# title:	Paite Chin

01001001	Atung in Pathian in lei leh vante asiam hi.
01001002	Lei tuh lim leh mel nei lou in, avuak kia ahi a, tui thukpi tung mial in amial hi. Pathian Kha in tuite tung a-opkhum hi.
01001003	Pathian in, “Vak om hen,” achi a, huchi in vak ahong omta hi.
01001004	Pathian in vak a-en a, hoih asa hi. Huchi in Pathian in mial a pan vak akhenkheta hi.
01001005	Pathian in vak, “Sun” achi a, mial, “Zan” achi hi. Huchi in ani khatna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01001006	Pathian in, “Tuite kikal ah vansin om henla, huai in tuite a pan tuite khenkhia hen,” achi hi.
01001007	Pathian in vansin abawl a, vansin tung a tui omte a pan vansin nuai a tui omte akhenkhia a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001008	Pathian in vansin, “Van” achi hi. Huchi in ani nihna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01001009	Pathian in, “Van nuai a tuite mun khat ah omkhawm uh henla, gamkeu hong dawk hen,” achi a; huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001010	Pathian in gamkeu, “Lei” achi a; tui omkhawmte Tuipite achi hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.
01001011	Pathian in, “Lei in loupate, anteh chi neite, thei sing lei a amau chi omdan ding bang zel a gah, agah sung a chi omte omsak hen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001012	Huchi in lei in loupate, anteh amau chi omdan ding bang a chi neite, sing amau chi omdan ding bang a gah, agah sung a chi omte a-omsak hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.
01001013	Huchi in ani thumna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01001014	Pathian in, “Sun leh zan khenna ding in vansin ah tanvakte om uhenla, huaite chiamtehnate, hunbite, nite leh kumte theihna hi uhen.
01001015	Lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah vakte om uhen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001016	Pathian in tanvak thupi nih abawl a; tanvak thupizaw pen sun a vaihawm ding in, tanvak thupi louzaw pen zan a vaihawm ding in abawl hi. Aksite leng abawl hi.
01001017	Pathian in huaite lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah akoih a;
01001018	sun tung leh zan tung a vaihawm ding leh vak leh mial khen ding in. Huchi in Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.
01001019	Huchi in ani lina ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01001020	Pathian in, “Tuite'n thilsiam tang thei hinna neite tampi pawtsak uhenla, vasate leng leitung a vansin hawm heuhou ah leng uhen,” achi hi.
01001021	Pathian in ngapi liante asiam a, ganhing tang thei chiteng tui in apawtsak a, amaute chi omdan ding bang leh kha nei vasa chiteng amaute chi omdan ding bang in asiam hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.
01001022	Pathian in, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, tuipi tuite dimsak unla, vasate leng lei ah pung uhen,” chi in avualzawl hi.
01001023	Huchi in ani ngana ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01001024	Pathian in, “Lei in ganhing amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in; gante, bokvak a pai ganhingte, gamsate, amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in pawtsak uhen,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001025	Pathian in gamsa amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, lei a thil bokvak a paite tengteng amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in abawl hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.
01001026	Pathian in, “I kibatpih in, eimah bang in mihing i bawl dia, tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, gante tung ah leh leitung tengteng tung ah thu i neisak ding,” achi hi.
01001027	Pathian in ama kibatpih in mihing asiam a, akibatpih mah in ahi asiam; pasal leh numei asiamta hi.
01001028	Pathian in amaute avualzawl hi. Pathian mah in akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, leitung luahdim unla, na thuthu un omsak un. Tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, thil hing leitung a bokvak a pai tengteng tung ah thu nei un,” achi hi.
01001029	Pathian mah in, “Ngai un, leitung tengteng a anteh chi nei om teng leh sing chiteng, sing chi nei gah omnate, ka hon pia hi; na an ding uh ahi.
01001030	Lei a gamsa chiteng kiang ah, tung a leng vasa chiteng kiang ah, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng kiang ah, hinna nei chiteng kiang ah a-an ding un loupa hing chiteng ka pia hi,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi.
01001031	Pathian in athilsiam tengteng a-en a, ngai in, hoih asa mahmah hi. Huchi in ani gukna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.
01002001	Huan lei leh vante leh asung a om tengteng siam zoh ahita hi.
01002002	Pathian in ani sagih ni in anasep azou a; huchi in ani sagih ni in anasep tengteng akhawlsanta hi.
01002003	Huai ni a Pathian in asiam leh abawl, anasep tengteng akhawlsan tak ziak in, Pathian in ani sagih ni vualzawl in, atangta hi.
01002004	Toupa Pathian in lei leh vante asiam ni a, lei leh vante siam ahih ua akisuansawndan uh hiai bang ahi.
01002005	Leitung ah gamlak loupa himhim a-om nai kei a, sing-le-louhing leng apou nai kei hi. Toupa Pathian in leitung ah vuah azusak nai kei a, lei let ding in mihing leng a-om nai kei hi.
01002006	Himahleh lei a pan tuihu ahong pawttou a, leitung tengteng anomsak hi.
01002007	Toupa Pathian in lei a leivui in mi abawl a, anakvangte ah hinna hu ahalut a; huai mi, hinna nei mihing ahong hita hi.
01002008	Toupa Pathian in suahlam a Eden ah huan abawl a; huai ah abawl pasal a-omsak hi.
01002009	Toupa Pathian in lei a kipan sing mit hiptak leh nek tuak chiteng apousak hi. Hinna sing leh asia leh apha theihna sing leng huan laizang ah apousak hi.
01002010	Eden a pan huan nomsak ding in lui aluang paisuak a; huai a kipan akazak a, ka li ahong hita hi.
01002011	Akhatna min Pishon ahi a, hiai Havilah gam tengteng kualkhum lui ahi a; huai dangka-eng omna ahi.
01002012	Huai gam a dangka-eng hoihtak ahi a, huai ah bedeli leh onik suang leng a-om hi.
01002013	Lui nihna min Gihon ahi a; huai lui in Kush gam tengteng akualkhum hi.
01002014	Lui thumna min Hiddekel ahi a; hiai Assuria gam suahlam a luang ahi. Lui lina bel Euphrates ahi.
01002015	Toupa Pathian in pasal api a, Eden huan ah akem ding leh aveng ding in akoihta hi.
01002016	Toupa Pathian in pasal kiang ah, “Huan a singgah chiteng na ut-ut na ne thei hi.
01002017	Asia leh apha theihna singgah bel na ne ding ahi kei. Na nekleh na nek ni mah in na si ngeingei ding hi,” chi in thu apia hi.
01002018	Toupa Pathian in, “Pasal amah kia a-om ahoih kei. Amah panpihtu dia kilawm ka bawlsak ding,” achi hi.
01002019	Toupa Pathian in leitung a kipan gamsa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng abawl hi. Amin ding ua bang sak ding ahia chih theihna ding in Adam kiang ah apikhawm hi. Ganhing chiteng amin uh Adam in ana phuah, huai amin uh ahi denta hi.
01002020	Adam in ganhing tengteng, tung a leng vasa tengteng leh gamsa chiteng min aphuak chiat hi. Himahleh Adam panpihtu ding muh in a-om kei hi.
01002021	Toupa Pathian in nuamtak in Adam a-ihmusak a, huchi in a-ihmuta a; anakguh khat alakhia a, alakkhiakna mun sa in adimsak hi.
01002022	Toupa Pathian in Adam a pan alak nakguh a kipan in numei abawl a, Adam kiang ah apita hi.
01002023	Adam in, “Hiai pen zaw ka guh a kipan guh, ka sa a kipan sa ahi. Pasal a kipan lakkhiak ahih ziak in, Numei, chih ding ahi,” achi hi.
01002024	Huaiziak in pasal in anu leh apa apaisan ding a, azi ah abelh ding. Huchi in sa khat ahong hita ding uh.
01002025	Adam leh azi vuaktang ahi tuak ua, azum tuan kei uhi.
01003001	Huan Toupa Pathian in gamsa abawl tengteng lak ah gul agitlouhpil pen hi. Ama'n numei kiang ah, “Pathian in, ‘Huan a singgah himhim na ne ding uh ahi kei chi ahi maw?’ ” achi hi.
01003002	Numei in gul kiang ah, “Chi lou e, huan a singgahte ne thei mah ung,
01003003	himahleh huan laizang a singgah pen ahihleh Pathian in, ‘Na ne ding uh ahi kei, khoih leng na khoih ding uh ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw na si ding uh chi aka,’ ” achi hi.
01003004	Gul in numei kiang ah, “Si zenzen lou e.
01003005	Na nek ni ua pat na mit uh ahong vak dia, asia leh apha thei in Pathian na hong bang ding uh, chih Pathian in thei kilkel ei ve,” achi hi.
01003006	Numei in singgah nek theih ahi chih leh mit hiptak ahi chih leh mi pilsak ding a singgah etlahhuai ahi, chih atheih in agah alou a, aneta hi. Akiang a om apasal leng apia a, ama'n leng aneta hi.
01003007	Anih un amit uh ahong vakta a, vuaktang ahih lam uh hong kithei ua; theipi nah khuikhawm in, puan akibawltawm uhi.
01003008	Toupa Pathian, nitaklam ninem a huan a vak thawmging aza ua; Adam leh azi in huan a sing lak ah Toupa Pathian ana kibuksan uhi.
01003009	Toupa Pathian in Adam asam a, akiang ah, “Koi a om na hia?” achi hi.
01003010	Ama'n, “Huan ah na thawmging ka za a, vuaktang ka hih ziak in ka lau a; ka na kibuta,” achi hi.
01003011	Ama'n, “Vuaktang na hih kua'n hon hilh ahia? Singgah nek louh ding ka chih ne na hita maw?” achi hi.
01003012	Adam in, “Hon ompih dia na hon piak numei in singgah hon pia a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.
01003013	Toupa Pathian in numei kiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Numei in, “Gul in hon zekhem a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.
01003014	Toupa Pathian in gul kiang ah, “Hichibang a na hih ziak in ganhing tengteng leh gamsa chiteng lak ah hamsiat na hi tuanse ding a, bokvak in na pai gigeta ding a, na damsung in leivui na neta ding.
01003015	Nang leh numei ka hon kidousak ding a, na suante leh asuante leng ka kidousak lai ding. Huai in na lutang asidupsak ding a, nang akhetul na sidupsak ding,” achi hi.
01003016	Numei kiang ah, “Na haksatna leh na naupaina nakpi in ka pungsak ding a; haksatak in tate na nei ding. Huan na lunggulh na pasal a ahi ding a, ama'n na tung ah thu anei ding,” achi hi.
01003017	Adam kiang ah, “Na zi thu na man a, singgah na ne ding ahi kei, chi a, ka hon thupiak na nek ziak in nang ziak in leitung hamsiat in a-omta. Na damsung teng in gimtak a sem in agah na neta ding.
01003018	Ling leh louling neite leng ahon omsak ding a, lei a anteh na neta ding hi.
01003019	Lei a na kik nawn masiah na mai a kho-ul luang puappuap in an na neta ding. Lei a pan lakkhiak na hi; leivui na hi a, leivui ah na kik nawn ding,” achi hi.
01003020	Adam in azi, mihing tengteng' nu ahih ziak in, amin Evi asa hi.
01003021	Toupa Pathian in Adam a ding leh azi a ding in savun puanaktual bawlsak in, asilhsak hi.
01003022	Toupa Pathian in, “Ngai un, mihing in asia leh apha thei in eite bang ahong hita, tu in akhut ua sawk in hinna singgah lou a ne in, tangtawn in ahing kha ding uh,” achi hi.
01003023	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in amah alakkhiakna lei let ding in Eden huan a kipan ahawlkheta hi.
01003024	Mihingte adelhkheta a; hinna sing lampi veng ding in Eden huan suahlam pang ah cherubte leh mei namsau kilek zualzual a-omsakta hi.
01004001	Huan Adam in azi Evi athei a; huchi in agai a, Kain anei a, “ Toupa panpihna in ta pasal ka neita,” achi hi.
01004002	Asanggampa Abel ahon nei nawn hi. Abel belamchingmi ahi a, Kain bel leiletmi ahi.
01004003	Anung in hichi ahong hi a, Kain in Toupa kiang a lat ding in lou a piang leigahte ahon tawi hi.
01004004	Abel in leng abelamhon lak a piang masapen leh athau pen ahon tawi a, Toupa'n Abel leh athillat akipahpih hi.
01004005	Himahleh Kain leh athillat akipahpih kei. Kain aheh mahmah a, amel aliap hi.
01004006	Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Bangziak a heh na hia? Bangziak a na mel liap ahia?
01004007	Hihhoih lechin pahtak na loh kei dia hia? Na hihhoih keileh kongkhak bul ah khelhna akual nilouh a, adeihlam nangmah ahi dia, atung ah thu na nei ding ahi,” achi hi.
01004008	Kain in anau Abel ahoupih a, hichi ahong hi a, lou a a-om lai un Kain in anau Abel asual a, athatta hi.
01004009	Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Abel koi a om ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka thei kei, ka sanggampa dontu ka hi a hia?” achi hi.
01004010	Toupa'n , “Bang hih na tamai a? Na sanggampa' sisan aw in lei a kipan hon sam ahi.
01004011	Huaiziak in na khut a kipan na sanggampa' sisan sang ding a kam ana ka, lei a pan hamsiat na hita hi.
01004012	Lei na leh in leng ahoihna ahon pe nawn kei ding a, leitung ah galtai leh vakvai na hita ding,” achi hi.
01004013	Kain in Toupa kiang ah, “N'on gawtna ana mahmah a, ka thuakzou kei ding.
01004014	“Ngai in, tuni in leitung a kipan na hon delhkheta a, na mitmuh phak louh a sel a om ding ka hita. Lei ah taimang leh vakvai hi ding ka hita hi. Hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh kei hon mu in ahon that mai ding uh,” achi hi.
01004015	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Huchi ahihleh, Kain that kuapeuh amun sagih in atung ah phu lak ahi ding,” achi hi. Huan mi amah mu kuahiam in athahlouhna ding in Toupa'n Kain achiamtehta hi.
01004016	Toupa kiang a kipan Kain apawt a, Eden suahlam a Nod gam ah atengta hi.
01004017	Kain in azi athei a; huchi in agai a, Enok anei hi. Khua asat a, akho min atapa tamsak in Enok asa hi.
01004018	Enok in tapa Irad anei a; Irad in tapa Mahujael anei hi. Mahujael in tapa Methusael anei a; Methusael in tapa Lamekh anei hi.
01004019	Lamekh in zi nih anei a; khat min Adah ahi a, akhat pen min Zillah ahi.
01004020	Adah in Jabal anei a; amah puanin a om ganvulmite suangpa ahi.
01004021	Asanggampa' min Jubal ahi a, amah kaihging leh tamngai tummi tengteng suangpa ahi.
01004022	Zillah in leng Tubal-kain, dal leh sik, tuzat-heizat chiteng sekmi anei hi. Tubal-kain sanggamnu Naamah ahi.
01004023	Lamekh in azite kiang ah, “Adah leh Zillahte aw, ka aw za unla; Lamekh zite aw, ka thugen ngaikhia un. Ahon liamsak ziak in mi khat ka that a, ahon sidupsak ziak in valnou khat ka that hi.
01004024	Kain' phu bawn amun sagih a lak ding ahihleh, Lamekh' phu amun sawmsagih-le-sagih a lak ahi ding,” achi hi.
01004025	Adam in azi athei nawn a; tapa anei nawn a; amin Seth asa hi, “Pathian in Abel sik in chisuan ding ahon sehsakta; Kain in lah amah athatta ngal a,” achi hi.
01004026	Seth in leng tapa anei a; amin Enosh asa hi. Huai a kipan mite'n Toupa min alou panta uhi.
01005001	Hiai Adam suante khangthubu ahi. Pathian in mihing asiam ni in Pathian batpih in amah abawl hi.
01005002	Pasal leh numei in amaute asiam a; avualzawl a, siam a a-om ni un amin uh Adam asa hi.
01005003	Adam in kum za-le-sawmthum ahih in amah mah bang, akibatpih ngei tapa anei a; amin Seth asa hi.
01005004	Seth aneih nung in Adam kum zagiat adam lai a; tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005005	Adam damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawmthum ahi a; huchi in asita hi.
01005006	Seth in kum za-le-nga ahih in, tapa Enosh anei hi.
01005007	Enosh aneih nung in Seth kum zagiat-le-sagih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005008	Seth damsung tengteng kum zakua sawm-le-nih ahi a; huchi in asita hi.
01005009	Enosh in kum sawmkua ahih in tapa Kenan anei hi.
01005010	Kenan aneih nung in Enosh kum zagiat sawm-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005011	Enosh damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi.
01005012	Kenan in kum sawmsagih ahih in, tapa Mahalalel anei hi.
01005013	Mahalalel aneih nung in Kenan kum zagiat-le-sawmli adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005014	Kenan damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawm ahi a; huchi in asita hi.
01005015	Mahalalel kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in tapa Jared anei hi.
01005016	Jared aneih nung in Mahalalel kum zagiat-le-sawmthum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005017	Mahalalel damsung tengteng kum zagiat sawmkua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi.
01005018	Jared in kum zakhat sawmguk-le-nih ahih in tapa Enok anei hi.
01005019	Enok aneih nung in Jared kum zagiat adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005020	Jared damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-nih ahi a, huchi in asita hi.
01005021	Enok in kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in, tapa Methuselah anei hi.
01005022	Methuselah aneih nung in Enok kum zathum sung Pathian toh atonkhawm ua, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005023	Enok damsung tengteng kum zathum sawmguk-le-nga ahi.
01005024	Pathian toh Enok atonkhawm ua, amah a-omta kei a; Pathian in alata hi.
01005025	Methuselah in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-sagih ahih in tapa Lamekh anei hi.
01005026	Lamekh aneih nung in Methuselah kum zasagih sawmgiat-le-nih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005027	Methuselah damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-kua ahi a, huchi in asita hi.
01005028	Lamekh in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-nih ahih in tapa anei hi.
01005029	“Hiai ngei in Toupa hamsiatkhum leitung ziak a i nasepna leh khut a i sepgimna ah hon lungmuan ding,” chi in amin Noah asa hi.
01005030	Noah aneih nung in Lamekh kum zanga sawmkua-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01005031	Lamekh damsung tengteng kum zasagih sawmsagih-le-sagih ahi a; huchi in asita hi.
01005032	Noah kum zanga a upa ahi. Noah in Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi.
01006001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, leitung a mite ahong pun ua, tanute ahon neih un,
01006002	Pathian tapate'n mite tanute melhoih in amu ua; adeihlam chiat uh zi in anei uhi.
01006003	Toupa'n , “Ka Kha in tangtawn in mi asual nilouh kei ding, amah lah sa ahi ngal a, himahleh kum za-le-sawmnih adam ding,” achi hi.
01006004	Huai hun lai in lei ah miliante a-om ua; huai nung in leng Pathian tapate'n mite tanute thei a, amau toh tate aneih zel lai un, huaite mah nidanglai a mihat, miminthangte ahi uhi.
01006005	Toupa'n lei ah mite gitlouhdan nasa ahi chih leh alungtang lunggeldan uh gilou ngen ahi ngitnget chih amu hi.
01006006	Leitung a mi abawl ziak in Toupa akisik a, lunggimna in aneihloh hi.
01006007	Toupa'n , “Leitung a kipan ka misiam ka hihmang mai ding. Mite, sate, ganhingte leh tung a leng vasate tan in; ka bawl ziak in ka kisik,” achi hi.
01006008	Noah in bel Toupa mitmuh in deihsakna atang hi.
01006009	Noah suan hiaite ahi uh: Noah midik ahi a, adam tonpihte lak ah gensiatbei ahi a; Pathian toh Noah atonkhawm uhi.
01006010	Noah in tapa thum Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi.
01006011	Pathian' mitmuh in lei asia a, hiamgamna in lei adim khin hi.
01006012	Huan Pathian in lei a-en a, ngai in, asegawp a; sa tengteng in leitung ah a-omdan uh ahihse khinta uhi.
01006013	Pathian in Noah kiang ah, “Sa tengteng beina ka ma ah ahong tungta; amaute ziak in hiamgamna in leitung adim khinta ngal a. Ngai in, leitung toh amau ka hihmang ding.
01006014	Nang a ding in meilah sing in long bawl inla; long ah dantante na bawl ding ahi. Asunglam leh apolam meilah nai in na zut vek ding hi.
01006015	Hiai na bawldan ding ahi. Long dunglam tong zathum hi henla, availam tong sawmnga hi henla, asanlam tong sawmthum hi hen.
01006016	Long ah tohlet na bawl ding a, atunglam tong khat chiang a na zoh ding ahi. Apang ah long kongkhak na bawl ding a; chial nuainung leh chial nihna leh chial thumna nei in na bawl ding ahi.
01006017	Ngai in, kei mahmah in, sa tengteng hinna hatna pai khempeuh, van nuai a kipan hihmangthang ding in leitung ah tuichim ka tungsak ding a; lei a thil chih omte asi vek ding uh.
01006018	Himahleh nang toh ka thukhun ka kipsak ding a, long ah na lut ding ahi. Nang na lut ding a, na tapate leh na zi leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah alut ding uh ahi.
01006019	Sa tengteng a thil hing chiteng lak a kipan, chi chih nihnih in, na kiang ah hinsak ding in long ah na pilut ding ahi. Amaute anu leh apa zel ahi ding uhi.
01006020	Vasate amau chi omdan bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan bang chiat in, chi chih nihnih in na hinsak ding in na kiang ah ahong pai ding uh ahi.
01006021	Nek theih an chi tuamtuam kaikhawm inla, na kiang ah koih in. Nang leh amaute a ding in an ahi ding uh,” achi hi.
01006022	Huchibang in Noah in ahih a; Pathian in akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi.
01007001	Huan Toupa'n Noah kiang ah, “Nang leh na inkuanpih tengteng long ah lutta un. Nang zaw hiai khang a ka ma ah midiktat na hih ka hon mu hi.
01007002	Sa siang chiteng lak ah anu leh apa, kop sagih zel; sa siang lou lak ah anu leh apa chiat toh kop nih zel, na kiang ah na pi ding ahi.
01007003	Tung a leng vasa lak ah leng, anu leh apa chiat, kop sagih zel in; leitung a chi khah ding a hinsak ding in.
01007004	Ni sagih in asam lai a, huai khit chiang in leitung ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung vuah ka zusak ding a; ka bawl thil hing chiteng leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding,” achi hi.
01007005	Noah in Toupa'n akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi.
01007006	Leitung a tuichim ahong tun lai in, Noah kum zaguk a upa ahita hi.
01007007	Tuichim atun ding ziak in long ah Noah alut a, atapate leh azi leh atapate' zite leng akiang ah alut chiat uhi.
01007008	Sa siang lak ah leng, sa siang lou lak ah leng, vasa lak ah leng, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng lak ah leng,
01007009	Pathian in Noah kiang a thu apiak bang in, anu leh apa chiat, akopkop in, Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi.
01007010	Huan ni sagih nung in leitung ah tuichim atungta hi.
01007011	Noah kum zaguk ahih kum, akha nihna, ani sawm-le-sagih ni in, huai ni mah in tui thuk zapi nak tengteng ahong puakzak a, van tohlette leng hong kihongta uhi.
01007012	Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung teng leitung ah vuahpi azuta hi.
01007013	Huai ni mah in long ah Noah leh Noah tapate Shem, Ham, Japheth leh Noah zi alut ua, atapate zi thumte leng akiang ah alut uhi.
01007014	Amaute alut ua, sa chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, ganhing leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, kha nei chiteng leng alut uhi.
01007015	Sa tengteng hinna hatna pai himhimte, akopkop in Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi.
01007016	Alutte Pathian in akiang a thu apiak bang in, sa tengteng lak a anu leh apa zel in alut uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n amah akhakkhumta hi.
01007017	Leitung ah ni sawmli sung teng tuichim atung a; tui ahong khang a, long alam a, leitung ah adomkangta hi.
01007018	Tui ahong om zuazua a, leitung ah akhan in ahong khang a, tui tung ah long akilam hi.
01007019	Leitung ah tui nakpi in ahong om zuazua a; van nuai a tang sang tengtengte atum khin vekta hi.
01007020	Tong sawm-le-nga hial a sang in tui ahong om a; tangte tupmang in a-omta uhi.
01007021	Lei a tang thei sa chiteng, vasate, gante, gamsate, ganhing lei a bokvak a pai chitengte, michih tengte toh asi khin vek uhi.
01007022	Anak ua hinna kha hatna omna tengteng, gam a om tengteng asi khin vek uhi.
01007023	Leitung a thil hing chiteng omte, mite, gante, ganhingte, tung a leng vasate toh hihmang in a-om ua; lei a kipan hihman in a-omta ua, long sung a om Noah leh akiang a omte kia hawi in a-om uhi.
01007024	Ni za-le-sawmnga sung teng leitung ah tui avung hi.
01008001	Huan Pathian in Noah leh long sung a akiang a thil hing chiteng leh ganta om tengteng atheigige a; Pathian in leitung ah huih anungsak a, tui ahong dai panta hi.
01008002	Tui thukpi nakte leh van tohlette hong kikhakta ua, van a kipan vuah leng theusak ahita.
01008003	Lei a kipan tui akiam giaigiai a; ni za-le-sawmnga nung in tui hong tawm deuhta a,
01008004	akha sagihna ani sawm-le-sagih ni in Ararat tang ah long ahong kinga hi.
01008005	Akha sawmna tan in tui akiam giaigiai zel a; akha sawmna ani khat ni in mualvumte akimuta hi.
01008006	Ni sawmli nung in hichi ahong hi a, Noah in abawl long tohlet ahongta hi.
01008007	Va-ak khat akhahkhia a, leitung a kipan tui akan khit masiah huai va-ak avial lenlen hi.
01008008	Leitung ah tui atawmta hia, tawm nai lou, chih theihna ding in vakhu khat akhahkhe nawn hi.
01008009	Himahleh vakhu in tukna ding himhim amu kei a, akiang ah long ah akik nawn a; tui lah leitung pumpi ah a-om lai ngal a. Polam ah akhut agolhkhia a, long sung ah akiang ah ana lalut nawn hi.
01008010	Ni sagih dang angak lai a; long a kipan vakhu akhahkhe nawn hi.
01008011	Nitaklam in akiang ah vakhu ahong lut nawn a; ngai in, amuk in olive nah khat ahon tuah hi. Noah in leitung ah tui atawmta chih atheita hi.
01008012	Ni sagih dang angak nawn a; vakhu akhahkhe nawn a; akiang ah hong kik nawn kei hi.
01008013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum zaguk-le-khatna, akha khatna, ani khat ni in, leitung a kipan tui akangta hi. Noah in long khuhna akoihsuan a, a-en a; ngai in, leitung ahulta hi.
01008014	Akha nihna ani sawmnih-le-sagih ni in leitung ahulta hi.
01008015	Pathian in Noah kiang ah thu agen a;
01008016	“Long a kipan nang pawt inla, na zi leh na tapate leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah pawt uhen.
01008017	Sa tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng na ompihte, vasate, gante, leitung a bokvak a pai ganhing chitengte toh na kiang ah pikhia in, leitung a chiphatak a chi tampi suang a ahong puntheihna ding un,” achi hi.
01008018	Noah apawt a, atapate leh azi leh atapate' zite leng akiang ah apawt uhi.
01008019	Sa chiteng, ganhing chiteng, vasa chiteng, leitung a tang thei peuhmahte amau chi omdan dungzui zel in long a kipan apawtta uhi.
01008020	Noah in Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a; sa siang chiteng lak leh vasa siang chiteng lak a kipan ala a, maitam ah halmang pumpiaknate alanta hi.
01008021	Toupa'n huai gim namtui aza a; Toupa'n alungsim in, “Mite ziak in leitung ka hamsiat nawn kei ding, mite lungsim ngaihtuahnate lah tuailai ahih a kipan gilou ahi ngal ua. Tua ka gawt bang in thil hing chiteng leng ka gawt nawn kei ding.
01008022	“Leitung a-om lai teng buhtuh leh buhlakte, khovot leh kholumte, nipi leh phalbite, sun leh zante abei kei ding,” achi hi.
01009001	Huan Pathian in Noah leh atapate avualzawl a, akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, lei hon luahdim un.
01009002	Leitung a sa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng in nou kihtakna leh lauhna anei ding uh. Hiaite leh lei a bokvak a pai tengteng leh tuipi a ngasa tengteng na khut ua piak ahita uhi.
01009003	Thil hing tang thei chitengte nou a ding in nek ding ahi ding ua; anteh hing ka hon piak bang in bangkim ka hon pe vek hi.
01009004	Himahleh sa, ahinna sisan toh zaw na nekhawm ding uh ahi kei.
01009005	Na hinna sisan phu ka la ngeingei ding. Sa chiteng lak ah ka la ding a; mi lak ah leng. Michih asanggamte uh lak ah, mite hinna phu ka la chiat ding.
01009006	“Mi sisan suahmi kuapeuh, huai mi mah in ama sisan asuah ding, Pathian batpih a mihing bawl ahi ngal a.
01009007	“Nou chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, ta leh nau tampi nei unla, leitung ah hong pung un,” achi hi.
01009008	Pathian in Noah kiang leh akiang a om atapate kiang ah,
01009009	“Ngai un, kei mahmah in na kiang uah leh na nung ua na suante uh kiang ah leng ka thukhun ka hihkip hi.
01009010	Na kiang ua om thil hing chiteng, na ompih uh vasate, gante, na ompih uh lei a sa chitengte kiang ah leng; long a kipan hong pawt tengteng, lei a sa chiteng kiang nangawn ah.
01009011	Na kiang uah ka thukhun ka hihkip ding; sa tengteng leng tuichim a hihman in a-om nawn kei ding ua; lei hihse ding in tuichim atung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
01009012	Pathian mah in, “Kei leh nou leh na kiang ua thil hing chiteng omte kal a, suan tawp nei lou a omte a ding in, hiai ka thukhun chiamtehna ahi ding hi.
01009013	Meipi ah ka sakhituihup ka zamsak a, huai kei leh lei kal a thukhun chiamtehna ding ahi.
01009014	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, leitung a meipi ka kaisak in meipi ah sakhituihup akimu ding hi.
01009015	Kei leh nou leh sa tengteng lak a thil hing chitengte kal a, ka thukhun om ka theigige ding. Sa tengteng hihmang ding in tui alet nawn kei ding hi.
01009016	Meipi a sakhituihup azam chiang in, Pathian leh leitung a sa om tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng kal a tangtawn thukhun om ka theihgige theihna ding in ka en zel ding,” achi hi.
01009017	Pathian mah in Noah kiang ah, “Hiai kei leh leitung a sa om tengteng kal a ka thukhun hihkip chiamtehna ahi,” achi nawn hi.
01009018	Noah tapa long a kipan pawtte Shem, Ham leh Japheth ahi uhi (Kanaan pa Ham ahi).
01009019	Hiai mi thumte Noah tapate ahi ua, amaute a kipan pawtte'n leitung pumpi azelsuak uhi.
01009020	Louneimi in Noah ahong om pan a, grephuan abawl hi.
01009021	Uain adawn a, akham a; apuanin ah alumkhialta hi.
01009022	Kanaan pa Ham in apa lumkhial amu a, inpua a om a-unau nihte ava hilh hi.
01009023	Shem leh Japheth in puan ala ua, aliang ua kizawn in anung pai ua, apa uh lumkhial ava khuh uhi. Amai uh lehlam nga in apa uh lumkhial amu kei uhi.
01009024	Noah, uain kham ahong halh a, atung a atapa naupangpen in ahihdan ahon theita hi.
01009025	“Kanaan hamsiat in om hen. Asanggamte sikhate sikha ahi ding,” achi hi.
01009026	“Shem Toupa Pathian phat in om hen. Asikha in Kanaan om hen.
01009027	Pathian in Japheth hihlian henla, Asikha in Kanaan om hen,” achi lai hi.
01009028	Tuichim tun nung in Noah kum zathum-le-sawmnga adam hi.
01009029	Noah damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawmnga ahi a; huchi in asita hi.
01010001	Hiaite Noah tapa Shem, Ham leh Japheth suante ahi uh. Tuichim tun nung in tapate anei chiat uhi.
01010002	Japheth tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshek leh Tiras ahi uh.
01010003	Gomer tapate: Ashkenaz, Riphath leh Togarmah ahi uh.
01010004	Javan tapate: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim leh Dodanim ahi uh.
01010005	Huaite a kipan in Zentelte, amau pau leh amau nam dungzui zel in, amau chite omna tuikulh gam, amau gamte ah akikhenzak uhi.
01010006	Ham tapate: Kush, Mizraim, Put leh Kanaan ahi uh.
01010007	Kush tapate: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah leh Sabtekhah ahi uh. Raamah tapate: Sheba leh Dedan ahi uh.
01010008	Kush in tapa Nimrod anei hi. Amah leitung ah mihattak ahong hi panta hi.
01010009	Toupa ma ah sabengmi hattak ahi a; huaiziak in ahi, “ Toupa ma a sabet hattak Nimrod bang ahi,” achih zel uh.
01010010	Alal patna Shinar gam a Babel khua, Erek khua, Akkad khua leh Shinar gam a Kalneh khua ahi uh.
01010011	Huai gam a kipan apawt a, Assuria gam ah alut a, Nineveh khua, Rehoboth-Ir khua leh Kalah khua asat hi.
01010012	Nineveh leh Kalah kikal ah Resen khua asat a, huai Resen khua thupitak ahi.
01010013	Mizraim in Ludte, Anamte, Lehabte, Naphtuhte,
01010014	Pathruste leh Kasluhte, Philistiate leh Kaphtorte pawtna asuang hi.
01010015	Kanaan in tapa masa Zidon anei a, Heth leng anei lai a,
01010016	Jebuste, Amorte, Girgaste;
01010017	Hivte, Arkate, Sinte;
01010018	Arvadte, Zemarte, Hamathte asuang; huai nung in Kanaan namte akithehzakta uhi.
01010019	Kanaante gamgi Zidon a kipan Gerar, Gaza, Sodom leh Gomorrah, Admah, Zeboim leh Lasa khua tan ahi.
01010020	Huaite, anamte dungzui zel leh apaute, agamte leh anamte lak ua dungzui zel in Ham suante ahi uh.
01010021	Shem, Eber ta tengteng suangpa, Japheth upa'n leng tate anei hi.
01010022	Shem tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud leh Aram ahi uh.
01010023	Aram tapate: Uz, Hul, Gether leh Mash ahi uh.
01010024	Arpakshad in tapa Shelah anei a; Shelah in tapa Eber anei hi.
01010025	Eber in tapa nih anei a: khat min Peleg ahi a, adam lai a leitung akikhen ziak in; anau min Joktan ahi.
01010026	Joktan in tapa Almodad, Seleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah;
01010027	Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah;
01010028	Obal, Abimael, Sheba;
01010029	Ophir, Havilah leh Jobab anei a; huai tengteng Joktan tapate ahi uh.
01010030	Atenna uh Mesha a kipan suahlam tang Sephar tan ahi.
01010031	Huaite Shem suante ahi ua; anamte dungzui zel leh apaute dungzui zel in, agamte ah leh achite dungzui zel in.
01010032	Huaite Noah suan namte ahi ua, asuante uh dungzui zel in achite uh lak ah; tuichim tun nung in huaite a kipan ahi a; lei a chi chih khenkhiak ahi uhi.
01011001	Huan lei a mi tengteng in pau khat leh paudan khat anei uhi.
01011002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, suahlam a kipan akisuan zel lai un, Shinar gam ah phaizang amu ua; huai ah atengta uhi.
01011003	“Kisa un, teklei i bawl ding a, hoihtak in i hal ding,” akichita uhi. Suang sik in teklei anei ua, suang hukna sik in longnai anei uhi.
01011004	“Kisa un, khopi i bawl ding a, avum in van sun ding in insang i bawl ding ua, i min i thangsak ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw leitung pumpi ah thehdalh in i om kha ding,” achi uhi.
01011005	Mite tate' khopi leh insang lam en ding in Toupa ahohsuk hi.
01011006	Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua, mite pum khat ahi ua, avek un lah pau khat anei ngal ua; hiai thil ahih pan uhi. Tu'n zaw athil hihtupte uh leng kham vual ahita kei ding.
01011007	Kisa un, i va hohsuk ding ua, pau akitheihtuah louhna ding un, apau uh i va suk lamdangsak ding,” akichi uhi.
01011008	Huchi in Toupa'n amaute huai a pan leitung tengteng ah adalhsak hi. Huchi in akhopi bawl uh atawpsanta uhi.
01011009	Huaiziak in amin Babel achi ua; Toupa'n leitung tengteng ah amaute adalhsakta hi.
01011010	Hiaite Shem suante ahi uh. Shem kum zakhat a upa ahi a; tuichim tun nung kum nih nung in tapa Arpakshad anei hi.
01011011	Arpakshad aneih nung in Shem kum zanga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011012	Arpakshad in kum sawmthum-le-nga ahih in tapa Shelah anei hi.
01011013	Shelah aneih nung in Arpakshad kum zali-le-thum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011014	Shelah in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Eber anei hi.
01011015	Eber aneih nung in Shelah kum zali-le-thum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011016	Eber in kum sawmthum-le-li ahih in tapa Peleg anei hi.
01011017	Peleg aneih nung in Eber kum zali-le-sawmthum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011018	Peleg in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Reu anei hi.
01011019	Reu aneih nung in Peleg kum zanih-le-kua adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011020	Reu in kum sawmthum-le-nih ahih in, tapa Serug anei hi.
01011021	Serug aneih nung in Reu kum zanih-le-sagih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011022	Serug in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Nahor anei hi.
01011023	Nahor aneih nung in Serug kum zanih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011024	Nahor in kum sawmnih-le-kua ahih in tapa Terah anei hi.
01011025	Terah aneih nung in Nahor kum za-le-sawmkua adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi.
01011026	Terah in kum sawmsagih ahih in tapate Abram, Nahor leh Haran anei hi.
01011027	Hiaite Terah suante ahi ua: Terah in tapa Abram, Nahor leh Haran anei a; Haran in tapa Lot anei hi.
01011028	Haran ahihleh apianna gam, Kaldaite khua Ur ah, apa Terah ma in asi hi.
01011029	Abram leh Nahor in zi anei ua; Abram zi min Sarai ahi a, Nahor zi min Haran tanu Milkah ahi. Haran ahihleh Milkah pa leh Iskah pa ahi.
01011030	Sarai achiing a; ta himhim anei kei.
01011031	Terah in atapa Abram, atapa Haran tapa Lot, amou, atapa Abram zi Sarai api a; Kanaan a hoh ding in Kaldaite khua Ur a kipan apawtkhekhawm uhi. Haran ahong tung ua, huai ah ateng uhi.
01011032	Terah damsung kum zanih-le-nga ahi a, Haran ah Terah asi hi.
01012001	Huan Toupa'n Abram kiang ah, “Na khua a kipan leh na tanaute a kipan leh na pa inn a kipan pawt inla, ka hon etsak ding gam ah pai in.
01012002	Chi thupi mahmah in ka hon bawl dia, ka hon vualzawl ding a, na min ka hih thupi ding. Nang vualzawlna na hi ding hi.
01012003	“Nang hon vualzawl peuhmah ka vualzawl ding a, hon hamsiat peuhmah ka hamsiat ding. Nang ah leitung a nam chih vualzawl in a-om ding uh,” achi hi.
01012004	Toupa'n akiang a agen bang in Abram akuankheta a; Lot in azui hi. Haran a kipan Abram apawt lai in kum sawmsagih-le-nga a upa ahi.
01012005	Abram in azi Sarai leh asanggampa' tapa Lot leh athil kaihkhawm tengteng uh leh Haran khua a, ami neih tengteng uh api a; Kanaan gam a teng ding in apawt ua; Kanaan gam atung uhi.
01012006	Abram huai gam a Shekem mun pha in, Moreh tosaw tan in apai zel hi. Huai lai in, huai gam ah Kanaante ateng uhi.
01012007	Abram kiang ah Toupa akilak a, “Na suante kiang ah hiai gam ka pe ding,” achi hi. Huai ah akiang a kilak Toupa a ding in maitam adoh hi.
01012008	Huai a kipan Bethel suahlam a tanggam ah akisuan a, huai ah apuanin akai hi. Atumlam ah Bethel a-om a, asuahlam ah Ai khua a-om hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh nawn a, Toupa min alou hi.
01012009	Sim gam lam zuan in Abram akisuan lai hi.
01012010	Huai gam ah kial akia a; huai gam anak kial mahmah ziak in, Aigupta gam a om tadih ding in Abram apaisuk hi.
01012011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam lut ding a akisak lai un, azi Sarai kiang ah, “Ngai in, numei melhoihtak na hi, chih ka thei hi.
01012012	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Aiguptate'n nang ahon muh chiang un, ‘Hiai azi ahi,’ achi ding ua; kei hon that in, nang ahon hawi ding uh.
01012013	Nang ziak a hoihtak a ka omtheihna ding in leh nang vang a ka hintheihna ding in, hehpih in asanggamnu ka hi chi zel in,” achi hi.
01012014	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta a Abram alutleh, Aiguptate'n numei amu ua, amel hoih ana sa mahmah uhi.
01012015	Pharaoh miliante'n leng amu ua, Pharaoh kiang ah ahoihdan agen uhi. Huchi in numei Pharaoh inn ah apilutta uhi.
01012016	Ama'n Sarai ziak in Abram hoihtak in abawl a; belamte, bawngte, sabengtungpate, sikhapate, sikhanute, sabengtungnute leh sangawngsaute aneihloh hial hi.
01012017	Toupa'n Abram zi Sarai ziak in Pharaoh leh a-inkuante tung ah hipi khawktak atungsak hi.
01012018	Pharaoh in Abram asam a, “Ka tung a na thilhih bangchidan amai a? Na zi ahi chih bangziak a hon hilh lou na hia? Bangziak a, ‘Ka sanggamnu ahi,’ chi na hia?
01012019	Huaiziak akei maw, ka zi ding a ka na neih hial, huaiziak in, tu'n en in, na zi pi inla, paimang in,” achi hi.
01012020	Pharaoh in atungthu ah mi kiang ah thu apia a, azi leh aneih tengteng toh asawlkhia hi.
01013001	Aigupta gam a kipan Abram pawt in simlam ah apaitou a, akiang ah azi, aneih tengteng leh Lot leng apaitou hi.
01013002	Abram tuh ganta, dangkate leh dangka-engte in ahausa mahmah hi.
01013003	Negev a kipan Bethel tan in apai zel a, Bethel leh Ai khua kikal atung a, achil a apuanin akaihna mun tanpha,
01013004	maitam adoh masakna mun mah ah Abram in Toupa min alou hi.
01013005	Lot leng Abram kiang a pai in, belamhonte, bawnghonte leh puaninte anei hi.
01013006	A-omkhawmna ding un gam akichingta kei a; avan neih uh atam mahmah ziak in, a-omkhawm thei nawnta kei uhi.
01013007	Abram ganpute leh Lot ganpute kikal ah kiselna ahong omta a; huai lai in huai gam ah Kanaante leh Perizte ateng uhi.
01013008	Abram in Lot kiang ah, “Hehpih in, nang leh kei kikal ah, na ganpute leh ka ganpute kikal ah leng kiselna om kei hen; unau lah i hi ngal a,” achi hi.
01013009	“Gam pumpi na ma ah a-om kei a hia? Hehpih in ka kiang a kipan tuam om mai in. Nang veilam a na paileh, kei taklam ah ka pai ding, ahihkeileh, nang taklam a na paileh, kei veilam ah ka pai ding,” achi hi.
01013010	Lot adak a, Zoar kholam zuan in, Jordan Phaizang tengteng, Toupa huan bang ahihkeileh Aigupta gam bang in, gam chih a tui tampi omna ahi chih athei hi: Toupa'n Sodom leh Gomorrah ahihsiat ma lah ahi ngal a.
01013011	Lot in Jordan Phaizang tengteng atelta hi. Suahlam ah Lot akisuan a; huchi in akikhenta uhi.
01013012	Kanaan gam ah Abram ateng a, phaizang khopite ah Lot ateng a, Sodom khua pha in apuanin akai hi.
01013013	Ahi a, Pathian mitmuh in Sodom mite nakpitak in hoih lou leh khial in a-om uhi.
01013014	Akiang a kipan Lot a-om tuam nung in, Toupa'n Abram kiang ah, “Dak inla, na omna a kipan mallam, simlam, suahlam leh tumlam en in.
01013015	Na gam muh tengteng na kiang ah leh na suante kiang ah tangtawn a ding in ka hon pe ding.
01013016	Na suante lei a leivui bang in ka bawl ding hi. Mi'n lei a leivui asim seng uleh, na suante leng sim seng ahi ding uh.
01013017	Thou inla, gam dung leh vai palsuak in; na kiang a hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi.
01013018	Abram in apuanin asuan a, Hebron a om Mamre tosaw kiang ah atengta a, huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh hi.
01014001	Huan Shinar kumpipa Amraphel, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok, Elam kumpipa Kedorla-omer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal dam lai in hichi ahong hi a;
01014002	amau Sodom kumpipa Bera asim uhi. Gomorrah kumpipa Birsha, Admah kumpipa Sinab, Zeboiim kumpipa Semeber, Bela kumpipa leng asim uhi, huai tuh Zoar ahi.
01014003	Hiai tengteng Siddim Phaizang ah apang uh, huai tuh Chi Tuipi ahi.
01014004	Kum sawm-le-nih sung Kedorla-omer nuai ah ana om ua, akum sawm-le-thumna in ahelta uhi.
01014005	Akum sawm-le-lina ah Kedorla-omer leh akiang a kumpipa omte ahong ua, Asteroth-karnaim ah Rephaimte athat ua, Ham ah Zuzimte athat ua, Shaveh-kariathaim ah Emimte athat uh;
01014006	a-omna Seir tang a El-paran gamdai zul a Horte omna tanpha in.
01014007	Akik nawn ua, Enmishpat atung ua, huai ahihleh Kadesh ahi a, Amalekte gam a mi teng leh Amorte, Hazezon-tamar a tengte leng athat nawn uhi.
01014008	Sodom kumpipa, Gomorrah kumpipa, Admah kumpipa, Zeboiim kumpipa leh Bela (huai Zoar kichi) kumpipa apawt ua, Siddim Phaizang ah amau sual ding in apangta uhi.
01014009	Elam kumpipa Kedorla-omer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal, Shinar kumpipa Amraphelte, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok sual ding in, Kumpipa li in kumpipa nga asual uhi.
01014010	Longnai khuk in Siddim Phaizang adim a; Sodom leh Gomorrah kumpipate ataikekna lam uah, khenkhatte huai ah akia ua, akeloute tang ah ataitou uhi.
01014011	Sodom leh Gomorrah mite sum tengteng leh anek ding tengteng uh la in apaita uhi.
01014012	Sodom a om Abram unaupa tapa, Lot leh aneih teng toh alaksak ua, apaita uhi.
01014013	Huai a pan suakta mi khat ahong pai a, Hebru mi Abram ahilh a, amah Amor mi Mamre tosaw kiang a teng ahi. Mamre ahihleh Eshkol leh Aner unaupih ahi a; huai mite Abram toh pangkhawm ahi uh.
01014014	Abram in unaupa sal in api uh chih azaktak in, a-inn a piang, ama'n achilsiamsa mi zathum apikhia a, Dan khua pha in adelhta hi.
01014015	Zan in amau sual ding in amah leh asikhate akihawmzak ua, azou ua Hobah pha in adelh uh; Hobah bel Damaskas mallam a om ahi.
01014016	Thil tengteng alakik nawn vek a, a-unaupa Lot leh aneih tengteng ban ah midang tengteng toh, numeite leng ahon pi nawn hi.
01014017	Kedorla-omer leh akiang a om kumpipate zou a, apaikik lam in Shaveh Phaizang (huai Kumpipa Phaizang kichi) ah Abram dawn ding in Sodom kumpipa ahohsuk hi.
01014018	Salem kumpipa Melkizedek in tanghou leh uain ahon tawi a; amah Pathian Tungnungpen siampu ahi.
01014019	Ama'n Abram avualzawl a, “Lei leh van neipa, Pathian Tungnungpen, Abram vualzawl in om hen.
01014020	Na melmate na khut a hon pepa, Pathian Tungnungpen phat in om hen,” achi hi. Abram in amah bangkim a sawm-a-khat apia hi.
01014021	Sodom kumpipa'n Abram kiang ah, “Mite hon pia inla, thilte zaw nang kineih in,” achi hi.
01014022	Abram in Sodom kumpipa kiang ah, “Lei leh van neipa, Toupa , Pathian Tungnungpen lam ah ka khut ka zakta hi.
01014023	Khauzang khat lel leng, khedap khau khat lel leng, na neih himhim ka la kei ding, huchi lou in zaw, Abram, kei hauhsaksak ahi, na chi kha ding,” achi hi.
01014024	“Tangvalte nekmang leh ka mi tonpihte tantuan kia lou zaw ka la kei ding, Aner, Eshkol leh Mamrete'n atantuan uh la uhen,” achi hi.
01015001	Huai thilte nung in, “Abram, lau ke'n, kei na phaw leh na kipahman thupitak ka hi,” chi in Abram kiang ah mengmuhna in Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
01015002	Abram in, “Aw, Toupa Pathian , bang na hon pe dia, ta nei lou a ka om na mu a, ka goukempa lah Damaskas a Eliezer ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
01015003	Abram mah in, “Ngai in, chi lah na hon suahsak kei a; en in, ka inn a piang pen mah ka gouluahpa hong hi ding ahi,” achi hi.
01015004	“Ngai in, huai mi na gouluah ding ahi kei. Nangmah gil a hong gah ding ngei, na gouluah ahi zaw ding,” chi in akiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
01015005	Amah inpua ah apikhia a, “Van lam en inla, aksite na simtheihleh sim him in,” achi hi. Amah mah in akiang ah, “Na suante huchibang ahi ding uh,” achi hi.
01015006	Ama'n Toupa agingta a, huchi in ama'n huai adiktatna in asehsakta hi.
01015007	Akiang ah, “Hiai gam na luah ding a hon pe ding a Kaldaite khua Ur a kipan hon pikhia Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
01015008	Ama'n, “Toupa Pathian aw, ka luah ding chih, bangchi in ka theithei dia?” achi hi.
01015009	Ama'n, akiang ah, “Bawngla kum thum a upa, kelpi kum thum a upa, vakhu leh vapalnou hon la in,” achi hi.
01015010	Huai teng ahon la a, alaitak ah aphelkhap chiat a, aphel khat, aphel khat lam doh in akoih chiat a; vasate bel aphelkhap kei hi.
01015011	Sasial ne vasate'n saluangte tung abohsuk chiang un Abram in ana hawlkhe zel hi.
01015012	Ni tum ding a akisak lai in, Abram a-ihmu hithit hi. Ngai in, amial a mial, thil mulkimhuai petmah in amah hon khuh hi.
01015013	Hiai thilte nung in Pathian in Abram kiang ah, “Na suante amau gam hilou ah mikhual in a-om ding ua, a-nna uh asepsak ding uh, chih teltak in thei in. Kum zali sung hihgentheih in a-om ding uh.
01015014	A-nna uh asepsak nam uh ka vaihawmkhum ding hi. Huai khit chiang in thil tampi nei in ahong paikhe ding uh.
01015015	Nang na pipute kiang ah lungmuangtak in na pai ding a; na lu a kelsam pou vek in ahon vui ding uhi.
01015016	Himahleh, Amorte khelhnate akim nai louh ziak in, suan lina ah hiai ah ahong pai nawn ding uh,” achi hi.
01015017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni tum a, khua ahong mial in, ngai in, haltuina mei khu lunglung leh meisel kuang luahluah, huai sa kiphelkhapte kal a paipai ahong om hi.
01015018	Huai ni mah in Toupa'n Abram toh thukhun bawl in, “Hiai gam, Aigupta lui a kipan lui lian, Euphrates Luipi pha in na suante kiang ah ka peta,” achi hi.
01015019	Kente, Kenizte, Kadmonte,
01015020	Hitte, Perizte, Rephate,
01015021	Amorte, Kanaante, Girgaste leh Jebuste toh leng ka pe lai hi, chi in Abram toh thu akhungta hi.
01016001	Huan Abram zi, Sarai in ta aneihsak kei hi. Sarai in Aigupta mi sikhanu khat anei a, amin Hagar ahi.
01016002	Sarai in Abram kiang ah, “Ngai dih ve, Toupa'n lah ta ka neih hon phal lou a; hehpih in ka sikhanu kithuahpih in. Amah a pan tate ka neih khakleh,” achi hi. Huchi in Abram in Sarai thu azuita hi.
01016003	Kanaan gam a Abram kum sawm a-om nung in, Abram zi Sarai in asikhanu Aigupta mi api a, apasal Abram kiang ah azi ding in apia hi.
01016004	Hagar athei a, huan agaita hi. Agai chih akitheihtak in, api asimmoh maimah hi.
01016005	Sarai in Abram kiang ah, “Ka thil thuak amoh nang pua in. Ka sikhanu na kawi ding in ka hon pia a; agai chih akitheihtak in, hon simmoh maimah hi. Toupa'n nang leh kei kikal ngaihtuah hen,” achi hi.
01016006	Abram in Sarai kiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhanu na khut a om ahi, nang pha na sak bang in atung ah hih in,” achi hi. Sarai in ahihgentheih mahmah tak in ataimangsanta hi.
01016007	Toupa angel in gamdai a tuikhuk kiang a, Shur zotna lampi a tuikhuk kiang ah ana mu hi.
01016008	Akiang ah, “Hagar, Sarai sikhanu aw, koi a kipan hong pai a, koi a hoh dia kisa na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka pi Sarai kiang a kipan taimang ka hi,” achi hi.
01016009	Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Na pi kiang ah kik nawn inla, athuthu in om in,” achi hi.
01016010	Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Na suante sim seng louh khop hial a tam in ka pungsak ding,” achi nawn hi.
01016011	Toupa angel mah in akiang ah, “Ngai in, nau na paita, tapa na nei ding a; Toupa'n na gimthuakna azak ziak in amin Ishmael na sak ding ahi.
01016012	Amah gam-sabiltung bang ahi ding a; michih adou ding a, michih in leng amah adou ding uh. Asanggamte a kipan atuam ten ding,” achi nawn hi.
01016013	Hagar in amah houpih Toupa min, “Nang muthei Pathian na hi,” chih asa hi. “Pathian mu a, hing lai ka hi maw?” achi ngal a.
01016014	Huaiziak in huai tuikhuk Beer-lahai-roi sak ahita. Ngai in, huai Kadesh leh Bered kho kikal a om ahi.
01016015	Hagar in Abram tapa aneihsak a; Abram in atapa, Hagar in aneihsak min Ishmael asata hi.
01016016	Hagar in Abram a ding a Ishmael aneihsak lai in Abram kum sawmgiat-le-guk a upa ahi.
01017001	Abram kum sawmkua-le-kua a upa ahih in, Abram kiang ah Toupa akilak a, akiang ah, “Kei Pathian Bangkim hihthei ka hi; ka ma ah pai inla, hoihkim in om in.
01017002	Nang toh i kal ah thu ka khung ding a, nakpitak in ka hon pungsak ding,” achi hi.
01017003	Abram abokkhup a; Pathian in amah ahoupih hi.
01017004	“Ngai in, ke'n zaw, na kiang ah ka thukhun ahi ka khun, nam tampite' Pa na hita ding.
01017005	Na min leng Abram ahi nawnta kei ding a, na min Abraham ahi zawta ding; nam tampite' Pa ding a ka hon bawl tak ziak in.
01017006	Nakpitak in ka hon chiphasak ding a, nang ah nam tampi ka bawl ding a, nang a kipan kumpipate ahong piangkhe ding uh.
01017007	“Kei leh nang leh na suante, suan sawnsawnte tan in leng ka thukhun nang a ding leh na nung a na suante a ding a, a Pathian uh hi ding in, tangtawn thukhun ding in ka hihkip ding hi.
01017008	Na kiang ah leh na nung a na suante kiang ah mikhual na hihna gam, Kanaan gam tengteng, tangtawn gou ding un ka hon pe ding, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding,” achi hi.
01017009	Pathian mah in Abraham kiang ah, “Nang ka thukhun na zui ding ahi. Na nung a na suante suan sawnsawnte tan in leng azui ding uhi.
01017010	Hiai kei leh nang leh na suante kal a ka thukhun na zuih ding uh ahi. Na lak ua pasal peuhmah in zek asum ding ahi.
01017011	Na zekvun sa uh na sum ding ua, huai tuh nang toh i kal a thukhun chiamtehna ahi ding hi.
01017012	Na lak ua kuapeuh ni giat a upa, na suan sawnsawn tan un leng, na suan hi chitchiat lou leng na inn a piang hiam, mikhual kuapeuh a kipan dangka sum a na lei hiam leng, pasal peuhmah zek sum ding ahi.
01017013	Na inn a piang leh na dangka sum a na leite leng zeksum ngeingei ding ahi. Ka thukhun tangtawn thukhun ding in na sa ah a-omta ding hi.
01017014	Pasal zeksum louh leh azekvun sa a zeksum a om lou, achipihte lak a kipan satkhiak ahi ding; ama'n ka thukhun hihsia ahi,” achi nawn hi.
01017015	Pathian mah in, Abraham kiang ah, “Na zi Sarai, amin Sarai na chi nawnta kei ding a, amin Sarah ahi zawta ding hi.
01017016	Amah ka vualzawl ding a, huai lou leng amah ah tapa ka hon pe ding. Ahi, amah ka vualzawl ding a, namte nu ahita ding. Amah a kipan nam tuamtuam kumpipate ahong om ding uh,” achi hi.
01017017	Abraham abokkhup a, anui a, alungsim in mi kum za a upa in ta anei ding maw? Sarah kum sawmkua a upa in ta anei ding maw? achi hi.
01017018	Abraham mah in Pathian kiang ah, “Na ma ah Ishmael om thei maileh aw,” achi hi.
01017019	Pathian in, “Hilou e, na zi Sarah in tapa ahon neihsak taktak ding a; amin Isak na sak ding ahi. Ka thukhun, anung a asuante a ding in tangtawn thukhun ding in akiang ah ka hihkip ding.
01017020	Ishmael tungthu leng ka hon ngaihkhiaksak hi. Ngai in, amah ka vualzawlta a, chi tampi ka suangsak ding hi. Nakpitak in leng ka pungsak ding a, ama'n vaihawmmi sawm-le-nih asuang ding a, amah chi thupitak in ka bawl ding hi.
01017021	Himahleh ka thukhun, Sarah in kum nawn hichi hun a ahon neihsak ding Isak kiang ah ahi ka hihkip ding,” achi hi.
01017022	Akiang a thugen azoh in, Pathian in Abraham apaitouh santa hi.
01017023	Abraham in atapa Ishmael leh a-inn a piang tengteng leh dangka sum a alei tengteng, Abraham inkuante lak a pasal peuhmah api a, Pathian in akiang a agen bang in, huai ni mah in azekvun uh asumsak chiat hi.
01017024	Abraham zekvun asum lai in kum sawmkua-le-kua a upa ahi.
01017025	Atapa Ishmael azekvun asum lai un kum sawm-le-thum a upa ahi.
01017026	Huai ni mah in Abraham leh atapa Ishmael zeksum ahita uh.
01017027	A-inkuanpihte lak a pasal tengteng, a-inn a piangte leh mikhual a kipan dangka sum a aleite leng, amah toh zeksum ahi vekta uhi.
01018001	Huan sun nisat laitak a puanin kongkhak bul a Abraham atut lai in, Mamre a tosaw kiang ah Toupa ahong kilak hi.
01018002	Abraham dak in a-en a, ngai in, akiang ah mi thum ana dingh uhi. Amuhtak in puanin kongkhak a kipan amaute tuak ding in ava tai a, lei lam ah akunsuk hi.
01018003	“Ka toupa na deihsakna ka tan theihleh hehpih in na sikha hon paikheng mahmah ke'n.
01018004	Tui tawmchik bek hon la uhenla, na khete uh sil unla, sing nuai ah khawl tadih un.
01018005	Tanghou tawmchik bek ka va la ding a, na lungtang uh halhsak un. Huai khit chiang in na pai zom zel na ding uh. Huai ding a na sikha kiang a hong pai na hi peuhmah ding uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Na chih bang in va hih in,” achi uhi.
01018006	Puanin sung a Sarah kiang ah Abraham ava lut pah a, “Tangbuang nel mahmah tehna thum bawl in, mek inla, tanghou pei in bawl in,” achi hi.
01018007	Ganhon lam ah Abraham atai a, bawngnou hoihtak ava man a, asikha kiang ah apia a, ama'n abawl mengmeng hi.
01018008	Nawituidat, nawitui leh bawngnou sa kibawl ala a, ama uah ava luita hi. Amau anek sung teng uh, sing nuai ah akiang uah adingh nilouh hi.
01018009	Amau akiang ah, “Na zi Sarah koi a om ahia?” achi ua, “Ama'n pam a puanin ah,” achi hi.
01018010	Amaute'n, “Hun ahong chin nawn peuhpeuh chiang in na kiang ah ka hong nawn ngeingei ding uh. Ngai in, na zi Sarah in tapa anei ding,” achi hi. Anung a puanin kongkhak bul a kipan Sarah in ana za hi.
01018011	Abraham leh Sarah upapi, tektak ahita ua; numei dan ngeina Sarah ah akam khin thamta hi.
01018012	Sarah in tektak ka hih nung in nopsakna ka nei thei lai diam maw, ka toupa lah a-upata ngal a? chi in alungsim in anui hi.
01018013	Toupa'n Abraham kiang ah, “Bang achia Sarah in, kei pitek in ta ka nei thei lai diam maw, chi a nui ahia?
01018014	Toupa a ding in thil himhim haksa lua a-om a hia? Hun seh ahong tun chiang in, na kiang ah ka hong nawn ding a, Sarah in tapa anei ding,” achi hi.
01018015	Sarah in alauh ziak in, “Ka nui kei,” chi in anial hi. Ama'n, “Zuau ahi, na nui tawk ve,” achi hi.
01018016	Huai a kipan mite adingh ua, Sodom kholam a-en ua, amaute khakhe ding in akiang uah Abraham apai hi.
01018017	Toupa'n , “Ka thilhih ding Abraham ka iim diam aw;
01018018	Abraham lah chi thupi leh thilhihtheitak ahong hi ngei ding a, amah ah leitung a nam chih vualzawl a om ding ahihdante?
01018019	Anung a atate leh a-inkuanpihte'n diktatna leh thudik a Toupa lampi zui a, vaihawmna ding thu apiaktheihna ding in amah ka septa a; huchi a atungthu genpa Toupa'n Abraham tung a atunsak theihna ding in,” achi hi.
01018020	Toupa'n , “Sodom leh Gomorrah kalh a kikou thawmging anasa a, agitlouh mahmah ziak un.
01018021	Tu in ka hohsuk ding a, akikou ging uh ka kiang a hong tung bangbang in ahih uhia, hih lou, ka en ding a, ahih kei uleh ka thei mai ding,” achi hi.
01018022	Huai a kipan mite akihei ua, Sodom kholam azuanta uhi. Abraham bel Toupa ma ah adingh lai hi.
01018023	Abraham in ava naih a, “Mikhialte lak a midiktatte hihmangkhawm tel ding na hi maw?
01018024	Khosung ah midiktat sawmnga bek a-om kha ding uh e. Asung a midiktat sawmnga omte ziak in akhua hawi lou in na hihmang ding maw?
01018025	Nang hial in zaw migiloute bang a midiktatte a-om samna ding ua migiloute lak a midiktatte hihlup zaw na hih tel kei ding hi. Leitung pumpi Vaihawmpa in diktattak in ahih kei dia hia?” achi hi.
01018026	Toupa'n , “Sodom a midiktat sawmnga ka muhleh amau ziak in akho pumpi ka hawi ding,” achi hi.
01018027	Abraham in, “Ngai in, kei leivui leh meivu lel in Toupa ka hon houpih thei hi.
01018028	Midiktat nga in sawmnga chingzou lou ahi kha ding e; nga achin louh ziak in kho pumpi na hihmang ding maw? chi in adawng hi. Ama'n sawmli-le-nga ka muhleh ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi.
01018029	Ama'n amah ahoupih zel a, “Huai ah sawmli kia na mu ahi kha ding e,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawmli ziak in leng ka hihmang dah mai ding,” achi hi.
01018030	Ama'n, “Toupa aw, heh ke'n, ka hon gen nawn lai ding. Huai ah sawmthum lel na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huai a sawmthum leng ka muhleh ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi.
01018031	Ama'n, “Ngai in, Toupa ka hon houpih theita a, huai ah sawmnih kia na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawmnih ziak in leng ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi.
01018032	Ama'n, “Toupa aw, heh ke'n, khatvei kia ka hon gen lai ding. Huai ah sawm kia na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawm ziak in leng ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi.
01018033	Abraham toh akihou khit un Toupa apaita a; Abraham leng amun ah akik nawnta hi.
01019001	Huan angel nih in nitaklam in Sodom khua aphasuk ua, Sodom khokulh kongkhak ah Lot ana tu hi. Lot in amaute ana mu a, va tuak ding in adingh a, amai a lei si in chibai abuk a,
01019002	“Ngai un, ka toupate aw, hehpih in na sikha inn ah hong lut phot unla, giak unla, na khete uh sil un. Na thou baih ding ua, na pai nawn na ding uh,” achi hi. Huan amau, “Hilou e, kholak ah ka giak zaw ding uh,” achi uhi.
01019003	Himahleh ama'n nakpitak in akun a; akiang ah api a, huchi in a-inn ah alutta uhi. Ama'n meh abawlsak a, tanghou silngou soh louh akang a, aneta uhi.
01019004	Alup ma un khopi a mite, Sodom khomite, veng teng a mi tengteng, atek-akhang in a-inn ava umkimvel uhi.
01019005	Lot kiang ah, “Tuzan a na inn a hong lut mite koi a om uh ahia? Amau ka kithuahpih theihna ding un ka kiang uah hon pikhia in,” ahong chi uhi.
01019006	Kongkhak bul ah akiang uah Lot ava pawt a, kongkhak akhak hi.
01019007	“Ka unaute aw, hehpih in, hichi tel in gilou dah un.
01019008	Ngai un, pasal' kithuahpih ngei nai louh tanu nih ka nei hi. Hon hehpih unla, na kiang uah amaute ka hon pikhe ding a, hoih na sak bang un, atung uah na hih na ding uh. Hiai mite tung ah zaw bangmah hih mahmah kei un. Hiai ding a ka insung a hong lut lah ahi ngal ua,” achi hi.
01019009	Amau, “Hon hon mai in,” achi uhi. Amau mah in, “Hiai mi sop lai hiai a teng ding in ahong pem lut a, vaihawmpa a om maw atup vial. Tu'n amaute tung a hih sang in nang tung ah ka hihse zaw sem ding uh,” achi uhi. Lot abohta ua, kongkhak hihse ding in hon naih uhi.
01019010	Himahleh mite'n akhut uh agolhkhia ua, akiang uah insung ah Lot akailut ua, kongkhak akhak bikbek uhi.
01019011	Kongkhak bul a mite, aneu-alian mit atawsak ua, huchi in kongkhak amuzouta kei uh.
01019012	Mite'n Lot kiang ah, “Hiai mite lou hiai ah inkuanpih dang na nei hia? Na makpate, na tapate, na tanute leh khosung a na neih peuhmahte khua a kipan pikhia in.
01019013	Toupa ma a, akikou husa uh anasat luat tak ziak in hiai khua hihmang ding ka hi uh. Hihmang ding in Toupa'n hon sawl ahi,” achi uhi.
01019014	Lot apaikhia a, atanute kitenpih, amakpate kiang ah ava gen hi. “Thou unla, hiai khua a kipan pawtkhia un, Toupa'n khua hihmang ding ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh amakpate ngaih in chiamnuih thu gen bang lel ahi.
01019015	Phalvak in angelte'n, “Thou inla, na zi leh hiai a na tanu nih omte pikhia in. Huchi lou in zaw hiai khua gawtna ah na mangkhawm kha ding uh,” chi in Lot anohta uhi.
01019016	Himahleh a-awltat mahmah lai a, Toupa'n amah ahehpih ziak in, mite'n ama khut leh azi khut leh atanu nihte khutte manbet in apikhia ua, kho polam ah akoihta uhi.
01019017	Huan polam a apikhiak khit un, khat in akiang ah, “Na hinna ding in taikhia in; na nunglam nga ke'nla, phaizang himhim ah leng khawl ke'n. Huai tang sang ah suahtak san in, huchi lou in zaw na mangkhawm kha ding hi,” achi hi.
01019018	Himahleh Lot in akiang uah, “Ka toupate aw, huai zaw hi kei hen.
01019019	Ngai in, na sikha in na mitmuh in deihsakna atang a, ka hinna humbitna ding in zahngaihna thupi na hon musak lai hi. Himahleh huai tang sang ah zaw ka tai thei kei ding, thil hoih lou khat in hon pha in ka si kha ding hi.
01019020	Ngai in, hiai khua taina ding in anaipen a, kho neuchik leng ahi. Aw, huai ah, kho neuchik ahi kei a hia! Hon taisak zaw in, huchi in ka hing ding hi,” achi hi.
01019021	Ama'n, akiang ah, “Ngai in, hiai thil tungtang ah leng ka hon mang, na kho gen ka hihmang dah ding.
01019022	Kin inla, huai ah tai in. Huai mun na tun mateng lah bangmah ka hihthei ngal kei a,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai kho min Zoar chih in a-omta hi.
01019023	Zoar a Lot atun in leitung ah ni asuak khinta hi.
01019024	Toupa'n Sodom leh Gomorrah kho tung ah van a Toupa kiang a kipan mei leh kaat azusak hi.
01019025	Huai khuate, phaizang tengteng, khua a mite tengteng leh leitung a thilpoute tengteng ahihmang vekta hi.
01019026	Himahleh Lot nung ah azi in nunglam a-en a, huchi in chikhuam ahong suakta hi.
01019027	Toupa ma a adinna mun ah beltak in Abraham ahohtou hi.
01019028	Sodom leh Gomorrah kholam leh phaizang gam lam tengteng a-en hi. Ngai in, huai gam a meikhu, haltuina meikhu bang mai in akhutou ngoingoi hi.
01019029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian in phaizang khopite, Lot tenna mun ngei ahihman lai in, Pathian in Abraham atheigige a, manthatna lak a pan Lot asawlkhia hi.
01019030	Zoar a kipan Lot apaitou a, tang ah ateng a, atanu nihte leng akiang ah ateng uhi. Zoar ah lah ateng ngam kei a, amah leh atanu nihte kohawm ah atengta uhi.
01019031	Huchi in atanu upazaw in anauzaw kiang ah, “I pa a-upata a, leitung tengteng dan bang a hon kithuahpih ding lei ah pasal khat leng a-om nawn kei hi.
01019032	Kisa in, i pa uain i dawnsak ding a, huchi a i pa chisuan bei lou a i bawltheihna ding in akiang ah i va lum ding,” achi hi.
01019033	Huai zan in apa uh uain adawnsakta uhi. A-upazaw alut a, apa kiang ah ava lum a; ama'n alup lam ana phawk kei a, athoh lam leng aphawk kei hi.
01019034	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in a-upazaw in anaupangzaw kiang ah, “Ngai in, zan in ka pa kiang ah ka va lum a; tuzan in leng uain i dawnsak nawn ding a; nang va lut inla, huchi a i pa chisuan bei lou a i bawltheihna ding in akiang ah va lum in,” achi hi.
01019035	Huai zan in leng apa uh uain adawnsak nawn ua; anaupangzaw athou a, akiang ah ava lumta hi. Ama'n alup lam aphawk kei a, athoh lam leng aphawk kei hi.
01019036	Huchibang in Lot tanu nihte'n apa ua pan nau apai tuak uhi.
01019037	A-upazaw in tapa anei a, amin Moab asa a, huai mi tulai a Moabte suangpa ahi.
01019038	Anaupangzaw in leng tapa anei a, amin Ben-ammi asa a, huai mi tulai a Ammonte suangpa ahi.
01020001	Huai a kipan Negeb gam lam zuan in Abraham akisuan a, Kadesh leh Shur kho kikal ah ateng a, Gerar ah hun bang tan hiam a-om tadih hi.
01020002	Abraham in azi Sarah, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” achi hi. Gerar kumpipa Abimelek in mi asawl a, Sarah ava pisak hi.
01020003	Himahleh, zan in amanglam in Abimelek kiang ah Pathian ahong kilak a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na numei pi ziak in misi leltak na hita, amah lah mi zi ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
01020004	Abimelek in anaih nai tadih kei hi, “Toupa, nam diktat na that hial dia hia?”
01020005	Amah mah in ka kiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” chi in; amah ngei in leng ka sanggampa ahi, achih behlap ngal a. “Lungtang hoihtak pu leh khut siangthoutak nei kawm a hiai bang ka hih ahi,” achi hi.
01020006	Pathian in amang in, “Ahi, hiai lungtang hoihtak pu kawm a na hih ahi chih ka thei, ke'n leng ka tung a na khelh ding ka hon kham hi. Huaiziak in amah na khoih ka phal louh ahi.
01020007	Tu in huai mi zi pekik in; amah lah zawlnei ahi ngal a. Ahon thumsak ding a, na dam ding. Na piakkik keileh, na si ngeingei ding chih thei in; nang leh na neih tengteng toh,” achi hi.
01020008	Abimelek beltak in athou a, asikha tengteng asam a, azak ding un huai thu tengteng ahilh a, mite'n alau mahmah uhi.
01020009	Abimelek in Abraham asam a, akiang ah, “Ka tung ua na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Bang lam ah ahia na tung a ka khelh a, kei leh ka lalgam tung a thil gilou thupitak na hon tut? Thil hih tuak louhtak ka tung ah na hihta,” achi hi.
01020010	Abimelek mah in Abraham kiang ah, “Bang na mu a, hichibang a thil hih na maizen a?” achi nawn hi.
01020011	Abraham in, “Hiai khua a Pathian launa himhim om lou a, ka zi ziak in ahon that mai ding uh, chih ka ngaihtuah ziak a hiai bang a na gamtang mah ka hi.
01020012	Huai lou in ka sanggamnu leng ahi him a, ka pa tanu ahi a, ka nu tanu bel ahi kei. Himahleh amah ka zi ahong hita hi.
01020013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian in ka pa inn a kipan ahon vakvaihsak lai in akiang ah, ‘Hiai na hehpihna ka tung a na lahsak ding ahi. Ka tunna peuh uah, ka sanggampa ahi hon chi zel in’ ka chi him hi,” achi hi.
01020014	Abimelek in belamte, bawngtalte, sikhapate leh sikhanute pi in Abraham kiang ah apia a, azi Sarah leng apekikta hi.
01020015	Abimelek in, “En in, na ma ah ka gam zapi a-om, na utna peuh ah teng in,” achi hi.
01020016	Sarah kiang ah, “En in, na sanggampa dangka sangkhat ka peta hi. Ngai in, na kiang a om tengteng leh nangmah a ding in amah na mit khuhna ahi ding. Hiai bang in amah taihilh in a-om hi.”
01020017	Pathian kiang ah Abraham athum a, Pathian in Abimelek leh azi leh asikhanute adamsak nawn a, huchi in tate aneita uhi.
01020018	Abraham zi Sarah ziak in Toupa'n Abimelek inkuante tengteng achiingsak vek ngal a.
01021001	Huan Toupa'n agensa bang in Sarah ava veh a, achiamsa bang in Sarah tung ah Toupa'n ahihta hi.
01021002	Sarah agai a, Pathian in akiang a agen hun seh bang in, atek nung in Abraham tapa aneihsakta hi.
01021003	Abraham in Sarah in aneihsak atapa min Isak asa hi.
01021004	Abraham in Pathian in akiang a thu apiak bang in atapa Isak ni giat achin in azek asumsak hi.
01021005	Atapa Isak apian lai in Abraham kum zakhat a upa ahita.
01021006	Sarah in, “Pathian in hon nuisakta; aza kha peuhmah in hon nuihpih ding uh,” achi hi.
01021007	Amah mah in, “Sarah in naungekte apom ding, chih kua'n ahia Abraham kiang a gen thei ding? Atek nung in tapa ka neihsakta,” achi hi.
01021008	Naungek ahong khanglian a, nawinek atawpsakta uh. Isak nawinek atawpsak ni un, Abraham in ankuang thupitak alui hi.
01021009	Aigupta mi Hagar tapa, Abraham a ding a aneihsak pen in Isak asimmohbawl lai Sarah in amu hi.
01021010	Huaiziak in Abraham kiang ah, “Hiai sikhanu leh atapa delhkhia in. Hiai sikhanu tapa in ka tapa Isak gou aluahpih thei kei ding,” achi hi.
01021011	Hiai thu atapa mah toh kisai ahih ziak in Abraham ngaih in thil hoih loutak ahi.
01021012	Himahleh Pathian in Abraham kiang ah, “Naupang tungtang thu leh na sikhanu tungtang thu na ngaih in thil hoih lou hi kei hen. Sarah in na kiang a thu agen tengteng zui in, Isak ah na suante kisim ding chih ahi ngal a,
01021013	Sikhanu tapa ah leng, na suan ahih ziak in, nam chih tham ngial ka bawl ding,” achi hi.
01021014	Beltak in Abraham athou a, tanghou leh tuithawl, tui a dim ala a, Hagar kiang a pia in, aliangkou ah asuan a, naupang toh asawlkhia hi. Apai a, Beer-sheba gamdai ah avakvakta hi.
01021015	Tuithawl a tui ahong beitak in, sawlbawk lim nuai khat ah naupang akoihta mai hi.
01021016	“Naupang si ding ka en ngam kei,” achih ziak in gamla kuam, thal kap phakna ding ah, ava pai a, amazawn a tu in ngaihtak in akapta hi.
01021017	Pathian in naupang aw aza a; Pathian angel in van a kipan Hagar asam a, akiang ah, “Bangchi na hia, Hagar? Lau ke'n, a-omna a naupang aw Pathian in aza hi.
01021018	Thou inla, naupang phong in, na khut in len in, amah nam thupitak a bawl ding ka hi,” achi hi.
01021019	Pathian in amit ahihvaksak a, huan tuileh amuta hi. Huai ah ava pai a, tuithawl dim in tui adim a, naupang adawnsak hi.
01021020	Naupang kiang ah Pathian a-om a, ahong khanglian a; gamdai ah ateng zel a, thalkapmi ahong hita hi.
01021021	Paran gamdai ah ateng a; anu'n Aigupta gam a kipan zi aguan hi.
01021022	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in Abimelek leh asepaih pawl a heutu Phikol in Abraham kiang ah, “Na thilhih peuh ah na kiang ah Pathian a-om.
01021023	Tu in hiai ah Pathian min lou inla, kei leh ka tapa leh ka tapa' tapa leng khem lou in, ka hon hehpih khit tak sa bang in kei leh na tenna gam hehpih thuk sam ding in ka kiang ah kichiam in,” achi hi.
01021024	Abraham in, “Ka kichiam ding,” achi hi.
01021025	Abimelek sikhate'n tuileh asuhsak ziak un Abraham in Abimelek asal hi.
01021026	Abimelek in, “Hiai thilhih pen kua ahia, ka thei himhim kei. Nang lah na hon hilh ngal kei a, tuni ngal lou in ka za kha himhim kei,” achi hi.
01021027	Abraham in belamte leh bawngtalte api a, Abimelek kiang ah apia a; anih un thu akhungta uhi.
01021028	Abraham in abelamhon lak a belamnou anu sagih akoihtuam hi.
01021029	Abimelek in Abraham kiang ah, “Belamnou anu sagih atuam a na koih bang na chihna ahia?” achi hi.
01021030	Ama'n, “Hiai tuileh keimah leh ahi, chih na hon theihpihna ding in hiai belamnou anu sagih ka khut a kipan na lak ding ahi,” achi hi.
01021031	Huaiziak in huai mun Beer-sheba asa hi; huai a anih ua akichiam ziak un.
01021032	Beer-sheba ah thu akhungta uh. Abimelek athou a, asepaih pawl heutu Philok toh Philistiate gam ah apai nawnta uhi.
01021033	Abraham in Beer-sheba ah meilah sing asuan a, huai ah Toupa , Tangtawn Pathian min alou hi.

01022001	Huai thilte nung in Pathian in Abraham a-enchian hi. Akiang ah, “Abraham,” achi a; ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.

01022003	Beltak in Abraham athou a, sabiltung abawl a, akiang ah atapa Isak toh sikha tangval nih atonpih hi. Haltum thillat a ding in sing a-ek a, athou a, Pathian in ahilhna mun lam ah apaita hi.
01022004	Ani thum ni in Abraham adak a, amun gamlapi a om amu hi.

01022008	Abraham in, “Bawi, Pathian in amah a dia halmang thillat ding belamnou angaihtuah tawm ding hi,” achi a; anih un apaikhawm zel uhi.

01022010	Abraham in akhut alik a, atapa thahna ding temta ala hi.

01022013	Abraham adak a, a-en a, ngai in, anunglam ah belampa, singbawk a akii awk ana om hi. Abraham in huai belampa ava man a, atapa sik in halmang thillat in alan zawta hi.

01023001	Sarah damsung kum zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih ahi. Hiaite Sarah damsung kumte ahi uh.

01023007	Huai gam mite leh Heth suante ma ah Abraham dingtou in akun hi.

01023017	Ephron lou, Mamre toh kizawn Makpelah gam a om, alou toh, asung a kokhuk om toh, lou a sing om tengteng toh, alou kim a sing om tengteng toh,

01024001	Abraham upa in ahong tek mahmahta a, Toupa'n thil bangkim ah Abraham avualzawl hi.
01024002	Abraham in asikha, a-inn a upapen, aneih tengteng tung a thuneipa kiang ah, “Hehpih in ka pheipi nuai ah na khut golh in,
