01024008	Numei in hon zuih nop keileh, ka kiang a na kichiamna thu ah na siang ding. Akoi abang hitaleh, huai ah zaw ka tapa na pikik nawn ding ahi kei,” achi hi.
01024009	Sikha in apu Abraham pheipi nuai ah akhut agolh a, akiang ah huai thu ah akichiamta hi.
01024010	Sikha in apu sangawngsaute lak ah sangawngsau sawm akai a, apu thil hoih chiteng tawi in, apawtkheta hi. Athou a, Mesopotamia gam a Nahor khopi lam ah akipankheta hi.
01024011	Nitaklam a tui tawi dia numeite akuan hun laitak un, dainawl a tuileh kiang ah asangawngsaute akhukdinsak hi.
01024012	“Aw Toupa , ka pu Abraham' Pathian, hehpih in tuni in hon lohchingsak in, ka pu Abraham tung ah hehpihna langsak in.
01024013	En in, tuikhuk kiang ah ka dingh a, khua a mite tanute tui tawi ding in ahong kuan uhi.
01024014	Huan hichi hi henla, nungak kuapeuh kiang a, ‘Hehpih in ka dawn ding in na tuibel niamsak dih ve,’ ka chih a, ama'n, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute leng dawn ding ka pe ding,’ chi peuhmah, huai mi ngei na sikha Isak zi ding a na miseh hi hen. Hiai ah ka pu tung ah hehpihna na langsak, chih ka thei ding,” achi hi.
01024015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, agen khit ma in, ngai in, Abraham nau Nahor zi Milkah tapa Bethuel tanu Rebekah, aliangzang a tuibel pua in ahong kuan hi.
01024016	Huai nungak amel hoih mahmah, nungak siangthou ahi a, pasal himhim akithuahpih ngei kei hi. Tuikhuk ah apaisuk a, atuibel adimsak a, apaitou nawn hi.
01024017	Amah tuak ding in sikhapa atai a, “Hehpih in na tuibel a tui tawmchik hon dawnsak dih ve,” achi hi.
01024018	Ama'n, “Dawn in, ka toupa,” achi a; kintak in akhut in atuibel adomkhesuk a, adawnsak hi.
01024019	Adawn nung in, “Na sangawngsaute a ding leng, adawnkham masiah uh ka tawi ding,” achi hi.
01024020	Kintak in gankuang ah atuibel atei a, tui tawi ding in tuileh lam ah atai nawn a, asangawngsau tengteng a ding leng atawisak hi.
01024021	Sikha in alohchingsak leh sak louh theihna ding in adai dide hi.
01024022	Huan hichi ahong hi a, sangawngsaute'n adawnkhamtak un, sikha in dangka-eng bilbah shekel kimkhat a gik leh akhut a ding dangka-eng tau nih shekel sawm a gik asuahkhia hi.
01024023	Akiang ah, “Kua tanu na hia? Hehpih in hon hilh in. Na pa inn ah ka giahna ding uh mun a-om diam?” achi hi.
01024024	Ama'n akiang ah, “Bethuel, Milkah tapa, Nahor a ding a aneihsaknu tanu ka hi,” achi hi.
01024025	Amah mah in akiang ah, “Buhpawl leh gan an ka hau tuak ua, giahna mun leng ka nei uh,” achi hi.
01024026	Sikha in alu akunsak a, Toupa abia hi.
01024027	“Ka pu tung ngei a azahngaihna leh athutakna tawp ngei lou, Toupa , ka pu Abraham' Pathian phat in om hen. Kei leng, Toupa'n ka pu unaute inn lam a hon na pi ahi ve,” achi hi.
01024028	Nungak atai a, huai thute anu inkuanpihte ava hilh hi.
01024029	Rebekah in sanggam pasal anei a, amin Laban ahi. Laban apawtkhia a, tuikhuk lam ah huai mi kiang ah ava tai hi.
01024030	Huan hichi ahong hi a, bilbah leh asanggamnu khut a taute amu a, huai mi'n, “Huchi khachi in ahon chi,” chi a, asanggamnu Rebekah thugente azaktak in, huai mi kiang ah ahohta hi. Ngai in, amah tuikhuk ah sangawngsaute kiang ah ana dingh gige hi.
01024031	Laban in, “Nang, Toupa vualzawlpa, hong inla, ka inn uah hong lut in. Bangziak a inpua a dingh nilouh? Inn leh mun sangawngsaute a ding in ka bawl khinta,” achi hi.
01024032	Huchi in inn ah alut a, Laban in sangawngsau van aphel a; sangawngsaute a ding in buhpawl leh gan an apia a, akhe leh alawmte khe silna ding tui apia hi.
01024033	Abraham sikha ma ah nek ding alui a; himahleh ama'n, “Ka hong hohna san thu ka gen mateng ka ne kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gen ve le,” achi hi.
01024034	Ama'n, “Kei Abraham sikha ka hi.
01024035	Toupa'n ka pu nakpitak in avualzawl a, miliantak ahong hita. Toupa'n akiang ah belamhon, bawnghon, dangka, dangka-eng, sikhapate, sikhanute, sangawngsaute leh sabiltungte leng apia hi.
01024036	Ka pu zi Sarah in tek nungpi in ka pu a ding in tapa aneihsak a; akiang ah aneih tengteng ape vek hi.
01024037	Ka pu in, ka tenna gam a Kanaante nungak lak a ka tapa zi ding a na neihsak ding ahi kei.
01024038	Ka pa inn lam ah, ka tanaute kiang ah hoh inla, ka tapa zi na pisak zaw ding ahi, chi in ahon kichiamsak hi.”
01024039	Ke'n ka pu kiang ah, “Numei in hon zui nuam kei kha ding,” ka chi hi.
01024040	Ama'n, ka kiang ah, “ Toupa ama a ka om zelnapa'n na kiang ah a-angel ahon sawl ding a; na hohna ding ah hon lohchingsak ding. Ka tapa a ding in ka tanaute leh ka pa inkote lak a zi na neisak ding ahi.
01024041	Ka tanaute kiang ngei na tun chiang in, ka kiang a na kichiamna a kipan na siang ding. Nungak ahon piak kei uleh ka kiang a na kichiamna a kipan na siang ding,” achi hi.
01024042	“Tuni in tuikhuk ka hong tung a, ‘Aw, Toupa , ka pu Abraham' Pathian, ka paina a na hon lohchinsak dingleh, en in, tuikhuk kiang ah ka dingh hi.’
01024043	Hichi hi henla, tui tawi ding a nungak hong kuan kuapeuh kiang a, ‘Hehpih in dawn ding na tuibel a tui tawmchik hon pia in,’ ka chih a,
01024044	ama'n ka kiang a, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute a ding leng ka tawi ding, chi peuhmah, huai mi ngeingei ka pu tapa a ding a Toupa numei seh hi hen,’ ka chi hi.
01024045	Ka lungsim a ka gen khit ma in, ngai in, Rebekah, atuibel pua in ahong kuan a; tuikhuk ah apaisuk a; tui atawi a; akiang ah, ‘Hehpih in tui hon dawnsak dih ve,’ ka na chi hi.
01024046	Ama'n kintak in aliangzang a kipan tuibel adomkhia a, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute leng dawn ding ka pe ding,’ achi hi. Ka dawn a, sangawngsaute leng adawnsak hi.
01024047	Ke'n, ‘Kua tanu na hia?’ chi in ka dong a; ama'n, ‘Nahor tapa, Milkah in aneihsakpa Bethuel tanu ka hi,’ achi hi. Abil ah bilbah ka batsak a, taute leng akhut ah ka bunsak hi.
01024048	“Ka lu ka kunsak a, Toupa ka bia a, Toupa , ka pu Abraham' Pathian, ka pu sanggampa tanu ngei, atapa a dia azi ding a pisak ding a lampi diktak a hon pipa ka phat hi.
01024049	Tu in ka pu na hehpih ua, atung a chihtak pet a na hih ding uleh hon hilh un. Na hih kei ding uleh leng hon hilh un. Taklam hiam, veilam hiam, ka nga thei ding,” achi hi.
01024050	Laban leh Bethuel in adawng ua, “Hiai thil Toupa a kipan a pawt ahi. Kou na kiang ah asia-apha bangmah ka gen thei kei uh.
01024051	En in, na ma ah Rebekah a-om, pi inla, paipih in, Toupa'n agensa bang in na pu tapa zi ding in om hen,” achi uh.
01024052	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Abraham sikha in athu uh azaktak in lei si in Toupa abia hi.
01024053	Abraham sikha in dangka suang kizepnate, dangka-eng kizepnate leh silh-le-ten alakhia a, Rebekah apia a; asanggampa leh anu kiang ah leng thil manpha pipi apia hi.
01024054	Amah leh alawmte'n ne in adawn ua, huai ah agiakta uh. Zingsang in athou ua, “Ka pu kiang ah hon paisakta un,” achi hi.
01024055	Asanggampa leh anu'n, “Nungak ni sawt lou chik, ni sawm lel bek, ka kiang uah om tadih hen. Huai khit in ahong pai na ding,” achi uhi.
01024056	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon zekaisak kei dih ua, Toupa'n lah ka hohna ah ahon lohchingsakta ngal a. Ka pu kiang a ka paitheihna ding in, hon sawl zaw mai ve ua,” achi hi.
01024057	Amau, “Nungak ka sam ding ua, ama kam mahmah kidongleh,” achi uhi.
01024058	Rebekah asam ua akiang ah, “Hiai mipa kiang ah na pai nuam maw?” achi ua. Ama'n, “Pai nuam ve ning e,” achi hi.
01024059	Asanggamnu uh Rebekah leh adonnu leh Abraham sikha leh amite akhakheta uhi.
01024060	Huan Rebekah avualzawl ua, akiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu uh aw, nang, sing ngenta sang tampite nu hong hi in! Na suante'n amau hote kulh kongkhak neihsak uhen!” achi uhi.
01024061	Rebekah athou a, asikhanute toh sangawngsaute tung ah atuang ua, huai mi azuita uhi. Abraham sikha in Rebekah api a, apaita uhi.
01024062	Huan Beer-lahai-roi tuikhuk lam a kipan Isak ahong a, amah sim gam a teng ahi.
01024063	Nitaklam in loubuk ah kingaihtuah ding in Isak apawtkhia hi. Adak a, a-en a, ngai in, sangawngsau hong paite amu hi.
01024064	Rebekah adak a, Isak amuhtak in sangawngsau tung a kipan akumkhia hi.
01024065	Sikhapa kiang ah, “Gamlak a hon dawn ding a hong pai kua ahia?” achi a; sikha in, “Ka pu ahi,” achi hi. Kikhuhna puan ala a, akikhuhta hi.
01024066	Sikha in athilhih tengteng Isak ahilh hi.
01024067	Isak in anu Sarah puanin ah apilut a, Rebekah ala a, azi ahong hita hi. Amah a-it a, anu sih nung Isak khamuang in a-omta hi.
01025001	Huan Abraham in zi dang anei nawn a, amin Keturah ahi.
01025002	Ama'n Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak leh Shuah aneihsak hi.
01025003	Jokshan in tapa Sheba leh Dedan anei a, Dedan tapate Asshurim leh Letushim leh Leummim ahi uh.
01025004	Midian tapate Ephah, Epher, Hanok, Abidah leh Eldaah ahi uh. Huai tengteng Keturah tate ahi uhi.
01025005	Abraham in aneih tengteng Isak apia hi.
01025006	Amei tapate kiang ah Abraham in thilpiakte apia a; amah dam lai ngei in atapa Isak a kipan amaute suahlam gam ah asawlkhia hi.
01025007	Abraham damsung kum zakhat sawmsagih-le-nga ahi.
01025008	Abraham in akha akhahta a, lu a kelsam pou vek in tekkun a dam in asi a, achipihte kiang a pi in a-omta hi.
01025009	Atapa Isak leh Ishmael in Hit mi Zohar tapa Ephron lou a, Mamre phak ma a Makpelah kokhuk ah avui uhi.
01025010	Huai lou, Abraham in Heth suante a pan aleisa ahi a, huai mun ah azi Sarah kiang ah Abraham vui in a-om hi.
01025011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Abraham sih nung in, Pathian in atapa Isak avualzawl a; Beer-lahai-roi ah Isak ateng hi.
01025012	Hiaite Abraham tapa Ishmael, Sarah sikhanu, Aigupta mi Hagar in Abraham aneihsak suante ahi uh.
01025013	Hiaite amin chiat uleh asuante uh dungzui zel in Ishmael tapate min ahi. Ishmael tapa upapen Nebajoth ahi a, huai ban ah Kedar, Adbeel leh Mibsam,
01025014	Mishma, Dumah leh Massa,
01025015	Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Naphish leh Kedemah ahi uh.
01025016	Huaite Ishmael tapate ahi ua, huaite akhua uh bang leh agiahphual uh dungzui zel a amin uh gelh ahi a, anam uh bang zel in vaihawmmi sawm-le-nih ahi uhi.
01025017	Ishmael damsung kum zakhat sawmthum-le-sagih ahi a; akha khah in asi a, achipihte kiang ah pi in a-omta hi.
01025018	Atapate Havilah gam a kipan Assuria gam lam a Aigupta gam phak ma a Shur tan in ateng ua, a-unau dang teng a kipan atuamten uhi.
01025019	Hiaite Abraham tapa Isak suante ahi ua: Abraham in tapa Isak anei hi.
01025020	Isak in Padan-aram gam a Siria mi Bethuel tanu, Aram mi Laban sanggamnu Rebekah zi a aneih lai in kum sawmli a upa ahi.
01025021	Azi achiin ziak in Isak in Toupa kiang ah azi a ding in nget petmah in angetsak hi. Toupa'n angetna angaihkhiaksak a, azi Rebekah ahong gaita hi.
01025022	Asung a anaupaite akisual ua; ama'n, “Hichibang ahih ngalleh, bangziak in ahia, ka hi chih?” achi a; Toupa dong ding in akuanta hi.
01025023	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na sul ah nam nih a-om ua, na gilsung a kipan nam nih akikhen ding uh, nam khat sang in nam khat ahatzaw ding a, a-upazaw in anaupangzaw nna asem ding,” achi hi.
01025024	Anau neih ahun in, ngai in, asul ah phik a-om hi.
01025025	Amasazaw asan a san seksawk, puanmul bang a mul thiapthuap in ahong suakkhia a, amin Esau asa uhi.
01025026	Huai nung in anau hong suakkhe nawn a, akhut in Esau khetul alenkip a; ama min Jakob asa uhi. Rebekah in amaute aneih lai in Isak kum sawmguk a upa ahi.
01025027	Naupangte hong khanglian ua; Esau sabetsiam, gamvakmi ahi a; Jakob mimelmawl, puaninte a tengmi ahi.
01025028	Isak in asamatte anek zel ziak in Esau a-it a; Rebekah in bel Jakob a-it hi.
01025029	Jakob in betang ahuan laitak in Esau gamkuan ahong tung a, atawl mahmah hi.
01025030	Esau in Jakob kiang ah, “Hehpih in na betang huan hon nesak in; ka bah mahmah hi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in ahi amin Edom achih uh.
01025031	Jakob in, “Na ta masa hihna hon leisak phot lechin,” achi hi.
01025032	Esau in, “Ngai in, si dek ka hi ngal a; kei a ding in hiai ta masa hihna bang aphatuam dia?” achi hi.
01025033	Jakob in, “Tuni in ka kiang ah kichiam phot in,” achi hi. Akiang ah akichiam a, Jakob kiang ah ata masa hihna akhawng maimah hi.
01025034	Jakob in Esau tanghou leh abetang huan apia a; ama'n ne in adawn a, athou a, apaikheta hi. Huchibang in Esau in ata masa hihna angaineu hi.
01026001	Huan Abraham dam lai a kial ke masapen chih louh, huai gam ah kial ahong ke nawn a, Philistiate kumpipa Abimelek kiang ah Gerar ah Isak ava hohsuk hi.
01026002	Akiang ah Toupa ahong kilak a, “Aigupta gam ah hohsuk ke'n. K'on hilh ding gam ah teng in.
01026003	Hiai gam ah om tadih inla, na kiang ah ka om ding a, ka hon vualzawl ding hi. Hiai gam tengteng nang kiang leh na suante kiang a pia in, na pa Abraham kiang a ka kichiamna ka hihkip ding hi.
01026004	Van a aksi zah in na suante ka pungsak ding a, hiai gam tengteng na suante kiang ah ka pe lai ding hi. Na suan ah leitung a nam tengteng vualzawl in a-om ding uh.
01026005	“Abraham in ka thu amang a, ka thuhilhte, ka thupiakte, ka dan thusehte leh ka dante azuih ziak in,” achi hi.
01026006	Huchi in Gerar ah Isak ateng hi.
01026007	Huai khua a mite'n azi tungtang adong ua; ama'n, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” achi hi. Amel ahoih ziak in hiai khua a mite'n Rebekah ziak in hon that kha ding uh, chi in “Ka zi ahi,” achi ngamta kei hi.
01026008	Hichi a, huai a sawtpi a-om nung in, Philistiate kumpipa Abimelek in tohlet a kipan a-en a, ngai in, Isak in azi Rebekah athoh lai amuta hi.
01026009	Abimelek in Isak asam a, “Ngai in, amah na zi ahi mah vele. Bangziak a ka sanggamnu ahi, chi maimah na hia?” achi hi. Isak in akiang ah, “Amah ziak in ka si kha ding ka chih ziak ahi,” achi hi.
01026010	Abimelek in, “Ka tung ua na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Mite lak a mi kuapeuh in na zi kithuahpih kha thei uh akei maw, ka tung uah siamlouhna na hon tungsak dek vele,” achi hi.
01026011	Abimelek mah in, “Kuapeuh hiai mi hiam, azi hiam, khoih, hihlup ngeingei ding ahi,” chi in mi tengteng thu apia hi.
01026012	Isak in huai gam ah buh aching a, huai kum in aleh za anei a, Toupa'n avualzawl hi.
01026013	Ahong thupi mahmah a, nakpitak a mithupi hong suak hial in ahong lian huaihuai hi.
01026014	Belamhon leh bawnghon anei a, inkuan leng tampi anei a, huaiziak in Philistiate'n amah ahaza uhi.
01026015	Apa Abraham dam lai a, apa sikhate'n tuileh atoh tengteng uh Philistiate'n ahudim ua, lei in ahihdim vek uhi.
01026016	Abimelek in Isak kiang ah, “Ka kiang ua kipan paimang in, kou sang in lah na hatzaw ngal a,” achi hi.
01026017	Huai a kipan Isak apawtkhia a, Gerar Phaizang ah puanin akai a, huai ah atengta hi.
01026018	Isak in apa Abraham dam lai a tuileh atohte uh atou nawn a; Abraham sih nung in Philistiate'n lah ana hudim vek ngal ua. Apa'n amin ana sak bangbang in amin asa chiat hi.
01026019	Isak sikhate'n phaizang ah atou ua, huai ah tuileh nak nei amu uhi.
01026020	Gerar a ganpute'n, “Kou tui ahi,” chi in Isak ganpute toh akisel ua, amah toh akisel ziak un tuileh min Eshek asata hi.
01026021	Tuileh dang atou nawn ua; huai leng tuhkhiak tum in akiselpih nawn zel ua; amin Sitnah asa hi.
01026022	Huai a kipan akisuan a, tuileh dang atou nawn hi. Huai ahihleh tuhkhiak tum in asubuai nawn ngal kei uhi. Tu in, “ Toupa'n mun lianpi ahon bawlsakta a, hiai gam ah chi tampi i suang ding uh,” chi in amin Rehoboth asa hi.
01026023	Huai a kipan Beer-sheba ah ahohtou hi.
01026024	Huai zan mah in akiang ah Toupa akilak a, “Kei, na pa Abraham' Pathian ka hi. Lau ke'n, na kiang ah ka om hi. Ka hon vualzawl ding a, ka sikha Abraham ziak a na suante pungsak ding ka hi,” achi hi.
01026025	Huai mun ah maitam adoh a, Toupa min alou a, huai ah apuanin leng akai hi. Isak sikhate'n huai ah tuileh atou nawn uhi.
01026026	Gerar a kipan Abimelek, alawm Ahuzzath leh sepaih pawl heutu Phikol toh akiang ah ahoh uhi.
01026027	Isak in akiang ah, “N'on ngai kei ua, na kiang ua pan na hon paimangsak ngal ua, bangchidan in ahia ka kiang a na hong pai uh?” achi hi.
01026028	Amau, “Na kiang ah Toupa a-om chih chiantak in ka thei ua, i kikal uah, kou leh nangmah kikal ah kichiam in thu i khung ding uh.
01026029	Na zakdah ka hih ngei louh bang ua, thil hoih kia lou ngal na tung a ka hih louh ua, hoihtak a ka hon paimangsak bang un; nang leng ka siatna ding himhim uh na hihlouhna ding in. Tu in nang Toupa vualzawl na hita,” achi uhi.
01026030	Huan amaute a ding in ankuang aluisak a, ne in adawn uhi.
01026031	Zingsang in beltak in athou ua, akichiamtuah uhi. Isak in amau apaisak a, akiang a kipan khamuangtak in apawtta uhi.
01026032	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai ni mah in Isak sikhate ahong pai ua, tuileh toh thu ahong hilh ua, akiang ah, “Tui ka muta uh,” achi uhi.
01026033	Ama'n huai tuileh Shebah asa hi. Huaiziak in tutan in huai kho min Beer-sheba akichi lai hi.
01026034	Esau kum sawmli a upa ahih in, Hit mi Beeri tanu Judith leh Hit mi Elon tanu Basemath zi in anei hi.
01026035	Huaite Isak leh Rebekah lunggimnate ahi uhi.
01027001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Isak hong tek a, kho mu thei lou khop in amit ahong mialta hi. Atapa upazaw Esau asam a, akiang ah, “Ka tapa,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
01027002	Ama'n, “Ngai in, ka tek mahmahta a, ka sih ni ding lah ka thei kei hi.
01027003	Tu in hehpih in na vanzat, na thaltang leh na thalpeu tawi in, va gamvak inla, sa hon va matsak in.
01027004	Ka sih ma a ka hon vualzawl theihna ding in, ka duh lamtak in meh ding in limtak hon bawlsak inla, ka nek ding in ka kiang ah hon tawi in,” achi hi.
01027005	Isak in atapa Esau ahoupih lai Rebekah in ana za hi. Sa beng a hon po ding in Esau agamvakta hi.
01027006	Rebekah in atapa Jakob kiang ah, “Ngai in, na pa'n na u Esau kiang a athugen ka za.
01027007	Sa hon puak inla, ka nek a ka sih ma a Toupa ma a ka hon vualzawlna ding in, meh limtak hon bawlsak in, chi ahi.
01027008	Ka tapa, tu in ka hon thupiak bang in ka thu zui in.
01027009	Ganhon lak ah va hoh inla, kelnou nih hoihtak, huai a kipan hon la in. Aduh lamtak in na pa a ding in meh limtak in huai ka na bawl ding.
01027010	Asih ma a hon vualzawlsak ding in, anek ding in na pa kiang ah na va paipih ding ahi,” achi hi.
01027011	Jakob in anu Rebekah kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka u Esau mimulhau ahi a, kei lah minel ka hi.
01027012	Ka pa'n hon na zawt vialvial kha ding a, amah a ding in khempa ka hong hi dia, vualzawl gen tak louh hamsiat kizon lel ka hi kei ding maw,” achi hi.
01027013	Anu'n akiang ah, “Ka tapa, ka tung ah na hamsiat muh ding tung hen. Ka thu zui inla, hon va lak in,” achi hi.
01027014	Huchi in akuan a, ava la a, anu kiang ah apaipihta hi. Anu'n apa duh lamtak in meh limtak abawl hi.
01027015	Rebekah in atapa upapen Esau puansilh hoihtak, akiang a inn a om ala a, atapa naupangzaw Jakob asilhsak hi.
01027016	Huai ban ah kelnou vun leng akhut leh angawng nelna munte ah aphah hi.
01027017	Meh limtak leh tanghou abawlte atapa Jakob khut ah apia hi.
01027018	Amah apa kiang ah ava pai a, “Pa aw,” achi a; ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om, ka tapa, akua zaw pen na hia?” achi hi.
01027019	Jakob in apa kiang ah, “Na tapa upazaw Esau ka hi; na hon sawl bang in ka hih khinta. Hehpih in thou inla, hon vualzawl ding in tu inla, ka samatsa ne in,” achi hi.
01027020	Isak in atapa kiang ah, “Ka tapa, bangchidan ahia, hong man baih na tel chia?” achi a. Ama'n, “ Toupa na Pathian in ahon lohchinsak ziak ahi,” achi hi.
01027021	Isak in Jakob kiang ah, “Ka tapa, hehpih in hong pai nai dih, ka hon zawt vialvial ding, ka tapa Esau na hi na hiam,” achi hi.
01027022	Jakob in apa Isak ava naih a; ama'n ana zawt vialvial a, “A-aw Jakob aw hiven, akhutte lah Esau khutte hiven,” achi hi.
01027023	A-u Esau khut abang a, akhut amul ziak in amah atheitel kei hi. Huchi in amah avualzawlta hi.
01027024	“Ka tapa Esau ngei na hi maw?” achi a; ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi.
01027025	Ama'n, “Hon tawi nai in, ka hon vualzawlna ding in ka tapa samatsa ka ne ding,” achi hi. Ahon tawi nai a, aneta a, uain leng ahon la a, huai leng adawn hi.
01027026	Apa Isak in akiang ah, “Ka tapa hong pai nai in, hon tawp in,” achi hi.
01027027	Ava naih a, atawp a, ama'n apuansilh gim aza a, avualzawl hi. “En in, ka tapa gim Toupa vualzawl gam gim bang ahi.
01027028	Pathian in van daitui, lei hoihna, buh tampi leh uain tampi hon pia hen.
01027029	Namte'n na nna sem uhenla, na ma ah namte kun uhen. Na unaute tung ah toupa in om inla; na nu tapate na ma ah kun uhen. Hon hamsiatte hamsiat in om uhenla, hon vualzawl peuhmah vualzawl in om hen,” achi hi.
01027030	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Isak in Jakob avualzawl zohtak in, apa Isak kiang a kipan Jakob a pawtkhe man lel chih in a-unaupa, Esau sabeng ahong tung hi.
01027031	Ama'n leng meh limtak abawl a, apa kiang ah, “Ka pa aw, hong thoukhia inla, na hon vualzawl theihna ding in na tapa samatsa neta in le,” achi hi.
01027032	Apa Isak in akiang ah, “Kua na hia?” achi a; ama'n, “Na tapa, na tapa upazaw, Esau ka hi,” achi hi.
01027033	Isak nakpi in aling zungzung a, “Sa va man a, ka kiang a, asa hon tawi, na hong tun ma a, ka na nek khit a, ka vualzawlpa kua ahia? Ahi, amah vualzawl in a-om ding,” achi hi.
01027034	Esau in apa thugen azak in nakpitak leh khase mahmah in akapta a, apa kiang ah, “Pa aw, hon vualzawl in, kei leng hon vualzawl mahmah ve aw,” achi hi.
01027035	Ama'n, “Na nau in ahong khem a, na vualzawlnate ahong laksakta,” achi hi.
01027036	Ama'n, “Amin Jakob achih uh dik mahmah hilou hia? Nihvei ahon suanta; ka ta masa hihna ahon laksak a; ngai in, tu in ka vualzawlna ahon laksak nawnta,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Kei a dia vualzawlna hon sitsak lou maw?” achi hi.
01027037	Isak in adawng a, Esau kiang ah, “Ngai in, amah na toupa in ka bawlta, a-unau tengteng leng asikha ding in akiang ah ka pe vekta, buh leh uain in leng ka vakta hi. Nang a ding in, ka tapa, bang hon hihsak ding ka hia?” achi hi.
01027038	Esau in apa kiang ah, “Pa aw, vualzawlna khat kia ahi maw na neih? Pa aw, kei leng hon vualzawl mahmah ve,” chi in ngaihtak in akapta hi.
01027039	Huan apa Isak in adawng a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na tenna ding lei hoihna tak, tunglam a kipan van daitui kiakna mun ahi ding.
01027040	Na namsau in ahi na hin ding, himahleh na nau nna na sem ding hi. Hichi ahong hi ding a, na kitutkhiak hun chiang in na ngawng a kipan ahakkol na singkheta ding,” achi hi.
01027041	Apa'n Jakob avualzawl ziak in Esau in amudah hi. Esau in alungsim in, “Ka pa suun ni ding anaita a, huai khit chiang in ka nau Jakob ka that mai ding,” achi hi.
01027042	Atapa upazaw Esau thugen Rebekah ahilh ua; ama'n mi asawl a, atapa naupangzaw Jakob asam a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na u Esau in na tungthu ah, nang hon thah tum in akikhamuan hi.
01027043	Huaiziak in ka tapa, tu in ka thu mang in. Thou inla, Haran a ka sanggampa Laban kiang ah va tai in.
01027044	Na u hehna adaih mateng akiang ah ni bangzah hiam va om tadih in;
01027045	na u hehna na tung a adaih a, atung a na thilhih amangngilh mateng. Huai chiang mi ka hon sawl ding a, huai a kipan ka hong pikhesak ding. Bangziak a ni khat thu a na nih ua hon chan tel ding ka hia?” achi hi.
01027046	Rebekah in Isak kiang ah, “Heth tanute ziak in hin ka chimtak mahmah. Jakob in hiai gam nungak, hiai Heth tanute lak a mi zi ding a aneih nawn ngial in zaw, kei a ding in hin bang phatuam ding ahia?” achi hi.
01028001	Huan Isak in Jakob asam a, avualzawl a, thu leng apia a akiang ah, “Kanaan gam nungakte lak a mi zi in na nei ding ahi kei.
01028002	Thou inla, Padan-aram gam a na nu pa Bethuel inn ah hoh inla, huai a kipan na nu sanggampa Laban tanute lak a mi zi in va nei in.
01028003	Pathian Bangkim hihthei in hon vualzawl in, mipi tampite na hong hihtheihna ding in chi tampi hon suangsak in, hon pungsak hen.
01028004	Mikhual na hihna gam, Pathian in Abraham kiang a apiak na luahna ding in Abraham vualzawlna leng hon tangsak hen, nang leh na suante leng,” achi hi.
01028005	Huchi in Isak in Jakob asawlkhia hi. Huan ama'n Padan-aram gam a, Jakob leh Esau nu Rebekah sanggampa Siria mi Bethuel tapa, Laban kiang azuanta hi.
01028006	Esau in, Isak in Jakob avualzawl a zi nei ding in Padan-aram gam ah asawlkhia, chih leh avualzawl lai a, Kanaan gam nungakte lak a mi zi in na nei ding ahi kei,
01028007	chi in thu apia chih leh Jakob in anu leh apa thu mang in Padan-aram gam ah apaita chih athei hi.
01028008	Esau in Kanaan gam nungakte'n apa Isak lung ahihkim kei uh chih athei hi.
01028009	Ishmael kiang ah Esau ava hoh a, Abraham tapa Ishmael tanu, Nebajoth sanggamnu Mahalath, zi in anei a, zi aneihsate ban ah amah aneih behlap ahi.
01028010	Beer-sheba a kipan Jakob apawt a, Haran kholam azuanta hi.
01028011	Koi lai mun hiam atung a, ni atum tak ziak in huai ah agiakta hi. Huai ah suang khat ala a; lukham in anei a, huai ah ihmu ding in alumta hi.
01028012	Mang anei a, ngai in, leitung ah lei ahong kidoh a, adawn in van asun hi. Ngai in, atung ah Pathian angelte kahtou in akumsuk uhi.
01028013	Ngai in, adawn ah Toupa adingh a, “Kei Toupa , na pu Abraham' Pathian leh Isak' Pathian ka hi. Na lupna gam nang leh na suante kiang ah ka hon pe ding.
01028014	Na suante lei a leivui zah a tam ahi ding ua, tumlam, suahlam, mallam leh simlam ah na dalhzak ding uh. Nang ah leh na suan ah leitung a inkuan chih vualzawl in a-om ding uh.
01028015	Ngai in, na kiang ah ka om, na paina peuh ah ka hon veng ding a, hiai gam ah ka hon pikik nawn ding. Na kiang a ka gen ka hih masak keileh ka hon nuse kei ding,” achi hi.
01028016	Jakob ihmu ahong khanglou a, “Hiai mun ah Toupa a-om ngeingei hi. Ke'n lah ka na thei kei a,” achi hi.
01028017	Huchi in alau a, “Hiai mun lauhuai hi na mai e! Hiai mun dang hilou in, Pathian inn na hi ei ve, hiai van kongpi na hi ei ve,” achi hi.
01028018	Zingkhang in Jakob athou a, asuang lukham ala a, suangphuh in aphut a, adawn ah sathau abuak hi.
01028019	Huai mun min Bethel asa a; akho min bel atung in Luz ahi.
01028020	Jakob in, “Pathian ka kiang a om a, ka paina lampi a ahon ven a, nek ding tanghou leh silh ding puansilh Toupa'n ahon piak a,
01028021	ka pa inn a lungmuangtak a ka hong pai nawnleh Toupa , ka Pathian ahi ding a,
01028022	hiai suang ka phuh leng Pathian' inn ahi ding a; ka kiang a na hon piak ding tengteng a kipan sawm-a-khat ka hon pe ngeingei ding,” chi in akichiamta hi.
01029001	Huai nung in Jakob apai zel a, suahlam mite gam atungta hi.
01029002	Huan a-etleh ngai in, gamlak ah tuileh ana om a, akiang ah belamhon thum akual uhi. Huai tuileh a kipan belamhonte, tui adawnsak uhi. Tuileh kong a suang om alian mahmah hi.
01029003	Huai ah belamhon tengteng apaikhawm ua; tuileh kong a kipan suang akhuksuan ua, tuileh kong a, a-omna ngei ah suang akoih nawn uhi.
01029004	Jakob in akiang uah, “Ka unaute aw, koilam mi na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau, “Haran khomi ka hi uh,” achi uh.
01029005	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nahor tapa Laban na thei kha uhia?” achi a; amau, “Thei e,” achi uhi.
01029006	Ama'n akiang uah, “Dam lai ahi na maw?” achi a; amau, “Dam lai mah e, en in, atanu, Rakil leng belamte pi ding in ahong kuan,” achi uhi.
01029007	Ama'n, “Ngai un, ni asang lai mahmah ngal a, ganhonte pikhawm leng ahun nai kei. Belamte tui dawnsak unla, va khah lai un,” achi hi.
01029008	Amau, “Ka hihthei kei ding uh, belamhon tengteng apikhawm ua, tuileh kong a kipan suang a khuksuan mateng uh. Huai khit chiang in belamte tui ka dawnsak zel uh,” achi uhi.
01029009	Amau ahoupih lai in Rakil, apa belamte toh ahong tung a; ama'n huai belamte achin zel ahi.
01029010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jakob in anu sanggampa Laban tanu Rakil leh anu sanggampa Laban belamhon amuh in ava naih a, tuileh kong a kipan suang akhuksuan a, anu sanggampa belamte tui adawnsak hi.
01029011	Jakob in Rakil atawp a, ngaihtak in akapta hi.
01029012	Jakob in apa tanau nai leh Rebekah tapa ahihdan Rakil ahilh hi. Rakil atai a, apa ava hilhta hi.
01029013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Laban in asanggamnu tapa Jakob tanchin azaktak in, amah dawn ding in atai a, apom a, atawp a, a-inn ah apita hi. Jakob in hiai thu tengteng Laban ahilh hi.
01029014	Laban in akiang ah, “Ka guh mah leh ka sa mah na hi,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang ah kha khat ataam hi.
01029015	Huan Laban in Jakob kiang ah, “Ka tupa na hih ziak in amawk in ka nna na sem dia hia? Bang na loh dia? Hon hilh in,” achi hi.
01029016	Laban in tanu nih anei a; a-upazaw min Leah ahi a, anaupangzaw min Rakil ahi.
01029017	Leah mit anou a, Rakil bel chinou hoihtak ahi a, amel leng ahoih mahmah hi.
01029018	Jakob in Rakil a-it a, “Na tanu naupangzaw Rakil toh kiteng ding in kum sagih nang nna ka hon sepsak ding,” achi hi.
01029019	Laban in, “Amah ahihleh midang kiang a ka piak sang in nang kiang a ka piak mah ahoihzaw ve. Ka kiang ah om nilouh in,” achi hi.
01029020	Jakob in Rakil kitenpih ding in kum sagih a-nna asepsakta hi. Himahleh Rakil a-it mahmah ziak in ni tam lou chik bang in athei hi.
01029021	Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka kithuahpih theihna ding in ka zi hon peta in, ka hun lah akimta ngal a,” achi hi.
01029022	Laban in huai khua a mi tengteng akaikhawm vek a, ankuang alui hi.
01029023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, khomial tung in atanu Leah api a, Jakob kiang ah apilut a; ama'n ana kithuahpih hi.
01029024	Laban in atanu Leah kiang ah asikhanu ding in ama sikhanu Zilpah apia hi.
01029025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang ahong hih in, ngai in, Leah ana hi maimah hi. Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka tung a na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Rakil toh kiteng ding a na nna sem ka ahi kei maw? Bangziak a hon khem maimah na hia?” achi hi.
01029026	Laban in, “Ka gam uah huchibang a ta upazaw ma a anauzaw piak ngeina ahi kei.
01029027	Hiai minu' nipikal zou phot inla, huchi in kum sagih dang ka nna na sep zoh chiang in anauzaw leng ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
01029028	Jakob in huchibang in ahih a, anipikal azouta a; atanu Rakil azi ding in apeta hi.
01029029	Laban in atanu Rakil kiang ah asikhanu ding in ama sikhanu Bilhah apia hi.
01029030	Rakil leng akithuahpih a, Leah sang in Rakil a-itzaw a, Laban nna kum sagih dang asemta hi.
01029031	Toupa'n Leah pen huat in a-om chih athei a, asul ahonsak a; Rakil bel achiing hi.
01029032	Leah agai a, tapa anei a, amin Reuben asa hi. “ Toupa'n ka gimdan amuta. Tu'n zaw ka pasal in hon itta ding,” achi hi.
01029033	Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “ Toupa'n huat a ka om azak ziak in hiai leng ahon pia hi,” achi hi. Huchi in amin Simeon asa hi.
01029034	Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “Tu in tapa thum ka neihsak ziak in, ka pasal in hon zuita ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Levi asa hi.
01029035	Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “Tutung in zaw Toupa ka phat ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Judah asa a; ta anei nawn tadih kei hi.
01030001	Rakil in Jakob ta himhim aneihsak kei chih akitheih in asanggamnu ahazata hi. Jakob kiang ah, “Tate hon pia in, huchi ahihkeileh ka si ding,” achi hi.
01030002	Rakil tung ah Jakob aheh a, “Gilgah hon pe lou Pathian bang ka hi a hia?” achi hi.
01030003	Ama'n, “En in, ka sikhanu Bilhah kithuahpih in. Huchi a ke'n leng amah a kipan tate ka neih sam theihna ding in ka phei tung ah ta ka hon nei ding hi,” achi hi.
01030004	Huan azi ding in asikhanu Bilhah apia a, Jakob in amah ana kithuahpih hi.
01030005	Bilhah agai a, Jakob ta aneihsakta hi.
01030006	Rakil in, “Pathian in hon ngaihtuah a, ka aw leng aza, tapa ahon pia,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Dan asa hi.
01030007	Rakil sikhanu Bilhah agai nawn a, Jakob tapa dang aneihsak nawn hi.
01030008	Rakil in, “Nakpitak in ka sanggamnu ka buan a, ka zouta,” achi a; amin Naphtali asa hi.
01030009	Leah in ta dang anei nawn kei chih akitheih in, asikhanu Zilpah api a, azi ding in Jakob kiang ah apia hi.
01030010	Huan Leah sikhanu Zilpah in Jakob tapa aneihsak hi.
01030011	Leah in, “Vangphathuai ei,” achi a; amin Gad asa hi.
01030012	Leah sikhanu Zilpah in Jakob tapa dang aneihsak nawn hi.
01030013	Leah in, “Hampha hi na tel ing e! Numeite'n hampha hon chi ding uh ei ve,” achi a, amin Asher asa hi.
01030014	Buh lak hun lai in Reuben in gamlak ah zawl-ai ava mu a; anu Leah kiang ah hon tawi hi. Rakil in Leah kiang ah, “Hehpih in na tapa zawl-ai akhen hon pe dih ve,” achi hi.
01030015	Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka pasal na hon suhsak thil namai ahi hia? Ka tapa zawl-ai leng hon suhsak na tum nawn lai maw?” achi hi. Rakil in, “Na tapa' zawl-ai sik in tuzan nang ahon kithuahpih ding,” achi hi.
01030016	Nitaklam in Jakob gamlak a kipan ahong tung a, adawn ding in Leah akuan a, “N'on kithuahpih ding ahi. Ka tapa zawl-ai in ka hon guaita ngal a,” achi hi. Huai zan in amah akithuahpih hi.
01030017	Pathian in Leah thumna angaikhia a, agai a, Jakob tapa ngana aneihsak nawn hi.
01030018	Leah in, “Ka sikhanu ka pasal kiang a ka piak ziak in Pathian in ka loh hon pia ei ve,” achi a; amin Issakar asa hi.
01030019	Leah agai nawn a, Jakob tapa gukna aneihsak nawn hi.
01030020	Leah in, “Pathian in thil hoihtak hon neisak a; tu in zaw ka pasal tapa guk ka neihsak tak ziak in, ka kiang ah atengta ding,” achi a; amin Zebulun asa hi.
01030021	Huai nung in tanu anei nawn a, amin Dinah asa hi.
01030022	Pathian in Rakil atheigige a, Pathian in athumna angaikhia a, asul ahonsak hi.
01030023	Amah agai a, tapa anei a, “Pathian in ka minsia alamangta,” achi hi.
01030024	“ Toupa'n tapa dang hon piakbeh ding,” chi in amin Joseph asa hi.
01030025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Rakil in Joseph aneih nung in, Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Kei ka omna ngei ah, ka gam ah hon paisakta in.
01030026	Na nna ka sepsan ka zite leh ka tate hon pia inla, hon paisak in; na nna ka hon sepsakdan lah na thei ngal a,” achi hi.
01030027	Laban in akiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh hehpih in om tadih lai ve. nang vang in Toupa'n kei ahon vualzawl, chih ka thiltuahte a kipan in ka sinkhia hi,” achi hi.
01030028	Amah mah in, “Na thaman ding gen inla, hon hilh dih, ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
01030029	Ama'n akiang ah, “Bangchi in na nna ka sem a, bangchi in ka kiang ah na gantate a-om ua, na thei akei hiam?
01030030	Ka hong ma in tawmchik kia na nei a, tu'n zaw tampi ahong phata uh. Ka kalsuanna peuh ah Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hi. Himahleh chikchiang in ahia ka inkuante a ding a ka sepkhiak sam ding?” achi hi.
01030031	Ama'n, “Bang ka hon pe dia?” achi a. Jakob in, “Bangmah na hon piak ding ahi kei. Hiai thil na hon hihsakleh na gantate ka khah dia ka ching nawn ding hi.
01030032	Tuni in na gantate ka va enkhe vek ding a, belam lak a, avom gial petmah a gial leh avom a gial zekzek leh avom peuhmah, kel lak a, akang a gial petmah agial leh akang a gial zekzekte huai a kipan ka pituam zel ding hi. Tuban huchibang a hong piang peuhmah ka loh ahita ding hi.
01030033	Tunung a nang toh kal a ka thaman en ding a na hong pai hun chiang in, ka diktatna in ahon dawng mai ding. Kel lak a akang a gial petmah a gial lou leh akang a gial zekzek lou leh belam lak a avom lou ka kiang a na muh peuhmah ka guk in na sep mai ding,” achi hi.
01030034	Laban in, “Ngai in, na gen bang geih in hi hen aw,” achi hi.
01030035	Huai nitak in keltal akang a gial leh akang a gial zekzek teng leh kelnu akang gial petmah a gial leh akang a gial zekzek teng akanna om peuhmah, belam lak a avom tengteng toh apituam a, atapate khut ah apia hi.
01030036	Amah leh Jakob kikal ah ni thum lam a-omsak a; Jakob in Laban ganhon dangte aching nawn hi.
01030037	Jakob in hiangzau sing leh makha sing leh sesing chiang hing ala a, ahawng akhokngou chiat a, chiangte ah angoute akilangsak hi.
01030038	Achiang hawng khohte ganhonte'n tui ahong dawnna zel tuikuangte ah, tui luannate ah leh gantate mazawn zel ah akoih hi; tui dawn ding a ahong pai chiang ua againa ding un.
01030039	Gantate chiangte ma ah agai panta ua, agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial zekzekte hon neikhia uhi.
01030040	Jakob in belamnoute akoihtuam a, ganhonte Laban ganhon lak a, agial leh avom tengteng lam angasak zel a; amah ganhonte akoihtuam zel a, Laban ganhon lak ah akoih kei hi.
01030041	Huan hichi ahong hi a, gannu hatzawte ahuk chiang un, agaitheihna ding un Jakob in tuiluanna ah, ganhonte mitmuh in chiangte akoih zel hi.
01030042	Himahleh gannu hatloute mai ah akoih kei hi. Anou hatloute Laban a ahi ua, ahatte Jakob a ahi zel uhi.
01030043	Jakob nakpi in ahong pung a, ganhon thupitak, sikhanute, sikhapate, sangawngsaute leh sabiltungte aneita hi.
01031001	Huan Laban tapate'n, “Jakob in i pa neihsate lamang in, i pa neihsa a kipan hiai thupina tengteng amu,” achih uh Jakob in ana zata hi.
01031002	Jakob in Laban mel a-en a, ngai in, tuma lam bang in atung ah ahoih nawn kei chih athei hi.
01031003	Toupa'n Jakob kiang ah, “Na pipute gam ah leh na tanaute kiang ah pai nawnta in. Na kiang a om ding ka hi,” achi hi.
01031004	Jakob in mi asawl a, gamlak a aganhon omna ah Rakil leh Leah asamsak a, akiang uah,
01031005	“Na pa uh mel ka muh in, tuma lam bang in ka tung ah ahoih nawn kei chih ka thei hi. Himahleh ka kiang ah ka pa' Pathian a-om hi.
01031006	Ka theihtawp in na pa uh nna ka sem chih na thei uh.
01031007	Himahleh na pa un hon khem a, ka loh lah sawmveitak ahihlamdang a; himahleh Pathian in ka siatna ding akhoih aphal kei hi.
01031008	Gial petmah a gialte na loh ahi ding, achihleh, ganta tengteng in gial petmah a gialte anei uh. Agialte na loh ahi ding achihleh, ganta tengteng in agialte anei zel uhi.
01031009	Huchibang in Pathian in na pa gantate alaksak a, kei ahon peta hi.
01031010	“Huan hichi ahong hi a, gantate agai pat lai un, ka mang in ka dak a, ngai in, apa, ganhonte, agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial a gial iik-iakte ahi uh chih ka mu hi.
01031011	Ka mang in Pathian angel in, ‘Jakob,’ hon chi a; ke'n, ‘hiai ah ka om’ ka chi hi.
01031012	Ama'n, ‘dak inla, en in, apa gantate tengteng agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial a gial iik-iakte ahi uh. Laban in na tung a athilhih tengteng ka mu hi.
01031013	Kei, suangphuh a sathau na nilh a, ka kiang a thu na chiamna Bethel, huai Bethel Pathian ka hi. Tu in thou inla, hiai gam a kipan pawt inla, na pianna gam ah pai nawnta in,’ ” achi hi.
01031014	Rakil leh Leah in adawng ua, akiang ah, “Ka pa uh inn ah koute a ding in tantuan leh gouluah ding a-om lailai a hia?
01031015	Ama'n mikhual bang lel a hon sim hita lou maw? Ahon khawng khinta a, ka man uh lah ane khinta hi.
01031016	Pathian in ka pa uh hauhna alaksak tengteng ei leh i tate a ahi. Pathian in na kiang a agen peuhmah hih in,” achi uhi.
01031017	Jakob athou a, sangawngsau tung ah atapate leh azite atuangsak hi.
01031018	Kanaan gam a apa Isak kiang a pai ding in aganta tengteng leh alamkhiak tengteng, aganta muhte, Padan-aram gam a akholte apaipih vek hi.
01031019	Laban, abelam mulmet ding in apawtkhia a; huan Rakil in apa milimte aguksak hi.
01031020	Siria mi Laban theih louh kal in Jakob in aguk paimangsan a, apaimangsan ding thu ahilh kei hi.
01031021	Huchi in aneih tengteng toh ataikheta hi. Athou a, Luipi akan a, Gilead tang lam zuan in apaita hi.
01031022	Ani thum ni in Jakob ataikhia chih Laban ahilh uh.
01031023	Asanggamte api a, ni sagih lam tan adelh a; Gilead tang ah adelhphata hi.
01031024	Siria mi Laban kiang ah zan in amang in Pathian ahong a, akiang ah, “Jakob kiang ah asia hi in apha hitaleh bangmah gen lou ding in pilvang in,” achi hi. Laban in Jakob adelhphata hi.
01031025	Jakob in tang ah apuanin akai khin a; Laban in leng asanggamte toh Gilead tang ah akai uhi.
01031026	Laban in Jakob kiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Ka theih louh kal a na guk paimang a, namsau a lak salte bang mai a ka tanute na pimang?
01031027	Bangziak a hon taimangsan a, hon guk paisan a, nopsaknate toh, late toh, khuangtate toh, kaihgingte toh ka hon khaktheihna ding a na hon hilh louh?
01031028	Ka tute leh ka tanute ka tawp na phal kei. Haihuaitak in thil na hih hi.
01031029	Hon hihse thei ka hi a; himahleh na pa Pathian in tuzan in, ‘Jakob kiang ah asia, apha bangmah gen lou ding in pilvang in,’ chi in hon houpih hi.
01031030	Na pa inn na ngaih mahmah tak ziak a, pai ut hi tawk lechin leng bang ding a ka pathiante hon guksak na hia?” achi hi.
01031031	Jakob in adawng a, Laban kiang ah, “Ka lauh ziak ahi. Na tanute kei a pan na hon suhsak kha ding ka chi a ahi.
01031032	Kuapeuh tung a na pathiante na muhna ahing kei ding. I unaute mitmuh in nang thilte ka kiang a om a-omleh, enchian inla, la in,” achi hi. Rakil in huaite na gu ahih lam Jakob in athei ngal kei a.
01031033	Jakob puaninte ah, Leah puaninte ah leh sikhanu nihte puaninte ah Laban alut a; himahleh amu kei. Leah puanin a kipan apawtkhia a, Rakil puanin ah alut hi.
01031034	Rakil in milimte ana la a, sangawngsau van lak ah ana koih a, ana tutkhum hi. Laban in apuanin sung tengteng amaisuak vek a, himahleh amu kei hi.
01031035	Ama'n apa kiang ah, “Na ma a ka din ngap louh ziak in ka toupa, heh ke'n aw; numei omdan ngeina ka tung a a-om laitak ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Azongzong a, himahleh milimte amuzouta kei hi.
01031036	Huchi in Jakob aheh a, Laban asalta hi. Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka tatlekna bang ahia? Ka khelhna bang hi ahia, na hon hichi delh kin?
01031037	Ka vante teng na pheklek nung in, na insung van bang na mu a? Ei gel kal a thu akhentheihna ding un ka unaute leh nang unaute ma ah na muh pen hon koihkhia in.
01031038	Kum sawmnih vingveng na kiang ah ka omta a; na belampite leh na kelpite'n nou aneikhial ngei kei uh. Na belamhonte lak a apate leng ka ne ngei kei.
01031039	Gamsa keih leng na kiang ah ka hon tun ngei ngal kei a: amangte sik in ke'n ka thuak zaw zel a; sun a guk hiam, zan a guk hiam lah ka dit na hon phut gige zomah hi.
01031040	Hichibang in ka om zel a; sun nisa leh zan khovot in hon hihgim thei mahmah a; ihmut leng ka mu ngei kei.
01031041	Kum sawmnih sung teng na inn ah ka om a; na tanu nihte loh ding in kum sawm-le-li na nna ka sem a, na gante loh ding in kum guk ka sem nawn a; ka loh sawmvei na hihlamdang hi.
01031042	Ka pa' Pathian, Abraham' Pathian leh Isak' Pathian lauhna ka kiang a om lou hileh houh, tu'n vuaktang lel a hon paisak ngeingei ding na hi. Pathian in ka haksat thuakdan leh ka sepgimdan amu a, tuzan a nang hon sal ahi,” achi hi.
01031043	Laban in adawng a, Jakob kiang ah, “Hiai tanute ka tanute ahi ua, hiai naupangte ka naupangte ahi uh. Hiai gante kei gante ahi ua, na muh tengteng kei a vek ahi uh. Tuni in hiai ka tanute tung ah leh ata neihte uh tung ah bang ka hihthei dia?
01031044	Kisa in, kei leh nang in thukhun i bawl ding; kei leh nang kikal ah theihpihna hi hen,” achi hi.
01031045	Huchi in Jakob in suang ala a, suangphuh in aphut hi.
01031046	Jakob in atanaute kiang ah, “Suang lakhawm un,” achi hi. Suang ala ua, achiangkhawm ua, asuang chiankhawm kiang ah an ane uhi.
01031047	Laban in huai suang chiankhawm, Jegar-sahadutha asa a; Jakob in bel Galeed asa hi.
01031048	Laban in, “Hiai suang chiankhawm tu in kei leh nang kikal ah theihpihtu ahi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Galeed chih ahita hi.
01031049	“Kikhen a i om hun chiang in Toupa'n hon veng tuaktuak hen,” achih ziak in Mizpah leng achi hi.
01031050	“Ka tanute na sukgentheih a, ka tanute lou zi dang na neihleh, ka tanute chih louh kuamah i kiang ah a-om kei na ua, en in, Pathian, kei leh nang kal hon theihpihpa ahi,” achi ngal hi.
01031051	Laban mah in, “Hiai suang chiankhawm en inla, keimah leh nangmah kikal a ka phuh, suangphuh leng en in.
01031052	Poi kikhoihsak ding in, kei hiai suang pel in na kiang ah ka hong pai kei ding, chih leh nang leng hiai suang chiankhawm leh hiai suangphuh pel in ka kiang ah na hong pai kei ding, chih, hiai suang chiankhawm atheihpihtu hi henla, hiai suangphuh leng atheihpihtu mah hi hen.
01031053	Abraham' Pathian, Nahor Pathian, apa uh Pathian in i kal ah thu khen hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Jakob in apa Isak lauhpa min lou in akichiamta hi.
01031054	Jakob in tang ah kithoihna alan a, atanaute tanghou ne ding in asamkhawm a; tanghou ane ua, tang ah agiak chiat uhi.
01031055	Zingsang in beltak in Laban athou a, atute leh atanute atawp a, avualzawl hi. Laban apaikhia a, amah omna ah akik nawnta hi.
01032001	Jakob apai zel a, Pathian angelte'n ana tuak uhi.
01032002	Jakob in amaute amuh in, “Hiai Pathian giahphual ahi,” achi a; huai mun Mahanaim asa hi.
01032003	Jakob in Edom gam, tua Seir gam ah ama ah thangkoute Esau kiang ah asawl hi.
01032004	Akiang uah ka toupa Esau kiang ah hichi in na gen ding uh, “Na sikha Jakob in hichi in achi: Laban kiang ah mikhual ka hi a, tutan ka om nilouh hi.
01032005	Bawngtalte, sabiltungte leh belamte, sikhapate leh sikhanute ka nei hi. Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihna ding a ka toupa hilh ding in mite ka hon sawl hi,” chi in.
01032006	Jakob kiang ah thangkoute ahong kik nawn ua, “Na u Esau kiang ka va tung ua, mi zali toh nang dawn ding in ahong pai hi,” chi in agen uhi.
01032007	Jakob in alau mahmah a, alungkhamta hi. Akiang a mi omte, belamhonte, bawnghonte leh sangawngsaute pawl nih in akhen hi.
01032008	“Esau ahong pai a, pawl khat athahleh leng taimang thei ding pawl khat om lai,” achi hi.
01032009	Jakob mah in, “Aw ka pa Abraham' Pathian, ka pa Isak' Pathian, Toupa , na gam ah leh na tanaute kiang ah pai nawnta in, ka hon hihhoih ding hon chipa,
01032010	na sikha tung a hehpihna na muhsakleh thutak tengteng na muhsak lak a, aneupen leng mu tak ka hi kei. Hiai Jordan lui ka chiangkhun kia toh ka kan a; tu in zaw pawl nih hial ka hong hita uhi.
01032011	Hehpih in ka u khut a kipan, Esau khut a kipan, hon humbit in. Huchi lou in zaw kei leh numei naupangte tan in ahon that kha ding, chih ka lau hi.
01032012	Nang ka hon hihhoih ngeingei ding a, na suante tuipi a piaunel sim zoh louh tan hial a atam bang in ka bawl ding na hon chi ngal a,” achi hi.
01032013	Huai zan in huai ah agiakta a; aneihte lak a kipan a-u Esau a ding thilpiak alakhia hi.
01032014	Kelpi zanih, keltal sawmnih, belampi zanih leh belampa sawmnih,
01032015	sangawngsau zat lai sawmthum anoute toh, bawngpi sawmli leh bawngtal sawmkhat, sabiltungpi sawmnih leh sabiltungnou sawmkhat.
01032016	Hiaite pawl chih atuam chiat in asikhate khut ah akemsak a, asikhate kiang ah, “Ka ma ah pai galkah unla, pawl chih kal neisak zel un,” achi hi.
01032017	Amakaipa kiang ah, “Ka u Esau in ahon tuah a, na kiang a, kua na hia? Koi a hoh dek na hia? Na ma a om kuate ahi ua? chi a ahon dotleh,
01032018	‘Na sikha Jakob a ahi ua; hiaite ka pu Esau, nang ka toupa a ding a ahon khak thilpiakte ahi uh. Ngai in, amah ka nung uah a-om,’ na chi ding,” chi in thu apia hi.
01032019	Anihna leh athumna leh ganhon hawlte tengteng kiang ah leng, “Esau na muh chiang un huchibang mah in na gen ding uh.
01032020	‘Ngai in, na sikha Jakob ka nung uah a-om,’ chi chiat un,” chi in thu ape chiat hi. “Thilpiak ka ma ah paileh alung ka damsak ding a, huai nung in amel ka mu ding. Huchi in ahon na kipahpih ding,” achi hi.
01032021	Huchi in thilpiak ama ah apai masasak a; amah huai zan in apawlte lak ah agiak hi.
01032022	Zan in athou a, azi nihte leh asikhanu nihte leh atapa sawm-le-khatte api a, Jabbok lui ngahna ah akanta hi.
01032023	Amaute api a, lui akan ua, aneih tengteng leng akansak vek hi.
01032024	Jakob amah kia in a-omta a, mi khat toh phalvak tan akibuan uhi.
01032025	Azou kei chih akitheih in Jakob pheipi guhtuah akhoihsak a, akibuan lai un Jakob pheipi guhtuah akilawita hi.
01032026	Ama'n, “Hon khah in, phalvak ding ahita,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n, “N'on vualzawl keileh ka hon khah kei ding,” achi hi.
01032027	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na min bang ahia?” achi a; ama'n, “Jakob,” achi hi.
01032028	Ama'n, “Na min Jakob ahi nawn kei ding a, Israel ahon chi zawta ding uh: Pathian leh mihingte na buan a, na zouta ngal a,” achi hi.
01032029	Jakob in amah adong a, “Hehpih in na min hon hilh in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Bangziak in ahia ka min na hon dot?” achi hi. Huchi in huai ah avualzawlta hi.
01032030	Jakob in huai mun min, “Peniel,” asa hi. “Pathian amai chin mahmah ah ka mu a; ka hinna ahawi ziak in,” achi hi.
01032031	Peniel akhen lai in, ni ahong suak a, amah ahon sun a, apheipi ziak in abaita hi.
01032032	Huaiziak in Jakob pheipi guhtuah a sadual tak akhoihsak ziak in, tuni tanpha Israel suante'n pheipi guhtuah a sadual om ane ngei kei uhi.
01033001	Huan Jakob dakkhia a a-etleh, ngai in, akiang ah mi zali toh Esau ahong pai hi. Huchi in Leah, Rakil leh sikhanu nihte kiang ah atate a-omsak khipkhep hi.
01033002	Sikhanute leh atate amakai in akoih a, azom in Leah leh atate, huan Rakil leh Joseph bel ananungpen in akoih hi.
01033003	Amah ama uah apai a, a-u kiang chin atun masiah sagihvei lei si in akun hi.
01033004	Himahleh Esau amah mu ding in atai a, apom a, angawng a kun in atawp a, akap uhi.
01033005	Esau dakkhia a a-etleh, numeite leh naupangte amu a, “Hiai n'on tonpihte kuate ahi ua?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Pathian in hehpihtak a na sikha kiang a apiak naupangte ahi uh,” achi hi.
01033006	Sikhanute leh atate uh ahong pai ua, akun uhi.
01033007	Leah leng atate toh ahong pai nai ua, akun ua, huai khit in Joseph leh Rakil leng ahong pai nai ua, akun uhi.
01033008	Esau in, “Ka ganhon kituahpih tengpi bang na chihna ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihna ding in ka chi a ahi,” achi hi.
01033009	Esau in, “Ke'n leng hau veng e, bawi aw, na neih tengteng nang a hi hen,” achi hi.
01033010	Jakob in, “Hilou e, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihleh hehpih in ka hon thilpiakte hon sansak in. Pathian mel mu bang in na mel ka mu a, ka tung ah lah na kipak ngal a.
01033011	Pathian in hon hehpih ziak leh akiching ka neih ziak in ka hon thilpiakte sang in,” achi hi. Huchi in akun teitei a, ama'n asangta hi.
01033012	Esau in, “Kisa in, pai ni, na ma ah ka pai ding,” achi hi.
01033013	Ama'n akiang ah, “Naupangte aneu laidan uleh belamhon ka kiang a omte anou ahihdan uh, ka toupa'n na thei hi. Ni khat lel leng hat lua a, ahawl uleh ganhon tengteng si vek ding uh ahi.
01033014	Ka toupa, hehpih in na sikha ma ah pai inla; ke'n Seir tang ah, ka toupa, na kiang ka tun mateng, ka ma a gante apai zoh dandan uleh naupangte apai theihdan bang zel un, awlawl in ka hon masuan zel ding,” achi hi.
01033015	Esau in, “Ka kiang a om mi khenkhat hon nutsiat leng ake,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Apoimoh khol a hia? Ka toupa mitmuh in deihsakna hon musak in,” achi hi.
01033016	Huai ni mah in Seir tang lam zuan in Esau akik nawnta hi.
01033017	Sukkoth mun ah Jakob apai a, amah a ding in inn alam a, agante a ding in leng aidakbukte alam hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min Sukkoth asa hi.
01033018	Padan-aram gam a kipan Jakob ahong paikhiak nung, lungmuangtak in Kanaan gam a om Shekem khua atung a, huai khopi ma ah apuanin azakta hi.
01033019	Shekem pa Hamor tapate a kipan dangka zakhat in apuanin zakna mun alei hi.
01033020	Huai ah maitam adoh a, amin El-Elohe-Israel asa hi.
01034001	Huan Leah tanu Dinah, Jakob aneihsak, huai gam nungakte mu ding in apawtkhia hi.
01034002	Hiv mi Hamor, huai gam vaihawmpa tapa Shekem in amah ana mu a, pummat in aluppih a, ahihninta hi.
01034003	Jakob tanu Dinah tung ah alungsim a-omden a, huai nungak a-it mahmah a, kamsiamtak in ahoupih hi.
01034004	Shekem in apa Hamor ahoupih a, “Ka zi ding in huai nungak hon pisak in,” achi hi.
01034005	Jakob in atanu Dinah aninsak khin chih aza a, gamlak ah aganhonte lak uah atapate a-om uhi. Huchi in ahong tun mateng uh Jakob adai dide hi.
01034006	Jakob houpih ding in Shekem pa Hamor akiang ah ahoh hi.
01034007	Jakob tapate'n azaktak un gamlak a kipan ahong pai ua, Jakob tanu kithuahpih in Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuaitak, thilhih het louh ding, ahih ziak in adah ua, aheh mahmah uhi.
01034008	Hamor in amau ahoupih a, “Ka tapa Shekem lungsim na tanu uh tung ah a-om tinten a, hehpih in azi ding in neisak ve ua.
01034009	Kilatuah ve ni e; na tanute uh hon lasak unla, ka tanute uh leng la sam un.
01034010	“Ka kiang uah na teng ding ua; gam leng akiching gige ding. Hiai ah teng unla, sum sin unla, hiai ah kihih inbul un,” achi hi.
01034011	Shekem in nungak' pa leh asanggampate kiang ah, “Na deihsakna uh hon musak unla, huan ka kiang a na gen peuh uh ka hon pe ding.
01034012	Man leh thilpiak zaw bangzah gen le uchin, na chih bangbang uh ka hon pe ding. Akoi abang hitaleh, nungak pen zi ding in hon neisak phot un,” achi hi.
01034013	Jakob tapate'n asanggamnu uh Dinah anitsak ziak in Shekem leh apa Hamor khembawl in adawng ua, akiang uah,
01034014	“Hiai thil zeksum louh mi kiang a ka tanu uh piak pen ka hihthei kei ding uh; huai lah koute a ding in minsiatna ahi ngal a.
01034015	Hichibang a kichiam kia in na thu uh pha ka sa ding uh. Na lak ua pasal peuhpeuh koute bang a zeksum in om uhen.
01034016	Huchi in ka tanute uh na nei ding ua, kou leng na tanute uh ka nei sam ding uh. Na kiang uah ka teng ding ua, chi khat i hi ding.
01034017	Himahleh, zeksum thu a ka thu uh na zuih kei ding uleh, ka tanu uh ka pi ding ua, ka pai mai ding uh,” achi uhi.
01034018	Athugen un Hamor leh Hamor tapa Shekem akipaksak hi.
01034019	Tangval in Jakob tanu adeih mahmah ziak in huai thil sawt hal lou in ahihta hi. Amah apa inkuan tengteng lak a mite zahtak pen ahi.
01034020	Hamor leh atapa Shekem in akhokulh kongkhak uh apha ua, akhote uh ahoupih uhi.
01034021	“Hiai mite ei toh kilemtak in a-om uh. Huaiziak in hiai gam a teng in, hiai ah sum sin uhen. Ngai un, amaute a ding in gam lah aza ngal a. Atanute uh zi in nei lehang, i tanute uh leng neisak sam ni.
01034022	Himahleh nam khat i hong hihna ding a i kiang a tentheihna ding un hichibang a i chiam kia in huai mite'n pha ahon sakpih ding uhi; zeksum ahih bang ua i lak ua pasal peuhpeuh zeksum hong hita lehang.
01034023	Agante uh, asumte uh, asa tengteng uh ei a ahi vek kei dia hia? Athu uh pha sakpih mai ve ni e, huchi in i kiang uah ateng ding uh,” achi uhi.
01034024	Hamor leh atapa Shekem thu a khokulh kongkhak a pawtkhe tengteng in azui ua; akhokulh kongkhak a pawtkhe tengteng, pasal peuhpeuh zek asumsak uhi.
01034025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni a, nat athuak lai un, Jakob tapate lak a nih, Dinah sanggampa Simeon leh Levi in anamsau uh tawi tuak in aguk in khua ava sualta ua, pasal tengteng athatgam uhi.
01034026	Namsau hiam in Hamor leh atapa Shekem athat ua, Shekem inn a kipan Dinah api ua, apawtta uhi.

01034028	Abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh, asabiltungte uh, akhua ua thil omte leh alou ua thil omte alaksak uhi.
01034029	Asum tengteng uleh ata-anau neu chikchikte leh azite tengteng uh sal in aman ua, insung a om tengteng alok uhi.

01035001	Huan Pathian in Jakob kiang ah, “Thou inla, Bethel ah hohtou in, huai ah teng in. Na u Esau a kipan na taimang lai a, na kiang a kilak Pathian a ding in huai mun ah maitam doh in,” achi hi.
01035002	Jakob in a-inkuanpihte leh akiang a om tengteng kiang ah, “Na lak ua om gamdang pathiante koihmang unla, kihihsiangthou unla, na puansilhte uh kheng un.
01035003	I thou ding ua, Bethel ah i paitou ding uh. Ka lungzin lai a hon dawng, ka paina a ka kiang a om zel Pathian a ding in maitam ka doh ding,” achi hi.
01035004	Huchi in gamdang pathiante akhut ua om tengteng leh abil ua bilbah abah tengteng uh Jakob kiang ah apekhe vek uhi. Jakob in Shekem kho kiang a tosaw nuai ah aphum hi.
01035005	Apai ua, akim ua khuate'n alau mahmah ua, Jakob tapate adelh kei uhi.

01035007	huai ah maitam adoh a, a-u a kipan ataimang lai a, akiang a Pathian akilak ziak in huai mun min El-bethel asa hi.

01035010	Pathian in akiang ah, “Na min Jakob ahi a; na min Jakob ahi nawn kei ding a, na min Israel ahi zawta ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amin Israel asata hi.
01035011	Pathian mah in akiang ah, “Kei Pathian Bangkim hihthei ka hi. Chi tampi suang in hong pung in. Nam, chih tham ngial leh nam tuamtuam omkhawmte leng nang ah ahong om ding ua, na khal a kipan kumpipate leng ahong pawt ding uhi.
01035012	Abraham leh Isak kiang a ka gam piak na kiang ah ka hon pe ding. Na om louh nung chiang in na suante kiang ah leng gam ka pe zel ding,” achi hi.
01035013	Pathian in ahoupihna mun a kipan Jakob apaitouh santa hi.
01035014	Ahoupihna mun ah Jakob in suangkhuam aphut a; atung ah dawn thillat abuak a, atung ah sathau leng abuak hi.
01035015	Jakob in Pathian in ahoupihna mun min Bethel asa hi.
01035016	Bethel a kipan apaikhia ua; Ephrath kho tunna ding gamlatak ahih lai in Rakil in nau avei a, anak vei mahmah hi.
01035017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, agim laitak in naudommi'n, “Lau ke'n, tapa nei nawn ding na hi,” achi hi.
01035018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, alaitah ding kuan in, (amah lah si dek ahi ngal a), amin Ben-oni asa a; himahleh apa'n Benjamin asa hi.
01035019	Rakil asita a, Ephrath lampi ah avui uh; huai Ephrath khua Bethlehem ahi.
01035020	Ahan tung ah Jakob in suang aphut a; huai tuni tan in Rakil hansuang ahiden hi.
01035021	Israel apai zel a, Migdol Eder khen lam ah apuanin akai hi.
01035022	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel huai gam a a-om lai in Reuben in apa mei Bilhah ava kithuahpih a; Israel in huai aza hi.
01035023	Jakob tapate sawm-le-nih ahi uh. Leah tapate Reuben (Jakob tapa upapen), Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakar leh Zebulun ahi uh.
01035024	Rakil tapate Joseph leh Benjamin ahi uh.
01035025	Rakil sikhanu Bilhah tapate Dan leh Naphtali ahi uh.
01035026	Leah sikhanu Zilpah tapate Gad leh Asher ahi ua; hiaite Jakob tapa, Padan-aram gam a aneihte ahi uhi.
01035027	Kiriath-arba a Abraham leh Isak omna Mamre ah apa Isak kiang ah Jakob atungta a; Kiriath-arba khua Hebron leng kichi ahi.
01035028	Isak damsung kum zakhat-le-sawmgiat ahi.
01035029	Isak in akha akhahta a, upapi tekkun a dam in asi a, huan achipihte kiang ah pi in a-omta hi. Atapate Esau leh Jakob in amah avui uhi.
01036001	Huan hiaite Esau suante ahi ua (huai tuh Edom kichi ahi).
01036002	Esau in azite Kanaan gam a nungakte lak a aneih ahi: Hit mi Elon tanu Adah leh Hiv mi Zibeon tanu Anah tanu Aholibamah ahi ua;
01036003	huan Ishmael tanu, Nebajoth sanggamnu Basemath toh.
01036004	Adah in Esau a ding in Eliphaz aneihsak a; Basemath in Reuel aneihsak hi.
01036005	Aholibamah in Jeush, Jaalam leh Korah anei a; hiaite Esau tapate, Kanaan gam a aneihte ahi uh.
01036006	Esau in azite, atapate, atanute, a-inn a mi tengteng, agante tengteng, asa tengteng leh athil neih tengteng, Kanaan gam a amuhte apaipih a, anau Jakob kiang a kipan gamdang ah apaimangta hi.
01036007	Athil neihte uh athupi lua a, a-omkhawm thei kei uhi. Agante uh ziak in mikhual a a-omna gam un achinta kei hi.
01036008	Seir tang ah Esau atengta hi: Esau ahihleh Edom ahi.
01036009	Hiaite Seir tang a Edomte suangpa Esau suante ahi uh.
01036010	Hiai Esau tapate minte ahi: Esau zi Adah tapa Eliphaz; Esau zi Basemath tapa Reuel.
01036011	Eliphaz tapate: Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam leh Kenaz ahi uh.
01036012	Timna ahihleh Esau tapa Eliphaz mei ahi a; ama'n Amalek, Eliphaz aneihsak hi. Hiaite Esau zi Adah suante ahi uh.
01036013	Hiaite Reuel tapate ahi uh: Nahath leh Zerah, Shammah leh Mizzah. Hiaite Esau zi Basemath suante ahi uh.
01036014	Hiaite Zibeon tanu Anah tanu Esau zi Aholibamah tapate ahi uh: Ama'n Esau Jeush, Jaalam leh Korah aneihsak hi.
01036015	Hiaite Esau tapate lak a hausa makaite ahi uh: Esau ta masapen Eliphaz tapate: hausa makai Teman, hausa makai Omar, hausa makai Zepho, hausa makai Kenaz,
01036016	hausa makai Korah, hausa makai Gatam leh hausa makai Amalek. Hiaite Edom gam a Eliphaz a kipan pawt hausa makaite ahi ua, hiaite Adah suante ahi uh.
01036017	Hiaite Esau tapa Reuel suante ahi ua: Hausa makai Nahath, hausa makai Zerah, hausa makai Shammah leh hausa makai Mizzah. Hiaite Edom gam a Reuel a kipan a pawt hausa makaite ahi ua; Esau zi Basemath suante ahi uh.
01036018	Hiaite Esau zi Aholibamah suante ahi ua: Hausa makai Jeush, hausa makai Jaalam leh hausa makai Korah. Huaite hausa makai Anah tanu Esau zi Aholibamah suante ahi uh.
01036019	Huaite Edom leng kichi Esau tapate ahi ua; hiaite ahausa makaite ahi uh.
01036020	Hiaite Hor mi Seir tapa gam luahte ahi uh: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,
01036021	Dishon, Ezer leh Dishan. Huaite Edom gam a Seir tapa Horte hausa makaite ahi uh.
01036022	Lotan tapate Hor leh Hemam ahi ua; Lotan sanggamnu Timna ahi.
01036023	Hiaite Shobal tapate ahi uh: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho leh Onam.
01036024	Hiaite Zibeon tapate ahi uh: Aiah leh Anah. Hiai Anah, apa Zibeon sabiltungte akhah lai a gamdai a tuisa khukte mukhepa ahi.
01036025	Hiaite Anah tate ahi uh: Dishon leh Anah tanu Aholibamah.
01036026	Hiaite Dishon tapate ahi uh: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran leh Cheran.
01036027	Hiaite Ezer tapate ahi uh: Bilhan, Zaavan leh Akan.
01036028	Hiaite Dishan tapate ahi uh: Uz leh Aran.
01036029	Hiaite Horte hausa makaite ahi uh: Hausa makai Lotan, hausa makai Shobal, hausa makai Zibeon leh hausa makai Anah,
01036030	hausa makai Dishon, hausa makai Ezer leh hausa makai Dishan. Hiaite Seir gam a hausa makai ahihdan bang a Horte hausa makaite ahi uh.
01036031	Hiaite kumpipa kuamah in Israel suante tung a vai ahawm ma ua, Edom gam a vaihawm kumpite ahi uh.
01036032	Beor tapa Bela in Edom gam ah vai ahawm a, akhopi min Dinhabah ahi.
01036033	Bela asi a, Bozrah mi Zerah tapa Jobab in asik in vai ahawm hi.
01036034	Jobab asi a, Temante gam a mi Husham in asik in vai ahawm hi.
01036035	Husham asi a, Bedad tapa Hadad, Moab loubuk a Midiante thatpa'n asik in vai ahawm a, akhopi min Avith ahi.
01036036	Hadad asi a, Masrekah mi Samlah in asik in vai ahawm hi.
01036037	Samlah asi a, Luipi gei a Rehoboth mi Saul in asik in vai ahawm hi.
01036038	Saul asi a, Akbor tapa Baal-hanan in asik in vai ahawm hi.
01036039	Akbor tapa Bal-hanan asi a, Hadar in asik in vai ahawm a, akhopi min Pau ahi. Azi min Mehetabel ahi a, amah Mezahab tanu Matred tanu ahi.
01036040	Hiaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel leh amun dungzui zel uh leh amin dungzui zel ua Esau suan hausa makaite min ahi. Hausa makai Timnah, hausa makai Alvah leh hausa makai Jetheth,
01036041	hausa makai Aholibamah, hausa makai Elah, hausa makai Pinon,
01036042	hausa makai Kenaz, hausa makai Teman, hausa makai Mibzar,
01036043	hausa makai Magdiel leh hausa makai Iram. Hiaite agam neih uah a-omna uh dungzui zel in Edom suan hausa makaite ahi uh, amah Edomte pa Esau ahi.
01037001	Apa mikhual a a-omna gam, Kanaan ah Jakob ateng hi.
01037002	Hiaite Jakob suante ahi uh. Joseph, kum sawm-le-sagih a upa ahih in, asanggamte toh ganhon akhah uhi. Amah naupang ahi lai a, apa' zite Bilhah leh Zilpah tapate kiang ah a-om a; Joseph in agitlouhna thu uh apa uh kiang ah atun hi.
01037003	Israel in Joseph, atek lam ta ahih ziak in atapate tengteng sang in a-itzaw a; puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial abawlsak hi.
01037004	Apa un asanggamte tengteng sang in amah a-itzaw chih asanggamte'n athei uhi; amah amudah ua, kampha himhim in ahoupih thei kei uhi.
01037005	Joseph in mang anei a, asanggamte ahilh a, amah amudah semsem uhi.
01037006	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hehpih in ka mang ngai dih uh.
01037007	Ngai un, lou ah buhphalte i na gak ua, ngai dih uh, kei buhphal athoutou a, adingh nemnom hi. Ngai un, nou buhphalte'n ahong um ua, kei buhphal ma ah akun chiat uh,” achi hi.
01037008	Asanggamte'n akiang ah, “Nang sop lai in ka tung uah vai na hawm mahmah ding maw? Nang sop lai in ka tung uah thu na nei mahmah ding maw?” achi uh. Huchi in amang ziak in amah amudah semsem uhi.
01037009	Mang dang anei nawn a, asanggamte ahilh nawn hi, “Ngai un, mang ka nei nawn hi. Ni, kha leh aksi sawm-le-khatte ka mai ah akun uhi,” achi hi.
01037010	Apa leh asanggamte ahilh hi. Apa'n atai a, akiang ah, “Mang na neih bangchi mang ahia? Kei leh na nu leh na sanggamte lei si in na mai ah ka kun taktak ding uh maw?” achi hi.
01037011	Asanggamte'n amah ahaza ua, apa'n bel athugen alungsim in apai nilouh hi.
01037012	Asanggamte Shekem ah apa uh ganhon khah in ahoh uhi.
01037013	Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Na sanggamte'n Shekem ah ahi maw ganhon akhah uh? Hong pai dih, akiang uah ka hon sawl ding,” achi hi. Huan ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
01037014	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na sanggamte adamdam na uhiam, ganhon leng adamdam na hiam va en inla, atanchin uh hong hilh nawn in,” achi hi. Hebron Phaizang a kipan asawlkhia a, Shekem ava pha hi.
01037015	Mi kuahiam in amah gamlak a vakvak amu hi. Huai mi'n, “Bang zong na hia?” chi in adong hi.
01037016	Ama'n, “Ka sanggamte zong ka hi. Hehpih in ganhon akhahna uh hon hilh ve,” achi hi.
01037017	Huai mi'n, “Hiai a kipan pawt hi ve un, Dothan ah i hoh ding uh, achih uh ka za,” achi hi. Joseph in asanggamte adelhzui a, Dothan ah ava mu hi.
01037018	Amau gamlapi a kipan ana galmuh ua, akiangnai uh atun ma in, amah thah ana sawm khin uhi.
01037019	Amau, “En un, hiai ah mang neipa ahong pai.
01037020	Hong un, i that ding ua, kokhuk khat ah i khe ding uh. Gamsa gilou in ane, chi na ni. Amangte bangchibang in a-om a, chih i thei mai ding uh,” akichi uhi.
01037021	Reuben in huai ana za a, akhut ua pan ahunkheta hi. “Thah zaw i that hial kei ding uh,” achi hi.
01037022	Reuben mah in apa uh kiang a, apitheihna ding a, akhut ua pan ahotkhiak theihna ding in, akiang uah, “Sisan zaw suah kei un, gamdai ah kokhuk ah khia un, atung ah khut kha kei un,” achi hi.
01037023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joseph asanggamte kiang atun in, Joseph puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial asilh, ana suahsak uhi.
01037024	Amah api ua, kokhuk ah akheta uhi. Huai kokhuk avuak ahi a, tui om louhna ahi.
01037025	An ne ding in atu chiat ua, adak ua, a-en ua, ngai in, Gilead gam a kipan Ishmael khualzin mite, asangawngsau ua thil gimnamtui, singnai damdawi leh murrah pua in Aigupta gam a paisuk dingte ahong pai uhi.
01037026	Judah in asanggamte kiang ah, “I naupa uh i thah ua, asisan suak i iim un bang phattuamna om ding ahia?
01037027	Hong un, atung a khut kha lou in, Ishmaelte kiang ah i zuak zaw ding uh; amah lah i sanggam uh, i sa ngeingei uh ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in asanggamte'n athu azuita uhi.
01037028	Midian sumsin mite ahong pai ua; kokhuk a kipan Joseph akaikhia ua, Ishmaelte kiang ah dangka sawmnih in Joseph akhawngta uhi. Amau Aigupta gam ah Joseph api uhi.
01037029	Kokhuk ah Reuben ahong pai nawn a, ngai in, kokhuk ah Joseph ana omta kei a; apuansilhte abotkek hi.
01037030	Asanggamte kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, “I naupa uh a-om nawn kei. Kei koi a paita ding ka hia oi?” achi hi.
01037031	Joseph puanaktual ala ua, kelnou agou ua, asi ah apuanaktual adiah uhi.
01037032	Huai puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial akhak ua, apa uh kiang ah ahon la ua, “Hiai lel ka mu ua, na tapa puanaktual ahi hia, hilou, en mah dih,” achi uh.
01037033	Ama'n ana thei pah a, “Ka tapa puanaktual ahi ve. Gamsa gilou in ne ahi ve. Joseph bohnen vek a om hi mahmah ding ahi ve,” achi hi.
01037034	Jakob in apuansilhte abotkek a, sai-ip puan ateng a, ni tamtak atapa asuun hi.
01037035	Atapa tengteng leh atanu tengteng amah lungmuan ding in athou ua; himahleh amah lungmuan a-ut kei, “Suun kawm in han ah ka tapa kiang ah ka paisuk ding,” achi hi. Amah ngai in apa akap hi.
01037036	Midiante'n Aigupta gam ah Joseph alutpih ua, Pharaoh nuai a heutu khat, vengmi pawl heutu Potiphar kiang ah azuak uhi.
01038001	Huai lai in hichi ahong hi a, asanggamte kiang a kipan Judah apaisuk a, Adullam mi khat amin Hirah ava bel hi.
01038002	Judah in huai ah Kanaan mi khat tanu amin Shuah amu a; akitenpih a, akithuahpih hi.
01038003	Huchi in agai a, tapa anei a; Judah in amin Er asa hi.
01038004	Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a; anu'n amin Onan asa hi.
01038005	Tapa anei nawn a, amin Shelah asa a; amah aneih lai in Kezib ah Judah a-om hi.
01038006	Judah in ata masa Er a ding in zi apisak a, amin Tamar ahi.
01038007	Toupa mitmuh in Judah ta masa Er agilou a; Toupa'n amah athat hi.
01038008	Judah in Onan kiang ah, “Na upa zi kitenpih inla kithuahpih in, na upa a ding in chi suahsak in,” achi hi.
01038009	Onan in chisuah ding pen ama suan ahi kei ding chih athei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-upa zi akithuahpih teng in a-upa a ding a chi asuahsaklouhna ding in lei ah achi akesak zel hi.
01038010	Athilhih in Toupa alungkimsak kei a, huaiziak in amah leng Toupa'n athat hi.
01038011	Judah in amounu Tamar kiang ah, “Ka tapa Shelah apichin mateng na pa inn ah meithai in va om tadih phot in. Huchi lou in zaw amah leng asanggamte bang in asi kha ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Tamar apai a, apa inn ah ava omta hi.
01038012	Anung in Shuah tanu Judah zi asi a; Judah ahong khamuantak in, Timnah ah abelam mulmette kiang ah alawm Adullam mi Hirah toh ahohtou uhi.
01038013	Mi'n Tamar, “Na pasal pa, abelam mul met ding in Timnah ah ahohtou,” chi in ahilh uhi.
01038014	Apasal suunna puansilhte asuah a, kikhuhna puan in akikhuh a, akituam bikbek a, Enaim kulh kongpi a Timnah kho lampi ah ana tu hi. Shelah apichingta ngal a, apa'n azi ding in amah apisak kei, chih athei hi.
01038015	Judah in amah amuh in kizuak hi in teh achi a; amai lah akikhuh bikbek ngal a.
01038016	Lampi gei a om huai numei ava zuan a, “Kisa in, hehpih in i lumkhawm ding,” achi hi (amou mah ahi chih lah athei ngal kei a). Ama'n, “Hon kithuahpih leng bang na hon pe dia?” achi hi.
01038017	Ama'n, “Ganhon lak a kipan kelnou ka hon khak ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huai na hon khak ma in kichiamna bang na hon pe dia?” achi hi.
01038018	Ama'n, “Kichiamna bang ka hon pe dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na minsawnna leh na taute leh na chiangkhun,” achi hi. Huchi in hiaite apia a, akithuahpih a, amah a kipan nau apaita hi.
01038019	Athou a, akikhuhna puan asuah a, ameithai puansilhte asilh nawnta hi.
01038020	Judah in akichiamna numei khut a kipan la ding in alawmpa Adullam mi khut ah kelnou akhak a, himahleh ama'n huai numei ava muzouta kei hi.
01038021	Huchi in numei omna mun a mite kiang ah, “Lampi gei a Enaim a kizuaknu koi a omta ahia?” chi in adong hi. Amau, “Hiai ah kizuak om kei,” achi uhi.
01038022	Huchi in Judah kiang ah akik nawn a, “Amah ka muzou kei. Amun a mite'n leng kizuak mawngmawng hiai ah a-om kei ana chi uh,” achi hi.
01038023	Judah in, “Ama'n nei den mai hen, huchi lou in zaw i zahlak kha ding. Ngai in, hiai kelnou khak ing a, amah lah muzou lou chin a,” achi hi.
01038024	Kha thum vel nung in mi'n, “Judah, na mounu, Tamar kizuak ve aw; huai lou leng, ngai in, sawn apai hi,” chi in ahilh uhi. Judah in, “Pikhia unla, hallup in om hen,” achi hi.
01038025	Apikhiak uleh, Tamar in, “Hiai thilte neipa a kipan ahi nau ka pai,” chi in apasal pa kiang ah mi asawl hi. Amah mah in, “Hehpih in hiai minsawnna, taute leh chiangkhun, kua a ahia, ana enchian ding in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.
01038026	Judah in huai thilte amah a ahi, chih ana thei hi. “Kei sang a amah diktatzaw ahi. Ka tapa Shelah lah amah toh ka na kitengsakta kei a,” achi hi. Huchi in Judah in amah akithuahpih nawn het kei hi.
01038027	Huan anau suah hun ahong tun in hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, asul ah phik ana om uhi.
01038028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, nau avei lai in khat in akhut ahon golhkhia a; naudommi in, “Hiai pen apawt masazaw ahi,” chi in ana len a, akhut ah khau san abunsak hi.
01038029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akhut alakkik toh kiton in, ngai in, asanggampa ahong suakkhia hi. Naudommi in, “Bangchidan a nang hon phusuak mawk na hia? Nang amoh khu in,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Perez asa uhi.
01038030	Huai nung in asanggampa, akhut a khau san bun pen ahong pawt nawn a, amin Zerah asa uhi.
01039001	Huan Aigupta gam ah Joseph apisuk ua; Pharaoh nuai a heutu khat, vengtu pawl heutu, Aigupta mi, Potiphar in ahon pisuk Ishmaelte khut a kipan aleita hi.
01039002	Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, amah mi lohchingtak ahi a; apu Aigupta mi inn ah a-om hi.
01039003	Apu in, Toupa akiang ah a-om a, athilhih peuhmah Toupa'n akhut ah alohchingsak chih athei hi.
01039004	Huchi in Joseph in apu mitmuh in deihsakna atang a, a-inn ah nna asem zel hi. Ama'n a-inkuante tung ah heutu in abawl a, aneih tengteng akhut ah akoih vek hi.
01039005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-inn leh aneih tengteng tung a heutu ding a abawl nungsiah Joseph ziak in Toupa'n Aigupta mi insung avualzawlta hi. Inn lam leh gam lam a aneih tengteng ah Toupa'n avualzawl hi.
01039006	Huchi in aneih tengteng Joseph khut ah akoih a, aneih teng, a-an nek kia lou ngal bangmah atheihpih kei hi. Joseph pianhoih leh melhoihtak ahi.
01039007	Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, apu zi in Joseph angaih et a, “Hon kithuahpih in,” achi hi.
01039008	Himahleh a-ut kei a, apu zi kiang ah, “Ka pu in hiai inn ah ka kiang ah bangbang a-om a chih lah athei ngal kei a, aneih tengteng ka khut ah akoih vek hi.
01039009	Hiai insung ah kei sang a lianzaw kuamah a-om kei. Azi na hih ziak in nang kia lou ngal, kei a kipan bangmah it anei kei hi. Bangchi in hiai khelhna khawktak hih in Pathian tung ah thil ka hihkhial thei dia?” achi hi.
01039010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng in Joseph houpih zel mahleh amah kithuahpih lam thu hiam, ama kiang a om lam thu hiam alimsak nuam kei hi.
01039011	Huchih lai in hichi ahong hi a, a-nna sem ding in insung ah ava lut a; insung ah mi himhim kuamah a-om kei hi.
01039012	Huchi in ama'n, “Hon kithuahpih in,” chi in apuansilh ah ana man a, ama'n apuansilh akhut a nusia in ataikhia hi.
01039013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, apuansilh akhut a nusia in ataikhia, chih atheihtak in,
01039014	A-inn a mite asam a, akiang uah, “En un, hon zahlaksak ding in Hebru mi khat i kiang ua hon pi ahita ve. Hon kithuahpih tum in ka kiang ah ahong lut a, huchi in ngaihtak in ka kikouta hi.
01039015	Huan hichi ahi a, aw suah a ngaihtak a ka kikou azaktak in hiai ka kiang ah apuansilh anusia a, ataikheta,” achi hi.
01039016	Joseph pu ahong tun masiah apuansilh akiang ah ana koih gige hi.
01039017	Akiang ah hiai thu ana gen a, “Hebru sikha i kiang a na hon pi in hon zahlaksak tum in ka kiang ah ahong lut hi.
01039018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, aw suah a ka kikoutak in hiai apuansilh ka kiang a nusia in ataikheta,” achi hi.
01039019	Huan hichi ahi a, Joseph pu in azi in akiang a, “Na sikha in hichi in ahon bawl,” chi a, athugen azak in, ahehna asou hi.
01039020	Huchi in Joseph pu in amah api a, suangkul, kumpi suangkul tangte khumna mun ah akhum a; huchi in suangkul ah a-omta hi.
01039021	Himahleh Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, atung ah azahngai a, suangkul vengmi mitmuh in deihsakna atang hi.
01039022	Huchi in suangkul vengmi in suangkul a tang tengteng Joseph khut ah akemsakta hi. Huchi in huai a thil kihih peuhmah ama hih ahong hita.
01039023	Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, athilhih peuhmah Toupa'n alohchinsak ziak in suangkul vengmi in akhut a thil om himhim a-enta kei hi.
01040001	Huan huai thil khit in hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta kumpipa uain pepa leh atanghou bawlpa'n apu uh Aigupta kumpipa alungkimsak kei uhi.
01040002	Pharaoh, asikha heutu nihte tung ah, a-uain pia heutupen tung ah leh atanghou bawl heutupen tung ah ahehta hi.
01040003	Huchi in vengmi pawl heutu inn, Joseph hen a a-omna suangkul ah, atangsakta hi.
01040004	Vengmi pawl heutu in amau Joseph akemsak a, amau a-nna asepsak ua, bang tan hiamtak atang uhi.
01040005	Suangkul a hen a om, Aigupta kumpipa uain pepa leh tanghou bawlpa'n zan khat khiakna tuam tuak mang anei uhi.
01040006	Azing in akiang uah Joseph ava lut a, amau ava mu a, ngai in, ana lungkham mahmah uhi.
01040007	Ama'n, “Bangchi na hi ua, tuni in lungkham mel pu na tel uchia?” chi in Pharaoh sikha heutu suangkul a tangte adong hi.
01040008	Amau akiang ah, “Mang ka nei tuak ua, hon hilhchiansak thei kuamah lah a-om ngal kei a ahi,” achi uh. Joseph in akiang uah, “Mang hilhchetnate Pathian a ahi kei maw? Hehpih in na mang uh hon hilh un,” achi hi.
01040009	Huchi in uain pia heutupen in amang Joseph ahilh a, akiang ah, “Ngai dih, ka mang in, ka ma ah grepgui ahong om hi.
01040010	Grepgui ah kahiang thum a-om a, ahong selnou ua, ahong pak ua, apakbomte'n grep minte ahon piangsak uhi.
01040011	Huan ka khut ah Pharaoh nou ahong om a; grep gahte ka lou a, Pharaoh nou sung ah ka suk a, huai nou Pharaoh khut ah ka na pia,” achi hi.
01040012	Joseph in akiang ah, ahilhchetna hiai ahi: “Kahiang thumte ni thum ahi.
01040013	Tu a kipan ni thum in Pharaoh in na lutang adomkang ding a, na nasep mah ahon semsak nawn ding. A-uain pepa na hih lai a, na piak ngeina bang in akhut ah Pharaoh nou na pe nawn ding.
01040014	Himahleh na dinmun ahong hoih hun chiang in hon theigige inla, hehpih in hehpihna ka tung a langsak in, Pharaoh kiang ah ka tungtang hon gen inla, huan hiai inn a kipan hon pikhia in.
01040015	Hebrute gam a kipan mi'n aguk a, ahon gukmang uh ka hi a; hiai gam ah leng kokhuk sung a ahon khumna ding in bangmah ka hihkhial kei,” achi hi.
01040016	Tanghou bawlpa'n hilhchetna ahoih chih atheih in, Joseph kiang ah, “Ke'n leng mang ka nei a, ngai in, lohbeu thum ka lu in ka na pua hi.
01040017	Lohbeu tungnungpen ah Pharaoh an, tanghou bawlpa bawl, chi chih ana om hi. Huaite vasate'n lohbeu ka lu a ka puak a kipan ana ne souhsouh uh,” achi hi.
01040018	Joseph in adawng a, “Hiai ahilhchetna ahi: Lohbeu thum ni thum ahi.
01040019	Tu a kipan ni thum in Pharaoh in na pumpi a kipan na lutang adomkang ding a, sing dawn ah akhai ding. Huchi in vasate'n na sa ane souhsouh ding uh,” achi hi.
01040020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni, Pharaoh pian champha ni in, ama'n asikha tengteng a ding in ankuang alui hi. Asikhate lak a uain pia heutupen lutang adomkangta hi.
01040021	Uain pia heutupen uain pemi mah in apangsak nawn a; Pharaoh khut ah nou apeta hi.
01040022	Himahleh Joseph in amau ahilhchet bangtak in, tanghou bawl heutupen akhailumta hi.
01040023	Himahleh, uain pia heutupen in Joseph atheigige kei a, amangngilhta hi.
01041001	Huan kum nih vingveng nung in hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh in mang anei a; ngai in, lui gei ah ana dingh hi.
01041002	Ngai in, bawngpi sagih hoih taktak, thau taktak ngen tui a kipan ahong pawtkhetou ua, loupa nou lak ah ahong gamta uhi.
01041003	Ngai in, bawngpi dang sagih kil theuthou, gawng gemgom ahong pawtkhe nawn ua, bawngpi dangte kiang, lui gei ah adingh uhi.
01041004	Huan bawngpi kil theuthoute'n bawngpi hoih taktak, thau taktakte anegai maimah uhi.
01041005	Huchi in Pharaoh akhanglou a, a-ihmu nawn a, mang anei nawn hi. Ngai in, buh kung khat ah avui sagih lian pipi, hoih liahluah ahong omkhia hi.
01041006	Ngai in, huai nung in vui sagih ngat giuhgeuh suahlam huih in anuai eksa nung ahong omkhe nawn hi.
01041007	Avui ngat giuhgeuhte'n avui sagih lian pipi, hoih liahluahte avalh khin maimah uhi. Huchi in Pharaoh akhanglou a; ngai in, mang ana hi.
01041008	Azingsang in hichi ahong hi a, alungsim abuai mahmah a; mi asawl a, Aigupta gam a mitkhialdawi siam tengteng leh mipil tengteng asamkhawm hi. Pharaoh in amang amau ana hilh a; himahleh Pharaoh mangte hilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uhi.
01041009	Huchih lai in uain pia heutupen in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Tuni in ka hihkhelh ka theikhia hi.
01041010	Khatvei asikhate tung ah Pharaoh aheh a, huchi in vengmi pawl heutu inn ah kei leh tanghou bawl heutupen ahon tangsak hi.
01041011	Kei leh ama'n zan khat mang ka nei ua, akhiakna tuam tuak ahi ka mat uh.
01041012	Huai ah ka kiang uah vengmi pawl heutu sikha, Hebru mi, tangval khat a-om a; amah ka hilh ua, ama'n ka mangte uh ahilhchian hi. Ka mang uh toh kituak in ahon hilhchetsak hi.
01041013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kei ka nasep mah ahon semsak nawn a, amah akhailumta hi,” achi hi.
01041014	Pharaoh in Joseph asamsak pah a, kintak in suangkul a kipan apikheta uhi. Amah akimet ngil a, apuansilh akhek a, Pharaoh kiang ah ava lut hi.
01041015	Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Mang ka nei a, ahilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uh. Nang mang thu na zak chiang in na hilhchian thei chih na tungtangmi gen ka na za hi,” achi hi.
01041016	Joseph in Pharaoh adawng a, “Huai ahihleh kei a om ahi kei hi. Pathian in lungkimhuaitak in Pharaoh adawng zaw ding,” achi hi.
01041017	Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Ka mang in, ngai in, lui gei ah ka na dingh hi.
01041018	Ngai in, bawngpi sagih hoih taktak, thau taktak ngen tui a kipan ahong pawtkhetou ua, loupa nou lak ah ahong gamta uhi.
01041019	Bawngpi dang sagih gina lou leh deihhuai lou leh gawng siatsuat, huchibang tel a hoih lou Aigupta gam tengteng a leng ka muh ngei louh, anung uah ahong pawtkhetou nawn uhi.
01041020	Bawngpi gawng siatsuat deihhuai lou pipite'n bawngpi sagih thau taktak hong pawt masate anegai maimah uhi.
01041021	Anekgaih khit nung un leng, ane uh chih akithei tuan kei hi. Atung lai mah bang in deihhuai loutak in a-om lailai uhi. Huchi in ka khanglouta hi.
01041022	Ka mang in, ngai in, buh kung khat ah vui sagih lian pipi, hoih pipi ahong vuikhia hi.
01041023	Ngai in, huai nung in vui sagih vuai ningniang, neu chikchik, suahlam huih in anuai hong vuikhe nawn hi.
01041024	Avui ngat ngiungeute'n avui sagih hoih taktakte avalh khit maimah uh ka mu hi. Mitkhialdawi siamte ka hilh a, himahleh hon hilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uh,” chi in agen hi.
01041025	Joseph in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Pharoah mang khat ahi a, Pathian in hih ding a akisak Pharaoh theisak ahi.
01041026	Bawng sagih hoih taktakte kum sagih ahi ua; vui sagih hoih taktakte leng kum sagih mah ahi uh. Huai mang khat ahi.
01041027	Anung ua bawng sagih tek taktak, deihhuai lou taktak hong pawtkhetoute kum sagih ahi ua, vui sagih ahawm ngen suahlam huih nuaite toh; huaite kial kum, kum sagih ding ahi.
01041028	Hiai ahi Pharaoh kiang a ka gen. Pathian in hih ding a akisak Pharaoh kiang a theisak ahi.
