01041029	Ngai in, Aigupta gamsung pumpi ah niang-le-tai a om kum, kum sagih ahong tung ding.
01041030	Huai nung in kial kum, kum sagih ahong om nawn ding. Huchi in Aigupta gam ah niang-le-tai a omna mangngilh vek ahita ding. Kial in gam anegawp vek ding hi.
01041031	Niang leh tai kum hon zui kial pen anasat mahmah ding ziak in mite'n hiai gam hauhsak lai hun athei nawnta kei ding uh.
01041032	Pharaoh mang nihvei aneih tuansakna ahihleh hiai ziak ahi. Thilhih ding Pathian in ahihkip a, Pathian in atungsak pah ding hi.
01041033	“Tu in Pharaoh in mi khat, teitak leh piltak zongkhia henla, Aigupta gam tung ah heutu in omsak hen.
01041034	Pharaoh in hiai hih hen. Gam tung ah heutute sep henla, niang-le-tai a om kum, kum sagih sung Aigupta gam buh mun nga a khen mun khat zel kaikhawm hen.
01041035	Amau huai kum hoih kum hong tung ding a buh tengteng kaikhawm in Pharaoh nuai a om ding in khuate ah tunung a nek ding in buh sungkhawm henla, kholkhawm hen.
01041036	Kial ziak a gam amanlouhna ding in, buh kial kum, kum sagih Aigupta gam a hong tun hun a ding in hiai gam a ding a kiginkholhna ahi ding,” achi hi.
01041037	Pharaoh leh asikha tengteng in hiai thusawm hoih asaklamtak uh ahi.
01041038	Pharaoh in asikhate kiang ah, “Hichibang Pathian kha omna mi i muzou ding ua hia?” achi hi.
01041039	Pharaoh mah in Joseph kiang ah, “Pathian in hiai tengteng hon theihsak ziak in, nang bang a tei leh pil himhim a-om kei uh.
01041040	Nang ka inkote tung ah heutu in na om ding a, ka khua-le-tui tengteng na thu bang zel in a-om ding uh. Laltutphah a tut thu ah kia nang sang in ka lianzaw ding,” achi hi.
01041041	Pharaoh mah in Joseph kiang ah, “En in, Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah heutu in ka hon bawl hi,” achi hi.
01041042	Pharaoh in akhut a kipan aminsawnna zungbuh atolkhia a, Joseph khut ah abunsak a, puanmalngat a kibawl puansilhte asilhsak a, angawng ah dangka-eng khainiang a-oksak lai hi.
01041043	Akangtalai neih nihna ah atuangsak a, “Ama ah khukdin un,” chi in mi akikousak hi. Huchi in Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah heutu in abawlta hi.
01041044	Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Kei Pharaoh ka hi, na thu lou in Aigupta gamsung pumpi ah kuamah in akhut uh hiam, akhe uh hiam alik kei ding,” achi hi.
01041045	Pharaoh in Joseph min Zaphnath-Paneah asa a; azi ding in On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath apia hi. Joseph apawt a, Aigupta gamsung pumpi asiksuak hi.
01041046	Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh ma a Joseph adin lai in kum sawmthum a upa ahi. Pharaoh a kipan Joseph apawt a, Aigupta gamsung pumpi asiksuak hi.
01041047	Hauh kum, kum sagih sung, lei in buh tampi atungsak hi.
01041048	Aigupta gam ah hauh kum, kum sagih ahong tung a, buh tengteng adongkhawm a, huai buhte khuate ah asungkhawmta hi. Akim a om kho chih lou a buhte asungkhawm chiat hi.
01041049	Joseph in buh tampi, tuipi piaunel zah bang in asungkhawm venvon a, asim leng atawp hial hi; sim zoh vual louh ahih tak ziak in.
01041050	Kial ahong tun ma in Joseph in tapa nih anei a, huaite On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath in aneihsakte ahi uh.
01041051	Joseph in atapa masa min Manasseh asa a, “Pathian in ka sepgimna leh ka pa insung mite tengteng ahon mangngilhsakta,” achi hi.
01041052	Atapa nihna min Ephraim asa a, “Pathian in ka gimthuakna gam ah chi ahon suangsakta,” achi hi.
01041053	Hauh kum, kum sagih Aigupta gam a hong tung abeita hi.
01041054	Huan kial kum, kum sagih ding, Joseph gen bang in ahong tung panta hi. Gam chih ah kial ahong keta a; Aigupta gamsung teng ah bel nek ding a-om hi.
01041055	Aigupta gam a mi tengteng akialtak un, Pharaoh kiang ah nek ding ngen in akikou uhi. Pharaoh in Aigupta mite kiang ah, “Joseph kiang ah hoh unla; na kiang ua agen peuhmah hih un,” achi hi.
01041056	Leitung pumpi ah kial aketa hi. Joseph in sunkhawmna buh innte ahong a, Aigupta gam ah leng kial anak kiak mahmah hi.
01041057	Leitung pumpi a kial anak kiak luat ziak in gam chih a mite buh lei ding in Aigupta gam a Joseph kiang ah ahong zel uhi.
01042001	Huan Jakob in Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih atheihtak in, Jakob in atapate kiang ah, “Bangziak a ki-en maimah na hi ua?” achi hi.
01042002	Amah mah in, “Ngai un, Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih ka za hi. Si lou a i hinkhiak theihna ding in huai ah va hohsuk unla, huai a kipan ei a ding in buh va lei un,” achi hi.
01042003	Joseph sanggam sawmte Aigupta ah buh lei ding in ahohsuk uhi.
01042004	Jakob in asanggamte kiang ah Joseph nau Benjamin ahohsak kei; tuahsia ava tuak kha ding, achih ziak in.
01042005	Huchi in Israel tapate mi ava hohte lak ah buh lei ding in ahoh ua; Kanaan gam ah leng kial ake ngal a.
01042006	Aigupta gam tung a heutu Joseph ahi a; amah huai gammi tengteng kiang a buh zuakpa ahi. Joseph sanggamte ahong pai ua, lei si in amai ah akun uhi.
01042007	Joseph in asanggamte ana mu a, amau ana thei lai hi. Himahleh akiang uah midang bang in akibawl a, khauhtak in amaute ahoupih hi. Akiang uah, “Koi a kipan a hong na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau, “Buh lei ding a Kanaan gam a kipan hong pai ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
01042008	Joseph in asanggamte ana thei lai a, amaute'n ahihleh amah athei kei uh.
01042009	Joseph in amau tungtang thu, mang a amatte atheikheta hi. Akiang uah, “Enkhe mite na hi uh. Gam venlouhna munte en ding a hong kuan na hi uh,” achi hi.
01042010	Amau akiang ah, “Ka toupa, hilou e, na sikhate buh lei ding a hong kuan ka hi uh.
01042011	Mi khat ta vek ka hi ua, midiktak ka hi uh. Na sikhate enkhe mite ka hi zenzen kei uh,” achi uhi.
01042012	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka taksang kei, gam venlouhna munte en ding a hong pai himah uteh,” achi hi.
01042013	Amau, “Kou na sikhate unau sawm-le-nih, Kanaan gam a om, mi khat tapate ka hi uh. Ngai in, ka nautumpen uh tu in ka pa uh kiang ah a-om hi. Khat pen ahihleh a-om nawnta kei,” achi uhi.
01042014	Joseph in akiang uah, “Enkhe mite na hi uh ka hon chih na hi mahmah uhi.
01042015	Hichibang a ettel na hi ding uh. Na nautumpen uh hiai a ahong pai keileh Pharaoh hinna a kichiam in hiai a kipan na pawtkhe kei hial ding uh, ka hon chi ahi.
01042016	Nou ah thutak a-om hia, om lou chetna ding in na lak ua khat kisawl unla, na nau uh hon pi hen. Nou bel hen in na om phot ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw Pharaoh hinna lou a kichiam in, enkhe mite na hi mahmah uh ka hon chi ding,” achi hi.
01042017	Huchi in avek un ni thum atangsak chiat hi.
01042018	Ani thum ni in Joseph in akiang uah, “Ke'n Pathian ka lau ziak in, hichi in hih le uchin na hing ding uh.
01042019	Midiktat na hih ualeh na unau lak uah khat na suangkul tanin uah hen in om hen.
01042020	Na nautumpen uh ka kiang ah hon pi un. Huchi in na thu uh atel ding a, na si kei ding uh,” achi hi. Huan huchibang in ahihta uhi.
01042021	Amau, “I nau tung a i thilhih uh moh petmah i hi, hehpih ding a ahon nget ngutngut lai a, alungtang mangbatdan mu napi a, i ngaihkhiaksak nop louh uh. Huaiziak in hiai mangbatna in hon buak ahita,” akichi uhi.
01042022	Reuben in, “Naupang tung ah thil hihkhial kei un, chi in na kiang uah ka gen kei maw? Na ngaikhe nuam kei ua ahi. Huaiziak in ngai un, asisan phu i tung ua lak ahita ve,” chi in amau adawng hi.
01042023	Akal ua paulet mi a-om ziak in Joseph in athugen uh athei chih athei kei uhi.
01042024	Ama'n amau alehngatsan a, akapta hi. Akiang uah ahong kik nawn a, amau ahoupih a, alak ua pan Simeon apituam a, amitmuh un ahenta hi.
01042025	Joseph in a-ipte uh buh a hihdim ding leh adangkate uh a-ip ua koih nawn chiat ding in leh lampi a nek ding pe ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in huchibang in ahihsakta hi.
01042026	Abuh uh asabiltungte aposak ua, huai a kipan apawtkheta uhi.
01042027	Alak ua mi khat in agiahbuk ua asabiltung an pe ding a a-ip ahonleh, adangka amuta hi. Ngai in, a-ipgong bul ah ana om hi.
01042028	Asanggamte kiang ah, “Ka dangka na koih nawn uh hi veh e. Ngai un, ka ip sung ah ana om mawk hi,” achi hi. Alunglel ua, “Pathian in hichibang a eite ahon bawl bangchidan adiam aw?” chi in ling kawm in aki-entuah uhi.
01042029	Kanaan gam a apa uh kiang ahong tung ua, atung ua thil tung tengteng ahilh uhi.
01042030	“Huai mi, agam heutupa un, khauhtak in hon houpih a, enkhe mite ding in hon koih hi.
01042031	Kou akiang ah, midiktak ka hi uh. ‘Enkhe mite ka hi zenzen kei uh.’
01042032	Unau sawm-le-nih ka hi ua, ka pa uh tapate ka hi vek uh. Khat a-om nawn kei a, ka nautumpen uh tu in Kanaan gam ah ka pa uh kiang ah a-om,” ka chi uhi.
01042033	Huai mi, agam heutupa un ka kiang uah, “Hichi in midiktak na hi uh chih ka hon thei ding. Na sanggampa uh khat ka kiang ah nusia unla, na inkuanpih kialte a ding in buh pua unla, paita un.
01042034	Na nautumpen uh ka kiang ah hon pi un. Huchi in enkhe mite na hi kei ua, midiktak na hi zaw uh, chih ka thei ding. Huchi in na sanggampa uh ka hon pe nawn ding a, hiai gam ah sum na sinta ding uh,” ahon chi, achi uhi.
01042035	Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-ipte uh abutkhiak lai un, ngai in, a-ipsung uah adangka tun chiat uh ana om hi. Amau leh apa un adangka tunte uh amuh un alau mahmah uhi.
01042036	Apa uh Jakob in akiang uah, “Noute'n ka tate hon tansak na hi uh. Joseph a-om nawn kei. Simeon lah a-om nawn kei, Benjamin nangawn lah pimang na tum nawn ngal ua. Hiai thil tengteng in hon kiakkhum ahita ve,” achi hi.
01042037	Reuben in apa kiang ah, “Na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn keileh ka tapa nihte that mai in. Amah ka khut ah hon kemsak inla, na kiang ah ka hon pikik nawn mai ding,” achi hi.
01042038	Ama'n, “Ka tapa na kiang uah ahong suk kei ding. A-upa asita a, amah kia lah ahita ngal a. Na paina lam lak ah tuahsia tuak taleh ka samkangpi toh lungkhamna in han ah na tumsak ding uh,” achi hi.
01043001	Huan gamsung ah kial anak kiak mahmah lai hi.
01043002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam a kipan a buh apuaktouh uh anekgaih nung un, apa un, akiang uah, “Kuan nawn unla buh tawmchik bek ei a ding in va lei nawn un,” achi hi.
01043003	Huchi in Judah in akiang ah, “Huai mi'n, na naupa uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu kei ding uh, chi in hon kalh giugeu hi.
01043004	Ka naupa uh na hon zuihsak dingleh, buh ka hon va leisak ding uh.
01043005	N'on zuihsak nop kei dingleh zaw, ka hoh dah mai ding uh. Huai mi'n ka kiang uah, na nau uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu kei ding uh, achita ngal a,” chi in agen hi.
01043006	Israel in, “Bangziak in ahia nau dang na neih lai tantan na hilh chitchiat uh? Kei a dia hoih lou na hih uh?” achi hi.
01043007	Amau, “Huai mi'n, na pa uh dam lai hia? Unau dang na nei lai uhia? chi in i tanchin leh i tanaute tanchin ahon dong hi. Ahon thudot bang zel in ka hilh uhi. Na nau uh hon pisuk un, achi ding chih kua'n athei chitchiat dia?” achi uhi.
01043008	Judah in apa Israel kiang ah, “Ka naupa uh hon zuisak in. Huchi in ka kisa ding ua, ka kuan ding uh. Kou leh nang leh ka taneu chikchikte uh leng si lou a i hintheihna ding un.
01043009	Atungtang thu keimah in bultum na ning. Ka khut a kipan mahmah ah amah hon phut in. Amah na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn louh a, na ma a ka hon dinsak nawn keileh, tangtawn in amoh ka po ding hi.
01043010	Om sawt lou hi le ung, anihveina hong tung nawn khinta ding hi ung a,” achi hi.
01043011	Apa uh Israel in akiang uah, “Huchibang ahih vanglakleh hichi in hih un. Na seng un hiai gam a thil hoih khenkhat singnai damdawi, khuaizu, gimnamtui, murrah, theihawk leh makha gah, neukha chiat bek huai mi a ding thilpiak tawisuk un.
01043012	Dangka amun nih in tawi unla, na ipgong bul ua ahon dangka piak nawn leng tawi nawn un; amuhkhelh ahi kha ding.
01043013	Na naupa uh leng pi un, thou unla, huai mi kiang ah va hoh nawn un.
01043014	Na sanggampa uh khat pen leh Benjamin ahon khahsakna ding in Pathian Bangkim hihthei in huai mi hon zahngaisak hen. Ka tate suun ka hihleh suun ka hita mai kei dia,” achi hi.
01043015	Huchi in thilpiak atawi ua, dangka leng amun nih atawi ua, Benjamin leng api uhi. Athou ua, Aigupta gam ah ahohsuk ua, Joseph ma ah adingh nawn uhi.
01043016	Joseph in akiang ua Benjamin om amuhtak in, a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Huai mite insung ah pilut inla, gan gou inla, bawl in, huai mite'n sun chiang in ka kiang ah an ane ding uh,” achi hi.
01043017	Huchi in ama'n Joseph thupiak bang in ahihta a; Joseph inn ah apilutta hi.
01043018	Joseph inn a pilut a a-om ziak un alau ua, “I hoh masak lai a, i ip ua dangka hong kik nawnte ziak in ei ve ahon pilut uh. I tung ua siatna zong a, hon sual in, ei leh i sabiltungte toh sikha ding a mat hon tum ahita ve,” achi uhi.
01043019	Joseph inkemmi kiang ah ava hoh ua, kongbul ah ahoupih uhi.
01043020	“Ka toupa aw, ka hong masak lai ua buh lei ding lel a hong suk ka hi uh.
01043021	Huan hichi ahong hi a, giahbuk ka tun un ka ipte uh ka hong ua, ngai in, ka dangka chiat uh ka ipgong bul uah ana om hi. Ka dangka uh abuk ngeingei in ana om a, huchi in ka hon tawi uhi.
01043022	Buh leina ding in dangka dang ka hon tawi ua, ka dangka uh lah kua'n ahia ka ip ua koih ka thei ngal kei ua,” achi uhi.
01043023	Ama'n, “Lungmuangtak in om unla, lau kei un. Na Pathian, na pa uh Pathian in na ipte uah gou ahon pia ahi mai ve. Na dangka uh lah ka mu ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang uah Simeon hon pikhia hi.
01043024	Huai mi in Joseph insung ah amaute apilut a, tui apia hi. Akhe uh asil ua; asabiltungte uh leng an apia hi.
01043025	Athilpiak tawi uh Joseph sun an ne ding a ahong pai ma in ana bawlkhol ua; huai ah an ane ding uh chih lah aza ngal ua.
01043026	Joseph a-inn a ahong paitak in, akhut ua thilpiakte, insung ah akiang ah atawilut ua, lei si in amai ah akun chiat uhi.
01043027	Ama'n atanchin uh adong a, “Na pa uh tanchin na gen uh, huai putek ahoih na maw? Adam lai hia?” achi hi.
01043028	Amau, “Na sikha ka pa uh damtheihna ahoih in, adam laitak ahi,” achi uh. Huchi in alu uh akunsak ua, zahtakna apia uhi.
01043029	Amah adak a, anau Benjamin, anu tapa amu a, “Hiai na nautumpen uh, atanchin na hon hilh uhia?” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Ka tapa, Pathian in hon hehpih hen,” achi hi.
01043030	Joseph in anaupa amuh in akhase mahmah a, kintak in kahna ding mun azong pah a, adantan sung ah alut a, huai ah akapkheta hi.
01043031	Amai aphiat a, ava pawt nawn a, akidek teitei a, “An nek bawl un,” achi hi.
01043032	Huchi in amah a ding atuam in, amaute a ding atuam in, Aigupta mi anekpihte a ding atuam in abawlta uhi. Aiguptate'n lah Hebrute anekpih thei ngal kei ua; huchibang hih lah Aiguptate a ding in thilsiang lou ahi.
01043033	Huchi in a-upapen ta masa ahihna bang in, anaupangpen nautumpen ahihna bang dungzui zel in Joseph ma ah atu ua; huchi in lamdang asa chiat uhi.
01043034	Joseph in ama a mite a kipan tantuan an aban piaksak a, Benjamin tantuan houh amaute tantuan tengteng sang in amun nga in atam tuam hi. Uain adawn ua, nuam asa chiat uhi.
01044001	Huan ama'n a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Huai mite ip in apuak zoh zahzah buh in dimsak inla, adangka chiat uh a-ipgong bul chiat uah koih in.
01044002	Ka nou, huai dangka nou, anaupangpenpa ipgong bul ah koih in, abuh man dangka toh,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in ama'n Joseph thugen bang in ahihta hi.
01044003	Khua avaktak in amau asabiltungte uh toh apaisakta hi.
01044004	Khua a kipan apaikhiak ua gamla atun ma un, Joseph in a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Thou inla, huai mite va delh in. Na va phak chiang in akiang uah, ‘Bangchidan a thil hoih, thil hoih lou a thuk na hi ua?
01044005	Huai ka pu uain dawnna leh a-aisanna mahmah hilou ahi maw? Hichibang na hih uh na gilou uhi,’ chi in,” achi hi.
01044006	Huan adelhphaktak in, huai thute akiang uah agen hi.
01044007	Amau akiang ah, “Pu, bangchidan ahia hiai bang thute na gen? Na sikhate'n huchibang thil ka hihlouhdan ding uh.
01044008	Ngai in, ka ipgong bul ua dangka ka muhte uh leng Kanaan gam a kipan na kiang ah ka hon tawi ve ua oi. Bangchidan in na pu inn a dangka hiam dangka-eng hiam gu mawk ding ka hi ua?
01044009	Na sikhate lak ah kuapeuh na muhna penpen si hen, huan kou leng ka pu uh sikha in ka om mai ding uh,” achi uhi.
01044010	Ama'n, “Hi hen, na thu bang zel un hi hen. Himahleh kuapeuh ka hon muhna penpen ka sikha in om hen. Nou ahihleh dembei na hi ding uh,” achi hi.
01044011	Huaitak in amau ip chiat uh kintak in lei ah angakhia ua, amau ip chiat ahong uhi.
01044012	Ama'n a-upapen ah apan a, anaupangpen pha in azong a; huchi in Benjamin ip ah nou amuta hi.
01044013	Huaitak in apuansilhte uh abotkek ua, amau sabiltung chiat aposak nawn ua, khua ah akik nawnta uhi.
01044014	Judah leh asanggamte'n Joseph inn ava pha ua; amah huai ah ana om lai hi. Huchi in amai ah abokkhup chiat uh.
01044015	Joseph in akiang uah, “Bang thil ahi mai a na hih uh? Kei bang mi in, aisan a hichibang thil mukhe thei ka hi, chih na thei kei ua hia?” achi hi.
01044016	Judah in, “Ka toupa kiang ah bang ka genta ding ua? Bang ka hon hilhta ding ua? Bangchibang in ka kigenvengta ding ua? Pathian in na sikhate tatlekna amukheta. Ngai in, ka toupa sikhate ka hita mai uh. Kou leh akhut a nou amuhna pen uh leng,” achi hi.
01044017	Ama'n, “Huchibang a ka hih louh ding dan. Akhut a nou amuhna pen kia ka sikha in a-om ding a, nou zaw lungmuangtak in na pa uh kiang ah paitouta un,” achi hi.
01044018	Huaitak in, Judah in Joseph ava naih a, “Ka toupa aw, hehpihtak in, kei na sikha, ka toupa bil a na zak ding in thu kam khat hon gensak inla, na hehna na sikha tung ah kuangsak ke'n, nang lah Pharaoh bang hial na hita ngal a.
01044019	Ka toupa'n, ‘Pa hiam sanggam hiam na nei uhia?’ chi in na sikhate na hon dong hi.
01044020	Ka toupa kiang ah, ‘Pa putektak leh atek lam a neih naupang chik ka nei uh. Huai mipa upa asita a, anu neih lak ah amah kia a-om lai a, apa'n lah amah a-it mahmah hi,’ ka chi uhi.
01044021	Nang na sikhate kiang ah, ‘Ka mit a amah ka muhtheihna ding in ka kiang ah hon pisuk un,’ na chi hi.
01044022	Ka toupa kiang ah, ‘Ka naupa un apa anuse thei kei ding; apa paisanleh apa asi mai ding,’ ka chi uhi.
01044023	Nang na sikhate kiang ah, ‘Na nautumpen uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu nawn kei ding uh,’ na chi hi.
01044024	“Huan hichi ahong hi a, na sikha ka pa uh kiang ka va tun un, ka toupa thute ka hilh uhi.
01044025	Ka pa un, ‘Kuan nawn unla, buh tawmchik bek ei a ding in va lei nawn un,’ ahon chi hi.
01044026	Kou, ‘Ka hohsuk thei nawn kei ding uh. Ka nautumpen uh ahong dingleh bel ka hohsuk ding ua, ka nautumpen un ahong pai keileh zaw huai mi mel mu thei lou ding ka hi uh,’ ka chi uhi.
01044027	Na sikha ka pa un ka kiang uah, ‘Ka zi in tapa nih ahon neihsak chih na thei uhi.
01044028	Akhat pen ka kiang a kipan apaikhia a, bohzan vek a om hi ngei ding ahi, ka chi hi. Huai nungsiah amah mu lou vengveng ka hi.
01044029	Huchi in hiai mi leng ka kiang a kipan na pikhiak ua, tuahsia va tuak taleh lungkhamtak a han a ka samkangpi toh hon tumsak ding na hi uh,’ achi hi.
01044030	“Huchi in ka nau in kou hon zui lou in, na sikha ka pa uh kiang va tung leng, ka nau uh hinna toh ahinna akizop ziak in,
01044031	hichi ahong hi ding a, naupang in ahon zui kei, chih atheih chiang in asi mai ding. Huchi in na sikhate'n na sikha ka pa uh samkangpi toh lungkhamna a han a tumsak ding ka hi uh.
01044032	Na sikha in na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn keileh, amoh tangtawn in ka pa lak ah ka po ding, chi in ka pa kiang ah ka nau uh tungtang thu ah abultumpa in ka kibawlta hi.
01044033	Huchi in hehpih in na sikha ka nau uh sik in, ka toupa sikha in hon omsak zaw inla, ka nau asanggamte zuitousak in.
01044034	Ka naupa'n hon zui lou in bangchi in ka pa kiang ah ka paitou thei dia? Atung a siatna tung mu ding ka kei hiam,” achi hi.
01045001	Huan akiang a dinghte ma ah Joseph akidek zouta kei, “Mi tengteng ka kiang a kipan pawtkhesak vek un,” chi in akikoukhia hi. Joseph asanggamte kiang a akigen sung teng akiang ah kuamah adingh kei uhi.
01045002	Akap loloih a, Aiguptate'n aza ua, Pharaoh inkuanpihte'n leng aza uh.
01045003	Joseph in asanggamte kiang ah, “Keimah Joseph ka hi. Ka pa adam lai na maw?” achi hi. Himahleh asanggamte'n adawng thei kei ua, ama ah buaitak in a-om uhi.
01045004	Joseph mah in asanggamte kiang ah, “Hehpih in hon naih un,” achi hi. Huchi in ava naih ua, ama'n, “Na unaupa uh Joseph, Aigupta gam a lutpih ding a na khotpa uh ka hi.
01045005	Himahleh hiai a pai ding a na hon khot ziak un lungkham kei unla, kihehkhum tuan sam kei un. Mite hinna hondam ding in Pathian in na ma ua hon sawl masa ahi.
01045006	Hiai kum nih sung hiai gam ah kial aketa a; kum nga in asam lai hi. Huai sung in leileh a-om kei ding a, buhlak leng a-om kei ding.
01045007	Tunung khang om zel ding hawisak ding leh noute hotdamna thupitak a hingdam a ka hon omsak theihna ding in Pathian in na ma uah kei ahon sawl masa hi.
01045008	Huchi in hiai a hon sawl noute na hi kei ua, Pathian ahi zaw. Ama'n Pharaoh pa in leh a-inkuanpih tengteng heutu in leh Aigupta gam tengteng vaihawmtu in ahon bawlta hi.
01045009	“Kintak in ka pa kiang ah va pai unla, akiang ah, na tapa Joseph in hichi in achi: Pathian in Aigupta gam tengteng heutu in ahon bawlta a, ka kiang ah hong paisuk in, sawt hon hal ke'n.
01045010	Huchi in Goshen gam ah na teng ding a, ka kiang ngei ah na om ding; nang, na tate, na tute, na belamhonte, na bawnghonte leh na neih tengteng toh.
01045011	Hiai ah keimah in ka hon vak ding; kial lah kum nga om lai ding ahi ngal a. Huchi lou in zaw nang leh na inkuanpihte leh na neih tengteng toh na kialgawp kha ding uh,” hon chi un.
01045012	“Ngai un, noumau mit ngei leh ka nau Benjamin mit ngei in keimah kam mahmah in agen lai na mu kilkel uhi.
01045013	Aigupta gam a ka thupina tengteng thu leh na thil muh tengteng thu uh ka pa na hilh ding ua; kintak in hiai ah ka pa na hon pisuk pah ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
01045014	Anau Benjamin ngawng a kun in akap a; Benjamin leng ama ngawng a kun in akap hi.
01045015	Asanggamte tengteng atawp a, akahkhum chiat a, huai khit in asanggamte'n thu vantang agenpih uhi.
01045016	Joseph sanggamte ahong uh chih thu thuthang Pharaoh inkote'n ana za uhi. Huai in Pharaoh leh asikhate akipaksak mahmah hi.
01045017	Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Na sanggamte kiang ah huchi in hih in. Na gante uh buh posak unla, pawt unla, Kanaan gam ah pai un.
01045018	Na pa uh leh na inkuanpihte uh hon pi unla, ka kiang ah hong pai un. Aigupta gam a thil hoihte ka hon pe ding a, hiai gam a thil om hoihpente na ne ding uh.
01045019	Thu ka hon pia ahi, ‘Hichibang in hih un: Na taneu chikchikte uh a ding leh na zite uh a ding Aigupta gam a kipan kangtalaite la unla, na pa uh pi ding in va kuan un.
01045020	Na van uh leng ngaihtuah nuam dah un, Aigupta gam tengteng thil hoih peuhmah nou a ahi ngal a,’ ” achi hi.
01045021	Israel suante'n huchibang in ahih ua, Joseph in Pharaoh thupiak bang in akiang uah kangtalaite apia a, lampi a nek ding leng apia hi.
01045022	Avek ua kiang ah puansilh kikhenna ding ape chiat a; Benjamin kiang ngial ah houh dangka zathum leh puansilh kikhenna ding nga apia hi.
01045023	Apa kiang ah hiaite akhak hi: Aigupta gam a thil hoih pua sabiltung sawmkhat leh lampi a, apa a ding buh leh tanghou leh nek ding pua sabengtungnu sawmkhat toh.
01045024	Huchi in asanggamte asawlkhia a, apaita uh. Ama'n akiang uah, “Lampi ah kina lou ding in pilvang un aw,” achi hi.
01045025	Aigupta gam a kipan apaitou ua, huan Kanaan gam a apa uh Jakob kiang ava tungta uhi.
01045026	Akiang ah, “Joseph adam lai a, huan Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah vaihawmpa in apang,” chi in ahilh uhi. Athugen uh agintak louh ziak in, alungtang abahta hi.
01045027	Akiang ua Joseph thugente ahilh ua; atuanna ding kangtalai Joseph in akhakte amuh in Jakob lungtang ahong halh nawn hi.
01045028	Israel in, “Ahunta; ka tapa Joseph hingdam a na om ahi maw. Ka sih ma in amah ka va mu ding,” achi hi.
01046001	Huan Israel aneih tengteng toh apawtkhia a, Beer-sheba atung a, apa Isak' Pathian kiang ah kithoihnate alan hi.
01046002	Pathian in zan a mengmuhna in Israel ahoupih a, “Jakob, Jakob,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
01046003	Ama'n, “Kei Pathian, na pa Pathian ka hi. Aigupta gam a hohsuk lau ke'n. Huai ah chi thupitak in ka hon bawl ding hi.
01046004	Aigupta gam ah na kiang ah ka hong ding a; ka hon pitou nawn ngeingei ding, na sih chiang in Joseph in hon mitsisak ding hi,” achi hi.
01046005	Huchi in Beer-sheba a kipan Jakob apawt a; Israel suante'n apa uh Jakob leh ataneu chikchikte uh leh azite uh tuanna ding a Pharaoh in kangtalai akhakte ah atuangsak uhi.
01046006	Huchi in Jakob leh asuan tengteng in Kanaan gam a alamkhiak uh, gantate leh vante tawi in, Aigupta gam atungta uhi.
01046007	Atapate, atupate, atanute, atunute leh asuan tengteng, Aigupta gam ah alutpihta hi.
01046008	Hiaite Israel suan Aigupta gam a lut, Jakob leh atapate min ahi uh: Jakob ta masa Reuben ahi.
01046009	Reuben tapate Hanok, Pallu, Hezron leh Karmi ahi uh.
01046010	Simeon tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Johar leh Kanaan numei tapa Shaul ahi uh.
01046011	Levi tapate: Gershon, Kohath leh Merari ahi uh.
01046012	Judah tapate: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez leh Zerah ahi ua; (Kanaan gam ah Er leh Onan asita ua) Perez tapate Hezron leh Hamul ahi uh.
01046013	Issakar tapate: Tola, Puah, Job leh Shimron ahi uh.
01046014	Zebulun tapate: Sered, Elon leh Jahleel ahi uh.
01046015	Hiaite tengteng Leah tapa, atanu Dinah toh Padan-aram gam a Jakob aneihsakte ahi ua; atapate leh atanute avek un sawmthum-le-thum ahi uh.
01046016	Gad tapate: Ziphion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi leh Areli ahi uh.
01046017	Asher tapate: Jimnah, Ishuah, Isui leh Beriah leh asanggamnu uh Serah ahi uh. Beriah tapate: Heber leh Malkiel ahi uhi.
01046018	Hiaite Zilpah Laban in atanu Leah kiang a apiak tapate, Jakob aneihsak mi sawm-le-guk ahi uh.
01046019	Jakob zi Rakil tapate: Joseph leh Benjamin ahi uh.
01046020	Joseph in Aigupta gam ah tapa Manasseh leh Ephraim anei a, huai mite On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath in amah aneihsakte ahi uh.
01046021	Benjamin tapate: Belah, Beker, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim leh Ard ahi uh.
01046022	Hiaite Rakil tapa Jakob aneihsakte ahi ua, avek un sawm-le-li ahi uh.
01046023	Dan tapa Hushim ahi.
01046024	Naphtali tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer leh Shillem ahi.
01046025	Hiaite Bilhah tapate Laban in atanu Rakil kiang a apiak ahi uh. Hiaite Jakob aneihsak a, avek un sagih ahi uh.
01046026	Jakob tapate' zite sim louh in Jakob kiang a Aigupta gam a lut, akhal a pawt tengteng avek un sawmguk-le-guk ahi uhi.
01046027	Joseph in Aigupta gam a tapa aneihte nih ahi ua; Jakob inkote, Aigupta gam a lutte, avek un sawmsagih ahi uhi.
01046028	Jakob in Goshen gam lampi na kawkmuh ding in Joseph kiang ah Judah ahoh masasak hi.
01046029	Huchi in Goshen gam ah alutta uhi. Joseph in akangtalai abawlkhol a, Goshen gam ah apa dawn ding in ahohtou hi. Akiang ah akigen a, angawng a kun in akap nilouh hi.
01046030	Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Dam in na om a, na mel ka muh nawn ziak in tu'n zaw si ding in ka kimanta,” achi hi.
01046031	Joseph in asanggamte leh apa inkuanpihte kiang ah, “Ka va hohtou ding a, Pharaoh ka hilh ding a, akiang ah, ka unaute leh ka pa inkuanpihte, Kanaan gam a-omte ka kiang ahong tungta uh.
01046032	Amaute ganvulmi, belamching mite ahi ua, abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh leh aneih tengteng uh ahon po vek uh, chi in ka va gen ding.
01046033	Hichi ahong hi ding a, Pharaoh in nou ahon sap a, bang nasem na hi ua? ahon chih chiang in,
01046034	na sikhate, hon suangtute a kipan naupang chik ka hih lai ua kipan tuni tanpha ganvulmi ka hi uh, na chi ding uh. Huchi in Goshen gam ah na teng thei ding uh,” achi hi; belamching mite himhim lah Aigupta mite kihlamtak ahi ngal ua.
01047001	Huai khit in Joseph in Pharaoh ava hilh a, akiang ah, “Ka pa, ka sanggamte, abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh leh aneih tengteng uh toh Kanaan gam a kipan ahong tungsuk ua; ngai in, Goshen gam ah a-om uh,” achi hi.
01047002	Huan asanggamte lak a kipan mi nga api a, Pharaoh ava lak hi.
01047003	Pharaoh in asanggamte kiang ah, “Bang nasem na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau Pharaoh kiang ah, “Na sikhate, kou hon suangtute a kipan belamching mite ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
01047004	Amau mah in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Hiai gam a om tadih ding a hong pai ka hi ua; ka gam uah lah na sikhate' belamhonte nek ding a-om nawnta kei a; kial lah Kanaan gam ah a-uang mahmah hi; hehpih in na sikhate Goshen gam ah hon tengsak in,” achi uhi.
01047005	Pharaoh in Joseph ahoupih a, “Na pa leh na sanggamte na kiang ahongta ua;
01047006	Aigupta gam akiching mahmah hi. Na pa leh na sanggamte gam hoihpenna mun ah tengsak in. Alak ua thilhihtheitak, theihna nei a-om ngialleh ka ganvulhte tung a makai ding in bawl in,” achi hi.
01047007	Joseph in apa Jakob apilut a, Pharaoh ma ah adingsak a; Jakob in Pharaoh avualzawl hi.
01047008	Pharaoh in Jakob kiang ah, “Kum bangzah na hita a?” achi hi.
01047009	Jakob in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Ka khualzin nung zaw kum za-le-sawmthum ahita, ka damsung kumte atawm in ahaksa hi. Hon suangtute akhualzin lai ua adamsung kum uh leng phazou kei ing,” achi hi.
01047010	Huchi in Jakob in Pharaoh avualzawl a, Pharaoh a kipan apawtkhia hi.
01047011	Joseph in apa leh asanggamte tenna abawlsak a, Pharaoh thupiak bang in Aigupta gam a hoihpenna mun ah, agou ding un Rameses gam apeta hi.
01047012	Joseph in apa leh asanggamte leh apa' inkuanpih tengteng a-inkuan uh dungzui zel in nek ding apia a, avakta hi.
01047013	Huai gam tengteng ah nek ding himhim a-omta kei a; kial lah a-uang semsem hi. Kial ziak in Aigupta leh Kanaan gam abahta hi.
01047014	Joseph in abuh leina man uh, Aigupta gam leh Kanaan gam a dangka om tengteng akhawmsak vek hi. Joseph in huai dangka Pharaoh inn ah atawilut hi.
01047015	Aigupta gam leh Kanaan gam a dangka tengteng azatbei khit un, Aigupta mi tengteng Joseph kiang ah ahong ua, “Nek ding hon pia in. Na ma a si maimah ding ka hi ding uam? Dangka lah a-om nawn ngal kei a,” achi uhi.
01047016	Joseph in, “Na gantate uh hon pe mai un. Dangka a-om nawn keileh na ganta man un nek ding ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
01047017	Joseph kiang ah agantate uh ahon pi ua; Joseph in sakol man ding, belamhon man ding, bawnghon man ding leh sabiltung man ding in nek ding ana pe zel hi. Huai kum in aganta tengteng uh man in nek ding apia a, avak chiat hi.
01047018	Huai kum abei a, kum ahong thak nawn in akiang ah ahong nawn ua, “Ka dangka teng uh abei takdan ka toupa ka hon iim kei ding uh. Ka toupa'n ka gantate uh na neita hi. Ka toupa mitmuh in ka pumpi uh leh ka gam uh chih louh, bangmah ka nei nawn kei uh.
01047019	Bangziak a na mitmuh a kou leh ka gam uh mangthang maimah ding ahia? Koumau mah ka gam uh toh an in hon lei mai in. Koumau leh ka gam uh Pharaoh sikhate ka hi ding uh. Si lou a dam a ka omtheihna ding un leh gam asiatlouhna ding in buhchi hon pia in,” achi uhi.
01047020	Huchi in Joseph in Pharaoh a ding in Aigupta gam tengteng aleisakta hi. Atung ua kial a-ot mahmah ziak in Aigupta mite'n lah alou uh azuak chiat uhi. Huchi in gam Pharaoh a ahi vekta hi.
01047021	Aigupta gamgi tawp khat lam a kipan khat lam tawp pha in khuate ah mite akisuansakta hi.
01047022	Siampute gam kia alei kei a, siampute'n Pharaoh a kipan tantuan anei ua, Pharaoh in apiak atantuan uh ane zel uhi. Huaiziak in agam uh azuak kei uhi.
01047023	Huai nung in, Joseph in mite kiang ah, “Ngai un, tuni in na gam uh leh noute Pharaoh a ding in ka hon leita hi. Hiai ah nou a ding in buhchi a-om, lei ah na ching ding uhi.
01047024	Buh lak hun chiang in hichi ahi ding a; Pharaoh a ding in seh nga suah seh khat zel na pe ding ua, aseh li pen noumau a ahi ding. Lou a achi ding, noumau na inkuanpihte uh leh na tanu neu chikchikte uh nek ding ahi ding,” achi hi.
01047025	Amau, “Nang ka hinna uh na humbitta. Ka toupa'n pha asakleh adeihsakna hon musak henla, Pharaoh sikhate ka hi ding uh,” achi uhi.
01047026	Huchi in Joseph in Pharaoh in seh nga suah seh khat amuh zel ding thu, Aigupta gam a ding in tuni tanpha in dan in abawlta hi. Siampute gam kia ahi, Pharaoh a hilou.
01047027	Israel in Aigupta gam a Goshen gam ah tenna abawlta a, huai ah akihih inbul a, chi tampi asuang a, nakpitak in apungta hi.
01047028	Aigupta gam ah Jakob kum sawm-le-sagih ateng a, huchi in Jakob damsung kum zakhat sawmli-le-sagih ahi.
01047029	Israel sih hun ahong naita a; atapa Joseph asam a, akiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, hehpih in ka pheipi nuai ah na khut golh inla, ka tung ah ginom leh diktak in gamta in, hehpih in Aigupta gam ah hon vui mahmah ke'n.
01047030	Hon suangtute kiang a ka ihmut hun chiang in, nang Aigupta gam a kipan na hon pokhe ding a, amaute vuina mun ah na hon vui zaw ding ahi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na chih bang in ka hih ding,” achi hi.
01047031	Ama'n, “Ka kiang ah kichiam in,” achi a; akiang ah akichiamta hi. Huchi in lupna lukhung si in Israel akunta hi.
01048001	Huan hiaite nung in hichi ahong hi a, Joseph kiang ah, “Ngai in, na pa achi na,” achi uhi. Huchi in atapa nihte Manasseh leh Ephraim akiang ah atonpih hi.
01048002	Jakob kiang ah, “Ngai in, na tapa Joseph na kiang ah ahong hi,” chi in ahilh uh. Israel akihalhsak a, lupna ah atutou hi.
01048003	Jakob in Joseph kiang ah, “Pathian Bangkim hihthei, Kanaan gam a Luz ah ka kiang ah akilak a, ahon vualzawl hi.
01048004	Ka kiang ah, chi tampi ka hon suangsak ding a, ka hon hihpung lai ding. Chi tuamtuam omkhawm in ka hon bawl ding. Hiai gam na nung a na suante kiang ah atangtawn gou ding un ka pe ding,” ahon chi hi.
01048005	“Na tapa nihte, Aigupta gam a na neihte, kei' a ahi ua, Reuben leh Simeon mah bang in Ephraim leh Manasseh kei' a ahi ding uhi.
01048006	Hiai mite nung a ta na neihte nang a ahi ding uh, agoutan uah asanggamte uh min akikoppih ding uh ahi.
01048007	Kei tungthu ahihleh, Padan gam a kipan ka hong pai lai in Kanaan gam ah lamkal ah Ephrath khua gamla kuam ahih lai in, ka kiang ah Rakil asi hi. Huai ah Ephrath kho lampi ah ka vuita, huai tuh Bethlehem khua ahi,” achi hi.
01048008	Israel in Joseph tapate a-en a, “Hiaite kuate ahi ua?” achi hi.
01048009	Joseph in apa kiang ah, “Hiaite ka tapa, Pathian in ahon piakte ahi uh,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hehpih in ka kiang ah hon pi in, amau ka na vualzawl ding,” achi hi.
01048010	Israel mit a-upat tak ziak in achiim nawn kei a, ama'n ana tawp a, ana pom hi.
01048011	Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Na mel muh ka kilamen nawn kei a, himahleh, ngai in, Pathian in na suante mel nangawn ahon musakta,” achi hi.
01048012	Joseph in amau apa khuk kal a kipan apikhia a, amai a lei si in akun hi.
01048013	Joseph in anih un akai a, Ephraim pen akhut taklam in Israel khut veilam pang ah, Manasseh pen akhut veilam in Israel khut taklam pang a kai in apinai hi.
01048014	Israel in asawkkalh teitei a, akhut taklam in asawk a, Ephraim anaupangzaw lusip ah anga a; Manasseh bel ata masa ahi.
01048015	Joseph avualzawl a, “Hon suangpa Abraham leh Isak om zelna Pathian, tuni tan a ka damsung tengteng hon vakpa Pathian,
01048016	thil hoih lou tengteng a kipan hon tanpa Angel in naupangte vualzawl hen. Ka min leh hon suangpa Abraham leh Isak min pu uhen. Khovel ah thupitak hi ding in hong pung uhen,” achi hi.
01048017	Joseph in apa'n akhut taklam Ephraim lusip a angak amuh in alungkim kei hial a; apa khut Ephraim lusip a kipan Manasseh lusip a suan ding in apa khut suansak a sawm hi.
01048018	Joseph in apa kiang ah, “Pa, hichibang ding ahi kei. Hiai ahi ta masa, na khut taklam a lusip ah nga zaw in,” achi hi.
01048019	Himahleh, apa a-ut kei a, “Ka thei hi, ka tapa aw, ka thei hi. Amah leng nam gen tham in a-om ding a, amah leng athupi ding hi. Himahleh amah sang in anaupa athupizaw ding a, asuante leng chi tuamtuam tamtak ahong hi ding uh,” achi hi.
01048020	Huchi in Jakob in, “Nang ah Israel vualzawl ahi ding, Pathian in Ephraim leh Manasseh bang in hon bawl hen,” chi in avualzawl hi. Huchibang in Manasseh ma ah Ephraim a-omsak hi.
01048021	Israel mah in Joseph kiang ah, “Ngai in, si ding ka hita. Himahleh na kiang uah Pathian a-om ding a, nou hon suangtute gam ah ahon pilut nawn ding hi.
01048022	Huai lou leng, na sanggamte tantuan sang in tan khat ka hon pe tuan hi, ka namsau leh ka thalpeu a Amorte khut a kipan ka laksak pen,” achi hi.
01049001	Huan Jakob in atapate asamkhawm a, hichibang in agen hi: “Ni nanungte a na tung ua thil hong tung dingte ka hon hilhtheihna ding in hong kikhawm un.
01049002	“Nou Jakob tapate aw, hong kikhawm unla, ngaikhia un; na pa uh Israel thu ngai un.
01049003	“Reuben, nang ka tapa masa, ka thilhihtheihna, ka hatna gah masapen na hi. Sanpenna leh thuneihpenna nang a ahi.
01049004	Himahleh tui bang a kip lou na hi, tungnunpenna na nei kei ding; na pa lupnapi a na kal ziak in. Huai ah ka lupna a kal in na hihbuah hi.
01049005	“Simeon leh Levi unau ahi ua, anamsaute uh sisan suahna vanzat ahi.
01049006	Ka kha aw, nang zaw akikupna uah va kigolh ke'n. Ka thupina, nang zaw akikhopna uah tel ke'n. Aheh un mi athat ua, agenhak un bawngtal thagui asattat uhi.
01049007	Ahehna un hamsia dong hen, hangsantak ahi ngal ua. Athangpaihna un leng hamsia dong hen, hinsetak ahi ngal ua. Jakob ah amaute ka kikhensak ding a, Israel ah ka hihdalh ding hi.
01049008	“Judah, nang na unaute'n ahon phat ding uh. Na doute ngawng ah na khut na nga ding a; na ma ah na tapate akun ding uh.
01049009	Judah humpinelkai nou ahi. Ka tapa, na sa keih na paitouhsanta. Na kun a, humpinelkai bang in na bok a, humpinelkainu bang in na kualsuk hi. Kua'n ahia hon thousak ngam ding?
01049010	Judah a kipan lalchiang amang kei ding, vaihawmpa chiang akhekal a kipan amang kei ding. Shiloh ahong pai mateng; mite'n ama thu amang ding uhi.
01049011	Grepgui ah asakolnou akhih ding a, asabiltungnou grepgui hoih chi ah akhih ding hi. Apuansilhte uain in asawp ding a, grep sisan in apuan asawp lai ding hi.
01049012	Amitte uain in asan ding ua, ahate nawitui in angou ding uhi.
01049013	“Tuipi gei ah Zebulun ateng ding a, longkhawlna luipiau ahi ding a; agamgi Zidon ah ahi ding.
01049014	“Issakar zaw sabiltung hattak ahi a, van-gik nih kal a kual ahi.
01049015	Khawl hoih in athei a, gam leng hoih in athei; huchi in van po ding in aliangzang aniamsak a, phutluih nasem in sikha in ahong omta hi.
01049016	“Dan in Israel nam lak a khat bang in amite vai ahawmsak ding.
01049017	Dan ahihleh lamlian gei a gul, lampi a gulgial, atung a tuangmi thalkiak ek khop a sakol khetul tu nakpa ahi ding.
01049018	“Aw Toupa , na hotdamna ka ngak gige hi.
01049019	“Gal in Gad asual ding a, himahleh ama'n akhetul lam uah amaute asual zaw ding hi.
01049020	“Asher, anek ahoih ding a, kumpi nekte apiangsak ding hi.
01049021	“Naphtali, zukpi khah ahi. Thuhoih pipi agen zel hi.
01049022	“Joseph hiang gah nuamtak ahi, tuikhuk kiang a hiang gah nuamtak; ahiang nawnsawnte'n baang atuam uhi.
01049023	Thalkap mite'n nakpitak in amah ahihgenthei ua, akap ua, asimmoh uhi.
01049024	Himahleh, amah thalpeu khauhtak in a-om gige a, abanthate Jakob' Pathian Mihatpa hatsak; belamchingmi, Israel suangpi a pan ahi.
01049025	Na pa Pathian, nang hon panpih dingpa, Bangkim hihtheipa, tunglam van vualzawlnate, nuailam a om gige tui thuktak vualzawlnate, nawite leh sul vualzawlnate, nangmah hon vualzawl dingpa ngei hihhat in na om hi.
01049026	Na pa vualzawlnate hon suangtute vualzawlna sang in tangtawn mualte tawpkhawk pha in athupizawta hi. Hiaite Joseph lutung ah a-om ding a, asanggamte a kipan hihtuam a ompa lusip ah a-om ding hi.
01049027	“Benjamin ngia duhgawl bang in, zingsang in asa matte ane ding a, nitaklam in agallak ahawm ding,” achi hi.
01049028	Huaite tengteng Israel nam sawm-le-nihte ahi uh. Huai thute leng amaute vualzawlna akiang ua apa uh thugen ahi. Vualzawlna atan ding gun bang zel un avualzawl chiat hi.
01049029	Ama'n atapate thugou asiah a, akiang uah, “Ka chipihte kiang a pi a om ding ka hita. Hit mi Ephron lou a kokhuk a kei hon suangtute kiang ah hon vui un.
01049030	Kanaan gam a Mamre ma a Makpelah lou a kokhuk, Abraham in kivuina mun ding a Hit mi Ephron a kipan alou toh alei ah.
01049031	Huai ah Abraham leh azi Sarah avui ua; huai ah Isak leh azi Rebekah avui ua; huai mah ah Leah ka vui hi.
01049032	Alou leh asung a kokhuk om Hit suante a kipan alei ahi,” achi hi.
01049033	Jakob in atapate kiang a thugou asiah khit in akhete lupna ah angatou a, akha akhahta a, achipihte kiang ah pi in a-om samta hi.
01050001	Huan Joseph in apa mai asi a, akah a, atawp hi.
01050002	Joseph in asikha damdawi siamte apa luang muat thei lou a bawl ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in damdawisiamte'n Israel luang muat thei lou in abawl uhi.
01050003	Aluang bawlna in ni sawmli azang ua; muat thei lou a bawlna ding a ni hiai zah lut zel mah ahi. Ni sawmsagih sung teng Aiguptate'n amah asuun uhi.
01050004	Amah asuun nite uh abei nung in, Joseph in Pharaoh inkuante ahoupih a, “Na mitmuh ua deihsakna ka tanleh hehpih in Pharaoh bil a zak ding in, ‘Ka pa'n, ngai in, si ding ka hita.
01050005	Kanaan gam a ka han ding a ka tohsa ngei ah na hon vui ding ahi,’ chi in ahon kichiamsak hi. Huaiziak in tu in hehpih in ka pa hon potousak inla, hon va vuisak in. Huchi in ka hong pai nawn ding, achi, chi in hon gensak un,” achi hi.
01050006	Pharaoh in, “Ahon kichiamsak bang in na pa va potou ve,” achi hi.
01050007	Joseph, apa vui ding in ava hohtou hi. Pharaoh sikha teng, a-inkuan lak a upate leh Aigupta gam upate tengteng leh,
01050008	Joseph inkuanpih tengteng leh asanggamte leh apa inkuanpihte, akiang ah ava hohtou uhi. Ataneu chikchikte uleh abelamhonte uleh abawnghonte kia uh Goshen gam ah anusia uhi.
01050009	Akiang uah kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite leng ahohtou ua, pawlching petmah ahi uh.
01050010	Jordan lui gal a Atad phual atung ua, huai ah nakpitak in akah ua, ni sagih sung apa suunna anei uhi.
01050011	Hiai gammi Kanaante'n, Atad phual a ami suun uh amuh un, “Hiai Aiguptate misi suunna thupitak ahi,” achi uhi. Huaiziak in huai mun Abel-mizraim asa ua, huai Jordan lui gal a om ahi.
01050012	Atapate'n athupiak bang in ahihsak uhi.
01050013	Atapate'n Kanaan gam ah azawnglut ua, Abraham in kivuina mun ding a, Hit mi Ephron a kipan alou toh aleikhawm Mamre ma a Makpelah lou a kokhuk ah avuita uhi.
01050014	Apa avui khit in Joseph leh asanggamte leh apa vui ding a amah toh hohtou tengteng Aigupta gam ah akik nawnta uhi.
01050015	Joseph sanggamte'n apa uh sita ahi chih amuh un, “Joseph in ahon mudah ding a, atung a i thilhihkhelh tengteng phu i tung uah akim in ahon la kha ding e,” achi uhi.
01050016	Joseph kiang a hilh ding in mi asawl ua, “Na pa'n asih ma in hichi in thu apia hi.
01050017	Joseph kiang ah, ‘Hehpih in na sanggamte tatlekna leh agitlouhna uh ngaidam in. Na tung ah thil hoih lou ahihta ngal ua. Tu in hehpih in na pa Pathian sikhate tatlekna ngaidam in,’ achi, chi in va gen un,” achi hi. Akiang a agentak un Joseph akap hi.
01050018	Asanggamte leng ava hoh ua, ama ah abokkhup chiat ua, “Ngai in, na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
01050019	Joseph in akiang uah, “Lau kei un. Pathian sik a om ka hi a hia?
01050020	Nou zaw ka tung ah thil gilou hih lungsim na pu ua; himahleh tuni in mi tampi hing leh dam a humbitna ding a thil hoih suahsak Pathian lungsim ahi zaw hi.
01050021	Huaiziak in tu in lau kei un. Nou leh na taneu chikchikte uh ka hon vak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amau alungmuan a, kamsiamtak in ahoupih hi.
01050022	Joseph, amah leh apa inkuanpihte toh Aigupta gam ah ateng ua, Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat adam hi.
01050023	Joseph in Ephraim ta, tusawn thum chiang amu hi. Manasseh tapa Makir tate leng Joseph phei tung a khanglian ngen ahi uh.
01050024	Joseph in asanggamte kiang ah, “Si ding ka hita hi. Himahleh Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai gam a kipan hon pikhia in, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a kichiam a, piak ding achiamsa gam ah ahon pitou ding,” achi hi.
01050025	Joseph in Israel suante akichiamsak a, “Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai a kipan ka guhte na potou ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
01050026	Huchi in Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi. Aluang muat thei lou ding in abawl ua, Aigupta gam ah hankuang sung ah akoih uhi.
02001001	Aigupta gam a hong lut Israel suante, michih leh a-inkote Jakob toh hong tonte min hiaite ahi:
02001002	Reuben, Simeon, Levi leh Judah,
02001003	Issakar, Zebulun leh Benjamin,
02001004	Dan leh Naphtali, Gad leh Asher,
02001005	Jakob khal a pan hong pawtkhia mi tengteng sawmsagih ahi uhi. Joseph bel Aigupta gam ah ana om khinta hi.
02001006	Joseph leh a-unau tengteng leh asuan tengteng leng asita uhi.
02001007	Israel suante'n gah asuang ua, tampi in akhang ua, ahong kibehlap zel ua, hat petmah in ahong hatkhia ua; agam hong dimta uhi.
02001008	Joseph thei lou, Aigupta gam ah kumpi thak ahong omta hi.
02001009	Ama'n amite kiang ah, “En un, Israel suante ei sang in atamzaw ua, ahatzaw uhi.
02001010	Kisa un, piltak in amaute i bawl ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw ahong kibehlap semsem ding ua, huan, hichi ahong hi ding a, kidouna ahong om chiang in, i melmate lam ah apang ding ua, ei ahon dou kha ding uh, huchi in gam apawtsan kha ding uh,” achi hi.
02001011	Huaiziak in puakgikte a amau hihgim ding in atung uah nasem heutu akoihta uhi. Huchi in Pharaoh a ding in khopite, Pithom leh Rameses alamta uhi.
02001012	Himahleh amau ahihgim semsem uleh, akibehlap semsem ua, akhang semsem uhi. Huchi in Aiguptate'n Israel suante alau mahmah uhi.
02001013	Huaiziak in Aiguptate'n Israel suante gimtak in nna asemsak uhi.
02001014	Nasep haksa in ahinna uh nuamloutak in abawlsak ua, buanman leh teklei bawl in gamlak a nna chiteng sem in, nakpitak in nna asemsak uhi.
02001015	Aigupta kumpipa'n Hebru naudom mite kiang ah thu agen a, huaite lak a khat min Siprah ahi a, adang khat min Puah ahi.
02001016	“Hebru numeite lak a nau na dop chiang un, tutphah tung ah en unla, tapa ahihleh na that ding ua, tanu ahihleh bel na hawi ding uh,” achi hi.
02001017	Himahleh naudom mite'n Pathian alau ua, Aigupta kumpipa'n thu apiak bang a hih lou in, pasal naupangte ahinghawi uhi.
02001018	Aigupta kumpipa'n naudom mite asamsak a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a hiai thilhih a pasal naupangte hinghawi na hi ua?” achi hi.
02001019	Naudom mite'n Pharaoh kiang ah, “Hebru numeite zaw Aigupta numeite bang ahih louh ziak un, atei ngal ua, naudom mite akiang uh atun ma un ana nei khin man zel uh,” achi uhi.
02001020	Huaiziak in Pathian in naudom mite a-angvan a, huchi in mite ahong kibehlap ua, ahat mahmah uhi.
02001021	Huchi in naudom mite'n Pathian alauh ziak un inkuante abawlsakta hi.
02001022	Pharaoh in asikha tengteng thu pia in, “Tapa hong piang peuhmah lui ah na pai ding ua, tanu hong piang peuhmah na hinghawi ding uh,” achi hi.
02002001	Huan Levi inn a pan pasal khat apaikhia a, Levi tanu zi in anei hi.
02002002	Huai numei in nau apai a, tapa anei a, naupang melhoih ahi chih atheih in kha thum sung aselta hi.
02002003	Asel zoh nawn louhtak in, phaiphek bawm abawlsak a, vahaibuan leh chim in azutbit a, asung ah nau akoih a; luipang ah loupa kawm ah akoih hi.
02002004	Asanggamnu'n bang hong suak hiam chih thei ding in gamla kuam ah adingh hi.
02002005	Pharaoh tanu lui ah kisil ding in ahong paisuk a; anungzui numeite toh lui gei ah avak uhi. Loupa lak a bawm amu a, asikha numei khat va la ding in asawl hi.
02002006	Ahonleh, naupang amuta a, ngai in, naungek akapta hi. Alainat a, “Hiai Hebru tate lak a khat ahi,” achi hi.
02002007	Asanggamnu'n Pharaoh tanu kiang ah, “Naungek hon donsak ding, Hebru numeite lak a naudonmi khat hon va sapsak leng na ut hia?” achi hi.
02002008	Pharaoh tanu in akiang ah, “Va kuan in,” achi hi. Nungak akuanta a, naungek nu ava samta hi.
02002009	Pharaoh tanu in akiang ah, “Hiai naungek la inla, hon donsak in. Na loh ka hon pe na ding,” achi hi. Huchi in huai numei in nau alata a, adonta hi.
02002010	Naungek ahong khanglian a, Pharaoh tanu kiang ah ahon pi a, huchi in atapa ahong hita hi. “Tui a pan ka kaihkhiak ahih ziak in, chi in amin Mosi asa hi.”
02002011	Huai lai in hichi ahong hi a, Mosi ahong khanlet in chipihte kiang ah ava hoh a, apuakgikte uh ava mu hi. Asanggamte lak a khat, Hebru mi khat Aigupta mi in avuak lai ava muta hi.
02002012	Adak loplop a, kuamah a-om kei chih atheihtak in, Aigupta mi athat a, piaunel ah asel hi.
02002013	Huan ani nih ni a, ava hoh nawnleh, ngai in, Hebru mite lak a mi nih ana kisual ua; gilou hihpa kiang ah, “Bangziak a na lawm vua na hia?” achi hi.
02002014	Ama'n, “Ka tung ua lal leh vaihawm dia nang kua'n hon bawl ahia? Aigupta mi na thah bang a, hon thah tum na hi maw?” achi hi. Huchi in Mosi in alau a, “Hiai thil kitheikhe petmah ahita ve,” achi hi.
02002015	Pharaoh in hiai azak in, thah ding in Mosi azongta hi. Himahleh Pharaoh mai a pan Mosi ataimang a, Midian gam ah ava teng a; tuileh kiang ah atu hi.
02002016	Midian siampu in tanu sagih anei a, amau ahong pai ua, tui ahong tawi ua, apa uh belamhonte piak ding in atuitheite adim uhi.
02002017	Belamchingte ahong pai ua, ahawlmangsak uhi. Himahleh, Mosi adingtou a, amau apanpih a, abelamhonte uh tui apia hi.
02002018	Apa uh Reuel kiang a ahong paitak un, “Bangziak a, tuni'n hong pai baih ve uchia?” ana chi hi.
02002019	Amau, “Belamchingte khut a pan Aigupta mi khat in hon hunkhia a, tui leng ahon tawisak a, belamhonte tui apia hi,” achi uhi.
02002020	Ama'n atanute kiang ah, “Ahihleh amah koi a om ahia? Bangziak a huai mi hon nusia? An ne ding in va sam ve ua,” achi hi.
02002021	Huchi in Mosi bel huai mi kiang a ten alungkim a, ama'n atanu Zipporah, Mosi apeta hi.
02002022	Ama'n tapa aneihsak a, “Melmak gam ah mikhual ka hita,” achih ziak in amin Gershom asa hi.
02002023	Hun hong pai zel in hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta kumpipa asita a, huchi in akoltan ziak un Israel suante athumthum ua, akap ua, koltan ziak a akahna uh Pathian kiang atungtou hi.
02002024	Amauna uh Pathian in aza a, huchi in Pathian in Abraham toh, Isak toh leh Jakob toh athukhun atheigige hi.
02002025	Pathian in Israel suante a-en a, Pathian in amau aphawk hi.
02003001	Mosi in asungpa, Midian siampu, Jethro belamhonte aching hi. Gamdai nunglam a belamhonte pi in, Pathian tang, Horeb pha in, ahong pai hi.
02003002	Pawn lak a pan meikuang in akiang ah Toupa Angel ahong kilak hi. A-en a, ngai in, mei in loubukh akuang a, himahleh loubukh akang kei hi.
02003003	Mosi in, “Ka kihei dia, hiai thil muh thupi, bangziak a loubukh kang lou ahia, ka va en ding,” achi hi.
02003004	Huchi a-en dia kihei lai Toupa'n amuh in loubuk a pan amah asam a, “Mosi, Mosi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
02003005	Ama'n, “Hiai mun hon naih ke'n. Na khepek a pan na khedapte suah in. Na dinna mun lei siangthou ahi,” achi hi.
02003006	Hiai achi lai a, “Na pa' Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian leh Jakob' Pathian ka hi,” Mosi in Pathian a-et ngam louh ziak in amai asel hi.
02003007	Toupa'n, “Aigupta gam a ka mite thuakgimna ka mu a, atung ua nasem heutute ziak a akah uh ka zata a, adahnate uh ka thei hi,” achi hi.
02003008	“Aiguptate khut a pan amaute pikhe ding leh huai gam a pan gam hoih leh za, bawngnawi leh khuaizu a luang gam, Kanaante, Hitte, Amorte, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste gam tun dia hong paisuk ka hi.
02003009	Huaiziak in tu in, ngai in, Israel suante kah thawm ka kiang ahong tungta. Aiguptate'n amau anuaisiahdan uh leng ka mu hi.
02003010	Huaiziak in tu in kisa in, Pharaoh kiang ah ka hon sawl ding, Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante, ka mite na hon pikhiak theihna ding in,” achi hi.
02003011	Mosi in Pathian kiang ah, “Pharoah kiang a hoh a, Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante pikhe ding, kei kua ka hia?” achi hi.
02003012	Ama'n, “Na kiang ah ka om ngeingei ding, ka hon sawl chih, hiai nang a ding in akitheihna ahi ding. Aigupta gam a pan mite na pikhiak khit chiang in, hiai tang tung ah Pathian nna na sem ding uh,” achi hi.
02003013	Mosi in Pathian kiang ah, “Ngai in, Israel suante kiang a ka hong pai a, akiang ua, hichibang a ka va gen chiang in, ‘Na pipute uh Pathian in na kiang ua ahon sawl ka hi,’ huan amau ka kiang ah, ‘Amin bang ahia?’ chi in ahon dong ding ua, ke'n akiang uah bang ka genta dia?” achi hi.
02003014	Pathian in Mosi kiang ah, “KA HIH KA HI,” achi hi. Huchibang in Israel suante kiang ah na va gen ding ahi, “KA HIH IN na kiang uah ahon sawl hi,” chi in.
02003015	Pathian in Mosi kiang ah agen behlap lai a, “Israel suante kiang ah hiai gen in: Israel suante Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian leh Jakob' Pathian in na kiang uah ahon sawl hi: “Hiai ka min ahi gige a, suan tengteng tan a kei theihgigena min ahi.
02003016	Kuan inla, Israel upate kaikhawm inla, akiang uah hichi in va gen in. Ka kiang ah, ‘Na pipute uh Toupa Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian leh Jakob' Pathian ahong kilak a, hichi in achi, “Ka hong veh petmah a, Aigupta gam a na tung ua hih a omte ka muta hi.”
02003017	Huan hichi in ka chita, Aigupta gimna a pan Kanaante, Hitte, Amorte, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste gam, bawngnawi leh khuaizu a luang gam ah ka hon pilut ding.’ ”
02003018	“Na aw angaikhe ding uhi. Huchi in na kuan ding a, nang leh Israel upate, Aigupta kumpipa kiang ah na va hoh ding ua, akiang ah hichibang in na va gen ding uhi. Hebrute' Toupa Pathian in ahon kimuhpih a, tu in, ka hon ngen uhi, hon paisak in, gamdai a ni thum lam a Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang a ka kithoihtheihna ding un.
02003019	Ahi a, Aigupta kumpipa'n bantha hatna toh lou in ahon paisak kei ding chih ka theitel hi.
02003020	Ka ban ka zak ding a, alak ua ka hih ding ka thillamdang tengteng in Aigupta gam ka gawt ding. Huai nung in ahon paisak pan ding hi.
02003021	“Aiguptate mitmuh in hiai mite deihsakna ka pe ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, na pai chiang un khutvuak in na pai kei ding uh.
02003022	Numei teng in invengte leh a-inn a khualtamte a pan dangka suangmantamte, dangka-eng suangmantamte leh puansilhte aleitawi ding. Huchi in huaite na tapate uh na silhsak ding ua, na tanute uh na silhsak ding uh. Huchibang in Aiguptate na lok ding uhi,” achi hi.
02004001	Huan Mosi in adawng a, “Ahi na a, ngai in, ahon gingta kei ding ua, ka aw leng ana ngaikhe sam kei ding uh, ‘Na kiang ah Toupa akilak kei,’ achih ding ziak un,” achi hi.
02004002	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na khut a bang ahia?” achi a; ama'n, “Chiangkhun,” achi hi.
02004003	Ama'n, “Leitual ah khia in,” achi a; leitual ah akhia a, gul ahong suak a; huai a pan Mosi ataikheta hi.
02004004	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Na khut zankhia inla, amei ah man in,” achi hi. Akhut azankhia a, amei ah amanta a, akhut ah chiangkhun ahong suak nawn hi;
02004005	“huchi a apipute uh Toupa Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian leh Jakob' Pathian, na kiang ah akilak chih agintakna ding un,” achi hi.
02004006	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Tu in na ang ah na khut koih in,” achi nawn hi. A-ang a akhut koih a, azankhiaktak in, ngai in, vuk bang in akhut aphakta hi.
02004007	“Ama'n na ang ah na khut koih nawn in,” achi hi. A-ang ah akhut a akoih nawn a, huan alakkhiakleh, ngai in, akhut khat lam bang ahong suak nawn hi.
02004008	“Huan hichi ahi ding a, ahon gintak louh ua, chiamtehna khatna leng angaihkhiak kei uleh, chiamtehna nanung agintak ding uh ahi ding hi.
02004009	Hichi ahong hi ding a, hiai chiamtehna nihte agintak louh lai ua, na aw leng angaihkhiak kei uleh, lui a pan tui na la dia, gamkeu ah na sung ding. Lui a pan na tui lakkhiak gamkeu ah sisan ahong suak ding hi,” achi hi.
02004010	Mosi in Toupa kiang ah, “Aw Toupa, midangnal ka hi kei a, chik lai mah in, na sikha kiang a thu na gen nungsang in leng midang-awk leh pau zekai ka hi zaw hi,” achi hi.
02004011	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Mihing kam bawl kua ahia? Ahihkeileh pau theiloute, nangongte, muhnate leh mittawte kua bawl ahia? Kei Toupa'n ka bawl ahi kei maw?
02004012	Huaiziak in tu in kuan inla, na kam ka ompih dia, na gen ding ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.
02004013	Ama'n, “Aw Toupa , hehpih in midang sawl in, na sawl dingpa khut in, ka hon ngen hi,” achi hi.
02004014	Mosi tung ah Toupa hehna asouta a, “Aaron, na unaupa a-om kei maw? Ama'n hoihtak in thu agen thei, chih ka thei. Huan ngai in, nang kimuhpih ding in ahong paikhia a, ahon muh chiang in alungtang akipak ding hi.
02004015	Akiang ah thu na gen dia, akam ah thute na guang ding. Na kam ka ompih dia, na hih ding ka hon hilh ding hi.
02004016	Amah mite kiang ah na thugenpa ahi dia; amah nang a ding in na kam' tang ahi dia, huan nang amah a ding in Pathian' tang na hi ding hi.
02004017	Chiamtehnate na hihna ding in, na khut in hiai chiangkhun na tawi ding ahi,” achi hi.
02004018	Mosi akisa a, asunghpa Jethro kiang ah akik a, akiang ah, “K'on ngen ahi, hon paisak inla, Aigupta gam a om ka unaute kiang ah ka kik dia, adam lai uhiam chih ka va kan ding,” achi hi. Jethro in Mosi kiang ah, “Damtak in va hoh in,” achi hi.
02004019	Toupa'n Midian gam a Mosi kiang ah, “Pai inla, Aigupta gam ah kik nawn in. Thah hon tum mi teng lah asita ngal ua,” achi hi.
02004020	Mosi in azi leh atapate api a, sabiltung tung ah atuangsak a, Aigupta gam ah akik nawnta hi. Mosi in akhut in Pathian' chiangkhun atawi hi.
02004021	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aigupta gam a kik nawn dia na kuan chiang in, na khut a ka koih huai thillamdangte tengteng Pharaoh ma ah hih ngeingei in. Himahleh alungtang ka khauhsak dia, huchi in mite apaisak kei ding,” achi hi.
02004022	Pharaoh kiang ah, “ Toupa'n Israel ka tapa ahi, ka ta masapen,” achi hi.
02004023	“K'on chi ahi, nna ahon sepsak theihna ding in, ka tapa paisak in. Paisak na nialleh, ngai in, na tapa ka that ding, na ta masapen ngei, na chi ding hi.”
02004024	Lampi a khualbuk ah hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n amah ana tuak a, thah ding in azongta hi.
02004025	Huchih lai in Zipporah in suang hiamtak khat ala a, atapa zekmuk vun a-atkhia a, akhebul ah akhia a, “Kei a ding in sikai pasal na hi taktak hi,” achi hi.
02004026	Huchi in amah apaisak hi. Zekvun ziak in, “Sisan kai pasal na hi,” achi hi.
02004027	Toupa'n Aaron kiang ah, “Mosi tuak ding in gamdai ah hoh in,” achi hi. Ava hoh a, Pathian tang ah amah atuak a, atawp hi.
02004028	Mosi in amah sawl Toupa thu tengteng leh amah apiak chiamtehna tengteng toh Aaron ahilh hi.
02004029	Mosi leh Aaron apaita ua; Israel suan upate tengteng akaikhawm vek uhi.
02004030	Mosi kiang a Toupa'n thu agen tengteng leh mite mitmuh a chiamtehna ahih tengteng Aaron in agenta hi.
02004031	Huchi in mite'n agingta ua; Toupa'n Israel suante ahong veh a, agimna uh amuta, chih azaktak un, alu uh kunsak in abeta uhi.
02005001	Huan huai nung in Pharaoh kiang ah Mosi leh Aaron alut ua, “Hichibang in Israelte' Toupa Pathian in achi. Gamdai a kei a dia ankuangluina abawltheihna ding un, ka mite paisak in,” chi in ahilh uhi.
02005002	Pharaoh in, “Israelte paisak ding a a-aw ka man ding, huai Toupa kua ahia? Hiai Toupa ka thei kei, Israelte leng ka paisak kei ding,” achi hi.
02005003	Huchi in amau, “Hebrute' Pathian in ahon kimuhpih a; gamdai ah ni thum lam ah, hon paisak in, ka hon ngen uhi. Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah hon kithoihsak in. Hipi hiam, namsau hiam in ahon gawt kha ding hi,” achi uhi.
02005004	Aigupta kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Mosi leh Aaron, bangziak a noute'n mite nasep khawlsak na hi ua? Na puakgikte uh pua un,” achi hi.
02005005	Pharaoh in, “Ngai un, gam a mite tu in atam ua, apuakgik ua pan na khawlsak uhi,” achi hi.
02005006	Pharaoh in huai ni mah in mite' nasem heutute leh upate thu apia hi.
02005007	“Tuma siah a bang in teklei bawlna ding in mite buhpawl na pe nawn kei ding uhi. Kuan uhenla, buhpawl va kilak uhen.
02005008	Tuma siah ateklei bawlsa tengteng uh, atung uah na koih ding a; huai a pan in bangmah na kiamsak kei ding uhi. Atha uh adah kha dia; huchi in kap in, ka Pathian kiang uah hon paisak inla, hon va kithoihsak in, achi kha ding uh.
02005009	Nna tamsem atung uah guan unla, asepgim theihna ding un; thugina lou limsak kei uhen,” achi hi.
02005010	Mite nasem heutute apaikhia ua, a-upate uh toh, mite kiang ah thu agen ua, “Pharoah in buhpawl ahon pe kei ding.
02005011	“Nou kuan unla, na muh theihtheihna uah buhpawl kilak un. Himahleh na nasep uh bangmah kiamsak ahi kei ding,” achi uhi.
02005012	Mite buhpawl sik a buhbul lakhawm ding in Aigupta gam teng ah avak zakta uhi.
02005013	Nasem heutute'n amau anoh ua, na nasep uh zou un, na niteng sep dingte uh, buhpawl a-om lai in, achi uhi.
02005014	Israel suan upate, Pharaoh nasem heutute atung ua akoihte un, avua ua, bangziak a tuma lam a bang a zan leh tuni a na teklei bawl uh zou lou na hi ua? chi in aphutluih uhi.
02005015	Huaitak in Israel suan upate ahong ua, Pharaoh kiang ah akap ua, “Bangziak a na sikhate hichi bawl tel na hia?
02005016	Na sikhate buhpawl piak ka hi kei ua, amau lah ka kiang uah, ‘Teklei bawl un!’ ahon chi uh. Ngai in, na sikhate vuak in ka om ua, amoh na mite ahi uh,” achi uhi.
02005017	Himahleh ama'n, “Thadah na hi uh, thadah na hi uh. Huaiziak in nou, ‘Pai ni in, Toupa kiang ah va kithoih ni,’ na chi uhi.
02005018	Huaiziak in kuan unla; nna va sem un. Pawl ahon kipe kei dia, himahleh teklei bikhiah zah na piakkhiak ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
02005019	Na niteng nasep ua na tekleite ua pan bangmah na kiamsak ding uh ahi kei, akichih nung Israel suan upate'n thusia om ahihdan atheita uhi.
02005020	Pharaoh a pan ahong paikhiak un lampi a dingh Mosi leh Aaron akituahpih uhi.
02005021	Akiang uah, “ Toupa'n nou hon en in vai hawm hen. Pharaoh mit leh asikhate mit in ka gimnam uh kihhuai in na bawl ua, koute hon that dia akhut ua namsau na koih tak ziak un,” achi uhi.
02005022	Toupa kiang ah Mosi akik nawn a, “Toupa, bangziak a hiai mite hichibang a gilou suaksak na hia? Bangziak a kei hon sawl na hia?
02005023	Na min a thu gen dia Pharaoh kiang a ka va hoh nungsiah lah, ama'n hiai mite tung ah gilou abawl ngal a. Na mite lah na pikhe ngal kei a,” achi hi.
02006001	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Tu in Pharaoh kiang a bang ahia ka hih ding na mu ding. Khut thahat in amau apaisak dia, khut thahat in amau agam a kipan hawlkhe ding ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
02006002	Pathian in Mosi kiang ah thu agen a, akiang ah, “Kei Toupa ka hi.
02006003	Bangkim hihthei Pathian min in Abraham kiang, Isak kiang leh Jakob kiang ah ka kilakta a, himahleh ka min JEHOVAH in alak uah ka kitheisak kei.
02006004	Amau Kanaan gam, mikhual a a-omna gam uh, akhualzinna gam uh, pe ding in amaute toh ka thukhun leng ka hihkipta hi.
02006005	Aiguptate'n koltanna a, atansak un, Israel suante maunate leng ka zata a, ka thukhun ka theigige hi.
02006006	Huaiziak in Israel suante kiang ah, kei Toupa ka hi, chih gen inla, Aiguptate puakgik nuai a pan ka hon pikhe dia, na koltanna ua pan ka hon suaktasak ding, ban zak in leh vaihawmna thupite toh ka hon tan ding hi.
02006007	Mipite a ding in ka hong kilak ding a, noute a ding in Pathian ka hi ding. Huchi in Aiguptate puakgikte nuai a pan hon lakhepa Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chih na thei ding uh.
02006008	Gam tungtang thu Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a pe dia ka chiamsa, huai gamsung ah ka hon tun ding. Huchi in gouluah ding in ka hon pe ding, Kei Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
02006009	Mosi in Israel suante kiang ah huchibang in thu agensawn hi. Himahleh lungsim dahna ziak leh koltanna haksatna ziak in Mosi angaikheta kei uh.
02006010	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a,
02006011	“Lut in, agam a pan Israel suante apaikhiaksakna ding in Pharaoh kiang ah thu gen in,” achi hi.
02006012	Mosi in Toupa ma ah thu agen a, “Ngai in, Israel suante'n hon ngaihkhiak kei ualeh kei muk sum louh, bangchi in Pharaoh in hon ngaikhe dia?” achi hi.
02006013	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang leh Aaron kiang ah thu agen a, Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante pikhe ding in Israel suante lam leh Aigupta kumpipa lam ah amaute thu apeta hi.
02006014	Hiaite asuangtute inkuan a kipan alupente ahi uhi: Israel ta masa Reuben tate; Hanok leh Pallu, Hezron leh Karmi, hiaite Reuben inkote ahi uh.
02006015	Simeon tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Zohar leh Kanaan numei tapa Shaul. Hiaite Simeon inkote ahi uh.
02006016	Akhang uh dungzui in hiaite Levi tapate min ahi: Gershon, Kohath leh Merari. Levi damsung kumte kum zakhat sawmthum-le-sagih ahi.
02006017	Gershon tapate, a-inkuan dungzui un, Libni leh Shimei.
02006018	Kohath tapate: Amram, Izhar, Hebron leh Uzziel. Kohath damsung kumte kum zakhat sawmthum-le-thum ahi.
02006019	Merari tapate: Mahli leh Mushi. Akhang uh dungzui in hiaite Levi inkote ahi uh.
02006020	Amram in apa sanggamnu Jokebed zi in anei hi. Ama'n Aaron leh Mosi aneihsak hi. Amram damsung kumte kum zakhat sawmthum-le-sagih ahi.
02006021	Izhar tapate: Korah, Nepheg leh Zikri.
02006022	Uzziel tapate: Mishael, Elzaphan leh Zithri.
02006023	Aaron in Amminadab tanu, Nahson sanggamnu, Elisheba zi in anei a, Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar leh Ithamar aneihsak hi.
02006024	Korah tapate: Assir, Elkanah leh Abiasaph. Hiaite Korah inkote ahi uh.
02006025	Aaron tapa Eleazar in Putiel tanute lak a khat zi in anei a, Phinehas aneihsak hi. Hiaite Levi inkuan suangtute inn a kipan a lupente ahi uhi.
02006026	Hiaite Toupa'n Aaron leh Mosi kiang a anam uh dungzui a Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante hon pikhia un, achihte ahi.
02006027	Hiaite Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh kiang a Aigupta a pan Israel suante pikhe dia thugentute ahi ua, hiaite Mosi leh Aaron mah ahi uhi.
02006028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam a Mosi kiang a Toupa'n thu agen ni in akiang ah,
02006029	“Kei Toupa ka hi. Na kiang a ka gen tengteng Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh kiang ah gen in,” achi hi.
02006030	Himahleh Mosi in Toupa ma ah, “Ngai in, muk sum louh ka hi a, bangchi in Pharaoh in hon ngaikhe dia?” achi hi.
02007001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “En in, Pharaoh a ding in Pathian in ka hon bawlta. Huchi in na sanggampa Aaron na zawlnei ahi ding,” achi hi.
02007002	Thu ka hon piak tengteng na gen ding hi. Huchi in Aaron na sanggampa'n agam a pan a Israel suante sawlkhe ding in Pharaoh kiang ah agen ding.
02007003	“Huan Pharaoh lungtang ka khauhsak dia, Aigupta gam ah ka chiamtehnate leh ka thillamdangte ka pungsak ding hi.
02007004	Himahleh, Aigupta tung a ka khut ka ngaktheihna ding leh ka sepaihte leh ka mi Israel suante, vaihawmna thupite a Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak theihna ding in, Pharaoh in nang ahon ngaikhe kei ding hi.
02007005	Aigupta tung a ka khut ka lik a, alak ua pan Israel suante ka pikhiak hun chiang in, Aiguptate'n kei, Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.
02007006	Mosi leh Aaron in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi.
02007007	Pharaoh kiang a thu agen lai un, Mosi kum sawmgiat a upa ahita a, Aaron kum sawmgiat-le-thum a upa ahita hi.
02007008	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron kiang ah thu agen a, akiang uah,
02007009	“Pharoah in na kiang ua, ‘Nou a ding in thillamdang suah un,’ achih chiang in Aaron kiang ah, ‘Na chiangkhun la inla, Pharaoh ma ah khia in, gul hong suak hen,’ na chi ding,” achi hi.
02007010	Huchi in Pharaoh kiang ah Mosi leh Aaron alut ua, Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi. Pharaoh leh asikhate ma ah Aaron in achiangkhun akhia a, gul ahong suak hi.
02007011	Pharaoh in leng mipilte leh bumsiamte asam a; Aigupta mitkhialdawi tawite'n amitkhialdawi un huchibang mah in ahih sam uhi.
02007012	Michih in leng amau chiangkhun chiat akhia ua, gul ahong suak uhi. Himahleh Aaron chiangkhun in amau chiangkhunte avalhta hi.
02007013	Hinapi in Toupa'n achih bang in Pharaoh in alungtang akhauhsak a, amau thu angaikhe nuam kei.
02007014	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Pharoah lungtang akhauhta a, mite paisak anial hi.
02007015	Zingsang in Pharaoh kiang ah va hoh in, ngai in, amah lui a hoh ding ahi a, ahong pai ngak in lui gei ah na dingh in. Na khut in huai chiangkhun, gul hong suak pen na tawi ding ahi.
02007016	Akiang ah, ‘Hebrute' Toupa Pathian in na kiang ah ahon sawl a, gamdai a ka nna aseptheihna ding un, ka mite paisak in.’ Ngai in, tuma lam in na ngeingaih kei, achi,” chi in.
02007017	Hichibang in Toupa'n achi, “Hiai ah Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding. Ngai in, ka khut a chiangkhun in lui a om tuite ka sat dia, sisan ahong suak ding uhi.
02007018	Lui a om ngasate asi ding ua, lui a-uih dia; Aiguptate'n luitui adawn thei kei ding uh,” achi hi.
02007019	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a, “Na chiangkhun la inla, Aigupta tuite tung ah, atui nak neite tung ah, aluite uh tung ah, atuichinte uh tung ah leh atuilite uh tung ah, sisan ahon suahtheihna ding un, Aigupta gam pumpi a singhawmte leh suanghawmte a sisan a-omtheihna ding in na khut likkhia in, Aaron kiang ah chi in,” achi hi.
02007020	Toupa thupiak bang in, Mosi leh Aaron in ahih uhi. Achiangkhun aliktou a, Pharaoh leh asikhate mitmuh in, lui a om tuite asatta a, lui a om tuite sisan ahong suak vek uhi.
02007021	Lui a om ngasate asi ua; lui a-uih a, Aiguptate'n luitui adawn theita kei uhi. Aigupta gam pumpi ah sisan a-omta hi.
02007022	Aigupta mitkhialdawi tawite'n leng amitkhialdawi tawi un huchi mah bang in ahih uhi. Pharaoh lungtang akhauh a, Toupa'n achih bang in amau angaikhe kei hi.
02007023	Pharaoh akihei a, a-inn ah apaita a, huai thil in alungtang akhoih kei hi.
02007024	Aigupta tengteng in luitui adawn theih louh ziak un, dawn ding zong in lui kim teng akhuat uhi.
02007025	Toupa'n lui asat nung ni sagih ahong chingta hi.
02008001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a, “Pharoah kiang ah hoh inla, akiang ah hichi in chi in ‘Toupa'n hichi in achi, ka nna ahon sepsak theihna ding un, ka mite paisak in.’
02008002	Amau paisak na nialleh, ngai in, ukengte in na gam tengteng ka gawt ding hi.
02008003	Lui in ukeng atam a tam hon suahkhe ding ua, huaite ahong paitou ding ua, na inn ah ahong lut ding ua, na lupna dantan sung ah, na lupna tung ah, na sikhate inn ah, na mite tung ah, na thuk ah leh na tangbuang bawlna ah ahong om ding uh.
02008004	Ukengte nang tung ah leh na mite tung ah leh na sikhate tung ah ahong kaltou ding uhi,” chi in.
02008005	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aaron kiang ah, luinak neite tung leh luite tung leh tuichinte tung ah na chiangkhun toh na khut lik inla, Aigupta gam tung ah ukengte hon paitousak in, chi in,” achi hi.
02008006	Aaron in Aigupta luite tung ah akhut alik a; ukengte ahong paitou ua, Aigupta gamsung atuamta uhi.
02008007	Huchi mah bang in mitkhialdawi tawite'n amitkhialdawi un ahih ua, Aigupta gam tung ah ukengte ahon latou uhi.
02008008	Huaitak in Pharaoh in Mosi leh Aaron asamsak a, “Kei leh ka mite a pan ukengte alakmang theihna ding in, Toupa ngen un. Toupa kiang a kithoihna abawltheihna ding un, mite ka paisak ding,” achi hi.
02008009	Mosi in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Ka tung ah ki-uangsak in; nang a ding leh na sikhate a ding leh na mite a ding leh nang leh na innte a pan, tui a a-omtheihna ding ua ukengte lakmangna dia chikchiang a hon ngetsak ding ka hia?” achi hi.
02008010	Ama'n, “Zingchiang in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na thu bang hi hen. Toupa ka Pathian bang kuamah a-om kei, chih na theihna ding in.
02008011	Nang leh na innte uh leh na sikhate leh na mite a pan ukengte apawtkhe ding ua; lui kia ah a-omta ding uh,” achi hi.
02008012	Huchi in Pharaoh a pan Mosi leh Aaron apaikhia ua; Pharaoh gawtna ding a ukengte akoih tungtang ah Toupa kiang ah Mosi athum hi.
02008013	Huan Toupa'n Mosi thu bang in ahihta a; innte leh khuate a pan leh loute a pan ukengte asita uhi.
02008014	Huchi in akaikhawm ua, avum ua, gam a-uihta hi.
02008015	Himahleh Pharaoh in atung azangta chih atheih in, alungtang akhauhsak a; amaute angaikhe kei; Toupa gen bang in.
02008016	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aaron kiang ah, na chiangkhun lik inla, gam a leivui sat in, Aigupta gam pumpi a hik ahong omtheihna ding un, chi in,” achi hi.
02008017	Huchibang in ahih ua; Aaron in achiangkhun toh akhut alik a, lei a leivui asat a, mi tung leh sa tung ah hik ahong omta a; gam a leivui teng Aigupta gam pumpi ah hik ahong suak vekta hi.
02008018	Mitkhialdawi tawite'n leng amitkhialdawi un hikte omsak ding in huchibang in ahih ua, himahleh ahihthei kei uh. Huchi in mi tung leh sa tung ah hik a-omta hi.
02008019	Huaitak in mitkhialdawi tawite'n Pharaoh kiang ah, “Hiai Pathian khutzung ahi,” achi uhi. Himahleh Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a, Toupa'n achih bang in amau angaikhe kei hi.
02008020	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Zingkhang in thou inla, Pharaoh ma ah va dingh in. Ngai in, tuilam zuan a, ahong paikhiak in akiang ah, ‘Hichibang in Toupa'n achi, ka nna aseptheihna ding un, ka mite paisak in.
02008021	Huchi lou a, ka mite na paisak keileh, ngai in, na tung ah leh na sikhate tung ah leh na mite tung ah leh na insung ah thouhonpi ka sawl ding. Huchi in Aiguptate innte thouhonpi in adim ding, a-omna lei uh toh.
02008022	Huai ni in ka mite tenna, Goshen gam ka satkhen ding, huai a thouhonpi a-omlouhna ding in; huchi a gamsung ah kei Toupa ka hi chih na theihna ding in.
02008023	Ka mite leh na mite kikal ah kikhenna ka koih ding. Zingchiang in hiai chiamtehna a-om ding hi,’ ” achi hi.
02008024	Huchibang in Toupa'n ahih a; Pharaoh insung leh asikhate insung leh Aigupta gam tengteng ah, thouhonpi thupitak ahong omta a; thouhonpi ziak in gam asegawp hi.
02008025	Pharaoh in Mosi leh Aaron asamsak a, “Pai unla, gamsung ah na Pathian kiang uah va kithoih un,” achi hi.
02008026	Himahleh Mosi in, “Huchibang a hih adik kei ding. Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang ah Aiguptate zakdah kithoihna lan ding ka hih ziak un. Ngai in, amuh ua Aiguptate zakdah kithoihna lan ding ka hi uh maw, suang in ahon deng kei ding ua hia?
02008027	Gamdai ah ni thum lam ah ka pai ding uh; ahon thupiak ding bang a Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang a kithoihna bawl ding in,” achi hi.
02008028	Huan Pharaoh in, “Gamdai a Toupa na Pathian uh kiang a na kithoihtheihna ding un ka hon paisak ding. Gamlapi ah pai kei peuh le uchin. Kei a ding in hon ngetsak in,” achi hi.
02008029	Huan Mosi in, “Ngai in, nang a pan ka paikhe dia, Pharaoh a pan, na sikhate a pan, na mite a pan zingchiang a thouhonpi apaimang theihna ding in Toupa ka ngen ding. Himahleh Toupa kiang a kithoih dia amite paisak ding in lepchiahtak in Pharaoh gamta nawn kei hen,” achi hi.
02008030	Huchi in Pharaoh a pan Mosi apawtkhia a, Toupa angenta hi.
02008031	Huan Mosi thu bang in Toupa'n ahihta a; Pharaoh a pan leh asikhate a pan thouhonpi alamangta a; khat lel leng a-om nawnta kei hi.
02008032	Himahleh hiai hun in leng Pharaoh in alungtang akhauhsak a, mite apaisak nuam tuan kei hi.
02009001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Pharoah kiang ah va lut inla, Toupa Hebrute' Pathian in ka nna aseptheihna ding un ka mite paisak in.
02009002	Amaute paisak na nial a, amau na letdet laileh,
02009003	ngai in, Toupa khut, lou a om na bawnghonte tung ah, sakolte tung ah, sabiltungte tung ah, sangawngsaute tung ah, bawngtalte tung ah leh belamte tung ah atu ding. Hipi nase mahmah a-om ding hi.
02009004	Toupa'n Israelte bawnghon leh Aiguptate bawnghon asatkhen ding. Israel suante a lam bangmah si a-om kei ding.
02009005	Toupa'n hun biseh asepta, zingchiang in Toupa'n gamsung ah hiai ahih ding,” chi in va gen in.
02009006	Huan azing in Toupa'n hiai thil ahih a, Aigupta bawnghon tengteng asita uhi. Himahleh Israel suante bawnghonte khat lel leng asi kei hi.
02009007	Pharaoh in mi asawl a, ngai in, Israel bawnghonte lak ah khat lel leng asi kei ngut hi. Himahleh Pharaoh lungtang akhauh a, mite apaisak kei lai hi.
02009008	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron kiang ah, “Meiphualpi vut na khut dim un la unla, Pharaoh muh in Mosi in van lam ah theh hen.
02009009	Aigupta gam ah leivui nen ahong suak dia, Aigupta gamsung teng ah, mi tung leh sa tung ah meimatum nasetak ahong hi ding,” achi hi.
02009010	Meiphualpi a vut ala ua, Pharaoh mai ah adinghta uhi. Mosi in van lam ah athehtou a; mi tung leh sa tung ah, meimatum ahong suakta hi.
02009011	Huchi in meimatumte ziak in Mosi ma ah mitkhialdawi tawite adingh theita kei ua; mitkhialdawi tawite tung leh Aiguptate tung ah lah meimatum a-om ngal a.
02009012	Himahleh Toupa'n Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a, Mosi kiang a Toupa'n agen bang in amau thu angaikhe kei hi.
02009013	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Zingkhang in thou inla, Pharaoh ma ah va dingh inla, akiang ah, Toupa Hebrute' Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Ka nna aseptheihna ding un ka mite paisak in.
02009014	Hiai hun in na lungtang tung leh na sikhate tung leh na mite tung a ka gawtna tengteng hon tun ding ka hi ngal a. Lei pumpi ah kei bang kuamah a-om kei, chih na theihna ding in.
02009015	Tu in ka khut zankhia in nang leh na mite hipi in hon gawt leng lei a pan satkhiak in na om ding hi.
02009016	Himahleh hiai ziak in ahi, nang ka hon tunding, nangmah a ka thilhihtheihna ka latsak theihna ding leh huchi a leitung tengteng a ka min akipuankhiak theihna ding in.
02009017	Amaute paisaklou ding in, ka mite kalh in nang leh nang na kiliansak nalai maw?
02009018	Ngai in, zingchiang tu hun in apian tung a kipan tutan a om ngei nai lou, Aigupta gam ah gialpi tam petmah ka zusak ding hi.
02009019	Huaiziak in tu in mi sawl inla, lou a na neih tengteng leh na gantate kaikhawm in. Michih tung leh lou a kimu sa tung ah, inn lam a hong kihawlloute tung ah, gial ahong kesuk ding a, asi ding uh,’ achi,” chi in.
02009020	Kuapeuh Pharaoh sikhate lak a Toupa thu laute'n asikhate leh agantate uh insung ah ahawllut uhi.
02009021	Toupa thu khawksaloute'n lou ah asikhate uh leh agantate uh anusia uhi.
02009022	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aigupta gam tengteng a, mi leh sa tung leh Aigupta gam tengteng alou a haichi tung teng a gial a-omtheihna ding in, van lam ah na khut zankhia in,” achi hi.
02009023	Mosi in van lam ah achiangkhun azankhia hi. Toupa'n van-ging leh gial ahon sawl a, leitung zui in meikuang ataita a; Toupa'n Aigupta gam tung ah gial azusakta hi.
02009024	Huchi in gial a-om a, gial toh kihel meikuang huaise mahmah, nam ahih nungsiah Aigupta gam ah huchibang om ngei kei hi.
02009025	Gial in Aigupta gamsungte a lou omte teng adengta hi. Gial in mi leh sa; lou a haichi chih adeng a, gam a sing chih akitansakta hi.
02009026	Israel suante tenna, Goshen gam kia ah gial ake kei hi.
02009027	Pharaoh in mi asawl a, Mosi leh Aaron asamsak a, akiang uah, “Tutung in ka khialta. Toupa adiktat a, kei leh ka mite ka gilou uh.
02009028	Toupa ngen in, ahunta, vanpiging leh gial thupi a-om nawnlouhna ding in. K'on paisakta dia, na om nawn kei ding uh,” achi hi.
02009029	Huan Mosi in akiang ah, “Khopi a pan ka pawtkhiak chiang in Toupa lam ah ka khutte ka zak ding a; vanpiging adai dia, gial leng a-om nawn kei ding; huchi a leitung Toupa a ahihdan na theihtheihna ding in.
02009030	Himahleh nang leh na sikhate'n ahihleh, Toupa Pathian na lau nai kei ding uh chih ka thei,” achi hi.
02009031	Pat leh barli buh densiat in a-om a, barli buh atuipumta a, pat gah akuhmumta hi.
02009032	Himahleh huit buh leh buhman zaw densiat in a-om kei; anou lai ziak un.
02009033	Pharaoh a pan Mosi in khopi apawtkhiaksan in, Toupa lam ah akhutte azak a; vanpiging leh gial adai a, leitung ah vuah buak in a-omta kei hi.
02009034	Pharaoh in vuah leh gial leh vanpiging atawpta chih atheih in, akhial tamsem a, amah leh asikhate'n alungtang uh akhauhsak uhi.
02009035	Huchi in Pharaoh lungtang khauhsak in a-om a, Mosi kam a Toupa'n agen bang in Israel suante apaisak nuam kei hi.
02010001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Pharoah kiang ah va lut in. Ama a hiai ka chiamtehnate ka etsak theihna ding in alungtang, asikhate lungtang toh ka khauhsak ahi.
02010002	Na tapa bil leh na tapa' tapa bil a, Aigupta gam a bang thil ahia ka hih, alak ua chiamtehna ka hihte na gen theih a, Toupa ka hi chih na theihna ding un,” achi hi.
02010003	Pharaoh kiang ah Mosi leh Aaron alut ua, akiang ah, “Hebrute Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Bang tan vei ka ma a kiniamkhiak nial lai ding na hia? Ka nna aseptheihna ding un, ka mite paisak in.’
02010004	Huchi ahih kei a, ka mite paisak na nialleh ngai in, na tuipiau ah zingchiang in khaukhup ka hon sawl ding hi.
02010005	Lei mai atuam ding ua, mite'n lei amu thei kei ding. Asuakta bang ane ding ua, gial in ahon hawisak teng, lou a pan nang a dia singpou chiteng ane ding uh.
02010006	Na innte uah adim ding ua, na sikhate innte leh Aiguptate innte leh leitung om a pan tuni tan a na pate, na pate uh pate un amuh ngei louh uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in akihei a, Pharaoh a pan apawtkheta hi.
02010007	Pharaoh sikhate'n akiang ah, “Bang tan hiai mipa ei a dia thang hi ding ahia? Mite paisak mai in, Toupa a Pathian uh nna aseptheihna ding un. Aigupta hihsiat a omta ahi, chih thei nai lou na hi hia?” achi uhi.
02010008	Pharaoh kiang ah Mosi leh Aaron ahon pi nawn ua; ama'n akiang uah, “Pai un, Toupa na Pathian uh nna va sem un. Himahleh apai dingte kuate ahi ua?” achi hi.
02010009	Mosi in, “Ka naupangte uh toh, ka tekte uh toh, ka tapate uleh ka tanute uh, ka ganhonte uleh ka belamhonte uh toh ka pai ding uhi, Toupa kiang a ankuangluina nei ding ka hih ziak un,” achi hi.
02010010	Himahleh ama'n akiang uah, “ Toupa na kiang uah om hen, na numeite uh leh na nau neute uh ka hon paisakleh, en mah un, na ma uah gilou a-om hi.
02010011	Huchi hilou e, nou pasal piching teng kuan unla, Toupa nna va sem un. Huai lah na ut ngal ua,” achi hi. Huchi in Pharaoh a pan delhkhiak in a-om uhi.
