02010012	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aigupta gam tung ah khaukhupte ahong omna ding in na khut zankhia in. Aigupta gam a ahong paitouh ua, gam a haichi teng, gial in ahawi teng tanpha anektheihna ding un,” achi hi.
02010013	Mosi in Aigupta gam tung ah achiangkhun alik a, Toupa'n huai ni nitum in leh huai zankhua in suahlam huih anungsak a; zingsang ahong hih in suahlam huih in khaukhup ahon tunta hi.
02010014	Huchi in Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah khaukhupte a-om ua, Aigupta gam tengteng ah akhawl ua: achimtakhuai mahmah uhi. Amalam uah huchibang khaukhup a-om ngei kei a, anunglam uah leng huchibang a-om kei ding hi.
02010015	Lei mai tengteng atuam ziak un, gamsung amialta hi. Gam a haichi gial in ahawite, singgahte toh ane uhi. Huchi in singte ah hiam, lou a haichite ah hiam leng thil hing a-omta kei, Aigupta gamsung teng ah.
02010016	Huaitak in Pharaoh in kintak in Mosi leh Aaron asamsak a, “ Toupa na Pathian leh noute tung ah ka na khialta hi.
02010017	Huaiziak in tu in ka hon ngen ahi. Tutung kia hiai ka khelhna ngaidam inla, kei a pan hiai sihna alakmang theihna ding in, Toupa na Pathian kiang ah ngen in,” achi hi.
02010018	Huchi in Pharaoh a pan apaikheta a, Toupa kiang ah angenta hi.
02010019	Toupa'n suahlam huih hat mahmah akhahta a, huai in khaukhupte alamang a, Tuipi San ah ahawllutta hi. Huchi in Aigupta gam tengteng ah khaukhup khat leng a-omta kei hi.
02010020	Himahleh Toupa'n Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a, Israel suante apaisak nuam tuan kei hi.
02010021	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aigupta gam tung a khomial, theihtheih ding khop mial sah a-omtheihna ding in, van lam ah na khut liktou in,” achi hi.
02010022	Mosi in van lam ah akhut aliktou a; huchi in ni thum sung Aigupta gam tengteng ah khomial bikbek a-omta hi.
02010023	Kuamah akimutuah kei ua, a-omna ua pan kuamah ni thum sung athoukhe kei uh; himahleh Israel suante tenna ah khua avak hi.
02010024	Pharaoh in Mosi asam a, “Pai un, Toupa nna sem un. Na bawnghonte leh na ganhonte uh kia om uhen. Na nau neute un leng hon zui uhen,” achi hi.
02010025	Himahleh Mosi in, “ Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang a ka kithoihtheihna ding un, kithoihnate leh halmang thillatte leng na hon piak ngeingei ding ahi.
02010026	Ka bawnghonte un leng ahon zuih ding uh ahi. Nunglam ah khechin khat lel leng nutsiat ahi kei ding; huaite a pan Toupa ka Pathian uh nna sepna dia ka lak ding uh ahih ziak in. Huai mun ka tun masiah uh, bang in ahia Toupa nna ka sep ding uh, ka thei kei uh,” achi hi.
02010027	Himahleh Toupa'n Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a, amau apaisak nuam kei.
02010028	Huchi in Pharaoh in akiang ah, “Ka kiang a pan paimang in. Ka mel mu nawn lou ding in pilvang in, ka mel na muh nini a si ding lah na hih ngal a,” achi hi.
02010029	Mosi in, “Na gen bang in, na mel ka mu nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
02011001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Pharoah tung leh Aigupta gam tung ah gawtna khat ka tun lai ding. Huai khit chiang in hiai a pan ahon paisakta ding hi. Ahon paisak chiang in, hon hawlkhe siang sipsip ding hi.
02011002	Tu in mite zak in thu gen inla, pasal chih in a-inveng kiang ah ngen hen. Numei chih in a-inveng kiang ah dangka suangmantamte leh dangka-eng suangmantamte ngen hen,” achi hi.
02011003	Toupa'n Aiguptate mitmuh in mite deihsakna apia hi. Huai lou in Aigupta gam ah, Pharaoh sikhate mitmuh leh mite mitmuh in Mosi athupi mahmah hi.
02011004	Mosi in, “Hiai bang in Toupa'n achi, zankim chiang in Aigupta gamsung teng ka tawnsuak ding hi.
02011005	Aigupta gam a piang masa tengteng, alaltutphah a tu Pharaoh tapa upapen a pan buhhek a om sikhanu ta masapen leh ganta piang masa tengteng asi ding uhi.
02011006	Aigupta gam pumpi ah kahna thupitak a-om ding a, huchibang om ngei nai lou, huchibang om ngei nawn lou ding.
02011007	Himahleh Israel suante lak a kuamah siatna ding in, mi hiam ganta hiam siatna ding in ui in alei atangsak kei ding a; Toupa'n Aiguptate leh Israel akhentuamdan na thei ding hi.
02011008	Huai hun chiang in ka kiang ah na milian tengteng ahong paisuk ding ua, ahong kun ding ua, ‘Nang hon zui mi tengteng toh paikhia un’ ahong chi ding uh. Huai khit chiang in ka paikhe ding,” chi in hehtak in Pharaoh a pan Mosi apaikhia hi.
02011009	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ka thillamdangte Aigupta gam a apunna ding in Pharaoh in ahon ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi.
02011010	Mosi leh Aaron in Pharaoh ma ah hiai thillamdang tengteng ahihta ua; Toupa'n Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a, gam a kipan Israel suante apaisak nuam tuan kei hi.
02012001	Toupa'n Aigupta gam ah Mosi leh Aaron kiang ah thu agen hi.
02012002	Hiai kha noute a dia khate kipatna ahi ding. Noute a ding in kum khat a akha masapen ahi ding hi.
02012003	Israel omkhawmte kiang ah thu gen in, hiai kha ani sawm ni in apipute inkuan dungzui zel in, michih in amah a ding in belamnou akilak chiat dia, inn khat zel a ding in belamnou khat zel.
02012004	Belamnou khat a dia inkuan atawm luatleh, ami phazah dungzui in amah leh a-inn zom a-invengte a toh lakhawm hen. Michih in akham ding bang zel in belamnou na sim ding uhi.
02012005	Na belamnou uh gensiatbei, apa kum khat a upa ahi dia; belamhon lak hiam kelte lak a pan in hiam na lakhe ding uhi.
02012006	Huai kha mah ani sawm-le-li tan na kem ding ua; nitaklam in Israel khawmpi omkhawmte'n agou ding uhi.
02012007	Asisan na la ding ua, anekna ding uh inn kongkhak biang khuam nihte ah leh kongkhak tung ah na tat ding uhi.
02012008	Huai zan in sa mei a haimin, tanghou silngou soh louh toh na ne ding uhi; lou kha toh na ne ding uhi.
02012009	Sialnek kei unla, tuihuan het kei un, alutang, akhete leh asungkua toh mei ah na haimin zaw ding uhi.
02012010	Azingchiang tan in bangmah na valsak kei ding uhi. Azingchiang tan a omlaite mei in na haltum ding uhi.
02012011	Hichibang in na ne ding uhi. Na kawng uh gaksa in, na khedap uh na khe ua bulhsa in, na khut ua na chiangkhunte uh tawisa in na kin nek ding uhi. Hiai Toupa Paikan Ankuang ahi.
02012012	Tuzan chiang a Aigupta gamsung tawnsuak a, Aigupta gam a piang masa teng, mi leh ganta that ding ka hih ziak in, Aigupta pathiante tengteng siatna ding in ka vaihawm ding hi: Kei Toupa ka hi.
02012013	Sisan tuh noute a ding in na omna innte uah chiamtehna ahi ding. Sisan ka muh chiang in, ka hon paikan ding, Aigupta gam ka gawt chiang in, nou hon hihse ding in na tung uah hiai gawtna a-om kei ding hi.
02012014	Hiai ni noute a ding in theihgige ahi ding. Na khang na khang un Toupa kiang a ankuangluina in na nei ding ua; tangtawn in dan thuseh a ankuangluina in na nei ding uhi.
02012015	“Ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding ua; ani masapen ni ngei in na innte ua pan in silngou na koihmang ding uhi. Ani masapen ni a kipan ani sagih ni tan, tanghou silngou soh ne peuhmah, huai mi Israel a pan satkhiak ding ahi ngal a.
02012016	Ani masapen ni in kikhopna siangthou a-om dia, ani sagih ni in noute a ding in kikhopna siangthou a-om ding. Huai nite in nek bawl chih louh ngal nna sep louh himhim ding ahi. Nekbawl kia na hihthei ding uh.
02012017	Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina na tang ding ua; hiai ni mah a Aigupta gam a kipan na mite ka pikhiak ziak in. Huaiziak in tangtawn in na khang un dan thuseh in hiai ni na tang ding uh ahi.
02012018	Akha khatna ah, huai kha ani sawm-le-li ni, nitaklam a kipan huai kha nitaklam ani sawmnih-le-khat matan in, tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uhi.
02012019	Na insung uah ni sagih sung silngou muh in a-om ding ahi kei. Kuapeuh silngou soh ne, huai mi ngei mikhual hiam hi in, agamsung a piang hitaleh Israel omkhawmte a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
02012020	Silngou soh bangmah na ne ding uh ahi kei. Na tenna peuhmah uah tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uhi,” achi hi.
02012021	Mosi in Israel upate asamsak a, akiang uah, “Na inkuan dungzui zel un belamnou kaikhia in kilak unla, Paikan Belamnou gou un,” achi hi.
02012022	“Hissop gaklop na la ding ua, belkuang sung a om sisan ah na diah ding ua, belkuang sung a om sisan in kongkhak biang khuam tuak leh kongkhak tung na zep ding uhi. Zingsang masiah na lak ua kuamah a-inn kongkhak ah ava pawtkhe ding ahi kei;
02012023	Aiguptate that dia Toupa hong paisuak ding ahih ziak in. Kongkhak tung a leh kongbiang khuam nihte a sisan amuh chiang in Toupa'n huai kongkhak apaikan dia, hon that ding in na insung uah hihsemi hong lut aphal kei ding hi.
02012024	Tangtawn in na tapate uh a ding leh noute a ding in dan thuseh in hiai thil na tang ding uh ahi.
02012025	Huan achiam bang a, nou ahon piak ding gam na tun chiang un, hichi ahi ding a, hiai biakna thilzek in na nei ding uh ahi.
02012026	Hichi ahong hi ding a, na tate un na kiang ua, hiai biakna thilzek bang na chihna uh ahia? ahon chih chiang un,
02012027	‘Aiguptate athah a, ei innte atatkhiak lai a, Aigupta gam a Israel suante innte paikanpa, Toupa paikanna theihgigena ahi,’ ” na chi ding uh. Huchi in mite'n alu uh akunsak ua abeta uhi.
02012028	Israel suante apaimang ua, Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron thu apiak bang in ahih ua, huchibang in amau leng ahihta uhi.
02012029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, zankim lai in Toupa'n Aigupta gam a piang masa tengteng, alaltutphah tung a tu Pharaoh ta masapen a pan suangkul sung a om sal ta masapen tan in, ganhon nou masapen teng toh athatta hi.
02012030	Huchi in zan in Pharaoh athou a, amah leh asikhate leh Aigupta tengteng, Aigupta gamsung teng ah kahna thupitak a-omta a; inn khat mahmah mi khat sihlouhna a-om louh ziak in.
02012031	Zan in Mosi leh Aaron asamsak a, “Thou unla, ka mite lak a pan paikhia un. Noute gel leh Israel suante pai un. Na gensa bang un, Toupa nna va sem un.
02012032	Na bawnghonte uleh na ganhonte uh leng, na chih bang un, pi unla, paikhia un. Huchi in kei leng hon vualzawl un,” achita hi.
02012033	Kintak a gam a pan asawlkhiak theihna ding un Aiguptate'n mite anoh mahmah ua, “Si khin vek ding i hi uh,” achih ziak un.
02012034	Mite'n atangbuang uh silngou soh ma in ala ua, aliangzang uah atangbuang haihnate uh puan a khihsawn in.
02012035	Mosi thu bang in Israel suante a-omta ua; Aiguptate dangka suangmantam leh dangka-eng suangmantam leh puansilh angen uhi.
02012036	Aiguptate mitmuh in Toupa'n mite deihsakna apia a, adeih bang un huai thilte akiang uah apia uhi. Huchi in Aiguptate alok uhi.
02012037	Israel suante Rameses a pan Sukkoth atung ua, numei leh naupangte sim louh pasal ngen khe a pai nuaiguk ahi uhi.
02012038	Mikihelte'n leng bawnghonte, ganhonte leh ganta tampi petmah toh amaute azuitou uhi.
02012039	Aigupta gam a kipan apuakkhiak uh tangbuangte mek in silngou soh louh tanghou abawl ua, amaute Aigupta gam a kipan kintak a hawlkhiak a om, akizekaisak theih louh ziak un, atanghou uah silngou asoh man kei ua, lamkal a nek ding leng abuaipih man kei uhi.
02012040	Huchibang in Aigupta gam a teng, Israel suante taam sung kum zali-le-sawmthum ahi.
02012041	Kum zali-le-sawmthum bei in hichi ahong hi a, huai ni ngei in hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam a pan Toupa mi tengteng apaikheta uhi.
02012042	Aigupta gam a kipan amau apikhiak ziak in Toupa a ding in huai zan zahtak petmah a tan ding ahi. Hiai Toupa zan Israel suante'n akhang-akhang a, pilvangtak a atan ding uh ahi.
02012043	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron kiang ah, “Hiai Paikan Ankuang zat ding a dan thuseh ahi. Mikhual in hiai anek louh ding ahi.
02012044	Himahleh michih sikha sum a leisa, azek na sum nung in hiai ane thei ding hi.
02012045	Gamdangmi leh sikha goihmi in hiai ane ding ahi kei hi.
02012046	Inn khat a nek ding ahi; inn polam ah sa, abangmah na lathang ding uh ahi kei. Aguh leng na hihtan ding uh ahi kei.
02012047	Israel omkhawmte tengteng in hiai azuih ding uh ahi.
02012048	Na kiang ua mikhual a-om a, Toupa a dia Paikan Ankuang a-um dingleh, pasalte zek sum ding ahi, huai khit chiang in hong pai nai uhenla, um uhen. Amah gamsung a piang bang ahi ding; zeksum louh mi in anek louh ding ahih ziak in.
02012049	Khotual mi a ding leh na lak ua mi khual taam a ding in dan khat a-om ding ahi,” achi hi.
02012050	Huchibang in Israel suan tengteng in ahih uhi. Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron thu apiak bang in ahih uhi.
02012051	Huai ni mah in hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante apawlpi in apikheta hi.
02013001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a,
02013002	“Piang masapen tengteng, Israel suante lak a sul hong peuhmah, mihing hi in ganta hitaleh siangthou in sehtuamsak in, kei' a ahi,” achi hi.
02013003	Mosi in mite kiang ah, “Hiai ni theigige un, Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtkhiak ni uh, saltanna inn a pan na hong pawtkhiak ni uh ahi; Toupa'n khut thahat a hiai mun hon tun lah ahi ngal a. Tanghou silngou soh nek louh ding ahi.
02013004	Hiai ni, Abib kha in na hong paikhia uhi.
02013005	Hichi ahong hi ding a, Toupa'n Kanaante, Hitte, Amorte, Hivte leh Jebuste gam nou hon piak dia, na pipute uh kiang a, akichiamna, bawngnawi leh khuaizu a luang gam ahon tut chiang in, hiai biakna thilzek hiai kha in na tang ding uhi.
02013006	Ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding ua, ani sagih ni in Toupa a ding in ankuangluina a-om ding ahi.
02013007	Ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh akine dia; na kiang uah tanghou silngou soh akimu ding ahi kei. Na omna tengteng uah leng silngou muh in a-om ding ahi kei hi.
02013008	Huai ni in na tapa na hilh ding a, ‘Aigupta gam a pan ka hong paikhiak lai a Toupa'n kei a dia athilhih ziak a hiai kihih ahi’ na chi ding hi.
02013009	Na ban ah nang a ding in chiamtehna ahi dia, na mitte kikal ah theihgigena, huchi a na kam a Toupa dan a-omtheihna ding in Toupa'n ban thahat a Aigupta gam a pan noute ahon pikhiak ziak in.
02013010	Huaiziak in kum teng in ahunbi in hiai dan thuseh na zui ding uh ahi.”
02013011	“Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n , nang kiang leh na pipute kiang a, akichiam bang a, Kanaante gam ahon tut chiang in, hiai ahon piak chiang in,
02013012	Toupa a ding in sul hong tengteng na koihtuam ding a, na neih ganta a pan hong om, anou masapen teng; apate Toupa a ahi ding uhi.
02013013	Sabiltungnou masapen teng belamnou in na tankhe dia; huchi a na tatkhiak keileh, angawng na hektan ding. Na tapate lak a mihing tapa masa tengteng na tankhe ding ahi.
02013014	Hun hong tung ding ah hichi ahi ding a, na tapa in, ‘hiai bang ahia? chi a hon dot chiang in, nang akiang ah, ban thahat in Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan, koltanna inn a pan ahon lakheta’ akiang ah na chi ding uhi.
02013015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh in genhaktak a hon paisak nop louh lai in, Toupa'n Aigupta gam a piang masa tengteng, mihing apiang masate leh ganta apiang masate athat hi. Huaiziak in pasal, sul hong tengteng, Toupa kiang a ka lat ahi ua; himahleh ka tapate lak a piang masa tengteng ka tankhia hi.
02013016	Huchi in na khut ah chiamtehna ding ahi dia, na mitte kikal a khaukhip ahi ding; Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan ban thahat a ahon pikhiak ziak in,” na chi ding hi.
02013017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh in huai mite apaisak lai in, naizaw mahleh Pathian in Philistiate gam tawn in api kei hi. Pathian in, “Kidouna amuh chiang un mite akisik kha ding ua, Aigupta gam ah akiheikik kha ding uh,” achih ziak in.
02013018	Huchi in Pathian in mite apikual a, Tuipi San gamdai lampi tawn in api hi. Huchibang in Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante apawlpawl a kizom in apaitou uhi.
02013019	Mosi in Joseph guhte apua hi. “Pathian in pel lou in ahong veh dia; hiai a pan ka guhte na puak ding uh ahi,” chi a Israel suante chihtaktak a, akichiam ziak in.
02013020	Sukkoth a pan azinkheta ua, gamdai zul ah, Etham mun ah agiak uhi.
02013021	Toupa ama uah sun in meipi khuampi dingh in, amaute lampi a pi ding in apai a; zan in meikuang khuampi dingh in, amaute vakna pe ding in; sun leh zan in apai hi; huchi a sun leh zan a apaitheihna ding un.
02013022	Mite ma a pan sun a meipi khuampi dingh hiam ahihkeileh zan a meikuang khuampi dingh alamang ngei kei hi.
02014001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen hi.
02014002	“Israel suante kiang ah thu gen in, kihei uhenla, Pi-hahiroth ma ah, Migdol leh tuipi kikal ah, Baal-zephon zawntak ah giak uhen. Ama ah tuipi kiang ah na giak ding uh ahi.
02014003	Israel suante tungtang thu, gamdai in adaltan ziak in gamsung ah tang in abuaigawp uh, Pharaoh in chi ding ahi.
02014004	Amaute nungdelh ding in Pharaoh lungtang ka khauhsak ding. Pharaoh tung leh asepaihte tung ah zahtak in ka om ding hi. Huchi a Aiguptate'n Toupa ka hi, chih atheihna ding un,” achi hi. Huchibang in Israel suante'n ahihta uhi.
02014005	Mite apaikheta uh, chih Aigupta kumpipa ahilh uhi. Pharaoh lungtang leh asikhate lungtang mite siatna ding in hei in a-om hi. “Eite nna asepna ua pan Israel i paisak uh, bangziak a hiai hih i hi ua!” achi uhi.
02014006	Akangtalai amansak a, amite atonpihta hi.
02014007	Kangtalai hoihpen zaguk, Aigupta gam a kangtalai tengteng leh aheutute chiat uh toh atonpih hi.
02014008	Toupa'n Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh lungtang akhauhsak a; Israel suante anungdelhta hi. Israel suante hangsantak in apaikheta uhi.
02014009	Himahleh Aiguptate'n Pharaoh sakol tengteng leh kangtalai tengteng, sakol tungtuang mite leh sepaih pawlte toh anungdelh ua, Baal-zephon ma a Pi-hahiroth pam a tuipi kiang a agiahna uah aphata uhi.
02014010	Pharaoh in ahon naih lai in, Israel suante adaktou ua, ngai in, Aiguptate'n amau ahon delhta uhi. Alau mahmah ua, Israel suante Toupa kiang ah akapkhia uhi.
02014011	Mosi kiang ah, “Aigupta gam a han a-om louh ziak a gamdai a si dia hon pikhia na hi maw! Bang achia hichibang a hon bawl dia Aigupta gam a kipan hon pikhia na hia?
02014012	Aigupta gam a ka hon hilh uh hiai thu ahi kei maw? Om maimai ni, Aiguptate nna i septheihna ding in,” chi in. “Gamdai a ka sih sang ua, koute a dia Aiguptate nasep ahoih zawk ding ziak in,” achi uhi.
02014013	Mosi in mite kiang ah, “Lau kei unla, dingh dinden un, Toupa hotdamna tuni a nou ahon etsak ding en un; tuni a na muh uh Aiguptate tangtawn a mu nawn lou ding na hih ziak un.
02014014	Toupa'n nou a ding in ahon dousak dia, na pau kei ding uh,” achi hi.
02014015	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Bang achia ka kiang a kap na hia? Malam a apaina ding un, Israel suante kiang ah thu gen in.
02014016	Na chiangkhun lik inla, tuipi tung ah na khut zankhia in, kikhensak in. Huchi in Israel suante tuipi laizang ah leihul ah apaisuak ding uhi.
02014017	Ngai in, ke'n Aiguptate lungtang ka khauhsak ding a; amaute adelhzui ding uhi. Pharaoh tung ah, akangtalaite tung ah leh asakol tungtuang mite tung ah zahtakhuaina ka kimuh ding hi.
02014018	Pharaoh tung, akangtalaite tung leh asakol tungtuang mite tung a zahtakhuaina ka kimuh chiang in, kei Toupa ka hi, chih Aiguptate'n athei ding uh,” achi hi.
02014019	Israelte giahphual ma a pai, Pathian angel akisuan a, anunglam uah apai a; amailam ua kipan meipi dingh akisuan a, anunglam uah adinghta hi.
02014020	Aiguptate giahphual leh Israelte giahphual kikal ah ahong omta a; amaute a ding in meipi leh khomial ahi a; himahleh zan in hiaite a ding in vak apia hi; huchi a zankhua a kuamah kinaihtuah thei zaw sam a-omlouhna ding un.
02014021	Mosi in tuipi tung ah akhut azankhia a; Toupa'n zankhua in suahlam huih hat in tuipi apaikiksak a, gam hul in tuipi abawl a, tuite akikhenta hi.
02014022	Tuipi lak a gam hul tung ah Israel suante apai ua; akhut taklam uh leh akhut veilam uah amau a ding in tuite baang ahong hita uhi.
02014023	Aiguptate'n adelh ua, Pharaoh sakol tengteng, akangtalai tengteng leh asakol tungtuangmi tengteng nangawn tuipi lak ah amau nung ah apailut uhi.
02014024	Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang ahong hihtak in Toupa'n meikuang khuampi dingh leh meipi khuampi dingh kawm ah Aigupta sepaihte lam a-en a, Aigupta sepaihte ahihbuaita hi.
02014025	Akangtalai khete uh alakkhiaksak a, haksapi in ahawl ua; Aiguptate'n, “Israelte ma a pan taikek ni; amaute a ding in Toupa'n lah Aiguptate siatna ding in adousak ngal a,” achi uhi.
02014026	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aiguptate tung leh akangtalaite tung leh asakol tungtuang mite tung a tuite ahong kizop nawn theihna ding in, tuipi tung ah na khut zankhia in,” achi hi.
02014027	Mosi in tuipi tung ah akhut azankhia a, zingsang ahong hih in tuipi ahatna ah ahong kik nawn a; Aiguptate alak ah ataikek ua; tuipi lak ah Toupa'n Aiguptate athalpaihta hi.
02014028	Tuite ahong kik nawn ua, kangtalaite, sakol tungtuang mite leh Pharaoh sepaih anung ua hong lut tengteng tui in akhuhta hi. Alak uah khat lel leng dam a suakta a-om kei uh.
02014029	Himahleh tuipi lak ah gam hul tung ah Israel suante apai ua; akhut taklam uleh, aveilam uah tuite amaute a ding in baang ahita hi.
02014030	Huchibang in Toupa'n huai ni in Aiguptate khut a pan Israelte ahondamta hi. Israelte'n tuipi piau ah Aiguptate' misi amu uhi.
02014031	Aiguptate tung a anasep thupi Israelte'n amu ua, huchi in Toupa leh asikha Mosi agingtata uhi.
02015001	Huai khit in Mosi leh Israel suante'n Toupa kiang ah hiai la asa uhi: Thupitak a avualzoh ziak in, Toupa kiang ah la ka sa ding. Sakol leh atung a tuangmi tuipi ah apaikheta.
02015002	Toupa ka hatna leh ka la ahi, ka hotdamna ahong hi a; ka Pathian ahi, omna ka bawlsak ding. Ka pa' Pathian, huchi in amah ka tawisang ding hi.
02015003	Toupa galhatpa ahi: Toupa amin ahi.
02015004	“Pharoah kangtalaite leh asepaihte tuipi ah apaikheta: aheutute uh leng, Tuipi San ah akelum uhi.
02015005	Thukna in amaute akhuhta: Suang bang in ataw ah atumta uhi.
02015006	“ Toupa aw, na khut taklam thilhihtheihna thupi ahong hita: Toupa aw, na khut taklam in melma agawizanta hi.
02015007	Na hoihna thupina in nang hon dou dia thoute azouta: na thangpaihna na sawlkhia a, huai in amaute buhpawl bang in akangta hi.
02015008	Na nakvangte mut in tuite kaihkhawm in a-om ua, tui tampite vum bang a chian in a-om, huchi in tuipi sunggil ah thuknate kipsak in a-om hi.
02015009	Melma in, ka delh ding a, ka pha dia, gallak ka hawm ding: Huaite ah ka duhgawlna atai ding, ka namsau ka phawi dia, ka khut in amau ka hihgawp ding,” achi hi.
02015010	Nang na huih in na muta, tuipi in amau akhuhta hi; tui hatte ah ngen bang in atumta uhi.
02015011	“ Toupa aw, nang bang kua a-om a? pathiante lak ah! Sianthouna a thupi, phatnate a lauhuai, thillamdang hih ah, nang bang kua a-om a?
02015012	Na khut taklam na zankhia a, lei in amaute avalhta hi.
02015013	“Na tatsa mite nang na zahngaihna in na pikhia a; na tenna siangthou ah na hatna in amaute na pita hi.
02015014	Mite'n aza ua, aling uhi: Lunggimna in Philistia a tengte amanta.
02015015	Huai chiang in Edom hausate'n lamdang asa mahmah ua: Moab a mi thilhihtheite, linna in aman a; Kanaan a tengte tengteng azulmang uhi.
02015016	Launa leh kihtakna atung uah ahong tung a; na ban thupina in suang bang in adai dide ua; na leisa na mite'n apaikan masiah uh, Toupa aw, na mite'n apaikan masiah uh.
02015017	Na gouluah tang ah amau na hon tun ding a, na suan ding, Toupa aw, tenna ding a na kibawlna mun ah, Mun Siangthou ah, Toupa aw, na khut in alamkipsa ah.
02015018	Toupa'n tangtawn tangtawn in vai ahawm ding.”
02015019	Pharaoh sakol kangtalaite leh asakol tungtuang mite toh tuipi ah apilut a, Toupa'n atung uah tuipi tuite ahon nilkhawm nawn a; himahleh Israel suante tuipi tung ah gam hul ah apai uhi.
02015020	Miriam zawlneinu, Aaron sanggamnu'n khuangta akhut in ala a; numei tengteng in khuangta toh lam kawm in anung ah azui uhi.
02015021	Miriam in amaute adawng a: “Thupitak a avualzoh ziak in, Toupa kiang ah la sa un; tuipi ah sakol leh atungtuangmi apaikheta hi,” chi in.
02015022	Huchibang in Tuipi San a pan Mosi in Israelte api a, Shur gamdai ah apai ua, gamdai ah ni thum apai ua, tui amuta kei uhi.
02015023	Marah ahong tun un, Marah tuite akhat ziak in adawn thei kei uh; huaiziak in amin Marah asa uhi.
02015024	Mosi dem in mite aphun ua, “Bang dawn ding i hia!” achi uhi.
02015025	Toupa kiang ah akap a; Toupa'n singkung khat a-ensak a, tui lak a akhiakleh, tui ahong limta hi. Huai ah amaute a ding in dan thuseh leh dan abawl a, huai ah amaute a-enchian hi.
02015026	“Lungluttak a Toupa na Pathian aw na ngaihkhiak a, amitmuh a dik na hih a, athupiakte a bil na doh a, adan thusehte na zuihleh, Aiguptate tung a ka tut, huai hipite lak ah abangmah na tung ah ka koih kei ding. Nang hon hihdampa Toupa ka hi ngal a,” achi hi.
02015027	Elim, tuikhuk sawm-le-nih omna leh tum sing sawmsagih omna ahong tung ua; huai a tuite kiang ah agiakta uhi.
02016001	Huan Elim a pan azin zom zel ua, Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan apawtkhiak nung uh akha nihna, ani sawm-le-nga ni in Israel suante Sin gamdai atung ua, huai Elim leh Sinai kikal a om ahi.
02016002	Gamdai ah Israel suan omkhawmte Mosi leh Aaron dem in aphun uhi.
02016003	Israel suante'n akiang uah, “Sa bel bulte a i tut lai un, khamtak a tanghou i nek lai un, Aigupta gam ah Toupa khut in na si zaw mai lehang. Hiai a omkhawm tengteng kial a hon that dia, hiai gamdai a na hon pikhiak tak ziak un,” achi uhi.
02016004	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai in, nou a ding in van a pan tanghou ka hon zusak ding. Huchi in mite apaikhe ding ua, niteng daih ding bangzah zah hiam alakhawm ding ua, ka dan ah a-om uhiam om lou, amau ka etchet theihna ding in.
02016005	Ani guk ni in, hichi ahi ding a, ahon lakte uh abawl ding ua; niteng a alakkhawm uh mun nih a tam ahi ding,” achi hi.
02016006	Mosi leh Aaron in Israel suan tengteng kiang ah, “Nitaklam in huai hun in Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan ahon pikhia chih na thei ding uhi.
02016007	Zingsang huai hun in Toupa thupina na mu ding ua; Toupa kalh a na phunnate uh lah azata ngal a. Kou bang ka hi ua, ka tung ua na phun uh?”
02016008	Mosi in, “Nitaklam a nek ding sa, zingsang a kham ding tanghou Toupa'n ahon piak chiang in hiai na mu ding uhi. Amah tung a na phunnate uh Toupa'n azata ngal a. Kou bang ka hi ua? Kou kalh a phun na hi kei ua, Toupa kalh a phun na hi zaw uhi,” achi hi.
02016009	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah thu agen a, “Israel suan omkhawm tengteng kiang ah Toupa ma ah hong pai nai un. Na phunnate uh lah azata ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
02016010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aaron in Israel suan omkhawmte tengteng kiang a thu agen lai in, gamdai lam a-et uleh, ngai in, meipi ah Toupa thupina ahong dawk hi.
02016011	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a,
02016012	“Israel suante phunna ka za; akiang uah thu gen in. Nitaklam in sa na ne ding ua, zingsang lam in tanghou na kham ding uhi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
02016013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitaklam in vengkeng ahong tungtou ua, giahphual ahong tuamdim ua; zingsang in giahphual kimvel ah daitui akia hi.
02016014	Daitui kia a-om nawn louhtak in, ngai in, gamdai pumpi ah thil bem neu, lei lak ah zing daitui khal ngou chia a neu a-om hi.
02016015	Israel suante'n amuh un, “Hiai bang ahia?” akichituah ua, bang ahia chih lah athei ngal kei ua. Mosi in akiang uah, “Hiai Toupa'n ahon piak na nek ding uh tanghou ahi.
02016016	Michih in ama khamkhop ding zah la hen. Na mite uh zah dungzui in, michih a ding in omer khat la uhen chi a, Toupa'n thu apiak hiai ahi. Michih in apuanin a om ding zah la un,” achi hi.
02016017	Israel suante'n huchibang in ahih ua, akhen in tam deuh, akhen in tawm deuh ala uhi.
02016018	Omer a ateh uleh atam la in bangmah anei val kei a, atawm la in bangmah atasam tuan kei hi. Michih in akham ding bang zel in ala uhi.
02016019	Mosi in, “Kuamah in zingsang tan nutsiat nei kei hen,” achi hi.
02016020	Hinapi in Mosi angaikhe kei ua; alak ua khenkhatte'n zingchiang tan in akoihkhol ua, athan a, a-uih hi. Huchi in atung uah Mosi ahehta hi.
02016021	Zingsang teng in, michih in akham ding bang zel in ala ua; ni ahong sat chiang in azul hi.
02016022	Ani guk ni in hichi ahong hi a, tanghou amun nih a tam mi khat a ding in omer nih zel ala uhi. Khawmpite heutu tengteng ahong ua Mosi ahilh uhi.
02016023	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hiai Toupa chihsa ahi, zingchiang Toupa a dia Sabbath siangthou khawlna ahi. Na kan nop uleh tuni in kang unla; na huan ding uleh huan un. Avalte zingchiang tan a ding in kikoih un,” achi hi.
02016024	Mosi thupiak bang in azingchiang tan akoih ua, a-uih kei a, athan leng a-om kei hi.
02016025	Mosi in, “Tuni in huai ne un; tuni lah Toupa a dia Sabbath ni ahi ngal a. Tuni in gamlak ah tanghou na mu kei ding uh.
02016026	Ni guk na lakhawm ding ua; himahleh ani sagih ni Sabbath ni ahi, huai ni in bangmah a-om kei ding,” achi hi.
02016027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in lakhawm ding in mi khenkhat apaikhia ua, himahleh bangmah amu kei uh.
02016028	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Bang tan ka thupiakte leh ka dante zui lou ding na hi ua?
02016029	En in, Toupa'n Sabbath ni ahon piak ngalleh, huaiziak a, ani guk ni a ni nih a ding tanghou hon pia ahi. Michih amun ah om henla, ani sagih ni in amun a pan kuamah paikhe kei hen,” achi hi.
02016030	Huchi in mite ani sagih ni in akhawlta uhi.
02016031	Israel inkote'n amin Manna asa ua; koriandar tang bang ahi a, angou a; chep in tanghou pei khuaizu soh abang hi.
02016032	Mosi in, “Hiai thil Toupa thupiak ahi. Na khang na khang ua ding in omer khat thundim un. Aigupta gam a pan ka hon pikhiak lai a, gamdai a ka hon vakna tanghou amuhtheihna ding un,” achi hi.
02016033	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah, “Bel la inla, huai ah omer khat manna dim koih in, Toupa ma ah luikhia in, na khang na khang ua zuih ding in,” achi hi.
02016034	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in, Aaron in Theihpihna ma ah, koih ding in aluitouta hi.
02016035	Gam kiluah ahong tun masiah uh, Israel suante'n kum sawmli sung manna ane uhi. Kanaan gamgi ahong tun masiah uh, manna ane uhi.
02016036	Omer khat, ephah khat mun sawm ahi.
02017001	Huan Israel suante omkhawm Sin gamdai a pan azin ua, Toupa thupiak bang a azin nung un Rephidim ah apuanin uh akai uhi. Huai ah mite dawn ding tui a-om kei hi.
02017002	Huaiziak in mite'n Mosi akinakpih ua, “Ka dawn ding uh tui hon pia in,” achi uhi. Mosi in akiang uah, “Bangziak a hon kinakpih na hi ua? Bangziak a Toupa ze-et na hi ua?” achi hi.
02017003	Mite lah tui duh in huai ah adang uh atak a; Mosi tung ah mite aphun ua, “Dangtakna a kou leh ka tate uh leh ka gante uh hon that dia, bangziak a Aigupta gam a pan hon lakhia na hia?” achi uhi.
02017004	Toupa kiang ah Mosi akap a, “Hiai mite bang ka loh dia? Suang a hon denglum ding in mansa in a-om uhi,” achi hi.
02017005	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Mite ma ah pai inla, Israel upate tonpih inla; lui na satna chiang na khut in tawi inla, pai in.
02017006	Ngai in, Horeb ah suangpi tung ah na ma ah ka dingh ding a, suangpi na sat dia, huai a pan tui ahong pawtkhe ding, mite'n adawntheihna ding un,” achi hi. Israel upate muh in Mosi in huchibang in ahihta hi.
02017007	Huai mun min Massah leh Meribah asa hi, Israel suante'n Toupa tawng a, amah chian in, “I lak uah Toupa a-om hia, om lou,” achih ziak un.
02017008	Huai khit in Amalek ahong kuan a, Rephidim ah Israelte ahong dou hi.
02017009	Mosi in Joshua kiang ah, “Mi hon telkhia inla, pawtkhe ni in, Amalek i dou ding. Zingchiang in ka khut a Pathian' chiangkhun tawi in mualvum ah ka kuan ding,” achi hi.
02017010	Huchi in Mosi in akiang a, agen bang in Joshua in ahih a, Amalek adou uhi. Mosi leh Aaron leh Hur mualvum ah ahohtouta uhi.
02017011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mosi in akhut aliktouh chiang in, Israelte ahat ua; akhut akhiaksuk chiang in, Amalek ahat hi.
02017012	Himahleh Mosi khut agik a; huchi in suang ala ua, anuai ah akoih uhi. Huai tung ah amah atu a, Aaron leh Hur in akhut adoptouhsak uhi; khat in akhat lam pang, leh adang pen in akhat lam pang ah. Huchi in nitum matan akhutte apangzou hi.
02017013	Huchi in Joshua in Amalek leh amite anamsau in azouta hi.
02017014	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Theihgige ding in hiai laibu ah gelh inla, Joshua bil ah gen nawn in. Van nuai a pan Amalek theihgigena ka koihmang sipsip ding ziak in,” achi hi.
02017015	Mosi in huai ah maitam adoh a, amin Jehovah-nissi asa hi.
02017016	“Akhang akhang a Toupa'n Amalek dou gige ding chi a akichiam ziak in,” achi hi.
02018001	Jethro, Midian siampu, Mosi sungpa'n, Mosi a ding leh ami Israelte a dia Pathian in ahih tengteng leh Aigupta gam a pan Toupa'n Israelte apikhiakdan ana za hi.
02018002	Huchi in Jethro, Mosi sungpa'n, Zipporah, Mosi zi, asawlkik nung in ana kem hi;
02018003	Zipporah tapa nihte toh. Huai nih lak a khat min Gershom ahi, “Melmak gam ah mikhual ka na hi,” achih ziak in.
02018004	Adang min Eliezer ahi, “Ka pa' Pathian hon panpihpa ahi, Pharaoh namsau a pan ahon tatkhiak ziak in,” achi hi.
02018005	Jethro, Mosi sunghpa atapate leh azi toh gamdai ah Mosi kiang ah ahong hoh ua, Pathian tang a apuanin kaihna mun ah.
02018006	Mosi kiang ah, “Kei na sunghpa Jethro na kiang ah ka hong, na zi leh akiang a atapa nihte toh,” achi hi.
02018007	Asunghpa dawn ding in Mosi apawtkhia a, akun a, atawp a; bang na chi uhiam chi in akidongtuah ua; puanin sung ah alut uhi.
02018008	Mosi in asungpa, Pharaoh tung leh Aiguptate tung a Israelte ziak a Toupa thilhih tengteng leh lampi a haksatna atung ua hong tung tengteng leh huaite a kipan Toupa'n atatkhiakdante ahilh hi.
02018009	Aiguptate khut a pan atatkhiak, Israelte tung a Toupa'n ahihhoihna tengteng ziak in Jethro akipak hi.
02018010	Jethro in, “Aiguptate khut a pan leh Pharaoh khut a pan hon tankhepa, Aiguptate khut a pan amite tankhepa Toupa pahtawi in om hen.
02018011	Tu in pathian tengteng sang in Toupa athupizaw, chih ka thei. Kisatheitak a Israel suante tung a thilhihte tung a hiai ahih tak ziak in,” achi hi.
02018012	Mosi sunghpa Jethro in, halmang thillat leh thillat dangte Pathian a ding in alan hi. Pathian ma a ankuang umkhawm ding in Aaron leh Israel upa tengteng ahong pai uhi.
02018013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in mipite vai hawm ding in Mosi atu hi. Mipite zingsang a pan nitaklam tan in Mosi kiang ah adingh uhi.
02018014	Mosi sungpa'n Mosi in mite tung a ahih tengteng amuh in, “Mite tung a hiai thil na hih bangchidan ahia? Bangziak a nang kia tangtut na hia? Bangziak a zingsang a pan nitaklam tan na kiang a mite dingh uh ahia?” achi hi.
02018015	Mosi in asunghpa kiang ah, “Pathian dong dia mite ka kiang a hong pai ahi uh.
02018016	Haksatna aneih chiang un, ka kiang ah ahong pai ua; khat leh adang kikal ah vai ka hawm a, Pathian dan thusehte leh adante ka theisak hi,” achi hi.
02018017	Mosi sungpa'n akiang ah, “Na thilhih ahoih kei hi.
02018018	Nang leh na kiang a om hiai mite na segawp mahmah ding uhi. Nang a dia hiai thil agik luat ziak in, nang kia in na hihthei kei hi.
02018019	Tu in ka aw ngaikhia in, ka hon thuhilh ding hi. Na kiang ah Pathian om hen. Pathian lam ah nang mite palai na hi dia, athubuaite uh Pathian kiang ah na tun ding hi.
02018020	Thusehte leh dante amau na sinsak dia, apaina ding lam uh leh anasep ding uh toh na ensak ding hi.
02018021	Huai lou in mite a pan hi thei, Pathian kihtakdan siamte, thutak mite, enna hote na telkhe dia, amaute atung uah na koih ding hi. Huchibang mite sangkhatte tung a vaihawmte, zakhatte tung a vaihawmte, sawmngate tung a vaihawmte leh sawmkhatte tung a vaihawmte ahi ding uh.
02018022	Hun tengteng in amau mite vai hawmsak uhen. Huan hichi ahi ding a, thu lian chiteng nang kiang ahong tun ding ua, thu neu chiteng amaute'n thu akhen ding uhi. Huchi in nang a ding in abaihlamzaw dia, na puakgik hon puakpih ding uhi.
02018023	Hiai thil na hih a, huchibang a Pathian in thu ahon piakleh, huchi in na pangzou dia, hiai mite leng lungkim in amun uah apai ding uh,” achi hi.
02018024	Mosi in asunghpa aw angaikhia a, agen tengteng ahihta hi.
02018025	Israel tengteng a pan Mosi in mihitheite atelkhia a, mite tung a lutang in abawlta hi. Sangkhatte tung a vaihawmte, zakhatte tung a vaihawmte, sawmngate tung a vaihawmte leh sawmkhatte tung a vaihawmte in abawlta hi.
02018026	Hun tengteng in mite vai ahawmsak ua; thu haksate Mosi kiang ah atun ua, thu neute bel amau akhen zel uhi.
02018027	Huchi in Mosi in asunghpa apaisak a, ama gam ah apaita hi.
02019001	Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante ahong paikhiak uh; akha thumna, huai ni mah in Sinai gamdai ahong tung uhi.
02019002	Rephidim a pan pawtkhia in, Sinai gamdai ahong tung ua, gamdai ah agiak uhi. Huai ah Israelte'n tang mazawn ah puanin akai uhi.
02019003	Pathian kiang ah Mosi ahohtou a, Toupa'n tang a pan amah asam a, “Hichibang in Jakob inkote kiang ah na chi dia, Israel suante na hilh ding hi:
02019004	Aiguptate tung a ka hih leh muvanlai khate a ka hon tuah a, keimah kiang ngei ka hon tutdan na muta uhi.
02019005	Huaiziak in tu in, ka aw na man taktak ua, ka thukhun na zuih taktak uleh, leitung pumpi kei a ahih ziak in mite sang in kei a ding in gou manpha na hi ding uhi.
02019006	Kei a ding in siampute, lalgam leh nam siangthou na hi ding uhi. Hiai thute Israel suante kiang a na gen ding ahi,” achi hi.
02019007	Mosi ahong a mite upate asamsak a, Toupa'n amah apiak hiai thu tengteng ama uah aluita hi.
02019008	Mi tengteng in kituaktak in adawng ua, “ Toupa thugen tengteng ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi. Mosi in mite thu Toupa kiang ah atun nawn hi.
02019009	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai in, na kiang ah meipi sah in ka hong, na kiang a thu ka gen chiang a mite'n azak theih ua, chik lai peuh a nang ahon gintak theihna ding un,” achi hi. Mosi in mite thu Toupa ahilh hi.
02019010	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Mite kiang ah va hoh inla, tuni leh zingchiang a ding in amaute siangsak in, apuante uh sawpsiang uhen.
02019011	Ani thum ni a ding in mansa in om uhen. Ani thum ni a mi tengteng mitmuh a Sinai Tang tung a Toupa ahong paisuk ding ziak in.
02019012	Mite kimvel ah dai na kai ding a, tang a hohtou lou ding in pilvang un, ahihkeileh tang kim khoih lou ding in pilvang un. Kuapeuh tang khoih sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02019013	Khut in alawng ding uh ahi kei, alawng peuhmah suang a denlup ngeingei ahi ding; ahihkeileh thal a kap pailet ahi ding. Ganta hiam mihing hiam hileh leng, ahing kei ding. Pengkul sawtpi agin chiang in, tang ah ahong paitou ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
02019014	Tang a pan mite kiang ah Mosi apaisuk a, apuante uh asawp uhi.
02019015	Ama'n mite kiang ah, “Ni thum ni a ding in kisakhol un; na zite uh naih kei un,” achi hi.
02019016	Ani thum ni in zingsang in hichi ahong hi a, vanpigingte leh khophiate, tang tung a meipi sah, pengkul aw angaih a ngaih ahong ging a, giahphual sung a om mi tengteng alingta uhi.
02019017	Mosi in puanin a pan mite Pathian toh kimu ding in ahon pikhia a; amau tang nuailam ah adingh uhi.
02019018	Meikuang a tang tung a kipan Toupa ahong kumsuk ziak in Sinai Tang apumkhut vekta hi. Haltuina meikhu bang in atungkah a, atang pumpi aling zungzung hi.
02019019	Sawtpi pengkul ging angaih semsem lai in Mosi in thu agen a, Pathian in aw in amah adawng hi.
02019020	Sinai Tang tung a tang vum tung ah Toupa ahong paisuk hi. Atang vum tung ah Toupa'n Mosi asamtou a, Mosi ahohtou hi.
02019021	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Paisuk inla, mite vauhilh in. En ding in Toupa lam hong phuvang in alak ua tampi amangthang kha ding uhi.”
02019022	“ Toupa kiang a hong pai siampute leng kihihsiangthou uhen, huchi lou in zaw atung uah Toupa apuakzak kha ding,” achi hi.
02019023	Mosi in Toupa kiang ah, “Sinai Tang ah mite ahong paitou thei kei ding uh. Tang kimvel in dai kai inla, hihsiangthou in chi a na hon hilh ziak in,” achi hi.
02019024	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Paisuk inla, huan Aaron toh hong paitou un. Himahleh siampute leh mite'n Toupa kiang a hong ding in hon phuvang kei uhen. Huchi lou in zaw amaute tung ah apuakzak kha ding,” achi hi.
02019025	Mite kiang ah Mosi ahohsuk a, akiang uah thu agenta hi.
02020001	Huan Pathian in huchi a chi in hiai thute tengteng agen hi.
02020002	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh, Aigupta gam a kipan leh saltanna inn a pan hon pikhepa ka hi;
02020003	ka ma ah keimah lou ngal pathian dangte na nei ding ahi kei.
02020004	Milim gelhthoh himhim ahihkeileh tunglam van a om thil lim kibatpih mawngmawng hiam nuai lei a om hiam lei nuai a tui sung a om kibatpih na kibawl ding ahi kei.
02020005	Akiang uah na kun ding ahi kei, a-nna uh leng na sem ding ahi kei. Kei lah Toupa na Pathian, mullit hat Pathian, kei hon hote khang thumna leh khang lina tan a, pate gitlouhna tate tung a thuk ka hi ngal a,
02020006	kei hon it a, ka thupiakte zuite lak a sang tampite kiang a zahngaihna lak zelpa ka hi.
02020007	Toupa na Pathian min na mawk gen ding ahi kei; amin mawk genmi lah Toupa'n moh lou in akoih ngal kei a.
02020008	Sabbath ni siangthou a tan ding theigige in.
02020009	Ni guk sung teng nna na sem ding a, na nna tengteng nasep ding ahi.
02020010	Himahleh ani sagihna Toupa na Pathian Sabbath ni ahi. Huai ah nna himhim; nang leng, na tapa in leng, na tanu in leng, na sikhapa hiam, na sikhanu hiam, na ganta hiam, na huangsung a om na mikhual hiam in leng asem ding ahi kei.
02020011	Ani guk ni in Toupa'n lei leh van, tuipi leh asung ua om tengteng bawl in, ani sagih ni in akhawl ngal a. Huaiziak in Toupa'n Sabbath ni vualzawl in, atang siangthou hi.
02020012	Na nu leh na pa zahtak in. Toupa na Pathian in ahon piak gam a na nite asautheihna ding in.
02020013	Tual na that ding ahi kei.
02020014	Ang na kawm ding ahi kei.
02020015	Na gu ding ahi kei.
02020016	Na inveng siatna ding in palai taklou na hi ding ahi kei.
02020017	Na inveng inn na eng ding ahi kei. Na inveng zi na eng ding ahi kei, asikhapa leng, asikhanu leng, abawngtal hiam, asabiltung hiam, thil himhim na inveng a peuhpeuh.
02020018	Mi tengteng in vanpigingte, khophiate, pengkul husate leh tang kang khu amu ua; mite'n huaite amuh un, akisuan ua, gamlapi ah adingh uhi.
02020019	Mosi kiang ah, “Ka kiang uah thu gen inla, ka hon ngaikhe ding uhi. Himahleh Pathian in hon houpih kei hen, ka si kha ding uh,” achi uhi.
02020020	Mosi in akiang uah, “Lau kei un. Amah launa na ma ua a-om a, na khelhlouhna ding un, noute hon enchian ding a Pathian hong pai ahih ziak in,” achi hi.
02020021	Mite gamlatak ah adingh ua, Pathian omna mun mial bikbek lam ah Mosi ava pai nai hi.
02020022	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, Israel kiang ah hichibang in na chi ding, “Van a pan nou ka hon houpih na muta uhi.
02020023	Kei lou dangka pathiante na kibawl ding uh ahi kei. Dangka-eng pathiante leng na kibawl ding uh ahi kei.
02020024	Kei a ding in lei maitam na bawl ding ua, huai ah na halmang thillatte leh na lemna thillatte, na belamte leh na bawngtalte na lan ding uh ahi. Mun tengteng a ka min ka khumna ah na kiang uah ka hong dia, ka hon vualzawl ding hi.
02020025	Suang maitam na hon bawlsakleh, suangsek a na bawl louh ding ahi. Suang tung a na vanzat na likleh, na hihnin ahi ngal a.
02020026	Huai a na vuaktanna adawklouhna ding in, ka maitam ah kalbi in na kahtou ding ahi kei,” achi hi.
02021001	Huan hiai vaihawmnate, ama ua na ngak dingte ahi uhi.
02021002	Hebru sikha na leileh, kum guk sung nang nna asem ding a, akum sagihna ah bangmah pe lou in noplen in apawtkhe ding.
02021003	Ama tum a hong lut ahihleh, ama tum mah in apawtkhe ding. Zi nei ahihleh, azi in amah azuikhe ding.
02021004	Apu in zi apiak a, tapate hiam tanute hiam aneihsakleh, azi leh atate apu a ahi ding ua, amah kia in apawtkhe ding.
02021005	Sikha in teltak a, “Ka pu ka it, ka zi leh ka tate ka it; noplen in ka pawtkhe kei ding,” achihleh;
02021006	apu in vaihawmte kiang ah amah api dia; kongkhak chiang ah hiam kongkhak khuam chiang ah hiam api dia, apu'n vuhna in abil avut pailet ding. Huchi in ama'n apu nna asem tawntung ding hi.
02021007	Mi'n sikhanu ding a atanu azuakleh, sikhapate bang in apaikhe kei ding.
02021008	Amah khampa, apu alungkimsak keileh, apa atankiksak ding. Atung ah muanhuai loutak a ahihleh melmak nam kiang a zuak ding in thuneihna anei kei.
02021009	Atapa zi dia adeihleh, tanute bang in abawl ding hi.
02021010	Ama'n zi dang aneihthuahleh, a-an nek, apuansilh leh apiak ding a kilawm asukkiam louh ding ahi.
02021011	Atung a hiai thumte ahihkeileh, sum-le-pai pe lou in noplen in apawtkhe ding ahi.
02021012	Asihna dia mi vua peuhmah, sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02021013	Mi'n thah ding a na buk lou ahih a, Pathian in akhut a amah apiakkhiakleh, ataikhiakna ding mun ka sehsak ding hi.
02021014	Himahleh mi khatpeuh in tupmawng in a-invengte tung ah gitlouh piltak in asihna ding in gamta taleh, ka maitam a pan amah na lakhe dia, asih ding ahi.
02021015	Kuapeuh apa hiam, anu hiam vomi, sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02021016	Kuapeuh mihing gu a zuakmi, ahihkeileh akhut ah muhkhiak a ommi, amah sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02021017	Kuapeuh anu leh pa hamsiatmi, sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02021018	Mite kisual uhenla, khat in khat suang in deng hiam, akhuttum hiam in tum henla, si lou in, lupna ngak taleh;
02021019	thou nawn in, chiangkhun khun in kholak vakleh, avopa ahul dia; ahun sukbei man ape dia, amah adamsiangsak sipsip ding hi.
02021020	Mi'n chiang in asikhapa hiam, asikhanu hiam sat henla, akhutlum in si taleh amah gawt ngeingei ding ahi.
02021021	Himahleh ni khat hiam, ni nih hiam nung a dam a, athohzohleh, gawt louh ding ahi; amah apu neihsa ahih ziak in.
02021022	Mite kisual in, numei gai lai hihna in, anau tolh henla, himahleh siatdetna in zui keileh; numeinu pasal in atung a, achih bangbang a gawt ngeingei ding ahi. Vaihawmte'n abikhiah bang uh aliau ding hi.
02021023	Siatna mawngmawng in zui taleh hinna tang a hinna apiak ding ahi.
02021024	Mit tang a mit, ha tang a ha, khut tang a khut, khe tang a khe.
02021025	Mei a hal tang a mei a hal, liam tang a liam, pawn tang a pawn.
02021026	Mi'n asikha mit hiam, asikhanu mit hiam suksak in, se taleh amit ziak in noplen in akhah ding ahi.
02021027	Asikhapa ha hiam, asikhanu ha hiam sukhe taleh, aha ziak in noplen in akhah ding ahi.
02021028	Bawngtal in pasal hiam, numei hiam, asik ziak in si taleh; huai bawngtal denlup ngeingei ding ahi. Asa nek louh hial ding ahi. Himahleh abawngtal nei pen gawt louh in asuakta ding hi.
02021029	Himahleh huai bawngtal amalam a, akii a misik hat hi a, aneitu kiang a hilhsa leng hinapi a, ama'n ana khum tuan lou ahihleh, pasal hiam, numei hiam ana siklupleh, huai bawngtal denlup ding ahi a; aneitu leng sihsak ding ahi.
02021030	Atung ah dangka sum akiphutleh, akiphut bangbang ahinna tatna man ding in ape ding ahi.
02021031	Tapa hiam, tanu hiam ana sikleh, hiai vaihawmna bang a, atung a hih ding ahi.
02021032	Bawngtal in sikhapa hiam sikhanu hiam asikleh, apu kiang ah dangka shekel sawmthum ape dia, bawngtal pen denlup ding ahi.
02021033	Pasal in kokhuk sin hong henla, ahihkeileh pasal in kokhuk tou henla, sin kei henla, asung ah bawngtal hiam sabiltung hiam ke taleh,
02021034	kokhuk neitu in abawlhoih a, aneipa kiang a dangka sum apiak ding ahi. Huchi in aganta si pen amah a ahi ding.
02021035	Mi khat bawngtal in midang khat bawngtal mah hih na kha henla, si taleh; abawngtal hing lai pen azuak ding ua, asum akihawm ding uhi. Abawngtal si pen leng akihawm ding uh ahi.
02021036	Ahihkeileh amalam a huai bawngtal sik hat ahi chih akitheih a, aneitu in akhum kei chih akitheihleh; bawngtal tang a bawngtal apiak ngeingei ding ahi. Huchi in aganta si pen amah a tuam ahi ding hi.
02022001	Mi'n bawngtal hiam, belam hiam gu in gou hiam zuak taleh; bawngtal khat gun in bawngtal nga, belam khat gun in belam li a adit ding ahi.
02022002	Guta inn luh kimu in, kivua in si taleh, avopa pen sisan suah chi a mohsak theih ahi kei ding.
02022003	Himahleh atung a ni asuah nung ahihleh sisan suah chi a mohpaih theih ahi ding. Ditna kim apiak ding ahi. Piak ding bangmah aneih keileh, aguktak ziak a amah zuak ding ahi.
02022004	Avan guk akhut a hing a akimuhleh, bawngtal hiam ahihkeileh sabiltung hiam, ahihkeileh belam hiam hitaleh, amun nih apiakkik ding ahi.
02022005	Mi'n lou hiam, grephuan hiam nek a omsak in, aganta lutsak in, midang lou ah va ta taleh; ama lou hoihna pen leh ama grephuan hoihna pen a pan ditna abawl ding ahi.
02022006	Mei hong kang in, ling lak hong kuang in, buh hiam ahihkeileh hai dingh lai hiam ahihkeileh lou kangse taleh; amei khahpa'n ditna abawl ngeingei ding ahi.
02022007	Mi'n a-invengpa kep ding in dangka sum hiam van hiam pekhia henla, huai mi inn a pan kigu taleh; guta akimuhleh azahnih pia hen.
02022008	Guta akimuh keileh, a-invengpa van tung ah akhut akha na hiam, chih theihna ding in vaihawmte kiang ah inn neipa api ding ahi.
02022009	Tatlekna chiteng, bawngtal thu ah hiam, sabiltung thu ah hiam, belam thu ah hiam, puansilh thu ah hiam, van mansak thu ah hiam, midang in kei a ahi, achihleh, alang tuak thu vaihawmte ma atut ding ahi. Vaihawmte mohpaihpa'n a-invengpa aleh nih apiak ding ahi.
02022010	Mi'n a-invengpa kiang ah akep ding in sabiltung hiam, bawngtal hiam, belam hiam gan himhim hiam pekhia henla; si hiam, liam hiam, hawlmang hiam a om in, kuamah in mu kei taleh;
02022011	Toupa kichiamna amau gel kikal ah a-om dia; a-invengpa' van tung ah akhut akha kei chihna; avan neipa'n huai apom dia, adin kei ding hi.
02022012	Amah a pan guk a-omleh, aneipa kiang ah ditna abawl ding hi.
02022013	Gan balnen in ana om taleh, atheihpihna ding in asa hon tawi hen, balnen a om pen adin kei ding hi.
02022014	Mi'n a-invengpa banghiam khel henla, anei pen om louh kal in liam in hiam si hiam in om taleh, adit ngeingei ding ahi.
02022015	Himahleh aneipa akiang a om ahihleh adin kei ding. Van khelh man in adin khin lel hi.
02022016	Khamsa hilou nungak siangthou khat pasal in zol henla, kithuahpih taleh, mou man pia in zi in anei ngeingei ding ahi.
02022017	Anumei pa'n akiang a piak anial bilbelleh, nungak siangthoute man dungzui in sum ape ding hi.
02022018	Dawizawl ahin na phal ding ahi kei.
02022019	Ganta kithuahpih peuhmah sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02022020	Toupa kiang kia lou ngal, pathian himhim kiang a kithoih peuhmah hihsiat dimdem ding ahi.
02022021	Mikhual na subuai hiam, na nuaisiah hiam ding ahi kei hi; Aigupta gam a mikhual na hih tak ziak un.
02022022	Meithai hiam, pa nei lou naupang hiam na hihgenthei ding ahi kei.
02022023	Bangchiteng a amau na gentheihsak a, ka kiang a ahong kah peuhmah uleh, akahna uh ka ngaikhe ngeingei ding hi.
02022024	Ka thangpaihna asou dia, namsau in ka hon that ding hi. Na zite uh meithai ahi ding ua, na tate uh pa nei lou ahi ding uhi.
02022025	Na kiang ua om ka mite lak a mizawng kuapeuh kiang a sum na leitawi sakleh, leitawisakmi hih bang a sumpung na nek louh ding ahi.
02022026	Kichiamna a na inveng puansilh na lakleh, ni tum ma a ama kiang a na va piakkik ding ahi.
02022027	Huai lah akikhuhna neihsun ahi ngal a, avun a ding a apuansilh ahi. Bang in a-ihmu dia? Hichi ahi dia, ka kiang a, ahong kah chiang in ka za ding; hehpih thei ka hih ziak in.
02022028	Pathian na enghou ding ahi kei a, na mite vaihawmmi leng na hamsiat ding ahi kei hi.
02022029	Na theigah min masate, na uain masate lan ding in na zekai ding ahi kei. Na tapate lak a piang masapen kei na hon piak ding ahi.
02022030	Huchi mah bang in na bawngtalte lak ah leng na hih ding ahi. Na belamte lak ah leng hiai bang in na hih ding ahi. Ni sagih sung api kiang ah na omsak dia, ani giat ni a kei na hon piak ding ahi.
02022031	Kei a dia misiangthoute na hih ding uh ahi. Huaiziak in gamlak a gamsa nek bang sa himhim na nek louh ding uh ahi a; uite na pe zaw ding uhi.
02023001	Thutut zuau na genzak ding ahi kei. Theihpih diklou hi ding in migiloute toh na kizop ding ahi kei.
02023002	Gilou hih ding in mipi na zui ding ahi kei. Vaihawmna kaikawi ding in mi tam lamlam zui in amau na gum ding ahi kei.
02023003	Thubuai genna ah mizawng dou in guptuam na nei ding ahi kei.
02023004	Na melma bawngtal hiam sabiltung hiam taimang na tuahleh, akiang a na pi nawn ngeingei ding ahi.
02023005	Nang hon homi' sabiltung, avan puak lel a puk na muhleh taisan lou a, na panpih ngeingei ding ahi.
02023006	Thubuai a kihekna ah mizawngte a ding in thukhenna na kaikawi ding ahi kei.
02023007	Thil diklou a pan gamlapi ah om in, thil hihkhial lou leh midikte that ke'n; migiloute siamtangsak lou ding ka hih ziak in.
02023008	Golhgukna na la ding ahi kei. Golhgukna in mit atosak a, midiktatte thu akaikawi ngal hi.
02023009	Huai lou in mikhual na hihgenthei ding ahi kei. Mikhual lungtang na theih ziak in, Aigupta gam ah mikhual in na om ngeita uh, chih thei in.
02023010	Kum guk sung na gam ah haichi na tuh dia, agahte na lakhawm ding,
02023011	himahleh akum sagihna na omsak kinken a, na khawlsak ding ahi; na mite lak a mizawngte'n anektheihna ding un. Anutsiat peuh uh gamlak sate'n ane ding uhi. Huchibang mah in na grephuan leh na olive huan tung ah na hih ding uhi.
02023012	Ni guk sung nangmah nna na sem dia, ani sagih ni in na khawl ding; na bawngtal leh na sabiltung akhawl ua, na sikhanu tapa leh mikhual ahalhtheihna ding un.
02023013	Na kiang a ka gen tengteng zui ding in pilvang inla; pathian dangte min lou ke'n, na kam a pan zak in leng om kei hen.
02023014	Kum khat sung in ka kiang ah ankuangluina thumvei na bawl ding ahi.
02023015	Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina bawl in ka hon thupiak bang in, Abib kha a hun sehsa in, ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding ahi, huai ni a Aigupta a pan hong paikhia na hih ziak in. Ka ma a kuamah khutvuak a ahong kilat ding uh ahi kei.
02023016	Pawltak Ankuanglui, na sepgim gahte, lou a na tuh Puaklutna Ankuangluina na bawl ding ahi. Na lou a pan na sepgimna gahte na puaklut khit chiang in kum tawp ah, Puaklut Ankuanglui na bawl ding ahi.
02023017	Kum khat sung in thumvei pasal tengteng Toupa Pathian ma a akilat ding uh ahi.
02023018	Ka kithoihna sisan, tanghou silngou soh toh na lat ding ahi kei. Ka kithoihna thau a zingsang chiang tan in a-om ding leng ahi kei hi.
02023019	Toupa na Pathian inn a na gam gah masa hoihpente lak a masapen na laklut ding ahi. Kelnou, api nawitui in na huan ding ahi kei.
02023020	Ngai in, lampi a nang hon kem ding leh ka mun bawlsa a nang hon tun ding in na ma ah Angel khat ka sawl hi.
02023021	Ama ah pilvang inla, a-aw zui in hehsak ke'n; na tatleknate angaihdam louh ding ziak in, ka min lah amah ah a-om ngal a.
02023022	Himahleh a-aw na zuih taktak a, ka gen tengteng na hihleh; na melmate tung ah melma ka hi dia, nang hon doute tung ah doumi ka hi ding hi.
02023023	Na ma ah ka Angel pai ding ahi, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte, Kanaante, Hivte leh Jebuste lak ah nang ahon pilut ding hi; huchi in amaute ka satkhe ding hi.
02023024	Apathiante uh ma ah na kun ding ahi kei. A-nna uh leng na sem ding ahi sam kei. Athilhihte bang uh leng na hih ding uh ahi kei. Himahleh amaute na zou siang sipsip dia, amilimte uh na hihzan dimdem ding ahi.
02023025	Toupa na Pathian uh nna na sem ding ua, ama'n na annek-tuidawn uh avualzawl ding hi. Huchi in na lak ua pan chinatna ka lamang ding hi.
02023026	Kuamah nausia a-om kei dia, na gamsung uah kuamah aching kei ding. Na nite zah uh ka tangtungsak ding hi.
02023027	Na ma uah kei lauhna ka sawl dia, na hong tunna mi tengteng lak ah buaizakna ka omsak ding hi. Huchi in na melma tengteng nang a pan ka taikeksak ding hi.
02023028	Na ma ah khuaizanta ka sawl dia, huai in Hivte, Kanaante leh Hitte na ma a pan ahawlkhe ding hi.
02023029	Kum khat sung in amaute na ma a pan ka hawlkhe kei ding. Agam ahong vuak dia, noute hon hihse ding in gamsa ahong pung kha ding hi.
02023030	Na hong pun ua, gam na luah mateng, na ma ua pan amaute tawm khakha in ka hawlkhe ding hi.
02023031	Tuipi San a pan Philistiate tuipi pha hial in, gamdai a pan Lui chiang pha in na gamgi ka khung ding. Na khut ua agam luah mite ka hon piakkhiak ding ziak in na ma uah amaute na hawlkhe ding uhi.
02023032	Amaute toh hiam apathiante uh toh hiam leng thukhun na bawl ding uh ahi kei.
02023033	Na gamsung uah ateng ding uh ahi kei. Ka tung ah nang ahon khialsak kha ding uhi. Apathiante uh nna na sep uleh huaite nou a ding in thang ahi ding hi.
02024001	Huai nung in Pathian in Mosi kiang ah, “ Toupa kiang ah hong tou in, nang leh Aaron, Nadab leh Abihu leh Israel upate lak a sawmsagihte, gamlapi a pan in Pathian bia un.
02024002	Mosi kia Toupa kiang ah ahong pai ding, himahleh amau ahong pai nai louh ding uh ahi. Mite leng amah toh ahong hohtouh louh ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
02024003	Mosi ahong pai a, Toupa thute leh vaihawmna tengteng mite ahilhta hi. Mite'n aw kituak in adawng ua, “ Toupa'n agen thu tengteng ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi.
02024004	Toupa thu tengteng Mosi in agelh a, zingsang in beltak in athou a, tang nuai ah maitam abawl a, Israel nam sawm-le-nih dungzui in, khuam sawm-le-nih aphut hi.
02024005	Ama'n Israel suante lak a tangvalte asawl a, amau Toupa kiang ah halmang thillat leh lemna thillat in bawngtalte alan uhi.
02024006	Mosi in bawngtalte sisan kimkhat ala a, kuangdai sung ah akoih a; maitam tung ah asisan kimkhat atheh hi.
02024007	Thukhun Laibu ala a, mite zak in asim hi. Mite'n, “ Toupa'n agen tengteng hih in athu ka mang ding uhi,” achi uhi.
02024008	Mosi in sisan ala a mite tung ah atheh a, “Thukhun sisan en un, hiai thu tengteng thu a Toupa'n akhun,” achi hi.
02024009	Mosi, Aaron, Nadab, Abihu leh Israel Upa sawmsagihte apaitou ua;
02024010	Israel' Pathian ava mu uhi. Akhepek nuai ah sapphir a bawl hileh kilawm leh van bang a siang a-om hi.
02024011	Himahleh Israel suante lak a upate dou in Pathian in atung uah akhut alik kei hi. Amau leng Pathian mu napi in hingdam a om in ne in adawn uhi.
02024012	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Tang ah ka kiang ah hong tou inla, huai ah om in. Suangpekte a ka gelhsa dan leh thupiakte ka hon pe ding; amaute na sinsak theihna ding in,” achi hi.
02024013	Mosi leh amah huhpa Joshua adingkhia ua, Pathian tang ah ahohtou uhi
02024014	Upate kiang ah, na kiang ua ka hong kik nawn masiah uh hiai ah hon ngak un. “Ngai un, Aaron leh Hur na ompih uhi. Mi kuapeuh in thubuai bangpeuh gen ding na neih uleh, amah akiang uah hong hoh hen,” achi hi.
02024015	Tang ah Mosi ahohtou a, meipi in tang akhuhta hi.
02024016	Sinai Tang tung ah Toupa thupina a-om a, meipi in ni guk sung akhuh hi. Ani sagih ni in meipi lak a kipan Mosi asamta hi.
02024017	Tang vum tung a Toupa thupina, Israel suante muh in kangmang thei meikuang bang ahi.
02024018	Meipi lak ah Mosi alutta a, tang ah ava hohtou hi. Mosi tang ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ava omta hi.
02025001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a,
02025002	“Thillat ahon tawitheihna ding un, Israel suante kiang ah thu gen in. Michih lungtang a uttak a pete a pan thilpiak na la ding hi.
02025003	Amau a pan thilpiak na lak ding hiai bang ahi. Dangka-eng leh dangka leh dal.
02025004	Puanmalngat dum, khau sandup leh khau san-au leh khau hoih leh kel mul.
02025005	Belampa vun sansaksa leh ngalvang vun leh singgi sing.
02025006	Vak ding in sathau, thaunuh ding gimlim, gimnamtui a ding toh.
02025007	Onik suangte, siampu puan leh awmtuamna a siat ding suangte.
02025008	Alak ua ka tentheihna ding in mun siangthou hon bawlsak uhen.
02025009	Nang ka hon etsak bangbang in, biakbuk lim bang in leh avanzat tengteng lim bang in na bawl ding ahi.
02025010	“Singgi sing in thukhun bawm na bawl ding ahi. Adunglam tong nih-le-akim ahi dia, availam tong khat-le-akim ahi dia, asanlam tong khat-le-akim ahi ding hi.
02025011	Dangka-engtak in na luan dia, asunglam leh apolam na luan dia, akimvel ah dangka-eng lallukhu bawl in atung ah na bawl ding ahi.
02025012	Dangka-eng in asikkual li na sung dia, aning lite ah na bulh ding hi. Sikkual nih apang khat ah a-om ding ua, sikkual dang nihte apang khat ah a-om ding uh.
02025013	Singgi sing chiang na bawl dia, dangka-eng in na luan ding ahi.
02025014	Thukhun bawm sik a sikkualte sung ah chiangte na thunlut dia, huaite thukhun bawm zawn ahihtheihna ding in.
02025015	Chiangte thukhun bawm sikkual sung ah a-om ding uhi.
02025016	Thukhun bawm sung ah ka hon piak theihsakna na koih ding ahi.
02025017	“Dangka-engtak in zahngaihna tutphah na bawl dia; adunglam tong nih-le-akim ahi dia, availam tong khat-le-akim ahi ding hi.
02025018	Zahngaihna tutphah mong nihte ah, dangka-eng in cherubte na bawl dia, huaite sekthoh in na bawl ding ahi.
02025019	Among khat ah cherub khat na bawl dia, among langkhat ah cherub dang. Among nihte ah zahngaihna tutphah ah cherubte na bawl ding ahi.
02025020	Cherubte'n tungsang lam ah akhate uh azakkhe ding ua, akhate ua zahngaihna tutphah tuam in, amai un aki-entuah ding ua; zahngaihna tutphah lam ah cherubte mai a-om ding ahi.
02025021	Thukhun bawm tung ah zahngaihna tutphah na koih dia; thukhun bawm sung ah ka hon piak ding theihsakna na koih ding ahi.
02025022	Huai ah ka hon kimuhpih dia, zahngaihna tutphah tung a pan, theihsakna thukhun bawm tung a om cherub nihte kikal a pan Israel suante kiang a thupiak ka hon piak ding thil tengteng thu ah ka hon houpih ding hi.
02025023	“Singgi in dohkan na bawl dia; adunglam tong nih ahi dia; availam tong khat, asanlam tong khat-le-akim ahi ding hi.
02025024	Dangka-engtak in na luan dia; akimvel in dangka-eng lallukhu na bawl ding ahi.
02025025	Akimvel in khut chia in agei na bawl dia; akimvel in agei ah dangka-eng lallukhu na bawl ding ahi.
02025026	Asikkual ding in dangka-eng in li na bawl dia; sikkualte aning lite akhe li tung a omte ah na koih ding.
02025027	Dohkan puakna ding chiangte a-omna ding in ageichin ah sikkualte a-om ding uh ahi.
02025028	Singgi in chiangte na bawl dia, dangka-eng in na luan dia, huaite dohkan akipuaktheihna ding ahi.
02025029	Akuangte, akeute, asinte, anoute, asitna ding in na bawl ding hi. Huaite dangka-engtak in na bawl ding ahi.
02025030	Ka ma a dohkan tung ah tanghou sawm-le-nih na koih gige ding ahi.
02025031	“Dangka-engtak in khawnvak koihna na bawl ding ahi. Khawnvak koihna sekthoh in na bawl ding ahi. Akungpi leh ahiangte, apakmum leh apakte, kibang mah in na bawl ding ahi.
02025032	Apangte a pan hiang guk akakhe dia; khawnvak koihna pang khat a pan hiang thum, khawnvak koihna pang dang a pan hiang thum.
02025033	Belkuang thumte makha bang a bawlte, hiang khat a pakmum leh pak; hiang dang a belkuang thumte makha bang a bawlte, pakmum leh pak; huchibang in khawnvak koihna a pan a hong suak hiang gukte.
02025034	Khawnvak koihna ah belkuang li makha bang a bawl a-om ding ahi, apakmumte leh pakte uh toh.
02025035	Huai mah ahiang nihte nuai ah pakmum khat a-om dia, huai mah ahiang nihte nuai ah apakmum khawnvak koihna a pan a hong suakkhia hiang gukte dungzui in.
02025036	Apakmumte leh ahiangte akibang ding ua, avek in dangka-engtak a sekthoh ahi ding hi.
02025037	Huai ah khawnvak sagih na bawl dia; khawnvakte ade ding ua, apang a vakna apiaktheihna ding un.
02025038	Ataitehte leh ameivu kuangte, dangka-engtak ahi ding ua;
02025039	belsuan tengteng toh dangka-engtak talent khat a bawl ding ahi.
02025040	Tang a ka hon etsak lim dungzui a bawl ding in pilvang in,” achi hi.
02026001	Huai lou in biakbuk puanmalngat hoih koptah puanzak sawmkhat toh adum leh asandup leh asan-au in na bawl dia; siamtak a bawl cherubte toh na bawl ding ahi.
02026002	Puanzak khat saudan tong sawmnih-le-giat ahi dia, puanzak khat zatdan tong li; puanzak chih in tehna khat anei ding ahi.
02026003	Puanzak ngate akithuapkhawm chiat ding uh ahi. Puanzak nga dangte akithuapkhawm chiat ding uh ahi.
02026004	Akithuapna a akipehna a pan puanzak khat gei ah adum in avang na bawl dia; huchibang zel in, puanzak dang mongchin mahmah ah, anihna kithuapna ah na bawl ding ahi.
02026005	Puanzak khat ah vang sawmnga na bawl dia, anihna kithuapna a om, puanzak mong ah vang sawmnga na bawl ding; huchi a baangte akimat chiat theihna ding un.
02026006	Dangka-eng in kilhna sawmnga na bawl dia, kilhnate'n puanzakte nihnih in akilhkhawm ding; huchi in biakbuk khat ahi ding hi.
02026007	Biakbuk tungkhuhna ding in kel mul puanzakte na bawl dia; puanzak sawm-le-khat na bawl ding ahi.
02026008	Puanzak khat dunglam tong sawmthum ahi dia, puanzak khat vailam tong li; puanzak sawm-le-khat tehna khat ahi vek ding hi.
02026009	Puanzak ngate amau mah in na thuapkhawm dia, puanzak gukte amau mah in, biakbuk mai ah puanzak gukna na khep ding ahi.
02026010	Akithuapna apuanzak ponung penpen mong ah vang sawmnga na bawl dia, anihna kithuapna puanzak mong ah vang sawmnga na bawl ding ahi.
02026011	Dal in kilhna sawmnga na bawl dia, kilhnate vang ah na guang dia, puanin khat ahihtheihna ding in, na thuapkhawm ding ahi.
02026012	Puanin puanzak val om lai tum khat pen biakbuk phaitam a khai ding ahi.
02026013	Puanin puanzakte dunglam a-omlaite, apang khat lam ah tong khat, akhuhna ding in hiai lam pang leh huai lam pang a biakbuk pangte a khai ding ahi.
02026014	Puanin khuhna ding belampa vun sansaksa leh atungsawn khuhna ding in ngalvang vunte na bawl ding ahi.
02026015	Biakbuk a ding in singgi singpek tunna dingtang in na bawl ding ahi.
02026016	Singpek khat dunglam tong sawm ahi dia, singpek khat vailam tong khat-le-akim ahi ding hi.
02026017	Singpek khat ah atunna ding nih a-om dia, kimuamtuah ding in lem in. Huchibang in biakbuk singpek tengteng a ding in na bawl ding ahi.
02026018	Biakbuk a ding in singpek na bawl dia, simlam pang ah pek sawmnih ahi ding.
02026019	Singpek sawmnih nuai ah dangka in kingakna khuakkuak sawmli na bawl ding. Akimuamtuah nihte a ding in singpek khat nuai ah kingakna khuakkuak nih, akimuamna nihte a ding in singpek dang khat nuai ah kingakna khuakkuak nih na bawl ding ahi.
02026020	Biakbuk pang nihna a ding in mallam pang ah singpek sawmnih a-om ding hi.
02026021	Adangka kingakna khuakkuak sawmlite singpek khat nuai ah kingakna khuakkuak nih, singpek dang khat nuai ah kingakna khuakkuak nih.
02026022	Biakbuk pang tumlam ate ding in singpek guk bawl in.
02026023	Pang nih ah biakbuk ningte a ding in singpek nih na bawl ding ahi.
02026024	Anuailam ah akithuapkhawm ding ua, sikkual khat ah atunglam ah akithuapkhawm ding uhi. Huchibang in amau tuak a ding in ahi ding hi. Ning nihte a ding in ahi ding uhi.
02026025	Singpek giat a-om dia, dangka kingakna khuakkuak sawm-le-gukte; singpek khat nuai ah kuak nih leh singpek dang khat nuai ah kuak nih zel a-om ding ahi.
02026026	Biakbuk pang khat a singpekte a ding in, singgi sing chiangtawn na bawl dia;
02026027	huan biakbuk pang dang khat a singpekte a ding in chiangtawn nga, biakbuk pang a singpekte, tumlam sik nihte a ding in chiangtawn nga.
02026028	Singpekte laitak a chiangtawn laita in mong khat a pan mong khat tan aphak ding ahi.
02026029	Singpekte dangka-eng in na luan dia, chiangtawnte a ding in dangka-eng sikkualte a munte a ding in na bawl ding ahi.
02026030	Tang a ka hon etsak dungzui in biakbuk na dinsak ding ahi.
02026031	Puanzak adum, asandup, asan-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah siamtak a hih na bawl dia, cherubte toh bawl ding ahi.
02026032	Dangka-eng a luan singgi sing khuam lite tung ah na zak ding a; abannate dangka-eng ahi ding a, dangka kingakna khuakkuak lite tung ah khai in.
02026033	Huai a theihpihna bawm na hon laklut theihna ding in puanzak kilhnate nuai ah na khai dia, huan huai puanzak in nang a ding in Mun Siangthou leh Mun Siangthoupen kikal akhen ding hi.
02026034	Mun Siangthoupen ah theihpihna bawm tung ah zahngaihna tutphah na koih ding ahi.
02026035	Puanzak polam ah dohkan na tung ding a; simlam ah biakbuk sik ah dohkan ngai in khawnvak koihna na koih ding ahi. Mallam sik ah dohkan na tung ding hi.
02026036	Puanin kongkhak a ding in puankhai na bawl ding a, puanmalngat hoih koptah, phim a khui, adum, asandup leh asan-au.
02026037	Akhaina ding in singgi sing khuam nga na bawl dia, dangka-eng a luan, akibatnate dangka-eng ahi ding uhi. Huaite a ding in dal kingakna khuakkuak nga na sung ding ahi.
02027001	Singgi sing in maitam na bawl ding a, tong nga a sau, tong nga a za; maitam detdou ahi ding. Asanlam tong thum ahi ding ahi.
02027002	Aning lite tung ah akiite na bawl dia; akiite akibang ding ua; dal in na luan ding ahi.
02027003	Ameivu dohna ding belte na bawl ding a, aluahna suahdul, kuangdal, keupi leh asikkhut leh amei beldai. Abelsuan tengteng dal a na bawl ding ahi.
02027004	Huai a ding in dal in sing khul ding koihna len bang in na bawl dia; atung a ning li ah dal sikkual li na bawl ding ahi.
02027005	Anuailam maitam huapna nuai ah na koih dia; huchi a maitam laizang a, lente akikim theihna ding in.
02027006	Maitam a ding in chiangte na bawl dia, singgi sing chiangte dal in na luan ding ahi.
02027007	Chiangte sikkual sung a thunlut ding ahi a; chiangte maitam sik nihte tung ah a-om ding hi, apuakna ding in.
02027008	Tang a ka hon etsak bang in, singpekte ah ahawm na bawl dia, huchibang in na bawl ding ahi.
02027009	Biakbuk huang na bawl ding ahi. Simlam pang a ding in simlam manoh in puankhai, huang umna ding in puanmalngat hoih sik khat a ding in tong za a sau a-om ding ahi.
02027010	Akhuam sawmnihte leh akingakna khuakkuak sawmnihte dal ahi ding ua; khuamte khainate leh puanduangte dangka ahi ding uhi.
02027011	Huchi mah bang in mallam pang ah asau lam tong za a sau puankhai a-om ding, dal khuam sawmnihte leh akingakna khuakkuak sawmnihte dangka chi khuam, akhaina leh puanduangte ahi ding hi.
02027012	Tumlam pang a huang vailam a ding in puankhai tong sawmnga a-om ding. Akhuamte uh sawm leh akingakna khuakkuak sawm ahi ding.
02027013	Suahlam a suahlam pang a huangsung umna vailam tong sawmnga ahi ding.
02027014	Kongpi sik khat lam a puankhaite tong sawm-le-nga ahi dia; akhuamte thum, akingakna khuakkuak thum ahi ding.
02027015	Langkhat lam pang ah puankhai tong sawm-le-ngate a-om dia; akhuamte thum leh akingakna khuakkuak thum ahi ding.
02027016	Huangsung kongpi a ding in puankhai tong sawmnih a-om dia, adum, asandup, asan-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah, phim a khui ahi dia, akhuam uh li ahi dia, akingakna khuakkuak li ahi ding hi.
02027017	Huangsung kimvel a khuam tengteng dangka puanduang a gak ahi dia, abannate dangka ahi dia, akingakna khuakkuak dal ahi ding hi.
02027018	Huangsung dunglam tong zakhat ahi dia, availam tong sawmnga koipeuh ah, asanlam tong nga puanmalngat hoih koptah a bawl, akingakna khuakkuak dal ahi ding.
02027019	Biakbuk a vanzat tengteng, anasepna chiteng, akilhbelhna sikzumte leh huangsung a kilhbelhna sikzum tengteng dal ahi ding ahi.
02027020	Israel suante meivak ding in olive thautak a bawl hon tawi ding in thu na pe ding, khawnvak kuangsak gige ding in.
02027021	Puanzak, theihpihna ma a om, polam a kihoupihna puanin ah, Aaron leh atapate'n Toupa ma ah nitaklam a pan zingsang lam tan in thu ape ding uhi. Israel suante ziak in akhang-akhang un tangtawn a ding in dan thuseh ahi ding hi.
02028001	Israel suante lak a pan na sanggampa Aaron leh atapate siampu hi a ka nna aseptheihna ding un la in. Aaron leh atapate: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar leh Ithamar na la ding ahi.
02028002	Athupina ding leh akilawmna ding in na sanggampa Aaron a ding in puan siangthou bawl in.
02028003	Pilna kha a ka dimsak khutsiam tengteng kiang ah thu gen in, amau Aaron puan, amah hihsianna ding abawltheihna ding un. Huchi a ama'n siampu nasepna mun a ka nna aseptheihna ding in.
02028004	Apuan bawl ding uh hiaite ahi: Awmtuam, siampu puan, puanaktual, puanakzem, lukhu leh kawnggak. Na sanggampa Aaron a ding leh tapate a ding in puan siangthou abawl ding uh ahi, huchi a ama'n siampu nasepna mun a ka nna aseptheihna ding in.
02028005	Amau dangka-eng, adum, asandup, asan-au leh puanmalngat hoih ala ding ua.
02028006	dangka-eng, adum, asandup, asan-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah in hoihtak a bawl in, siampu puan abawl ding uhi.
02028007	Aliang nihte gei nihte akimat ding ua; akimatkhawm ding uhi.
02028008	Siampu puanakzem gakna, puanduang kawnggak dangka-eng khau toh khau dum, khau sandup leh khau san-au siamtak a gat puanmalngat in abawl ding uh ahi.
02028009	Onik suang nih na la dia, huaite tung ah Israel suante min na gelh ding ahi.
02028010	Suang khat tung ah aminte uh lak a guk, suang dang tung ah, a-omlaite min guk dangte, apiandan bang zel un na gelh ding ahi.
02028011	Suainamna zungbuh khuakthoh a kigelh bang in, suangmantam khuakthoh agelhsiamte gelh, huai suangmantam nihte ah Israel tapate min na gelh ding a, huai suangmantamte dangka-eng khuak sung ah na phum ding ahi.
02028012	Huai suang nihte Israel suante a ding a theihgigena suang hi ding in siampu puan liangzang ah na koih ding. Huchi in theihgigena ding in Aaron in aliangzang nihte tung ah Toupa ma ah aminte uh apo ding hi.
02028013	Dangka-eng bulhna na bawl ding ahi.
02028014	Amongte a dangka-engtak khainiang nihte; pakkhi bang in na bawl dia, akibulhnate ah pakkhi bang khainiangte na khih ding ahi.
02028015	Vaihawmna omtuamna siamtak in na bawl dia; siampu puan bawl bang in na bawl ding, dangka-eng in, adum in, asandup in leh asan-au in leh puanmalngat hoih koptah in, na bawl ding ahi.
02028016	Khep nih in akikhep dia, akhep adung-avai kikim, khap khat a sau leh khap khat a za ahi ding ahi.
02028017	Huaite tung ah suang vual li in suangmantamte na bulh dia: avual khatna sardi suang, topaz suang leh karbankul suang ahi ding. Hiai avual khatna ahi ding hi.
02028018	Avual nihna emerald suang, sapphir suang leh diamond suang ahi ding ahi.
02028019	Avual thumna liguri suang, agate suang leh amethis suang ahi ding.
02028020	Avual lina beril suang, onik suang leh jasper suang ahi ding hi. Abulhna ua dangka-eng bulh ding ahi.
02028021	Suangte Israel suante min toh akithuah dia, amin uh dungzui in sawm-le-nih, chiamtehna gelhte bang in, michih amin toh nam sawm-le-nihte dungzui in ahi ding uhi.
02028022	Awmtuam tung ah pakkhi bang a bawl amongte ah dangka-eng siang khainiang na bawl ding ahi.
02028023	Awmtuam tung ah dangka-eng sikkual nih na bawl dia, huai sikkual nihte awmtuam mong nihte tung ah na koih ding hi.
02028024	Awmtuam mongte tung a om sikkual nihte ah dangka-eng pakkhi bang nihte na koih ding ahi.
02028025	Pakkhi bang khainiang nihte mong nih dangte bulhna nihte ah na khih dia, ama a siampu puan liangzangte ah na koih ding hi.
02028026	Dangka-eng in sikkual nih na bawl dia, huai gei a siampu puan mong nihte tung ah na koih ding; asunglam a siampu puan gei a om pen ah.
02028027	Dangka-eng in sikkual dang nihte na bawl dia, siampu puan gei nihte nuailam a atung ah na koih ding, amalam sang a akikhepna zawntak ah, siampu puan konggak lamdang tungtak ah.
02028028	Asikkual in awmtuam siampu puan sikkual ah puanduang dum toh na hen dia, huchi a siampu puan kawnggak lamdang tung a a-omtheihna ding in leh siampu puan a pan awmtuam akiphellouhna ding in.
02028029	Aaron in, Toupa ma a theihgigena hiden ding a, mun siangthou a alut chiang in, alungtang zawntak ah vaihawmna awmtuam tung ah Israel suante minte apo ding hi.
02028030	Vaihawmna awmtuam ah Urim leh Thummim na koih ding. Toupa ma a ava lut chiang in, Aaron lungtang zawn ah a-om ding hi. Huchi in Aaron in Toupa ma ah alungtang zawntak ah Israel suante vaihawmna apo gige ding hi.
02028031	Siampu puan puanaktual adum in na bawl ding ahi.
02028032	Akhung ah a-awng a-om dia; alaitak a, a-awng kimvel ah gatthoh khihna a-om dia, siklen puanak ban nei lou hileh kilawm ahi ding, akeklouhna ding in.
02028033	Huai puanaktual mong ah adum in, asandup in leh asan-au in na bawl dia, agei kimvel in. Dangka-eng dakte akimvel in akikal zel uah na bawl ding ahi.
02028034	Dangka-eng dak leh theibuhfai puanaktual gei tung ah akivel in a-om ding ahi.
02028035	Aaron in nna asep chiang in huai asilh ding hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a Mun Siangthou a alut chiang leh ahong pawt chiang in aging akiza dia, asi kei chih theihna ding in.
02028036	Dangka-engtak in kuang na bawl dia, atung ah na gelh ding, suainamna zungbuh bang a khuak in, Toupa A DIA SIANTHOUNA chih na gelh ding ahi.
02028037	Huai laigelhna sikpek siampu dialkhip a, amailam ah khau dum in na khihbelh ding ahi.
02028038	Huai Aaron taltang ah a-om dia, ama'n Israelte thillat siangthou toh kisai a, Israel suante khelhna apo ding ahi. Huai Aaron taltang ah a-om gige dia, thillat siangthoute Toupa mai ah san ahi ding hi.
02028039	Puanmalngat hoih puanak na gan dia, puanmalngat in lukhu na bawl dia, agatthoh in kawnggak na bawl ding hi.
02028040	Aaron tapate a ding in puanakte na bawl dia, kawnggakte na bawlsak ding. Athupina ding leh akilawmna ding in lukhute amau a ding in na bawl ding ahi.
02028041	Huaite na sanggampa Aaron tung ah leh akiang a atapate tung ah na koih dia; amaute thau na nilh dia, na septuam dia, na siansak ding ahi; siampu nasepna mun a ka nna aseptheihna ding un.
02028042	Avuaktanna uh khuh ding in puan pheituam zumte na bawlsak dia; atai a pan aphei chiang atun ding uh ahi.
02028043	Kihoupihna puanin a alut chiang un hiam ahihkeileh Mun Siangthou a nasem dia dohkan kiang a, ahong pai chiang un, khelhna khatpeuh neih ziak a asihlouhna ding un huaite asa tung uah a-om gige ding ahi. Huchi in huai amah a ding leh anung a asuante a ding in tangtawn a dan thuseh ahi ding hi.
02029001	Huan siampu a pang a, ka na sem ding a na siansakna dia hiai ahi atung ua na hih ding, bawngtalnou khat leh belampa nih gensiatbei na la ding ahi.
02029002	Huai ban ah tanghou silngou soh louh, tanghou beu silngou soh louh thau a zut leh tanghou pek silngou soh louh thau a zut, huit buh tangbuang in na bawl ding ahi.
02029003	Huaite loh sung ah na koih dia, bawngtal leh belampa nihte toh, loh in na hon tawi ding hi.
02029004	Kihoupihna puanin kongkhak ah Aaron leh atapate na hon pi dia, tui in amau na sil ding ahi.
02029005	Huai khit in siampu puansilhte na la dia, puanak tung leh siampu puanaktual leh siampu puan leh awmtuam Aaron na silhsak dia, siamtak a kigan puanduang kawnggak in amah na gak ding ahi.
02029006	Alutung ah lukhu na koih dia, lukhu tung ah lallukhu siangthou na koih ding ahi.
02029007	Thau nilhchi na la dia, alutung ah na buak dia amah na nuh ding ahi.
02029008	Atapate na hon pi dia puanak tungte na silhsak ding ahi.
02029009	Kawnggak in amau na gak dia, Aaron leh atapate, lukhu bem na khusak ding hi. Omden ding dan thuseh a ding in siampu nasep amaute a ahi ding. Hichibang in Aaron leh atapate na hihsiangthou ding ahi.
02029010	Kihoupihna puanin ma ah bawngtal na kaisak dia; Aaron leh atapate'n bawngtal lutung ah akhutte uh anga ding uhi.
02029011	Kihoupihna puanin kongkhak kiang ah, Toupa ma ah bawngtal na gou ding ahi.
02029012	Bawngtal sisan na la dia, na khutzung in maitam kiite na nuh dia, sisan tengteng maitam bul sik ah na sungkhe ding ahi.
02029013	Asunglam tuamtu athau tengteng na la dia, asin tung a alam omleh, akailing nihte leh atung ua athau maitam tung ah na hal ding hi.
02029014	Bawngtal sa leh avun leh a-ek, giahphual polam ah mei in na hal ding hi. Hiai khelhna thillat ahi.
02029015	Belampa khat na la dia, belampa lutung ah Aaron leh atapate'n akhut uh anga ding uhi.
02029016	Belampa na that ding a, asisan na la dia, maitam kimvel in na theh ding hi.
02029017	Belampa na semnen dia, asunglam na sawpsiang dia, akhete leh asate leh alu na koihkhawm ding hi.
02029018	Belampa avek in maitam tung ah na halmang ding ahi. Hiai Toupa a dia mei a thillat gimnamtui ahi.
02029019	Belampa dang na la dia; belampa lutung ah Aaron leh atapate'n akhut uh akoih ding uhi.
02029020	Huan huai belampa na gou dia, Aaron bil taklam dawn leh atapate bil taklam dawn ah leh akhut taklam khutpi uah, akhe taklam khepi uah, asisan na la dia, na nuh ding a, maitam kimvel ah huai sisan na theh ding ahi.
02029021	Maitam tung a om sisan na la ding a, nuh theih thau toh, Aaron tung ah leh apuan tung ah leh atapate tung ah leh akiang a atapate puan tung ah na theh ding hi. Huchi in amah leh apuante leh tapate leh atapate' puante hihsiangthou ahi ding hi.
02029022	Huai Belampa thaute, amei thau, asung thau, asin leh akailing nihte leh athaute, ataklam phei toh na la ding ahi; hiai bel siangthou a sehtuamna belampa ahih ziak ahi.
02029023	Toupa mai a lohbeu a om silngou soh louh tanghou kikoihte lak a tanghou beu khat, sathau a kikang tanghou pei khat leh tanghou kan pek khat na la dia,
02029024	Aaron khut leh atapate khut ah na koih dia; huaite Toupa ma ah vei thillat in na vei ding hi.
02029025	Amau khut a pan huaite na sang dia, halmang thillat ding in maitam tung ah na hal ding ahi, Toupa ma a gimlim hi ding in. Hiai Toupa a dia mei a thillat ahi.
02029026	Aaron hihsianthouna belampa awm na la dia, Toupa ma ah vei thillat in na vei ding hi. Hiai nang tan ding ahi.
02029027	Huai siangthou a sehtuamna belampa a pan vei thillat a veisa a-awm leh vei thillat a veisa aphei, Aaron tan leh atapate tante na hihsiangthou ding ahi.
02029028	Hiai Israel suante a pan a dan thuseh bang a Aaron leh atapate tan ngeina ahih gige ding ahi. Huai bel Israel suante'n alemna thillatte ua pan Toupa a dia apiak ding uh ahi.
02029029	Aaron puansilh siangthoute amah nung in atapate a ahi ding uh; amaute a hihsiangthou ding leh sehkip ding in.
02029030	Ama mun a siampu hong hi atapa in Mun Siangthou a nasem dia kihoupihna biakbuk sung a alut chiang in, ni sagih sung huai puansilhte asilh ding ahi.
02029031	Kihihsianthouna belampa na la dia, mun siangthou ah asa na tuihuan ding ahi.
02029032	Aaron leh atapate'n belampa sa leh loh sung a om kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak kiang ah tanghou ane ding uhi.
