02029033	Amau sehkipna ding leh hihsianthouna dia akhelhna thoihna thilte anek ding uh ahi. Thilzek leh siangthou ahih ziak in midang kuamah in anek louh ding uh ahi.
02029034	Kihihsianthouna sa hiam tanghou hiam zingsang tan a-omleh mei in na hal ding ahi. Asianthou ziak in na ne ding ahi kei.
02029035	Huchibang a thu ka hon piak bangbang in Aaron kiang ah leh atapate kiang ah na hih dia, ni sagih sung amau na hihsiangthou ding ahi.
02029036	Lemna thillat ding in niteng in bawngtal khat khelhna thillat ding in na lan ding ahi. Hiai a dia lemna na bawlzoh chiang in, maitam na hihsiang dia, thau na nilh dia, na siangthousak ding ahi.
02029037	Ni sagih sung maitam a ding in lemna na bawl dia; na hihsiangthou dia; maitam siangthoupen ahi ding. Huai maitam khoih peuhmah a sianthou ngeingei ding ahi.
02029038	Niteng a maitam tung ah kum khat a upa belamnou nih na lat gige ding ahi.
02029039	Belamnou khat zingsang in na lan dia; belamnou dang khat nitaklam in na lan ding ahi.
02029040	Belamnou khat na lat chiang in tangbuang seh sawm suah seh khat, athau toh hin khat a seh lina toh dawn thillat ding in uain hin khat a seh lina na lan ding ahi.
02029041	Belamnou khat dang pen nitaklam in na lan dia, tangbuang thillat dungzui in leh dawn thillat dungzui in gimlim ding in, na hih dia, Toupa a dia mei a thillat gimnamtui ahi.
02029042	Na khang na khang un hiai Toupa ma a kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a halmang thillat ahi nilouh ding ahi. Huai ah na kiang ua thu gen ding in ka hon kituahpih ding hi.
02029043	Huai ah Israel suante ka kituahpih dia, ka thupina in biakbuk ahihsiangthou ding hi.
02029044	Kihoupihna puanin leh maitam ka hihsiangthou dia; siampu a pang a kei a dia nasem ding in Aaron leh atapate leng ka hihsiangthou tuaktuak ding hi.
02029045	Huchi in Israel suante lak ah ka teng dia, a Pathian uh ka hi ding.
02029046	Toupa a Pathian uh, alak ua ka tentheihna dia amaute Aigupta gam a pan pikhepa ka hi, chih athei ding uh. Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi.
02030001	Gimlim halna ding maitam na bawl ding ahi. Singgi sing in na bawl ding ahi.
02030002	Asau lam tong khat ahi dia; azatlam tong khat mah. Asau lam leh azatlam akikim dia, asanlam tong nih ahi ding ahi. Akiite leng akibang in sa khat ahi ding uhi.
02030003	Dangka-engtak in na luan dia; atung, asikte leh akiite ah akimvel in dangka-eng in agei vel na bawl ding hi.
02030004	Dangka-eng sikkual nih apang nih a ding na bawl dia, maitam pang nihte ah na bulh dia, azawnna zawlte khumna ding ahi ding uhi.
02030005	Singgi sing in azawnna ding chiangte na bawl dia, dangka-eng in huaite na luan ding ahi.
02030006	K'on kituahpihna ding mun, theihsakna tung a om zahngaihna tutphah ma, theihpihna bawm kiang a om puanzak ma ah na koih ding ahi.
02030007	Zingsang teng in huai tung ah Aaron in gimlim ahal dia; khawnvakte adet chiang in, atung ah gimlim ahal ding ahi.
02030008	Nitaklam a Aaron in khawnvakte adet chiang in, atung ah gimlim ahal ding hi. Na khang na khang un Toupa ma a gimlim ahi tawntung ding hi.
02030009	Huai ah theih louh gimlim hiam halmang thillat hiam, tangbuang thillat hiam, na lan ding uh ahi kei. Huai lou in huai ah dawn thillat leng na sung ding uh ahi kei hi.
02030010	Kum khat in khatvei Aaron in khelhna thillat sisan akiite ah atat dia, lemna abawl ding ahi. Na khang na khang un kum khat in khatvei atung ah lemna abawl ding ahi. Hiai Toupa a dia siangthoupen ahi.
02030011	Huai khit in Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a,
02030012	“Azah uh theihna dia kisimpina na bawl chiang in, pasal chih in ahinna tatna sum Toupa kiang a apiak ding ahi. Hiai ahihleh amaute na sim chiang a alak ua hipi alenlouhna ding ahi.
02030013	Simtel a om michih in tatna sum apiak ding ahi. Mun siangthou sum shekel kimkhat ahi ding ahi. Shekel khat gerah sawmnih a gik ahi.
02030014	Simtel a omte lak a paisuak peuhmah kum sawmnih a upa leh atunglam in Toupa kiang a thillat alat ding uh ahi.
02030015	Na kha ua ding a lemna bawlna dia, Toupa kiang a thillat apiak chiang un, ahaute leh azawngte'n shekel kimkhat sang a tamzaw leh tawmzaw apiak louh ding uh ahi.
02030016	Hiai bang in Israel suante lemna sum na la dia, kihoupihna biakbuk a nasepna ding in na sep ding ahi; na kha uh tatna ding a, Toupa ma a Israel suante a dia theihgigena ahihtheihna ding in,” achi hi.
02030017	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen hi:
02030018	“Kisilna ding in tuikuang dal in na bawl dia, atunna khete leng dal in na bawl ding ahi. Kihoupihna puanin leh maitam kikal ah na koih dia, huai ah tui na koih ding ahi.
02030019	Aaron leh atapate'n akhutte uh leh akhete uh tui in asil ding uh ahi.
02030020	Kihoupihna puanin sung a alut ding chiang uhiam, nasem dia Toupa mai a, mei a thillat lan dia maitam anaih ding chiang ua, akisil ding uh ahi. Akisil kei uleh asi ding uhi.
02030021	Huai bang a, asihlouhna ding ua akhutte uh leh akhete uh asil ding uh ahi. Hiai tangtawn in amau a ding in dan thuseh ahi dia; akhang-akhang un amah a ding leh asuante a ding nangawn in ahi ding ahi,” achi hi.
02030022	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen lai hi:
02030023	“Gimlim leng kilak inla, murrah tui shekel zanga leh singguithak gimlim huai zah kimkhat, shekel zanih-le-sawmnga sialluang khum shekel zanih-le-sawmnga,
02030024	Singguithak shekel zanga, mun siangthou shekel dungzui in, olive thau hin khat.
02030025	Nilh theih siangthou in thau na bawl dia, nilh theih damdawi misiamna bang a gawm; nilh theih thau siangthou ahi ding.
02030026	Huai in kihoupihna biakbuk na nuh ding, theihpihna bawm toh,
02030027	adohkan leh abelsuan tengteng leh khawnvak koihna leh abelsuan chiteng leh gimlim maitam toh.
02030028	Haltum thillat maitam leh abelsuan tengteng leh tuikuang leh akhe.
02030029	Huaite asiangthoupen hi ding in na hihsiangthou ding ahi. Bangpeuh huaite khoih asianthou ngeingei ding uh ahi.
02030030	Aaron leh atapate thau na nilh dia, amau na siangsak ding, siampu nasepna mun a kei a dia nna aseptheihna ding un.
02030031	Israel suante kiang ah thu na gen dia, na khang na khang un kei a ding in hiai thaunilh siangthou ahi ding hi.
02030032	Mihing sa tung ah na buak ding uh ahi kei. Akihelkhawm bang in akibatpih dang himhim leng na bawl ding uh ahi kei. Hiai nilh siangthou ahi a, nou a ding in asiangthou ding ahi.
02030033	Hiai bangbang a hel a, akibatpih sathau bawl hiam, siampu hilou midang tung a zang hiam kuapeuh amite lak a pan ka satkhe ding, achi,” chi in.
02030034	Huai ban ah Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Gimlimte, singnai, onicha, galbanum leh begaw akikim chiat la in.
02030035	Hiaite a pan gimnamtui na bawl ding ahi. Gimnamtui bawlsiamte hel bang na hel ding ahi. Chisoh, asiang leh azek a siangthou ahi ding hi.
02030036	Khenkhat na gawizan mahmah dia, kihoupihna biakbuk sung a theihpihna ma ah na koih dia, huai ah ka hon kimuhpih ding hi. Hiai nang a ding in siangthoupen ahi ding hi.
02030037	Na bawl ding gimnamtui toh kisai in, ahelkhawmdan a abatpih nou aituam ding in na kibawl ding ahi kei. Nou a ding in Toupa mai ah siangthou ahi ding ahi.
02030038	Agim namtui nap dia abatpih bawl peuhmah amite a pan ka satkhe ding,” achi hi.
02031001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen hi:
02031002	“En in, Judah nam a Hur tapa, Uri tapa Bezaleel amin in ka samta hi.
02031003	Pathian Kha leh pilna leh theihsiamna leh theihna leh khutsiamna lam chiteng in amah ka dimsakta hi.
02031004	Ama'n khutsiamna in thil lim leh mel nei in agel dia, dangka-eng leh dangka leh dal in thil abawl ding hi.
02031005	Huai ban ah suangmantamte a-at dia, singte lim leh mel nei in khutsiamtak in abawl ding hi.
02031006	Aseppih ding in akiang ah Dan nam a mi Ahisamak tapa, Aholiab ka peta hi. Khutsiamna nei tengteng leng pilna lungtang ka peta a, amau nang ka hon thupiak bang in thil tengteng abawl ding uhi.
02031007	Kihoupihna puanin, theihpihna bawm, huai tung a om zahngaihna tutphah leh puanin vanzat tengteng;
02031008	Dohkan leh avante leh khawnvak koihna a van tengteng toh, gimlim maitam;
02031009	halmang thillat maitam, avan tengteng toh, tuikuang leh akhe;
02031010	nasepna puante leh siampu Aaron puan siangthoute leh atapate puansilhte, siampu nasepna mun a nasem ding in;
02031011	huan nilh theih thau leh Mun Siangthou a ding gimlim abawl ding ua, nang ka hon thupiak tengteng bang in ahih ding uhi,” achi hi.
02031012	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen hi:
02031013	Israel suante kiang ah thu gen in, “Chihtaktak a ka Sabbath na tan ngeingei ding uh ahi. Na khang ua kei leh nou kal a chiamtehna ahih ziak in. Nou hon hihsiangthou, Toupa ka hi, chih na theihna ding un.
02031014	Huaiziak in Sabbath na tang ding ua; nou a dia siangthou ahih ziak in. Kuapeuh hiai hihbuah sihsak ngeingei ding ahi. Kuapeuh hiai ni a nasem, amite lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
02031015	Ni guk sung nna septheih ahi dia; himahleh ani sagihna Sabbath, Toupa a dia siangthou ahi. Sabbath ni a kuapeuh in nna khatpeuh asepleh, sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
02031016	Huaiziak in Israel suante'n Sabbath ni atang ding ua, thukhun tawntung hi ding in, akhang-akhang un Sabbath ni atang ding uhi.
02031017	Hiai tangtawn in kei leh Israel suante kikal a chiamtehna ahi. Ni guk a Toupa'n lei leh van abawl a, ani sagih ni akhawl a, atawldam ziak in,” achi hi.
02031018	Sinai Tang tung a Pathian in Mosi houpih a, thu agen khit in theihsakna pek nih, suangpekte, Pathian khutzung a gelh, Mosi apia hi.
02032001	Tang a pan Mosi ahong paisuk pah louh mite'n atheih un, mite Aaron kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, akiang ah, “Kisa in, ka ma ua pai ding, pathiante hon bawlsak in. Hiai Mosi, Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhepa lah, bang chita ahia, ka thei ngal kei ua,” achi uhi.
02032002	Aaron in akiang uah, “Na zite uh bil a om, na tapate uh bil a om, na tanute uh bil a om, dangka-eng bilbahte tolkhia unla, ka kiang ah hon tawi un,” achi hi.
02032003	Mi tengteng in abil ua dangka-eng bilbahte atolkhia ua, Aaron kiang ah ahon tawi uhi.
02032004	Ama'n akhut ua pan huaite ala a, sunthoh bawngnou lim abawl a, huai bang in dangka-eng bawngnou lim in asung hi. Huai khit in amau, “Israel aw, Aigupta gam a pan nang hon pikhia na pathian hiai ahi,” akichi uhi.
02032005	Aaron in huai amuhtak in, ama uah maitam abawl a, Aaron in thupuan anei a, “Zingchiang Toupa a dia ankuangluina ahi,” achi hi.
02032006	Azing in beltak in athou ua, halmang thillat alan ua, lemna thillat atawi uhi. Mite ne ding leh dawn ding in atu ua, kimawl ding in adingh uhi.
02032007	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Kumsuk in, na mi Aigupta gam a pan na pikhiakte, akihihsiat ziak un.
02032008	Amau ka lampi hilh a pan apial pah man hial uhi. Bawngnou lim sun akibawl ua, huai abia ua, amai ah thillatte alan ua, ‘Israel aw, hiai na pathian, Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhetu ahi,’ achi uh,” achi hi.
02032009	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Hiai mite ka muta a, ngai in, migenhakte ahi uhi.
02032010	Huaiziak in tu in atung uah ka thangpaihna akuangzak a, amaute ka kattum theihna ding in hon subuai kei in. Huchi in nam thupi in ka hon bawl ding,” achi hi.
02032011	Mosi in Toupa a Pathian angen a, “ Toupa , thilhihtheihna thupi leh ban thahat a Aigupta gam a pan na pikhiaksa, na mite tung ah bangziak a na thangpaihna kuangzak ding ahia?
02032012	Bang ding in ahia Aiguptate'n thu gen a, ‘Hihse dia amau pikhia ahita ve, tangte a amaute that ding leh leitung maikaih a pan amaute kangtum ding in?’ Na thangpaihna thupi lakik inla, na mite tung a hiai thil hoih lou na ngaihtuah kikhelsak in.
02032013	Akiang ua, ‘Van a aksite bang in na suante ka pungsak dia, na suante kiang a thu ka gensa, hiai gam tengteng ka hon pe ding, huchi in tangtawn in na luah ding uh,’ chi a, nangmah ngei a na kichiamna, na sikhate, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob theigige in,” achi hi.
02032014	Huchi in amite tung a thil hoih lou hih dia angaihtuah Toupa'n akikhelsakta hi.
02032015	Mosi akihei a, tang a kipan apaisuk hi. Akhut ah theihpihna suangpek nihte a-om a, suangpekte alangnih tuak a gelh ahi a, khat lam leh langkhat lam a gelh ahi uhi.
02032016	Suangpekte Pathian thilhih ahi a, agelhte leng Pathian gelh ahi, suangpekte tung a kigelhte.
02032017	Joshua in mite kikou husa azak in Mosi kiang ah, “Giahphual ah kidouna husa a-om,” achi hi.
02032018	Ama'n, “Tungnun kituh a kikoute aw ahi kei a, nuaisiah a om ziak a kapte aw leng ahi kei. Lasate husa ahi zaw ka zak,” achi hi.
02032019	Huan hichi ahong hi a, giahphual kiang ahong tuntak in, bawngnou leh lam amuta hi. Huchi in Mosi hehna asou a, akhut a pan suangpekte apai a, tang nuai ah akeksakta hi.
02032020	Abawngnou bawl uh ala a, mei ah akhul a, agawinen a, tui tung ah atheh a, Israel suante adawnsak hi.
02032021	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah, “Hiai mite'n bang ahia na kiang a ahih uh, atung ua hichi tel a khelhna thupi na tunsak?” achi hi.
02032022	Aaron in, “Mite'n thil sia azondan uh na thei hi, ka toupa' hehna kuang kei hen.
02032023	Ka ma ua pai ding, pathiante hon bawlsak in. Hiai Mosi, Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhetoupa lah, bang suakta ahia ka thei ngal kei ua, ka kiang a achih ziak un.
02032024	Ke'n akiang uah, dangka-eng nei peuh in hon tolkhia un ka chi hi. Huchi in amau kei ahon pia ua; ke'n mei sung ah ka khia a, hiai bawngnou lim ahong pawtkhia,” achi hi.
02032025	Aaron in a-utut ua om dia mite ataizak uh phal in, melmate ma ah zahlak in a-omsak, chih Mosi in amu hi.
02032026	Giahphual kongpi ah Mosi adingh a, “ Toupa lam a pang kuakua ahia? Ka kiang ah hong pai hen,” achi hi. Akiang ah Levi ta tengteng akikhawmkhawmta uhi.
02032027	Ama'n akiang uah, “Israel Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Michih in apang ah anamsau kuah henla, giahphual tuansuak in kongpi khat a pan kongpi dang ah lut in pawt henla, michih in asanggampa, michih in alawmpa, michih in a-invengte that hen,” achi hi.
02032028	Levi tapate'n Mosi thu dungzui in ahihta ua; huchi in huai ni in mite lak ah mi sangthum asi uhi.
02032029	Mosi in, “Michih in atapa, michih in a-unaupa douta na hih ziak un, ahon vualzawl theihna ding in tuni in Toupa a ding in kihihsiangthou un,” achi hi.
02032030	Azing in hichi ahong hi a, Mosi in mite kiang ah, “Khelhna khawktak in na khialta uhi. Tu in Toupa kiang ah ka hohtou dia; na khelhna uh a ding in lemna ka bawl thei maithei hi,” achi hi.
02032031	Toupa kiang ah Mosi akik nawn a, “Aw, hiai mite'n khelhna thupitak ahih ua, dangka-eng pathiante akibawl uhi.
02032032	Ahi a lah, tu in, akhelhna uh ngaidam in; Na ngaihdam kei dingleh, na gelhsa na laibu a pan kei hon thaimang in, ka hon ngen ahi,” achi hi.
02032033	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Kuapeuh ka tung a khial, ka laibu a pan ka thaimang ding.
02032034	Huaiziak in tu in kuan inla, na kiang a ka genna mun ah mite pi in. Ngai in, na ma ah ka Angel apai ding. Akoi abang hitaleh gawt dia ka veh ni in akhelhna uh ziak in amaute ka gawt ding,” achi hi.
02032035	Huchi in Aaron in abawl bawngnou mai a thil alat ziak in Toupa'n mite hipi in agawtta hi.
02033001	Huai khit in, Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Kuan inla, hiai a kipan paitou in, nang leh Aigupta gam a pan na pikhiak mite, na suante kiang ah ka hon pe ding, chi a, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a ka kichiamna gam ah.
02033002	Na ma ah ka angel ka sawl ding a; huchi in Kanaante, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste ka hawlkhe ding.
02033003	Bawngnawi leh khuaizu a luang gam ah hohtou un. Migenhakte na hih ziak un, kei na lak ua hohtou lou ding ka hi. Huchi lou in zaw lampi ah ka hon kangtum kha ding,” achi hi.
02033004	Mite'n hiai thuhoih lou azak un, alungkham uhi. Huchi in mi kuamah kizepna a kizem a-om kei uh.
02033005	Toupa'n lah Mosi kiang ah, “Israel suante kiang ah, migenhakte na hi uhi. Mitphiat kal lou a na lak ua hong tou a, hong kangtum thei ka hi. Huaiziak in na tung ua bang hih ding ka hia, chih ka theihna ding in na kizepnate uh suahkhia un,” chi in ana gen khinta hi.
02033006	Huchi in Israel suante'n Horeb tang ah akizepnate uh asuahkhe vek uhi.
02033007	Mosi in puanin asut a, giahphual polam, giahphual a pan gamlapi ah akai a, Kihoupihna Biakbuk, achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, michih Toupa zongte kihoupihna biakbuk, giahphual polam a om ah ahoh uhi.
02033008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, puanin lam a Mosi apaikhiak teng in, mite avek un adingh ua, michih apuanin kongkhak bul ah adingh ua; puanin a alut mateng Mosi a-enzui uhi.
02033009	Huan hichi ahong hi a, puanin a Mosi alutleh, meipi khuam ahong kumsuk a, puanin kongkhak bul ah adingh a, huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupihta hi.
02033010	Mi tengteng in puanin kongkhak bul a dingh, meipi khuam amu uhi. Mi tengteng adingh ua abia uhi; michih in apuanin kongkhak chiat ah.
02033011	Mi'n alawm ahoupih bang in, Toupa'n kimaituah in Mosi ahoupih hi. Huchi in giahphual ah akik nawn a, himahleh asikha Joshua, Nun tapa, tangval nou ahihleh puanin a pan apaikhe kei hi.
02033012	Mosi in Toupa kiang ah, “En in, hiai mite hon pitou in na hon chi a, himahleh ka kiang a kua hon sawl ding na hia chih na hon theisak kei hi. Hinapi in lah, na min in ka hon thei a, ka mitmuh in hehpihna leng na mu hi, na chi hi.
02033013	Huaiziak in tu in, ka hon ngen ahi. Na mitmuh a hehpihna ka muhleh, nang ka hon theihna ding leh na mitmuh a hehpihna ka muhtheihna ding in, tu in na lampi hon ensak in. Hiai nam na mite ahi, chih ngaihtuah in,” achi hi.
02033014	Ama'n, “Ka ompihna nang toh aton dia, khawlna ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
02033015	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na ompihna kei toh aton kei dingleh, hiai a pan hon pitou ke'n.
02033016	N'on tonpih keileh, bangchi in na mite leh ke'n na mitmuh in deihsakna ka mu uh chih kithei ding ahia? Leitung pumpi a teng mi tengteng a pan kei leh na mite atuam ka hi uh, chih bang in akichiansak dia?” achi hi.
02033017	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ka mitmuh in deihsakna na mu a, na min in ka hon theita a, hiai na nget pen leng ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi.
02033018	Ama'n, “Ka hon ngen hi, na thupina hon ensak in,” achi hi.
02033019	Ama'n, “Na ma ah ka hoihna tengteng ka paisak dia, na ma ah Toupa min ka tangkoupih ding. ‘Ka hehpih nopmi, ka hehpih dia, zahngaihna ka lah nopmi kiang ah zahngaihna ka lak ding,’ achi hi.
02033020	Himahleh ka mai na mu thei kei ding; mi, kei hon mu, ahing kuamah a-om louh ziak in.
02033021	Toupa'n , ‘En in, hiai ah ka kiang ah mun khat a-om a; suangpi tung ah na dingh in.
02033022	Huchi in hichi ahi ding a, ka thupina in hon khen sung in suangpi heng ah ka hon koih dia, ka hon khen sung in ka khut in ka hon khuh ding hi.
02033023	Huai khit chiang in ka khut ka lakhe dia, huchi in ka nunglam na mu dia; himahleh ka mai bel akimu kei ding,’ ” achi hi.
02034001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Amasa bang in suangpek nih bawl inla; hiai suangpekte tung ah, na hihsiat suangpek masapente a om thute ka gelh ding.
02034002	Zingsang in mansa in om inla, zingsang in Sinai Tang ah hong paitou inla, tang vum ah ka kiang ah hong kihil in.
02034003	Na kiang a kuamah ahong paitouh louh ding uh ahi. Tang kimvel a leng kuamah himhim muh a a-om louh ding uh ahi. Tang mazawn lam a bawnghon leh belamhon leng agamtat louh ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
02034004	Huchi in amasapen bang in suangpek nih abawl hi. Zingkhang in Mosi athou a, Toupa'n thu apiak bang in, Sinai Tang ah ahohtou a, akhut in suangpek nihte atawi hi.
02034005	Meipi ah Toupa ahong kumsuk a, akiang ah ahong dingh a, Toupa min agenkheta hi.
02034006	Huchi in ama ah Toupa apaisuak a, “Toupa, Toupa Pathian, hehpih thei leh it thei, dohthei leh, hoihna leh thutak hau.
02034007	Sangte a dia zahngaihna nei, gitlouhna, tatlekna leh khelhna ngaidam, mohna bangchi mah a siangsak lou ding, pate gitlouhna tate tung leh atusuante tung, akhang thumna leh akhang lina tan a thukpa,” chi in apuangkhia hi.
02034008	Kintak in lei si in Mosi akunsuk a, abeta hi.
02034009	Ama'n, “Tu a na mitmuh a hehpihna ka muhleh, Toupa aw, ka hon ngen hi, ka lak uah ka Toupa pai hen; migenhak ahih ziak un. Ka gitlouhna uleh ka khelhna uh ngaidam inla, na gouluah ding in hon la in,” achi hi.
02034010	Ama'n: Ngai in, nou toh thukhun ka bawl hi. Leitung pumpi a hih a om ngei lou, koi nam a leng hih a om ngei lou, thillamdangte na mi tengteng ma ah ka hih ding hi. Alak ua na tenna mi tengteng in Toupa'n nou a dia thil lauhuai ka hih dingte amu ding uh.
02034011	Nang tuni a ka hon thupiak zui in. Ngai in na ma uah Amorte, leh Kanaante, leh Hitte, leh Perizte, leh Hivte, leh Jebuste ka hawlkhe ding hi.
02034012	Pilvang in, na paina gam a tengte toh thukhun na bawl kha ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw na lak ua thang ahi ding uhi.
02034013	Amaitamte uh hihsia un, amilimte uh hihgawpsak un, a Asherah songte uh na phuksak ding uh ahi.
02034014	Pathian dang na be ding uh ahi kei: Toupa , amin Mullit hat ahi a, mullit hat Pathian ahi.
02034015	Huai gam a teng mite toh kikal ah thukhun na bawl kha ding uh. Apathiante uh kiang a kithoihna alat chiang in khattei in ahon chial dia, akithoihna sa uh na ne kha ding uh.
02034016	Na tapate a ding in atanute uh na pisak kha ding ua, atanute uh apathiante uh kiang a akizuak chiang un, na tapate uh leng amaute hih bang a, amilimte uh be ding in akhempuk kha ding uhi.
02034017	Sunthoh pathiante na kibawl ding uh ahi kei.
02034018	Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina na nei gige ding uh ahi. Thu ka hon piak tak bang in, Abib kha in, ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uh; Abib kha a Aigupta a pan a na hong paikhiak ziak un.
02034019	Sul hong ta masa tengteng, na ganhon lak ua piang masapen teng, bawngtal hi in belam hileh, apa peuhpeuh kei a ahi.
02034020	Himahleh sabiltungnou masapen belamnou in na tatkhiak ding uh ahi. Na tatkhiak kei uleh, angawng na hektan ding uh ahi. Na tapate tengteng lak a piang masapen na tatkhiak ding ahi. Ka ma ah kuamah khutvuak in ahong kilang ding uh ahi kei.
02034021	Ni guk sung nna na sem ding ahi. Himahleh ani sagih ni in na khawl ding ahi. Haichi pawi hun leh pawltak hun in na khawl ding ahi.
02034022	Nipi kalte a ankuangluina, huit buh pawltak gah masa ankuangluina, kum tawp a koihkhawmna ankuangluinate na tan ding ahi.
02034023	Kum khat in thumvei pasal tengteng Toupa Pathian , Israel' Pathian ma a akilat ding uh ahi.
02034024	Na mai ua namte ka delhkhe ding a, na gamgi uh ka keklian ding. Kum khat a thumvei Toupa na Pathian ma a na kilat chiang un, kuamah in na gam uh ahon deihgoh kei ding hi.
02034025	“Ka mai a kithoihna thillat; silngou toh sisan na lan ding uh ahi kei. Paikan Ankuanglui kithoihna leng azingchiang tan in nutsiat in a-om ding ahi kei.
02034026	Na gam a gah masa hoihpente a masapen Toupa na Pathian inn ah na hon tawi ding ahi. Kelnou anu' nawitui in na huan ding ahi kei,” achi hi.
02034027	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Hiai thute gelh in. Hiai thute omdan zui a nang leh Israel toh thukhun ka bawl tak ziak in,” achi hi.
02034028	Toupa kiang ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a-om a; an ane kei a, tui leng adawn kei hi. Suangpek tung ah thukhun thute, huai Thupiak Sawmte agelh hi.
02034029	Sinai Tang a kipan akhut a theihpihna suangpek nihte tawi a, tang a kipan Mosi ahong paisuk lai in, amah ahoupih sung in amaitang tang ahi chih Mosi in athei kei hi.
02034030	Aaron leh Israel suan tengteng in Mosi amuhtak un, ngai in, amaitang atang a; amah naih a hong pai alauta uhi.
02034031	Himahleh Mosi in amaute asam a; Aaron leh mipi kikhawmte heutu tengteng akiang ah ahong kik nawn ua; Mosi in amaute ahoupih hi.
02034032	Huai nung in Israel suan tengteng ahong pai nai ua; Sinai Tang a Toupa'n akiang a agen tengteng thupiak in amaute apeta hi.
02034033	Mosi in amaute ahoupih khit in, amaitang khuhna in akhuh hi.
02034034	Himahleh Toupa houpih dia amai alut teng in, ahong pawtkhiak nawn mateng, thupiak a omte Israel suante kiang a agen chiang in, amai khuhna ahawkkhia hi.
02034035	Israel suante'n Mosi maitang amu ua, Mosi maivun atang hi. Mosi in amah houpih dia alut nawn matan in amaitang akhuh zel hi.
02035001	Huan Mosi in Israel suan tengteng akhawmkhawm a, akiang uah: “Hiaite na hih ding ua Toupa thupiakte ahi.
02035002	Ni guk sung in nna sep zoh ahi dia, himahleh ani sagih ni noute a dia inn om ni ahi ding hi. Toupa a dia Sabbath khawlna ahi. Sabbath ni a noute a dia inn om ni: Hiai ni nna sem peuhmah thah ding ahi.
02035003	Sabbath ni in na tenna peuh uah mei na chih ding uh ahi kei,” achi hi.
02035004	Israel suan kikhawmkhawm tengteng kiang ah Mosi in thu agen a, “ Toupa'n noute ahon thupiak hiaite ahi uh.
02035005	Toupa a ding in na lak uah thilpiakte lakhawm un. Lungtang a utna nei kuapeuh in Toupa a ding in thilpiakte: dangka-eng, dangka leh dal;
02035006	khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au, puanmalngat hoih, kel mul;
02035007	belampa mul diahsan, ngalvang vun, singgi sing;
02035008	khawnvak a ding thau, thaunilh ding in gimlim; hal namtui ding;
02035009	onik suangte, siampu puanak leh awmtuam a siat ding suangmantamte hon tawikhawm uhen,” achi hi.
02035010	“Na lak ua khutsiam tengteng na hong pai ding ua, Toupa'n bawl ding chi a thu ahon piak tengteng abawl ding uhi.
02035011	Biakbuk, apuanin, akhuhna, asikkawi, asingpekte, asiktawnte, akhuamte leh akingakna khuakkuakte;
02035012	abawm leh achiangte, zahngaihna tutphah leh akhuhna puanzak;
02035013	dohkan leh achiangte, atui-um belsuan leh tanghou koihna;
02035014	khawnvak a ding in khawnvak koihna leng, avante, akhawnvakte, avakna thau;
02035015	gimlim maitam leh achiangte, nilh theih thau, gimlim leh biakbuk lutna kongkhak a dia puankhai,
02035016	halmang thillatna maitam, adal vutluah, azawlte leh atui-um belsuan tengteng, tuikuang leh akhe;
02035017	ahuangsung puankhaite, akhuamte, akingakna khuakkuakte, huangsung kongkhak a dia puankhai;
02035018	biakbuk kilhna zumte, huangsung kilhna zumte leh akhaute;
02035019	nasepna puante, mun siangthou a nasepna dia siampu Aaron puan siangthoute, atapate puante bawl uhen,” achi hi.
02035020	Huchi in Israel suan kikhawm teng Mosi omna a pan apaita uhi.
02035021	Michih alungtang tohthoh a om peuhmah leh michih utna nei peuhmahte ahong pai ua, kihoupihna biakbuk lamna ding leh asung a nasepna ding leh puansilh siangthoute bawlna ding Toupa ma ah thilpiak ahon tawi uhi.
02035022	Lungtang a utna nei pasalte leh numeite ahong pai ua, dangka-eng a kibawl thil tuamtuam: bilbah, nakbah, zungbuh, ohthoh leh butthoh kizepnate ahon tawi ua, Toupa mai ah alan uhi.
02035023	Khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au, puanmalngat hoih, kel mul, belampa vun, ngalvang vun neite'n huaite ahon tawi uhi.
02035024	Thilpiak dia dangka leh dal neite'n Toupa mai a thillat ding in ahon tawi uhi. Singgi sing nei teng in leng ahon tawi uhi.
02035025	Numei khutsiam teng in khut in khau akhek ua, akheksa uh ahon tawi ua, khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih ahon tawi uhi.
02035026	Lungtang tohthoh numei tengteng in kel mul akhek uhi.
02035027	Vaihawm mite'n onik suangte, suangte, siampu puan leh awmtuam a siat dingte ahon tawi uhi;
02035028	gimnamtui hal ding singgah namtui leh det ding meivak leh nilh ding sathau a zat ding leh gimnamtui a hel ding sathau ahon tawi uhi.
02035029	Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu apiak a, van bawl ding achih tengteng bawlna ding in Israel suante, numei leh pasalte'n amau ut thu in thilpiakte Toupa mai ah ahon tawi uhi.
02035030	Mosi in Israel suante kiang ah, “En un, Toupa'n Bezaleel, Uri tapa, Hur tapa, Judah nam a mi amin in asam a;
02035031	Pathian Kha leh pilna leh theihsiamna leh theihna leh khutsiamna chiteng in amah adimsak hi.
02035032	Huai bel khutsiamtak a bawl dingte gelsiamna, dangka-eng leh dangka leh dal thilbawlsiamna ahi a, bulh ding suangmantamte atsiamna, sing lam siamna ahi.
02035033	bulh ding suangmantamte atsiamna, sing lam siamna leh khutsiam thilbawl chiteng asiamna ahi.
02035034	Huan amah leh Dan nam a Ahisamak tapa Aholiab leng midangte sinsak siamna apia hi.
02035035	Amaute teng khuakthoh a thilbawl siamna chikim leh khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au, puanmalngat hoih gat zep siamna, gat siamna, ze tuamtuam gelh siamna nei ding in pilna apia hi,” achi hi.
02036001	“Hiai bang in Bezaleel, Aholiab leh mun siangthou vanzatte bawldan ding thei ding a Toupa'n pilna leh theihsiamna a piak khutsiamte'n Toupa thupiak bang in vanzatte abawl ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
02036002	Huai khit in Mosi in Bezaleel, Aholiab leh michih khutsiamna nei, alungtang ua Toupa'n pilna akoih leh michih alungtang ua nasem a kuan dia tohthoh a omte Mosi in asamta hi.
02036003	Amaute'n mun siangthou bawlna dia Israel suante'n ahon tawi uh thilpiak tengteng Mosi a pan alata uhi. Huchi in zingsang teng in ut thu apiak thillatte akiang ah hon tawi uhi.
02036004	Mun siangthou a nna tengteng sem, khutsiam teng a nasep chiat a pan ahong pai ua,
02036005	Mosi kiang ah, “ Toupa'n bawl dia ahon thupiak bang a nasepna dia poimoh zah sang a tamzaw mite'n ahon tawi uh,” achi uhi.
02036006	Mosi in thu apia a, giahphual teng ah atangkoupih ua, “Pasal hileh numei hileh mun siangthou bawlna dia thilpiak kuamah in pe nawn kei un,” achi hi. Huchi in thilpiak hon tawi nawn lou dia kham in a-omta uhi.
02036007	Mun siangthou bawlna a nna tengteng sepna ding in avan neihsa uh kiching in, atam lota hi.
02036008	Nasemte lak a khutsiamte'n biakbuk khuhna ding siamtak a khui cherubte lim tuanna puanzak sawm, khau dum, khau sandup leh khau san-au khuk in abawl uhi.
02036009	Puanzak khat dunglam tong sawmnih-le-giat ahi a; availam tong li; puanzak tengteng letdan akikim chiat hi.
02036010	Puanzak ngate kithuah in akhep uhi. Puanzak dang ngate leng akhep hi.
02036011	Akithuahna mong khepna a pan puanzak khat gei ah khau dum in abilte abawl a, huchi mah in anihna khepna ah, puanzak dang gei chin ah abilte abawl hi.
02036012	Puanzak khat ah abil sawmnga abawl a, anihna kikhepna a puanzak gei ah abil sawmnga abawl hi. Abilte kizawn geihgeih in a-om uhi.
02036013	Dangka-eng in kilhna sawmnga abawl a, kilhnate in puanzakte agawmkhawm hi. Huchi in biakbuk khat ahong hita hi.
02036014	Puanin biakbuk tung a ding in kel mul in puanzak abawl a; sawm-le-khat abawl hi.
02036015	Puanzak khat dunglam tong sawmthum ahi a, puanzak khat vailam tong li ahi. Puanzak sawm-le-khatte alehlam akibang vek hi.
02036016	Puanzak ngate amau in akikheptuam a, puanzak gukte amau in akikheptuam hi.
02036017	Akikhepna puanzak mongchin ah abil sawmnga abawl a, puanzak anihna thuahna pen mong ah abil sawmnga abawl hi.
02036018	Khat ahihtheihna dia puanin kaihkhawmna ding in dal in kilhna sawmnga abawl hi.
02036019	Puanin khuhna ding in belampa vun diahsan in abawl a, huai tung ah ngalvang vun in khuhna abawl hi.
02036020	Singgi sing in biakbuk singpek ding atunthoh in abawl hi.
02036021	Singpek sau lam tong sawm ahi a, singpek zatlam tong khat-le-akim ahi.
02036022	Singpek khat in atgek nih anei a, akigamlatdan uh kikim in huchibang in biakbuk singpek tengteng a ding in abawl hi.
02036023	Biakbuk a ding in singpek abawl a, simlam pang a ding in singpek sawmnih abawl hi.
02036024	Singpek sawmnih nuai ah dangka-eng in kingakna khuakkuak sawmli abawl a; a-atgek nihte a ding in singpek khat dang ah kingakna khuakkuak nih, a-atgek nih a ding in singpek dang ah kingakna khuakkuak nih abawl hi.
02036025	Biakbuk pang khat lam a ding in, amallam ning a om a ding in singpek sawmnih,
02036026	adangka-eng kingakna khuakkuak sawmlite toh; singpek khat dang ah kingakna khuakkuak nih, singpek dang khat ah kingakna khuakkuak nih abawl hi.
02036027	Tumlam biakbuk pangte a ding in singpek nih abawl hi.
02036028	Apang nihte ah biakbuk ningte a ding in singpek nih abawl hi.
02036029	Anuai ah akithuah ua, atung ah sikkual khat ah akikaikhawm a; huchibang in aning tuak ah ahih tuaktuak hi.
02036030	Singpek giat a-om a; akingakna khuakkuak uh, dangka a bawl kingakna khuakkuak sawm-le-guk ahi ua, singpek chih dang ah kingakna khuakkuak nih abawl hi.
02036031	Singgi sing chiangtawn abawl a, biakbuk pang khat a singpekte a ding in nga abawl hi.
02036032	Biakbuk pang dang a singpekte a ding in chiangtawn nga abawl a, tumlam pang a biakbuk singpekte a ding in chiangtawn nga abawl hi.
02036033	Chiangtawn laita pen singpekte khat a pan adang kap paisuak in abawl hi.
02036034	Singpekte dangka-eng in aluan a, adangka-eng sikkualte chiangtawn omna ding in abawl a, chiangtawnte dangka-eng in aluan hi.
02036035	Khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat koptah hoih in puankhai abawl a; khutsiamtak in cherubte abawl hi.
02036036	Singgi sing in khuam li abawl a; dangka-eng in aluan a, abannate dangka-eng abawl hi. Huaite a ding in dangka in kingakna khuakkuak li asung hi.
02036037	Biakbuk kongkhak a ding in khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah, phim a khui in puankhai abawl hi.
02036038	Akhuam ngate abanna uh toh; azingte uleh apuanduangte dangka-eng in aluan a, himahleh akingakna khuakkuak ngate dal a bawl ahi.
02037001	Huan Bazaleel in singgi sing in bawm abawl a, adunglam tong nih-le-akim ahi a, availam tong khat-le-akim, huan asanlam tong khat-le-akim ahi.
02037002	Dangka-engtak in asunglam leh apolam aluan a, dangka-eng lallukhu akimvel in abawl hi.
02037003	Aning lite a bulh ding in dangka-eng sikkual li asung hi. Apang khat asikkual nih, apang khat lam ah sikkual nih.
02037004	Singgi sing in zawl abawl a, dangka-eng in aluan hi.
02037005	Huan bawm pang a sikkual sung ah, bawm zawnna ding in hiai zawlte athunlut hi.
02037006	Dangka-engtak in zahngaihna tutphah abawl a; tong nih-le-akim adunglam ahi a, tong khat-le-akim availam ahi.
02037007	Dangka-eng sekkhiak in zahngaihna tutphah mong nihte tuak ah cherubte abawl hi.
02037008	Hiai lam pang mong ah cherub khat, huai lam pang mong ah cherub dang khat, zahngaihna tutphah a pan among langnihte ah cherubte abawl hi.
02037009	Cherubte'n tunglam ah akha uh azak ua, zahngaihna tutphah tunglam ah, amai uh kingattuah in, akha un akhuh ua; zahngaihna tutphah lam ah cherubte mai a-om hi.
02037010	Singgi sing in dohkan abawl a; adunglam tong nih ahi a, availam tong khat, huan asanlam tong khat-le-akim ahi.
02037011	Dangka-engtak in aluan a, akimvel in dangka-eng lallukhu abawl hi.
02037012	Huai lou in huai ah akimvel in khutpek chia in agei abawl a; akimvel in agei ding in dangka-eng lallukhu abawl hi.
02037013	Dangka-eng sikkual li asung a, akhe lite a om aning lite tung ah sikkualte abulh hi.
02037014	Ageichin ah, dohkan puakna ding chiangte a ding in mun, sikkualte a-om uhi.
02037015	Singgi sing in chiangte abawl a, dohkan puakna ding in, dangka-eng in aluan hi.
02037016	Dohkan tung a om tui-um belsuan abawl a, akuangte leh asikkeute leh anoubemte leh akhuhna ding singte, dangka-engtak in abawl hi.
02037017	Khawnvak koihna dangka-engtak in abawl a; sekthoh in khawnvak koihna abawl hi. Akungpi, ahiang, anoubemte leh amumte leh apakte kibang chiat uhi.
02037018	Apangte a pan hiang guk akakhia a; khawnvak koihna hiang thum apang khat a pan, apang dang a pan khawnvak koihna hiang thum.
02037019	Noubem thum makha gah bang a bawl hiang khat ah, amum leh apak; noubem thum makha gah bang a bawl hiang dang ah, amum leh apak, huchibang in hiang guk teng ah khawnvak koihna a pan in.
02037020	Khawnvak koihna makha gah bang a bawl noubem li a-om; amumte leh apakte toh.
02037021	Akibang in hiang nihte dang ah mum khat, akibang in hiang nihte dang ah mum khat, akibang in hiang nihte dang ah mum khat, hiang gukte bang zel in akakhia uhi.
02037022	Amumte uh leh ahiangte uh kibang ahi ua: avek un dangka-engtak sekthoh ahi.
02037023	Khawnvak sagihte, meihalnate leh meivu kuangte dangka-engtak in abawl hi.
02037024	Dangka-engtak talent khat in tui-um belsuan teng abawl hi.
02037025	Gimlim maitam singgi sing in abawl a; adunglam tong khat ahi, availam tong khat; kiptak a bawl ahi a; asanlam tong nih ahi. Akibang vek uhi.
02037026	Dangka-engtak in atung leh akimvel in apangte leh akite aluan hi. Huai lou leng akimvel in dangka-eng lallukhu abawl hi.
02037027	Alallukhu nuai ah dangka-eng in sikkual nih abawl a, aning nihte kiang ah, asik nihte tung ah, apuakna ding chiangte omna ding in.
02037028	Huan singgi sing in zawlte abawl a, dangka-eng in aluan hi.
02037029	Nilh theih thau siangthou, gimnamtui siangthou, gimlim bawlmi hih bang in abawl hi.
02038001	Singgi sing in halmang thillat maitam abawl a; adunglam tong nga ahi a, availam tong nga ahi a, huan asanlam tong thum ahi. Kiptak a bawl ahi.
02038002	Aning lite ah akii abawl a; akiite akibang vek ua; dal in aluan hi.
02038003	Atui-um belsuan tengteng, maitam, belte, vutluahte, salu kuangte, sa thuknate leh meibel tengteng dal in abawl hi.
02038004	Huan alaizangtak nuai ah among dang ah dal hakvang maitam a ding in abawl hi.
02038005	Chiangte omna ding in, dal hakvang mong lite a ding in sikkual li asung hi.
02038006	Singgi sing in zawl abawl a, dal in aluan hi.
02038007	Azawnna ding in, maitam pang a sikkualte sung ah zawlte athunlut a; maitam singpek in asung ahawmsak hi.
02038008	Dal in tuikuang leh akhe abawl a, numei nasem, kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a kikhawmte' limlangte abawl hi.
02038009	Huangsung abawl a; simlam pang simlam ah huangsung puankhai, puanmalngat hoih koptah, tong zakhat a-om hi.
02038010	Akhuamte sawmnih ahi ua, adal kingakna khuakkuakte sawmnih; khuam bannate leh adangka puanduangte a-om uhi.
02038011	Amallam pang a ding in puankhaite tong zakhat ahi ua, akhuamte uh sawmnih leh adal kingakna khuakkuakte sawmnih; akhuamte abannate leh dangka gaknate.
02038012	Atumlam pang a ding in tong sawmnga a sau puankhaite a-om ua, akhuamte sawm leh akingakna khuakkuak sawm; akhuamte abannate leh adangka gaknate a-om uhi.
02038013	Asuahlam pang suahlam a ding in tong sawmnga.
02038014	Kongpi sik khat a puankhaite tong sawm-le-nga ahi ua; akhuamte thum, akingakna khuakkuakte thum mah.
02038015	Hiai lam leh huai lam, huangsung kongpi sik khat lam pang a ding in puankhai tong sawm-le-nga ahi ua; akhuamte thum, akingakna khuakkuakte thum mah ahi.
02038016	Huangsung akimvel a puankhai tengteng puanmalngat koptah hoih ahi.
02038017	Khuam kingakna khuakkuakte dal ahi ua; khuam bannate leh adangka gaknate dangka azingte uh luanna; huangsung khuam tengteng dangka in agaknate akibawl hi.
02038018	Huangsung kongpi a puankhai phim a khui, khau dum, khau sandup, asan-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah ahi. Adunglam tong sawmnih ahi a, apek sanlam tong nga ahi, huangsung puankhaite toh akituak hi.
02038019	Akhuamte li ahi a, akingakna khuakkuakte li, dal a bawl ahi. Abannate dangka a bawl, dangka a bawl azingte leh adung luante.
02038020	Biakbuk kilhna zum teng leh huangsung kimvel kilhna tengteng dal ahi uh.
02038021	Hiai biakbuk vankim, sim a om bang in, theihpihna biakbuk ate ngei, Levite nasepna dia, Mosi thupiak bang zel a siampu Aaron tapa, Ithamar khut a bawl ahi uhi.
02038022	Huchi in Bezaleel, Uri tapa, Hur tapa, Judah nam a mi in Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng abawlta hi.
02038023	Amah toh sem, gelh nasep siam, khau dum leh khau sandup leh khau san-au leh puanmalngat a zebawl siam, Aholiab, Ahisamak tapa, Dan nam a mi ahi.
02038024	Dangka-eng tengteng mun siangthou a nasepna teng a sepna dia zat, thillat dangka-eng nangawn, talent sawmnih-le-kua leh shekel, mun siangthou a shekel dungzui in, zasagih-le-sawmthum ahi.
02038025	Dangka, khawmpi a simte mun siangthou a shekel dungzui in talent zakhat leh shekel sangkhat zasagih sawmsagih-le-nga ahi.
02038026	Michih a ding in beka khat, huai bel, shekel kimkhat ahi, mun siangthou a shekel dungzui in, michih sim a omte a ding in, kum sawmnih a upa leh atunglam, pasal nuaiguk sangthum zanga-le-sawmnga.
02038027	Dangka talent zakhat mun siangthou a kingakna khuakkuak a ding in asung ua, puanzak a kingakna khuakkuakte toh; talent zakhat a dia kingakna khuakkuak zakhat, kingakna khuakkuak khat a dia talent khat zel.
02038028	Shekel sangkhat zasagih sawmsagih-le-nga in khuam bannate abawl a, azingte luan in akimatsak hi.
02038029	Thillat dal talent sawmsagih leh shekel sangnih-le-zali ahi.
02038030	Huaite in kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak kingakna khuakkuak abawl a, dal maitam leh dal hakvang a bawl, maitam tui-um belsuan tengteng toh.
02038031	Huangsung kimvel a kingakna khuakkuak, huangsung kongpi kingakna khuakkuak, biakbuk kilhna zum tengteng leh huangsung kimvel a kilhna zum tengteng azou hi.
02039001	Khau dum leh khau sandup leh khau san-au kigan in Mun Siangthou a nasepna ding siampu puante abawl ua, Aaron puansilh siangthoute abawl uhi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a bawl ahi.
02039002	Khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah dangka-eng in siampu puan abawl uhi.
02039003	Dangka-eng khau leh khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih a kigan in siampu puanakzem abawl uhi.
02039004	Anunglam leh malam kaihkhawmna ding, aliangzang ah kaihna abawl ua, atunglam gei tuak akhihkhawm hi.
02039005	Atung a om, asiampu puanak siamneltak a gat leng akibang mah in anasep dungzui in; dangka-eng, khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih a Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak dungzui in gat in abawl uhi.
02039006	Onik suang abawl ua, chiamtehna gelhna a gelh, dangka-eng bulhna a bulh in, Israel suante min dungzui zel in abawl uhi.
02039007	Huaite siampu puanak liangzang ah akoih ua, Israel suante a dia theihgigena suangte hi ding in: Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in abawl hi.
02039008	Khutsiamtak in awmtuam abawl a, siampu puan bawl bang in, dangka-eng, khau dum leh khau san leh khau sandup leh khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih koptah in abawl hi.
02039009	Adung-avai akikim a; awmtuamna thuah nih in abawl uhi. Asau lam khap khat ahi a, availam khap khat, thuah nih ahi.
02039010	Huai ah vual li in suang asiat ua; avual khatna sardi suang, topaz suang leh karbankul suang; hiai avual khatna ahi.
02039011	Avual nihna, emerald suang, sapphir suang leh diamond ahi.
02039012	Avual thumna, liguri suang, agate suang leh amethis suang ahi.
02039013	Avual lina, beril suang, onik suang leh jasper suang ahi a; aphuhna uah dangka-eng bulhna asiatlut uhi.
02039014	Suangte Israel suante min dungzui zel leh ahihna zah uh dungzui zel in, sawm-le-nih, chiamtehna gelhnate bang in, michih amin toh nam sawm-le-nihte gelh ahi.
02039015	Amongte ah awmtuam tung ah khainiang, dangka-engtak pakkhi abawl uhi.
02039016	Huchi in dangka-eng bulhna nih abawl ua, dangka-eng sikkual nih toh, awmtuamna mong nihte ah sikkual nihte akoih uhi.
02039017	Awmtuamna mongte a sikkual nihte sung ah dangka-eng khainiang nihte pak bang a bawl in athun uhi.
02039018	Pak khainiang nihte mong nihte suangmantam bulhna nihte ah akoih ua, ama ah siampu puan liangzang thuahna ah akoih uhi.
02039019	Dangka-eng in sikkual nih abawl ua, awmtuamna mong nihte tung ah akoih ua, agei ah sunglam pang ah siampu puanak a-om hi.
02039020	Dangka-eng sikkual nih dang abawl ua, nuailam ah siampu puanak mong nihte ah akoih uhi, amalam sang ah, akikhepna zawntak ah, siampu puanak kawnggak kigatthoh tung ah akoih uhi.
02039021	Gakna khau dum in siampu puanak sikkualte in awmtuam agakden ua, siampu puanak a pan a awmtuam akiphel theihlouhna ding in; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in abawl uhi.
02039022	Siampu puanak puanaktual gatthoh, avek a adum a bawl ahi.
02039023	Puanak tual laitak ah avang a-om a, sik puanak banbei vang bang in, akeklouhna ding a, avang kimvel in kaihna khau a-om hi.
02039024	Puanak tual mongte ah khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au leh puanmalngat hoih in theibuhfai gahte abawl uhi.
02039025	Dangka-engtak in dak abawl ua, dakte puanaktual mong a theibuhfai gahte kikal ah, theibuhfai gahte kikal zel ah akhaisuak uhi.
02039026	Dak leh theibuhfai gahte nasepna ding a puanaktual mong kimvel ah Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in abawl uhi.
02039027	Aaron leh atapate a ding in puanmalngat puanak tung gatthoh abawl uhi.
02039028	Puanmalngat hoih in lukhu leh puanmalngat hoih in lutuam leh puanmalngat hoih koptah in puan pheituam gek abawl uhi.
02039029	Kawnggak puanmalngat hoih koptah, khau dum, khau sandup, khau san-au, Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in khuithoh in abawl uhi.
02039030	Dangka-engtak in lallukhu siangthou abawl ua, atung ah laigelh, chiamtehna gelhnate bang in, SIANTHOUNA Toupa A AHI chih agelh uhi.
02039031	Huai ah khauhual dum akhih ua, lukhu tunglam gaktou pek ding in; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in abawl uhi.
02039032	Hichibang in khawmpite' kihoupihna biakbuk nasep tengteng zoh ahita hi. Toupa'n Mosi kiang a thupiak bang in Israel suante'n ahihta uhi.
02039033	Biakbuk leh puanin van tengteng, akibatnate, asingpekte, azawlte, akhuamte leh kingakna khuakkuakte Mosi kiang ah hon tawi uhi.
02039034	Akhuhna belampa vun diahsan leh akhuhna ngalvang vun leh akhuhna puanzak;
02039035	theihpihna bawm leh azawlte leh zahngaihna tutphah;
02039036	dohkan leh atui-um belsuan tengteng leh Pathian Ompihna tanghou sawm-le-nihte;
02039037	khawnvak koihna, khawnvakte leh atui-um belsuan tengteng leh khawnvak a dia sathau;
02039038	dangka-eng maitam leh nilh theih sathau leh gimlim leh puanin kong a ding a puankhai;
02039039	dal maitam, adal hakvang, azawlte leh atui-um belsuan tengteng tuikuang leh akhe;
02039040	huangsung puankhaite, akhuamte leh akingakna khuakkuakte leh huangsung kongpi puankhai, akhaute, akilhna zumte leh biakbuk nasepna tui-um belsuan tengteng, kihoupihna biakbuk a ding:
02039041	Mun siangthou a nasepna ding nasepna puan, hoihtak a bawlte, siampu Aaron a ding puan siangthoute leh atapate puante, siampu nasepna mun a nasepna ding,
02039042	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in, huchibang in Israel suante'n nna tengteng asem uhi.
02039043	Mosi in nasep tengteng a-en a, ngai in Toupa thupiak bangtak in asemkheta uhi. Huchi in Mosi in huaite avualzawl hi.
02040001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah thu agen a:
02040002	“Kha masapen ani masapen in kihoupihna biakbuk na dingsakta ding ahi.
02040003	Huai sung ah theihpihna bawm na koih dia, bawm puanzak in na khuh ding ahi.
02040004	Dohkan na lalut dia, atung ah thil kizom akoih dingte kizom in na koih ding a; khawnvak koihna na lalut dia, akhawnvakte na det ding ahi.
02040005	Theihpihna bawm ma ah gimlim a dia dangka-eng maitam na koih dia, kongkhak puankhai biakbuk ah na koih ding ahi.
02040006	Kihoupihna puanin biakbuk kongkhak ma ah halmang thillat maitam na koih ding ahi.
02040007	Kihoupihna puanin leh maitam kikal ah tuikuang na koih dia, huai ah tui na koih ding ahi.
02040008	Akimvel in huangsung na bawl dia, huangsung kongpi ah puankhai na khaitou ding ahi.
02040009	“Thaunilhna sathau na la dia, biakbuk na nilh ding a; huai sung a om tengteng toh, na hihsiangthou dia, atui-um belsuan tengteng asiangthou ding hi.
02040010	Haltum thillat maitam na nilh ding a; atui-um belsuan tengteng toh, maitam na siangthousak ding. Huchi in maitam asiangthou penpen ding hi.
02040011	Tuikuang leh akhe na nilh dia, na siangsak ding ahi.
02040012	“Kihoupihna puanin kongkhak ah Aaron leh atapate na hon pi dia, tui in na sil ding ahi.
02040013	Puan siangthoute Aaron na silhsak dia, na nilh dia, na siangthousak ding ahi; siampu nasepna mun a ka nna aseptheihna ding in.
02040014	Atapate na hon tonpih dia, puanak tung na silhsak ding ahi.
02040015	Apa uh sathau na nilh bang in amau siampu nasepna mun a, ka nna aseptheihna ding un thau na nilh ding ahi. Athaunilhna uh akhang-akhang ua siampu hihna ahih taktak ding ziak in,” achi hi.
02040016	Hiai bang in Mosi in ahihta a; Toupa'n amah thu apiak bang zel in ahi, ahih.
02040017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum nihna, akha masapen, huai kha a ani masapen ni in, biakbuk dinsak in a-omta hi.
02040018	Mosi in biakbuk adingsakta a, akingakna khuakkuakte ahen a, asingpekte atung a, azawlte athunlut a, akhuamte adingsak hi.
02040019	Biakbuk tung ah puanin azalhta a; atunglam ah puanin khuhna akoih a; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in ahihta hi.
02040020	Theihpihna ala a bawm sung ah akoih a, bawm tung ah azawlte akoih a; bawm tunglam ah zahngaihna tutphah akoih hi.
02040021	Bawm biakbuk sung ah atawilut a, khuhna puanzak azak a, theihpihna bawm akhuh hi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in ahihta hi.
02040022	Kihoupihna puanin sung ah biakbuk pang mallam, puanzak polam ah dohkan akoih hi.
02040023	Toupa ma ah dohkan tung ah tanghoute kizom in akoih a; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in akoih hi.
02040024	Kihoupihna puanin sung ah dohkan zawn ah, biakbuk sik simlam pang ah khawnvak koihna akoih hi.
02040025	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Toupa ma ah khawnvakte det ahi.
02040026	Huan puanzak ma ah kihoupihna biakbuk sung ah dangka-eng maitam akoih hi:
02040027	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in, huai tung ah gimlim ahal hi.
02040028	Biakbuk kongkhak ah puankhai akhai hi.
02040029	Kihoupihna puanin biakbuk kongkhak kiang ah Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in halmang thillat leh tangbuang thillat alan hi.
02040030	Kihoupihna puanin leh maitam kikal ah kisawpna ding in tuikuang akoih a, huai ah tui akoih hi.
02040031	Mosi leh Aaron leh atapate'n akhutte uh leh akhepekte uh huai ah asil uhi.
02040032	Kihoupihna puanin sung ah ahoh ua, maitam kiang ah ahong pai nai ua Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in akisil uhi.
02040033	Biakbuk leh maitam kimvel in huangsung abawl a, huangsung kongpi puankhaite akhaita hi. Huchi in Mosi in nasep azouta hi.
02040034	Huai khit in meipi in kihoupihna biakbuk atuam a, Toupa thupina in biakbuk adimsak hi.
02040035	Huchi in kihoupihna biakbuk sung ah Mosi alut theita kei; atung a meipi akai ziak in leh Toupa thupina in biakbuk adimsak ziak in.
02040036	Biakbuk tung a pan meipi laktouh a a-om chiang in, Israel suante akhualzinna uah malam ah apai zel uhi.
02040037	Himahleh meipi laktouh a a-om louh chiang in, akilaktouh louh ni in azin kei uhi.
02040038	Akhualzin sung teng uh Israel inkote mitmuh in sun in biakbuk tung ah meipi in Toupa a-om a, zan in biakbuk tung ah meikuang in a-om hi.
03001001	Toupa'n Mosi asam a, kihoupihna biakbuk a pan ahoupih a,
03001002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘Na lak ua kuapeuh in Toupa kiang a thillat na lat un, ganhon, bawnghon leh belamhon lak ate, na lat ding uh ahi,’ achi hi.
03001003	“Athillat pen ganhon lak ate halmang thillat ahihleh apa, gensiatbei alat ding ahi. Amah Toupa ma a pom ahihtheihna ding in kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah alan ding ahi.
03001004	Haltum thillat lutung ah akhut akoih dia; huchi in amah a ding in lemna bawlna dia pomsak ahi ding.
03001005	Toupa ma ah bawngtal agou dia; Aaron tapa, siampute'n asisan alan ding ua, sisan in kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul a maitam atheh ding uhi.
03001006	Haltum thillat vun alip dia, asemnen ding ahi.
03001007	Siampu Aaron tapate'n maitam ah mei akoih ding ua, mei tung ah sing achiangkhawm ding uhi.
03001008	Aaron tapa siampute'n sabakte, alute leh athaute maitam a mei tung ah sing ah kilawmtak in akoih ding uhi.
03001009	Asungkuate leh akhete tui in asil ding ua; siampu in Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a lat halmang thillat ding in apum in maitam ah ahal ding ahi.
03001010	“Athillat, halmang thillat ding aganhon lak ate, belam hiam, kel hiam ahihleh apa, gensiatbei alan ding ahi.
03001011	Maitam sik, mallam pang ah Toupa ma ah agou dia; Aaron tapa, siampute'n maitam kimvel in sisan atheh ding uhi.
03001012	Asem ding a, alu toh, athau toh; siampu in maitam tung a mei tung a sing tung ah akoih hoih ding hi.
03001013	Asungkuate leh akhete tui in asil dia; apum in siampu in alan dia, maitam ah ahal ding hi. Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a lat halmang thillat ahi.
03001014	“ Toupa a dia thillat vasa lam halmang thillat ahihleh athillat ah vakhute hiam, vapalnoute hiam alan ding ahi.
03001015	Siampu in maitam ah ahon tawi dia, alu ahektan dia, maitam ah ahal ding. Asisan maitam pang ah atakkangsak ding ahi.
03001016	Agongkholh amul toh alakhe dia, maitam kiang, suahlam pang a meivu koihna mun ah apai ding hi.
03001017	Akhate abottol dia, atak botzak lou in siampu in maitam a mei tung ah ahal ding; huai Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a lat halmang thillat ahi.
03002001	“Huan kuapeuh in Toupa kiang a thillat, tangbuang thillat alat chiang in, athillat tangbuang nel dimdem ahi ding ahi. Sathau abuak dia, atung ah begaw akoih lai ding ahi.
03002002	Aaron tapa siampute kiang ah apaipih dia; ama'n apham khat in huai a tangbuang nel dimdem, asathau toh, abegaw tengteng toh alakhe ding a, siampu in maitam tung ah theihgigena, Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a thillat ding in ahal ding hi.
03002003	Tangbuang thillat bangte Aaron leh atapate a ding ahi ding. Huai Toupa a dia mei a thillatte a thil siangthoupen ahi.
03002004	“Tangbuang thillat, akanna a kan thillat na latleh, tangbuang nel dimdem, sathau a mek silngou soh louh tanghou hiam, sathau a zut, silngou soh louh tanghou pei hiam ahi ding ahi.
03002005	“Na thillat, kuang a kan tangbuang thillat ahihleh, silngou soh louh, sathau a mek, tangbuang nel dimdem ahi ding hi.
03002006	Na phelkhap ding a, sathau a na buah ding ahi. Huai tangbuang thillat ahi.
03002007	“Na thillat kan bel a kan, tangbuang thillat ahihleh tangbuang nel dimdem leh sathau a bawl ahi ding hi.
03002008	Hiai thil a bawl tangbuang thillat Toupa kiang ah na hon tawi dia; siampu kiang a lat ahi dia, ama'n maitam ah hon paipih ding hi.
03002009	Siampu in tangbuang thillat a pan theihgigena pen alakhe dia, maitam ah ahal ding. Hiai Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a thillat ahi.
03002010	Tangbuang thillat lat bangte Aaron leh atapate atuam ding ahi dia; hiai Toupa a dia mei a thillatte lak a siangthoupen ahi.
03002011	“Tangbuang thillat himhim, Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh silngou soh a bawl ding ahi kei. Toupa a dia mei a thillat ah silngou hiam, khuaizu himhim na hel ding uh ahi kei.
03002012	Gah masapen thillat bang in Toupa kiang ah na lan ding ua; gimlim dia maitam akoih ding ahi kei hi.
03002013	Na tangbuang thillat ah na Pathian thukhun chi na maih ding ahi kei. Na thillat tengteng ah chi na lat tel ding ahi.
03002014	Gah masapen tangbuang thillat Toupa kiang a na latleh na buh thak masapente, tangbuang thillat ding in tanghou pek na lan ding ahi.
03002015	Sathau na buak dia, atung ah begaw na koih ding ahi,
03002016	siampu in huai theihgigena, buh sukzan bangzah hiam toh begaw tengteng toh ahal ding ahi. Hiai Toupa a dia amei a thillat ahi.
03003001	“Huan a thillat, lemna thillat kithoihna ahih a, ganhon lak a alatleh, Toupa ma ah gensiatbei alan ding ahi.
03003002	Athillat lutung ah akhut akoih dia, kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah agou ding. Aaron tapa siampute'n maitam kimvel ah sisan atheh ding uhi.
03003003	Lemna thillat kithoihna, Toupa a dia mei a thillat alan dia, asungkua, athau leh agilbom tengteng leh,
03003004	akal nihte leh atuamthau aphuk chin a omleh asin tuam lam, akalte toh kigawm in asuah ding ahi.
03003005	Aaron tapate'n maitam ah mei a sing om tung a halmang thillat tung ah ahal ding uhi. Hiai Toupa a dia gimlimtak, mei a thillat ahi.
03003006	“Lemna thillat kithoihna a Toupa a dia athillat belamhon lak ate ahihleh, anu leng hita hen aw, apa leng hitaleh, gensiatbei ahih ding ahi.
03003007	Athillat a, belamnou alatleh Toupa ma ah alan ding ahi.
03003008	Athillat lutung ah akhut akoih ding a, kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi ah agou ding. Aaron tapate'n maitam kimvel ah asisan atheh ding uhi.
03003009	Lemna thillat kithoihnate, Toupa a dia mei a thillat alan ding ahi. Athaute leh ameibul thau mahmah atawn in, akawngguh tan in ala vek ding a; asungkua thaute, agilbom tengtengte,
03003010	akal nihte leh aphuk chin a om, atuamthau leh asin tuam alap, akalte nangawn toh asuah ding ahi.
03003011	siampu in huai maitam ah ahal dia; hiai Toupa a dia mei a thillat nek ding ansiah ahi.
03003012	“Athillat kel ahihleh Toupa ma ah alan ding ahi.
03003013	Alutung ah akhut akoih ding a, kihoupihna biakbuk kong ah agou ding. Aaron tapate'n maitam kimvel in sisan atheh ding uhi.
03003014	Athillat pen alan dia, Toupa a dia mei a thillat tak, asungkua thau leh agilbom tengteng leh,
03003015	akal nihte leh aphuk chin a om, atuamthau leh asin tuam lam, akalte toh nangawn in asuah ding ahi.
03003016	Hiai siampu in maitam ah ahal ding ahi. Gimlim dia mei a thillat nek ding ansiah ahi a; athau tengteng Toupa a tuam ahi.
03003017	Sathau hiam, sisan hiam na ne ding uh ahi kei, chih na suante uh a ding in abanban in na tenna phot uah tangtawn a dan thuseh ahi ding,” achi hi.
03004001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03004002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘ Toupa'n thilhih louh ding a thu apiakte, abangpeuh leng mi'n na hihkhial kha in, abangpeuh leng na hih taleh,
03004003	thaunilh siampu in thil ahihkhelh amipite tung a mohpaihna atunsakleh athilhihkhelhsa thoihna ding in Toupa kiang ah ganhon lak a pan bawngtuai gensiatbei, khelh thoihna ding in lan hen.
03004004	Bawng pen kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah Toupa ma ah ahon kai dia, bawng lutung ah akhut akoih dia, Toupa ma ah huai bawng agou ding ahi.
03004005	Thaunilh siampu in bawng sisan bangzah hiam ala dia, kihoupihna biakbuk ah ahon tawi ding hi.
03004006	Siampu in sisan ah akhut adiah dia, akhenkhat Toupa ma ah, mun siangthou puanzak bul ah sagihvei atheh ding ahi.
03004007	Siampu in Toupa ma ah kihoupihna biakbuk a gimlimtak maitam kiite ah huai sisan bangzah hiam atat ding ahi. Bawng sisan tengteng kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi kiang a halmang thillat maitam bul ah asungkhe ding ahi.
03004008	Khelh thoihna bawng thau tengteng, asungkua thau leh agilbom teng leng ala vek dia;
03004009	akal nihte leh aphuk chin a om, atuamthau leh asin tuam alam, akal nihte nangawn toh asuah ding ahi.
03004010	Lemna thillat kithoihna bawngtal a kipan alak bang in, siampu in halmang thillat maitam ah ahal ding ahi.
03004011	Bawngvunte, asa tengtengte, alu toh, akhete toh, asungkuate, a-ekte,
03004012	abawng pumpi toh giahphual polam mun siang ah, vut paihna ah apaipih dia, sing tung ah ahal ding, vut paihna ahal ding ahi,’ achi hi.
03004013	“Israel omkhawm tengteng in ahihkhelh khak ua, mipi mitmuh a sel ahih a, Toupa'n hih louh ding a thu apiakte, abang mahmah ahih ua,
03004014	siam louh atan ua, athil gilou hih uh theihkhiak ahihleh, mipi in khelh thoihna ding in bawngtuai alan ding ua, kihoupihna biakbuk kong ah ahon kai ding uhi.
03004015	Upa omkhawmte'n Toupa ma ah bawng lutung ah akhut uh akoih ding ua; Toupa ma a huai bawng goh ding ahi.
03004016	Thaunilh siampu in kihoupihna biakbuk ah bawng sisan bangzah hiam ahon tawi ding hi.
03004017	Siampu in huai sisan ah akhutzung adiah dia, puanzak bul ah Toupa ma ah sagihvei atheh ding hi.
03004018	Sisan pen kihoupihna biakbuk a Toupa ma ah maitam kii ah tam lou atat dia, sisan tengteng kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi kiang a halmang thillat maitam bul ah asungkhe ding ahi.
03004019	Athau tengteng ala vek dia, maitam ah ahal ding.
03004020	Huchibang in bawng pen ahih dia; khelh thoihna bawng ahih bang geih in hiai leng ahih ding ahi. Huchi in siampu in kilemna abawl ding a, ngaihdam ahi ding uhi.
03004021	Huai bawng giahphual pua ah apaipih dia, bawng masa ahal bang in ahal ding hi. Hiai mipi a dia khelh thoihna ahi.
03004022	“Vaihawmtu in thil ahihkhelh a, Toupa a Pathian in hih louh ding a thu apiakte abang pen hiam ahihkhak a, siam louh atan a,
03004023	athil gilou hih atheihleh athillat ding in kelpa gensiatbei ahon kai ding ahi.
03004024	Kel lutung ah akhut akoih dia, Toupa ma ah halmang thillat agoh zelna uah agou ding hi. Hiai khelh thoihna ahi.
03004025	Siampu in khelh thoihna sisan akhutzung in tam lou ala dia, maitam kiite ah halmang thillat atat dia, halmang thillat maitam bul ah asisan asungkhe ding hi.
03004026	Athau tengteng, lemna thillat kithoihna thau ahal bang in maitam ah ahal ding ahi. Huchi in akhelhna tungthu ah siampu in kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
03004027	“Vantang lak a mi, akuamah mah in Toupa'n hih louh ding a thu apiakte abangmah hihkhial in, siam louh na tangleh,
03004028	athil gilou hih atheihleh athillat ding in kelnu gensiatbei, athilhihkhelhsa khelh thoihna ding in ahon kai ding hi.
03004029	“Khelh thoihna lutung ah akhut akoih dia, halmang thillatna mun ah khelh thoihna agou ding hi.
03004030	Siampu in asisan, akhutzung in tam lou ala dia, halmang thillat maitam kiite ah atat dia, asisan tengteng maitam bul ah asungkhe ding hi.
03004031	Athau tengteng lemna thillat kithoihna thau alak bang in ala vek ding hi. Siampu in Toupa a dia gimlim ding in maitam ah ahal ding ahi. Huchi in siampu in kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
03004032	“Khelh thoihna dia athillat ding belamnou ahon tawileh, anu, gensiatbei ahon tawi ding ahi.
03004033	Khelh thoihna lutung ah akhut akoih dia, halmang thillat agohna uah khelhna thoihna ding in agou ding hi.
03004034	Siampu in khelh thoihna sisan akhutzung in tam lou ala dia, halmang thillat maitam kiite ah atat dia, sisan tengteng maitam bul ah asungkhe ding hi.
03004035	Athau tengteng, belamnou thau, lemna thillat kithoihna alak bang in ala vek ding a, siampu in Toupa a dia mei a thillat bang in maitam ah ahal ding ahi. Huchi in siampu in athilhihkhelhsa tungthu ah kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
03005001	“Huan kuapeuh athil muh hiam, athil zak hiam a dia theihpih ahih a, kichiamsakmi aw azak a leng gen nuam lou a, thil ahihkhelhleh athulimlouhna moh apo ding.
03005002	“Kuapeuh in thilsiang lou himhim, gamsa siang lou luang hiam, gan siang lou luang hiam, avakthoh ganhing siang lou luang hiam thei lou a, akhoihkhakleh, siang lou leh mohtang ahi ding hi.
03005003	“Mihing leng asianlouhna bangpeuh hi hen aw, asianlouhna thei lou a, akhoihleh atheihkhiak hun in siam louh atang ding hi.
03005004	“Kuapeuh in thil hoih lou hiam, thil hoih hiam hih dia, akam a thei lou a, akichiam zialzialleh, akoi abang hitaleh, akichiam zialzialna atheihkhiak hun in siam louh atang ding hi.
03005005	“Huan hichi ahi ding a, hiai thilte khat a leng siam louh atan chiang in akhelhna apuang ding ahi.
03005006	Khelh thoihna ding in belamhon lak ah anu, belamnou hiam kel hiam, athilhihkhelhsa man ding in Toupa kiang a lat ding in khelhna thoihna ahon tawi dia; siampu in akhelh tungthu ah kilemna abawlsak ding ahi.
03005007	“Aneih in belamnou achin zoh keileh Toupa kiang a lat ding in akhelh man ding in akhelh thoihna ding in vakhu nih hiam, vapalnou hiam ahon tawi ding ahi. Khat, khelh thoihna ding in, akhat pen halmang thillat ding in.
03005008	Siampu kiang ah ahon tawi dia, ama'n khelh thoihna ding in alan masa dia, phelkhap lou in angawng ah alu ahektan ding hi.
03005009	Khelh thoihna sisan maitam pang ah tam lou atheh dia, asisan om lai teng maitam bul ah atakkangsak ding hi. Hiai khelh thoihna ahi.
03005010	Akhat pen dan dungzui in halmang thillat ding in alan dia; siampu in athilhihkhelhsa tungthu ah lemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding.
03005011	“Himahleh vakhu nih hiam, vapalnou nih hiam aneih zoh keileh akhelh man thillat ding leh khelh thoihna ding in tangbuang nel dimdem, ephah mun sawm a khen mun khat ahon tawi ding hi. Sathau a buak ding ahi kei a, atung ah begaw akoih ding ahi kei; khelh thoihna ahih ziak in.
03005012	Siampu kiang ah ahon tawi dia, siampu in theihgigena ding in apham khat ala dia, maitam tung ah Toupa a ding in mei a thillat bang in ahal ding ahi. Hiai tatlek thoihna ahi.
03005013	Huai thillak a abangmah leng ahihkhelhsa tungtang thu ah siampu in kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding. A-om lai teng tangbuang thillat bangmah in siampu tantuam ahi ding,” achi hi.
03005014	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03005015	“Kuapeuh in thil ahihkhelh a, Toupa thil siangthoute tung a akhelh khakleh, akhelh thoihna, belamhon lak a belampa gensiatbei, Mun siangthou shekel bang in, dangka shekel bangzah hiam gun a ngaih, tatlek kithoihna ding in Toupa a ding in ahon kai ding ahi.
03005016	Thil siangthou tung a ana hihdiklouh khitsa pen adin dia, amun nga a khen mun khat abehlap dia, siampu ape ding ahi. Huchi in siampu in tatlek thoihna belampa in kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding.
03005017	“Kuapeuh in thil ahihkhelh a, hih louh dia Toupa'n thu apiakte khatpeuh ahihleh, thei kei mahleh siam louh atang himhim dia, athulimlouhna moh apo ding ahi.
03005018	Belamhon lak a belampa gensiatbei, aman kilawm hun, tatlek thoihna ding in siampu kiang ah ahon kai ding ahi. Siampu in theiloupi a hihkhelh khak tungthu ah kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding.
03005019	Hiai tatlek thoihna ahi a; Toupa ma ah talek mah ahi,” achi hi.
03006001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03006002	“Kuapeuh in thil hihkhial in, Toupa thu kalh in talek taleh, sum kepsak thu ah hiam, lep thu ah hiam, guktak thu ah hiam a-invengte khem in, a-invengte zuaubawl taleh,
03006003	ahihkeileh, vanmangte mu in, khem in, zuau in kichiam taleh, hiai thil tengteng akhatpeuh leng hihkhial taleh,
03006004	hichi ahi ding a, akhial ngei ahih a, siam louh atanleh avan gukte, khem a athillakte, akiang a kepsak sumte, vanmang atopte,
03006005	zuau a kichiamna thil bangpeuh leng adit nawn ding ahi. Akim sipsip in adin nawn vek ding a, amun nga a khen mun khat val in abehlap ding. Siam louh atan ni in aneitu ape ding ahi.
03006006	Atatlek thoihna, belamhon lak a, aman kilawm hun, belampa gensiatbei tatlek thoihna ding in Toupa a ding in siampu kiang ah ahon kai ding ahi.
03006007	Siampu in Toupa ma ah kilemna abawlsak ding a, siam louh tanna ding a thil ahih peuhmah tungthu ah, ngaihdam ahi ding,” achi hi.
03006008	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03006009	“Aaron leh atapate kiang ah, hiai halmang thillat dan ding ahi. Haltum thillat pen maitam tung a, ahalna ah zankhua in azingchiang tan in a-om dia; maitam a mei akuang nilouh ding ahi.
03006010	Siampu in apuanmalngat puansilh asilh dia, asa khuhna ding in apuanmalngat khekol ateng dia; maitam a halmang thillat kangvute ala dia, maitam pang ah akoih ding ahi.
03006011	Apuansilh siangthou asuah dia, puansilh dang asilh dia, avute giahphual pua mun siangthou ah apaipih ding ahi.
03006012	Maitam tung ah mei kuansak nilouh ahi dia, amit ding ahi kei. Siampu in zingsang teng in sing akhul dia, halmang thillat akoih hoih dia, huai ah kilemna thillatte thau ahal ding ahi.
03006013	Maitam ah mei akuang gige dia, amit ding ahi kei hi.
03006014	“Hiai tangbuang thillatdan ding ahi. Aaron tapate'n maitam bul ah, Toupa ma ah alan ding uh ahi.
03006015	Ama'n apham khat in tangbuang thillat tung a begaw tengteng alakhe dia, Toupa a dia gimlimtak, theihgigena ding in maitam ah ahal ding hi.
03006016	Alak bangte Aaron leh atapate'n ane ding uhi. Huai mun siangthou ah silngou soh louh in ane ding ua; kihoupihna biakbuk kongtual ah ane ding uh ahi.
03006017	Silngou toh akan ding uh ahi kei. Mei a ka thillat atantuan ding ua ka piak ahi. Huai khelh thoihna leh tatlek thoihna bang a siangthoupen ahi.
03006018	Aaron suan pasal tengteng in anek ding uh ahi. Hiai Toupa a dia halmang thillat tungthu a na suante zel uh tan a tangtawn dan ahi ding. Kuapeuh hiaite khoih peuhmah asiangthou ding uh, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.
03006019	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03006020	“Thaunilh a, a-om ni ua, Aaron leh atapate'n Toupa kiang a alat ding uh thillat hiai ahi. Tangbuang thillat dia lat zel ding, tangbuang nel dimdem ephah sawm a khen mun khat, zingsang in akim, nitak in akim.
03006021	Sathau in kuangdai sung ah na kang dia, sathau a akidiah suak khit chiang in na hon lalut dia; na balnen dia, tangbuang thillat Toupa a dia gimlim ding in na lan ding ahi.
03006022	Atapate lak a, asik a pangmi, thaunilh siampu in alan dia; tangtawn dan thuseh ding in Toupa a dia halmang vek ding ahi.
03006023	Siampu in tangbuang thillat a lat peuhmah halmang vek ding ahi a, nek het louh ding ahi,” achi hi.
03006024	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03006025	“Hiai khelh thoihna dan ding ahi. Haltum thillat goh zelna ah khelh thoihna leng Toupa ma a goh ding ahi. Hiai thil siangthoupen ahi.
03006026	Khelh thoihna lantu siampu in ane dia; kihoupihna biakbuk kongtual ah, mun siangthou ah ane ding ahi.
03006027	Kuapeuh huai sa khoih peuhmah asiangthou ding ahi. Asisan pen bang puan peuh a theh ahihleh, abanna peuhmah mun siangthou ah na sawp ding ahi.
03006028	Ahuanna leibel pen sukkhap ding ahi. Sumbel a huan ahihleh bel nawtsiang a khuahsiang ding ahi.
03006029	Pasal siampu tengteng in huai ane ding uh ahi. Hiai thil siangthoupen ahi.
03006030	Khelh thoihna sisan, Mun Siangthou a kilemna bawlna dia kihoupihna puanin a hong kitawi pen nek ding ahi kei, mei a halmang ding ahi.
03007001	“Huchi mah bang in hiai tatlek thoihdan ding ahi. Thil siangthoupen ahi.
03007002	Haltum thillat agoh zelna ua tatlek kithoihna leng goh ding ahi a; asisan a maitam theh kimvel ding ahi.
03007003	Athau tengteng alat ding ahi. Amei thautakte, asungkua thaute,
03007004	akal nihte leh aboh thau, aphuk kiang a thau leh asin tuam lap, akalte nangawn in asuahkhe ding ahi.
03007005	Siampu in Toupa a dia mei a thillat ding in maitam tung ah ahal ding ahi. Hiai tatlek thoihna ahi.
03007006	Pasal siampu tengteng in ane ding ua; mun siangthou a nek ding ahi. Hiai thil siangthoupen ahi.
03007007	“Tatlek thoihna pen khelh thoihna mah bang ahi a, dan khat ahi. Kilepna bawltu siampu in huai atang ding hi.
03007008	Siampu, kuapeuh halmang thillat latsaktu siampu ngei in halmang thillat dia alat vun apum tan ding ahi.
03007009	Akanna a kan tangbuang thillat peuhmah, sikbel a kan leh kuang a kan tengteng alantu siampu atuam ding ahi.
03007010	Tangbuang thillat tengteng sathau a mek leng, agaw leng adang mah bang in Aaron tapa tengteng akihawm dialdial ding uh ahi.
03007011	“Hiai pen mi'n Toupa kiang a alat ding, lemna thillat a kithoihdan ding ahi.
03007012	Kipahthu genna dia alatleh kipahthu genna kithoihna ding in sathau a zut, silngou soh louh tanghou leh sathau a zut silngou soh louh tanghou pa didekte leh sathau a mek tangbuang nel mahmah kidiah suak a lat tel ding ahi.
03007013	“Kipahthu genna dia lemna thillat kithoihna ah tanghou silngou soh alat tel ding ahi.
03007014	Huai athillat teng a Toupa a dia vei thillat a ding in khat chiat alan dia; lemna thillat sisan a thehtu siampu a tuam ding ahi.
03007015	Kipahthu genna dia alemna thillat kithoihna sa pen thillat alat ni mah a nekgaih ding ahi. Azingchiang tan a bangmah asit ding ahi kei.
03007016	“Himahleh athillat kithoihna pen thuchiam hiam, amah ut thu a thillat hiam ahihleh kithoihna alat ni mah a nek ding ahi a; nek bang azingchiang a nek ding ahi.
03007017	Himahleh kithoihna sa, ani thum ni tan a-om lailaileh hal ding ahi.
03007018	Alemna thillat kithoihna sa ani thum ni tan a anek uleh, pomsak ahi kei dia, alantu leng alan a sim ahi kei ding. Thilkihhuai ahi dia, kuapeuh ane in athulimlouhna moh uh apo ding hi.
03007019	Thilsiang lou himhim toh kisukha sa nek ding ahi kei, hal ding ahi. Sa siang peuhmah nek ding ahi.
03007020	Himahleh lemna thillat kithoihna sa, Toupa a tuam, siang lou nemi achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
03007021	Kuapeuh in thilsiang lou himhim, misiang lou hiam, gan siang lou hiam, thilkihhuai siang lou himhim akhoih a, lemna thillat kithoihna sa, Toupa a tuam anekleh huai mi achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi, chi in Aaron leh atapate houpih in,” achi hi.
03007022	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03007023	“Bawng hiam, belam hiam, kel hiam thau na ne ding uh ahi kei.
03007024	Amah sih a si thau leh gamsa balzan thau thil dang a dia zat ding ahi. Na ne himhim ding uh ahi kei.
03007025	Kuapeuh, Toupa a dia mi'n mei thillat alat uh sathau nemi, achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
03007026	Na tenna peuh uah sisan himhim, vasa hiam, gamsa hiam sisan hiam na ne ding uh ahi kei.
03007027	Kuapeuh hitaleh, sisan ne himhim achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi, chi in Israel suante houpih in,” achi hi.
03007028	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03007029	“ Toupa kiang a lemna thillat kithoihna lan peuhmah in, Toupa a dia athillat, alemna thillat kithoihna a pan ahong lat ding ahi.
03007030	Toupa a dia mei a thillat amah khut mahmah in ahon tawi ding a; athau leh a-awm ahon la ding ahi; a-awm pen Toupa ma a vei thillat ding a vei ahihtheihna ding in.
03007031	Siampu in maitam ah athau ahal dia, a-awm bel Aaron leh atapate a tuam ding ahi.
03007032	Aliang taklam pen kilemna thillat kithoihna a pan vei thillat dia siampu na piak ding uh ahi.
03007033	Aaron tapate lak a lemna thillat sisan leh thau lantu kuapeuh in atantuan ding in aliang taklam atang ding ahi.
03007034	A-awm leh aliang avei lel pen uh Israel suante a lemna thillat kithoihna a pan ka la tuam a, Israel suante tangtawn dan thuseh ding in siampu Aaron leh atapate ka pia ahi, chi in Israel suante kiang ah gen in,” achi hi.
03007035	Hiai ahi, siampu nasem dia Toupa kiang a lat ahih nungsiah Toupa a dia mei a thillat a pan Aaron tantuan leh atapate tantuan ding,
03007036	amau thau anilh ni a Israel suante'n dan thuseh a apiak gige ding ua Toupa'n thu apiak. Hiai tangtawn a asuan hong om zel dingte tan a ahihdan ding uh ahi.
03007037	Hiai ahi halmang thillat, tangbuang thillat, khelh thoihna leh tatlek kithoihna dan.
03007038	Sinai gamdai a Israel suante'n thillat Toupa kiang a alat ding ua thu apiak ni a Sinai Tang a Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak ahi.
03008001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03008002	“Aaron atapate toh pi inla, puansilhte, nilhchi sathau, khelh thoihna bawngtalte, belampa nihte, tanghou silngou soh louh bawm khat toh tawi inla,
03008003	Omkhawmte tengteng kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi kim ah paikhawmsak in,” achi hi.
03008004	Toupa'n thu apiak bang in Mosi in ahih a; omkhawmte tengteng kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi kim ah a-omkhawm uhi.
03008005	Mosi in omkhawmte kiang ah, “Hiai ahi, Toupa'n hih dia ahon thupiak pen,” achi hi.
03008006	Mosi in Aaron leh atapate ahon pi a, tui in amaute asil hi.
03008007	Puanak asilhsak a, kawnggakna in agak a, puanaktual asilhsak a, siampu puanak in atuam a, siampu puanak gakna siamtak a gat in agak a, huai in agakbelh hi.
03008008	Awmtuamna athuah a, awmtuamna ah Urim leh Thummim akoih hi.
03008009	Dial akhimsak a, dial tung ah dangka-eng sikpek abulh a, huai mailam ah Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in siampu lukhu siangthou akilhbelh hi.
03008010	Mosi in nilhchi sathau ala a, biakbuk leh asung a thil om tengteng anilh a, asiangthousak chiat hi.
03008011	Huai mah in sagihvei maitam atheh a, maitam leh atui-um belsuan tengteng, maiphiatna kuang leh atunna siangthousak ding in anilh hi.
03008012	Huai sathau Aaron lu ah abuak a asianthouna ding in anilh hi.
03008013	Mosi in Aaron tapate ahon pi a, puanak sungsilh tualte asilhsak a, kawnggakna in agak a, Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in dial akhimsak hi.
03008014	Khelh thoihna bawngtal ahon kai a, Aaron leh atapate'n khelh thoihna ding bawngtal lutung ah akhut uh akoih uhi.
03008015	Agou a; Mosi in asisan ala a, huai maitam a dia kilemna bawlna ding in akhutzung in maitam kii ah akimvel in atat a, maitam asiangsak a, maitam bul ah sisan sung in asiangthousak hi.
03008016	Agilbom tengteng, asin, alap, akal nihte leh athau ala a, maitam tung ah Mosi in ahal hi.
03008017	Bawngtal pen avun toh, asa toh, a-ek toh giahphual pua ah ahal hi; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in.
03008018	Haltum thillat belampa pen alan a, Aaron leh atapate'n belampa lutung ah akhut uh akoih uhi.
03008019	Agou a, Mosi in maitam sisan in akimvel in atheh hi.
03008020	Belampa asem a, alu, asemnente leh athau ahal hi.
03008021	Asungkua leh akhete asil a; belampa pen maitam ah avek in ahal hi. Huai gimlim dia halmang thillat ahi a; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Toupa a dia mei a thillat ahi.
03008022	Belampa dang, hihtuamna belampa pen ahon la nawn a, Aaron leh atapate'n belampa lutung ah akhut uh akoih uhi.
03008023	Mosi in agou a, asisan ala a, Aaron bil taklam dawn, akhut taklam khutpi leh akhe taklam khepi anuh hi.
03008024	Mosi in Aaron tapate api a, abil taklam dawn, akhut taklam khutpi, akhe taklam khepi anuh a, maitam sisan in akimvel ah atheh hi.
03008025	Athaute, amei thau, agilbom tengteng asin tuam pen alapte, akal nih leh athau leh aliang taklam ala hi:
03008026	Toupa ma a tanghou silngou soh louh bawm a pan tanghou silngou soh louh khat leh sathau a mek tanghou pei khat leh tanghou peipa'n khat ala a, thau tung leh aliang taklam tung ah akoih hi.
03008027	Avek in Aaron khutpek tung ah leh atapate khutpek tung ah akoih a, Toupa ma ah vei thillat ding in avei hi.
03008028	Mosi in akhut a pan ala a, halmang thillat tung ah maitam ah ahal hi. Huai gimlim dia ahihtuamna ahi. Toupa a dia mei a thillat ahi.
03008029	Mosi in a-awm ala a, Toupa ma ah vei thillat in avei a; hihtuamna belampa Mosi tantuam ahi, Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in.
03008030	Mosi in nilhchi sathau a pan tam lou leh maitam asisan tam lou ala a, huai in Aaron leh apuansilhte atheh a; atapate leh atapate puansilhte leng atheh hi. Aaron leh apuansilh ahihsiangthou a, atapate leh atapate puansilhte leng ahihsiangthou hi.
03008031	Mosi in Aaron leh atapate kiang ah, “Kihoupihna puanin kongpi bul ah sa huan unla, Aaron leh atapate'n anek ding uh ahi, chi a thu ka piak bang in, huai ah hihtuamna bawm a tanghou toh ne uhen.
03008032	Sa leh tanghou nekbangte na hal ding uh ahi.
03008033	Na kihihtuamna ni uh achin masiah kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi pawtsan lou in ni sagih na om ding uh ahi. Ni sagih sung nou hon hihtuam ding ahi ngal a.
03008034	Tuni a ahihsa bang in, nou a dia kilemna hon bawlsak ding in Toupa'n thu apeta hi.
03008035	Huaiziak in kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah ni sagih, sun leh zan in na om nilouh ding ua, na sihlouhna ding ua Toupa thupiak na zuih ding uh ahi; huchibang ding a thu piak ahi,” achi hi.
03008036	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi zang a ahih ding ua thu apiak tengteng Aaron leh atapate'n ahih uhi.
03009001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani giat ni in Mosi in Aaron leh atapate leh Israel upate asam hi.
03009002	Aaron kiang ah, “Khelh thoihna ding in bawngnoupa leh halmang thillat ding in belampa gensiatbei tuaktuak kai inla, Toupa ma ah lan in,” achi hi.
03009003	“Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Khelh thoihna ding in kelpa, halmang thillat ding in bawngnou leh belamnou kum khat a upa tuaktuak gensiatbei tuak
03009004	leh bawngtal leh belampa, sathau a mek tangbuang thillat toh Toupa ma a lemna thillat a lat ding in hon kai un.’ Tuni in na kiang uah Toupa ahong kilang ding hi, chi in hilh in,” achi hi.
03009005	Mosi in thu apiak bang in kihoupihna biakbuk kong ah ahon kai ua; Toupa ma ah omkhawmte tengteng in ava naih ua, ava dingh uhi.
03009006	Mosi in, “Hiai ahi na hih ding ua Toupa'n thu ahon piak, na lak uah Toupa thupina ahong kilang ding,” achi hi.
03009007	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah, “Maitam hon naih inla, na khelh thoihna leh na halmang thillat lan inla, nang a ding leh mipite a ding in kilemna bawl in. Mipite thillat pen lan inla, amau a ding in kilemna bawl in, Toupa thupiak bang in,” achi hi.
03009008	Aaron in maitam ava naih a, amah a tuam khelh thoihna bawngnou agou hi.
03009009	Aaron tapate'n akiang ah sisan ahon tawi ua, huai sisan ah akhutzung adiah a, maitam kiite ah atat a, sisan pen maitam bul ah asung hi.
03009010	Himahleh, khelh thoihna thau, akalte leh asin tuam pen lapte, Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in maitam tung ah ahal hi.
03009011	Asa leh avun giahphual pua ah ahal hi.
03009012	Haltum thillat pen agou a; Aaron tapate'n asisan apia ua, ama'n maitam kimvel in atheh hi.
03009013	Haltum thillat sabakte leh alu apia ua, ama'n maitam ah ana hal hi.
03009014	Asungkuate leh akhete asil a, maitam ah halmang thillat tung ah ahal hi.
03009015	Mipite thillat pen alan a, mipite khelh thoihna kel akai a, agou a, ama a mah bang in khelh thoihna ding in alan hi.
03009016	Haltum thillat alan a, adan bang in alan hi.
03009017	Tangbuang thillat alan a, huai a pan pham khat ala a, zingsang a halmang thillat chih louh leng maitam ah ahal lai hi.
03009018	Mipite atuam dia lemna thillat kithoihna bawngtal leh belampa leng agou a, Aaron tapate'n asisan apia ua, maitam kimvel ah atheh hi.
03009019	Bawngtal thau leh belampa thau, amei thau, agilbomte, akalte, asin tuam pen alapte leng apia uhi.
03009020	Athau pen a-awmte tung ah akoih a, ama'n athau pen maitam ah ahal hi.
03009021	A-awm leh aliang taklam pen, Mosi thupiak bang in Aaron in Toupa ma ah vei thillat ding in avei hi.
03009022	Aaron in mipi lam ah aban azak a, avek un avualzawl hi. Khelh thoihna, halmang thillat leh lemna thillat alat zoh in ahong paisuk hi.
03009023	Kihoupihna puanin ah Mosi leh Aaron ava lut ua, ahong pawtkhe nawn ua, mipite avualzawl uhi. Toupa thupina mi tengteng kiang ah ahong kilang hi.
03009024	Toupa ma a pan mei ahong pawtkhia a, halmang thillat leh thaute maitam ah akangtumta hi. Mipi tengteng in huai amuh un akikou zuazua ua, lei si in abokkhup uhi.
03010001	Huan Aaron tapa Nadab leh Abihute'n amei lakna uh ala tuak ua, huai ah mei-am akoih ua, gimlim abuak ua, Toupa thupiak louhpi in Ama ah mei zat louh chi alan uhi.
03010002	Toupa ma a pan mei ahong pawtkhia a, amau akanglum a, Toupa ma ah asita uhi.
03010003	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah, “Kei hon naih mite ah ka siangthou ding a, mipi tengteng ma ah thupisak in ka om ding, chi a Toupa'n agentak hiai ahi,” achi a, Aaron adai dide hi.
