03010004	Mosi in Aaron paneu Uzziel tapate, Mishael leh Elzaphan asam a, akiang uah, “Mun siangthou mai a pan giahphual polam ah na unaute uh pokhia un,” achi hi.
03010005	Amau ahong pai nai ua, Mosi gen bang in a-unaute uh puanaktual in giahphual polam ah apokhia uh.
03010006	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah leh atapa Eleazar leh Ithamar kiang ah, “Na sam uh khah kei unla, na puante uh leng botkek kei un, huchi lou in zaw na si kha ding ua; mi tengteng tung ah Toupa athangpai kha ding. Himahleh na unaute uh leh Israel inkote teng in ahihleh Toupa'n mei a ahihmanthatte asuun thei ding uhi.
03010007	Kihoupihna puanin kongpi a pan na pawt ding uh ahi kei. Huchi lou in zaw na si ding uh. Toupa sathau nilhchi na tung uah a-om ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in Mosi thu bang in ahihta uhi.
03010008	Toupa'n Aaron ahoupih a,
03010009	“Nang hiam, na tapate hiam in leng, kihoupihna biakbuk sung a na lut chiang un, zu leh dawn theih hat himhim dawn kei un, huchi lou in zaw na si ding uh. Hiai na suan zelte uh tan a tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
03010010	Huai bel asiangthou leh siangthou lou, asiang leh siang lou na khentheihna ding uleh;
03010011	Toupa'n Mosi zang a akiang ua agen, thupiak tengteng Israel suante na sinsak theihna ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
03010012	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah leh atapa dam lai Eleazar leh Ithamar kiang ah, “ Toupa a dia mei a thillat a tangbuang thillat lat bangte la unla, maitam bul ah silngou tel lou in ne un; hiai thil siangthoupen ahi ngal a.
03010013	Toupa a dia mei a thillat a nang a tuam leh na tapate a tuam ahih ziak in mun siangthou ah na ne ding uhi. Huchibang a thupiak a om ka hi.
03010014	A-awm vei leh aliang taklam vei pen mun siang ah na ne ding uh; nang leh na tapate leh na tanute toh; Israel suante lemna thillat kithoihna nang a tuam leh na tapate a dia seh ahi ngal a.
03010015	Aliang vei leh a-awm vei pen Toupa ma a vei thillat dia vei ding in mei a thillat thau toh ahon tawi ding uh ahi. Huai nang leh na tapate toh, tangtawn a nou a tuam ding ahi; Toupa thupiak bang in,” achi hi.
03010016	Mosi in khelh thoihna kel pen ngenteltak in azong a, ngai dih, ana hal khin tham uh ahi a; huchi in Aaron tapa dam lai, Eleazar leh Ithamar tung ah ahehta hi.
03010017	“Bangziak a khelh thoihna mun siangthou a ne lou na hi ua? Thil siangthou, mipi omkhawmte thulimlouhna po dia Toupa ma a lemna bawlsakna dia nou ahon piak ahi ngal a.
03010018	Ngai dih ua, asisan pen mun siangthou ah laklut ahi kei a, thu ka hon piak bang a mun siangthou a na nek ngeingei ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
03010019	Aaron in Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai dih, tuni in Toupa ma ah akhelh thoihna uh leh ahalmang thillat uh alan uhi. Hichibang thilte lah ka tung ah ahong omta ngal a; tuni in khelh thoihna ana ne taleng, Toupa mitmuh in pom in a-om dia hia?” achi hi.
03010020	Mosi in huai azak in alungkimta hi.
03011001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
03011002	“Israel suante houpih unla, leitung a gamsa tengteng lak a na nek ding uh gamsa hiaite ahi uh.
03011003	Gamsa khechin nih a ka paisuak, eknel hai peuhmah na ne thei ding uh.
03011004	Himahleh eknel hai hiam, khechin nih a ka paisuak hiam lak ah hiaite zaw na ne ding uh ahi kei. Sangawngsau in eknel haileh leng, achin akat louh ziak in; nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011005	Zupi, eknel ahai na a, himahleh achin akat louh ziak in nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011006	Zusapi, eknel ahai na a, himahleh achin akat louh ziak in, nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011007	Vok, achin aka paisuak na a, himahleh eknel ahai louh ziak in; nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011008	Asa uh na ne ding uh ahi kei, aluang uh leng na khoih ding uh ahi kei, nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011009	“Tui sung a tengte lak ah hiaite na ne thei ding uh: Tuipite leh luite a om kha leh lip nei photphot na ne thei ding uhi.
03011010	Tui sung a tengte leh tui a thil hing om tengteng lak ah tuipi ate, lui ate, kha leh lip nei lou photphot nou a ding in thilkihhuai ahi.
03011011	Nou a ding in thilkihhuai ahi ding ua; asa uh na ne ding uh ahi kei. Aluangte uh thilkihhuai a na neih ding uh ahi.
03011012	Tui a kha leh lip nei lou photphot zaw nou a ding in thilkihhuai ahi.
03011013	“Vasa lak ah hiaite thilkihhuai a na neih ding uh ahi a; nek ding ahi kei. Thilkihhuai ahi uh: muvanlai, musane leh tuivapi.
03011014	Muvompi leh musi chi himhimte.
03011015	Va-ak leh achi himhimte.
03011016	Simbu, vabak, tuipi vasate leh mu chi himhimte.
03011017	Simbutanglip, ngagal leh simbupi.
03011018	Tuivapi, vabukngak leh musanepi,
03011019	Intung vasa, dil vasa leh achi himhim, huihtun leh bakte.
03011020	“Kha nei khe li a pai chi peuhmah nou a ding in thilkihhuai ahi.
03011021	Himahleh aleng thei ganhing neu pawl khat na nek theih ding uh a-om. Huaite ahihleh lei lak a tawm thei kheguh tang neite ahi uhi.
03011022	Hiaite lak a na nek theih dingte uh, khaupe chi himhim, kelkum, khuangbai ahihkeileh khaukhup.
03011023	Himahleh kha nei, khe li nei dangte peuhmah nou a ding in kihhuai ahi vek uhi.
03011024	“Hiaite ziak in siang lou na suak thei uhi. Kuapeuh hiai ganhing siang lou sisa toh kisukha peuhmah nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03011025	Kuapeuh huai luang lami peuhmah in apuante uh asawp ding uh ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uh.
03011026	Gamsa chin ka paisuak lou, eknel leng hai lou chi tengteng nou a ding in siang lou ahi ua; kuapeuh huaite khoih siang lou ahi ding.
03011027	Bokvak a pai tengteng lak a khebom a pai peuhmahte nou a ding in siang lou ahi a; aluang uh khoih peuhmah nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03011028	Aluang lami peuhmah in apuante asawp ding ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding a; nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011029	“Lei a vakthoh chi lak a nou a dia siang lou hiaite ahi: Bui, chikpi, thankikpi leh achi himhim.
03011030	Inhik, tangteuh, thankik, dokdawn leh zusa.
03011031	Avakthoh chi tengteng lak a nou a dia siang lou hiaite ahi uh. Kuapeuh hiaite sisa akhoih uleh nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03011032	Asih ua bangpeuh adelhkhum uh, siang lou ahi dia; vanzat photphot sing a bawl tui-um belsuan hiam, puan hiam, savun hiam, sai-ip hiam leng tui a diah ding ahi a; nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding. Huai khit in ahong siang ding hi.
03011033	Akiakna peuh leibel chih na hihtam ding uh ahi, asung a om tengteng siang lou ahi ding uh.
03011034	Huai bel a nek chi om tengteng leh huai a om tui a diahsa himhim siang lou ahi dia; dawn chi, dawn theih chi tengteng leng huai bel sung a om himhim siang lou ahi ding.
03011035	Thil bangpeuh asiluang a kahiang khatpeuh in adelhkhum phot siang lou ahi zel dia; tanghou kanna hiam, kan lumna bel hiam leng hihtap vek ding ahi, siang lou ahi khin a, nou a ding in siang lou ahi ding.
03011036	Himahleh tuikhuk hiam, tuibem, tui tamtak omna siang lou chih a-om kei, himahleh asiluang in asuk khak peuhmah siang lou ahi ding.
03011037	Chin ding haichi himhim zaw siluang in bang lai peuh in delhkhum taleh asiang lou kei hi.
03011038	Himahleh haichi, tui a diahsa siluang in koi lai peuh adelh khakleh nou a ding in siang lou ahi.
03011039	“Gamsa na nek theih chi himhim uh leng asihleh aluang khoihmi peuhmah nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03011040	Asa ne peuhmah in apuante uh asawp ding uh ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding. Aluang lami in leng apuante asawp ding ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03011041	“Ganhing leitung a bokvak chi tengteng thilkihhuai ahi ua, nek ding ahi kei.
03011042	Akitholh chi leh khe li a pai chi hiam, khe tampi nei chi hiam, leitung a bokvak chi himhim na ne ding uh ahi kei, thilkihhuai ahi ngal ua.
03011043	Bokvak chi himhim in na kihihthanghuai ding uh ahi kei, hiaite in na kihihbuah ding uh ahi kei, huaite in siang lou in na kibawl ding uh ahi kei hi.
03011044	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi ngal a; huaiziak in, kisiangsak unla, siangthou in om un; kei lah ka siangthou ngal a. Leitung a teng, abok a vak, abangchi mah in kihihbuah kei un.
03011045	Na Pathian uh hi ding a Aigupta gam a kipan noute hon pikhia Toupa lah ka hi ngal a. Kei ka siangthou a, huaiziak in, nou leng na siangthou ding uh ahi.
03011046	“Hiai pen gamsa leh vasate leh tui a teng chi thil hing chiteng leh lei a bokvak chitengte tungthu a dan ding ahi.
03011047	Asiang leh siang lou khenna ding leh gamsa nek theih chi leh gamsa nek theih louh chi khenna ding in, chi in,” achi hi.
03012001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03012002	“Israel suante kiang ah, numei in nau apai a, tapa aneihleh ni sagih sung siang lou ahi dia; numei dan ngeina hun lai a asian louh bang in siang lou ahi ding hi.
03012003	Ani giat ni in atapa zekmong vun asum ding ahi.
03012004	Sisan ziak a kisiangsak in ni sawmthum-le-thum a-om lai ding ahi. Akisiansak ni akim mateng thilsiang himhim akhoih ding ahi kei a; mun siangthou ah leng alut ding ahi sam kei hi.
03012005	“Nau numei aneihleh bel numei dan ngeina hun lai a asian louh bang in nipikal nih sung siang lou ahi dia, sisan ziak a kisiangsak in ni sawmguk-le-guk a-om lai ding ahi.
03012006	“Tapa hiam, tanu hiam ziak a kisiansak ni akim chiang in halmang thillat ding in belamnou kum khat a upa leh khelh thoihna ding in vapalnou hiam, vakhu hiam kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah siampu kiang ah ahon tawi ding ahi:
03012007	Ama'n Toupa ma ah alan ding a, kilemna abawlsak dia, huchi in asisan pawtna a pan asiang ding. Hiai pen pasal hiam, numei hiam neinu a dia dan ahi.
03012008	“Aneih in belamnou achin keileh vakhu kop khat hiam, vapalnou kop khat hiam atawi ding ahi: Khat halmang thillat ding in, akhat pen khelh thoihna ding in. Siampu in kilemna abawlsak dia, huchi in ahong siangta ding, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
03013001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
03013002	“Mi vun a, akhem hiam, abol hiam, phak hileh kilawm akimuhleh siampu Aaron kiang ah hiam, atapa siampute lak a kua pen hiam kiang api ding ahi.
03013003	Siampu in avun a hii pen ana en dia, ahii omna amul akan a, ahii pen avun sang a thukzaw a akimuhleh phak ahi a, siampu in amah ana en dia, misiang lou in apuang ding ahi.
03013004	Avun a bolte akan a, avun sang a thukzaw a akimuh keileh, amul akan keileh hii nei mi pen siampu in ni sagih sung akhumtuam ding hi.
03013005	Siampu in ani sagih ni in amah a-en dia; ngai dih, ahii pen angeingei a amuh a, ahii pen avun a azamzak keileh siampu in ni sagih mah akhumtuam nawn ding hi.
03013006	Siampu in ni sagih ni in a-en nawn dia; ngai dih, hii pen amial a, hii pen avun a azamzak keileh siampu in asiang chih apuang ding ahi. Akhem lel ahi a, apuante asawp dia, ahong siang ding hi.
03013007	Himahleh asiansakna ding a siampu aki-etsak nung a akhem pen avun a azamzak luatleh siampu aki-ensak nawn ding ahi:
03013008	Siampu in a-en dia, ngai in, akhem pen avun a azamzakleh siampu in siang lou chih apuang dia, hiai phak ahi.
03013009	“Mi'n phak hii avomleh siampu kiang a pi ding ahi;
03013010	Siampu in ana en dia, ngai dih, avun a akang a-om khiak a, amul akansak a, abawk dulh hethutleh,
03013011	asa a phak kumlui om ahi a, siampu in siang lou ahi chih apuang dia, himahleh amah siang lou ahih ziak a khumtuam ding ahi kei hi.
03013012	Aphak pen avun a azamzak mahmah a, ahii veimi vun, alu a pan akhe tan a siampu theih chiang phak in abopleh, siampu'n a-en ding hi.
03013013	Ngai dih, phak in asa tengteng abop suaksa ahihleh, hii veimi asiang chih apuang dia, akang khinta a, asiangta hi.
03013014	Himahleh asa adulh hethutleh, siang lou ahi dia,
03013015	Siampu in asa dulh hethut a-en dia, siang lou in apuang ding hi. Sa dulh hethut pen siang lou ahi a, phak ahi.
03013016	Himahleh sa dulh hethut pen ana lamdan nawn a, ana kan nawnleh siampu kiang ah ahoh ding hi.
03013017	Siampu in ana en dia; ngai dih, ahii akanleh siampu in hii veimi asiang lou kei chih apuang ding hi. Amah asiangta hi.
03013018	“Asa leh avun a om meimatum ahi a, adamta hi.
03013019	Ameimatum omna mun ana kan a na san hiam, kang san deuh a na bol hiam ahihleh, siampu in a-et ding ahi.
03013020	Siampu in ana en dia, ngai dih, avun sang a thukzaw a akimuh a, amul akanleh siampu in siang lou in apuang ding ahi: phak hii ahi a, meimatum hong suakkhia ahi.
03013021	Himahleh siampu in ana et a, ngai dih, mul kang a-om louh a, amial sim phet ahihleh, siampu in ni sagih akhumtuam ding a:
03013022	Avun a azamzakleh siampu in siang lou in apuang ding hi.
03013023	Himahleh abol ngou pen a-omna ngei a om a, azamzak keileh meimatum pawn lel ahi a; siampu in asiangthou chih apuang ding ahi.
03013024	“Ahihkeileh avun polna mun asa a-om a, akang hiam, asan sim hiam ahihkeileh angouleh,
03013025	siampu in ana en dia, ngai dih, apolna laitak a mul pen akan a, huchi avun sang a thukzaw a akimuhleh phak ahi a, meikat ahong omkhia phak ahi a, siampu in siang lou in apuang ding ahi, hiai phak hii ahi.
03013026	Himahleh siampu in ana et a, ngai dih, apol a mul kang om lou a, avun sang a thuk lou zaw a, mial deuh lel ahihleh siampu in ni sagih akhumtuam ding ahi.
03013027	Siampu in ni sagih ni in amah a-en dia, avun a azamzak luatleh siampu in asiang lou in apuang ding hi, hiai phak hii ahi.
03013028	Apol pen a-omna ngei a ana omdet a, vun a azamzak keileh, mial deuh lel ahihleh meikat bawk lel ahi a, siampu in asiang chih apuang ding ahi; meikang pawn lel ahi.
03013029	“Numei hiam, pasal hiam in alu ah hiam, akhamul lak ah hiam hii aveileh
03013030	Siampu in hii pen ana en dia; ngai dih, avun sang a thukzaw a akimuh a, amul eng ngattak a-omleh siampu in siang lou in apuang ding ahi; meima sungtum ahi a, alu hiam akhamul hiam phak ahi.
03013031	Siampu in meima sungtum hii pen a-et a, ngai dih, avun sang a thuk lou zaw a akimuh a, amul vom a-om keileh siampu in meima sungtum hii veimi pen ni sagih akhumtuam ding hi.
03013032	Ni sagih ni in siampu in hii a-en dia, ngai dih, meima sungtum azamzak louh a, mul eng a-om keileh, meima sungtum a vun sang a thukzaw a akimuh keileh,
03013033	met ding ahi a, meima sungtum laitak bel amet ding ahi kei; siampu in meima sungtum neimi ni sagih dang akhumtuam nawn ding ahi.
03013034	Ni sagih ni in siampu in meima sungtum a-en nawn dia; ngai dih, meima sungtum pen avun a azak louh a, avun sang a thukzaw a akimuh keileh, siampu in siang in apuang ding ahi. Huchi in apuante asawp dia, ahong siangta ding hi.
03013035	Himahleh meima sungtum pen akisiansak nung a, avun a azamzak luatleh,
03013036	siampu in amah ana en dia, ngai dih, meima sungtum pen avun a, azamzakleh, siampu a ding in mul eng zon akiphamoh chitchiat kei ding; amah siang lou ahi.
03013037	Himahleh meima sungtum pen angeingei a amuh a, mul vom apouleh, meima sungtum adamta ahi a, amah a siang a, siampu in asiang, chih apuang ding hi.
03013038	“Numei hiam, pasal hiam, avun ah pol, pol ngou kilhkelh ana omleh,
03013039	siampu in a-en dia, ngai dih, avun a pol pen mialngou sim lel ahihleh pol lel ahi a, vun a hong suak ahi a, amah asiang hi.
03013040	“Asam pulhsiang mi lugiau ahi; himahleh amah asiang hi.
03013041	Asip sam apulh siangleh talkolh ahi a, himahleh amah asiang hi.
03013042	Himahleh lugiau hiam, talkolh hiam ah, hii san sim a ngou a-omleh, alugiau hiam, atalkolh hiam phak ahi.
03013043	Huchi in siampu in ana en dia, ngai dih, alugiau hiam, atalkolh hiam a hii hong bawkkhia pen asan simleh ngou sim hethut a, avun a phak bang akimuhleh,
03013044	amah phak ahi a, siang lou ahi. Siampu in siang lou a apuan ngeingei ding ahi, alu ah phakna a-om hi.
03013045	“Phak hii veimi puante bohkek ahi dia, asamte khah ahi dia, amuk tunglam atuam dia, siang lou, siang lou, chi in akikou ding ahi.
03013046	Phak in abop sung teng siang lou ahi dia; siang lou ahi a, atengtuam dia; giahphual pua ah ateng ding hi.
03013047	“Phak hii omna puansilh, samul puan hiam, khauzang ngat puan hiam;
03013048	agatthoh hiam, aphanthoh hiam; khauzang ngat hiam, samul hiam, savun hiam, bangpeuh savun a bawl ah hiam; savun hiam, bangpeuh savun a bawl ah hiam, savun hiam,
03013049	gat ah hiam, phan ah hiam, bangpeuh savun a bawl ah hiam ahing sim hiam a adawkkhiakleh, phak hii ahi a, siampu in a-en ding hi.
03013050	Siampu in hii a-en dia, hii omna ni sagih akhumtuam ding hi.
03013051	Ni sagih ni in hii a-en dia, hii pen puansilh, gat ah hiam, phan ah hiam, savun ah hiam, bang ding peuh a leng azat uh savunte ah hiam, azamleh hii pen phakkip mahmah chi ahihleh siang lou ahi.
03013052	Puansilh, gatthoh hiam, phanthoh hiam, samul hiam, khauzang ngat hiam, savun a bawl chi himhim hiam, phak omna peuhmah hal ding ahi; phakkip mahmah chi ahi ngal a, hal ngeingei ding ahi.
03013053	“Siampu in ana et a, huchi a, ngai dih, puansilh, gat hiam, phan hiam, savun a bawl chi himhim ah leng hii pen azam keileh
03013054	hii omna siampu in sawp ding thu ape dia, ni sagih dang akhumtuam nawn ding hi.
03013055	Hii omna sawp ahih khit nung in siampu in ana en nawn dia, ngai dih, huai hii latdan akikhek keileh hii pen zam kei mahleh, asiang tuan kei, mei a na hal ding ahi; akipchi ahi, asunglam hiam, apolam hiam agiauleh leng.
03013056	Siampu in ana et a, huchi a, ngai dih, sawp khit nung a mial sim lel ahihleh puansilh a pan hiam, savun a pan hiam, gat a pan hiam, phan a pan hiam abotkhe ding ahi.
03013057	Puansilh pen, gat ah hiam, phan ah hiam, savun bawl ah hiam alat lailai leh ahong pawt nawn ahi a; hii omna pen na hal ding ahi.
03013058	Puansilh, gat hiam, phan hiam, bangpeuh savun a bawl chi himhim hiam na sawp a, hii in anutsiatleh sawp nawn ding ahi a, huchi in ahong siangta ding hi.
03013059	“Hiai bel, puansilh samul hiam, khauzang ngat hiam, gat hiam, phan hiam, savun a bawl chi himhim hiam a phak hii om asian leh sian louh puanna dan ding ahi,” chi in.
03014001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03014002	“Hiai phak siansak ni a hihdan ding ahi. Siampu kiang a pi ding ahi.
03014003	Huchi in siampu giahphual pua ah apaikhe dia; siampu in a-en dia, ngai dih, phakmi pen aphakna hii adamleh
03014004	siampu in akisiangsak ding mi vasa hing siang nih, sidar sing, khauzang san leh hissop tawisak ding in thu ape ding hi.
03014005	Siampu in vasa khat pen leibel ah luitui tung ah goh ding in thu ape ding hi.
03014006	Vasa hing pen ala dia, sidar sing, khauzang san, hissop toh luitui luang tung a gohsa vasa sisan ah adiah vek ding hi.
03014007	Phakna a pan a kisiangsak ding mi sagihvei atheh dia, asiang chih apuang ding, huchi in vasa hing pen gamlak ah akhah ding hi.
03014008	Akisiangsak ding mi'n apuante asawp dia, akimetmai vek dia, akisil ding ahi. Huchi in ahong siang dia, huai khit chiang in giahphual ah ahoh dia, himahleh apuanin pua ah ni sagih a-om lai ding hi.
03014009	Huan hichi ahi ding a, ani sagih ni in alu a sam tengteng leh akhamul leh amitkhu multe ametmai dia, amul tengteng ametmai ding hi. Apuante asawp in akisil dia, huchi in ahong siangta ding hi.
03014010	“Ani giat ni in belamnoupa nih gensiatbei leh belamnounu khat gensiatbei, kum khat a upa leh tangbuang thillat ding in tangbuang nel mahmah ephah mun sawm a khen mun thum sathau a mek leh sathau thawl khat atawi ding ahi.
03014011	Asiangsakpa siampu in kisiangsak ding mi leh huai thilte kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah Toupa ma ah akoih ding hi.
03014012	Siampu in belamnoupa khat pen sathau log khat toh ala dia, tatlek thoihna ding in alan dia, Toupa ma a vei thillat ding in avei ding hi.
03014013	Khelh thoihna leh halmang thillat agoh zelna mun uh, mun siangthou ah belamnoupa pen agou dia, khelh thoihna siampu a tuam ahih bang in tatlek thoihna leng siampu a tuam ahi; hiai thil siangthoupen ahi.
03014014	Siampu in tatlek thoihna sisan ala dia, kisiangsak ding mi bil taklam mongte, akhut taklam khutpite, ataklam khepite siampu in anuh ding hi.
03014015	Sathau log khat pen siampu in ala dia, amah khutpek veilam ah asung ding hi.
03014016	Siampu in akhut veilam a sathau ah akhut taklam zung adiah ding a, Toupa ma ah akhutzung in sathau sagihvei atheh ding.
03014017	Akhut a sathau om lai teng in kisiangsak ding mi bil taklam dawn, akhut taklam khutpi leh akhe taklam khepi ah tatlekna kithoihna sisan tung ah anuh ding hi.
03014018	Siampu in akhut a om lai teng in kisiangsak ding mi lu anuh dia; huchi in siampu in Toupa ma ah kilemna abawlsak ding ahi.
03014019	“Siampu in khelh thoihna alan dia, asianlouhna a pan kisiangsak ding mi pen kilemna abawlsak dia; huai khit in halmang thillat agou ding hi.
03014020	Siampu in halmang thillat leh tangbuang thillat maitam ah alat ding asiam a, siampu in kilemna abawlsak ding a, huchi in ahong siang ding hi.
03014021	“Mizawng ahih a, hiaite aneih zoh keileh, belamnoupa khat tatlek thoihna, kilemna bawlsakna dia vei ding leh tangbuang thillat dia tangbuang nel mahmah ephah mun sawm a khen mun khat, sathau a zut, sathau log khat toh atawi ding ahi.
03014022	Vakhu kop khat hiam, vapalnou kop khat hiam, aneih zoh lamlam; khat khelh thoihna ding, khat pen halmang thillat ding ahi ding hi.
03014023	Ani giat ni in akisiansakna ding in siampu kiang ah kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah Toupa ma ah ahon tawi ding ahi.
03014024	Huchi in siampu in tatlek thoihna belamnou leh sathau log khat ala dia, vei thillat ding in Toupa ma ah siampu in avei ding ahi.
03014025	Tatlek thoihna belamnou pen agou dia; siampu in tatlek thoihna sisan ala dia, kisiangsak ding mi bil taklam dawn, akhut taklam khutpi leh akhe taklam khepi anuh ding hi.
03014026	Siampu in sathau amah khutpek veilam ah asung ding ahi.
03014027	Siampu in akhut veilam a sathau khenkhat akhut taklam in Toupa ma ah sagihvei atheh ding ahi.
03014028	Siampu in akhut a sathau in kisiangsak ding mi bil taklam dawn, akhut taklam khutpi, akhe taklam khepi leh tatlek kithoihna sisan tungtak ah anuh ding hi.
03014029	Siampu in akhut a sathau om lai teng in Toupa ma a kilemna bawlsak ding in kisiangsak ding mi lu anuh ding hi.
03014030	Vakhu hiam, vapalnou hiam, aneih zoh lamlam khat alan dia;
03014031	aneih zoh lamlam, khelh thoihna ding in khat, halmang thillat ding in khat, tangbuang thillat toh. Huchi in siampu in kisiangsak ding mi a ding in Toupa ma ah kilemna abawlsak ding hi.
03014032	Hiai bel phak hii vei, kisiansakna dan bang a chinloute a dia dan ahi,” achi hi.
03014033	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
03014034	“Luah dia ka hon piak Kanaan gam na lut chiang ua, na luah ding uh gam a inn khat a phak hii ka koihleh,
03014035	Huai inn neitu in, hiai inn ah hii hileh kilawmtak omleh kilawm ka sa, chi in siampu ahong hilh ding ahi.
03014036	Siampu in hii a-en dia, alut ma in insung hihvuak ding in siampu in thu ape dia, hiai insung a thil om tengteng siang lou ahi ding hi; huai nung in siampu insung en ding in alut ding ahi.
03014037	Ama'n hii a-en dia, ngai dih, hii in ahinglam sim hiam asanlam sim hiam a baang anekkuak a, baang sang a niamzaw a akimuhleh,
03014038	siampu inn a pan kongpi ah apawt dia, ni sagih sung huai inn akhak ding ahi.
03014039	Ani sagih ni in siampu'n inn ava en nawn dia, ngai dih, hii pen huai inn baang a ana zamzakleh;
03014040	siampu in huai hii omna suang pen lakhia a, khopi polam a ninpaihna mun a paih ding in thu ape ding hi.
03014041	Insung lam akiatsiangsak kimvel dia, suang zutbitna a kiatkhiak leivui pen dainawl mun nin ah asung ding uhi.
03014042	Suang dang ala ding ua, huai suangte mun ah akoih ding ua; suang zutbitna dang ala ding ua, inn ahu ding uhi.
03014043	“Suang alakkhiak a, inn akiatsiang a, ahuk khit nung a hii ahong dawk nawnleh, siampu ava lut dia, ava en nawn ding hi.
03014044	Ngai dih, hii ana zamzakleh huai inn a phak akipchi ahi a, siang lou ahi
03014045	Huai inn aphel dia, asuang, asing leh asuang zutbitna teng leng dainawl mun nin ah anawnkhe vek ding ahi.
03014046	Kuapeuh huai inn khak ahih sung himhim alut taphot nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding hi.
03014047	Kuapeuh huai inn a lum taphot in apuante uh asawp ding ua; kuapeuh huai inn a an ne taphot in apuante uh asawp ding uh ahi.
03014048	“Siampu alut a, a-et kimvel a, ngai dih, huai inn hukbit ahih nung a, hii azamzak keileh, inn asiang chih siampu in apuang ding; hii pen akikhinmang tak ziak in.
03014049	Inn siansakna ding in vasa nih leh sidar sing leh khauzang san leh hissop atawi ding hi.
03014050	Vasa khat pen leibel ah luitui luang tung ah agou ding hi.
03014051	Sidar sing, hissop, khau san leh vasa hing pen ala dia, vasa gohsa sisan ah leh luitui ah adiah ding hi.
03014052	Vasa sisan, luitui luang, vasa hing pen, sidar sing, hissop leh khau san in huai inn asiangsak ding ahi.
03014053	Vasa hing pen khua a pan gamlak ah kilemna bawlna ding in alengkhesak dia; huchi in huai inn asiangsak ding a, ahong siang ding hi.
03014054	“Hiai pen phak hii chi chih leh meima sunglut tungthu a dan ahi;
03014055	puan a-omleh innte a om phak a ding;
03014056	chibawk, khem, pol leh chikang chihte toh kisai a,
03014057	sianlouhna hun leh sianna hun a sinsak ding, phak dan ahi,” achi hi.
03015001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
03015002	“Israel suante houpih unla, akiang uah, ‘Mi kuapeuh sa a thil apawtleh athilpawt ziak in siang lou ahi.
03015003	Athilpawt sung teng siang lou ahi a, asa ah apawt gige hiam, apawt atawpta hiam leng hitaleh, amah siang lou himhim ahi.
03015004	Thilpawtmi lupna peuhmah siang lou ahi dia; atutna peuhmah leng siang lou ahi lai ding hi.
03015005	Kuapeuh alupna khoih peuhmahte'n apuante uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03015006	Thilpawtmi tutna a tu peuhmahte'n apuante uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uh.
03015007	Kuapeuh thilpawtmi sa khoih peuhmah in apuante uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03015008	Thilpawtmi in misiang chil asiatkhumleh apuante asawp dia, akisil ding ahi, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015009	Tuanna bangpeuh a leng thilpawtmi atuanleh siang lou ahi ding.
03015010	Kuapeuh akingaihnasa nung thil khoih peuhmahte nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding ua; huai thil lasuan mi peuhmah in apuante uh asawp ding ua; akisil ding uh ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03015011	Kuapeuh thilpawtmi in akhut sil lou a akhoih peuhmah in apuante asawp dia, akisil ding ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015012	Thilpawtmi leibel khoihsa suktap ding ahi; asing vanzat tengteng silsiang vek ding ahi,’ achi hi.
03015013	“Huan thilpawtmi bel, athilpawt hihsiang ahihleh, akisiansakna ding in ni sagih akipe dia, apuante asawp dia; luitui ah akisil dia; huchi in ahong siangta ding hi.
03015014	Ani giat ni in vakhu kop khat hiam, vapalnou kop khat hiam tawi in Toupa ma ah kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah ahoh dia, siampu ape ding ahi.
03015015	Siampu in khelh thoihna ding in khat, halmang thillat ding in akhat pen alan ding hi. Siampu in athilpawt thu ah Toupa ma ah kilemna abawlsak ding.
03015016	“Pasal kuapeuh kipolhna chi amah a pan apawtleh apumpi in akisil vek dia, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015017	Puansilh leh vun, kipolhna chitukna peuhmah sawpsiang vek ding ahi a, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015018	Numei akithuahpih leng anih ua akisil tuak ding uh ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03015019	“Numei in thilpawt aneih a, asa a thilpawt si ahihleh ni sagih sung siang lou ahi dia; kuapeuh amah khoih kha taphot nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015020	Asian louh sung a, alupna peuhmah siang lou ahi dia, atutna peuhmah leng siang lou ahi lai ding hi.
03015021	Alupna khoih peuhmahte'n apuante uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uh.
03015022	Kuapeuh atutna khoih peuhmahte'n apuante uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uhi.
03015023	Alupna a thil om hiam, atutna a thil om hiam khoih peuhmah leng nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uh.
03015024	Kuapeuh in akithuahpih a, asi neih luang in amah asuk khakleh ni sagih sung siang lou ahi dia; alupna peuhmah siang lou ahi vek ding hi.
03015025	“Numei asi neih ngeina hilou, ni sawtkuamtak a sipawt hiam, anitdan ngeina sang a sawtzaw sipawt hiam ahihleh, asianlouhdan ngeina sung a, a-om zel bang in sipawtmi anit sung teng siang lou in a-om ding hi.
03015026	Asipawt sung teng alupna taphot asiang louh ngeina hun lai a, alupna bang ahi dia; atutna peuhmah asian louh ngeina hun lai a, asiang louh bang in siang lou ahi ding.
03015027	Kuapeuh huai thil khoih peuhmah siang lou ahi dia, apuante asawp dia, akisil ding ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
03015028	Himahleh asipawt pen siansak ahihleh ni sagih ama'n akisim dia, huchi in ahong siangta ding hi.
03015029	Ani giat ni in vakhu kop khat hiam, vapalnou kop khat hiam atawi dia, kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah siampu ahong pe ding ahi.
03015030	Siampu in khelh thoihna ding in khat, halmang thillat ding in khat alan ding ahi. Huchi in siampu in sipawtmi asianlouhna thu ah Toupa ma ah kilemna abawlsak ding ahi.
03015031	“Hiai bang in Israel suante asianlouhna ua pan na hihtuam ding uh ahi; alak ua ka biakbuk ahihbuah khak chiang ua leng asianlouhna ua asihlouhna ding un.
03015032	“Hiai dan pasal thilpawt neimi leh kipolhna a pan chi pawtkhia a ninte leh
03015033	numei kha teng si neih sung a ding, pasal hi in numei hitaleh sa a pan thilpawt neimi a ding leh siang lou a ngaih numei kithuahpih pasal a ding ahi,” achi hi.
03016001	Huan Aaron tapa nihte'n Toupa ava naih ua asihloh nung un Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03016002	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Na unau Aaron houpih inla, puanzak sung Mun Siangthou ah, bawm tung a zahngaihna tutphah ma ah chik lai peuh in leng hong lut het kei heh, asi kha ding hi. Zahngaihna tutphah tung a, meipi a hong kilang ding ka hih ziak in.
03016003	Hichibang in Mun Siangthou ah khelh thoihna ding in bawngtuai, halmang thillat ding in belampa toh Aaron ahoh ding ahi.
03016004	“Puanmalngat puanak siangthou asilh dia, asa khuhna ding in puanmalngat pheituam abun ding, puanmalngat dial akhim ding ahi. Hiaite puansilh siangthou ahi a; akisil masa dia, huchi in asilh phet ding ahi.
03016005	“Israel suan mipi omkhawmte a pan khelh thoihna ding in kelpa nih leh halmang thillat ding in belampa khat atawi ding ahi.
03016006	Aaron in amah a tuam, khelh thoihna bawngtal pen alan dia, amah leh a-inkote a ding in kilemna abawl ding ahi.
03016007	Kel nih akai dia, kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul ah Toupa ma ah akoih ding hi.
03016008	Aaron in kel nih tungthu ah ai asan dia, khat Toupa a tuam ahi dia, akhat pen thuak sik thuak kel ahi ding.
03016009	Aaron in Toupa a tuam dia puk kel pen ala dia, khelh thoihna ding in alan ding hi.
03016010	Thuak sik thuak kel dia puk pen kilemna bawlna dia khah ding in Toupa ma ah ahing in akoih ding hi.
03016011	“Aaron in ama a tuam khelhna bawngtal pen ala dia, amah leh a-inkote a ding in kilemna abawl dia, amah a tuam khelh thoihna bawngtal pen agou ding hi.
03016012	Toupa ma a maitam a pan mei lakna dim in mei-am ala dia, gimlim gawizan ngiingei pham khat toh puanzak sung ah alutpih ding hi.
03016013	Gimlim khu in thu theihpihna tung a zahngaihna tutphah abopna ding in Toupa ma a mei ah gimlim abuak dia, sihna atuahlouhna ding in.
03016014	Bawngtal sisan bangzah hiam ala dia, akhutzung in zahngaihna tutphah suahlam pang a theh dia, akhut in zahngaihna tutphah bul sisan in sagihvei atheh ding ahi.
03016015	“Mipi a tuam khelh thoihna kel pen agou dia, asisan, bawngtal sisan abawl bang in abawl dia, zahngaihna tutphah tung leh zahngaihna tutphah ma ah atheh ding hi.
03016016	Israel suante sianlouhnate leh akhelhnate ua atatleknate uh ziak in Mun Siangthou a ding in kilemna abawl ding hi. Huai mah bang in, asianlouhnate uh lak a om, kihoupihna biakbuk a ding in leng abawl sam ding hi.
03016017	Mun Siangthou a kilemna bawl dia alut lai in, amah leh a-inkote leh Israel mipite a dia kilemna bawl khin a ahong pawtkhiak masiah kuamah puanin sung ah a-om ding ahi kei.
03016018	Toupa ma a maitam lam ah apawt dia, huai a ding in kilemna abawl dia, bawngtal sisan leh kel sisan bangzah hiam ala dia, maitam kiite ah akimvel in atat ding ahi.
03016019	Akhut in huai sisan sagihvei atheh dia, asiangsak dia, Israel suante sianlouhna a pan ahihsiangthou ding hi.
03016020	“Mun Siangthou leh kihoupihna biakbuk leh maitam a dia kilemna abawl khit chiang in, kel hing pen ahon kai ding hi.
03016021	Aaron in kel hing lutung ah akhut langnih akoih dia, atung ah Israel suante gitlouhna teng leh khial a atatlekna teng uh apulak dia; huaite kel lutung ah anga dia, mi khat asehkholhsa un gamdai ah apimang ding hi.
03016022	Huai kel in agitlouhna tengteng uh luah louh gam ah apomang dia, kel bel gamdai ah akhah ding hi.
03016023	“Kihoupihna puanin ah Aaron alut dia, Mun Siangthou a, alut lai a puanmalngat puansilh asuah dia, huai ah anuse ding hi.
03016024	Mun siangthou ah akisil dia, apuansilh asilh dia, ahong pawtkhe dia, amah a tuam halmang thillat leh mipi a tuam halmang thillat alan dia, amah leh mipi a ding in kilemna abawl ding hi.
03016025	Khelh thoihna thau maitam ah ahal ding hi.
03016026	Thuak sik thuak kel khah mi kuapeuh in apuante asawp dia, akisil dia, huai khit in a-omna mun ah apai nawn ding ahi.
03016027	Khelh thoihna bawngtal leh khelh thoihna kel sisan kilemna abawlna dia Mun Siangthou a, alutpih uh giahphual pua ah apaipih ding hi; avun, asa leh a-ek ahal ding ahi.
03016028	Ahalmi'n apuan asawp dia, akisil dia, huai khit in a-omna mun ah apai nawn ding ahi.
03016029	“Hiai na tangtawn dan thuseh ding uh ahi: Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawm ni in na lungsimte uh na gimsak ding ua, na gam ua mi himhim hiam, gamdangmi na lak ua teng hiam in bangmah asep louh ding ahi.
03016030	Hiai ni in noute hihsiangthou ding in noute a ding in kilemna bawl ahi dia; huchi in Toupa ma ah na khelhna tengteng lak ua pan na siang ding uhi.
03016031	Nou a dia Sabbath ni ahi a, na lungsimte uh na gimsak ding uh ahi. Hiai tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
03016032	Siampu, apa sik a siampu hi dia sathau nilh ding leh hihtuam mi hi ding in kilemna abawl dia, puanmalngat puansilh siangthou asilh dia; mun siangthou a ding in kilemna abawl dia; kihoupihna biakbuk leh maitam a ding in leng kilemna abawl sam ding hi.
03016033	Siampute leh mipihon a ding in kilemna abawl nawn lai ding hi.
03016034	Akhelhna tengteng uh ziak a kum chih a khatvei Israel suante a dia kilemna bawl na tangtawn dan thuseh ding uh ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in Mosi in ahihta hi.
03017001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03017002	“Aaron leh atapate leh Israel suan tengteng houpih inla, akiang uah: Hiai Toupa thupiak ahi:
03017003	Israel inkote lak a mi bawngtal hiam, belamnou hiam, kel hiam giahphual hiam, giahphual polam hiam a gou a,
03017004	Toupa biakbuk ma a Toupa a dia athillat dia kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul a hon tawi lou peuhmah, huai mi sisan suah a ngaih ahi ding; sisan suah ngei ahi, huai mi achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
03017005	Hiai pen Israel suante'n akithoihnate uh, gamlak a kithoihnate uh ahon lak ua, Toupa a ding ngei a kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul a, siampu kiang a, ahon tawi ua, Toupa a dia lemna thillat kithoihna ahihtheihna ding ahi.
03017006	Siampu in kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul a maitam, sisan in atheh dia, Toupa a ding in gimlimtak in athau ahal ding ahi.
03017007	A-angkawmna uh dawite kiang ah akithoih nawn ding uh ahi kei. Hiai asuante uh tan a tangtawn a dia dan thuseh ahi.
03017008	“Akiang uah, Israel inkomi himhim hiam, gamdangmi alak ua tengte hiam in halmang thillat hiam, kithoihna hiam,
03017009	Toupa kiang a kithoihna dia kihoupihna biakbuk kongpi bul a hon tawi lou a-omleh huai mi achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
03017010	“Kuapeuh Israel inkote lak a mi hiam, gamdangmi alak ua teng hiam, bang sisan leng ne peuhmah, huai sisan nemi tung ah ka mai ka gumsak dia, achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ahi ding hi.
03017011	Sa hinna pen sisan a a-om ziak in, na hinna ua dia kilemna bawlna ding a maitam tung a nou ka hon piak ahi. Hinna ding a kilemna bawlna pen sisan mah lah ahi ngal a.
03017012	Huaiziak in Israel suante kiang ah, kuamah in sisan na ne ding uh ahi kei. Gamdangmi na lak ua teng in leng sisan a ne ding ahi kei, ka chi ahi.
03017013	“Israel suante lak a mi hiam, gamdangmi alak ua teng hiam, gam va vak a, sa hiam, vasa hiam, nek theih chi ahon tutleh asisan apawtsak dia, leivui in asisan avuk ding ahi.
03017014	Sa tengteng hinna thu ah asisan leh ahinna kibang geih ahi. Huaiziak in Israel suante kiang ah, sa sisan mawngmawng na ne ding uh ahi kei, sa tengteng hinna asisan ahi ngal a. Hiai ne peuhmah satkhiak ahi ding.
03017015	“Amah sih a si hiam, sa keihlup hiam nemi, huai gam a mi hiam leng hi hen aw, apuan uh asawp ding ua, akisil ding uh ahi. Nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding uh. Huchi in nitaklam in ahong siangta ding uh.
03017016	Asawp louh ua, akisil kei uleh athulimlouhna moh akipuak ding uh,” achi hi.
03018001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03018002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘Kei Toupa , na Pathian uh ka hi.
03018003	Na omna masa uh Aigupta gam mite hih bang in hih kei unla, ka hon pilutna ding Kanaan gam mite dan thusehte bang in leng hih kei un.
03018004	Ka vaihawmte na zui ding ua, ka dan thusehte zui in na mang ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi.
03018005	Huaiziak in ka dan leh ka vaihawmte na mang ding uh ahi, huai mi'n ahihleh ahing ding hi. Kei Toupa ka hi,’ achi hi.
03018006	“Kuamah in na tanau nai numei, avuaktanna lem ding in na zuan ding ahi kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03018007	Na pa vuaktanna ahihkeileh na nu vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Na nu ahi a, avuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei hi.
03018008	Na pa zi vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei, na pa vuaktanna ahi.
03018009	Na sanggamnu, na pa tanu hiam na nu tanu hiam, na pianpih hiam, na pianpih louh hiam vuaktanna leng na lem ding ahi kei.
03018010	Na tapa tanu hiam, na tanu, tanu hiam vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Avuaktanna uh nang vuaktanna ahi ngal a.
03018011	Na pa zi tanu, na pa suan vuaktanna, na sanggamnu ahi, avuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei.
03018012	Na pa sanggamnu vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Na pa tanaunu nai ahi.
03018013	Na nu sanggamnu vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei, na nu tanaunu nai ahi ngal a.
03018014	Na pa sanggam vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei, azi na zuan ding ahi kei, amah na nu ahi.
03018015	Na mounu vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Na tapa zi ahi a, avuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei.
03018016	Na sanggampa zi vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Na sanggampa vuaktanna ahi.
03018017	Nutate vuaktanna na lem ding uh ahi kei. Avuaktanna lem ding in atapa tanu hiam, atanu tanu hiam na la ding ahi kei. Na tanau naite ahi ua; gitlouhna lianpi ahi.
03018018	Na zi adam lai teng, asanggamnu vuaktanna lem ding in na zi in na nei ding ahi kei hi.
03018019	“Numei anitdan ngeina a, anit sung in avuaktanna lem ding in na zuan ding ahi kei.
03018020	Alak a kihihnin ding in na invengpa zi na kithuahpih ding ahi kei.
03018021	Molek a dia mei a lutsuaksak ding in na gil a gah himhim na pe ding ahi kei, na Pathian min na hihse ding ahi sam kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03018022	Numei bang in pasal na kithuahpih ding ahi kei. Thilkihhuai ahi.
03018023	Kihihnin ding in ganta himhim na kithuahpih ding ahi kei. Luppih ding in ganta ma ah numei adin ding ahi kei. Gitlouhna tungtuan ahi.
03018024	“Hiaite ah, abangmah ah kihihnin kei un. Hiai thil tengteng ah na ma ua ka delhkhiak khitsa namte ana nin khinta uhi.
03018025	Agam leng anin khinta hi. Huaiziak in athulimlouhnate uh ziak in amau ka gawt a, gam in asung a teng mite alokhe khin vek hi.
03018026	Huaiziak in nou zaw ka dante, ka vaihawmte na zui ding uh ahi. Hiai thilkihhuaite na hih ding uh ahi kei; na gam ua mi himhim hiam, gamdangmi na lak ua tengte hiam in leng.
03018027	Hiai thilkihhuai tengteng na ma ua hiai gam a omte'n ana hih khin ua, gam mah leng anin khinta hi;
03018028	na ma ua om nam aluakkhiak mah bang a na hihnit ua, gam in ahon luakkhiaklouhna ding in.
03018029	Kuapeuh hiai thilkihhuaite lak a khatpeuh hihmi achipihte a pan satkhiak ahi ding.
03018030	“Huaiziak in hiai thilkihhuai na ma ua omte'n achin bang uh na chin samlouhna ding un leh huai a na kihihnitlouhna ding un ka thuseh na zui ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,” achi hi.
03019001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03019002	“Israel suan mipi omkhawmte tengteng houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘Na siangthou ding uh ahi, Kei, Toupa na Pathian uh ka siangthou ngal a.
03019003	Michih in na nu leh na pa na lau ding uh ahi. Ka Sabbathte na tan ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,’ achi hi.
03019004	“Milim lam ah kihei kei unla, sunthoh milimte leng kibawltawm kei un. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi.
03019005	“ Toupa a dia kilemna thillat na lat chiang un noumau deihtelna a na lat ding uh ahi.
03019006	Na lat ni mah uh ahihkeileh azing a na nek ding uh ahi. Ani thum ni tan a, aval a-om laileh mei a na hal ding uh ahi.
03019007	Ani thum ni tan a nek ahihleh thilkihhuai ahi a; pomsak ahi kei ding hi.
03019008	Ane kuapeuh in Toupa sianthouna ahihnit ziak in athulimlouhna moh akipuak dia, huai mi achipihte a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
03019009	“Na lou ua buh na lak chiang un, lounawl zulte tan in na la vek ding uh ahi kei. Asang leng na zong ding uh ahi kei.
03019010	Na grephuan uah asang na zong ding uh ahi kei. Na grephuan ua agah kia leng na tomkhawm ding uh ahi kei. Mizawng leh gamdangmi a ding in na hawisak ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi.
03019011	“Na gu ding uh ahi kei. Atak lou in thil na hih ding ahi kei. Zuau na kihilhtuah ding uh ahi kei.
03019012	Na Pathian min hemsak ding in ka min in dikloutak in na kichiam ding uh ahi kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019013	“Na invengte na khem ding ahi kei. Na guksak ding leng ahi kei. Kilohmi loh zankhua in azingsang tan in na kem ding ahi kei.
03019014	Nangong na hamsiat ding ahi kei. Mittaw ma ah apukna ding na koih ding ahi kei. Na Pathian na lauh ding ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019015	“Vaihawmna ah diktat loutak in thu na khen ding ahi kei. Mizawng na simmoh tuam ding ahi kei hi. Mi thilhihthei na zahtak tuam ding ahi kei. Himahleh diktattak in na invengte vai na hawmsak ding ahi.
03019016	Na chipihte lak ah migensia in na vialvak ding ahi kei. Na invengte sisan thu ah ahilou lam in na pang ding ahi kei. Toupa ka hi.
03019017	“Na lungtang in na unau na ho ding ahi kei. Na invengte na taihilh ngeingei ding ahi. Na huchihleh agitlouhna ah na siang ding hi.
03019018	Phu na la ding ahi kei. Na chipihte suante huatna na pai ding ahi kei. Nang na ki-it bang in na invengte na it ding ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019019	“Ka thupiakte na zui ding uh ahi. Na ganta chi tuamtuam suangsak ke'n. Na lou ah haichi chi nih chingkhawm ke'n. Thil chituam nih gatpolh puan na silh ding ahi kei.
03019020	“Kuapeuh sikhanu, apasal ding khamsa nei, tat nai louh, khahkhiak nai louh pasal dang toh lumkhawm peuhmah gawt ding ahi. Himahleh hihlup ding bel ahi kei, amah zalen ahih louh ziak in.
03019021	Kihoupihna puanin kongpi bul ah Toupa kiang ah atatlekna thoihna ding in belampa ahon kaih ding ahi.
03019022	Athilhihkhelhsa, akhelhna ah Toupa ma ah tatlek thoihna belampa in siampu in kilemna abawlsak dia; huchi in athilhihkhelhsa ngaihdam ahi ding.
03019023	“Gam na va luah ua, nek dia theikung chi chih na suan hun un agah siang lou in na ngai ding uh. Nou a ding in kum thum siang lou a ngaih ding ahi a, nek het louh ding ahi.
03019024	Himahleh, akum lina ah agah teng Toupa phatna ding in amah a dia sehtuam ahi ding hi.
03019025	Akum ngana ah nou a dia apun zel theihna ding in agah na ne ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi.
03019026	“Asisan toh khatpeuh na ne ding uh ahi kei. Bum ching in ai na san ding uh ahi kei.
03019027	Na baknel a pan akimvel in na lu na met ding ahi kei. Na khamul lang tuak leng na tan ding ahi sam kei.
03019028	Misi ziak in na sa uh na atkeh ding uh ahi kei. Na satung ua gelh in chiamtehna na gelh ding uh ahi kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019029	“Na tanu kizuaksak ke'n. Gam angkawmna gam ahong suak kha dia, gitlouhna in ahong dim kha ding hi.
03019030	Ka Sabbathte na tan ding uh ahi. Ka mun siangthou na zahtak ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019031	“Dawi aisan siamte zuan kei unla, bumsiamte leng ahon nitsaklouhna ding un zongkhe kei un. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019032	“Lu a kelsam poute ma ah dingh in. Tek omna na zahtak in. Na Pathian lau in. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03019033	“Gamdangmi, na gam ua ana teng a-omleh na hihsiat louh ding uh ahi.
03019034	Gamdangmi na lak ua tengte bel nou a ding in na gam ua mi bang ahi ding ua, nangmah na ki-it bang in amah na it ding ahi. Nou leng Aigupta gam ah gamdangmi na hi ngeita uhi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi.
03019035	“Vaihawm thu ah, tehna chiang ah, gikdan ah leh saudan tehna ah diktatloupi in na hih ding uh ahi kei.
03019036	Bukna dik, gikdan dik, ephah dik, hin dik na nei ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh Aigupta gam a pan nou hon pikhepa ka hi.
03019037	Ka thupiak tengteng leh ka vaihawm tengteng na pom ding ua, na zuih ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
03020001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03020002	“Israel suante kiang ah, kuapeuh, Israel suante lak a mi hiam, Israel gam a teng gamdangmi hiam, agil a gah Molek pe peuhmah hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Hiai gam a mi teng in suang in adenglum ding uhi.
03020003	Ka mun siangthou leh ka min siangthou hihnin ding a, agilgah khenkhat Molek kiang a apiak ziak in huai mi tung ah ka mai ka gumsak dia, achipihte lak a pan ka satkhe ding hi.
03020004	Hiai gam a mite'n agil a gah Molek kiang a piak akitheihmohbawl ua, ahihlup kei uleh,
03020005	amah leh a-inkote tung ah ka mai ka gumsak dia, Molek kiang a kei hon ang kawmsan peuhmahte toh achipihte uh lak a pan ka satkhe ding hi.
03020006	“Alak ua angkawm dia dawi aisan siamte leh bumsiamte zuan mi tung ah ka mai ka gumsak dia; achipihte lak a pan ka satkhe ding hi.
03020007	Huaiziak in kihihsiangthou unla, siangthou in om un. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi ngal a.
03020008	Ka thupiakte pom in na zui ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa noute hon hihsiangthoupa ka hi.
03020009	“Anu hiam, apa hiam hamsiatkhum peuhmah hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Anu hiam, apa hiam hamsiatkhum ahi a, atung ah asisan moh a-om ding ahi.
03020010	“Mi zi angkawm, a-invengte zi angkawm zaw, a-angkawmpa leh a-angkawmnu, anih ua hihlup ngeingei ding ahi.
03020011	Apa zi kithuahpih in apa vuaktanna lem ahi a; hihlup tuaktuak ding ahi. Asisan moh atung uah a-om ding hi.
03020012	Mi'n amounu akithuahpihleh hihlup tuaktuak ding ahi. Tatsiatna tungtuan hih ahi ua, asisan moh atung uah a-om ding hi.
03020013	Mi'n numei akithuahpih bang a pasal akithuahpihleh thilkihhuai mahmah hihtuak ahi ua, hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Asisan moh atung uah a-om ding hi.
03020014	Mi'n nuta zi in nei leh gitlouhna ahi. Na lak ua thulimlouhna a-omlouhna ding in amah leh nutate mei a hallup ding ahi.
03020015	Mi'n ganta akithuahpihleh hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Ganta leng hihlup ding ahi.
03020016	Numei in ganta ava naih a, akithuahpihsakleh huai numei na hihlup ngeingei ding uh ahi. Ganta leng hihlup ngeingei ding ahi a; asisan moh atung uah a-om ding hi.
03020017	“Mi'n asanggamnu, apa tanu hiam, anu tanu hiam akitenpih a, avuaktanna amuh a, ama'n leng avuaktanna amuhleh thil gilou hih ahi ua, amite mitmuh a satkhiak ding ahi uh. Asanggamnu vuaktanna lem ahi a, atatlekna moh apo ding hi.
03020018	Mi'n numei akha teng si neih aneih lai a, akithuahpih a, avuaktanna alemleh asi pawtna lem ahi a, ama'n leng asi pawtna lem ahi a, achipihte ua pan anih ua satkhiak ding ahi.
03020019	“Na nu sanggamnu hiam, na pa sanggamnu hiam vuaktanna na lem ding ahi kei. Asanggam nai vuaktanna lem ahi a, agitlouhna moh apo ding.
03020020	Mi'n apaneu zi akithuahpihleh apaneu vuaktanna lem ahi a; akhelh moh uh apo ding ua, suan-le-pak bei in asi ding uh.
03020021	Mi'n a-unaupa zi akitenpihleh thilnin ahi a, a-unaupa vuaktanna lem ahi a, suan-le-pak nei lou in a-om ding uh.
03020022	“Huaiziak in ka thupiak tengteng, ka vaihawm tengteng na pom ding ua, na zui ding uh ahi. Huchi in tenna ding a ka hon pina gam in nou ahon lokhe kei ding hi.
03020023	Na ma ua ka delhkhiaksa namdangte thilhihte na zui ding uh ahi kei. Hiai thil tengteng ahih ua, huaiziak in, amau ka kih hi.
03020024	Himahleh nou kiang ah, agam uh, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, na luah ding un ka hon pe ding, ka chi khinta hi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh, namdangte a pan hon hihtuampa ka hi.
03020025	Huaiziak in sa siang leh siang lou leh vasa siang leh siang lou na khentuam ding ua; sa hiam, vasa hiam lei a vakthoh chi himhim hiam nou a dia siang lou dia ka sehtuamte in na hinna uh na kihhuaisak ding uh ahi kei.
03020026	Kei a ding in misiangthou na hi ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa lah ka siangthou ngal a. Kei a na hihna ding un namdangte lak a pan nou ka hon septuamta hi.
03020027	“Pasal leng, numei leng dawi aisan siam zawl hiam, bumsiam hiam hihlup ngeingei ding ahi a; suang a denlup ding ahi uh. Asisan moh uh atung uah a-om ding hi,” achi nawn lai hi.
03021001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Aaron tapa siampute houpih inla, akiang uah: Achipihte uh lak a misi ziak in kuamah akihihnit ding ahi kei.
03021002	Atanau nai, anu uh, apa uh, atapa uh, atanu uh, a-unau,
03021003	asanggamnu, a-ompih lai uh nungak, pasal nei nailoute ziak in ahihleh akihihnin thei ding uh.
03021004	Hiai bang ahih kei ngalleh, achipihte uh lak a intekpen ahih ziak in akihihnin ding ahi kei.
03021005	“Alu uh ametgiau ding uh ahi kei. Akhamul sik tuak uh leng atantom ding uh ahi kei. Asa uh leng a-atkeh ding uh ahi kei.
03021006	A Pathian uh a ding in misiangthou ahi ding ua, a Pathian min ahemsak ding ahi kei hi. Toupa a dia mei a thillat, a Pathian a dia nek ding ansiahte alat ziak in asiangthou ding ahi.
03021007	Numei kizuak hiam, min hem hiam, apasal maksa hiam akitenpih ding ahi kei, a Pathian a ding in misiangthou ahi ngal a.
03021008	Huaiziak in amah na siangthousak ding ahi; ama'n na Pathian tanghou alat ziak in, nang a ding in asiangthou ding hi. Kei, Toupa , nou hon hihsiangthoupa lah ka siangthou ngal a.
03021009	Siampu kuapeuh tanu kizuak a, akihihthanghuai leh apa ahihthanghuai ahi a, mei a hal ding ahi.
03021010	“A-unaute lak a siampu lian, alu sathau nilhsa, puansilh dia sehtuamsa in alukhuhna alakhe ding ahi kei. Apuante abotkek ding ahi kei.
03021011	Misi luang omna ah alut ding ahi kei. Anu hiam, apa hiam ziak in akihihnin ding ahi sam kei hi.
03021012	Mun siangthou a pan apawtkhe ding ahi kei. A Pathian' mun siangthou ahihthanghuai ding ahi sam kei hi. A Pathian sathau nilhna lah atung ah a-om ngal a; Kei Toupa ka hi.
03021013	Zi ding in nungak siangthou akitenpih ding ahi.
03021014	Meithai hiam, maksa hiam, numei min hem hiam, kizuak hiam akitenpih ding ahi kei. Amah chipih, nungak siangthou zi ding in akitenpih ding ahi.
03021015	Achipihte lak ah asuante ahihnin ding ahi kei. Kei Toupa'n amah ka hihsiangta ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
03021016	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03021017	“Aaron kiang ah, asuante lak a na khang ua demna ding nei peuhmah in a Pathian a dia ansiah lan ding in hon zuan kei hen.
03021018	Kuapeuh melhemna nei in ahon naih het louh ding ahi. Mittaw, khebai, nakpek ahihkeileh akan-aval a om peuhmah;
03021019	ahihkeileh khe kitan, khut kitan,
03021020	ahihkeileh nungkul, mineu lua, mit sia, meima damthei lou nei ahihkeileh chiltang kitam,
03021021	siampu Aaron suan gensiatna ding nei himhim in Toupa a dia mei a thillat lan ding in ahon naih ding ahi kei. Gensiatna ding nei ahi a, a Pathian a dia sehtuam an lan dia ahon naih het louh ding ahi.
03021022	A Pathian a dia an siangthou leh siangthoupen ahihleh ane thei ding hi.
03021023	Himahleh gensiatna ding nei ahih ziak in puanzak sung ah hiam, maitam kiangnai ah hiam ahong pai thei kei ding. Ka mun siangthoute ahihnin kha ding hi. Kei Toupa amah hihsiangthoupa ka hi ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
03021024	Huchi in Mosi in Aaron leh atapate leh Israel suante tengteng kiang ah agenta hi.
03022001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03022002	“Aaron leh atapate kiang ah gen inla, Israel suante'n ka ma a thillat siangthou, kei a dia sehtuam alatte uh zahtaktak in sai uhen. Ka min siangthou ahihnin kha ding uh. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03022003	Akiang uah, khang sawnsawn in na suante uh lak a kuapeuh siang lou a ngaih a om in Toupa a dia sehtuam a om thillat siangthou anaihleh ka omna a pan satkhiak in a-om ding. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03022004	“Aaron suan kuapeuh phak hiam, thilpawt nei hiam in asian masiah thil siangthoute ne kei hen. Misi in ahihnit hiam, amah a pan chipawt peuhmah hiam;
03022005	ahihkeileh amah siang lou hisak thei bokvak ganhing khatpeuh khoih kha hiam bangchibang siang lou khoih kha siang lou in a-om ding hi.
03022006	Huchibang khoihmi nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi dia, tui a akisil keileh thil siangthoute anek louh ding ahi.
03022007	Nitum chiang in ahong siangta ding hi. Huai khit in thil siangthoute ane theita ding, anek ding an ahih ziak in.
03022008	Akihihnin ding in amah sih a si hiam, gamsa in abalnen hiam ane ding ahi kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03022009	“Huaiziak in ka thuseh azuih ding ahi. Huchi lou in zaw akihihnitna khelh moh akipuak ding a, asihloh ding hi. Kei Toupa , amaute hihsiangthoupa ka hi ngal a.
03022010	“Gamdangmi'n thil siangthou ane ding ahi kei. Siampu kiang a gamta hiam, kiloh hiam in thil siangthou ane ding ahi kei.
03022011	Himahleh siampu in kuahiam sum a aleileh, huai mi in bel ane thei dia, a-inn a piangte'n leng ane thei sam ding uh.
03022012	Siampu tanu in gamdangmi akitenpihleh thillat siangthoute ane ding ahi kei.
03022013	Himahleh siampu tanu in ta nei lou in meithai in hiam, mak hiam a-om a, apa inn a, akik nawnleh anungak lai mah bang in apa nek dingte ane sam ding hi. Himahleh gamdangmi in ane ding ahi kei.
03022014	“Mi'n thei lou a thil siangthou anekleh amun nga a khen mun khat akoih behlap dia, thil siangthou pen siampu kiang ah ape ding hi.
03022015	Israel suante'n Toupa kiang a alat uh thil siangthou athangbawl ding uh ahi kei.
03022016	Ahihkeileh, hiai thil siangthoute ne in atatlekna uh moh akipuak ding uh, hiaite kei Toupa'n ka hihsiangthouta ngal a,” chi in.
03022017	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03022018	“Aaron leh atapate leh Israel inkote teng houpih inla, akiang uah, Israel lak a teng, gamdangmi hiam, kuapeuh athillat uh, halmang thillat dia Toupa kiang a alat uh, athuchiamna uh hiam, amah ut thu a thillat hiam lan peuhmahte'n,
03022019	santak na hihtheihna ding un bawng hiam, belam hiam, kel hiam, apa gensiatbei na lat ding uh ahi.
03022020	Gensiat kai himhim na lat ding uh ahi kei; hon pomsak theih lah ahi ngal kei a.
03022021	Kuapeuh thuchiam hih buching ding hiam, amah ut thu a athillat ding hiam, lemna thillat kithoihna a ganhon lak a hiam, abelamhon lak a hiam, Toupa kiang a lan taphot in, pomtak ahihtheihna ding in gensiatbei alat ding ahi a; gensiat kaina himhim a om ding ahi kei.
03022022	Amit taw, aguh tan, akhe bai, meima nei, chibawk leh phak nei, Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh ahi kei, mei a thillat ding in Toupa kiang ah maitam ah na lan ding uh ahi kei.
03022023	Ama ut thu a thillat ding in bawngtal hiam, belamnou hiam, akan-aval a om sahiang nei hiam, sahiang kim lou hiam bel na lan thei ding uh. Himahleh thuchiamna thillat ding in hiaite pom ahi kei ding.
03022024	Achiltang dup hiam, kitam hiam, keh hiam Toupa kiang ah na lan ding uh ahi kei. Na gam uah huchibang kithoihna ding in na zang ding uh ahi kei hi.
03022025	“Gamdangmi a pan la in huaite lak a himhim na Pathian uh a dia sehtuam an ding in na lan ding uh ahi kei. Asiatna leh gensiat kaina a-om ziak in pomsak theih ahi kei ding hi, chi in,” achi hi.
03022026	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03022027	“Bawngtal hiam, belam hiam, kel hiam, ahong pian chiang in api kiang ah ni sagih a-om ding ahi, ani giat ni a pan anunglam in Toupa a dia mei a thillat ding in pom theih ahi ding.
03022028	Bawngpi hiam, belampi hiam, anou toh ni khat in na gou ding uh ahi kei.
03022029	Kipahthu genna kithoihna dia Toupa kiang a na kithoih chiang un pomtak na hihtheihna ding un na kithoih ding uh ahi.
03022030	Huai ni mah a nek bei ding ahi, azingchiang tan in bangmah na sit ding uh ahi kei. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03022031	“Huaiziak in ka thupiakte na pom ding ua, na zuih ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03022032	Ka min siangthou na hemsak ding uh ahi kei. Israel suante lak ah hihsiangthou in ka om ding ahi. Kei noute hon hihsiangthoupa,
03022033	na Pathian uh hi dia Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhepa ka hi. Kei Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
03023001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03023002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘ Toupa ankuanglui hunbi hiaite ahi.
03023003	Ni guk sung nna na sem ding ua, ani sagih ni khawlna Sabbath ni ahi a, khawmpi siangthou ahi. Hiai ni in nna na sem ding uh ahi kei. Na tenna teng uah hiai Toupa Sabbath ni ahi.
03023004	Toupa ankuanglui hunbi, khawmpi siangthou, ahun geihgeih a na puankhiak ding uh hiaite ahi,’ achi hi.
03023005	“Akha khatna, ani sawm-le-li nitaklam in Toupa Paikan Ankuang akipan ding hi.
03023006	Huai kha mah ni sawm-le-nga Toupa a dia silngou soh louh tanghou ankuang ahi a, ni sagih sung silngou soh louh tanghou na ne ding uh ahi.
03023007	Ani khat ni in khawmpi siangthou na nei ding ua, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
03023008	Ni sagih sung mei a thillat Toupa kiang ah na lan ding ua; ani sagih ni pen khawmpi siangthou ahi a, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei, chi in,” achi hi.
03023009	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03023010	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, k'on gam piak ding na va tun ua, huai a buh na lak chiang un, na buh thak masate uh phal khat siampu kiang a na hon tawi ding uh ahi.
03023011	Pomsak theih na hihna ding un, ama'n buhphal pen Toupa ma ah hon na veisak dia; Sabbath zingchiang in siampu in avei ding ahi.
03023012	Buhphal na vei ni un belamnoupa, gensiatbei, kum khat a upa halmang thillat ding in Toupa kiang ah na lan ding uh ahi.
03023013	Tangbuang thillat bel tangbuang nel chi ephah mun sawm a khen mun nih sathau a mek, Toupa a dia gimlim, mei a thillat ahi ding ahi. Dawn thillat ahihleh uain hin mun li a khen mun khat ahi ding ahi.
03023014	Na Pathian uh a dia thillat na lat ma un, huai ma himhim in tanghou hiam, kan thoh hiam, an thak hitaleh na ne ding uh ahi kei. Hiai na tenna teng ua na suante zel uh tan a na tangtawn dan thuseh ding uh ahi.
03023015	“Sabbath zingchiang vei thillat buhphal na hon tawi ni ua pan in na sim ding ua, Sabbath sagihvei aching ding ahi.
03023016	Sabbath sagihveina zingsang a pan ni sawmnga na sim ding ua, Toupa kiang a tangbuang thak thillat na lat ding uh ahi.
03023017	Na tenna mun ua pan in ephah mun sawm a khen mun nih a bawl, tanghou beu vei ding nih, tangbuang nel chi, silngou toh kan, Toupa a dia gah masa vei thillat a lat dia na hon tawi ding uh ahi.
03023018	Tanghou lat toh kituak in belamnou sagih gensiatbei, kum khat a upa leh bawngtuai leh belampa nih na lan ding uh ahi. Huaite atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat uh toh, Toupa a dia halmang thillat, Toupa a dia gimlim, mei a thillat ahi ding hi.
03023019	Khelh thoihna ding in kelpa khat leh kilemna thillat kithoihna ding in belamnou apa nih kum khat a upa na lat ding uh ahi.
03023020	Siampu in gah masa a bawl tanghou, belamnou nih toh Toupa ma a vei thillat in avei dia; siampu a tuam, Toupa a dia siangthou ahi ding.
03023021	Huai ni mah na sep ding ua, nou a ding in khawmpi siangthou ahi dia, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei. Hiai na tenna teng uah na suante uh tan in tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
03023022	“Na lou ua buh na lak chiang un na lounawl zul uh la vek kei un. Asang leng na zong ding uh ahi kei. Mizawng leh gamdangmi a dia na hawisak ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chi in,” achi hi.
03023023	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03023024	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, akha sagihna huai kha ani khat ni, noute a ding in khawlna ni ahi dia; pengkul mut in theihgigena khawmpi siangthou ahi ding.
03023025	Nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei; Toupa a dia mei a thillat na lan ding uh ahi, chi in,” achi hi.
03023026	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03023027	“Akha sagihna ani sawm ni Thoihna Ni ahi a; nou a ding in khawmpi siangthou ahi ding. Na lungsimte uh zangsak unla, Toupa a ding in mei a thillat lan un.
03023028	Huai ni in bang nna peuh na sem ding uh ahi kei. Toupa na Pathian uh ma a lemna bawlsak ding, Thoihna Ni lah ahi ngal a.
03023029	Huai ni kigimsak lou peuhmah, amite a pan satkhiak ahi ding.
03023030	Kuapeuh hi hen aw, huai ni a bang nna peuh sem, achipihte uh lak a pan ka satkhe ding hi.
03023031	Bang nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei. Hiai bel na tenna peuh ua na suante zel uh tan a tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
03023032	Nou a ding in khawlna Sabbath ni ahi a; na kigimsak ding uh ahi. Huai kha ani kua ni nitaklam, huai kha nitaklam a pan nitaklam nawn tan Sabbath ni in na zang ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
03023033	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03023034	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, akha sagihna ani sawm-le-nga ni Toupa a ding in ni sagih sung Biakbuk Ankuang ahi ding hi.
03023035	Ani khatna pen khawmpi siangthou ahi dia, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
03023036	Ni sagih sung in mei a thillat Toupa kiang ah na lan ding ua, ani giat ni nou a ding in khawmpi siangthou ahi ding. Mei a thillat Toupa kiang ah na lan ding ua; khawmpi bei ni ahi a, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
03023037	“Hiaite ahi, Toupa ankuangluina hunbi, Toupa a dia mei a thillat, halmang thillat, tangbuang thillat, kithoihna, dawn thillat, ani tuam chiat a lan dia khawmpi siangthou na zat dingte uh;
03023038	Toupa Sabbathte, na thilpiakte uh, na thuchiam tengteng uh, amah ut thu a thillat, Toupa kiang a na thillat zelte uh ban ah.
03023039	“Akha sagihna ni sawm-le-nga ni a na lou ua thilpiangte na lak khit chiang un Toupa ankuangluina ni sagih na zang ding ua; ani khatna ni khawl kinkenna ni ahi dia, ani giat ni leng khawl kinkenna mah ahi ding hi.
03023040	Ani khat ni in singkung hoihte gahte, tum sing hiangte, singbawkpha hiangte, lui a muisumte na tawi ding ua, Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah ni sagih sung kipak in na om ding uhi.
03023041	Hiai ankuangluina bel Toupa a dia kum chih a ni sagih sung na zat ding uh ahi. Hiai na suante uh zel tan a tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi. Akha sagihna ana zat zel ding uh ahi.
03023042	Sawlbuk ah ni sagih sung na teng ding ua, Israel mi a piang himhim aidakbuk ah na ten vek ding uh ahi.
03023043	Huchi in na suante un Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak lai in aidakbuk ah ka tengsak, chih athei ding uh. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chi in,” achi hi.
03023044	Huchi in Mosi in Toupa ankuangluina hunbite Israel suante kiang ah apuangta hi.
03024001	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03024002	“Israel suante, Olive thau chimtak, det ding a suk, khawnvak kuansak gigena ding a na kiang a hon tawi ding in thu pia in.
03024003	Kihoupihna puanin a thu theihpihna puanzak polam ah nitaklam a pan zinglam tan a ding in Toupa ma ah Aaron in koih hoih hen. Hiai na suante zel uh tan a tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
03024004	Toupa ma ah khawnvak koihna siangthoutak tung ah khawnvakte koih hoih zel hen.
03024005	“Tangbuang nel chi la inla, tanghou sawm-le-nih in bawl in. Tanghou khat a ephah mun sawm a khen mun nih zat ding ahi.
03024006	Toupa ma ah dohkan siangthou tung ah vual nih in, vual khat a guk tuaktuak in na chiang ding ahi.
03024007	Tanghou tung a avual nih ah begaw chimtak na koih dia, theihgigena, Toupa a dia mei a thillat ahong hihtheihna ding in.
03024008	Sabbath teng in Toupa ma ah akoih hoih zel ding ahi. Hiai tangtawn thukhun, Israel suante a ding ahi.
03024009	Hiai Aaron leh atapate a tuam ahi dia, mun siangthou ah ane ding uh. Tangtawn dan thuseh ding a Toupa a dia mei a thillatte lak a, amah a dia thil siangthoutak ahi,” chi in.
03024010	Israel numei tapa, apa Aigupta mi khat Israel suante lak ah ava hoh a; huai Israel numei tapa leh Israel mi khat giahmun ah akisual uhi.
03024011	Israel numei tapa in Pathian min gensia in ahamsiatkhum a; huchi in Mosi kiang ah ahon pi uhi. Anu min Shelomith ahi a, Dan chi Dibri tanu ahi.
03024012	Toupa kam a pan thupawt ngakna in suangkul ah akhum uhi.
03024013	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03024014	“Hamsiat loupa giahphual polam ah pikhia unla, atheihpihte tengteng in alu ah akhut uh nga uhenla, mipi omkhawm tengteng in suang in deng uhen.
03024015	Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, kuapeuh a Pathian hamsiat loh peuhmah in akhelh moh apo ding.
03024016	Toupa min gense peuhmah hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Mipi omkhawm tengteng in suang in adeng ngeingei ding uh ahi. Toupa min agensiatleh gamdangmi leng, hiai gam a mi him leng hihlup ding ahi.
03024017	“Si khop a mi tung a khut kha peuhmah hihlup ngeingei ding ahi.
03024018	Si khop a ganta tung a khut kha peuhmah in adit ding ahi; ganta sik in ganta mah ahi ding hi.
03024019	“Mi'n a-invengte amelsiat sakleh ahih bang geih atung a hih ding ahi.
03024020	Guh kitan sik in guh kitan, mit sik in mit, ha sik in ha; mi ahih melsiat bang in atung ah leng hih ahi ding.
03024021	Ganta that peuhmah in adit ding ahi. Mi that peuhmah hihlup ding ahi.
03024022	Gamdang mite a ding leh hiai gam mite a ding in dan kibang khat na nei ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, na chi ding,” chi in.
03024023	Huchi in Mosi in Israel suante ahoupih a, hamse loupa giahphual polam ah apikhia ua, suang in adeng uh, Israel suante'n Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi.
03025001	Huan Toupa'n Sinai Tang ah Mosi ahoupih a,
03025002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘K'on gam piak ding a na va tun chiang un, Toupa min in agam in leng Sabbath ni atang ding ahi.
03025003	Na lou uah kum guk sung thil na ching ding ua, na grephuan kum guk sung na satnou ding ua, agahte na la ding uhi.
03025004	Akum sagih kum in gam khawl kinkenna, Toupa min a Sabbath ni ahi dia: na lou a buh-le-bal na chin ding uh ahi kei, na grephuan na satnou ding ahi sam kei.
03025005	Na buhpou na la ding ahi kei, na kep louh grep na lou ding ahi kei. Gam khawl kinkenna kum ahi ding ahi.
03025006	Gam khawl kum ate na nektawm ding uh ahi dia; nang, na sikha leh na sikhanu, na kiloh mi, na kiang a teng gamdangmi a ding ahi.
03025007	Na bawnghon, na gam a ganta a dia nektawm ding ahi,’ achi hi.
03025008	“Khawl kum, kum sagih na sim dia, kum sagih mun sagih ahi ding a; khawl kum, kum sagih sung kum sawmli-le-kua ahi ding hi.
03025009	Huai khit akha sagihna, a ani sawm ni in pengkul ngaihtak in na vialmutsak dia; Thoihna Ni in na gam tengteng uah pengkul na vialmutsak ding uhi.
03025010	Akum sawmngana na kipahpih ding ua, gamsung pumpi a, huai a teng mite kiang ah noplenna thu na puang ding uhi. Noute a ding in Jubili ahi dia; michih ama neih-le-lam chiat na pekik nawn ding ua, michih ama inkuan ah akik nawn ding ahi.
03025011	Huai akum sawmngana pen nou a ding in Jubili ahi dia; bangmah na ching kei ding ua, apou leng na la kei ding ua, kep louh grep gah leng na lou ding uh ahi kei.
03025012	Jubili ahih ziak in nou a ding in siangthou ahi dia, na lou ua thil gahte na ne ding uhi.
03025013	“Hiai Jubili kum in michih kiang ah amah a mah na pekik nawn ding uh ahi.
03025014	Na invengte kiang a banghiam na khot a, na invengte kiang a banghiam na lei in leng kikhem in kinekna lemtang in na zang ding uh ahi kei.
03025015	Jubili khit akum zah dungzui zel in na invengte thil na lei dia, buh-le-bal tun kum tamdan dungzui in na kiang ah azuak ding ahi.
03025016	Akum tamdan dungzui zel in ama'n na khangsak dia, akum tawm dan dungzui in ama'n na kiamsak ding ahi. Buh-le-bal tun kum tam dungzui a na kiang ah zuak lah ahi ngal a.
03025017	Na kikhem ding uh ahi kei. Na Pathian na lau ding uh ahi; kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi ngal a.
03025018	“Huaiziak in ka dan thusehte zui in ka vaihawmte na pom ding uh ahi. Huchi in huai gam ah bittak in na teng ding uhi.
03025019	Gam in gah asuah dia, niang-le-tai a ne in na ta ding ua, bittak in na va teng ding uhi.
03025020	Ahihleh, akum sagih kum in bang ka neta ding ua? Ngai dih, bangmah lah ka ching kei ua, ka thil tungte uh lah ka la sam kei ua, na chih uleh,
03025021	akum guk kum in ka vualzawlna na tung ua tung ding in thu ka pe dia, kum thum sung a ding gah asuah ding hi.
03025022	Akum giat kum in buh na ching ding ua, haichi na pawi sung un buh luite na ne ding ua, akum kua kum tan, ahong thak nawn matan in aluite na ne ding uhi.
03025023	“Tangtawn a dia gam pen khot det ding ahi kei, gam lah kei a ahi ngal a. Noute mikhual, akhohloh lel na hi uh.
03025024	“Na gam luah tengteng uh, tatkik na phal ding uh ahi.
03025025	Na unau ahong gentheih a, agam khenkhat azuakleh atanau naipen ahong kuan dia, a-unau gam zuaksa atan ding ahi.
03025026	Mi'n tatsak ding mi nei kei mahleh ahong navak a tatna khop aneihleh,
03025027	azuak kum sut henla, azuakna pa kiang ah aval pe nawn hen; huchi in agam aluah nawn ding.
03025028	Amah a dia atatkik theih nawn keileh, akhotsa pen Jubili kum tan in aleipa khut ah om hen. Jubili kum in apawt nawn dia, ama'n agam aluah nawn ding hi.
03025029	“Mi'n kulh nei khua a tenna inn azuakleh, azuak a pan kum khat sung in atat nawn theihna hamphatna anei ding hi. Kum khat sung in atan thei nawn ding hi.
03025030	Kum khat sung a atat theih keileh, kulh nei khua a a-inn pen tangtawn in asuante zel tan in leng aleimi a ahi den ding ahi, Jubili chiang in leng apawt tuan kei ding hi.
03025031	Kulh nei lou khua a innte singtang gam bang a ngaih ahi dia, tat theih ahi dia, Jubili chiang in apawt ding.
03025032	Himahleh Levi mite khua, atantuam khua ua innte Levi mite'n chik lai peuh in leng atan thei ding uhi.
03025033	“Levi chite lak a mi'n atat keileh zuaksa inn leh atantuan khua pen Jubili chiang in apawt ding. Levi chite khua a innte Israel suante lak a atantuan uh ahi.
03025034	Akho kim ua loute zuak theih ahi kei ding, tangtawn a atantuan uh ahi.
03025035	“Na unau ahong gentheih a, nang ahong belhleh na kep ding ahi. Mikhual ahihkeileh khualzin bang himahleh amah na kiang ah na tengsak ding ahi.
03025036	Amah a pan dangka hiam, thil hiam, apung la ke'n, himahleh, Pathian lau in, na unau na kiang a atentheihna ding in.
03025037	Apung delh in na sum na leitawisak ding ahi kei.
03025038	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh, Kanaan gam hon pepa leh na Pathian uh hi dia Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhepa ka hi.
03025039	“Na unau ahong gentheih a, na kiang a ahong puklutleh sikha bang ana zat ding ahi kei.
03025040	Kilohmi bang leh na kiang a teng sam bang in na kiang ah ateng dia, Jubili kum tan in nangmah nna asem ding ahi.
03025041	Huai khit in na kiang a pan apawt dia, amah leh atate, amau inkuan ngei ah alut nawn ding uh, api-le-pute inn-le-lou aluah nawn ding uhi.
03025042	Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak, ka sikhate ahi ngal ua, sikha dia zuakkhiak ding ahi kei uh.
03025043	Huhamtak in atung uah gamta ke'nla; na Pathian lau zaw in.
03025044	Sikhanu leh sikhapa na neih dingte na kim ua namte lak a mi, sikhanu leh sikhapa dia na lei dingte ahi ding uh.
03025045	Na lak ua teng gamdangmi leh na gam ua piang a-inkote uh lak a mite leng na lei thei sam ding ua; amau na thil neih asuak ding uh.
03025046	Na nung ua na tapate uh gouluah ding in, athil neih ding un na bawl ding uhi. Huai lak a mite na tangtawn sikha ding in na nei ding uh. Himahleh na unau Israel suante lak ah huhamtak in na gamtang ding uh ahi kei.
03025047	“Gamdangmi hiam, na kiang ua teng kuahiam hong hau a, akiang a na unaupa ahong gentheih a, na kiang a gamdangmi hiam, na kiang a teng kiang hiam a amah-le-amah akizuak khiakleh,
03025048	khotsa ahih nung in leng akitankik thei ding hi; a-unaute lak a khat in amah atan thei ding hi.
03025049	Apaneu in hiam, apaneu tapa in hiam atan thei ding; achipihte lak a atanau nai in hiam atan thei ding hi. Amah leng ahong hauh nawnleh akitan thei ding hi.
03025050	Apuklutnapa toh apuklut a pan Jubili kum nawn ding sutkhawm uhenla, apuklut man, akum omdan in ahi dia; kiloh sikha ding a goih sut bang zel a sutsak ahi ding hi.
03025051	Kum tampi a-om laileh atatna man pen abelh sung hu toh kituak a piakkik nawn ding ahi.
03025052	Jubili kum tunna ding kum tawmchik kia om lai ahihleh sutkhawm uhenla; a-om kum tamdan dungzui in atat man apekik ding ahi.
03025053	Kum khat bi zel a goih kilohmi bang in abel ding hi. Abelhpa atung a huhamtak a na gamtatsak louh ding ahi.
03025054	Hiai kumte a tat ahihkeileh, Jubili kum in apawt ding; amah leh atate teng toh.
03025055	Israel suante lah ka sikhate ahi ngal ua, Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak, ka sikhate ahi uh. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,” achi hi.
03026001	“Milimte na kibawl ding uh ahi kei. Milim bawltawm suangphuh na dingsak ding uh ahi kei. Biak ding in na gam uah suang milim na phut ding uh ahi sam kei; kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi ngal a.
03026002	Ka Sabbathte na tang ding ua, ka mun siangthou na zahtak ding uh ahi. Kei Toupa ka hi.
03026003	“Ka thusehte na man ua, ka thupiakte pom a na man uleh ahunhun in vuahtui ka hon zusak ding hi.
03026004	Lei in thil ahon piangsak dia, gam a singte'n gah asuang ding uhi.
03026005	Na phual ua buh in grep loh hun abanpha dia, na grep loh hun un thil chin hun abanpha ding hi. Na tanghou uh niang-le-tai in na ne ding ua, na gam uah bittak in na teng ding uh.
03026006	“Hiai gam ah muanna ka omsak dia, na lum ding ua, kuamah in ahon lausak kei ding. Gamsa hoihloute hiai gam a pan ka hawlmang dia, namsau in na gam uh atuansuak sam kei ding hi.
03026007	Na melmate uh na delh ding ua, na ma uah namsau a thah in a-om ding uh.
03026008	Mi nga in zakhat na delh ding ua, zakhat in singkhat na delh ding uh. Na melmate uh na ma uah namsau a thah in a-om ding uhi.
03026009	K'on deihsak dia, chi tampi ka hon suangsak ding hi. Na lak uah ka thukhun ka hihkip ding.
03026010	Sawtpi na kepsa, aluite na ne ding ua, athak koihna ding in aluite na lakhe ding uh.
03026011	Na lak uah ka biakbuk ka omsak dia; ka hinna in noute ahon kih kei ding.
03026012	Na lak uah ka teng dia, na Pathian uh ka hi dia, nou leng ka mite na hi ding uh.
03026013	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh, asikha uh na hihlouhna ding ua Aigupta gam a pan noute hon pikhepa ka hi. Na hakkolte uh ka hihtanta a, dingtang in ka hon paisakta hi.
03026014	“Himahleh ka thu pom lou a, hiai thupiak tengteng na zuih kei ua, ka thusehte na deih kei ua,
03026015	na hinna un ka vaihawmte ahuat a, ka thupiak tengteng zui lou a, ka thukhun na bohsiat uleh ke'n leng na tung uah hiai ka hih ding.
03026016	Na tung uah thil lauhuai, na hinna uh netum leh na mit uh hihsia kumzawnna leh khodam ka lengsak ding hi. Na haichite uh bangmah lou dia ching na hi ding ua, na melmate un ane zel ding uh.
03026017	Na tung uah ka mai ka gumsak dia, na melmate uh ma ah na vuallel ding uh. Nou hon hote'n na tung uah vai ahawm ding ua, kuamah delh louh in na tai ding uhi.
03026018	“Huchi pipi a leng ka thu na pom kei lai uleh na khelhnate uh ziak in sagihvei ka hon gawt lai ding hi.
03026019	Na thilhihtheihna ki-otsakna uh ka hihse dia, na tung ua van sik bang in leh na nuai ua lei sumsan bang in ka bawl ding.
03026020	Na tha uh na sengthawn lel ding ua; na gam un thil apiangsak kei dia, gam a singte'n gah asuang sam kei ding uh.
03026021	“Kei kalh lam a na om ua, ka thu na pom kei uleh na khelhna uh dungzui in amun sagih in na tung uah gawtna ka tungsak ding.
03026022	Na lak uah gamsate ka hon sawl dia, huaite'n na tate uh ahon laksak ding ua, na gantate uh ahihmangthang ding ua, na hong tawm mahmah ding ua, na lampite uh nutsiat in a-om ding hi.
03026023	“Hiaite tawn a ka hon bawlhoihna na pom tuan kei ua, kei kalh a na om lailai uleh,
03026024	ke'n leng nou ka hon kalh dia, kei mahmah in na khelhnate uh ziak in sagihvei ka hon gawt ding hi.
03026025	Huchi in na tung uah namsau ka lengsak dia, huai in ka thukhun na palsat uh phu ala ding hi. Noumau khosung chiat a na kibawmkhawm chiang un, na lak uah hii ka lengsak dia, melma khut a piak na hi ding uh.
03026026	Na muanpen uh tanghou ka beisak chiang in, numei sawm in thuk khat ah na tanghou uh a-emkhawm ding ua, na tanghou uh buk chitchiat in ahon pe ding ua; na ne ding ua, na kham tuan kei ding uh.
03026027	“Huchi tengteng a leng ka thu na pom kei ua, kei kalh a na om lailai uleh hehtak in noute ka hon kalh ding hi.
03026028	Na khelhnate uh ziak in sagihvei, kei mahmah in ka hon gawt ding hi.
03026029	Na tapate uh sa na ne ding ua, na tanute uh sa na ne nalai ding uhi.
03026030	Na mun sangte uh ka chimsak dia, na milimte uh ka puksak dia, na luang uh na milimte uh luang tung ah ka pai ding. Ka hinna in nou ahon kih ding hi.
03026031	Na khuate uh ka gamsak dia, na mun siangthoute uh ka hawmsak dia, na gimlimte uh ka dik kei ding hi.
03026032	Gam ka hihse ding a; huai a om na melmate un lamdang asa ding uh.
03026033	Namdangte lak ah ka hon dalhsak dia, noute hon delhzui ding in namsau ka phawi ding. Huchi in na gam uh ahawm dia, na khuate uh agam ding.
03026034	Ahawm sung teng leh na melmate uh gam a na om sung teng uh gam in a Sabbathte atang dia, a Sabbathte ah nuam asa ding uhi.
03026035	Ahawm sung teng in akhawl ding; asung a na ten lai ua, na Sabbath nite ua, akhawl louh ziak un.
03026036	“Na lak ua mi omsunte, amelmate uh gam ah alungtang sung uah bahna ka omsak ding hi. Nahthel ging in leng adelh dia, namsau a pan taikek bang in ataikek ding ua, kuamah delh louh in apuk ding uh.
03026037	Kuamah delh louh in namsau ma a taikek bang in akipalpuk lemlum ding ua; na melmate uh dal ding in hatna himhim na nei kei ding uh.
03026038	Namdangte lak ah na mangthang ding ua, na melmate gam in noute ahon negai ding.
03026039	Na lak ua omsunte na melmate uh gam ah athulimlouhna ziak un, amuih hiaihiai ding ua; api-le-pute un athulimlouhnate uh ziak a amuihloh bang un amau leng amuihloh sam ding uhi.
03026040	Ka tung a akhelh ziak leh athulimlouhna uh leh api-le-pute thulimlouhna leh kei kalh a a-om ziak un,
03026041	ke'n leng amau ka kalh a, amelmate uh gam a ka omsakdante akitheihmohbawl kei ding ua; asum louh lungtang ua akiniamkhiak ua, athulimlouhna uh ziak a ka gawtna apom uleh, Jakob kiang a ka thukhun ka theigige ding hi.
03026042	Isak leh Abraham kiang a ka thukhunte ka theigige ding hi.
03026043	“Agam mah leng ka theigige ding hi. Gam in leng akihepmangsan dia, amau om lou in ahawm sung in a Sabbathte ah nuam asa ding. Ka vaihawmte adeih louh ziak uh leh ahinna un ka dan thusehte amuh nop louh nak ziak in, athulimlouhna uh gawtna apom ding uhi.
03026044	Huchi pipi in leng, amelmate uh gam a a-om un amaute ka paimang kei dia, amaute hihmangthang ding leh ka thukhun bohse ding in amaute ka kih kei ding; kei Toupa a Pathian uh lah ka hi ngal a.
03026045	A Pathian uh ka hihtheihna dia namte mitmuh a Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak, apipute uh thukhun amaute ziak in ka theigige zaw ding hi. Kei Toupa ka hi, chi in,” achi hi.
03026046	Hiaite Sinai Tang a Mosi zang a amah leh Israel suante kal a Toupa'n abawl thupiakte, vaihawmte leh dante ahi.
03027001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
03027002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, ‘Mi khat in midangte Toupa a tuam dia septuam alan dia thuchiam abawlleh,’ achi a,
03027003	“Pasal ahihleh na sehdan ding kum sawmnih leh kum sawmguk kikal a upa, mun siangthou a shekel buk dungzui in dangka shekel sawmnga hu ahih ding ahi.
03027004	Numei ahihleh na sehdan ding shekel sawmthum ahih ding ahi.
03027005	Kum nga leh kum sawmnih kikal a upa ahihleh, na sehdan ding pasal, shekel sawmnih, numei, shekel sawm ahih ding ahi.
03027006	Kha khat leh kum nga kikal a upa ahihleh, na sehdan ding pasal, dangka shekel nga, numei, shekel thum ahih ding ahi.
03027007	Kum sawmguk a kipan atunglam ahihleh, na sehdan ding pasal, shekel sawm-le-nga, numei, shekel sawm ahih ding ahi.
03027008	“Himahleh na seh zah pe zou lou khop a mizawng ahihleh siampu kiang ah ava pai dia, siampu in anasep ding; thuchiammi zoh hun bangbang ana sep ding ahi.
03027009	“Thillat, Toupa kiang a alat ding uh gan ahihleh kuapeuh in Toupa a dia huchibang apiak peuh uh siangthou ahih ding ahi.
03027010	Ahihlamdang ding ahi kei, ahoih pen asia in, asia pen ahoih in akheng ding ahi sam kei. Gan pen gan mah a akhen teiteileh anih in asiangthou ding uhi.
03027011	“Gan siang lou, Toupa kiang a lat ngei louh chi ahihleh, gan pen siampu ma ah akoih ding ahi.
03027012	Siampu in ahoihdan bang in aman hun ana sep ding. Siampu in aseh bangbang ahi zel ding hi.
03027013	Himahleh atat nawn taktak dingleh na seh zah mun nga a khen mun khat abehlap ding ahi.
03027014	“Mi'n a-inn Toupa a tuam dia alat dingleh ahoih leh hoih louh dungzui in siampu in asep dia; siampu seh bang ahi ding.
03027015	Alanmi in a-inn pen atat nawn dingleh aman ding ana seh zah mun nga a khen mun khat abehlap ding hi. Huchi in amah a ahi nawn ding hi.
