03027016	“Mi'n agam a lou akhen Toupa a tuam dia alat ding leh na sehdan ding achi tuh dungzui zel in ahi ding. Barli buh homer khat mun, dangka shekel sawmnga man ahi ding.
03027017	Alou pen Jubili kum a pan lat ahihleh na seh bang ahitou pek ding.
03027018	Jubili kum nung a lat ahihleh bel siampu in Jubili tun nawnna ding kum dungzui zel in aman asep dia, na sehdan a pan akiam hun bawl ahi ding.
03027019	Alanmi in atat nawn taktak ding leh aman na seh zah mun nga a khen mun khat abehlap dia, amah a ahi nawn ding hi.
03027020	Lou pen atat nop louh hiam, midang kiang a khot hiam ahihleh tat nawn theih ahi kei ding.
03027021	Jubili kum a apawt nawn hun in lou pen Toupa a dia siangthou, amah a tuam siangthou ahi dia siampu a ahi ding hi.
03027022	“Amah lou him hilou, aleisa lou, mi'n Toupa kiang a alatleh,
03027023	Jubili kum tan in na sehdan bang in siampu in aman asehsak dia, na seh bang in Toupa a dia siangthou hi ding in huai ni in ape ding hi.
03027024	Jubili kum in aleinapa, agamneipa mah in atang nawn ding.
03027025	“Na sehdan tengteng mun siangthou shekel bang zel ahi dia, gerah sawmnih shekel khat ahi ding.
03027026	“Ganta lak a piang masapen, apian masakpen ziak a Toupa a tuam dia sehsa peuhmah kuamah in alan ding ahi kei. Bawngtal leng belam leng hitaleh, Toupa a tuam ahi.
03027027	Gan siang lou ahihleh na sehdan bang a tat ding ahi dia, amun nga a khen mun khat abehlap ding hi. Tat ahihkeileh, na sehdan bang a khot ding ahi.
03027028	“Mi'n aneih lak a bangpeuh, mihing hi in, ganta hiam, aneihsa lou hitaleh, Toupa kiang a apiaksa zuak ding ahi kei a, tat ding leng ahi kei. Huai thil chih Toupa a dia siangthoupen ahi.
03027029	Kuapeuh si dia vai hawmsak, mihing lak a pan manthatsak ding, tat ding ahi kei, amah sihsak ngeingei ding ahi.
03027030	“Gamsung a sawm-a-khat peuhmah, gamsung a haichi hitaleh, singgah hitaleh, Toupa a ahi. Toupa a dia thil siangthou ahi.
03027031	Mi'n asawm-a-khat atat nopleh, mun nga a khen mun khat abehlap ding ahi.
03027032	Bawng leh belam sawm-a-khat thu ah, ganvulmi chiang a chiamtehsa nangawn leng, asawmna zel Toupa a dia siangthou ahi ding.
03027033	Huai gan hoih hia, hoih lou, a-enchian ding ahi kei, akhek ding leng ahi sam kei. Akhekleh, akhek pen leh akhekna pen leng anih un siangthou ahi ding ua; tat ding ahi kei hi,” achi hi.
03027034	Hiaite Israel suante a dia Toupa'n Sinai Tang a Mosi kiang a thupiakte ahi uhi.
04001001	Aigupta gam a kipan ahong pawt uh akum nihna, akha nihna, ani khat ni in Sinai gamdai ah kihoupihna biakbuk ah Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04001002	“Israel suan omkhawm tengteng, a-inkuankuan un amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in pasal tengteng sim vek in,” achi hi.
04001003	“Kum sawmnih a pan atunglam Israel lak a galdou thei chiang peuhmah nang leh Aaron in apawlpawl in na sim vek ding uh ahi.
04001004	Na kiang ah nam chih lak a khat, inkuan a vaihawm makai a-om ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04001005	Hiaite na kiang a om dingte min ahi: Reuben nam a kipan Shedeur tapa Elizur,
04001006	Simeon nam a kipan Zurishaddai tapa Shelumiel.
04001007	Judah nam a kipan Amminadab tapa Nahson.
04001008	Issakar nam a kipan Zuar tapa Nethaneel.
04001009	Zebulun nam a kipan Helon tapa Eliab.
04001010	Joseph tapate a kipan: Ephraim nam a kipan Ammihud tapa Elishama; Manasseh nam a kipan Pedazur tapa Gamaliel.
04001011	Benjamin nam a kipan Gideoni tapa Abidan.
04001012	Dan nam a kipan Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer.
04001013	Asher nam a kipan Okran tapa Pagiel.
04001014	Gad nam a kipan Deuel tapa Eliasaph.
04001015	Naphtali nam a kipan Enan tapa Ahira.
04001016	Hiaite omkhawm mipite' tel, api-le-pute uh nam a vaihawm makai Israel inkuan a lupente ahi uh, chi in.
04001017	Mosi leh Aaron in huai mi amin ua lohte api uhi.
04001018	Mipi omkhawm tengteng akha nihna, ani khat ni in asamkhawm vek ua; a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam teng apipute uh min ataklang uhi.
04001019	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Sinai gamdai ah asimta uhi.
04001020	Israel tapa upapen Reuben tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in pasal kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001021	Reuben nam, asimte uh singli sangguk-le-zanga ahi.
04001022	Simeon tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in pasal kum sawmnih a pan atunglam galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001023	Simeon nam, asimte uh singnga sangkua-le-zathum ahi uh.
04001024	Gad tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in pasal kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001025	Gad nam a asimte uh singli sangnga zaguk-le-sawmnga ahi uh.
04001026	Judah tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001027	Judah nam a asimte uh singsagih sangli-le-zaguk ahi uh.
04001028	Issakar tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001029	Issakar nam a asimte uh singnga sangli-le-zali ahi uh.
04001030	Zebulun tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh kizomdan dungzui zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001031	Zebulun nam a asimte uh singnga sangsagih-le-zali ahi uh.
04001032	Joseph tate lak a Ephraim tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001033	Ephraim nam a asimte uh singli-le-zanga ahi uh.
04001034	Manasseh tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001035	Manasseh nam a asimte uh singthum sangnih-le-zanih ahi uh.
04001036	Benjamin tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001037	Benjamin nam a asimte uh, singthum sangnga-le-zali ahi uh.
04001038	Dan tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001039	Dan nam a asimte uh, singguk sangnih-le-zasagih ahi uh.
04001040	Asher tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001041	Asher nam a asimte uh, singli sangkhat-le-zanga ahi uh.
04001042	Naphtali tate suante achichi in a-inkuankuan in amin uh tamdan bang zel in kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng asim uhi.
04001043	Naphtali nam a asimte uh, singnga sangthum-le-zali ahi uh.
04001044	Hiaite Mosi leh Aaron in Israel vaihawm makai sawm-le-nih, inkuan a lupente toh asimte uh ahi.
04001045	Huchi in Israel suan a-inkuankuan ua kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, galdou thei teng, Israel gam ate sim ahi uhi.
04001046	Asim teng uh nuaiguk sangthum zanga-le-sawmnga ahi uh.
04001047	Levite pipute asimtel kei uh.
04001048	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04001049	“Levi chi na simtel ding ahi kei, Israel mite lak ah na simtel ding ahi sam kei.
04001050	“Levite theihpihna biakbuk kem mite leh van tengteng kem mite dia seh zawk ding ahi. Biakbuk a van tengteng azawng ding ua, akem ding ua, biakbuk akimvel in a-omkhum ding uhi.
04001051	Biakbuk malam a apai chiang in Levite'n aphel ding ua; biakbuk kaih ding chiang in Levite mah in akai nawn ding uh. Namdang hong kigolh peuhmah hihlup ding ahi.
04001052	“Israel suante'n amau mun chiat ah, apawlpawl in atamdan uh dungzui zel in apuaninte uh akai ding uh.
04001053	Himahleh Levite'n Israel suan omkhawmte tung a hehna a-omlouhna ding in theihpihna biakbuk kimvel ah akai ding uhi. Levite'n theihpihna biakbuk akep ding uh,” achi hi.
04001054	Huchibang in Israel suante'n Toupa'n Mosi kiang a thu apiak tengteng bang in ahihta uhi.
04002001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
04002002	“Israel suante'n a-inkuan chiamtehna uh bang chiat in apawl uh hihdan bang in apuanin uh akai ding uhi. Kihoupihna puanin a pan bangtan hiam kihal in akai ding uhi.
04002003	“Nisuahna lam suahlam pang ah apawl uh tamdan dungzui zel a puanin kai dingte Judah pawlte ahi ding ua; Judah tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Amminadab tapa Nashon ahi.
04002004	Sim a om pawlte tamdan, singsagih sangli-le-zaguk ahi uh.
04002005	Amah zom a puanin kai dingte Issakar chi ahi ding a; Issakar tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Zuar tapa Nethaneel ahi.
04002006	Sim a om pawlte tamdan singnga sangli-le-zali ahi uh.
04002007	Zebulun chite, Zebulun tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Helon tapa Eliab ahi.
04002008	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singnga sangsagih-le-zali ahi uh.
04002009	Apawl uh tamdan bang zel in sim a om Judah inkuante nuaikhat singgiat sangguk-le-zali ahi uh. Amaute'n ma akai zel ding uhi.
04002010	“Apawl uh tamdan bang zel in asimlam pang ah Reubente pawl a-om ding ua; Reuben tate lak a vaihawm makai Shedeur tapa Elizur ahi.
04002011	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singli sangguk-le-zanga ahi uh.
04002012	Azom a dingte Simeon chi ahi ding ua; Simeon tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Zurishaddai tapa Selumiel ahi.
04002013	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singnga sangkua-le-zathum ahi uh.
04002014	Huai khit in Gad chite ahi ding ua, Gad tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Reuel tapa Eliasaph ahi.
04002015	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singli sangnga zaguk-le-sawmnga ahi uh.
04002016	Reubente tamdan nuaikhat singnga sangkhat zali-le-sawmnga ahi uh; apawl uh dungzui in. Azom in amaute apawtkhe ding uhi.
04002017	“Kihoupihna puanin ah akipankhe ding ua, Levite alai ah a-om ding ua, a-omna thu zil bang zel in apawlpawl in apai chiat ding uhi.
04002018	“Apawl tamdan thu in atumlam pang ah Ephraimte a-om ding ua, Ephraim tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Ammihud tapa Elishama ahi.
04002019	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singli-le-zanga ahi uh.
04002020	Azom in Manasseh chi ahi ding a; Manasseh tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Pedazur tapa Gamaliel ahi.
04002021	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singthum sangnih-le-zanih ahi uh.
04002022	Azom nawn in Benjamin chite, Benjamin tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Gideoni tapa Abidan ahi.
04002023	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singthum sangnga-le-zali ahi uh.
04002024	Ephraimte tamdan nuaikhat sanggiat-le-zakhat ahi. Azom nawn in apaikhe ding uhi.
04002025	“Apawl uh tamdan bang zel in Dante amallam pang ah a-om ding ua; Dan tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer ahi.
04002026	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singguk leh sangnih leh zasagih ahi uh.
04002027	Azom a puanin kai dingte Asher chi ahi ding a; Asher tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Okran tapa Pagiel ahi.
04002028	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singli leh sangkhat leh zanga ahi uh.
04002029	Azom nawn in Naphtali chite; Naphtali tate lak a vaihawm makai ding Enan tapa Ahira ahi.
04002030	Sim a om, apawlte tamdan, singnga sangthum-le-zali ahi uh.
04002031	Dante tamdan nuaikhat singnga sangsagih-le-zaguk ahi ua; amau apawlpawl a pawtkhia in ananungpen ahi ding uhi.”
04002032	Hiai Israel suante inkuan teng a mi asimte uh, tamdan ahi a, nuaiguk sangthum zanga-le-sawmnga apha uhi.
04002033	Levite Israel suante lak a simtel ahi kei uh; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in.
04002034	Huchibang in Israel suante'n ahih ua; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang zel in apawlpawl in puanin akai uhi. Huchi mah bang in achichi in a-inkuankuan zel un akipankhe zel uhi.
04003001	Toupa'n Sinai Tang a Mosi ahoupih lai a Aaron leh Mosi suan hiaite ahi uh.
04003002	Aaron tapate min, a-upapen Nadab, huan Abihu, Eleazar leh Ithamar ahi.
04003003	Hiaite siampu dia thaunilh, siampu nasem ding a sehtuam, Aaron tapate min ahi.
04003004	Nadab leh Abihu ahihleh Sinai gamdai a mei zat louh ding achih, Toupa ma a alat lai un Toupa ma ah asita ua, ta anei kei uhi. Eleazar leh Ithamar in apa uh Aaron dam lai in siampu nna asem uhi.
04003005	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04003006	“Levi chite, siampu Aaron kiang ah pi inla, nna aseptheihna ding un akiang ah omsak in.
04003007	Amau biakbuk a nasem in kihoupihna biakbuk chin ah amah leh omkhawm mipi tengteng a ding in nna asem ding uhi.
04003008	Kihoupihna puanin van tengteng akem ding ua, Israel suante a ding in biakbuk ah asem ding uh.
04003009	Levite Aaron leh atapate kiang ah na pe ding a; Israel suante lak a kipan amah kiang a piak ahi uhi.
04003010	Aaron leh atapate na sep ding a, asiampu hihna nna asem nilouh ding uh. Midang hong kigolh a-omleh hihlup ding ahi,” achi hi.
04003011	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04003012	“Ngai in, Levite Israel suante lak a pan Israel suante tachil sul hong masapen sik-le-tang a keimah ngei in ka lak ahi uh. Huaiziak in Levite kei a ahi ding uhi.
04003013	Piang masa ta tengteng kei a ahi. Aigupta gam a piang masa tengteng ka thah ni in Israelte lak a piang masa tengteng, amihing leh ganta tan in kei a tuam ding a ka kham ahi. Kei a ahi ding uh. Kei, Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
04003014	Sinai gamdai ah Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04003015	“Levi tate a-inkuankuan un, akhang-akhang un sim inla; pasal peuhmah kha khat a pan atunglam teng na sim ding ahi,” achi hi.
04003016	Mosi in ahih ding a thupiak bang in Toupa thu bang in asim chiatta hi.
04003017	Levi tapate min: Gershon, Kohath leh Merari ahi.
04003018	Amaute suangpa Gershon tapate min Libni leh Shimei ahi.
04003019	Amaute suangpa Kohath tapate min Amram, Izhar, Hebron leh Uzziel ahi.
04003020	Amaute suangpa Merari tapate min Mahli leh Mushi ahi. Hiaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Levi suante ahi uh.
04003021	Gershon, Libnite leh Simeite suangpa ahi a, hiaite Gershonte suante ahi uhi.
04003022	Pasal tengteng kha khat a pan atunglam asimte uh sangsagih-le-zanga ahi uhi.
04003023	Gershonte suante'n apuanin uh biakbuk tumlam pang ah akai ding uhi.
04003024	Gershonte inkuan a vaihawm makai Lael tapa Eliasaph ahi.
04003025	Gershon tapate'n kihoupihna biakbuk a asep ding uh ahihleh biakbuk leh puanin, atung, kihoupihna biakbuk leh akongkhak puanzak kep ahi ding a;
04003026	a-intual puanzakte, biakbuk chin a, a-intual kongkhak puanzak leh maitam kim a zat ding khau tengteng toh leng ahi lai ding hi.
04003027	Kohath bel Amramte, Izharte, Hebronte leh Uzzielte suangpa ahi a; hiai teng Kohath suante ahi uhi.
04003028	Pasal tengteng kha khat a pan atunglam asimdan bang zel un sanggiat-le-zaguk ahi ua, mun siangthou akem ding uhi.
04003029	Kohath tapate suante'n biakbuk simlam pang ah apuanin akai ding uhi.
04003030	Kohathte suante inkuan a vaihawm makai ding Uzziel tapa Eliazaphan ahi.
04003031	Akep dingte: bawm, dohkan, sathau, khawnvak koihna, maitam, mun siangthou a nasepna tui-um belsuan tengteng, puanzak leh huai a nasepna thil tengteng ahi.
04003032	Siampu Aaron tapa Eleazar, Levi makaite vaihawm makai ahi ding a, mun siangthou kem mite amakaih ding hi.
04003033	Merari, Mahlite leh Mushite suangpa ahi. Hiai Merari suante ahi uh.
04003034	Pasal tengteng kha khat a pan atunglam asimdan bang zel un sangguk-le-zanih ahi uh.
04003035	Merari suante inkuan a vaihawm makai Abihail tapa Zuriel ahi a; biakbuk mallam pang ah apuanin akai ding uhi.
04003036	Merari tapate kep ding a sehte biakbuk khuam lepkhawm, baangkal, akhuamte, akingakna khuakkuak, avanzat tengteng leh nasepna vanzat tengteng ahi uh.
04003037	Akongpi umna khuamte, akingakna khuakkuakte, akilhbelhna leh akhaute toh leng ahi lai ding hi.
04003038	Biakbuk suahlam pang kihoupihna biakbuk chin a, nisuahna lam a puanin kai ding ahihleh Mosi leh Aaron leh atapa ahi ding ua, mun siangthou ah Israel suante a tuam ding in akul peuhpeuh asem ding uh. Namdang hong kigolh peuhmah thah ding ahi.
04003039	Toupa thupiak a Levite a-inkuankuan ua pasal tengteng kha khat a pan atunglam Mosi leh Aaron in asim teng uh singnih-le-sangnih ahi uh.
04003040	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Israel suante lak a piang masa, pasal kha khat a pan atunglam teng sim inla, azah uh thei in.
04003041	Israel suante lak a piang masa teng sik in kei a ding in Levite na hon laksak dia, Israel suante gan tengteng apiang masapen sik in Levite gante, na hon laksak ding ahi, kei Toupa ka hi,” achi hi.
04003042	Mosi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in Israel suante lak a piang masa teng asim hi.
04003043	Amin uh kizom bang zel in kha khat a pan atunglam piang masa pasal teng asim a, singnih sangnih zanih sawmsagih-le-thum ahi uh.
04003044	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04003045	“Israel suante lak a piang masa teng sik in Levite la inla, agan uh sik in Levite gan; Levite kei a ahi ding ua; kei Toupa ka hi.
04003046	Levite sang a tamzawte lak ah tat ding in Israel suante piang masa zanih sawmsagih-le-thum la in.
04003047	Shekel nga chiat na la ding ahi; mun siangthou a shekel bang in na la ding, shekel bel gerah sawmnih ahi:
04003048	Atatna sum val Aaron leh atapate na piak ding ahi,” achi hi.
04003049	Levite tatte ban ah atatna sum uh Mosi in ala hi.
04003050	Israel suante piang masate lak a pan sum ala a; sum siangthou shekel bang in sangkhat zathum sawmguk-le-nga ala hi.
04003051	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak, Toupa thu bang in Mosi in tatna sum Aaron leh atapate apia hi.
04004001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04004002	“Levi tapate lak a Kohath tapate, akhang-akhang un, a-inkuankuan un, sim vek in,
04004003	kum sawmthum a pan atunglam, kum sawmnga tan in nasepna, kihoupihna biakbuk a sem ding teng.
04004004	Kihoupihna puanin mun siangthoupen a Kohath tapate nasep ding hiaite ahi.
04004005	“Giahphual a suan ding teng un Aaron, atapate toh alut ding ua, dantan puanzak ahawkkhe ding ua, huai in thukhun bawm akhuh ding uh.
04004006	Huai pen ngalvang vun in akhuh ding ua, puandum buang in leng akhuh ding ua, azawnna chiang athuah ding uhi.
04004007	“Etsakna tanghou dohkan tung ah puandum buang aphah ding ua, huai ah kuangte, keute, belhbute leh noute butkhiakna ding akoih ding uhi. Tatlak lou in tanghou koih huai ah a-om ding ahi.
04004008	Huai pen puansan in akhuh ding ua; akhuhna ngalvang vun in akhuh ding uh, azawnna chiang athuah ding uhi.
04004009	“Vaksak khawnvak koihna leh huai a dia azat ding ua khawnvakte, ataitehte, avu koihnate, thau bing tengteng puandum buang in akhuh ding uhi.
04004010	Huai leh avanzat tengteng akhuhna ngalvang vun a khuh in azawnna ah akoih ding uhi.
04004011	“Dangka-eng maitam puandum buang in akhuh ding ua, akhuhna ngalvang vun in akhuh nawn ding uh, azawnna chiang athuah ding uhi.
04004012	Mun siangthou a vanzat leh tui-um belsuan tengteng ala vek ding ua, puandum buang in atun ding ua, akhuhna ngalvang vun in akhuh ding uh, azawnna ah akoih ding uhi.
04004013	Maitam a meivu alamang ding ua, atung ah puan sandup aphah ding uhi.
04004014	Atung ah anasep vialvialna uh tui-um belsuan tengteng, mei laknate, sa thukna sikkhutte, vutluahnate, tuikuangte leh maitam tui-um belsuan tengteng akoih ding uhi. Akhuhna ngalvang vun in akhuh ding ua, azawnna abulh ding uh.
04004015	Aaron leh atapate'n mun siangthou leh mun siangthou van tengteng om mun suan dia akhuh khit chiang un; huai khit chiang in azawng ding in Kohath tapate ahong pai ding uhi. Himahleh thil siangthou himhim akhoih ding uh ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw asi kha ding uh. Hiaite kihoupihna biakbuk a Kohath tapate nasep ding ahi.
04004016	“Siampu Aaron tapa Eleazar sep ding, det ding thau, gimnamtui, niteng a tangbuang thillat, nilhchi thau, biakbuk, huai a thil om tengteng, mun siangthou leh avante ngaihtuah ahi,” achi hi.
04004017	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
04004018	“Kohath suan inkuan zaw Levite lak a pan satkhe kei un.
04004019	Himahleh thil siangthoute khoih lou a, si lou a a-omtheihna ding uh hichibang ahi. Aaron leh atapate lut uhenla, asep ding uh leh atantuam ding chiat uh sehsak uhen.
04004020	Himahleh akikhuh lai teng thil siangthoute en ding in lut kei uhen, alut uleh asi ding uh,” achi hi.
04004021	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04004022	“Gershon tapate leng a-inkuankuan un, akhang-akhang un sim vek in.
04004023	Kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa tan in nasepna kihoupihna biakbuk a sem thei ding teng zah sim vek in.
04004024	Gershon suante tantuam nasep lam leh puak lam hiai ahi.
04004025	Biakbuk puanzakte, kihoupihna biakbuk, akhuhnate, atung khuhna ngalvang vun, kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak puanzak;
04004026	intual puanzakte, intual kongkhak puanzakte, abiakbuk leh maitam bul a, akhaute leh avanzat tengteng uh toh apo ding ua, sep dia kiphamoh peuhmah asem ding uhi.
04004027	Gershon suante nasep, asep lam leh puak lam ah atantuan tengteng uh Aaron leh atapate'n asep ding ua; ahih ding uh banghiam nengneng tan a sehsak in huaite asem ding uhi.
04004028	Huaite kihoupihna biakbuk a Gershon suante nasep ahi. Ahih ding uh siampu Aaron tapa Ithamar seh ding ahi.
04004029	“Merari tapate, akhang-akhang un, a-inkuankuan un na sim ding ahi.
04004030	Kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa tan in kihoupihna biakbuk a sem ding zah na sim vek ding ahi.
04004031	Kihoupihna puanin a anasep uh, atantuam ding uh hiaite ahi. Biakbuk khuam lepkhawmte, abaangkalte, akhuamte, akingakna khuakkuakte;
04004032	a-intual umna khuamte, akingakna khuakkuakte, akilhbelhnate, akhaute, avanzat tengteng leh avanzat dang tengteng puakte, amin uh lou chiat in atantuam ding uh na sehsak ding ahi.
04004033	Huaite siampu Aaron tapa Ithamar heu a kihoupihna biakbuk a Merari tapate suante'n ahih ding uh banghiam nengneng tan a anasepdan ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04004034	Huchi in Mosi leh Aaron leh omkhawmte lak a lupente'n Kohathte tapate akhang-akhang un, a-inkuankuan un asimta uhi.
04004035	Kihoupihna puanin a nasepna a ding in michih nasem dia kisate, kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa chiang.
04004036	Huaite akhang-akhang a asim uh sangnih zasagih-le-sawmnga ahi uhi.
04004037	Hiaite ahi uh, kihoupihna biakbuk a nasem Kohathte suan Mosi zang a Toupa thupiak bang a Mosi leh Aaron in asimte.
04004038	Hiaite a-inkuankuan a, akhang-akhang ua kisim, Gershon tapate ahi uh.
04004039	Kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa tan kihoupihna biakbuk nasepna a dia michih nasem dia kisate.
04004040	Akhang akhang a, a-inkuankuan ua asimte uh sangnih zaguk-le-sawmthum ahi uh.
04004041	Huaite ahi uh, Gershon tapate suante, kihoupihna biakbuk a nasem teng, Toupa thupiak bang a Mosi leh Aaron in asimte uh.
04004042	Huaite a-inkuankuan ua, akhang-akhang ua, Merari tapate asimte uh ahi,
04004043	kihoupihna biakbuk a sem ding a nasem zah ding, kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa chiang.
04004044	Huai akhang-akhang a, a-inkuankuan ua asimte uh sangthum leh zanih ahi uh.
04004045	Hiaite Merari tapate suante asim uh, Mosi zang a Toupa thupiak bang a Mosi leh Aaron in asimte ahi uhi.
04004046	Mosi leh Aaron leh Israelte lupente'n akhang-akhang a, a-inkuankuan a, asimte uh avek un huai teng ahi uh.
04004047	Nasem ding leh kihoupihna biakbuk a puakchi pomi ding zah, kum sawmthum a pan atunglam kum sawmnga a upa chiang.
04004048	Asimte uh sanggiat zanga-le-sawmgiat ahi uh.
04004049	Mosi zang a Toupa thupiak bang a michih asep ding leh atantuam ding dungzui zel a sim ahi. Hichibang in Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a sim ahi uhi.
04005001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04005002	“Israel suante agiahna mun ua kipan phak tengteng leh sipawt tengteng leh misi ziak a buah peuhmahte pawtkhesak vek ding in thu pia in.
04005003	Numei leh pasal pawtkhesak in giahphual pua ah na koih ding ahi. Alaitak a ka omna giahna mun abuahsaklouhna ding un,” achi hi.
04005004	Huchi in Israel suante'n huchibang in ahih uhi, dainawl ah akoihkhia ua; Toupa'n Mosi kiang a agen bang in Israel suante'n ahih uhi.
04005005	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04005006	“Israel suante kiang ah gen inla, pasal hiam, numei hiam in Toupa tung ah thil bangpeuh na hihkhial in moh taleh;
04005007	ahihkhelhna ah thupha atawi ding ahi. Ahihkhelh man pen kimtak in adin dia, amun nga a khen mun khat ahihkhelhnapa apiak behlap ding ahi.
04005008	Himahleh huai mi in khelh man piakna ding tanau nai aneih keileh, khelh man pen Toupa a tuam ahi dia, akhelh man leh akhialpa a dia kilemna bawlsakna belampa pen siampu kiang a piak ding ahi.
04005009	Israel suante thil siangthou vei thillat tengteng, siampu kiang a lat peuhmah siampu a tuam ding ahi.
04005010	Michih thil siangthou siampu a tuam ahi dia, mite'n siampu apiak peuhmah ama a tuam ahi ding, chi in,” achi hi.
04005011	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04005012	“Israel suante kiang ah gen inla, akiang uah, Mi, azi in alampialsan a, mi'n amah kithuahpih henla, apasal in thei kei henla,
04005013	huchibang a a-om nilouh a, kihihthanghuai pipi a kigenkhe nai lou hi in, athei kuamah om lou, mat louh hitaleh;
04005014	apasal thikthu hong sia a, azi muangmoh a, siangthou lou mah ana hihleh, ahihkeileh apasal thikthu hong sia a, azi muangmoh a, azi siangthou ana hihleh:
04005015	huai mi in azi a dia thillat barli buh tangbuang ephah mun sawm a khen mun khat tawi in siampu kiang ah azi api ding hi. Athillat ding sathau abuak ding ahi kei a, begaw leng anuh ding ahi sam kei. Thikthusiatna tangbuang thillat, theihgigena thillat, thulimlouhna theihgigena ahi.
04005016	“Siampu in azi api dia, Toupa ma ah adingsak dia:
04005017	Siampu in leibel in tui siangthou ala dia, biakbuk pialkhang a leivui ala dia, tui ah akhe ding hi.
04005018	Siampu in huai numei Toupa ma ah adingsak dia, asam akhahkhiaksak dia, theihgigena tangbuang thillat atawisak dia; siampu in hamsia tungsak tui kha akhut in atawi ding.
04005019	Siampu in huai numei akichiamsak dia, numei kiang ah, ‘Na pasal hilou midang kuamah in hon kithuahpih louh a, nitna lam a na lampial keileh hamsia tungsak hiai tui kha a pan na hul ding.
04005020	Himahleh lampialsan a na kihihnit a, na pasal lou mi kuahiam in ahon kithuahpihleh na hul kei ding,’ achi ding.
04005021	Siampu in numei avau dia, akichiamsak ding. Numei kiang ah siampu in, ‘ Toupa'n na pheipi azawtsak a, na gil apuaksakleh, Toupa'n na chipihte lak ah hamsethuak in nang hon bawl hen.
04005022	Hamsia tungsak hiai tui na gil ah alut dia, na gil apuaksak dia, na pheipi azawsak ding. Numei in, Amen, Amen,’ achi ding.
04005023	“Siampu in huai hamsia thute laibu ah agelh dia, tui kha ah adiah ding hi.
04005024	Hamsia tungsak tui kha numei adawnsak ding ahi. Huchi in hamsia tungsak tui kha agilsung ah alut dia, ahong kha ding hi.
04005025	Siampu in thikthusiatna thillat tangbuang numei khut a pan ala dia; Toupa ma ah tangbuang thillat avei dia, maitam ah apaipih ding hi.
04005026	Siampu in tangbuang thillat theihgigena pham khat ala dia, maitam ah ahal dia, huai khit in tui numei adawnsak ding ahi.
04005027	Tui adawnsakleh hichi ahi dia; ahong nit a, apasal tung a thil hihkhial ana hihleh hamsia tungsak huai tui agilsung ah alut dia, ahong kha dia, agil ahong puak dia, apheipi ahong zaw dia; huchi in numei achipihte lak a hamsia thuaknu ahong hi ding hi.
04005028	Himahleh numei anit louh a, asianthouleh ahul dia, nau apai thei ding.
04005029	“Hiai zi lampial a, apasal hilou midang toh kihihnin hiam,
04005030	ahihkeileh apasal thikthu hong siat a azi ahazat chiang a vaihawmdan ding ahi. Huchi in Toupa ma ah api dia, siampu in hiai dan tengteng bang in atung ah ahih ding.
04005031	Huchi in pasal pen thulimlouhna ah ahul dia, numei in akhelhna moh apo ding hi, chi in,” achi hi.
04006001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04006002	“Israel suante kiang ah gen inla, akiang uah, pasal hiam, numei hiam in leng banghiam thuchiam tuam, Toupa a dia akipiakna Nazarit thuchiam achiam lai in uain leh zu angawl ding ahi.
04006003	Uain thuk, zu thuk leh grep tui adawn ding ahi kei a, grep mindup hiam, minvuai hiam leng ane ding ahi sam kei hi.
04006004	Akihihtuam sung teng grepgui a pan atang leng, ahawng leng ane ding ahi kei.
04006005	“Kihihtuamna thu achiam sung teng alu leng amet louh hial ding ahi. Toupa a dia akihihtuam sung ni akim mateng hihtuam ahi dia, asam ahawi ding ahi.
04006006	Toupa a dia akihihtuam sung teng misi luang anaih ding ahi kei.
04006007	Apa, anu, a-unaupa, a-unaunu hiam sih thu ah leng akihihnin ding ahi kei hi; Pathian a dia akihihtuamna in amah agak ziak in.
04006008	Akihihtuam sung teng Toupa a tuam ahi.
04006009	“Akiang ah mi hong siguih in, akihihtuamna lutang hon hihnin kha taleh, akisiansak ni, ani sagih ni in alu amet ding ahi.
04006010	Ani giat ni in kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a siampu kiang ah vakhu kop khat hiam, vapalnou kop khat hiam ahon tawi ding ahi.
04006011	Siampu in khat khelh thoihna ding in alan dia, akhat pen halmang thillat ding in, misi ziak a ahihkhelhna ah kilemna abawlsak ding. Huai ni mah in alu ahihsiangthou ding ahi.
04006012	Akihihtuamna nite Toupa kiang a pia in khelh thoihna ding in belamnoupa kum khat a upa ahon tawi ding hi. Himahleh akihihtuamna hihnit ahih tak ziak in amangta ding uhi.
04006013	“Hiai Nazarit mi dan ahi: Akihihtuamna ni abukim chiang in kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a pi ahi ding.
04006014	Toupa a dia thillat ding in belampa kum khat a upa gensiatbei halmang thillat ding in khat, khelh thoihna ding in belamnounu kum khat a upa gensiatbei khat, lemna thillat ding in belampa gensiatbei khat,
04006015	silngou soh louh tanghou loh khat, tangbuang nel mahmah thau a mek tanghou leh tangbuang nel mahmah thau a mek tanghou beu, thau a zut tanghou pek silngou soh louh leh nek thillat ding uleh dawn ding thillatte toh alan ding ahi.
04006016	“Siampu in huaite Toupa ma ah alan dia, akhelh kithoihna leh ahalmang thillat alan ding ahi.
04006017	Belampa pen palbawm a tanghou silngou soh louh toh lemna kithoih thillat Toupa kiang ah alan dia; siampu in tangbuang thillat leh dawn thillat mah leng alan tel ding ahi.
04006018	Nazarit mi in kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah akihihtuamna lu amet dia, akihihtuamna sam ala dia, lemna kithoihna thillat nuai a mei ah ahalmang ding hi.
04006019	Siampu in belampa liang huanmin leh bawm a silngou soh louh tanghou khat leh silngou soh louh tanghou pek khat ala dia, Nazarit mi in akihihtuamna lu amet khit in atawisak ding hi.
04006020	Siampu in vei thillat ding in Toupa ma ah avei ding ahi. Hiai siampu a tuam ahi ding, awm vei leh liang vei toh. Huai khit in Nazarit mi in uain adawn theita ding hi.
04006021	“Hiai ahi Nazarit mi thuchiam dan leh Toupa ma a thillatdan. Ama ut thu a lat sim louh in akihihtuamna thuchiam dungzui zel in ahih ding ahi,” achi hi.
04006022	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04006023	“Aaron leh atapate kiang ah, hichibang in Israel suante na vualzawl ding ahi. Akiang uah,
04006024	“ Toupa'n nou hon vualzawl in hon veng hen.
04006025	Toupa'n na tung uah amel vaksak henla, hon hehpih hen.
04006026	Toupa'n nou lam hong nga henla, lungmuanna noute hon pia hen, chi in gen un, chi in agen hi.
04006027	“Huchibang a hih in Israel suante tung ah ka min tuansak ahi dia, amau ka vualzawl ding,” achi hi.
04007001	Mosi in biakbuk alam khit a, thau anilh khit a, ahihsiangthou khit a, van tengteng leh maitam leh tui-um belsuan tengteng thaunilh a, ahihsiangthou ni in hichi ahi a,
04007002	Israel intekpen, a-inkuan ua intekpente'n thillat alan ua, huaite anam ua intekpente, asimte uh tung a omte ahi uh.
04007003	Athillatte uh kangtalai tung nei guk leh bawngtal sawm-le-nih, intekpen nih in kangtalai khat zel, khat in bawngtal khat zel Toupa ma ah ahon paipih ua, biakbuk ah ahong lan uhi.
04007004	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04007005	“Biakbuk nasepna ding in aphatuam kha ding, na la chiat un; Levite, anasep uh dungzui zel in na pe chiat ding hi,” achi hi.
04007006	Huchi in Mosi in kangtalaite leh bawngtalte ala a, Levite khut ah apia hi.
04007007	Kangtalai nih leh bawngtal li Gershon tapate anasep uh dungzui zel in apia hi.
04007008	Kangtalai li leh bawngtal giat, siampu Aaron tapa Ithamar, Merari tapate anasep uh dungzui in apia hi.
04007009	Kohath tapate bel mun siangthou a nasep amau a tuam hi a, anasep uh azawnthoh ahih ziak in ape kei hi.
04007010	Intekpente'n thaunilh ni in maitam latna dia athillatte uh maitam bul ah alan uhi.
04007011	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Intekpen chih in maitam latna dia athillat, athillat uh amau tan hi zel ding in alan ding uhi,” achi hi.
04007012	Ni khat ni a thillat lan ding mi Judah chi Amminadab tapa Nashon ahi.
04007013	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik, dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding in thau helsa tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007014	Shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007015	halmang thillat ding in bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007016	khelh thoihna ding in keltal khat;
04007017	lemna kithoihna thillat ding in bawngtal nih, belamtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga leh belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga ahi a, hiaite Amminadab tapa Nashon thillatte ahi uh.
04007018	Ni nih ni in Issakar intekpente'n Zuar tapa Nethaneel in alan hi.
04007019	Athillat ding in dangkasik kuang khat agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007020	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007021	halmang thillat ding in bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007022	khelh thoihna ding in keltal khat;
04007023	lemna kithoihna thillat ding in bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga alan hi. Hiaite Zuar tapa Nethaneel thillatte ahi uh.
04007024	Ani thum ni in Zebulun tate intekpen Helon tapa Eliab in alan hi.
04007025	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik, dangkasik belhbu khat; tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007026	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007027	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007028	khelh thoihna ding in keltal khat;
04007029	lemna kithoih thillat ding in bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga ahi. Hiaite Helon tapa Eliab thillatte ahi uh.
04007030	Ani li ni in Reuben tate intekpen Shedeur tapa Elizur in alan hi.
04007031	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat dia thau hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007032	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007033	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007034	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007035	lemna kithoihna thillat ding in bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga ahi. Hiaite Shedeur tapa Elizur thillatte ahi uh.
04007036	Ani nga ni in Simeon tate intekpen Zurishaddai tapa Selumiel in alan hi.
04007037	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum; mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik, dangkasik belhbu khat; tangbuang thillat ding in thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007038	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007039	halmang thillat a lat ding in bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007040	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007041	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga. Hiaite Zurishaddai tapa Selumiel thillatte ahi uh.
04007042	Ani guk ni in Gad tate intekpen Deuel tapa Eliasaph in alan hi.
04007043	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007044	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007045	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnou apa kum khat a upa khat;
04007046	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007047	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa ngate Deuel tapa Eliasaph thillatte ahi uh.
04007048	Ani sagih ni in Ephraim tate intekpen Ammihud tapa Elishama in alan hi.
04007049	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat; halmang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007050	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007051	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnou apa kum khat a upa khat;
04007052	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007053	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa ngate Ammihud tapa Elishama thillatte ahi uh.
04007054	Ani giat ni in Manasseh tate intekpen Pedazur tapa Gamaliel in alan hi.
04007055	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat; tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel, tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007056	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007057	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007058	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007059	lemna kithoihna thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa ngate Pedazur tapa Gamaliel thillatte ahi.
04007060	Ani kua ni in Benjamin tate intekpen Gideoni tapa Abidan in alan hi.
04007061	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007062	shekel sawm toh kim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007063	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa;
04007064	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007065	lemna kithoihna thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga ahi. Hiaite Gideoni tapa Abidan thillatte ahi uh.
04007066	Ani sawm ni in Dan tate intekpen Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer in alan hi.
04007067	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007068	Sshekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007069	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007070	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007071	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa nga ahi. Hiaite Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer thillatte ahi uh.
04007072	Ani sawm-le-khat ni in Asher tate intekpen Okran tapa Pagiel in alan hi.
04007073	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007074	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka keu khat;
04007075	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007076	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007077	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat upa ngate Okran tapa Pagiel thillatte ahi uh.
04007078	Ani sawm-le-nih ni in Naphtali tate intekpen Enan tapa Ahira in alan hi.
04007079	Athillat dangkasik kuang khat, agikdan shekel za-le-sawmthum, mun siangthou a shekel sawmsagih toh kikim a gik dangkasik belhbu khat, tangbuang thillat ding thau toh hel tangbuang toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah a dim tuak;
04007080	shekel sawm toh kikim a gik gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu khat;
04007081	halmang thillat ding bawngtaltuai khat, belamtal khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa khat;
04007082	khelh thoihna ding keltal khat;
04007083	lemna kithoih thillat ding bawngtal nih, belamtal nga, keltal nga, belamnoupa kum khat a upa ngate Enan tapa Ahira thillatte ahi uh.
04007084	Maitam thau nilh ni a Israel intekpente thillatte dangkasik kuang sawm-le-nih, dangkasik belhbu sawm-le-nih leh dangka-eng keu sawm-le-nih ahi.
04007085	Dangkasik kuang shekel za-le-sawmthum toh kikim a gik chiat ahi a, belhbu sawmsagih chiat ahi. Dangkasik tui-um belsuan tengteng mun siangthou a shekel sangnih-le-zali toh kikim a gik ahi.
04007086	Gimlim a dim dangka-eng keu sawm-le-nih mun siangthou a shekel sawm toh kikim a gik chiat ahi. Dangka-eng keu tengteng shekel za-le-sawmnih toh kikim a gik ahi.
04007087	Haltum thillat ding bawngtal tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi a, belamtal sawm-le-nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa sawm-le-nih; atangbuang thillatte uh toh. Khelh thoihna ding keltal sawm-le-nih.
04007088	Lemna kithoihna thillat ding bawngtal sawmnih-le-li ahi a, belamtal bel sawmguk, keltal sawmguk, belamnoupa kum khat a upa sawmguk ahi. Hiai thau nilh khit a maitam latna dia thilpiakte ahi uh.
04007089	Huchi in biakbuk a amah be dia Mosi alut in thukhun bawm tung a zahngaihna tutphah tunglam a cherub nihte kikal a pan amah ahoupihna aw aza hi.
04008001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04008002	“Aaron houpih inla, akiang ah, khawnvak na det chiang in khawnvak sagihte'n sathau khawnvak koihna malam atatvak ding uh ahi,” chi in.
04008003	Aaron in huchibang in ahih a; Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in khawnvak koihna malam ah khawnvakte ade hi.
04008004	Hiai khawnvak koihna ahihleh dangka-eng a sekthoh chi ahi a; amung bul a kipan apak tan a sekthoh ahi. Alim Toupa'n Mosi a-etsak bang geih a khawnvak koihna bawl ahi.
04008005	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04008006	“Levite, Israel suante lak a pan hihtuam inla, hihsiangthou in.
04008007	Amaute hihsiangthou ding in hichibang in na hih ding ahi. Atung uah sawpsianna tui sung inla, apumpi tengteng uh metsak inla, apuante uh sawpsak inla, kihihsiangthousak in.
04008008	Bawngtaltuai khat tangbuang thillat thau toh hel tangbuang nel mahmah toh lasak inla, khelh thoihna ding in bawngtaltuai khat dang leng na kaisak ding ahi.
04008009	Levite kihoupihna biakbuk bul ah pi inla, Israel suan omkhawm tengteng kigawmkhawmsak vek in.
04008010	Levite Toupa kiang ah na lan dia; Israel suante'n Levite tung ah akhut uh anga ding uhi.
04008011	Huchi in Aaron in Levite, Toupa nna aseptheihna ding un Israel suante min in vei thillat Toupa kiang ah alan ding.
04008012	Levite'n bawngtalte lutung ah akhut uh anga ding ua; Levite a dia kilemna bawlna ding in, khat, khelh thoihna ding in, akhat pen halmang thillat ding in Toupa kiang ah alan ding ahi.
04008013	“Levite Aaron leh atapate ma ah na omsak dia, Toupa a ding in vei thillat ding in na lan ding ahi.
04008014	Huchibang in Israel suante lak a pan Levite na hihtuam dia, huchi in Levite kei a ahi ding uh.
04008015	Huai khit in Levite kihoupihna biakbuk nasem ding in alut ding ua, nang amaute na hihsiangthou ding, vei thillat ding in na lan ding ahi.
04008016	Israel suante lak a pan kei a tuam dia seh ahi ngal ua. Sul hong tengteng, Israel suante ta masapen teng tang in kei a ding in ka neita hi.
04008017	Israel suante lak a ta masapente, mihing toh ganta toh kei a ahi him uhi. Aigupta gam a ta masapente ka sihsak lai in kei a tuam dia ka sehsa ahi.
04008018	Huchi in Israel suante lak a ta masapente tang in Levite ka nei khinta ahi.
04008019	Huchi in Israel suante tang a kihoupihna biakbuk a nasem ding leh Israel suante'n mun siangthou ahon naih ua leng Israel suante lak a hii alenlouhna dia lemna bawl ding in Israel suante lak a pan Levite Aaron leh atapate ka pia ahi,” achi hi.
04008020	Huchibang in Mosi, Aaron leh Israel suan omkhawm tengteng in Levite tung ah ahihta uhi. Levite tungtang thu a Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng bang in atung uah Israel suante'n ahih uhi.
04008021	Huchi in Levite siansak ahi ua, apuante uh asawp ua; Aaron in Toupa ma ah vei thillat ding in alan hi. Amau hihsianthouna ding in Aaron in kilemna abawlsak hi.
04008022	Huai zoh in Levite Aaron leh atapate nuai a, anasep uh sem ding in kihoupihna biakbuk sung ah alut uhi. Levite tungtang thu a Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in atung uah ahihta hi.
04008023	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04008024	“Levite tantuam hiaite ahi. Kum sawmnih-le-nga chiang tunglam in kihoupihna biakbuk a nasep asem ding uh.
04008025	Kum sawmnga a upate'n anasep uh akhawlsan ding ua, nna asem nawn kei ding uh.
04008026	Himahleh khawmpite biakbuk kep thu ah a-unaute uh ahuh zel ding ua, nasep zaw asem nawn kei ding uh. Hichibang in Levite nasep na gelsak ding ahi,” achi hi.
04009001	Huan Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawt nung uh akum nihna, akha khatna in Sinai gamdai ah Mosi ahoupih a,
04009002	“Israel suante'n Paikan Ankuangluina ahunbi zel in nei uhen.
04009003	Ahunbi in, hiai kha, ani sawm-le-li nitaklam in na nei ding uhi. Huai a hih dia seh tengteng leh dan bang in na nei ding uhi,” achi hi.
04009004	Huchi in Mosi in Israel suante Paikan Ankuangluina nei ding in ahilh hi.
04009005	Huchi in Sinai gamdai ah akha khatna, ani sawm-le-li ni nitaklam in Paikan Ankuangluina anei uhi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang zel in Israel suante'n ahih uhi.
04009006	Kuate hiam misi luang ziak a siang lou ana om ua, huai ni in Paikan Ankuangluina ah atel thei kei ua, huchi in huai ni in Mosi leh Aaron ma ah ahoh uhi.
04009007	Huaite'n akiang ah, “Misi luang ziak in siang lou ka hi ua; huaiziak in hia, Israel suante lak a ahunbi a Toupa kiang a thillat ka lat sam uh kham ka hih uh?” achi uhi.
04009008	Mosi in akiang uah, “Na pau kei phot dih uh. Na tungtang thu uah Toupa'n bangchi in ahia thu ahon piak ka hon za masa phot ding,” achi hi.
04009009	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04009010	“Israel suante kiang ah, na lak ua kuapeuh, na suante uh lak a kuapeuh, misi luang ziak a siang lou hiam, ana zinmang hiam a-om zenzen uleh Toupa a ding in Paikan Ankuangluina neih himhim ding ahi.
04009011	Akha nihna, ani sawm-le-li ni nitaklam in anei ding ua; tanghou silngou soh louh lou kha toh anek ding uh ahi.
04009012	Azing a ding in bangmah akoih ding uh ahi kei. Aguh leng ahihtan ding uh ahi kei. Paikan Ankuangluina a hih dia seh bang zel a ahih ding uh ahi.
04009013	Himahleh, siang ngal a, zinmangna nei lou, Paikan Ankuangluina a tel lou mawkmawk ahihleh achipihte lak a pan huai mi satkhiak ding ahi. Ahunbi a Toupa kiang a thillat alat louh ziak in huai mi in akhelh moh akipuak ding hi.
04009014	“Namdangmi na kiang ua om in Toupa a dia ankuangluina a tel sam a-utleh Paikan Ankuangluina a hih dia seh leh adan bang in ahih ding ahi. Hiai gam a mi mawng leh namdang mite a dia dan kikhat na neih ding uh ahi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
04009015	Huchi in biakbuk lam khit ni in biakbuk, theihpihna puanin pen meipi in atuam liiliai hi. Nitaklam in biakbuk tung ah meikuang bangbang azingsang tan in a-om hi.
04009016	Huchibang in a-om nilouh a; meipi in atuam nilouh a, zan chiang in mei bang in akilang hi.
04009017	Meipi in puanin akikhinsan teng in Israel suante'n pai ding vai ahawm zel ua; meipi khawlna mun peuh ah Israel suante'n giahphual asat zel uhi.
04009018	Toupa thupiak in Israel suante apai zel ua, Toupa thupiak mah in giahphual asat uhi. Biakbuk tung a meipi a-om sung teng giahphual ah a-om nilouh uh.
04009019	Biakbuk tung a meipi sawtpi a-omleh Israel suante'n Toupa thu azui ua, apai kei uhi.
04009020	Biakbuk tung a ni tam lou sung meipi a-om chiang in giahphual asat ua, Toupa thupiak bang in, huchi in apai zel uhi.
04009021	Akalkal in meipi nitaklam a pan azingsang pha in a-om a; zingsang a meipi in atungkahsanleh apai zel uhi. Ni khat lel hiam, zan khat lel hiam om a meipi in atungkahsanleh apai zel uhi.
04009022	Biakbuk tung a meipi ni nih hiam, kha khat hiam, kum khat hiam a-om a, huai a a-om nilouh leh Israel suante giahphual ah a-om nilouh ua, apai kei uh. Atungkahsanleh bel apai zel uhi.
04009023	Toupa thupiak in giahphual asat zel ua, Toupa thupiak in apai zel uh. Mosi zang a Toupa thupiak in Toupa thu azui uhi.
04010001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04010002	“Dangka pengkul nih bawl inla; sekthoh in bawl in. Mipi omkhawmte sapkhawmna ding leh pawtsakna dia na zat ding ahi.
04010003	Huai akimut chiang in mipi omkhawmte tengteng na kiang ah kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak bul a ahong kikhop vek ding uh ahi.
04010004	Khat lel amut uleh Israel mipite heutu intekpente kia na kiang a ahong paikhawm ding uh ahi.
04010005	Gallau mut a na mut uleh suahlam pang a omte apawt ding uhi.
04010006	Gallau mut a na mut nawn uleh simlam pang a omte apawt ding uhi. Apawtna ding un gallau mut bang a amut ding uh ahi.
04010007	Himahleh mipite hong paikhawmna ding in na mut peuhmah ding ua, gallau mut a bel mut lou in.
04010008	Aaron tapa siampute'n pengkul amut ding uh ahi. Huai nou a ding in na suante uh tan a tangtawn dan ahi ding hi.
04010009	Na gam ua melma, nou hon nuaisiahte dou dia na kuan chiang un gallau mut in pengkulte na mut ding uhi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian ma uah theihgigena ahi ding ua, na melmate ua pan humbit na hi ding uh.
04010010	Nuam na sak nite un, ahunbi a na ankuangluinate uah, na kha thakte uah, na halmang thillat uahte leh na kilemna thillat kithoihnate uah pengkul na mut ding uh ahi. Huchi in na Pathian ma uah nou a ding in theihgigena ahi ding. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,” chi in.
04010011	Akum nihna, akha nihna, huai kha ani sawmnih ni in, hichi ahong hi a, meipi in theihsakna biakbuk tung atungkah santa hi.
04010012	Huchi in Israel suante apaidan dungzui in Sinai gamdai a pan apawt ua; Paran gamdai ah meipi akhawlta hi.
04010013	Mosi zang a Toupa thupiak bang in apawt uhi.
04010014	Amasapen in Judah pawlte, apawl uh tamdan dungzui zel in apawt ua; aheutu uh Amminadab tapa Nashon ahi.
04010015	Issakarte heutu Zuar tapa Nethaneel;
04010016	Zebulunte heutu Helon tapa Eliab ahi.
04010017	Biakbuk aphel ua, Gershon tapa leh Merari tapa biakbuk zawng mite apawt uhi.
04010018	Reubente apawl uh tamdan dungzui in apawt ua; aheutu uh Shedeur tapa Elizur ahi.
04010019	Simeonte heutu Zurishaddai tapa Selumiel ahi.
04010020	Gadte heutu Deuel tapa Eliasaph ahi.
04010021	Kohathte'n mun siangthou azawng ua, apawt ua; adangte'n atun ma un biakbuk ana lam uh.
04010022	Ephraimte apawl uh tamdan dungzui in apawt ua; aheutu uh Emihud tapa Elishama ahi.
04010023	Manassehte heutu Pedazur tapa Gamaliel ahi.
04010024	Benjaminte heutu Gideoni tapa Abidan ahi.
04010025	Ananungpen in Dante apawl uh tamdan dungzui in apawt ua; aheutu uh Ammishaddai tapa Ahiezer ahi.
04010026	Asherte heutu Okran tapa Pagiel ahi.
04010027	Naphtalite heutu Enan tapa Ahira ahi.
04010028	Hiai bang ahi Israel suante pawl atamdan dungzui ua apaidan uh, hiai bang in apai zom zel uhi.
04010029	Mosi sunghpa Midian mi Reuel tapa Hobab kiang ah, Mosi in, “K'on pe ding, Toupa'n achihna mun ah ka pai ding ua, ka kiang uah hong sam inla, hoihtak in na tung ah ka hih ding uh. Toupa'n Israel suante tungtang thu lah hoih in agenta ngal a,” achi hi.
04010030	Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka hong dah mai ding, ka gam uah ka tanaute kiang ah ka pai zaw mai ding,” achi hi.
04010031	Ama'n, “Hon paisan mahmah ke'n, gamdai ah lah giahphual satna ding na thei zaw ngal a, kou a ding in mit na hong hi ding hi.
04010032	Hichi ahi dia, ka kiang ua na hong samleh, ahi, hichi ahi ding. Toupa'n thil hoih hon hihsak bang in ka hon hihsak sam zel ding uhi,” achi hi.
04010033	Huchi in Toupa tang a pan ni thum lam ah apai ua; Toupa thukhun bawm amau a dia kingakna mun zong in ama uah ni thum lam ah ana pai masa hi.
04010034	Abuk ua pan apawt un Toupa meipi sun in atung uah a-om hi.
04010035	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai bawm apawt ding peuhmah chiang in Mosi in, “ Toupa aw, hong kisa inla, na melmate hawlzak in, nang hon hote na ma ah taikek uhen,” achi zel hi.
04010036	Akingakna peuh ah, Toupa aw, Israel mipi sang tampite kiang ah hong kik nawn in, achi zel hi.
04011001	Huan mipite'n Toupa zak a phun in thil hoih lou pipi agen ua; Toupa'n huai azak in ahehta hi. Huchi in Toupa mei alak uah ahong kuang a, giahphual ponungpen a omte akangta hi.
04011002	Huchi in mipite'n Mosi asam ua; Toupa kiang ah Mosi athum a, huai mei amitta hi.
04011003	Toupa mei alak ua ahong kat ziak in, huai mun min Taberah asa hi.
04011004	Alak ua mikihel pawl khat in sa lunggulhna ahon neita ua; Israel suante leng akap nawn ua, “Kua'n ahia nek ding sa hon pe ding?
04011005	Ut leh dah a Aigupta gam a ngasa i nek zelte i theigige ua, tangmaite, mazelte, phulun sialnek chite, vaiphulunte, phulun ngou leng.
04011006	Himahleh tu in i guhngek uh akeu khinta, bangmah lamet ding a-om kei, manna lel lou ngal,” achi uhi.
04011007	Manna bel koriandar tang bang, alatdan in bedeli suang bang ahi.
04011008	Mite'n atomkhawm ua, gawinelna in agawinel ua, sum in asu ua, belte ah ahuan ua, tanghou in abawl uhi. Nek in sathau a kan tanghou abang hi.
04011009	Giahphual a zan a dai akiak in manna leng ahong kia hi.
04011010	Mipite a-inkuankuan un apuanin kongkhak chiat uah akap uh, chih Mosi in ana za hi. Toupa aheh mahmah a; Mosi leng alungkim kei hi.
04011011	Huchi in Toupa kiang ah, “Bangziak in ahia na sikha na hon sukgim a, bang ahia na mit ka tunlouhna, hiai mite tengteng puakgik ka tung a na ngak?
04011012	Hiai mipite tengteng ka suan ahi ua hia? Api-le-pute uh kiang a kichiam a piak na chiam gam a pilut ding in. Naupommi in nawitui ne lai a pom bang in na angsung ah pom in, na hon chih dia ka pikhiak?
04011013	Hiai mipi tengteng piak ding sa koi a pan ka nei dia? ‘Ka nek ding un sa hon pia in,’ chi in akap ngal ua.
04011014	Hiai mipi tengteng keimah kia in ka po zou kei. Kei a ding in agik lua hi.
04011015	Hichibang a hon hih ding na hihleh, hon sisak vanglak in, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, ka gentheihna hon musak nawn mahmah ke'n,” achi hi.
04011016	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Israelte Upa, mipite Upa leh aheutute uh hi a na theih mi sawmsagih ka kiang ah hon pikhawm inla, kihoupihna biakbuk ah nangmah toh dingkhawm ding in hon pi in.
04011017	Huchi in ka hong pawt dia, huai ah ka hong houpih ding. Na tung a om kha om pen atung uah ka koih ding. Nang kia'n po lou in mipite puakgik ahon puakpih ding uhi.
04011018	Nang mipite kiang ah, zingchiang a ding in kihihsiangthou vek unla; huchi in sa na ne ding uh. Sa nek ding kuan ahia hon pe ding? Aigupta gam a nuam i saksak uh toh, chi in Toupa zak in na kap ua; huaiziak in, Toupa'n noute sa ahon pe dia, huchi in na ne ding uhi.
04011019	Ni khat kia, ni nih kia, ni sawm kia, ni sawmnih kia leng na ne kei ding ua;
04011020	himahleh kha khat pumlum, na nakvang ua ahong pawtkhiak a nou a dia kihhuai ahong hih masiah na ne ding uh. Na lak ua om Toupa na deih louh ua, Aigupta gam a pan bangziak a paikhia i hi ua? chi a, ama a na kah ziak un,” achi hi.
04011021	Mosi in, “Ka ompih mipite khe a pai thei kia leng nuaiguk ahi ua; kha khat pumlum nek ding in sa ka pe ding, na chi hi.
04011022	Belamhon leh ganhon leng gohsak lehang leng, akham ding ua hia? Tuipi a ngasa tengteng leng matsak vek lehang leng, akhamzou ding ua hia?” achi hi.
04011023	Toupa'n , Mosi kiang ah, “ Toupa khut tomsak ahi a hia? Na tung ah ka thu bang a, atun leh tun louh na thei mai ding,” achi hi.
04011024	Mosi apawt a, Toupa thu mipite ahilh hi. Mipite Upa sawmsagihte asamkhawm a, puanin kim ah adingsak hi.
04011025	Meipi ah Toupa ahong suk a, ahong houpih a, ama tung a om Kha pen Upa sawmsagihte tung ah akoih hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, atung ua kha akoihtak in thu agen ua; agen zom sawt kei uhi.
04011026	Himahleh giahphual ah mi nih a-om lai ua, khat min Eldad ahi, akhat pen min Medad ahi. Atung uah kha a-om a, upate lak a min khum ahi ua, himahleh kihoupihna biakbuk ah bel ahoh kei uhi. Giahphual ah thu agen uhi.
04011027	Huchi in tangval khat ava tai a, Mosi ava hilh a, “Eldad leh Medad in giahphual ah thu agen uh,” achi hi.
04011028	Nun tapa Joshua, atuailai a pan Mosi nasempa'n adawng a, “Ka toupa Mosi, kham ve,” achi hi.
04011029	Mosi in akiang ah, “Kei gum a na thikthu sia hia? Pathian mi tengteng zawlnei hi vek le uh, Toupa'n atung uah tua Kha koihchiatleh chi zomah lai ka hi!” achi hi.
04011030	Huchi in Mosi leh Israel Upa tengteng giahphual ah alut nawn uhi.
04011031	Toupa a pan huih ahong nung a, tuipi a pan vengkeng ahon mutleng a, giahphual lehlam sang ni khat lam, alehlam ni khat lamtuak dimsuak in giahphual kim ah tong nih ding a sang in akesak hi.
04011032	Mipite'n huai ni nitum leh zankhua leh azing nitum tan in vengkeng ava tomkhawm ua; atom tawmpen in leng homer sawm atom hi. Giahphual kim ah amau a chiat aphou uhi.
04011033	Huai sa anek lai un, anek khit ma un, mipite tung ah Toupa aheh mahmah a, Toupa'n hipi nasatak in mipite agawtta hi.
04011034	Hiai mun min Kibroth-hattaavah asa a; huai a saduhte avui ziak un.
04011035	Kibroth-hattaavah a pan mipite Hazeroth ah apai ua; Hazeroth ah agiahphual uh asat uhi.
04012001	Huan Miriam leh Aaron in Mosi in Kus numei zi a, aneih ziak in agensia ua; Kus numei bel anei ngei hi.
04012002	Amau, “Mosi kiang kia ah hia Toupa'n thu agen tuam? Ei kiang ah leng agen sam kei a hia?” achi uh. Toupa'n huai ana za hi.
04012003	Mosi bel leitung a mihing tengteng sang in amigi mahmah hi.
04012004	Thakhat in Toupa'n Mosi, Aaron leh Miriam kiang ah, “Na thum un hong paisuk unla, kihoupihna biakbuk ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in athum un ava hoh uhi.
04012005	Toupa meipi dingh ah ahong paisuk a, puanin kongkhak ah ahong dingh a, Aaron leh Miriam asam a; anih un ahong paisuk uhi.
04012006	Ama'n, “Ka thu ngaikhia un. Na lak ua zawlnei na om uleh amah kiang ah kei Toupa kilakna in ka kihil dia, manglam in ka houpih ding.
04012007	Ka sikha Mosi bel huchibang ahi kei. Ka inko tengteng ah amuanhuai hi.
04012008	Amah toh paukam in thuguk om lou in teltak in ka kihou ding ua; Toupa mel leng amu ding. Huaiziak in ka sikha Mosi bangchidan a gense ngam na hi ua?” achi hi.
04012009	Huchi in Toupa atung uah aheh mahmah a, apai nawnta hi.
04012010	Puanin tung ah meipi akikhinta hi. Ngai in, Miriam vuk bang a ngou in ahong phakta a; Aaron in Miriam a-en a, ngai in, phak ana hita maimah hi.
04012011	Huchi in Aaron in Mosi kiang ah, “Ka toupa aw, ka tung uah khelhna nga mahmah ke'n. Haihuaitak in ka na hihta ua, ka na khialta uhi.
04012012	Anu sul a pan sisa phial mahmah a ahong pawt bang in amah omsak ke'n,” achi hi.
04012013	Huchi in Mosi in, “Pathian aw, damsak nawn dih ve,” chi in Toupa angen hi.
04012014	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Apa'n amai chilsiat hilhial taleh ni sagih azakta kei ding maw? Giahphual pua ah ni sagih kibu henla; huai khit chiang in pilut nawn hi hen,” achi hi.
04012015	Huchi in giahphual pua ah ni sagih sung Miriam khumtuam in a-om hi. Miriam apilut nawn ma un mipite akisuan kei uhi.
04012016	Huai khit in mipite Hazeroth a pan apawt ua, Paran gamdai ah giahphual asat uhi.
04013001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04013002	“Israel suante ka piak, Kanaan gam va enkhe ding in mi sawl in. Anam inko chih ua mi, a-intekpa pen lak a mi khat chiat na sawl ding,” achi hi.
04013003	Mosi in Paran gamdai a pan Toupa thupiak bang in akuansakta a; avek un Israel suante lak a intekpa pen chiat ahi uhi.
04013004	Hiaite amin uh ahi: Reuben nam lak a mi Zakkur tapa Shammua.
04013005	Simeon nam lak a mi Hori tapa Shaphat.
04013006	Judah nam lak a mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb.
04013007	Issakar nam lak a mi Joseph tapa Igal.
04013008	Ephraim nam lak a mi Nun tapa Hoshea.
04013009	Benjamin nam lak a mi Raphu tapa Palti.
04013010	Zebulun nam lak a mi Sodi tapa Gaddiel.
04013011	Joseph nam, Manasseh nam achih uh, lak a mi Susi tapa Gaddi.
04013012	Dan nam lak a mi Gemalli tapa Ammiel.
04013013	Asher nam lak a mi Mikael tapa Sethur.
04013014	Naphtali nam lak a mi Vophsi tapa Nahbi.
04013015	Gad nam lak a mi Maki tapa Geuel.
04013016	Hiaite gam enkhe dia Mosi in asawlte min ahi. Mosi in Nun tapa Hoshea, Joshua achi hi.
04013017	Huchi in Mosi in Kanaan gam enkhe ding in amaute asawl a, akiang uah, “Simlam lampi ah pai phot unla, tangte ah kahtou un.
04013018	Huai gam bangchibang ahia, huai a teng mipite ahat uh hia, hat lou, atawm uh leh atam uh;
04013019	atenna gam uh ahoih hia hoih lou, a-omna khuate uh bangchibang ahia, puanin maimah hia, kulh nei;
04013020	huai gam lei thau ahi hia, lei gawng, gammang om hia om lou chih va enkhia un. Hangsantak in om unla, huai gam theigahte hon pua un,” achi hi. Tu grep gah masa gah hun laitak ahi.
04013021	Huchi in akuantouta ua, huai gam Zin gamdai a pan Hamath lutna Rehob tan in a-enkhe vek uhi.
04013022	Simlam ah ahohtou phot ua, Hebron ava tung ua, huai ah Anak suan Ahiman, Sheshai leh Talmai a-om uhi. Hebron bel Aigupta gam a Zoan kilam ma kum sagih a kilam khinta ahi.
04013023	Eshkol Phaizang ava tung ua, huai ah grep gahbom khat ahiang toh asattan ua, chiang in mi nih in azawng uhi. Theibuhfai leh theipite leng apua uhi.
04013024	Israel suante'n huai a grep bom asatkhiak ziak un, huai mun Eshkol Phaizang asa uhi.
04013025	Ni sawmli zoh in gam etkhiakna a pan ahong kik nawn uhi.
04013026	Huchi in Paran gamdai a Kadesh ah Mosi leh Aaron leh Israel suan mipi omkhawmte tengteng kiang ahong tung ua, akiang uah leh mipi omkhawmte tengteng kiang ah thu ahon tun ua, huai gam theite a-ensak uhi.
04013027	Akiang ah, “N'on sawlna gam ah ka va hoh ua, bawngnawi leh khuaizu luanna ana hi ngei ngut a; hiai agam thei ahi.
04013028	Himahleh agam a mi tengte mihat pipi ahi ua, khuate leng kulh nei, thupi taktak ahi. Anak suante leng ka va mu uh.
04013029	Simlam gam ah Amalekte ateng ua; tanggam ah Hitte, Jebuste, Amorte ateng uh. Tuipi gei leh Jordan luidung ah Kanaante ateng uh,” chi in ahilh uhi.
04013030	Huchi in Mosi ma ah Kaleb in mipite adaisak khipkhep a, “Kisa tou zok ni in, va latou zok ni, i zou ngeingei ding uh,” achi hi.
04013031	Himahleh ahohpihte'n, “I va zou vek thei kei ding e, ei sang in lah ahatzaw ngal ua,” achi uhi.
04013032	Huchi in Israel suante kiang ah, “Ka va gam etkhiak uh gam, enkhe dia ka va vakna uh, asung a mi tengte nek khit hatmi ahi ua; ami om ka muhte uh mi awmkhauh pipi ahi uh.
04013033	Huai ah Anak suante, miliante, awmkhauh pipi ka va mu ua; koute lah khaupe bang lel in ka va kimu ua, amau leng khaupe ek bang lel in ahon mu uh,” chi in ahoih lou lam in agen uhi.
04014001	Huan omkhawm tengteng aw suah in akap ua; huai zan in mite akap uhi.
04014002	Israel suan tengteng Mosi tung leh Aaron tung ah aphun ua; omkhawm tengteng in akiang uah, “Aigupta gam ah Pathian in hon that geih hileh aw! Ahihkeileh gamdai ah hon na that geih hileh aw!
04014003	Bang achia namsau a si maimah dia Pathian in hiai gam a hon pi ahi diam aw? I zi leh i tate lah mat maimah ding ahi ngal ua. Aigupta gam a kik nawn ei a dia hoihzaw lou ding hia? achi uhi.
04014004	Huchi in akihoukhawm ua, heutu bawl ni e, Aigupta gam ah kik nawn ni,” achi uhi.
04014005	Huchi in Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng ma ah Mosi leh Aaron abokkhup uhi.
04014006	Nun tapa Joshua leh Jephunneh tapa Kaleb, gam va enkhete lak a telte'n apuan uh abotkek uh.
04014007	Israel suan omkhawm tengteng kiang ah, “Enkhe dia ka va vakna gam uh gam hoihtak ahi.
04014008	I tung ua Toupa akipahleh huai gam ah ahon pilut ngei ding. Huai nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam ahon pe ding hi.
04014009	Toupa tung ah hel kei phot le uchin. Huai gam a mite leng lau sam kei un. I an ding uh ahi ua, akihumbitna uh bangmah ahi kei. Toupa i kiang uah a-om hi, amau lau kei un,” chi in agen uhi.
04014010	Himahleh omkhawm tengteng in suang a den asawm ua; huchi in kihoupihna biakbuk, Israel suan tengteng ma ah Toupa thupina ahong kilangta hi.
04014011	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Hiai mipite'n bang tan hon thusim lou ding ahi ua; alak ua chiamtehna ka hih zel nangawn a leng bang tan ahia hon taksan louh lai ding uh?
04014012	Hipi in ka gawt dia, ka in-gamsak dia, nangmah ah amau sang a thupi leh thilhihtheizaw nam ka bawlkhe zaw mai ding,” achi hi.
04014013	Mosi in Toupa kiang ah, “Aigupta mite'n aza kha ding uh. Hiai mite lah alak ua pan na thilhihtheihna a na pikhiakte ahi ngal ua.
04014014	Hiai gam a teng mite ahilh ding uh. Hiai mite lak ah nang Toupa na om chih azata uh. Kimaituah hial a muh in na om a, atung uah na meipi a-om a; sun in meipi dingh, zan in meikuang in ama uh lah na pi zel hi.
04014015	Hiai mite na thahgamleh na minthanna za namte'n,
04014016	Toupa'n hiai mite kichiam a, achiam gam a api theih louh ziak in gamdai ah athatta, achi ding uh.
04014017	Tu in ka hon ngen ahi, ka Toupa thilhihtheihna hih thupi in om hen, thu a na gen tak dungzui in;
04014018	Toupa lungneltak, migitna hau, thulimlouhnate, tatleknate ngaidam zel; moh a asehte khah ngei loupa, pate thulimlouhna tate, tate tasawnte, suan thumna leh suan lina tan a gawt zel ahi, na chi hi.
04014019	Na migitna athupi bang ngei leh Aigupta gam a pan tutan a na ngaihdam bang in mipite thulimlouhna ngaidam in,” achi hi.
04014020	Toupa'n , “Na thu bang in ka ngaidam hi.
04014021	Himahleh kei ka hin bang in Toupa thupina in leitung pumpi adimsak ding.
04014022	Aigupta gam leh gamdai a ka thupina leh ka thillamdang hihte mu a, huchi pipi a leng sawmveitak hon ze-et lailai a, ka thu zui lou lai mi tengteng in;
04014023	apipute uh kiang a kichiam a ka chiam huai gam amu kei hial ding uh. Alak ua kei hon ngaineute mawngmawng in leng amu sam kei ding uh.
04014024	Ka sikha Kaleb in bel lungsim dang aput a, ahon zuih taktak ziak in, amah zaw ava hohna gam ah ka pilut dia, asuante'n huai aluah ding uh.
04014025	Phaizang a Amalekte leh Kanaante teng ahih ziak un, zingchiang in kihei unla, Tuipi San lampi lam gamdai ah lut un,” achi hi.
04014026	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
04014027	“Hiai mithulim lou omkhawmte, ka tung a phunphunte bang tan ahia ka dohzoh ding? Israel suante phunna, ka tung a aphunnate uh ka za hi.
04014028	Akiang uah, ka hin bang in ka gen ahi, ka bilbuk ngei a na gen bang un na tung uah ka hih ding hi.
04014029	Na luang uh gamdai ah apuk dia; na lak ua simsa mi tengteng, kum sawmnih a pan atunglam ka tung a phun teng,
04014030	ban zak hial a, ka hon omsak ding, ka chih gam ah Jephunneh tapa Kaleb leh Nun tapa Joshua kia lou ngal na lut kei ding uh.
04014031	Himahleh mat ding lel ahi ding uh, na chih uh na tate uh ka pilut dia, na ngaihneu uh gam athei ding uhi.
04014032	“Nou bel na luang uh hiai gamdai ah apuk ding hi.
04014033	Na tate uh gamdai ah kum sawmli sung avakvai ding ua, gamdai a na luangte uh amawk man masiah na kizuakna uh amau athuakloh ding uhi.
04014034	Gam na va etkhiak ni zah uh, ni sawmli, ni khat tang in kum khat zel, kum sawmli sung na tatlekna uh na thuakloh ding ua, huchi in ka thuchiam ka hihlamdan dan na thei ding uhi.
04014035	Kei Toupa'n migilou omkhawm, kei hon kalh a omkhawmte tung ah hiai ka hih ngei ding ka na chi khinta hi. Hiai gamdai ah amangthang ding ua. Huai ah asi ding uh,” achi hi.
04014036	Gam enkhe dia Mosi misawl hong kik nawnte'n, gam omdan ahoih lou lam agen un amah tung ah omkhawmte aphunsak hi.
04014037	Huai gam omdan ahoih lou lam agente ngei Toupa ma ah hipi in asita uhi.
04014038	Gam enkhe dia hohte lak a Nun tapa Joshua leh Jephunneh tapa Kaleb bel asi kei uhi.
04014039	Mosi in huai thute Israel suan tengteng ahilh a; huchi in mipite'n nakpitak in asuun uhi.
04014040	Huchi in zingsangpi in athou ua, tang vum ah ahohtou ua, “Ngai in, hiai ah ka hong pai uh. Toupa'n ahon chiamna mun ah ka hoh ding uh, ka na khialta uhi,” achi uhi.
04014041	Mosi in, “Tu a bangziak a Toupa thupiak palsat na hi ua? Hiai alohching kei ding.
04014042	Na kiang ua Toupa a-om louh ziak in hohtou kei un; melmate thah a na omlouhna ding un,” achi hi.
04014043	“Na ma uah Amalekte leh Kanaante a-om uhi. Namsau a thah na hi phet ding uh. Toupa na lehngatsan tak ziak un na kiang uah Toupa a-om kei ding,” achi hi.
04014044	Himahleh mualvum a hoh atum ua; himahleh Toupa thukhun bawm leh Mosi giahphual a pan apawtkhe kei uhi.
04014045	Huchi in huai mual a om Amalekte leh Kanaante hong kuansuk in, ahong dou ua, Hormah tanpha in asatpuk phengphung uhi.
04015001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04015002	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, tenna ding a gam ka hon piakna na tun chiang un,
04015003	Toupa kiang a mei a thillat ahihkeileh halmang thillat, ahihkeileh thuchiam tangtun dia kithoihna, ahihkeileh noumau ut thu a thillat, ahihkeileh ankuanglui hunbi, ahihkeileh ganhon lak, ahihkeileh belamhon lak, ahihkeileh Toupa a dia gimlim bawl ding a na lat chiang un,
04015004	Toupa kiang a thillat lanmi peuhmah in tangbuang thillat, tangbuang nelte ephah mun sawm a khen mun khat, sathau hin mun li a khen mun khat a mek alat ding ahi.
04015005	Dawn thillat dia uain hin mun li a khen mun khat halmang thillat, ahihkeileh kithoihna belamnou khat a dia na bawl ding uh ahi.
04015006	Belamtal a tangbuang thillat, tangbuang nelte, ephah mun sawm a khen mun nih, sathau hin mun thum a khen mun khat mek na bawl ding uh ahi.
04015007	Dawn thillat dia Toupa a ding a gimlim ding uain hin mun thum a khen mun khat na lat ding uh ahi.
04015008	Haltum thillat ding, ahihkeileh thuchiam tangtun dia kithoihna, ahihkeileh Toupa kiang a lemna thillat a bawngtal na lat chiang un;
04015009	Bawngtal lat toh kiton in tangbuang thillat tangbuang nelte ephah mun sawm a khen mun thum sathau hin kimkhat a mek na lat ding uh ahi.
04015010	Dawn thillat dia uain hin kimkhat, Toupa a dia gimlim mei a thillat na lat ding uh ahi.
04015011	“Huchibang in bawngtal, ahihkeileh belampa, ahihkeileh belamnou, ahihkeileh kelnou ahi ding ahi.
04015012	Atamdan uh dungzui zel in na bawl ding ua, atamdan uh dungzui zel in na lan ding uhi.
04015013	Huai gam a piang tengteng in hichibang zel in Toupa a dia gimlim mei a thillat alat chiang un ahih ding uhi.
04015014	Namdangmi na kiang ua tengsa him ahihkeileh kuapeuh na kiang ua teng zelzel ding hiamte'n leng Toupa a dia gimlim mei a thillat lan nuam peuhmah in na hih bang ua ahih sam ding uh ahi.
04015015	Na suante uh leh mipite leh namdang na kiang ua omte a dia leng dan khat kia a-om ding ahi. Toupa ma ah namdangte noumau bang ahi ding uh.
04015016	Nou a ding leh na kiang ua namdang omte a ding in dan khat leh hihdan kibang khat kia a-om ding,” achi hi.
04015017	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04015018	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah, hichi ahi ding a, ka hon pina ding gam na va tun ua,
04015019	huai gam tanghou na nek chiang un, Toupa kiang ah vei thillat na lan ding uh ahi.
04015020	Na tanghou mek masakpen lak ua beu khatvei thillat dia na lat ding uh ahi. Buhphual a vei thillat dia na vei bang un na vei ding uhi.
04015021	Na suante uh tan in na tanghou mek masakpen uh Toupa kiang a vei thillat dia na lat zel ding uh ahi.
04015022	“Hiai thupiak tengteng, Toupa'n Mosi kiang a agen, tup mawng hilou a zuih khak louh na neih uleh,
04015023	Toupa'n thu apiak tung a pan na suante uh tan a dia Mosi zang a thu apiak tengteng chihna ahi.
04015024	Hichi ahi dia, omkhawmte'n thei lou a, ahih khak uh ahihleh, omkhawm tengteng in halmang thillat Toupa a dia gimlim ding in bawngtuai khat alan ding ua, adan ngeina bang in tangbuang thillat leh dawn thillat toh, khelhna kithoihna ding in keltal khat leng alan tel ding uh ahi.
04015025	Siampu in Israel suan omkhawm tengteng a ding in kilemna abawlsak dia, ngaihdam ahi ding uh. Thei lou a hihkhak ahih ziak leh athillat uh Toupa a dia mei a thillat leh ahihkhelh uh sik a khelhna kithoihna alat tak ziak un.
04015026	Israel suante omkhawm tengteng ngaihdam ahi ding ua, alak ua namdang omte leng; mipi tengteng in ahih khak uh ahih ziak in.
04015027	“Mi'n thei lou a thil ahihkhelhleh khelhna kithoihna ding in kelnu khat kum khat a upa alat ding ahi.
04015028	Thei lou a Toupa ma a hihkhialmi a ding in siampu in kilemna abawl ding hi; huchi in ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
04015029	Thei lou a hihkhialmi a ding in, Israel suante, huai gam a piangte a ding leh namdangmi na lak ua omte a ding in leng dan khat na neih ding uh ahi.
04015030	“Himahleh tup mawng a hihkhial ahihleh, huai gam a piang hiam, namdang hiam leng hitaleh Toupa gensia ahi a; huai mi achipihte lak a pan satkhiak ding ahi.
04015031	Toupa thu musit a, athupiak abohsiat ziak in, huai mi satkhiak ding ahi, athulimlouhna moh ama'n apo ding, chi in,” achi hi.
04015032	Israel suante gamdai a a-om lai un mi khat Sabbath ni a sing tom amu uhi.
04015033	Asing tom mu mite'n amah Mosi leh Aaron leh mipi omkhawmte kiang ah ahon pi uhi.
04015034	Bangchi a hih ding ahia chih genkhiak nai louh ahih ziak in tanna inn ah akhum uhi.
04015035	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Hiai mi hihlup ngeingei ding ahi, giahphual pua ah mipi omkhawm tengteng in suang in adeng ding uh,” achi hi.
04015036	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in mipi omkhawm tengteng in giahphual pua ah api ua, suang in adenglumta uhi.
04015037	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04015038	“Israel suante kiang ah, asuante uh tanpha a, apuan mong ua agei bawl ding leh among teng gei a adum khak ding in gen in.
04015039	Huai among na et ua, Toupa thupiak tengteng na theihgige ua na zuihna ding un leh; kizuak a na om zel bang ua na lungtang uh deih leh na mit uh la lam peuh deih a na omlouhna ding un.
04015040	Ka thupiak tengteng na theihgige ua na zuih ua, na Pathian uh a dia na sianthou theihna ding uh ahi.
04015041	Na Pathian uh hi ding a Aigupta gam a pan nou hon pikhepa Toupa , na Pathian uh ka hi. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,” achi hi.
04016001	Levi tapa Kohath, huai tapa Izhar, huai tapa Korah pen Eliab tapate, Dathan leh Abiram leh Peleth tapa On leh Reuben tapate'n mite api ua;
04016002	Israel suante, mi tallang deuhdeuh mipi omkhawmte lak a heutu vaihawmmi dia telte lak a mi zanih-le-sawmnga toh Mosi ma ah ava kisa uhi.
04016003	Mosi leh Aaron kalh in akikhawm ua, akiang uah, “Na uang lua uh, na uang lua uh, omkhawm mipite lah asiangthou chiat ngal ua, Toupa alak uah a-om chih mu zenpi a, bangziak a Toupa mipi omkhawmte tung a kikoih na hi ua?” achi uh.
04016004	Mosi in huai azak in amai a lei si in abokkhup hi.
04016005	Korah leh apawlte tengteng kiang ah, “Zingchiang in Toupa'n amah ate kuate ahi ua, kuate ahia siangthou, chih ataklang ding a, akiang ah ahon pai naisak ding. Ama'n amitel ngei tan in akiangnai ah apaisak ding hi.
04016006	Hichi in hih un, Korah leh apawlte tengteng aw, zingchiang in mei laknate tawi unla;
04016007	huai ah mei koih unla, Toupa ma ah gimlim buak un. Toupa'n atel peuhmah asiangthou ding. Levi tapate, na uang lua uh,” chi in agen hi.
04016008	Mosi in Korah kiang ah, “Nou Levi tapate aw, ngaikhia unla,
04016009	Toupa biakbuk nasep sem ding leh khawmpi nna sem dia khawmpite ma a dingh a, amah kiang a hon om naisak ding a, Israel Pathian in Israel omkhawmte a pan noute ahon omsak, nou a dia thil neuchik phet a kilang hia?
04016010	Amah kiang ah ahon om naisakta a, na kiang a na unau Levi tapa tengteng, siamputna leng na zong ua hia?
04016011	Huaiziak in nang leh na pawl tengteng Toupa kalh in na kikhawm uh ahi. Aaron in bang ahih a ahia, atung a na phun uh?” achi hi.
04016012	Mosi in Eliab tapa Dathan leh Abiram asamsak a, “Amau ka hong paitou kei ding uh.
04016013	Gamdai a hon that dia nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam a pan na hon pikhiak thil neuchik ahi hia? Ka tung uah na kilalsak nawn ngal a.
04016014	Nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam ah na hon pilut kei a, lou ding leh grephuan gou ding lah na hon pe kei a; hiai mite mitte na mialsak ding maw? Ka hong paitou kei hial ding uh,” achi uh.
04016015	Huchi in Mosi aheh mahmah a, “ Toupa kiang ah, athillat uh sang ke'n. Asabiltung uh khat lel leng ka la kei, kuamah ka hih na kei,” achi hi.
04016016	Mosi in Korah kiang ah, “Zingchiang in nang, na mi kikhawmte leh Aaron Toupa ma ah ana om un.
04016017	Amei lakna uh tawi chiat uhenla, gimlim buak uhen. Toupa ma ah amei lakna uh hon tawi uhenla, mei lakna zanih-le-sawmnga hon tawi uhen. Nang leh Aaron in leng na mei lakna uh tawi tuaktuak un,” achi hi.
04016018	Huchi in michih in amei lakna uh atawi chiat ua, mei akoih ua, gimlim abuak ua, Mosi leh Aaron toh kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah ava dingh uhi.
04016019	Korah in mipi tengteng ama ah kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah a-omkhawmsak a; mipi tengteng kiang ah Toupa thupina ahong langta hi.
04016020	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
04016021	“Hiai mipi omkhawmte a pan kihuikhia un, amau ka hihmang guihtheihna ding in,” achi hi.
04016022	Amau abokkhup ua, “Pathian aw, sa tengteng kha Pathian, mi khat khelh ziak in mipi omkhawm tengteng tung ah na heh dia hia?” achi uhi.
04016023	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04016024	“Mipite kiang ah, Korah, Dathan leh Abiram puanin a pan kihemkhia un, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
04016025	Mosi athoutou a, Dathan leh Abiram kiang ah ava hoh a; Israelte upate'n azui uhi.
04016026	Omkhawmte kiang ah, “Hiai migiloute puanin a pan pawtkhia un. Abangmah uh khoih kei un, huchi lou in zaw akhelhna tengteng uah na pangkha ding uh,” chi in agen hi.
04016027	Huchi in Korah, Dathan leh Abiram puanin a pan apawtkhe duamduam ua; Dathan leh Abiram ahong pawtkhia ua, apuanin kongkhak uah azite, atapate leh atanu neu chikchikte uh toh adingh uhi.
04016028	Mosi in, “Keimah lungsim a pawtkhia ahi kei a, hiai thilhih ding in Toupa'n ahon sawl ahi, chih hiai ah na thei ding uh.
04016029	Hiai mi tengteng dan bang lel a asih ua, mi tengteng gawt bang lel a gawt ahih uleh Pathian in kei hon sawl lou ahi ding.
04016030	Himahleh Toupa'n thil thak abawl a, lei in akam akat a, amau leh amau a tengteng avalh a, ahing a Sheol alut uleh bel hiai mite'n Toupa ana hehsak uh, chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
04016031	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thu tengteng agen khit in anuai ua lei ahong khangkham phok hi.
04016032	Lei in akam aka a, a-inkuan un Korah mi tengteng, aneih tengteng uh toh avalh khin vekta hi.
04016033	Huchi in amau leh amau a tengteng Sheol ah ahing in atum vek ua, lei in akam achihkhum a, omkhawmte lak a pan amangthangta uhi.
04016034	Huchi in akim ua Israel tengteng akikou husa uah ataizak ua, lei in ei leng ahon valh kha ding, achi uhi.
04016035	Toupa a pan meikuang ahong pawtkhia a, gimlim lanmi zanih-le-sawmnga ahong kanglumta hi.
04016036	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04016037	“Aaron tapa siampu Eleazar kiang ah thu gen inla, ama'n meikuang a pan mei laknate lakhe ding in hilh in, siangthou lah ahita ngal ua.
04016038	Ahinna tung mah a hiai mikhialte mei laknate maitam khuhna kuang ding in sek hi uhen, Toupa ma a lat ahi ngal a. Huaiziak in asiangthou hi, huai Israel suante a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding,” achi hi.
04016039	Siampu Eleazar in mi kangte dal mei laknate ala a; maitam khuhna ding in asekta hi.
04016040	Israel suante a dia theihgigena hi ding in huchi a Aaron tate hilou namdang himhim, Toupa ma a gimlim hal dia ahong pai nailouhna ding un. Mosi zang a akiang a Toupa'n agen bang a, Korah leh apawlte bang ahong hihlouhna ding in.
04016041	Himahleh azingsang in, Toupa mite na that uh, chi in Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng Mosi leh Aaron tung ah aphun uhi.
04016042	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mosi leh Aaron tung a mipi apunkhawm lai un, kihoupihna biakbuk lam a-en ua; ngai in, meipi in ahon khuh a, Toupa thupina ahong kilang hi.
04016043	Mosi leh Aaron kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah ahoh uhi.
04016044	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04016045	“Hiai mipi omkhawmte lak a pan kihemkhia un, amau ka hihmang guihtheihna ding in,” achi hi. Amau amai ua lei si in abokkhup uhi.
04016046	Mosi in Aaron kiang ah, “Na mei lakna tawi inla, maitam a pan mei koih inla; gimlim buak inla, mipi omkhawmte kiang ah paipih meng inla, amaute a ding in kilemna bawl in. Toupa hehna ahong suak hi; hipi aleng panta,” achi hi.
04016047	Aaron in Mosi gen bang in atawi a, omkhawmte lak ah atailut a, ngai in, mipi lak ah huai hipi ahong leng pan a; gimlim abuak a, mipi a ding in kilemna abawl hi.
04016048	Misi leh mihing kikal ah adingh a, hipi akhawlta hi.
04016049	Huchi in Korah tungtang thu a site sim louh, hipi a si tengteng singkhat sangli-le-zasagih ahi uh.
04016050	Aaron kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a Mosi kiang ah akik nawn a, huchi in hipi akhawlta hi.
04017001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04017002	“Israel suante houpih inla, a-inkuan chih a tuam ding in chiang khat chiat, a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a a-intekpen tengteng zah, chiang sawm-le-nih la inla; achiang uah amin uh gelh in.
04017003	Levi chiang ah Aaron min gelh inla; a-inkuan chih uh a ding in chiang khat zel ahi ding ahi.
04017004	Kihoupihna puanin thu theihsakna ma ah na koih dia, huai ah i kimu ding.
04017005	Huan hichi ahi ding a, ka tel ding mi chiang asel ding; huchi in Israel suante na tung a aphunna uh ka daisak ding,” achi hi.
04017006	Mosi in Israel suante ahoupih a, a-intekpen tengteng in amau inkuan chih a tuam a ding, intekpen chih in chiang khat zel, chiang sawm-le-nih apia uhi. Huaite lak ah Aaron chiang leng atel sam hi.
04017007	Mosi in theihpihna biakbuk ah Toupa ma ah huai chiangte akoih hi.
04017008	Azing in hichi ahong hi a, theihpihna puanin ah Mosi ava hoh a; ngai in, Levi inkuante a dia Aaron chiang ana sel a, pakmum asuah a, apakpalh a, vaisuaklu min asuang hi.
