04017009	Mosi in Toupa ma a pan chiang tengteng Israel tengteng kiang ah alakhia a; ana en ua, amau chiang chiat ala uhi.
04017010	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Helhat tate ahi uh chih theihsak zelna ding in Aaron chiang theihpihna bul ah koih nawn in. Huchi in ka tung a ahelna uh na daisak thei ding, asihlouhna ding un,” achi hi.
04017011	Huchibang in Mosi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahih hi.
04017012	Israel suante'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka si ua, ka mangthang uh, ka vek un ka mangthang uh.
04017013	Toupa biakbuk kiangnai a hong pai peuhmah asi ding uh. Kou leng si in ka mangthang ding uh maw?” achi uhi.
04018001	Huan Toupa'n Aaron kiang ah, “Nang leh na tapate leh na inkuan un mun siangthou tung a khelhna toh kisai mohpuakna na la ding uh ahi. Nang leh na tapate kia in siampu hihna toh kisai thilhihkhelhte a mohpuakna na puak ding uh ahi.
04018002	Na unaute, Levi suante leh na pa inkote hon tawnpih in, huchi a amau mun siangthou tung a khelhna toh kisai a mohpuakna alaktheihna ding un. Nang leh na tapate'n bel siampu hihna toh kisai thilhihkhelhte ah mohpuakna na lak ding uh ahi.
04018003	Nna nasep ahon huh ding ua, puanin nasep tengteng atang ding ua, himahleh mun siangthou tui-um belsuan leh maitam pen hon naih kei uhen, asihlouhna ding un, amau hiam, nang hiam in leng.
04018004	Puanin nasepna tengteng ah kihoupihna biakbuk nna pen atang ding uh. Namdangte'n nou ahon naih ding uh ahi kei hi.
04018005	Nang mun siangthou nasep leh maitam nasep pen na tang ding, Israel suante tung a hehna a-om nawnlouhna ding in.
04018006	Ngai in, ke'n na unau Levite, Israel suante lak a pan ka telkhia a, kihoupihna biakbuk ah asem ding uh. Toupa'n nang a hon thilthawnpiak ahi uh.
04018007	Nang leh na tapate'n maitam leh puanzak sunglam thu ah na siampu nasep uh na sem ding uh. Nang na sem dia; siampu nasep na sep ding in ka hon pia hi. Namdang hong kigolh peuhmah thah ahi ding uh,” achi hi.
04018008	Toupa'n Aaron ahoupih a, “Ngai in, Israelte thil siangthou teng lak a kei a dia vei thillat teng leng ka hon pia hi. Thaunilh na hih ziak leh na tapate tangtawn dan ding ahih ziak in huaite ka hon pia hi.
04018009	Mei a dia keptuam, thillat siangthoupente nang a ahi ding uh. Athillat teng uh, tangbuang thillat hiam khelhna thillat hiam mohna thillat hiam tantuan thillat tengteng nang leh na tapate tantuan ahi uh.
04018010	Mun siangthoupen ah na ne ding ua; pasal teng in ane ding ua, nou a ding in hiai thil siangthou ahi.
04018011	“Hiaite kei a tuam ahi; athilpiak uh tangbuang thillat, Israel suante vei thillat tengteng tan in. Nang, na tapate leh tanute a dia tangtawn a na tantuam ding ua ka hon piak ahi. Na inn a misiang tengteng in ane thei ding uh.
04018012	Sathau hoihpen, grep hoihpen, buh hoihpen leh gah masapen Toupa a dia apiak teng uh ka hon pia hi.
04018013	Alou ua gah min masapen Toupa a dia ahon tawi uh nang a ahi dia; na inn a misiang teng in ane thei ding uh.
04018014	Israelte thillat tengteng nang a ahi ding.
04018015	“ Toupa a dia apiak uh sul hong masapen peuhmah mihing leng gan leng nang a ahi ding. Himahleh tapa masapen zaw na tan ngeingei dia, gan siang lou nou suakkhe masapen leng na tat ding ahi.
04018016	“Kha khat ahih in tat dingte tatna man na sehdan bang in, mun siangthou a shekel hihdan bang a shekel nga a na tat ding ahi, shekel tuh gerah sawmnih ahi.
04018017	Himahleh bawng suakkhe masapen hiam, belam suakkhe masapen hiam, kel suakkhe masapen hiam, na tat ding ahi kei; asiangthou uhi. Asisan uh maitam ah na theh dia, Toupa a dia gimlim ding in athaute mei a thillat in na hal ding ahi
04018018	Asa uh nang a ahi dia, vei thillat leh aliang taklam pang nang a ahih bang in.
04018019	“Thil siangthou vei thillat, Israel suante'n Toupa a dia alatte uh tangtawn a na tantuam ding un ka hon pia hi. Toupa ma a nang, na tapate leh na tanute a dia tangtawn thukhun ahi,” achi hi.
04018020	Toupa'n Aaron kiang ah, “Agam uah goutan na nei kei dia, alak uah leng tantuan na nei sam kei ding. Israel suante lak a na tantuan leh na goutan, Keimah ka hi.
04018021	“Ngai in, anasep, puanin a asep man ding un, Israel gam a sawm-a-khat tengteng Levi suante kiang ah ka pia ahi.
04018022	Tu a pan Israel suante'n kihoupihna biakbuk ahon naih het louh ding uh ahi; khelhna pua in asi kha ding uh.
04018023	Himahleh Levite'n bel kihoupihna biakbuk nasep asem ding ua; Israelte khelhna toh kisai mohpuakna ala ding uh. Hiai asuante tan a ding in dan thusehsa hi dia; Israel suante lak ah goutan anei kei ding uh.
04018024	Israel suante'n sawm-a-khat Toupa a dia vei thillat alat uh Levite goutan ding in ka pia hi. Huaiziak in akiang uah, Israel suante lak ah goutan anei kei ding uh, ka na chita him ahi,” achi hi.
04018025	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04018026	“Levite houpih inla, akiang uah, na goutan ding ua Israel suante sawm-a-khat ka hon piak na lak chiang un, huai sawm-a-khat a pan sawm-a-khat Toupa kiang ah vei thillat ding in na lan ding uh ahi.
04018027	Na vei thillat uh buhphual a buh leh uain tung masapen dia sim ahi ding.
04018028	Huchibang in Israel suante lak a sawm-a-khat na lak tengteng uah leng Toupa vei thillat ding in na lan zui zel ding uhi; huai Toupa vei thillat pen siampu Aaron na piak ding uh ahi.
04018029	Na thillat tengteng lak ua ahoihpen, asiangthoupen Toupa vei thillat ding in na lan ding uhi.
04018030	Huaiziak in akiang uah, ahoihpen na vei chiang un Levite buhphual a tung leh grep sukna a pan tung bang a sim ahi ding.
04018031	Koi lai peuh ah leng na ne thei ding uh, nou leh na inkuanpihte un leng; kihoupihna biakbuk a na sep man uh ahi ngal a.
04018032	Ahoihpen na vei uleh akhelh moh na po kei ding uh. Israel suante thil siangthou na hihthanghuai kei ding ua, na si kei ding uhi, chi in,” achi hi.
04019001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron ahoupih a,
04019002	“Hiai Toupa thupiak dan ahi. Israel suante bawngla san, dembei, gensiatbei, hakkol bulhsak ngei het louh na kiang a hon kai ding in hilh un.
04019003	Siampu Eleazar na pe ding a, ama'n giahphual pua ah apikhe dia, ama ah mi khat in agou ding hi.
04019004	Siampu Eleazar in akhut in asisan ala dia, kihoupihna biakbuk ma ah asisan sagihvei atheh ding.
04019005	Mi khat in huai bawngla amitmuh in ahal dia; avun, asa, asisan leh a-ek ahalmang ding hi.
04019006	Siampu in sidar sing, hissop leh khau san ala dia, abawngla hal uah apailut ding ahi.
04019007	Siampu in apuansilhte sawp in, akisil dia, huai khit in giahphual ah ahoh dia, nitaklam tan in siampu siang lou ahi ding.
04019008	Ahal mi in apuansilhte sawp in, akisil dia, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
04019009	Mi asiang khat in bawngla vu alakhawm dia, giahphual pua a mun siang a ngaih ah akoih dia, Israel suan mipi omkhawmte kisiansakna tui dia zat ding ahi. Hiai khelh siansakna ahi.
04019010	Bawngla vu lakhawm mi in apuansilhte asawp dia, nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding. Hiai Israel suante leh namdang akiang ua omte a ding in tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi.
04019011	“Kuapeuh siluang khoih peuhmah ni sagih sung siang lou ahi ding.
04019012	Amah ani thum ni in akisiangsak dia, ani sagih ni in asiang ding. Himahleh, ani thum ni a akisiansak keileh ani sagih ni in leng asiang kei ding hi.
04019013	Kuapeuh siluang khoihmi, akisiansak keileh Toupa biakbuk ahihnin ahi. Huai mi Israel mite a pan satkhiak ding ahi. Kisiansakna tui atung a atheh louh ziak in asiang kei dia, atung ah asianlouhna a-om lai hi.
04019014	“Puanin a mi asihleh hiai adan ding ahi. Puanin a lut peuhmah leh puanin sung a om peuhmahte ni sagih sung siang lou ahi ding uh.
04019015	Tui-um belsuan kihong, sit louh peuhmah siang lou ahi uh.
04019016	Gamlak a namsau a thah hiam, misi luang hiam, mihing guh hiam, han hiam mi'n akhoihleh ni sagih sung siang lou ahi ding.
04019017	“Asiangloute a tuam ding in khelh thoihna vu ala ding ua, bel ah tuikhuk tui toh asung ding uhi.
04019018	Misiang in, hissop ala dia, tui ah adiah dia, puanin tung, tui-um belsuan tengteng, huai a om mi tengteng, guh hiam, thah siluang hiam, misi luang hiam, han hiam khoih mite tung ah atheh ding.
04019019	Misiang in ani thum ni leh ani sagih ni in misiang lou atheh dia, ani sagih ni in ahihsiang dia; apuansilhte asawp dia, akisil dia, nitaklam in ahong siangta ding hi.
04019020	“Misiang lou kisiangsak lou in Toupa mun siangthou ahihnit ziak in huai mi omkhawmte a pan satkhiak ding ahi. Kisiansakna tui a theh louh ahi a, siang lou ahi.
04019021	Hiai amau a ding in tangtawn dan thuseh ding ahi. Kisiansakna tui a theh peuhmah in apuansilhte asawp dia; akisiansakna tui khoih peuhmah nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding.
04019022	Misiang lou in akhoih peuhmah siang lou ahi zel dia; huai khoihmi kuapeuh nitaklam tan in siang lou ahi ding,” achi hi.
04020001	Huan Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng huai kha khatna in Zin gamdai alut ua; mipite'n Kadesh ah giahphual asat ua; huai ah Miriam asi a, huai ah avui uhi.
04020002	Omkhawmte a ding in tui a-om kei a; Mosi leh Aaron kalh in akikhawm uh.
04020003	Mite'n, “ Toupa ma a i unaute asih lai un Pathian in hon that geih maileh aw!
04020004	Kou leh ka gante uh toh bangziak a Toupa mipite si ding a gamdai a pilut na hia?
04020005	Bangziak in ahia hiai gam hoihloupi a hon pilut dia Aigupta gam a pan na hon pawtkhiaksak mahmah? Buh-le-balte, theipite, grepkungte, theibuhfaite omlouhna mun ahi, tui dawn ding mahmah leng a-om sam kei hi,” achi uhi.
04020006	Huchi in Mosi leh Aaron mipi a pan kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah ahoh ua, abokkhup ua; Toupa thupina akiang uah ahong kilang hi.
04020007	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04020008	“Chiang la inla, mipite omkhawmsak inla, nang leh na sanggampa Aaron toh, huai suangpi in amitmuh ua tui pawtsak ding in thu pia in. Suangpi a pan tui na lakkhiaksak dia, mipi omkhawmte leh agante uh na dawnsak ding ahi,” achi hi.
04020009	Mosi in Toupa ma a pan chiang, athupiak bang in ala hi.
04020010	Mosi leh Aaron in mipite suangpi bul ah a-omkhawmsak ua, Mosi in akiang uah, “Nou mihelte aw, ngai un, hiai suangpi a pan tui ka hon lakkhiaksak ding ua hia?” achi uhi.
04020011	Mosi in aban azak a, achiang in suangpi nihvei asat a; huchi in tui tamtak ahong pawt a, mipi omkhawmte leh agante un adawn uhi.
04020012	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron kiang ah, “N'on gintak louh ua, Israel suante mitmuh a na hon pahtawi louh ziak un hiai omkhawmte ka piak gam ah na pilut kei ding uh,” achi hi.
04020013	Hiai Meribah tui ahi. Israel suante'n Toupa akinakpih ua, amaute lak a amah pahtawi a a-om ziak in.
04020014	Mosi in Kadesh a pan Edom kumpipa kiang ah mi asawl a, “Na unaupa Israel in hichi in achi, ka tung ua thuakna hong tung tengteng na thei hi.
04020015	Ka pipute uh Aigupta gam ah ahohsuk ua, sawtpi Aigupta gam a ka om uh, Aigupta mite'n kou leh ka pipute hoih loutak in ahon bawl uh.
04020016	Huchi in Toupa ka sam ua, ka aw uh ana za a, angel ahon sawl a, Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhia a, ngai in, na gam naihpen khua Kadesh ah ka om uhi.
04020017	Hehpih in na gam ka tawn paisuak ding uh aw. Lou hiam, grephuan hiam ka tawn kei ding ua, tuileh tuite leng ka dawn kei ding uh. Kumpipa lamlian ah ka pai ding ua, na gam ka khen masiah uh taklam hiam, veilam hiam ah ka pial kei ding uh,” achi hi.
04020018	Edom in akiang ah, “N'on palsuak ding ahi kei. N'on palleh hon dou ding in namsau toh ka hong kuan ding,” achi hi.
04020019	Israel suante'n akiang ah, “Lamlian ah ka paitou ding ua; kou leh ka ganta un na tui ka dawn uleh aman ka hon pe ding uh. Thil dang bangmah hih lou in apai in ka paisuak mai ding uh,” achi uhi.
04020020	Ama'n, “Paisuak lou ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Edom mipi tampi leh mihat taktakte toh amau dou ding in ahong kuanta uhi
04020021	Hiai bang in Edom in Israel mite agam a apaisuak uh aphal kei a, Israel mite'n akiksan nawnta uhi.
04020022	Huchi in Kadesh a pan apawt ua; Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng Hor tang ahong tung uh.
04020023	Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron, Edom gam naih Hor tang ah ahoupih a,
04020024	“Achipihte kiang ah Aaron pi ahita ding. Meribah tui a ka thu kalh a, ahel ziak in Israel suante ka piak gam ah alut kei ding.
04020025	Aaron leh atapa Eleazar Hor tang ah hon pitou in.
04020026	Aaron puansilhte suahsak inla, atapa Eleazar silhsak in. Aaron achipihte kiang a pi ahi ding, huai ah asi ding,” achi hi.
04020027	Mosi in Toupa thupiak bang in ahih a; mipi omkhawm tengteng mitmuh in Hor tang ah apaitou uhi.
04020028	Huchi in Mosi in Aaron puansilh asuahsak a, Eleazar asilhsak hi. Aaron tang vum ah asita a, tang a pan Mosi leh Eleazar ahong paikhesuk uhi.
04020029	Mipi omkhawm tengteng in Aaron si ahi chih atheih un, Israel inkote'n ni sawmthum sung Aaron asuun uhi.
04021001	Huan Kanaan mi, kumpipa Arad simlam a om in, Atharim lampi ah Israel mite ahong pai uh chi a kigen ana za a; huchi in Israel mite ana dou a, galmat khenkhat anei hi.
04021002	Israel mite'n Toupa kiang ah thu achiam ua, “Ka khut ua hiai mite na hon piakleh akhuate uh ka hihmang ding uh,” achi uh.
04021003	Toupa'n Israel mite thu apom a, akiang uah Kanaan mite apia a, amau leh akhuate ahihmang uhi. Huai mun min Hormah asa uhi.
04021004	Hor tang a pan Tuipi San lam ah Edom gam kualkhum in apai ua; alampi ziak in mipi alunglel mahmah uhi.
04021005	Mipite'n Pathian leh Mosi kalh in, “Gamdai a si dia bang ding a Aigupta a pan hon pikhia na hia? Tanghou lah om lou, tui lah om lou. Hiai tanghou kihhuai lah ka hinna un akih hi,” achi uh.
04021006	Huchi in Toupa'n mipi lak ah gul gukhahte asawl a, mite atu ua, Israel mite tampi asi uhi.
04021007	Huaiziak in mite Mosi kiang ah ahong pai ua, “ Toupa leh nang kalh a ka na pau uh ka khialta uh, i lak ua gulte lamang ding in Toupa kiang ah thum dih ve,” achi uhi. Huchi in mite a ding in Mosi athum hi.
04021008	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Gul gukhah lim bawl inla, khuam lek ah khai in. Huan hichi ahi ding a, gultukmi peuhmah in huai a-et uleh adam ding uh,” achi hi.
04021009	Huchi in Mosi in dal gul abawl a, khuam lek ah akhai a; huan hichi ahong hi a, gultukmi peuhmah in huai dal gul a-et uleh adam uhi.
04021010	Israel suante apai zel ua, Oboth ah giahphual asat uhi.
04021011	Oboth a pan apai nawn ua, nisuahna lam Moab gamdai bul Ije-abarim ah giahphual asat uhi.
04021012	Huai a pan apai nawn ua, Zered Phaizang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04021013	Huai a pan apai nawn ua, Amorte gamgi a pan hong dawktuam gamdai a Arnon lehlam ah giahphual asat uhi. Arnon bel Moab gamgi, Moab leh Amorte kikal a om ahi.
04021014	Huaiziak in Toupa kidounate laibu ah, Tuipi San leh Arnon luitate a;
04021015	Ar tenna a luangkhia luite leh Moab gamgi a omte ah athilhihte, achih.
04021016	Huai a pan Beer ah apai nawn ua; huai bel Toupa'n Mosi kiang a mipite samkhawm inla, tui ka pe ding, achihna tuileh ahi.
04021017	Huchi in Israelte'n hiai la asa uh. “Aw tuikhuk, hong kikhohkhia inla, athu la in sa un.
04021018	Dan petu in akawkmuh bang a miliante uleh mipite heutute'n akhetbuk uh toh alaih uh tuikhuk,” chi in. Huchi in gamdai a pan Mattanah tan;
04021019	Mattanah a pan Nahaliel ah; Nahaliel a pan Bamoth ah;
04021020	Bamoth a pan Moab lou a phaizang leh gamdai sunsuk Jeshimon lam nga Pisgah vum ah apai uhi.
04021021	Israel mite'n Amorte kumpipa Sihon kiang ah mi asawl ua,
04021022	“Na gam ah hon paisuaksak ve; lou ah hiam, grephuan ah hiam ka pial kei ding ua; tuileh tuite ka dawn kei ding uh. Na gam ka khen masiah uh Kumpipa Lamlian ah ka pai zel ding uh,” chi in.
04021023	Himahleh Sihon in Israel mite agam a apaisuak uh aphal kei hi. Sihon in amite tengteng akaikhawm vek a, Israel mite dou ding in gamdai ah akisazawta hi. Jahaz ava tung ua; huai ah Israel mite adou uh.
04021024	Israel mite'n namsau in amah athat ua, agam Arnon a pan Jabok tan in, Ammon suante tan in alazou uhi. Ammon suante gamgi kulh nei ahih ziak in agam chiang lel alazou uhi.
04021025	Israel mite'n huai khua tengteng ala ua; Israel mite'n Amorte khua tengteng aluah uhi. Heshbon leh akhopel tengteng ah leng ateng uhi.
04021026	Heshbon khua bel Amorte kumpipa Sihon khua ahi. Amah huai ma a Moab kumpipa asual a akhut a pan gam tengteng, Arnon tan alaksakpa ahi.
04021027	Huaiziak in paunak gente'n, “Heshbon ah hong pai in, kilam thak hen, Sihon khopi kilam thak hen, achi uhi.
04021028	Heshbon a pan mei ahong pawt a, Sihon khopi a pan meikuang. Moab a Ar akang khin a, Arnon a mun sang a toupate toh.
04021029	Aw, Moab, na tung agik hi. Na mangthangta, Aw Kemosh mi! Ama'n Amorte kumpipa Sihon kiang ah tapate galtaite bang in leh atanute saltangte bang in apia hi.
04021030	Himahleh amau ka kap ua, Dibon tan in Heshbon amangthangta. Huchi in Nophah tan in ka hihmang uh, huai in Medeba tan apha hi.”
04021031	Huchibang in, Amorte gam ah Israel mite ateng uhi.
04021032	Mosi in Jazer enkhe ding in mi asawl a, akhuate ala ua, huai a teng Amorte ahawlkhia uhi.
04021033	Akik nawn ua, Bashan lampi ah apaitou uh. Bashan kumpipa Og, amau dou ding in, amah leh amite tengteng, Edrei ah akisakhia uhi.
04021034	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Amah lau ke'n. Amah, amite tengteng leh agam na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Heshbon a om Amorte kumpipa Sihon tung a na hih bang in na hih ding ahi,” achi hi.
04021035	Huchi in amah leh tapate hawi himhim nei lou in amite tengteng toh athat ua; agam aluahsakta uhi.
04022001	Huan Israel suante apai zel ua, Jeriko zawn Jordan gal a Moab Phaizang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04022002	Zippor tapa Balak in Israel mite'n Amorte abawldan tengteng uh ana thei hi.
04022003	Moabte'n mite alau mahmah ua, atam ngal ua. Israel suante ziak in Moabte alungkham uhi.
04022004	Moabte'n Midian upate kiang ah, “Hiai mipite'n bawng in loupa anekgaih bang in i kim ua mi tengteng anegai ding uh,” achi uhi. Huai lai in Zippor tapa Balak Moab kumpipa ahi.
04022005	Huaiziak in Beor tapa Balaam, Pethor a om kiang ah mi asawl hi. Huai bel amite suante gam a lui kiang a om ahi. Amah ava sam ua, “Ngai in, Aigupta gam a pan hong paikhia mipi a-om ua; ngai in, leitung maikaih atuamdim ua, ka kiangchin ah a-om uhi.
04022006	Hehpih in hong pai inla, hiai mite hong hamsiat dih ve. Kei a ding in ahat lua ua, ka zoh theih ua ka gam a pan ka delhkhiak theih zenzen khak uleh. Na vualzawl peuhmah vualzawl in a-om a, na hamsiat peuhmah lah hamsiat in a-om, chih ka thei,” ava chisak hi.
04022007	Huchi in Moab upate leh Midian upate aisanna ding tawi in apawtkhia ua; Balaam kiang ava tung ua, Balak thukhah ahilh uhi.
04022008	Ama'n akiang uah, “Tuzan hiai ah giak unla, Toupa'n hon hilh bangbang thu na kiang ua ka hon tun ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Moab miliante Balaam kiang ah agiakta uhi.
04022009	Balaam kiang ah Pathian ahong a, na kiang a mite kuate ahi ua? achi hi.
04022010	Balaam in Pathian kiang ah, “Zippor tapa Moab kumpipa Balak in ka kiang ah,
04022011	‘Ngai in, Aigupta gam a pan a hong pai mipite'n leitung maikaih aluahdim uh. Hong pai inla, hong hamsiat in, ka zoh theih a, ka delhkhiak theih khakleh,’ ” chi in mi ahon sawl hi, achi hi.
04022012	Pathian in Balaam kiang ah, “Akiang ua na hoh ding ahi kei. Huai mite na hamsiat ding ahi kei; mihampha ahi uh,” achi hi.
04022013	Zingsang in Balaam athou a, Balak miliante kiang ah, “Na gam uah pai nawnta un. Toupa'n na kiang ua hoh dia ka pawt aphal kei,” achi hi.
04022014	Huchi in Moab miliante athou ua, Balak kiang ah apai ua, “Balaam in ahon zui ut kei,” achi uhi.
04022015	Balak in milian tamsem, asang ua zahtakhuaizaw asawl nawn hi.
04022016	Balaam kiang ava tung ua, akiang ah, “Zippor tapa Balak in hichi in achi, ‘Ka kiang a na hong hoh ding bangmah in dal kei hen.
04022017	Mithupitak in ka hon bawl dia, ka kiang a na gen peuhmah ka hih zel ding. Huaiziak in hong pai teitei inla, hiai mite hong hamsiatsak mahmah mai in,’ ” achi uhi.
04022018	Balaam in Balak mite adawng a, akiang uah, “Balak in a-inn dim dangka leh dangka-eng hon pe ding himahleh, abangmah Toupa ka Pathian thu pel in ka hihthei kei.
04022019	Huaiziak in Toupa'n ka kiang ah bangchi in ahia agen nawn ding, tuzan hiai lai ah giak peuhmah phot un,” achi hi.
04022020	Zan in Balaam kiang ah Pathian ahong a, akiang ah, “Hiai mite nang hong sam a hong ahih uleh, thou inla, akiang uah hoh in. Himahleh na kiang a ka gen kia na hih ding ahi,” achi hi.
04022021	Huchi in zingsang in Balaam athou a, asabiltung tung ah tutphah aphah a, Moab miliante azuita hi.
04022022	Huchi in ahoh ziak in Pathian aheh mahmah a, amah na lamdal ding in lampi ah Toupa angel ana dingh hi. Asabiltung tung a tuang ahi a, asikhate nih leng akiang ah a-om uhi.
04022023	Sabiltung in Toupa angel, namsau tawi a lampi a dingh amu hi. Huchi in lampi a pan sabiltung apialkhia a, gamlak ah apai a, Balaam in lampi a kiksak tum in sabiltung asat hi.
04022024	Grephuan umna kikal kuak ah Toupa angel adingh hi.
04022025	Sabiltung in Toupa angel amu a, grephuan umna ava ngai a, dai umna toh Balaam khe anehden hi. Balaam in asabiltung asat nawn hi.
04022026	Apam deuh ah Toupa angel apai a, mun kochik laitak, taklam hiam, veilam hiam a leng pialna omlouhna laitak ah adingh hi.
04022027	Sabiltung in Toupa angel amu a, Balaam akualpihta hi. Balaam aheh mahmah a, achiangkhun in sabiltung asat hi.
04022028	Toupa'n sabiltung apausak a, Balaam kiang ah, “Bang ka hon chih a ahia? Thumveitak na hon huchi sat?” achi hi.
04022029	Balaam in sabiltung kiang ah, “N'on simmoh ziak in ahi. Namsau tawi hi leng, ka hon that khin hialta ding,” achi hi.
04022030	Sabiltung in Balaam kiang ah, “Tutan a na tuanna gige na sabiltung ka hi kei a hia? Hichibang in ka hon hih ngei a hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hih ngei lou e,” achi hi.
04022031	Toupa'n Balaam mit avaksak a, Toupa angel namsau tawi alampi a dingh amuta a; akun a, amai a lei si in abokkhup hi.
04022032	Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Bang achia hichibang a na sabiltung thumvei sat na hia? Ngai in, na gamtatdan ka mitmuh a asiat ziak in hon na lamdal dia hong pawtkhia ka hi.
04022033	Sabiltung in ahon mu a, ka ma a thumvei pial ahi. Pial keileh amah that lou a, nang hon that khin ding ka hi,” achi hi.
04022034	Balaam in Toupa angel kiang ah, “Ka na khialta hi. Hon na lamdal ding in lampi ah na dingh chih ka thei kei hi,” achi hi.
04022035	Toupa angel in Balaam kiang ah, “Hiai mite kiang ah hoh inla; himahleh na kiang a ka thugen ding kia na gen ding ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Balaam in Balak miliante azuita hi.
04022036	Balak in Balaam ahong chih azak in Arnon lam a gamgi chiang ah Moab khopi pha in ava dawn a, huai tuh gamgi tawpna ahi.
04022037	Balak in Balaam kiang ah, “Phatuamngaitak a nang hong sam dia mi ka hon sawl ahi kei maw? Bangziak a ka kiang a hong nuam lou na hia? Mithupitak in ka hon bawl thei ka hia?” achi hi.
04022038	Balaam in Balak kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka hong hi. Bangmah gentheihna mawngmawng ka nei a hia? Pathian in ka kam a thu akoih kia ka gen ding,” achi hi.
04022039	Huchi in Balak kiang ah Balaam ahohta a, Kiriath-huzot ava tung uhi.
04022040	Balak in bawng leh belam alan a, khenkhat Balaam leh akiang a om miliante kiang ah akhak hi.
04022041	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Balak in Balaam api a, Baal mun sangte ah ahohtouhpih a, huai a pan mite omna chiang amupha hi.
04023001	Balaam in Balak kiang ah, “Hiai ah maitam sagih hon bawlsak inla, bawngtal sagih leh belampa sagih hon suktuahsak in,” achi hi.
04023002	Balak in Balaam gen bang in ahih a; Balak leh Balaam in maitam chin ah bawngtal khat leh belam khat alan uhi.
04023003	Balaam in Balak kiang ah, “Na halmang thillat bul ah ana dingh gige inla, kei ka va paituam ding. Kei hon houpih ding in Toupa ahong pai kha thei hi. Ama'n hon hilh peuhmah ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.
04023004	Huchi in mual giau velvul ah ahohtou hi. Pathian in Balaam ana kituahpih hi. Balaam in akiang ah, “Maitam sagih ka bawl khin a; maitam chih ah bawngtal khat leh belampa khat ka lan chiat,” achi hi.
04023005	Toupa'n Balaam kam ah thu akoih a, “Balak kiang ah kik nawn inla, va gensawn in,” achi hi.
04023006	Huchi in akiang ah akik nawnta a; ngai in, ahalmang thillat bul ah amah leh Moab milian tengteng leng ana dingh lai uhi.
04023007	Ama'n thu agenta a, “Aram a pan Balak in ahon pi a, suahlam tang a Moab kumpipa'n, ‘Hong inla, Jakobte hon hamsiatsak in, hong inla, Israelte hong dalsak in!’ achi a.
04023008	Bangchi in Pathian hamsiat louh ka hamsiat dia? Bangchi in Pathian dal louh ka dal dia?
04023009	Amau lah suangpi tung a pan ka mu ngal a, mualte a pan amau ka mu a, ngai in, mite atuam in ateng ding ua, namte lak a simtel louh ding ahi uh.
04023010	Jakobte leivui kua'n asim thei dia, Israelte mun li a khen, mun khat kua'n ahia sim thei ding? Midiktat sih in si sam ning, ka tawpna amah a bang hi hen!” achi hi.
04023011	Balaam kiang ah Balak in, “N'on bawldan bangchidan ahia? Ka melmate hamsiat ding in ka hon pi a, na vualzawl zaw mawk ngal a!” achi hi.
04023012	Ama'n adawng a, “ Toupa'n ka kam a akoih ka gen ding mah hilou ding maw?” achi hi.
04023013	Balak in akiang ah, “Mun dang ah hoh nawn dih ni e, huai a pan na thei vek ding. A-omna chiang uh na mu ding, avek un zaw na mu vek khol kei ding. Huai a pan hon hamsiatsak in,” achi hi.
04023014	Huchi in Zophimte tenna Pisgah vum ah apitou a, maitam sagih adoh a, maitam chih ah bawngtal khat leh belampa khat alan hi.
04023015	Balak kiang ah, “Pam a Toupa ka va houpih sung in na halmang thillat bul ah ana dingh lai in,” achi hi.
04023016	Toupa'n Balaam ana kituahpih a, akam ah thu akoih a, “Balak kiang ah kik nawnta inla, akiang ah va gensawn in,” achi hi.
04023017	Akiang ah ava hoh a, ngai in, ahalmang thillat bul ah ana dingh nilouh hi. Moab miliante leng akiang ah a-om uh. Balak in akiang ah, “ Toupa'n bang ana gen a?” achi hi.
04023018	Ama'n thu agenta hi: “Thou inla, Balak, ngaikhia in. Zippor tapa, ka thu ngai in.
04023019	Pathian zaw Zuauhat mihing ahi kei. Kisik hat mihing tapa leng ahi sam kei. Agensa ahih kei dia hia? Ana gensa ahih piching kei dia hia?
04023020	Ngai in, vualzawl ding in thupiak ka mu a, ama'n avualzawl khin a, ke'n ka hihlamdang thei kei.
04023021	Jakobte ah thulimlouhna amu kei a, Israelte ah phengphitna amu sam kei. Toupa a Pathian uh akiang uah a-om a, alak uah kumpipa kikou husa a-om hi.
04023022	Aigupta a pan Pathian in apikhia a, gam bawngtal tha bang anei uhi.
04023023	Jakobte tung ah bumhaina a-om kei a; Israelte tung ah leng khimhaina a-om sam kei hi. Jakobte leh Israelte kiang ah Pathian thilhih hihlat ahi!
04023024	Ngai in, humpinelkai lian bang in mipite athou ua, humpinelkai dawng bang in adingtou ua; asamat uh anek ma un akual kei ding uh, amat uh sisan adawn ma un,” achi hi.
04023025	Balak in Balaam kiang ah, “Hamsiat ke'nla, vualzawl leng vualzawl het ke'n,” achi hi.
04023026	Himahleh Balaam in adawng a, Balak kiang ah, “ Toupa'n agen tengteng ka hih ngeingei ding ahi chi in ka hon hilh khin ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
04023027	Balak in Balaam kiang ah, “Hong dih, mun dang ah ka hon pi nawn dia, huai a pan na hon hamsiatsak Pathian in phal kha zenzen hiam,” achi hi.
04023028	Huchi in Jeshimon lam nga Peor vum ah Balak in Balaam apitouta hi.
04023029	Balaam in Balak kiang ah, “Hiai ah maitam sagih hon bawlsak inla, bawngtal sagih leh belampa sagih hon suktuahsak in,” achi hi.
04023030	Balak in Balaam gen bang in ahih a, maitam chih ah bawngtal khat leh belampa khat alan hi.
04024001	Israelte vualzawl ding Toupa deihlam ahi chih Balaam in atheih in nidang a ahih bang in bumna zat tum lou in gamdai lam anga zawta hi.
04024002	Balaam avandak a, Israel mite anam dungzui zel a om amu a; atung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung hi.
04024003	Huchi in hiai thu agen a, “Beor tapa Balaam in agen a, amit a kichiantak a mupa'n agen hi.
04024004	Pathian thute za a, Bangkim hihtheipa kilakna mu, akhup a puk a, amitte hong vakpa'n agen hi.
04024005	Jakob aw, na puaninte hoih hi na e, Israel aw, na biakbukte uh!
04024006	Phaizang bang in akiphah a, luidung a huante bang in, Toupa suan tosaw bang in, luidung a sidar singte bang ahi uh.
04024007	Abaltinte a pan tui asungkhe dia, tui tampite ah ahaichi a-om dia, akumpipa Agag sang in asangzaw dia, alalgam tawisang in a-om ding hi.
04024008	“Aigupta a pan Pathian in apikhia a, gam bawngtal hatna bang anei a, Amelma uh namdangte anegai dia, aguhte uh atansak dia, athaltangte in akap pailet ding hi.
04024009	Akun a, humpinelkai bang in akual a, humpinelkai bang mai in; kua'n atokthou dia? Hon vualzawl peuhmah vualzawl in om uhenla, hon hamsiat peuhmah hamsiat in om hen,” achi hi.
04024010	Balaam tung ah Balak aheh mahmah a; akhutte nuaituah in Balak in Balaam kiang ah, “Ka melmate hamsiat ding in ka hon sam a, tu in, thumveitak amau na vualzawlta.
04024011	Huaiziak in na mun ah taimang in. Thupitak a hon tawisang ding ka hon chih na hi a; himahleh, ngai in, Toupa'n nang ka hon tawisang ding adal,” achi hi.
04024012	Balaam in Balak kiang ah, “Na misawlte kiang ah ka gen kei maw?
04024013	‘Balak in a-inn dangka leh dangka-eng a dim hon pe ding himahleh, ahoih lam hiam, aselam hiam Toupa thu khen lam ah keimah lungsim a suak in bangmah ka hihthei kei. Toupa'n agen peuhmah ka gen ding,’ chi in.
04024014	“Ngai in, ka mite kiang ah ka paita ding. Huaiziak in hong hoh in, tunung a na mite tung a hiai mite'n ahih ding uh ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.
04024015	Hiai thu agen a, Beor tapa Balaam mitvaktak amu in agen hi.
04024016	“Pathian thute za a, Tungnungpen theihna thei, Bangkim hihthei kilakna mu, akhup a puk a mit hong vakta in;
04024017	Amah ka mu, himahleh tu in hilou in; Amah ka en a, naichik ah hilou in. Jakob a pan aksi khat ahong suakkhe dia, Israel a pan lalchiang ahong dingkhe dia, Moab gam nawlte adou dia, Seth tapate ahihse ding hi.
04024018	Amelma Edom leh Seirte lak zoh in a-om ding ua; Israel in hattak in ahih ding hi.
04024019	Jakob a pan ukmi khat ahong paikhe dia, khopi a omsunte ahihmang ding,” achi hi.
04024020	Amalek lam anga a, thu agen a, “Amalek bel namte bulpen ahi na a, adawn lam tangtawn a manthatna ahi,” achi hi.
04024021	Kente lam anga a, thu agen a, “Na tenna mun akip a, suangpi ah na bu na sep hi.
04024022	“Asshurte'n sal a hon pimang masiah, Kente hihmanthat in na om ding uh,” achi hi.
04024023	Thu agen nawn a, “Pathian in hiai ahih, kua ahing zou dia?
04024024	Himahleh Kittim gam a pan longte ahong tung ding ua, Asshur ahihgim dia, Eber ahihgim ding ua, Amah leng amangthang ding,” achi hi.
04024025	Huchi in Balaam adingkhia a, akhua ah apaita. Huchi in Balak leng apai samta hi.
04025001	Huan Shittim a Israelte ataam sung un, pasalte'n Moab numeite akithuahpih uhi.
04025002	Apathiante uh ma a kithoihnate ah achial ua; huchi in ane ua, apathiante ma ah akun uhi.
04025003	Israelte'n Peor Baal abe samta uhi. Huchi in Israelte tung ah Toupa hehna akuangta hi.
04025004	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Mipite heutu tengteng pi inla, Toupa hehna lauhuaitak mai Israelte tung a pan akikhinmang theihna ding in sun khovak ah amaute that in,” achi hi.
04025005	Mosi in Israelte vaihawmte kiang ah, “Peor Baal biakna a tel peuhmahte that vek un,” achi hi.
04025006	Ngai in, puanin kongkhak a mite kap a a-om laitak un, Mosi leh Israel omkhawmte mitmuh in Israel mi khat in Midian numei khat a-unaute kiang ah ahon pi hi.
04025007	Siampu Aaron tapa Eleazar tapa Phinehas in amuhtak in omkhawmte a pan athou a, teipi khat alata hi.
04025008	Israel mi apuanin sung ah adelhlut a, Israel mi toh anih un asun pailet a, numei pen agil ah asun pailet hi. Huchi in Israel suante tung a hipi adaita hi.
04025009	Himahleh huai hipi a site singnih-le-sangli ahi uh.
04025010	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04025011	“Siampu Aaron tapa Eleazar tapa Phinehas in alak ua kei a dia phatuam angaih ziak in Israel suante a pan ka hehna aheimang a, huchi in ka thikthusiat ziak in Israel suante ka hihmangthang kei hi.
04025012	Huaiziak in ngai in, ka lemna thukhun amah ka pe ding hi.
04025013	Amah leh anung a asuante a ding in tangtawn siamputna thukhun ahi dia; a Pathian a dia phatuam ngai a Israel suante a dia kilemna abawlsak ziak in, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
04025014	Midian numei toh athah uh Israel mi min Jimri ahi a, amah Simeonte lak a inkuan a vaihawm makai Salu tapa ahi.
04025015	Athah uh Midian numei min Kozbi ahi. Amah Zur tanu ahi a, Midiante inkuan lak a heutu ahi.
04025016	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04025017	“Midiante hihlungzing unla, that un.
04025018	Amau Peor tungtang thu leh a-unaunu uh Midiante heutu tanu Kozbi toh kisai a noute ahon khem lai un, melma bang a hon sai uh ahi. Peor ziak a hipi ahong tun in Kozbi thah a om ahi,” achi hi.
04026001	Huan hipi adaih nung in hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n Mosi leh siampu Aaron tapa Eleazar ahoupih a,
04026002	“Israel suan omkhawm tengteng, kum sawmnih a pan atunglam, a-inkuan dungzui un Israel gam a galdou thei chiang teng sim vek un,” achi hi.
04026003	Mosi leh siampu Eleazar in Jeriko zawn, Jordan gei, Moab Phaizang ah amaute ahoupih a,
04026004	“Mipite kum sawmnih a pan atunglamte sim un,” Toupa'n Mosi leh Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante kiang a thu apiak bang in, achi uhi.
04026005	Israel ta upapen Reuben: Reuben tapate: Hanok suan Hanok inkote, Pallu suan Pallu inkote.
04026006	Hezron suan Hezron inkote, Karmi suan Karmi inkote.
04026007	Hiaite Reubente inkuante ahi uh. Sim a om tengteng singli sangthum zasagih-le-sawmthum ahi uh.
04026008	Pallu suan Eliab.
04026009	Eliab suante: Neumuel, Dathan leh Ahiram ahi uh. Hiai Dathan leh Abiram ahi ua, Toupa ahehsak lai ua Mosi leh Aaron kalh a Korah pawl a tel omkhawmte.
04026010	Huai pawl asih lai un lei in akam aka a, Korahte toh avalhkhawm a; mei in mi zanih-le-sawmnga akattum lai in, huchi in chiamtehna ana hita uhi.
04026011	Himahleh Korah tapate asi kei uh.
04026012	Simeon tapate inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a asuante uh: Nemuel suan Nemuel inkote, Jamin suan Jamin inkote, Jakin suan Jakin inkote,
04026013	Zerah suan Zerah inkote, Shaul suan Shaul inkote ahi uh.
04026014	Hiaite Simeon suante ahi ua, singnih sangnih-le-zanih ahi uh.
04026015	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Gad tapate: Zephon suan Zephon inkote, Haggi suan Haggi inkote leh Shuni suan Shuni inkote,
04026016	Ozni suan Ozni inkote, Eri suan Eri inkote;
04026017	Arod suan Arod inkote leh Areli suan Areli inkote.
04026018	Hiaite asimdan bang zel ua Gad tapate suante ahi ua, singli-le-zanga ahi uh.
04026019	Judah tapate: Er leh Onan ahi a, huan Kanaan gam ah Er leh Onan asi uhi.
04026020	Judah suante inkuan paidan hichibang ahi: Shelah suan Shelah inkote,
04026021	leh Perez suan Perez inkote: Zer suan Zer inkote, Hezron suan Hezron inkote; Hamul suan Hamul inkote ahi uh.
04026022	Hiaite asimdan bang zel un Judah tapate suante ahi ua, singsagih sangguk-le-zanga ahi uh.
04026023	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Issakar suante: Tola suan Tola inkote, Puah suan Puah inkote,
04026024	Jashub suan Jashub inkote, Shimron suan Shimron inkote ahi uh.
04026025	Hiaite asimdan bang zel ua Issakar tapate suante ahi ua, singguk sangli-le-zathum ahi.
04026026	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Zebulun suante: Sered suan Sered inkote, Elon suan Elon inkote, Jahleel suan Jahleel inkote ahi uh.
04026027	Hiaite asimdan bang zel ua Zebulunte suante ahi ua, singguk-le-zanga ahi uh.
04026028	A-inkuan uh kizomdan dungzui zel a Joseph suante: Manasseh leh Ephraim.
04026029	Manasseh suante: Makir suan Makir inkote; Makir in Gilead asuang a, Gilead suan Gilead inkote ahi uh.
04026030	Hiaite Gilead suante ahi ua: Iezer suan Iezer inkote, Helek suan Helek inkote,
04026031	Asriel suan Asriel inkote, Shekem suan Shekem inkote,
04026032	Shemida suan Shemida inkote; Hepher suan Hepher inkote ahi uh.
04026033	Hepher tapa Zelophehad in tapa nei lou in tanute anei a: Zelophehad tanute min Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah leh Tirzah ahi uh.
04026034	Hiaite Manasseh suante ahi uh. Asim teng uh singnga sangnih-le-zasagih ahi.
04026035	Hiai a-inkuan uh kizomdan dungzui zel a Ephraim suante ahi ua: Shuthelah suan Suthelah inkote, Beker suan Beker inkote, Tahan suan Tahan inkote ahi uh.
04026036	Hiaite Shuthelah suante ahi ua: Eran suan Eran inkote ahi uh.
04026037	Hiaite asimdan bang zel un Ephraim suante inkuan ahi ua, singthum sangnih-le-zanga ahi. Hiai a-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Joseph suante ahi uh.
04026038	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Benjamin suante: Bela suan Bela inkote, Ashbel suan Ashbel inkote, Ahiram suan Ahiram inkote,
04026039	Shupham suan Shupham inkote, Hupham suan Hupham inkote ahi uh.
04026040	Bela suante Ard leh Naaman ahi uh: Ard suan Ard inkote, Naaman suan Naaman inkote ahi uh.
04026041	Hiaite a-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel in Benjamin suante ahi uh. Asim teng uh singli sangnga-le-zaguk ahi.
04026042	Hiaite a-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Dan suante ahi ua: Shuham suan Shuham inkote ahi uh. Hiaite a-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Dan suante ahi uh.
04026043	Saham suante tengteng asimdan bang zel un singguk sangli-le-zali ahi.
04026044	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Asher suante ahi ua: Jimna suan a pan Jimna inkote, Ishvi suan a pan Ishvi inkote; Beriah suan a pan Beriah inkote.
04026045	Beriah suan Beriah inkote: Heber suan a pan Heber inkote; Malkiel suan a pan Malkiel inkote ahi uh.
04026046	Asher tanu min Serah ahi.
04026047	Hiaite Asher tapate suan asim teng uh ahi ua, singnga sangthum-le-zali ahi.
04026048	A-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Naphtali suante: Jahzeel suan a pan Jahzeel inkote; Guni suan a pan Guni inkote;
04026049	Jezer suan a pan Jezer inkote; Silem suan a pan Silem inkote ahi uh.
04026050	Hiaite a-inkuan uh kizomdan bang zel a Naphtali suante ahi ua; asim teng uh singli sangnga-le-zali ahi.
04026051	Hiaite Israel suante asim teng uh ahi ua, nuaiguk sangkhat zasagih-le-sawmthum ahi.
04026052	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04026053	“Hiaite amin zah zel ua gam hawmsak ding ahi.
04026054	Atam deuhte gam na pe tam dia, atawm deuhte gam na pe tawm deuh ding ahi. Asimdan bang in gam piak chiat ding ahi.
04026055	Himahleh aisan a gam hawm ding ahi: Apute nam min kizomdan bang zel in gam atang ding uhi.
04026056	Aisan bang zel in atam leh atawmte kiang ah gam hawm ahi ding hi,” achi hi.
04026057	Hiai Levite, a-inkuan kizomdan bang zel ua simte ahi uh: Gershon suan a pan Gershon inkote; Kohath suan a pan Kohath inkote; Merari suan a pan Merari inkote ahi uh.
04026058	Hiaite Levi suante ahi uh: Libni inkote, Hebron inkote, Mahli inkote, Mushi inkote, Korah inkote ahi uhi.
04026059	Kohath in Amram asuang a, Amram zi min Jokebed, Levi tanu, Aigupta gam a Levi a pan a piang ahi a, ama'n Amram lak ah Aaron leh Mosi leh asanggamnu Miriam asuang hi.
04026060	Aaron in Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar leh Ithamar asuang hi.
04026061	Nadab leh Abihu in Toupa zat louh chi meikuang azat lai un asi uhi.
04026062	Sim tengteng pasal kha khat chiang tunglam teng singnih-le-sangthum ahi. Israel mite lak ah gam hawm tang ding ahih louh ziak un Israel mite lak ah sim ahi kei uh.
04026063	Jeriko zawn, Jordan gei, Moab Phaizang a Israel suante Mosi leh siampu Eleazar in asim uh hiaite ahi uh.
04026064	Himahleh hiaite lak ah Sinai gamdai a Israel mite Mosi leh siampu Aaron in asimte, khat lel leng a-omta kei hi.
04026065	Toupa'n gamdai ah asi ngeingei ding uh, ana chi khinta ngal a. Jephunneh tapa Kaleb leh Nun tapa Joshua lou ngal kuamah dam a-om kei uhi.
04027001	Joseph tapa Manasseh suan a Manasseh tapa Makir, huai mi tapa Gilead, huai mi tapa Hepher tapa Jelophehad tanute ahong pai ua, atanute min, Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah leh Tirzah ahi uh.
04027002	Kihoupihna puanin kongkhak ah Mosi, siampu Eleazar leh miliante leh omkhawmte tengteng ma a kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ah ava dingh uhi.
04027003	“Gamdai ah ka pu uh asi a, Toupa kalh a kikhawm, Korah pawl ah atel kei. Himahleh amah khelh ziak in asi a, tapa anei kei hi.
04027004	Tapa aneih louh ziak lel in bangziak a ka pa uh min, asuante a pan mang ding ahia? Ka pa unaute lak ah tantuan hon pia un,” achi uhi.
04027005	Mosi in athu uh Toupa ma ah atun hi.
04027006	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04027007	“Jelophehad tanute'n ahihdik uhi. Apa uh unaute lak ah tantuan na bawlsak ding ahi. Apa uh tantuan na piak ding ahi.
04027008	Israel suante kiang ah mi tapa nei lou a asihleh agou atanute na piak ding uh ahi.
04027009	Tanu aneih keileh agou a-unaute na piak ding uh ahi.
04027010	“Sanggam pasalte aneih keileh agou apa sanggam pasalte na piak ding uh ahi.
04027011	Apa'n sanggam pasalte aneih keileh agou atanau na pe ding ua, ama'n aluah ding hi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a Israel suante a ding in vaihawmna dan thuseh kip ahi ding, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
04027012	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Abarim tang ah hohtou inla, Israel suante ka piak ding gam va en in.
04027013	Na muh khit chiang in na sanggampa Aaron achipihte kiang a pi ahih mah bang in nang leng pi na hita ding hi!
04027014	Zin gamdai a omkhawmte aphun lai ua amitmuh ua tui a kei hon pahtawi dia ka hon thupiak kalh a na hel ziak in,” achi hi. Huaite Zin gamdai a Kadesh a Meribah tuite ahi.
04027015	Mosi in Toupa ahoupih a,
04027016	“Omkhawm mipite tung a om ding mi khat, sa tengteng khate Pathian, Toupa'n sep hen.
04027017	Toupa mi omkhawmte chingtu nei lou belam bang a a-omlouhna ding un, ama uh kai ding, amaute pikhia a, pilut ding in,” achi hi.
04027018	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Huai Kha omnapa Nun tapa Joshua pi inla, atung ah na khut nga in.
04027019	Siampu Eleazar leh omkhawm mipite ma ah dingsak inla, amitmuh un amah nna guan in.
04027020	Israel suante mipi omkhawm tengteng in athu aman theihna ding un atung ah na zahtakhuaina nga in.
04027021	Huchi in amah siampu Eleazar ma ah adingh dia, ama'n Toupa ma ah Urim thu alaksak dia; athu in apawt ding ua, athu in alut ding uh; amah leh Israel suan tengteng, omkhawmte toh,” achi hi.
04027022	Mosi in Toupa thupiak bang in ahih a, Joshua api a, Eleazar leh omkhawmte ma ah adingsak hi.
04027023	Huchi in atung ah akhut anga a, Mosi zang a Toupa'n agen bang in nna aguanta hi.
04028001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04028002	“Israel suante thu pia inla, akiang uah, kei a dia gimlim mei a thillat, ka kiang a thillat pen ahun geih in na lan ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04028003	Akiang uah, hiai mei a thillat Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh ahi. Belamnoupa, kum khat a upa, gensiatbei, niteng in nih, halmang thillat alat gige ding ahi.
04028004	Belamnou khat zingsang in na lan ding ua, nitaklam in khat na lan ding uh.
04028005	Tangbuang thillat ding in tangbuang nelte ephah mun sawm a khen mun khat sathau suk, hin mun li a khen mun khat a hel toh.
04028006	Toupa a dia mei a thillat, gimlim dia Sinai Tang a sehsa halmang thillat lat gige ding ahi.
04028007	Belamnou khat latna a dawn thillat, hin mun li a khen mun khat ahi ding ahi. Toupa a dia uain, dawn thillat mun siangthou ah na sungkhe ding ahi.
04028008	Belamnou khat nitaklam in na lan dia; zingsang lam a tangbuang thillat bang in leh dawn thillat bang in Toupa a dia gimlim ding in mei a thillat na lan ding ahi.
04028009	Sabbath ni in belamnoupa kum khat a upa, gensiatbei nih leh tangbuang thillat a ding in tangbuang nelte ephah mun sawm a khen mun nih sathau a helkhawm leh dawn thillat toh na lat ding ahi.
04028010	Hiai Sabbath niteng a halmang thillat lat gige leh dawn thillat sim louh a halmang thillat lat ding ahi.
04028011	Na kha thak teng un Toupa a dia halmang thil na lat ding uh ahi. Ganhon a pan bawngtal nih, belampa khat leh belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sagih.
04028012	Bawngtal chih ah tangbuang thillat ding in tangbuang nelte sathau a helkhawm ephah mun sawm a khen mun thum; belam khat a tangbuang thillat ah tangbuang nelte, sathau a helkhawm mun sawm a khen mun nih.
04028013	Belamnou chih ah tangbuang thillat ah tangbuang nelte, sathau a helkhawm mun sawm a khen mun khat. Hiai halmang thillat gimlim Toupa a dia mei a thillat ahi.
04028014	Adawn thillat uh bawngtal khat ah uain hin kimkhat ahi dia, belampa khat ah hin mun thum a khen mun khat, belamnou khat ah hin mun li a khen mun khat. Hiai kumtawn a kha teng a halmang thillat ahi.
04028015	Toupa kiang a khelh thoihna dia kelpa khat na lat ding uh ahi; halmang thillat lat gige leh huai dawn thillat sim louh in.
04028016	Akha khatna, ani sawm-le-li ni Toupa Paikan ahi.
04028017	Huai kha ani sawm-le-nga ni ankuanglui ni ahi dia; ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh nek ding ahi.
04028018	Ani khat ni in khawmpi siangthou a-om dia; nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
04028019	Mei a thillat bel Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh ahi. Ganhon a pan bawngtal nih, belampa khat leh belamnoupa kum khat a upa sagih; na ngaihtuah ua gensiatbei ahi ding ahi.
04028020	Tangbuang nelte, sathau helkhawm, atangbuang thillat uh toh, bawngtal khat ah mun sawm a khen mun thum, belampa khat ah mun sawm a khen mun nih.
04028021	Belamnou sagih bel belamnou khat ah mun sawm a khen mun khat ahi ding ahi.
04028022	Nou a dia kilemna bawlna ding khelh thoihna ding in kelpa khat.
04028023	Hiaite zingsang a halmang thillat dawn thillat sim louh a lat gige ding ahi.
04028024	Hichibang in Toupa a dia gimlim, mei a thillat nek ding niteng in, ni sagih sung na lan ding uh ahi; halmang thillat lat gige leh dawn thillat sim louh in.
04028025	Ani sagih ni in khawmpi siangthou na nei ding ua, nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
04028026	Na Nipikal Ankuangluina, na buh thak tung ankuangluina Toupa a dia thil thak tangbuang thillat na lat ni un leng khawmpi siangthou na nei ding ua; nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
04028027	Toupa a dia gimlim halmang thillat bel na lat ding uh ahi; ganhopn a pan bawngtal nih, belampa khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa sagih.
04028028	Atangbuang thillat uh, tangbuang nelte sathau a helkhawm, bawngtal khat ah mun sawm a khen mun thum.
04028029	Belampa khat ah mun sawm a khen mun nih, belamnou sagih, belamnou khat chiat ah mun sawm a khen mun khat.
04028030	Nou a dia kilemna bawlna ding kelpa khat toh.
04028031	Haltum thillat gige leh huai a tangbuang thillat, huaite dawn thillat toh na lat ding uh ahi, na ngaihtuah ua gensiatbei ahi ding ahi.
04029001	“Huan akha sagihna, ani khat ni in khawmpi siangthou na nei ding ua; nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei; nou a ding in pengkul mut ni ahi ding ahi.
04029002	Toupa a dia gimlim ding in halmang thillat na lan ding uh ahi: Ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai khat, belampa khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sagih.
04029003	Atangbuang thillat uh, tangbuang nelte sathau a helkhawm, bawngtal khat ah mun sawm a khen mun thum, belampa khat ah mun sawm a khen mun nih,
04029004	belamnou sagih, khat chiat ah mun sawm a khen mun khat.
04029005	Nou a dia kilemna bawlna ding in khelh thoihna kelpa khat toh.
04029006	Kha thak halmang thillat leh huai tangbuang thillatte, halmang thillat lat gige leh huai a tangbuang thillat, dawn thillat, ahihdan ngeina uh Toupa a dia gimlim ding a mei a thillatte sim louh in.
04029007	“Hiai akha sagihna, ani sawm ni in khawmpi siangthou na nei ding uh. Na hinna uh zangsak in nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
04029008	Toupa a dia gimlim ding in halmang thillat na lan ding uh ahi. Ganhon a pan bawngtal khat, belampa khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa sagih; na ngaihtuah ua gensiatbei ahih ding ahi.
04029009	Atangbuang thillat uh, tangbuang nelte sathau a helkhawm, bawngtal khat ah mun sawm a khen mun thum, belampa khat ah mun sawm a khen mun nih.
04029010	Belamnou sagih, belamnou khat chiat ah mun sawm a khen mun khat.
04029011	Khelh thoihna ding in kelpa khat toh; kilemna dia khelh thoihna, halmang thillat lat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn thillat uh sim louh in.
04029012	“Akha sagihna, ani sawm-le-nga ni in khawmpi siangthou na nei ding ua; bang nna mahmah na sem ding uh ahi kei, Toupa a ding in ni sagih sung ankuang na lui ding uh ahi.
04029013	Toupa a dia gimlim ding in mei a thillat, halmang thillat na lat ding uh ahi. Ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai sawm-le-thum, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa sawm-le-li, huaite gensiatbei chiat ahih ding uh ahi:
04029014	Atangbuang thillat uh sathau toh helkhawm bawngtal sawm-le-thum, bawngtal khat ah mun sawm a khen mun thum, belampa nih, belampa khat ah mun sawm a khen mun nih.
04029015	Belamnou sawm-le-li, belamnou khat ah mun sawm a khen mun khat.
04029016	Khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn thillat sim louh in.
04029017	“Ani nih ni in bawngtaltuai sawm-le-nih, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li na lat ding uh ahi.
04029018	Atangbuang thillat uh leh dawn thillat a dan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding,
04029019	khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat gige, huai atangbuang thillat, dawn thillat sim louh in.
04029020	“Ani thum ni in bawngtal sawm-le-khat, belampa nih, belamnou kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li.
04029021	Atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding.
04029022	Khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige leh huai atangbuang thillat leh huai adawn thillat sim louh in.
04029023	“Ani li ni in bawngtal sawm, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li.
04029024	Atangbuang thillat uh leh dawn thillat, adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding,
04029025	khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn thillat sim louh in.
04029026	“Ani nga ni in bawngtal kua, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li.
04029027	Atangbuang thillat uh leh dawn thillat uh, adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat uh, adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un, bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding.
04029028	Khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn ding thillat sim louh in.
04029029	“Ani guk ni in bawngtal giat, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li.
04029030	Atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un bawngtal a ding;
04029031	khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn thillat sim louh in.
04029032	“Ani sagih ni in bawngtal sagih, belampa nih, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sawm-le-li.
04029033	Atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat, adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un, bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding,
04029034	khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige, huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn thillat sim louh in.
04029035	“Ani giat ni in khawmpi siangthoutak na nei ding ua; nna himhim na sem ding uh ahi kei.
04029036	Toupa a dia gimlim ding in halmang thillat bel na lat ding uh ahi. Bawngtal khat, belampa khat, belamnoupa kum khat a upa gensiatbei sagih.
04029037	“Atangbuang thillat uh leh adawn thillat uh, bawngtal a ding, belampa a ding leh belamnou a ding, adan bangtak in atamdan bang zel un,
04029038	khelh thoihna ding kelpa khat toh; halmang thillat lat gige leh huai atangbuang thillat leh adawn ding thillat sim louh in.
04029039	“Na thuchiamte uh, ut thu a thillatte, na halmang thillatte uh, na tangbuang thillatte uh, na dawn thillatte uh, na kilemna thillatte uh sim louh in hiaite ankuangluina hunbi nei a na neihte uh ni in Toupa kiang ah na lan ding uhi, chi in,” achi hi.
04029040	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng Mosi in Israel suante ahilh hi.
04030001	Huan Mosi in Israel suan intekpente ahoupih a, “ Toupa'n thu apiak pentak hiai ahi.
04030002	Mi'n Toupa kiang a thu achiam a ahihkeileh athuchiam a kihenleh athuchiam abohse ding ahi kei. Akam a pawt bangbang ahih ding ahi.
04030003	“Numei in leng anungak lai a, apa inn a a-om lai a, Toupa kiang a thu achiam a, athuchiam a akihen a;
04030004	athuchiam leh athuchiam a akihenna apa'n azak a, apa'n adaihsan maimahleh athuchiam tengteng apaisuak ding ahi. Athuchiam a akihenna a-om gige ding ahi.
04030005	Himahleh apa'n azak ni a aphal keileh athuchiam a akihenna thuchiamte akoi mahmah apaisuak kei ding. Apa'n aphal louh ziak in Toupa'n amah angaidam ding hi.
04030006	“Thuchiam min thu khual lou a, ahenna a-om lai a pasal aneih a;
04030007	apasal in azak a, azak ni a, adaih dideleh athuchiam a-om gige dia, thuchiam a ahenna leng a-om gige ding.
04030008	Himahleh apasal in azak ni a aphal keileh atung a thuchiam leh khual lou a akihenna amang dia, Toupa'n amah angaidam ding.
04030009	“Himahleh meithai hiam, mak a omnu hiam thuchiam zaw, ahenna tengteng in adelh gige ding.
04030010	“Inn a thu achiam a, kichiam a akihenleh,
04030011	apasal in azak a leng adaih dide a, aphal louh keileh athuchiam a-om gige dia, kichiam a akihenna leng a-om gige ding hi.
04030012	Himahleh apasal in azak ni a bangmah lou a bawl a, ahihmangleh athuchiam hiam, kichiam a akihenna a kam a thupawt peuhmah a-om nawn kei ding. Apasal in ahihmang khinta ahi. Toupa'n amah angaidam ding.
04030013	Thuchiam tengteng leh hinna hihgim dia hen akichiamna tengteng apasal in akipsak thei in ahihmang thei hi.
04030014	Himahleh apasal in azak ni a pan adeihdan leh athuchiam tengteng leh atung ahenna om tengteng kipsak ahi a; azak ni a pan adaihsan ziak in akipsak ahi.
04030015	Himahleh azak khit nung a bangmah lou a bawl a, ahihmanleh athulimlouhna moh apuak ding ahi,” achi hi.
04030016	Hiaite pasal leh azi kal leh apa inn a a-om gige lai a, akikal ua dan ding a Toupa'n Mosi thu apiakte ahi uh.
04031001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04031002	“Midiante tung ah Israel suante phu la in. Huai khit chiang in na chipihte kiang a pi na hita ding,” achi hi.
04031003	Mosi in mipite ahoupih a, “Midiante tung a Toupa phulakna tangtun dia Midiante dou ding in na lak ua mi kigalthuam uhen.
04031004	Israel nam tengteng lak a nam chih a mi sangkhat zel kidouna a na kuan ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04031005	Huchi in Israelte sang tamtak lak a pan, nam chih a pan sangkhat chiat, kidouna a kuan ding in sepaih singkhat-le-sangnih apekhia uhi.
04031006	Huchi in Mosi in chi chih lak a mi sangkhat chiat leh siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas mun siangthou a tui-um belsuante, thupiakna dia pengkulte tawi in kidouna ah akuansak hi.
04031007	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Midiante adou ua; pasal teng athat uhi.
04031008	Amithahte lak ah Midiante kumpipate leng atel uh. Huai Midiante kumpipa ngate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur leh Reba ahi a, Beor tapa Balaam leng namsau in athat uhi.
04031009	Israel suante'n Midiante numei teng leh atate uh sal in api ua; aganta tengteng uh, abelamhon tengteng uh leh avan tengteng uh gallak in ala uhi.
04031010	A-omna khuate leh agiahna tengteng uh ahal vek uhi.
04031011	Gallak tengteng, mihing leh gan tan in apaipih vek uhi.
04031012	Salte, matte leh gallakte, Mosi, siampu Eleazar leh Israel suan omkhawmte kiang, Jeriko zawn Jordan gei Moab Phaizang a agiahphual uh ahon tun uhi.
04031013	Mosi, siampu Eleazar leh omkhawmte intek penpente'n giahphual pua ah ana dawn uhi.
04031014	Sepaih heutu, sangkhatte tung a heutute leh zakhatte tung a heutute, kidouna a pan hong tungte tung ah Mosi aheh hi.
04031015	Mosi in akiang uah, “Numei tengteng na hinghawi vek uh maw?
04031016	Ngai un, Balaam lemtheih a Peor tungtang thu ah Israelte Toupa tung a taleksak mite hiaite ahi uh. Toupa mi omkhawmte lak ah hipi ahong leng hi.
04031017	Huaiziak in naupangte lak a pasal tengteng that unla, pasal kithuahpihsa numei teng leng that un.
04031018	Numei naupang pasal kithuahpih nai louh tengteng nou a ding in hinghawi un.
04031019	Giahphual pua ah ni sagih sung giak unla; kuapeuh mi that leh thah a om misi khoih peuhmah ani thum ni leh ani sagih ni in kisiangsak un; noumau leh na salte uh leng.
04031020	Van himhim leh savun a thilbawl tengteng, kel mul a thilbawl tengteng, sing a thilbawl tengteng thu ah na kisiangsak ding uh,” achi hi.
04031021	Siampu Eleazar in kidouna a hoh kidou mite kiang ah, “Hiai Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak, dan thuseh ahi.
04031022	Bangpeuh dangka-eng, dangkasik, dal, sik, langva leh ngen,
04031023	mei a hal a se thei lou teng mei ah na tholh paisuak ding ua, huchi in ahong siangthou ding uh. Bangpeuh, silsianna tui a hihsiangthou ding ahi. Mei a hal thuak thei lou peuhmah tui a na tholh paisuak ding uh ahi.
04031024	Ani sagih ni in na puan uh na sawp ding ua, na hong siang ding uh. Huai khit in giahphual ah na hong lut ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04031025	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04031026	“Nang, siampu Eleazar leh omkhawmte inkuan lupente'n gallak a, alak uh mihing leh gante sim vek un.
04031027	Gallak mun nih ah khen un; kidouna a kuan kidou mite a ding leh omkhawmte a ding in.
04031028	Kidouna a kuan galdoumi a pan Toupa a dia siah piak ding in mihing zanga zel ah khat, mihing a pan, bawng a pan, sabiltung a pan leh belamhon a pan sepkhia un.
04031029	Huaite a tan kimkhat ua pan la unla, Toupa a dia vei thillat ding in siampu Eleazar pia un.
04031030	Israel suante tan sawmnga a pan khat, mihing a pan, bawng a pan, sabiltung a pan, belamhon a pan leh ganhon a pan sepkhia inla, huaite Toupa biakbuk kemmi Levite pia in,” achi hi.
04031031	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Mosi leh siampu Eleazar in ahih uhi.
04031032	Sepaihte'n amat uh gallak sim louh alak uh belam nuaiguk singsagih-le-sangnga,
04031033	Bawng singsagih-le-sangnga,
04031034	sabiltung singguk-le-sangkhat,
04031035	pasal kithuahpih nai louh numei singthum-le-sangnih ahi uh.
04031036	Akimkhat, kidouna a kuante tantuan, belam nuaithum singthum sangsagih-le-zanga ahi.
04031037	Toupa siah belam zaguk sawmsagih-le-nga ahi.
04031038	Bawng singthum-le-sangguk ahi a; huai a Toupa siah sawmguk-le-khat ahi.
04031039	Sabiltung singthum-le-zanga ahi; huai a Toupa siah sawmguk-le-khat ahi.
04031040	Mihing singkhat-le-sangguk ahi ua; huai a Toupa siah mi sawmthum-le-nih ahi.
04031041	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in siah, Toupa vei thillat Mosi in siampu Eleazar apia hi.
04031042	Mosi in galdou mite a pan ahawm Israel mite tantuan kimkhat galdou a kuante lak ah ahawm hi.
04031043	Omkhawmte' tantuan kimkhat belam nuaithum singthum sangsagih-le-zanga,
04031044	Bawng singthum-le-sangguk,
04031045	Sabiltung singthum-le-zanga,
04031046	Mihing singkhat-le-sangguk ahi.
04031047	Israel tantuan kimkhat a pan Mosi in mihing leh gan sawmnga zel ah khat ala a, Toupa thupiak bang in Toupa biakbuk kemmi Levite apia hi.
04031048	Sepaihte tung a heutu, sangkhatte tung a heutute, zakhatte tung a heutute'n Mosi ava naih uhi.
04031049	Mosi kiang ah, “Na sikhate'n ka khut ua om kidou mite ka sim ua, kuamah kim lou ka om kei uhi.
04031050	Ka hinna ua dia Toupa ma a kilemna bawlna dia Toupa a dia thillat mi'n aneih lam uh, dangka-eng a bawl zephoih van, khengawng a bulhte, khutngawng a bulhte, minsawnna zungbuhte, bilbahte, khite ka hon tawi uh,” achi uhi.
04031051	Mosi leh siampu Eleazar in dangka-eng a bawl van tengteng ana sang uhi.
04031052	Sangte tung a heutute leh zate tung a heutute'n dangka-eng Toupa kiang a vei thillat dia alat tengteng uh shekel singkhat sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnga ahi.
04031053	Galdou mite'n agallak uh amau a chiat ding in ala ngal ua.
04031054	Mosi leh siampu Eleazar in sangkhatte tung a heutu leh zakhatte tung a heutute dangka-eng ala ua, Israel suante theihgigena ding in kihoupihna biakbuk ah Toupa ma ah ahon tawi uhi.
04032001	Reuben leh Gad tate'n ganta ahau mahmah ua; Jazer gam leh Gilead gam amuh un, amun ganta a dia hoihtak hi in athei uhi.
04032002	Huchi in Gad tate leh Reuben tate'n Mosi, siampu Eleazar leh omkhawm mipite ava houpih ua,
04032003	“Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Shebam, Nebo leh Beon,
04032004	Israel omkhawmte ma a Toupa'n azoh gam, gante a ding in ahoih a, na sikhate'n ganhonte ka nei uhi.
04032005	Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan uleh, na sikhate kiang ah ka luah ding un hiai gam hon pia inla, Jordan lui hon pi galkai dah mai ve,” achi uhi.
04032006	Mosi in Gad tate leh Reuben tate kiang ah, “Na unaute uh kidouna ah akuan ding ua, nou bel hiai ah na om maimah ding uh maw?
04032007	Bangziak a Toupa'n apiak gam a lut lou dia Israel suante lungtang lunglelsak na hi ua?
04032008	Kadesh-barnea a pan gam va enkhe dia ka sawl in na pate un hichi mah bang in ahih uhi.
04032009	Eshkol Phaizang atuntouh un gam ava mu ua, Toupa'n gam apiak a alut noplouhna ding un Israel suante lungtang alunglelsak uhi.
04032010	Huai ni in Toupa aheh mahmah a, akichiam a,
04032011	Aigupta gam a pan hong pawt, kum sawmnih chiang tunglam mi himhim in Abraham, Isak leh Jakob, kiang a kichiam a, ka piak gam kuamah in amu kei ding uh; ahon zuih taktak louh ziak un.
04032012	‘Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb leh Nun tapa Joshua kia lou ngal, amau bel Toupa azuih taktak ziak un,’ achi hi.
04032013	Israelte tung ah Toupa aheh mahmah a, Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou hihmi suan tengteng amanthat vek masiah uh gamdai ah kum sawmli avakvaisak hi.
04032014	Ngai un, Israelte tung a Toupa hehna lauhuaitak behlap in nou gilou in na pute uh sik in na dinghta uhi.
04032015	Toupa zui lou a, na om himhim uleh ama'n amaute gamdai ah a-omsak nawn ding hi. Hiai mi tengteng na hihmang mai kei ding uh maw?” achi hi.
04032016	Ava naih ua, akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka gante uh a ding in belam huangte leh ka tate uh a ding in khua ka sat ding uh.
04032017	Kou bel amun ding uh ka tut masiah uh Israel suante ma a pai ding in ka kigalthuam ding uhi. Hiai gam a mite ziak in ka tate uh kulh nei khuate ah ateng ding uh.
04032018	Israel suante michih in amun luah ding aluah chiat ma un ka inn uah ka paikik kei ding uh.
04032019	Ka luah ding uh bel hiai lam gal Jordan suahlam ahih ziak in Jordan gal khat lam leh akhen lam zaw ka luahpih kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
04032020	Mosi in akiang uah, “Huchibang na chih ua, galdou dia Toupa ma a kuan dia na kigalvat ua,
04032021	Toupa ma a gam zoh ahih masiah na lak ua kigalthuam tengteng Toupa ma a Jordan na galkah vek ua, ama a melmate adelhkhiak mateng leh
04032022	Toupa ma a gam lak a om a, huai khit chiang a na kik nawn ding uleh Toupa leh Israelte ma ah na mohpuakna ua pan na siangta ding ua, Toupa ma ah hiai gam na luah ding uhi.
04032023	Himahleh huchibang a na hih kei uleh, ngai un, Toupa tung ah na khial uh ahi dia, na khelhna un hon mukhe ngeingei ding chih thei un.
04032024	Na tate uh a ding in khuate sat unla, na belamte uh a ding in leng huangte bawl unla, na gen bangbang un hih un,” achi hi.
04032025	Gad tate leh Reuben tate'n Mosi kiang ah, “Na sikhate'n ka toupa uh thupiak bang in ka hih ding uh.
04032026	Ka zi, ka tate uh, ka belamhonte uh leh ka ganhon tengteng uh Gilead gam khuate ah ana om ding uh.
04032027	Himahleh na sikha, kidou dia kigalthuam tengteng in ka toupa uh gen bang in Toupa ma ah ka va galkah ding uh,” chi in agen uhi.
04032028	Huchi in Mosi in, atungtang thu uah siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel nam inkuan lupente thu apia hi.
04032029	Mosi in akiang uah, “Gad tate, Reuben tate leh galdou dia kigalthuam tengteng in Toupa ma a Jordan lui ahong galkahpih ua, huai gam na zoh uleh Gilead gam pen aluah ding ua na piak ding uh ahi.
04032030	Himahleh kigalthuam a ahong galkahpih kei uleh Kanaan gam ah na lak uah atel mai ding uh,” achi hi.
04032031	Gad tate leh Reuben tate'n, “Asikha kiang a Toupa'n agen bang in ka hih ding uh.
04032032	Kigalvan a Toupa ma a galkah in Kanaan gam ah ka lut ding ua, ka gam luah ding uh Jordan lui khen lam ah ahi lai ding,” chi in adawng uhi.
04032033	Mosi in Gad tate, Reuben tate leh Joseph tapa Manasseh suan nam kimkhatte Amor kumpipa Sihon gam, Bashan Kumpipa Og gam, huai gamte a khua tengteng toh, akim gam a khuate nangawn toh apia hi.
04032034	Gad tate'n Dibon, Ataroth, Aroer;
04032035	Atroth leh Shophan, Jazer, Jogbehah;
04032036	Beth-nimrah leh Beth-haran alam ua, khopi kulh neite, belam huangte toh.
04032037	Reuben tate'n Heshbon, Elealeh, Kirjathaim,
04032038	Nebo leh Baal-meon, aminte khek khit ahi, huan Sibmah alam ua; akhosatte uh min dang aphuak zel uhi.
04032039	Manasseh tapa Makir tapate Gilead gam ah ahoh ua, ala ua, huai a teng Amorte ahawlkhia uhi.
04032040	Mosi in Gilead gam Manasseh tapa Makir apia a; huai ah ateng hi.
04032041	Manasseh tapa Jair in akhotate ava la a, Havothjair asa hi.
04032042	Nobah in Kenath ava la a, akhotate toh, ama min tam in Nobah asa hi.
04033001	Mosi leh Aaron makaih a Aigupta gam a pan apawlpawl a pawt a, apai zeldan uh hiai bang ahi.
04033002	Toupa thupiak in apaikhia ua, apai zelnate uh Mosi in agelh a; apaikhiak ua apainate uh hiaite ahi.
04033003	Akha khatna, ani sawm-le-nga ni in Rameses a pan apawt ua; Paikan Ankuanglui ni zing in Aigupta mi teng muh in hangsantak in Israel suante apawtkhia uhi.
04033004	Aigupta mite'n ata masapen teng uh Toupa'n athahsakte avui ua, apathiante uh leng Toupa'n athukhen khumta hi.
04033005	Huchi in Israel suante Rameses a pan apawt ua, Sukot ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033006	Sukot a pan apawt ua, gamdai phak tung Etham ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033007	Etham a pan apawt ua, Baal-zephon bul a Pi-hahiroth lam ah akinung khin ua, Migdol chin ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033008	Pi-hahiroth chin a pan apawt ua, tuipi apaltan ua, gamdai ah alut uhi. Etham gamdai ah ni thum lam apai ua, Marah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033009	Marah a pan apawt ua, Elim atung uh. Elim ah tui nak nei sawm-le-nih leh tum sing sawmsagih a-om a; huai ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033010	Elim a pan apawt ua, Tupi San ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033011	Tuipi San a pan apawt ua, Sin gamdai ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033012	Sin gamdai a pan apawt ua, Dophkah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033013	Dophkah a pan apawt ua, Alush ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033014	Alush a pan apawt ua, Rephidim ah giahphual asat ua, huai ah mipite dawn ding tui a-om kei hi.
04033015	Rephidim a pan apawt ua, Sinai gamdai ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033016	Sinai gamdai a pan apawt ua, Kibroth-hattaavah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033017	Kibroth-hattaavah a pan apawt ua, Hazeroth ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033018	Hazeroth a pan apawt ua, Rithmah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033019	Rithmah a pan apawt ua, Rimmon-parez ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033020	Rimmon-parez a pan apawt ua, Libnah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033021	Libnah a pan apawt ua, Rissah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033022	Rissah a pan apawt ua, Kehelathah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033023	Kehelathah a pan apawt ua, Shepher tang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033024	Shepher tang a pan apawt ua, Haradah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033025	Haradah a pan apawt ua, Makheloth ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033026	Makheloth a pan apawt ua, Tahath ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033027	Tahath a pan apawt ua, Terah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033028	Terah a pan apawt ua, Mithkah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033029	Mithkah a pan apawt ua, Hashmonah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033030	Hashmonah a pan apawt ua, Moseroth ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033031	Moseroth a pan in apawt ua, Bene-jaakan ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033032	Bene-jaakan a pan apawt ua, Hor-hagidgad ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033033	Hor-hagidgad a pan apawt ua, Jotbathah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033034	Jotbathah a pan apawt ua, Abronah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033035	Abronah a pan apawt ua, Ezion-geber ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033036	Ezion-geber a pan apawt ua, Zin gamdai ah giahphual asat uh huai tuh Kadesh leng achi uhi.
04033037	Kadesh a pan apawt ua, Edom gam chin a Hor tang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033038	Toupa thupiak in Hor tang ah Siampu Aaron ahohtou a, Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawt uh akum sawmlina, akha ngana, ani khat ni in huai ah asita hi.
04033039	Aaron Hor tang a asih in kum zakhat sawmnih-le-thum ahi.
04033040	Kanaan mi, Kanaan gam simlam a om Arad kumpipa'n Israel suante ahong pai uh ana za hi.
04033041	Hor tang a pan apawt ua, Zalmonah ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033042	Zalmonah a pan apawt ua, Punon ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033043	Punon a pan apawt ua, Oboth ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033044	Oboth a pan apawt ua, Moab gam naih Ije-abarim ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033045	Ije-abarim a pan apawt ua, Dibon-gad ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033046	Dibon-gad a pan apawt ua, Almon-diblathaim ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033047	Almon-diblathaim a pan apawt ua, Nebo chin a Abarim tang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033048	Abarim tang a pan apawt ua, Jeriko zawn, Jordan gei Moab Phaizang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033049	Jordan gei Beth-jeshimoth a pan Abel-shittim pha in Moab Phaizang ah giahphual asat uhi.
04033050	Jeriko zawn Jordan gei Moab Phaizang ah Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04033051	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah Jordan lui na kan ua, Kanaan gam na lut chiang un,
04033052	huai gam a om tengteng na delhkhe vek ding ua, asuang milim tengteng uh na hihse vek ding ua, amilim sunte uh na hihse vek ding ua, amun sangte uh na hihchim vek ding uh ahi.
04033053	Gam na luah ding ua, huai ah na teng ding uh. Na luah ding ua gam ka hon piaksa na hi uh.
04033054	Achi dungzui bang zel in aisan in gam na luah ding ua, a-inbul deuhte gam za deuh na pe ding ua, a-inbul lou deuhte gam neu deuh na pe ding uh. Aisan apukna peuh michih a tuam ahi dia; na pi-le-pute uh chi paidan bang zel in na luah ding uhi.
04033055	Himahleh huai gam a omte na delhkhiak kei uleh na omsakte uh na mit ua ding in sutna zum leh na sa ua ding in ling bang ahi ding ua, na omna gam uah buaina ahon tun ding uhi.
04033056	Huan hichi ahi ding a, atung ua hih ka tup bang na tung uah ka hih ding, chi in,” achi hi.
04034001	Huan Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04034002	“Israel suante thu pia inla, akiang uah, Kanaan gam na tun chiang un, Kanaan gam, agamgi dan dungzui zel a na luah ding gam uh,
04034003	simlam na luah ding chiang uh Zin gamdai a pan Edom gam zulzul ahi dia, simlam gamgi Chi Tuipi tawp a pan suahlam pang ahi ding.
04034004	Na gamgi uh Akrabbim tungkahna simlam pang ah akawi dia, ahong pawtna Kadesh-barnea simlam ah ahi dia, Hazaraddar ah apai dia, Azmon ah apai zel ding.
04034005	Gamgi Azmon a pan Aigupta lui tan in akawi dia, atawpna Tuipi ah ahi ding.
04034006	“Tumlam pang ah Tuipi Lian agamgi ding in na tang ding ua, hiai tumlam a na gamgi uh ahi ding.
04034007	“Hiai mallam a na gamgi uh ahi ding. Tuipi Lian a pan Hor tang huap in na bawl ding uh.
04034008	Hor tang a pan Hamath lutna tan in na bawl dia, gamgi tunna bel Zedad ah ahi ding hi.
04034009	Gamgi Jiphron ah apai zel dia, atunna Hazar-enan ah ahi ding. Hiai mallam a na gamgi uh ahi ding hi.
04034010	“Suahlam a na gamgi uh Hazar-enan a pan Shepham tan in na bawl ding uhi.
04034011	Gamgi Shepham a pan Riblah tan in Ain suahlam pang ah asukpai dia; huchi in gamgi apai suksuk dia, Kinereth tuipi suahlam pang asun ding hi.
04034012	Gamgi Jordan ah apaisuk dia, atunna Chi Tuipi ah ahi dia hiai akimvel a gamgi paidan bang in na gam uh ahi ding, chi in,” achi hi.
04034013	Mosi in Israel suante thu apia a, “Hiai Toupa'n nam kua-le-akimte piak dia thu apiak aisan a na luah ding gam uh ahi.
04034014	Reuben tate nam in a-inkuan uh dungzui zel leh Gad tate nam in a-inkuan uh dungzui zel leh Manasseh nam kimkhat in leng agam luah ding uh atangta ngal ua.
04034015	Nam nih leh nam kimkhatte'n agam luah ding uh nisuahna lam Jeriko zawn Jordan gal suahlam ah atangta uh,” achi hi.
04034016	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04034017	“Luah dia gam hon khennenpihte min hiaite ahi. Siampu Eleazar leh Nun tapa Joshua.
04034018	Gam luah dia khennen ding in nam chih a pan a-intekpen khat chiat na tel ding ahi,” achi hi.
04034019	Huai mite min bel hiaite ahi. Judah nam a mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb.
04034020	Simeon tate nam a mi Ammihud tapa Semuel.
04034021	Benjamin nam a mi Kislon tapa Elidad.
04034022	Dan tate nam lak a intekpen Jogli tapa Bukki.
04034023	Joseph tate lak a mi, Manasseh tate nam intekpen Ephod tapa Hanniel.
04034024	Ephraim tate nam lak a intekpen Sitan tapa Kemuel.
04034025	Zebulun tate nam lak a intekpen Parnak tapa Elizaphan.
04034026	Issakar tate nam lak a intekpen Azan tapa Paltiel.
04034027	Asher tate nam lak a intekpen Selo mi tapa Ahihud.
04034028	Naphtali tate nam lak a intekpen Ammihud tapa Padahel.
04034029	Hiaite Kanaan gam a Israel suante gam luah ding hawm dia Toupa'n thu apiakte ahi uhi.
04035001	Huan Jeriko zawn Jordan gei, Moab Phaizang ah Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04035002	“Israel suante thu pia inla, agam uah Levite tenna ding khuate bawlsak uhen. Agante uh tatna ding in kho dainawl kim Levite na piak ding uh ahi.
04035003	Khuate atenna ding uh ahi dia, akimte bel bawng leh agante leh aganvulh tengteng a ding ahi.
04035004	Levite na piak ding dainawl khokulh a pan tong sangkhat a sau ahih ding ahi.
04035005	Kulh polam a pan na teh dia, suahlam pang ah tong sangnih, mallam pang ah tong sangnih, khopi bel alaitak ah a-om ding ahi. Hiai amau dainawl tuam ahi ding.
04035006	Levite na piak ding khuate lak ah tualthatte taina ding kihumbitna khopi guk ahi dia; huaite lou khua sawmli-le-nih na piak lai ding uh ahi.
04035007	Levite na piak ding khua tengteng khua sawmli-le-giat ahi ding. Dainawl toh na piak ding uh ahi.
04035008	Israel suante luah khua na piakdan ding, mi tamte na pe tam dia, atawmte na pe tawm ding ahi. Michih in aluah uh gam tamdan dungzui a khua Levite na piak ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
04035009	Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
04035010	“Israel suante houpih inla, akiang uah,
04035011	Jordan lui na galkah ua Kanaan gam na lut chiang un kihumbitna khua na sep ding uh ahi, tup mawng hilou a tual thatkhami taina ding in.
04035012	Huai khuate, phulami a pan na kihumbitna khua uh, omkhawmte ma a vai hawmsak dia adin ma a tualthatmi asihlouhna ding ahi.
04035013	Nou a dia kihumbitna ding na sehte uh khopi guk ahi ding.
04035014	Jordan gal ah khopi thum na sep ding ua, Kanaan gam ah khopi thum na sep ding ua, kihumbitna khopite ahi ding uh.
04035015	Israel suante leh namdang leh akiang ua tengte a ding in hiai khopi gukte kihumbitna ahi dia, huai ah kuapeuh mi that kha atailut ding ahi.
04035016	“Himahleh mi kuahiam in sik a mi asat a, asihleh tualthat ahi a, tualthat bel hihlup ngeingei ding ahi.
04035017	Si khop a suang a mi aden a, asihleh tualthat ahi a, tualthat bel hihlup ngeingei ding ahi.
04035018	Ahihkeileh mi khat in mi khat sing zang in sat henla, si taleh tualthat ahi a, tualthat bel hihlup ngeingei ding ahi.
04035019	Sisan phulami'n tualthatmi athat dia, amuh peuh chiang in athat ding ahi.
04035020	“Mi khatpeuh in huatna toh tupkholhna nei in midang khat sawn henla, ahihkeileh tup mawng in banghiam in deng henla, huai mi si taleh;
04035021	ahihkeileh kimelmakna nei in akhuttum in tum henla, huai mi si taleh ahihlumpa hihlup ngeingei ding ahi. Amah tualthat ahi a, sisan phulami in athah ding ahi.
04035022	“Himahleh kimelmakna nei hilou a, kuahiam khat in midang asawn khak ahihkeileh tup mawng hilou a amah aden khak a,
04035023	ahihkeileh amah mu lou a, amah that thei suang atung a akhiak a, amah asihleh amelma leng hilou a, hihnat tum leng hilou ahih ziak in.
04035024	Omkhawmte'n hiai vaihawmna dan bang in ahihlum mi leh sisan phulami vai ahawmsak ding uh ahi:
04035025	Omkhawmte'n tualthatmi sisan phulami a pan ahumbit ding ua, omkhawmte'n ataina, akihumbitna khua ah atengsak ding ua, sathau siangthou nilh a om siampu lianpen asih mateng huai lai khua ah ateng ding hi.
04035026	Himahleh chik lai peuh in tualthatmi ataina, a kihumbitna kho gamgi polam apai a;
04035027	sisan phulami in akihumbitna kho polam a amuh a, sisan phulami in athahleh asisan ah moh apo kei ding.
04035028	Siampu lian asih mateng akihumbitna khua ah ateng gige ding a, himahleh siampu asih in bel tualthatmi atenna gam ah apaikik ding ahi.
04035029	Hiai thilte na suante uh tan a na tenna peuh ua na vaihawmna dan thuseh ding uh ahi.
04035030	“Kuapeuh in mi athahleh tualthatmi pen theihpihte kam a pan thupawt a hihlup ding ahi. Himahleh theihpih khat kia mi hihlupna ding in ahun kei.
04035031	Tualthatmi na tan ding uh ahi kei. Sihna khop a moh ahi a, hihlup ngeingei ding ahi zaw.
04035032	Siampu sih ma in, kihumbitna khua a tailut kuapeuh agam a sawlkik nawn dia tatna sum na lak ding uh ahi kei.
04035033	Huchi in na tenna gam uh na hihthanghuai kei ding ua, sisan in gam ahihthanghuaileh sisan suahna gam hihthanghuai silna ding in asuahmi sisan kia lou lah zattheih ahi ngal kei a.
04035034	Na tenna gam uh, ka omna na hihthanghuai ding uh ahi kei. Kei Toupa lah Israel suante lak ah ka om ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
04036001	Huan Joseph inkuanpihte lak a mi, Manasseh tapa Makir tapa Gilead tate inkuan lupente lak a mite'n ahon naih ua, Mosi leh heutu, Israel suante intekpente ma ah thu agen uhi.
04036002	“ Toupa'n ka toupa Israel suante aisan a, aluah ding uh gam pe ding in thu apia hi. Toupa'n ka toupa, ka unaupa uh Jelophehad gam a tanute pe ding in nang thu ahon pia hi.
04036003	Amau Israel suante lak a mi, namdang kuapeuh tate ava kitenpih uleh, ka pi-le-pute uh gam aluah uh laksak a, akitenpih uh namte gam toh gawm ding ahi dia; huchibang in ka gam tantuan ua kipan lakkhiak ahi ding hi.
04036004	Israel suante Jubili ahong tun chiang in agam uh ava kitenpih uh namte gam toh gawm ding ahi dia; huchi in ka pi-le-pute uh gam a pan amau gam lak hek ahong hi ding hi,” achi uh.
04036005	Mosi in, Toupa thu bang in Israel suante thu apia a, “Joseph tate nam in agen dik uhi.
04036006	Jelophehad tanute tungtang thu a Toupa'n thu apiak pen hiai ahi. ‘Hoih asaksak uh kitenpih uhenla, himahleh apate uh nampih lak a mi ngei akitenpih ding uh ahi.
04036007	Huchi in Israel suante gam pen namdang kiang a suan ahi kei ding. Israel suante'n api-le-pute uh nam gam aneih gige ding uh ahi.
04036008	Israel suante lak a gouluah ding tanu peuhmah Israel suante'n api-le-pute uh gam aluah chiat zel theihna ding un apa nampih lak a mi zi ahih ngeingei ding ahi.
04036009	Huchi in gam bel namdang kiang a suan ahi kei ding hi. Israel suante'n amau gam chiat atang gige ding uh ahi ngal a,’ ” achi hi.
04036010	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Jelophehad tanute'n ahih uhi.
04036011	Jelophehad tanu Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milkah leh Noahte'n apa uh unau tapate akitenpih uhi.
04036012	Joseph tapa Manasseh tapate akitenpih ua, agam uh apa uh nam ah a-om gige hi.
04036013	Hiaite Toupa'n Mosi zang a Jeriko zawn Jordan gal a Moab Phaizang a Israel suante apiak, thupiakte leh vaihawmdante ahi uhi.
05001001	Hiai thute Jordan suahlam gamdai, Paran leh Tophel leh Laban leh Hazeroth leh Dizahab kikal a Suph chin a Arabah a Mosi in Israel mi tengteng kiang a agen ahi.
05001002	Horeb tang a kipan Kadesh-barnea, Seir tang lam lampi tawn a pai in ni sawm-le-khat lam ahi.
05001003	Akum sawmlina, akha sawm-le-khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in, hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n amau hilh dia thu apiak tengteng Israel kiang ah Mosi in agen hi.
05001004	Heshbon a om Amorte kumpipa Sihon leh Edrei leh Astaroth a om Bashan kumpipa Og athah nung in;
05001005	Jordan suahlam Moab gam ah hiai dan Mosi in hiai bang in agenchian panta hi.
05001006	Toupa i Pathian un Horeb tang ah ahon houpih a, “Hiai tang ah na om sawt huntawkta uhi.
05001007	Kisuan unla, paikhia unla, Amorte tanggam ah leh akimvel teng Arabah ah, tanggamte ah, phaizang gam leh Lebanon ah, Luipi Euphrates tan in pai un.
05001008	Ngai un, gam ka hon pe khin a; na pu uh Abraham, Isak, Jakob leh amaute nung a, asuansawnte uh kiang a kichiam a Toupa'n apiak gam va luah un,” achi hi.
05001009	Huai lai in na kiang uah, “Kei kia in ka hon po zou kei.
05001010	Toupa na Pathian un ahon pungsak a, ngai un, tu in na tamdan uh van a aksi zah hial ahong hita hi.
05001011	Toupa , na pi-le-pute Pathian in tu sang in amun sang tamtak in hon pungsak henla, hon chiam bang in hon vualzawl hen.
05001012	Bangchi in kei kia in na buainate uh, na puakgikte uh, na kihoutheih louhnate uh ka po zou dia?
05001013	Na nam lak ua mi, mipil, theisiammi, adan ding thei mi kitelkhia unla, na tung ua heutu ding in ka bawl ding,” ka chi hi.
05001014	Nou, “Na thil gen kou a ding in ahoih mahmah,” chi in na hon dawng uhi.
05001015	Huchi in na nam heutute uh ka la a, na nam lak ua mi, mipil, dan thei mite na tung ua heutu in ka bawl hi: sangkhatte tung a heutute, zakhatte tung a heutute, sawmngate tung a heutute, sawmkhatte tung a heutute, intekpente toh.
05001016	Huai lai in na vaihawmte uh kiang ah, “Na unaute uh kal a thu kingaihkhiaksak unla, unau leh unau kikal ah leh gamdangmi, a-ompih toh akal uah diktattak in vai hawm un.
05001017	Vaihawmna ah deihsak tuam na nei ding uh ahi kei. Mineu leh milian kibang a na ngaihkhiaksak ding uh ahi. Kuamah na lau ding uh ahi kei. Vaihawmna lah Pathian a ahi ngal a. Nou a dia thuhaksa luate ka kiang ah na hon tun zel ding ua, huai ka ngaikhe zel ding,” chi in thu ka pia hi.
05001018	Huai lai in na thilhih ding tengteng uah thu ka hon pia hi.
05001019	Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in Horeb tang a pan i pawt ua, Amorte tanggam lampi a gamdai zapi leh mulkimhuaitak na muh uh i kantan ua, Kadesh-barnea khua i va tung uhi.
