05001020	Na kiang uah, “ Toupa i Pathian in hon piak Amorte tanggam na hong tungta uhi.
05001021	Ngai dih ua, Toupa na Pathian un gam ahon pe khinta hi. Hohtou unla, Toupa na pi-le-pute Pathian in ana gen khitsa bang in va luahtou un. Lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un,” ka hon chi hi.
05001022	Ka kiang ah na hong pai vek ua, “Agam va enkhia a, i hohtouhna ding lampi leh i hohna ding kho tanchinte hong hilh nawn ding in i ma uah mi sawl leng,” na chi uhi.
05001023	Huai thu in hon kipaksak a; huchi in na lak ua mi sawm-le-nih, nam khat a khat zel ka tel hi.
05001024	Huchi in apawtta ua, tang ah akahtou ua, Eshkol Phaizang ava tung ua, ava enkhe vek uhi.
05001025	Huai gam a theite alou ua, ahon puak ua, tanchin hon tun ua, “ Toupa i Pathian hon gam piak hoih petmah ahi,” achi uhi.
05001026	Himahleh na hohtou nuam kei ua, Toupa na Pathian uh thupiak na helsan uhi.
05001027	Na puaninte uah na phun ua, “ Toupa'n ahon huat ziak in hon hihmang dia, Amorte khut a hon pe ding in Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhia ahi.
05001028	Koi lai ah ahia i hohtouh ding? I unaute'n, mihing ei sang in alianzaw ua, san leng asangzaw ua; khuate alian a, van sun in kulh anei uh. Anak tapate leng i mu a, chi in hon lung kesak uh,” na chi uhi.
05001029	Ke'n na kiang uah, “Amaute kihta kei unla, lauh leng lau sam kei un.
05001030	Toupa na Pathian na makaipa un na mitmuh ua Aigupta gam a hon hihsak tengteng bang in ahon doupih ding.
05001031	Gamdai ah leng mi'n ata apuak bang a Toupa na Pathian un hiai mun na tun tan un lamtawn a hon puakdan na mu ding uhi, ka chi hi.
05001032	Himahleh hiai thil ah Toupa na Pathian uh na gingta kei uh.
05001033	Na puanin na zak ding uh hon zonsak ding leh na lampi uh hon kawkmuh dia zan a meikuang a, sun a meipi a na ma uh pipa na muang kei uhi.”
05001034	Toupa'n na thugen uh aza a, aheh a, akichiam hi.
05001035	“Hiai suan giloutak lak a mi khat mahmah in leng na pi-le-pute uh pe dia ka kichiamna gam hoih petmah amu kei ding uh,
05001036	Jephunneh tapa Kaleb kia ngal lou in. Ama'n zaw amu dia, ava sik gam amah leh atate ka pe ding, ama'n alungtang tengteng a Toupa azuih ziak in,” achi hi.
05001037	Noute ziak in ka tung ah Toupa aheh a, “Nang leng huai ah na lut kei ding,
05001038	na nasempa Nun tapa Joshua bel alut ding. Amah hanthawn in, Israelte alutsak ding hi.
05001039	“Na taneute uh, gallak in ala mai ding uh, na chihte uleh, tua asia-apha thei nai lou na tate uh alut ding ua, amau zaw ka pe dia, aluah ding uhi.
05001040	Nou ahihleh kihei unla, Tuipi San lam ah gamdai ah pai un,” achi hi.
05001041	Nou, “ Toupa tung ah i na khialta uh, i hohtou ding ua, Toupa i Pathian in thu hon piak tengteng bang in i va dou ding uh,” chi in na hon dawng ua, huchi in kidouna van in na kivan chiat ua, tang a hohtouh thil neuchik in na ngaihtuah uhi.
05001042	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hohtou kei un. Va dou sam kei un, na lak uah ka om kei hi. Na melmate un hon na that kha ding uh, akiang uah chi in,” ahon chi hi.
05001043	Huai ka hon hilh a, na ngaikhe kei ua, Toupa thupiak na helsan zawta ua, tang ah na hohtou teitei uhi.
05001044	Huai tang ah Amorte'n hon na dou ua, khuai midelh bang in hon delh ua, Seir a pan Hormah tan in hon that uhi.
05001045	Na hong kik nawn ua, Toupa ma ah na kap ua; himahleh Toupa'n na aw uh angaikhe kei a, abil leng ahon doh sam kei hi.
05001046	Huchi in huai a na om sung uh ngaihtuah in Kadesh ah sawtpi na taam uhi.
05002001	Huan i kihei ua, Toupa'n i kiang ua agen bang in Tuipi San lam ah gamdai ah i lutta ua; Seir tang ni tampi i vel uhi.
05002002	Toupa'n ahon houpih a,
05002003	“Hiai tang na vel sawt hunta uh. Mallam zuan in kihei un.
05002004	Mipite, Seir tang a om, Esau suan na unaute uh gam ah na paisuak ding uhi. Amau hon na lau ding ua; huaiziak in pilvang mahmah un.
05002005	Kisualpih kei un. Agam uh koi lai mah leng, khepek a sik khop lel leng nou ka hon pe kei ding. Seir tang zaw ama a tuam ding in Esau ka pe khinta hi.
05002006	Na nek ding un a-an uh sum in na lei ding ua, na dawn ding un atui uh leng sum in na lei ding uhi.
05002007	Toupa na Pathian un na khut nasep peuhmah uah ahon vualzawl zel a, hiai gamdai zapi na totsuakdante uh leng athei hi. Hiai kum sawmli sung teng in Toupa na kiang uah a-om a, bangmah na tasam kei uh, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.
05002008	Huchi in Elath leh Ezion-geber a pan Arabah lam a pai in Seir tang a om Esau suan i unaute gam i tawn paisuak uhi. I kihei ua, Moab gamdai lam ah i pai uhi.
05002009	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Moabte hihbuai kei unla, galsual in leng sual kei un. Agam uh nou a tuam ding in ka hon pe kei ding, Lot suante a tuam ding in Ar ka pe khinta hi,” achi hi.
05002010	Tuma lam in Emimte, huai ah ateng ua, amaute Anakte bang a milian leh tam, mi sangpite ahi uh.
05002011	Huaite leng Anakte mah bang a miliante ahi ua, himahleh Maobte'n Emimte achi uhi.
05002012	Tuma lam in Seir tang ah Horte leng a-om ua; himahleh Esau suante'n aluahsak uhi. Athat ua, amun uah atengta ua; Israelte Toupa'n amau a tuam dia apiak gam mah bang in.
05002013	Huchi in “Thou unla, Zered Phaizang kan dih ua,” achi a; huchi in Zered Phaizang i kanta uhi.
05002014	Kadesh-barnea a pan i pawt a, Zered Phaizang i kan ua, Toupa'n akiang ua akichiam bang a mipi lak a misuan a gal dou thei mi tengteng abei vek kikal uh kum sawmthum-le-giat ahi.
05002015	Mipite lak a pan abei sipsip ma uh amaute hihmang ding in atung uah Toupa khut atu hi.
05002016	Huchi ahi a, huchibang a mipi lak a pan galdou thei tengteng abei ua, ahong sih khit nung un,
05002017	Toupa'n ahon houpih hi.
05002018	“Tuni in Moab gam, Ar na khen paisuak ding uh ahi.
05002019	Ammon suante kiang ava tun chiang un, hihbuai kei unla, kisualpih kei un. Ammonte gam nang a tuam ding in ka hon pe kei ding. Lot suante a tuam ding in ka pe khinta,” achi hi.
05002020	Huai leng Rephaimte gam bang a sim ahi sam; huai ah tuma lam in Rephaimte ateng uhi. Himahleh Ammonte'n zaw Zamzummim achi uhi.
05002021	Anakte bang a milian leh tam leh misang pipi ahi ua; himahleh Toupa'n ahihmang a, amau aluah leuleu ua, amun uah atengta uhi.
05002022	Seir tang a om Esau suante Horte ahihmansak lai a, ahih bang in; huchi in amau aluah ua, amun uah tu dong in ateng lai uhi.
05002023	Gaza tan a khoneu chikchik a om Avvite Kaphtor a pan a hong pawt Kaphtorte'n ahihmang ua, amun uah ateng uhi.
05002024	“Thou unla, paikhia unla, Arnon Phaizang kan un; ngai dih ua, Amor mi Heshbon kumpipa Sihon leh agam ka hon pe khinta hi; luah peuhmah unla, galsual in sual un.
05002025	Tuni in, van nuai a mite tung ah nang hon lauhna uh leh hon kihtakna uh ka omsak pan dia, na tanchin aza ding ua, aling ding ua nang ziak in gimthuak in a-om ding uhi,” achi hi.
05002026	Kedemoth gamdai a pan Heshbon kumpipa Sihon kiang ah lemna thu pua in mi ka sawl hi.
05002027	“Na gam ah hon paisuaksak dih ve. Lamlian zel ah ka pai ding ua, ataklam ah hiam, aveilam ah hiam leng ka pial kei ding uh.
05002028	Ka nek ding un an sum in na hon leisak dia, ka dawn ding un tui leng sum mah in na hon leisak ding hi.
05002029	Jordan ka kan ua Toupa ka Pathian un ahon piak gam ka lut masiah uh, Seir a om Esau suante leh Ar a om Moabte'n ahon paisuaksak bang un hon paisuaksak lel in,” chi in.
05002030	Himahleh Heshbon kumpipa Sihon in agam ah hon paisuaksak nuam kei a; Toupa na Pathian un na khut ua ahon piaktheihna ding in alungtang akhauhsak a, na theihsa uh bang un apaupengsak hi.
05002031	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Ngai in, Sihon leh agam hon pe ding ka hita, agam tang ding in luah peuhmah in,” ahon chi hi.
05002032	Sihon leh ami tengteng Jahaz a hong sual ding in ahong kuan uh.
05002033	Toupa i Pathian in ahon pia a; amah leh atate leh amite tengteng i that uhi.
05002034	Huai lai in akhua tengteng i la ua, huai khuate a mihing tengteng, numei leh ataneu chikchikte uh tan in i hihmang vek ua, hawi mahmah i nei kei uhi.
05002035	I lak khua a gallak a i lak thil leh gante kia ei a tuam ding in i la uhi.
05002036	Arnon Phaizang a om Aroer a pan leh phaizang a kho omte a pan Gilead pha in ei a ding in khua sang lua a-om kei hi, Toupa i Pathian in hon pe vek hi.
05002037	Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in Ammon suante gam koimah, Jabok lui tan in mual tung a khuate kim leh kiang gam hitaleh na naih kei uhi.
05003001	Huai khit in i kihei ua, Bashan lampi ah i paitou uhi. Bashan kumpipa Og leh ami tengteng Edrei ah ei dou ding in ahong kuan uhi.
05003002	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Amah lau ke'n, amah leh ami tengteng leh agam na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Heshbon a om Amorte kumpipa Sihon tung a na hih bang in amah tung ah na hih ding,” achi hi.
05003003	Toupa i Pathian in Bashan kumpipa Og leng, ami tengteng toh i khut ah hon pia hi. Huchi in khat lel leng hawi lou in i that vek uhi.
05003004	Huai lai in akhua tengteng kho sawmguk, Argob gambup a Bashan kumpipa Og gam tengteng i la vek ua, i laksak louh khua khat lel leng a-om kei hi.
05003005	Hiai khua tengteng kulh sang pipi, kongpi leh kalhna nei chiat ahi a, kulh nei lou khua tampi sim louh in leng.
05003006	Heshbon kumpipa Sihon tung a i hih bang in khua a pasal tengteng, numei leh ataneu chikchikte uh tan in i hihmang sipsip uhi.
05003007	Himahleh ganta tengteng leh khua a gallak a i lak thilte ei a tuam ding in i la uhi.
05003008	Huai lai in Jordan gal a om Amorte kumpipa nihte a pan Arnon Phaizang a pan Hermon tang pha in gam i la uhi.
05003009	Sidonte'n Hermon tuh Sirion achi ua, Amorte'n ahihleh Senir achi uhi.
05003010	Phaigam a khua tengteng leh Gilead gam tengteng leh Bashan gam tengteng toh, Bashan gam a Og gam a khuate, Salekah leh Endrei tan in i la uhi.
05003011	Milian sibangte lak a khosuaksun Bashan kumpipa Og kia ahi a, ngai dih, alupna sik ahi a; Ammon suante khua Rabbah ah tutan in a-om ahi kei maw? Huai lupna mihing tong a teh in adunglam tong kua, availam tong li ahi.
05003012	Huai tung in huai gam i luah ua; Arnon Phaizang kiang Aroer a pan Gilead tanggam kimkhat tan in, khua omte toh Reubente leh Gadte ka pia hi.
05003013	Gilead gam om lai teng leh Og gam Bashan tengteng Manasseh nam kimkhatte ka pia hi, Argob gam tengteng leh Bashan gam tengteng Rephaimte gam chih in a-om hi.
05003014	Manasseh tapa Jair in Argob gam tengteng Geshurte leh Maakathte gam tan in ala a, Bashan pen, ama min tam in Havothjair asa a, tuni tan in achi lai uh.
05003015	Gilead kiang ah Makir ka pia hi.
05003016	Reubente leh Gadte bel Gilead a pan Arnon Phaizang, phaizang laitak tan in agam ding un ka pia a; Ammon suante gamgi, Jabok lui tan in.
05003017	Atumlam gamgi Arabah a Jordan lui, Kinereth a pan Arabah Tuipi tan, Pisgah mual pang ken nuai apai ahi. Arabah Tuipi, Chi Tuipi ahi.
05003018	Huai lai in, Toupa na Pathian un, “Hiai gam nou a tuam ding in ahon pia hi. Israelte, na unaute uh ma ah na mihangsan tengteng uh kigalthuam in va hohtou sam uhen.
05003019	Himahleh, na zite uh leh na taneu chikchikte uh leh na gante uh, ganta na hau uh chih ka thei, na khua uah, ka hon piaksa ah ana om ding uhi.
05003020	Nou bang a na unaute uh Toupa'n galmuang a abawl ma leh Toupa na Pathian un Jordan gal a gam apiak aluah sam matan uh; huchi in nou a tuam ding ua ka hon piak ah na hong pai nawn ding uh, chi in thu ka hon pia hi.
05003021	Huai lai mah in Joshua bel, Toupa na Pathian un huai kumpipa nihte tung athilhih tengteng na mit in amu vek a; huchi mah bang in na lutna ding gam tengteng tung ah Toupa'n ahih ding hi.
05003022	Amaute lau ke'n; hon doupihpa Toupa na Pathian uh ahi ngal a,” chi in thu ka pia hi.
05003023	“Huai lai mah in Toupa ka ngen a,
05003024	Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha kiang ah na thupidan leh na khut hattak na langsak ahi peuhmah ngei hi. Van ah hiam, lei ah hiam na thilhih bang leh na thilhih thupitak bang hihthei pathian kua a-om a?
05003025	Hon galkahsak inla, Jordan gal a gam hoihtak, huai tang kilawmtak leh Lebanon hon musak in,” ka chi hi.
05003026	Himahleh noute ziak in ka tung ah Toupa aheh mahmah a, ka thu angaikhe kei a; huchi in Toupa'n , “Hunta hen, hiai thu ah hon houpih nawn ke'n,” achi hi.
05003027	“Pisgah tang vum ah va paitou inla, tumlam, mallam, simlam leh suahlam na mit in en inla, en vialvial in. Jordan kan lou ding na hi.
05003028	Himahleh Joshua thu pia inla, hanthawn inla, hatsak in. Hiai mipite api galkai dia, na va muhtouh ding gam aluah ding uhi,” ahon chi hi.
05003029	Huchi in Beth-peor kiangchin a phaizang ah i omta uhi.
05004001	Huaiziak in Israelte aw, Toupa na pi-le-pute uh Pathian in hon piak gam, dam a na luahtheihna ding ua na zuih ding uh ka hon hilh dante leh vaihawmte ngaikhia un.
05004002	Toupa na Pathian uh thupiak ka hon piak na zuihtheihna ding un, ka hon thupiak na behlap ding uh ahi kei a, na kiamsak ding uh leng ahi sam kei.
05004003	Baal-peor a Toupa thilhih na mit un na mu ua; Baal-peor bemi tengteng Toupa na Pathian un na lak ua pan ahihmangta hi.
05004004	Toupa na Pathian uh lenkip peuhmahte bel tutan in dam in a-om lai chiat uhi.
05004005	Ngai un, na va luah ding gam ua leng na zuih zel ding un Toupa ka Pathian in thu ahon piak bang geih in dante leh vaihawmte ka hon hilh hi.
05004006	Hiai dan leh dan thuseh tengteng za a, “Hiai nam thupi, apil leh atheisiam mite ahi taktak uh,” chi ding namte kiang a hiai in na pilna uh leh na theihsiamna uh lak ding ahih ziak in pilvangtak in hiaite zui un.
05004007	I sap peuhmah chiang ua Toupa i Pathian in ahon naih bang a amau naih zel pathian nei nam thupi kua a-om ua?
05004008	Hichitak a dik, dan leh vaihawmna, tua na ma ua ka khun tengteng bang dan nei nam thupi dang kua a-om a?
05004009	Bang teng hi heh, pilvang unla, ngenteltak in kikem phot un. Huchi lou in zaw na mit un athil muhte na mangngilh ding ua, na damsung un na lungtang ua pan amang kha ding hi. Na tate uh leh na tute uh sinsak un.
05004010	Horeb tang a Toupa na Pathian uh ma a na din ua, Toupa'n ka kiang a, “Mite hon sapkhawmsak in, leitung a a-om sung teng ua hon kihtakdan akisintheihna ding uh leh atate uh sinsak ding in ka thute ka hon zasak ding, ahon chih ni na mangngilh kha ding uhi,” achi hi.
05004011	Huchi in na hong naih ua, huai tangbul ah na hong dingh uhi. Huai lai in meikuang in van sun zen in huai tang akang a, meipi vom leh mial in akhuh lai hi.
05004012	Toupa'n meikuang a pan ahon houpih a; athugen na za ua, himahleh lim bangmah na mu kei ua, aw ging lel na za uhi.
05004013	Athukhun zui dia nou thu ahon piak, thupiak sawm na kiang uah agenkhia a, suangpek nih ah agelh hi.
05004014	Huai lai in luah dia na va galkahna gam ua na zuih ding un dante leh vaihawmte sinsak ding in Toupa'n thu ahon pia hi.
05004015	Huaiziak in pilvang mahmah un. Horeb tang a meikuang a pan Toupa'n nou hon houpih ni in lim bangmah na mu kei uhi.
05004016	Nou leh nou kihihsia in, milim gelh kibawl in, lim kibatpih, apa lim hiam, anu lim hiam,
05004017	leitung a om gamsa kibatpih, huihkhua a leng kha nei vasa kibatpih,
05004018	lei a vak thilte kibatpih, lei nuai a tui a om ngasa mawngmawng kibatpih na kibawl kha ding uhi.
05004019	Van lam na nga un, ni, kha, aksite, van a om tengteng leng na mu un, Toupa na Pathian un van nuai a mi tengteng ahon sehsakte un hon hip in, hiaite bia in a-nna uh na sepsak kha ding uh.
05004020	Toupa'n amite, agou hi ding in sik haltuina a pan, Aigupta gam a pan nou ahon pikhe zawta ahi; tu a na hih mah bang un.
05004021	Hiai kia leng hilou in, noute ziak in ka tung ah Toupa aheh a, Jordan lui ka galkah louh a, na luah ding ua gam hoihtak Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak a ka lutlouhna ding in leng akichiam hi.
05004022	Kei zaw hiai gam a si ding ka hi a, Jordan lui gal kah lou ding ka hi. Nou bel na galkah ding ua, hiai gam hoihtak na luah ding uhi.
05004023	Pilvang mahmah un, Toupa na Pathian uh thukhun, na kiang ua akhun na mangngilh ding ua, Toupa na Pathian un akibatpih himhim bawl aphal louh milimte na kibawltawm kha mahmah ding uh.
05004024	Toupa na Pathian uh katmang hat mei, mullit hat Pathian ahi.
05004025	Tu leh tate na neih ua, huai gam a sawt kuam na ten nung ua, na kineksiat louh ua, banghiam akibatpih peuh a milim bawltawm lelte na bawlkhiak ua, hihheh dia Toupa na Pathian uh mitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih maizen uleh;
05004026	Jordan kan a na va luah ding uh gam a pan na mangthang pah ding uh, chih na tungtang thu ua hon theihpih ding in tu in lei leh van ka chial ahi. Sawt na teng kei ding ua, na mangthang vek mai ding uh.
05004027	Toupa'n mite lak ah hon dalhsak dia, Toupa'n hon paimangsakna namte lak ah tawmchik kia na teng ding uh.
05004028	Huai ah, sing leh suang a abawl uh pathiante, mu thei lou peuh, za thei lou peuh, ne thei lou peuh, dik thei lou peuh na be ding uh.
05004029	Himahleh huai lai mah a Toupa na Pathian uh na zon ua, na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua na zon uleh na mu ding uh.
05004030	Haksa a na om ua, na tung ua hiai thil tengteng ahong tun chiang in, Toupa na Pathian uh lam na hong nga khongkhong ding ua, athu na zuita ding uhi.
05004031	Toupa na Pathian uh lah zahngaihna a dim Pathian ahi ngal a; ahon donsak lou kei dia, ahon hihmang kei ding. Na pi-le-pute uh kiang a kichiam a athukhun amangngilh het kei ding hi.
05004032	Na om ma uh, nidanglaite sui le uchin leitung a Pathian in mihing asiam nungsiah van nuai ah, hichibang a thil thupi a-om ngei in, zak ahi ngei hia?
05004033	Na zak bang un, mei a pan Pathian aw mi'n aza ngei mawngmawng in, ahing uhia?
05004034	Namdang lak a pan khemna, chiamtehna, thillamdang, kidouna, khut hattak, ban zak, thil mulkimhuai a Toupa na Pathian un na mitmuh ua Aigupta gam a ahih tengteng bang a nam pikhe ngam Pathian a-om ngei hia?
05004035	Toupa amah tuh Pathian ahi, chih na theihtheihna ding ua na kiang ua hihlat ahi a; amah lou ngal adang a-om kei.
05004036	Ahon sinsak theihna ding in van a pan a-aw hon zasak a, leitung ah ameikuang thupi ahon musak a, meikuang a pan athu na za uhi.
05004037	Na pi-le-pute uh a-it ziak in anung ua asuante uh ahon tel a, amitmuh in athilhihtheihna thupitak in Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhia hi.
05004038	Namdang nou sang a thupi leh thilhihtheizaw ahon delhkhiaksak a, agam uh hon luahsak a, tua na hih mah bang un hon lutsak hi.
05004039	Huaiziak in tu in na lungtang un vom unla, tunglam van ah leh nuailam lei ah Toupa zaw Pathian ahi, chih thei un. Adang himhim kuamah a-om kei hi.
05004040	Tangtawn a dia Toupa na Pathian un nou ahon piak gam ah noumau leh na suante uh a dia hoih ding leh na ten sawttheihna ding un, adante leh athupiakte, tua ka hon piakte na zuih ding uh ahi.
05004041	Huchi in Mosi in Jordan gal, nisuahna lam pang ah khopi thum asep hi.
05004042	Tualthatmi, a-invengte, tuma lam a leng mudah khol lou, mi that kha humbitna ding in, hiai khua khatpeuh peuh a, atailutleh humbit in a-om ding.
05004043	Huai khuate hiaite ahi uh: Reubente gam a Bezer khopi; Gadte gam Gilead a Ramoth khopi leh Manassehte gam Bashan a Golan ahi uhi.
05004044	Mosi in Israel suante apiak, dan hiai ahi.
05004045	Hiaite Mosi piak theihsaknate, dan thusehte leh dante ahi. Huai bel Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawtkhiak lai uleh,
05004046	Sihon gam, Jordan lui suahlam a Beth-peor kiang phaizang a, a-om lai ua apiak ahi. Sihon bel Amorte kumpipa, Heshbon a vaihawmpa, Mosi leh Israelte'n Aigupta a pan ahong paikhiak lai ua azohpa uh ahi.
05004047	Amau Sihon gam leh Bashan kumpipa Og gam aluah uhi. Amau nihte Jordan lui suahlam a Amor kumpipa nihte ahi uhi.
05004048	Hiai gam ahihleh Arnon Phaizang gei a Aroer a pan Sion tang, Hermon leng achih uh, pha a kizalh ahi. Sion tang in min dang anei a, Hermon ahi.
05004049	Huai gam in Jordan lui suahlam a Arabah luipiau tengteng, Pisgah tang a tui nakte nuai a Arabah tuipi tan ahuap hi.
05005001	Huan Mosi in Israel tengteng asamkhawm a, akiang uah: Israel mite aw, na sin ua na zuih ding uh dante, vaihawmte tuni a na bil ua na zak ua ka gen ngaikhia un.
05005002	Toupa Pathian in Horeb ah eite toh kikal ah thu akhung hi.
05005003	Toupa'n hiai thu i pi-le-pute kiang ah ana khung kei a, eite, tutan a hingdam a om lai tengteng kiang ah ahi, akhun zawk.
05005004	Toupa'n tang ah mei a pan kimaituah in hon houpih a,
05005005	huai lai in Toupa thu nou hon kawkmuh ding in Toupa toh na kikal uah ka dingh a; meikuang ziak in lah na lau ngal ua, tang ah na hohtou kei uhi.
05005006	Kei Toupa Pathian, Aigupta gam a saltanna inn a pan hon pikhepa ka hi.
05005007	Ka ma ah keimah lou ngal pathian dangte na nei ding ahi kei.
05005008	Milim bawltawm, tunglam van a om hiam, nuailam lei a om hiam, lei nuailam a tui a om hiam, akoi batpih mahmah na kibawl ding ahi kei.
05005009	Huaite ma ah na kun ding uh ahi kei a, a-nna uh leng na sem ding uh ahi kei. Kei Toupa na Pathian uh Pathian mullit hat, pate khelhna ziak a tate gawt zel, hon mudahte suan thumna leh suan lina tan a gawt zel leh;
05005010	ahon itte, ka thupiakte zuimi sang tampite tung a hehpihna langsak zel ka hi.
05005011	Toupa na Pathian min na lou mawkmawk ding ahi kei. Toupa'n amin lou mawkmawkte lah moh lou in akhah ngal kei ding hi.
05005012	Toupa na Pathian in thu hon piak bang in Sabbath ni tang siangthou in.
05005013	Ni guk sung nna na sem dia, nna tengteng na sem ding ahi.
05005014	Ani sagih ni, Toupa na Pathian a ding in Sabbath ni ahi. Huai ni in nang, na tapa, na tanu, na sikhapa, na sikhanu, na bawngtal, na sabiltung, na gante uh lak a akoi mahmah in leng, na inn a gamdang mite'n leng nna himhim asem ding uh ahi kei. Nangmah bang in na sikhapate, na sikhanute leng akhawl ding uh ahi.
05005015	Nang leng Aigupta gam ah sikha na hi khin a, Toupa na Pathian in huai a pan khut hat leh ban zak a, hon pikhiak na hi, chih theigige in. Huaiziak in ahi, Toupa na Pathian in Sabbath ni tang dia thu ahon piak.
05005016	Toupa na Pathian in thu ahon piak bang in na nu leh na pa zahtak in. Huchi in Toupa'n gam ahon piak ah lamzang in, na damsawt ding hi.
05005017	Tual na that ding ahi kei.
05005018	Ang na kawm ding ahi kei.
05005019	Na gu ding ahi kei.
05005020	Na invengte tung ah theihpih taklou in na pang ding ahi kei.
05005021	“Na invengte zi na eng ding ahi kei, na invengte inn hiam, alou hiam, asikhapa hiam, asikhanu hiam, abawngtal hiam, asabiltung hiam, na invengte thil bangmah na eng ding ahi kei,” achi hi.
05005022	Hiai thute tang a mei, meipi leh mial sah bikbek a pan Toupa'n aw ngaihtak in na vek ua kikhawmte kiang ah agen a, abehlap nawn tuan kei hi. Huaite suangpek nih a gelh in, kei kiang ah hon pia hi.
05005023	Tang akat lai a, mial a pan aw na zak un, hichi ahong hi a, na nam ua intekpen teng leh na upate un hon naih uhen.
05005024	Nou ngai in, “ Toupa i Pathian in i kiang uah athupidan leh aletdan alangsak a, mei a pan a-aw i za uh. Pathian in mihing ahoupih a leng na sih tuanlouhdan uh tuni in na theita uhi.
05005025	Huaiziak in bangziak a si ding i hi ua? Hiai meikuang thupitak in hon kangmang mai ding. Toupa i Pathian aw i zak nawnleh zaw i si mai ding uhi.
05005026	Meikuang a pan Pathian hing aw i zak bang a za sam a lah hing ngal mihing tengteng lak ah kua a-om a?
05005027	Nang va naih inla, Toupa i Pathian in agen ding tengteng va ngaikhe dih ve. Toupa i Pathian in na kiang a, agen tengteng kou kiang ah na gen dia; huchi in ka na ngaikhe ding ua, ka zui ding uh,” na chi uhi.
05005028	N'on houpih lai ua na thugen uh Toupa'n ana za a; huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mipite'n na kiang a thu agen uh ka na za a; athugen tengteng uh agen hoih uhi.
05005029	Huchibang lungsim pu gige le uh aw, laudan ahong siam ding ua, ka thupiak azui gige ding ua, amau leh atate uh tangtawn in alamzang ding uhi.
05005030	Pai inla, apuanin ua kik nawn ding in amaute hilh in.
05005031	Himahleh aluah ding ua ka piak ding gam a azuih ding ua na sinsak ding thupiak, dan thuseh leh dante tengteng ka hon piaktheihna ding in nang zaw hiai ah om tadih in,” achi hi.
05005032	Huaiziak in Toupa na Pathian un thu ahon piak bang a hih ding in pilvang un. Taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam na pial ding uh ahi kei.
05005033	Na va luah ding uh gam a na hin ua, na lamzanna ding uh leh na ten sawttheihna ding un, Toupa na Pathian un thu hon piak lampi na zuih tawnsuak ding uh ahi.
05006001	Luah dia na va galkahna gam ua na zuih ding ua, Toupa na Pathian un noute hon sinsak dia thu ahon piak, thupiak, dan thuseh leh dan hiaite ahi uh.
05006002	Huai bel nou leh na tapate uh leh na tupate un Toupa na Pathian uh laudan na siam ua, na damsung teng ua adan leh athupiak ka hon piak tengteng na zuihna ding uh leh na hong ten sawttheihna ding uh ahi.
05006003	Huaiziak in Israel mite aw, lamzang a Toupa , na pi-le-pute uh Pathian in hon kamchiam bang a nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam a nakpitak a na hong puntheihna ding un, ngaikhia unla, zui ding in pilvang un.
05006004	Israel mite aw, ngaikhia un, Toupa na Pathian uh kia Toupa ahi.
05006005	Toupa na Pathian uh na lungtang tengteng un, na lungsim tengteng un, na hatna tengteng un na it ding uh ahi.
05006006	Hiai thu, tuni a ka hon piak na lungtang uah ataam gige ding a;
05006007	na tate uh phatuamngaitak in na sinsak ding ua, na inn ua na tut lai un, lampi a na pai lai un, na lup lai un leh na thoh chiang bang un na gen ding uh ahi.
05006008	Chiamtehna ding in na ban uah na vial ding ua, na mit kikal uah talgakna ding in a-om ding ahi.
05006009	Na inn kongkhak biang leh na kongkhak uah na gelh ding uhi.
05006010	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un na pu uh Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a kichiam a ahon piak gam, na bawlkhiak uh hi het lou,
05006011	kho thupi leh kilawm taktakte, na hihdim uh hi het lou, thil hoih chiteng a dim innte, na leh uh hi het lou tuikhuk lehsate, na suan uh hi het lou grephuan leh olive singte omna a hon pilut a, na nek ua na tai chiang un, pilvang mahmah un.
05006012	Huchi lou in zaw Aigupta gam a saltanna inn a pan hon pikhia Toupa na mangngilh kha mahmah ding uhi.
05006013	Toupa na Pathian uh laudan na siam ding ua, ama nna na sem ding ua, amin lou in na kichiam ding uh ahi.
05006014	pathian dangte na zui ding uh ahi kei, na kim ua mite pathiante na be ding uh ahi kei.
05006015	Na lak ua Toupa na Pathian uh zaw Pathian mullit hat ahi; Toupa na Pathian uh na tung uah aheh dia, lei a pan hon hihmang kha ding hi.
05006016	Massah a na ze-et bang un Toupa na Pathian uh na ze-et ding uh ahi kei.
05006017	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak, athupiakte, athu theihsakte leh adante pilvangtak in na zui ding uh.
05006018	Toupa mitmuh a dik leh hoih na hih ding uh ahi. Huchi in nou a ding in ahoih dia, Toupa'n na pi-le-pute uh kiang a, achiam gam hoih a lut in, na luah thei ding uhi.
05006019	Toupa'n agensa bang in, na ma ua kipan na melma tengteng uh ahawlkhe ding hi.
05006020	Na tate un, “ Toupa i Pathian un thu hon piak, athu theihsaknate, dante, dan thusehte, bangchidan ahia?” chi a tunung lam chiang a ahon dot chiang un,
05006021	nou na tate uh kiang ah, “Aigupta gam ah Pharaoh sikha i na hi ua, Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan khut hattak in hon pikhia hi.
05006022	Toupa'n i mitmuh un Aigupta gam tung ah, Pharaoh tung ah, a-inkuanpih tengteng tung ah, chiamtehna leh thillamdang, thupi leh huaise mahmahte amusak hi.
05006023	Eite bel hon pe dia i pi-le-pute kiang a piak ding chi a akichiam gam hon piaktheihna ding in huai gam a pan hon pikhia hi.
05006024	Huchi in hiai dan tengteng zui ding leh i hoih tawntungna dia Toupa i Pathian laudan siam ding in Toupa'n thu hon pia a, tuni a mihing a hon hawitheihna ding in.
05006025	Athu hon piak bang a Toupa ma a thupiak tengteng zui dia i pilvanleh ei a ding in damna ahi ding,” na chi ding uhi.
05007001	Na va luah ding uh gamsung a Toupa na Pathian un ahon pilut a, na ma ua nam tampi, Hitte, Girgaste, Amorte, Kanaante, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste, nou sang a thupizaw leh hatzaw nam sagihte, adelhkhiak a;
05007002	Toupa na Pathian un amaute nou ahon piak a, na thahgam chiang un amaute na hihgam sipsip ding ua; amaute toh thukhun na bawl ding uh ahi kei.
05007003	Zi leh ta in na nei ding uh ahi kei. Na tanute uh atapate uh na pe ding uh ahi kei. Atanute uh na tapate uh a ding na la ding uh ahi kei.
05007004	Na tapate uh, kei hon zuilaite pathian dangte biakna ah apikawi mai ding uhi. Huchi in Toupa na tung uah aheh dia, hon hihmang pah ding hi.
05007005	Atung uah hichibang in na hih zaw ding uh ahi. Amaitam uh na hihchim ding ua, asuangphuhte uh na kitamzansak ding ua, a Asherahte uh na phuk ding ua, amilim bawltawmte uh na hal vek ding uhi.
05007006	Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in lah nam siangthou na hi ngal ua. Leitung maikaih a nam tengteng tung a amah a tuam ding a Toupa na Pathian un hon tel na hi uhi.
05007007	Namdang sang a na tam zawk ziak ua Toupa'n na tung uah a-itna tusak a, hon tel ahi kei a, namdang tengteng a nam tawmpen na hi zomah uhi.
05007008	Toupa'n noute ahon it ziak in leh na pi-le-pute uh kiang a, ana kichiamna tangtun a-ut ziak in ahi zaw, Toupa'n Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh khut a pan leh saltanna inn a pan khut hat mahmah a hon tatkhiak.
05007009	Huaiziak in Toupa na Pathian uh Pathian ahi chih thei un. Pathian muanhuai, amah it a athu zuimi tung a suan sangkhat tan a athukhun leh hehpihna zui gige,
05007010	amah hote hihmang dia amaitang mahmah ua thuk zel ahi. Amah hote ahal sawt kei dia, amaitang mahmah uah athuk ding hi.
05007011	Huaiziak in athupiakte, adante, dan thusehte, zui dia tuni a thu ka hon piak na zuih ding uh ahi.
05007012	Huan hichi ahi ding a, avaihawmte na ngaihkhiak ua, na zuih ua, na hih ziak un Toupa na Pathian un na pi-le-pute uh kiang a, ana kichiamna thukhun leh hehpihna na tung uah azui ding hi.
05007013	Noute ahon it dia, ahon vualzawl dia, hon hihpung ding hi. Piak ding a na pi-le-pute uh kiang a, ana kichiamna gam ah na gil ua gah leh na leigah uh leng avualzawl lai ding. Na buhte uh, na uainte uh, na thaute uh; na bawngnou uh leh na belamnoute uh leng avualzawl ding hi.
05007014	Nam tengteng tung ah vualzawl na hi ding ua; na lak uah numei hiam pasal hiam, na gante uh lak ah leng ching himhim a-om kei ding hi.
05007015	Toupa'n hipi tengteng hon hihthengsak vek dia, na theihsa uh Aigupta gam hipite na tung uah atungsak kei dia, nou hon hote tengteng tung ah atungsak zaw ding hi.
05007016	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak ding nam tengteng na hihmang vek ding uhi. Na hehpih ding uh ahi kei a, apathiante uh nna na sem ding uh ahi kei; huaite nou a dia thang ahih ding ziak in.
05007017	Na lungsim ua, “Hiai namte lah ei sang in atamzaw ngal ua, bangchi in i hawlkhe thei dia?” chi na hih uleh,
05007018	Amau kihta kei un. Toupa na Pathian un Pharaoh leh Aigupta mi tengteng tung a athilhihte theigige un.
05007019	Ze-etna thupitak na mit mahmah ua na muhte uh, chiamtehnate, thillamdangte, khut hattakte leh ban zakte a Toupa na Pathian un nou hon pikhiak; huchibang in Toupa Pathian in na mi lauhte uh tung ah ahih ding hi.
05007020	Noumau a pan kibute leh akhosuaksunte amanthat vek tan un Toupa na Pathian un alak uah tunpite asawl ding hi.
05007021	Amau na lau ding uh ahi kei. Pathian thupitak leh lauhuaitak Toupa na Pathian uh na lak uah a-om hi.
05007022	Toupa na Pathian un huai namte awlawl in ahon delhkhiaksak ding. Amau na hihmang pah ding uh ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw nou a ding in gamsate ahong tam lo kha ding uhi.
05007023	Ama'n masiah uh Toupa na Pathian un ahon pe dia, buai petmah in ahihbuai ding hi.
05007024	Akumpipate uh na khut uah ahon pe dia, amin uh van nuai a pan na thaimang sipsip ding uh ahi. Na hihman sipsip tan un kuamah in hon dalzou kei ding hi.
05007025	Apathian lim bawltawmte uh na hal ding uh ahi. Huaite dangkasik hiam, dangka-eng hiam na enlah ding uh ahi kei. Nou a dia na lak ding uh ahi kei. Huchi lou in zaw na awk kha ding uh; Toupa na Pathian uh a dia thilkihhuai ahi ngal ua.
05007026	Na insung ua thilkihhuai lalut in huai thil bang in hamsiat thuak ding in na kibawl ding uh ahi kei. Kih petmah a kih in na mudah mahmah ding uh ahi, hamsiat thuakna thil lah ahi ngal ua.
05008001	Chidam ludam a na om ua, na hong tam semsem ua, nou hon pe dia na pi-le-pute uh kiang a Toupa'n akichiamna gam na va luahtheihna ding un ka hon thupiak tengteng zui ding in pilvang un.
05008002	Athupiakte na zui ding uhia, zui lou ding, na lungsim uh theihna dia enchian ding leh hon hihgim dia gamdai a kum sawmli sung nou ahon pina lampi tengteng theigige un.
05008003	Tanghou kia in mihing ahing kei. Toupa kam a thu chih pawt in ahing zaw, chih nou ahon theihsak theihna ding in hon hihgim a, na kial uh aphal a, na theih ngei louh uh, na pi-le-pute un leng atheih ngei louh uh manna in ahon vak hi.
05008004	Hiai kum sawmli sung in na puansilhte uh na silhtul kei ua, na khete uh leng abawk kei hi.
05008005	Mi'n ata asawi bang in Toupa na Pathian un nou hon sawi ahi, chih na lungsim un thei un.
05008006	Alampi zui dia amah laudan siam ding in Toupa na Pathian uh thupiakte na zui ding uh ahi.
05008007	Toupa na Pathian un phaizangte leh mualte a pan hong pawtkhia luitui, tuikhuk leh tui thukpi omna gam;
05008008	buh, barli buh, grep, theipi leh theibuhfaite omna gam; thau nei olive leh khuaizu omna gam;
05008009	kitatlak lou a tanghou na nekna ding gam uh, bangmah na taksaplouhna ding uh, asuangte bang sik, atangte dal laihkhiak theihna gam hoih mahmah ah nou hon pilut ding ahi ngal a.
05008010	Na neih ua, na tai mahmah chiang un, gam hoih mahmah ahon piak ziak in Toupa na Pathian uh na phat ding uh ahi.
05008011	Athupiakte, adan thusehte leh adante, tuni a ka hon piak zui lou in Toupa na Pathian uh na mangngilh kha mahmah ding uh, pilvang un.
05008012	Huchi lou in zaw na nek ua, na tai ua, inn hoih taktak na lam ua, na luah chiang un;
05008013	na ganhon uh, na belamhon uh ahong tam a, na dangka uh, na dangka-eng uh ahong tam a, na thil neih tengteng uh ahong tam hun chiang in na lungtang uh akisathei kha dia,
05008014	Aigupta gam a saltanna inn a pan noute hon pikhepa Toupa na Pathian uh na mangngilh mai kha ding uh.
05008015	Ama'n gamdai zatak leh lauhuaitak, gul gukhahte leh aikamte omna, tui omlouhna, gamkeu ah hon pi paisuak a;
05008016	suangpi a pan meisah suang tui ahon pawtkhesak a, na pi-le-pute uh theih ngei louh, manna in nou ahon vak a, tunung chiang khualna a na hoihtheihna ding un nou hon hihgim a, ahon chet theihna ding in.
05008017	“Hiai i sum-le-paite eimah hatna leh i khut hatna in asepkhiak ahi,” na lungtang un na chi kha ding uh, pilvang un.
05008018	Tua na kip bang ua na pi-le-pute uh kiang a kichiam a thu akhun ahihkipna ding in Toupa na Pathian uh theigige un, sum-le-pai muhkhiak theihna hon pepa lah amah ahi ngal a.
05008019	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian uh na mangngilh ua, pathian dangte na zuih ua, a-nna uh na sep ua, na biak uleh, na mangthang ngeingei ding uh, chih tuni in ka hon theisak ahi.
05008020	Na ma ua namdangte ahihmanthat bang in noute leng na mangthang ding uh, Toupa na Pathian aw ngaikhe ut lou na hih ding ziak un.
05009001	Israel mite aw, ngaikhia un, nou sang a thupizaw leh thilhihtheizaw namte, khopi van sun a kulh daikaih leh thupi luah ding in tuni in Jordan galkah a, na kuan ding uh ahi.
05009002	“Milian leh sang, Anakte, Anak suante ma ah kua adingh zou dia?” achih uh na theih uh leh zaksa uh ahi.
05009003	Huaiziak in Toupa na Pathian uh katmang hat mei bang a na ma ua pai ahi, chih tuni in thei un. Ama'n amaute ahihmangthang dia, ahon hihniamsak ding. Huchi in Toupa'n na kiang ua agensa bang in, amau na delhkhe ding ua, na hihmangthang pah ding uhi.
05009004	Toupa na Pathian un ahon delhkhiaksak khit chiang in, “I diktat ziak a hiai luah dia Toupa'n hon pilut ahi, na lungsim un chi kei hial un.” Hiai namte agitlouh ziak un ahi zaw, Toupa'n hon delhkhiaksak ding.
05009005	Na diktat ziak uh hiam, na lungsim uh dik ziak hiam in, agam uh na luah kei ding ua, hiai namte gitlouhna ziak leh Toupa'n na pu uh Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a, akichiamna hihkip ding in Toupa na Pathian un amau hon delhkhiaksak ahi zaw hi.
05009006	Huaiziak in hiai gam hoih mahmah na diktat ziak ua luah ding in Toupa'n hon pia ahi kei chih thei un. Nam genhakpi lah na hi ngal ua.
05009007	Gamdai a Toupa na hehsak nak dante uh theigige unla, mangngilh kei un. Aigupta gam a pan na pawt ni ua kipan hiai mun na hong tun tan un Toupa tung a helhat na hi uhi.
05009008	Horeb ah leng Toupa na hehsak ua, nou hon hihmangthang ding khop hial in Toupa aheh hi.
05009009	Suangpek, na kiang ua Toupa'n thu akhunna suangpek la dia tang a ka va hohtouh lai in, tang ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka va om a; tanghou ka ne kei a, tui leng ka dawn sam kei hi.
05009010	Toupa'n suangpek nih, Pathian khutzung a gelh ahon pia a; huai ah na kikhopkhawm ni ua tang tung a mei a pan Toupa'n na kiang ua thu agen tengteng atuang hi.
05009011	Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli khit in hichi ahong hi a, suangpek nih, thukhun suangpek ahon pia hi.
05009012	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, hiai a pan paisuk meng in, Aigupta gam a pan na pikhiak na mite akihihse khinta uh. Zuih dia ka hon thupiak lampi a pan apialmangta ua, milim suntawm akibawl uh,” achi hi.
05009013	Huaite ban ah, “ Toupa'n , hiai mite ka etet aleh, ngai in, nam genhak ahi uh.
05009014	Amau hihmangthang ding leh van nuai a pan amin uh thaimang ding in ka hih dandan in ka hih mai ding. Amau sang a nam thilhihtheizaw leh thupizaw in nang ka hon bawl ding,” chi in leng hon houpih lai hi.
05009015	Huchi in tang a pan ka kihei a, ka paisuk a, tang akangta, thukhun suangpek nihte ka khut langnih in ka tawi hi.
05009016	Huchi in ka en a, ngai un, Toupa na Pathian uh tung ah na khialta uhi. Bawngnou lim suntawm na kibawl ua; Toupa'n thu ahon piak lampi na pialsanta uhi.
05009017	Suangpek nihte ka dom a, ka khut langnih a pan ka pai a, na mitmuh un ka hihkhamta hi.
05009018	Tuma a ka hih bang in Toupa ma ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka bokkhup hi. Amah hihheh dia Toupa mitmuh a na thilhihkhelhsa uh, nou khelhna tengteng ziak in tanghou ka ne kei a, tui leng ka dawn sam kei hi.
05009019	Nou hon hihmangthang dia Toupa hehna, athangpaihna leh alungkimlouhna mahmah lah ka lau ngal a. Himahleh huai lai in leng Toupa'n ka thu hon ngaihkhiaksak hi.
05009020	Toupa bel Aaron hihmangthang nuam hial khop in aheh a; himahleh Aaron mah leng ka thumsak pah ngal hi.
05009021	Na khelhna uh ziak a na bawl uh bawngnou lim ka la a, ka hal a, ka satzan a, leivui bang in ka gawinel dimdem a; tang a pan a lui hong luang ah anel ka pai hi.
05009022	Taberah, Massah leh Kibroth-hattaavah ah leng Toupa na hihheh uhi.
05009023	Toupa'n , k'on gam piak va luah un, chi a, Kadesh-barnea a pan ahon sawl lai in, Toupa na Pathian uh thupiak na helsan ua, amah na gingta kei ua, a-aw lah na ngaikhe sam kei uh.
05009024	K'on theih tung a pan Toupa tung a helhatmi na hi gige uh.
05009025	Huchi in Toupa'n , ka hihmangthang ding, ahon chih ziak in Toupa ma ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung ka bokkhup hi.
05009026	Toupa kiang ah ka thum a, “Toupa Pathian aw, na thupina a tat, khut hattak a Aigupta gam a pan na tatkhiak, na mite leh na goutante hihmangthang ke'n.
05009027	Na sikha Abraham, Isak leh Jakob theigige inla, hiai mite phengphitdan, gitlouhdan leh akhelhdante uh en ke'n.
05009028	Huchi lou in zaw na hon pikhiakna gam a mite'n Toupa'n agam chiam a apilut theih louh ziak leh amuhdah ziak in gamdai a thah ding in apikhia, achi kha ding uh.
05009029	Na thilhihtheihna thupitak leh na ban zak a na pikhiak, na mite leh na goutante lah ahi ngal ua,” ka chi hi.
05010001	Huai lai in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Suangpek nih tuma lam ate bang sek nawn inla, tang ah ka kiang ah hong pai inla, singkuang bawl in.
05010002	Tuma lam a suangpek na hihkhapte a thu tuangte suangpekte ah ka gelh dia, singkuang ah na koih ding ahi,” achi hi.
05010003	Huchi in singgi sing in singkuang ka bawl a, tuma lam a bang suangpek nih ka sek a, suangpek nihte tawi in tang ah ka hohtou hi.
05010004	Suangpekte ah ama a gelh bang, na kikhopkhawm ni ua tang a mei a pan Toupa'n na kiang ua agen thupiak sawm agelh a, Toupa'n ahon pia hi.
05010005	Tang a pan ka kiheisuk nawn a, ka singkuang bawl ah suangpek ka koih hi. Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in huai ah a-om nilouh hi.
05010006	Israel suante Bene-jaakan tuileh a pan Moserah ah apai ua; huai ah Aaron asi a, huai ah avui uhi. Atapa Eleazar in amun ah siampu nna asem hi.
05010007	Huai a pan Gudgodah ah apai ua; Gudgodah a pan tuiluite gam Jotbathah ah apai uhi.
05010008	Huai lai in tutan a Toupa thukhun singkuang zawng a, ama a Toupa nna sem a, amin a vualzawlsakmi hi ding in Levi chi aseptuam hi.
05010009	Huaiziak in Levi in a-unaute lak ah tantuan, goutan anei kei hi. Toupa na Pathian un akiang a agen bang in Toupa agoutan ahi.
05010010	Amalam mah bang in tang ah, ni sawmli ka om a; huai lai in leng Toupa'n ka thu angaikhia a, Toupa'n nou hon hihmangthang kei hi.
05010011	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, mipite ma kai in; amaute piak dia api-le-pute uh kiang a kichiam a ka chiam gam aluah ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
05010012	Khai le, Israel mite aw, nou a pan Toupa na Pathian un ahon phut bangdang ahia, na hoihna ding ua Toupa na Pathian uh laudan siam a, alampi tengteng tawn a, amah it a, na lungtang tengteng uleh na lungsim tengteng ua Toupa na Pathian uh nna sem a,
05010013	Toupa thupiakte, adante zuih dia tua thu ka hon piak zuih hilou maw?
05010014	Ngai un, van leh van sangpente leh lei leh asung a om tengteng Toupa na Pathian uh a vek ahi.
05010015	Himahleh na pi-le-pute it bel amah kipah lam ahi a, namdang tengteng tung ah noute, amau nung a asuante uh tua na hih mah bang un hon na telta hi.
05010016	Huaiziak in na lungtang vun uh sum unla, genhak nawn kei un.
05010017	Toupa na Pathian uh lah pathiante' Pathian, toupate' Toupa, Pathian thupitak, hattak, lauhuaitak, kuamah deihsak tuam nei lou a, golhna leng la ngei lou ahi ngal a.
05010018	Pa neiloute leh meithaite hoihtak in vai ahawmsak hi.
05010019	Huaiziak in gamdang mite it sam un; nou leng Aigupta gam ah gamdangmi na hi ngeita uhi.
05010020	Toupa na Pathian uh laudan na siam ding ua, amah nna na sem ding ua; amah na len tinten ding ua, amin lou in na kichiam ding uh ahi.
05010021	Amah na phat dingpa uh ahi, hiai na mit ua na muh khitsa uh thil thupitak leh mulkimhuaitakte hon hihsakpa na Pathian uh ahi.
05010022	Na pi-le-pute uh Aigupta gam ah mi sawmsagih apaisuk ua; tu in bel tamlam in van a aksi zah in Toupa na Pathian un ahon tamsakta hi.
05011001	Huaiziak in Toupa na Pathian uh na it un adan thusehte, adante, avaihawmte leh athupiakte na zui gige ding uh ahi.
05011002	Tu in thei un, Toupa na Pathian sawina, athupidan, aban hatdan, aban zakdan,
05011003	achiamtehnate, athilhih, Aigupta gamsung a Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh tung leh agamsung pumpi a ahihte;
05011004	Aigupta sepaihte leh asakol leh akangtalai tung a athilhihte; nou ahon delhzui ua, Tuipi San a atumsakdan, tutan a Toupa'n ahihmanthatdante;
05011005	hiai mun na tun masiah ua gamdai a na tung ua athilhihtheihdante;
05011006	Reuben tapa Eliab tapa Dathan leh Abiram tung a ahihdan; lei in akam akat a, Israel mite tengteng lak a amaute leh a-inkuanpihte uh leh apuaninte uh leh aganhon tengteng uh avalh vekdante thei lou na suante uh kiang a thu gen ka hi kei hi.
05011007	Na mit ngei ua Toupa'n thil thupitak, ahih tengteng mute kiang a thugen ka hi zaw hi.
05011008	Huaiziak in na hong hat ua, luah dia na va zot gam uh na luahtheihna ding un, tuni a ka hon piak thupiak tengteng na zuih ding uh ahi.
05011009	Nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam, na pi-le-pute leh asuante kiang a piak dia Toupa'n akichiamna gam a na ten sawttheihna ding un.
05011010	Huai na va luah ding uh gam, na hong pawtna uh Aigupta gam, anteh-louhing huan a haichi na tuh ua, na khe ua tui na buah uh bang uh ahi kei hi.
05011011	Na va luah ding uh gam zaw, mualte leh phaizangte leh van vuahtui mu gam ahi zaw hi.
05011012	Toupa na Pathian uh zonkhiak gam ahi a; Toupa na Pathian uh mit kum thak a pan kum tawp pha atuk gigena gam ahi.
05011013	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian uh it ding leh na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua a-nna sem dia tu a ka hon piak thupiak tengteng phatuamngaitak a na zuih uleh,
05011014	na gam vuahtui uh ahun geihgeih in, vuahtui ke masa leh vuahtui ke nanung ka hon pe dia, huchi in na buh uh, na uain uh, na thau uh na seklut thei ding uhi.
05011015	Na gante uh a ding in leng na loute uah loupa ka hon sawl dia, nou leng na ne ding ua, na tai ding uhi.
05011016	Pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw na lungtang uh khem in a-om dia, na pial ding ua, pathian dangte nna sem in, na be kha ding uh.
05011017	Na huchih uleh Toupa na tung uah athangpai dia, van akhak dia, vuah azu kei dia, lei in agah apiangsak kei ding. Huchi in Toupa'n ahon piak, gam hoih a pan na mangthang pah ding uhi.
05011018	Huaiziak in hiai ka thute na lungtang uleh na lungsim uah khum unla, chiamtehna ding in na ban uah na vial ding ua, na mit kikal uah talgakna ding in leng a-om ding ahi.
05011019	Huaite na tate uh na sinsak ding ua, na inn ua na tut lai un, lampi a na pai lai un, na lup lai un, na thoh chiang un na gen ding uhi.
05011020	Na inn kongkhak biangte uah, na kongkhakte uah na gelh ding uh ahi.
05011021	Huchi in na pi-le-pute uh piak dia akichiamna gam ah na damsung nite uh leh na tate uh damsung nite leitung a vante nite bang in asausak ding hi.
05011022	Toupa na Pathian uh it ding leh alampi tengteng zui ding leh amah len tinten ding a phatuamngaitak a hiai thupiak nou ka hon piak tengteng na zuih peuhmah uleh;
05011023	Toupa'n hiai nam tengteng ahon delhkhiaksak dia, nou sang a thupizaw leh thilhihtheizaw namte gam na luah ding uhi.
05011024	Na khepek ua na sikna peuh uh nou a ahi dia, gamdai a pan leh Lebanon tang a pan lui, Euphrates Luipi a pan tumlam tuipi pha in na gam uh ahi ding hi.
05011025	Kuamah in hon pha kei dia; Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua agensa bang in na va sik ding uh gam tengteng ah noute kihtakna leh lauhna a-omsak ding.
05011026	Ngai un, tuni in na ma uah vualzawlna leh hamsia ka koih hi:
05011027	Toupa na Pathian uh thupiakte, tua ka hon piakte na zuih uleh, vualzawlna ahi ding hi.
05011028	Toupa na Pathian uh thupiakte na zuih kei uleh, na theih ngei louh uh pathian dangte be ding a tua ka hon thupiakte na pialsan uleh bel, hamsiat na hi ding uh.
05011029	Huan hichi ahi ding a, na va luah ding uh gam a Toupa na Pathian un hon pilut chiang in, Gerizim tang ah vualzawlna, Ebal tang ah hamsiatna na koih ding uhi.
05011030	Nitumna khen, Arabah a om, Kanaante gam, Gilgal zawn Moreh tosaw sik, Jordan gal ate ahi kei uh maw?
05011031	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak gam va luah ding in Jordan na kan ding ua, na luah ding ua, huai ah na teng ding uhi.
05011032	Tua na ma ua ka koih, dan leh vaihawm tengteng zui ding in na pilvang ding uh ahi.
05012001	Toupa na pi-le-pute uh Pathian in hon piak gam na luah ua, leitung a na ten sung ua pilvangtak a na zuih ding uh dante leh vaihawmte hiaite ahi uh.
05012002	Na va luah ding uh gam namte'n tang sangte leh mualte tung leh sing hing nuai a pathiante nna asepna mun tengteng uh na hihsiat vek ding uh ahi.
05012003	Amaitamte uh na hihchim ding ua, a Asherahte uh mei in na hal ding uh ahi. Abawltawm uh pathian limte na phuksak ding ua, huai a minte na hihse ding uhi.
05012004	Toupa na Pathian uh tung ah bel huchibang in na hih ding uh ahi kei.
05012005	Toupa na Pathian un na nam tengteng lak ua amin omna dia amun seh ding na zong zaw ding ua, huai ah na hoh ding uh ahi.
05012006	Huai ah na halmang thillatte uh, na sawm-a-khatte uh, na vei thillat uh leh na thuchiamte uh, piak dia na chiamsate uh, na ut thu ua thillatte leh na ganhon uh leh na belamhon lak ua piang masapente na hon tawi ding uh ahi.
05012007	Huai ah Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah na ne ding ua, na khut koihna peuh ua Toupa na Pathian un ahon vualzawlna ah kipaktak in na om ding uh.
05012008	Michih in amau hoihsak bang chiat a tuni a na hih bang ua na hih ding uh ahi kei.
05012009	Toupa na Pathian un nou hon piak gam leh khawlna lah na tung nai tadih ngal kei ua.
05012010	Jordan lui na galkah ua, Toupa na Pathian un ahon luahsak ding gam a na ten ua, bittak a na tentheihna ding ua na kim ua melma tengteng a pan hon khawlsak chiang in hichi ahi ding.
05012011	Toupa na Pathian un amin a-omsakna dia asehna mun ah ka chih tengteng na hon tawi ding uh ahi: Na halmang thillatte uh, na kithoihnate uh, na sawm ua khatte uh, na vei thillat uh leh Toupa kiang a na chiamsa uh na neihte ua ahoihpen teng na hon tawi ding uh ahi.
05012012	Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah kipaktak in na om ding ua, noumau leh na tapate uh, na tanute uh toh, na sikhapate uh, na sikhanute uh toh, na inn ua om, Levite toh, amau lah na lak uah tantuan leh gam anei ngal kei uhi.
05012013	Mun na muh peuh ua na halmang thillatte uh lan mawkmawk lou ding in pilvang un.
05012014	Na namte uh lak a Toupa'n aseh ding mun ah na halmang thillatte uh na lan zaw ding ua, huai ah thu ka hon piak tengteng na hih ding uh ahi.
05012015	Himahleh Toupa na Pathian un vualzawlna hon muhsak bang zel in na hinna un alunggulhpen uh na inn chiat uah na gou ding ua, asa na ne thei ding uh. Asiangloute leh asiangte'n leng sangai leh sakhi ane thei ding uhi.
05012016	Asisan ahihleh na ne ding uh ahi kei. Tui bang in lei ah na sungbo ding uh ahi.
05012017	Na inn uah, na buh uh leh na uain thak ua sawm-a-khat na khuate uah na ne ding uh ahi kei. Ahihkeileh na ganhonte uh leh belamhonte uh leh na kelhonte uh lak a piang masapente ahihkeileh na ut thu ua na thillat uh ahihkeileh na vei thilte na khuate uah na ne ding uh ahi kei.
05012018	Toupa na Pathian un amun seh ding ah, Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah na ne zaw ding uh ahi: Noute leh na tapate uh leh na tanute uh, na sikhapate uh, na sikhanute uh, na inn ua om Levite toh. Toupa na Pathian ma uah na khut ngakna peuhmah ah kipaktak in na om ding uhi.
05012019	Na gam ua na ten sung teng un Levite limsak lou a om lou ding in pilvang un.
05012020	Toupa na Pathian un ahon chiam bang a na gam uh ahih zat a, na hinna un sa nek a-ut ziak a, sa ka ne ding, na chih hun chiang un, na hinna un alunggulh lam peuh sa na ne thei ding uhi.
05012021	Toupa na Pathian un amin omna dia aseh ding mun agamlat luatleh, thu ka hon piak bang in Toupa'n hon piak na ganhon uleh na belamhon lak ua na gou ding ua, na hinna un alunggulh lam pang na inn uah na ne ding uh ahi.
05012022	Sangaisa leh sakhisa nek ahih bang in na ne ding ua, asiangloute leh asiangte'n leng akibang in na ne ding uhi.
05012023	Sisan ahihleh ne lou ding in pilvang un; sisan lah hinna ahi ngal a; hinna toh sa na ne ding uh ahi kei.
05012024	Na ne mahmah ding uh ahi kei; tui bang in lei ah na sungbo mai ding uh ahi.
05012025	Na ne ding uh ahi kei. Huchi in Toupa mitmuh a thil dik na hih un noumau leh na nung ua na tate uh a ding in ahoih ding hi.
05012026	Himahleh na thil siangthoute uh leh lat dia na thuchiamsate kia uh tawi unla, Toupa'n amun seh ding ah paipih un.
05012027	Toupa na Pathian uh maitam ah na halmang thillat uh, asa leh asisan na lan ding ua; na kithoihna sisante uh Toupa na Pathian uh maitam ah na sungkhe ding ua, asa na ne ding uh ahi.
05012028	Hiai ka hon thupiak tengteng limsak unla, ngaikhia un, huchi in Toupa na Pathian uh mitmuh a thil hoih leh thil dik na hih un noute a ding leh na nung ua na tate uh a ding in tangtawn in ahong hoih ding hi.
05012029	Toupa na Pathian un na zoh ding uh namte ahon hihmanthatsak a, agam uh na luah ua, na ten hun chiang un;
05012030	hihmanthat a a-omna ua na awk khaklouhna ding un, pilvang un. Hiai namte'n bangchi in ahia apathiante uh nna asep uh? Achih bang un en leng i chi sam ding uh, chi in apathiante uh tungtang kan kei un.
05012031	Huchibang in Toupa na Pathian tung ah na hih ding uh ahi kei. Apathiante tung uah Toupa theih a thilkihhuai chiteng, ahuat mahmahte ahih zel ua; atapate uh, atanute ngei uh leng apathiante uh a ding in ahal zel uhi.
05012032	Hih ding a ka hon thupiak peuhmah na hih ding uh ahi. Na behlap ding uh ahi kei a, na tawmsak ding uh leng ahi kei.
05013001	Na lak ua zawlnei hiam, mangneimi hiam ahong om a, chiamtehna hiam, thillamdang hiam hon etsak a,
05013002	chiamtehna hiam, thillamdang hiam hon etsak, ahong tangtun a, na theih ngei louh uh, “pathian dangte zui ni e, a-nna uh sem ni,” na kiang ua achihleh;
05013003	huai zawlnei hiam, mangneimi hiam thute na ngaikhe ding uh ahi kei. Toupa na Pathian uh na lungtang tengteng uh leh na hinna tengteng un na it uhia, itlou chih theihtelna ding ua Toupa na Pathian un ahon ze-et ahi.
05013004	Toupa na Pathian uh na zui ding ua, amah laudan na siam ding ua, athupiakte na zui ding ua, athugente na zui ding ua, amah nna na sem ding ua, amah na len tinten ding uh ahi.
05013005	Huai zawlnei hiam, mangneimi hiam hihlup ding ahi. Aigupta gam a pan hon pikhia a, saltanna inn a pan hon tanpa Toupa na Pathian un zuih ding thu ahon piak lampi a pan hon pialsak dia, Toupa na Pathian uh tung a helna thu agen ziak in, huchibang in na lak ua thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uhi.
05013006	Na unaupa, na nu tapa hiam, na tapa hiam, na tanu hiam, na zi pom lai hiam, na lawm nangmah hinna bang hial nangawn in leng, ahon zol a, kisa ni, “pathian dangte nna sem ni,” ahon chihleh; nang hiam, na pipute hiam in leng na theih louh uh pathiante;
05013007	na kimvel ua, na kiangchin ua omte hiam, na kigamlatpih deuh uhiam, kawlmong a pan kawlmong khat lam pha a mite pathiante;
05013008	pha na sakpih ding uh ahi kei, amah na ngaikhe ding uh ahi sam kei. Na hehpih ding uh ahi kei a, na hawi ding uh leng ahi sam kei, na iim ding uh leng ahi sam kei hi.
05013009	Na hihlup ngeingei ding uh ahi zaw. That ding in khut na kha masa ding a, huai khit chiang in mipi tengteng in akhut uh akha ding uh.
05013010	Suang a na denlup ding uh ahi, Aigupta gam a saltanna inn a pan hon pikhepa Toupa na Pathian ua kipan hon pialsakna ding azon ziak in.
05013011	Huchi in Israel mi tengteng in aza ding ua, alau ding ua, na lak ua huchibang tatsiatna himhim achingta kei ding uhi.
05013012	Toupa na Pathian un na tenna ding ua ahon piak na khua khat a na lak ua kipan Belial tate khenkhat hong pawt a,
05013013	huai khopi a mite na theih ngei louh uh, “pathian dangte be ding in apimang uh,” chih thu kigen na zak uleh kan unla;
05013014	dingkhia unla, phatuamngaitak in dongkhia un. Ngai un, thudik ana hih a, huchibang thilkihhuai na lak ua hih ahi, chih theihtel ahihleh,
05013015	namsau a huai khua a tengte na hihlup ngeingei ding uh ahi. Asung a om tengteng, ganhonte toh namsau in na hihmangthang vek ding uh ahi.
05013016	Gallak thil teng kholak ah na lakhawm ding ua, khua leh gallak thil teng Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah halmang thillat in na hal ding ua, leivui lel ahi tawntung ding a, lam thak ahi nawn kei ding hi.
05013017	Gallak thil bangmah na khoih ding uh ahi kei. Toupa'n aheh mahmahna akiheisan dia, zahngaihna ahon musak ding a, hon hehpih ding hi.
05013018	Toupa na Pathian uh mitmuh a thil hoih hih dia tua ka hon piak thupiak tengteng na zuih peuhmah uleh nou ahon pungsak ding hi; na pi-le-pute uh kiang a ana kichiam khit bang in.
05014001	Toupa na Pathian uh tapate na hi ua; misi ziak in na ki-atkeh ding uh ahi kei. Na mitmul uh leng na metmai ding uh ahi sam kei hi.
05014002	Toupa na Pathian a ding in nam siangthou na hi uh. Leitung a nam tengteng tung ah amah a tuam mawng hi dia Toupa'n hon tel na hi uhi.
05014003	Thilkihhuai himhim na ne ding uh ahi kei.
05014004	Hiai sate ahi, na nek theih ding uh: Bawngtal, belam, kel,
05014005	sakhi, sangai, sakhital, sathak, gamkel, gamlawi leh gam belam.
05014006	Sa chiteng, achin ka, achin ka paisuak, eknel hai chi peuhmah na ne thei ding uh.
05014007	Himahleh eknel hai lel leh achin uh leng ka ngalte, na nek ding uh ahi kei. Sangawngsau, zupi leh zusapi in eknel ahai na ua, achin uh akat louh ziak in nou a ding in siang lou ahi uh.
05014008	Vok ahihleh achin aka na a, eknel ahai louh ziak in nou a ding in siang lou ahi; asa na ne ding uh ahi kei a, asiluang leng na khoih ding uh ahi kei.
05014009	Tui a tengte lak ah hiaite na ne thei ding uh: phe leh lip nei peuhmah na ne thei ding uhi.
05014010	Phe leh lip nei lou peuhmahte na ne thei kei ding uh, nou a ding in siang lou ahi uh.
05014011	Vasa siang tengteng na ne thei ding uh.
05014012	Hiaite zaw na ne ding uh ahi kei: Muvanlai, mungawnggiau, mu-akla;
05014013	musane, mumeika, mu chi himhim;
05014014	va-ak chi himhim;
05014015	simbu, zan mu, mu chi himhim, tuipi mu;
05014016	simbu neu, simbu lian, simbutanglip;
05014017	gamdai simbu, musane, vangawngsau;
05014018	Tuiva kengsang, tuivapi chi himhim, huihtun leh bak.
05014019	Kha nei khe a pai chi himhim nou a ding in siang lou ahi uh, nek ding ahi kei.
05014020	Vasa siang tengteng na ne thei ding uh.
05014021	Amah sih a si bangmah na nek ding uh ahi kei. Na ompih uh gamdang mite nek ding in na pe thei ding uh. Namdang mite kiang ah leng na zuak thei ding uh. Nou zaw Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in nam siangthou na hi uhi. Kelnou api nawitui in na huan ding uh ahi kei.
05014022	Kum chih in na lou ua an tung tengteng sawm-a-khat na piak ngeingei ding uh ahi.
05014023	Toupa na Pathian uh laudan siamna dan na hon theihgige theihna ding un sawm-a-khat, na buh uh, na uain uh, na thau uh leh na ganhon uh leh na belamhon lak ua piang masapente Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah, amin omna dia aseh ding ah na ne ding uhi.
05014024	Toupa na Pathian un hon vualzawl chiang in, Toupa na Pathian un amin omna dia aseh ding mun agamlat luat ziak a nou a dia alampi asau luat a, na tawi theih kei uleh,
05014025	sum na suah ding ua, sum na tawi ding ua, Toupa na Pathian un amun sehna ah na hoh ding uh ahi.
05014026	Na lungsim ua na deihpen uh, bawngtal hiam, belam hiam, uain hiam, zu khauh hiam, na lungsim ua na lunggulh peuhmah uh a ding in sum na zang ding ua; huai ah Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah na ne ding ua, kipaktak in na om ding uh; noute leh na inkote uh toh.
05014027	Na tenna ua teng Levite limsak lou in om het kei un. Na lak uah amau tantuan leh goutan anei kei uhi.
05014028	Kum thum achin kum in huai kum a na thil tung tengteng ua sawm-a-khat na lakhawm vek ding ua, na omna uah na koih ding uh ahi.
05014029	Na omna ua om Levite leng, na lak ua tantuan, goutan leng neiloute leh gamdang mite leh pa neiloute leh meithaite'n ane ding ua, ahong khosa thei sam ding uhi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian un na khut koihna teng uh avualzawl ding hi.
05015001	Kum sagih achin kum in ngaihdamna na bawl ding uh ahi.
05015002	Ngaihdamdan ding hichibang ahi: Leiba neimi peuhmah in a-invengte ana leitawisak angaihdam ding ahi. A-invengte leng, a-u anau leng asik teitei ding ahi kei; Toupa khahkhiak chih ahih ziak in.
05015003	Namdangmi ahihleh na sik teitei thei ding uh. Himahleh nou a bangpeuh na unaute un ana zat uh na ngaihdam ding uh ahi.
05015004	Mizawng himhim na om ding uh ahi kei; Toupa na Pathian un luah dia nou ahon piak gam ah Toupa'n lah hon vualzawl ngei ding ahi ngal a.
05015005	Hiai thupiak tuni a ka thupiak tengteng zui dia Toupa na Pathian uh phatuamngaitak a na zuih peuhmah uleh;
05015006	Toupa na Pathian un ahon chiam bang in hon vualzawl ding a, nam tampi na leitawisak ding uh. Nam tampi tung ah vai na hawm ding ua, nou tung ah bel amau vai ahawm kei ding uhi.
05015007	Toupa'n ahon gam piak na tenna ua na unaute uh lak a mizawng a-om uleh na unau gentheite lak ah na lungsim khauhsak kei unla, sumchil sam kei un.
05015008	Atung uah na thilphal ngeingei ding ua, ataksap awng hukna khop na leitawisak ding uh ahi.
05015009	“Ngaihdam kum, akum sagihna ahong tung dekta, chi in na unau zawngte mudah a bangmah pe nuam lou in na lungtang uah dikloutak a ngaihtuahna om lou ding in pilvang un,” Huchi lou in zaw, amau na tungtang thu uah Toupa asam ding ua, nou a ding in khelhna ahi kha ding.
05015010	Na piak ngeingei ding uh ahi. Na piak chiang un leng na lungtang uh anuam moh ding ahi kei. Huchibang thil ziak in ahi, Toupa na Pathian un na thilhih tengteng uah leh na khut ngakna peuh uh ahon vualzawl ding hi.
05015011	Huai gam ah lah mizawngte om louh lai om lou ding ahi ngal a. Huaiziak in na gam ua na unaute uh tung ah, tasamte tung ah, na mizawngte uh tung ah, na thilphal ngeingei ding uh ahi, chih ka hon thupiak ahi.
05015012	Na unau uh, Hebru pa hiam, Hebru nu hiam, na kiang ua azuak ua, kum guk nangmah nna asepleh akum sagih kum in na khah ding uh ahi.
05015013	Na khah chiang un khutvuak in na pawtsak ding uh ahi kei.
05015014	Na belamhon ua kipan, na phual ua kipan, na uain sukna khuk ua kipan itloutak in na pe ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un ahon vualzawl dan bang zel in na pe ding uhi.
05015015	Aigupta gam ah sikha na hita ua, Toupa na Pathian un hon tan chih na theigige ding uh ahi. Huaiziak in ahi, tua hiai thu ka hon piak.
05015016	Huan hichi ahi ding a, noute leh na inkuan uh angaih ziak uleh, na kihoutheih ziak ua, “K'on pawtsan kei ding,” achih bikbek aleh;
05015017	sikzum na la ding ua, kongkhak ah abil na vut pailet ding ua, huchi in tangtawn in na sikha uh ahi ding. Na sikhanu uh leng huchi mah bang in na hih ding uh ahi.
05015018	Pawtsak thil haksa bang in na ngaihtuah ding uh ahi kei. Kiloh sep zahnih sem in kum guk nang nna ahon sepsak khinta ngal a. Toupa na Pathian un na thilhih peuh uah hon vualzawl ding hi.
05015019	Na ganhonte uh, na belamhonte uh lak a apa, piang masapente Toupa na Pathian uh a tuam in na pe ding uhi. Na ganhon uh apiang masapen nasem ding in na zang ding uh ahi kei. Na belamhonte uh lak a piang masapen mul na met ding uh ahi kei.
05015020	Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah kum teng in Toupa'n amun seh ding ah nou leh na inkuante uh toh na ne ding uh ahi.
05015021	Gensiat kai, akhe bai hiam, amit taw hiam, gensiatna om peuhmah Toupa na Pathian uh kiang a kithoihna ding in na zang ding uh ahi kei.
05015022	Na omna huangsung ah na ne ding uh ahi. Asiangloute leh asiangte'n sangai leh sakhi leng ane thei ding uh.
05015023	Asisan kia na ne ding uh ahi kei. Tui bang in lei ah na sungbua mai ding uh ahi.
05016001	Abib kha tang unla, Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in Paikan Ankuangluina ding in zang un. Abib kha in ahi, Toupa na Pathian un Aigupta gam a pan zan a ahon pikhiak.
05016002	Toupa'n amin omna mun dia aseh ding ah Toupa na Pathian kiang uah na belamhon lak ua leh na ganhon lak ua Paikan Ankuang ding in na kithoih ding uh ahi.
05016003	Tanghou silngou soh toh na ne ding uh ahi kei. Na damsung teng ua Aigupta gam a pan na pawt ni uh na theihgigena ding un ni sagih tanghou silngou soh louh, haksatna tanghou toh na nek ding uh ahi, Aigupta gam a pan kintak a pawtkhia na hi uhi.
05016004	Na gamsung uah ni sagih sung, na lak uah silngou muh in a-om ding ahi kei. Ani khat ni nitaklam a na kithoihna sa uh zankhua in azingsang tan in bangmah a-om ding ahi kei.
05016005	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak na omna uh koi lai mah ah Paikan Ankuang kithoih in na kithoih thei kei ding uhi.
05016006	Toupa na Pathian un amin omna mun dia aseh ding kia ah ahi ding. Huai ah Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawt hun bang un nitaklam in Paikan Ankuang kithoih in na kithoih ding uhi.
05016007	Na em ding ua, Toupa'n amun seh ding ah na ne ding ua, zingsang in na pai nawn ding ua, na puanin uah na lut ding uhi.
05016008	Ni guk sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uh ahi. Ani sagih ni pen Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in khawmpi siangthou ahi dia, nna na sem ding uh ahi kei hi.
05016009	Nipikal sagih na sim ding ua; na buhlak tung ua kipan nipikal sagih na sim ding uhi.
05016010	Toupa na Pathian un ahon vualzawl bang zel in na sepkhiak uh lak a noumau ut thu a thillat lan in Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in Nipikal Ankuanglui na nei ding uh ahi.
05016011	Toupa na Pathian un amin omna dia aseh ding ah na sikhanute uh, na tenna ua om Levite, na lak ua om gamdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite toh Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah kipaktak in na om ding uhi.
05016012	Aigupta gam ah sikha na hi uh, chih na theihgige ding uh ahi. Hiai dante pilvangtak in na zui ding uh ahi.
05016013	Na buhphual ua kipan leh na uain sukna khuk ua kipan na sekkhawm khit un ni sagih sung Biakbuk Ankuanglui na nei ding uhi.
05016014	Na ankuangluina uah nou toh, na tapa uh toh, na tanu uh toh, na sikhanu uh toh, na tenna ua om Levite, gamdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite toh kipaktak in na om ding uhi.
05016015	Toupa'n amun seh ding ah Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in ni sagih ankuang na lui ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un thil tung tengteng ah leh na khut ngakna tengteng uah ahon vualzawl dia, na vek un kipaktak in na om ding uh ahi.
05016016	Kum teng in na pasal tengteng uh thumvei Toupa ma ah mun hon sehsak ding ah akilang ding uh ahi. Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuang ah, Nipikal Ankuang ah, Biakbuk Ankuang ah akilang ding ua, Toupa ma ah kuamah khutvuak in na kilang ding uh ahi kei.
05016017	Toupa na Pathian un vualzawlna ahon muhsak bang zel in michih in azoh hun bang in ape ding ahi.
05016018	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak kulh kongpi tengteng ah na nam bang zel un vaihawmte leh heutute na kibawl chiat ding ua, mipite vai hoihtak in ahawmsak ding uh ahi.
05016019	Dik loutak in vai na hawm ding uh ahi kei. Kuamah deihsak tuam na nei ding uh ahi kei. Golhgukna na la ding uh ahi kei. Golhgukna in mipilte mit atawsak a, midiktatte thu akaikawi hi.
05016020	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak gam dam a na luahtheihna ding un adik kia na zui ding uh ahi.
05016021	Toupa na Pathian uh maitam na bawl chiang un apang ah sing bangchi mah in leng Asher na phutkhe ding uh ahi kei.
05016022	Toupa na Pathian un amuhdah lam suang leng na phut ding uh ahi sam kei hi.
05017001	Bawngtal hiam, belam hiam, demna omleh hoihlouhna himhim nei in Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah na kithoih ding uh ahi kei. Hiai lah Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in thilkihhuai ahi ngal a.
05017002	Na lak uah Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak na tenna koipeuh uah leng pasal hiam, numei hiam leng, thukhun bohsia a pathian dang nna va sem a,
05017003	ka thupiak louh, ni hiam, kha hiam, van ate himhim hiam, Toupa na Pathian uh mitmuh a thil hoih lou hih a-om a;
05017004	ahon hilh ua, nang na zak a, phatuamngaitak a na dot a, ngai in, adik a, thu atel mahmah a, huchibang thilkihhuai Israelte lak a hih ana hihleh;
05017005	huai thil gilou hihmi, pasal hiam, numei hiam na kulh kongkhak polam uah pasal hiam numei hiam pen na pikhe ding ua, suang in na denglum ding uhi.
05017006	Theihpih nih hiam, thum hiam kam a pan in asi ding mi hihlup ding ahi. Himahleh theihpih khat kia kam a pan in hihlup ding ahi kei.
05017007	Hihlup ding pen tung ah theihpihte'n akhut uh that ding in akha masa ding ua, huai khit chiang in mipi tengteng in, huchibang in na lak ua kipan thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uh ahi.
05017008	Sisan kisuah thu ah, sum-le-pai thu ah, kivuak thu ah, na tenna ua kiselna thu himhim a nou a dia vaihawm haksa lua ahong omleh, Toupa na Pathian un amun seh ding ah na hoh ding ua,
05017009	huai hun a siampu Levite leh vaihawmte kiang a hoh in na dong ding uhi. Amau thu hihpukdan ding hon na kawkmuh ding uhi.
05017010	Huchi in nou Toupa'n mun aseh ding a pan thu hihpukdan hon na kawkmuh bang un na hih ding ua, ahon sinsak bang un pilvangtak in na hih ding uhi.
05017011	Thu hihpukdan hon na sinsak uleh vaihawmdan hon na hilh bang zel un na hih ding uhi. Thu hihpukdan hon na kawkmuh uh taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam na pialsan ding uh ahi kei.
05017012	Toupa na Pathian uh ma a nasem a pang siampu leh vaihawmmi thu pom lou a, engtat peuhmah, huai mi hihlup ding ahi. Israel a pan huai thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uh ahi.
05017013	Huchi in mi tengteng in aza ding ua, alau ding ua, a-engtat nawn kei ding uhi.
05017014	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak ding gam na va tun ua, na va luah ua, na va ten ua, “I gam a nam tengteng bang in kumpipa i nei ding uh, na chih chiang un,”
05017015	Toupa na Pathian un atel pen kumpipa dia na neih ding uh ahi. Na unau lak ua mi khat na kumpipa ding ua na bawl ding uh ahi. Namdangmi, na unau uh hilou zaw nou hon uk dia na bawl ding uh ahi kei.
05017016	Himahleh sakol tampi akaikhawm ding ahi kei, ahihkeileh sakol zong ding in Aigupta gam a kik nawn ding in mite asawl ding ahi kei. Aziak ahihleh Toupa'n , “Huai lam a na kik nawn louh ding uh ahi,” achi khinta hi.
05017017	Alungtang pimang a a-omlouhna ding in zi leng tampi aneih ding ahi kei. Dangka leh dangka-eng leng tampi akhawm ding ahi kei.
05017018	Huan hichi ahi ding a, alalgam laltutphah a atut chiang in siampu Levite a pan kila hiai dan teisawn a, amah a dia laibuzial a agelh ding ahi.
05017019	Hiai dan amah kiang ah a-om gige ding a, adamsung teng a, asim zel ding ahi. Huchi in Toupa a Pathian laudan asin thei dia, hiai dan thu tengteng leh dan thusehte pilvangtak in azui thei dia,
05017020	a-unaute tung ah alungtang akisathei kei dia, dan a pan taklam hiam, veilam hiam ah apial kei ding hi. Huai nung in alalgam Israel tung ah amah leh asuante'n sawtpi vai ahawm ding uhi.
05018001	Siampu Levite, Levi nam tengteng in Israelte lak ah tantuan leh goutan anei ding uh ahi kei. Toupa kiang a mei a thillat leh amau a tuam pen ane ding uhi.
05018002	A-unaute uh lak ah goutan anei ding uh ahi kei; agoutan uh bel akiang ua agen bang in Toupa ahi ngal a.
05018003	Mipite lak a pan kithoihna lanpa siampu a tuam ding hiaite ahi: Bawngtal leh belam liang leh abiangtuai langnih leh agilpi siampu apiak ding uh ahi.
05018004	Na buh na bal, na uain, na thau tung masate uh, na belam mulmet masakpente uh leng na piak ding uh ahi.
05018005	Toupa na Pathian un Toupa min a nasem a om tawntung ding in nam tengteng a pan amau leh atapate uh toh atel ahi ngal ua.
05018006	Levi mi kuapeuh atenna Israel gam na tenna ua akoipeuh pawtsan a, alungsim a kilawptak a Toupa'n aseh ding mun a ahong paileh;
05018007	huai a Toupa ma a om Levite, a-unaute mah bang in Toupa a Pathian min in nna asem ding ahi.
05018008	Asiamput man uh sim louh in midang tuam nek ding atang sam himhim ding uhi.
05018009	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak ding gamsung a na lut chiang un, huai gam a namte thilhih kihhuaite zui kei un.
05018010	Na lak uah mi kuamah atapa hiam, atanu hiam mei a paisuaksak, mi kuamah aisan ching, mi kuamah mangsan ching hiam, bum hiam, mitkhialdawi tawi hiam,
05018011	zawl aitawi hiam, mi sisa houpih hiam, khate zawl hiam, misisate dong thei hiam na om ding uh ahi kei.
05018012	Hichibang thilhih chingte peuhmah Toupa a ding in mikihhuai ahi ngal ua. Hiai thilkihhuaite ziak in ahi, Toupa na Pathian un amaute ahon delhkhiaksak.
05018013	Toupa na Pathian uh ma a na hoihkim ding uh ahi.
05018014	Huai na va luah ding uh gam a namte'n mitkhialdawi leh aisan ching mite angaikhia ua; nou zaw Toupa na Pathian un huchibang hih ahon phal kei hi.
05018015	Toupa na Pathian un keimah bang na unaute uh lak a mi zawlnei a hon bawlsak dia, ama thu na ngaikhe ding uh ahi.
05018016	“ Toupa i Pathian aw zaw hon zasak nawn ke'nla, hiai mei thupi hon musak nawn ke'n, ka si kha ding uh,” chi a Horeb tang a kikhopkhawm ni a Toupa na Pathian uh na deihdan bang un.
05018017	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, athugen uh agen hoih ngel uhi.
05018018	A-unaute uh lak ah nangmah bang zawlnei ka bawlsak dia, akam ah ka thute ka koih dia, akiang a ka thupiak peuhmah akiang uah agen ding.
05018019	Huan hichi ahi ding a, ka min a ka thu agen zui lou peuhmah ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
05018020	Ka min agen ding ka piak louh gen teitei zawlnei hiam, pathian dangte min a thugenmi zawlnei hiam, huai zawlnei hihlup ding ahi.
05018021	“Na lungtang ua, bangchi in ahia athu Toupa gen ahi kei chih i theih ding? na chih uleh,
05018022	zawlnei in Toupa min a thu agen a, athil gen pen ahong tangtun kei a, alohchin keileh, huaitak ahi, Toupa gen louh, zawlnei in ki-uangsaktak in agen mawkmawk ahi a, amah na lau ding uh ahi kei,” achi hi.
05019001	Toupa na Pathian un agam uh nou ahon piak namte Toupa'n ahihmanthat khopite na luah ua, a-innte ua na ten chiang un;
05019002	Toupa na Pathian un luah dia nou ahon piakna gam ah nou a ding in khopi thum na sep ding uhi.
05019003	Huai khopite zotna ding lampite sial unla, Toupa'n hon luahsak ding gam seh thum suah un. Huchi in mi that kha kuapeuh huaite ah atailut thei ding uhi.
05019004	Huai a tailutmi that kha bit thei ding hiaite ahi: Mi a-invengte tuma lam a huatna leng nei khol lou a that kha peuhmahte;
05019005	a-invengte toh sing phuk dia gamlak a kuan, asing phuk dia aheipi asat a, heipi tang kitol in a-invengte adenlup khakte ahi ding ua hiai khopite lak a khatpeuh ah atai thei ding uh;
05019006	sisan phulami in ahehna apai lai a mithat mi pen delh a, lampi asau ziak a delhpha in ava satlum kha ding hi. Tuma lam a huatna na nei khol lou ahih ziak in si tak ahi kei hi.
05019007	Huaiziak in Khopi thum nou a ding in na sep ding uh, chi in thu ka hon pia hi.
05019008	Toupa na Pathian un na pi-le-pute uh kiang a, ana kichiam bang a na pi-le-pute uh piak ana chiam gam ahon piak a;
05019009	Toupa na Pathian uh it ding leh alampi zui gige ding a, tuni a ka hon thupiak tengteng na zuih uleh hiai khopi thumte sim louh in nou a ding in khopi thum dang na behlap nawn ding uhi.
05019010	Hiai bel Toupa'n luah ding a ahon piak na gamsung ua poi khoih lou sisan suah a-om louh a, na tung ua sisan a-omlouhna ding ahi.
05019011	Himahleh mi'n a-invengte ahuat a, atan a, asual a, si khop hial a avuak a, huai khopite lak a khat a ataileh;
05019012	akho upate un mi sawl uhenla, huai mipa va pi uhenla, hihlup ding in sisan phulami khut ah pekhia uhen.
05019013	Amah na hehpih ding uh ahi kei a, nou a dia hoih ding in Israel gam a pan poi khoih lou sisan suahna na hihmang ding uh ahi.
05019014	Toupa na Pathian un luah dia ahon piak gam ah, ana phuhsa uh na invengte gamgi na suan ding uh ahi kei.
05019015	Mi athulimlouhna hiam, akhelhna himhim hiam theihpih khat ahun kei dia; theihpih nih kam hiam, theihpih thum kam hiam a thu hihkip ding ahi.
05019016	Mi khatpeuh thil hihkhial a ngoh dia tup gilou nei theihpihmi adinleh,
05019017	huai bang a kingohna neite gel Toupa ma leh huai hun a siampute leh vaihawmte ma ah adingh tuak ding uhi.
05019018	Vaihawmte'n ngenteltak in thu adong ding ua, ngai in, theihpihmi thu theihpih zuau ahih a, a-unau zuau a ngoh ahihleh;
05019019	a-unau tung a hih atup bangbang amah tung ah na hih ding uh. Huchibang in na lak ua thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uhi.
05019020	Midangte'n aza ding ua, alau ding ua, huchi in tunung chiang in huchibang thil hoih lou mawngmawng na lak uah ahih nawn kei ding uhi.
05019021	Na hehpih ding uh ahi kei. Hinna tang in hinna, mit tang in mit, ha tang in ha, khut tang in khut, khe tang in khe ahi ding ahi.
05020001	Na melmate uh dou ding a na kuan ua, sakol, kangtalai, nou sang a mipi tamzaw na muh chiang un, na lau ding uh ahi kei. Aigupta gam a pan nou hon pikhepa Toupa na Pathian uh na kiang uah a-om hi.
05020002	Kidou dia na kuan dek chiang un siampu in mipi va naih henla, houpih henla, akiang uah,
05020003	“Israelte aw, za un, tu in na melmate uh dou ding na hi ua, na lungtang uh patausak kei un. Lau kei unla, ling sam kei un, amaute lauhsak in om kei un.
05020004	Noute hon tonpih a na melmate uh hon dousak a, hon hondam ding Toupa na Pathian uh ahi, chi hen.”
05020005	Heutute'n mipite kiang ah, “Inn thak lam a lan nai lou na om uhia? A-inn ah paikik nawn hen. Kidouna ah ava si kha dia, midang in alan kha ding,”
05020006	“Grephuan bawl a, agah ne nai lou na om uhia? A-inn ah paikik nawn hen, kidouna ah ava si kha dia, midang in ane kha ding hi.”
05020007	“Zikham a kiteng nai lou na om uhia? A-inn ah paikik nawn hen. Kidouna ah ava si kha dia, midang in akitenpih kha ding,” chi in gen hen.
05020008	Heutute'n mipite kiang ah, “Lau leh patau na om uhia? A-inn ah paikik nawn hen, a-unaute uh lungtang amah lungtang bang in azulsak kha ding,” chi lai uhen.
05020009	Huan hichi ahi ding a, heutute'n mipite kiang a thu agen khit un mipite makaih ding sepaih heutute asep ding uhi.
05020010	Dou ding kho kim na va tun chiang un lemna thu gen phot un.
05020011	Huan hichi ahi ding a, ahon kileppih ua, ana kihon uleh hichi ahi ding a, huai a mi om tengteng nasem dia na goih ding uh ahi dia, na nna uh asem ding uhi.
05020012	Hon kileppih ut lou a, ahon na dou ding uleh umkhum un.
05020013	Toupa na Pathian un na khut ua ahon piak hun chiang in pasal tengteng namsau in na that vek ding uh ahi.
05020014	Numei leh ataneu chikchikte uh, gante leh khua a thil omte leh huai a gallak thil tengteng nou a tuam dia na lak ding uh ahi. Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak na melmate uh a pan gallak thil na ne ding uhi.
05020015	Hiai namte khua hilou, na tenna ua kipan a kho gamla tengteng huchibang in na hih zel ding uhi.
05020016	Toupa na Pathian un luah dia ahon piak hiai namte khuate zaw Toupa na Pathian un thu ahon piak bang in ahing peuhmah bangmah na hawi ding uh ahi kei.
05020017	Hitte, Amorte, Kanaante, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste na hihmang vek ding uhi.
05020018	Apathiante uh tung a ahih zel uh thilkihhuai tengteng ahon sinsaklouhna ding un hihmang vek un. Huchi lou in zaw Toupa na Pathian tung ah thil na hihkhial kha ding uhi.
05020019	Lak tum a na dou uh khua sawtpi na um chiang un, asingte uh heipi in na phuk ding uh ahi kei; na nek ding uh ahi ngal a. Huai khopi douna a zat ding in leng na phuk ding uh ahi kei; huai gam a singte mihing hinna ahi ngal a.
05020020	Himahleh gah nei lou singte bel phuk in na hihse thei ding ua, na doute khua na lak zoh masiah uh adouna vanzat in na zang ding uhi.
05021001	Toupa na Pathian un luah dia ahon piak gamsung a thahsa mi ana om a, athatmi theih louh ahihleh,
05021002	na upate uh leh na vaihawmtute uh ahong pai ding ua, athahna kim khua a pan ateh ding ua,
05021003	huan hichi ahi ding a, aluang a pan kho naipen khua a upate'n bawnghon lak a bawngla, zat nai louh, hakkol po nai lou akai ding uhi.
05021004	Huai khua upate'n bawngla, tui luanna, lei leh louh leh bangmah chinlouhna phaizang ah akaisuk ding ua, phaizang ah angawng atan ding uh.
05021005	Levi tapa siampute'n ahon zuan ding ua, amau Toupa na Pathian un anasemmi leh Toupa min a vualzawlmi dia asehte uh lah ahi ngal ua; thubuai leh kivuak thu agen bangbang uh ahi ding ahi.
05021006	Luang naihpen khua upa tengteng in phaizang a bawngla ngawng atan tung uah akhut uh asil ding uhi.
05021007	“Ka khut un hiai sisan asuah kei a, ka mit un leng amu sam kei.
05021008	Toupa aw, na tatkhiak, na mi Israelte lak ah poi khoih lou sisan suahna moh hon khusak ke'n,” chi in apang ding uhi. Huchi in sisan thu ah ngaihdam ahi ding uhi.
05021009	Huchibang in Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih hih in poi khoih lou sisan suahna na lak ua kipan na koihmang ding uhi.
05021010	Na melmate uh dou dia na kipatkhiak ua, Toupa na Pathian un na khut ua ahon piak a, sal a na pi ua,
05021011	sal lak a numei melhoihtak, na mi deihlam, zi ding a na mi deihlamtak na muhleh,
05021012	na inn ah na pi dia; alu amet dia, akhutchin atan ding hi.
05021013	Asal puanak asuahkhe dia, na inn ah a-om dia, kha khat sung anu leh apa asuun dia, huai khit in, na kithuahpih dia, apasal na hi dia, amah na zi ahi ding hi.
05021014	Amah a kipahna na neih keileh a-utna peuh a pai na phal ding ahi, sum-le-pai in na zuak ding ahi kei a, sumsinna in na zang ding leng ahi kei, amah na daisakta ngal a.
05021015	Mi'n zi nih nei henla, khat pen deih in khat pen ho taleh, adeihnu leh ahuatnu in ta suansak tuak taleh; a-upapen ahuatnu tapa hitaleh;
05021016	agou neih atapate akhopsak hun chiang in adeihpen tapa, atapa upa ahuat pen ta sang a deihsakna apiak tuam ding ahi kei.
05021017	Ahuat pen ta, ata upapen, aneih tengteng a pan tan nih huai a dia abawl ding ahi; ahatna bul ahi a, tachil hihna ama a tuam ahi.
05021018	Mi'n tapa phengphitak, helhattak nei henla, anu leh apa thumang lou in, asawina uh limsakta keileh;
05021019	anu leh apa'n akai ding ua, akho upate uh kiang ah akhokulh kongpi bul ah api ding uhi.
05021020	Akho upate uh kiang ah, hiai ka tapa uh phengphitak leh helhattak ahi a, ka thu uh leng amang nuam kei a; kizatbei hat leh kham hatmi ahi, achi ding uhi.
05021021	Huchi in khua a mi tengteng in suang in adenglum ding uhi. Huchibang in na lak ua kipan thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uh ahi. Israel mi tengteng in aza ding ua, alau ding uhi.
05021022	Mi'n sihna khop khelhna ahih a, thah a om a, sing dawn a na khai uleh;
05021023	aluang sing ah zankhua in a-om ding ahi kei. Huai ni mahmah in na vui ding uhi. Sing a khai peuhmah lah Pathian hamsethuak ahi ngal a. Toupa na Pathian un luah ding a ahon piak na gam uh na hihnitlouhna ding un.
05022001	Na unau bawngtal hiam, abelam hiam mang na muhleh na daihsan ding ahi kei. Na unau inn ah na pi ngeingei ding ahi.
05022002	Na unau inn kiangnai a om ahih louh a, aneimi na theih louh uh ahihleh, na inn ah na pitou dia, na kiang ah a-om nilouh dia, na unau in azon hunhun in na pe nawn ding ahi.
