05022003	Huchi mah bang in asabiltung leng na hih ding ahi. Huai mah bang in apuansilh leng na hih ding ahi. Huchi mah bang in na unau thil mansak na muh peuhmah na hih ding ahi, na daihsan mawkmawk ding ahi kei.
05022004	Na unau sabiltung hiam, bawngtal hiam, lampi a puk na muhleh na daihsan maimah ding ahi kei. Na photpih ngeingei ding ahi.
05022005	Numei in pasal van asilh ding ahi kei. Pasal in numei van asilh ding ahi kei. Kuapeuh huchibang hihmi Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in kihhuai ahi.
05022006	Lampi a vasabu, sing ah hiam, lei ah hiam, anou hiam, atui hiam om, anou hiam atui hiam, api in a-opkhum lai na muhleh api toh anou na lakkhawm ding ahi kei.
05022007	Api na khah ngeingei ding ahi. Anou bel na la thei ding ahi. Huchi in nang a ding in ahoih dia, na damsung na sawtsak ding hi.
05022008	Inn thak na lam chiang in atung a pan mi kia a, asisan moh na khuklouhna ding in atung na um ding ahi.
05022009	Na grephuan ah thil chi nih na ching ding ahi kei. Huchi lou in zaw na chi tuh gah leh na grephuan a gah teng siang lou ahi ding uhi.
05022010	Bawngtal leh sabiltung lei na kaikhawmsak ding ahi kei.
05022011	Samul leh pat kigankhawm puan na silh ding ahi kei.
05022012	Na kituamna puan uh agei li ah mong khih na bawl ding uh ahi.
05022013	Pasal khatpeuh in zi aneih a, akithuahpih a, amuhdah nawn thepthup a,
05022014	hiai numei ka kitenpih a, ka kithuahpih a, nungak siangthou ahihna ka mu kei, chi a zahlaktak a bawl a, amin ahihsiatleh,
05022015	nungak nu leh pa'n kulh kongpi ah huai kho upate kiang ah nungak siangthou ahih kichetnate ahon tawi ding uhi.
05022016	Nungak pa'n upate kiang ah, “Hiai mipa ka tanu ka neisak a, aho nawn thepthup hi.
05022017	Ngai un, na tanu nungak siangthou ahihna ka mu kei, chi in zahlaktak in abawl a, himahleh hiaite ka tanu nungak siangthou ahihna ahi,” achi ding hi. Huchi in huai kho upate ma ah tua puan aphah ding hi.
05022018	Huai kho upate'n huai mipa paipih in agawt ding ua;
05022019	Israel nungak siangthou asukminsiat ziak in dangka shekel zakhat aliausak ding ua, nungak pa ape ding uhi; amah zi ahi dia, adamsung in akhen thei kei ding.
05022020	Himahleh huai mipa thu ana dik a, nungak siangthou ahih kichetnate muh ahihkeileh;
05022021	nungak pen apa'n kongpi ah apikhe dia, atenna khua a mite'n amah suang in adenglum ding uh; apa inn a kizuak a Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuai mahmah ahih ziak in. Huchibang in na lak ua kipan, huai thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uhi.
05022022	Pasal khat in pasal nei numei akithuahpih lai muh ahihleh akithuahpih pasal leh numei anih ua asih ding uh ahi. Huchibang in Israel a pan huai thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uhi.
05022023	Nungak siangthou, mi zikham, pasal khat in khopi a amuh a, akithuahpihleh;
05022024	anih un khokulh kongpi ah na pikhe ding ua, suang in na denglum ding uh; numei pen khua a-om ngal a, akikou louh ziak in. Pasal pen a-invengte zi ahihminsiat ziak in. Huchibang in na lak ua kipan huai thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uh ahi.
05022025	Himahleh min gamlak a midang in zi dia akhamsa nungak amuh a, apawngsualleh hiai thilhih pasal kia sihsak ding ahi.
05022026	Nungak pen bangmah loh louh ding ahi. Nungak in sihna khop khelhna bangmah hih lou ahi. Hiai bang mi ahihleh min a-invengte sual a, that toh kibang ahi.
05022027	Hiai bang thu ahihleh gamlak a va tuak kha a, mi zikham nungak kikou a, panpih ding mi om lou ahih ziak ahi.
05022028	Mi'n nungak siangthou kuamah kham louh amuh a, amat a, akithuahpih amuh uleh;
05022029	akithuahpih pasal in nungak pa dangka shekel sawmnga ape ding ahi. Zi in anei ding ahi; ahihminsiat tak ziak in. Huchi in adamsung in akhen thei kei ding hi.
05022030	Pasal in apa zi akitenpih ding ahi kei. Apa lupna abuahsak ding ahi kei.
05023001	Chiltang kitam ahihkeileh zahmoh atkhiak mi kuapeuh Toupa mi kikhawmte lak ah atel ding ahi kei.
05023002	Toupa mi kikhawmte lak ah sawnta atel ding ahi kei. Suan sawm tan in asuante Toupa mi kikhawmte lak ah atel ding ahi kei hi.
05023003	Ammonte leh Moabte Toupa mi kikhawmte lak ah atel ding uh ahi kei. Suan sawmna tan in alak ua mi Toupa mi kikhawmte lak a, atel mahmah louh ding uh ahi.
05023004	Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawt lai ua tanghou leh tui a, ahon na dawn louh ziak un leh hon hamsiat dia Mesopotamia gam a Pethor a Beor tapa Balaam agoih ziak un.
05023005	Himahleh Toupa na Pathian un Balaam thu angaikhe nuam kei; Toupa na Pathian un nou ahon it ziak in Toupa na Pathian un huai hamsia nou a ding in vualzawlna asuaksak zaw hi.
05023006	Na damsung teng un akhamuanna ding uh leh alohchinna ding uh na ngaihtuahpih ding uh ahi kei.
05023007	Edom mite na kih ding uh ahi kei, na unaute uh lah ahi ngal ua. Aigupta mite na kih ding uh ahi kei, agam ua mikhual na hih tak ziak un.
05023008	Asuan uh thumna a pan Toupa mi kikhawmte lak ah atel ding uh ahi.
05023009	Na melmate uh dou dia giahphual na sat chiang un thilsiang lou chiteng a pan na kihuikhiak ding uh ahi.
05023010	Na lak ua kuapeuh zan chiang a amah a pan chi apawt ziak a thanghuai na om uleh, giahphual a pan apawt dia, giahphual ah alut nawn ding ahi kei.
05023011	Himahleh ni ahong kai chiang in, akisil dia; nitum chiang in giahphual ah alut nawn ding ahi.
05023012	Giahphual polam ah zun leh ek thakna ding mun na sep ding uh ahi.
05023013	Na vanzat lak uah ninluahna na nei ding ua; hichi ahi ding a, na dailen chiang un, huai in lei na khuak ding ua, zun leh ek na thak uh na vuk nawn ding uhi.
05023014	Toupa na Pathian un lah na giahphual uah nou hon humbit ding leh na melmate uh hon pe ding in ahong tel ngal a. Huaiziak in na giahphual uh asiangthou ding ahi. Huchi lou in zaw na lak ua thilsiang lou amu dia, hon paimangsan ding hi.
05023015	Na kiang ua sikha, apu hon taikhiaksan na pekik nawn ding uh ahi kei.
05023016	Na omna ua adeihpen atel peuhpeuh ah na lak uah a-om sam ding ahi. Amah na nuaisiah ding uh ahi kei.
05023017	Israel tanute lak ah kizuak a-om ding ahi kei a, Israel tapate lak ah leng pasal kizuak a-om ding ahi kei.
05023018	Kizuakna man hiam, toko man hiam thuchiamna ding in Toupa na Pathian inn ah na tawi ding uh ahi kei. Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in thilkihhuai ahi.
05023019	Apung delh in na unau na leitawisak ding ahi kei. Dangka lam a pung hiam, nek ding lam a pung hiam, bangpeuh apung delh a leitawisak louh ding ahi
05023020	Gamdang mite bel apung delh in na leitawisak thei ding uh. Himahleh na unaute apung delh in na leitawisak ding ahi kei. Huchi in na va luah ding uh gam a na khut ngakna tengteng uah Toupa na Pathian un hon vualzawl ding hi.
05023021	Toupa na Pathian uh kiang a thu na chiam un sawt hal lou in na pe pah ding uh ahi. Toupa na Pathian un lah hon phut ngei ding ahi ngal a. Khial in na moh kha ding hi.
05023022	Thuchiam lam a na kidek uleh nou a ding in khelhna ahi kei ding.
05023023	Na kam ua pawtsa na hih ding uh ahi: Ut thu a thillat na kam ua na chiam uh Toupa na Pathian uh kiang a na chiam bang ua na lat pah ding uh ahi.
05023024	Na invengte grephuan a na hoh chiang un na deih zah uh na ne ding ua, himahleh na seng ua na guan louh ding uh ahi.
05023025	Na invengte buh ding lai mun a na hoh chiang un avui na khiak thei ding uh. Himahleh na invengte buh ding lai ah kawite na zang ding uh ahi kei hi.
05024001	Pasal khat in zi aneih a, amah a siang lou banghiam khat amuh ziak a, amitmuh a lungtunna angah keileh hichi ahi ding a, kimakna lai agelhsak dia, ape dia, a-inn a pan apawtsak ding hi.
05024002	A-inn a pan apawt nung in midang ava nei thei ding hi.
05024003	Apasal nanungpen in azakdah a, kimakna lai agelhsak a, apiak a, a-inn a pan apawtsak hiam, apasal nanungzaw, zi a neipa si hiam ahihleh;
05024004	apasal masa, amah paisakpa'n ahih nitsa ahi a, anei nawn thei kei ding. Toupa mitmuh in hiai thilkihhuai ahi. Toupa'n luah dia ahon piak gam ah khelhna na lutsak ding uh ahi kei.
05024005	Pasal zi nei tung sepaih in akuan ding ahi kei a, bang nna sem dia phut ding leng ahi kei. A-inn ah kum khat zalen in a-om dia, azi lungnuamtak in a-omsak ding hi.
05024006	Buh gawizanna hiam, atunglam suang hiam kichiamna ding in kuamah a pan na lentang ding uh ahi kei; mi hinna lettangsak na hi ngal ua.
05024007	Kuapeuh, Israel suan a-unaute lak a mi gu a, sal a zat hiam, zuak hiam theihkhiak ahihleh huai gutapa hihlup ding ahi. Huchibang na lak ua kipan thil hoih lou na hihmang ding uh ahi.
05024008	Phak hipi tungtang thu ah hoihtak a ettel a, siampu, Levite sinsakdan bang zel a hih ding in pilvang un. Amau thu ka piak bang in pilvangtak in na hih ding uh ahi.
05024009	Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtna lampi a Toupa na Pathian un Miriam tung a ahihdan theigige un.
05024010	Bangpeuh na invengte uh na leitawi sakleh akhamna la ding in a-inn ah na lut ding ahi kei.
05024011	Inn pua ah na dingh dia, leitawisakmi in tua khamna inpua ah ahon tawikhe ding ahi.
05024012	Mizawng ahihleh akhamna kem in na giahpih ding ahi kei.
05024013	Bang teng hileh ni ahong tum chiang in akichiamna thil akiang ah pekik in. Huchi in apuantual silh in a-ihmu thei dia, nang hon phat thei ding hi. Huai khamna thil pen na Pathian ma ah nang a ding in diktatna ahi ding hi.
05024014	Na migoih, mizawng leh tasam na unau hiam, na gam ua na tenna ua om gamdangmi hiam leng hitaleh na simmoh ding uh ahi kei.
05024015	Asep ni in aloh na pe ding uh; ni in atumkhum ding ahi kei. Mizawng ahi a, huai ah alungtang akoih hi. Huchi lou in zaw na tungtang uah Toupa asam dia, nou a ding in khelhna ahi ding hi.
05024016	Tate ziak in pate hihlup ding ahi kei a, pate ziak in tapate leng hihlup ding ahi sam kei. Michih amah khelhna ziak a hihlup ding ahi.
05024017	Gamdang mite leh pa neiloute dikloutak a na gensak ding ahi kei. Meithai puan leng khamna ding in na laksak ding ahi kei.
05024018	Nou leng Aigupta gam ah sikha na hi ngeita ua, Toupa na Pathian un huai a pan a hon tat na hi uh, chih na theihgige ding uh ahi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian un na khut ngakna chiteng uah hon vualzawl ding hi.
05024019	Na lou ua buh na lak un, buhphal na khop maih uleh na lak nawn ding uh ahi kei. Gamdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite a ding ahi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian un na khut koihna tengteng uh avualzawl ding hi.
05024020	Na olive sing uh na sat chiang un ahiangte na sat ding uh ahi kei. Gamdang mite, pa neiloute leh meithaite a ding ahi.
05024021	Na grephuan ua na loh chiang un asang na zong ding uh ahi kei. Gamdang mite, pa neiloute leh meithaite a ding ahi.
05024022	Aigupta gam ah sikha na hita uh, chih na theigige ding uh ahi. Huaiziak in ahi, hiai thilhih dia thu ka hon piak.
05025001	Mi akinak ua, vaihawmna mun a ahoh uleh, vaihawmte'n ana gensak ding ua, midiktat siam atangsak ding ua, migilou moh atangsak ding uhi.
05025002	Huan hichi ahi ding a, migilou zep tuak mah ahihleh, vaihawmmi in alumsak dia, ama ah azep ding ahi. Agitlouh dungzui a zep ding zah bikhiah ding ahi.
05025003	Sawmli vei tan zep theih ahi dia, huai val zaw hilou in. Hiai sang a val azepleh na unaupa uh na zahlaksak lo kha ding uh.
05025004	Bawngtal in buh achil lai in amuk na gak ding uh ahi kei.
05025005	Unaute tengkhawm uhenla, tapa nei lou in alak ua khat si taleh, asipa zi in polam a midang akitenpih ding ahi kei. Apasal unaupa in aluah dia, zi in anei dia, apasal unau mohpuakna tung ah ahih ding ahi.
05025006	Huan hichi ahi ding a, atachil suansak in Israel lak a, amin amanlouhna ding in a-unau sipa min apu ding ahi.
05025007	Ama'n a-unaupa zi kitenpih a-ut keileh, kulh kongpi a upate kiang ah a-unaupa zi ahohtou dia, “Ka pasal unaupa'n Israel lak a a-unaupa min omsak zel a-ut kei a, ka pasal unaupa hih ding ka tung ah ahih nuam kei,” ava chi ding hi.
05025008	Huchi in akho upate un amah asam ding ua, ahoupih ding ua ama'n, “Ka kitenpih nuam kei,” chi a apanleh;
05025009	a-unaupa zi akiang ah upate ma ah ahong dia, upate ma ava naihtou dia, akhedap asuahsak dia, amai ah achil ase ding hi. “A-unaupa inkuan khotuah nuamloupa tung ah hichibang a hih hi ngeingei hen,” achi ding hi.
05025010	Huchi in inkuan khedap suahsakpa, chi in Israelte lak ah amin putsak ahi ding hi.
05025011	Mikilai uhenla, akhat penpa zi in akilaihpihpa a pan apasal honkhe ding in azahmoh kaihsak taleh;
05025012	akhut na tansak ding uh ahi. Na hehpih ding uh ahi kei.
05025013	Na ip sung uah bukna suang chi tuamtuam, agik leh azang na nei ding uh ahi kei.
05025014	Na inn uah tehna chi tuamtuam, alian leh aneu na kem ding uh ahi kei.
05025015	Bukna diktak leh hoihtak na nei ding uh ahi. Tehna diktak leh hoihtak na nei ding uh ahi. Huchi in Toupa'n ahon gam piak ah na damsawt ding uhi.
05025016	Huchibang hihmi, diktat loutak a hih tengteng Toupa na Pathian un akih hi.
05025017	Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtna lampi ua Amalekte'n hon na bawldan uh:
05025018	Pathian leng lau lou a, na bah lai uh leh na nguai lai ua lampi a hon kituahpih a, na lak ua ananungpente, na nunglam ua hatloute, na bah lai leh na gim lai ua hon na sualdante uh theigige un.
05025019	Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un luah dia gam ahon piak chiang in, na kim ua na melma tengteng ua pan Toupa na Pathian un galmuanna ahon piak chiang in van nuai a Amalekte theihgigena na hihmang sipsip ding uhi. Na mangngilh ding uh ahi kei.
05026001	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un gouluah dia gam hon piak a na va lut ua, na va ten chiang un;
05026002	Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak na gam leigah tung masapen chiat uh na hon tawi ding ua; bawm ah na koih ding ua, Toupa na Pathian un amin omsakna dia aseh ding ah na hoh ding uhi.
05026003	Huchi in siampu kiang ah na hoh ding ua, akiang ah, hon piak dia i pi-le-pute kiang a, achiamna gam ka hong tungta uh, chih tuni in Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah i hihlang uhi, na chi ding uh.
05026004	Siampu in na khut ua kipan bawm ala dia, Toupa na Pathian uh maitam bul ah anga ding hi.
05026005	Nou Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah, “Ka pu uh Siria mi, mivakvai ahi a, Aigupta gam ah apaisuk a, ava teng a, tawmchik ahi ua; huai ah nam thupitak, thilhihtheitak, tamtak ahong hita uhi.
05026006	Aigupta mite'n hon simmoh ua, hon hihgenthei ua, nasep haksa pipi hon semsak uh.
05026007	Huchi in Toupa i pi-le-pute Pathian i sam ua, Toupa'n i aw uh ana za a, i gentheihdan, i gimdan leh nuaisiah a i omdan amu hi.
05026008	Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan khut hattak, ban zak, thil lauhuaitak, chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte in ahon pikhia a;
05026009	hiai mun ah hon pilut a, hiai gam, nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam ahon pia hi.
05026010	Ngai in, Toupa aw, nang na hon piak leigah masapen chiatte ka hon tawi uhi,” na va chi ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah na vual ding ua, Toupa na Pathian uh bia in na kun ding uhi.
05026011	Toupa na Pathian un na inkuante, noute, Levi mite, na lak ua gamdang mite thil hoih ahon piak tengteng ah kipaktak in na om ding uhi.
05026012	Kum thum kum, sawm-a-khat piak kum a na thil tung tengteng uh sawm-a-khat na piak khit uleh, Levi mite, gamdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite'n na omna uah ane ding uh, ahong khosak theih samna ding un.
05026013	Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah, thu na hon piak tengteng bang in ka inn ua kipan thil siangthoute ka sepkhia ua, Levi mite, gamdang mite, pa neiloute leh meithaite ka peta uh. Na thupiak akoi mahmah ka bohse kei ua, ka mangngilh kei uhi.
05026014	Ka dah lai un huai ka ne kei ua, ka sian louh lai un ka thehthang sam kei ua, misi tuam a ding in leng ka pe sam kei uhi. Toupa ka Pathian uh aw ka dawp ua, na hon thupiak tengteng bang in ka hih uhi.
05026015	Na omna siangthou van a pan hon en inla, nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam, ka pi uh leh pute piak dia na kichiamsa bang in na mi Israelte leh na gam hon piak vualzawl in, na chi ding uh.
05026016	“Tuni in Toupa na Pathian un hiai dan leh vaihawmte zui ding in thu ahon pia hi. Huaiziak in na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua pom in na zui ding uh ahi.
05026017	Tuni in Toupa lampite zui a, adante, athupiakte leh avaihawmte zui a, a-aw dawp tum in na Pathian ding un na telta uh.
05026018	Thu ahon chiamsa bang in leh athupiak tengteng na zuihna ding un Toupa'n tuni in amah a tuambik hi ding in noute ahon na telta hi.
05026019	Ana gensa bang a Toupa na Pathian uh a dia a misiangthou na hihtheihna ding un leh nam a bawl tengteng tung a phat, minhoih leh pahtawi a na omtheihna ding un,” achi hi.
05027001	Huan Mosi leh Israel upate'n mipite thu apia ua, “Tuni a ka hon piak thupiak tengteng zui un.
05027002	Toupa na Pathian un ahon gam piak a lut dia Jordan na kan ni chiang un hichi ahi ding a, suang liantakte na phut ding ua, suang lou na nuh ding uh ahi.
05027003	Na galkah khit chiang un atung uah hiai dan thu tengteng na gelh ding uh ahi. Huchi in Toupa , na pi-le-pute uh Pathian in hon na chiamsa bang in nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam, Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak gam ah na pai thei ding uhi.
05027004	Jordan lui na galkah khit chiang un hichi ahi ding a, tuni a ka hon thupiak bang in Ebal tang ah suangte na phut ding ua, suang lou na nuh ding uh ahi.
05027005	Huai ah Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in maitam, suang maitam na bawl ding uh ahi. Vanzat ding in sik na zang ding uh ahi kei.
05027006	Toupa na Pathian uh maitam suang sek louh in na bawl ding uh ahi. Huai ah Toupa na Pathian uh a ding in halmang thillatte na lan ding uhi.
05027007	Kilepna thillatte in na kithoih ding ua, huai ah na ne ding ua, Toupa na Pathian uh ma ah kipaktak in na om ding uh ahi.
05027008	Suangte ah hiai dan thu tengteng teltak in na gelh ding uh ahi,” chi in.
05027009	Mosi leh siampu Levite'n Israel mi tengteng ahoupih ua, Israel mite aw, hoihtak in ngaikhia un. Tuni in Toupa na Pathian uh mite na hong hita uhi.
05027010	Huaiziak in Toupa na Pathian uh thu na zuih ding uh ahi. Tuni a ka hon thupiakte leh adante na zuih ding uh ahi, achi uhi.
05027011	Huai ni mah in Mosi in mipite thu apia a,
05027012	“Jordan lui gal na kah khit chiang un mipite vualzawl ding in Gerizim tang a hiaite adin ding uh ahi: Simeon nam, Levi nam, Judah nam, Issakar nam, Joseph nam leh Benjamin nam.
05027013	Hamsiat ding in hiaite Ebal tang a adin ding uh ahi: Reuben nam, Gad nam, Asher nam, Zebulun nam, Dan nam leh Naphtali nam,” achi hi.
05027014	Levite'n ahon gen pan ua, Israel mi tengteng kiang ah aw ngaihtak in,
05027015	“Khutsiamte khutsuak Toupa a dia kihhuai milim tunkhiak tawm hiam, gukkep peuhmah hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen,” chi in ana dawng ding uhi.
05027016	“Anu hiam, apa hiam zahtak lou peuhmah hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uh.
05027017	“A-invengte gamgi suanmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uh.
05027018	“Lampi a pan mittaw lampi lou a paisakmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uhi.
05027019	“Gamdangmi, pa nei lou leh meithai vai dikloutak a hawmsakmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uhi.
05027020	“Apa zi kithuahpihmi hamsethuak in om hen,” apa nik lem ahih ziak in, achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uh.
05027021	“Bang gan peuhpeuh kithuahpihmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uhi.
05027022	“Asanggamnu, apa tanu hiam, anu tanu hiam, kithuahpihmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” achi ding uhi.
05027023	“Asungnu kithuahpihmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” ana chi ding uh.
05027024	“A-invengte gukthahmi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” achi ding uhi.
05027025	“Poi khoih lou thahna ding a golhna lami hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” achi ding uhi.
05027026	“Hiai dan thute zui ding a pomkip lou mi hamsethuak in om hen,” achi ding ua, mipi tengteng in, “Amen!” achi ding uhi.
05028001	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, Toupa na Pathian aw hoihtak a na ngaihkhiak ua, tuni a thu ka hon piak, thupiak tengteng pilvangtak a na zuih uleh, Toupa na Pathian un leitung nam tengteng a tungnungpen in ahon bawl ding hi.
05028002	Toupa na Pathian uh thu na zuih peuhmah uleh hiai vualzawlna tengteng na tung uah ahong tung dia, ahon zui ding uhi.
05028003	Inn lam leh gam lam ah vualzawl in na om ding uh.
05028004	Na gil ua gah, na lei ua gah, na ganhon, na bawngpi leh na belamhon uh vualzawl in a-om ding.
05028005	Na bawm uh leh na tanghou mekna kuangte uh vualzawl in a-om ding.
05028006	Vakkhete vualzawl in na om ding ua, inn a hong lutte leng vualzawl in na om ding uh.
05028007	Na melma nou hon doute Toupa'n ahon zohsak dia; nou hon dou ding in lampi khat ah ahong kuan ding ua, lampi sagih ah ataikek ding uh.
05028008	Toupa'n na buh inn tung uah, na khut koihna tengteng uah vualzawlna thu ape dia; Toupa na Pathian un ahon gam piak ah ahon vualzawl ding hi.
05028009	Na kiang ua ana kichiam bang in Toupa'n amah a ding in nam siangthou ding in ahon hihkip ding, Toupa na Pathian uh thupiakte na zuih ua, alampite na zuih phot uleh.
05028010	Huchi in leitung a mite'n Toupa min a sap na hi uh, chih athei ding ua, hon lau ding uhi.
05028011	Nou piak dia na pi-le-pute uh Toupa'n ana chiam gam ah na gil ua gah, na ganhon gah leh na leigah uh Toupa'n nakpitak in apungsak ding.
05028012	Toupa'n ahun geihgeih in na gam uh vak ding, vuahtui hon pe ding leh na khut koihna tengteng uh hon vualzawl ding in, avan goubawm hoih akihongsak ding hi. Huchi in nam tampi na leitawisak ding ua, nou bel na leitawi kei ding uhi.
05028013	Toupa'n amei hilou in, alu in hon bawl dia, anuainung hilou in, atungnung na hi ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian uh thupiak, tuni a ka hon piak ngaikhia a, pilvangtak a na zuih uleh.
05028014	Tuni a ka hon thupiak mah bang a taklam hiam, veilam hiam a pathian dangte zui leh nasem dia na pialsan kei peuhmah uleh.
05028015	Himahleh hichi ahong hi ding a, Toupa na Pathian uh aw hoihtak a na ngaihkhiak louh ua, tuni a ka hon piak thupiak tengteng pilvangtak a na zuih kei uleh, na tung uah hiai hamsia tengteng ahong tung dia, ahon pha nawn ding uhi.
05028016	Inn lam leh gam lam ah hamsia na thuak ding uh.
05028017	Na bawm uh leh na tanghou mekna kuang uh hamsethuak in a-om ding uh.
05028018	Na gilgahte, na leigahte leh na bawngpi uh leh na belamhon gahte hamsethuak in a-om ding uh.
05028019	Na pawtkhete uh hamsethuak in a-om ding ua, ahong lutte leng hamsethuak in a-om ding uh.
05028020	Toupa'n na tung uah, na khut koihna tengteng uah hamsia, buaina leh salhna ahon sawl dia, na vuallel ding ua, na mangthang pah ding uh; na thilhih giloute ua kei na hon paisan ziak un.
05028021	Luah dia na lutna gam ua kipan ahon hihmanthat masiah Toupa'n na lak uah hipi alengsak gige ding hi.
05028022	Toupa'n kumzawnna, khosik, bawkna, sat huthutna, namsau, keuna leh muatna in hon gawt dia, na manthat vek masiah uh hiaite'n hon delh ding uhi.
05028023	Na lutung ua van dal ahi dia, na nuai ua lei sik ahi ding.
05028024	Toupa'n na gam vuah uh leivui leh vut asuaksak ding a; na manthat masiah uh van a pan na tung uah ahong ke ding hi.
05028025	Toupa'n na melmate uh lak ah hon hihniam dia; amaute dou ding in lampi khat ah na kuankhe ding ua, lampi sagih ah na taikek ding uh. Leitung a lalgamte lak ah paihkhiak in na om ding uhi.
05028026	Na luang uh tungleng vasa tengteng leh gamsa tengteng nek ding an ahi dia, mi kuamah in amaute adelhmang kei ding uh.
05028027	Hihdam theih louh Aigupta meimatum, chithak, bawkna leh vunthak in Toupa'n ahon gawt ding hi.
05028028	Haina, mittawtna leh lunglelhna in Toupa'n ahon gawt ding.
05028029	Mittaw in khomial amaimai bang in, sun khovak nangawn ah na maimai ding ua, na khosakna uah na lamzang kei ding uh. Nuaisiah ding leh gallak ding phet na hi ding ua, hon hunkhe ding kuamah a-om kei ding uhi.
05028030	Zi na kham ding ua, midang in akithuahpih ding uh. Inn na lam ding ua, na luah kei ding uh. Grephuan na bawl ding ua, agah na ne kei ding uh.
05028031	Na mitmuh un na bawngtal uh hon gohsak ding ua, asa na ne kei ding uh. Na mitmuh un na sabiltung uh thagum a suhsak na hi ding ua, piakkik na hi kei ding uh. Na belam uh na melmate uh piak ahi ding; hon hunkhe ding kuamah na nei kei ding uh.
05028032	Na tanute uh leh na tapate uh namdangte piak ahi ding ua, nitum in amaute ngai in na en vungvung ding ua, na etetna lam un na mitte uh avai ding; bangmah lah hihtheih na nei kei ding uhi.
05028033	Na leigah, na sepkhiak teng uh na theih louh uh nam in ane khin dia, hihgentheih leh hihsiat in na om gige ding uh.
05028034	Huchi in hiai thil mu in na hailoh ding uhi.
05028035	Toupa'n na khuk uah, na khe uah, hihdam theih louh meimatum ahon veisak ding, na khepek ua kipan na lusip tanpha un.
05028036	Nou leh na kumpipa uh nangawn in na pi-le-pute'n atheih ngei louh uh nam kiang ah Toupa'n ahon pi dia; huai ah pathian dangte, sing leh suang pathiante nna na sem ding uh.
05028037	Toupa'n hon pimangna ding nam tengteng lak ah lamdang chih leh paunak leh aselam a gentehna na hong hi ding uhi.
05028038	Lou ah buhchi tampi na kuankhiakpih ding ua, tawmchik kia na la ding uh, khaupe in anegai vek ding hi.
05028039	Grephuan na bawl ding ua, na kem ding ua, himahleh a-uain na dawn kei ding uh. Grep lah na lou kei ding uh, lung in anegai ding hi.
05028040	Na gam tengteng uah olive sing na suan ding ua, himahleh athau na nilh kei ding uh, na olive gahte uh apulh khin ding hi.
05028041	Tanu tapa na suang ding ua, himahleh sal a kaihmang a, a-om ding ziak un na ompih kha kei ding uh.
05028042	Na theikung tengteng uh leh na leigah tengteng uh khaupe an ahi ding.
05028043	Gamdangmi na lak ua tengte na tung uah asang hiaihiai ding ua, nou na niam giaigiai ding uh.
05028044	Ahon leitawisak ding ua, nou zaw na leitawisak kei ding uh. Amau alu ahi ding ua, nou amei na hi ding uh.
05028045	Hiai hamsia tengteng na tung uah ahong tung dia, ahon delh dia, ahon pha dia; hihmanthat a na om masiah uh; athupiak leh adan hon piak zui dia Toupa na Pathian aw na ngaihsak louh ziak un.
05028046	Na tung uah leh na suante uh tung ah tangtawn a dia chiamtehna leh lamdang chih ding in a-om ding uhi.
05028047	Thil bangkim a na hong kiningchin ua leng Toupa na Pathian uh lungsim kipaktak leh nuamsatak a na sepsak louh ziak un.
05028048	Huaiziak in noute hon dou dia Toupa'n ahon sawl ding na melmate uh gilkial, dangtak leh vuaktang leh thil bangkim tasam kawm in na sepsak ding uh. Ahon hihsiat masiah uh na ngawng uah sik hakkol ahon batsak ding uhi.
05028049	Gamlapi a pan, kawlmong a pan nou hon dou ding nam, Toupa'n muvanlai ngumkiak bang in ahon sawl ding; apau uh na theih louh uh nam;
05028050	nam lauhuai melpu, upa leng khawk sa lou leh tuailaite leng deihsak tuam lou.
05028051	Na ganhon pungte leh na leigah, na manthat masiah uh ane ding ua, buh, uain, thau, na bawnghon leh na belamhonte uh ahawi kei ding uh, na tung ua manna ahon tunsak tan in.
05028052	Na gam tengteng ua na muanpen uh, na kulhsangte uh achip tan in na kulh kongpi tengteng uah ahon um ding ua, Toupa na Pathian un nou ahon piak na gam tengteng ua na kulh kongpi tengteng uh ahong um ding uhi.
05028053	Na melmate'n hon umbichilh ziak un leh ahon hihmangbatna uah na gil ua gah, Toupa'n ahon piak na tanu, na tapate sa na ne ding uhi.
05028054	Na lak ua minunnem leh chingkam nangawn in leng a-unaupa, ahihkeileh azi it, a-ompih lai atate ngialtak leng a-it kei ding hi.
05028055	Bangmah aneih nawn louh ziak in atate uh sa anek ding kuamah ape kei ding hi. Ahon umna uh leh ahon khelhchipna uah, na melmate'n na kulh kongpi ua ahon khelhchip ziak un.
05028056	Na lak ua numei chinou leh chingek, achinouna leh achingekna ziak a lei leng sik nuam lou in apasal deih mahmah uh, atapate, atanute;
05028057	apom lai atasen leh ata piang lai dingte leng a-en moh ding uh. Bangkim ataksap khit ziak in asimnek ding; na melmate'n na kulh kongpi ua ahon lungkiaksak ziak un.
05028058	Toupa na Pathian uh min thupitak leh lauhuaitak na lauhtheihna ding ua, hiai laibu a tuang thu tengteng pilvangtak a na zuih kei uleh;
05028059	Toupa'n noute leh na suante uh tung ah hipi lamdangtak, hipi leng gige, damlouhna haksatak leng gige chi a lengsak ding hi.
05028060	Na lauh mahmah uh Aigupta gam hiite na tung uah alengsak nawn dia, hon lenkip ding uhi.
05028061	Hiai dan laibu a tuanglou, damlouhna hii chiteng leng na manthat masiah uh Toupa'n na tung uah alengsak ding hi.
05028062	Van a aksi zah hita noute tawmchik kia na hong hita ding uh; Toupa na Pathian aw na man louh ziak un.
05028063	Huan hichi ahi ding a, hon hihhoih ding leh hon pungsak dia Toupa na tung ua akipah bang in, hon hihmang ding leh bangmah lou hon suah ding in Toupa na tung uah akipak dia, na va luah ding uh na lutna gam ua kipan suanmang na hi ding uhi.
05028064	Toupa'n kawlmong a pan kawlmong langkhat tan in chi chih lak ah hon hihdalh dia, huai ah sing leh suang, na pi uh leh pute uh tan a na theih ngei louh uh pathian dangte nna na sem ding uhi.
05028065	Hiai namte lak ah tawldamna na mu kei ding ua, na khe uh a ding in khawlna a-om kei dia; huai ah, Toupa'n lungtang ling, mit gim leh lungsim ngui hon pe zaw ding hi.
05028066	Na hinna uh lauthawng gige in a-om dia, sun leh zan in lau gige in na om ding ua, na hinna un kitheihchetna anei kei ding hi.
05028067	Zingsang in, “Nitak hita maileh aw!” na chi ding ua, nitak in, “Zingsang hita maileh aw!” na chi ding uh, “Thil lauhuai na lungtang un alauh ding ziak leh na mit ua na thil muh ding uh ziak in.
05028068	Na mu nawn kei ding uh, na kiang ua ka chih lampi ah long in Aigupta gam ah Toupa'n ahon pi nawn ding. Huai ah na melmate uh sikhapa ding leh sikhanu dia zuak na hi ding ua, kuamah in ahon lei kei ding uh,” achi hi.
05029001	Horeb tang a akiang ua thu akhun sim louh, Toupa'n Moab gam a Israel suante kiang a Mosi thu akhunsak, athukhun thu hiaite ahi.
05029002	Mosi in Israel mi tengteng asam a, akiang uah, Aigupta gam a Pharaoh, asikha tengteng leh agam tengteng tung a na mitmuh ngei ua Toupa'n thil ahih tengteng na mu uhi.
05029003	Khemna thupi mahmahte, chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte na mit mahmah ua na muh uh.
05029004	Himahleh Toupa'n tuni tan in theisiam ding lungtang, mu thei ding mitte, za thei ding bilte ahon pe nai kei hi.
05029005	Gamdai ah kum sawmli ka hon pi a; na puansilhte uh na silhtul kei ua, na khedapte uh leng na buntul kei lai uhi.
05029006	Kei, Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chih na theihna ding un tanghou na ne kei ua, uain hiam zu khauh hiam leng na dawn kei uhi.
05029007	Hiai mun na hong tun un Heshbon kumpipa Sihon leh Bashan kumpipa Og hon dou ding in ahong kuan ua, amau i na zou uh.
05029008	Agam uh i la ua, Reubente, Gadte, Manasseh nam kimkhatte luah ding in i pia uhi.
05029009	Na thilhih tengteng ua na lamzan zel theihna ding un hiai thukhun thute pom unla, zui un.
05029010	Tuni in na vek un, na nam lupente uh, na upate uh, na heutute uh leh Israel mi tengteng, Toupa na Pathian ma ah na dingh ua;
05029011	na taneute uh, na zite uh, na tenna ua gamdangmi na ompih uh, na singphukmi uh leh na tui tawi mite uh nangawn in;
05029012	Toupa na Pathian uh kichiamna leh athukhun tuni a nou toh abawl a na luttheihna ding un:
05029013	Na pipute uh Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a ana kichiam bang leh na kiang ua ana gensa bang a amite hi ding a tuni a hon hihkip theihna ding leh na Pathian uh ahihtheihna ding in;
05029014	hiai kichiamna leh thukhun na kiang kia ua khung ka hi kei;
05029015	tuni a Toupa i Pathian uh ma a dinghte leh tua i kiang ua omloute kiang ah leng ahi.
05029016	Aigupta gam a i omdan, namdangte pal paisuak a i paidan bang uh na thei ua;
05029017	alak ua athilkihhuaite uleh amilimte uh, sing leh suang, dangka chi leh dangka-eng leng na mu uh.
05029018	Huchi lou in zaw na lak ua pasal hiam, numei hiam, inkuan hiam, nam hiam, huai pathiante be ding in alungtang un tu in Toupa i Pathian uh kiheisan in, na lak uah thil kha leh gamsai selkhiakna bulte na hong om kha ding uh.
05029019	Huchi ahihleh zaw, hiai hamsia thu samte azaktak in, amah kivualzawl tawm in, “Paupeng in pai teitei leng le ka bit na ding,” chi in akingaihtuah kha ding.
05029020	Toupa'n angaidam het kei dia, Toupa hehna leh amullitna in huai mi akhuh dia, hiai laibu a hamse tuang tengteng atung ah atung dia, Toupa'n van nuai a pan amin athaimang zaw ding hi.
05029021	Hiai Dan Bu a tuang hamsia thukhun tengteng bang in Israel nam tengteng lak a pan hihtuam in thil hoih lou lam ah Toupa'n akhenkhe ding hi.
05029022	Khangthak hong om ding, na nung ua na tate uh hong om ding leh gam gamlapi a pan a hong pai dingte'n, huai gam a hipi leh Toupa'n natna aveisakte amu ding uhi.
05029023	Agam pumpi mei katsiat leh chi leh kat a dim, haichi lah kipawi lou, bangmah pou lou, sing leh lou bangmah om lou ahi ding. Toupa heh leh thangpaihna Sodom leh Gomorrah, Admah leh Zeboim alumlet lai a siatna bangmah ahi ding.
05029024	“Nam teng in bangziak in ahia hiai gam hichi tel a Toupa'n abawl? Hiai thangpaihna thupi bangchidan ahia?” achi ding uh.
05029025	Mite'n, “Aigupta gam a pan apikhiak lai a Toupa , apipute uh Pathian thukhun amau toh akhun amangngilh ziak un.
05029026	pathian dangte, atheih ngei louh uh pathiante, ama'n asehsak louhte nna sem a, abiak ziak un.
05029027	Hiai laibu a tuang hamsia tengteng tungsak ding in hiai gam tung ah Toupa aheh hi.
05029028	Thangpai, heh leh thangpai mahmah in agam ua kipan abotkhe vek a, gamdang ah asawnlut hi, tua a-omdan bang uh,” achi ding uhi.
05029029	Thil kiselte Toupa i Pathian a ahi, thil kiphoulakte bel hiai dan thu tengteng i zuihtheihna dia eite leh i suante a ahi gige ding ahi.
05030001	Huan hichi ahi ding a, hiai thil tengteng na ma ua ka omsak, vualzawlna leh hamsiate na tung ua ahong tun a, Toupa'n hon delhzakna nam tengteng lak a na theihkhiak nawn ua,
05030002	Toupa na Pathian lam na ngat nawn ua, tua thu ka hon piak bang a nou leh na tate uh toh na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua a-aw na zuih hun chiang un.
05030003	Toupa na Pathian un na sal hihna uh ahihmang dia, ahon hehpih dia, Toupa na Pathian un nam chih lak a hon dalhsakna a pan hon pikhawm nawn ding hi.
05030004	Na lak ua mi van nuai tawp pha a delhkhiak a-om uleh, Toupa na Pathian un huai a pan hon pikhawm dia, huai a pan hon pikhe ding hi.
05030005	Toupa na Pathian un na pi-le-pute un aluah gam ah hon pilut nawn dia, na luah ding uh. Ama'n hon lamzangsak dia, na pi-le-pute uh khup in hon pungsak ding hi.
05030006	Na hintheihna ding ua Toupa na Pathian uh na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua na it theihna ding un, Toupa na Pathian un na lungtang uh leh na suante lungtang hon sumsak ding hi.
05030007	Toupa na Pathian un hiai hamsia tengteng hon simmohte, na melmate uh leh hon hote tung ah atungsak ding hi.
05030008	Na hong kihei nawn ding ua, Toupa aw na zui ding ua, tuni a thu ka hon piak, athupiak tengteng na zui ding uhi.
05030009	Toupa na Pathian un na khut ngakna tengteng uah, na gil ua gah ah, na ganhon gah uah leh na gam gah uah hoih atungsak dia, na pi-le-pute uh tung a akipah bang in na tung uah Toupa akipak nawn ding hi.
05030010	Hiai Dan Bu a tuang athupiakte, adante zui dia Toupa aw na zuih ua, na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng ua Toupa na Pathian uh lam na ngat phot uleh.
05030011	Hiai thupiak, tua ka hon piak nou a ding in ahaksa lo kei a, gamlat leng hon gamlat kei hi.
05030012	I zak ua i zuihtheihna ding in, “Kua ahia van a hon kahsak a, hon laksak ding?” chih ding in van a om ahi kei hi.
05030013	I zak ua i zuihtheihna ding in tuipi gal ah, “Kua'n ahia hon va hohsak dia, hon laksak ding?” chih ding in tuipi gal a om leng ahi sam kei.
05030014	Na zuihtheihna ding un thu in ahon naih mahmah a, na kam uh leh na lungtang uah a-om hi.
05030015	“Tu in na ma uah hinna leh hoih, sihna leh hoih lou ka koih hi.
05030016	Toupa na Pathian uh it ding, alampi zui ding, athupiak, adan, avaihawm, zui dia tua ka hon thupiak na zuih uleh na hing ding ua, na hong pung ding ua, na va luah ding uh gam ah Toupa na Pathian un hon vualzawl ding hi.
05030017	Himahleh na lungtang uh akiheimang a, na ngaihkhiak kei ua, pimang a na om ua, pathian dangte na biak ua, a-nna uh na sep uleh;
05030018	na mangthang ngeingei ding uh, chih tu in ka hon hilh ahi. Jordan lui kan a, luah ding a na va lutna gam uah na damsawt kei ding uhi.
05030019	Na ma uah hinna leh sihna, vualzawlna leh hamsia ka koih chih tu a hon theihpih ding in lei leh van ka sam ahi. Huchi in hinna tel un, na hinna ding un nou leh na suante uh toh.
05030020	Toupa na Pathian uh it in, a-aw zui in, amah len tinten un, amah na hinna uh, na damsawtna uh lah ahi ngal a. Huchi in na pu uh Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a kichiam a piak gam ah na teng ding uhi,” achi hi.
05031001	Huan Mosi in, Israel mite teng kiang ah hiai thu agen hi.
05031002	“Tu in kum za-le-sawmnih ka hita a; ka vialvak zou nawn kei. Toupa'n ‘Hiai Jordan lui na kan kei ding,’ ahon chi hi.
05031003	Toupa na Pathian un na ma uh api dia, hiai namte ahon hihsiatsak dia, agam uh na luah ding uh. Toupa'n ana gensa bang in Joshua in na ma uh api ding hi.
05031004	Toupa'n Amorte kumpipa, Sihon leh Og leh agam tung ua ahih bang in atung uah ahih dia; amaute ahihse ding hi.
05031005	Toupa'n amaute ahon pe dia, thu ka hon piak thupiak tengteng atung uah na hih ding uhi.
05031006	Kuhkaltak leh hangsantak in om un. Lau kei unla, kihta sam kei un. Na kiang ua hon pepa Toupa na Pathian uh ahi ngal a. Ahon vuallelsak kei dia, pai leng hon paisan kei hial ding,” achi hi.
05031007	Mosi in Joshua asam a, Israel mi tengteng mitmuh in akiang ah, “Hattak leh hangsantak in om in. Hiai mite toh akiang ua api-le-pute uh Toupa'n kichiam a piak ana chiamsa gam ah na lut ngeingei ding ua, amaute na luahsak ding ahi.
05031008	Na ma uh pipa Toupa ahi dia, na kiang ah a-om zel dia, ahon vuallelsak kei dia, pai leng hon paisan kei hial ding hi. Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n,” achi hi.
05031009	Mosi in dan agelh a, Toupa thukhun bawm zawng Levi tapa siampute leh Israel upate tengteng apia hi.
05031010	Mosi in, amau thu apia a, “Kum sagih kum, ngaihdam kum teng a Biakbuk Ankuangluina,
05031011	mun aseh dia Israel mi tengteng Toupa na Pathian uh ma a hong kilat chiang un, hiai dan Israel tengteng zak in na sim ding uh ahi.
05031012	Mipite, numei leh pasal, na taneu chikchikte uh, na ompih uh gamdang mite, amau angaihkhiak ua, akisin ua, Toupa na Pathian uh laudan asiam ua, hiai dan thu tengteng pilvangtak a azuihtheihna ding uh leh
05031013	atate uh athei nailoute'n leng azak ua, Jordan lui kan a na va luah ding uh gam a na ten sung teng ua Toupa na Pathian uh laudan siam akisintheihna ding un samkhawm in,” achi hi.
05031014	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai in, na sih hun ahong naita; Joshua sam inla, kihoupihna biakbuk ah va kihil in, amau thu ka pe ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Mosi leh Joshua ahoh ua, kihoupihna biakbuk ah ava kihil uhi.
05031015	Toupa puanin ah meipi ding in akilak a; meipi ding puanin kongpi lutung ah adingh hi.
05031016	Toupa'n Mosi kiang ah, “Ngai in, na pi-le-pute kiang ah na ihmu ding hi. Hiai mite athou ding ua, ava tenna dingte uh lak ah huai gam pathiante lak ah ang a kawm ding ua, ahon lehngatsan ding ua, ka thukhun akiang ua ka khun abohse ding uh.
05031017	Huchi in huai ni in atung uah ka heh dia, ka lehngatsan dia, ka kibuk mangsan dia, hihsiat in a-om ding uh. Thil hoih lou leh mangbatna tampi atung uah atung ding hi. Huchi in huai ni in, i Pathian uh i lak ua a-om louh ziak in hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua hong tung ahi kei maw? achi ding uh.
05031018	Pathian dangte lam nga a thil hoih lou ahih ding tengteng uh ziak in huai ni in ka kibuksan ngeingei ding hi.
05031019	Huaiziak in tu in ‘hiai la gelh inla, Israel suante sinsak inla, akam uah koih in. Hiai la Israel suante kalhna a kei a dia theihpihtu ahihtheihna ding in.
05031020	Api-le-pute uh kiang a kichiam a ka chiam, nawitui leh khuaizu luang gam ah ka pi a, ne leh ta in a-om ua, atai ua, ahong thau hial chiang un pathian dangte lam anga ding ua, a-nna uh asem ding ua, kei hon hehsak ding ua, ka thukhun abohse ding uh’.
05031021	Huan hichi ahi ding a, thil hoih lou leh mangbatna tampi atung ua ahong tun chiang in, hiai la akhelhna uh theihpihtu ahi ding. Asuante kam a pan mangngilh theih ahi kei ding hi. Tu in ka kichiam gam a ka pilut ma him in leng alunggel uh akawidan ka thei hi,” achi hi.
05031022	Huchi in Mosi in, huai la, huai ni mahmah in agelh a, Israel suante asinsak hi.
05031023	Nun tapa Joshua kiang ah hiai thupiak apia hi. “Hattak leh hangsantak in om in. Israel suante kiang a ka kichiam bang in huai gam ah na pilut ding hi. Na kiang ah ka om ding,” achi hi.
05031024	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mosi in hiai dan thute laibu agelh khit a mansa ahih vek nung in,
05031025	Toupa thukhun bawm zawng Levite Mosi in thu apia hi.
05031026	“Hiai Dan Bu la unla, noute kalh a theihpihtu hi ding in Toupa na Pathian uh thukhun bawm sik ah koih un.
05031027	Na helhatdan uh leh na paupendan uh ka thei hi. Ngai un, tua ka hon dampih lai a bawn Toupa tung a hel na hi ua; ka sih nung ngial in houh bangchi phet in anasazaw diam aw?
05031028	“Abil ua zak a hiai thu ka gen a, noute kalh a theihpihtu dia lei leh van ka saptheihna ding in na nam ua intekpen tengteng leh na heutute uh hon samkhawm un.
05031029	Ka sih nung in nakpitak in na kihihse ding ua, ka hon thupiak lampi a pan na pial ding uh chih ka thei kilkel hi. Atawp chiang ngial in houh thil hoih lou in hon buakkhum dia; na khut thilhih ua hihheh ding in Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih ding ziak un,” achi hi.
05031030	Mosi in, Israel kikhawmkhawm tengteng zak in hiai la thu abul a pan atawp pha in agen vek hi.
05032001	Bil na doh un, vante aw, ka gen ding hi. Lei aw, ka kam a thu za in.
05032002	Vuahtui bang in ka thu azu ding a, Daitui bang in ka thugen atak ding. Loupa nou dipdip tung a vuah bang leh lounah tung a vuah phin bang in.
05032003	Toupa min ka puan ding ziak in Thupina i Pathian pia un.
05032004	Amah suangpi ahi, Athilhih adik kim sipsip hi. A-omdan tengteng dan ahi. Pathian muanhuai, thulimlouhna nei lou, diktat leh hoih ahi.
05032005	Amau leh amau akihihsia ua, atate ahi kei uh, gensiat alohna uh ahi, suan gina lou leh genhak ahi uhi.
05032006	Mihai leh pilloute aw, huchi in maw, Toupa na thuk ding uh? Nou hon suang, na pa uh ahi kei maw? Ahon bawl a, ahon dingkipsak hi.
05032007	Nidanglai nite theigige inla, suan tampi kumte ngaihtuah dih. Na pa dong in, ahon kawkmuh ding, na upate'n leng ahon hilh ding uhi.
05032008	Tungnungpen in namte gam apiak lai a, mihing tate akhen lai in namte gamgi Israel suante zah in akhung hi.
05032009	Toupa tantuan zaw amite ahi ua; Jakob lah agoutan ahi.
05032010	Gamdai gam ah amu a, gamdai sia mau honhon ah, akim ua omkhum in akem a, Amit laivom bang in akem hi.
05032011	Muvanlai in abu a anou tokthou a, anou tung ah kha azap a, akhate azak a, atuah a, akha a apuak bang in;
05032012	Gamdang pathian hilou in Toupa kia in api zel hi.
05032013	Lei mun sangte ah atuangsak a, lou a thil tung ane zel a; suangpi a pan khuaizu akikhohkhesak zel a, suang tak a pan thau toh;
05032014	Ganhon a pan nawitui khal, belamhon a pan nawitui, belamnou thau toh, Bashan uain na dawn ding.
05032015	Himahleh Jeshurun ahong thau a, ahong kipek a; na thau a, na sapha a, na maitai a; abawlpa Pathian alehngatsanta, hotdamna Suangpi angaineu hi.
05032016	Gamdang pathiante'n i Pathian mullitna atokthou a, thilkihhuai in ahehsak hi.
05032017	Pathian hilou, dawite kiang ah atheih ngei louh uh pathiante kiang ah, ahong khonung om phing pathian thakte, na pi, na pute un akihtak ngei louh uh kiang ah.
05032018	Nang hon suang Suangpi na ngaisang kei, nang hon bawlpa Pathian na mangngilh lai hi.
05032019	Huai Toupa'n amu a, amudah a, atanu leh tapate'n ahihheh ziak un.
05032020	Ka bukmang san dia, atawpna uh bang ahi dia chih ka en ding, achi hi. Suan thulim lou ginna nei lou tate ahi uhi.
05032021	Pathian hilou thil in ka mullitna atokthou ua; athil gina lou un ahon hehsak uh; chi a genlouhte ka mullitsak dia, nam haite in ka hehsak ding hi.
05032022	Ka hehna akuang a, gawtmun nuainungpen tan in akang a, lei leh athilpung akang ding, tangte kingaknate mei in akang ding hi.
05032023	Atung uah siatna ka chiangkhawm dia, atung uah thal ka khah ding.
05032024	Gilkial in agongthak ding ua, meisa leh siatna in akangmang ding ua, atung uah gamsa hate ka sawl dia, leivui agulte gu toh.
05032025	Nungak, tangval, nawi ne lai, lu a kelsam poute tanpha in polam ah namsau in asi ding ua, sunglam ah launa in.
05032026	Ke'n, ka delhzak vek ding, mihing lak a amau theihgigena ka hihmang vek ding.
05032027	Melma thangpaihna lau lou hi leng, amelmate un theikhial in, i khut uh tawisang in a-omta, huai teng Toupa hih ahi kei, achi kha ding uhi, ka chi hi.
05032028	Pilna nei lou namte ahi ua, amau ah theihsiamna a-om kei.
05032029	Aw, pil le uh hiaite atheisiam ding ua, atunung thu uh ngaihtuah ding hi ve un!
05032030	Bangchi in khat in sang adelh dia, nih in sing ataikeksak ding ua, a Suangpi un amaute akhawng khinta hi, Toupa'n amaute apiakkhiak kei ngalleh?
05032031	Asuangpi uh lah i melmate mahmah theihdan in leng i Suangpi bang ahi kei hi.
05032032	Agrepgui uh Sodom grepgui ahi a, aloute uh Gomorrah loute ahi. Agrepte uh sinkha grepte ahi uh, agahbomte akha hi.
05032033	A-uainte uh dragon gu leh gulgial gu khatak ahi.
05032034	Hiai ka kholkhawm, ka goubawm a bilh bikbek ahi kei maw?
05032035	Phulak leh thuk zaw kei hih ding ahi, asiksan uh ateu hun chiang in; asiatna ni uh ahong naita, atung ua thil hong tung dingte ahong tungpahta ding hi.
05032036	Toupa'n amite avaihawm ding, asikhate leng alainat ding, athilhihtheihna uh abei chih leh kuamah sikha leh noplen a-om kei, chih amuh chiang in.
05032037	Ama'n apathiante uh koi ah, amuan suangpi uh koi ah;
05032038	akithoihna thau netute, adawn thillat uain dawntute? Hong thou in nou hong panpih uhenla, nou hon humbittute hi le uh ake, achi ding.
05032039	Kei, kei mahmah ka hihthei unla, pathian dang a-om kei. Ka that a, ka hingsak a, ka liamsak a, ka damsak hi. Ka khut a pan noute hon hunkhe thei kuamah a-om kei uhi
05032040	Van lam ah ka khut ka zak a, keimah ka hin bang in ka kichiam hi.
05032041	Ka namsau tat-hiam a, ka khut a vaihawmna ka letleh ka melmate tung ah phu ka la dia, kei hon hote ka thuk ding hi.
05032042	Ka thaltangte asisan uah ka diah dia, ka namsau in sa teng ka that bei dia; thahte leh salte sisan toh melmate tung a phulakna a kipan, achi ding hi.
05032043	Aw, nou nam chihte aw, amite toh kipak un; asikhate sisan phuba ala ding hi. Amah doute tung ah phu ala ding, agam leh amite a ding in kilemna bukim abawl ding.
05032044	Huchi in mipite zak in Mosi leh Nun tapa, Joshua in hiai la thu tengteng agen uhi.
05032045	“Mosi in huai thu tengteng Israel mi tengteng kiang a agen khit in, akiang uah;
05032046	Tua na kiang ua ka hon thu theihsak ah na lungtang uh koihkip unla, hiai dan tengteng pilvang mahmah a zui ding in na tate uh thu pia un.
05032047	Nou a ding in thil bangmah lou lel ahi kei a, na hinna uh ahi ngal a. Hiai thilhih in luah dia Jordan na va galkahna gam uah na damsawt ding uhi,” achi hi.
05032048	Huai ni mah in Toupa'n Mosi ahoupih a,
05032049	“Moab gam a Jeriko zawn a Abarim tang dung a Nebo tang ah va hohtou inla, Israel suante luah dia ka piak Kanaan gam va gal-et in.
05032050	Na sanggampa Aaron Hor tang a si a, achipihte kiang a pi ahih tak mah bang in na kahtouh na tang ah na si dia, na chipihte kiang a pi na hita ding hi.
05032051	Zin gamdai a Meribah-kadesh tui munte a Israel suante lak a ka tung a na khelh ziak in leh Israel suante lak a na hon pahtawi louh ziak in.
05032052	Tua gam na va galmuh dia; himahleh Israel suante ka piak gam ah na lut kei ding,” achi hi.
05033001	Hiai vualzawlna in ahi Pathian mipa Mosi in asih ma a Israel suante avualzawlna:
05033002	“Sinai a pan Toupa ahong pai a, Seir a pan akiang uah athoukhia a, Paran tang a kipan hong vakkhia in, Mi Siangthou singkhat lak a pan ahong pai; akhut taklam a pan amau a ding in meikuang bang dan a-om.
05033003	Ahi, amite a-it a, Mi Siangthou tengteng na khut ah a-om uh. Na khebul ah atu ua; na thute azui chiat ding uh.
05033004	Mosi in eite dan ahon pia, Jakob mipite gouluah ding.
05033005	“Jeshurun ah amah kumpipa ahi, mipite intekpen leh Israel chi tengteng a-omkhawm lai un.”
05033006	“Reuben hing hen, si lou in, amite ahihleh tawm kei uhen.”
05033007	“Hiai Judah vualzawlna ahi. Toupa Judah aw ngaikhia inla, amite kiang ah pilut in. Amah a ding in akhut kiching henla, nang amelmate doupihpa hi in.”
05033008	Levi tungthu ah, “Na Thummim leh na Urim, na misiangthou kiang ah omsak in, Massah ah na ze-et a, Meribah tuite ah na dou hi;
05033009	ka nu leh ka pa ka thei kei, chi in; a-unaute leng athei sam kei hi. Amah tate ngei leng athei tuan kei; na thu apom ua, na thukhun azui ngal ua.
05033010	Na vaihawmte Jakob asinsak ding ua, Israelte, na dan. Na ma ah gimlim akoih ding ua, na maitam ah halmang thillat.
05033011	Aneihte vualzawl in, Toupa , akhut nasepte ana pom inla; amah doute kawng sat inla, amah hote kawng toh, adin nawnlouhna ding un.”
05033012	Benjamin tungthu ah zaw, “ Toupa deihtak zaw akiang ah bit in ateng ding. Nitum in amah akhuh dia, aliangte kikal ah ateng ding.”
05033013	Joseph tungthu ah zaw, “Agam Toupa vualzawl in om hen, van thil mantam daitui in, tui thuk mahmah nuailam a tui in.
05033014	Nisa in apiansak gah manphate leh khapi in a-omsak thil mantamte in.
05033015	“Nidanglai tangte athil deihhuaipente in, tangtawn mual a thil mantamte in.
05033016	Lei leh atung a thil mantamte in, loubuk a ompa deihsakna in. Vualzawlna Joseph lutung ah hong om hen, a-unaute a pan hihtuam a ompa lusip ah.
05033017	Athupina bawngtal piang masa thupina bang ahi a, akiite gam bawngtal kiite bang ahi. Huai in nam chih asi a, kawlmong tan in asi ding. Amaute Ephraim singkhatte ahi ua, Manasseh sangte ahi uhi.”
05033018	Zebulun tungthu ah, “Kipak in, Zebulun, na vakkhiaknate ah, Issakar, na puaninte ah.
05033019	Tang ah chi chih asam ding ua, huai ah diktatna kithoihnate alan ding uh. Tuipi buchinna ne ding ahi ngal ua, piaunel a gou kiselte toh,” achi hi.
05033020	Gad tungthu ah, “Gad hihlianpa phat in om hen, humpinelkai bang in ateng a, aluzang leh aban ahamkek hi.”
05033021	“Amah a ding in ahoihna pen atel a, dan pepa tantuan mun a amah atut ziak in, intekpente toh ahoh a, Toupa vaihawmna dik leh Israelte kiang a vaihawmnate azui hi.”
05033022	Dan tungthu ah, “Dan zaw humpinelkai nou ahi a, Bashan a pan ahong tawm ding.”
05033023	Naphtali tungthu ah, “Naphtali aw, deihsakna a lungkim, Toupa vualzawlna a tai, sim leh tum luah in.”
05033024	Asher tungthu ah, “Asher tapate a vualzawl in om henla, a-unaute lak ah tuitum henla; thau ah akhete diah hen.
05033025	Na khedap sik leh dal ahi dia, na damsung ni bang in na hatna leng a-om ding.”
05033026	“Jeshurun Pathian nang hon panpih dia van a tuang, thupitak a van a tuang bang kua mahmah a-om kei uhi.
05033027	Tangtawn Pathian na kibukna ahi a, nuailam ah atangtawn ban a-om, melmate ahon satmang dia, hihmang in, achi ding hi.
05033028	“Israel bel galmuangtak in amah kia in ateng dia, Jakob tui leh buh leh uain gam ah a-om ding, avante'n leng daitui akesak ding uhi.
05033029	Na hampha hi, aw, Israel, nangmah bang a Toupa'n ahotdam mite kua a-om a? Nang hon panpihpa phaw, na thupina namsau ahi! Na melmate nang ah ahong kipe ding ua, nang amun sangte uh na tuanchil ding hi.”
05034001	Huan Moab Phaizang a pan Jeriko zawn a Nebo tang, Pisgah tang vum ah Mosi ahohtou a; Toupa'n Gilead gam tengteng, Dan pha in a-ensak hi.
05034002	Naphtali leh Ephraim gam tengteng, Manasseh leh Judia gam tengteng, atumlam tuipi pha in.
05034003	Sim gam leh tum khopi Jeriko Phaizang, Zoar pha in.
05034004	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hiai gam ahi Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a, ‘Na suante ka pe ding,’ chi a kichiam a ka na chiam. Muh ahihleh ka hon musak peuhmah a, himahleh huai ah na pai kei ding,” achi hi.
05034005	Huchi in Toupa sikha Mosi, Toupa thu bang in Moab gam ah asita hi.
05034006	Beth-peor zawn a Moab gam phaizang ah avui a; himahleh tuni tan in kuamah in ahan athei kei uh.
05034007	Mosi asih in kum za-le-sawmnih a upa ahi; amit amial kei a, atha leng akiam tuan kei hi.
05034008	Israel suante'n Moab Phaizang ah ni sawmthum Mosi akah ua, huchi in Mosi suun a, akah nite uh hong beita hi.
05034009	Mosi in atung a, akhut akoih ziak in Nun tapa Joshua pilna kha in adim a; Israel suante'n athu azui ua, Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in ahih uhi.
05034010	Huai nung in Israelte lak ah Mosi bang a Toupa'n kimaituah a ahoupih zawlnei himhim a-omta kei;
05034011	chiamtehna leh thillamdang tengteng, Pharaoh leh asikha tengteng kiang leh Aigupta gam tengteng a-ensak a,
05034012	khut hattak leh lauhuai pipi a Israel mi teng mitmuh a Mosi in ahih bang hih a-om kei uhi.
06001001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa sikha Mosi sih nung in Mosi nasempa Nun tapa Joshua kiang ah Toupa'n
06001002	“Ka sikha Mosi asita a; thou inla, nang leh hiai mipi tengteng in Jordan lui kan unla, Israel suante ka piak gam ah pai un.
06001003	Mosi kiang a ka gensa bang in na khepek ua na sikna peuhmah uh ka hon pe vek ding.
06001004	Gamdai a pan leh hiai Lebanon tang a pan lui lianpi Euphrates Luipi pha a, Hitte gam tengteng, nitumna lam a tuipi zatak pha in na gam uh ahi ding.
06001005	Na damsung teng kuamah himhim in hon nangzou kei ding. Mosi kiang a ka om bang in, nang kiang ah leng ka om ding hi. K'on zuausan kei dia, pai leng k'on paisan sam kei ding hi.
06001006	Hattak leh hangsantak in om in; asuante uh kichiam a piak ka na chiamsa gam, hiaite luahsak ding na hi ngal a.
06001007	Ka sikha Mosi in dan tengteng zui dia thu hon piak zui tinten ding in hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in. Na paina teng a na lamzan zel theihna ding in na taklam ah hiam, na veilam ah hiam pialsan het ke'n.
06001008	Hiai Dan Bu in na kam pawtsan het kei hen. Hiai a thu kigelh tengteng na zuih tinten theihna ding in sun leh zan in na ngaihtuah zaw ding ahi. Huchi in na lampite na tuahphasak dia, na hong lamzang ding hi.
06001009	Thu ka hon pia hilou hiam? Hattak leh hangsantak in om in. Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n, Toupa na Pathian na paina teng ah na kiang a om ding ahi,” achi hi.
06001010	Joshua in mipi heutute thu apia a,
06001011	“Giahphual va sik unla, mipite kiang ah, ‘Nek ding sutuah dih ua, ni thum sung a Toupa na Pathian un gam luah dia ahon piak luah ding a Jordan lui kan ding na hih ziak un,’ ” chi in thu ahon pia hi.
06001012	Reubente, Gadte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah Joshua in,
06001013	“ Toupa na Pathian un khawlna ahon pia a, hiai hon pe ding chi a Toupa sikha Mosi in thu hon piak theigige un.
06001014	Na zite uh, na taneu chikchikte leh na ganhonte uh zaw Jordan lui gal a Mosi in gam hon na piak ah a-om ding uh. Nou mihat leh hangsan teng kigalthuamsa in na pai masa ding ua, na unaute uh na panpih ding ua,
06001015	Toupa'n na unaute uh noute bangmah a khawlna apiak a, Toupa na Pathian un hon gam piak amaute'n leng aluah mateng uh. Huchi in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gam nou a tuam ding a hon na piakna lam ah na kik nawn ding ua, na luah ding uh,” achi hi.
06001016	Amau, “Hih dia na hon thupiak tengteng ka hih ding uh, n'on sawlna teng ah leng ka pai ding uh.
06001017	Bang lam peuh a Mosi thu ka zuih bang un, nang thu leng ka zui ding uh. Mosi kiang a Toupa na Pathian a-om bang in nang kiang ah leng om peuhmah phot hen.
06001018	Kuapeuh na thupiak kalh a, hel a, thu na piak peuhmah zui nuam lou zaw hihlup ding ahi. Hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in,” chi in Joshua adawng uhi.
06002001	Huan Nun tapa Joshua in, “Agam leh Jeriko khua va en mah dih ua,” chi in mi nih Sittim a pan asim a enkhe ding asawl hi. Ava hoh ua, kizuak khat, amin Rahab inn ah ava lut ua, huai ah ava zintung uhi.
06002002	“Ngai in, tuzan in gam enkhe ding in Israel suante ahong uh,” chi in Jeriko kumpipa hilh in a-om hi.
06002003	Jeriko kumpipa'n, “Na inn a hong tung mikhualte hon pekhia in. Gam pumpi enkhe ding a hong ahi uh,” chi ding in Rahab kiang ah mi asawl hi.
06002004	Numei in huai mi nihte api a, asel a, akiang uah, “Hi, ka kiang ah mite ahong ngei ngut ua, himahleh koi a pan hong pai ahi ua, chih zaw ka thei kei.
06002005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, khomial, kulh kongpi khak hun lai in huai mite apawtkhe nawnta uh. Koilam ah ahia apai uh ka theita kei hi. Delh meng le uchin, na pha lai ding uh,” achi hi.
06002006	Himahleh inn tung ah apitou a, inn tung a ziza kung siatkhawm lak a sel khin lah ahi ngal a.
06002007	Mite'n Jordan lui lam ah, agalkaina tan in ava delh ua; adelh mite apawtkhiaktak un kulh kongpi akhak uhi.
06002008	Alup ma un inn tung ah akiang uah ava hohtou hi.
06002009	Akiang uah, “Hiai gam Toupa'n nou ahon peta, na lauhhuaina un hon delhkhum a, hiai gam a teng tengteng na ma uah azul khin uh, chih ka thei hi.
06002010	Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtkhiak un Toupa'n Tuipi San ahon hihkangsak a, Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpi nih: Sihon leh Og tung a na hihdante uh, huchibang a na hihmangdante uh lah ka na zata ngal ua.
06002011	Huai ka na zaktak un, ka lungtangte uh azul khin a, noute ziak a lau lou himhim a-om kei hi. Toupa na Pathian u lah tunglam van ah leh nuailam lei ah Pathian ahi.
06002012	“Tu in na tung uah ka hehpihna ka langsakta hi, nou leng ka pa inkote tung ah na hehpihna uh langsak sam un.
06002013	Ka nu leh ka pa, ka sanggam pasalte, ka sanggam numeite leh aneih teng uh hawi unla, sihna lak a pan ka hinna uh hon humbitsak ding in Toupa min in hehpih in ka kiang ah kichiam unla, chiamtehna dik hon pia un,” achi hi.
06002014	Mite'n akiang ah, “Ka thilhih uh na genkhiak kei dingleh na sih tang in ka si ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n gam ahon piak hun chiang in, ka hon hehpih ding ua, na tung ah muanhuaitak in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi.
06002015	Tohlet ah khauhual azankhesuk a; khopi kulhbaang khou a a-inn om ahi a, huan amah kulhbaang tung a teng ahi.
06002016	Akiang uah, “Tang lam zuan in pai un, huchi lou in zaw nou hon delhte'n ahon mu kha ding uh. Huai ah ni thum sung va kibu un; nou hon delhte ahong kik nawn masiah uh. Huai zoh chiang in na pai nawn na ding uh,” achi hi.
06002017	Mite'n akiang ah, “Kichiamna a na hon kichiamsakna ah zaw dembei ka hi ding uh.
06002018	Ngai in, hiai gam ka hong lut chiang un na hon khiakna tohlet ah hiai khau san na gak belh in. Insung ah na kiang ah na pa, na nu, na sanggam teng leh na pa inkote tengteng pilut vek in.
06002019	Huan hichi ahi ding a, na inn kongpi a pan kholak a pawtkhe peuhmah alutung ah asisan a-om dia, kou ahihleh moh in ka om kei ding uh. Kuapeuh insung a na kiang a om peuhmah atung ua khutkhak ahihleh, ka lutung uah asisan uh a-om ding hi.
06002020	Himahleh ka thilhih uh na genkhiakleh na hon kichiamsakna ah moh in ka om kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
06002021	Ama'n, “Na thu bang zel uh hi hen,” achi a; huchi in amau akhakhia a, apaita uhi. Tohlet ah khau san agakden hi.
06002022	Apai ua, huai tang ava tung ua, huai ah ni thum, amau delhte akik nawn masiah uh ava om uhi. Adelh mite'n lamtawn in azong ua, himahleh amuzou kei uh.
06002023	Huai mi nihte akik nawn ua, huai tang a pan apaisuk ua, agalkah ua, Nun tapa Joshua kiang atung ua; atung ua thil tung tengteng ahilh uhi.
06002024	Joshua kiang ah, “ Toupa'n agam pumpi i khut uah ahon na pe petmah ve, huai kia leng hilou, huai gam a tengte i ma uah azul khin uh,” achi uhi.
06003001	Huan Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israel suan tengteng toh Shittim a pan akisuan ua, Jordan lui atung uhi. Agalkah ma un huai ah agiak uhi.
06003002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni thum nung in heutute'n giahphual ava tawn vialvial uhi.
06003003	“ Toupa na Pathian uh thukhun bawm leh siampute, Levi chite'n azawn uh na muh chiang un na omna ua kipan kisuan unla, na zui ding uh ahi.
06003004	Himahleh nou toh akal tehna tong sangnih vel ahi ding ahi. Naih kei unla, huchi in na paina ding lampi na theithei ding uhi. Hiai lampi lah tuma lam in na tawn ngei ngal kei ua,” chi in mipite thu apia uhi.
06003005	Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kihihsiangthou un, zingchiang a Toupa'n na lak ua thillamdang mahmah hih ding ahi,” achi hi.
06003006	Joshua in siampute kiang ah, “Thukhun bawm zawng unla, mipite ma ah galkah un,” achi hi. Huchi in thukhun bawm azawng ua, mipite ma ah apaita uhi.
06003007	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Mosi kiang a ka om bang in na kiang ah ka om ding, chih atheihtheihna ding un, tuni in Israel tengteng mitmuh in ka hon pahtawi pan ding hi.
06003008	Thukhun bawm zawng siampute, Jordan lui gei na tun chiang un, Jordan lui ah dingden un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.
06003009	Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “Hong pai unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu hong ngaikhia un,” achi hi.
06003010	Joshua in, “Hiai ah Pathian hing na lak uah a-om a, na ma uah Kanaante, Hitte, Hivte, Perizte, Girgaste, Amorte leh Jebuste adelhkhe ngeingei ding hi.
06003011	Ngai un, leitung pumpi Toupa thukhun bawm in na ma uah Jordan lui akan hi.
06003012	Israel namte lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih sik in mi khat zel telkhia un.
06003013	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa leitung pumpi Toupa bawm zawng siampute khepek Jordan tui a akingaktak in, saklam a pan Jordan tui hong luangte akitat dia; ahong kiching venvon ding,” achi hi.
06003014	Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite Jordan lui kan dia apuanin ua kipan apawt lai un, mipite ma ah thukhun bawm zawng siampute apai uhi.
06003015	Bawm zawngte Jordan lui ava tung ua, bawm zawng siampute khe in tui gei asiktak in, buhlak sung teng Jordan lui a kuang tengteng ah tui alet gige hi.
06003016	Saklam a pan tuipi luang lai akhawlta a, gamla kuamtak a Zarethan gam chin a Adam ah ahong kiching hi. Arabah tuipi, Chi Tuipi lam a luangsuk lai akitat geih a; huchi in Jeriko khozawntak ah mipite agalkahta uhi.
06003017	Jordan lui lai ah Toupa thukhun bawm zawng siampute leihul ah adingh ua, mipi tengteng Jordan lui agalkah vek uhi.
06004001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, anam pumpi ua Jordan lui agalkah siang nung un, Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah,
06004002	“Mipite lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih a mi khat zel telkhia inla,
06004003	akiang uah, Jordan lui lai, siampute dinna laitak a suangte sawm-le-nih la unla, pophei unla, giahphual, tuzan a na giahna ding uah koih un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.
06004004	Huchi in Joshua in Israel suante lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih a mi khat zel atelkhiakte asam a;
06004005	Joshua in akiang uah, “ Toupa na Pathian uh bawm ma ah Jordan lui lai ah galkah unla, Israel suante anam zah zel in, michih in suang khat chiat pua hen.
06004006	Hiaite na lak uah chiamtehna ahong hi ding a, tunung chiang in na tate un, hiai suangte bang na chihna uh ahia? chi a ahon dot chiang un,
06004007	Nou akiang uah, Toupa thukhun bawm ma a Jordan tuite ahong kan tak ziak in ahi. Jordan akan lai un, Jordan tuite ahong kitat a ahi. Hiai suangte Israel suante'n tangtawn a atheihgigena ding uh ahi, na chi ding uh,” achi hi.
06004008	Israel suante'n Joshua thupiak bang in ahih ua, Israel suante'n anam zah zel in, Jordan lui lai a suang sawm-le-nih ala ua; agiahphual uah, apophei ua, huai ah akoih uhi.
06004009	Thukhun bawm zawng siampute dinna laitak, Jordan lui lai ah Joshua in huai suang sawm-le-nihte aphut a; huaite tuni tan in a-om lai uhi.
06004010	Mosi in Joshua thu ana piak tengteng bang a Toupa'n mipite kiang a hih dia Joshua thu apiak ahihzoh vek mateng uh siampu bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai ah adingh nilouh uhi. Mipite akinoh ua, agalkahta uhi.
06004011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng agalkah siang vek nung un, Toupa bawm leh siampute leng mipi mitmuh in agalkahta uhi.
06004012	Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in akiang ua ana gen khitsa bang in, Israel suante ma ah kigalthuam in agalkah uhi.
06004013	Galvan a kivan dimdiam mi singli vel galdou ding in Jeriko phaizang ah Toupa ma ah agalkah uhi.
06004014	Huai ni in Toupa'n Israel tengteng mitmuh in Joshua atawisang a; Mosi alauh mah bang un adamsung teng in amah alau uhi.
06004015	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah thu agen a:
06004016	“Siampute, thu theihpihna bawm zawngte Jordan lui a pan hong pawt ding in thu pia in,” achi hi.
06004017	Joshua in siampute, “Jordan lui a pan hong pawtta un,” chi in thu apia hi.
06004018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, siampute, Toupa thukhun bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai a pan ahong pawt ua, siampute khete'n leihul asiktak in, Jordan tuite aluan ngeina bang un ahong luang nawn ua, ama a mah bang in akuang ah aluanglet nawn hi.
06004019	Mipite akha khatna, ani sawm ni in Jordan lui a pan apawt ua, Jeriko suahlam pang Gilgal ah giahphual asatta uhi.
06004020	Jordan lui a pan suang sawm-le-nih apuakkhiak uh, Joshua in Gilgal ah aphut hi.
06004021	Israel suante kiang ah, “Tunung chiang a na suante un apate uh kiang a, hiai suangte bang chihna ahia? chi a hon dot chiang un,
06004022	‘Israelte'n Jordan lui leihul ah agalkah ua ahi, chi in na suante uh na theisak ding uhi.’
06004023	Toupa na Pathian un nidanglai a Tuipi San i galkah masiah ua, i ma ua ana kangtatsak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un Jordan tuite na galkah masiah uh na ma uah akangtatsak a ahi.
06004024	Lei a nam chiteng in Toupa khut ana hat ngei, chih atheih ua, Toupa na Pathian uh tangtawn a alauhtheihna ding un,” chi in agen hi.
06005001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan lui khen suahlam a om Amorte kumpipa tengteng leh tuipi gei a om Kanaan gam kumpipa tengtengte'n, agalkah masiah uh Toupa'n Jordan tuite Israel suante ma ah akangtatsak, chih ana zak un, Israel suante ziak in alungtang uh ana zul khin a, lauthawng lou himhim a-om kei uhi.
06005002	Huai lai in Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Temta hiam kibawl inla, Israel suante zek anihveina ding in sumsak in,” achi hi.
06005003	Joshua in temta hiamte akibawl a, Israel suante Gibeth Haraloth ah azek uh asumsak hi.
06005004	Joshua in azeksumna ziak hiai ahi: Aigupta gam a pan pawt tengteng, pasal galdoumi tengteng Aigupta gam a pan apawtkhiak nung un lamkal a gamdai a asih khit tak ziak uh ahi.
06005005	Aigupta gam a pan pawt tengteng zeksumsa vek ahi ua; himahleh Aigupta gam a pan apawt ua gamdai a lamkal a piang tengteng bel zeksum ahi kei uhi.
06005006	Toupa aw angaihkhiak nop louh ziak ua mipi tengteng, Aigupta gam a pan hong pawt galdou mite tan hihman a a-om vek tan un Israel suante gamdai ah kum sawmli avialvak uhi. Toupa'n amau pi-le-pute kiang a nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam kichiam a piak ana chiam, huai gam mu lou ding in akiang uah Toupa ana kichiamta hi.
06005007	Asuante uh amau sik a akhanletsakte Joshua in azek uh asumsak hi. Lamkal a azek uh sum ahih louh ziak in zeksum louh ana hi him uhi.
06005008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng zek asum khit un, adam mateng uh amau giahphual chiat uah a-om uhi.
06005009	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Tuni in Aiguptate'n nou hon muhsitna uh noumau a pan ka khukmangta,” achi hi. Huchi in tuni tan in huai mun Gilgal achi uhi.
06005010	Israel suante'n Gilgal ah giahphual asat ua; Jeriko Phaizang ah huai kha, ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi.
06005011	Paikan khit azing mah in huai gam a tanghou silngou soh louh leh vaimim kan ane uhi.
06005012	Huai gam a buh anek ni zing ua pan manna aketa kei a; Israel suante'n manna leng amu nawn kei uhi. Huai kum in Kanaan gam a buh-le-bal ane zawta uhi.
06005013	Huan Jeriko kho kiangchin a Joshua a-om lai in adak a, a-entou a, ngai in, hichi ahong hi a, amazawn chin ah mi khat anamsau phawisa tawi in ana ding hi. Joshua in ava naih a, akiang ah, “Kou lam a pang na hi hia, ka melmate uh lam a pang?” achi hi.
06005014	Ama'n, “Hilou e, Toupa sepaihte heutu dia hong pai ka hi zaw,” achi hi. Huchi in lei ah Joshua abokkhup a, amah abia a, akiang ah, “Ka toupa'n asikha kiang ah bang gen ding nei ahia?” achi hi.
06005015	Toupa sepaihte heutu in Joshua kiang ah, “Na khepek a pan na khedap phel in. Na dinna mun siangthou ahi,” achi a; huchi in Joshua in aphelta hi.
06006001	Jeriko khua Israel suante ziak in akikhak bikbek a; kuamah apawt kei ua, kuamah leng alut kei uh.
06006002	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “En in, Jeriko leh akumpipa uh leh amihat hangsante uh na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi.
06006003	Galdoumi tengteng in khopi kimvel in khatvei na va velsuak phot ding uh. Huchibang in ni guk sung na hih ding uh ahi.
06006004	Siampu sagih in bawm malam ah belampa kii pengkul sagih atawi ding ua, ani sagih ni in khopi sagihvei na velsuak ding ua, siampute'n pengkul amut ding uh.
06006005	Huan hichi ahi ding a, belampa kii amutging uh na zak chiang un, mipi tengteng ngaihtak in kikou uhen. Huchi in khopi kulhbaang achim dia, mipi amau mazawn chiat ah apaitou ding uh,” achi hi.
06006006	Nun tapa Joshua in siampute asam a, akiang uah, “Thukhun bawm zawng unla, siampu sagih in Toupa bawm malam ah belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi uhen,” achi hi.
06006007	Ama'n mipite kiang ah, “Pai zel unla, khopi velsuak un, mi kigalthuamte Toupa bawm malam ah pai zel uhen,” achi hi.
06006008	Hichi ahong hita a, Joshua in mipite kiang a thu agen khit in Toupa ma a belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai zel ua, pengkul amut ua; Toupa thukhun bawm in azui hi.
06006009	Mi kigalthuamte pengkul mut siampute ma ah apai ua, nungdal mite'n bawm amasuan ua, siampute'n pai kawm in pengkul amut uhi.
06006010	Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou kei unla, na aw uh leng zak hi kei hen. Kikou dia thu ka hon piak ni atun mateng na kam ua pan thu pawt kei hen. Huai hun chiang in na kikou ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi.
06006011	Toupa bawm khopi khatvei velh in avelsuaksak a; giahphual ah apai ua, giahphual ah agiak nawn uhi.
06006012	Joshua zingkhang in athou a, siampute'n Toupa bawm azawng uhi.
06006013	Toupa bawm ma ah belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai ua, pengkul amut uhi. Ama uah mi kigalthuamte apai ua; nungdalte'n Toupa bawm ahon masuan ua, siampute'n apai kawm un pengkul amut uhi.
06006014	Ani nih ni in khopi khatvei avelsuak nawn ua, agiahphual uah akik nawn uh. Huchibang in ni guk ahih uhi.
06006015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in zingkhang, phalvak in athou ua, ahihdan ngei mah un sagihvei avelsuak ua; huai ni kia in khopi sagihvei avelsuak uhi.
06006016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, asagihveina a siampute'n pengkul amuttak un Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou un: Toupa'n khopi ahon pe khinta hi.
06006017	Khopi leh asung a thil om tengteng Toupa hamsiat ahi. Rahab kizuaknu kia, amah leh a-insung a akiang a om tengteng bel i misawlte uh ana sel ziak in hinghawi ding ahi.
06006018	Nou zaw hamsiat thilte a pan kihuikhe hiau un, huchi lou in zaw, hamsiat thilte la in noumau mah hamsiat in na omloh kha ding uhi. Israelte giahphual hamsiat a omsak in na buaisak kha ding uhi.
06006019	Dangkasik, dangka-eng, dal leh sik tui-um belsuan teng ahihleh Toupa a tuam ahi vek hi. Toupa sum in akoih ding ahi,” achi hi.
06006020	Mipite akikou ua, siampute'n pengkul amut uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite'n pengkul ging azaktak un, ngaihtak in akikou ua, kulhbaang achimta hi. Huchi in mipite amazawn chiat uah apaitou ua, khopi ah alut ua, khopi alata uhi.
06006021	Khopi sung a mi tengteng, numei leh pasal, atek-akhang, bawngtal, belam leh sabiltung teng namsau in asatlum vek uhi.
06006022	Joshua in mi nih, gam va enkhete kiang ah, “Huai kizuaknu inn ah va lut unla, akiang a na kichiamsa bang un huai numei leh aneih teng hon pikhia un,” achi hi.
06006023	Enkhe mi tangvalte ava lut ua, Rahab, anu leh pa, asangamte leh aneih teng ahon pikhia ua, atanau teng leng ahon pikhia ua; Israelte giahphual polam ah a-omsak uhi.
06006024	Khopi leh asung a thil om teng mei in ahal vek ua; dangkasik, dangka-eng, sum-eng leh sik tui-um belsuan teng kia Toupa' inn a sumkoihna ah akoih uhi.
06006025	Himahleh Joshua in Jeriko khua enkhe dia amisawlte ana humbit ziak in, Rahab kizuaknu leh aneih teng leh apa inkuante Joshua in ahinghawi vek a; Israelte lak ah tuni tan in ateng lai uhi.
06006026	Huai lai in Joshua in, Hiai Jeriko khopi hon lam nawn peuhmah Toupa ma ah hamsiat in om hen. Asuangphum phummi ta masa leh akulhbaang kongpite tungkhemi ta tumpen leng hamsiat in om hen, chi in amaute ahilh chiatchiat hi.
06006027	Joshua kiang ah Toupa a-om a; gam pumpi ah amin hong thangta hi.
06007001	Himahleh Israel suante hamsiat thilte ah ahong talekta ua, Judah nam a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan in hamsiat thilte ana la a, Israel suante tung ah Toupa ahehta hi.
06007002	Joshua in Jeriko a pan Bethel suahlam Beth-Aven chin a om Ai ah mi asawl a, akiang uah, “Va hohtou unla, gam va enkhia un,” chi in agen hi. Mite ava hohtou ua, Ai khua ava enkhia uhi.
06007003	Joshua kiang ah akik nawn ua, akiang ah, “Mi tengteng hohtou chitchiat kei uhen. Mi sangnih hiam sangthum hiam va hohtou uhenla, Ai khua dou le uh. Mi tengteng va hihgim chitchiat ding ahi kei; tawmchik kia lah ahi ngal ua,” achi uhi.
06007004	Huchi in mipi lak a mi sangthum huai ah ahohtou ua, Aite ma ah ahong taikek uhi.
06007005	Aite'n mi sawmthum-le-guk ana that ua; kulhbaang kongpi chin a pan Sebarim pha hial in adelh ua, akumsukna ah athat uhi. Huaiziak in mite lungtang azul khin a, tui bang ahong hita hi.
06007006	Joshua in apuante abotkek a, Toupa bawm ma ah amah leh Israel upate amai ua lei si in nitaklam tan in abokkhup uhi. Alu uah leivui abuak uhi.
06007007	Joshua in, “Maizen! Toupa Pathian aw, bang ding in ahia, hiai mipite hihmanthat dia, Amorte khut a piak dia, Jordan lui na pi galkai mahmah? Jordan lui gal ah lungkimtak in om hiathiat zaw mai le ung!
06007008	Toupa aw, hichi a melmate delh a Israelte ataikek mawk uh bang ka lohta dia oi?
06007009	Kanaante leh hiai gam a tengte'n aza ding ua, ahon um ding ua, lei a pan ka min uh hihmangthang ding ahita ve ua. Na min thupi bang na chihta dia le?” achi hi.
06007010	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Thou in, Bang achia bokkhup nilouh na hia?
06007011	Israelte'n thil ahihkhial ua; zuih dia ka piak ka thukhun ah atalek ua, hamsiat thilte ala ua, agu nalai ua, asim iim behlap ua, amau van lak mahmah ah asimsel uhi.
06007012	Huaiziak in ahi, Israel suante'n amelmate uh zou lou a, amelmate a pan ataikek uh. Hamsiat in a-omta ua ahi. Hamsiat a om pen na lak ua pan na hihmang keileh ka hon ompih nawn kei ding.
06007013	‘Thou inla, mipite hihsiangthou photmai in’. Akiang uah, zingchiang a ding in kihihsiangthou un. Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, Israelte aw, na lak uah hamsiat thil a-om a ahi. Na lak ua pan hamsiat thil na lakmang masiah uh na melmate uh na zou thei kei ding uh.
06007014	Zingchiang in achichi a, na hong kilat ding uh ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n huai chi a na mat pen anam anam a ahong kilat ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai nam a na mat pen a-inkuankuan ua ahong kilat nawn ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai inkuan a na mat pen amalmal a ahong kilat nawn ding ahi.
06007015	Huan hichi ahi ding a, kuapeuh hamsiat thil na la peuhmah, amah leh aneih tengteng mei a hal vek ding ahi. Toupa thukhun atatleksan ziak leh Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuaitak ahih ziak in, achi,” na chi ding hi.
06007016	Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israelte achichi in ahong kilangsak a; Judah namte mat ahong hita uh.
06007017	Judah namte ahong kilangsak nawn a; Zerah namte ana man a; Zerahte inkuante amalmal in ahong kilang nawn ua; Zabdi mat ana hita.
06007018	A-inkuante amalmal in hong kilangsak nawn a; huchi in Judah chi a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan mat ahong hita hi.
06007019	Joshua in Akan kiang ah, “Ka tapa, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian thupina pia inla; akiang ah kipuang in. Na thilhih hon hilh in. Kei kiang ah iim ke'n,” achi hi.
06007020	Akan in Joshua adawng a, akiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian tung ah thil ka na hihkhialta, hichibang in ahi ka na hih:
06007021	‘Gallak lak a Babulon puan hoihtak leh dangka shekel zanih leh dangka-eng tang shekel sawmnga buk ka mu a, ka enlah lua a, ka lata mai hi. Ngai in, ka puanin sung a lei a selguk ahi a, dangka pen huai nuai ah a-om,’ ” achi hi.
06007022	Joshua in mite asawl a, puanin sung ah ava tai ua; ngai in, apuanin ah selguk ahi ngei a, anuai ah dangka ana om hi.
06007023	Puanin sung a kipan alakhia ua, Joshua leh Israel suan tengteng kiang ah ahon tawi ua; amau Toupa ma ah akoih uhi.
06007024	Joshua leh Israel tengteng in Zerah tapa Akan dangka, puan, dangka-eng tang, atapate, atanute, abawngtal, asabiltungte, abelamte, apuanin leh aneih tengteng toh api ua; Akor Phaizang ah apaitouhpih uhi.
06007025	Joshua in, “Bangziak a hon hihmangbang na hia? Toupa'n tuni in nang leng ahon hihmangbang ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel tengteng in suang in adeng ua; suang a aden khit un mei in ahal uhi.
06007026	Atung ah suang achiangvum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi. Huchi in Toupa'n aheh petmahna akiheisan hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min tuni tan in Akor Phaizang achi lai uhi.
06008001	Huan Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n. Galdou thei tengteng tonpih inla, thou inla, Ai ah hohtou in. Ngai in, na khut ah Ai kumpipa, amite, akhua leh agam ka hon peta hi.
06008002	Jeriko leh akumpipa uh tung a na hih bang in, Ai khua leh akumpipa tung ah leng na hih ding hi. Gallak leh gante kia nou a tuam ding in nei un. Khopi nung ah guktan un,” achi hi.
06008003	Joshua leh galdou thei tengteng Ai a hohtou ding in akisata ua, huchi in Joshua in mihat hangsan singthum atelkhia a, zan in asawlkheta hi.
06008004	Akiang uah, “Ngai un, khopi nunglam ah khopi dou ding in guktan un. Khopi a pan gamla lua ah pai kei unla, mansa in om gige un.
06008005	Kei leh ka kiang a om tengteng in khopi ka hon zuan ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, tuma a mah bang in hong dou dia ahong pawt chiang un, ama uah i taikek ding uh.
06008006	Hon delh ding in ahong pawt ding ua, khua a pan gamla sim i kihepkhiak tan in. Amau, ‘Tuma a mah bang in i ma uah taikek uh e,’ achi ding ua; ama uah i taikek ding uh.
06008007	Guktanna a pan na hong pawtkhe ding ua, khopi na la ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah ahon pe ding hi.
06008008	Huan hichi ahi ding a, khopi na lak chiang un, khopi na hal ding uh ahi. Toupa thu bang zel in na hih ding uh ahi. Ngai un, thu ka hon peta,” chi in thu apia hi.
06008009	Joshua in asawlkheta a, guktanna mun ah ahoh ua, Ai kho tumlam ah Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah a-om uh. Joshua bel huai zan in mipite lak ah agiak hi.
06008010	Zingkhang in Joshua athou a, mipite akaikhawm a, amah leh Israel upate mipite ma ah Ai kholam ah ahohtou uhi.
06008011	Mi tengteng, akiang a galdou thei omte tan in ahohtou ua, ava zuan ua, khopi chin ah ahohtou ua, Ai kho mallam pang ah agiaktou uhi. Ai khua toh akikal uah phaizang a-om hi.
06008012	Mi sangnga atonpih a, khopi tumlam a Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah aguktansak hi.
06008013	Mite, khopi mallam a sepaihte panmun leh khopi tumlam a guktan mite panmun hoihtak in asep a; Joshua huai zan in phaizang lak ah apai hi.
06008014	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ai kumpipa'n huai amuhtak in, kintak in zingkhang in athou a, huai khua a mite leh amah leh alawite tengteng toh, amun seh Arabah zawn ah Israelte dou ding in apawtta hi. Himahleh kho nunglam ah amah dou ding in guktanmi a-om uh chih athei kei hi.
06008015	Joshua leh Israel tengteng zohsa bangtak in a-om ua, gamdai lampi ah atai uhi.
06008016	Khopi a om tengteng amau delh ding in asamkhawm ua; huchi in Joshua adelh ua, khopi a pan gamla sim ah khemkhiak in a-omta uhi.
06008017	Ai ah leh Bethel ah Israelte delh lou khat leng a-om kei ua; khopi bangmah lou kal a pawtsan in Israelte adelhta uhi.
06008018	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Na teipi tawi Ai kholam nga in lik in. Na khut a hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi. Joshua in khopi lam nga in ateipi alikta hi.
06008019	Guktan mite a-omna ua kipan ahong paikhe guih ua, akhut azaktak in atai ua, khopi ah alut ua, alata ua; khua ahal pah uhi.
06008020	Aite'n anunglam uh a-et uleh, ngai in, khopi kang meikhu van lam a khutou amu ua, akoilam lam ah leng taitheihna himhim anei kei ua; gamdai a tai delhte'n ana lehdelh uhi.
06008021	Joshua leh Israel tengteng in guktan mite'n khopi alak ua, khopi meikhu paitou amuhtak un akik nawn ua, Ai mite athat uhi.
06008022	Midangte amau dou ding in khopi sung a pan ahong pawtkhia ua Israelte'n akaltehta uhi. Akhen alangkhat ah, akhen alangkhat ah a-om uhi. Huchi in athat ua, khat lel leng hawi leh khah anei kei uhi.
06008023	Ai kumpipa ahingmat ua, Joshua kiang ah ahon pi uhi.
06008024	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte'n Ai khomi gamlak a om tengteng, gamdai gam a amau ava delhna mun uah namsau in athat vek uhi. Huai khit in Israelte tengteng Ai ah akik nawn ua, asung a om tengteng namsau in ava that uhi.
06008025	Huai ni a si tengteng numei leh pasal singkhat-le-sangnih ahi ua, Ai a pasal teng asi khin vek uhi.
