06008026	Joshua in lah ateipi likna khut Ai khomite tengteng ahihman keuhkeuh masiah akaikik kei hi.
06008027	Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak a, hih dia achih bangbang in huai khopi a gante leh gallakte kia Israelte a tuam ding in atangta uhi.
06008028	Joshua in Ai khua ahal a, tangtawn a ding in leivum in abawl a, tuni tan in loihsan ahita.
06008029	Ai kumpipa nitak tan in sing dawn ah akhai a; nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, huchi in aluang sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah apai ua, atung ah suang avum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi.
06008030	Joshua in Ebal tang ah Toupa , Israel Pathian a ding in maitam adoh hi.
06008031	Mosi Dan laibu a gelhsa bang in, Toupa sikha Mosi in Israel suante ana piaksa bang in, sek louh suangte, kuamah in sik a asek ngei nai hetlouhte in maitam abawl hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan a, lemna thillatte leng alan uhi.
06008032	Huai ah Israel mite muh mah in Mosi Dan gelhsa huai suangte tung ah ateisawn hi.
06008033	Israel tengteng, gamdangmi hi in, tualsungmi hitaleh avekpi un, a-upate uh, amakaite uh leh vaihawmte toh Toupa thukhun bawm sik tuak ah adingh uhi. Amau huai bawm zawng Levi siampute mai ah huai bang in adingh uhi. Amau kikimkhen in, akimkhat Gerizim tang mazawn ah adingh ua, akimkhat dang Ebal tang mazawn ah adingh uhi. Toupa sikha Mosi in Israelte vualzawl dia thu ahilh lai in, hiai bang a hih ding in thu ana pe khinta hi.
06008034	Huai khit in Joshua in dan thu teng, vualzawlna thu leh hamse thu tengteng asim a, dan laibu a kigelh tengteng bang in asimkhia hi.
06008035	Mosi thupiak tengteng Israel omkhawm tengteng leh numeite leh naupang neuchikte leh alak ua namdang omte ma ah Joshua in sim louh himhim anei kei hi.
06009001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan gal a kumpipa tengteng, mual a omte, phaizang a omte, tuipi zatak dung teng a Lebanon pha a om tengteng, Hitte, Amorte, Kanaante, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste'n ana zak un,
06009002	Joshua leh Israelte pheikhai khat a dou tum in akikhawm uhi.
06009003	Himahleh Gibeon khomite'n Joshua in Jeriko khua leh Ai khua abawldan ana zak un, lepchiahpil in agamtang uhi.
06009004	Palai a kibawl in ip lui pipi, uain thawl lui pipi, asesa kithuap nemnum sabiltungte a pua in mi akisawl uhi.
06009005	Khedap lui thuap nennon abun ua, puan lui pipi asilh ua, anek ding tanghoute uh gaw gemgom, ap khetkhut ngen ahi.
06009006	Gilgal giahphual ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua, akiang leh Israelte kiang ah, “Gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi ua, huaiziak in tu in kou leh nou lemna thu khung ni,” achi uhi.
06009007	Israelte'n huai Hivte kiang ah, “Ka lak ua teng hi kha ni uchia; bangchi in nou toh lemna thu i khung thei dia?” achi uh.
06009008	Amau Joshua kiang ah, “Na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Joshua in akiang uah, “Kuate na hi ua? Koilam a pan hong pai na hi ua?” achi hi.
06009009	Amau akiang ah, “ Toupa a Pathian min uh ka zak ziak un na sikhate gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi uh. Aminthandan, Aigupta gam a athilhih tengteng,
06009010	Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpipa nihte, Heshbon gam kumpipa Sihon, Bashan gam kumpipa Astaroth a om Og tung a athilhih tengteng ka na za uhi.
06009011	Ka upate uh leh ka gam ua tengte'n ka kiang uah, ‘Lampi a nek ding tawi unla, amau va houpih un,’ akiang uah, ‘Na sikha ka hi uh. Nou toh kilem ni, na va chi ding uh,’ ” chi in ahon sawl uhi.
06009012	“Hiai ka nek ding uh tanghoute na kiang a hong dia ka hong pawt ni ua ka inn ua kipan asa a ka hon puak uh ahi. Himahleh tu in en dih, agaw gemgom a a-ap khetkhutta hi.
06009013	Hiai thawl uain ka thunnate uh leng athak ahi. En dih, avang khin vekta hi. Hiai ka puante uh leh ka khedapte uh leng ka hong paina uh agamla mahmah a, aluigawpta hi,” achi uhi.
06009014	Mite'n atawi uh nek-le-dawn dingte achiam ua, Toupa dong in thu akan masa kei uhi.
06009015	Huchi in Joshua in amau toh kilemna abawl a, amaute hawi ding in amau toh thu akhungta hi. Omkhawm miliante leng akiang uah akichiam uhi.
06009016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ua thu akhun ua kipan ni thum nung in, akhopite uh amau kiangnai a teng sam ahi uh, chih atheikheta uh.
06009017	Israel suante akipankhia ua, ani thum ni in akhopite uh ava tung uhi. Akhopite uh Gibeon, Kephirah, Beeroth leh Kiriath-jearim ahi.
06009018	Omkhawm heutute'n Toupa , Israelte' Pathian min lou a akiang ua ana kichiam tak ziak un, Israel suante'n akhoih kei uh. Huchi in mipi omkhawm tengteng heutute tung ah aphun uhi.
06009019	Himahleh heutu tengteng in mipi omkhawm tengtengte kiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian min lou in akiang uah i na kichiamta ngal ua. Huaiziak in amaute i khoih uh siang lou ahi.
06009020	Hichibang in atung uah hih ni. I hinghawi mai ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw i tung uah thangpaihna ahong tung kha ding, akiang uah lah i na kichiam khinta ngal ua,” achi uhi.
06009021	Heutute mah in akiang uah, “Hinghawi in om uhen. Himahleh omkhawm tengteng a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite hi uhen,” achi uhi; heutute'n ana chiam khit tak sa bang un.
06009022	Joshua in amaute asamsak a, akiang uah, “Bangdia, gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi uh, chi a hon khem na hi ua? Ka kiangnai a teng sam lah na hi ngal ua.
06009023	Huaiziak in tu in hamsiat na hi uh, na lak ua mi kuamah ka Pathian inn a dia sing pomi leh tui tawimi na hihna ua pan asuakta ngei kei ding uh,” achi hi.
06009024	Amau Joshua adawng ua, “ Toupa na Pathian un asikha Mosi gam pumpi nou hon pe dia, agam luahmi tengteng na ma ua kipan ahihmang zel ding ahi, chih thu ana piak, na sikhate hon na hilhchian mahmah ua; huaiziak a noute ziak a ka hinna uh mansuah lau mahmah a, hichibang a na gamta ka hi uh.
06009025	Tu in ngai in, na khut a om ka hi ua; na ngaihtuahna a hoih leh dik a na theih bang in ka tung uah hih mai in,” achi uhi.
06009026	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante a pan Joshua in hunkhia in, athatta kei uhi.
06009027	Huai ni in Joshua in aseh bang in omkhawmte leh Toupa maitam a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite in asep a, tuni tan in hiaite in apang uhi.
06010001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Joshua in Ai khua ala a, ahihsegawp dimdem a, Jeriko khua leh akumpipa ahihsiat bang in Ai khua leh akumpipa leng ahihsegawp a, Gibeon a mite'n Israelte toh lemna bawl in, alak uah ateng sam uh, chih azak in, alauta mahmah hi.
06010002	Gibeon khua bel lianpi, kumpipa khopite lak a khat bang a lian ahi. Ai khua sang a lianzaw leh amite leng hattak ahih ziak un alau mahmah uhi.
06010003	Huaiziak in Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham, Jermuth kumpipa Piram, Lakish kumpipa Japhia leh Eglon kumpipa Debir kiang ah,
06010004	“Hong pai unla, hong panpih un, Gibeon i va dou ding uh. Joshua leh Israel suante toh lemna abawl ngal ua,” chi in athukhak hi.
06010005	Amorte kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa akikhawm ua, asepaih tengteng uh toh ahohtou ua, Gibeon kho zawn ah giahphual sat in adouta uhi.
06010006	Gibeonte'n Gilgal giahphual a om Joshua kiang ah mi asawl ua, “Na sikhate hon nuse ke'n. Kintak in ka kiang uah hong tou in, hong panpih inla, hong hondam in. Singtang gam a teng Amor kumpipate kou hong dou ding in akikhawm uh,” chi in ava hilh uhi.
06010007	Joshua leh akiang a gal dou thei mi tengteng leh mihat hangsan tengteng Gilgal a pan ahohtou uhi.
06010008	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau het ke'n. Na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Alak ua mi kuamah na ma ah adingh zou kei ding uh,” achi hi.
06010009	Huaiziak in Joshua in amaute adou guih a; zankhua a Gilgal a pan ana hohtousa ahi.
06010010	Toupa'n Israelte ma ah amaute ahihbuai gawpta a, Gibeon ah tampi athat a, Beth-horon zottouhna lampi ah adelh a, Azekah leh Makkedah kho pha in athat hi.
06010011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte ma ah ataikek ua, Beth-horon a pan apaisukna mun a a-om lai un, Toupa'n van a pan gial lian pipi atung uah Azekah kho pha in akesak a, asi uhi. Israel suante'n namsau a asatlup sang un gial denlup atamzaw hi.
06010012	Toupa'n Amorte Israel suante apiak ni in Joshua in Toupa kiang ah thu agen a; Israelte mitmuh in, “Ni, Gibeon kho tung ah dingh nilouh in; kha, nang leng, Aijalon Phaizang ah om nilouh in,” achi hi.
06010013	Mite'n amelmate uh tung a phu alak masiah uh ni adingh kinken a, kha leng a-om nilouh hi. Hiai thu Jasar laibu a gelh hilou hia? Huchi in van lai ah ni a-om nilouh a, ni khat sung vengveng tum thu angaihtuah kei hi.
06010014	Toupa'n huchibang a mihing aw angaihkhiak ni, ama in a-om ngei kei a anung in leng a-om ngei kei; Toupa'n lah Israelte adoupih ngal a.
06010015	Joshua leh Israelte agiahphual uh Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.
06010016	Huai kumpipa ngate ataimang ua, Makkedah kokhuk ah akibu uhi.
06010017	“Makkedah kokhuk a kibu, kumpipa ngate muh ahi uh,” chi in Joshua hilh in a-om hi.
06010018	Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam suang lianpi khuk in sin unla, veng mite leng omsak un.
06010019	Noute bel om kei unla; na melmate uh delh unla, anungdalte that unla; akhua himhim uah lutsak kei un. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah amau ahon peta ngal a,” achi hi.
06010020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joshua leh Israel suante'n athah bei khit ua, kulhbaangpi nei khuate a, a-omlaite atailut khit un,
06010021	mi tengteng Joshua kiang Makkedah ah galmuangtak in ahong kik nawn ua. Israel suante dem in kuamah in lei alok ngam kei uh.
06010022	Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam hong unla, kokhuk a pan ka kiang ah kumpipa ngate hon kaikhia un,” achi hi.
06010023	Hichibang in ahih ua, kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa kokhuk a pan akiang ah ahon pikhia uhi.
06010024	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipate Joshua kiang a ahon pitak un, Joshua in Israel tengteng asamkhawm a, amah toh kuan galdou thei mite lak a heutute kiang ah, “Hong pai nai unla, hiai kumpipate ngawng sik un,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, angawng uh ahong siksak uhi.
06010025	Joshua in akiang uah, “Lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un. Hattak leh hangsantak in om un. Na dou uh na melma tengteng tung ah Toupa'n hichibang in ahih ding,” achi hi.
06010026	Huai khit in Joshua in amau asatzan a, athat a, sing dawn ah akhai a; nitaklam tan in sing dawn ah akikhai lai uhi.
06010027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, akibukna kokhuk uah apailut ua, akokhuk kam suang lianpi in asin ua, tuni tan in leng a-om lai hi.
06010028	Joshua in huai ni in Makkedah khua ala a, akumpipa uh tan in namsau in alok a; huai khua a om tengteng asatlum vek a, khat lel leng hawi anei kei. Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in, Makkedah kumpipa tung ah leng ahihta hi.
06010029	Joshua Israel tengteng toh Makkedah a pan Libnah ah apai ua, Libnah khua adou uhi.
06010030	Toupa'n huai khua kumpipa tan in Israelte khut ah apia hi. Huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng athat vek hi. Asung a om mi khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi. Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in akumpipa tung ah ahih hi.
06010031	Joshua Israel tengteng toh Libnah a pan Lakish ah apai ua, panmun khoh in asual uhi.
06010032	Toupa'n Lakish khua Israelte khut ah apia a, ani nih ni in ala ua huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat vek ua, Libnah khote tung a ahih bang in ahihta uhi.
06010033	Bezer kumpipa Horam, Lakish khua panpih ding in akuantou a; Joshua in amah leh aheute nangawn khat mah leng hawi lou in athatgam vek hi.
06010034	Joshua Israel tengteng toh Lakish a pan Eglon ah apai ua, panmun akhoh ua; adou uhi.
06010035	Huai ni in ala ua, huai ni mah in huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat bei sipsip hi. Lakish kho tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi.
06010036	Joshua, Israelte tengteng toh Eglon a pan Hebron ah apai ua adou uhi.
06010037	Ala ua, huai khua, akumpipa, akhopel tengteng leh asung a om tengteng namsau a dou in athat vek ua, Eglon kho tung a hih bang in khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi. Akhua nangawn hihse vek in asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip hi.
06010038	Joshua leh Israel tengteng Debir ah akihei nawn ua adou ua;
06010039	huai khua, akumpipa leh akhopel tengteng ala ua; namsau in adou ua, asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip ua; khat mah leng hawi anei kei uh. Hebron kho tung leh Debir khua leh akumpipa uh tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi.
06010040	Huchi in Joshua in agam pumpi, tanggamte, simlam a phaizang leh mual gamte hihse vek in akumpipa tengteng uh athat vek a; khat mah hinghawi anei kei hi. Toupa , Israelte' Pathian thupiak bang in anak thei peuhmah ahihchimit vek hi.
06010041	Joshua in Kadesh-barnea a pan Gaza pha in, Goshen gam tengteng toh Gibeon pha in ahihse vek hi.
06010042	Huai kumpipate tengteng leh agam uh Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in Israelte adoupih ziak in, Joshua in hun khat a alak vek ahi uhi.
06010043	Joshua leh Israel tengteng a giahphual Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.
06011001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hazor kumpipa Jabin in huai azak in, Madon kumpipa Jobab, Shimron kumpipa leh Akshaph kumpipa,
06011002	Mallam tanggam kumpipate, Kineroth simlam a Arabah kumpipate, Phaigam kumpipate leh tumlam pang a Dor kumpipate,
06011003	suahlam leh tumlam a om Kanaan mite, tanggam a om, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte, Jebuste, Mizpah gam Hermon tang nuai a om Hivte kiang ah mi asawl hi.
06011004	Huan asepaih tengteng uh toh mi tampi, atamdan uh tuipi a piaunel zah mahmah sakol leh kangtalai tampi toh akisa uhi.
06011005	Huai kumpipa tengteng akimukhawm ua Israelte dou ding in Merom tuite ah agiakkhawm uhi.
06011006	Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau ke'n. Zingchiang in hichih hun in amaute hihlupsa vek in Israelte ka hon pe mai ding hi. Asakolte khukguh na kilawisak dia, akangtalaite uh na halsak ding uh,” achi hi.
06011007	Joshua leh gal dou thei mi tengteng Merom tuite ah ava kuan guih ua adou uhi.
06011008	Toupa'n Israelte khut ah apia a adou ua, Zidon lianzaw pha in, Misrephoth-maim munte pha in, suahlam pang a Mizpeh Phaizangte pha in adelh ua, khat leng hawi nei lou in athat vek uhi.
06011009	Toupa'n asawl bang in Joshua in atung uah ahih a; asakolte khukguh akilawisak ua, akangtalaite uh ahalsak uhi.
06011010	Huai hun in Joshua akilehhei a, Hazor khua ala a, akumpipa uh namsau in athat hi. Tuma in Hazor khua huai lai a hiai gamte tengteng lak a khopi pen ahi.
06011011	Huai khua a om tengteng namsau in athat vek a, ahihchimit vek a, ahing peuhmah khat mah leng ahinghawi kei uhi.
06011012	Huchi in Kumpipate khopi tengteng leh akumpipa tengteng uh Joshua in aman vek a, namsau a dou in athat a, ahihchimit vek a; Toupa sikha Mosi in thu apiak bang in.
06011013	Mual pawng a khopi a na om khinsate, Hazor khua chih louh, Israelte'n khat mah leng ahal kei uh. Huai khua bel Joshua in ahal hi.
06011014	Hiai khopite a gallak tengteng leh gante Israel suante'n amau a tuam ding in anei ua; mihing bel ahihman vek masiah uh namsau in athat zel ua, ahing peuhmah hawi anei kei uhi.
06011015	Toupa'n a sikha Mosi thu apiak bang in, Mosi in huai thu Joshua apesawn a; Joshua in huai bang in ahih zel hi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng hih louh himhim anei kei hi.
06011016	Huai bang in Joshua in huai gam tengteng, tanggamte, sim gam tengteng, Goshen gam tengteng, phaizang leh phaizang teng leh Israelte tangte leh phaizang teng toh ala vek hi.
06011017	Seir va suntou Halak tang a pan Hermon tang nuai a Lebanon Phaizang a Baal-gad pha in akumpipate tengteng uh aman a that in ahihlum hi.
06011018	Joshua in huai kumpipa tengteng sawtpitak adou hi.
06011019	Gibeon a om Hivte kia chih louh Israelte toh lemna bawl khua a-om kei uh. Dou a lak vek ahi uhi.
06011020	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a, ahihchimit vek a, deihsakna nei het lou a, ahihman theihna dia alungtang uh hihkhauhsak a Israelte dou sakpa Toupa ahi.
06011021	Huai lai in Joshua akuan a, tanggamte a pan, Hebron a pan, Debir a pan, Anab khua leh Judia tanggam tengteng leh Israel tanggam tengteng a pan Anakte ahihmang vek hi.
06011022	Israel suante gam ah Anakte khat lel leng atengta kei ua; Gaza, Gath leh Ashdod khuate kia ah bel a-om lai uhi.
06011023	Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang a, agen tengteng bang in Joshua in gam pumpi alata hi. Joshua in Israelte anam uh kikhendan bang zel in agouluah ding un gam ape chiat hi. Huchi in gam galmuang in a-omta hi.
06012001	Hiaite ahi uh huai gam kumpipate, Israel suante'n ahihman ua, agam uh Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gamte, Arnon Phaizang a pan Hermon tang tan, suahlam pang a Arabah tengteng toh aneihsak uh kumpipate:
06012002	Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a teng in Arnon Phaizang pang a om Aroer a pan vai ahawm a, phaizang laitak a khopite, Ammon suante gamgi Jabok lui pha in Gilead gam kimkhat tung ah vai ahawm hi.
06012003	Suahlam ah Arabah ah Kineroth Tuipi tan in ahi a; suahlam ah Beth-jeshimoth hohna lampi lam ah Arabah Tuipi, Chi Tuipi tan in ahi a; simlam ah Pisgah tang nuai pha in ahi.
06012004	Astaroth leh Edrei a om Rephaim nam khosuaksunte lak ah Bashan kumpipa Og in vai ahawm hi.
06012005	Amah Hermon tang, Salkah khua leh Bashan tengteng, Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi pha leh Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gamgi chiang Gilead gam kimkhat pha in vai ahawm hi.
06012006	Toupa sikha Mosi leh Israel suante'n huaite athat ua; Toupa sikha Mosi in Reuben chite, Gad chite, Manasseh nam kimkhatte agouluah ding un ahawm hi.
06012007	Hiai gam kumpipate ahi, Joshua leh Israel suante'n Jordan lui gal tumlam pang a, athahte uh, Lebanon Phaizang Baal-gad a pan Seir tang suntou Halak tang pha in. Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un, huai gam agouluah ding un ape chiatta hi.
06012008	Tanggam a, phaizang gamte, Arabahte, tanggamte, gamdai gamte, sim gamte; huaite bel Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Periz mite, Hiv mite, Jebus mite gam ahi.
06012009	Jeriko kumpipa khat; Bethel kho kiang a Ai kumpipa, khat;
06012010	Jerusalem kumpipa, khat; Hebron kumpipa, khat;
06012011	Jarmuth kumpipa, khat; Lakish kumpipa, khat;
06012012	Eglon kumpipa, khat; Gezer kumpipa, khat;
06012013	Debir kumpipa, khat; Geder kumpipa, khat;
06012014	Hormah kumpipa, khat; Arad kumpipa, khat;
06012015	Libnah kumpipa, khat; Adullam kumpipa, khat;
06012016	Makkedah kumpipa, khat; Bethel kumpipa, khat;
06012017	Tappuah kumpipa, khat; Hepher kumpipa, khat;
06012018	Aphek kumpipa, khat; Lasaron kumpipa, khat;
06012019	Madon kumpipa, khat; Hazor kumpipa, khat;
06012020	Shimron-meron kumpipa, khat; Akshaph kumpipa, khat;
06012021	Taanak kumpipa, khat; Magiddo kumpipa, khat;
06012022	Kedesh kumpipa, khat; Karmel tang a Jokneam kumpipa, khat;
06012023	Dor tuipang a Dor kumpipa, khat; Gilgal a Goiim namte kumpipa, khat;
06012024	Tirzah kumpipa, khat; kumpipa tengteng sawmthum-le-khat ahi uh.
06013001	Joshua ahong upata a, ahong tek mahmahta hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na hong upa in na hong tek mahmahta a, gam lak ding lah atam lai mahmah ngal a.
06013002	Hiai gamte ahi lak louh: Philistia gam tengteng leh Geshur gam tengteng.
06013003	Aigupta gam chin a om Shihor a pan mallam pang a Ekron gamgi tan in, huai tuh Kanaan mite gam a sim ahi; Philistiate vaihawmtu ngate, Gaza mite, Ashdod mite, Ashkelon mite, Git mite leh Ekron mite; simlam a Avi mite.
06013004	Kanaan mite gam tengteng leh Zidon mite gam a Mearah, Amorte gamgi Aphek kho pha in.
06013005	Gebal mite gam leh nisuahna lam Lebanon gam tengteng Hermon tang nuai Baal-gad a pan Hamath kholutna pha in.
06013006	Lebanon a pan Misrephoth-maim mun pha in, tanggam a teng tengteng, Zidon mi tengteng. Amaute Israel suante ma ah ka delhkhe dia; ka hon thupiak bang in Israel gouluah ding in bawlsak in.
06013007	Huchi in hiai gam nam kuate leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte gouluah ding in hawmsak in,” achi hi.
06013008	Toupa sikha Mosi in amau a dia asehsak bang in Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n Manasseh nam kimkhat dangte toh Mosi piaksa Jordan suahlam gam ah goutan aneita uhi.
06013009	Huai gam ahihleh Arnon Phaizang gei a om Aroer a pan leh phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng, Dibon tan ahi.
06013010	Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a vaihawm a tu khopi tengteng Ammon suante gamgi tan ahi.
06013011	Gilead gam leh Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi chiang leh Hermon tang tengteng leh Bashan gam tengteng Salkah kho tan ahi.
06013012	Astaroth leh Edrei a kumpipa a tu Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng toh, huaite Rephaim nam milian khosuaksunte ahi uh; huaite Mosi in ana dou a, ana delhkheta hi.
06013013	Himahleh Geshurte leh Maakathte Israel suante'n adelhkhe kei ua; Geshurte leh Maakathte tuni tan in Israelte lak ah atengden lai uhi.
06013014	Levi namte kia ahi gouluah ding a piak louh. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa , Israelte' Pathian a dia mei a thillatte amau gouluah ahi.
06013015	Reuben suante nam a-inkuan dungzui in Mosi in gam ana peta hi.
06013016	Agamgi uh Arnon Phaizang a om Aroer a pan phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng a pan,
06013017	Heshbon leh huai phaigam a khopi tengteng; Debon, Bamoth-baal leh Beth-baal-meon;
06013018	Jahaz, Kedemoth leh Mephaath;
06013019	Kiriathaim, Sibmah leh phaizang a tang a om Zereth-sahar;
06013020	Beth-peor leh Ashdot-pisgah leh Beth-jeshimoth;
06013021	Phaigam khopi tengteng, Heshbon a vaihawm Amorte Kumpipa Sihon lalgam teng, Mosi in ana thah khitsa Midiante kumpipate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur leh Reba omna gam toh ahi.
06013022	Beor tapa Balaam, aisan siam leng a-inkuante toh Israel suante'n athat uhi.
06013023	Reuben suante gam chiang bel Jordan leh apang teng ahi. Hiai gam leh akhopite leh khuate ahi Reuben suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a gouluah dia asehsak uh.
06013024	Mosi in Gad suante a-inkuan dungzui un gam apia hi.
06013025	Agamgi uh Jazer khua leh Gilead gam khopi tengteng leh Ammon suante gam kimkhat, Rabbah kho kiang a om Aroer pha in;
06013026	Heshbon a pan Ramath-mizpeh leh Betonim pha in; Mahanaim a pan Debir gamgi pha in;
06013027	Guam ah Beth-aram, Beth-nimrah, Sukoth, Zaphon, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gam teng, Jordan leh agei a gamte, Jordan gal suahlam pang a Kinereth Tuipi tawp chiang tan in ahi.
06013028	Hiai Gad suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a agouluah ding ua seh, akhopite uh leh akhuate uh ahi.
06013029	Mosi in Manasseh nam kimkhatte gam apia hi. Manasseh nam kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a piak ahi uh.
06013030	Agamgi uh Mahanaim a pan Bashan gam tengteng, Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng leh Bashan gam a Jair khopi tengteng toh, kho sawmguk ahi.
06013031	Gilead gam kimkhat leh Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam a Astaroth, Edrei; huai Manasseh tapa Makir suan Makir suan kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan uh omdan bang zel a seh ahi.
06013032	Hiaite Moab phai, Jeriko zawn, Jordan gal lehlam a, Mosi in gouluah dia a piak gamte ahi uh.
06013033	Levi chite Mosi in gouluah ding ape kei hi. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa , Israelte' Pathian agouluah uh ahi.
06014001	Hiaite ahi Israel suante'n Kanaan gam alak ua, siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan lupente'n agouluah ding ua ana hawm uh.
06014002	Nam kuate leh nam kimkhatte a tuam dia Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu ana piak bang in aisan in agouluah uh piak ahi.
06014003	Mosi in nam nih leh nam kimkhatte Jordan gal ah agouluah ding uh ana peta hi. Levi chite bel alak uah gouluah ding ape kei hi.
06014004	Joseph suante nam nih ahi ua, Manasseh leh Ephraim. Levi chite huai gam ah tantuam ape kei uh, a-omna ding uh khopite leh adaikim ua gantatna ding mun leh a-inn leh alou uh bawlna ding lou ngal piak ahi kei uhi.
06014005	Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Israel suante'n ahih ua, gam ahawm uhi.
06014006	Judah suante Gilgal ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua; Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb in akiang ah, “Kadesh-barnea mun a Pathian mipa Mosi kiang a Toupa'n ka tungtang leh na tungtang thu ana gen na thei hi.
06014007	Toupa sikha Mosi in Kadesh-barnea mun a pan gam va enkhe dia ahon sawl lai in kum sawmli a upa ka na hita a; ka lungsim a om bangtak akiang ah ka tun nawn hi.
06014008	Himahleh ka unau ka kiang a pai samte'n mipite lungtang azulsuaksak ua; ke'n bel Toupa ka Pathian ka zui hi.
06014009	Mosi in huai ni in, Toupa ka Pathian na zuih ziak in na khe in ana siksa gam tangtawn in nang leh na suante gouluah ahi ngeingei ding, chi in akichiam hi.
06014010	Huchi in ngai in, Toupa'n Mosi kiang a huai thute agen nung Israelte gamdai a, avakvaih sung un Toupa'n agensa bang in kum sawmli-le-nga tak ahon damsak lai hi. Ngai in, tu in kum sawmgiat-le-nga ka hita.
06014011	Hichi pipi in leng Mosi in ahon sawl lai mah bang in ka hat lai a, nidanglai a kidouna ding leh nasep silbawlna dia thagui ka neih mah bang in tu in leng ka nei lai hi.
06014012	Huaiziak in hiai tang, Toupa'n huai ni a agensa pen hon pia in, Anakte a-om ua, akhopite uh athupi a, kulhbaang a umsuak ahi uh, chih huai ni in na za a; Toupa'n ahon ompih dia, amaute ka delhkhe thei ding, Toupa'n ana gensa bang in,” achi hi.
06014013	Joshua in avualzawl a; Jephunneh tapa Kaleb gouluah ding in Hebron khua apeta hi.
06014014	Huaiziak in Hebron khua tuni tan in Keniz mi, Jephunneh tapa Kaleb gouluah ahong hita hi; Toupa Israelte' Pathian azuih ziak in.
06014015	Hebron kho min ama in Kiriath-arba ahi. Arba ahihleh Anakte lak a mithupipen ahi. Huai khit in agam ahong galmuangta hi.
06015001	Hiai Judah suante a-inkuan dungzui a amau a tuam dia seh a om ahi: Edom gamgi chiang, simlam pang Zin gamdai tan hial in, simtawp tanpha in akizalhsuk hi.
06015002	Simlam gamgi bel, chi Tuipi simtawp a tuipi gam geng a pan simlam doh ahi.
06015003	Simlam zuan in Akrabbim tan in apai zel a, Zin ava tung hi. Kadesh-barnea simlam ah atungkah a, Hebron ava tung a, Adar ah atoupai a, Karka akualkhum hi.
06015004	Azmon ah apai zel a, Aigupta luita ah atuakkhia a; tuipi ah gamgi atawp hi. Hiai bel simlam pang gamgi ahi.
06015005	Suahlam pang gamgi bel Chi Tuipi ahi a, Jordan ah atawp hi. Mallam pang gamgi bel tuipi tuimeng a pan Jordan tun tawp chiang ahi.
06015006	Beth-hoglah ah atoupai a, Beth-arabah mal ah apai zel a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaitou zel hi.
06015007	Akor Phaizang a pan Debir ah apaitou a, lui simlam a om Adummim atungkahna chin ah Gilgal lam zuan in mallam ah apai zel a; En-shemesh tuite ah apaipai a, En-rogel ah asuakkhia hi.
06015008	Hinam tapa phaizang ah Jebuste gam pang simlam, huai tuh Jerusalem ahi, pha in apaitou a; Hinnom tang lam pang phaizang chin a om tang vum ah apaitou a, huai tuh Rephaim mallam pang phaizang tawp mahmah ahi.
06015009	Mualvum a pan Nephtoah a luituite pha in apaisuak a, Ephron tang a khopite ah apai zel a; gamgi Baalah, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, lam ah apaisuk hi.
06015010	Baalah a pan tumlam pang ah Seir tang pha in akihekkual nawn a, mallam pang ah Jearim, huai tuh Kesalon ahi, Beth-shemesh ah apaisuk a, Timnah tawn in apai zel hi.
06015011	Mallam pang Ekron zul ah apaikhia a, Shikron ah apaisuak a, Baalah tang ah apai zel a, Jabneel ah apawt a; tuipi ah atawp hi.
06015012	Tumlam pang gamgi bel tuipi azat a za leh apiau chiang teng ahi. Huai gam chiang ahi Judah suante a dia a-inkuan uh dungzui a sehsak a om.
06015013	Jephunneh tapa Kaleb Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak bang in Judah suante lak ah tantuam abawlsak a, huai tuh Kiriath-arba ahi, Arba bel Anan pa ahi a, akhopi ahihleh Hebron ahi.
06015014	Kaleb in huai khua a pan Anak tapate thum Sheshai, Ahiman leh Talmai adelhkhia hi.
06015015	Huai a pan Debir khomite ava dou a; ama in Debir kho min Kiriath-sepher ahi.
06015016	Kaleb in, “Kuapeuh Kiriath-sepher va dou a, va la zou peuhmah, azi ding in ka tanu Aksah ka pe ding,” achi hi.
06015017	Kaleb unaupa Kenaz tapa Othniel in ava la zou a; huchi in azi ding in atanu Aksah aneisakta hi.
06015018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ava tun in, apa gam ngen ding in akuan a; asabiltung a pan akumkhia hi. Kaleb in akiang ah, “Bang na deih a?” ana chi hi.
06015019	Ama'n, “Hon vualzawl in. Simlam gam lah na hon peta ngal a. Tui nak neite leng hon pe tel lai in,” achi hi. Huchi in tui nak nei saknungte leh khangnungte apeta hi.
06015020	Hiai ahi Judah suante nam, a-inkuan uh dungzui a agouluah uh.
06015021	Simlam a Edom gamgi zul a Judah suante aneih khopi hiaite ahi uh: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur,
06015022	Kinah, Dimonah leh Adadah;
06015023	Kadesh, Hazor leh Ithnan;
06015024	Ziph, Telem, Bealoth,
06015025	Hazor, Hadattah, Kerioth, Hezron (huai Hazor ahi,)
06015026	Amam, Shema, Moladah,
06015027	Hazar-gaddah, Hesmon, Beth-palet,
06015028	Hazar-shual, Beer-sheba, Bizjothjah,
06015029	Baalah, Ijim, Ezem,
06015030	Eltolad, Kesil, Hormah.
06015031	Ziklag, Madmannah leh Sansannah.
06015032	Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain leh Rimmon ahi ua; khopi tengteng, akhotate uh toh sawmnih-le-kua ahi.
06015033	Phaigam lam ah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah,
06015034	Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam,
06015035	Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah,
06015036	Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah leh Gederothaim ahi ua, akhotate uh toh khopi teng sawm-le-li ahi uh.
06015037	Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad;
06015038	Dilean, Mizpah leh Joktheel;
06015039	Lakish, Bozkath, Eglon;
06015040	Kabbon, Lahmas, Kitlish;
06015041	Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, Makkedah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi uh.
06015042	Libnah, Ether, Ahsan,
06015043	Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib,
06015044	Keilah, Akzib leh Mareshah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi uh.
06015045	Ekron leh akhopite leh akhotate toh,
06015046	Ekron a pan tuipi tanpha in Ashdod zul a om tengteng, akhotate uh toh.
06015047	Ashdod leh akhopite leh akhotate: Gaza leh akhopite leh akhotate; Aigupta lui leh tuipi za leh agei chiang pha in.
06015048	Singtang gam lam ah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh,
06015049	Dannah leh Kirjath-sannah, huai tuh Debir ahi,
06015050	Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim leh Gosen,
06015051	Gosen, Holon leh Giloh; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-khat ahi.
06015052	Arab, Dumah, Eshean,
06015053	Janum, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah,
06015054	Humtah leh Kiriath-arba, huai tuh Hebron ahi, huan Zior; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi.
06015055	Maon, Karmel, Ziph, Juttah,
06015056	Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah,
06015057	Kain, Gibeah leh Timnah; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi.
06015058	Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor,
06015059	Maarath, Beth-anoth leh Eltekon; akhotate uh toh khopite tengteng guk ahi.
06015060	Kiriath-baal, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, leh Rabbah; akhotate uh toh khopi nih ahi.
06015061	Gamdai a Beth-arabah, Middin, Sekakah,
06015062	Chi khopi Nibshan leh En-gedi; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng guk ahi.
06015063	Jerusalem a teng Jebuste ahihleh Judah suante'n adelhkhe zou kei ua, tuni tan in Jerusalem ah Judah suante leh Jebuste atengkhawm uhi.
06016001	Joseph suante tantuam, Jeriko zawn a pan gamdai kiang, suahlam pang Jeriko tuite ah asuak a, Jeriko a pan singtang gam ah Bethel pha in apaitou zel hi.
06016002	Bethel a pan Luz ah alut a, Arki mite gamgi a Ataroth pha in apai zel hi.
06016003	Tumlam pang ah Japhlet suante gamgi, Beth-horon gamgi khangnungzaw, Gezer pha in apaisuk zel a; tupi ah asuak hi.
06016004	Huchi in Joseph suante Manasseh leh Ephraim suante'n tantuam in alata uhi.
06016005	A-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Ephraim suante gamgi hiai ahi: Suahlam pang atantuam uh gamgi Ataroth-addar ahi a, Beth-horon saknungzaw apha hi.
06016006	Mikmethath maltum lam pang ah asuak a, suahlam pang ah Taanath-shiloh pha in akihei nawn a, Janohah suahlam ah apai zel hi.
06016007	Janohah a pan Ataroth ah, Naarah ah apaisuk a, Jeriko atung a, Jordan ah asuak hi.
06016008	Tappuah a pan tumlam pang ah Kanah luita pha in apai a; tuipi ah asuak hi. Huaite ahi Ephraim suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam uh.
06016009	Manasseh suante tantuam lak a Ephraim suante a dia khopi asehtuamsakte toh; akhopi tengteng leh akhotate leng.
06016010	Gezer a teng Kanaante adelhkhe kei ua; Ephraimte lak ah Kanaante tuni tan in a-om lai ua, asikha un a-om uhi.
06017001	Manasseh suante tantuam hiaite ahi. Manasseh Joseph tapa masa ahi a, Gilead pa, Manasseh tapa masa Makir galhat ahih ziak in Gilead leh Bashan gam atang hi.
06017002	Manasseh suan dang tengteng a ding in a-inkuan uh dungzui in tantuam leng a-om hi. Abiezer suante a ding, Helek suante a ding, Shekem suante a ding, Hepher suante a ding leh Shemida suante a ding. Huaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Joseph tapa Manasseh suan pasalte ahi uhi.
06017003	Manasseh tapa Makir, huai tapa Gilead, huai tapa Hepher, huai tapa Zelophehad in tapa nei lou in tanu ngen anei hi. Atanute min Mahlah, Noah, Hoglai, Milkah leh Tirzah ahi.
06017004	Siampu Eleazar ma ah leh Nun tapa Joshua ma ah leh miliante ma ah ahoh ua, “Ka unaute uh lak a tantuam hon pe sam ding in Toupa'n Mosi thu apia hi,” chi in agen uhi. Toupa thupiak bang in apa uh unaute lak ah tantuam ape samta hi.
06017005	Jordan gal ah Gilead leh Bashan gam sim louh in, Manasseh tantuam ding in mun sawm apuk a;
06017006	Manasseh tanute'n atapate uh lak ah tantuam aneih sam ziak uh ahi. Gilead gam bel Manasseh tapa dangte'n atang uhi.
06017007	Manasseh gamgi Shekem suahlam a om Asher a pan Mikmethath pha in ahi a; taklam pang ah En-tappuah mite tenna pha in apai hi.
06017008	Tappuah gam Manasseh a ahi a; himahleh Manasseh gamgi chin a Tappuah ahihleh Ephraim suante a ahi.
06017009	Gamgi kan in luita simlam pang ah apaisuk a, Ephraim suante gamgi asun hi. Ephraim suante khopite khenkhat Manasseh suante khopite lak ah a-om hi. Himahleh Manasseh suante gamgi bel Kanah kuam mallam pang ah apai a, tuipi ah atawp hi.
06017010	Simlam pang Ephraim a ahi a, mallam pang pen Manasseh a ahi. Tuipi a gamgi ahi. Mallam ah Asher pha in ahi a, suahlam ah Issakar pha in ahitou hi.
06017011	Issakar leh Asher gam ah Manasseh in Beth-shean leh akim a khuate, Ibleam leh akim a khuate, Dor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Endor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Taanak a tengte leh akim a khuate, leh Meggiddo a tengte leh akim a khuate zou in, kho seh thum anei uhi.
06017012	Kanaan mite'n huai gam luah asawm teitei ziak un, Manasseh suante'n huai khopi a tengte adelhkhe zou kei uhi.
06017013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante ahong hat hiaihiai un, Kanaante nasem a goih ding in a-omsak ua, adelhkhe siang vek kei uhi.
06017014	Joseph suante'n Joshua kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia gouluah ding tantuam seh khat, tan khat kia na hon piak tuam, Toupa'n lah tutan in hon nak vualzawl mahmah ngal a?” achi uhi.
06017015	Joshua in akiang uah, “Tam na hih uleh, Perizte leh miliante gammang na tenna ding un va vat un. Ephraim tanggam pen nou a dia aneu luatleh,” achi hi.
06017016	Joseph suante'n, “Tanggam kou a ding in ahun kei. Phaigam a teng Kanaan tengteng, Beth-shean leh akhopi a tengte leh Jezreel phaizang a tengte'n sik kangtalai anei chiat tuamse uh,” achi uhi.
06017017	Joshua in Joseph inkuante, Ephraim leh Manasseh suante kiang ah, “Na tam mahmah ua, hat leng na hat ua; tan khat kia na nei kei ding uh.
06017018	‘Tanggam teng nou a ding ahi lai ding hi. Gammang hitaleh, na vat ding ua, agam chiang tengteng nou a ahi ding.’ Kanaante'n sik kangtalaite nei in, hat tawk le uh leng, na hawlkhe zou ding uh,” achi hi.
06018001	Huai nung in Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng Shiloh ah akikhawm ua, huai ah kihoupihna biakbuk akai uhi. Huai gam teng azou khinta uhi.
06018002	Israel suante lak ah atantuam uh tang nai lou nam sagih a-om lai uhi.
06018003	Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “ Toupa na pipute uh Pathian in nou hon piaksa gam, bang tan ahia luah lou a na awltat lai ding uh?
06018004	Nam chih a kipan mi thum zel telkhia unla; amau akuan ding ua, gam ava en vialvial ding ua, atantuam hun ding uh bang chiat zel in ava gelh ding ua; ka kiang ah ahong nawn ding uh.
06018005	Mun sagih in akhen phot ding ua; Judah pawl simlam ah atantuam uah a-om ding ua, Joseph inkuante mallam ah atantuam uah a-om ding uh.
06018006	Gam mun sagih in va khen unla, huai gelhna hon pia un. Huchi in hiai ah Toupa i Pathian ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding hi.
06018007	Levi teng in na lak uah tantuam anei kei ding uh. Toupa mai a siampu nasep amau goutan ahi. Gad pawl, Reuben pawl leh Manasseh nam kimkhat bel Jordan gal suahlam ah amau tantuam Toupa sikha Mosi in apiak ana tangta uh,” achi hi.
06018008	Huchi in huai mite apawtkheta ua, Joshua in, “Gam va en vialvial unla, hon gelhkhia unla, ka kiang ah hon tun nawn unla, hiai ah Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding,” chi in thu apia hi.
06018009	Mite akuan ua, gam ava en vialvial ua, mun sagih in akhen ua, laibu ah akhuakhua in agelhkhia ua, giahphual Shiloh ah Joshua kiang ah akik nawn uhi.
06018010	Joshua in Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ana sansak a; huai ah Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un gam ahawmta hi.
06018011	Aisan a-inkuan uh dungzui in Benjamin suante tung ah aketa a; agamgi chiang uh Judah suante leh Joseph suante kikal ahi.
06018012	Mallam pang a agamgi chiang uh Jordan a pan ahi a; Jeriko sik ah mallam pang ah apaitou a, tumlam pang ah tanggam ah apaitou zel a; Beth-Aven gamdai ah atawp hi.
06018013	Hiai a pan Luz lam ah, Luz, huai tuh Bethel ahi, sik ah, simlam pang ah apai zel a; Beth-horon khang simlam pang a mual zul ah Ataroth-addar ah apaisuk hi.
06018014	Apai zel a, Beth-horon simlam pang a tangchin a pan tumlam ah simlam pang ah akualphei a; Kiriath-baal, huai Kiriath-jearim ahi, Judah suante khopi ah atawp a; huai tumlam pang gamgi ahi.
06018015	Simlam pang a gam Kiriath-jearim tawp a pan ahi a; tumlam ah apawt a, Nephtoah luituite ah apai zel hi.
06018016	Rephaim mallam pang phaizang a Hinnom Tapa phaizang chin a tangmong ah apaisuk a; Jebuste sik ah, simlam pang a Hinnom Phaizang ah apaisuk a, En-rogel ah apaisuk hi.
06018017	Mallam zuan in apai a, En-shemesh ah apai a, Adummim kahtouhna chin Geliloth ah apai a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaisuk a;
06018018	Arabah sik mallam pang ah apai zel a, Arabah ah apaisuk a;
06018019	Beth-hoglah sik, mallam pang ah apai zel a; atawpna bel Jordan simtawp, Chi Tuipi mallam tuipi meng ah ahi. Huai simlam gamgi ahi.
06018020	Jordan suahlam pang, agamgi chiang ahi. Huai ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam gam in akolhkhum sung.
06018021	Benjamin suante a-inkuan dungzui un akhopite uh, Jeriko, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz,
06018022	Beth-arabah, Zemariam, Bethel,
06018023	Avim, Parah, Ophrah,
06018024	Kephar-haammonai, Ophni leh Geba; akhopel tengteng toh akhopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi.
06018025	Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth,
06018026	Mizpeh, Kephirah, Mozah,
06018027	Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah;
06018028	Zelah, Eleph, Jebus, huai Jerusalem ahi, Gibeah leh Kiriath, akhotate toh khopi sawm-le-li ahi. Hiaite ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui ua atantuam ding ua kisepte.
06019001	Aisan nihveina Simeon suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam uh Judah suante tantuam lak ah atel hi.
06019002	Atantuam ding ua pukte Beer-sheba, Sheba, Moladah,
06019003	Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem,
06019004	Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah,
06019005	Ziklag, Beth-markaboth, Hazar-susah,
06019006	Beth-lebaoth leh Sharuhen; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi.
06019007	Ain, Rimmon, Ether leh Ashan: akhotate toh khopi li.
06019008	Huai khopi kim akhopel tengteng Baalath-beer simlam a Ramah apha hi. Huaite Simeon suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a amau tantuam dia seh ahi.
06019009	Simeon suante tantuam Judah suante tantuam lak a ahi. Judah suante tantuam amau a ding in aza lo ngal a; huaiziak in Simeon suante tantuam lak ah atel hi.
06019010	Aisan thumveina Zebulun suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam gamgi uh Sarid tan ahi.
06019011	Agamgi uh tumlam pang ah Maralah pha in apai a, Dabeseth ava tung a; Jokneam kiang a luita tan ava tung hi.
06019012	Sarid a pan suahlam pang nisuahna lam ah Kisloth-tabor gamgi pha in akawitou a; Daberath ah apawt hi.
06019013	Huai a pan suahlam pang ah Gittah-hepher leh Eth-kazin ah apai zel a, Neah lam zuan in Rimmon ah apawt hi.
06019014	Mallam ah Hannathon ah akualphei nawn a, apawtna Iphtah-el Phaizang ah ahi.
06019015	Katath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah leh Bethlehem; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi.
06019016	Hiaite ahi Zebulun suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh; huai khopite leh khopelte toh.
06019017	Aisan liveina Issakar suante tung ah a-inkuan uh omdan dungzui in apuk hi.
06019018	Agamgi chiang uh Jezreel, Kesuloth, Shunem,
06019019	Haphraim, Shion, Anaharath,
06019020	Rabbith, Kishion, Abez,
06019021	Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah leh Beth-pazzez tan ahi.
06019022	Tabor, Shahazimah leh Beth-shemesh ava pha a; apawtna Jordan ah ahi a, akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi.
06019023	Hiaite ahi Issakar suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh; khopite leh akhotate toh.
06019024	Aisan ngana Asher suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi.
06019025	Gamgi chiang Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaph,
06019026	Allammelek, Amad leh Mishal ahi a; tumlam pang ah Karmel tang leh Shihor-libnath aphasuk hi.
06019027	Nisuahna lam pang ah Beth-dagon akualtou a, Zebulun leh mallam pang ah Jiphthah-el Phaizang ah Beth-emek leh Neiel ava pha a; veilam ah Kabul pha in apai a,
06019028	Ebron leh Rehob, Hammon leh Kanah, Zidon thupi pha in apai zel hi.
06019029	Gamgi Ramah leh Tura khopi kulhbaang nei ah akualphei a, Hosah ah akualphei nawn a, Akzib gam tuipi ah apawt hi.
06019030	Ummah, Aphek leh Rehob; akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawmnih-le-nih ahi.
06019031	Huaite ahi Asher suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.
06019032	Aisan gukna Naphtali suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi.
06019033	Agamgi chiang uh Heleph leh Zaananim a singkung lianpi a pan Adami-nekeb, Jabneel leh Lakkum pha in apai a, Jordan ah atawp hi.
06019034	Tumlam pang ah Aznoth-tabor ah apaisuk a; huai a pan Hukok ah apai a, simlam ah Zebulun ava tung a, tumlam ah Asher atung a, nisuahna lam ah Judia gam a Jordan aphatou hi.
06019035	Khopi kulhbaang neite: Ziddim, Zer, Hamath, Rakkath, Kinneret,
06019036	Adamah, Ramah, Hazor,
06019037	Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor,
06019038	Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath leh Beth-shemesh ahi a, akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi.
06019039	Hiaite ahi Naphtali suante nam a-inkuan dungzui ua khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.
06019040	Aisan sagihna Dan suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi.
06019041	Atantuam gamgi uh Zorah, Estaol leh Ir-shemesh,
06019042	Shaalabbin, Aijalon leh Jethlah,
06019043	Elon, Timnah, Ekron,
06019044	Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath,
06019045	Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon,
06019046	Me-jarkon, Rakkon leh Joppa kiang a gamgi toh.
06019047	Dan suante gamgi in huaite ava kheng a; Dan suante'n Lesem adou ua, ala ua, namsau in ahihmang ua, atangta uh. Huai ah ateng pah ua, apu uh Dan min tam in Lesem, Dan ana chi uhi.
06019048	Hiaite ahi Dan suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, huai khopi leh akhotate toh atantuam uh.
06019049	Huchi in atantuam ding ua gamgi bawl bang zel a gam ahawm khit un, Israel suante'n Nun tapa Joshua alak uah tantuam abawlsak uhi.
06019050	Toupa thupiak bang in Ephraim singtang gam a, akhopi ding in anget mah Timnath-serah apia ua; ama'n khopi asat a, huai ah ateng hi.
06019051	Hiaite ahi siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente'n Shiloh a Toupa ma a kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a ai san a, agoutan ding ua ana hawmte uh. Huchi in gam kihawm azouta uhi.
06020001	Huan Toupa'n Joshua ahoupih a,
06020002	“Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Kihumbitna khuate bawl in, Mosi zang a na kiang ua ka gen khitsa ahi.
06020003	Kuapeuh thei lou leh tumloupi a mi that kha, huai ah atailut thei ding hi. Huchi in sisan phulami a pan nou a ding in kihumbitna ahi ding.
06020004	Huai khopite lak a akoi hiam pen a, atailut chiang in, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah ava dingh ding a, huai kho upate bil a zak in atanchin ava tun ding. Amau khopi sung ah akiang uah apilut ding ua, alak ua aten sam theihna ding in a-omna ding asehsak ding uhi.
06020005	Sisan phulami in ahon delhleh athatmi pen akhut ah na pe ding uh ahi kei. A-invengte thei lou a, athah ahi; ama in aho ngal kei hi.
06020006	Omkhawmte ma a vai hawmsak dia adin ma leh siampu lianpen a pangpa asih mateng, huai khopi ah ateng ding hi. Huai nung in mithat mi pen amah khosung mahmah, ataikhiaksan khua, amah mah insung ah alut nawn ding ahi,’ chi in gen in,” achi hi.
06020007	Huchi in Naphtali tanggam a Galili a Kadesh, Ephraim tanggam a Shekem leh Judia singtang gam a Kirath Arba, (huai tuh Hebron ahi) asep uhi.
06020008	Suahlam ah Jordan gal a Jeriko ah Reuben nam gam a gamdai phaizang a Bezer, Gad nam gam a Gilead gam a Ramoth, Manasseh nam gam a Bashan a Golan asepta uhi.
06020009	Hiai khuate ahi Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng leh alak ua namdang tengte a dia seh a om. Kuapeuh mi that kha, hiai khuate a tailut in mipi mai a adin mateng sisan phulami khut ah si lou in a-om thei ding hi.
06021001	Huchi in Levi chi inkuan a lupente siampu Eleazar kiang ah leh Nun tapa Joshua kiang ah leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente kiang ah ahoh uhi.
06021002	“Kanaan gam a Shiloh khua ah, Toupa'n Mosi zang in ka tenna ding uh khopite, ka gante uh tatna ding akimvel toh na hon piak ding uh thu ana peta,” achi uhi.
06021003	Huchi in Israel suante'n Toupa thupiak bang in atantuam ua kipan hiai khopite akimvel toh Levi chite apia uhi.
06021004	Aisan Kohath suan tung ah apukta hi. Huchi in siampu Aaron suan Levi chi a mite'n Judah nam tantuam a pan, Simeon nam tantuam a pan leh Benjamin nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi.
06021005	Kohath suan dangte'n Ephraim nam suante tantuam a pan, Dan nam tantuam a pan leh Manasseh nam kimkhat tantuam a pan khopi sawm aisan in atangta uhi.
06021006	Gershon suante'n Issakar nam suante tantuam a pan, Asher nam tantuam a pan, Naphtali nam tantuam a pan leh Bashan gam a Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi.
06021007	Merari suante'n a-inkuan uh dungzui in Reuben nam tantuam a pan, Gad nam tantuam a pan leh Zebulun nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-nih atangta uhi.
06021008	Israel suante'n Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu apiak bang in Levi mite khopite leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte aisan in apia uhi.
06021009	Huchi in Judah suante nam tantuam a pan leh Simeon suante nam tantuam a pan hiai khopi minlohte apia uhi.
06021010	Huaite Levi suan Kohath pawl a namte, Aaron suan pawl a ding ahi; amau tung ah aisan apuk masapen hi.
06021011	Amau a ding in Judah tanggam a Kiriath-arba leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh apia uhi. Kiriath-arba Hebron kichi ahi a, Arba ahihleh Anak pa ahi.
06021012	Khopi kimvelte leh akhotate Jephunneh tapa Kaleb tantuam ding in apia uhi.
06021013	Siampu Aaron suante Hebron, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Libnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021014	Jattir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Eshtemoa khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021015	Holon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Debir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021016	Ain khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Juttah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beth-shemesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; huai nam nihte tantuam a pan khopi kua apia uhi.
06021017	Benjamin nam tantuam a pan Gibeon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Geba khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021018	Anathoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Almon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li ape lai uhi.
06021019	Aaron suan siampute khopi tengteng khopi sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.
06021020	Kohath suante inkuan, Levi pawl leh Kohath suan dangte'n leng atantuam khopite uh Ephraim nam tantuam a pan in ahi atan uh.
06021021	Mi that mite kihumbitna khopi Ephraim singtang gam a Shekem khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gezer khua akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh,
06021022	Kibzaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Beth-horon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li apia uhi.
06021023	Dan nam tantuam a pan Eltekeh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gibbethon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021024	Aijalon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li.
06021025	Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan Taanak khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih.
06021026	Kohath suan dangte nam khopi tengteng kho sawm ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.
06021027	Gershon suante pawl, Levi namte Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Bashan gam a Golan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beeshterah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih apia uhi.
06021028	Issakar nam tantuam a pan Kishion khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Daberath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021029	Jarmuth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, En-gannim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li.
06021030	Asher nam tantuam a pan Mishal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021031	Helkath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Rehob khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li.
06021032	Naphtali nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Galili gam a Kadesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Hammoth-dor khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi thum.
06021033	Gershon pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, atantuam uh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.
06021034	Merari suante pawl inkuan, Levi pawl dangte bel Zebulun nam tantuam a pan Jokneam khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh,
06021035	Dimnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Nahalal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li.
06021036	Reuben nam tantuam a pan Bezer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jahaz khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh,
06021037	Kedemoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li.
06021038	Gad nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Gilead gam a Ramoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Mahanaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh;
06021039	Heshbon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jazer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; avek in khopi li.
06021040	Hiai tengteng Levi pawl inkuan dangte Merari suante pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, akhopite uh ahi. Huchi in atantuam uh khopi sawm-le-nih ahi.
06021041	Israel suante pawl tantuam a pan Levi pawl khopi tengteng sawmli-le-giat ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.
06021042	Hiai khopite'n akimvel anei chiat ua; khopi tengteng huchibang vek ahi uh.
06021043	Huchi in Toupa'n apipute uh kichiam a piak ana chiamsa gam tengteng Israelte apia hi. Amau huai gam aluah ua, asung ah atengta uhi.
06021044	Toupa'n apipute uh kiang a kichiam a, ana chiamsa bang ngei in mun chih ah muanna apia a, amelma tengteng uh kuamah ama ua pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi. Toupa'n amelma tengteng akhut uah ape vek hi.
06021045	Toupa'n Israel inkuante kiang a, ahoih lam thu a na gen tengteng vuaksuak khat leng a-om kei a, ahong tung vek hi.
06022001	Huai khit in Joshua in Reuben pawlte, Gad pawlte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte asam hi.
06022002	Akiang uah, “ Toupa sikha Mosi in hon thupiak peuhmah na zuita ua, ke'n thu ka hon piak peuhmah leng na zuita uhi.
06022003	Tuni tanpha in na unaute uh na taisan kei ua, Toupa na Pathian un hih dia thu ahon piak na zuita uhi.
06022004	Toupa na Pathian un akiang ua ana gensa bang in, na unaute uh muanna apeta hi. Huaiziak in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan gal a na tantuam ding ua hon piaksa gam ah, na puanin kaihte uah pai nawnta un.
06022005	Toupa sikha Mosi in Toupa na Pathian uh it a, alampi tengteng tawn a, athupiakte zui a, amah len tinten a, na lungtang tengteng uleh na kha tengteng ua amah nna sem chiatchiat dia hon thupiakte, huai thupiak leh dante pilvangtak in limsak un,” achi hi.
06022006	Joshua in amau avualzawl a, apaisakta hi. Huchi in apuanin lam uah apaita uhi.
06022007	Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in Bashan gam ah tantuam apia a; akimkhat dangte Joshua in tumlam pang ah Jordan gal ah a-unaute lak ah tantuam ape zawta hi. Joshua in a-inn lam ua apaisak dek lai in avualzawl hi.
06022008	Akiang uah, “Na puanin lam uah hauhsakna tamtak toh paita unla, ganta tampi toh, dangka toh, dangka-eng toh, dal toh, sik toh, silh-le-ten tampi toh. Na melmate ua pan na gallakte uh unaute toh kihawm dialdial un,” achi hi.
06022009	Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte akik nawn ua, Kanaan gam Shiloh a pan Israel suante kiang a pan Gilead gam, Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu a na piak bang in amau tantuam ding mawng a sehsa gam a pai ding in apawtkheta uhi.
06022010	Kanaan gam a Jordan gamgi ava tun un Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Jordan lui gei ah maitam lianpi kholang mahmah khat adoh uhi.
06022011	Ngai in, Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Kanaan gam chin tak, Jordan gamgi, Israel suante gam lam pang ah maitam adoh uh, chih Israelte kiang ah kuahiam khat in ava hilh hi.
06022012	Israel suante'n hiai thu azak un, Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng amaute dou tum in Shiloh ah akikhawm uhi.
06022013	Israel suante'n Gilead gam a Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas asawl uhi.
06022014	Milian sawmkhat, Israel nam a inkuan a lupente'n Phinehas azui uhi.
06022015	Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang Gilead gam ah ahoh ua, akiang uah,
06022016	huchi in Toupa mi omkhawm tengteng in, “Bangziak a tuni a Toupa tung a hel tum a maitam doh a, Toupa lehngatsan na hi ua?” achi uhi
06022017	“Peor mun a tatsiatnate, ei a dia neu lua a sim theih ahi maw? Tuni tan in leng huai a i khelhna ua pan silsiang i hi nai kei ua, Toupa mi omkhawmte lak ah hipi alen tanpha in leng.
06022018	Tuni a Toupa lehngatsan na tup maizen uh? Huchi in tuni in Toupa tung ah na na helta maimah ua, zingchiang a zaw Israel mipi omkhawm tengteng tung a amah heh ding ahita ve.
06022019	Na gam luah uh siang lou ahihleh, Toupa gam, Toupa biakbuk omna mun ah hong pai unla, ka lak uah hong teng un. Himahleh Toupa i Pathian un achih louh maitam dang bawl in Toupa tung ah hel kei unla, kou tung ah leng hel kei un.
06022020	Zer tapa Akan in hamsiat thil ah ana hihkhial a, Israel mipi tengteng tung ah hehna ahong om ahi kei maw? Huai mi tatsiatna ah amah kia amangthang tuam kei hi,” achi uhi.
06022021	Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Israel nam a intekpente adawng ua, akiang uah,
06022022	“ Toupa , pathiante' Pathian, pathiante Toupa Pathian in athei. Israel pawl in leng thei hen! Ka maitam doh uh Toupa lehngatsan a, hel tupna hiam thilhihkhelh tupna hiam a ka hih uleh, tuni in leng hon hawi kei un,
06022023	halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, lemna thillatna ding hiam ahihleh, Toupa mahmah in thukhen hen.
06022024	Tunung chiang in na suante un ka suante uh kiang ah, Nou Toupa , Israelte' Pathian na zat phakna uh bang om ahia?
06022025	Nou Reuben suante leh Gad suante aw, Toupa'n kou leh nou a ding in Jordan gamgi ding in abawl hi. Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh, ahon chi kha ding uh, chi a, pilvan ziak a aziak neitak a ka hih uh ahi. Na suante un kou suante Toupa laudan thei lou in abawl kha thei uhi.
06022026	Huaiziak in kisa un, maitam i bawl ding uh, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding bel hilou in.
06022027	Kou leh nou leh i nung ua i suante kikal ah theihpihna ahi dia, huchi in ka halmang thillatte uh leh ka kithoihnate uh leh ka lemna thillatte ua Toupa nna ka septheihna ding uh leh na suante un leng tunung chiang a ka suante uh kiang a Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh ahon chihlouhna ding un, ka chi ua ahi.
06022028	Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, tunung chiang a ka kiang uh hiam, ka suante uh kiang uh hiam a huchibang a ahon chih chiang ua kou, ‘En ve ua, ka pipute un Toupa maitam abawl uh omdan, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding ahi kei a, kou leh nou kikal a theihpihna ahi zaw hi,’ ka chihna ding ua, ka hih uh ahi.
06022029	Toupa tung a hel a Toupa lehngatsan a, Toupa ka Pathian uh maitam, abiakbuk chin a maitam kia lou halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, theihpihna ding hiam a maitam bawl ka hihlouhdan uh,” achi uhi.
06022030	Siampu Phinehas leh akiang a omkhawmte' miliante, Israel pawl nam intekpente'n Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte thugen azak un akipaksak mahmah hi.
06022031	Siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas in Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte kiang ah, “ Toupa tung a thil na hihkhelh louh ziak un, tu'n zaw Toupa i lak ua om ngeina ahi, chih ka theita ve ua. Huchi in Israel suante Toupa khut a pan na hunkheta uh,” achi uhi.
06022032	Huchi in siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas leh milian pawl, Reuben suante leh Gad suante a pan leh Gilead gam a pan Kanaan gam ah Israel suante kiang ah akik nawnta ua, thu ava tun nawn uhi.
06022033	Huai thute'n Israel suante akipaksak mahmah a; Israel suante'n Pathian aphatta uh. Huchi in Reuben suante leh Gad suante dou a, atenna gam uh suksiatsak ding in kuankhiak atum nawn kei uhi.
06022034	Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n huai maitam pen, “theihpihtu,” achi uhi. “ Toupa , Pathian a na hi ngei chih i kikal ua theihpihtu ahi ngal a,” achi uhi.
06023001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n Israelte amelma tengteng a pan galmuanna apiak nung hun sautak a pai nung in Joshua ahong upa in, ahong tekta hi.
06023002	Joshua in Israel tengteng, a-upate leh a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutu teng uh asamsak a, akiang uah, “Ka upa in, ka tekta hi.
06023003	Toupa na Pathian un noute ziak a hiai nam tengteng tung a athilhihte na muta ua; Toupa na Pathian un, amah mah in noute a ding in gal ahon dousak hi.
06023004	Ngai un, Jordan lui leh tumlam Tuipi Lian kikal a nam omlaite zou in, aisan in na tantuam ding un ka hon pia hi.
06023005	Toupa na Pathian un na ma uah amau adelhkhe dia, na muhbatlouhna uah ahawlmang vek ding. Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua agensa bang in agam uh na luah ding uhi.
06023006	Huaiziak in Mosi Dan laibu a gelh tengteng taklam ah hiam veilam ah hiam a na pialsan hetlouhna ding un hangsantak in zui un.
06023007	Hiai nam na lak ua omlaite toh tengkhawm kei un. Apathiante uh min gen kei unla, aminte un kichiam kei unla, a-nna uh leng sem kei unla, ama uah leng kun in a-nna uh sem kei un.
06023008	Himahleh tuni tan a na hih gige bang un, Toupa na Pathian uh lenkip un.
06023009	Toupa'n na ma uah nam thupitak leh hattakte adelhkhe khinta hi. Na ma uah tuni tan in kuamah pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi.
06023010	Na lak ua mi khat in mi sangkhat adelh ding, na kiang ua agensa bang in, Toupa na Pathian un nou a ding in gal ahon dousak ngal a.
06023011	Toupa na Pathian uh it ding in pilvang mahmah un.
06023012	Pilvang lou a, na lehngatsan himhim ua, hiai namte lak a khosuaksun, na lak ua omlaite ngei, na pawlmat ua, amaute toh pasal leh zi a na kineih ua, amaute na kithuahpih ua, amau leng nou ahon kithuahpih uleh zaw,
06023013	Toupa na Pathian un hiai namte na mitmuh un ahon delhkhiaksak nawn kei ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un hiai gam hoihtak a hon piak a pan na manthat vek masiah uh amaute nou a ding in pial leh thang leh na pang ua ding in khetna chiang leh na mit ua ding in ling ahong hi zaw ding uh, chih teltak in thei un.
06023014	“Ngai un, tuni in leitung pumpi dan bang in ka paita ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un na tungtang uh, ahoih lam, ana gensa tengteng vuaksuak khat lel leng a-om kei, chih na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng un na thei uhi. Na tung uah ahong tungvekta a, khat lel leng vuaksuak a-om kei hi.
06023015	Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua thil hoih agen tengteng na tung ua ahong tun vek tak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak hiai gam hoihtak a pan ahon manthatsak vek masiah Toupa'n thil hoihloute na tung uah atungsak ding hi.
06023016	Toupa na Pathian un ahon thupiak thukhun na tatlek san ua, pathian dangte nna sem a, kun a na biak uleh, Toupa hehna na tung uah a-om dia, ahon piak gam hoihtak a pan na mangthang pah ding uhi,” achi hi.
06024001	Huan Joshua in Israel nam tengteng Shekem ah asamkhawm a, Israel upate, a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutute uh asamsak a; Pathian ma ah ahong kimusak chiat uhi.
06024002	Joshua in mi tengteng kiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh nidanglai in lui khen lam ah ateng ua, Abraham pa leh Nahor pa Terah hialte leng, amaute'n pathian dangte nna asem uhi.
06024003	Na pu uh Abraham huai lui gal a pan ka pikhia a, Kanaan gam teng tawnsuak in ka pi a, asuante ka pungsak a, Isak ka pia hi.
06024004	Isak kiang ah Jakob leh Esau ka pia a; Esau tantuam ding in Seir tang ka pia a; Jakob leh atate Aigupta ah apaisuk uhi.
06024005	Mosi leh Aaron ka sawl a, alak ua thillamdang hih in Aigupta ka gawt a: huai khit in amaute ka hon pikhia hi.
06024006	Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhia a, tuipi na hong tung ua; Aigupta mite'n na pipute uh kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite toh Tuipi San tan in anungdelh uhi.
06024007	Amau Toupa asam ua, Aigupta mite toh na kikal uh amialsak bikbek a, amaute tuipi tuamsak in akhuhkhumsak a; Aigupta gam a ka thilhih na mit un amu a; gamdai ah sawtpi na teng uhi.
06024008	Jordan lui gal a om Amorte gam ah ka hon pi a; amau ahon dou uh. Na khut uah amaute ka hon pia a, agam uh na luahta uhi. Amau ka hon hihmangsakta hi.
06024009	Moab kumpipa Zippor tapa Balak ahong kisa a, Israel adou a; Beor tapa Balaam nou hon hamsiat ding in asamsak hi.
06024010	Himahleh Balaam thu ka ngaikhe kei hi. Huaiziak in nou ahon vualzawl zosopta hi. Huchi in akhut a pan ka hon hunkheta hi.
06024011	Jordan lui na kan ua, Jeriko khua na tungtou ua; Jeriko khomite'n hon na dou ua, Amorte, Perizte, Kanaante, Hitte, Girgaste, Hivte leh Jebuste toh; amau na khut uah ka hon peta hi.
06024012	Na ma uah tunpi ka sawl a, huai in na ma uah amau adelh a, Amorte' kumpipa nihte tan in leng. Himahleh na namsau un hiam, na thal un hiam in ahi kei hi.
06024013	“Na sepkhiak het louh uh gam leh na bawl het louh uh khopite ka hon pia a, huaite ah na teng ua; na suan louh uh grephuan leh olive huan a pan na ne uhi.
06024014	“Huaiziak in Toupa laudan siam unla, chitak leh thutak in ama nna sem un. Na pipute un Lui gal leh Aigupta gam a, a-nna asep uh pathiante koihkhia unla; Toupa nna sem un.
06024015	Toupa nna sep hoih lou a na theih uleh tuni in kua nna ahia na sep ding uh, tel un. Na pipute un Lui gal a, a-nna asep uh pathiante hia, na luah uh gam a Amorte pathiante? Kei leh inkuante'n zaw Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh,” achi hi.
06024016	Mipite'n, “ Toupa Pathian paisan a, pathian dangte nna ka sep louh ding dan uh.
06024017	Toupa i Pathian ngei ahi, i pipute toh Aigupta gam saltanna inn a pan hon pikhia a, i mitmuh a chiamtehna thupi taktak hih a, i paina teng leh mipi tengteng i nawk paisuakna ah leng hon vengbit hi.
06024018	Toupa'n i ma ngei uah mi chih, huai gam a om Amorte ngei adelhkhe vek hi. Huaiziak in kou leng Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh; amah lah ka Pathian uh ahi ngal a,” chi in adawng uhi.
06024019	Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “ Toupa nna na sem thei kei ding uh. Amah lah Pathian siangthou ahi ngal a. Mullit hat Pathian ahi a; na tatleknate uh leh na khelhnate uh angaidam kei ding hi.
06024020	Toupa na paisan ua, namdang pathiante nna na sep uleh, na tung ua thil hoih ahih khit nung in ahong kihei dia, hon hih na in ahon hihmangthang ding,” achi hi.
06024021	Mipite'n, Joshua kiang ah, “Hilou e, Toupa nna ka sem kinken zaw ding uh,” achi uhi.
06024022	Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “A-nna sep tum in Toupa na telta uh, chih atheihpihtute noumau mah na hi uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
06024023	Amah mah in, “Huchi ahihleh na lak ua namdang pathian omte koihmang unla, na lungtangte uh Toupa , Israelte' Pathian lam ah awnsak un,” achi hi.
06024024	Mipite'n Joshua kiang ah, “ Toupa i Pathian nna ka sem ding ua, athu ka zui ding uh,” achi uhi.
06024025	Huai ni in Joshua in mipite toh kikal ah thu akhung a, Shekem ah dan thuseh leh thuseh asehsak hi.
06024026	Joshua in hiai thu Pathian Dan Laibu ah agelh a; suang lianpi ala a, Toupa Mun Siangthou chin a tosaw nuai ah aphut hi.
06024027	Joshua in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, hiai suang i thu hon theihpihtu hi hen. Toupa'n i kiang ua thu agen tengteng aza vekta hi. Huaiziak in na thu uh hon theihpihtu ahi ding hi, huchi lou in zaw Pathian na kitheihmohbawl kha ding uh,” achi hi.
06024028	Huchi in Joshua in mipite atantuam gam chiat uah apaisakta hi.
06024029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thilte khit in Nun tapa Joshua, Toupa sikha kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi.
06024030	Gaash tang mallam pang, Ephraim tanggam a amah tantuam gamgi sung Timnath-serah ah avuita uhi.
06024031	Joshua damsung leh amah khup a dam, Toupa'n Israelte a dia thil ahih tengteng theihpih mite damsung in Israelte'n Toupa nna asem uhi.
06024032	Israel suante'n Aigupta gam a pan Joseph guhte apuaktouh uh Shekem a Shekem pa Hamor tapate a pan Jakob in dangka zakhat a aleina mun ah avui ua; huai mun Joseph suante tantuam ahita hi.
06024033	Huan Aaron tapa Eleazar asi a; atapa Phinehas tantuam dia apiak Ephraim tang ah avui uhi.
07001001	Joshua sih nung in hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante'n, “Kanaante dou a ei a dia hon sualsak ding in kua akuantou masa dia?” chi in Toupa adong uhi.
07001002	Toupa'n , “Judah va kuan hen. Ngai un, akhut ah gam ka peta,” achi hi.
07001003	Judah in a-unau Simeon kiang ah, “Kanaante dou ding in ka gam tantuam ah hong paitou in. Kei leng na gam tantuam ah ka hong pai sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Simeon akiang ah ahohta hi.
07001004	Huchi in Judah ava hoh a; Kanaante leh Perizte Toupa'n akhut uah apeta hi. Bezek ah mi singkhat athat uhi.
07001005	Bezek ah Adoni-bezek amu ua, adou ua, Kanaante leh Perizte athat uhi.
07001006	Himahleh Adoni-bezek atai a; anungdelh ua, aman ua, akhutpi leh akhepi atansak uhi.
07001007	Adoni-bezek in, “Kumpipa sawmsagihte khutpi leh khepi ka tankhiaksakte'n ka dohkan nuai ah anneng atawm uh. Ka hih bang geih a Pathian in hon thuk ahita ve,” achi hi. Jerusalem ah api ua, huai ah asita hi.
07001008	Judah suante'n Jerusalem khua dou in ala ua, namsau a sual in akhopi ahal uhi.
07001009	Huai nung in Judah suante tanggam simlam leh phaizang a teng Kanaante dou ding in akuansuk uhi.
07001010	Judah in Kanaante Hebron a tengte ava dou a, (ama in Hebron min Kiriath-arba ahi) Sheshai, Ahiman leh Talmai athat uhi.
07001011	Huai a pan Debir khomite adou uh, ama in Debir kho min Kiriath-sepher ahi.
07001012	Kaleb in, “Kuapeuh Kiriath-sepher khua dou a, la peuhmah ka tanu Aksah azi ding in ka pe ding,” achi hi.
07001013	Kaleb nau Kenaji tapa Othniel in alazou a, azi ding in atanu Aksah apeta hi.
07001014	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ava tun in gam ngen thei ding in apa akunzou hi. Sabiltung a pan akumkhia a; Kaleb in akiang ah, “Bang na deih a?” achi hi.
07001015	Ama'n akiang ah, “Hon vualzawl in. Simlam gam lah na hon peta ngal a, tui nak neite leng hon pe lai in,” achi hi. Kaleb in tui nak nei tungnungte leh khangnungte apeta hi.
07001016	Mosi puzon Ken suante Arad simlam a om Judah gamdai ah Judah suante toh tum sing khopi a pan ahohtou ua; mipite lak ah ava teng uhi.
07001017	Judah bel a-unau Simeon toh akisa ua, Zephath a om Kanaante ava that ua, ahihchimit vek uhi. Huai khopi min Hormah chih ahi.
07001018	Judah in Gaza khua leh abialte, Ashkelon khua leh abialte leh Ekron khua leh abialte tan in ala hi.
07001019	Toupa Judah kiang ah a-om a; tanggam a tengte adelhkhia a; phaizang a tengte bel sik kangtalaite aneih ziak un adelhkhe zou kei hi.
07001020	Mosi in ana gensa bang in Hebron khua Kaleb apia ua, ama'n huai a pan Anak tapa thumte adelhkhia hi.
07001021	Benjamin suante'n Jebuste, Jerusalem a tengte adelhkhe kei ua, Jebuste Benjamin suante toh tuni tan in Jerusalem ah atengkhawm uhi.
07001022	Joseph inkuante leng Bethel khua dou ding in akisatou ua, akiang uah Toupa a-om hi.
07001023	Joseph inkuante'n Bethel ah enkhe mite asawl uhi. Ama in huai kho min Luz ahi.
07001024	Enkhe mite'n mi khat khosung a pan hong pawtkhia amu ua, akiang ah, “Hehpih in khopi sung lutna hon ensak dih ve, huchi in ka hon hehpih ding uh,” achi uhi.
07001025	Khopi sung lutna a-ensak a, namsau in huai khua adou ua; huai mipa leh a-inkuanpihte teng bel ahinghawi uhi.
07001026	Huai mipa Hitte gam a lut in khua asat a, huai kho min Luz asa a; tuni tan in hiai min apu lai hi.
07001027	Manasseh in Beth-shean khua leh akhopel a tengte, Taanak khua leh akhopel a tengte, Dor khua leh akhopel a tengte, Ibleam khua leh akhopel a tengte, Meggiddo khua leh akhopel a tengte adelhkhe kei hi. Huai gam ah Kanaante ateng uhi.
07001028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante ahong hat un anasem ding un Kanaante a-omsak ua, adelhkhe siang vek kei uhi.
07001029	Ephraim in Gezer a teng Kanaante adelhkhe kei a; Gezer ah alak uah Kanaante ateng zawta uh.
07001030	Zebulun in Kitron a tengte leh Nahalol a tengte adelhkhe kei a; Kanaante alak uah ateng sam ua, anasem ding un a-om zawta uhi.
07001031	Asher in Akko a tengte, Zidon a tengte, Ahlab a tengte, Akjib a tengte, Helbah a tengte, Aphik a tengte leh Rehob a tengte adelhkhe kei hi.
07001032	Asher suante huai gam a teng Kanaante lak ah ateng samta uhi; amau lah adelhkhe ngal kei ua.
07001033	Naphtali in Beth-shemesh a tengte, Beth-anath a tengte adelhkhe kei. Huai gam a teng Kanaante lak ah ateng samta uhi. Beth-shemesh a tengte leh Beth-anath a tengte nasem ding in a-omta uhi.
07001034	Amorte'n Dan suante tanggam ah ahawltou uh; phaizang a apaisuk uh aphal ngal kei ua.
07001035	Amorte Aijalon a Heres tang leh Shaalbim ah ateng ua, Joseph inkuante'n amau azou ua, anasem ding un alak uah ateng uhi.
07001036	Amorte gam chiang Akrabbim tungkahna a pan, suangpi a pan leh Sela a pan ahi.
07002001	Toupa Angel khat Gilgal a pan Bokim ah ahohtou hi. Ama'n, “Aigupta gam a pan ka hon pawtsak a, ‘na pipute uh kiang a kichiam a ka na chiamsa gam ah ka hon pilut a, noute toh ka thukhun ka bohse kei hial ding.
07002002	Hiai gam a tengte toh thu khung kei unla; amaitamte uh hihchipsak un’ ka chi hi. Himahleh ka thupiak na zui kei ua, bangziak in ahia hiai na hih uh?
07002003	Huaiziak in amaute ka hon delhkhiaksak nawn kei dia, na pang uah lingte ahi zawta ding ua, apathiante uh nou a ding in thang ahi ding uh,” ka chi ahi.
07002004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa angel in Israel suan tengteng kiang a hiai thu agenleh mipite aw suah hial in akap uhi.
07002005	Huai mun min Bokim asa ua; huai ah Toupa kiang ah kithoihnate alan uhi.
07002006	Joshua in mipite akikhenzaksak nung in Israel suante michih amau tantuam gam chiat luah ding in apaita uhi.
07002007	Joshua damsung leh upate Joshua kheng a dam teng, Toupa'n Israelte a dia thil thupi ahih tengteng mu mite damsung in mipite'n Toupa nna asem uhi.
07002008	Nun tapa Joshua, Toupa sikha kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi.
07002009	Gaash tang mallam pang Ephraim tanggam a amah tantuam gamgi sung Timnath Heres ah avui uhi.
07002010	Huai khang a mi teng leng apipute uh kiang ah apaikhawmta uhi. Amaute nung in Toupa leh Israelte a dia athilhihte thei lou suan dang ahong omta hi.
07002011	Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ua, Baal nna asem uhi.
07002012	Toupa , apipute uh Pathian, Aigupta gam a pan pikhepa alehngatsan ua, pathian dangte, akim ua tengte pathiante azui ua, abia ua, Toupa ahehsakta uhi.
07002013	Toupa alehngatsan ua, Baal leh Astoreth nna asem uhi.
07002014	Israelte tung ah Toupa ahehta a, amau dou mite khut ah apia a, amelma uh, akim ua tengte kiang ah akhawng a, amelmate uh azouta kei uhi.
07002015	Koipeuh ah hoh mah le uh Toupa khut atung uah aselam in ake zel a, Toupa'n akiang ua kichiam a agensa bang in. Huchi in buai namai in abuaita kei uhi.
07002016	Himahleh Toupa'n vaihawmte abawlsak a, huaite'n amau dou mite khut a pan ahunkheta hi.
07002017	Huchipi in leng avaihawmte uh thu angaikhe kei ua, pathian dangte kiang a angkawm in amaute abe zawta ua, apipute un Toupa thupiakte pom a azuih uh lampi pen apialsan pah maimah uhi.
07002018	Toupa'n vaihawmte abawlsak chiang in, vaihawmmi kiang ah Toupa a-om a, vaihawmte damsung in amelmate uh khut a pan ahunkhe zel hi. Amau nuaisiah mite leh hihlungkham mite ziak a amauna un, Toupa akisiksak hi.
07002019	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, vaihawmmi asih khit chiang in, anungtolh ua, pathian dangte zui a, a-nna uh asep uah apipute uh sang mah in agamta sezaw sem ua; athilhihte uh leh apaupenna uh leng atawpsan tuan kei uhi.
07002020	Israelte tung ah Toupa ahehta a, “Hiai namte'n apipute uh thu ka piak, ka thukhun abohsia ua, ka thu lah angaikhe kei ua;
07002021	huaiziak in tuban Joshua sih ma a delhkhiak louh namte ka delhkhiaksak nawn kei ding.
07002022	Apipute uh zuih bang a Toupa dan zuih ding leh ding louh uh Israelte ze-etna ding in amau ka zang ding,” achi hi.
07002023	Huchi in Toupa'n huai namte delhkhe pah lou in a-omsakta a; Joshua khut ah leng apekhe kei hi.
07003001	Kanaan gam a galdou kha nai het lou Israelte etchetna ding in Toupa'n hiai namte anusia hi.
07003002	Atup bel Israel suante, tuma a galdoudan thei nai hetloute galdoudan sinsak ahihna ding lel ahi.
07003003	Huaite bel: Philistiate kumpipa ngate, Kanaan mi tengte, Sidonte leh Lebanon tang a teng Hivte ahi ua, Baal-hermon tang a pan Hamath lutna pha in ahi uh.
07003004	Toupa'n Mosi zang a apipute uh thu ana piakte azuih ding uh leh zuih louh ding uh theihna ding in, huaite Israelte chetna ding ahi uh.
07003005	Israel suante Kanaante, Hitte, Amorte, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste lak ah ateng uhi.
07003006	Atanute uh zi in anei ua, atanute uh atapate uh zi in apia ua, apathiante uh nna asem uhi.
07003007	Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ua, Toupa a Pathian uh amangngilh ua, Baal leh Astoreth nna asem uhi.
07003008	Huchi in Toupa Israelte tung ah ahehta a, Mesopotamia gam kumpipa Kushan-risathaim kiang ah azuakta hi. Huchi in Israel suante'n Kushan-risathaim nna kum giat asem uhi.
07003009	Israel suante'n Toupa asaptak un, Toupa'n Israel suante hunkhepa abawlsak a, huai mi in amau ahunkheta hi. Huai mi bel Kaleb naupa Kenaz tapa Othniel ahi.
07003010	Toupa kha atung ah ahong tung a, Israel tung ah vai ahawm hi. Ama'n Mesopotamia gam kumpipa Kushan-risathaim ava dou a, Toupa'n Kushan-risathaim a khut ah apia a, azouta hi.
07003011	Huchi in kum sawmli gam galmuang in a-omta a, huchi in Kenaz tapa Othniel asita hi.
07003012	Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih nawn uh. Toupa mitmuh a thil ahihkhelh ziak un Toupa'n Israelte tung ah Moab kumpipa Eglon ahatsak hi.
07003013	Ama'n Ammon leh Amalek suante akaikhawm a; Israelte ava dou a, tum sing khopi aluahta hi.
07003014	Huchi in Moab kumpipa Eglon thunuai ah Israelte kum sawm-le-giat a-om uhi.
07003015	Himahleh Israel suante'n Toupa asaptak un, Toupa'n Gera tapa Ehud, Benjamin mi, miveilong, hunkhepa abawlsak hi. Israel suante'n Moab kumpipa piak ding kipahman Ehud atawisak uhi.
07003016	Ehud in namsau hiamtuah tongtan a sau in asek a; puan nuai ah ataklam pheipi ah ahenbelh hi.
07003017	Moab kumpipa Eglon kipahman ava pia a; Eglon bel mithautak ahi.
07003018	Kipahman ava piak khit in, kipahman tawite apaisak nawn hi.
07003019	Amah bel Gilgal kho kiang a suangsekna mun a pan anungkik nawn a, “I aw, kumpipa, hon hilh ding thuguk ka nei hi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Dai un,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang a dingh teng in apawtkhiaksan vek uhi.
07003020	Ehud in akiang ava naih a; amah bel anipi dantan ah amah kia in ana tu hi. Ehud in, “Pathian in na kiang a gen ding thu ahon thukhak hi,” achi hi. Atutphah a kipan amah hong dingh hi.
07003021	Ehud in akhut veilam in apheipi taklam a namsau adokkhia a, agil ah adawt hi.
07003022	Anamsau bul tan in atum a, athau in namsau ahubit a, agilpi a pan namsau adokkhe kei a, a-ek atolhkhia hi.
07003023	Huchi in Ehud inlim ah apawt a, dantan kongkhakte akhakkhum a, akalh bikbek hi.
07003024	Apawt khit nung in, asikhate ahong pai ua, ava ettak un ngai in, dantan kongkhakte ana kikalh hi. “Anipi dantan ah atuam om tadih a hi in teh,” achi uhi.
07003025	Zumhuai tan khop in angak nilouh ua, ngai in, dantan kongkhakte ahong himhim kei a; huchi in chabi ala ua, ahong ua; ngai in, akumpipa uh pialkhang ah sisa in ana puk hi.
07003026	Ehud lah huchi a angak nilouh sung un ana taimang khin a, huai suangsekna mun akheng a, Seirah ah atailut hi.
07003027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai mun atun in Ephraim tanggam ah pengkul amut a, Israel suante tanggam a pan akiang ah apaisuk ua, ama'n ama uh akaita hi.
07003028	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon zui dih ua. Toupa'n na melma uh Moabte hon pe khinta ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in azuisuk ua, Moab gam chin Jordan lui kannate ala ua; kuamah agalkah uh aphal kei hi.
07003029	Huai hun in Moabte mihat ngen taleh mihat hangsan hoih ngenta singkhat athat ua; khat lel leng taikhia a-om kei uh.
07003030	Huchi in huai ni in Israelte lak ah Moabte azahlak uhi. Huchi in gam kum sawmgiat sung galmuang in a-om hi.
07003031	Anung in Anath tapa Shamgar ahong kilang a, huai mi'n bawng sutna chiang in Philistiate zaguk asunlum a; Israelte ahunkhia hi.
07004001	Ehud sih nung in Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih nawn uh.
07004002	Huchi in Hazor a vaihawmpa, huai Kanaan gam kumpipa Jabin kiang ah Toupa'n akhawngta hi. Huai mi sepaih heutupen bel Sisera ahi a, Zentelte gam Haroseth ah ateng hi.
07004003	Israel suante'n Toupa asam uh. Huai mi in kangtalai zakua tak anei a, kum sawmnih sung Israel suante nakpitak in anuaisiah hi.
07004004	Huai lai in Lapidoth zi, zawlnei Deborah in Israelte tung ah vai ahawm hi.
07004005	Ephraim tanggam a Ramah leh Bethel kho kikal a tum sing nuai ah Deborah ateng hi. Israel suante akiang ah avai uh hawmsak ding in ahong hoh zel uhi.
07004006	Kedesh Naphtali gam a pan Abinoam tapa Barak athukhak a, akiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in, Tabor Tang kiang ah hohtou inla, Naphtali suante leh Zebulun suante mi singkhat pi in.
07004007	Huchi in Kishon lui ah Jabin sepaih heutu Sisera, akangtalaite leh amipite toh ka hon sawl ding; amah nang ka hon pe ding, chi in thu ahon pia ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
07004008	Barak in akiang ah, “Hon tonpih lechin ka hoh ding. N'on tonpih kei dingleh ka hoh kei ding,” achi hi.
07004009	Ama'n, “K'on tonpih tham ding. Himahleh na hohna a minhoih loh lou ding na hi. Toupa'n Sisera numei kiang ah akhawng ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Deborah athou a, Barak toh Kedesh ah ahohta uhi.
07004010	Barak in Zebulunte leh Naphtalite Kedesh ah athukhakkhawm a; mi singkhat amah toh ahohtou ua; Deborah leng akiang uah ahohtou sam hi.
07004011	Ken mi Heber bel Mosi puzon Hobab suante lak a pan ana om tuam a, Kadesh kiang a Zaanaim gam a tosaw sing mun ah apuanin ava kai hi.
07004012	Abinoam tapa Barak bel Tabor tang ah ahohtou chih Sisera ahilh uhi.
07004013	Huchi in Sisera in akangtalai tengteng, sik kangtalai zakua leh aheute Zentelte gam Haroseth a pan, Kishon lui ah akaikhawm hi.
07004014	Huchi in Deborah in Barak kiang ah, “Khai le, tuni Toupa'n Sisera hon piak ni ahi. Na makaipa Toupa ahi kei a hia?” achi hi. Huchi in Barak Tabor tang a pan apaisuk a, mi singkhat in azuisuk uhi.
07004015	Toupa'n Sisera leh akangtalai tengteng leh asepaih tengteng namsau in Barak ma ah ahihbuai gawpta a; akangtalai a pan Sisera akumkhia a, akhe in ataimang hi.
07004016	Barak in bel kangtalaite leh sepaihte Zentel gam Haroseth pha in adelh hi. Huchi in Sisera sepaih tengteng namsau in athat vek a; khat lel leng ahinghawi kei uhi.
07004017	Sisera bel Ken mi Heber zi Jael puanin ah khe in atailut hi. Hozor Kumpipa Jabin leh Ken mi Heber inkuante kikal ah lemna a-om hi.
07004018	Jael bel Sisera dawn ding in ahong pawt a, akiang ah, “Pu, hong lut in, ka kiang ah hong lut in; lau ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in puanin sung ah akiang ah alutta a, ama'n puan in akhuh hi.
07004019	Akiang ah, “Hehpih in tui tawmchik hon pe dih ve, ka dang atak mahmah hi,” achi hi. Ama'n bawngnawi thawl ahong a, adawnsak a, akhuhkhum nawn hi.
07004020	Akiang ah, “Puanin kongpi ah ding inla, huchi in ‘Hiai ah mi a-om hia?’ chi a hon dot uleh, ‘om lou’ na chi zel in,” achi hi.
07004021	Heber zi Jael in puanin khetkilhna ala a, sek atawi a, awlchik in akhe asuanphei a, khetkilhna in ahaizek ah akhen paisuak a, lei toh akilhbelh hi. Bah in a-ihmut alim mahmah ngal a; huchi in asita hi.
07004022	Ngai in, Barak in Sisera ahon delh a, amah tuak ding in Jael ava pawt a, akiang ah, “Hong pai in, na mi zon ka hon ensak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang ah ava hoh a; ngai in, Sisera ana sita mai a, ahaizek ah puanin khetkilhna ana tal hi.
