07004023	Huchi in Pathian in huai ni in Israel suante ma ah Kanaan gam kumpipa Jabin anuaisiah hi.
07004024	Kanaan kumpipa Jabin anuaisiah masiah uh, Kanaan kumpipa Jabin tung ah Israel suante ahat semsem uhi.
07005001	Huai ni in Deborah leh Abinoam tapa Barak in hiai la asa uhi:
07005002	“Israel a makaite'n ma akaih lai un, amau ut thu a mite'n azuih lai un, Toupa phat un!
07005003	Aw, nou kumpipate aw, ngaikhia un. Aw, nou heutute aw, bil na doh un. Kei mahmah in Toupa pahtawi in la ka sa dia, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian phat in la ka sa ding hi.
07005004	Toupa , Seir gam a pan na hong paikhiak a, Edom loubuk a na hong pawt in, lei aling a, van ahong kia a, meipi'n vuah azusak uhi.
07005005	Toupa ma ah tangte achim ua, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian ma ah Sinai Tang mah leng.
07005006	Anath tapa Samgar dam lai nite leh Jael dam lai nite in lamliante tot louh in a-om ua, zin-le-lengte lah lam neute ah apai uhi.
07005007	Israel gamte atul khin a, akhuate luah louh in atul khin hi, kei Deborah ka gamtang a, Israel gam nu ka gamtat masiah.
07005008	Amau pathian thakte atel ua; huchi in kulh kongkhak bul ah kidouna a-om a; Israel gam a mi singli lak ah lum leh tei muh in a-om hia?
07005009	Ka lungsim Israelte vaihawmpa, mipite lak a lungluttak a kipiate lam ah a-om hi. Toupa phat un.
07005010	Pau un, nou sabiltung kang tung a tuangte, nou vaihawmna a tute leh lampi a paite.
07005011	Thalkap mite husa zak phak louh, tui tawina mun ah Toupa thil dik hihte agengen ua, Israel gam tung a thil dik ahihte ngei. Huchi in Toupa mipite kulh kongkhakte lam ah apaisuk ding uhi.
07005012	Thou in, thou in, Deborah; thou in, thou in, la sa in. Thou in, Barak, thou inla, Abinoam tapa, na salmatte pi in.
07005013	Huchi in mi omlaite mipite lak a miliante tung ah thu aneisak a, Toupa'n mihat tung ah thu hon neisak hi.
07005014	Ephraim a pan zungzam khat Amalek dou a-om a, Benjamin, na mite lak a mite'n nang hon zui uh, Makir a pan gam vaihawmte ahong paisuk ua, Zebulun a pan laigelhmi chiangkhun tawi mite ahong paisuk uhi.
07005015	Deborah kiang ah Issakar miliante a-om ua; Issakar leh Barak mah leng. Amah phaizang lam a sawlsuk ahi a, Reuben pawlte ahihleh nakpitak in akingaihtuah lai uhi.
07005016	Bangziak a belam huang lak a tu nilouh, belamhon ham ngai ding lel in maw? Reuben pawlte a ding in lungtang a kingaihtuahna thupitak a-om hi.
07005017	Gileadte Jordan gal ah a-om nilouh ua; bangziak a Dante longte a om nilouh uh ahia? Asherte tuipi piau ah atu kinken ua, atuipiaute ah a-om nilouh uhi.
07005018	Zebulun leh Naphtali leng mun sang pawn a sih ngap gigete ahi uh.
07005019	Kumpipate'n ahong dou ua, Kanaan kumpipate'n Meggiddo tui kiang, Taanak ah adou ua; sum himhim ala kei uhi.
07005020	Van a pan ahon dou ua; aksite'n amun ua kipan Sisera ahon dou uh.
07005021	Kishon lui in amaute ataimang a, nidanglai lui, Kishon lui in, Aw ka kha, hattak in pai zel in.
07005022	Huchi in sakolte akipek thotthot ua, sakol hatte atawmtawm ziak un.
07005023	Meroz hamsiat un,” Toupa angel in achi, huai a tengte nakpitak in hamsiat un. Toupa panpih ding, Toupa'n mihattak adouna panpih dia ahong louh ziak un.
07005024	Numei lak ah Jael, Ken mi Heber zi nuamsapen ahi, numei puanin a tengte lak ah amah minuamsapen ahi.
07005025	Tui ahong ngen a, ama'n nawitui apia hi: miliante' nou in nawituidat ana pia hi.
07005026	Kilhna atawi a, ataklam in nasemmi sek; sek in Sisera akhen a, alu ah akhen pailet a, ahi, ahaizek ah akhen a, akhental vengvong hi.
07005027	Akhebul ah akun a, apuk a, alum a; akhebul ah akun a, apukta a; apukna mun ah asita hi.
07005028	Sisera nu bel tawlet ah adak a, vathangkalh awng ah asam a, “Bang achia kangtalai hong tunghak ahia? Bang achia akangtalai khe zekai ahia?” achi hi.
07005029	Anumei pilte'n ana dawng ua, ahi, amah dawng ding in ahong nawn ua:
07005030	Amuzouta kei ua hia? Gallak kihawmta lou uhia? Michih in nungak khat hiam nih chiat; Sisera tan ding gallak puan ze tuamtuam, gallak puan ze kilawm, ze tuamtuam, gallak ngawng a velh ding puan, alangnih a ze kilawm, ze tuamtuam, chi in.
07005031	“Huchibang in aw, Toupa , na melmate tengteng mangthang vek uhen. Amah itte bel hattak a pai, nisa bang hi uhen,” achi uhi. Huchi in kum sawmli sung gam galmuang in a-om hi.
07006001	Huan Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih uh. Huchi in Toupa'n Midiante khut ah kum sagih sung apekhia hi.
07006002	Midiante'n Israelte azouta ua; huchi in Midiante ziak in tang ah kokhukte, kohawm leh kulhte abawl uhi.
07006003	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte'n haichi achin khit un Midiante, Amalekte leh suahlam mite ahong kuan ua; ava dou ua,
07006004	panmun ava khoh ua, Gaza tan in lei a thilpoute ahihsiatsak ua, Israel gam ah nek ding himhim ahawi kei ua, belam, bawng leh sabiltung tan in ahihse vek uhi.
07006005	Aganhonte uh leh apuaninte uh toh ahong kuan ua, khaupe bang in tampi ahong kuan ua; amaute leh asangawngsaute uh sim seng ahi kei, gam hihse dia hong kuan ahi uhi.
07006006	Huchi in Midiante ziak in Israelte akeniam mahmahta ua; huchi in Israel suante'n Toupa asamta uhi.
07006007	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Midiante ziak a Israel suante'n Toupa asaptak un, Toupa'n Israel suante kiang ah zawlnei khat asawl a; ama'n akiang uah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in, hichi in achi:
07006008	‘Aigupta gam a pan ka hon pitou a, saltanna inn a pan ka hon pikhia hi.
07006009	Aiguptate khut a pan leh nou hon nuaisiah mi teng khut a pan ka hon hunkhia a, na ma uah amaute ka delhkhia a, agam uh nou ka hon pia hi.
07006010	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, agam ua na tenna uh Amorte pathiante na lau ding uh ahi kei, ka chi hi’. Himahleh ka thugen na zui kei uh,” achi hi.
07006011	Huan Toupa angel ahong pai a, Ophrah a Abiezer mi Joash tosaw sing nuai ah atu hi. Atapa Gideon in Midiante muh louh ding in grep sukna khuk ah buh ana vua hi.
07006012	Toupa angel akiang ah ahong kilak a, akiang ah, “Nang mihat hangsan, na kiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi.
07006013	Gideon in akiang ah, “Aw ka toupa, ka kiang ua Toupa om ahihleh bangchidan a hichibang a ka tung ua hiai thilte hong tung ahia? Ka pipute un, Toupa'n Aigupta gam a pan hon pitou hilou hia? chi a, athilhih lamdang ahon hilhte uh koilam a bangchi khinta ahia? Tu'n zaw, Toupa'n hon pampaih ahita a, Midiante khut a hon peta ei ve,” achi hi.
07006014	Toupa'n , amah a-en a, akiang ah, “Hiai na hatna in kuan in, Midiante a pan Israelte hunkhia in. K'on sawl ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
07006015	Ama'n akiang ah, “Aw Toupa , bangchi in ahia Israelte ka va hutkhiak mahmah ding? Ngai in, Manasseh suan lak a inkuan hatloupen ka hi ua, kei lah ka pa inkote lak a neupen ka hi ngal a,” achi hi.
07006016	Toupa'n , akiang ah, “Na kiang ah ka om ngeingei ding hi, huchi in Midiante mi khat lel bang in na zou vek ding,” achi hi.
07006017	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, nang mahmah in na hon pi chih chiamtehna banghiam hon musak in.
07006018	Na ma a lat ding thilpiak ka va lak a, na kiang a ka hong nawn masiah hiai a pan hehpih in ana paimang ke'n,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na hong nawn masiah ka na om gige ding,” achi hi.
07006019	Insung ah Gideon alut a, kelnou leh tangbuang ephah khat silngou soh louh abawl a; seng ah asa akoih a, huai gel tuibel ah akoih a, tosaw sing nuai ah akiang a hon tawi in ahong lan hi.
07006020	Pathian angel in akiang ah, “Sa leh tanghou silngou soh louh la inla, hiai suang tung ah koih inla, atui pen sungkhia in,” achi hi. Huchibang in ama'n ahihta hi.
07006021	Huchi in Toupa angel in achiangkhun tawi muk in sa leh tanghou silngou soh louh akhoih a; suang a pan mei ahong pawt a, sa leh tanghou silngou soh louh akangtum vek hi. Huan amuhlouhna ah Toupa angel in apaimangsanta hi.
07006022	Huchi in Gideon in, Toupa angel ahi chih atheita hi. Gideon in, “Maizen, Aw Toupa Pathian , Toupa angel kimaituah a mu ka kei maw,” achi hi.
07006023	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in om inla, lau ke'n. Na si kei ding,” achi hi.
07006024	Huchi in Gideon in huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a, Jehovah Shalom asa hi. Tuni tan in Abiezerte gam Ophrah ah a-om lai hi.
07006025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai zan mah in Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na pa bawngtaltuai, bawngtal nihna kum sagih a upa la inla, na pa neih Baal maitam hihchim inla, abul a sing a bawl Asherah phuk in.
07006026	Hiai suangpi tung ah zeneitak in Toupa na Pathian a ding in maitam bawl inla, bawngtal nihna la inla, na phuk ding Asherah sing zang in halmang thillat lan in,” achi hi.
07006027	Huchi in Gideon in asikhate lak a mi sawm api a, Toupa'n akiang a agen bang in ahihta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, apa inkote leh khopi a mite alauh ziak in, sun lai in ahih ngam kei a, zan lai in ahihta hi.
07006028	Khopi a mite zingkhang a athoh uleh, ngai in, Baal maitam hihchip in ana om a, abul a Ashera phukpaih in ana om a, maitam tung ah bawngtal nihna lat in ana om hi.
07006029	“Hiai kua hih ahia?” chi in akihou ua, akidongtuah ua, azon khit un, “Joash tapa Gideon in hiai thil ahih ana hi,” achi uhi.
07006030	Huchi in khopi a mite'n Joash kiang ah, “Na tapa va pikhia in, asih ngeingei ding ahi. Baal maitam ahihchip ziak leh abul a Asherah aphuk ziak in,” achi uhi.
07006031	“Joash in amah hong kalh teng kiang ah, Baal gum ding na hi uh maw? Ama'n hon hondam ding hia? Kuapeuh amah gum zingsang mahmah a thah ding ahi. Pathian khat ahihleh amaitam ahihchip ziak in kigum leh akei dia,” achi hi.
07006032	Huaiziak in huai ni in amah Jerubbaal asa uhi, amaitam hihchip ahih ziak in, “Baal in amah kalh heh,” achi uhi.
07006033	Huchi in Midiante tengteng leh Amalekte leh suahlam mite akikhawm ua; lui akan ua, Jezreel Phaizang ah akikulh uhi.
07006034	Himahleh, Toupa Kha Gideon tung ah ahong tung a; pengkul amut a; huchi in Abiezerte'n amah agum uhi.
07006035	Manasseh tengteng kiang ah mi ataisak a; huaite'n leng anaihkhawm uhi. Asherte, Zebulunte leh Naphtali teng kiang ah leng mite ataisak a; amau leng abehlaptouta uhi.
07006036	Gideon in Pathian kiang ah, “Na gen bang a ka khut a Israelte na hutkhiak dingleh,
07006037	ngai in, buhphual ah belam mul ka koih dia, belam mul tung kia a daitui ana om a, leitual ana hul vekleh, na gen bang in ka khut in Israelte na hunkhe ding, chih ka thei ding,” achi hi.
07006038	Huchibang ahong hi a, azing zingsangpi a thou a, belam mul asukleh belkuang dim tui atakkhia hi.
07006039	Gideon in Pathian kiang ah, “Ka tung ah heh ke'n, khatvei kia ka hon gen nawn ding. Hehpih in, khatvei kia belam mul in hon ze-etsak nawn in. Tutung in ahihleh belam mul kia hul henla, leitual ah daitui om nawn leuleu hen,” achi hi.
07006040	Huchibang in Pathian in huai zan in ahih a; belam mul kia ana hul a, leitual ah daitui ana om leuleu hi.
07007001	Huchi in Jerubbaal, huai tuh Gideon ahi a, huan akiang a om mi tengteng zingkhang in athou ua, Harod tuikhuk chin ah akikulh uh. Midiante bel mallam pang Moreh mual bul phaizang ah akikulh uhi.
07007002	Toupa'n Gideon kiang ah, “Na kiang a om mite, Midiante akhut ua ka piakna ding in atam lua uh. Huchi lou in zaw Israelte'n, ‘Ei khut ngei a kihunkhia i hi uh,’ chi in ahon otkhum kha ding uhi.
07007003	Huaiziak in ngai in, mite zak in, ‘Kuapeuh lau leh ling a-omleh kik nawn henla,’ Gilead tang a pan paikik nawn hen, chi in genkhia in,” achi hi. Huchi in mite singnih-le-sangnih akik nawn ua; singkhat a-om lai uhi.
07007004	Toupa'n Gideon kiang ah, “Mite atam lo lai uh. Lui ah pisuk inla, huai ah ke'n ka hon khensak ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, hiai mi zaw na kiang ah pai heh, ka chih peuhmah na kiang ah pai hen. Hiai mi zaw na kiang ah pai kei heh, ka chih peuhmah pai kei hen,” achi hi.
07007005	Huchi in lui ah mite apisuk a, Toupa'n Gideon kiang ah, “Ui bang a, alei a tui liahthoh peuhmah atuam in koih inla, huchi mah bang in kun a khukdin a tui hipthoh peuhmah leng,” achi hi.
07007006	Akhutpek a liahthohte mi zathum ahi ua, midang tengteng kun a khukdin a tui hip vek ahi uh.
07007007	Huchi in Toupa'n Gideon kiang ah, “Mi zathum, aliah a liahthohte zang in ka hon hunkhe ding. Midiante na khut ah ka hon pe ding hi. Mipi teng amau mun chiat ah pai nawn uhen,” achi hi.
07007008	Huchi in mite'n nek ding leh apengkulte uh atawi ua; Israel mi tengteng apuanin lam uah apaisak vek a, mi zathumte ahihleh a-omsak a, Midiante kulh bel anuai phaizang a om ahi.
07007009	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai zan in Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, kulh ah va hohsuk dih ve; na khut ah ka hon peta.
07007010	Himahleh hohsuk na lauhleh na sikha Purah toh kulh ah va hohsuk phot un.
07007011	Huchi in athugen uh na za dia; huai khit chiang in na khut hihhat in a-om dia, kulh ah na hoh ngamta ding,” achi hi. Huchi in asikha Purah toh kulh a galvengte tuah masakna pen omna ah ahohsuk uhi.
07007012	Midiante, Amalekte leh suahlam tapate tengteng huai phaizang ah khaupehon bang in tampi ana om ua; asangawngsaute uh sim seng vual louh, atamlam uh lah tuipi piau a piaunel zah mahmah ahi uhi.
07007013	Gideon atunsuk in, ngai in, mi khat in alawmpa amang ana hilh a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, mang ka nei a, Midiante kulh ah barli buh tanghou phel ana om a, puanin ah ana tuklut a, ahon hihchim a, ahih lumlet a, puanin akiphah maimah,” achi hi.
07007014	Alawmpa'n adawng a, “Huai ahihleh Israel mi, Joash tapa Gideon namsau lou bangdang hi kei e. Pathian in Midiante leh sepaih tengteng akhut a pia ahita ve,” achi hi.
07007015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Gideon in huai mang leh alehkhiakna akihilhchian uh azak in Pathian abeta hi. Huchi in Israelte kulh lam ah akik nawn a, “Thou dih uh; Toupa'n Midian sepaihte na khut uah ahon peta hi,” achi hi.
07007016	Huchi in mi zathumte pawl thum in akhen a, avek un pengkul leh leibel vuak, asung a meisel koihsa ape chiat hi.
07007017	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon en unla, ka hih bang in hih sam un. Ngai un, kulh tuah masakpen ka tun chiang a ka hih bang a na hih sam ding uh ahi.
07007018	Kei leh ka kiang a om tengteng in pengkul ka hon mut chiang un, kulh kimvel a om tengteng in pengkul na mut sam ding uhi, ‘ Toupa a ding leh Gideon a ding in’ na chi chiat ding uh,” achi hi.
07007019	Huchi in Gideon leh akiang a om mi zakhatte zanven laizang, galven akikhen kuan laitak in kulh tuah masak atungsuk ua, pengkul amut ua, aleibel tawi uh atatkham uhi.
07007020	Pawl thumte'n pengkul amut ua, leibelte atatkham ua, akhut veilam un meisel atawi ua, ataklam un pengkul mut ding atawi uhi. “ Toupa leh Gideon namsau,” chi in akikou uhi.
07007021	Kulh kim ah michih amau panmun chiat ah adingh vek ua; huchi in sepaih tengteng atai ua; akikou ua, ataizak uhi.
07007022	Mi zathumte'n pengkulte amut ua, Toupa'n sepaih tengteng amau leh amau namsau in akisualsak a, huchi in sepaihte Zererah a Beth-shittah, Tabbath kiang a Abel-meholah gamgi pha in ataizak uhi.
07007023	Israelte Naphtali, Asher leh Manasseh tengteng a pan kigawmkhawm in Midiante anungdelhta uhi.
07007024	Gideon in Ephraim tanggam tengteng ah, Midiante hong sual un, Beth-barah tan in luite na lakkhalh un, Jordan lui toh, chi in mite avialtaisak a, huchi in Ephraim tengteng akikhawm ua, Beth-barah tan in luite Jordan lui toh ana lakkhalh vek uhi.
07007025	Midian kumpipa Oreb leh Zeeb aman ua; Oreb suangpi ah athat ua, Zeeb pen Zeeb grep sukna khuk ah athat uhi. Midiante adelhta ua, huchi in Oreb leh Zeeb lutang Jordan lui gal a Gideon kiang ah ahon tun uhi.
07008001	Huan Ephraimte'n akiang ah, “Bangziak a hichibang a hon bawl e, Midiante na douna ua na hon chial sam louh?” achi uhi. Huchi in nakpitak in amah atai uhi.
07008002	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou toh genkak ding ke'n bang ka hihzou a eita? Abiezerte grep loh sang a Ephraimte grep loh hoihzaw hilou maw?
07008003	Pathian in Midiante kumpipa Oreb leh Zeeb na khut uah ahon peta hi. Huchi in nou toh genkak ding in ke'n bang ka hihzou a eita?” achi hi. Huchi in huai thu agentak in atung a ahehna uh adaita hi.
07008004	Gideon leh akiang a om mi zathumte'n Jordan lui aphasuk ua, akan ua, bah mah le uh adelh teitei uhi.
07008005	Sukoth a mite kiang ah, “Hehpih in kei hon zuite sangpek pe dih ua; abah mahmahta uh. Midiante kumpipa Zebah leh Zalmunna delh ka hi,” achi hi.
07008006	Sukoth a miliante'n, “Zebah leh Zalmunna na khut a om khinta uhia, huchi a na sepaihte tanghou ka piak pah mai ding uh?” achi uh.
07008007	Gideon in hiai ziak in, “ Toupa'n Zebah leh Zalmunna ka khut a ahon piak chiang in gamdai a ling leh louling neite in na sa uh ka kuikek ding,” achi hi.
07008008	Huai a pan Penuel ah ahohtou ua, akiang uah huchi mah bang in agen nawn hi. Penuel a mite'n Sukoth a mite dawn mah bang in adawng uhi.
07008009	Penuel khomite kiang ah, “Vualzou a ka hong kik nawn chiang in, hiai kulh ka hihchim ding,” achi hi.
07008010	Zebah leh Zalmunna bel Karkor ah a-om ua, asepaihte leh suahlam mite sepaih asibang teng, singkhat-le-sangnga toh; namsau dok mi nuaikhat-le-singnih lah asi khinta ngal ua.
07008011	Gideon bel Nob leh Jogbeh suahlam a puanin a tengte lampi ah ahohtou a, sepaihte ava dou a; sepaihte galmuangtak in ana om ngal uhi.
07008012	Zebah leh Zalmunna ataikekta ua; amau adelh ua; huchi in Midiante kumpipa nih Zebah leh Zalmunna aman ua, sepaihte tengteng apatausakgawp uhi.
07008013	Joash tapa Gideon bel kidouna a pan nisuah ma in ahong kik nawnta hi.
07008014	Sukoth ah tangval khat aman ua, thu adong ua; huchi in Sukoth a miliante leh upate min agelhsak vek a, sawmsagih-le-sagih ahi uh.
07008015	Sukoth a mite kiang ah ahohtou a, “Zebah leh Zalmunna en dih ve ua, hiaite akei ua, Zebah leh Zalmunna na khut ua omsa bang a, mibahte tanghou ka piak ding uh, chi a na hon enghou uh?” achi hi.
07008016	Huchi in huai khua upate aman a, gamdai ling leh louling neite in Sukoth mite athuhilh hi.
07008017	Penuel khokulh ahihchim a, khua a mite leng athat hi.
07008018	Huchi in Zebah leh Zalmunna kiang ah, “Tabor tang a na mithahte uh mi bangchibang ahi ua? achi hi. Amau, Nangmah bang ahi uh; Kumpipa tapate abang chiat uh,” achi uhi.
07008019	Ama'n, “Ka unaute ahi uh, ka nu tapate mahmah ahi ve ua. Toupa ahin bang in, amaute na hinghawi le uchin zaw, nou hon that lou mah ding hi veng in,” achi hi.
07008020	Atapa upapen Jether kiang ah, “Khai le, nang amaute that in,” achi hi. Himahleh tangval in anamsau aphawi kei; tangval lel ahih lai ziak in alau hi.
07008021	Huchi in Zebah leh Zalmunna in, “Nangmah hong kisa in, hong satlum tanla. Piching leh piching kisual ding ahi,” achi uhi. Huchi in Gideon athou a, Zebah leh Zalmunna that in, sangawngsaute ngawng zepnate ala hi.
07008022	Huchi in Israel mite'n Gideon kiang ah, “Nang ka tung uah vaihawm in, nang leh na tapa leh na tapa tapate tan in leng; nang Midiante a pan lah na hon hunkheta ngal a,” achi uhi.
07008023	Gideon in akiang uah, “Ke'n zaw na tung uah vai ka hawm kei ding. Ka tapa in leng na tung uah vai ahawm sam kei ding. Toupa'n na tung uah vai ahawm zaw ding,” achi hi.
07008024	Gideon in akiang uah, “Thil khat ahihleh hon nget ka ut, michih in na gallak bilbah uh hon pe chiat un,” achi hi. (Ishmaelte ahih ziak un dangka-eng bilbah anei uhi).
07008025	Amau, “Phaltak in ka hon pe ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in puan aphah ua, michih in agallak bilbah uh apaikhe chiat uhi.
07008026	Huai dangka-eng bilbah angette gikdan dangka-eng shekel sangkhat-le-zasagih ahi; hakkolte, bilbahte, Midian kumpipate puan sandup sim louh in, asangawngsaute uh khainiang omte leng tel lou in.
07008027	Gideon in huaite in Ephod abawl a, a-omna Ophrah ah akoih hi. Israel tengteng in hiai thil ah ang a kawm uh. Huchi in Gideon leh a-inkote a ding in thang ahong hita hi.
07008028	Huchi in Midiante bel Israel suante nuaisiah in a-om ua; atangkhe zou nawn kei uhi. Huchi in Gideon damsung kum sawmli sung in gam galmuang in a-omta hi.
07008029	Joash tapa Jerubbaal apai a, a-inn ah atengta hi.
07008030	Gideon in zi tampi aneih ziak in ama suan mahmah tapa sawmsagih anei hi.
07008031	Shekem a amei in tapa asuansak lai a, amin Abimelek asa hi.
07008032	Joash tapa Gideon kha leh khuk tuah a dam in asita a, Abiezer mi Ophrah a apa Joash han ah avui uhi.
07008033	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Gideon asih phet in Israel suante akinunghei ua, Baalte toh ang a kawm ua, pathian in Baal-berith aneita uhi.
07008034	Israel suante'n akim ua melmate tengteng lak a pan amau hunkhepa Toupa a Pathian uh atheigige kei uhi.
07008035	Jerubbaal, Gideon kichi mah, Israelte tung a theihtawp a hoih suahpa inkote leng ahehpih kei uhi.
07009001	Huan Jerubbaal tapa Abimelek Shekem ah anu sanggampate kiang ah ahoh a, anu' pa inkote tengteng ahoupih hi.
07009002	“Shekem a mi tengteng zak in thu gen unla, ‘Jerubbaal tapa tengteng mi sawmsagihte'n na tung ua vai ahawm uhia hoih na sak uh, mi khat in na tung ua vai ahawm?’ Gen dih ua, kei leng na guh uh leh na sa uh hi sam ka hi, chih theigige un,” chi in agen hi.
07009003	Anu sanggampate'n Shekem a mi tengteng zak in huai thu tengteng agen uh. Huchi in Abimelek zuih utna lungsim ahon puta ua, “Amah i unau ahi,” achi ngal ua.
07009004	Baal-berith inn a pan dangka sawmsagih apia ua, huai zang in Abimelek in amah zui, mingongtat leh migina lou pipite aguai hi.
07009005	Ophrah a apa inn ah ava hoh a, Jerubbaal tapate, a-unau sawmsagihte suang khat tung ah athat hi. Jerubbaal tapa naupangpen Jotham bel ana kibuk ziak in athat kha kei hi.
07009006	Shekem a mi tengteng leh Beth-millo a mi tengteng akikaikhawm ua, Shekem a suangphuh bul tosaw kiang ah kumpipa in Abimelek abawlta uhi.
07009007	Hiai Jotham ahilh uleh Gerizim tang ah ahohtou a, avum ah ava dingh a, aw ngaihtak in akikou a, akiang uah, “Nou Shekem a mite aw, ka thugen ngaikhe dih ua, huchi in Pathian mah in leng nou thu ahon ngaikhe sam ding hi:
07009008	Khatvei atung ua kumpipa ding thaunilh ding in singte akuankhia ua; olive sing kiang ah, ‘Nang ka kumpipa hi in,’ achi uhi.
07009009	Himahleh olive sing in akiang uah, ‘Pathian leh mihing pahtawina dia azat pen uh ka thau nusia in singte tung ah dopsang in ka om ding maw?’ achi hi.
07009010	Singte'n theipi kung kiang ah, ‘Kisa dih, nang ka kumpipa ding un hong om in,’ ava chi uhi.
07009011	Himahleh theipi kung in akiang uah, ‘Ka khumna leh ka gah hoihtak nusia in singte tung ah dopsang in ka om ding maw?’ achi hi.
07009012	Singte'n grepgui kiang ah, ‘Kisa dih, nang ka kumpipa ding un om in aw?’ achi uh.
07009013	Grepgui in akiang uah, ‘Pathian leh mihing kipaksak ka uain nusia in singte tung ah dopsang in ka om ding maw?’ achi hi.
07009014	Huchi in sing tengteng in lingvom kiang ah, ‘Kisa in, nang ka kumpipa ding un om in,’ achi uhi.
07009015	Lingvom in singte kiang ah, ‘Na kumpipa ding ua thau hon nilh taktak na hih uleh ka liim ah hong bu in hon muang un; huchi ahihkeileh ling a pan mei hong pawt henla Lebanon tang a sidar singte kang khin hen,’ achi hi.
07009016	“Huaiziak in tu in chihtaktak a Abimelek na kumpipa ua bawl na hih ua, Jerubbaal leh a-inkote hoihtak a bawl a akituahpih bang a, atung a na hih ua;
07009017	Ka pa'n gal ahon dousak a ana sihloh hialta a, Midiante khut a pan in noute ahon hunkheta hi.
07009018	Tuni in ka pa inkote tung ah na hel ua, atapate sawmsagih tak suang khat tung ah na that ua, na unaupa uh ahih ziak in asikhanu tapa Abimelek, Shekem khomite kumpipa ding in lah na bawlta ngal ua.
07009019	Tuni a Jerubbaal leh a-inkote tung a chihtaktak a gamta na hih uleh, Abimelek tung ah kipak unla, amah leng na tung uah kipak hen.
07009020	Himahleh huchibang ahihkeileh Abimelek a pan mei hong kuangkhia henla, Shekem a mite leh Beth-millo mite kangtum hen. Shekem a mite leh Beth-millo a pan meikuang hong pawt henla, Abimelek kangtum vek hen,” achi hi.
07009021	Huchi in Jotham atai a, ataimang a, Beer ah atai a, a-unaupa Abimelek alauh ziak in huai ah atengta hi.
07009022	Abimelek in Israelte tung ah kum thum vai ahawm hi.
07009023	Pathian in Abimelek leh Shekem a mite kikal ah kha gilou asawl hi. Huchi in Shekem khomite Abimelek tung ah lepchiahtak in agamta uhi.
07009024	Huai ahihleh Jerubbaal tapa sawmsagihte tung a mulkimhuaitak a, agamtat ziak a atung a phulakna ahong tuntheihna ding leh amaute thatpa a-unaupa uh Abimelek tung a leh a-unaute that ding a amah ana panpih Shekemte tung a, asisan uh a-omtheihna ding ahi.
07009025	Shekem a mite'n mualvumte ah amah guktan mite akoih ua, huai mun a va pai peuhmah ana suam ua; huai thu Abimelek ahilh uhi.
07009026	Ebed tapa Gaal, a-unaute toh ahong kuan ua, Shekem ah alut ua; Shekemte'n ana muangmoh kei uh.
07009027	Lou lam ah ahoh ua, agrephuan ua grepte alou ua, achil ua, vualnop abawl ua, apathian inn uah alut ua, ne a dawn in Abimelek ahamsiat uhi.
07009028	Ebed tapa Gaal in, “Eite'n a-nna uh i sepsak ding, Abimelek kua ahia? Shekem mah leng kua ahia? Jerubbaal tapa ahi kei maw? Zebul, asepaih makai hilou amaw? Shekem pa Hamor mite nna sem ding maw? Bangziak in ahita amah nna i sep ding uh?
07009029	Hiai mite ka khut nuai ah om le uh aw! Abimelek ka lakhe ding.” Abimelek kiang ah, “Na sepaihte pungsak inla, hong paikhia in,” achi hi.
07009030	Huai kho vaihawmpa Zebul in Ebed tapa Gaal thugen azak in, aheh tohthoh in a-om hi.
07009031	Huchi in gitlouhpil in, Abimelek kiang ah, “Ngai in, Ebed tapa Gaal leh a-unaute Shekem ah ahong uh. Ngai in, na tung a hel tum in na khua a mite ahanthawn uhi.
07009032	Huchi in na mite toh kisa unla, zan in loubuk ah na tang un.
07009033	Huchi in hichi ahi ding a, zingsang a ni asuah chiang in, beltak in thou inla, khua hong dou mai in. Ngai in, amah leh alawite'n nang hon dou dek chiang un, hoih na sak dandan in atung uah na hih mai ding hi,” chi a hilh ding in mite ataisak hi.
07009034	Huchi in Abimelek leh ami tengteng zan in athou ua, pawl li a kikhen in Shekem khua ava umta uhi.
07009035	Ebed tapa Gaal ava pawt a, khopi lutna kongpi ah ava dingh a, Abimelek leh amite aguktanna ua kipan ahong kuanta uhi.
07009036	Gaal in mipite amuh in Zebul kiang ah, “Ngai in, mualvum a pan mipite ahong paisuk uh,” achi hi. Zebul in akiang ah, “Mihing bang a mual lim mu hilel teh,” achi hi.
07009037	Gaal in, “En tanla, gam laitak ah mipi ahong paisuk uh. Pawl khatte houh aisan siampa tosaw sing lampi ah ahong pai uh,” achi nawn hi.
07009038	Huchi in Zebul in akiang ah, “Abimelek kua ahia, a-nna i sep ding pen uh? chi a na genna kam koi a omta ahia? Hiaite na mimuhsitte mah hilou uhia? Va pawtkhia inla, va dou in,” achi hi.
07009039	Huchi in Gaal in Shekemte makai in Abimelek ava douta hi.
07009040	Abimelek in ana delh a, ataisia a, khopi tan in mi tampi liam in apuk uhi.
07009041	Abimelek bel Arumah ah ateng hi. Zebul in Gaal leh a-unaute Shekem a teng thei lou ding in adelhkhe vek hi.
07009042	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in mipite loubuk ah apawtkhia uh chih Abimelek ahilh uhi.
07009043	Mipite api a, pawl thum in akhen a, loubuk ah aguktan ua; adak a, ngai in, mipite khopi a pan ahong pawtkhia ua, huchi in amau ana sual ua, athatta uhi.
07009044	Abimelek leh apawlte malam ah atai ua, khopi lutna kongpi ah adingh ua, pawl nihte'n loubuk a omte tengteng apumboh ua, athatta uhi.
07009045	Abimelek in khopi huai ni in nitum in asual a; huchi in khopi ala a, asung a mite athat a, khopi ahihse vek a; chitui in atheh hi.
07009046	Shekem kulh a omte tengteng in huai thu ana za ua, Berith pathian insung bitna mun ah atailut uhi.
07009047	Shekem kulh a mi tengteng a-omkhawm vek uh chih Abimelek ahilh uhi.
07009048	Abimelek leh akiang a om tengteng Zalmon tang ah ahohtou uhi. Abimelek in heipi atawi a, singhiang asatkhia a, apua a, akiang a om amite kiang ah, “Ka hihdan na mu uh, ka hih bang in nou leng hih mengmeng un,” achi hi.
07009049	Mi tengteng in singhiang asatkhe chiat ua, Abimelek hih bang in apua ua, inn kulhpi kim ah asekhawm ua, kulhpi sung a omte ahalkhum uhi. Huchi in Shekem Kulhpi sung a om tengteng asi vek ua, pasal leh numei teng sangkhat vel ahi uh.
07009050	Huchi in Thebez ah Abimelek ahoh a, Thebez khua a-um a, alata hi.
07009051	Himahleh huai khopi sung ah kulhpi kiptak a-om a, huai ah pasal leh numei tengteng leh khopi sung a mi tengteng atailut ua, akikhakkhum bikbek ua, kulh tung ah a-omkhawm uhi.
07009052	Abimelek bel kulh lam ah ahoh a, ava dou a, hal ding in kulh kongpi ah ahoh hi.
07009053	Numei kuahiam in Abimelek lutung ah buh gawizanna suang khat akhesuk a, aluguh akitam hi.
07009054	Huchi in agalvan tawipa tangval asam pah a, akiang ah, “Na namsau phawi inla, hon that mai in. Huchi a mite'n, ‘Numei thah ahi,’ ahon chihlouhna ding un,” achi hi.
07009055	Israelte'n Abimelek asi chih atheihtak un, a-inn lam chiat uah apaita uhi.
07009056	Abimelek in a-unau sawmsagihte athah leh apa tung a giloutak a atatsiatna Pathian in hiai bang in athukta hi.
07009057	Shekem khomite gitlouhna tengteng Pathian in athuk samta hi. Jerubbaal tapa Jotham hamsiat amau tung ah ahong tungta hi.
07010001	Huan Abimelek sih nung in Israelte hunkhe ding in Issakar mi Tola ahong dingkhia a; amah Puah tapa ahi. Puah bel Dodo tapa ahi. Amah Ephraim tanggam Shamir ah ateng hi.
07010002	Kum sawmnih-le-thum sung Israelte tung ah vai ahawm a, huchi in asita a, Shamir ah avui uhi.
07010003	Huai nung in Gilead mi Jair ahong dingkhia a, kum sawmnih-le-nih sung Israelte tung ah vai ahawm hi.
07010004	Ama'n sabiltungnou tung a tuang tapa sawmthum anei a, amau Gilead gam ah khua sawmthum anei ua, huaite tuni tan in Havothjair achi lai uhi.
07010005	Jair asi a, Kamon ah avui uhi.
07010006	Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou hih nawn in Baal leh Ashtaroth, Siriate pathian, Zidonte pathian, Moabte pathian, Ammon suante pathian leh Philistiate pathian nna asem uhi. Huchi in Toupa alehngatsan ua, ama nna asemta kei uhi.
07010007	Huchi in Toupa Israelte tung ah ahehta mahmah a, Philistiate leh Ammon suante kiang ah amaute akhawngta hi.
07010008	Huai kum in amau Israel suante hihbuai in anuaisiah uhi. Jordan gal Gilead gam a Amorte gam a Israel suan om tengteng kum sawm-le-giat sung anuaisiah uhi.
07010009	Ammon suante bel Judahte, Benjaminte, Ephraim inkote dou ding in Jordan agalkah ua; huchi in Israelte alungzing mahmah uhi.
07010010	Israel suante'n, “I Pathian in Baalte nna i na sep ziak un hon lehngatsanta, atung ah thil i hihkhialta uh,” chi in Toupa asam uhi.
07010011	Toupa'n Israel suante kiang ah, “Aiguptate a pan, Amorte a pan, Ammon suante a pan leh Philistiate a pan noute ka hon hunkhe kei maw?
07010012	Sidonte, Amalekte leh Ammonte'n leng noute ahon nuaisiah ua; na hon sam ua, huchi in akhut ua kipan ka hon hunkhia hi.
07010013	Himahleh noute'n na hon lehngatsan ua, pathian dangte nna na sem zawta uh. Huaiziak in ka hon hunkhe nawn kei ding.
07010014	Na pathian telte uh samta unla, amau na gimthuak hun un hon hunkhia uhen,” achi hi.
07010015	Israel suante'n Toupa kiang ah, “Thil ka na hihkhialta uh. Nang pha na sak bangbang in ka tung uah hih in. Himahleh ka hong thum uhi, tuni in hon hunkhe lai in,” chi in.
07010016	Huchi in alak ua namdang pathiante akoihmang ua, Toupa nna asemta uh. Ama'n Israelte lungzinna athuakzou nawnta kei hi.
07010017	Ammon suante akikhawm ua, Gilead gam ah ava kikulh ua, Israel suante leng akikhawm ua, Mizpah ah akikulh uhi.
07010018	Mipite leh Gilead gam a miliante akihou ua, Ammon suante dou pan ding kua a-om a? Huai mi Gilead gam tengteng tung ah heutu ahi ding, akichi uhi.
07011001	Gilead mi Jephthah mihat hangsan ahi a, kizuaknu tapa ahi. Gilead in Jephthah asuang hi.
07011002	Gilead zi in tapate asuansak a; azi tapate ahong pichin un Jephthah adelhkhia ua, akiang ah, “Nang zaw ka pa uh inn ah gou na luah thei kei ding. Numei tuam khat tapa na hih ziak in,” achi uhi.
07011003	Huchi in Jephthah a-unaute a pan ataimang a, Tob gam ah ateng hi. Jephthah kiang ah mithulim lou pipi atengkhawm ua, amah azui zel uh.
07011004	Huai nung deuh in Ammon suante'n Israelte adouta uhi.
07011005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ammon suante'n Israelte adou uleh, Gilead upate Tob gam a Jephthah pi ding in apaikheta uhi.
07011006	Jephthah kiang ah, “Ammon suante ka dou theihna ding un ka heutupen ding un hong om in,” achi uhi.
07011007	Jephthah in Gilead upate kiang ah, “N'on hua ua, ka pa inn a pan na hon delhkhia uh ahi kei maw? Bang achia na buaitak ua ka kiang a hong na hi ua?” achi hi.
07011008	Gilead upate'n Jephthah kiang ah, “Huaiziaktak ahi, tua nang lam ka hong ngat nawn uh. Ammon suante dou dia ka kiang ua na paitheihna ding in; Gilead gam a teng tengtengte tung ah ka heutu ding un na om ding,” achi uhi.
07011009	Jephthah in Gilead upate kiang ah, “Ammon suante dou dia na hon pikik nawn ua, Toupa'n amau ahon piakleh na heutu ding un maw ka om ding?” achi hi.
07011010	Gilead upate'n Jephthah kiang ah, “Na thu bangbang a ka hih kei uleh i kikal uah hon theihpihpa Toupa ahi ding,” achi uhi.
07011011	Huchi in Jephthah bel Gilead upate kiang ah ahohta a, mite'n heutu ding leh api penpen ding in ana bawlta uhi. Jephthah in Mizpah ah Toupa ma ah athu teng agenta hi.
07011012	Jephthah in Ammon suante kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangchidan a hichibang a ka gam hong dou dia ka kiang a hong pai mawk na hia?” chi in palai asawl hi.
07011013	Ammon suante kumpipa'n, “Israelte Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawt lai ua, ka gam ahon laksak ziak uh ahi. Arnon a pan Jabok leh Jordan tan in. Huaiziak in huai gamte lungdam in hon pe nawn mai in,” chi in Jephthah palaite ana dawng hi.
07011014	Huchi in Jephthah in Ammon suante kumpipa kiang ah palai asawl nawn hi.
07011015	Akiang ah, Jephthah in hichi in achi, “Israelte'n Moab gam alaksak kei ua, Ammon suante gam leng alaksak sam kei uh.
07011016	Himahleh, Aigupta gam a pan Israelte ahong pawt un gamdai tawn in Tuipi San ahong tung ua, huai a pan Kadesh ah ahong pai uhi.
07011017	Israelte'n Edom kumpipa kiang ah, ‘Hehpih in na gam ah ka paisuak ding uh,’ chi in palai asawl uh. Himahleh Edom kumpipa in ana ngaikhe nuam kei. Huchi mah bang in Moab kumpipa kiang ah asawl nawn a, himahleh pha ana sa kei hi. Huchi in Kadesh ah Israelte a-omta uhi.
07011018	Huchi in gamdai ah apaisuak ua, Edom gam leh Moab gam kimvel in apai ua, Moab gam suahlam pang ah apai ua, Arnon lehlam pang ah giahphual asat uhi. Moab gamsung ah alut kei hial uh; Arnon bel Moab gamgi chiang ahi.
07011019	Israelte'n Amorte kumpipa Sihon leh Heshbon kumpipa kiang ah palai asawl uhi. Israelte'n akiang ah, ka hong thum uhi, ‘Ka mun ua ka paina ding un hehpih in na gam tawn in hon paisuaksak in,’ achi uhi.
07011020	Himahleh Sihon in Israelte agam a paisuak ding in amuangzou kei. Sihon in ami tengteng akaikhawm a, Jahaz ah akikulh a, Israelte adouta hi.
07011021	Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in Sihon leh ami tengteng Israelte khut ah apia a, amaute athat uhi. Huchi in Israelte'n huai gam a om Amorte gam tengteng atangta uhi.
07011022	Huchi in Amorte gamgi chiang tengteng Arnon a pan Jabok pha in, gamdai a pan Jordan pha in atangvekta uhi.
07011023	Huchi in Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in ami Israelte ma ah Amorte ahawlkhia a, bangziak a nang hiai gam luah thei ding na hia?
07011024	Na pathian Kemos in nang a tuam dia ahon sehsaksa tang ding hilou na hi maw? Huchi in Toupa ka Pathian un ka ma ua ahawlkhiakte uh ka tang ding uhi.
07011025	Moab kumpipa Zippor tapa Balak sang in na hatzaw a hia? Ama'n Israelte kinakpih in ahihkeileh adou ngei himhim a hia?
07011026	Heshbon leh akhotate, Aroer leh akhotate, Arnon gamgi naih khopi tengteng a kum zathum tak aten lai ua, bangziak a nang ana lakik lou nilouh na hia?
07011027	Huaiziak in na tung ah thil bangmah ka hihkhial kei. Nangma'n hon dou na tup ziak in ka tung ah thil na hihkhial ahi zaw. Toupa , Vaihawmpa in tuni in Israel suante leh Ammon suante kal ah thu ngaihtuah hen,” achi hi.
07011028	Himahleh Ammon suante kumpipa'n Jephthah thukhah ana ngaikhe nuam kei hi.
07011029	Huchi in Jephthah tung ah Toupa kha ahong tung a, Gilead leh Manasseh gam ah apaisuak a, Gilead a Mizpah ah apaisuak a, Gilead gam Mizpah a pan Ammon suante kiang ah apai zel hi.
07011030	Toupa kiang ah Jephthah akichiam a, “Ammon suante ka khut a na hon piakleh,
07011031	hichi ahi ding a, Ammon suante a pan galmuang a ka paikik nawn chiang in bangpeuh ka inn kongpi a pan hon dawn masa penpen Toupa a ahi dia, halmang thillat ding in ka zang ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
07011032	Huchi in Jephthah bel Ammon suante dou ding in akuanta hi. Toupa'n akhut ah amaute apeta hi.
07011033	Aroer a pan Minnith pha leh Abel-keramim kal a khopi sawmnih azou vek a, mi tampi athat hi. Huchi in Israel suante'n Ammon suante anuaisiahta uhi.
07011034	Jephthah, atenna khua Mizpah a a-inn ah apai a, ngai in, atanu in khuangtate toh lam in ana dawn hi. Ata neihsun ahi a; amah lou tapa hiam tanu dang himhim anei kei hi.
07011035	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amah amuhtak in apuante abotkek a, “Ehe, ka tanu! N'on niamkiaksak mahmah ve. Hon mangbangsak mite lak a khat na hita. Toupa ma ah lah ka kam ka na kata ngal a, huai lah zukkik thei ka hita kei,” achi hi.
07011036	Ama'n akiang ah, “Pa aw, Toupa kiang a thu na chiam tak ahihleh, na kam a thupawt bang in ka tung ah hih in. Toupa'n lah na melma Ammon suante tung ah na phu ahon laksakta ngal a,” achi hi.
07011037	Ama'n apa kiang ah, “Hichibang in kei a ding in kihih hen. Kha nih sung ka tang-om dia, tangte ah asuk atou in ka pai dia, ka nungak siangthou hihna ka suun ding, kei leh ka lawmte'n,” achi hi.
07011038	Ama'n, “Pai ve,” achi hi. Huchi in kha nih taam ding in asawlkhia a; apawt a, amah leh alawmte'n tangte ah anungak siangthou hihna ava suun uhi.
07011039	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kha nih nung in apa kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, ama'n ana kichiamsa bang in atung ah ahih hi. Atanu nungak siangthou in a-omdenta a, pasal toh alumkhawm ngei kei hi.
07011040	Israel tanute'n Gilead mi Jephthah tanu kum teng in ni li sung asuun zel uhi. Hiai Israelte lak ah ngeina in aneita uhi.
07012001	Huan Ephraimte akikaikhawm ua, mallam zuan in apai ua; Jephthah kiang ah, “Bangziak a Ammon suante dou dia hong paiphei a, na kiang a hoh dia hon chial sam lou? Na inn toh ka hon buhalkhawm ding uh,” achi uhi.
07012002	Jephthah in akiang uah, “Ammon suante ka mite toh theihtawp suah in ka dou ua; ka hon sap lai in akhut ua kipan in lah na hon hunkhe ut kei ua.
07012003	Huchi in na hon hunkhe nuam kei uh chih ka theihtak in, sih khawk sa lou hial in ka pang a, Ammon suante dou ding in ka kuan a, huchi in Toupa'n amaute ka khut ah ahon pia hi. Huaiziak in bangziak a hon dou dia tuni a hong kuan na hi ua?” achi hi.
07012004	Huchi in Jephthah in Gilead mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Ephraimte adouta hi. Gileadte'n Ephraimte athat uhi. “Nou Gileadte, Ephraimte leh Manassehte lak a galtai vakvai maimaite na hi uh,” achih ziak un.
07012005	Gileadte'n Ephraimte ma in Jordan lui kainate ana la ua; hichi ahong hi a, Ephraim mi suaktate'n, “Ka hong galkah ding uh,” achih chiang un Gileadte'n akiang ah, “Ephraim mi na hi hia?” ana chi zel uh. Ama'n, “Hilou e,” achihleh,
07012006	akiang ah, “Shiboleth, chi mah dih,” ana chi ua, ama'n, “Siboleth,” achi zaw zel a; alouchian thei kei hi. Huchi in aman ua, Jordan lui kainate ah ana that zel uh. Huchi in huai tung in Ephraimte singli-le-sangnih athat uhi.
07012007	Jephthah in Israelte tung ah kum guk vai ahawm a, huchi in asita a, Gilead gam a khua khat ah avui uhi.
07012008	Anung in Bethlehem a mi Ibzan in Israelte tung ah vai ahawm hi.
07012009	Ama'n tapa sawmthum leh tanu sawmthum anei hi. Atanute gamdang ah asawl a, atapate a ding in gamdang a pan tanu sawmthum apisak hi. Ama'n Israelte tung ah kum sagih vai ahawm hi.
07012010	Ibzan asita a, Bethlehem ah avui uh.
07012011	Anung in Zebulun mi Elon in Israelte tung ah vai ahawm a; Israelte tung ah kum sawm vai ahawm hi.
07012012	Zebulun mi Elon asita a, Zebulun gam a Aijalon ah avui uhi.
07012013	Huai nung in Pirathon mi, Hilel tapa Abdon in Israelte tung ah vai ahawm hi.
07012014	Ama'n tapa sawmli leh sabiltungnou sawmsagih tung a tuang zel tupa sawmthum anei hi. Ama'n Israelte tung ah kum giat vai ahawm hi.
07012015	Pirathon mi, Hilel tapa Abdon asita a, Ephraim gam, Amalek mite tanggam ah Pirathon ah avuita uh.
07013001	Huan Israel suante'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih nawn ua; huchi in Toupa'n Philistiate khut ah amaute kum sawmli sung apia hi.
07013002	Zorah ah Dan nam mi khat a-om a, amin Manoah ahi a, azi bel achiing a, nau anei kei hi.
07013003	Numei kiang ah Toupa angel ahong kilak a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na chiing a, nau nei thei lou himah lechin na gai dia, tapa na nei ding hi.
07013004	Huchi in pilvang in, uain leh zu hat leh siang lou thil himhim ne het ke'n.
07013005	‘Ngai in, na gai dia, tapa nei ding na hi ngal a. Alu ah mulmet tem himhim zat ahi kei ding; naupang bel sul a a-om lai a pan Pathian a dia Nazarit hi ding ahi ngal a.’ Ama'n Israelte Philistia mite khut a pan hutkhiak apan ding,” achi hi.
07013006	Numei in apasal kiang ah, “Pathian mipa khat ka kiang ah ahong a, amel Pathian angel mel bang ahi a, kihtakhuaitak ahi. Koilam mi ahia chih bel ka dong chitchiat kei a, ama'n lah amin ahon hilh sam kei hi.
07013007	Himahleh ka kiang ah, Ngai in, na gai dia, tapa na nei ding. Huchi in uain leh zu hat himhim dawn ke'nla, siang lou thil himhim leng ne het ke'n. Naupang sul a a-om lai a pan asih tan in Pathian a dia Nazarit mi hi ding ahi, achi,” chi in agen hi.
07013008	Huchi in Manoah in Toupa kiang ah nget chihtak in angen a, akiang ah, “Aw Toupa hehpih in huai Pathian mipa na hon sawl ka kiang uah hong nawn henla, naupang hong piang ding bang ka chih ding ua hong sinsak hen,” achi hi.
07013009	Pathian in Manoah thugen ana ngaikhia hi. Loubuk a numei atut lai in akiang ah Pathian angel ahong nawn hi. Apasal Manoah bel akiang ah a-om kei hi.
07013010	Numei kintak in atai pah a, apasal ava hilh a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, zanlam a ka kiang a hong hohpa ka kiang ah ahong kilak nawn,” achi hi.
07013011	Huchi in Manoah athou a, azi azui a, huai mi kiang ava tung uhi. Akiang ah, “Numei kiang a thu gen nang na hi maw?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi.
07013012	Manoah in, “Na thu bang zel in hong tung hen. Naupang omdan ding bangchibang ahi dia, asep ding bang ahi dia le?” achi hi.
07013013	Toupa angel in Manoah kiang ah, “Numei kiang a ka gen tengteng ah amah pilvang hen.
07013014	Grepgui a pan mawngmawng ane ding ahi kei a, uain leh zu hat adawn ding ahi kei. Siang lou thil mawngmawng leng ane ding ahi kei. Ka thupiak tengteng zui hen,” achi hi.
07013015	Manoah in Toupa angel kiang ah, “Ka hong thum uh. Hehpih in hon ompih lai in, kelnou ka hon bawlsak khit matan uh,” achi hi.
07013016	Toupa angel in Manoah kiang ah, “Hon khou lechin leng na an zaw ka ne kei ding. Haltum thil lan ding na hihleh Toupa kiang a na lat ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. Manoah in lah Toupa angel ahi chih athei ngal kei hi.
07013017	Manoah in Toupa angel kiang ah, “Na min bang ahia, na thugen bang a hong tun chiang a ka hon pahtawi theihna ding un?” achi hi.
07013018	Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Bangziak a ka min hon dong na hia, lamdang ahi chih theizen napi a?” achi hi.
07013019	Huchi in Manoah in kelnou khat leh nek ding thillat ala a; suangpi tung ah Toupa kiang ah alan hi. Angel in thillamdangtak ahih a, Manoah leh azi in a-en nilouh uhi.
07013020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, maitam a pan meikuang van lam a akahtouh lai in, maitam a meikuang ah Toupa angel apaitouta hi. Manoah leh azi in a-en nilouh ua, amaitang un lei asi uhi.
07013021	Himahleh Toupa angel Manoah leh azi kiang ah ahong kilak nawn kei hi. Huchi in Manoah in Toupa angel ahi chih atheita hi.
07013022	Manoah in azi kiang ah, “Pathian i muh ziak in i si ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
07013023	Himahleh azi in akiang ah, “ Toupa'n hon hihlup tum hileh halmang thillat leh nek ding thillat i latte asang kei ding. Hiai thil tengteng leng ahon ensak kei ding a, tu hun in hiai thilte leng hon hilh kei ding,” achi hi.
07013024	Numei in tapa aneita a, amin Samson asa uh. Naungek ahong khanglian a, Toupa'n avualzawl hi.
07013025	Zorah leh Eshtaol kikal ah Mahaneh Dan mun ah Toupa kha in atokthouta hi.
07014001	Huan Samson bel Timnah ah ahohsuk a, Timnah ah Philistiate tanute lak ah numei khat ava mu hi.
07014002	Ahong paitouh nawn in anu leh apa ahilh hi. “Timnah khua ah, Philistiate tanute lak ah numei khat ka mu a; ka zi ding in hon pisak un,” achi hi.
07014003	Huchi in anu leh apa'n akiang ah, “Na unaute tanute lak ah hiam, ka mipite lak a hiam numei om het lou hia? Zeksum louh Philistiate lak a zi ding na va zon maimah?” achi uhi. Samson in apa kiang ah, “Hon pisak mai in; ama'n hon lungkimsak mahmah ahi,” achi hi.
07014004	Himahleh anu leh apa'n, hiai Toupa a pan ahi chih athei kei uh; ama'n Philistiate tung a phulakna ding hun lemtang zong lah ahi ngal a. Huai lai in Philistiate'n Israelte tung ah vai ahawm uhi.
07014005	Huchi in Samson bel anu leh apa toh Timnah ah ahohsuk ua, Timnah a grephuan ava tung uhi. Ngai in, humpinelkai lun lai ana humham hi.
07014006	Toupa Kha atung ah nakpitak in ahong tung hi. Huchi in kelnou balnen bang mai in abalnen maimah hi; bangmah lah atawi ngal kei a. Himahleh athilhih anu leh apa ahilh kei hi.
07014007	Ahohsuk a, huai numei ahoupih hi. Ama'n Samson akipaksak mahmah hi.
07014008	Anung in va pi ding in ahoh nawn a, humpinelkai luang en ding in ava pial hi. Ngai in, humpinelkai luang ah khuai hon leh azu ana om hi.
07014009	Huai ala a, apai nawn a, apai kawm in ane kawmkawm hi. Anu leh pa kiang atungtou a, amau leng apia a, amau leng ane sam uhi. Himahleh huai khuaizu humpinelkai luang a pan alak ahi chih ahilh kei hi.
07014010	Huchi in huai numei kiang ah apa ava hohsuk a, huai ah Samson in ankuang alui hi. Huai ahihleh tangvalte hihdan ahi him hi.
07014011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amah amuhtak un, akiang a om ding in mi sawmthum api uhi.
07014012	Samson in akiang uah, “Tu in thuhaksa hon dong ning e. Ankuanglui ni, ni sagih sung a na hon hilhchet theih ua, na theihkhiak theih uleh puanmalngat silh sawmthum ka hon pe ding.
07014013	Himahleh na hon hilhchet theih kei uleh, puanmalngat silh sawmthum leh kikhenna puan sawmthum na hon piak ding uh ahi,” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Na thuhaksa gen dih ve le, ka na ngaikhe ding uh,” achi uhi.
07014014	Ama'n akiang uah, “Netu a pan nek ding hong pawt, hattak a pan thil khumtak hong pawt,” achi hi.
07014015	Ni thum sung in huai thuhaksa ahilhchian thei kei uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in Samson zi kiang ah, “Ka kiang ua hiai thuhaksa hilhchetna puangkhe ding in na pasal kun in. Huchi lou in zaw nang leh na pa inkote ka hon hal ding uh. Ka neihsa uh la dia hon sam na hi kei maw?” achi uhi.
07014016	Huchi in Samson zi ama ah akap a, “N'on it kei a, na hon ho zaw ve. Ka chite lah thuhaksa na dong ngal a, kei na hon hilhchian kei,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, ka nu leh pa leng ka hilh kei a; nang ka hon hilh dia hia?” achi hi.
07014017	A-ankuanglui uh, ni sagih sung teng ama ah akapkap hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in anget ngutngut ziak in ahilh khongkhong hi. Ama'n thuhaksa hilhchetna achipihte ava hilhta hi.
07014018	Ani sagih ni, nitum ma in huai khua a mite'n akiang ah, “Khuaizu sang a khumzaw bang ahia? Humpinelkai sang a hatzaw bang ahia?” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka bawngla in lei let kei le uchin zaw, ka thuhaksa theikhe lou ding hi ve uchin,” achi hi.
07014019	Toupa Kha atung ah nakpitak in ahong tung a, Ashkelon ah ahohsuk hi. Mi sawmthum ava that a, apuansilhte uh ahawksak a, kikhenna puante thuhaksa hilhchiante apia hi. Huchi in aheh mahmah a, apa inn ah apaitou hi.
07014020	Himahleh Samson zi pen akitenna ua theihpih a pang Samson lawmpa kiang ah zi ding in piak in a-om hi.
07015001	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, anung sawt lou in, buhlak hun in, Samson in kelnou tawi in azi ava veh hi. “Dantan sung ah ka zi kiang ah ka va lut ding,” achi hi. Himahleh apa'n alut aphalta kei hi.
07015002	Apa'n, “Amah na ho mahmah ka sa a, huaiziak in na lawmpa kiang ah ka peta hi. Anau amah sang in amelhoih zaw hilou hia?” achi hi.
07015003	Samson in, “Tutung in Philistiate khoih leng amau sang in dem ka kai kei zaw ding,” achi hi.
07015004	Huchi in Samson in sihal zathum ava man a, meisel ala a, amei uleh mei apehkhawm a, amei uh kikal chiat ah meisel akoih chiat hi.
07015005	Meiselte adettak in Philistiate buhlak ah atailutsak a, buhphal leh buh dingh laite, olive munte toh nangawn in akang vek hi.
07015006	Huchi in Philistiate'n, “Kua hih ahia?” achi uh. Amau, “Timnah a mi makpapa Samson hih ahi. Huai Timnah a mi in Samson zi alawmpa zi dia apiak man ahi,” akichi uhi. Huchi in Philistiate ahong kuan ua apata un ahallumta uhi.
07015007	Samson in akiang uah, “Hichibang na hih uh leh na tung uah phu ka la sam ding, huai khit in ka tawp ding,” achi hi.
07015008	Huchi in nakpitak in asual a, tampi athat a, apaisuk a, Etam suangpi tung ah a-omta hi.
07015009	Huchi in Philistiate ahohtou ua, Judah gam ah ava kikulh ua, Lehi mun ah akiphalh uhi.
07015010	Judah gam a mite'n, “Bangchidan ahia kou sual dia na hong kuan mawk uh?” achi uhi. Amau, “Samson khaukhih a ka tung ua ahih mah bang a ama tung a leng hih ding in ka hong uh,” achi uhi.
07015011	Huchi in Judah gam a mi sangthum Etam suangpi tung ah ahoh ua, Samson kiang ah, “Philistiate i tung ua vaihawmte ahih uh thei lou na maw? Bangchidan a hichibang a ka tung ua thil hon hihta mai na hia oi?” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka tung a, ahih bang ua ke'n leng amau tung a hih sam ka hi,” achi hi.
07015012	Amau akiang ah, “Nang hon khaukhih a, Philistiate khut a hon pe dia hong kuan ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Samson in akiang uah, “Noute'n hon that lou ding in ka kiang ah kichiam un,” achi hi.
07015013	Amau akiang ah, “That lou e. Himahleh ka hon khaukhih tinten ding ua, akhut ua hon pe ding ka hi uh. Thah zaw ka hon that kei hial ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in khauzen thak nih in akhih ua, suangpi a pan apita uhi.
07015014	Lehi mun ahong tun in, Philistiate'n ana dawn ua, ana kikou zuazua uhi. Toupa kha atung ah nakpitak in ahong tung a, huchi in aban a gakna khauzen ziza zang mei in kangtat bang mai ahong hita a, agaknate a khut a pan akekhe niang maimah uhi.
07015015	Sabiltung khaguh thak amu a, asawk a, ala a, huai in mi sangkhat asatlum hi.
07015016	Samson in, “Sabiltung khaguh in ka chiang vum venvon a, sabiltung khaguh in mi sangkhat ka satlum,” achi hi.
07015017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, athugen khit in akhaguh tawi apai a; huai mun Ramath Lehi asa hi.
07015018	Adang atak mahmah a, Toupa asam a, “Nang na sikha khut zang in thupitak in na hon hunkheta hi. Tu in dangtak in ka si mai ding maw? Zeksumlouhte khut ah ka puklut dia hia?” achi hi.
07015019	Himahleh Pathian in Lehi mun a leikuak akhisak a, tui ahong kikhohkheta hi. Huai adawntak in alungsim ahong halh a, ahong hat nawnta hi. Huai mun min En-hakkore asa a; tuni tan in Lehi mun ah a-om lai hi.
07015020	Huchi in Philistiate hun in Israelte tung ah kum sawmnih vai ahawm hi.
07016001	Huan Gaza ah Samson ahoh a, huai ah numei kizuak khat ava mu a, ava kithuahpih hi.
07016002	“Samson hiai ah ahong hoh,” chi in Gaza mite ahilh uhi. Huchi in ava umta ua, khopi kulh kongpi chin ah zankhua in atang uhi. Zankhua in adai sipsip ua, “Khua hong vak peuhmahleh, huchi in that na ni,” akichi uhi.
07016003	Samson bel zankim tan in alum a, zankim in athou a, khopi kulh kongkhakte leh akhuam nih alen a, akalhnate toh aphawikhe vek a, aliangzang ah apua a, Hebron ma a mualvum ah apotou hi.
07016004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, anung in Sorek Phaizang a numei khat a-it a, amin Delailah ahi.
07016005	Philistia' miliante akiang ah ahohtou ua, akiang ah, “Amah ka zohtheihna ding un, ahatna san theih tum in kankhia in. Huchi in ka vek un dangka sangkhat-le-zakhat ka hon pe chiat ding uh,” achi uhi.
07016006	Huchi in Delailah in Samson kiang ah, “Na hat mahmahna san hon hilh dih ve. Bangchi in ahia hihnat dia khau khihtheih na hih ding?” achi hi.
07016007	Samson in akiang ah, “Khauhual thak, keu nai lou sagih in hon hen le uchin, ka hat kei dia, midang bang lel mah ka hi ding,” achi hi.
07016008	Huchi in Philistiate' miliante'n khauhual thak sagih, keu nai lou apia ua, ama'n huaite in ahenta hi.
07016009	Dantan sunggil ah guktan mite akoih a, akiang ah, “Samson, Philistiate'n hon sual dek uh e,” achi hi. Mei in ziza khaulom akattat bang phet in ama'n khauhual ahihtanta hi. Huchi in ahatna san atheikhe zou kei hi.
07016010	Delailah in Samson kiang ah, “Ngai in, na hon khem a, zuau hon hilh na hi. Bangchi a hen theih ding na hia? Hon hilhta in,” achi hi.
07016011	Ama'n akiang ah, “Khauzen thak, zat nai louh in hon hen le uh, huchi in ka hat kei mai ding, midang bang lel mah ka hi ding,” achi hi.
07016012	Delailah in khauzen thak ala a, ahen a, akiang ah, “Samson, Philistiate'n ahon sual dek uh,” achi hi. Dantan sunggil ah guktan mite a-om uhi. Akhut a henna patzang suktat bang mai in ahihtanta hi.
07016013	Delailah in Samson kiang ah, “N'on khem lai a, zuau na hon hilh lai hi. Bangchi a hen theih ding na hia? hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka samphek sagih puan in gatkhum leteh ahi mai,” achi hi.
07016014	Ama'n kilhna in akilhkip giugeu a, akiang ah, “Samson, Philistiate'n hon sual dek uh e,” achi hi. Huchi in ihmu lai ahong halh a, puanbu kilhdenna leh puanbu nangawn toh kikhongsak in apaikhia hi.
07016015	Akiang ah, “Na lungtang hon pe hetloupi in, bangchidan a ka hon it, chi thei na hia oi? Tu'n thumvei hilhial na hon khemta hi, na hat mahmahna san na hon hilh nai kei lailai,” achi hi.
07016016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng a ngen ngutngut a, adotdot ziak in, si ding khop hial in alunggimta hi.
07016017	Huchi in alungsim tengteng ahilh vekta hi. Akiang ah, “Ka lu ah mulmet tem himhim zat ahi ngei nai kei hi. Ka nu sul a ka om lai a pan Pathian a dia Nazarit mi dia na om ka hi. Tu in met taleng, ka hatna amang vek ding, huchi in ka hat kei dia, midang bang lel ka hi ding,” achi hi.
07016018	Alungsim tengteng ahilh vekta chih Delailah in atheih phet in, “Tu kia hong hoh un, alungsim tengteng ahon hilh vekta,” chi in Philistia' miliante thukhak in asamsak hi. Huchi in akiang ah Philistia' miliante ava hohtou ua, dangka atawi uhi.
07016019	Apheipi tung ah a-ihmusak hi. Mi asam a, asamphek sagihte ametkhesak vek hi. Huchi in amah ahihgim panta a, ahatna in anuseta hi.
07016020	“Samson, Philistiate'n ahong sual dek uh e,” achi hi. Ihmu lai ahong halh a, “Nidang mah bang in ka pawtkhe nawn ding a, ka kitungkhe nawn ding,” achi hi. Himahleh Toupa'n apaisan khinta chih himhim athei kei hi.
07016021	Philistiate'n aman ua, amitte akhelkhiaksak uhi. Gaza ah apaipihsuk ua, sikkol abunsak ua; suangkul ah buh gawizantu in apang hi.
07016022	Himahleh asam met ahih nung in hong pou in ahong khang nawn hi.
07016023	Philistia' miliante Dagon pathian kiang a kithoihna thupitak lan ding leh kihih nuamsa ding in akikhawm uhi. “I pathian un i melmapa uh Samson ahon peta,” achi uhi.
07016024	Mipite'n amuh un apathian uh aphat ua, “I pathian un i melmapa, i gam hihsia a mi tampite thatpa i khut uah ahon peta,” achi uhi.
07016025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, alungtang un nuam asak laitak in, Samson pen muhnop ding in va sam dih ua, achi uhi. Huchi in suangkul a pan Samson ava samkhia uhi. Ama uah muhnop ding in a-omta a; khuam leh khuam kikal ah adingsak uhi.
07016026	Samson in amah kaitu naupang kiang ah, “Hiai inn dou pen khuam hon khoihsak dih ve, ka hon ngai deh,” achi hi.
07016027	Huai inn, pasal leh numei in adim miuhmeuh uhi. Philistiate milian tengteng huai ah a-om vek ua, Samson muhnop dia en mite intung ah pasal leh numei sangthum a-om uhi.
07016028	Samson in Toupa asam a, “Aw Toupa Pathian , hehpih in hon theigige inla, hehpih in tutung in hon hihhat in, aw Pathian, ka mit langnih phu Philistiate tung ah tu kia hon lasak in,” achi hi.
07016029	Samson in, huai inn dou pen sut nihte alen a, akhut taklam in khat, akhut veilam in khat mah apansan hi.
07016030	Samson in, “Philistiate toh sikhawm ning e,” achi hi. Huchi in theihtawp in akunsuk a; miliante leh mipi asung a om tengtengte huai inn chim in adelhkhumta hi. Huchi in adam lai a athahte sang in asihkhumte atamzaw uhi.
07016031	Huchi in a-unaute leh apa inkote tengteng ahong paisuk ua, ala ua azawngtou ua, Zorah leh Eshtaol kikal a; apa Manoah kivuina mun ah avuita uhi. Huchi in ama'n kum sawmnih sung Israelte tung ah vai ahawm hi.
07017001	Huan Ephraim tanggam ah mi khat a-om a, amin Mikah ahi.
07017002	Ama'n anu kiang ah, “Dangka sangkhat-le-zakhat nang a pan lakmang a omte, nang leng na hamsiat leh ka zak mahmah a na gen pen, ngai in, huai dangka ka kiang ah a-om, kei lak ahi,” achi hi. Anu'n, “Ka tapa Toupa vualzawl in om hen,” achi hi.
07017003	Dangka sangkhat-le-zakhat anu apekik a, anu'n, “Hiai dangka kei khut mahmah in ka tapa in milim abawlna ding leh milim asunna ding in Toupa kiang ah ka lan hi. Huaiziak in tu in ka hon pekik ding,” achi hi.
07017004	Huchi in huai dangka anu apekik a, anu'n dangka zanih ala a, dangka sekmi apia a, ama'n milim khuakthoh leh sunthohte ana bawl a, huaite Mikah inn ah a-om uhi.
07017005	Mikah in pathiante inn anei a, ephod leh milimte abawl a, atapa khat asiampu in aseptuamta hi.
07017006	Huai lai in Israel gam ah kumpipa a-om kei a; michih in ama mit a dik asakte ahih chiat mai uhi.
07017007	Judah gam Bethlehem mi Judah nam, Levi chi tangval khat, huai ah ava om hi.
07017008	Huai mi Bethlehem Judah khopi a pan apawt a, omna zong a vak ahi. Avakna lam ah Ephraim tanggam a Mikah inn ava tung hi.
07017009	Mikah in akiang ah, “Koi a pan hong pai na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Bethlehem Judah mi Levi chi ka hi a, omna mun zong a vak ka hi,” achi hi.
07017010	Mikah in akiang ah, “Ka pa leh siampu ding in ka kiang ah teng in, kum teng in, dangkasik tang sawm ka hon pe dia, puansilh khat leh nek dingte leng,” achi hi. Huchi in Levi chi alutta hi.
07017011	Levi chi, huai mi kiang a ten alungkim hi. Huchi in atapa khat bang in huai tangvalpa a-omta hi.
07017012	Mikah in Levi chi aseptuamta a, huchi in tangvalpa asiampu in apangta a, Mikah inn ah atengta hi.
07017013	Huchi in Mikah in, “Tu in zaw Levi chi ka siampu ding in ka neita hi. Toupa'n ahon lamzangsak ngei ding, chih ka thei,” achi hi.
07018001	Huai lai in Israel gam ah kumpipa a-om kei. Dan chite'n gam luah ding azong uhi. Israel chite lak ah gam luah ding atang nai kei uhi.
07018002	Dan suante'n anam pumpi lak ua mi, pasalpha nga, Zorah leh Eshtaol a pan gam enkhe ding leh va entel ding in mi asawl uhi. Akiang uah, “Va kuan unla, gam va entel dih ua,” achi uhi. Huchi in Ephraim tanggam a Mikah inn ava tung ua, huai ah agiak uhi.
07018003	Mikah inn kiang a a-om lai un, Levi chi tangval aw athei ua, huai lam ava zuan ua, akiang ah, “Hiai a hon pi kua ahia? Hiai mun ah bang ahia na hih? Bangchi in ahia hiai a na ten?” achi uhi.
07018004	Ama'n akiang uah, “Mikah in huchi in ahon na bawlta a, ahon guai a, asiampu in ka om hi,” achi hi.
07018005	Amau akiang ah, “Ka hohna ding uah ka lamzang ding uh hia ding lou, chih theihtheihna ding in Pathian hon dotsak dih ve,” achi uhi.
07018006	Siampu in akiang uah, “Lungmuangtak in pai un. Na hohna ding ma uah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi.
07018007	Huchi in mi ngate apawtkhia ua, Laish ah alut ua, huai mite Zidon mite mah bang a galmuangtak leh lungmuangtak a om hithiat a om ava mu ua; amaute zahlaksak ding thuneimi kuamah a-om kei a, Zidonte toh akigamla ua, kuamah toh leng akisai kha kei uhi.
07018008	Zorah leh Eshtaol ah a-unaute uh kiang ah ahong pai ua; a-unaute un akiang uah, “Bangchi ahia oi?” achi uhi.
07018009	Amau, “Thou dih ua, i sual ding uh. Gam ahihleh ka va mu ngei ua, ngai un, ahoih mahmah hi. Dai maimah ding na hi uhia? Huai gam va lut a, va luah ding in zekai kei dih uh.
07018010	Va hoh le uchin galmuang a om mite ahi chih na va mu ding uh; agam lah aza mahmah ngal a. Pathian in nou ahon pe khinta hi. Lei a thil om ah zaw bangmah taksap ding a-om hetlouhna mun ahi,” achi uhi.
07018011	Huchi in Zorah leh Eshtaol a pan Dan namte kidouna galthuam silh in mi zaguk apawt uhi.
07018012	Ava hohtou ua, Judah gam Kiriath-jearim ah om mun abawl uh. Huaiziak in huai mun tuni tan in Mananeh Dan achi lai ua, Kiriath-jearim tang lam a om ahi.
07018013	Huai a pan Ephraim tanggam lam azuan ua, Mikah inn ava tung uhi.
07018014	Huchi in Laish gam enkhe dia mi nga pawtte'n adawng ua, a-unaute uh kiang ah, “Hiai innte ah ephod, milimte, milim bawltawmte, milim suntawmte a-om chih na thei uhia? Huchi bangchi in ahia na hih ding uh ngaihtuah un,” achi uhi.
07018015	Huai a pan apai ua, Levi chi tangval omna Mikah inn ngei ava tung ua, atungtang thu adong uhi.
07018016	Dan suan mi zaguk kidouna galthuam silhte kulh kongpi bul ah adingh uhi.
07018017	Mi nga gam enkhete ava hohtou ua, alut ua, milim bawltawm, ephod, milimte leh suntawm milimte ala ua, mi zaguk kidouna galthuam silhte lak ah kulh kongpi bul ah siampu adingh hi.
07018018	Huaite Mikah inn ah ava lut ua, bawltawm milimte, ephod, milimte leh suntawm milimte ava lak uleh, siampu in akiang uah, “Hiai a bang hih na mai ua?” achi hi.
07018019	Amau, “Dai in, na khut in na muk hum inla, ka kiang uah hong pai inla, ka pa uh leh siampu ding un hong om in. Nang a ding in inn khat kia siampu a om hia hoihzaw, Israel lak a chi khat leh nam khat siampu dia om?” achi uhi.
07018020	Siampu lungtang akipak mahmah a, huchi in ephod, milim leh bawltawm milimte ala a, mipite lak ah a-omta hi.
07018021	Huchi in apaikhia ua, anau neute uh, gante uh leh avante uh amasuan tou zel uh.
07018022	Mikah inn a pan gamla kuam apaikhiak nung un Mikah invengte akikaikhawm ua, Dan suante adelhphata uhi.
07018023	Dan suante asam uhi. Amau anunglam anga ua, Mikah kiang ah, “Bang achia ahia, mi huai zahzah na hon tonpih?” achi uhi.
07018024	Ama'n, “Ka bawl pathiante leh siampu na paipih ua, na pai vengveng ua, bang ka nei lai a? Bangziak a bangchi na hia, na hon chih uh?” achi hi.
07018025	Dan suante'n akiang ah, “Ka lak uah pau mawkmawk kei dih aw, huchi lou in zaw mithangpai khut na thuak kha dia, na inkote toh na hinna na tan ding uh,” achi uhi.
07018026	Huchi in Dan suante apai ua, Mikah in lah sual ngam vual hi un athei kei a, a-inn lam ah apai nawnta hi.
07018027	Mikah thilbawlte leh asiampu neih apaipih ua, Laish khua, galmuang a om hithiatte kiang atungtou ua, namsau in athat ua; mei in khua ahalta uh.
07018028	Zidon a pan agamlat mahmah ziak in va hunkhe ding mi kuamah a-om kei, akuakua toh kizatna mahmah anei kei uh. Beth-rehob kiang a om phaizang ahi a, khopi khat alam ua, huai ah atengta uhi.
07018029	Akho min Israel tapa, apu uh Dan tam in, Dan asa uhi. Himahleh atung in huai kho min Laish ahi.
07018030	Dan suante'n huai milim bawltawm adingkhesakta ua, Mosi tapa Gershon tapa Jonathan leh atapate, gam sal a pi ahih masiah uh Dan chite siampu ahita uhi.
07018031	Huchi in Mikah bawltawm milim ahihleh Shiloh a Pathian inn a a-om lai teng adingsak uhi.
07019001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai a Israel gam a kumpipa a-om louh lai in, Levi chi a mi khat Ephraim tanggam tawp lam ah a-om a, Judah gam a Bethlehem mi mei in anei hi.
07019002	Amei in ang a kawm san a, huchi in Judah gam a Bethlehem a apa inn ah ataisan hi. Huai ah kha li tak a-om hi.
07019003	Apasal athou a, asikha leh asabiltung nih pi in kamdam in ava khem a, lungkim a pikik nawn tum in ava delhzui hi. Ama'n apa inn ah ana pilut a, apa'n ana muh in ana kipahpih hi.
07019004	Asungpa, numei pa'n akiang a om ding in ana khou a; akiang ah ni thum a-om a, ane un adawnkhawm ua, huai ah atung hi.
07019005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani li ni in zingkhang in athou a, amah bel pawt tum in athou hi. Numei pa'n amakpa kiang ah, “Tanghou tawmchik ne in. Na lungtang hihhalh tadih inla, huai khit chiang in na pai na ding,” achi hi.
07019006	Huchi in atu ua, anih un ane un adawnkhawm uh. Numei pa'n huai mi kiang ah, “Lungkimtak in tuzan giak in, na lungtang nuamsak in,” achi hi.
07019007	Huai mi bel pawt tum in athou a, himahleh asungpa'n azolzol a, agiak nawnta hi.
07019008	Ani nga zingkhangpi in pawt tum in athou hi. Numei pa'n, “Na lungtang hihhalh tadih lechin akei dia, nitak ninem hun tan bek om tadih in,” achi hi. Huchi in anih un an anekhawm nawn uhi.
07019009	Huai mi bel amei leh asikha toh pawt tum a akisakleh asungpa, numei pa'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, ni leng akaita, tuzan giak nawn mai inla, ni leng tum ding ahita. Hiai ah giak in; na lungtang akipahna ding in. Huchi in zingchiang in zingkhang in na thou dia, inn lam ah na pai mai ding,” achi hi.
07019010	Himahleh huai mi huai zan giah a-ut kei a, athou a, apawtta hi. Jebus kho zawn atung a, huai tuh Jerusalem khua ahi, sabiltung nih bawlsa api a; amei leng atel hi.
07019011	Jebus kho kiang atun un ni akai mahmahta hi. Sikha in apu kiang ah, “Hong pai dih, hiai Jebuste khopi ah i lut mai dia, i giak mai ding,” achi hi.
07019012	Apu'n akiang ah, “Israel suan hilou namdang khua ah lut lou e. Gibeah kholam i zuan zaw ding,” achi hi.
07019013	Asikha kiang ah, “Kisa aw, hiai munte akoi zaw hiam i zuan ding. Gibeah ah hiam, Ramah ah hiam i giak ding,” achi hi.
07019014	Huchi in apai nawn zel ua; Benjaminte Gibeah kho kiang atun un ni atumta hi.
07019015	Gibeah a giak ding in alut ua, alut un huai khopi kholak ah atu uh; kuamah zintun ding a-om ngal kei ua.
07019016	Ngai in, nitaklam in putek khat lou kuan ahong pai hi. Huai mi bel Ephraim tanggam a mi ahi a, Gibeah a om zual ahi. Amah Benjamin chite lak a ahi.
07019017	Akiheileh kholak a mikhualpa amu hi. Putek in, “Koi a hoh ding? Koi a pan a hong pai na hia?” achi hi.
07019018	Ama'n akiang ah, “Judah gam a Bethlehem a pan Ephraim tang tawp gam lam a hoh tum ka hi uh. Huai a om ka hi, Bethlehem, Judah gam ah ka va hoh a; tu in Toupa' inn a hoh tum ka hi. Kuamah hon zintun a-om kei hi.
07019019	Ka sabiltung ua ding buhpawl leh gan an ka nei uh. Kei leh na sikhanu leh na sikhate kiang a om tangval a ding leng tanghou leh uain a-om lai a, bangmah taksap ka nei kei uh,” achi hi.
07019020	Putek in, “Lungmuangtak in om in. Na kulna tengteng ke'n ka tum vek ding. Kholak ah zaw giak mahmah ke'n,” achi hi.
07019021	Huchi in a-inn ah apilut a, sabiltungte an apia a; akhete uh asil ua, ne in adawn uhi.
07019022	Huchi a nuamsa leh kipaktak a a-om lai un, ngai in, huai khua a mi, Belial tapate khenkhat in huai inn ahon umta uh. Kongkhak ahong khen ua; inn neipa putek kiang ah, “Na inn a hong tungpa hon pikhia in, ka kithuahpih ding uh,” achi uhi.
07019023	Inn neipa akiang uah ava pawt a, akiang uah, “Hilou e, ka unaute aw, hichi tel a gilou zaw hih mahmah kei un. Hiai mi ka mikhual ahi. Hiai thil haihuai hih kei un,” achi hi.
07019024	“Ngai un, hiai ah ka tanu nungak leh amei a-om uh. Amau ka hon pikhe dia, amaute zahlaksak in na ut-ut uh atung uah hih un. Himahleh hiai mi tung ah zaw hiai thil gilou hih kei un,” achi hi.
07019025	Himahleh huai mite'n athu azui nuam kei ua, huchi in hiai mi'n amei aman a, akiang uah ava pikhia hi. Amau ana kithuahpih ua, khovak masiah zankhua in apawngsual uhi. Huchi a khua ahong vaktak in, akhah uhi.
07019026	Khua ahong vaktak in numei apai a, apu tunnapa inn kongpi bul ah apuk a, khovak nung tan in a-om nilouh hi.
07019027	Apu zingsang in ahong thou a, inn kongpite ahong a, pai tum in ava pawt hi. Ngai in, ameinu kongpi bul ah akhutte insung lam nga in ana lum hi.
07019028	Ama'n akiang ah, “Thou in, i pai ding,” achi hi. Himahleh adawng kei. Huchi in asabiltung tung ah akoihtou a; athou a, amun lam ah apaita hi.
07019029	A-inn atun in temta ala a, amei asem a, aguhte toh seh sawm-le-nih in asemnen a, Israel gam teng ah akhak vek hi.
07019030	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amu peuhmahte'n, “Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawt nung uh hichibang thilhih leh muh tutan in a-om ngei nai kei. ‘Ngaihtuah unla, kihou unla, na lungsim uh gen un,’ ” achi uhi.
07020001	Huchi in Israel suan omkhawmte tengteng akisata ua, pheikhai lual in Dan a pan Beer-sheba kho pha in Gilead gam a mite toh Mizpah ah Toupa kiang ah akikhawm uhi.
07020002	Mi tengteng heutu, Israel chite tengteng Pathian mite kikhopkhawmna ah atel ua, sepaih namsau tawimi nuaili ahi uhi.
07020003	Benjamin suante'n Israel suante Mizpah ah ahohtou uh chih aza ua, Israel suante'n, “Bangchidan a hichibang a gitlouhna hong om ahia, hon hilh un?” achi uhi.
07020004	Levi chi, athah uh numei pasal in, “Benjamin chite omna Gibeah ah ka mei toh giak ding in ka va lut uhi.
07020005	Gibeah mite'n ahong sualta ua, zan in inn ahong um ua; hon thah atum ua, ka mei apawngsual ua asita hi.
07020006	Huchi in ka mei luang ka sem a, Israelte gam luah tengteng ah ka khak a, Israel gam ah thilkihhuai leh haihuaitak ana hihta ngal ua.
07020007	Nou Israel suante aw, na vek un ngai un, na ngaihdan uleh pha na sakdan uh gen dih ua,” achi hi.
07020008	Huchi in mi tengteng pheikhai lual in athou ua, “Kuamah i puanin lam ah i pai het kei ding, kuamah i inn ah i lut kei ding uh.
07020009	Gibeahte i bawldan ding hichibang ahi. Ai i san ding ua, amaute i dou ding uh.
07020010	Gibeah mun a Benjaminte i va sualna ua mipite nek ding pe ding in Israel nam tengteng lak a mi zakhat ah sawmkhat zel, sangkhat ah zakhat zel, singkhat ah sangkhat zel i telkhe ding uh,” achi uhi.
07020011	Huchi in Israel mi tengteng pheikhai lual in huai khopi sual ding in akikhawm uhi.
07020012	Israel namte'n Benjamin nam tengteng kiang ah mi asawl ua, “Na lak ua na hih uh bang gitlouhna ahia?
07020013	Gibeah a mi Belial tate hon pi unla, Israel gam a gitlouhna adaihtheihna ding in ka na that ding uh,” chi in mi asawl uhi. Himahleh Benjamin chite'n a-unau Israel suante thugen azui nuam kei uh.
07020014	Benjamin suante bel Israel suante dou ding in khopite a pan ahong pawtkhawm ua, Gibeah ah alutta uhi.
07020015	Huai ni a Benjamin suante khopi a pan namsau tawi a pawtte, Gibeah a mi zasagih telkhiakte sim louh in singnih-le-sangguk ahi uh.
07020016	Huai tengteng lak ah veilong zasagih, telkhiak a-om ua; amaute'n vaisuangseh in samzang chia leng akhial kei uhi.
07020017	Israel mite, Benjamin mite sim louh in namsau tawimi nuaili ahi uh. Amau tengteng galdou thei vek ahi uh.
07020018	Israel suante athou ua, Bethel ah ahohtou ua, Pathian ava dong ua, Benjamin suante kua'n ahia va sual masa ding? achi uh.
07020019	Toupa'n , “Judah nam va hoh masa uhen,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel suante lak ah athou ua, Gibeah khua ava umta uhi.
07020020	Israel mite Benjamin pawl sual ding in akisa ua, Israel mite'n Gibeah ah amaute sual ding in panmun akhoh uhi.
07020021	Benjamin suante Gibeah a pan apawtkhia ua, huai ni in Israel suante lak a mi singnih-le-sangnih ava that uhi.
07020022	Mipite, Israel mite akihasuan nawn ua, asual tung ni ua asualna mun mah uah sual ding in panmun akhoh nawn uhi.
07020023	Israel suante ahohtou ua, Pathian ma ah nitak tan in ava kap ua, “Ka unau uh Benjamin suante ka va sual nawn ding uam?” chi in Toupa adong uhi. Toupa'n , “Va sual nawn un,” achi hi.
07020024	Ani nih ni in Israel suante'n Benjamin suante ava naih uhi.
07020025	Benjamin suante leng huai ani nih ni in sual ding in Gibeah a pan apawt sam ua, Israel suante lak a mi singkhat-le-sanggiat ahong that nawn uh. Huaite tengteng namsau tawimi ngen ahi uh.
07020026	Huchi in Israel suan tengteng leh mi tengteng ava paitou ua, Bethel ah ahohtou ua, akap ua, Toupa ma ah atu uhi. Huai ni in nitak tan in an angawl uh. Toupa kiang ah halmang thillat leh lemna thillatte alan uhi.
07020027	Israel suante'n Toupa adong uh (huai hun lai in huai ah Pathian thukhun bawm a-om hi).
07020028	Huai lai in Aaron tapa Eleazar tapa Phinehas in a-nna asem zel ahi. “Ka unau uh Benjamin suante ka va sual nawn ding uam, ka tawpsanta mai ding uam?” chi in Toupa adong uhi. Toupa'n , “Va hoh un; zingchiang in zaw na khut uah ka hon peta ding,” achi hi.
07020029	Israel suante'n Gibeah kho kim ah tangpang mi agukkoih uhi.
07020030	Israel suante Benjamin suante sual ding in ani thum ni in akisa nawn uh. Nidang mah bang in Gibeah khua sual ding in panmun akhoh nawn uhi.
07020031	Benjamin suante bel huai mite sual ding in apawt ua, khua apawtsan uhi. Huchi in nidang mah bang in mite sual in athat pan nawnta ua, loubuk ngial ah Bethel kholam lamliante ah Israel suante sawmthum athat uhi.
07020032	Benjamin suante'n, “Ama mah bang in i ma uah azahlak nawnta uh e,” achi uhi. Israel suante'n bel, “I tai ding uh, khopi a pan lamlian lam ah i tolhkhesak ding,” achi uhi.
07020033	Huchi in Israel suan tengteng in apanmun uh apawtsan ua, Baal Tamar mun ah panmun akhoh uhi. Israel suan aguk a na tangpangte amun ua pan, Gibeah Phaizang a panmun tan in ahong pawtkhia uhi.
07020034	Israel suante tengteng lak a telkhiak mi singkhat in ava sual ua, kidouna athupi mahmah hi. Himahleh amau thil hoih lou akiang naichik uah a-om chih athei kei uh.
07020035	Toupa'n Israelte ma ah Benjamin suante athat hi. Israel suante'n huai ni in Benjamin suante mi singnih sangnga-le-zakhat athat uhi. Huaite tengteng namsau tawimi ngen ahi uh.
07020036	Huchi in Benjamin suante'n avuallelta uh chih ahong kitheita uhi. Israel suante'n Gibeah khua sual dia aguk a tangpang mite akoih uh amuan ziak un Benjamin suante anungtolh san uhi.
07020037	Aguk a tangpang mite'n Gibeah khua asual guih uhi. Huchi in aguk a tangpangte akiphalh ua, khua a mi tengteng namsau in asualta uhi.
07020038	Israel suante leh aguk a tangpang mite'n akichiam uh bel khopi sung a mei khuttouhsak ding, chih ahi.
07020039	Huai amuh chiang ua, Israel taikekte kilehhei a, dou ding achih uh ahi.
07020040	Huchi in khopi sung a meikhu ahong kitun nguingui tak in, Benjamin suante akihei uleh, ngai in, khopi apum in van lam tan ah akhutou ngoingoi hi.
07020041	Huchi in Israel suante ahong kilehhei ua, Benjamin suante'n lamdang asa mahmah uh. Atan uh ahoih kei ding chih lah atheita ngal ua.
07020042	Huaiziak in Israel suante ma ah gamdai ah ataikekta uh. Himahleh adelhzui pek ua, khopi a pan hong pawtte'n huai ah ana that uhi.
07020043	Benjamin suante bel a-umsip ua, adelh ua, nisuahna lam Gibeah kiang a akhawlna uah aphata uhi.
07020044	Benjamin suante mi singkhat-le-sanggiat asi ua; avek un mihat hangsan chiat ahi uh.
07020045	Akihei ua, gamdai lam Rimmon suangpi ah atai uh. Mi sangnga lamliante ah atom ua; Gidom tan in adelhzui ua, mi sangnih athat uhi.
07020046	Huchi in huai ni a Benjamin suan site, namsau tawimi ngen singnih-le-sangnga ahi ua, avek un mihat hangsan ahi uhi.
07020047	Mi zagukte gamdai lam Rimmon suangpi ah ataikek ua, huai Rimmon suangpi ah kha li sung a-om uhi.
07020048	Israel suante Benjamin suante tung ah akisa nawn ua, khopi sung a om peuhmah gante, amuhmuh uh namsau in asatlum zel ua, huai lou leng khua amuh peuhmah uh ahal zel uhi.
07021001	Huan Israel suante'n Mizpah khua ah, i lak ua mi kuamah in i tanute uh Benjamin suante zi ding in i pe kei ding uh, chi in akichiam uhi.
07021002	Bethel ah mipite ahoh ua, Pathian ma ah nitak tan in atu ua, a-awte uh suah in akap vongvong uhi.
07021003	Amau bel, “Aw Toupa Israelte' Pathian, bangchidan ahia Israelte lak a hichibang thil ahong om?” achi uhi.
07021004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in zingkhang in athou ua, huai ah maitam abawl ua, halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan uhi.
07021005	Israel suante'n, Israel nam tengteng lak a Toupa kiang a paikhawm pawl lak a va tel tei lou kuate ahi ua? achi uh. Mizpah a Toupa kiang ava hoh lou peuhmahte bel, thah ngeingei ding ahi, chi in ana kichiamta uhi.
07021006	Israel suante a-unaupa uh Benjamin suante tungthu ah akisik ua, “Tuni in Israel suante lak ah nam khat satkhiak ahita, achi uhi.
07021007	A-omsunte a ding in azi ding uh bangchi in i hihta ding ua? I tanute uh lah azi ding ua neisak lou ding in Toupa min lou in i na kichiamta ngal ua,” achi uhi.
07021008	Amau achi ua, Mizpah a Toupa kiang a hong paitou lou Israel namte lak ah a-om hia? Ngai in, kikhawm pawl omna mun ah Jabesh-gilead mite lak ah khat lel leng ahong hoh kei uhi.
07021009	Mite akisim uleh, ngai in, Jabesh-gilead gam a omte khat lel leng ana omta kei uhi.
07021010	Omkhawmte'n mihangsan hoih ngen singkhat-le-sangnih asawl uhi. “Kuan unla, Jabesh-gilead gam a omte numei leh atanu neute uh toh namsau in va satlum vek un.
07021011	Na hihdan ding uh hichibang ahi. Mi tengteng leh numei, pasal kithuahpih khinsa peuhmah hihmangthang vek un,” chi in thu apia uhi.
07021012	Jabesh-gilead gam a omte lak ah nungak zali, pasal kithuahpih ngei het louh amu uhi. Huchi in a-omna uh Shiloh ah api ua, huai tuh Kanaan gam a om ahi.
07021013	Omkhawm tengteng in mi asawl ua, Rimmon suangpi a om Benjamin suante ava houpih ua, kilemna bawl ding in asam uhi.
07021014	Huaitak in Benjamin pawl ahong nawn ua; Jabesh-gilead gam a numei ahawite uh azi ding un apia uhi. Huchi in leng akiching kei lai uhi.
07021015	Israel nam lak a Toupa'n kihihtuamna ana bawl ziak in mite, Benjamin suante tungthu ah akisik uhi.
07021016	Huchi in omkhawmte upate'n, “Adamlaite zi ding bang i chih ding ua? Benjamin suante lak a numeite lah hihmang ahita ngal ua?” achi uhi.
07021017	“Amau Israel nam hihmanlouhna ding in Benjamin suan omsunte bangchi in suan i neisak ding ua?
07021018	I tanute uh lah azi un i neisak thei ngal kei ua,” achi uhi. Israel suante'n, “Kuapeuh Benjamin suante zi dia neisak peuhmah hamsiat in om uhen,” chi in akichiam uhi.
07021019	Amau, “Ngai un, Bethel mallam, Bethel a pan Shekem zotna lamlian suahlam pang a Lebonah simlam a om Shiloh ah kum sim in Toupa a ding in ankuangluina a-om,” achi uhi.
07021020	Amau Benjamin suante kiang ah, “Va hoh unla, grep mun ah va guktan un;
07021021	Na en unla, ngai un, Shiloh a nungakte lamna a lam dia ahong pawt uleh, grep mun a pan hong pawt unla, Shiloh nungakte na zi ding un man chiat unla, Benjaminte gam ah paipih un.
07021022	Huan hichi ahi ding a, apate uh hiam, asanggampate uh hiam kalh dia i kiang ua ahong uleh, akiang uah, hon hehpih un. Kidouna sung in lah zi ka guan thei kei uh. Nou lah na tanute uh na piak thoh un hilou a, kichiamna a moh tang lou ding na hi uh,” ka chi ding uh, achi uhi.
07021023	Benjamin suante'n huchibang in ahih uhi. Lampawlte lak a mi amau zah chiat zi ding in aman ua, apaimangpihta uhi. Huchi in agam uah apai ua, khopite apuah nawn ua, huai ah atengta uhi.
07021024	Huaitak in huai a pan Israel suante bel amau chichi leh amau namnam in akihuituam nawn ua, huai nungsiah amau gam chiat ah apai nawn uhi.
07021025	Huai lai in Israelte lak ah kumpipa a-om kei a; michih in ama mitmuh a dik asak bang in ahih chiat uhi.
08002001	Huan Naomi in apasal tanau, Elimelek beh, mineizoutak tanau anei a; amin Boaz ahi.
08002002	Moab mi Ruth in Naomi kiang ah, “Lou ah ka va hoh dia, buhsang ka va zong ding aw, hon deihsakmi kuate hiam va tuak moh lou ka hi,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Hoh in, ka tanu,” achi hi.
08002003	Huchi in ahohta a, buh la mite lakmaih ava zong a; huchi in Elimelek beh Boaz lou ah ava hoh kha geih hi.
08002004	Huchi in ngai in, Bethlehem a pan Boaz ava hoh a, buh la mite kiang ah, “Na kiang uah Toupa om hen,” achi hi. Amau, “ Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen,” chi in adawng uhi.
08002005	Huchi in Boaz in asikha, buh la mite tung a heutu kiang ah, “Hiai kua nungaknou ahia oi?” achi hi.
08002006	Abuh la mite tung a heutu asikha in, “Moab nungaknou, Moab gam a pan Naomi toh hong pai ahi.
08002007	Ama'n, ‘hon hehpih inla, na buhsang ka zong dia, buh la mite'n abuhphal uh alakkhawm khit chiang un ka zong zel ding aw’ achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai a, inn a tomchik a-om chih louh zingsang a pan a-om nilouh hi,” chi in adawng hi.
08002008	Huchi in Boaz in Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, ngai dih, buhsang zong in lou dang ah hoh ke'nla, hiai a pan paisuan ke'n. Ka sikha nungakte kiang ah om gige in.
08002009	Abuhlak uh en gige inla, anung uh sui zel in. Tangvalte nang bangmah hon chih lou ding in thu ka pevekta hi. Na dangtak peuh chiang in tuibel a tangvalte tui tawisa dawn zel in,” achi hi.
08002010	Huchi in akun a, lei si in abokkhup a, akiang ah, “Namdang hinapi ing a, nang hichibang a na hon theihnop a, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan bangchidan ahia?” achi hi.
08002011	Boaz in adawng a, akiang ah, “Na pasal sih nungsiah na pi tung a na thilhihdan tengteng mi'n ahon hilh vek uh. Na nu leh na pa leh na pianna gam paisan atum a lam a na mi theih ngeilouhte kiang a na hong paidante leng.
08002012	Toupa'n na thilhih hon din henla, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, kihumbitna dia akha nuai na muan in kipahman tampi hon pia hen,” achi hi.
08002013	Ama'n, “Ka toupa, na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang a, na hon lungmuan a, na sikha nungakte lak a mi hi kei mah leng, na sikhanu hoihtak in na hon houpihta ngal a,” achi hi.
08002014	An nek hun in Boaz in akiang ah, “Hong pai inla, tanghoute hong ne sam inla, tanghou themte uain thuk ah hong diah in,” achi hi. Huchi in buh la mite kiang ah atu a; buhkan apia a; ane a, anek nung in leng akhamval lai hi.
08002015	Buhsang zong dia adin nawn in, Boaz in atangvalte kiang ah, “Buhphalte lak ah leng tawmsak zel unla, tai kei un.
