08002016	Alomte leng dohkhiaksak unla, nutsiat zel unla, tom henla, tai kei un,” chi in thu apia hi.
08002017	Huchi in lou a buhsang nitaklam tan in azong hi. Azonsa akhen a, barli buh ephah khat hiamtak apha hi.
08002018	Avan kisuan in khopi ah apaita hi. Api in abuhsang zon ana mu a; ama'n anek kham val asitte asuahkhia a, apia hi.
08002019	Api in akiang ah, “Tuni a koilam a buhsang zong na hia? Koi ah ahia na va sep? Ahon na theinuampa vualzawl in om hen,” achi hi. Ama'n kua kiang ah ahia ava sep chih api ahilh hi. “Tuni a nna ka va sepna pa min Boaz ahi,” achi hi.
08002020	Naomi in amounu kiang ah, “ Toupa , mihing leh misi tung a ahehpihna tawp tuan ngei lou in amah vualzawl hen,” achi hi. Naomi in akiang ah, “Huai mi, i kinaihpih, i tanau bul ei ve,” achi hi.
08002021	Moab mi Ruth in, “Kei kiang a leng hon chi ei ve,” achi hi.
08002022	Naomi in amounu Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, lou dang a ahon muh hetlouhna ding in asikha nungakte lak ngen ah pai lechin ahoih ding,” achi hi.
08002023	Huchi in barli buh leh buhpi lak khit mateng Boaz sikha nungakte lak kia ah buhsang zong in ahoh a, api kiang ah ateng hi.
08003001	Huan api Naomi, apasal nu'n akiang ah, “Ka tanu, nang a ding in khawlna ka hon zonsak kei dia hia, huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding hi.
08003002	I tanaupa Boaz, asikha nungakte toh nna na sepna pa om hilou hia? Ngai in, tuzan in phual ah barli buh azapsiang ding hi.
08003003	Huchi in kisil inla, thau kinilh inla, na kizepna puan silh inla, phual ah va hohsuk in. Himahleh an ne a, adawn khit masiah akiang ah kitheisak ke'n.
08003004	Huan hichi ahi ding a, alup chiang in alupna chiamteh inla, lut inla, akhe lem inla, va lum in. Ama'n na hih ding ahon hilh ding,” achi hi.
08003005	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na gen teng ka hih ding,” achi hi.
08003006	Huchi in phual ah ahohsuk a, api hilh bang in ava hihta hi.
08003007	Boaz in an ne a, adawn khit in alungtang akipak a, buhvum bul a lum ding in apaita a, huan, minu leng awlawl in ahong pai a, akhe alem a, alumta hi.
08003008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, akhe kiang ah numei khat ana lumta mai a, zan lai in huai mipa kiguih in akihei hi.
08003009	Ama'n, “Kua na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na sikhanu Ruth ka hi. Huchi in na sikhanu na puan hon zawn in, ka tanau bul lah na hi ngal a,” achi hi.
08003010	Ama'n, “Ka tanu, Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen. Tangval zawng hiam, hausa hiam na zuih louh in atung lai sang in anunglam ah hoihna na hihlang zaw hi.
08003011	Huchi in ka tanu, lau ke'n. Na gen bang in na tung ah ka hih ding. I khua a mi tengteng in numei kizentak na hi chih athei vek ngal ua.
08003012	Kitanau nai i hi ngut hi. Himahleh kei sang a naizaw a-om hi.
08003013	Tuzan zaw om peuhmah inla, zingchiang zingsang in na tung a ama'n atanau hih ding ahihnopleh ahoih hi. Himahleh tanau hih ding na tung a ahihnop keileh, tanau hih ding pen Toupa ahin bang in ke'n ka hih ding. Zingsang tan lum nilouh in,” achi hi.
08003014	Huchi in zingsang tan in akhebul ah alum hi. Kuamah akimuh chet theih ma in athoukhia hi. Ama'n, “Phual ah numei a hong chih himhim kuamah in thei kei hen,” achi hi.
08003015	Akiang ah, “Na puansilh la inla, doh in,” achi hi. Huchi in adoh a, barli buh tehna guk atehsak a, asuan a; huchi in khua ah apaita hi.
08003016	Api kiang atun in, “Ka tanu, bang na hong chi a?” ana chi hi. Ama'n, huai mipa in atung a thil ana hih tengteng ahilhta hi.
08003017	“Hiai barli buh tehna guk ahon pia a, ‘na pi kiang ah avuak in pai ke'n,’ ahon chi,” achi hi.
08003018	Ama'n, “Ka tanu, bangchibang in ahia thil ahong om ding na theih ma in tu maimai in. Tuni a hiai thil ahih khit mateng huai mipa dai mai lou ding ahi,” achi hi.
08004001	Huchi in Boaz kulh kongpi ah ahohtou a, huai ah atu hi. Ngai in, atanau bul uh atungtang thu Boaz in agen ahong pai hi. Huai mi kiang ah, “Eh! Nang na hi maw! Hong pai inla, hong tu dih ve,” achi hi. Amah hong pai in atuta hi.
08004002	Huai khua a upate lak a mi sawm api a, akiang uah, “Hiai ah tu dih ua,” achi a, huchi in amau atuta uhi.
08004003	Atanau bul uh kiang ah, “Moab gam a pan hong kik Naomi in i unaupa Elimelek gam azuak hi.
08004004	Huchi in khomite mitmuh leh ka mite upate mitmuh in lei in. Na tat nopleh tan in. Himahleh na tatnop keileh ka theihtheihna ding in hon hilh in. Nang lou lah kuamah atan dia kilawm a-om ngal kei ua. Nang zom in kei ka hi chih nang hon theihsak kiphamoh in ka thei,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tan ding,” achi hi.
08004005	Boaz in, “Naomi khut a pan huai gam na lei ni'n, misi zi, Moab numei Ruth a pan misi min bei lou a, agouluah ding mi a-om zel theihna ding in na lei tel ding ahi,” achi hi.
08004006	Atanau bulpa in, “Kei a ding in zaw ka tan thei kei. Huchi lou in zaw keimah gouluah ka mansuah kha ding. Ka tattheihna nang tang mai in. Ke'n zaw tan thei lou ka himai hi,” achi hi.
08004007	Nidanglai a Israelte lak a thil bangkim ahihkipna ding ua akitatdan uleh akikhendan uh hichi ahi. Khedap aphel ua, avengte uh apia ua, huai Israelte lak a ahihdan uh ahi.
08004008	Huchi in atanau bulpa un Boaz kiang ah, “Nang a ding in lei zaw in,” achi hi. Huchi in akhedap aphelta hi.
08004009	Boaz in upate leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni in noute Elimelek thil neih tengteng leh Kilon leh Mahlon thil neih tengteng Naomi khut a pan ka lei chih theihpihtute na hi uh.
08004010	Huai kia hilou in misi min amanlouhna ding in Moab numei Ruth, Mahlon zi ka zi ding in ka lei a, huai, tuni in noute atheihpihtute na hi uh,” achi hi.
08004011	Kulh kongpi a mipi tengteng leh upate'n, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh. Na inn a numei hong lut Rakil leh Leah, Israel inkuan dingsak nihte bang in Toupa'n bawl hen. Nang Ephrathah ah suanhuaitak in hong om inla, Bethlehem ah minthangtak in hong om in.
08004012	Toupa'n hiai nungaknou a pan suan ahon bawlsak ding ziak in na inkuan uh Tamar in Judah asuansak Perez inkuan bang hong hi hen,” achi uhi.
08004013	Huchi in Boaz in Ruth api a, azi ahong hita hi. Huchi in akithuahpih a, Toupa'n nau apaisak a, tapa anei hi.
08004014	Numeite'n Naomi kiang ah, “Tuni mahmah a tanau nai bei a hon omsak lou, Toupa phat in om hen. Israelte lak ah amin hong thang hen.
08004015	Amah na hinna tungdingpa leh na tek lam a hon vakpa ahong hi dia; na mounu nang hon itnu, tapa sagihte sang a nang a dia hoih in amah lah asuangta ngal a,” achi uhi.
08004016	Naomi in nau ala a, apom a, adonta hi.
08004017	A-inveng numeite'n amin aphuak ua, “Naomi a ding in tapa ahong piangta,” chi in amin Obed asa uhi. Amah, David pa Jesse pa ahi.
08004018	Hiaite Perez suante ahi uh. Perez in Hezron asuang;
08004019	Hezron in Ram asuang; Ram in Amminadab asuang;
08004020	Amminadab in Nashon asuang a, Nashon in Salmon asuang;
08004021	Salmon in Boaz asuang a, Boaz in Obed asuang;
08004022	Obed in Jesse asuang a, Jesse in David asuang hi.
09001001	Ephraim tanggam Ramathaim-zophim ah mi khat a-om a, amin Elkanah ahi a, amah Jeroham tapa, Elihu tapa, Tohu tapa, Ephraim mi Zuph tapa ahi.
09001002	Ama'n zi nih anei a, akhat min Hannah ahi, akhat min Peninnah ahi. Peninnah in tate anei a, Hannah in bel tate anei kei hi.
09001003	Huai mi akhua ua kipan Shiloh ah Sepaihte' Toupa houpih ding leh kithoih ding in kum teng in ahohtou hi. Huai ah Eli tapate nih, Hophni leh Phinehas, Toupa siampute a-om uhi.
09001004	Elkanah kithoih ni ahong tun in, azi Peninnah leh atapate leh atanute tengteng tantuan abawlsak hi.
09001005	Hannah tan nih abawlsak a, Hannah lah a-it mahmah ngal a. Himahleh Toupa'n asul akhaksak hi.
09001006	Toupa'n asul akhaksak ziak in alangnu'n alungkhamsak nak hi.
09001007	Huchibang a kum teng a ahih ziak in Toupa inn ahohtouh teng in alungkhamna atokthou nak hi. Huchi in akapkap a, an leng ane kei.
09001008	Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hannah, bang achia ahia na kah? Bang achia an ne lou na hia? Bang achia lungkham na hia? Tapa sawm sang in nang a ding in ka hoihzaw kei a hia?” achi hi.
09001009	Huchi in Shiloh a anek ua adawn khit un Hannah adingh a, siampu Eli Toupa tempul kong khuambul a atutna ah atu hi,
09001010	Hannah lungsim haksa mahmah in a-om a, Toupa kiang ah athum a, khase mahmah in akap hi.
09001011	Thu achiam a, “Sepaihte' Toupa aw, na sikhanu gimna en a, na hon theihgige a, na sikhanu na hon mangngilh louh a, na sikhanu tapa na piakleh adamsung teng Toupa ka pe dia, alu ah mulmetna zat ahi kei ding,” achi hi.
09001012	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa ma a athum san lai in Eli in amukphun ana chiamteh hi.
09001013	Hannah in alungtang in agen a, amuk kia atangsak a, a-aw bel zak ahi kei hi. Huaiziak in Eli in zukham asa hi.
09001014	Huchi in Eli in akiang ah, “Bang tan ahia kham a na om nilouh ding? Na uain koihmang in,” achi hi.
09001015	Hannah in, “Kham kei veng e, ka toupa. Lungsim lungkham mahmah numei ka hi. Uain leng, zu chik leng ka dawn kei, Toupa ma ah ka lungsim ka suahkhia ahi zaw.
09001016	Na sikhanu Belial tanu in hon ngoh het ke'n. Ka lungsim a dimlet lunggimna leh ka lungkhamna genkhia ka hi zaw hi,” chi in adawng hi.
09001017	Eli in, “Lungmuangtak in pai in, Israelte' Pathian in na thilnget nang hon pia hen,” chi in adawng hi.
09001018	Ama'n, “Na sikhanu na mitmuh in deihsakna musak in,” achi hi. Huchi in numei apaita a, an ane a, lungkham mel aputa kei hi.
09001019	Zingsangpi in athou ua, Toupa abia ua, apai ua, Ramah a a-inn uh atung nawnta uh. Elkanah in azi Hannah akithuahpih a, Toupa'n amah atheigige hi.
09001020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hannah in nau apai a, ahun ahong tun in tapa anei hi. “ Toupa ka nget ziak in,” chi in amin Samuel asa hi.
09001021	Huchi in Elkanah leh a-inkote tengteng Toupa ma a kum teng a akithoihna uh lan ding leh athuchiam uh tangtun ding in ahong paitou uhi.
09001022	Hannah bel ahohtou kei hi. Apasal kiang ah, “Kei zaw naupang in nawinek atawp masiah ka hohtou kei ding. Huai hun chiang in Toupa ma a akilat theihna ding in ka pi ding. Huai ah a-om nilouhta ding,” achi hi.
09001023	Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hoih ding na chih bang zel in hih in. Anawinek na tawpsak tan in om in. Himahleh Toupa'n athu hihkip lel hen,” achi hi. Huchi in nawinek atawp masiah huai ah numei a-om a, atapa nawinek atawp masiah nawi anesak hi.
09001024	Nawinek atawptak in, tangbuang ephah khat leh uain thawl khat tawi in bawngtal kum thum a upa toh Shiloh a Toupa inn ah ata naupang chik paipih in, apitou hi.
09001025	Bawngtal khat gou in, naupang Eli kiang ah api uhi.
09001026	Ama'n, “Toupa, na hin bang in ka gen ahi, kei zaw, aw toupa, hiai lai a na kiang a dingh a Toupa kiang a thum numei ka hi.
09001027	Hiai naupang ngen in ka thum a, Toupa'n ka nget ahon peta.
09001028	Huaiziak in ke'n leng Toupa kiang ah ka lan hi. Adamsung teng Toupa a dia lat ahi,” achi hi. Huai ah ama'n Toupa abia hi.
09002001	Huan Hannah athum a, hichi in achi, “Ka lungtang Toupa tung ah akipak mahmah, Toupa ah ka kii pahtawi in a-om. Ka melmate tung ah ka kam letsak in a-om; na hotdamna a ka kipah mahmah ziak in.
09002002	Toupa bang a siangthou a-om kei uh: Nang bang mahmah lah a-om ngal kei uh. I Pathian bang suangpi himhim leng a-om sam kei.
09002003	Huchi tel a kisathei in thu gen nawn kei unla; na kam ua pan pau uang himhim pawt kei hen. Toupa lah pilna Pathian ahi ngal a, ama'n thilhihte hoihtak in abuk zel hi.
09002004	Mihat thalpeute akitansak a, akisuite taihatna a gak in a-om hi.
09002005	Niang leh tai a omte nek ding zong in alohtawm ua, gilkialte kial nawn lou uhi. Achiingnu'n ta sagih aneita a, ta tampi neinu abahta hi.
09002006	Toupa'n athat a, ahingsak hi. Han ah apaisuksak a, apikhetou hi.
09002007	Toupa'n azawngsak a, ahausasak a, ahihniam a, ahihsang hi.
09002008	Leivui a pan azawngte adingtousak a, ekvu a pan khutdohte adomtou hi. Miliante kiang a a-omsak theih a, thupina laltutphah atantheihna ding un. Lei kingaknate Toupa a ahi a, ama'n atung uah khovel angata ngal a.
09002009	Amisiangthoute khe akem ding a, migiloute bel mial lak ah daihsak in a-om ding uh. Hatna a kuamah in zou lou ding ahi ngal a.
09002010	Toupa melmate a i tamgawp ding ua, van a pan vanpiging bang in amaute adou ding. Toupa'n kawlmong pha in vai ahawm ding a; akumpipa kiang ah hatna ape dia, athaunilhpa kii apahtawi ding,” achi hi.
09002011	Huchi in Ramah ah a-inn ah Elkanah apaita hi. Huchi in naupang in siampu Eli ma ah Toupa nna asemta hi.
09002012	Eli tapate Belial tapate ahi ua; Toupa athei kei uh.
09002013	Mite lak a siampute hihdan ngeina ahihleh mi'n kithoihna ahong lat chiang un, sa huan laitak in siampu sikha sa thukna sikkhut zum thum nei tawi in ahong pai zel hi.
09002014	Belgongza hiam, belgong nei hiam, bel khaina nei hiam, bel hiam sung asunsuk a, huai sa thukna zum in ahon thukkhiak tengteng siampu in ala zel hi. Huchibang in Israel mi huai a hong pai tengteng a pan Shiloh ah ana hihsak zel uhi.
09002015	Huai ban ah, thau akhul ma un siampu sikha ahong pai a, kithoihmi kiang ah, “Siampu a ding haimin ding sa hon pia in. Na sa huanmin adeih kei, asial adeih hi,” achi hi.
09002016	Mi'n akiang ah, “Athau pen khul phot uhenla, huai khit chiang in na hinna in adeih zahzah na la ding,” ana chih chiang un ama'n, “Hilou e, tu mah a na hon piak pah ding ahi. N'on piak keileh thagum in ka la ding,” achi hi.
09002017	Huchi in Toupa mitmuh in tangvalte khelhna athupi mahmah a, mite'n lah Toupa kiang a kithoihna lat thilkihhuai in angaita uhi.
09002018	Himahleh Samuel in bel naupang chik in, puanmalngat siampu puanak silh in Toupa ma ah nna asem hi.
09002019	Huai lou leng anu'n puanaktual neu akhuisak a, kum teng kithoihna uh lan dia apasal toh ahoh chiang un kum teng in atawisak zel hi.
09002020	Eli in Elkanah leh azi avualzawl a, “ Toupa a dia na thillat uh mun luah ding numei suan Toupa'n hon pia hen,” achi hi. Huchi in a-inn uah apaita uhi.
09002021	Toupa'n Hannah aveh a, nau apai a, tapa thum leh tanu nih anei hi. Toupa ma ah naupang Samuel ahong khanglianta hi.
09002022	Eli bel atek mahmahta hi. Israel mi tengteng tung a atapate thilhih tengteng leh kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak bul a nasem numeite ana kithuahpih zel thute uh aza hi.
09002023	Huchi in akiang uah, “Bangziak a hichibang thilhih na mai ua? Hiai mi tengteng a pan na thilhihdan hoihloute uh ka na za ngal a.
09002024	Hichi ding hilou ahi, ka tapate aw, na tanchin uh ka zak ahoih lou lam ngen ahi. Toupa mite na taleksak uhi.
09002025	Mi khat, midang tung a akhelhleh Pathian in vai ahawmsak ding hi. Himahleh Toupa tung a mi akhelhleh kua'n amah a ding in angetsakta dia?” achi hi. Huchi pipi in leng apa uh aw angaikhe kei ua, Toupa'n amaute athah ding ziak in.
09002026	Naupang Samuel akhanglian deuhdeuh a; Pathian leh mihing deihsak in a-om hi.
09002027	Eli kiang ah Pathian mipa khat ahong a, akiang ah, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Aigupta gam a Pharaoh inn a na om lai un na pa inkote kiang ah ka kilak kei maw?
09002028	Israel nam tengteng lak a pan ka siampu hi ding, ka maitam a thil lan ding, gimlim hal ding leh siampu puanak silh dia amah ka tel ahi kei maw? Na pa inkote kiang ah Israel mite halmang thillat teng ka pia ahi kei maw?
09002029	Bangziak in ahia ka tenna a na lat ding ua ka thupiak ka kiang a kithoihna leh kei a tuam dia thillat pen lei toh sikden a, kei sang a na tapate na zahtak zawk a, noumau na kisukthauna ding ua ka mi Israelte kithoihna ahoihpente na zat uh?’
09002030	Huaiziak in Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, ‘Ke'n zaw na inkote leh na pa inkote tangtawn in ka ma ah na om ding uh,’ ka na chi ngei hi. Himahleh tu in Toupa'n , ‘Na om het kei ding uh. Hon zahtak peuhmah ka zahtak dia, hon musit peuhmah ka musit ding,’ achi hi.
09002031	Ngai in, ‘na bante leh na pa inkote bante ka tankhiak ni ahong tung, na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh.
09002032	Ka tenna inn ah, Pathian in Israel hauhsakna apiak teng ah melma na mu dia, tangtawn in na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh.
09002033	Ka maitam a pan ka hihman louh ding na mi pen na mit hihkhamtu leh na lungsim lungkhamsaktu ahi ding. Na inn a hong piang peuhmah adawnsih zel ding uhi.
09002034	Hiai, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas tung a thil tung ding nang a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding. Ni khat in anih un asi tuaktuak ding uhi.
09002035	Kei a ding in siampu muanhuai ka dingkhesak dia, huai in ka lungtang leh ka lungsim toh kituak in nna asem ding. Inkuan kiptak in ka lamsak dia, tangtawn in ka thaunilhmi ma ah a-om ding.
09002036	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, na inn a om lai tengteng dangka leh tanghou ngen in akiang ah akuan ding ua, tanghou tawmchik bek nek ding ka muhtheihna ding un siampu nna khat bek hon semsak ve aw, chi in ka hong thum hi, achi ding uh,’ ” achi hi.
09003001	Huan naupang Samuel in Eli ma ah Toupa nna asem hi. Huai lai in Toupa thu tung avang mahmah a; alangtang a kilaknate a-om kei hi.
09003002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in, Eli amun a alup lai in, amit amial panta a, khua agina muhthei nawn ngel kei hi.
09003003	Pathian khawnvak amih ma in, Pathian bawm omna Toupa tempul ah Samuel ihmu ding in alumta hi.
09003004	“ Toupa'n Samuel asam a,” ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
09003005	Eli kiang ah ava tai a, akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n, “K'on sam kei; va lum nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in apai a, ava lum nawn hi.
09003006	Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn hi. Samuel athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “K'on sam kei, ka tapa, va lum nawn in,” achi hi.
09003007	Huai lai in Samuel in Toupa athei nai kei a, Toupa thu leng akiang a kilaksak ahi nai kei hi.
09003008	Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn a, huai athumveina ahita. Amah athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Huchi in Eli in naupang Toupa'n sam ahi chih atheita hi.
09003009	Huaiziak in Eli in Samuel kiang ah, “Pai inla, va lum nawn inla, ahon sap nawnleh, Toupa , thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia, na chi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel apaita a, amun ah ava lum nawn hi.
09003010	Toupa ahong pai a, hong dingh in, ama a asap bang in, “Samuel, Samuel,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in, “Thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia hi,” achi hi.
09003011	Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Ngai in, Israel gam ah aza peuhmahte bil langnih a aphuaitak in thil khat ka hih ding hi.
09003012	Huai ni in a-inkuan tungtang thu ka gen tengteng abul a pan atawp tan in Eli tung ah ka hih ding ahi.
09003013	Atapate'n Pathian agensiatna khelhna uh theigige napi a, akham louh ziak in a-inkuan tangtawn a ding in ka hawmsak ding hi, chih ka hilh khinta ngal a.
09003014	Huaiziak in Eli inkuan kiang ah Eli inkuan bohsiatna kithoihna in hiam, thillat in hiam, chikchiang in leng siansak theih ahi kei ding, chi in ka kichiam khinta hi,” achi hi.
09003015	Zingsang tan in Samuel alum a, Toupa' inn kongkhakte ahong hi. Samuel in huai kilakna Eli theihsak alau hi.
09003016	Huchi in Eli in Samuel asam a, “Samuel, ka tapa,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
09003017	Ama'n, “Bang thil ahia Toupa'n na kiang a agen? Ka kiang ah bangmah iim ke'n aw. Na kiang a agen tengteng ka kiang a iim na neihleh na tung ah Pathian in ahihhih in hih henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng,” achi hi.
09003018	Samuel in thil tengteng ahilh sipsip a, akiang ah bangmah iim anei kei. Huchi in ama'n, “ Toupa thuthu ahi mah ve, hoih asak bang in hih hen aw,” achi hi.
09003019	Samuel ahong khanglian deuhdeuh a, akiang ah Toupa a-om a, athu himhim lei lak ah akesak kei hi.
09003020	Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan in Israel mi tengteng in Toupa zawlnei dia Samuel hihkip ahi, chih ana theita uhi.
09003021	Shiloh ah Toupa akilak nawn a; Toupa thu in Samuel kiang ah Shiloh a kilak lah ahi ngal a.
09004001	Huan Samuel thu Israel mi tengteng lak ah athangkheta hi. Israel mite Philistia mite dou ding in akuankhia uhi. Ebenezer kiang ah panmun akhoh ua, Philistia mite'n Aphek ah panmun akhoh uhi.
09004002	Philistia mite Israel mite na dal ding in ana kiphalh uh. Ahong kidou uleh Philistia mite ma ah Israel mite azahlakta ua, kidouna mun ah sepaih sangli vel athat uhi.
09004003	Mipite agiahmun ua ava pai uleh Israel upate'n, “Bangziak in ahia tuni a Toupa'n Philistia mite ma a hon zahlaksak mahmah? I kiang ua om a i melmate khut a pan hon hondam ding in Shiloh a pan Toupa thukhun bawm i va la ding uh,” achi uhi.
09004004	Huchi in mipite'n Shiloh ah mi asawl ua, huai a pan cherubim tung a tu sepaihte' Toupa thukhun bawm ava la ua; huai ah Pathian thukhun bawm toh Eli tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas a-om uhi.
09004005	Huchi in Toupa thukhun bawm agiahmun uh ahong tun in, Israel mi tengteng ngaihtak in akikou zuazua ua, lei nangawn athawn ging zuazua hi.
09004006	Philistia mite'n akikou husa uh azak un, “Hebrute giahmun a kikou husa gingta zuazua mai bang chihna ahia le?” achi uh. Agiahmun uah Toupa thukhun bawm ahong tung ahi, chih atheita uhi.
09004007	Philistia, “Giahmun ah Pathian ahong hi,” achih ziak un mite'n alau uhi. “I tung agik hi! Tuma lam in huchibang a-om ngei ngal kei a, achi uhi.
09004008	I tung agik hi! Huai Pathiante khut hattak a pan kua'n ahia hon hondam ding? Huai Pathiante ahi, Aigupta mite gamdai a hipi chiteng a that.
09004009	Aw, nou Philistia mite aw, nou sikha ua a-om bang ua nou Hebrute sikha a na omlouhna ding un hattak in om unla, kipasalsak un. Kipasalsak unla sual un,” achi uhi.
09004010	Huchi in Philistia mite'n asual ua, Israel mite azahlaksak ua, michih apuanin lam chiat uah ataikek uh. Anak thah mahmah ua, Israelte sepaih singthum asi uhi.
09004011	Pathian bawm alaksak ua, Eli tapa nih, Hophni leh Phinehas leng athat uhi.
09004012	Sepaih lak a Benjamin suan mi khat atai a, apuan khawng kikek nengnung in leh alu a lei kai niaunuau in huai ni mahmah in Shiloh ava tung hi.
09004013	Ahong tun in, ngai in, Eli in lampi gei a tutna a tu kawm in ana en nilouh a, Pathian bawm ziak in alungtang aling ngal a. Mipa'n khua atun a tanchin agenleh akhomi teng akapkhia uhi.
09004014	Eli in akikou husa uh azak in, “Tua thawm ging vengvung bang chihna ahia?” achi hi. Mi khat kintak in ava hoh a, Eli ava hilh hi.
09004015	Eli bel kum sawmkua-le-giat a upa ahi a, amit amialta a, khua amu thei nawn kei.
09004016	Huai mipa'n Eli kiang ah, “Sepaih lak a pan hong paikhia ka hi. Tuni a sepaih lak a pan hong taikhia ka hi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tapa, bangchibang in thil a-om a oi?” achi hi.
09004017	Tanchin hon tunpa'n adawng a, “Israel mite Philistia mite ma ah ataikek ua, mipi lak ah kithahna thupitak a-om lai a, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas leng asi ua, Pathian bawm leng alaksak uh,” achi hi.
09004018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian bawm thu agentak in kongpi bul a tutphah a pan athalpuk a, amah tekta a kikhouh zou nawn lou ahih ziak in, angawng akitan a, asita hi. Israel tung ah kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi.
09004019	Amounu, Phinehas zi in nau apai a, neih ahun mahmahta hi. Ama'n Pathian bawm laksak ahih thu leh apu leh apasal si uh ahi chih azak in akunsuk a, nauvei nat in apha a, ta aneita hi.
09004020	Asih dek lai in akiang a dingh numeite'n akiang ah, “Lau ke'n, tapa na neita,” achi uhi. Himahleh adawng het kei a, alimsak sam kei hi.
09004021	“Thupina in Israel apawtsanta,” chi in nau min Ikabod asa hi. Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ua, apa leh apasal lah asita ngal ua.
09004022	“Thupina in Israel apawtsanta, Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ngal ua,” achi hi.
09005001	Huan Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Ebenezer a pan Ashdod ah apaipih uhi.
09005002	Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Dagon inn ah alalut ua, Dagon kiang ah akoih uhi.
09005003	Ashdod khomite zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk hi. Dagon ala ua, a-omna mun ah akoih nawn uhi.
09005004	Azing nawn zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk a; Dagon lu leh akhutpek bawm langnih kitankhia kongpi bul ah ana kikham hi.
09005005	Huaiziak in Dagon siampu hiam, Dagon inn a hong paite'n leng Ashdod a Dagon inn bul tuni tan in asik ngam kei uhi.
09005006	Huchi in Toupa khut Ashdod khua mite tung ah agik a, amaute ahihsia a, Ashdod khua leh akiang vel a omte zaangtan hipi in agawtta hi.
09005007	Huchi in Ashdod a mite'n huchibang thil tung amuh un, “Israelte' Pathian bawm i kiang uah om gige kei hen, eimah leh i pathian Dagon tung ah akhut khak ana tel mai,” achi uhi.
09005008	Huaiziak in Philistia hausa tengteng akiang uah asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm bang i lohta dia?” achi uh. Amau, “Israelte' Pathian bawm Gath ah puak hi hen,” chi in adawng uhi. Huchi in Gath ah Israelte' Pathian bawm apaipihta uhi.
09005009	Hichi ahong hi a, apaipih lai un Toupa khut in huai khua ahihseta hi. Kho mite aneu leh alian agawt vek a, atung uah zaangtan hipi alengsak hi.
09005010	Huchi in Pathian bawm Ekron ah atun ua, Ekron khomite'n Israelte' Pathian bawm eite leh i mite that ding in i kiang ahon tunta uh, chi in akikou vengvung uhi.
09005011	Huchi in Philistia hausa tengteng asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm paimangsak unla, koute leh ka mite ahon thahlouhna ding in a-omna mun ngei ah pai nawn hen,” achi uh. Kho pumpi ah sihna khop siatna a-om a; Pathian khut lah huai khua ah agik mahmah ngal a.
09005012	Asiloute'n zaangtan avei chiat ua, van ah huai kho kikou husa atungtou hi.
09006001	Huan Toupa bawm Philistia mite gam ah kha sagih sung a-om hi.
09006002	Philistia mite'n, “ Toupa bawm bang i loh ding ua? A-omna ngei mah apaisak nawndan hon hilh dih ve ua,” chi in asiampute leh aisan siamte asam uhi.
09006003	Amau, “Israelte' Pathian bawm na paisak ding uleh leng avuak in paisak het kei un. Akiang ah tatlek kithoihna lan ngeingei un. Huchi in hihdam in na om ding uh. Huchi in bangziak a akhut nou a pan lakkhiak a om lou ahia chih na thei ding uh,” achi uhi.
09006004	Huchi in amau, “Akiang a ka tatlekna thillat ding bang ahia?” achi uh. Amau, “Philistia hausate zah dangka-eng zaangtan lim nga leh dangka-eng sansim lim nga; na vek ua tung leh na hausate uh tung a leng hipi lah khat ahi ngal a.
09006005	Huaiziak in na zaangtan lim uh leh na gam uh hihsetu sansim limte bawl un. Israelte' Pathian thupina pia un, huchi in akhut na tung uah, na pathiante uleh na gam uh tung ah azangsak nuam khamoh kei ding,” achi uhi.
09006006	Aigupta mite leh Pharaoh in lungsim akhauhsak bang un bangziak a na lungtang uh khauhsak na hi ua? Alak ua thillamdang ahih in mite paisak in apawtkhesak uh, hilou maw?
09006007	Huaiziak in tu in kangtalai thak sutuah unla, bawngpi nih anawi suk lai, hakkol po ngei lou toh; huai bawngpite kangtalai ah khih unla, anoute uh amau a pan inn ah hon pi un.
09006008	Toupa bawm la unla, kangtalai ah koih unla; tatlek thoihna dia na lat uh dangka-eng thil pen singlem ah thun in asik a koih in, paisak unla, khah un.
09006009	Huchi in gamgi lam pang lampi tawn in Beth-shemesh ah apai hiam en un, apaileh i tung ua thil hoih loutak amah hih ana hi dia; apai keileh ei hon gawtpa amah khut ana hi kei chih i thei ding ua, i tung ua hong om himhim lel ahi ding, achi uhi.
09006010	Mite'n huchibang in ahih ua; bawngpi anawi suk lai nih api ua, kangtalai ah akhih ua, anoute uh bel inn lam ah akhum uhi.
09006011	Sansim lim dangka-eng leh zaangtan lim koihna singlem toh kangtalai ah Toupa bawm akoih uhi.
09006012	Bawngpite'n Beth-shemesh lam zuan in lampi azui vengveng ua; huchi in ham kawmkawm in lampi azui ua, taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam apial het kei uh. Philistia hausate'n Beth-shemesh gamgi pha in azui uhi.
09006013	Beth-shemesh khomite'n phaizang ah buh ana la ua, adaktou ua, bawm amu ua, akipahpih mahmah uhi.
09006014	Huai kangtalai Beth-shemesh a mi Joshua lou ah alut a, suangpi lian mahmah omna tak ah akhawlta hi. Kangtalai sing a-ek ua, Toupa kiang ah bawngpite halmang thillat in alan uhi.
09006015	Levi chite'n Toupa bawm dangka-eng thil omna singlem toh alakhia ua, suangpi tung ah akoih uhi. Beth-shemesh khomite'n huai ni mah in halmang thillatte leh kithoihnate Toupa kiang ah alan uhi.
09006016	Huai Philistia hausa ngate'n amuh nung un, huai ni mahmah in Ekron kholam ah apai nawnta uhi.
09006017	Philistia mite'n dangka-eng zaangtan lim Toupa kiang a tatlek thoihna dia alat uh, Ashdod kho tuam a ding in khat, Gaza kho tuam a ding in khat, Ashkelon kho tuam a ding in khat, Gath kho tuam a ding in khat, Ekron kho tuam a ding in khat ahi.
09006018	Dangka-eng sansim lim ahihleh kho tengteng kulh nei khua leh singtang lam khua leng sim vek a hausa ngate a Philistia mite kho zah ahi. Toupa bawm angakna suangpi mahmah uh Beth-shemesh khomi Joshua lou ah tuni tan in a-om nilouh lai hi.
09006019	Toupa bawm sung a-et ziak un Beth-shemesh khomite ama'n agawt a, alak ua mi sangnga-le-sawmsagih tak athat hi. Toupa'n anak thah ziak in mite'n asuun uhi.
09006020	Beth-shemesh khomite'n, hiai Pathian siangthou Toupa ma ah kua adingh thei in ei a pan kua kiang ah ahia apaitouh ding? achi uh.
09006021	Huchi in Kiriath-jearim khomite kiang ah, “Philistia mite'n Toupa bawm ahong koih nawn ua, hong suk unla na kiang uah latou dih ua,” chi a hilh ding in thupo mite asawlta uhi.
09007001	Huchi in Kiriath-jearim a mite ahohsuk ua, Toupa bawm alatou ua; mual a Abinadab inn ah alalut ua, atapa Eleazar Toupa bawm kemtu in aseptuam uhi.
09007002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Kiriath-jearim a bawm a-om sung sawtpi, kum sawmnihtak ahi. Huchi in Israel inkuan tengteng in Toupa alungzuan nawnta uhi.
09007003	Samuel in Israel inkuan tengteng kiang ah, “Na lungtang tengteng uh toh Toupa lam hong nga na hih taktak uleh, gamdang pathiante leh Ashtaroth na lak ua kipan koihmang unla, na lungtang uh Toupa a ding in kisakholsak un. Amah kia nna sem un; huchi in Philistia mite khut a pan nou ahon tankhe ding hi,” chi in agen hi.
09007004	Huchi in Israel mite'n Baal leh Ashtaroth akoihmang ua, Toupa nna kia asemta uhi.
09007005	Samuel in, “Israel mi tengteng Mizpah ah samkhawm vek unla, Toupa kiang ah ka hon thumsak ding,” achi hi.
09007006	Huchi in Mizpah ah apaikhawm ua, tui atawi ua, Toupa ma ah asungbua uh. Huai ni in an angawl ua, huai ah Toupa tung ah i na khialta uh, achi uhi. Samuel in Mizpah ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi.
09007007	Philistia mite'n Israel mite Mizpah ah a-omkhawm uh chih azak un, Israel mite sual ding in Philistia hausate akisatou ua, Israel mite'n huai ana zak un Philistia mite alauta uhi.
09007008	Huchi in Israel mite'n Samuel kiang ah, “Philistia mite khut a pan hon hondam dia Toupa i Pathian na hon sapsak tawp ke'n,” achi uh.
09007009	Samuel in belamnou nawi ne lai ala a, halmang thillat in Toupa kiang ah alan hi. Israel mite a ding in Samuel in Toupa asam a, Toupa'n adawng hi.
09007010	Samuel in halmang thillat alat laitak in Philistia mite'n Israel mite sual ding in ahon naih uhi. Himahleh huai ni in Toupa'n Philistia mite tung ah ngaihtak in van agingsak a, abuaisakgawp a, Israel mite ma ah zoh in a-om uhi.
09007011	Mizpah a pan Israel mite apawt ua, Philistia mite adelh ua, Beth-kar nuai atun tan un athat zel uhi.
09007012	Huchi in Samuel in suang ala a, Mizpah leh Shen kikal ah aphut a, “Hiai tan Toupa'n hon panpih hi,” chi in amin “Ebenezer” asa hi.
09007013	Huchi in Philistia mite azahlakta ua, Israel gam ah ahoh nawnta kei uh. Huchi in Samuel damsung tengteng Toupa khut in Philistia mite adou hi.
09007014	Philistia mite'n Israel mite khua alakte uh Ekron a pan Gath tan in Israel mite ape nawn vek uh. Agam Israel mite'n Philistia mite khut a pan atankheta uhi. Israel mite leh Amor mite kal ah kilemna a-om hi.
09007015	Huchi in adamsung teng Samuel in Israelte vai ahawmsak hi.
09007016	Kum teng in Bethel leh Gilgal leh Mizpah aveh zel a; huai mun teng ah Israelte vai ahawmsak hi.
09007017	A-inn omna ahih ziak in Ramah ah apai nawn zelzel hi. Huai ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam khat adoh hi.
09008001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Samuel a-upata a, Israel mite tung a vaihawmmi in atapate abawl hi.
09008002	Ata masapen min Joel ahi a, azom min Abijah ahi. Amaute Beer-sheba a vaihawmte ahi uh.
09008003	Himahleh atapate'n ama omdan ala kei ua, sum-le-pai adelh ua, golhna ala ua, dik a vaihawmna akaikawi uhi.
09008004	Huchi in Israel mite upate tengteng akikhawm ua, Ramah ah Samuel kiang ah ahoh uhi.
09008005	Akiang ah, “Ngai in, na upa mahmahta a, na tapate'n lah na omdan ala kei hial uh. Namdang tengteng bang a ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon bawlsak in,” achi uhi.
09008006	Himahleh akiang a, “Ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon pia in,” achih un Samuel akipaksak kei hi. Huchi in Toupa kiang ah Samuel athum hi.
09008007	Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Mite'n na kiang a agen tengteng uh ngaikhia in. Nang hon deih lou ahi kei ua, atung ua kumpipa dia kei hon deih lou ahi zaw uhi.
09008008	Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak ni a pan tutan a athilhihdan tengteng uh, hon lehngatsan a pathian dangte nna ahon sepsan zel uh mah bang in nang tung ah ahih uhi.
09008009	Huaiziak in athu uh ngaikhia in. Himahleh chitaktak in vauhilh inla, atung ua vaihawmmi kumpipa tatdan ding kawkmuh in,” achi hi.
09008010	Samuel in Toupa thu tengteng kumpipa ngen mipite ahilh vek hi.
09008011	“Na tung ua vaihawmmi ding kumpipa tatdan hichibang ahi ding. Na tapate uh ala dia, amah mah a ding, sakol kangtalai a ding leh asakol tungtuang mite ding in asep ding. Akhente asakol kangtalai ma ah atai ding uh.
09008012	Asepaih sangkhatte heutu ding leh sawmngate heutu ding asep dia; khenkhatte alei let ding, abuh la ding, agalvante bawl ding, akangtalai van bawl ding in azang ding hi.
09008013	Na tanute uh gimlim bawl ding, anhuan ding leh tanghou bawl ding in azang ding hi.
09008014	Na lou, na grephuan, olive huan a ahoih tata ahon sut dia, asikhate ape ding hi.
09008015	Na haichi leh na grephuan a sawm-a-khat ahon laksak dia; asikhate leh heutute ape ding hi.
09008016	Na sikhapate, na sikhanute, na tangval hoihhoihte leh na bawngte ahon sut dia, anasem ding in azang ding.
09008017	Na belamhon lak a sawm-a-khat ahon laksak dia; nou asikhate na hi ding uh.
09008018	Huai hun chiang in na tel ding uh kumpipa ziak in na kapkhe ding uh. Himahleh huai hun chiang in Toupa'n ahon ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi.
09008019	Himahleh mipite'n Samuel thu azui nuam kei uh, “Ahi kei, kumpipa i neih ngeingei ding uh ahi.
09008020	Huchi in namdang tengteng bang i hong hi dia, i kumpipa'n vai ahon hawmsak dia, i namte pi in galte ahon doupih ding,” achi uhi.
09008021	Samuel in mipite thugen tengteng aza a, Toupa bil ah agensawn hi.
09008022	Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Athu uh la inla, kumpipa bawlsak in,” achi hi. Samuel in Israel mite kiang ah, “Michih noumau khua chiat ah paita un,” achi hi.
09009001	Huan Benjamin gam a Benjamin suan a mi khat mihat leh hangsan mahmah a-om a, amin Kish ahi. Amah Abiel tapa, Zeror tapa, Bekorath tapa, Aphiah tapa ahi.
09009002	Ama'n tapa khat anei a, amin Saul ahi. Tangval deihhuaitak ahi a, Israel mite lak ah amah sang a deihhuaizaw himhim a-om kei. Kuamah aliangzang khup leng a-om kei hi.
09009003	Saul pa Kish sabiltungte amang hi. Kish in atapa Saul kiang ah, “Thou inla, sikha khat pi inla sabiltungte va zong dih ve,” achi hi.
09009004	Huchi in Ephraim tanggam ah avak a, Shalisha gam ah avak hi. Himahleh amu kei uh. Huchi in Shalim gam ah avak ua, huai ah leng amu kei uh. Benjamin mite gam ah avak nawn ua, himahleh amu tuan kei uhi.
09009005	Zuph gam atun un Saul in akiang a om asikha kiang ah, “Kisa dih, i pai nawn mai ding, ahuchih keileh ka pa'n sabiltungte awlmoh nawn lou in ei hon ngaihtuah zaw kha ding,” achi hi.
09009006	Ama'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, hiai khua ah Pathian mipa a-om a, mizahtakhuaitak ahi. Agen peuhmah ahong tung ngeingei nak hi. Kisa in, huai ah i va hoh ding, i hohna lampi ahon hilhthei zenzen khakleh,” achi hi.
09009007	Huchi in Saul in asikha kiang ah, “Ahi na a, ngai dih, hoh hita lehang, huai mi a ding in bang i tawi dia? I bawm ah lah tanghou a-om nawn kei. Pathian mipa kipahman tawi ding a-om het kei hi. Bang i nei a eita?” achi hi.
09009008	Sikha in Saul adawng nawn a, “Ngai in, dangka shekel mun li a khen mun khat ka tawi lai hi. Hiai i hohna ding a hon hilh man ding in Pathian mipa ka pe ding,” achi hi.
09009009	Tuma siah Israelte lak a mi'n Pathian dot a-utleh, “Kisa dih, mutheipa kiang ah i hoh ding,” achi nak uh. Tulai a zawlnei achih uh tuma lam a mutheipa achih uh ahi.
09009010	Huchi in Saul in asikha kiang ah, “Hoih geih e, va hoh peuhmah ni,” achi hi. Huchi in Pathian mipa omna khua ah ahohta uhi.
09009011	Mual a kho zotna lampi a apaitouh lai un nungak tui tawi dia hong kuante amu ua, akiang uah, “Hiai ah mutheipa a-om hia?” achi uhi.
09009012	Amau adawng ua, “Om mah e, ngai in, na ma uah apai, kin un, tuni in khua ah ana hoh hi. Tuni in mun sang ah mite akithoih uh.
09009013	Khua a na luttouhtak un mun sang a an ne dia ahoh ma in na va mu ngal ding uh. Kithoihna vualzawlpa ding ahih ziak in atun mateng mipi'n an ane kei ding uh. Huai khit chiang in amisapte un an ane zel uhi. Huaiziak in hohtou meng unla, na va mu pah ding uh,” achi uhi.
09009014	Huchi in khua ah ahohtou ua, khua alut uleh, ngai in, Samuel mun sang a hoh ding in amau akituahpih hi.
09009015	Saul hong ma ni khat in Samuel kiang ah Toupa akilak a:
09009016	“Zingchiang in hichi hun in Benjamin gam a pan na kiang ah mi khat ka hon hohsak dia, ka mi Israelte tung a heutu ding in thau na nilh ding ahi. Ama'n Philistia mite khut a pan ka mite ahondam ding. Akikou husa uh ka kiang ahong tun tak ziak in ka mite zaw ka limsak ahi,” achi hi.
09009017	Samuel in Saul amuh in Toupa'n akiang ah, “En dih, na kiang a ka mi gen; amah mah in ka mite tung ah vai ahawm ding,” achi hi.
09009018	Huchi in kulh kongpi ah Saul in Samuel ava naih a, “Mutheipa inn koi lai a om ahia, hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi.
09009019	Samuel in Saul adawng a, “Kei huai mutheipa ka hi. Ka ma ah mun sang lam zuan in pai inla, tuni in ka kiang ah an na ne ding hi. Zingchiang zingsang in ka hon paisak ding. Na lungtang a om tengteng leng ka hon hilh ding.
09009020	Ni thum paita a mang na sabiltung thu lunghimoh ke'n. Muh ahita uh. Israelte lunggulh kua tung ah ahia a-om? Nang leh na pa inn a mi tengteng tung ah ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
09009021	Saul in adawng a, “Israel nam lak a neupen, Benjamin nam ka hi kei maw? Ka inkuan leng Benjamin inkuan tengteng lak a neupen ahi kei maw? Bangchidan a hichidan ka kiang a gen na hia?” achi hi.
09009022	Samuel in Saul leh asikha api a, mikhual indan ah apilut a, achialte uh, mi sawmthum lak ah mun zahtakhuai ah atusak hi.
09009023	Samuel in anhuanmi kiang ah, “Na kiang a koihtuam ding ka chih, tantuan ka hon piak pen hon la dih,” achi hi.
09009024	Huchi in anhuanmi in aphei leh atung a om ahon tawi a, Saul ma ah alui hi. Samuel in, “En dih, ka na koihtuam, um inla ne in. Ahun sehsa a dia hiai mite ka chialkhawm lai a ka hon sehsak him ahi, ka na chita ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in huai ni in Saul in Samuel toh ankuang a-umkhawm uhi.
09009025	Mun sang a pan khua ahong paisuk un intung ah Saul in Samuel ahoupih hi.
09009026	Zingkhangpi in athou a; nisuah kuan in Samuel in intung a om Saul asam hi. “Thou in, ka hon paisakta ding,” achi hi. Huchi in anih un apaikhia ua, Saul leh Samuel apawtta uh.
09009027	Khonawl atunsuk un Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Sikhapa i malam ah paisak inla, ama'n hon paipel zoh chiang in, nang bel khawl tadih in, Pathian thu ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.
09010001	Huai khit in Samuel in sathau bawm lakhia in alu ah asung a, atawp a, “ Toupa'n agoutante tung a heutu ding a sathau hon nilh ahi kei maw?
09010002	Tuni a na hon nutsiat chiang in Zelzah ah Benjamin gamgi a Rakil han kiang ah mi nih na mu dia; amau na kiang ah, ‘Na sabiltung zonte amuta uh. Ngai in, na pa'n sabiltungte lungkhampih nawn lou in, nang hon lungkhampihta hi. Ka tapa a ding in bang ka hih dia, chichi ahi, achi ding uh’.
09010003	Huai a pan pai zel inla, Tabor tosaw na va tung ding a, huai ah mi thum Bethel a Pathian kiang a hohtou dingte'n hon na kituahpih ding uh. Khat in kelnou apom dia, khat in tanghou pek khal thum atawi dia, khat in uain thawl atawi ding hi.
09010004	“Chibai ahon buk ding ua, tanghou pek khal nih ahon pe ding ua; huai na la ding ahi.
09010005	Huai khit in Philistia sepaihte omna Pathian mual na va tung ding ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, huai khua na va tun chiang in zawlnei pawl khat ama ua pekgingte, khuangtate, tamngaite leh kaihgingte tawimi pawl toh mun sang a pan hong paikhesuk na tuak dia, amaute'n thu agen ding uhi.
09010006	Na tung ah Toupa Kha nakpitak in ahong tung ding a, nang leng amau toh thu na gen dia, huchi in mituam na suak ding hi.
09010007	“ ‘Hiai chiamtehnate na tung a ahong tun chiang in, thil hong om in azil dungzui in na hih ding ahi. Pathian lah na kiang ah a-om ngal a.
09010008	Kei ma in Gilgal ah hohsuk in. Ngai in, kei leng halmang thillatte leh lemna kithoihnate lan ding in na kiang ah ka hong suk ding.’ Na kiang a ka hong a, na hih ding ka hon hilh ma ni sagih na taam ding,” achi hi.
09010009	Huchibang ahong hi ngei a, Samuel paisan dia anungngattak in Pathian in lungtang dang apeta hi. Huai chiamtehna tengteng huai ni in ahong tung vek hi.
09010010	Huchi in mual ahong tun uleh, ngai in, zawlneite'n ana kituahpih uhi. Atung ah Toupa Kha nakpitak in ahong tung a, athugenna uah amah leng atel samta hi.
09010011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, tuma lam a amah ana theisate'n zawlneite thugenna ah atel sam chih atheih un, akihou ua, “Kish tapa tung a thil hong om bangchidan ahita a? Saul leng zawlneite lak a tel samta ahi maw?” akichi uhi.
09010012	A-omna khua ua mi khat in adawng a, “Apa uh kua ahi tuan a ahia?” achi hi. Huchi in Saul leng zawlnei ahi samta maw? chih paunak ahong hita hi.
09010013	Athugen khit in mun sang atungta hi.
09010014	Saul paneu in akiang ah leh asikha kiang ah, “Koi a hoh na hi ua?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sabiltung zong ka hi uh. Ka muh zoh louh ziak un Samuel kiang ah ka va hoh uhi,” achi hi.
09010015	Saul paneu in, “Samuel in na kiang ua bang ahia agen hon hilh dih,” achi hi.
09010016	Saul in apaneu kiang ah, “Sabengtungte amuta uh chih ahon hilh hi,” achi hi. Himahleh lalgam thu Samuel in agen pen ahilh kei hi.
09010017	Huchi in Samuel in mipite Mizpah ah Toupa mai ah asamkhawm hi.
09010018	Huai ah Israel suante kiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte Aigupta a pan ka pikhia a, Aigupta mite khut a pan leh nou hon nuaisiah gam tengteng a pan ka hon hunkhia hi.
09010019	Himahleh tuni in na mangbatna tengteng uleh na gimthuakna tengteng ua kipan nou hon humbitpa na Pathian uh na deih kei uh. Akiang ah, ‘Ahi kei, kumpipa hon bawlsak in,’ na chi uh. Huaiziak in tu in anam a nam leh achi a chi in Toupa ma ah hong kilang un,” achi hi.
09010020	Huchi a Samuel in Israel chi tengteng ahong kilat naisaktak in Benjamin chitel ahong hita.
09010021	Benjamin chite bel a-inkuankuan in ahong kilak ua, Matri mite inkuan tel ahong hi a, Kish tapa Saul tel ahong hita hi. Amah azon uleh amuzou kei uh.
09010022	Huaiziak in Toupa adong tuan nawn ua, “Hiai mi hong pai nai lou hiam,” achi uh. Toupa'n adawng a, “Ngai un, van lak ah akibu hi,” achi hi.
09010023	Huchi in atai ua, ava pikhia ua, mipi lak a adinleh mi lak ah asangpen a, kuamah aliangzang khengzou a-om kei uhi.
09010024	Samuel in mi tengteng kiang ah, “ Toupa miseh na mu uhia? Mi tengteng lak ah amah bang mahmah a-om kei,” achi hi. Mite akikou ua, “Pathian in kumpipa hondam hen,” achi uhi.
09010025	Huchi in Samuel in mipite lalgam omdan ding ahilh hi. Laibu ah agelh a, Toupa ma ah akoih hi. Samuel in mite amau inn chiat ah apaisakta hi.
09010026	Saul leng Gibeah a a-inn ah apai sam hi. Pathian in alungtang uh akhoih mihangsante leng amah toh apaikhawm uhi.
09010027	Himahleh Belial tapate'n, “Hiai mi'n bangchi in ahon hondam thei mahmah dia?” chi in amah angaineu ua, thilpiak ahong pe kei uh. Himahleh amah bel adai dide hi.
09011001	Huchi in Ammon mi Nahash ahong kisa a, Jabesh-gilead sual tum in ava giahkhum hi. Jabesh mi tengteng in Nahash kiang ah, “Kou toh thukhun bawl in, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh,” achi uh.
09011002	Ammon mi Nahash in akiang uah, “Hichibang in ahi nou toh thu ka khun ding. Na mit taklam tengteng uh khelkhiak vek ahi dia; huai Israel mi tengteng minsiatna dia koih ahi ding,” achi hi.
09011003	Jabesh khua upate'n akiang ah, “Israel gam tengteng a thupo mite ka sawltheihna ding un ni sagih sung hon hungaih in. Hon hondam ding kuamah a-om keileh na kiang ah ka hong paikhe ding uh,” achi uhi.
09011004	Huchi in huai thupo mite Saul omna khua Gibeah ahong tung uhi. Mite bil azak in huai thute agen ua; mite aw suah in akap uhi.
09011005	Ngai in, lou a pan bawng hawl in Saul ahong pai hi. Saul in, “Bang achi ua ahia mite akah uh?” achi hi. Jabesh a mite thugen ahilh uhi.
09011006	Huai thu azaktak in Saul tung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung a nakpitak in ahehta hi.
09011007	Huchi in bawngtal nih ala a, asemnen vek hi. Israel gam tengteng ah thupo mite ahawmsak a, “Kuapeuh Saul leh Samuel zui nuam lou peuhmah hiai bawngtal bang a hih ahi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in mipite'n Toupa alau ua, thukhat sat in ahong kuankheta uh.
09011008	Bezek ah amaute asim a, Israel mite nuaithum ahi uh. Judah mite singthum ahi uh.
09011009	Ahong pai thupo mite kiang ah, “Jabesh-gilead mite kiang ah, zingchiang in nisat san laitak mah in hotkhiak na hi ding uh va chi un,” achi hi. Thupo mite ava hoh ua, Jabesh mite ahilh ua, huchi in akipak mahmah uhi.
09011010	Huchi in Jabesh mite'n, “Zingchiang in na kiang uah ka hong pawtkhe ding ua, ka tung uah na ut-ut un hih mai un,” achi uhi.
09011011	Hichi ahong hi a, azing in Saul in mipite pawl thum in akoih a, zing ven hun laitak in agiahmun uah alut uhi. Ammon mite sun nisat san lai tan in athat uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, athahvalte adalhzak vek ua, nih a omkhawm himhim leng a-om kei uhi.
09011012	Mipite'n Samuel kiang ah, “Kuate ahia, Saul in i tung uah vai ahawm tel ding maw chi? Huai mite hon pi in ka that ding uh,” achi uhi.
09011013	Saul in, “Tuni chitchiat in zaw kuamah that kei un. Tuni in Toupa'n Israelte lak ah hotdamna abawlta ngal a,” achi hi.
09011014	Huchi in Samuel in mipite kiang ah, “Kisa dih uh, Gilgal ah i hoh ding ua, huai ah lalgam i thaksak nawn ding uh,” achi hi.
09011015	Huchi in mite tengteng Gilgal ah ahohta uhi. Saul Gilgal ah Toupa ma ah kumpipa in abawlta uhi. Huai ah Toupa ma ah lemna kithoihnate alan uhi. Huchi in huai ah Saul leh Israel mi tengteng akipak mahmah uhi.
09012001	Huan Samuel in Israel mi tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai dih ua, ka kiang a na thugen tengteng uh ngaikhia in, na tung uah kumpipa ka bawlta hi.
09012002	Tu in, ngai dih ua, kumpipa in na ma uh akai hi. Kei zaw tek in ka sam leng akangta hi. Ngai dih ua, na kiang uah ka tapate a-om uh. Ka naupan a pan tutan na ma uh ka hon pi hi.
09012003	Hiai ah ka om hi. Toupa ma leh asathau nilhpa ma ah hon sel un. Kua bawngtal ka suh ngei a? Kua sabiltung ahia ka suh ngei? Kua ka khem ngei a? Kua ka hihgenthei ngei a? Ka mit tawsak ding in kua a pan in golhna ka la ngei a? K'on din nawn vek ding,” achi hi.
09012004	Amau, “Na hon khem ngei kei a, n'on hihgenthei ngei sam kei. Kuamah khut a pan lak tuak louh leng na la ngei kei,” achi uhi.
09012005	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka khut ah bangmah kilawm lou na mu kei uh, chih tuni in Toupa na lak uah theihpihpa ahi a; asathau nilhpa atheipihpa ahi,” achi hi. Amau, “Amah hon theipihpa ahi,” achi uhi.
09012006	Samuel in mite kiang ah, “Mosi leh Aaron seppa leh Aigupta a pan na pipute uh pikhepa Toupa ahi.
09012007	Huchi in dingh kinken unla, Toupa ma ah Toupa'n na tung uh leh na pipute uh tung a thil dik ana hihte ka hon sutpih ding.
09012008	Aigupta gam a Jakob alut nung in, na pipute un Toupa asam ua, huchi in Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron asawl hi. Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a pan apikhia a, hiai mun ah atengsak hi.
09012009	Himahleh, Toupa a Pathian uh amangngilh uh. Ama'n Hazor sepaih heutu Sisera khut, Philistia mite khut leh Moab kumpipa khut ah akhawng a, amaute'n adou uhi.
09012010	“ Toupa asam ua, ‘ Toupa i lehngatsan ua, Baal leh Ashtaroth nna i sep ziak un i na khialta uh. Himahleh tu in ka melmate khut a pan hon hunkhia inla, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh,’ achi uh.
09012011	Toupa'n Jerubbaal, Bendan, Jephthah leh Samuel asawl a, khat lam khat lam a na melmate uh khut a pan ahon hunkhia hi. Huchi in bittak in na tengta uhi.
09012012	Ammon suante kumpipa Nahash nou dou ding in ahong kuan chih na theihtak un, ka kiang ah, ‘Ahi kei, kumpi in ka tung uah vaihawm hen’ na chi uh; Toupa Pathian lah na kumpipa uh ahi gige ngal a.
09012013	“Huchi in na kumpipa tel uleh nget uh en dih uh, Toupa'n kumpipa ahon bawlsakta hi.
09012014	Toupa laudan na siam ua, a-nna na sep ua, a-aw na zuih ua, Toupa thupiak na helsan louh ua, nou leh na tung ua vaihawm kumpipa toh Toupa na Pathian uh zuite na hih uleh ahoih ding hi.
09012015	Himahleh, Toupa aw zui lou a, Toupa thupiak na helsan uleh na pipute un Toupa khut athuak mah bang un nou leng na thuak ding uhi.
09012016	Huchi in ding kinken unla, Toupa'n na mitmuh ua thil thupitak ahih ding en un.
09012017	Tuni in huit buh ala uh ahi kei maw? Van gingsak ding leh vuah zusak ding in Toupa ka sam ding. Huchi in kumpipa na nget thu uah Toupa mitmuh a thil na hihkhelh uh athupidan thei in na mu ding uh,” achi hi.
09012018	Huchi in Samuel in Toupa asam a, Toupa'n huai ni in van agingsak a, vuah azusak hi. Huchi in mite'n Toupa leh Samuel alau mahmah uhi.
09012019	Mi tengteng in Samuel kiang ah, “Ka sihlouhna ding un, Toupa na Pathian kiang ah na sikhate hon thumsak in. Hiai thil hoih loutak, kumpipa ka na nget uh, ka gitlouhna tengteng uh behlap ka na hita uh,” achi uhi.
09012020	Samuel in mite kiang ah, “Lau kei un, hiai thil giloutak na hihta uhi. Himahleh Toupa na zuih uh pialsan kei unla, na lungtang tengteng un Toupa nna sem zaw un.
09012021	“Lampial kei un. Manna bei thilte leh nou hon hunkhe theiloute zui kei un; amaute bangmah lou ahi ngal ua.
09012022	Amin thupitak ziak in Toupa'n amite alehngatsan kei dia; amah mite hi ding a noute hon bawl Toupa kipah lam ahi.
09012023	Huai phet leng ahi kei a, nou a dia thum tawp in Toupa tung ah thil ka hihkhial het kei ding. Himahleh lampi hoih leh dik ka hon kawkmuh zaw ding ahi.
09012024	Toupa laudan siam photphot un. Na lungtang tengteng un chihtaktak in amah nna sem unla; nou a dia athilhih thupitakte ngaihtuah un.
09012025	Himahleh giloutak a thil na hih lailai uleh nou leh na kumpipa uh na mangthang ding uh,” achi hi.
09013001	Saul kum sawmthum ahih in vaihawm apan a; Israelte tung ah kum nih vai ahawm in,
09013002	Saul in Israelte lak ah mi sangthum atel hi. Huai teng lak a sangnih Mikmash ah leh Bethel tang ah Saul kiang ah a-om uh. Sangkhat Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah Jonathan kiang ah a-om uh. Adang teng apuanin uah apaisak vek hi.
09013003	Jonathan in Gibeah a om Philistia galvil sepaihte ava sual hi. Huai Philistia mite'n ana za uhi. Huchi in Saul in, “Hebru mite'n na za uhen,” chi in agam tengteng ah pengkul amutsak hi.
09013004	Israel tengteng in, Saul in Philistia galvil sepaihte asual chih leh Israelte'n leng Philistia mite huat in a-om uh chih thute ana zata uh. Huchi in mite Saul kiang ah Gilgal ah akikaikhawm uhi.
09013005	Philistia mite Israelte sual ding in akikaikhawm uhi. Kangtalai singthum, sakol tungtuangmi sangguk, mihing tuipi piau a piaunel zah mahmah a tam ahi uh. Huchi in akuantou ua, Beth-aven suahlam pang ah Mikmash ah panmun akhoh uhi.
09013006	Israel mite'n umbit in a-om uh chih akitheih un, mite lah alunghimoh mahmahta ua, mite kokhuk ah, lounok ah, suangpi pang ah, kulh ah leikohawm ah akibu uhi.
09013007	Hebru mi khenkhatte Jordan gal ah Gad leh Gilead gam ah atai uhi. Saul bel Gilgal ah a-om lailai a, mite'n ling kawmkawm in amah azui uhi.
09013008	Samuel hun seh bang in ni sagih ataam hi. Himahleh Samuel lah Gilgal ah ahong pai kei hi. Huchi in mite'n ataizaksanta uh.
09013009	Saul in, “Haltum thillat ding leh lemna thillat dingte hiai ah ka kiang ah hon la un,” achi hi. Huchi in halmang thillat alan hi.
09013010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, halmang thillat alan khin lel a, ngai in, Samuel ahong tung hi. Amah mu ding in Saul akuan hi. Samuel in, “Bang na hih na hia?” achi hi.
09013011	Saul in, “Mite'n ahon paimangsan khin ua, nang lah niseh ni in na hong tungta kei hi. Philistia mite lah Mikmash ah akikaikhawm uh chih ka thei hi.
09013012	Huaiziak in ‘Philistia mite'n Gilgal ah hon sual dekdek uhi. Toupa hehpihna lah ka ngen nai kei a,’ ka chi hi. Huaiziak in halmang thillat lan lou thei ka hi kei,” achi hi.
09013013	Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Na thilhih ahaihuai mahmah hi. Toupa na Pathian thupiak, nang thu ahon piak na zui kei hi. Toupa'n Israelte tung ah na lalna tangtawn a hihkip tum zaw hiven maw,
09013014	Himahleh na lalna amongta ding; Toupa'n thu ahon piak na zuih louh ziak in Toupa'n ama lungtang bang pumi azong a, mite tung a heutu ding in Toupa'n amah asepta hi,” achi hi.
09013015	Samuel athou a, Gilgal a pan Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah ahohtou hi. Saul in akiang a mi omte asim a, zaguk tak ahi uh.
09013016	Saul leh atapa Jonathan leh akiang ua mi omte Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah a-om uh. Himahleh Philistia mite'n Mikmash ah panmun akhoh uhi.
09013017	Lok mite Philistia mite panmun a pan pawl thum ahong kuan ua, pawl khat in Shual gam a Ophrah lam zuan lampi azui uhi.
09013018	Pawl khat in Beth-horon lam zuan lampi azui ua, pawl dang in gamdai zul Zeboim Phaizang lam zuan gamgi lampi azui uhi.
09013019	Philistia mite'n, “Hebru mite'n namsau hiam, tei hiam abawl kha zenzen ding uh,” achih ziak un Israel gam pumpi ah siksekmi akimu kei hi.
09013020	Himahleh Israel mi tengteng, michih aleilehna, asuanggal, aheipi, atupi tat-hiam ding in, Philistiate kiang ah ahohsuk zel uhi.
09013021	Himahleh tupite, suanggalte, sikkhutte leh heipite tat-hiamna ding sik-hat leh chiang mukzumte bawlna ding anei uhi.
09013022	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, akidou ni un Saul leh Jonathan kiang a om mite'n namsau hiam, tei hiam anei kei uh. Saul leh atapa Jonathan in bel anei uhi.
09013023	Philistia galvil sepaihte Mikmash kuam ah apaikheta uhi.
09014001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni khat Saul tapa Jonathan in agalvan tawipa tangval kiang ah, “Kisa dih, gal langkhat a Philistia mi galvil sepaihte omna ah i va hoh ding,” achi hi. Himahleh apa ahilh kei hi.
09014002	Saul bel Gibeah gam tawp lam pek a Migron a theibuhfai kung nuai ah a-om hi. Akiang a om mite zaguk ahi uh.
09014003	Shiloh a Toupa siampu Eli tapa Phinehas tapa Ikabod unaupa Ahitub tapa Ahijah siampu puanak silh a-om hi. Jonathan ahoh chih mipite'n athei kei uhi.
09014004	Jonathan in Philistia mi galvil sepaihte omna a hoh atupna phaizang leh phaizang kikal ah alang tuaktuak ah suangpi sangtak a-om hi. Akhat min Bozez ahi a, akhat min Seneh ahi.
09014005	Suangpi sang khat pen Mikmash zawn mallam a om ahi a, adang khat pen Gebeah zawn simlam a om ahi.
09014006	Jonathan in agalvan tawipa tangval kiang ah, “Kisa dih, zeksum louh sepaihte omna ah i va hoh ding. Toupa'n thil ahon hihsak kha mai hiam. Toupa a ding in atam hiam, atawm hiam ahotdamna ding bangmah dalna a-om tuan ngal kei a,” achi hi.
09014007	Agalvan tawipa'n akiang ah, “Na lungsim a om bangtak in hih in. Ngai in, na lungsim bang geih ka lungsim ahi,” achi hi.
09014008	Huchi in Jonathan in, “Kisa in, akiang uah i va hoh galkah dia, i va kimusak ding.
09014009	I kiang a, ‘Na kiang ua ka hong matan uh na om un, ahon chih uleh i mun ah i dingh kinken dia, akiang uah i hohtou kei ding.’
09014010	“Ka kiang lam uah hong tou un, achih uleh bel i hohtou dia, Toupa'n i khut ah amaute ahon pia chih ei a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding,” achi hi.
09014011	Anih un Philistia mi galvil sepaihte ava kimusak uhi. Philistiate'n, “En dih uh, Hebru mite abukna leihawm a pan ahong paikhia uh,” achi uhi.
09014012	Galvil sepaihte omna a mite'n Jonathan leh agalvan tawipa, “Hong paitou unla, thil banghiam ka hon ensak ding uh,” chi in ana sam uhi. Jonathan in agalvan tawipa kiang ah, “Hon zuitou dih. Toupa'n amaute Israelte khut ah apeta hi,” achi hi.
09014013	Jonathan akhut leh khe toh pang in akaltou a, agalvan tawipa'n azui hi. Amau bel Jonathan ma ah apuk ua, ama nung in agalvan tawipa'n amaute athat hi.
09014014	Jonathan leh agalvan tawipa'n athah masakpen uh mi sawmnih vel, lou chiing khat, bawngtal nih leilehna chia sung ahi.
09014015	Giahmun leh gamlak a mipi tengteng aling ua; galvil sepaihte leh lok mite leng aling sam uh. Huan ziin ahong ling a; huchi in nakpitak a linna a-om hi.
09014016	Benjamin gam Gibeah ah Saul galvil mite'n a-en vialvial uhi. Ngai in, mipite zul in azulkhe zungzung ua, khat lam khat lam ah akiphutuah muimui uhi.
09014017	Huchi in Saul in akiang a mipi omte kiang ah, “Tu in kisim unla, kuate ahia kim lou hong ki-en dih ua,” achi hi. Ahong kisim uleh ngai in, Jonathan leh agalvan tawipa ana om kei uhi.
09014018	Saul in Ahijah kiang ah, “Pathian bawm va la dih,” achi hi. Huai lai in Pathian bawm Israel suante kiang a om ahi.
09014019	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul in siampu ahoupih laitak in Philistia mite giahmun lam a thawmging angaih semsem hi. Saul in siampu kiang ah, “Na khut kaikik in,” achi hi.
09014020	Huchi in Saul leh akiang a mipi om tengteng apaikhawm ua, kidouna ah ahohta uh. Ngai in, amau leh amau namsau in ana kisattuah ua, huchi in apumbuai uhi.
09014021	Hiai ban ah tuma lam a Hebru mite huai gam kim a pan Philistiate giahmun a amau toh va paitoute leng Saul leh Jonathan kiang a om in Israel mite lam ah ahong pang nawnta uhi.
09014022	Huchi mah bang in Ephraim tanggam a Israel mi kibu tengteng in Philistia mite ataimang uh chih ana za ua, amau leng kidouna a pang sam in adelhzui uhi.
09014023	Huchi in huai ni in Toupa'n Israelte ahumbitta hi. Beth-aven pha in asual uhi.
09014024	Huai ni in Israel mite alungkia ua, Saul in, “Ka melmate tung a phu ka lakna dia nitaklam ahih masiah kuapeuh in an anekleh hamsia thuak hen,” achih ziak in. Huchi in kuamah in an himhim achiam kei uhi.
09014025	Mipi tengteng gamnuai ava tung ua, lei ah khuaizu ana om hi.
09014026	Mipite gamnuai ava tun un, ngai in, khuaizu ana takkhia hi. Himahleh mipite'n hamsia alauh ziak un kuama'n khut a sawk in achiam ngam kei uhi.
09014027	Himahleh apa'n mipite kichiam a, vau ahih lam Jonathan in thei lou in akhut a chiangmong in khuaikhak adawt a, akam a guang in aneta a, huchi in amit hah ahong chiangta hi.
09014028	Mipi lak a mi khat in ahoupih a, “Na pa'n zaw mipite tuni a an ne peuhmah hamsethuak in om hen, chi a vau bikbek hiven. Huchi in mipite abah uhi,” achi hi.
09014029	Jonathan in, “Ka pa'n mite buaisak lel ahi ve. Enta unla, khuaizu tawmchik ka chep ziak lel a ka mit ahong vak takdan.
09014030	Mipite'n gallak thil amuh peuhpeuh uh tuni in a-utut uh ne thei le uh vakzaw na tel in chia! Huaiziak in Philistiate tamsem thah louh loh i hi ve ua,” achi hi.
09014031	Huai ni in Mikmash a pan Aijalon tan in Philistia mite adou uh. Huchi in mipite abah mahmah uhi.
09014032	Mipite'n agallak thil uh aboh in aboh uhi. Belamte, bawngtalte leh bawngnoute aman ua, leitual ah athat ua, mipite'n asisan toh ane uhi.
09014033	“Ngai in, mipite'n sisan toh ne in Toupa tung ah akhialta uh,” chi in Saul ahilh uhi. Ama'n, “Na talekta uhi; ka ma ah suang lianpi khuk un,” achi hi.
09014034	Saul in, “Mipi lak ah vakzak vek unla, akiang uah, michih in abawng hon kai hen. Michih in abelam hon kai hen. Hiai ah hong gou in ne hen. Asisan toh ne a Toupa tung a thil hihkhial lou in, va chi un,” achi hi. Huai zan in mi tengteng in amau bawngtal chiat uh ahon kai ua, huai ah agou uhi.
09014035	Saul in Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a; huai pen Toupa a dia maitam abawl masakpen ahi.
09014036	Saul in, “Zan chiang in Philistia mite va dou unla, zing khovak tan in i sual ding uh. Kuamah i hawi kei ding uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Hoih na sak peuhmah hih in,” achi uh. Siampu in ahihleh, “Pathian naih ni,” achi hi.
09014037	Saul in Pathian adong a, “Philistia mite ka va sual diam? Israelte khut ah amaute na pe diam?” achi hi. Himahleh huai ni'n adawng kei.
09014038	Saul in, “Nou mipi heutu tengteng hong nai dih ua. Tuni in akoi pen ah ahia i khelh uh theihkhiak tum dih uh.
09014039	Israelte hondam zelpa Toupa ahin lai teng ka tapa Jonathan hilhial in ana hihkhelhleh amah asih ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh mipi lak a mi kuamah adawng himhim a-om kei uh.
09014040	Israel tengteng kiang ah, “Noute atuam in omkhawm unla, kei leh ka tapa Jonathan atuam in ka omkhawm ding uh,” achi hi. Mipite'n Saul kiang ah, “Hoih na sak bang in hih in,” achi uhi.
09014041	Saul in Toupa Israelte' Pathian kiang ah, “Adiktak hon hihlang in,” achi a, aisan pen Jonathan leh Saul tung ah apuk a; mipite bel ahul uhi.
09014042	Saul in, “Kei leh ka tapa kikal ah aisan un,” achi hi. Huchi in Jonathan tung ah apuk hi.
09014043	Saul in Jonathan kiang ah, “Bang ahia na hih hon hilh in,” achi hi. Jonathan in ahilh a, “Ka chiang tawi mong in khuaizu neuchik ka na chiam hi. Ngai in, ka sih ding mah ahi,” achi hi.
09014044	Saul in, “Pathian in ahihhih in hih mai hen. Huai sang a thupizaw in leng. Jonathan, na si ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi.
09014045	Mipite'n Saul kiang ah, “Israelte lak a hiai hotdamna thupi mahmah hihpa Jonathan asi dia hia? Si lou hial ding. Toupa ahin lai teng asamzang khat leng lei ah ake het kei ding. Tuni in Pathian toh asemkhawm uhi,” achi uh. Mipite'n Jonathan ahondam ua, asi kei hi.
09014046	Saul in Philistia mite adelh lai akiksanta a, Philistia mite amau om mun ah apaita uhi.
09014047	Saul in Israelte tung ah vaihawmna ala a, aning teng ah amelmate, Moab, Ammon suante, Edom, Zobah kumpipate leh Philistia mite adou a; akiheina peuh ah avualzou zel hi.
09014048	Hangsantak in gal adou a, Amalekte azou a, alok mite khut a pan Israelte ahonkhia hi.
09014049	Saul tapate bel Jonathan, Ishvi leh Malki-shua ahi ua, atanu nihte min hiaite ahi; a-upazaw min Merab ahi a, anaupangzaw min Mikal ahi.
09014050	Saul zi min Ahinoam ahi a, amah Ahimaaz tanu ahi. Asepaih heutu min Abner ahi a, amah Saul paneu Ner tapa ahi.
09014051	Saul pa Kish ahi a, Abner pa Ner bel Abiel tapa ahi.
09014052	Saul damsung teng in Philistia mite toh nakpitak in akidou uhi. Saul in mihat leh hangsan amuh peuhmah anuai a sem ding in ala zel hi.
09015001	Huan Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “ Toupa'n amite tung ah, Israelte tung ah kumpipa dia nang sathau hon nilh dia ahon sawl ka hi. Huaiziak in tu in Toupa thugen ngaikhia in.
09015002	Sepaihte' Toupa'n , Amalek mite'n Israelte tung a athilhih uh, Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawtkhiak lai ua lampi a ana daldan ka theigige hi.
09015003	Amalekte dou ding in kuan inla, athil neih tengteng uh hawi himhim nei lou in hihmang vek in. Numei leh pasal, naungek leh nawi ne lai, bawngtal leh belam, sangawngsau leh sabiltung tan in that vek in, achi,” achi hi.
09015004	Huchi in Saul in mipite asamkhawm a, Telaim ah amaute asim a, sepaih nuainih leh Judah mi singkhat ahi uh.
09015005	Saul Amalekte khua atungsuk a, phaizang ah ana buk hi.
09015006	Saul in Kente kiang ah, “Hong pawt unla, Amalekte a pan kihuikhia un. Huchi lou in zaw, ka hon that tel kha ding. Nou zaw Israel suan tengteng Aigupta a pan ahong pawtkhiak lai un na na hehpih ua,” achi hi. Huchi in Kente Amalek mite lak a pan apawtkhia uhi.
09015007	Saul in Amalek mite Havilah a pan Aigupta gam gei a Shur tan in adou hi.
09015008	Amalek mite kumpipa Agag ahingmat a, mipi tengteng namsau in asatlum vek hi.
09015009	Himahleh Saul leh mipite'n Agag ahawi ua, belam leh bawngtal hoihhoih, athauthau, belamnoute, ahoih tengteng athat nuam kei uh. Ahoih lou leh adeih louh peuhmah uh bel athat vek uhi.
09015010	Toupa thu Samuel kiang ah ahong tung hi.
09015011	“Saul kumpipa dia ka seh ka kisik hi. Hon zui lai hon kinungngatsan in ka thupiak bang in ahih ngal kei a,” achi hi. Hiai in Samuel ahehsak a, zankhua in Toupa asam hi.
09015012	Saul mu ding in Samuel zingkhangpi in athou a, Karmel ah Saul ahoh hi. Ngai in, huai ah amah theihgigena suang aphut a, akik nawn a, apai zel a, Gilgal ah apaisukta, chih Samuel hilh in a-om hi.
09015013	Saul kiang Samuel ahong tung a, akiang ah, “ Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen. Toupa thupiak bang in ka hihta,” achi hi.
09015014	Samuel in, “Tua belam ham ka bil a hong lut leh bawng ham ka zakte bangchidan ahi dia le?” achi hi.
09015015	Saul in, “Amalek mite ahon laksak uh ahi. Toupa na Pathian kiang a kithoihna ding in mipite'n belam leh bawngtal hoihhoih ahawi uhi. Adang tengteng ahihleh ka that vek uhi,” achi hi.
09015016	Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Dai in, Toupa'n tuzan a ka kiang a athugen ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Gen dih ve,” achi hi.
09015017	Samuel in, “Nang ngaih in mi neuchik himah lechin leng, Israel nam heutu dia bawl na hi kei maw? Toupa'n Israelte kumpipa ding in sathau ahon nilh hi.
09015018	Toupa'n nang ahon sawlkhia a, kuan inla, mikhialte, Amalek mite that vek inla, amanthat sipsip masiah uh dou zel in, ahon chi hi.
09015019	Bang ding a Toupa thu zui lou a, gallak thilte aboh a na boh a, Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih mawk?” achi hi.
09015020	Saul in Samuel kiang ah, “E, Toupa thu ka zui vo oi, Toupa'n hon sawlna ah ka hoh a, Amalek kumpipa Agag ka hon man a, Amalek mite ka that vek vo oi.
09015021	Himahleh mipite'n gallak thil belam leh bawngtal hihman ding lak ah ahoihhoih Gilgal a Toupa na Pathian kiang a kithoihna ding in ahon tawi uh,” achi hi.
09015022	Samuel in, “ Toupa'n Toupa thu zuih akipahpih bang in halmang thillatte leh kithoihnate akipahpih a hia? Ngai in, kithoihna sang in thuman ahoihzaw a, belamtal thau sang in athu man ahoihzaw hi.
09015023	Helna zaw aisan khelhna toh akibang a, engtatna zaw milim biakna toh akikim hi. Toupa thu na nial ziak in ama'n leng kumpipa ding in nang ahon nialta,” achi hi.
09015024	Saul in Samuel kiang ah, “Mipite lau a, athu uh ka manna lam in Toupa thupiak leh nang thu ka na bohse maizen a; ka na khialta hi.
09015025	Huaiziak in tu in ka khelhna ngaidam inla, Toupa ka biaktheihna ding in kei lam ah hong kihei nawn in,” achi hi.
09015026	Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “ Toupa thu na nialta a, nang lam ah ka hong kihei nawn kei ding. Toupa'n Israelte kumpipa ding in ahon deih kei,” achi hi.
09015027	Huchi in Samuel pai dia akiheileh apuan mong ah alen a, akekta hi.
09015028	Huchi in Samuel in akiang ah, “Tuni a pan Toupa'n Israel gam ahon sutta, nang sang a hoihzaw na inveng kiang ah apeta hi.
09015029	Israelte thagui azuau kei dia, akisik sam kei ding. Mihing bang a kisik nawn themthum mi ahi ngal kei hi,” achi hi.
09015030	Huchi in ama'n, “Ka na khialta hi. Himahleh ka mite upate leh Israelte ma a hon zahtak ding in ka hon ngen hi. Toupa na Pathian ka biaktheihna ding in kei lam ah hong kihei in aw,” achi hi.
09015031	Huchi in Samuel in Saul apaipih a, Saul in Toupa abia hi.
09015032	Samuel in, “Amalek mite kumpipa Agag ka kiang ah hon pi un,” achi hi. Samuel kiang ah ling kawm in Agag ava hoh hi. Agag in, “Sihna mulkimhuai in hon paikhengta ahi ve,” achi hi.
09015033	Samuel in, “Na namsau in numeite ta nei lou dia abawl bang in na nu leng numei lak a ta neiloumi ahi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in Gilgal ah Toupa ma ah Agag asatzanta hi.
09015034	Huchi in Ramah ah Samuel apai a; Saul bel a-inn ah Saul omna khua Gibeah ah apaitou hi.
09015035	Huchi in Samuel in asih ni pha in Saul amu nawnta kei hi. Samuel bel Saul ziak in alungkham hi. Israelte kumpipa dia Saul ana tel ziak in Toupa akisik hi.
09016001	Huan Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Israel mite kumpipa dia ka deih louhsa Saul ziak in bang tan ahia na lungkham ding? Na kii ah sathau thundim inla, kuan in. Bethlehem mi Jesse kiang ah ka hon sawl ding. Atapate lak a mi kumpipa ding in ka sep khinta hi,” achi hi.
09016002	Samuel in, “Bangchi in ka kuan thei dia? Saul in ana zaleh hon that ding,” achi hi. Toupa'n , “Bawngla hon pi inla, Toupa kiang a kithoih dia hong ka hi,” chi in.
09016003	“Kithoihna ah Jesse sam inla, na hih ding ka hon hilh ding. Amin ka hon hilh dingpa sathau hon nilhsak in,” achi hi.
09016004	Samuel in Toupa gen bang in ahih a, Bethlehem ah ahohta hi. Khua a upate'n ling kawm in amah ana dawn ua, “Hoih lam thu a hong na hi maw?” achi uh. Ama'n, “Hoih lam thu ah hi e,” achi hi.
09016005	“ Toupa kiang a kithoih dia hong ka hi. Kisiangsak unla kithoihna ah hong pai sam un,” achi hi. Jesse leh atapate asiangsak a, kithoihna ah asam hi.
09016006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ahong pai un Eliab ana en a, “ Toupa sathau nilhpa ama a ompa ahi mahmah ve,” achi hi.
09016007	Himahleh Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Amel in hiam, asandan hiam in en ke'n. Ke'n amah ka deih kei hi. Toupa'n mihing et bang in a-en kei. Mihing in polam a kilatdan a-en a, Toupa'n bel lungtang a-en zaw hi,” achi hi.
09016008	Jesse in Abinadab asam a, Samuel ma ah apaisak hi. Ama'n, “Hiai leng Toupa tel ahi nai kei,” achi hi.
09016009	Jesse in Shammah ava paisak nawn hi. Ama'n, “Hiai leng Toupa tel ahi nai kei lai,” achi hi.
09016010	Huchi in Jesse in atapa sagihte Samuel ma ah apaisak nawn hi. Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “ Toupa'n hiaite atel kei,” achi hi.
09016011	Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “Hiai ah na tapate a-om kim vek uhia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Anaupangpen a-om lai, ngai in, ama'n belam aching hi,” achi hi. Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “Va samsak dih ve; ahong tun masiah i tu kei ding uh,” achi hi.
09016012	Huchi in ava samsak a, amah ahon pi uhi. Amah bel san thiuhtheuh, mit hah kilawm leh melhoihtak ahi. “ Toupa'n , thou inla, sathau nilh in, hiai amah ahi,” achi hi.
09016013	Samuel in sathau bawm kii ala a, a-unaute lak ah amah sathau anilh hi. Toupa Kha huai ni a pan nakpitak in David tung ah ahong tungta. Samuel athou a, Ramah ah apaita hi.
09016014	Himahleh, Toupa Kha in Saul apawtsan a, Toupa sawl kha gilou in amah ahihbuai hi.
09016015	Saul sikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, Pathian sawl kha gilou in nang hon hihbuai hi.
09016016	Ka toupa un na ma a om na sikhate kaihging tumsiamtak mi zon thu hon pe dih ve. Pathian sawl kha gilou in ahon mat chiang in atum dia, na hoih mai ding,” achi uhi.
09016017	Saul in asikhate kiang ah, “Tumsiamtak mi hon zonsak unla, ka kiang ah hon pi un,” achi hi.
09016018	Asikhate lak a khat in adawng a, akiang ah, “Ngai dih, Bethlehem mi Jesse tapa khat ka muta a, huai mi tumsiamtak, mihangsantak, kidoumi, thugen siam, melhoihtak ahi a, akiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi.
09016019	Saul in Jesse kiang ah mi asawl a, “Na tapa David belamching a om ka kiang ah hon hohsak in,” achi hi.
09016020	Jesse in sabiltung, tanghou leh uain thawl khat leh kelnou ala a, Saul piak ding in atapa David aposak hi.
09016021	Saul kiang ah David ava tung a, ama ah ava dingh hi. Ama'n ana it mahmah a, agalvan tawipa in apangsak hi.
09016022	Saul in Jesse kiang ah, “David ka kiang ah om hen, ka mit atung mahmah hi,” chi a hilh ding in mi asawl hi.
09016023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul tung a Pathian sawl dawi ahong om chiang in David in kaihging ala a, atum zel hi. Huchi in Saul ahong halh a, ahoih a; dawi in apawtsan hi.
09017001	Huan Philistia mite'n kidou ding in asepaihte uh akaikhawm ua, Judah gamsung Sokoh ah akikhawm uhi. Ephes-dammim mun ah Sokoh khua leh Azekah kho kikal ah panmun akhoh uhi.
09017002	Saul leh Israel mite akikhawm ua, Elah Phaizang ah panmun akhoh uhi. Philistia mite na dal ding in akiphalh uhi.
09017003	Philistia mite tang pang ah a-om ua, Israel mite bel alangkhat tang pang ah a-om ua, akikal uah phaizang a-om hi.
09017004	Philistia mite panmun a pan amihat uh, amin Goliath, Gath khomi, tong guk leh khap khat a sang ahong pawtkhia hi.
09017005	Dal lukhu akhu a, awmphaw asilh a; a-awmphaw gikdan dal shekel sangnga ahi.
09017006	Angal ah dal ngalphaw abun a, anungzang ah dal teita akuah hi.
09017007	Atei peu siamkol bang ahi a; atei lu bel sik shekel zaguk a gik ahi. Aphaw popa ama ah apai hi.
09017008	Adingh a, Israel sepaihte asam a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a kidou dia hong kiphalh na hi ua? Kei Philistia mi, nou Saul sikha na hi kei uh maw? Mi kitel unla ka kiang ah hong paisuk hen.
09017009	Hon sual a ahon thahleh na sikha un ka om ding uh. Himahleh ke'n ka zoh a ka thahleh ka sikha un na om ding ua, ka nna uh na sem ding uh,” achi hi.
09017010	Philistia mi in, “Tuni in Israel sepaihte ka chou a, mi khat hon kuansak unla ka na kisual ding uh,” achi hi.
09017011	Saul leh Israel tengteng in huai Philistia mi thugente azak un, alunglel ua, lauh petmah in alau uhi.
09017012	Huchi in David tuh Judah gam a Bethlehem a Ephrath mi Jesse tapa ahi a, ama'n tapa giat anei hi. Saul hun lai in amah upa in tektak ahi khinta hi.
09017013	Jesse tapa upazaw thum in kidouna ah Saul azui uhi. Atapa thum kidouna a hohte min a-upapen Eliab, azom Abinadab, athumna Shammah ahi.
09017014	David anaupangpen ahi a, a-u thumte'n Saul azui uhi.
09017015	Bethlehem ah apa belam kem in Saul kiang a pan David ava hoh hi.
09017016	Philistia mi in zingsang leh nitak teng in ava naih zel a, ni sawmli sung ava kitaklang zel hi.
09017017	Jesse in atapa David kiang ah, “Vaimim kan ephah khat leh hiai tanghou beu sawm pua inla, na unaute kiang ah agiahmun uah va hohpih pah in.
09017018	Bawngnawi dat khal sawm apawl ua sangkhat heutupa a ding in puak inla; na unaute bangchi in a-om ua va en inla, atanchin uh theihna banghiam hon pua in,” achi hi.
09017019	Saul leh amau leh Israel mi tengteng Philistia mite dou ding in Elah Phaizang ah a-om uhi.
09017020	Zingkhang in David athou a, belamte chingmi khat akemsak hi. Jesse in thu apiak dungzui in apua a, akuanta hi. Kidouna mun a pawtkhe lel sepaihte kidou dia akikou zuazua laitak un amah kangtalai omna mun ava tung hi.
09017021	Israelte leh Philistia mite kidou ding in ana kikhung ua, sepaih leh sepaih ana kigalsai uhi.
09017022	David in akemmi khut ah avan akoih a, sepaihte kiang lam ah ava tai a, asanggamte chibai ava buk hi.
09017023	Amaute ahoupih laitak in ngai in, amihat uh Gath a Philistia mi amin Goliath, Philistia mite sepaih pawl lak a pan ahong paisuk a, athugen ngei mah hong gen nawn hi. Huai thu David in azata hi.
09017024	Israel mi tengteng in huai mi amuh un, ataikek ua, lauh petmah in alau uhi.
09017025	Israel mite'n, “Huai mihing hong kuankhia na mu hia? Israel mite chou dia hong kuankhia ahi. Kuapeuh amah that kumpipa'n nakpitak in sum lam in ahih hausa dia, atanu ape dia, apa inkuan Israelte lak ah azalensak ding,” achi uhi.
09017026	David in akiang a dinghte kiang ah, “Hiai Philistia mi that a, Israelte minsiatna lamangmi bangchi bawl ahi dia? Hiai zeksum louh Philistia mi kua ahia ahih, Pathian hing sepaihte achou vial mahmah,” achi hi.
09017027	Mipite'n huchi in adawng ua, “Amah that peuhmah ka gen bang ua bawl ahi ding,” achi uhi.
09017028	A-u upapen Eliab in mite kiang a, athugen lai ana za hi. David tung ah Eliab aheh guih a, “Bangziak a hong suk na hia? Gamdai a belam tam lou omte kua chingsak na hia? Na kisaktheihdan leh na lungsim hoihlouhdan ka thei. Kidou en ding bang in na hong mawkmawk a,” achi hi.
09017029	David in, “Bang ka hih a ahia? Aziak om hilou ahi maw?” achi hi.
09017030	Ama'n midang lam angatsan a, agen ngei mah agen hi. Mipite'n ama a mah bang in adawng nawn uhi.
09017031	David thugen azak un Saul kiang ah agensawn ua; ama'n asam hi.
09017032	David in Saul kiang ah, “Amah ziak in kuamah lungsim lunglel kei heh. Na sikha in huai Philistia mi ka va sual ding,” achi hi.
09017033	Saul in David kiang ah, “Nang zaw huai Philistia mi sual ding in na kuan thei kei ding, valnou phet na hi a, amah lah avalnou tung a pan galdou siammi ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
09017034	David in Saul kiang ah, “Na sikha in apa belamte achin lai in, humpinelkai hiam vompi hiam ahong kuan a, belamhon lak a pan belamnou aman hi.
09017035	Ka delhzui a, ka sual a, akam a pan ka hunkhe zel hi. Amah hong sual tum in ahong dingh a, ke'n abaksam ah ka man a, ka sual a, ka that zel hi.
09017036	Na sikha in humpinelkai leh vompi ka that tuaktuak hi. Huai zeksum louh Philistia mi amau bang in a-om sam ding hi. Pathian hing sepaihte achou vial a,” achi hi.
09017037	David in, “Humpinelkai khutbom a pan leh vompi khutbom a pan kei hon hunkhepa Toupa'n huai Philistia mi khut a pan hon hunkhe ding,” achi hi. Saul in David kiang ah, “Kuan in, na kiang ah Toupa om hen!” achi hi.
09017038	Saul in amah galthuam David asilhsak a, dal lukhu akhusak a, awmphaw asilhsak hi.
09017039	David in agalvan tung ah anamsau akuah a, pai ding in akisa hi. Huchibang achiamteh ngei nai kei hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Ka paipih thei kei. Hichibang ka chiamteh ngei kei,” achi hi. Huchi in David in agalthuam asuahta hi.
09017040	Achiangkhun atawi a, luita a suang mum mam pilhpelh nga atel hi. Abelam chinna kawlzal ah akuah hi. Akhut a avaisuanglot tawi in, Philistia mi ava zuan naita hi.
09017041	Philistia mi ahong pai zel a, David azuan nai hulhul a; ama ah alum tawipa apai hi.
09017042	Philistia mi'n a-en vialvial a, David amuhleh asimmoh mahmah hi. Amah lah san chiuchiau, mit hah kilawmtak, valnou lel lah ahi ngal a.
09017043	Philistia mi in David kiang ah, “Ui ka hi maw chiangte toh ka kiang a na hong pai?” achi hi. Philistia mi in apathiante lou in David ahamsiatkhumta hi.
09017044	Philistia mi in David kiang ah, “Ka kiang ah hong pai in, tung a leng vasate leh gamsate na sa ka nesak ding,” achi hi.
09017045	David in Philistia mi kiang ah, “Nang zaw namsau, tei leh lum tawi in na hong kuan a, himahleh kei zaw Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel Sepaihte' Pathian na kousiatpa min in ka hong kuan zaw hi.
09017046	Tuni in Toupa'n ka khut ah nang ahon pe ding hi. Huchi in ka hon that dia, na lutang ka tan ding. Philistia sepaihte luangte tuni in tung a leng vasate leh gamsate ka nesak ding hi. Huchi in leitung a mi tengteng in Israel ah Pathian a-om chih athei ding uh.
09017047	Hiai a kikhawm tengteng in Toupa'n namsau leh tei in ahondam kei chih athei ding uh. Kidouna lah Toupa kidouna ahi ngal a. Ama'n ka khut uah noute ahon pe ding,” achi hi.
09017048	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Philistia mi ahong kuan a, David sual dia ahon naihleh, sepaihte lam ah Philistia mi sual ding in David atai gepgep hi.
09017049	David in a-ip asawk a, suang khat alakhia a, avaisuanglot in alawn a, Philistia mi taltangtak ah adeng hi. Ataltang ah suang alut a, akhup in apuk helhul maimah hi.
09017050	Huchi in David in vaisuanglot leh suang in Philistia mi azou hi. Philistia mi adeng a, athatta hi. Himahleh David in namsau atawi kei.
09017051	Huaiziak in David atai a, Philistia mi tung ah adingh hi. Anamsau ala a, apai a pan adokkhia a, huai in athat a, alu atanta hi. Philistia mite'n amihat uh sita ahi chih atheih un ataikekta uh.
09017052	Israel mite leh Judah mite athou ua, akikou ua, Philistia mite Gath leh Ekron kulh kongkhak pha in adelh uh. Philistia mite lak a liamte Shaaraim lam tawn in Gath leh Ekron pha in apuk zengzung uhi.
09017053	Huchi in Israel suante'n Philistia mite adelh uh atawpsan ua, ahong kik nawn ua, agiahmun uh alok uhi.
09017054	David in Philistia mi lu ala a, Jerusalem ah apaipih a, agalvan bel apuanin ah akoih hi.
09017055	Saul in Philistia mi sual dia David kuankhe lai amuh in sepaih heutu Abner kiang ah, “Abner, hiai valnou kua tapa ahia?” achi hi. Abner in, “Na hin bang in ka gen, toupa aw, ka thei kei,” achi hi.
09017056	Kumpipa'n, “Hiai naupang kua tapa hiam dongkhia in,” achi hi.
09017057	Philistia mi that David ahong pai in Abner in api a, Philistia mi lu tawi kawm in Saul kiang ah apaipih hi.
09017058	Saul in akiang ah, “Tangval, kua tapa na hia?” achi hi. David in adawng a, “Bethlehem mi na sikha Jesse tapa ka hi,” achi hi.
09018001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul kiang a thu agen khit in Jonathan hinna leh David hinna ahong kipeh geih a, huchi in Jonathan in ama hinna a-it bang in amah a-it hi.
09018002	Saul in huai ni in a-omsak ngal a, apa inn ah apaisak nawnta kei hi.
09018003	Huchi in ama hinna bang geih a amah a-it ziak in Jonathan in David toh thu akhung hi.
09018004	Jonathan in apuansilh lai asuah a, David apia a, akivatna leh anamsau leh athalpeu leh ataigakna nangawn apia hi.
09018005	Saul in asawlna peuh ah David ahoh zel a, kizentak in agamtang hi. Saul in sepaihte heutu in amah abawl a, hiai tuh mi tengteng ngaih in leh Saul sikhate ngaih in ahoih hi.
09018006	Ahong pai un hichi ahong hi a, Philistia mi that David ahong pai in Israel kho teng ah numeite lasa leh lam kawm in khuangta leh thil gingtheite toh, nuamsatak in kumpipa Saul dawn ding in ahong pawtkhia uhi.
09018007	Numeite'n lam kawm ala a kidawngtuah in, “Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing,” achi uhi.
09018008	Hiai lasak in Saul akipaksak kei a, aheh mahmah hi. David bel asing asing that in angai ua, kei ka hihleh asang asang kia that in ahon ngai uh. Kumpigam lou ngal atan ding dang bang ahia om? achi hi.
09018009	Saul in huai ni a pan David ahazat bawlta hi.
