09018010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Saul tung ah Pathian sawl kha gilou ahong tung a, insung ah thu agen hi. David in nidang a ahih mah bang in kaihging atum hi. Saul in ateipi atawi hi.
09018011	Saul in ateipi akhoh a, “Huai baang ah David ka khohden ding,” achi hi. David in nihvei akihepkhiaksan hi.
09018012	Akiang a Toupa a-om ziak leh Saul apaisan ziak in Saul in David alau hi.
09018013	Huaiziak in Saul in amah a pan akisuansak a, asepaih sangkhat tung a heutu in abawl hi. Huchi in mipi lak ah David lut in apawt zel hi.
09018014	David bel ahih peuhmah ah piltak in agamtang zel a; akiang ah Toupa a-om hi.
09018015	Saul in piltak in agamtang chih amuh in alau hi.
09018016	Himahleh Israelte leh Judahte tengteng in David a-it uh; alak ua lut a pawt zel lah ahi ngal a.
09018017	Saul in David kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka tanu upazaw Merab na zi ding in ka hon neisak ding. Hangtak in hon gum peuhmah lechin. Toupa kidounate dou in,” achi hi. Saul in, “Ke'n zaw atung a khut kha lou in Philistia mite'n atung ah khut kha zaw uhen,” achi hi.
09018018	David in Saul kiang ah, “Kua ahia ka hih a, ka hinna leh Israelte lak a ka pa inkuante leng bang ahia ahih uh, kumpipa makpa ka hihna ding?” achi hi.
09018019	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, David toh Saul tanu Merab kitensak ahong hun in, Meholath mi Adriel zi ding in ape mawk hi.
09018020	Saul tanu Mikal in David a-it a; Saul ahilh ua; huai in akipaksak hi.
09018021	Saul in, “A-awkna ding thang ahong hihtheihna ding leh Philistia mite'n atung a khut akhaktheihna ding un amah ka pe ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Saul in David kiang ah, “Tuni in ka makpa na hihna ding hunlem anihveina na nei,” achi hi.
09018022	Huchi in Saul in asikhate thu apia a, “Asimtham in David houpih unla, ngai in, kumpipa na tung ah akipak mahmah a, asikhate tengteng in leng nang ahon it uh. Huchi in kumpipa makpa in om in, chi un,” achi hi.
09018023	Saul sikhate'n huai thu David bil ah agen uhi. David in, “Mizawng leh kuamah theih phak ngel louh kei a ding in kumpipa makpa hih thil namai in na sep ua hia?” achi hi.
09018024	Saul sikhate'n, “David in huchibang in achi,” chi in ahilh uh.
09018025	Saul in David kiang ah hichibang in na chi ding uh, “Kumpipa'n kumpipa melma phulakna ding in Philistia mite zekvun zakhat chih louh man bangmah adeih kei achi, chi un,” achi hi. Saul in David lah Philistia mite khut a sihsak lungsim in anei bikbek hi.
09018026	Asikhate'n huai thu David ahilh uleh kumpipa makpa hih David akipak mahmah hi.
09018027	Huchi in ni chiamte abei ma in, David leh amite athou ua, Philistia mite zanih ava that uhi. David in azekvun uh ahon pua a, kumpipa makpa ahihtheihna ding in kumpipa kimtak in apia hi. Huchi in Saul in atanu Mikal azi ding in apeta hi.
09018028	Saul in David kiang ah Pathian a-om chih atheitelta hi. Saul tanu Mikal in amah a-it hi.
09018029	Huchi in Saul in David alau semsem a, Saul bel David melma ahi denta hi.
09018030	Philistia' miliante ava kuankhe zel uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akuankhiak peuhmah chiang ua Saul sikha tengteng sang a piltak a David agamtat ziak in amin athang semsem hi.
09019001	Huan Saul in atapa Jonathan leh asikha tengteng kiang ah David thah ding thu agen hi.
09019002	Himahleh Saul tapa Jonathan in David adeihthoh mahmah hi. Jonathan in, “Ka pa Saul in thah ding in hon zong hi, huaiziak in, zingchiang zingsang in pilvang inla mun-guk ah bu nilouh in.
09019003	Ka pawtkhe dia, na omna gamlak ah ka pa kiang ah ka va dingh dia, na tungtang thu ah ka pa ka houpih ding. Huchi in ka muhdan ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.
09019004	Jonathan in apa Saul ma ah David aphat a, akiang ah, “Asikha David tung ah kumpipa khial het kei hen. Na tung ah lah akhial kei a, athilhihte lah nang a dia hoih pipi ahi zaw ngal ua.
09019005	Sih khawk sa lou in Philistia mi asual a, Toupa'n Israel tengteng a ding in hotdamna thupitak asepkhiaksak hi. Huai nang ngei in na mu a, na kipak mahmah hi. Huaiziak in sisan poi khoih lou tung ah bang ding in ahia na khelh ding, aziak bangmah om lou a David na thah ding?” achi hi.
09019006	Huchi in Saul in Jonathan thugen azui hi. Saul in kichiam in, “ Toupa ahin lai teng amah thah ahi kei ding,” achi hi.
09019007	Jonathan in David asam a, huai thil tengteng ahilh hi. Jonathan in Saul kiang ah David api a, tuma lam mah bang in akiang ah a-om nawnta hi.
09019008	Kidouna ahong om nawn a, David akuankhia hi. Philistia mite ava sual a, tamtak ava that a, ama ah ataikek uhi.
09019009	Saul bel a-inn a teipi tawi a, atut lai in atung ah Toupa sawl kha gilou ahong tung hi. David in kaihging atum hi.
09019010	Saul in ateipi in David baang toh khohden atum hi. Himahleh Saul kiang a pan akitholhkhe geih a, teipi pen baang ah akhohtal hi. Huchi in David ataikhia a, huai zan in asuakta hi.
09019011	Saul in azingsang a David tang a that ding in mi asawl hi. David zi Mikal in, tuzan a na hinna na humbit keileh zingchiang in hon that ding uh, chi in ahilh hi.
09019012	Mikal in David tohlet ah akhaikhesuk a; huchi in ataimang a, asuakta hi.
09019013	Mikal in milim ala a, lupna ah alumsak a, alulam ah kel mul lukham akoih a, puan in akhuh hi.
09019014	David pi dia Saul in mi ahon sawl kiang ah, “Achi ana,” ana chi hi.
09019015	Saul in David va en ding in mi asawl nawn a, “Alupna toh hon zawngtou le uchin ka na that ding,” achi hi.
09019016	Amisawlte ava lut uleh, ngai in, lupna ah milim alulam a kel mul lukham kham in ana om hi.
09019017	Saul in Mikal kiang ah, “Bangziak a hichibang a hon khem a, bitna dia ka melma pawtsak na hia?” achi hi. Mikal in Saul adawng a, “Hon paisak in, bangziak a nang hon that ding ka hia? ahon chi,” achi hi.
09019018	Huchi in David ataimang a, asuakta hi. Ramah a Samuel kiang ava tung a, Saul in atung a athilhih tengteng ava hilh hi. Amah leh Samuel akuan ua, Naioth ah a-om uhi.
09019019	Ngai in, Ramah a Naioth ah David a-om, chi in Saul ahilh uh.
09019020	Huchi in David pi ding in Saul in thupotu asawl hi. Zawlnei pawlte thugenkhol a a-om lai uh leh Samuel atung ua heutu a om ava muh un Saul in amisawl thupote tung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung a, amau leng thugenkhol in a-om sam uhi.
09019021	Huai Saul ahilh uleh, thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om zel uhi. Saul in athumveina ding in thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om nawn zel uhi.
09019022	Amah leng Ramah ah ava hoh a, Seku mun a tuileh lian mahmah ava pha hi. “Samuel leh David koi a om ahi ua?” chi in adong hi. Mi kuahiam khat in, “Ngai in, Ramah a Naioth ah a-om uh,” achi hi.
09019023	Ramah a Naioth ah ahoh a; Pathian kha atung ah ahong tung samta a, apai zel hi. Ramah a Naioth atun matan thugenkhol in a-om lai hi.
09019024	Ama'n apuansilhte leng asuah a, Samuel ma ah thugenkhol in a-om a, huai ni nitum leh huai zankhua in vuaktang in alum hi. Huaiziak in “Saul leng zawlnei lak a tel sam ahi maw?” achi uhi.
09020001	Huan David bel Ramah a Naioth a pan atai a, Jonathan kiang ava tung hi. “Bang ka hih a ahia? Bang ahia ka tatsiatna? Na pa tung ah bang ahia ka hihkhelh, hichitak a hon thah atup maizen?” achi hi.
09020002	Ama'n, “That lou e. Na si het kei ding. Ngai in, ka pa'n kei hon theisak lou in bangmah himhim lian in neu taleh, ahih ngei kei hi. Bang ding in ahia hiai thute kei ahon iim ding? Ahon iim kei hial ding,” achi hi.
09020003	David in, “Na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang chih na pa'n atheichian mahmah ngal a, alungsim in, hiai zaw Jonathan in thei dah hen, huchi lou in zaw alungkham lo kha ding, chi ahi ding. Himahleh Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi, sihna toh ka kikal uh kal khat lel ahi,” chi in uangtak in agen hi.
09020004	Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Na hinna in adeih peuhpeuh ka hon hihsak zel ding,” achi hi.
09020005	David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Ngai in, zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Kumpipa kiang a ankuang um ngeingei ding ka hi. Himahleh ani thum ni nitaklam tanpha in gamlak a kibu ding in ka kuan zaw ding.
09020006	Na pa'n ka om louh lam ahon theihkhiakleh, David in akhua Bethlehem a va hoh zual ding hon ngen ngutngut a; a-inkuan ua dia kum teng a akithoih hun uh ahi,” na chi in.
09020007	“Ahoih vo oi, achihleh na sikha alungmuang ding. Himahleh ahehleh thil hoih lou hih atum, chih thei mai in.
09020008	Huaiziak in na sikha hoihtak in hih in. Na sikha lah Toupa thukhun ah na lutpihta ngal a. Himahleh tatsiatna nei ka hihleh nangmah in hon that mai in. Bangziak a na pa kiang a hon pi chitchiat ding na hia?” achi hi.
09020009	Jonathan in, “That lou e. Ka pa'n na tung a thil hoih lou hih atum chih ka theih peuhmah leh nang hilh lou in ka om mahmah dia hia?” achi hi.
09020010	Huchi in David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Na pa'n hehngoh in hon na dawng taleh kua'n ahon hilh dia?” achi hi.
09020011	Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Pai dih, gamlak ah i va hoh peuhmah ding,” achi hi. Huchi in gamlak ah ava hohkhawm uhi.
09020012	Jonathan in David kiang ah, “ Toupa Israelte' Pathian atheihpihtu hi hen. Zingchiang hichih hun hiam, ani thum ni hiam a ka pa ka va dawp hun a, ngai in, David tungtang thu ahoih lam ahihleh na kiang a mi hon sawl in ka hong hilh kei dia hia?
09020013	Ka pa'n na tung ah thil hoih lou hih ut bang hitaleh, ka hon hilh louh a, lungmuangtak a na paitheihna dia ka hon khah keileh, Toupa'n Jonathan abawlbawl in bawl henla, huai sang a thupi in leng. Ka pa kiang a a-om zel bang in Toupa na kiang ah om hen.
09020014	Ka sihlouhna dia ka damsung kia a Toupa hehpihna hon musak hilou in,
09020015	tangtawn in ka inkote leng na hehpih tawp ke'n. Toupa'n David melma leitung a pan ahihman khit vek pha in leng tawp ke'n,” achi hi.
09020016	Jonathan in David inkote toh thukhun bawl in, “David melmate khut tan in leng Toupa'n phut hen,” achi uhi.
09020017	Huchi in Jonathan in David akichiamsak nawn hi; amah hinna a-it bang geih in lah a-it ngal a.
09020018	Huchi in Jonathan in akiang ah, “Zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Na tutna avuak ding ziak in na om louh akilang ngei ding hi.
09020019	Ni thum na om nung in paisuk pah inla, tuma a thil ahong om lai a na kibukna mun ah hoh inla, Ezel suang chin ah ana om gige in.
09020020	Muitum bang in thaltang thum asik ah ka hon kapkhe ding hi.
09020021	Ngai in, kuan inla, thaltangte va mukhia in, chi in naupang ka sawl ding hi. Naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na nunglam ah a-om, la inla hong pai in, ka chihleh Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, nang a ding in agalmuanhuai in lauh ding om lou ahi ding.
09020022	Himahleh naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na pamlam ah a-om uh, ka chihleh paimang mai in. Toupa'n ahon paimangsak ahi ding.
09020023	Nang leh ke'n thil i gensa tungthu ah ngai in, nang toh i kikal ah Toupa a-om tawntung hi,” achi hi.
09020024	Huchi in David gamlak ah akibu a; kha ahong thak a, kumpipa ankuang um in atu hi.
09020025	Hun dang a atutna ngei bang in atutna ah kumpipa atu hi. Jonathan adingh a, Saul kiang ah Abner atu a; David mun bel avuak hi.
09020026	Himahleh Saul in huai ni in bangmah agen kei, “Atung ah thil banghiam a-om a, siang lou hiam ahi ding, siang lou ahi ngei ding,” achi hi.
09020027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, khadet zing ani nih ni in David mun avuak lailai hi. Huchi in Saul in atapa Jonathan kiang ah, “Bang achia Jesse tapa zan leh tuni a ankuang um dia hong pai lou ahia?” achi hi.
09020028	Jonathan in Saul adawng a, “David in Bethlehem a hoh ding ahon ngen ngutngut hi.
09020029	Hon hohsak teitei in, ka inkote'n khua ah kithoihna nei ding in ahon thukhak tinten uh. Huchi in na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh hon hohsak inla, ka unaute ka va veh ding, achi hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa dohkan ah ahong kei hi,” achi hi.
09020030	Huchi in Jonathan tung ah Saul aheh guih a, akiang ah, “Nang, numei genhak leh helhat tapa, Jesse tapa na zahlakna ding leh na nu vuaktanna zahlaksak ding in na tel chih thei lou hon sa na hi hiam?
09020031	Jesse tapa hiai a a-om sung teng hihkip na hi kei dia, na gam leng. Huaiziak in samsak pah inla, ka kiang ah hon pisak in, asih ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi.
09020032	Jonathan in apa Saul adawng a, akiang ah, “Bang ding in maw thah ding ahih? Bang ahih a ahia?” achi hi.
09020033	Saul in thah tum in teipi in akhoh a, huchi in Jonathan in apa'n David thah atum ngei, chih achian hi.
09020034	Jonathan bel dohkan a pan heh mahmah kawm in adingh a, huai kha ani nih ni in an a-um kei hi. Apa'n David azahlaksak mahmah ziak in alungkhampih hi.
09020035	Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang in Jonathan in naupang khat pi in gamlak ah David toh amun sehsa uah ahoh uhi.
09020036	Anaupang kiang ah, “Tai inla, ka thaltang kapkhiakte va zong in,” achi hi. Naupang atai lai in, apam lam ah thaltang akap hi.
09020037	Jonathan in akapkiakna mun a naupang ava tun in Jonathan in naupang asam a, “Thaltang na pamlam ah ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
09020038	Jonathan in anaupang asam a, “Hong pai meng in, kin in, zekai ke'n,” achi hi. Jonathan naupang in thaltangte atawmkhawm a, apu kiang ah ahong paita hi.
09020039	Himahleh, naupang in bangmah athei kei, Jonathan leh David kia in thil omdan athei uhi.
09020040	Jonathan in anaupang kiang ah athal leh avante apia a, akiang ah, “Pai inla, khua ah ana paipih in,” achi hi.
09020041	Jonathan in apaitak in David omna mun simlam pang a pan adingh a, amai a lei si in thumvei akunsuk a, akitawptuah ua, akikahkhum ua, David anak kahzaw hi.
09020042	Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in pai in aw, nang toh kei kikal ah leh ka suante leh na suante kikal ah tangtawn in Toupa om hen, chi in Toupa min in i kichiam tuak khinta hi,” achi hi. Huchi in adingh a, apaita a, khua ah Jonathan alutta hi.
09021001	Nob a siampu Ahimelek kiang ah David ahong hi. Ahimelek in ling kawm in David ana dawn a, akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia tangtat na chia, kuamah tonpih na neih louh?” achi hi.
09021002	David in siampu Ahimelek kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n thilhih ding in thu ahon pia a, ka kiang ah, ka hon thilhihsak tup leh ka hon thupiak kuamah in thei kei heh, achi bikbek hi. Ka sikhate amun ding uh ka sehsakta,” achi hi.
09021003	Huaiziak in tu in, “Na khut ah bang a-om a? Tanghou beu nga ahihkeileh na neih lamlam hon pia in,” achi hi.
09021004	Siampu in David adawng a, “Tanghou vantang ka nei kei a, himahleh tanghou siangthou bel ka nei hi, tangvalte numei a pan akihepkhiak nak uleh,” achi hi.
09021005	David in siampu adawng a, akiang ah, “Tu ni thum sung numei a pan ka kihemkhe vek taktak uhi. Ka hong pawtkhiak dek lai in leng tangvalte tui-um belsuan asiangthou a, tanghou leng vantang ahi a, ahi, tuni tui-um belsuan sung asiansak mah bang in,” achi hi.
09021006	Huchi in siampu in tanghou siangthou apeta hi. Huai ah lah tanghou koih alak ni ua tanghou lum a khen dia Toupa ma a pan lak pen kia lou ngal tanghou dang a-om ngal kei hi.
09021007	Huai ni in Saul sikhate lak a mi khat Toupa ma a zekaisak a-om a; amin Doeg ahi. Amah Edom mi, Saul ganchingmi lak a heutupen ahi.
09021008	David in Ahimelek kiang ah, “Teipi hiam, namsau hiam na kem kei maw? Kumpipa hon sawlna thukin ahih ziak in ka namsau leh ka galvan bangmah ka hon tawi man kei hi,” achi hi.
09021009	Siampu in, “Philistia mi Goliath, Elah Phaizang a na thahpa namsau, ngai in, siampu puanak nung ah puan a tuam in a-om hi. Huai na laknopleh la in. Huai lou ngal adang a-om kei,” achi hi. David in, “Huai val a-om ding hia, hon pe dih ve,” achi hi.
09021010	Huchi in David adingh a, huai ni in Saul lau in ataimang a, Gath kumpipa Akish kiang ah apaita hi.
09021011	Akish sikhate'n akiang ah, “Hiai mi huai gam kumpipa David ahi kei maw? Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chih lou kawm in atungtang la in asa zuazua uh ahi kei maw?” achi uhi.
09021012	David in huai thute alungsim in apai a, Gath kumpipa Akish alau mahmah hi.
09021013	Huchi in ama ah a-omdan ahihlamdang a, amitmuh un akihaisak hi. Akhut in kongkhakte aham ekek a, akhamul ah achil aluangsak zengzung hi.
09021014	Huchi in Akish in asikhate kiang ah, “Enta unla, mihai ahih na thei ua, bangziak a ka kiang a hon pi na hi ua?
09021015	Mihai ka kitaksap ziak in hia hiai mi ahaidan hihlang dia ka ma a na hon pi uh? Hiai mi ka inn ah ahong lut tel mahmah ding maw?” achi hi.
09022001	Huchi in David bel huai a pan apawtkhia a, Adullam kokhuk ah a-omta hi. Asanggamte leh apate inkote tengteng in azak un huai ah akiang ah ahohsuk uh.
09022002	Lungkham peuhmah, leiba nei peuhmah leh lungkim lou peuhmahte akiang ah akikaikhawm uh. Huchi in aheutu un a-omta hi. Akiang ah mi zali hiamtak a-om uhi.
09022003	David bel huai a pan Moab gam a Mizpah ah ahoh hi. Moab kumpipa kiang ah, “Pathian in ahon hihsak ding thil ka theih masiah ka nu leh ka pate na kiang ah na om le uh,” achi hi.
09022004	Moab kumpipa ma ah amaute api a; huchi in kokhuk a David a-om lai teng akiang ah a-om uhi.
09022005	Zawlnei Gad in David kiang ah, “Kokhuk ah om nilouh ke'n. Pawt inla Judah gam ah pai in,” achi hi. Huchi in David apawt a, Hareth gammang ah alutta hi.
09022006	Saul in, “David leh akiang a omte amuta uh,” chih ana za hi. Saul bel Gibeah a Ramah a tamarisk sing nuai ah teipi tawi in atu hi. Akim ah asikha tengteng adingh uhi.
09022007	Saul in akim a dingh asikhate kiang ah, “Nou Benjamin mite aw, ngaikhia un; Jesse tapa in loute leh grephuante hon pia in asepaih sangkhat heutu leh asepaih zakhat heutu in ahon bawl dia hia?
09022008	Na vek un na hon sawm ua, ka tapa in Jesse tapa kiang a thu akhun ka kiang a hihlang himhim na om kei uh. Ka tapa in ka sikha kei hon dou ding leh tuni nangawn a kei hon tang dia ahanthawn thu ka kiang a hihlang na om louh uh?” achi hi.
09022009	Huchi in Saul sikhate kiang a ding Edom mi Doeg in adawng a, “Jesse tapa Nob a Ahitub tapa Ahimelek kiang a, ahong lam ka mu hi.
09022010	Ama'n Toupa adotsak a, nek ding apia a, Philistia mi Goliath namsau leng ape lai hi,” achi hi.
09022011	Huchi in kumpipa'n Ahitub tapa Ahimelek leh Nod a siampu a pang apa inkote tengteng asamsak hi.
09022012	Saul in, “Nang, Ahitub tapa, na ngaikhia in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi.
09022013	Saul in akiang ah, “Tanghou leh namsau na pia a, Toupa bang dotsak a, tuni a kei hon dou ding leh hon tang dia bang ding a nang leh Jesse tapa in hon guksawm na hi ua?” achi hi.
09022014	Ahimelek in kumpipa adawng a, “Kumpipa makpa, na thumang, na inkuan sung ua mizahtakhuai David bang a muanhuai na sikhate tengteng lak ah kua a-om ua?
09022015	Amah a dia Pathian thu ka dotsak amasapen ahi a hia? Ahi kei. Kumpipa'n asikha hiam, ka pa inkote kuapeuh hon ngoh mahmah kei hen. Na sikha in hiai thu bangmah ka thei kei hi,” achi hi.
09022016	Kumpipa'n, “Ahimelek, na sih ngeingei ding ahi, nang leh na pa inkote tengteng toh,” achi hi.
09022017	Kumpipa'n akiang a dingh sepaihte kiang ah, “Kihei unla, Toupa siampute that un, David lam a apan ua, taimang ahi chih thei napi a ka kiang a agen louh ziak un,” achi hi. Himahleh kumpipa sikhate'n Toupa siampute sual ding in khut azak nuam kei uhi.
09022018	Kumpipa'n Doeg kiang ah, “Nang kihei inla, siampute sual in,” achi hi. Edom mi Doeg akihei a, siampute asual a, huai ni in puanmalngat siampu puanak silh, mi sawmgiat-le-nga athat hi.
09022019	Nob, siampu khua namsau in asual a; numei leh pasal naupang leh nawi ne laite nangawn, bawngte, sabiltungte leh belamte toh namsau in asatlum hi.
09022020	Ahitub tapa Ahimelek tapate lak a khat, amin Abiathar ataikhia a, David kiang ah ataitung hi.
09022021	Abiathar in Saul in Toupa siampute athah thu David ahilh hi.
09022022	David in Abiathar kiang ah, “Edom mi Doeg huai a, a-om ni mah in Saul ahilh ngeingei ding chih theisa in ka om hi. Na pa inkuan tengteng kei ziak a si ahi uh.
09022023	Nang ka kiang ah om inla, lau ke'n. Kei thah hon tumte'n nang leng thah ahon tum ding uh. Ka kiang ah om lechin na bit ding hi,” achi hi.
09023001	Huan ngai in, “Philistia mite'n Keilah khua asual ua, phual a buhte alaksak vek uh,” chi in David ahilh uhi.
09023002	Huchi in David in, “ Toupa , huai Philistia mite ka va sual diam?” chi in adong hi. Toupa'n David kiang ah, “Philistia mite va sual inla, Keilah khua va humbit in,” achi hi.
09023003	David mite'n akiang ah, “Ngai in Judah gam a om nangawn i lau ua, Keilah a hohsuk a Philistia sepaihte va sual lauhuaizaw sem na'n chia,” achi uhi.
09023004	David in Toupa adong nawn hi. Toupa'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Thou inla, Keilah ah hohsuk in, Philistia mite na khut ah ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
09023005	Huchi in Keilah ah David leh amite ahoh ua, Philistia mite ava sual ua, agante uh alaksak ua, tamtak athat uh. Huchibang in David in Keilah khomite ahumbitta hi.
09023006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Keilah a David kiang a Ahimelek tapa Abiathar atai lai in siampu puanak tawi in apaisuk hi.
09023007	Keilah ah David ahoh chih Saul ahilh uhi. Saul in, “Pathian in ka khut a amah hon pia ahita ve. Kulh kongpi leh akalhna nei khua ah lah lut in akikhumta ngal a,” achi hi.
09023008	Saul in mi tengteng kidou ding in Keilah khua va sual a David leh amite va um ding in asamkhawm hi.
09023009	David in Saul in atung ah thil hoih lou asawm chih a na thei hi. Siampu Abiathar kiang ah, “Siampu puanak hon la dih ve,” achi hi.
09023010	Huchi in David in, “Aw Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, kei ziak a khua hihse ding in Keilah ah Saul hong paisuk atum, chih kei na sikha in ka za hi.
09023011	Keilah a mite'n akhut ah hon pe ding uam? Na sikha in ka zak bang in Saul ahong paisuk diam? Aw Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, hehpih in na sikha hon hilh in,” achi hi.
09023012	Toupa'n , “Ahong suk ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in, “Keilah khua mite'n kei leh ka mite Saul khut ah ahon pe ding uam?” achi hi. Toupa'n , “Ahon pe ding uh,” achi hi.
09023013	Huchi in David leh amite, zaguk hiamtak athou ua Keilah a pan apawt ua, alemna lamlam ah apaita uh. Keilah a pan David ataikheta, chih Saul ahilh ua; huchi in kuankhiak akikhelsakta hi.
09023014	David gamdai ah, leikohawm ah a-om hi. Ziph gamdai a tanggam ah a-om nilouh hi. Saul in niteng in amah azong a, himahleh Pathian in akhut ah ape kei hi.
09023015	David in amah thah tum in Saul ahong kisa chih athei a; huchi in Ziph gamdai Horesh ah David a-om hi.
09023016	Saul tapa Jonathan athou a, Horesh ah David kiang ah ahoh a, Pathian ah akhut ahatsak hi.
09023017	Akiang ah, “Lau het ke'n, ka pa Saul khut in ahong zongkhe kei ding, Israelte tung ah kumpi na hong hi dia, kei nang hon zom pa ka hi ding. Hiai leng ka pa Saul in athei kilkel hi,” achi hi.
09023018	Anih un Toupa ma ah thukhun abawl ua, Horesh ah David a-om nilouh a, Jonathan bel a-inn lam ah apaita hi.
09023019	Huchi in Ziph mite Gibeah ah Saul kiang ah ahohtou ua, “I kiang ua Horesh a leikohawm, gamdai simlam pang Hakilah mual a David na kibu nilouh akei maw?
09023020	Huaiziak in aw kumpipa, hong paisuk na lunggulh lamtak ahih bang in hong paisuk inla, kou ka hih ding uh ahihleh kumpipa khut a amah hon piak ahi ding,” achi uhi.
09023021	Saul in, “ Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen. Noute'n na hon hehpih mahmah uhi.
09023022	Pai unla, va chian nawn sem unla, anung va zui unla, amumi leng va chian hoih nawn sese un. Lepchiah piltak in thil ahih nak chih mi'n ahon hilh uhi.
09023023	Huaiziak in abukna mun tengteng thei sipsip unla, ka kiang ah hong nawn ngeingei unla, nou kiang ah kei leng ka hong sam ding hi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, hiai gam a a-om peuhmahleh Judah mi sang tampi lak a pan ka zongkhe ding,” achi hi.
09023024	Huchi in athou ua, Saul ma in Ziph ah ahoh uh. Himahleh David leh amite gamdai simlam Arabah a Maon gamdai ah a-om uhi. Huai mun Jashimon simlam a om ahi.
09023025	Saul leh amite amah zong ding in ahoh uh. David ahilh ua, huchi in suangpi zuan in apawtkhia hi. Maon gamdai ah David adelhta hi.
09023026	Saul tang langkhat lam pang ah apai a, David leh amite bel tang langkhat lam pang ah apai uhi. David Saul lau in kintak in atai a; Saul leh amite'n lah David leh amite mat tum in a-umkimvel ngal ua.
09023027	Himahleh Saul kiang ah, “Kin meng inla, hong pai in, Philistia mite'n i gam uh ahong sual uh,” chi in thangkou ahong tung hi.
09023028	Huchi in Saul in David adelh lai akiksan hi. Philistia mite sual ding in apaita hi. Huaiziak in huai mun Sela-hammahlekoth achi uhi.
09023029	David huai a kipan apaitou a, En-gedi leikohawm ah a-om hi.
09024001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul in Philistia mite va delh ahong paikik in ngai in, “En-gedi gamdai ah David a-om,” chih hilh in a-om hi.
09024002	Huchi in Saul in Israel mi tengteng lak a telkhiak tuam mi sangthum api a, sathakte tenna suangpi lak lam ah David leh amite zong in ahohta uhi.
09024003	Lamkal ah belam huang kokhuk omna ava tung ua, khawl tawldam ding in Saul ava lut hi. Kokhuk sunggil lam ah David leh amite a-om uhi.
09024004	David mite'n akiang ah, “Ngai dih, Toupa'n na kiang ah, ngai in, na khut ah na melma ka hon pe dia, atung ah hoih na saksak in na hih ding, achih ni ahita ve,” achi uhi. Huchi in David athou a, simthamtak in Saul puan mong ava tan hi.
09024005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, aden chiang in Saul puan mong ava tan in David lungsim asun mahmah hi.
09024006	Huchi in amite kiang ah, “Amah Toupa sathau nilh ahi, chih thei napi a, atung a khut zang a Toupa sathau nilh ka toupa tung a hiai thil ka hih louh ding hi a,” achi hi.
09024007	David in huai thu in amite akhamdai a, Saul sual dia akuan uh aphalta kei hi. Saul bel kokhuk a pan apawt a, apai nawnta hi.
09024008	Anung zek in David leng athou a, kokhuk a pan apawt a, “Kumpipa, ka toupa,” chi in Saul anungsap hi. Nunglam ah Saul ahong kihei a, David in amai a lei si in akunsuk hi.
09024009	David in Saul kiang ah, “Ngai in, David in na siatna azong, chi a mite'n na kiang a, agen uh bangziak a gingta na hia?
09024010	Ngai in, tuni in Toupa'n kokhuk ah ka khut ah nang ahon pia chih na mit mahmah in na mu hi. Mi khenkhatte'n nang that ding in ahon chi uh. Himahleh ka hon hawi hi. Ka toupa tung ah ka khut himhim ka kha kei ding, Toupa sathau nilh ahi ngal a,” ka chi hi.
09024011	Huai kia leng hilou in, pa, en in, na puan mong leng ka tawi hi. Na puan mong ka tan theih a, ka hon thahlouhna ah ka khut ah thil hoih lou leh tatlekna a-om kei, chih leh ka hinna lak tum in hon zongzong lechin leng, na tung ah ka khial kei chih thei in.
09024012	Toupa'n nang leh kei kikal ah vaihawm henla, Toupa'n na tung ah ka phu hon laksak hen. Himahleh ke'n zaw na tung ah khut ka kha kei himhim ding.
09024013	Nidanglai a paunak in, “Migilou a pan gitlouhna apawt zel,” achi hi. “Himahleh ke'n bel na tung ah khut ka kha kei ding.
09024014	Israel kumpipa kua zong in ahia ahong pawtkhiak? Kua ahia na delh? Ui sisa, uihik lel mo?
09024015	Huaiziak in Toupa vaihawmpa hi henla, nang toh kei kikal ah vaihawm hen, hon mu in hon genpih henla, na khut a pan hon hunkhia hen,” achi hi.
09024016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, David in Saul kiang a hiai thute agen khit in, Saul in, “Hiai ka tapa David aw hilou amaw?” achi hi. Huchi in aw suah in Saul akapta hi.
09024017	David kiang ah, “Kei sang in na diktatzaw, nang zaw ka tung ah thil hoih na hih a, ke'n bel thil hoih lou ka hih.
09024018	Tuni in ka tung a thil hoih na hihdan na hihlang a, Toupa'n na khut a kei ahon piak a leng na hon thahlouhna ah.
09024019	Mi'n amelma mu taleh bangmah lou in akhah mawk diam? Huaiziak in tuni a ka tung a na thilhih ah Toupa'n thil hoih in nang hon thuk hen.
09024020	Ngai in, kumpipa na hong hi ngei dia, Israel gam na khut ah hihkip in a-om ding chih ka theita hi.
09024021	Huaiziak in ka nung a ka suan hong om dingte hihmang lou ding in Toupa min in ka kiang ah kichiam inla, ka pa inkote a pan ka min thaimang ke'n,” achi hi.
09024022	Huchi in Saul kiang ah David akichiam hi. Huchi in inn ah Saul apai a, David leh amite leikohawm ah apaitou uhi.
09025001	Huan Samuel asita a; Israel mi tengteng ahong paikhawm ua, amah kah in Ramah ah a-inn uah avui uhi. David athou a Paran gamdai ah ahohsuk hi.
09025002	Maon ah mi khat a-om a, Karmel tang ah aneih-le-lam a-om hi. Amah mithupitak ahi a, belam sangthum leh kel sangkhat anei hi. Karmel tang ah abelam mul amet hi.
09025003	Amin Nabal ahi a, azi min Abigail ahi. Huai numei teitak leh melhoihtak ahi. Himahleh pasal pen mi chihhaktak leh giloutak ahi a; amah Kaleb suan ahi.
09025004	David in gamdai a pan Nabal in abelam mul amet chih ana za hi.
09025005	Huchi in David in tangval sawm asawl a, tangvalte kiang ah, “David in Karmel tang ah va hohtou unla, Nabal kiang ah hoh unla ka min in chibai va buk un.
09025006	Mineizoupa kiang ah huchi in va chi un: ‘Nang tung ah, na inkuante tung ah leh na neih tengteng tung ah khamuanna om hen.
09025007	Na belam mulmet mite a-om uh chih ka na za hi. Na belamching mite ka kiang ah a-om zel ua, apoi uh bangmah ka khoih kei ua, Karmel tang a a-om sung un bangmah amangsak kei uh.
09025008	Na tangvalte dong lechin hon hilh mai ding uh. Huchi in hiai ka tangvalte'n na mitmuh in deihsakna tang uhen, ni hoih ni tak a hong hoh lah ka hi ngal ua. Na neih bangbang na sikhate leh na tapa David na pe dih ve, achi, chi un,’ ” achi hi.
09025009	David tangvalte ava tun un David min in huai thu tengteng Nabal kiang ah agen ua, huchi in adaita uh.
09025010	Nabal in David sikhate adawng a, “David kua ahia oi? Jesse tapa kua ahia oi? Tulai in sikha tampi pute taimangsan atam mai uh.
09025011	Ka tanghou, ka tui leh ka belam mulmet mite a dia ka gohsa kuate ahi ua chih ka theihlouhte ka pe peuhmah dia hia?” achi hi.
09025012	Huchi in David tangvalte akihei ua, akik nawn ua; huai thu tengteng ahong hilh uh.
09025013	David in amite kiang ah, “Na namsau uh kuah chiat un,” achi hi. Anamsau uh akuah chiat uh. David in leng anamsau akuah a, mi zali in David azuitou ua; mi zanih van veng in a-om uhi.
09025014	Tangval khat in Nabal zi Abigail kiang ah, “Ngai in, David in gamdai a pan ka pu uh chibai buk ding in mi ahon sawl a, ama'n ana sal hi.
09025015	Himahleh huaite lah ka tung uah ahoih mahmah ua, ka poi uh bangmah akhoih kei uh. Gamlak a ka om lai ua ka omkhawm sung tengteng uh bangmah ka tan kei uhi.
09025016	Belamching a akiang ua ka om sung tengteng un sun leh zan kou a ding in baang ahi mai uhi.
09025017	Huaiziak in bang ahia na hih ding hoihtak in ngaihtuah dih ve. Ka pu uh tung ah leh a-inkuan tengteng tung ah thil hoih lou tup in anei hi. Amah lah a Belial tapa mahmah a, kuamah houpih theih ahi kei hi,” chi in agen hi.
09025018	Abigail in kintak in tanghou beu zanih, uain thawl nih, belam nga huan dia mansa, vaimim kan buk nga, grep gah phoukeu bawk zakhat leh theipi beu zanih alakhawm a, sabiltung aposak hi.
09025019	Asikha tangvalte kiang ah, “Ka ma ah na pai zel unla, ngai un, ka hon zui ding,” achi hi. Himahleh apasal Nabal ahilh kei hi.
09025020	Huchi in hichibang ahi a, asabiltung tung a tuang a tang sang sing lak a apaisuk lai in, ngai in, David leh amite'n ahon zuan ua, huchi in amau atuakta hi.
09025021	David in, “Bangmah amansaklouhna dia gamdai a hiai mipa neih tengteng athawn lel in ka na vensak ana hi mahmah ve; thil hoih lah thil hoih lou in ahon dinta ngal a.
09025022	Zingchiang zingsang khovak pha a amah a tengteng lak a pasal naupang khat kia lel leng ka hawi peuhmahleh Pathian in David melmate thupizaw sem in bawl hen,” achi hi.
09025023	Abigail in David amuh in asabiltung a pan akumsuk zok a, David ma a lei si in akunsuk hi.
09025024	Akhebul ah abokkhup a, “Keimah in, ka toupa aw, kei mahmah in thulimlouhna ka khu ding. Na sikhanu'n na bil a zak ding in thu gen henla, na sikhanu thugen hehpih in ngaikhia in.
09025025	Ka toupa aw, Belial mi Nabal bangmah in sim ke'n. Amin bangbang ahi geih hi. Nabal ahi na mah a, ahai hi. Kei na sikhanu'n, ka toupa'n na hon sawl tangvalte ka na mu kha kei hi.
09025026	Huaiziak in tu in, toupa aw, Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi. Ka mu mahmah kei hi, Toupa'n sisan suah lou ding leh na khut a phu la lou ding in lah nang ahon bawl hi. Na melmate leh ka toupa hoihlouhna zong mite Nabal bang himai uhen.
09025027	Hiai ka toupa a dia na sikha in vualzawlnate ka hon tawi ka pu hon zui tangvalte piak hi hen.
09025028	Na sikhanu tatlekna hehpih in ngaidam in. Toupa'n ka toupa inkuan kiptak in aphut ngeingei dia, ka pu Toupa kidounate dou ahi ngal a. Na damsung teng in nangmah gitlouh man muh ding a-om kei ding.
09025029	Nang hon delh ding leh na hinna hihmang ding in mite hong kisa mah le uh, ka toupa hinna zaw Toupa na Pathian toh hinna a gak ahi dia; na melmate hinna bel vaisuanglot a suanglot bang in alawnmang ding hi.
09025030	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n na tungtang thu a thil hoih a chiam bang teng ka toupa tung a ahih chiang a, Israelte kumpipa dia ahon bawl chiang in,
09025031	Aziak om lou a sisan na suah louh a, ka toupa'n phu na lak louh nang a ding in lungkhamna himhim ahi kei ding. Ka toupa a ding in leng lungkimlouhna himhim ahi sam kei ding. Toupa'n ka toupa tung a thil hoih ahih hun chiang in na sikhanu theigige in,” achi hi.
09025032	David in Abigail kiang ah, “Tuni a kei hon na dawn dia hon sawlpa Toupa , Israelte' Pathian phat in om hen.
09025033	Na lemtheihna vualzawl in om henla, nang sisan suah mohna a pan hon humnu leh keimah khut a phu la lou dia hon bawlnu vualzawl in om hen.
09025034	Kei hon dawn dia hong pawtkhe pah lou hi lechin, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi, zingchiang khovak pha in Nabal ka hawisak het kei ding,” achi hi.
09025035	Huchi in David in athiltawite ala a, akiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in na inn ah paitouta in. Na thu ka mang hi. Na nget pen ka hon sansak hi,” achi hi.
09025036	Nabal kiang ah Abigail ahohtou hi. Ngai in, a-inn ah kumpipa ankuanglui bang mai in ankuang a na lui hi. Akham mahmah ziak in Nabal amaitai ngial hi. Huaiziak in azingsang khovak masiah bangmah ahilh kei hi.
09025037	Huan hichi ahong hi a, zinglam a Nabal uain kham ahong halh in azi in huai thute ahilhta a, alung adaiduak a, suang bang in ahong om hial hi.
09025038	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni sawm nung in Toupa'n Nabal tung ah khut akha a, asita hi.
09025039	David in Nabal asi chih azak in, “Ka minsiatna dia Nabal thilhih a pan hon genpih a, asikha thil hoih lou hih lou dia hon khampa Toupa phat in om hen. Nabal thil hoih lou hih Toupa'n amah tung mah ah akesakta,” achi hi. Huchi in David in Abigail azi dia va houpih ding in mi asawl hi.
09025040	David sikhate'n Karmel tang a Abigail kiang atuntouh un, “David in azi dia nang hong pi ding in ahon sawl,” chi in amah ahoupih uhi.
09025041	Athou a, amai a lei si in akunsuk hi. “Ngai dih ua, na sikhanu uh ka toupa sikhate khe sil ding sikha ka hi,” achi hi.
09025042	Huchi in Abigail athou zok a, sabiltung tung ah atuang a, anungzui nungak ngate toh David misawlte azui ua, azi in a-omta hi.
09025043	David in Jezreel a mi Ahinoam leng ana pi khin a; huchi in azi ding in a-om tuaktuak uhi.
09025044	Saul in lah atanu Mikal, David zi Gallim a mi Laish tapa Palti toh ana kitengsak zouta hi.
09026001	Huan Ziphte Gibeah ah Saul kiang ah ahoh ua, “Gamdai chin a Hakilah mual ah David akibu kei maw?” chi in ava gen uhi.
09026002	Huchi in Saul athou a, Ziph gamdai ah Israel mite lak a pan telkhiak mi sangthum pi in Ziph gamdai ah David zong ding in ahohsukta uhi.
09026003	Saul in gamdai chin, lampi gei suahlam a om, Jeshimon toh kigalsai, Hakilah mual tung ah panmun akhoh a, gamdai ah David a-om lai a, Saul amah zong in gamdai ah ahong chih athei hi.
09026004	Huaiziak in David in enkhe mite asawl a, huchi in Saul ahong taktak chih atheitelta hi.
09026005	David athou a, Saul panmun khohna ah ahoh hi. David in Saul leh asepaih heutu, Ner tapa Abner lupna amu hi. Giahphual um sung ah Saul alum a, akim ah mite'n a-umkual uhi.
09026006	David in Hit mi Ahimelek leh Joab unau Zeruiah tapa Abishai kiang ah, “Saul panmun ah kua ahia ka kiang a hong ding?” chi in agen hi. Abishai in, “Kei na kiang ah ka hong suk sam ding,” achi hi.
09026007	Huchi in David leh Abishai mipite omna ah zan in ava hoh uhi. Ngai in, Saul bel giahphual um sung ah lum in a-ihmu hi. Alulam ah ateipi lei ah asiat tal a, Abner leh mite bel akim ah lum in a-ihmu uhi.
09026008	Abishai in David kiang ah, “Tuni in Pathian in na melma na khut a hon pia ahita ve. Huaiziak in teipi in khatvei in lei ah ka hon sunden suk ding aw? Nihvei sut tuan angai kei ding,” achi hi.
09026009	Himahleh David in Abishai kiang ah, “Hihmangthang ke'n, Toupa thaunilh tung a khut kha amoh lou kua a-om thei a?” achi hi.
09026010	David mah in, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Toupa'n atung ah khut kha na ve. Ahihkeileh leng asih ni ahong tung na ding. Ahihkeileh leng, kidouna ah ahoh dia, amangthang mai ding.
09026011	Toupa thaunilh tung ah khut ka kha het kei ding. Alu kiangchin a teipi leh tuithawl ahihleh la inla, pai ni,” achi hi.
09026012	Huchi in David in Saul lu kiangchin a teipi leh tuithawl ala a, apai nawnta uh. Kuamah in amu kei ua, kuamah in phawk in akhanglou kei. Toupa'n nuamtak a a-ihmutsak ziak in avek un nakpi in a-ihmu uhi.
09026013	Huchi in gal khat lam ah David ahoh a, gamla kuam ah mualvum ah adingh a; akikal uh gamlapi ahi.
09026014	David in mipite leh Ner tapa Abner zak in akikou a, “Abner, na hon dawng kei dia hia?” chi in asam hi. Huchi in Abner in adawng a, “Kumpipa sam nang kua na hia?” achi hi.
09026015	David in Abner kiang ah, “Mihangsan na hi kei maw? Israelte lak ah nang bang kua a-om a? Bangchidan ahia kumpipa, na toupa na ven louh? Kumpipa, na pu hihmang ding in kuahiam khat ahong pai hi.
09026016	Na thilhihdan ahoih kei. Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Toupa thaunilh toupa na ven hoih louh ziak in si dia kilawm na hi. Kumpipa lu chin a teipi leh tuithawl om koi a om ahita ua? En him dih,” achi hi.
09026017	Saul in David aw athei a, “Tua nang aw hia, ka tapa David?” achi hi. David in, “Hi, toupa, kumpipa aw, ka aw ahi,” achi hi.
09026018	“Bangziak in ahia ka toupa in asikha adelh? Bang thil ka hih a ahia? Akhut ah thil gilou bang ahia om?
09026019	Huaiziak in toupa, ka kumpipa'n asikha thu ngaikhia hen. Kei dou dia na lungtang tokthoupa Toupa ahihleh thillat pom teitei hen. Mihing tate ahih uleh Toupa ah hamsia thuak in om uhen. Pai inla, pathian dangte nna sem in, chi a Toupa gou ka luah theihlouhna dia tuni a hon delhmang lah ahi ngal ua.
09026020	Huaiziak in Toupa muh phak louh in lei ah ka sisan luang kei hen. Vengkeng gem dia tang a mi agamvak bang un Israel kumpipa, uihik leltak zong ding a paikhia ahi ve,” achi hi.
09026021	Saul in, “Ka na khialta. Ka tapa David, hong pai nawn in. Tuni a na mitmuh a ka hinna amanphat mahmah ziak in bangmah himhim ka hihta kei ding hi. Ngai in, thil haihuai mahmah ka na hihta a, ka nak khelh mahmah hi,” achi hi.
09026022	David in adawng a, “Toupa aw, teipi en dih, tangval khat hong henla, hong la hen.
09026023	Toupa'n michih adiktat man uleh amuanhuai man uh ape ding. Tuni in Toupa'n ka khut ah nang ahon pe na a, Toupa thaunilh tung ah ka khut ka lik nuam kei a ahi.
09026024	Ngai in, tuni a na hinna ka hon mantamsak mahmah bang in Toupa'n ka hinna hon mantamsak henla, mangbatna tengteng a pan hon hunkhia hen,” achi hi.
09026025	Huchi in Saul in David kiang ah, “Ka tapa David, vualzawl in om in. Thilhihtheitak in na om dia, na zou zel ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David apai a, Saul leng amun ah apai nawnta hi.
09027001	Huan David in alungsim in, “Chikchiang hiam a zaw Saul khut a mangthang khongkhong ding ka hi ve. Philistia mite gam a taimang sang a hoihzaw om lou ding ahi. Huchi in Saul in Israel gam a hon zonna alungdong dia, huchi in akhut a pan ka suakta ding,” achi hi.
09027002	David athou a, amah leh akiang a mi zaguk omte Maok tapa Gath kumpipa Akish kiang ah apaita uhi.
09027003	David leh amite, michih a-inkuankuan un, David zi nihte, Jezreel mi Ahinoam leh Nabal zi Karmel mi Abigailte toh Gath ah Akish kiang ah atengta uhi.
09027004	Gath ah David atai chih Saul ahilh ua, huchi in azong nawnta kei hi.
09027005	David in Akish kiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, na gam a khua khat ah tenna ding mun hon pe sam inla, huai ah ka teng ding uh. Na sikha bang ding in kumpipa khopi ah na kiang ah a-om nilouh dia?” achi hi.
09027006	Huchi in Akish in huai ni in Ziklag khua apeta hi. Huaiziak in Ziklag tuni tan in Judah gam kumpipate a ahi nilouh hi.
09027007	Philistia gam a David a-om sung kum khat pumpi leh kha li ahi.
09027008	David leh amite ava hohtou ua, Geshur mite, Girzi mite leh Amalek mite ava dou uhi. Huai namte Telam a pan Shur gam lam pang Aigupta gam pha a om ahi uhi.
09027009	David in gam asual a, numei leh pasal hawi himhim anei kei. Belamte, bawngte, sabiltungte, sangawngsaute leh apuansilhte uh alaksak hi. Apai nawn a, Akish kiang ah ahoh hi.
09027010	Akish in, “Tuni in koilam na dou a?” achi hi. David in, “Judah sim gam, Jerahmeelte sim gam leh Kente sim gam,” achi hi.
09027011	“Philistia gam a a-om sung mawngmawng in ‘David in hichibang in ahih zel,’ ” achi kha ding ua, chi in numei pasal Gath a pi ding hawi himhim anei kei hi.
09027012	Akish in David thugen ataksang a, “Ami Israelte akimudahsak mahmah ziak in, tangtawn in ka sikha ding in a-om ding,” achi hi.
09028001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in Philistia mite'n asepaihte uh Israel mite sual a dou ding in akaikhawm uh. Akish in David kiang ah, “Nang leh na mite kei toh galdou dia na hong kuan ngeingei ding uh ahi, chih thei in,” achi hi.
09028002	David in Akish kiang ah, “Aw le, na sikha in bang ahihthei a chih na thei ding,” achi hi. Akish in David kiang ah, “Ahoih ve, kei hon vengpa ding in ka hon bawl den ding,” achi hi.
09028003	Samuel asita a, Israel mi tengteng in akah ua, amah khua mah Ramah ah avui uhi. Saul in dawi aisan siam zawlte leh dawisiamte agam a pan adelhkhe khin hi.
09028004	Philistia mite akikaikhawm ua, Shunem ah panmun akhoh uh. Saul in Israel mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Gilboa ah panmun akhoh sam hi.
09028005	Saul in Philistia sepaihte amuhtak in alau a, alungsim aling tonton maimah hi.
09028006	Saul in Toupa adot in leng Toupa'n mang hiam, Urim hiam, zawlnei hiam in leng adawng himhim kei hi.
09028007	Saul in asikhate kiang ah, “Dawi aisan siam zawl numei akiang a ka hoh a ka dot ding hon zonkhiaksak un,” achi hi. Asikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, Endor a dawi aisan siam numei om ei ve,” achi uhi.
09028008	Saul akibawl lamdang a, puan dang asilh a, amah leh midang nih ahoh uh. Zan in numei kiang ava tung uhi. “Dawi aisanna in ai hon sansak inla, na kiang a, amin ka gen peuhmah hon sapsak in,” achi hi.
09028009	Numei in akiang ah, “Ngai in, Saul thilhih na thei a, agam a dawi aisan siam leh dawisiamte ahihmang khinta a, bangziak a ka sihna dia ka hinna thang kamkhum dia kisa na hia?” achi hi.
09028010	Saul in, “ Toupa min lou in, Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Hiai thil ziak in na tung ah gawtna atung kei ding,” chi in akiang ah akichiam hi.
09028011	Numei in, “Kua ka hon sapkhiaksak dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Samuel hon sapkhiaksak in,” achi hi.
09028012	Numei in Samuel amuhleh ngaihtak in akikou a, Saul kiang ah, “Bangziak a hon khem, Saul lah na hi ngal a?” achi hi.
09028013	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Lau ke'n. Bang a na muh?” achi hi. Numei in Saul kiang ah, “Lei a pan pathiante hong pawtkhia ka mu,” achi hi.
09028014	Akiang ah, “Bangchibang ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Putekpi ahong pawt a, puanaktual asilh,” achi hi. Saul in Samuel ahi chih athei a, amai a lei si in akun hi.
09028015	Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Bangziak a hihbuai a hon samkhia na hia?” achi hi. Saul in adawng a, “Ka lung azing mahmah a ahi. Philistia mite'n ahon dou ua, Pathian in lah ahon lehngatsan a, zawlnei hiam, mang hiam in leng lah ahon dawng himhim kei hi. Huaiziak in ka hih ding hon hilh ding in ka hon sam ahi,” achi hi.
09028016	Samuel in, “Huchi a Toupa hon lehngatsan in na melma ahong hita, chih theigige kawm a bangziak a thu hon dong?
09028017	Kei hon zang a, agen bang in Toupa'n na tung a hih ahita ve. Toupa'n na khut a pan gam ahon sut a, na invengpa David apeta hi.
09028018	Toupa thu na man louh ziak leh Amalekte tung a aheh mahmah dungzui a na tangtun louh ziak in. Tu in na tung ah hiai thil ahihta hi.
09028019	Huai lou leng, Toupa'n nang leh Israelte leng Philistia mite khut ah ahon pe dia; zingchiang in nang leh na tapate ka kiang ah na hong om ding uh. Toupa'n Israel sepaihte leng Philistia mite khut ah ape ding,” achi hi.
09028020	Huchi in Samuel thugen ziak in Saul alau mahmah a, lei ah apuk vialvual maimah hi. Tha leh zung himhim anei kei; nitum leh zankhua a an ne lou ahi ngal a.
09028021	Saul kiang ah numeinu ahoh a, adah mahmah chih athei hi. Akiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhanu'n na gen ka taksang a, sih-le-sih ka kiang a na thugente ka zui hi.
09028022	Huaiziak in nang leng na sikhanu thu taksang sam in. An tawmchik bek ka hon lui dia, huchi in na pai chiang a hatna na neihtheihna ding in ne in,” achi hi.
09028023	Himahleh a-ut kei a, “Ka ne kei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh asikhate'n numei toh asawl teitei ua; a thu uh amangta hi. Lei a pan athou a, lupna ah atuta hi.
09028024	Numei in a-inn ah bawngnou vak thau anei a, agou zok a; tangbuang ala a, amek a, silngou soh louh tanghou abawl hi.
09028025	Saul leh asikhate ma ah alui a, aneta uh. Huchi in athou ua, huai zan in apaita uhi.
09029001	Philistia mite'n asepaih tengteng uh Aphek ah akaikhawm vek ua, Israel mite'n Jezreel a tuikhuk kiang ah panmun akhoh uhi.
09029002	Philistia makaite azaza in, asangsang in apai ua, David leh amite'n Akish toh anung uh azui uhi.
09029003	Philistia makaite'n, “Hiai Hebrute'n bang ahia ahih uh?” achi uhi. Akish in Philistia makai kiang ah, “Hiai David Israelte kumpipa Saul sikha, hichi tan a ka kiang a om khin a, ka kiang a, ahong lut nung a lah tutan a leng adiklouhna ka muhlouhna pa ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
09029004	Himahleh Philistia kumpipate atung ah aheh uhi. Philistia kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Hiai mi na mun sehsak a pai ding in kiksak inla, kidouna ah i kiang uah hong suk kei heh. Huchi lou in zaw kidouna ah i melmate lam ah apang kha ding. Hiai mite lu ding in hiai mipa leh apu kilem nawn ve un teh aw?
09029005	Hiai David mah ahi kei maw, Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chi a, atungtang thu la a asak uh?” achi uhi.
09029006	Huchi in Akish in David asam a, akiang ah, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Midik mahmah na hi a, sepaihte lak a ka kiang a na kuan leh na hong leltak ka mitmuh in ahoih mahmah hi. Ka kiang a na hong ni a pan tuni tan in na tung ah bangmah hoihlouhna himhim ka mu het kei hi. Himahleh makaite'n ahon ngai kei uhi.
09029007	Huaiziak in Philistia kumpipate na hihlungkim louhlouhna ding in kik inla, lungkimtak in pai in,” achi hi.
09029008	David in Akish kiang ah, “Ahihleh, bang thil ahia ka na hih? Na kiang a ka om sung teng tuni tan in, ka toupa kumpipa melma dou lou a ka kik nawn maimah ding, na sikha tung ah bang mu na hia oi?” achi hi.
09029009	Akish in adawng a, David kiang ah, “Ka mitmuh in Pathian angel bang in na hoih chih ka thei hi. Himahleh Philistia kumpipate'n, kidouna ah i kiang ah ahong sam kei ding, achi bikbek mawk uhi.
09029010	Huaiziak in na kiang a om na pu sikhate toh zingkhang in thou unla, zingkhang a na thoh phet ua khua avak chiang in pai un,” achi hi.
09029011	Huchi in David leh amite Philistia gam a kik nawn ding a zingsang a pawtkhe ding in athouta uh. Jezreel ah Philistia mite ahohtou uhi.
09030001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni a David leh amite Ziklag atun un, Amalekte'n simlam leh Ziklag khua ana sim khin uh. Ziklag khua ana sual ua, mei in ana hal uhi.
09030002	Numeite leh khua a om peuhmah aneu-alian sal in aman ua, kuamah that lou a pi in apaipih khinta uhi.
09030003	David leh amite khua ava tun un, ngai in, ana kangsiang khinta hi. Azite, atapate leh atanute uh sal in ana man khinta uhi.
09030004	David leh akiang a omte'n aw suah in kah leng kap zou nawn lou khop in akap uhi.
09030005	David zite nih: Jezreel mi Ahinoam leh Karmel mi Nabal zi Abigail leng sal a pi in a-om uhi.
09030006	Michih atapate uh leh atanute uh ziak a lungkham in amah suang a den ding thu agen ziak un, David alungzing mahmah hi. Himahleh David bel Toupa a Pathian ah akihihhat hi.
09030007	David in Ahimelek tapa siampu Abiathar kiang ah, “Siampu puanak hon va laksak dih ve,” achi hi. Abiathar in David siampu puanak ava laksak hi.
09030008	David in, “Hiaite delh leng ka pha lai diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Delh in, na pha ngeingei ding, na la nawn vek ding,” achi hi.
09030009	Huchi in David, amah leh akiang a mi zaguk toh akuankhia a, Besor lui ava tung ua, ami nutsiatte uh huai ah a-om uhi.
09030010	David in adelh zel a, amah leh mi zalite toh, mi zanihte'n abah tak ziak un Besor lui akan zou kei uhi.
09030011	Gamlak ah Aigupta mi amu ua, David kiang ah api ua, tanghou apia ua, ama'n ane a, tui adawnsak uhi.
09030012	Theipi beu them khat leh grep gah phoukeu bawm nih apia uhi. Hiaite anekleh ahong halh nawn a; ni thum leh zan thum an ne lou leh tui dawn lou lah ahita ngal a.
09030013	David in akiang ah, “Kua na hia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Aigupta gam tangval, Amalek mi sikha ka hi. Ni thum ahita a, ka chi anat ziak in ka pu in hon nusia maimah hi.
09030014	Kereth sim gam leh Judah sim gamte ka sim ua, Kaleb sim gam leng ka sim ua, huchi in Ziklag khua leng ka hal uh,” achi hi.
09030015	David in akiang ah, “Huaite omna ah na hon pisuk thei diam?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hon that lou ding leh ka pu khut a hon pe nawn lou ding in Pathian min lou in ka kiang ah kichiam inla, huchi in huaite omna ah ka hon pisuk ding,” achi hi.
09030016	Apisukleh, ngai in, Philistia gam leh Judah gam a gallak tampi alak ziak un ankuang alui ua, ane un adawn ua mun teng ah ana om dalh phengphung uhi.
09030017	Huchi in David in nitum a pan zingsang nitaklam tan in amau asual hi. Tangval zali sangawngsau tung a tuang a taikekte kia lou ngal kuamah dam a suakta himhim a-om kei uh.
09030018	David in Amalek mite puakmang tengteng ala nawn vek a, David in azi nihte leng ahunkheta hi.
09030019	Huchi in aneu-alian in, atapate uh, atanute uh, agallak uh leh athil lak himhim bangmah tan anei kei ua, David in alaksak nawn vek hi.
09030020	David in belamhon leh ganhon tengteng ala a, gan dangte ma ah ahawl ua, “Hiaite David gallak ahi,” achi uhi.
09030021	Mi zanih abah ziak ua David zuizou nawn lou a Besor lui a a-omsakte uh kiang ah David ava tung hi. Amau David dawn ding leh akiang a omte dawn ding in apawtkhia uh. Mite kiang atun in David in amaute chibai abuk hi.
09030022	David kiang a hohte lak a migiloute leh Belial mi teng in adawng ua, “I kiang ua ahong tel louh ziak un gallak thil i va lak nawn himhimte amau i pe kei ding uh. Api ua apaitheihna ding un azite chiat uh leh atate chiat uh ahihleh api uh i phal ding uh,” achi uhi.
09030023	David in, “Unaute aw, Toupa eite hon kembitpa'n ahon piakleh eite dou dia hong kuante i khut ua hon pepa thilte huchi in hih kei un.
09030024	Kua'n ahia hiai thu a na thu uh zui ding? Kidouna a hohte tan bangmah van veng a na omte'n leng atan sam ding uh ahi; kibang vek a tan ding ahi,” achi hi.
09030025	Huai ni a pan tuni tan in Israelte a dia thupiak leh dan thuseh ding in abawlta hi.
09030026	David, Ziklag khua atun in, gallak khenkhat, hiai, Toupa melmate lak a gallak, nang a dia thilpiak, chi in Judah upate, alawmte ngei kiang ah, gallak khenkhat akhak hi.
09030027	Bethel a omte kiang ah, Ramoth sim a omte kiang ah, Jattir a omte kiang ah,
09030028	Aroer a omte kiang ah, Siphmoth a omte kiang ah, Eshtemoa a omte kiang ah;
09030029	Rakal a omte kiang ah, Jerahmeel a omte kiang ah, Kente a omte kiang ah;
09030030	Hormah a omte kiang ah, Bor-ashan a omte kiang ah, Athak a omte kiang ah;
09030031	Hebron a omte kiang ah, David leh amite tatna mun tengteng kiang ah.
09031001	Huan Philistia mite'n Israelte asual ua; Philistia mite a pan Israelte ataikek ua, Gilboa tang ah thah in a-om zelzul uhi.
09031002	Philistia mite'n Saul leh atapa adelhzui vengveng uh. Philistia mite'n Saul tapate: Jonathan, Abinadab leh Melkishua athat uhi.
09031003	Saul anak sual mahmah ua, thalkap mite'n akapkhata ua, thalkap mite'n nasatak in akapliam uhi.
09031004	Huchi in Saul in agalvan tawipa kiang ah, “Na namsau dok inla, hon sun pailet in. Huchi lou in zaw hiai zeksumlouhte ahong pai ding ua, hong sun pailet ding ua, hon bawlse kha ding uh,” achi hi. Himahleh agalvan tawipa'n ahih ut kei; alau mahmah ngal a. Huaiziak in Saul in anamsau ala a, abohkhumta hi.
09031005	Agalvan tawipa'n Saul asi chih atheih in ama'n leng anamsau abohkhum samta a, asikhawmta uh.
09031006	Huchi in Saul, atapa thumte, agalvan tawipa leh ami tengteng huai ni mah in asikhawm vek uhi.
09031007	Guam gal khat lam a Israel mi omte leh Jordan gal a omte'n Israel mite ataikek uh, chih leh Saul leh atapate asi uh chih atheih un khuate apawtkhiaksan ua, ataimangta uhi. Huchi in Philistia mite'n ava luahta uhi.
09031008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Philistiate agalthahte uh puansilh suahsak ding a ava pai uleh Saul leh atapate thum Gilboa tang a si ava mu uhi.
09031009	Alu atan ua, agalvan asuahkhiaksak ua, mite kiang leh amilimte inn a suah ding in akim ua Philistia mite gam teng ah akhak uhi.
09031010	Ashtaroth inn ah agalvan akoih ua; Beth-shan kulhbaang ah aluang atak uhi.
09031011	Jabesh-Gilead a omte'n Philistia mite'n Saul abawldan thu ana zak un,
09031012	mihangsan tengteng athou ua, zankhua in apai ua, Saul luang leh atapate luang Beth-shan kulhbaang a pan alakhia uh. Jabesh atung ua, huai ah ahal uhi.
09031013	Aguhte ala ua, Jabesh a sing nuai ah avui ua, ni sagih sung an angawl uhi.
10001001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul sih nung in Amalekte zou khin David ahong kik nawn a, Ziklag ah David ni nih a-om hi.
10001002	Hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni in, ngai in, mi khat Saul panmun a kipan apuante bohkeksa leh alu a lei kai niaunuau in ahong pai hi.
10001003	David kiang ahong tun in lei a bokkhup in zahtakna apia hi. David in akiang ah, “Koi a pan hong pai na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Israel mite panmun a pan hong taikhia ka hi,” achi hi.
10001004	David in akiang ah, “Bangchibang in thil a-om a? Hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Kidouna a pan mite ataikek ua, mi tampi puk in asi uh. Saul leh atapa Jonathan leng asi tuaktuak uh,” achi hi.
10001005	David in amah hilhpa tangval kiang ah, “Bangchi in ahia Saul leh atapa Jonathan asih uh na theih?” achi hi.
10001006	Ahilhpa tangval in, “Bangchi chi hiam in Gilboa tang ah ka na om kha zenzen hi. Ngai in, ateipi ngai a Saul dingh ka mu a, kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite'n hon naihta uhi.
10001007	Anunglam angatleh ahon mu a, hon sam hi. Ke'n, ‘Hiai ah ka om,’ chi in ka dawng hi.
10001008	Ka kiang ah, ‘Kua na hia?’ ahon chi hi. Ke'n, Amalek mi ka hi, chi in ka dawng hi.
10001009	Ama'n ka kiang ah, ‘Ka kiang ah hong dingh inla hong that mai dih, ka hing lai vanglak a, lungdonna in lah hon manta ngal a,’ achi hi.
10001010	Akiang ah ka dingh a, huchi a pukgawp khinsa, damzou nawn lou ding chih ka theih ziak in ka thatta mai hi. Alu a lallukhu leh aban a tau ka la a, ka pu kiang ah ka hon tawi hi,” achi hi.
10001011	David in apuansilhte abotkekta a, huchi mah bang in akiang a mi om tengteng in leng ahih uhi.
10001012	Saul leh atapa Jonathan leh Toupa mite leh Israel inkuante asuun ua, akah ua, nitaklam tan in an angawl ua, namsau a thah ahih ziak un.
10001013	David in amah va hilhtu tangval kiang ah, “Koilam mi na hia?” achi hi.
10001014	Ama'n, “Gamdangmi, Amalek mi tapa ka hi,” chi in adawng hi. David in akiang ah, “ Toupa thaunilh hihmang dia atung a khut khak bangchidan a lau lou na hia le?” achi hi.
10001015	David in tangval khat asam a, “Va naih inla, that in,” achi a, ama'n ava sat a, asita hi.
10001016	David in akiang ah, “Na sisan nangmah lutung ah om hen. Nangmah kam ngei in, Toupa thaunilh ka that ahi, chi a na puan tak man in,” achi hi.
10001017	David in Saul leh atapa Jonathan hiai kahtam in asuun hi:
10001018	Thalkapdan Judah suante sinsak ding in asawl a, ngai in, Jasher laibu ah hiai gelh ahi:
10001019	Aw Israel, na kilawmna mun sangte ah athat ua, na mihatte apukta uh.
10001020	Gath ah gen kei unla, Ashkelon kongzingte ah puang kei un. Huchi lou in zaw Philistia tanute akipak ding ua, zeksum louh tanute avualzou kha ding uhi.
10001021	Nou Gilboa tangte aw, na tung uah daitui leh vuah ke kei hen. Thillat dingte leng suah sam ke'n. Huai ah lah mihat lum Saul lum, thaunilh louh mi lum bang mai in giloutak in apaimang uhi.
10001022	Thah a omte sisan a pan leh mihat thau a pan Jonathan thal akik nawn kei a, Saul namsau avuak in akik nawn kei hi.
10001023	Saul leh Jonathan hindan adeihhuai in akilawm a, asih un leng akikhen kei uh. Mupite sang in ahatzaw ua, humpinelkaite sang in ahatzaw uhi.
10001024	Nou Israel tanute aw, Saul kah un, puansan kilawmte na tung uah abaang a, na puan uah dangka-eng a zephoihnate hon koihsakpa ahi.
10001025	Kidou laitak a mihatte apuk maizen uh! Aw, Jonathan, na mun sangte ah nang ahon thatta uhi.
10001026	Ka unaupa Jonathan, na tungthu ah ka lungzing petmah hi. Ka tung ah na hoih mahmah a, N'on itna alamdang a, numei itna akhup hi.
10001027	Mihatte apuk ua, kidouna galvante leng amangthang khinta!
10002001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in David in, “Judah gam a khua khatpeuh ah ka hohtou diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hohtou in,” achi hi. David in, “Koi ah ahia ka hohtouh ding?” achi a, Ama'n, “Hebron ah,” achi hi.
10002002	Huchi in David, azi nihte, Jezreel mi Ahinoam leh Karmel mi Nabal zi Abigail toh huai ah ahohtou hi.
10002003	David in akiang a om mi tengteng apitou a, michih a-inkuante chiat uh toh, Hebron khuate ah atengta uhi.
10002004	Judah gam a mite ahong hoh ua, huai ah Judah inkote tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi. Huchi in “Saul vui mite Jabesh-gilead mite ahi uh,” chi in David ahilh uhi.
10002005	Jabesh-gilead mite kiang ah David in mite asawl a, akiang uah, “Na pu uh Saul na hehpihdan uh hihlang a na vui ziak un, Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen.
10002006	Tu in Toupa'n na tung uah zahngaihna leh thutak langsak henla; hiai thil na hih ziak un ke'n leng na chit man uh ka hon thuk ding.
10002007	Huaiziak in tu in na khutte uh hong hat henla, hangsantak in om un. Na pu uh Saul asita hi. Judah inkote'n atung ua kumpipa ding in thau ahon nilh khinta uhi,” chi in ava gensak hi.
10002008	Himahleh Ner tapa Abner, Saul sepaihte heutu in, Mahanaim ah Saul tapa Ishboshet apaipih hi.
10002009	Gilead, Ashur, Jezreel, Ephraim leh Israel tengteng tung a kumpipa in abawlta hi.
10002010	Saul tapa Ishboshet in Israel tung a vaihawm apat in kum sawmli a upa ahi a, kum nih sung vai ahawm hi. Himahleh Judah mite'n David azui uh.
10002011	David in Hebron a Judah chite tung ah kum sagih leh kha guk vai ahawm hi.
10002012	Ner tapa Abner leh Saul tapa Ishboshet sikhate Mahanaim a pan apawtkhia ua, Gibeon ah apai uhi.
10002013	Zeruiah tapa Joab leh David sikhate apaikhia ua, Gibeon dil ah akituak uhi. Pawl khat dil gal khat lam ah atu a, pawl khat pen dil gal langkhat ah atu hi.
10002014	Abner in Joab kiang ah, “Tangvalte hong kuan uhenla, i ma uah hong kisual uhen,” achi hi. Joab in, “Hong kuan le uh ake,” achi hi.
10002015	Huchi in akuan ua, azah chiang sep in agalkah phei ua, Benjamin chi, Saul tapa Ishboshet lam a pang sawm-le-nih, David sikha sawm-le-nih ahi uh.
10002016	Alangte uh lu chiat ah akimantuah ua, amau tumte chiat namsau in anak ah akidawt ua; apukkhawm vek uhi. Huaiziak in huai mun Helkath-hazzurim achi ua, huai Gibeon a om ahi.
10002017	Huai ni a akisual uh athupi mahmah a, David sikhate ma ah Abner leh Israel mite zoh in a-om uhi.
10002018	Huai mun ah Zeruiah tapate thum, Joab, Abishai leh Asahel a-om uhi. Asahel zukpi bang a ngalhat ahi.
10002019	Asahel in Abner adelh a; Abner adelh taklam hiam veilam hiam a pialsan het lou in adelh vengveng hi.
10002020	Abner alehngat a, “Nang na hi maw, Asahel?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Ka hi,” achi hi.
10002021	Abner in akiang ah, “Na taklam hiam, na veilam hiam ah pialkhia inla, tangval khat man inla, agalvan laksak in,” achi hi. Himahleh Asahel in amah adelh apialsan nuam tuan kei hi.
10002022	Abner in Asahel kiang ah, “Hon pialsan in. Bangziak a lei a hon satpuk ding ka hia? Na unaupa Joab mel ka mu ngam dia hia?” achi nawn hi.
10002023	Himahleh apial nuam tuan kei. Huaiziak in Abner in ateipi tolam in anakguh ngana nuaitak asun a, anunglam ah teipi apaisuak a, huai mun a puk in asita hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Asahel puk a, asihna mun a hong pai teng huai mun ah akhawl zel uhi.
10002024	Himahleh, Joab leh Abishai in Abner adelhzui ua; Gibeon gamdai lampi a Giah chin a Ammah mual atun un ni atumta hi.
10002025	Benjamin suante Abner kiang ah akikaikhawm ua, pawl khat in akibawl ua, mualvum ah ava dinghta uh.
10002026	Abner in Joab asam a, “Namsau in hon negai den ding hia? Atawplam in ahong kha mahmah ding, chih na thei kei maw? Bang tan ahia a-unaute uh delh tawpsan a kik nawn dia mipite hilh lou a na om ding?” achi hi.
10002027	Joab in, “Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Bangmah na gen lou hi lechin zingchiang a pan mite paimang khinta ding ua, a-unaute uh delh lou ding hi ve un,” achi hi.
10002028	Joab in pengkul amut a, mite adingh depdup uh. Israel mite adelhta kei ua, kuamah asual nawnta kei uhi.
10002029	Abner leh amite zankhua in phaizang tawnsuak a pai in Jordan akan ua, Bithron akantan ua, Mahanaim atung uhi.
10002030	Joab bel Abner delh akik nawnta a, mipi tengteng akaihkhawm vek leh David sikhate sawm-le-kua leh Asahel akimta kei uhi.
10002031	Himahleh David sikhate'n Benjamin mite leh Abner mite zathum-le-sawmguk athat uhi.
10002032	Asahel luang ala ua, Bethlehem a apa han ah avui uh. Joab leh amite zankhua in apai ua, khovak in Hebron atung uhi.
10003001	Saul inkuante leh David inkuante sawtpi akidou ua; David in hatlam amanoh a, Saul inkuante'n hat louh lam amanoh uhi.
10003002	David in Hebron ah tapate anei a, ata masapen, Amnon, Jezreel mi Ahinoam lak a ahi.
10003003	Azom Kileab, Karmel mi Nabal zi Abigail lak a ahi. Athumna Absalom, Geshur kumpipa Talmai tanu Maakah tapa ahi.
10003004	Alina Adonijah, Haggith tapa ahi a; angana Shephatiah, Abital tapa.
10003005	Agukna Ithream, David zi Eglah lak a ahi. Hiai teng David tapa Hebron a piangte ahi uh.
10003006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul inkuante leh David inkuante akidou sung un Saul inkuante a ding in Abner akihatsak semsem hi.
10003007	Saul in mei anei a, amin Rizpah ahi. Amah Aiah tanu ahi. Ishboshet in Abner kiang ah, “Bangziak a ka pa mei kithuahpih na hia?” achi hi.
10003008	Ishboshet thugen in Abner ahehsak mahmah hi. Judahte ui lutang leltak ka hi a hia? Tuni tan in na pa Saul inkuante leh a-unaute leh alawmte tung ah zahngaihna ka hihlang a, David khut ah ka hon pe kei hi. Hinapi a nang hiai numei tung a khial a na hon ngoh mawk!
10003009	Pathian in Abner alohloh in loh henla, huai sang a sezaw in leng. David kiang a Toupa akichiam bang a, huchibang ngei atung a ka hih keileh.
10003010	Saul inkuante lak a pan agam laksak ding, Israel leh Judahte tung a Dan a pan a Beer-sheba tan a David laltutphah tunding ding.
10003011	Huchi in ama'n Abner alau mahmah ziak in dawn himhim leng adawng thei kei hi.
10003012	Abner in amah sik in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Hiai gam kua a ahia? Ka kiang ah thu khung in. Huchi in ngai in, Israel mi tengteng na lam a pang ding in ka khut nang lam ah apang ding,” chi in ava gensak hi.
10003013	Ama'n, “Hi hen. Na kiang ah thu ka khung ding. Himahleh na tung ah thil khat ka hon phut hi. Huai tuh hiai ahi. Hong mu ding a na hong pai chiang in Saul tanu Mikal na hon pi phot keileh ka mel na mu thei kei ding,” achi hi.
10003014	David in Saul tapa Ishboshet kiang ah, “Philistia mite zekvun zakhat a ka leisa, ka zi Mikal hon pia in,” chi ding in mi asawl hi.
10003015	Ishboshet in mi asawl a, apasal Laish tapa Paltiel mahmah a pan apita hi.
10003016	Apasal in kap kawm in Bahurim tan anung azui zel hi. Abner in akiang ah, “Pai in, kik nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in akik nawnta hi.
10003017	Abner in Israel upate ahoupih a, “Tuma siah David na kumpipa ding un na zong uh.
10003018	Tu in na kumpipa un bawl un. Toupa'n David tungtang thu ah, ka sikha David khut in ka mi Israelte Philistia mite khut a pan leh amelma teng khut a pan ka hunkhe ding ana chi,” achi hi.
10003019	Abner in Benjamin mite bil a zak in agen hi. Israel mite leh Benjamin inkuan tengteng in hoih asak bangbang un Hebron a David bil a zak dia gen ding in Abner ahoh hi.
10003020	Abner leh amite sawmnih Hebron a David kiang ah apai uhi. David in Abner leh akiang a mi sawmnihte a ding in ankuang alui hi.
10003021	Abner in David kiang ah, “Ka thou ding a, na kiang a thu akhuntheihna ding un leh na deihthusam bangtak a vai na hawmtheihna ding in Israel mi tengteng ka toupa kiang a kaikhawm ding in ka kuan ding,” achi hi. David in Abner asawlkhia a, lungmuangtak in akuanta hi.
10003022	Ngai in, David mite leh Joab galdou zou ahong tung ua, gallak tampi ahon pua uh. Himahleh Abner bel Hebron a David kiang ah ana om nawn kei hi. Ana paikiksak khinta a, amah leng lungmuangtak in ana paita hi.
10003023	Joab leh akiang a mipi tengteng ahong tun un, Ner tapa Abner kumpipa kiang ah ahoh hi. Ama'n ana paisak nawn khin a, “Lungmuangtak in apai nawnta,” chi in Joab ahilh uhi.
10003024	Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Ngai in, Abner na kiang ah ahong a, bangziak a paimangsak a, apaimang vengveng mawk?
10003025	Ner tapa Abner na thei a, nang hong khem ding a na pawt lam leh na lut lam leh na thilhih peuhmah theih tum a hong pai ahi,” achi hi.
10003026	David kiang a pan Joab ahong pawtkhiak in Abner delh ding in mi asawl hi. Sirah a tuileh a pan ava pikik uh. Himahleh David in athei kei hi.
10003027	Hebron a Abner ahong tun in Joab in sim houpih ding in kulh kongpi ah apituam hi. A-unaupa Asahel sisan pawt thukna ding in anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt a, huchi in asita hi.
10003028	Anung a David in azak in, “Ner tapa Abner sisan thu ah kei mahleh ka gam Toupa mitmuh in tangtawn in ka siang uh.
10003029	Joab lutung ah kia henla; apa inkote tengteng tung ah toh. Joab inkote lak ah meima sia vei hiam, phak natna nei hiam, chiangkhun ngai a pai hiam, namsau a si hiam, kial thuak hiam kitatlak lou in hong om hen,” achi hi.
10003030	Huchi in a-unaupa uh Asahel Gibeon a kidouna a athah ziak in Joab leh a-unau Abishai in Abner athat uhi.
10003031	David in Joab leh akiang a mi om tengteng kiang ah, “Na puante uh botkek unla, sai-ip puan silh unla, Abner suun in ama ah pai un,” achi hi. David in leng siluang azui hi.
10003032	Hebron ah Abner avui ua, kumpipa'n a-aw suakkhesak in Abner han ah akap a, mipi tengteng leng akap uhi.
10003033	Kumpipa'n Abner akah a: “Abner, mihai sih in asi dia hia?
10003034	Na khut hen ahi kei a, na khete leng sikkol butsak ahi sam kei. Migiloute ma a mi apuk bang a na puk maizen? achi hi.” Mi tengteng in akah nawn uhi.
10003035	Huchi in sun ahih lai in mi tengteng David an nesak ding in ahong pai uh. Himahleh David in, “Nitum ma a an nek hiam, thil dang hiam leng ka nekleh Pathian in alohloh hon loh hen; huai sang a sezaw in leng,” chi in akichiam hi.
10003036	Mi tengteng in huai atheih un akipak mahmah uh. Kumpipa thilhih peuhmah in mite akipaksak hi.
10003037	Mi tengteng leh Israel mi tengteng in huai ni in Ner tapa Abner thah ahih kumpipa thu ahi kei chih athei uhi.
10003038	Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Tuni in Israel milian, mithupitak asi, chih thei lou na hi uh maw?
10003039	Kumpipa dia thaunilh himah leng, tuni in ka hat kei hi. Hiai Zeruiah tapate kei a ding in athuakhak lua uh. Toupa'n thil hoih lou hihmi agitlouh dungzui zel in thuk hen,” achi hi.
10004001	Huan Saul tapa Ishboshet in Hebron ah Abner asi chih ana zak in akhutte ahong hat kei ua, Israel mi tengteng apatau uhi.
10004002	Saul tapa Ishboshet in sepaih pawl heutu nih anei hi. Khat min Baanah ahi a, adang min Rekab ahi. Amau Benjamin suan Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate ahi uh. Beeroth bel Benjamin nam a simtel a ngaih ahi.
10004003	Beeroth a mite Gittaim ah atai ua, tuni tan in huai ah ateng uhi.
10004004	Saul tapa Jonathan in tapa khebai anei hi. Jezreel a pan Saul leh Jonathan tanchin ana theih in kum nga a upa ahi. Amah donnu in apom a, ataimangpih hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, taimang dia akintatna lam in akesak a, akhe hong baita hi. Ama min Mephibosheth ahi.
10004005	Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate Rekab leh Baanah apai ua, Ishboshet inn ah sun nisat laitak a lupna a alup lai in akiang ah ahoh uhi.
10004006	Huit buh la ding hileh kilawm in insung lam ah alut ua, anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt ua, huchi in Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah ataimang uhi.
10004007	Inn ava lut un alupna dantan a lupna a lum lai ava dawt ua, athat ua, alu atan ua, alu ala uh. Arabah kantan in zankhua in apaimang uhi.
10004008	Ishboshet lu Hebron ah David kiang ah ahon pua ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, nang hon thah tum, na melma Saul tapa Ishboshet lu hiai ah a-om; Toupa'n ka toupa phu Saul leh asuante tung ah tuni in alaksakta,” achi uhi.
10004009	David in Beeroth mi Rimmon tapa Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah adawng a, akiang uah, “ Toupa ka mangbatna tengteng a hon tanpa ahin bang in ka gen ahi.
10004010	Tanchinhoih hon tun akisep in, ‘Ngai in, Saul asita, chi a mi khat in ahon hilh lai in, amah ka man a, Ziklag ah ka that hi’. Huai atanchinhoih hon puakman a ka na piak ahi.
10004011	Midiktat, ama insung a ama lupna tung ngei a lum, migilou in athah uh sisan man na tung uah ka hon phut nawn sem dia, leitung a pan alamang kei dia hia?” achi hi.
10004012	Huchi in David in atangvalte thu apia a, amaute athat uh. Akhutte uleh akhete uh atansak ua, Hebron a dil tung ah akhai uhi. Ishboshet lu bel ala ua, Hebron a Abner han ah avui uhi.
10005001	Huchi in Israel chi tengteng Hebron a David kiang ah ahong pai ua, “Ngai in, na guh leh na sa ka hi uh.
10005002	Hun paisa in leng Saul ka tung ua kumpipa ahih lai a leng Israelte pikhia leh pilutpa na hi. Toupa'n na kiang ah, ka mi Israelte na vak dia, Israelte tung ah heutu in na om ding, achi,” achi uhi.
10005003	Israel upa tengteng Hebron ah kumpipa kiang ah ahoh uh. Kumpipa David in Hebron ah Toupa ma ah amau toh thu akhung hi. Huchi in Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi.
10005004	Vai ahawm pat tung in David kum sawmthum a upa ahi a, kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi.
10005005	Hebron ah Judahte tung ah kum sagih leh kha guk vai ahawm a; Jerusalem ah Israelte leh Judah tengteng tung ah kum sawmthum-le-thum vai ahawm hi.
10005006	Kumpipa leh amite huai gam a teng Jebus mite sim ding in Jerusalem ah ahoh uhi. Huai mite'n David ahong lut theih louh gingta in, David kiang ah, “Hiai ah na hong lut het kei ding. Mittaw leh khebaite'n hon na dal ding uh,” achi uhi.
10005007	Himahleh David in Zion kulhpi alazou a, huai tuh David khopi ahi.
10005008	David in huai ni in, “Jebus mi sual peuhmahte tuiluanna ah paitou uhenla, David mudah khebai leh mittawte that uheh,” achi hi. Huaiziak in ahi, “Mittaw leh khebaite inn ah ahong lut kei ding uh,” achih uh.
10005009	Huchi in David kulh ah ateng a, David khua achi uhi. David in Millo a pan akimvel leh asunglam ah kulh abawl hi.
10005010	David in Toupa , Sepaihte' Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in thupi lam amanoh zel hi.
10005011	Tura kumpipa Hiram in David kiang ah mi asawl a, sidar singte akhak a, khutsiamte leh suangseksiamte asawl a, David a ding in inn alamsak uhi.
10005012	David in Toupa'n amah Israel mite tung a kumpipa ding in akipsak a, ami Israelte ziak in alalgam atawisang chih athei hi.
10005013	David in Hebron apawtsan nung in Jerusalem a pan mei leh zi aneih behlap hi. Huchi in David in tapate leh tanute anei nawn lai hi.
10005014	Jerusalem a aneihte min hiaite ahi: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan leh Solomon,
10005015	Ibhar, Elishua, Nepheg leh Japhia,
10005016	Elishama, Eliada leh Eliphalet.
10005017	Himahleh Israel mite kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uh chih Philistia mite'n azak un Philistia mi tengteng David zong ding in ahohtou uh. David in ana za a, kulh sung ah apaisuk hi.
10005018	Philistia mite Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi.
10005019	David in, “Philistia mite sual ding in ka hohtou diam? Amaute ka khut ah na hon pe diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Toupa'n David kiang ah, “Hohtou in. Philistia mite na khut ah ka hon pe ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
10005020	Huchi in David Baal-perazim ah ahoh a, huai ah David in amaute asual a, “ Toupa'n ka melmate tuichin khah bang mai in ka ma ah ahon hihdalhsakta,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min, “Baal-perazim,” asa hi.
10005021	Huai ah amilimte uh anusia ua, David leh amite'n ahal uhi.
10005022	Philistia mite apaitou nawn ua, Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi.
10005023	David in Toupa adotleh Ama'n, “Hohtou ke'n. Anunglam uah khelh inla, singtheimi kung zawn ah sual in.
10005024	Hichi ahi ding, singtheimi lek a pai husa na zakleh gamtang in. Philistia sepaihte sual ding in na ma ah Toupa akuankheta chihna ahi,” achi hi.
10005025	Huchi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in David in ahih a; Philistia mite Geba a pan Gazer tan in asual hi.
10006001	David in Israel mite lak a mi teltuam singthum akaikhawm nawn hi.
10006002	Huchi in David athou a, Judah gam a Baale a pan cherubte tung a tuang sepaihte' Toupa min aputsak uh Pathian bawm latou ding in akiang a mi om tengteng toh akuan uhi.
10006003	Pathian bawm kangtalai thak ah akoih ua, mual tung a om Abinadab inn a pan alakhia uh. Abinadab tapa Uzzah leh Ahio in kangtalai thak ahawl uhi.
10006004	Abinadab inn a pan Pathian bawm alakhia ua; Pathian bawm ma ah Ahio apai hi.
10006005	David leh Israel mi tengteng in Toupa ma ah thil ging thei chi tuamtuam meilah sing a bawl leh kaihgingte, pekgingte, khuangtate, pengkul bineite, dakkhutbette atum uhi.
10006006	Nakon a buhphual atun un, bawng in ahoisak ziak in Uzzah in Pathian bawm asawk a, alen hi.
10006007	Uzzah tung ah Toupa hehna akuang a, athilhihdiklouh ziak in Pathian in huai ah athat a, Pathian bawm kiang ah asita hi.
10006008	Toupa hehna Uzzah tung a apuahzak ziak in David alungkim kei a, huai mun Perez-uzzah asa a, tuni tan in ahi lai hi.
10006009	Huai ni in David in Toupa alauta hi. “Bangchi in Toupa bawm ka kiang ahong tung theita dia?” achi hi.
10006010	David in Toupa bawm David khua a amah kiang ah asuan nuam kei hi. Himahleh David in Git mi Obed-edom inn ah akoih zawta hi.
10006011	Git mi Obed-edom inn ah kha thum Toupa bawm a-om hi. Huchi in Obed-edom leh a-inkuan tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl hi.
10006012	“Pathian bawm ziak in, Obed-edom inkuan leh aneih-le-lam tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl,” chi in kumpipa David ahilh uh. Huchi in David in Obed-edom inn a pan Pathian bawm, David ah kipaktak in ava lata hi.
10006013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm zawng mite'n kal guk asuantak un bawngtal leh gan vak thau alan hi.
10006014	Toupa ma ah atheihtawp in David alam a, puanmalngat puanak asilh hi.
10006015	Huchi in David leh Israel mi tengteng in kikou zuazua leh pengkul mut kawm in Toupa bawm alatouta uhi.
10006016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm David khua a alut lai in, Saul tanu Mikal in tohlet a pan ana en a, Toupa ma a David tawm leh lam amu a, alungtang in asimmohta hi.
10006017	Huchi in Toupa bawm alalut ua, akoihna dia David in akaih, puanin sung a amun ding ah akoihta uhi. David in Toupa ma ah halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi.
10006018	David in halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alat khit in sepaihte' Toupa min in mite avualzawl hi.
10006019	Mi tengteng anumei apasal michih tanghou phel khat leh sa bak khat leh grep gah phoukeu bawm khat chiat apia hi. Huchi in michih ama inn lam chiat ah apaita uh.
10006020	Hiai zoh in a-inkuante vualzawl ding in David apaikik hi. David dawn ding in Saul tanu Mikal ahong pawt a, “Tuni in Israel kumpipa thupi hi na mai e, migina lou, zumna thei lou kisuahkhete bang mai in tuni in asikha nungakte mitmuh in akisuahkhia a,” ana chi hi.
10006021	David in Mikal kiang ah, “Na pa leh a-inkuante tengteng sang a kei hon tel, Toupa , Israelte tung a kumpipa dia hon seppa Toupa ma ah ahi ka lam. Huaiziak in Toupa ma ah nuamsa in ka om ding hi.
10006022	Hiai sang mah in leng ka zumpihhuai lai ding. Keimah mitmuh in leng ka sithuai lai ding. Himahleh huai sikha nungak na gente pahtawi in ka om ding,” achi hi.
10006023	Huchi in Saul tanu Mikal in asih ni tanpha in ta anei kei hi.
10007001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa a-inn a om a, Toupa'n akimvel a melmate tengteng a pan galmuang a a-omsak nung in;
10007002	Kumpipa'n zawlnei Nathan kiang ah, “Tu in en in kei sidar sing inn ah ka teng a, himahleh Pathian bawm puanin ah a-om,” achi hi.
10007003	Nathan in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na lungsim a om bangtak in va hih in, na kiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi.
10007004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai zan mah in Nathan kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
10007005	“Ka sikha David va hilh in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ka tenna ding inn na hon lamsak ding maw?’ ”
10007006	Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak a pan tuni tan in inn ah ka teng kei a, puanin ah leh biakbuk ah ka teng zaw hi.
10007007	Israel suante lak a ka paina tengteng ah leng, ka mi Israel vak dia thu ka piak vaihawmte kiang ah, “Bangziak a sidar sing a inn hon lamsak lou?” chi in ka gen ngei a hia?
10007008	Huaiziak in ka sikha David kiang ah, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Belam tatna mun a pan belam na ven lai in ka mi Israel mite tung a heutu ding in ka hon la hi.
10007009	Na hohna peuh ah na kiang ah ka om zel a, na ma ah na melmate ka hihmang zel hi. Lei a mithupitakte bang in min thupitak ka hon bawlsak hi.
10007010	Hiai ban ah ka mi Israelte a ding in mun ka sep dia, amau ka suan ding a, amau mun mah ah ateng ding ua, tuma lam bang in gitlouhna tate'n ahihbuai nawn kei ding uh.
10007011	Na melmate tengteng lak a pan ka hon khawlsak hi. Huai lou him in Toupa'n inn ka hon bawlsak ding, chi in ahon hilh hi.
10007012	Na ni abei a na pute kiang a na lup chiang in, na nung a na suan na gil a gah ding ka tungding ding a, agam ka hihkip ding.
10007013	Ama'n ka min a ding in inn alam dia, agam laltutphah tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding.
10007014	Apa ka hi ding a, amah ka tapa ahi ding. Thil ahihkhelhleh, mihing chiang leh mihing tapate khetna in ka thunun ding.
10007015	Himahleh, na ma a ka suanmang Saul kiang a pan ka lakmang bang in ka zahngaihna in ahon paisan kei ding hi.
10007016	Na inkuan leh na gam tangtawn a hihkip ngiungeu ahi dia, na laltutphah lah tangtawn in hihkip ahi ding,” chi in.
10007017	Huai thute tengteng bang zel leh huai kilakna bang geih in Nathan in David kiang ah agen hi.
10007018	Huchi in kumpipa David alut a, Toupa ma ah atu hi, “Toupa Pathian aw, kua ahia ka hih a, ka inkuante bang ahia ahih uh, hiai tantan na hon pi?
10007019	Toupa Pathian aw, huaite leng nang mitmuh in thil bangmah tham ahi kei uh. Himahleh na sikha inkuan omdan ding thu kum tampi sung a ding in leng na gen khinta hi. Toupa Pathian aw, hiaite mihing hihdan ahi a hia?
10007020	David in na kiang ah bang agen nawn tuan dia? Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha lah na thei vek ngal a.
10007021	Na sikha theih ding in na thu ziak leh nangmah lungtang bang zel in hiai thil thupi tengteng na hihta hi.
10007022	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian aw, nang na thupi hi. Ka bil ua ka zak bang un nang bang kuamah a-om kei a, nangmah lou ngal Pathian a-om kei hi.
10007023	Aigupta gam a pan leh namte leh apathiante ua pan tankhia a, min bawlsak ding leh na gam a dia na mite ma a thil thupitak leh thil lauhuaitak hih ding na mi Israelte bang leitung ah namdang kua a-om a?
10007024	Huchi in Israel mite tangtawn a na mite ahong hihtheihna ding un nang a ding in na hihkipta hi. Toupa , nang a Pathian uh na hong hita hi.
10007025	“Huchi in Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha tungtang thu leh a-inkuante tungtang thu na gen tangtawn a ding in hihkip inla, na gensa bang in hih in.
10007026	Sepaihte' Toupa Israelte' Pathian ahi, chi in na min tangtawn in pahtawi in om hen. Huchi in na sikha David inkuante na ma ah hihkip in a-om ding uhi.
10007027	Sepaihte' Toupa aw, Israel Pathian, na sikha kiang ah, inkuan ka hon phuhsak ding, chi in lah na puangta ngal a. Huaiziak in na sikha in hiai thumna na kiang ka hon tun ngam hi.
10007028	“Tu in Toupa Pathian aw, nang huai Pathian na hi a, na thu dik hen, hiai thil hoih na sikha kiang ah na chiamta hi.
10007029	Huaiziak in tu in na sikha inkuante na ma a tangtawn a a-om gige theihna ding un vualzawl in. Toupa Pathian aw, nang lah na genta ngal a. Na vualzawlna in na sikha inkuante tangtawn in vualzawl in om uhen,” achi hi.
10008001	Huan huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David in Philistia mite sual in azou hi. Huchi in David in Philistia mite khut a pan Metheg-ammah alaksak hi.
10008002	Moab mite asual a, lei a lumsak in khau in ateh a; vual nih athat a, vual khat bel ahinghawi hi. Huchi in Moab mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, thilpiakte ahon tawi uhi.
