10008003	David in Euphrates Luipi a, gam la nawn dia hoh in Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer leng athat hi.
10008004	Huchi in David in asakol tungtuangmi sangkhat-le-zasagih leh lei sepaih singnih amatsak hi. Huchi in kangtalai kai ding zakhat chih louh sakol tengteng athagui uh asattansak hi.
10008005	Damaskas a Siria mite Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer huh dia kuante David in Siria mite lak a mi singnih-le-sangnih athat hi.
10008006	Huchi in David in Siria gam a Damaskas ah sepaih akoih hi. Siria mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, siah aliau uhi. Toupa'n ahohna peuh ah David avualzousak zel hi.
10008007	David in Hadadezer pawlte dangka-eng lumte alaksak a, Jerusalem ah apaipih hi.
10008008	Hadadezer khopite Betah leh Berothai a pan David in dal tampi ala hi.
10008009	Hamath kumpipa Toi in Hadadezer sepaih tengteng David in azou chih azak in,
10008010	Hadadezer asual a, azou chih azak in chibai buk ding leh vualzawl ding in Toi in David kiang ah atapa Joram asawl a; David in lah Hadadezer dou in ana that khinta hi. Huchi in Joram in dangka belte, dangka-eng belte leh dal belte ahon tawi hi.
10008011	Huaite leh namdang azoh tengteng a pan alak dangka leh dangka-eng kumpipa David in Toupa kiang ah alan hi:
10008012	Siriate, Moabte, Ammon suante, Philistiate, Amalekte leh Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer a kipan agallakte.
10008013	David in Chi Phaizang ah Siria mi singkhat-le-sanggiat ava that a, apailam in aminthangta hi.
10008014	Edom ah sepaih akoih a; Edom gam teng ah sepaih akoih hi. Huchi in Edom mi tengteng David sikha ahong hita uh. Huchi in Toupa'n David apaina peuh ah avualzousak hi.
10008015	Huchi in David in Israel mi tengteng tung ah vai ahawm a; David in ami tengteng tung ah diktattak in vai ahawm hi.
10008016	Zeruiah tapa Joab sepaih heutupen ahi. Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat bel tanchin gelhpa ahi.
10008017	Ahitub tapa Zadok leh Abiathar tapa Ahimelek siampute ahi ua; Seraiah bel laigelhmi ahi.
10008018	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi ua, David tapate bel vaihawmtu liante ahi uh.
10009001	David in, “Jonathan ziak a hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai a-om hia?” achi hi.
10009002	Saul inkote sikha khat amin Ziba a-om hi. David kiang a hoh ding in asam uhi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Ziba na hi hia?” achi a; ama'n, “Na sikha amah ka hi,” achi hi.
10009003	Kumpipa'n, “Pathian hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai om lou uhia?” achi hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jonathan in tapa khat anei lai a, amah khebai ahi,” achi hi.
10009004	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Koi a om ahia?” achi hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Lo-debar ah Amiel tapa Makir inn ah a-om,” achi hi.
10009005	Huchi in kumpipa David in mi asawl a, Lo-debar a pan Ammiel tapa Makir inn a pan mi ava pisak hi.
10009006	David kiang ah Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Amai a lei si in zahtakna apia hi. David in, “Mephibosheth,” achi a; ama'n, “En in, na sikha,” chi in adawng hi.
10009007	David in akiang ah, “Lau ke'n. Na pa Jonathan ziak in hehpihna ka hon musak ngeingei ding. Na pu Saul gam tengteng ka hon pe nawn dia, ka dohkan ah an na ne gige ding,” achi hi.
10009008	Huchi in akun a, “Ui sisa bang lel na hon limsak, kei na sikha bang ka hi a?” achi hi.
10009009	Kumpipa'n Saul sikha Ziba asam a, akiang ah, “Saul thil neih tengteng leh a-inkote thil tengteng na pu tapa ka pe vek hi.
10009010	Amah a ding in lei na lehsak dia, nang leh na tapate leh na sikhate teng in na pu tapa in nek ding aneihtheihna ding in na sepkhiakte na hon la ding. Na pu tapa Mephibosheth in bel ka dohkan ah an a-um gige ding,” achi hi. Ziba in tapa sawm-le-nga leh sikha sawmnih anei hi.
10009011	Huchi in Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa ka toupa'n asikha thu apiak bang zel in na sikha in ahih ding,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mephibosheth in ka dohkan ah kumpipa tapa bang in an a-um ding,” achi hi.
10009012	Mephibosheth in tapa naupang anei a, amin Mika ahi. Ziba inn a om tengteng Mephibosheth sikhate ahi uh.
10009013	Huchi in kumpipa dohkan a an a-um gige ziak in Jerusalem ah Mephibosheth atengta hi; amah akhe lang tuak bai ahi.
10010001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in Ammon suante kumpipa asi a, atapa Hanun in amun ah vai ahawm hi.
10010002	David in, “Apa'n hon na hehpih bang in ke'n leng Nahash tapa Hanun ka hehpih sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in apa tungtang thu a lungmuan ding in amah mite asawl a, huchi in David mite Ammon suante gam ava tung uhi.
10010003	Himahleh Ammon suante makaite'n atoupa uh Hanun kiang ah, “David in na pa azahtak ziak a na kiang a lungmuanmi hon sawl hi in na um a hia? David in na mite khuate ahong hihsiatna dia zongkhe ding leh enkhe dia hon sawl ahi kei a hia?” achi uhi.
10010004	Huchi in Hanun in David mite aman a, akhamul langkhat uh ametsak a, apuansilhte uh alaitak ah ataw uh phazou lel in atansak a, asawlkheta hi.
10010005	David ahilhtak un, amau dawn ding mi asawl hi; amau lah azum mahmah ngal ua. Kumpipa'n, “Na khamul uh asau nawn ma in Jeriko ah om tadih unla, huai nung in hong paikik un,” achi hi.
10010006	Ammon suante'n David huat lam ana hihta uh, chih atheih un, Ammon suante'n Beth-rehob a Siriate leh Zobah a Siriate sepaih singnih leh kumpipa Maka mi sangkhat, Tob mite singkhat-le-sangnih toh thukhak in aguai uhi.
10010007	David in huai azak in Joab leh sepaih hangsan tengteng asawl hi.
10010008	Ammon suante ahong kuan ua, kholutna kongkhak lam ah panmun akhoh uh. Zobah a mite leh Rehob a Siriate leh Tob leh Maakahte bel atuam in loubuk ah a-om uhi.
10010009	Huchi in amalam uh leh anunglam uah ahon sual ding uh chih Joab in atheih in, Israel mite lak a mihoih tata atelkhia a, Siria mite sual ding in panmun ana khoh hi.
10010010	Midang tengteng a-unaupa Abishai khut ah akoih vek a, Ammon suante sual ding in panmun akhoh hi.
10010011	“Siria mite ka zoh kei dingleh, nang na hon huh dia, Ammon suante na zoh kei dingleh ke'n ka hon huh ding hi.
10010012	Hangtak in om unla, i mite leh i Pathian khua hum in i kipasalsak ding uh. Toupa'n hoih asak bangbang in hih hen,” achi hi.
10010013	Huchi in Joab leh akiang a mite'n Siria mite sual ding in kidouna mun anaih ua; ama uah ataikek uhi.
10010014	Ammon suante'n Siria mite ataikek uh chih atheih un amau leng Abishai ma ah ataikek samta ua, khosung ah alut uhi. Joab in Ammon suante akiksan a, Jerusalem ah apaita hi.
10010015	Siria mite'n Israelte ma ah thah in a-om uh chih akitheih un akikaikhawm uhi.
10010016	Hadadezer in mi asawl a, Lui khen lam a Siria mite apikhia a, Hadadezer sepaih heutu Shobak in ma kai in lehlam ah ahong pai uhi.
10010017	Huai David ahilh ua, ama'n Israel mi tengteng asamkhawm a, Jordan lui kan in Helam ah apai uhi. David dou ding in Siria mite'n panmun khoh in ahong dou uhi.
10010018	Israelte ma ah Siria mite ataikek ua, David in Siria mi kangtalai zasagih tung a tuang leh sakol tungtuangmi singli athat a, asepaih heutu uh Shobak leng athat a, huai ah asita hi.
10010019	Huchi in Hadadezer sikha a om kumpipa tengteng in Israelte ma ah tamtak thah ahi uh chih atheih un, Israelte toh kilemna abawl ua, asikha un a-omta uh. Huchi in Siria mite'n Ammon suante apanpih ngam nawn kei uhi.
10011001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum ahong kivei a, kumpipate galdou dia akuankhiak lai un, David in Joab leh asikhate tengteng asawl a, Ammon suante ahihmang ua, Rabbah khua a-umkhum uhi. Himahleh David bel Jerusalem ah a-om nilouh hi.
10011002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitaklam ninem in alupna a pan David athoukhia a, kumpipa' inn tung ah akahtou hi. Inn tung a pan numei khat kisil lai amu hi. Huai numei bel melhoihtak ahi.
10011003	David in huai numei tanchin dongtel ding in mi asawl hi. Huai mi in, “Eliam tanu, Bathsheba, Hit mi Uriah zi ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
10011004	David in thupote asawl a, ava pita uh. Akiang ahong tung a, ana kithuahpihta hi. Asianlouhna a pan siansak khit ahita hi, huchi in a-inn ah paikikta hi.
10011005	Huchi in numei ahong gaita a, “Nau ka paita,” chi in David atheisak hi.
10011006	David in Joab kiang ah, “Hit mi Uriah ka kiang ah hon sawl in,” chi in athukhak hi. Joab in David kiang ah Uriah asawlta hi.
10011007	Uriah akiang atun in David in, “Joab leh mite bang achi ua, kidouna ah bang achi ua?” chi in adong hi.
10011008	David in Uriah kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na khete va sil in,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa' inn a pan Uriah apawtkhia a, kumpipa'n an nek ding thawnpiak azuisak hi.
10011009	Himahleh atoupa sikha tengteng lak a kumpipa' inn kongkhak bul ah Uriah agiak a, a-inn ah apai kei hi.
10011010	“A-inn ah Uriah apai kei,” chi a David ahilhtak un, David in Uriah kiang ah, “Khualzin hong tung hilou na hi maw? Bangziak a na inn a pai lou na hia?” achi hi.
10011011	Uriah in David kiang ah, “Pathian bawm, Israelte leh Judahte aidakbuk a om gige ua, ka toupa Joab leh ka toupa sikhate gamlak ah akikulh uh. Kei ka inn a pai in ka ne in ka ta in, ka zi kiang ah ka lum ding maw? Na hinna leh na kha ahin bang in ka gen ahi, huai zaw ka hih kei ding,” achi hi.
10011012	David in Uriah kiang ah, “Tuni leng hiai ah om lai inla, zingchiang in na pai na ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Uriah huai ni leh azingchiang leng Jerusalem ah a-omta hi.
10011013	David in amah asam a, ama ah ne in adawn hi. Adawn khamsak hi. Nitaklam in a-inn a pai lou in atoupa sikhate lak ah agiak hi.
10011014	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingchiang in David in Joab lai akhak a, Uriah aposak hi.
10011015	Huai laikhak ah, “Gal khawkna pen ah Uriah ma phusak inla, athah ua asihna ding in kikhinsan un,” chi in agelh hi.
10011016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joab in khua a-um lai in, mihangsante omna hi a atheihna ah Uriah apangsak hi.
10011017	Khua a mite apawtkhia ua, Joab asual ua, David sikhate khenkhat asi ua, Hit mi Uriah leng asi hi.
10011018	Huchi in Joab in mi asawl a, kidou tungtang thil tengteng David ahilhsak hi.
10011019	Amisawl kiang ah, Kumpipa kiang a kidou tanchin tengteng na gen khit in,
10011020	ahong heh guih a, “Bangziak a dou dia huchibang a khobul chin a hoh na hi ua? Kulh a pan a hon kap ding uh chih thei lou na hi uh maw?
10011021	Jerubeseth tapa Abimelek that kua ahia? Buh gawizanna suang tungnungpen numei in kulhbaang tung a pan atung ah akhesuk a, Thebez a si ahi kei maw? Bangziak a hichibang a kulh kiangchin a pai na hi ua?” achihleh, “Na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng si ei ve, na chi ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi.
10011022	Huchi in amisawl akuanta a, ava tung a, Joab in asawlsan tengteng David ahilh hi.
10011023	Amisawl in David kiang ah, “Mite'n ahon na zou ua, loubuk ah hon sual ua, kou akho lutna kongkhak tanpha in ka nohkik uhi.
10011024	“Thalkap mite'n kulh a pan na sikhate ahon kap ua, huchi in kumpipa sikha khenkhatte asi ua, na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng asi,” achi hi.
10011025	Huchi in David in misawl kiang ah, Joab kiang ah huchi in va gen in, “Hiaite'n na lungsim kipaklousak kei hen. Namsau in kuamah akhentuam ngal kei a, naksem in khua sual unla hihsia un, chi in hanthawn in,” achi hi.
10011026	Uriah zi in apasal Uriah asi chih azak in apasal asuun hi.
10011027	Asuun hun abei nung in David in a-inn ah api a, azi ahong hita a, tapa khat aneihsak hi. Himahleh David thilhih in Toupa akipaksak kei hi.
10012001	Huan Toupa'n David kiang ah Nathan asawl hi. Akiang ah ava hoh a, hichi in achi, “Khua khat ah mi nih a-om ua; khat pen mihausa ahi a, khat pen mizawng ahi.
10012002	Mihausa in belamhon tampi leh ganhon tampi anei hi.
10012003	Mizawng in bel belamnou anu neuchik khat lei a, avulh kia lou ngal bangmah dang anei kei hi. Amah leh atate toh khangliankhawm in akuang sawkpih leh anou kikoppih, a-angsung a om, atanu bang geih a angaihtuah ahi.
10012004	Mihausa kiang ah khualzinmi khat ava tung hi. Akiang a mikhual tung ama belam leh gan goh ding phal lou in mizawngpa belamnou leh ganhon a pan agohsak zawta hi,” achi hi.
10012005	Huchi in huai mi tung ah David aheh mahmah a, Nathan kiang ah, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, huai thilhihmi asih ngeingei ding ahi.
10012006	Hichibang thil ahih ziak leh hehpihna aneih louh ziak in abelamnou amun li a adit ding ahi,” achi hi.
10012007	Nathan in David kiang ah, “Huai mipa nangmah na hi. Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte kumpipa ding in thau ka hon nilh a, Saul khut a pan ka hon hunkhia hi.
10012008	Na pu in ka hon luahsak a, na pu zite na angsung ah ka koih hi. Israel leh Judah inkote ka hon pia a; huaite atawm luat uleh thil dangte leng hon piakbeh lai ding ka hi.
10012009	Bangziak a Toupa thupiak ngaineu a, amitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih maizen? Hit mi Uriah namsau in na that a, azi na zi ding in na neihsak a, Ammon suante namsau in amah na that hi.
10012010	Huaiziak in namsau in na insung anuse ngei nawn kei ding. Kei hon ngaineu a, Hit mi Uriah zi na zi dia na lak ziak in.
10012011	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, nangmah inkote mah nang kalh ding thil hoih lou ka tungkhe dia, na mitmuh mahmah in na zite ka hon laksak dia, na inveng ka pe dia, ama'n hiai sun khovak in na zite akithuahpih ding.
10012012	Nang aguk in na hih a, ke'n Israel mite tengteng mitmuh in sun khovak in ka hih ding,” achi hi.
10012013	David in Nathan kiang ah, “ Toupa tung ah ka khialta,” achi hi. Nathan in David kiang ah, “ Toupa'n leng na khelhna akoihmangta. Na si kei ding.
10012014	Himahleh hiai na thilhih a Pathian gensiatna dia hun lemtang thupitak Toupa melmate na piak ziak in nang a pan hong piang ding naupang asi ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
10012015	Huchi in Nathan in a-inn ah apaisanta hi. Uriah zi in David asuansak naupang tung ah Toupa'n akhut kha in, achi ana mahmahta hi.
10012016	Huaiziak in David in naupang a ding in Pathian kiang ah angen ngutngut a, an angawl a, alut a, zankhua in lei ah alum hi.
10012017	A-inkote lak a upate athou ua, lei a pan kaithou ding in akiang ah adingh uhi. Himahleh athou nuam kei a, akiang uah leng ane sam kei.
10012018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in naupang asita hi. David sikhate'n naupang asita chih ahilh ngam kei uh, “Ngai in, naupang adam lai in akiang ah thu i gen ua, angaikhe nuam kei a. Naupang asita chih bangchi in i hilh ngamta ding ua? Bangchi hiam in thil hoih lou akihih kha ding,” achi uhi.
10012019	Himahleh David in asikhate kisimhou amuh in naupang asita chih atheita hi. David in asikhate kiang ah, “Naupang sita hia?” achi a, amau, “Asita,” achi uh.
10012020	Huchi in David lei a pan athou a, akisil a, sathau akinilh a, apuante akheng a; Toupa' inn ah ahoh a, Pathian abia hi. A-inn ah apai nawn a, an akan a, ama ah alui ua, aneta hi.
10012021	Huchi in asikhate'n akiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Naupang adam lai in an na ngawl a, na kap a, himahleh naupang asihtak in na thou a, an na ne a,” achi uhi.
10012022	Ama'n, “Naupang adam lai in an ngawl in ka kap hi. Naupang adamna ding in Toupa'n hon hehpih khamoh kei ding chih kua ahia thei? Ka chi hi.
10012023	Himahleh tu in asita ngal a, bang ding in an ka ngawl dia? Ka pikik nawn thei dia hia? Akiang ah ka pai dia, himahleh amah ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
10012024	Huchi in David in azi Bathsheba alungmuan a, akiang ah alut a, akithuahpih a, tapa asuang a, amin Solomon asa hi. Toupa'n amah a-it hi.
10012025	Huchi in zawlnei Nathan athukhak a, ama'n Toupa ziak in amin Jedidiah asa hi.
10012026	Huchi in Joab in Ammon suante khopi Rabbah sim in alata hi.
10012027	Joab in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Rabbah ka sim a, tuite khopi ka lata hi.
10012028	Tu in mi om lai teng kaikhawm inla, khopi sual tum in zuan inla, la in. Ke'n khopi la leng ka min apu kha ding,” achi hi.
10012029	Huchi in David in mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Rabbah ah ahoh ua, ava sim ua, alata uhi.
10012030	Akumpipa uh lallukhu khuk lai alaksak a, agikdan dangka-eng talent khat ahi a, suangmantamte leng atel hi. David akhusak ua, khopi ah gallak tampi ala uhi.
10012031	Huchi in asung a om mipite apikheta a, sing-atnate, leilehna sikzumte leh sik heipite zang in nna asemsak hi. Lei haltakte abawlsak a; Ammon suante khopi tengteng ah huchibang in ahih hi. Huchi in David leh mi tengteng Jerusalem ah apaikik nawnta uhi.
10013001	Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David tapa Absalom in sanggam numei melhoih khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi. David tapa Amnon in amah a-it hi.
10013002	Huchi in asanggamnu Tamar ziak in Amnon abuai mahmah a; achi ana hi. Amah lah nungak siangthou ahih ziak in atung a thil banghiam hih haksapi ahi chi in Amnon in angaihtuah hi.
10013003	Himahleh Amnon in lawm anei a, amin Jonadab ahi. Amah David unaupa Shimea tapa ahi. Jonadab migitlouhpil mahmah mi khat ahi.
10013004	Ama'n Amnon kiang ah, “Aw, nang kumpipa tapa bangchidan ahia, aniteng a na gawn hulhul mawk? Hon hilh lou ding maw?” achi hi. Amnon in akiang ah, “Ka unaupa Absalom sanggamnu Tamar ka it a ahi,” achi hi.
10013005	Jonadab in akiang ah, “Na lupna ah lumlum inla, kichinasak in. Na pa'n ahong veh chiang in akiang ah, Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar ka kiang ah hong hoh henla, tanghou nek ding hong pia hen. Ka muh theih in ka mitmuh mahmah in nek ding hon bawlsakleh, akhut ngei ah ka na ne ding, na chi in,” achi hi.
10013006	Huchi in Amnon alum a, akichinasakta hi. Kumpipa'n amah ava et in Amnon in akiang ah, “Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar hong pai henla, ka mitmuh mahmah in tanghou pek nih hiam hon bawlsak henla, amah khut mahmah ah ka ne ding,” achi hi.
10013007	Huchi in David in Tamar kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon inn ah hoh inla, nek ding va bawlsak dih ve,” chi ding in a-inn ah mi asawl hi.
10013008	Huchi in Tamar, asanggampa Amnon inn ah ahoh hi. Amah ana lum hi. Tangbuang ala a, amek a, amitmuh a tanghou pek bawl in akang hi.
10013009	Akanna bel ala a, ama ah abungkhia hi. Himahleh ama'n ane nuam kei hi. Huan Amnon in, “Mi tengteng in hon pawtkhiaksan uhen,” achi hi. Huchi in apawtkhiaksan vek uhi.
10013010	Huan Amnon in Tamar kiang ah, “Na khut mahmah a ka nektheihna ding in nek ding dantan ah hon la in,” achi hi. Tamar in atanghou pek bawl ala a, asanggampa Amnon kiang ah dantan ah alalut hi.
10013011	Nesak dia akiangnai a ava paipih in ana len a, akiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu, ka kiang ah hong lum in,” achi hi.
10013012	Ama'n adawng a, “Hilou e, ka sanggampa, hon chi teitei ke'n. Israelte lak ah hichibang thilhih ding ahi kei. Hiai thil gilou haihuaitak hih ke'n.
10013013	Ke'n ka maizumna koi ah ka paisak dia? Nang leng Israelte lak a mihaite lak a khat na hi ding. Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa houpih zaw in, na hon neih anial kei ding,” achi hi.
10013014	Himahleh athu azui kei a, amah sang in ahatzaw ngal a, thagum in akithuahpih teiteita hi.
10013015	Huchi in Amnon in huat chihtak in ahota a, a-itna sang in ahuatna alianzaw hi. Huchi in Amnon in akiang ah, “Thou inla, paimang in,” achi hi.
10013016	Ama'n akiang ah, “Huchi ding ahi kei. Hichibang a dikloutak a na hon delhkhiak ka tung a na gamtatsa sang in ahoih kei zaw hi,” achi hi. Himahleh azui nuam tuan kei hi.
10013017	Huchi in anasem sikha asam a, “Hiai numei ka kiang a pan pawtsak inla, kong khak bikbek in,” achi hi.
10013018	Minu'n puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial asilh hi. Huchibang puanaktual kumpipa nungak siangthoute'n asilh uh ahi. Huchi in asikha in apikhia a, kong akhak bikbekta hi.
10013019	Tamar in alu ah meivu akoih a, apuanaktual silh ze tuamtuam abotkek a, asip ah akhut akoih a, ngaihtak a kap kawm in apaita hi.
10013020	Asanggampa Absalom in akiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon na kiang a om ahi maw? Himahleh tu in dai mai in, ka sanggamnu, na sanggampa aka, limsak dah in,” achi hi. Huchi in Tamar asanggampa Absalom inn ah nguitak in akikhumta hi.
10013021	Himahleh kumpipa David in huai tengteng azak in aheh mahmah hi.
10013022	Absalom in Amnon kiang ah asia-apha hitaleh bangmah agen nuam kei hi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei ziak in Absalom in Amnon aho mahmah hi.
10013023	Kum nih vengveng abei nung in hichi ahong hi a, Ephraim kiang a Baal-hazor ah Absalom in belam mul ametsak hi. Hiai ah kumpipa tapa tengteng achial hi.
10013024	Kumpipa kiang ah Absalom ahoh a, “Ngai in, na sikha in belam mul ametsak a, kumpipa leh asikhate na sikha kiang ah hoh le uh akei dia,” achi hi.
10013025	Kumpipa'n Absalom kiang ah, “Hilou e, ka tapa, ka vek un hoh lou e, ka hon hihtuailuai lo kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n chial teitei mahleh a-ut tuan kei a, himahleh avualzawl hi.
10013026	Huchi in Absalom in, “Ahihkeileh ka unaupa Amnon bek ka kiang uah hong hohleh ake,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang ding in ahong hoh tuamse dia?” achi hi.
10013027	Himahleh Absalom in angen teitei a, huchi in Amnon leh kumpipa tapa tengteng azuisak hi.
10013028	Absalom in, asikhate kiang ah, “Ngai un, Amnon uain dawn a nuam asak lai in na kiang ua Amnon that un, ka hon chihleh, that unla, lau kei un, thu ka hon pe khin hilou hia? Hangsantak in om unla, kipasalsak un,” chi in thu apia hi.
10013029	Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n Amnon tung ah Absalom thupiak bang in ahih uhi. Huchi in kumpipa tapa tengteng athou ua, asabiltung uah atuang chiat ua, ataimangta uhi.
10013030	Huan hichi ahong hi a, lampi a a-om lai un, Absalom in kumpipa tapate tengteng athat vek a, khat lel leng ahawi kei, chi in David kiang ah thu ana tung hi.
10013031	Huchi in kumpipa athou a apuansilhte botkek in lei ah alumta hi. Asikha tengteng in leng apuansilhte uh botkek in akiang ah adingh uhi.
10013032	David unau Shimea tapa Jonadab in adawng a, “Ka toupa'n kumpipa tapa tangval tengteng athat vek uh chih gingta kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei nungsiah Absalom in hichibang a hih atup him ahi.
10013033	Huaiziak in tu in ka toupa, kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa tengteng asi uh chih gingta in lunghimoh kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi,” achi hi.
10013034	Huai sung in Absalom ataimangta hi. Galvil tangval adak a, a-en a, ngai in, anunglam a tang pang a lampi ah mi tampi ahong pai uhi.
10013035	Jonadab in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong pai uh, na sikha in agen bang geih ana hi na,” achi hi.
10013036	Huan hichi ahong hi a, agen khittak in ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong tung ua, a-aw uh suah in akap uhi. Kumpipa leng asikhate toh kah petmah in akapta uhi.
10013037	Himahleh Absalom ataimang a, Geshur kumpipa Ammihud tapa Talmai kiang ah ahoh hi. David in niteng in atapa asuun hi.
10013038	Absalom ataimang a, Geshur gam atung a, huai ah kum thum ava om hi.
10013039	Absalom kiang ah kumpipa David hoh a-ut mahmah a, Amnon tungtang thu ah alung amuangta hi. Amah lah asi khinta chih athei ngal a.
10014001	Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Joab in kumpipa lungsim Absalom tung ah a-om chih ana thei hi.
10014002	Huchi in Joab in Tekoa ah mi asawl a, huai a numei pil khat ava pisak hi. Akiang ah, “Lusuun bang in kibawl inla, lusuun puan silh inla, sathau leng kinilh lou in numei sawtpi misi suun bang in om in.
10014003	Kumpipa kiang ah hoh inla, akiang ah hichibang in thu va gen in aw,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab in akam ah thute amuam hi.
10014004	Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang a thu gen ding in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, zahtakna pia in, “Kumpipa aw, hon huh in,” achi hi.
10014005	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Meithai petmah ka hi a, ka pasal asita hi.
10014006	Na sikhanu'n tapa nih anei a, anih un lou ah akisual ua, kuamah phelh ding lah a-om kei a, akhat pen in adang asat a, athatta hi.
10014007	Ngai in, a-inkuan tengteng in na sikhanu adoukhawm ua, a-unaupa thatpa, a-unaupa athah ziak a ka thah sam theihna ding un hon pekhia in, huchi in gouluah dingpa leng ka that pah ngal ding uh, achi uh. Huchibang in ka mei-am omsun amitsak ding ua, ka pasal min nei lou leh leitung a suan himhim nei lou in a-om mai ding,” achi hi.
10014008	Kumpipa'n numei kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na tungtang thu ah thu ka pe mai ding,” achi hi.
10014009	Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, huai gitlouhna moh ka tung leh ka pa inkote tung ah ke mai hen. Kumpipa leh alaltutphah in moh po kei hen,” achi hi.
10014010	Kumpipa'n, “Kuapeuh na tung a banghiam gen peuhmah ka kiang ah hon pi inla, ahon khoih nawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.
10014011	Ama'n, “Sisan suah mite tung a phula mite'n hihmang nawn lou ding in kumpipa'n Toupa na Pathian theigige hen aw, huchi lou in zaw ka tapa ahihmang kha ding uh,” achi hi. Ama'n, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, na tapa samzang khat lel leng lei ah ake kei ding,” achi hi.
10014012	Huchi in numei in, “Na sikhanu in toupa ka kumpipa kiang ah thu kam khat kia ka hon gen nawn peuhmah ding aw,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gen ve,” achi hi.
10014013	Numei in, “Ahihleh bangziak in ahia Pathian mite dou a hichibang a hih tum na hia? Hiai thu a pan kumpipa moh in akilang ahi, kumpipa'n adelhmangpa apikik nawn louh ziak in.
10014014	Ka si ngeingei ding ua, lei a bosa luah nawn theih louh tuisik bang ka hi uh. Pathian in hinna alamang kei a, adelhmangpa amah a pan hawlkhiak ahihlouhna ding lunggel ahi zaw hi.
10014015	Huchi in toupa ka kumpipa kiang a hiai thu gen dia ka hong leng mite'n ahon lauhsak ziak uh ahi. Na sikhanu'n, kumpipa kiang ah ka gen phot dia, kumpipa'n asikhanu nget ahihsak khakleh, ka chi a ahi.
10014016	Kumpipa'n kei leh ka tapa Pathian gouluah lou dia hihman tum mi lak a na sikhanu hunkhe ding in ana ngaikhe ding, ka chi hi.
10014017	Huchi in na sikhanu a ding in, toupa ka kumpipa thu lungmuanhuaitak hi henla; asia-apha na khen ding in toupa ka kumpipa lah Pathian angel bang mai ahi ngal a. Toupa Pathian na kiang ah om hen, ka chi ahi,” achi hi.
10014018	Kumpipa'n adawng a, numei kiang ah, “K'on dot peuhmah bangmah hon iim ke'n aw,” achi hi. Numei in, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n genleh ake,” achi hi.
10014019	Kumpipa'n, “Hiai thu himhim ah Joab in panna anei hia?” achi hi. Numei in adawng a, “Toupa ka kumpipa, na kha ahin bang in ka gen ahi, toupa ka kumpipa'n agensa kuamah in taklam hiam, veilam ah hiam apel thei kei ding uh. Na sikha Joab in hon sawl a, hiai thu tengteng na sikhanu ahon muam vek hi.
10014020	Thil omdan hihlamdang ding in hiai thil na sikha Joab in ahih ahi. Ka toupa bel leitung a thil om tengteng theithei Pathian angel bang a pil ahi,” achi hi.
10014021	Kumpipa'n Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka hih samta hi. Huaiziak in pai inla, tangval Absalom va pi nawn lechin maw,” achi hi.
10014022	Joab in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, kumpipa kiang ah kipahthu agen hi. Joab in, “Toupa ka kumpipa aw, toupa'n asikha ngetna alohchinsak ziak in tuni in na sikha in na mitmuh in deihsakna atang chih ka na theita hi,” achi hi.
10014023	Huchi in Joab athou a, Geshur ah ahoh a, Jerusalem ah Absalom ahon pita hi.
10014024	Kumpipa'n, “Ama inn ah pai henla, ka mel hong mu kei hen,” achi hi. Huchi in ama inn ah Absalom apai a, kumpipa mel amuta kei hi.
10014025	Israel tengteng lak ah Absalom bang a melhoih a phat loh kuamah a-om kei uh. Akhenuai a pan alusip pha in gensiatna himhim a-om kei hi.
10014026	Asam amet chiang in, kum kivei teng in ametsak a, asam lah agik ziak in amet zel hi, abuk zel a, kumpipa bukna shekel zanih apha hi.
10014027	Absalom in tapa thum leh tanu khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi a, melhoihtak ahi.
10014028	Absalom kum nih hilhial Jerusalem ah a-om a; himahleh kumpipa mel himhim amu kei hi.
10014029	Absalom in kumpipa kiang a amah sawl ding in Joab athukhak hi. Himahleh ahoh nuam kei a, athukhak nawn in leng ahoh nuam tuan kei hi.
10014030	Huchi in asikhate kiang ah, “I aw, Joab lou, kei lou kiang ahi a, barli buh anei a, va hal un,” achi hi. Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n lou ava hal uhi.
10014031	Huchi in Joab athou a, Absalom kiang ah a-inn ah ahoh a, “Bangziak a na sikhate'n ka lou hal ahi ua?” achi hi.
10014032	Absalom in Joab adawng a, “Ngai dih, bang ding a Geshur a pan hong pai ka hia? Huai ah omden leng kei a dia hoihzaw mah ding hiven. Kumpipa kiang a sawl dia hon thukhak ka hi. Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa mel hon musak in. Tatlekna nei ka hihleh hon that maileh ake,” achi hi.
10014033	Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, ahilh hi. Ama'n Absalom asam a, kumpipa kiang ah ahoh a, kumpipa ma ah amai a lei si in abokkhup a; huchi in kumpipa'n Absalom atawp hi.
10015001	Huai khit in hichi ahong hi a, Absalom in kangtalai leh sakolte leh mi sawmnga ama a tai ding in abawlkhol hi.
10015002	Absalom zingkhang in athou a, kulh kongkhak lampi nawl ah ana dingh hi. Thubuai khensak dia kumpipa kiang a hong pai peuhmah ana sam a, “Nang koi khopi a kipan na hia?” ana chi zel hi. Amau, “Na sikha Israel namte lak a khat ka hi,” achi zel uh.
10015003	Absalom in, “I aw, na thu ahoih in adik hi. Himahleh angaikhe ding mi kumpipa'n kuamah asep kei,” ana chi zel hi.
10015004	Absalom mah in, “Michih thubuai gen ding nei hiam, nget ding nei hiam peuhmah ka kiang a ahong paina ding un, gam vaihawmpa in bawl in om leng chi na tel ing e aw! Huchi in diktak in vai ka na hawmsak ding,” ana chi zel hi.
10015005	Hichi leng ahi lai a, kuapeuh amah zahtakna pe dia hong paitou peuhmah akhut a sawk in alen a, ana tawp hi.
10015006	Israel mi kumpipa kiang a thugen dia hong kuan peuhmahte Absalom in huchibang in ana hih zel hi. Huchi in Absalom in Israel mite lungtang aguksak hi.
10015007	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum li ahong bei in Absalom in kumpipa kiang ah, Hebron a Toupa kiang a ka thuchiam tangtun ding in hon hohsak in.
10015008	“Na sikha in Siria gam a Geshur a ka om lai in Jerusalem a ahon pikik peuhmahleh Toupa nna ka sem ding, chi in thu ka chiam khinta ngal a,” achi hi.
10015009	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Khamuangtak in kuan in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, Hebron ah ahohta hi.
10015010	Himahleh Absalom in, “Pengkul ging na zak peuhmah chiang un, Hebron ah Absalom kumpipa ahita, na chi ding uh,” chi in Israel nam tengteng kiang ah mi asimsawl khinta hi.
10015011	Jerusalem a pan asap mi zanih in Absalom azui uhi. Amau bel lungsim siangtak pu in ahoh ua, thil omdan bangmah athei kei uh.
10015012	Absalom in kithoihnate alat lai in Gilon mi Ahithophel, David thudotmi, Giloh a pan athukhak hi. Athusawmguk uh athupi mahmah a; Absalom lam ah lah mipite apung hulhul uhi.
10015013	David kiang ah, Israel mite lungtang Absalom lam ah a-awn mahmah, chih thupotu khat in ahong hilh hi.
10015014	David in Jerusalem a om, asikha tengteng kiang ah, “Thou unla i taikhe ding uh. Kuamah lah Absalom a pan suakta lou ding i hi ngal ua. Pawtkhe meng un. Huchi lou in zaw ahon pha pah mai dia, i tung uah thil hoih loutak ahon tun dia, namsau in khua ahong sual kha ding,” achi hi.
10015015	Kumpipa sikhate'n kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhate ka toupa, ka kumpipa un aseh peuhmah hih dia mansa ka hi gige uh,” achi uhi.
10015016	Kumpipa apawt a, a-inkote tengteng in azui uhi. Kumpipa'n inn ngak ding in numei sawm, ameite akoih hi.
10015017	Kumpipa apawt a, mi tengteng in azui uh. Gamla kuam mun khat, inn tawpna ah akhawl tadih uhi.
10015018	Asikha tengteng in apaikheng ua; Kerit mite, Pelet mite, Git mite, mi zaguk Gath a pan amah hon zuite kumpipa ma ah apai uhi.
10015019	Huchi in kumpipa'n Git mi, Ittai kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia nang na hong tel? Paikik nawn inla, kumpipa kiang ah om in. Nang zaw mikhual gamdangmi leng na hi ngal a, nangmah mun lam ah kik nawn mai in.
10015020	Zan zek a hong na hi a, tuni a ka kiang ua asuk atou a hon zui sam ding in ka hon chi ding maw? Ka pai theihtheihna a pai ding ka hi, nang zaw kik nawn inla, na unaute tengteng pikik nawn in. Hehpihna leh thutak na kiang ah om hen,” achi hi.
10015021	Ittai in kumpipa kiang ah, “ Toupa hinna leh kumpipa, ka toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Kumpipa, ka toupa na omna peuh ah, sih leh sih, dam leh dam, na sikha a-om sam ding,” achi hi.
10015022	David in Ittai kiang ah, “Pai inla, va galkai in,” achi hi. Huchi in Git mi Ittai, amite tengteng leh ataneute tengteng toh agalkai uhi.
10015023	Ngaihtak in huai gammi teng akap ua, mipite apai vek uhi. Gamdai lampi zuan in apai ua, kumpipa'n leng Kidron lui akan a, mipi tengteng in leng akan uhi.
10015024	Huan ngai in, Pathian thukhun bawm zawng in Zadok leh Levite tengteng akiang ah ahong pai uhi. Pathian bawm anga ua, mipi in khua apawtkhiaksan vek tan in Abiathar ahohtou hi.
10015025	Kumpipa'n Zadok kiang ah, “Pathian bawm pen khopi sung ah zawnglut nawn un. Toupa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh ahon pikik nawn dia, Pathian bawm leh a-omna ahon musak nawn ding.
10015026	Himahleh, nang ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei achihleh, ngai in, hichi mai ka hi a, hoih asak bangbang in ka tung ah hih mai hen,” achi hi.
10015027	Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok kiang ah, “Mutheipa na hi kei a hia? Na tapate nih, na tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan toh lungmuangtak in khopi ah pai nawn un.
10015028	Ngai in, kei zaw tanchin ahong theihsak masiah uh gamdai a lui kannate ah ka na om ding,” achi hi.
10015029	Zadok leh Abiathar in Jerusalem ah Pathian bawm apaipih nawn ua; huai ah a-omta uh.
10015030	Olive tang paitouhna ah David akahtou a, apaitouh kawm in akap kawmkawm hi. Alu akhuh a, khevuak in apai hi. Akiang a mi om tengteng in alu uh akhuh chiat ua, kap kawmkawm in apaitou uhi.
10015031	Kuahiam khat in Ahithophel, Absalom lam a pang in thusawm mite lak ah apang sam, chih David ahilh hi. David in, “ Toupa aw, Ahithophel lemtheihna haina suaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi,” achi hi.
10015032	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian biakna tang vum a David akahkhiak touhleh, ngai in, Arki mi Hushai apuanak bohkek silh a, alu a lei kai niaunuau in amah dawn ding in ahong pai hi.
10015033	David in akiang ah, “Ka kiang a na hong samleh zaw, kei a ding in puakgik na hi ding.
10015034	Himahleh khopi a na kik nawn a, Absalom kiang a, toupa aw, na sikha in ka om ding. Tuma lam a na pa sikha a ka om bang in, tu in na sikha in ka om leuleu ding, na va chihleh Ahithophel lemtheihna hon dalsakpa na hi zaw ding hi.
10015035	Huai ah na kiang ah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar leng a-om sam uh ahi kei maw? Huan hichi ahi ding a, kumpipa' inn a thupawt na zak peuhmah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar na hilh zel ding.
10015036	Ngai in, atapate uh nih Zadok tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan leng akiang uah a-om uhi. Na thil zak peuhmahte hon theisak ding in amau na hon sawl zel ding,” achi hi.
10015037	Huchi in David lawm, Hushai khopi ah alut a; huchi in Jerusalem ah Absalom alutta hi.
10016001	Huan David in tang vum kahkhiakna akhen zek nung in, ngai in, Mephibosheth sikha Ziba in sabiltung nih toh ana dawn hi. Sabiltung nihte'n tanghou beu zanih, grep phoukeu bawk zakhat, nipithei zakhat leh uain thawl khat apua uhi.
10016002	Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Hiaite bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ziba in, “Sabiltungte kumpipa inkuanpihte tuanna ding ahi. Tanghou leh nipitheite tangvalte nek ding; uain bel gamdai a bah peuhmahte dawn ding ahi,” achi hi.
10016003	Kumpipa'n, “Ahihleh na pu tapa koi ah?” achi hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Jerusalem ah a-om. ‘Tuni in Israel inkote'n ka pa lalgam ahon pekik nawn ding uh, chi a angaihtuah ziak in,’ ” achi hi.
10016004	Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Ngai in, Mephibosheth thil neih tengteng nang a ahi vekta,” achi hi. Ziba in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, na mitmuh a deihsakna mu ding in kingainiamtak in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.
10016005	Kumpipa David, Bahurim atun in, ngai in, Saul inkote lak a mi Gera tapa, amin Shimei ahong pawtkhia a; hamsia lou kawmkawm in ahong paitou hi.
10016006	Suang in David adeng a, kumpipa David sikha tengteng leng; mi tengteng leh sepaih hat tengteng ataklam leh veilam ah a-om uhi.
10016007	Shimei in hamsiat in hichi in achi, “Paimang vengveng in, paimang vengveng in, nang sisan suah hat leh Belial mipa:
10016008	Asik a vai na hawm Saul inkote tengteng sisan Toupa'n na tung ah ahon kiksak nawnta. Toupa'n gam na tapa Absalom ana pe khinta. Ngai in, sisan suah hatmi na hih ziak in nangmah siatna na kitun ve,” achi hi.
10016009	Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Abishai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai ui sisa in toupa, ka pu hamsiat mawkmawk ahia? Ka kuantou ding a alu ka tansak mai ding?” achi hi.
10016010	Kumpipa'n, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon theihsak ding uh bang a-om a? Toupa'n akiang a, David hamsiat in, achihleh ahamsiat ahi mai kei dia. Bangziak a huchibang a hih kua'n achi dia?” achi hi.
10016011	David in Abishai leh asikhate tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, ka tapa, ka gil a gah mahmah in hon thah atum. Hiai Benjamin mi'n nak tup sem na'n chia! Bangmah loh kei unla, hamsia ahihleh loh hen. Toupa hihsak ahi.
10016012	Toupa'n ka haksatna ahon mu dia, Toupa'n tuni a hon hamsiat ahoih lam in hon thuk nawn kha maithei hi,” achi hi.
10016013	Huchi in David leh amite lampi ah apai zel uh. Shimei bel agal tang pang ah apai zel a, apai kawm in ahamsiat zom zel a, suang in adeng a, leivui in atheh hi.
10016014	Huchi in kumpipa leh akiang a mi om tengteng Aiphim atungta uh. Huchi in huai ah akhawl tawldam uhi.
10016015	Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ahoh ua, alak uah Ahithophel leng atel hi.
10016016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Arki mi Hushai, David lawm, Absalom kiang atun in Absalom kiang ah, “Pathian in kumpipa humbit hen, Pathian in kumpipa humbit hen,” achi hi.
10016017	Absalom in Hushai kiang ah, “Hichibang ahi maw na lawm na hehpihna dan? Bangziak a na lawm kiang a hoh lou?” achi hi.
10016018	Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Ka hoh kei ding. Toupa leh hiai mite leh Israel mi tengteng atelpa uh thuthu in ka om dia, akiang ah ka om zaw ding.
10016019	Kua nna ka sem dia? Atapa ma ah nna ka sem ding ahi kei maw? Na pa ma a ka sep bang in nangmah ma ah ka sem ding,” achi hi.
10016020	Absalom in Ahithophel kiang ah, “Bangchi in i hih diam aw, na ngaihdan gen dih ve,” achi hi.
10016021	Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Na pa mei, inn ngak a akoihte kithuahpih in. Israel mi tengteng in na pa'n nang hon mudah chih ana za ding ua; nang lam a pang tengteng khut ahat ding,” achi hi.
10016022	Absalom a ding in inn tung ah puanin akai uh. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng mitmuh in apa meite akithuahpih hi.
10016023	Huai lai in Ahithophel lemtheihnate, Pathian thu dongpa lemtheihna bang ahi a; huchi mah bang in David leh Absalom in leng Ahithophel ana ngai uhi.
10017001	Huai lou leng Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Mi singkhat-le-sangnih ka telkhe dia, tuzan in David delh ding in ka kuan ding.
10017002	Abah lai leh hat louh laitak ka va phanon dia, ka va lausak ding. Huchi in akiang a mi tengteng ataimang ding uh. Huchi in kumpipa kia ka va that mai ding.
10017003	Na kiang ah mipite ka hon pikik nawn vek ding. Na mizonpa mi tengteng hong kik toh kibang ahi. Huchi in mi tengteng khamuang in a-om ding uh,” achi hi.
10017004	Huan hiai thugen in Absalom leh Israel upate akipaksak hi.
10017005	Huchi in Absalom in, “Arki mi Hushai sam peuhmah phot inla, amah gendan i ngaikhe peuhmah ding uh,” achi hi.
10017006	Absalom kiang a Hushai ahong tun in Absalom in, “Ahithophel in hichibang in agen a, agen bang a hih ding i ding uam? Hih lou ding hi leng nang hon gen himhim dih,” chi in ana houpih hi.
10017007	Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Tutung a Ahithophel lemtheihna ahoih kei,” achi hi.
10017008	Hushai in, “Na pa leh amite na thei a, sepaih hangsantak, gam a vompi anou laksak bang mai ahi uh. Na pa lah galdoumi ahi a, mipi lak ah agiak khol kei ding.
10017009	Ngai in, tu in leng koi lai leihawm hiam ah, koi lai mun ah hiam a kibu ahi ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, akisual tung ua mi khenkhat apuk ualeh aza peuh in, Absalom zuite athat ek uh, achi mai ding uh.
10017010	Huchi in mihangsantak, humpinelkai lungsim bang pumi hial leng ahong lungke mahmah ding uh. Israel mi tengteng in lah na pa sepaih hangsantak ahihdan leh akiang a mi omte mihangsan taktak ahihdan uh athei vek ngal ua.
10017011	Kei hoihsak sam dan, Israel mi tengteng Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in tuipi a piaunel zah hial ding na kiang ah samkhawm vek lehang; kidouna ah nang nangawn kuan lechin.
10017012	Huchi in koi lai mun peuh ah i kituahna na ah lei a daitui kia bang mai in i boh ding ua; amah leh akiang a mi om tengteng khat lel leng i hawi kei ding uh.
10017013	Huai lou leng, khua a alutleh Israel mi tengteng, khauhual tawi in huai ah i va hoh ding ua, suang neuchik leng om lou hial khop in lui ah i kaikhe vek ding,” achi hi.
10017014	Huchi in Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng in, “Ahithophel thuhilhna sang in Arka mi Hushai thuhilhna ahoihzaw,” achi uhi. Toupa'n Absalom tung a thil hoih lou atunsak theihna ding in Ahithophel thuhilhna hoihtak nuaisiah ding in ana sep khin him hi.
10017015	Huchi in Hushai in siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah, “Huchibang khachibang in Ahithophel in Absalom leh Israel upate hoih ding in angaihtuahpih a; ke'n huchibang khachibang in hoih ding in ka ngaihtuah hi.
10017016	Huaiziak in tuzan in gamdai lui kainate a giak nawn lou in kan ngeingei un. Huchi lou in zaw kumpipa leh akiang a om tengteng ahihmang vek kha ding uh chi in David hilhsak zok un,” achi hi.
10017017	Khopi sung alut uh kuama'n amuhlouhna ding un, Jonathan leh Ahimaaz bel En-rogel ah a-om ua; sikhanu khat in amaute ava hilh zel hi. Amau kumpipa David ava hilhsawn zel uhi.
10017018	Himahleh naupang in ana mu a, Absalom ahilh hi. Himahleh anih un ataimang pah ua, Bahurim a mi khat, a-intual a tuileh nei inn ah ava hoh ua, tuileh sung ah alutsukta uhi.
10017019	Numei in tuileh asitna in asin a, atung ah buh aphou a, kuama'n athei kei hi.
10017020	Absalom sikhate numei kiang ah ava hoh ua, “Ahimaaz leh Jonathan koi a om ahi ua?” achi uhi. Numei in akiang uah, “Luita tui akanta ding uh,” ana chi hi. Ava zong ua, amu kei ua, Jerusalem ah akik nawn uh.
10017021	Huan hichi ahong hi a, apaitum khit un tuileh a pan ahong pawtkhia ua, kumpipa David ava hilh uhi. David kiang ah, “Pawtkhia unla, tui kan pah un, huchi in Ahithophel in ahon tum hi,” achi uh.
10017022	Huchi in David leh akiang a mi om tengteng apawtkhia ua, Jordan lui akan uh. Khua ahong vak in Jordan lui kan lou khat lel leng a-om kei uh.
10017023	Ahithophel in ahoihsakdan azui kei uh, chih atheih in asabiltung avan a, apawtkhia a, akhua ah apai hi. A-inkuante khosakna ding abawlsak sipsip a, huchi in a-awklumta hi. Amah asita a, apa han ah avui uhi.
10017024	Huchi in David, Mahanaim ava tung hi. Absalom in akiang a Israel mi tengteng toh Jordan lui akan uhi.
10017025	Absalom in Joab sik in Amasa sepaih heutu ding in akoih hi. Amasa bel mi khat amin Ithra tapa ahi. Ithra ahihleh Israel mi, Joab nu sanggam Nahash tanu Abigail zi a neipa ahi.
10017026	Israel mite leh Absalom in Gilead gam ah panmun akhoh uhi.
10017027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mahanaim a David atun in, Ammon suan Rabbah a mi Nahash tapa Shobi, Lo-debar a mi Amiel tapa Makir leh Rogelim a Gilead mi Barzillaite'n
10017028	lupnate, maiphiat kuangte, leibelte, huit buh, barli buh, tangbuang, be kankeu,
10017029	khuaizu, mokhon, belamte, ganhon a pan nawikhalte, David leh akiang a om mite nek ding ahon tawi uhi, “Gamdai ah mite agilkial ua, atawl ua, adangtak uh,” achih ziak un.
10018001	Huan David in akiang a om mite asim a, sepaih sangkhat tung a heutute, zakhat tung a heutute abawl hi.
10018002	David in mite asawlkhia a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab unaupa Zeruiah tapa, Abishai in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Git mi Ittai in aheu hi. Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Keimah leng nou toh ka kuan ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
10018003	Himahleh mipite'n, “Kuan lou e. Koute zaw na taimang hita le ung leng, khawk asa kei ding uh. Akimkhat hiam va si le ung leng khawk asa kei lai ding uh. Nang koute singkhat sang in na manphazaw hi. Huaiziak in khopi a pan hon panpih dia na na om ahoihzaw hi,” achi uh.
10018004	Kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Hoih na sak bangbang un ka hih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa kulh kongpi bul ah adingh a, mipi tengteng azaza in leh asangsang in apaikhe zungzung uhi.
10018005	Kumpipa'n Joab, Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, kei ziak in tangval Absalom tung ah nemtak in hih un aw, chi in thu apia hi. Mipi tengteng in Absalom tungtang thu a kumpipa'n sepaih heutute tengteng thu apiak lai aza uhi.
10018006	Huchi in mipite Israel mite dou ding in kidouna mun ah ahohta ua; akidouna uh Ephraim gammang ahi.
10018007	Huai ah David mite ma ah Israel mite avuallel ua, huai ni in sepaih singnih athat uhi.
10018008	Akidouna un huai gam tengteng a-uap vek ngal a. Huai ni in namsau sang in leng gammang sung a mang a si atamzaw hi.
10018009	Absalom in David mite abingtuah guih hi. Absalom asabiltung tung a tuang ahi a, tosaw singhiang bawkphatak nuai ah sabiltung alut a, tosaw sing ah alu a-awkta hi. Lei leh van kikal ah aluai nilouh hi. Sabiltung ataisuak hi.
10018010	Kuahiam in mu in, Joab ahilh a, “Ngai in, tosaw sing ah Absalom kikhai nilouh ka mu,” achi hi.
10018011	Joab in ahilhpa kiang ah, “Ngai in, huai lah na mu ngal a, bangziak a hihlum a lei a kesak pah ngal lou? Huchibang a hih hi lechin dangka sawm leh kawnggak hon pe pah ding hi veng in,” achi hi.
10018012	Huai mi'n Joab kiang ah, “Dangka sang mu ding hi leng le kumpipa tapa tung ah ka khut ka kha kei himhim ding, i bil ua i zak mahmah in kumpipa'n nang leh Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, tangval Absalom kuamah in khoih het kei un, chi in thu ahon pe ngal a.
10018013	Ginom huai loutak in na that mawk leng, kumpipa lak ah lah bangmah sel theih ahi ngal kei a, nang lah na kihulsak nawn maimah tuak ngal a,” achi hi.
10018014	Huchi in Joab in, “Hichibang in na kiang ah ka om nilouh thei het kei,” achi hi. Teipi thum atawi a, tosaw sing lak a na hing lai Absalom lungtang adawt pailet hi.
10018015	Joab galvan tawi tangval sawm in ahong um ua, Absalom asun ua, athatta uhi.
10018016	Joab in pengkul amut a, Israelte delh mipite ahong kik nawn ua; Joab in mite ana nang bikbek hi.
10018017	Absalom luang ala ua, gammang ah leihawm thukpi ah apai ua, atung ah suang asekhawm venvon uhi. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng amau puanin chiat ah ataikekta uhi.
10018018	Absalom in adam lai in kumpipa phaizang ah amah theihgigena ding suang ana phut khin hi. Ka min adailouhna ding tapa lah ka nei ngal kei a, chi in ama min atamsak hi. Huchi in tuni tan in hiai Absalom theihgigena suangphuh chih in a-om hi.
10018019	Huchi in Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in, “Ka va tai dia, Toupa'n amelma phu alaksakdan tanchin kumpipa ka va hilh ding,” achi hi.
10018020	Joab in akiang ah, “Tuni in zaw tanchin va hilh nai ke'n. Nidang chiang in tanchin va hilh zaw in, kumpipa tapa asih ziak in, tuni in zaw tanchin bangmah va hilh dah in,” achi hi.
10018021	Joab in Kush mi kiang ah, “Kuan inla, na thil muh kumpipa va hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Kush mi akun a, ataikhe pah hi.
10018022	Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in Joab kiang ah, “Akoi abang hitaleh, Kush mipa ka va delh ding,” achi hi. Joab in, “Ka tapa aw, tanchin hilh man lah na mu kei dia, bangziak a tai ding na hia?” achi hi.
10018023	Himahleh ama'n, “Akoi abang hitaleh ka tai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Tai mai ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in Phaizang lampi ah Ahimaaz atai a, Kush mipa amakhelh hi.
10018024	Kulh kongpi chial kikal ah David ana tu hi. Galvilpa kulh kongpi ponungzaw pen tunglam ah apaitou a, adak vialvial hi. Ngai in, mi khat amah kia in ahong tai hi.
10018025	Galvilpa akikou a, kumpipa ahilh hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mi khat kia ahihleh tanchin hong gen ding nei ahi ding,” achi a; ahong tai mengmeng a, ahong naih hiaihiai hi.
10018026	Galvilpa'n midang hong tai amu nawn hi. Galvilpa'n kongkhak vilpa asam a, “Ngai in, midang amah kia in ahong tai nawn,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ama'n leng tanchin hong tun sam ding nei ahi ve,” achi hi.
10018027	Galvilpa'n, “Amasapen taidan Zadok tapa Ahimaaz taidan bang mahmah in ka thei,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Amah mihoih mahmah ahi, tanchinhoih hon tun ding ahi,” achi hi.
10018028	Ahimaaz in asam a, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangkim ahoih e,” achi hi. Amai a lei si in kumpipa ma a kun in, “ Toupa , ka toupa sual a khut khak tum mite daltanpa Toupa na Pathian phat in om hen,” achi hi.
10018029	Kumpipa'n, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi. Ahimaaz in adawng a, “Joab in kumpipa sikha, kei na sikha mahmah ahon sawlkhiak lai in abuai nuainuai uh ka mu a, himahleh bang ahia chih ka thei kei,” achi hi.
10018030	Kumpipa'n, “Ka pam ah hong dingh tadih in,” achi hi. Huchi in apam ah ana dingh hi.
10018031	Ngai in, Kush mi ahong tung hi. Kush mi'n, “Toupa ka kumpipa a ding in tanchin ka hon tun hi. Na tung a helte tengteng phu tuni in Toupa'n ahon laksak hi,” achi hi.
10018032	Kumpipa'n Kush mi kiang ah, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi. Kush mi in adawng a, “Toupa, ka kumpipa melmate leh na siatna zong mite tengteng huai tangval bang in om vek uheh,” achi hi.
10018033	Huchi in kumpipa alungdong mahmah a, kulh kongpi tung a dantan ah ahohtou a ava kap hi. Apaitouh kawm in, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, ka tapa Absalom, na sih sik in si zaw mai leng maw, Aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa,” achi hi.
10019001	Huan Joab ahilh ua, “Ngai in, kumpipa'n kap in Absalom asuun hi,” achi uh.
10019002	Huai ni a avualzohna uh mi tengteng a ding in suunna ahong hi zawta hi. “Atapa ziak in kumpipa alungkham mahmah,” achih uh huai ni in mite'n lah ana zata ngal ua.
10019003	Mite kidouna a mi taimang azum ziak a aguk a paimang bang in huai ni in aguk in khopi ah alut uhi.
10019004	Kumpipa'n amai ahum a, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa!” chi in kumpipa akap huphup hi.
10019005	Inn ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab alut a, “Na hinna, na tapate hinna, na tanute hinna, na zite leh na meite hinna humbit mite tuni in zumtak in na bawlta hi.
10019006	Nang hon hote na it a, nang hon itte na hua hi. Heutute leh sepaihte nang a dia bangmah hilou bang in tuni in na hihlangta hi. Absalom dam in, kou midang tengteng tuni in si zaw vek le ung, na kipah lamtak hileh kilawm in ka thei hi.
10019007	Huaiziak in thou inla, pawtkhia in. Na mite lungmuansak ding lam thu gen in. Na pawtkhiak keileh Toupa min lou in ka kichiam hi. Mi khat lel leng tuzan in na kiang ah a-om kei ding. Huai lah nang a ding in na tuailai a pan tutan a na tung a thil hoih lou hong tung teng sang in ahoih kei zaw ding,” achi hi.
10019008	Huchi in kumpipa athou a, kulh kongpi ah ava tu hi. “Ngai un, kumpipa kulh kongpi ah atu hi,” chi in mipi tengteng ahilh uhi. Mipi tengteng kumpipa ma ah ava hoh uhi. Israelte bel amau puanin chiat ah ataikek uhi.
10019009	Israel nam a mi tengteng akisel vengvung ua, “Kumpipa'n i melmate khut a pan hon hunkhia a, Philistiate khut a pan hon hondamta. Tu in Absalom ziak in gam ataikhiaksan hi.
10019010	Absalom i kumpipa dia thau i nilhpa uh lah kidouna ah asita a; bang achia kumpipa pikikna ding kam khat bek na gen louh uh?” akichi uh.
10019011	Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah asawl a, Judah upate kiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a-inn a pikik thu a, azekaipen a pang na hi ua? Israel mite'n kumpipa pikik thu agen uh lah kumpipa kiang atungta ngal a.
10019012	Ka unaute na hi ua, ka guh leh ka sa lah na hi ngal ua, bang achia azekaipen a pang peuhmah na hi ua? chi in va gen un,” achi hi.
10019013	Amasa kiang ah, “Ka guh leh ka sa na hi kei a hia? Joab sik a ka ma a sepaihte heutu a ka hon bawl keileh, Pathian in alohloh hon loh mai henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng, achi,” chi ding in mi asawl hi.
10019014	Huchi in Judah mi tengteng lungtang mi khat lungtang bang mai in a-awnsakta hi. Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na mi tengteng toh hong kik nawn un,” chi ding in mi asawl uhi.
10019015	Huchi in kumpipa apai nawn a, Jordan ahong tung hi. Kumpipa dawn a, Jordan a na pi galkai ding in Gilgal ah Judahte ahoh uhi.
10019016	Hahurim a Benjamin mi Gera tapa Shimei leng kintak in kumpipa dawn ding in Judahte mah toh kiton in apawtkhia hi.
10019017	Akiang ah Benjamin mi sangkhat toh, Saul inkote sikha Ziba, atapa sawm-le-nga leh asikha sawmnih toh ahi ua, kumpipa ma in Jordan agalkah uhi.
10019018	Kumpipa inkote pi galkahna ding leh hoih asak bangbang a hih ding in long apaipih uh. Jordan lui agalkahleh kumpipa ma ah Gera tapa Shimei abokkhup hi.
10019019	Kumpipa kiang ah, “Ka toupa'n thulimlouhna nei in hon sep kei henla; toupa ka kumpipa'n Jerusalem apawtsan ni a na sikha in dikloutak a ana hihte leng theigige sam kei hen. Kumpipa'n alungtang ah pai kei hen.
10019020	Na sikha in thil ka hihkhial chih ka kithei hi. Huaiziak in ngai in, Joseph inko tengteng lak a ka toupa kumpipa mu dia tuni a hong pawt masapen ka hi,” achi hi.
10019021	Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in adawng a, “ Toupa thaunilhpa ahamsiat ziak in Shimei pen thah ding ahi kei dia hia?” achi hi.
10019022	David in, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon na theihsak ding uh bang ahia om? Tuni a kei hon doute na hi ding uh maw? Tuni a Israelte lak a mi thah ahi dia hia? Tuni in Israel mite tung a kumpipa ka hihthei lou ka hi maw?” achi hi.
10019023	Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Shimei kiang ah, “Na si kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Kumpipa akiang ah akichiamta hi.
10019024	Kumpipa mu ding in Saul tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Kumpipa apawtkhiak ni a pan galmuang a ahong pai nawn ni tan in akhete azun kei a, akhamul atan kei a, apuan leng asawp sam kei.
10019025	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa mu dia Jerusalem ahong tun in kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mephibosheth, bangziak a ka kiang a hong sam lou?” achi hi.
10019026	Ama'n adawng a, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, ka sikha in ahon khem a; na sikha in, kumpipa kiang a hoh ding in ka tuanna ding sabiltung ka van ding, ka chi a; na sikha lah akhe abai ngal a.
10019027	Kumpipa ka toupa kiang ah na sikha ahek hi. Himahleh toupa ka kumpipa Pathian angel ahi. Huaiziak in hoih na sak bangbang in hih in.
10019028	Ka pa inkote tengteng toupa ka kumpipa ma a thah vek dia kilawm ahi uh. Himahleh na sikha na an umpihte lak ah na pangsak hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa kiang ah thil dang phut ngam lai dia kilawm ka hi maw?” achi hi.
10019029	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Na tungtang thu bangziak a gen nawn nak na hia? Nang leh Ziba gam kihawm un ka chi hi,” achi hi.
10019030	Mephibosheth in kumpipa kiang ah, “Eh, ama'n tang vek hen, toupa ka kumpipa lah ama inn mah ah galmuang in ahong pai nawnta ngal a,” achi hi.
10019031	Rogelim a pan Gilead mi Barzillai ahong suk a; kumpipa Jordan a pi galkai ding in amah toh Jordan ah ahoh hi.
10019032	Barzillai upapi ahi a, kum sawmgiat a upa ahita. Mahanaim a kumpipa om sung in nek ding apia a, amah mineizoutak ahi.
10019033	Kumpipa'n Barzillai kiang ah, “Ka kiang ah hong inla, ka kiang ah Jerusalem ah ka hon vak ding,” achi hi.
10019034	Barzillai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jerusalem a kumpipa toh hohtou ding in bang tan ka dam lai dia?
10019035	Tu in kum sawmgiat ka hita a; asia leh apha ka khen thei a hia? Na sikha in ka nek-le-dawn, a lim leh lim louh leng a theikak thei a hia? Pasal leh numeite lasak ging leng ka za thei nawn a hia? Huaiziak in na sikha bang ding a toupa ka kumpipa a dia puakgik ka hih maizen ding?
10019036	Na sikha in kumpipa toh Jordan galkah lel ka tup ahi. Bang ding in kumpipa'n huchibang in hoih man ahon thuk chitchiat dia?
10019037	Hehpih in na sikha hon paisak nawn mai in, ka hon ngen ahi. Ka nu leh ka pa han omna koumau kho ngei ah ka si ding. Himahleh en in, na sikha Chimham; toupa ka kumpipa toh hong galkah henla, atung ah hoih na sak bangbang in hih in,” achi hi.
10019038	Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Chimham ka kiang ah agalkah sam dia, hoih na sak bang zel in atung ah ka hih ding. Thil na hon nget peuhmah ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi.
10019039	Huchi in mi tengteng Jordan gal akah ua, kumpipa leng agalkah hi. Kumpipa'n Barzillai atawp a, avualzawl hi. Huchi in amah amun ah apai nawnta hi.
10019040	Huchi in Gilgal ah kumpipa agalkah a, amah toh Chimham agalkah sam hi. Juda mi tengteng in kumpipa api galkah ua, Israel mi leng akimkhat apang uhi.
10019041	Ngai in, Israel mi tengteng kumpipa kiang ah ahong ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bang achia ka unau uh Judah mite'n nang hon gukhia a, kumpipa leh a-inkote leh David mite teng Jordan gal a apikhawm vek mawk uh?” achi uhi.
10019042	Judah mi tengteng in Israel mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ka kinaihpih uh ahih ziak ahi. Bangziak a hiai thu a heh mawk? Kumpipa neih muang a om ka hi mahmah uh maw? Thilpiak banghiamte leng ahon nei a hia?” achi uh.
10019043	Israel mite'n Judah mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ah tan sawm ka nei ua, David ah noute sang in anglaitanna ka nei zaw uh. Bangziak a hon ngaineu maw? Kumpipa pikik nawn sawm masate ka hi kei uh maw?” achi uh. Huchi in Judah mite thu Israel mite thu sang in akhauhzaw hi.
10020001	Huan Benjamin mi Bikri tapa Sheba, Belial mi khat ana om hi. Ama'n pengkul amut a, “David ah tantuan i nei kei ua, Jesse tapa ah leng gouluah ding i nei sam kei, Israel mite aw, na puanin lam chiat uah pai un,” achi hi.
10020002	Huchi in Israel mi tengteng in David azuih uh alehngatsan ua, Bikri tapa Sheba azuita uhi. Judah mite'n Jordan a pan Jerusalem pha in akumpipa uh alen tinten uhi.
10020003	Jerusalem a a-inn ah David ahong pai hi. Kumpipa'n numei sawm ameite inn ngak dia akoihte api a, inn khat ah akhum a, anek ding uh pia in avak a, himahleh amaute akithuahpih kei hi.
10020004	Kumpipa'n Amasa kiang ah, “Ni thum sung in Judah mite hon sapkhawmsak inla, nang leng hong om sam in,” achi hi.
10020005	Huchi in Amasa leng Judah mite samkhawm ding in akuan hi. Himahleh ahun sehsak sang in ava tam sawt zawta hi.
10020006	David in Abishai kiang ah, “Bikri tapa Sheba in Absalom sang in i poi uh akhoihzaw dia hia? Na toupa mite pi inla delh un. Huchi lou in zaw khokulh nei ah alut man dia, muh phak louh in i khahsuah kha ding,” achi hi.
10020007	Huchi in Joab mite, Kereth mite, Pelet mite leh amihat tengteng un amah azuikheta uh. Jerusalem a pan Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in apawtkhia uhi.
10020008	Gibeon a suangpi omna ava tun un, Amasa in amaute ana dawn hi. Joab in kidouna van asilh a, atung ah namsau apai toh kawnggak ah akuah hi. Mailam a apai kawm in huai namsau aphawi hi.
10020009	Joab in Amasa kiang ah, Unaupa, “Na hoih tadih na maw?” achi hi. Huai khit in Joab in Amasa tawp ding in akhut taklam in akhamul aman hi.
10020010	Himahleh Amasa in Joab in atawi namsau alimsak kei hi. Joab in agil ah adawt a, agilzangte lei ah atolhkhe zelzul a, adawt tuan nawn kei hi. Huchi in asita hi. Joab leh a-unaupa Abishai in Bikri tapa Sheba adelh uhi.
10020011	Akiang ah Joab mite lak a tangval khat adingh a, “Joab lam a pang leh David lam a pang peuhmah in Joab zui hen,” achi hi.
10020012	Amasa bel lamlian laitak ah si a kidiah in ana lum hi. Huai mi'n mi tengteng dingh dide amuh in lamlian a pan Amasa luang gamlak ah asuan a, akiang a hong pai peuhmah khawl zel a amuh ziak in puan in atuam hi.
10020013	Lamlian a pan suankhiak ahih nung in Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in mi tengteng in Joab azui uhi.
10020014	Abel leh Beth-maaka pha in Israel nam tengteng leh Ber mi tengteng atawn vek a; amau akikaikhawm ua amah azuita uhi.
10020015	Beth-maaka a Abel ah amah a-um ua; kho zulzul ah lei achiang ua, kulh zul ah adingh uhi. Joab kiang a mi om tengteng in chimsak ding in kulh akhoh ok-ok uhi.
10020016	Huchi in khua a pan numei pil khat ahong kikou a, “Ngai un, ngai un; Joab kiang ah, hong pai nai in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding, va chi un,” achi hi.
10020017	Akiang ava naihtak in numei in, “Joab na hi hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in akiang ah, “Na sikhanu thugen ngaikhe dih,” achi a, ama'n, “Ka ngaikhia hi,” chi in adawng hi.
10020018	Huai numei in, “Nidanglai in Abel ah akikum ngeingei ding uh,” achi zel uh. Huchibang in thu atawpsak zel uhi.
10020019	Kei Israel lak a kituah ut leh muanhuai mite lak a khat ka hi. Nang zaw Israel khua, akho bulpi pen hihsiat tum na hi lim ve. Bangziak a Toupa gou nawmvalh tum na hia? achi hi.
10020020	Joab in adawng a, “Huchibang ahi zenzen kei. Nawmvalh hiam, hihsiat hiam ka tum kei himhim hi.
10020021	Huchibang thu ahi kei. Ephraim tanggam a mi Bikri tapa amin Sheba in kumpipa kalh in, David hilhial kalh in akhut alik hi. Amah hon pekhe le uchin khua ka pawtsan mai ding,” achi hi. Numei in Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, kulh a pan alutang lotkhiak ahi ding,” achi hi.
10020022	Huchi in numei in apilna in mi tengteng kiang ah ava pai a, Bikri tapa Sheba lutang atan ua, Joab kiang ah alawnkhia uhi. Huchi in pengkul amut a, amau puanin chiat zuan in khua a pan apaita uhi. Jerusalem ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab apaikikta hi.
10020023	Israel sepaih tengteng heutu Joab ahi a; Jehoiada tapa Benaiah ahihleh Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi.
10020024	Adoram phutluih nasem dia goih a omte heutu ahi a, Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat tanchin gelhmi ahi.
10020025	Sheva, laigelhmi ahi a; Zadok leh Abiathar ahihleh siampute ahi uh.
10020026	Jair mi Ira leng David vaihawmtu lian ahi.
10021001	Huan David dam lai in kum kizom in kum thum kial akia hi. David in Toupa adong a, Toupa'n , “Saul leh sisan suahmi a-inkote ziak ahi. Amau Gibeon mite athat ngal ua,” achi hi.
10021002	Kumpipa'n Gibeon mite asam a, akiang uah, Gibeon mite Israel suante ahi kei ua, Amor mi khosuaksunte ahi zaw uh. Israel suante amau kiang ah ana kichiam khin ua; Saul in Israel suante leh Judah suante a dia phatuam angaih ziak in thah atum nak hi.
10021003	David in Gibeon mite kiang ah, “Bang ahia ka hon hihsak ding? Toupa gou na vualzawl theihna ding un bangchibang in hihdik thak nawnna ka bawl dia?” achi hi.
10021004	Gibeon mite'n akiang ah, “Saul leh a-inkote dangka leh dangka-eng ka la kei ding uh. Kou ziak in Israel ah mi kuamah na that kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Na gen peuhmah uh ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi.
10021005	Amau kumpipa kiang ah, “Hon hihmangpa leh Israel gamsung himhim a om lou dia hihmang hon sawmpa,
10021006	tapa sagihte hon pia inla, Toupa miseh Saul omna Gibeah ah Toupa ma ah ka khailum ding uh,” achi uh. Kumpipa'n, “Hon pe leng ake,” achi hi.
10021007	Himahleh kumpipa'n, David leh Saul tapa Jonathan kikal a, anih ua kal a Toupa kichiamna ziak in Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahawi hi.
10021008	Kumpipa'n Aiah tanu Rizpah in Saul tapa nih aneihsak Armoni leh Mephibosheth api a, Meholath mi Barzillai tapa Adriel, Saul tanu Mikal in tapa nga aneihsakte toh
10021009	Gibeon mite khut ah apekhia a, mual a Toupa ma ah akhailum uhi. Huchi in asagih un asikhawm uhi. Buh lak hun, barli buhlak pat lai in athatta uhi.
10021010	Aiah tanu Rizpah in sai-ip puan ala a, amah a ding in suangpi tung ah aphah hi. Buh lak kipat tung a pan huai siluangte tung a van vuahtui in abuah tan in, sun chia siluangte tung a vasate atuk ding uh leh zan chia gamsate khoih ding aphal kei hi.
10021011	Aiah tanu, Saul meinu Rizpah thilhih David ahilh uhi.
10021012	Huchi in David akuan a, Philistia mite'n Gilboa a Saul athah ni ua Philistia mite'n Beth-shan mun lian a akhai uh aguhte uh, Jabesh-gilead mite'n ava guklak uh, Saul guh leh atapa Jonathan guhte ala hi.
10021013	Huai a pan Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte alatou a; akhailupte uh guhte leng alakhawm hi.
10021014	Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte Benjamin gam a Jelaha apa Kish han ah avui uh. Kumpipa thupiak dungzui in ahih uhi. Huai khit in huai gam tung ah Pathian alungkimta hi.
10021015	Philistia mite'n Israel mite adou nawn uhi. David, amite toh ava kuansuk ua; Philistia mite ava sual ua, David abah mahmah hi.
10021016	Ishbi-benob, milian tapate lak a khat, ateipi gikdan dal shekel zathum, namsau thak kuah in David thah atum hi.
10021017	Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in ahong hunkhia a, Philistia mi sual in athatta hi. David mite'n, “Israelte khawnvak na mihsaklouhna ding in kidou ding in ka kiang uah nang zaw na kuan nawn kei ding,” chi in akiang ah akichiam uhi.
10021018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Gob ah Philistiate toh kidouna dang khat a-om nawn hi. Huai hun in Hushat mi Sibbekai in milian suante lak a khat Saph kichi athat hi.
10021019	Philistia mite toh Gob ah akidou nawn uh. Bethlehem mi Jaar oregim tapa Elhanan in Git mi Goliath unaupa athat a, huai mi teipi tuh siam kolpi bang ahi.
10021020	Gath ah kidouna a-om nawn hi. Huai ah mi khat asan a sang, akhut langkhat tuaktuak a khutzung guk, akhe langkhat tuaktuak a khezung guk, avek a sawmnih-le-li nei a-om hi. Amah leng milian suan ahi.
10021021	Ama'n Israel mite ava chou a, David unau, Shimei tapa Jonathan in ana that hi.
10021022	Huai lite Gath a milian suante ahi ua, huchi in David leh amite khut in asita uhi.
10022001	Huan amelma tengteng khut a pan leh Saul khut a pan Toupa'n ahutkhiak ni in David in hiai la thu Toupa kiang ah agen hi.
10022002	Ama'n, “ Toupa tuh ka suangpi leh ka kulhpi leh hon humbitpa ahi.
10022003	Ka suangpi Pathian, amah ka muang ding a; ka phaw leh ka hotdamna kii, ka insang leh ka bukna ahi. Ka hondampa, hiamgamna a pan na hon hondam hi.
10022004	Phat tak Toupa ka sam ding a; huchi in hon doute lak a pan hotdam in ka om ding hi.
10022005	“Sihna tuikihot in hon umkimvel a, Pathian limsak lou mite tui lian in ahon lausak hi.
10022006	Sheol khauhualte'n hon gaksuak a; sihna thangte'n hon awksak uh.
10022007	Ka lungzin in Toupa ka sam a, ahi, ka Pathian ka sam hi: Atempul a pan ka aw aza a, ka kikou husa abil ah alut hi.
10022008	“Huaitak in lei aling a, akisat hi. Aheh ziak in van kingaknate nangawn kisat in alingta uhi.
10022009	Anak a pan meikhu azamtou a, akam a kipan katmang hat meikuang apawt a, huai in meihol akuangsak hi.
10022010	Ama'n vante akunsak a, ahong suk ua; akhenuai ah mialna a-om hi.
10022011	“Cherub tung ah atuang a, alengta hi, huih khate tung ah amah muh in a-om hi.
10022012	Khomial in aki-umkimvel a, tui vomte, van meipi sah miuhmeuhte abawl hi.
10022013	Ama a vakna tawn in meiholte akuang hi.
10022014	“ Toupa van a pan ahong ging a, Tungnungpen in a-aw asuaksak hi.
10022015	Thaltangte akapkhia a, amau adalhzaksak a; khua aphesak a, abuaizaksak hi.
10022016	Toupa salhna, anakvangte a hu in tuipi lampite ahong kilang a, lei kingaknate hihlat in a-omta hi.
10022017	“Ama'n tunglam a pan hon sawksuk a, ahon len a; tuipi a pan hon kaikheta hi.
10022018	Kei hon dou hattak a pan hon humbit a, kei hon hote a pan leng; kei a ding in lah ahat lo ngal ua.
10022019	Ka tuahsiat ni in ahon sual ua, himahleh Toupa ka kingakna ahi.
10022020	Ama'n mun awngthawltak ah hon pikhia a; ka tung a akipah ziak in hon humbitta hi.
10022021	“ Toupa'n ka diktatna dungzui in ka tung ah ahih a; ka khutte sianthoudan dungzui in hon thuk hi.
10022022	Toupa lampite ka zui a, ka Pathian a pan giloutak in ka paimang ngei ngal kei a!
10022023	Avaihawmna tengteng ka ma a a-om ziak in: adan thusehte ka kilehheisan ngei kei hi.
10022024	Ama ah leng gensiatbei ka hi lai a, ka thulimlouhna a pan ka kihuikhia hi.
10022025	Huaiziak in Toupa'n ka diktatdan bang zel in hon na thukta a; amitmuh a ka sianthoudan bang zel in.
10022026	“Chingtheite kiang ah chingthei in na kilang ding a, mihoihkimte kiang ah hoihkim in na kilang ding hi.
10022027	Misiangthoute kiang ah siangthou in na kilang ding a; migenhakte kiang ah genhak in akilang ding.
10022028	Haksa thuak mite na hondam ding a; mikisatheite na niamsak theihna ding in atung uah na mit atu gige hi.
10022029	“ Toupa aw, ka khawnvak na hi ngal a. Toupa'n ka mialna avaksak ding.
10022030	Nang panpih in sepaihhon toh ka tai a, ka Pathian panpih mah in kulh ka tawmkan hi.
10022031	“Pathian lampi ahoihkim a; Toupa thu etchetsa ahi; amah muangte tengteng a ding in amah lum ahi.
10022032	Toupa lou kua Pathian a-om a? I Pathian lou kua suangpi a-om a?
10022033	Pathian ka hatna leh thilhihtheihna ahi a, Ama'n ka lampite hoihkim in abawl hi.
10022034	Ka khepekte zukpi khepek bang in abawl a; ka mun sangte ah hon omsak zel hi.
10022035	Ka khutte galdou ding in asinsak a; huchi in ka bante'n dal thalpeu atansak hi.
10022036	“Nang na hotdamna lum na hon pia a; na nunnemna in na hon bawl lianta hi.
10022037	Ka nuai a ka kalsuante na liansak a, huchi in ka khete atolh kei uhi.
10022038	Hon doute ka delhpha a, ka hihmang a; hihmanthat sipsip a a-om masiah uh ka nungkik kei hi.
10022039	Athohnawn theihlouhna ding un ka hihmang sipsip a, ka satzan ngiingei a; ahi, ka khenuai ah apukta uh.
10022040	Nang galdou ding in hatna in na hon gak a; hon sual mite ka nuai ah na nuaisiahta hi.
10022041	Hon hote ka hihmanthat theihna ding in, kei hon doute ngawng na hon pia hi.
10022042	Amaute adak kimvel ua, himahleh hondam ding kuamah a-om kei uh. Toupa a-en ua, himahleh adawng kei.
10022043	Huaitak in ke'n lei a leivui bang in ka khennel dimdem a, kholak buannawi bang mai in ka tuanzak a, ka thehzak vekta hi.
10022044	“Nang ka mite kisualna a pan leng na hon humbit a; namte lutang hi ding in na hon kemhoih hi. Ka theih ngei louh nam in ka nna asemta ding.
10022045	Ka kiang ah namdangte ahong kipe ding ua; ka tanchin azaktak un ka thu azui ding uh.
10022046	Namdangte atulmang ding ua, a-insang ua kipan ling kawm in ahong paisuk ding uh.
10022047	“ Toupa ahing hi. Ka suangpi phat in om henla; ka hotdamna suangpi Pathian tawisang in om hen:
10022048	Phu hon laksakpa leh ka nuai a mite koihpa Pathian;
10022049	Hon doute a pan hon domtoupa: Kei hon doute tunglam ah na hon domkang a, hiamgammi lak a pan na hon humbit hi.
10022050	“Huaiziak in aw Toupa , namte lak ah kipahthu ka hon hilh ding a, na min phat in la ka sa ding hi.
10022051	Akumpipa a dia amah hotdamna insang ahi a, athaunilh, David leh asuante tung ah tangtawn in hehpihna alangsak,” achi hi.
10023001	Hiaite David thu nanungpen ahi. Jesse tapa David, sangtak a dopsang a ompa, Jakob' Pathian thaunilhpa, Israelte la phuaktu in achi hi.
10023002	Toupa Kha in kei hon zang in agen a, athu ka lei ah a-om hi.
10023003	Israelte' Pathian in agen a, Israelte' Suangpi'n ka kiang ah agen hi. Mi tung a vaihawmmi adik ngeingei dia Pathian lau kawm a vai ahawm ding ahi.
10023004	Amah ni ahong suah a, meipi om het lou zingsang vak bang ahi dia, vuahzuk khit a khua hong siang a lei a loupa selnou mitmet bang ahi ding ahi.
10023005	Pathian a ding in ka inkuan hiai bang hi kei mahleh, kei toh tangtawn thukhun abawl a, bangkim kizentak in ahihkip hi. Ama'n khangsak kei mahleh hiai ka hotdamna leh ka deihlam tengteng ahi.
10023006	Himahleh Belial tate bel avek un ling paihkhiak bang ahi ding uh, khut a lak theih louh ahih ziak un.
10023007	Himahleh amau khoih ding mi sik leh teipi a, akivat ding ahi. Huchi in amun mah ah hal ahi ding uh.
10023008	Hiaite David sepaih hangsante min ahi. Tekmon mi Joseph Bashebeth sepaih heutute lak a heutupa ahi a; amah khatvei thu a mi zagiat thatpa Eznit mi Adino achih mah uh ahi.
10023009	Ama zom in Ahoh tapa Dodo tapa Eleazar ahi. Amah Philistia mite kidou dia akikaihkhop ua, achou ua, Israel mite a paimang vek lai ua David kiang a sepaih hangsan thumte lak a khat ahi.
10023010	Amah athou a, Philistia mite akhut a kham matan namsau leng khah lou khop in athat hi. Huai ni in Toupa'n nakpitak in azouta a, mite ama nung ah gallak thil la ding lel in ahong kik nawn uhi.
10023011	Amah nung in Harar mi Agee tapa Shammah ahi. Behiang tampi omna lou a Philistia mite akikaihkhop lai un, Israel mite ataikek uhi.
10023012	Himahleh amah huai mun ah adingh a, aveng a, Philistia mite athat a, Toupa'n nakpitak in azohsak hi.
10023013	Sepaih hangsan sawmthum lak a thumte ahohsuk ua, buhlak laitak in David kiang ah Adullam kohawm ah ahoh ua; Philistia sepaihte'n Rephaim Phaizang ah panmun akhoh uh.
10023014	Huchih lai in David insung ah a-om a, huchih lai mah in Bethlehem ah Philistia sepaihte a-om uhi.
10023015	David in tui alunggulh mahmah a, “Bethlehem a tuileh tui, kulh kongkhak kiang a dawn ding hong pia om le uh aw!” achi hi.
10023016	Huchi in sepaih hangsan thumte'n Philistia sepaihte apaltan ua, kulh kongkhak kiang a Bethlehem tuileh ava tawi ua, David kiang ah apaipih uh. Himahleh ama'n ana dawn ngam kei a, Toupa a ding in abungkhe zawta hi.
10023017	“Aw Toupa , hiai ka hih louh ding dan; sih ngap a kuante sisan ka dawn dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in adawn nuam kei hi. Huai thilte sepaih hangsan thumte'n ahih uh ahi.
10023018	Zeruiah tapa Joab unau Abishai thumte lak a aheutupen uh ahi. Teipi in mi zathum sual in athat a, thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi.
10023019	Thumte lak ah pahtawi tuak pen ahi kei maw? Huaiziak in aheutu ding un abawl uhi. Himahleh tungnungpen thumte lak atung zou kei hi.
10023020	Kabzeel mihangsan tapa Jehoiada tapa Benaiah thil thupitak hihpa in Moab mi Ariel tapate nih athat a; huchi in ahohsuk a, vuk kiak hun lai in leikohawm ah humpinelkai leng ava that hi.
10023021	Aigupta mi, miliantak athat a; huai Aigupta mi in teipi atawi hi. Himahleh ama'n chiangkhun tawi in ava zuan a, Aigupta mi teipi tawi ava sut a, ama teipi in asunlumta hi.
10023022	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah in huchibang thil ahih ziak in sepaih hangsan thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi.
10023023	Mi sawmthumte sang in pahtawi tuak ahi. Himahleh tungnungpen thumte lak a simtel ahi zou kei hi. David in amah vengtu heutu in akoih hi.
10023024	Sawmthumte lak a khat Joab unau Asahel ahi: Bethlehem a mi Dodo tapa Elhanan;
10023025	Harod mi Shammah, Harod mi Elika;
10023026	Pal mi Helez, Tekoa mi Ikkesh tapa Ira;
10023027	Anethot mi Abiezer, Hushath mi Mebunnai;
10023028	Ahoh mi Zalmon, Netophah mi Maharai
10023029	Netophah mi Baanah tapa Heleb, Benjamin suan, Gebeah a mi Ribai tapa Ittai;
10023030	Pirathon mi Benaiah, Gaash luite a mi Hidai;
10023031	Arbath mi Abi-albon, Barhum mi Azmaveth;
10023032	Shaalbon mi Eliaba, Jashen tapate lak a Jonathan;
10023033	Harar mi Shammah, Arar mi Sharar tapa Ahiam;
10023034	Mankat mi Ahasbai tapa Eliphelet, Gilon mi Ahithophel tapa Eliam;
10023035	Karmel mi, Hezrai, Arba mi Paarai;
10023036	Zobah mi Nathan tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani;
10023037	Ammon mi Jelek, Beeroth mi Nahari, Zeruiah tapa Joab galvan tawi;
10023038	Ith mi Ira, Ith mi Gareb;
10023039	Hit mi Uriah ahi uh. Avek un sawmthum-le-sagih ahi uh.
10024001	Huan Toupa hehna Israelte tung ah ahong tung nawn hi. Amaute kalh a David tokthou in, “Kuan inla, Israel mite leh Judah mite sim vek in,” achi hi.
10024002	Kumpipa'n akiang a om sepaih heutu Joab kiang ah, “Israel nam tengteng lak ah Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in vialvak inla, mi bangzah ahi ua ka theihtheihna ding in sim vek in,” achi hi.
10024003	Joab in kumpipa kiang ah, “ Toupa na Pathian in mite pungsak in bangzah a tam, amun za leng, toupa ka pu in muta ve, himahleh toupa ka kumpipa'n bangziak a huai thei ut se ahia?” achi hi.
10024004	Himahleh kumpipa thu in Joab leh sepaih heutute thu azouta hi. Huchi in Joab leh sepaih heutute Israel mite sim ding in kumpipa kiang a pan apaikheta uhi.
10024005	Jordan gal ava kah ua, Gad Phaizang laitak taklam a khopi om Aroer ah Jazer pha in om mun akhoh uhi.
10024006	Gilead gam leh Tahtim-hodshi gam atung ua; Dan-jaan leh Zidon kimvel atung uhi.
10024007	Tura kulh leh Hiv mite kho tengteng leh Kanaan mite kho tengteng ava tung ua; Beer-sheba a, Judah simlam ah apaikhia uhi.
10024008	Huchi in gam tengteng atotsuah khit uh, kha kua leh ni sawmnih abei in Jerusalem ahong tungkik uhi.
10024009	Joab in mihing phazah kumpipa apia a; Israel gam ah namsau tawi mihangsan nuaigiat a-om uhi. Judah mi bel nuainga a-om hi.
10024010	Mihing asim khit un David lungtang anuam het kei. David in Toupa kiang ah, “Ka thilhih ah nakpitak in ka na khialta hi. Himahleh tu in aw Toupa , na sikha thulimlouhna koihmang ding in ka hon ngen hi. Haihuai mahmah in ka na hihta,” achi hi.
10024011	Zingsang a David athohleh David zawlnei Gad kiang ah Toupa thu ana tung hi.
10024012	“Kuan inla, David kiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Thil thum ka hon tah a, na tung a ka hih ding in khat tel in, achi,’ ” chi in.
10024013	Huchi in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, ahilh a, akiang ah, “Na gam a na tung a kum sagih sung kial akiak hia? Na melmate'n hon delh ua kha thum sung amau a pan na taimang hia? Na gam a ni thum sung hipi ahong len? Hon sawlpa bangchi in ka dawng dia? Kingaihtuah inla, hon hilh in,” achi hi.
10024014	David in Gad kiang ah, “Ka lung azing mahmah mai hi. Toupa khut sung ah hon puklutsak in; azahngaihna lah athupi mahmah ngal a. Mihing khut sung ah zaw hon puklutsak ke'n,” achi hi.
10024015	Huchi in Toupa'n Israel mite tung ah zingsang a pan hun seh tan hipi alengsak hi. Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan mi singsagih asi uh.
10024016	Angel in hihse dia Jerusalem lam a, akhut alikleh Toupa'n thil hoih lou hih atup alunghei thak a, mite hihmangpa angel kiang ah, “Ahunta; na khut lik nawn ke'n,” achi hi. Toupa angel bel Jebus mi Araunah phual chin ah a-om hi.
10024017	David in mi that angel amuh in Toupa ahoupih a, “Ngai in, ka na khialta, dikloutak in thil ka na hihta hi. Himahleh hiai belamte'n bang ahih ua? Na khut in kei leh ka pa inkote hon khoih zaw hen,” achi hi.
10024018	Huai ni in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, akiang ah, “Kuantou inla, Jebus mi Araunah phual ah Toupa a ding in maitam va doh in,” achi hi.
10024019	Huchi in David, Toupa thupiak bang a Gad in ahilh bang in akuantouta hi.
10024020	Araunah in amalam a-etleh, amah lam zuan a kumpipa leh asikhate hong pai amu hi. Huchi in Araunah apawt a, amai a lei si in kumpipa ma ah abokkhup hi.
10024021	Araunah in, “Bang achia ahia toupa ka kumpipa, asikha kiang a ahong?” achi hi. David in, “Mipite lak a hipi akhawltheihna dia Toupa a dia maitam doh ding a na phual lei ding in ahi ka hong pai,” achi hi.
10024022	Araunah in David kiang ah, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n hoih asak bang in la henla, lan hen: En in, halmang a lat ding in bawngtalte a-om ua, sing ding in phual vanzatte leh bawng vante a-om uhi.
10024023	Aw toupa, hiai tengteng Araunah in kumpipa ape vek hi,” achi hi. Araunah in kumpipa kiang ah, “ Toupa na Pathian in hon dawng hen,” achi hi.
10024024	Kumpipa'n Araunah kiang ah, “Hilou e, aman pia in ka hon lei teitei ding ahi. Kei lam a bangmah senna om lou in Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah halmang thillatte ka lan kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in phual leh bawngtalte dangka shekel sawmnga in aleita hi.
10024025	David in huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a, halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi. Huchi in Toupa agam tung ah alungkimta a, Israel gam a pan hipi akhawlta hi.
11001001	David hong upa in, ahong tek mahmahta hi. Huchi in puan in akhuh zel ua, himahleh lum asa thei tuan kei hi.
11001002	Asikhate'n akiang ah, “Ka toupa kumpipa a ding in nungak zong le ungla; kumpipa kiangchin ah om gige henla, kemleh; na angsung ah hong lumleh, ka toupa kumpipa'n lum ahon sa thei ding,” achi uhi.
11001003	Huchi in Israel gam tengteng ah nungak melhoih azong ua, Shunam mi Abishag ava mu ua, kumpipa kiang ah api uhi.
11001004	Huai nungak amel ahoih mahmah a, kumpipa akem a, anek-tak abawlsak hi. Himahleh, kumpipa'n amah akithuahpih kei hi.
11001005	Haggith tapa Adonijah in, “Kei kumpipa a pang ding ka hi ve,” chi in akingai thupi mahmah hi. Kangtalai leh sakol tungtuangmi sawmnga ama a tai dingte toh akisasak hi.
11001006	Apa'n lah chik lai in leng, “Bangziak a hichibang a hih na hia?” chi in alungkhamsak ngei kei hi. Amah melhoih mahmah a, Absalom sangpa ahi.
11001007	Ama'n Zeruiah tapa Joab leh siampu Abiathar thu adong a; amau Adonijah lam ah apang ua, amah apanpih uhi.
11001008	Siampu Zadok, Jehoiada tapa Benaiah, zawlnei Nathan, Shimei, Rei leh David pawl a mihangsante bel Adonijah lam ah apang kei uhi.
11001009	Adonijah in belamte, bawngtalte, ganta vak thaute Zoheleth' Suang ah agou a, huai tuh En-rogel kiangchin a om ahi. Kumpipa tapate, a-unau tengteng leh Judah gam a kumpipa sikha tengteng achial hi.
11001010	Zawlnei Nathan, Benaiah, mihangsante leh a-unaupa Solomon bel achial kei hi.
11001011	Nathan in Solomon nu Bathsheba kiang ah, “Haggith tapa Adonijah, i toupa David theih louh in vaihawm in a-om chih za lou na hi maw?
11001012	Na bitna ding leh na tapa Solomon bitna ding ka hon hilh ding.
11001013	Kumpipa David kiang ah va lut inla, akiang ah, Aw toupa, ka kumpipa, na sikhanu kiang ah na tapa Solomon, ka nung in ahong lal ngeingei dia, amah ka laltutphah ah atu ding, chi in na kichiam ahi kei maw? Bang achia Adonijah in vaihawm ahia?” va chi dih achi hi.
11001014	“Ngai in, kumpipa na va houpih laitak in ke'n leng ka hon zui lut sam dia, na thugen ka hon hihkippih ding,” chi in agen hi.
11001015	Bathsheba kumpipa kiang ah indan ah ava lut a; kumpipa a-upa mahmahta a, Shunam mi Abishag in kumpipa nek-tak a na bawl hi.
11001016	Bathsheba in kumpipa kun in zahtakna apia hi. Kumpipa'n, “Bang na deih a?” ana chi hi.
11001017	Ama'n, “Ka toupa aw, Toupa na Pathian min lou in na sikhanu kiang ah, na tapa Solomon ka nung in ahong lal ngeingei ding a, amah ka laltutphah ah ahong tu ding, chi in na kichiam khinta hi.
11001018	Ngai in, tu in Adonijah lah alal a; nang ka kumpipa toupa'n lah na thei kei hi.
11001019	Bawngtalte, ganta vak thaute leh belamte agou zengzung a, kumpipa tapa tengteng leh siampu Abiathar leh sepaih heutu Joab achial a, na sikha Solomon achial kei hi.
11001020	Huchi in toupa aw, ka toupa nung a alaltutphah a kua hong tu ding ahia chih na gen ding in, Israelte tengteng mit nang ka toupa kumpipa tung ah atu hi.
