11001021	Huchi lou in zaw hichi ahi ding a, toupa kumpipa apute kiang a a-ihmut sam hun chiang in, kei leh ka tapa Solomon thil hihkhial in ahon sep mai ding uh,” achi hi.
11001022	Ngai in, huchi a kumpipa ahoupih laitak in, zawlnei Nathan ava lut sam hi.
11001023	“En dih, zawlnei Nathan ahong,” chi in kumpipa ahilh uh. Kumpipa kiang ava tun in, kumpipa ma ah amai a lei si in abokkhup hi.
11001024	Nathan in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, ka nung ah Adonijah alal dia, ka laltutphah ah atu ding na chi maw?
11001025	Tuni in akuansuk a, bawngtalte, ganta vak thaute leh belamte agou zengzung a, kumpipa tapa tengteng, sepaih heutute leh siampu Abiathar achial hi. Ngai in, ane un adawnkhawm ua, Pathian in kumpipa Adonijah hondam hen, achi uh.
11001026	Himahleh kei na sikha ngei leh siampu Zadok, Jehoiada tapa Benaiah leh na sikha Solomon ahon chial kei hi.
11001027	Hiai toupa ka kumpipa thu a hih ahih ngalleh toupa ka kumpipa'n anung a laltutphah a tu dingpa akua pen ahia chih na sikhate na hilh nai lou na hi ding maw?” achi hi.
11001028	Kumpipa David in adawng a, “Bathsheba hon sapsak dih ua,” achi hi. Kumpipa kiang ah ava hoh a, kumpipa ma ah ava dingh hi.
11001029	Kumpipa akichiam a, “Lungzinna tengteng a ka hinna humbitpa Toupa ahin bang in,
11001030	na kiang a Toupa Israelte' Pathian min lou a, na tapa Solomon ka nung in ahong lal ngeingei ding. Ka sik in ka laltutphah ah ahong tu ding, chi a ka kichiam bang in, tuni in ka hih ding,” achi hi.
11001031	Bathsheba amai a lei si in abokkhup a, kumpipa zahtakna pia in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa David tangtawn in dam zel hen,” achi hi.
11001032	Kumpipa David in, “Siampu Zadok leh zawlnei Nathan, Jehoiada tapa Benaiah hon va sapsak dih ua,” achi hi. Amau kumpipa ma ah ava pai uhi.
11001033	Kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Na toupa uh sikhate pi unla, ka tapa Solomon keimah sabiltung mahmah ah tuangsak unla, Gihon ah pisuk un.
11001034	Siampu Zadok leh zawlnei Nathan in Israelte kumpipa ding in thau nilh uhen. Pengkul mut unla, Pathian in kumpipa Solomon hondam hen, chi un.
11001035	Huchi in amah na zuitou ding ua, ka laltutphah ah ahong tu ding hi; amah lah ka sik a lal ding ahi ngal a. Amah Israel gam leh Judah gam vaihawmtu dia ka seh ahi,” achi hi.
11001036	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah in kumpipa adawng a, “Amen, Toupa , ka toupa kumpipa Pathian in leng pha sa hen.
11001037	Toupa ka toupa kumpipa kiang a a-om bang in, Solomon kiang ah leng om sam henla, ka toupa kumpipa David laltutphah sang in alaltutphah hih thupizaw hen,” achi hi.
11001038	Huchi in siampu Zadok, zawlnei Nathan, Jehoiada tapa Benaiah, Kereth mite leh Pelet mite ahohsuk ua, David sabiltung tung ah Solomon atuangsak ua, Gihon ah api uhi.
11001039	Siampu Zadok in puanin a pan thau koihna ala a, Solomon anilh hi. Pengkul amut ua, huchi in mi tengteng in, “Pathian in kumpipa Solomon hondam hen,” achi uhi.
11001040	Mi tengteng in amah azuitou ua, mite'n tamngaite atum ua, akipak mahmah ua, ahusa ging un lei akheng hi.
11001041	Adonijah leh amichial, akiang a om tengteng in ankuang alui khit un aza ua, Joab in pengkul mutging azak in, “Khopi sung a husa ging zuazua bangchidan ahia le?” achi hi.
11001042	Huai achih laitak in, ngai in, siampu Abiathar tapa Jonathan ava hoh a, Adonijah in, “Hong pai dih ve, nang zaw mikizen na hi a, tanchinhoih na hon tun mahmah ding,” ana chi hi.
11001043	Jonathan in adawng a, Adonijah kiang ah, “Tun ke'ng e, toupa aw, kumpipa David in Solomon kumpipa in abawl khinta hi.
11001044	Amah toh siampu Zadok, zawlnei Nathan, Jehoiada tapa Benaiah, Kereth mite leh Pelet mite kumpipa'n asawl a, kumpipa sabiltung tung ah atuangsak uhi.
11001045	Siampu Zadok leh zawlnei Nathan in Gihon ah kumpipa ding in thau anilh uh. Huai a pan nuamsatak in apaitou ua, huai in khopi sung athawn zuazua hi. Husa na zak uh huai ahi,” achi hi.
11001046	Huchi in Solomon leng lalgam tutphah ah atuta hi.
11001047	Kumpipa sikhate i toupa kumpipa David vualzawl ding in ahong ua, “Pathian in na min sang in Solomon min hihhoih zaw henla, na laltutphah sang in ama laltutphah hih thupizaw hen,” ahong chi uh. Huchi in kumpipa lupna tung ah akun hi.
11001048	Kumpipa'n leng, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, tuni mahmah a ka laltutphah a tu ding hon pepa phat in om hen. Ka mit mahmah in amuta,” achi hi.
11001049	Adonijah michial tengteng in alauta ua, athou ua, alampi chiat uah apaivekta uhi.
11001050	Adonijah in Solomon alau a, athou a, maitam kii ava len hi.
11001051	“Ngai in, Adonijah in kumpipa Solomon alau a; kumpipa Solomon in asikha namsau a that lou ding in ka kiang ah kichiam phot hen,” chi in maitam kii alen hi chi in Solomon ahilh uhi.
11001052	Solomon in, “Miginomtak ahih asuklat peuhmahleh asamzang khat leng lei ah ake kei ding. Gitlouhna anei chih theihna a-omleh bel asi ding,” achi hi.
11001053	Huchi in kumpipa Solomon in mi asawl a, maitam a pan ava pisuk ua, amah ava hoh a, kumpipa Solomon ma ah akun hi. Solomon in akiang ah, “Na inn ah pai in,” ana chi hi.
11002001	Huan David sih ni ding ahong naita a; atapa Solomon thu apia hi.
11002002	“Leitung pumpi lampi ah ka pai sam dia; nang hattak leh pasalphatak in om in.
11002003	Na thilhih peuhmah leh na kiheina lam peuhmah a na lamzan theihna ding in Mosi Dan a gelh ahih bang in, Toupa na Pathian in alampite zui ding leh adan thusehte, athupiakte, avaihawmte leh athu theihsakte pom dia thu apiakte zui in.
11002004	Toupa'n ka tungtang thu a, ‘Na suante'n alungtang tengteng uleh alungsimtak ua ka mitmuh a thutak a-om ding a, a-omdan ua apilvan uleh Israelte laltutphah a tu ding mi na tatlak kei ding, chi a agen ahihkip ding hi.’ ”
11002005	“Zeruiah tapa Joab in ahon bawldan, Israelte sepaih heutu nih Ner tapa Abner leh Jether tapa Amasa abawldan na thei hi. Amaute athah a, kilep lai a kidou sisan suah a, atai a kawnggak leh akhedap but a kidouna sisan abansakdan.
11002006	Huchi in pha na sakdan bang in hih inla, alu a kelsam pou in han ah lungmuangtak in tumsak ke'n.
11002007	Gilead mi Barzillai tapate tung ah hehpihna hihlang in. Na dohkan a an ummi ding in telsak in; na unau Absalom a pan ka taimang lai in ka kiang ah ahong ngal a.
11002008	Ngai in Bahurim mi, Benjamin suan Gera tapa Shimei na kiang ah a-om hi. Ama'n Mahanaim a ka hoh lai in hamse hoihloupi ahon lohkhum hi. Himahleh Jordan ah hong dawn ding in ahong kuan hi. Huai ah, namsau in ka hon that kei ding, chi in Toupa min lou in akiang ah ka na kichiamta hi.
11002009	Huchi in moh lou in zaw koih ke'n; Mipil na hi ngal a. Atung ah bangchi in na hih dia chih ahihleh na thei mai ding. Alu a kelsam pou in sisan toh han ah na tumsak ding ahi,” achi hi.
11002010	David bel apute kiang ah a-ihmu samta a, David khopi ah avui uhi.
11002011	Israelte tung a David lal sung kum sawmli ahi. Hebron ah kum sagih alal a, Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum-le-thum alal hi.
11002012	Apa David laltutphah ah Solomon atu a; huchi in agam nakpitak a hihkip in ahong omta hi.
11002013	Huan Solomon nu Bathsheba kiang ah Haggith tapa Adonijah ahoh a. Ama'n, “Hoih lam thu a hong na hi maw?” ana chi hi. Ama'n, “Hoih lam thu ah hi e,” achi hi.
11002014	“Na kiang ah banghiam gen ding ka nei hi,” achi nawn a, ama'n, “Gen ve,” achi hi.
11002015	Ama'n, “Lalgam kei a ahita chih leh Israelte tengteng in leng kumpipa ding in kei ahon en gige uh chih na thei. Himahleh ka unaupa a ding in lalgam hei a om a, Toupa sehdan in ka unaupa a ahong hita hi.
11002016	Tu in thil khat nget ding ka hon nei a, hon nial ke'n,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Gen ve,” achi hi.
11002017	Ama'n, “Hehpih in kumpipa Solomon hon houpihsak inla, na thu sel lou ding ahi ngal a, Shunam mi Abishag zi ding in hon neisak in,” achi hi.
11002018	Bathsheba in, “Hileh ake, kumpipa ka hon na houpihsak ding,” achi hi.
11002019	Bathsheba in Adonijah a dia kumpipa Solomon houpih ding in akiang ah ahohta hi. Amah mu ding in kumpipa adingh a, ama ah akun a, alaltutphah ah atuta hi. Kumpipa nu a ding in laltutphah akoihsak a; ataklam ah atu hi.
11002020	“Thil neuchik khat ka hon ngen ut hi. Hon nial mahmah ke'n,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Nu, hon ngen ve, ka hon phalsak lou kei ding,” achi hi.
11002021	Ama'n, “Shunam mi Abishag na unaupa Adonijah zi ding in neisak in,” achi hi.
11002022	Kumpipa Solomon in adawng a, anu kiang ah, “Bangchidan a Shunam mi Abishag, Adonijah a dia ngen na hia oi? Gam leng ngetsak vanglak tanla; amah ka u avo oi. Amah a ding leh siampu Abiathar leh Zeruiah tapa Joab a ding in leng ngen tanla,” achi hi.
11002023	Kumpipa Solomon in Toupa min lou in, “Adonijah thilnget in amah tung a sihna thu gen ahih kei himhimleh Pathian in alohloh in hon loh mai hen, huai sang a thupizaw in leng.
11002024	Toupa , athuchiam bang a hon hihkip, ka pa David laltutphah a hon tusak, inkuan hon na phuhkhiaksakpa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Adonijah tuni mahmah a asihsak ngeingei ding ahi,” chi in akichiamta hi.
11002025	Huchi in kumpipa Solomon in Jehoiada tapa Benaiah asawl a, ama'n ava sual a, athatta hi.
11002026	Siampu Abiathar kiang ah kumpipa'n, “Anathoth a na inn-le-lou ah pai in, si tak lah na hi ngal a. Himahleh ka pa David ma a Toupa Pathian bawm na na zawn zel ziak in leh ka pa haksatna thuak tengteng na na thuak sam zel ziak in, tu in zaw ka hon that kei ding,” achi hi.
11002027	Huchi in Solomon in Abiathar Toupa siampu ahihna atawpsak hi. Hiai Toupa'n Shiloh a Eli inkuante tungtang thu agen atangtun theihna ding ahi.
11002028	Huai thu Joab kiang ahong tung a, Absalom lam ah Joab apang kei na a, Adonijah lam ah apang hi. Joab Toupa puanin ah atai a, maitam kiite alen hi.
11002029	“ Toupa puanin ah Joab atai a, ngai in, maitam bul ah a-om,” chi in kumpipa Solomon ahilh uhi. Kumpipa Solomon in Jehoiada tapa Benaiah, va sual in, chi in asawl hi.
11002030	Benaiah Toupa puanin ah ahohtou a, akiang ah, “Kumpipa'n hong pawtkhia heh, achi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hilou e. Hiai ah ka si zaw ding,” achi hi. Benaiah in, “Joab in huchi in ahon na dawng hi,” chi in kumpipa kiang ah thu atun nawn hi.
11002031	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Achih bang in hih inla, va sual inla, vui in, aziak om het lou a Joab in sisan asuahna a pan kei leh ka pa inkote na hulsak theihna ding in,” achi hi.
11002032	“Amah sang a kizenzaw leh hoihzaw mi nih, Ner tapa Abner, Israelte sepaih heutu leh Jether tapa Amasa, Judahte sepaih heutu ka pa David theih louh a sual a, namsau a athah ziak in Toupa'n alutung ah asisan akiksak nawn ding hi.
11002033	Huaiziak in asisan uh Joab lutung leh asuante lutung ah tangtawn in akik nawn dia; David leh asuante leh a-inkote leh alaltutphah tung ah Toupa a pan lungmuanna tangtawn in a-om nilouh ding,” achi hi.
11002034	Huchi in Jehoiada tapa Benaiah va hohtou in ava sual a, athatta hi. Huchi in gamdai ah amah inn mah ah vui in a-om hi.
11002035	Kumpipa'n sepaihte tung ah asik in Jehoiada tapa Benaiah apangsak hi. Kumpipa'n Abiathar sik in Siampu Zadok apangsak hi.
11002036	Kumpipa'n Shimei asamsak a, akiang ah, “Jerusalem ah inn kilam inla huai ah teng inla, huai a pan koi dang mah ah pawt ke'n.
11002037	Na pawt ni, Kidron lui na kan ni in na si ngeingei ding chih thei in. Na sisan nangmah lutung mah ah a-om ding,” achi hi.
11002038	Shimei in kumpipa kiang ah, “Adik hi. Toupa ka kumpipa'n agen bang in na sikha in ahih zel ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Jerusalem ah Shimei sawtkuamtak ateng hi.
11002039	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum thum nung in Shimei sikhate lak a nih, Gath kumpipa Maakah tapa Akish kiang ah ataimang uhi. “Ngai in, na sikhate Gath ah a-om uh,” chi in Shimei ahilh uhi.
11002040	Shimei athou a, asabiltung avan a, asikhate zong ding in Gath a Akish kiang ah ahohta hi. Shimei in Gath a pan asikhate ava pikik hi.
11002041	Shimei Jerusalem a pan apawt a, Gath ah hoh in ahong kik nawn chi in Solomon ahilh uhi.
11002042	Kumpipa'n Shimei asamsak a, akiang ah, “Na pawt ni, gamdang a na pawtkhiak ni in na si ngeingei ding, chi in Toupa min lou a hon kichiamsak in, ka hon theisak ahi kei maw? Nangmah in leng ka kiang ah, na thugen ka zak ahoih hi, na chi hi.
11002043	Bangziak a Toupa kichiamna leh ka hon thupiak zui lou na hia?” achi hi.
11002044	Kumpipa mah in Shimei kiang ah, “Na lungtang sunggil gitlouhdan, ka pa David tung a na gamtatdante na thei vek hi. Huchi in Toupa'n na gitlouhna nangmah lutung ngei ah akiksak nawn ding.
11002045	Kumpipa Solomon vualzawl in a-om dia, David laltutphah Toupa ma ah tangtawn in hihkip ahi ding,” achi hi.
11002046	Huchi in kumpipa'n Jehoiada tapa Benaiah thu apia hi. Amah akuan a, ava sual a, athatta hi. Huchi in gam Solomon khut a hihkip in a-omta hi.
11003001	Huan Solomon in Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh toh kizolhna abawl hi. Pharaoh tanu akitenpih a, ama inn ding leh Toupa' inn ding alam khit ma leh Jerusalem kulh a-umsuak masiah David khopi ah a-omsak hi.
11003002	Mipite kia mun sangte ah akithoih ua, huai ma in Toupa min a dia inn akilam nai takdih louh ziak in.
11003003	Solomon in Toupa a-it a, apa David dan thusehte azui a; mun sangte a kithoih in, gimlimte kia ana hal hi.
11003004	Kithoih ding in Gibeon ah kumpipa ahoh hi; huai lah mun sang poimohtak ahi ngal a. Solomon in huai maitam tung ah halmang thillat sangkhat alan hi.
11003005	Gibeon ah zan in Solomon kiang ah amang in Toupa ahong kihil hi. Pathian in akiang ah, “Ngen in, bang ahia ka hon piak ding?” achi hi.
11003006	Solomon in, “Na sikha, ka pa David na mitmuh a thutak leh diktatna leh lungtang diktak pu a a-om bang in, nang akiang ah hehpihna thupi mahmah na langsak hi. Nang hiai hehpihna thupi mahmah ama a ding in na guan a, nang alaltutphah a tu ding tapa na pia a, tuni a ahong om petmah bang in.
11003007	Aw Toupa , ka Pathian, nang na sikha, ka pa David sik in kumpipa in na hon bawlta hi. Kei zaw naupang leltak ka hi a; thu tung lam leh pawt lam leng ka thei kei hi.
11003008	Na sikha, na mitelte, mi tampi, atam ziak ua sim seng vual louh leh azah theihseng vuallouhte lak ah a-om hi.
11003009	Huaiziak in na mite vai hawmsak ding in na sikha theihsiamna lungtang pia in, huchi a asia leh apha ka khenkak theihna ding in. Na mi hiai zah zouzai kua'n ahia vai hawmsak thei ding?” achi hi.
11003010	Solomon in huai ngen a, athugen in Toupa akipaksak hi.
11003011	Pathian in akiang ah, “Na damsawtna ding, nang a dia hauhsaknate, na melmate sihna ding ngen lou a, vaihawm siamna dia theihsiamna na nget zawk ziak in;
11003012	ngai in, na nget bang in ka hihta hi. Ngai in, pilna leh theihsiamna lungtang ka hon pia hi. Huchi in na ma ah nang bang kuamah a-om kei ding ua, na nung in leng nang bang kuamah ahong om sam kei ding.
11003013	Na nget louh, hauhsakna leh zahtakhuaina leng ka hon pe lai hi. Huchi in na damsung in kumpipate lak ah nang bang a-om kei ding uh.
11003014	Na pa David in azuih bang a ka dan thusehte leh ka thupiakte zui dia ka lampite a na paileh ka hon damsawtsak lai ding hi,” achi hi.
11003015	Solomon akhanglou a, ngai in, mang ana hi. Huchi in Jerusalem ah ahoh a, Toupa thukhun bawm ma ah adingh a, halmang thillat leh lemna thillatte alan a, asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuang alui hi.
11003016	Kizuak numei nih kumpipa kiang ah ahong ua, ama ah ava dingh uhi.
11003017	Numei khat in, “Aw ka toupa, hiai numei toh inn khat a tengkhawm ka hi ua; huai inn a amah toh ka om lai un nau ka nei hi.
11003018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ka nau neih nung ani thum ni in hiai numei in leng nau anei sam hi. Omkhawm ka hi ua; huai inn a om koute gel lou, kuamah mikhual om a-om kei hi.
11003019	Zan in hiai numei ta ana si a; ama'n adelhlup khak ahi.
11003020	Zan lai in athou a, na sikhanu a-ihmut kal in, ka sik a ka tapa ana la a, apom a, ama ta si pen ka ang ah ana sial hi.
11003021	Zingsang a ka ta nawi pe dia ka thohleh, ngai in, ana si khin hi. Himahleh zingsang a ka etchetleh ngai in, ka suan ka tapa pen ana hi kei,” achi hi.
11003022	Numei dang in, “Hilou e. Ahing pen kei tapa ahi a, asi pen nang tapa ahi,” achi hi. Khat in, “Hilou, asi pen na tapa ahi a, ahing pen ka tapa ahi,” achi tinten hi. Huchibang in kumpipa ma ah agen tuaktuak uhi.
11003023	Kumpipa'n, “Khat in, ahing pen ka tapa ahi a, asi pen na tapa ahi,” achi hi. Khat pen in, “Hilou, asi pen na tapa ahi, ahing pen ka tapa ahi zaw, achi zel hi,” achi hi.
11003024	Kumpipa'n, “Namsau hon va lak un,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa ma ah namsau ahon tawi uhi.
11003025	Kumpipa'n, “Naungek hing pen tum nih suah unla, akimkhat khat pia unla, adang khat kiang ah akimkhat pia un,” achi hi.
11003026	Naungek hing pen nu in ata alainat mahmah ziak in kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw ka toupa, naungek hing pen amah pe mai in, that mahmah ke'n,” achita hi. Khat pen in, “Kei a hi tuan dah henla, nang a leng lah hi tuan kei heh. Himahleh tumtan hi hen,” achita hi.
11003027	Huchi in kumpipa'n adawng a, “Naungek hing pen that kei unla, amah pia un. Amah anu ahi,” achi hi.
11003028	Israel tengteng in huai thu a kumpipa thukhendan ana za ua; kumpipa alau uh. Vaihawm ding in Pathian pilna amah ah a-om chih athei uhi.
11004001	Huchi in Kumpipa Solomon tuh Israel tengteng kumpipa ahong hita hi.
11004002	Hiaite amiliante ahi uh: Zadok tapa Azariah siampu ahi.
11004003	Shisha tapa Elihoreph leh Ahiah laigelhmi ahi uh. Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat tanchin gelhmi ahi.
11004004	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah sepaih heutu ahi a; Zadok leh Abiathar siampu ahi uh.
11004005	Nathan tapa Azariah heutute tung a mi ahi a; Nathan tapa Zabud siampu leh kumpipa lawm ahi khawm hi.
11004006	Ahishar insung lam heutu ahi a; Abda tapa Adoniram phutluih nasemte heutu ahi.
11004007	Solomon in Israel tengteng tung ah heutu sawm-le-nih anei hi. Huaite'n kumpipa a ding leh a-inkote a ding in nek-le-tak angaihtuah zel uhi. Mi khat in kum khat in kha khat zel nek ding tak ding ape zel hi.
11004008	Hiaite amin uh ahi: Ephraim tanggam ah Ben-hur.
11004009	Makaz, Shaalbim, Beth-shemesh leh Elon-beth-hanan ah Ben-deker ahi.
11004010	Arubboth ah Ben-hesed ahi a, ama'n Sokoh leh Hepher gam teng leng atangkhawm hi.
11004011	Dor gam tengteng ah Ben-abinadab ahi a, ama'n Solomon tanu Taphath zi in anei hi.
11004012	Tanak khua leh Meggiddo khote, Jezreel kho nuai, Zarethan khochin a om Beth-shean bial teng ah, Beth-shean apan Abel-meholah, Jokmeam gam bul tan in Ahilud tapa Baana ahi.
11004013	Ramoth-gilead ah Ben-geber ahi a, ama'n Manasseh tapa Jair khote, Gilead gam a omte atangkhawm hi. Bashan gam a Argob bial, kho thupi taktak sawmguk, kulh leh akalhna daltawn neite leng atangkhawm hi.
11004014	Mahanaim ah Iddo tapa Ahinadab ahi.
11004015	Naphtali ah Ahimaaz ahi a, ama'n leng Solomon tanu Basemath zi in anei hi.
11004016	Asher leh Bealoth khua ah Hushai tapa Baana ahi a;
11004017	Issakar ah Paruah tapa Jehoshaphat;
11004018	Benjamin ah Elah tapa Shimei;
11004019	Amorte kumpipa Sihon leh Bashan kumpipa Og gam, Gilead gam ah Uri tapa Geber ahi a, Amah huai gam heutu omsun ahi.
11004020	Judahte leh Israelte tuipi piau a piaunel zah mahmah in atam ua, ane un adawn ua, nuamtak in a-om zel uhi.
11004021	Solomon in lui a pan Philistiate gam leh Aigupta gamgi pha in gam teng ah vai ahawm hi. Thilpiakte ahon tawi zel ua, Solomon damsung teng a-nna asem uhi.
11004022	Solomon ni khat an nekkhiak, tangbuang nel mahmah pota sawmthum leh tangbuang pota sawmguk;
11004023	bawngtal thautak sawm, gam a bawngtal sawmnih leh belam zakhat ahi uh. Hiaite lou leng sakhite, sangaite, sakhital, ak vak thaute leng ahi lai uhi.
11004024	Lui gal khen lam gam teng, Tiphsah a pan Gaza tan, lui gal khen lam a kumpipate tung ah alal hi. Akimvel a mi teng toh kilem in a-om hi.
11004025	Solomon damsung in Judahte leh Israelte Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan in michih amau grep leh theipi chinna nuai ah bittak in ateng chiat uhi.
11004026	Solomon in kangtalai kai sakol singli leh sakol tungtuangmi singkhat-le-sangnih anei hi.
11004027	Hiai heutute'n amau tankha kha in Solomon leh kumpipa Solomon dohkan hong um teng nek ding apia ua, piak kim louh anei ngei kei uh.
11004028	Michih in ahih dia seh bang dungzui in a-omna ding mun ah sakolte leh gan taihat mahmahte a ding in barli buh leh buhpawlte ahon pua uhi.
11004029	Pathian in Solomon pilna leh theihsiamna thupi mahmah leh lungsim letna tuipi piau a piaunel bang mai apia hi.
11004030	Solomon pilna in suahlam ta tengteng pilna leh Aigupta mite pilna tengteng akhup vek hi.
11004031	Mi tengteng sang in apilzaw a, Mahol tapate, Ezrah mi Ethan, Heman, Kalkol leh Darda sang in leng. Huchi in akim a nam tengteng lak ah amin athangkheta hi.
11004032	Paunak sangthum agen a, alate sangkhat leh nga ahi uh.
11004033	Sing tanchin, Lebanon tang a Sidar sing a pan kulhbaang a hong selkhia hissop tan in agen hi. Gamsate tanchin, vasate tanchin, bokvak a paite tanchin leh ngasate tanchin leng agen hi.
11004034	Huchi in Solomon pilna ngaikhe ding in nam tengteng a pan apilna zasate leh lei a kumpipa teng ahong pai uhi.
11005001	Huan Tura kumpipa Hiram in Solomon kiang ah asikhate asawl hi; apa mun ah kumpipa in amah thau anilh uh chih lah ana zata ngal a. Hiram in David a-it gige him ahi.
11005002	Solomon in mi sawl in Hiram kiang ah,
11005003	“Ka pa David in Toupa'n akhepek nuai a akoih masiah akimvel a mun chih mual chih a kidounate ziak a Toupa a Pathian min a dia inn alam theihlouhdan na thei hi.
11005004	Tu in Toupa ka Pathian in mun chih mual chih ah muanna ahon neisakta hi. Melma leh vangsiatna leng a-om kei hi.
11005005	Ngai dih, Toupa'n ka pa David kiang ah, ‘Na tapa na sik a na laltutphah ka luahsak ding in ka min a ding in inn ahon lam ding, chi a ana gensa bang in, Toupa ka Pathian min a ding in inn lam ka tum hi.’
11005006	Huaiziak in tu in Lebanon tang a sidar singte hon phuksak ding in thu pia inla, ka sikhate leng na sikhate lak ah ahong tel sam ding ua, na sikhate loh ahihleh na chih peuhmah ka hon pe ding. Zidon mite bang a sing phuksiam ka lak uah kuamah a-om kei uh, chih lah na thei ngal a,” chi in agensak hi.
11005007	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hiram in Solomon thu azak in akipak mahmah hi. “Hiai mi tampi tung a vaihawm dia tapa piltak David pepa Toupa tuni in phat in om hen,” achi hi.
11005008	Huchi in Hiram in Solomon kiang ah, “N'on thukhah ka na za hi. Sidar sing thu leh meilah sing thu na deih peuhmah ka hih ding.
11005009	Ka sikhate'n Lebanon tang a pan tuipi pha in ahon lasuk ding ua, n'on mun sehsak a tuipi a tolh ding in ka gaklopsak ding hi. Huai ah ka phelsak dia, nang na na la ding hi. Nang leng ka inkote nek ding tum in ka deih na hon hihsak sam ding,” chi in mi asawl hi.
11005010	Huchi in Hiram in sidar sing leh meilah sing Solomon deih teng apia hi.
11005011	Solomon in Hiram inkote nek ding in buh pota singnih leh sathau suk pota sawmnih apia hi. Hiai Solomon in kum teng a Hiram apiakdan ahi.
11005012	Toupa'n achiam bangtak in Solomon pilna apia hi. Hiram leh Solomon kikal ah kilemna a-om a; anih un kilemna thukhun abawl uhi.
11005013	Kumpipa Solomon in Israel tengteng lak ah phutluih nasemmi abawl a; amau mi singthum ahi uh.
11005014	Lebanon ah kha khat a kikheng zel in singkhat asawl zel hi. Kha khat Lebanon ah a-om ua, kha nih amau inn ah. Phutluih nasem mite heutu Adoniram ahi.
11005015	Solomon in tangte ah thil pomi singsagih leh suangsekmi singgiat anei hi.
11005016	Huaite sim louh in Solomon in anasep tung a heutu tuam, nasep vengmi sangthum-le-zathum anei lai hi.
11005017	Kumpipa thupiak in inn suangphum dia lep ding in suang lian pipi, suang mantam pipi leh suang seksa ahon pua uhi.
11005018	Inn lam mite, Solomon mite leh Hiram mite leh Gebal mite'n suangte asek ua, huai inn lamna ding in sing leh suangte abawl uhi.
11006001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam a pan Israel suante apawt nung uh kum zali-le-sawmgiatna kum, Israelte tung a Solomon lal akum lina, Ziv kha, akha nihna in Toupa' inn lam apan uhi.
11006002	Solomon in Toupa a dia a-inn lam adunglam tong sawmguk ahi a, availam tong sawmnih ahi, asanlam tong sawmthum ahi.
11006003	Huai inn a Mun Siangthou malam a inlim availam tan tong sawmnih a sau ahi a, amalam a pen availam tong sawm ahi.
11006004	Inn a ding in tohlet neuchik vathangkalh om in abawl hi.
11006005	Huai inn baang kimvel leh tempul baang kimvel in tempul mun baang kimvel leng huai inn baang si in inn chial nei alam hi.
11006006	Akimvel in dantan abawl a; achial nuainungpen availam tong nga ahi a, alai a pen availam tong guk ahi. Athumna availam tong sagih ahi. Kalvaite ahihleh inn baang a kigolh akiphamoh kei; inn polam ah akimvel in baang ah akingakna akibawl ziak ahi.
11006007	Huai inn alam lai un suang alaihna mun a seksa vek a bawl ahi. Huchi in alam sung un sek ging, heipi ging leh sik vanzat ging huai inn ah zak ahi kei hi.
11006008	Dantan laita pente kongpi huai inn taklam pang ah a-om a; alaita ah kahna kivial in akahtou ua, alaita a pan athumna tan ah.
11006009	Huchi in huai inn ahon lam a, azou a, inn bel sidar inkam leh apek in akhuh hi.
11006010	Inchial neite akisituah vek in tong nga chiat a sang in alam a; huaite sidar sing toh apeh hi.
11006011	Solomon kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
11006012	“Hiai inn na lam laitak tungtang thu, ka dan thusehte na pom a, ka vaihawmte na zuih a, ka thupiak tengteng zui dia na pom peuhmahleh, na pa David kiang a ka gensa, huai ka thu na tung ah ka hihkip ding.
11006013	Israel suante lak ah ka teng dia, ka mi Israelte ka limsak lou kei ding,” achi hi.
11006014	Huchi in Solomon in huai inn alam a, azouta hi.
11006015	Inn sunglam baang ding in sidar singpek azang a; apialkhang a pan atunglam baang pha in asunglam ah sing abelh vek hi. Apialkhang ding in meilah singpek aphahbeh hi.
11006016	Inn phaitam lam tong sawmnih pen pialkhang a pan baangte tan in sidar singpek vek in abawl a; biakna mun, Mun Siangthoupen a ding in leng asunglam ah azang hi.
11006017	Huai inn, abiakna munpi adunglam tong sawmli ahi.
11006018	Huai insung lam ah apakmum leh apakpalh limgelh kilawm sidar sing a khuak a-om a; avek in sidar sing vek ahi a; suang himhim muh ahi kei hi.
11006019	Toupa thukhun bawm koihna ding in huai insung ah biakna lam ah mun abawl hi.
11006020	Huai, biakna mun sung adunglam tong sawmnih, availam tong sawmnih, asanlam tong sawmnih ahi a, dangka-eng hul ngen in aluan a; sidar sing a bawl maitam leng aluan hi.
11006021	Huchi in Solomon in huai insung dangka-eng hul ngen in aluan a; biakna mun malam dangka-eng khainiang in adaikaih a; huai dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006022	Huai in avek a azoh pha in apumpi in dangka-eng in aluan tawmtawm hi. Biakna mun maitam pumpi leng dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006023	Biakna mun ah tong sawm tuaktuak a sang, cherub nih olive sing in abawl hi.
11006024	Cherub kha khat pen tong nga ahi a, cherub kha langkhat pen tong nga mah ahi. Akha mong khat a pan akha langkhat mong kikal tong sawm ahi.
11006025	Cherub khat pen leng tong sawm ahi a; cherubte akikim geih un, akibang geih uhi.
11006026	Cherub khat sanlam tong sawm ahi a, cherub khat pen leng huai toh kikim mah ahi.
11006027	Cherubte insung gilzaw ah akoih a; cherubte kha akizak a, khat kha in baang langkhat lam ava khoih a, cherub khat pen kha in leng baang langkhat akhoih a; huai inn laitak ah akha uleh akha uh akisukhatuah uhi.
11006028	Huai cherubte dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006029	Inn baang tengteng akimvel in cherubte, tum sing leh pakpalh limte gelh kilawm insung lam leh polam ah abawl hi.
11006030	A-inn pialkhang sunglam leh polam dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006031	Biakna mun lutna ding in olive sing kongkhak abawl a; kongpi lutung leh kongpi biangte abaang seh nga suah seh khat chiat ahi.
11006032	Huchi in olive sing inn kongkhak nih abawl a; huai ah cherubte tum sing leh pakpalh limte gelh kilawm in abawl hi. Huai dangka-eng in aluan a; cherubte leh tum singte dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006033	Tempul lutna ding in abaang seh li suah seh khat chia in olive kongpi khuam abawl lai hi.
11006034	Meilah sing kongkhak nih toh; kongkhak khat a pek nihte kheptheih ahi a, kongkhak khat pen apek nih leng kheptheih ahi.
11006035	Huaite ah cherubte tum sing leh pakpalh limte agelh a; huai gelh kilawm mamtak in dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11006036	Tempul huangsung intual sunggilzaw pen suangsek chial thum leh sidar singpek thuah khat in abawl hi.
11006037	Akum lina, Ziv kha in Toupa inn suangphum lep khit ahi.
11006038	Akum sawm-le-khatna, Bul kha, akha giatna in huai inn zuih ding bangbang, bangkim mansa vek ahi. Huchi in kum sagih sung alam hi.
11007001	Huan Solomon in a-inn kum sawm-le-thum alam a, huchi in a-inn pumpi alamzou vekta hi.
11007002	Lebanon gammang inn, khuamvual li, khuam tung a sidar singpek tung ah alam a; adunglam tong zakhat ahi. Availam tong sawmnga ahi a, asanlam tong sawmthum ahi.
11007003	Huai khuam a kinga dantan sawmli-le-nga tunglam ah sidar singphel a khuh ahi a; vual khat ah sawm-le-nga zel ahi.
11007004	Vual thum ah tohlette a-om a, vak leh vakte bel vual thum in akigalsai vek uhi.
11007005	Kongkhak leh khuam tengteng singpek aning li nei a bawl ahi a, vak leh vakte vual thum in akigalsai vek uhi.
11007006	Inn lim khuam nei abawl a; adunglam tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmthum ahi. Huaite ma ah akhuamte leh ama a lutna tung kah toh inlim abawl hi.
11007007	Avaihawmna ding laltutphah inlim, vaihawmna inlim, avaihawmna ding abawl hi. Huai pialkhang langkhat a pan langkhat pha a sidar sing a khuh ahi.
11007008	Ama tenna ding in, inn lim nung a, huangsung intual dang nei om pen huchi mah bang a bawl ahi. Huai inlim mah bang in Solomon in zi a Pharaoh tanu aneih, inn ding leng alamsak lai hi.
11007009	Hiai tengteng suang manpha pipi, ahun geihgeih a sek zel suang, atna a at a lam ahi. Sunglam leng, polam leng asuangphum a pan alek pha in, huchi mah bang in polam ah huangsung intual lianpi tanpha in.
11007010	Suangphum suang manpha pipi, suang lian pipi, suang tong sawm leh suang tong giatte a lep ahi.
11007011	Huai tunglam ah suang manpha pipi, suang ahun geihgeih zel a sek leh sidar sing ahi.
11007012	Akimvel in huangsung intual lianpi suangsek chial thum leh sidar singpek thuah khat a um ahi. Toupa' inn huangsung intual sunggilzaw leh inn inlim mah bang in.
11007013	Kumpipa Solomon in Tura a pan mi sawl in, Hiram asam hi.
11007014	Huai mi Naphtali nam meithai tapa ahi a, apa Tura khomi, dalsekmi ahi. Amah dalsek lam himhim ah apil in atheisiam in akhutsiam petmah hi. Kumpipa Solomon kiang ah ahoh a, a-nna tengteng asepsak vek hi.
11007015	Dal khuam nih, tong sawm-le-giat a sang; akimvel a teh a tong sawm-le-nih a lian tuaktuak abawl hi.
11007016	Khuam lu a koih ding dal sunbawk nih abawl a; bawk khat sanlam tong nga ahi a, bawk khat pen sanlam tong nga mah ahi.
11007017	Khuampite dawn ah lubawkte gial im-iam leh kihek nginngian a-om a; hiai lubawk kisuangsawn bel khainiang kiphan sagih, bawk khat pen a ding in leng sagih mah a kituam ahi.
11007018	Huchi in khuamte abawl a; khuam lu a bawkte tuamna ding in gial im-iam khat tung ah akimvel vual nih a-om a; huchi mah bang in khat tung ah leng a-om lai hi.
11007019	Inn lim a khuam dawn a bawk ah lili lim atuang a, huai tong li ahi.
11007020	Khuam nih dawn a bawkte gei ah gial im-iam kiang ah theibuhfaite a-om a; theibuhfaite bel huai bawkte ah zanih tuaktuak a volh in a-om uhi.
11007021	Tempul inlim ah khuamte adingsak a; taklam khuam adingsak a, amin Jakin asa a; veilam khuam leng adingsak a; amin Boaz asa hi.
11007022	Khuamte dawn ah lili lim atuang a; huchi in khuam lam nasep teng zohsiang ahita.
11007023	Dal tuibem lianpi, tong sawm, asanlam tong nga asung a; agei tong sawmthum kimvel ahi.
11007024	Agei nuai ah pakmum lim in akimvel vek a, tong sawm ahi a, tuibem kimvel in a-om hi. Huai pakmumte vual nih in a-om ua, sunkhawm pah ahi.
11007025	Huai bawngtal sawm-le-nih tung ah akinga a, thum in mallam anga ua, thum in tumlam anga ua, thum in simlam anga ua, thum in suahlam anga uhi. Atung uah tuibem akitung a, ameilam un asunglam adoh hi.
11007026	Khutpek chia a sah ahi a; agei lili pak bang, nou gei bang a bawl ahi. Bath sangnih takna ahi.
11007027	Dal in tunsawnna sawm abawl a; tunsawnna khat sau lam tong li ahi a, availam tong li mah ahi a, asanlam tong thum ahi.
11007028	Tunsawnna bawldan hichibang ahi. Huai in kuak anei a, huai kuakte ageite kikal ah a-om hi.
11007029	Ageite kikal a kuakte ah humpinelkaite, bawngtalte leh cherubte atuang ua; agei tungte ah tunsawnna a-om hi. Humpinelkaite leh bawngtalte nuailam ah kilawmsaknate a-om dindian hi.
11007030	Tunsawnnate ah dal kangtalai li leh dal tung chih a-om chiat a; aning lite ah kingakna a-om chiat hi. Kisilna nuailam ah akingakna sun a-om a, asik chiat ah kilawmsakna a-om chiat hi.
11007031	Valh gong sung tong khat ahi; akam kimvel valh bang a bem ahi a, tong khat-le-akim ahi. Akam gei kimvel gial kilawm ahi a, akuakte ning li ahi a, abem kei uh.
11007032	Akuak nuailam ah kangtalai lite a-om ua; kangtalai tungchihte tunsawnna ah a-om uhi. Kangtalai sandan tong khat-le-akim ahi.
11007033	Huai kangtalaite bawldan sakol kangtalai khe bawldan bang ahi a; atungchihte, avalhte, asutkalhnate leh laibawkte avek a sun ahi.
11007034	Tunsawnna ning li chiat ah kingakna li a-om a; huai kingaknate tunsawnna toh pum khat vek ahi uh.
11007035	Tunsawnna tung ah valh, tong kimkhat a sang a-om a; tunsawnna tung a atunna khete leh akuakte pum khat vek ahi.
11007036	Atunna khepekte leh akuakte ah azat bangbang in cherubte, humpinelkaite leh tum singte atuangsak a, akimvel in kilawmsakna a-om dindian hi.
11007037	Huchibang vek in tunsawnna sawm abawl a; avek in pum khat a sun ahi chiat ua, kikim chiat, bawldan kibang geih ahi chiat uh.
11007038	Kisilna bel sawm dal in abawl a; kisilna bel khat in bath sawmli adong a; kisilna bel tong li chiat ahi uh. Tunsawnna sawm tung ah kisilna bel khat akitung chiat hi.
11007039	Tunsawnnate inn taklam pang ah nga atung a, inn veilam pang ah nga mah. Tuibem pen inn taklam pang ah suahlam ah simlam nga in atung hi.
11007040	Hiram in kisilna belte, vutluahte, maiphiat kuangte abawl a, huchi in Toupa inn a dia Solomon abawlsak teng azousiangta hi.
11007041	Khuam nihte, khuam dawn a bel bang a bawk nihte, khuam dawn a bel ban a bawk nih tuamna gial im-iam nihte,
11007042	tuamna gial im-iam nih a dia theibuhfai zalite, khuam dawn a bel bang a bawk nih tuamna ding gial im-iam tuaktuak a dia theibuhfai vual nihte;
11007043	tunsawnna sawm leh tunsawnna tung a kisilna bel sawmte;
11007044	tuibem khat leh tuibem nuai a bawngtal sawm-le-nihte,
11007045	belte, vutluahte leh maiphiat kuangte toh. Tui-um belsuan tengteng Toupa' inn a dia Hiram in kumpipa Solomon abawlsak dal nawttet a bawl vek ahi.
11007046	Jordan Phaizang ah Sukkoth leh Zarethan kikal a bellei omna ah hiai teng kumpipa'n asung hi.
11007047	Huai tui-um belsuan tengteng atam mahmah ziak in Solomon in buk khe lou in akoih a; dal bukzah pen theihkhiak ahi kei hi.
11007048	Solomon in Toupa' inn a tui-um belsuan om tengteng abawl a; dangka-eng maitam leh tanghou koihna dohkan dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11007049	Mun siangthoupen ma a khawnvak koihnate, taklam a nga leh veilam a ngate dangka-eng siang in; pakte, khawnvakte leh taitehte dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11007050	Noute, khawnvak puantehnate, maiphiat kuangte, keute leh mei laknate dangka-eng siang in; insung gilzaw, Mun Siangthoupen kongkhakte leh inn, tempul, kongkhak bulhnate dangka-eng in aluan hi.
11007051	Huchi in kumpipa Solomon in Toupa' inn a dia abawl tengteng azouvekta hi. Huchi in Solomon in apa David in ana latkhitsa dangka chite, dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuante alalut a, Toupa' inn a goute lak ah akoihta hi.
11008001	Huchi in Solomon in Israel upate, anam intekpen tengteng Israel suan inkuan a lupente, Jerusalem a kumpipa Solomon kiang ah David khopi, Zion a pan Toupa thukhun bawm zawngtou ding in akaikhawm vek hi.
11008002	Israel mi tengteng Ethanim kha, akha sagihna ah, ankuangluina ah kumpipa Solomon kiang ah akikaikhawm vek uhi.
11008003	Israel upa tengteng ahong ua, siampute'n bawm azawng uhi.
11008004	Toupa bawm leh Kihoupihna Puanin leh puanin a tui-um belsuan siangthou tengteng tan in siampute leh Levi chite'n azawngtou uhi.
11008005	Kumpipa Solomon leh Israel suan omkhawm tengteng akiang a hong kikhawmte bawm ma ah a-omkhawm uh. Belam leh bawngtal atam ziak a sim seng vual louh leh azah theihseng vual louh in akithoih uhi.
11008006	Siampute'n Toupa thukhun bawm omna ding, insung a biakna mun a Mun Siangthoupen ah cherubte kha nuai ah alalut uhi.
11008007	Cherubte'n bawm omna tung zawn ah akha uh azak gige ngal ua, cherubte'n bawm leh azawnna chiangtawnte ahuap vek uhi.
11008008	Azawnna chiangtawn asau mahmah ziak in, azawnna chiangtawn mongte biakna mun ma, mun siangthou a pan amuh theih hi. Himahleh inn polam ah zaw adawk kei, tuni tan huai ah a-om nilouh hi.
11008009	Aigupta gam a pan apawt ua Toupa Israel suante toh thu akhun lai a Mosi in Horeb tang a suangpek nih akoihte kia lou ngal, huai bawm sung ah bangmah dang a-om kei.
11008010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, siampute Mun Siangthou a pan ahong pawtkhiaktak un meipi in Toupa' inn ahong dim meuhmouh hi.
11008011	Meipi ziak in siampute nasem in a-om thei kei uh. Toupa thupina in Toupa' inn lah adimsak vek ngal a.
11008012	Solomon in thu agen a: “ Toupa'n , mial bikbek ah ka om ding,” achi hi.
11008013	“Na tenna ding in, tangtawn a na om gigena ding inn ka hon lamsak petmah hi,” achi hi.
11008014	Kumpipa akinunghei a, Israel kikaikhawm tengteng avualzawl a, Israel kikaikhawm tengteng adingh dipdep uhi.
11008015	Ama'n, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, ka pa David kiang a amah kam mahmah a,
11008016	Aigupta gam a pan ka mi Israelte ka pikhiak ni a pan Israel nam lak a koi lai khua leng ka min omna ding, inn lamna ding ka tel ngei kei hi. Himahleh ka mi Israelte heutu ding in David ka tel hi, chi a ana genpa, amah khut mahmah a hon pichingsakpa phat in om hen.
11008017	“Ka pa David in Israelte' Pathian, Toupa min dia inn lam alungsim in ana tum hi.
11008018	Himahleh Toupa'n ka pa David kiang ah, ‘Na lungsim in ka min a ding in inn lam na tum a, hichibang lungsim na put na hihhoih hi.
11008019	Himahleh nang zaw, inn na lam kei ding. Na tapa, na khal a hong pawtkhe ding in ka min a ding in inn alam zaw ding,’ ” ana chi hi.
11008020	“ Toupa'n athugen ahihkip a; Toupa'n ana chiamsa bang ngei in ka pa David mun ka hon luah in, Israel laltutphah ah ka hong tuta a, Israelte' Pathian, Toupa min a ding in inn ka na lamta ngei hi.
11008021	Huai ah bawm omna ding mun ka na sep a, huai ah Aigupta gam a pan apikhiak lai a i pute uh kiang a athukhun, Toupa thukhun a-om,” achi hi.
11008022	Toupa maitam ma, Israel hong kikhawm tengteng muh in Solomon adingh a, van lam ah akhut azaktou hi.
11008023	“Aw Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, na sikha lungtang tengteng na mitmuh a omte kiang a thukhun tangtun a hehpihna hihlang zel, na sikha ka pa David kiang a thuchiam tangtunpa, tunglam ah leh nuailam lei ah nang bang Pathian dang a-om kei.
11008024	Ahi, nang na kam in thu na gen a, na khut in na hon lohchingsakta a, tuni a, hong omta ngei bang in.
11008025	Huaiziak in aw Toupa Israelte' Pathian, na sikha ka pa David kiang a, na suante ka mitmuh a na om bang a ka mitmuh a om sam ding a a-omdan uh apilvan peuhmah uleh ka mitmuh in Israelte laltutphah a tu ding na tatlak kei ding, chi a na chiam tangtun in.
11008026	Aw Israelte' Pathian, na sikha ka pa David kiang a thu na gensa hehpih in tungsak in.”
11008027	“Himahleh lei ah Pathian ateng mahmah dia hia? Ngai in, van leh vante' van a leng ta lou na hi a; hiai ka inn lam ah nak tat tuak kei na tel chia!
11008028	Himahleh Toupa ka Pathian, tuni a na sikha in ahon sapna thumna, athusam ngaihkhiaksak in, na sikha thumna leh ngetna hon limsak in.
11008029	Hiai mun lam nga a na sikha in thum a thu asam ding ngaikhia a, nang, huai ah ka min a-om ding, na chihna mun ngei a, inn lam a sun leh zan a na mit ahah gige theihna ding in.
11008030	Na sikha leh na mi Israelte'n hiai mun lam nga a, ahong thum chiang un angetnate uh na ngaihkhiaksak zel in. Ahi, na tenna mun, van ah na ngaikhia in; ngaikhia inla, ngaidam in.”
11008031	“Mi kuapeuh in a-invengte tung ah thil hihkhial in, kichiamsak hial ahong kiphatmohleh hiai inn a na maitam ma ah hong kichiam henla,
11008032	nang van ah na ngaikhia inla, gamtang inla na sikhate vai hawmsak in, migilou pen mohpaih in alutung ah a-omdan nga inla, midiktat pen siamtangsak in adiktatna bangbang amah pia in.
11008033	Na mi Israelte'n na tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ua melmate lak a avuallelh ua nang lam ahong ngat nawn ua, na min aphat ua, hiai inn a thum a thil ahon nget uleh,
11008034	nang van ah ana ngaihkhiaksak inla, na mi Israelte khelhna ngaidam inla, apute uh gam na piak ah pikik nawn in.”
11008035	“Na tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ua van akikhak a, vuah ahong zuk louh hun chiang in, hiai mun lam nga a ahong thum ua, na min apuankhiak ua, amau na bawl gentheih ziak a akhelhnate uh akisik uleh,
11008036	nang van ah ana ngaikhia inla, na sikhate leh na mi Israelte khelhna ngaidam inla, apaina ding uh lampi hoih sinsak inla, na mite goutan dia na piakna gam ah vuah zusak in.”
11008037	“Ka gam ua kial ahong kiak a, hipi ahong len a, keuna hiam, muatna hiam, khaukhup hiam, lung hiam ahong om a, amelmate un akongpi kim ua ahong um ua, hipi khatpeuh, chinatna bangpeuh ahong tunleh,
11008038	na mi Israel tengteng lak a amau lungtang a hipi om hi a thei a, hiai inn lam nga a khut zankhia a, thumna leh ngetna ahon lat uleh;
11008039	na omna van ah ana ngaikhia inla, ngaidam inla, gamtang inla, nang alungtang uh theipa, michih a-omdan bangbang in lohchingsak in; nang, nang kia lah mihing ta tengteng lungtang theipa na hi ngal a.
11008040	Ka pute uh na piak gam a aten lai teng uh nang ahon lauhtheihna ding un.”
11008041	“Na mi Israelte hilou namdang, na min ziak a gam gamlapi a pan hong paite tungtang thu leng;
11008042	na min thupi mahmah, na khut hat mahmah, na ban na zak thu na za chiat ding ahi ngal ua, huaite'n hiai inn lam nga a, ahong thum chiang un,
11008043	nang na omna van ah ana ngaikhia inla, namdang in hon nget ana hihsak in. Na mi Israelte bangmah a leitung mite'n na min atheih ua, laudan ahong siam ua, hiai ka inn lam in na min pu ahi chih ahon theihtheihna ding un.”
11008044	“Na mite'n amelmate uh na sawlna lamlam ah adou ua, na khopi tel lam nga leh na min a dia ka lam inn lam nga a, Toupa kiang a ahong thum uleh,
11008045	athumna uleh angetna uh nang van ah ana ngaikhia inla, athu uah gamtang in.”
11008046	“Na tung a thil ahihkhelh uleh, kuamah thil hihkhial lou lah a-om ngal kei a; atung ua na hehna, melma gam gamla mahmah hiam, naichik hiam a leng sal a api ua;
11008047	sal a apina gam ua ahong kingaihtuahkhiak ua, akisik ua, thil i na hihkhialta, dikloutak leh gilou mahmah in i na gamta uh, chi a sal a pi mite gam a nang ahon nget uleh,
11008048	amelma amau sal a pite gam a alungtangtak uleh alungsimtak ua nang lam ahong ngat ua, apute uh na piak gam lam leh na khopi tel lam leh na min a dia ka inn lamlam nga a na kiang a ahong thum uleh;
11008049	athumna uleh angetna uh nang na omna van ah ana ngaikhia inla, athu uah gamtang in.
11008050	Na mi na tung a thil hihkhialte leh na tung a ana tatlekna uah atatleknate tengteng uh ngaidam inla; sal a pite'n ahehpih theihna ding un hehpihna neisak in.
11008051	Na mi na goutan, Aigupta gam a pan sik haltuina sung a pan na pikhiakte lah ahi ngal ua.”
11008052	“Ahon sap chiang ua na ngaihkhiak dia, na sikha ngetna leh na mi Israelte ngetna lam a na mit na hah gige theihna ding in.
11008053	Aw Toupa Pathian , ka pute uh Aigupta gam a pan na pikhiak lai a na sikha Mosi zang a na gen bang in na goutan ding in leitung mite lak a pan na hihtuam lah ahi ngal ua,” achi hi.
11008054	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Solomon in Toupa kiang a athumna leh ngetna tengteng agen khit in, Toupa maitam ma a khukdin a, van lam a akhut zaktou a om lai athou hi.
11008055	Adingtou a, aw ngaihtak in Israel kikhawm tengteng avualzawl hi.
11008056	“Athuchiam tengteng bang zel a, ami Israelte khawlna pepa Toupa phat in om hen. Asikha Mosi zang a athuchiam hoih tengteng thu khat leng avuaksuak kei,” chi in.
11008057	“ Toupa i Pathian, i pute kiang a a-om bang in i kiang uah om henla; hon paisan in hon donsak lou kei hen.
11008058	Huchi in alampi tengteng tawn ding leh i pipute ana piak khitsa bang a, athupiakte, adan thusehte, avaihawmte zui dia i lungtangte ama lam a angatsak theihna ding in.
11008059	Asikha thu leh ami Israelte thu ah ani omdan bang zel a, agamtat theihna ding in hiai ka thugen, Toupa ma a ngetna ka tutte sun leh zan in Toupa i Pathian ma ah om gige hen.
11008060	Toupa Pathian ahi a, kuamah dang a-om kei uh chih leitung a mite'n atheihtheihna ding in.
11008061	Huchi in adan thuseh bang a om ding leh athupiakte zui ding in Toupa i Pathian lam ah na lungtangte uh hoihkim hen, tuni a bang in.”
11008062	Israel tengteng leh Solomon in Toupa ma ah kithoihna alan uhi.
11008063	Solomon in Toupa a dia alat kilemna kithoihna ding in bawngtal singnih-le-sangnih leh belam nuaikhat-le-singnih ahi. Huchibang in kumpipa leh Israel suan tengteng in Toupa' inn alan uhi.
11008064	Huai ni mah in kumpipa'n Toupa inka zawn a intual huangsung laitak ahihsiangthou hi. Huai ah halmang thillatte, tangbuang thillatte, kilemna thillat thaute alan hi. Aziak bel huai halmang thillatte, tangbuang thillatte, kilemna thillat sathaute huai dal maitam atat zoh louh ziak ahi.
11008065	Huchi in huai hun in Solomon leh Israel tengteng, mipi kikhawm tampi, Hamath lutna a pan Aigupta gam lui pha a mite'n Toupa i Pathian ma ah ni sagih leh ni sagih, ni sawm-le-li sung ankuang aluikhawm uhi.
11008066	Ani giat ni in mipite akikhensak a, amau kumpipa avualzawl ua, huchi in Toupa'n asikha David leh ami Israelte tung a ahoihna huchi lawmlawm a alatsak ziak in lungsim nuamsa leh kipak mahmah in a-inn lam uah apaita uhi.
11009001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Solomon in Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn lam a, lunggulhtak a, atup tengteng ahih khit vek nung in,
11009002	Gibeon khua a, akiang a, akilak bang in Toupa Solomon kiang ah ahong kilak nawn hi.
11009003	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na thumna leh na ngetna ka ma a na hon tutte ka na ngaikhia hi. Na inn lam tangtawn a ka min omna ding in ka hihsiangthouta hi. Ka mit leh ka lungtang huai ah tangtawn in a-omta ding hi.
11009004	Nang leng thu ka hon piak peuhmah bang a hih dia na pa David a om bang, lungtang hoihtak pu leh lungsim diktak pu a ka mitmuh a na om a, ka dan thusehte leh ka vaihawmte na zuih gigeleh,
11009005	Israelte tung ah na gam laltutphah tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding; na pa David kiang a, Israelte laltutphah a tu ding na tatlak kei ding, chi a ka na chiamsa bang in.
11009006	Himahleh nang hiam na suante hiam in na hon zuih uh kiksan a, ka thupiakte leh ka dan thusehte leh ka hon theihsakte pom lou a, pathian dangte nna na sep ua, na biak uleh,
11009007	gam ka piak a pan Israelte ka hihmang dia; hiai inn ka min a dia ka hihsiangthousa ka mitmuh phak louh ah ka suanmang ding. Huchi in namte lak ah enghouna leh aselam gentehna in Israel zat ahong hi ding.
11009008	Hiai inn sang tawkleh leng, akiang a pai peuhmah in lamdang sa in amuk uh ahum ding ua, bangziak a Toupa'n hiai gam leh hiai inn hichi tel a hih adiam aw? achi ding uh.
11009009	Mite'n Toupa a Pathian uh, apute uh Aigupta gam a pan pikhepa apaisan ua, pathian dangte alet ua, abiak ua, a-nnate uh asep ziak uh ahi. Huaiziak in Toupa'n hiai siatna tengteng atung uah atungsakta hi, chi in adawng ding uh,” achi hi.
11009010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Solomon inn nihte; Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn alam sung kum sawmnih abei nung in,
11009011	Tura kumpipa Hiram in Solomon sidar singte, meilah singte leh dangka-engte akul teng atupsak vek ahi, kumpipa Solomon in Galili gam a khua sawmnih Hiram apia hi.
11009012	Solomon in apiak khuate en ding in Tura a pan Hiram apawtkhia a; ava en a himahleh alungtung kei.
11009013	Ama'n, unaupa aw, hiai na hon kho piakte bangchibang khua amaizen ua? achi hi. Huchi in tuni tan in ama'n huai khuate Kabul gam achi hi.
11009014	Hiram in dangka-eng talent za-le-sawmnih kumpipa akhak hi.
11009015	Kumpipa Solomon in phutluih nasem pawl abawl nangawn hiai ahi: Toupa' inn leh amah inn lam ding leh Millo, Jerusalem kulh, Hazor khua, Meggiddo khua leh Gezer khuate bawl ding in ahi.
11009016	Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ahohtou a, Gezer khua ava la a, ahal a, huai khua a teng Kanaante athat a, atanu Solomon zi thilpiak in ana pe khinta ngal a.
11009017	Solomon in Gezer, Beth-horon khangnungzaw,
11009018	Baalath leh Israel gamdai a Tadmor khuate,
11009019	Solomon in thil koihkhawmna khua aneih tengteng, akangtalai koihna khuate, Jerusalem khua leh Lebanon a vaihawmna gamsung pumpi Solomon in lunggulhtak a bawl atup tengteng abawl hi.
11009020	Israel suante hilou, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte leh Jebus omsun tengtengte;
11009021	asuan uh, huai gam a om lai Israel suante'n ahihman zoh vek theihlouhte lak ah Solomon in sikha, phutluih nasem pawl abawl a, tuni tan in asem lai uhi.
11009022	Israel suante bel Solomon in sikha in abawl kei. Galdou mite, a-intekpate, amiliante, asepaih heutute, akangtalai leh asakol tungtuang pawl heutute ahi zaw uh.
11009023	Hiaite Solomon nasep tung a heutu tuam, zanga-le-sawmnga, nasep veng mite ahi uh.
11009024	Himahleh Pharaoh tanu bel David khopi a pan, Solomon in alamsak ama inn ah apaitou hi. Huchi in Solomon in Millo abawl hi.
11009025	Solomon in Toupa a dia abawl maitam ah kum teng in thumvei halmang thillat leh kilemna thillat alan a, Toupa ma a maitam ah gimlimte ahal hi. Huchi in inn alamzouta hi.
11009026	Kumpipa Solomon in Edom gam a Tuipi San gei Eloth chin a om Ezion-geber mun ah longhon abawl hi.
11009027	Hiram in asikha long mite, tuipi a kiseksa, long a Solomon sikhate kiang ah asawl hi.
11009028	Huai mite Ophir ah ava hoh ua, dangka-eng talent zali-le-sawmnih ahon pua ua, kumpipa Solomon kiang hon tun uhi.
11010001	Huan Toupa min a athilhih tungtang thu a Solomon minthandan Sheba kumpinu'n ana zak in thuhaksa pipi toh amah ettel tum in akiang ah ahoh hi.
11010002	Jerusalem ah nungzui mi tampi toh, gimlimte leh dangka-eng tampi leh suangmantamte pua sangawngsaute tonpih in ahoh hi. Solomon kiang atun in alungtang a thu a pai tengteng suahkhe vek in ahoupih hi.
11010003	Solomon in athudot tengteng adawng vek a; kumpipa theih louh, ahilhchet theih louh himhim a-om kei hi.
11010004	Sheba kumpinu'n Solomon pildan tengteng, a-inn lam,
11010005	adohkan a nek ding, asikhate tutdan, anasemte nasepdan, akivatdante uh, anou pe mite, Toupa' inn a lat halmang thillatte amuh in lungsim chih leng nei zou lou khop in lamdang asa hi.
11010006	Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na thilhihte leh na pildante ka gam a ka zak thuthang adik mah ana hi.
11010007	Himahleh keimah mit mahmah a ka hong muh masiah agen uh ka taksang kei hi. Huchi in ngai in, akimkhat leng ahon na hilh sam ua, agen uh ka zak sang in na pildan leh na hoihdan ana thupizaw hi.
11010008	Na mite, hiai na sikha, na kiang a om gige na pilna thu ngaikhe gigete ahampha uhi!
11010009	Toupa na Pathian, na tung a kipak mahmah, Israelte laltutphah a hon tusakpa phat in om hen. Toupa'n Israelte tangtawn in a-it a, huaiziak in, diktattak a vaihawm ding in kumpipa in ahon bawl hi,” achi hi.
11010010	Huchi in dangka-eng talent za-le-sawmnih leh gimlim atam a tam leh suangmantamte kumpipa apia a, Sheba kumpinu'n kumpipa Solomon gimlim apiak bang lawmlawm a tam alut ngei kei hi.
11010011	Hiram longhon, Ophir a pan dangka-eng va pote'n leng Ophir a pan almug sing tampi leh suangmantamte ahon pua uhi.
11010012	Kumpipa'n almug singte Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn umna ding in leh lasa mite kaihging leh pekging bawlna ding in azang hi. Tuni tan in hichibang almug sing himhim alut in, muh leng muh ahi nawnta kei hi.
11010013	Anget louh Solomon in apiakte chih louh leng kumpipa Solomon in Sheba kumpinu'n adeih tengteng, anget peuhmah apia hi. Huchi in amah leh lawite a-omna gam ah apai nawnta uhi.
11010014	Solomon kiang a kum khat sung a dangka-eng lut gikdan dangka-eng talent zaguk sawmguk-le-guk ahi.
11010015	Hiaite lou leng sumsin mite leh thilzuak mite, Arab kumpipate leh gamsung vaihawmte a pan siahpiakte anei lai hi.
11010016	Kumpipa Solomon in dangka-eng sekpek in lum lian zanih abawl a; lum khat ah dangka-eng shekel zaguk alut hi.
11010017	Dangka-eng sekpek in lum zathum abawl a; lum khat ah dangka-eng mina thum alut a; huaite kumpipa'n Lebanon gammang inn ah akoih hi.
11010018	Kumpipa'n saiha laltutphah thupi mahmah abawl a, huai dangka-eng hoihpen tui in aluan hi.
11010019	Laltutphah kaltouhna ah siksan guk a-om a, laltutphah nunglam dawn abem hi. Atutna sik tuak ah douna a-om tuaktuak a; adouna zulte ah humpinelkai dingh lim nih a-om hi.
11010020	Siksan gukte sik tuak ah humpinelkai dingh sawm-le-nih lim a-om a; huchibang koi gam mah ah leng abawl ngei kei uhi.
11010021	Kumpipa nou tengteng dangka-eng ahi vek a, Lebanon gammang inn a, atui-um belsuan tengteng leng dangka-eng ngen mah ahi vek uhi. Dangka himhim a-om kei. Solomon dam lai in huai bangpi in asim kei uh.
11010022	Kumpipa'n tuipi ah Hiram longhon kithuahpih Tarshish longhon anei a; Tarshish longhon in kum thum hal zel in dangka-eng, dangka, saiha, zawng leh utong ahon po zel uhi.
11010023	Huchi in kumpipa Solomon in leitung a kumpipa tengteng hauh lam leh pil lam in akhup vek hi.
11010024	Pathian in alungtang a pilna thu akoihsak ngaikhe ding in leitung a mi tengteng in Solomon ahong zuan huthut zel uhi.
11010025	Michih in thilpiakte kum teng a piak zah nei in dangka tui-um belsuan dangka-eng tui-um belsuan puan, galvan, gimlim, sakol leh sabiltungnoute ahong pe zel uhi.
11010026	Solomon in kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite akaikhawm a, kangtalai sangkhat-le-zali leh sakol tungtuangmi singkhat-le-sangnih anei hi. Huaite kangtalai koihnate ah, Jerusalem a kumpipa omna ah a-omsak hi.
11010027	Kumpipa'n Jerusalem ah atam mahmah ziak in dangka chite suang bang mai a sehkhop in a-omsak a, sidar singte phai a theipi sing bang lel a sehkhop in a-omsak hi.
11010028	Solomon neih sakolte Aigupta gam a pan ahon tolhkhiak ahi a; kumpipa sumsin mite'n huaite ahonhon in ana khak zel ua, ahon a lei zel ahi.
11010029	Aigupta gam a kangtalai dangka chi shekel zaguk zel in leh sakol dangka chi shekel za-le-sawmnga zel in ahon polut uhi. Huchibang mah in Hitte kumpipa tengteng leh Siria kumpipate a ding in leng apokhia uhi.
11011001	Himahleh Solomon in Pharaoh tanu ban ah namdang numei tampi a-it hi. Amau Moabte, Ammonte, Edomte, Zidonte leh Hitte ahi uh.
11011002	Huai namte tungtang thu Toupa'n Israel suante kiang ah, “Amau toh na kitentuah het louh ding uh ahi. Na kitentuah uleh apathiante uh lam a na lungtang uh hon ngasak ngeingei ding uh ahi,” chi a na hilh khit tak namte ahi uh. Hinapi in Solomon in amau it in alen tinten hi.
11011003	Huchi in zipi zasagih, kumpipa tanute anei a, mei zathum anei hi. Huai azite'n alungtang apikawisak uhi.
11011004	Hichi ahong hi a, Solomon ahong upat nung in, azite'n pathian dangte lam ah alungtang apikawisak uhi. Huchi in apa David lungtang bang in Toupa a Pathian lam ah alungtang ahoihkimta kei hi.
11011005	Solomon in Zidonte pathiannu Ashtaroth leh Ammonte pathian kihhuai mahmah Milkom azuita hi.
11011006	Huchi in Solomon in Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahihta a, apa David bang in Toupa azui tettet kei hi.
11011007	Huchi in Solomon in Jerusalem chin a mual ah Moabte pathian kihhuai mahmah Khemosh a ding leh Ammon suante Pathian kihhuai mahmah Molek a ding in mun sang abawlta hi.
11011008	Huai mah bang in namdang azi tengteng apathiante uh kiang a kithoih a gimlim hal zelte a ding leng abawlsak hi.
11011009	Huchi in Toupa Israelte' Pathian, akiang a nihvei kilak khinsa alungtang in alehngatsan ziak in, Solomon tung ah Toupa ahehta hi.
11011010	Hiai thu, pathian dangte na zui ding ahi kei, chih thu a na pepa Toupa thupiak lah azui kei hi.
11011011	Huaiziak in Toupa'n Solomon kiang ah, “Hichibang in na omta a, ka thukhun leh ka dan thusehte zuih dia thu ka hon piak lah na zuita kei hi. Gam ka hon sut ngeingei dia, na sikha ka pe ding.
11011012	Himahleh na pa David ziak in na damsung tel in zaw ka hih tadih kei ding. Himahleh na tapa khut a pan gam pen ka hon sut ding hi.
11011013	Gam tengteng ka hon sut vek kei dia; himahleh ka sikha David ziak leh ka tel Jerusalem ziak in nam khat na tapa ka pe ding,” achi hi.
11011014	Toupa'n Solomon melma ding in Edom mi, Hadad adingkhesakta a; amah Edom gam kumpipa suan ahi.
11011015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Edom gam a David a-om lai a, amithahte uh vui ding a asepaih heutu Joab ahohtouh a, Edom mi pasal peuhmah ava thah khit nung in,
11011016	Joab leh Israel mi tengteng kha guktak Edom gam a pasal tengteng ahihlup khit masiah om uhi.
11011017	Hadad leh apa sikhate lak a Edom mi khenkhatte Aigupta gam ah atai ua; Hadad ahihleh naupang neu ahi lai hi.
11011018	Midian gam a pan apawt ua, Paran ahong tung uh. Paran a pan mite api ua, Aigupta gam, Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh kiang atungsuk ua; ama'n inn ana pia a, nek dingte ana ngaihtuahsak a, gam leng ana pia hi.
11011019	Hadad tung ah Pharaoh mit atung mahmah a, huchi in ama zi sanggamnu, kumpinu Tahpenes sanggamnu azi ding in apia hi.
11011020	Tahpenes sanggamnu in tapa Genubath aneihsak a, Tahpenes in Pharaoh inn ah anawinek tawpna abawlsak hi. Pharaoh inn ah Pharaoh tapate lak ah Genubath a-omta hi.
11011021	Hadad in Aigupta gam a pan David apute kiang ah a-ihmuta chih leh sepaih heutu Joab leng asita chih ana zak in, Hadad in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Ka gam ua ka paitheihna ding in hon pawtsak ve,” achi hi.
11011022	Huchi in Pharaoh in akiang ah, “Ka kiang a na om in taksap bang na nei a? Ngai in, huchi a na gam ua pai nawn na tup maimah?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Bangmah nei lou e. Bang teng hileh hon paisak himhim in,” achi hi.
11011023	Pathian in amelma ding in Eliadah tapa Rezon, atoupa Hadadezer, Zobah kumpipa a pan taimangsa leng adingsak nawn hi.
11011024	David in Zobah a mite athah lai in ama'n akiang ah mite akaikhawm a, sepaih heutu in ana pang hi. Damaskas ah ahoh ua, huai ah ateng ua, Damaskas ah kumpipa in atuta hi.
11011025	Hadad in buaina tut behlap in Solomon damsung teng Israelte melma ahi gige a; Israelte aho mahmah a, Siria gam tung ah vai ahawm hi.
11011026	Nebat tapa Jeroboam, Zered a Ephraim mi Solomon sikha mah, anu min Zeruah ahi a, meithai ahi, huai mi'n leng kumpipa tung ah akhut alik sam hi.
11011027	Kumpipa tung a akhut ahon likna san hichibang ahi: Solomon in Millo abawl a, apa David khua asiatna lailai abawlhoih hi.
11011028	Jeroboam ahihleh mihat leh hangsan ahi a; huchi in Solomon in huai tangval mithanuamtak ahi chih atheih ziak in Joseph inkote nasep tengteng tung ah heutu in abawl hi.
11011029	Huai lai in hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem a pan Jeroboam apawtkhiak lai in Shiloh mi zawlnei Ahijah in lampi ah ana mu a; Ahijah in puan thak asilh a; amau gel kia in gamlak ah a-om uhi.
11011030	Ahijah in apuan thak silh ala a, nen sawm-le-nih in abotkek hi.
11011031	Jeroboam kiang ah, “Nen sawm la in,” Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai in, Solomon khut a pan lalgam ka sut dia, nam sawm nang ka hon pe ding.
11011032	Himahleh ka sikha David ziak leh Israel nam tengteng lak a ka tel khopi, Jerusalem ziak in nam khat anei ding;
11011033	amau hon paisan a, Zidonte pathiannu Ashtaroth, Moabte pathian Kemosh leh Ammonte pathian Milkom abiak ziak un leh ka mitmuh a thil hoih hih ding leh ka sehte leh ka vaihawmte zui dia apa David bang a ka lampite azuih louh ziak in.
11011034	“Gam pumpi in ahihleh ka sut kei dia; himahleh ka thupiakte leh ka dan thusehte zuipa, ka tel, ka sikha David ziak in adamsung in kumpipa in ka omsak lai ding.
11011035	Himahleh atapa khut a pan in lalgam ka sutkhe dia, nang ka hon pe ding, nam sawmte tan in leng.
11011036	Ka sikha David in ka min omna ding a ka tel khopi Jerusalem a ka ma a vak aneih gige theihna ding in nam khat bel atapa ka pe ding hi.
11011037	Nang ka hon sep ding a, na ut tengteng bang in vai na hawm dia, Israelte kumpipa na hi ding.
11011038	Huan hichi ahi ding a, thu ka hon piak peuhmah na pom a, ka lampite na zuih a, ka sikha David bang a ka dan thusehte leh ka thupiakte zui dia ka mitmuh a thil hoih na hihleh na kiang ah ka om dia, David a dia ka dinkipsak bang in inkuan kip ka hon dinkhiaksak dia, Israelte ka hon pe ding hi.
11011039	Huchi in David suan ka hihgim dia, himahleh tangtawn in zaw ahi kei ding,” achi hi.
11011040	Huaiziak in Solomon in Jeroboam thah atum a, Jeroboam a ding a, Aigupta gam ah, Aigupta gam kumpipa Shishak kiang ah atai a, Solomon sih matan Aigupta gam ah a-omta hi.
11011041	Solomon tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng leh apilna Solomon thilhih gelhna bu ah atuang kei a hia?
11011042	Solomon in Israel tengteng tung a Jerusalem a vai ahawm sung kum sawmli ahi.
11011043	Huchi in Solomon apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, apa David khopi ah avui uh. Huchi in atapa Rehoboam asik in ahong lalta hi.
11012001	Huan Rehoboam Shekem ah ahoh hi. Israel tengteng Shekem ah kumpipa a amah bawl ding in ahoh khinta uhi.
11012002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam in huai thu ana zak in Kumpipa Solomon kiang a pan ataimangna Aigupta gam a om lai ahi a, Jeroboam ahihleh Aigupta gam a om ahi.
11012003	Amah ava samsak ua, Jeroboam leh Israel kikaikhawm tengteng ahong ua, Rehoboam kiang ah,
11012004	“Na pa'n ka hakkol uh agiksak mahmah hi. Huaiziak in na pa hon zat gimna leh ahakkol giktak ka tung ua angak hon hihzangsak inla, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh,” chi in ahong gen uhi.
11012005	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ni thum sung va kikhinkhe phot unla; ka kiang ah hong pai nawn un,” achi hi. Huchi in mite apaikheta uh.
11012006	Kumpipa Rehoboam in apa Solomon dam lai a, akiang a om upate kiang ah, “Hiai mite bangchi in ka dawng dia hon hilh mah dih uh,” chi in adong hi.
11012007	Amau akiang ah, “Tuni a hiai mite sikha a na om a, a-nna uh sem a, amau dawng a, akiang ua thuhoih na genleh, tangtawn in na sikha in a-om ding uh,” achi uhi.
11012008	Himahleh upate hoihsak azui kei a, amah toh kivual tuailai akiang a omte adong zawta hi.
11012009	Akiang uah, “Hiai mite, ka kiang a, na pa'n ka tung ua hakkol angak hon hihzangsak in, chi a hong gen mite bangchi in ka dawng dia, hon hilh mah dih uh,” achi hi.
11012010	Akhanvual tuailaite'n akiang ah, “Hiai mite, na pa'n ka hakkol uh agiksak thei mahmah a, nang hon hihzangsak dih ve, na kiang achi mite kiang ah, hichibang in chi inla, hichibang in akiang uah gen in.
11012011	‘Ka pa kawng sang in ka khutme alianzaw. Ka pa'n hakkol giktak ahon na batsak a, ke'n na hakkol uh ka behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa'n zepna in ahon sawi a, ke'n aikam in ka hon sawi ding,’ ” achi hi.
11012012	Huchi in Jeroboam leh mi tengteng kumpipa'n ni thum nung chiang in, “Ka kiang ah hong nawn un,” chi a ahilh bang in, ani thum ni in Rehoboam kiang ah ava hoh uhi.
11012013	Kumpipa'n mite khauhtak in ana dawng a, upate hoihsak apompih kei hi.
11012014	Tuailaite hoihsak bang in, “Ka pa'n na hakkol uh ana giksak a, ke'n na hakkol uh ka behlap lai dia, ka pa'n zepna in ahon na sawi a, ke'n ahihleh aikam in ka hon sawi ding,” achi hi.
11012015	Huchi in kumpipa'n mite thu angaikheta kei; hiai bang a thil om Toupa a pan lah ahi ngal a. Toupa'n Shiloh mi Ahijah zang a Nebat tapa Jeroboam kiang a, athugen atungtun theihna ding ahi.
11012016	Israel tengteng in kumpipa'n athugen uh apom kei chih atheih un, “David ah tantuan bang i nei ua? Jesse tapa ah gouluah ding i nei kei uh. Israelte aw, na puanin chiat uah pai un. David, na inkuan kingaihtuah in,” chi in kumpipa adawng uh. Huchi in Israelte apuanin chiat uah apaita uhi.
11012017	Himahleh Judah khopite a teng Israel suante tung ah Rehoboam in vai ahawm hi.
11012018	Huchi in kumpipa Rehoboam in phutluih nasemte heutu Adoram asawl hi. Israel tengteng in suang in ana deng ua, asita hi. Huaiziak in Jerusalem a tai ding in kumpipa Rehoboam kintak in akangtalai ah atuang hi.
11012019	Huchi in tuni tan in David inkote tung ah Israelte ana hel uhi.
11012020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel tengteng in Jeroboam ahong kik nawn chih azak un, kikaihkhawmna a hoh ding in asamsak ua, Israelte tung ah kumpipa in abawl uhi. Judah nam chih louh David inkote zui kuamah a-om kei uh.
11012021	Jerusalem atuntak in Rehoboam in Israel inkote dou a Solomon tapa Rehoboam lalgam la nawn ding in Judah inkuan tengteng leh Benjamin nam a pan mihangsan atelkhiak, nuaikhat-le-singgiat akaikhawm hi.
11012022	Himahleh Pathian mipa Shemaiah kiang ah Pathian thu ahong tung hi.
11012023	Judah gam kumpipa Solomon tapa Rehoboam kiang ah leh Judah leh Benjamin inkuan tengteng kiang ah leh midang teng kiang ah,
11012024	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Va hohtou kei un. Israel suan na unaute va dou kei un. Na inn chiat uah pai nawn vek un. Hiai kei thilhih ahi, chi in gen in,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa thu azui ua, Toupa thu bang in akik nawn ua, apai nawn vekta uhi.
11012025	Huchi in Jeroboam in Ephraim tanggam ah Shekem khua asat a, huai ah ateng hi. Huai a pan apawtkhia a, Penuel khua asat hi.
11012026	Jeroboam in alungtang in, “Lalgam David inkote ahong hi nawn diam aw,” achi hi.
11012027	“Hiai mite Jerusalem a Toupa' inn a kithoihnate lan dia ahohtouh uleh alungtang un atoupa uh, Rehoboam, Judah gam kumpipa lam ah a-awn nawn mai ding. Huchi in kei ahon that ding ua, Judah gam kumpipa Rehoboam lam ah abelh nawn mai ding uh,” achi hi.
11012028	Kumpipa'n mi adong a, dangka-eng in bawngnou lim nih abawl a; akiang uah, “Nou a ding in Jerusalem a hohtouh ahaksa lo tel hi. Aw, Israel en dih uh, Aigupta gam a pan nou hon pikhia na pathiante uh,” achi hi.
11012029	Huchi in khat Bethel ah akoih a, khat pen Dan ah akoih hi.
11012030	Mipite lah hiai bawngnou lim khat be ding in Dan tanpha ava pai ziak un hiai khelhna ahong hita hi.
11012031	Mun sang ah innte alam a, Levi suante hilou, miniampente lak a mi siampu in abawl hi.
11012032	Jeroboam in Judah gam a ankuanglui aneih mah bang un akha giatna, huai kha ani sawm-le-nga ni ankuanglui ni ding in asep hi. Maitam ah ahohtou a; Bethel ah abawngnou lim kiang ah akithoih hi. Mun sang abawlte ah siampute sep in Bethel ah akoih hi.
11012033	Ama'n adeih bang a, aseh kha mah, akha giatna, ani sawm-le-nga ni in Bethel a maitam abawl ah ahohtou hi. Israel suante a ding in ankuangluina asep a, maitam a gimlim hal ding in ahohtou hi.
11013001	Huan ngai in, Toupa thu in Judah gam a pan Bethel ah Pathian mipa khat ahong hi. Maitam chin ah gimlim hal ding in Jeroboam ana ding hi.
11013002	Ama'n Toupa thu in maitam akikoukhum a, “Maitam aw, maitam, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ngai in, David inkuan ah tapa, amin Josiah ahong piang dia, ama'n na tung a gimlim halna mun sang a siampute na tung ah alan dia, na tung ah mihing guhte ahal ding,’ ” achi hi.
11013003	Huai ni mah in chiamtehna apia hi. “Hiai Toupa'n chiamtehna ding achih ahi. Ngai in, maitam ahong khangkham dia, atung a meivute ahong bo vek ding,” achi hi.
11013004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian mipa in Bethel a maitam akikoukhum thu kumpipa'n azak in, Jeroboam in, “Man un,” chi in maitam a pan akhut in asawk hi. Mat tum a asawkna khut azawta a, akhut akaikik nawn theita kei hi.
11013005	Pathian mipa in Toupa thu chiamtehna dia agen bang in maitam leng akhangkham a, maitam a meivute leng abo vek uhi.
11013006	Kumpipa'n adawng a, Pathian mipa kiang ah, “Ka khut ahong dam nawn theihna ding in Toupa na Pathian hehpihna ngen inla, hon thumsak in,” achi hi. Pathian min Toupa kiang ah angen a, kumpipa khut ahong dam nawn a, amalam a bangmah in ahong om nawnta hi.
11013007	Huchi in kumpipa'n Pathian mipa kiang ah, “Ka inn ah kei toh i pai dia hong kihihhalh tadih inla, huchi in kipahman ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
11013008	Pathian mipa in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na inn kimkhat zah hon pe ding himah lechin leng na kiang ah ka hong pai tuan kei ding, hiai ah tanghou ne in tui himhim leng ka dawn sam kei ding.
11013009	Tanghou va ne in tui himhim leng va dawn ke'nla, ‘Na va hohna lampi ah leng kik nawn ke'n chi a Toupa thu a sawl ka hi,’ ” achi hi.
11013010	Huchi in lampi dang ah apai a, Bethel a ahong kuanna lampi ah apaita kei hi.
11013011	Bethel ah zawlnei putek khat a-om hi. Atapate'n huai ni a Bethel a Pathian mipa thilhih tengteng ahilh vek uhi. Kumpipa kiang a athugente leng apa uh ahilh lai uhi.
11013012	Apa un akiang uah, “Koi lampi atawn a?” achi hi. Atapate'n Judah gam a pan hong pai Pathian mipa pai nawnna lampi akawkmuh uhi.
11013013	Huchi in atapate kiang ah, “Sabiltung hon bawlsak dih uh,” achi hi. Sabiltung abawlsak ua; atung ah atuang hi.
11013014	Pathian mipa adelhta a, tosaw sing nuai a tu in ava mu hi. Akiang ah, “Nang na hi maw Judah gam a pan hong pai Pathian mipa?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi.
11013015	Huchi in ama'n akiang ah, “Ka inn ah kei toh hong pai inla; tanghou hong ne dih ve,” achi hi.
11013016	Ama'n, “Nang toh kik nawn thei ka hi kei, na kiang a hong thei leng ka hi sam kei. Hiai ah na kiang ah tanghou ne in tui himhim leng ka dawn sam kei ding.
11013017	Tanghou va ne in tui himhim leng va dawn ke'nla, na va hohna lampi ah leng kik nawn ke'n, chi a Toupa thu a hilh lah ka hi ngal a,” achi hi.
11013018	Ama'n akiang ah, “Kei leng nangmah bang a zawlnei ka hi. Angel in Toupa thu in, tanghoute ne a tuite dawn ding in na inn ah pikik nawn in, chi in ahon houpih hi,” achi hi. Himahleh akiang ah zuau agen hi.
11013019	Huchi in akiang ah akik nawn a, a-inn ah tanghoute ne in tui adawnta hi.
11013020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, dohkan a-um lai un, apikik nawnpa zawlnei kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
11013021	Huchi in Judah gam a pan hong pai Pathian mipa kiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “ Toupa thugen mang lou a, Toupa na Pathian in thu ahon piak na zuih louh a,
11013022	hong kik nawn a, tanghou ne in tui leng dawn ke'n, ka chihna mun mahmah a tanghou ne a, tui na dawn ziak in na luang na pute han a koih ahi kei ding,” chi in agenkheta hi.
11013023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, tanghou ne a, tui adawn zoh in, zawlnei pikik nawnpa'n sabiltung abawlsak hi.
11013024	Huchi in apaita a lamkal ah humpinelkai toh akituak ua, ana that hi. Aluang lampi ah akipai a, akiang ah sabiltung adingh a, humpinelkai leng siluang kiang ah adingh hi.
11013025	Ngai in, mi ava pai ua, lampi a siluang kipai leh siluang kiang a humpinelkai dingh amu ua; zawlnei putek tenna khua ah ava gen uhi.
11013026	Lamkal a pan va pikik nawnpa zawlnei in huai thu ana zaktak in, “Pathian mi, Toupa thugen mang nuamloupa ei ve. Huchi in Toupa'n akiang a agen, athu bangbang a Toupa'n humpinelkai kiang a pia a, na ham a, na keilum ahita ve,” achi hi.
11013027	Atapate kiang ah, “Sabiltung hon bawlsak dih uh,” chi in agen a; abawlsak uhi.
11013028	Huchi in akuanta a, aluang lampi a kipai leh sabiltung leh humpinelkai a luang kiang a dingh ava mu hi. Humpinelkai in luang ana ne nai kei a, sabiltung leng ana ham kei hi.
11013029	Zawlnei in Pathian mipa luang adom a, sabiltung tung ah akoih a, akikpihta hi. Huchi in zawlnei putek tenna khua ah suun ding leh vui ding in alalut hi.
11013030	Aluang ama han ah asial a, “Ka unaupa khawk hi na mah e!” chi in asuun uhi.
11013031	Huan hichi ahong hi a, avui khit nung in atapate kiang ah, “Ka sih chiang in Pathian mipa kivuina han ah hon vui sam un. Aguhte kiang ah ka guhte koih un.
11013032	Pathian thu a Bethel a maitam leh Samaria gam khopite a mun sangte inn tengteng akikoukhumna thu hong tung ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi.
11013033	Huai thil zoh in Jeroboam in a-omdan diklou atawpsan tuan kei hi. Miniampente lak a mun sang siampu dia abawl siampute a-omtheihna ding un adeihdeih ahihtuam hi.
11013034	Huai thil Jeroboam inkuan khelhna amau inn gamsaktu leh leitung maikaih a pan hihmangthangtu ahong hita hi.
11014001	Huai lai in Jeroboam tapa Abijah achina hi.
11014002	Jeroboam in azi kiang ah, “Thou inla, Jeroboam zi na hi chih ahon theihtheihlouhna ding un kihihlamdang inla, Shiloh ah va hoh dih; ngai in, huai ah zawlnei Ahijah, hiai mite tung a kumpipa dia ka hong om ding ka tungtang thu genpa a-om hi.
11014003	Tanghou beu sawm leh tanghou pei lian lou leh khuaizu thawl khat tawi inla, akiang ah va hoh dih. Naupang omdan ding hon na hilh ding,” achi hi.
11014004	Jeroboam zi in huchibang in ahih a, athou a, Shiloh ah ahoh a, Ahijah inn ah ava hohta hi. Ahijah in khua amu thei nawn kei a; a-upat ziak in amit amialta hi.
11014005	Toupa'n Ahijah kiang ah, “Ngai in, Jeroboam zi atapa tungtang a thu dong ding in ahong, achi ana a, chi in hichibang in na hilh ding ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, ahong lut chiang in numei dang hileh kilawmtak in ahong kibawl ding,” achi hi.
11014006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ahijah in ahong lut lai a akhesik ging ana zaktak in, “Nang Jeroboam zi hong lut dih ve. Bang achia ahia midang dan a na kibawl? Tanchin hoih loutak nang hon hilh dia sawl ka hi.
11014007	Pai nawn inla, Jeroboam kiang ah, Toupa'n , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Mipite lak a pan ka hon tawisang a, ka mi Israelte tung ah heutu in ka hon bawl hi.
11014008	David inkuante gam ka sut a, huai nang ka hon pia hi. Himahleh nang ka sikha David bang in na om kei. Ama'n zaw ka thupiakte azui a, ka mitmuh a thil hoih kia hih tum in alungtang tengteng in ahon zui hi.
11014009	Himahleh nang bel na ma a mite tengteng sang in thil na hihkhial mahmah se a, na hon hehsakna ding in pathian dangte leh milim sunte na bawl a, na hon nungngatsanta hi.
11014010	Huaiziak in ngai in, Jeroboam inkuan tung ah thil hoih lou ka tungsak dia, Jeroboam a pan ta pasal taphot Israel gam a mi nehden leh den louh leng ka hihmang dia, mi'n ek aphiatsiang sipsip bang in Jeroboam inkuan agam vek masiah ka phiatmang ding hi.
11014011	Jeroboam inko lak a mi, khopi a si peuhmahte ui in ane dia; gam a si peuhmahte tung a leng vasate'n ane ding uh. Hiai Toupa'n agen khinta hi.
11014012	“Huchi in thou inla na inn ah pai nawn mai in, khopi sung na sik chiang in huai naupang asi ding hi.
11014013	Huchi in Israel tengteng in asuun ding ua, avui ding uh. Jeroboam inkote lak ah amah kia han akoih ahi ding hi. Jeroboam inko lak ah amah kia a Toupa Israelte' Pathian lam a thil hoih omsun ahi.
11014014	Toupa'n amah a dia Israelte tung a kumpipa hi ding; Jeroboam inkuan hihmang ding mi khat atungkhe ding hi. Himahleh bang eita? Huai ni ding, tu mah ahi.
11014015	Toupa'n lah tui a phaiphek lingling bang mai in Israelte ahon sat ling dia; huchi in Toupa hehsak a Asherte uh abawl ziak un apute uh ana piaksa, hiai gam hoihtak a pan Israelte abotkhe siang vek dia, lui khen lam ah ahon hihzak vek ding hi.
11014016	Israelte thil hihkhialsak a, ahih Jeroboam khelhnate ziak in Israelte alehngatsan ding,” achi hi.
11014017	Jeroboam zi athou a, apawtkhia a, Tirzah khua ava tung a; inn kongpi bul atuntak in huai naupang asita hi.
11014018	Toupa'n asikha zawlnei Ahijah zang a thu agen bang ngei in Israel tengteng in avui ua, asuunta uhi.
11014019	Jeroboam tanchin dang, agaldou thute leh avaihawm thute, ngai in, Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh in a-om hi.
11014020	Huchi in Jeroboam vaihawm sung kum sawmnih-le-nih ahi a, apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, amah sik in atapa Nadab ahong lalta hi.
11014021	Solomon tapa Rehoboam Judah gam ah alal hi. Alal tung lai in Rehoboam kum sawmli-le-khat a upa ahi. Toupa'n amin omsakna dia Israel nam tengtengte lak a atel khopi Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-sagih alal hi. Anu min Naamah ahi a, amah Ammon mi ahi.
11014022	Judahte'n Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ua; apute uh thilhih tengteng khup in akhelhnate un ahazatna atokthou uhi.
11014023	Mual sang teng ah leh sing hing teng nuai ah suangphuhte phut in mun sangte leh Asherte nangawn abawl ngal ua.
11014024	Huai gam ah pasal kizuakte leng a-om ua; Israel suante ma a Toupa'n adelhkhiak namte thilhih kihhuai chiteng ahih uhi.
11014025	Kumpipa Rehoboam lal akum nga kum in hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta kumpipa Shishak in Jerusalem asual hi.
11014026	Toupa' inn a goute leh kumpipa' inn a goute ala a, avek in ala khin hi. Solomon dangka-eng lum bawl tengteng leng ala tel vek hi.
11014027	Kumpipa Rehoboam in huaite tang in dal lumte abawl a, kumpipa' inn kongpi vengmi heutute akemsak hi.
11014028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa' inn a kumpipa alut peuhmah chiang in veng mite'n huaite atawi ua, dantan ah akoih nawn zel uhi.
11014029	Rehoboam tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11014030	Rehoboam leh Jeroboam adamsung teng un akidou uhi.
11014031	Huchi in Rehoboam apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, David khopi ah apute lak ah avui uh. Anu min Naamah ahi a, Ammon mi ahi. Asik in atapa Abijam ahong lalta hi.
11015001	Huan Nebat tapa kumpipa Jeroboam kum sawm-le-giat alal kum in Judahte tung ah Abijam alal pan hi.
11015002	Jerusalem ah kum thum alal a; anu min Maakah, Abishalom tanu ahi.
11015003	Ama a pan thil gilou ahih tengteng ama'n leng ahih sam ahi. Apu David bang in alungtang Toupa a Pathian lam ah ahoihkim sam kei hi.
11015004	Himahleh David ziak in Toupa a Pathian in anung a, atapa hong dinkhiakna ding leh Jerusalem khua dingkipsak ding in Jerusalem ah khawnvak apia hi.
11015005	Hit mi Uriah tungtang chih louh in David in Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih ahih ziak leh adamsung teng a hih dia thu apiak peuhmah asel ngei louh ziak in.
11015006	Rehoboam adamsung teng Jeroboam toh akidou gige uhi.
11015007	Abijam tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw? Abijam leh Jeroboam akidou uhi.
11015008	Abijam apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; David khopi ah avui uhi. Ama sik in atapa Asa alal hi.
11015009	Israel kumpipa Jeroboam kum sawmnih alal kum in Asa bel Judahte tung ah alal pan hi.
11015010	Kum sawmli-le-khat Jerusalem ah alal a; anu min Maakah ahi a, amah Abishalom tanu ahi.
11015011	Asa in apu David mah bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
11015012	Pasal kizuakte gam a pan adelhkhia a; apute'n milim ana bawl tengteng uh alamang hi.
11015013	Anu Maakah leng, milim kihhuai mahmah Asherah abawlsak ziak in, akumpinu hihna atawpsak hi. Amilim bawl ahihsia a, Kidron lui ah ahal hi.
11015014	Mun sangte ahihleh alamang kei a; himahleh Asa lungtang adamsung teng in Toupa lam ah ahoih bukim hi.
11015015	Apa'n thil ana latsate leh amah mah in ana latsa dangka, dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan Toupa' inn ah alalut hi.
11015016	Asa leh Israel kumpipa Baasha lal sung teng akidou gige uhi.
11015017	Israel kumpipa Baasha in Judah ava dou a, Judah kumpipa Asa kiang a lut ding leh pawtkhe ding dalna ding in Ramah khua abawl hi.
11015018	Huchi in Asa in Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn a gou om lai dangka leh dangka-eng tengteng ala a, asikhate apia hi. Huchi in kumpipa Asa in Damaskas a om Siria kumpipa Hezion tapate Tabrimon tapa Ben-hadad kiang ah,
11015019	“Kei leh nang kikal ah leh ka pa leh na pa kikal ah thukhun a-om a; ngai in, thilpiak dangka leh dangka-eng ka hon khak hi. Hong pai inla, Israel kumpipa Baasha in ahon paisanna ding in amah toh na thukhun uh hihsia in,” chi in akhak hi.
11015020	Ben-hadad in kumpipa Asa thu ana pom a, Israel khuate dou ding in asepaih heutute asawl a, Ijon, Dan, Abel-beth-maakah khuate, Kinneroth bial tengteng leh Naphtali gam tengteng tan in adou hi.
11015021	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Baasha in huai thu ana zaktak in Ramah abawl atawp a, Tirzah ah atengta hi.
11015022	Kumpipa Asa in Judah gam tengteng ah thu athangsak vialvial hi. Kuamah om awl a-om kei uh. Huchi in Baasha in Ramah khua bawlna dia suang leh sing azatte anawn ua; huaite zang in kumpipa Asa in Mizpah khua leh Benjamin gam a Geba khua abawl hi.
11015023	Asa tanchin dang tengteng, athilhihdan tengteng, athilhih tengtengte leh akho bawlte Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw? Himahleh atek lam in akhe ahong nata hi.
11015024	Huchi in a-ihmuta a, apu David khopi ah apute lak ah avui ua; atapa Jehoshaphat asik in alal hi.
11015025	Jeroboam tapa Nadab Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum nihna ah Israel tung ah alal pan a, Israel tung ah kum nih alal hi.
11015026	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih loutak ahih a, apa lampi atawn a, Israelte thilhih akhialsak a, ahihkhelhna pentak ama'n leng ahih sam hi.
11015027	Issakar inkuante lak a mi Ahijah tapa Baasha in amah aguksawm a, Philistiate tan, Gibbethon ah Baasha in athat hi. Nadab leh Israel tengteng in Gibbethon a-um lai uh ahi.
11015028	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum thumna ah ahi Baasha in athah a, asik a ahong lal.
11015029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa ahong hih in Jeroboam inko tengteng athat a; Jeroboam a ding in kuamah ahinghawi kei hi. Toupa Shiloh a mi asikha Ahijah zang a agensa bang in.
11015030	Huai bel Israelte thil hihkhialsak a ahih, Jeroboam khelhnate ziak leh Toupa , Israelte' Pathian ahehsak ziak ahi.
11015031	Nadab tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
