11015032	Asa leh Israel kumpipa Baasha alal sung teng un akidou gige uh.
11015033	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum thum na ah Ahijah tapa Baasha Tirzah ah Israel tengteng tung ah alal pan a, kum sawmnih-le-li alal hi.
11015034	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih a, Jeroboam lampi zuih azui a, Israelte thil hihkhialsak a ahihkhelhna ahih sam hi.
11016001	Huchi in Baasha kalh in Hanani tapa Jehu kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
11016002	“Leivui a pan ka hon domsang a, ka mi Israelte tung ah heutu in ka hon bawl hi. Nang Jeroboam lampi zuih na tawn a, akhelhnate a hon hehsak ding in ka mi Israelte thil na hihkhialsak hi.
11016003	Ngai in, Baasha leh a-inkote ka hihmang ding hi. Huchi in Nebat tapa Jeroboam inkote bang mai in na inkote ka bawl ding.
11016004	Baasha inkote lak a mi khopi a si peuhmah ui in ane dia; a-inkote lak a mi gamlak a si peuhmah tungleng vasate'n ane ding uh,” chi in.
11016005	Baasha tanchin dangte, athilhihte leh athilhihtheihdante Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11016006	Baasha apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, Tirzah ah avui ua; asik in atapa Elah alal hi.
11016007	Baasha leh a-inkote tungtang thu ah akhutsuak a Toupa hehsak dia Jeroboam inkote batna nei a Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou mahmah ahih ziak leh amah athah ziak in Hanani tapa zawlnei Jehu zang a agen Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
11016008	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum sawmnih-le-gukna ah Baasha tapa Elah, Tirzah ah Israelte tung ah alal pan a, kum nih alal hi.
11016009	Asikha Zimri, akangtalai kimkhat tung a heutu in Tirzah ah amah gukthah asawm hi. Huchih lai in, Tirzah ah insung lam heutu Arza inn ah amah zukham in a-om hi.
11016010	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum sawmnih-le-sagih in Zimri lut in ava sual a, athat a, asik in alalta hi.
11016011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ahong lal pan a, alaltutphah a ahong tuttak in, Baasha inko tengteng athat vek a; atanaute leh alawmte lak a mi pasal photphot khat leng ahawi kei hi.
11016012	Huchi in zawlnei Jehu zang a Baasha kalh a agen, Toupa thu bang in, Zimri in Baasha inko tengteng athat vek hi;
11016013	Toupa , Israelte' Pathian, hehsak dia aginatlouhna ua, atohthoh ua, Baasha khelhnate leh atapa Elah khelhnate a amaute akhelh ua, huai mah a Israelte akhelhsak ziak un.
11016014	Elah tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11016015	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum sawmnih-le-sagihna ah Zimri, Tirzah ah ni sagih alal hi. Philistiate neihsa, Gibbethon a mite'n a-um uhi.
11016016	A-um mite'n, “Zimri in aguksawm a, kumpipa athat,” chih agen uh ana za ua; huchi in Israel tengteng in sepaih heutu, Omri, huai ni in agiahmun uah Israelte tung a kumpipa in abawl uhi.
11016017	Omri bel Israel tengteng toh Gibbethon a pan in ahohtou ua, Tirzah ava um uhi.
11016018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Zimri in khua ala uh chih atheih in, kumpipa' inn a kulh ah atailut a, kumpipa' inn ah akibuhal a, asita hi;
11016019	Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou mahmah hih a akhelhnate ziak leh Jeroboam lampi tawn a Israelte thil hihkhialsak a, akhelh ziak in.
11016020	Zimri tanchin dangte leh asawmgukna thute Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11016021	Huchi in Israel mite pawl nih in akikhenta ua; mipi kimkhat in Ginath tapa Tibni kumpipa dia bawl tum in azui ua; akimkhat in Omri azui uhi.
11016022	Himahleh Omri zuite'n Ginath tapa Tibni zuite azou ua: huchi in Tibni asi a, Omri ahong lalta hi.
11016023	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum sawmthum-le-khatna ah Omri Israelte tung ah alal pan a, kum sawm-le-nih alal a: Tirzah ah kum guk alal hi.
11016024	Shemer a Samaria mual dangka talent nih in alei a; mual tung ah khua asat a, akhosat min huai neipa Shemer min tam in Samaria asa hi.
11016025	Omri in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih a, ama a mi tengteng sang in thil ahihkhial thupi tuamse hi.
11016026	Nebat tapa Jeroboam dan tengteng ala a, aginatlouhna ziak ua Toupa , Israelte' Pathian hehsak dia Israelte thil ahihkhelhsak bang in akhial samta hi.
11016027	Omri thilhih tanchin dangte leh athilhihtheihdan ahihlat thute Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11016028	Huchi in Omri apute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, Samaria ah avui ua; asik in atapa Ahab ahong lal hi.
11016029	Judah kumpipa Asa lal akum sawmthum-le-giatna ah Israelte tung ah Omri tapa Ahab alal pan hi. Omri tapa Ahab, Samaria ah kum sawmnih-le-nih Israelte tung ah alal hi.
11016030	Omri tapa Ahab in ama a mi tengteng sang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih hi.
11016031	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhna bang hih sam bangmah lou a ngai hileh kilawmtak in, Zidonte kumpipa Ethbaal tanu Jezebel zi in anei a, Baal nna sem in abia hi.
11016032	Samaria a Baal inn alam ah Baal a ding in maitam adoh hi.
11016033	Ahab in Asherah abawl a; ama a Israel kumpipa tengteng sang in Ahab in Toupa , Israelte' Pathian hehsakna thil anak hih tungtuan hi.
11016034	Alal lai in Bethel mi Hiel in Jeriko khua asat a; atachil Abiram tanloh in asuangphum aphum hi. Toupa'n Nun tapa Joshua zang a ana gensa bang in, anautum Segub tanloh hial in akulh kongkhakte adingkhesak hi.
11017001	Huan Gilead gam a Tishbi a mi Elijah in Ahab kiang ah, “ Toupa , ama a ka dinna Israelte' Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Keimah thu lou in kum bangzah hiam sung daitui leh vuah azu kei ding,” achi hi.
11017002	Toupa thu akiang ah ahong tung hi.
11017003	“Hiai a pan pawt inla, suahlam zuan in pai inla, Jordan gei a om Kerith lui ah va kibu in.
11017004	Huan hichi ahi ding a, huai luitui na dawn dia; huai ah nang hon vak ding in va-ak thu ka pe khinta hi,” achi hi.
11017005	Huchi in akuan a, Toupa thu bang in ahihta hi. Jordan gei a om Kerith lui ah atengta hi.
11017006	Va-akte'n zingsang in tanghou leh sa ahong puak zel ua, nitaklam in tanghou leh sa ahong puak nawn zel uhi. Huai luitui adawn hi.
11017007	Anung deuh in hichi ahong hi a, huai gam a vuah himhim azuk louh ziak in lui ahong kangta hi.
11017008	Toupa thu akiang ah ahong tung a,
11017009	“Thou inla, Zidon gam a Zarephath ah hoh inla, huai ah om in. Nang hon vak ding in meithai khat thu ka pe khinta,” achi hi.
11017010	Huchi in athou a, Zarephath ah ahohta hi. Huai khokulh kongpi atun in, ngai in, meithai khat sing tom in ana om a; amah asam a, “Bel in tui tawmchik hon la dih ve, ka na dawn ding,” achi hi.
11017011	La dia kuan asam a, “Tanghou neuchik bek hon tawi lechin,” achi hi.
11017012	Ama'n, Toupa na Pathian ahin bang in, ka gen hi. “Tanghou ka nei kei, bel ah tangbuang pham khat lel leh thawl ah sathau tawmchik kia ka nei hi. Ngai in, ka pai chia ka tapa a dia bawlna ding singkang nih hiam lel ka tom a, huchi in ka ne ding ua, ka si mai ding uh,” achi hi.
11017013	Elijah in akiang ah, “Lau ke'n, na gen bang in va hih in. Himahleh huai in tanghou neuchik petmah hon bawlsak phot inla, huai hon tawi inla, huai khit chiang in nang a ding leh na tapa a ding na bawl ding hi.
11017014	Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Toupa'n leitung a vuah ahon zuksak masiah tangbuang bel avuak tuan kei dia, sathau thawl leng akang kei ding,” achi hi.
11017015	Huchi in Elijah gen bang in ahih a; amah leh a-inkote leh Elijah toh ni tamtak ane uhi.
11017016	Elijah zang a agen Toupa thu bang in tangbuang bel avuak tuan kei a, sathau thawl leng akang sam kei hi.
11017017	Huai thilte nung in hichi ahong hi a, huai numei, inn neinu tapa china in ahong gim mahmah a, anak ahong beita hi.
11017018	Ama'n Elijah kiang ah, “Nang Pathian mipa aw, ka tung a lungkimlouhna bang nei na hia? Ka khelhna hon theikhesak ding leh ka tapa hon thahsak dia hong pai na hi ve!” achi hi.
11017019	Ama'n akiang ah, “Na tapa hon pia in,” achi hi. Huchi in apom lai ala a, a-omna dantan ah apom tou a, alupna ah asial hi.
11017020	Toupa asam a, “Aw Toupa , ka Pathian, ka tenna meithainu tung ah leh atapa hihlupsak in thil hoih lou hon tungsakta na hi maw?” achi hi.
11017021	Huchi in naupang tung ah thumvei bokkhup in, Toupa asam a, “Aw Toupa , ka Pathian, hehpih in hiai naupang hinna asung ah hon omsak nawn in,” achi hi.
11017022	Toupa'n Elijah thu ana ngaihkhiaksak hi. Hichi in naupang hinna amah sung ah ahong om nawn a, ahong halh nawnta hi.
11017023	Elijah in naupang api a, dantan a pan insung ah apaipihsuk a, anu apia hi. Elijah in, “En in, na tapa ahing hi,” achi hi.
11017024	Numei in Elijah kiang ah, “Tu in Pathian mipa na hi a, na kam a Toupa thu thutak ahi, chih ka theita,” achi hi.
11018001	Huan ni sawtkuamtak nung in hichi ahong hi a, akum thum kum in Toupa thu Elijah kiang ah ahong tung hi. “Va kuan inla, Ahab kiang ah va kihil in. Huchi in leitung ah vuah ka zusak ding,” achi hi.
11018002	Ahab kiang a kihil ding in Elijah akuanta hi. Samaria gam ah kial ana mahmah hi.
11018003	Ahab in Obadiah, a-inn sunglam heutu asam hi. Obadiah bel Toupa laudan siam mahmah mi ahi a;
11018004	huan, hichi ahong hi a, Jezebel in Toupa zawlneite asatkhiak lai in Obadiah in zawlnei zakhat api a, kokhuk ah sawmnga nga in asel a, tanghou leh tui in avak hi.
11018005	Ahab in Obadiah kiang ah, “Tui nak nei tengteng leh lui phaizang tengteng omna gam va tuan vialvial dih ve. Sakol leh sabiltungte i hut hing theihna ding in loupa i muhsak thei kha hiam, huchi lou in zaw gante i tan vek kha ding,” achi hi.
11018006	Huchi in gam totsuak ding in akihawm ua; Ahab amah kia in lampi dang ah apai a, Obadiah leng amah kia in lampi dang ah apai hi.
11018007	Huchi a Obadiah apai lai in, ngai in, Elijah in ana tuak a; ama'n athei lai a, huchi in abokkhup a, “Ka toupa Elijah na hi maw?” achi hi.
11018008	Ama'n adawng a, “Hi e, kuan inla, ngai in, Elijah huai ah a-om hi, chi in na toupa va hilh in,” achi hi.
11018009	Ama'n, “Thil bang ahia ka hihkhelh a, na sikha thah dia Ahab khut a na hon piak ding?
11018010	Toupa na Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi, ka pu in nang ahon zonsaklouhna nam leh gam himhim a-om kei. Hiai ah a-om kei, achih chiang un nang ahon muhlouhna thu uah gam leh nam akichiamsak hi.
11018011	Tu in nang, kuan inla, ngai in, Elijah hiai ah a-om, chi in na toupa va hilh in, na chi hi.
11018012	Huan hichi ahi ding a, nang ka hon nutsiattak in Toupa Kha in ka theihlouhna ah nang ahong lamang dia; huchi in Ahab ka va hilh a, nang ahon muh theih ngal ke'n zaw, kei hon that mai ding hi. Himahleh na sikha in ka valnou tung a pan Toupa ka lau hi.
11018013	Jezebel in Toupa zawlneite athah lai a ka thilhih, Toupa zawlneite lak a mi zakhat, sawmnga nga a kokhuk a, tanghou leh tui a ka vakdan ka toupa hon hilh lou uhia?
11018014	Tu in nang, kuan inla, ngai in, Elijah huai ah a-om hi, chi in na toupa va hilh in na chi mawk a; ama'n kei ahon that mahmah ding,” achi hi.
11018015	Elijah in, “Ama ka dinna sepaihte' Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, tuni in akiang ah ka kihil ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
11018016	Huchi in Ahab houpih ding in Obadiah akuan a, ahilhta a; huchi in Elijah mu ding in Ahab akuanta hi.
11018017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ahab in Elijah amuh in Ahab in akiang ah, “Nang na hi maw, Israelte buaisakpa?” achi hi.
11018018	Ama'n adawng a, “Israelte ka buaisak kei. Nang leh na pa inkote ahi ve abuaisak zaw; Toupa thupiakte lehngatsan a, Baal na zuih zawkna ah.
11018019	Huchi in tu in Israel tengteng leh Baal zawlnei zali-le-sawmnga leh Asherah zawlnei, Jezebel dohkan a ankuang um zalite ka kiang ah Karmel tang ah va samkhawm in,” achi hi.
11018020	Huchi in Ahab in Israel suan tengteng kiang ah mi asawl a, zawlneite Karmel tang ah asamkhawm hi.
11018021	Elijah in mipi tengteng ava naih a, “Vanglak a bang tan om ding na hi ua? Toupa Pathian ahihleh, amah zui unla; Baal ahihleh amah zui un,” achi hi. Mipite'n kam khat in leng adawng kei uh.
11018022	Huchi in Elijah in mipite kiang ah, “ Toupa zawlnei omsun kei kia ka hi a; Baal zawlneite bel mi zali-le-sawmnga ahi uh.
11018023	Huchi in bawngtal nih hong pia uhenla; amau bawngtal khat amau a tuam ding in tel uhenla, semnen uhenla, sing tung ah koih uhenla, anuai ah mei toh kei uhen. Ke'n leng bawngtal khat ka bawl sam dia, sing tung ah ka koih dia mei ahihleh ka toh kei ding.
11018024	Nou na pathiante min uh sam unla, ke'n Toupa min ka sam ding. Huchi in mei a hon dawng Pathian pen Pathian hi hen,” achi hi. Huchi in mi tengteng in, “Athugen ahoih hi,” chi in adawng uhi.
11018025	Elijah in Baal zawlneite kiang ah, “Nou bawngtal khat nou a tuam ding in tel unla, bawl masa un; nou na tam deuh ua; na pathiante min sam unla, himahleh anuai ah mei toh kei un,” achi hi.
11018026	Bawngtal atan pen uh ala ua, abawl ua, “Baal aw, hon dawng in,” chi in zingsang a pan sun tan in Baal min asam uh. Himahleh aw himhim a-om kei a, adawng leng a om sam kei a, maitam kibawl tung ah atawm uhi.
11018027	Sun lai in hichi ahong hi a, “Elijah in amau enghou in, kikou ngaih ve ua; pathian khat ahi ngal a. Midang houpih hiam, nungdelh nei lel hiam, khualzin ahihkeileh ihmu lel phawn teitei ngai houh hi in teh,” achi hi.
11018028	Huchi in angaih a ngaih in akikou ua, ahih zeldan bang un sisan pawt khop hial in temta in aki-atkeh ua, thilzum in akisun uhi.
11018029	Sun nung ahong hih in hichi ahong hi a, nitaklam kithoih hun tan in thu agen uhi. Himahleh aw hiam, dawngtu hiam limsaktu leng a-om kei.
11018030	Huchi in Elijah in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Hong naih dih ua,” achi hi. Huchi in mipi tengteng in ava naih uhi.
11018031	Toupa maitam kichimsa abawlhoih a; na min Israel ahi ding, chi a Toupa thu ana mupa Jakob tapate nam zah suang sawm-le-nih Elijah in ala hi.
11018032	Huai suangte in Toupa min in maitam abawl a; maitam kim buhchi tehna nih takna ding atoukuak hi.
11018033	Sing akoih hoih sipsip a, bawngtal asemnen a, sing tung ah akoih hi. “Bel li tui in dimsak unla, halmang thillat leh sing buak un,” achi hi.
11018034	Anihveina ding in, “Buak nawn un,” achi a, abuak nawn uhi. Athumveina ding in, “Buak nawn un,” achi a, abuak nawn uhi.
11018035	Huchi in tui maitam kim ah aluang zuazua a; tohkuak tui in adimta hi.
11018036	Nitaklam kithoih hun in hichi ahong hi a, zawlnei Elijah in ava naih a, “ Toupa Abraham, Isak leh Israel Pathian, nang Israel gam a Pathian na hihleh, kei na sikha ka hih, hiai tengteng nang thu a ka hih tuni in theihsak hi hen.
11018037	Hon ngaikhia in, aw Toupa hon ngaikhia in, hiai mipite'n nang Toupa Pathian na hi a, alungtang uh na heikik nawnta chih atheihna ding un,” achi hi.
11018038	Huchi in Toupa mei ahong kia a, halmang thillat, asing, asuang leh aleivui akangtum a, tohkuak a tui ahipkang hi.
11018039	Huchi in mipi tengteng in huai amuh un abokkhup ua, “ Toupa amah Pathian ahi, Toupa amah Pathian ahi,” achi uh.
11018040	Elijah in akiang uah, “Baal zawlneite man unla, khat leng suaktasak kei un,” achi hi. Huchi in aman ua, Elijah in Kishon lui ah apisuk a, huai ah amaute athat hi.
11018041	Elijah in Ahab kiang ah, “Paitou inla, ne in dawnta in; vuahpi zu ding husa a-om,” achi hi.
11018042	Ne leh dawn ding in Ahab apaitouta hi. Elijah bel Karmel tang vum ah apaitou a; lei ah akunsuk a, akhukte kikal ah amai aphual hi.
11018043	Asikha kiang ah, “Va paitou inla, tuipi lam va en mah dih!” achi hi. Ava paitou a, tuipi lam a-en a, “Bangmah a-om kei,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sagihvei kuan nawn in,” achi hi.
11018044	Asagihveina ah hichi ahong hi a, “Ngai in, tuipi a pan mihing khuttum chia lel meipi hong lengtou viaiviai,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Va pai inla, Ahab kiang ah, na kangtalai bawl inla, paisukta in, vuah in ahon khum kha ding, chi in,” achi hi.
11018045	Sawt lou nung in hichi ahong hi a, huih leh meipite in van adup keihkuih a, vuahpi tam petmah ahong zuta hi. Ahab kangtalai a tuang in Jezreel ah apaita hi.
11018046	Toupa khut Elijah tung ah a-om a; apuan ateng a, Ahab ma ah Jezreel kholutna tan atai hi.
11019001	Huan Ahab in Elijah thilhih tengteng, namsau a zawlnei tengteng athah thute toh Jezebel ahilh hi.
11019002	Huchi in Jezebel in Elijah kiang ah, “Huai mite lak a mi khat hinna bang a zingchiang a hichi hun ma a na hinna ka hon bawlsak sam keileh pathiante'n alohloh uh hon loh uhenla, huai sang a sezaw in leng,” chi a hilh ding in mi asawl hi.
11019003	Huchi in huai atheih in alau a, athou a, ahinna humbit ding in atai hi. Judah gam a Beer-sheba khua ava tung a, huai ah asikha anusia hi.
11019004	Amah gamdai ah ni khat lampaina tan ah ahoh a, Juniper sing nuai ah tu in sih angenta hi. “Ahunta; Toupa aw, tu in ka hinna la in, ka pute sang in lah ka hoihzaw tuan kei,” achi hi.
11019005	Juniper sing nuai ah alum a, a-ihmuta hi. Ngai in, angel in ahong khoih a, akiang ah, “Thou inla ne in,” achi hi.
11019006	Ama'n a-en vialvial a, ngai in, alu chin ah tanghou pei, suangsa a haiminsa leh tuithawl ana om hi. Huchi in hiaite ne in adawn a, alum nawn hi.
11019007	Anihveina ding in Toupa angel ahong pai nawn a, ahong khoih a, “Thou inla, ne in, na paina ding agamla lo lai hi,” achi hi.
11019008	Huchi in athou a, ne in adawn a, an ziak a hatna in Pathian tang Horeb tan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli apai hi.
11019009	Huai a kokhuk khat ava tung a, huai ah a-omta hi. Ngai in, Toupa thu akiang ah ahong tung a, akiang ah, “Hiai a bang hih na hia, Elijah?” achi hi.
11019010	Ama'n, “ Toupa , Sepaihte' Pathian a ding in phatuam ka ngai mahmah hi. Israel suante'n lah na thukhun alehngatsan ua, na maitamte achimsak ua, na zawlneite namsau in athat ua; a-om lai kei ka hi a, ka hinna lakmang ding in azong uh,” achi hi.
11019011	Ama'n, “Pawtkhia inla, huai tang ah Toupa ma ah va dingh in,” achi hi. Ngai in, Toupa ahong pai a, huihpi hat mahmah in tangte Toupa ma ah amutkhang a, suangpi akitam phuakphuak hi. Himahleh huai ah Toupa a-om kei. Huih nun khit in zin ahong ling a; himahleh huai zinling ah Toupa a-om kei.
11019012	Zinlin khit in meikuang ahong pawt a; himahleh huai mei ah Toupa a-om kei. Meikuang nung in aw ngat ngiingei ahong pawt hi.
11019013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Elijah in huai azak in apuanin amai akhuh a, va pawtkhia in kokhuk lutna ah ava dingh hi. Ngai in, huai aw in akiang ah, “Hiai a bang hih na hia, Elijah?” achi hi.
11019014	Ama'n, “ Toupa , Sepaihte' Pathian a ding in phatuam ka ngai mahmah hi. Israel suante'n lah na thukhun alehngatsan ua, na maitamte achimsak ua, na zawlneite namsau in athat ua. A-om lai kei ka hi a, ka hinna lakmang ding in azong uh,” achi hi.
11019015	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Pai nawn inla, gamdai lam a Damaskas ah pai in. Na tun chiang in Siria kumpipa ding in Hazael thau na nilh ding hi.
11019016	Israel kumpipa ding in Nimshi tapa Jehu thau na nilh ding; na sik a zawlnei ding in Abel-meholah a mi Shaphat tapa Elisha leng thau na nilh ding ahi.
11019017	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Hazael namsau pel peuhmah Jehu in athat dia; Jehu namsau pel peuhmah Elisha in athat ding.
11019018	Himahleh Israel gam ah Baal ma a khukdin ngei lou leh amah tawp ngeiloumi sangsagih kei a ding in ka sit hi,” achi hi.
11019019	Huchi in huai a pan apawtkhia a, Shaphat tapa Elisha ava mukhia hi. Ama'n langkawn bat bawngtal tuak sawm-le-nih in lou ana kai hi. Asawm-le-nihna azang hi. Elijah in ava naih a, apuan ava silhsak hi.
11019020	Ama'n abawngtalte paisan in Elijah anungdelh a, “Ka nu leh ka pa hon tawpsak ding in ka hon ngen, huchi in ka hon zui ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Pai nawn ve le, bang ka hon chih a eita?” achi hi.
11019021	Amah zui lai akik nawn a, bawng tuakkhat agou a, bawng vante in asa ahuan a, mite apia a, amau ane uhi. Huchi in athou a, Elijah adelh a, a-nna asepsakta hi.
11020001	Huan Siria kumpipa Ben-hadad in asepaih tengteng akaikhawm vek a, kumpipa sawmthum-le-nih atel ua, sakol leh kangtalaite toh akuantou a, Samaria khua ava um a, adouta hi.
11020002	Israel kumpipa Ahab kiang ah khopi sung ah mi asawl a, akiang ah, Ben-hadad in hichi in achi,
11020003	“Na dangka leh dangka-eng kei a ahi. Na zite leh na tate, na neih hoihpente tan in leng kei a ahi,” achi hi.
11020004	Israel kumpipa'n ana dawng a, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, na gen bang in kei leh ka neih tengteng nang a ahi,” achi hi.
11020005	Amisawlte apai nawn ua, Ben-hadad in hichi in achi, “Ka kiang a na dangka leh dangka-eng, na zite leh na tate na hon piak ding ahi, chi in mi hon sawl ding ka hi,
11020006	‘Zingchiang hiai hun in ka sikhate na kiang ah ka hon sawl dia, na inn leh na sikhate inn ahong mai ding uh.’ Huan hichi ahi ding a, na mit late ala ding ua, ahon paipih vek ding uh,” achi hi.
11020007	Israel kumpipa'n agam a upa tengteng asam a, thei un, “Hiai mi in thil hoih loutak hih atupdan. Ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl a, ka zite, ka tate, ka dangka leh ka dangka-eng ahong ngen a, amah ka na nial kei hi,” achi hi.
11020008	Upa tengteng leh mipi tengteng in akiang ah, “Amah na limsak dah inla, angette leng pe sam ke'n,” achi uhi.
11020009	Ben-hadad misawlte kiang ah, “Kumpipa, ka toupa kiang ah, na sikha kiang a mi sawl a na hon nget masak tengteng bang in ka hih dia; himahleh hiai zaw ka hih kei ding,” achi, chi un. Huchi in amisawlte apai nawn ua, huai thu ava tun uhi.
11020010	Ben-hadad in akiang ah mi asawl nawn a, “Kei hon zui teng in akhut dim ua apham dia kiching Samaria kho leivui nutsiat ahihleh pathiante'n alohloh hon loh uhenla, huai sang a sezaw in leng,” achi hi.
11020011	Israel kumpipa'n adawng a, “Mi kigalthuam khinsa, agalvan suah khesa bang in ki-uangsak kei hen, chi in va hilh un,” achi hi.
11020012	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amah leh kumpipate'n puanin a zu ana dawnkhawm lai un huai thu Ben-hadad in ana za a, amite kiang ah, “Kisa dih ua,” achi hi. Huchi in khua dou ding in akisata uhi.
11020013	Huchi in ngai in, zawlnei khat in Israel kumpipa Ahab ava naih a, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hiai mipi tampite na mu hia? Ngai in, tu in na khut ah ka hon pe ding. Huchi in kei Toupa ka hi, chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
11020014	Ahab in, “Kua zang in eita?” achi hi. Ama'n, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Gam sehkhente a heutu tangvalte zang in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kua'n dou dia thu pe ding eita?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Nangmah in,” chi in adawng hi.
11020015	Huchi in ama'n gam sehkhente a heutu tangvalte akaikhawm a, zanih sawmthum-le-nih ahi uh. Huai mite nung in mi tengteng, Israel suan tengteng akaikhawm a, sangsagih ahi uh.
11020016	Sun laitak in ava pawt ua, Ben-hadad leh kumpipate, amah panpih kumpipa sawmthum-le-nihte huai puanin ah zu dawnkham in ana om uh.
11020017	Gam sehkhente a heutu tangvalte ava pawt masa ua; Ben-hadad in mi asawl a, “Amau, Samaria a pan hong pawt a-om uh,” chi in ahilh uh.
11020018	Ama'n, “Kilep tum a hong ahih uleh hingmat unla, kidou tum a hong ahih uleh leng hingmat un,” achi hi.
11020019	Huchi in hiai gam sehkhente a heutu tangvalte leh ahon zui sepaihte khua a pan apawt uhi.
11020020	Abitum chiat uh ava that ua; huchi in Siriate ataikekta ua, Israelte'n adelh uhi. Huchi in Siria kumpipa Ben-hadad sakol tung a tuang in sakol tungtuang mite toh asuakta hi.
11020021	Israel kumpipa ava pawtkhia a, sakol leh kangtalaite ava sual a, Siriate tampi athat hi.
11020022	Zawlnei in Israel kumpipa ava naih a, akiang ah, “Kihatsak inla, na hihdan ding ngaihtuah in kum hong beileh Siria kumpipa'n hong dou nawn ding ahi,” achi hi.
11020023	Siria kumpipa sikhate'n akiang ah, “Apathiante uh mualte pathiante ahi uh. Huaiziak a ei sang a amau hatzaw ahi uh. Phaizang ah dou lehang, amau sang in i hatzaw ngeingei ding uh,” achi uhi.
11020024	“Hiai thilhih in, kumpipate avek un lakhia inla, amun uah gamuk mite koih in.
11020025	Sepaihte, sakolte leh kangtalaite, na mansuahsa zah geih sepaihte ding khethaksak nawn in. Huchi in phaizang ah i dou ding ua, amau sang in i hatzaw na ding uhi,” achi uh. Ama'n athugen uh angaikhia a, huchibang in ahihta hi.
11020026	Akum nawn in hichi ahong hi a, Ben-hadad in Siriate akaikhawm a, Israelte dou ding in Aphek ah ahohtou hi.
11020027	Israel suante leng akikaikhawm ua, nek ding asekkhawm masa ua, dou ding in akisata uhi. Israel suante kelnou tawm chikchik hon nih bang lel in ava kilang ua; Siriate bel gam ah apumdim uhi.
11020028	Pathian mipa'n Israel kumpipa va naih in, ahoupih a, akiang ah, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Siriate'n, Toupa mualte Pathian ahi a, phaizang Pathian ahi kei, achi uhi. Huaiziak in hiai mipi tampite na khut ah ka hon pe ding hi, huchi in kei Toupa ka hi, chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
11020029	Ni sagih sungtak akinangtuah nilouh uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in akidouta ua; Israel suante'n Siria mite ni khat in sepaih nuaikhat athat uhi.
11020030	Midangte bel Aphek ah, khopi sung ah atailut ua, omlaite mi singnih-le-sangsagih kulh chim in achipkhumta hi. Ben-hadad atai a, khopi sung ah dantan sunggil ah alut hi.
11020031	Asikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, Israel inkuan lak a kumpipate mihehpih thei kumpipate ahi uh chih thu ka za uh. Sai-ip puan teng in, ka lu ua khau a kikhih in Israel kumpipa kiang ah hon va hohsak in; ama'n ahon hinghawi nuam khamoh kei ding,” achi uhi.
11020032	Huchi in sai-ip puan ateng ua, alu uah khau in akikhih ua, Israel kumpipa kiang ah ava hoh ua, “Na sikha Ben-hadad in, hehpih in hon hinghawi hen, achi,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Dam lai ahi maw? Amah ka unaupa ahi,” achi hi.
11020033	Huai mite'n lungnuamtak in, alungsim thutak gen ahi ding chih gingta in, “Na unaupa Ben-hadad himah e,” achi pah uhi. Huchi in ama'n, “Va pai unla, hon pi un,” achi hi. Ben-hadad ahong pawtkhia a, akiang ah ahoh a; ama'n akangtalai ah ana tuangsak hi.
11020034	Ben-hadad in akiang ah, “Ka pa'n na pa a pan khua ana lakte ka hon pekik ding. Ka pa'n Samaria a sumsinna munte a bawl bang in Damaskas ah sumsinna munte na bawl sam ding hi. Huchibang a thu kikhung in ka hon paisak ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang ah thu akhung a, apaisakta hi.
11020035	Zawlnei tapate lak a mi khat in Toupa thu in alawmpa kiang ah, “Hon khen in,” achi a; huai mi in akhen ut kei hi.
11020036	Huchi in akiang ah, “ Toupa thu na man louh ziak in, ngai in, mual na hon khupsantak in, humpinelkai in ahon na kei ding,” achi hi. Mual akhuptak in humpinelkai in atuak a, athat hi.
11020037	Huchi in midang ava mu nawn a, “Hon khen in,” achi a; huai mi in akhen a, aliamta hi.
11020038	Huchi in zawlnei apai a, lampi ah kumpipa ana tang a, amai a vut nuh in ana kibawl lamdang hi.
11020039	Kumpipa ahong tun in kumpipa ana sam a, “Kei na sikha kidouna lak ah ka tailut a; ngai in, mi khat ahong kilehhei a, ka kiang ah mi khat ahon pi a, hiai mi na veng in, ataimangleh ahinna sik in na hinna na tan dia, ahihkeileh dangka talent khat na piak ding ahi,” achi hi.
11020040	“Kei na sikha ka pumbuai ziak in ana paimangta hi,” achi hi. Israel kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Huchibang geih in na tung a thu khen ahi ding, nangmah in thu khen khin na hi ve,” achi hi.
11020041	Ama'n amai a pan vut alakhezok a; Israel kumpipa'n zawlneite lak a mi ahi chih atheita hi.
11020042	Ama'n akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hihsiatgawp dia ka sehsa mi khat na paisak ziak in ahinna sik in nang hinna, amite sik in na mite na tan ding,” achi hi.
11020043	Israel kumpipa bel nguitak leh lungkim loutak in apai a, Samaria khua ahong tungta hi.
11021001	Huan huai thilte nung in hichi ahong hi a, Jezreel mi Naboth in Jezreel ah grephuan anei a, huai Samaria kumpipa Ahab inn kiang a om hi.
11021002	Ahab in Naboth kiang ah, “Ka inn kiang a om ahih ziak in anteh-louhing huan ding in na grephuan hon pia in. Asik in grephuan hoihzaw ka hon pe ding. Ahihkei a na deih zawkleh lah adangka in ama'n hun ding ka hon pe ding,” chi in agen hi.
11021003	Naboth in Ahab kiang ah, “ Toupa'n ka pu ka pate gou nang ka hon piak ding aphal kei,” achi hi.
11021004	Jezreel mi Naboth in huchibang thu akiang a agen ziak in Ahab ngui leh lungkim loutak in a-inn ah alut hi; ka pu ka pate gou ka hon pe thei het kei ding, achi bikbek ngal a. Huchi in alupna ah alum a, khat lam anga a, an ane kei hi.
11021005	Huchi in azi Jezebel ava hoh a, akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia na lungsim huchitak a alungkham a, an na nek louh?” achi hi.
11021006	Ama'n akiang ah, “Naboth kiang ah, na grephuan hon leisak in, ahihkeileh na deih zawkleh asik in grephuan dang ka hon pe ding ka chi hi. Ama'n, ka grephuan zaw ka hon pe thei het kei ding, chi in ahon dawng a ahi,” achi hi.
11021007	Azi Jezebel in akiang ah, “Israel gam kumpipa na hi kei a hia? Thou inla, an ne inla, lungsim nuamtak in om in. Ke'n Jezreel mi Naboth grephuan ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
11021008	Huchi in Ahab min in laithonte agelh a, Ahab suainamna in suai anam a, Naboth invengte a-upate leh makaite kiang ah akhak hi.
11021009	Laithonte ah, “An ngolh na puang unla, mipi lak ah Naboth ma kaisak un.
11021010	Belial tate mi nih ama ah tusak unla, nang Pathian leh kumpipa na gensia hi, chi a amah hek ding mi ana bawl un. Huchi in amah pikhia unla, suang in ana denglum un,” achi hi.
11021011	Atenna khua a upate leh makaite'n Jezebel in akiang ua akhak laithon akigelh bang in ana hihta uhi.
11021012	An ngolh apuang ua, mipi lak ah Naboth a makaisak uhi.
11021013	Belial tate mi nih hong pai in ama ah ava tu ua; Belial tate'n mipite ma ah, Naboth in Pathian leh kumpipa agensia, chi in amah ahek uhi. Huchi in khua a pan apokhia ua, suang in adeng ua, asita hi.
11021014	Jezebel kiang ah, “Naboth suang in adeng ua, asita,” chih hilh ding in mi asawl uhi.
11021015	Jezebel in Naboth suang in adeng ua, asita chih azak in hichi ahong hi a, Jezebel in Ahab kiang ah, “Thou inla, Jezreel mi Naboth grephuan, ahon leisak phal louh neita aw le. Naboth adam nawnta kei, asita hi,” achi hi.
11021016	Ahab in Naboth asita chih azak in hichi ahong hi a; Jezreel mi Naboth grephuan nei dia kuansuk ding in Ahab athouta hi.
11021017	Tishbi mi Elijah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
11021018	“Thou inla, Samaria a om Israel kumpipa houpih ding in hohsuk in. Ngai in, Naboth grephuan ah a-om a, neih tum in huai ah ahohsuk hi.
11021019	Akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Na that a, na neihsak behlap lai maw? chi inla, akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi, ui in Naboth sisan aliahna mun mah ah nang sisan leng aliak ding uh’ na chi ding,” achi hi.
11021020	Ahab in Elijah kiang ah, “Na hong muta maw, ka melmapa?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Hon muta ka hi ve; Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou hih dia nang leh nang na kikhotkhiak tak ziak in.
11021021	Ngai in na tung ah thil hoih lou ka tungsak dia, na suante ka lamang dia, Ahab a pan a ta pasal taphot Israel gam a mi zalen hi in zalen lou hitaleh ka satkhe ding.
11021022	Nang na hon hehsak ziak in leh Israelte thil na hihkhelhsak ziak in Nebat tapa Jeroboam inkote leh Ahijah tapa Baasha inkote bang mai in na inkote ka bawl ding,” achi hi.
11021023	Jezebel tungtang thu leng Toupa'n agen a, “Jezebel khokulh chin ah uite'n ane ding uh.
11021024	Ahab inkote lak a mi khopi a si peuhmah uite'n ane ding ua; gam a si peuhmahte tung a leng vasate'n ane ding uh,” achi hi.
11021025	Azi Jezebel tohthoh a Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou hih dia amah-le-amah kikhawngkhia Ahab bang mi kuamah a-om kei hi.
11021026	Toupa'n Israel suante ma a delhkhiaksa Amorte thilhih chiteng bang in milimte bia in thilkihhuaitak ahih hi.
11021027	Ahab in huai thu azak in hichi ahong hi a, apuan abotkek a, sai-ip puan asilh hi. An angawl a, sai-ip puan ah alum a, kidawmtak in apai hi.
11021028	Toupa thu Tishbi mi Elijah kiang ah ahong tung hi.
11021029	“Ka ma a Ahab akiniamkhiakdan na mu hia? Akiniamkhiak ziak in adamsung in hiai thil hoih lou ka tungsak kei dia, atapa damsung in bel a-inkote tung ah hiai thil hoih lou ka tungsak ding,” achi hi.
11022001	Huan kum thum sung Siriate leh Israelte kidou lou in a-om uhi.
11022002	Akum thum kum in hichi ahong hi a, Israel kumpipa kiang ah Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ahohsuk hi.
11022003	Israel kumpipa'n asikhate kiang ah, “Ramoth-gilead khua ei a ahi chih thei napi a, bangchidan a Siria kumpipa khut a pan sutkhe lou a mawk om i hi ua oi?” achi hi.
11022004	Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ramoth-gilead ah galdou ding in kei toh na hong kuan diam?” achi hi. Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “Kei leh nang, ka mite leh na mite pum khat i hi ua, ka sakol leh na sakol pum khat ahi ve ua le,” achi hi.
11022005	Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “Tuni in Toupa thu dong in, chi in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.
11022006	Huchi in Israel kumpipa'n zawlnei mi zali asamkhawm a, akiang uah, “Ramoth-gilead khua dou ding in ka kuantou diam, kuantou lou ding?” achi hi. Amau, “Kuan in, Toupa'n kumpipa khut ah ahon pe ding,” achi uh.
11022007	Himahleh Jehoshaphat in, “Hiai ah Toupa zawlnei dang kuahiam bek i dot ding om lou hia?” achi hi.
11022008	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “ Toupa hon dotsak ding mi khat Imlah tapa Mikaiah om lai veh aw. Himahleh amah ka hua hi; ka tungtang thu ahoih lou lam lou ngal agen ngei kei,” achi hi. Jehoshaphat in, “Kumpipa'n hichibang in chi kei hen,” achi hi.
11022009	Huchi in Israel kumpipa'n heutu khat asam a, “Kintak in Imlah tapa Mikaiah va pi mah dih,” achi hi.
11022010	Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat bel Samaria kongpi lutna gei phaizang ah akumpipa uh puan a kithuam in alaltutphah tuaktuak uah atu ua, zawlnei tengteng in ama uah thu agen uhi.
11022011	Kenaanah tapa Zedekiah in sik kiite abawlsak a, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hiaite in Siriate mangthang sipsip khop in na hihse ding chi in,” achi hi.
11022012	Huchi mah bang in zawlnei tengteng in, “Ramoth-gilead ah va hohtou inla, va lohching in, Toupa'n kumpipa khut ah ahon pe ding,” chi in agen uhi.
11022013	Mikaiah sam dia sawl a ompa'n akiang ah, “Ngai dih, zawlneite'n thukhat sat in ahoih lam in kumpipa kiang ah thu agen chiat uh. Agen khitsa bang un gen sam inla, ahoih lam in va gen in,” chi in angen hi.
11022014	Mikaiah in, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, Toupa'n ka kiang ah agen mah ka va gen ding,” achi hi.
11022015	Kumpipa kiang atuntouh in, kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mikaiah, Ramoth-gilead khua dou ding in ka kuantou diam, kuantou lou ding?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Kuantou inla, va lohching in; Toupa'n kumpipa khut ah ahon pe ding,” achi hi.
11022016	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Thutak kia lou ngal ka kiang a Toupa min agen lou dia bangzah vei ahia ka hon kichiamsak ding?” achi hi.
11022017	Ama'n, “Israel tengteng ching ding nei lou belam bang in tang a dalhzak in ka mu hi. Toupa'n , hiaite'n heutu aneita kei ua, michih ama inn chiat ah lungmuangtak in pai hen achi,” achi hi.
11022018	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ka tungtang thu ahoih lou lam kia lou ngal, ahoih lam himhim agen kei ding chih ka hon hilh ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
11022019	Ama'n, “Huaiziak in Toupa thu ngaikhe dih, Toupa alaltutphah tung a tu, van a mipi tengteng ataklam leh veilam a dinghte toh ka mu hi.
11022020	Toupa'n , Ramoth-gilead a hohtou a, gal a si dia kua'n Ahab kunzou ding ahia? achi hi. Khat in hichibang in, midang in huchibang in,” achi uh.
11022021	Huchi in kha khat ahong pawt a, Toupa ma ah adingh a, “Ke'n ka kunzou ding,” achi hi.
11022022	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Bang in eita? achi hi. Ama'n ka va hoh dia, azawlnei teng muk ah kha zuauthei ka va suak ding, achi hi. Ama'n va kun mah inla, na lohching lai ding. Va kuan inla, huchibang in va hih ve leh,” achi hi.
11022023	“Huaiziak in tu in ngai in, Toupa'n hiai na zawlnei teng muk ah kha zuauthei akoih a, na tungtang thu ahoih lou lam Toupa'n agen khinta,” achi hi.
11022024	Huchi in Kenaanah tapa Zedekiah in ahon naih a, Mikaiah biang ahong beng a, “ Toupa Kha in na kiang a thu gen ding in kei a pan koilam ah ahia apai?” achi hi.
11022025	Mikaiah in, “Ngai in, dantan sunggil a kibu dia na lut ni in na thei ding,” achi hi.
11022026	Israel kumpipa'n, “Mikaiah pi unla, khopi ukpipa Ammon leh kumpi tapa Joash kiang ah paipih nawn un,” achi hi.
11022027	Kumpipa'n hichi in achi, “Hiai mi suangkul ah khum unla, galmuang a ka hong pai nawn masiah gimthuakna an leh gimthuakna tui na pia un,” achi hi.
11022028	Mikaiah in, “Galmuang a na hong pai nawnleh Toupa'n kei zang a thu gen lou ahi ding,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Nou, mipite aw, na vek un na za un,” achi hi.
11022029	Huchi in Ramoth-gilead ah Israel kumpipa leh Jehoshaphat ahohtou uh.
11022030	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ka kibawl lamdang dia, kidouna ah ka hohtou dia; nang bel na kumpi puan silh in,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel kumpipa akibawl lamdang a, kidouna ah ahohtou hi.
11022031	Siria kumpipa'n akangtalai tung a heutu sawmthum-le-nihte kiang ah, “Israel kumpipa kia lou ngal mineu leng, milian leng akuamah sual kei un,” chi in thu apia hi.
11022032	Kangtalai tung a heutute'n Jehoshaphat amuh un, hichi ahong hi a, “Israel kumpipa ahi mah ve,” achi uh. Huchi in sual tum in a-umta ua; Jehoshaphat akikoukhia hi.
11022033	Kangtalai tung a heutute'n Israel kumpipa ana hi kei chih atheih un hichi ahong hi a, adelh lai uh anungkiksan uhi.
11022034	Mi khat in tup tuam nei lou in athalpeu alai a, Israel kumpipa kithopna kikaltak ah akapkhata hi. Huchi in akangtalai hawlpa kiang ah, “Kaihei inla, sepaihte lak a pan hon pawtpih in, ka liam,” achi hi.
11022035	Huai ni in kidouna athupi mahmah a; kumpipa akangtalai tung a kingai in Siriate lam nga in a-opsuk a, nitaklam in asita a; aliamna a pan sisan kangtalai sung ah aluang hi.
11022036	Nitum kuan in sepaihte lak ah, “Michih amah khua ah, michih amah gam ah pai vek hen,” chi in thu puankhiak ahi.
11022037	Huchi in kumpipa asita a, Samaria khua alutpih ua; huchi in Samaria ah kumpipa avui uh.
11022038	Samaria khua dil khat ah kangtalai asil ua; Toupa thugen bang in uite'n asisan aliaksiang ua, agalvan leng asilsiang uh. Huai dil bel kizuakte kisilna dil ahi.
11022039	Huchi in Ahab tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng, saiha inn alamte, akhosat tengteng Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11022040	Huchi in apute kiang ah Ahab a-ihmuta a; asik in atapa Ahaziah ahong lalta hi.
11022041	Israel kumpipa Ahab lal akum lina ah, Judahte tung ah Asa tapa Jehoshaphat alal pan hi.
11022042	Jehoshaphat alal kipat in kum sawmthum-le-nga ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-nga vai ahawm hi. Anu min Azubah ahi a, amah Shilhi tanu ahi.
11022043	Apa Asa lampi tot tengteng atawn a; pialsan het lou in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi. Himahleh mun sangte alamang kei a, mun sangte ah mite kithoih lai in gimlim ahal lailai uhi.
11022044	Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa toh kilemna abawl hi.
11022045	Huchi in Jehoshaphat tanchin dangte, athilhihtheihdan ahihlat thute, agaldou thute Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
11022046	Apa Asa dam lai a pasal kizuak omlaite, agam a pan adelhkhe vek hi.
11022047	Edom gam ah kumpipa a-om kei a, thuneihna piaksawn mi khat in vai ahawm hi.
11022048	Jehoshaphat in Ophir a pai a dangka-eng po ding Tarshish longte abawl hi. Himahleh Ezion-geber mun ah longte asiat khit vek ziak in ahohta kei hi.
11022049	Huchi in Ahab tapa Ahaziah in Jehoshaphat kiang ah, na sikhate toh longte ah ka sikhate kuankhawm le uh ake, achi a; himahleh Jehoshaphat in lem asa kei.
11022050	Huchi in apute kiang ah Jehoshaphat a-ihmuta a, apute lak ah apu David khopi ah avui ua; asik in atapa Jehoram alalta hi.
11022051	Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat lal akum sawm-le-sagih kum in Samaria ah, Israelte tung ah Ahab tapa Ahaziah alal pan a, Israelte tung ah kum nih alal hi.
11022052	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a, anu leh apa lampi totte, Nebat tapa Israelte thil hihkhialsakpa Jeroboam lampi totte atawn sam hi.
11022053	Apa hih teng hih in Baal nna sem in abia a, Toupa , Israelte' Pathian ahehsak hi.
12001001	Huan Ahab sih nung in Israelte tung ah Moabte ahel uhi.
12001002	Samaria a dantan tungnung vathangkalh tohlet a pan Ahaziah akekhia a, akihihnata hi. Huchi in mi asawl a, akiang uah, “Kuan unla, hiai ka natna ahoihkhe nawn thei hiam Ekron kho pathian Baal-zebub va dong un,” achi hi.
12001003	Himahleh Toupa angel in Tishbi mi Elijah kiang ah, “Thou inla, Samaria kumpipa misawlte houpih ding in kuantou inla, akiang uah, Israel gam a Pathian a-om louh ziak in hia Ekron kho pathian Baal-zebub dong dia na hong kuan uh?
12001004	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kahtouhna lupna a pan na hong kumsuk nawn kei dia, na si ngeingei ding, chi in va gen in,” achi hi. Huchi in Elijah akuanta hi.
12001005	Amisawlte akiang ah ahong kik nawn un akiang uah, “Bang achi a ahia na hong kik nawn mawk uh?” achi hi.
12001006	Amau akiang ah, “Mi khat hong houpih ding in ahong a, ka kiang uah, pai unla, nou hon sawlpa kumpipa kiang ah kik nawn unla, akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi, Israel gam a Pathian a-om louh ziak in hia Ekron kho pathian Baal-zebub dong dia na sawl? Huchi in na kahtouhna lupna a pan na hong kumsuk nawn kei ding a, na si ngeingei ding, chi in va hilh un ahon chi,” achi uhi.
12001007	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou hon houpih dia hong, huai thute hong hilhpa mi bangchibang ahia oi?” achi hi.
12001008	Amau adawng ua, “Samul puan a kizem ahi a, akawng savun kawnggak in agak,” achi ua; ama'n, “Tishbi mi Elijah ahi ve,” achi hi.
12001009	Kumpipa'n sepaih sawmnga heutu, aheute sawmnga toh akiang ah asawl hi. Mualvum a tu Elijah kiang ah ahohtou a, ama'n, “Nang, Pathian mi, kumpipa'n hong paisuk in, achi ve,” achi hi.
12001010	Elijah in adawng a, sepaih sawmnga heutu kiang ah, “Pathian mipa ka hihleh van a pan mei hong kesuk henla, nangmah leh na heute sawmnga hong kangmang vek hen,” achi hi. Huchi in van a pan mei ahong kia a, amah leh aheute sawmnga akangmang vek uhi.
12001011	Akiang ah sepaih sawmnga heutu dang, aheute sawmnga toh asawl nawn hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Nang Pathian mi, kumpipa'n, hong paisuk meng in, achi ve,” achi hi.
12001012	Elijah in adawng a, akiang ah, “Pathian mipa ka hihleh van a pan mei hong kesuk henla, nang leh na heute sawmnga hong kangmang vek hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Pathian mei van a kipan ahong kia a, amah leh aheute sawmnga akangmang vekta uhi.
12001013	Sepaih sawmnga dang heutu, aheute sawmnga toh asawl nawn a, huai sepaih sawmnga dang heutu akuantou a, Elijah ma ah ava khukdin a, akiang ah, “Pathian mipa aw, ka hinna leh hiai na sikha mi sawmngate hinna na mitmuh in manpha hen.
12001014	Ngai in, van a pan mei ahong kesuk a, sepaih sawmnga heutu nihte aheute sawmnga utoh akangmangta ua; huaiziak in ka hinna na mitmuh in manpha hen,” chi in angen hi.
12001015	Huchi in Toupa angel in Elijah kiang ah, “Kumsuk pih in, amaute lau ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, amah toh kumpipa kiang ah akumsukkhawm uhi.
12001016	Ama'n akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Ekronte pathian Baal-zebub dong dia mite na sawl, Israel gam a dot ding Pathian a-om louh ziak hia? Huaiziak in na kahtouhna lupna a pan na hong kumsuk nawn kei ding a, na si ngeingei ding,” achi hi.
12001017	Huchi in Elijah in agen Toupa thu bang in asita hi. Tapa aneih louh ziak in Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat tapa, Jehoram kum nih alal kum in, asik in Jehoram alalta hi.
12001018	Ahaziah thilhih tanchin dangte Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12002001	Huan Toupa'n Elijah pingpei a van a apitouh ding in, hichi ahong hi a, Gilgal a pan Elisha toh Elijah apawt uhi.
12002002	Elijah in Elisha kiang ah, “Hiai ah ana om dih; Toupa'n Bethel a pai ding in ahon sawl,” achi hi. Elisha in, “ Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi. K'on nuse kei hial ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Bethel ah apaisukkhawm uhi.
12002003	Bethel a om zawlneite tapate Elisha kiang ah ahoh ua, akiang ah, “Tuni in Toupa'n na heutupa ahon lakmangsak ding chih na thei hia?” achi uh. Ama'n, “Hi, thei mah ing, dai un,” achi hi.
12002004	Elijah in akiang ah, “Elisha, hiai ah na om dih; Toupa'n Jeriko a hoh ding in ahon sawl,” achi hi. Ama'n, “ Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi. K'on nuse kei hial ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Jeriko ah ahohkhawmta uhi.
12002005	Jeriko a om zawlneite tapate'n Elisha ava naih ua, akiang ah, tuni in Toupa'n na heutupa ahon lakmangsak ding chih na thei hia? achi uh. Ama'n adawng a, “Hi, thei mah ing, dai un,” achi hi.
12002006	Elijah in akiang ah, “Hiai ah na om dih, Toupa'n Jordan a hoh ding in ahon sawl,” achi hi. Ama'n, “ Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi, k'on nuse kei hial ding,” achi hi. Huchi in anih un apaikhawmta uh.
12002007	Zawlneite' tapate lak a mi sawmnga ava hoh ua, amaute zawn, gamla kuamtak ah ava dingh ua; amau gel bel Jordan gei ah ana dingh uhi.
12002008	Elijah in apuan la in alomzial a, tui asat a, alang tuak ah ahong kikhenta a, huchi in anih un lei keu ah apaita uhi.
12002009	Agalkah nung un hichi ahong hi a, Elijah in Elisha kiang ah, “Na kiang a pan lakmang a ka om ma in bang ahia ka hon hihsak ding hon ngen in,” achi hi. Elisha in, “Na kha tan nih tang leng,” achi hi.
12002010	Ama'n, “Thil haksapi ngen na hi ve; haksa mahleh na kiang a pan lakmang a ka om lai na muhleh na tang ding, na hon muh keileh bel na tang kei ding,” achi hi.
12002011	Apai kawmkawm ua, ahoulim lai un hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, mei kangtalai leh mei sakolte ahong kimu guih uhi. Akal ua kigolh in akikhensakta a; Elijah bel pingpei in van ah apaitouta hi.
12002012	Elisha in huai amu a, “Ka pa aw, ka pa aw, Israelte kangtalai leh asakol a tuangte aw!” chi in akikou hi. Huchi in Elijah amuta kei a; ama puan aman a, phel nih in abotkek hi.
12002013	Elijah puan hong kia leng atawm a, apaikik nawn a, Jordan lui gei ah adingh hi.
12002014	Elijah puan hong kia ala a, huai in tui asat a, “ Toupa , Elijah Pathian koi ah?” achi hi. Huchi a tui asattak in alang tuak ah hong kikhen a, Elisha agalkahta hi.
12002015	Jeriko a zawlneite tapate, amah zawn a omte'n amuh un, “Elijah kha Elisha tung ah atu mah ve,” achi uhi. Amah mu ding in akuan ua, ama ah lei si in akunsuk uhi.
12002016	Amaute'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhate'n mi ngalhat pipi sawmnga ka ompih uh. Na heutupa zong ding in sawl ve. Toupa Kha in latou ahi dia, koi lai tang ah hiam, koi lai phaizang ah hiam a khia khattou ahi mai ding,” achi uh. Ama'n, “Kuansak ke'n,” achi hi.
12002017	Zumhuai khop a anget nung un, “Kuansak ve ua,” achi khong hi. Huchi in mi sawmnga asawl ua; ni thum sung azong ua, himahleh amuzou kei uh.
12002018	Jeriko a anituan lai in akiang ah ahong nawn ua; ama'n akiang uah, na kiang uah, “Kuansak kei un, ka hon chi ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
12002019	Huai khua a mite'n Elisha kiang ah, “En in, hiai khomun anuam mahmah a, ka toupa un leng na hon muhpih hi. Himahleh tui ahoih kei a, agam mahmah gahsuah thei lou gam ahi,” achi uhi.
12002020	Ama'n, “Tuithawl thak hon la unla, chi thun un,” achi a; huchi in ahon la uhi.
12002021	Tuikhuk ah ava hoh a, chi athehlut a, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi, hiai tui ka limsakta, tuban siah sihna leh gahsuahlouhna a-om nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
12002022	Huchi in Elisha gen bang in tuni tan in huai tui alimta hi.
12002023	Huai a pan Bethel ah ahohtou a; lampi a apai lai in khua a pan pasal naupang hon ahong pawtkhia ua, ahong nuihsan ua, akiang ah, “Nang lugiaupa, va hohtou in, nang lugiaupa va hohtou in,” achi uhi.
12002024	Anunglam anga a, amau amu a, Toupa min in ahamsiatta hi. Huchi in gamnuai a pan vompinu nih ahong pawtkhia ua, alak ua naupang sawmli-le-nih abalgawp uhi.
12002025	Huai a pan Karmel tang ah ahoh a, huai a pan Samaria ah apai nawnta hi.
12003001	Huan Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat kum sawm-le-giat alal kum in Ahab tapa Jehoram Israelte tung ah Samaria ah alal pan a; kum sawm-le-nih alal hi.
12003002	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoihloupi ahih a; himahleh anu leh apa bang tel in zaw thil ahih kei. Ama'n apa Baal suangphuh apaimang hi.
12003003	Himahleh, Israelte thil hihkhialsak Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhnate amah ah abelh tinten a; huai apaisan kei hi.
12003004	Moab kumpipa Mesha belam vul mi ahi a; ama'n Israel kumpipa kiang ah belamnou nuaikhat mul leh belampa nuaikhat mul siah aliau hi.
12003005	Himahleh Ahab sih nung in hichi ahong hi a, Moab kumpipa Israel kumpipa tung ah ahelta hi.
12003006	Huchih lai in Samaria a pan kumpipa Jehoram apawt a, Israel tengteng akaikhawm vek hi.
12003007	Huchi in apawt a, Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Moab kumpipa ka tung ah ahel a, Moabte na hon doupih diam?” chi in mi asawl hi. Ama'n, “Hon doupih e, kei leh nang, ka mite leh na mite pum khat i hi ua, ka sakolte leh na sakolte leng pum khat ahi uh,” achi hi.
12003008	Amah mah in, “Koi lampi ah ahia i kuan touh ding?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Edom gamdai lampi ah,” achi hi.
12003009	Huchi in Israel kumpipa Judah kumpipa toh, Edom kumpipa toh, akuanta ua; ni sagih apaikual ua; asepaihte leh agan tonpihte dawn ding tui a-omta kei hi.
12003010	Israel kumpipa'n, “E heh he! Toupa'n kumpipa thumte Moabte khut a piak dia hon pikhawm ahi peuhmah ve,” achi hi.
12003011	Himahleh Jehoshaphat in, “Hiai ah Toupa hon dotsak ding Toupa zawlnei kuahiam bek a-om kei maw?” achi hi. Israel kumpipa sikha khat in adawng a, “Elijah khut tui buaksekpa Shaphat tapa Elisha hiai a om ei ve,” achi hi.
12003012	Jehoshaphat in, akiang ah, “Ama'n Toupa thu anei hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel kumpipa leh Jehoshaphat leh Edom kumpipa akiang ah ahohsukta uh.
12003013	Elisha in Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “Nang leh ke'n kizopna bang i nei a? Na pa zawlneite leh na nu zawlneite kiang ah va hoh in,” achi hi. Israel kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Pai lou e; kumpipa thumte Moabte khut a piak ding in Toupa'n ahon pikhawm hi,” achi hi.
12003014	Elisha in, “Akiang a ka dinna sepaihte' Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat zahtak lou hi leng nang lam leng ka nga kei dia, muh leng ka hon mu het kei ding.
12003015	Himahleh, kaihging tumsiammi hon sam un,” achi hi. Kaihging tumsiam in ahon tumleh, hichi ahong hi a, Toupa khut atung ah ahong omta hi.
12003016	Ama'n, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hiai phaizang tengteng toukuak tektuk un.
12003017	Toupa mah in hichi in achi: Huih himhim na mu kei ding ua, vuah himhim leng na mu sam kei ding uh. Himahleh hiai phaizang tui in adim vek ding hi. Huchi in nou leh na bawnghonte uh leh na gante un adawn ding uh.
12003018	Hiai Toupa ngaih in thil neuchik lel ahi a; Moabte na khut uah ahon piak behlap ding hi.
12003019	Kulhpi nei khua tengteng leh khopi hoih tengteng na hihse ding ua, sing hoih tengteng na phuk ding ua, tuikhuk tengteng na hubing ding ua, mun hoih tata suang in na dengse vek ding uh,” achi hi.
12003020	Zingsang in, thillat lat hun lai in hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, Edom gam lam a pan tui ahong luang a, tui in agam ahong dimta hi.
12003021	Moab tengteng in amau sual ding in kumpipate ahong kuantou uh chih ana zak un, galdou thei chiang tengteng ana kikaikhawm ua, gamgi ah ana pangta uhi.
12003022	Huchi in zingkhang in athou ua, ni in tui tung a hon salvak a, Moabte'n azawn ua tui sisan bang a san in amu uhi.
12003023	“Sisan ei ve, kumpipate amau le amau akidou ua, amau leh amau kithat uh ahi mahmah ve. Kisa un, Moabte aw, gallak thil i va tuh ding uh,” achi uhi.
12003024	Israelte giahphual ava tun uleh, Israelte ahong thou phut ua, Moabte asual ua, huchi in ama uah ataikek uh. Moabte that kawm in agam uah adelhlutta uhi.
12003025	Khuate ahihsia ua; amun hoih tata teng uh michih in adeng ua, suang in adimgawpta hi. Tuikhuk tengteng ahubing ua, sing hoih tengteng aphuk ua; Kir-hareseth a om suangte kia akhoih kei uhi. Huai leng vaisuanglot tawi pawl in a-umkimvel ua, asual uhi.
12003026	Moab kumpipa'n akidou uh zou ding in akitheita kei, Edom kumpipa kiang a tung dia phut paisuak tum in namsau tawimi zasagih apikhia a, himahleh alohsam uhi.
12003027	Huchi in atapa upapen, asik a hong lal ding pen kulh dawn ah halmang thillat in alanta hi. Huchi in Israelte atung ah aheh mahmah ua, akisa ua, agam uah apaikik nawnta uhi.
12004001	Huan zawlneite tapate' zite lak a numei khat in Elisha kiang ah, “Na sikha, ka pasal ana sita hi. Na sikha in Toupa alau chih na thei a; aleibatna pa'n ka tate anih ua sikha dia pi ding in ahong kuan hi,” chi in amangbat thu ahilh hi.
12004002	Elisha in akiang ah, “Bang ka hon hihsak dia? Hon hilh ve, inn ah bang na nei a?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na sikhanu'n sathau um khat kia lou ngal inn ah bangmah ka nei kei,” achi hi.
12004003	Huchi in ama'n, “Va kuan inla, na invengte tengteng bel vuak va khelkhawm in; tam lou kia zaw khel ke'n.
12004004	Na hong lut chiang in na tapate toh kong kikhakkhum unla, huai tuh tengteng ah sathau thun inla; adimdim in na tuamkoih ding,” achi hi.
12004005	Huchi in akiang a pan apaita a, amah leh atapate toh kong akikhakkhum ua; amau belte ahon la ua, ama'n ana thun zel hi.
12004006	Belte adim nung in, hichi ahong hi a, atapa kiang ah, “Bel hon la nawn dih,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Bel a-om nawn kei,” achi hi. Huchi in sathau akangta hi.
12004007	Huai khit in Pathian mipa kiang ah ava hoh a, thil omdan ava hilh hi. Ama'n, “Va pai inla, sathau va zuak inla, na leibat va din inla, aval in na tapate toh khosa un,” achi hi.
12004008	Ni khat Shunem ah Elisha ava zin hi. Huai ah numei neizoutak khat a-om hi. Ama'n an ne ding in ana sawl teitei hi. Huchi in apai peuhmah chiang in huai ah an ne ding in alut hi.
12004009	Ama'n apasal kiang ah, “Ngai in, hiai mi hon nawk zelpa Pathian misiangthoupa ahi, chih ka thei.
12004010	Kisa dih, inn pindan neu i bawlsak dia, lupna, dohkan, tutphah leh khawnvak koihna i koihsak ding. Huchi a i kiang a ahong chiang in alut zel ding,” achi hi.
12004011	Ni khat ava hoh a, huai in pindan ah ava lut a, ava lum hi.
12004012	Asikha Gehazi kiang ah, “Hiai Shunem numei hon sam dih,” achi hi. Ava sam a ama ah ahong dingh hi.
12004013	Ama'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, nang nakpitak in na hon deihthoh a, bang ka hon hihsak sam dia, kumpipa hiam, sepaih heutu hiam hon houpihsak leng na ut hia? chi in akiang ah gen in,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Ka chipihte lak mah a teng ka hi,” achi hi.
12004014	Ama'n, “Amah a dia bang hih ding ahia le?” achi hi. Gehazi in adawng a, “Tapa anei kei, apasal lah a-upata a,” achi hi.
12004015	Ama'n, “Va sam dih,” achi hi. Ava sam a, kong ah ahong dingh hi.
12004016	Ama'n, “Tu bang hun ahong tun nawn chiang in tapa na pomta ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Maizen, toupa, nang Pathian mipa in na sikhanu kiang ah zuaugen ke'n,” achi hi.
12004017	Huchi in numei agai a, Elisha in akiang a, agen bang a ahun ahong tun nawn in tapa aneita hi.
12004018	Naungek ahong khanglian a, ni khat apa toh buh la mite kiang ah akuan hi.
12004019	Apa kiang ah, “Ka lu, ka lu,” achi hi. Apa'n sikha valnou khat kiang ah, “Pom inla, anu kiang ah paipih in,” achi hi.
12004020	Apaipih a, anu kiang atun in aphei tung ah sun tan atu a, huchi in asita hi.
12004021	Apaitou a, Pathian mipa lupna ah asial a, kong akhakkhum a, apawtta hi.
12004022	Huchi in apasal asam a, “Sikha kuahiam leh sabiltung khat hon ngaihtuahsak dih ve, Pathian mipa kiang ah ka va tai dia, ka hong kik nawn ding,” achi hi.
12004023	Ama'n, “Bangziak a tuni chitchiat a akiang a hoh tum na hia? Kha thak leng ahi kei a, Sabbath leng ahi ngal kei a,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ahoih ding,” achi hi.
12004024	Huchi in sabiltung abawl a, asikha kiang ah, “Hawl inla malam ah pai in, thu ka hon piak keileh awl pai ke'n,” achi hi.
12004025	Huchi in apaita a, Pathian mipa kiang ah Karmel tang ah ava hoh hi. Pathian mipa'n gamlapi a pan ana muh in, hichi ahong hi a, asikha Gehazi kiang ah, “En in, huai ah Shunem numei a-om.
12004026	Amah dawn ding in va tai inla, akiang ah, na dam hia? Na pasal adam maw? Naupang leng adam maw? va chi in,” achi hi. Ama'n ana dawng a, “Dam e,” achi hi.
12004027	Mual a Pathian mipa kiang ava tun in, akhe alen tinten a, amah hong sawnhang tum in Gehazi in ava naih hi. Himahleh Pathian mipa'n, “Bangmah chih ke'n, alungsim mangbang ahi. Toupa'n ka lak ah asel a, ahon hilh nai kei hi,” achi hi.
12004028	Huchi in ama'n, “Ka toupa, tapa ka hon ngen a hia? Hon khem ke'n, ka hon chi hilou maw?” achi hi.
12004029	Huchi in Gehazi kiang ah, “Na puan teng inla, ka chiangkhun tawi in va hoh in. Kuapeuh mu lechin leng, chibai buk ke'n. Kuapeuh in chibai ahon buk uleh leng dawng ke'n. Naupang maitang ah ka chiangkhun va nga in,” achi hi.
12004030	Naupang nu'n, “ Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi, ka hon khah het kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, azuita hi.
12004031	Gehazi in amau ana makhelh a, naupang mai ah chiangkhun ana nga hi. Himahleh aw leh zak bangmah a-om kei. Huchi in houpih ding in akik nawn a, “Naupang hak het kei veh aw,” chi in ahilh hi.
12004032	Elisha insung ava lutleh ngai in, naupang asi khinta a, alupna ah ana lumsak lai uhi.
12004033	Huchi in ava lut a, anih un kong akhakkhum a, Toupa kiang ah athum hi.
12004034	Apaitou a, naupang abohkhum a, amuk leh amuk, amit leh amit, akhut leh akhut asutuah a; atung ah akizan a; huchi in naupang taksa ahong lum hiaihiai hi.
12004035	Huchi in akik nawn a, insung ah akivialleh a; ahohtou a, atung ah abok a; huchi in naupang sagihvei ahong hahchiai a, ahong hakta hi.
12004036	Huchi in Gehazi asam a, “Hiai Shunem numei hon sam dih,” achi hi. Ava sam a, akiang a ava lutleh, “Na tapa pom in,” ana chi hi.
12004037	Huchi in ava lut a, akhebul ah abokkhup a, amai a lei si in akun a; atapa apom a, apawtkhia hi.
12004038	Gilgal ah Elisha ahoh nawn hi. Huai gam ah kial akia hi. Zawlneite tapate ama ah atukhawm ua; ama'n asikha kiang ah, “Bel lianpi suang inla, zawlneite tapate an huansak in,” achi hi.
12004039	Mi khat gam ah meh zong in ava kuan a, gam khau ava mu a, agah khenkhat alou a, apuan in atun theih zah atun a, a-atnen a, bel sung ah akha hi. Bang ahia chih athei kuamah a-om kei uh.
12004040	Huchi in huai mite nek ding in asuakkhia ua, anhuan anek ualeh, hichi ahong hi a, “Ehe, Pathian mi, bel sung a sihna om akei maw,” achi kheukhou ua; ane theita kei uh.
12004041	Ama'n, “Tangbuang hon la dih ua,” achi a; huai tuh ah akha hi, “Mite nek ding in hon suakkhe dih ua,” achi hi. Huchi in bel ah lauhuai bangmah a-omta kei hi.
12004042	Baal-shalisha a pan mi khat ahong a, Pathian mipa a ding in buh thak masapen abawl barli buh sangpek sawmnih leh buh thak vui a-ip in ahon tawi a; ama'n, “Hiai mite nek ding in pia in,” achi hi.
12004043	Asikha in, “Bang e, mi zakhattak hiai ka lui ding maw?” achi hi. Ama'n hiai mite nek ding pia in. Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Ane ding ua, akhamval lai ding uh,” achi hi.
12004044	Huchi in alui a, ane ua, Toupa chih bang ngei in akhamval lai uhi.
12005001	Siria kumpipa sepaih heutu Naaman, Toupa'n Siriate humbitpa a azat ziak in, apu ngaih in thupi leh zahtakhuaitak ahi. Amah mihat ahi lai a, himahleh aphak hi.
12005002	Siriate apawlpawl in akuankhia ua, Israel gam a pan numei naupangnou khat sal in ahon pi ua; ama'n Naaman zi nna asem hi.
12005003	Ama'n api kiang ah, “Samaria a om zawlnei kiang ah ka toupa va hohleh chi na ing e! Ama'n aphakna na hihdamsak ding hi a,” achi hi.
12005004	Mi khat ava lut a, atoupa kiang ah, “Israel gam a numei naupangnou in huchibang khachibang in agen,” chi in apu ahilh hi.
12005005	Siria kumpipa'n, “Va hoh hen aw, Israel kumpipa kiang ah lai ka khak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in apawt a, dangkasik talent sawm leh dangka-eng khal sangguk leh silh-le-ten kikhenna ding sawm akeng hi.
12005006	Huai laikhak Israel kumpipa ava pia a, huai ah hiai akigelh hi, “Hiai lai na mu dia, ngai in, ka sikha Naaman aphakna na hihdamsak ding in na kiang ah ka hon sawl hi,” chih.
12005007	Israel kumpipa'n huai lai asim a, hichi ahong hi a, apuan abotkek a, “Mite that thei a, hingsak nawn thei Pathian hia ka hih? Hiai mi in phak hihdam dia ka kiang ah ahon sawl mawkmawk. Ngaihtuah unla, ka tung ah thusia azong hi, chih thei dih ua,” achi hi.
12005008	Pathian mipa Elisha in Israel kumpipa'n apuan abotkek chih ana zak in, hichi ahong hi a, “Bangziak a na puan botkek na hia? Ka kiang ah hong paileh ake, huchi in Israel gam ah zawlnei a-om chih athei mai ding,” va chi ding in kumpipa kiang ah mi asawl hi.
12005009	Huchi in asakolte leh akangtalaite toh Naaman ava hoh a, Elisha inn kongbul ah ava dingh hi.
12005010	Elisha in, “Jordan lui ah sagihvei va kisil inla, na sa in ngeina apu nawn dia, huchi in na siangta ding,” chi ding in mi asawl hi.
12005011	Himahleh, Naaman aheh mahmah a, apaikhia a, “Ngai un, amah mah ka kiang a hong pawt dia, ahong dingh dia, Toupa a Pathian min asam dia, ka phakna tung ah akhut akoih dia, ka phak damsak ding ei ve, chi mah hi veng in,” achi hi.
12005012	“Israel gam lui tengteng sang in Damaskas kho luite, Abana leh Pharpar ahoihzaw kei a hia? Huaite a kisil in ka siangthou thei kei dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in akilehhei a, heh mahmah in apai hi.
12005013	Asikhate'n ava naih ua, ava houpih ua, “Ka pa aw, zawlnei in thil haksatak hon hihsak dekleh leng na hihmai kei dia hia? Va kisil inla, hong siangthou in, achih pen hih zawk tuak lua hilou maw?” achi uhi.
12005014	Huchi in ahohsuk a, Pathian mipa gen bang in Jordan lui ah sagihvei ava kidiah a; huchi in asa naungek sa bang ahong hi nawn a, ahong siangta hi.
12005015	Amah leh aheute tengteng Pathian mipa kiang ah akik nawn ua, ama ah ava dingh uhi. Ama'n, “Ngai in, Israel ah lou ngal leitung tengteng ah Pathian ana om kei, chih ka theita. Huaiziak in tu in na sikha vualzawlna la ding in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.
12005016	Himahleh ama'n, “Akiang a ka omna Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Bangmah ka la kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n la ding in angen a; himahleh ala ut kei bikbek hi.
12005017	Naaman in, “Ahihkeileh, kei na sikha sabiltung nih puak khop leitang hon lasak in. Tuban siah kei na sikha in Toupa kiang kia ah ngal lou halmang thillat leh kithoihna himhim pathian dangte kiang ah ka lan nawn het kei ding hi.
12005018	Hiai thil ah Toupa'n na sikha ngaidam hen. Rimmon inn a be dia ka ban a kingai a ka toupa alut chiang a, kei leng ka kun sam angaih chiang in Toupa'n hon ngaidam hen,” achi hi.
12005019	Ama'n akiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in pai in,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang a pan apawt a, gamla lou apaikhe man hi.
12005020	Himahleh Pathian mipa Elisha sikha Gehazi in, “Ngai in, ka pu in Siria mi Naaman thil hon tawite la het lou in apaisak mawk a. Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, ka va delh dia, aneih banghiam bek ka va la ding,” achi hi.
12005021	Huchi in Gehazi in Naaman adelhta hi. Naaman in kuahiam in adelh amuh in, na houpih ding in kangtalai a pan akumkhia a, “Hoih vek na maw?” achi hi.
12005022	Ama'n, “Hoih vek mah e. Ka pu in, ngai in, tu mah in Ephraim tanggam a pan in zawlneite tapate lak a tangval nih ka kiang ah ahong ua, amaute dangkasik talent khat leh puansilh kikhenna ding nih pia in, chih gen ding in ahong sawl hi,” achi hi.
12005023	Naaman in, “Khamuang inla, talent nih la ve,” achi hi. Huchi in la ding in angen a, dangkasik talent nih puansilh kikhenna ding nih toh ip nih ah athun a, asikhate nih aposak a, ama ah apaipihta uhi.
12005024	Tang ava tun un alaksak a, insung ah akoih a; huchi in mite apaisakta hi.
12005025	Amah alut a, apu ma ah ava dingh hi. Elisha in akiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia, Gehazi?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na sikha koimah ah ka hoh kei,” achi hi.
12005026	Ama'n akiang ah, “Nang mu dia kangtalai a pan huai mi ahong kum lai in ka lungtang na kiang ah apai kei maw? Sum, puansilhte, olive huante, grephuante, belamte, bawngtalte, sikhapate leh sikhanute lak hun ahi a hia?
12005027	Huaiziak in Naaman phak nang ah abelh dia, tangtawn in na suante ah leng abelh ding,” achi hi. Huchi in a-omna a pan vuk bang a ngou in phaksa in apaikheta hi.
12006001	Huan zawlneite tapate'n Elisha kiang ah, “En in, hiai mun na kiang a ka tenna uh kou a ding in akochik lua hi.
12006002	K'on ngen uh. Jordan lui ah ka hohsuk ding ua, huai ah sing ka va la chiat ding ua, ka tenna ding uh huai ah ka va lam ding uh aw?” achi uhi. Ama'n adawng a, “Kuan ve ua,” achi hi.
12006003	Mi khat in, “Na sikhate kiang ah hoh sam in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hoh sam leng akei dia,” chi in adawng hi.
12006004	Huchi in akiang uah ahoh samta hi. Jordan lui atun un sing aphuk uhi.
12006005	Mi khat in aphuk san lai in, aheitang tui ah akia hi. Ama'n, “Maizen! Pu, mi a kikhel ei ve,” chi in akikou hi.
12006006	Pathian mipa in, “Koi lai ah ahia akiak?” achi hi. Ama'n akiakna mun a-ensak hi. Huchi in singhiang khat asat a, huai ah apailut a, sik ahong kilam hi.
12006007	Ama'n, “Tawm aw le,” achi a; huchi in asawk a, atawmta hi.
12006008	Siria kumpipa'n Israelte ahong dou in, huai mun ah giahphual ka sat ding, chi in asikhate thu akum hi.
12006009	Pathian mipa'n Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “Huchibang mun a hoh lou ding in pilvang in. Huai ah Siriate ahong suk ding uh,” chi in mi asawl hi.
12006010	Israel kumpipa'n Pathian mipa'n ana hilhna mun mi ava enkhesak zel hi. Huai ah khatvei nihvei phet lou in, ana kihumbit zel hi.
12006011	Huchi in huai thu ah Siria kumpipa lungtang amangbanggawp hi. Asikhate asam a, akiang uah, “I lak ua mi akua pen ahia Israel kumpipa lam a pang? N'on hilh kei ding ua hia?” achi hi.
12006012	Asikhate lak a mi khat in, “Kuamah pang kei ve ung e, kumpipa, ka toupa aw. Israel gam a om zawlnei Elisha in na dantan sunggil a na gente Israel kumpipa ana hilh zel ahi zaw hi,” achi hi.
12006013	Ama'n, “Koi a om ahia va simzon un, ka va mansak ding,” achi hi, “Ngai in, Dothan ah a-om,” chi in ahilh uhi.
12006014	Huchi in sakolte, kangtalaite leh sepaih tampite huai ah asawl a, zan in ava hoh ua, khua a-umkimvel uhi.
12006015	Pathian mipa sikha zingkhang in athou a, ava pawtkhiakleh, ngai in, sepaihte'n sakol leh kangtalaite toh khua ana umsuakta uh. Sikha in akiang ah, “Maizen! Pu aw, bang i chihta dia le?” achi hi.
12006016	Ama'n, “Lau ke'n; amau lam a pangte sang in ei lam a pangte atamzaw hi,” achi hi.
12006017	Huchi in Elisha athum a, “ Toupa , amuhtheihna ding in amit vaksak in,” achi hi. Toupa'n huai tangval mit avaksak a; huchi in amu samta a; ngai in, Elisha kimvel a mualte mei kangtalai leh sakol in adim vekta hi.
12006018	Amah lam a ahong paisuk uleh Toupa kiang ah Elisha athum a, “Hiai mite mit tawsak in,” achi hi. Huchi in Elisha thu bang in amit uh atawsakta hi.
12006019	Elisha in akiang uah, “Hiai lampi ahi kei, hiai leng khua ahi sam kei. Kei hon zui un, na mizonpa uh kiang ah ka hon pi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samaria ah apita hi.
12006020	Samaria khosung atun un hichi ahong hi a, Elisha in, “ Toupa , hiaite'n amuhtheihna ding un amit uh vaksak in,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n amit uh avaksak a, amuta ua; ngai in, Samaria khosung ah ana omta uhi.
12006021	Israel kumpipa'n amaute amuh in Elisha kiang ah, “Ka pa aw, ka that diam? Ka that diam?” achi hi.
12006022	Ama'n adawng a, “That ke'n, na namsau leh na thalpeu in na salmatte na that dia hia? Tanghou leh tui ama uah lui inla, ne in dawn uhenla, apu uh kiang ah paikik nawn uhen,” achi hi.
12006023	Huchi in nek ding thupi mahmah abawlsak a; anek ua adawn khit un apaisak vek ua, apu uh kiang lam ah apai nawn uh. Huchi in Siria pawlte Israel gam ah ahong nawnta kei uhi.
12006024	Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, Siria kumpipa Ben-hadad in asepaih tengteng akaikhawm a, Samaria khua ava um hi.
12006025	Samaria ah kial anasa mahmah a, ngai in, sabiltung lutang dangka sawmgiat a akhot uh leh begap kab mun li a khen mun khat dangka nga a lei ahih tan hial un, khua a-um bikbek hi.
12006026	Israel kumpipa kulh dawn a apai lai in numei khat in, “Aw kumpipa, ka toupa, hon huh in,” chi in ana sam hi.
12006027	Ama'n, “ Toupa'n ahon panpih ngal keileh ke'n koi a pan in ahia ka hon panpih ding? Buhphual ahihkeileh grep sukna khuk a pan in maw?”
12006028	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang na chi a ahia awi?” achi nawn hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Hiai numei in ka kiang ah, tuni in na tapa i nek ding in hon thoh ve, zingchiang in ka tapa i ne na kei dia,” achi hi.
12006029	Huchi in ka tapa ka huan ua, ka ne uh. Azing in ke'n akiang ah, “Na tapa i nek ding in hon thoh sam in, ka chi hi. Ama'n atapa aselgu maimah hi,” achi hi.
12006030	Kumpipa'n numei thugen azak in hichi ahong hi a, apuan abotkek a; kulh dawn a apai lai ahi a; mipite'n a-et uleh, ngai in, asa tung ah sai-ip puan ana silh nilouh hi.
12006031	Huchi in ama'n, “Tuni a Shaphat tapa Elisha in alutang apuak lai peuhmah leh Pathian in alohloh in hon loh mai hen, huai sang a leng thupizaw in,” achi hi.
12006032	Elisha a-inn ah atu a, upate leng akiang ah atu sam uh. Kumpipa'n akiang ah mi khat asawl a, himahleh amisawl akiang atun ma in upate kiang ah, “Hiai tualthatpa tapa in ka lu la ding in mi ahon sawl, chih na thei na uhia? Pau kei dih ua, amisawl ahong tun chiang in, kong na khak unla, kongkhak in na dal bikbek un. Anung ah apu kalsuan ging akiza kei maw?” achi hi.
12006033	Huchi a amau ahoupih san lai in, ngai in, amisawl ahong tungsuk hi. Ngai in, kumpipa'n, “Hiai thil hoih lou Toupa hon sawl ahi; bang ding in Toupa ka hungaih lailai dia? chi ahi,” achi hi.
12007001	Elisha in, “ Toupa thu na za un. Toupa'n hichi in achi: Zingchiang hiai hun ding vel in Samaria kulh kongpi bul ah tangbuang nel tehna khat shekel khat in akhawng ding ua, barli buh tehna nih shekel khat in,” chi in agen hi.
12007002	Heutu khat kumpipa'n akhut angaknapa'n Pathian mipa adawng hi. “Ngai in, Toupa'n van ah tohlette bawl leh leng hiai bang ahi thei mahmah dia hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ngai in, na mit in na mu dia, himahleh na ne kei ding,” achi hi.
12007003	Huai lai in kulh lutna kongpi bul ah phak li a-om uhi. Amau, “Bangziak a sih ngak lel a tu nilouh i hi ua?
12007004	Khopi sung ah lut ni, chi leng, khopi sung kial a, huai a va si mai ding hang a; hiai ah tu nilouh lehang lah si thouthou ding hang a; huaiziak in tu in pai ni in Siria sepaihte kiang ah i va lut peuhmah ding uh. Ahon na hinghawi uh leh i hing dia; ahon na thah uleh si i himai ke,” chi in akihou uhi.
12007005	Huchi in Siriate giahphual a hoh ding in khomui in akuan uhi. Siriate giahphual tuah masak ava tun un, ngai in, kuamah ana om kei uhi.
12007006	Toupa'n Siria sepaihte kangtalaite husa, sakolte husa leh sepaih tampi husa ana zasak hi. Huchi in “Ngai un, Israel kumpipa'n Hit kumpipate leh Aigupta kumpipate ei hong dou dia guai ei ve,” chi in akihou uhi.
12007007	Huchi in athou ua, khomui in ataikekta uh. Apuaninte uh, asakolte uh, asabiltungte uh leh agiahphual uh a-om ngeingei in ataisan ua, ataikekta uhi.
12007008	Huai mi phakte giahphual tuah masak ava tun un puanin khat ah alut ua, ne in adawn uh. Dangkasik, dangka-eng leh puansilhte ala ua, asel ua; anungkik nawn ua, puanin dang ah alut nawn ua, huai leng ala ua, asel uhi.
12007009	“Aden chiang in, i hihdik het kei. Tuni tanchin kipahhuai tun ni ahi a, ei i daih dide ua; khovak i ngak uleh gawtna i tuak ding uh. Huaiziak in kisa ni, kumpipa inkote i va hilh ding uh,” chi in akihou uhi.
12007010	Huchi in khopi kongkhak vengmi ava sam ua, “Siriate giahphual ah ka va hoh ua, ngai in, kuamah ana om kei ua, mihing husa himhim leng a-om kei, sakolte leh sabiltungte kia ana kikhih a, puaninte leng a-om ngeingei in ana om uh,” chi in ahilh uhi.
12007011	Kongkhak veng mite asam a; amau kumpipa insung a mite ava hilh uh.
12007012	Zan in kumpipa athou a, asikhate kiang ah, “Siriate hon bawldan ka hon hilh ding. I gilkialdan uh athei uh. Huaiziak in khopi a pan ahong pawt uleh ahing in i na man ding ua, khosung ah i lut ding uh, chi in gamlak a kibu dia agiahphual uh pawtkhiaksan ahi uh,” achi hi.
12007013	Asikhate lak a khat in adawng a, “Khopi a omsun sakol nga va pisak inla, ngai in, Israel mipi adam lai tengteng Israel mipite si bang a sehte ahi himhim uhi; huchi in amaute sawl in enkhe ni,” achi hi.
12007014	Huchi in kangtalai kai sakol nih api ua; kumpipa'n, “Va en dih ua,” chi in Siria sepaihte delh ding in asawl hi.
12007015	Jordan lui pha in ava delh ua; ngai in, Siriate'n akin ziak ua apaih uh puansilhte leh vante, lamtawn in a-om zelzul hi. Huchi in amisawlte ahong kik nawn ua, kumpipa ahong hilh uhi.
12007016	Huchi in mipi apawtkhia ua, Siriate giahphual ava lok uhi. Huchi in Toupa thu bang ngei in tangbuang nel tehna khat shekel khat in akhong ua, barli buh tehna nih shekel khat mah in.
12007017	Kumpipa'n sepaih heutu, akhut angaknapa kulh kongpi vengmi in asep hi. Mipite'n akulh kongpi bul ah achil uhi, Pathian mipa'n akiang a kumpipa ahong paisuk lai a, ana gen bang in asita hi.
12007018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian mipa'n kumpipa kiang a, Zingchiang hichih hun ding vel in Samaria kulh kongpi bul ah, “Barli buh tehna nih shekel khat in akhong ding ua, tangbuang nel tehna khat shekel khat mah in,” achih a;
12007019	sepaih heutu in Pathian mipa adawng a, “Ngai in, Toupa'n van ah tohlette bawlleh leng, huchibang ahi thei dia hia?” achih a, ama'n, “Ngai in, na mit in na mu ngei dia, himahleh na ne kei ding,” achih bang in;
12007020	huchibang in atung ah ahong tungta hi; mipi'n kulh kongpi bul a achil ziak un asita hi.
12008001	Huan Elisha in atapa ahihdamsak numei kiang ah, “Thou inla, nang leh na inkote na omtheihna munmun uah va kialtai tadih un. Toupa'n lah kial akesak ngal a, hiai gam ah kum sagih sung kial ake ding,” achi hi.
12008002	Huchi in numei athou a, Pathian mipa thugen bang in ahih a; a-inkote toh Philistiate gam ah kum sagih ava kialtai uhi.
12008003	Kum sagih ahong kivei nung in hichi ahong hi a, huai numei Philistiate gam a pan akik nawn a; a-inn leh alou ngen ding in kumpipa azuan hi.
12008004	Kumpipa'n Pathian mipa sikha Gehazi ahoupih a, “Elisha in thil thupi ahih tengteng hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi.
12008005	Asisa mi khat ahinsak nawn thu kumpipa ana hilh laitak in hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, atapa ahinsak nawn numei in a-inn leh alou kumpipa kiang ah ahong ngen hi. Gehazi in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, hiai numei ahi, hiai ahi atapa, Elisha in ahinsak nawn,” achi hi.
12008006	Kumpipa'n numei adotleh ahilh hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n heutu khat asehsak a, “Amah a tengteng, alou a thil piang tengteng tan in, hiai gam apawtkhiaksan a pan tuni tan ateng pe nawn vek un,” achi hi.
12008007	Damaskas ah Elisha ahoh a; Siria kumpipa Ben-hadad achi ana hi. “Pathian mipa hiai ah ahong ve,” chi in ahilh uh.
12008008	Kumpipa'n Hazael kiang ah, “Thilpiak tawi inla, Pathian mipa houpih ding in va hoh inla, ka chinatna a pan ka hoihkhe nawn thei diam, Toupa hon na dotsakleh,” achi hi.
12008009	Amah houpih ding in Hazael akuan a, thilpiak ding Damaskas a thil hoih chiteng, sangawngsau sawmli puak khop atawi a, ama ah ava dingh a, “Na tapa Ben-hadad, Siria kumpipa in, ka chinatna a pan ka hoihkhe nawn diam chi ding in na kiang ah kei ahon sawl hi,” achi hi.
12008010	Elisha in akiang ah, “Pai nawn inla, akiang ah, na hoihkhe nawn na mah ke, achi ve, va chi in. Himahleh ataktak in bel asi ngeingei ding chih, Toupa'n ahon theisak hi,” achi hi.
12008011	Huchi in amah a dia zumhuai khop in Elisha in a-ensal gegu a; huchi in Pathian mipa akapta hi.
12008012	Hazael in, “Bangziak a ka toupa kap ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Israel suante tung a na thil hoih lou hih ding ka theih ziak in ahi. Akulhte uh na hal dia, atangvalte uh namsau in na that dia, atanu neu chikchikte na paizan dia, naupai lai anumeite uh na pikkek ding,” achi hi.
12008013	Hazael in, “Kei na sikha ui leltak in hiai thil thupi hihthei ding ka hi mahmah a hia?” achi hi. Elisha in adawng a, “Siriate tung ah na hong lal ding chih Toupa'n ahon theisak hi,” achi hi.
12008014	Huchi in Elisha kiang a pan apawt a, apu kiang ah apaita hi. Ama'n, “Elisha in bang hon na hilh a?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na hoihkhe nawn na tham ding, chi in ahon hilh,” achi hi.
12008015	Azing in hichi ahong hi a, puansahpi khat ala a, tui ah adiah a, amai akhuhsak a, huchi in asita a; asik in Hazael alalta hi.
12008016	Israel kumpipa Ahab tapa Joram kum nga alal kum in huai lai in Jehoshaphat bel Judah kumpipa ahi, Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat tapa Jehoram alal pan hi.
12008017	Alal pat lai in kum sawmthum-le-nih a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum giat vai ahawm hi.
12008018	Ahab inkote bang in, Israel kumpipate lampi tot atawn a; Ahab tanu zi in anei hi. Huchi in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoihloupi ahih hi.
12008019	Himahleh Toupa'n asikha David ziak in Judah gam ahihse nuam kei a, asuante tan a khawnvak neihsak gige ana chiam tak ziak in.
12008020	Adam lai in Judahte tung ah Edomte ahel ua, atung ua kumpipa ding akibawltawm uhi.
12008021	Huchi in Zair ah kangtalai tengteng toh Joram ahoh hi. Zan in akisakhia a, amau um Edomte leh akangtalai tung ua heutute ava sualta hi. Huchi in mite apuaninte uah atai uhi.
12008022	Edomte tuni tan in Judahte tung ah ahel lailai uh. Huai hun mah in Libnah leng ana hel sam uhi.
12008023	Jehoram tanchin dangte leh athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah akigelh kei maw?
12008024	Huchi in Jehoram api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, api-le-pute lak ah David khopi ah avui ua; asik in atapa Ahaziah alalta hi.
12008025	Israel kumpipa Ahab tapa Joram lal akum sawm-le-nih kum in Judah kumpipa Jehoram tapa Ahaziah alal pan hi.
12008026	Ahaziah in vai ahawm pat in kum sawmnih-le-nih a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum khat vai ahawm hi. Anu min Athaliah ahi a, amah Israel kumpipa Omri tanu ahi.
12008027	Ahab inkote lampi tot atawn sam a, Ahab inkote makpapa ahih ziak in, Ahab inkote hih bang in, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih hi.
12008028	Amah Ahab tapa Joram in Ramoth-gilead a Siria kumpipa Hazael ava douna ah apang sam hi. Siriate'n Joram ana hihliam uhi.
12008029	Siria kumpipa Hazael adouna uah Siriate'n Ramah ah kumpipa Joram ana hihliam ua, Jezreel a kidamsak ding in akik nawnta hi. Ahab tapa Joram adam louh ziak in, amah veh ding in Jezreel ah Judah kumpipa Jehoram tapa Ahaziah ahohsuk hi.
12009001	Huan zawlnei Elisha in zawlneite tapate lak a khat asam a, akiang ah, “Na puan teng inla, hiai sathau bawm tawi inla, Ramoth-gilead ah va hoh in.
12009002	Na va tun chiang in Nimshi tapa Jehoshaphat tapa Jehu va zongkhia inla; va lut inla, a-unaute lak a pan samkhia inla, dantan sunggil ah lutpih in.
12009003	Huchi in sathau bawm la inla, alu ah sung inla, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in sathau ka hon nilh hi,” chi in. “Huchi in kong hong inla, taikhia in, om sawt ke'n,” achi hi.
12009004	Huchi in tangval, zawlnei tangvalpa Ramoth-gilead ah ahohta hi.
12009005	Ava tunleh ngai in, sepaih heutute atukhawm ua; ama'n, “Sepaih heutu, na kiang a gen ding thukhah ka nei,” achi hi. Jehu in, “Kua pen kiang ah eita?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Nang kiang ah, sepaih heutupa,” achi hi.
12009006	Athou a, inn ah alut a; alu ah sathau asung a, akiang ah, “ Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Toupa mipite, Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in thau ka hon nilh hi.
12009007	Ka sikha zawlneite sisan leh Toupa sikha tengteng sisan phu Jezebel tung a ka laktheihna ding in na pu Ahab inkote na that ding hi.
12009008	Ahab inko tengteng amangthang vek ding uh. Ahab a pan pasal taphot Israel gam a zalen hi in sikha hitaleh ka hihmang ding hi.
12009009	Ahab inkote Nebat tapa Jeroboam inkote leh Ahijah tapa Baasha inkote bang in ka bawl ding hi.
12009010	Uite'n Jezreel khokulh zul ah Jezebel ane ding ua, amah vui ding mi a-om kei ding, chi in,” achi hi. Huchi in kong ahong a, ataikheta hi.
12009011	Huchi in Jehu bel atoupa sikhate kiang ah ahong pawt a; khat in akiang ah, “Hoih lam thu hia? Huai mihaipa koi a pan na kiang a hong ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Huai mi na thei ua; athugen leng na thei uh,” achi hi.
12009012	Amau, “Thei maizen dia, tu'n hon hilh in,” achi uh. Ama'n, “Hichibang in ahon chi ahi: ‘ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in sathau ka hon nilh hi,’ ” achi hi.
12009013	Huchi in michih in apuan uh asuah somsom ua, kailawn tung ah aphahsak chiat ua, “Jehu kumpipa ahita,” chi in pengkul amutta uhi.
12009014	Huchi in Nimshi tapa Jehoshaphat tapa Jehu in Joram thahna ding aguksawm hi. Siria kumpipa Hazael ziak in Joram leh Israelte tengteng in Ramoth-gilead khua aveng uhi.
12009015	Siria kumpipa Hazael toh kumpipa Joram akidouna ua Siria mite'n asukliam uh, Jezreel a kidamsak ding in akik nawn hi. Huchi in Jehu in, “Kei lam a pang na hih uleh kuamah Jezreel a hiai thu gen ding in khua a pan paikhesak kei un,” achi hi.
12009016	Huchi in Jehu bel kangtalai ah atuang a, Jezreel ah ahoh a, huai ah Joram alum hi. Judah kumpipa Ahaziah leng Joram veh ding in ahohsuk hi.
12009017	Jezreel kulh ah galvilmi adingh a, Jehu pawlte amah toh hong pai amu a, “Mi tampi ka mu,” achi hi. Joram in, “Sakol tungtuangmi amau va dawn ding in sawl inla, hoih lam thu hia? va chi uhen,” achi hi.
12009018	Huchi in mi khat sakol tung a tuang amau dawn ding in akuan a, kumpipa'n hichi in achi, “Lemna thu toh hong pai na hi hia?” achi hi. Jehu in, “Lemna thu toh hong pai leng, nang na theih ding bang a-om a? Ka nung ah pai in,” achi hi. Galvilmi'n, “I mi sawl akiang uh ava tung a, himahleh ahong kik nawn het kei mawk a,” chi in ahilh hi.
12009019	Huchi in mi khat sakol tung a tuang asawl nawn a, huai mi leng akiang uh ava tung a, kumpipa'n hichi in achi, “Lemna thu toh hong pai na hi hia?” achi hi. Jehu in adawng a, “Lemna thu toh hong pai leng, nang na theih ding bang a-om a? Ka nung ah pai in,” achi hi.
12009020	Galvilmi leng akiang uh ava tung a, amah leng ahong kik nawn het kei mawk hi. “Huai kangtalai kihawldan leng Nimshi tapa Jehu hawldan geih ahi; mihai bang mai in ahawl hi,” achi hi.
