12009021	Joram in, “Kimansak un,” achi a; kangtalai akimansakta uh. Huchi in Israel kumpipa Joram leh Judah kumpipa Ahaziah amau kangtalai tuaktuak in ava pawtkhia ua, Jehu tuak ding in ataikhia ua, Jezreel mi Naboth huan ah ava mu uhi.
12009022	Joram in Jehu amuh in hichi ahong hi a, “Lemna toh hong pai na hia, Jehu?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Na nu Jezebel angkawmna leh bumna atam lai teng bangchi in lemna a-om thei dia?” achi hi.
12009023	Joram akihei a, atai a, Ahaziah kiang ah, “Kikhem a kilehbawlna om ei ve, Ahaziah,” achi hi.
12009024	Jehu in athalpeu atheihtawp in alai a, Joram liang leh liang kikal ah akap a, thaltang in alungtang apailet a, akangtalai sung ah apuklut hi.
12009025	Huchi in Jehu in asepaih heutu Bidkar kiang ah, “Dom inla, Jezreel mi Naboth huan ah paikhia in. Tuma lam a nang toh apa Ahab nung a i tuankhawm lai a Toupa'n hiai puakgik atung ah anga hi.
12009026	Toupa'n zan in Naboth sisan leh atapate sisan ka muh ngei ahi,” achi hi. “ Toupa'n , hiai mun ngei ah ka hon thuk ding,” achi nawn hi. Huchi in “ Toupa thu bang in dom inla, hiai mun ngei ah paikhia in,” achi hi.
12009027	Himahleh Judah kumpipa Ahaziah in huai amuh in huan in lampi ah atai hi. Jehu in adelh a, “Amah leng huai kangtalai sung ah that un,” achi hi. Huchi in Ibleam kiang, Gur zottouhna ah asatliam uhi. Meggiddo ah atailut a, huai ah asita hi.
12009028	Amite'n Jerusalem ah kangtalai in apaipih ua, amah han ah, api-le-pute lak ah David khopi ah avui uhi.
12009029	Ahab tapa Joram kum sawm-le-khat alal kum in Judahte tung ah Ahaziah alal pan hi.
12009030	Jezreel ah Jehu ava lut chih Jezebel in ana za hi. Huchi in amitte anuh a, asam azem a, tohlet ah ana dakkhia hi.
12009031	Jehu kulh kongpi a, ahong lut laitak in, “Na pu thatpa nang Zimri, lemna thu toh hong pai na hi hia?” ana chi hi.
12009032	Tohlet lam nga in amah adaktou a, “Kei lam a pang kuakua na om ua? Kua?” achi hi. Michilgeh nih hiam, thum hiam amah lam nga in ahong dakkhia uhi.
12009033	Ama'n, “Hon lawnkhia un,” achi hi. Huchi in alawnkhia ua; asi khenkhat in baang leh sakolte atheh nengnung a; ama'n lei ah akhe in ana chil hi.
12009034	Huchi in alut a, ne in adawn a, “Hamse thuaknu va dom unla, va vui un, kumpipa tanu lah ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
12009035	Vui ding in akuan ua; himahleh aluguh, akhebomte leh akhutpek bomte kia lou ngal amu kei uh.
12009036	Huchi in ahong pai nawn in ahong hilh uh. Ama'n, “Hiai Toupa'n asikha Tishbi mi Elijah zang a, Jezreel kulhchin ah uite'n Jezebel ane ding ua;
12009037	Jezebel luang Jezreel khokulh chin a huan a ekchim bang ahi dia, huchi a, hiai Jezebel ei ve, achihlouhna ding un, chi a agen ahi,” achi hi.
12010001	Huan Ahab in Samaria ah tapa sawmsagih anei hi. Jehu in Samaria a, Jezreel kho heutute, upate leh Ahab tapate ana dontei mite kiang ah, laigelh in akhak hi.
12010002	“Hiai laikhakte na muh phet chiang un, na pu tapate na kiang uah a-om ua, kangtalaite, sakolte, kulhpi nei khuate leng, galvante toh na nei uhi.
12010003	Huchi in na pu tapate lak a mi, ahoihpen leh akizenpen zongkhia unla, apa laltutphah ah tusak unla, na pu uh inkote a ding in gal dou un,” achi hi.
12010004	Himahleh amau alau mahmah ua, “Ngai dih ua, kumpipa nihte'n azoh louhsa uh ahi a, e'n bangchi in i zou mahmah dia?” achi uhi.
12010005	Kumpipa insung heutupen, khopi ukpen, upate, naupangte ana dawntei mi teng in Jehu kiang ah, “Na sikhate ka hi uh, hih dia na hon hilh tengteng ka hih ding uh. Kuamah kumpipa in ka bawl kei ding uh; nang hoih na sakdan in hih in,” chi in mi asawl uhi.
12010006	Akiang uah, “Kei lam a pang na hih ua, ka thu na man ding uleh na pute uh tapate lu hon la unla, zingchiang in hichih hun ma in Jezreel ah ka kiang ah hong un,” chi in lai akhak nawn hi. Kumpipa tapate sawmsagih ahi ua, khopi miliante, amau dontei mite kiang ah a-om uhi.
12010007	Laikhak amuh un hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa tapate aman ua, sawmsagihte athat ua, alute uh bawmpi a koih in Jezreel ah akiang ah akhakta uhi.
12010008	Thangkou khat ahong tung a, “Kumpipa tapate lu ahon tawita uh,” chi in ahilh uh. Ama'n, “Kulh lutna kongpi gei ah mun nih in sekhawm unla, zingchiang tan in om hen,” achi hi.
12010009	Azingchiang in hichi ahong hi a, ava pawt a, adingh a, mi tengteng kiang ah, “Noute diktat hi un, ngai un, ka pu ka guksawm a, ka hihlumta a; ahihleh hiai tengteng kua thah ahia le?
12010010	Toupa'n Ahab inkote tungtang agen, Toupa thu lei ah ake het kei ding chih thei un; Toupa'n asikha Elijah zang a agen ahon tungsakta hi,” achi hi.
12010011	Huchi in Jehu in Jezreel a Ahab inkuan a mi omsun teng, amilian tengteng, alawm tengteng leh asiampute khat lel leng hawisak het lou in athat siang vek hi.
12010012	Huchi in athou a, apawt a, Samaria ah ahohta hi. Lampi a belampute belam mulmetna inn ava tun in,
12010013	Jehu in Judah kumpipa Ahaziah unaute amu a, “Kuate na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau, “Ahaziah unaute ka hi uh, kumpipa tapate leh kumpinu tapate chibai va buk dia paisuk ka hi uh,” chi in adawng uh.
12010014	Ama'n, “Hingmat un,” achi a; huchi in ahingmat ua, belam mulmetna inn khukchin ah athat ua, mi sawmli-le-nih ahi ua; khat lel leng ahawi kei uh.
12010015	Huai a pan apawt nung in Rekab tapa Jehonadab, amah dawn dia hong pai amu hi. Chibai abuk a, akiang ah, “Na tung a lungsim dik ka put bang in, lungsim dik na pu sam hia?” achi hi. Jehonadab in, “Pu e,” chi in adawng hi. “Ahihleh na khut hon pe dih,” achi a; huchi in akhut apia a, ama'n akiang ah kangtalai sung ah akailut hi.
12010016	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hong sam inla, Toupa a dia phatuam ka ngaihdan mu himhim dih,” achi hi. Huchi in akangtalai ah atuangsak hi.
12010017	Samaria ava tun in Ahab inkote Samaria a omsunte, Elijah kiang a agen Toupa thu bang ngei in, ahihman khit vek masiah athat zel hi.
12010018	Jehu in mite tengteng asamkhawm a, akiang uah, Ahab in Baal nna sem zek phet ahi a, Jehu in bel nakpi in asem ding hi.
12010019	“Tu in Baal zawlnei tengteng, abemi tengteng leh asiampu tengteng ka kiang ah hon samkhawm dih ua. Kuamah kim lou kei uhen; Baal kiang ah kithoihna thupitak lat ding ka nei a; kuapeuh akim lou ahing het kei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh Jehu in Baal bemite hihlup tum in, gitlouh piltak a, ahih ahi.
12010020	Jehu in, “Baal min in khawmpi thupi bawl un,” achi hi. Huchi in agenzakta uhi.
12010021	Jehu in Israel gam tengteng ah akhakkhia a; huchi in Baal bemi tengteng ahong pai ua, atel lou himhim a-om kei uhi. Baal inn ah alut ua; Baal inn kongpi a pan aphaitam pha in adim dipdep uhi.
12010022	Kivatna puan kemmi kiang ah, “Baal bemi tengteng kivatna puan hon la in,” achi hi. Huchi in kivatna puante ahon la uhi.
12010023	Rekab tapa Jehonadab toh Baal inn ah Jehu alut ua; Baal bemite kiang ah, “Hiai ah Baal bemite lou ngal, Toupa mite a-om kha ding uh, zong unla, en vialvial dih uh,” achi hi.
12010024	Kithoihnate leh halmang thillatte lan dia alut un, Jehu in inkuan ah mi sawmgiat ana dingsak khin hi. “Na khut ua ka hon piak kuapeuh asuahtakleh, asuaktami hinna tang a amah hinna lak ding ahi,” achi hi.
12010025	Haltum thillat alat khittak in hichi ahong hi a, Jehu in galvil sepaih leh aheutute uh kiang ah, “Lut unla, va that un; kuamah suaktasak kei un,” achi hi. Huchi in namsau in asat ua; galvil sepaih leh aheutute uh apaikhia ua, Baal inn ah alut uhi.
12010026	Baal inn a milimte alakhia ua, ahal uhi.
12010027	Baal lim alaichim ua, Baal inn ahihsia ua, tuni tan in dailenbuk in azang lai uhi.
12010028	Huchibang in Jehu in Israel gam a pan Baal ahihsia hi.
12010029	Himahleh Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhna, Israelte thil ahihkhialsak a, ahihte Jehu in atawpsan kei hi. Huai bel Bethel khua leh Dan a dangka-eng bawngnou limte biak ahi.
12010030	Toupa'n Jehu kiang ah, “Ka mit tungtak a thil na hih ziak leh ka lungsim a deihthusam bangtak a Ahab inkote tung a na hih ziak in, na tapate suan lina tan in Israel laltutphah ah atu ding uh,” achi hi.
12010031	Himahleh Jehu in Toupa , Israelte' Pathian dan alungtang tengteng in azui kei a; Jeroboam in Israelte thil hihkhialsak a, ahihkhelh atawpsan tuan kei hi.
12010032	Huai lai in Toupa'n Israel gam letdan aneusak panta hi. Huchi in Hazael in Israel gam tengteng ah amau anuaisiahta hi.
12010033	Jordan a pan suahlam, Gilead gam tengteng, Gadte, Reubente, Manassehte, Arnon Phaizang a Aroer a pan Gilead leh Vasan gam tan in.
12010034	Jehu tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng, athilhihtheihdan tengteng Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12010035	Huchi in Jehu api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, Samaria ah avui ua; asik in atapa Jehoahaz ahong lalta hi.
12010036	Samaria gam a Israelte tung a Jehu vaihawm sung kum sawmnih-le-giat ahi.
12011001	Huan Ahaziah nu Athaliah in atapa asi chih atheih in, athou a, kumpipa tapa tengteng athat vek hi.
12011002	Ahaziah tapa Joash bel kumpipa Jehoram tanu, Ahaziah sanggamnu Jehosheba in kumpipa tapa athahte uh lak a pan pimang in, adontu toh lupna dantan ah a-omsak a; Athaliah muh theih louh ding in asel ua, huchi in thah ahita kei hi.
12011003	Amah bel amah toh Toupa' inn ah kum guk akibu ua, huchi in Athaliah in huai gam ah vai ahawmta hi.
12011004	Akum sagihna ah Jehoiada in Keroth mite leh galvil sepaihte lak a mi sepaih za heutute asamsak a, Toupa' inn ah akiang ah apilutsak hi. Akiang uah thu akhung a, Toupa' inn ah akichiamsak a, kumpipa tapa amusak hi.
12011005	Ama'n, “Na hih ding uh hichibang ahi. Na lak ua Sabbath ni a hong dingte seh thum suah seh khat in kumpipa' inn na veng ding uh.
12011006	Seh thum suah seh khat bel Sur kulh kongpi ah na om ding uh. Huchibang in na veng ding ua, asiat ding na dal ding uhi.
12011007	Na lak ua pawl nih, Sabbath ni a pai dingte'n kumpipa kiang ah Toupa' inn na veng ding uhi.
12011008	Michih in galvan tawi in kumpipa na umsuak ding ua; kuapeuh huai huamsung a hong lut na thah zel ding uh ahi. Huchi in kumpipa alut leh apawt zui vialvial un,” chi in thu apia hi.
12011009	Sepaih za heutute'n siampu Jehoiada thupiak bangbang in ahih ua; amau heutu chiat Sabbath ni a hong dingte leh Sabbath ni a pai dingte api ua, siampu Jehoiada kiang ah ahoh uhi.
12011010	Siampu in sepaih za heutute Toupa' inn a om, kumpipa David teipite leh lumte apia hi.
12011011	Galvil sepaihte'n galvan tawi chiat in, Tempul sik taklam a kipan veilam tan in maitam leh inn zul ah kumpipa a ding in umkhum uhi.
12011012	Huchi in kumpipa tapa ahon pikhia a, lallukhu akhusak hi. Theihsakna thu apia a; kumpipa in abawl ua, sathau anilh ua; akhut uh abeng ua, “Pathian in kumpipa hondam hen,” achi uhi.
12011013	Galvilmi leh mipite husa Athaliah in ana zak in, Toupa' inn ah mipite lak ah ava hoh hi.
12011014	A-en a, ngai in, kumpipa dan dungzui in khuam zul ah ana dingh a, sepaih heutute leh pengkul mut mite bel kumpipa kiangnai ah adingh uhi. Huai gam mite'n nuam asa mahmah ua, pengkul amut uh. Huchi in Athaliah in apuante abotkek a, “Guksawmna! Guksawmna ahita ve!” chi in akikou hi.
12011015	Siampu Jehoiada in sepaihte tung a heutute dia aseh sepaih za heutute thu apia a, akiang uah, “Sepaihte kikal ah pawtsak in. Kuapeuh amah zui namsau a satlup ding ahi,” achi hi. Siampu in, “ Toupa' inn a thah ding ahi kei,” ana chita ngal a.
12011016	Huchi in aman ua; kumpipa' inn a sakolte lutna lampi a pai in, huai ah athatta uh.
12011017	Jehoiada in Toupa leh kumpipa leh mipite kikal leh kumpipa leh mipite kikal ah Toupa mite ahihna ding un thukhun abawl hi.
12011018	Huai gammi tengteng Baal inn ah ahoh ua, ahihchim ua; amaitamte leh alimte ahihnen dimdem ua, Baal siampu Mattan leng maitam bul ah athat uh. Huchi in siampu in Toupa' inn vengmi heutute asepta hi.
12011019	Ama'n sepaih za heutute, veng mite, galvil sepaihte leh huai gam a mi tengteng api a, Toupa' inn a pan kumpipa apikhia ua, galvil mite kongpi tawn in kumpipa' inn a lut in, kumpipa laltutphah ah atuta hi.
12011020	Huchi in huai gam a mi tengteng akipak ua, khopi buai lou in a-omta hi; Athaliah namsau in kumpipa' inn ah athat uhi.
12011021	Joash in vai ahawm pat lai in kum sagih a upa ahi.
12012001	Jehu kum sagih alal kum in Joash alal pan hi. Jerusalem ah kum sawmli alal a; anu min Zibiah ahi a, Beer-sheba khomi ahi.
12012002	Siampu Jehoiada in Joash asinsak sung teng Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
12012003	Himahleh mun sang teng hihsiat vek ahi tuan kei a; mun sangte ah mite kithoih lailai in gimlim ahal nilouh lai uhi.
12012004	Joash in siampute kiang ah, “ Toupa inn a laklut thilzek tatna sum teng simsate lak a pai peuhmahte ahinna uh tatna sumte, kuapeuh in Toupa inn a laklut aphal uh sum tengtengte,
12012005	siampute'n ameltheihte ua pan la uhenla; inn sia, asiatna na bawl uhen,” achi hi.
12012006	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa Joash bel kum sawmnih-le-thum alal nung in leng siampute'n inn sia abawl kei lailai uhi.
12012007	Huchi in kumpipa Joash in siampu Jehoiada leh siampu dangte asam a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a inn siatna bawl lou na hi ua? Tu'n zaw na sumkemte a pan dangka la nawn kei unla, inn sia bawlna ding in pekhe zawta un,” achi hi.
12012008	Siampute'n mite a pan dangka lak nawn louh leh inn siatna puahphat louh pha asa uhi.
12012009	Himahleh siampu Jehoiada in bawm ala a, asin gei avutvang a, Toupa inn lutna taklam pang, maitam kiang ah atung hi. Huai bawm ah Toupa inn a dangka tawilut tengteng kongkhak vengmi siampute'n ana koih zel uh.
12012010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, bawm ah dangka atamta chih atheih un, Toupa' inn ah kumpipa laigelhmi leh siampu lianpen ava hoh ua, sumte asim ua ipte ah athun khe zel uhi.
12012011	Adangka sim uh nasem mite, Toupa inn lam mite tung a heutute khut ah apekhia ua; amau Toupa' inn lam mite leh khutsiam mite;
12012012	suangsek mite leh suang laikhe mite kiang ah, Toupa inn siatna bawlna ding sing leh suangte leh inn bawlna, akhawkna peuh a zat ding in apekhia uhi.
12012013	Himahleh Toupa insung a dangka ahon tawi un, Toupa' inn a ding dangkasik noute, khawnvak puantehnate, maiphiat kuangte, pengkulte, dangka-eng tui-um belsuante, dangkasik tui-um belsuante abawl kei uhi.
12012014	Nasem mite ape zel ua, Toupa' inn bawlna in azang uhi.
12012015	Nasem mite piak dia dangka akepsak mite uh leng a-etzui pih tuan kei uh. Amau ginomtak in ahih zel uhi.
12012016	Mohna thoihna dia thillat dangka leh khelhna thoihna dia thillat dangkate bel Toupa' inn ah alalut kei ua; siampute tantuam ahi.
12012017	Huchi in Siria kumpipa Hazael in Gath khua ava sual a, ala a; Hazael in Jerusalem a hoh atum hi.
12012018	Judah kumpipa Joash in Judah kumpipa apu Jehoshaphat, Jehoram leh Ahaziah in ana latsa thilzek tengteng leh amah thilzekte leh Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn a gou koihkhawmna a dangka-eng om tengteng ala vek a, Siria kumpipa Hazael akhak a; huchi in Jerusalem apawtsanta hi.
12012019	Huchi in Joash tanchin dangte, athilhihte tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12012020	Asikhate athou ua, aguk in asim sawm ua, Joash bel Silla zot sukna lampi Millo inn ah asual ua; athatta uhi.
12012021	Amah Simeath tapa Jozakar leh Shomer tapa Jehozabadte'n athat ua; huchi in api-le-pute lak ah David khopi ah avui ua; asik in atapa Amaziah ahong lalta hi.
12013001	Judah Kumpipa Ahaziah tapa Joash kum sawmnih-le-thum alal kum in Jehu tapa Jehoahaz Israelte tung ah Samaria ah alal pan a, kum sawm-le-sagih alal hi.
12013002	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih a, Israelte thil hihkhialsak a, ahih Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhnate ama'n leng ahih samta a, apaisan nawn kei.
12013003	Israelte tung ah Toupa aheh mahmah a, huchi in Siria kumpipa Hazael khut leh Hazael tapa Ben-hadad khut ah adamsung teng ape vekta hi.
12013004	Jehoahaz in Toupa kiang ah nget chihtak in angen a, Toupa'n athu angaihkhiaksak a; Israel simmoh a om a, Siria kumpipa'n amau asimmohdan lah amu kilkel ngal a.
12013005	Huchi in Toupa'n Israelte hondampa apia a, huchi in Siriate nuai a pan apawtkhia uh. Israel suante tuma lam bang in amau inn ah a-om kinken uhi.
12013006	Himahleh Israelte thil ana hihkhialsak a Jeroboam inkote khelhnate apaisan kei ua, ahih lailai zosop ua; Samaria ah Asherah song leng a-om lailai hi.
12013007	Jehoahaz in amite lak a sakol tungtuangmi sawmnga, kangtalai sawm leh sepaih singkhat chih louh aneih aphalsak ngal kei a; Siria kumpipa'n ahihmang vek a, leivui chilzan bang in abawl hi.
12013008	Huchi in Jehoahaz tanchin dangte, athilhih tengtengte, athilhihtheihdante Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12013009	Hichi in Jehoahaz bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; Samaria ah avui ua; asik in atapa Jehoash alalta hi.
12013010	Judah kumpipa Joash kum sawmthum-le-sagih alal kum in Jehoahaz tapa Jehoash Israelte tung ah Samaria ah alal pan a, kum sawm-le-guk alal hi.
12013011	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou pipi ana hih a; Israelte thil hihkhialsak a ahih Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhna tengteng apaisan kei a, aching lailai zosop hi.
12013012	Huchi in Jehoash tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng, Judah kumpipa Amaziah toh akisual lai ua athilhihtheihdante Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12013013	Huchi in Jehoash api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; Jeroboam alaltutphah ah atu a, Jehoas bel Samaria ah Israel kumpipate lak ah avui uhi.
12013014	Elisha achi ana a, sihpih ding khop chinatna ahi. Huchi in akiang ah Israel kumpipa Jehoash ahohsuk a, akah a, “Aw, ka pa, ka pa, Israelte kangtalai leh sakol tungtuang mite,” achi hi.
12013015	Elisha in akiang ah, “Thalpeu leh thaltangte hon la in,” achi a; ama'n thalpeu leh thaltangte ahon la hi.
12013016	Israelte kumpipa kiang ah, “Thalpeuh tung ah na khut nga in,” achi hi. Huchi in akhut anga a; Elisha in kumpipa khut tung ah akhut anga hi.
12013017	Ama'n, “Suahlam tohlet hong in,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong hi. Elisha in, “Kap in,” achi a, akap hi. Ama'n, “ Toupa hotkhiakna thaltang leh Siria a pan hotkhiakna thaltang; Aphek ah na zoh tanpha in Siriate na sual ding hi,” achi hi.
12013018	“Thaltangte hon la in,” achi a, Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “Huai in leitual sun dih,” achi a; huchi in thumvei asun a, atawpta hi.
12013019	Huchi in Pathian mipa atung ah aheh a, “Ngavei ahihkeileh gukvei na sut ding ei ve; huchi in Siriate mangthang vek khop in na zou ding. Himahleh Siriate thumvei kia zou ding na hita ve,” achi hi.
12013020	Huchi in Elisha asi a, avui uh. Kum hong kivei in, Moab pawlte'n agam uh ahong dou uhi.
12013021	Mi khat avui laitak un hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, mi pawl khat amu uhi. Huchi in huai mi Elisha han sung ah akhe mawk ua; aluang in Elisha guhte asukkhaktak in, ahong hing nawn a, adingtouta hi.
12013022	Siria kumpipa Hazael in Jehoahaz damsung teng in Israelte anuaisiah hi.
12013023	Himahleh Toupa'n Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a thu akhun ziak in amau ahehpih a, alainat a, azahtak a, amau ahihmang nuam kei a, akiang a pan apaikhe kei hi.
12013024	Siria kumpipa Hazael asi a; asik in atapa Ben-hadad alal hi.
12013025	Jehoahaz tapa Jehoash in Hazael tapa Ben-hadad in apa Jehoahaz adou a, khua alaksakte asut nawn a, Joash in thumvei azou a, Israel gam khuate alakik nawn hi.
12014001	Israel kumpipa Jehoahaz tapa Jehoash kum nih alal kum in Judah kumpipa Joash tapa Amaziah alal pan hi.
12014002	Alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-kua alal a; anu min Jehoadan, Jerusalem mi ahi.
12014003	Toupa mitmuh in thil dik ahih a, himahleh apu David zaw apha kei; apa Joash thilhih bang ahih sam hi.
12014004	Mun sangte lakmang ahi tuan kei a, mun sangte ah mite akithoih lai ua gimlim ahal lai uhi.
12014005	Akhut a lalgam ahong kiptak in hichi ahong hi a, apa, kumpipa thatmi ama sikhate athat hi.
12014006	Himahleh huai tualthat mite tate athat kei hi. Mosi Dan Bu a, “Tate ziak in pate hihlup ding ahi kei a, pate ziak in leng tate hihlup ding ahi sam kei, michih amau khelhna ziak in asi ding uh,” chi a Toupa thupiak gelh ahih bang in.
12014007	Edomte chi phaizang ah singkhat athat a, Selah khua asual a, ala a, amin ding in Joktheel asa a, tuni tan in hiai ahi lai hi.
12014008	Huchi in Amaziah in Israel kumpipa Jehu tapa Jehoahaz tapa Jehoash kiang ah, hong kuan in, kimaituah ni, chi in mi asawl hi.
12014009	Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Judah kumpipa Amaziah kiang ah, “Lebanon tang a ling in Lebanon tang a sidar sing kiang ah, na tanu ka tapa zi ding in neisak dih ve, chi in athukhak a; Lebanon tang a gamsa ahong pai a, huai ling ahong tuanpuk hi.
12014010	Nang Edomte na zou ngei a, na lungtang ahong kisathei hi; na kisaktheihna ompih maimai in; nang leh Judah nangawn tan a siatna, nang a dia hoih lou ding thil bang ding a khoihkhe ding na hia?” chi in adawng hi.
12014011	Himahleh Amaziah in ana ngaikhe nuam kei a; huchi in Israel kumpipa Jehoash va hohtou in ava douta hi. Judah kumpipa Amaziah toh Judah gam Beth-shemesh ah ava kimaituahta uhi.
12014012	Judah bel Israelte ma ah azahlakta a; michih amau inn chiat ah ataikekta uh.
12014013	Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Judah kumpipa Ahaziah tapa Joash tapa Amaziah Beth-shemesh ah aman a, Jerusalem ah apaipih a, Jerusalem kulh, Ephraim kongpi a pan kulh ning kongpi pha in tong zali ahihchim hi.
12014014	Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn a gou koihkhawmna a dangka-eng leh dangka leh tui-um belsuan om tengteng ala a, thuchiam tangtunna dia mat a om mite toh, huchi in Samaria kholam ah apai nawnta hi.
12014015	Huchi in Jehoash thilhih tanchin dangte, athilhihtheihdante, Judah kumpipa Amaziah adou thute Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12014016	Huchi in Jehoash api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, Samaria ah Israel kumpipate lak ah avui ua; asik in atapa Jeroboam alalta hi.
12014017	Judah kumpipa Joash tapa Amaziah Israel kumpipa Jehoahaz tapa Jehoash sih nung in kum sawm-le-nga adam lai hi.
12014018	Huchi in Amaziah tanchin dangte Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12014019	Jerusalem ah amah aguksawm ua; huchi in Lakish ah mi adelhsak ua, huai ah athatta uhi.
12014020	Aluang sakol in apaipih ua, api-le-pute lak ah David khopi Jerusalem ah avui uhi.
12014021	Judah mi tengteng in kum sawm leh kum guk a upa, Azariah api ua, apa Amaziah sik in kumpipa in abawl uhi.
12014022	Ama'n Elath khua abawlhoih nawn in Judah gam ah apangsak nawn a; huai nung in kumpipa api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta hi.
12014023	Judah kumpipa Joash tapa Amaziah kum sawm-le-nga alal kum in Israel kumpipa Jehoash tapa Jeroboam Samaria ah alal pan a, kum sawmli-le-khat alal hi.
12014024	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Israelte thil ahihkhialsak a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhna tengteng apaisan kei hi.
12014025	Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in asikha, Gath hepher mi Amittai tapa zawlnei Jonah zang a athugen bang in, Hamath lutna a pan Arabah Tuipi pha in Israel gam ah apangsak nawn hi.
12014026	Toupa'n Israelte haksatna a thupi mahmah chih lah athei ngal a; sal hi in noplen hitaleh athuakdan uh akibang a; Israelte panpih ding kuamah om sam kei hi.
12014027	Toupa'n Israel min van nuai ah achimitsak zenzen ding chih ahihleh agen kei him a; Jehoash tapa Jeroboam zang in ahondam zawta hi.
12014028	Huchi in Jeroboam tanchin dangte, athilhih tengtengte, athilhihtheihdante, agaldou thute, tuma lam in Judah gam tan hi gige Damaskas leh Hamath khua Israelte a dia ana laksak nawn thute Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12014029	Jeroboam api leh pu, Israel kumpipate kiang ah a-ihmu samta a; huchi in atapa Zakariah asik in alalta hi.
12015001	Israel kumpipa Jeroboam kum sawmnih-le-sagih alal kum in Judah kumpipa Amaziah alal pan hi.
12015002	Alal pat tung in kum sawm-le-guk a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga-le-nih alal a; anu min Jekoliah, Jerusalem mi ahi.
12015003	Apa Amaziah thilhih bangbang hih sam in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
12015004	Himahleh mun sangte lakmang ahi tuan kei. Mun sangte ah mite kithoih lailai in, gimlim ahal lai uhi.
12015005	Toupa'n kumpipa agawt a, huchi in asih ni pha in aphak a, inn tuam ah atengta hi. Kumpipa tapa Jotham in agam ua mite vai hawmsak in inkuan tung a heutu in a-om hi.
12015006	Huchi in Azariah tanchin dangte athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12015007	Azariah bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; api-le-pute lak ah David khopi ah avui ua; huchi in asik in atapa Jotham alalta hi.
12015008	Judah kumpipa Azariah kum sawmthum-le-giat alal kum in Jeroboam tapa Zakariah Israelte tung ah Samaria ah kha guk alal hi.
12015009	Apute hih mah bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Israelte thil ahihkhialsak Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhnate apaisan kei hi.
12015010	Jabesh tapa Shallum in aguk in thah asawm a, mipite ma ah asual a, athat a, asik in alalta hi.
12015011	Huchi in Zakariah tanchin dangte bel ngai dih, Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah atuang hi.
12015012	Huai bel Toupa'n Jehu kiang a, “Na tapate suan lina tan in Israelte laltutphah ah atu ding uh,” chih thu agen hi. Huchi in huai bang geih ahong hita hi.
12015013	Judah kumpipa Uzziah kum sawmthum-le-kua alal kum in Jabesh tapa Shallum alal pan a; Samaria ah kha khat sung alal hi.
12015014	Tirzah a pan Gadi tapa Menahem ahohtou a, Samaria ah ahoh a, Samaria ah Jabesh tapa Shallum asual a, athat a, asik in alalta hi.
12015015	Huchi in Shallum tanchin dangte, aguksawmna thute ngai dih, Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah atuang hi.
12015016	Huchi in Menahem in Tirzah a pan Tiphsah leh asung a om tengteng leh agamte asual a; amah a dia akihon louh ziak un asual a; huai ah naupai lai numei tengteng apikkek hi.
12015017	Judah kumpipa Azariah kum sawmthum-le-kua alal kum in Gadi tapa Menahem Israelte tung ah alal pan a, Samaria ah kum sawm alal hi.
12015018	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Israelte thil hihkhialsak Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhna in adamsung apaisan kei hi.
12015019	Assuria kumpipa Pul in agam ahong sual a; gam aneihkippih theihna ding in Menahem in Pul dangka talent sangkhat apia hi.
12015020	Menahem in Assuria kumpipa piak ding in Israel mi nei zou tengteng lak ah dangka shekel sawmnga chiat akhon a; huchi in Assuria kumpipa apai nawn a, huai gam ah ataam nilouh kei hi.
12015021	Menahem tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12015022	Huchi in Menahem api-le-pute kiang ah ihmuta a; asik in atapa Pekahiah alal hi.
12015023	Judah kumpipa Azariah kum sawmnga alal kum in Israelte tung ah Samaria ah Menahem tapa Pekahiah alal pan a, kum nih alal hi.
12015024	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Israelte thil hihkhialsak, Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhnate apaisan kei hi.
12015025	Asepaih heutu Remaliah tapa Pekah in amah aguksawm a, Samaria a kumpipa' inn a kulh ah Argob toh, Arieh toh athatta a; akiang ah Gilead mi sawmnga toh; huchi in Pekahiah athat a, asik in alalta hi.
12015026	Huchi in Pekahiah tanchin dangte, athilhih tengtengte, ngai dih, Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah atuang hi.
12015027	Judah kumpipa Azariah kum sawmnga-le-nih alal kum in Remaliah tapa Pekah Israelte tung ah Samaria ah alal pan a, kum sawmnih alal hi.
12015028	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Israelte thil hihkhialsak, Nebat tapa Jeroboam khelhnate apaisan kei.
12015029	Israel kumpipa Pekah lal lai in Assuria kumpipa Tiglath-pileser in Ijon, Abel-beth-maakah, Janoah, Kadesh, Hazor, Gilead leh Galili gamte leh Naphtali gam tengteng ala a, Assuria gam ah sal in api hi.
12015030	Elah tapa Hoshea in Remaliah tapa Pekah aguksawm a, asual a, athat a, Uzziah tapa Jotham kum sawmnih alal kum in asik in alalta hi.
12015031	Huchi in Pekah tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng, ngai dih, Israel kumpipate khangthubute ah atuang hi.
12015032	Israel kumpipa Remaliah tapa Pekah kum nih alal kum in Judah kumpipa Uzziah tapa Jotham alal pan hi.
12015033	Alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-guk alal a; anu min Jerusha, Zadok tanu ahi.
12015034	Apa Uzziah thilhih bangbang hih sam in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
12015035	Himahleh mun sangte hihmang ahi tuan kei; mun sangte ah mite'n kithoih in, gimlim ahal lai uhi. Toupa' inn kongpi saknungzaw abawlhoih hi.
12015036	Huchi in Jotham tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12015037	Huai lai in Siria kumpipa Rezin leh Remulia tapa Pekah Judate sual ding in Toupa'n asawl pan hi.
12015038	Jotham api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, api-pute lak ah apu David khopi ah avui ua; asik in atapa Ahaz alalta hi.
12016001	Remaliah tapa Pekah kum sawm-le-sagih alal kum in Judah kumpipa Jotham tapa Ahaz alal pan hi.
12016002	Ahaz alal pat tung in kum sawmnih a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-guk alal hi. Apu David bang in Toupa a Pathian mitmuh in thil hoih ahih sam kei hi.
12016003	Israel kumpipate tot lampi atawn sam a, ahi, Toupa'n Israel suante ma a adelhkhiaksa namte thilkihhuaitak ahih bang un atapa mei ah alutsuaksak hi.
12016004	Mun sangte leh mualte tung ah leh sing hing chih nuai ah kithoih in gimlim ahal hi.
12016005	Huchi in Siria kumpipa Rezin leh Israel kumpipa Remaliah tapa Pekah, Jerusalem dou ding in akuantou ua; Ahaz ava um ua, himahleh azou thei kei uhi.
12016006	Huai lai in Siria kumpipa Rezin in Elath khua Siria gam ding in ala nawn a, Elath a pan Judate adelhkhia a; huchi in Siriate'n Elath khua ava luah ua, tuni tan in ateng lai uh.
12016007	Huchi in Ahaz in Assuria kumpipa Tiglath-pileser kiang ah, “Na sikha leh na tapa ka hi kei a hia; kei hong dou dia hong kuan, Siria kumpipa khut a pan leh Israel kumpipa khut a pan hon hunkhe dih ve,” chi in mi asawl hi.
12016008	Ahaziah in Toupa' inn a dangka leh dangka-eng om peuhmah leh kumpipa' inn a gou koihkhawmte ala a, Assuria kumpipa kiang ah thilpiak ding in akhak hi.
12016009	Assuria kumpipa'n athugen ana pom a; huchi in Assuria kumpipa'n Damaskas khua ava dou a, ala a, Kir gam ah sal in huai a mite api a, Rezin athat hi.
12016010	Kumpipa Ahaz bel Assuria kumpipa Tiglath-pileser houpih ding in Damaskas ah ahoh a, Damaskas ah maitam ava mu a, huchi in kumpipa Ahaz in huai maitam lim leh akibawldan bang geih etton ding in siampu Urijah kiang ah akhak hi.
12016011	Siampu Urijah in maitam abawl a; kumpipa Ahaziah in Damaskas a pan akhak bang geih in siampu Urijah in Damaskas a pan a Ahaz ahong pai nawn in ana bawl khin vekta hi.
12016012	Damaskas a pan kumpipa ahong tun in maitam amu a; kumpipa'n maitam anaih a, atung ah thillatte alan hi.
12016013	Maitam ah ahalmang thillat hal in tangbuang thillat alan a, dawn thillat asung a, alemna thillatte sisan atheh hi.
12016014	Toupa ma a dal maitam ala a, maitam leh Toupa' inn kikal a, inn mazawn a pan alasuan a, amaitam mallam pang ah akoih hi.
12016015	Kumpipa Ahaz in, maitam lianpi tung ah zinglam halmang thillat, nitaklam tangbuang thillat, halmang thillat, tangbuang thillat, i gam ua mipi tengteng halmang thillat, tangbuang thillat leh dawn thillat toh hal in lan inla; atung ah halmang thillat sisan tengteng leh kithoihna sisan tengteng theh in; dal maitam bel kei thudotna ding ahi, chi in siampu Urijah thu apia hi.
12016016	Huchi in siampu Urijah in kumpipa Ahaz thupiak bangbang in ahihta hi.
12016017	Kumpipa Ahaz in tunna kuakte a-atkhia a, kisilna bel akoihkhia a; atunna dal bawngtal a pan lakhia in suanglep tung ah atung hi.
12016018	Sabbath ni a dia atung nei lampi abawl uleh inn polam a kumpipa lutna Toupa' inn a pan Siria kumpipa a ding in akheng hi.
12016019	Huchi in Ahaz thilhih tanchin dangte Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12016020	Huchi in Ahaz api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, api-le-pute lak ah David khopi ah avui ua; asik in atapa Hezekiah alalta hi.
12017001	Judah Kumpipa Ahaz akum sawm-le-nihna alal kum in Elah tapa Hoshea Israelte tung ah Samaria ah alal pan a, kum kua alal hi.
12017002	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih loutak ahih a, himahleh ama a Israel kumpipate bang zen in zaw ahih kei.
12017003	Assuria kumpipa Salmaneser in ava dou a, huchi in Hoshea asikha ahong hi a, siah apia hi.
12017004	Assuria kumpipa'n, Aigupta kumpipa So kiang a mi sawl in Hoshea thuguk sawm ana theikhia a; a kumchin a, apiak zel bang in leng Assuria kumpipa kiang ah siah ape kei behlap lai a; huaiziak in Assuria kumpipa'n suangkul ah hensa in akhumta hi.
12017005	Huchi in Assuria kumpipa'n gam tengteng atuansuak vek a, Samaria ah ahohtou a, kum thum a-umkhum hi.
12017006	Hoshea kum kua alal kum in Assuria kumpipa'n Samaria ala a, Assuria gam ah Israelte api a, Halah, Habor a Gozan lui leh Mediate khuate ah akoih hi.
12017007	Huchibang a, ana omna uh bel Israel suante'n Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh khut nuai a pan, Aigupta gam a pan a pikhepa Toupa a Pathian uh tung a thil ahihkhelh ua, pathian dangte alau ziak uh ahi.
12017008	Toupa'n Israel suante ma a, ana delhkhiaksa namte thuzoh leh Israel kumpipate dan thusehte azuih zawk ziak uh leng ahi.
12017009	Israel suante'n Toupa a Pathian uh tung ah thil hoih loutak aguk in ahih uhi. Akho teng uah galvil mite insang a pan kulh nei khopite pha in mun sangte abawl uhi.
12017010	Mual sang teng ah pathian limte leh sing hing teng nuai ah suangphuhte phut in Asherah songte abawl uhi.
12017011	Huai mun sang tengteng ah Toupa'n ama ua adelhmangsa namte hih bang in gimlim ahal ua; Toupa hehsak ding in thil gilou ahih lai uhi.
12017012	Toupa'n akiang uah, “Hichibang hih kei un,” achih milimte nna leng asem uhi.
12017013	Toupa'n , dan zuih ding na pi-le-pute uh ka piakleh ka sikha zawlneite zang a ka hon theihsak bang zel in, “Na omdan gilou uh lehngatsan unla, ka thupiakte leh ka dan thusehte zui un,” chi in Israelte leh Judah zawlnei chih leh mu thei michih zang in atheisak hi.
12017014	Huchi pipi in leng azui nuam kei ua, api-le-pute un Toupa a Pathian uh gingta nuam lou a, angawng uh akhauhsak mah bang un, angawng uh akhauhsak uhi.
12017015	Adan thusehte, api-le-pute uh toh athukhun, akiang ua athu theihsakte anial ua; thil gina lou azui ua, bangmah lou phet ahong hita uh. Atungthu ua Toupa'n , amau bang in zaw hih kei un, ana chihsa, akiang ua namte azui uhi.
12017016	Toupa a Pathian uh thupiak tengteng alehngatsan ua, bawngnou lim sun nih abawl ua, Asherah song abawl ua, van a om tengteng abia ua, Baal nna asem uhi.
12017017	Atapate uh leh atanute uh mei tawn in alutsak ua, aisan leh bum aching ua, Toupa hehna tokthou ding in amitmuh in thil hoih lou hih ding in akizuak uhi.
12017018	Huaiziak in Toupa Israelte tung ah heh petmah in aheh a, amuh phaklouhna ding ah asuanmang a; Judah nam kia lou ngal a-omta kei uhi.
12017019	Judahte'n leng Toupa a Pathian uh thupiakte azui kei ua, Israelte bawltawm dan thusehte azui zawta uhi.
12017020	Israel suante himhim adeihta kei a, amau ahihgim a, amuh phak louh ua asuanmang masiah lok mite khut ah apia hi.
12017021	Israelte lah David inkote ahihna uh apaihsakta ngal a; huchi in Nebat tapa Jeroboam pen kumpipa ding in abawl ua; Jeroboam in Israelte'n Toupa azuih uh ahawlkawi a, thil gilou thupi mahmah ahihsak hi.
12017022	Israel suante'n Jeroboam thilhihkhelh bangbang ahih sam ua;
12017023	Toupa'n azawlnei tengteng zang a ana gensa bang a amuh phaklouhna a, asuanmang masiah huaite apaisan ngal kei ua. Huchi in Israelte amau gam a pan Assuria gam ah api ua, tuni tan in huai gam ah a-om lai uhi.
12017024	Assuria kumpipa'n Babulon khomite, Kuth khomite, Ava khomite, Hamath khomite leh Sepharvaim khomite athukhak a, Samaria khote ah Israel suante mun aluahsak a; huchi in Samaria gam aluah ua, akhuate ah ateng uhi.
12017025	Huai lai a a-om tung un hichi ahong hi a, Toupa laudan asiam kei ua, huchi in Toupa'n alak uah humpinelkaite asawl a, khenkhatte akeilum uhi.
12017026	Huchi in Assuria kumpipa kiang ah, “Na lakkhiak a, Samaria gam khuate a na koih namte'n hiai gam Pathian omdan athei kei ua, huaiziak in, alak uah humpinelkaite asawl a; ngai dih, hiai gam Pathian omdan atheih louh ziak un athat uh,” achi uhi.
12017027	Huchi in Assuria kumpipa'n, “Huai a sal a na pite uh lak a siampu khat pi unla, hong om sam henla, ama'n huai gam Pathian biakdan sinsak hen,” chi in thu apia hi.
12017028	Huchi in Samaria gam a pan apite uh lak a siampu khat Bethel ah ava teng a, Toupa laudan ding asinsak hi.
12017029	Himahleh nam chih in amau pathian chiat akibawl ua, Samari mite'n mun sang ana bawl innte ah nam chih in amau omna khua chiat ah huai apathiante chiat uh akoih uhi.
12017030	Babulon mite'n Sukkoth-benoth abawl ua, Kuthte'n Nergal abawl ua, Hamathte'n Ashima abawl ua;
12017031	Ava mite'n Nibhaz leh Tartak abawl uhi. Sepharvaim mite'n pathiante Adrammelek leh Anammelek kiang ah atate ahal uhi.
12017032	Huchi in Toupa laudan asiam ua, alak ua mineupente mun sang siampute in abawl ua, mun sang innte ah amau a ding in thil alan uhi.
12017033	Toupa alau ua, apikhiakna gam ua namte hihdan bang in amau pathiante nna asem uh.
12017034	Tuma lam a, ahihdan bang un tuni tan in ahih lailai uhi. Toupa laudan asiam kei ua, Toupa'n Jakob suan Israel achihte kiang ah,
12017035	“pathian dangte zaw lau kei unla, amau be kei unla, akiang ah kithoih sam kei un.
12017036	Toupa , thilhihtheihna thupitak leh ban zak hial a Aigupta gam a pan nou hon pikhepa amah laudan na siam zawk ding uh ahi, amah na biak ding uh ahi a, ama kiang a na kithoih ding uh ahi.
12017037	Huchi in dan thusehte, vaihawmte, dante, thupiakte ahon na gelhsaksate tangtawn in na pom gige ding uh ahi; pathian dangte laudan na siam ding uh ahi kei.
12017038	Na kiang ua thu ka khun pen na mangngilh ding uh ahi kei; pathian dangte leng laudan na siam ding uh ahi sam kei hi.
12017039	Toupa na Pathian uh laudan na siam ding uh ahi. Huchi in na melma tengteng khut a pan ama'n ahon hunkhe dia, chi a thu akhun a, amau a dia Toupa thupiakte, dan thusehte, vaihawmte, dan bawlte, azui tuan kei uhi,” achi hi.
12017040	Bangchi mah in leng azui nuam tuan kei ua, tuma lam a ahihdan bang un ahih lailai uhi.
12017041	Huchi in huai namte'n Toupa alau ua; amilim bawltawmte uh nna leng asem lai uh. Huchi mah bang in asuante uh leh asuante uh suante tan in leng tuni tan in api-le-pute uh hih bang in ahih lailai uhi.
12018001	Huan Elah tapa Israel kumpipa Hoshea, kum thum alal kum in hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Ahaz tapa Hezekiah alal pan hi.
12018002	Alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-kua alal a; anu min Abi, Zakariah tanu ahi.
12018003	Apu David thilhih tengteng hih sam in, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
12018004	Mun sangte ahihgawp a, suangphuhte ahihchim a, Asherahte aphuk a; Mosi dal gul bawl akitam nensak vek a; huai hun tanpha a Israel suante'n akiang a gimlim ahal ziak un, ama'n huai Nehushtan asa hi.
12018005	Ama'n Toupa , Israelte' Pathian amuang a; huchi in anung a Judah kumpipa tengteng lak ah amah bang kuamah a-om kei ua, amalam in leng a-om sam kei uh.
12018006	Toupa alen tinten a, ama zuih atawp nuam kei a, athupiak, Toupa'n Mosi apiakte azui hi.
12018007	Huchi in Toupa akiang ah a-om a; avakkhiakna peuh ah alamzang a; Assuria kumpipa tung ah ahel a, a-nna asemta kei hi.
12018008	Philistiate Gaza khua tan in agamgi chiang tengteng toh, galvilmi insang a pan kulh nei khopi tan in azou vek hi.
12018009	Kumpipa Hezekiah kum li alal kum, Israel kumpipa Elah tapa Hoshea kum sagih alal kum in hichi ahong hi a, Assuria kumpipa Salmaneser in Samaria ahong dou a, a-umkimvel a,
12018010	huchi in kum thum achin kum in alazou hi. Hezekiah kum guk alal kum, Israel kumpipa Hoshea kum kua alal kum in ahi Samaria khua alak zoh.
12018011	Assuria kumpipa'n Assuria gam ah Israel apimang a, Halah, Habor, Gozan lui leh Mediate khuate ah akoihta hi;
12018012	Toupa a Pathian uh thu mang lou a, athukhun bohsia a, Toupa'n asikha Mosi thu apiak tengteng azuih louh ziak un.
12018013	Kumpipa Hezekiah kum sawm-le-li alal kum in Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib Judah gam a khokulh nei tengteng dou ding in ahohtou a, alata hi.
12018014	Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in Lakish a Assuria kumpipa kiang ah, “Thil ka na hihkhial hi, kei a pan kik nawn in, ka tung a na hon got peuhmah ka po ding,” chi a gen ding in mi asawl hi. Assuria kumpipa'n Judah kumpipa Hezekiah dangka talent zathum leh dangka-eng talent sawmthum abikhiahsak hi
12018015	Huchi in Hezekiah in Toupa' inn a dangka om teng leh kongkhak a dangka-eng tengteng leh kumpipa gou koihkhawmna a om tengteng apia hi.
12018016	Huai tung mah in Hezekiah in Toupa tempul kongkhak a dangka-eng aluante leh Judah kumpipa Hezekiah inn khuampite a kiluante alakhe vek a, Assuria kumpipa apia hi.
12018017	Assuria kumpipa'n Tartan, Rab-saris leh Rabshakeh sepaih tampi toh Lakish a pan Jerusalem a kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah asawl hi. Jerusalem khua atungtou ua; atuntouh un Puansawpmi Lamlian lampi a dil saknungzaw tuilakna kiang ah adingh uhi.
12018018	Kumpipa asap uleh, insung heutu Hilkiah tapa Eliakim, laigelhmi Sebnah leh tanchin gelhmi Asaph tapa Joah, akiang uah ahong pawtkhia uhi.
12018019	Rabshakeh in akiang uah, “Hezekiah kiang ah va gen dih ua, Kumpipa thupitak Assuria kumpipa in hichi in achi: Na gin a na muan bang ahia oi?
12018020	Kidouna a ding in geldan siam leh hatna ka nei uh, na chi a; himahleh huai zaw paukam lel ahi. Kua ahia na muan a ka tung a na hel maizen?
12018021	Tu in, ngai in, hiai sialluang chiangkhun, Aigupta muang na hita a; huai a mi akingaihleh akhut asun ding hi. Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh bel amah muang tengteng tung ah huchibang ahi naknak hi.
12018022	Ahihkeileh, ka kiang ah, Toupa ka Pathian uh ahi ka muan uh, na chih uleh, amah pen Hezekiah in Judah leh Jerusalem kiang a Jerusalem a hiai maitam ma ah na biak ding uh ahi, chi a mun sangte leh amaitamte alakmangsakpa ahi kei a hia? chi in.
12018023	Huchi in ka pu Assuria kumpipa toh thu kichiam dih ua, huchi in atung a tuangmi ding na muh theih peuhmah ding leh sakol sangnih ka hon pe ding.
12018024	Bangchi in ahia kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite thu in Aigupta tung a na muanna koih in, ka pu mite lak a neupen heutu khat lel leng na nankik zoh mahmah ding?
12018025	Hiai gam Toupa lou a hihse ding a hong kuantou ka hi a hia? Toupa'n ka kiang ah, hiai gam dou inla, hihsia in, chi ahi,” chi in achi hi.
12018026	Hilkiah tapa Eliakim leh Sebnah leh Joahte'n Rabshakeh kiang ah, “Hehpih in na sikhate Siria pau in hon houpih in; huai lah ka theisiam ngal ua; kulh tung a mite zak in Judah pau in hon houpih nawn ke'n,” achi uh.
12018027	Himahleh Rabshakeh in akiang uah, “Ka pu in na pu uh kiang leh nou kiang kia ah hiai thu gen ding in ahon sawl a hia? Kulh tung a tute, noute leh a-ek uh ne dingte kiang ah leng hon sawl ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
12018028	Rabshakeh adingh a, Judah pau in aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Kumpipa thupitak Assuria kumpipa thu ngaikhia un.
12018029	Kumpipa'n hichi in achi, ‘Hezekiah khem in om kei un; ama'n akhut a pan noute hon humbit thei lou ding ahi.
12018030	Hezekiah in, Toupa'n ahon humbit dia; hiai khopi Assuria kumpipa khut ah piak ahi kei ding, chi in Toupa ah hon muangsak kei hen.’
12018031	Hezekiah thu pom kei un. Assuria kumpipa'n hichi in achi: Hon kileppih unla, ka kiang ah hong pawtkhia un; michih in ama grepgui leh ama theipi kung ngei ate ne chiat uhenla, michih in amah tuikhuk tui dawn chiat hen.
12018032	Noumau gam bang a buh leh uain gam, tanghou leh grephuan gam, olive leh khuaizu gam, si lou a na hintheihna ding uh gam a ka hon pi masiah, Hezekiah in, Toupa'n hon humbit ding, chi a nou ahon khem in leng pom kei un.
12018033	Namte' pathian mawngmawng lak a himhim in agam uh Assuria kumpipa a pan ahumbit ngeita uh hia?
12018034	Hamath leh Arpad pathiante koi a omta uh ahia? Sepharvaim, Hena leh Ivah pathiante leng koi a omta ahi ua? Samaria ka khut a pan ahumbit uhia?
12018035	Gam chih pathian tengteng lak a kuate ahi ua ka khut a pan agam uh humbit a, Toupa'n Jerusalem khua kei a pan humbit mahmah ding? chi in,” achi hi.
12018036	Amau adai sipsip ua, kam khat in leng adawng kei uh, kumpipa dan thupiak, “Amah dawng ke'n,” chih ahi ngal a.
12018037	Huchi in kumpipa insung heutu Hilkiah tapa Eliakim, laigelhmi Sebnah leh tanchin gelhmi Asaph tapa Joahte'n apuansilh bohkekte uh silh in Hezekiah kiang ah ahoh ua, Rabshakeh thugente ahilh uhi.
12019001	Huan kumpipa Hezekiah in huai azak in hichi ahong hi a, apuansilhte abotkek a, sai-ip puan asilh a, Toupa' inn ah alutta hi.
12019002	Inn sung heutu Eliakim, laigelhmi Sebnah leh siampu upate sai-ip puan silh in Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai kiang ah asawl hi.
12019003	Amau akiang ah, Hezekiah in hichi in achi, “Tuni mangbatna leh salhna leh minsiatna ni ahi. Naute lah apian uh ahunta ngal a, piangsak ding in lah thahatna a-om nawnta ngal kei.
12019004	Apu Assuria kumpipa'n Pathian hing gense ding a asawl Rabshakeh thugen tengteng, Toupa na Pathian in aza dia, athugen, Toupa na Pathian in athu azak in ana sal kha mai ding, huaiziak in, a-om lai khosuaksunte thumsak in,” achi va chi un.
12019005	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah sikhate Isai kiang ah ahoh uh.
12019006	Isai in akiang uah, “Na pu kiang ah huchi in gen in, Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Assuria kumpipa sikhate'n kei ahon gensiatnate uh, na zak thute ziak in lau mawk ke'n.
12019007	Ngai in, asung ah kha ka omsak ding a, thuthang aza ding a, ama gam ah apai nawn ding. Huchi in ama gam mahmah ah namsau puksak in ka omsak ding, achi hi,’ chi in,” achi hi.
12019008	Huchi in Rabshakeh akik nawn a, Assuria kumpipa'n Libna khua ana sual lai amu a; Lakish a pan apawt chih azaksa him ahi.
12019009	“Ngai in, nang hon dou ding in apawtta,” chi a Tirhak Ethiopia gam kumpipa tungtangmi gen ana zak in Hezekiah kiang ah mite asawl hi.
12019010	Hichi in Judah kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah na gen ding uh, “Na Pathian na muan in Jerusalem khua Assuria kumpipa khut ah piak ahi kei ding, chi in hon khem kei hen.
12019011	Ngai in, Assuria Kumpipate'n gam tengteng ahihse vek ua, atung a athilhih uh na za a; nang humbit na hi tuan dia hia?
12019012	Namte' pathiante'n ka pi-le-pute'n ahihmangte uh ahumbit ua hia? Gozan, Haran, Reseph, Eden ta Thelasar a omte.
12019013	Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sepharvaim khopi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa, Ivah kumpipate koi a om ahita ua? chi in,” achi hi.
12019014	Hezekiah in amisawlte khut a pan lai amu a, asim a: Hezekiah Toupa' inn ah alut a, Toupa ma ah huai aphalh hi.
12019015	Hezekiah Toupa ma ah athum a, “ Toupa aw, cherubte tung a tu, Israel Pathian, nang, nang kia leitung gam tengteng Pathian na hi a; lei leh van nangmah siamsa ahi uh.
12019016	Toupa aw, na bil na doh inla, ngai dih ve; Toupa aw, na mit hak inla, en dih ve; Pathian hing gense dia Sennakerib in thu ahong gen ngaikhe dih ve.
12019017	Toupa , Assuria kumpipate'n namte leh agamte uh ahihse ngei ua, apathiante uh mei ah apai uh.
12019018	Hiaite pathian ahi kei him ua, mihing khut a bawl sing leh suang ahi zaw uhi. Huaiziak in mei a pailut in ahihmang uhi.
12019019	Huaiziak in tu in Toupa , ka Pathian uh aw, nang, nang kia Toupa Pathian na hi chih leitung a lalgam tengteng in atheihtheihna ding un akhut a pan hon humbit in,” achi hi.
12019020	Huai lai in Amoz tapa Isai in Hezekiah kiang ah, Toupa Israel Pathian in hichi in achi: Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib siatna ding a ka kiang a na thum ka za, chih gen ding in mi asawl hi
12019021	Amah tungtang Toupa'n agen hiai ahi: “Zion tanu nungak siangthou in nang hon musit in, ahon nuihsan a; Jerusalem tanu in alu hon sinkhum hi.
12019022	Kua na minsesak a, kua na gensia a? Kua tung ah ahia na aw na sansak a, na mit na hah sang? Israelte Mi Siangthoupa tung ah ahi.
12019023	Na misawlte zang in Toupa na minsesak a, ka kangtalai tampi toh Lebanon gamgi tang sangte ka hong tungtouta hi. Huai a sidar sing sang pipite leh taksing hoih pipite ka phuk dia; alei hoihna mun gammang a tenna mun ngil pen ah ka lut ding.
12019024	Gamdang tui ka laikhia a, ka dawn zel a, ka khepek nuai ah Aigupta lui tengteng ka kangsak vek ding, na chi hi.
12019025	“Keimah in nidanglai a pan huai ka hih ahihdan bang, ma lai a pan huai ka bawl ahihdan bang na za kei a hia? Khokulh neite in chinkhawm lel bang a hihsepa ding in nang ka hon septa hi.
12019026	“Huaiziak in asung a omte'n hatna anei kei ua, alauthawng ua, ahong zahlakta uhi. Gamlak loupa bang leh loupa hing bang leh intung a loupa bang leh buh alet ma a haivuai bang ahi uhi.
12019027	“Ke'n bel na tut, na lut, na pawt leh ka tung a na hehnate ka thei hi.
12019028	Ka tung a na heh ziak leh uangtak a na pau ka bil a ahong luttouh ziak in ka nakbulh na nak ah ka bulh dia, ka sikbah na muk ah; na hong kuanna lampi mahmah ah ka hon kiksak nawn ding,” chi in.
12019029	“Hiai nang a dia chiamtehna ahi ding. Tukum in buhsang na sen ding ua; kum nawn chiang in asang mah; kum thumna ah buh na tuh ding ua, at unla, grephuante bawl unla, agahte ne un.
12019030	Huchi in Judah inkote lak a khosuaksunte'n asuklam in zung akai ding ua, atoulam in agah nawn ding uhi.
12019031	Jerusalem a pan a omsunte Zion tang a pan akhosuaksunte apawtkhe ding uhi. Toupa phatuamngaihna in hiai ahih ding,” achi hi.
12019032	Huaiziak in Toupa'n Assuria kumpipa tungtang thu huchi in agen: “Hiai khopi ah ahong tung kei ding, hiai ah leng thal akap sam kei ding, lum toh akiang ah lah ahong pai kei ding a, akhozul ah lah lei ase sang kei ding hi.
12019033	Ahong kuanna lampi ah, huai mah ah anungkik nawn dia, hiai khopi ahong tung kei ding,” Toupa'n achi.
12019034	“Kei ziak leh ka sikha David ziak in hiai khopi humbit ding in ka veng ding,” chi in.
12019035	Huchi in huai zan in hichi ahong hi a, Toupa angel akuankhia a, Assuriate giahphual ah mi nuaikhat singgiat-le-sangnga athat a; zingkhang a ahong thoh uleh, ngai in, misi luang ngen ana om maimah hi.
12019036	Huchi in Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib apawt a, akik nawn a, apai zel a, Nineveh ah a-omta hi.
12019037	Apathian Nisrok inn a amah abiak lai in hichi ahong hi a, Adrammelek leh Sarezerte'n namsau in athat ua; huchi in Ararat gam ah atailutta uh. Huchi in asik in atapa Esarhaddon alalta hi.
12020001	Huai lai in Hezekiah, muanmohhuai in achi ana hi. Huchi in Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai akiang ah ahong a, akiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Na inkote omdan ding gel in; damkhe zou lou a si ding na hi ngal a,” achi hi.
12020002	Huchi in baang lam nga in akihei a, Toupa kiang ah,
12020003	“ Toupa aw, na ma a thutak leh lungtang hoihkim pu a ka omdan leh na mitmuh a thil hoih ka hihdan hehpih in theigige in,” chi in athum hi. Huchi in Hezekiah kah petmah in akap hi.
12020004	Isai huangsung intual laitak atun ma in hichi ahong hi a, Toupa thu akiang ah ahong tung hi.
12020005	“Kik nawn inla, ka mite heutu Hezekiah kiang ah gen in, Toupa'n , na pu David Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Na thumna ka za a, na khitui kia leng ka mu hi. Ngai in, ka hon damsak ding a; ani thum ni in Toupa' inn ah na hohtou ding.
12020006	Na damsung kumte kum sawm-le-nga in ka behlap dia; nang leh hiai khopi Assuria kumpipa a pan ka humbit ding.’ Keimah ziak leh ka sikha David ziak in hiai khopi ka hum ding, achi,” chi in.
12020007	Isai in, theipi gah beu khat hon la un, achi a; huchi in ahon la ua, ameimatum ah atat a, ahong dam nawnta hi.
12020008	Hezekiah in Isai kiang ah, “ Toupa'n ahon damsak dia, Toupa' inn ah ani thum ni in ka hohtou ding, chih chiamtehna bang ahi dia?” achi hi.
12020009	Isai in, Toupa'n athil gen ahih ngei ding chih hiai nang a ding in Toupa a pan chiamtehna ding ahi ding, “Limliap kalbi sawm tan, amailam a akintouh hia na deih, kalbi sawm tan a anunglam a akik?” achi hi.
12020010	Hezekiah in adawng a, “Limliap kalbi sawm tan amalam a kintouh abaih tel a, huai zaw hi kei henla, limliap kalbi sawm tan in nunglam ah nungkik zaw hen,” achi hi.
12020011	Huchi in zawlnei Isai in Toupa asam a; huchi in Ahaz dak zah theihna a limliap niamsa kalbi sawm tan in nunglam ah akiksak nawn hi.
12020012	Huai lai in Hezekiah chi ana chih ana zak ziak in Baladan tapa Babulon kumpipa Merodak-baladan in laikhakte leh thilpiakte Hezekiah akhak hi.
12020013	Huchi in Hezekiah in amau ana kipahpih a, athil manpha koihna inn a thil manpha tengteng, dangka, dangka-eng, gimlimte, sathau manpha, agalvan koihna inn teng leh agou koihkhawmna insung a om tengteng a-ensak a: a-inn leh agamsung a Hezekiah in a-etsak louh a-om kei hi.
12020014	Huai lai in zawlnei Isai kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah ahong a, akiang ah, “Huai mite'n bang ahia agen uh? Koi a pan na kiang a hong hoh ahi ua?” chi in adong hi. Hezekiah in, “Gam gamla, Babulon a kipan a hong hoh ahi uh,” achi hi.
12020015	Huchi in ama'n, “Na inn ah bangbang ahia amuh uh?” achi a; Hezekiah in, “Ka insung a om tengteng amu vek ua, ka gou lak ah ka etsak louh a-om kei,” chi in adawng hi.
12020016	Isai in Hezekiah kiang ah, “ Toupa thu ngaikhia in.
12020017	Ngai in, na insung a om tengteng leh tuni tan a na pi-le-pute'n ana kholkhawmte uh Babulon ah apaipih nite uh ahong tung ding; bangmah nutsiat anei kei ding uh Toupa'n achi.
12020018	Na gil a gah, na suan ding, na tapate ngei leng apaimangpih ding ua; Babulon kumpipa' inn ah michilgeh ahi ding uh,” achi hi.
12020019	Huchi in Hezekiah in Isai kiang ah, “Na gen Toupa thu ahoih ahi,” achi hi. “Ka damsung a lemna leh thutak a-om ding nakleh hoih himai lou hia?” achi hi.
12020020	Huchi in Hezekiah tanchin dangte, athilhihtheihdan tengteng leh dil leh tuilakna abawl a, khopi sung a tui alaklut thute Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12020021	Huchi in Hezekiah bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; atapa Manasseh asik in alal hi.
12021001	Manasseh alal pat tung in kum sawm-le-nih a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga-le-nga alal a; anu min Hephzibah ahi.
12021002	Toupa'n Israel suante ma a adelhkhiaksa namte, thilkihhuaitak ahihte uh bang, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih hi.
12021003	Apa Hezekiah in ahihsiatsa mun sangte adingsak nawn a; Israel kumpipa Ahab hih bang in Baal maitamte adingsak a, Asherahte abawl a, van a om tengteng bia in a-nna uh asem hi.
12021004	Toupa'n , “Jerusalem ah ka min ka omsak ding,” achihna Toupa' inn ah maitamte abawl hi.
12021005	Toupa' inn huangsung intual nihte ah van a om tengteng a ding in maitamte abawl hi.
12021006	Atapa mei ah apaisuaksak a, aisan leh bum ahih a, dawi zawlte leh kha napeuh adong hi. Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou thupi mahmah amah hehsak ding in ahih hi.
12021007	Toupa'n David leh atapa Solomon kiang a, “Hiai inn leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi tengteng lak a ka tel ah ka min tangtawn in ka omsak ding,” achihna mun ah Asherah lim khuaktawm atungkhia hi.
12021008	“Thu ka piak tengteng leh ka sikha Mosi in dan apiak tengteng zuih peuhmah uleh api-le-pute uh ka piaksa gam a pan Israelte khete leng ka kal ka suankhesak nawn sam kei ding,” achi hi.
12021009	Himahleh amau azui kei ua; Toupa'n Israel suante ma a delhkhiaksa namte hih sang tham a thupizaw thil hihkhial ding in Manasseh in mite alampialsak hi.
12021010	Toupa'n asikha zawlneite zang in thu agen hi.
12021011	“Judah kumpipa Manasseh in hiai thilkihhuaitakte ahih a, Amorte sang tham in ahihkhial thupi hi. Judahte'n leng amilimte a thil ahihkhelhsak ziak in,” achi hi.
12021012	Toupa , Israel Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai dih ua, Jerusalem leh Judah tung ah aza peuhmahte bil langnih khengzou khop in thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding hi.
12021013	Jerusalem tung ah Samaria tehna khau leh Ahab inkuan' ulum khai ka khung dia; mi'n akuangnul akilumletsak bang in Jerusalem ka nul ding hi.
12021014	Ka goutan khosuaksunte ka taisan dia, amelmate uh khut ah ka pe ding.
12021015	Huchi in api-le-pute uh Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawt nung uh tuni pha a ka mitmuh a thil hoih lou ahih ua, hon hehsak ziak un, amelma tengteng mat ding leh gallak ding ahi ding uh,” chi in achi hi.
12021016	Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih loutak hih a Judahte thil ahihkhelhsak, khelhna a sim lou in Manasseh in poi khoih lou sisan nakpitak in asuah lai a, Jerusalem dung leh vai adimsak hi.
12021017	Manasseh tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng, athilhihkhelhte Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12021018	Huchi in Manasseh api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a, Uzza huansung a om ama inn huan mah ah avui ua; asik in atapa Ammon alalta hi.
12021019	Ammon alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nih a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum nih alal a; anu min Mesullemeth, Jotbah a Haruz tanu ahi.
12021020	Apa Manasseh hih bangmah Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih loutak ahih hi.
12021021	Apa lampi tot tengteng atawn sam a, apa septe milimte nna sem in amaute abia hi.
12021022	Huchi in Toupa , api-le-pute Pathian apaisan a, Toupa lampi atawn kei hi.
12021023	Ammon sikhate'n amah aguksawm ua, kumpipa amah inn ah athatta uhi.
12021024	Himahleh huai gam a mite'n kumpipa Ammon guksawm mi tengteng athat vek uhi. Huchi in huai gam mite'n atapa Josiah asik in kumpipa in abawlta uhi.
12021025	Huchi in Ammon thilhih tanchin dangte Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah gelh ahi kei maw?
12021026	Uzza huan a amah han ah avui ua; asik in atapa Josiah alalta hi.
12022001	Josiah alal pat tung in kum giat a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum-le-khat alal a; anu min Jedidah, Boskath a Adaiah tanu ahi.
12022002	Ama'n Toupa mitmuh in thil dik ahih a, apu David lampi tot tengteng atawn a, taklam ah hiam veilam ah hiam apialkhe kei hi.
12022003	Kumpipa Josiah alal kum sawm-le-giatna kum in hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa'n Meshullam tapa Azaliah tapa laigelhmi Shaphan kiang ah,
12022004	“Siampu lianpen Hilkiah kiang ah hohtou inla, kongkhak veng mite'n mite a pan ana lakkhawm uh Toupa' inn a dangka kikoih sim uhenla;
12022005	Toupa' inn lam nasem mite pia uhen; amau inn se bawl Toupa' inn a nasemte pia uhen.
12022006	Singlem bawl mite, inn lam mite, inn sia bawl mite'n inn siatna tak bawlna sing leh suangsek aleitheihna ding un, chi in va gen in, chi in Toupa' inn ah asawl hi.
12022007	Himahleh dangka apiakte uh etpih nawn ding in agelhsak tuan kei, muanhuaitak a hih zel ahih ziak un,” achi hi.
12022008	Siampu lianpen Hilkiah in laigelhmi Shaphan kiang ah, “ Toupa' inn ah dan laibu ka mu,” achi hi. Hilkiah in huai laibu Shaphan apia a, ama'n asimta hi.
12022009	Kumpipa kiang ah laigelhmi Shaphan ava hoh a, kumpipa kiang ah thu ava tun nawn a, “Na mite'n inn a dangka omte apekhe vek ua, Toupa' inn lam nasem mite ape vek uh,” achi hi.
12022010	Laigelhmi Shaphan in, “Siampu Hilkiah in laibu ahon pia,” chi in kumpipa ahilh a, huchi in Shaphan in kumpipa ma ah asim hi.
12022011	Kumpipa'n dan laibu a thute azak in hichi ahong hi a, apuante abotkek hi.
12022012	Huchi in kumpipa'n siampu Hilkiah, Shaphan tapa Ahikam, Mikaiah tapa Akbor, laigelhmi Shaphan leh kumpipa sikha Asahiah kiang ah,
12022013	“Kei, mi tengteng leh Judah teng a ding in hiai laibu a thu tuang toh kisai in Toupa hon dotsak un. I pi-le-pute'n hiai laibu a thute zuih ding ana ngaihkhiak louh ziak un i tung uah Toupa thangpaihna athupi mahmah ngal a,” chi in thu apia hi.
12022014	Huchi in siampu Hilkiah, Ahikam, Akbor, Shaphan, Asahiah, puansilh kempa Harhas tapa Tikvah tapa Shallum zi zawlnei Huldah kiang ah ahoh ua, ava houpih uhi. Amah bel Jerusalem sehkhen nihna a teng ahi.
12022015	Ama'n akiang uah Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ka kiang a nou hon sawlpa hilh un,” Toupa'n hichi in achi:
12022016	“Ngai in, hiai mun ah leh asung a tengte tung ah thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding, Judah kumpipa'n laibu a, athusim tengteng bang in.
12022017	Kei ahon paisan ua, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, akhutsuak ua ahon thangpaihsak ziak un hiai mun ah ka thangpaihna nakpitak in akuang dia, amawkmih kei ding hi.
12022018	Himahleh Toupa thu dong ding a nou hon sawlpa Judah kumpipa kiang ah huchi in na chi ding uh. Toupa , Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Na thuzakte tungtang thu ah,
12022019	hiai mun leh asung a tengte hihgam leh hamsiat in a-om ding uh chih thu ka gen na zak a, na lungtang anem a, Toupa ma a na kiniamkhiak a, na puante na bohkek a, ka ma a na kah ziak in, ke'n leng na thu ka na za, Toupa'n achi.
12022020	Huchi in ngai in, na pi-le-pute kiang ah ka hon pi dia, na han ah lungmuangtak a pi in na om dia, hiai mun a thil hoih lou ka tunsak ding tengteng na mit in amu vek kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in huai thu kumpipa kiang ah atun nawn uhi.
12023001	Huan kumpipa'n mi asawl a, akiang ah Judah leh Jerusalem khopi a upa tengteng asamkhawm uhi.
12023002	Huchi in kumpipa Judah gam a mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a mi tengteng toh, siampute leh zawlneite toh, mipi tengteng toh, aneu leh alian in Toupa' inn ah ahohtou ua; Toupa' inn a kimu thukhun laibu a tuang thu tengteng abil ua zak in asim hi.
12023003	Khuam zul ah kumpipa adingh a, huai laibu a tuang thukhun thu hihkip ding in lungtang tengteng leh akha tengteng a Toupa zui ding leh athupiakte, athu theihsakte, adan thusehte zui ding in Toupa ma ah thu akhung a; huchi in mipi tengteng in leng akhunpih uhi.
12023004	Kumpipa'n siampu lianpen Hilkiah leh azom a siampute, kongkhak veng mite kiang ah Toupa tempul sung a Baal, Asherah leh van a om tengteng a dia kibawl tui-um belsuan tengteng lakhe vek ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in Jerusalem polam, Kidron mun ah huai tengteng ahal a, avute Bethel ah apaipih hi.
12023005	Milim pathian bia siampute, Judah Kumpipate'n Judah gam khopi mun sangte a, Jerusalem kim a gimlim hal dia ana seh uh atawpsak a; Baal a dia, ni a dia, kha a dia, aksite a dia van a omte tengteng a dia gimlim hal mite leng.
12023006	Toupa' inn a Asherah pen Jerusalem polam Kidron lui a lakhia in ahal a, asiknengawp a, anen mi vantangte han ah atheh hi.
12023007	Asherah a dia puan gan numeite omna, Toupa' inn kiang a pasal kizuakte omna innte aphelkhe vek hi.
12023008	Judah khopi a pan siampu tengteng apikhia a, siampute'n gimlim ahalna uh Geba a pan Beer-sheba pha in ahihbuah vek a; khopi kongpi veilam pang a om khopi ukpa Joshua kongpi ah alut a kongpite a mun sangte achimsak hi.
12023009	Mun sang siampute Jerusalem a Toupa maitam ah ahohtou kei ua, himahleh a-unaute uh lak ah tanghou silngou soh louh ane uhi.
12023010	Kuamah in atapa hiam atanu hiam Molek kiang a mei a apaisuaksak nawnlouhna ding in, Hinnom suante phaizang a Tophet ahihbuah hi.
12023011	Toupa' inn lutna a inn huangsung a kumpipa' inn vengmi Nathan-melek dantan chin a Judah kumpipate'n nisa a dia sakol apiakte uh alamang vek a; nisa kangtalai mei in ahal hi.
12023012	Ahaz inn chial tung a Judah kumpipate'n maitam abawlte uh leh Manasseh in Toupa' inn huangsung intual nih a maitam abawlte kumpipa'n ahihchim a, ahihnen vek a, anente Kidron lui ah apai hi.
12023013	Jerusalem ma a tatsiatna tang taklam pang a Zidonte pathian kihhuai mahmah Astoreth a dia, Ammon suante pathian kihhuai mahmah Khemosh a dia, Ammonte Pathian kihhuai mah Molek Israel kumpipa Solomon in mun sang abawlte kumpipa'n ahihbuah hi.
12023014	Milimte akitamsak vek a, Ashera ahihpuk a, huai munte ah mihing guhte akoih hi.
12023015	Huai lou leng Israelte thil hihkhialsakpa Nebat tapa Jeroboam in Bethel a maitam leh Israelte thil hihkhialsakpa Nebat tapa Jeroboam in abawl mun sang, huai maitam ahihchim a mun sang mei ahal in asikzan a, Ashera ahal hi.
12023016	Josiah akihei a, tang a hante amu a; huchi in han a guhte ava lasak a, huai thu Pathian mipa'n ana gen, Toupa thu bangbang in maitam tung ah ahal a, ahihbuah hi.
12023017	Huchi in ama'n, “Huai a ka muh kua suangphuh ahia?” achi a; khomite'n, “Pathian mipa, Judah gam a pan hong pai, Bethel a maitam tung a tua na hih a na genkholpa han ei ve,” chi in ahilh uhi.
12023018	Ama'n, “Bangmah chih kei un; kuamah in aguhte lasuan kei hen,” achi hi. Huchi in aguhte Samaria gam a pan zawlnei hong paipa guhte toh bangmah achih kei uhi.
12023019	Israel Kumpipate'n Toupa hehsak dia alam uh Samaria gam khua a mun sang inn tengteng leng Josiah in asuanmang a, Bethel a ahih vek bang geih in ahih hi.
12023020	Huchi in huai a mun sang siampu tengteng maitam tung ah athat a, huaite ah mihing guhte ahal a, Jerusalem ah akik nawnta hi.
12023021	Kumpipa'n mi tengteng kiang ah, “Hiai thukhun bu a tuang bang in Toupa , Pathian a ding in Paikan Ankuang zang un,” chi in thu apia hi.
12023022	Israelte tung a vaihawm mite'n vai ahawm ua kipan Israel kumpipa tengteng, Judah kumpipate lal sung hun teng in huchibang hial Paikan Ankuang azang ngei nai kei uhi.
12023023	Kumpipa Josiah lal akum sawm-le-giatna kum in Jerusalem ah Toupa a ding in hiai bang in Paikan Ankuang anei phet uhi.
12023024	Huai ban ah Toupa' inn a siampu Hilkiah in amuh laibu a thu tuangte akipsak theihna ding in dawi aisan siam zawlte, bumsiamte, pathian limte, Judah gam leh Jerusalem a thilkihhuai amuh tengteng Josiah in ahihmang vek hi.
12023025	Mosi Dan tengteng alungtang leh kha tengteng leh hatna tengteng a Toupa pom amah bang mahmah ama a kumpipate kuamah a-om kei ua; anung in leng amah bang kuamah a-om nawn sam kei hi.
12023026	Huchipi in leng Toupa'n athangpaihna thupi mahmah, Manasseh in ana thangpaihsakna tengteng ziak in Judah tung a athangpaihna akiheisan kei hi.
12023027	Toupa'n , “Israel ka suanmang bang in Judah leng ka muhphaklouhna ah ka suanmang sam dia, hiai khua ka tel Jerusalem ngei leh huai a inn ka min a-omna ding, ka chih ka paimang ding,” achi hi.
12023028	Huchi in Josiah tanchin dangte, athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah tuang ahi kei maw?
12023029	Amah alal lai in Assuria kumpipa dou ding in Euphrates Luipi ah Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh Neko ahohtou hi. Kumpipa Josiah in amah ana dou a; ama'n amuhtak in Meggiddo ah athat hi.
12023030	Huchi in asikhate'n Meggiddo a pan aluang kangtalai in apaipih ua, Jerusalem ah alutpih ua, ama han ah avui uh. Huchi in huai gam a mite'n Josiah tapa Jehoahaz api ua, thau anilh ua, apa sik in kumpipa in abawlta uhi.
12023031	Jehoahaz alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-thum a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kha thum sung alal a; anu min Hemutal, Libnah a Jeremiah tanu ahi.
12023032	Api-le-pute hih bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih hi.
12023033	Pharaoh Neko in Jerusalem a vaihawm thei nawn lou ding in Hamath gam a Riblah ah akoltangsak a; agam uh dangka talent zakhat leh dangka-eng talent khat siah akipesak hi.
12023034	Pharaoh Neko in Josiah tapa Eliakim, apa Josiah sik in alalsak a, amin Jehoiakim chi in akheksak hi. Jehoahaz bel apimang a; Aigupta gam ah apai a, huai ah asita hi.
12023035	Jehoiakim in dangka leh dangka-eng Pharaoh ape phot a; himahleh Pharaoh thupiak bang a dangka apiakna ding in agam siah aliausak hi. Pharaoh Neko kiang a piak ding in michih liau dia aseh zah chiat bang in huai gam a mite dangka leh dangka-eng aliausak hi.
12023036	Jehoiakim alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat alal a; anu min Zebudah, Rumah a Pedaiah tanu ahi.
12023037	Huchi in api-le-pute hihdan bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih hi.
12024001	Alal lai hun in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in huai gam ahong dou a, Jehoiakim bel asikha in kum thum a-om hi. Huai nung in alehngatsan a, atung ah ahelta hi.
12024002	Toupa'n Kaldai pawlte, Siria pawlte, Moab pawlte, Ammon suan pawlte amah sual ding in asawlkhia a, asikha zawlneite zang a agen Toupa thu bang in Judah gam hihsesak ding in asawl hi.
12024003	Manasseh khelhna, athilhih tengteng ziak a, amuh phaklouhna a amaute suanmang ding in, Judah tung ah Toupa thupiak ahong tung petmah hi.
12024004	Midik sisan asuah ziak in leng; midik sisan a Jerusalem ahihdim ziak in leng Toupa'n amah angaidam kei hi.
12024005	Huchi in Jehoiakim tanchin dang leh athilhih tengteng Judah kumpipate khangthubute ah tuang ahi kei maw?
12024006	Huchi in Jehoiakim bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmuta a; asik in atapa Jehoiakin alalta hi.
12024007	Aigupta kumpipa agam a pan ahong kuankhe nawn kei; Babulon kumpipa'n Aigupta gam lui a pan Euphrates Luipi pha a kumpipa gam huap tengteng alak zoh tak ziak in.
12024008	Jehoiakin bel alal pat tung in kum sawm-le-giat a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kha thum alal a, anu min Nehushta, Jerusalem a Elnathan tanu ahi.
12024009	Apa hihdan tengteng hih in, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih hi.
12024010	Huchih lai in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar sikhate Jerusalem ah ahohtou ua, khua ava um uhi.
12024011	Huchi a asikhate'n ava um lai un khua ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ava hohtou hi.
12024012	Huchi in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin, anu, asikhate, amiliante, aheutute toh Babulon kumpipa kiang ah ava pawtkhia ua; alal akum giatna kum in Babulon kumpipa'n ana man hi.
12024013	Toupa gen bang in, a-inn a gou tengteng leh kumpipa' inn a gou tengteng ala vek a, Toupa tempul a Israelte kumpipa Solomon in dangka-eng tui-um belsuan abawl tengteng asatgawp vek hi.
12024014	Jerusalem a mi tengteng, milian tengteng, mihat hangsan hoih tengteng, singkhat leh khutsiam leh siksekmi tengteng sal in api vek hi. Huai gam a migentheite chih louh kuamah a-omta kei uhi.
12024015	Jehoiakin bel Babulon ah api a; kumpipa nu, kumpinute, aheutute leh huai gam a mihatte Jerusalem a pan Babulon ah sal in api hi.
12024016	Babulon kumpipa'n pasal hoih tengteng sangsagih leh khutsiam leh siksekmi sangkhat, mihat hoih teng gal dou thei mi ngen Babulon ah sal in api vek hi.
12024017	Apa unaupa Mattaniah, Babulon kumpipa'n asik in alalsak a, amin Zedekiah chi in akheksak hi.
12024018	Zedekiah bel alal pat tung in kum sawmnih-le-khat a upa ahi. Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat sung alal a; anu min Hamutal, Libnah a Jeremiah tanu ahi.
12024019	Jehoiakim hihdan tengteng bang in ahih a, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou mahmah ahih hi.
12024020	Toupa hehna tawn in Jerusalem leh Judah tung ah Zedekiah, Babulon kumpipa tung a ahel a pan ama'n amuh phak louh dia apaihmang masiah hiai thilte ahong tungta hi.
12025001	Alal kum kuana kum, akha sawmna, ani sawm ni in hichi ahong hi a, asepaih tengteng toh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hong kuan in Jerusalem ahong dou a, om mun ava bawl a; kulh in a-umsuakta hi.
12025002	Hichi in kumpipa Zedekiah lal akum sawm-le-khatna tan in khua um in a-om hi.
12025003	Akha lina, ani kua ni in khua akial mahmahta a, huai gam mite a ding in tanghou a-om kei hi.
12025004	Khopi kulh ahihvang ua, zan in gal dou thei mi tengteng kumpipa huan ning, kulhbaang nih kikal a kulh kongpi ah ataikhe vek ua; Kaldaite'n khua a umsuak uhi; kumpipa Arabah lampi ah apai hi.
12025005	Himahleh Kaldai sepaihte'n kumpipa adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah apha ua; asepaih tengteng in amah taizaksan vek uhi.
12025006	Huchi in kumpipa aman ua, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Riblah ah api ua; atungtang thu angaihtuah uhi.
12025007	Zedekiah tapate amitmuh ngei in athat ua, Zedekiah mitte akhelkhiaksak ua, kol abunsak ua, Babulon ah apaipih uhi.
12025008	Huchi in Babulon kumpipa, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar lal akum sawm-le-kuana, akha ngana, ani sagih ni in Jerusalem ah Babulon kumpipa vengmi pawl heutu Nebuzaradan alut hi.
12025009	Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn ahal a; Jerusalem inn tengteng, inn thupi taktakte ahal hi.
12025010	Vengmi pawl heutu kiang a om Kaldai sepaih tengteng in Jerusalem kim a kulhte ahihchim vek uhi.
12025011	Khopi sung a nutsiat a om mite, Babulon kumpipa kiang a kipia mite leh mipi dang teng vengmi pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in sal in api vek hi.
12025012	Huai gam a azawng tatate lak a mite vengmi pawl heutu in grepgui kem ding leh lou bawl ding in anusia hi.
12025013	Toupa' inn a dalkhuamte leh atunnate leh dal limlang tuipi Kaldaite'n ahihkekgawp vek ua, adal Babulon ah apaipih uhi.
12025014	Belte, vutluahnate, khawnvak puantehnate, keute leh dal tui-um belsuan tengteng, nasepna dia azatte uh ala uhi.
12025015	Mei laknate, belkuangte toh, vengmi pawl heutu in dangka-eng abawlte bel adangka-eng ala a, dangkasik a bawlte adangka ala hi.
12025016	Solomon in Toupa' inn a dia abawl khuampi nih, tuikuangpi khat leh atunnate leh hiai vanzat tengteng bawlna dal buk theih vual ahi kei hi.
12025017	Khuam khat sandan tong sawm-le-giat ahi a, adawn ah dal sunbawk a-om a; huai sunbawk sandan tong thum ahi. Sunbawk kim ah agial tiktek leh theibuhfai atuang a, dal a bawl vek ahi uh. Huchi mah bang in khuampi khat leng agial tiktek hi.
12025018	Vengmi pawl heutu in siampu lianpen Seraiah leh azompa siampu Zephaniah leh kongkhak vengmi thum aman hi.
12025019	Galdou thei mite tung a heutu khat toh, kumpipa kiang a om khopi tung a om lai ngate toh, mipite mingelhpa sepaihte heutu laigelhmi toh, khopi sung a om lai gam a mi sawmguk toh khopi sung a pan aman hi.
12025020	Vengmi pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in amau api a, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Riblah ah apaipih hi.
12025021	Babulon kumpipa'n Hamath gam, Riblah ah amau ana that hi. Huchi in Judah, agamsung a pan sal a pikhiak in a-omta hi.
12025022	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah gam a anutsiat teng tung ah Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa Gedaliah ukpa ding in abawl hi.
12025023	Huchi in sepaih pawl heutu tengteng leh aheute'n Babulon kumpipa'n Gedaliah ukpa in abawl chih azak un Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah ahoh ua, huaite bel Nathaniah tapa Ishmael, Kareah tapa Johanan, Netophah mi Tanhumeth tapa Seraiah, Mak mi tapa Jaazaniah leh aheute ahi uhi.
12025024	Gedaliah huai mite leh aheute uh kiang ah akichiam a, akiang uah, “Kaldaite sikha a om lau kei un. Hiai gam ah teng unla, Babulon kumpipa na sem un, huchi in nou a ding in ahoih ding,” achi hi.
12025025	Himahleh akha sagihna ah hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa suan Elishama tapa, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel mi sawmkhat toh ahong kuan a, Mizpah a Juda mi leh Kaldai mi akiang a om teng leh Gedaliah ahong sual ua, athat vek uhi.
12025026	Huchi in mi tengteng aneu leh alian in sepaih heutute toh apawtkhia ua, Kaldaite alauh ziak un Aigupta gam ah apaita uhi.
12025027	Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin saltan akum sawmthum-le-sagihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, ani sawmnih-le-sagih ni in hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Evil-merodak in alal pat tung kum in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin atanna inn a pan akhahkhia hi.
12025028	Akiang ah hoihtak in thu agen a, Babulon a kumpipa om samte laltutphah tung ah alaltutphah akoihsang tuamse hi.
12025029	Atanna inn puansilhte akheng a, adamsung teng in akiang ah an ane gige samta hi.
12025030	Huchi in aloh ding, kumpipa'n apiak tatlak lou a-om a, adamsung teng in, niteng a azat ding abawlsak gige hi.

13001009	Kus tapate: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raamah leh Sabtekhah ahi uh. Raamah tapate: Seba, leh Dedan ahi uh.
13001010	Kush in Nimrod asuang a; amah lei ah mihat ahong hi pan hi.
13001011	Mizraim in Ludte, Anamte, Lahabte, Naphtuhte,

13001018	Arpakshad in Shelah asuang a, huan Shelah in Eber asuang hi.
13001019	Eber lak ah tapa nih apiang ua: khat pen min Peleg ahi (adam lai in lah lei akikhen ngal a), a-unaupa min Joktan ahi.
13001020	Joktan in Almodad, Seleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah;

13001022	Ebal, Abimael, Sheba;

13001024	Shem, Arpakshad, Shelah;
13001025	Eber, Peleg, Reu;
13001026	Serug, Nahor, Terah;
13001027	Abram, huai mah Abraham ahi.

13001030	Mishma, Dumah, Massa; Hadad, Tema,
13001031	Jetur, Naphish, leh Kedemah. Hiaite Ishmael tapate ahi uh.
13001032	Keturah, Abraham mei tapate: Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, leh Shuah ahi. Jokshan tapate: Sheba leh Dedan ahi uh.
13001033	Midian tapate: Ephah, Epher, Honok, Abida, leh Eldaah ahi uh. Hiaite tengteng Keturah suante ahi uh.
13001034	Abraham in Isak asuang hi. Isak tapate: Esau leh Israel ahi uh.
13001035	Esau tapate: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jaalam, leh Korah ahi uh.
13001036	Eliphaz tapate: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, leh Amalek ahi uh.
13001037	Reuel tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, leh Mizzah ahi uh.
13001038	Seir tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezar leh Dishan ahi uh.
13001039	Lotan tapate: Hori leh Homam; leh Lotan sanggamnu Timna ahi uh.
13001040	Shobal tapate: Alian, Manahath leh Ebal, Shephi leh Onam ahi uh. Huan Zibeon tapate: Aiah leh Anah ahi uh.
13001041	Anah tapa Dishon ahi. Dishon tapate: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran leh Keran ahi uh.
13001042	Ezer tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan leh Jaakan ahi uh. Dishan tapate: Uz leh Aran ahi uh.
13001043	Huchi in hiaite Israel suante tung a vaihawm kumpipate himhim a-om ma ua, Edom gam a vaihawm kumpipate ahi uhi. Beor tapa Bela, akhopi min Dinhabah ahi.
13001044	Bela asi a, huchi in Bozrah a Zerah tapa Jobab in asik in vai ahawm hi.
13001045	Jobab asi a, Teman mite gam a Husham in asik in vai ahawm hi.
13001046	Husham asi a, Bedad, Moab gam a Midian mi thattu, Bedad tapa Hadad in asik in vai ahawm a; akhopi min Avith ahi.
13001047	Hadad asi a, huchi in Masrekah mi Samlah in asik in vai ahawm hi.
13001048	Samlah asi a, huchi in lui kiang a Rehoboth a Shaul in asik in vai ahawm hi.
13001049	Shaul asi a, huchi in Akbor tapa Baal-hanan in asik in vai ahawm hi.
13001050	Baal-hanan asi a, asik in Hadad in vai ahawm a, akhopi min Pai ahi; huan azi min Mehetabel, Matred tanu, Mezahab tanu ahi.
13001051	Hadad leng asi hi. Edom hausa makaite: hausa makai Timnah, hausa makai Aliah, hausa makai Jetheth,
13001052	hausa makai Aholibamah, hausa makai Elah, hausa makai Pinon,
13001053	hausa makai Kenaz, hausa makai Teman, hausa makai Mibzar,
13001054	hausa makai Magdiel, leh hausa makai Iram; hiaite Edom hausa makaite ahi uhi.
13002001	Hiaite Israel tapate ahi uh: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakar, Zebulun;
13002002	Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad leh Asher.
13002003	Judah tapate: Er, Onan leh Shelah; huaite Shuah tanu Kanaan nu a kipan amah lak a piang thumte ahi uh. Huan Toupa mitmuh in Judah ta masapen Er agi kei a; amah athat hi.
13002004	Huchi in Tamar atapa zi in Perez leh Zerah asuansak hi. Judah tapate tengteng nga ahi uh.
13002005	Perez tapate: Hezron leh Hamul ahi uh.
13002006	Huan Zerah tapate: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Kalkol leh Dara: avek un nga ahi uh.
13002007	Huan Karmi tapate: Akar, thil siangthou a talekpa, Israel hihbuaipa.
13002008	Huan Ethan tapa Azariah ahi.
13002009	Hezron, amah lak a piangte leng; Jerahmeel, Ram leh Kelubai.
13002010	Huan Ram in Amminadab asuang a; Amminadab in Nahson, Judah suante lal asuang hi.
13002011	Nahson in Salma asuang a, Salma in Boaz asuang;
13002012	Boaz in Obed asuang a, Obed in Jesse asuang hi.
13002013	Jesse in ata masapen Eliab, anihna Abinadab leh athumna Shimea asuang;
13002014	alina Nethaneel, angana Raddai;
13002015	agukna Ozem, asagihna David.
13002016	Huan asanggamnute uh Zeruiah leh Abigail ahi uh. Huchi in Zeruiah tapate: Abishai, Joab leh Asahel, thum ahi uh.
13002017	Abigail in Amasa asuang a, huan Amasa pa Ishmael mi Jether ahi.
13002018	Huan Jezron tapa Kaleb in Azubah azi leh Jerioth lak ah tate asuang a; hiaite atapate ahi: Jesher leh Shobab leh Ardon.
13002019	Azubah asi a, Kaleb in amah a ding in Ephrath api a, huai in Hur aneihsak hi.
13002020	Hur in Uri asuang a, Uri in Bezaleel asuang hi.
13002021	Huai nung in Gilead pa Makir tanu kiang ah Hezron alut a; huai zi dia api lai in kum sawmguk a upa ahi; ama'n Segub asuansak hi.
13002022	Segub in, Gilead gam a khopi sawmnih-le-thum nei Jair, asuansak hi.
13002023	Ama'n amau a kipan Kenath leh huai a khoneite, khopi sawmguk toh Geshur, Aramin leh Jair khuate ala hi. Hiaite tengteng Gilead pa Makir tapate a ahi uh.
13002024	Huai nung in Kaleb-ephrathah ah Hezron asi a, huchi in Hezron zi Abia in Tekoa pa Ashur asuansak hi.
13002025	Huan Hezron ta masapen Jerahmeel tapate: ata masapen Ram, Bunah, Oren, Ozem leh Ahijah ahi uh.
13002026	Jerahmeel in zi dang anei a, amin Atarah ahi; amah Onam nu ahi.
13002027	Jerahmeel ta masapen Ram tapate Maaz, Jamin leh Eker ahi uh.
13002028	Onam tapate: Shammai leh Jada ahi uh. Shammai tapate: Nadab leh Abishur ahi uhi.
13002029	Abishur zi min Abihail ahi; ama'n Ahban leh Molid asuansak hi.
13002030	Nadab tapate: Seled leh Appaim ahi ua, Seled bel tate nei lou in asi hi.
13002031	Appaim tapa Ishi ahi. Ishi tapa Sheshan ahi. Sheshan tapa Ahlai ahi.
13002032	Huan Shammai unaupa Jada tapate: Jether leh Jonathan ahi ua; Jether ta nei lou in asi hi.
13002033	Huan Jonathan tapate: Peleth, Zaza ahi uh. Hiaite Jerahmeel tapate ahi uh.
13002034	Huchi in Sheshan in, tanute chih louh, tapate anei kei hi. Huan Sheshan in Aigupta mi khat sikha anei a, amin Jarha ahi.
13002035	Huan Sheshan in asikha Jarha kiang ah zi ding in atanu apia a; huchi in Attai aneihsak hi.
