13003023	Neariah tapate: Elioenai, Hizkiah, leh Azrikam, thum ahi uh.
13003024	Elioenai tapate: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Dalaiah, leh Anani, sagih ahi uh.
13004001	Judah tapate: Perez, Hezron, Karmi, Hur leh Shobal ahi uh.
13004002	Shobal tapa Reaiah in Jahath asuang; Jahath in Ahumai leh Lahad asuang hi. Hiaite Zorathit inkote ahi uh.
13004003	Huan hiaite Etam pa tapate ahi uh: Jezreel, Ishma, leh Idbash: huan asanggamnu uh Hazelelponi ahi.
13004004	Gedor pa Penuel ahi a, Hushah pa Ezer ahi. Hiaite Ephrathah ta masa, Bethlehem pa, Hur tapate ahi uh.
13004005	Tekoa pa Ashur in zi nih, Helah leh Naarah anei hi.
13004006	Naarah in Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, leh Haahashtari aneihsak hi. Hiaite Naarah tapate ahi uh.
13004007	Helah tapate Zereth, Izhar, leh Ethnan ahi uh.
13004008	Koz in Anub leh Zobebah, Harum tapa Aharhel inkote asuang hi.
13004009	Huan Jabez bel a-unaute sang in azahtakhuaizaw a: anu'n amin Jabez asa a, “Lungkhamna toh amah ka neih ziak in,” chi in.
13004010	Jabez in Israel' Pathian asam a, “Aw hon vualzawl mahmah in, ka gam liansak in, na khut ka kiang ah om in, hoih lou a kipan in kei hon kem in, hon lungkham saklouhna ding in,” chi in. Huchi in Pathian in anget aphalta hi.
13004011	Huan Shuhah sanggampa Kelub in Eshton pa Mehir asuang hi.
13004012	Eshton in Beth-rapha, Paseah, Irnahash pa Tehinnah asuang hi. Hiaite Rekah mite ahi uh.

13004014	Meonothai in Ophrah asuang; Seraiah in Geharasim pa Joab asuang; khutsiam mite chih in a-om uhi.

13004016	Jahaleleel tapate: Ziph leh Ziphah, Tiria leh Asarel ahi uh.
13004017	Ezra tapate: Jether, Mered, Epher leh Jalon ahi uh; huan Miriam, Shammai, leh Eshtemoa pa Ishbah anei hi.
13004018	Azi Jehudijah in Jered Gedor pa, Heber Sokoh pa, leh Jekuthiel Zanoah pa asuang hi. Huchi in hiaite Mered in api, Pharaoh tanu Bithiah tapate ahi uh.
13004019	Huan Naham sanggamnu, Hodiah zi tapate: Keilah pa Garmi, leh Maakah mi Eshtemoa pa ahi uh.
13004020	Simon tapate: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, leh Tilon ahi uh. Ishi tapate: Zoheth, leh Ben-zoheth ahi uhi.
13004021	Huan Judah tapa Shelah tapate: Lekah pa Er, Mareshah pa Laadah, leh puanmalngat hoih bawlte inkuante, Ashbea inkote;
13004022	Jokim, Kozeba mite, Joash, Saraph, Moab a vaihawmna nei, Jashubi-lehem. Huchi in chiamtehna laite alui mahmah hi.
13004023	Hiaite belvel mite leh Netaim leh Gederah a tengte ahi uh. Huai ah anasepna ziak in kumpipa kiang ah ateng uhi.
13004024	Simeon tapate: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul,
13004025	atapa Shallum, atapa Mibsam, atapa Mishma.
13004026	Mishma tapate: atapa Hammuel, atapa, Zakkur, atapa Shimei.
13004027	Shimei in tapa sawm-le-guk leh tanu guk anei a, himahleh a-unaute'n tate tampi anei kei ua, Judah tate bang in, a-inkote tengteng uh leng apung kei uhi.
13004028	Amaute Beer-sheba, Moladah leh Hazar-shual ah ateng ua;

13004030	Bethuel ah, Hormah ah, Ziklag ah;

13004033	Huai kim a khotate tengteng Baal pha in ahi. Hiaite atenna uh ahi a, khangthu suina anei uhi.

13004035	Joel, Joshibiah tapa Jehu, Seraiah tapa, Asiel tapa;

13004037	Shiphi tapa Ziza, Allon tapa, Jedaiah tapa, Shimri tapa, Shemaiah tapa;
13004038	Hiai minlohte a-inko sung ua vaihawmte ahi uh: huan apipute uh inkote akhang mahmah uhi.
13004039	Aganhon uh a dia loupa nek ding zong ding in, phaizang suahlam pang tanpha in, Gedor lutna chiang pha in apai uhi.
13004040	Loupa nek hoihna leh tamna amu ua, gam za leh dai, ban ah galmuang; tuma a huai a omte lah Ham a kipante ahi uhi.
13004041	Hiai min gelhte Judah kumpipa Hezekiah dam lai in ahong pai ua, apuaninte uh leh huai a om Meun mite asual ua, amaute ahihse vek ua, tuni tan in amun uah ateng uh; huai lai a agante uh a dia louhing a-om ziak in.

13005001	Huan Israel ta masapen Reuben tapate (amah piang masapen ahi a; himahleh apa lupna ahihbuah ziak in, piandan a u-pa hihna Israel tapa, Joseph tapate kiang a piak ahi; huchi in upatna dungzui in khangthu akisim kei hi.
13005002	A-unaute tung ah Judah avualzou a, amah a kipan in vaihawmtu ahong om a; himahleh upatna Joseph a ahi).
13005003	Israel ta masapen Reuben tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, leh Karmi.

13005019	Hagarit mite, Jetur toh, Naphish toh, Nodab toh akidou uhi.
13005020	Amaute dou ding in panpih in a-om ua, huchi in Hagarit mite akhut ua piak in a-om ua, akiang ua om tengteng toh; amau lah Pathian kiang ah kidouna ah akap ngal ua, Pathian in angetna uh aza a; amah a amuanna uh akoih ziak un.
13005021	Huchi in agante uh alamang ua; asangawngsau uh singnga, belam nuainih-le-singnga, sabiltung sangnih, mite nuaikhat.
13005022	Kidouna Pathian a ahih ziak in, mi tampi petmah apuk uhi. Huchi in saltanna tanpha in amun uah atengta uhi.
13005023	Huan Manasseh nam kimkhatte tate gamsung ah ateng ua: Bashan a kipan Baal-hermon leh Senir leh Hermon tang tan in apung uhi.

13007030	Asher tapate: Imnah, Ishuah, Ishuai, Beriah, Sheerah asanggamnu uh.
13007031	Beriah tapate: Heber, Malkiel, Birzaith pa.
13007032	Heber in Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham, Shua asanggamnu asuang hi.
13007033	Japhlet tapate: Pasak, Bimhal, Asvath. Hiaite Japhlet tapate ahi uh.
13007034	Shamer tapate: Ahi, Rohgah, Jehubbah leh Aram.
13007035	A-unaupa Helem tapate: Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, Amal.
13007036	Zophah tapate: Suah, Hernephar, Shual, Beri, Imrah;
13007037	Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, Beera.
13007038	Jether tapate: Jephunneh, Pispah, Ara.
13007039	Ulla tapate: Arah, Hanniel, Rezia.
13007040	Hiaite tengteng Asher tate ahi uh; pipute inkuan a lupente, mihat, mitel, hangsan, kumpi tapate lak a vaihawmte. Kidouna nasepna ding a khangthu sutna a sim in amau zah singnih-le-sangguk ahi uhi.
13008001	Huchi in Benjamin in ata masa Bela, azom Ashbel, athumna Aharah asuang;
13008002	alina Nohah, angana Rapha ahi.
13008003	Bela in tapate anei a, Addar, Gera leh Abihud;
13008004	Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah;
13008005	Gera, Shephuphan, Huram.
13008006	Hiaite Ehud tapate ahi uh: hiaite Geba a tengte pipute inkuan a lupente ahi uh, huchi in amaute Manahath ah sal in api uhi.
13008007	Naaman, Ahiah, Gera, amaute sal in api a; Uzza leh Ahihud asuang hi.
13008008	Shaharaim in amaute asawlmang nung in, Moab mun ah tapate asuang; azite Hushim leh Baar ahi uh.
13008009	Azi Hodesh a pan, Jobab, Zibia, Messa leh Malkam asuang hi;
13008010	Jeuz, Sakia, Mirma. Hiaite pipute inkuan a lupente, atapate ahi uhi.
13008011	Hushim lak ah Abitub leh Elpaal asuang hi.
13008012	Elpaal tapate: Eber, Misham, Shamed, Ono lamkhetu leh Lod, huai khopite toh lampa.
13008013	Beriah, Shema, Aijalon, Gath a tengteng delhzakte tengtengte pipute inkuan a lupente ahi uh;
13008014	Ahio, Shakshak, Jeremoth;
13008015	Zebadiah, Arad, Edar,
13008016	Beriah tapate Mikael, Ishpah, Joha.
13008017	Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hezeki, Heber;
13008018	Ishmerai, Jezliah, Jobab, Elpaal tapate,
13008019	Jakim, Zikri, Zabdi;
13008020	Elienai, Zilthai, Eliel;
13008021	Adaiah, Beraiah, Shimrath, Shimei tapate:
13008022	Ishpan, Heber, Eliel;
13008023	Abdon, Zikri, Hanan;
13008024	Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah;
13008025	Ipdeiah, Penuel, Shashak tapate;
13008026	Samserai, Shehariah, Athaliah;
13008027	Jaaresiah, Eliah, Zikri, Jeroham tapate.
13008028	Hiaite akhangte ua pipute inkuan a lupente ahi uh, ahausa makaipente: hiaite Jerusalem ah ateng uhi.
13008029	Gibeon ah Gibeon pa ateng a, azi min Maakah ahi:
13008030	Atapa masapen Abdon, Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab;
13008031	Gedor, Ahio, Zaker.
13008032	Mikloth in Shimea asuang hi. Anaute uh toh Jerusalem ah a-unaute uh zom ah ateng lai uhi.
13008033	Ner in Kish asuang; Kish in Saul asuang; Saul in Jonathan, Malki-shua, Abinadab leh Eshbaal asuang hi.
13008034	Jonathan tapa Merib-baal ahi a; Merib-baal in Mikah asuang hi.
13008035	Mikah tapate: Pithon, Melek, Tarea leh Ahaz ahi uh.
13008036	Ahaz in Jehoaddah asuang; Jehoaddah in Alemeth, Azmaveth leh Zimri asuang; Zimri in Moza asuang;
13008037	Moza in Binea asuang; Rapha atapa, Eleasah atapa, Azel atapa:
13008038	Azel in tapa guk anei a, amin uh hiaite ahi: Azrikam, Bokeru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah leh Hanan. Hiaite tengteng Azel tapate ahi.
13008039	Unaupa Eshek tapate: Ulam ata masa, Jehush a zom, Eliphelet athumna ahi.
13008040	Ulam tapate mihat hangsan, thalkap mite ahi uh, tapate' tapate, tupate tampi, zakhat-le-sawmnga ahi uh. Hiaite tengteng Benjamin tapate ahi uhi.
13009001	Huchi in Israel tengteng khangthu a sim in a-om ua; huan, ngai in, Israel leh Judah Kumpipate Laibu ah gelh in a-om uhi: atatlekna ziak un Babulon lam ah sal a pimang in a-om uh.
13009002	Amau tante akhopite ua teng masapente bel, Israel, siampute, Levi mite leh Nethinim mite ahi uhi.
13009003	Jerusalem ah Judah tate, Benjamin tate, Ephraim leh Manasseh tate ateng uhi.
13009004	Ammihud tapa Uthai, Omri tapa, Imri tapa, Bani tapa, Perez tapate ah Judah tapa.
13009005	Shilon mite; Asaiah piang masapen leh atapate.
13009006	Zerah tapate ah; Jeuel, a-unaute, zaguk-le-sawmkua ahi uh.
13009007	Benjamin tapate ah; Meshullam tapa Sallu, Hodaviah tapa, Hassenuah tapa;
13009008	Huan Jeroham tapa Ibneiah, Uzzi tapa Elah, Mikri tapa, Shephatiah tapa Meshallum, Reuel tapa, Ibnijah tapa.
13009009	A-unaute uh, akhangte uh dungzui in, zakua sawmnga-le-guk ahi uh. Hiai mite tengteng apipute uh inkote dungzui a alupente ahi uhi.
13009010	Huan siampute ah: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib; Jachin;
13009011	Hilkiah tapa Azariah, Meshullam tapa, Ahitub tapa, Pathian inn a vaihawmpa;
13009012	Jeroham tapa Adaiah, Pashur tapa, Malkijah tapa, Maasai Adiel tapa, Jahzerah tapa, Meshullam tapa, Meshillemit tapa, Immer tapa;
13009013	A-unaute uh, apipute uh lupente, sangkhat zasagih-le-sawmguk; Pathian inn a nasepna thilhihna ding a mihithei mahmahte ahi uh.
13009014	Huan Levi mite ah: Hashub tapa Shemaiah, Azrikam tapa, Hashabiah tapa, Merari tapate ah;
13009015	Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal, Mika tapa Mattaniah, Zikri tapa, Asaph tapa;
13009016	Shemaiah tapa Obadiah, Galal tapa, Jeduthun tapa, Asa tapa Berekiah, Elkanah tapa, Netophah mite khuate a tengte.
13009017	Huan kongkhak ngak mite; Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, a-unaute uh, Shallum bel amakaipen ahi.
13009018	Kumpipa kongpi suahlam pang ngak sek: Levi tate puanin a dia kongkhak ngak mite ahi uhi.
13009019	Kore tapa Shallum, Ebiasaph tapa, Korah tapa, a-unaute, apa inkote a, Korah mite, nasepna thilhihna a heutu ahi ua, biakbuk kongpite ngak mite: apipute uh Toupa puanin tung a heutu, biakbuk lutna ngak mite ahi uhi.
13009020	Eleazar tapa Phinehas hun paisa ah amaute tung a vaihawmpa ahi a, akiang ah Toupa a-om hi.
13009021	Meshelemiah tapa Zekariah kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak ngakpa ahi.
13009022	Hiaite tengteng kongpite kongkhak ngak mite hi ding a telte zanih sawm-le-nih ahi uh. Hiaite akhuate ua khangthu a simte ahi ua, asep ding uh bawlsa a David leh zawlnei Samuel in ahihkipsate ahi uhi.
13009023	Huchi in amau leh atapate un Toupa' inn kongpite, adandan in, biakbuk inn nangawn in akem uhi.
13009024	Apang lite ah, suahlam, tumlam, mallam, simlam ah kongkhak ngak mite a-om uhi.
13009025	A-unaute uh, akallak lak in ni sagih nite teng in amau kiang a om ding in ahong pai zel ding uh ahi:
13009026	Kongkhak ngakpipen lite lah, Levi mite, sep ding sehsa a om ahi ua, Pathian insung a dantante leh sumkoihnate tung ah heutu ahi uhi.
13009027	Huai lai a thupiak amau tung a a-om ziak in, Pathian inn kimvel ah agiak ua, zingsang teng in huai hon ding amau nasep ahi.
13009028	Huan alak ua kuate hiam in nasepna tui-um belsuante akem ua; alaklut uleh alakkhiak teng un aphazah asim gige uhi.
13009029	Alak ua khenkhatte vante, mun siangthoupen tui-um belsuan tangbuang nelte, uainte, sathaute begaw leh gimnamtuite kem ding a seh ahi uhi.
13009030	Siampute tapate lak a akhente gimnamtuite toh hel in abawl uh.
13009031	Mattithiah, Levi mite, Korah mi Shallum ta masapen lak a khat in belliangneite kan thilte tung a nasepna sehsa anei hi.
13009032	A-unaute uh lak a akhen, Sabbathte a bawl ding in, Kohath mite tapate'n tanghou akem uhi.
13009033	Hiaite lasa mite ahi ua, Levi mite inkote pipute inkuan a lupente, dantante sung ah ateng ua, sun leh zan in anasepna ua zat in a-om ua, nasepna dangte a kipan a-awl uhi.
13009034	Akhang pumpite uah, hiaite Levi mite pipute inkuan makaipente ahi uh, amakaipente: hiaite Jerusalem ah ateng uhi.
13009035	Huan Gibeon ah Gibeon pa ateng a, Jehiel, azi min Maakah:
13009036	Atapa masapen Abdon, Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab;
13009037	Gedor, Ahio, Zekariah, Mikloth.
13009038	Huan Mikloth in Shimeam asuang a, huchi in amau leng a-unaute uh toh Jerusalem ah, a-unaute uh zawn ah ateng uhi.
13009039	Ner in Kish asuang a; Kish in Saul asuang; Saul in Jonathan, Malki-shua, Abinadab leh Eshbaal asuang hi.
13009040	Jonathan tapa bel Merib-baal ahi; Merib-baal in Mikah asuang hi.
13009041	Huan Mikah tapate: Pithon, Melek, Tahrea leh Ahaz.
13009042	Ahaz in Jarah asuang; Jara in Alameth, Azmaveth leh Zimri asuang hi; Zimri in Moza asuang hi.
13009043	Moza in Binea asuang; Rephaiah atapa, Eleasah atapa, Azel atapa;
13009044	Azel in tapa guk anei a, amin uh hiaite ahi: Azrikam, Bokeru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah leh Hanan: hiaite Azel tapate ahi uh.
13010001	Philistia mite'n Israel adou ua; huchi in Israel mite Philistia mite ma ah ataikek ua, Gilboa tang ah thah in a-om uhi.
13010002	Philistia mite'n Saul leh atapate adelh vengveng ua; Philistia mite'n Jonathan, Abinadab leh Malki-shua, Saul tapate athat uhi.
13010003	Huchi in kidouna Saul a ding in ahaksa mahmahta a, thalkap mite'n amah aphata uh; huan thalkap mite ziak in alungkham mahmah hi.
13010004	Huchih lai in Saul in agalvan popa kiang ah, “Na namsau dokkhia inla, huai in hon dawt pailet in; huchi lou in zaw hiai zeksumlouhte hong pai in bawl louhlouh in ahon bawl kha ding uh,” achi a. Himahleh agalvan popa a-ut kei; alau mahmah ngal a. Huaiziak in Saul in anamsau ala a kisiatna in aneita hi.
13010005	Agalvan popa'n Saul asita chih atheih in, huai bangmah in ama'n leng anamsau kisiatna in azang a asita hi.
13010006	Huchi in Saul asita a, atapa thumte; huan a-inkote tengteng leng asikhawm vek uhi.
13010007	Guam a om Israel mite tengteng in sepaihte taikek leh Saul leh atapate asi uh chih amuh un akhopite uh anusia ua, ataikekta uhi. Philistia mite ahong ua huaite ah atengta uhi.
13010008	Azingsang in hichi ahi a, thahsate puante suah ding a Philistia mite ahong pai lai un, Gilboa tang ah Saul leh atapate apuk uh chih amu uhi.
13010009	Huan amah vante asuah ua, alutang ala ua, agalvan leng, amilimte uh kiang leh mite kiang ah tanchin puak ding in Philistia mite gamsung ah akhak kimvel vek uhi.
13010010	Huchi in agalvan apathiante uh inn ah akoih ua, Dagon tempul ah alutang atak uhi.
13010011	Jabesh-gilead tengteng in Saul tung a Philistia mite thilhih tengteng azak un,
13010012	mihangsante tengteng athou ua, Saul luang leh atapate luang ava lamang ua, Jabesh ah ahon pua ua, Jabesh a tosaw sing nuai ah aguhte uh avui ua, ni sagih an angawl uhi.
13010013	Huchi in Toupa tung a tatlekna hih a, Toupa thu azuih louh a, dawi zawl aisan siam thu adot ziak in Saul asita hi.
13010014	Huai a thu kan a, Toupa a kipan thu akan louh ziak in: huaiziak in amah athat a, lalgam Jesse tapa David kiang ah apeta hi.
13011001	Huchi in Israel tengteng Hebron ah David kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, “Ngai in, na guh leh na sa ka hi uh.
13011002	Tuma lam in, Saul mahmah kumpipa ahih lai in, Israel pikhia a pilut nang na hi a; Toupa na Pathian in na kiang ah, Israel ka mite na vak ding a, ka mite Israel tung ah lal na hi ding hi, hon chi,” achi uhi.
13011003	Huchi in Israel Upa tengteng Hebron ah kumpipa kiang ah ahong pai ua; huan David in Hebron ah Toupa ma ah amau toh thukhun abawlpih a; Samuel khut a Toupa thu bang in, Israel tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi.
13011004	David leh Israel tengteng Jerusalem, huai tuh Jebus ahi a, huai ah ahoh ua; huchi in Jebus mite, huai gam a tengte huai ah a-om uhi.
13011005	Huchi in Jebus a tengte'n David kiang ah, “Hiai lam a na hong louh ding ahi,” achi ua. Himahleh David in Zion kulh muanhuai ala a; huai mah David khopi ahi.
13011006	David in, “Kuapeuh Jebus mite that masa penpen alianpen leh heutu ahi ding,” achi a. Huan Zeruiah tapa Joab akuantou masapen a, huchi in amah alianpen a bawl in a-omta hi.
13011007	David bel kulh muanhuai ah ateng a; huaiziak in David khopi achi uhi.
13011008	Huchi in khopi abawlsuak vek a, Millo kimvel a kipan nangawn in: huchi in Joab in khopi dangte abawlhoih vek hi.
13011009	Akiang a sepaihte' Toupa a-om ziak in, David ahong thupi semsem hi.
13011010	Hiaite David neih mihatte lak a amakaipente ahi uh, Israel tungtang a Toupa thu bang zel a, amah kumpipa dia bawl ding a, Israel tengteng toh, agamsung a amah lak a ahatna uh taklangte.
13011011	Hiai David in aneih mihatte zah ahi: Jashobeam, Hakmon mi tapa, sawmthumte lak a makai lianpen; zathumte dou ding in ateipi alek a khatvei thu in amaute athat hi.
13011012	Amah nung in Dodo tapa Eleazar, Ahoh mi, mihat thumte lak a khat ahi hi.
13011013	Pasdammim ah David kiang ah a-om a, huai ah kidou tum in Philistia mite akikhawm ua, barli buh a dimna mun ah; Philistia mite ma a kipan in mite ataikekta uhi.
13011014	Huchi in huai mun laitak ah adingh ua, ahum ua, Philistia mite athat uhi; Toupa'n zohna thupitak in amaute ahondamta hi.
13011015	Heutu lian sawmthumte lak a thum suangpi a David kiang ah, Adullam kokhuk ah ahohsuk uhi; Philistia mite tampite'n Rephaim Phaizang ah puanin akai uhi.
13011016	Huai lai in David bel kohawm sung ah a-om a, Philistia mite kulhpi bel Bethlehem ah a-om hi.
13011017	Huchi in David in tui alunggulh a, “Aw kongpi kiang a om, Bethlehem tuileh tui dawn ding a hong pia mi khat omleh chi na ing e!” achi hi.
13011018	Huai thumte'n Philistia mite tampi lak aphu paisuak ua, kongpi kiang a om, Bethlehem tuileh a kipan tui ava tawi ua, ahon la ua, David kiang ahon tun uhi: himahleh David in adawn nuam kei a, Toupa a ding in abungkhe zaw hi.
13011019	“Hiai ka hih, ka Pathian in hon phal kei hen: ahinna uh lauhuaina a koih hiai mite sisan ka dawn ding hia? Amaute'n lah ahinna uh lauthawnna toh hon tawi uh ahi ngal ua,” achi hi. Huaiziak in adawn nuamta kei hi. Hiai thilte huai mihat thumte'n ahih uh ahi.
13011020	Abishai, Joab unaupa, huai thumte lak a khat ahi: ama'n zathumte dou ding in ateipi alik a amaute athat a, mi thumte lak ah min aneita hi.
13011021	Thumte lak ah, nihte sang in, amah azahtakhuai zaw hi, huchi in aheutupa ding ua bawl in a-om hi: hita mahleh thum masate zaw apha kei.
13011022	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah, Kabzeel a mihangsan, thilhih thupite hihpa tapa, Moab a Ariel tapate nihte athat a: apaisuk lai a, vuk kiak lai in kokhuk lak ah humpinelkai athat hi.
13011023	Aigupta mi athat a, milian mahmah, tong nga a sang; huan Aigupta mi khut a ateipi siamganmi chiam bang ahi; huchi in akiang ah chiangkhun toh ahohsuk a, Aigupta mi khut a kipan teipi ala a, amah mah teipi in ahihlumta hi.
13011024	Hiai thilte Jehoiada tapa Benaiah in ahih a, huchi in huai mihat thumte lak ah min anei hi.
13011025	Ngai in, sawmthumte sang in zahtakhuaizaw in a-om a, himahleh thum masate zaw apha kei, huchi in David in agalvil heutu in amah akoih hi.
13011026	Sepaih pawlte a mihatte: Joab unaupa Asahel, Bethlehem a Dodo tapa Elhanan;
13011027	Haror mi Shammoth, Pelon mi Helez;
13011028	Tekoa mi Ikkesh tapa Ira, Antoth mi Abiezer.
13011029	Husat mi Sibbekai, Ahoh mi Ilai;
13011030	Netophah mi Maharai, Netophah mi Baanah tapa Heled;
13011031	Benjamin tate Gibeah a Ribai tapa Ithai, Pirathon mi Benaiah;
13011032	Gaash luitate a Hurai, Arbath mi Abiel.
13011033	Baharum mi Azmaveth, Saalbon mi Eliahba;
13011034	Gizon mi Hasem tapate, Harar mi Shage tapa Jonathan;
13011035	Harar mi Sakar tapa Ahiam, Ur tapa Eliphal;
13011036	Mekerath mi Hepher, Pelon mi Ahijah;
13011037	Karmel mi Hezro, Ezbai tapa Naarai;
13011038	Nahtan unaupa Joel, Hageri tapa Mibhar.
13011039	Ammon mi Zelek, Beroth mi Naharai, Joab galvan pomi Zeruiah tapa;
13011040	Ithri mi Ira, Ithri mi Gareb;
13011041	Hit mi Uriah, Ahlai tapa Zabad;
13011042	Reuben mi Shiza tapa Adina, Reuben mite lak a makai lianpen leh akiang a sawmthumte.
13011043	Maakah tapa Hanan, Mithni mi Josaphat;
13011044	Asterath mi Uzzia, Aroer mi Hotham tapate Shama leh Jehiel,
13011045	Shimri tapa Jediael, Tiz mi a-unaupa Joha;
13011046	Mahavi mi Eliel leh Jeribai, leh Elnaam tapate Joshaviah, Moab mi Ithmah;
13011047	Eliel, Obed leh Mezoba mi Jaasiel ahi uh.
13012001	Huchi in hiaite Kish tapa Saul ziak a akihepmang lai a Ziklag a David kiang a hong paite ahi uh: huchi in kidouna a amah panpih mite mihatte lak ah a-om uhi.
13012002	Thalte in akigalthuam ua, suangkap leh thalpeu a thalkap ah khut taklam leh veilam azang thei ua; amaute Saul unau, Benjamin a kipan ahi uhi.
13012003	Amakaipen Ahiezer ahi, huan Joash, Gibeah mi Shemaah tapate: Azmaveth tapate Jeziel leh Pelet; Berkah, Antoth mi Jehu;
13012004	Gibeon mi Ishmaiah, sawmthumte lak a mihat, sawmthumte tung ah; Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan leh Geerath mi Jozabad;
13012005	Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah leh Haruph mi Shephatiah;
13012006	Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer leh Korahith mi Jashobeam;
13012007	Gedor mi Jeroham tapate Joelah leh Zebadiah ahi uh.
13012008	Gad mite ahihleh gamdai a kulh ah David lam ah akituamseh ua, mihangsan, kidouna a dia chilsa, lum leh teipi khoih theite; amaitang uh humpinelkaite maitang bang, mual a sazate bang a kin;
13012009	Ezer apipen, azom in Obadiah, Eliab athumna;
13012010	Mishmannah alina, Jeremiah angana;
13012011	Attai agukna, Eliel asagihna;
13012012	Johanan agiatna, Elzabad akuana;
13012013	Jeremiah asawmna, Makbannai asawm-le-khatna.
13012014	Hiai Gad tapate lak ate sepaihte heutute ahi uh: aneupen zakhat toh akikim a, alianpen pen sangkhat toh.
13012015	Hiaite Jordan lui piaute tui in atup lai a, akha khatna a kan a paite ahi ua; huchi in phaizang a om tengteng, suahlam leh tumlam tuaktuak, delhzakte ahi uh.
13012016	Benjamin leh Judah tate lak a mi, kulh ah David kiang ah ahong uhi.
13012017	Huchi in amaute tuak ding in David apaikhia a, amaute kiang ah, “Hon panpih dia lemna deih a ka kiang a hong na hih ualeh, nou a ding in ka lungtang phankhawm ahi ding; himahleh ka khut ah bangmah hiamgamna a-om kei chih thei a, ka galte a dia kei hon man ding a hong pai na hih uleh, ka pipute uh Pathian in huai en henla, sal hen,” achi hi.
13012018	Huai lai in sawmthumte lak a amakai lianpenpa, Amasai tung ah kha ahong tung a, “Nang David, Jesse tapa, nang a, nang lam a pang ka hi uh: na kiang ah muanna om henla, nang hon panpih mite kiang ah muanna: na Pathian in lah nang ahon panpih ngal a,” achi hi. Huai lai in David in amaute ana kipahpih a, pawl heutute ding in abawlta hi.
13012019	Manasseh a kipan in leng khenkhatte, hong taikhia in kidouna a Saul dou ding a Philistia mite toh hong pai in David lam ah ahong belh ua; himahleh amaute'n amaute apanpih kei uh. Philistia mite toupate'n thu hilh in amah asawlmang ngal ua, i lupente uh lauthawnghuaina ding in, “Saul, heutupa lam ah apukmang ding,” chi in.
13012020	Ziklag a David ahoh in, Manasseh a kipan amah lam ah hong puklut a-om ua, Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Mikael, Jozabad, Elihu, Zilthai, Manasseh a kipan sangkhatte heutute ahi uhi.
13012021	Huan galguk bawlte dou ding in David apanpih uh; amau lah mihat hangsante leh sepaih lak a heutute ahi ngal ua.
13012022	Sepaih pawl thupi, Pathian sepaih pawl bang a hong hih masiah uh niteng in David kiang ah amah panpih ding in ahong paikhawm uhi.
13012023	Hiaite Toupa thu bang a Saul gam amah a dia bawl dia kidou ding a kigalthuamte huaite lupente Hebron a David kiang a hong paite ahi uhi.
13012024	Judah tate lum leh teipi tawi theite sangguk-le-zagiat, kidou ding a kigalthuam.
13012025	Simeon tate ah kidouna ding a, mihat hangsante, sangsagih-le-zakhat.
13012026	Levi tate ah sangli-le-zaguk.
13012027	Jehoiada bel Aaron inkote pipa ahi a, amah toh sangthum-le-zasagih a-om uhi;
13012028	Tangval hat hangsan, Zadok leh apa inkote heutu sawmnih-le-nih.
13012029	Benjamin tate, Saul unaute, sangthum: amaute lak a thupi penpente Saul inkote lam ah aginom lailai uhi.
13012030	Ephraim tate ah singnih-le-zagiat, mihat hangsan, apipute uh inkote a miminthangte.
13012031	Manasseh nam kimkhatte singkhat-le-sanggiat, hong a, David kumpipa a bawl dia, min genkhiakte.
13012032	Issakar tate, hunte theihsiamna nei mite, Israel in bang ahih dia chih thei ding; amaute lupente zanih ahi uh; huan a-unaute tengteng uh amau thupiak in a-om uhi.
13012033	Zebulun a kipan, sepaih pawl kuankhe theite bang, kidouna van chi chih toh kigalthuamsa singnga; kidou ding a kigalthuamsa, lungsim thuah nih nei lou mite.
13012034	Naphtali a kipan heutu sangkhat, amaute kiang ah lum leh teipi tawi singthum-le-sangsagih.
13012035	Dan mite kidou ding a kigalthuamsa, singnih sanggiat-le-zaguk.
13012036	Asher a kipan, sepaih pawl akuankhe thei, kidou ding a kigalthuamsa singli.
13012037	Jordan lehlam gal ah, Reuben mite leh Gad mite leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte a kipan, kidouna a ding a kidouna vanzat chi chih toh nuaikhat-le-singnih.
13012038	Hiaite tengteng, kidoumi ngen hi in, kidou ding a kigalthuamsa, lungtang bukim toh Hebron ah David, Israel tengteng tung a kumpipa dia bawl ding in ahong pai ua: David kumpipa a bawl ding in Israel dang tengteng in lungkhat apu chiat uhi.
13012039	Huchi in huai ah David kiang a, ne leh dawn in, ni thum a-om uh; a-unaute un lah amau a ding in kisakna abawl ngal ua.
13012040	Huai ban ah Issakar, Zebulun leh Naphtali tanpha a teng amau kiangnai a omte'n, sabiltungte leh sangawngsaute leh sakol neute leh bawngtalte in tanghou ahon pua ua, an nek ding, theipi gah beute, grep minbomte, uain leh sathau, atam a tam bawngtalte leh belamte: Israel nopsakna thupi ahi.
13013001	Huchi in David in heutu leh makai chiteng, sangte leh zate heutute toh thu akikum uhi.
13013002	David in Israel kikhawmte tengteng kiang ah, “Hoih na sak ua, Toupa i Pathian ua kipan ahihleh, mun chiteng a Israel gam tengteng nutsiat a om i unaute kiang ah thu i khak ding ua, loupa munte nei akhopite ua akiang ua siampute leh Levi mite om, huchi a i kiang a ahong kikhopkhawm theihna ding un.
13013003	Huchi in i Pathian uh bawm i lakik nawn ding uhi; Saul hun lai in i na zong kei uhi,” achi hi.
13013004	Kikhawmpi tengteng in huchibang in i hih ding uh achi ua: mi tengteng mit ah huai thil dik ahi ngal a.
13013005	Huchi in David in Israel tengteng Aigupta gam luita Shihor a kipan Hamath lutna chiang pha in, Kiriath-jearim a kipan a Pathian bawm va la ding in amite akaikhawm hi.
13013006	Huchi in David, Israel tengteng toh, Baalah huai bel, Kiriath-jearim ah ahi, huai tuh Judah gam ahi a, huai a kipan a Pathian, Toupa Cherubte tung a tupa, aminlohna om va la ding in akuantou hi.
13013007	Pathian bawm kangtalai thak in apua ua, Abinadab inn a kipan alakhia ua: huchi in Uzza leh Ahio in ahawl uhi.
13013008	Huchi in David leh Israel tengteng Pathian ma ah ahatna tengteng un late, kaihgingte, pekging gui sawm neite, khuangtate, dakkhutbette leh pengkulte toh lopna bawl in a-om uhi.
13013009	Huan Chidon buhchilna phual ahong tun un, bawngtalte akisuih man un, Uzza in bawm len ding in akhut in asawk hi.
13013010	Uzza tung ah Toupa hehna asouta a, bawm a akhut akhoih ziak in, amah ahihlumta hi: huchi in Pathian ma ah asita hi.
13013011	Toupa Uzza tung a apuahkhap ziak in, David alungkim kei hi: huchi in huai lai tuni tan in, Perez-uzzah achita hi.
13013012	Huai ni in David in Pathian akihta a, bangchi in Pathian bawm inn ka kitun thei dia? chi in.
13013013	Huchi in ama'n akiang a, David khopi sung ah bawm apolut kei a, Git mi Obed-edom insung ah apolut zawta hi.
13013014	Pathian bawm bel kha thum Obed-edom inkote kiang ah insung ah a-om a: huchi in Toupa'n Obed-edom leh aneih tengteng avualzawlta hi.
13014001	Huchi in Tura kumpipa Hiram in David kiang ah sawltak mite asawl a, sidar singte, suangsek mite, khutsiam mite, inn lamsak ding in.
13014002	David in Israel tung ah Toupa'n amah kumpipa in akoihkipta chih athei a, agam lah, ami Israelte, sangpi a tawisang in a-omta hi.
13014003	David in Jerusalem ah zite tamsem api a: huchi in David in tapate leh tanute tamsem asuangta hi.
13014004	Hiaite Jerusalem a aneih tate minte ahi; Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon;
13014005	Ibhar, Elishua, Elpalet;
13014006	Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia;
13014007	Elishama, Beeliada, Eliphalet.
13014008	Philistia mite'n Israel tengteng tung ah kumpipa a David thaunilh ahi chih azak un, David zong ding in Philistia mite tengteng akuantou ua: David in huai azak in, amaute dou ding in akuankheta hi.
13014009	Philistia mite ahong ua, Rephaim Phaizang atuam uhi.
13014010	Huchi in David in Pathian adong a, “Philistia mite dou ding in ka kuantou diam? Amau ka khut ah na hon pe diam?” chi in. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Kuantou in; na khut a amaute hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi.
13014011	Huchi in Baal-perazim ah ahong tou ua, David in amau athat a; huchi in David in, “Pathian in tui khah bang in ka khut in ka melmate ahihsia,” achi a. Huaiziak in huai mun min ding in Baal-perazim asa hi.
13014012	Huai ah apathiante uh anusia ua; David in thupiak apia a, mei in ahal uhi.
13014013	Huchih nung in Philistiate'n phaizang atuam nawn lai uhi.
13014014	David in Pathian thu adong nawn a; Pathian in akiang ah, “Amau delh ding in na kuantou kei ding: amau kihei mangsan inla, singtheimi singte zawntak ah amau sual in,” achi hi.
13014015	“Singthei mi singte dawn a taiging na zak chiang in; huai chiang in kidou ding in na kuankhe ding hi: Philistia mihonte that ding in na ma ah Pathian akuankheta chihna ahi ding hi,” achi hi.
13014016	Huchi in Pathian in amah thu apiak bang in David in ahih a: Gibeon a kipan Gezer pha in Philistia mihonpi athatta uhi.
13014017	Huan gam tengteng ah David min athangkheta a; huchi in Toupa'n nam tengteng tung ah amah launa atungsakta hi.
13015001	Huchi in David khopi sung ah David in innte akibawl a; Pathian bawm a ding in mun abawl a, puanin akaihsakta hi.
13015002	Huai lai in David in, “Levi mite chih louh kuamah in Pathian bawm apo ding ahi kei: Toupa'n lah amau Pathian bawm po ding leh tangtawn a amah nna sepsak ding in amaute ana telta ngal a,” achi hi.
13015003	Amun abawlsaksa a Toupa bawm hon latou ding in, David in Jerusalem ah Israel tengteng akaikhawmta hi.
13015004	Huchi in David in Aaron tapate leh Levi mite akhawm a;
13015005	Kohath tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Uriel leh a-unaute za-le-sawmnih;
13015006	Merrari tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Asaiah leh a-unaute zanih-le-sawmnih;
13015007	Gershom tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Joel leh a-unaute za-le-sawmthum;
13015008	Elizaphan tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Shemaiah leh a-unaute zanih;
13015009	Hebron tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Eliel leh a-unaute sawmgiat;
13015010	Uzziel tapate lak ah: amakai lianpen Amminadab leh a-unaute za-le-sawm-le-nih.
13015011	David in Zadok leh Abiathar siampute, Levi mite, Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel leh Amminadab asamsak a,
13015012	akiang uah, “Noute Levi mite pipute inkuan a lupente na hi ua: kihihsiang unla, nou leh na unaute uh, mun ka bawlsaksa a Israel' Pathian, Toupa bawm na laktheihna ding un.
13015013	Atung a pan hih ding achih bang a amah i zon louh ziak un, i tung uah Toupa i Pathian apuakzak hi,” achi hi.
13015014	Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite, Israel' Pathian, Toupa bawm latou ding in akisiangsak uhi.
13015015	Huchi in Toupa thu bangbang a Mosi in thu apiak bang in Levi tate'n aliangzang uah huai a chiangtawnte in Pathian bawm azawngta uhi.
13015016	David in Levi mi makaipente kiang ah a-unaute uh lasa mite tumging theihte toh, pekging gui sawm neite leh kaihgingte leh dakkhutbette, ngaihtak a ging leh nuamsa a aw suah ding sep ding in ahilh hi.
13015017	Huchi in Levi mite'n Joel tapa Heman asep ua; a-unaute lak ah, Asaph Berekiah tapa; huan Merari tapate a-unaute uh lak ah, Kusaiah tapa Ethan;
13015018	amau toh a-unaute uh pawl nihnate, Zekariah, Ben, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattithiah, Eliphelehu, Mikneiah, Obed-edom, Jeiel, kongkhak ngak mite.
13015019	Huchi in lasami, Heman, Asaph, Ethente seh in a-omta ua, ngaihtak a tum ding, dal dakkhutbette toh;
13015020	Zekariah, Aziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah, Benaiah, pekging gui sawm neite Alamoth toh kituak a bawl toh;
13015021	Mattithiah, Eliphelehu, Mineiah, Obed-edom, Jeiel, Azaziah, kaihgingte Sheminith toh bawl, makai ding in.
13015022	Huan Kenaniah, Levi mite lak a amakai lianpen, lapu in apang a: asiam ziak in, la hilh in apang hi.
13015023	Berekiah leh Elkanah bawm a dia kongkhak ngak mite in a-om uhi.
13015024	Shebaniah, Josaphat, Nethaneel, Amasai, Zekariah, Benaiah, Eliezer, siampute'n, Pathian bawm ma ah pengkulte amut ua: Obed-edom leh Jehiah tuh bawm a dia kongkhak ngakte ahi uhi.
13015025	Huan David leh Israel Upa, sangte tung a heutute, Obed-edom inn a kipan Toupa'n thukhun bawm latou ding in nuamsatak in akuanta uhi.
13015026	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian in Toupa bawm zawng Levi mite apanpih ziak in, amau bawngtal sagih leh belamtal sagih in akithoih uhi.
13015027	David, puanmalngat hoih puanaktual in akizem a, bawm zawng Levi mi tengteng leh lasa mite leh la heutupa Kenaniah lasa mite toh, huchi in David in puanmalngat siampu lian puanak asilh hi.
13015028	Huchibang in Israel tengteng in Toupa thukhun bawm kikou kawm leh pengkul ging binei toh, pengkulte toh, dakkhutbette toh pekging gui sawm neite leh kaihgingte ngaihtak a ging toh, ahon latouta uhi.
13015029	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa thukhun bawm David khopi ahong tun in, Saul tanu Mikal tohlet ah adakkhia a, David lam leh mawl amuta a; alungtang in amusit hi.
13016001	Huchi in Pathian bawm ahon lalut ua, David in abawlsak, puanin laizang ah akoihta ua, Pathian ma ah halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan uhi.
13016002	David in halmang thillat leh lemna thillatte alat khit in Toupa min in mite avualzawl hi.
13016003	Israel michih kiang ah, pasal leh numei michih kiang ah tanghou beu khat, sa bak khat leh grep min gaw beu khat ahawm hi.
13016004	Huchi in Toupa bawm mai a nasem ding leh Toupa , Israel' Pathian kipahpih ding, kipahthu gen ding leh phat ding in Levi mite lak a kuate hiam asepta hi:
13016005	Amakai lianpen Asaph, amah zom in Zekariah, Shemiramoth, Jeiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed-edom, Jeiel, pekging gui sawm neite leh kaihgingte toh; Asaph dakkhutbette, ngaihtak a ging toh;
13016006	Benaiah leh Jahaziel siampute Pathian thukhun bawm ma a, om nilouhte toh.
13016007	Huchi in huai ni in David in, Asaph leh a-unaute khut ah, Toupa kiang a kipahthute gen ding ahihkip masa penpen hi.
13016008	Aw Toupa kiang ah kipahthute gen unla, amin lou un; mite lak ah athilhihte theisak un.
13016009	Amah mai ah la sa unla, phatna late sa un; anasep lamdangte tengteng thu in houlim un.
13016010	Amin siangthou suang unla: Toupa zongte lungtang kipak hen.
13016011	Toupa leh ahatna zong unla; amel zong nilouh un.
13016012	Ahih khitsa athillamdangte theigige unla; alamdannate leh, akam a vaihawmte;
13016013	Aw nou asikha Israel chi, nou amitel, Jakob tate.
13016014	Amah Toupa i Pathian ahi: ama'n leitung pumpi vai ahawm hi.
13016015	Tangtawn in athukhun theigige unla, suan sangkhatte kiang a apiak athu;
13016016	Thukhun Abraham toh abawl, Isak kiang a athuchiam;
13016017	Huai mah dan thuseh ding in Jakob kiang ah ahihkip a, Israel kiang ah tangtawn thukhun ding in;
13016018	“Na kiang ah Kanaan gam, na goutan tuan, ka hon pe ding,” chi in;
13016019	Mi tawmchik phet na hih lai un; ahi, tawmchik mahmah, asung a mikhual in;
13016020	Nam dangdang kiang ah abanhoh ua, gam dangdang a kipan in mi tuamtuamte kiang ah.
13016021	Kuamah nuaisiah aphal kei a; ahi, amaute ziak in kumpipate leng asal hi;
13016022	“Ka thaunilhte khoih kei unla, ka zawlneite leng hihna kei un,” chi in.
13016023	Leitung luahte tengteng aw, Toupa pahtawi in la sa unla, niteng in ahotdamna thu theisak un.
13016024	Namte lak ah athupidan gen unla, michihte lak ah athilhih lamdangte genzak un.
13016025	Toupa lah athupi a, nakpi mahmah a phat ding ahih ziak in pathian tengteng sang a kihtak ding ahi.
13016026	Michih pathiante milim ahi ua; Toupa'n bel vante abawl hi.
13016027	Pahtawina leh thupina ama ah a-om a; hatna leh kilawmna ama mun ah a-om hi.
13016028	Michih a chichihte aw, Toupa kiang ah pia unla, Toupa thupina leh hatna pia un.
13016029	Toupa amin thupina pia unla, thillat ding tawi unla, ama ah hong pai un; siangthou kilawmna in Toupa bia un.
13016030	Leitung tengteng aw, ama ah ling un; khovel leng alin theihlouhna ding in hihkip in a-om hi.
13016031	Vante kipaktak in om uhenla, leitung leng nuamsatak in om hen; namte lak ah “ Toupa'n vai ahawm,” chi uhen.
13016032	Tuipi leh asung a thil om tengteng ging honhon henla; gam leh asung a om tengteng kipaktak in om hen;
13016033	Huai hun chiang in gamnuai a sing tengteng in Toupa ma ah nuamsa in la asa ding ua, leitung vaihawm ding in ahong pai sin ngal a.
13016034	Aw Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un, amah lah ahoih ngal a; achitna lah tangtawn a om ding ahi ngal a.
13016035	“Aw, ka hotdamna uh Pathian, hon hondam inla, na min siangthou phat ding leh na phatna suang ding in, namte lak a kipan hon pikhawm inla, hon humbit in,” chi un.
13016036	Israel' Pathian Toupa phat in om hen, tangtawn a kipan tangtawn dong in. Mipi tengteng in, Amen, chi in Toupa aphatta uhi.
13016037	Huchi in huai a Toupa thukhun bawm ma a niteng a akuldan bang zel a nasem ding in Asaph leh a-unaute akoihta a;
13016038	Obed-edom leh a-unau uh sawmguk-le-giatte toh; Jeduthun tapa Obed-edom leh Hosah bel kongkhak ngakmi ahi uhi;
13016039	Huan Zadok siampu leh a-unaute siampute, Gibeon a om mun sang a Toupa biakbuk ma a,
13016040	zingsang leh nitak a halmang thillat maitam tung a Toupa a dia halmang thillatte lan gige ding in, Israel kiang ah thupiak a piak Toupa , dan sung a kigelh dungzui in;
13016041	Azahngaihna tangtawn a a-om ziak in Toupa kiang a kipahthu gen ding Heman leh Jeduthun leh midang min loh a telkhiakte toh;
13016042	Heman leh Jeduthun in Pathian lasakna dia vanzatte, pengkulte leh dakkhutbette, ngaihtak a ginsak dingte anei ua; kongkhak ngakmi ding Jeduthun tapate toh.
13016043	Huchi in mipi tengteng amau inn lam chiat ah apaita ua; huan David leng a-inkote vualzawl ding in apai sam hi.
13017001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, David a-inn a a-om lai in zawlnei Nathan kiang ah David in, “Ngai in, kei sidar sing inn ah ka om a, himahleh Toupa thukhun bawm puanzak nuai maimah ah a-om a,” achi hi.
13017002	Nathan in David kiang ah, “Na lungsim a na vei bangtak in hih in; Pathian na kiang ah lah a-om ngal a,” achi hi.
13017003	Huai zan mah in hichi ahong hi a, Nathan kiang ah Pathian thu ahong tung hi,
13017004	“Ka sikha David va hilh in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ka omna ding in nang inn na hon lamsak ding ahi kei;
13017005	Israel suante Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak a kipan tutan in inn lam ah ka om kei a; puanin leh biakbuk ah ka om zel hi.
13017006	Israel tengteng toh ka paina himhim uah leng ka mite vak ding a thu ka piak Israelte vaihawmte kiang ah, bangziak a sidar sing inn hon lamsak lou, ka chi ngei a hia?’
13017007	“Huaiziak in ka sikha David kiang ah huchi in gen in, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi, belam tatna mun a kipan na belamching lai ka mi Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in ka hon la a;
13017008	na paina peuhmah ah na kiang ah ka om zel a, na melmate ka hon hihmansak zel hi; lei a mithupi mahmahte bang in min thupitak ka hon bawlsak sin hi.
13017009	Ka mi Israelte a ding in mun ka sepsak ding a, kisuan nawn lou a amau tuam mun a a-om gige theihna ding un amaute ka phutkip ding a, tuma lam a bang in, migiloute'n amaute ahihgenthei nawn kei ding uh;
13017010	ka mi Israelte tung a vaihawmte ka seh hun a kipan. Huan na melma tengteng leng ka zahlaksak lai ding hi. Huai lou leng Toupa'n inn khat ahon lamsak lai ding chih ka hon hilh ahi.
13017011	Huchi in na ni abei a, na pi-le-pute kiang a na pai hun chiang in, hichi ahi ding a, na nung a na suan na tapate lak a mi ka tungding ding a; agam ka hihkip ding hi.
13017012	Ama'n inn ahon lamsak ding a; alaltutphah tangtawn in ka hihkip ding.
13017013	Huchi in apa ka hi ding a, amah ka tapa ahi ding; ka zahngaihna na ma a ompa a kipan a ka lakmang bang in, amah zaw ka lamang kei ding hi;
13017014	Ka inn ah leh ka gam ah amah tangtawn in ka dingkipsak ding a, alaltutphah tangtawn a hihkip ahi ding,” chi in.
13017015	Huai thute tengteng leh huai kilakna bang geih in Nathan in David kiang ah agen hi.
13017016	Huchi in kumpipa David alut a, Toupa ma ah atu a, “Aw Toupa Pathian, kua ahia ka hih a, ka inkote leng kua ahia ahih ua, hichi tantan na hon pi?
13017017	Aw Pathian, huaite leng nang mitmuh in thil neuchik phet zaw ahi a; himahleh aw Toupa Pathian, na sikha inkuan hong omdan ding thu kum tampi sung a ding na na genta a, milian bang in na hon sep lai a, aw Toupa Pathian.
13017018	Na sikha pahtawi a a-om tungtang thu ah David in na kiang ah bang agen tuan nawn dia? Na sikha lah na theitel mahmah hi.
13017019	Aw Toupa na sikha ziak in nangmah lungsim a pawt bang zel in hiai thil thupi mahmah theisak ding in thil thupi mahmahte na hihta hi.
13017020	Aw Toupa ka theih un nang bang mahmah a-om kei ua, nang lou ngal Pathian himhim leng a-om sam kei hi.
13017021	Aigupta gam a kipan na tatkhiak a na mite ma a namdangte zahlaksak a, thil thupitak leh lauhuaitak hih a min thupitak bawlsak ding a Pathian in amah mite a dia ahon tatkhiak na mi Israelte bang mahmah leitung ah namdang kua a-om ua?
13017022	Na mi Israelte tangtawn a na mite ding in lah na bawlta ngal a; nang Toupa amaute Pathian na hita hi.
13017023	“Huchi in aw Toupa , na sikha tungtang thu leh a-inkote tungtang thu na gen tangtawn a ding in hihkip inla, na gensa bang in hih in.
13017024	Tangtawn in na min hihkip leh hihlet in om hen, ‘Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian, Israelte a dia Pathian mahmah ahi,’ na sikha David inkote na ma ah hihkip in om uhen,” chi in.
13017025	“Aw nang ka Pathian, na sikha kiang ah inkuan na dingsak ding chih na na puangta ngal a; huaiziak in na sikha in na kiang ah ka thum ngam lai ahi.
13017026	Aw Toupa , nang zaw Pathian na hi a, hiai thil hoih na sikha na chiamta hi.
13017027	Na sikha inkote na ma a tangtawn a a-om gige theihna ding un na vualzawl a; aw Toupa , na vualzawl zaw tangtawn a vualzawlna ahi,” achi hi.
13018001	Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David in Philistia mite asual a, azou a, Gath khua leh akhotate Philistia mite asuhsak hi.
13018002	Moabte asual nawn a, Moab mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, siah ape zel uhi.
13018003	Euphrates Luipi a agam kipsak ding a David apai kawm in Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer leng Hamath chin ah asual nawn hi.
13018004	Huchi in David in kangtalai sangkhat leh sakol tungtuangmi sangsagih leh sepaih singnih amatsak a; David in kangtalai kaimi sakol tengteng thagui asattansak a, kangtalai zakhat kai ding bel ahawi hi.
13018005	Huan Damaskas a Siria mite Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer huh ding in ahong kuan ua, David in Siria mi singnih-le-sangnih athat hi.
13018006	Huchi in David in Damaskas a Siria mite lak ah asepaihte akoih a; huchi in Siria mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, siah ape zel uhi.
13018007	David in Hadadezer pawlte dangka-eng lumte alaksak a, Jerusalem ah apaipih hi.
13018008	Hadadezer khua Tibhath leh Chun a kipan David in dal tampi apua a, huaite in Solomon in dal lohte, atunnate, dal tui-um belsuante abawl hi.
13018009	Huchi in Hamath kumpipa Tou in Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer sepaih tengteng David in azou chih azak in,
13018010	Hadadezer asim a, athah ziak a chibai buk ding leh kipahpih ding in David kiang ah atapa Hadoram asawl a; Hadadezer leh Toute lah kidou sek ahi ngal ua; dangka-eng leh dangkasik leh dal tui-um belsuan chi chih leng atawisak lai hi.
13018011	Hiaite leng David in namdang azoh tengteng Edom, Moab, Ammon suante, Philistiate, leh Amalekte lak a pan dangkasik leh dangka-eng alakte toh Toupa kiang ah alan hi.
13018012	Huai lou leng, Zeruiah tapa Abishai in Edomte singkhat-le-sanggiat Chi Phaizang ah athat hi.
13018013	Edom gam ah sepaihte akoih a; huchi in Edom mi tengteng David sikhate ahong hita uh. Toupa'n David apaina peuh ah azousak zel hi.
13018014	Huchi in David in Israel mi tengteng tung ah vai ahawm a; ami tengteng tung ah diktattak in vai ahawm hi.
13018015	Zeruiah tapa Joab bel sepaih heutupen ahi a; Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat bel tanchin gelhpa ahi.
13018016	Ahitub tapa Zadok leh Abiathar tapa Abimelek bel siampu ahi ua, huan Shavsha bel laigelhmi ahi a;
13018017	Jehoiada tapa Benaiah bel Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi a, David tapate bel kumpipa kim a heutu lian ahi uhi.
13019001	Huan huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, Ammon suante kumpipa Nahash asi a, asik in atapa in vai ahawm hi.
13019002	David in, “Apa'n hon na hehpih zel ziak in ke'n leng Nahash tapa Hanun ka hehpih sam ding,” achi a. Huchi in David in apa tungtang thu a lungmuan ding in mite asawl hi. Huan David mite Ammon suante gam ah Hanun kiang ah amah lungmuan ding in ava tung uhi.
13019003	Himahleh Ammon suan heutute'n Hanun kiang ah, “David in na pa azahtak ziak a lungmuan ding mi na kiang a hon sawl hi in na gingta a hia? Amite gam hihse ding a enchian leh enkhe ding a na kiang a hong pai ahi khamoh ding uam maw?” achi uhi.
13019004	Huchi in Hanun in David mite aman a, akhamul uh ametmaisak a, huan apuansilhte uh alaitak ah atobou uh khuhpha minmen in atansak a, apaisakta hi.
13019005	Huchi in kuate hiam in amite ana hihdan David ava hilh ua. Huan adawn ding in mi asawl a; amau lah azum mahmah ngal uhi. Kumpipa'n, “Na khamul uh asau nawn ma Jeriko ah om unla, huai zoh chiang in hong kik un,” achi hi.
13019006	Huchi in Ammon suante'n David zakdah lam ana hihta uh chih akitheih un, Hanun leh Ammon suante'n Mesopotamia gam a mite, Siria-maakah a mite, Zobah a mite, kangtalai leh sakol tungtuang mite goihna ding in dangkasik talent sangkhat akhak uhi.
13019007	Huchi in kangtalai singthum-le-sangnih, Maakah kumpipa leh amite toh api ua, Medeba kiang ah panmun abawlta uhi. Ammon suante akhua ua kipan apawtkhia ua, akikaikhawm ua, kidou ding in akuanta uhi.
13019008	David in huai azak in, Joab leh sepaih hangsante tengteng asawlkhia hi.
13019009	Ammon suante ahong kuan ua, khopi kongpi chin ah akiphalh ua, kumpipa amau thu a hong kuante atuam in loubuk ah a-om uhi.
13019010	Huchi in amalam leh nunglam ah ahon sual dek uh chih Joab in atheih in Israel mite lak a mi teltuamte atelkhia a, Siria mite sual ding in akizalh uhi.
13019011	Midang tengteng bel a-unaupa Abishai khut ah akoih vek a, Ammon suante sual ding in amau leng akizalh uhi.
13019012	Huchi in ama'n, “Siria mite ka zoh kei dekleh, hon panpih in; Ammon suante na zoh kei dekleh ka hon panpih ding.
13019013	Hangsantak in om unla, i mite leh i Pathian khuate hum in i kipasalsak ding uh; Toupa'n hoih asak bang zel in hih hen,” achi hi.
13019014	Huchi in Joab leh akiang a mite'n kidouna mun a Siria mite ava naih ua; huchi in ama ah ataikekta uhi.
13019015	Ammon suante'n Siria mite ataikek uh chih atheih un amau leng a-unaupa Abishai ma ah ataikekta ua, khua ah alut uhi. Huchi in Joab Jerusalem ah apaita hi.
13019016	Siria mite'n Israelte ma ah apang thei kei uh chih ana theih un, mi asawl ua, Lui khen lam a Siria pawlte asamkhia ua, Hadadezer sepaih heutu Shophak bel aheutupen uh ahi.
13019017	Huai thu David ahilh ua; ama'n Israel mi tengteng asamkhawm a, Jordan lui akan ua, ava mu ua, sual ding in akiphalh uhi. Huchi in Siriate kidoupih dia David akisak khit in amah akidoupihta uhi.
13019018	Siria mite bel Israelte ma ah ataikek ua; David in Siria mi, kangtalai sangsagih tung a tuang leh sepaih singli athat a, sepaih heutu Shophak leng athat hi.
13019019	Huchi in Hadadezer mite'n Israelte ma ah apang theita kei uh chih atheih un, David toh kilemna abawl ua, asikhate ding in a-omta uh; Siria mite'n leng Ammon suante apanpih nuamta kei uhi.
13020001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum ahong bei a kumpipate kidou ding a akuankhiak lai un, Joab in asepaih hatte apikhia hi. Ammon suante gam asuhsak a, Rabbah khua a-um uh. David bel Jerusalem ah a-om hi. Huan Joab in Rabbah khua asual a, alata hi.
13020002	Huchi in David in akumpipa uh lallukhu khuk lai alaksak a, agikdan dangka-eng talent khat ahi, suangmantamte leng atel a; David akhusak ua; khopi a om gallak sum tampi ala hi.
13020003	Huchi in huai lai a mipite bel apikhia a, sing-atnate, leilehna sikzumte, heipite in nna asemsak hi. Huchibang in Ammon tate khopi tengteng David in ahih hi. David leh mi tengteng Jerusalem ah apai nawnta uhi.
13020004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in, Philistia mite toh Gezer ah kidouna a-om a; huchi in Husat mi Sibbekai in milian suante lak a mi Sippai athat a; huchi in avuallelta uhi.
13020005	Philistia mite toh kidouna a-om nawn a; Jair tapa Elhan in Git mi Goliath unaupa Lahmi athat a, ateikung chiampek bang ahi.
13020006	Gath ah kidouna a-om nawn a, huai ah misang mahmah, akhut lang tuak a khutzung guk, akhe lang tuak a khezung guk, avek a sawmnih-le-li nei a-om a; amah leng miliante lak a khat ahi.
13020007	Ama'n Israel mite asimmoh a, David unau Shimea tapa Jonathan in amah athat hi.
13020008	Huaite Gath a milian lak a piang ahi uh; huaite David leh amite khut ah asi uhi.
13021001	Huan Setan in Israelte asual a, David bel Israelte phakzah sim utna aneisak hi.
13021002	Huan David in Joab leh amiliante uh kiang ah, “Kuan unla, Beer-sheba a kipan Dan tan in Israel mite sim unla, aphakzah uh ka theihtheihna ding in hong hilh nawn un,” achi hi.
13021003	Joab in kumpipa kiang ah, “ Toupa'n amite amun za in hihpung taleh zong, kumpipa ka toupa, ka toupa mite mah hilou uh ahi maw? Bangziak a ka toupa'n huai theih kilawp ahia? Bangziak a Israelte siam louh tanlohna hi ding ahia oi?” achi hi.
13021004	Huchi in Joab apawtkhia a, Israel gam tengteng ah apai a, Jerusalem ah apai nawn hi.
13021005	Joab in mihing om zah David ahilh hi. Israel gam a namsau tawimi tengteng maktaduaikhat-le-nuaikhat ahi uh; huan Judah gam a namsau tawimi bel nuaili-le-singsagih ahi uh.
13021006	Levite leh Benjaminte bel asimtel kei; Joab in kumpipa thupiak zakdah lamtak ahi ngal a.
13021007	Huai thil ah Pathian akipak kei a; huchi in Israelte agawtta hi.
13021008	Huchi in David in Pathian kiang ah, “Hiai thil ka na hihna ah nakpitak in ka na hihkhialta ahi; himahleh na sikha thulimlouhna hehpih in ngaidam in, haihuaitak in ka na hihta hi,” achi hi.
13021009	Huan Toupa'n zawlnei Gad kiang ah,
13021010	“Kuan inla, David kiang ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Thil thum ka hon tah: na tung a ka hih ding in alak ua khat tel in achi,’ ” va chi in.
13021011	Huchi in David kiang ah Gad ava hoh a, akiang ah, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi:
13021012	‘Akoi ahia na deih tel in; kum thum kialpi tun hia, na melmate namsau a delhphak a om a kha thum na melmate vuallelhsak hia, ni thum hipi len ding, Toupa namsau a Toupa angel in Israel gam tengteng a mi ahihmanthat zel?’ chi in. Huchi in kei hon sawlpa bang ka chi dawn dia, kingaihtuah inla, hon hilh in,” achi hi.
13021013	David in Gad kiang ah, “Ka lungzing mahmah, Toupa khut ah puklut peuhmah mai leng; azahngaihna lah athupi mahmah ngal a; mihing khut ah zaw hon puklutsak mahmah ke'n,” achi hi.
13021014	Huchi in Toupa'n Israelte lak ah hipi alengsakta.
13021015	Huan Jerusalem khua hihse ding in Pathian in angel asawl a; ahihsiat dek laitak in, Toupa'n a-en a, thil hoih lou hih atup akhiam a, mite hihmangthang angel kiang ah, “Ahunta; na khut lik nawn ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa angel Jebus mi Ornan phual chin ah adingh hi.
13021016	David adaktou a, Toupa angel, namsau phawisa a Jerusalem lam ngim a, lei leh van kikal a dingh amu hi. Huchi in David leh a-upate'n sai-ip puan silh in lei ah abokkhup uhi.
13021017	David in Pathian kiang ah, “Keimah ka hi kei a hia mipite sim ding chih thu pepa? Keimah ka hi ginat huai loutak a thil na hihkhial, hiai belamte'n bang thil ahia ahih tei uh? Aw Toupa ka Pathian, keimah leh ka inkote tung ah na khutkha inla, na mite'n hipi thuak nawn kei uhen,” achi hi.
13021018	Huchi in Toupa angel in David kiang a Gad va hohtou a, Jebus mi Ornan phual a Toupa dia maitam doh ding a David hilh ding in thu apia hi.
13021019	Gad in Toupa min a athugen ziak in David ahohtouta hi.
13021020	Ornan akilehhei a, angel amu a; atapa li akiang a omte abuta uhi. Ornan in buh ana chil ahi.
13021021	David, Ornan kiang atun in, Ornan akihei a, David amuta a, huan phual a kipan apawtkhia a, amai a lei si in David ma ah abokkhup hi.
13021022	Huchi in David in Ornan kiang ah, “Hiai phual Toupa a dia maitam ka bawlna ding in hon pe dih ve; aman kim geih la in hon pia in, mipite lak a hii akikhin theihna ding in,” achi hi.
13021023	Ornan in David kiang ah, “Tang in, Toupa ka kumpipa'n pha asak bang in hih hen; halmang a lat ding in bawngtalte, sing ding in phual vanzatte, tangbuang thillat ding in buhte ka hon pia hi; ka hon sutuah vek ding,” achi hi.
13021024	Huan kumpipa David in Ornan kiang ah, “Hilou e; aman kim geih in ka lei zaw ding, man bei in Toupa a ding in nang a ka la kei ding, halmang thillat leng ka lan kei ding,” achi a.
13021025	Huchi in David in huai mun leina in Ornan dangka-eng shekel zaguk apia hi.
13021026	David in huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam abawl a, halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan a, Toupa asam a; Toupa'n maitam tung ah mei in van a kipan in adawngta hi.
13021027	Huan Toupa'n angel thu apia a, anamsau apai ah athun nawnta hi.
13021028	Huchi in David in Jebus mi Ornan phual ah Toupa'n ahon dawng chih atheih in huai ah akithoihta hi.
13021029	Huai lai in Mosi in gamdai a Toupa biakbuk leh halmang thillatna maitam abawl Gibeon khua mun sang ah a-om ahi.
13021030	Himahleh David bel Toupa angel namsau akihtak ziak in Pathian dong ding in huai ah ahoh thei kei hi.
13022001	Huchi in David in, “Hiai zaw Toupa Pathian inn ahi hi; hiai zaw Israelte halmang thillatna maitam ahi hi,” achi hi.
13022002	Huchi in David in Israel gam a namdang omte sapkhawm thu apia a; huan, Pathian inn lamna ding in suangsek mite suang aseksak hi.
13022003	David in intual kongkhak leh abulhna ding kilhna ding sik tampi abawlkhol a; dal tamtak buk seng louh toh; sidar sing sim seng louh toh;
13022004	Zidon mi leh Tura mite'n David kiang ah sidar sing tampi ahon la uhi.
13022005	David in, “Ka tapa Solomon lah anaupang lai in, bangmah athei nai kei a, Toupa' inn lam ding thupitak, amin leh athupina gam chih a thangkhe ding ahi a; huaiziak in ka kisakhol hi,” achi hi. Huchi in David asih ma in akisakhol nasa mahmah hi.
13022006	Huchi in atapa Solomon asam a, Toupa Israel' Pathian inn lam ding in thu apia hi.
13022007	Huan David in atapa Solomon kiang ah, “ Toupa ka Pathian min ding in inn lam lungsim in ka nei gige hi.
13022008	Himahleh, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, nang zaw sisan na naksuah tel a, kidoute na uang tel a; leitung ah ka mitmuh a sisan na naksuah ziak in, ka min a ding in inn na lam kei ding.
13022009	Ngai in, tapa chingkam na hon nei ding a, amah kei lungtuak mi ahi ding a, akim gam a amelma tengteng lak ah galmuanna ka pe ding; amin Solomon ahi ding a, amah ziak in Israelte galmuang leh lungmuangtak in ka omsak ding.
13022010	Ama'n ka min a ding in inn alam ding a, amah ka tapa ahi ding a, kei apa ka hi ding; huan, Israelte tung a agam laltutphah tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding.
13022011	“Huchi in ka tapa, Toupa na kiang ah om henla, lamzang zel inla, na tungtang thu agenkholhsa bang in, Toupa na Pathian inn lam in.
13022012	Toupa'n pilna leh theihnate hon neisak peuhmah phot henla, Israelte tung ah thuneihna hon pia hen, huchi in Toupa na Pathian dan na zui thei ding hi.
13022013	Huchi in Israelte tungtang thu a dan thusehte leh vaihawmnate Toupa'n Mosi apiak na zuihleh, na lamzang zel ding; hattak in om inla, hangsantak in om in; lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n.
13022014	Ngai in, ka lungzin lai in Toupa' inn a ding in dangka-eng talent nuaikhat leh dangkasik talent maktaduaikhat ka na kisakhol khin a; dal leh sikte leng buk seng louh, tampi ahi; sing leh suang leng ka kisakhol khin ahi, huaite na sunzom theita ding.
13022015	Nasemmi, sing-atmi leh suangsekmi leh khutsiamna chiteng sem thei leng na hau hi.
13022016	Sim seng vual louh dangka-engte, dangkate, dalte, sikte leng; thou inla, nasep pan in, Toupa na kiang ah om hen,” achi hi.
13022017	David in Israelte makai tengteng atapa Solomon panpih ding in thu apia hi.
13022018	“ Toupa na Pathian uh na kiang uah a-om kei a hia? Mun chih mual chih ah galmuanna ahon pe kei a hia? Hiai gam a mite ka khut ah ahon peta a, Toupa ma leh amite ma ah gam lak ahita.
13022019	Tu in na lungtang uleh na lungsim uh Toupa na Pathian uh zong ding in koihkip un; huaiziak in thou unla, Toupa min a inn lam ding suang, Toupa thukhun bawm leh Pathian tui-um belsuan siangthoute laklutna ding in, mun siangthou lam un,” achi hi.
13023001	David adamsawt in a-upa mahmah a; huchi in Israelte kumpipa in atapa Solomon abawlta hi.
13023002	Huan Israelte makai tengteng siampute leh Levite toh asamkhawm hi.
13023003	Levite kum sawmthum a kipan atunglam sim ahi ua; atamlam uh piching singthum-le-sanggiat ahi.
13023004	Huaite lak a, “Singnih-le-sangli Toupa' inn lam heutute heutu ding ahi ua; sanggukte heutute leh vaihawmmi dingte ahi uh;
13023005	Sanglite kongkhak ngak mite ding ahi ua, huan sanglite, phatna ding a thil tumging chi ka bawl,” David in achihte zang a Toupa phat ding mite ahi uhi.
13023006	Levi tapate Gershon, Kahath, Merari zah in David in pawl abawl a,
13023007	Gershon mite Laadan leh Shimei ahi uh.
13023008	Laadan tapate makaipente Jehiel, Zetham, Joel, thum ahi uh.
13023009	Shimei tapate Shelomith, Haziel, Haran, thum ahi uh. Hiaite Laadan suan inkuan makaipente ahi uh.
13023010	Shimei tapate bel Jahath, Zina, Jeush, Beriah ahi uh. Hiai lite Shimei tapate ahi uh.
13023011	Jahath a-upapen ahi a, Zizah anihna ahi; Jeush leh Beriahte'n bel ta ahau kei ua; huaiziak in inkuan khat bang a sim ahi uh.
13023012	Kohath tapate Amram, Izhar, Hebron, Uzziel, li ahi uh.
13023013	Amram tapate Aaron leh Mosi ahi uh; Aaron bel amah leh asuante tangtawn a ding a thil siangthoutakte hihsiangthou a, tangtawn a Toupa ma a gimlim hal a, a-nna sem a, amin a vualzawlpa ding a hihtuam ahi uh.
13023014	Pathian mipa Mosi bel, atapate Levi nam lak a sim ahi uh.
13023015	Mosi tapate Gershom leh Eliezer ahi uh,
13023016	Gershom tapate lak a upapen Shebuel ahi.
13023017	Eliezer tapate lak a upapen Rehabiah ahi. Eliezer in tapa dang anei kei; Rehabiah in bel tapa tampi anei.
13023018	Izhar tapate: Shelmoth amakai lianpen.
13023019	Hebron tapate lak a makai lianpen Jeriah ahi a, anihna Amariah, athumna Jahaziel, alina Jekameam ahi.
13023020	Uzziel tapate lak a upazaw Mikah ahi a, anihna Isshiah ahi.
13023021	Merari tapate: Merari tapate bel Mahli leh Mushi ahi uh, Mahli tapate Eleazar leh Kish ahi uh.
13023022	Eleazar tapate nei lou in asi a, tanute kia anei a; Kish tapa a-unaute un zi in anei uh.
13023023	Mushi tapate Mahli, Eder, Jeremoth, thum ahi uh.
13023024	Huaite Levi suan a-inkuan uh bang zel a min gelh a asim uh inkuan makaipen, Toupa' inn lam a kuan, kum sawmnih a kipan tunglam asimte uh ahi.
13023025	David in, “ Toupa , Israel' Pathian in amite galmuangtak in a-omsakta a, Jerusalem ah a-om nilouh hi.
13023026	Levite'n leng biakbuk leh anasepna ding tui-um belsuan tengteng azon uh akiphamohta kei hi,” achi hi.
13023027	David thupiak nanung ziak in Levite kum sawmnih a kipan atunglam tan in sim ngal ahi uhi.
13023028	Anasep uh Pathian inn a nasep a Aaron tapate panpih a intual sung leh dantan sung a thil siangthoute hihsiangthou a, Toupa' inn a nasep ahi;
13023029	tanghou koih dingte, tangbuang thillat ding a tangbuang nel mahmah, silngou hel louh tanghou pek hiam, bel a uk hiam, kan hiam, ateh leh aletdan bang teng ding bawlte toh;
13023030	Zingsang teng a Toupa kiang a kipahthu gen leh amah phatte toh, nitak a leng huchi mah;
13023031	Sabbathte, kha thakte a ankuanglui neihte ahih ding seh bang zel a Toupa kiang a halmang thillat tengteng Toupa ma a lat gigete toh;
13023032	kihoupihna biakbuk kepte, mun siangthou kepte, Toupa' inn a nasem a a-unau Aaron tapate'n hih ding aseh peuhmah uh hihte toh.
13024001	Aaron tapate pawl khendan hichibang ahi, Aaron tapate Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar leh Ithamar ahi uh.
13024002	Nadab leh Abihu bel apa uh sang in asi masa ua; ta anei kei uh; huaiziak in Eleazar leh Ithamarte'n siampu nna asem uhi.
13024003	David in Eleazar tapa Zadok leh Ithamar tapa Ahimelekte toh anasepdan ding uh ahawmsak hi.
13024004	Ithamar suante sang in Eleazar suan makaipen a pang atamzaw uh; hichibang in akhen ua; Eleazar suan ah, inkuan makaipen sawm-le-guk a hi uh; Ithamar suan ah, inkuan makaipen giat ahi uhi.
13024005	Eleazar suan a mi leh Ithamar suan a mite lak ah, mun siangthou a miliante leh Pathian miliante a om tuaktuak uh ahih ziak in aisan in, amaute akhen uhi.
13024006	Huan Levi mi, laigelhmi Nethaneel tapa Shemaiah in kumpipa, milian, siampu Zadok, Abiathar tapa Ahimelek, siampute leh Levite inko makaipente mitmuh in agelh a; inkuan pipa khat tan Eleazar tung ah apuk a, khat bel Ithamar tung ah apuk hi.
13024007	Huchi in aisan akhatveina bel Jehoarib tung ah atu a, anihveina Jedaiah tung ah;
13024008	athumveina Harim tung ah, aliveina Seorim tung ah;
13024009	angaveina Makijah tung ah, agukveina Mijamin tung ah;
13024010	asagihveina Hakoz tung ah, agiatveina Abijah tung ah;
13024011	akuaveina Jeshua tung ah, asawmveina Shekaniah tung ah;
13024012	asawm-le-khatveina Eliashib tung ah, asawm-le-nihveina Jakim tung ah;
13024013	asawm-le-thumveina Huppah tung ah, asawm-le-liveina Jeshebeab tung ah;
13024014	asawm-le-ngaveina Bilgah tung ah, asawm-le-gukveina Immer tung ah;
13024015	asawm-le-sagihveina Hezir tung ah, asawm-le-giatveina Happizzez tung ah;
13024016	asawm-le-kuaveina Pethahiah tung ah, asawmnihveina Jehezekel tung ah;
13024017	asawmnih-le-khatveina Jakin tung ah, asawmnih-le-nihveina Gamul tung ah;
13024018	asawmnih-le-thumveina Delaiah tung ah, asawmnih-le-liveina Maaziah tung ah atu hi.
13024019	Huai bel Toupa , Israel' Pathian in apu uh Aaron thu ana piak, Toupa insung a nna asepdan ding ana sehdan ahi hi.
13024020	Levi suan dangte lak ah; Amram tapate lak ah Shubael ahi; Shubael tapate lak ah Jehdeiah.
13024021	Rehabiah lam ah; Rehabaihte lak ah amakaipen Isshiah ahi.
13024022	Izharte lak ah Shelomoth; Shelomoth tapate lak ah Jahath,
13024023	Hebron tapate, a-upapen Jeriah ahi a, anihna Amariah, athumna Jahaziel, alina Jokameam ahi.
13024024	Uzziel tapate lak a mi Mikah; Mikah tapate lak a mi Shamir ahi.
13024025	Mikah unaupa Isshiah ahi a; Isshiah tapate lak a mi Zekariah ahi.
13024026	Merari tapate bel Mahli leh Mushi ahi ua; Jaaziah tapate lak a mi Beno ahi.
13024027	Merari suante, Jaaziah lak ah Beno, Shoham, Zakkur leh Ibrite ahi uh.
13024028	Mahli lak ah, Eleazar ahi a, ama'n tapa anei kei.
13024029	Kish lak ah, Kish tapa Jerahmeel ahi.

13024031	Hiai inkuan chih a lianpen leh naupangpente'n leng Aaron ta a-unaute uh bang in, agam tan ding uh, kumpipa David, Zadok, Ahimelek, siampu leh Levite inko makaipente mitmuh in ai asan sam uhi.
13025001	Huan Asaph, Heman, Jeduthun tapa khenkhat kaihgingte, pekgingte, dakkhutbette toh ala vek a nasemmi ding in David leh sepaih heutute'n ahihtuam ua; nasep ding omdan bang zel in nasem mite tamdan ding asep uhi.
13025002	Asaph tapate lak a mi Zakkur, Joseph, Nethaniah leh Asarelah ahi ua, amau bel Asaph tapate, kumpipa thupiak bang a zawlnei thugen a gen, Asaph thuthu a omte ahi uh.
13025003	Jeduthun lak ah: Jeduthun tapate Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah leh Matithiahte, guk ahi uh; kaihging toh Toupa kiang a kipahthu gen a la vek a apa uh Jeduthun thuthu a omte ahi uh.
13025004	Heman lak ah: Heman tapate Bukkiah, Mataniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanni, Eliathah, Giddalti, Romamti-ezer, Joshbekashah, Malothi, Hothir leh Mahaziothte ahi uhi;
13025005	Huaite tengteng Pathian lam thu a kumpipa zawlnei Heman tapate pengkulkawi mut dingte ahi uh. Pathian in Heman tapa sawm-le-li leh tanu thum apia hi.
13025006	Huaite tengteng Toupa' inn a dakkhutbet toh, kaihging toh, pekging toh, Pathian inn a nasepna ding a la toh lem mite, apa uh thuthu a omte ahi uh; Asaph, Jeduthun leh Hemante bel kumpipa thupiak a omte ahi leuleu uhi.
13025007	Atamlam uh, a-unau, Toupa ding a lasak kisin siam khinsa tengtengte toh zanih sawmgiat-le-giat ahi uh.
13025008	Huan aneu leh alian, sinsakmi leh sinmi in atan ding uh kibang vek in ai asan uhi.
13025009	Huchi in aisan akhatveina Asaph tapa Joseph tung ah atu a; anihveina Gedaliah tung ah; amah leh a-unaute leh atapate sawm-le-nih ahi uhi.
13025010	Athumveina bel Zakkur tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih ahi uh.
13025011	Aliveina Izri tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih ahi uhi.
13025012	Angaveina Nethaniah tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025013	Agukveina Bukkiah tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025014	Asagihveina Jesharelah tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025015	Agiatveina bel Jeshaiah tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025016	Akuaveina bel Mataniah tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025017	Asawmveina Shimei tung ah, atapate leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.
13025018	Asawm-le-khatveina Azarel tung ah, atapa leh a-unaute sawm-le-nih.

13026001	Kongkhak ngak pawl khendan: Kore mi bel Asaph tapate lak a Kore tapa Meshelemiah ahi.
13026002	Huan Meshelemiah in tapate anei a: ata masa Zekariah ahi a, azom Jediael, athumna Zebadiah, alina Jathniel;
13026003	angana Elam, agukna Jehohanan, asagihna Elioenai ahi.
13026004	Obed-edom in tapate anei a; ata masa Shemaiah ahi a, azom Jehozabad, athumna Joah, alina Sakar, angana Nethaneel,
13026005	agukna Amiel, asagihna Issakar, agiatna Peulethai ahi, amah bel Pathian in avualzawl hi.
13026006	Atapa Shemaiah a kipan tapa, a-inkote uh vaihawmte leng apiang ua; amaute mihat hangsan ahi chiat uhi.
13026007	Shemaiah tapate Othni, Rephael, Obed leh Elzabadte ahi ua, a-unau uh Elihu leh Semakiah bel mihat mahmah ahi uh.
13026008	Huaite tengteng Obed-edom suante ahi ua: amau leh atapate uh leh a-unaute uh nasepna lamsang ah mi piching ahi uh; Obed-edom a kipan mite sawmguk-le-nih ahi uhi.
13026009	Meshelemiah in tapa leh unau mihat mahmah sawm-le-giat anei hi.
13026010	Merari suante lak a Hosah in leng tapate anei a; Shimri bel amakai lianpen ahi a, ta masa ahi kei na a, apa'n makaipen in abawl hi.
13026011	Azom in Hilkiah ahi a, athumna Tebaliah, alina Zekariah ahi. Hosah tapate leh a-unaute avek un sawm-le-thum ahi uh.
13026012	Huai amakaipente lak a mi a-unaute uh bang a Toupa' inn a nasem thilbawl a tantuan nei a kongkhak ngakmi pawl a akhente uh ahi.
13026013	Aneu alian in, a-inkuan dungzui zel un kongpi chih a om ding zonna ding in ai asan uhi.
13026014	Huchi in suahlam a dia aisan pen Shelemiah tung ah atu hi. Lemgel siam piltak, atapa Zekariah a ding in ai asan ua, mallam pen amah a tuam in atu hi.
13026015	Simlam bel Obed-edom tuam in; atapate tuam in Asuppim.
13026016	Tumlam a toupaina lampi a Shaleketh kongkhak venna toh, Shuppim leh Hosah tuam in.
13026017	Suahlam ah Levite guk a-om ua, niteng in mallam ah li, simlam ah li, thil koihkhawmna inn ah nih tuaktuak.
13026018	Tumlam inn um sung a ding in alutna ah li; inn um sung ah nih.
13026019	Huaite ahi uh, Korah tapate leh Merari mi tapate kongkhak ngakmi pawl akhente uh.
13026020	Huan a-unaute uh Levite lak ah Ahijah, Pathian sum koihkhawmna inn leh thil latsate koihkhawmna inn heutu ahi.
13026021	Laadan tapate: Gershon mite tapate Laadante a te, pipute inkote amakai lianpen Gershon mi Laadan a te; Jehieli.
13026022	Jehieli tapate: Zetham, Joel a-unaupa, Toupa' inn a sum koihkhawmna heutu ahi uh.
13026023	Amram mite a kipan, Izhar mite a kipan, Hebron mite a kipan, Uzziel mite a kipan:
13026024	Mosi tapa, Gershom tapa Shebuel sum koihkhawmna heutu ahi.
13026025	A-unaute bel Eliezer tapa Rahabiah, Jeshaiah, Joram, Zikri leh Shelomithte ahi.
13026026	Shelomith leh a-unaute bel kumpipa David leh a-inkote uh makaipen sepaih sangkhat heutute leh zakhat heutute leh sepaih pawl heutute'n ahihsiangthousa uh, thil siangthou koihkhawmna inn tengteng kemte ahi uhi.
13026027	Kidouna gallak thilte Toupa' inn bawlphatna ding in akoih uhi.
13026028	Zawlnei Samuel, Kish tapa Saul, Ner tapa Abner leh Zeruiah tapa Joabte'n ahihsiangthou tengteng uh, kuapeuh in thil ahihsiangthousa peuhmah uh Shelomith leh a-unaute kep vek ahi.
13026029	Izhar mi Kenaniah leh atapate Israel gam polam tungtang thu a heutute leh vaihawmmi ahi uh.
13026030	Hebron mi Hashabiah leh a-unau mihangsan sangkhat-le-zasagih Jordan gal tumlam a Israelte ukpate ahi uhi; Toupa nna tengteng leh kumpipa nasepna lam nna ah.
13026031	Hebron mi Jerijah bel asuan uh tungtang thu a inko makai lam ah Hebronte, amakaipente ahi uhi. David kum sawmli avaihawm kum a azon un Gilead gam a Jazer ah mihat hangsan amukhia uhi.
13026032	A-unau mihangsante sangnih-le-zasagih ahi uhi. Huaite inko makaipen, kumpipa David in Pathian lam thil chiteng leh kumpipa na lam thu a Reuben, Gad leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte heutu dia abawlte ahi uh.
13027001	Israelte atamdan uh inkuan makaipente, sepaih sangkhat heutute, zakhat heutute leh kumpipa nasem mite tengteng kum khat sung a kha teng a kikheng zelzel, pawl chih a mi singnih-le-sangli ahi uhi.
13027002	Pawl khatna akha khatna a heutu Zabdiel tapa Jashobeam ahi a, pawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027003	Amah Perez suan a mi, akha khatna a sepaih heutu tengteng makaipen ahi.
13027004	Akha nihna pawl a heutu Ahoh mi Dodai ahi a, apawl a mi Mikloth leng ahi a, apawl uah singnih-le-sangli a-om uhi.
13027005	Akha thumna a sepaihte heutupen siampu Jehoiada tapa Benaiah ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027006	Hiai Benaiah ahi a, sawmthum lak a mihangsan, sawmthum tung a mi pen; apawl ah atapa Ammizabad atel hi.
13027007	Akha lina a sepaih heutu Joab unaupa Asahel ahi a, atapa Zebadiah asik a pang ahi, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027008	Akha ngana a sepaih heutu Izrah mi Shamhuth ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027009	Akha gukna a sepaih heutu Tekoa mi, Ikkesh tapa Ira ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027010	Akha sagihna a sepaih heutu Ephraim suan Pelon mi Helez ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027011	Akha giatna a sepaih heutu Zerah suan Husat mi Sibbekai ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027012	Akha kuana a sepaih heutu Benjamin suan Anathoth mi Abiezer ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027013	Akha sawmna a sepaih heutu Zerah suan Netophah mi Maharai ahi a, apawl ah singnih sangli a-om uh.
13027014	Akha sawm-le-khatna a sepaih heutu Ephraim suan Pirathon mi Benaiah ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027015	Akha sawm-le-nihna a sepaih heutu Othniel suan Netophah mi Heldai ahi a, apawl ah singnih-le-sangli a-om uh.
13027016	Huai lou leng, Israel namte tung a: Reubente lak a Zikri tapa Eliezer vaihawmpa ahi a, Simeonte lak ah Maakah tapa Shephatiah ahi;
13027017	Levite lak ah Kumuel tapa, Hashabiah; Aaronte lak ah Zadok;
13027018	Judate lak ah David unaute lak ah Elihu, Issakarte lak ah Mikael tapa Omri;
13027019	Zebulunte lak ah Obadiah tapa Ishmaiah; Naphtalite lak ah Azriel tapa Jeremoth;
13027020	Ephraim suante lak ah Azaziah tapa Hoshea; Manasseh nam kimkhatte lak ah Pedaiah tapa Joel.
13027021	Gilead gam a Manasseh nam kimkhatte lak ah, Zekariah tapa Ido; Benjaminte lak ah, Abner tapa Jaasiel;
13027022	Dante lak ah Jeroham tapa Azariel. Huaite Israel nam heutute ahi uh.
13027023	David in kum sawmnih a kipan anuailam asim kei hi, Israelte bel van a aksi zah in apungsak ding chih Toupa'n ana gen khit tak ziak in.
13027024	Zeruiah tapa Joab in asim pan a, himahleh asimzou kei a, Israelte tung ah leng hehna ahong tungta a; kumpipa David vaihawm lai khangthubute ah azah gelh leng ahi sam kei hi.
13027025	Kumpipa sumkempa Adiel tapa Azmaveth ahi a; huan lou lam ah, khopite ah, khopel khawng ah, insangte a sumkempa bel Uzziah tapa Jehonathan ahi.
13027026	Lou a leileh nasep sem kempa Kelub tapa Ezri ahi a;
13027027	Grephuan kempa Ramath mi, Shimei ahi a, grephuan a uain suksa koihkhawm kempa Shiph mite mi Zabdi ahi.
13027028	Phaiguam olive sing leh theipi kungte kempa Geder mi Baal-hanan ahi a, sathau koihkhawmna kempa Joash ahi.
13027029	Sharon a ta ganhon kempa Sharon mi Shitrai ahi a, Phaizang a ganhon kempa Adlai tapa Shaphat ahi.
13027030	Sangawngsau kempa Ishmael mi Obil ahi a, sabiltung kempa Meronoth mi Jehdeiah ahi a;
13027031	belamhon kempa Hagar mi Jaziz ahi. Huaite tengteng kumpipa David sumkem mite ahi uh.
13027032	Huan David paneu, Jonathan tuh mipil, laisiam mahmah thu theipen ahi a, huan amah leh Hakmoni tapa Jehiel in kumpipa tapate asinsak uhi.
13027033	Kumpipa lemgelpihpa Ahithophel ahi a; Arki mi Hushai kumpipa lawm ahi a.
13027034	Ahithophel zom in Benaiah tapa Jehoiada leh Abiathar ahi ua, kumpipa sepaih heutu bel Joab ahi.
13028001	Huan David in Israel heutu tengteng nam makaipente, kumpipa nasem a kikheng zelzel pawl heutute, sepaih sangkhat heutute, zakhat heutute, kumpipa leh atapate sum leh thil neih tengteng tung a heutute, milian mihat, mihat hangsan tengtengte toh Jerusalem ah asamkhawm hi.
13028002	Huchi in kumpipa David adingh a, “Ka unaute leh ka mite aw, ka thu na ngaikhia dih ua, ke'n Toupa thukhun bawm koihna leh i Pathian khe ngakna ding inn lam lungsim in ka nei gige a; alamna ding leng ka ngah khin sipsip hi.
13028003	Himahleh, Pathian in ka kiang ah, ‘Nang zaw kidoumi sisan suahmi na hih ziak in ka min a ding in inn na lam kei ding,’ achi hi.
13028004	Himahleh Toupa Israel' Pathian in, ka pa inkote tengteng lak a kipan Israelte kumpipa dia tangtawn a om ding in ahon na telta a; Judah makai pipen ding in ana telta a; Judah namte lak ah ka pa inkote; ka pa tapate lak a kipan Israel tengteng kumpipa ding in ahon na telkhe tuamta hi.
13028005	Toupa'n tapa tampi ahon pia a, ka tapa tengteng lak ah, Israelte kumpipa ding in Toupa gam laltutphah a tu ding in ka tapa Solomon ana telta hi.
13028006	“Huchi in ka kiang ah, ‘Na tapa Solomon in ka inn leh ka intualte adingsak ding; ka tapa ding in ka telta a, huchi in apa ka hi ding.
13028007	Ka thupiakte leh ka vaihawmte apom gigeleh tua na hih gige bang un agam tangtawn a ding in ka kipsak ding hi.’
13028008	Huchi in Toupa mipi, Israelte tengteng mitmuh in leh i Pathian zak in Toupa na Pathian uh thupiak tengteng pom ding leh limsak ding in ka hon hanthawn ahi; huchi in hiai gam hoih mahmah na luah ding ua, na nung uah na suante uh tangtawn a ding in na luahtou sawnsak zel ding uhi.
13028009	“Huan nang, ka tapa Solomon, na pa Pathian thei inla, lungtang hoih bukim leh lungsim kilawptak in anasep sem in; Toupa'n lah lungtang a-en sek a, lungsim a lunggel tengteng athei vek hi; amah na zonleh na mu ding a, na lehngatsanleh bel tangtawn in ahon khahkhe ding hi.
13028010	Pilvang in; mun siangthou a dia inn lam ding in Toupa'n nang ahon septa; hattak in om inla, pang in,” achi hi.
13028011	Huchi in David in atapa Solomon kiang ah atempul intual, asum koihkhawmna, adantan tungnung, asung dantan, azahngaihna tutphah,
13028012	Alungsim a alunggel bang tengteng, Toupa' inn um sung intual, akim dantan tengteng, Pathian in asum koihkhawmna inn, thil tan koihkhawmna inn lamdan ding guhgel apia hi.
13028013	Siampute leh Levite apawlpawl a a-omna ding uh lim, Toupa' inn a nasepna lam ding tengteng lim, Toupa' inn a nasepna ding tui-um belsuan tengteng lim leng.
13028014	Nasepna lam a dia tui-um belsuan chi chih, dangka-eng tui-um belsuan ding, dangka-eng zat zel zah ding,
13028015	Dangka-eng khawnvak koihna leh akhawnvak ding dangka-eng zat zel zah ding, khawnvak koihna leh akhawnvak tui ding a zat zel zah ding, khawnvak koihna a mun kiphamoh chiat bang zel a dangkasik khawnvak koihna ding a dia zat zel zah ding toh;
13028016	tanghou at koihna ding dangka-eng dohkan leh dangkasik dohkan bawlna ding a, dangka-eng zat zah ding leh dangkasik zat zel zah ding atehna in apia hi.
13028017	Maiphiatna kuang, noute toh; dangka-eng belhbu ding, belhbu khat zel a dia zat zel zah ding.
13028018	Cherubte akha uh zak a; Toupa thukhun bawm tuam tuanna lim bang bawlna ding dangka-engte toh.
13028019	David in, “Hiaite tengteng Toupa'n amah mah khut a hon gelh, hiai a lim tengteng hon theisak hi in ka thei,” achi hi.
13028020	Huchi in David in atapa Solomon kiang ah, “Hattak leh hangsantak in om inla, pang in; lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n; Toupa Pathian, ka Pathian na kiang ah a-om hi; Toupa' inn lam nasep tengteng zoh ahih vek mateng hon paisan in, ahon limsak lou kei ding hi.
13028021	Huan ngai dih, Pathian in na chih teng semmi pawl siampute leh Levite a-om ua, bang nna peuh a, bang lam peuh a nasep siam, hattak chiat a nang hon panpih ding na kiang ah a-om zel ding uhi; heutute leh mipi teng in leng na thupiak peuhmah azui ding uhi,” achi hi.
13029001	Huan kumpipa David in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Pathian telkhiak ka tapa Solomon anaupang lai in bangmah athei nai kei a, asep ding lah athupi ngal a, tempul mihing a ding ahi kei a, Toupa Pathian a ding ahi zaw hi.
13029002	Huchi in ka Pathian inn a ding in adangka-eng lam thil a ding in dangka-engte, dangkasik lam thil a ding in, dangkasik, dal lam thil a ding in dal, sik lam thil a ding in sik, sing lam thil a ding in sing theih tawk in ka na kisa khinta a, azepna ding onik suang, suang kilawm, asilh ding suang kilawm chi tuamtuam leh suangmantam chi chih leh suangpak suang tampite ka pe khinta hi.
13029003	Huai kia lou leng ka Pathian inn ka deihsak mahmah a, keimah sum dangka-eng leh dangkate leng, inn siangthou a dia ka na kisaksa tengteng chih louh, ka Pathian inn a ding in ka pia hi, huai tuh baang zutna ding in ophir dangka-eng,
13029004	dangka-eng talent sangthum leh dangkasik siangthou talent sangsagih, azatna lam tuamtuam a misiamte zat ding in, dangka-eng zatna ding a dangka-engte.
13029005	Dangkasik zatna ding a dangkasikte ahi. Tuni in Toupa a ding a kipaktak a pe phal kuakua na om ua?” achi hi.
13029006	Huchi in inkuan makaipente, Israel nam heutute, sangkhat heutute leh zakhat heutute, kumpipa nasemte heutute toh kipaktak in apia uhi.
13029007	Pathian inn lamna ding dangka-eng talent sangnga leh darik singkhat, dangkasik talent singkhat leh dal talent singkhat-le-sanggiat, sik talent nuaikhat apia uhi.
13029008	Suangmantam neite'n Toupa sum koihkhawmna a Gershon mi Jehiel kep ding in akoih uhi.
13029009	Huchi in mipite akipak mahmah ua, lungsim mun khat pu a kipaktak a Toupa apiak ziak un, kumpipa David in leng nop sak petmah in nuam asa hi.
13029010	Huchi in David in mipi tengteng ma ah Toupa kiang ah kipahthu agen hi,
13029011	“Aw Toupa , ka pu uh Israel' Pathian, tangtawn in phat in om hen. Aw Toupa , thupina, thilhihtheihna, pahtawina, zohna, lalna nang a ahi a, lei leh van a om tengteng nang a ahi. Aw Toupa , gam nang a ahi a, mi tengteng atungnungpen na hi.
13029012	Hauhsakna leh pahtawina na kiang a kipan ahi, bangkim tung ah thu na nei a, na khut ah thilhihtheihna a-om a, mi tengteng hih thupina leh hatna piaktheihna na khut ah a-om hi.
13029013	‘Huchi in ka Pathian uh kipahthu ka hon hilh ua, na min thupi ka phat uhi.’
13029014	“Himahleh kua ahia ka hih a, ka mite leng kua ahia ahih ua, hiaite kipaktak a ka hon lat theih mahmah uh? Thil tengteng na kiang a kipan a pawt ahi ua, nang a hon pe nawn lel ka hi uhi.
13029015	Ka pi-le-pute uh bang in kou zaw na ma ah mikhual, mite kiang a om sam bang ka hi ua; leitung adamsung nite zaw limliap bang lel ahi a, lamet ding himhim a-om kei hi.
13029016	Toupa ka Pathian uh, na min siangthou ding a inn ka hon lamsak ding a hiai thil ka na kisakna tengteng uh nangmah khutsuak ahi a, nang a vek ahi.
13029017	Ka Pathian, nang lungtangte na enchian sek a, diktatnate na kipahpih nak chih leng ka thei hi. Ke'n zaw lungsim taktak in hiai thil tengteng kipak mahmah in ka hon lan ahi, hiai lai a kipak mahmah a na kiang a hon lan mite ka muh in ka kipak mahmah hi.
13029018	Aw Toupa , ka pu uh Abraham, Isak, Israel' Pathian, na mite'n hichibang lungsim aput gige theihna ding un alungsimte uh nang a ding in hihkip inla;
13029019	huan ka tapa Solomon na thupiakte, na thu theihsakte, na dante zui a, huaite tengteng hih ding leh ka kisakkholhna inn lam ding in lungsim hoihkim pusak in,” David in achi hi.
