13029020	David in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Khai le, Toupa na Pathian uh phat un,” achi a, huchi in mipi tengteng in Toupa , apipute uh Pathian aphat ua, akun ua, Toupa leh kumpipa abia uhi.
13029021	Azing in Toupa kiang ah kithoihna ding leh Toupa kiang a halmang thillat ding in bawngtal sangkhat leh belam sangkhat leh belamnou sangkhat, adawn ding uh thillat toh Israelte tengteng a ding in kithoihna tampi alan uhi.
13029022	Huchi in huai ni in Toupa ma ah nuamsatak in ane ua, a-om chiat uhi. David tapa Solomon bel kumpipa ding in abawl tuan nawn ua, Toupa milian ding in sathau anilh ua, huan, Zadok bel siampu ding in.
13029023	Huchi in Solomon Toupa laltutphah ah apa David sik in kumpipa in atuta a, lamzangtak in a-om a; huan Israelte tengteng in athu azui uhi.
13029024	Huan heutute tengteng leh mihat hangsante leh kumpipa David tapa dang tengtengte kumpipa Solomon lak ah akipia uh.
13029025	Toupa'n Israelte tengteng mitmuh in nakpitak in Solomon ahih thupi a, Israel gam a ama a kumpipate lak ah kuamah in atan ngei louh uh, kumpipa hihna thupi mahmah atangta hi.
13029026	Jesse tapa David in Israelte tengteng tung ah vai ahawm hi.
13029027	Israelte tung a avaihawm sung kum sawmli ahi; Hebron ah kum sagih vai ahawm a, Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum-le-thum vai ahawm hi.
13029028	Upa tekkun a dam in, hausatak leh pahtawinate tang in asi a; asik in atapa Solomon in vai ahawm hi.
13029029	Ngai in, kumpipa David tanchin atung a kipan atawp tan in, zawlnei Samuel laibu, zawlnei Nathan laibu leh zawlnei Gad laibute ah atuang hi.
13029030	Avaihawm thute, athilhihtheihdan tengtengte, amah leh Israelte tung leh gam tengteng tung a thil hong omdante toh.
14001001	7 Huan David tapa Solomon agamsung ah hatsak in a-om a; Toupa a Pathian akiang ah a-om a, nakpi mahmah in athupisak hi.
14001002	Solomon in Israel tengteng, sepaih sangkhat heutu, zakhat heutu, vaihawmmi, Israel gam tengteng a milian, inkuan a makaipen tengteng ahoupih hi.
14001003	Huchi in Solomon leh kikhawm tengteng Gibeon a mun sang ah ahoh ua; huai ah Toupa sikha Mosi in gamdai a abawl Pathian biakna buk a-om hi.
14001004	Pathian bawm bel David in ana bawl khitsa mun, Kiriath-jearim a kipan David in alatou khin a; Jerusalem ah akoihna ding puanin azak khitsa him ahi.
14001005	Huan Hur tapa, Uri tapa, Bezalel bawl dal maitam Toupa biakna buk chin ah a-om behlap a; Solomon leh mipite'n ava zuan uhi.
14001006	Huan kihoupihna biakbuk chin a dal maitam omna Toupa ma ah Solomon ahohtou a, halmang thillat sangkhat alan hi.
14001007	Huai zan in Solomon kiang ah Pathian akilak a, akiang ah, “Bang ahia ka hon piak ding hon ngen in,” achi hi.
14001008	Huchi in Solomon in Pathian kiang ah, “Ka pa David kiang ah hehpihna thupitak na langsak a, asik in kumpipa in na hon bawlta a,
14001009	aw Toupa Pathian, ka pa David kiang a na thuchiam hihtangtung in; nang lei a leivui zah mipite kumpipa in na hon bawlta hi.
14001010	Huchi in hiai mipite ma a lut leh pawt a ka omtheihna ding in pilna leh theihna hon pia in; na mi hiai zahzah vai, kua'n ahia hawmsak thei ding?” achi hi.
14001011	Huchi in Pathian in Solomon kiang ah, “Hichibang lungsim na put a, sum-le-paite, hauhsaknate, pahtawinate, nang hon mudahte hinnate ngen lou a, damsawtnate leng ngen lou a, atung ua kumpipa a ka hon bawl na mite vai na hawmsak theihna ding a pilna leh theihnate na hon nget zawk ziak in, pilna leh theihna piak na hita hi.
14001012	Huchi in na ma a kumpipate'n ana neih ngei louh uh, nang nung a leng aneih het louh ding uh sum-le-paite, hauhsaknate, pahtawinate ka hon pe lai ding,” achi hi.
14001013	Huchi in Solomon mun sang chin a kihoupihna biakbuk omna Gibeon a zin Jerusalem ah apai a, Israel tung ah vai ahawmta hi.
14001014	Huan Solomon in kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite akaikhawm a; kangtalai sangkhat-le-zali leh sakol tungtuangmi singkhat-le-sangnih anei a, huaite kangtalai koihna khuate leh Jerusalem a kumpipa omnate ah akoih hi.
14001015	Huchi in kumpipa'n Jerusalem ah suangtum bang mai in dangka-eng leh dangkasikte akoih a, sidar singte leng phaizang a theipi sing bang a tam in akoih lai hi.
14001016	Solomon neih sakolte, Aigupta gam a kipan a lakkhiak ahi a; kumpipa sumsin mite'n huaite ahonhon in akhak zel ua, ahon a lei zel ahi.
14001017	Aiguptate gam a kangtalaite bel dangkasik shekel zaguk zel in aleikhiaksak zel ua; sakolte dangkasik shekel za-le-sawmnga zel in; huchi mah bang in Hitte kumpipa tengteng leh Siria kumpipate kiang ah leng azuaksawn zel uhi.
14002001	Huan Solomon in Toupa min a ding inn leh kumpipa' inn ding toh lam atum hi.
14002002	Solomon in van po ding mi singsagih leh mual a singphukmi singgiat leh amau vengmi sangthum-le-zaguk asep hi.
14002003	Solomon in Tura kumpipa Huram kiang ah, “Ka pa David thil na hihsak a, a-omna inn lamna ding sidarte na khak bang in, kei leng hon kithuahpih sam in.
14002004	Ngai dih, Toupa ka Pathian min a-inn amah a dia lam a, ama a gimlim hal a, tanghou siah koih gige a, Sabbathte, kha thakte, Toupa ka Pathian ankuanglui nite a zingsang leh nitak a halmang thillat latna ding inn ka lam ding ahi. Hiaite Israelte a ding in tangtawn thupiak ahi.
14002005	Huchi in ka inn lam tup athupi mahmah ding ahi; pathian tengteng sang a ka Pathian uh thupizaw ahih ziak in.
14002006	Van, vante van ah leng ta lou ahi ngal a, kua'n ahia a-inn lamsak thei ding? Kei, ama a gimlim halna ding lel chih louh ngal kei leltak in ka lamsak thei mahmah dia hia?
14002007	Huchi in Judah gam leh Jerusalem a mikhutsiamte ka pa David in ana zatsek, tu in ka kiang a omte lak a sem ding in mi khat, dangka-eng, dangkasik, dal, sik lam khoih thei, puan sandup, san-au, dumpuang bawl siam, gelh bangchibang peuh siam mi hon sawl in.
14002008	Lebanon a sidar sing, meilah sing, algum sing leng hon khak lechin; na mite'n Lebanon a singphuk asiam mahmah uh chih ka thei ngal a; huchi in ngai dih, ka mite nang mite lak ah tel sam le uh,
14002009	sing tampi hon ngaihtuahsak ding: ka inn lam tup athupi mahmah ding ahi.
14002010	Ngai dih, na singphuk mite huit buh pota a singnih leh barli buh pota singnih leh uain bath singnih leh thau bath singnih ka pe ding,” chi in mi asawl hi.
14002011	Huchi in Tura kumpipa Huram in, “ Toupa'n amite a-it ziak in akumpipa ding ua nang hon bawl ei ve,” chi in lai khak in Solomon adawng hi.
14002012	Huram in, “ Toupa , Israel' Pathian, lei leh van bawlpa, Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn lam ding a pilna leh theihna nei tapa piltak kumpipa David pepa phat in om hen.
14002013	Mikhutsiam, theihtheihna nei, ka pa Huram amah mah, ka hon sawl a,
14002014	Dan suan a mi numei khat tapa ngei, apa bel Tura a mi, dangka-eng lam, dangkasik lam, dal lam, sik lam, suang lam, sing lam, puan sandup, dumpuang, puanmalngat, sandang khoihsa, gelh bangchibang leng siam, siam chiteng siam ahi a; nang mikhutsiamte leh ka pu, na pa David khutsiamte lak ah ahong sem ding uhi.
14002015	Huchi in huit buh, barli buh, thau, uain thu ka toupa'n agen asikhate hon khak hen.
14002016	Huchi in kou Lebanon a sing na deih zahzah ka na phuk ding ua, tuipi ah Jopa tan in ka hon tolhsak ding uh; huan, nang Jerusalem ah na nawntou ding hi,” achi hi.
14002017	Huan Solomon in Israel gam a apa David in asimsa, namdangmi tengteng asim a, nuaikhat singnga sangthum-le-zaguk ahi uh.
14002018	Huchi in van po ding mi singsagih leh tang a singphukmi singgiat leh mipite sepdan ngaihtuahsak ding mi sangthum-le-zaguk asep hi.
14003001	Huchi in Solomon in Jerusalem a Moriah tang, apa David kiang a Toupa kilakna, Jebus mi Ornan phualzang, David sehsa ah Toupa' inn alam panta hi.
14003002	Avaihawm akum lina kum, akha nihna, ani nih ni inn lam apan hi.
14003003	Pathian inn lamdan ding Solomon in angaihtuahdan hichibang ahi. Adunglam tong tehdan ngeina in tong sawmguk ahi a, availam tong sawmnih ahi.
14003004	Amalam a inlim dunglam inn vailam tan mah tong sawmnih ahi a, asanlam za-le-sawmnih ahi a, asung dangka-eng chi kia in aluan hi.
14003005	Dantan lianzaw pen baang ah meilah sing athuap a, huai dangka-eng chi kia in aluan a, huai ah tum sing leh khainiang lim atuangsak hi.
14003006	Huchi in akilawmsak ding in bel suangmantam in azem a, dangka-eng bel Paravaim dangka-eng ahi.
14003007	Inn bel, kalhkangte, baangte, apialkhangte, kongkhakte dangka-eng in aluan a; baangte ah cherub limte atuangsak hi.
14003008	Mun Siangthoupen abawl a, adunglam in vailam tan mah, tong sawmnih ahi a, availam tong sawmnih ahi a, dangka-eng chi ngen in aluan a, talent zaguk apha hi.
14003009	Akilhna gikdan dangka-eng shekel sawmnga ahi. Dantan tungnungte dangka-eng in aluan hi.
14003010	Mun Siangthoupen ah cherub lim nih abawl a, huaite dangka-eng in aluan hi.
14003011	Cherub khate'n tong sawmnih akhak a, cherub khat kha tong nga ahi a, baang apha a, huan, akha langkhat leng tong nga mah ahi a, cherub khat kha apha hi.
14003012	Huchi in cherub dang khat kha leng tong nga ahi a, baang a pha a; huan, akha langkhat tong nga mah ahi a, cherub khat kha apha hi.
14003013	Cherubte'n tong sawmnih khak in akha uh azak ua, adingh ua, insung lam nga in adingh uhi.
14003014	Puanzak ding adumpuang, asandup, asan-au, khauzang ngatte in abawl a, huai ah cherub lim atuangsak hi.
14003015	Inn mailam ah tong sawmthum leh tong nga a sang khuam nih aphut a, huaite dawn tong nga tuaktuak ahi.
14003016	Huai ah khainiang abawl a, khuam dawn ah avial a; theibuhfai zakhat abawl a, khainiang ah akhai hi.
14003017	Tempul mailam ah khuam aphut a, khat taklam ah, khat veilam ah, taklam a pen Jakin achi a, veilam a pen Boaz achi hi.
14004001	Dal maitam, adunglam tong sawmnih, availam tong sawmnih, asandan tong sawm abawl hi.
14004002	Dal lohbem lianpi, agei leh agei kikal a tong sawm kia, asandan tong nga abawl a; agei akimvel in tong sawmthum ahi.
14004003	Agei nuai bawngtal limte in avelsuak a, tong khat ah sawm zel, dal loh kimvel in a-om hi. Bawngtal limte vual nih ahi a, dal loh akimat a sun ahi.
14004004	Huchi in bel bawngtal sawm-le-nih tung ah akinga a, thum in mallam anga ua, thum in tumlam anga ua, thum in simlam anga ua, thum in suahlam anga uh; dal loh bel huaite tung ah akoih a, anunglam anga hi.
14004005	Loh pen khutpek tan in asah a, agei ahihleh nou gei bangbang, lili pak bang a bawl ahi a, bath sangthum ta ahi.
14004006	Kisilna ding kuangzawn, sawm abawl lai a, taklam sang ah nga atung a, veilam sang ah nga atung a; huaite bel halmang thillat silna ding ahi; huan, dal lohbem bel siampute kisilna ding ahi.
14004007	Huan bawldan ding a aseh bang in, dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sawm abawl a, tempul sung taklam ah nga, veilam ah nga akoih hi.
14004008	Dohkan sawm abawl lai a, tempul sung ah taklam ah nga, veilam ah nga akoih a, dangka-eng kuangzawn zakhat abawl hi.
14004009	Huai lou leng siampute huang leh huang zapite a-um a, huang kongkhakte abawl a, dal in aluan hi.
14004010	Loh pen inn taklam pang ah suahlam ah simdoh in atung hi.
14004011	Huram in belte, vutluahnate, kuangzawnte abawl hi. Huchi in Pathian inn a ding a kumpipa Solomon abawlsak Huram in azouta hi.
14004012	Khuam nihte, noubemte khuam dawn a zing nihte, khuam dawn a noubem nihte tuamna gial chitek nihte;
14004013	huai tuamna gial chitek nih ding a theibuhfai zalite khuam dawn a noubial nih tuamna ding gial chitek tuaktuak ding a theibuhfai vual nihte.
14004014	Kingaknate, kingakna tung a kuangzawnte leng abawl a;
14004015	Loh khat leh anuai a bawngtal sawm-le-nihte toh.
14004016	Belte, vutluahnate, sa thuknate leh atui-um belsuan tengteng leng Huram in Toupa' inn a dia dal nawttet akumpipa Solomon abawlsak ahi.
14004017	Huaite Jordan Phaizang ah Sukoth leh Zered bellei mun ah kumpipa'n asung hi.
14004018	Huchibang in Solomon in tui-um belsuan tampi abawl a; dal gikzah buk seng vual ahi kei hi.
14004019	Solomon in Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan om tengteng abawl a, dangka-eng maitamte, tanghou koihna dohkante.
14004020	Seh bang a mun siangthou mai adet ding khawnvak koihnate, akhawnvak nangawn toh, dangka-eng ngen in abawl hi.
14004021	Dangka-eng pakte, khawnvakte leh taitehte, dangka-eng siang ngen in abawl hi.
14004022	Khawnvak puantehnate, maiphiat kuangte, keute, mei laknate dangka-eng siang ngen mah in; huan, insung lutna, insung gilzaw Mun Siangthoupen kongkhakte leh a-inn, tempul kongkhakte dangka-eng in abawl hi.
14005001	Huchi in Solomon in Toupa' inn ding alamzou vekta a; Solomon in apa David in thil ana latsa tengteng alalut a, dangkasik, dangka-eng, vanzat tengteng Pathian inn a goukoihna ah akoihta hi.
14005002	Huchi in Solomon in Israel upate, anam intekte, Israel suante inkuan makaite tengteng, David khopi Zion a kipan Toupa thukhun bawm zawngtou ding in Jerusalem ah akaikhawm hi.
14005003	Huchi in Israel mi tengteng akha sagihna a ankuangluina ah kumpipa kiang ah ahohkhawm uhi.
14005004	Israel upate tengteng ahong ua, Levite'n bawm azawng uhi.
14005005	Huchi in Toupa bawm leh kihoupihna biakbuk leh puanin a tui-um belsuan siangthou tengteng azawngtou ua; siampu Levite'n azawngtou uhi.
14005006	Kumpipa Solomon leh Israelte omkhawm tengteng akiang a hong kikhawmte bawm ma ah a-omkhawm ua, belam leh bawngtal gen seng vual louh leh sim seng vual louh in akithoih uhi.
14005007	Huchi in siampute'n Toupa thukhun bawm a-omna ding ah alalut ua, insung a biakna mun, Mun Siangthoupen ah, cherubte kha nuai ah.
14005008	Cherubte'n bawm omna tung zawn ah akha uh azak gige ua, cherubte'n bawm leh azawnna chiangtawnte akhuh vek uhi.
14005009	Azawnna chiangtawnte asau mahmah a, azawnna chiangtawnte kongte biakna mun mai, Mun Siangthou a kipan in amuh theih a; himahleh polam ah zaw adawk kei: tutan huai ah a-om nilouh hi.
14005010	Aigupta gam a kipan apawt ua, Toupa'n Israel suante kiang a thu akhun lai Mosi in Horeb tang a suangpek nih akoih kia lou ngal huai bawm sung ah bangmah dang a-om kei hi.
14005011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, siampute Mun Siangthou a kipan a ahong pawttak un, siampu omte tengteng akisiangsak ua, apawl in akibawl tuan kei ua;
14005012	Levi lasami tengteng leng avek un, Asaph, Heman, Jeduthun, atapate uh leh a-unaute uh toh, puanmalngat silh a kivan in dakkhutbette, pekgingte, kaihgingte toh, maitam suahlam sang ah adingh ua, alak uah siampu za-le-sawmnih pengkul mut in a-om lai uhi.
14005013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, pengkul mutte leh lasa mite'n Toupa phatna leh kipahthu genna dia atumging uh ging khat bang mai in akiza a; pengkul leh dakkhutbet leh thil tumging toh a-aw uh asuah ua: “Amah lah ahoih ngal a; azahngaihna tangtawn a om ding ahi ngal a,” chi a, Toupa aphat uleh, meipi in Toupa' inn akhuhdim meuhmouh hi.
14005014	Huchi in meipi ziak in siampute'n nna asem theita kei ua; Toupa thupina in Pathian inn adim vek hi.
14006001	Huchi in Solomon in thu agen a, “ Toupa'n , mial bikbek ah ka om ding, achi a,
14006002	himahleh na tenna ding, tangtawn a na omna ding inn ka hon lamsakta hi,” chi in.
14006003	Huchi in kumpipa akihei a, Israel kikhawm tengteng avualzawl a; Israel kikhawmte adingkhawm uhi.
14006004	Ama'n, “ Toupa Israel' Pathian, ka pa David kiang a amah kam mahmah a,
14006005	Aigupta gam a kipan ka mi Israelte ka pikhiak ni a kipan Israelte nam lak a koi khua mah ka min omna ding inn lamna ding ka tel ngei kei a; ka mi Israelte tung a heutu ding mi kuamah ka tel ngei kei hi.
14006006	Himahleh, ka min omna ding in Jerusalem ka telta a, ka mi Israelte heutu ding in David ka tel hi, chi a genpa, amah khut mahmah a hon pichingsakpa phat in om hen.
14006007	“Ka pa David in Israel' Pathian, Toupa min ding a inn lam angaihtuah hi.
14006008	Himahleh Toupa'n ka pa, David kiang ah, ka min ding a inn lam na ngaihtuah a, hichibang lungsim na na put na hihhoih hi; himahleh nang zaw inn na lam kei ding;
14006009	na tapa, na khal a hong pawt ding in ka min ding in inn ahon lam zaw ding, ana chita hi.
14006010	“Huchi in Toupa'n athugen atangtungsakta a: Toupa chiamsa bang ngei in ka pa David mun ka hon luah a, Israel laltutphah ah ka hong tu a, Israel' Pathian Toupa min ding inn ka hon lamta ahi.
14006011	Huai ah Israel suante kiang a na khun, Toupa thukhun bawm ka koihta ahi,” achi hi.
14006012	Huan Toupa maitam bul ah Israel kikhawm tengteng muh in adingh a, aban azak a,
14006013	Solomon in dal dohkan asau lam tong nga, azatlam tong nga, asanlam tong thum a bawl huang laitak a tun tung ah atuang a, Israel kikhawm tengteng ma ah akhukdin a, van lam nga in aban azak a:
14006014	“Aw Toupa , Israel' Pathian, lei leh van ah nangmah bang mahmah Pathian a-om kei uh, alungtang tengteng ua na lampi tawnmi asikhate tung a thukhun tangtungsak a hehpihna kem,
14006015	na sikha, ka pa David kiang a, na thuchiam na tangtungsak a; ahi, tuni in na kam a na gensa na khut in na lohchingsakta a:
14006016	Huchi in aw Toupa , Israel' Pathian, na sikha, ka pa David kiang a, na suante na om bang a om sam ding a-omdan ua apilvan peuhmah uleh, ka mitmuh a Israelte laltutphah a tu ding na tasam kei ding, chi a na chiamsa tangtungsak in.
14006017	Huchi in Toupa , Israel' Pathian, na sikha, David kiang a na thugen lohchingsak mahmah in.
14006018	“Himahleh, Pathian lei ah mihing lak ah a-om petmah dia hia? Ngai in, van, vante van ah leng na ta kei a, hiai ka inn lam ah ta kei sem na tel ni chia!
14006019	Himahleh, aw Toupa ka Pathian na sikha in nang ahon sapna leh athumna ngaihkhiaksak in, na sikha thumna leh ngetna hon limsak in.
14006020	Hiai mun lam nga a na sikha thumna ngaikhia a, huai ah ka min a-om ding, na chihna mun mahmah, inn lam ah sun leh zan a na mitsuan gige theihna ding in.
14006021	Na sikha leh na mi Israelte'n hiai mun lam nga a athum chiang un angetnate uh na ngaihkhiaksak zel in, ahi, na tenna mun van ah na ngaikhia inla, na zak chiang in ngaidam in.
14006022	“Mi kuapeuh in a-invengte tung ah thil hihkhial in, kichiamsak hong kiphamoh taleh, hiai inn a na maitam ma ah hong kichiam henla;
14006023	nang van ah na ngaikhia inla, gamtang inla, migilou agitlouh man a moh tangsak in, midiktat adiktak man a dik tangsak in, na sikhate vai hawmsak in.
14006024	“Na mi Israelte'n na tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ua melmate lak a avuallelh ua, nang lam ahong ngat nawn ua, na min agup ua, hiai inn a thum a thil na kiang a ahon nget uleh;
14006025	nang van a pan na ngaihkhiaksak inla, na mi Israelte khelhna ngaidam inla, amau leh api-le-pute uh na piak gam ah pi nawn in.
14006026	“Na tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ua van ahong bin a, vuah ahong zuk louh a, hiai mun lam nga a athum ua, na min agup uleh, amaute na hihgim ziak a akhelhna uh akisik uleh;
14006027	nang van ah na ngaikhia inla, apaina ding uh lampi hoih kawkmuh in na sikhate leh na mi Israelte khelhna ngaidam in na mite agoutan ding ua na piakna gam ah vuah zusak in.
14006028	Ka gam ua kial ahong kiak a, hipi ahong len a, keuna hiam, muatna hiam, khaukhup hiam, lung hiam ahong om a, amelmate un akhuate uh ahong um ua, hipi bangpeuh, natna bangpeuh ahong tunleh hii avei uhiam, alungkhamna uh theipih in.
14006029	Hiai inn lam nga a ban zak a mimal hiam, Israel mipihon in hiam thumna leh ngetna ahon tut uh:
14006030	Na omna van a pan na ngaikhia inla, ngaidam inla, michih a-omdan bang chiat un lohchingsak in, alungtang uh lah na thei ngal a; nangmah kia mihing tate lungtang theipa na hi.
14006031	Ka pi-le-pute uh na piak gam a a-om sung teng ua na lampi tawn thei ding a nang laudan ahong siamna ding un.
14006032	“Na mi Israelte hilou, namdangmi, na min thupitak leh na khut hattak leh na ban zak ziak a gam gamlatak a kipan a hong pai, hiai inn lam nga a ahong thum chiang un:
14006033	Nang na omna van ah na ngaikhia inla, nang hon sapdan uh dungzui in namdangte tung ah leng hih in, huchi in na mi Israelte bangmah in leitung a mi tengteng in na min athei ding ua, nang laudan ahong siam ding ua, hiai ka inn lam in na min apu chih athei ding uhi.
14006034	“Na mite'n amelmate uh na sawlna lamlam a asual ua na khopi tel leh na min omna dia na lam inn lam nga a na kiang a athum uleh:
14006035	Nang athumna uh leh angetna uh van a pan na ngaikhia inla, athu uah pi zel in.
14006036	“Na tung a ahong khelh ua, kuamah lah khial lou a-om ngal kei a, atung ua na heh a, melma khut a na piak a, gam gamlapi ah hiam, naideuh ah hiam sal a api un leng,
14006037	sal a apina gam ua akingaihtuahkhiak ua, akisik ua, ‘I na khialta, dikloutak leh gitlouhhuaitak in thil i na hihta,’ chi a atanna gam ua ngetna ahon tut ua;
14006038	sal a amau apina ua, atanna gam ua alungtangtak uleh alungsim taktak ua nang lam ahong ngat ua, api-le-pute uh gam lam leh na khopi tel leh na min dia ka lam inn lam nga a na kiang a athum uleh;
14006039	athumna uh leh angetna uh nang na omna van ah na ngaikhia inla, athu uah pi zel inla, na tung a na khialta na mite ngaidam in.
14006040	“Aw ka Pathian, hehpih in na mit hong hak inla, hiai mun athumna ah na bildoh in.
14006041	“Aw Toupa Pathian, na omna mun ah paitou in nang leh na hatna bawm toh, Aw Toupa Pathian, na siampute na hotdamna in van inla, na misiangthoute hoihna in nuamsasak in.
14006042	Aw Toupa Pathian, na thaunilhpa mel lehngatsan ke'nla, na sikha David thil hoih hihte theigige in,” achi hi.
14007001	Huchi in Solomon athum khit in van a kipan mei ahong kesuk a, halmang thillat leh kithoihnate ahong kangmangta a, huan Toupa thupina'n inn adimta hi.
14007002	Toupa thupina in Toupa' inn adimsak ziak in Toupa' inn ah siampute alut thei kei uhi.
14007003	Israel suante in van a kipan a mei hong lengsuk leh inn tung a Toupa thupina a-en nilouh ua, suanglep tung ah mai a lei si in abokkhup ua, Toupa phat in abia uhi. “Amah lah ahoih ngal a, azahngaihna tangtawn in a-om ding hi,” chi in chibai abuk ua, kipahthu agen uhi.
14007004	Kumpipa leh mipite'n Toupa ma ah kithoihnate alan uhi.
14007005	Kumpipa Solomon in kithoihna bawngtal singnih-le-sangnih leh belam nuaikhat-le-singnih alan uhi. Huchibang in kumpipa leh mipite'n Pathian inn alan uhi.
14007006	Huan siampute amun chiat uah adingh ua; Levite leng Toupa kiang a kipahthu genna ding a phuah, azahngaihna tangtawn in a-om ding hi, chi a Toupa phatna dia David in azat sek, thil ging thei toh Toupa lasa in adingh ua; huchi in siampute'n pengkul amut ua, Israel mi tengteng adingh diamduam uhi.
14007007	Solomon in Toupa' inn mazawn a um sung kongtual ahihsiangthou behlap a; huai ah halmang thillatte, lemna thillat thaute alan a; Solomon dal maitam bawl halmang thillat, tangbuang thillat, thaute latna ding a aneu luat ziak in.
14007008	Huchi in huai tung in Solomon leh Israel mi tengteng mipi kikaikhawm thupitak Hamath kholutna a kipan a Aigupta gam lui pha a mite toh ni sagih ankuang alui uhi.
14007009	Ani giat ni in kikhopna tak anei ua; maitam kipahpihna ding in ni sagih azang ua, ankuanglui ni a ding in ni sagih azang uhi.
14007010	Huchi in akha sagihna ani sawmnih-le-thum ni in mipite akikhensak a, Toupa'n David leh Solomon leh ami Israelte tung a ahoihna alatsak ziak in nuamsatak leh kipaktak in mite a-inn lam chiat uah apaita uhi.
14007011	Huchibang in, Solomon in Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn apichinta a; Solomon in alungsim a atup bang in Toupa' inn leh ama inn lamzangtak in apichinta hi.
14007012	Huan zan in Solomon kiang ah Toupa ahong kilak a, akiang ah, “Na thumna ka za a, hiai mun kei a ding in kithoihna inn ding in ka sep khin hi.
14007013	Vante ka khak a, vuahte azuk louh in hiam, khaukhup ka sawl a, gamte ahihsiat hiam, ka mite lak a hipi ka lensak hiam a;
14007014	ka min pu ka mite kingaineu a athum ua, ahon zon ua, a-omdan giloute uh alehngatsan uleh van a kipan in ka na ngaikhe ding a, akhelhna uh ka ngaidam ding a, agam uh ka damsak ding hi.
14007015	Hiai mun a thumna ka mit ka suan ding a, ka bil ka doh ding hi.
14007016	Huai a ka min tangtawn a a-omtheihna ding in hiai inn ka sep a, ka hihsingthouta hi: huai ah ka mit leh ka lungtang a-om tawntungta ding hi.
14007017	Huan nang tungtang thu ah leng, na pa David bang a ka mitmuh a na om a, thu ka hon piak bang a na om a, ka dan thusehte leh ka vaihawmte na zuihleh:
14007018	Israelte lak ah ‘vaihawmmi na tasam kei ding,’ chi a na pa David kiang a ka thukhun bang in ‘na gam laltutphah ka kipsak ding hi.’
14007019	Himahleh na kiheimang ua, ka dan thusehte leh ka thupiakte na lehngatsan ua, Pathian dangte nna na sep ua, na biak uleh:
14007020	Amau ka piak gam a kipan ka hon hihmang ding a; hiai inn, ka min ding a ka hihsiangthousa, ka mitmuh phak louh ah ka suanmang ding a, nam chih lak a paunak leh aselam a gentehna ding in ka bawl ding hi.
14007021	‘Hiai inn sangpi akiang a pai peuh in lamdang asa ding ua, bangchi a hiai gam leh hiai inn Toupa'n hichi a hih ahia? achi ding uh.’
14007022	Toupa , apipute uh Pathian, ‘Aigupta gam a kipan pikhepa alehngatsan ua, Pathian dangte zui a, abiak ua, a-nnate asep ziak un hiai siatna tengteng atung uah atung ahi, ahon chi ding uh achi hi.’ ”
14008001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Solomon in Toupa' inn leh ama inn alam sung kum sawmnih abei in,
14008002	Huram in Solomon khopi apiakte Solomon in inn abawl a, Israel suante a-omsak hi.
14008003	Solomon in Hamath-zobah asual a, azou hi,
14008004	Gamdai ah, Tadmor abawl a, Hamath a vankoihna khuate toh.
14008005	Beth-horon saknungzaw leh khangnungzaw leng, kulhte, kongkhakte, akalhnate nei in abawlbeh hi.
14008006	Baalath khuate, avankoihna khua tengteng, akangtalai koihna khuate, asakol tungtuang mite omna khuate, Jerusalem leh Lebanon leh agamsung pumpi ah Solomon in adeih bangbang in abawl hi.
14008007	Israel suante hilou, Hitte, Amorte, Perizte, Hivte, Jebuste suan a om lai mite tengteng;
14008008	Israel suante'n ahihmanlouhte uh, huai gam a amaute nung a nutsiat a om asuante uh, tutan a, Solomon in sikha nasem ding a goih teitei pawl ding in abawl hi.
14008009	Israel suante Solomon in anasemmi sikha ding in abawl kei a, kidou mite, asepaih heutute makaite, akangtalai leh asakol tungtuangmi heutu ahi zaw uhi.
14008010	Huaite mipite heutu, Solomon makai lianpente ahi ua, zanih-le-sawmnga ahi uhi.
14008011	Solomon in David khopi a kipan atuam a inn alamsak ah Pharaoh tanu apitou a, “Ka zi Israel kumpipa David inn a om ding ahi kei, Toupa bawm hong tunna mun siang ahi,” achi hi.
14008012	Huchi in Solomon in inlim mai a Toupa a ding a Toupa maitam abawl tung ah halmang thillatte alan hi.
14008013	Mosi thupiak, niteng a dia bikhiah bangbang in Sabbath ni ah, kha thak ni, ankuanglui hun nei, kum khat a thumvei, Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluinate, Nipikal Ankuangluinate, Biakbuk Ankuangluinate,
14008014	Huan apa David na seh bang in siampu pawlte leh Levite atantuam chiat ua, niteng a sep kul dungzui zel a, phat dingte, siampute ma a nasem ding in asep a; kongkhak teng ah apawlpawl a veng mite asep lai a; huchibang in Pathian mipa David in ana sep hi.
14008015	Kumpipa'n siampute, Levite thu apiak bangchi mah in sumthute leng apialsan het kei uhi.
14008016	Toupa' inn abawlkhiak tung ua kipan a azoh tan un, Solomon in asuktuahsa bang geih ahi. Huchi in Toupa' inn pichin ahita hi.
14008017	Huchi in Solomon bel Edom gam a luipi gei a Ezion-geber ah leh Eloth ah ahoh a,
14008018	Huram in asikha tuipi a gamtangmi, longte toh akuansak a, Solomon sikhate toh Ophir ah ahoh ua, huai ah dangka-eng talent zali-le-sawmnga ahon pua ua, kumpipa Solomon kiang ah hon tun uhi.
14009001	Solomon minthandan Sheba kumpinu'n azak in Solomon thuhaksa pipi a ettel tum in nungzui mi tampi toh sangawngsaute a gimlim leh dangka-eng tampi leh suangmantamte pua in Jerusalem ah ahohtou a: Solomon kiang atuntouh in, alungsim a om tengteng suahsiang vek in ahoupih hi.
14009002	Huan Solomon in athudot tengteng adawng vek a: Solomon in adawn theih louh himhim a-om kei hi.
14009003	Huchi in Sheba kumpinu'n Solomon pilna leh a-inn lam amuh in,
14009004	adohkan a nek dingte, asikhate tutdante, anasemte nasepdante, akivatdante uh, anou pe mite leh akivatdante uh, Toupa' inn a hohtouhnate, alungmang hial hi.
14009005	Kumpipa kiang ah, “Na thilhihte leh na pildan thuthang ka gam a ka zak adik mahmah ahi.
14009006	Himahleh keimah mit mahmah a ka hong muh masiah agen kia uh ka um thei kei a, ngai in, na pilna thupidan akimkhat leng ahon na hilh kei uh: na minthanna ka zakte nakpi in na khup hi.
14009007	Na mite nak hamphat na uh e, hiai na sikha na kiang a om gige a na pilna thu ngaikhe gigete hampha hi na tel uh e!
14009008	Toupa na Pathian, na tung a kipak, akumpipa ding a alaltutphah a hon tusakpa Toupa na Pathian phat in om hen: na Pathian in Israelte tangtawn a hihkip ding in a-it a, huaiziak in diktattak a vaihawm ding in akumpipa ding ua nang hon bawl ahi ve,” achi hi.
14009009	Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah dangka-eng talent za-le-sawmnih leh gimlim tampi mahmah leh suangmantamte apia a, Sheba kumpinu'n kumpipa Solomon gimlim apiak bang himhim a-om ngei kei hi.
14009010	Huan Solomon sikhate leh Huram sikhate Ophir a kipan a dangka-eng va pote'n algum sing leh suangmantam ahon pua uhi.
14009011	Kumpipa'n algum sing Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn umna ding leh lasa mite a ding a kaihging leh pekging ding in abawl a: huchibang Judah gam ah tuma lam in amu ngei kei uhi.
14009012	Sheba kumpinu'n athil apiak sim louh in kumpipa Solomon in adeihdeih ape sam a, huchi in agam lam ah aheute toh apai nawnta uhi.
14009013	Huchi in Solomon kiang a kum khat sung a dangka-eng hong lut gikdan dangka-eng talent zaguk sawmguk-le-guk buk ahi.
14009014	Mi ompolhte leh sumsin mite hon tawi sim het louh in: huan, Arabia kumpipa tengteng leh gam ukpate'n Solomon kiang ah dangka-engte, dangkasikte ahon tawi sek uhi.
14009015	Kumpipa Solomon in dangka-eng sekthoh in lum lian chi zanih abawl a, lum lian khat ah dangka-eng shekel zaguk abei hi.
14009016	Dangka-eng sukpek in lum zathum abawl a; lum khat zel ah dangka-eng shekel zathum abei a; huaite Lebanon gammang inn ah akoih hi.
14009017	Huan kumpipa'n Saihapak laltutphah thupitak abawl behlap a, dangka siang ngen in aluan hi.
14009018	Laltutphah a akaltouhna siksan gukte, laltutphah toh azop, dangka-eng khe ngaknate, aban ngakna bul a ding humpinelkai lim nihte a-om hi.
14009019	Siksan guk lang tuak tung ah humpinelkai sawm-le-nih adingh uhi. Huchibang koi lai gam ah leng abawl ngei kei uh.
14009020	Kumpipa Solomon nou tengteng dangka-eng vek ahi a, Lebanon gammang inn a tui-um belsuan tengteng leng dangka-eng siang vek ahi; Solomon dam lai in dangkasik bangmah in asim kei uhi.
14009021	Kumpipa'n longhon, Huram sikhate, Tarshish a hohsek kikoppih anei a, kum thum hal zel in, Tarshish longhon in dangka-eng, dangkasik, saiha, zawng leh utongte, ahon po sek hi.
14009022	Huchi in kumpipa Solomon in leitung kumpipa tengteng hauhsakna leh pilna lam ah akhup vek hi.
14009023	Huchi in Pathian in alungtang a akoih, apilna thu ngaikhe ding in, kumpipa tengteng in Solomon ahon zuan huthut uhi.
14009024	Kum teng a piak bikhiah nei in dangkasik tui-um belsuan dangka-eng tui-um belsuan puante, galvante, gimlimte, sakolte, sabiltungte ape zel uhi.
14009025	Huan Solomon in sakol leh kangtalai koihna mun sangli anei a, huan sakol tungtuangmi singkhat-le-sangnih anei a, huaite kangtalai koihna khuate ah, Jerusalem kumpipa kiangte ah a-omsak hi.
14009026	Huchi in lui a kipan a Philistia gam leh Aigupta gam tan a kumpipa tengteng tung ah vai ahawm hi.
14009027	Jerusalem ah kumpipa'n dangkasikte suang bang mai a tam in a-omsak a, sidar singte phaizang a theipite bang lel a ngaih in a-omsak hi.
14009028	Solomon a ding in sakolte Aigupta a kipan leh gam chih a kipan in ahon la zel uhi.
14009029	Solomon tanchin dangte abul a kipan atawp tanpha in, zawlnei Nathan gelh tanchinbu ah, Shilon mi Ahijah genkholhna bu ah, Nebat tapa Jeroboam tungtang thu a zawlnei Iddo mengmuh gelhna bu ah atuang kei maw?
14009030	Solomon in Jerusalem ah Israel mi tengteng tung ah kum sawmli vai ahawm hi.
14009031	Solomon bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, apa David khua ah avui ua, asik in atapa Rehoboam in vai ahawm hi.
14010001	Rehoboam bel Shekem ah ahoh a; Israelte tengteng Shekem ah kumpipa dia bawl ding in ahoh khinta uhi.
14010002	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam in huai thu azak in, Aigupta gam a kipan Jeroboam ahong pai nawn hi; amah kumpipa Solomon kiang a kipan ataimangna Aigupta gam a om lai ahi ngal a.
14010003	Mi asawl ua, ava sam ua; huchi in Jeroboam leh Israel tengteng ahong pai ua, Rehoboam kiang ah,
14010004	“Na pa'n ka hakkol uh agiksak mahmah a; huaiziak in na pa'n hon zat gimna leh ahakkol giktak ka tung ua akoih hon sukzangsak inla, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh,” chi in agen uhi.
14010005	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ni thum khit chiang in hong pai nawn zaw un,” achi a, huchi in mipite akihemkhia uhi.
14010006	Kumpipa Rehoboam in, “Hiai mipite dawnna ding thupha bang ahia na hon hilh ding uh?” chi in apa Solomon dam lai a upate kiang ah adong hi.
14010007	Amau akiang ah, “Hiai mipite na hehpih a na kipahsak a, akiang ua thuhoih tata na genleh tangtawn in na mite ahi ding uh,” chi in agen uhi.
14010008	Himahleh, upate hoihsakpih apom kei a, amah khanvualpih tangvalte, akiang a om sekte adong zosop hi.
14010009	Akiang uah, “Hiai mipite ka kiang a, ‘Na pa'n ka tung ua hakkol akoih hon hihzangsak in chi a gen mite ka dawndan ding hoih bang ahia na hon hilh ding uh?’ ” achi hi.
14010010	Akhanvualpih tangvalte'n akiang ah hiai mipite na pa'n ahakkol uh ahihgik thei mahmah a, nang zaw hon hihzangsakzaw in na kiang a hong gen mite kiang ah huchi in chi inla, huchi in akiang uah gen in, “Ka pa kawng sang in ka khutzung agolzaw.
14010011	Ka pa'n hakkol giktak ahon na posak a, ke'n ahihleh na hakkol uh behlap lai ding ka hi, ka pa'n khetna in nou ahon sawi zel a, ke'n ahihleh aikam a hon sawi ding ka hi,” chi in agen uhi.
14010012	Huchi in Jeroboam leh mipite tengteng kumpipa'n, “Ani thum khit chiang in hong nawn un, achih bang in ni thum ni in Rehoboam kiang ah ahoh uhi.
14010013	Kumpipa'n amaute gumtak in adawng a, kumpipa Rehoboam in upate thuhilhna apom kei.
14010014	Tangvalte phatsakpih bang in, ka pa'n na hakkol uh ahihgik a, ke'n huai behlap ding ka hi; ka pa'n khetna in nou ahon na sawi a, ke'n zaw aikam a nou hon sawi ding ka hi,” achi hi.
14010015	Huchi in Toupa'n Shilon mi Ahijah zang a, Nebat tapa Jeroboam kiang a athu gensa akipsak theihna ding in kumpipa'n mite thugen Pathian ziak in apom kei hi.
14010016	Kumpipa'n athu uh apom kei chih Israelte tengteng in atheih un mipite'n: “David ah tantuan bang ahia i neih uh? Jesse tapa ah gouluah ding i nei sam kei uh, Israel mite aw, na puanin lam chiat uah pai un: David, na inkuan sung ngaihtuah mai in, chi in kumpipa adawng uhi.” Huchi in Israel tengteng apuanin lam uah apaita uhi.
14010017	Israel suan Judah gam khua a omte bel atung uah Rehoboam in vai ahawm hi.
14010018	Huchi in kumpipa Rehoboam in phutluih nasem dia asawlte uh heutu Hadoram asawl a; amah huai Israelte tengteng in suang in ana deng ua, asita hi. Jerusalem a tai tum in akangtalai ah kumpipa Rehoboam atuang pah hi.
14010019	Huchi in tutan in David inkote tung ah Israelte ahelta uhi.
14011001	Huan Jerusalem a Rehoboam atuntouh in, Israelte dou a, Rehoboam gam la nawn ding in Judah nuaikhat leh Benjamin inkote, mihangsan chiat telkhiak, nuaikhat-le-singgiattak akaikhawm hi.
14011002	Himahleh Pathian mipa Shemaiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
14011003	Judah gam kumpipa Solomon tapa Rehoboam kiang ah leh Judah gam leh Benjamin gam a Israel mi tengteng kiang ah,
14011004	“ Toupa'n hichi in achi: na hohtou ding uh ahi kei, na unaute uh dou sam kei un; na inn lam uah pai nawn vek un; hiai keimah hih ahi hi, chi in gen in,” chi in. Huchi in Toupa thu amang ua, Jeroboam dou ding a ahoh ding uh akik nawn uhi.
14011005	Rehoboam bel Jerusalem ah a-om a, Judah gam ah kivenna ding in khua asat hi.
14011006	Bethlehem khuate, Etam, Tekoa asat a,
14011007	Beth-zur, Shoko, Adullam,
14011008	Gath, Mareshah, Jip,
14011009	Adoraim, Lakish, Azekah,
14011010	Zorah, Aijalon, Hebron khua; huaite Judah leh Benjamin gam a kulh nei khopite ahi.
14011011	Huchi in huai kulhte ahihkip a, heutute akoih a, nek ding, thau leh uain asekkhawm hi.
14011012	Kho teng ah lum leh tei akoih a, khua kiptak in abawl chiat hi. Huchi in Judah leh Benjamin gam ama gam ahisak hi.
14011013	Huan Israel gam tengteng a siampute leh Levite amau gam a kipan chiat in akiang ah ahong uhi.
14011014	Levite'n agam uh leh a-omnate uh apawtsan ua, Judah gam leh Jerusalem ah ahoh uh; Jeroboam leh atapate'n Toupa a dia siampu nna sem lou ding in atawpsak uhi.
14011015	Amun sang a ding leh keltal leh bawngnou lim abawl a ding a siampute aseh zawk ziak in.
14011016	Huan Israel nam, Toupa Israel' Pathian lam a lungsim awn tengteng in azui ua, Toupa , apipute uh Pathian kiang ah kithoih ding in Jerusalem ah ahoh uhi.
14011017	Huchi in Judah gam akipsak ua, kum thum sung Solomon tapa Rehoboam in akipsak hi: kum thum sung David leh Solomon lampi azui uhi.
14011018	Rehoboam in David tapa Jerimoth tanu Mahalath zi in anei a, huai Jesse tapa Eliab tanu ahihleh Abihail tanu ahi.
14011019	Tapate aneihsak a: Jeush, Shemariah leh Zaham ahi uh.
14011020	Amah nung in Absalom tanu Maakah anei a; ama'n Abijah, Atai, Ziza leh Shelomith aneihsak hi.
14011021	Rehoboam in Absalom tanu Maakah bel azite leh amite tengteng tung ah a-it tuan a; zi sawm-le-giat leh mei sawmguk anei a, tapa sawmnih-le-giat leh tanu sawmguk anei ahi.
14011022	Rehoboam in Maakah tapa Abijah, a-unaute lak ah makai lianpen in abawl a; kumpipa ding a bawl alungsim ahi zomah hi.
14011023	Piltak in agamta a, atapate tengteng Judah gam leh Benjamin gam tengteng kulh nei khopite ah a-om zaksak vek a; nek ding tampi apia a, zi tampi azonsak chiat hi.
14012001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Rehoboam in gam aphutkip a, mihattak ahong hih nung in amah lam a pang Israel tengteng toh Toupa Dan alehngatsan uhi.
14012002	Hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa Rehoboam vaihawm akum ngana kum in, Toupa tung a atatlek ziak un, Jerusalem sim ding in Aigupta kumpipa Shishak ahong kuantou hi,
14012003	Kangtalai singkhat-le-sangnih leh sakol tungtuangmi singguk toh, Aigupta gammi hon zuite sim vual louh ahi uh; Libiate, Sukite, Ethiopiate ahi uhi.
14012004	Judah gam a kulh nei khopite ala a, Jerusalem ava tung hi.
14012005	Rehoboam leh Judahte intekpen, Shishak ziak a Jerusalem a kikaikhawmte kiang ah zawlnei Shemaiah ahohtou a, akiang uah, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi, na hon lehngatsanta ua, huaiziak in ke'n leng noute Shishak khut ah ka hon koihta ahi achi,” ava chi hi.
14012006	Huchi in Israel intekpen leh kumpipa akiniamkhiak ua, “ Toupa adiktat hi,” achi uhi.
14012007	Toupa'n akiniamkhiak uh atheih in Toupa thu Shemaiah kiang ah ahong tung a, “Akiniamkhiakta ua; ka hihmang vek kei ding a, khenkhat ka humbit ding a, Shishak zang in Jerusalem tung ah ka hehna ka sungbo kei ding.
14012008	Himahleh asikhate ahi ding ua, ka nasep leh gamdangmi nasepdan atheihna ding un,” chi in.
14012009	Huchi in Aigupta kumpipa Shishak Jerusalem sim in apaitou a, Toupa' inn a goute leh kumpipa' inn a goute ala a; ala khin vek hi; Solomon bawl dangka-eng lumte leng ala hi.
14012010	Kumpipa Rehoboam in huaite tang in dal lumte abawl a, kumpipa' inn kongkhak ngakmi sepaih heutute akemsak hi.
14012011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa Toupa' inn a lut teng in veng mite'n ava pi ua, amah dantan ah akhakik nawn zel uhi.
14012012	Akiniamkhiak ziak a hihmanthat ahihlouhna ding in atung a Toupa thangpaihna akiheimangta a; Judah gam leng ahoih gige hi.
14012013	Huchi in kumpipa Rehoboam in avaihawmna Jerusalem ah akipsakta hi: Rehoboam in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmli-le-khat a upa ahi, Toupa'n amin omsakna ding a Israel nam tengteng lak a atel khopi Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-sagih vai ahawm a; anu min Naamah, Ammon mi ahi.
14012014	Toupa zong dia alungsim azat louh ziak in thil hoih lou ahih hi.
14012015	Huchi in Rehoboam tanchin abul a kipan atawp pha in zawlnei Shemaiah gelh tanchinbu ah leh zawlnei Iddo gelh tanchinbu a suante tanchin lak a gelh ahi kei maw? Rehoboam leh Jeroboam bel a kidou nilouh uhi.
14012016	Huan Rehoboam api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, David khua ah avui ua: asik in atapa Abijah in vai ahawm hi.
14013001	Jeroboam kum sawm-le-giat avaihawm kum in Judahte tung ah Abijah in vai ahawm pan hi.
14013002	Jerusalem ah kum thum vai ahawm a, anu min Mikaiah, Gibeah mi Uriel tanu ahi. Huan Abijah leh Jeroboam bel akidou uhi.
14013003	Abijah in sepaih kidoumi, mihangsan telkhiak nuaili toh ava sual a, Jeroboam mihat hangsan telkhiak nuaigiat kiphalh in ana dou uhi.
14013004	Abijah bel Ephraim tanggam a om Zemariam tang tung ah adingh a, “Aw Jeroboam, Israelte tengteng toh na ngaikhia un;
14013005	Toupa Israel' Pathian in Israel gam David leh atate kiang a chi a thukhun in tangtawn a ding in apia chih thei dia kilawm mahmah hilou na hi uh maw?
14013006	Himahleh Nebat tapa Jeroboam, David tapa Solomon sikha apu tung ah ahong hel maimah hi.
14013007	Rehoboam anaupang lai a, alungsim anem lai a, amaute ana nan theih louh lai in Solomon tapa Rehoboam kalh in mithulim lou Belial tate akikaikhawm uhi.
14013008	“David tapa lak ah Toupa gam dou theih na kigingta kei ua: tamkuam leng hi ua, Jeroboam in pathiante ding a nou ahon bawlsak dangka-eng bawngnou limte leng na kiang uah a-om lai hi.
14013009	Toupa siampu, Aaron tapate leh Levite delhkhia in, gamdang mite hihdan bang in siampu na kibawl uh ahi kei maw? Huchi in bawngtuai leh belam sagih a hong kilan peuhmahte pathian hiloupite siampu ahi thei zel mawk uhi.
14013010	“Himahleh kou zaw, ka Pathian uh Toupa ahi a, amah ka lehngatsan kei ua: Toupa a dia nasemmi amau nna chiat sem Aaron tapa siampute leh Levite ka nei uhi.
14013011	Ni teng leh zan teng in Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte, gimlimte ahal zel uh, tanghou siah leng dohkan siangthou ah akoih kichian gige uhi. Nitaklam teng a hal ding in dangka-eng khawnvak koihna akhawnvak toh; kou zaw Toupa ka Pathian uh thupiak ka zui gige ua, nou bel amah na lehngatsan uhi.
14013012	Ngai dih ua, Pathian ka ma uh pi in ka kiang uah a-om a, asiampute leng apengkul ua nou hon noh ding a mut ding in a-om uhi. Aw, Israel suante aw Toupa na pi-le-pute uh Pathian zaw dou mahmah kei un, na lamzang kei hial ding uh,” achi hi.
14013013	Himahleh Jeroboam in anunglam uah aguktansak a: huchi in Judahte malam ah a-om ua, guktan mite anunglam uah a-om uh.
14013014	Judahte alehngat uleh anunglam uh leh amalam uah gal a-omta a, Toupa asam ua, siampute'n pengkul amut uhi.
14013015	Huchi in Judahte akikou zuazua ua; huchi a Judahte akikou zuazua ualeh hichi ahong hi a, Abijah leh Judahte ma ah Toupa'n Jeroboam leh Israelte tengteng avuallelsakta hi.
14013016	Israel suante Judahte ma ah ataikek ua, Pathian in akhut uah apeta hi.
14013017	Huchi in Abijah leh aheute'n amau athat ua: Israel mitel ngen nuainga athat uhi.
14013018	Huai tung in Israel suante vuallelhdan huchibang ahi, Judah suante'n Toupa apipute uh Pathian amuan ziak un azouta uhi.
14013019	Huan Abijah in Jeroboam adelh a, akhuate alaksak a, Bethel akhotate toh, Jeshanah akhotate toh, Ephron akhotate toh.
14013020	Abijah vaihawm lai nite in Jeroboam in dinkhiak zohna anei nawn kei; Toupa'n agawt a, asita hi.
14013021	Abijah bel ahat deuhdeuh a, zi sawm-le-li anei a, tapa sawmnih-le-nih leh tanu sawm-le-guk anei hi.
14013022	Abijah tanchin dangte leh a-omdante, athugente zawlnei Iddo hilhchetna bu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14014001	Huchi in Abijah bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, David khopi ah avui ua, asik in atapa Asa in vai ahawmta hi. Avaihawm sung in agam uh kum sawm galmuang in a-om hi.
14014002	Asa in Toupa a Pathian mitmuh in thil hoih leh thil dik ahih gige hi.
14014003	Gamdang pathian maitamte leh mun sangte alamang a, suangphuhte ahihchim a, Asherah songte aphuk hi.
14014004	Judahte Toupa apipute uh Pathian zong ding leh adan leh athupiak zui ding in thu apia hi.
14014005	Huan Judahte khua tengteng a mun sangte leh milimte alamang vek a; amah nuai ah agam galmuang in a-om hi.
14014006	Judah gam ah kulh nei khopite abawl a, gam galmuang in a-om a, huai kumte in kidouna anei kei; Toupa'n galmuanna apiak ziak in.
14014007	Judahte kiang ah, “Hiai khuate bawlpha nawn ni e, kulh in um lehang, insangte, kulh kongkhakte, akalhnate bawl ni: Toupa i Pathian i zon tak ziak un gam i nuai uah ahong omta ahi: amah i zong ua, ama'n kil chih ning chih a galmuang a omna hon peta ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in abawlhoih ua, alamzang zelta uhi.
14014008	Asa in Judah mi lum leh tei tawimi sepaih nuaithum anei a: Benjamin mi phaw leh thal zangmi nuainih-le-singgiat; hiai tengteng mihat hangsan vek ahi uhi.
14014009	Huan Ethiopia mi Zerah, sepaih maktaduaikhat leh kangtalai zathum toh amau sual ding in ahong kuan a; Mareshah ahong tung hi.
14014010	Huchi in asual ding in Asa ava kuan a, Mareshah ah Zephathah Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi.
14014011	Asa in Toupa a Pathian asam a, “ Toupa kia lou ngal mihattak lak a hat lou panpih a-om kei a; aw Toupa ka Pathian uh, hon panpih ve; nang hon muang in na min in hiai mipite ka hong sual uhi. Aw Toupa , ka Pathian uh na hi a, mihing in nang hon zou kei uhen,” achi hi.
14014012	Huchi in Toupa'n Asa leh Judahte ma ah Ethiopia mite asual a; Ethiopia mite ataikekta uhi.
14014013	Asa leh aheute'n Gerar tan in adelh ua, Ethiopia mite asih tam mahmah ziak un apang thei kei ua; Toupa leh asepaihte ma ah vuallelhsak in a-omta ua; gallak tampi ala uhi.
14014014	Gerar kim a khua tengteng asual ua, Toupa launa atung uah a-om a, khua tengteng alok ua, gallak atam ngial hi.
14014015	Ganpute' puaninte leng asual ua, belam leh sangawngsau tampi ahawl ua, Jerusalem ah apai nawnta uhi.
14015001	Oded tapa Azariah tung ah Pathian kha ahong tung hi.
14015002	Asa dawn ding in apaikhia a, akiang ah, “Asa leh Judah mi tengteng leh Benjamin mite aw, ka thu ngaikhe dih ua, alam a na pan sung teng un nou lam ah Toupa apang, amah na zon uleh na mu ding ua, amah na lehngatsan uleh ama'n ahon lehngatsan ding.
14015003	Israel mite sawtpi Pathian tak nei lou leh sinsakmi leh siampu nei lou leh dan nei lou in a-om uhi.
14015004	Himahleh, amangbat ua Toupa Israel' Pathian lam angat ua, azontak un amu uhi.
14015005	Huai lai in apawt lam leh alut lamte a ding in galmuanna a-om kei a, gamsung a om tengteng a ding in mangbatna thupi mahmah ngen ahi zaw.
14015006	Nam leh nam, khua leh khua akihihsia ua, Pathian in haksatna chiteng in ahaksasak hi.
14015007	Himahleh, nou zaw hattak in om unla, kithadahsak kei un, na thilhih man uh na mu ding uhi,” achi hi.
14015008	Huchi in Asa in huai thute leh zawlnei Oded thugente azak in akihangsak a, Judah gam leh Benjamin gam tengteng a kipan leh Ephraim tanggam a kholak a kipan athilkihhuaite apaimang vek a; Toupa' inn lim chin a Toupa maitam abawlhoih hi.
14015009	Judah gam leh Benjamin gammi tengteng, akiang a om Ephraim leh Manasseh leh Simeon gam a mite toh asamkhawm vek a, Toupa Pathian akiang ah a-om chih atheih un Israel gam a pan in ahong bel vek uhi.
14015010	Huchi in Asa vaihawm akum sawm leh kum nga, akha thumna ah Jerusalem ah akikaikhawm uhi.
14015011	Huai ni in agallak uh bawngtal zasagih leh belam sangsagih in Toupa kiang ah akithoih uhi.
14015012	Alungsim uh leh alungtang tengteng un Toupa apipute uh Pathian zong ding leh;
14015013	kuapeuh Toupa Israel' Pathian zong lou aneu leh alian, anumei apasal in hihlup ding thu akhung uhi.
14015014	Huchi in Toupa kiang ah aw ngaihtak a ging in, akikou ua, pengkul ging toh, pengkul binei ging toh akichiam uhi.
14015015	Judah mi tengteng akichiamna uah akipak ua, alungtangtak ua kichiam a, kituaktak a ahih ziak un, muh leng amu him ua; huchi in Toupa'n mun chih ah galmuang a omna apia hi.
14015016	Kumpipa Asa nu Maakah leng milim kihhuaitak Asherah abawlsak ziak in akumpinu hihna atawpsak a; huchi in Asa in milim aphuk a, ahihzan vek a, Kidron lui ah ahal hi.
14015017	Himahleh, Israel gam a kipan mun sangte paihmang ahi kei a; himahleh Asa lungsim avaihawm sung in akizen gige hi.
14015018	Apa thillatte leh ama latte dangkasik, dangka-eng, tui-um belsuan Pathian inn ah alalut hi.
14015019	Asa vaihawm lai kum sawmthum-le-nga sung in kidou himhim a-om nawn kei hi.
14016001	Asa kum sawmthum-le-guk avaihawm kum in Israel kumpipa Baasha in Judahte asual a, Judah kumpipa kiang a lut ding leh pawt ding dalna ding in Ramah khua abawl hi.
14016002	Huchi in Asa in Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn a gou dangkasik leh dangka-engte alakhia a, Damaskas a Siria kumpipa Ben-hadad kiang ah,
14016003	“Ka pa leh na pa kal a thukhun a-om bang mah in i kikal ah thukhun a-om a, ngai dih, dangkasik leh dangka-engte ka hon khak ahi; kisa dih, Israel kumpipa Baasha in ahon tawpsanna ding in akiang ah na thukhun phel nawn mai in,” chi in akhak hi.
14016004	Huchi in Ben-hadad in kumpipa Asa thu ana pom a; Israel khuate sual ding in sepaih heutute asawl a, Ijon khua, Dan khua, Abel-maim khua, Naphtali gam a vankoihna khua tengteng asual uhi.
14016005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Baasha in huai thu azak in Ramah khua abawl lai akhawlsan a, athilhih tup akikhelsakta hi.
14016006	Huchi in kumpipa Asa in Judah mi tengteng api a. Baasha in Ramah khua bawlna ding a suang leh sing azatte ala vek ua, huaite in Geba leh Mizpah khua abawl hi.
14016007	Huai lai in zawlnei Hanani Judah kumpipa Asa kiang ah ahong a, akiang ah, “ Toupa na Pathian muang lou in Siria kumpipa na muang a, huaiziak in Siria kumpipa sepaihhonte na khahta ahi.
14016008	Ethiopiate leh Libiate sepaihhon liantak, kangtalai leh sakol tungtuang mite tampi ahi kei uh maw? Himahleh Toupa na muan ziak in na khut ah ahon pia hi.
14016009	Amah lam a lungsim diktak pu mite tung a ahatdan hihlang ding in leitung tengteng ah Toupa mit avak dundun hi. Haihuai mahmah in thil na hihta a; tuban dou na nei gige ding,” achi hi.
14016010	Huchi in zawlnei tung ah Asa aheh a, suangkul ah akhumta a; athugen ziak in aheh mahmah mai hi. Asa in mi khenkhatte leng asimmoh behlap lai hi.
14016011	Huan ngai dih ua, Asa tanchin abul a kipan a atawp pha in Judah leh Israel kumpipate tanchin gelhna bu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14016012	Kum sawmthum-le-kua vai ahawm kum in Asa khe ahong na a; anatna thupitak ahi; himahleh anatna ah Toupa zong lou in damdawi siamte azong zaw hi.
14016013	Huchi in api-le-pute kiang ah Asa a-ihmu a, kum sawmli-le-khat avaihawm kum in asita hi.
14016014	David khopi a amah a tuam dia ahankhuk ah avui ua, gimlimtak, gimlim bawl mite'n gimlim chi tuamtuam a dim a kibawl lupna ah asial ua, amah zahtakna in meikuang thupi mahmah asem uhi.
14017001	Asik in atapa Jehoshaphat alal a, Israel mite dou ding in akihihhat hi.
14017002	Huchi in Judah gam a kulh nei khopi tengteng ah sepaih akoih a; Judah gam leh apa Asa in ana lak Ephraim gam a khuate ah galvilmi akoih hi.
14017003	Huan Jehoshaphat kiang ah Toupa a-om a; Baal zong lou a, apu David in atot masaksa lampi tawn a,
14017004	apipute uh Pathian zong a, Israel mite hih bang hih lou a, athupiakte azuih zawk ziak in.
14017005	Huaiziak in Toupa'n akhut ah agam ahihkip a, huchi in Judah gammi tengteng in Jehoshaphat kipahman ahong pia ua, ahong hau in athupi hiaihiai hi.
14017006	Toupa lam ah alungsim a-awn a, Judah gam a kipan mun sangte leh Asherahte aphiatmang vek hi.
14017007	Kum thum avaihawm kum in amilian Benhail, Obadiah, Zekariah, Nathanael, Mikaiah, Judah gam khuate a mite sinsak ding in asawlkhia a;
14017008	Levi mi, Shemaiah, Nethaniah, Zebadiah, Asahel, Shemiramoth, Jehonathan, Adonijah, Tobijah, Tobadonijah atel tei ua, siampu Elishama leh Jehoramte leng atel uhi.
14017009	Toupa Dan Bu atawi ua, Judah gam ah asinsak ua, Judah gam khua tengteng tawn in mite asinsak uhi.
14017010	Huchi in Judah gam leh akim gam tengteng a mite'n Toupa laudan asiam ua, kuamah in Jehoshaphat adou ngam kei uhi.
14017011	Philistia mi khenkhat in Jehoshaphat kipahman ahong pia ua, siah ding in dangkasik leng ape lai uh; Arabia mite'n ganhon, belamtal sangsagih-le-zasagih leh keltal sangsagih-le-zasagih ahon kai uhi.
14017012	Huchi in Jehoshaphat ahong thupi mahmah a, Judah gam ah kulhte leh thil koihkhawmna khuate abawl a, Judah gam khuate ah nasep tampi anei hi.
14017013	Jerusalem ah sepaih mihat hangsante ahau behlap lai hi.
14017014	A-inkuankuan ua a-omdan uh hichibang ahi: Judah inkuan a sangkhat heutute, heutu Adnah in mihat hangsan nuaithum aheu hi.
14017015	Azom Jehohanan in nuainih-le-singgiat aheu hi.
14017016	Azom nawn Zikri tapa Amasiah bel kiphaltak a Toupa a ding a kipia in, mihat hangsan nuainih aheu hi.
14017017	Benjamin inkuante mihat hangsan Eliada in thal leh lum zangmi nuainih aheu hi.
14017018	Azom Jehozabad in galkap ding a mansiangsa nuaikhat-le-singgiat aheu hi.
14017019	Hiai tengteng Judah gam a kulh nei khopi a kumpipa'n akoihte sim louh akumpipa kiang a om gigete ahi uh.
14018001	Huchi in Jehoshaphat bel ahong hau in athupi mahmah a, huchi in Ahab toh kizopna abawl hi.
14018002	Kum bangzah hiam nung in Samaria ah Ahab kiang ah ahohsuk a, Ahab in amah leh aheute belam leh bawngtalte tampi ana goh a, Ramoth-gilead a hohtouhpih ding in achial hi.
14018003	Israel kumpipa Ahab in Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ramoth-gilead ah i hohtoukhawm kei dia hia?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Kei leh nang, ka mite leh na mite pum khat i hi ua, gal i doukhawm ding uh,” achi hi.
14018004	Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa kiang ah, “ Toupa thu hungaih phot lai in,” achi hi.
14018005	Huchi in Israel kumpipa'n, zawlneite mi zali asamkhawm a, akiang uah, “Ramoth-gilead khua sual ding in ka kuan ding uam, kuan lou ding?” achi hi. Amau, “Kuan in, Pathian in kumpipa khut ah ape ding,” achi uhi.
14018006	Himahleh Jehoshaphat in, “ Toupa zawlnei kuate hiam i dot ding a-om kei ua eita aw?” achi hi.
14018007	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “ Toupa hon dotsak ding mi khat a-om; himahleh amah bel ka muhdah lamtak ahi; ka tungtang thu ahoih lou lam kia lou ngal ahoih lam himhim agen ngei kei a; huai mi bel Imla tapa Mikaiah ahi,” achi hi.
14018008	Huchi in Israel kumpipa'n heutu khat asam a, “Imla tapa Mikaiah hon pi meng dih,” achi hi.
14018009	Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Samaria kulh kongpi lutna chin mun awng ah akumpi puan ua kizem in alaltutphah tuaktuak uah atu ua; zawlnei tengteng in ama uah thu agen uhi.
14018010	Kenaanah tapa Zedekiah in sik kiite abawl a, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hiaite in Siriate mangthang sipsip khop in na sual ding achi,” achi hi.
14018011	Huchi mah bang in zawlnei dangte'n leng, “Ramoth-gilead ah hoh inla, lamzang in; Toupa'n kumpipa khut ah ape ding hi,” chi in agen uhi.
14018012	Mikaiah sam dia asawlpa un, “Ngai dih, zawlneite'n kithutuaktak in ahoih lam in kumpipa kiang ah thu agen chiat ua; huaiziak in nang leng achihsa bang un ahoih lam in va gen sam dih ve,” chi in agen hi.
14018013	Huan Mikaiah in, “ Toupa ahin bang in ka chi hi, ka Pathian in achih bang geih in ahi ka gen ding,” achi hi.
14018014	Huchi in kumpipa kiang atun in kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mikaiah, Ramoth-gilead khua sual ding in ka kuan ding uam, kuan lou ding?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kuan unla, va lamzang un, na khut a piak ahi ding hi,” achi hi.
14018015	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Thutak keleu lou ka kiang ah Toupa min a gen lou ding in bangzah vei ahia nang ka hon kichiamsak ding?” achi hi.
14018016	Ama'n, “Belamchingtu nei lou bang in Israel tengteng tang ah dalhzak in ka mu a; Toupa'n , hiaite'n heutu anei kei ua, amau inn lam ah lungmuangtak in pai diam uhen achi,” achi hi.
14018017	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ka tungtang thu zaw aselam kia lou ngal ahoih lam himhim ahihleh agen sam kei ding chih ka hon hilh ahi kei maw?” achi hi.
14018018	Mikaiah in agen nawn a, “ Toupa thu ngaikhia un, Toupa alaltutphah a tu, van mipite tengteng ataklam leh aveilam a dingh ka mu hi.
14018019	Toupa'n Ramoth-gilead a Israel kumpipa Ahab kuantou a, va si ding a kua'n ahia khem ding? achih chiang in khat in, ‘Huchi khachi in’ achi a, midang in, ‘Huchibang khachibang in’ achi hi.
14018020	Kha khat ahong pawt a, Toupa ma a dingh in, ‘Ke'n ka khem ding,’ achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, ‘Bang in eita?’ achi hi.
14018021	Ama'n, ‘Ka va hoh ding a, zawlneite tengteng kam ah kha zuauthei in ka va suak ding,’ achi hi. Huan ama'n, ‘Na va khem ngei ding a, na lohching ding, kuan inla, huchibang in hih in,’ ” achi hi.
14018022	Huchi in ngai dih, Toupa'n , “Hiai zawlneite kam ah kha zuauthei akoih a; na tungthu Toupa'n ahoih lou lam in agenta ahi,” achi hi.
14018023	Huaitak in Kenaanah tapa Zedekiah in ava naih a, Mikaiah biang ah abeng a, “Na kiang a thugen ding Toupa kha in koilam a hon pawtsan ahia?” achi hi.
14018024	Mikaiah in, “Ngai dih, dantan sunggil a bu ding a na lut ni chiang in na hon thei ding,” achi hi.
14018025	Huchi in Israel kumpipa'n, “Mikaiah pi unla, kho ukpa Ammon leh kumpipa tapa kiang ah paipih nawn un.
14018026	Kumpipa'n hichi in achi a, ‘Hiai mi suangkul ah khum unla, lungmuangtak a ka hong pai nawn masiah gimthuakna an leh gimthuakna tui pia un,’ achi a, na chi ding uh,” achi hi.
14018027	Huan Mikaiah in, “Lungmuangtak a na hong pai nawn peuhmahleh Toupa'n kei hon zang a thu gen lou ahi ding hi,” achi a, amah mah in, “Nou mipi tengteng in leng na za un,” achi hi.
14018028	Ramoth-gilead ah Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ava hohtou uhi.
14018029	Israel kumpipa'n Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Kei ka kibawl lamdang ding a, kisualna ah ka hoh sam ding; nang zaw na kumpipa puan kisilh in,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel kumpipa bel akibawl lamdang a, kidouna ah ahohtou hi.
14018030	Siria kumpipa'n akangtalaite tung a heutute kiang ah, “Israel kumpipa lou ngal mineu leng milian leng na sual ding uh ahi kei,” chi in thu apia hi.
14018031	Huan hichi ahong hi a, “Kangtalai tung a heutute'n Jehoshaphat amuh uleh Israel kumpipa ahi ve,” achi ua. Huchi in sual tum in a-umta uhi; himahleh Jehoshaphat akikou a, Toupa'n apanpihta a, huchi in Pathian in amau amah anusesak hi.
14018032	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, kangtalai tung a heutute'n Israel kumpipa ahi kei chih atheih un delh nawn lou in akiksanta uhi.
14018033	Mi khat in ngim tuam nei lou in athalpeu alai a, Israel kumpipa a-awmphaw leh a-awmphaw kikal ah akha a, huchi in akangtalai hawlpa kiang ah, “Lehhawl inla, mipi lak a kipan hon paikhiakpih in, liamna natak ka tuak hi,” achi hi.
14018034	Huai ni in kisualna athupi mahmah a; Israel kumpipa bel Siriate lam nga in akangtalai ah nitaklam tanpha in adingh a; huan nitum kuan in asita hi.
14019001	Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat bel lungmuangtak in Jerusalem a a-inn ah apai nawnta hi.
14019002	Huchi in zawlnei Hanani tapa Jehu in ana dawn a, kumpipa Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Migilou na panpih in Toupa ho mite na it ding ahi maw? Hiai ziak in Toupa thangpaihna, na tung ah ahong omta hi.
14019003	Himahleh hiai gam a kipan Asherah na paimang a, Toupa na zon ziak in hoihna lam banghiam khat na nei lai hi,” achi hi.
14019004	Jehoshaphat bel Jerusalem ah a-om a; huan Beer-sheba a kipan a Ephraim tanggam pha in amite lak ah ahoh nawn a, Toupa , apipute uh Pathian lam ah ama'n apikik nawn vek hi.
14019005	Huchi in kho chih ah Judah gam kulh nei khopi tengteng ah vaihawmte akoih a, vaihawmte kiang ah,
14019006	“Na thilhih uh hoihtak a ngaihtuah in hih un, mihing a ding a vaihawm na hi kei ua, Toupa a ding ahi zaw ngal a; vaihawmna ah na kiang uah atel zel ahi.
14019007	Huaiziak in Toupa lau unla, pilvangtak in hih un; Toupa i Pathian ah gitlouhna, khentuam neihna leh golh neknate a-om kei,” achi hi.
14019008	Huchi in Jehoshaphat in Jerusalem a ahong kik nawn un Toupa vaihawm ding leh thubuaite lemmi ding in Levite, siampute, Israel inkuan makaite akoih behlap hi.
14019009	“ Toupa laudan siam kawm in muanhuaitak in, lungsim diktak pu in na hih ding uh ahi.
14019010	Koi lai khua a mi in leng thubuai ahong gen ua, tualthah thu, dan leh thupiak thu, dan thuseh leh vaihawm thute a hong kilan uleh, Toupa tung a thil ahihkhelhlouhna ding un amau pilvangtak in na hilh ding ua, nou leh na unaute uh tung ah thangpaihna ahong tung zenhouh kha ding; huchibang in hih le uchin, mohsak in na om kei ding uhi.
14019011	“Huan ngai dih ua, Toupa lam thu tengteng ah siampu lianpen Amariah bel na heutu uh ahi a; kumpipa lam thu tengteng ah Judah inkote tung a vaihawmmi Ishmael tapa Zebadiah ahi: Levite leng na heutute uh ahi sam ding uh. Hangtak in hih unla, mihoihte kiang ah Toupa om hen,” achi hi.
14020001	Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, Moab suante leh Ammon suante khenkhat toh Jehoshaphat sual ding in ahong kuan uhi.
14020002	Huchi in kuate hiam in Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Nang sual ding in mipi thupi mahmah, tuipi gal Siria a kipan ahong kuan uhi; ngai in, Hazazon-tamar ah a-omta ua, huai ‘Engedi’ leng achi uh,” chi in agen uhi.
14020003	Jehoshaphat alau a, Toupa zong ding in akipia a; Judah gam tengteng ah an ngawl ding thu athangsak hi.
14020004	Huchi in Judahte bel Toupa panpihna zong in akikaikhawm ua; Judah kho chih a kipan Toupa zong ding in ahong pawtkhia uhi.
14020005	Jehoshaphat Toupa' inn ah, intual thak chin ah Judah leh Jerusalem kikaikhawm lak ah adingh a;
14020006	“Aw Toupa ka pi-le-pute uh Pathian, van Pathian, van a Pathian na hi kei a hia? Namte' lalgam tung a vaihawmpa na hi kei a hia? Na khut ah thilhihtheihna leh hatna a-om a, kuamah zoh vual na hi kei hi.
14020007	Aw ka Pathian uh, hiai gam a tengte na mi Israelte na ma ah na delhkhiaksak a, na lawm Abraham suante tangtawn a dia na piak ahi kei maw?
14020008	Hiai gam ah ahong omta ua, na min a ding in mun siangthou ahon lamsak uhi.
14020009	Ka tung uah thil hoih lou, namsau a vaihawmnate hiam, hiite hiam, kialte hiam ahong tunleh hiai inn ma leh nangmah ma ah ka hong dingh ding ua, hiai inn ah lah na min a-om ngal a, ka mangbatna uah nang ka hon sam ding ua, nang na hon na ngaihkhiaksak in na hon hondam ding,” chi in.
14020010	“Huchi in ngai in, Ammon suante leh Moabte leh Seir tang a mi, Israelte, Aigupta gam a kipan ahong paikhiak lai un, amau asim uh na phal kei a, amau a kipan akiheimang zaw ua, amau ahihmang kei uhi.
14020011	Ka luah ding ua na hon piak gam a kipan hon delhkhe ding in ahong kuan uhi.
14020012	Aw ka Pathian uh, atung ua vaihawm lou ding na hi maw? Mi huai zahzah hon sual ding a hong kuante lah na sualthei ding dan mahmah ka hi kei ua; alohna dan ka thei kei ua, nang lam ka hong nga zaw mai uhi,” achi hi.
14020013	Judahte tengteng, anau neu chikchik uh, azite uh atate uh toh Toupa ma ah adingh uhi.
14020014	Huchi in mipi lak ah Jahajiel tung ah Toupa kha ahong tung a, huai mi Zekariah tapa ahi a, huai mi Benaiah tapa ahi a, huai mi Jeiel tapa ahi a, huai mi Asaph suan Levi mi Mataniah tapa ahi.
14020015	Ama'n, “Nou Judah gam a mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a teng tengteng leh nang Jehoshaphat, na ngaikhia un: Toupa'n na kiang uah hichi in achi, ‘Lau kei unla, huai mipi thupi mahmahte ziak in leng lunglel sam kei un; kidouna noute kidouna ahi kei a, Pathian kidouna ahi zaw ngal a.
14020016	Zingchiang in va sual un; ngai dih ua, Ziz zottouhna ah ahong tou ua, Jeruel gamdai chin phaizang tawp lam ah na va mu ding uh.
14020017	Hiai kidouna na sual uh akiphamoh kei ding: kiphalh unla, adin in dingh mai unla, nou lam a pang Toupa hotdamna tak en gige un, Judah mite leh Jerusalem mite aw: lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un, zingchiang in sual ding in kuan un, Toupa lah nou lam ah apang ngal a,’ ” achi hi.
14020018	Huchi in Jehoshaphat bel amai a lei si in akun a; Judah mite tengteng leh Jerusalem mite tengteng Toupa bia in Toupa ma ah akun uhi.
14020019	Kohath suan leh Korah suan Levite aw ngaihtak a Toupa Israel' Pathian phat ding in ahong dinghta uhi.
14020020	Huchi in zingsang in zingkhang in athou ua, Tekoa gamdai ah alut ua; apai lai un Jehoshaphat adingh a, “Aw, Judah mite leh Jerusalem mite aw, ka thu ngaikhia un; Toupa na Pathian uh ging unla, kiptak in dingh unla, azawlneite gingta un, hileh lamzangtak in na om ding uh,” achi hi.
14020021	Mipite ahanthawn khit in sepaihte ma a pai kawm a Toupa pahtawina leh asiangthou kilawmdan phat ding a lasami dingte a sep hi, “Aw Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un, azahngaihna lah tangtawn in a-om sin ngal a, chi un,” achi hi.
14020022	Huan la asak ua aphattak un Ammon suante, Moab suante, tang a mite Judate sual ding a hong kuante guktan ding mite Toupa'n akoih a; avuallelta uhi.
14020023	Ammon suante leh Moab suante'n Seir tang a omte thah chimih vek leh hihman sipsip tum in asualta uhi. Seir tang a mite ahihman khit un amau leh amau kihihman tum in akisual nilouh uhi.
14020024	Judahte'n gamdai etna mun sang ava tun uleh mipi lam a-en ua; ngai dih, misi luang lei ah apuk zengzung a, khat lel leng asuakta kei uhi.
14020025	Huchi in Jehoshaphat leh aheute gallak la ding in ava hoh ua, alak uah sum-le-paite, puansilhte, suangmantamte ava mu ua, apuak zoh louh khop un ala ua, atam petmah a, ni thum tak gallak asek uhi.
14020026	Ani li ni in Berakah Phaizang ah akikhawm ua, huai ah Toupa apahtawi ua; huaiziak in tutan in huai lai mun, Berakah Phaizang achi uhi.
14020027	Huchi in Judah mi leh Jerusalem mi tengteng apai nawn ua Jehoshaphat in Jerusalem a nuamsatak a pai ding in ama uh akai hi; Toupa'n amelmate uh tungthu a nuamsatak a a-omsak ziak in.
14020028	Huchi in pekgingte, kaihgingte, pengkulte toh Jerusalem a Toupa' inn atungtou uhi.
14020029	Toupa'n Israelte melma asual chih atheih un, gam chih a mite'n Pathian alauta uhi.
14020030	Huchi in Jehoshaphat gam galmuang in a-omta a; a Pathian in akimvel a mite lak a galmuanna apiak ziak in.
14020031	Jehoshaphat in Judah tung ah vai ahawmta a; kum sawmthum-le-nga a upa ahih in vaihawm apan a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-nga vai ahawm a; anu min Azubah, Silhi tanu ahi.
14020032	Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih hih in apa Asa lampi pialsan het lou in azui hi.
14020033	Himahleh mun sangte paihmang ahi kei a, mipite'n leng apipute uh Pathian tung ah alungtang uh anga tuan sam kei uh.
14020034	Huan ngai dih ua, Jehoshaphat thilhih tengteng abul a kipan atawp pha in Hanani tapa Jehu tanchin gelhna bu ah atuang a, Israel kumpite tanchinbu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14020035	Huai nung in Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat in Israel kumpipa Ahaziah, thil hoih loutak a hihsekpa akithutuahpih hi:
14020036	Tarshish lam a pai ding long abawlkhawm ua, Ezion-geber ah longte abawl uhi.
14020037	Huchi in Mareshah mi Dodavah tapa Eliezer in Jehoshaphat kiang ah, “Ahaziah na kithuahpih ziak in Toupa'n na thilhih tup ahon hihsiatsakta ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in longte akise vek ua, Tarshish ah ahoh thei kei uhi.
14021001	Jehoshaphat api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, apute lak ah apu David khopi ah avui uhi. Asik in atapa Jehoram alalta hi.
14021002	Ama'n unau, Jehoshaphat tapate anei a, Azariah, Jehiel, Zekariah, Azariahu, Mikael leh Shephatiah ahi uh. Hiai tengteng Israel kumpipa Jehoshaphat tapate vek ahi uhi.
14021003	Apa un thil thupi taktak apia a, dangkasik, dangka-eng, thil mantam pipite, Judah gam a kulh nei khopite toh; himahleh gamte pen Jehoram apia a, ata upapen ahih ziak in.
14021004	Huchi in Jehoram in apa gam luah in ahong kihihhatta a, a-unaute tengteng namsau in Israelte lak a intek tampi toh athat vek hi.
14021005	Jehoram bel kum sawmthum-le-nih a upa ahih in vaihawm apan a: Jerusalem ah kum giat vai ahawm hi.
14021006	Ahab inkote hih bang in Israel kumpipate lampi azui hi: Ahab tanu zi in anei hi. Huchi in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih loutak ahih hi.
14021007	Himahleh, Toupa'n David inkote ahihmang nuam kei; David kiang a thukhun ziak leh amah leh asuante tan a khawnvak neihsak thak ana chiam khit ziak in.
14021008	Amah dam lai in Judahte lak a kipan Edomte ahel ua, kumpipa akibawltawm uh.
14021009	Huchi in Jehoram asepaih heutute leh akangtalai tengteng toh akuankhia a, zan in akuan a, amau leh kangtalai tung a heutute amau umkual Edomte asual hi.
14021010	Huchi in Edomte tuni tan in Judahte lak ah ahel lailai uh, huai lai mah in Libnah khote leng ahel uh; Toupa , apipute uh Pathian alehngatsan ziak in.
14021011	Huan Judah gam tangte ah mun sang abawl a, Jerusalem mite a-angkawmsak a, Judahte apimang hi.
14021012	Huchi in zawlnei Elijah a kipan akiang ah lai ahong tung a, “ Toupa , na pu David Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Na pa Jehoshaphat lampite na tawn kei a, Judahte kumpipa Asa lampite leng na zui kei hi.
14021013	Israel kumpipate lampi na zui zaw a, Judahte leh Jerusalem a omte Ahab inkuan bang in ang na kawmsak a, na unau, na pa inkuante nang sang a hoihzaw na that lai hi.
14021014	Ngai dih, Toupa'n na mite, na tate, na zite, na gante hipi in agawt ding a;
14021015	gilpi natna thupi mahmah na nei ding a, niteng in natna ziak a na ngoi teng atolhkhiak vek tan in na chi ana ding,’ ” chi in.
14021016	Huchi in Ethiopia mite kiang a mi Philistiate leh Arabiate lungsim Jehoram sual ding in Toupa'n atokthou hi.
14021017	Huchi in Judate ava sual ua, agam uah alut ua, kumpipa' inn a thil tengteng ala vek ua, atapate, azite uh leng; atapa naupangpen Jehoahaz lousiah atapa dang anutsiat kei uhi.
14021018	Huai nung in Toupa'n hihdam thei louh gilnatna in agawt hi.
14021019	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum nihna abei in anatna ziak in angoi apilhkhia a, natna mulkimhuaitak in asita hi. Amite'n apa meipi asehsak bang un asehsak kei uhi.
14021020	Avaihawm tung in kum sawmthum-le-nih ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum giat vai ahawm a, kuamah it louh in asi a, David khopi ah kumpipate han lou ah avui uhi.
14022001	Huchi in Jerusalem mite'n atapa naupangpen Ahaziah asik in kumpipa ding in abawl ua; ata upate tengteng, Arab sepaihhonte, apanmun ua hong pai mite'n athat khin vek uhi. Huchi in Judah kumpipa Jehoram tapa Ahaziah in vai ahawmta hi.
14022002	Ahaziah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmli-le-nih a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum khat vai ahawm a, anu min Athaliah, Omri tanu ahi.
14022003	Ama'n leng Ahab inkote lampi tot atawn a; anu bel thil giloutak a thuhilhtu ahi.
14022004	Ahab inkote hih bang mah in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a, apa sih nung in asiatna ding a thuhilhtu ahi.
14022005	Amah leng athuhilh un a-om a, Ramoth-gilead ah Siria kumpipa Hazael dou ding in Israel kumpipa Ahab tapa Jehoram kiang ah ahoh a, huchi in Siriate'n Jehoram asuliam uhi.
14022006	Siria kumpipa Hazael asualna a Ramah a asukliam uh hihdam ding in Jezreel ah ahoh hi. Huchi in Judah kumpipa Jehoram tapa Azariah bel Ahab tapa Jehoram adam louh ziak in aveh ding in Jezreel ah akuan hi.
14022007	Huchi in Jehoram kiang ah Ahaziah ahoh a, amanthatna Pathian hih ahi; Nimshi tapa Jehu sual ding in Jehoram kiang a ahoh ziak in. Huai mi bel Ahab inkote hihmang ding a Toupa seh ahi him hi.
14022008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ahab inkote hihse ding a asual lai in Judahte intekte leh Ahaziah nasem a-unau tapate amu a, athat vek hi.
14022009	Ahaziah azong ua, Samaria a akibuk lai in aman ua, Jehu kiang ah ahon pi ua, athat ua; alungtang tengteng a Toupa zong sek Jehoshaphat tapa ahi, achi ua, avui in avuithoh uhi. Huchi in Ahaziah inkote'n agam uah thuneihna aneita kei uhi.
14022010	Huan Ahaziah nu Athaliah in atapa si chih azak in athou a, Judah inkote kumpipa tengteng athat vek hi.
14022011	Ahaziah tapa Joash bel kumpipa tanu Jehosabeath in kumpipa tapa athahte uh lak a kipan aselmang a, naudonmi toh lupna dantan sung ah asel hi. Huchi in kumpipa Jehoram tanu Jehosabeath, siampu Jehoiada zi in, (amah Ahaziah sanggamnu ahi a) Athaliah muh louh ding in aselgu a, huchi in athah in a-om kei hi.
14022012	Akiang ua teng in Pathian inn ah kum guk aguk in akibu a; huchi in Athaliah in agam uah vai ahawm hi.
14023001	Akum sagih kum in Jehoiada akihatsak a, sepaih zaheutu, Jehoram tapa Azariah, Jehohanan tapa Ishmael, Obed tapa Azariah, Adaiah tapa Maaseiah, Jikri tapa Elisaphath kiang ah thu akhung hi.
14023002	Huchi in Judah gam ah avak ua, Judah gam kho chih a Levite leh Israel inkuan intekte akaikhawm ua, Jerusalem ava tungtou uhi.
14023003	Kikaikhawmte tengteng in Pathian inn ah kumpipa kiang ah thu akhung uhi. Huan akiang uah, “Ngai dih ua, Toupa'n David tapate tungtang thu ana gen bang in kumpipa tapa in vai ahawm ding ahi.
14023004	Na hih ding uh hichibang ahi, siampute leh Levite Sabbath ni a hong kuansekte seh thum a khen seh khat kongkhak ngak mite na hi ding ua;
14023005	seh thum a khen seh khat kumpipa' inn ah na om ding ua; huan seh thum a khen seh khat kulh kongpi ah; mipi tengteng bel Toupa intual sung ah a-om ding uh.
14023006	Himahleh, siampute leh nasemmi Levite kia lou ngal kuamah Toupa' inn ah lut kei un, amau bel asiangthou ziak un alut ding ua, mipi tengteng bel Toupa hungaih in a-om ding uhi.
14023007	Levite'n agalvan uh tawi in kumpipa a-um ding ua; kuapeuh inn a hong lut thah ding ahi a; huan kumpipa apawt leh alut in amah kiang ah om zel un,” achi hi.
14023008	Huchi in Levite leh Judah tengteng in siampu Jehoiada thupiak bang in ahih ua; amaute heute chiat Sabbath ni a hong kuan dingte leh Sabbath ni a tawp dingte api ua; siampu Jehoiada in atawp ding pawl lah atawpsak nai kei hi.
14023009	Siampu Jehoiada in sepaih za heutute Toupa' inn a om kumpipa David tei leh lum neu leh lum liante apia hi.
14023010	Huan mite galvan tawi chiat in taklam sang a kipan in veilam sang tan in maitam leh inn um in kumpipa a-umsak uhi.
14023011	Huchi in kumpipa tapa ahon pikhia ua, lallukhu akhusak ua, theihsakna thu apia ua, kumpipa in abawl ua, Jehoiada leh atapate'n thau anilh ua, “Pathian in kumpipa hondam hen,” achi uhi.
14023012	Athaliah in mipi kumpipa pahtawi a mipi kiphu motmot husa azak in Toupa' inn ah mipi lak ah ava hoh hi.
14023013	A-en a, ngai in, kongpi a khuambul ah kumpipa adingh a, akiang ah sepaih heutute leh pengkul mut mite toh; huai gam a mi tengteng in nuam asa mahmah ua, pengkulte amut zuazua ua; lasa mite'n athil gingtheite uh tum in phatna la asakhawm uhi. Huchi in Athaliah in apuante abotkek a, “Kiphialgukna; kiphialgukna ahi ve,” achi hi.
14023014	Huan siampu Jehoiada in sepaihte tung a heutu dia seh sepaih za heutute apikhia a, akiang uah, “Sepaihte kikal ah pawtsak unla, huan kuapeuh azuizui namsau a satlup hi hen,” achi hi. Siampu in, “ Toupa' inn ah zaw thah ding ahi kei,” achita hi.
14023015	Huchi in lampi a-awn ua, sakol lutna kongpi ah kumpipa' inn ah ahoh a, huai ah athat uhi.
14023016	Huan Jehoiada in amah leh mipi tengteng leh kumpipa kikal ah Toupa mite hi ding in thu akhung hi.
14023017	Mipi tengteng Baal inn ah ahoh ua, ahihsia ua, amaitamte, alimte ahihtam dimdem ua, Baal siampu Matan, maitam bul ah athat uhi.
14023018	Jehoiada in, Mosi Dan Bu a gelh bang a nuamsatak leh la sa kawm a, David in Toupa' inn a Toupa kiang a halmang thillat lan ding a ana seh siampu Levite nuai a sem ding in David thupiak bang in Toupa' inn ngakmi dingte asep hi.
14023019	Siangthou lou peuhmah alutlouhna ding un Toupa' inn kongkhak ngak mite asep hi.
14023020	Huan zakhat tung a heutute, mihoihte, mipi uk mite, huai gammi tengteng api a, Toupa' inn a kumpipa apikhia ua; kongkhak saknungzaw ah kumpipa' inn lam ah ahoh ua, kumpipa agam laltutphah ah atusakta uhi.
14023021	Huchi in namsau a Athaliah athah nung un huai gam a mi tengteng nuamsatak in a-om ua, khopi galmuang in a-omta hi.
14024001	Joash in vaihawm apat tung in kum sagih a upa ahi; Jerusalem ah kum sawmli vai ahawm a; anu min Zibiah, Beer-sheba mi ahi.
14024002	Joash in siampu Jehoiada damsung in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih hi.
14024003	Jehoiada in amah zi nih aguan a, tapate leh tanute anei hi.
14024004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in Joash in Toupa' inn bawlphat lungsim in anei hi.
14024005	Siampute leh Levite akaikhawm a, “Judate khuate ah hoh unla kum teng a na Pathian inn uh bawlphatna ding in Israel mi tengteng kiang ah sum-le-pai khonkhawm unla, zekai kei un,” achi hi. Himahleh Levite akintat tuan kei uhi.
14024006	Huchi in kumpipa'n siampu lianpen Jehoiada asam a, akiang ah, “Bangziak a Levite Toupa sikha Mosi leh Israel mipite seh theihsak a puanin a dia thoh bikhiah seh Judah mi leh Jerusalem mite thoh ding a phut lou na hia?
14024007	Migilou nu Athaliah tapate'n lah Pathian inn ahihse khinta ua, huan, Toupa' inn a thillat tengteng Baalte ape khin behlap lai uh,” achi hi.
14024008	Huchi in kumpipa'n thu apia a, bawm abawl ua, Toupa in kongpi polam ah akoih uhi.
14024009	Gamdai a Pathian sikha Mosi in Israel mite hih ding a thoh bikhiah a seh Toupa a ding a thoh ding in Judah gam tengteng leh Jerusalem ah thu athangsakta hi.
14024010	Huchi in miliante leh mipite akipak ua, adangkate uh ahon la ua, akhon khit masiah uh bawm ah ahong koihkoih mai uhi.
14024011	Levite'n kumpipa upate kiang a bawm ahon tawi ua, dangka tampi a-om chih atheih un kumpipa laigelhmi leh siampu kumpipa seh upa in bawm a kipan abungkhia a, ala ua, amun ah akoih nawn uh. Huchibang in niteng in ahih ua, dangka tampi akholkhawmta uhi.
14024012	Kumpipa leh Jehoiada in Toupa' inn nasem mite khut ah apia ua, Toupa' inn bawlpha ding in suangsek mite, khutsiamte, Toupa' inn bawlpha ding in sik leh dal a khutsiamte leng aguai hi.
14024013	Huchi in nasem mite'n asem pan ua, asem hoih mahmah ua, Pathian inn angei bang geih in abawlhoih ua, adingkip nawnta hi.
14024014	Azoh un dangka om lai teng kumpipa leh Jehoiada kiang ah ahon tawi ua, huai in Toupa' inn a nasepna ding a tui-um belsuante, latna tui-um belsuan sikkeute leh dangkasik tui-um belsuante nangawn abawl uhi. Huchi in Jehoiada damsung in Toupa' inn ah halmang thillat alan gige uhi.
14024015	Jehoiada bel upapi tekkun a dam in asita. Asih in kum za-le-sawmthum a upa ahi.
14024016	Huchi in Israelte lak ah Pathian tung ah leh a-inn tungtang a thil ahihhoih ziak in David khopi ah kumpipate lak ah avui uhi.
14024017	Jehoiada sih nung in Judah miliante ahong kuan ua, kumpipa kiang ah toukaina abawl ua, kumpipa'n athu uh ana pom hi.
14024018	Himahleh apipute uh Pathian Toupa' inn alehngatsan ua, Asherahte leh milimte nna asemta uh. Huchi in akhelhna uh ziak in Judate leh Jerusalem tung ah thangpaihna ahong tungta hi.
14024019	Himahleh Toupa kiang a pikik ding in akiang uah zawlneite asawl a, amohdante uh atheisak ua, himahleh abil uh adoh nuam kei uhi.
14024020	Siampu Jehoiada tapa Zekariah tung ah Pathian kha ahong tung a, amah mipi tunglam ah adingh a, akiang uah, “Pathian in hichi in achi: Bangziak a na lamzan theihlouhna ding ua Toupa' thupiakte bohsia na hi ua? Toupa na lehngatsan ziak un ama'n leng nou hon lehngatsan ahi,” achi hi.
14024021	Huchi in amah asawmta ua, kumpipa thupiak in Toupa' inn huangsung ah suang in adenglumta uhi.
14024022	Huchibang in kumpipa Joash in apa Jehoiada hehpihna theigige lou in atapa athatta hi. Asih kuan in, “ Toupa'n ahon ngaihtuah ding a, phu ahon laksak ding,” achi hi.
14024023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum abei in Siria sepaihte'n ahong sual ua; Judah gam leh Jerusalem ah alut ua, amilian tengteng uh ahihmansak ua, Damaskas kumpipa kiang ah gallak tengteng akhak vek uhi.
14024024	Siria sepaihte bel tawmchik kia ahong kuan ua; apipute uh Pathian Toupa alehngatsan ziak un Toupa'n sepaih tampite akhut uah apia ahi. Huchibang in Joash tung ah gawtna atungsak uhi.
14024025	Apaisan nung un, natna thupitak thuak in apaisan ua, amah mite ngei in siampu Jehoiada tapate sisan ziak in asawm ua, alupna a lum lai athat ua, asita hi. David khopi ah avui ua, himahleh kumpipate han ah aphum kei uhi.
14024026	Hiaite amah sawm mite ahi uh: Ammon mi Simeath tapa Zabad leh Moab mi Shimrith tapa Jehozabad.
14024027	Huchi in atapate tung ah thute, atung a puakgiktak puaksak tungtang thute; Pathian in abawlhoiht tungtang thute, ngai dih Kumpite Tanchin gelhna bu ah gelh ahi. Huan asik in atapa Amaziah in vai ahawmta hi.
14025001	Amaziah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-kua vai ahawm a; anu min Jehoaddan, Jerusalem mi ahi.
14025002	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih a, himahleh alungsim ape bukim kei hi.
14025003	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, agam ahong dinkip in apa thattu, sikhate athat hi.
14025004	Himahleh atate uh bel athat kei a, Mosi Dan laibu a tuang, “Tate ziak in pate asi ding uh ahi kei, pate ziak in tate asi ding uh ahi sam kei, michih amau gitlouhna ziak in asi ding uh ahi,” chi a Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahih hi.
14025005	Amaziah in Judahte akaikhawm a, Judah leh Benjamin mi tengteng a-inkuan uh dungzui zel in sangkhat heutu leh zakhat heutute nuai ah a-omsak hi. Kum sawmnih tunglam teng asim a, mi teltuam, tei leh lum tawi thei, galkap thei mi nuaithum a-om uhi.
14025006	Huan Israel gam a mi, mihat hangsan nuaikhat dangka talent zakhat in aguai lai hi.
14025007	Himahleh, akiang ah Pathian mi, mi khat ahong a, “Aw Kumpipa, Israel sepaihte na kiang ah pai kei le uh, Toupa Israel mite, Ephraim suante huam in, na kiang ah a-om kei hi.
14025008	Hoh hi lechin leng, hangtak in kidouna ah gamtang in: huchi lou in zaw Pathian in melma mai ah nang a hon vuallelsak ding: Pathian in lah panpih theihna leh vuallelhsak theihna anei ngal a,” ahong chi hi.
