14025009	Huchi in Amaziah in Pathian mipa kiang ah, “Ahihleh Israel sepaihte ka piaksa talent zakhat bang i chihta dia awi?” achi a. Huan Pathian mipa'n, “ Toupa'n huai sang a tampi nang ahon pe thei ahi,” achi hi.
14025010	Huchi in Amaziah in Ephraim gam a kipan a sepaih hong paite paikik ding in akhen a; huaiziak in Judate tung ah aheh mahmah ua, hehtak in apaikikta uhi.
14025011	Amaziah in lunglel lou in mite apikhia a, Chi Phaizang ah ahoh ua, Seir suante singkhat athat uhi.
14025012	Singkhat dang Judate'n ahingmat ua, suangpi vum ah api ua, suangpi vum a kipan in asawnkhe mengmeng ua, akitamzangawp uhi.
14025013	Himahleh Amaziah in akiang ah galkap ding a pai lou ding a asawlkik sepaihte'n Judah gam khuate, Samaria a kipan a Beth-horon pha in asual ua, mi sangthum athat ua, gallak tampi ala uhi.
14025014	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, Amaziah, Edomte that ahong pai in Seir suante' pathiante ahon pua a, apathian ding in apangsak a, huchi in abia ua, gimlimte ahalsak chiat hi.
14025015	Huaiziak in Amaziah tung ah Toupa hehna akuangta a, akiang ah zawlnei asawl a, huai mi in akiang ah, “Na khut a kipan a amite hunkhe thei lou nam pathiante bang ding mahmah a zong na hia?” achi hi.
14025016	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, akiang a thu agen lai in kumpipa'n, “Kumpipa vaihawmpa ding in nang ka hon bawl ua hia? Dai mai in: bang ding a na hinna tan ding na hia?” achi a. Huchi in zawlnei in, “Pathian in hichibang a na hih ziak leh ka thuhilhna na ngaihkhiak louh ziak in nang hihmang lungsim in anei chih ka thei hi, achi a,” adaita hi.
14025017	Huchi in Judah kumpipa Amaziah in thuhilh apom a, Israel kumpipa Jehu tapa, Jehoahaz tapa, Joash kiang ah, “Hong dih, kimatuah in i ki-en ding,” chi in mi asawl hi.
14025018	Israel kumpipa Joash in Judah kumpipa Amaziah kiang ah, Lebanon tang a sidar sing kiang ah, “Ka tapa zi ding in na tanu neisak dih, chi in athukhak a; huan, Lebanon tang a gamsa ahong pai a, ling ahong chilpukgawp hi.
14025019	‘Nang ngai dih, Edom ka zou,’ na chi a, na lungsim in na kisathei a, na inn ah om kinken mai in; nang leh Judah gam nangawn a siatna, nang dia poi ding thil bangziak a tokkhe ding na hia?” chi in mi asawl hi.
14025020	Himahleh, Amaziah in angaikhe nuam kei a; Edomte pathiante azon ziak a, Judah gam a amelmate uh khut a apiaktheihna ding a Pathian hih ahi.
14025021	Huchi in Israel kumpipa Joash ahohtou a; Judah kumpipa Amaziah toh Judah gam Beth-shemesh ah kimaituah in aki-enta ngei uhi.
14025022	Huan Israelte sang in Judate tan ahong sezaw a; michih amau inn lam chiat ah apaita uhi.
14025023	Israel kumpipa Joash in Beth-shemesh ah Judah kumpipa, Ahaziah tapa Jehoahaz tapa Amaziah aman a, Jerusalem ah api a, Jerusalem kulh Ephraim kulh kongpi a kipan akulh ning kongpi tan in tong zali tak achimsak hi.
14025024	Huan Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn agou koihkhawmna a dangka-eng leh dangka leh tui-um belsuan om tengteng ala a, henta koltang dingte toh, huan, Samaria kholam ah apaikik nawnta hi.
14025025	Huchi in Judah kumpipa Joash tapa Amaziah bel Israelte kumpipa Jehoahaz tapa Joash sih nung in kum sawm-le-nga adam lai hi.
14025026	Amaziah thilhih dangte abul a pan atawp tan in ngai dih, Judah kumpite leh Israel kumpite thugelhnabu ah gelh ahi kei maw?
14025027	Huchi in Amaziah in Toupa zuih atawpsantak in Jerusalem ah thah asawm ua, Lakish ah atai a; himahleh khua ah mi adelhsak ua, huai ah athat uhi.
14025028	Aluang sakol in apua ua, api-le-pute kiang Judah khopi ah avui uhi.
14026001	Huchi in Judah mi tengteng in kum sawm-le-guk a upa Uzziah api ua, apa Amaziah sik in kumpipa ding in abawlta uhi.
14026002	Ama'n kumpipa api-le-pute kiang a a-ihmut nung in Eloth khua abawlhoih a, Judah gam ah apangsak nawn hi.
14026003	Uzziah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawm-le-guk a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga-le-nih vai ahawm a, anu min Jekoliah, Jerusalem mi ahi.
14026004	Apa Amaziah thilhih bangbang hih sam in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoihtak ahih zel hi.
14026005	Pathian kilakna theisiam Zekariah damsung in Pathian zong ding in akibawl tinten hi. Pathian azon sung teng in Pathian in alamzangsak hi.
14026006	Philistiate sim ding in akuankhia a, Gath kulhte, Jabneh kulh, Ashdod kulh ahihchim a; huchi in Ashdod gam ah leh Philistiate lak ah khua abawl hi.
14026007	Huchi in Pathian in Philistiate lak ah leh Gurbaal a om Arabiate leh Meuni mite lak ah apanpih hi.
14026008	Ammonte'n Uzziah lak ah siah aliau sek ua; huchi in ahong hat mahmah ziak un Aigupta gam tan in aminthangta uhi.
14026009	Uzziah in Jerusalem ah aning ah kongpi, Phaizang kongpi, kulh kawina lai kongpi, insangte, alam lai a, kulh in a-um hi.
14026010	Gamdai ah leng insang alam a, gam tampi aneih ziak in tuilehte atoukhia a, phailam leh phaizang ah ganhon anei a; lounei mite leh uain suk mite tang lam leh gam hoihte ah akoih a, amah louma lam limsakmi tak ahi.
14026011	Uzziah in sepaih kidoumi kumpipa sepaih heutu Hanani nuai a mi laigelhmi Jeiel leh heutu Maaseiahte'n aseh bang zel ua apawlpawl a galkapmi anei lai hi.
14026012	Mihat hangsan chiat, a-inkuan upate tengteng sangnih-le-zaguk ahi uh.
14026013	Anuai uah sepaih sinsiamsa ngen nuaithum sangsagih-le-zanga melma lak a kumpipa panpihmi galsualmi taktak a-om uhi.
14026014	Huchi in Uzziah in sepaih tengteng a ding in lum, tei, sik lukhu, sik puanak, thalpeu leh vaisuanglot a ding in suangte akisakhol hi.
14026015	Jerusalem ah mipilte theihkhiak khawlte abawl a, insang leh kulh ning chih ah thalkapna leh suang lian kuamkuam ana denna ding akoih a; amin gam chih mual chih ah athangta a; ahat mahmah tan in alam a lamdangtak a panpih in a-om hi.
14026016	Himahleh ahong hat nung in alungsim ahong sang a, hoih lou hial in thil ahih a, Toupa a Pathian tung ah thil ahihkhial a; gimlim maitam a gimlim hal ding in Toupa tempul ah alut hi.
14026017	Huchi in siampu Azariah in azui a, mihangsantak Toupa siampu sawmgiat atel uhi.
14026018	Kumpipa Uzziah akhou ua akiang ah, “Uzziah aw, Toupa a ding a gimlim hal nang hih ding ahi kei, gimlim hal ding a sehtuam Aaron tapa siampute hih ding ahi zaw hi; mun siangthou a kipan pawtkhia in; thil na hihkhial hi; Toupa Pathian a pan na thupina ding ahi kei,” achi uhi.
14026019	Huan Uzziah ahehta a; gimlim halna ding mei lakna atawi a, huchi a siampute tung a aheh laitak in Toupa' inn ah, gimlim halna chin ah siampute ma ah atal ahong phakkheta hi.
14026020	Huchi in siampu heutu Azariah leh siampu tengteng in a-en ua, ngai in, atal ahong phak a, huai a kipan in avikkhe pah ua, ahi, Toupa'n agawt ziak in amah leng kintak in apawtkheta hi.
14026021	Kumpipa Uzziah bel asih ni tan in aphakta a, aphak ziak in a-inn tuam ah a-omta hi. Toupa' inn a kipan hihkhiak in a-omta a, huchi in atapa Jotham bel agam ua mite vaihawm in kumpipa' inn a ukpa ding in a-omta hi.
14026022	Uzziah thilhih dang tengteng bel abul a kipan a atawp pha in Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai in agelh hi.
14026023	Huchi in Uzziah bel api leh apute kiang ah a-ihmu a, kumpipa kivuina mun a api leh apute lak ah avui uhi. “Amah zaw phak ahi ngal a,” achi ua, huchi in asik in atapa Jotham in vai ahawmta hi.
14027001	Jotham bel avaihawmpat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-guk vai ahawm a, anu min Jerushah, Zadok tanu ahi.
14027002	Apa Uzziah thilhih bangbang hih in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih zel hi. Toupa tempul ah bel alut kei hi. Himahleh mite'n hoih loutak in ana hih gige uhi.
14027003	Toupa' inn a kongkhak saknungzaw abawl a, huan, Ophel kulh tung ah inn tampi alam behlap lai hi.
14027004	Huan Judah tanggam ah khuate abawl a, gamnuai ah inn thupi taktakte, insangte alam lai hi.
14027005	Ammon suante'n kumpipa adou ua, azou hi. Huchi in Ammon suante'n huai kum in dangka talent zakhat leh huit buh puak singkhat leh barli buh puak singkhat apia uhi. Huchibang mah in Ammon suante'n akum nihna leh akum thumna ah leng apia uhi.
14027006	Huchi in Jotham in Toupa a Pathian ma a lampi hoih abawl ziak in ahong hatta hi.
14027007	Jotham thilhih dangte agaldoute, a-omdante ngai dih, Israel leh Judah kumpite thugelhnabu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14027008	Vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-guk vai ahawm hi.
14027009	Jotham bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, David khopi ah avui uh; asik in atapa Ahaz in vai ahawmta hi.
14028001	Ahaz in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih a upa ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-guk vai ahawm; apu David bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih kei hi.
14028002	Israel kumpipate lampi azui zaw a, Baalte a ding in milim suntawmte abawl lai hi.
14028003	Hinnom tapa phaizang ah gimlimte ahal a, Toupa'n Israel suante ma a delhkhiaksa namte thilkihhuaitak ahih sek bang un atate uh mei ah alutsak uhi.
14028004	Mun sangte, mualte, sing hing nuaite ah akithoih a, gimlimte ahal zel hi.
14028005	Huaiziak in Toupa a Pathian in Siria kumpipa khut ah apia a; asual ua, mi tampi sal in api ua, Damaskas ah apaipih uhi. Israel kumpipa khut a piak ahi lai a, ama'n tampi athat hi.
14028006	Api-le-pute uh Toupa Pathian alehngatsan ziak un. Remaliah tapa Pekah in Judah gam ah nuaikhat-le-singnih ni khat in athat a, avek un mihangsan chiat ahi uhi.
14028007	Ephraim mihat Jikri in kumpipa tapa Maaseiah leh insung upa Azrikam leh Elkanah, kumpipa zom athat hi.
14028008	Huchi in Israel suante'n a-unaute uh nuainih, numeite, atapate uh, atanute uh sal in api ua; gallak tamtak alaksak lai ua, gallak pen Samaria ah atun uhi.
14028009	Huai ah Toupa zawlnei ana om a, amin Obed ahi; Samaria a hong pai ding sepaihte ana vaidawn a, akiang uah, “Ngai dih uh, Toupa na pi-le-pute uh Pathian Judahte tung ah aheh a, na khut ua hon pia ei ve, heh a na thahna un van asuntou hi.
14028010	Judah leh Jerusalem mite sikhanu leh sikhapa in bawl na tum ua, himahleh noute ngei in leng Toupa na Pathian uh tung ah na hihkhial uh ahi kei maw?
14028011	Huaiziak in ka thu pom unla, na unaute uh sal a na matte uh paisak nawn un; Toupa hehna thupitak na tung uah a-om hi,” achi hi.
14028012	Huchi in Ephraimte heutu khenkhat, Johanan tapa Azariahte, Mesillemoth tapa Berekiahte, Shallum tapa Jehizkiah, Hadlai tapa Amasa kidouna a kipan a hong paite ana dal ua, akiang uah,
14028013	“Salte na hon pilut ding uh ahi kei; ka khelhna uh leh ka tatlekna uh behlap in, Toupa tung ah tatlekna na hon tungsak ding uh ahi, ka khelhna uh athupi mahmah ngal a, Israel mite tung ah hehna thupitak a-om hi,” ana chi uhi.
14028014	Huchi in sepaihte'n miliante leh mipi ma ah salte leh gallak sumte anusia uh.
14028015	Huan minlohlouhte ahong thou ua, salte api ua, gallak thil in vuaktang a om teng puansilh aguan ua, avan ua, khedapte abunsak ua, nek ding leh dawn ding apia ua, sathau anilh ua, ahatloute tengteng sabiltung ah atuangsak ua, tum sing khua, Jeriko ah a-unaute uh kiang ah apaisak ua, amau Samaria ah akik nawnta uhi.
14028016	Huai lai in kumpipa Ahaz in Assuria kumpipate panpihna ngen ding in mi asawl hi.
14028017	Edomte'n Judahte va sual a, sal dia hon mat thuk ziak un.
14028018	Philistiate'n leng phailam khuate leh Judah simte ahong la ua, Beth-shemesh, Aijalon, Gederoth, Sokoh leh akhotate toh, huan, Timnah leh akhotate, Gimzo leng akhotate toh ala ua, huai ah a-om uhi.
14028019	Israel kumpipa Ahaz ziak in Toupa'n Judahte avuallelsak hi. Judahte tung ah thanghuaitak in thil ahih a, Toupa tung ah nakpitak in akhial ahi.
14028020	Huchi in Siria kumpipa Tilgath-pilneser akiang ah ahong pai a, hihhat nak sang in ahihmangbang zaw hi.
14028021	Ahaz in Toupa' inn, kumpipa' inn leh miliante a pan thilte ala a, Siria kumpipa apia a; himahleh aphatuam tuan kei.
14028022	Amangbat laitak in leng hiai kumpipa Ahaz in Toupa tung ah thil ahihkhial semsem mawk hi.
14028023	Amah sualmi Damaskaste pathian kiang ah akithoih hi, “Siria kumpipate' pathian in amaute apanpih ziak in kei leng ahon panpih theihna ding in akiang ah ka kithoih ding ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh amah leh Israel mi tengteng siatna ahi ngal a.
14028024	Huchi in Ahaz in Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan akaikhawm vek a, Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan ahihkham vek a, Toupa' inn kongkhakte akhak bikbek a; Jerusalem ning chih ah maitam abawl hi.
14028025	Judah kho tampi ah pathian dangte dia gimlim halna mun sangte abawl a, Toupa api-le-pute Pathian ahehsak hi.
14028026	Athilhih dangte tengteng leh a-omdan tengteng abul a kipan atawp pha in ngai dih, Judate leh Israel kumpite tanchinbu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14028027	Api-le-pute kiang ah Ahaz a-ihmu a, Jerusalem khopi ah avui ua; Israel kumpipate han ah akoih kei uh. Huchi in asik in atapa Hezekiah in vai ahawmta hi.
14029001	Hezekiah in kum sawmnih-le-nga a upa ahih in vaihawm apan a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnih-le-kua vai ahawm a; anu min Abijah, Zekariah tanu ahi.
14029002	Ama'n apu David thilhih bang hih in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih zel hi.
14029003	Ama'n vaihawm apat kum akha khatna ah Toupa' inn kongkhakte ahong a, azemhoih hi.
14029004	Siampute leh Levite apilut a, suahlam sang mun za lai ah apikhawm a, akiang uah,
14029005	“Nou Levite aw, ka thu ngaikhia un; noute kihihsiangthou phot unla, huchi in Toupa , na pi-le-pute uh Pathian inn hihsiangthou unla, mun siangthou a kipan ninte paikhia un.
14029006	I pi-le-pute un thil ahihkhialta ua, Toupa Pathian mitmuh in thil hoih lou ana hih ua, ana lehngatsan ua, Toupa omna alehngatsan ua, ana nungngatta uhi.
14029007	Inn lim kongkhakte akhak ua, khawnvakte ahihmit ua, Israel' Pathian' mun siangthou ah gimlimte ahal kei ua, halmang thillatte leng alan kei uh.
14029008	Huaiziak in Toupa hehna Judate leh Jerusalem tung ah a-om a, na mit ua na muh bang un, gam chih mual chih a sepsep ding leh lamdangsak ding leh nuihzat ding in ana bawlta ahi.
14029009	Ngai dih ua, i pi-le-pute uh namsau a vuallelhsak in a-om ua, i tanu leh i tapate uh, i zite uh, huaiziak in sal in ana om uhi.
14029010	“Ngai dih ua, ahehna mahmah athentheihna ding in Toupa Israel' Pathian kiang ah thu khun ka tum hi.
14029011	Ka naute aw don lou in om kei un, Toupa nasem na hi ua, ama a nasem a om ding leh gimlim halmi ding in nou ahon telta ahi,” achi hi.
14029012	Huchi in Levi mi Amasai tapa Mahathte, Kohath mi Azariah tapa Joelte; Merari tapate lak a Abdi tapa Kishte, Jehalleleel tapa Azariah, Gershon, Zimmah tapa Joah, Joah tapa Edente,
14029013	Elizaphan tapate lak a mi Shimri leh Jeuelte: Asaph tapate lak a mi Zekariah leh Mataniahte;
14029014	Heman tapate lak a mi Jehuel leh Shimeite; Jeduthun tapate lak a mi Shemaiah leh Uzzielte akuankhia uhi.
14029015	A-unaute uh asamkhawm ua, akihihsiangthou ua, Toupa thu a kumpipa thupiak bang a Toupa' inn hihsiang ding in alutta uhi.
14029016	Huchi in kihihsiang ding in Toupa insung gil lam ah siampute alut ua, Toupa' inn a thilnin amuh tengteng uh Toupa inkong ah alakhia uhi.
14029017	Akha khatna ani khat ni in apan ua, huai kha ani giat ni in Toupa inlim atung ua; huchi in ani giat in Toupa' inn ahihsiangthou ua; akha khatna ani sawm-le-guk ni in azou vek uhi.
14029018	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah kumpipa' inn ah alut ua, “ Toupa' inn a halmang thillatna maitamte, huai a tui-um belsuan tengteng, tanghou siahna dohkante, huai a vanzat tengtengte ka hihsiang vekta uh.
14029019	Kumpipa Ahaz in avaihawm lai a thil ahihkhelh a, apaihmang tui-um belsuan tengteng leng ka bawl zou vek ua, ka hihsiangthou lai ua; huan, ngai dih, Toupa maitam malam ah a-om hi,” achi uhi.
14029020	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah bel zingkhang in athou a, khua a miliante asamkhawm a, Toupa' inn ah ahoh uhi.
14029021	Gam, mun siangthou leh Judate a ding a khelh thoihna ding bawngtal sagih, belamtal sagih, belamnou sagih leh keltal sagih akaitou ua. Aaron tapa siampute Toupa maitam a lan ding in thu apia hi.
14029022	Huchi in bawngtalte agou ua; siampute'n sisan ala ua, maitam atheh ua: belamtalte agou ua, asisan in maitam atheh ua; belamnoute leng agou ua, asisan in maitam atheh uhi.
14029023	Huan keltalte khelh thoihna ding in kumpipa leh mipite kiang ah ahon kai ua, atung uah akhut uh anga uhi.
14029024	Siampute'n agou ua, Israel mi tengteng a ding a lemna bawlna ding in asisan un maitam ah khelh thoihna alan ua; kumpipa thupiak bang in Israel mi tengteng a ding in alan uhi.
14029025	Huchi in David leh kumpipa zawlnei Gad leh zawlnei Nathan thupiak bang in Toupa' inn ah Levite dakkhutbette, pekgingte, kaihgingte tum ding in akoih a; thupiak a zawlneite zang a Toupa piak lah ahi ngal a.
14029026	Levite bel David bawl tumging chi toh siampute pengkul toh adingh uhi.
14029027	Huan Hezekiah in maitam a halmang thillat lan ding in thu apia a. Halmang thillat ahon lat pat un Toupa la pengkul leh Israel kumpipa David bawl tumging toh ahon sa uhi.
14029028	Huchi in mipite'n Pathian abia ua, lasiamte'n la asa ua, pengkul mut mite'n amut ua, halmang thillat lat khit ahih masiah huchibang in ahih nilouh uhi.
14029029	Thillat alat khit un kumpipa leh akiang a om tengteng in kun in Pathian abia uhi.
14029030	Kumpipa Hezekiah leh miliante'n Levite bel David leh zawlnei Asaph phuah phatna la sa ding in thu apia uhi. Huchi in nuamsatak in phatna la asa ua, akun ua, Pathian abia uhi.
14029031	Huchi in Hezekiah in, “ Toupa a ding in na kihihsiangthouta ua, hong nai unla, Toupa' inn ah kithoihna leh kipahthu genna thillat hong lan un,” achi hi. Mipite'n kithoihnate, kipahthu genna thillatte ahon lan ua, a-ut peuhmah in halmang thillat ahon lan uhi.
14029032	Mipite'n halmang thillat ahong lat zah uh bawngtal sawmsagih leh belamtal zakhat leh belamnou zanih ahi. Hiaite tengteng Toupa a dia halmang thillat ding vek ahi.
14029033	Thillat tengteng bawngtal zaguk, belamtal sangthum ahi.
14029034	Himahleh siampu atawm lua ua, halmang thillat pen asem seng kei ua; huaiziak in a-unaute Levite'n akimansak ma un siampute kihihsiangthou tan in ahuh uhi. Levite siampute sang in kihihsiangthou thu ah angentelzaw uhi.
14029035	Huchi in halmang thillatte atam a, halmang thillat chih a ding a lemna thillat thaute, dawn ding thillat a dingte leng atam mahmah hi. Huchi in Toupa' inn nasepdan hoihtak in ahih uhi.
14029036	Pathian in mite kisakholsak khin a, kintak a thil atunsak a, thil om guih ahih ziak in, Hezekia leh mi tengteng akipak mahmah uhi.
14030001	Huan Hezekiah in Israel gam leh Judah gam teng ah mi asawl a, Ephraim leh Manasseh gamte ah leng Toupa Israel' Pathian a ding in Paikan Ankuang nei ding a Jerusalem a Toupa' inn a hong pai ding in lai akhak hi.
14030002	Kumpipa leh amiliante leh Jerusalem a mipi teng in akha nihna ah, Paikan Ankuang neih asawm uhi.
14030003	Huai lai in alui thei nai kei ua, siampu kihihsiangthoute atam nai kei uh; Jerusalem a mipi akikaihkhop nai louh ziak un.
14030004	Athil sawm uh kumpipa leh mipite ngaih in adik hi.
14030005	Huchi in Israel gam teng, Beer-sheba a kipan Dan pha in Toupa Israel' Pathian a ding in Paikan Ankuang nei ding a Jerusalem a hong pai ding apuang ding in thu ahihkipta hi. Adan bangtak in huchibang a tam in ahih ngei nai kei uh.
14030006	Huchi in lai taipih mite kumpipa leh amiliante uh lai tawi in, Israel leh Judah gam tengteng a pai ding in kumpipa thupiak bang in apawt ua, “Nou Israel suante aw, Siria kumpipate khut a kipan pawt a akhosuaksunte Toupa , Abraham, Isak leh Israel' Pathian lam hong nga nawn un; huchi a nou lam ahong ngat nawn theihna ding in.
14030007	Nou zaw na pi-le-pute uh leh na unaute uh, Toupa apipute uh Pathian tung a thil hihkhial a om, segawp ding a donsak lou a na muhte uh bang in om kei un.
14030008	Na pi-le-pute uh bang in genhak nawn kei unla, Toupa kiang ah kitulut zaw unla, tangtawn a dia ahihsiangthou, amun siangthou ah hong lut unla, Toupa na Pathian uh nna sem un, huchi in ahehna thupitak na lak ua kipan akiheimangsak ding hi.
14030009	Toupa lam na hong ngat nawn uleh na unaute uh leh na tate uh sal a man mite'n ahehpih ding ua, hiai gam ah ahong pai nawn ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian uh lah chingtheitak leh zahngaitheitak ahi ngal a, amah lam na hong ngat peuhmah uleh ahon nuse kei ding,” chi in.
14030010	Huchi in lai taipih mite kho chih ah Ephraim leh Manasseh gam tengteng ah Zebulun pha in apai ua, himahleh amaute nuihsan in ana simmoh uhi.
14030011	Himahleh Asherte leh Manassehte leh Zebulunte tampi akitulut ua, Jerusalem ah ahoh uhi.
14030012	Judah gamte ngial houh Toupa thu a kumpipa leh miliante thupiak zui ding in Pathian in lungsim mun khat apusak hi.
14030013	Huchi in kha nihna ah tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina nei ding in Jerusalem ah mi tampi ahong kikhawm ua, atam mahmah uhi.
14030014	Huan athou ua, Jerusalem a maitamte ala ua, gimlim halna maitamte leng ala ua, Kidron lui ah apai uhi.
14030015	Huchi in akha nihna ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuangluina agou ua; siampute leh Levite azum ua, akihihsiangthou ua, halmang thillat toh Toupa' inn ah alalut uhi.
14030016	Huan Pathian mipa Mosi Dan bangtak in amau mun chiat ah adingh ua; siampute'n Levite a kipan atan uh sisan atheh uhi.
14030017	Mipi lak ah lah kihihsiangthou lou atam ua; huaiziak in Toupa a ding a hihsiangthou ding in asiangthouloute tuam ding in Levite'n Paikan Ankuangluina ding agou uhi.
14030018	Ephraim, Manasseh, Issakar, Zebulun mite tampi akihihsiangthou kei na ua, dan lou bang in Paikan Ankuangluina ane uhi. Himahleh amaute a ding in Hezekiah athum a, “Chingthei Toupa'n ,
14030019	Michih alungtang a Toupa , apipute Pathian, Pathian zongte, mun siangthou siansakna dan dungzui in kisiangsak kei mahleh, ngaidam hen,” chi in.
14030020	Huchi in Toupa'n Hezekiah thumna angaikhia a, mipite ahihdamta hi.
14030021	Israel mi Jerusalem a omte'n Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina nuamsatak in ni sagih azang ua; Levite leh siampute'n kaihging ngaihtak toh Toupa pahtawi a la sa in niteng in Toupa aphat uhi.
14030022	Huan Hezekiah in siamtak in Toupa kilawmtak a phat Levite alungmuan hi. Huchi in Toupa apipute uh Pathian kiang a thupha tawi in lemna thillatte lan in ni sagih ankuangluina ane tawntung uhi.
14030023	Huan mipi in ni sagih dang ankuang lui nawn asawm ua; huchi in ni sagih dang nuamsatak in ankuang alui nawn uhi.
14030024	Huan Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in mipite bawngtal sangkhat leh belam sangsagih goh ding in apia a; miliante'n mipite bawngtal sangkhat leh belam singkhat apia uhi; siampu tampite akihihsiangthou uhi.
14030025	Huchi in Judah mipi tengteng siampute toh Levite toh, Israel gam a kipan a mipi hong pai tengteng leh namdang Israel gam a kipan a hong pai Judah gam a omte'n nuam asa mahmah uhi.
14030026	Huchi in nopsakna thupitak Jerusalem ah a-om a: Israel kumpipa David tapa Solomon chiang ah huchibang himhim Jerusalem ah a-om ngei nai kei hi.
14030027	Huchi in siampu leh Levite athou ua, mipite avualzawl ua; a-aw uh ngaihkhiak in a-om a, athumna un a-omna siangthou van apha hi.
14031001	Huchi in huai tengteng ahih khit un huai a Israel mi om tengteng in Judah gam tengteng leh Benjamin gam leh Ephraim leh Manasseh gam suangphuhte ahihzan ua, Asherahte aphuk ua, mun sangte leh maitamte achipsak vek masiah uh Judah gam khuate ah apai zel uhi. Huchi in Israel suante tengteng agam uah amau khua chiat ah apai nawn uhi.
14031002	Huan Hezekiah in siampute leh Levite apawldan bang zel un michih siampute leh Levite'n atuah chiat ding un, halmang thillat leh lemna thillat lanmi dingte, nasemmi dingte, kipahthu genmi ding leh Toupa omna kongpi a ngakmi dingte pawl abawlsak chiat hi.
14031003	Toupa dan a tuang bangbang in zingsang lam leh nitaklam halmang thillat dingte, Sabbath leh kha thak leh hunbi nei ankuang a dingte kumpipa tantuan a ding asep hi.
14031004	Jerusalem a mipite Toupa dan a akihihhatna ding un siampute leh Levite tantuan pe ding in thu ape lai hi.
14031005	Huai thupiak adalhzaktak in Israel suante'n abuhte, uainte, thaute, khuaizute, alou ua thilsuak masapente ahong pia ua; abangkim uh sawm-a-khat leng ahong pia uhi.
14031006	Israel suante leh Judah suante, Judah khuate a omte'n abawng uleh belam uh sawm-a-khatte, Toupa a Pathian uh tantuam dia apiaksawn uh sawm-a-khatte ahon pia ua, akoihkhawm ekok phet uhi.
14031007	Kha thumna ah akoihkhawm pan ua, akha sagihna ah akoihkhawm khin uhi.
14031008	Huchi in Hezekiah leh amiliante un koihkhawm amuh un Toupa leh ami Israelte aphat uhi.
14031009	Hezekiah in athil koihkhawm tungtang thu uh huai siampute leh Levite adong a.
14031010	Zadok mi siampu heutu Azariah in adawng a, “Mite'n Toupa' inn a thilpiak ahon tawi tung ua kipan in i ne zel ua, i deihkhop ua, a-om ekok lai hi. Toupa'n mite avualzawl zel a, hiai a om ekok lai teng i kham val uh ei ve,” achi hi.
14031011	Huchi in Hezekiah in Toupa' inn ah dantante bawl ding in thu apia a; abawlta uhi.
14031012	Huan thilpiakte sawm-a-khatte, Pathian a tuamte muanhuaitak in anawn lut uhi: aheutu uh Levi mi Konaniah ahi a, a-unau Shimei bel azom ahi.
14031013	Konaniah leh a-unau Shimei nuai ah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Pathian inn a heutu Azariah seh in endikmi Jehiel, Azajiah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Jozabad, Eliel, Ismakiah, Mahath leh Benaiahte a-om uhi.
14031014	Levi mi Imna tapa Kore, suahlam kongkhak ngakmi Pathian kiang a lungsim ut thu a thilpiak kempa leh Toupa a dia thilpiak leh thil siangthoupen hawmpa ahi.
14031015	Anuai ah Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Shemaiah, Amariah, Shekaniah, siampu khua ah nasep hunbi chiat ah a-unaute uh apawlpawl aneu leh aliante kiang a semmi a-om uhi:
14031016	Khangthu sut pasal kum thum chiang tunglam, niteng a Toupa' inn a nasep kul nei a pawl dandan bang ua hohsekte sim louh in.
14031017	A-inkuan uh pipute gelhna a siampu asehte leh Levi mi kum sawmnih chiang tunglam apawldan bang zel ua nasemmi dia sehte;
14031018	pipute gelhna a tuang ataneute tengteng uh, azite uh, atapate uh, a-inkuan tengteng uh; asepna bik ua siangthoutak a akihihsiangthoute ahi uhi.
14031019	Aaron suan kho chih khopua a om siampute leh Levite suante gelhna a tuang peuhmahte tantuan pe ding mi sehtuam a-om uhi.
14031020	Huchibang in Judah gam tengteng ah Hezekiah in ahih a, Toupa a Pathian mitmuh in hoih leh dik leh muanhuai thil ahih sek hi.
14031021	Pathian nasep lam thu ah, dan lam thu ah, thupiak lam thu ah, a Pathian zon thu ah ahih peuhmah ah alungsim tengteng in ahih a, alamzang zel hi.
14032001	Huchibang a muanhuaitak a thil ahih nung un Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib ahong kuan a, Judah gam ah ahong lut a, kulh nei khuate ahong um a, lak ahong tum hi.
14032002	Sennakerib ahong kuan a, Jerusalem hong sual atum chih Hezekiah in atheih in,
14032003	kho polam a tuite hihtat ding in amiliante leh amihatte athuhilh a; huchi in apanpih uhi.
14032004	Huchi in mi tampi akikaikhawm ua, tui tengteng leh gamsung a luangsuak luite achingtan ua, Assuria kumpipate ahong lut ua, “Tui tampi bang ding in ahong nei mahmah ding ua,” achi uhi.
14032005	Huchi in akihangsak ua, kulh chipna tata abawl a, insungte leh polam kulhte leng abawlhoih hi. David khua ah Millo ahihkip a, galvante leh lumte tampi abawl hi.
14032006	Kidouna a mipi heutute abawl a, khopi kongkhak mun za lai ah asamkhawm hi.
14032007	“Hattak in, hangsantak in om unla, Assuria kumpipa leh aheute mipi lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un:
14032008	Amah lam a pangsa sepaih ahi ua, ei hon panpih ding leh hon dousak ding a ei lam a pang bel Toupa i Pathian uh ahi ngal a,” chi in lungmuanna thu agen hi.
14032009	Huai nung in Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib in; amah leh asepaihte Lakish ah a-om ua, Judah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Jerusalem a Judah mi tengteng kiang ah,
14032010	“Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib in hichi in achi, Jerusalem lak bang ahia na uplouhna uh?
14032011	Hezekiah in, Toupa i Pathian in Assuria kumpipa khut a kipan hon hunkhe ding, chi in gilkial leh dangtak a na sihna ding un ahon khem ahi kei maw?
14032012	Hezekiah mah ahi kei maw, amun sangte leh amaitamte chimsak a Judah mi leh Jerusalem a mite kiang a, maitam khat ah Pathian na be ding ua, gimlim na hal ding uh, chi a thu pepa?
14032013	Kei leh ka pute'n gamdang mite tung a ka thilhih uh na thei kei ua hia?
14032014	“Kua namte pathian ahia ka pute'n ahihman uh ka khut a kipan a amite uh hunkhe thei om a, noute Pathian in leng ka khut a kipan a ahon hutkhiak theih tuamna ding?
14032015	Huaiziak in Hezekiah in hon khem kei henla, huchibang in hon khem kei henla, amah um kei un; bang nam pathian leh bang gam pathian himhim amite uh ka khut a kipan leh ka pute khut a kipan hunkhe thei a-om kei ua; bangchi in na Pathian un ka khut a kipan a hon hunkhe thei tuam mahmah dia?” chi in Jerusalem ah amite asawl hi.
14032016	Huan amite'n huai sang a thupi in Toupa Pathian leh asikha Hezekiah tungtang thu ahoih lou lam in agen uhi.
14032017	Israelte' Toupa Pathian hehsak ding leh gense ding in lai agelh lai hi. “Gam chih, namte pathiante'n ka khut a kipan amite uh hunkhe thei lou bangmah in Hezekiah Pathian in leng ka khut a kipan amite ahunkhe kei hial ding,” chi in.
14032018	Khua alaktheihna ding un amulkimsakna ding leh lungzinsakna ding in Jerusalem a kulh a omte Judah pau in ngaihtak in akikoukhum uhi.
14032019	Jerusalem Pathian mihing khut a bawl leitung mite pathian bang lel phet in agen uhi.
14032020	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah leh Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai huaiziak in athum ua, van a om asam uhi.
14032021	Toupa'n angel asawl a, huai in Assuria kumpipa giahmun a mihat hangsan tengteng leh makai heutute athat hi. Huchi in zum mahmah melpu in agam lam ah apai nawnta hi. Huan apathian inn a hoh lai ama tapate mahmah in namsau in athat uhi.
14032022	Huchibang in Toupa'n Hezekiah leh Jerusalem a mite Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib khut a kipan leh midang tengteng khut a kipan ahumbit a, akim ua mite lak ah aveng hi.
14032023	Huan mi tampi in Jerusalem ah Toupa a ding in thilpiak ahon tawi ua, thil manpha pipite Judah kumpipa Hezekiah ahong pia ua; huai a kipan in nam chih mitmuh in pahtawi in a-omta hi.
14032024	Huai lai in Hezekiah bel sizou ding khop in achina a, Toupa kiang ah athum a; huan, adawng a, chiamtehna apia hi.
14032025	Himahleh Hezekiah in amah a ding a hoih kihih dungzui in ahih kei a, alungtang hong kisaktheih ziak in ahi; huaiziak in atung ah leh Judahte leh Jerusalem tung ah hehna ahong tung hi.
14032026	Himahleh Hezekiah in alungtang kisaktheihna kisik in akiniamkhiak nawn a, amah leh Jerusalem a mite toh; huchi in Hezekiah damsung in Toupa hehna atung uah ahong tung kei hi.
14032027	Huan Hezekiah in sum-le-pai ahau a, athupita mahmah a; dangkasik, dangka-eng, suangmantam, gimlim, lum leh tui-um belsuan hoih pipi koihkhawmna inn alam hi.
14032028	Buh, uain leh thau koihkhawmna inn leng alam lai a; gan chiteng koihna leh belam huang leng abawl hi.
14032029	Huchi in khuate leng abawl lai a, belamhon leh bawnghon ahau mahmah hi. Pathian in neizoutak in abawl hi.
14032030	Hezekiah mah in Gihon luitui saknungzaw pen ahubing a, David khua tumlam pang ah aluangkhesak hi. Huchi in Hezekiah athilhih tengteng ah alamzang zel hi.
14032031	Babulon miliante'n palai asawl ua agam a thillamdang adot thu uah alungtang a om tengteng atheihtheihna ding in Pathian in anusia in aze-et hi.
14032032	Hezekiah thilhih dang tengteng, athilhih hoihte, ngai dih, Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai kilakna bu, Judah kumpipa leh Israel kumpite tanchinbu ah gelh in a-om hi.
14032033	Api-le-pute kiang ah Hezekiah a-ihmu a, David tapate hanmun paitouhna ah avui ua; Judah tengteng leh Jerusalem a mite'n asih ni in thupitak in agal uhi. Asik in atapa Manasseh in vai ahawmta hi.
14033001	Manasseh in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawm-le-nih ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga-le-nga vai ahawm hi.
14033002	Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou, Israel suante ma a Toupa'n adelhkhiak Pathian thei lou namte'n thilkihhuaitak ahih bang uh ama'n leng ahih zel hi.
14033003	Apa Hezekiah in ahihchip nung mun sangte abawlhoih a, Baalte a ding in maitam abawl a, Asherah limte abawl a, van a om tengteng abia a, a-nna uh asem hi.
14033004	“Jerusalem ah tangtawn in ka min a-om ding,” Toupa'n achihna Toupa' inn ah maitamte abawl hi.
14033005	Toupa' inn huangsung intual nih ah van a om tengteng a ding in maitamte abawl hi.
14033006	Phaizang ah Hinnom tapa mei ah atate alutsak a; aisante aching a, bumte aching a, dawi aisan siam zawlte leh bumsiamte aguai sek a; Toupa thangpaisak ding in amitmuh ah thil hoih lou ahih hi.
14033007	Pathian in David leh atapa Solomon kiang a, “Hiai inn leh Jerusalem a Israel chi tengteng lak a ka tel ah ka min tangtawn in ka omsak ding, achih khitsa Pathian inn ah amah bawl, milim bawltawm akoih hi.
14033008	Thu ka piak tengteng leh dan tengteng, dan thuseh, thilhih ding Mosi zang a ka piakte azuih peuhmah uleh api-le-pute uh ka piaksa gam a kipan Israelte khe ka kal suankhesak nawn kei ding,” achihna ah.
14033009	Manasseh in Judahte leh Jerusalem a mite thil ahihkhialsak a; Toupa'n Israelte ma a ahihman khitsa namte sang in ahihkhialzaw hi.
14033010	Huan Toupa'n Manasseh leh amite kiang ah thu agen zel a; himahleh alimsak kei uhi.
14033011	Huaiziak in Toupa'n Assuria sepaih heutute asawl a, Manasseh khainiang in akhih ua, kol abunsak ua, Babulon ah apaipihta uhi.
14033012	Huchi in mangbangtak a a-om lai in Toupa a Pathian azong a, api-le-pute Pathian ma ah nakpitak in akiniamkhiak hi.
14033013	Akiang ah athum a, hehpih angen a, angetna angaihkhiaksak a, Jerusalem ah agam ah apai nawnta hi.
14033014	Huai nung in David kho polam ah Gihon tumlam pang phaizang ah ngasa kongkhak lutna pha in kulh abawl a, Ophel umsuak in sangpi in adingsak a: Judah khua kulh nei tengteng ah heutu hangsan taktak akoih hi.
14033015	Gamdang pathiante leh milimte, Toupa' inn a kipan apaimang a, tang a Toupa' inn leh Jerusalem a maitam abawl tengteng khua a kipan apaikhe vek uhi.
14033016	Toupa maitam abawl a, lemna thillat kithoihnate, kipahthu gennate alan a, Judahte bel Toupa Israel' Pathian nasem ding in thu apia hi.
14033017	Mipite mun sang ah akithoih lailai ua; himahleh Toupa a Pathian uh kiang ah kithoih ahi zawta hi.
14033018	Manasseh tanchin dang tengteng, a Pathian kiang a athum thute, Toupa Israel' Pathian min a zawlnei in akiang a thu agente uh ngai dih, Israel kumpipate tanchin lak ah atuang hi.
14033019	Athumnate, Pathian in ahehpihna leh akiniamkhiak ma in agitlouhna tengteng, mun sang abawl a, Asher leh milim bawltawm a bawlkhiakna mun tengteng leng, ngai dih, Hozai tanchin gelhna bu ah atuang vek hi.
14033020	Huchi in Manasseh bel api-le-pute kiang ah a-ihmu a, ama inn ah avui ua; atapa Ammon in asik in vai ahawmta hi.
14033021	Ammon in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nih ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum nih vai ahawm hi.
14033022	Apa Manasseh hih mah bang in Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; apa Manasseh in abawl milim bawltawm tengteng kiang ah Ammon akithoih a, a-nna asem hi.
14033023	Apa Manasseh kiniamkhiak bang in Toupa ma ah akiniamkhiak kei a, Ammon agilou semsem hi.
14033024	Huchi in a sikhate'n asawm ua, ama inn ah athat uhi.
14033025	Himahleh kumpipa Ammon kalh a phialguk sawm mi tengteng mipi'n athat vek nawn ua; asik a kumpipa hi ding in mipite'n atapa Josiah abawlta uhi.
14034001	Josiah in vaihawm apat tung in kum giat a upa ahi; Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum-le-khat vai ahawm hi.
14034002	Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih ahih zel a, apu David lampite azui a, taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam apialsan kei hi.
14034003	Kum giat avaihawm kum, naupangtak ahih lai a kipan him in apu David Pathian azong pan a; kum sawm-le-nih avaihawm kum in Judah gam leh Jerusalem a mun sangte, Asherte, milim bawltawmte, milim suntawmte ahihbei a.
14034004	Baal maitamte amitmuh in achimsak ua; huaite sang a sangzaw milimte aphuk a; Asherte, milim bawltawmte, milim suntawmte ahihkham vek a, akiang ua kithoih mite han tung ah athehzak hi.
14034005	Siampu guhte amaitamte uah ahal a, Judah gam leh Jerusalem ahihsiang hi.
14034006	Huchi mah bang in Manasseh, Ephraim, Simeon leh Naphtali khuate tan in ahih vek hi.
14034007	Maitamte achimsak a, Asherte, milim bawltawmte ahihkham a, Israel gam tengteng a milimte aphuk vek a, Jerusalem ah apai nawn hi.
14034008	Huan avaihawm kum sawm-le-giat kum, agam leh innte ahihsiang kum in Azaliah tapa Shaphan, kho ukpa Maaseiah, Joahaz tapa laigelhmi Joah Toupa a Pathian inn bawlhoih ding in asawl hi.
14034009	Siampu Hilkiah kiang ah ahoh ua, kongkhak ngak Levite'n Manasseh mite, Israel khosuaksunte, Judah mi leh Benjamin mite, Jerusalem a mite kiang a kipan ana lakkhawm uh, Pathian inn a hong koih uh dangka apia uhi.
14034010	Huchi in Toupa' inn lammi nasemte apia ua; Toupa' inn nasem mite'n inn bawl mite leh zem mite apia uhi.
14034011	Judah kumpipate'n ahihsiat uh bawlhoihna ding in suangsekte, apehnate leh a-inkamte ding sing leina ding in khutsiamte leh inn lam mite apia uhi.
14034012	Huchi in mite'n muanhuaitak in nna asem ua; aheutu uh, nasep ngaihtuah mite, Merari tapate lak a Levi mi Jahath leh Obadiah, Kohath mi tapate lak a mi Zekariah leh Meshullamte ahi ua; Levi mi, midang ginglawm tumsiam tengteng toh;
14034013	apuak a puakthoh mite heutu leh nna chiteng sem mite sep ding ngaihtuahmi ahi uhi. Laigelhmite, heutute, kongkhak ngak mite Levi mite lak a mi ahi uh.
14034014	Huan Toupa' inn a hong koih uh sumte asuah ualeh, siampu Hilkiah in Mosi zang a apiak Toupa Dan Bu amukhia hi.
14034015	Huchi in Hilkiah in laigelhmi Shaphan kiang ah, “ Toupa' inn ah Dan Bu i mukheta uh,” achi a. Huan Hilkiah in laibu Shaphan apia hi.
14034016	Huan Shaphan in laibu kumpipa kiang ah apaipih a, “Na sikhate'n hih ding a seh a om tengteng ahih uh.
14034017	Toupa' inn a dangka om abungkhia ua, heutute leh nasem mite apia uh,” chi in thu atun hi.
14034018	Laigelhmi Shaphan in, “Siampu Hilkiah in laibu ahon pia,” chi in kumpipa ahilh a, kumpipa ma ah asim hi.
14034019	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa'n Dan thute azak in, apuan abotkek hi.
14034020	Kumpipa'n Hilkiah, Shaphan tapa Ahikam, Mikah tapa Abdon, laigelhmi Shaphan leh kumpipa sikha Asaiah thu apia hi.
14034021	“Kuan unla, dan thu na muhkhiak tungtang thu uah kei leh Israel leh Judah gam a mite a ding in Toupa hon dotsak dih ua; i pi-le-pute'n hiai Dan Bu a tuang bang a Toupa thu azuih louh ziak un i tung uah Toupa thangpaihna ahong om mahmah ngal a,” chi in.
14034022	Huchi in kumpipa'n thu apiak mite leh Hilkiah puansilh kempa Hasrah tapa Tokhat tapa Shallum zi zawlnei Huldah kiang ah ava hoh ua, huai thu ah ava houpih uhi. Amah bel Jerusalem Misneh a om ahi.
14034023	Huan ama'n akiang uah, Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ka kiang a nou hon sawlpa hilh unla, Toupa'n hichi in achi:
14034024	‘Ngai dih ua, hiai mun leh asung a omte tung ah thil hoih lou ka tungsak ding a, Judah kumpipa ma a kisimkhia, laibu a tuang hamsia tengteng leng;
14034025	akhut thilhih ua hon hehsakna ding ua hon lehngatsan a, milim dangte ding a gimlim ahal ziak un hiai mun tung ah ka hehna sun ahi a, daihsak ahi kei ding,’ chi in.
14034026	Himahleh Toupa thu dong ding a nou hon sawlpa Judah kumpipa kiang ah, hichibang in chi un, Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Na thuzakte tungtang thu ah,
14034027	na lungtang hihnem a a-om ziak a Pathian ma a na kiniamkhiak a, hiai mun tungtang thu leh asung a omte tungtang thu na zak a, ka ma a na kiniamkhiak a, na puan na bohkek a, ka ma a na kah ziak in ke'n leng na thu ka na ngaikhia hi.
14034028	Ngai dih, na pi leh na pute kiang ah ka hon hohsak ding a, na han ah lungmuangtak in na pai ding a, hiai mun leh asung a omte tung a ka hon tunsak ding thil hoih lou tengteng na mit in amu kei ding, chi in gen in,’ ” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah thu atunta uhi.
14034029	Huchi in kumpipa'n mi asawl a, Judah gam leh Jerusalem a upa tengteng asamkhawm hi.
14034030	Huchi in kumpipa leh Judah mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a mi tengteng, siampu leh Levite, mipi tengteng aneu leh alian in Toupa' inn ah ahohtou ua; Toupa' inn a muhkhiak thukhun bu a thu tengteng abil ua zak in asim hi.
14034031	Kumpipa bel amun ah adingh a, huai laibu a tuang thukunte hihkip ding in alungtang tengteng, akha tengteng a Toupa zui ding leh athupiakte, athu theihsakte, adan thusehte pom ding in Toupa ma ah thu akhung uhi.
14034032	Jerusalem leh Benjamin mi tengteng huchibang a om ding in achi ua. Huan Jerusalem a mite'n Pathian, apipute uh Pathian thukhun bang in ahihta uhi.
14034033	Huchi in Josiah hi in Israel gam in ahuap tengteng a kipan thilkihhuai tengteng apaimang a, Israel gam a om tengteng Toupa a Pathian uh nna asemsak hi. Adamsung in Toupa apipute uh Pathian azuih uh apialsan kei uhi.
14035001	Huan Josiah in Jerusalem ah Toupa a ding in Paikan Ankuang abawl a; akha khatna, ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuangluina ding agou hi.
14035002	Huchi in siampute anasep uh asehsak a, Toupa' inn a nasepna sem ding in ahanthawn hi.
14035003	Israel mite sinsakmi, Pathian a ding a hihtuam Levite kiang ah, “Israel kumpipa David tapa Solomon inn lam ah bawm siangthou koih un; na liangzang ua zawn akiphamohta kei ding; Toupa na Pathian uh leh ami Israelte nna semta un.
14035004	Israel kumpipa David gelh bang leh atapa Solomon gelh bang in na inkuan vaihawm makai dungzui zel un apawlpawl in kisa un.
14035005	Na unaute uh inkuan vaihawm makai dungzui zel in Levite tuam a tantuan nei in mun siangthou ah om un.
14035006	Paikan Ankuangluina ding gou unla, kihihsiangthou unla, Mosi zang a Toupa gen bang hih ding in na unaute uh ding in bawl un,” achi hi.
14035007	Huchi in Josiah in huai a mi om tengteng Paikan Ankuang a dia lan ding in ganhon lak a belamnou leh kelnou singthum leh bawngtal sangthum apia a: huaite kumpipa sum lak a ahi.
14035008	Amiliante'n mipite, siampute, Levite amau ut thu a lan ding in apia uhi. Pathian inn a heutu, Hilkiah, Zekariah leh Jehielte'n Paikan Ankuang dia lan ding in ganta nou sangnih-le-zaguk leh bawngtal zathum siampute apia uhi.
14035009	Konaniah, a-unau Shemaiah leh Nethaneel, Levite heutu Hashabiah, Zeiel leh Jozabadte'n leng Paikan Ankuang dia lat ding in Levite ganta nou sangnga leh bawngtal zanga apia uhi.
14035010	Huchi in nasepna abawl ua, kumpipa thupiak bang in siampute amun uah adingh ua, Levite apawldan bang zel un.
14035011	Paikan Ankuangluina ding agou ua, siampute'n sisan atheh ua, Levite'n avun ahawk uhi.
14035012	Huan Mosi laibu a tuang bang a inkuan khendan dungzui zel a Toupa kiang a lat ding a piak ding in halmang thillatte alasawn ua. Bawngtalte leng huchi mah bang in ahih uhi.
14035013	Huchi in Paikan Ankuangluina ding a dan bang in a-em min ua; thillat siangthousa bel, bel khaina nei, belgongza in a-ui ua, mi tengteng kiang ah apaipih uhi.
14035014	Huai khit in amau leh siampute a ding abawl ua; Aaron ta siampute halmang thillat leh sathau lan in zan tanpha in abuai ngal ua; huaiziak in Levite'n amau leh Aaron ta siampute a ding abawl uhi.
14035015	David, Asaph, Heman leh kumpipa zawlnei Jeduthunte thupiak bang in lasami Ashaph tapate amun uah adingh ua, kongkhak ngak mite bel kongkhak chih ah a-om ua; a-unau Levite'n abawlsak ziak un a-nna uh paisan akiphamoh kei hi.
14035016	Huchi in kumpipa Josiah thupiak bang a Paikan Ankuang lui ding leh Toupa maitam a halmang thillat lan ding in huai ni mah in Toupa nasepna thil tengteng abawl uhi.
14035017	Huchi in huai lai a Israel suan omte'n huai ni in Paikan Ankuang abawl ua, tanghou silngou soh louh ankuang leng ni sagih abawl lai uhi.
14035018	Zawlnei Samuel dam lai a kipan Israel gam ah Paikan Ankuang huchibang himhim abawl ngei kei ua; Israel kumpipa kuamah in Josiah leh siampute leh Levite leh Judah tengteng leh Israelte'n aneih bang uh nei a-om sam kei uhi.
14035019	Kum sawm-le-giat Josiah vaihawm kum in huai Paikan Ankuangluina zat in a-om hi.
14035020	Huai tengteng khit a Josiah in tempul abawl khit in, Karkhemish sual ding in Euphrates Luipi ah Aigupta kumpipa Neko apaitou a; Josiah in amah ava sual hi.
14035021	Himahleh, ama'n, “Judah kumpipa, ei gel i kisaikhakna bang om ahia? Nang sual ding in ka hong pai kei a, ka dousa dou ding a hong ka hi zaw, Pathian in kinoh ding in thu ahon pia a, ka lam a pang Pathian doudal kei in, ahon hihmang kha ding,” chi in palai asawl hi.
14035022	Himahleh Josiah in akiksan nuam kei a, adou theihna ding in akibawl lamdang a, Pathian kam a kipan a Neko thugen apom kei a, Meggiddo Phaizang ah na sual ding in akuan hi.
14035023	Huchi in thalkap mite'n Josiah akapkha ua; kumpipa'n asikhate kiang ah, “Hon paimangpih un, liamna thupi mahmah ka tuakta,” achi hi.
14035024	Huchi in asikhate'n kangtalai a kipan alakhia ua, akangtalai dang ah akoih ua, Jerusalem ah apaipih ua, asi a, api-le-pute han ah avui uhi. Judah mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a mite'n Josiah asuun uhi.
14035025	Huan Jeremiah in Josiah akah a; lasami numei leh pasalte'n tutan in Josiah akahna la uh agen lailai uhi. Israel gam ah dan in anei ua, ngai dih, kahna la ah huai atuangta hi.
14035026	Josiah thilhih dang tengteng, athilhih hoihte, Toupa Dan Bu a kigelh bang zel in,
14035027	amasapen leh ananungpente leng, ngai dih, Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipate tanchinbu ah gelh in a-om uhi.
14036001	Huai gam a mite'n Josiah tapa Jehoahaz api ua, Jerusalem ah apa sik in kumpipa in abawl uhi.
14036002	Jehoahaz in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-thum ahi a, Jerusalem ah kha thum vai ahawm hi.
14036003	Aigupta kumpipa'n Jerusalem a avaihawmna atawpsak a, agam uh dangkasik talent zakhat leh dangka-eng talent khat aliausak hi.
14036004	Aigupta kumpipa'n a-unaupa Eliakim, Judah leh Jerusalem a kumpipa ding in abawl a, amin Jehoiakim chi in akhensak hi. Huchi in Neko in a-unaupa Jehoahaz Aigupta gam ah api hi.
14036005	Jehoiakim in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-nga ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat vai ahawm hi. Toupa a Pathian mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih hi.
14036006	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar amah sual ding in ahong kuan a, Babulon a pi ding in kol abunsak hi.
14036007	Nebukadnezzar in Toupa' inn a tui-um belsuan leng Babulon ah apua a, Babulon a atempul ah akoih hi.
14036008	Jehoiakim tanchin dangte, athilkihhuai hihte leh a-omdante, ngai dih, Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpite tanchinbu ah atuang hi. Huan asik in atapa Jehoiakin in vai ahawmta hi.
14036009	Jehoiakin in vaihawm apat tung in kum giat ahi a, Jerusalem ah kha thum leh ni sawm vai ahawm a, Toupa mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih hi.
14036010	Kum abei in kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in mi asawl a, Toupa in atui-um belsuan hoih pipite toh Babulon ah apisak a, a-unaupa Zedekiah, Judah gam leh Jerusalem a kumpipa ding in abawl hi.
14036011	Zedekiah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih-le-khat ahi a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat vai ahawm hi.
14036012	Toupa a Pathian mitmuh in thil hoih lou ahih a; Toupa kam a kipan a thugenpa zawlnei Jeremiah lak ah akiniamkhiak nuam kei hi.
14036013	Pathian min a kichiamsakpa kumpipa Nebukadnezzar tung ah ahel lai a, genhaktak in a-om a, Toupa , Israel' Pathian lam nga lou ding in alungsim akhauhsak hi.
14036014	Siampu heutu tengteng leh mipite'n leng Pathian thei lou mite mah bang in thilkihhuai pipite ahih ua, Jerusalem a hihsiangthou Toupa' innte leng ahihbuah uhi.
14036015	Huchi in Toupa'n amite leh a-omna mun alainat ziak in apipute uh Pathian in akiang uah theihtawp a phatuamngai in mi asawl hi.
14036016	Himahleh Pathian misawlte amusit ua, athute angaineu ua, amite tung ah Toupa hehna ahong thou a, hih lungdam nawnna mahmah om lou khop in azawlneite ahihgim uhi.
14036017	Huaiziak in atung uah Kaldai kumpipa agamtangsak a, ama'n atangvalte uh amun siangthou uah namsau in athat a, nungak leh tangval, tek, teksia kuamah lainatna anei kei a; akhut ah ape vek hi.
14036018	Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan tengteng, aneu leh alian, Toupa' inn a sum koihkhawm tengteng, kumpipa sum koihkhawm leh amiliante sum koihkhawmte nangawn in Babulon ah apo vek hi.
14036019	Pathian innte ahal a, Jerusalem kulhte achimsak a, huai lai a inn thupi tengteng ahal a, huai lai a tui-um belsuan hoih tengteng ahihse vek hi.
14036020	Namsau thah bang teng Babulon ah api a, Persiate ahong laltak un, sikha in amah leh atapate a-om uhi.
14036021	Gam in nuamtak a a Sabbathte azattan a Jeremiah kam a Toupa thugen atangtunna ding in, segawp a a-om sung teng, kum sawmsagih tangtunna ding in, a Sabbathte atang uhi.
14036022	Huchi in Persia kumpipa Kura vaihawm tung kum in Jeremiah kam a Toupa thu atunkim theihna ding in agam tengteng a thankhiak vek ding leh agelh a gelh ding in leng Toupa'n Persia kumpipa Kura lungtang atokthou hi.
14036023	Persia kumpipa Kura in hichi in achi: “Khovel gam tengteng Toupa , van Pathian in ahon pia a; Judah gam a Jerusalem ah a-inn lamsak ding in thu ahon pia ahi. Na lak ua ama mite photphot kiang ah Toupa a Pathian om henla, va hohtou uhen,” chi in.
15001001	Persia kumpipa Kura kum khatna ah, Jeremiah kam a Toupa thu hihtangtun ahihtheihna ding in, Toupa'n Persia kumpipa Kura kha atokthou a, huchi in agamsung teng ah thupuan abawl a, agelhthoh in leng akoih hi.
15001002	Hichibang in Persia kumpipa Kura in achi, “ Toupa , van Pathian in, Lei gam tengteng kei ahon peta hi; Judah a om Jerusalem a amah inn lamsak ding in kei thu ahon pia hi.
15001003	Amite tengteng na lak ua om peuhmah, akiang ah Pathian om henla, Judah a om Jerusalem ah hohtou henla, Toupa Israel' Pathian, amah Pathian ahi, Jerusalem a om inn lam hen.
15001004	Kuapeuh akhualtamna koi mun peuh a nutsiat a omna mun a mite'n, amah dangka leh dangka-eng, vante leh gantate in panpih uhenla, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a ding a ut thu a thillat chih louh,” chi in.
15001005	Huchi in Judah leh Benjamin intekpate inkuan a lupente, siampute leh Levite, Pathian in Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn lam dia hohtou dia akha uh atohthohte tengteng, athouta uhi.
15001006	Huan akimvel ua omte tengteng in akhut uh dangka tui-um belsuan dangka-engte, vante, gantate leh thil manphate in ahihhat ua, uttak a piakte tengteng sim louh in.
15001007	Kumpipa Kura in leng Toupa' inn a tui-um belsuan Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan alakkhiak, pathiante inn a akoihte alakhe vek hi;
15001008	Huaite Persia kumpipa Kura in sumkempa Mithredath khut in alakhe vek a, Judah vaihawm, Sesbazzar pia in asimsak hi.
15001009	Huchi in hiai amuh zah uh ahi: dangka-eng kuang sawmthum, dangka kuang sangkhat, gimlim halna kuang sawmnih-le-kua;
15001010	Dangka-eng noubem sawmthum, dangka noubem ahoih lou deuhte zali-le-sawmkhat leh tui-um belsuan dangte sangkhat.
15001011	Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan tengteng sangnga-le-zali ahi uh. Saltangte lak ate Babulon a kipan Jerusalem a pitouh a a-om lai un, hiai tengteng Sesbazzar in atawitou vek hi.
15002001	Hiaite pimang a om koltanna a kipan a paitou, bial a tate, Babulon lam a akumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimang, Jerusalem leh Judah a, michih ama khua chiat a hong kik nawnte ahi uh.
15002002	Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah toh hong tonte, Israel mite lak a pasal phazah:
15002003	Parosh suante sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih.
15002004	Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih.
15002005	Arah suante, zasagih sawmsagih-le-nga.
15002006	Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat leh sawm-le-nih.
15002007	Elam suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li.
15002008	Zattu suante, zakua sawmli-le-nga.
15002009	Zakkai suante, zasagih-le-sawmguk.
15002010	Bani suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih.
15002011	Bebai suante, zaguk sawmnih-le-thum.
15002012	Azgad suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnih-le-nih.
15002013	Adonikam suante, zaguk sawmguk-le-guk.
15002014	Bigvai suante, sangnih sawmnga-le-guk.
15002015	Adin suante, zali sawmnga-le-li.
15002016	Ater suante, Hezekiah tate, sawmkua-le-giat.
15002017	Bezai suante, zathum sawmnih-le-thum.
15002018	Jorah suante, zakhat leh sawm-le-nih.
15002019	Hashum suante, zanih sawmnih-le-thum.
15002020	Gibbar suante, sawmkua-le-nga.
15002021	Bethlehem suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum.
15002022	Netophah mite, sawmnga-le-guk.
15002023	Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat.
15002024	Azmaveth suante, sawmli-le-nih.
15002025	Kiriath-arim, Kephirah leh Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum.
15002026	Ramah leh Geba tate, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat.
15002027	Mikmas mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih.
15002028	Bethel leh Ai mite, zanih sawmnih-le-thum.
15002029	Nebo suante, sawmnga-le-guk.
15002030	Magbish suante, zakhat sawmnga-le-guk.
15002031	Elam dang suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li.
15002032	Harim suante, zathum-le-sawmnih.
15002033	Lod, Hadid leh Ono tate, zasagih sawmnih-le-nga.
15002034	Jeriko suante, zathum sawmli-le-nga.
15002035	Senaah suante, sangthum leh zaguk-le-sawmthum.
15002036	Siampute: Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkote, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum.
15002037	Immer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih.
15002038	Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih.
15002039	Harim suante, sangkhat leh sawm-le-sagih.
15002040	Levi mite: Jeshua leh Kadmiel suante, Hodaviah suante, sawmsagih-le-li.
15002041	Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat.
15002042	Kongkhak ngak mite: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Hatita leh Shobai suante, avek un zakhat sawmthum-le-kua.
15002043	Nethinim mite: Ziha, Hasupha leh Tabbaoth suante;
15002044	Keros, Siaha leh Padon suante;
15002045	Lebanah, Hagabah leh Akkub suante;
15002046	Hagab, Shalmai leh Hanan suante;
15002047	Giddel, Gahar leh Reaiah suante;
15002048	Rezin, Nekoda leh Gazzam suante;
15002049	Uzza, Paseah leh Besai suante;
15002050	Ashna, Meunim leh Nephusim suante;
15002051	Bakbuk, Hakupha leh Harhur suante;
15002052	Bazluth, Mehida leh Harsha suante;
15002053	Barkos, Sisera leh Thamah suante;
15002054	Neziah leh Hatipha suante,
15002055	Solomon sikhate tate: Sotai, Hassopheret leh Peruda suante;
15002056	Jaalah, Darkon leh Giddel suante;
15002057	Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ami suante.
15002058	Nethinim mite teng, Solomon sikhate tate, zathum sawmkua-le-nih.
15002059	Huchi in hiaite Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan leh Immer a kipan a paitoute ahi uh: himahleh apipute inkote, asuan uh, Israel a kipan ahi uhia chih ataklang thei kei uh:
15002060	Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih.
15002061	Huan siampute suante: Habaiah, Hakkoz leh Barzillai Gilead mi Barzillai tanute a kipan azi kitenpihpa suante, amau min zui a sak in a-om hi.
15002062	Hiai khangthu sutna a sim mite lak a min gelhna azong ua, himahleh amu kei uh. Huaiziak in buah a sim in a-om ua siamputna a kipan dangkoih in a-om uhi.
15002063	Huan Tirshatha in, siampu Urim leh Thummim toh ahong dinkhiak mateng, thil siangthoupente ne lou ding in amau ahilh hi.
15002064	Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk ahi.
15002065	Apasal sikhate uleh anumei sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in pasal lasami leh numei lasami sangnih anei uhi.
15002066	Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk ahi ua; sakol neute, zanih sawmli-le-nga;
15002067	Sangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga; sabiltung uh, sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih.
15002068	Huan Jerusalem a Toupa' inn ahong tun un, apipute uh inkuan lak a alupente akhen in, Toupa' inn alamna ding in ut thu a thillat alan uhi.
15002069	Nasepna sumbawm ah ahihtheihdan un dangka-eng darik singguk-le-sangkhat, dangka paun sangnga leh siampute puansilh zakhat.
15002070	Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, mite lak a akhenkhat leh lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite leh Nethinim mite, akhopite uah ateng ua, Israel mite akhopite uah ateng uhi.
15003001	Huchi akha sagihna ahong tun a, khopite a Israel suante a-om lai un, mite Jerusalem ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawm uhi.
15003002	Huchi in Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh a-unaute adingh ua, Pathian mipa Mosi Dan a akigelh bang a, atung a halmang thillatte lan ding in, Israel' Pathian maitam abawl uhi.
15003003	Maitam kingakna tung ah atung ua; gamte a mite ziak in atung uah launa a-om hi: huchi in atung ah Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte zing leh nitak a halmang thillatte ngei alan uhi.
15003004	Huan akigelh bang in, biakbukte ankuangluina abawl ua, ahih ding zah in niteng halmang thillatte, dan dungzui in, niteng a sep ding kiphamoh bang in alan uhi.
15003005	Huai nung in halmang thillat ngeinate, kha thakte thillatte leh hihsiangthou a om Toupa ankuanglui sehkhiakte tengteng leh michih a kipan Toupa a dia uttak a ut thu a thillatte alan uhi.
15003006	Akha sagihna ani khat ni a kipan in Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan pan ua; himahleh Toupa tempul suangphum akiphum nai kei hi.
15003007	Sumte suangsek mite kiang leh khutsiam mite kiang ah apia ua; Kura Persia kumpipa a kipan aphalna amuh bang ua tuipi a, Joppa tan a Lebanon tang a kipan sidar singte hon la ding in, Zidonte kiang leh Turate kiang ah, sa, dawn ding leh sathau apia uhi.
15003008	Huchi in akha nihna, Jerusalem a Pathian inn ahong tun uh akum nihna in, Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Levi mite leh koltanna a kipan a Jerusalem a hong paite akipan ua; Levi mite kum sawmnih a upa leh atunglam Toupa' inn nasepna a heutute hi ding in asep uhi.
15003009	Huchi in Pathian inn a nasem mite heutu ding in, Jeshua atapate leh a-unaute, Kadmiel leh atapate, Judah tapate, Henadad tapate, atapate uh leh a-unaute uh Levi mite toh adingkhawmta uhi.
15003010	Inn lam mite'n Toupa tempul suangphum akoih lai un, Israel kumpipa David thupiak bang in, Toupa phat ding in, siampute pengkulte toh apuan uh asilhsak ua, Levi mite Asaph tapate dakkhutbette aguan uhi.
15003011	Huchi in Toupa phatna leh kipahna piakna in la asakhawm chiat ua, “Amah lah ahoih ngal a, azahngaihna tangtawn in Israel lam ah a-om gige ngal a,” chi in. Huchi in Toupa' inn suangphum akoih ziak un mite tengteng aw ngaihtak a kikou in Toupa aphat uhi.
15003012	Himahleh siampute leh Levi mite leh pipute inkote lak a mi tampi, amit mahmah ua hiai inn suangphum akikoih lai a, tua inn masa mute putekte, ngaihtak in akapkhia ua; mi tampi nuamsa in ngaihtak in akikou uhi.
15003013	Huchi in mite'n nuamsa a kikouna husa, mite kahna husa toh atheikak thei kei ua: mite ngaihtak in akikou ua, ahusa uh gamlapi ah akiza hi.
15004001	Huchi a Judah leh Benjamin melmate'n saltangte tate'n Toupa , Israel' Pathian a ding in tempul alam uh chih azak un;
15004002	Zerubbabel leh pipute inko lupente kiang ah ahong pai nai ua, akiang uah, “Hon lampih le ung ake: noute bang in, na Pathian uh lah ka zong ngal ua; Assuria kumpipa Esarhaddon in hiai mun ahon pipa dam lai nite a kipan amah kiang ah ka kithoih uhi,” achi uhi.
15004003	Himahleh Zerubbabel leh Jeshua leh Israel pipu inko lupente'n akiang uah, “Ka Pathian uh a dia inn na hon lampihna ding ziak bangmah na nei kei uh; himahleh Persia kumpipa Kura in kou thu ahon piak bang in, Israel' Pathian, Toupa a ding in koute'n ka lam ding uhi,” achi uhi.
15004004	Huchi in gam a mite'n Judah a mite khut ahatsakta kei ua, inn lamna ah amau asubuaita uhi.
15004005	Persia kumpipa Kura dam lai tengteng, Persia kumpipa Darias lal lai tanpha in, athiltup uh kalhse ding, amaute siatna ding in thuhilh mite aguai uhi.
15004006	Ahasueras vaihawm pat tung lai in, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte hekna lai agelh uhi.
15004007	Huan Artaksarses dam lai in Bishlam, Mithredath, Tabeel leh akithuahpihte'n Persia kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah lai agelh ua; laikhak gelhdan Siria laimal a gelh a, Siria pau a bawlkhiak ahi.
15004008	Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai in Jerusalem siatna ding in kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah hichibang in laikhak agelh uhi.
15004009	Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte un huchi in agelhta ua; Dinai mite, Apharsatki mite, Tarpe mite, Aphar mite, Arki mite, Babulon mite, Susan mite, Deha mite, Elam mite leh,
15004010	Osnappar lian leh thupi in apikhiak, Samaria khopi leh luipi khen a gamdang leh adangdang a kikoih namte tan in.
15004011	Kumpipa Artaksarses kiang a alaikhak uh teisawn hiai ahi: “Luipi khen lam leh adangdang a na sikhate.
15004012	Na kiang a kipan a hong tou Judate Jerusalem ah kou kiang ah ahong uh chih kumpipa kiang ah theih in om hen: Khopi helhat leh hoih lou alam lellel ua, akulhbaangte azouta ua, asuangphumte apuah khinta uh.
15004013	Kumpipa'n thei hen, hiai khopi lam a a-om a, akulhbaangte zoh in omleh zaw, leimante, siahte sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante ape kei ding ua, atawptawp in kumpipa siatna ahi ding.
15004014	Tu in koute kumpi inn a pan huhna ngahte ka hih ziak un, kumpipa zahlakna muh koute ding in akilawm kei a, huaiziak in kumpipa thudik ka hon khak uhi.
15004015	Na pipute chiamtehna laibu sung ah kizong hen: huchi in chiamtehna laibu sung ah na mu ding a, hiai khopi helhat, kumpipate leh bialte a dia poikhoih hat chih leh nidanglai mah in leng huai sung mah a helna ana bawlta uh chih na thei mai ding; huaiziak a hiai khopi kihihsegawp lah ahi ngal a.
15004016	Hiai khopi akilam a, akulhbaangte hichibang a akihih khitleh zaw, luipi khen lam ah tan na nei kei ding chih kumpipa ka hon theitelsak uhi,” chi in.
15004017	Huchi in dansiam Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh Samaria leh luipi khen a gam a teng akithuahpih tengteng kiang ah kumpipa'n dawnna akhak hi: Chibai,
15004018	“Laikhak ka kiang a na hon khak uh ka ma ah teltak a sim ahita.
15004019	Huchi in thu ka pia a, akizong khin a, nidanglai in hiai khopi in kumpipate tung ah helna abawl a, huai ah helpina leh helna a na kibawlta chih muhkhiak in a-om hi.
15004020	Huai lou in kumpipa thilhihthei taktak, luipi khen gam tengteng tung a vaihawm, Jerusalem tung a vaihawmte ana om ua; van leimante, sumsinna leimante leh lamlian leimante amau kiang a piak ahi hi.
15004021	Huchi in keimah in thupiak ka bawl masiah, huai mite khawl ding leh hiai khopi lam lou ding in, thupiak bawl un.
15004022	Hiai thu a ze-ol lou ding in pilvang un: Bang ding in kumpipate siatna ding in hoihlouhna akhang dia?” chi in.
15004023	Huchi a kumpipa Artaksarses laikhak teisawn Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte ma a asim khit un, kintak in Jerusalem a Judate kiang ah ahoh ua, kihatsakna leh thilhihtheihna zang in amau akhawlsakta uhi.
15004024	Huchi in Jerusalem a Pathian inn nasep akhawl a: Persia kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum nihna tan in akhawl hi.
15005001	Huan zawlneite, zawlnei Haggai leh Zekariah Iddo tapa in Judah leh Jerusalem a om Judate kiang ah athu agenkhol ua; akiang uah Israel' Pathian min in thu agenkhol uhi.
15005002	Huchi in Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua athou ua, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn alam panta ua; amaute panpih in akiang uah Pathian zawlneite a-om uhi.
15005003	Huchih lai mah in akiang uah Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte uh ahong ua, akiang uah hichibang in, hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in kua'n thu ahon pia a? achi uhi.
15005004	Huai ban ah ka kiang uah, “Hiai inn lam mite min bang ahia?” chi in ahong dong uhi.
15005005	Himahleh Juda upate tung ah a Pathian uh mit atu a, athu Darias kiang a ahong tun a, huai tungtang laikhak a dawnna ahong kik nawn masiah, amaute akhawlsak kei uhi.
15005006	Laikhak teisawn Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpih Abharsa mite, luipi khen a omte'n kumpipa Darias akhak uhi.
15005007	Akiang ah laikhak akhak uh hichibang a gelh ahi. “Darias kumpipa kiang ah khamuanna kim om hen.
15005008	Kumpipa'n thei hen, Judia bial ah ka pai ua, suang thupite a lam, Pathian thupi inn ah, kulhbaangte singte akikoih a, hiai nasep thanopna toh apai zel a, akhut uah ma asawn zel hi.
15005009	Huai upate thu ka dong ua, hichibang in akiang uah, ‘Hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in nou kuan thu ahon pia a?’ ka chi uhi.
15005010	Nang kiang a tel mahmah gen thei ding in, aminte uh leng ka dong ua, huchi a amau makaipen a om mite min ka gelhkhiak theihna ding un.
15005011	Huchi in hichibang in kou ahon dawng uhi, ‘Van leh lei Pathian sikhate ka hi ua, hiai inn kum tampi a na kilamsa, Israel kumpipa thupi in alam leh azohsa inn ka lam uhi.
15005012	Himahleh ka pipute un van Pathian a na suk heh nung un, amaute Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kaldai mi khut ah apia a, ama'n hiai inn ahihsia a, mite Babulon lam ah apimang hi.
15005013	Himahleh Babulon kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, kumpipa Kura in hiai Pathian inn lam ding in thupiak abawl hi.
15005014	Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan Pathian inn ate leng, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a kipan a alakkhiak a, Babulon tempul a laklutte, huaite kumpipa Kura in Babulon tempul a kipan alakhia a, mi khat Sesbazzar, ukpipa dia abawl kiang ah huaite apekhia hi.’
15005015	Ama'n akiang ah, ‘Hiai tui-um belsuan la inla, pai in, Jerusalem a om tempul ah koih in, amun ah Pathian inn lam hi hen,’ achi hi.
15005016	Huai lai in Sesbazzar ahong a, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn suangphumte aphum a: huai hun a kipan tutan in lam in a-om a, hinapi in lah zoh ahi kei hi.
15005017	Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa'n hoih asakleh, Babulon a om, kumpipa laigelhte koihchingna insung kizong henla, Jerusalem a hiai Pathian inn lam ding kumpipa Kura in thupiak bawlna hiam abawlleh, hiai thu ah kumpipa'n akipahna kou hon khak hen,” chi in.
15006001	Huchih lai in kumpipa Darias in thupiak abawl a, Babulon a goute koihkhawmna, laibute insung azong uhi.
15006002	Huchi in Akmetha ah, Media bial a om inpi ah laizial akimukhia a, huai ah chiamtehna ding in hichibang a gelh ahi.
15006003	“Kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, Kura kumpipa'n thupiak abawl hi: Jerusalem a Pathian inn tungtang, a-inn lam hi henla, kithoihnate a latna mun uh leh huai a suangphumte kiptak a koih hi hen; asanlam tong sawmguk, azatlam tong sawmguk;
15006004	Suang thupi taktak vual thum leh sing thak vual khat toh, huan sum sennate kumpipa' inn a kipan piakkhiak hi hen:
15006005	Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem tempul a kipan a alakkhiak, Babulon lam a alak, Pathian inn a dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan piak nawn vek hi henla, Jerusalem a om Pathian insung ah amau mun chiat ah koih nawn vek hi hen.”
15006006	“Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh na kithuahpihte uh Apharsa mite, luipi khen a omte: huai inn lamna a kipan gamla ah om un:
15006007	Hiai Pathian inn nasepna subuai kei un; Judate ukpipa leh Juda upate'n amun ah hiai Pathian inn lam uhen.
15006008	Huai lou in hiai Pathian inn lamna ding a hiai Juda upate kiang ah na hih ding uh thu ka bawl hi: kumpipa vante a kipan, luipi khen a siah a kipan mahmah in, hiai mite kiang a sumzatnate thanopna chiteng toh apiak ding ahi, huchi a dal a a-omlouhna ding un.
15006009	Huan ataksapnate uh, bawngtalnoute, belamtalte, belamnoute, van Pathian kiang a halmang thillat ding huit buh, chi, uain leh thaute, Jerusalem a om siampute thu bang zel in, tatlak lou in niteng in amau piak ding ahi:
15006010	Huchi a van Pathian kiang a gimlim kithoihnate alat theih ua, kumpipa hinna leh atapate hinna a dia athumtheihna ding un.
15006011	Thupiak ka bawl lai a, kuapeuh in hiai thu a suklamdan leh a-inn a kipan inkam dohkhiak hi henla, huai ah amah dopkang touh leh henden in om hen; hiai ziak in a-inn ekvum a bawl hi hen.
15006012	Huai mah hihlamdang ding, Jerusalem a om hiai Pathian inn hihse ding a akhut uh kuansak ding kumpipate tengteng leh mite tengteng Pathian huai lai a teng ding a amin omsakpa'n paithal vek hen. Kei, Darias in, thupiak ka bawlta; thanopna tengteng toh sepkhiak in om hen,” chi in.
15006013	Huchi in Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte un, kumpipa Darias in asawl ziak in, thanopna tengteng toh huchibang in asemkheta uhi.
15006014	Juda upate'n zawlnei Haggai leh Iddo tapa Zekariah genkholhna pansan in inn alam ua ma asawn zel uhi. Israel' Pathian thupiak dungzui leh Kura, Darias leh Persia kumpipa Artaksarses thupiak dungzui in inn alam ua azouta uhi.
15006015	Kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum gukna kum a om, Adar kha ani thum ni in hiai inn zoh ahita hi.
15006016	Huchi in Israel suante, siampute leh Levi mite leh saltanna ta dangte'n, hiai Pathian inn latna nuamtak in aneita uhi.
15006017	Hiai Pathian inn latna ah bawngtal zakhat, belamtal zanih, belamnou zali alan ua; Israel tengteng a dia khelhna thillat ding in, keltal sawm-le-nih, Israel namte zah dungzui in.
15006018	Huchi in Jerusalem a om, Pathian nasepna a ding in, Mosi laibu a kigelh bang in, siampute atan hawmna uah, Levi mite amun tan uah akoih uhi.
15006019	Huan saltanna tate'n akha khatna ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi.
15006020	Siampute leh Levi mite lah akisiangsakkhawm vek ngal ua; avek un asiang uhi: huchi in saltanna tate a ding leh a-unaute uh siampute a ding leh amau mah a ding in, Paikan belamnou agou uhi.
15006021	Saltanna a kipan a hong paikhe nawn, Israel suante leh Toupa , Israel' Pathian zong ding a, gam a khovel mite buahna a kipan amau leh amau kihuikhetuam tengteng in, ane uhi.
15006022	Nuamtak in ni sagih sung Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina abawl uhi: Toupa'n amaute nuam asasak in, Israel' Pathian, Pathian inn a nasepna khutte uh hatsak ding in amau lam ah Assuria kumpipa lungtang akiheisak hi.
15007001	Hiai thilte nung in, Persia kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai in, Seraiah tapa Ezra, Azariah tapa, Hilkiah tapa,
15007002	Shallum tapa, Zadok tapa, Ahitub tapa,
15007003	Amariah tapa, Azariah tapa, Meraioth tapa,
15007004	Zerahiah tapa, Uzzi tapa, Bukki tapa,
15007005	Abishua tapa, Phinehas tapa, Eleazar tapa, Aaron siampu lian tapa:
15007006	Babulon a kipan in hiai Ezra apaitou a; amah Mosi Dan, Toupa Israel' Pathian in apiak, dan theisa ahi a: atung a Toupa a Pathian khut a-om dungzui in, angetna tengteng kumpipa'n aphalsak hi.
15007007	Huan kumpipa Artaksarses kum sagih kum in, Jerusalem ah Israel suante lak a akhen, siampute lak a akhen, Levi mite, lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite leh Nethinim mite, ahohtou ua.
15007008	Huchi in kumpipa akum sagih kum akha ngana in Jerusalem ah Ezra ahong pai hi.
15007009	Babulon a kipan akha khatna ani khat ni in akuantou pan a, akha ngana ani khat ni in a Pathian khut hoih atung a a-om bang zel in, Jerusalem ah ahong pai hi.
15007010	Ezra in bel Toupa Dan zong ding, zui ding leh Israel tua dan thusehte leh vaihawmnate sinsak ding in alungtang akoihkip hi.
15007011	Tu in kumpipa Artaksarses in siampu, laigelhmi, Toupa thupiakte thu gelhmi leh Israel kiang a adan thusehte gelhmi Ezra kiang a apiak laikhak teisawn hiai ahi.
15007012	Artaksarses, kumpipate' kumpipa'n, siampu, van Pathian Dan gelhmi, buching leh huchibang zel in, Ezra kiang ah,
15007013	“Thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Israel a mite lak a amaute tengteng, ka gamsung a, asiampute uh leh Levi mite, amau ut thu petmah a Jerusalem a pai ding a theihsakte, nang kiang ah pai uhen.
15007014	“Kumpipa leh athudot mi sagihte'n, na khut a om na Pathian Dan dungzui a, Judah leh Jerusalem tungtang thu kan ding a, nang ahon sawl bang un;
15007015	atenna Jerusalem a om, Israel' Pathian kiang a man nei lou a kumpipa leh athudot mite'n apiaksate uh dangka leh dangka-eng po ding in,
15007016	Babulon bial tengteng a dangka leh dangka-eng na muh tengteng, mite leh siampute'n amau ut thu a thillat, Jerusalem a om a Pathian uh inn a dia uttak a alat tengteng uh toh.
15007017	“Huaiziak in thanopna toh hiai sum in bawngtalte, belamtalte, belamnoute na lei ding a, a-anpiak thillatte uleh adawn ding thillatte uh toh, huchi in Jerusalem a om na Pathian uh inn maitam tung ah huaite na lan ding hi.
15007018	Dangka leh dangka-eng om lai hihdan ding nang leh na unaute'n hoih na sak dandan uh, na Pathian uh deihlam bang in hih un.
15007019	Na Pathian inn a nasepna ding a tui-um belsuan ka hon piak uh, Jerusalem Pathian ma ah pia in.
15007020	Na Pathian inn ding a kiphamoh dangdangte, piakna ding na neih dingte, kumpipa gou koihkhawmna a kipan in pekhia in.
15007021	“Kei, kumpipa kei Artaksarses mahmah in luipi khen a om sumkem mite tengteng kiang ah thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Ezra siampu, van Pathian Dan, laigelhmi in nou ahon nget, thanuamtak a hih zel ahihtheihna ding in.
15007022	Dangka talent zakhat, huit buh tehna zakhat, uain bath zakhat, sathau bath zakhat leh aphazah gen lou in chi nangawn.
15007023	Bangpeuh van Pathian in thu apiak, van Pathian inn a ding in hih in om zel hen; aziak bel bang ding in kumpipa leh atapate gamsiatna ding in thangpaihna a-om dia?
15007024	Huai lou in leng ka hon chitaktak uh hi, siampute leh Levite, lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite, Nethinim mite hiam hiai Pathian inn sikhate lak a akuakua tungtang ah, van leimante, sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante amau liausak dan ahi kei ding hi.
15007025	Huan nang, Ezra, na khut a om na Pathian pilna zui in, thukhenmi leh vaihawmmi, tuipi khen a omte mite tengteng vaihawm ding in sep in; na Pathian dante tengteng, huaite theiloute nou sinsak un.
15007026	Kuapeuh na Pathian dan leh kumpipa dan zui lou, sihna chiang hizong leh thanuamtak in atung ah vaihawmna bawl in om hen, ahihkeileh, khakmangna hiam, vankhakna hiam, suangkul lutna tan in,” chi in.
15007027	Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn kilawmsak ding a, kumpipa lungtang a hichibang a thil koih, i pipute Pathian, Toupa nuamsa in om hen;
15007028	Kumpipa leh athudot mite leh kumpipa vaihawmpih thilhihthei tengteng ma a ka tung a zahngaihna hon pepa amah ahi. Huchi in ka tung a Toupa ka Pathian khut dungzui in hihhat in ka omta a, ka kiang a hoh ding in Israel a kipan mikizen tungtuan ka kaikhawmta hi.
15008001	Huan hiaite apipute uh inkote lak a alupente ahi ua, kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai a kei hon zuite khangthu suina ahi.
15008002	Phinehas tapate lak ah, Gershom: Ithamar tapate lak ah Daniel: David tapate lak ah, Hattush,
15008003	Shekaniah tapate lak ah; Parosh tapate lak ah, Zekariah: amah toh pasalte khangthu suina a suikhawmte zakhat-le-sawmnga ahi.
15008004	Pahath-moab tapate lak ah, Elihoenai Zerahiah tapa; huan amah toh pasal zanihte.
15008005	Shekaniah tapate lak ah, Jahaziel tapa; amah toh pasal zathumte.
15008006	Adin tapate lak ah, Jonathan tapa Ebed; amah toh pasal sawmngate.
15008007	Elam tapate lak ah, Athaliah tapa Jeshaiah; amah toh pasal sawmsagihte.
15008008	Shephatiah tapate, Mikael tapa Zebadiah; amah toh pasal sawmgiatte.
15008009	Joab tapate lak ah, Jehiel tapa Obadiah; amah toh pasal zanih sawm-le-giatte.
15008010	Shelomith tapate lak ah, Josiphiah tapa; amah toh pasal zakhat-le-sawmgukte.
15008011	Bebai tapate lak ah, Bebai tapa Zekariah; amah toh pasal sawmnih-le-giatte.
15008012	Azgad tapate lak ah, Hakkatan tapa Johanan; amah toh pasal za-le-sawmte.
15008013	Adonikam tapate lak ah, ananungpente; hiaite amin uh ahi, Eliphelet, Jeiel, Shemaiah leh amau toh pasal sawmgukte.
15008014	Bigvai tapate, Uthai leh Zabbud; amau toh pasal sawmsagihte.
15008015	Huchi in Ahava pha a luang luipi tan in amaute ka kaikhawm a; huai ah ni thum ka giak uhi. Mite leh siampute ka en vialvial a, huai ah Levi tapate kuamah ka mu kei.
15008016	Huan Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekariah leh Meshullam, mikizen tungtuante, sinsak mite Joiarib leh Elnathan leng ka thukhak hi.
15008017	Kasiphia mun a Iddo hausapa kiang ah amau ka sawlkhia a; Iddo kiang ah leh Kasiphia mun a a-unaute Nethinimte kiang a agen ding uh ka hilh a, i Pathian inn ua ding a nasemmi ei a dia hon tonpih ding in.
15008018	Huchi in i tung ua i Pathian khut hoih a om dungzui in pasal khat lunggelsiam, Mahli tapate lak a, Levi tapa, Israel tapa ei ding in Sherebiah atapate leh a-unaute, sawm-le-giat toh ahon pi uhi.
15008019	Hashabiah, amah toh Merari tapate lak a Jeshaiah toh, a-unaute leh atapate uh, sawmnih toh;
15008020	Nethinimte, David leh avaihawmpihte'n Levi mite nasepna ding a apiakte uh, zanih-le-sawmnih Nethinimte: avek un minkhumna ah akhum uhi.
15008021	Huchi in huai ah, Ahava lui ah, an ngawl ka puang a, huchi a ei a ding leh i nau neute a ding leh i neih i lamte tengteng a dia lampi tang amah lak a zong ding a i Pathian uh ma a ei leh ei i kiniamkhiak theihna ding in.
15008022	Lampi a melma dou ding a ei hon panpih ding a kumpipa kiang a sepaih pawl leh sakol tungtuangmi nget lah ka zum ngal a: hoihna ding a, amah zongte tung ah i Pathian khut a-om a; himahleh amah mangngilh tengteng siatna ding in athilhihtheihna leh athangpaihna a-om hi, chi a, kumpipa kiang a thu i gen tak ziak in.
15008023	An i ngawl ua hiai ding in i Pathian i ngen ngutngut ua: huchi in ama'n i thumna uh hon dawng hi.
15008024	Huai lai in siampute lak a amakai lianpente lak a sawm-le-nih, Sherebiah, Hashabiah leh akiang ua om a-unaute uh lak a sawmkhat ka sehkhen a,
15008025	amau a ding in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuante, kumpipa leh athuhilh mite leh avaihawmpihte'n Toupa' inn a alatte uh huai lai a om Israel tengteng puak ding in ka buksak hi.
15008026	Akhut sung mahmah uah dangka talent zaguk-le-sawmnga leh dangka tui-um belsuan talent za ka buksak a; dangka-eng lak ah talent za;
15008027	dangka-eng noubem sawmnih, darik sangkhat lak ah; dal hoih nawttet, dangka-eng bang a manpha bel nih.
15008028	Huan akiang uah, “ Toupa a ding in na siangthou ua, tui-um belsuante asiangthou uh; dangka leh dangka-eng Toupa , na pipute uh Pathian a dia ut thu a thillat ahi uh.
15008029	Toupa' inn dantante, Jerusalem a siampute lak a lupente leh Levi mite leh Israel pipute inko vaihawmte ma a huaite na buk masiah uh, pilvan suah in, amaute kem un,” ka chi hi.
15008030	Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite'n i Pathian inn ua Jerusalem a apuak ding un dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan bukkhiakte ala uhi.
15008031	Huai lai in Jerusalem lam a pai ding in, akha khatna ani sawm-le-nih ni in Ahava lui a kipan i pawtkhia ua: huan i Pathian khut i tung uah a-om a, melma khut leh lampi a buk mi a kipan ama'n hon tankheta hi.
15008032	Huchi in Jerusalem i tung ua huai ah ni thum i om uhi.
15008033	Ani li ni in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan i Pathian inn uah Uriah siampu tapa Meremoth khut ah buk in a-om a; akiang ah Phinehas tapa Eleazar a om; akiang uah Jeshua tapa Jozabad leh Binnui tapa Noadiah, Levi mite a-om uhi;
15008034	aphazah leh agikdan tengteng sim ahi a, huai hun in laibu a chiamteh ahi.
15008035	Pimangna a kipan a hong pai, saltanna tate'n Israel' Pathian kiang ah halmang thillatte, bawngtal sawm-le-nih Israel tengteng a ding in, belamtal sawmkua-le-guk, belamnou sawmsagih-le-sagih, keltal khelhna thillat ding in sawm-le-nih alan uhi: hiaite tengteng Toupa a ding a halmang thillat ahi.
15008036	Kumpipa thukhen mite kiang leh tuipi khen a ukpipate kiang ah kumpipa thupiakte apekhia ua: huchi in mite leh Pathian inn apanpih uhi.
15009001	Huchi a hiai thilte hih khit ahih lai in, ka kiang ah vaihawmtute ahong pai nai ua, “Israel mite leh siampute leh Levi mite, gamte a mite a kipan amau leh amau akikoihtuam kei ua, amaute kihhuainate, Kanaan mi, Hit mi, Periz mi, Jebus mi, Ammon mi, Moab mi, Aigupta mi leh Amor mite, dungzui in a-om uhi.
15009002	Amau a ding leh atapate uh a ding in atanute uh ala ua; huchi in chi siangthou gamte mite toh amau leh amau akihelkhawmta hi: ahi, hiai tatlekna ah vaihawmtute khut leh vaihawmte amakai lianpente ahi uhi,” achi hi.
15009003	Huchi a hiai thil ka zak in, ka puansilh leh ka puanak ka botkek a, ka lu a sam leh ka khamul ka botkhia a, lamdang sa in ka tusuk hi.
15009004	Huai lai in saltanna a amaute tatlekna ziak a, Israel' Pathian thute ziak a lau a ling michih ka kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua; nitaklam kithoih hun masiah lamdang sa in ka tu hi.
15009005	Nitaklam kithoih hun lai in ka tunggikna a pan ka thou a, ka puansilh leh ka puanak bohkeksa toh; ka khukdin a, Toupa ka Pathian lam ah ka khutte ka zakkhia a;
15009006	“Aw ka Pathian, na kiang a daktou ding in ka zum in ka zakta hi, ka Pathian: ka thulimlouhnate uh ka lutunglam uah apung deuhdeuh a, ka mohna un vante asunta hi.
15009007	Ka pipute uh dam lai hun a kipan tuni pha in nakpi in ka mohta ua; huchi in ka thulimlouhnate uh ziak in kou, ka kumpipate uh leh ka siampute uh, gamte kumpipate khut ah, namsau ah, saltanna ah, lohna ah leh zahlakna ah, hiai ni bang in piakkhiak in ka omta uhi.
15009008	Huan tu in sawt lou sung a ding in Toupa ka Pathian ua kipan in hehpihna hong lang a, suakta ding a om lai dia nutsiat ding in leh amun siangthou a omkipna hon pe ding in, huchi a ka Pathian un ka mitte uh ahon sukvaksak a, ka tanna ua halhna neukha ahon piaktheihna ding in.
15009009	Sikha lah ka hi ngal ua; huchipi in leng sikha ka hihna uah ka Pathian un ahon mangngilh kei a, himahleh Persia kumpipate mitmuh in zahngaihna ahon pia a, halhna hon pe ding, ka Pathian uh inn dingsak ding leh huai a siatna bawlpha ding leh Judah leh Jerusalem a kulhbaang hon pe ding in.
15009010	“Tu in, Aw ka Pathian uh, hiai zoh in bang ka chita ding ua? Na thupiakte lah ka lehngatsanta ngal ua,
15009011	Na sikha zawlneite zang in thu na hon pia a: ‘Luah ding a na paina uh, huai gam, gamte a mite nitna ziak a gam nin ahi. Akihhuainate un gam tawp khat lam a kipan khat lam tawp tan ahihdimna ziak in.
