15009012	Huaiziak in na tanute uh atapate uh kiang ah pe kei unla, atanute uh leng na tapate uh a ding in la sam kei un, amuanna uhiam ahauhsakna uhiam leng tangtawn in zong sam kei un: huchi a na hat ua, gam a ahoih na nek ua, tangtawn a na tate uh a ding a gouluah dia na nutsiat theihna ding un.’
15009013	Huchi a ka gamtat giloute uh ziak leh ka mohna thupi mahmah ziak ua, ka tung ua hong tung tengteng zoh in, nang ka Pathian un ka thulimlouhnate uh gunzah sang a hon gawt tawmzaw a, akhosuaksun om lai na hon piak mu in.
15009014	Na thupiakte bohse nawn in, kihhuaite hih mite toh kituak in ka om ding uam? Akhosuak ding hiam, suakta ding himhim leng om lou khop a na bawlgawp matan ka tung uah na heh nilouh dia hia?
15009015	‘Aw Toupa Israel' Pathian, nang na diktat a; hiai ni bang a akhosuak omlaite na hon nutsiat ziak in. Ngai in, ka mohna un na ma ah ka om uhi;’ hiai ziak in lah kuamah na ma ah adingh thei kei ding uhi.”
15010001	Huchi a Ezra kap a Pathian inn mai a lei kidenna a nei in, athum a, thupha atawi lai in, Israel a kipan pasal leh numei leh naupang tampi kikhawmte akiang ah hong kikaikhawm ua: mite lah anak kah mahmah ngal ua.
15010002	Elam tapate lak a khat, Jehiel tapa Shekaniah in adawng a Ezra kiang ah, “I Pathian tung ah i talekta ua, gammi numei namdangte i kitenpihta uh: Himahleh hiai thil thu ah Israel a ding in lametna a-om lai hi.
15010003	Huaiziak in tu in zite tengteng leh amau a kipan a huchibang a piangte, ka toupa thuhilh dungzui in leh i Pathian uh thupiak a lau a lingte thuhilh dungzui in, koihmang ding in i Pathian toh thu i khung ding uh; huan dan dungzui a hih hi hen.
15010004	Thou in, athu lah nang a ahi ngal a, kou leng na kiang ah ka om ding uh; hangsantak in om inla, hih in,” achi hi.
15010005	Huchi in Ezra athou a, hiai thu dungzui a ahih ding un, siampute leh Levi mite lak a amakai lianpente leh Israel tengteng akichiamsak hi. Huchi in akichiamta uhi.
15010006	Pathian inn mai a kipan Ezra athoukhia a, Eliashib tapa Jehohanan dantan sung ah alut a: huai lai a ahong pai lai in, tanghou ane kei a, tui lah adawn kei hi; saltanna a tatlekna ziak in asuun hi.
15010007	Judah leh Jerusalem teng a saltanna tate tengteng kiang ah Jerusalem a kikaikhawm vek ding in thu apuangkhia ua;
15010008	kuapeuh ni thum sung a hong pai lou, vaihawmte leh upate thu bang zel in, avan tengteng laksak ahi ding a, amah mah saltanna omkhawmte a kipan a tuamkoih ahi ding hi.
15010009	Huchih lai in Judah leh Benjamin mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ni thum sung in akikaikhawm ua; hiai akha kuana, akha ni sawmnih ni ahi. Huchi in mi tengteng Pathian inn kongtual a mun awng ah atu ua, hiai thu leh vuahpi ziak in aling uhi.
15010010	Huchi in siampu Ezra adingh a, akiang uah, “Na talek ua, Israel mohna khangsak ding in, numei namdangte na kitenpih uhi.
15010011	Huaiziak in tu in na pipute uh Pathian, Toupa kiang ah thupha tawi unla, akipah lam hih un; gam a mite a kipan, numei namdangte a kipan kituamseh un,” achi hi.
15010012	Huchi in kikhawmte tengteng in adawng ua, aw ngaihtak in, “Ka tungtang uh na gen bang in, huchibang in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi.
15010013	Himahleh mite tampi ahi ua, vuah tampi zuk lai ahi a, huchi in inkuan ah ka dingh thei kei ua, hiai lah ni khat hiam nasep ahi kei; hiai thu ah lah nakpitak in i talekta ngal ua.
15010014	Tu in omkhawmte a ding in i vaihawmte ding seh in om henla, i Pathian uh thangpaihna ei a kipan a akihei a, hiai thu hihbei ahih masiah, numei lamdangte kitenpihte i khopite a omte hun sehsate ah, khopi chiteng a upate amau toh, huai lai a vaihawmte toh, hong pai uhen.
15010015	Asahel tapa Jonathan leh Tikvah tapa Jahaziah kia in hiai thu asel uh: huan Meshullam leh Levi mi Shabbethai in amaute apanpih uhi.
15010016	Huchibang in saltanna a kipan kik nawnte'n ahihta uhi. Siampu Ezra, apipute uh inkote dungzui a, pipute inkuan lak a vaihawm makai kuate hiam toh leh aminte ua amaute tengteng, tuam sehkhiak in a-om ua; huchi in athu entel ding in akha sawmna ani khat ni in atuta uhi.
15010017	Huchi in akha khatna ani khat ni in numei namdang kitenpih mite ahih khin uhi.
15010018	Huchi in siampute tapate lak ah numei namdang kitenpih muh in a-om a: huaite, Jeshua tapate, Jozadak tapa leh a-unaute, Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib leh Gedaliahte.
15010019	Huchi in azite uh koihmang ding in pha asa ua; amoh ziak un, amohna a ding in belamhon lak a belamtal alan uhi.
15010020	Immer tapate lak ah: Hanani leh Zebadiah.
15010021	Harim tapate lak ah: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel leh Uzziah.
15010022	Pashur tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad leh Elasah.
15010023	Levi mite lak ah: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah, huai mah Kelita ahi, Pethahiah, Judah leh Eliezer.
15010024	Lasa mite lak ah: Eliashib: huan kongkhak ngak mite lak ah; Shallum, Telem leh Uri.
15010025	Israel lak ah: Parosh tapate lak ah; Ramiah, Jeziah, Malkijah Mijamin, Eleazar leh Malkijah leh Benaiah.
15010026	Elam tapate lak ah: Mattaniah, Zekariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth leh Eliah.
15010027	Zattu tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad leh Aziza.
15010028	Bebai tapate lak ah; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, Athlai.
15010029	Bani tapate lak ah: Meshullam, Malluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal leh Ramoth.
15010030	Huan Pahath-moab tapate lak ah: Adna, Kelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui leh Manasseh.
15010031	Harim tapate lak ah: Eliezer, Isshiah, Malkijah, Shemaiah, Simeon,
15010032	Benjamin, Malluk leh Semariah.
15010033	Hashum tapate lak ah: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, Shimei.
15010034	Bani tapate lak ah: Maadai, Amram leh Uel;
15010035	Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kelluh,
15010036	Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib;
15010037	Mattaniah, Mattenai leh Jaasau;
15010038	Bani, Binnui, Shimei;
15010039	Shelemiah leh Nathan leh Adaiah,
15010040	Maknadebai, Shasai, Sharai;
15010041	Azarel leh Shelemiah, Shemariah;
15010042	Shallum, Amariah, Joseph.
15010043	Nebo tapate lak ah: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel leh Benaiah.
15010044	Hiai tengtengte'n namdang zite api ua: huchi in alak ua khenkhatte'n hiai zite a kipan tate anei uhi.
16001001	Hakaliah tapa Nehemiah thute: Kisleu kha, akum sawmnihna kum a, Susa Inpi a ka om lai in hichi ahong hi a,
16001002	Hananiah, ka unaute lak a khat ahong a, amah leh Judah a kipan mi kuate hiam; amaute kiang ah saltanna a kipan a nutsiat a omte, Juda suaktate tanchin leh Jerusalem thu ka dong hi.
16001003	Amau ka kiang ah, “Huai lai bial a saltanna a kipan omlaite gimthuakna thupi thuak leh simmoh in a-om uh: Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng achim a, akongpite leng mei in akang,” achi uhi.
16001004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, hiai thute ka zak lai in, ka tu a ka kap a, ni bangzah hiam ka suun a; van Pathian ma ah an ngawl in ka thum hi.
16001005	“Aw Toupa , van Pathian, Pathian thupi leh lauhuai, amah it a, athupiakte zuite tung a thukhun theigige leh zahngaihna nei gige.
16001006	“Tu in na bil in hon ngeingaih henla, na mitte hong kihong hen, huchi a na sikha thumna, huai hun a, sun leh zan a, na sikhate Israel suante a dia, nangmah tung a ka hihkhelh uh, Israel suante khelhna thupha tawi a, ka thumna na hon ngaihkhiaksakna ding in: Ahi, kei leh ka pa inkote ka khialta uhi.
16001007	“Thanghuaitak in na tung ah ka na gamtata ua, na thupiakte ka zuita kei ua, na sikha Mosi kiang a na thupiak, dan thusehte leh vaihawmte.
16001008	“Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi, na sikha Mosi kiang a thu na piak, na tatlek uh leh mite lak ah ka hon thehzak ding.
16001009	“Himahleh ka kiang a na hong kik ua, ka thupiakte na zuih ua na hih uleh, delhkhiak a na omna uh van tawp mun ah himahleh, huai a kipan in amaute ka kaikhawm ding a, ka min omna dia ka mun telsa ah amaute ka pikhawm ding, chi in.
16001010	“Tu in hiaite, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na banhat a na tatsa, na sikhate leh na mite ahi uh.
16001011	“Aw Toupa , ka hon ngen ahi, na min laudan siam nuamsa, na sikha thumna leh na sikhate thumna na bil in ngeingaih hen: ka hon ngen ahi, tuni in na sikha lohchingsak inla, hiai mi mitmuh in akiang ah zahngaihna pia in,” achi hi. Kei bel kumpipa nou dompa ka hi.
16002001	Kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm akum sawmnih, Nisan kha in, ama a uain a-om lai in hichi ahong hi a, uain ka la a, kumpipa kiang ah ka pia hi. Ama ah nidang in dahmel ka pu ngei nai kei hi.
16002002	Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, “Na chi lah ana kei a, bangchi a dahmel pu mawk na hia? Hiai zaw bangmah dang ahi kei, lungtang dahna ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in ka lauta mahmah a.
16002003	Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa tangtawn in dam hen: ka pipute hante omna, khopi kisegawp a om a, huai a kongpite mei in kangtum hiven bangchi in ka mel adah lou dia?” ka chi hi.
16002004	Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, “Ahihleh bang ahia na nget?” achi hi. Huchi in van Pathian kiang ah ka thumta hi.
16002005	Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, na mitmuh a na sikha in deihsakna atanleh, Judah gam ah, ka pipute han omna khopi ka bawltheihna ding in kei hon sawl in,” ka chi hi.
16002006	Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, (kumpinu leng akiang a tu ahi a), “Na khualzinna bang tan a sawt ahi dia? Chikchiang in na hong kik nawn dia?” ahon chita hi. Huchi in kei hon sawl ding kumpipa kipah lam ahi a; amah hun ka pia hi.
16002007	Huai lou in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, Judah gam tan ka tun mateng a kei ahon paisak zel theihna ding un, luipi khen a ukpipate kiang a piak ding laikhakte hon pe lechin.
16002008	“Inn toh kizom kulh kongpite a ding leh khopi kulhbaangte a ding leh ka lutna ding inn a dia bawl ding inkamte bawlna dia sing ahon piakna ding in, kumpipa gammang kempa Asaph kiang ah laikhak hon khaksak lechin, ka chi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n ka tung a ka Pathian khut hoih a-om bang in hon phalsak hi.
16002009	“Huchi in luipi khen a ukpipate kiang ka hong tung a, akiang uah kumpipa laikhakte ka pia hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n hon zui ding in sepaih pawl heutute leh sakol tungtuang mite asawl hi.
16002010	“Horon mi, Sanballat leh sikha Tobiah, Ammon mi in azaktak un, Israel suante hoihna zongmi kuahiam khat ahong pai ziak in nakpitak in alungkim kei mahmah uhi.
16002011	“Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, huai ah ni thum ka omta hi.
16002012	“Zan in ka thou a, kei leh ka kiang a om mi tawmchikte; Jerusalem a dia hih ding ka lungtang sung a ka Pathian in bang ahia a koihmi kuamah ka hilh kei a: atung a ka tuanna ganta chih louh ngal ka kiang ah ganta a-om kei hi.
16002013	“Zan in Gulpi Tuileh lam, Ekvum Kongpi lam ah, Phaizang Kongpi a pai in ka pawtkhia a, achimsa, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leh mei a kangsa kongpite ka velta hi.
16002014	“Tuikhuk Kongpi leh Kumpipa Dil ah ka hoh a: himahleh ka nuai a om ganta paina ding mun a-om kei hi.
16002015	“Luita zui in zan in ka paitou a, kulhbaang ka vel a; ka kik nawn a, Phaizang Kongpi ah ka lut a, huchi in ka kik nawnta hi.
16002016	“Huchi in ka paina lam hiam, ka hih hiam vaihawm mite'n athei kei uh; Judate kiang ah leng, siampute hiam, miliante hiam, vaihawmte hiam leh nasep sem midangte kiang ah leng ka gen nai kei hi.
16002017	“Huan akiang uah, ‘I dinmun uh hoihlouhdan na mu ua, Jerusalem asiat khitdan, huai a kongpite mei a akat khitdan: simmoh a i om nawnlouhna ding in, kisa un Jerusalem baang i lam nawn ding uh,’ ka chi hi.
16002018	“Huchi in ka tung a hoih ka Pathian' khut tanchin ka kiang a agen kumpipa thute leng amau ka hilh a; huchi in amau, ‘Thou ni in lam ni,’ achi uhi. Huchi in nasep hoih sem ding in akhutte uh ahatsakta uhi.
16002019	“Himahleh Horon mi Sanballat leh Ammon mi sikha Tobiah leh Arabia mi Geshem in azak un, ahon nuihsan ua, ahon simmohbawl ua, ‘Bang thil ahia na hih uh? Kumpipa tung a hel sawm na hi uhia?’ achi uhi.
16002020	“Amau ka dawng a, akiang uah, ‘Van Pathian in koute ahon lohchingsak ding, huaiziak in kou asikhate ka thou ding ua ka lam ding uh: himahleh nou Jerusalem ah thuneihna, theihgigena leh tan na nei kei uhi,’ ” ka chi hi.
16003001	Huchi in siampu lianpen Eliashib a-unau siampute toh athou ua, Belam Kongpi abawl ua; ahihsiangthou ua, akongkhakte atung ua; Hameah insang tan in ahihsiangthou ua, Hananel insang tan in.
16003002	Amah zom in Jeriko mite'n alam uhi. Amau zom in Imri tapa Zakkur in alam hi.
16003003	Hassenaah tapate'n Ngasa Kongpi ahih ua; a-inkamte akhung ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte.
16003004	Amau zom in Uriah tapa, Hakkoz tapa, Meremoth in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Berekiah tapa Meshullam, Meshezabel tapa in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Baana tapa Zadok in abawlhoih hi.
16003005	Amaute zom in Tekoa mite'n abawlhoih ua; himahleh amiliante un a Toupa uh nasepna ah anak pan nuam kei uhi.
16003006	Kongpi lui pen Paseah tapa Jehoiada leh Besodeiah tapa Meshullam in abawlhoih ua, a-inkamte akhung ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte toh.
16003007	Amaute zom in Gibeon mi Melatiah leh Meronoth mi, Jadon, Gibeon mite, Mizpah mite, luipi khen a ukpipa laltutphah toh kizomte'n abawlhoih uhi.
16003008	Amah zom in Harhaiah, dangka-eng sek mite tapa Uzziel in abawlhoih hi. Amah zom in gimlim bawl mite tapa Hananiah in abawlhoih a, kulhbaang za tanpha in Jerusalem abubitsak uhi.
16003009	Amaute zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hur tapa Rephaiah in abawlhoih hi.
16003010	Amaute zom in Harumaph tapa Jedaiah in, ama inn sun hial in abawlhoih hi. Huan amah zom in Hashabneiah tapa Hattush in abawlhoih hi.
16003011	Malkijah, Harim tapa leh Pahath-moab tapa Hasub in amun dang leh meipi insang abawlhoih uhi.
16003012	Amah zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hallohesh tapa Shallum in, amah leh atanute toh abawlhoih uhi.
16003013	Guam Kongpi pen Hanun leh Zanoah a tengte'n abawlhoih ua, alam ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte leh Ekvum Kongpi lam a kulhbaang tong sangkhat toh.
16003014	Huchi in Beth-hakkerem seh a vaihawmpa, Rekab tapa Malkijah in Ekvum Kongpi abawlhoih a, akongkhakte, akalhnate leh atung a akalhna tawnte alam hi.
16003015	Mizpah seh a vaihawmpa, Kol-hozeh tapa Shallum in tuikhuk kongpi abawlhoih a; alam a, avuk a, kongkhakte, kalhnate leh kalhna tawnte leh kumpipa huan kiang a Shiloah Dil baang, David Khopi a kipan a sukpai leichial tan in abawl hi.
16003016	Amah nung in Azbuk tapa Nehemiah, Beth-zur gam kimkhat a vaihawmpa'n, David han toh kimatuah mun leh dil bawltawm chiang leh mihatte inn tan in abawlhoih hi.
16003017	Amah nung in, Levite, Bani tapa Rehumte'n abawlhoih uhi. Huan amah zom in Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa Hashabiah in ama seh ding in abawlhoih hi.
16003018	Amah nung in a-unaute uh, Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Henadad tapa Bavai in abawlhoih hi.
16003019	Amah zom in Mizpah vaihawmpa, Jeshua tapa Ezer in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina tak a galvan koihkhawmna tan a paitouhna sun in abawlhoih hi.
16003020	Amah nung in Zabbai tapa Baruk in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina a kipan siampu lianpen Eliashib inn kongkhak chiang abawlhoih hi.
16003021	Amah nung in Hakkoz tapa Uriah tapa Meremoth in seh dang, Eliashib in kongkhak a kipan Eliashib inn tawpna chiang abawlhoih hi.
16003022	Amah nung in, phaizang mite, siampute'n abawlhoih uhi.
16003023	Amaute nung in Benjamin leh Hasub in a-inn pha un abawlhoih ua. Amau nung in Ananiah tapa Maaseiah tapa Azariah in amah inn sik ah abawlhoih hi.
16003024	Amah nung in Henadad tapa Binui in seh dang, Azariah inn a kipan kulhbaang kawina tan leh aning chiang abawlhoih hi.
16003025	Uzai tapa Palal in kulhbaang kawina sun chiang abawlhoih a, kumpipa' inn tungnungzaw a kipan a hong dingkhetou insang, venna pisa kiang a om toh, amah nung in Parosh tapa Pedaiah,
16003026	leh tempul nasem Ophel a tengteng suahlam pang Tui Kongpi leh insang lawkkhia zawn tan abawlhoih uhi.
16003027	Amah khit in Tekoa mite'n seh dang, Ophel kulhbaang chiang pha, insang thupi dingkhetou sun in abawlhoih uhi.
16003028	Siampute'n Sakol Kongpi tunglam, michih in ama inn tung sun chiat in abawlhoih uhi.
16003029	Amaute nung in Immer tapa Zadok in ama inn tung suntou chiang abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in suahlam kongpi ngakpa Shekaniah tapa Shemaiah in abawlhoih hi.
16003030	Amah nung in Shelemiah tapa Hananiah leh Zalaph tapa gukna Hanun in seh dang abawlhoih uhi. Amah nung in Berekiah tapa Meshullam in adantan tung zawn abawlhoih hi.
16003031	Amah nung in dangka-eng sek mite tapa Malkijah in Nethinimte inn leh sumsin mite inn chiang, Hammipkad Kongpi zawn chiang leh aning a kahtouhna chiang abawlhoih hi.
16003032	Huan aning a kahtouhna leh Belam Kongpi kikal dangka-eng sek mite leh sumsin mite'n abawlhoih uhi.
16004001	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang i lam uh chih Sanballat in azak in, ahehta a, nakpitak in athangpai a, Judate akouta hi.
16004002	Huchi in a-unaute leh Samari sepaih pawl ma ah thu agen a, “Hiai Juda zawngkhalte'n bang ahia ahih uh? Kihihhat ding uhia? Kithoih ding uh hia? Ni khat a zoh sawm uhia? Akangsa ahi chih mu napi in, ninneng sunvum a kipan a suangte bawl thak ding uhia?” achi hi.
16004003	Huai lai in Ammon mi Tobiah akiang ah a-om a, “Ama'n, a-inn lam uh, sihal nangawn va kaltouleh, asuang baang uh alaichim ding,” achi hi.
16004004	Za in aw ka Pathian; simmoh in lah ka om ngal ua: ahon kouna uh amau lutung ah kiksak inla, saltanna gam a loh ding in amau pia in:
16004005	Aginatlouhna uh khuh ke'nla, na ma a kipan akhelhna uh nulmang in omsak ke'n: inn lamte ma ah nang ahon hehsakta uhi.
16004006	Huchi in baang ka bawl ua; baang tengteng, asandan kim chiang in akizom ta hi: mite'n lah nna sem ding in lungsim anei ngal ua.
16004007	Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite leh Ashdod mite'n Jerusalem kulhbaangte bawlphatna in ma asawntou zel a, akichipsiatna akibawlpha, chih azak un, athangpai mahmah uhi.
16004008	Huchi in avek ua hong kuan a Jerusalem dou ding leh huai a buaina omsak ding in akikumkhawmta uhi.
16004009	Himahleh i Pathian kiang ah i thum ua, amau ziak in sun leh zan in amaute vil ding i koih uhi.
16004010	Judah in, “Puakgik pote hatna abahta a, ninneng tampi a-om; huchi in kulhbaang bawl thei lou i hi uh,” achi hi.
16004011	I melmate un, “Alak uh i hong tun ua, amaute i thah ua, nasep i khawlsak matan athei kei ding ua, muh leng amu kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
16004012	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amau kiang a teng Judate ahong pai lai un, “Sawmvei i kiang uah mun tengteng a kipan hon dou ding uh ahi,” ahon chi uhi.
16004013	Huaiziak in kulhbaang nunglam mun a mun niam penpen, mun awngthawlte ah, ka koih a, mite a-inkuankuan uh dungzui in anamsaute uh toh, ateipite uh toh, athalpeute uh toh ka koih hi.
16004014	Huchi in ka en a, ka thou a, miliante leh vaihawmte leh mipi dangte kiang ah, “Amau lau kei un: Toupa thupi leh lauhuai theigige unla, na unaute uh, na tapate uh leh na tanute uh a ding in gal dou un, na zite uh leh na innte uh a ding in,” ka chi hi.
16004015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate thil sawm i na theita ua, Pathian in athusawm uh bangmah lou asuaksak a, kulhbaang bawl ding in i vek un michih anasepna mun ah i kileh nawnta uh chih aza lai uhi.
16004016	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, huai hun a kipan in, ka sikhate lak a kimkhat nasepna ah apang ua, alak ua kimkhat in lum, teipi leh thalpeu leh sik puanakte alen ua; vaihawmte Judah inkote nung ah a-om vek uhi.
16004017	Kulhbaang bawlte leh van-gik pote'n apuak lai un, michih in akhutte uh khat nasepna a nna sem in, akhut khat lam a galvan tawi in.
16004018	Inn lam mite'n, michih in anamsau apang ah khaisa a nei in, huchi in alamtou zel uhi. Pengkul mutpa ka kiang ah a-om hi.
16004019	Huchi in miliante kiang leh vaihawmte kiang ah leh mite lak a adangdangte kiang ah, “Nasep athupi in, atam a, kulhbaang tung ah i kikhenzak ua, kigamlattak in:
16004020	Koi lai mun peuh a pengkul ging na zakna uah, i kiang uah huai lam ah kuan un; i Pathian un gal hon dousak ding ahi,” ka chi hi.
16004021	Nna i sem ua: alak ua akimkhat in zingsang kipat a kipan aksite ahong kilat matan teipi atawi uhi.
16004022	Huchi mah bang in huai lai in mite kiang ah, michih asikha toh Jerusalem sung ah giak hen, zan chiang a eite a dia galvil ahih a, sun chiang a nna aseptheihna ding un, ka chi hi.
16004023	Huchi in kei hiam, ka unaute hiam, ka sikhate hiam, kei hong zui galvil mite, i lak ua kuamah in i puante uh sawp ding nasan in i suah man kei uhi.
16005001	Huai lai in a-unaute uh Judate dem a nakpitak a kikouna, mite leh azite ua kipan ahong omta hi.
16005002	Kou, ka tapate leh ka tanute uh, tampi ka hi ua: “Ka nek ua ka hintheihna ding un, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi pawl ahong om uhi.
16005003	“Ka loute uh, ka grephuante uh, ka innte uh ka zuak ua; kial ziak in, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi kuate hiam leng a-om uhi.
16005004	“Ka loute uh leh ka grephuante ua dit ding in kumpipa siah ding in sum ka leitawi uh, chimi khenkhat leng a-om uhi.
16005005	Hinapi in ka sa uh ka unaute uh sa bang ahi a, ka tate uh lah amau tate bang: Ngai un, ka tapate uh leh ka tanute uh sikhate hi ding in tanna ah ka pi ua, ka tanute uh lak a akhente tanna a pi in a-om khin man hial ua, panpih theihna ka nei kei ua; midangte'n lah ka loute uh leh ka grephuante uh anei ngal ua,” chi in.
16005006	Huchi a akikouna uleh hiai thute ka zak in ka heh mahmah hi.
16005007	Huchih lai in ka kingaihtuah a, miliante leh vaihawmte ka sal a, akiang uah, “Michih in a-unau lak ah apung na phut uh,” ka chi hi. Huchi in amaute demna kikhawmpi thupi ka nei hi.
16005008	Akiang uah, “Khovel mite kiang a zuak a omsa, i unau Judate i theih bang un i tanta ua; nou na unaute uh zuak in, i lak ua khot a om ding uh ahi maw?” ka chi hi. Amau adai dide ua, thu khat leng anei kei uhi.
16005009	“Na thilhih uh ahoih kei; i melmate khovel mite'n hon simmohna ziak un, i Pathian laudan siam a na om ding uh hilou hia? ka chih behlap hi.
16005010	Huchi mah bang in, ‘ka unaute leh ka sikhate leh ke'n amau kiang ah sum leh buh-le-bal ka leitawisak uhi. K'on ngen ahi, apung omsak kei ni.’
16005011	‘Pe nawn un, ka hon ngen ahi, akiang uah, tuni mahmah in, aloute uh, agrephuante uh, a-olive huante uleh a-innte uh, asum uh aseh zakhatna leng, buh-le-bal, uain,’ leh sathau, amau a kipan na phutkhia uhi,” ka chi hi.
16005012	Huchi in amau, “Ka pe nawn ding ua, amau a kipan bangmah ka phut kei ding uh; huchibang in ka hih ding ua, na chih mah bang in,” achi uhi. Ke'n siampute ka sam a, akichiamna uh ka la a, huchi a hiai thuchiam bang a ahihna ding un.
16005013	Ke'n leng ka pheipi ka vuangsak a, “Hiai thuchiam bawl lou peuhmah, a-inn a kipan, anasepna a kipan Pathian in hichibang in vuangsak hen; hichibangtak a vuankhiak ahi ding a, ahawm ding,” ka chi hi. Huan khawmpite tengteng in, “Amen, Toupa phat in om hen,” achi uhi. Huchi in mite'n hiai thuchiam dungzui in ahih uhi.
16005014	Huai lou in Judah gam a a-ukpipa ding ua seh a ka om lai a kipan, kumpipa Artaksarses akum sawmnihna leh akum sawmthum-le-nihna chiang, huai bel, kum sawm-le-nih ahi a, kei leh ka unaute'n ukpipa tanghou ka ne kei uhi.
16005015	Himahleh kei ma a ukpipa masate mite tung a mohsak theih ahi ua, amau a kipan in tanghou leh uain ala uh, dangka shekel sawmli sim louh in; ahi, asikhate uh nangawn in mite tung ah vai ahawm uhi. Himahleh ke'n Pathian ka kihtak ziak in huchibang in ka hih kei hi.
16005016	Ahi, huai lou leng hiai kulhbaang nasepna ah ka pang nilouh a, gam himhim leng i lei kei uh: ka sikhate tengteng huai lam ah nasepna ah kaihkhawm in a-om uhi.
16005017	Huai ban ah ka dohkan ah Judate leh vaihawmte lak a mi za-le-sawmnga, i kim i vel ua om khovel mite lak a pan i kiang ua hong paite chih louh, a-om uhi.
16005018	Ni khat a ding a bawlkholhsa bawngtal khat leh belam hoih ngenta guk ahi ua; vasate leng kei dia bawlkholhsa in a-om ua, huan ni sawm sung a khatvei uain chi chih a kipan koih hoih: hinapi in hiai mite tung a tanna agik ziak in, ukpipa tanghou hiaite tengteng ziak in ka phut kei hi.
16005019	Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in, hiai mite a dia ka hih tengteng kei lam hon theigige in.
16006001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang ka lam khin a, huai ah khangkham a-om nawnta kei chih, Sanballat, Tobiah, Geshem Arabia mi leh i melma dangdangte kiang a akitut lai in; huai hun tan in kongpi kongkhakte tung nai kei mah leng;
16006002	Sanballat leh Geshem in ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua, “Hong pai in, Ono Phaizang a khuate lak a khat ah i va kimu ding,” chi in. Himahleh ka tung ah gilou hih angaihtuah uhi.
16006003	Huchi in akiang uah sawltakte ka sawl a, “Nna thupitak sem ka hi, ka hong paisuk thei kei; bangziak a ka nna nusia a, na kiang ua ka hong suk ziak a, nasep khawl ding ahia oi?” ka chi hi.
16006004	Huan hichibang ngen in livei ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua; angeingei in amaute ka dawng zel hi.
16006005	Huchi in Sanballat in ka kiang ah hichibang in angaveina ding in asikha akhut a laikhak honsa toh ahon sawl a;
16006006	huai ah, “Namte lak ah akigen a, Gasmu in achi a, nang leh Judate'n hel na tum uh; huai a ding in kulhbaang na lam hi: huchi in nang akumpipa uh hi ding in, hiai thute dungzui in,
16006007	Jerusalem a nang tanchin gen ding in zawlneite leng na sep a, Judah ah kumpipa a-om chi in. Huchi in tu in hiai thute dungzui in kumpipa kiang a tut ding ahi; huaiziak in hong kuan inla, kihouna i nei ding,” chi in.
16006008	Akiang ah mi ka sawl a, “Na gen bang a huchibang thilhih a-om kei a, himahleh na lungtang a kipan na phuahtawm ahi,” chi in.
16006009	Amau lah, hih louh ahihna ding in, “Nasepna a kipan akhutte uh hatsak louh in a-om ding,” chi a hon lauhsak a-ut ngal ua. Himahleh tu in, Aw Pathian, nang ka khutte hatsak in.
16006010	Khum a om, Mehetabel tapa Delaiah tapa Shemaiah inn ah ka hoh a, ama'n, “Tempul sung ah, Pathian inn ah i kikhawm dia, huchi in tempul kongkhakte i khak ding, nang that dia hong ding uh lah ahi ngal ua; ahi, zan in nang that ding a hong ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
16006011	Ke'n bel, “Kei bang mi, taise ding hon sa maw? Huan kua ahia, huchi a kei bang a om a, ahinna humbitna ding a tempul sung a hoh nuam ding? Ka lut kei ding,” ka chi hi.
16006012	Ka ngaihtuah a, huchi in ngai in, Pathian in amah asawl kei a; himahleh ka siatna ding in hiai genkholhna agenkheta hi: Tobiah leh Sanballat in amah aguai uhi.
16006013	Hiai a ding a goih ahi, ka launa ding leh huchibang a hih a, khial a, thutut gilou ding a thubuai aneihtheihna ding ua, kei ahon simmoh theihna ding un.
16006014	Aw ka Pathian, Tobiah leh Sanballat anasepte uh bang zel leh zawlneinu Noadiah leh zawlnei dangte, lausak hon tumte, theigige in.
16006015	Huchi in Elul kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni, ani sawmnga-le-nih sung in, kulhbaang zoh in a-omta hi.
16006016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate tengteng in huai azak un, i kim i vel ua om namte teng in alauta ua, amitmuh ngei uah nakpitak in alunglelta uhi; hiai nasep i Pathian hih ahi chih athei ngal ua.
16006017	Huai lou in huai lai in Judah miliante'n laikhak tampi Tobiah kiang ah akhak ua, amau kiang ah Tobiah laikhakte ahong tung hi.
16006018	Amah Arah tapa Shekaniah tanu pasal ahih ziak in, Judah ah mi tampi amah lam a kichiam lah a-om ngal ua; atapa Jehohanan in Berekiah tapa Meshullam tanu zi in anei hi.
16006019	Huai lou leng ka ma ah athil hoih hihte agen ua, amah kiang ah ka thute atun zel uhi. Huchi in Tobiah in kei hon hihlau ding in laikhakte akhak hi.
16007001	Hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang lam khit ahih a, kongkhakte ka tun khit a, kongkhak ngak mite leh lasa mite leh Levi mite seh ahih khit nung un,
16007002	ka unau Hanani leh Hananiah kulh ukpa kiang ah Jerusalem kepna ka pia a: amah miginom ahi a, tampi sang a Pathian laudan siam ahih ziak in.
16007003	Akiang ah, “Ni asat mateng Jerusalem kongpite hon hi kei hen; galvilmi adin lai un, kongkhakte khak uhenla, amaute kalhkhum un; Jerusalem a tengte vengmi sep inla, michih ama dinmun ah, michih ama inn zawn chiat ah,” chi in.
16007004	Khopi aza in alian a: himahleh huai ah mite atawm ua, innte lah lam ahi kei uhi.
16007005	Huchi in ka Pathian in ka lungtang miliante, vaihawm mite, mipite, khangsutna a sim ahihtheihna ding ua kaikhawm ding in akoih hi. Huan amasapen a hong lang amaute khangsutna laibu ka muta a, huai ah gelh a om ka mu hi.
16007006	Hiaite bial naupangte ahi ua, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimangte, huai pimang a omte lak a saltanna kipan a paitoute, Jerusalem leh Judah akik nawn, michih amah khopi a kik;
16007007	Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamiah, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, Baanah toh hong paite.
16007008	Israel mite lak a pasal zah: Parosh suante, sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih.
16007009	Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih.
16007010	Arah suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih.
16007011	Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat sawmkhat-le-giat.
16007012	Elam suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li.
16007013	Zattu suan zagiat sawmli-le-nga.
16007014	Zakkai suan zasagih-le-sawmguk.
16007015	Binnui suan zaguk sawmli-le-giat.
16007016	Bebai suan zaguk sawmnih-le-giat.
16007017	Azgad suan sangnih zathum sawmnih-le-nih.
16007018	Adonikam suan zaguk sawmguk-le-sagih.
16007019	Bigvai suan sangnih sawmguk-le-sagih.
16007020	Adin suan zaguk sawmnga-le-nga.
16007021	Ater, Hezekiah suan sawmkua-le-giat.
16007022	Hashum suan zathum sawmnih-le-giat.
16007023	Bezai suan zathum sawmnih-le-li.
16007024	Hariph suan zakhat sawmkhat-le-nih.
16007025	Gibeon suan sawmkua-le-nga.
16007026	Bethlehem leh Netophah suan zakhat sawmgiat-le-giat.
16007027	Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat.
16007028	Beth-azmaveth, mite sawmli-le-nih.
16007029	Kiriath-jearim, Kephirah, Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum.
16007030	Ramah leh Geba mite, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat.
16007031	Mikmas suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih.
16007032	Bethel leh Ai mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum.
16007033	Nebo dang mite, sawmnga-le-nih.
16007034	Elam dang suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li.
16007035	Harim suan zathum-le-sawmnih.
16007036	Jeriko suan zathum sawmli-le-nga.
16007037	Lod, Hadid leh Ono suante, zasagih sawmnih-le-khat.
16007038	Senaah suan sangthum zakua-le-sawmthum.
16007039	Siampute: Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkuan a kipan, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum.
16007040	Imer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih.
16007041	Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih.
16007042	Harim suante, sangkhat sawm-le-sagih.
16007043	Levi mite: Jeshua, Kadmiel suante, Hodevah suante, sawmsagih-le-li.
16007044	Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmli-le-giat.
16007045	Kongkhak ngakte: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Hatita leh Shobai suante, zakhat sawmthum-le-giat.
16007046	Tempul nasem, Nethinim mite: Ziha, Hasupha, Tabbaoth;
16007047	Keros, Sia, Padon;
16007048	Lebana, Hagabah, Shalmai;
16007049	Hanan, Giddel, Gahar;
16007050	Reaiah, Rezin, Nekoda;
16007051	Gazzam, Uzza, Paseah;
16007052	Besai, Meunim, Nephishesim;
16007053	Bakbuk, Hakupha, Harhur;
16007054	Bazlith, Mehida, Harsha;
16007055	Barkos, Sisera, Tamah;
16007056	Neziah leh Hatipha suante.
16007057	Solomon sikhate tate: Sotai, Sophereth, Perida;
16007058	Jaala, Darkon, Giddel;
16007059	Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ammon suante.
16007060	Nethinim mite tengteng leh Solomon sikhate' suante, zathum sawmkua-le-nih.
16007061	Huan hiaite Telmelah, Tel-harsha, Kerub, Addon leh Immer a kipan paitoute ahi uh, himahleh apipute uh inkote, Israel a kipan ahi hiam chih bel a-ensak thei kei uhi:
16007062	Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih.
16007063	Siampute a kipan: Habaiah, Koz leh Barzillai suan Gilead mi Barzillai tanute lak a zi neipa min atamsak uhi.
16007064	Hiaite'n khangthu suina a sim a omte lak ah amin gelhna uh azong ua, himahleh muh in a-om kei; huaiziak in nin a sim ahi ua siamputna a kipan koihkhiak ahi uhi.
16007065	Ukpipa in akiang uah, siampu khat Urim leh Thummim toh ahong suah mateng thil siangthoupente lak a nek louh ding chih agen hi.
16007066	Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk,
16007067	Apasal sikhate uh leh anungak sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in: pasal lasa leh numei lasa zanih sawmli-le-nga anei uhi.
16007068	Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk; asakolneute uh, zanih sawmli-le-nga;
16007069	Asangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga; asabiltungte uh sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih.
16007070	Pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a kipan khenkhatte nasem ding in akipia uhi. Ukpipa'n sumbawm ah dangka-eng darik sangkhat, maiphiat kuang sawmnga, siampute puan zanga-le-sawmthum apia hi.
16007071	Huan pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a khenkhatte'n dangka-eng darik singnih leh, dangka paun sangnih-le-zanih apia uhi.
16007072	Mipite lak a adangdangte piak dangka-eng darik singnih leh dangka paun sangnih leh, siampute puan sawmguk-le-sagih ahi.
16007073	Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite, mite lak a akhente leh Nethinim mite leh Israel tengteng a khopite uah atengta uhi. Akha sagihna ahong tun in, Israel suante akhopite uah a-om uhi.
16008001	Huchi in mite tengteng Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawmta ua; Toupa'n Israel kiang a apiak, Mosi Dan laibu hon tawi ding in laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah thu ahilh uhi.
16008002	Siampu Ezra in omkhawmte, pasal leh numei, theihsiamna toh za thei ding tengteng ma ah akha sagihna ani khat ni in dan thu ahon lata hi.
16008003	Pasal leh numeite leh theisiam thei dingte ma ah, zingkhang a kipan sun lai tanpha in Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ma ah asimta hi; huchi in mite tengteng in Dan Laibu abildoh chiat uhi.
16008004	Huai ding mah a abawl uh, sing dohkang tung ah laigelhmi Ezra adingh a; asik ah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah leh Maaseiah, ataklam pang ah adingh ua; aveilam pang ah, Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkijah, Hashum, Hashbaddana, Zekariah leh Meshullam.
16008005	Huchi in Ezra in mite mitmuh in laibu ahong a; mite tunglam ah a-om ngal a; huan ahongta a, mite tengteng adingh uhi:
16008006	Ezra in Toupa , Pathian thupi avualzawl hi. Huchi in mipi tengteng in adawng ua, “Amen, Amen,” chi a akhutte uh lik kawm in alute uh akunsak ua amai ua lei si in Toupa abia uhi.
16008007	Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, Pelaiah leh Levi mite'n mipite dan theisiam ding in abawl ua: huchi in mite amau mun ah adingh uhi.
16008008	Huchi in teltak in laibu ah, Pathian dan sung ah asim ua; a-omdan ataklang ua, huchi a lai simkhiak atheihsiamna ding un.
16008009	Huan Nehemiah, amah Tirshatha ahi a, huan siampu leh laigelhmi Ezra, leh Levite mite sinsakte'n, mite tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni Toupa na Pathian uh a dia ni siangthou ahi; dah kei unla kap kei un,” achi ua. Dan thute azak un lah mite tengteng akap ngal ua.
16008010	Akiang uah, “Pai unla, thaute ne unla, akhumkhum dawn un, amah a dia bangmah bawlkhol a om lou kiang ah tantuante khak un: tuni lah i Toupa uh a dia ni siangthou ahi ngal a. Dah kei unla; Toupa a kipahna na hatna uh ahi,” achi hi.
16008011	Huchi in Levite'n mite tengteng adaisak ua, “Tuni siangthou ahih ziak in, dai sipsip unla; dah kei un,” chi in.
16008012	Huan mite tengteng ne ding leh dawn ding leh vualnopna thupi bawl ding in apaita ua, akiang ua phuankhiak a om thute atheisiamta uhi.
16008013	Ani nih ni in mite tengteng pipute inko lupente, siampute leh Levi mite, laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah, Dan thute ngaikhe ding in akikhawmkhawm uhi.
16008014	Toupa'n Mosi zang a Israel suante akha sagihna ankuangluina a aidakbuk a atendan ding ua thu apiakdan dan a kigelh amu uhi:
16008015	“Tang ah kuankhia unla, olive hiang, gam olive leh muising hiang, tum hiang, sing vunsah hiang, akigelh bang a, aidakbuk bawlna ding in va la un, akhopi tengteng uh leh Jerusalem a apuankhiak theihna ding un,” achi hi.
16008016	Huchi in mite akuankhia ua, ava la ua, michih in a-inn tung ah, ahuangsungte uah, Pathian huangsungte ah, Tui Kongpi a mun lian ah leh Ephraim Kongpi a mun lian ah aidakbukte akibawlta uhi.
16008017	Huan saltanna a kipan hong pai nawn omkhawmte tengteng in aidakbukte abawl ua, aidakbuk ah ateng uhi. Nun tapa Joshua dam lai a kipan huai ni tanpha in Israel suante'n lah huchibang in ahih nai kei uhi. Huchi in nakpi a kipahna mahmah a-omta hi.
16008018	Huai lou in niteng in ani masapen a kipan ani tawp ni tan in Pathian Dan laibu sung ah asim hi. Huan ankuangluina ni sagih anei ua; ani giat ni in paidan dungzui in kikhopna thupi a-omta hi.
16009001	Hiai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni in Israel suante an ngawl kawm leh sai-ip puansilh kawm leh atung ua lei kibuak kawm in akikhawm ua.
16009002	Huchi in Israel chite mikhual tengteng a kipan in akikoihtuam ua, adingh ua akhelhnate uleh, apipute uh thulimlouhnate thupha atawi uhi.
16009003	Amun uah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian uh Dan laibu sung ah ni khat a aseh lina teng asim ua; aseh lina teng thupha atawi ua, Toupa a Pathian uh abeta uhi.
16009004	Huchih lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani leh Kenanite dohkan tung ah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian kiang uah aw ngaihtak in akikou uhi.
16009005	Huai lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah leh Pethahiahte'n, “Dingh unla tangtawn a kipan tangtawn pha in Toupa na Pathian uh vualzawl un: huchi in vualzawlna leh phatna tengteng tunglam a tawisang a om, na min thupi vualzawl in om hen.”
16009006	“Nang, nang kia mahmah Toupa na hi; van, vante' van a, sepaihte tengteng, lei leh asung a thil om tengteng, tuipite leh asung ua om tengteng na bawl a, avek un na hawi a; van sepaihte'n nang ahon bia uhi.
16009007	Abram tel a, Kaldaite Ur a kipan a amah pikhia a, akiang a Abraham min pepa, Toupa Pathian na hi;
16009008	Na ma a lungtang ginom na mu a, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Jebus mite leh Girgas mite gam pe ding a amah toh thukhun bawlpa, achite kiang a pe ding in, na thute bawl piching a; nang lah na diktat ngal a.
16009009	Aigupta a ka pipute uh gimthuakna na mu a, Tuipi San a akah uh na za a;
16009010	Pharaoh tung leh, asikhate tengteng tung leh, agam a mite tengteng tung ah chiamtehna leh thillamdangte na ensak a; amaute siatna ding in kisatheitak in agamtang uh chih lah na thei ngal hi; tuni a bang in, min na kimuh hi.
16009011	Ama uah tuipi na khen a, huchi in gam hul tung ah tuipi lak ah apaisuak ua; amau delhte nang tui thuk sung ah, tui hattak sung a suang bang in na pailut hi.
16009012	Huai lou in sun in meipi kitung in amaute na pi a; zan in meikuang dingh in, apaina ding lampi ua vakna amaute kiang a pe ding in.
16009013	Sinai Tang ah leng na hohsuk a, van a kipan in amau na houpih a, vaihawmna dikte leh dan dikte, dan thuseh leh thupiak hoihte na pia hi.
16009014	Amau kiang ah na Sabbath siangthou na theisak a, na sikha Mosi khut in, thupiakte leh dan thusehte leh dan amaute na thupiak in na pia hi.
16009015	Agilkial un van a kipan tanghou na pia a, adangtak un suangpi a kipan amaute a ding in tui na pawtkhesak a, amaute pe ding a na khut na lik a, gam luah ding a kuan ding in amaute thu na pia hi.
16009016	Himahleh amaute leh apipute un kisatheitak in ahih ua, apaupeng ua, na thupiakte angaikhe kei uhi,
16009017	Thu amang nuam kei ua, alak ua na hih na thillamdangte leng alimsak sam kei uh; himahleh aki-uangsak ua, ahelna uah atanna ua kik nawn ding in heutu khat asep uhi; himahleh nang ngaidam dia mansa, lainatna a dim leh hehpihsiam, heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau, amaute lehngatsan lou Pathian na hi.
16009018	Ahi, bawngnou sun abawl lai un, Aigupta a kipan a nang hon pikhepa hiai na Pathian ahi, achi ua, nakpitak a thangpaihnate abawl lai un.
16009019	Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampite ziak in amaute gamdai ah na lehngatsan kei hi: sun in atung ua kipan meipi dingh apaimang kei a, vakna amau pe ding, zan a meikuang dingh leng, apaina lampi uah amaute pi ding in.
16009020	Amaute chil ding in na kha hoih na pia a, akam uah na Manna na phal lou kei a, amaute adangtak un tui na pia hi.
16009021	Ahi, gamdai ah kum sawmli amaute na vak a, bangmah atasam kei ua; apuansilhte uh atul kei a, akhepekte uh abawk kei hi.
16009022	Huai ban ah lalgamte leh mite amau na pia a, atantuante uh dungzui a na piakkhiakte: Sihon gam, Heshbon kumpipa gam leh Bashan kumpipa Og gam alata uhi.
16009023	Van aksite bang in atate uh na pungsak a, nei ding in alut ding uh chi a, api-le-pute kiang a na gen bang in, gamsung ah na pilut hi.
16009024	Huchi in tate alut ua gam aneita ua, ama uah gam a tengte na satpuk a, Kanaante, akumpite leh, gam a mite, amau khut ah na pia a, huchi a a-utdan ua atung ua ahihtheihna ding un.
16009025	Khopi hatte, gam hoihte ala ua, thil hoih tengteng a dim innte anei ua, tuibel sekte, grephuante, olive huante, atam a tam theikungte: huchi in ane ua, avah ua, ahong thau ua, na hoihna thupi ziak in akipak mahmah uhi.
16009026	Hinapi'n lah thu amang kei ua, na tung ah ahel ua, na dan anunglam uah apai ua, na kiang lam amaute ngasak nawn ding a, amaute dem a thugen na zawlneite athat ua, thangpaihna thupi mahmah abawl uhi.
16009027	Huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ah amau na pia a, amau ahihgenthei uh: abuai ni ua na kiang a ahong kah lai un, van a kipan in na za a; na zahngaihna tampi dungzui in amelmate uh khut a kipan a amaute hondam ding in akiang uah hondam mite na pia hi.
16009028	Himahleh atawldam nung un, na ma ah gilou ahih nawn zel ua; huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ah amau na nusia a, huchi in amau atung uah thu anei ua: hinapi in ahong kihei ua, na kiang a akah un, van a kipan na za a; na zahngaihnate dungzui in amaute tamveipi na hunkhia hi.
16009029	Na dan a na pilut theih nawnna ding in, amau na dem a: himahleh kisatheitak in ahih ua, na thupiakte alimsak kei ua, na vaihawmte tung ah akhial zosop uhi, huai mi'n ahihleh, huai ah ahing ding, liang asawisak ua, aki-uangsak ua, aza nuam kei uhi.
16009030	Himahleh kum tampi amau na thuakzou a, na zawlneite in na kha zang in amaute na dem a, himahleh angaikhe nuam kei ua; huaiziak in gam mite khut ah amaute na peta hi.
16009031	Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampite ziak in amaute na hihbei keuhkeuh kei a, na lehngatsan kei; nang lah hehpih thei leh chingthei Pathian na hi ngal a.
16009032	Huaiziak in tu in, ka Pathian uh, thupi Pathian hat leh kihtakhuai, thukhun leh zahngaihna vompa, na ma ah, ka tung uh, ka kumpipate uh tung, ka vaihawmte uh tung, ka siampute uh tung, ka zawlneite uh tung, ka pipute uh tung, na mite, Assuria kumpipate dam lai a kipan a tuni tan, na mite tung a, nauveina bangmah tham lou bang in kilang kei hen.
16009033	Akoi abang hitaleh ka tung ua hong tung tengteng ah nang na diktat a; nang lah diktak in na hih ngal a, kou bel giloutak in ka hih uhi.
16009034	Kumpipate leh ka vaihawmte uh hiam, siampute uh hiam, ka pipute uh hiam in na dan azui kei ua, na thupiakte leh na thu theihpihnate, amaute dem a na theihpihnate lah angaikhe nuam sam kei uhi.
16009035	Agam uah nang nna asem kei ua, na hoih mahmahna ziak a amau na piak, ama ua na piak gam lian leh hoih, anasep gilou ua kipan akilehhei sam kei uhi.
16009036	Ngai in, tuni in sikhate ka hi ua, agah nekna ding leh huai ahoihte neihna dia ka pipute uh kiang a na piak gam ahihleh, ngai in, asung ah sikhate ka hi uhi.
16009037	Ka khelhna ziak ua ka tung ua na koih kumpipate a ding in anak pun mahmah a, athuthu un, ka pumpite uleh, ka gantate uh tung athilhihtheihna anei ua, kou ka nak gim mahmah uhi.”
16009038	Huan hiaite tengteng huchibang hita mahleh thukhun muanhuai ka bawl ua, ka gelh ua; ka vaihawmte uh, ka Levi mite uleh ka siampute un, huai ah suai akai uhi.
16010001	Suaikaite hiaite ahi uh Nehemiah Tirshatha, Hakaliah tapa leh Zedekiah;
16010002	Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah;
16010003	Pashur, Amariah, Malkijah;
16010004	Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluk;
16010005	Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah;
16010006	Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruk;
16010007	Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin;
16010008	Maaziah, Bilgai, Shemaiah: hiaite siampute ahi uh.
16010009	Levi mite: huaite, Jeshua, Azaniah tapa, Henadad tapa Binnui, Kadmiel;
16010010	A-unaute uh, Shebaniah, Hodiah, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan;
16010011	Mika, Rehob, Hashabiah;
16010012	Zakkur, Sherebiah, Shebaniah;
16010013	Hodiah, Bani, Beninu.
16010014	Mite hausate: Parosh, Pahath-moab, Elam, Zattu, Bani;
16010015	Bunni, Azgad, Bebai;
16010016	Adonijah, Bigvai, Adin;
16010017	Ater, Hezekiah, Azzur;
16010018	Hodiah, Hashum, Bezai;
16010019	Hariph, Anathot, Nebai;
16010020	Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir;
16010021	Meshezabel, Zadok, Jaddua;
16010022	Pelatiah, Hanan, Anaiah;
16010023	Hoshea, Hananiah, Hasub;
16010024	Hallohesh, Pileha, Shobek;
16010025	Rehum, Hasabnah, Maaseiah;
16010026	Huan Ahijah, Hanan, Anan;
16010027	Malluk, Harim, Baanah.
16010028	Huan mipi lak a adangte, siampute, Levi mite, Kongkhak ngakte, Lasa mite, Nethinim mite leh gamte a mite lak a kipan amau leh amau Pathian dan lam a kituamsehte tengteng, azite uh, atapate uh, atanute uh, michih theihna leh theihtheihna neite.
16010029	A-unaute uh, amiliante uh lam ah abelh tinten ua, Mosi Pathian sikha in apiak Pathian Dan a om ding leh Toupa i Toupa uh thupiak tengteng zui ding leh hih ding a, avaihawmte leh adan thusehte hih ding in hamsia leh kichiamna abawl uhi.
16010030	Huan i tanute gam a mite pe lou ding leh i tapate a dia atanute uh la lou ding in.
16010031	Gam a mite'n Sabbath ni a van hiam an nek hiam zuak ding ahon tawi uleh, Sabbath hiam, ni sianthou ni hiam in huaite i lei kei ding uh; huchi in akum sagihna louhaite lak leh leiba chiteng sik i kidek ding uh.
16010032	Huai lou leng i Pathian uh inn a nasepna ding a kum teng a shekel seh thumna kibasak ding in, thupiakte i kibawl uhi.
16010033	Tanghou koihna ding, anpiak thillat gige a ding, halmang thillat gige a ding, Sabbathte, kha thakte, sehsa ankuangte a ding, thil siangthoute a ding, Israel a dia lemna kithoihna bawlna dia khelhna thillatte a ding leh i Pathian inn ua nasepna tengteng a ding in.
16010034	Ai i san ua, siampute, Levi mite leh mite, sing thillat a ding in, dan a kigelh bang a, i Pathian uh Toupa maitam tung a khul ding, kum teng a, hun sehsa, i pipute inkote dungzui a, i Pathian inn ua laklut ding in.
16010035	Toupa' inn a, kum teng a, i lei theigah masapente, sing chiteng a gah tengteng a kipan gah masapente, tawi ding in.
16010036	Dan a kigelh bang in, i tapate lak a piang masapen leh i gantate lak a leng, i bawnghonte lak leh i belamhonte lak a nou masapente, i Pathian inn ua nasem siampute kiang a i Pathian inn ua tawi ding in.
16010037	I tangbuang mek masakpen uleh, i vei thillatte uleh, sing chiteng gah, uain leh thau, i Pathian uh inn a dantante ah, siampute kiang ah i tawi ding uh; huan i louma a sawm-a-khatte Levi mite kiang ah; amau, Levi mite'n, singtang khopi tengteng uah sawm-a-khat ala uhi.
16010038	Aaron tapa siampu, Levi mite'n sawm-a-khat alak chiang un, Levi mite kiang ah a-om ding: huchi in Levi mite'n sawm-a-khatte' sawm-a-khat i Pathian inn uah, dantante ah, sumbawm inn ah atawitou ding uhi.
16010039	Israel suante leh Levi tate'n buh-le-bal, uain, thau, thillat mun siang tui-um belsuan nasem siampute, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite omna, mun siangthou a atawi ding uh ahi. Huchi in i Pathian inn i nuse kei ding uhi.
16011001	Huchi in mite vaihawmte Jerusalem ah ateng ua: midangte'n leng, khopi siangthou Jerusalem a teng ding sawm lak a khat leh khopi dangte a teng dia seh kuate theihna ding in ai asan uhi.
16011002	Mite'n Jerusalem a teng ding a uttak a amau leh amau kipete tengteng avualzawlta uhi.
16011003	Huchi in Jerusalem a teng bial sung a hausate hiaite ahi uh; himahleh Judah khopite ah michih amau khopite uah michih atan chiat uah amau ateng ua, huaite, Israel siampute, Levi mite leh Nethinim mite leh Solomon sikhate tate.
16011004	Jerusalem ah Judah tate lak a leh Benjamin tate lak a kuate hiam ateng uhi. Judah tate lak ah: Athaiah Uzziah tapa, Zekariah tapa, Amariah tapa, Shephatiah tapa, Mahalalel tapa, Perez tate lak ah;
16011005	Maaseiah Baruk tapa, Kol-hozeh tapa, Hazaiah tapa, Adaiah tapa, Joiarib tapa, Zekariah tapa, Shiloni tapa.
16011006	Jerusalem a teng Perez tapate tengteng pasal hangsan ngen zali sawmguk-le-giat ahi uh.
16011007	Hiaite Benjamin tapate ahi uh: Sallu, Meshullam tapa, Joed tapa, Pedaiah tapa, Kolaiah tapa, Maaseiah tapa, Ithiel tapa, Jeshaiah tapa.
16011008	Huai nung in Gabbai, Sallai, zakua sawmnih-le-giat.
16011009	Huan Zikri tapa Joel aheutu uh ahi: huan Senuah tapa Judah khopi tung a nihna ahi.
16011010	Siampute lak ah: Joiarib tapa Jedaiah, Jakin tapa,
16011011	Hilkiah tapa Seraiah, Meshullam tapa, Zadok tapa, Meraioth tapa, Ahitub tapa, Pathian inn a vaihawm,
16011012	leh a-unaute uh huai inn a nasep sem, zagiat sawmnih-le-nih: huan Jeroham tapa Adaiah, Pelaliah tapa, Amzi tapa, Zekariah tapa, Pashur tapa, Malkijah tapa,
16011013	leh a-unaute, pipute inkote hausate, zanih sawmli-le-nih: huan Azarel tapa Amashai, Ahzai tapa, Mesillemoth tapa, Immer tapa,
16011014	leh a-unaute uh, mihat hangsante, za-le-sawmnih-le-giat: huan aheutu uh Zabdiel, Haggedolim tapa ahi.
16011015	Levi mite lak ah: Hassub tapa Shemaiah, Azrikam tapa, Hashabiah tapa, Bunni tapa;
16011016	Shabbethai leh Jozabad, Levi mite hausate lak a, Pathian inn polam nasep a heutu;
16011017	Mika tapa Mattaniah, Zabdi tapa, Asaph tapa, thumna a kipahthu genna pankhe pipen ahi. Huan Bakbukiah, a-unaute lak a nihna; huan Shammua tapa Abda, Galal tapa, Jeduthun tapa.
16011018	Khopi siangthou sung a Levi mite tengteng zanih sawmgiat-le-li.
16011019	Huai ban ah kongkhak ngakte, Akkub, Talmon leh a-unaute uh kongpite ngakte, za sawmsagih-le-nih ahi uhi.
16011020	Huan Israel lak a omlaite, siampute lak a Levi mite, Judah khopite tengteng ah a-om ua, michih agouluahna chiat uah.
16011021	Himahleh Ophel ah Nethinim mite ateng uh; huan mite tung ah Ziha leh Gispa Nethinim a-om uhi.
16011022	Jerusalem a Levi mite heutu leng Bani tapa Uzzi ahi, Hashabiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mika tapa, Asaph tapate, Pathian inn a nasepna a lasa mite;
16011023	amau tungtang thu ah kumpipa a kipan a thupiak, niteng a akiphamoh bang in; lasa mite a ding a dan kipsa lah a-om ngal a.
16011024	Huan Pethahiah, Meshezabel tapa, Judah tapa Zerah tate lak a mipite tungtang thu tengteng amah kumpipa khut ah a-om hi.
16011025	Khuate, aloute uh toh ahihleh, Judah tate lak a akhenkhatte Kiriath-arba leh akhotate ah, Dibon leh akhotate ah, Jekabzeel leh akhotate ah ateng ua;
16011026	Jeshua leh Moladah leh Bethphelet ah;
16011027	Hazar-shual leh Beer-sheba leh akhotate ah;
16011028	Ziklag leh Mekonah leh akhotate ah;
16011029	Enrimmon leh Zariah leh Jarmuth ah;
16011030	Zanoah, Adullam leh akhotate uah, Lakish leh huai aloute, Azekah leh akhotate. Huchi in Beer-sheba a kipan Hinnom Phaizang tan in giahbuk abawl uhi.
16011031	Benjamin tate leng Geba a kipan in atengtou zel ua, Mikmash leh Aija ah, Bethel leh akhotate ah;
16011032	Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah ah;
16011033	Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim;
16011034	Hadid, Zeboim. Neballat;
16011035	Lod leh Ono, khutsiamte phaizang ah.
16011036	Huan Judah a Levi mite sehkhen bangzah hiam Benjamin toh akizom uhi.
16012001	Huan hiaite Joshua leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel toh tontou siampute leh Levi mite ahi uh.
16012002	Siampute: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra, Amariah, Malluk, Hattush;
16012003	Shekaniah, Rehum, Meremoth;
16012004	Iddo, Ginnetho, Abijah;
16012005	Miamin, Maadiah, Bilgah;
16012006	Shemaiah, Joiarib, Jedaiah;
16012007	Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah. Hiaite siampute lak leh a-unaute uh lak a Jeshua dam lai a makai lianpente uh ahi.
16012008	Levi mite mah leng: Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah, Mattaniah, kipahthu genna tung a om, amah leh a-unaute.
16012009	Bakbukiah leh Unni leng, a-unaute uh toh venbuk sung ah a-om uh.
16012010	Huan Joshua in Joiakim asuang, Joiakim in Eliashib asuang, Eliashib in Joiada asuang,
16012011	Joiada in Jonathan asuang, Jonathan in Jaddua asuang hi.
16012012	Huan Joiakim dam lai in siampute a-om ua, pipute' inkuan a lupente: Seraiah a pan Meraiah; Jeremiah a pan Hananiah;
16012013	Ezra a pan Meshullam; Amariah a pan Jehohanan;
16012014	Meliku a pan Jonathan; Shebaniah a pan Joseph;
16012015	Harim a pan Adna; Meraioth a pan Helkai;
16012016	Iddo a pan Zekariah; Ginnethon a pan Meshullam;
16012017	Abijah a pan Zikri; Miniamin lak ah, Moadiah a pan Piltai;
16012018	Bilgah a pan Shammua; Shemaiah a pan Jehonathan;
16012019	Joiarib a pan Mattenai; Jedaiah a pan Uzzi;
16012020	Sallai a pan Kallai; Amok a pan Eber;
16012021	Hilkiah a pan Hashabiah; Jedaiah a pan Nethaneel.
16012022	Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan, Jaddua dam lai in Levi mite, pipute inkote vaihawm makai a gelh ahi uh: Persia mi Darias vaihawm lai a, siampute toh in.
16012023	Levi tapate, pipute inkuan a lupente, khangthubu ah, Eliashib tapa Johanan dam lai tan a gelh ahi.
16012024	Huan Levi mite hausate: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Kadmiel tapa Jeshua, a-unaute uh toh amau hunbi chiat ah Pathian mipa David thupiak dungzui a kipahthu gen ding in kimaituah in adingh uhi.
16012025	Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkubte kongpite vankoihna dantan kem kongkhak ngakte ahi uhi.
16012026	Hiaite Jozadak tapa, Jeshua tapa, Joiakim hun lai a damte ahi ua, huan huai tuh ukpipa Nehemiah leh laigelhmi, siampu Ezra hun lai ahi.
16012027	Huan Jerusalem kulhbaang latna a ding in a-omna tengteng uah Levi mite azongkhia ua, kipahna toh, kipahthu genna leh lasak, dakkhutbet, tumgingte leh kaihgingte toh Jerusalem a amaute hon pi ding a, kipahna bawl ding in.
16012028	Huchi in lasa mite tapate akikaikhawm ua, Jerusalem kimvel a phaizang a kipan leh Netophah mite khotate a kipan in;
16012029	Beth-gilgal a kipan in leng, Geba leh Azmaveth loute a kipan in; lasa mite'n lah Jerusalem kimvel in khotate ana bawlta ngal ua.
16012030	Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite akihihsiangthou ua, mite leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte ahihsiangthou uhi.
16012031	Huchih lai in kulhbaang tung ah Judah vaihawmte ka pitou a, kipahthugen leh ahon a pai pawlpi nih ka sep a; huai ah pawl khat kulhbaang tung ah Ekvum Kongpi lam ah apai uhi.
16012032	Amaute nung in Hoshaiah leh Judah vaihawmte lak a kimkhat,
16012033	Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam,
16012034	Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah, Jeremiah,
16012035	leh siampute tapate lak a kuate hiam pengkulte toh, Zekariah Jonathan tapa, Shemaiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mikaiah tapa, Zakkur tapa, Asaph tapa;
16012036	a-unaute, Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethaneel, Judah, Hanani Pathian mipa David tumging theihte toh; ama uah Ezra laigelhmi a-om hi.
16012037	Tuikhuk kongpi kiang ah, amazawntak uah, David khopi dohkang ah apaitou ua, kulhbaang toupaina ah, David inn tunglam ah, suahlam pang a Tui Kongpi pha in.
16012038	Huan alak ua pawl dang kipahthugente amaute tuak ding in apai ua, kei amau nung ah, kulhbaang tung a, meipi insang tunglam ah, kulhbaang lian tanpha in;
16012039	Ephraim kongpi tung ah, kongpi lui kiang, ngasa kongpi kiang a Hananel insang, Meah insang, Belam Kongpi tanpha in Venna Kongpi ah adingh den uhi.
16012040	Huchi in Pathian insung a kipahthugen pawl nihte leh kei leh ka kiang a vaihawmte lak a akimkhatte adingh ua:
16012041	Siampute, Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Mikaiah, Elioenai, Zekariah, Hananiah, pengkulte toh;
16012042	huan Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malkijah, Elam leh Ezer. Huchi in lasa mite'n ngaihtak in, aheutupa uh Jezrahiah toh la asa uhi.
16012043	Huai ni in kithoihna thupite alan ua, nuam asa uhi; Pathian in lah nopsakna thupi in amau nuam asasak hi; numeite leh naupangte toh akipak uhi: huchi in Jerusalem kipahna husa gamlapi tan ah leng zak in a-om hi.
16012044	Huai ni in thilpiakte, vei thillatte, haithak masapente, sawm-a-khatte koihkhawmna dantante a heutu, Dan in aseh bang a, siampu leh Levite tantuan kho chih in ana hihzoh bang zel ua lakhawm ding mite asep uhi. Judahte bel nasemmi siampute leh Levite ziak in akipak mahmah uhi.
16012045	A Pathian uh indan leh siansakna indan akem ua, huchibang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite'n David leh atapa Solomon thupiak bang in ahihta uhi.
16012046	David leh nidanglai a Asaph dam lai in lasami heutupen leh Pathian kiang a phatna leh kipahthu genna lasate lah a-om ngal a.
16012047	Huan Zerubbabel dam lai leh Nehemiah dam lai in Israel tengteng in, niteng a akul bang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite tantuan ape zel uhi: Levi mite a ding in thilsiangte asepsiang ua; Levi mite'n Aaron tapate a ding in asepsiangthou uhi.
16013001	Huai ni in mite zak in Mosi laibu asim ua; Ammon mi leh Moab mi tangtawn in Pathian khawmpi sung a alut ding uh ahi kei chih, huai sung a kigelh amu uhi.
16013002	Tanghou leh tui a Israel suante dawn lou a, amaute hamsiat ding a, amaute siatna ding a Balaam alak ziak un: himahleh i Pathian in hamsia vualzawlna asuaksakta hi.
16013003	Dan azak lai un, hichi ahong hi a, gamdangmi suante a pan Israel mite akikhenkhe tuamta uhi.
16013004	Huan hiai ma in, siampu Eliashib i Pathian inn ua dantante tung a seh a ompa, Tobiah toh kizom in,
16013005	ama a ding in dantan thupi abawlkhol a, huai ah amalam in anpiak thillatte, begaw leh tui-um belsuante leh buh-le-bal, uain leh thaute sawm-a-khatte akoih ua, huaite bel Levi mite leh lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite kiang a thupiak a piak ahi a; huan vei thillatte siampute a ding in.
16013006	Himahleh hiai hunte in, Jerusalem ah ka om kei: Babulon kumpipa Artaksarses kum sawmthum-le-nih kum in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh a, ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa phalna ka ngen hi.
16013007	Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, Pathian inn pisate sung dantan amah a dia abawlsakna ah, Eliashib in Tobiah a dia gilou ahihdan ka theisiam hi.
16013008	Huchi in kei hon dahsak mahmah a: huaiziak in dantan a kipan in Tobiah inn van tengteng ka lawnkhia hi.
16013009	Huan thu ka pia a, dantante ahihsiang ua: huai ah anpiak thillatte leh begaw toh, Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan ka hon la nawn hi.
16013010	Levi mite tante amau kiang ah piak nai louh in a-om chih ka thei a; huchi in Levi mite leh lasa mite, nasep semte michih aloulam ah ataizak uhi.
16013011	Kei tuh vaihawmte toh ka kiselta ua, bang ding a Pathian inn mangngilh a om ahia? ka chi hi. Amau ka kaikhawm a, amun uah ka koih hi.
16013012	Judah tengteng in buh-le-bal leh uain leh thau sawm-a-khat sumbawm ah ahon tawi uhi.
16013013	Sumbawm a ding in sumkem mite ka bawl a, Shelemiah siampute, Zadok laigelhmite leh Levi mite lak ah Pedaiah. Huan amaute zom in Zakkur tapa Hanan, Mattaniah tapa: muanhuai a sim ahi ngal ua, anasep uh a-unaute uh kiang a hawm ding ahi.
16013014	Aw ka Pathian, hiai thu ah hon theigige inla, ka Pathian inn a ding a ka nasep hoih ka hihte leh huai a zuih dingte nulmang ke'n.
16013015	Huai lai in Judah ah Sabbath ni a kuate hiam uain suknate chil a, buhphalte hon tawi a, huaite toh asabiltungte van guang ka mu a; uain, grep gahte, theipite van puakgik chi chih, Sabbath ni a Jerusalem a hon tawilutte leng; huan an nekte azuak ni uh huai ni in amaute dem in thu ka gen hi.
16013016	Huai ah Tura mite leng a-om ua, ngasa ahon tawi ua, van chi tuamtuam toh, Judah tate kiang leh Jerusalem ah Sabbath ni in azuak uhi.
16013017	Huchi in ke'n Judahte miliante ka kiselpih a, akiang uah, “Bang thil gilou ahia hiai na hih ua, Sabbath na hihnit uh?
16013018	Na pipute un huchibang in ahih ngei ua hia, i Pathian in eite tung leh hiai khopi tung ah hiai hoih lou tengteng hon tun ahi kei maw? Hinapi in nou Sabbath hihnin in Israel tung ah thangpaihna tamsem na tun ua,” ka chi hi.
16013019	Huan Jerusalem kongpite Sabbath ni ma a khua amial pat in, hichi ahong hi a, kongkhakte khak ding in thu ka pia a, Sabbath ni abei matan kihong lou ding in thu ka pia a, ka sikhate lak a akhen kongpi tung ah ka pangsak a, huchi a Sabbath ni a puakgik ahong kilaklutlouhna ding in.
16013020	Huchi in khatvei hiam nihvei hiam sumsin mite leh van chiteng zuak mite Jerusalem polam ah agiak uhi.
16013021	Amaute dem in thu ka gen a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a kulhbaang kim a giak na hi ua? Na hih nawn uleh, na tung uah khut ka kha ding,” ka chi lai hi. Huai hun a kipan in Sabbath ni in ahong pai nawnta kei uhi.
16013022	Kihihsiangthou ding leh hong kuan a kongpite ngak ding, Sabbath ni siangsak ding in, Levi mite thu ka pia hi. Aw ka Pathian, hiai ah leng kei hon theigige in, na zahngaihna letdan dungzui in kei hon hawi in.
16013023	Huai lai in Judate Ashdod, Ammon leh Moab numeite kitenpihte leng ka mu hi:
16013024	Huchi in atate'n Ashdod pau kimkhat leh namdangte pau azang ua, Judate pau in apau thei kei uhi.
16013025	Amaute ka kiselpih a, ka hamsiatkhum a, alak ua kuate hiam ka khen a, amul uh ka bohkhiaksak a, Pathian min lou in ka kichiamsak a, “Na tanute uh atapate uh a ding in na pe kei ding ua, na tapate uh a ding hiam, noumau a ding hiam in leng atanute uh na la ding uh ahi kei chi in.
16013026	Israel kumpipa Solomon hiaite in akhial kei maw? Hinapi in lah nam tampite lak ah amah bang kumpipa a-om kei a, a Pathian it in a-om a, Israel tengteng tung ah Pathian in kumpipa in abawl hi. Himahleh amah nangawn numei lamdangte'n akhialsak uhi.
16013027	Ahihleh hiai gilou mahmah hih ding in, numei lamdangte kitenpih a i Pathian tung a talek ding in, na thu hon zui ding ka hi uh maw?”
16013028	Joiada tapate lak a khat, siampu lianpen Eliashib tapa, Horon mi Sanballat tanu' pasal ahi a; huaiziak in kei a kipan ka delhkhia hi.
16013029	Aw ka Pathian, siamputna, siamputna thukhun leh Levi mite ahihnit ziak un, amaute theigige in.
16013030	Huchi in mikhualte tengteng a kipan in amaute ka hihsiang a, siampute a ding leh Levi mite a ding in, michih anasep uah, nasepdante ka sehsak a;
16013031	hun sehsa a sing thillat a ding leh gah masa a ding in. Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in kei hon theigige in.
17001001	Ahasueras dam lai in hichi ahong hi a, hiai Ahasueras bel India a kipan Ethiopia tan a, bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih tung a vaihawm ahi.
17001002	Huai lai a, Susa Inpi a kumpipa Ahasueras a gam laltutphah tung a atut lai,
17001003	avaihawm kum thum kum in, avaihawmte leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuangluina abawl a; Persia leh Media thuneihna, bialte a miliante leh vaihawmte ama ah a-om uhi.
17001004	Agam thupi hauhsaknate leh avaihawmna sang zahtakhuaina ni tampi, ni za-le-sawmgiat a-ensak hi.
17001005	Huchi in hiai nite zoh in, kumpipa'n Susa Inpi a om mite tengteng, aneu leh alian a ding in kumpipa Kulhpi huangsung ah, ankuangluina ni sagih abawl hi.
17001006	Puan kang khaite, ahing, adum, puanmalngat hoih leh sandup khauzangte a dangka zungbuhte leh suangpak khuamte a henden a-om a, tutna nemte dangka-eng leh dangka a bawl, suangchian suangpak san, ngou, eng leh vom a bawl tung ah a-om uhi.
17001007	Dangka-eng noute in dawn ding amau apia ua, noute akibang kei vek uh; kumpipa uain tampi, kumpipa khuttawi letna dungzui zel in.
17001008	Huchi in dan bang zel in uain dawnna a-om a; kuamah phutluih a-om kei; kumpipa'n a-inn heutu tengteng kiang ah, michih in nuam asak bang zel ua ahih ding un atheisak khin hi.
17001009	Kumpinu Vasti in leng kumpipa Ahasueras inn a om numeite a ding in ankuangluina abawl sam hi.
17001010	Ani sagih ni a, kumpipa lungtang uain a kipak a a-om lai in, Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha leh Abagtha, Zethar leh Karkaste, kumpipa Ahasueras omna a nasem michilgehte thu apia hi.
17001011	Kumpipa ma a kumpi lukhu toh Vasti hon tonpih a, akilawmna mite leh vaihawmte ensak ding in, amah et in ahoih hi.
17001012	Himahleh kumpinu Vasti in michilgehte zang a kumpipa thupiak hoh lou ding in asel a, huaiziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, asung ah ahehna akuang hi.
17001013	Huchih lai in hunte thei mipilte kiang ah kumpipa'n, huchibang lah kuapeuh dan leh vaihawmna theite lau a kumpipa omdan sek ahi him hi.
17001014	Amah zom in Karsena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena leh Memukan, Persia leh Media vaihawmtu sagihte kumpipa mai mute leh gamsung a tu masate ahi uhi.
17001015	“Michilgehte zang a kumpipa Ahasueras chih ahih louh ziak in, dan dungzui in kumpinu Vasti tung ah bang i hih ding ua?” achi hi.
17001016	Kumpipa leh vaihawmte ma ah Memukan in adawng a, “Kumpinu Vasti kumpipa tung ah kia thil diklou hih ahi kei a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial sung a om vaihawmte tengteng tung leh mite tengteng tung ah leng hih ahi.
17001017	Kumpipa Ahasueras in ama a hong pai ding in kumpinu Vasti thu apia a, himahleh ahong pai kei, chih akigenthang chiang in, hiai kumpinu thilhih numei tengteng kiang atung ding a, amit uah apasalte uh simmohna suaksak ding ahi.
17001018	Tuni a kumpinu thilhih na za Persia leh Media vaihawmte'n kumpipa vaihawmte tengteng kiang ah huchi mah bang in agen ding uh. Huchi in nakpi a kisimmohna leh thangpaihna ahong kipankhe ding hi.
17001019	Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, amah a kipan kumpi thupiak pekhia henla, kumpipa Ahasueras ma ah Vasti hong pai nawn het lou ding chih, hihlamdan theih louh ding in, Persia mite leh Media mite dante lak ah gelh in om hen; huan kumpipa'n amah sang a hoihzaw midang khat amah kumpi mun leh mual peleh.
17001020	Huchi in kumpipa'n thupiak abawl ding a, gamsung pumpi a akithehzak chiang in, athupi ngal a; zi tengteng in apasalte uh, aliante leh aneute kiang ah zahtakna ape ding uh,” chi in.
17001021	Huchi in thugen in kumpipa leh lalte akipaksak a; huchi in Memukan thu dungzui in kumpipa'n ahihta hi.
17001022	Ama'n lah huai a kigelh dungzui in, kumpipa bial tengteng, bial chiteng leh mi chiteng kiang ah apau uh dungzui in, huchi a michih in ama insung mahmah a dante apuaklut theih a, amite pau dungzui a, athehzak theihna ding in laikhakte akhakta hi.
17002001	Hiai thilte zoh in, kumpipa Ahasueras thangpaihna lungkimsak a om in, Vasti bang ahia ahih, asiatna dia bang ahia thupiak chih atheigige hi.
17002002	Huchi in anasepsak kumpipa sikhate'n akiang ah, “Kumpipa a ding in nungak siangthou tuailai melhoih kizong henla,
17002003	kumpipa'n agam a bial tengteng ah heutu sep hen, huaite'n nungak siangthou tuailai tengteng Susa Inpi ah, numeite inn ah, Hegai kumpipa michilgeh numeite kempa in ahon pikhawm theihna ding un; huchi in siansakna ding a thilte uh amau kipeleh.
17002004	Huchi in nungak kumpipa lungkimsak pen Vasti sik in kumpinu hi hen,” achi uhi. Huai thil in kumpipa alungkimsak a; huchibang in ahihta hi.
17002005	Susa Inpi ah Juda mi kuahiam, amin Mordekai, Jair tapa, Shimei tapa, Benjamin mi a-om a;
17002006	amah bel Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jekoniah apimang a om salte toh pimang in a-om uhi.
17002007	Ama'n Hadassah, huai tuh Esther, apaneu tanu akem piching hi; ama'n nu leh pa anei kei. Huai nungak akilawm in amel ahoih hi, anu leh pa asih un Mordekai in atanu ding in ala hi.
17002008	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl akizak in, nungak tampi Susa Inpi, Hegai in akaihkhawm a-om lai un, Esther leng kumpipa' inn ah, Hegai, numeite kempa nuai ah ahon pi uhi.
17002009	Huchi in nungak in amah alungkimsak a, ama deihsakna angahta a; ama'n siansakna ding in athilte amah ape pah a, atantuante toh, amah piak ding akilawm, kumpipa' inn a kipan nungak sagih toh; amah leh anungakte numeite inn a mun hoihpen ah asuanta hi.
17002010	Esther in ahihna agenkhe kei a, atanaute hihna leng agenkhe sam kei hi; Mordekai in lah genkhe lou ding in amah athuhilh ngal a.
17002011	Huchi in Mordekai bel niteng in numeite inn mai ah Esther in bangchi in ahih zel a, bang ahong chi dia chih thei ding in ahoh zel hi.
17002012	Numeite a dia dan dungzui a kha sawm-le-nih, murrah thau toh kha guk, gimnamtuite toh kha guk leh numeite siansakna ding a thilte toh, huchibang in asiansakna nite hihkim a a-om nung in, nungak chih kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a ava lut hun uh atungta hi.
17002013	Nungakte kumpipa kiang a alut chiang un, kumpipa' inn a hohpih ding in numeite omna a kipan adeihdeih uh piak in a-om uhi.
17002014	Nitaklam in apai a, azing nawn in numeite inn nihna ah, kumpipa michilgeh Shasgaz, meite kempa inn ah ahong kik a, kumpipa amah ah kipak napi in, kumpipa kiang ah ahong lut kei a, amin a sap in a-om hi.
17002015	Huchi a amah atanu ding a lapa, Mordekai paneu Abihail tanu, Esther kumpipa kiang a ava lut hun ahong tun in, Hegai kumpipa michilgeh, numeite kempa a seh chih ngal louh bangmah akan kei hi. Huchi in amah ente tengteng mitmuh in Esther in deihsakna atang hi.
17002016	Huchi in Esther kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a kumpi inn ah akha sawmna, Tebeth kha a avaihawm kum sagihna kum in laklut in a-omta hi.
17002017	Huchi in kumpipa'n numei tengteng sang in Esther a-it a, nungak siangthoute sang in amitmuh in hehpihna leh deihsakna atang hi. Huchi in alutung ah lallukhu akoih a, Vasti sik in kumpinu ding in amah abawlta hi.
17002018	Huchih lai in kumpipa'n avaihawmte tengteng leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuang thupi, “Esther Ankuang mahmah,” aluita a; bialte kiang ah khawlna abawl a, kumpipa siamna bang zel in, thilpiakte apia hi.
17002019	Huchi a nungak siangthoute nihveina dia kaihkhawm a-om lai un, Mordekai bel kumpipa kongpi ah atu hi.
17002020	Esther in atanaute leh amite hihna agenkhe kei; amah kiang a khanletsak a om bangtak in Mordekai thupiak bang in ahih hi.
17002021	Huai lai a, Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a atut lai in, kumpipa michilgeh lak a nih, Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak ngakte aheh ua, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut kha ding in azongta uhi.
17002022	Huai thil Mordekai in athei a, ama'n kumpinu kiang ah atheisak hi. Esther in Mordekai min in huai akumpipa ahilhta hi.
17002023	Huchi in athu akikanleh, huchibang ahi ngei chih akimukhia a, anih un sing dawn ah khailup in a-om uhi. Hiai thu tanchin gelhna laibu ah kumpipa ma ah akigelh hi.
17003001	Hiai thilte nung in kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman akaisangsak a, malam anawtsak a, akiang a om vaihawmte tengteng tunglam ah atutphah akoih hi.
17003002	Huchi in kumpipa'n amah tungtang thu huchibang a apiak bang in kumpipa sikha tengteng, kumpipa kongpi a omte Haman azahna pia in akun uhi. Himahleh Mordekai akun kei a, amah zahna abawl kei hi.
17003003	Huchih lai in kumpipa sikhate, kumpipa kongpi a omte'n, Mordekai kiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa thupiak a talek na hia?” achi uhi.
17003004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng a amah ahoupih lai un, amau angaikhe kei a, Mordekai thu pai ding hia pai lou ding chih thei ding in Haman ahilh ua; amah Juda mi ahi chih amaute ahilhta hi.
17003005	Huchi a Mordekai niamchik a kun lou in, amah azahtak kei chih Haman in atheih in, aheh mahmah hi.
17003006	Himahleh Mordekai tung kia a khut khak bang tham lou in angaihtuah a; Mordekai mite lah amah a-ensakta ngal ua; huchi in Haman in Ahasueras gam pumpi a om Judate tengteng, Mordekai mite, hihgawp ding in azongta hi.
17003007	Kumpipa Ahasueras vaihawm akum sawm-le-nih ni, akha khatna, Nisan kha in, “Pur,” asan ua, huai tuh aisan ahi, Haman ma ah, niteng in, kha teng in, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha tan in.
17003008	Huan Haman in kumpipa Ahasueras kiang ah, “Mi kuate hiam kithehzak a na gam bial sung tengteng a mite lak a dalh a-om ua; adante uh mi tengteng dan toh akibang kei a; kumpipa dante azui kei uhi. Huaiziak in amaute thuakzoh kumpipa punna ding ahi kei hi.
17003009	Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, hihsiat a a-omna ding un lai kigelhleh, kumpipa nasepna a heutute khut ah ke'n dangka talent singkhat ka pe ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a tawilut ding in,” achi hi.
17003010	Huchi in akhut a kipan kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Judate melmapa kiang ah apia hi.
17003011	Huchi in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Dangka na kiang a piak ahi, mipi leng, amau tung a pha na saksak hih ding in,” achi hi.
17003012	Huchih lai in akha khatna, ani sawm-le-thum ni in, kumpipa laigelhmite asamlut ua, kumpipa heutu liante leh kumpipa bial chih a omte tengteng leh mi chiteng vaihawmte Haman in thu apiak peuhmah dungzui in akigelhta hi. Bial chih kiang ah huai a kigelh dungzui in, michih kiang ah apau bang zel un; kumpipa Ahasueras min in akigelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in suai akisawn hi.
17003013	Huchi in Adar kha, akha sawm-le-nih, ani sawm-le-thum ni mahmah a, ni khat a, Juda mite tengteng atek-akhang naupang noute leh numeite hihsiat ding, that ding leh mangthangsak ding in, kumpipa bial sung tengteng ah dak in laikhakte akhak ua, asum uh gallak a laksak ding in.
17003014	Laigelh teisawn, thupiak bial teng a piakkhiak ding leh huai ni a dia mansa a om chiat ding in, mi tengteng kiang ah asuah uhi.
17003015	Kumpipa thupiak in dakte kinohtak in asawlkhia ua, Susa Inpi ah thupiak akipekhia hi. Huchi in dawn ding in kumpipa leh Haman atu ua; himahleh Susa khopi ahamhaihsak hi.
17004001	Huchi a thil kihih tengteng Mordekai in atheih in, apuante abotkek a, vut toh sai-ip puan asilh a, khopi laizang ah apaikhia a, ngaihtak leh nakpi in akap hi.
17004002	Kumpipa kongpi mai pha in ahong pai a, sai-ip puansilh mi kuamah lah kumpipa kongpi sung ah alut thei kei hi.
17004003	Huchi in bial chiteng a, koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tunna ah, Judate lak ah nakpitak a suunna, an ngawlna, kahna, mauna a-om hi. Huchi in mi tampi sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak ah alum uhi.
17004004	Esther nungakte leh aheutute ahong pai ua athu amah ahilhta uhi. Huchi in kumpinu adah mahmah a, Mordekai silh ding in puansilh akhak a, amah a kipan a asai-ip puan lakhe ding in, himahleh asang kei.
17004005	Huchi in Esther in Hatak, kumpipa michilgehte lak a khat asam a, amah vil ding a kumpipa'n aseh, Mordekai kiang a hoh ding in thu apia hi, hiai bang thu ahi, bangziak a hichi ahia chih thei ding in.
17004006	Huchibang in kumpipa kongpi mai a om, khopi mun za ah Mordekai kiang ah Hatak ava pawtkhia hi.
17004007	Mordekai in atung a tung tengteng thu amah ahilh a, Judate a dia, amaute hihsiatna ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a Haman in dangka sum piak ding a achiam zah geih ahilh hi.
17004008	Huai lou leng Esther kiang a lak ding leh akiang a puan ding in amaute hihsiatna ding a Susa a thubawl piakkhiak laigelh kiteisawn amah apia a; kumpipa kiang ava hoh ding a hilh ding in, akiang athumna va bawl ding leh amite a dia, ama a ngetna va bawl ding in.
17004009	Huchi in Hatak ahong a Mordekai thute Esther ahilh hi.
17004010	Huchih lai in Esther in Hatak kiang ah thu agen a, Mordekai a ding thukhah apia hi.
17004011	“Kumpipa sikhate tengteng leh kumpipa bialte a mite'n athei kilkel uhi, mi kuapeuh numei, pasal leng, sap louh a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen a ahoh uleh, amah a ding in dan khat a-om a, ‘Sihsak ding,’ chih leh ‘Ahing ding,’ chi a, kumpipa'n dangka-eng kumpi chiang aletkhumte chih louh ngal, himahleh hiai ni sawmthum sung kumpipa kiang a hong pai ding in sap in ka om nai kei hi,” chi in.
17004012	Huan Esther thute Mordekai ahilh uhi.
17004013	Huchih lai in Mordekai in Esther kiang a dawnna va tun nawn ding in amau achi a, “Juda tengteng sang a, kumpipa insung a nang na suahtak tuan ding kingaihtuah het ke'n.
17004014	Nang hiai hun a bangmah gen lou a na daih dideleh, mun dang a kipan in Judate ding in panpihna leh hutkhiakna ahong om ding a, himahleh nang leh na pa inkote na mangthang ding uh: hun hichibang a dia hong lal na hih mel kua'n athei a?”
17004015	Huchi in Esther in Mordekai kiang a dawnna va tun ding in amau achi hi.
17004016	“Kuan inla, Susa a om Judate tengteng kaikhawm inla kei a ding in an ngawl unla, ni thum, zan hiam sun hiam: nek lah ne kei unla, dawn leng dawn kei un. Huchi mah bang in ke'n leng ka nungakte toh an ka ngawl ding uh; huai chiang in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh ngeingei ding, dan bang zaw ahi kei a, huchi a ka manleh, mang ka himai ding,” achi hi.
17004017	Huchi in Mordekai akuan a, Esther in amah thu apiak tengteng bang in agamta hi.
17005001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni in, Esther in akumpi puansilh asilh a, kumpipa' inn zawn a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen ah ava dingh a; kumpipa bel inn lutna zawn a, kumpi inn ah alaltutphah tung ah atu hi.
17005002	Hichibang ahi a, kumpipa'n pisa a kumpinu Esther dingh amuh in, amitmuh in deihsakna atangta: kumpipa'n akhut a om dangka-eng kumpi chiang Esther lam ah alik hi. Huchi in Esther ahong painai a, kumpi chiangdawn ahong khoih hi.
17005003	Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang na deih a, kumpinu Esther? Na ngetna bang ahia? Gam kimkhat tan leng piak na hi ding,” achi hi.
17005004	Huchi in Esther in, “Kumpipa'n hoih asakleh tuni in kumpipa leh Haman amah a dia ka bawl an nekna ah hong pai un,” achi hi.
17005005	Huan kumpipa'n, “Esther gen bang a hih ahihtheihna ding in Haman kinohsak un,” achi hi. Huchi in Esther an nekna abawl ah kumpipa leh Haman ahong uhi.
17005006	Huan uain adawn lai un kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna? Phal ahihtheihna ding in bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat tan in leng piak ahi ding,” achi hi.
17005007	Esther in adawng a, “Ka thumna leh ka ngetna hiai ahi:
17005008	Kumpipa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, ka thumna phal ding leh ka ngetna bawl ding a kumpipa alungkimleh, kumpipa leh Haman, amau a dia ka bawl ding an nekna ah hong le uh, kumpipa'n achih bang in zingchiang in ka hih ding,” achi hi.
17005009	Huchi in huai ni in nuamsa leh lung kipak in Haman apaikheta a: himahleh Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a om, Haman in ama a Mordekai dingh lou a tat leng tang lou amuh in, atung ah aheh mahmah hi.
17005010	Huchi in leng Haman aki-ip teitei a, inn ah apaita; huan mi asawl a alawmte leh azi Zeresh ahon tonpih hi.
17005011	Haman in akiang uah, ahauhsakna thupina leh atate tamdan leh kumpipa'n akaisansakna thil tengteng leh kumpipa sikhate vaihawmte tung a amasak tuamdan agen hi.
17005012	Haman in, ahi, “Esther in an nekna abawl ah kumpipa toh kei chih louh ngal mi kuamah ahohsak kei; zingchiang in leng kumpipa toh kei ahon sam hi.
17005013	Himahleh Mordekai huai Juda mipa, kumpipa kongpi a tu ka muh lai teng hiaite tengteng kei a ding in bangmah aphatuam kei,” achi lai hi.
17005014	Huchi in azi Zeresh leh alawmte'n akiang ah, “Khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang kibawl henla, zingsang in nang kumpipa kiang ah thu gen inla, huai a Mordekai khailup ahihtheihna ding in; huchi in vualnuamtak in kumpipa toh an nekna ah na hoh ding uh,” achi uhi. Hiai in Haman akipaksak a; huchi in khailupna khuam abawlsakta hi.
17006001	Huai zan in kumpipa a-ihmu thei kei; tanchin chiamtehna laibu hon tawi ding in thu apia a, huaite kumpipa ma ah asim uhi.
17006002	Kumpipa michilgehte lak a mi nih Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak vengte'n, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut khak sawmte tanchin Mordekai in agen chih kigelhna muh in a-om hi.
17006003	Huchi in kumpipa'n, “Hiai ziak in Mordekai tung ah bang zahtakna leh thupina hih in a-om a?” achi hi. Kumpipa sikha amah nasemte'n, “Amah a ding in bangmah hih a-om kei,” achi uhi.
17006004	Kumpipa'n, “Pisa a om kua ahia?” achi a. Huchi in Haman, kumpipa' inn pisa ponungzaw ah, kumpipa kiang a abawlkholhsa khailupna khuam a Mordekai khai ding thu gen ding in ahong hi.
17006005	Kumpipa sikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in pisa ah Haman adingh nilouh hi,” achi ua. Kumpipa'n, “Hong lut heh,” achi hi.
17006006	Huchi in Haman ahong lut hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mi kumpipa'n azahtak nop tung ah bang kihih ding ahia?” achi hi. Haman in alungtang in, Kumpipa'n kei sang a pahtawi dia akipahna kua kiang a bawl nuamzaw ahia? achi hi.
17006007	Haman in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n apahtawi nopmi a ding in,
17006008	kumpipa'n asilh zel kumpi puansilh hon lakhia henla, sakol kumpipa tuan zelna leng, aluzang a lallukhu akoihna zel:
17006009	Huchi in puansilh leh sakol kumpipa vaihawmpih thupi penpente lak a khat khut ah pekheleh, huaite akumpipa'n zahtak a-utpa azeptheihna ding un leh khopi kongzing lak ah sakol tung ah tuangsak henla, ama ah, huchibang in kumpipa'n apahtawi nopte kiang ah hih in a-om ding, chi in puang leng,” achi hi.
17006010	Huai laitak in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Kin inla, na chih bang in, puansilh leh sakol la inla, kumpipa kongpi a tu zel Juda mi Mordekai tung ah hih in: na gen tengteng bangmah vuaksuak kei hen,” achi hi.
17006011	Huchi in Haman in puansilh leh sakol ala a, Mordekai azem a, khopi kongzing lak ah atuangsak a, ama ah, “Hichibang in kumpipa'n azahtak nopmi tung a ahih ahi ding,” chi in apuangta hi.
17006012	Huan kumpipa kongpi ah Mordekai ahong pai nawn hi. Himahleh Haman bel suun leh alutang khuhsa in a-inn lam ah kintak in apai hi.
17006013	Huchi in Haman in azi Zeresh kiang leh alawmte tengteng kiang ah atung a thil tung tengteng agen vek hi. Huaitak in amipilte leh azi Zeresh in akiang ah, “Ama a na puk patna Mordekai, Juda chi a mi ahihleh, amah na zou kei ding, himahleh ama ah na puk ngei ding,” achi uhi.
17006014	Amah toh ahoulim san lai un, kumpipa michilgehte ahong pai ua, Esther in an nek ding abawlna a ding in kintak in hong pita uhi.
17007001	Huchi in kumpipa leh Haman kumpinu Esther toh an nekna ah ahong uhi.
