17007002	Uain adawn lai un ani nih ni in kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna, kumpinu Esther? Ahon phalsak ding uh bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat leng piak in na om ding,” achi hi.
17007003	Huchi in Esther kumpinu'n adawng a, “Aw kumpipa, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa kipahna ahihleh, ka thumna ah ka hinna leh ka mite hinna piak in om hen:
17007004	Zuak in ka omta ua, kei leh ka mite, hihgawp a om ding in, thah a om ding in leh hihmang ding in. Sikhapa ding leh sikhanu ding a zuak a om hi le ung zaw, melma in kumpipa siatna gun bawl theita kei mahleh, dai dide ding hi veng in,” achi hi.
17007005	Kumpipa Ahasueras in thu agen a, kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Kua ahia, koi a om ahia, huchibang a lungtang sung a tum ngam?” achi hi.
17007006	Esther in, “Melma leh gal, hiai giloupa Haman mah,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa leh kumpinu ma ah Haman alauta hi.
17007007	Huchi in uain dawnkhamna a kipan aheh ziak in kumpipa adingkhia a, inpi huansung ah alut a; huchi in kumpinu Esther kiang a ahinna ngen ding in Haman adingh hi; kumpipa'n asiatna ding in hoih lou a tup a-om chih lah athei ngal a.
17007008	Kumpipa Kulhpi huan a kipan uain an nekna mun ah ahong kik a; huchi in Esther omna tutphah nem tung ah Haman apuk hi. Kumpipa'n, “Inn sung a ka ma a kumpinu nangawn sual ding ahi hia?” achi hi. Kumpipa kam a thupawt bang in, Haman maitang atuamsakta uhi.
17007009	Huai lai in kumpipa ma a om zel michilgehte lak a khat, Harbonah in, “En un, Haman in Mordekai, kumpipa gum a thugenpa a dia abawl, khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang, Haman inn ah adingh hi,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Huai ah amah khailum un,” achi hi.
17007010	Huchi in Mordekai a dia abawlkholhsak khailupna khuam ah Haman akhailumta uhi. Huchi in kumpipa thangpaihna adaita hi.
17008001	Huai ni in kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang ah Judate melmapa Haman inn apia hi. Kumpipa ma ah Mordekai ahong a; Esther in amah a ding in kua ahia chih agen khinta hi.
17008002	Huchi in kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Haman a kipan alak, Mordekai kiang ah apeta hi. Esther in Haman inkote tung ah Mordekai akoihta hi.
17008003	Esther in kumpipa ma ah thu agen lai a, akhebul a puk in, Agag mi Haman gilou bawl leh Judate siatna ding a alunggel khitsa a lunggelna koihmang ding in khitui toh amah angen ngutngut hi.
17008004	Huchi in kumpipa'n Esther lam ah adangka-eng kumpi chiang alen a. Huchi in Esther athou a kumpipa ma ah adingh hi.
17008005	Ama'n, “Kumpipa lungkimna ahih a, amitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa ma a thil dik a alat a, amuh a lungkimhuai ka hihleh, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman in laikhak abawlte kumpipa bial a om Judate hihsiatna ding a agelh sut in om hen.
17008006	Huchi lou in ka mite tung a gilou tung ding ke'n bangchi in ka en ngam dia? Ahihkeileh ka tanaute siatna bangchi in ka mu ngam dia?” achi hi.
17008007	Kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang leh Juda mi Mordekai kiang ah, “Ngai un, Judate tung a akhut akhak ziak in, Haman inkote leh khailupna khuam a akhailuppa uh amah Esther kiang ah apeta hi.
17008008	Na deih bang in, kumpipa min in, kumpipa zungbuh a sawn in, Judate kiang ah leng lai gelh un; kumpipa min a lai kigelh, kumpipa zungbuh a kisawn peuhmah, mi kuamah in ahihlamdang thei ngal kei a,” achi hi.
17008009	Huchi in kumpipa laigelhmite asam ua, akha thumna Sivan kha a, ani sawmnih-le-thum ni in; Judate tungtang thu Mordekai in thu apiak bang in gam heutute kiang leh India a kipan Ethiopia pha a om bialte ukpipate leh vaihawmte, bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih, huai a kigelhdan bang zel a bial chiteng kiang, mi chih apau uh dungzui zel in, alaigelh uh bang zel a Judate, apau uh bang zel in akiang uah gelh in a-omta hi.
17008010	Kumpipa Ahasueras min in agelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in asawn a, kumpipa nasepna a kizangsek sakol man-gang, hoihtak a vulhte a tuang in sakol tung ah dak in laikhakte akhakta hi.
17008011	Huai ah kumpipa'n khopi chiteng a om Judate kikhawmkhawm a, ahinna ua dia pang a, amaute sual ding a anau neute uleh anumeite uh, asum uh gallak a la ding a kisa mite leh bial thilhihtheihna hihse ding leh mangthangsak ding in phalna apia hi.
17008012	Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng ah ni khat in, huai bel, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha ahi a, ani sawm-le-thum ni geih in.
17008013	Bial chih a piak ding chi a thupiak, kigelh a teisawn mite tengteng kiang ah suah in a-om a, huai ni chiang a Judate'n amelmate uh tung a phu la dia mansa a a-om chiat theihna ding un.
17008014	Huchi in dak kumpipa nasepna a zat sakol man-gangte tung a tuangte apaikhia ua, kumpipa thupiak in amau anoh in akhawksak ngal ua; thupiak pen Susa Inpi a piakkhiak ahi.
17008015	Huchi in Mordekai bel kumpi puandum leh kang, dangka-eng lallukhu thupitak toh, puanaktual puanmalngat hoih leh sandup toh kumpipa ma a kipan apaikheta hi: Susa khopi akikou a, akipak hi.
17008016	Huchi in Judate'n kouzanna leh kipahna, nopna leh zahna anei uhi.
17008017	Bial chih leh khopi chih a koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl paina peuh ah, Judate'n ankuangluina leh ni hoih kipahna leh nopna anei uhi. Huchi in gam a mite lak a tampite Judate ahong hi ua; Judate launa lah atung uah ahong omta hi.
17009001	Huan akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha, huai mah ani sawm-le-thum ni, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tangtunna ding ahong nai lai in, Judate melmate'n atung ua vaihawmna neih akilamet ni uh; hinapi a, ahilou lam a hong kilehbut a, Judate'n amau mudahte tung a vaihawmna ahon neih lai un;
17009002	Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng akhopite uah Judate, amau siatna zongte tung a khut kha ding in, akikhawmkhawm ua: kuamah in lah amaute anangzou kei uhi; mite tengteng tung ah lah amaute launa ahong omta hi.
17009003	Huchi in bialte a vaihawmte leh gamuk mite leh ukpipate leh kumpipa nasemte'n, Judate apanpih ua; Mordekai launa lah atung uah ahong om ngal a.
17009004	Kumpipa' inn ah Mordekai athupi a, bial tengteng ah amin athangkheta hi: hiai mipa Mordekai lah ahong thupi semsem hi.
17009005	Huchi in namsau a sat in Judate'n amelmate tengteng athat ua, thahna leh hihsiatna in, amaute mudahte tung ah ahih ding uh ahihta uhi.
17009006	Susa Inpi ah Judate'n mi zanga athat ua ahihgawp uhi.
17009007	Parsandatha, Dalphon, Aspatha,
17009008	Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha,
17009009	Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai, Vajezathate,
17009010	Judate melmapa Hammedatha tapa Haman tapate, athat ua; himahleh gallak ah akhut uh anga kei uhi.
17009011	Huai ni in Susa Inpi a thah a om zah kumpipa ma ah ahon tawi uhi.
17009012	Huan kumpipa'n kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Judate'n Susa Inpi sung ah mi zanga athat ua ahihsia uh, Haman tapa sawmte toh; kumpipa bial dangte ah bang achi bawlta phet ding uam ah: Khai le, bang ahia na nget? Na kiang ah phal ahi ding; ahihkeileh bang ngetbeh na nei lai a? Suk pichin ahi ding,” achi hi.
17009013	Esther in, “Kumpipa' lungkimna ahihleh, zingchiang a tuni a thupiak bangbang a gamtang ding in Susa a om Judate phal inla, Haman tapa sawmte khailupna khuam ah kikhai le uh,” achi hi.
17009014	Huchi in huchibang a hih ahi ding chi in kumpipa'n thu apia hi: Susa ah thubawl akipekhia a: huchi in Haman tapa sawmte akhaita uhi.
17009015	Adar kha mah ani sawm-le-li ni in Susa a om Judate akikhawmkhawm ua, Susa ah mi zathum athat uh; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uhi.
17009016	Huchi in kumpipa bialte a om Juda dangte akikhawmkhawm ua, ahinna uh ahum ua, amelmate ua kipan khawlna anei ua, amau mudahte lak ah mi singsagih-le-sangnga athat ua; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uh.
17009017	Adar kha ani sawm-le-thum ni in hiai tuh hih ahi; huai mah ani sawm-le-li ni in akhawl ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi.
17009018	Himahleh Susa a om Judate akikhawm ua, ani sawm-le-thum ni in leh ani sawm-le-li ni in; huai mah ani sawm-le-nga ni in akhawlta ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi.
17009019	Huaiziak in khoneute a Judate, kho kulhbaang nei lou a tengte'n, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li ni kipahna ni leh ankuanglui ni in, ni hoih, khat-le-khat tantuan kikhaktuahna ni in azang uhi.
17009020	Huan Mordekai in hiai thilte agelh a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng a om Judate, gamla leh nai a omte kiang ah akhak hi.
17009021	Kum teng a, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li leh ani sawm-le-nga ni, kum teng a tan ding ahilhna ding in,
17009022	Judate amelmate ua kipan akhawl ni uh, amau a dia lungkhamna kipahna ahong hihna kha, misi suunna ni hoih ahong hihna kha bang in: huai nite ankuangluina leh kipahna ni a a-om ua, tantuante khat-le-khat akikhaktuah uhi; gentheite kiang a thilpiakte piakna aneihtheihna ding un.
17009023	Huchi in Judate'n apatkhitsa bang un leh Mordekai in amaute kiang a agelh khitsa bang in hih ding in atheisiam uhi.
17009024	Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Juda tengteng melmapa'n Juda tengteng siatna ding amau hihse ding, angaihtuah a, amaute hihgawp ding leh amaute hihse ding a, Pur, (huai tuh aisan ahi) ana paih ziak in.
17009025	Himahleh athu kumpipa ma ahong tun in, angaihtuah gilou, Judate siatna ding a angaihtuah, ama lutung mahmah a kibung ding in laikhakte in thu apeta a; huchi a amah leh atapate khailupna khuam a khai a a-omna ding un.
17009026	Huchibang ahih ziak in hiai nite Pur min zui in Purim asa uhi. Huaiziak in hiai laikhak thute tengteng ziak leh hiai thu tungtang thu amuhsa uh, atung ua ahong tun ziak in.
17009027	Judate'n ahihkip ua, amau tung leh asuante uh tung leh amaute huchibang akizomkhawm bangte tengteng tung ah akisuanta uhi, huchi a pel lou a, huai a laigelh dungzui leh huai a hun sehsa dungzui a, kum chiteng a hiai ni nihte atantheihna ding un.
17009028	Huchi a hiai nite akhang-akhang a, a-inkuankuan a, bial chiteng leh khopi chiteng atheihgigeleh tan a a-omtheihna ding in; huchi a hiai Purim nite Judate lak a kipan a azuau louh a, huaite theihgigena leng asuante uh a kipan amanlouhna ding in.
17009029	Huchi in kumpinu Esther, Abihail tanu leh Juda mi Mordekai in, hiai Purim laikhak nihna sukkipna ding in thuneihna tengteng in agelhta uhi.
17009030	Judate tengteng kiang ah, Ahasueras gam a bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagihte kiang ah, lungmuanna leh thutak thute, laikhakte akhakta hi.
17009031	Hiai Purim nite a hun asehsa uh, Juda mi Mordekai leh kumpinu Esther in huaite pha asak uh dungzui leh amau a ding leh asuante uh a dia, an ngawlna leh akahna thu ua ana hihkip bang ua hihkip ding in.
17009032	Esther thupiak in hiai Purim thute ahihkip a; laibu ah kigelh ahita hi.
17010001	Huan kumpipa Ahasueras in gam tung leh tuipi tuikulh gam tung ah siah abawlta hi.
17010002	Huchi in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna thilhihte tengteng leh Mordekai, kumpipa'n amah akoihsanna, letna genna kim, Media leh Persia kumpipate chiamtehna laibu a gelh ahi kei uh maw?
17010003	Juda mi Mordekai, kumpipa zom a Judate lak a lian ahi, a-u anau mi tampi in apom uh ahi. Ama'n mite hoihna ding zong a nasem achipihte tengteng kiang ah lemna thu agen hi.
18001001	Uz gam ah mi khat a-om a, amin Job ahi; amah mihoihkim leh tang ahi a, Pathian kihta a, hoih lou mudah ahi.
18001002	Ama'n tapa sagih leh tanu thum anei hi.
18001003	Aneih-le-lam leng belam sangsagih, sangawngsau sangthum, bawngtal zanga leh sabiltungnu zanga leh inkuan thupi mahmah ahi, huchi in hiai mipa suahlam tate tengteng lak a thupipen ahi.
18001004	Huan atapate akuan ua khat chiat inn ah, ani ni in ankuangluina anei ua; huchi in mi asawl ua asanggam numei thumte uh amau kiang a ne ding leh dawn ding in asamsak uhi.
18001005	Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-ankuanglui san laitak un, Job in mi asawl a amaute ahihsiangthou a, zingsang beltak in athou a, avek ua zah dungzui in halmang thillatte alan a: Job in, “Ka tapate'n thil ahihkhial un, alungtang un Pathian ahamsiat kha ding uh,” achi hi. Hichibang in Job in ahih gige hi.
18001006	Huchi in Toupa ma a Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om a, alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi.
18001007	Huchi in Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia?” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Leitung langkhat langkhat tawn a, asung a sukvak-touvak ka hi,” achi hi.
18001008	Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a,” achi hi.
18001009	Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Bangmah lou dia Job in Pathian kihta ahi maw?
18001010	Amah kimvel in, a-inn kimvel in leh aneih tengteng kimvel in, ning chiteng ah umna na bawl kei maw? Akhut nasep na vualzawl a, gamsung ah aneih-le-lam apung hi.
18001011	Himahleh tu in na khut zankhia inla, aneih tengteng khoih in, huchi in na maitang ah nang ahon gense mai ding hi,” achi hi.
18001012	Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, aneih tengteng nang thu ahi; amah mah tung ah kia na khut kha ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan akuankhia hi.
18001013	Huan atapate leh atanute'n a-unaupa uh upapen inn a ne a uain adawn ni uh a-om a,
18001014	Job kiang ah sawltak khat hong pai in, “Bawngtalte'n lei alet ua, sabiltungte akiang ah agamta ua,
18001015	Sheba mite'n amau adelh ua, apimang uh; ahi, namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi.
18001016	Huchi a thu agen lai in midang khat leng ahong a, “Van a kipan in Pathian mei akia a, belamte leh sikhate akangmang a, amau akangtum hi; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi.
18001017	Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat ahong lai a, “Kaldai mite'n pawl thum abawl ua, sangawngsaute adelh ua, apimang uh, huan namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi.
18001018	Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat mah ahong a, “Na tapate leh na tanute'n a-unaupa upapen inn a anek ua uain adawn lai un,
18001019	ngai in gamdai a kipan in huih thupi ahong nung a, huai inn ning lite ahon nuai a, tangvalte tung ah achim a, asi uh: huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi.
18001020	Huchi in Job athou a, apuanaktual abotkek a, asam ametsiang a, leitual kidenna in anei a, Pathian abeta hi.
18001021	Ama'n, “Ka nu sul a kipan vuaktang in ka hong a, huan vuaktang in ka kik ding, Toupa'n apia a, huan Toupa'n alamangta; Toupa min phat in om hen,” achi hi.
18001022	Hiai tengteng ah Job in ahihkhial kei a, haihuaitak in Pathian leng amohsa kei hi.
18002001	Toupa Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om nawn a, huan Toupa ma a kilak ding in alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi.
18002002	Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia?” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Leitung langkhat langkhat tawn a, asung a sukvak-touvak ka hi,” achi hi.
18002003	Huan Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a; ama siatna ding in hon tangsak mah lechin, aginomna alen tinten hi,” achi hi.
18002004	Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Vun sik in vun, ahi, mihing in aneih tengteng hinna sik in ape ding hi.
18002005	Himahleh tu in na khut kha inla, aguh leh asa khoih lechin, na maitang ah nang hon gense ding hi,” achi hi.
18002006	Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, amah na khut ah a-om hi; ahinna lel hawi in,” achi hi.
18002007	Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan apawtkhia a, meimatum in akhepek nuai a kipan aluzang tan in Job agawt hi.
18002008	Huchi in ama'n kikhuatna ding in belpei ala a; meivu lak ah atu hi.
18002009	Huai lai in azi in akiang ah, “Na ginomna len tinten lailai na hi hia? Pathian gensia inla, si in,” achi hi.
18002010	Himahleh akiang ah, “Numei hai thugente lak a khat bang in thu na gen a. Bang ahia? Pathian khut ah hoih i mu dia, hoih lou leng i mu kei dia hia?” achi hi. Hiai tengteng ah Job in amuk in thil ahihkhial kei hi.
18002011	Huchi a Job lawm thumte'n atung a hiai hoih lou hong tung tengteng azak un, michih ama mun a kipan in ahong ua: Teman mi Eliphaz, Shuah mi Bildad leh Naaman mi Zophar, amah kah ding leh amah lungmuan ding in hohkhawm ding in hun seh abawl uhi.
18002012	Huchi a gamlapi a pan adaktouh uleh, amah athei kei ua, nakpi in akikoukhia ua, akapta uhi. Apuanaktual uh michih in abotkek ua, alutang uah van lam ah leivui akibuak uhi.
18002013	Huchi in akiang ah leitual ah ni sagih leh zan sagih atu ua, akiang ah kuamah in thu khat leng agen kei uh; alungkhamna anasa mahmah chih amu uhi.
18003001	Hiai khit in Job in akam aka a, ani ahamsiat hi.
18003002	Job in adawng a, hichi in achi.
18003003	“Ka pian ni leh zan, pasal naupang pai in a-om, akichihna mangthang hen.
18003004	Huai ni mialna hi hen; tunglam a kipan Pathian in ngaihsak kei hen, atung ah leng khovak tang kei hen.
18003005	Khomial leh sihna lim in amau a ding in huai ngen uhen; atung ah meipi kai hen; khua nimsak tengteng in huai tuh lausak uhen.
18003006	“Zan ahihleh, mial sah bikbek atung ah tu hen; kum nite lak ah telsak kei hen; khate simna ah tel kei heh.
18003007	Ngai in, huai zan hut henla; huai ah kipah aw ging kei hen.
18003008	Huai ni hamsiatte amau hamsiat uhen, Leviathan tokthou ding a mansa a omte.
18003009	Huai a khomui aksite mial uhen; khovak zong henla, himahleh bangmah nei kei hen; zingsang mitvunte leng mu sam kei hen.
18003010	Ka nu sul kongkhakte akhak louh ziak in, ka mit a kipan abuaina asel louh ziak in.
18003011	“Sul a kipan bangziak a si lou ka hia? Gil a kipan ka hong paikhiak lai a bangziak a kha khah lou ka hia?
18003012	Bangziak a khukte'n kei hon dom ahia? Ahihkeileh bangziak a ka tep ding nawi na om ahia?
18003013	Tu a na lum khin a, na dai mai ding lah ka hi ngal a; ka na ihmuta dia; huchi in ka na khawlta ding hi.
18003014	Lei kumpipate leh thudot mite, amau a ding a mun sia bawlte toh.
18003015	Ahihkeileh dangka-eng nei kumpite, a-innte uh dangka a dimsakte toh.
18003016	Ahihkeileh muh louh a ahun lou a piang bang na hilou ka hia, naungek khovak mu ngeiloute bang?
18003017	Huai ah migiloute'n sukbuai atawpsan ua; huai ah mitawlte akhawl uhi.
18003018	Huai ah salmatte nuam in a-omkhawm uh; nasem heutute aw aza kei uhi.
18003019	Huai ah aneu leh alian a-om ua; apu a kipan in sikha anuamlen.
18003020	“Bangziak a dah a omte kiang a khovak piak ahia, kha a haksa sa kiang ah hinna;
18003021	Sihna deih a, atunlouhnate kiang ah; gou selguk zon sang a thupi a zong mite kiang ah.
18003022	Han atun lai ua, nakpitak a kipakte kiang ah?
18003023	Bangziak a mi alampi sel a om kiang leh Pathian in a-umsuak kiang a khovak piak a om ahia?
18003024	An ka nek ma in ka thumna ahong tung a, ka maunate tui bang a leihbuak in a-om hi.
18003025	Ka kihtak thil lah ka tung ah ahong tung ngal a, ka laulau ka tung ah ahong tung hi.
18003026	Nuam ka sa kei a, ka lung amuang kei, khawlna leng ka nei kei hi; himahleh buaina ahong pai hi.”
18004001	Huai lai in Eliphaz, Teman mi in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18004002	“Mi'n nang hon houlimpih tumleh na zadah diam? Himahleh pau lou in kua a-om thei dia?
18004003	Ngai in, mi tampi na hilhta a, khut hatloute na hihhatta hi.
18004004	Apuk lai in na thute'n adingsak a, khuk hatloute na kipsak hi.
18004005	Himahleh tu in na tung ah ahong tung a, na bah a; nang ahon khoih a, na buaita hi.
18004006	Pathian na kihtakna, na muanna hilou hia, na lametna na lampite muanhuaina?
18004007	Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi, hoih hinapi a, mangthang ngei kua ahia? Ahihkeileh koi lai ah ahia midik satkhiak a a-om?
18004008	Kei muh in, thulimlouhna lei lette ahi ua, buaina tuh a huai mah atte.
18004009	Pathian hu in amangthang ua, hehna a mut a hihmang in a-om uhi.
18004010	Humpinelkai humham leh, humpinelkai hangsan aw leh, humpinelkai tuailai hate, akitanta hi.
18004011	Samat taksap ziak in humpinelkai tek amangthang a, huan humpinelkaipi noute adalhzak uhi.
18004012	“Tu in aguk in thil ka kiang a hong tung ka bil in huai a huauna asangta hi.
18004013	Zan mengmuhna a kipan angaihtuahnate ah, mite nakpitak a a-ihmut san lai un,
18004014	ka tung ah launa ahong tung a, linna in ka guhte tengteng asing hi.
18004015	Huai lai in ka mai ah kha apai a; ka chimul adinghta hi.
18004016	Ka dingh kinken a, himahleh huai a kilatdan ka theikak theita kei a; alim tuh ka mit ma ah a-om a; daihna a-om a, aw ka za hi,
18004017	Pathian sang in sithei mihing dikzaw ding hia? Abawlpa sang in mihing siangthouzaw ding hia? chi in.
18004018	Ngai in, asikhate ah muanna akoih kei a; angelte hai in angoh hi:
18004019	Tungman inn a teng amaute hi sem na un chia, asuangphum leivui a om a, leikha ma a chimsia.
18004020	Zingsang leh nitak kikal in hihsiat in a-om ua; theih louh hial in tangtawn in amangthang uhi.
18004021	Amau sung a apuanin khau uh bohkhiak touh hilou hia? Pilna tel lou in asi uhi.”
18005001	“Tu in sam in; nang hon dawng kua a-om a? Misiangthoute lak ah akua lam na nga dia?
18005002	Lungzinna in lah mihai athat a, huan thikna in mimawl athat sek hi.
18005003	Mihai zungkai ka muta a; himahleh thakhat in atenna ka hamsiat hi.
18005004	Bitna a kipan gamlapi ah atate a-om ua, kongpi ah hihgawp in a-om uh, kuamah amaute hunkhe ding a-om kei uhi.
18005005	Agilkial in ling lak a kipan nangawn a-an kaihkhawm agaihsak a, suamhat in aneih-le-lam anawmvalhsak hi.
18005006	Gimthuakna leivui a kipan in ahong pawt kei a, lei a kipan in buaina leng ahong dawnkhe sam kei hi.
18005007	Himahleh mihing buai ding mah apiang ahi, mei-ekte atoulen bang in.
18005008	“Himahleh ke'n ahihleh, Pathian lam ah ka zong ding a, Pathian kiang ah ka thu ka koih ding hi.
18005009	Thil thupite hihpa leh zonkhiak theih louh; sim zoh louh thillamdangte,
18005010	leitung a vuah pepa leh, loute tung a tui sawlpa.
18005011	Huchi in ama'n aniamsate tungsang ah akoihtou a; misi suunte muanna ah atawisang hi.
18005012	Zekhem hatte lunggelte bangmah lou asuaksak a, huchi in akhutte un athiltup uh ahihthei kei uhi.
18005013	Mipilte akhemhatna un aman a, mihoihloute thilgel athalpaihsak hi.
18005014	Sun lai in khomialna athuak ua, zan lai bang in suntang lai in amai maimah uhi.
18005015	Himahleh ama'n gentheite mihatte kam leh khut a kipan leh tasamte mahmah namsau a kipan ahondam hi.
18005016	Huchi in mizawng in lametna anei a, thulimlouhna in akam ahumsak hi.
18005017	“Ngai in, Pathian in abawlhoih mi in nuam asa hi; huaiziak in Bangkim hihthei sawina musit ke'n.
18005018	Ama'n lah meima abawl a, atuam a, aliamsak a, akhut in adamsak hi.
18005019	Buaina guk ah ahon suaktasak ding a; ahi, sagih ah gilou in nang ahon khoih kei ding hi.
18005020	Kial chiang in nang sihna a kipan ahon tan ding; namsau thilhihtheihna a kipan, kidou chiang in.
18005021	Kam sung a leizepna a kipan ahon sel ding a; siatna ahong tun chiang in na lau sam kei ding hi.
18005022	Siatna leh kialna ah na nui ding a, lei gamsate na kihta kei ding hi.
18005023	Gam a suangte toh na kithuahtheih ding ziak un; huan gam a gamsate nang toh na kituak ding uhi.
18005024	“Na puanin muang in a-om chih na thei ding a; na ganhuang na veh ding a, bangmah kim lou a-om kei ding hi.
18005025	Na chite leng athupi ding a, na suante lei a loupa bang in a-om ding uh chih na thei ding hi.
18005026	Kum ching in na hankhuk na zuan ding a, ahun a buhlak a-om bang in.
18005027	Ngai in, hiai thu i zongta ua, adik mah ahi, za in na hoihna ding in thei in.”
18006001	Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18006002	“Aw ka lungzinna kibuk thei hi henla, ka tuahsiatna selbukna ah kikoihkhawm thei hileh!
18006003	Tu in tuipite a piaunel sang in agikzaw ding: huaiziak in ka thugente leng akhauh hi.
18006004	Bangkim hihthei thalte lah ka sung ah a-om ngal a, agu uh huai a kipan a ka kha in adawnvek; kei dou ding in Pathian mulkimhuainate akivual uhi.
18006005	“Anek ding loupa mu, gam sabiltung aham a hia? Ahihkeileh gan an mu bawngtal aham a hia?
18006006	Chi tel lou in gim nei lou akine thei dia hia? Ahihkeileh aktuida ah limna mawngmawng a-om a hia?
18006007	Ka kha in amaute akhoih nuam kei; kei a ding in an kihhuai bang ahi uhi.
18006008	“Aw ka nget tang thei leng zaw; ka thil deih Pathian in hon phalleh zaw.
18006009	Kei hon hihgawp ding in Pathian deihlam hi lai henla; akhut zan in, kei hon satkhe maileh.
18006010	Huchi in lungmuanna ka nei lai dia; ahi, damlou natna ah ka kipak ding hi; Mi Siangthou thute ka kitheihmohbawl ngal kei a.
18006011	Ka hatna bang ahia, ka ngak ding? Huan ka beina bang ahia, ka kuhkal ding?
18006012	Ka hatna suangte hatna hi hia? Ahihkeileh ka sa dalsik hia?
18006013	Kei ah panpihna a-om het kei a, kei a kipan theihsiamna hawlmang in.
18006014	“Bah dia mansa a om kiang ah alawm in siamna a-etsak ding ahi kei maw; huchi lou in Bangkim hihthei kihtakna tawpsan ahi kei ding maw.
18006015	Luita bang in ka unaute alepchiah uh; luita mangthang luanna bang in.
18006016	Huai tui khal ziak a vom a; huai a vukkhal akisel.
18006017	Alum hun chiang in atuimang ua, asat chiang in amun ua kipan amangthang uhi.
18006018	Huai lampi a khualzinte apial ua, bangmah omlouhna mun ah apaitou ua, amangthang uh.
18006019	Tema khualzinte'n azong ua, Sheba pawlte'n alamen uh.
18006020	Akilamet hang un azahlak uh; huai lam ah ava pai ua azahlak uh.
18006021	Tu in bangmah na hi ngal kei ua; mulkimhuaina na mu ua, na lau uhi.
18006022	Kei hon pia un? Ahihkeileh na neih-le-lam ua kipan in kei a ding in thilpiak lan un, ka chi hia?
18006023	Ahihkeileh, melma khut a pan hon tan un, mihat khut a pan hon hukhia un ka chi hia?
18006024	“Hon sinsak in, huan ka dai ding: ka diklouhna hon theisiamsak un.
18006025	Thudikna thute hat hi nah e: himahleh miselna in bang aselphou a?
18006026	Thute selphou ding a um na hi uhia? Chimoh mi thugente huih bang ahi chih thei in.
18006027	Ahi, pa neiloute tung ah ai na san ua, na lawm uh sumsinna van in na bawl uh.
18006028	Tu in hehpih in hon en un; na ma uah thuzuau ka gen kei a.
18006029	Kik nawn un ka hon ngen ahi, diklouhna om kei hen; ahi, kik nawn un, ka thu adik ahi.
18006030	Ka lei ah diklouhna a-om hia? Ka lei in thil hoih lou atheikak thei kei dia hia?”
18007001	“Leitung ah mihing a ding in kidouna a-om kei maw? Anite kilohmi nite bang ahi kei a hia?
18007002	Limliap deih mahmah sikha bang in, aloh lamen kilohmi bang in.
18007003	Huai bang in bangmah lou khate nei ding a bawl ka hi, huan kei a ding in zan chimhuaite seh ahi.
18007004	Ka lup chiang in, chikchiang in ka thou dia? ka chi a; himahleh zan asawt hi; lehlam lehlam ah nisuah matan kilumlet in ka om hi.
18007005	Ka sa than leh leivui khal in atuam a; ka vun kimat in apuakkham hi.
18007006	Ka nite siamganmi khohthei sang in akinzaw a, lametna bei a zatbei ahi.
18007007	“Aw ka hinna huih ahi chih theigige in; ka mit in hoih amu nawn kei ding hi.
18007008	Kei hon mu mit in ahon en thei nawnta kei ding a; ka tung ah na mitte a-om ding ua himahleh ka omta kei ding hi.
18007009	Meipi mangthang a-om nawn louh bang in, huchi in kuapeuh Sheol a paisuk ahong paitou nawnta kei uhi.
18007010	A-inn ah akik nawn kei ding a, amun in amah athei nawn kei ding hi.
18007011	Huaiziak in ka kam ka khou kei ding a; ka lungsim gimna ah thu ka gen ding; haksatna ah ka kha ka phun ding hi.
18007012	“Tuipi ka hi hia, ahihkeileh tua tuipi ngapi lian ka hi a hia, huchi a kei na hon chin nak?
18007013	Ka lupna in hon lungmuan ding a, ka tutna nem in ka phunna azangkhaisak ding, ka chih chiang in.
18007014	Huai chiang in mang in na hon lausak a, mengmuhna in na hon mulkimsak hi.
18007015	Huchi in ka kha in heklup leh sihna atel a, hiai ka guhte sang in.
18007016	Ka hinna ka chimtak a; ka hing gige kei ding, hon omsak maimai un; ka nite lah bangmah lou ahi ngal a.
18007017	“Mihing bang ahia, hichi tel a na pahtawi ding a, amah tung a na lungtang na koih ding?
18007018	Zingsang teng a amah na veh a, mitphiat kal chih a amah na ettel ding?
18007019	Bang tan vei kei hon lehngatsan lou ding na hia, bang tan vei ka chil ka nawmvalh matan hon omsak maimai lou ding na hia?
18007020	Na khial hi taleng, na tung ah bang ka hih a, Aw mite chingpa nangmah? Bangziak a nang a dia chiamtehna bang a hon koih na hia, huchi a keimah a dia puakgik ka hih maimah?
18007021	Bangziak a ka tatlekna ngaidam lou a, ka thulimlouhna lamang lou oi? Kei tu in leivui a lum ding ka hi a; kuhkaltak in na hon zong dia, himahleh ka omta kei ding hi.”
18008001	Huchi in Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18008002	“Bang tan hiai thilte gen ding na hia? Bang tan na kam a thute huih hat bang ding ahi ua?
18008003	Pathian in vaihawmna ahekkawi a hia? Ahihkeileh Bangkim hihthei in dikna ahekkawi ahia?
18008004	Atung ah na tate akhial ua, huai tatlekna ziak a akhut a amaute apikhiakleh,
18008005	Pathian lam kuhkaltak a na zon a, huai Bangkim hihthei kiang a na thilnget na bawlleh;
18008006	Na sianthou a na dikleh; nang ziak in tu in ka khanglou dia, na diktatna omna alohchingsak ding hi.
18008007	Na kipatna neu mahleh, na tawpna nanung lam nakpi in athupi ding hi.
18008008	“Huaiziak in ka hon ngen hi, hun masa thu kan inla, apipute un ana zonkhiak uh lam ah kisuk in.
18008009	Ei lah zan a lel i hi ua, bangmah i thei kei uh, leitung ah i nite uh lah limliap ahi a.
18008010	Amaute'n nang ahon sinsak un, ahon hilh un, alungtang ua kipan in thute agen kei ding ua hia?
18008011	Buannawi lou in phaiphek akhangkhe thei a hia? Tui lou in loupa akhangthei a hia?
18008012	Hing a om a, satpuk louh ahih lai in, loupa dangte ma in avuai nak hi.
18008013	Huai bang mah in Pathian mangngilhte tengteng lampi ahi; Pathian limsakloumi lametna amangthang ding:
18008014	Amuanna akitan ding a, akingakna maimomlen ahi hi.
18008015	A-inn tung ah akingai dia, himahleh adingh kei ding; huai ah alen tinten ding a, himahleh apang sawt kei ding hi.
18008016	“Nisuah ma in ahing a, ahuan ah aselte amengkhia uhi.
18008017	Azungte leivum kim ah azam ua, suangte omna mun ah ahing hi.
18008018	Amun a kipan lakmang hileh, huchi in amah akitheihmohbawl ding a, Ka hon mu ngei kei, chi in.
18008019	Ngai in, hiai alampi kipahna ahi a, lei a kipan adangte ahong suak ding uh.
18008020	Ngai in, Pathian in mihoihkim apaikhe kei ding, gilou hih mite leng atungding sam kei ding hi.
18008021	Na kam nuih in ahon dimsak lai dia, na mukte kikouna in.
18008022	Hon mudahte zumna in akhuh ding a; gilou puanin a-omta kei ding hi.”
18009001	Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18009002	“Chihtaktak in huchi ahi chih ka thei hi, himahleh Pathian lak ah mihing bangchi in adik thei dia?
18009003	Amah kiselpih a-utlam ahihleh, sangkhat lak a khatvei zong amah adawng thei kei ding hi.
18009004	Amah lungtang in apil a, hatna in thil ahihthei ahi, amah dou in kua akikhauhsak in, alohchingta a oi?
18009005	“Mualte asuan a, athei kei ua, heh a amaute alumleh lai in.
18009006	Amun a kipan in lei asing a, huan huai a khuamte aling uhi.
18009007	Nisa thu apia a, asuak kei; aksite abilhkhum ngiungiau hi.
18009008	Amah kia'n vante aphalhkhia a, tuipi kihot tung ah apai hi.
18009009	Ama'n Zangkhua, Zuheisuktun, Siguk leh simlam aksi munte abawl hi.
18009010	Ama'n sui theih vual louh thil thupite sim zoh louh thillamdangte ahih hi.
18009011	“Ngai in, ka kiang ah apai a, amah ka mu kei, apai lailai a, himahleh amah ka mu kei hi.
18009012	Ngai in, alamang a, amah kua'n akham thei dia? Bang hih na hia? Kua'n akiang ah achi dia?
18009013	Pathian in ahehna alakik kei ding; Rahab panpih mite amah nuai ah akun petmah uhi.
18009014	Bangchi phet a tawmzaw in amah ka dawng in, amah toh ngaihtuah ding in ka thute ka telkhe dia hia?
18009015	Diktat himah leng amah ka dawng kei ding hi; ka thukhentu kiang ah thilngetna ka bawl thei lel ding hi.
18009016	“Amah sam in hon dawng mahleh; ka aw angaikhia chih ka um kei ding hi.
18009017	Huihpi in ahon kitamsak a, asan om lou in ka liamnate apungsak hi.
18009018	Ka nak ahon phal kei a, himahleh thangpaihna in hon dimsak hi.
18009019	Hatna thu gen leng, ngai in, Amah ahat hi, vaihawmna thu, kua'n hun ahon pe dia?
18009020	Kidiktatsak leng, ka kam mah in ahon mohpaih hi, hoihkim ka hi, kichi taleng, hoih lou in ahon telsak ding hi.
18009021	Hoihkim mah leng, ka kilimsak kei; ka hinna ka musit hi.
18009022	“Akibang ahi vek a; huaiziak in ke'n, hoihkim leh gilou ahihse tuak, ka chi hi.
18009023	Jepna in thakhat in thatleh, mihoih thuakna anuihsan ding hi.
18009024	Lei migilou khut a piak a a-om chiang in huai a vaihawmte amaituam a; amah ahihkeileh, kua ahita dia?
18009025	Tu in ka nite laihawmmi sang in akinzaw a ataimang ua, hoih amu kei uh.
18009026	Long kinte bang in apaimang ua, muvanlai samat tung a ngumkiak bang in.
18009027	Ka phunna ka mangngilh dia, ka mel lungkham ka pai dia, ka kipak ding, chi leng.
18009028	“Ka lungkhamna tengteng ka lau a, hoih na hon sa kei ding chih ka thei hi.
18009029	Mohpaih in ka om dia; bangziak a athawn a semgim ka hia?
18009030	Vuk tui in kisil in, ka khutte siangsak kei leng;
18009031	Hinapi in phaizang ah na hon pailut dia, keimah puante'n ahon kih ding uhi.
18009032	“Kei bang in amah lah mihing ahi kei a, amah ka dawn theih a, vaihawmna a ka hohkhawm theihna ding un.
18009033	Ka kikal uah kou gel hon mattheihna ding in, thulai genmi a-om kei hi.
18009034	Kei a pan in achiang lamang henla akihtakhuaina in kei hon lausak kei hen.
18009035	Huai chiang in thu ka gen dia, amah ka lau kei ding: keimah ah huchibang ka hi ngal kei hi.”
18010001	“Ka kha in ka hinna achimtak a, ka utdan dan in ka phun ding; ka kha thangpaihna in thu ka gen ding.
18010002	Pathian kiang ah, Hon mohpaih ke'n; bangziak a hon kinakpih na hia hon theisak in, ka chi ding hi.
18010003	Na nuaisiah nang a dia hoih ahi maw, na khutte thilhih na muhsit a, giloute thugen tung a na maitai?
18010004	Sa mitte nei na hi hia, ahihkeileh mihing muh bang amu na hi hia?
18010005	Na nite mihing nite bang hi a, ahihkeileh na kumte mihing kumte bang,
18010006	Ka thulimlouhna na kan a, ka khelhna na nungdelh hi.
18010007	Ka gilou kei chih thei napi a, na khut a kipan hon suaktasak ding a-om louh?
18010008	“Na khutte'n ahon sek un ahon bawl kimvel sipsip ua; tu'n kihei in na hon hihse dia hia?
18010009	Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi, tungman bang a na hon mekdan; leivui hon tun nawn ding na hi hia?
18010010	Nawitui bang in na hon sungkhia in, nawituidat bang in na hon tok kei maw?
18010011	Vun leh sa in na hon tuam a, guhte leh thagui in na hon phankhawm hi.
18010012	Hinna leh deihsakna na hon phal a, huan na hon vehna in ka kha ahawi hi.
18010013	“Himahleh hiai thilte na lungtang sung ah na sel a; hiai bel na tup ahi chih ka thei hi.
18010014	Thil ka hihkhelhleh na hon chiamteh a, ka thulimlouhna a kipan na hon khah kei ding hi.
18010015	Ka gitlouhleh, ka tung agik hi; midiktat himah leng, ka lutang ka sangsak kei ding hi. Lungbuaina in ka dim a, huaiziak in ka gimthuakna en in.
18010016	Ka lutang akiletsakleh, humpinelkai bang in nang na hon beng a, ka tung a na lamdandan na hon ensak nawn hi.
18010017	Kei kalh in na palainate na thaksak a, ka tung a na hehna na khangsak a; hon dou ding sepaihhon thak na hon sawl hi.
18010018	“Bangziak a sul a pan hon lakhia na hia? Na si in kuamah muh louh na hi leng.
18010019	Om lou mah bangta ding hi ing a; sul a pan a han a puak a om ding hi ing.
18010020	Ka nite atom kei maw? Huchi ahihleh, tawp in, hon omsak maimai in, huchi a neukha a ka lungmuan theihna ding in.
18010021	Ka kik nawnlouhna a ka pai ma in khomialna gam leh sihna limliap gam mahmah ah.
18010022	Mialna mah bang a, mialna sahna gam a: sihna limliap gam, dan himhim omlouhna, khovak khomial bang a a-omna mun ah.”
18011001	Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18011002	“Thu tampite dawn louh ding ahi a hia? Mi houlimna a dim siamtansak ding hia?
18011003	Na khemnate'n mite daisak ding hia? na simmoh chiang in, kuamah in nang hon zahlaksak lou ding uhia?
18011004	Ka thuhilh asiangthou a, na mit uah ka siang hi, na chi ngal a.
18011005	Himahleh Pathian in thugen maizenleh zaw, nang dem in amukte hongleh;
18011006	Huchi in pilna thugukte nang ahon ensak ding a, atheihna ah thuah tampi ahi chih, huaiziak in na thulimlouhna sang a tawmzaw na lak ah Pathian in nang ahon phut chih thei in.
18011007	“Zon in Pathian na mu thei diam; hoihkimna ah Bangkim hihthei na mu thei diam?
18011008	Van bang in asang a; bang na hihthei dia? Sheol sang in athuk a; bang na theithei dia?
18011009	Huai a tehna lei sang in asauzaw a, tuipi sang in azazaw hi.
18011010	Paisuak henla, man henla, vaihawmna ah samleh, huchi in kua'n amah adal thei dia?
18011011	Ama'n lah mi bangmah loute athei ngal a; ngaihtuah kei mahleh, thulimlouhna leng amu hi.
18011012	Mihing theihsiamna bei in theihsiamna anei ding, mihing a sabiltungnou apian chiang in.
18011013	“Na lungtang na koih dik a, amah lam a na khutte na zakleh;
18011014	Na khut a thulimlouhna a-om a, gamlapi a na koihkhiak a, gitlouhna na puanin a na tensak keileh;
18011015	Gensiatna ding om lou in na mai na daksak ding a; ahi, na kip ding a, na lau kei ding.
18011016	Na haksatna na mangngilh ding ziak in; tui luangmang bang in na theigige ding hi.
18011017	Sun lai sang in na hinna achiangzaw ding a; khomial om mahleh, zingsang bang in na tangkhe ding hi.
18011018	“Lametna a-om ziak in, na kipta ding hi; ahi, ama tanchin na zong ding a, muang in na khawlta ding hi.
18011019	Lup leng na lum ding a, kuamah in nang hon lausak kei ding uhi; ahi, mi tampi'n nang hon zong ding uhi.
18011020	Himahleh gilou mitte azuausuak ding a, asuakta kei ding ua, alametna uh kha khah ahi ding hi.”
18012001	Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18012002	“Ginlelh vual louh in mite zaw na hi peuhmah ua, nou toh pilna asi ding hi.
18012003	Himahleh noute bang in theihsiamna ka nei; nou sang in ka niamzaw kei, ahi, hiaite bang thilte kuan athei kei a?
18012004	Kei zaw mi invengte a dia nuihzabuk ka hi a, kei, huai Pathian sam a, huai ama'n amah adawnpa, midik, mihoihkim, nuihzabuk ka na hi.
18012005	Om nuam a om ngaihtuahna ah vangsiatna muhsitna a-om a; himahleh akhe uh teute a ding in mansa in a-om hi.
18012006	Suamhatte puaninte alohching a, Pathian hehsakte abit ua; akhut a pathian tawite Pathian in tampi apia hi.
18012007	“Himahleh gamsate dong in, huchi in amau nang ahon sinsak ding uh; huan huihkhua a vasate'n, nang ahon hilh ding uhi.
18012008	Ahihkeileh lei kiang ah thu gen in nang ahon sinsak ding ua; tuipi a ngasate'n na kiang ah apuang ding uhi.
18012009	Hiai tengteng ah, Toupa khut in ahih khin chih kua ahia thei lou?
18012010	Amah khut ah thil hing chiteng kha leh, mihing tengteng hatna a-om hi.
18012011	Bil in thute enchian in, Kam in ana chiam kei maw?
18012012	“Mi upate kiang ah pilna a-om a nite sauna ah theihsiamna a-om hi.
18012013	Amah kiang ah pilna leh hatna a-om; ama'n thupha leh theihsiamna anei.
18012014	Ngai in, akaipuk a, akilam nawn thei kei ding; mihing akhakbing a, kuama'n ahong thei kei ding.
18012015	Ngai in, tui aching a akang hi; akhahkhia a, lei atum vek hi.
18012016	“Akiang ah hatna leh pilna a-om a; khem a omte leh khempa amah a ahi.
18012017	Thuhilh mite loh sam in apimang a, huan vaihawmte mihai in abawl hi.
18012018	Kumpipate kolte asut a, kawnggak in akawng uh agak hi.
18012019	Siampute loh sam in apimang a, mihatte azou hi.
18012020	Muan mite thugen asuan a, upate theihsiamna alamang hi.
18012021	Lalte tung ah muhsitna abuak a mihatte kawnggak aphel hi.
18012022	“Mial a kipan in thil thukte amukhia a, sihna limliap khovak ah ahon lakhia hi.
18012023	Namte apungsak a, amau hihsia in, namte athehzak a, alakhawm nawn hi.
18012024	Lei a mite hausate lungtang alamang a, gamdai a lampi omlouhna ah amau avakvaisak hi.
18012025	Vakna bei in khomial ah amai ua, huchi in zukhammi bang in amaute ahoisak hi.”
18013001	“Ngai in, ka mit in hiai tengteng amu a, ka bil in huai za in atheisiamta hi.
18013002	Na thei uh, huai mah ke'n leng ka thei a, nou sang in ka niamzaw kei hi.
18013003	Bangkim hihthei kiang ah thu ka gen mahmah ding, Pathian toh houlim ka ut hi.
18013004	Himahleh nou zuau phuakte na hi ua, phattuamna bei damdawisiam na hi vek uhi.
18013005	Aw na vek un dai sipsip le uchin maw; na pilna uh hi ding hiven.
18013006	“Tu in ka thusut za un, ka mukte ngetna ngaikhia un.
18013007	Pathian a ding in dikloutak in thu na gen ding uam, amah a ding in khemhattak in na houlim ding uam?
18013008	Ami na zahtak ding uam? Pathian a ding in na sual ding uam?
18013009	Nou ahon zonkhiak ahoih hia? Ahihkeileh mi'n mi akhem bang in, amah na khem ding uam?
18013010	Nou ahon sal mahmah ding, aguk a mite na zahtak uleh.
18013011	Ahoih tungtuanna in nou ahon lausak kei dia hia, nou tung ah akihtakhuaina ake kei diam?
18013012	Na thupilte uh vut bang lel ahi, manna bei paunak ahi a, na kidalnate uh tungman kidalnate ahi.
18013013	Dai unla, thu ka gentheihna ding in, hon omsak maimai un, ka tung ah ahong tung ding hong tung hen.
18013014	“Bangziak a ka ha in ka sa kei a, ka khut a ka hinna koih ding ahia?
18013015	Ama'n hon that mahleh, amah ka ngak lai ding; ama ah ka lampite ka kemhoih lailai ding hi.
18013016	Hiai leng ka hotdamna ahi ding; Pathian limsakloumi ama a hong pai lou ding ahih ziak in.
18013017	Ka thugen thanuamtak in za un, ka thupuanna na bil sung uah om hen.
18013018	Ngai un, tu in ka thu ka bawlhoihta a; ka diktat ahi chih ka thei hi.
18013019	“Kei hon kiselpih ding amah kua ahia? Kei tu in ka dai dia kha ka khah ding hi.
18013020	Ka tung ah thil nih hih kei phot le uchin, huchi in na mai a kipan ka bu kei ding hi.
18013021	Kei a pan gamlapi ah na khut kaikik in; na lauhuaina in hon lausak ke'n.
18013022	“Huai chiang in hon sam lechin, ka hon dawng ding; ahihkeileh hon pausak inla, hon dawng in.
18013023	Ka thulimlouhnate leh khelhnate bang ahia? Ka tatlekna leh ka khelhna hon theisak in.
18013024	Bangziak a na mai sel a na melma dia hon bawl na hia?
18013025	Singnah mutleng na hihbuai dia hia? Buhpawl keu na delh dia hia?
18013026	“Nang lah kei dem in khatak in na gelh a, ka tuailai thulimlouhnate na hon luahsak hi.
18013027	Ka khete leng kol na bunsak a, ka lampite tengteng na chiamteh hi; ka khenuai kim ah gi na khung hi.
18013028	Mihing zaw thilmuat leh nget nekgawp puansilh bang in amangthang hi.”
18014001	“Mihing, numei a pan pian nite tomchik ahi a, buaina ngen in adim hi.
18014002	Pak bang in ahong dawnkhia a, avuai nawn pah a, limliap bang in atai a, a-om gige kei.
18014003	Mi huchibang tung ah na mit hak in, vaihawmna ah kei na hon pi dia hia?
18014004	Thilnin a kipan kua'n ahia thilsiang lakhe thei? Kuamah in.
18014005	Anite sehsa ahi chih thei in, na kiang ah akhate simna a-om a, akan thei louh ding in agamgite na septa hi.
18014006	Amah en ke'n, akhawltheihna ding in, kiloh bang a, ani ahihkim matan.
18014007	“Phukpaih in om mahleh, ahong sel nawn ding a, ahiang nou atawp kei ding, chih sing a ding in lametna lah a-om ngal a.
18014008	Lei ah azung upa mahleh, akungpi lei ah sita mahleh;
18014009	Tuigim ziak in ahong nou thak dia, sing suan bang in bawkte ahon neikhe nawn ding hi.
18014010	Mihing asi a, amang zel hi; ahi, mihing in akha akhah a, huan koi ah a-om a?
18014011	“Tuipi a kipan tuihute alenmang bang in, luipi bel atul a, akang hi.
18014012	Huai mah bang in mihing alum a athou kei hi, vante a-om nawn louh matan, akhanglou kei ding uh, a-ihmu uh leng ahalh khe sam kei ding uhi.
18014013	“Aw Sheol ah hon sel lechin aw, na thangpaihna aman masiah hon na gukkep lechin, hun sehsa hon na pia in, kei hon theigige lechin aw;
18014014	Mi sileh ahing nawn diam? Ka galdouna leh nasepna ni tengteng ka ngak ding a, ka suahtakna ahong tun matan in.
18014015	N'on na sam dia, k'on dawng ding hi, na khut nasep na hon lunggulh ding hi.
18014016	Tu in ka kalsuante na sim a: ka khelhnate na chiamteh hi.
18014017	Ip sung ah ka tatlekna bilh in a-om a, ka thulimlouhna na gonggak hi.
18014018	“Tang kipuk bangmah lou ahong hi taktak a, amun a kipan in suangpi suan in a-om hi;
18014019	tuite'n suang akiamsak ua; leivui a kibawl mun sangte na taimang a; huan mihing lametna na hihsia hi.
18014020	Tangtawn in amah na zou a, apai a; amel na lamdangsak a, na sawlmang hi.
18014021	Atapate zah in a-om ua, ama'n athei kei; hihniam in a-om ua, himahleh ama'n amau ahi chih athei kei hi.
18014022	Himahleh atung a sa in natna anei a, asung ah akha in asuun hi.”
18015001	Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18015002	“Mipil in theihna bangmah lou toh dawnna abawl in, suahlam huih in agilpi adimsak diam?
18015003	Houlimna phatuam lou thu angaihtuah in, ahihkeileh hoih ahihtheihlouhna ding a thugente angaihtuah diam?
18015004	Ahi, launa na hihmang a, Pathian ma a kipiakzohna na dal lai hi.
18015005	Na kam in na thulimlouhna asinsak a, khemhatmi lei na tel ngal a.
18015006	Nang mahmah kam in siam louh ahon tangsak a, kei hilou in; ahi, nang dem in nangmah mukte mah in hon theihpih hi.
18015007	“Mihing piang masapen hi hia? Ahihkeileh mualte om ma a lakkhiak na hi maw?
18015008	Pathian thuguk na zata hia? Huan pilna na kikoih hoih hia?
18015009	Ka theih louh uh bang na thei a? kou a om lou bang na theisiam a?
18015010	Ka lak uah samkang leh upa mahmah a-om tuaktuak, na pa sang a nakpi a upazaw.
18015011	“Pathian nepnate leh siamtak a hon hilhte nang a dia neu lua uhia?
18015012	Bangziak a na lungtang in nang hon pimang ahia? Bangziak a na mitte phia ahia?
18015013	Huchi a Pathian dem a na lungsim na hei a, na kam a pan a huai thute na pawtkhiaksak.
18015014	“Mihing bang ahia, asian ding? Numei a pan piang amah kua ahia diktat ding?
18015015	Ngai in, amisiangthoute ah muanna anga kei a; amitmuh in vante asiang kei uhi.
18015016	Mikihhuai leh sia, tui bang a thulimlouhna dawnmi, siang kei sem na in chia.
18015017	“K'on ensak ding, hon za in; huan ka muhsa ka puang ding.
18015018	Mipil kuate in ahia apipute ua kipan na thu gen a, a-iim louh uh
18015019	Amau kiang kia ah gam piak in a-om a, mikhual kuamah alak uah apai kei uh.
18015020	“Migilou in adamsung niteng in natna athuak a, nuaisiah hatmi a dia kholkhawm kumte zah mah.
18015021	Abil ah launa ging a-om a; hauh lai in lokmi atung ah ahong pai ding hi.
18015022	Khomial a kipan ahong kik ding chih a-um kei a, namsau a ngak in a-om hi.
18015023	Tanghou zong in avakvai a, Koi a om ahia? chi in. Khomial ni akiangchin ah mansa in a-om chih athei hi.
18015024	Dahna leh haksatna in amah alausak a; kumpipa galdou dia mansa bang in, amah azou uhi.
18015025	“Pathian dou ding a khut alikkhiak ziak in, Bangkim hihthei dou a kisatheitak in,
18015026	alum, atuamna sahtak nei toh amah dou a atai teitei ziak in;
18015027	athau in amaitang akhuh a, agil ah thau akholkhawm hi.
18015028	“Khopi tulsa ah ateng a, kuamah ten tuaklouhna innte ah, segawp ngiingei dingte aluah ziak in.
18015029	Ahau kei ding a, aneih-le-lam a-om gige kei ding a; amah lei ah zung akai kei ding.
18015030	Khomial a kipan asuakta kei ding a, meikuang in aselnoute akangkeu ding a, apaklun laite amutmang ding.
18015031	Amah kikhem in, bangmah lou ah muang kei hen: bangmah lou lah athukna hi ding ahi ngal a.
18015032	“Ahun ma in hihzoh in a-om dia, huan ahiang nou kei ding hi.
18015033	Grepgui bang in agah min lou asingpulh dia, olive bang in apak apaikhe ding.
18015034	Pathian limsak lou kithuahkhawmna hut ding ahi a, golhna puaninte lah mei in akangmang ding hi.
18015035	Siatna apai ua, thulimlouhna asuakkhesak uh, alungtang un khemna a-opkeuh uhi.”
18016001	Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18016002	“Huchibang thil tampi ka zata hi: lungmuanmi chimtakhuai ngen na hi uh.
18016003	Thu bangmah loute'n tawp hun anei ding uam? Ahihkeileh dawng ding a nang hon hihheh bang ahia?
18016004	Nou bang in kei leng ka pau thei sam hi; na kha uh ka kha mun a om hileh, noute dem a thute kaikhawm a, ka lu hon sinkhum thei ding hi veng in.
18016005	Himahleh ka kam in nou ka hon hatsak ding a, ka muk a muanna in na lungkhamna uh ka hon nem ding.
18016006	“Thu gen mah leng, ka dahna nep in a-om kei a: doh mah leng, hihnop in ka om a hia?
18016007	Himahleh ahon chimtaksakta a; ka lawmte tengteng na hihgamta hi.
18016008	Huan kiptak in na hon len a, huai kei demna theihpihna ahi: huchi in ka gawnna kei dem in athou a, ka maitang ah atheisak hi.
18016009	“Ahehna in kei ahon botkek a, ahon sawi hi; aha ahon gawikhum a: ka tung ah ka gal in amit atat-hiam hi.
18016010	Akam uh lianpi in ahon katkhum ua; simmohtak in ka biang ah ahon beng ua; kei dou ding in akikaikhawm uh.
18016011	Pathian in Pathian limsakloute kiang ah ahon pekhia a, migiloute khut ah ahon paikhia hi.
18016012	Om nuam in ka om a, himahleh ahon kitamsak a; ahi, ka ngawng in ahon man a, hon pai nen hi; amuitum ding in ahon tungtou hi.
18016013	Athalkap mite'n ka kimvel ah ahon um ua, ka sisan guite abottan a, ahawi kei; lei ah ka sinkha asungkhia hi.
18016014	Siatna tung ah siatna in ahon sesak a; galhat bang in ka tung ah atai hi.
18016015	Ka vun tung ah sai-ip ka khui a, leivui ah ka kingata hi.
18016016	Kahna in ka mai ahoihta kei a, ka mitvunte ah sihna limliap a-om hi.
18016017	Ka khut ah hiamgamna om kei mahleh, ka thumna siangthou mahleh.
18016018	“Aw leitung, ka sisan khuh ke'n, huan ka kahna in mun nei kei hen.
18016019	Tu mahmah in, ngai in, van ah kei hon theihpihpa a-om a, tungsang ah kei hon genpihpa a-om hi.
18016020	Ka lawmte'n hon nuihsan ua, himahleh ka mit in Pathian ah khituite asungkhia hi.
18016021	“Huchi a Pathian lak a mihing dikna aletkip theih a, invengte lak a mihing tapa dikna aletkip theihna ding in.
18016022	Kum tawmchik ahong tun chiang in, ka kik nawnlouhna ding lampi ah ka paita ding hi.”
18017001	“Ka lungsim hihgawp in a-om a, ka nite abei a, kei a ding in han mansa in a-om hi.
18017002	Ka kiang ah musit mite a-om taktak ua, ahehna uah ka mit a-om gige hi.
18017003	Tu in thuchiam hon pia in, nangmah toh kei a ding in moh khu hong hi in; kei toh khutte beng ding kua a-om a?
18017004	Theihsiamna a kipan alungtang uh na sel ngal a; huaiziak in amau na hihlian kei ding hi.
18017005	“Kuapeuh mat ding a alawmte hek a, aneih-le-lam tan tummi, atate nangawn mit azuausuak ding hi.
18017006	Mite houlimna ding in ahon bawl lai a; huchi in tangpi kih ka hong hita hi.
18017007	Lungkhamna ziak in ka mit leng amial a, ka hiangte tengteng limliap bang ahi.
18017008	Midikte'n hiai ah lamdang asa ding ua, mihoih Pathian limsakloute dou ding in akitokthou ding.
18017009	Himahleh midiktat alampi ah apang zouzou dia, kuapeuh khut siangneite ahat semsem ding uhi.
18017010	Himahleh hong kik un, na vek un, tu in hong un; huchi in na lak uah mipil ka mu kei ding.
18017011	“Ka nite abeita, ka thiltupte asegawpta hi, ka lungtang ngaihtuahte tan in.
18017012	Zan, sun in akheng ua; khovak in khomial anaih, achi uh.
18017013	Ka inn bang in Sheol en leng; khomial ah ka lupna phah taleng;
18017014	siatna kiang ah, ‘Ka pa na hi,’ chi leng; tangtel kiang ah, ‘Ka nu leh ka sanggamnu na hi,’ chi leng;
18017015	huchi hileh ka lametna koi a om ahia? Lamet nei hi leng kua'n ahon musak dia?
18017016	Sheol mundaite ah paisuk in leivui ah ka kikkhawm ding ua adiam?”
18018001	Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18018002	“Thute zong a bang tan thang kam ding na hi ua? Ngaihtuah in, huai zoh chiang in ka pau ding uh.
18018003	Bangziak a gamsa bang a sim a om a, na mitmuh ua siang lou ka hi ua?
18018004	Nang na hehna kipumpei ziak in lei mangngilh in a-om diam? Ahihkeileh amun a kipan in suangpi suankhiak in a-om diam?
18018005	“Ahi, migilou vakna mihsak in a-om ding a, amei-ek atang kei ding.
18018006	Apuanin ah vakna amial dia, atung a khawnvak mihsak ahi ding.
18018007	Ahatna kalsuante hihtuailuai ahi dia, amah thupha gen in apaikhe ding hi.
18018008	Amah khe mahmah in len sung ah amah apailut ua, len ah a-awksak hi.
18018009	Thang in akhetul ah aman dia, thang in amah alen ding hi.
18018010	Lei ah amah a ding in thangkual sel in a-om a, lampi ah amah a ding in thang.
18018011	“Kihtakhuaite'n ning chiteng ah amah alausak dia, akhetul ah adelhzui ding hi.
18018012	Ahatna gilkial nek in a-om dia, akhawlna ding in mansa in tuahsiatna a-om ding.
18018013	Apumpi hiangte anegai ding a, ahi, ahiangte sihna ta masapen in anegai ding hi.
18018014	Asuan apuanin a kipan zungkalhkhiak in a-om dia lauhuainate kumpipa kiang a pi in a-om ding hi.
18018015	Amah a hilou puanin ah teng a-om ding, atenna ah kat thehzak in a-om ding hi.
18018016	“Nuailam ah azungte akeu dia, tunglam ah ahiang satkhiak ahi ding.
18018017	Lei a kipan in atheihgige amangthang ding; kongzing ah min anei kei ding.
18018018	Khovak a kipan in khomial ah hawllut ahi ding a, khovel a kipan a delhkhiak.
18018019	Amite lak ah tapa anei kei dia, tute leng atenna ah kuamah om lai a-om kei ding hi.
18018020	“Amalam a omte'n ani lamdang asa ding uh; nunglam a omte hihlau a a-om bang un.
18018021	Huchibang midiktatloute tennate ahi petmah a, Pathian theiloumi mun ahi hi.”
18019001	Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18019002	“Bang tan ka kha hihbuai a, thute a hon hihzan gawp ding na hi ua?
18019003	Hiai sawmvei na hon kouta ua; ka tung a giloutak a na hih uh na zum kei uh.
18019004	Ana paikhial taleng maw, keimah kiang a ka diklouhna a-om gige hi.
18019005	Kei dem in nou kiliansak petmah ve ni uchin, ka minsiatna ka tung ah na gen ding ua,
18019006	Pathian in ka thu ah hon zouta chih tu in thei un, huchi in alen in ahon umsuak hi.
18019007	“Ngai un, ‘Hiamgamna,’ chi in ka kikoukhia a, himahleh zak in ka om kei, panpih deih in ka kikou a, himahleh vaihawmna a-om kei hi.
18019008	Ka pai theihlouhna ding in ka lampi a-um a, ka paina dingte ah khomial akoih hi.
18019009	Ka thupina hon suahsak a, ka lu a kipan lallukhu alakhia hi.
18019010	Ning chiteng ah ahon hihniam a, ka mangta hi; huchi in sing bang in ka lametna abotkhia hi.
18019011	Ka tung ah ahehna leng asou a, amah a ding in agalte lak a khat bang in ahon sim hi.
18019012	Asepaih pawlte ahong kuankhawm ua, ka siatna ding in alampi uh abawl ua ka puanin kimvel in puanin akai uhi.
18019013	“Kei a pan in ka unaute gamlapi ah akoih a, ka meltheihte kei a pan in atuam vekta uh.
18019014	Ka tanaute'n ahon zuausan ua, ka lawm theihngeite'n ahon mangngilhta uhi.
18019015	Ka inn tengte leh, ka sikhanute'n, mikhual ahon sa ua: amitmuh un namdangmi ka hi.
18019016	Ka sikha ka sam a, hon dawng kei, ka kam in amah khem mah leng.
18019017	Ka zi a ding in ka hu kihhuai ahi a, sanggamte ziak in pumpi hahsiang mah leng ka namsia hi.
18019018	Naupang neute nangawn in hon simmoh ua; ka thohleh, ka siatna ding in thu agen uhi.
18019019	Ka lawm thudotte'n kei ahon hua ua, amau ka itte ka tung ah ahel uhi.
18019020	Ka vun ah leh ka sa ah ka guh abelh bikbek a, ka ha vun toh ka suakta hi.
18019021	Hon hehpih un, hon hehpih un, Aw nou ka lawmte; Pathian khut in kei ahon khoihta ngal a.
18019022	Bangziak a Pathian bang a nou hon sawi na hi ua, ka sa a bangziak a lungkim lou na hi ua?
18019023	“Aw ka thute tu in gelh in om le uh aw; Aw laibu ah kigelh lutleh aw.
18019024	Sik leh ngen gelhna zum in tangtawn a ding in suangpi a gelh hi le uh aw;
18019025	Ka Tanpa ahing chih leh, atawp chiang in leitung ah adingh nawn ding chih ka theih ziak in.
18019026	Ka vun huchibang a hihsiat a a-om khit nung in, himahleh ka sa a kipan Pathian ka mu ding hi.
18019027	Keimah a ding in amah kei mahmah in ka mu dia, ka mitte'n a-en ding, midang hilou in; ka sung ah ka lungtang asidang hial hi!
18019028	“Amah bangchibang in i sawita phet ding uam, na chih uleh, kei ah thubul muh in a-om chih thei in.
18019029	Namsau kihta un; hehna in lah namsau gawtnate ahon tun ngal a, huchi a vaihawmna a-om chih na theihtheihna ding un.”
18020001	Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18020002	“Huaiziak in ka ngaihtuahnate'n kei dawnna ahon pia a, ka sung a om ka kinohna thu ziak mahmah in.
18020003	Kei hon zahlaksak salhna ka zata a, ka theihsiamna kha in ahon dawng hi.
18020004	“Leitung a mihing a-om nungsiah, hun lui thu hiai na thei kei maw;
18020005	Giloute vualzohna atom a, Pathian limsakloute nopsakna mitphiat kal sung lel ahi chih?
18020006	Ahoihkimna in vante suntou in, alu in meipite phatou mahleh;
18020007	Himahleh amah ek bang in tangtawn in amangthang ding a, ‘Koi a om ahia?’ Amah mute'n achi ding uh.
18020008	Mang bang in alengmang dia, muh in a-om kei ding hi; ahi, zan mengmuh bang in hawlmang in a-om ding hi.
18020009	Amah mu mit in amah amuta kei ding hi; amun in leng amah amuta kei ding hi.
18020010	Atate'n gentheite deihsakna azong ding ua, akhutte'n athil hoih ape nawn ding hi.
18020011	“Atuailai hatna in aguhte dim mahleh, leivui ah amah toh alum ding uhi.
18020012	Akam ah gitlouhna khum in alei nuai ah sel mahleh;
18020013	Sit in, paisak kei in, akam ah kem gige zou mahleh;
18020014	Agil a an akitok a, asung ah gulgu bang in akha hi.
18020015	Hauhsaknate anawmvalh a, alokhe nawn ding hi. Pathian in agilpi a kipan in apaikhe ding hi.
18020016	Sokval gu atawp dia, gulngan in amah athat ding.
18020017	Luipite, khuaizu leh nawituidat lui luangte a-en kei ding hi.
18020018	Sepgim gah ape nawn dia anawmvalhsuk kei ding a; amuhsa ah kipahna anei kei ding.
18020019	Ama'n lah gentheite anuaisiah a, amangngilh hi; alam louhpi inn hiamgamtak in alata uhi.
18020020	Adeihgawlna in huntawk anei kei a akipahpih thil himhim akhol kei ding.
18020021	Anekgaih louh bangmah om lai a-om kei hi; huaiziak in ahauhna in adaih sawt kei ding.
18020022	Ahauh san lai in haksa sakna anei dia, thulimloumi khut ahong tung ding hi.
18020023	Agilpi hihdim ding a akisak lai in, Pathian in atung ah athangpaihna kihtakhuaina akhe ding a, anek lai in atung ah azusak ding hi.
18020024	Sik galvan a kipan atai dia, dal thal in amah akap pailet ding.
18020025	Adokkhia a, apumpi a kipan in ahong paikhia; ahi, asinkha a pan amukzumte velvel hong paikhia a launate atung ah ahong tung hi.
18020026	Agou ding in mialna tengteng kholkhawm in a-om; mei mut louh in amah anegai ding; apuanin a nutsiat a om anegai ding hi.
18020027	Vante'n abohsiatna ataklang ding ua, lei amah dou ding in athou ding.
18020028	A-inn a punna apaimang dia, aheh ni in avante aluangmang ding hi.
18020029	“Hiai Pathian a pan a migilou tantuan ahi, agouluah dia Pathian in asehsak.”
18021001	Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18021002	“Ka thugen hoihtak in ngaikhia unla, hiai na khamuanna thu uh hi hen.
18021003	Hon thuak teitei unla, ka hon gen ding a, ka gen khit chiang in nuihsan na ni uteh.
18021004	“Kei phunna mihing tung ah hia? Bangziak a kuhkal lou a om lou ding ka hia?
18021005	Hon en unla, lamdang sa unla, khut in na kam uh hum un.
18021006	Ka ngaihtuah in ka lung adong a, linna in ka sa aman nak.
18021007	“Bangziak in ahia migilou ahin a, tekkun a adam a, ahong thupikhiak?
18021008	Asuante uh akiang uah amitmuh uah ahihkip a, agil ua gahte amai ma uah.
18021009	A-inkuante uh lauhuai lak ah abit a, atung uah Pathian chiang ake kei hi.
18021010	Abawngtal un chi akhah a, ahut ngei kei, abawngpi un nou anei a, anou ase ngei kei.
18021011	Ganhon bang in ataneute uh apawtsak ua, atate uh alam uh.
18021012	Apekging uleh kaihging toh kituak in la asa ua, atamngai ging uah akipak uh.
18021013	Anite uh lamzangtak in azang ua, lungmuang in Sheol ah apaisuk uh.
18021014	“Pathian kiang ah, ‘Hon paisan in, na lampite theih ka kilawp kei uh.
18021015	Bangkim hihthei bang a ahih, a-nna ka sep ding uh, akiang a ka thum un punna bang a ka muh ding uh?’ achi uhi.
18021016	Ngai in, alamzanna uh akhut ua om ahi kei a hia? Migilou lemtheihna kei a kipan a gamlapi a om ahi.
18021017	“Migilou meisel bangzah vei amit a, vangtahna atung ua atun a, Pathian in athangpaihna in lungkhamna apiak chiat?
18021018	Bangzah vei ahia buhpawl huih mut bang ahih ua, buhsi huihpi mutmang bang ahih uh?
18021019	“Pathian in gitlouhnate atate uh a ding in akholkhawm, na chi ua, amau tung ah tungsak le ake; atheihsiamna ding un.
18021020	Amau mit ngei in asiatna uh mu uhenla, Bangkim hihthei thangpaihna dawn uhen.
18021021	Aman nung in a-inn uh amau a ding in bang a ahih, akha zah uh hihtawp ahih nung in?
18021022	Kua'n ahia Pathian theihna sinsak ding? ama'n sangpi a omte vai ahawmsak ngal a.
18021023	“Alut lai in mi asi a, nuam leh bit lai in.
18021024	Anawite nawizu in adim a, aguhngekte thau in adim hi.
18021025	Midang lungkhamtak in asi a, Nuamsa a a-an chiam ngei lou in.
18021026	Vut lak ah kibang in alum ua, than in apumtuam hi.
18021027	Ngai in, na ngaihtuah uh ka thei, dikloupi a ka tung a na sawmte uh.
18021028	‘Koi ah ahia kumpi inn a-om, migilou tenna puanin koi ah a-om a?’ na chi uh.
18021029	“Zinzin mite na dong ngei kei ua hia? Agente uh na pom kei ua hia?
18021030	Migilou vangtah ni in hawi in a-om a, thangpaih ni in hotkhiak in a-om, chih.
18021031	Kua ahia amaitang a alampi pulak ding, kua ahia athilhih bang a amah din ding?
18021032	Han lam a puak ahih in, ahan ven ahi.
18021033	Lui phaizang a leitang amah a ding in anuam a; mi tengteng in amah nung azui ua, amah ma a na paite sim seng louh ahi uh.
18021034	Bangchi in thu mumal omloupi a hon khamuan ding na hia? Na dawnnate uah zuauthu lou ngal bangmah a-om kei hi.”
18022001	Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in hichi in achi:
18022002	“Pathian a ding in mihing aphatuam thei diam? Kuapeuh apil amah mah a ding in aphatuam ngei a.
18022003	Na diktat, Bangkim hihthei a ding a kipahna ahi a hia? Ahihkeileh na lampite na hoihkimsak, amah a dia punna hia?
18022004	Nang ahon salh a, vaihawmna a nang toh alut, amah na kihtak ziak hia?
18022005	Na gitlouhna alian kei maw? Na thulimlouhna ah leng tawpna a-om sam kei hi.
18022006	“Bangmah lou ding in na unau thuchiamte na la a, vuaktangte puansilh na suahsak hi.
18022007	Bahte a ding in dawn ding tui na pe kei a, gilkial a ding in tanghou na it hi.
18022008	Himahleh mihat in gam anei a; asung ah ami deihthoh ateng hi.
18022009	Khutvuak in meithaite na sawlmang a, pabeite khutte hihtan in a-om hi.
18022010	Huaiziak in na kim ah thangte a-om ua, lauguihna in nang ahon hihbuai hi.
18022011	Ahihkeileh khomial, na muh theih louh, leh tui tampi in nang ahon khuh hi.
18022012	“Van sang ah Pathian a-om kei a hia? Aksite sandan en in, sang hi na tel uh e;
18022013	Nang, ‘Pathian in bang athei a? Khomial bikbek ah vai ahawm thei dia hia?
18022014	Ama'n hon muhlouhna ding a, meipi sah in liah a, van dum khen a vak ahi,’ na chi hi.
18022015	Migiloute totsa lampi lui na kem ding hia?
18022016	Ahun ma ua lakmang a-om a, akingakna ua tui luang bang a butkhiak a omte.
18022017	Pathian kiang a, ‘Hon paimangsan in; huan ei a ding in Bangkim hihthei in bang ahihthei a?’ chite.
18022018	Himahleh a-innte uh thil hoih in adimsak ua, himahleh migiloute thugen kei a kipan agamla hi.
18022019	Midiktatte'n amu ua, akipak uh; mihoihte'n amau anuihsan ua,
18022020	Chihtaktak in ei dou ding a thoute satkhiak in a-om ua, amaute lak a khosuaksunte mei in ahulta,” chi in.
18022021	“Tu in amah kimeltheihpih inla, muangtak in om in. Huai ah hoih na kiang ah ahong pai ding hi.
18022022	Akam a kipan in dan sang in, ka hon ngen hi, na lungtang ah athute kholkhawm in.
18022023	Bangkim hihthei kiang a na kik nawnleh, lamkip na hi ding; na puaninte a kipan gamlapi ah diktatlouhna na koihmang ding ahi.
18022024	Huan na gou leivui ah koih inla, luite suangte lak ah Ophir dangka-eng;
18022025	Bangkim hihthei na gou ahi dia, dangka manpha nang a ding in
18022026	Bangkim hihthei ah kipak in, Pathian kiang ah daktou ding na hih ziak in.
18022027	Amah kiang ah na thum ding a, ama'n hon na za ding a, na thuchiam na tangtun ding hi.
18022028	Thil khat tung ah thupukna bawl in thu na pe dia, nang a ding in hihkip in a-om ding; huchi in na lampite ah khovak atang ding hi.
18022029	Ahon sawnpuk chiang un, ‘Thohtouhna a-om,’ na chi ding. Hihniam a omte ama'n ahondam ding hi.
18022030	Ama'n ahoih lou nangawn asuaktasak ding a; ahi, na khutte sianna ziak in amah suahtaksak in a-om ding.”
18023001	Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18023002	Tuni mahmah in ka phunna helhuai ahi, ka mauna sang in ka thuakna agikzaw hi.
18023003	Aw amah ka muhna mun thei leng la, atutna mahmah ah hoh thei leng aw!
18023004	Ama ah ka thu ka bawlhoih dia, thugente in ka kam dimsak ding hi veng.
18023005	Ahon na dawnna ding thute ka thei dia, huchi in bang ahia ka kiang a agen ding ka theisiam ding.
18023006	Athilhihtheihna thupina in kei ahon sel diam? Ii, himahleh kei hon hatsak ding hi.
18023007	Huai ah midik in amah thu asutpih thei dia; huchi in ka vaihawmmi a pan suahtaksak in ka om tawntungta ding hi.
18023008	“Ngai in, mailam zuan in ka pai a, himahleh huai ah a-om kei; nunglam zuan in, himahleh amah ka mu kei hi.
18023009	Veilam pang ah, na sep lai in, himahleh amah ka mu thei kei a; taklam pang ah abu, amah ka muh theihlouhna ding in.
18023010	Himahleh ka zuih lampi athei a; ahon ze-et lai in, dangka-eng bang in ka hon suakkhe ding hi.
18023011	Ka khe in akalsuante alenkip a; alampite ka zuita a, ka pial kei hi.

18023017	Khomial ma in satkhiak in ka om ngal kei a, ka mai a kipan khomial sah leng akhuh sam kei hi.”
18024001	“Bangziak a Bangkim hihthei in vaihawmna hunte bawl lou ahia? Amah theite'n bangziak a anite mu lou uh ahia?
18024002	“Gamgi suan a-om ua; hiamgamtak in ganhon alamang ua, avak uhi.
18024003	Pabeite sabiltung ahawlmang ua, thuchiamna ding in meithai bawngtal ala uh.
18024004	Lampi a kipan tasamte aheikhia ua; lei a gentheite akiselkhawm uhi.
18024005	“Ngai in gamkeu a sabiltungte bang in athilhihna lam uah, an thanuamtak a zong in apaikhia ua, atate uh a ding in gamdai in amau an asuaksak hi.
18024006	Gam lam ah agan an a-at ua; migiloute grep gah ala uh.
18024007	Zankhua in puan bei in vuaktang in alum ua, khovot ah khuhna nei lou in.
18024008	Tangte vuahpi in amaute akawt ua, belh ding deih man in suangpi akawi uhi.

18024011	Olive a pan sathau abawl ua; a-uain sukna uh achil ua, himahleh adangtak uhi.

18024015	Ang kawm mi mit in leng khomui angak a, kuamah in hon mu kei ding, chi in amai abawl lamdang hi.
18024016	Khomial in innte avut pailet ua, sun chiang in akikhumbilh ua; khovak athei kei uh.
18024017	Amaute tengteng a ding in zingsang sihna limliap bang ahi a; zan mial lauhuaite lawm in anei uhi.”

18024021	“Ta nei lou numei ching anegai a; meithai a ding in hoih ahih kei hi.

18027001	Huchi in Job in agentehna thu apan nawn a, hichi in achi:

18028001	“Chihtaktak in dangka a ding in khuk a-om a, ahihsiang uh dangka-eng a ding in mun.
18028002	Lei a pan in sik akilakhia a, suang a kipan in dal akisungkhia hi.
18028003	Mihing in khomial phak tawp aneisak a, bukimna azongkhia hi; khomial leh sihna lim phak tawp tan in.
18028004	Mite omlouhna ah kokhuk lutna hawm atouvang ua, mite a pan gamla ah akikhai ua, lehlam lehlam ah akivei uh.
18028005	Lei ahihleh, huai a kipan in tanghou ahong suak a; anuai ah mei ahih bang in akilumlet hi.
18028006	Huai suangte sapphir suang mun ahi a dangka-eng nen anei hi.
18028007	Huai lampi sasial ne vasa in athei kei a, mu-akla mit in leng amu ngei sam kei hi.
18028008	Gamsa kisatheite'n asik kha ngei kei ua, humpinelkai lun lai leng huai ah apai kha nai kei hi.
18028009	“Meisah suangpi tung ah akhut akoih a; azung in mualte alumlet hi.
18028010	Suangpite lak ah tuilam ahong a; amit in thil manpha chiteng amu hi.
18028011	Atakkhiaklouhna ding un lui luangte atuam a; thil kisel khovak ah ahon lakhia hi.
18028012	Himahleh koi lai ah apilna akimu dia? Theihsiamna koi lai a om ahia?
18028013	“Mihing in alampi athei kei; mihing gam ah leng muh in a-om kei.
18028014	Thukna in, ‘Kei ah a-om kei,’ achi a, tuipi in, ‘Ka kiang ah a-om kei,’ achi hi.
18028015	Dangka-eng a lei theih ahi kei a, huai man ding in dangka buk theih ahi kei hi.
18028016	Ophir dangka-eng toh amanphatna teh theih ahi kei ding, Onik mantam hiam Sapphir toh hiam.
18028017	Dangka-eng leh limlang in akimpih thei kei ua, huai khenna ding in dangka-eng hoih leh suangmantam leng ahi thei kei ding hi.
18028018	Suang dum hiam suang muh paisuak theih akigen kei ding, Ahi, pilna man rubi suang sang in asangzaw hi.
18028019	Ethiopia topaz suang in apha kei dia, dangka-engtak toh leng amanphatna teh ding ahi kei.
18028020	“Ahihleh pilna koi a kipan a hong pai ahia? Theihsiamna koi a om ahia?
18028021	Mihing tengteng mit a kipan a sel ahi chih leh, huihkhua a vasate a kipan sitsa a om ahi chih thei in.
18028022	Abaddon leh Sihna in, ‘Huai a thuthang ka bil un ka za uh,’ achi uhi.
18028023	Pathian in huai alampi atheisiam a, amun athei hi.
18028024	Lei mong tan in a-en ngal a, van nuai thil tengteng amu hi.

18028026	Vuah a ding a thupiak abawl a, vanpiging khophia a dia lampi abawl lai in;
18028027	Huai lai in ama'n amu a, apuang a; ahihkip a, ahi, azongkhia hi.
