18029001	Job in agentehna thu agen nawn a, hichi in achi.
18029002	“Aw nidanglai khate bang a om hi leng, Pathian in ahon veh lai nite bang in;
18029003	Ka lutung a akhawnvak atan a, amah vakna a khomial a ka vak lai;
18029004	Ka tuailai nite a ka om bang a, ka puanin tung a Pathian thuguk a-om lai in;
18029005	Ka kiang a Bangkim hihthei a-om a, ka tate ka kim a-om lai un;
18029006	Ka kalsuante bawngnawi a sawp ahih a, suangpi in sathau luite abutkhiak lai in.
18029007	Khopi a kongpi zuan a ka pai lai in, kongzing a ka tutna ka bawl lai in,
18029008	Tangvalte'n ahon mu ua, abu ua; upate athou ua adingh uh.
18029009	Lalte houlim akidek ua, akam uah akhut uh akoih uh.
18029010	Miliante aw adai a, akam dangtawng uah alei uh abelh hi.
18029011	“Bil in ahon zak lai in, hampha ahon chi a; mit in ahon muh lai in, pom ahon chi a;
18029012	Migenthei, panpih ngai a kap, Pa nei lou, panpihtu bei ka hutkhiak ziak in.
18029013	Mangthang ding a mansa a kipan vualzawlna ka tung ah ahong tung a; meithai lungtang kipah ziak a lasa ding in ka omsak hi.
18029014	Diktatna ka silh a, ahon tuam hi; ka dikna puanak thupi leh lukhum bang leh suangmantam bang ahi.
18029015	Mittaw a ding in mitte ka hi a, khebai a ding in khete ka hi.
18029016	Tasam a ding in pa ka hi a; ka theih louh thubul ka zongkhia hi.
18029017	Diktatloumi haizek ka hihtan a, aha a kipan asamat ka khahsak.
18029018	“Huchi in ke'n, ka bu ah ka si ding a, piaunel bang in ka nite ka pungsak ding, ka chi a.
18029019	Ka zungte tuite pha in adalhzak a, ka hiangte ah zankhua in daitui akai.
18029020	Kei ah ka thupina athak gige a, ka khut ah ka thalpeu athak gige.
18029021	Mite'n ahon ngai ua, angak ua, ka thuhilh a ding in adai dide uhi.
18029022	Ka thute zoh in apau nawn kei uh; ka thugen atung uah atakkhia.
18029023	Vuah ngak bang in ahon ngak ua; vuah nanungte a ding bang in lianpi in akamka uh.
18029024	Kimuanna aneih louh chiang un atung uah ka nuihmai a; huchi in ka mel tang apaikhe kei uh.
18029025	“Alampi ding uh ka telsak a, hausa bang in ka tu a; sepaih pawl lak a kumpipa bang in ka leng a, suun mite lungmuanmi bang in.”
18030001	“Huan kei sang a naupang, apate uh, ka ganching uite toh koih dia ka sitte'n, kei nuihza bawlna in ahon zang uh.
18030002	Ahi, akhutte uh hat a, kei bang ahon loh tak dia, huai ahatna uh beisate'n?
18030003	Taksapna leh kialna in atuikang ua; lei keu leh sia akheuh uh,
18030004	Pawn a anteh alou ua; huan lou kha zungte a-an uh ahi.
18030005	Mite lak a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om ua; guta bang in amau nung ah akikou ua.
18030006	Guam a hengte ah ateng ding ua, lei leh suangpi hawmte ah.
18030007	Pawn lak ah aham ua; lahou nuaite ah akisekhawm uh.
18030008	Mihaite tate ahi ua, ahi, mithulim lou tate; gam a pan in delhkhiak ahi uhi.
18030009	“Huan tu in kei ala uh ka hong hi ahi, amau a ding in houlimna ka hi.
18030010	Ahon kih ua, kei a kipan atuam ding in uh, ka mai a chilsiat akidek kei uh.
18030011	Pathian in ka khau akhah a, ahon hihgim a, huan ka ma ah kamkaihna akhahkhia uh.
18030012	Ka khut taklam ah tuailaite athou ua; ka khe anawlkhin ua, siatna lampi ka ma ah akoih uhi.
18030013	Ka lampi hihsia in, ka tuahsiatna azong ua, kuama'n akham kei uh.
18030014	Awng zapi apaisuak bang in ahong ua, siatna lak ah ka tung ah akikhuk uh.
18030015	Ka tung ah launate ahei ua, huih bang in ka minphatna adelhmang uh; meipi bang in ka hauhna apaimang hi.
18030016	“Huchi in tu in ka sung ah ka kha buakkhiak in a-om; gimthuakna nite'n kei ahon man uhi.
18030017	Zan in ka guhte asawi a, kei hon sun natnate'n khawl chih anei kei uh.
18030018	Ka natna hi hat mahmah ziak in ka puansilh anin a: ka puanak ngawng bang in kei ahon gak hi.
18030019	Buannawi ah ahon pailut a, leivui leh meivu bang ka hi hi.
18030020	“Na kiang ah ka kikou a, na hon dawng kei hi. Ka ding a, kei na hon en maimah a.
18030021	Ka tung a gilou ding in na kilumlet a, na bantha hatna in kei na hon sawi hi.
18030022	Huih ah na hon domkangtou a, huai tung ah na hon tuangsak; huchi in huih ah na hon lumlet den hi.
18030023	Sihna na hon tun ding chih ka thei hi, mihing tengteng a dia sehsa inn ah.
18030024	Himahleh siatna a pukgawp mi'n aban zak lou ding hia? Atuahsiatna ah panpihna ngen in kikou lou ding hia?
18030025	Buaina a ding in ka kap kei diam? tasam a ding in ka kha adah kei ding a hiam?
18030026	Hoih ka ngak chiang in, hoih lou ahong pai a; khovak ka ngak chiang in, khomial ahong pai.
18030027	“Ka lungtang abuai, khawl hun amu ngei kei; gimthuakna nite ka tung ah ahong tung.
18030028	Hihvom a om in ka vialvak, himahleh ni hihvom hilou in; khawmpi ah ka dingh a panpih deih in ka kikou hi.
18030029	Sehalte unaupa ka hi a, simbute lawm ka hi.
18030030	Ka vun avom a, kei a kipan apilh uh, kholum in ka guhte akang hi.
18030031	Huaiziak in ka kaihging suunna asuak a, ka mutging mikapte aw.”
18031001	“Ka mit toh thukhun ka na bawl khinta; bangchi in nungak ka en theita dia?
18031002	“Ahihleh tunglam Pathian a kipan in ka tantuan bang ahia, tungsang a Bangkim hihthei a kipan in ka goutan?
18031003	Midikloute tung ah siatna, gitlouh nasemte tung ah gawtna atung kei maw?
18031004	Ama'n ka lampite amu kei a hia? ka kalsuante asim vek kei a hia?
18031005	“Thuzuau toh na om a, huai a ka khe khem ding a kinoh ahihleh;
18031006	bukna diktak ah hon buk dih ua, Pathian in ka thutakna thei hen!
18031007	Ka kalsuan lampi a kipan a na pial hiam, ka lungtang in ka mitte na zui hiam, ka khutte ah nin himhim na belh hiam;
18031008	Huchi ka hihleh, chi tuh ning, midang in ne hen; ahi, ka lou a piang bulkalh khiak hi hen.
18031009	“Ka lungtang numei lam a khem a om a, ka inveng kongkhak ka na ngak takleh;
18031010	huchi ahih takleh ka zi in midang a ding in an su henla, midangte amah tung ah kun uhen.
18031011	Huchibang gitlouhna hoih het lou ahi; ahi, vaihawm mite gawt ding khelhna ngei,
18031012	siatna ding a Abaddon tan a kangbei leh, ka punna tengteng zungkalh ding mei hi ding lah ahi ngal a.
18031013	“Ka tung a phunna aneih lai ua, ka sikhapa hiam ka sikhanu hiam makhua na musit a, na khualsak lou ka hihleh;
18031014	Pathian athohkhiak chiang in bang ka hihta dia? Thu akan hun chiang in bang in ka dawngta dia?
18031015	Kei sul a pan hon bawlpa'n amah abawl kei maw? Khat in ahon bawl tuak ahi kei maw?
18031016	“Migentheite alunggulh uh ka piak louh a, ahihkeileh vuaksuak ding a meithai mitte ka na omsakleh;
18031017	Ahihkeileh kei kia in ka an ka nek a, huai a pabei in an anek keileh;
18031018	Ii, ka tuailai a kipan in pa bang ka hi, ka kiang ah ana khanglianta; ka nu sul a kipan amah pipa ka hita hi.
18031019	“Kuapeuh taksap ziak a mangthang hiam, ahihkeileh tasam khuhna nei lou hiam ka na muhleh;
18031020	Akawngte'n kei hon vualzawl lou a, ka belam mul a lumsak a ana om keileh.
18031021	“Kongpi a panpihna ka muh ziak a pabeite siatna ding a ka khut ka na likleh;
18031022	Huchi ka hihleh, ka liang ka liangzang a kipan kia henla, aguh a kipan ka ban kitan hen.
18031023	Pathian a kipan tuahsia kei a ding in launa ahi ngal a, athupina ka tuak ngam kei hi.
18031024	“Dangka-eng lametpen a ka na bawl a, dangka-eng hoih kiang ah, ka muanna na hi, ka na chihtak a;
18031025	Ka hauhna thupi ziak a hiam, ka khut in tam alam ziak a ka kipah a;
18031026	Avak lai a ni ka na et a, kha thupitak paikhia ka na et a,
18031027	Ka lungtang guk a khem a a-om a, ka kam in ka khut ana tawp takleh;
18031028	Hiai leng thulimlouhna vaihawmte gawt ding ahi, tung a Pathian kiang a na zuauta hi ding ka hih ziak in.
18031029	“Kei hon mudah siatna a ka na kipah a, ahihkeileh hoih lou atung a atun chiang a ka na kipah luatleh;
18031030	Ka melma hamsiat ding leh ahenna thum ding in ka kam ka na khialsak kei.
18031031	Ka puaninte a, ‘A-an a kihihvah lou kua a-om a?’ hon na chih kei ualeh;
18031032	Kongzing ah mikhual agiak ngei kei a; khualzin a ding in ka kongte ka na hongta.
18031033	“Adam bang a ka angsung a thulimlouhna na sel a, ka tatlekna na khuh ka hih a,
18031034	aziak, mi tampi launa thupitak ka neih ziak ahih a, sungte hon muh daina launa ziak a huchi a dai dide a, popawt lou ka hihleh,
18031035	Aw, kei hon za ding mi nei leng maw. Ngai in, ka deihlam hiai ahi. Bangkim hihthei in hon dawng henla; ka melma in laibu ah gelhkhiak hen.
18031036	“Chihtaktak in ka liangzang ah ka po dia; lallukhu bang in kei ah ka kan den ding hi.
18031037	Akiang ah ka kalsuan zah ka puang ding a; lal bang in akiangnai ah ka hoh ding hi.
18031038	“Ka gam kei dem a akikou a, lei lehsate akahkhawm uleh;
18031039	Sum lou a huai gahte ka na nek tak a, ahihkeileh huai a aneite ahinna uh ka na tansakleh,
18031040	Buh hilou in louling neite, barli buh hilou in loubualte pou zaw hen,” Job thute abeita hi.
18032001	Huchibang in hiai mi thumte Job dawn atawpta ua, amah mit a diktat ahih ziak in.
18032002	Huai lai in Job tung ah Ram inkuan a Buz mi Barakel tapa Elihu hehna akuangkhia a, Pathian hi zaw lou a amah siam akitansak ziak in.
18032003	Alawm thumte tung ah leng ahehna akuangkhia a, dawnna ding nei lou a, hinapi a lah Job amohpaih ziak un.
18032004	Amah sang a a-upat zawk ziak un, Job kiang a thu gen ding in Elihu in angak hi.
18032005	Hiai mi thumte kam a dawnna a-om kei chih atheih in, ahehna akuangkhia hi.
18032006	“Huchi in Buz mi Barakel tapa. Ka naupang a, noute na upa mahmah uh; huaiziak in ka dai a, ka lungsim ka hon ensak ngam kei hi.
18032007	Huchi in ka chi, ‘Nite'n thu agen ding uh, kum tampi in pilna a sinsak ding hi.’
18032008	Himahleh mihing lungsim a om a, Bangkim hihthei in theihsiamna apia hi.
18032009	Apilte mithupite ahi kei ua, vaihawmna theisiamte upate ahi sam kei uh.
18032010	Huaiziak in hong ngaikhia un; ke'n leng ka lungsim ka ensak ding, ka chi.
18032011	“Ngai un, na thute uh ka ngak a, gen ding na zonkhiak lai un, na thusutte uh ka ngaikhia.
18032012	Ahi, ka hon limsak a, ngai un, kuamah Job thuzoh zou na om kei uh, ahihkeileh na lak uah, athute dawng.
18032013	Pilna i muta, chi lou ding in pilvang un; mihing hilou in Pathian in amah azou thei hi.
18032014	Ama'n kei siatna ding in athute ahih kei a; ke'n leng nou thugente in amah ka dawng sam kei ding.
18032015	“Lamdang sa in, adawng nawn kei ua, gen ding thu khat leng anei kei uh.
18032016	Thu ging neih louh ziak in adingh kinken ua, adawn nawn louh ziak un ke'n ka ngak diam?
18032017	Ke'n leng ka dawnna ding ka nei hi, ka lungsim ka ensak sam ding, ka chi hi.
18032018	Thu in ka dim a; ka sung a ka kha in hon sawl teitei hi.
18032019	Ngai un, ka gilpi pawtkhiakna nei lou uain thawl bang ahi; uain thawl thakte bang in puakzak ding in mansa in a-om hi.
18032020	Ka halhtheihna ding in, ka pau ding; ka mukte ka hong dia, ka dawng ding hi.
18032021	Mihing mihinna zahtaksak kei un, ka hon ngen hi; kuamah kiang ah leng maitang phatna min ka pe kei ding hi.
18032022	Maitang phatna minte piak ding ka thei ngal kei a; huchi lou in zaw kei hon bawlpa'n ahon lazok ding hi.”
18033001	“Akoi abang hitaleh, Job, ka hon ngen hi, thugen za inla ka thugen tengteng ngaikhia in.
18033002	Ngai in, tu in, ka kam ka ka a, ka kam in ka pau hi.
18033003	Ka thute'n ka lungtang dikna agenkhe ding uh; Ka mukte'n atheih ngei uh chihtaktak in agen ding uhi.
18033004	Pathian Kha in ahon bawl a, Bangkim hihthei hu in hinna ahon pia hi.
18033005	“Na theihleh hon dawng in; ka ma ah na thute akizom in koih inla na panna ah dingh in.
18033006	Ngai in, nang bang in Pathian lam ah ka om hi; kei leng tungman a bawl ka hi.
18033007	Ngai in, ka lauhuaina in nang ahon lausak kei ding, ka hahkatna leng na tung ah agik kei ding hi.
18033008	“Chihtaktak in ka zak in na pauta a, huchi in na thute ging ka zata hi.
18033009	Ka siang hi, tatlekna bei; ka hoih a, kei ah thulimlouhna leng a-om kei, chi in.
18033010	Ngai in, kei demna ding ziak amu a melma in ahon simta hi;
18033011	Ka khete kol abunsak a, ka lampite tengteng achiamteh hi.
18033012	“Ngai in, ka hon dawng ding, hiai na diklouhna ah; mihing sang in Pathian alianzaw hi.
18033013	Bangziak a amah dou na hia, Ka thute a bangmah mah lah adawng kei ding, chi in?
18033014	Pathian in lah khatvei agen a, ahi, nihvei, mihing in limsak kei mahleh.
18033015	Zan a mang ah, mengmuhna ah, mite tung a ihmut kip akiak lai un, lupna tung a ihmut laite un;
18033016	huai lai in mite bilte ahong a, vaunate in amau ahihlau a,
18033017	Huchi a athiltup a kipan a mihing alakkik a, mihing a kipan akisaktheihna asatkhiak theihna ding in;
18033018	Ama'n kokhuk a kipan akha akepkiksak a, namsau a kipan ahinna.
18033019	“Alupna tung ah natna asawi in leng a-om, aguhte akinakna om gige toh in.
18033020	Huchi in ahinna in tanghou, akha in an lim akih hi.
18033021	Asa atummang a, huchi in muh theih in a-om kei; Akimu lou a guhte hong dawkkhia uhi.
18033022	Ahi, han kiang ah akha ahong nai a, ahinna hihse mite kiang ah.
18033023	“Akiang a angel, kamlet, sangkhat lak a khat, mihing kiang a amah a dia dik bang ahia chih etsak ding a-omleh;
18033024	Huchi a amah a ding a zahngai thei, Kokhuk a paisukna a kipan amah suaktasak un, tatna ka muta.
18033025	Asa naupang a sang in nou zaw hen; atuailai nite lam ah kik nawnta hen.
18033026	Pathian kiang ah athum a, amah ding in deihsak theih in a-om hi; huchi in nopna toh amai amu a; adiktatna akiang ah ape nawn hi.
18033027	Mite ma ah la asa a, ka khialta a, adik ka na hekkawi a, thuk in ka om kei!
18033028	Kokhuk sung a paisukna a kipan akha atanta hi, ahinna in vakna amuta ding hi, achi a.
18033029	“Ngai in, hiai thilte tengteng Pathian in, mihing lak ah ahih a, nihvei, ahi thumvei.
18033030	Kokhuk a kipan akha pikik ding in, huchi a mihing vakna ahihvak a a-omtheihna ding in.
18033031	“Chiamteh in, Aw Job, ngaikhia in, dai inla, thu ka gen ding.
18033032	Gen ding na neihleh, hon dawng in, pau in, siam hon tansak ka ut ngal a.
18033033	Na neih keileh, kei hon ngaikhia in, dai inla pilna ka hon sinsak ding hi.”
18034001	Huai lou in Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18034002	“Ka thute za un, nou mipilte; nou theihna neite, bil hon doh un.
18034003	Dangtawng in an achep bang in, bil in thute a-enchian hi.
18034004	Adik ei a ding in i tel ding uh; i lak ua hoih bang ahia i thei ding uh.
18034005	Job in, ‘Ka dik a, Pathian in ka dikna a lamang,’ achi ngal a.
18034006	Ka dikna huchi hita mahleh zuauthei a sim ka hi a; tatlekna bei himah leng, ka liamna hihdam theih louh ahi.
18034007	“Muhsitna tui bang a dawn bei, Job bang mihing kua ahia?
18034008	Thulim lou nasem mite toh ahon a pai, migiloute toh omkhawm mi.
18034009	Ama'n lah, ‘Pathian lak a ka kipahna ding bangmah ka loh tak kei,’ achi ngal a.
18034010	Huaiziak in nou theisiam mite, hon ngaikhia un. Pathian in, gilou bangchi in ahih ngei dia; Bangkim hihthei in thulim lou bangchi in ahih mahmah dia.
18034011	Ama'n lah mihing thilhih amah kiang apekik ding a, mi chiteng alampite kiang a pekik ding ahi.
18034012	“Ahi, moh khuksakna thu ah, Pathian in giloutak in ahih kei dia, Bangkim hihthei in leng vaihawmna ahihse sam kei ding hi.
18034013	Kua'n ahia amah leitung a heutu hihna pia? Ahihkeileh khovel pumpi kua'n ahia athu a koih?
18034014	Mihing tung a alungtang nga a, ama lam a akha leh ahu lakhawm;
18034015	Sa tengteng amangthang vek ding ua, mihing leivui asuak nawn ding hi.
18034016	“Theihsiamna na neihleh, hiai za in; ka thu aw ngaikhia in.
18034017	Mi thudik hua in vai ahawm ding hia? Dik leh hat amah na mohpaih ding hia?
18034018	Kumpipa kiang a, ‘Na hoih kei’ chih akilawm hia? Ahihkeileh miliante kiang a, ‘Na gilou uh?’ chih.
18034019	Milalte mihinna zahtak lou a, Genthei sang a mihausate limsak zawte kiang a chih akilawm sem lou ding hia? Amaute lah akhut nasep ahi ngal ua.
18034020	Mitphiat kal lou in asi ua zankim lai mahmah in; mite aling ua apaimang ua, mihing khut hilou in mihatte lakmang in a-om uhi.
18034021	“Amitte mihing lampite tung ah a-om a, apainate amu hi.
18034022	Thulim lou nasem mite bukna ding khomial hiam limliap hiam a-om kei hi.
18034023	Vaihawmna a Pathian ma a pai ding in, mihing angaihtuah lailai akiphamoh kei hi.
18034024	Lamte theih phak vual louh in ama'n mihatte ahihzan vek a, amun uah midang atungkhia hi.
18034025	Huaiziak in anasepte uh athei hi; zan in amau alumlet a, hihsiat in a-om uhi.
18034026	Midang mitmuh mahmah in migiloute bang in amau agawt hi.
18034027	Amah zuihna a kipan apialkhiak ua, alampite a koimah alimsak louh ziak un.
18034028	Huchi in mizawng kahna akiang tung ding in abawl ua, gimthuak kahna aza hi.
18034029	“Amah na pau keileh, kua'n siam louh atangsak dia? Ama'n amai aselleh, kua'n amah amu thei dia? Namte kiang a hih hiam, ahihkeileh mihing kiang a hih hiam akibang hi.
18034030	Huchi a Pathian theiloumi in vai ahawm louh a, amite thang a awksak ding a-omlouhna ding in.
18034031	“Kuapeuh in Pathian kiang ah, Gawtna ka thuakta, ka gilou nawn kei ding,
18034032	Ka muh louh nang hon sinsak in, gilou ka hihleh ka hih nawn kei ding, achi uhia?
18034033	Athukna huchi a na nial na deih bang in a-om diam? Kei hilou in, nang na tel ngeingei ding ahi.
18034034	“Theisiam mite'n ka kiang ah, ‘Ahi,’ achi ding uh, aza mipil teng in.
18034035	Job in theihna bei in thu agen a, athute pilna bei ahi uh.
18034036	Mihaite bang a adawnna ah, atawp chiang in Job tungtang ngaihtuah le uh.
18034037	Ama'n akhelhna ah helna abehlap a, i lak uah akhut abeng a, Pathian kalh in athu apungsakta hi.”
18035001	Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi:
18035002	“Hiai na dikna hi in na ngaihtuah hia, ahihkeileh, kei a mawng ahi, Pathian mai ah na chi hia?
18035003	Kei a ding in bang phattuamna a-om dia? Khial lou a ka om in bang phattuamna ka nei a? na chih.
18035004	Nang leh na kiang a na lawmte ka hon dawng ding.
18035005	“Vante lam en inla, mu in; vante, nang sang a sangzaw, en in.
18035006	Na hihkhelhleh, amah dem a bang hih na hia? Na tatleknate punsak hileh, amah tung a bang hih na hia?
18035007	Diktat na hihleh, amah bang na pia a? Ahihkeileh na khut a kipan bang amu a?
18035008	Na gitlouhna in nang bang in mi ahihna thei a; na diktatna in mihing tapa ahih hampha thei hi.
18035009	Nuaisiahna atam mahmah ziak in akikoukhia ua; mihat ban ziak in panpih deih in akikou uh.
18035010	Kuamah in, ‘Zan chia late hon pia, Pathian kei hon Bawlpa koi a om ahia;
18035011	Lei a gamsate sang a hon sinsak tamzaw leh, van a vasate sang a hon pilsakzaw?’ achi kei uh.
18035012	Huai ah akikou ua, himahleh, migilou kisaktheihna ziak in, kuamah in dawnna ape kei.
18035013	Chihtaktak in Pathian in bangmah lou aza kei dia, Bangkim hihthei in leng alimsaksak kei ding hi.
18035014	“Nang ngial in houh, ‘Amah ka mu kei, athu ma ah a-om, Amah ka ngak hi,’ na chih vial.
18035015	Himahleh tu in, heh a aveh louh a, ki-otsakna leng alimsak louh ziak in;
18035016	Huaiziak in Job in bangmah lou in akam aka ahi; theihna bei in thu atamsak ahi.”
18036001	Elihu mah in agenzom zel a, hichi in achi:
18036002	“Hon na thuakzou zek inla, huan ka hon ensak ding; Pathian sik in lah banghiam khat gen ding ka nei ngal a.
18036003	Gamla a kipan ka theihna ka hon la ding a, kei hon Bawlpa tung ah diktatna ka nga ding hi.
18036004	Diktak in ka thute zuau ahi kei a; hoihkim khat ka kiang ah a-om hi.
18036005	“Ngai in, Pathian in thil ahihthei a, kuamah amusit kei; theihsiamna hatna ah thil ahihthei hi.
18036006	Gilou hinna ahawi kei a; himahleh gimthuakte kiang ah adikna uh apia hi.
18036007	Midiktat a kipan amit alakik kei; himahleh laltutphah tung a kumpipa toh amau tangtawn in akoih a, huchi in hihlet in a-om uhi.
18036008	Huan sikkhaute a gak a a-om ua, gimthuakna guite alak a a-om uleh;
18036009	Huchi in athilhih uh amau a-ensak a, atatlekna uh, huchi a kisatheitak a ana omna uh.
18036010	Thuhilhna lam ah abil uh ahonsak a, thulimlouhna a kipan kik ding in thu apia hi.
18036011	Amah thu angaihkhiak ua, a-nna asep uh leh, anite uh hauhsakna in ahihbei ding ua, akumte uh kipahna in.
18036012	Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh, namsau in amangthang ding ua, huchi in theihna bei in asi ding uh.
18036013	“Himahleh amau lungtang a Pathian limsaklouhnate'n hehna akholkhawm hi; amau ahen lai in panpih deih in akikou kei uh.
18036014	Tuailai in asi ua, siangloute lak ah ahinna uh amangthang hi.
18036015	Agimthuakna in gimthuakte asuaktasak a, nuaisiahna ah abil uh ahonsak hi.
18036016	Ahi, gakchihna omlouhna, mun lian lam ah dahna a kipan nang ahon pimang ding a; na dohkan tung a kilui thauna in adimta ding hi.
18036017	Himahleh giloute vaihawmna in na dim a; vaihawmna leh diktatna in nang hon len hi.
18036018	Thangpaihna a-om ziak in, pilvang in huchi lou in zaw na hauhna in nang ahon pimang kha ding hi; golhgukna tampi in leng nang hon pialsak kei hen.
18036019	Dahna ana omlouhna ding in, na hauhsaknate ahun diam, ahihkeileh na hatna thilhihtheihna tengteng?
18036020	Mite tengteng amun ua satkhiak a a-om zan uah lunggulh ke'n.
18036021	Pilvang in, gilou limsak ke'n; gimthuakna sang in hiai lah na telzawta ngal a.
18036022	“Ngai in, Pathian in athilhihtheihna in sangtak in ahih; amah bang sinsakmi kua ahia?
18036023	Kua'n amah alampi thu apia a? Ahihkeileh, ‘Diklouhna na bawlta,’ kua'n achi thei dia?
18036024	Mite'n la asak uh, athilhih hihlian ding in theigige in.
18036025	Huai ah mite tengteng a-en ua; huai mihing in gamlapi ah amu hi.
18036026	Ngai in, Pathian alian a, amah i thei kei; akumte zah zontheih ahi kei.
18036027	“Tui takte ama'n atawi khin a, huai a tuihu a kipan vuah azu.
18036028	Huai vante'n asungkhia ua, mihing tung ah tampi in atak.
18036029	Meipi kiphahte leh a-inn vanpi gingte kua'n atheisiam dia?
18036030	Ngai in, akim ah akhovak azak a; tuipi nuai atuam hi.
18036031	Hiaite in mite avai hawmsak a; an tampi apia hi.
18036032	Akhutte in khophia atawi a; chiamtehna khoh ding in thu apia hi.
18036033	Huai husa in atungtang thu agen a, ganhonte'n leng hong kuantou huihpi tungtang thu athei uh.”
18037001	“Hiai ah leng ka lungtang aling a, amun a kipan suan in a-om hi.
18037002	A-aw ging leh akam a kipan avan-ging paikhia noute'n ngaikhia un.
18037003	Van pumpi nuai ah asawlkhia a, akhophia lei tawpnate tan in.
18037004	Huai zoh in aw akikou a; alalna aw in vanpi agingsak a: a-aw zak a a-om chiang in amau alen kei hi.
18037005	Pathian in a-aw in lamdangtak in vanpi agingsak a; i theihtheih louh, thil thupite ahih zel hi.
18037006	Ama'n lah vuk kiang ah, ‘Lei ah kia in,’ achi ngal a; huchi mah bang in vuahmal phin kiang ah leng.
18037007	Mi chiteng khut atuambit a; abawlsa mite tengteng in huai atheihtheihna ding un.
18037008	Huai lai in gamsate amun uah alut ua, akuate uah a-om uhi.
18037009	Simlam dantan a kipan huihpi ahong a; mallam a kipan khovot.
18037010	Pathian hu in tui khal piak ahi; tuite nakna hihhaksat in a-om.
18037011	Ahi, meipi nawnna aposak a; akhophia meipi aphalhsak hi.
18037012	Amah pi in akivial heihei ua, tentheihna khovel maikaih a amaute thu apiak peuhmah ahihna ding un.
18037013	Bawlhoihna ding hiam, agam a ding hiam, ahihkeileh zahngaihna ding hiam a, ahon paisakna ah.
18037014	“Hiai ngaikhia in, Aw Job; dingh kinken inla, Pathian thilhih lamdangte ngaihtuah in.
18037015	Amaute tung a Pathian thupiak akoih a, ameipi khophia atansakdan na thei hia?
18037016	Meipite kibuk diknate, amah theihna hoihkim thilhih lamdangte na thei hia?
18037017	Sim huih ziak a lei adaih sipsip lai a, na puansilhte alumdan?
18037018	Amah toh van, suntawm limlang bang a khauh na phalh thei hia?
18037019	Akiang a ka gen ding uh hon sinsak in; mialna ziak in ka thugen ding uh ka gelkhol thei kei ua.
18037020	Thu ka gen ding chih amah hilh ding ahi diam? Ahihkeileh mihing in valh khit a om ut ding ahi diam?
18037021	“Huchi in mite'n meipi a om khovak amu kei ua: himahleh huih anung a, amaute ahihsiang hi.
18037022	Mal a kipan in dangka-eng bang a thupi ahong pai a; Pathian alalna ah athupi hi.
18037023	Bangkim hihthei thu ahihleh, mu thei kei hang; thilhihtheihna ah athupi petmah hi. Huan vaihawmna leh dikna hauhna ah gim athuaksak kei ding hi.
18037024	Huaiziak in mite'n amah alau ua; lungtang a pil kuamah alimsak kei hi.”
18038001	Huchi in Toupa'n pingpei a kipan in Job adawng a, hichi in achi:
18038002	“Theihna bei thute a thuhilh hihmial hiai kua ahia?
18038003	Kipasalsak in tu in na kawng gak inla; hon dong ding ka hi, ka kiang a na gen ding ahi.
18038004	Lei kingaknate ka koih lai in nang koi ah na om a? Gen in, theihsiamna nei na hihleh.
18038005	Atehnate kua bawl ahia? Thei na hihleh! Atung a tehna khau kua zan ahia?
18038006	Anuai suangphumte kua phum ahia? Huai aning a suang kua koih ahia?
18038007	Zingsang aksite'n la asakkhawm ua, Pathian tapate tengteng kipak a akikou lai un?
18038008	“Ahihkeileh kua'n kongkhakte in tuipite akhakbing a? Gil a kipan hong pawtkhia bang a, ahong puahkhiak lai in.
18038009	Huai a puansilh meipi leh, khomial bikbek, huai a ding a tuamna puan ka bawl a,
18038010	huai a ding a ka thupiak bawl a, kalhnate leh kongkhakte koih a,
18038011	hiai tan na hong pai ding, himahleh aban hilou in, ka chih a; hiai lai ah aki-uangsak na tuikihotte kholsak in a-om ding uh, ka chih lai in?
18038012	Na nite akipat nungsiah zingsang thu na pia in, phalvak amun thei ding in na bawlta hia?
18038013	Lei tawpnate amat theih a, huai a kipan a gilou sinkhiak ahihtheihna ding in?
18038014	Chiamtehna nuai a tungman lei bang in mel akikheng a; puansilh bang in thil tengteng zenei in adingkhia hi.
18038015	Gilou a kipan a akhovak uh lettangsak ahi a, aban liksang uh akitan hi.
18038016	“Tuipi nak sung ah na lutta hia? Ahihkeileh tui thuk tawp ah na paita hia?
18038017	Sihna kongpite na kiang ah taklat in a-omta hia? Ahihkeileh sihna limliap kongpite na muta hia?
18038018	Leitung zatdan na theisiamta hia? Puangkhia in, huai na theihleh.
18038019	Khovak tenna zotna lampi koi ah a-om a, huan khomial omna mun koisan ahia?
18038020	Huchi a gamgi tan a na tonpih theih a, huai a inn tan a lampite na theihna ding in?
18038021	Thei mah niteh maw, huai lai a piangta hi ding hi chin a? Na nite atam mahmah ngal a!
18038022	“Vuk koihkhawmna ah na lut ngei hia, ahihkeileh gial koihkhawmna na muta hia?
18038023	Huai buaina hun a ding leh kidou leh kisat ni a dia ka koihkholhte?
18038024	Bang lampi ah ahia khovak akikhen hiam leitung a suahlam huih adalhzak?
18038025	Kua'n ahia tui tampi luanna ding a tuilam khuak a, kekkia a dia lampi sial?
18038026	Mihing omlouhna mun gam tung a vuah zusak ding in; mihing omlouhna, gamdai tung ah.
18038027	Lei kisia leh segawpsa lungkimsak ding; loupa hing nou khangkhesak ding?
18038028	Vuah in pa anei hia? Ahihkeileh daitui takte kua suan ahia?
18038029	Kua gil a kipan a tui khal hong pai ahia? Van daitui khal ngou, kua suahsak ahia?
18038030	Suang bang in tuite atak a, tui thuk maite akhal hi.
18038031	“Siguk khaute na khihkhawm thei hia? zuheisuktun khaute na phel thei hia?
18038032	Ama hunbi ah Aksi lamvak a chiamtehnate na pikhe thei hia? Ahihleh Zaangkhua leh tate na pi thei hia?
18038033	Van thupiakte na thei hia? Huai lalna lei ah na dingkhesak thei diam?
18038034	Nang tui tampi in akhuhtheihna ding in meipi kiang ah aw na suah thei diam?
18038035	Amau kiang ah, ‘Hiai ah om ung,’ chi a apaikhiak theihna ding un khophiate na sawlkhe thei a hia?
18038036	Sunggil lam ah pilna kua'n akoih a? Ahihkeileh lungsim kiang ah kua'n theihsiamna apia a?
18038037	Pilna in kua'n meipite asim thei dia? Van tuithawlte kua'n abokhe thei dia?
18038038	Alompi a leivui aluan a, asakte akimatkhawm ngiungeu lai un?
18038039	“Humpinelkai a ding in samat na betsak ding hia? Ahihkeileh humpinelkai noute gilkial na hihdam ding hia?
18038040	Akua ua aboh ua, buk ding a abukna mun ua a-om nilouh lai un?
18038041	Va-ak a ding a an kua'n pia ahia? Anoute Pathian kiang akikou a an duh man a avakvak lai un?”
18039001	“Suangpi a gam sathakte'n nou asuahsak hun uh na thei hia? Ahihkeileh nou aneih lai uh na chiamteh thei hia?
18039002	Akha chinsak zah uh na thei hia? Ahihkeileh apian hun na thei hia?
18039003	Akun ua, atate uh asuang uh, alungkhamnate uh apaikhia uhi.
18039004	Atate uh deihhuaitak in a-om ua, gamlak ah akhanglian ua; akuankhia ua, ahong kik nawn kei uh.
18039005	“Kua'n gam sabiltung akhahkhia a? Ahihkeileh kua'n gam sabiltunghonte aphel a?
18039006	Kua ahia a-inn ding a gamdai ka piak a, atenna ding a gamkeu ka bawlsak?
18039007	Khopi buai nuanua amusit a, hawltute kikounate aza kei hi.
18039008	Mual dungte agantatna mun ahi a, huan thil hing chiteng azong hi.
18039009	“Na nna sem ding in gam bawngtal alungkim hia? Ahihkeileh na anpiakna kiang ah a-om gige diam?
18039010	Leilehna ah khau in gam bawngtal na khihthei diam? Ahihkeileh na nung ah phaizangte atoktam diam?
18039011	Ahatna athupi ziak in, amah na muang diam? Ahihkeileh akiang ah na sepgimna na khiak diam?
18039012	Na buhchi inn ahon tut a, na buhphual a buh akaihkhawm theihna ding in amah na muang diam?
18039013	“Ostrik kha kisatheitak in akizap a; akhavengte leh amulte amigi hia?
18039014	Atuite lah leitung ah anusia a, leivui ah alumsak a,
18039015	Khe in asikkham thei chih a mangngilh a, ahihkeileh gamsa in asikgawp thei, chih.
18039016	Amah a hilou bang in, anoute siatna ding in akhauh a; asepgimna bangmah lou himahleh, alau kei hi.
18039017	Pathian in pilna angolhsak ziak in, theihsiamna leng ape sam kei hi.
18039018	Tungsang lam a akitawisang chiang in, sakol leh atungtuangmi anuihsan.
18039019	“Sakol hatna nang piak hia? Mul nem in angawng na tuam hia?
18039020	Khaukhup bang in na tawmsak hia? Ahamna thupi alauhuai ve.
18039021	Guam ah lei akhuat a, ahatna ah akipak a, mi kigalthuamte tuak ding in apaikhia.
18039022	Lauhuai anuihsan a, alungdong kei a, namsau leng anungngat sam kei hi.
18039023	Amah ah thalbawm aging lengleng a, teipite zelzel leh chiangzum.
18039024	Kihtakhuaina leh hehna in lei anawmvalh a; Pengkul aw ahi chih leng agingta sam kei hi.
18039025	Pengkul agin teng in, ‘Hah’ achi a, kidouna, heutute vanpiging leh kikou, gamlapi a pan athei.
18039026	“Na pilna in mu sangpi a lengsak in, akhate simlam ah aphalh hia?
18039027	Nang thupiak in hia muvanlai in tungsang a leng a abu aseh?
18039028	Suangpi tung ah ateng a, huai ah giahna anei a, suanghengte leh kulh muanhuaite ah.
18039029	Huai a kipan in mat ding amu a; amitte'n gamla amu hi.
18039030	Anoute'n leng sisan atawpbei ua; thah a a-omna mun, huai ah a-om hi.”
18040001	Huai lou in Toupa'n Job adawng a, hichi in achi:
18040002	“Kuapeuh awlmoh nei lou in thil Bangkim hihthei akiselpih diam? Kuapeuh Pathian kiselpih, huai tuh amah dawngsak un.”
18040003	Job in Toupa adawng a, hichi in achi:
18040004	“Ngai in, bangmah ka hita kei a; bangchi in ka hon dawng dia? Ka kam ah ka khut ka koih.
18040005	Khatvei ka pauta a, ka dawng kei ding; ahi, nihvei himahleh ka pau nawn kei ding.”
18040006	Toupa'n pingpei a kipan in Job adawng a, hichi in achi.
18040007	“Kipasalsak inla, tu in na kawng gak in. Nang a kipan ka hon phut dia, kei kiang ah na hon puang ding hi.
18040008	Ka vaihawmna bangmah lou a koih ding na hiam? Siam na tantheihna dia, kei hon mohpaih ding na hi hia?
18040009	Ahihkeileh Pathian bang in ban na nei hia? Amah bang in aw in vanpi na gingsak thei hia?
18040010	Tu in nang hoihkim leh zahna in kizem in; zahna leh lalna in kivan in.
18040011	Na hehna dimlette sungkhia in; michih kisatheite en inla, hihniam in.
18040012	Michih kisathei en inla, kainiam in; adinna uah migiloute tuanchil in.
18040013	Leivui ah amaute selkhawm in; mundai ah amai uh kan in.
18040014	Huchi in na khut taklam in nang ahondam thei chih ka hon thei ding.
18040015	“Ngai dih, nang ka hon siam bang a ka siam, tu in behemoth en in; bawngtal bang in loupa ane hi.
18040016	En in tu in, akawng ah ahatna a-om a, agilpi thate ah ahatna a-om hi.
18040017	Sidar sing bang in amei atangsak a, apheite thaguite phankhawm in a-om hi.
18040018	Aguhte dal lawng ahi a, aguh leh tangte siktawn bang ahi.
18040019	“Pathian lampite amakai lianpen ahi, amah bawlpa kia in anamsau amah kiang lam naih ding in abawl thei ding.
18040020	Chihtaktak in mualte'n amah an apuak ua; gamsate tengteng mawlna mun ah.
18040021	Singbawk limte nuai ah alum a, pumpeng kawm leh chiknawng lak ah.
18040022	Tui lili singte'n alim un akhuh ua; lui gei singnah kaite'n atuam kimvel uhi.
18040023	Ngai in, lui adimletleh, aling kei a; akam chiang pha hial in Jordan khang mahleh, amuang hi.
18040024	Akiven lai in kuapeuh in amah sikkawi in aman diam, thang in anak avut pailet diam?”
18041001	“Ngakuai in Leviathan na kaikhe thei diam? Ahihkeileh akhau in alei na sawntum thei diam?
18041002	Anak sung ah khauhual na thun thei diam? Ahihkeileh sikkawi in ahaizek na vut pailet thei diam?
18041003	Na kiang ah thilnget tampi abawl diam? Ahihkeileh na kiang ah thu nemte agen diam?
18041004	Tangtawn a ding in amah sikha dia na laktheihna ding in, nang toh thukhun abawl diam?
18041005	Vasa toh bang in amah toh na mawl diam? Ahihkeileh na sikhanute a ding in amah na hen diam?
18041006	Ngaman mite'n amah sumsinna ding in abawl ding uam? Sumsin mite lak ah amah azuak ding uam?
18041007	Siklen in avun na dimsak thei diam, ahihkeileh alu ngalingte in?
18041008	Atung ah na khut koih in; kidouna theigige in, huchi in na hih nawn kei ding hi.
18041009	“Ngai in, amah lametna bangmah lou ahi; amah muh mahmah in mi paihkhiak in a-om kei dia hia?
18041010	Amah hihhalh ngam khop ding in kuamah ahang kei; ka ma a dingh kua ahia le?
18041011	Amah ka dit ding, ka kiang ah kua'n ape masa a le? Van nuai a om peuhmah kei' a ahi.
18041012	“Aguh-le-tang thu ah ka dai kei ding, ahatna mahmah leh, apum kilawmna ah leng.
18041013	Apuansilh tungnung kua'n asuahsak thei dia? Akamkaih thuah nih sung ah kua ahong pai dia?
18041014	Amai kongkhakte kua'n ahong thei dia? Aha kimvel ah lauhuaina a-om.
18041015	Alip hattakte akisaktheihna ahi, namkipsa bang a khakkhum ahi.
18041016	Akal ua huihzam alut theihlouhna ding in, khat in adang anaih mahmah.
18041017	Khat leh adang akizom ua, akisoumat ua, khen theih louh in a-om uh.
18041018	Ahahchhiaite'n avaksak a, amitte zingsang mitvunte bang ahi.
18041019	Akam a pan meikuangte apawtkhia, mei-ekte atawmkhia hi.
18041020	Anakvangte a kipan in meikhu apawt a, halsianna bel leh chiklak loupa kang a kipan bang in.
18041021	“Ahu in suang akuangsak a, akam a pan meikuang apawtkhia hi.
18041022	Angawng ah hatna a-om gige a, ama ah lauhuaina alam hi.
18041023	Asa thate akizomkhawm ua, atung ah akip ua; hihtat theih in a-om kei uh.
18041024	Alungtang suang bang in akip a; ahi, buhgawina suang nuainung bang ahi.
18041025	Amah athoh chiang in, mihatte alau uh; lauh luatna ziak in omdan ding athei kei uh.
18041026	Mi'n amah namsau in satleh, aphatuam kei hi; teipi hiam, thal hiam, sikmuk zum hiam in leng.
18041027	Buhpawl bang in sik asim a, sing muatsa bang in dalsik.
18041028	Thal in amah ataisak thei kei ding; amah lak ah vaisuanglot suangte buhpawl asuak hi.
18041029	“Khetbukte buhpawl bang a sim ahi. Teipi ging anuihsan hi.
18041030	Anuailam pangte belpei ahi, buannawi tung ah buhkhetna chiang bang in akiphah hi.
18041031	Tui thukte belpi sou bolhbolh ding in abawl a, tuipi nuh theih bawm in abawl hi.
18041032	Anung ah lampi avaksak a; tui thuk samkang nei asa uhi.
18041033	Leitung ah amah bang a lauh nei lou a-om kei a,
18041034	Thil sang chiteng a-en a, kisathei tapate tengteng tung ah kumpipa ahi.”
18042001	Huchi in Job in Toupa adawng a, hichi in achi.
18042002	“Thil bangkim na hihthei chih leh nang thiltup kham theih ahi kei chih ka thei hi.
18042003	Hiai thuhilhna theihna tel lou a sel kua ahia? Huaiziak in ka theihsiam louh, ka theih louh, kei a dia thillamdang luate ka genkhia hi.
18042004	“Za in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka pau ding; nang ka hon phut ding, kei lam ah nang puang in, na hon chi hi.
18042005	Zakna bil in nang ka hon za a; himahleh tu in ka mit in ka hon mu a,
18042006	Huaiziak in ka kikih a, leivui leh meivu ah ka kisik hi.”
18042007	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huchi a Toupa'n Job kiang a hiai thute agen khit in, Toupa'n Teman mi Eliphaz kiang ah, “Ka hehna nang tung leh na lawm nihte tung ah akuang, ka sikha Job bang a noute'n ka tanchin thil dik na gen louh ziak un,” achi hi.
18042008	“Huaiziak in tu in, bawngtal sagih leh belamtal sagih la unla, ka sikha Job kiang ah hoh unla, nou a ding in halmang thillat lan un; huchi in noute a ding in ka sikha Job athum ding a; amah vang in ka sang dia, huchi in na haina uh dungzui in na tung uah ka hih kei ding; ka sikha Job bang in lah ka tanchin thil dik na gen kei uh,” chi in.
18042009	Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz leh Shuah mi Bildad leh Naamath mi Zophar akuan ua, Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi. Toupa'n Job asangta hi.
18042010	Alawmte a dia Job athum zoh in Toupa'n Job saltanna akiheisak a, Toupa'n Job ama a aneih zahnih apeta hi.
18042011	Huai lai in akiang ah, a-unaute tengteng leh asanggamnute tengteng leh tuma lam a amel theihsa tengteng leh a-insung a tanghou amah toh nete ahong pai ua, amah anem ua, Toupa'n atung a hoih lou atunsak tengteng tungtang thu ah amah alungmuan uhi. Michih in leng ama sum leh michih in dangka-eng bilbah apia uhi.
18042012	Huchi in Toupa'n Job tawpna lam a kipatna lam sang in anak vualzawl zaw hi. Belam singkhat-le-sangli leh sangawngsau sangguk leh bawngtal sangkhat leh sabengtungnu sangkhat anei hi.
18042013	Tapa sagih leh tanu thum leng anei hi.
18042014	Amasapen, Jemima achi a; anihna min, Kezia; athumna min, Keren-happuk.
18042015	Huchi in gamsung pumpi ah Job tanute bang a melhoih a-om kei uh; apa un a-unaute lak ah goutan amaute apia hi.
18042016	Huai nung in Job, kum za-le-sawmli adam a, atapate leh atapate' tapate, khang lina tan amu hi.
18042017	Huchi in Job atek mahmah a, a-upat tak ziak in asita hi.
19001001	Pathian limsakloute hoihsak bang a om ngei lou a, mikhialte lampi a leng dingh lou a, musitte tutphah a leng tu ngeiloumi ahampha hi.
19001002	Akipahna tuh Toupa dan ah ahi zaw a; adan thu sun leh zan in angaihtuah ngitnget hi.
19001003	Amah zaw tui luang kiang a sing suan ahun a gah zel, anah leng kau ngei lou bang ahi a; athilhih peuhmah alamzang zel ding hi.
19001004	Pathian limsakloute huchibang ahi kei ua; buhsi huih in amut lengmang bang ahi zaw uhi.
19001005	Huaiziak in mi Pathian limsakloute zaw vaihawmna ma ah adingh thei kei ding uh, mikhialte leng midiktatte omkhopna ah adingh thei sam kei ding uhi.
19001006	Toupa'n midiktatte lampi athei naknak ngal a; mikhialte lampi bel amangthang ding hi.
19002001	“Bang achia namte heh a, bang achia michih in thil phatuam lou ngaihtuah uh ahia?
19002002	Leitung a kumpipate akisa duamduam ua, heutute'n leng Toupa leh athaunilh kalh asawm chiat uh,
19002003	agaknate uh hihtat in, akhauhualte uh ei a kipan i paimang ding uh,” chi in.
19002004	“Van a tupa anui dia; Toupa'n amaute anuihsan ding hi.
19002005	Huai khit chiang in heh in akiang uah thu agen ding a, thangpaitak in amaute ahihmangbangta ding hi.
19002006	Kei mahmah in ka mual siangthou Zion ah ka kumpipa ka tusak hi,” achi hi.
19002007	Thusehsa ka gen ding hi; Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Nang zaw ka tapa na hi a; tuni in ka hon neikhia ahi.
19002008	Hon ngen in, huchi in na gouluah ding in namte ka hon pe dia, kawlmong tawp tan in na gou ding in leng ka hon pe ding hi.
19002009	Sikchiang in amaute na hihkham dia; belvelmi'n bel apaihkhap bang un na paikham ding,” achi hi.
19002010	Huchi in kumpipate aw, pilta unla; leitung a vaihawmte aw, thuzoh in omta un.
19002011	Laudan siam in Toupa nna sem unla, ling kawm in kipak un.
19002012	Tapa tawp unla, huchi keileh aheh ding a, lam lak ah na mangthang kha ding uh, athangpai zok ding hi. Amah a ginna koih tengteng ahampha uhi.
19003001	Toupa aw kei hon doute pung hi na mahmah uh e! Kei hon sualte tampi ahi uh;
19003002	amah a ding in Pathian ah panpihna himhim a-om kei, chi a, ka hinna tungtang thugente tampi a-om uhi. Selah
19003003	Himahleh, Toupa aw, nang ka thupina leh ka kim ka vel in ka phaw na hi a; ka lu domkangpa na hi.
19003004	Ka aw in Toupa ka sam a, amual siangthou a kipan in ahon dawng zel hi. Selah
19003005	Kei ka lum in ka na ihmuta a; ka khanglou nawn a; Toupa'n ahon na len gige ahi.
19003006	Hon dou a, hon umsuakte, mi singkhat nangawn ka kihta kei ding.
19003007	Toupa aw, thou inla; ka Pathian aw, hon hondam in; kei hon doute teng abiangguh uah na khen pah a; Pathian limsak lou mite ha na kikhongsak a;
19003008	hotdamna tuh Toupa a ahi; na vualzawlna na mite tung ah om hen. Selah
19004001	Ka diktanna Pathian aw, ka hon sap chiang in hon dawng in; ka mangbat chiang in, nang na hon hih navak zel a; ka tung ah zahngai inla, ka thumna hon ngaihkhiaksak in.
19004002	Mihing tate aw, ka thupina bang tan ahia zahlakna a na suahsak ding uh? Bang tan ahia thil bangmah lou na thupisak ua, zuauthu na zon ding uh? Selah
19004003	Toupa Pathian limsakmi amah a ding in akoihtuam chih thei zaw un; amah ka sap peuhmah chiang in, Toupa'n ahon ngaikhe ding hi.
19004004	Kihta unla, thil hihkhial kei un; na lupna tung uah na lungtang un ngaihtuah unla, dai sipsip un. Selah
19004005	Diktatna kithoihna lan unla, Toupa gingta un.
19004006	Hoihna himhim kua'n ahia hon musak ding chite tampi a-om uhi. Toupa , nang mahmah in na mel vak in hon sunvak in!
19004007	Abuh leh a-uain uh ahong khan chiang a akipahna sang ua, kipahna thupizaw ka lungtang ah na omsak hi.
19004008	Khamuangtak in ka lum ding a, ka ihmu ding hi; Toupa , nangmah mah na hi, kei kia a leng bittak a hon omsak gige.
19005001	Toupa aw, ka thute ah na bil hon doh inla, ka ngaihtuahnate ngaihtuah in.
19005002	Ka kumpipa leh ka Pathian, ka kikou aw ngaikhia in, na kiang a thum ka hi ngal a.
19005003	Toupa aw, zingsang in ka aw na za zel ding a; zingsang in ka thumna na ma ah ka gel hoih dimdiam ding a, ka hon na hungaih zel ding hi.
19005004	Gilou-salou kipahpih Pathian na hi ngal kei a; mikhialte na kiang atung kei ding hi.
19005005	Miki-uangsakte na mitmuh in adingh thei kei ding ua; gitlouhna nna semte tengteng na hua hi.
19005006	Zuaugen hatte na hihmang ding a; Toupa'n sisan suah hat leh khemhatmi akih nilouh hi.
19005007	Himahleh kei bel, na hoihna phatna in, na inn ah ka hong lut ding a; laudan siam kawm in na tempul siangthou lam nga in ka hon be zel ding hi.
19005008	Toupa aw, ka melmate ziak in na diktatna in hon pi inla; na lampi ka ma ah kichiansak in.
19005009	Akam uah ginomna himhim a-om kei a; asunglam uh gitlouh satlouhna ngen ahi; agawl uh han kihong ahi a; alei un mi aphat khempeuh uhi.
19005010	Pathian aw, amaute siam louh tangsak in amau hoihsaknate ngei pukna in zang uhen; atatlekna tampi ziak un sawnkhia in; na tung ah ahel ngal ua.
19005011	Nangmah a ginna koihte nangmah ah kipak uhenla, na humbit zel ziak in nuam in kikou nilouh uhen; na min itte leng nangmah ah kipaktak in om uhen.
19005012	Midiktat na vualzawl ding a; Toupa aw, amah phaw bang in, deihsakna in na umsuak ding hi.
19006001	Toupa aw, heh in hon sal ke'nla, thangpai in hon sawi sam ke'n.
19006002	Toupa aw, ka tung ah zahngai in, ka gimgawpta a; Toupa aw, hon damsak in; ka guhte lah ana vekta ngal a;
19006003	Ka hinna leng nakpitak in hihmangbat in a-om hi; Toupa aw, nang bang tan ahia na hon etsim ding?
19006004	Toupa aw, hong kik nawn inla, ka hinna hondam in, na hoihna phatna ziak in hon hondam in.
19006005	Sih nung in nang theihgigena a-om ngal kei a; Sheol ah kua'n ahia na tung a kipahthu gen ding?
19006006	Ka mauna lam ah ka bahta; zan teng in tui ah ka lupna ka kilamsak a; ka lupna ka khitui in ka kawtsak zel hi;
19006007	Lungkhamna ziak in ka mit ase hulhul a; hon doute ziak in ahong tek deuhdeuhta hi.
19006008	Nou, nna gilou sem tengteng aw, hon paisan vek un; Toupa'n ka kah ging azata ngal a;
19006009	Toupa'n hehpihna ka nget lah angaikheta a; Toupa'n ka thumna akipahpih ding hi.
19006010	Hon doute tengteng azahlak un amangbang mahmah ding ua; akik nawn ding ua, thakhat in ahong zahlak ding uhi.
19007001	Toupa ka Pathian aw, nangmah ah ka ginna ka nga a; hon delh tengteng lak ah hon hondam in hon humbit in;
19007002	huchi lou in zaw, humbitpa om lou in humpinelkai bang in, ka hinna abotnen kha ding hi.
19007003	Toupa ka Pathian aw, huchibang a hih ka na hih a, ka khut a khelhna a-om a,
19007004	ka lawm khelhna a thuk ka na hihleh, ahi, bangmah lou a hon dou ka humbit ana hi zaw.
19007005	Melma in ka hinna delh in, delhpha mai hen aw; ahi, ka hinna lei ah chilpuk in, ka thupina leivui lak ah koih mai hen. Selah
19007006	Toupa aw, heh in thou inla, hon doute thangpaihna dou ding in kisa inla; kei a ding in kihihhalh inla; vaihawmna ding thu na peta hi.
19007007	Huchi in michih omkhawmte'n hon umsuak uhen, huan, nang atung uah sangpi in kik nawn in.

19007012	Mi akiheikik keileh ama'n anamsau tat-hiam in; thalpeu alai a, amanta hi.

19007016	Athilhihkhelhna ama lutung mah ah ahong kik nawn ding, hiamgamtak a athilhih ama sip mah ah ake ding hi.
19007017	Toupa adiktatna ziak in, akiang ah kipahthu ka gen ding; Toupa tungnungpen min phat in la ka sa ding hi.
19008001	Toupa koute Toupa aw, leitung tengteng ah na minhoih hi na tel e! Na thupina thu van tungte ah na koih a.
19008002	Melma leh phulami daihsakna ding in, hon doute ziak in naungek leh nawi ne laite kam a pawt in hatna na hihkip hi.
19008003	Na van, na khutsuakte, kha leh aksi na sehte, ka ngaihtuah chiang in,
19008004	Mihing bang ahia, huchi tel a na limsak? Mihing tapa leng bang ahia, huchi tel a na veh? ka chi hi.
19008005	Amah zaw angelte sang a nuaizaw phet in na bawl a, thupina leh pahtawina na khusak hi.
19008006	Na khutsuak tungte ah thu na neisak a; akhenuai ah bangpeuh na koih a.
19008007	Belam leh bawng tengteng toh, ahi, gamsate toh leng;
19008008	Tung a leng vasa leh tuipi ngasate, tuipi a lampi tawn peuhmahte toh.
19008009	Toupa kou Toupa aw, leitung tengteng ah na minhoih hi na tel e!
19009001	Toupa kiang ah ka lungtang tengteng in kipahthu ka gen ding a; na thillamdang hih tengteng ka theisak ding hi.
19009002	Nangmah ah ka kipak in ka nuam ding a; Tungnungpen aw, na min phat in la ka sa ding hi.
19009003	Hon doute ataizaktak un, na ma ah akipalpuk ua, amangthang uhi.
19009004	Kei a dia kilawm himahleh ka thu ah nang kei na hon gum ngal a; diktak a vaihawm in laltutphah ah na tu a.
19009005	Namte na thuhilh a, gilou-saloute na hihmangthang a, amin uh leng tangtawn tangtawn in na thaimangta hi.
19009006	Dou mite amangbang vek ua, tangtawn a ding in bangmah nei lou in a-omta uhi; na kho sukgamsate amaute theihgigena nangawn toh amangthang hi.
19009007	Toupa tangtawn in kumpipa in atu dia; alaltutphah vaihawmna in abawlta hi.
19009008	Ama'n khovel kizentak in vai ahawmsak ding a, khentuam nei lou in michih vai ahawm ding hi.
19009009	Nuaisiahte a ding in Toupa bukna ahi ding, buai hun chiang a bukna.
19009010	Huchi in na min theite'n ahon muang ding ua; nang zaw Toupa , nangmah hon zongte na paisan ngei ngal kei hi.
19009011	Toupa , Zion a om phat in la sa unla; mite lak ah athilhihte hilh un.
19009012	Sisan suah thu dongtel zelpa'n amau lah atheigige ngal a; migenthei kikou aw amangngilh ngei kei hi.
19009013	Toupa aw, hon hehpih inla; sihna kongkhak a pan hon kaikhepa, hon hote ziak a ka mangbatna en in.
19009014	Nangmah phatna tengteng ka theihsak theihna ding in; Zion tanu kongpi ah, na hon hotdamna ah ka nuam ding hi.
19009015	Namte akokhuk bawl uah atum ua; aguk a alen zak uah amau khe mah a-awkta hi.

19009017	Migilou-saloute Sheol ah akik nawn ding uh. Nam chih Pathian mangngilh hatte tengteng toh.

19009020	Toupa aw, amau lausak in; namte'n mihing lel ahi uh chih kithei uhen. Selah
19010001	Toupa aw, bang achia gamlapi a dingh nak na hia? Bang achia mangbat lai bang a kisel nak?
19010002	Migilou-salou kisaktheihna ziak in migentheite delh in a-om uhi, athil gilou ngaihtuahkhiakte uah amau mah awk uhen.
19010003	Migilou-salou in alungtang ut lam asuang, mihuaiham in Toupa apaikhia a, amusit hi.
19010004	Migilou-salou in kisaktheih melpu in, angaihtuahna ah, Pathian a-om kei, achi hi. Angaihtuahna tengteng tuh, Pathian a-om kei, chih ngen ahi.
19010005	A-omdante tuh chik lai peuh in leng akip a; na vaihawmnate tunglam gamlapi ah, amuh bat louh ah, a-om hi; Amah doute tengteng lah anuihsan maimah ngal a.
19010006	Alungsim in, “Ka ling kei ding, khang tengteng tan in mangbang in ka om kei ding,” achi hi.
19010007	Akam hamse lohnate, khemnate, engbawlnate in adim a; alei nuai ah thilhihkhelhna leh siatna a-om hi.
19010008	Kho teng a guktanna munte ah atu zel a; mundai ah khelhna nei lou mite athat zel hi, amit in tasam mite aguktan nak ahi.
19010009	Humpinelkai in akua a aguktan bang in ama'n mundai ah aguktan zel hi; mitasam man ding in atang zel a, mitasam aman ngei a, huchi in alen in akaimang nak hi.
19010010	Abokkhup a, akun a, bangmah hihthei lou amihatte uh hihpuk in a-om nak uhi.
19010011	Alungsim ah, Pathian in amangngilh ahi; amai asel a, chik mah chiang in amu kei ding, achi hi.
19010012	Toupa aw, thou in; Pathian aw, na khut lik in, migentheite mangngilh ke'n;
19010013	Bangziak in ahia migilou-salou in Pathian amuhsit, alungsim a, na phut kei ding, achih nak?
19010014	Muh zaw na mu khin tham a; na khut a thuk ding thil hihkhial leh hihvuina na en a, migentheite na kiang ah akikemsak ua; pa nei lou panpihpa na hi.
19010015	Migilou-salou ban sutan inla, migilou, gitlouhna zongkhia in, na muh het louh mateng.
19010016	Toupa tangtawn tangtawn a ding in Kumpipa ahi a; namte amah gam a pan in amangthang uhi.
19010017	Toupa , kingainiamte deihna na ngaikhia a; alungtang uh na kisasak ding a, abil un leng na zasak ding hi.
19010018	Pa neiloute leh nuaisiah a omte, leitung mi'n a-engbawl nawnlouhna ding un, avai uh hawmsak in.
19011001	Toupa ah ka ginna ka nga zel a, bangchidan ahia ka hinna kiang a, “Na tang ah vasa bang in lengmang in chi na hi ua?

19011003	Suangphumte hihsiat a-omleh, midiktat in bang ahia ahihtheih ding?”
19011004	Toupa atempul siangthou ah a-om a, Toupa laltutphah leng van ah a-om; mihing tate amit in a-en a, amit in a-enchian zel hi.
19011005	Toupa'n midiktat a-enchian zel a; migilou-salou leh hiamgamna deihte bel ahinna in ahua hi.
19011006	Migilou-saloute tung ah thang akesak ding a; mei leh kaat leh huih mulkimhuaitak a nou tan ding uh ahi ding hi.
19011007	Toupa lah adiktat ngal a; diktatna adeih naknak hi; midiktatte'n amel amu ding uhi.
19012001	Toupa , hon panpih in; Pathian limsakmi lah a-om nawnta ngal kei ua; mihing tate lak a kipan miginom lah amangta ngal ua.
19012002	Michih in a-invengte kiang ah thu bangmah lou maimai agengen ua; maitang phatna leh khemna lungtang pu in thu agen nak uhi.

19013001	Toupa aw, bang tan ahia na hon mangngilh nilouh ding? Bang tan ahia kei a kipan a na mai na sel ding?
19013002	Nitum in ka lungtang a lungkhamna nei in bang tan ahia ka lungsim a ka gelgel ding? Bang tan ka melma ka tung a tawisan hi ding ahia?
19013003	Toupa ka Pathian aw, ngaihtuah inla, hon dawng in; ka mit hon hihvak in, huchi lou in zaw sihna ihmut in ka ihmu kha ding hi.
19013004	Ka melma in, amah ka zouta, achi kha ding hi; ka lin leh kei hon doute akipak kha ding uhi.
19013005	Himahleh ke'n zaw na zahngaihna ka muang ahi; na hon hotdamna ah ka lungtang akipak ding.

19014001	Mihai in alungsim in, “Pathian a-om kei,” achi a. Akigawp khin ua, thilkihhuaitak ahih ua; thil hoih hih a-om kei uhi.

19015001	Toupa , na puanin ah kua ahong zintung dia? Na mual siangthou ah kua hong om ding?
19015002	Diktak a om, kizentak a hih a, alungtang a thutak genmi pen.

19015004	Migilou muhsit in a-om nak hi; Toupa laudan siamte apahtawi hi. Amah a ding a poi ding nangawn kichiam khin a hihlamdang ngei lou mi.

19016001	Pathian aw, hon humbit in, nangmah ah ka ginna ka koih hi.
19016002	Toupa kiang ah, nang tuh ka Toupa na hi a; nang lou ngal thil hoih himhim ka nei kei.

19016010	Ka kha Sheol ah na nuse kei ding a, muatna mu ding in na misiangthou na phal sam kei ding hi.
19016011	Nang hinna lampi na hon theisak ding a; na ma ah nuam dimletna a-om hi; na khut taklam ah tangtawn kipahna ding a-om hi.
19017001	Toupa aw, ka dikna thu za inla, ka kikou husa ngaikhia inla, ka thumna, zuauthu genhat muk a pawt hilou ah, bil na doh in.
19017002	Ka tung a thupukna na ma a kipan a pawt hi henla; na mit in khentuam neihlouhna en hen.
19017003	Ka lungtang na enchian a; zan in na hong pha a; na hon endikta a bangmah na mu het kei a; ka kam in agenkhial kei ding ka chi tinten ahi.
19017004	Mihing thilhih ah zaw, na muk a thupawt ziak in mihing ngongtat lampi a pai lou ding in ka kikemhoih ahi.
19017005	Ka kalsuante'n na lampi atawn ziahziah a, ka khete atal ngei kei hi.
19017006	Pathian aw, ka hon sam zel a, nang lah na hon dawng ding a; kei lam ah na bil hon doh inla, ka thugen ngaikhia in.

19017015	Ke'n zaw diktatna nei in na mel ka mu ding a; nangmah batna nei a ka hah chiang in ka lungkim hun mahmah ding hi.
19018001	Toupa ka hatna aw, ka hon it hi.
19018002	Toupa ka suangpi leh ka kulhpi, hon humbitpa ahi; ka Pathian ka suangpi kiptak ahi a, amah ah ginna ka koih ding; ka phaw, ka hotdamna kii leh ka insang ahi.
19018003	Phat tuak Toupa ka sam ding a, Hon doute lak ah hotdam in ka om ding hi.

19018005	Sheol khauhualte'n ahon gaksuak a, sihna thangte ka kimvel in a-om hi.
19018006	Ka lungkham a Toupa ka sam a, ka Pathian ka sam hi. Ama'n atempul a pan ka aw aza a, ama a ka kikou husa abil ah alutta hi.
19018007	Huaitak in lei aling a, akisatta a, aheh ziak in mualte leng akingakna nangawn toh akisat in alingta hi.
19018008	Anak a kipan in meikhu azamtou a, akam a pawt mei in akang zuazua a, meihol leng akuangsak hi.
19018009	Ama'n vante kunsak in, ahohsuk a; akhenuai ah mial bikbek a-om hi.
19018010	Cherub tung ah atuang a, alengta hi, ahi, huihkhuate ah aleng vengveng hi.
19018011	Mial bukna mun ah, bukta in ama umna abawl a; tui a mialna leh van a meipite mah.
19018012	Ama a vakna ziak in ameipite atheng a, gialte leh mei-amte ake toktok uhi.
19018013	Toupa van tung ah aging dodop a, Tungnungpen in a-aw asuaksak a; gialte leh mei-amte ake toktok uhi.
19018014	Athalte akapkhia a, amaute ahihzak hi; ahi, khua aphe zolzol nilouh a, ahihbuai vengvung hi.
19018015	Huaitak in, Toupa aw, na tai ding a, na nak a hu pawt in amut ziak in, tui luannate ahong kilang a, leilung kingaknate hihlat in a-omta hi.
19018016	Ama'n tunglam a kipan hon sawk in, ahon len a; tui tampi a kipan hon kaikhia hi.
19018017	Kei galhattak lak ah hon humbit a, hon hote lak ah leng; kei a ding in ahat lo zen ngal ua.
19018018	Amau ka vangtah ni in hon sual ua, himahleh Toupa ka ginpi pen ahi.
19018019	Ama'n mun awngthawl ah hon pikhia a; ka tung a akipah ziak in hon humbitta ahi.
19018020	Toupa'n ka diktatdan bang in ka tung ah ahih a; ka khutte asianthoudan bang ngei in ahon din ahi.
19018021	Toupa lampite ka tawn a, ka Pathian kiang a kipan giloutak in ka paimang ngei ngal kei a.
19018022	Avaihawmna tengteng ka ma ah a-om a, adan thusehte ka pai ngei ngal kei hi.
19018023	Amah lak ah gensiatbei ka hi a, ka siatna a kipan ka kihuikhe zel hi.
19018024	Huaiziak in Toupa'n ka dikdan bang in ahon na dinta a, ka khutte amitmuh a asianthou bang zel in.
19018025	Mihehpih theitakte lak ah hehpih theitak in na kilang ding a; mihoihkimte lak ah hoihkim in na kilang ding a;
19018026	misiangthoute lak ah siangthou in na kilang ding a; huan, genhakte lak ah genhak in na kilang ding hi.
19018027	Gimthuak mite hondam ding na hi ngal a; mikisatheite bel na hihniam ding hi.

19030004	Amisiangthoute aw, Toupa phat in la sa unla, amin siangthou phat un.
19030005	Ahehna mitphiat kal lel ahi a; adeihsakna ah hinna a-om hi; kahna zan khat sung lel ahi a, himahleh zingsang in nopna ahong tung nak hi.
19030006	Ke'n zaw nuam ka sak lai in, chik mah chiang in ka ling kei ding, ka chi hi.
19030007	Toupa nang na deihsakna ziak in ka tang na dingkipsakta a; himahleh na mai na sel a, ka hong mangbangta hi.
19030008	Toupa aw, nang ka hon sam a; Toupa kiang ah hehpihna ka ngen hi.
19030009	Kokhuk a ka paisuk leh, ka sisan ah punna bang a om ding! Leivui in hon phat ding hia? Na thutak a gen sin maw?
19030010	Toupa aw, ngaikhia inla, ka tung ah zahngai in; Toupa , nang hon panpihpa hi in.
19030011	Kei a ding in ka suunna, lamna na suaksak a; ka sai-ip puan na hon suahsak a, kipahna na hon tengsak hi.
19030012	Ka thupina dai nilouh lou a, nangmah phat a la asakna ding in Toupa ka Pathian aw, tangtawn in kipahthu ka hon hilh gige ding hi.
19031001	Toupa aw, nangmah ah ka ginna ka koih zel a; chik mah chiang in zahlak in hon omsak ke'nla, na diktatna ziak in hon humbit in.
19031002	Kei lam ah na bil hon doh inla; hon humbit meng in; kei a ding in suangpi kiptak, hon hotdamna ding in bitna inn hong hi in.
19031003	Nang ka suangpi leh ka kulhpi na hi a; huaiziak in na min ziak in hon pi hon kai in.
19031004	Ka awkna dia aguk a alenphah lak uah hon kaikhia in; ka insang na hi ngal a.
19031005	Na khut ah ka kha ka hon kemsak hi. Toupa thutak Pathian, nang na hon tanta hi.
19031006	Thil bangpeuh gina lou peuh ngaihtuahte ka hua a; ke'n bel Toupa ka muang ahi.
19031007	Na zahngaihna ziak in nuam in ka kipak ding a; ka mangbatna na mu gige hi; ka hinna amangbat lai in na theigige hi.
19031008	Hon doumi khut ah na hon khum kei a; ka khe mun awngthawl ah na nga zawta hi.
19031009	Toupa aw, ka tung ah zahngai in, mangbang in ka om ngal a; lungkhamna ziak in ka mit, ahi, ka hinna leh ka pumpi nangawn ase huaihuai hi.
19031010	Ka damsung lungkhamna in amangbangta ngei a, ka kumte thumna in abeita hi; ka thulimlouhna ziak in ka tha azaw a, ka guhte leng asegawp hi.
19031011	Hon doute ziak in ka min ahong seta a, ahi ka vengte lak ah nakpi in aseta hi, ka meltheihte a ding in leng kihtakhuaipi ka hita hi; kholak a hon mute'n ahon taisanta ngal ua.
19031012	Misi amangngilh bang ngei un mangngilh in ka om a, bel kitam bang lel ka hita hi.
19031013	Mi tampi hon hekna ka za ngal a, kil chih ah mulkimna a-om hi. Kei kalh a akisawmkhawm lai un, ka hinna hon laksak atum uhi.
19031014	Himahleh, Toupa aw, ka hon muang a; ka Pathian na hi ka chi hi.
19031015	Ka hunte na khut ah a-om a, hon doute khut a kipan leh hon simmohte lak ah hon humbit in.
19031016	Na mel in na sikha hon sunvak in; na zahngaihna ziak in hon hondam in.
19031017	Toupa aw, zahlak in hon omsak ke'n; ka hon sam ngal a; migilou-salou zahlak in om uhen, Sheol ah dai dinden in om uhen.
19031018	Muk zuautheite pau thei lou in om uhen; huaite'n kisathei leh musit kawm in pautaltak in midiktatte agense zel uhi.
19031019	Na hoihna, nangmah laudan siamte a ding a na kholkhawm thupi na tel e! Mihing tate mitmuh a muanna koihte a ding a na hihsak pentak.
19031020	Amau mihing omna lak ah na humbitna na mitmuh in na selgu dia; lei selhatna lak ah bukta ah na koih gu ding hi.
19031021	Toupa phat in om hen; achitdan lamdangtak khopi kiptak ah ahon musak ngal a.
19031022	Kei lah, hamhaih in, na mitmuh a pan paihmang in ka omta, ka na chi maimah hi; himahleh ka hon sap a hehpihna ka hon ngetna awte na na za hi.
19031023	Amisiangthou tengtengte aw, Toupa it un; Toupa'n miginom ahumbit a, kisatheitak a gamta nakpitak in athuk zel hi.
19031024	Toupa lamen tengtengte aw, hattak in om unla, na lungtang uh hangsak un.
19032001	Atatlekna ngaihdam a om a, akhelhna khuh a om in nuam asa hi.
19032002	Toupa'n thulimlouhna nei a aseh louh a, akha a khemna himhim omloumi in nuam asa hi.
19032003	Ka khelhna ka genkhiak louh lai in, nitum a ka mau nilouhna in ka guhte atak khin vekta hi.
19032004	Sun leh zan in na khut in na hon delh a; ka tui nawnna leng, khal nisa in thil ahihlamdang bang in, alamdang hialta hi. Selah
19032005	Ka khelhna na kiang ah ka puang a, ka thulimlouhna ka imta kei hi, ka tatlekna Toupa kiang ah ka pulak ding a, ka chi a; huchi in ka khelh thulimlouhna na ngaidamta hi. Selah
19032006	Huaiziak in Pathian limsak michih in zon muh baihlam a na om lai in na kiang ah thum chiat uhen; tui liante ahong let hun chiang in amau aphazou kei ding hi.
19032007	Nang ka bukna mun na hi a, mangbatna lak ah na hon humbit ding a; humbitna late in na hon umsuaksak ding. Selah
19032008	Na paina lampi ah ka hon hilh pil dia, ka hon chil ding; ka mit in ka hon pi ding a, ka hon suangtuahsak zel ding hi.
19032009	Ngaihtuahna nei lou sakol hiam, sabiltung hiam bang in om ke'nla; tuate letkipna ding asikbah leh kaihkhawlna khau ahi a, huchi lou in na kiangnai ah ahong pai kei ding uhi.
19032010	Migilou-salou a ding in lungkhamna tampi a-om ding; Toupa muangte bel zahngaihna in a-umsuak zaw ding hi.
19032011	Midiktatte aw, Toupa ah nuam in kipak unla; lungtang diktak pu tengteng aw, nuam in kikou un.
19033001	Midiktatte aw, Toupa ah nuam in la sa un; midik a ding in Pathian phat akilawm him ahi.
19033002	Kaihging in Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen unla; pekging gui sawm nei in amah phat in la sa un.
19033003	Amah pahtawi in la thak sa unla; husa thupi toh siamtak in tum un.
19033004	Toupa thu adik a; athilhih tengteng muanhuaitak a hih ahi ngal a.
19033005	Diktatna leh vaihawmna dik a-it nak a; leitung Toupa zahngaihna in adim hi.
19033006	Toupa thu in vante siam ahi a; huai a omte tengteng leng akam a hu a siam ahi uhi.
19033007	Ama'n tuipi tuite koihkhawm bang in abawl lemkhawm a; tui thukpite koihkhawmna innte ah akoih hoih zel hi.
19033008	Leitung luah tengteng in Toupa laudan siam henla; khovel a om tengteng amah lau in om uhen.
19033009	Ama'n agen a, ahong omta a; thu apia a, ahong omkipta hi.
19033010	Toupa'n namte lunggelna bangmah lou in a-omsak a; michih ngaihtuahnate bangmah phattuamna nei lou in asiam hi.
19033011	Toupa lunggelna bel tangtawn in a-omkip ding a, alungtang a ngaihtuahte khang tengteng tan in a-omkip ding hi.
19033012	Toupa Pathian anei nam ahampha uhi; amah gouluah ding a atel mite mah.
19033013	Toupa'n van a kipan in a-en a; mihing tate tengteng amu nak hi.
19033014	Lei a om tengteng a-omna mun a kipan in ahon en zel hi.
19033015	Amaute tengteng lungtang sekpa'n athilhih tengteng uh a-enkhia hi.
19033016	Kumpipa himhim sepaih tam ziak lel a humbit ahi ngei kei, mihat thahat ziak lel a tatkhiak ahi sam kei.
19033017	Bitna ding in sakol bangmah ahi kei; ahat mahmah ziak lel in kuamah ahumbit tuan kei ding hi.
19033018	Ngai dih, Toupa mit tuh amah laudan siamte tung ah atu gige a; azahngaihna lamente tung ah.
19033019	Ahinna uh sihna lak a humbit ding leh kial tun a amau tungding ding in.
19033020	I hinna in Toupa angak nilouh a; amah hon panpihpa leh i phaw uh ahi.
19033021	Amah ah i lungtang anuam ding ahi; amin siangthou i muan ziak in.
19033022	Toupa aw, na zahngaihna ka tung uah om hen, ka hon lamet bang zel un.
19034001	Chik lai peuh in leng Toupa ka phat ding a; amah phatna ka kam ah apawt gige ding hi.
19034002	Ka hinna in Toupa asuang ding a, thunuailutte'n huai aza ding ua, akipak ding uhi.
19034003	Aw, Toupa hon phatpih unla, amin pahtawi chiat ni.
19034004	Toupa ka zong a ama'n ahon dawng a, ka kihtak peuhmah lak ah ahon humbit hi.
19034005	Amah a-en ua, huchi in ahong vakta uhi; amelte uh chik mah in azum kei ding.
19034006	Hiai migenthei akikou a, Toupa'n aza a, amangbatna tengteng ah ahunkheta hi.
19034007	Amah laudan siamte tuh akimvel uah Toupa angel in a-opkhum a, ahumbit hi.
19034008	Aw, Toupa hoihdan chiam him dih ua; amah a muanna koihmi ahampha hi.
19034009	Amisiangthoute aw, Toupa laudan siam un; amah laudan siamte a ding in taksapna himhim a-om louh ziak in.
19034010	Humpinelkai lunlaite tuh atasam un agilkial naknak uh; Toupa zongte zaw thil hoih himhim atasam kei ding uhi.
19034011	Kisa un, naupangte, ka thu ngaikhia un; Toupa laudan ka hon hilh ding hi.
19034012	Hoihna amuhtheihna ding un, hinna deih a damsawt utmi kua ahia?
19034013	Na lei tuh gilou lak ah venghoih inla, na muk khemna thu gen lou ding in venghoih in.
19034014	Gilou paisan inla, thil hoih hih in; lemna zong inla, adelh in delh in.
19034015	Toupa mit in midiktatte a-en gige a, abil in asap uh za ding in angaikhe gige hi.
19034016	Toupa mel in thil hihkhialte adou a, amau theihgigena lei a kipan hihmangthang ding in.
19034017	Midiktatte akikou ua, Toupa'n aza a, amangbatna tengteng uah ahunkheta hi.
19034018	Toupa'n lungtang khasiate anaih zel a, lungsim a kisik peuhmahte ahondam zel hi.
19034019	Midik haksatnate atam a, himahleh Toupa'n huaite a pan ahonkhia ahi.
19034020	Aguh tengteng akemhoih a, khat lel leng hihtan ahi kei hi.
19034021	Thil hoih lou in migilou-saloute athat ding a; dik hote'n siam louh atang ding uhi.
19034022	Toupa'n asikhate hinna atan a; amah a muanna koihte khat lel leng siam louh tang a-om kei ding uhi.
19035001	“ Toupa aw, hon sualte nang sual in; hon doute nang dou in.
19035002	Phaw neu leh phaw lian la inla, hon panpih ding in dingh in.
19035003	Tei leng phawi inla, hon delhte lam na dal in; ka hinna kiang ah, na hondampa ka hi,” chi in.
19035004	“Ka hinna hihmang tum a zongte zahlaksak a hihzum in om uhen, hon hihsiatna ding a thubawlte taizaksak in gen ding thei lou hial in om uhen.
19035005	Buhsi huih mutleng bang in om uhenla, Toupa angel in delhzui zel hen.
19035006	Alampi uh mialtak leh naltak hi henla, Toupa angel in gawt hen.
19035007	“Aziak om lou in hon matna ding un alen uh kokhuk ah aphahgu ua, aziak om lou in ka hinna kiakna ding in kokhuk atou uhi.
19035008	Akigin louh lai in atung uah siatna tung henla; alen phahguk ah amah mah awk henla, huai ah kesia hen.
19035009	“Huchi in ka hinna Toupa ah anuam ding hi; ahotdamna ah akipak ding.
19035010	Ka guh tengteng in, Toupa , migenthei nan zoh vual louh lak a humbitpa ahi, tagah leh genthei, ahihgampa a pan humbitpa, nang bang kua a om?” achi ding uhi.
19035011	“Theihpih diktat lou hialte ahong ding ua; ka thil theih het louh thute ahon dong uhi.
19035012	Ka hinna in mansuah khop in thil hoih thil sia in ahon din hi.
19035013	Ke'n bel, adam louh lai un, ka puansilh sai-ip ahi a; ka hinna an ngawl in ka hihgenthei ngal a; ka thumna keimah angsung ngei ah ahong kik nawn hi.
19035014	Ka lawm hiam, ka unau hiam leng hi heh aw atung ua ka omdan ding bang in ahi ka om; mi anu kah bang in suun in ka kun hi.
19035015	“Himahleh kei ka bai leh amau akipak ua, akikhawm hial ua; mivuak hatte hon sual ding in akikhawm ua, huai ka na thei ngal kei a, tawp nuam lou in ahon hih ek uhi.
19035016	Ankuangluina a chiamnuih gente bang phet in aha uh ahon gawikhum uhi.
19035017	“ Toupa , nang bang tan ahia na et ding? Ka hinna hihsiat atupna lak uah hon hunkhia inla, ka neihsun pen humpinelkai lak ah honkhia in.
19035018	Kikhopna thupitak ah kipahthu ka hon hilh ding a; mi tampi lak ah ka hon phat ding hi.
19035019	“Ka melmate'n dikloutak ah hon otsan kei uhen; bangmah lou a hon hote leng amit un kihoupih sam kei uhen.
19035020	“Kituahna thu himhim agen ngal kei ua, hiai gam a om hiathiatte khemna thute angaihtuah zaw uhi.
19035021	Ahi, akam un hon kam kat khum ua; Ku! Ku! I mit in i muta achi uhi.
19035022	Toupa aw, nang na mu hi, daihsan ke'n! Toupa aw, hon gamlat mahmah ke'n.
19035023	Ka Pathian leh ka Toupa aw, ka vaihawm ding in, ahi, ka thu a hong um ding in, kihalhsak inla, hak in.
19035024	Toupa ka Pathian aw, na diktatna bang zel in vai hon hawmsak inla; amaute'n hon otsan kei uhen.
19035025	Alungsim un, Nuam e! Huchibang akei maw i deih, chi kei uhen. Amah i valh khinta, chi sam kei uhen.
19035026	“Ka siatna tung a kipakte zahlak leh gen ding bei in om chiat uhenla; ka tung a kiliansakte zahlakna leh zumna silhsak in om uhen.
19035027	Ka diktatna tung a kipakte nuam a kikou in kipaktak in om uhenla, Ahi, asikha vangphatna a kipakte'n Toupa pahtawi in om hen, chi gige uhen.
19035028	Huchi in ka lei in na diktatna thu agen ding a, na phatna thu nitum in agen ding hi.”
19036001	“Migilou-salou tatlekna in ka lungtang sung ah thu agen a, ‘Amit ah Pathian kihtakna a-om kei,’ chi in.
19036002	Athulimlouhna amukhe kei ding ua, apai tuan kei ding uh, chi in. Amah mitmuh in akiphat tawm hi.
19036003	Akam a thupawtte thulimlouhna leh khemna thu gen ahi nak a; pil leh thil hoih hih atawpta ahi.
19036004	Alupna ah thil thulim lou agel gige a; lampi hoih lou ah apai teitei a; gilou akih kei hi.
19036005	Toupa aw, na zahngaihna vante ah a-om a; na ginomna in meipite asu hi.
19036006	Na diktatna Pathian tangte bang ahi; na vaihawmte tui thuk talkhauh bang ahi; Toupa aw, mihing leh gamsa na humbit hi.
19036007	“Pathian aw, na zahngaihna manpha hi na tel e! Mihing tate na kha nuai ah atu zel uhi.
19036008	Amau na insung thil hoih in atai ding ua; na kipahna lui ana dawnsak ding hi.
19036009	Hinna tuikhuk nang ah a-om a, na vak ah vak ka mu ding uhi.
19036010	“Aw, nangmah theite tung ah na zahngaihna kitheisak inla; lungtang diktak pute tung ah leng na diktatna langsak in.
19036011	Kisathei khe hon sual ding in kei lam ah kalsuan dah henla, migilou-salou khut in hon delhmang kei hen.
19036012	“Huai ah thulimlouhna hihte apuk ua; paihkhiak in a-om ua, athou thei nawn kei ding uhi.”
19037001	Thil hoih lou hihte ziak in kihihlungkham nuam dah inla, dikloutak a hihte leng eng ke'n.
19037002	Loupa bang in atpaih in a-om zok ding ua, louhing bang a vuai ding ahi ngal ua.
19037003	Toupa muang inla, thil hoih hih in; hiai gam ah om inla, ginomna delh zel in.
19037004	Toupa tung ah leng kipak in; huchi in na lungtang deihlamte ahon pe ding hi.
19037005	Na omdan ding Toupa tung ah nga inla; amah muang in, ama'n ahih vek ding.
19037006	Na dikdan vak bang in asuaksak ding a, na siamtandan leng sun lai bang mai in.
19037007	Toupa ah khawl inla, amah ngak nilouh in; a-omdan a vangphatna mute ziak in kihihlungkham nuam dah in, ngaihtuahna giloute pichin mi ziak in.
19037008	Heh tawpsan inla, thangpaih kisik in; kihihlungkham nuam ke'n, thilhihkhelh ah ahong ke maimah nak hi.
19037009	Thil hoih lou hihte hihmang in a-om dek ngal ua; Toupa ngakte'n bel gam aluah ding uhi.
19037010	Sawt louchik in migilou-salou a-om nawnta kei dia; ahi, a-omna mun uh enen mah lechin, a-omta kei ding hi.
19037011	Thunuailutte'n gam aluah ding ua; kituahna thupitak ah akipak ding uhi.
19037012	Migilou-salou in midiktat a sawm a, aha agawikhum nak hi.
19037013	Toupa'n amah anuihsan ding. Ani hong tung dek ahi chih atheih ziak in.
19037014	Genthei leh tagahte hihpuk ding leh omdan dikte that ding in migilou-saloute'n namsau aphawi ua, athalpeute uh alai uhi.
19037015	Anamsau un amau lungtang asun ding a, thalpeute uh hihtan in a-om ding hi.
19037016	Midiktat thil tawmchik neih migilou-salou thil neih keihkuih sang in ahoihzaw ahi.
19037017	Migilou-salou bante hihtan in a-om dek ngal a, Toupa'n midik alen gige ding ahi.
19037018	Toupa'n mihoihkimte nite athei a; agouluah ding uh tangtawn a om gige ding ahi.
19037019	Hun hoih lou ah azahlak kei ding ua; kial kum in leng avah ding uhi.
19037020	Migilou-saloute amangthang ding ua, Toupa doute leng gamlak loupa pak kilawm bang in hihmanthat in a-om ding ua, meikhu in azammang ding uhi.
19037021	Migilou-salou in aleitawi a, ape nawn kei nak a; midik in bel zahngaihna suah in, ape zaw nak hi.
19037022	Avualzawlna mute'n gam aluah ding ua, ahamsiatte hihmanthat in a-om ding uhi.
19037023	Mi kalsuante Toupa hihkip ahi a; alampi ah akipak nak hi.
19037024	Puk mahleh, lupdetsak in zaw a-om kei ding hi; Toupa'n akhut in alen gige ngal a.
19037025	Naupang ka na hita a, tu in tek ka hong hita, himahleh midiktat limsak louh a a-om lam ka mu ngei kei hi, asuante an ngolh lam leng ka mu ngei sam kei hi.
19037026	Mi ahehpih gige a, aleitawisak a; asuante leng ahampha nak uhi.
19037027	Gilou paisan inla, thil hoih hih in; huchi in tangtawn in teng gige in.
19037028	Toupa'n vaihawm diktat adeih ngal a, amisiangthoute apaisan ngei kei hi, tangtawn a ding in kephoih in a-om ua; migilou-salou suante bel hihmang in a-om ding uhi.
19037029	Midikte'n gam aluah ding ua, asung ah tangtawn in a-om ding uh.
19037030	Midik kam in pilna thu agen a, alei in vaihawm diktatna thu agen hi.
19037031	A Pathian dan alungtang ah a-om a; akalsuan atolh kei ding hi.
19037032	Migilou-salou in midiktat a-enkhia a, hihlup atum gige hi.
19037033	Toupa'n akhut ah anuse kei ding a, avaihawm hun chiang in siam louh tansak aphal sam kei ding hi.
19037034	Toupa ngak inla, alampi tawn in, huchi in gam luah ding in ahon pahtawi ding hi; migilou-saloute hihmanthat a a-om uh na mu ding hi.
19037035	Migilou-salou nakpitak a thu nei a, apouna mun a singnou dawng thenthon bang a, ka biambuam ka mu hi.
19037036	Himahleh lampi ah mi ava pai ua, ngai dih, amah ana om kei maimah a; ahi, ka zong a, himahleh muh theih ahita kei hi.
19037037	Migensiatbei chiamteh inla, midiktak en in, huchibang mite tawpna ding zaw khamuanna hi ding ahi ngal a.
19037038	Talekte bel akituak a hihsiat in a-om ding ua, migilou-salou tawpna ding tuh hihmanthat ahita ding hi.
19037039	Himahleh midiktatte hotdamna Toupa a kipan in ahi; amah mangbat lai a kulhpi muan ahi.
19037040	Toupa'n amaute panpih in ahumbit a, amah ah akituklut ziak un migilou-saloute lak ah humbit in ahondam hi.
19038001	Toupa aw, heh in hon tai ke'nla; thangpai in hon sawi sam ke'n.
19038002	Na thalte ka sa ah atal a, na khut ka tung ah atu bukbuk ngal a.
19038003	Na lung hihlouhna ziak in ka sa ah dam lai himhim a-om kei a; ka thulimlouhna ziak in ka guhte ah dam lai a-om kei hi.
19038004	Ka thulimlouhnate'n ka lu atummang a, puakgiktak, ka puak zoh vual louh ahi.
19038005	Ka haina ziak in ka liamnate uih in anamse zouta hi.
19038006	Ka chi ana a, ka kun ngiungiau a; nitum in lungkham in ka mau den hi.
19038007	Ka kawng a lum huthut vek a; ka sa ah leng dam lai a-om kei hi.
19038008	Ka bah a, ka sidup keihkuih a; ka lungtang noplouhna ziak in ka thum hithit hi.
19038009	Toupa aw, ka deihlam tengteng na thei a; ka thumnate nang a pan sel ahi kei hi.
19038010	Ka lungphu kisai in hatna ka nei kei a; ka mit vakna in hon paimangsanta hi.
19038011	Hon itte leh ka lawmte ka natna lak ah akihuikhia ua; ka sanggamte leng gamlapi ah adingh uhi.
19038012	Ka hinna hihmang tum a zongte'n hon matna ding un thang akam ua; ka siatna ding zongte'n leng thuhoih loutakte agen nak uhi; nitum in khemna thute angaihtuah uhi.
19038013	Himahleh kei tuh nangong bang in za lou in ka om a; pau theiloumi kam ka ngei lou bang in ka om hi.

19041001	Gentheite ngaihtuahmi ahampha hi, mangbat ni in Toupa'n amah ahumbit ding.
