19050010	Gamnuai a sa chiteng kei a ahi a, mual sangkhat tung a gan omte leng.
19050011	Tang a vasa tengteng ka thei vek a; gamsate kei' a ahi.
19050012	“Gilkial mah leng ka hon hilh kei ding, leitung leh asung a thil om tengteng kei' a ahi.
19050013	Bawngtal sa ka ne in kel sisan ka dawn dia hiam?
19050014	Pathian kiang ah kipahthugen kithoihna lan zaw inla; na thuchiam leng Tungnungpen lak ah tangtun in.
19050015	Huan mangbat ni in hon sam lechin, ka hon humbit ding a, huchi in nang na hon pahtawi ding hi, achi a.
19050016	“Migilou-salou kiang ah bel, Pathian in, Ka dan thuseh bangchidan a na kam a lou na hia?
19050017	Thuhilhna na hua a, ka thute na nunglam ah na pai zel ngal a.
19050018	Guta na muh in phaze na sakpih a, angkawmpate na koppih gige behlap hi.
19050019	“Gilou kiang ah na kam na pia a, Na lei in khemna a bawl gige hi.
19050020	Tu kawm in na unau na kalh a; nangmah nu tapa ngei na hek hi.
19050021	Huai thil na hih a, himahleh ka dai nilouh a; nangmah bang geih in na hon gingta hi. Himahleh ka hon tai a, na mitmuh in kizom zel in ka hihlang ding hi.
19050022	“Nou Pathian mangngilhte aw, hiai ngaihtuah dih ua! Huchi lou in zaw ka hon botnen kha ding hi, noumau hon humbit ding lah a om dek ngal kei hi.
19050023	Kuapeuh kipahthugen kithoihna lan in ahon pahtawi zel hi, huan a-omdan kemhoihmi kiang ah Pathian hotdamna ka ensak ding hi,” achi a.
19051001	“Pathian aw, na itna thupitak dungzui in ka tung ah zahngai inla; na lainatna thupi dungzui in ka tatleknate nulmang in.
19051002	Ka thulimlouhnate hon silsiang vilvel inla, ka khelhna hon silsiangsak in.
19051003	“Ka tatleknate ka theigige ngal a, ka khelhna ka ma ah a-om nilouh hi.
19051004	Na tung ah, na tung kia ah thil ka hihkhial a, na mitmuh in thil gilou ka na hihta hi; thu na gen a siamtang a na om theih a, vai na hawm a, gensiatbei a na omtheihna ding in.
19051005	Ngai in, thulimlouhna a suktuah in ka om a; ka nu'n khelhna in ahon pai hi.
19051006	“Ngai in, sunggil ah takna na deih naknak a, akimu lou lam ah pilna na hon theisak ding hi.
19051007	Hissop in hon siangsak inla, huchi in ka siang ding; hon silsiang lechin, vuk sang in ka ngouzaw ding hi.
19051008	Nopna leh kipahna bil in hon zasak in; na guh suktante a kipahtheihna ding in.
19051009	Ka khelhnate lak ah na mai sel inla, ka thulimlouhna tengteng nulmang in.
19051010	“Pathian aw, keimah ah lungtang siangthoutak siam inla; ka sung ah kha diktak siam thak nawn in.
19051011	Na kiang a kipan in hon paimang ke'nla; na Kha Siangthou hon laksak ke'n.
19051012	Na hotdamna kipahna hon pe nawn inla; na Kha khut in hon len gige in.
19051013	Huchi in talekte na lampi tungtang ka hilh ding a; huchi in mikhialte nang lam anga nawn ding uhi.
19051014	“Pathian, hon hondampa Pathian aw, sisan suahte lak ah hon tankhia in; huchi in ka lei in na diktatna thu kipaktak in la in asa ding hi.
19051015	Toupa aw, nang ka muk hong in; huchi in ka kam in na phatna a theisak ding hi.
19051016	“Kithoihna tung ah kipahna na nei ngal kei a; huchi hilou hileh ka pe ding a, halmang a thillat tung ah lungkimna himhim na nei kei hi.
19051017	Pathian deihlam kithoihnate zaw kha khasia ahi. Pathian aw, lungtang khasia leh kisik tuntun na musit kei ding hi.
19051018	“Na deihlamtak in Zion tung ah thil hoih hih inla; Jerusalem kulh lem in.
19051019	Huchi in diktatna kithoihnate tung ah kipahna na neita ding a, halmang a thillat leh halmang a pumpiak tung ah, huchi in na maitam tung ah bawngtalte alanta ding uh.”
19052001	“Mihat aw, bang achia thil hihkhelh suang na hia! Pathian zahngaihna tung a gitlouhna bangziak a suang?
19052002	Na lei in niteng in gilou-salou asuangtuah nak; mulmet tem hiamtak khemhat bang in.
19052003	Hoih sang in gilou na deihzaw a; diktatna thugen sang in zuauthu gen na deihzaw hi. Selah
19052004	Nang lei khemhat aw, thu mivalhtheite na deih hi.
19052005	“Pathian in tangtawn a ding in ahon hihse ding a, ahon man ding a, na omna a kipan in ahon kaikhe ding a, mihing gam a kipan ahon botkhe ek ding hi. Selah
19052006	Midiktatte'n leng amu un alau ding ua, anuihsan ding uh.
19052007	En dih uh, hiai mi ahi, akulhpi a Pathian nei nuam lou a, ahauhna thupi muang zaw a, gitlouh satlouhna akihihhat,” chi in.
19052008	“Kei zaw, Pathian inn a olive sel liahliah bang ka hi, Pathian zahngaihna tangtawn tangtawn in ka muang ding hi.
19052009	Huai na hih ziak in, tangtawn in kipahthu ka hon hilh ding; na misiangthoute mitmuh ah na min ka ngak ding, ahoih ahi.”
19053001	Mihai in alungtang in, Pathian a-om kei, achi nak hi. Ase khin ua, thil thulim lou kihhuaitak ahih uh; kuamah thil hoih hih himhim a-om kei uh.
19053002	Theisiam a Pathian zong himhim a-om uhiam chih thei ding in Pathian in van a kipan mihing tate a-ensuk a.
19053003	Alehngat chiat ua; nintak in ana om vekta ua; kuamah thil hoih hih a-om kei ua, khat lel leng a-om kei uh.
19053004	Thil hihkhialte'n theih anei kei ua hia! Tanghou nek bang in ka mite ane khin ua, Pathian lah asam kei uhi.
19053005	Launa omlouhna ah alau petpet ua, Pathian in nang hon umpa guhte adalhsak ziak in; Pathian in amau amuhsit ziak in, amau na zahlaksak.
19053006	Israelte hotdamna Zion a kipan in hong pawtleh aw! Pathian in ami saltangte a pikik nawn chiang in, huai hun chiang in Jakobte anuam ding ua, Israelte akipak ding uhi.
19054001	Pathian aw, na min in hon hondam inla, na hatna in vai hon hawmsak in.
19054002	Pathian aw, ka thumna ngaikhia inla; ka kam a thu suakkhete bildoh in.
19054003	Mikhualte'n hon sual ua, mingongtatte'n ka hinna hihmang tum in azong ua, ama uah Pathian akoih kei uhi. Selah
19054004	Ngai in, Pathian hon panpihpa ahi a, Toupa ka hinna lentu ahi.
19054005	Ama'n ka melmate gitlouhna athuk ding a, nang amaute na thutakna ziak in hihmangthang in.
19054006	Keimah deih thu a thil lan in na kiang ah ka kithoih ding a; Toupa aw, na min ka phat ding, ahoih ziak in.
19054007	Ka mangbatna tengteng ah na hon tankheta a; hon doute tung a ka deihtel ka mit in amuta hi.
19055001	Pathian aw, ka thumna ah bildoh inla; hehpih ka ngetna ah kisel ke'n.
19055002	Hon za inla, hon dawng in; ka mangbat thu ziak in ka mau vialvial a, ka thum nilouh hi.
19055003	Melma husa in hon hihmangbang; migilou-salou nuaisiahna in ahon vuk ua, heh in hon sawi uhi.
19055004	Ka sung ah ka lungtang ana mahmah a, sih mulkimnate'n hon delhkhum hi.
19055005	Lauthawnna leh linna in hon bawm a, launa in ahon khuh khinta hi.
19055006	Huan ke'n, vakhu bang a kha neih ut hi na tel ing e, aw! Huchi in ka lengmang ding a, khamuangtak in ka om ding.
19055007	Ngai in, gamlapi ah ka vialvak dia, gamdai ah ka om ding hi. Selah
19055008	Huih hattak leh huihpi a kipan ka bukna mun ah ka taikin ding, ka chi a.
19055009	Toupa aw, alei uh hihsia in hihkek in; khopi ah ngongtatna leh kisuknatna ka mu ngal a.
19055010	Sun leh zan in khopi kulh dawn ah avialvak ua; asung ah thulimlouhna leh haksatna a-om hi.
19055011	Gitlouh satlouhna asung ah a-om a, nuaisiahna leh khemna in kholak apawtsan ngei kei hi.
19055012	Hon gensia lah melma ahi ngal kei a; hileh zaw, ka thuak thei zaw ding, ka tung a kihihlian a hon hua ahi sam kei a; hileh zaw, ka buksan ding hi.
19055013	Himahleh, nang, ka mi batpih, ka lawm, kithuahpih theih na hi ngal a.
19055014	Kam khumtak in i kihoukhawm zel a, mipi lak a Pathian inn ah i pawt zel hi.
19055015	Sihna atung uah hong tung henla, kohawm ah ahing in paisuk uhen; gitlouh satlouhnate a omna uah leh agilsungte uah a-om ngal a.
19055016	Ke'n zaw Pathian ka sam ding a; Toupa'n hon hondam ding hi.
19055017	Nitaklam, zingsang, sun in ka mangbat thu ka gen in ka thum ding a, huchi in ama'n ka aw angaikhe ding hi.
19055018	Ka tung a kidouna lak ah ka hinna khamuangtak in ahumbitta a, hon sualte lah atam ngal ua.
19055019	Pathian, nidanglai a om gige in, angaikhe dia, amau adawng ding. Selah Lamdanna nei ngei lou, Pathian laudan siam ngei lou mite zaw.
19055020	Amah toh kituakte tung ah akhut alik a; athukhun abohsia hi.
19055021	Akam nawituidat bang in anem a, alungtang bel kidouna ahi ngal a; athute sathau sang in analzaw a, himahleh namsau phawisate ahi.
19055022	Toupa tung ah na puakgik nga lechin, ama'n nang ahon hihhat ding hi. Midiktat chik mah in leng hihlin aphal kei ding hi.
19055023	Himahleh, Pathian aw, nang amaute manthatna kohawm ah na paisuksak ding; sisan suah hat leh khemhat mite tuh adamsung kimkhat uh leng adam zou kei ding uhi; ke'n bel nang ka hon muang hi.
19056001	Pathian aw, hon hehpih in; mihing in hon valh khit atum uhi, nitum in hon sual in hon nuaisiah uh.
19056002	Ka melmate'n nitum in hon valh zoh atum ua, kisatheitak a hon sualte lah atam ngal ua.
19056003	Ka lau chiang in, nangmah ka hon muang hi.
19056004	Pathian ah athu ka phat ding a; Pathian ka gingta a, ka lau kei ding; sa in bang ahon chih thei dia!
19056005	Nitum in ka thute alakawi ua; angaihtuahna tengteng tuh ka siatna ding lam ngen ahi.
19056006	Akikhawm ua, abu ua, ka khapte achiamteh ua, ka hinna hihmang tum a angak ziak un.
19056007	Thulimlouhna in asuahtak san ding uam! Pathian aw, heh in michih hihniam in.
19056008	Nang ka vakvaihnate na chiamteh a, ka khituite na savun thawl ah thun in; na laibu ah atuang chiat kei ua hia!
19056009	K'on sap hun ngeingei in hon doute ataizak ding ua; hiai ka thei, Pathian in hon panpih hi.
19056010	Pathian ah athu ka phat ding a, Toupa ah athu ka phat ding hi.
19056011	Pathian ka gingta a, ka lau kei ding; mihing in bang ahon chih thei dia!
19056012	Pathian aw, na kiang ah thuchiam ka nei a, kipahthugen kikhopnate in ka hon thuk ding hi.
19056013	Ka hinna sihna lak ah na humbit a; ka khete puk lou ding in na humbit kei a hia! Hinna vak a Pathian ma a ka paitheihna ding in.
19057001	Pathian aw, hon hehpih inla, hon hehpih in; ka hinna nangmah ah ahong puklut ngal a, ahi, na khalim nuai ah ka bu ding, vangtahnate athen masiah.
19057002	Pathian Tungnungpen ka sam ding, Pathian kei dia bangkim hon hihsakpa.
19057003	Hon valh khit tumpa'n ahon gensiat hun chiang in ama'n van a kipan in ahon sawl ding a, ahon hondam ding hi; Selah Pathian in azahngaihna leh athutak ahon sawlkhe ding.
19057004	Ka hinna humpinelkai lak ah a-om a; mi mei a kang lak ah ka lum a, mihing tate lak ah; huaite ha tei leh thal ahi a, alei uh namsau hiamtak ahi.
19057005	Pathian aw, nang van khen pek ah pahtawi in hong om in! Na thupina leitung tengteng tung ah hong om hen!
19057006	Ka khe awkna ding in len aphah ua; ka hinna akun kheikhei a, ka ma ah kokhuk atou ua; amau mah alaitak ah akia uhi. Selah
19057007	Ka lungtang akip ahi, Pathian aw, ka lungtang akip ahi; la ka sa ding a, ahi, phatna la ka sa ding hi.
19057008	Ka thupina, halh in; pekging leh kaihgingte aw, halh un; kei zingkhang in ka halh ding hi.
19057009	Toupa aw, michih lak ah nang kipahthu ka hon hilh ding a, namte lak ah nangmah phat in la ka sa ding hi.
19057010	Na zahngaihna vante sun in athupi a, na thutak meipite sun in athupi ahi.
19057011	Pathian aw, nang vante khen pek ah pahtawi in omta in; na thupina leitung tengteng ah hong omta hen.
19058001	Diktatna thu dai dide in maw na gen taktak uh! Mihing tate aw, diktak in maw vai na hawm uh!
19058002	Ahi, na lungtang uah thil thulim lou na hih nak ua; leitung ah na khut ua thil ngongtatna na bukkhia uhi.
19058003	Migilou-saloute anu uh gilsung a kipan in Pathian a pan khen in a-om ua; apiantak un zuauthu gen in avakmang zel uhi.
19058004	Agu uh gulgu bang ahi a; thangtom nangong abil hum bang ahi uhi.
19058005	Huai in gul aitawi aw angaikhe kei a, bangchibang a siam in bum mah le uh.
19058006	Pathian aw, akam uah hate tansak inla; Toupa aw, humpinelkai hatsanlaite ha lian pipite tongkhia in.
19058007	Amau tui hattak a luang bang in tuimang uhenla; athalte a angim in, sattan bang in om zel hen.
19058008	Dokdawn, tui a mang maimah zel bang hileh; ahun lou a numei nau neih, nisa mel mu lou bang hi hen aw.
19058009	Na belte un ling satna atheih ma un leng ama'n pingpei in alamang ding; ahing lai leh akuang lai leng.
19058010	Midiktat in phulakna amuh in akipak ding a, migilou-salou sisan ah akhe asil ding hi.
19058011	Huchi in mite'n, “Midiktat a ding in kipahman a-om taktak a, lei ah vaihawmpa Pathian a-om taktak hi,” achi ding uhi.
19059001	Ka Pathian aw, hon doute a pan hon humbit inla; hon sualte a pan hon humbit in.
19059002	Thil hihkhialte a pan hon humbit inla, sisan suah hatte a pan hon hondam in.
19059003	Toupa aw, ka tatlekna ziak hilou in, ka khelh ziak leng hilou in, ngai in, ka hinna atang gige hi, mihatte hon sual ding in akikhawm uhi.
19059004	Ka khelh louhpi in leng hon sual ding in akisa ua; hon panpih ding in kihihhalh inla, en in.
19059005	Toupa aw, sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian, nangmah ngei nam chih gawt ding in thou inla; milepchiah giloutakte peuhmah hawi ke'n. Selah
19059006	Nitaklam in ahong nawn ua, ui bang in aham vengvung ua, khopi kimvel ah apai uhi.
19059007	Ngai in akam un asa-ikkhia ua; amuk uah namsaute a-om a, kua athei a-om a! achi maimah uhi.
19059008	Himahleh, Toupa aw, nang amau na nuihsan zaw ding a; nam chih na nuihsan ding hi.
19059009	Ahatna ziak in amah ka ngak nilouh ding a, Pathian ka insang ahi ngal a.
19059010	Ka tung a zahngai Pathian in ahon dawn ding a, Pathian in ka melmate tung ah ka thudeih ahon musak ding hi.
19059011	Amau that ke'nla, huchi lou in zaw ka mite'n amangngilh kha ding ua; Toupa aw, ka phaw pen uh, Na thilhihtheihna in hihdalh inla, hihniam in.
19059012	Akam khelhna ziak un leh amuk ua thupawt ziak in akisaktheihna ngei uah awk uhen; athugen zel uh hamse lohna leh zuauthu ziak in leng.
19059013	Amaute thangpai in hihmangthang inla, a-om nawnlouhna ding un hihmangthang inla, Pathian in Jakobte lak ah vai ahawm chih thei chiat uhen; kawlmong pha in.
19059014	Huan nitaklam in hong uhenla, ui bang in ham vengvung uhenla, khopi kimvel ah pai uhen.
19059015	Amau nek ding zong in avakvak ding ua, atai kei uleh a-om zanhak ding uhi.
19059016	Himahleh ke'n na hatna thu la in ka sa ding a; ahi, zingsang in na zahngaihna thu nuamtak in la in ka sa ding hi; nang ka insang, ka mangbat ni a ka kihumbitna na hi ngal a.
19059017	Ka hatna aw, nang phat in la ka sa ding a; Pathian ka insang, ka tung a siam Pathian ahi ngal a.
19060001	“Pathian aw, nang na hon khahkhia a, na hon hihsia a; na hong hehta a; hon tungding nawn in aw.
19060002	Hiai gam na hihling a, na khangsakta hi; akhangkhamte siam hoih nawn inla; aling aling ngal a.
19060003	Na mite thil haksa pipi na tuaksak a hoina uain na hon dawnsak hi.
19060004	Nang laudan siamte kiang ah puanzak na peta a, thutak ziak a zak ahihtheihna ding in. Selah
19060005	Na deihtakte humbit a a-om theihna ding un, na khut taklam in hon hondam inla, hon dawng in.
19060006	“Pathian in asianthouna ah hichibang in agen, ka nuam ding a; Shekem khua ka hawm ding a, Sukkoth phaizang ka hawmzak ding hi.
19060007	Gilead gam kei a ahi a, Manasseh gam kei a ahi a; Ephraim gam leng ka lu humbitna ahi a; Judah gam ka lalchiang ahi.
19060008	Moab gam ka kisilna bel ahi; Edom gam ah khedap ka pai ding, Philistia gam, nang zaw keimah ziak in kikou tanla, chi in.
19060009	“Khopi kiptak ah kua'n ahon pilut dia! Edom gam ah kua'n a hon pi ding!
19060010	Pathian aw, nangmah mah in na hon deih louh ka hi kei ua hia? Pathian aw, ka sepaihte kiang uah lah na pawt ngal ta kei a.
19060011	Melmate sual ding in hon panpih in, mihing panpihna bangmah lou maimai ahi ngal a.
19060012	Pathian ziak in hangsantak in ka hih ding; amah tuh i melmate sikden dingpa ahi ngal a.”
19061001	Pathian aw, ka kikou husa na za inla; ka thumna ngaikhia in.
19061002	Ka lungtang abah lai in kawlmong a kipan ka hon sam ahi. Kei sang a sangzaw suangpi ah hon pi in.
19061003	Nang kei a ding in humbitna melmate lak ah galven insang kiptak na hi ngal a.
19061004	Na puanin ah tangtawn in ka om ding a, na kha nuai bukna mun ah ka muang ding hi. Selah
19061005	Pathian aw, nang ka thuchiamte na ngaikhia a, na min laudan siamte gam luah tuh na hon pia hi.
19061006	Kumpipa damsung hihsau in, akumte suan tampi bang ahi ding.
19061007	Pathian ma ah tangtawn in a-om gige ding, aw, amah ah zahngaihna leh thutak bawl in, amah humbittu ding in.
19061008	Huchi in ka thuchiamte niteng a ka hihtheihna ding in, tangtawn in na min phat in la ka sa ding hi.
19062001	Ka hinna in Pathian kia angak a, amah a kipan in ka hotdamna ahong pawt ding ahi.
19062002	Amah kia ka suangpi leh hon hondampa ahi. Ka insang ahi a, nakpitak in ka ling kei ding hi.
19062003	Nou tengteng in, mi khat that ding a, baang awn leh gawl puk dekdek bang in bang tan ahia na sual ding uh?
19062004	Athupina a kipan a sawnkhe ding lel in akihou ua; zuaugen akipah lamtak uh ahi a, akam un avualzawl ua, himahleh alungsim un hamsia aloh zel ngal uhi. Selah
19062005	Ka hinna aw, Pathian kia ngak in; ka lametna amah kiang a kipan a pawt ahi ngal a.
19062006	Amah kia ka suangpi leh ka hotdamna ahi; ka insang ahi a, ka ling kei ding.
19062007	Pathian kiang ah ka hotdamna leh ka thupina a-om a; ka hatna suangpi leh ka kihumbitna Pathian ah a-om hi.
19062008	Nou mipite aw, chik lai peuh in leng amah muang unla, na lungtang uh ama ah sungbua un; Pathian ei a ding in kihumbitna ahi. Selah
19062009	Minamniamte bangmah lou lel ahi ua, minam liante leng zuau lel ahi uhi; bukna ah teh hi le uh, tuihu sang in azangzaw ding uh.
19062010	Nuaisiahna muang kei unla; aphatuam lou guktakna lamen kei unla, hauhnate ahong khanleh atung ah na lungtang uh nga kei un.
19062011	Pathian in khatvei agen a; hiai nihveitak ka zata hi; thilhihtheihna Pathian a ahi chih.
19062012	Toupa aw, zahngaihna nang a mah ahi a, michih athilhih bangbang un na thuk ngal zel hi.
19063001	Pathian aw, nang ka Pathian na hi a; phalvak in ka hon zong hi; ka hinna nangmah duh in adangtak a; ka sa in ahon ngai ahi, gamkeu leh phaizang tui omlouhna ah.
19063002	Huchi mah bang in mun siangthou ah ka hon en gige hi, na thilhihtheihna leh na thupina mu ding in.
19063003	Na zahngaihna ka hinna sang a ahoih zawk ziak in ka muk in ahon phat ding hi.
19063004	Huchi mah bang in ka damsung teng in ka hon phat ding a; na min in ka khutte ka zak ding hi.
19063005	Ka hinna guhngek leh thau a atai bang in atai ding a; ka kam in kipahna mukpu in ahon phat ding hi.
19063006	Ka lupna tung a ka hon theihgige lai in, zan a na tungtang thu ka lunggel lai in.
19063007	Nang hon panpihpa na hi a, na kha nuai ah nuam in la ka sa ding hi.
19063008	Ka hinna in hon zui tettet a, na khut taklam in na hon kai zel hi.
19063009	Ka hinna hihmang tum a zongte lei mun nuainung ah alut ding ua;
19063010	Namsau thilhihtheihna in apuk ding ua; sehalte tan ahi ding uhi.
19063011	Kumpipa bel Pathian ah anuam ding a; amah lou a kichiam peuhmah in asuang ding ua, zuauhat kamte hum a om ding ahih ziak in.
19064001	Pathian aw, ka mangbat thu ah ka aw na za inla; melmate lauhhuaina lak ah ka hinna humbit in.
19064002	Thil hoih lou hihte kihou gukna lak ah hon sel in; thil hihkhialte buaina lak ah.
19064003	Amau namsau bang in alei uh atat-hiam ua, athu khate ngei uh thalte bang a kap ding in angim ua.
19064004	Mi gensiatbeite mundai a akaptheihna ding un; lau lou in khatvei thu in akap guih ngal uhi.

19073016	Huai ka theihna ding dan ka ngaihtuah in, kei a ding in ana lua hi.

19073018	Amau mun naltak ah na koih a; siatnate ah na paikhe zel hi.
19073019	Bangchidan ahia mitphiat kal kia a a-ingamtak uh aw! Thil mulkimhuaitakte a hihmanthat vek in a-omta uhi.
19073020	Mi'n khanloh nung a mang bangmah asak louh bang un, Toupa aw, na halh hun in amau lim leng bangmah na sa kei ding hi.
19073021	Ka lungsim lungkham a a-om a, ka lungtang a sut a ka om lai in.
19073022	Mimawl leh bangmah thei lou ka hi a, na lak ah gamsa bang phet ka hi hial hi.
19073023	Himahleh na kiang ah ka om gige a, ka khut taklam na len gige hi.
19073024	Nang na lemtheihna in na hon pi ding a, huai nung chiang in thupina ah na hon tun ding hi.
19073025	Van ah nang lou kua ka nei a? Lei ah leng nang lou ngal ka deih kuamah a-om kei hi.
19073026	Ka sa leh ka lungtang abahta a, himahleh Pathian tangtawn a ka lungtang utna ding leh ka tantuan ding ahi.
19073027	Ngai in, nangmah gamlat a omte amangthang dek ua; ahon angkawmsan peuhmahte na hihmangta ahi.
19073028	Himahleh kei a ding in bel Pathian naih ahoih hi; Toupa Pathian ka kihumbitna in ka nei a, na nasep tengteng ka puanzak theihna ding in.
19074001	Pathian aw, bang ding a hon paimang den ding na hia oi? Bangziak a na gantatna mun a belamte tung a na hehna akhut?
19074002	Na mite omkhawmte, nidanglai a na lei, na gou ding a na tat namte theigige in; na omna Zion tang toh.
19074003	Tangtawn siatna lam ah na khe khai in, melmate'n mun siangthou ah thil gilou chiteng ahihta uhi.
19074004	Nangmah doute na mite kikhawmte lak ah a-awng zuazua ua; achiamtehnate uh chiamtehna hi ding in atakta uhi.
19074005	Mi singbawk heipi a ngimte bang in akimu ua.
19074006	Tun ah athilkhuak kilawm teng uh heita leh sek in ahihse chiat uhi.
19074007	Na mun siangthou ahal ua; na min omna lei a tumkhop hial in ahihbuahta uhi.
19074008	Alungsim un, avek in i hihse ding, achi ua, hiai gam a Pathian kikhopna inn tengteng ahalse khinta uhi.
19074009	I kichiamtehnate uh i muta kei ua, zawlnei a-omta kei ua asawtdan ding thei himhim i lak uah leng a-om kei hi.
19074010	Pathian aw, melma in bang tan ahia hon gensiat ding? Gal in na min tangtawn in agense dia hia?
19074011	Bang ding in ahia, na khut, na khut taklam na lakkik? Pholhkhe nawn inla, amaute hihmang in.
19074012	Himahleh, Pathian nidanglai tan a ka Kumpipa, lei laitak a hotdamna siampa pen ahi.
19074013	Nang na hatna in tuipi na kikhensak a, nang tui a dragonte na kitamsak hi.
19074014	Nang Leviathan lute na zansak a, amah gamdai mi omte kiang ah an ding in na pia hi.
19074015	Nang tuikhuk leh tui lian na khen a; nang lui lian taktakte na kangsak hi.
19074016	Sun nang a ahi a, zan leng nang a ahi. Nang khovak leh nisa na ngaihtuah hi.
19074017	Nang leitung gamgite na khung vek hi; nang nipi leh phalbi na siam ahi.
19074018	Toupa aw, hiai theigige in, melma in ahon gensiat a; nam haipi in na min agensiat.
19074019	Aw na vakhu hinna gam sahang kiang ah pe mahmah ke'nla; na migentheite hinna tangtawn in mangngilh sam ke'n.
19074020	Thukhun hon poimohngaih in; lei mun mial tata hiamgamna omna in adim hi.
19074021	Aw, nuaisiahna thuakte zahlak in nungkik kei uhenla; genthei leh tagahte'n na min phat uhen.
19074022	Pathian aw, thou inla, nangmah thu kigen tawm inla, mihai in nitum in ahon gensiat dan theigige in.
19074023	Nangmah galte husa mangngilh ke'n; ahon sualte chiak vengvung a paitou gige ahi uhi.
19075001	“Pathian aw, kipahthu ka hon hilh uhi; kipahthu ka hon hilh uhi, na min anai ziak in; mi'n na thillamdang hih thute agengen uhi.
19075002	“Hun seh pen ka muh hun chiang in diktak in vai ka hawm ding hi.
19075003	Lei leh asung a om tengteng azul khinta, ke'n abante ka phut ahi. Selah
19075004	Mi-uangte kiang ah, ‘Uangtak in om kei un,’ ka chi a, migilou-saloute kiang ah, ‘Na kii uh sangsak kei un,’ leng ka chi hi.
19075005	Na kii uh tunglam ah hihsang kei unla; ngawng golh zen in thu gen kei un.
19075006	“Sansakna suahlam a kipan ahi kei a, tumlam a kipan leng ahi kei lai a, simlam a kipan ahi sam kei hi.
19075007	Pathian vaihawmpa ahi zaw; ama'n khat niamsak in khat asangsak hi.
19075008	Toupa khut ah nou a om a, a-uain aphul a; thil dang toh hel in adim a, huai a pan abungkhia a; pel lou in aneng nangawn lei a migilou-salou tengteng in adawnsiang sipsip ding uhi.
19075009	“Himahleh ke'n zaw tangtawn in ka theisak ding a, Jakob' Pathian phat in la ka sa ding hi.
19075010	Migilou-saloute kii tengteng ka hihtan ding a; midiktatte kii zaw sansak in a-om ding hi.”
19076001	Judahte lak ah Pathian theih in a-om a; Israelte lak ah amin athupi hi.
19076002	Salem ah biakbuk a-om a. Amah omna Zion ah a-om hi.
19076003	Huai ah thalpeu thalte ahihsia a; phawte, namsaute, kidouna vanzatte toh. Selah
19076004	Nang thupitak leh hoihtak na hi a, sathah tangte sang in.
19076005	Lungtang phate'n suam atuak ua, a-ihmu uh a-ihmu denta uhi; mihatte leng kuamah in akhut uh alik theita kei uhi.
19076006	Jakob' Pathian aw, na sawina ziak in kangtalai leh sakol leng gen ding thei lou in a-om tuaktuak uhi.
19076007	Nang, nangmah mah, lau ding na hi; na heh peuhmah leh, kua ahia na mitmuh a dingh thei ding?
19076008	Na vaihawm thu van a kipan in na theisak a; lei alau a, adaita hi.

19076010	Pel lou in mihing hehna in nang ahon phat ding a, hehna kawnggak in na kigak ding hi.

19077001	Ka aw in Pathian ka sam a; ka aw in Pathian ngei tuh ka sam ding a, ama'n kei lam ah bil ahon doh ding hi.
19077002	Ka buai ni in Toupa ka zong a, zan chiang in leng ka khut khaikhe lou in ka zak gige a; ka hinna in khamuan a om anial hi.
19077003	Pathian ka theigige a, ka buai naknak; ka ngaihtuah a, ka kha abah naknak. Selah
19077004	Ka mitvunte na haksak a, pau thei lou khop in ka buai hi.
19077005	Nidanglaite ka ngaihtuah a, tang lai hun leh kumte.
19077006	Zan a ka lasak ka thei nawn a; ka lungtang ah ka kingaihtuah a, ka kha in phatuamngaitak in azong hi.
19077007	Toupa'n tangtawn in akhahkhe dia eita aw? Chik mah chiang in akipakta kei dia eita aw?
19077008	Azahngaihna amang tawntung dia eita aw? Athuchiam suan tengteng pha in amang dia eita aw?
19077009	Pathian in hehpih a mangngilh a eita aw? Heh in lainatnate akhakta a eita aw? Selah
19077010	Huai ka hatlouhna ziak ahi; himahleh Tungnungpen khut taklam kumte ka theigige hi.
19077011	Toupa thilhih thute ka gen ding a; nidanglai a na thillamdang hihte ka theigige ding hi.
19077012	Nna nasep tengteng ka ngaihtuah ding a, na thilhihte leng ka sut ding hi, ka chi a.
19077013	Pathian aw, na lampi mun siangthou ah a-om a, Pathian bang Pathian thupi kua a-om a?
19077014	Nang thillamdang hihpa Pathian na hi a; michih lakte ah na hatdan na theisak zel hi.
19077015	Na ban in na mite na honkhia, Jakob leh Joseph tate. Selah
19077016	Tuite'n ahon mu ua, Pathian aw, tuite'n nang ahon mu ua, akikou ua; tui thukpite leng aling uhi.
19077017	Meipite'n tui asungbua ua; vante'n aw asuah ua; na thalte leng aphe zolzol hi.
19077018	Na van-ging husa pingpei ah a-om a; khophiate'n khovel atanvak zolzol a; lei kising in aling dopdop hi.
19077019	Tuipi ah na lampi a-om a, na lampite tui zatak ah a-om a, na khapte theih ahi kei hi.
19077020	Mosi leh Aaron khut in na mite belamhon bang in na pipi hi.
19078001	Ka mite aw, ka dan thu ah bil na doh unla; ka kam a thute ah na bil uh hon doh un.
19078002	Gentehna thu in ka kam ka ding a; nidanglai a thugil gente ka genkhe ding.
19078003	Huaite i bil un i za ua, i lungsim in leng i thei uhi, apipute'n leng ahon hilh uhi.
19078004	Huaite atate uh lak ah i iim kei ding ua, khang hong om ding kiang ah Toupa phatna thu leh, ahatdan leh athillamdang pipi hihdante i hilh zaw ding uhi.
19078005	Jakobte lak a thu theihsak ahihkip a, Israelte lak ah dan asep a, huaite i pipute kiang ah thupiak in apia a, amau huai thu atate uh kiang ah atheihsak ding un.

19078009	Ephraim suante galthuam a kithuam a, thalpeu tawi in, kisual ni in ataikek ua.

19078011	Athilhihte amangngilh ua, athillamdang amuhsakte toh.

19078013	Tuipi akhenhok a, amau agalkaisak a; tuite thil koihkhawm venvon bang in akhawlsak meuhmouh hi.

19081001	Pathian hon hihhatpa pahtawi in nuamtak in la sa unla; Jakob' Pathian pahtawi in nuamtak in kikou un.

19081008	Ka mite aw, ngaikhia unla, ka hon theihsak bang in; Israel aw, ka thu ngaikhe nuam hi le uteh aw!
19081009	Gamdang pathian himhim na lak uah a-om ding ahi kei; midang pathian himhim na biak ding uh leng ahi kei hi.
19081010	Kei, Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi a, Aigupta gam a kipan hon pikhepa tak; na kam uh liankat un, ka hihdim ding hi.
19081011	Himahleh ka mite'n ka aw angaikhe kei ua; Israelte'n hon deih kei uhi.
19081012	Huchi in alungtang uh genhakdan bang zel a om ding in ka khahzanta ahi, amau hoihsak bang a a-omna ding un.
19081013	Aw, ka mite'n ka thu ngaikhia in, Israelte ka lampite ah pai le u aw.
19081014	Amelmate uh ka hihneu zok in, amau galte tung ah ka khut ka lik ding hi.
19081015	Toupa hote akiang ah akipelut ding uhi; amau hun bel a om nilouh ding ahi.
19081016	Nou bel buh hoihpen in ka hon vak ding hi; suangpi a khuaizu in ka hon taisak ding ahi.
19082001	Mihat omkhawmte lak ah Pathian adingh a; pathiante lak ah vai ahawm hi.
19082002	Bang tan ahia dikloutak a vai na hawm ua, migilou-saloute, na deihsak tuam ding uh? Selah
19082003	Gentheite leh pa neiloute hawmsak unla; haksa thuakte, tagahte tung ah hihdik un.
19082004	Gentheite leh tagahte gum unla; migilou-salou khut a kipan humbit un.
19082005	Athei kei ua, theihsiamna leng anei kei uh; mial ah akileh akileh ua; leilung kingakna tengteng alingta hi;
19082006	pathiante na hi ua, na vek un Tungnungpen tate na hi uh, ka chi hi.
19082007	Himahleh mihingte bang phet in na hong si ding ua, milian khat bang in na hong puk ding uhi.
19082008	Pathian aw, thou inla, lei vai hawmsak in, nam chih na gouluah ding ahi uhi.
19083001	Pathian aw, pau lou in om ke'nla; Pathian aw, dai nilouh ke'n, om maimai mahmah ke'n.
19083002	Ngai in, na melmate alum lutlut ua; nangmah hote adak hekhawk uhi.
19083003	Na mite lepchiahtak in asawm ua, na mi selgukte tung ah aselam in akihou akihoukhawm uhi.
19083004	Kisa dih ua, anam uh mangsak khop in i hihmang ding uh; Israel min himhim theihgige a a-om nawnlouhna ding in, achi uhi.
19083005	Thukhat sat in akihou ua; na tung ah aselam a hih ding in thu achiamkhawm uhi.
19083006	Edom leh Ishmael puaninte, Moab leh Haggar;
19083007	Gebal leh Ammon leh Amalek; Philistiate Tura a omte toh,
19083008	Assuriate amau lam ah apang ua; Lot suante apanpih uhi. Selah
19083009	Amau Midiante tung a na hih bang, Kishon lui a Sisera tung a na hih bang, Jabin tung a na hih bang in hih sam in.
19083010	Huai mite Endor ah amang ua; lei a ding in eklei bang lel ana hita uhi.
19083011	Amiliante uh Oreb leh Zeeb bang in bawl inla, Ahi, a kumpipa tengteng uh Zebah leh Zalmunna bang in bawl in.
19083012	Huai mite'n, Pathian omnate i luahsak ding uh, achi uhi.
19083013	Ka Pathian aw, amaute leivui kipei lunglung bang in bawl in; buhsi huih mutleng bang in.
19083014	Gam kang mei bang leh, tang kang meikuang bang in.
19083015	Amau na huihpi in delh inla, na huih thupitak in hihlau in.
19083016	Toupa aw, na min a zontheihna ding un amel uh zumna in hihdim in.
19083017	Tangtawn in zahlak leh mangbangtak in om uhenla; ahi, hihzum a om in mangthang uhen.
19083018	Nangmah kia Jehovah min pu, leitung tengteng tung a Tungnungpen na hi chih atheihna ding un.
19084001	Sepaihte' Toupa aw, na omnate deihhuai na tel e!
19084002	Ka hinna in Toupa huangsung intualte angai mahmah a, ahi, abahpih hial a; ka lungtang leh ka sa Pathian hing kiang ah akikoukhia hi.
19084003	Ahi, kawlgit in inn amu a, lensiam in leng amah a ding in bu amu, anou koihna ding in sepaihte' Toupa aw, ka Kumpipa leh ka Pathian, huai nangmah maitamte ngei ahi.
19084004	Na inn a omte'n nuam asa ua; nang ahon phat gige ding uhi. Selah
19084005	Nangmah a hatna neimi in nuam asa hi; alungtang a Zion naihna lamliante om in.
19084006	Baka Phaizang atot un, tuikhuk omnate abawl ua, ahi, vuahtui ke masa in vualzawlna in akhuh hi.
19084007	Hatna a kipan in hat nawnsemna ah apai ua, Zion ah Pathian ma ah akimusak chiat uhi.
19084008	Toupa aw, Sepaihte' Pathian, ka thumna hon ngaikhia inla; Jakobte Pathian aw, bil na doh in. Selah
19084009	Pathian ka phaw pen uh aw, en in, na thaunilhpa mel en in.
19084010	Na huangsung intual a ni khat om tuh mun dang a ni sangkhat sang in ahoihzaw hi. Gitlouhna puaninte a om sang in i Pathian inn kongkhak ngaktu hih leng ka utzaw ahi.
19084011	Toupa Pathian i ni leh phaw ahi, Toupa'n hehpihna leh thupina ape ding a; diktak a omte lak ah thil hoih a-it kei ding hi.
19084012	Sepaihte' Toupa aw, nangmah muangmi in nuam asa hi.
19085001	Toupa , na gam tung ah na kipak a; sal a om Jakob na pikik nawnta hi.
19085002	Na mite thulimlouhnate na ngaidam a, agitlouhna tengteng uh na khuh khinta hi. Selah
19085003	Na thangpaihna tengteng na lamang a; na hehna thupitak na kiheisanta hi.
19085004	Hon hondampa Pathian aw, hon kiheisak nawn inla, ka tung ua na hehna tawpsak in.
19085005	Ka tung uah na heh nilouh dia hia? Na hehna suan tengteng tan in na kitheisak zel dia hia?
19085006	Nangmah a na mite akipahtheihna ding un na hon hihhalh nawn kei dia hia?
19085007	Toupa aw, na zahngaihna hon musak inla, na hotdamna leng hon pia in.
19085008	Toupa Pathian thu gen ding ka ngaikhe ding; amite leh amisiangthoute kiang ah khamuanna thu agen dek a, himahleh amau haina lam ah kihei nawnta kei uhen.
19085009	Ahotdamna amah kihtate naih in a-om ngeingei nak hi; i gam ua thupina a-omtheihna ding in.
19085010	Zahngaihna leh thutak akituak a; diktatna leh kituahna akitawptuah a,
19085011	Thutak lei a kipan in adawnkhia a; diktatna in van a pan ahon tansukta hi.
19085012	Ahi, Toupa'n thil hoih ape ding a; i gam in leng athilpou ape ding hi.
19085013	Diktatna in ama akai ding a; akhapte lampi ah asiam ding hi.
19086001	Toupa aw, kei lam ah na bil hon doh inla, hon dawng in; genthei leh tagah lua ka hi.
19086002	Ka hinna vomhoih inla; Pathian limsakmi ka hi ngal a, ka Pathian aw, nangmah muang na sikha, hondam in.
19086003	Toupa aw, hon hehpih inla; nitum in ka hon sam ngal a.
19086004	Na sikha hinna hihnuam in; Toupa aw, ka lungsim na kiang ah ka koihdet ziak in.
19086005	Toupa , nang, na hoih a, ngaihdam na ngap a, ahon sam peuhmah tung ah zahngaihna na hau ngal hi.
19086006	Toupa aw, ka thumna ah na bil na doh in; hehpih ka hon ngetna aw ngaikhia in.
19086007	Ka mangbat ni in ka hon sam ding a, huchi in na hon dawng ding hi.
19086008	Toupa aw, pathiante lak ah nang bang himhim a-om kei ua; na thilhih bang thilhih a-om kei hi.
19086009	Toupa aw, na siam nam chihte ahong pai ding ua, na ma ah akun ding ua, na min ahon pahtawi ding uhi.
19086010	Nang na thupi ngal a, thillamdangte leng na hih zel a; nangmah kia Pathian na hi.
19086011	Toupa aw, na lampi hon ensak inla, na thutak ah ka om ding a, na min lau ding in lungtang khat hon pusak in.
19086012	Toupa ka Pathian aw, ka lungtang tengteng in ka hon phat ding a; na min tangtawn in ka pahtawi ding hi.
19086013	Ka tung a na zahngaihna athupi ziak in, ka hinna kokhuk nuainungpen a kipan na humbitta hi.
19086014	Pathian aw, mikisatheite'n hon sual ua, mingongtat omkhawmte'n ka hinna hihmang tum in azong ua, nang ama uah ahon koih kei uhi.
19086015	Himahleh, Toupa aw, nang Pathian, lainatna a dim, mihehpih thei, lungnel, zahngaihna leh thutak hau na hi.
19086016	Kei lam hong nga inla, aw, ka tung ah zahngai in, na sikha kiang ah na hatna pia inla, na sikhanu tapa hondam in.
19086017	Hoihna ding chiamtehna hon lak in; hon hote'n huai amuh ua, azahlakna ding un, Toupa , nang na hon panpih a, na hon khamuan ziak in.
19087001	Asuangphum tang siangthou ah a-om hi.
19087002	Toupa'n Zion kulh kongkhakte Jakob omna tengteng sang in a-itzaw ahi.
19087003	Pathian khopi aw, na tungthu thupitak in agen uhi. Selah
19087004	Hon theite lak ah apang sam uh chih Rahab leh Babulon tungtang thu ka gen ding; Philistia leh Tura, Ethiopia toh, “En un, hiai mi huai lai a piang ahi,” achi ua.
19087005	Zion tungtang thu gen ahih chiang in, “Hiai mi leh huai mi amah a piang ahi; Tungnungpen ngei in amah ahihkip ding,” chi a gen ahi dia;
19087006	Toupa'n , mite' min gelh a akhumlut chiang in, “Hiai mi huai a piang ahi,” achi ding a, Selah
19087007	Lasate leh lamte'n, “Ka tuikhuk teng nangmah ah ahi a-om,” achi ding uhi.
19088001	Toupa aw, hon humbitpa Pathian, sun leh zan in na ma ah ka kikou gige a;
19088002	Ka thumna na ma ah lut henla; ka kikou husa ah na bil hon doh in.
19088003	Ka hinna mangbatnate in adim a, ka hinna in Sheol anaihta ngal a.
19088004	Kokhuk a paite toh simkhawm ka hi; hatna himhim neiloumi bang ka hi a;
19088005	Gal thahte han a lumte bang a misi lak a paihkhiak ka hi; huaite na theih tak louh, na khut a kipan hihman ahi uhi.
19088006	Kokhuk nuainungpen ah na hon lumsak a, mun mial, thupi ah.
19088007	Na hehna in hon delhkhum a, nang na tuikihot tengteng in gim na hon thuaksakta hi. Selah
19088008	Ka meltheihte hon gamlat in na omsak a; amaute a dia kihhuaipi in na hon bawlta a; khakkhum in ka om a, ka pawt thei kei hi.
19088009	Gimthuak ziak in ka mit aseta a; Toupa aw, niteng in ka hon sam ahi, nang lam ah ka khutte ka zak hi.
19088010	Misite a ding in thillamdang na hih dek a hia? Sisate'n thou in ahon phat ding ua hia? Selah
19088011	Na chitdan hankhuk a puangzak in, hiam ahihkeileh na ginomdan Abaddon mun ah puanzak in a-om dia hia?
19088012	Na thillamdang hihte mial ah theih in a-om dia hia? Na diktatna gam ah theih in a-om dek nawn a hia?
19088013	Toupa aw, ke'n zaw ka hon sam a, ka thumna in zingsang in ahon don hi.
19088014	Toupa , bang achia ka hinna khahkhia na hia? Bang achia ka lak a na mai sel?
19088015	Ka naupan chil a kipan gimthuak leh si dekdek in ka om a; na thil mulkimhuaite ka thuak in hihlungbuai in ka om hi.
19088016	Na heh mahmahna in hon vukmang a; thil mulkimhuaite'n hon hihmangta hi.
19088017	Huaite'n nitum in tui bang in hon umsuak ua; ka kim ka vel in hon um chiat uhi.
19088018	Hon itpa leh ka lawm hon gamlat in a-omsakta a, ka meltheihnate mial ah na omsakta ahi.
19089001	“ Toupa zahngaihna thute tangtawn in la in ka sa ding a; ka kam in na ginomdan suan tengteng tan in ka theisak ding.
19089002	Zahngaihna tangtawn a ding in leptouh in a-om ding a; na ginomna vante ah ngei na hihkip ding, ka chita ahi.
19089003	Ka mitel kiang ah thu ka khung a, ka sikha David kiang ah ka kichiamta a;
19089004	na suante tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding a, na laltutphah leng suan tengteng tan in ka lem ding, chi in. Selah
19089005	“ Toupa aw, vante'n na thillamdang hihte aphat ding ua; misiangthoute kikhopna ah na ginomna leng aphat ding uhi.
19089006	Tung vandumte ah Toupa toh kiteh thei ding kua a-om a? Mihattak tate lak ah Toupa bang.
19089007	Misiangthoute omkhawmna ah Pathian kihtakhuaitak, akim a mi tengteng sang a kihtakpen ding kua ahia?
19089008	“ Toupa sepaihte' Pathian aw, nang bang a mihat kua a-om a? Na ginomna na kim ah a-om ngal a.
19089009	Nang tuipi kisaktheihna vai na hawm a, atuikihot kiseplaite uh na hihdai hi.
19089010	Nang Rahab gal thah bang in na hihkham dimdem a; nangmah galte na ban thahat in na delhzakta hi.
19089011	Vante nangmah a ahi a, leitung leng nangmah a ahi; khovel leh asung a om teng nangmah muhkhiak ahi.
19089012	Sim leh mal nangmah siam ahi a; Tabor leh Hermon na min ziak in anuam hi.
19089013	Nang ban thilhihtheitak na nei a; na khut ahat a, na khut taklam pahtawi in a-om hi.
19089014	“Diktatna leh vaihawmna dik na laltutphah kingakna ahi a; na ma ah zahngaihna leh thutak apai hi.
19089015	“Husa kipahhuai za namte'n nuam asa ua; Toupa aw, amau na mel vak ah avak uhi.
19089016	Na min ziak in nitum in anuam ua, diktatna ziak in pahtawi in a-om uhi.
19089017	Nang ahatna uh thupina na hi ngal a; na deihsakna ziak in ka kii uh pahtawi in a-om ding.
19089018	Ka phaw uh Toupa a ahi ngal a; ka kumpipa uh Israelte Mi Siangthou ahi.
19089019	Huai lai in na misiangthoute kiang ah kilakna in thu na gen a, mihattak khat tung ah panpihna ka nga a; mi khat mite lak a telkhiak ka pahtawita hi, chi in.
19089020	Ka sikha David ka mukheta a; ka thau siangthou in amah ka nilhta a.
19089021	Akiang ah ka khut hihkip in a-om ding a; ka ban in amah ahihhat ding a, ahihhat taktak ding hi.
19089022	“Melma in alak ah aphut kei ding; thulimlouhna tapa in ahihgim kei ding.
19089023	Amah galte ama ah ka satpuk ding a, amah hote ka bawl ek ding.
19089024	Amah kiang ah bel ka ginomna leh ka zahngaihna a-om ding hi; ka min ziak in akii pahtawi in a-om ding hi.
19089025	Tuipi ah akhut ka ngasak ding a, luipite ah akhut taklam.
19089026	Ama'n, ‘Nang ka Pa, ka Pathian, ka hotdamna suangpi na hi,’ chi in ahon sam ding hi.
19089027	Huan ke'n amah tapa masa in ka siam ding a, lei a kumpipate lak ah tungnungpen in ka bawl ding hi.
19089028	Ka zahngaihna tangtawn in amah a ding in ka kephoihsak ding a, ka thukhun akiang ah a-omkip ding hi.
19089029	Asuante tangtawn in ka omsak ding a, alaltutphah van om lai siah in ka omsak ding hi.
19089030	“Atate'n ka dan alehngatsan ua, ka vaihawmnate bang a a-om louh ua;
19089031	ka dan thuseh a tatlekna aneih ua, ka thupiakte akephoih kei uleh;
19089032	atatlek chiang un ka gawt dia, athulimlouhnate uh zep in ka hong kan ding.
19089033	Himahleh, ka zahngaihna tu in akiang a kipan ka laksak vek kei ding a, ka ginomna zuau a suak ding in leng ka phal sam kei ding.
19089034	Ka thukhun ka hihse kei ding a, ka muk a thupawt leng ka hihlamdang sam kei ding hi.
19089035	“Khatvei ka sianthouna lou in ka kichiam a, David kiang ah zuau ka gen kei ding;
19089036	Asuante tangtawn in a-om ding ua, alaltutphah ka ma ah ni bang in a-om ding hi.
19089037	Kha bang in tangtawn a ding in hihkip in a-om ding a, van dum a theihpih ginom bang in, achi a. Selah
19089038	“Himahleh nang na khahkhia in na deih kei a, na thaunilhpa tung ah na hehta ahi.
19089039	Na sikha thukhun na deih kei a; alallukhu lei a paikhe hial in na hihniamta hi.
19089040	Ahuang tengteng na hihpuk a; akulhpite na hihseta hi.
19089041	Lampi a pai peuhmah in athil alaksak zel uh.
19089042	Amah doute khut taklam na pahtawi a; amelma tengteng na hih nuamsata hi.
19089043	Ahi, anamsau ma na bengpek a, amah kisualna ah na dingkipsak kei hi.
19089044	Avakna na hihtawpsak a, alaltutphah lei ah na paikheta hi.
19089045	Atangval lai nite uh na hihtom a; amah zahlakna in na khuhta hi. Selah
19089046	“ Toupa aw, bang tan ahia na buk nilouh ding? Bang tan ahia na hehna mei bang a akuan ding?
19089047	Aw, ka hun atomdan theigige inla; mihing tate siam gina kei na tel chia!
19089048	Kua mi ahia sih ni mel mu lou a hing a, Sheol khut a kipan a ahinna humbit ding? Selah
19089049	“ Toupa , nidanglai a na hehpihna, na ginomna David kiang a kichiam a na chiam, koi a om hita ahia?
19089050	Toupa , na sikhate agensiatna uh theigige in; nam hattakte tengteng gensiatna ka angsung a ka thuak zeldan.
19089051	Toupa aw, nang hon doute gensiatna, na thaunilhpa khapte gensiatna mah,
19089052	Toupa tangtawn in phat in om hen. Amen, Amen.”
19090001	Toupa , suan tengteng tan a ka tenna uh nangmah na hi a,
19090002	Tangte pian ma a, leitung leh khovel na bawlkhiak ma in leng; tangtawn a kipan tangtawn Pathian, nangmah na hi.
19090003	Nang mihingte manthatna ah na kiksak a; mihing tate aw, kikta un, na chi zel hi.
19090004	Nang seh in kum sangkhat zan mangta bang phet ahi a, zanven khat sung bang phet ahi.
19090005	Amaute tui lian bang in na taimang a; khang khat ihmu bang phet ahi ua, zingsang a loupa dawnkhia bang ahi uhi.
19090006	Zingsang in ahong pou in ahong dawnkhia a; nitaklam in phuk in a-om a, avuai hi.
19090007	Na hehna a hihman in ka om ua, na thangpaihna a hihmangbat a leng ka om ziak un.
19090008	Ka thulimlouhnate uh na ma ah na koih a, ka khelhna gukte uh na mel vak ah na koihta hi.
19090009	Ka damsung ni tengteng uh na hehna ah amang zel a; ka damsung kumte uh tangthu bang in ka tawpsak uhi.
19090010	Ka damsung kumte uh kum sawmsagih ahi a, hatna ziak in kum sawmgiat leng ahi thei hi; himahleh asawtna zaw sepgimna leh lungngaihna lel ahi a; amang pah a, kou leng ka lengmang zel uhi.
19090011	Kua'n ahia na hehna thilhihtheihdan thei a, nangmah kihtakdan ding a na hehna thei lou?
19090012	Ka damsung nite uh simdan hon hilh in, huchi a pilna lungtang ka neihloh hialna ding un.
19090013	Toupa aw, hong kik nawn in; bang tan ahia na heh ding? Na sikhate tungthu ah na lungsim kiheisak in.
19090014	Aw, zingsang in na zahngaihna in hon taisak in; ka damsung tengteng ua ka nuam ua ka kipahtheihna ding un.
19090015	Nang na hon hihgim ni leh, thil hoih lou ka tuah kum sung hute bang un hon kipaksak in.
19090016	Nna nasep na sikhate kiang ah kithei henla, na thupina atate kiang uah kithei hen.
19090017	Toupa ka Pathian uh kilawmna ka tung uah om hen, ka khut nasep uh ka tung uah leng hihkip in; ahi, ka khut nasep uh hihkip in.
19091001	Tungnungpen bukna mun a ommi Bangkim hihthei limnuai ah ateng ding hi.
19091002	Toupa tungthu ah, amah ka kihumbitna leh ka kulhpi; ka Pathian, ka muan ahi, ka chi ding.
19091003	Ama'n thangkammi thang leh hipi hoih lou lak ah nang ahon hondam ding hi.
19091004	Akha in ahon khuh ding a, akha nuai ah na muang ding hi; athutak phaw neu leh phaw lian ahi.
19091005	Zan a thil mulkimhuai na lau kei ding a, sun a thal leng zong na lau kei ding hi.
19091006	Mial nuai a hii leng na lau kei ding a, sun a thilhihsia siatna na lau kei ding hi.
19091007	Na sik ah sang apuk ding ua, na taklam ah sing apuk ding uh; himahleh nang ahon naih kei ding hi.
19091008	Na mit in na en ding a, migilou-saloute siatna amuh in na mu lel ding hi.
19091009	Toupa aw, nang ka kihumbitna na hi a! Tungnungpen na omna ahi;
19091010	Thil hoih lou in ahon tuak kei ding a, hii himhim in leng na puanin ahon naih sam kei ding hi.
19091011	Na lampi teng a hon humbit ding in, na tungthu ah zaw a-angelte thu pe ding ahi ngal a.
19091012	Akhut un hon dom ding ua, huchi lou in zaw na khe in suang na sui khakha ding hi.
19091013	Humpinelkai leh gulgial na sikden ding a; humpinelkai hat lai leh dragon na sikden ding hi.
19091014	Ka tung a a-itna angak ziak in amah ka humbit ding a; ka min atheih ziak in mun sang ah ka khatou ding hi.
19091015	Ama'n hon sam ding a, ka dawng ding hi; mangbat lai in akiang ah ka om ding hi, amah ka humbit in ka pahtawi ding hi.
19091016	Damsawtna in ka lungkimsak ding a, ka hotdamna leng ka musak ding hi.
19092001	Toupa kiang a kipahthu gen leh Tungnungpen aw, na min phat a lasak thil hoih ahi.
19092002	Zingsang a na zahngaihna hihlat leh, zan teng a na ginomna hihlat,
19092003	thil tumtheih gui sawm neite, pekgingte, kaihging tum khasiathuaite toh, ahoih hi.
19092004	Toupa , nang nna na sep in na hon kipaksak a, na khut thilhihte ziak in nuam in la ka sa ding hi.
19092005	Toupa aw, na thilhihte thupi hi na tel e! Na ngaihtuahnate thuk hi na lawmlawm e!
19092006	Mimawl in hiai athei kei hi; mihai in atheisiam sam kei hi.
19092007	Migilou-saloute loupa bang a ahong nou ua, thil hihkhialte tengteng a hong phat letlot un, tangtawn a ding ahihman a hong om ding uh ahi, chih.
19092008	Toupa aw, nang zaw tangtawn a ding a sangpi a om gige na hi.
19092009	Toupa aw, ngai dih, nang hon doute, ngai dih, nang hon doute amangthang dek uhi; thil hihkhial tengteng hihzak in a-om vek ding uhi.
19092010	Himahleh gam bawngtal kii bang in ka kii na pahtawi a; sathau thak ka nilhta hi.
19092011	Ka mit in leng ka galte tung a ka thudeih amu dia, ka bil in kei hon dou gilou-saloute tung a ka thudeih aza ding.

19113005	Tunglam a tutphah nei, Toupa i Pathian bang kua ahia,
19113006	van a thil omte leh lei a thil omte en ding a kua kihihniam ahia?
19113007	Ama'n genthei leivui a kipan akaithou a, tagah eklei a kipan adomkang hi.
19113008	Miliante kiang a omsak theihna ding in, amite miliante kiang ngei ah.
19113009	Ama'n numei chiing inn-le-lou akepsak a, tu leh ta neinu bang in nuamsatak in abawl hi. Toupa phat un.
19114001	Aigupta gam a pan Israelte apawt ua, Jakob inkuanpihte melmak mi lak a kipan apawt lai un.
19114002	Judah a mun siangthou ahi a, Israelte avaihawmna gam ahong hita hi.
19114003	Tuipi in huai amu a, ataimang a; Jordan lui kiksak in a-omta hi.
19114004	Tangte belamtal bang in adiang ua, mual neute belampa noute bang in.
19114005	Aw nang tuipi, bang na chi a, na taimang tak? Nang Jordan, bangchi na hia, na kik nawn tak?
19114006	Nou tangte aw, bang na chi ua ahia, belampa noute bang a na dian uh?
19114007	Nang leitung, Toupa ma ah ling in, Jakobte Pathian ma ah.
19114008	Ama'n suangpi dil asuaksak a, meisuang tui nak asuaksak hi.
19115001	Toupa aw, kou hon pe lou in, koumau hon pe lou in, na min thupina pe zaw in, na zahngaihna leh na thutak ziak in.
19115002	Bang achia namte'n, “A Pathian uh koi a om ahia?” chi uh ahia?
19115003	Ka Pathian uh van ah a-om a; a-utut ahih ahi.
19115004	Amilimte uh dangka leh dangka-eng ahi ua, mihing khutsuak ahi uh.
19115005	Kam anei ua, apau kei uh; mit anei ua, amu kei uh;
19115006	bil anei ua, aza kei uh; nak anei ua, gim aza kei uh;
19115007	khut anei ua, bangmah akhoih kei uh; khe anei ua, apai kei uh; agawl tungtawn un apau sam kei uhi.
19115008	Amau bawlte amaute bang ahi ding ua; ahi, huai muang peuhmahte.
19115009	Israelte aw, Toupa muang un; amah amau panpihpa leh aphaw uh ahi.
19115010	Aaron inkuanpihte aw, Toupa muang un, amau panpihpa leh aphaw uh amah ahi.
19115011	Toupa laute aw, Toupa muang un, amau panpihpa leh aphaw uh ahi.
19115012	Toupa'n hon theigige a; avualzawl ding, Israel inkuante avualzawl ding a, Aaron inkuante avualzawl ding hi.
19115013	Toupa laute avualzawl ding, aneu leh alian in.
19115014	Toupa'n nou hon pungsak hen, nou leh na tate uh toh.
19115015	Toupa vualzawlna mute na hi uh, amah lei leh van siampa ahi.
19115016	Vante Toupa vante ahi a; leitung mihing tate kiang ah apia hi.
19115017	Misite'n Toupa aphat kei ua, mundaitak a paisukte peuhmah in aphat sam kei uh;
19115018	kou bel Toupa ka phat ding uh, tu a kipan tangtawn in, Toupa phat un.
19116001	Toupa ka it ahi, ka aw leh ka ngetnate angaihkhiak ziak in.
19116002	Kei lam a abil ahon doh ziak in ka damsung teng in amah ka sam ding hi.
19116003	Sihna khauhualte'n hon vial a, Sheol natnate'n hon man a, mangbatna leh lungkhamna ka na tuak hi.
19116004	Huaitak in Toupa min ka sam a; “Aw Toupa , hehpih in ka hinna humbit in,” chi in.
19116005	Toupa mihehpih theitak leh diktattak ahi a; ahi, i Pathian uh milainat theitak ahi.
19116006	Toupa'n mimawlte ahumbit nak a; hihniam in ka om a, ama'n hon hondamta hi.
19116007	Ka hinna aw, na khawlna ah kikta in; Toupa'n na tung ah hoihtak in ahihta ngal a.
19116008	Ka hinna sihna a pan, ka mitte khitui a pan, ka khete pukna a pan na humbitta hi.
19116009	Mihing gam ah Toupa ma ah ka vak ding hi.
19116010	Ka gingta a, thu ka gen ding, ahi, nakpitak a hihgim in ka om hi.
19116011	Ka lungvai in, mi tengteng zuau ahi uh, ka na chita mawk hi.
19116012	Ka tung a athil hoih hih tengteng ziak in Toupa kiang ah bang ahia ka piak thuk sam ding?
19116013	Hotdamna nou ka la ding a, Toupa min ka sam ding hi.
19116014	Ka thuchiamte Toupa kiang ah ka tangtun ding, ahi amite ma ah.
19116015	Amisiangthoute sihna Toupa muh in manphapi ahi.
19116016	Toupa aw, na sikha ka hi, na sikha, na sikhanu tapa ka hi; na hon henna na sutta hi.
19116017	Kipahthu genna kithoihnate ka hon lan ding a, Toupa min ka sam ding hi.
19116018	Ka thuchiamte Toupa kiang ah ka tangtun ding, ahi, amite tengteng ma ah;
19116019	Toupa' inn huangsung intual ah, Jerusalem aw, na laitak ah ka tangtun ding hi. Toupa phat un.
19117001	Aw, nam chihte aw, Toupa phat unla; michihte aw, amah phat un.
19117002	Azahngaihna i tung uah athupi in; Toupa thutak tangtawn a om ding ahih ziak in. Toupa phat un.
19118001	Aw, Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un; Amah lah ahoih ngal a; azahngaihna leng tangtawn a om ding ahih ziak in.
19118002	Azahngaihna tangtawn in a-om ding chih Israelte'n gen uhen.
19118003	Azahngaihna tangtawn in a-om ding chih, Aaron inkuante'n gen uhen.
19118004	Azahngaihna tangtawn in a-om ding chih, Toupa kihtate'n gen uhen.
19118005	Ka mangbatna a kipan in Toupa ka sam a, Toupa'n hon dawng a, mun awngthawl ah hon omsakta hi.
19118006	Toupa kei lam a pang ahi a, ka lau kei ding; mihing in bang ahon chih thei dia.
19118007	Toupa kei lam a pang hon panpihte lak a ahi; huaiziak in hon doute tung ah ka thu deihtel ka mu ding hi.
19118008	Mihing muan sang in Toupa a muanna koih ahoihzaw hi.
19118009	Miliante gintak sang in Toupa a ginna koih ahoihzaw hi.
19118010	Nam chih in ahon umsuak ua; amau Toupa min in ka hihmang ding.
19118011	Amau hon umsuak ua; ahi, hon umsuak ua; amau Toupa min in ka hihmang ding hi.
19118012	Khuai bang in hon umsuak ua; ling meikuang bang in mihsak in a-om uh; amau Toupa min in ka hihmang ding hi.
19118013	Ka pukna ding in hon sut na tum a; himahleh Toupa'n ahon panpih geih hi.
19118014	Toupa ka hatna leh ka la ahi, ka hotdamna leng ahong hita hi.
19118015	Kipahna leh hotdamna husa midiktatte puanin ah a-om hi, Toupa khut taklam in hangsantak in ahih nak hi.
19118016	Toupa khut taklam pahtawi in a-om nak a; Toupa khut taklam in hangsantak in ahih nak hi.
19118017	Ka si kei ding, ka dam ding hi, Toupa thilhihte ka theisak zaw ding.
19118018	Toupa'n nakpitak in hon thuzoh a, sihna kiang ah zaw hon pe tel kei hi.
19118019	Diktatna kulh kongkhakte hon honsak un; huaite ah ka lut ding a, Toupa kiang ah kipahthu ka hilh ding hi.
19118020	Hiai Toupa kongkhak ahi; midiktatte alut ding uh.
19118021	Na kiang ah kipahthu ka gen ding, nang hon dawng in, hon hondampa na hita ngal a.
19118022	Inn lamte suang deih louh aning a suang phatuampen ana hita hi.
19118023	Huai Toupa hih ahi; i mitmuh uah alamdang ahi.
19118024	Hiai Toupa ni seh ahi, hiai ah i nuam un i kipak ding uh.
19118025	Toupa aw, hehpih in hon hondam inla, Toupa aw, hehpih in vangphatna hon sawl in.
19118026	Toupa min a hong pai in nuam asa hi; Toupa' inn a pan in ka hon vualzawl uhi.
19118027	Toupa Pathian ahi, ama'n vak ahon pia a, kithoihna ding khauhual in khih uhen, maitam kii mahmah ah.
19118028	Nang ka Pathian na hi a, kipahthu ka hon hilh ding a; ka Pathian na hi a, ka hon pahtawi ding hi.
19118029	Aw, Toupa kiang ah kipahthu hilh un; amah lah ahoih ngal a; azahngaihna lah tangtawn a om ding ahi ngal a.
19119001	Lampi a mihoihkimte'n nuam asa uhi, Toupa dan zuite'n.
19119002	Athu theihsakte zuite'n nuam asa uhi, lungtang tengteng a amah zongte'n.
19119003	Ahi, amau diktatlouhna ahih kei ua; alampite ah apai zel uhi.
19119004	Nang na thuzohna thute phatuamngaitak a, zui ding in thu na hon pia hi.
19119005	Aw, na dan thusehte zui ding in ka omdante hihkip in omleh aw;
19119006	Huai hun chiang in ka zahlak kei ding a, na thupiakte khawk ka sak hun chiang in.
19119007	Lungtang diktak pu in kipahthu ka hon hilh ding hi. Na vaihawmna dikte ka zil hun chiang in.
19119008	Na dan thuseh ka zui ding a, aw, hon paisan den ke'n. Beth
19119009	Valnou in, bangchi in ahia a-omdan ahihsiangthou ding? Na thu bang zel a a-omdan venghoih in.
19119010	Ka lungtang tengteng in ka hon zong a; Aw, na thupiakte ka paisan zaw phal mahmah ke'n.
19119011	Na tung a thil ka hihkhelh louhna ding in na thu tuh ka lungtang ah ka kem hi.
19119012	Toupa aw, nang nuam na sa hi; na dan thusehte hon zilsak in.
19119013	Na kam a na vaihawm pawt tengteng ka muk in ka theisakta hi.
19119014	Na thu theihsak lam ah nuam ka sa a, hauhsaknate teng a nuam ka sak bang in.
19119015	Na thuzohna thute ka ngaihtuah ding a, na lampite ka limsak behlap ding hi.
19119016	Na dan thuseh tungte ah ka kipak ding a; na thu ka mangngilh kei ding hi. Gimel
19119017	Ka hintheihna ding in na sikha tung ah hoihtak in hih in; huchi in na thu ka zui ding hi.
19119018	Na dan thu a kipan thillamdang ka muhtheihna ding in, ka mitte vaksak in.
19119019	Lei ah mikhual ka hi a; na thupiakte ka lak ah iim ke'n.
19119020	Ka hinna kitamgawp in a-om a, chik lai peuh a na vaihawmna angai hi.
19119021	Mikisathei, hamsiat a omte na taihilh a, na thupiakte vakmangsante.
19119022	Gensiatna leh muhsitna ka kiang a kipan lamang in; na thu theihsakte ka zui hi.
19119023	Miliante leng atu ua, hon kalh ua; himahleh na sikha in na dan thusehte angaihtuah zaw ahi.
19119024	Na thu theihsakte ka kipahna ahi a, thupha hon hilhte ahi uh. Daleth
19119025	Ka hinna leivui ah abelh bikbek a; na thu bang zel in hon hihhalh in.
19119026	Ka omdante ka hon theisak a, nang na hon dawng a; na dan thusehte hon sinsak in.
19119027	Na thuzohna lam hon theisiamsak in, huchi in na thillamdang hih thute ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
19119028	Ka hinna lungkham ziak in atuimang nak a; na thu bang zel in hon hihhat in.
19119029	Omdan diklou ka kiang a kipan lasuan inla; hehpih in na dan hon pia in.
19119030	Omdan muanhuai ka tel a; na vaihawmnate ka ma ah ka omsak hi.
19119031	Na thu theihsakte ah ka bel tinten a; Toupa aw, hon zahlaksak ke'n.
19119032	Na thupiak lam ah ka tai ding a, ka lungtang na hihlet hun chiang in. He
19119033	Toupa aw, na dan thuseh lampi hon ensak in; huchi in atawp pha in ka tawn ding hi.
19119034	Theihsiamna hon pia in, huchi in na dan ka kemhoih ding hi, ahi ka lungtang tengteng in ka zui ding hi.
19119035	Na thupiak lampi ah hon paisak in, huai ah ka kipak ngal a.
19119036	Na thu theihsak lam ah ka lungtang kiheisak in, huaihamna lam ah hilou in.
19119037	Thil bangmah lou phet en lou ding in ka mit kaihei inla, na lampite ah hon hihhalh in.
19119038	Na thu na sikha kiang ah hihkip in, huai nangmah launa ahi.
19119039	Kei a dia gensiatna ka kihtak lamang in; na vaihawmte lah ahoih ngal a.
19119040	Ngai in, na thuzohna thute theih ka ut gige a; na diktatna ziak in hon hihhalh in. Vau
19119041	Toupa aw, na zahngaihnate ka kiang ah hong pai hen, na hotdamna ngei, na thu bang zel in.
19119042	Huchi in hon gensete dawnna ding ka nei ding a, na thu lah ka muang ngal a.
19119043	Huan thutak thu ka kam a kipan lakhe vek ke'nla; na vaihawmnate ka lamen gige ngal a.
19119044	Huchi in na dan ka zui gige ding a, tangtawn tangtawn in.
19119045	Huan noplenna ah ka vak ding a; na thuzohna thute ka zong hi.
19119046	Na thu theihsak thute kumpipate ma ah ka gen ding a, ka zum kei ding hi.
19119047	Huan ka it, na thupiak ah ka kipak ding hi.
19119048	Na thupiak, ka it lamte ah, ka khutte ka zak ding a, na dan thusehte ka ngaihtuah ding hi. Zain
19119049	Na sikha kiang a thuchiam theigige in, Nang na hon lametsak ziak in.
19119050	Huai ka gimthuakna ah leng ka khamuanna ahi, na thu in lah ahon hihhalhta ngal a.
19119051	Kisatheite'n nakpitak in hon nuihsan ua, himahleh na dan ka pai hoisan kei hi.
19119052	Toupa aw, nidanglai a na vaihawmte ka theigige a, ka kikhamuan zel hi.
19119053	Lung hihlouhna in nakpitak in hon buakkhumta a, migilou-salou na dan paisante ziak in.
19119054	Ka khualzinna inn ah na dan thusehte ka la ahi gige hi.
19119055	Toupa aw, zan chiang in na min ka theigige hi, na dan leng ka zui gige hi.
19119056	Huai ka nei a, na thuzohna thute ka vomhoih ziak in. Kheth
19119057	Toupa ka tantuan ahi a; na thu ka zui ding chih ka gen khinta hi.
19119058	Ka lungtang tengteng in na deihsakna ka ngen a; na thu bang zel in hon hehpih in.
19119059	Ka omdante ka ngaihtuah a, na thu theihsak lam ah ka kalsuan hi.
19119060	Ka kintat a, na thupiakte zui ding in ka zekai kei hi;
19119061	Migilou-salou khauhual in hon gaklom gige a; himahleh na dan ka mangngilh kei hi.
19119062	Zankim in kipahthu gen ding in ka thou ding a, na vaihawm diktatte ziak in.
19119063	Nangmah laute leh na thuzohna thu zuite lawm ka hi.
19119064	Toupa aw, leitung na zahngaihna in adim ahi; na dan thusehte hon sinsak in. Teth
19119065	Toupa aw, na thu bang in na sikha na hihhoih zel hi.
19119066	Ngaihtuah siamna leh theihna hon sinsak in; na thupiakte ka gingta hi.
19119067	Hihhaksat a ka om ma in ka vakmang a, tu'n zaw na thu ka zuita hi.
19119068	Nang na hoih a, thil hoih leng na hih a; na dan thusehte hon sinsak in.
19119069	Kisatheite'n ka tung ah zuau a phuaktawm ua, ka lungtang tengteng in na thuzohna thute ka vomhoih ding hi.
19119070	Alungtang uh sungthau bang in athau a; Kei bel na dan tung ah ka kipak gige hi.
19119071	Na dan thusehte ka ziltheihna ding a hihhaksat a ka om ahoih hi.
19119072	Dangka-eng leh dangka sang tampi sang in na kam a dan pawt kei a ding in ahoihzaw hi. Jod
19119073	Na khut in hon siam in, ahon sek hi; na thupiakte ka sintheihna ding in theihsiamna hon pia in.
19119074	Nangmah laute'n ahon mu ding ua, akipak ding uh; na thu ka lamet ziak in.
19119075	Toupa aw, na vaihawmte adik chih leh nang ginomtak in ahi, na hon hihgim chih ka thei hi.
19119076	Na sikha kiang a na thuchiam bang zel in hehpih in na zahngaihna ka khamuanna hisak in.
19119077	Ka hintheihna ding in na zahngaihnate ka kiang ah hong pai hen; na dan ka kipahna ahi.
19119078	Kisathei zahlak in om uhen; dikloupi in hon hihniamta ua; himahleh na thuzohna thute ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
19119079	Nang hon laute'n kei lam hong nga uhen, na thu theihsakte athei ding uhi.
19119080	Ka zahlaklouhna ding in ka lungtang na dan thusehte ah hoihkim in om hen. Kaph
19119081	Ka hinna na hotdamna ngai in abah a; himahleh na thu ka lamen gige hi.
19119082	Na thu etna in ka mit avai khinta a, “Nang chikchiang a hon khamuan ding na hia?” ka chi, ka chi a.
19119083	Meikhu uk savun thawl bang ka na hita ngal a; himahleh na dan thusehte ka mangngilh kei hi.
19119084	Na sikha kum chiang ding bang tan hi ding ahia, hon simmohte tung ah chikchiang in ahia vai na hawm ding?
19119085	Mikisathei, na dan bang a omloute'n ka kiakna ding in kokhukte atou uhi.
19119086	Na thupiak tengteng a ginom ahi; amau dikloupi in hon simmoh uh; hon panpih in!
19119087	Amau lei ah hon hihmang dekdek ua; himahleh na thuzohna thute lah ka kiheisan ngal kei hi.
19119088	Na zahngaihna bang zel in hon hihhalh in; huchi in na kam a thu theihsak ka zui ding hi. Lamed
19119089	Toupa aw, tangtawn a ding in na thu van ah kiptak in a-om hi.
19119090	Na ginomna suan tengteng pha in a-om ding hi; leitung na hihkip a, a-om gige hi.
19119091	Huaite tuni in na vaihawmte bang in a-om gige a thil teng na sikhate ahi uhi.
19119092	Na dan ka kipahna hi keileh zaw, ka gimthuakna a mangthang ding hi ing a.
19119093	Na thuzohna thute chik lai peuh in leng ka mangngilh kei ding, nang lah huaite in na hon hihhalhta ngal a.
19119094	Nang a ka hi, hon hondam in; na thuzohna thute ka zong ngal a.
19119095	Migilou-saloute'n hihmang tum in ahon ngak ua; himahleh na thu theihsakte ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
19119096	Hoihkimna teng tawpna ka mu a; na thupiak aza ngei e. Mem
19119097	Aw, na dan deih hi na tel ing e! Nitum a ka ngaihtuah ahi.
19119098	Na thupiakte'n hon doute sang a pilzaw in hon bawl a; tangtawn a ka kiang a a-om gige ziak in.
19119099	Hon hilhte tengteng sang in pilna ka nei zaw ahi; na thu theihsakte ka ngaihtuah ahih nak ziak in.
19119100	Tekte sang in ka theisiam zaw a, ahi, na thuzohna thute ka vomhoih ziak in.
19119101	Na thu ka zuihtheihna ding in lampi gilou himhim ah ka khete kalsuan ka phal kei hi.
19119102	Na vaihawmna a pan ka pial kei; nang na hon hilh ziak in.
19119103	Na thute ka kam a ding in khum hi na tel e! Ahi, ka kam a ding in khuaizu sang in akhumzaw hi.
19119104	Na thuzohna thute ziak in theihsiamna ka nei zel; huaiziak in omdan diklou peuhmah ka hua hi. Nun
19119105	Na thu ka khe a ding in khawnvak ahi a, ka lampi a ding in vak ahi.
19119106	Na vaihawmna diktatte zui ding in ka kichiam a, ka hihkip lai hi.
19119107	Nakpitak a hihhaksat in ka om a; Toupa aw, na thu bang zel in hon hihhalh in.
19119108	Toupa aw, hehpih in ka kam a ka deih thu phatna ana sang inla, na dante hon sinsak in.
19119109	Ka hinna ka khut ah a-om a; himahleh, na dan ka mangngilh ngei kei hi.
19119110	Migilou-saloute'n ka awkna ding in thang akam ua; himahleh na thuzohna thute ka vakmangsan kei hi.
19119111	Na thu theihsakte tangtawn a gouluah ding in ka la a; ka lungtang hihnuam pen ahi.
19119112	Na dan thusehte, atawp pha a zui ding in, ka lungtang ka koihkipta hi. Samekh
19119113	Bangmah lou ngaihtuahnate ka hua a, na dan ka deih ahi.
19119114	Nang ka bukna mun leh ka phaw na hi a; na thu ka lamet ahi.
19119115	Nou thil hoih lou hihte aw, hon paisan un; ka Pathian thilpiakte ka vomhoih theihna ding in.
19119116	Ka hintheihna ding in na thu bang zel in hon len nilouh inla, ka lamet tung ah zahlak in hon omsak ke'n.
19119117	Hon kai in, huchi in ka bit ding a, na dan thusehte ka khawk sa gige ding ahi.
19119118	Na dan thusehte vakmangsan tengteng na musit a; akhemna uh lah zuau ahi.
19119119	Lei a migilou-salou tengteng eksia bang in na hihmang a, huaiziak in na thu theihsakte ka deih hi.
19119120	Ka sa nangmah lau in aling a, na vaihawmnate leng ka lau hi. Ayin
19119121	Vai ka hawm a, diktattak in ka hih hi; hon nuaisiahte lak ah hon nuse ke'n.
19119122	Na sikha tungtang thu ah, ahoihna a bultum in; kisatheite'n hon nuaisiah kei uhen.
19119123	Na hotdamna etna in ka mit avai khinta a, na thu diktattak etna toh in.
19119124	Na zahngaihna bang zel in na sikha tung ah hih inla, na dan thusehte hon hilh in.
19119125	Na sikha ka hi a, theihsiamna hon pia in; na thu theihsakte ka theihna ding in.
19119126	Toupa , sep ahunta; na dan bangmah lou in abawlta uhi.
19119127	Huaiziak in na thupiakte dangka-eng sang in ka deih a; ahi, dangka-eng siangthou sang in.
19119128	Huaiziak in thil peuhmah thu a na thuzohna thu tengteng dik in ka thei a; omdan diklou peuhmah ka hua ahi. Pe
19119129	Na thu theihsakte alamdang a; huaiziak in ka hinna in azui hi.
19119130	Na thu hilhchet in mite ahihvak a; mimawlte atheisiamsak hi.
19119131	Kam zapi in ka ka a, ka nak hawphawp hi; na thupiakte ka lunggulh ziak in.
19119132	Kei lam hong nga inla, hon hehpih in, na min deihte na hehpih bang in.
19119133	Ka khe kalsuante na thu ah hihkip inla; gitlouhnate ka tung ah thu neisak ke'n.
19119134	Mihing nuaisiahna pan hon humbit in; huchi in na thuzohna thute ka zui ding hi.
19119135	Na mel in na sikha sunvak inla; na dan thusehte hon sinsak in.
19119136	Na dan azuih louh ziak in, Lui a tui bang in ka mit ah ka khitui aluangkhia hi. Tsadhe
19119137	Toupa aw, nang na dik a, na vaihawmte adik ahi.
19119138	Na thu theihsakte diktat leh ginom mahmah in thu na pia hi.
19119139	Ka phattuamngaihna in hon negaita, hon doute'n na thu amangngilh ziak un.
19119140	Na thu siangthou mahmah ahi; huaiziak in na sikha in adeih hi.
19119141	Mineu leh mi muhsit ka hi a, himahleh na thuzohna thute ka mangngilh ngei kei hi.
19119142	Na diktatna tangtawn diktatna ding ahi a, na dan leng thutak ahi.

19119145	Ka lungtang tengteng in ka hon sam a; Toupa aw, hon dawng in; na dan thusehte ka kemhoih ding hi.
19119146	Ka hon sam hi; hon dawng in, huchi in na thu theihsakte ka zui ding hi.
19119147	Phalvak ma in ka thou a, huhna deih in ka kikou a; na thute ka lamen hi.

19119150	Ngaihtuah gilou delhte'n ahon naih ua; amau zaw na dan gamlat a om ahi uh.

19119166	Toupa aw, na hotdamna ka lamen a, na thupiakte bang in ka hih zel hi.

19139005	Nang ka nunglam leh ka malam ah na hon umsuak a, ka tung ah na khut na koih lai hi.
19139006	Huchi tel a theihna kei a ding in alamdang lua a; asang tel a, ka phazou kei hi.
19139007	Na kha a pan in koi ah ka pai dia? Nang a pan koi ah ka taimang dia?
19139008	Van ah kahtou ning chi leng, huai ah na om ngal a; Sheol ah lupna bawl ning chi leng, ngai in, huai ah leng na om zel hi.
19139009	Zing kha zak in, tuipi tawp pek ah va om ning chi leng;
19139010	huai ah leng na khut in na hon pi ding a, na khut taklam in hon len ding ahi ngal a.
19139011	Pel lou in mial in hon khuh zou vek ding a, ka kim a vak zan ahi ding chi dek mah leng;
19139012	Mial in nang a pan bangmah aliah kei a, zan lah sun bang in avak hi; nang a ding in mial leh vak akibang sapsap hi.
19139013	Nangmah ngei in ka lungsim na nei a; ka nu gilsung ah na hon phankhawm hi.
19139014	Na kiang ah kipahthu ka hon hilh ding a; lauhuaitak leh lamdangpi a bawl ka hih ziak in. Na thilhihte lamdangtak ahi a; huai tuh ka hinna in atheitel mahmah hi.
19139015	Aguk a bawl a ka om a, lei mun nuainungpen a kilawmtak a bawl a ka om lai in, ka guh ka tang nang a pan sel in a-om kei hi.
19139016	Ka lim kibawl kim nai lou na mit in amu a, na laibu ah ka hiangte teng gelh vek ahi, anisim a bawl in a-om zel a, khat leng a-om nai louh lai in.
19139017	Pathian aw, na ngaihtuahnate kei a ding in manpha hi na tel e! Agawmkhawmna thupi hi na tel e!
19139018	Sim dek mah leng, atamdan piaunel sang in atamzaw ding; ka khanloh hun in, na kiang a om nilouh ka na hi.

20001033	Himahleh kuapeuh kei hon ngaikhia bittak in ateng ding ua, gilou launa pang lou in amuang ding uhi.
20002001	Ka tapa, ka thute na san a, ka thupiakte nang a na kholkhawmleh;
20002002	huchi a pilna lam a na bil na doh a, theihsiamna lam a na lung na suk leh;
20002003	ahi, theihkakna na sap a, theihsiamna ding a na aw na suahleh;
20002004	dangka bang a huai na zon a, gou sel bang a huai na zonleh;
20002005	huchi in Toupa kihtakna na theisiam ding a, Pathian theihna na mu ding hi.
20002006	Toupa'n lah pilna ape ngal a; akam a kipan in theihna leh theihsiamna ahong pai hi.
20002007	Midik a ding in pilna hoih akholkhawm a, muanhuaina a omte amaute a ding in lum ahi.
20002008	Vaihawmna lampite aventheihna ding in, amisiangthoute lampi ahawitheihna ding in.
20002009	Huchi in diktatna leh vaihawmna na theisiam ding a, huan, hawmsiamna, ahi, lampi hoih chiteng.
20002010	Na lungtang sung ah pilna ahong lut ding a, huan na kha a ding in theihna anuam ding hi.
20002011	Ngentelna in nang ahon veng ding a, theihsiamna in nang ahon kem ding hi.
20002012	Gilou lampi a kipan ahon hunkhe ding, mi thil hoih lou gente a kipan;
20002013	lampi tangte mangngilh, khomial lampite a pai ding;
20002014	gilou hih ding a kipak a, gilou hoihlouhna a nuamsa;
20002015	alampite ua kawi a, alampite ua dikloute.
20002016	Numei lamdang a kipan nang hon hun ding, mikhualnu athute toh amaitangphatnu a kipan mahmah in;
20002017	ama'n atuailai lawm anusia a, a Pathian thukhun amangngilh hi.
20002018	A-inn in sihna lampi adoh a, alampite'n misite lampi;
20002019	amah kiang a hoh kuamah akik nawn kei ua, kuamah in hinna lampite aphazou sam kei uhi.
20002020	Mihoihte lampi a na pai theih a, midiktatte lampi na zuihtheihna ding in.
20002021	Mitangte gamsung a teng ding ahi ua, huan asung ah mihoihkimte a-om tawntung ding uh.
20002022	Himahleh giloute gam a kipan satkhiak in a-om ding ua, huan lepchiahtak a hihte huai a kipan zungkalhkhiak in a-om ding uh.
20003001	Ka tapa, ka dan mangngilh ke'n; himahleh ka thupiakte na lungtang in kem hen.
20003002	Nite sawtna leh damsung kumte leh muanna, nang a hong kibehlap ding ahi ngal a.
20003003	Zahngaihna leh thutak in nang hon nuse kei hen; na ngawng kimvel in vial inla; na lungtang dohkan tung ah amaute gelh in.
20003004	Huchi in Pathian leh mihing mitmuh in deihsakna leh theihsiamna hoih na mu ding hi.
20003005	Na lungtang tengteng toh Toupa ah muang inla, nangmah theihsiamna ah kinga ke'n.
20003006	Na lampi tengteng ah amah thei inla, huchi in ama'n na lampite apitang ding hi.
20003007	Nangmah mit ah pil ke'nla; Toupa kihta inla, gilou taisan in.
20003008	Na lai a ding in damna ahi ding a, na guhte a ding in guhngek.
20003009	Na van in Toupa zahtak in, na punna tengteng a gah masate toh in.
20003010	Huchi in hauhna in na pangte adimlet dia, na belte uain thak in adimlet ding hi.
20003011	Ka tapa, Toupa sawina musit ke'nla; abawlhoihna leng chimtak sam ke'n.
20003012	Pa'n akipahna tapa asalh bang in; Toupa'n a-itte asal ngal a.
20003013	Pilna mumi leh theihsiamna mumi'n nuam asa hi.
20003014	Huai a vante lah dangka vante sang in ahoihzaw ngal a, huan huai a punna dangka-eng hoih sang in.
20003015	Rubi suang sang in amanphazaw; huan amah toh na thil deihte na tehpih thei kei ding.
20003016	Akhut taklam ah nite sawtna a-om a; akhut veilam ah hauhsaknate leh zahtakhuaina.
20003017	Alampite nopna lampite ahi a, alampite tengteng muanna ahi.
20003018	Amah len tintente a ding in hinna sing ahi; amah nei den michih in nuam asa uhi.
20003019	Toupa'n pilna in lei amukhia a; theihsiamna in vante ahihkipta hi.
20003020	Atheihna in thuknate akitam a, huan vante'n adaitui ataksak uhi.
20003021	Ka tapa, na mitte a kipan amaute paimangsak ke'n; pilna hoih leh ngentelna kem gige in.
20003022	Huchi in na kha a ding in hinna ahi ding ua, na ngawng a ding in kilawmna.
20003023	Huchi in bittak in na lampi ah na pai ding a, na khe akisui kei ding hi.
20003024	Na lup chiang in, na lau kei dia; ahi, na lum ding a, na ihmut alim ding.
20003025	Lauguihna kihta ke'n, ahong pai chiang in, giloute hihgawpna leng lau sam ke'n.
20003026	Toupa na kimuanna ahi sin ngal a, na khe thang a awk lou ding in aveng ding hi.
20003027	Amu dingte a kipan thil hoih it ke'n, hih ding a na khut thilhihtheihna a-om lai in.
20003028	Na invengte kiang ah, na kiang a na neih lai in, pai inla, hong nawn in, huchi in zingsang chiang in ka hon pe ding, chi ke'n.
20003029	Na invengte siatna ding gilou ngaihtuah ke'n, na kiang ah bittak in ateng chih thei in.
20003030	Aziak bei in mi toh kina ke'n, gilou bangmah na tung a ahihkeileh.
20003031	Hiamgammi eng ke'n, alampite bangmah tel ke'n.
20003032	Kilawm lou lah Toupa a ding in kihhuai ahi ngal a; himahleh athuguk mitangte kiang ah a-om hi.

20003034	Ama'n nuihsan hatte anuihsan a, himahleh kingainiamte kiang ah hehpihna apia hi.

20004001	Tate aw, pa hilhna za un, theihsiamna thei ding in limsak un.
20004002	Thugin hoihtak ka hon pe ngal a; ka dan taisan kei un.
20004003	Ka pa a ding in tapa ka hi a, ka nu mitmuh a nunnem leh ithuaipen ka hi.
20004004	Huan ahon sinsak a, ka kiang ah, na lungtang in ka thute lenden hen; ka thupiakte zui inla, huchi in hing in.

20004008	Amah pahtawi inla, ama'n nang hon kaisangsak ding; pahtawina ahon tun dia, amah na kawi lai in.
20004009	Na lu a ding in kilawmna kizepna ahon pe dia; kilawmna lallukhu nang ahon pe ding hi.
20004010	Aw ka tapa, ka gente za inla, sang in; huchi in na damsung kumte atam ding hi.
20004011	Pilna lampi ah ka hon kisinsakta a; lampi tangte ah ka hon pita hi.

20004013	Hilhna kiptak in len in; paisak ke'n; amah vom in; amah lah na hinna ahi ngal a.

20004015	Pel inla, akiang ah pai ke'n; kiheisan inla, pai vengveng in.

20004020	Ka tapa, ka thute limsak in; ka gente ah na bildoh in.

20005001	Ka tapa, ka pilna limsak in; ka theihsiamna na bildoh in.
20005002	Ngentelna na vom theih a, na mukte'n theihna akeptheihna ding un.

20005004	Himahleh atawpna nanung gamsai bang in akha a, namsau hiamtuah bang in ahiam hi.

20005006	Huchi in hinna lampi phei amu kei hi; alampite akip kei a, ama'n athei kei hi.

20005013	Hon sinsak mite aw ka mang kei a, kei hon hilhte lam leng ka bil in ka na doh kei.
20005014	Omkhawmte leh kikhawmpite lak ah gilou tengteng ah siatna ka na hita mahmah hi.
20005015	Nangmah tuibem a kipan tuite dawn in, nangmah tuileh a kipan tui luang laite.
20005016	Na tui nak neite suk thanghuaigawp a om ding hia, kongzingte ah na luite?
20005017	Nangmah a ding kia hi uhen, nang kiang a mikhualte ding hilou in.
20005018	Na tuikhuk vualzawl in om hen; huan na tuailai zi ah kipak in.

20005020	Bangziak in ahia, ka tapa, numei lamdang vak a om a, mikhual ang va kawi ding na hia?

20006001	Ka tapa, na inveng a dia moh khu dia na dinleh mikhual a ding a na khut na kichiamleh,
20006002	na kam a thute a awk na hih a, na kam a thute a mat na hihleh,
20006003	tu in hiai hih in, ka tapa, nang leh nang kihonkhia in, na inveng khut sung ah na om chih thei in; kuan in, nang leh nang kiniamkhiak inla, na inveng va ngen ngutngut in.
20006004	Na mitte ihmusak ke'nla, na mitvunte leng lususak sam ke'n.
20006005	Gamvakpa khut a sakhipi bang leh thangkampa khut a vasa bang in kihonkhia in.
20006006	Miksi kiang ah hoh in, nang thadah; alampite ngaihtuah inla, pil in.
20006007	Hausa, heutu, hiam vaihawmmi, nei lou in,

20006009	Bang tan ihmu ding na hia, aw thadah? Na ihmutna a kipan chikchiang a thou ding na hia?

20006011	Huchi in na gentheihna guta bang in ahong pai dia, huan na taksapna mi kigalthuam bang in.
20006012	Miphatuamlou, migilou; kam ki-uangsak toh avak a;

20006020	Ka tapa, na pa thupiak zui in, huan na nu dan mangngilh ke'n.

20007001	Ka tapa, ka thute kem in, na kiang ah ka thupiakte kholkhawm in.
20007002	Ka thupiakte kem inla hing in; huan ka dan na mittang bang in,
20007003	na khutzungte tung ah vial inla; na lungtang suangpek tung ah gelh in.
20007004	Pilna kiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu na hi,” chi inla, theihsiamna na tanaunu chi in.
20007005	Numei lamdang a kipan nang ahon keptheihna ding un, athute a maitangphatnu mikhual a kipan.
20007006	Ka inn tohlet a pan ka dakkhia a, tohlet vang kal ah ka en paisuak a;
20007007	huan mimawlte lak ah ka en a, tuailaite lak ah ka theikak a, tangval theihsiamna beipa,
20007008	a-omna ningchin a kongzing a paisuak a, a-inn lam zuan a pai zelpa;
20007009	khomui in, nitaklam in, zan mial bikbek leh khomial ah.
20007010	Ngai in, numei khat, kizuak puansilh silh, lungtang kiva in akituahpih a.
20007011	Amah ahi lawlaw a, atum tuntun a; akhe a-inn ah a-om ngei kei.
20007012	Kongzing a om ton a-om a, mun liante a a-om ton a-om a, ning chiteng abuk zel hi.
20007013	Huchi in amah amanta a, amah atawpta a, zummoh maitang toh in akiang ah.
20007014	Lemna kithoihnate ka kiang ah a-om; tuni in ka thuchiamte ka peta hi.
20007015	Huaiziak in nang tuak ding in ka hong paikhia a, na mel thanuamtak a zong ding in, ka hon muta hi.

20007017	Ka lupna murrah, aloe leh sinamon in ka namtuisakta hi.

20007020	Sum ip akitawi a; kha alik chiang in inn ah ahong pai ding, achi hi.
20007021	Athugen siamna in amah akipesakta a, amuk a maitang phatnate in amah asawlmangta hi.

20007023	thal in asin akap pailet tan; thang lam a vasa akintat bang in, huai tuh ahinna gun a hih athei kei hi.
