20008001	Pilna akikou in, theihsiamna in a-aw asuah kei maw?
20008002	Lampi a mun sangte tung ah, lampite kisutna ah adingh a;
20008003	kongpite biang ah, khopi lutna ah, kongkhakte apailutna ah, nakpi in akikou hi.
20008004	Noute, aw mite, ka sam; huan ka aw mite tapa kiang ah ahi.
20008005	Aw nou mimawlte, kivensiamna theisiam un; nou mihaite, lungtang theisiam nei un.
20008006	Za un, thil hoihpente gen ding ka hi ngal a; huan ka mukte honna thil dikte ahi ding hi.
20008007	Ka kam in thutak gen ding ahi ngal a; gitlouhna ka muk a ding in akihhuai hi.
20008008	Ka kam a thute teng diktatna ah a-om; huaite ah bangmah diklou a-om kei hi.
20008009	Atheisiam kuapeuh a ding in akichian a, theihna mu amaute a ding in adik hi.
20008010	Ka hilhna sang unla, dangka hilou in; dangka-eng hoihpen sang in theihna.
20008011	Rubi suang sang in pilna ahoihzaw hi; huan deihhuai thilte tengteng huai toh tehpih theih ahi kei uh.
20008012	Kei, pilna, kivensiamna toh ka tengkhawm a, theihna leh theihkakna ka mu hi.
20008013	Toupa kihtak a gilou huat ding ahi; kisaktheihna leh, ki-otsakna, gilou lampi leh kam hoih lou, ka hua hi.
20008014	Thupha kei a ahi, theihna hoih; theihsiamna leh hatna ka nei hi.
20008015	Kei ziak in kumpipate'n vai ahawm ua, lalte'n dikna thu apia uh.
20008016	Kei ziak in lalte'n vai ahawm ua, miliante leh lei a vaihawmte tengteng in.
20008017	Kei hon itte amau ka it a; kuapeuh hon zong in hon mu hi.
20008018	Hauhna leh zahna ka kiang ah a-om; ahi, sawt daih hauhna leh diktatna toh.
20008019	Ka gah dangka-eng sang in ahoihzaw, ahi, dangka-eng hoih sang in; ka sum muhna dangka hoihpen sang in.
20008020	Diktatna lampi ka zui a, vaihawmna lampite lak ah.
20008021	Kei hon itte van ka luahsak theih a, agoubawm uh ka dimsak theihna ding in.
20008022	Toupa'n alampi kipat tung in ahon nei a, nidang a athilhihte ma in.
20008023	Tangtawn a kipan, atung a kipan leh lei om ma a pan koihkip ka hi.
20008024	Thuknate a-om louh lai in, lakkhiak in ka om a; luikhuk tui a dimte a-om louh lai un.
20008025	Tangte a-omkip ma a, mualte om ma in lakkhiak in ka om.
20008026	Lei leh gam bawlkhiak ahih ma in, leivui a khovel abawl nai louh lai in.
20008027	Vante ahihkip lai in, huai ah ka om; tui thuk maikaih a tehna akoih lai in.
20008028	Tung a vante abawlkip lai in; tui thukte tuikhukte ahong hat lai un.
20008029	Tuipi kiang a agi apiak lai in, huchi a tuite'n athupiak tung a atatleklouhna ding un; lei suangphumte achiamteh lai in.
20008030	Huai lai in akiang ah ka om, nasemmi heutu bang in; huan niteng in akipahna ka hi a, ama a kipak gige in;
20008031	atentheihna lei ah; ka kipahna mite tapate kiang ah a-om hi.
20008032	Huaiziak in tu in, ka tapate, hon ngaikhia unla; ka lampite zui mite'n nuam asa ngal ua.
20008033	Hilhna za in pil unla, nial kei un.
20008034	Mi kei hon za in nuam asa hi, niteng a ka kongpi leh ka kongkhak khuamte a ngak in.
20008035	Kuapeuh hon mu in hinna amu ua, Toupa deihsakna tang ding ahi uhi.
20008036	Himahleh kuapeuh ka tung a thil hihkhial in amah kha ahihdik kei hi; kei hon hote'n sihna a-it uhi.
20009001	Pilna in a-inn alam khin a, akhuam sagihte aphut hi.
20009002	Agante agouta a; a-uain leng ahelta hi; adohkan leng abawl khinta hi.
20009003	Anungakte asawlkheta a, khopi mun sang penpente tung ah akikou a,
20009004	mimawl peuhmah, hiai lam ah hong kihei hen; theihsiamna nei lou amah tungtang ahihleh, ama'n akiang ah,
20009005	“Hong in, ka tanghou ne unla, ka helsa ka uain dawn un,” achi hi.
20009006	Paikhia unla, nou mimawlte, hing un; theihsiamna lampi ah pai un.
20009007	Musitmi bawlhoih in amah a ding in zumhuaina amu; huan kuapeuh migilou-salou in amah a ding in minsiatna amu.
20009008	Musitmi sal dah in, nang ahon ho kha ding; mipil sal in, huchi in nang ahon it ding.
20009009	Mipil kiang ah hilhna pe lechin, apilzaw lai ding a; midiktat sinsak in.
20009010	Toupa kihtak pilna bul ahi; misiangthou theihna theihsiamna ahi.
20009011	Kei ziak in na nite lah hihtam ahi ding a, na damsung kumte hihpun ahi ding hi.
20009012	Na pilleh, nangmah a dia pil na hi. Huan mi na muhsitleh, nang kia in na po ding hi.
20009013	Numei hai a-aphuai; mimawl ahi a, bangmah athei kei.
20009014	Huan a-inn kongkhak ah atu a, khopi mun sangte atutphah tung ah,
20009015	avialpaite sam ding, alampite ua pai zelte,
20009016	mimawl kuapeuh, hiai lai ah hong kihei hen; huan amah theihsiamna nei lou tungtang ahihleh, ama'n akiang ah,
20009017	tuigukte akhum a, aguk a tanghou nek anuam, achi hi.

20010001	Solomon paunakte. Tapa pil in pa kipak abawl a; himahleh tapa hai anu gikna ahi.
20010002	Gitlouhna sumte'n bangmah aloh tak kei; himahleh diktatna in sihna a kipan atankhia hi.
20010003	Toupa'n midiktat kialsih aphal kei ding; himahleh migilou a kipan atankhia hi.
20010004	Khut ze-ol mi ahong genthei a; himahleh mithanuam khut in hauhsakna abawl hi.
20010005	Nipi lai a lakhawmpa tapa pil ahi; himahleh pawltak hun a ihmu zumhuai omsak tapa ahi.

20022011	Kuapeuh lungtang sianthouna it, amukte deihhuaina ziak in kumpipa alawm ahi ding hi.
20022012	Theihna nei amah Toupa mit in avomhoih ding, himahleh lepchiahmi thute apai ahi.
20022013	Thadah in, polam ah humpinelkai a-om; kongzing ah thah in a-om ding, achi hi.

20029003	Kuapeuh pilna it in apa akipaksak a; himahleh kuapeuh kizuakte kithuahpih in asum amawk zatbei hi.
20029004	Kumpipa'n vaihawmna in gam ahihkip a; himahleh kuapeuh thilpiak phut teitei in ahihsia hi.
20029005	Mi invengte maitangphat in kalsuante a ding in len azaksak hi.
20029006	Mihoih lou tatlekna ah thang a-om; himahleh midiktat in la asa a, akipak hi.
20029007	Midiktat in migenthei thu atheihpih a; migilou in huai thei ding in theihsiamna anei kei hi.
20029008	Misimmoh hatte'n khopi ahal ua; himahleh mipilte'n thangpaihna aheimang uh.
20029009	Mipil in mihai akiselpihleh, aheh hiam anui hiam, khawlna a-om kei ding hi.
20029010	Sisan duh a dangtak in amah mihoihkim amudah; huan mitang ahihleh, ahinna azong uhi.
20029011	Mihai in ahehna tengteng agen a; himahleh mipil in agenkhe kei a, akhemdai hi.
20029012	Vaihawmmi'n zuauthu angaihkhiakleh, asikha tengteng gilou ahi uh.
20029013	Migenthei leh nuaisiah hat akituakkhawm ua; Toupa'n anih tuak uh mitte asukvaksak hi.
20029014	Kumpipa ginomtak gentheite ngaihtuah, tangtawn in alaltutphah akip ding hi.
20029015	Chiang leh salhna in pilna apia; himahleh naupang ama thuthu a omsak in anu a ding in zumna ahi.
20029016	Giloute apun chiang un, tatlekna apung hi; himahleh midiktat in apukna uh a-en ding hi.
20029017	Na tapa bawlhoih in, awlna ahon pe ding hi; ahi, na kha a ding in nopna ahon pe ding hi.
20029018	Mengmuhna omlouhna ah, mite azautat uh; himahleh kuapeuh dan zui, ama'n nuam asa hi.
20029019	Sikha thute a bawlhoih in a-om kei ding; thei mahleh alimsak kei ding.
20029020	Athute a kinoh mi na mu hia? Amah sang in mihai a kipan in lametna a-om zaw hi.
20029021	Kuapeuh anaupan a kipan a asikha nuamtattak a kem in atawptawp in ama tapa hong hi in anei ding hi.
20029022	Miheh in kinakna atokthou a, huan mithangpai in tatlekna ahau hi.
20029023	Mihing kisaktheihna in amah alainiam ding; himahleh kuapeuh lungsim kiniamkhiak in pahtawina amu ding.
20029024	Kuapeuh guta toh kithuah in amah kha amudah hi; nakpitak a ngetna aza a, huan bangmah agen kei hi.
20029025	Mihing kihtakna in thang ahon tawi a; himahleh kuapeuh Toupa a muanna koih abit ding hi.
20029026	Mi tampi'n vaihawmmi deihsakna azong ua; himahleh mihing vaihawmna Toupa a kipan hong pai ahi.
20029027	Midiklou midiktat a ding in kihhuai ahi; huan kuapeuh lampi a tang migilou a ding in kihhuai ahi.
20030001	Jakeh tapa Agur thute. Huai mi in Ithiel kiang ah, Ithiel leh Ukal kiang ah.
20030002	Chihtaktak in kuamah sang in ka haizaw a, mihing theihsiamna ka nei kei.
20030003	Pilna ka sin nai kei a, Mi Siangthou theihna leng ka nei kei, achi hi.
20030004	Van ah kua akahtouta in ahong kumsuk a? Akhuttum sung ah kua'n huih alakhawmta a? Apuansilh in kua'n tuite atun a? Lei tawpnate kua'n ahihkipta a? Amin bang ahia? Huan atapa min bang ahia, na theihleh?
20030005	Pathian thu chiteng ettel ahi; amah a muangte a ding in lum ahi.
20030006	Athute ah behlap ke'n, ahon sal dia, zuauthei amuh in na om kha ding hi.
20030007	Thil nih ka hon ngen; ka sih ma in huaite hon kitheihmohbawl ke'n.
20030008	Bangmah lou leh zuau kei a kipan gamlapi ah suan in. Gentheihna hiam hauhsaknate hiam hon pe ke'n; kei a dia kiphamoh an in hon vak in.
20030009	Huchi lou in zaw ka kham in, nang ka hon kitheihmohbawl in, Toupa kua ahia? Ka chi kha ding hi. Ahihkeileh, ka genthei in, ka gu in, ka Pathian min thanghuaitak in ka bawl kha ding hi.
20030010	Apu kiang ah sikha gense ke'n, huchi lou in zaw nang ahon hamsiat dia, mohtansak in na om ding hi.
20030011	Apa uh hamsiat suan khat a-om a, anu uh vualzawl lou.
20030012	Amau mitte a siangthou suan khat a-om a, ahi a lah anitna ua kipan silsiang louh ahi uhi.
20030013	Suan khat a-om a, aw amitte uh sanghah hi na e; huan amitkhu vunte sansak in a-om hi.
20030014	Ahate uh namsau bang leh ahate uh temta bang suan khat a-om uh, lei a kipan a migenthei leh tasamte mite lak a kipan anekbeina ding in.
20030015	Vot in tanu nih anei a, hon pia in, hon pia in, chi in akikou ua. Thil thum lungkimsak theih ngei louh a-om uh, ahi, li, “Hun e,” chi lou.
20030016	Han leh sul hut; lei tui a hihlungkim a om lou; huan mei, “Hun e,” chi lou.
20030017	Apa nuihsan mit leh anu thuman musit, phaizang va-akte'n atawm ding ua, muvanlai noute'n ane ding uhi.
20030018	Thil thum kei a ding a lamdang lua a-om ua, ahi, ka theih louh li.
20030019	Huihkhua a muvanlai lampi; suangpi tung a gulpi lampi; tuipi lak a long lampi leh pasal nungak toh alampi.
20030020	Huai mah bang in angkawm hat numei lampi ahi; ane a, zapi in akam aka a, gitlouhna ka hih kei, achi hi.
20030021	Thil thum ziak in lei aling a, huan thil li apuak zoh louh ziak in;
20030022	sikha kumpipa hong hih lai leh mihai ankham lai;
20030023	numei huathuaitak in pasal aneih a, sikha nungak in api aluah in.
20030024	Leitung ah aneu thil li a-om ua himahleh apil mahmah uh.
20030025	Miksite hat lou ganhing hon ahi ua, himahleh nipi lai in anek ding uh asutuah ua;
20030026	kawl sazawte hat lou pawltak ahi ua, himahleh suangpi heng ah a-inn abawl uhi.
20030027	Khaukhupte'n kumpipa anei kei ua, himahleh ahonhon in avek un kilem in apai uh;
20030028	inhikte na khut a na tawi theih ahi ua; himahleh kumpipate inpite ah ateng uh.
20030029	Apai chiang ua thupi thil thum a-om ua, ahi, apai chiang ua thupi, li.
20030030	Humpinelkai, gamsa laklak a hat penpen, bangmah ma ah akiheimang kei hi;
20030031	kidouna sakol; keltal leng; huan kumpipa, amite ma a pai.
20030032	Na kiletsak a haitak a na gamtatleh, ahihkeileh ngaihtuahna gilou na neihleh, na kam tung ah na khut koih in,
20030033	nawitui pei in nawituidat a-omsak a, nak hek in sisan asuahkhesak; huchi mah bang in thangpaihna paisuak in kilaina a-omsak hi.
20031001	Kumpipa Lemuel thute; anu'n amah athuhilh thu:
20031002	Bang ahia, ka tapa? Bang ahia, Aw ka sul tapa? Huan bang ahia, ka thuchiam tapa?
20031003	Na hatna numeite kiang ah pe ke'nla, kumpipate hihsete kiang ah leng na lampite pe sam ke'n.
20031004	Kumpipate a ding ahi kei, Aw Lemuel, uain dawn kumpipate a ding ahi kei; Zu khauh koi a om ahia, chih leng lalte a ding ahi sam kei.
20031005	Huchi lou in zaw adawn un, dan amangngilh un, gimthuak kuapeuh vaihawmna akaikawi kha ding uh.
20031006	Mangthang dia mansa kiang ah zu khauh pia un, kha a haksa sa kiang ah uain.
20031007	Dawnsak unla, agentheihna mangngilhsak un, ahaksatna theigige nawn kei hen.
20031008	Pau thei lou a ding in na kam ka in, sukgawp a ommi huchibangte tengteng thu ah.
20031009	Na kam ka inla, diktak in vai hawm in, gentheite leh tasamte kiang ah vai hawmsak in.
20031010	Zi nunhoih kua'n amu dia? Rubi suang tung pek sang in amanphazaw hi.
20031011	Apasal lungtang in amah amuang a, punna taksapna anei kei ding hi.
20031012	Adamsung niteng in amah ahihhoih a, ahihse kei.
20031013	Samul leh ziza azong a, akhut in kilawptak in nna asem hi.
20031014	Sumsinmi longte bang ahi a; gamla a kipan in an ahon tawi a.
20031015	Zan lai in leng athou a, a-inkote ding an leh asikhanute kiang ah asep ding apia hi.
20031016	Lou angaihtuah a, alei a; akhut a gahte in grephuan abawl hi.
20031017	Hatna in akawng agak a, akhutte ahatsak hi.
20031018	Asumsinna vante aphatuam chih amu a; zan in akhawnvak amit kei hi.
20031019	Akhutte muikhut ah anga a, akhutte mui ah anga hi.
20031020	Gentheite lam ah akhut azak a; ahi, tasamte lam asawk hi.
20031021	A-inkote ziak in vuk akihta kei a; a-inkote tengteng puan san-au in akithuam uhi.
20031022	Puanphah zehoih mantam akibawl a; apuansilh puanmalngat leh sandup ahi.
20031023	Kongpite a gam upate lak a apasal atut chiang in, mite' theihtuam in a-om hi.
20031024	Puan hoih puansilh abawl a, azuak a; sumsinmi kiang ah kawnggakte apekhia hi.
20031025	Hatna leh zahtakna apuansilh ahi; huan hun hong tung ding anuihsan hi.
20031026	Pilna in akam aka a; siamna dan alei ah a-om hi.
20031027	A-inkote lampi hoihtak in a-en a, huan thadahna tanghou ane kei hi.
20031028	Atate athou ua, amah nuamsa achi uhi; apasal in leng, amah aphat hi.
20031029	Tanu tampite'n hoihtak in ahih ua, himahleh nang zaw amaute tengteng na khup vek hi, chi in.
20031030	Ngaihbanna khemna in adim a, huan kilawmna bangmah lou ahi; himahleh numei Toupa laudan siam, phat in a-om ding hi.
20031031	Akhut a gahte amah pia un; huan kongpite ah athilhihte'n amah phat hen.
21001001	Thugenpa, David tapa, Jerusalem kumpipa thute.
21001002	Bangmah loute bangmah lou, bangmah loute bangmah lou, bang teng bangmah lou ahi, Thugenpa'n achi hi.
21001003	Asepgimna tengteng ni nuai a asepgim a kipan mihing in bang phattuamna anei a?
21001004	Khang khat apai a, khang dang ahong tung a; tangtawn in lei a-om gige.
21001005	Ni leng asuak zel a, ni atum zel; huchi in asuahna mun lam ah akik nawn pah hi.
21001006	Simlam ah huih apai a, mallam ah akilehhei a; alampi ah akivialhei gige, huan huih alam zuih ah akik nawn zel hi.
21001007	Luite tengteng tuipi ah aluanglut ua, himahleh tuipi a dim tuan kei; luite paina mun lam ah, huai lam ah apai nawn uh.
21001008	Thil tengteng gimna in adim a; mihing in agen thei kei; muh in mit alungkim kei a, zak in bil leng alungkim sam kei.
21001009	A-om khinsa ahong om ding ahi a; hih khitsa hih a om ding ahi a; huchi in ni nuai ah thil thak a-om kei hi.
21001010	En dih, “Hiai athak ahi?” chi a mite'n agen uh thil a-om hia? I ma ua hunte ua a-om khinsa ahi.
21001011	Khang masate theihgigena a-om kei a; anung a hong om dingte lak ah hong om ding khang nanung lam theihgigena leng a-om sam kei ding.
21001012	Kei Thugenpa, Jerusalem ah Israel tung a kumpipa ka hi.
21001013	Van nuai a hih a omte tengteng tungtang pilna a zong ding leh zongkhe ding a ka lungtang suah ka hi; huai a kisuk ding a mite tapate kiang a Pathian in apiak nakpitak a gimna ahi.
21001014	Ni nuai a hih a om nasepte tengteng ka muta a; ngai in, bang teng bangmah lou ahi a, huih nungdelh ahi.
21001015	Akawisa bawl tang theih ahi kei; huan akim lou sim theih ahi kei.
21001016	Keimah lungtang ka houlimpih a, “Ngai in, Jerusalem a ka ma a omte tengteng sang in pilna thupi ka hon muhsak a; ahi, ka lungtang in pilna aneita,” chi in.
21001017	Huchi in pilna thei ding leh haina haitatna thei ding in ka lungtang ka suk a; hiai leng huih nungdelh ahi chih ka thei hi.
21001018	Pil mahmahna ah lungkham mahmahna a-om a; kuapeuh theihna khangsak in lungkhamna akhangsak hi.
21002001	Ka lungtang in, “Kisa in, vualnopna in ka hon entel dia; huaiziak in nopbawlna ah bual in,” ngai in, hiai leng bangmah lou ahi, ka chi hi.
21002002	Nuihzatna thu ah, “Haina ahi,” Vualnopna thu ah, “Bang ahih a?” ka chi hi.
21002003	Adamsung ua mite tapate'n ahih ding uh bang ahia hoih ka muh theih matan, ka lungtang in pilna kei hon pi kawm in, uain a ka sa kipahsakdan leh haina let tintendan ka lungtang in ka zong hi.
21002004	Nasepna thupi ka bawl a; innte ka kilam hi.
21002005	Grephuante ka kibawl a; huante leh gamsitte ka kibawl a, huaite ah thei chi chih ka suan hi.
21002006	Gammang singte khoinate hihkawt ding in, tui lite ka kibawl hi.
21002007	Pasal sikhate leh numei sikhate ka lei a, ka insung ah sikhate apiang ua; belamhon leh bawnghon ka hau a, Jerusalem a ka ma a omte tengteng sang in.
21002008	Dangka leh dangka-eng leng, bialte leh kumpipate a kipan kei a ding in gou ka kaikhawm a; pasal lasa mite leh numei lasa mite, mite tapate kipahna, atam a tam meite ka nei hi.
21002009	Huchi in Jerusalem a ka ma a om tengteng sang in ka thupi in, ka pung zaw a; ka pilna leng ka kiang ah a-om gige hi.
21002010	Huan bangpeuh ka mit in alunggulh amau ka it kei hi; nopsakna himhim a kipan in ka lungtang ka len kei, ka sepgimnate tengteng ziak in ka lungtang lah akipak ngal a; huan hiai tuh ka sepgimna tengteng a kipan ka tantuan ahi.
21002011	Huchi in ka khutte'n abawl uh nasep tengteng ka vel a, semgim a ka hih nasep gimna tengteng; huan, ngai in, bang teng bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh ahi a, ni nuai ah bangmah phattuamna a-om kei hi.
21002012	Huan pilna leh lungsim kimlouhna leh haina en ding in ka kihei a; kumpipa nung a hong pai mihing in bang hihthei ding ahia? Akihih khinsa mahmah tanpha in leng.
21002013	Huchi in khovak in khomial akhen dandan in, pilna in haina kheng ahi chih ka muta hi.
21002014	Alutang ah mipil mitte a-om a, khomial ah mihai avak hi; huchi hinapi in lah thu khat mi tengteng kiang ah atung hi.
21002015	Huai lai in ka lungtang in, “Mihaite kiang a ahong om bang in, huchibang in kei kiang ah leng ahong om ding; ahihleh bang ding a kei pilzaw ka hia?” ka chi hi. Huan ka lungtang in hiai mah leng bangmah lou ahi, ka chita hi.
21002016	Mipil, mihai bangmah a, theihgigena lah tangtawn in a-om ngal kei a; tunung chiang in avek ua mangngilh khit ahi ding uh chih thei in. Huan bangchi a mihai bang a mipil si ahia?
21002017	Huchi in hinna ka hua a; ni nuai a bawl thilhih kei a ding a ahaksat ziak in; bang teng lah bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh ahi ngal a.
21002018	Huan ni nuai a ka sepgim ka sepgimna tengteng ka hua a; ka nung a hong om ding mi kiang a ka nutsiat ngei ding ahi chih thei in.
21002019	Kua'n ahia mipil hia ahihkeileh mihai ahong hih ding thei? Ka sepgimna tengteng a ka sepgimna tung ah thu anei ding a, ni nuai a pilna ka etsakna ah. Hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21002020	Huaiziak in ni nuai a sepgimna tengteng ka na bawl tak tungtang thu a ka lungtang lungdongsak ding in ka kipumhei hi.
21002021	Mi asepgimna pilna leh theihna leh kivakna toh om lah a-om ngal a; himahleh huai a semgimloumi kiang ah atantuan ding a nutsiah in a-om ding hi. Hiai leng bangmah lou leh gilou lianpi ahi.
21002022	Ni nuai a asepgimna tengteng a kipan leh alungtang a akisukna tengteng a kipan mihing in bang anei a le?
21002023	Anite tengteng lungkhamna lel ahi ngal a, athuakna dahna; ahi, zan nangawn in alungtang akhawl kei hi. Hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21002024	Mihing a ding a anek a adawn a, asepgimna a thil hoih a akha abualsak val a hoihzaw bangmah a-om kei hi. Hiai leng ka thei a, Pathian khut a kipan om ahi.
21002025	Kei sang a kua'n ahia ne thei a, ahihkeileh kua'n ahia nopsakna nei zaw?
21002026	Amah hihlungkim mi kiang ah Pathian in pilna leh theihna leh nopsakna ape ngal a; himahleh mikhial kiang ah, gimthuakna apia, lakhawm ding leh kholkhawm ding in, huchi a kuapeuh Pathian hihlungkim kiang a apiaktheihna ding in. Hiai leng bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh lel ahi.
21003001	Bangchiteng a ding in hunbi a-om, van nuai a thiltup chiteng a ding in hun;
21003002	Pian hun leh sih hun; suan hun leh suansa bohkhiak hun;
21003003	Thah hun leh hihdam hun; phel hun leh lam nawn hun;
21003004	Kah hun leh nuih hun; suun hun leh lam hun;
21003005	Suangte paihmang hun leh suangte lakkhawm hun; kawi hun leh kawi kidek hun;
21003006	Zon hun leh mansuah hun; vom hun leh paihmang hun;
21003007	Bohkek hun leh khui hun; pau louh hun leh thugen hun;
21003008	It hun leh muhdah hun; kidou hun leh kilep hun.
21003009	Asepgimna nasempa'n bang phattuamna anei a?
21003010	Huai akisawizoina ding a Pathian in mite tapate kiang a apiak haksatna ka muta hi.
21003011	Thil chiteng ahun a kilawm in abawl a; alungtang uah khovel leng akoihta a, hinapi in mihing in Pathian nasep abul a kipan a atawp pha ahihsa amukhe thei kei hi.
21003012	Adamsung teng un kipah leh hoih hih sang a amau a dia hoihzaw bangmah a-om kei chih ka thei hi.
21003013	Michih in anek a adawn a, asepgimna tengteng a hoih leh nuam asakpih Pathian thilpiak ahi.
21003014	Bangpeuh Pathian in ahih, tangtawn in a-om ding chih ka thei a; huai ah bangmah akikoih thei kei ding a, huai a kipan in bangmah mah akilakhe thei sam kei ding; Pathian in ahih khinta a, huchi in ama ah mite'n alau ding uhi.
21003015	A-om khinsa pen; a-om ding a om khinsa ahi; huan Pathian in apaimangsa azong hi.
21003016	Huchi in ni nuai ah, vaihawmna mun ah, gitlouhna a-om chih leng ka mu hi; huan diktatna mun ah, gitlouhna huai ah a-om hi.
21003017	Ka lungtang in, “Pathian in midiktat leh migilou angaihtuah ding; thiltup chiteng leh nasep chiteng a ding in hun a-om,” ka chi hi.
21003018	Ka lungtang in, mite tapate ziak in ahi, Pathian in amau a-ettel a, amau mahmah gamsa bang lel ahihdan uh akitheihtheihna ding un.
21003019	Mite tapate tung atung peuhmah lah gamsate tung ah atung ngal a; thil khat ngei atung uah atung a; khat asih bang in, huchi mah bang in adangdang asi a; ahi, hu khat aneikhawm ua; huan mihing in gamsate sang a masak zawkna anei kei; bang teng bangmah lou ahi ngal a.
21003020	Bang teng mun khat ah apai ua; bang teng leivui a kipan ahi ua, bang teng leivui ah akik nawn uh.
21003021	Mihing kha tunglam a paitouleh gamsa kha nuailam a paisuk ahihdan kua ahia thei?
21003022	Huaiziak in mihing a nasepte a akipah ding sang a hoihzaw bangmah a-om kei chih ka thei hi; huai atantuan ahi ngal a; amah nung in bang ahi dia chih mu ding in amah kua'n hon pi nawn ahia le?
21004001	Huchi in ka kihei a ni nuai a nuaisiahna hih a om tengteng ka mu a; huan ngai in, huchibang a nuaisiah a omte, lungmuanpa neiloute; huan amau nuaisiahte lam ah thilhihtheihna a-om a, himahleh lungmuanpa anei kei uh.
21004002	Huaiziak in misite asi khinsate adam lai dam a omlaite sang in ka phat zaw.
21004003	Ahi, a-om ngei nai lou, ni nuai a nasep gilou hih a om mu ngei nailoumi amaute sang in ka ngai thupizaw hi.
21004004	Huchi in sepgimna leh nasep siamna tengteng, hiai ziak a mihing invengte hazat a omna ka muta hi. Hiai leng bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh lel ahi.
21004005	Mihai in abante khepkhawm in amah sa ane hi.
21004006	Khut dim nih sepgimna leh huih nungdelhna sang in, lungmuanna toh khut dim khat ahoihzaw hi.
21004007	Huchi in ka kihei a ni nuai a bangmah lou ka mu hi.
21004008	Amah kia a om khat ka mu a, nihna anei kei a; ahi, tapa anei kei, sanggampa leng anei kei; hinapi in lah asepgim tawpna a-om kei a, hauhsakna in amitte leng alungkim tuan kei hi. “Kua a dia semgim a, ka kha hoih tansak ka hia?” achi a. Hiai leng bangmah lou ahi, ahi, nakpi a gimthuakna ahi.
21004009	Khat sang in nih ahoihzaw; asepgimna ua ding a kipahman hoih aneih ziak un.
21004010	Puk le uh, khat in alawm phong ding ahih ziak in; himahleh apuk chiang a amah kia a-om a, amah phong ding midang nei lou tung agik hi.
21004011	Huai lou in, nih alupkhawm un, lumna athei uh; himahleh khat kia bangchi in alum thei dia?
21004012	Huan mi khat in amah kia a om pen zouleh, nih in amah adou ding ua; khauzang guk a hek akitat mengmeng kei hi.
21004013	Kumpipa tek leh hai, thuhilhna sang thei nawn lou sang in tuailai genthei leh pil ahoihzaw hi.
21004014	Suangkul a kipan a kumpipa hi ding a hong paikhia lah ahi ngal a; ahi, ama gam mahmah a gentheisa a piang ahi.
21004015	Ni nuai a vak ahing tengteng, tuailaite toh om uh ahihleh, anihna, amun ah adingh chih ka muta hi.
21004016	Mi tengteng, amaute tung a a-omna mahmah, bei chih a-om kei a; hinapi in lah tunung chiang a hong om dingte amah ah akipak kei ding uh. Chihtaktak in hiai leng bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh lel ahi.
21005001	Pathian inn a na hoh chiang in na khepek kem in; ngaikhe ding a pai, mihaite kithoihna piak sang in ahoihzaw ngal a; gilou ahih uh chih akithei kei uhi.
21005002	Kam lawp ke'nla, Pathian ma a thil himhim gen ding in na lungtang lawptawp kei hen; Pathian lah van ah a-om a, nang lah leitung ah na om ngal a; huaiziak in na thute tawmsak in.
21005003	Mang lah thu leh la tampi toh ahong om a; huan mihai aw thu tampi toh.
21005004	Pathian kiang a thuchiam na chiam chiang in, pe ding in hal ke'n; mihaite tung ah kipahna anei ngal kei a; na thuchiam pen pia in.
21005005	Na chiam a na piak louh sang in, na chiam louh ahoihzaw hi.
21005006	Na kam in na sa thil ahihkhelhsak phal ke'n; angel ma ah leng, adik kei chi sam ke'n; bang ding in na aw ah Pathian in aheh in, na khut nasep ahihse dia?
21005007	Huchibang in mangte punna leh thute tamna ah bangmah loute a-om nak; himahleh nang zaw Pathian kihta in.
21005008	Gentheite nuaisiahna leh hiamgamna in bial sung ah vaihawmna leh diktatna alamang chih na muhleh, huai thu lamdang sa ke'n; thuneitu sangte'n thuneihna neite a-enkai ua; huan amau tung ah asangzaw a-om hi.
21005009	Huai lou in lei a punna bang teng a ding ahi; kumpipa ngei leng louma in a-nna asepsak hi.
21005010	Kuapeuh dangka deihta dangka in alungkim kei ding; kuapeuh hauhsakna punna deih taleng; hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21005011	Van akibehlap chiang in, amau nete akhang uh; huan huai neimi a ding in bang phattuamna a-om a, amitte a huaite et chih ngal louh?
21005012	Ne tawm in ne tam taleh, semgimmi ihmut alim a; himahleh mihausa vahna in amah a-ihmusak kei hi.
21005013	Ni nuai a gilou hoih het lou ka muh a-om a, huai tuh, hauhsakna a neipa'n amah siatna ding a akep.
21005014	Himahleh huai hauhsaknate thuakna gilou in amangthang hi; tapa asuanleh, akhut ah bangmah a-om kei.
21005015	Anu gil a kipan ahong paileh, vuaktang in apai nawn ding a hong pai bang in, asepgimna, akhut a apuakmang theih a ding in bangmah ala kei ding hi.
21005016	Huan hiai leng gilou hoih het lou ahi, ahong paidan tengteng in, hichibang in apai ding a; huih a ding a asepgimna ah bang punna anei a?
21005017	Adamsung teng in khomial ah an ane a, huan nakpitak a hihbuai in a-om a, chinatna leh thangpaihna anei hi.
21005018	Ngai in, hoih leh kilawm hi a ka muh mi'n Pathian in amah apiak adamsung teng a anek a, adawn a, ni nuai a asepgimna tengteng a hoih asakpih a, huai ahi; hiai lah atantuan ahi ngal a.
21005019	Mi chiteng leng amah kiang a Pathian in hauhsakna leh neih zohna apiak, huai a nektheihna apiak a, atantuan la ding leh asepgimna a kipak ding in; hiai Pathian thilpiak ahi.
21005020	Adam lai nite lah atheigige kei ding a; alungtang kipahna a Pathian in amah adawn ziak in.
21006001	Ni nuai a ka muh gilou a-om a, mite tung ah agik hi.
21006002	Mi Pathian in hauhsakna leh neih zohna leh zahna apiak a, huchi a adeih peuh akha a dia bangmah taksap nei het lou a, himahleh huai ne ding a Pathian in thilhihtheihna apiak louh a, mikhual in anek zawkna; hiai bangmah lou ahi a, gilou natna ahi.
21006003	Mihing in ta zakhat suang henla, kum tampi dam in akumte nite tampi phaleh, akha lah hoih in dim kei ngal in, kivuina nei kei ngalleh; amah a ding in ahun lou a pian ahoihzaw ka chi ahi.
21006004	Bangmah lou lah ahong hi a, khomial ah apaimang a, khomial in amin akhuh hi.
21006005	Huai lou in ni amu kei a, theih leng athei kei; hiai in adang sang in akhawlna anei hi.
21006006	Ahi, kum sangkhat gentuan dam mahleh, hoih nuam asakpih tuan kei; bang teng mun khat ah apai kei uh maw?
21006007	Mihing sepgimna tengteng akam a ding ahi a, himahleh agilkialna adim tuan kei.
21006008	Mihai sang in mipil in bang phattuamna anei a le? Ahihkeileh, mihing ma a omdan thei, migenthei in bang anei a?
21006009	Lunggulhna tam vak sang in mitte muh ahoihzaw hi; hiai leng bangmah lou leh huih nungdelh lel ahi.
21006010	Ana om khinsa bangpeuh, sawtpi a huai amin piaksa ahi, huan mihing ahi chih theih ahi; amah sang a hatzaw amah toh leng akisual thei kei ding hi.
21006011	Thil tampi bangmah lou pungsak a om ding chih thei in, mihing bang ahoih tuan a?
21006012	Adamsung bangmah lou limliap bang a asukbei tengteng, adamsung in mihing a ding a hoih kua'n athei a le? Ni nuai ah amah nung in bang a-om dia chih kua'n mihing ahilh thei a ahia?
21007001	Nuh theih mantam sang in minhoih ahoihzaw; mi pian ni sang in sih ni.
21007002	Ankuangluina inn a hoh sang in, suunna inn a hoh ahoihzaw; huai mi tengteng tawpna ahi a; huan mihing in alungtang a angaihtuah ding ahi.
21007003	Nuih sang in lungkham ahoihzaw; mel lungkhamna ah lungtang kipahsak in lah a-om ngal a.
21007004	Mipil lungtang suunna inn ah a-om; himahleh mihaite lungtang vualnopna inn ah a-om hi.
21007005	Mi a ding in mihaite lasak zak sang in, mipil taina zak ahoihzaw.
21007006	Bel nuai a lingte puak vengvung bang in, mihai nuihna huchibang in a-om ngal a; hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21007007	Simmohna in mipil ahaisak mahmah a; thilpiak in theihsiamna asusia hi.
21007008	Akipatna sang in thil tawpna ahoihzaw; lungsim a kisaktheih sang in lungsim a doh theih ahoihzaw hi.
21007009	Heh ding in na lungsim in kinoh ke'n; hehna lah mihaite awm ah akhawl hi.
21007010	Nidanglaite hiaite sang a ahoihzawkna aziak bang ahia? chi ke'n; hiai thu lah pilhuaitak in na dong kei hi.
21007011	Pilna gouluah bang in ahoih a; ahi, amau ni mute a ding in ahoihzaw tham hi.
21007012	Dangka sum kihumna ahih bang in, pilna lah kihumna ahi ngal a; himahleh theihna hoihzawkna bel, pilna in aneimi hinna ahawisak hi.
21007013	Pathian nasep ngaihtuah in; ama'n akawisak sa, kua ahia bawl tang thei ding?
21007014	Hauhsak ni in nuamsa inla, huan vangtah ni in ngaihtuah in; mihing in anung a thil om ding amuhkhiaklouhna ding in, Pathian in khat lah adang kiang ah kihiang helhel in abawl hi.
21007015	Ka bangmah lou ni in hiai tengteng ka muta hi; midiktat adiktatna a mangthang a-om a, huan migilou agilou bawlna a ahinna hihsau a-om hi.
21007016	Kidiktatsak lo zen ke'n; kipilsak lo zen sam ke'n; bangziak a nang kihihse ding na hia?
21007017	Gilou lo zen ke'nla, hai sam ke'n; na hun tun ma a bangziak a si ding na hia?
21007018	Hiai na let tinten ahoih hi; ahi huai a kipan in leng na khut kai ke'n; kuapeuh Pathian kihta lah amute tengteng a kipan hong paikhe ding uh ahi ngal a.
21007019	Khopi a om vaihawmmi sawmkhat sang in mipil a ding in pilna athupizaw.
21007020	Hoih hih a, khial lou, leitung ah midiktat a-om mahmah kei hi.
21007021	Thu kigen tengteng leng limsak khol dah in; huchi lou in zaw na sikha in nang ahon hamsiat na za kha ding hi.
21007022	Na lungtang in lah huchi mah bang in nang leng midangte na hamsiat mun chih athei ngal a.
21007023	Hiai tengteng pilna in ka enchian vek a, “Ka pil ding,” ka chi a; himahleh kei a kipan agamla hi.
21007024	Gamlatak a thilte leh athuk petpette; kua'n amukhe thei dia?
21007025	Ka kipumhei a, thei ding leh zongkhe ding, pilna zong ding leh thilte ziak zong ding, gitlouhna haina ahi chih thei ding, haina lungsim kimlouhna ahi chih thei ding in ka lungtang koihkip in a-om hi.
21007026	Sihna sang a khazaw tuh numei, alungtang thangte leh lente hi a, akhut henna khau hi ahi chih ka muta hi. Kuapeuh Pathian lungkimsak huai nu a pan asuakta ding a, himahleh mikhial bel athang-awk ding hi.
21007027	Ngai in, hiai ka mukhia, thugentu in achi; thil omdantak mukhe ding in thil akhat akhat ka buk hi.
21007028	Tu in leng ka zong lai a ka mu kei; pasal sangkhat lak a mitang khat ka mu, himahleh numei tengteng lak a mitang ka mu kei hi.
21007029	Ngai in, Pathian in mihing hoihtak in abawl chih, hiai kia ka mu a; himahleh bawltawm tampi azongkhia uhi.
21008001	Mipil bang a om kua ahia? Huan thil hilhchetna kua ahia thei? Mihing pilna in amai avaksak a, amai takna akikheng hi.
21008002	K'on thuhilh, Pathian thuchiam lam thu ah, kumpipa thupiak zui in.
21008003	A-omna mun a kipan paikhe ding in kinoh ke'n; thil gilou ah engtat ke'n; ama'n lah a-utut ahih sek ngal a.
21008004	Kumpipa thu in thilhihtheihna aneih ziak in, “Bang ahia na hih?” Kua'n ahia akiang achi thei ding?
21008005	Thupiak zuite'n thil gilou athei kei ding uh; huan mipil lungtang in hun leh vaihawmna atheikhen zel.
21008006	Thiltup chiteng ah lah hun leh vaihawmna a-om ngal a; mihing haksatna lah atung ah athupi ngal a.
21008007	Ahong om ding lah athei ngal kei a; bangchi in a-om dia chih amah kua'n ahilh thei dia le?
21008008	Kha lentang ding in kha tung a thilhihtheihna neimi a-om kei; sihna ni tung ah leng thilhihtheihna anei sam kei. Huan huai kidouna ah panna a-om kei; piak a om gitlouhna in amah ahunkhe sam kei ding hi.
21008009	Hiai tengteng ka mu a, nasep chiteng ni nuai a hih ah ka lungtang ka pia a; asiatna ding in mi khat in midang tung a thilhihtheihna aneih louh hun a-om hi.
21008010	Huan giloute vui a om ka mu lai a, huan han ah ahong ua; huchi in hihdikte mun siangthou a kipan apaimang ua, khopi ah mangngilh in a-om uhi; hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21008011	Gilou nasep kintak a gawtna akibawl louh ziak in, huaiziak in mite tapate lungtang gilou hih ding in huai ah koihkip in a-om hi.
21008012	Mikhial in gilou zakhat vei hih in, anite hihsau mahleh, Pathian kihta mite amau a ding in ahoih ding chih ka thei mahmah hi, ama a laudan siamte.
21008013	Himahleh giloute a ding in ahoih kei ding, anite leng asausak kei ding a, huai lah limliap bang ahi; Pathian ma a laudan asiam louh ziak in.
21008014	Bangmah lou leitung a hih a om a-om a; midiktat omta bang hileh leng, ama tung a migilou nasep dungzui in ahong om nak hi; huai lou in migiloute omta bang hileh leng, midiktatte nasep dungzui in atung uah ahong om hi; hiai leng bangmah lou ahi.
21008015	Nek leh dawn a vualnuam a om kan a ni nuai a mihing in thil hoihzaw aneih louh ziak in, vualnopna ka phat hi. Pathian in amah ni nuai a apiak adamsung ni tengteng a asepgimna ah amah toh om gige ding ahi ngal a.
21008016	Pilna thei ding leh leitung a hih a om thu-le-la mu ding a ka lungtang ka suk lai in; sun hiam zan hiam a mit a ihmut muh louh lah a-om ngal a.
21008017	Huchi in Pathian thilhih tengteng ka mu a, huchi in ni nuai a thilhih mihing in amukhe thei kei hi; zongkhe ding in mihing nakpitak in pang lezong, amuh louh ding ziak in; huai lou in, mipil in thei kisa mahleh, amukhe thei kei ding hi.
21009001	Hiai tengteng ka lungtang in ka vei ngal a, hiai tengteng zongkhe ding in; midiktatte leh mipilte leh athilhihte uh Pathian khut ah a-om ahi chih; itna ahi hia muhdahna, mihing in athei kei; ama uah avek in a-om hi.
21009002	Thil tengteng kibang in avek ua kiang ah ahong om a; midiktatte leh migiloute tung ah tanchin khat a-om hi; mihoih kiang leh migilou kiang, misiang kiang leh misiang lou kiang, kithoihmi kiang leh kithoihloumi kiang ah, mihoih a-om bang in, mikhial a-om a; akichiampa, thuchiam kihtapa bang in.
21009003	Ni nuai ah hih a om tengteng ah hiai gilou ahi, bang teng tung a tanchin khat om; ahi nalai a, mite tapate lungtang gilou in adim a, adam lai uh alungtang uah lungsim kimlouhna a-om, huai nung in misite kiang ah apai uh.
21009004	Amah hing lai tengteng toh kizom a om ding in lah lametna a-om ngal a; humpinelkai sisa sang in ui hing lai lah ahoihzaw ngal a.
21009005	Mihingte'n asi ding uh chih lah athei ngal ua; himahleh misi in thil himhim athei kei, kipahman leng aneita kei uhi; amaute theihgigena lah akimangngilh hi.
21009006	A-itna uh bang in, amuhdahna uleh a-enna uh tu in amangta a; ni nuai a hih a om thil himhim ah tangtawn in tantuan anei nawnta kei uhi.
21009007	Pai inla, nopsakna toh na tanghou ne inla, lungtang kipak toh in na uain dawn in; Pathian in lah na thilhihte asang khinta ngal a.
21009008	Na puansilhte ngou gige in om hen; huan na lu in nilh theih tasam kei hen.
21009009	Na bangmah lou damsung ni tengteng a na it na zi kiang ah kipaktak in om inla, huai ama'n ni nuai a ahon piak, na bangmah lou ni tengteng in; huai lah damsung in na tantuan ahi ngal a, ni nuai a na sepgimna a na sepgimna ah.
21009010	Na khut in hih ding bangpeuh amuh na theihtawp in sem in; na paina lam han sung ah, nasep hiam, thil ngaihtuah hiam, theihna hiam, pilna hiam a-om lou ding ahi ngal a.
21009011	Ka kihei a, kitaitehna kinte a ding ahi kei a, galdouna hatte a ding ahi tuan kei chih ka mu hi, tanghou leng apilte a ding, hauhsakna leng theisiam mite a ding, deihsakna khutsiamte a ding hi tuan lou; himahleh hun leh phat amaute tengteng tung ah ahong om zel hi.
21009012	Mihing in ahun athei kei hi; ngasate len gilou a akimat bang leh vasate thang a a-awk uh bang in, huchibang in mite tapate, amau tung a thakhat a ahong tun guih lai in, hun gilou a mat in a-om uhi.
21009013	Hichibang in pilna leng ni nuai ah ka mu a, ka kiang ah thupi in akilang hi.
21009014	Khopi lian lou a-om a, asung ah mi tawmchik; huan kumpipa thupi in ahong sim a, ala a, adouna ding in sepaih nasep thupitak abawl hi.
21009015	Huchi in huai ah mipil genthei khat a-om, apilna in khopi ahunkhia a; himahleh kuamah in huai migentheipa atheigige kei uh.
21009016	Huan ke'n, “Hatna sang in pilna ahoihzaw; migenthei pilna muhsit in a-om a, athute ngaihkhiaksak in a-om kei,” ka chi hi.
21009017	Mihaite lak a vaihawmmi kikou sang in awl a mipil thugente akiza zaw hi.
21009018	Kidouna galvante sang in pilna ahoihzaw; himahleh mikhial khat in hoih tampi ahihsia hi.
21010001	Thou sisa in gimlim bawlpa nuhtheihna uihgim asawlkhesak a; huchi mah bang in haina neuchik in pilna leh zahna abukzou nak hi.
21010002	Mipil lungtang ama khut taklam ah a-om a; himahleh mihai lungtang akhut veilam ah.
21010003	Ahi, huai ban ah, lampi a mihai avak lai in, atheihsiamna in azuausan a, mi chiteng kiang ah hai ahihdan agen hi.
21010004	Vaihawmmi lungsim nang dou ding a athohleh na mun taisan ke'n; kipiak in tatkhelhna thupite alungkimsak hi.
21010005	Gilou ni nuai a ka muh, vaihawmmi a kipan adiklouhna hong kipankhia bang in a-om hi.
21010006	Haina nakpi a zahtakhuai in akibawl a, mun niam ah hauhsakna atu hi.
21010007	Sikhate sakol tung a tuang leh lalte leitung a sikhate bang a khe a pai ka mu hi.
21010008	Kuapeuh kokhuk tou huai sung ah ake ding; kuapeuh dai phuvang; gulpi in akei ding.
21010009	Kuapeuh suang hemkhia huai in akihih na ding a; kuapeuh sing a belh huai ah lauhuai in akibawl hi.
21010010	Sik amol a, mi'n ama atat-hiam keileh, hatna tamsem akoih ding ahi; himahleh pilna thuzoh aphatuam hi.
21010011	Khim a om ma a gulpi in akeihleh, khimmi ah phattuamna a-omta kei hi.
21010012	Mipil kam a thute hehpih thei in a-om a; himahleh mihai mukte'n amah mah anawmvalh ding.
21010013	Akam a thute kipatna haina ahi; huan ahoulimna tawpna lungsim kimlouhna gilou ahi.
21010014	Mihai in leng thu akhangsak a; himahleh mihing in bang a-om dia chih athei kei; huan amah nung a hong om ding, amah kua'n ahilh thei dia?
21010015	Khopi a hohna dan atheih louh ziak in, mihaite sepgimna in amaute lak a michih agimsak hi.
21010016	Aw gam, na tung agik hi, na kumpipa naupang ahih lai in na lalte'n zingsang in ane uh!
21010017	Aw gam, na kumpipa miliante tapa ahih a, na lalte'n, kham ding hilou a, hatna ding a ahuntak a anek lai un, nuam na sa hi.
21010018	Thadahna ziak in intung achim a; khut zawntatna ziak in inn akeh hi.
21010019	Nuihna ding in ankuang a kilui a, uain in hinna akipaksak; sum thil tengteng awnghukna ahi.
21010020	Kumpipa, na ngaihtuahna in hamsiat ke'n, na lupna dantan sung ah mihausate hamsiat ke'n; huihkhua a vasate'n na aw pua a, kha neite'n athu agen ding ziak un.
21011001	Tuite tung ah na tanghou pai in; ni tampi nung a mukhe ding na hi ngal a.
21011002	Sagih kiang ah tantuan pia in, ahi, giat ngei kiang ah; leitung a bang gilou hong om ding ahia chih lah na thei ngal kei a.
21011003	Meipite vuah a adimleh, leitung ah akihih awngthawl uh; huan simlam a sing apukleh, hiam mallam ah, apukna mun ah, huai ah a-om ding hi.
21011004	Huih ngeingaihmi in atuh kei ding a; meipi limsakmi in a-at kei ding hi.
21011005	Huih lampi hiam, amah nau toh omna gilsung a guhte bang hong chi khan uh ahia chih na theih louh bang in; bang teng bawlpa Pathian thilhih na thei kei hi.
21011006	Zingsang in na chi tuh inla, nitak in na khut ton maimah ke'n; koi pen hong lohching ding ahia, hiai hia huai hia, ahihkeileh hong hoih tuaktuak ding uhia chih lah na thei ngal kei a.
21011007	Diktak in khovak anuam a, mitte a dia nisa muh thil nuamtak ahi.
21011008	Ahi, mi kum tampi adamleh, huaite tengteng ah kipak hen; himahleh khomial hunte theigige hen, tampi pha ding uh lah ahi ngal a. Ahong om tengteng bangmah lou ahi.
21011009	Aw tangval, na tuailai in kipak in; na tuailai nite ah na lungtang in hon kipaksak hen, na lungtang lampite ah leh na mitte muh in om in; himahleh hiai thilte tengteng ziak in Pathian in nang vaihawmna a hon pi ding ahi chih thei in.
21011010	Huaiziak in na lungtang a kipan lungkhamna suankhia inla, na sa a kipan gilou koihmang in; tuailaina leh khan lut lai lah bangmah lou ahi ngal a.
21012001	Na tuailai nite in nang hon siampa theigige in, ni hoihloute ahong tun ua kumte ahong nai ua, Amaute ah kipahna ka nei kei, na chih hun ahong tun nai louh lai in.
21012002	Ni hiam, khovak leh kha leh aksite, hihmial a om a, meipite vuahzuk khit a akik nawn ma un;
21012003	inn ngakte akivuan ua, mihatte ahong kun ua, atawm tak ziak ua ansute akhawl ua, tawlet a dakkhete hihmial a a-om ua,
21012004	kongzing akongkhakte khak ahih nai louh lai un; ansuk ging angaih louh a, vasa aw a mi athoh a, tumging theih tanute tengteng sukniam a a-om nai louh lai un;
21012005	Ahi, tungsang a om akihta ding ua, alampi ah launa a-om ding; vaisuaklu sing apaklun ding a, huan khaukhup tunggikna ahi dia, lingmin thuk azuau ding; mihing a-inn sau a pai a, suun mite kongzing kim a apai ziak un.
21012006	Dangka khau kiphel a, dangka-eng noubem suktap a a-om a, tuibel tuikhuk a hihkek a a-om a, tuibem a kangtalai khe hihtan a a-om nai louh lai in.
21012007	Huan a-om bang in leivui lei ah akik nawn a, kha bel apepa Pathian kiang ah akik hi.
21012008	Bangmah loute bangmah lou, thugenmi'n achi; bang teng bangmah lou ahi.
21012009	Huai ban ah, Thugenpa apil ziak in, mite theihna asinsak lailai a; ahi, paunak tampi kizomzom in angaihtuah a, azongkhia a, akoih hi.
21012010	Thugenpa'n thu pomtakte mukhe ding in azong a; diktak a gelhkhiak a omte, thutak thute ngei.
21012011	Mipil thute sutna zum bang ahi a, hoihtak a khetkip sikkilhnate bang tuh Belamchingpa khat thugen lakkhawm piakte ahi.
