23001029	“Na tosaw deih mahmahte uh azumpihta ding ua, na huan telte uh ziak in zaktatak in na om ding uhi.
23001030	Tosaw nah vuaite leh huan tui mu lou bang phet na hi ding hi.
23001031	Huchi in mihattak ziza zial bang ahita ding a, anasep mei-ek bang ahi ding; huchi in akang tuaktuak ding ua; kuamah in aphelh kei ding uh,” chi in.
23002001	Amoz tapa Isai in Judah leh Jerusalem tungtang thu amuh:
23002002	Ni nanungte ah hichi ahi ding a, Toupa' inn omna tang tuh tang lian tungte ah hihkip in a-om ding a, mual neu chikchikte tung ah leng tawisan in a-om ding; huai ah nam chihte ahoh ding uhi.
23002003	Huan chi tampite ahoh ding ua, “Hong pai unla, Toupa tang ah, Jakob' Pathian inn ah, i hohtou ding uh; ama'n alampite tanchinte ahon sinsak ding a, alampite ah i pai ding,” achi ding uh. Zion a kipan in dan thu ahong pawt ding a, Jerusalem a pan Toupa thu ahong pawt ding hi.
23002004	Huchi in ama'n namte lak ah vai ahawm ding a, chi tampitak leng ataihilh ding; atemsaute uh leilehna mukzum ding in asek ding uh; namdang in namdang tung ah namsau alikta kei ding a, kidoudan leng asin kei ding uhi.
23002005	Jakob inkuanpihte aw, hong pai un Toupa vak ah i khosa ding uh.
23002006	Suahlam a kipan dan hong pawtta a, ana dim ua, Philistiate bang a aisan siamte ahih ua, gamdang mite tate toh khut akilet ziak un, na mi, Jakob inkuanpihte na paisanta hi.
23002007	Agam uh dangka leh dangka-eng in adim a, asumte uh lah sim seng vual ahi kei; agam uh sakol in adim a, akangtalaite uh lah sim seng vual ahi kei hi.
23002008	Agam uh milim in adim a; akhut ua asepkhiak uh, akhutzungte ua abawl uh, abesek uhi.
23002009	Mineute hihniam in a-om ua, miliante leng niamsak in a-om uh; huaiziak in amau ngaidam ke'n.
23002010	Toupa kihtakhuaina a kipan leh akilawmna thupina a kipan suangpi ah lut unla, leivui ah kibu un.
23002011	Mihing kideihnate hihniam in a-om ding a, mite kisaktheihna niamsak in a-om ding, huai ni in Toupa kia tawisan in a-om ding hi.
23002012	Sepaihte' Toupa ni lah kingaisang leh kisathei tengteng tung ah leh tawisang a om tengteng tung a om ding ahi ngal a; huchi in niamsak in a-om ding uh.
23002013	Lebanon tang a sidar sing sang pipite leh tawisang a om tengteng tung ah, Bashan gam a tosaw tengteng tung ah,
23002014	tang lian sang pipite tung ah, tang neu tawisang a om tengteng tung ah,
23002015	insang sang pipite tung ah, kulhbaang tengteng tung ah,
23002016	Tarshish long lian tengteng tung ah, thil lim deihhuai tengteng tung ah leng ahong om ding hi.
23002017	Mihing kideihnate hihniam in a-om ding a, mite kisaktheihna niamsak in a-om ding. Huai ni in Toupa kia tawisang in a-om ding.
23002018	Milimte amang vengveng ding hi.
23002019	Huan lei nak pipi a lingsak ding a athoh hun chiang in, Toupa kihtakhuaina a kipan leh akilawmna thupina a kipan in mite suangpi hawmte leh lei kohawmte ah alut ding uhi.
23002020	Huai ni in mite'n adangka milimte uleh adangka-eng milimte uh, biak ding a abawlsak uh, buite leh bakte kiang ah apai ding uh.
23002021	Lei nak pipi a lingsak ding a athoh hun chiang in, Toupa kihtakhuaina a kipan leh akilawmna thupina a kipan in, suangpi hawmte leh kawl suangpi hawmte ah alut ding uhi.
23002022	Anak vang ua hu om mihing muan tawpsanta un; bang lam ah ahia muantak ahih mahmah uh?
23003001	Ngai dih ua, Toupa Sepaihte' Pathian in Jerusalem a kipan leh Judah a kipan amuanpi uleh achiang uh, amuanpi uh an tengteng leh amuanpi uh tui tengteng, alaksak hi.
23003002	Mihat leh kidousiamte toh; vaihawmmi leh zawlnei leh aisan siam leh upate toh;
23003003	sawmnga heutu leh mizahtakhuai leh lemthei mi leh khutsiam leh thugensiamte toh.
23003004	Huchi in amiliante uh hi ding in naupangte ka pe ding a, naungekte'n atung uah vai ahawm ding uh.
23003005	Huchi in mite nuaisiah in a-om ding ua, michih kinuaisiah in a-om ding uh, michih amau invengte toh kinuaisiah in a-om ding uh; naupang upa tung ah kisatheitak in a-om ding ua, mithulimloupi nangawn mizahtakhuai tung ah kisatheitak in a-om ding.
23003006	Mi'n apa inn a-unau len in, “Nang silh-le-ten na nei a, ka vaihawmtu un om inla, hiai siatna na khut ah om heh,” achih chiang in.
23003007	Huai chiang in amah apau khe ding a, “Kei zaw bawlhoihtu in ka om kei ding hi; ka inn ah nek ding a-om kei a, silh-le-ten leng a-om kei; mite vaihawmpa in na hon bawl kei ding,” chi in.
23003008	Athupina mit vuisak ding a apau uleh athilhihte uh Toupa dou lam ahih ziak in Jerusalem ase khin a, Judahte apuk khinta uhi.
23003009	Amel latdan in amau ahek tawm a; akhelhna uh Sodom bangtak in alangsak ua, a-iim kei uh. Atung uh agik e! Thil hoih lou in akithuk tawm ngal ua.
23003010	Midiktat thu ah ahoih ding uhi, chi un; athilhih gahte uh lah ane sin ngal ua.
23003011	Migiloute tung agik hi! Lah ase sin ngal ua; akhut ua thilhih thukna akiang ua piak ahih ding ziak in.
23003012	Ka mite zaw, amau nuaisiahtute naupangte ahita ua, numeite'n atung uah vai ahawmta uhi. Ka mite aw, nou hon pite'n ahon pikhial ua, na paina lamte ahihse sek uhi.
23003013	Toupa genpih ding in ahong dingkhia a, mite vaihawm ding in ahong dinghta hi.
23003014	Toupa'n a mi upate tung ah leh amau miliante tung ah vai ahawm ding: Toupa Sepaihte' Toupa'n , “Noute na hi uh grephuan negaite; na innte uah ahi mitagahte a kipan a sumlakte a-om;
23003015	bang achia ahia ka mite na at ua, tagahte mai na gawizan uh?” Toupa, Sepaihte' Toupa'n achi hi.
23003016	Huai lou in Toupa'n , “Zion tanute kisatheitak a a-om ua, dak vuauvuau leh mi en loplop in apai ua, apai un apai lohloh ua, akhete uh asuan ging thuapthuap ziak un.
23003017	Toupa'n Zion tanute luzang ah meima khem a-omsak ding a, Toupa'n azahmohte uh leng adawksak ding,” achi hi.
23003018	Huai ni chiang in Toupa'n akizepna hoihnate uh alaksak ding a, khebulhte, len lukhute, hakkolte;
23003019	bilbah kai ngiahngiahte, taute, kikhuhna puante;
23003020	lutang puante, khebulh khainiangte, kawng a tente, gimlim bawmte, kikaunate;
23003021	minsawnna zungbuhte, nakbulhte;
23003022	ankuangluina vante, puanaktualte, puansilhte, kawlzalte;
23003023	limlangte, puanmalngatte, dialte, kituamhoihna puante.
23003024	Thaunamtui sik in thilmuat a-om ding; kawnggak sik in khauzen a-om ding; sam mam sik in talkolh a-om ding; puan kilawmtak sik in sai-ip puan a-om ding; melhoih sik in meikang pawn a-om ding hi.
23003025	Namsau in na mite vatpaih ahi ding ua, na mihat mahmahte kidouna ah apuk ding uh.
23003026	Akulh kongkhakte ah awm kitum in akap ding ua; ahawm a nutsiat ahi ding ua, lei ah atu ding hi.
23004001	Huai ni in numei sagih in pasal khat alen ding ua, “Koumau an ka ne ding ua, koumau silh-le-ten ka silh un ka teng ding uh; na min lel hon pusak in; ka minsia uh hon lakmangsak in,” chi in agen ding uhi.
23004002	Huai ni in Toupa hiang kilawmtak in leh thupitak in a-om ding a, Israelte damlaite a ding in lei a gahte hoihtak leh kilawmtak in a-om ding.
23004003	Huchi in Zion nutsiat a omleh, Jerusalem a omden tuh siangthou chih in a-om ding, michih Jerusalem a dam lai a min gelhte.
23004004	Vaihawmna kha leh katna kha a Toupa'n Zion tanu buahte asawpsiangsak a, asung a kipan Jerusalem sisan asuksiang khit chiang in.
23004005	Huan Toupa'n Zion tang a omna tengteng tung ah leh akikhawmpite tung ah sun in meipi leh meikhu, zan in meikuang vak asiamsak ding; thupina tengteng tung ah banghiam zak a om ding ahi ngal a.
23004006	Sun in nisa liah ding leh huihpi vuahpi lak a kihumbitna leh bukna mun ding in biakbuk ahi ding hi.
23005001	Ka it luat thu, agrephuan tungtang thu, ka it luat a ding in la in ka sata mai ding. Ka it luat in lei hoihna mahmah mual ah grephuan anei hi.
23005002	Akimvel in lei atoukuak a, asuangte atomsiang a, grepgui hoihpen asuan a, alai ah insang alam a, huai ah grep sukna khuk leng atou hi. Huchi in grep gah a gah ding in alamen a, himahleh grep tak lou ahong gah maimah hi.
23005003	Tu in, Jerusalem a omte leh Judah mite aw, “Hehpih in kei leh ka grephuan kal thu hon ngaihtuah dih ve ua.
23005004	Tua grephuan ah ka hihsa akan-aval atung ah hih nawn lailai ding bangbang om ahita mai a? Bangziak in ahia, grep gah a gah ding a ka lamet et toh, grep tak lou ahong gah maimah?
23005005	“Tu in ngai un, ka grephuan tung ah ka hih ding ka hon hilh ding; aling dai ka lamang ding a, nekgaih in a-om ding; asuangdai ka chimsak ding a, sikden in a-om ding.
23005006	Huan ka hihse vek ding a; satnou in om ke'n chin, tohvui in leng om sam ke'n teh; loulingnei leh khaulingneite apou zaw ding; meite leng atung a vuah zusak lou ding in thu ka pe ding,” achi hi.
23005007	Sepaihte' Toupa grephuan Israel inkuanpihte ahi a, Judah mite akung deihhuai ahi uhi. Vaihawmna diktat alamen a; himahleh, ngai in, nuaisiahna ahong om zawta ahi; diktatna alamen a, himahleh, ngai in, kikou husa ahong om zawta hi.
23005008	Gam laizang a amau kia a-omtheihna ding ua mi om samna ding mun himhim om lou khop hial a inn leh inn kizomsak zel leh lou leh lou kizom sakte tung agik hi.
23005009	Sepaihte' Toupa'n ka bil ah hichibang in achi, “Innte tampi, lian pipite kilawm pipi, ateng ding om lou in ahawm vek ngeingei ding.
23005010	Grephuan tin sawm mun ah bath khat kia suak ding in akisa a, buhchi homer khat tuh in ephah khat kia suak ding in lah akisa ngal a,” chi in.
23005011	Zu delh ding a zingkhang pipi a thou a, uain in akhamgawpsak mateng zan sawt pipi tan a-omsakte atung uh agik hi.
23005012	Tumging leh kaihgingte, khuangta leh tamngaite, uain toh ankuangluinate uah a-om sek a, himahleh Toupa nasep angaisang kei ua, akhut thilhihte leng, angaihtuah ngei kei uhi.
23005013	Huaiziak in ka mite zaw, theihna aneih louh ziak un, sal a pi in a-om ua; amizahtakhuaite uh gil akial a, amipite uh dangtak in adang uh akeugawpta hi.
23005014	Huaiziak in Sheol in agilkialna ana liansak a, akam teh vual louh khop in akata a; huchi in athupinate uh, amipite uh, athupina mahmahte un, alak ua kipaktak a omte toh alutsuk ngoingoi uhi.
23005015	Mineute kunsak in a-om ua, miliante niamsak in a-om ua, kisatheite sukniam in a-omta uhi.
23005016	Sepaihte' Toupa bel vaihawmna a tawisang in a-om zawta, Pathian, Mi Siangthou, diktatna a hihsiangthou in a-omta hi.
23005017	Huan belamnoute atatna mun ua ata bang un ata diamdiam ding ua, mithau pipite mun sesa a thilte vakvaite'n ane ding uhi.
23005018	Zuautheihna khaute a thulimlouhna kai a, khauzen a kangtalai kaih bang a khelhna kai sekte tung agik hi!
23005019	I muhna ding in hih meng henla, athilhih ding hihkin heh; i theihna ding in Israelte Mi Siangthou lemtheih hong nai in hong tung hen, chi gigete ngei.
23005020	Thil hoih lou thil hoih chi a, thil hoih lah thil hoih lou chi zel a, vak mial a ngai a, mial vak a ngaisek a, thil khum thil kha a ngai a, thil kha thil khum a ngaisekte atung uh agik hi.
23005021	Amau pil a kingaihtuahte leh amau mitmuh a teite atung uh agik hi!
23005022	Uain dawn lam a mihattak, zu hel lam a thagui nei mite atung uh agik!
23005023	Golh nek ziak a migilou siamtangsak sek a, midiktat diktatna laksak sekte ngei.
23005024	Huaiziak in meikuang in buhpawl aliah bei dundun sek bang in leh loupa keu meikuang a apuk zungzung sek bang in azung ua muatna bang in a-om ding a, apak uh leivui bang in atungkah lunglung ding; Sepaihte' Toupa dan adeih louh ua, Israelte Mi Siangthou thu angaihneu ziak un.
23005025	Huaiziak in Toupa amite tung ah aheh mahmah a, atung uah akhut alik a, avua a, huchi in mualte ah aling vonvon ua, aluangte uh kongzing lak ah nin bulom bang in a-om venvon hi. Huchi tel a ahih in leng ahehna lah adai kei a, akhut alik lailai hi.
23005026	Gamlatak a om namte a ding in chiamtehna atakkhe ding a, kawlmong a kipan sam ding in asingsit ding; huchi in ngai in, amaute kintak in ahong pai pah ding uh.
23005027	Amau lak ah kuamah agim kei ding ua, akisui sam kei ding uh; kuamah alusu kei ding ua, a-ihmu sam kei ding uh; akawnggak uh lah phelkol in a-om kei ding a, akhedap gakna leng atan sam kei ding hi.
23005028	Athalte uh azum mahmah a, athalpeu tengteng uh lai sa in a-om keukou a; asakol chinte uh meisah suang abang a, akangtalai khete uh leng pingpei abang hi.
23005029	Ahusa ging honhon uh humpinelkai humham bang mai ahi. Humpinelkai lun lai humham bang mai in aging honhon hi; ahi, aging honhon a, asamat ding uh aman ua, bittak in apaimangpih ua, kuamah in ahunkhe thei kei hi.
23005030	Huai ni in tuipi ging hawhaw bang in atung uah aging hawhaw ding uh. Huchi in mi'n gam ahon et uleh, ngai in, mial leh mangbatna ngen ahi a, vak lah huai ameite a hihmial in a-om hi.
23006001	Kumpipa Uzziah asih kum in Toupa laltutphah sangtak a tawisan a tu ka mu a, apuansilh mong tual in tempul adimsak vek hi.
23006002	Akiang ah serafte adingh ua; kha guk chiat anei ua, akha nihte un amai uh akhuh ua, nih in akhepekte uh akhuh ua, nih in aleng uhi.
23006003	Huchi in, “Sepaihte' Toupa asiangthou hi, asiangthou hi, asiangthou hi: Leitung pumpi athupina in adim,” chi in akidawngtuah uhi.
23006004	Huchi in akikou husa in kongpi bul suangphum nangawn alingsak dupdup a, meikhu in insung adim hi.
23006005	Huaitak in, ke'n, “Muk nin pumi ka hi a, muk ninpu mite lak a teng ka hih ziak in ka tung gik hi na tel e! Mangthang ka hita ve; ka mit in kumpipa, sepaihte' Toupa , amuta ngal a,” ka chi hi.
23006006	Huchi in serafte lak a khat, maitam a kipan taiteh a teh, mei-am tawi in ka kiang ah ahong leng a, ka kam ahong bi hi.
23006007	“Ngai in, hiai in na muk asukhata, huchi in na thulimlouhna lakmang ahita, na khelhna leng sawpsiang ahita,” achi hi.
23006008	Huan “Kua ka sawl dia, kou a dia kua kuan ding ahia?” chi in Toupa aw ka za hi.
23006009	Huchi in ke'n, “Kei hiai ah ka om, hon sawl ve,” ka chi hi. Ama'n, “Kuan inla, hiai mite va hilh in, bil in zaw za unla, theihsiam bel theisiam kei un; muh zaw mu unla, theih bel thei kei un, chi in.
23006010	Hiai chite lungtang khengsak inla, abil uh ngongsak inla, amitte uh mit sisak in; huchi lou in zaw amit un amu ding ua, abil un aza ding ua, alungtang un athei ding ua, ahong kihei nawn ding ua, damsak in a-om kha ding uh,” achi hi.
23006011	Huan ke'n, “Toupa bang tan ahi dia?” ka chi a. Ama'n ahon dawng a, “Khopite a teng ding bei a suksiat a a-om a, innte a mi bei a a-om a, gam loih sipsip a a-om a,
23006012	Toupa'n mite gamlapi ah asuan a, gamsung a mun paisansa tampi a-om masiah.
23006013	Huan asung ah sawm lak ah khat leng om lai a-omleh nek khit in a-om behlap ding uhi; himahleh nahhi leh tosaw phuk khit nung a abul a om nilouh bang in chi siangthou abulsum a om nilouh ahi,” ka chi hi.
23007001	Huan Uzziah tapa Jotham tapa Ahaz vaihawm lai in hichi ahi a, Siria kumpipa Rezin leh Israel kumpipa Remaliah tapa Pekah Jerusalem sim ding in akuantou ua; himahleh azou kei uhi.
23007002	Siria leh Ephraim apangkhawmta uh chi in David inkuanpihte ahilh ua, huchi in alungtang leh akhua-le-tuite lungtang, gamnuai singte huih in amutling suausuau bang in, hihlin in ahong omta hi.
23007003	Huchi in Toupa'n Isai kiang ah, “Nang leh na tapa Shear-jashub, dil saknungzaw pen tuilakna tawp ah, Puansawpmi gam lamlian ah, Ahaz dawn ding in kuankhia unla;
23007004	akiang ah, pilvang inla om kinken in; meisel sum khu lel nih, Siria toh Rezin leh Remaliah tapa hehna thupitak kihta ke'nla, na lungtang taikek kei hen.
23007005	Siria in, Ephraim leh Remaliah tapa toh nangmah tung a gitlouh asawm tak ziak in, chi in achi hi.
23007006	Judah dou ding in kuantou ni in, va hihlau ni, eimah a ding ngei in i va zou dia, alaitak ah kumpipa in Tabeel tapa i tusak ding,” chi in.
23007007	Toupa Pathian in hichibang in achi, “Athusawm uh apiching kei dia, avuaksuak ding.
23007008	Siria lutang Damaskas ahi a, Damaskas lutang Rezin lah ahi ngal a; kum sawmguk leh kum nga man ma in Ephraim chi chihtak louh a om ding in suksiat vek in a-om ding.
23007009	Huan Ephraim lutang Samaria ahi a, Samaria lutang Remaliah tapa lel ahih ziak in. Na up nop kei uleh hihkip in na om kei hial ding uh, chi in,” achi hi.
23007010	Toupa'n Ahaz ahoupih nawn a,
23007011	“ Toupa na Pathian kiang ah chiamtehna ngen in; thukpi ah hiam, tunglam sangpi ah hiam ngen in,” achi hi.
23007012	Ahaz in bel, “Ka ngen kei ding, Toupa ka ze-et kei ding,” achi hi.
23007013	Huan ama'n, “David inkuanpihte aw, tu in ngaikhe dih ua; mihing hihgim thil neuchik ding in na sep uh maw, ka Pathian nangawn hihgim na ut zel uh?
23007014	Huaiziak in Toupa mahmah in chiamtehna nou ahon pe ding; ngai un, nungak siangthou khat agai ding a, tapa anei ding a, amin ‘Immanuel’ asa ding uh.
23007015	Ama'n thil hoih lou lam deihlouhna dan atheih chiang in leh thil hoih lam deihna dan atheih chiang in bawngnawi dat leh khuaizu ane ding.
23007016	Naupang thil hoih lou lam deihlouhna dan leh thil hoih lam deihna dan atheih ma in leng na lauh kumpipa nihte gam nutsiat in a-om ding,” achi hi.
23007017	“Ephraim in Judah anutsiat ni a kipan tung ngei nai lou nite Toupa'n na tung ah leh na khua-le-tuite tung ah leh na pa inkuanpihte tung leh Assuria kumpipa mahmah tung ah atungsak ding hi.
23007018	“Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n Aigupta luinak a thoute leh Assuria gam a khuai omte singsit in asam ding hi.
23007019	Huchi in ahong pai ding ua, avek un phaizang leh kense lak ah, suangpi hawm ah, loulingnei tengteng leh gantatna mun tengteng ah adim ding uhi.
23007020	“Huai ni chiang in Toupa'n mulmet tem kikhel in, Luipi khen gam a Assuria kumpipa omte zang in, lutang leh khemul ametsiang ding a; khamul leng ametsiang vek ding hi.
23007021	“Huchi in huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, mi khat in bawngla khat leh belam nih kia avul ding.
23007022	Himahleh hichi ahi ding a, nawitui tampi aneih ding ziak un nawituidat anesak ding; gamsung a om lai mi'n nawituidat leh khuaizu ne chiat ding ahi ngal ua.
23007023	“Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, mun chih, grepgui sang, dangka sang man omna peuhmahte loulingnei leh khaulingnei omna lel ahita ding.
23007024	Gam pumpi loulingnei leh khaulingnei ngen ahong hih tak ziak in huai ah thaltang leh thalpeu tawi in apai ding uhi.
23007025	Huchi in mual, tupi a tohsa teng ah, loulingnei leh khaulingnei kihtak ziak in na hong pai kei ding a, bawngtalte tatsakna leh belam gamtatna mun ding lel ahita ding hi,” achi hi.
23008001	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Laigelhna pek lianpi la inla, mihing laigelhna in atung ah Mahershalalhashbaz a ding, chi in gelh in.
23008002	Huchi in theipih muanhuai, siampu Uriah leh Jaberekiah tapa Zekariah theihpihpa ding in ka bawl ding,” achi hi.
23008003	Huan zawlneinu kiang ah ka hoh a, huchi in ama'n nau apai a, tapa aneita hi. Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Amin in Mahershalalhashbaz sa in.
23008004	Naupang in, Nu, Pa, chihna dan atheih ma in leng Damaskas hauhsakna leh Samaria a gallak tengteng Assuria kumpipa ma ah apaimangpih ding uh,” achi hi.
23008005	Toupa'n ka kiang ah agen nawn a,
23008006	“Hiai chite'n Shiloah tui awl a luang diahdiah adeih louh ziak un leh Rezin leh Remaliah tapa tung a akipah un,
23008007	huaiziak in tu in, ngai in, Toupa'n luipi tui, khauh mahmah leh tam mahmah, Assuria kumpipa leh athupina tengteng, atung uah aluangsak ding; huchi in apiau tengteng a hong let zoizoi in, agei tengteng ah leng alet zoizoi ding;
23008008	huchi in Judah gam tuam in aluang ding a; ngawng tan atum pha hial ding a; akha zak in, Immanuel aw, na gam vailam tengteng akhak vek ding hi.
23008009	Chichihte aw, buai vengvungta unla, kitamzak a om ding na hi uhi; gam gamlapi a mi tengteng aw, bildoh un; kigalthuam un, kitamzak a om ding na hi uhi; kigalthuam un, kitamzak a om ding na hi uhi.
23008010	Thu kikum unla, bangmah hi peuh ke'n teh; thu gen unla, piching peuh ke'n teh; Pathian i kiang ah a-om ngal a,” chi in.
23008011	Toupa'n khut hattak in huchi in ka kiang ah agen, hiai chite lampi a ka pailouhna ding in hon thuzoh ei ve;
23008012	Hiai chite'n, “Sawm anei uh, achih teng uh, Sawm anei uh, chihpih kei un, akihtak teng uh zong nou zaw kihta kei unla, lau leng laupih sam kei un.
23008013	Sepaihte' Toupa , amah mah na hihsiangthou ding uhi; amah na kihtak uh hi henla, amah na lauh uh hi hen.
23008014	Huan amah mun siangthou a ding ahi ding a; Israel inkuanpih nihte a ding in bel pukna suang leh dalna suangpi ahi zaw ding a, Jerusalem a omte a ding in thang leh pial ahi lai ding hi.
23008015	Huchi in mi tampi in huai asui ding ua apuk ding uh, kitapsak in a-om ding ua, a-awk ding ua, mat in a-om ding uh,” chi in.
23008016	Theihsakna thu zial gak inla, dan thu ka sinsakte lak ah bilh in.
23008017	Huan ke'n Jakob inkuanpihte lak a amai selpa Toupa ka ngak ding a, amah ka en nilouh ding.
23008018	Ngai in, kei leh Toupa hon piak naupangte, Israelte lak ah sepaihte' Toupa Zion tang a om lak a chiamtehna a dingte leh thillamdang a dingte i hi uhi.
23008019	Huan mi'n, “Dawi aisan siam zawl leh bumsiam ham tualtual leh phun nomnomte dong in, ahon chih chiang un huchi in dawng un; Mi'n a Pathian uh adot zawk ding uh hilou hia? Mihingte a ding in misi adong ding ua hia?”
23008020	“Dan thu leh theihsakna thu dot ding ahi,” chi in. Huai thu bangbang a agen kei uleh amaute a ding in khua himhim avak zok kei ding hi.
23008021	Lungkhamtak leh gilkial kawm in gam atuansuak ding ua; hichi ahi ding a, agil uh akial chiang in aheh mahmah ding ua, akumpipa uleh a Pathian uh ahamsiat ding ua, van lam anga ding uhi.
23008022	Huchi in lei lam a-en ding ua, ngai in, lungkhamna leh mialna, lunglauna nguina ahi ding; huchi in mial bikbek ah delhmang in a-om ding uh.
23009001	Himahleh lunglau a om khinnu a ding in nguina himhim a-omta kei ding. Nidanglai in Zebulun gam leh Naphtali gam simmohhuai in a-omsak a, himahleh hun nanung ah zaw thupitak in a-omsakta, tuipi gei, Jordan gal ah, namte' Galili mah.
23009002	Mi mial nuai a vakte'n vak thupitak amuta ua; sihna lim gam a omte tung mahmah ah vak ahong vakta hi.
23009003	Nam na pungsakta a, anopsakna uh na khangsakta hi; buhlak lai a nuamsa bang in na ma ah nuam asata ua, min gallak sum ahawm ua nuam asak bang mai un.
23009004	Apuakgik puakna hakkol leh aliangzang a zawnna zawl, amah nuaisiahte khetbuk mah, Midiante zoh ni bang in na suktansakta ngal a.
23009005	Chiak vengvung a mi galthuam a akithuamna tengteng uleh puansilh sisan toh kidiah niaunuau tengteng, hal a, mei a khul ding phet ahi ngal a.
23009006	Ei ding in naupang ahong piang a, tapa piak in i omta; vaihawmna aliangzang ah atuang ding a; amin Lamdang, Lemthei, Pathian Hat, Tangtawn Pa, Lemna Lal lah achi sin ngal ua.
23009007	David tutphah tung ah leh agam tung ah avaihawmna khandan leh lemna in tawp ni anei kei ding, hihkip ding leh tua kipan a tangtawn tan a leng vaihawmna leh diktatna tungding ding in, Sepaihte' Toupa phatuamngaihna in huaite ahih ding.
23009008	Toupa'n Jakobte gam ah thu akhak a, Israelte tung ah aketa.
23009009	Huchi in mi tengteng, Ephraimte leh Samaria a om, kisatheitak leh lungsim a ki-uangsak;
23009010	tekleite chim mahleh, suang tak sek in i lemna ding; theipi singte sattan in om mahleh, sidar singte in i kheng ding, chite'n athei ding uh.
23009011	Huaiziak in Toupa'n Rezin dou mite amah dou ding in atawisang ding a;
23009012	amelma, suahlam a Siriate, tumlam a Philistiate, atokthou ding; huchi in kam ka in Israelte ane khin ding uh. Huchi hial ahih in leng ahehna adai kei a, akhut alik lailai hi.
23009013	Himahleh mite'n amaute vopa lam anga tuan kei ua, Sepaihte' Toupa lah azong tuan kei uhi.
23009014	Huaiziak in Toupa'n Israelte a kipan in alutang leh amei, tum hiang leh pumpeng ni khat thu in abantan ding.
23009015	Upa leh mizahtakhuaite, alutang ahi ua; zuauthu sinsak zawlneite, amei ahi uh.
23009016	Hiai mipite'n apikhial nak uhi, apite uh hihmanthat in a-om nak uhi.
23009017	Huaiziak in Toupa'n atangvalte uh tung ah akipak kei ding a, atagahte uleh ameithaite uh leng azahngai sam kei ding ua; avek un Pathian zahloumi leh thil hoih lou hih mite ahi chiat ua, akam un thugina lou agen uhi. Hichi ahih nung in leng, ahehna adai kei a, akhut alik lailai hi.
23009018	Gitlouhna lah mei bang in akuang luahluah a, loulingnei leh khaulingneite akangmang ahi, gammang nong lak akang luahluah a, akhutou ngoingoi hi.
23009019	Sepaihte' Toupa heh ziak in gam akangsia a, mite leng mei a khul ding sing bang ahi ua; kuamah in amau unau leng ahawi kei uhi.
23009020	Huchi in mi'n ataklam ua mi asuh ding ua, himahleh atai tuan kei ding uh; michih in amau bansa ane chiat ding uh.
23009021	Manassehte'n Ephraimte ane ding ua, Ephraimte'n Manassehte ane ding ua; anih un Judahte adoukhawm ding uhi. Huchi lawmlawm a ahih in leng, ahehna lah adai kei a, akhut alik lailai hi.
23010001	Hoih loutak a thupukna bawlte leh dikloutak a gelh mite tung agik hi!
23010002	Meithaite tan ding gallak a laksak a-omtheihna ding uleh, pa neiloute thil laksak bang a abawltheihna ding un, nei zouloute vaihawmna diktat tangsak lou ding leh ka mite lak a gentheite muh ding mawngmawng laksak tumte!
23010003	Huchi in gawtna ni ahong tun chiang leh gamlapi a kipan huihpi ahong tun chiang in, bang na hih ding ua oi? Panpihna ngen ding in kua kiang ah na taita ding ua? Na thupina uh koi ah na nuseta ding ua?
23010004	Hentate lak ah akun ding ua, thahte lak ah apuk ding uh, hiaite lel atan uh ahita ding hi. Huchi ahih in leng ahehna adai tuan kei a, akhut alik lailai hi.
23010005	Toupa'n “Kisa in, Assuria mi, ka hehna khetbuk, ka lungkimlouhna chiangkhun tawi!
23010006	Gallak la ding leh thil laksak la ding leh kongzing buannawi bang a ngap ding in amah zaw Pathian zah lou nam dou ding in ka sawl ding a, ka hehna mite sual ding in thu ka pe ding hi,” achi hi.
23010007	Himahleh ama'n huchibang a tup ahi kei a, huchibang zaw alungsim in leng angaihtuah sam kei; nam tam petmah a tam hihsiat leh hihmanthat ahi, lungsim a aneih zawk.
23010008	“Ka miliante tengteng kumpipa ahi vek kei ua hia?
23010009	Kalno khua Karkhemish khua bang hita lou ahi maw? Hamath khua Arpad khua bang hita lou ahi maw? Samaria khua Damaskas khua bang hita lou ahi maw?
23010010	Ka khut in milimte gam, Jerusalem khua leh Samaria khuate sang a milim bawltawm hoihzaw neite leng, azongkheta uhi.
23010011	Samaria leh amilimte tung a ka hihtak bang in Jerusalem leh amilimte tung ah ka hih kei dia hia?”
23010012	Huchi ahih ziak in hichi ahi ding a, “Toupa'n Zion tang leh Jerusalem khosung a anasep ding tengteng asep khit hun chiang in Assuria kumpipa lungsim ki-otsakna gah leh amit kisathei thupina ka gawt ding,” achi hi.
23010013	Ama'n, “Ka khut hatna in ka hihta hi, ka pilna toh in; ka kizen ngal a; chi chih gamgite lah ka suan a, avaihawmna uh lah ka sut a, laltutphah a tute mihangsan hih bang in ka kaikhia hi.
23010014	Ka khut in chi chih hauhsaknate lah vasabu bang in azongkhia a; mi'n vasa tui api loihsansa ala uh bang in leitung pumpi ka la khin vekta hi; khazap hiam, kam ka hiam ham himhim leng a-om kei uhi,” achi vial ngal a.
23010015	Heipi in thil ehna ding a azangmi akisaktheihsan dia hia? Sing-atna in atmi anuaisiah dia hia? Khetbuk in adom mite alik zosop diam aw, chiangkhun in sing hilou alik zomah bang phet ahi.
23010016	Huaiziak in Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n , “Ami thaute lak ah gawnna asawl ding a; athupina nuai ah meikuang lai lel bang in mei toh in a-om ding.
23010017	Huan Israelte vakna mei ahong hi ding a, amaute Mi Siangthou mah leng meikuang ahi ding; huai in ni khat thu in louling neite leh khaulingneite kangsak in ahihmangthang ding.
23010018	Agammang leh alei hoih mun thupina leng, kha leh sa nangawn in, ahihmang ding; huchi in chiamtehna tawi pen kia hun lai bang ahi ding.
23010019	Agammang a sing om zek laite naupang gelh tham phet a tawm ahita ding,” achi hi.
23010020	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Israelte khosuaksunte leh Jakob inkuanpihte lak a khosuaksunte'n amaute thatpa ah akinga nawnta kei ding ua; Toupa Israelte Mi Siangthou, chihtaktak in amuangzawta ding uhi.
23010021	Akhosuaksunte, Jakob khosuaksunte, Pathian hattak kiang ah akik nawn ding uh.
23010022	Na mi Israelte tuipi piaunel zah himah le uh, akhosuaksunte kia akik nawn ding uhi; diktatna luanletna suksiatna tung ding avaihawm puk ahi.
23010023	Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa , tawpna, tawpna tung ngei ding a vaihawm puk, gam tengteng laizang ah abawl ding hi.
23010024	Huaiziak in Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Zion a om ka mite aw, Aigupta gam a ahih bang un khetbuk a nou hon vua in achiangkhun na tung uah lik mahleh, Assuria mi kihta kei un.
23010025	Sawt louchik nung in ka lungkimlouhna ahong bei dia, ka hehna leng amaute hihmanthatna ding in hei in a-omta ding hi.
23010026	Oreb suangpi a Midiante athah lai bang un sepaihte' Toupa'n amah sual ding in zepna apei ding a; achiang lah tuipi tunglam ah a-om ding a Aigupta gam a apei bang in apei ding hi.
23010027	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, puakgik na liangzang a kipan lakmang in a-om ding a, ahakkol leng na ngawng a kipan lakmang in a-om lai ding hi; thaunilh ziak in hakkol hihsiat in a-omta ding,” chi in.
23010028	Rimmon a kipan Aiath khua atungta, Migron ah apaisuakta; Mikmash ah avan akoihta hi.
23010029	Guam ah atumta uh; Geba ah agiakta uh; Ramah khuate alingling ua; Saul, Gibeah khote ataimangta uh.
23010030	Gallim tanu aw! Na aw in ngaihtak in kikou in; Laish a khua aw! Ngaikhia in; Anathoth aw, hehpihhuai na lawmlawm chia!
23010031	Madmenah khote taimang in a-omta uh; Gebim a omte taimang tum in akidelh ding uhi.
23010032	Tuni mah in Nob ah ataam dia; Zion tanu tang, Jerusalem mual pawng akhut asinkhum hi.
23010033	Ngai dih, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n , thil mulkimhuaitak in ahiangte asatkhe ding a, sang pipite phuk in a-om ding a, adawktuamte leng gawiniam in a-om ding hi.
23010034	Sik in gamnuai sing sahte aphuk ding a, Lebanon sidar singte mithupi puk in apuk zuazua ding uhi.
23011001	Jesse bul a kipan in selnou ahong pawt ding a, azungte a kipan in ahiang hong khangkhe ding hi.
23011002	Huan Toupa kha pilna leh theihtheihna kha, lemtheihna leh hatna kha theihna leh Toupa launa kha atung ah atu ding hi.
23011003	Huchi in akipahna uh Toupa launa ah ahi ding. Amit a amuh bang in vai ahawm kei ding a, abil a azak bang in leng ataihilh sam kei ding hi.
23011004	Diktattak in gentheite vai ahawmsak zaw ding a, lei a mi thunuailutte a ding in khentuam nei lou in ataihilhsak lai ding hi; akam a khetbuk in lei akhen ding a, amuk a hu in migilou-saloute athat ding.
23011005	Diktatna akawnggak ahi ding a, ginomna ataigakna ahi ding hi.
23011006	Huchi in ngia leh belamnou a-omkhawm ding ua, kelnou toh gialbem abokkhawm ding uh, bawngnou leh humpinelkai tuailai leh gan vak thaute a-omkhawm ding ua; naupangnou in api zungzung ding hi.
23011007	Bawng leh vompi agamtakhawm ding ua; anoute uh abokkhawm tiptep ding uhi; huan humpinelkai in bawngtal bang in buhpawl ane ding hi.
23011008	Nau nawitui ne lai thangtom ko gei ah a-om hiathiat ding a, nau nawitui nek tawpsa in guldekpak ko gei ah akhut anga ding.
23011009	Ka tang siangthou ah kihihnat a-omta kei ding a, kihihsiat leng a-om nawn kei ding, tuipite tui a adim gige bang in, Toupa theihna in leitung adim ding hi.
23011010	Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Jesse zung michih chiamtehna ding in a-om ding a, amah mahmah namte'n adong ding ua, akhawlna mun athupi ding hi.
23011011	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n asi val khosuaksun amite, Assuria gam a kipan, Aigupta gam a kipan, Pathros gam a kipan, Kush gam a kipan, Elam gam a kipan, Shinar gam a kipan leh Hamath a kipan leh tuipi tuikulh gam a kipan, ala nawn ding a, anihveina ding in akhut azak nawn ding hi.
23011012	Huchi in namte a ding in chiamtehna atakkhe ding a, Israel delhkhiakte apikhawm ding a, Judah dalhte kawlmong li a kipan apikhawm ding.
23011013	Huchi in Ephraimte hazatna abeita ding a, Judahte hihbuai mite hihmanthat in a-omta ding uh; Ephraimte'n Judahte ahaza nawnta kei ding ua, Judahte'n leng Ephraimte ahihbuai nawn kei ding uh.
23011014	Huchi in amaute tumlam ah Philistiate liangzang ah lengsuk in ava tuang ding ua; suahlam mite alokkhawm ding uh; Edom leh Moabte tung ah akhut uh akha ding ua, Ammon suante'n athu uh amangta ding uh.
23011015	Toupa'n Aigupta Tuipi lei ahihse vek ding a, Luipi leng ahuih sa huthut in akhut asinkhum ding a, luita sagihte a bawl hial in avo ding a, mite khepek leng kawt lou in apai galkah ding.
23011016	Huchi in Aigupta gam a kipan apaitouh ni ua Israelte a ding a lamlian ahong om bang in, akhosuaksun amite a ding in Assuria gam a kipan in lamlian ahong om ding hi.
23012001	Huai ni chiang in hichibang in na chi ding hi, “ Toupa aw, kipahthu ka hon hilh hi; ka tung ah na hehta mah lechin, na hehna lah adaita, na hon khamuan hi.
23012002	Ngai in, Pathian hon hondampa ahi a; ka gingta ding a, lau in ka om kei ding; Toupa Jehovah ka hatna leh ka la ahi, hon hondampa ahi,” chi in.
23012003	Huaiziak in hotdamna tuikhuk a pan nuam in tui na tawi ding uh.
23012004	Huai ni in huchi in na chi ding hi. “ Toupa kiang ah kipahthu hilh unla, amin lou un, athilhihte michih lak ah theisak unla, amin pahtawi in a-om chih gen un.
23012005	Toupa pahtawi in la sa un; ama'n thil hoihpente ahihta hi; huai leitung ah theih in om hen.
23012006	Zion a omte aw, ngaihtak in kikou unla, kikou vengvung un, Israelte Mi Siangthou na lak ua om lah athupi ngal a,” chi in.
23013001	Babulon kho puakgik Amoz tapa Isai in amuh thu.
23013002	Miliante kongpite a aluttheihna ding un tang sang mai velvul ah chiamtehna takkhia unla, ngaihtak in amau sam unla, khut in hihdan ding hilh un.
23013003	Kei mahmah in ka misehte thu ka peta, ahi, ka mihattak, ka mi kinuamsakte, ka hehna tangtungsak ding in ka samta hi.
23013004	Tang a mipi husa, mipi atam a tam husa bang mahmah! Namte' lalgam a mi omkhawmte chiak vengvung husa! Sepaihte' Toupa'n galsual ding a sepaihte kaikhawm ei ve.
23013005	Amaute, Toupa leh alungkimlouhna vanzat, gam gamlapi a kipan, kawlmong tawpna mahmah a kipan in gam tengteng hihse ding in ahong pai uhi.
23013006	Mau tuaituai un, Toupa ni anaita hi. Bangkim hihthei a kipan siatna ahong tung bang in ahong tung ding hi.
23013007	Huaiziak in khut tengteng ahat kei ding a, mihing lungtang chiteng leng azulmang ding.
23013008	Huchi in alau ding ua; damlouhna leh lungkimlouhnate'n amaute aman ding a; numei nauvei bang mai in achi uh ana ding; lamdang kisatuah in a-om chiat ding uh; amelte uh meikuang mel bang ahi ding.
23013009	Ngai in, gam hihse ding leh huai lai a mikhialte asung a kipan a hihmangthang ding in Toupa ni thupitak, thangpaihna leh hehna thupitak toh, ahong tung ding hi.
23013010	Van aksite leh aksi munkipte un avakna uh asuaksak kei ding ua; ni lah asuah lai in mialsak in a-om ding a, kha in leng avakna avaksak kei ding hi.
23013011	Huan khovel agitlouhna ziak in ka gawt ding a, migilou-saloute athulimlouhna ziak un ka gawt sam ding. Mikisathei paukhauh lah ka tawpsak ding a, mikihtakhuai kisaktheihna ka niamsak lai ding hi.
23013012	Mi dangka-eng siangthou sang a leng manphazaw in ka bawl ding a, mihing mahmah lah Ophir dangka-eng siangthou sang a leng manphazaw in ka bawl ding.
23013013	Huchi in tung a van ka kisingsak ding a, sepaihte' Toupa hehna ziak in, ahehna ni thupitak ni in, lei leng a-omna mun kisuan tham in linsak in a-om ding.
23013014	Huan hichi ahi ding a, sakhi delh ek bang leh belam kuamah hawlkhawm louh bang in michih amau chipihte lam chiat anga ding ua, michih amau gam lam chiat ah ataimang ding uh.
23013015	Muh a om peuhmah dawt pailet in a-om ding a, huan, mat a om peuhmah namsau a satpaih in a-om ding.
23013016	Anaungekte uh leng amitmuh un zan dimdem khop a leitual satna a zat in a-om ding uh; a-innte uh loh in a-om dia, azite uh leng mawksual in a-om ding uh.
23013017	Ngai in, Mediate amau sual ding in ka tokthou ding a, huaite'n dangka alimsak kei ding ua, dangka-eng leng akipahpih sam kei ding uh.
23013018	Athalpeute un tangvalte azansak ding a; gil a gahte hehpihna himhim anei kei ding uh; amit un naupangte ahawi kei ding uh.
23013019	Huan Babilon, gam chih thupina, Kaldaite kisaktheihpih thil hoihtak, Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah asukman lai bang in a-om ding uh.
23013020	Chik mah chiang in leng huai ah mi a-om nawnta kei ding uh, suan om lai siah in leng asung a om a-om sam kei ding. Arab mite'n huai ah apuaninte uh akai kei ding ua; belamchingte'n huai ah abelamhonte uh akualsak kei ding uh.
23013021	Gamdai a gamsate huai ah a-om ding ua; a-innte uh simbute inn in adim ding a; vasa ngawngsaute huai ah ateng ding ua, sathakte huai ah amawl leklek ding uhi.
23013022	A-insangte uah ngiate aham ding ua, sihalte leng a-inpi nuam mahmahte uah aham ding uh; huan, agawt hun ding atung dekta a, anite leng suksau in a-om kei ding hi.
23014001	“ Toupa'n Jakobte tung ah zahngaihna anei ding a, Israelte tel in amau gam ngeingei ah a-omsak ding hi; huan, gamdang mite'n amau azui ding ua, Jakob inkuanpihte alenkip ding uhi.
23014002	Huchi in michih in amau api ding ua, amun ding uh atun ding uhi; huchi in Israel inkuanpihte'n Toupa gam ah amau salpa leh salnu in anei ding ua; amau sal a nei mite sal in ahon man ding ua; amaute simmohte tung ah vai ahon hawm ding uhi.
23014003	“Huan na lungkhamna a kipan, na buaina a kipan leh nasep haksa pipi ahon sepsakna ua kipan in Toupa'n nang ahon khawlsak ni chiang in hichi ahi ding hi.
23014004	Hiai pau-el thu Babulon kumpipa kikoukhum in na gen ding. Bangchidan ahia, simmoh hatpa daita na e! Bangchidan ahia, dangka-eng khopi daita na tel e!
23014005	Toupa'n migilou-salou chiangkhun ahihtanta, vaihawmte lalchiang.
23014006	Michih heh kawm a vo zialzial zel, thangpai kawm a kuamah kham ngei louh sawina a namte vai hawmsak zel.
23014007	Lei pumpi akhawl a, adai vungvung a; thakhat in la asakhe guih uh.
23014008	Ahi, na tungthu ziak in meilahte anuam ua, Lebanon tang a sidar singte toh. Hihniam a na om nungsiah phukpaitu ding himhim ka kiang uah ahong tou ngei nawn kei uh,” chi in.
23014009	“Nuailam a kipan Sheol nang hon dawn ding in, nangmah ziak in abuai lutlut hi; misi, lei a makai tengteng nangmah ziak in atokthou a; namte kumpipa tengteng alaltutphah ua kipan akaidinghta hi.
23014010	Huai tengteng in nangmah bia in, na kiang ah huchi in agen ding uh. Nang leng kou bang a hat lou na hita maw?
23014011	Na thupi mahmahna Sheol a pikhiaksuk ahita, na kaihging lunglungte toh; tangtel na nuai ah aphah ua, than in nang ahon khuhta uhi,” chi in.
23014012	“Sun Aksi aw, Zingsang lam tapa, bangchidan ahia van a kipan na kiak tak maimah! Namte hihpukpa, bangchidan ahia lei a satkhiaksuk a na om maimah!
23014013	Na lungtang in, van ah ka kah ding a, Pathian aksite tunglam ah ka laltutphah ka tawisang ding; huan, kikhopna tang, mal tawp a om ah, ka tu ding a;
23014014	meipi sang a sang ah ka kah ding a; Tungnungpen bang mai in ka om ding, na chi nak vial a.
23014015	Himahleh, Sheol ah, kokhuk tawp ah, pikhiaksuk a om ding na hi ngal a.

23015001	Moab gam puakgik. Zan khat thu in Moab gam a Ar khua suksiat in a-om a, bangmah lou a bawl in a-omta hi; zan khat thu in Moab gam a Kir khua suksiat in a-om a, bangmah lou a bawl in a-omta hi.
23015002	Dibon tanu, mun sangte a kap ding in ahohtouta a; Moabte'n Nebo leh Medeba akahkhum ua, alu tengteng uh agiau vek a, akhamul teng uh leng met in a-om vek hi.
23015003	Akongzingte uah sai-ip puan ateng ua; a-intungte uah leh akholak uah michih nakpi in amau tuaituai uhi.

23017001	Damaskas kho puakgik. Ngai in, Damaskas khopi hi nawn lou ding a lakmang ahita, huchi in inn chimsia koihkhawm lel ahita ding hi.

23022012	Huai ni in Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n , kap ding leh awm kitum ding leh lu giausak ding leh sai-ip puan teng ding in asam a;
23022013	himahleh, ngai in, nopna leh kipahnate, bawng thahna leh belam thahnate, sa nekna leh uain dawnnate a-om zawta a, ne ni, dawn ni, zingchiang a si ding i hi ngal ua, achi uhi.
23022014	Huchi in sepaihte' Toupa tuh ka bil ah akilak a, “Pel lou in hiai khelhna na sih masiah uh na lak uah silsiang ahita kei ding, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi,” chi in.
23022015	Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n , hichi in achi, “Kuan inla, hiai sumkempa kiang ah, Shebna, inn tung a heutu a om kiang ngeingei ah, hoh in.
23022016	Akiang ah huchi in gen in: Hiai a bang hih na hia? Hiai ah kua na nei a, hiai a han na khuak vial? Amah a ding in sangpi a ahan akhuak a, amah a dia suangpi a omna abawl vial!
23022017	Ngai in, Toupa'n nang apaih in ahon pai ek ding, mihat in apaih bang in; ahi, atun in nang ahon tun ding hi.
23022018	Pel lou in ama'n nang lum bang in ahon pei ding a, gam zapi ah ahon vawklut ding a; huai ah na si ding a, huai lai mah ah, nang, na pu insung zahlaksakpa, na thupina kangtalaite a-om ding hi.
23022019	Na nasepna a kipan ka hon delhkhe ding a, ama'n heutu na hihna a kipan ahon kaikhesuk ding hi.
23022020	“Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, ka sikha Eliakim, Hilkiah tapa ka sam ding a; amah na puanaktual ka silhsak ding a,
23022021	na kawnggak in ka hihhat ding a na vaihawmna amah khut ah ka kemsak ding. Huchi in Jerusalem a omte a ding in leh Judah inkuanpihte a ding in pa ahi ding.
23022022	Huan David inkuanpihte chabi aliangzang ah ka koih ding a; ama'n ahong ding a, kuamah in akhak kei ding uh; akhak ding a kuamah in ahong kei ding uh.
23022023	Amah kilhna mun kiptak a akilh ngiungeu bang un, ka hihkip ngiungeu ding a; huchi in amah apa inkuanpihte a ding in laltutphah thupi mahmah ahi ding hi.
23022024	“Amah ah apa inkuanpihte thupina tengteng abang vek ding ua, atate leh asuante, tui-um belsuan neu chiteng, belhbu tui-um belsuan a kipan tui koihna tui-um belsuan tengteng tan in.
23022025	Huai ni in kilhna, mun kiptak a kilh ngiungeu a om in anangzou kei ding a; satkhiak a om in, aketa ding a, atung a thil gik om lah hihmanthat in a-omta ding a; Toupa'n huai lah agenta ngal a, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi,” chi in.
23023001	Tura kho puakgik. Tarshish longpite aw, mau tuaituai un; innte om lou khop leh lutna ding om lou khop a hihsiat in a-omta hi; huai lah Kittim gam a kipan in akiang uah hihlat in a-om hi.
23023002	Tuikulh a omte aw, dai sipsip un; Sidon kho sumsin tuipi a paite'n ahon kiningchinsak uh.
23023003	Shihor a pan buhchi tuipite tung ah hon pua a, Nile lui a buh, apunna hi a, namte sumsinna mun ahi hi.
23023004	Sidon aw, zum in; tuipi kulhpi in thu agenta ngal a, “Nau ka vei ngei kei a, ka nei ngei sam kei, tangval lah ka vak ngei sam kei a, nungak leng ka khangliansak ngei sam kei hi,” chi in.
23023005	Thuthang Aigupta gam atun hun chiang in Tura thuthang anak vei mahmah ding uhi.
23023006	Tarshish ah va hoh unla; Tuikulh a omte aw, mau tuaituai un.
23023007	Hiai maw na kho kipak uh, upat a upa, akhe in gamlapi a om ding a api sek?
23023008	Lallukhu khusaktu khua Tura tung ah kua'n ahia hiai tung ding a sep? Huai lai a sumsin mite lah miliante ahi ua, huai lai a sumsin mite lah lei a mizahtakhuaite ahi uhi.
23023009	Sepaihte' Toupa'n , thupina tengteng kisaktheihna nawngkaisak ding leh lei a mizahtakhuai tengteng muhsithuai a omsak ding in asep hi.
23023010	Tarshish tanu aw, Nile lui bang in na gam ah luanglet in; na kawnggakna himhim lah a-omta kei hi.
23023011	Tuipi tung ah akhut azak a, gamte alingsak a; Toupa'n Kanaan gam tungtang ah thu apia a, akulhte hihse ding in.
23023012	Ama'n, “Sidon tanu nungak aw, mi nuaisiah, nuam na sa nawn kei ding; thou inla, Kittim gam ah galkah in; huai ah leng khawlna himhim na mu tuan kei ding hi,” achi hi.
23023013	En in, Kaldaite gam; hiai mite a-omta kei uh; Assuria mi in gamdai a gamsate a ding in asepta hi; a-insangte uh alam ua, huai a inpite ahihmang ua, inn sia in abawlta.
23023014	Tarshish longpite aw, mau tuaituai un; na kulhte uh hihsiat in a-omta hi.
23023015	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Tura khua, kumpipa khat kum sim a, kum sawmsagih sung mangngilh in a-om ding; kum sawmsagih abei nung in kizuak la a agen bang un Tura kho tung ah ahong tung ding.
23023016	Nang kizuak mite mangngilhsa nung, kaihging la inla, kho kim ah vak in, kaihging kai inla, theih a na om nawn theihna ding in la tampi sa in.
23023017	Huan kum sawmsagih abei nung in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n Tura apha ding a, huchi in huai minu aloh delh in a-om nawn ding a, leitung a khovel lalgam tengteng lak ah kizuak in a-om ding.
23023018	Asum muhkhiak leh aloh Toupa a ding in siangthou ahi ding; huai lah kholkhawm in hiam, koihkhawm in hiam a-om kei ding a, asum muhkhiak Toupa ma a omte a ding in ahi ding a, niang-le-tai a anek ding uleh, puansilh thupitak aneihtheihna ding uh ahi.
23024001	Ngai in, Toupa'n lei a-awngsak in asesak ding a, alumlet ding a, a-omte adalhsak ding hi.
23024002	Huan vantang tung a om bang in siampu tung ah leng a-om ding; sikhapa tung a om bang in apu tung ah leng a-om ding; sikhanu tung a om bang in api tung ah leng a-om ding; aleimi tung a om bang in, akhawngmi tung ah leng a-om ding; leitawisakmi tung a om bang in, leitawimi tung ah leng a-om ding; apung delh a leitawisakmi tung a om bang in, akiang a apung pemi tung ah leng a-om ding.
23024003	Leitung awnsak keuhkeuh in leh hihsiat dimdem in a-om ding; Toupa'n achita hi.
23024004	Leitung akap in atul a, khovel abah in atul a, leitung a mi tungnungte abah uhi.
23024005	A-om mite nuai ah leitung abuah khinta; dante ah atalek ua, thupiakte hihlamdang a, tangtawn thukhun a atatlek ziak un.
23024006	Huaiziak in hamsiat in leitung ane khin a, a-om mite lah siam louh tansak in a-omta uh; huaiziak in lei a om mite lah akanglum ua, mi tawmchik kia a-om lai uh.
23024007	Uain thak akap a, grepgui abah a, lungtang nuamte tengteng amau uhi.
23024008	Khuangtate kipahna adai a, kaihging nuamsa ging adaita.
23024009	Lasa kawm in uain adawn kei ding uh; adawn mite a ding in zu akha mahmah ding.
23024010	Buaina khopi chipsak in a-omta; kuamah alutlouhna ding un inn chih khak in a-omta.
23024011	Uain ziak in kongzingte ah kah husa a-om a; nopna tengteng mialsak in a-om a, hiai gam nopna amangta.
23024012	Khopi ah siatna nutsiat in a-om a, akulh kongkhak vuaksiat in a-omta.
23024013	Lei laitak ah michih lak ah huchi in a-om ding hi, olive sing vuak nung a gah a-om lai bang in leh grep loh nung a maih khak grep loh ding a-om lai bang in.
23024014	Huaite'n a-aw uh asuah ding ua, akikou ding uh; Toupa thupina ziak in tuipi a kipan in ngaihtak in akikou ding uh.
23024015	Huaiziak in Toupa tuh Suahlam ah pahtawi un. Toupa , Israel' Pathian min mahmah, tuipi tuikulh gamte ah pahtawi un.
23024016	Kawlmong tawp a lasak i za, Midiktatte kiang ah thupina om hen, chih la. Himahleh, ke'n bel, “Ka gawng huaihuai a, ka gawng huaihuai a, ka tung agik hi! Lepchiahtak a gamta mite'n lepchiahtak in thil ahih ua; ahi, lepchiahtak a gamta mite'n lepchiahtak in ahih uhi, ka chi hi.
23024017	Leitung a tengte aw, lauhuainate, kokhukte, thangte na tung ah a-om hi.
23024018	Huchi in hichi ahi ding a, lauhuai husa a kipan a taipa kokhuk ah ake ding a; kokhuk sung a kipan a pawtkhetoumi thang ah a-awk ding; tunglam a tohlette lah hon in a-om ngal a, lei kingaknate aling hi.
23024019	Leitung akitamgawp vek a, leitung hihman in a-om vek a, nakpitak in leitung aling hi.
23024020	Mi zukham bang in leitung ahoi dongdong ding a, biakbuk hawt bang in akihot ding; atatlekna lah atung ah giktak in a-om ding a, huchi in apuk ding a, athounawnta kei ding hi.
23024021	“Huan huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n tunglam a mi tungnung pawl lian pipite a gawt ding, leitung a leitung kumpipate toh.
23024022	Hentate kokhuk a pikhawm a a-om bang un huaite pikhawm in a-om ding ua, suangkul a khum in a-om ding uh, ni sawttak nung in gawt in a-om ding uh.
23024023	Huai hun chiang in tung a khapi zumtak in a-om ding a, tung a nisa zahlaktak in a-om ding; sepaihte' Toupa lah Zion tang leh Jerusalem ah leh a-upate ma ah, thupitak a kumpi a om ding ahi ngal a.”
23025001	Toupa aw, nang ka Pathian na hi a; ka hon pahtawi ding, na min ka phat ding; thillamdangtak, nidanglai a vaihawmte, ginomtak leh thutak in na hih ngal a.
23025002	Khopite leivum in na suaksak a; akulhte uh leng na hihsia hi; gamdang mite kumpipa' inn leng khopi hi nawn lou in na bawl ngal a; chikchiang mah a lam in a-om nawnta kei ding.
23025003	Huaiziak in mihat mahmahte'n ahon pahtawi ding ua, nam kihtakhuai mahmah khopi in ahon kihta ding uhi.
23025004	Mikihtakhuaite hu huihpi in baang asawn ok-ok lai bang a ahong om chiang in, nang zaw migenthei a ding in bukna, tagah mangbang lai a ding in bukna, huihpi lak a kihumbitna, nisa liahna na hi ngal a.
23025005	Mun keu a kholum na daihsak zel bang in, gamdang mite husa na daisak hi; kholum meiliah a daihsak a a-om bang in, milauhuaite thawm daihsak ahi ding.
23025006	Huan hiai tang ah sepaihte' Toupa'n michih a ding in thil thaute, uain todat toh kidiah, thil thau mahmah guhngek a dim, uain todat toh kidiah hoihtak a khitsiang in ankuang alui ding hi.
23025007	Huan khuhna mi tengteng tung a khiak, puanzak nam chih tung a kizak, hiai tang ah ahihse ding hi.
23025008	Sihna avalh denta, Toupa Pathian in mi tengteng mai a kipan khitui anulsiang ding a; amite minsiatna lah leitung luah tengteng a kipan in alamang ding; Toupa'n huai achita hi.
23025009	Huai ni in, “Ngai un, hiai i Pathian ahi; amah i ngakngak ua, huchi in ahon hondam ding; hiai Toupa ahi; amah i ngakngak ua; ahotdamna ah i kipak in i nuam ding uh,” achi ding uhi.
23025010	Hiai tang ah Toupa khut a kinga ding a, Moab, buhpawl ek kua a sikden a a-om sek bang in, amah mun ah sikden a om ding ahi ngal a.
23025011	Huchi in tuiliaumi in liau ding a tui akhuat bang in, huai lak ah akhut azakkhe ding a; akisaktheihna lah akhut lepchiahna toh in Toupa'n akoihniam ding.
23025012	Huan na kulhbaangte insang kulhpi hihchim in, akoihniam a, lei ah leivui pha hial in apuksakta hi.
23026001	Huai ni chiang in Judahte gam ah hiai la asa ding uh. Khopi kiptak i nei ua; ama'n hotdamna kulhbaangte leh kulhpite a ding in asep ding hi.
23026002	Nam diktat thutak zui nam a luttheihna ding in kulh kongkhakte hong un.
23026003	Na tung a lungsim ngami, nangmah ahon muan ziak in, muanna kim in na kem ding.
23026004	Toupa tangtawn in muang un; Toupa , Jehovah ah lah tangtawn suangpi a-om ngal a.
23026005	Ama'n sangpi a omte ahihniam a khopi sangpi mah; akoihniam a, lei pha in akoihniam a, leivui pha hial in apuksak hi.
23026006	Khe in asikden ding; gentheite khe leh tagahte kalsuan in.
23026007	Midiktat lampi lah dikna ahi a; nang lungtang diktat pu in midiktat lampi na hihmam sek a.
23026008	Ahi, Toupa aw, na vaihawmna lampi ah ka hon ngak uhi; kou hinna deih zaw na min loh leh nangmah theihgigena ahi.
23026009	Zan chiang in ka hinna in nangmah ahon ngai a; ahi, zingkhang in ka sung a ka kha om in ka hon zong ding hi; na vaihawmnate leitung a ahong om chiang in khovel a omte'n diktatna lah asin zel ngal ua.
23026010	Mithulim lou deihsak in om mahleh, diktatna asin tuan sam kei ding; dikna gam ah dikloutak in ahih ding hi. Toupa thupina amu tuan kei ding.
23026011	Toupa , na khut zak in a-om a, himahleh amau amu tuan kei ua; himahleh mite a dia na phatuamngaihna amu ding ua, azum ding uh; ahi, nang hon doute mei in akangmang ding hi.
23026012	Toupa nang lemna na hon sehsak ding; nang ka nasep tengteng uh na hon sepsak hi.
23026013	Toupa ka Pathian uh aw, nang kia hilou in kumpipa dangte'n leng ka tung uah thu anei khinta ua, himahleh na min kia ka louta ding uh.
23026014	Amau lah asita uh a, ahing nawn kei ding uh; amangta ua, athounawn kei ding uh; huaiziak in nang amaute gawt in na hihsia a, atheihgigena teng uh leng na hihmangta hi.
23026015	Hiai nam na pungsakta a, Toupa aw, hiai nam na pungsak a; nang pahtawi in na omta; hiai gam a gamgite na hihlian hi.
23026016	Toupa , adah lai un ahon zong ua, amau na thunun chiang in athum zel uhi.
23026017	Numei naupai, neih hun naita bang in; Toupa aw, kou na ma ah ka om uhi.
23026018	Nau ka pai ua, ka na ua, huih bang lel ka nei uh; lei ah lah tatkhiakna lam himhim ka ngah kei ua; khovel a omte lah apuk sam kei uhi.
23026019	Na misite ahing nawn ding ua; ka misi luang toh athounawn ding uh. Leivui a omte aw, halh unla, nuamtak in la sa un; na daituite khovak daitui bang ahi a, lei in misite apaikhe ding hi, chih.
23026020	Kisa un, ka mite aw, na dantan sungte ah lut unla, na kongkhakte uh kikhakkhum un; lung hihlouhna aven masiah sawt lou sung kibu un.
23026021	Ngai un, Toupa , agitlouhna ziak ua lei a omte gawt ding in a-omna a kipan ahong pawtkhe ding a; lei mah in asisan ahihlang dia, ami athahte uh akhuhta kei ding hi.
23027001	Huai ni chiang in Toupa'n , anamsau hoihtak a hiam, lianpi, muanhuaitak in, leviathan gulpi hattak leh leviathan gulpi kivial ngeingoi agawt ding a, tuipi a dragon om leng athat ding hi.
23027002	Huai ni chiang in, uain grephuan khat, huai pahtawi in la sa un.
23027003	Kei Toupa lah avengpa ka hi a; mitphiat kal teng in tui ka buak ding a, kuamah in akhoihlouhna ding un sun leh zan in ka veng ding.
23027004	Kei ah hehna a-om kei hi; loulingnei leh khaulingneite'n hon dou in hon sual le u aw! Amau sual ding in ka kuan ding a, mun khat ah ka halkhawm ding hi.
23027005	Ahihkeileh, hon kileppihna ding in ka hatna len hen; ahi, hon kileppih hen.
23027006	Hun hong tung ding ah Jakobte'n zung akha ding ua; Israelte'n zung akha ding ua; Israelte apakmum un apakpalh ding uh; huchi in leitung gah in adimsak ding uhi.
23027007	Amah vote avuak bang in amah avo sam a hia? Ahihkeileh, amah thatte thahna bang in amah thah in a-om a hia?
23027008	Amah na paimangsak lai in ahun lel in amah na sel a; suahlam huih nun ni in ahu thupitak in amah amutlengta hi.
23027009	Huaiziak in hiai in Jakobte thulimlouhna silsiang ahi ding a, hiai akhelhna uh paimangpihna gah ngen ahi; Asherim hiam, gimlim maitamte hiam ding nawn lou ding khop in maitam suang tengteng suangpak den khap bang in abawl uhi.
23027010	Khua kulhpi nei lah alungzuang a, omna nutsiat leh paisan, gamdai bang ahi; huai ah bawngnou ata ding a, huai lai mah ah akual ding a, aselte ane ding.
23027011	Ahiangte lah avuai chiang un khiah in a-om ding a; numeite ahong pai ding ua ahal ding uh; amau lah theihtheihna himhim neiloumi ahi ngal ua; huaiziak in amaute bawlpa'n atung uah zahngaihna anei kei ding a, amaute sutuahpa'n amaute deihsakna himhim anei kei ding hi.
23027012	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n , Euphrates Luipi akuang dim a luang zoizoi a kipan in, Aigupta luita pha in, agah asatkhe ding a, huchi in Israel suante aw, khatkhat a pikhawm in na om ding uhi.
23027013	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, pengkul lianpi amut ding ua; Assuria gam a mangthang dekdekte leh Aigupta gam a delhkhiak a omte ahong pai ding ua; Jerusalem a tang siangthou ah Toupa abe ding uhi.
23028001	Ephraimte zukhamhatte kisaktheihna lallukhu tung leh akilawmna uh thupi pak vul lel laitak, uain thazoh a omte phaizang hausatak lutang tung a omte atung uh agik hi!
23028002	Ngai in, Toupa'n mihat thilhihtheitak anei a; ama'n, gial thupitak ke phuakphuak, huihpi thilhihse lemlum bang leh tui lian thupi let zuazua bang mai in, lei ah apai ek ding.
23028003	Ephraimte zukhamhatte kisaktheihna lallukhu lah sikden in a-om ding a;
23028004	akilawmna uh thupi pak vul laitak, phaizang hausatak lutang tung a om, nipi ma a theipi min masapen, a-enmi in amuh a, akhut a a-omtak a anek khit sek bang ahi ding hi.
23028005	Huai ni chiang in sepaihte' Toupa tuh, thupina lallukhu leh kilawmna lukhute, amikhosuaksunte a ding in ahi ding;
23028006	Vaihawm dia tu a ding in vaihawmna khate, kulh kongkhak bul a hon sualte nangkik mite a ding in hatna ahi ding.
23028007	Himahleh huaite leng uain ziak in akipekpek ua, zu ziak in ahoihoi ua; siampute leh zawlneite leng zu ziak in akipekpek ua, uain valh khit in a-om ua, zu ziak in ahoihoi ua; kilakna thute ah akipekpek ua, vaihawmna thu ah ahoihoi uhi.
23028008	Mun siang mahmah om lou khop in dohkan tengteng lah luak leh thilnin in adim hi.
23028009	Ama'n theihna lam a kua ahia asinsak ding? Thukhah leng ama'n kua ahia atheihsak sin laitei? Nawinek tawptungte leh nawi neksak nawnlouhte ahi ding uam?
23028010	Thuhilhna tung a thuhilhna, thuhilhna tung a thuhilhna chiantouh; dan tung a dan, dan tung a dan chiantouh; hiai ah tawmchik, huai ah tawmchik chih ngenta ahih ziak in.
23028011	Ahi, muk lamdang pumi zang in, pau tuam in hiai mite kiang ah thu agen zawta ding.
23028012	Hiai lah khawlna ahi a, atawlte khawlsak un; hiai lah kihihhalhna ahi, achihte; himahleh amau angaikhe nuam kei ua.
23028013	Huaiziak in apai ua, athal a apuk ua, akitapgawp ua, thang a a-awk ua, mat a a-omtheihna ding un, Toupa thu amaute a ding in, thuzohna thu tung a thuzohna thu chiantouh, thuzohna thu tung a thuzohna thu chiantouh, dan tung a dan chiantouh; dan tung a dan chiantouh; hiai ah tawmchik huai ah tawmchik chih ngen a ahi mai ding hi.
23028014	Huaiziak in mi muhsithatte aw, hiai mite, Jerusalem a omte, vai hawmsakte aw, Toupa thu za un.
23028015	Sihna toh thu i khungta, Sheol ah thu i kichiamta; vuakna tui lian a luansuak hun chiang in lei pha in zaw aluang kei ding; zuauthute i kihumbitna ding in i zang ua, zuau nuai ah lah i buta ngal ua, na chih ziak un.
23028016	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ding, “Ngai in, suang, suang ettelsa, akil a suang manphatak phumkip mahmah, Zion ah suangphum ding in ka lem hi; agingtami zaw akin kei ding.
23028017	“Vaihawmna diktat a tansakna khau ding in ka zang ding a, diktatna lah a-ulum khai ding in ka zang ding a, gial in kihumbitna zuauthute aphiatmang vek ding a, tuite'n lah bukna atum ding.
23028018	Huan sihna toh na thukhun uh akiphel ding a, Sheol toh na chiam uh leng apiching kei ding, vuakna tui lian aluansuak hun chiang in. Huai hun chiang in sikden in na om ding uhi.
23028019	Aluansuak peuhmah chiang in nou ahon la zel dia; zingsang teng, sun leh zan in, aluangsuak ding a; thukhah omdan theihsiam lah thil mulkimhuai ngen ahi ding,” chi in.
23028020	Lupna lah khekhuanna ding in atom lo zen a, puanthuah lah lukhuhna ding in aneu lua hi.
23028021	Anasep, anasep lamdang aseptheihna ding leh athilhih, athilhih lamdang azuihtheihna ding in, Toupa Perazim tang a athou bang in athou sin ngal a, Gibeon Phaizang a aheh bang in aheh sin hi.
23028022	Huchi in mi muhsit chingte hi nawn kei un, huchi lou in zaw na kolbutte uh muanhuaitak in abawl kha ding uh; tawpna, tawpna tung ngei ding a seh, leitung pumpi tung a atunsak ding. Toupa sepaihte' Toupa a kipan in ka za hi.
23028023	Bildoh unla, ka aw za un; ngaikhia unla, ka thugen za un.
23028024	Leilet mi in chi thehna ding in lei tatlak lou in alet ngei ahia? Aleikhalte tatlak lou in akhenkham in ahihzan ngei a hia?
23028025	Atung a tohtam khit in mohurite athehdalh kei a hia? Zirate leng atheh kei a hia? Buhte avual in, huit buhte leng amun sehsa ah, vaibuhte leng anawlzul ah atuh sek kei a hia?
23028026	A Pathian in lah amah diktak in athuzoh in asinsak ngal a.
23028027	Mohuri lah buhchilna khawl in achil ngei ngal kei ua, zira tung ah leng kangtalai khe atuksak ngei kei uh; mohuri zaw chiang in akhen ua, zira leng khetbuk in akhen zaw sek uhi.
23028028	Tanghou bawlna buh gawizan in a-om a, ama'n tangtawn in avo kei ding a, akangtalai khe leh asakolte'n dalhsak mahleh, agawizansak ngei kei hi.
23028029	Huaite leng sepaihte' Toupa , lemtheihna a mi lamdang mahmah leh pilna a mihoih mahmah a kipan a pawt ahi.
23029001	Ariel, Ariel, David puanin kaihna mun! Kum ah kum gawm inla; ankuangluinate hong tung nawn hen.
23029002	Huai hun chiang in Ariel ka lungzingsak ding a, huchi in suunna leh kahna a-om ding; huan amah kei a ding in Ariel bang ahi ding.
23029003	Huan nangmah sual tum in na kim ah ka hon giahkhum ding a, nangmah sual ding in umsuakna insangte ka bawl ding.
23029004	Huchi in puksak in na om ding a, lei nuai a kipan in thu na gen ding a, na aw lah leivui lak ah awlawl in agingkhe ding; na aw dawi aisan siam zawl aw bang in lei nuai a kipan in apawt ding hi, na pau leivui lak a kipan in ahong pawt siausiau ding hi.
23029005	Himahleh nang hon dou mipite zaw leivui nel mahmah bang in a-om ding uh, mikihtakhuai mipite leng buhsi mangthang sekte bang in a-om ding uh; ahi, huai mitphiat kal lou in ahong om guih ding hi.

23029007	Huchi in Ariel dou nam tengteng mipite, amah leh a-insang sualmi tengteng leh amah hihlungzingte tengteng, ihmu mang bang lel ahi ding uh, zan a kilakna bang lel.
23029008	Mi gilkial in mang aneih in an ane a, himahleh akhanglou a abah lai in tui aduh lai bang ahi ding hi; Zion tang sual, nam chih leh mipite, huai bang ahi ding uhi.
23029009	Dingh kinken unla, lamdang sa un, kituam unla, mittaw in om un; akham ua, himahleh uain ziak ahi kei; ahoihoi ua, himahleh zu ziak ahi kei.
23029010	Toupa'n ihmut limna kha na tung uah asungbua a, zawlneite na mit uh amitsisak a, na lu uh, mutheite, akhuhta ngal a.
23029011	Huchi in kilakna himhim nou a ding in laibu bilhkhum bikbek bang ahita, mite'n laisiammi kiang ah, hehpih in huai sim in, chi in apia ua, ama'n, ka sim thei kei, bilhkhum bikbek ahi, achi a;
23029012	Huan laibu tuh laisiamloumi kiang ah, “Hehpih in hiai sim in, chi in apia ua, ama'n, laisiam ka hi kei,” achi hi.
23029013	Huchi in Toupa , “Hiai mite'n ahong naih ua, akam un leh amuk un ahon pahtawi ua, himahleh alungtang uh kei a kipan in agamla a, ahon launa uleh mihingte thupiak min asinsak lel uh ahi.
23029014	Hiai mite lak ah thillamdang ka hihbehlap ding, thillamdang, thillamdang mahmah; huchi in amipilte uh pilna amang ding a, ami teite uh teina sel in a-om ding,” achi hi.
23029015	Athusawm uh Toupa lak a sel ding a thuktak zong mite tung agik hi! Athilhihte uh lah mial nuai ah a-om a, kua'n ahon mu dia? Kua'n ahon thei dia? achi uhi.
23029016	Thilte na lumlet vek uh! Belvelpa bellei bang lel a seh in a-om sin a hia? Thil bawl in abawlpa tung ah, ama hon bawl ka hi sam a, achih? Ahihkeileh, thil suktuah a om in asutuahpa tungthu ah, theihna himhim anei kei, achih?
23029017	Sawt louchik nung in ahi ka hia, Lebanon lei hoihtak mun a suahsak in a-om sin a, lei hoihtak mun lah gammang a seh a a-om sin?
23029018	Huai ni in nangongte'n laibu thute abil un aza ding ua, mittawte'n mial nuai leh mial lak a kipan in amu ding uhi.

23029021	Huaite'n thu in mite thil hihkhial in abawl ua, kulh kongpi ah taihilhmi awkna ding in thang akam ua, midiktat bangmah lou in anawlkhin uhi.
23029022	Huaiziak in Toupa , Abraham tan pen, Jakob inkote tungthu ah hichi in achi: Jakobte zaw tu in azahlakta kei ding ua, amai uh amual nawn sam kei ding.

23032003	Huchi in amute mit amial kei ding a, azate bil in angaikhe ding.

23034001	Nou namte aw, bil a za ding in hong nai un; michihte aw, ngaikhia un; leitung leh asung a om tengteng in bil in za uhen; khovel leh asung a pan pawt tengteng toh.
23034002	Toupa'n nam chiteng tung a lungkimlouhna nei in asepaihte uh tengteng tung ah lah hehna anei ngal a; amau ahihmang vek a, thah ding in apeta hi.

23034004	Van a omte tengteng hihman in a-om ding ua, laibuzial kizial bang in van zial in a-om ding a, a-omte tengteng, grepgui a kipan a nahvuai apulh bang in leh theipi kung a kipan a nahvuai apulh bang in avuai khin un apulh vek ding uhi.
23034005	Ka namsau in van ah taitak in adawnta ngal a, ngai in, huai vaihawm ding in Edomte tung ah leh ka hamsiat mite tung ah ake ding.
23034006	Toupa namsau sisan in atai ding a, thauna a thausak in a-omta, belamnoute leh kelte sisan in, belampa gilthaute in. Toupa'n Bozrah ah kithoihna anei a, Edom gam ah leng thahna thupitak anei hi.
23034007	Gam bawngtalte leng kituak in satpaih in a-om ding ua, bawngtalte toh, agam un sisan akham ding a, aleivui uh thauna a thausak in a-om ding.
23034008	Toupa phulak ni lah ahita ngal a, Zion selna lam thu athukna kum.
23034009	Aluituite longnai dia suahsak in a-om ding a, leivuite mei leh kaat asuak ding a, agam longnai kang asuak ding hi.
23034010	Sun leh zan in mihsak ahi kei ding a; ameikhu lah tangtawn in atungkah ding a; suan om lai siah asia in a-om nilouh ding a; tangtawn in leng kuamah in angap kei ding uhi.
23034011	Tuivagik leh sakuh in huai gam atang ding ua; simbu leh va-ak huai ah ateng ding uh; siatna khau leh siatgawpna ulum atung ah akhai ding hi.
23034012	Amihoihte uh gam uk ding in asam ding ua, himahleh huai ah kuamah sap ding a-om kei ding uh; amilian tengteng uh bangmah ahi kei ding uh.
23034013	Akumpipa uh inn ah louling neite apou ding a, akulhpi sung uah dailing leh lingnok apou ding; sehalte tenna ding leh vasa ngawngsaute a ding in inn um sung intual ahi ding hi.
23034014	Huan gamdai a, gamsate ngiate toh akituak ding ua, sathak in alawm asam ding; ahi, zan thil lauhuaipi in huai ah omna abawl ding a, amah a ding in khawlna mun ding amu ding hi.
23034015	Huai ah simbu thupi in bu abawl ding a, atui dia, akeuh ding a, a-opkhawm ding; ahi, huai ah mute koppih nei chiat in a-omkhawm ding uhi.
23034016	Toupa laibu ah zong unla, sim un; huaite lak ah khat leng kim lou a-om kei ding a, khat leng koppih nei lou a-om kei ding; amah kam ngei in thu apia a, akha ngei in huaite apikhawmta hi.
23034017	Ama'n lah amaute a ding in ai asansak a, akhut a khau a teh in huai gam ahawmsak chiat a; tangtawn in anei ding ua, suan om lai teng huai ah a-om ding uhi.
23035001	Gamdai leh phaksap gam akipak ding a; gamkeu in nuamsa in pawn pak bang in apak ding.
23035002	Apaklun ding a, kipaktak leh la sa in nuam asa ding hi. Lebanon thupina akiang ah piak ahi ding, Karmel leh Sharon kilawmna toh; Toupa thupina amu ding ua, i Pathian kilawmna toh.
23035003	Khut hatloute hatsak unla, khukzawte kipsak un.
23035004	Lungtang dawilokte kiang ah, “Hattak in om unla, lau kei un! Ngai un, na Pathian uh phulakna toh, a Pathian thukna toh, ahong pai ding a, hon hondam ding,” chi un.
23035005	Huai hun chiang in mittawte mit hahsak in a-om ding a, nangongte bil hihvak in a-om ding.
23035006	Huai hun chiang in khebaite sakhi bang in atawm ding ua, pau theiloute lei in nuamsatak in la asa ding uh; gamdaite ah tuite ahong phulkhe ding ua, gamkeute ah luita tui ahong phulkhe biabia ding uhi.
23035007	Huchi in piaunel sa mahmah munte dil ahong suak ding a, lei dangtak mahmah tui nak ahong suak ding; sehalte tenna a, alupna uah, loupa, maute leh sikhapat toh a-om ding.
23035008	Huan huai ah lamlian a-om ding a, kongpi toh, huai Sianthouna Lampi achi ding uh; mithanghuai in lampi atawn kei ding; himahleh huai mite a ding in ahi zaw ding; mi vialzinte, ahi, mihaite leng, huai ah amang kei ding uhi.
23035009	Humpinelkai himhim huai ah a-om kei ding a, sa hing ne himhim huai ah apaitou sam kei ding uh, muh phak in leng a-om kei ding ua, himahleh tatsate bel huai ah apaitou ding uh.
23035010	Toupa tatsate akik nawn ding ua, lasa kawm in Zion atung ding uh, tangtawn a kipahna alutung uah a-omta ding a; nopsakna leh kipahna angah ding ua, lungkhamna leh thumna amang ding hi.
23036001	Kumpipa Hezekiah akum sawm-le-li kum in hichi ahong hi a, Assuria gam kumpipa Sennakerib tuh Judah gam a kulh nei khua tengteng sim ding in ava hohtou a alata hi.
23036002	Assuria kumpipa'n Lakish a kipan Jerusalem a kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah sepaihhon tampipi toh Rabshakeh asawl hi. Huan dil saknung tuilakna kiang a Puansawpmi Loubuk lamlian ah adingh hi.
23036003	Huchi in kumpipa inkuanpihte tung a heutu a om Hilkiah tapa Eliakim, laigelhmi Shebna, tanchin gelhmi Asaph tapa Joah akiang ah ahong suk uhi.
23036004	Huan Rabshakeh in akiang uah, “Hezekiah kiang ah huchi in gen un, ‘Kumpipa thupitak Assuria kumpipa in hichi in achi: Na muanna kingakna bang ahi mai a?’
23036005	Kidouna ding a na lemtheihna leh na hatna zaw thu lel ahi, ka chi. Kua muang a, ka tung a hel na himai a?
23036006	Ngai in, hiai sialluang chiangkhun kitan Aiguptate muang na hi ve; huai mi na muanleh, na khut ah asun ding hi. Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ah zaw amah muangte tung ah huchibang ahi.”
23036007	Ahihkeileh, ka kiang ah, “ Toupa i Pathian uh ahi ka muan uh,” na chihleh, amah pen Hezekiah in Judahte kiang ah leh Jerusalem kiang ah, “Hiai maitam ma ah kia na biak ding uh ahi,” chi a, amun sangte leh amaitamte lakmangsakpa hilou hia?
23036008	Huchi in hehpih in, ka pu Assuria kumpipa kiang ah thu chiam in, huchi in ke'n sakol sangnih ka hon pe ding, nang atung ua tuang dingte na muh theih peuh dingleh.
23036009	Bangchi in kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite thu ah Aiguptate tung a na muanna nga a, ka pu sikha neupente lak a heutu khat leng na nan zoh ding?
23036010	Huan hiai hihse ding a sim ding in Toupa pang lou a hong paitou ka hi a hia? Toupa'n , ka kiang ah, “Huai gam sim ding in hohtou inla, hihsia in, ahon chi, chi un,” achi hi.
23036011	Eliakim leh Shebna leh Joahte'n, Rabshakeh kiang ah, “Hehpih in na sikhate Siria pau in hon houpih in; huai ka theithei ngal ua; kulhbaang tung a mite zak in Judah pau in hon houpih nawn ke'n,” achi uhi.
23036012	Himahleh Rabshakeh in, “Ka pu in na pu kiang kia ah leh nang kiang ah hiai thu gen ding in ahon sawl a hia? Kulhbaang tung a tute, noute toh amau ek ne ding leh amau zun dawn dingte kiang ah, ahon sawl ahi zaw kei maw?” achi hi.
23036013	Huchi in Rabshakeh adingh a, Judah pau in ngaihtak in akikou a, “Kumpipa thupi Assuria kumpipa thute ngaikhia un.
23036014	Kumpipa'n hichi in achi, ‘Hezekiah khem in om nuam dah un; ama'n lah ahon humbit thei kei ding hi.
23036015	Hezekiah in, Toupa'n pel lou in hon humbit ding; hiai khopi zaw Assuria kumpipa khut a piak in a-om kei ding, chi in thu gen mahleh, Hezekiah gen ziak in Toupa muang nuam tuan dah un.’ ”
23036016	Hezekiah thu ngaikhe kei un; Assuria kumpipa'n lah hichi in achi ngal a, “Thilpiak in hon kituahpih unla, ka kiang ah hong paikhia un; michih in agrepgui a pan leh michih in atheipi kung a pan ne chiat unla, michih in atuikhuk a pan tui dawn chiat un.
23036017	Ka hong pai a, noumau gam bang a buh leh uain omna gam, tanghou leh grephuante omna gam a ka hon paipih matan.
23036018	Toupa'n hon humbit ding, chi a, Hezekiah in ahon khem khakleh pilvang un. Namte pathiante'n Assuria kumpipa khut a pan agam uh ahumbit ngei ua hia?
23036019	Hamath leh Arpahte pathiante koi a om ahita ua? Sepharvaimte pathiante koi a om ahita ua? Huai Samaria khua kei a kipan in ahumbitta ua ahia?
23036020	Huai gam pathian tengteng lak a kuate'n ahia kei a kipan agam uh ahumbit uh? Toupa'n Jerusalem khua kei a kipan in ahumbit mahmah ding maw? chi in,” achi hi.
23036021	Amau bel adai dide ua, “Thu khat lel in leng adawng kei uh; kumpipa thupiak, amau dawng kei un,” chih ahi ngal a.
23036022	Huchi in kumpipa inkuanpihte tung a heutu a om Hilkiah tapa Eliakim, laigelhmi Shebna, tanchin gelhmi Asaph tapa Joahte'n a uansilh uh botkek in Hezekiah kiang ah ahong pai ua, Rabshakeh thugente ahilh uhi.
23037001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa Hezekiah in huai azaktak in apuansilhte abotkek a, sai-ip puan asilh a, Toupa' inn ah alutta hi.
23037002	A-inkuanpihte tung a heutu a om Eliakim leh laigelhmi Shebna leh siampute upate sai-ip puan silh in Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai kiang ah asawl hi.
23037003	Amau akiang ah, Hezekiah in hichi in achi, “Tuni mangbatna leh muhsitna ni ahi; naupangte lah apian hun uh ahita a, amau piangsak ding in hatna lah a-om nawn kei.
23037004	Rabshakeh apu Assuria kumpipa'n Pathian hing gense ding a asawl thugente, Toupa na Pathian in abil in aza lai ahi kha ding, huchi in athugen, Toupa na Pathian in abil a azakte ah, ahon sal ding hi; huaiziak in akhosuaksunte a ding in na thumna lan in achi,” achi uhi.
23037005	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah sikhate Isai kiang ah ahong pai uhi.
23037006	Isai in akiang uah, “Na pu kiang uah hichi in na chi ding uh, Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Na thuzak, Assuria kumpipa sikhate'n ahon gensiatnate uh, kihta ke'n.
23037007	Ngai in, asung ah kha banghiam ka omsak ding a, huchi in thuthang aza ding a, amah gam ah akik nawn mai ding; huchi in amah gam ngei ah namsau a puksak in ka omsak ding, achi,’ chi in,” achi hi.
23037008	Huchi in Rabshakeh akik nawn a, Assuria kumpipa in Libnah adouna a kipan apaikheta chih athei khinta hi.
23037009	Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib in Tirhak Ethiopia kumpipa tungthu, “Nang hon sim ding in apawtta,” chi in mi gen aza hi. Huchi in huai azaktak in Hezekiah kiang ah palaite asawl a.
23037010	Hichi in Judahte kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah na chi ding uh ahi, “Na muan Pathian in, Jerusalem khua Assuria kumpipa khut ah piak ahi kei ding, chi in hon khem kei hen.
23037011	Ngai in, Assuria Kumpipate'n gam tengteng hihse vek in atung ua athilhihte uh na bil in na za hi, huchi in nang penpen humbit in na om tuam ding hiam?
23037012	Namte pathiante'n, Gozan, Haran, Reseph, Eden ta Telassar a omte, ka pipute sukmante, ahumbit ngei ua hia?
23037013	Hamath kumpipate, Ivvah kumpipate koi a om ahita ua? chi in,” achi a.
23037014	Hezekiah in palaite khut a kipan in lai amu a, asim a, huchi in Toupa' inn ah Hezekiah ava lut a, Toupa ma ah aphahta hi.
23037015	Toupa kiang ah Hezekiah athum hi.
23037016	“Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian aw, cherubte tung a tupa, nang, nang kia, leitung luah gam tengteng Pathian na hi; nangma'n leitung leh van na bawl hi.
23037017	Toupa aw na bildoh inla, ngai dih ve; Toupa aw na mit hak inla, en dih ve; Pathian hing gense ding a mite sawlpa Sennakerib thu tengteng ngai in.
23037018	Toupa , Assuria kumpipate'n nam tengteng leh agam uh ahihse ngei ua, apathiante uh leng mei ah apai uhi.
23037019	Huaite zaw Pathian ahi kei him ua, mihing khut a bawl sing leh suang, ahi zaw uh. Huaiziak in ahihmang uhi.
23037020	Huaiziak in Toupa ka Pathian uh aw, nang, nang kia, Toupa na hi chih leitung luah gam tengteng in atheihna ding un amah a kipan in hon humbit in,” chi in.
23037021	Huai lai in Amoz tapa Isai in Hezekiah kiang ah mi asawl a, hichi in achi, “ Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib siatna ding nangawn a ka kiang a na thum ziak in,
23037022	hiai atungtang thu Toupa'n agen ahi, ‘Nungak siangthou, Zion tanu in ahon musit a, hon nuihsan hi; Jerusalem tanu in alu hon sinkhum hi.
23037023	Kua ahi mai a na minsiatsak a na gensiat? Kua tung ah ahia na aw na puamsak a, na mit na sansak? Israelte Mi Siangthou tung ah ahi kei maw.
23037024	Na sikhate zang in Toupa min na sesak a, ka kangtalai tampi toh tang sang sanna, Lebanon gam kil ah ka hong tungtouta hi; asidar sing sangtakte leh ameilah sing hoihte ka phuk ding; amun sangpen, alei hoihna gammang ah ka lut ding.
23037025	Tuileh ka let a, tui ka dawn zel a, ka khepek nuai in Aigupta lui tengteng ka kangsak vek ding,’ ” na chi hi.
23037026	Ke'n nidanglai a pan in huai ka hih ahi a, tuma lam a kipan a ka suktuah ahi chih na za kei a hia? Khua kulh neite inn chimkhawm bang lel a hihsepa na hihtheihna ding in tu in ka tungsak hi.
23037027	Huaiziak in asung a omte ahat lo kei ua, alau ua, azahlak uhi; loubuk loupa bang lel leh loupa hing bang lel, intung loupa hing bang lel, intung loupa bang leh lou buh hoih mah bang lel ahi uhi.
23037028	“Ke'n bel na tut, na pawt, na lut leh ka tung a na hehdan ka thei hi.
23037029	Ka tung a na heh ziak leh na uangpau ka bil a ahong luttouh tak ziak in ka nakbulh nang nak ah ka bulh ding a, ka sikkaihna leng na muk ah ka bulh ding, na hong paina lampi mah ah ka hon kiksak nawn ding, chih,” chi in.
23037030	“Huan hiai pen nang a ding a chiamtehna ding ahi ding; tukum in buhsang na sen ding ua; kum nawn in leng huai buhsang mah na sen ding uh; akum thumna ah buh tuh unla, at unla, grephuante bawl unla, agah ne un.
23037031	“Huan Judah inkuanpihte lak a akhosuaksunte bel asuklam a zungkai a, atoulam a gah in a-om nawn ding.
23037032	Akhosuaksunte Jerusalem a kipan in apawt ding ua, dam lai dingte Zion tang a kipan in apawt ding uh; sepaihte' Toupa phatuamngaihna in huaite ahih ding hi.
23037033	“Huaiziak in Toupa'n Assuria kumpipa tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Amah hiai khopi ahong tung kei ding a, hiai lai ah athal leng akap sam kei ding a, lum toh akiang ah leng ahong pai sam kei ding, asimna ding in lah leikulh abawl sam kei ding.
23037034	Ahong paina lampi ah huai mah ah akik nawn ding ziak in, hiai khopi ah ahong tung kei ding,” Toupa'n achi.
23037035	“Kei ziak leh ka sikha David ziak in hiai khopi ka humbit ding hi,” chi in achi a.
23037036	Huchi in Toupa angel ava pawt a, Assuriate giahmun ah mi nuaikhat singgiat-le-sangnga asisak a; huan, zingkhang a mi athoh uleh, ngai in, misi luang ngen ana hi uhi.
23037037	Huchi in Assuria kumpipa Sennakerib apawt a, apaikik a, Nineveh ah a-om nilouh hi.
23037038	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, apathian Nisrok inn a pathian abiak lai in atapa Adrammelek leh Sarezerte'n namsau in asatlum ua; huchi in ataimang ua, Ararat gam ah alut uhi. Huchi in atapa Esarhaddon in asik in vai ahawm hi.
23038001	Huai lai in Hezekiah si thei ding khop in achi ana hi. Huchi in akiang ah Amoz tapa zawlnei Isai ahong a, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na inkuanpihte omdan ding gelsak in; damkhe lou a si ding na hi ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
23038002	Huchi in Hezekiah baang lam nga in akihei a, Toupa kiang ah athum a,
23038003	“ Toupa aw, na ma a thutak leh lungtang hoihkim pu a ka om zeldan leh na mitmuh a thil hoih ka hih zeldan, hehpih in theigige in,” achi hi. Huchi in Hezekiah akap huphup hi.
23038004	Huchi in Toupa thu Isai kiang ah ahong tung a,
23038005	“Kuan inla, Hezekiah kiang ah gen in, Toupa , na pu David Pathian in hichi in achi: Na thumna ka za a, na khituite leng ka mu a; ngai in, na damsung nite ah kum sawm-le-nga ka behlap ding hi.
23038006	Huan nang leh hiai khopi Assuria kumpipa a kipan ka humbit ding a; hiai khopi ka hum ding hi.
23038007	“ Toupa'n athil gen ahih ngei ding chih, hiai nang a ding in Toupa a kipan chiamtehna ding ahi.
23038008	En in, inlim chial a lim, Ahaz dakbi theihna a niamkiaksa, inliim chial sawm tan in ka kiksak nawn ding,” achi hi. Huchi in ni niamna dakbi theihna ah inliim chial sawm tan in akik nawnta hi.
23038009	Judah kumpipa Hezekiah china, adam nawn nung a alaigelh a:
23038010	“Ka damsung nite sun laitak in han kongpi ah lut ding in ka kisa a; ka damsung kum om lai dingte suh in ka omta, ka chi hi.
23038011	Toupa , Toupa ngei, mihing gam ah ka mu nawnta kei ding a; khovel a omte lak ah mihing ka mu nawn kei ding hi.
23038012	Ka omna suan in a-om a, belamchingmi puanin bang in ka kiang a kipan a lakmang in a-omta hi. Puan ganmi'n apuan azial bang in ka hinna ka zial a; ama'n siambu a kipan ahon teptan ding a; ni khat leh zan khat thil thu a hon hihtawp maimah ding na hi ve, ka chi hi.
23038013	“Zingsang tan ka dai teitei a; humpinelkai bang in ka guh tengteng ahihtan vek a; nang ni khat leh zan khat thil thu a hon hihtawp mai ding na hi ve.
23038014	Lensiam hiam, vakang hiam bang in ka hamham a, vakhu bang in ka thum hi, tunglam etna in ka mit avaita hi; Toupa aw, nuaisiah a om ka hi, nang ka tang in ding in.
23038015	Bang ka gen dia? Ama'n ahon houpih a, amah mah in ahih pah hi; ka hinna ning kitelna ziak in ka damsung kum teng awl khakha in ka pai khiankhianta ding.
23038016	“ Toupa aw, hichibang thil ziak in mihingte ahing zel uh, huaite kia ah ka kha hinna a-om zel hi; huaiziak in hon damsak nawn in hon hingsak nawn in.
23038017	Ngai in, ka lungmuanna ding in ahi, ning kitelna thupitak ka na neih; himahleh nang, ka hinna na it ziak in, siatna kokhuk a kipan in na humbitta; ka khelhnate tengteng lah na nunglam ah na pai vekta hi.
23038018	Han in lah hon phat thei ngal kei a, sihna in leng ahon pahtawi thei sam kei hi; kokhuk a kumte'n na thutak alamen thei kei uhi.
23038019	Mihing in, mihing in, amau ngei in tuni a ka hih bang in ahon phat ding uh; pa'n atate kiang ah na thutak atheisak ding.
23038020	“ Toupa bel hon hondam ding in amansa gige hi; huaiziak in i damsung tengteng in, Toupa' inn ah, ka late tumging guineite toh i sa ding.”
23038021	Isai in, “Theipi gah lom khat la henla, damdawi atat a tatte ding in ameimatum ah tuamkhum hen, huchi in adam ding,” ana chi khinta hi.
23038022	Hezekiah mah in leng, “ Toupa' inn ah ka hohtou nawn ding chih theihna bang chiamtehna hong om ding ahia?” ana chi khinta hi.
23039001	Huai lai in Baladan tapa Babulon kumpipa Merodak-baladan in Hezekiah kiang ah achi ana chih leh adam nawnta chih azak ziak in laite leh kipahman akhak hi.
23039002	Huchi in Hezekiah atung uah akipak a, akiang uah athil manphate koihna inn dangkate, dangka-engte, gimlim bangbang hiamte, sathau manphate, agalvan koihna insung tengtengte, agou hoih lak a om tengtengte a-ensak hi. A-inn leh agamsung a om himhim Hezekiah in akiang ua a-etsak louh a-om kei hi.
23039003	Huchi in kumpipa Hezekiah kiang ah zawlnei Isai ahoh a, akiang ah, “Den a mite'n bang ahia agen uh? Koi a kipan in ahia na kiang a ahong uh?” achi hi. Hezekiah in, “Gam gamlapi a kipan, Babulon a kipan in, ka kiang a hong pai ahi uh,” achi hi.
23039004	Huchi in ama'n, “Na inn ah bangbang en ahi ua?” achi hi. Hezekiah in, “Ka insung a om tengteng a-en vek uh; ka gou hoihte ka etsak louh bangmah a-om kei,” chi in adawng hi.
