23039005	Huchi in Isai in Hezekiah kiang ah, “Sepaihte' Toupa thu thei in.
23039006	Ngai in na insung a om tengteng leh tuni tan a na pipute'n akholkhawmte uh Babulon a paipih in a-om vek ding; bangmah nutsiat in a-om kei ding; huchibang nite ahong tung ding, Toupa'n achi.
23039007	Huan na tapa, na gil a hong gah ding, na suan dingte ngei lak a mi, apaimangpih ding uh; amau Babulon kumpipa' inn ah michilgeh ding in a-om ding uh,” achi hi.
23039008	Huchi in Hezekiah in, Isai kiang ah, “ Toupa thu na gen ahoih hi,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Ka damsung in lemna leh muanna a-om ding hi,” achi lai hi.
23040001	Lungmuan un, ka mite lungmuan un, na Pathian un achi hi.
23040002	Jerusalem kiang ah lungmuan lam sang in thu gen unla, agaldouna uh hihzoh ahita a, akhelhna uh ngaihdam ahi a, athilhihkhelh teng gun ding in Toupa khut a kipan amun nih in amuta uh chih hilh un.
23040003	Tua! Kikou aw in, “Gamdai ah Toupa lampi bawl unla, gamkeu ah i Pathian a ding in lamlian kilualsak un.
23040004	Guam chih sansak ahi vek ding a, tang chih mual chih niamsak ahi ding; lampi kawite tansak ahi ding a, aphokna lailai hihlual ahi ding hi;
23040005	Toupa thupina hihlat ahi ding a, mi tengteng in huai amu chiat ding uh chih Toupa kam in lah agenta ngal a,” achi hi.
23040006	Tua aw in, “Kikou in,” achi hi. Mi'n, “Bang gen in ka kikou dia?” achi hi. Mi tengteng loupa bang ahi ua, athupina tengteng uh leng lou a pak bang ahi.
23040007	“ Toupa hu in amut ziak in loupa avuai a, apak atul nak; mite zaw loupa bang ahi mahmah uhi.
23040008	Loupa avuai a, apak atul zel; i Pathian thu bel tangtawn in a-om gige ding,” chi in achi a.
23040009	Zion kiang a atanchinhoih hilh mi aw, tang sang mahmahte ah va hohtou in; Jerusalem kiang a tanchinhoih hilh mi aw, ngaihtak in na aw suah in; suah in, lau ke'n; Judah khuate kiang ah, “En un, na Pathian uh!”
23040010	“En un, Toupa Pathian mihattak bang in ahong pai ding hi; aban in vai ahawm ding; En un, akipahman akiang ah a-om a, ditna leng ama ah a-om.
23040011	Ama'n belamchingpa bang in abelamhonte avak ding a, belamnoute aban in apomkhawm ding a, a-angsung a koih in apaipih ding a, nou kailaite bel awlawl in api hiathiat ding,” chi in.
23040012	Kua'n ahia tuite akhutpek sung lel ateh a, tung a van khap lel ateh a, lei a leivui tehna khat lel a thun vek a, tangte lah khaina a khai a, mual pawngte bukna lel a buk?
23040013	Kua'n ahia Toupa kha thilhih dan ding kawkmuh? Ahihkeileh kua ahia amah lemsehsak hi a amah chil?
23040014	Ama'n kua adong a, kua'n ahia amah theisak a, vaihawm lampi ensak a, theihna hilh a, theihsiamna lampi ensak ngei?
23040015	Ngai in, namte lah baltin a tui tak khat bang lel ahi ua, bukna a banghiam nen bang lel a seh ahi ua, ngai in, ama'n tuikulh gamte thil neu neuchikte bang in adom zel hi.
23040016	Lebanon nangawn khul tham ahi kei a, agam a gante leng halmang a kithoihna tham ahi sam kei hi.
23040017	Nam chihte lah ama ah bangmah lou bang ahi ua, amah ngaihtuah in bangmah lou sang a tawm zaw, huihkhua lel ahi uhi.
23040018	Pathian kua toh teh na hi ua? Ahihkeileh, bang lim ahia amah toh na teh ding uh?
23040019	Milim bawltawm zaw, nasem mi in asung a, dangka-eng sekmi'n dangka-eng in aluan khum a, huai a ding in dangka khainiangte asunsak zel hi.
23040020	Huchibang thilpiak pe zou lou a, genthei lo mahmah in sing muat lou ding atel zel, milim bawltawm, ling lou ding, amah a dia bawlkhiaksak ding khutsiam mi azong zel hi.
23040021	Na lungsim un na thei kei ua hia? Na bil un na za kei ua hia? Atung a kipan in hon hilh kei ua hia? Lei pianchil a pan na theisiam kei ua hia?
23040022	Amah zaw lei kualkhumna tung a tupa ahi, ama mitmuh in leitung a omte khaupe bang lel ahi uh, amah zaw tung a van puanin tung bang a kaipalh a, omna ding a puanin zak a, miliante bangmah lou suaksakpa ahi.
23040023	Amah leitung a vaihawm mite bangmah lou a bawl nakpa ahi.
23040024	Ahi, suan ahi kei ua; ahi, tuh ahi sam kei uh; ahi, akung un lei ah zung akai kei; huai lou in ama'n amau amut a, avuai ua, pingpei in buhsi alakmang bang in alamang hi.
23040025	Kua toh hon teh a, kua kimpih a hon sep na hi ua? Mi Siangthou in achi hi.
23040026	Tunglam ah na mit uh hak unla, huai thilte kua siam ahia en un; ama'n sepaihte kizomzom in apikhia a, amin chiat un asam a; ahatna thupina ziak leh thilhihtheihna a ahat ziak in khat mah leng kim lou a-om ngei kei uhi.
23040027	Jakobte aw, bang achia hiai chi na hi ua, Israelte aw, bang achia hichibang a thu gen na hi ua, “Ka lampi zaw Toupa lak a sel ahi a, avai hawmsakna ka Pathian lak a lakmang ahi,” chih?
23040028	Na lungsim un na thei kei ua hia? Na bil un na za ngei kei ua hia? Tangtawn Pathian, Toupa kawlmong Siampa, abah louh a, agim ngeilouhdan; atheihsiamdan zonkhiak vual ahi kei hi.
23040029	Bahte kiang ah thilhihtheihna apia a, hatna himhim neiloute ahatsak naknak hi.
23040030	Tuailaite nangawn leng bah in agim ding ua, tangvalte leng apukzou ding uh.
23040031	Toupa ngakte'n zaw ahatna uh athaksak nawn ding ua; muvanlai bang in kha in alengtou ding ua; gim lou in atai ding ua; bah lou in khe in apai ding uhi.
23041001	Tuikulh gamte aw, ka ma ah dai sipsip unla; michih in ahatna uh thaksak nawn uhenla; hong pai nai chiat le uh; huai khit chiang in gen uhen; vaihawm ding in paikhawm ni.
23041002	Suahlam a kipan mi khat, diktatna ziak a akhebul a asap, kua'n ahia kaihalh? Ama'n ama ah namte apia a, kumpipate tung ah vai ahawmsak a; leivui bang in anamsau kiang ah apia a, buhsi huih mutleng bang in athalpeu kiang ah leng apia hi.
23041003	Ama'n amaute adelh a, bittak in apai a; akhe a apai nailouhna lampi ah.
23041004	Atung a kipan suan tengteng sam in, kua'n ahia sem a, hih khin? Kei Toupa , amasapen leh ananungpen, ahihpa kei kia ka hi.
23041005	Tuikulh gamte'n amu ua; alau ua; kawlmongte aling ua; ahon naih a, ahong pai uhi.
23041006	Michih in amau lawmte apanpih ua; michih in a-unaute uh kiang ah, Khamuangtak in om un, achi chiat uhi.
23041007	Huchi in abulhkipna lam thu ah, “Ahoih hi,” chi in khutsiam mi in dangka-eng sekmi ahanthawn a, sek a sekmum mi in sekdou sekmi a ahanthawn; alinlouhna ding in kilhnate in akilh kipta hi.
23041008	Himahleh nou Israelte ka sikha, Jakobte ka mitel, ka lawm, Abraham suante aw,
23041009	Nou, lei tawpna a kipan a ka mipi, anawl a kipan a ka misap, “Ka sikhate na hi ua, hon paikhe lou in ka hon tel zaw,” ka hon chihte aw,
23041010	Lau kei un, kei lah na kiang uah ka om ngal a; mangbang kei un, kei lah na Pathian uh ka hi ngal a; ka hon hatsak ding a; ahi, ka hon panpih ding; ahi, ka diktatna khut taklam in ka hon len gige ding hi.
23041011	Ngai in, na tung ua lungkim lou tengteng zahlaktak leh zumtak in a-om ding uh; nou hon selte lah bangmah lou bang ahi ding ua, amang ding uh.
23041012	Nou hon selte na zong ding ua, na mu tuan kei ding uh; nou hon doute lah bangmah lou bang ahi ding ua, thil om lou bang lel ahi ding uh.
23041013	Kei Toupa na Pathian un, Lau kei un, ka hon panpih ding, chi in na khut taklam uh ka len ding hi.
23041014	Nou Jakob tangtel leh Israel mite aw, lau kei un, ka hon panpih ding, Toupa'n achi, nou hon tanpa Israelte Mi Siangthou ahi
23041015	Ngai in, buhsukna khawl thak mahmah, hiam mahmah, ha nei in ka hon bawl ding; tangte chil in na khenzan ding ua, mualte buhsi bang in na bawl ding uh.
23041016	Na zap ding ua, huih in amut leng ding, pingpei in ahihdalh ding a, huan, noute Toupa ah na kipak ding ua, Israelte Mi Siangthou na hon suang ding uh.
23041017	Migenthei leh tagahte'n tui azong ua, a-om kei a, alei uh dangtak in ahul khin hi; kei Toupa'n amau ka dawng ding a, kei Israel' Pathian in amau ka paisan kei ding.
23041018	Tang sang giau ah luite ka luangsak ding a, phaizang laizangte ah tui nak ka suaksak ding; gamdai dil in ka bawl ding a, gamkeu leng tui nak in ka bawl ding hi.
23041019	Gamdai ah sidar singte, singgite, muite, thausingte ka suan ding a, gamkeu ah meilah singte, phante, sing gelh chite ka suankhawm vek ding;
23041020	Toupa khut in huaite ahih ahi chih leh Israelte Mi Siangthou in asiam ahi chih amuh ua, atheih ua, angaihtuah ua, atheihsiam theihna ding un.
23041021	Na thu uh hong gen un, Toupa'n achi; na paulam pen uh langsak un, Jakobte' Kumpipa'n achi hi.
23041022	Huaite langsak uhenla, thil hong tung dingte i kiang uah gen uhen; i ngaihtuah theihna ding leh atawpna ding i theihtheihna ding in, tuma thilte bang ahia gen un; ahihkeileh, thil hong tung dingte hon theisak un.
23041023	pathiante na hi uh chih ka theihna ding un tunung chiang a thil tung dingte gen un; ahi, i mangbat chiatna ding un leh i et chiat ding un thil hoih hiam thil hoih lou hiam hih dih ua le.
23041024	Ngai un, bangmah na hi kei ua, na thilhih uh leng bangmah ahi kei; nou hon telpa mikihhuai ahi.
23041025	Mallam a kipan mi khat ka dingsak a, amah ahong tung a; nisuahna a kipan ka min loupa; ama'n suang bulhkipna abawl bang in vaihawmte abawl ding a, belvelmi'n bellei achil bang in achil ding hi.
23041026	I theihtheihna ding un kua'n ahia atung a kipan gen ngei? Amah zaw adik i chih theihna ding un kua'n ahia genkhol ngei? Ahi gen himhim a-om kei uh, ahi, theisak himhim a-om kei uh, ahi, na thugente uh za a-om kei uh.
23041027	Ke'n Zion kiang ah, “En in, hiai ah amaute a-om uh,” chi masa ding ka hi a, Jerusalem kiang ah tanchinhoih hon tun mi khat ka pe ding.
23041028	Ka et in leng mi himhim a-om kei ua; amau ka dot in leng, alak ua lemthei mi, thu khat leng dawng thei, kuamah himhim leng a-om kei uh.
23041029	En un, anasepte uh bangmah lou ahi a, thil om lou ahi; amilim sunte uh lah huih leh huihkhua lel ahi hi.
23042001	Ka sikha, ka let gige, ka tel, ka lung in apahtak mahmah en dih ua; atung ah ka kha ka koihta; Zentelte kiang a piak ding in vaihawmna thu ahong pawt ding.
23042002	Akikou kei ding a, a-aw asuaksak sam kei ding, kongzing ah a-aw akizasak sam kei ding.
23042003	Sialluang gawpsa akuaitan kei ding a, meikuang liakliak amitsak kei ding; thudik in vai ahawm zaw ding hi.
23042004	Leitung a vaihawmna a-omsak masiah, amah abah kei ding a, alungdong sam kei ding; tuikulh gamte'n adan thu angak nilouh ding uhi.
23042005	Pathian, Toupa , van siampa leh phalhpa, lei leh asung a kipan a pawt tengteng hihlianpa, atung a mite kiang a hatna pepa leh atung a paite kiang a kha pepa'n hichi in achi:
23042006	“Kei Toupa in diktatna in ka hon sam a, na khut ka len ding a, ka hon humbit ding, mite thukhun hi ding leh Zentelte hihvakpa hi ding in ka hon sep ding a;
23042007	mitdelte mit hihvak ding leh mitangte suangkul a kipan pikhe ding leh, mial lak a tute suangkul a pan pikhe ding in.
23042008	“ Toupa ka hi; huai ka min ahi; ka thupina midang kiang ah ka pe kei ding a, phat ka lohna leng milim bawltawmte kiang ah ka pe sam kei ding.
23042009	Ngai un, tuma thilte ahong tungta, thil thakte gen ka hi; apou ma in nang ka hon hilh hi.
23042010	Tuipi a hoh sukte leh asung a om tengteng leh tuikulh gamte leh, atung a om tengtengte aw, Toupa pahtawi in la thak sa unla, kawlmong a kipan in leng amah phatna la sa un.
23042011	Gamdai leh akhote'n a-aw uh suaksak uhen, Kedarte omna khuate'n; suangpi khua a omte'n nuamsa in la sa uhenla, mual dawn a kipan kikou uhen.
23042012	Toupa hih thupi uhenla, tuikulh gamte'n aphatna thu gen uhen.
23042013	Toupa lah mihat mahmah bang in apawt ding a, galdoumi bang in mullitna atokthou ding; akikou ding a, ahi, ngaihtak in akikou ding; amah doute tung ah hattak in agamtang ding.
23042014	Sawtpi ka daita a; ka om kinken in ka kidek teitei; tu'n zaw numei nauvei bang in ka kikou tuaituai ding a; ka nak honhon in ka nak huhu ding.
23042015	Tang leh mual pawngte ka hihse ding a, aniam tengteng ka keusak vek ding; luite tuikulh gam in ka bawl ding a, dilte ka kangsak ding.
23042016	“Mittawte atheih ngei louh lam uah ka pi ding a, atheih ngei louh uh lampi ah ka pi ding; ama uah mial vak in ka bawl ding a, lam kawinate leng ka tangsak ding. Huai thilte ka hih ding a, amau leng ka nuse kei ding.
23042017	Milim bawltawmte muang a, milim sunte kiang a, ka pathian uh na hi uh, chite kiheisak in a-om ding ua, nakpitak in azahlak ding uhi.”
23042018	Bilngongte aw, za un; mittawte aw, na muhtheihna ding un en un.
23042019	Ka sikha lou ngal kua mit ataw a? Ahihkeileh, ka sawltak sawl bang in kua bil angong a? Hon kithuahpih mi bang in kua mit ataw a? Toupa sikha bang in kua mit ataw a?
23042020	Thil tampi na mu a, himahleh na lungsim in na vom gige kei; abilte akihong a, himahleh aza kei hi.
23042021	Dan lah adiktatna ziak a letsak a pahtawisak a om Toupa'n hoih asa hi.
23042022	Himahleh hiaite zaw guta guksak leh loh tuak mite ahi ua; phaizang a ahi vek ua, suangkul a khummangte ahi ua; sal kaih ding ahi ua, kuamah in lah ahumbit ngal kei ua, gallak a lak ding ahi ua, kuamah in, “Pe nawn in!” achi kei uhi.
23042023	Na lak uah huaite bildoh ding kua na om ua? Hun hong tung ding a dia ngaikhia a za ding kua na om ua?
23042024	Kua'n ahia Jakobte gallak a lak ding a pia a, Israelte gutate kiang a pia? Toupa , atung a i khelhnapa un, apiak hilou hia? Ama lampi ah apai nuam ngal kei ua. Adan thu amang sam kei uhi.
23042025	Huaiziak in aheh mahmahna leh kibawlna tha amau tung ah asungbua a, huai in amaute akang a himahleh athei sam kei uh; huai in amaute ahul a, himahleh alungsim un angaihtuah tuan kei uhi.
23043001	Tu in zaw, Jakob aw, Toupa nou hon siampa leh, Israel aw, nang hon bawlpa'n, hichi in achi: Lau ke'n, ka hon tanta hi; na min in ka hon sam a, kei a na hi hi.
23043002	Tuite na ngah tan lai in na kiang ah ka om ding a; luite na ngah tan lai in leng ahon tum kei ding hi; mei a na pai tan lai in leng ahon hul kei ding a; meikuang in ahon liau kei ding hi.
23043003	Kei, Toupa na Pathian, Israelte Mi Siangthou, nang hon humbitpa ka hi ngal a; na tatna ding in Aigupta gam ka pia a, Ethiopia leh Seba gam na sik in ka pia hi.
23043004	Ka ngaih in manpha mahmah na hi a, mizahtakhuai mahmah leng na hi hi, it leng ka hon it ziak in, na sik in mite ka pe ding a, na hinna sik ding in michih ka pe ding hi.
23043005	Lau kei in, na kiang ah ka om ngal a; na suante suahlam a kipan ka hon pi ding a, tumlam a kipan ka hon pikhawm ding hi.
23043006	Mallam kiang ah, khah in, ka chi ding a; simlam kiang ah, len kei in, ka chi ding; ka tapate gamlapi a kipan hon pi inla, ka tanute kawlmong a kipan hon pi in;
23043007	Ka min po peuhmahte leh ka thupina ding a ka siam peuhmahte; amau ka bawl a, ahi, amau ka suktuahte ahi uhi.
23043008	Mit nei ngal a mittawte leh, bil nei ngal a nangongte, pikhia un.
23043009	Nam chih kikhawm uhenla, michih omkhawm uhen; alak ua kua ahia hiai gen thei a, tuma lam in thilte hon theisak thei? Siamtansak a a-omtheihna ding un apalaite uh hon pi uhen; ahihkeileh bil in za uhenla, thutak ahi, chi uhen.
23043010	“Noute ka theihpihtute na hi uh” Toupa'n achi; “Ka sikha ka mitelsate, kei amah ka hi chih thei a, na gintak ua, na theihsiamna ding un. Ka om ma in Pathian bawlkhiak in a-om kei a, ka om nung in leng a-om sam kei ding.
23043011	“Kei, kei mahmah, Toupa ka hi; keimah lou ngal hondampa a-om kei hi.
23043012	Ke'n ka gen a, ka hondam a, ka theisak a, na lak uah gamdang pathian a-om kei hi; huaiziak in noute ka palaite na hi uh, Toupa'n achi, kei Pathian ka hi.
23043013	Ahi, ni om nungsang kei amah ka hi; huchi in ka khut a kipan hunkhe thei kuamah a-om kei uh; nna ka sem a, kua'n ahia huai hei ding?
23043014	Toupa , nou hon tanpa, Israelte Mi Siangthou in hichi in achi: Nou ziak in Babulon ah sepaihte ka sawl a, huchi in avek un, Kaldaite, akipahna longpi uah taimang mi pi in ka pisuk ding.
23043015	Kei Toupa , na Mi Siangthou uh, Israelte Siampa, na Kumpipa uh ka hi,” chi in.
23043016	Tuipi a lampi bawlpa leh, tui thupi mahmahte a paina ding bawlpa, Toupa'n hichi in achi:
23043017	“Kangtalai leh sakol, sepaihte leh thilhihtheihna a pikhepa'n, huaite alumkhawm zengzung ua, athounawnta kei ding uh; achimit khin ua, khawnvak puan mihsak bang in mihsak in a-omta uh,” chi in.
23043018	Tuma lam thilte zaw theigige kei unla, nidanglai thilte ngaihtuah sam kei un.
23043019	Ngai un, thil thak ka hih ding; tua kipan in adawnkhe ding; huai na thei kei ding ua hia? Gamdai nangawn ah lampi ka bawl ding a, gamkeu ah leng luite ka bawl ding.
23043020	Gamsate'n leng hon pahtawi ding ua, sehalte, vasa ngawngsaute tan in; gamdai a tuite ka omsak ziak leh gamkeu a luite ka omsak ziak in, ka mi, ka telte kiang a dawn ding a piak ding.
23043021	Hiai mite kei a ding in ka bawl a; kei phatna ahihlang ding uhi.
23043022	Himahleh Jakobte aw, nou zaw na hon sam kei ua, Israelte aw, nou zaw nawn chimtak zawta uhi.
23043023	Haltum thillat gannoute na hon lak ngei kei ua; na kithoihnate un na hon pahtawi sam kei uh. Thillat in na ka hon semsak ngei kei a, begaw in ka hon hihgim ngei kei hi.
23043024	Kawltu dangka in na hon leisak ngei kei ua, na kithoihna thaute un na hon taisak ngei kei uh; na khelhnate uh puak nasepte na hon semsak ua, na tatleknate un na hon hihgim zawta uhi.
23043025	Kei, kei mahmah, keimah leh keimah ziak lel a, na tatlekna uh nulmangpa ka hi; na khelhnate uh leng ka theigige nawnta kei ding.
23043026	Hon theihpih un; ngaihtuah chiat ni; siamtansak a na omtheihna ding un na thu uh gen un.
23043027	Na pu masapen uh akhial a, na thugen mite uh leng ka tung ah atalek uhi.
23043028	Huaiziak in Mun Siangthou a miliante ka hihbuah ding a, huchi in Jakobte hamsethuak ding in ka bawl ding a; Israelte muhdah ding in ka bawl ding hi.
23044001	Tu in zaw, Jakobte, ka sikhate aw, ka tel Israelte aw, ngaikhia unla;
23044002	Toupa nou hon siampa, sul a pan nou hon bawlpa, nou hon panpih ding pa'n hichi in achi: “Ka sikha Jakob aw, ka tel nou Jeshurunte aw, lau kei un.
23044003	“Dangtakmi tung ah tui ka sung ding a, lei keu ah tui luangte ka sung ding; na suante uh tung ah ka kha ka sung ding a, na tate uh tung ah ka vualzawlna ka sung ding hi.
23044004	Huchi in amau, tui luanna kiang a singhiang kaite apou bang in, loupa lak ah apou ding uh.
23044005	“Mi khat in, Toupa a ka hi, achi ding a; midang Jakob min in akilou ding a; midang in akhut a, Toupa , chi a gelh in, Israel min abeh min in azang ding chi in,” achi hi.
23044006	Toupa , Israelte Kumpipa, amau tanpa sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Kei amasapen pa ka hi a, ananungpen pa ka hi; keimah lou ngal Pathian a-om kei hi.
23044007	Nidanglai a mite ka seh nungsang kei hih bang in kua'n asam dia, huaite kua'n agen dia, kua'n ahia kei sik a akizom zel a hihlang ding? Thil hong tung dingte leh hong om dingte gen hen.
23044008	Lau kei unla, kihta sam kei un; tuma lam in na kiang uah ka gen khin in ka hon theisak khin hilou hia? Noute ka palaite na hi uhi. Keimah lou Pathian a-om hiam? Ahi, Suangpi himhim a-om kei; khat lel leng a-om lam ka thei kei.”
23044009	Milim bawltawm bawl mite avek un huihkhua lel ahi ua; athil deihlam uh aphatuam kei ding; azahlakna ding un amau palaite un leng amu thei kei ua, atheithei kei uhi.
23044010	Kua'n ahia Pathian bawl? Ahihkeileh, kua'n ahia bangmah ding a phatuamloupi milim bawltawm sung?
23044011	Ngai in, apawlpi tengteng azahlak ding ua; nasem mite leng mihingte lak a mi ahi uh. Avek un kikhawm vek uhenla, dingh uhen; alau ding ua, azahlakkhawm ding uh.
23044012	Siksek in heipi asek zel a, meihol ah atholh a sek ding bang in asek a, aban hattak in asek zel; ahi, agil ahong kial a, atha ahong zoi zel; tui adawn kei a, abah nak hi.
23044013	Singlem bawlmi in khau akaigak a, pensil in ahi ding achiamteh a, nawt mamna in ahihdan ding abawl a, bem bawlna in ahi ding abawl a, mihing lim bang in abawl a, inn a om ding in mihing kilawmna bang in abawl zel hi.
23044014	Sidar singte akiphuk a, sesing leh tosaw ala a, gammang sing lak a khat amah tuam a om ding in ahihkip a; meilah sing asuan a, vuahtui in avak hi.
23044015	Huai nung in mi a ding a mei a khul ding ahita ding; huai a kipan in ala a, akihihlum zel; ahi, akuangsak a, tanghou ahai zel hi; ahi, pathian abawl a, abe zel hi; huai sing pen milim bawltawm ding in abawl a, huai bokkhup in abia hi.
23044016	Huai sing khenkhat mei ah akhul a; akhen sa nekna ding in azang a; sa a-em a, atai hi; ahi, meilum a-awi a, “Nuam e, ka lumta, mei mel ka muta e,” achi hi.
23044017	Aval pathian ding in abawl a, abawltawm milim mah; huai bokkhup a bia a, akiang ah athum a, “Hon hondam in, ka pathian lah na hi ngal a,” achi zel hi.
23044018	Athei kei ua, angaihtuah sam kei uh; ama'n lah amit uh amitsisakta ngal a; atheihsiamlouhna ding un alungtang uh leng akhaksakta hi.
23044019	Huchi in kuamah in atheikhe nawn kei ua, “Mei ah khenkhat ka khul a; ahi, a-am ah tanghou bang in ka hai a; sa leng ka em a, ka ne a; aval thilkihhuai ding in ka bawl ding hia? Sing a suak bokkhup in ka be ding hia? Hih ding in amau ah theihna leh theihsiamna a-om tuan kei hi.”
23044020	Vut kia ane zel a; alungtang khem a om in, ahinna akihumbit theihlouhna ding leh, “Ka khut taklam ah zuau a-om kei a hia?” achih theihlouhna ding in, amah akalsuansakta hi.
23044021	“Jakobte aw, huai thilte theigige un, Israelte aw, nou leng theigige un ka sikhate lah na hi ngal ua; kei bawl na hi ua; ka sikhate na hi uh; Israelte aw, ka mangngilh in na om kei ding uhi. Toupa , bangkim siamtu leh hondampa.
23044022	“Na tatleknate uh meipi hihmang bang in ka hihmangta a, na khelhnate uh mei hihmang bang in ka hihmang nalai hi; ka kiang ah hong kik nawn un, nou lah ka hon tanta ngal a,” chi in.
23044023	“Vante aw, nuamsatak in la sa un, Toupa'n lah huaite ahihta ngal a; lei nuailamte aw, kikou un, tangte aw, gamnuai leh asung a sing om chiteng aw, la sakhe guih un; Toupa'n Jakobte atanta a, Israelte ah akipahtawi ding hi.”
23044024	Toupa , noumau hon tanpa, sul a kipan noute hon bawlpa'n hichi in achi: “Kei zaw Toupa , thil tengteng siampa, keimah kia a van kaipalhpa, liansakpa ka hi; kua ahia ka kiang a om?
23044025	“Kei lah zuautheite chiamtehnate bangmah lou a bawl a, aisan siamte mihai a bawlpa, mipilte nunglam ngasak a, atheihna uh haihuai a bawlpa.
23044026	“Asikha thu hihkip a, apalaite lemtheih tangtungsakpa, Jerusalem tungthu a, ‘Huai ah mi a-om nawn ding uh, chipa leh Judah gam kho tungthu a, Bawl in a-om nawn chiat ding uh, asiatna lailai ka bawl nawn ding,’ chipa.
23044027	“Tui thuk mahmah kiang a, ‘Kangtat in, na luite leng ka kangtatsak ding,’ chipa.
23044028	“Kura tungthu a, ‘Amah zaw ka belamchingpa ahi a, Jerusalem tungthu ah, Bawl in a-om nawn ding,’ chih leh tempul kiang ah, ‘Na suangphum lep in a-om nawn ding, chi khop hial in ka deihlam tengteng a hih ding,’ chipa ka hi,” chi in.
23045001	Toupa'n athaunilh, Kura, namte ama a phukpai ding leh, kumpipate kawnggakte phelsak ding a, ama a kongkhakte honsak ding leh, kulh kongkhakte khak louh a omsak dingpa, akhut taklam ka letpa kiang ah, hichi in achi:
23045002	“Kei na ma ah ka pai ding a, aphok lailai ka kibangsak ding; dal kongkhak ka hihse vek ding a, akalhna siktawnte ka tansak ding;
23045003	Toupa , na min a hon sampa, Israel' Pathian ka hi chih na theihtheihna ding in mial lak a goute ka hon pe ding a, mundai a sum selte leng ka hon pe ding.
23045004	Jakob ka sikhate leh Israel ka telte ziak in na min in ka hon sam a; hon thei ngei kei mah lechin na min ka hon phuahsak hi.
23045005	Keimah Toupa ka hi, adang himhim a-om kei; keimah lou ngal Pathian a-om kei; hon thei ngei kei mah lechin na tai ka hon gaksak ding hi.
23045006	Keimah lou ngal adang a-om kei chih nisuahna lam a kipan leh tumlam a kipan atheihtheihna ding un; kei Toupa ka hi, adang himhim a-om kei.
23045007	Vak ka bawl a, mial leng ka bawl hi; kituahna ka bawl a, siatna leng ka bawl hi; kei zaw Toupa , huchibang thilte hih zelpa ka hi,” chi in.
23045008	Vante aw, tunglam a kipan takkhesak un, van dumte'n diktatna sungsuk uhen; hotdamna adotkhiak theihna ding un lei kihong henla, diktatna toh poukhawm hen; kei, Toupa'n huaite ka siam ahi.
23045009	Amah bawlpa kinakpihmi tung agik hi! Bellei in avel mi kiang ah, “Bang a hon bawl na hia?” achi dia hia? Ahihkeileh, nna na sep in, “Akhut in siam anei kei?” achi dia hia?
23045010	Apa kiang a, “Bang chi suang na hia?” chimi tung hiam, anu kiang a, “Bang toh ahia na hinkhiak ding?” chimi tung agik hi!
23045011	Toupa , Israelte Mi Siangthou, amau Bawlpa'n hichi in achi: “Thil hong tung ding thu hon dong unla; ka tapate leh ka khut nasepte ah thu hon pia un.
23045012	Leitung ka bawl a, atung a mihing omte leng ka siam hi; keimah in ka khut ngei in, van ka kaipalh a, asepaihte thu ka pia hi.
23045013	Kura diktatna nei in ka dingsak a, alampite teng ka tangsak ding; ama'n ka khopi abawl nawn ding a, atatna man uh deih ziak in hilou in, kipahman deih ziak leng hilou in, ka salte apawtsak ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi,” chi in.
23045014	Toupa'n hichi in achi, Aigupta semgimte leh Ethiopia sumsinmi leh Saviate misang pipite na kiang uah ahong pai ding ua, nou a ding in a-om ding ua; nou ahon zui ding ua; khainiang bun in ahi ahong pai ding uh; huchi in bokkhup in, Pathian noumau ah a-om hi; adang himhim a-om kei, pathian dang himhim a-om kei, chi in ahong thum ding uhi.
23045015	Israel' Pathian aw, Hondampa, Pathian kisel nakpa na hi ngut hi.
23045016	Zahlaktak in a-om ding ua, ahi, avek un zumtak in a-om ding uh; milim bawl mite zumna ah alut ding uh.
23045017	Israelte bel tangtawn hotdamna a Toupa hotdam in a-om ding uh; tangtawn in na zahlak kei ding ua, na zumsak kei ding uhi.
23045018	Toupa van siampa'n, amah Pathian, lei bawl a siampa ahi; ama'n lei akipsak a, bangmah lou ding in abawl kei a, mihing omna ding in abawl a, hichi in achi ngal a; Kei Toupa ka hi; adang a-om kei.
23045019	Aguk in, mun mial ah, thu ka gen ngei kei a; Jakob suante kiang ah bangmah lou ding in hon zong un, ka chi ngei kei; kei Toupa'n diktatna thu ka gen zel a, thudik mahmahte ka gen zel hi.
23045020	Kikhawm unla hong pai un; namte lak a gawtna pelte aw, hong pai nai chiat un; asing milim bawltawm tawi a, mi hondam theiloupi pathian kiang a thum zelte'n theihna himhim anei kei uh.
23045021	Gen unla, hon pawtkhesak un; ahi, kidong uhenla; nidanglai a kipan kua'n ahia theisak? Huai hun lai a kipan kua'n ahia gen? Kei Toupa'n ka hih ahi kei maw? Keimah lou ngal Pathian dang a-om kei; Pathian diktat leh hondampa ka hi; keimah lou ngal adang a-om kei.
23045022	“Kawlmong a mi tengteng aw, kei lam hong nga unla, hotdam in om un; kei lah Pathian ka hi ngal a, adang himhim a-om kei.
23045023	Khuk chih ka ma ah akhukdin ding ua, lei chih in leng ka kiang ah kichiam in thu achiam ding chi in kei-le-kei kilou in ka kichiamta, thu lah diktatna in ka kam a kipan in apawtta a, ahong kik nawnta kei ding.
23045024	“Mi'n, Toupa kia ah diktatna leh hatna a-om, chi in ka tanchin agen ding ua; amah kiang ah mi ahong pai ding ua, atung a lungkim lou tengteng zahlaktak in a-omta ding uh.
23045025	Israel suan tengteng Toupa ah ahi, siamtansak a a-om ua, Toupa asuan ding uh,” chi in.
23046001	Bel akun a, Nebo akihihniam a; amilimte gamsa leh gan tung ah ana omta ua; na thil vakpihte uh vanpuak abawl ua, gamsa bah a ding in van puakgik dia bawl ahi lel hi.
23046002	Ana kihihniam un, ana kun chiat ua, van puakgik lah ahumbit thei ngal kei ua, amau mah sal a pi in a-om zawta uhi.
23046003	Jakob inkuanpihte leh, Israel inkuanpihte lak a khosuaksun tengteng aw, gil a kipan ka hon puak a, sul a pan a ka kithuahpihte aw, ka thu ngaikhia un.
23046004	Tekkun a na om tanpha un leng amah ka hi ding a, na lu ua kelsam apou vek hun chiang in leng ka hon pom ding hi; ke'n ka bawl a, kei mahmah in ka po ding; ahi, ke'n ka pom ding a, ka humbit ding.
23046005	Kibang a seh ka hihna ding un kua toh na hon teh a, kua kimpih in na hon bawl a, kua toh ahia na hon teh ding?
23046006	Zaip a kipan dangka-eng bungkhe zel dangka bukna a buk zelte'n, dangka-eng sekmi achial ua, ama'n huai pathian in abawl a, huchi in abokkhup ua, ahi, abe zel uhi.
23046007	Aliangzang uah apua ua, apaipih ua, a-omna a kipan asuan nawn kei ding; ahi, min amah asam ding ua, himahleh adawng thei kei ding, amangbatna ua kipan ahunkhe thei kei ding hi.
23046008	Talek mite aw, huai theigige unla, kipasalsak unla, theikhe nawn un,
23046009	Nidang a thil masate theigige un; kei Pathian ka hi a, adang a-om kei; kei Pathian ka hi, kei bang a-om kei;
23046010	Ke'n atawpna ding uh atung a kipan in ka gen a; pha ka sak adingsuak ding a, ka deihlam tengteng ka hih vek ding, ka chi hi;
23046011	Suahlam a kipan vasa duhgawl, khopi gamlapi a pan in ka miseh ka sam ding a; ahi, ka genta, ka tangtungsak ding; ka na tumta, ka hih ding.
23046012	Lungsim ki-uangsak, diktatna toh kigamlate aw, ka thu ngaikhia un;
23046013	Ka diktatna ka hon tawi nai a, gamla ah a-om kei ding, ka hotdamna in leng sawt ahal kei ding; huchi in ka thupina Israelte a ding in hotdamna Zion ah ka koih ding.
23047001	Babulon tanu nungak siangthou aw, hong suk inla, leivui ah tu in; Kaldai tanu aw, laltutphah tel lou in lei lak ah tu in; awm nou leh nuamsa hon chi nawn lou ding uhi.
23047002	Buh gawizanna suangte la inla, tangbuang bawl in; na kikhuhna puan koih inla, na tentual lem inla, na khe hong inla, luite ngap galkah in.
23047003	Na vuaktanna khuh louh in a-om ding a, ahi, na zahmoh adawk ding; phu ka la ding a, mi kuamah ka kithuahpih kei ding.
23047004	Ahon tanpa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa ahi, Israelte Mi Siangthou.
23047005	Kaldai tanu aw, dai dide in tu inla, mial nuai ah lut in, Gam chih lalnu hon chita kei ding uh Toupa'n achi.
23047006	Ka mite tung ah ka heh a, ka goutan ka hihthanghuai a, na khut ah ka hon pia hi; nang atung uah zahngaihna na langsak kei a; tek lamte tung ah nangawn ah na hakkol giktak na nga ahi.
23047007	Kei tangtawn in lalnu ding in ka om ding, na chi a; huchi in huai thilte na lungsim in na ngaihtuah kei a, atawpna ding na theigige sam kei hi.
23047008	Huchi in nang nuamtat a om, awlmoh nei lou a om, lungsim a, “Keimah ka hi, keimah lou midang a-om kei, meithai in ka tu kei ding a, tate tan thu ka thei sam kei ding,” chinu, hiai thei in;
23047009	Hiai thil nih, tate tanna leh meithaina in, ni khat thu in mitphiat kal lou in ahon pha ding a; na bumna zatna tamngial in, na kivenna tamkuam mahleh, huaite nakpitak in na tung ah ahong tung ding hi.
23047010	Na gitlouhna muang a; “Kuamah in hon mu kei uh,” na chi vial ngal a; na pilna leh na theihna in hon hihsia hi; na lungsim in, “Keimah ka hi, kei lou midang a-om kei,” na chi behlap hi.
23047011	Huaiziak in thil hoih lou na tung ah ahong tung ding a; na vengsiam kei ding; vangtahna in ahon buak ding a; huai na hihmang thei kei ding; siatna leng thakhat in na tung ah hong tung guih ding a; huai na theikhol kei ding.
23047012	Na kikauna leh bumna na zatna, valnou na hih a kipan a na kisukgimnate, dinpih inla; na phattuampih theih ding phot a, na zohpih theih ding photleh.
23047013	Na lemtheihna atam mahmah ziak in na gimta hi; tu in van thu theite, aksi en mite, kha teng a thugenkhol mite ding uhenla, na tung a thil hong tung dingte lak a kipan in hon hong uhen.
23047014	Ngai in, buhpawl bang lel ahi ding ua; mei in akang ding; meikuang thilhihtheihna lak a kipan akihumbit kei ding uh; hihlumna ding meihol bang ahi kei ding a, awi ding mei bang ahi sam kei ding.
23047015	Huchibang in na kihihgim nakna thilte nang a ding in a-om ding uhi; na naupan nou a kipan a na lak a sumsin mite amau lampi chiat ah avakmang ding ua; hon humbit ding kuamah himhim a-om kei ding uh.
23048001	Aw Jakob inkuan, Aw Israel min kikoppih, Judah tuite a pan a pawt, thutak hilou, diktatna ah hi sam lou, Toupa min lou a kichiam a, Israel' Pathian min lou zelte aw, hiai ngaikhia un.
23048002	Khopi siangthou a mi akichi ngal ua, Israel' Pathian tung ah ginna anga ua; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
23048003	Atung a kipan in thil masate ka gen a; ahi, ka kam a kipan in apawt a, ka theisak a; thakhat in ka tangtungsak guih a, ahong tung hi.
23048004	Migenhak na hi uh, na ngawng uh sik tha ahi, na tal uh dal ahi chih ka theih ziak in,
23048005	Nidanglai a kipan na kiang uah ka genta; ahong tun ma in na kiang uah ka hon theisakta hi; huchi lou in zaw, “Ka milim in ahih ahi, ka milim bawltawm leh ka milim sun in thu apiak ahi,” na chi kha ding uh.
23048006	“Na zata uh, hiaite tengteng en un, noumau na genta kei ding ua hia? Tua kipan in thil thak ka hon theisak ding a, thil kisel na theih ngeilouhte uh.
23048007	Huaite nidanglai a siam hilou in, tu a siam ahi; tuni ma in na bil un na za ngei kei uh; huchi lou in zaw, ‘Ngai in, huaite i theihsa ahi, na chi kha ding uh.’
23048008	Ahi, na bil un na za ngei kei ua; ahi, na lungsim un na thei ngei kei uh, ahi, nidanglai a kipan in na bil uh hon in a-om ngei kei him hi; lepchiahtak in na hih zel uh chih leh, sul a kipan in talek mi ahon chi him uh chih lah ka thei ngal a.
23048009	“K'on hihmanlouhna ding in ka min ziak in ka hehna ka hawi lai ding a, phat ka lohna ding in na tung uah ka kidek ding.
23048010	Ngai un, ka hon hihsiang ahi, himahleh dangka hihsiang bang in ahi kei; haksatna haltuina mei ah ka hon chian hi.
23048011	Kei leh kei ziak in, ahi, kei leh kei ziak lel in ahi ka hih ding; bang ding in ka min suksiat in a-om dia? Ka thupina midang kiang ah ka pe kei ding.
23048012	“Jakob leh ka sap Israel aw, ka thu ngaikhia un; kei amah ka hi; amasapen ka hi, ananungpen leng ka hi.
23048013	Ahi, ka khut in lei kingakna aphum a, ka khut taklam in avante akaipalh a; ka saptak in adingkhawm zel uh.
23048014	“Noute aw, kikhawm unla, ngaikhia un; alak uah kua'n hiai thil agen dia? Toupa'n amah a-it a; ama'n Babulon tung ah adeihlam ahih ding a, Kaldaite tung ah aban lik in a-om ding.
23048015	Kei, keimah ngei in, thu ka genta; ahi, amah ka sam a, ka pi a, alampi alamzangsak ding.
23048016	Noute'n hon naih unla, hiai ngaikhia un; atung a kipan in asim in thu ka gen ngei kei; a-om tung lai a kipan in huai ah ka om; tu in Toupa Pathian in keimah leh ama Kha hon sawlta hi.”
23048017	Toupa , nou hon tanpa, Israelte Mi Siangthou in hichi in achi: “Kei, Toupa na Pathian uh, na hoihna ding ua hon chilpa, na paina ding lampi ua hon pipa ka hi.”
23048018	“Aw noute'n ka thupiakte na ngaikheta hi le uchin, na tung ua lemna lui bang mai a om ding a, na diktatna uh tuipi kihawtte bang mai a om ding hiven maw;
23048019	Na suante uh piaunel zah pha ding ua, na gil ua gahte leng piaunel mal neu chikchik zah a pha ding ua; amin uh ka ma a kipan thaimang in a-om kei ding, hihman in leng a om sam kei ding,” chi in.
23048020	“Babilon a kipan pawt unla, Kaldaite taimangsan un; hiai lasak husa in genzak in, hilh unla, kawlmong pha in gingsak un, Toupa'n asikha Jakobte atanta!” chi un.
23048021	Gamdai a api lai in adangtak kei ua; suangpi a pan in amaute a ding in tuite aluangkhesak a; suangpi aphelkhap a, huchi in tui ahong pawtkhia hi.
23048022	“ Toupa'n , mithulimloute a ding in muanna himhim a-om kei,” achi hi.
23049001	Tuikulh a gamte aw, ka thu ngaikhia unla, gamlapi a michih aw, ngaikhia un; Toupa'n sul a kipan ahon sap ka hi; ka nu gilsung a pan in ka min agenta hi.
23049002	Ka kam namsau hiam bang in abawl a, akhut ah ahon sel a; thal nawttet vilvel in hon bawl a, athalbawm ah ahon khum a;
23049003	Ka kiang ah, “Nang zaw ka sikha na hi; Israel pahtawi a ka omna ding na hi,” achi a.
23049004	Ke'n bel, “Athawn in ka semgim a, bangmah lou ding leh huihkhua lel ding in ka thapai; himahleh pel lou in ka tung a vaihawmna ding Toupa kiang ah ahi a-om, hon ditna ding leng ka Pathian kiang ah ahi a-om,” ka chi a.
23049005	Huan tu in Toupa , Jakobte akiang a pi nawnna ding leh Israelte akiang a pikhawm a a-omna ding un, asikha a om ding a sul a kipan a hon bawlpa'n agen, Toupa mitmuh in mizahtakhuai ka hi ngal a, ka Pathian ka hatna ahi behlap hi.
23049006	Ahi, ama'n, “Jakob namte tundinna ding leh Israelte lak a humbitte a-omsak nawnna ding in, ka sikha a na om zaw, thil neuchik mahmah ahi lai; Zentelte vaksakpa ding in ka hon sep ding, kawlmong pha a hondampa dia na omtheihna ding in,” achi a.
23049007	Toupa , Israelte tanpa leh a Mi Siangthou un, mite muhsitpa, namte kih tuntun, vaihawmte sikha kiang ah hichi in achi: “Muanhuai Toupa , Israelte Mi Siangthou, nang hon telpa ziak in Kumpipate'n amu ding ua, athou ding uh; miliante'n amah abe ding uh,” chi in.
23049008	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hun kipahhuai ah ka hon dawng a, hotdamna ni ah ka hon panpih hi; ka hon hawi ding a, mipite thukhunna ding in ka hon pe ding, lei dingkipsak a, gouluah nutsiatsa luahsak ding in;
23049009	Suangkul tangte kiang a, Pawt un, mial a omte kiang a, Hong kilang un, na chih theihna ding in. Lampite ah ane zel ding ua, tang sang mai pengpongte ah atatna mun uh a-om ding hi.
23049010	Agilkial un adangtak kei ding ua; kholum a bawlgim in ni in leng ahai sam kei ding hi; amaute itpa in api ding a, tui nak nei kiang ah api ding hi.
23049011	“Huchi in ka tang tengteng lampi ding in ka bawl ding a, ka lamliante leng sansak in a-om ding uh.
23049012	En in, hiaite gamlapi a kipan in ahong pai ding ua; en in hiaite mallam a kipante, tumlam a kipante in ahong pai ding uh; Sinim gam a kipan in ahong pai ding uhi.”
23049013	Vante aw, nuamtak in la sa un; lei aw, nuamsa in om in; tangte aw, la sakhe guih un; Toupa'n lah amite alungmuan ngal a, a mi haksa thuakte leng ahehpih ding hi.
23049014	Himahleh Zion in, “Jehovah in ahon paisan a, Toupa'n ahon mangngilhta,” achi hi.
23049015	“Numei in atapa, agilgah ngei, hehpihlouhna ding in anau nawi ne lai amangngilh thei a hia! Thei e, huaite'n zaw amangngilh uh ahi thei, himahleh ke'n zaw ka hon mangngilh kei ding hi.
23049016	En in, ka khutpek ah ka hon gelh a; na kulhbaangte ka ma ah a-om gige hi.
23049017	Na tate akin ua, hon hihmang mite leh hon hihse mite'n ahon pawtsan ding uh.
23049018	Dak inla, en vialvial inla, en in; hiai tengteng akikhawm ua, na kiang ah ahong pai uhi. Kei ka hin bang in, nang pahtawina kisilh bang in hiaite na kisilh a, mou akigak bang in hiaite in na kigak ngei ding,” Toupa'n achi.
23049019	“Na mun sia leh nutsiatsate leh na gam hihmansa thu zaw tu in a-omte a ding in na neu lota ngeingei ding a, nang hon valhte gamlapi ah a-omta ding uh.
23049020	Na ta mansak nung a na ta neih nawnte'n, ‘Kei a ding in mun aneu lua a; ka omna ding in mun hon pia in,’ chi in na bil ah ahon gen ding uh.
23049021	Huchi in nang na lungsim in: ‘Hiaite kua'n hon suaksak ua eita? Ka tate ka mangsak a, keimah kia sal a vialvak ka hi a; huchi in hiaite kua'n akem ua eita? Ngai in, keimah kia a nutsiat in ka om ngal a, hiaite koi a na om uh ahia? na chi ding,’ ” chi in.
23049022	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai in, namte a ding a khut zak in, michih a ding in ka chiamtehna ka takkhe ding; huchi in na tapate angpom in na kiang ah ahon pi ding ua, na tanute leng liangkolou a suan a pi in a-om ding uh.
23049023	Kumpipate na tate donpate ahi ding ua, kumpinute na tate donnute ahi ding uh; amau amai ua lei si in ahon be ding ua, na khe a leivui aliak ding uh; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei mai ding, hon ngak mite zahlak in a-om kei ding uh.
23049024	“Gallakte mihattak a kipan suh a om in, sal lauhuaite hotkhiak in a-om ding uam?”
23049025	Om na ke, Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Mihattak salte suh in a-om ding ua, milauhuai gallakte hotkhiak in a-om ding; nang hon doute dou ding ka hi ngal a, na tate leng ka hondam ding hi.
23049026	Nang hon simmohte amau sa ka nesak ding; uain khum kham bang in amau sisan akham ding uh; huchi in mi tengteng in, kei Toupa nangmah Hondampa leh nangmah Tanpa, Jakob Mihat ka hi chih, athei ding uh,” chi in.
23050001	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Na nu uh makna lai, ka makna, koi a om ahia? Ahihkeileh, ka leibatnate akua pen kiang ah ahia ka hon zuaktak? Ngai un, na thulimlouhnate uh ziak a na nu uh mak a om ahi.
23050002	“Bangziak in ahia ka hong pai a mi himhim a-om louh uh? Bangziak in ahia ka sap a hon dawng ding a-om louh uh? Ka khut hotdam theih louh ding in tomsak in a-om himhim a hia? Ahihkeileh, humbit ding in thilhihtheihna ka nei kei a hia? Ngai un, ka salhna in tuipi ka kangsak a, luipite gamkeu in ka bawl hi; tui himhim a-om louh ziak in angasate a-uih ua, dangtak in asi uh.
23050003	“Van mial in ka thuam a, akhuhna ding in sai-ip puan ka bawl zel,” chi in.
23050004	Mi gimtak thu a ka tawldamsak siamna ding in sinsakte lei Toupa Pathian in ahon pia; ama'n zingsang teng a phawng in, sinsakte atheih bang ua thei ding in ka bil aphawng zel.
23050005	Toupa Pathian in ka bil ahon vangsak a, kei zaw ka hel kei, ka lehngat sam kei hi.
23050006	Ka nungzang sat mite ka doh a, ka biang mul bot mite ka doh hi; zahlakna ah leh chilsiatna ah ka mai ka sel kei.
23050007	Toupa Pathian in ahon panpih ding a; huaiziak in ka zum kei a; huaiziak in meisah suang bang in ka nga zel a, ka zahlak kei ding chih ka thei.
23050008	Siam hon tangsakpa anai hi; kua'n ahia hon dou ding? Dingkhawm ni ung; hon dou kua ahia? Hon naih mah hen aw.
23050009	Ngai in, Toupa Pathian in hon panpih ding; kua'n ahia siam louh hon tangsak ding? Ngai in, huaite puansilh bang in alui ding ua, kausi in anese ding.
23050010	Na lak ua, Toupa kihta a, asikha thu mang, kua ahia? Mial nuai a khosa, vakna himhim nei lou in Toupa min muang henla, a Pathian ah kinga hen.
23050011	Mei toh a, mei-ekte a ki-umte aw, ngai un; na meikuang uah leh na mei-ek halte uh lak ah vak un. Hiai ka khut a kipan a na muh ding uh ahi hi; lungkhamtak a na lupna ding uh.
23051001	Diktatna delh mite, “Nou, Toupa zong mite aw, ka thu ngaikhia un: noute sekna suangpi lam leh noute tohkhiakna kokhuk lam en un.
23051002	Na pu uh Abraham lam leh noute hon suangnu Sarah lam en un; khat kia ahih lai in ka sam a, ka vualzawl a, mi tampi ding in ka bawlta hi.
23051003	“Na Toupa'n Zion alungmuanta ngal a; amun sesate tengteng alungmuan a, Eden bang in agamdai abawl a, agamkeu leng Toupa huan bang in abawl hi; huai ah kipahna leh nopsaknate, kipahthu genna leh lasak husate a-om ding hi.
23051004	“Ka mite aw, ka thu ngaikhia unla; ka namte aw, ka thu bil na doh un; kei a pan in dan thu ahong pawt ding a, michih vakna ding in ka vaihawmna ka kipsak ding.
23051005	Ka diktatna anai a, ka hotdamna apawtta, ka bante'n michih vai ahawmsak ding, tuikulh gamte'n ahon ngak ding ua, ka ban amuang ding uh.
23051006	Van lam ah daktou unla, nuailam ah lei en un; van meikhu bang in azammang ding a, puansilh bang in leitung alui ding, asung a omte huchibang in asi ding uh; ka hotdamna bel tangtawn in a-om ding, ka diktatna leng hihman in a-om kei ding.
23051007	“Diktatna theimi, ka dan thu lungtang a pai mite aw, ka thu ngaikhia un; mihing gensiatna lau kei unla, ahon tainate uh ziak in lunghimoh kei un.
23051008	Sim in puansilh anekgawp vek bang in, amaute anegawp vek ding, nget in samul anek bang in, amaute ane ding; ka diktatna tangtawn in a-om ding a, ka hotdamna suan tengteng tan in a-om ding.
23051009	“Aw Toupa ban aw, halh inla, hatna kisilh in; nidanglai a, tang a suante om lai a na halh bang in halh in. Nang Rahab satzanpa, dragon sunpa na hi kei a hia?
23051010	Nang tuipi, tui thuk zapi tui kangsakpa, tatsate paisuakna lampi ding a tuipi taw bawlsakpa na hi kei a hia?
23051011	Toupa tatsate akik nawn ding ua, la sa kawm in Zion atung ding ua; tangtawn a kipahna alutung uah a-omta ding; kipahna leh nopsakna amu ding ua, lungkhamna leh mauna amangta ding.
23051012	“Kei, kei mahmah, nou lungmuanpa ka hi; si ding mihing kihta ding, loupa bang a bawl ding mihing tapa kihta ding nang kua hi na hia;
23051013	Na Toupa nang hon Bawlpa, van kaipalh a lei kingaknate phumpa, mangngilh a, nuaisiahmi hihse ding a angim lai hehna ziak lel a nitum a lau? Nuaisiah mi hehna koi a om ahita a?
23051014	Sal pimang kintak a khah in a-om ding a, suangkul ah asi kei dia, an nek ding atasam kei ding hi.
23051015	“Kei na Toupa na Pathian, tuipi kihot ging honhonte khen a tuipi tokletpa ka hi ngal a; ka min sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
23051016	Van ka kaihpalh a, lei kingaknate ka phum theih a, Zionte kiang a, ka mite na hi uh, ka chih theihna ding in ka thute na kam ah ka koih a, ka khut in ka hon hum hi.
23051017	Jerusalem aw, Na Toupa khut a kipan ahehna nou dawnnu, halh inla, thou in; nang hoihoina nou a anengte na dawn a, na dawn siang sipsip hi.
23051018	Atapa suan tengteng lak a pi ding kuamah a-om kei ua; atapa vaklet teng lak ah akhut a len kuamah a-om kei uh.
23051019	“Hiai thil nihte'n ahon phat ahi; kua'n ahon kahpih ding ua? Gamna leh siatna leh kial, leh namsau; bangchi in ka hon lungmuan diam aw?
23051020	Na tapate abah ua, sathak len a awk bang in, kongzing lu lam ah alum uhi; Toupa hehna leh na Pathian salhna in adim uhi.
23051021	“Huaiziak in nang hihgentheih leh uain kham hilou a mi kham, hiai za in.
23051022	Na Toupa Jehovah, na Pathian, amite thu genpihpa'n, hichi in achi, ‘Ngai in, hoihoina nou, ka hehna nou belhbu ngei, na khut a kipan ka lakheta; na dawn nawnta kei ding,’
23051023	Huchi in nang hon hihgentheite khut ah ka koih ding; amau na hinna kiang ah, ‘K'on tot ding un bokkhup un,’ achi uh; huchi in atawn mite kiang ah na nungzang lei leh kongzing bang in na doh,” chi in.
23052001	Zion aw, halh in, halh in, na hatna silh in; Jerusalem aw, khopi siangthou, na puansilh kilawmtakte silh in; tuban zeksum louh leh minin na sung ah alutta kei ding uh.
23052002	Jerusalem aw, na tung a bang leivui sing in; thou inla, tu in; Zion tanu aw, sal a om, na ngawng gaknate phel in.
23052003	Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a: “Bangmah lou a zuak na hi ua; huchi in dangka lou a tat na hita ding uh,” chi in.
23052004	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ka mite atung in Aigupta gam a om ding in apaisuk ua; Assuria mite'n athu-ala bei in anuaisiah uhi.
23052005	Tu a, ke'n hiai a bang ahia ka neih?” “Ka mite bangmah lou in pimang in a-om ua,” Toupa'n achi. Atung ua vaihawmte nuam in a-awng ua, Toupa'n achi, “Ni tumtum in ka min gensiat in a-om hi.
23052006	Huaiziak in ka mite'n ka min athei ding uh; huai ni in agenpa ka hi chih athei ding ua; ngai in, keimah ka hi,” chi in.
23052007	Tangte a tanchinhoih tun a, lemna thu tangkoupih a, thil hoih tanchinhoih tun a, hotdamna thu tangkoupih a, Zion kiang a, “Na Pathian kumpi in atu,” chimi khe akilawm hi!
23052008	Ngai in! na galvil mite'n aw suah in, nuamsatak in la asa chiat uh; Toupa Zion a ahong kik nawn chiang a kimaituah a mu ding ahi ngal ua.
23052009	Jerusalem mun sesate aw, nuam sakhe guih unla, nuamsatak in la sa un; Toupa'n amite alungmuanta a, Jerusalem atanta hi.
23052010	Toupa'n nam chih mitmuh in aban siangthou alemta; huchi in kawlmong a mi tengteng in i Pathian hotdamna amu ding uh.
23052011	Pawt un, pawt un, huai a kipan in pawt un, thilnin himhim lawng kei un; asung a kipan paikhia un; Toupa belsuan tawite aw, siangthoutak in om un.
23052012	Kintak in na paikhe kei ding ua, taikek in na pai sam kei ding uh; Toupa'n na ma uh pi ding ahi ngal a; Israel' Pathian na nungdal uh ahi ding hi.
23052013	Ngai in, ka sikha in piltak in ahih ding, pahtawi leh tawisang in a-om ding a, sangpi in a-om ding.
23052014	Mi tampi'n lamdang honsak bang un, amel mihing mel sang in asesak zaw a, apiandan lah mihing tate piandan sang mah ahihsiat in a-om.
23052015	Huchi in ama'n nam tampi tung ah sisan atheh ding; Kumpipate'n amah lak ah akam uh achih ding uh; akiang ua gen ngei louh amu ding ua; bil a azak ngei louh uh angaisiam ding uhi.
23053001	I thugen uh kua'n agingta a? Toupa khut kua kiang ah ahia akihil?
23053002	Ama ah thilpou noutak bang in amah lah adawnkhia a, lei keu a pan zung bang in akhangkhia hi; piandan hoihna leh mel kilawmna himhim anei kei a; amah i muh un amah i deihna ding un kilawmna himhim a-om kei hi.
23053003	Amah mihingte muhsit leh deih louh in a-om a; dahnate neimi leh natna thei mi ahi a; amah lak a i mai uh sel bang i hi ua, muhsit in a-om a, e'n lah amah i ngaisang tuan kei uhi.
23053004	Ama'n i natnate pua in, i dahnate leng apo ngei a; himahleh e'n bel dahna khu, Pathian vuak, hihgentheih in i bawl ngal ua.
23053005	Ahih hang in i tatleknate ziak in amah liam in a-om a, i thulimlouhnate ziak in vuak sidup in a-om a; i lungmuanna ding in atung ah sawina akia a; avuakna golhte a hihdam in i omta hi.
23053006	I vek un belam bang in i vakmang ua; eimah lampi tuam chiat uah i pialta uh; Toupa'n amah tung ah i vek ua thulimlouhna angata hi!
23053007	Amah nuaisiah in a-om a, himahleh akingainiam a, akam aka kei; belamnou goh ding api uh bang leh, belam amulmet mite ma a adai dide bang mai in; ahi, akam aka kei hi.
23053008	Nuaisiahna leh vaihawmna a lakmang in a-om a; adam tonpihte'n houh kua'n ahia mihing gam a kipan hihman a a-om ngaihtuah mahmah? Ka mite tatlekna ziak a dahna khu ahih.
23053009	Huan hiamgam ahih ngei kei a, akam ah zekhemna om ngei kei mahleh, ahan migiloute kiang ah asehsak ua, asih nung in mihausa kiang ah a-om hi.
23053010	Toupa'n , amah vuak sidup a-ut him ahi; adahsakta ngei a; ahinna khelhna a dia thillat ding a na zat peuhpeuh chiang in, achisuan amuta ding a, adamsung nite asausak ding, Toupa deihlam akhut ah lohching in a-om ding hi.
23053011	Akha nauvei gim gah amu ding a, alungkimta ding; ka sikha diktattak in atheihna in mi tampi'n siam atang ding ua, athulimlouhnate uh apuaksak ding.
23053012	Huaiziak in miliante tantuan amah ka hawm ding a, gallak sumte ama'n mihatte ahawm sam ding hi; ahinna pen si khop hial a asunbuak a, talekte lak a simtel a a-om ziak in; himahleh mi tampi khelhna apua a, talekte athumsak hi.
23054001	“Aw chiing, nang ta nei ngei lou, nuamsatak in la sa in; nang, nauvei ngei lou, la sakhe guih in, kikoukhia in; pasal neimi tate sang in lunglengnu tate lah atamzaw ngal ua,” Toupa'n achi.
23054002	Na puanin mun kek in, na omnate puanin tung kaipalh in; chil ke'n; na khaute sausak inla, na kaihgakna khette kipsak in.
23054003	Taklam leh veilam ah na dalhzak sin ngal a; huchi in na chisuante'n namte' gou aluah ding ua, khopi loih sa nungte ah mi a-omsak nawn ding uh.
23054004	“Lau ke'n, na zahlak kei ding; zum sam ke'n, zahlak in na om sin kei hi; na tuailai zahlakna na mangngilh in, na meithaina minsiatna na theigigeta kei ding hi.
23054005	Nang hon bawlpa na pasal ahi a; amin sepaihte' Toupa , Israelte Mi Siangthou nang hon tanpa ahi; amah leitung pumpi Pathian achi ding uh.
23054006	“Zi mak lungsim a lungkhamtak, tuailai zi khensa, paihsa nung sap nawn bang in Toupa'n nang ahon sam ahi, na Pathian in achi hi.
23054007	Mitphiat kal lel ka hon ma a; himahleh hehpihna thupitak in ka hon pi nawn ding.
23054008	Ka heh dimlet in mitphiat kal na lak ah ka mai ka sel a; himahleh tangtawn zahngaihna in ka hon hehpih ding,” Toupa nang hon Tanpa'n achi hi.
23054009	“Huai lah kei a ding in Noah dam lai nite bang ahi a; Noah tuite'n leitung atummang nawn kei ding, chi a, ka kichiam bang in, Na tung ah ka heh nawn kei ding a, ka hon sal nawn kei ding, chi in ka kichiamta ahi.
23054010	Tangte apaimang ding ua, mual neute leng suan in a-om ding uh; ka zahngaihna ahihleh nang a kipan in apaimang kei ding a, ka lemna thukhun leng suan in a-om sam kei ding,” Toupa hon hehpihpa'n achi hi.
23054011	“Aw nang hihgentheih, tuikihot sepsep, lungmuanna nei lou, ngai in na suangte zehoih in ka lem ding, na suangphumte sapphir suang in ka lem ding hi.
23054012	Na tungzumte rubi suang in, na kongkhakte karbankul suang in, na kulh tengteng suang hoihte in ka bawl ding.
23054013	“Na ta tengteng Toupa chil in a-om ding ua; na tate lungmuanna thupitak ahi ding.
23054014	Diktatna a kipsak in na om ding a, nuaisiahna a pan gamlapi ah na om ding, na lau kei ding hi; thil mulkimhuai a pan gamlapi ah na om ding a, ahon naih kei ding hi.
23054015	Ngai in, ahong kikhawm uh ahi thei, himahleh ka thu ahi kei ding; nang sual ding a kikhawm peuhmahte nang ziak in apuk ding uh.
23054016	“Ngai in, ke'n siksekmi pumzap anasepna ding vanzat sek zel mi ka siam a; kei mahmah in hihse ding in hihsemi ka siam ding hi.
23054017	Nang sualna ding avanzat sek himhim aphatuam kei ding; lei chih thubuai a nang hon lang siam louh na tangsak ding a, Huai Toupa sikhate goutan ahi a, adiktatna uh ka kiang a kipan ahi,” Toupa'n achi.
23055001	Ngai un, dangtak peuhmahte aw, tuite ah hong pai un, dangka neiloute; hong pai unla, lei unla ne un! Ahi, hong pai unla, uain leh nawitui dangka pe lou in, aman leng pe lou in lei un.
23055002	An hiloupi a bang ding a dangka pai? Niang leh taina hilou a bang ding a na tha uh pai? Ka thuhoihtak in ngaikhia unla, thil hoih ne un, na hinna uh thil thau in nuamsa hen.
23055003	Na bil uh doh unla, ka kiang ah hong pai un; za unla, huchi in na hinna uh ahing ding; na kiang uah tangtawn thu ka khung ding, David kiang a huai hehpihna chiamte.
23055004	Ngai in, michih a ding in amah palai in ka sep a, michih a ding in makai leh heutu in ka sep ahi.
23055005	Ngai in, na theih ngei louh na sam ding a, nang hon thei ngei lou namte na kiang ah ahong tai ding uh, Toupa na Pathian ziak leh Israelte Mi Siangthou ziak in; ama'n ahon pahtawi ngal a.
23055006	Muh theih a a-om lai in Toupa zong unla, anai lai in amah sam un;
23055007	Migilou in a-omdan tawpsan henla, midiktat lou in angaihtuahnate tawpsan sam hen; Toupa kiang ah kik nawn hen, huchi in ama'n atung ah zahngaihna asuah ding; i Pathian kiang uah kik nawn hen, ama'n angaidam mahmah ding hi.
23055008	Ka ngaihtuahte na ngaihtuahte ahi kei a, na omdante leng ka omdan ahi sam kei, Toupa'n achi.
23055009	Leitung sang a vante asan zawk bang in, ka omdante na omdan sang in asangzaw hi, ka ngaihtuahte leng na ngaihtuahte uh sang in asang lai hi.
23055010	Vuah leh vuk van a kipan azu a, huai lam ah akiktou ngei kei, lei avak zaw hi, thil apousak in adawnsak a, buhchi thehmi kiang ah buhchi apia a, nemi kiang ah nek ding ape zel hi.
23055011	Huchi mah bang in ka kam a kipan ka thupawt a-om ding; bangmah hih nei lou in ka kiang ah akik nawn kei ding a, ka deih bang ahihzou zaw ding a, thilhih ding a ka sawlna ah leng alohching ding.
23055012	Nuam satak a pawt in, lungmuangtak a pikhiak a om ding na hi ngal ua; tangte leh mual neute'n na ma uah la asakhe guih ding uh, gamlak sing tengteng in leng akhut uh abeng ding uh.
23055013	Loulingnei tang in meilah apou zaw ding a, khaulingnei tang in muising apou zaw ding; huai Toupa minhoihna ding leh tangtawn chiamtehna hihman a om lou ding ahi ngal a.
23056001	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Vaihawm zui unla, diktak in hih un; ka hotdamna ahong tung dek in, ka diktatna ahong tung dekta hi.
23056002	Huchibang hihmi leh huaitak pom geih mihing tapa in nuam asa hi; Sabbath buahsak a, tang zel leh hoih lou hih lou ding a akhut venghoihmi ngei.”
23056003	Huan gamdangmi, Toupa toh kizommi in, Toupa'n amite lak ah hon hihtuam ding, chi keileh; michilgeh in, “En in, singkeu ka hi, chi sam keileh.
23056004	Ka Sabbathte tang a, ka kipahpih lam thilte tel a, ka thukhun pomkip michilgehte tungtang thu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a;
23056005	akiang uah ka insung leh ka kulh sungte a tanu leh tapa neite sang mah in theihgigena hoihzaw leh minhoihzaw ka pe ding; akiang uah tangtawn min, hihman nawn louh ding, ka pe ding,” chi in.
23056006	“Gamdang mite leng, Sabbath tang lou lou a, tang zel leh ka thukhun pomkip peuhmah, Toupa nasem ding leh Toupa min it ding leh asikhate a om ding a Toupa toh kizom peuhmahte;
23056007	amaute mah ka tang siangthou ah ka pi ding a, ka thumna inn ah nuam ka sasak ding; halmang a athillatte uleh akithoihnate uh ka maitam a kipahpih in a-om ding; ka inn michih a ding a thumna inn chi ding uh ahi ngal a,” chi in.
23056008	Toupa Pathian , delhkhiak Israelte pikhawmpa'n, “Amah a pikhawm a omte lou leng namdangte akiang ah ka pikhawm lai ding,” achi hi.
23056009	Gamsa tengteng aw, ahi, gamnuai a sa om tengteng aw, ne ding in hong pai un.
23056010	Agalvil mite amit uh ataw a, theihna nei lou ngen ahi ua; ui aw nei lou ngen ahi ua, ana thei kei uh; mang nei a, lum gige a, lup hai mi ahi uh.
23056011	Ahi, amaute ui duhgawlte ahi ua; hunsak chih anei ngei kei uh; theihsiamna nei lou belampu ahi ua, avekpi un amau lampi, amau punna lam chiat anga uhi.
23056012	“Hong pai un,” chi in “Uain ka la ding a huchi in zu in i kithundim ding; zingchiang tuni bang ahi nawn ding a, ni thupi mahmah ahi ding,” achi chiat uhi.
23057001	Midiktat amang zel a, kuamah in alungsim un angaihtuah kei uh, Pathian limsak mite lakmang in a-om ua, midiktat thil hoih lou hong tung ding a kipan lakmang ahi uh chih kuamah in angaihtuah kei uhi.
23057002	Lungmuanna ah alut ua; alupnate uah alum tawldam zel ding uh, diktak a pai peuhmahte.
23057003	Himahleh nou bumsiamnu tapa, angkawm leh kizuak suante aw, hiai ah hon naih un.
23057004	Nuihza bawlna dia na zat zel uh kua eita? Kua na maiphen khum ua, na lei khatkhum ua? Tatlekna ta, zuautheihna suante na hi kei uh maw?
23057005	Nou tosaw lak a, singbuk nuai teng a milimte toh kithoh a suangpi kawl lak nuai a phaizang sung a naupang that zelte.
23057006	Lui Phaizang suang mam lak ah na tantuan a-om a; huaite, huaite ngeingei na tantuan ahi; huaite a ding in dawn thillat na sung a, thilpiak na lan hi. Huai thil ah hihlungkim in ka om ding hia?
23057007	Tang sang zou mahmah tung ah na lupna na koih a; huai lai mah ah kithoihna lan ding in na hohtou zel hi.
23057008	Huan kongkhakte leh kongbiang liahte ah na theihgigena na tung a; kei a ding hilou in midang a ding in na kisuah a, na hohtou ngal a; na lupna na kek a, akiang uah thu na khung a; alupna uh lah na muhna ah na it hi.
23057009	Huan sathau toh kumpipa kiang ah na hoh a, na gimlimte lah na bawl thupi diakdiak a, gamlapi ah na palaite na sawl a, sheol pha hial in na niamsak hi.
23057010	Na paina lampi sau ziak in na gim a; himahleh, “Lametna himhim a-om kei, na chi ngal kei a; na hatna halhsakna na mu a; huaiziak in na bahta kei hi.
23057011	“Kua na kihta in na lau, zuau na gen nak a, kei na hon theih tak louh a, na lungsim a na ngaihtuah tak louh mai? Sawtpi ka dai dide kei maw? Kihtak leng na hon kihtak louh, Toupa'n achi.
23057012	Na diktatna leh na thilhihte ka gen ding; bangmah lah na loh tak kei dia.
23057013	Na kikou chiang in na lak khawmte'n hon humbit uheh; himahleh huih in amaute ala ding a, hu in amut vek ding; kei hon muang in bel gam anei ding a, ka tang siangthou aluah ding.”
23057014	Ama'n, “Sungvum un, sungvum un, lampi bawl un, ka mite lampi bawl un, ka mite lampi a kipan pukna ding pai un,” Toupa'n achi.
23057015	Mitungnung, tawisang, tangtawn a om, amin Siangthou in hichi in achi ngal a, “Kei mun tungnung leh siangthou ah ka om a, mithunuailutte lungsim hihhalh ding leh kisik tuntunte lungtang hihhalh ding in mi lungsim a kisik tuntun a thunuailuttak kiang ah leng ka om hi.
23057016	Tangtawn a dou lou ding ka hi, ka heh gige sam kei ding hi; huchi keileh mi lungsim ka ma ah abah ding a, hinna ka bawlte leng abah ding uh.
23057017	Ahuaiham a athulimlouhna ziak in ka heh a, ka sat a, ka mai ka hum a, ka heh ahi; amah lah alungtang omdan ngeingei in paupengtak in a-om hi.
23057018	“A-omdante ka mu a, amah ka damsak ding; ka pi ding a, amah leh asuunpih mite kiang ah lungmuanna ka pe nawn ding.
23057019	Ke'n muk gah ka siam hi. Lemna, lemna, gamlapi a om kiang ah leh naichik a om kiang ah om hen,” Toupa'n achi, “Amah ka damsak ding.
23057020	Mithulimloute bel tuipi kihot gige bang ahi uh; a-om kinken thei ngei kei a, atuite'n lah nin leh buannawi avikkhe zel uh,” chi in.
23057021	Ka Pathian in, “Mithulimloute a ding in muanna himhim a-om kei,” achi hi.
23058001	Ngaihtak in kikou inla, kidam ke'n, pengkul bang in na aw suaksak loloih inla, ka mite kiang ah atatlekna uh hilh inla, Jakob inkuanpihte kiang ah akhelhnate uh hilh in.
23058002	Zon zaw niteng in ahon zong zel ua, ka lampi thute theih akilawp ua; diktattak a hih leh a Pathian uh vaihawmna tawpsan ngei lou nam bang in ka kiang ah vaihawmna diktat ahon ngen ua, Pathian naih leng akilawp uhi.
23058003	Bangziak in ahia an ka ngawl ua, na muh louh? Bangziak in ahia ka kihihgentheih ua, na theih louh? achi nak uhi. Ngai un, na an ngawl ni un noumau nopsakna na bawl ua, na nasem mite tengteng na nuaisiah uh.
23058004	Ngai un, kihoutheih louh leh kiselna ding leh thulimlouhna khuttum a kitum ding in ahi, an na ngawl nak uh; na aw uh tunglam a zak ding in hiai ni in an na ngawl ngei kei uhi.
23058005	Huchibang an ngawlna ka deihlam ahi hia? Mi akihih gentheihna ni ding uh ahi maw? Sialluang bang a alu kun ding leh anuai a sai-ip puan phah a vut buah ding hia? Huaite an ngawlna Toupa a ding a ni kipahhuai na chi ding ua hia?
23058006	Hiai an ngawlna ka deihlam ahi kei maw? Thulimlouhna a gakna phelsak leh hakkol khaute sutsak leh nuaisiahte pawtsak leh hakkol chiteng hihtansak.
23058007	Na an mi gilkialte kiang a hawm leh genthei delhkhiakte na inn a pi ahi kei maw? Mi vuaktang mu a puan piakleh nangmah tanaute a kipan a kisel louh ahi kei maw?
23058008	Huai hun chiang in na vak zing nisuak bang in ahong suak ding a, na damna ding ahong poukhe zok ding; na diktatna in na ma akai ding a; Toupa thupina na nungdal ahi ding.
23058009	Huai hun chiang in na sam ding a, huchi in Toupa'n ahon dawng ding; na kikou ding a, huchi in ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi ding. Na lak ua kipan ahakkolte khutzung a mikawkte, mawkpaute na hihman a,
23058010	gilkialte kiang a na deihlam pia a, hihgentheihmi na taisakleh, na vak mial lak ah avakkhe ding a, na mial bikbek sun lai bang ahita ding.
23058011	Huan Toupa'n ahon pi gige ding a, mun keu ah leng ahon taisak ding a, na guhte leng ahatsak ding; tui a vak huan bang leh tui nak nei kang ngei lou bang na hita ding hi.
23058012	Huchi in nang a kipan a hong pawt dingte'n mun lui sesate alem nawn ding ua; suan tampi suangphum ding in na lemtou nawn ding; huchi in nang bel, ase lai bawlhoihpa, mi omna ding a lampite bawlhoihpa, ahon chi ding uh.
23058013	“Sabbath tang lou lou ding a, ka ni siangthou a na deihlam hih lou ding a na khepek na ngat kiksak a, Sabbath ni kipahhuai leh Toupa ni siangthou zahhuai na chih a, nangmah lampi tawn lou a, nangmah nopsakna bawl lou a, nangmah thu gen lou a, na pahtawileh,
23058014	Toupa tung ah na kipak ding a, lei mun sangte ah ka hon tuangsak ding; na pu Jakob gouluah thil in ka hon vak ding,” Toupa kam in huai achita hi.
23059001	Ngai un, Toupa khut hondam thei lou ding in tomsak in a-om kei a; abil leng za thei lou ding in angong sam kei.
23059002	Na thulimlouhnate uh noumau leh na Pathian kal ua kia in ahon khen ahi, bil a azak noplouhna ding in na khelhnate un amai ahon liahsak ahi.
23059003	Na khutte uh lah sisan a hihnit in a-om a, na khutzungte uh lah thulimlouhna a hihnit in a-om hi; na mukte un zuau agen a, na lei uh ginatlouhna thu gen in aphun nuanua hi.
23059004	Kuama'n diktak in thukhawk agen kei ua, kuama'n thutak in thu agenpih ngei kei uh; huihkhua lelte amuang ua, zuau agen nak uhi; thilhihkhelhna apai ua, thulimlouhna asuang zel uhi.
23059005	Thangtom tuite a-opkhum ua, maimom gil puan agan uh; atui ne mite asi uhi, hihtap a om ah gul ahong pawt hi.
23059006	Amaimon gil puante uh puansilh ding in ahong om kei ding a, athilhihte uh leng asilh sam kei ding uh; athilhihte uh lah thulimlouhna thilhihte ahi a, hiamgamtak a hihna akhut uah a-om hi.
23059007	Akhete uh thil hoih lou lam ah atai a, gensiatbei sisan suah ding in akintat nilouh ua; angaihtuahte uh lah thulimlouhna ngaihtuahnate ahi a; gamna leh siatna alampite uah a-om zel hi.
23059008	Lungmuanna lampi athei kei ua; apaina uah dikna himhim a-om ngei kei; amau a ding in lam kawi bang abawl ua; huai lai a pai peuhmah in lungmuanna athei ngei kei uh.
23059009	Huaiziak in vaihawmna ei a kipan gamlapi ah a-om naknak a, diktatna in ahon phazou ngei kei; vak i ngak ua, himahleh, ngai in, mial ahong hi a; vakna i ngak ua, himahleh mial bikbek mah ah i pai uhi.
23059010	Mittaw bang in baang i mai puampuam ua, ahi, mit neiloute bang in i mai puampuam uhi; khomial tung bang in sun lai in i kisui ua; mihatte lak ah misi bang phet i hi uhi.
23059011	Vompite bang in i vek un i ham dupdup ua, vakhute bang in nakpitak in i thum ngutngut uh; vaihawmna i ngak ua, himahleh, a-om het kei hi; hotdamna i ngak ua, himahleh gamlapi ah ahon omsan hi.
23059012	I tatleknate uh na ma ah akhangta a, i khelhnate'n ahon hek gige hi; i kiang ua i tatleknate uh a-om gige ziak in, i thulimlouhnate uh i thei uhi.
23059013	I takleknate, Toupa i theihmohbawlte, i Pathian i zuih louh a i kiheisante, nuaisiah thu leh hel thu i gente, zuau thu i pai ua, lungtang a kipan i genkhiak zelte.
23059014	Huchi in vaihawmna in nunglam ahon ngatsan a, diktatna in gamlapi ah ahon dinsanta; thutak lah kongzing ah apuk a, dikna alut thei kei hi.
23059015	Ahi, thutak a-omta kei a; thil hoih lou tawpsanmi gallak in akibawl zel. Huchi in Toupa'n huai amu a, thudik a vaihawmna himhim a-om louh ziak in alungkimsakta kei hi.
23059016	Huan mi kuamah a-om kei chih athei a, ngetsakmi mawngmawng a-om louh uh lamdang asa a; huaiziak in amah ban mahmah in hotdamna akibawl a; amah diktatna mah in akilenkip hi.
23059017	Diktatna lum in anei a, hotdamna lukhu akhu a; puansilh in phulakna puansilhte asilh a, puanaktual ding in phatuamngaihna asilh hi.
23059018	Athilhihte uh bang in, athilhihte uh bang in ama'n athuk ding, amah dou mite hehna in, amelmate thukna in athuk ding; tuikulh gamte thukna in athuk ding.
23059019	Huchi in tumlam a kipan Toupa min alau ding ua, athupina leng nisuahna a kipan in alau ding uh; tui khang bang a melma ahong pai chiang in, Toupa Kha in amah dou in alamang ding hi.
23059020	“Zion ah Tanpa in ahong pai ding a, Jakobte lak a tatlekna tawpsan mite lak ah leng ahong pai ding, Toupa'n achi.
23059021	Ke'n zaw, hiai ahi akiang ua ka thukhun,” Toupa'n achi. “Ka kha na tung a omleh, na kam a thu ka koihte'n, tuban tangtawn pha in na kam apawtsan kei ding ua, na suante kam leng apawtsan sam kei ding ua, na tusuan sawnte kam leng apawtsan sam kei ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
23060001	Thou inla, vak in, na vak ahong tung a, Toupa thupina na tung ah ahong suakta hi.
23060002	Ngai in, mial in leitung akhuh ding a, mial bikbek in mite akhuh ding ahi; himahleh na tung ah Toupa ahong suak ding a, thupina na tung ah ahong kilang ding hi.
23060003	Huchi in nam chih na vak lam ah ahong pai ding ua, kumpipate leng na hong suah vakna lam ah ahong pai ding uh.
23060004	Dak inla, na mit in en vialvial in, en in, avek un akikhawm ua, na kiang ah ahong pai uhi; na tapate gamlapi a kipan in ahong pai ding ua, na tanute ahong don ding uhi.
23060005	Huai hun chiang in na mu ding a, na vakta ding a, na lungtang kipak in aling ding, zatsak in a-om ding; tuipi a hauhsakna in na kiang lam ahon naih ding a, namte thahatna na kiang ahong tun ding ziak in.
23060006	Sangawngsau tampi'n ahon tuam ding ua, Midian leh Ephah gam a sangawngsau tuaite'n; huaite tengteng Sheba gam a kipan in ahong pai ding uh; dangka-eng leh begaw ahon po ding ua, Toupa phatna thu atheisak ding uhi.
23060007	Kedarte ganhon tengteng na kiang ah a-omkhawm ding ua, Nebajoth a belamtalte'n na nna asem ding uh; ka maitam ah kipak in apaitou ding ua, ka thupina in ka pahtawi ding.
23060008	Mei bang a leng leh vakhu amau tohlet zuan a leng duamduam bang kuate ahi ua?
23060009	Ama'n ahon pahtawi ziak in Toupa na Pathian min ding leh Israelte Mi Siangthou a ding in na tapate adangka uh leh dangka-eng toh gamlapi a kipan a pi ding in pel lou in tuikulh gamte'n ahon ngak ding ua, Tarshish long liante'n masakpen atuh ding uh.
23060010	Huan gamdang mite'n kulhbaangte alemtou nawn ding ua, akumpipate un na nna asem ding uh; ka heh in ka hon sat a, himahleh ka hon deihsakna in na tung ah ka zahngai leuleu hi.
23060011	Na kongkhakte leng hon in a-om gige ding ua; sun le zan in akhak kei ding uh; mite'n nam chih sum na kiang a ahon tawi ua, akumpipate uh ahon pi theih samna ding un.
23060012	Na nna sem nuam lou nam leh gam amangthang ding uhi; ahi, huai namte zaw suksiat in a-om ding uh.
23060013	Ka Mun Siangthou zem ding in Lebanon thupina na kiang ah ahong pai ding, meilahte, phante, sing gelh chi ahong paikhawm ding ua ka khe sikna mun ka thupibawl ding hi.
23060014	Nang hon hihgentheite tapate kun in na kiang ah ahong pai ding ua; nangmah musit mite na khepek nuai ah akun ding ua, nang bel Toupa khopi, Israelte Mi Siangthou Zion, ahon chi ding uh.
23060015	Kuamah veh ngei louh khopi, paisan leh huat a na om sang in tangtawn suanpen, suan tampi kipahna ding in ka hon bawl ding.
23060016	Namte nawitui na tep ding a, kumpipate nawi leng na tep ding; kei Toupa zaw nang hon hondampa leh nang Tanpa, Jakob Mi Hat ka hi chih na hon thei ding hi.
23060017	Dal tang in dangka-eng ka hon la ding a, sik tang in dangka ka hon la ding, sing tang in leng sumbelsik, suang tang in sik; lungmuanna na heutu ding in ka sep lai ding a, diktatna nang hon phutmi ding in ka sep ding hi.
23060018	Hiamgam a thilhih husa na gam ah zak ahita kei ding a, hiamgamna leh siatna husa leng na gamgi sung ah zak ahita kei ding; na kulhbaang Hotdamna, na chi zaw ding a, na kongkhakte leng, Phatna, na chi ding hi.
23060019	Sun a nang hon tan ding nisa ahi kei ding a; kha leng vakna ding in ahon vaksak sam kei ding; Toupa bel nang a ding in tangtawn vaksakpa ding in a-om ding a, na Pathian leng na thupina ding ahi ding.
23060020	Na ni atumta kei ding a, na kha leng amangta kei ding hi; Toupa tangtawn vaksakpa ahita ding a, na lusuun nite atawp ding hi.
23060021	Na mite avek un midiktat ahi ding ua, na gam aluah tawntung ding uh; pahtawi a ka omtheihna ding a amau a zung selkhia ka suan, ka khutsuak ahi ding uh.
23060022	Mi tawmpen sangkhat ahi ding ua, mineupen leng nam hatte ahi ding uhi, kei Toupa'n ahunhun in ka tungsak pahpah ding.
23061001	Liangvaite kiang a tanchinhoih gen ding a Toupa'n thau ahon nilh ziak in ka tung ah Toupa Pathian kha a-om; ama'n lungtang khasiate tuam ding, salte kiang a pawtna thu leh saltangte kiang a tanin honna thu gen ding.
23061002	Toupa lungkim kum thu leh i Pathian phulak ni thugen ding bang, lungkhamte lungmuan ding bang,
23061003	Vut tang a pakkhigui bang, lungkham tang a nopna thau bang, nguina kha tang a phatna puansilh bang akiang ua piak ding, Zion a lungkham a omte a ding a seh ding bang in ahon sawl ahi. Amah pahtawi a a-omna ding in, diktatna sing Toupa suante chih, ahihtheihna ding un.
23061004	Mun lui sesate alem nawn ding ua, tuma a khua sesate adingh hoihsak nawn ding ua, khopi sesa, suan tampi gamnate, abawlhoih nawn ding uh.
23061005	Gamdang mite'n dinsa in na ganhonte uh avak ding ua, theih ngei louh mite na leiletmi ding un leh na grepgui uh kemmi ding in a-om ding uh.
23061006	Nou bel, Toupa siampute, chih a loh in na om ding uh; mite'n i Pathian nasem mite ahon chi ding uh. Namte sum na ne ding ua, athupina uh na suang ding uh.
23061007	Na zahlakna gun uh aleh nih na mu ding ua; na zum gun un na tantuan uah nuamsa in la na sa ding uh; huaiziak in na gam uah azahnih na luah ding ua; tangtawn nopsakna nou a ahi ding.
23061008	Kei Toupa'n vaihawmna dik ka deih a, thulim loutak a hiamgam zaw ka hua hi; huchi in amau ka thukna chihtak ngial in akiang uah ka pe ding a, akiang uah tangtawn thu leng ka khung ding.
23061009	Huchi in asuante uh nam chih lak a theih ahi ding ua, atate uh michih lak a theih ahi ding uh; amau mute'n Toupa vualzawl chi ahi uh chih athei ding uhi.
23061010	Toupa ah nakpitak in nuam ka sa ding a, ka hinna Pathian ah kipaktak in a-om ding. Mouneipa ding pakkhigui a akizep bang leh mou ding a kivatnate a akivat zel bang in, ama'n hotdamna puansilhte ahon silhsak a, diktatna puanaktual in ahon tuamta hi.
23061011	Leitung in athil dawn apawtsak bang leh, huan in asung a thil chinte adawnsak bang in, Toupa Pathian in diktatna leh phatna nam chih ma ah adawnkhesak ding ahi.
23062001	Adiktatna uh vakna bang a suah a, amah hotdamna khawnvak kuang bang a asuah masiah, Zion ziak in ka dai nilouh kei ding a, Jerusalem ziak in ka om kinken kei ding hi.
23062002	Huchi in na diktatna amu ding ua, kumpipa tengteng in na thupina amu ding uh; huan, min thak, Toupa kam in asak ding in, ahon sam ding uh.
23062003	Toupa khut a kilawmna lallukhu leh i Pathian khut a thupina lukhu na hi ding.
23062004	Taihsansa, ahon chi nawn kei ding uh; na gam leng, Loihsansa achi nawn sam kei ding uh; Hephzibah, ahon chita ding ua, na gam leng Beulah, achi ding uhi; Toupa na tung ah akipak ngal a, na gam in pasal anei ding hi.
23062005	Tangval in nungak zi a aneih bang in na tapate'n zi in ahon nei ding uh; mou neimi mou tung a akipah bang in, na tung ah na Pathian akipak ding hi.
23062006	Jerusalem aw, na kulh tung ah galvilmi ka vilsak a; sun leh zan in chik lai mah in adai kei ding; nou Toupa theihpih ding a omte aw, om kinken het kei un.
23062007	Amah leng om kinkensak kei un, Jerusalem ahihkip a, lei a phathuai a abawl masiah.
23062008	Toupa'n akhut taklam leh abanhat lou a akichiam in, na buh nang hon dou mite an ding in ka pe nawn kei ding a; gamdang mite'n nna sepkhiak uain adawn nawn kei ding uh.
23062009	Abuh late'n ane zaw ding ua, Toupa aphat ding ua alou mite'n ka Mun Siangthou huangsung intual ah adawnta ding, chi in.
23062010	Pawt unla, kulh kongpite ah pawt un; mite a ding in lampi bawl unla; sungvum un, lamlian sungvum un; suangte tomsiang unla; mite a ding in chiamtehna takkhia un.
23062011	Ngai un, kawlmong pha in huchi in atheisak ahi, Zion tanu kiang ah hichi in gen un, “En in, nangmah hotdamna ahong tung ding; en in, akipahman akiang ah a-om hi, aditna leng ama ah a-om hi.
23062012	Huchi in amau, ‘Mipi Siangthou, Toupa tatte,’ achi ding uh; nang bel Zonkhiak, Paisan louh khopi ahon chi ding uh, chi in,” achi hi.
23063001	Edom gam a kipan hong pai, Bozrah a kipan puansilh diahsan silh kua ahia? Apuansilh a thupitak, ahatna thupidan bang a hong pai? Kei Toupa diktattak a thu gen a, hotdam lam a mihat mahmah ka hi.
23063002	Bangziak a na puansilh san a, na silh-le-tente leng grep sukna khuk a chiltaimi' silh-le-ten bang a om ahia?
23063003	Keimah kia in grep sukna khuk ah ka chiltai a; michih lak a mi khat lel leng ka kiang ah a-om kei uh; ahi, amau ka heh a ka chil a, ka heh a ka pal a; huchi in ahinna sisan uh ka puansilhte ah theh in a-om a, ka puan tengteng ka hihninta hi.
23063004	Phulak ni ka lungtang ah a-om a, ka tatkhiakna kum ahong tungta ahi.
23063005	Huchi in ka en a, panpih ding mi a-om kei ua; len ding mi a-om louh uh lamdang ka sa a; huaiziak in keimah ban mahmah in hotdamna ahon puak a; ka hehna in ahon lenkip hi.
23063006	Huchi in michih ka heh in ka sikden a, ka heh in ka khamsak a, ahinna sisan uh lei ah ka bota hi.
23063007	Toupa'n thil bangkim ahon vuh bang zel in Toupa chitdan thute leh Toupa phatna thute ka gen ding a; ahehpihnate leh azahngaihna thupidante bang zel a Israel inkuanpihte lak a ahoihna thupi mahmah a atung ua avuh thu leng ka gen ding hi.
23063008	Ama'n, “Ka mite, hi taktak hi ua, zuautat lou ding tate ahi uh,” achi hi. Huchi in amaute hondampa ding in ahong omta hi.
23063009	Amangbatna tengteng uah amah amangbang a, angel, ama a om in, amaute ahumbit a; a-itna leh ahehpihna in atanta a; nidanglai ni tengteng ah amaute pua in apom hi.
23063010	Himahleh ahel un, a Kha Siangthou alungkhamsak ua; huaiziak in amau dou ding in kilehheisak in a-om a, amau asualta hi.
23063011	Huai lai in amite'n Mosi nidanglai nite atheigige ua, hichi in achi uh, “Tuipi a kipan a abelamching mite toh amaute pi Toupa koi a om ahia? A Kha Siangthou alak ua koihpa koi a om ahia?
23063012	Aban thupitak Mosi taklam a paisakpa koi a om ahia? Tangtawn min kibawlna dia ama ua tui kikhensakpa koi a om ahia?
23063013	Akisuihlouhna ding ua tui thuktak a, gamdai a sakol pi bang a, amaute pikaipa koi a om ahia?
23063014	Guam a ganta paisukte bang in Toupa Kha in amaute akhawlsak a; huchibang in, min thupitak na kibawlna ding in, na mite na pi hi,” chi in.
23063015	Toupa , Van a kipan in hon ensuk inla, na sianthouna leh na thupina omna a kipan in hon en in; na phatuamngaihna leh na thilhih thupitakte koi ah? Na lungtang a na hon ngaihna leh na hon hehpihna, kham a omta hia?
23063016	Abraham in hon thei lou in, Israel in leng hon limsak kei mahleh, nang zaw ka Pa uh na hi a; nang zaw, aw Toupa , ka Pa uh na hi; na min tangtawn a kipan in koute hon Tanpa ahi.
23063017	Toupa aw, nang bangziak a na lampi a kipan hon vakmangsak na hia? Na sikha, na gouluah namte ziak in hong kik nawn in.
23063018	Na misiangthoute'n sawt louchik kia anei ua; hon doute'n lah na min siangthou asikgawpta uh.
23063019	Atung ua vai na hawm ngeilouhte, na min pu ngeilou namte ka bangta uhi.
23064001	Aw tangte na ma a aluankhiak zoizoina ding un, van botkek in hong kumsuk teitei lechin aw.
23064002	Namte na ma a alinna ding un nang hon doute kiang a na min theihsakna ding in, mei in sing nen akuansak a, mei in tui asousak bang in!
23064003	Ka lamet louh uh thil mulkimhuai na hih lai in na hong suk a, na ma ah tangte aluangkhe zoizoi uhi.
23064004	Nidanglai a kipan in mite'n, nang kia lou ngal, amaute ngak ding a, sepsak zelpa Pathian athei ngei kei ua, bil in lah aza ngei kei ua, mit in leng amu ngei sam kei uhi.
23064005	Nang zaw, nuamtak a om a diktattak a hihmi, na lampite a nang hon theigigete, na don a; ngai in, nang na heh a, kou thil ka hihkhial ua; huaite ah sawtpi ka omta ua, huchi in hotdam in ka om thei lai ding uam?
23064006	Minin bang in ka na om vekta ngal ua, ka diktatna teng uh leng puansilh nin bang ahi; ka vek un nah bang in ka vuai ua; ka thulimlouhnate un huih bang in ahon mutmang zel hi.
23064007	Huchi in na min lou a, nang hon len ding a kihihhalh kuamah a-om kei uh; kou a kipan in na mai na selta ngal a, ka thulimlouhnate uh zang in na hon mangsakta hi.
23064008	Tu in zaw, aw Toupa , nang ka pa uh na hi; kou bellei ka hi ua; nang kou hon velpa na hi; huchi in ka vek un na khutsuak ka hi uh.
23064009	Toupa aw, heh ke'nla, thulimlouhnate leng tangtawn in theigige ke'n; ngai in hehpih in hon en inla, ka vek un nangmah mite ka hi uhi.
23064010	Na khopi siangthoute gamdai ahong suak ua, Zion gamdai ahong suak a, Jerusalem mun nutsiat ahong hita hi.
23064011	Ka inn siangthou uleh ka inn kilawmtak uh, ka pipute un nang a hon phat zelna uh, mei ahal ahi; ka thil deihhuaite tengteng uh lah hihsiat in a-omvekta ngal a.
23064012	Toupa aw, huai thilte ah na kidek thei ding a hia? Na dai nilouh in na hon hihgenthei nilouh ding a hia?
23065001	Kei hon deih ngeiloute zon in ka om; hon zong ngeiloute muhkhiak in ka om; ka min pu lou nam kiang ah, “Hon en un, hon en un,” ka chi hi.
23065002	Mihelhatte a ding in nitum in ka bante ka zak, huaite bel amau ngaihtuahnate bang zel a lampi hoih lou a paite ahi.
23065003	Huante a kithoih a, teklei tungte a banghiam gimlim hal a, ka maitang mahmah a hon hihheh nakte.
23065004	Han lakte khawng a tu a, mundaite a giak a, voksa ne a, abelte ua thilkihhuai tuihuante.
23065005	Nang kia dingh in, hon naih ke'n, nang sang in ka siangthouzaw hi, chite ahi uh; huaite bel ka nak a meikhu om, nitum a mei mit lou om gige nakte ahi uhi.
23065006	Ngai in, ka ma ah gelh in a-om; ka dai nilouh kei ding a, ka thuk ding, a-angsung uah ka thuk ding.
23065007	Noumau thulimlouhna leh na pute uh thulimlouhnate, Toupa'n achi, huaite'n lah tangte tung ah gimlim ahal ua, mual tungte ah ka min agensia uhi; huaiziak in anasep uh amasapen in a-angsung uah ka tehsak ding hi.
23065008	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Grep bawm ah uain thak amu ua, mi'n, ‘Hihse ke'n, huai ah lah vualzawlna a-om ngal a,’ achih bang un, ka sikhate ziak in ka hih sam ding, avek ua ka suksiatlouhna ding in.
23065009	Huan Jakob a kipan in chi khat ka pawtsak ding a, Judah a kipan in ka tangte luah ding ka pawtsak ding; huchi in ka mitelte'n huai aluah ding ua, ka sikhate huai ah a-om ding uh.
23065010	Huan ka mi, kei hon zongte a ding in, Sharon belamhonte huang ahi ding a, Akor Phaizang bel bawnghon kualna mun ahi ding hi.
23065011	“Himahleh nou Toupa paisan a, ka tang siangthou mangngilh a, Gad pathian a ding a dohkan bawl a, Meni a ding a dawn thillat lante aw;
23065012	k'on sap lai in na hon dawng nuam kei ua, thu ka gen lai in na za ut kei ua, ka mitmuh in thil gilou na hih zaw ua, ka kipahpih louh thil na tel zawk ziak un namsau in na tan hun uh ka hon ngaihtuahsak ding a, na vek un thahna ah na kun vek ding uh.
23065013	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Ngai un, ka sikhate'n ane ding ua, nou bel gilkial in na om ding ua; ngai un, ka sikhate'n adawn ding ua, nou bel dangtak in na om ding uh; ngai un, ka sikhate'n nuam asa ding ua, nou bel na zum ding uh;
23065014	ngai un, ka sikhate lungtang akipah ziak un la asa ding ua, nou bel lungtang a na lungkham ziak un na kap ding uh, kha a na vui ziak un na mau vungvung ding uh.
23065015	Huan hamsia hi ding in ka mitelte kiang ah na min uh na nuse ding ua, Toupa Pathian in ahon that ding hi; huan, asikhate min dang in asamta ding hi.
