23065016	Huchi in lei a amah kivualzawl tawmmi bel thutak Pathian ah akivualzawl ding a; lei a kichiammi in thutak Pathian lou in akichiam ding; nidang alungkhamnate mangngilh a a-om tak ziak in leh ka mit a kipan a sel a a-om tak ziak in.’
23065017	“Ngai un, van thakte leh lei thak ka siam ahi; nidanglai thilte zaw theihgige in a-om nawn kei ding a, lungsim ah leng alut nawn kei ding hi.
23065018	Himahleh ka thilsiam ah tangtawn in kipak in nuamsa un; ngai un, Jerusalem nopsakna ding in ka siam a, amite kipahna ding in ka bawl hi.
23065019	Jerusalem tung ah nuam ka sa ding a, ka mite tung ah leng ka kipak ding; asung ah kap husa zak ahi nawn kei ding a, mau husa leng zak ahi nawn kei ding hi.
23065020	Huai a kipan a pawt zaw naungek ni sawt louchik dam a-om kei ding ua, putek adamsung nite tangtun lou leng a-om kei ding uh; naupang lah kum za a upa in asi ding ua, mikhial kum za lel dam zaw hamsethuak ahi ding uhi.
23065021	Huan innte alam ding ua, huaite ah a-om gige ding uh; grephuan abawl ding ua, agah leng ane ding uh.
23065022	Midang omna ding in inn alam nawn kei ding ua, midang nek ding in grephuan abawl nawn kei ding uh; sing damsung nite bang in ka mite damsung nite lah om ding ahi ngal a, ka mitelte zaw sawtpi asepkhiak tung uah akipak ding uhi.
23065023	Bangmah lou in asemgim kei ding ua, vangtah lel ding in ta anei sam kei ding uh; Toupa vualzawlmi suante ahi ngal ua, atate uh akiang uah a-om nilouh ding uh.
23065024	Huan hichi ahi ding a, amau hon sap ma un ka dawng ding a; thu agen san lai un leng ka bil in ka za ding hi.
23065025	Ngia leh belamnou agamtakhawm ding ua, humpinelkai in bawngtal bang in buhpawl ane ding a; gulpi an leivui ahi ding hi. Ka tang siangthou ah akihih na nawn kei ding ua, akihihse nawn sam kei ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
23066001	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Van ka tutphah ahi a, lei ka khe ngakna ahi; inn bangchibang ahia na hon lamsak ding uh? Koi lai ahia ka khawlna ding?
23066002	Hiai thil bangkim lah ka khut a ka bawl ahi ngal ua, huchi in hiai thil bangkim ahong omta ahi, Toupa'n achi; himahleh hiai mi gentheitak a om, lungsim a kisik tuntun, ka thu a ling zel zaw ka en zaw ding.
23066003	“Bawngtal goumi zaw mi that bang ahi a; belam a kithoihmi zaw ui ngawng hektan bang ahi; thilpiak lanmi peuhmah vok sisan lanmi bang ahi a; begaw halmi peuhmah milim vualzawlmi bang ahi; ahi, amau lampi atelta ua, athilkihhuaite uah alungsim uh akipak zel hi.
23066004	Ka sap lai a kuama'n ahon dawn louh ua, thu ka gen lai a bil a azak louh ua, ka mitmuh a thil gilou ahih zawk ua, ka thil kipahpih louh lam atel ziak un ke'n leng amau khemna dingte ka telsak ding a, akihtak lam uh atung uah ka tungsak ding,” chi in.
23066005	Athu a lingte aw, Toupa thu za un; na unau uh, nou hon hopa leh ka min ziak a nou hon delhkhete'n, “Na kipahman uh ka muhtheihna ding un, Toupa hih thupi in om hen,” achi ua, himahleh azum zawta ding uh.
23066006	Tua! Khopi a lum vengvung husa! Tempul a kipan husa! Amelmate thukpa Toupa husa ei ve!
23066007	“Ama'n vei man lou in nau anei a; na sa man lou in pasal naupang anei hi.
23066008	Huchibang kua'n za ngei ahia? Huchibang kua ahia mu ngei? Ni khat in gam apiang guih ding a hia? Thakhat in nam suan in a-om guih ding a hia? Zion in nau aveitak in tate anei pah hi.
23066009	Pian hun tungsak ngal in ka nei kei ding a hia?” Toupa'n achi, “Kei neisak zelpa'n ta ka neisak phal kei ding a hia?” Na Pathian in achi hi.
23066010	“Jerusalem itte tengteng aw, Jerusalem nopsakpih unla, kipahpih un; amah suunte tengteng aw, kipah ziak in nuamsakpih un.
23066011	Na tep ua, alungmuanna nawite a na taitheihna ding un leh, na tep peng ua, athupina tampi a na kipahtheihna ding un,” chih.
23066012	Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a, “Ngai un, luipi bang mai in akiang pha in lemna ka luangsak ding a, nam chih thupina luita akuang a let zoizoi bang mai in akiang pha in ka luangsak ding, huchi in huai na tep ding uh; ahon angpom ding a, apheipi tung ah ahon tawmsak ding hi.
23066013	“Mi, anu'n alungmuan bang in ka hon lungmuan ding; huchi in Jerusalem ah lungmuan in na om ding uhi.
23066014	Huai na mu ding ua, na lungtang un nuam asa ding a, na guhte uh leng loupa hing dipdip bang in apha lihliah ding; huchi in Toupa khut asikhate lam ah a-om chih athei ding ua, amelmate tung ah alungkim kei ding.
23066015	“Ngai un, ahehna thangpaihna a thuk ding leh asalhna meikuang a thuk ding in Toupa mei toh ahong pai ding hi, akangtalaite pingpei bang mai ahi ding hi.
23066016	Mei in ahi, Toupa'n angaihtuah ding, anamsau in ahi mi tengteng angaihtuah ding; huchi in Toupa hihlupte zaw tampi ahi ding uh.
23066017	“Huante ah ahoh ua, alai a mi nung a om khepkhup ding a kihihsiangthou leh kisiangsak zelte, voksa leh thilkihhuai leh chikpi nete, amangthangkhawm ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
23066018	“Athilhihte uleh angaihtuahte uh lah ka thei ngal a; nam chih leh pau chih ka pikhawm hun ahong tung sin; huchi in ahong pai ding ua, ka thupina amu ding uh.
23066019	Huan alak uah chiamtehna ka omsak ding a, huchi in alak ua gawtna pelte peuhmah namte kiang ah Tarshishte, Pulte, thangpeulaite Lud kiang ah, tuikulh gam gamlapi, ka minthanna za ngei nai lou Tubalte leh Javante kiang ah, ka thupina mu ngei nailoute kiangte ah ka sawl ding; huchi in nam chih lak ah ka thupina thu agen ding uh.
23066020	Huchi in Israel telte'n athillat uh belsuan siangthoutak a Toupa' inn a ahong lut zel bang un, Toupa kiang a thillat ding in nam chih teng lak a kipan na unaute tengteng uh sakol tung, kangtalaite, zawnnate, sabiltung tungte, sangawngsau tungte ah, Jerusalem ka tang siangthou ah ahon pi ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
23066021	“Huan huaite lak a kipan in siampu dingte leh Levi mi dingte ka la ding,” Toupa'n achi.
23066022	“Ka bawl ding van thakte leh lei thak ka ma ah om gige ding bang in, na suante uh leh na min uh leng a-om gige ding ahi,” Toupa'n achi.
23066023	“Huan hichi ahi ding a, kha thak a kipan kha thak dang tan in, Sabbath ni a kipan Sabbath dang tan in mi tengteng ka ma a hon be ding in ahong pai zungzung ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
23066024	“Apaikhe ding ua, ka tung a talekte luang a-en ding uh; athante uh asi kei ding a, ameikuangte uh leng thah in a-om sam kei ding hi; mi tengteng a ding in thilkihhuai mahmah ahi ding uh.”
24001001	Benjamin gam a Anathoth a siampute lak a mi Hilkiah tapa Jeremiah thute:
24001002	Judah Kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah hun lai, avaihawm akum sawm-le-thumna ah akiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
24001003	Judah kumpipa, Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai in leng ahong tung a; Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah akum sawm-le-khatna tawp, Jerusalem sal a pi akha ngana tan in.
24001004	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
24001005	“Gilsung a ka hon bawl ma in ka hon thei a, sul a kipan a na pawtkhiak ma in leng ka hon koihtuam a, namte kiang a zawlnei hi ding in ka hon sep khin,” chi in.
24001006	Huan ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian , ngai dih, thu ka gensiam kei, ka naupang ngal a,” ka chi hi.
24001007	Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka naupang, chi ke'n, ka hon sawlna peuhmah kiang ah na hoh ding a, ka hon thupiak peuhmah na gen ding ahi.
24001008	Amaute lau ke'nla, nang hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chi in.
24001009	Huchi in Toupa'n ahon sawk a, ka kam akhoih a, Toupa'n ka kiang ah,
24001010	“Ngai in, na kam ah ka thute ka koihta, en dih, namte leh kumpipa gamte tung ah, botkhe ding, phel ding, hihse ding, paikhe ding, bawlhoih ding leh dingkhesak ding in tuni in ka hon koih na hi,” achi hi.
24001011	Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, “Jeremiah, bang na mu?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Vaisuaklu singhiang ka mu,” ka chi hi.
24001012	Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Na mu kha mahmah ve; ka thu tangtun ding in ka kigalging gige ahi,” achi hi.
24001013	Huan anihveina ding in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Bang na mu a?” chi in. Ke'n bel, “Bel sou bolhbolh, agong mallam nga ka mu,” ka chi hi.
24001014	Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Gam a tengte tung ah mallam a kipan thil hoih lou ahong tung ding.
24001015	Ngai dih, mallam kumpipa gam nam tengteng ka sam ding; chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ahong pai ding ua, Jerusalem kongpi lutna ah, akimvel kulhbaang tengteng chin ah leh Judah khopi teng ah alaltutphah uh atung chiat ding uh.
24001016	Hon paisan in, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, amau khutsuak mah abia ua; hiai athulimlouhna teng tungtang ua ka thugelte ka puang ding hi.
24001017	Huaiziak in puan teng inla, thou inla, ka hon thupiak teng akiang uah va gen in; ama uah lunglel ke'n, huchi lou in zaw ama uah ka hon lunglelsak kha ding hi.
24001018	Ngai in, tuni in nang, agam pumpite, Judah kumpipate, aheutute, asiampute leh agam mipite dou in khopi kulh a um leh sik khuam leh dalsik khuam in ka hon bawl ahi.
24001019	Hon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh; hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002001	Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, hichi in achi:
24002002	“Kuan inla, Jerusalem zak in kikou in, Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Na tuailai a na migitdante, kikham lai a na hon itdante ka theigige hi; gamdai a khoh louh gam a na hon zuihdan bang.
24002003	Israel bel Toupa a dia hihsiangthou, agahpung masa ahi, amah negaimi peuhmah amoh ding a, atung uah siatna ahong tung ding,’ ” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002004	Aw Jakob inkote leh Israel inkote tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un;
24002005	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Na pipute un kei ah diktatlouhna bang ahia amuh uh, kei a kipan gamlapi ah avakmang ua, bangmah lou delh a, ana ki-otsak uh?
24002006	‘ Toupa , Aigupta gam a kipan hon pikhia a, gamdai, gamkeu, kokhuk mun, sihna limliap leh gamkeu mun, kuamah paisuak ngeilouhna, kuamah omlouhna mun a hon pi paisuakpa koi a om ahia?’ achi kei uh.
24002007	Gam hoihtak ah, agah leh hoihna ne ding in, ka hon pilut a, himahleh na lut uleh ka gam na hihnin ua, ka goutan thilkihhuai in na bawl uh.
24002008	Siampute'n, ‘ Toupa koi a om ahia?’ achi kei ua, Dan zang mite'n ahon thei sam kei uh, vaihawmte ka tung ah ahel ua, zawlneite'n Baal min in thu agen ua, thil phatuam lou dingte adelh uh.”
24002009	“Huchi in ka hon langbawl ding a, na tate uh ta nawnte leng ka langbawl lailai ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002010	Kittim tuikulh ah va hoh unla, en un, Kedar ah mi sawl unla, chiktak in ngaihtuah un, hichibang thil a-om ngeina hiam chih theihna ding in.
24002011	Namte'n apathian uh akheng uhia, pathiantak hiloupi leng? Ka mite'n bel athupina uh, thil phatuam loutak in akhek uh.
24002012	“Aw vante, lamdang sa unla, hon mulkimsak henla, mau tuaituai un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002013	Ka mite'n thil nih ahihkhial uhi: kei, hinna tuikhuk ahon paisan ua, tui ching thei lou ding tuivungte atoukhia uhi.
24002014	Israel sikha ahi hia? Sikha mawng a piang hia? Bangziak a nuaisiah a om ahia?
24002015	Humpinelkai tuailaite'n hamkhum in, atung ah aw asuah ua, agam ahihgawp khinta uh, akhopite leng luahmi nei lou in akangsiang khin hi.
24002016	Memphis mi leh Tahpanhes mite'n, na luzang agiausak khinta uh.
24002017	Toupa na Pathian in lampi a ahon pi lai a, na taimangsan ziak in, huai na tung a na tunsak ahi kei maw?
24002018	Nile tui dawn ding a Aigupta lampi na zuih, nang ding a bang aphatuam a? Luipi tui dawn ding a Assuria lampi na zuih, nang ding in bang aphatuam a?
24002019	Na thulimlouhna in hon thuaksak ding a, na nungkinna in nang ahon sal ding hi; hon launa nei lou Toupa na Pathian na paisan a, thil giloutak leh kha mahmah ahi na hih, na theikhia inla, mu telta in, chih, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002020	Nidanglai a pan na hakkol hihtan in, na khaute leng na hihtatta hi, ‘Na nna ka sem nawn kei ding,’ na chi a, mual sangte, singbawk nuai ah na kizuak hi.
24002021	Chi dik zang in grepgui hoih mahmah ka hon phut a, bangchidan a kikheng a, kei a dia grep tak lou hong suakta na hia?
24002022	Tangal in kisil in sahbon tampi zang mah lechin, na thulimlouhna ka mitmuh in adawk teitei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
24002023	‘Ka kihihnin sam a, Baalte ka delh sam a, bang achia chi thei na hia, phaizang kuak a na omdante en inla, na thilhihsate thei in; sangawngsaula huk diang ngongngong na hi vele.
24002024	Gam sabiltung gamdai a om, ahuk lai a dak uau-uau a dik vutvut bang; a-utna kua'n ahia dalzou ding? Azongmi kihihgim nuam dah hen, ahun in amu na ding uh.
24002025	Na khe ah khedap bun lou in om ke'nla, na dang leng hul kei heh; nang bel, lamet abeita, pau tuam mite ka ngai a, amau ka delh ding,’ na chi hi.
24002026	“Guta aphawk ua azum bang in, Israel inkote azumta uh, amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh leng.
24002027	Singbul kiang a, ‘Ka pa na hi,’ chi a, suangbul kiang a, ‘Kei hon suangtu na hi,’ chi mite; masuan lou in adekkhuk sah uh ahon suan zaw ua, amangbat hun un bel, ‘Thou in, hon hondam tanla,’ achi ding uh, na pathian, huai na bawlte koi a om ahita ua?
24002028	“Amau thou zaw uhenla, na mangbat lai in ahon hondam thei khamoh ding uhia; aw Judah, na pathiante bel na khopite zah mah ahi ve ua oi!
24002029	Bangziak a ka tung a vui nak? Na vek un ka tung ah thil na hihkhial ngal ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24002030	Na tate uh ka khen a, aphatuam kei, ahoih loh tuan kei uh; humpinelkai duhgawl bang mai in, noumau namsau in na zawlneite uh ane khin uhi.
24002031	Aw khangthakte aw, Toupa thu thei un, Israel a ding in gamdai gam bang ka hi maw? Mial sah meuhmouh gam ka hi maw? Ka mite'n bangdia, ka pawt kichianta ua, ka hong kik nawn kei ding uh, chi uh ahia?
24002032	Nungak siangthou in akizephoihnate amangngilh thei in, mouthak in akivatna amangngilh thei ding maw? Ka mite'n ni sim seng louh sung in ahon na mangngilhta uhi.
24002033	Deihtakmi muhtheihna ding in na omdan ngentel na chia! Numei gilou kiang ah leng na omdan na sinsakta ve.
24002034	Na nikte ah leng migenthei poi khoihloute hinna sisan alang a; na inn abuluh lai khutmat ahi kei uhi.
24002035	“Ka moh kei a, kei a kipan ahehna lakmang ahi, na chi nawn ngal a, ngai in, ‘Ka gilou kei hi,’ na chih ziak in, na tungthu ka ngaihtuah ding.
24002036	Na omdan kheng mengmeng a, bangziak a vialvak vak na hia? Assuria na zumpih mah bang in, Aigupta leng na zumpih lai ding hi.
24002037	Na khutte lukhuk in akiang ua pan na pawtkhe nawn dia, Toupa'n lah na muannate apaikheta ngal a, amau ah na lamzang kei ding hi.”
24003001	Mi'n zi ma henla, amah a pan paikhia in pasal dang neileh, ama'n aneikik nawn diam? Agam in nitloh hial lou ding hia? chih a-om. Nang bel tangval tampi kiang ah na hukmang in, huchipi in ka kiang ah na hong kik nawn ding maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24003002	Tang giau viauvuau lam ah na mitte lengtousak inla, en in, ahon kithuahpihlouhna mun koi ah? Gamdai a Arabia mi bang mai in amau ngak in lampi geite ah na tu nilouh sek, na hukna leh na thulimlouhnate in gam na hihnin khinta hi.
24003003	Huaiziak in vuah zuksak ahi kei a, vuah nanung leng azu sam kei; mihuk talpuak in na pua, na zum het kei hi.
24003004	Ka pa, ka tuailai a hon pipa na hi, chi in tua kipan in na sam kei ding maw?
24003005	Na heh tawntung ding a hia? Athangpaihna a omden ding ahia? Ngai in, huchibang in na pau ngei a, himahleh agilou theipen in thil na hih hi.
24003006	Huai lou leng Josiah vaihawm lai in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel thilhih na mu hia? Tang sang chih a kuantou a, singbawk chih nuaite a ahukna thil ahihte?
24003007	Huan ke'n bel hiai thil tengteng ahih nung in ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn ding, ka chi a; himahleh ahong kik tuan kei; huchi in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in amu samta hi.
24003008	Ama'n nungkinhat Israel a-angkawm ziak a ka mak a, makna lai ka piak amuh in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in alau tuan kei, huchih nak sang in ava hoh a, hukna thil ava hihteita hi.
24003009	Huan ahuk mawkmawk zenhouh ziak in gam ahihnin khinta a; singbul, suangbul kiang ah ang akawmta hi.
24003010	Huchipi in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah lungtangtak a ka kiang a hong kik lou in azuaulel in ahong kik a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24003011	Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah sang in diktatzaw in akihihlang a.
24003012	Kuan inla, hiai thu mallam ah va puang in; Nungkinhat Israel hong kik in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Heh melpu in ka hon en kei ding a, zahngaitheitak ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, ka heh tawntung kei ding hi.
24003013	Toupa na Pathian tung a na helnate, singbawk nuai a pau tuam mite kiang a na kiphal gaihnate, ka paukam suak na manlouhnate a na thulimlouhna ah thupha tawi in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24003014	Aw nungkinhat tate aw, hong kik un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nou hon honpa ka hi ngal a, na lak ua kipan khopi a mi khat, inkuan a mi nih ka hon la ding a, Zion ah ka hon pi ding hi.
24003015	Ka lung toh kituak belamchingte ka hon pe ding a, amau theihna leh theihsiamnate in noute ahon vak ding uhi.
24003016	Huchi in na hong tam ua, gam a na hong pun chiang un, huai ni chiang in amau, Toupa thukhun bawm, achi ngei nawn kei ding uh; alungsim uah alut kei ding a, theih leng atheigige sam kei ding uh; akhelah nawn kei ding ua, abawl nawn kei ding uh.
24003017	Huai nung in Jerusalem bel Toupa laltutphah achi ding ua, huai ah nam tengteng Toupa min in Jerusalem ah ahong paikhawm ding uh; alungtang gilou khauhna uh bang in apaita kei ding uh.
24003018	Huai ni chiang in Judah inkote Israel inkote toh a-omkhawm ding ua, mallam gam a kipan in, na pipute uh kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak gam ah, ahong pawtkhe ding uh.
24003019	Ke'n bel, “Nam chih lak a gouluah ding hoihpen, gam nuamtak hon pia in, tate lak a hon koih ka utdan! Ka pa, chi a na hon sap a, na hon zuihna a kipan na pialmang kei ding, chih ka na um hi.
24003020	Zi khemhat pasal ang kawmsan bang in, Aw Israel inkote aw, hon khem na hita ve ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24003021	Tang giau velvul tung ah husa a-om hi, Israel suante kap leh thil ngen husa, Toupa Pathian amangngilh ua, a-omdan uh ahihgawp ziak un.
24003022	Anungkin hat tate aw, hong kik unla, na nungkin seknate uh ka hihdam ding hi; en dih, na kiang ah ka hong pai uhi, nang Toupa ka Pathian uh na hi.
24003023	“Mualte a hotdamna lamet athawn ahi, tang tung a husa chiak vengvungte; Israel hotdamna zaw Toupa i Pathian kia ah ahi a-om.
24003024	Himahleh huai thilkihhuai mahmah in i tuailai a kipan i pipute'n tha asukbeina uh anebeita hi; abelamhonte uh, aganhonte uh, atanute uh, atapate uh tan in.
24003025	Zum in lum ni e, i zahlakna in hon khuh heh; Toupa i Pathian tung ah thil i hihkhial ua, ei leh i pipute'n i tuailai a kipan tuni tan in Toupa i Pathian paukam i mang kei uhi.”
24004001	“Aw Israel, na hong kikleh, ka kiang ngei ah na hong kik ding ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na kihhuainate ka mitmuh louh a na koihmang a, chihtaktak a, thugel diktak zang a diktattak a;
24004002	Toupa ahin lai teng, chi a na kichiamleh namte amah ah nuamsa akichi ding ua, amah asuangta ding uh.
24004003	“Judah mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na lei sit uh let unla, lingte lak ah chi theh kei un.
24004004	Nou Judah gam a mi leh Jerusalem a tengte aw, Toupa a ding in na zek uh sum unla, na lungtang zek uh sum un, huchi lou in zaw na thil gilou hihte uh ziak in, ka hehna mei bang in apawtkhe ding a, kuamah phelh theih louh in akang kha ding.
24004005	Judah gam ah hilh unla, Jerusalem ah puang un, Gam pumpi ah pengkul mut unla, ngaihtak in kikou un. Hong kikhawm unla, kulh nei khopite ah i lut ding uh, chi un;
24004006	Zion lam ah puanzak khai unla, bitna zong in tai unla, zekai kei un, mallam a pan thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding, nakpi a siatna.
24004007	Gammang nuai ning kitel a kipan in humpinelkai apawt hi, namte hihse ding; amun a kipan apawtta, ahong pai lellel hi, na gam hihse ding leh na khopite teng mi nei lou khop a sugawp ding in.
24004008	Huaiziak in sai-ip puan teng unla, kap un, mau vongvong un; i lak ua kipan in Toupa hehna thupi lah akikaikhe ngal kei a.”
24004009	“Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; kumpipa lungtang a lungke khin ding a, heutute lungtang leng; siampute'n gen ding athei kei ding ua, zawlneite'n lamdang asa ding uh.”
24004010	Huan ke'n, “Ah, Toupa Pathian , hiai mite leh Jerusalem nakpitak a khem na hi ve, ‘Muanna na nei ding uh,’ na chi a, namsau in hinna asun zawta,” ka chi hi.
24004011	Huai hun chiang in hiai mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah, “Gamdai tang giau velvul a kipan huih sa, ka tanu, ka mite zapsiang ding hilou; siangsak ding hi sam lou;
24004012	Huih hat lua, ka thu in ahong tung ding ahi; tu in leng atungthu uh ngaihtuahpa kei ka hi,” chih ahi ding.
24004013	Ngai dih, ahong paitou ding, meipi bang in, akangtalai pingpei bang maite; asakolte muvanlai sang in ahatzaw uh, i tung gik na e! Buluh a om i hi ve ua.
24004014	Aw Jerusalem, thulimlouhna a kipan na lungtang silsiang inla, hotdam a na omtheihna ding in; bang tan ahia na ngaihtuahna gilou na pai ding?
24004015	Dan gam a kipan aw ahong pawtkhia a, Ephraim tang a kipan in thil hoih lou apuang hi.
24004016	Namte hilh unla, Jerusalem ah puang un, “Ngai dih, gam gamlapi a kipan sual mite ahong tung uh, Judah khopite tung ah a-aw uh asuah uhi.
24004017	Louma veng mite bang mai in akimvel in a-um ua, ka tung a ahel ziak un chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24004018	“Na omdan leh na thilhihte'n, hiaite na tung ah atun ahi, hiai na siatna ding ahi, ana mahmah a na lungtang sun ei ve.”
24004019	Ka lung ana, ka lung ana, ka lungtang mahmah ana, ka sung ah ka lungtang abuaita a, ka om maimai thei kei, aw ka hinna, pengkul ging, kidouna husa ka zak ziak in.
24004020	Siatna tung ah siatna atungta, gam pumpi loh in a-omta, ka puaninte ahihse guih ua, ka puanzakte leng mitphiat kal lou in.
24004021	“Bang tan ahia kidouna puanzak ka muh ding a, pengkul ging ka zak ding?
24004022	Ka mite ahai mahmah ua lah athei ngal kei ua, naupang haitak, theihna nei lou bang mai ahi ua, thil gilou hih asiam ua, thil hoih hihdan asiam kei uh.”
24004023	Leitung ka etleh, ngai dih, segawp leh vuak in a-om a; vante'n vakna anei kei uh.
24004024	Tangte ka etleh, ngai in, aling uh, mual tengteng leng atang zualzual uh.
24004025	Ka etleh, ngai in, mihing a-om kei ua, tungleng vasate alengmang khinta uh.
24004026	Ka etleh, ngai in, louma hoihte gamdai asuak khin a, khopite leng achim khin, Toupa leh ahehna mahmah ah.
24004027	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gam pumpi asegawp ding, himahleh ka hihtawp tawntung kei ding.”
24004028	“Huaiziak in lei in asuun ding a, tunglam vante leng amial ding; thu ka genta a, ka tumta hi, ka kisik kei a, ka lunghei kei hi.
24004029	Sakol tung a tuang leh thalpeu zang mite husa ah, khopi pumpi ataikek ua, gammang ah alut ua, kho chih anusia ua, luahmi khat lel leng om lou in.
24004030	“Huan nang, loh a na om hun chiang in bangchi in na hih dia? Puan san-au a kizem in, kivatna dangka-eng a kivan in, na mitte nuh mah lechin, na kihih lawm thawn ahi, na tangvalte'n ahon simmoh ding ua, na hinna lak atum uhi.
24004031	Numei nauvei kikou husa ka za, tachil neinu thuak lai, Zion tanu nak ging, akhutte zak a, ka tung gik hi na mai e! Tualthat mite ma ah ka hinna abah khinta,” chi in.
24005001	Jerusalem kholakte ah vialtai unla, chiamteh un! Amual tamte zong unla, mi khat bek diktattak a hih a, thutak zong mahmah na muh theih uleh, Jerusalem ka ngaidam ding.
24005002	“ Toupa ahin a ahin sung, chi mah le uh, zuau in akichiam lel uh ahi.
24005003	Aw Toupa , thutak na muhnop ahi kei a hia? Amau na sat a, himahleh alungkham tuan kei uh, amau na hihmang a, na thuzohna apom nuam tuan kei uh, suangpi sang a tak in atal uh ataksak ua, akilehhei nuam kei bikbek uhi.
24005004	“Ke'n, hiaite miphalou, ahai lai ua, Toupa dan, a Pathian uh thugel athei kei uhi.
24005005	Miliante kiang ah ka hohta ding a, ka houpih ding a, amau zaw Toupa dan leh Pathian thugelte athei uh,” achi a. Himahleh hiai mite'n thukhat sat in, hakkol ahihtan ua, henna khau ahihtat uhi.
24005006	Huaiziak in gammang nuai a humpinelkai in amaute akei ding a, gamdai ngia in amaute ane bei ding a, gialbem in akhopite a tang in, huai a hong pawt peuhmah abotzan ding; atatleknate uh atam a, anungkinnate uh athupi mahmah ziak in.
24005007	“Bangchi in ka hon ngaidam thei dia? Na tate'n ahon paisan ua, Pathian hiloupite sam in akichiam ua, taitak a ka vak nung in ang a kawm ua, kizuak innte ah akivel hehu uh.
24005008	Amaute zingsang a sakol vakvah bang mai ahi ua, michih ama invengpa zi enlah in aham hi.
24005009	Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei ding maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hichibang nam tung ah phu ka kilaksak kei ding a hia?
24005010	Abaangte ah kaltou unla, hihsia un, himahleh hihse khin vek kei un, ahiangte lamang un, Toupa a lah ahi ngal kei hi.
24005011	Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n ka tung ah lepchiahtak in ahih uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24005012	Toupa bel zuauthei dia sep in, “Bangmah ahihthei sam kei ding, siatna i tung uah atung kei ding, kial hiam namsau hiam i thuak kei ding.
24005013	Zawlneite leng huihzam lel ahi ding ua, amau ah thu a-om kei a; atung uah hichibang a hih ahi ding,” achi uhi.
24005014	Huaiziak in Toupa , Sepaihte' Pathian in achi: “Huchibang thu na gen ziak un, ngai in, na kam a ka thute mei ka suaksak ding a, hiai mipi singte akang khin ding.”
24005015	Ngai un, aw Israel inkote aw, gamlapi a kipan, nam khat na kiang ah ka hon pi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nam hattak, nidanglai a kipan a, apau uh na theih louh, athugen uh na theih louh namte.
24005016	Athalbawm uh han kihong ahi a, avek un mihattak ahi khin uh.
24005017	Na buhlaksa leh na nek ding ane khin vek ding uh; na tanute na tapate nek ding mahmah; na ganhonte, na belamhonte ane ding ua, na grep guite, na theipi kungte ane ding ua, na khopi kulh nei, na muanpi pente mahmah namsau in ahihse ding uhi.
24005018	“Himahleh huai nite ah leng ka hon hihchimit kei ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24005019	Hichi ahong hi ding a, “Bangziak a Toupa i Pathian un hiai thil tengteng i tung ua hih ahia?” Na mite un achih hun chiang un, “N'on paisan ua, na gam ua pathian dangte nna na sep bang un, na gam lou uah, paudang mite nna na sem ding uh, akiang uah na chi ding ahi.”
24005020	“Jakob inkote lak ah hiai genkhia unla, Judah gam ah puang un.
24005021	Aw theihtheihna nei lou, mihaite aw, mit nei a lah mu lou, bil nei a lah zaloute aw, hiai ngaikhia un.
24005022	N'on kihta kei uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ka ma ah na ling kei ding uh maw? Kei, tuipi huap chiang a dia piautak, tangtawn a aletlouhna ding a daikaihna, tuipi kihot zou mahleh alet tuan theih louh a, ging honhon mahleh akhen theih louh ding bawlpa ka hi.
24005023	Himahleh hiai mite'n genhakna leh helhat lungtang apu ua, ahel ua, ataimangta uh.
24005024	Alungtang un leng, Toupa i Pathian, ahuntak a vuah masa leh vuah nanung zusakpa, buh leh hunbi hon sehsakpa laudan i siam ding uh, achi sam kei uh.
24005025	Hiai thilte na thulimlouhnate un ahihmang a, na khelhnate un thil hoih nou ahon tansak ahi.
24005026	“Ka mite lak ah migilou a-om ngal ua, vasa gemmi in atan bang in atang gige ua, thang akam ua, mite aman uh.
24005027	Bawm vasa a dim bang mai in, a-innte uh khemna in adim a, huaiziak in ahong lian ua, ahong hauhsak lohta uhi.
24005028	Ahong thau ua, ahong zol ua, ahi, agitlouhna thilhihte un hun chiang anei kei, pa neiloute lamzanna ding in amau lam ah apang kei uhi.
24005029	“Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei dia hia?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Hichibang nam tung ah ka hinna in phu ala kei ding a hia?
24005030	Huai gam ah thillamdangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahong tung hi.
24005031	Zawlneite'n zuauthu agen ua, siampute'n lah amau thuthu in vai ahawm ua, ka mite'n lah huchibang hih a-ut uhi, atawp ah bangchi in na hih ding ua le?”
24006001	Benjamin tate aw, Jerusalem sung a kipan na bitna ding un taimang unla; Tekoa ah pengkul mut unla Beth-hakkerem ah theihsakna suaksak un. Mallam a kipan in siatna ahong kuan hi, hihsiatna thupi mahmah.
24006002	Zion tanu melhoihtak leh noutak ka hihmang ding.
24006003	Belampute, abelamhonte uh toh akiang ahong tung ding ua, akim ah apuaninte uh akaihkhum ding ua, amau mun chiat ah ake ding uh.
24006004	Amah dou ding in kisa un, thou unla, sun lai in i sual ding uh, ei a ding in khawk hi na e! Ni akihekta a, nitaklam limliap ana sauta hi.
24006005	Thou unla, zan in i sual mai ding uh! A-inn hoihhoih uh hihsia ni.
24006006	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Asingte phuk unla, Jerusalem sualna ding in mualvum bawl un, khopi gawt ding pen hiai ahi, asung ah nuaisiahna ngen ahi.
24006007	Tuileh in tui apawtsak bang mai in agitlouhna apawtsak sek, asung ah hiamgamna leh kilohna a-om chih zak ahi, ka ma ah natna leh kiliamsaknate a-om nilouh hi.
24006008	Ka lungsim in ahon nutsiat vengveng ma in aw, Jerusalem, pilvang in, huchi lou in zaw luahmi nei lou gam dia hon bawl in, ka hon hihgawp kha ding hi.”
24006009	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel khosuaksunte grep bang in lou siang vek unla, grep lou mi bang in ahiangte ban tuantuan un.
24006010	“Angaihkhiak theihna ding un kua ka houpih in, kua ka theisak dia? Ngai in, bil lam zeksum louh ahi ua, angaikhe thei kei uh; ngai in, Toupa thu amau a ding in thil simmohhuai ahi a, kipahna mahmah anei nawn kei uh.
24006011	Huaiziak in Toupa hehna in ka dim a, ka kidek zou nawn kei; kholak a naupang tung ah ka bungkhe dia; tangval omkhawmte tung ah leng, azi toh kiton in pasal leng lak ahi ding a, upate leh teksiate leng.
24006012	A-innte uh midang kiang a piak ahi ding a, aloumate uleh azite uh toh; huai gam a tengte tung ah ka khut lik ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24006013	Aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in leng michih huaihamna in adim ua; zawlneite leh siampute nangawn leng, michih azuautat mahmah uhi.
24006014	Ka mite liamna, awlmoh loutak buaipih in, muanna a-om louh laitak in Muanna, muanna, achi ua.
24006015	Thilkihhuai ahih un leng azum ua hia? Zum lou hial, azum het kei uh, amai uh leng asan sam kei; huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua; amaute ka gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
24006016	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lamka thuam ah dingh unla, en un, lampi hoih omna lampi luite tawn un, huai ah pai unla, na kha uh a ding in khawlna na mu ding uh,” amau bel, “Huai ah ka pai kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
24006017	Huan nou a ding in galvil mite ka sep ding a, “Pengkul ging ngaikhia un,” chi in; amau bel, “Ka ngaikhe kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
24006018	Huaiziak in “Aw, namte aw, ngaikhia unla, aw, kikhawmte aw, atung ua hong tung ding thei un.
24006019	Aw, leitung, ngaikhia in, ngai in, hiai mite tung ah siatna ka hon tun ding; angaihtuahna gahte uh; ka thute angaihkhiak louh ziak un; ka dante lah apaikhe hithet ua.
24006020	Bangziak a Sheba a kipan begaw, gamlapi a kipan kawltute ka kiang hong tung nak ahia? Na halmang kithoihnate uh kipahpihtak ahi kei a, na kithoihnate un ahon kipaksak sam kei hi.
24006021	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Hiai mite kiang ah puknate ka koih ding a, huai ah pate atapate uh toh apukkhawm ding ua, inveng leh alawm leng amangthang ding uh,’ ” chi in.
24006022	Huan Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, mallam gam a kipan mite ahong pai uh, lei mun tawp a kipan nam thupi mahmah ahong kuankhia hi.
24006023	Thalpeu leh teipi atawi ua, hiamgam mahmah, zahngaihna himhim nei lou ahi uhi, ahusa uh tuipi ging honhon bang ahia; sakol tungte ah atuang ua, michih galkapmi bang a kivan in, aw, Zion tanu, nang ahong sual dek uhi,” chi in.
24006024	“Aminthanna uh i za ua, i khutte azaw khinta, numei nauvei lunggimna bangbang lunggimna'n ahon manta hi.
24006025	Gam ah paikhe kei un, lampi ah leng pai sam kei un, huai ah lah melma namsau a-om ngal a, kil chih ah launa a-om hi.”
24006026	“Aw, ka mi, ka tanu, sai-ip puan teng inla, vut lak ah tubial in; tapa tang khat suun bang in suun inla, kap vongvong dih, i tung uah hihsemi ahong tung guih dek ngal ua.
24006027	Ka mite lak a chiamtehmi ding leh ze-etmi ding in ka hon bawl a, a-omdan uh na theih a, na ze-et theihna ding in.
24006028	Avek un genhaktak a helhat, gensiat ching a vialvak, dal leh sik bang ahi uh, hoihloupi in agamtang uhi.
24006029	Pum in azap huhu a, mei ah asuan zulbei a, hihsiangthou tupna athawn lel ahi; migiloute lah paihmang ahi ngal kei ua.
24006030	Mite'n dangkasik ek hoih lou achi ding uh, Toupa'n amaute apampaih ziak in,” achi hi.
24007001	Toupa a pan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung:
24007002	“ Toupa' inn kongpi ah dingh inla, huai ah hiai thu puang inla, hichi in chi in; Nou Judah mi tengteng, Toupa be ding a hiai kongpi a lutte'n Toupa thu ngaikhia un.”
24007003	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, hiai mun ah ka hon tengsak ding hi.
24007004	Hiai, “ Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul ahi,” chih zuauthute gingta kei un.
24007005	“Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh na bawlhoih petmah ua, mi leh invengte kikal a thu diktak a na vai hawmsak ua,
24007006	namdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite na nuaisiah louh ua, hiai mun a midiktat sisan na suah louh ua, na hoihlouhna ding ua pathian dangte na delh sam kei ualeh,
24007007	hiai gam, tuma lam a na pipute uh kiang a ka piak ah tangtawn in ka hon tengsak ding hi.
24007008	Ngai un, zuauthu, phattuamna om het lou na gingtazaw ua.
24007009	Gukgu in, tualthat in, angkawm in, zuau a kichiam in Baal kiang a gimlim hal in, pathian dang, na theih ngeilouhte uh na delh uhi.
24007010	Hiai inn, ka min mahmah a loh ah ka ma ah hong ding in, hiai thilkihhuai tengtengte hih zel kawm in, hotkhiak ka hita, na chi ding ua hia?
24007011	Hiai inn ka min mahmah a loh, na mitmuh un suamhatte kokhuk bang lel ahi hia? Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka mu hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24007012	Atung a ka min ka tensakna, ka mun Shiloh ah hoh dih ua, ka mi Israel gitlouhna ziak a ka thilhih va en un.
24007013	Tu in hiai thil tengteng na hih ua, phalvak a thou a na kiang ua thu ka gengente na ngaihkhiak louh ua, nou ka hon sap a, na dawn louh ziak un;
24007014	Shiloh tung a ka hih bang in hiai ka min lohna inn, noumau leh na pipute uh kiang a ka mun piak, na muan uh tung ah ka hih dek ahi.
24007015	Na unau tengteng uh, Ephraim nam pumpi nangawn ka paihkhiak bang in ka mitmuh a kipan nou ka hon paikhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24007016	“Huaiziak in hiai mite a ding in thum ke'nla, kikoukhia in thum ke'nla, ka kiang ah leng ngetsak sam ke'n; ka hon ngaikhe kei ding hi.
24007017	Judah khopite a leh Jerusalem kholakte a athilhih uh na mu kei a hia?
24007018	Naupangte'n sing atom ua, apate un mei atoh ua, numeite'n van kumpinu kiang a lat ding tanghou amek ua, pathian dangte ding in dawn ding thillat atungkhia ua, ahon hehsakna lel ding un.
24007019	Kei ahi maw hon hehsak uh?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau zumna ding in amau ahi zaw kei uh maw?
24007020	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai dih uh, hiai mun tung ah ka hehna leh thangpaihna ka sungkhe ding a; akang dia, amit kei ding.
24007021	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kithoihnate uah halmang kithoihnate behlap unla, sa ne un.
24007022	Halmang thillat hiam, kithoihnate hiam tungthu ah zaw na pipute uh kiang ah thu ka gen kei a, Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak lai in leng thu ka pe sam kei.
24007023	Ka aw ngaikhia unla, na Pathian uh ka hi ding a, nou leng ka mite na hi ding uh; na hoihtheihna ding un na omdan ding uh ka hon hilh tengteng zui un, chi in thu ka pe zaw hi.
24007024	Himahleh angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungtang gilou ua angaihtuah uh zui in a-om zaw uh, malam zot sang in anungtawn zawta uhi.
24007025	Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan apawt ni ua kipan a tuni tan in ka nasemmi, zawlnei tengtengte phalvak a thou in na kiang uah niteng in ka sawl zel a,
24007026	himahleh ahon ngaikhe tuan kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungsim uh akhauhsak ua, apipute uh sang in agilou zawta uhi.
24007027	“Hiai thu tengteng akiang ua na gen ding ahi; himahleh ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua; amau na sam ding a, ahon dawng kei ding uh.
24007028	Akiang uah, ‘Hiai nam Toupa a Pathian uh aw ngaikhe lou a, thununna tang lou nam ei ve ua, na chi ding a; thudik amangthangta, akam ua kipan paihmang ahita.
24007029	Na sam tan inla, paimang in, mun sang giaute ah kapkhia in; Toupa'n ahehna khang paikhia in anawlkhinta hi.’
24007030	“Judah tate'n lah ka mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ngal uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ka min lohna inn ninsak ding in athilkihhuaite uh akoih khin uhi.
24007031	Atanute uh, atapate uh hal ding in Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah Taphet mun sangte abawl ua; huaite ka thupiak ahi kei a, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei sam kei.
24007032	Huaiziak in ngai dih uh, nite ahong tung dek,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai phaizang pen Tophet, chih ahi nawn kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang, chih leng ahi sam kei ding a Kithahna Phaizang chih ahita ding; Tophet ah avui ding ua, vuina ding mun a-omta kei ding.
24007033	Mite luang tung a leng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding; kuamah in adelhmang kei ding uh.
24007034	Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah nuamsa husate leh kipahna gingte, mouneipa awte, mou awte leng ka daisak ding; agam segawp ding ahi ngal a.
24008001	Huai hun chiang in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipate guhte, aheutute guhte, siampute guhte, zawlneite guhte, Jerusalem a tengte guhte ahan ua kipan alakhe ding ua;
24008002	nite, khate, van a om tengteng, a-it ua, nna asep ua, adelh ua, azon ua, chibai abukte uh ma ah aphoukhe ding uh; lakkhawm ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vui ahi sam kei ding uh; leitung a ekvut lel ding ahi ding.
24008003	Hiai inkuan gilou mahmah om lai sung tengteng, ka hawlzakna mun a omlaite'n hin sang in sih atel zaw ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24008004	Huai lou leng akiang uah huchi in na gen ding hi, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Mi apuk un athounawn kei ding ua hia? Mi avakmang in ahong kik nawn kei dia hia?
24008005	Bang achia hiai Jerusalem mite, tangtawn a nungtawn ding a atolhpuk uh? Khemna alenkip ua, kik nawn a-ut kei uh.
24008006	Ka bildoh in ka ngaikhia a, kuamah in thudik agen kei uh, kuamah in, “Bang ahia ka hih?” chi in athulimlouhna uh akisik sam kei uh; michih in amau lampi anga chiat uh; kidouna mun a sakol dianglut bang mai in.
24008007	Ahi, van a tuivapi in ahunbite athei a, vakhute, lensiamte, tuivanelkaite, ahun geihgeih in ahong tung zel uh. Ka mite'n bel Toupa thukhendante athei kei uh.
24008008	Bangchi in ahia, mipil i hi ua, Toupa dan i kiang uah a-om, na chih uh? Ngai un, laigelhmi laigelhna zuauthei in, zuau in asuaksak zaw uhi.
24008009	Mipilte azum un alungdong ding ua, mat in a-om ding uh; ngai un, Toupa thu apaikhia ua, amau ah bang pilna a-om a hia?
24008010	Huaiziak in azite uh midangte kiang ah ka pe ding a, aloute uh leng ahon neimi a dingte kiang ah; michih, aneupen a kipan athupipen tan in en hat ahi uhi. Zawlnei a kipan a siampu tan in leng michih khemhat ahi uhi.
24008011	Ka tanu, ka mite liam awlmoh loutak in, muanna om lou napi, “Muanna, muanna,” chi in athoih uhi.
24008012	Thilkihhuai ahih un azum uhia? Ii, azum het kei ua, amel uh leng asan kei. Huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua, amaute gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24008013	Amau ka hihmang vek ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; grep guite agah kei ding a, theipi kungte agah sam kei ding; anah leng avuai ding a, amaute tummang dingte ka sep khinta hi.
24008014	Bangziak a tulai lai i hi ua? Kikaikhawm unla, khopi kulh neite ah lut unla, huai ah i mangthang diam ding uh; Toupa tung a i gitlouh tak ziak in; Toupa i Pathian un gutui dawn ding hon pia in manthatna ah ahon koih hi.
24008015	Muanna i zong ua, hoihna bangmah ahong tung kei, hihdamna hun ding leng, ngai in, lungdonna lel!
24008016	Asakol nak ging uh Dan a kipan a zak ahi a, asakol uh ham ging in gam pumpi aling a, ahong tung ua, asung a om teng, agai vek ua, khopi leh asung a tengte toh.
24008017	Ngai un, na lak uah gulpi ka sawl ding a, gulgu nei, khoizual vuallouhte; huaite'n nou ahon tu ding ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24008018	Aw lungkhamna ah kilungmuan thei leng aw! Sunggil ah ka lungtang abah khinta hi.
24008019	Ngai un, gam gamlapi a kipan, ka mite tanu kah husa, Zion ah Toupa a-om kei a hia? Asung a akumpipa om lou ahi maw? milim bawltawmte leh namdang milimte'n bang achia hon hehsak ahi ua?
24008020	Buh lak hun akikhelta, nipi abeita, hotdam in i om kei lailai.
24008021	Ka mite, ka tanu natna ah ka na a, ka suun a, lungdonna in ahon len hi.
24008022	Gilead a singnai damdawi om lou hia? huai ah hihdam mi a-om kei a hia? bangziak a ka mite, ka tanu damthei lou ahia?
24009001	Ka lu tui hi in, ka mit khitui nak hileh aw, ka mi, ka tanu thahte a ding in asun-azan in ka kap ding,
24009002	Gamdai ah khualbuk nei thei leng aw! Ka mite paisan in om mangsan leng aw; angkawm hatmi ahi vek ngal ua, khemhat omkhawm lel ahi uh.
24009003	Alei uh thalpeu bang in zuau in azang ua, gam ah akhanglian ua, thutak a khang lou in gilou lam ah akhang ua, kei hon thei lou in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24009004	Noumau inveng lak ah pilvang chiat unla, na unaute himhim uh muang kei un; unaute lah khemhat ahi ngal ua; invengte leng gensiat hat ahi uh.
24009005	Amau inveng chiat akhem ding ua, thudik agen kei ding uh; alei uh zuaugen akisinsak ua, thulimlouhna sem in agim uhi.
24009006	Khem hat lak ah na teng a, akhemna uh ziak in kei ahon thei nuam kei uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24009007	Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai un, amau ka tuisuaksak ding a, ka ze-et ding; ka mi, ka tanu ziak in bang dang ahia ka hihtak ding aw?
24009008	Alei uh sihna thal ahi a, khemna thu agen zel, mi'n kam in invengte kiang ah kituahna thu gen mahleh, alungtang ah amah atang giugiau hi.
24009009	Hiai thilhihte ziak in ka gawt kei dia hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi; nam hichibang tung ah phu ka la kei dia hia?
24009010	Tangte a ding in ka kap dia, ka mau vungvung ding, gamdai loupa munte ka suun ding a, kuamah pai nawnlouhna ding a akat khit tak ziak in, mite'n ganta husa aza nawnta kei ding ua, tung a leng vasate leh gamsate leng ataikek ua, apaimangta uh.
24009011	Huan Jerusalem bel thil sia omkhawm lel in ka bawl dek a, sehalte tenna mun ahi ding; Judah khopite tengmi om lou in ka hihgawp ding.
24009012	Hiai theisiam ding in mipil kua ahia? Puangkhe ding a Toupa thugen na sang mi pen kua ahia? Bangziak in ahia gam asiat khit a, kuamah pailouhna ding a gamdai bang a akat khit?
24009013	Huan Toupa'n , “Ka dan, ama ua ka koih apaisan ua, ka paukam suak amang kei ua, azui kei uh,
24009014	alungtang khauh uh zui a, apipute un asinsak uh Baalte adelh zawk tak ziak un;
24009015	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, amau, hiai mite mahmah gamsai in ka vak ding a, tui kha leng ka dawnsak ding.
24009016	Nam, amau leh apipute un leng atheih ngeilouhte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a; ka hihmanthat vek mateng namsau ka delhsak ding.”
24009017	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngaihtuah unla, numei kap mite hong pai ding in sam un, numei kahsiamte hong pai ding in sam lai un.
24009018	Hong kin uhenla, hong kahkhum peuhmah le uh, i khitui aluan a, i mitte ua tui apawttheihna ding in.
24009019	Zion a kipan kah husa zak ahi ngal a, i naksiat khit takdan uh; gen ding i thei mahmah kei ua, i gam i paisan ziak uleh, i tennate apaihkhiak tak ziak un.
24009020	Aw nou numeite aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia unla, akamsuak thu na bil uah lut henla, na tanute uh kah sinsak un; michih in a-invengnu kiang ah suunna la.
24009021	I tawlet uahte sihna kal lut in i kumpipa' inn uahte alutta hi; inn polam a kipan naupang hihmang ding leh, kholak a kipan tangval hihmang ding.
24009022	Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi: Mi luangte gamlak ah ekvut bang in apuk ding ua, buh lami buhmaih bang in; kuamah in alakhawm kei ding, chi in.
24009023	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Mipil in apilna suang kei henla mihat in ahatna suang sam kei hen, mihau in asum-le-pai suang kei hen.
24009024	Asuang peuhmah in hiai suang hen, Kei Toupa , zahngaihna, vaihawmdikna, diktatna lei a zangpa ka hi chih atheih a, atheihsiamnatak; hiai thilte ka kipah lam ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24009025	Ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, zeksum hi ngal, sum louh bang zaw ka gawt ding.
24009026	Aigupta, Judah, Edom, Ammon leh Moab, gamdai a teng, baksam metgiaute; hiai nam tengteng zeksumlouhte ahi ngal ua, Israel inkote tengteng leng lungtang a zeksumlouhte ahi uh.
24010001	Aw, Israel inkote aw, na kiang ua Toupa thugen ngaikhia un,
24010002	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Namte omdan ching kei unla, van a chiamtehnate ziak in leng lunglau sam kei un; huaite ah namte lunglau in a-om nak uhi.
24010003	Mite dante bangmah lou ahi ngal a, Gamnuai ah sing aphuk ua, heipi a mikhutsiam khut in asep ahi.
24010004	Dangkasik leh dangka-eng in azem ua, atatlouhna ding in sikkilhna leh sek in akilh uh.
24010005	Tangmai huan a vasa lauh ding milim bang ahi ua, apau thei kei uh. Amau apai theih louh ziak un, puak suan akiphamoh sek uh; amaute lau kei un, thil sia ahihthei kei ua, thil hoih leng ahihthei sam kei uh.
24010006	Aw Toupa , nang bang kuamah a-om kei ua, na thupi a, na min hatna in athanglian hi.
24010007	Aw namte Kumpipa, kua'n ahia hon kihta lou ding? Huai lah na tuakzou him ngal a. Namte mipil tengteng lakte ah, alalgam lak uah leng, nang bang mahmah a-om kei uh.
24010008	Amau khawksak nei lou mihai ahi ua, manna bei sing milimte sinsak ahi uhi.
24010009	Tarshish a kipan dangkasik sek ahon la ua, Uphaz a kipan dangka-eng, mikhutsiam bawl, dangka-eng sekmi khutsuak, puansilh dumpuang leh sandup, mikhutsiam khutsuak vek ahi uhi.
24010010	Toupa bel Pathian tak ahi, Pathian hing tangtawn Kumpipa ahi, aheh in lei aling a, namte'n ahehna anangzou kei uh.
24010011	Akiang ua hichibang a na chih ding uh ahi: Pathian, lei leh van bawl hiloupi lei a kipan amangthang ding ua, van nuai a kipan amang vek ding uh.
24010012	Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a, apilna in khovel atungding a, alemtheihna in van akaipalh hi.
24010013	A-aw asuah chiang in, van ah tui aging honhon a, kawlmong a kipan meipi akahtousak a, vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a, agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi.
24010014	Michih amawl ua, theihna anei kei uh, dangka-eng sekmi in alimsek azumpih a, amilim sun lah zuau lel ahi a, amau ah hinna leng a-om kei hi.
24010015	Bangmah lou ahi ua, khemna nasep lel, agawt hun chiang un amang ding uh.
24010016	Jakob tantuan bel hichibang ahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahi ngal a; Israel agouluah nam ahi a, amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
24010017	Aw nang, um a om lellel in, lei a kipan na puanthuah lakhawm in,
24010018	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, tu in gam a tengte ka singkhe ding, aphawk tham un ka hihgenthei ding.”
24010019	Ka natna ziak in ka tung agik hi, ka liamna ana a, himahleh, “Hiai hial haksatna ahi, ka thuak mai ding ahi,” ka chi.
24010020	Ka puanin aseta, ka khau tengteng akitat vek a, ka kiang a kipan ka tate apawt ua, a-om nawn kei uh; ka puanin kaipalh ding a-omta kei uh, ka puanzak hon lepsak ding.
24010021	Belamching mite amawl ua, Toupa thudotdan athei kei uh; huaiziak in alamzang kei ua, abelamhonte uh adalhzak khinta.
24010022	Ngai un, mallam a pan husa ahong tung, buaina thupi mahmah, Judah khopite hihgawp in, sehal tenna ding a suaksak ding in.
24010023	Aw Toupa , mihing omdan bel, amah thu lel ahi kei chih ka theita hi; mihing akalsuante ama kipi hilou hi.
24010024	Aw Toupa , hon thunun inla, ahun lel in, heh lou in, huchi lou in zaw na hon hihmang kha ding hi.
24010025	Nang hon thei ngeiloute tung leh na min lou ngei lou namte tung ah na hehna bungkhia in; Jakob ane khin ua, ahi, ane khin ua, anemang ua, atenna gam ahihsia uhi.
24011001	Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung:
24011002	Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah gen un.
24011003	Nang akiang uah, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thukhun thute ngaikhe loumi hamsethuak in om hen.
24011004	Huai bel na pipute uh, Aigupta gam, sik haltuina kipan a ka pikhiak ni a, ka paukam suak mang unla, thu ka hon piak tengteng hih un, chi a ka thupiak tak ahi; huchi in ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding;
24011005	Na pipute uh kiang a khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam kichiam a piak ka chiamtak ka tangtun theihna ding in tuni a a-om bang in, hichi in achi: Huan ke'n, “Amen, Aw Toupa ,” chi in ka dawng hi.
24011006	Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah hiai thu tengteng puang inla: Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, zui un.
24011007	Na pipute un Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak ni a kipan tutan in ka paukam suak mang un, chi in ka theisak sek hi.
24011008	Himahleh amang kei ua, bil adoh kei ua, michih, amau lungtang gilou bang zel in a-om zaw uhi. Huaiziak in hiai thukhun thu, hih ding a thu ka piak, ahih louh tengteng uh atung uah ka hon tungsakta ahi,” achi a.
24011009	Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte lak ah phialgukna a-om.
24011010	Apipute uh, ka thu ngaikhe nuamloute thulimlouhna lam ah akilehhei nawn ua; pathian dangte nna sem ding in akuan ua; Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n apipute uh kiang a ka thukhun bawl pen ahihseta uh.”
24011011	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, atung uah thil hoih lou, apelh het louh ding uh ka hon tungsak ding; ahon sam ding ua, himahleh ka ngaikhe kei ding.”
24011012	Huan Judah khopite leh Jerusalem a tengte'n pathian, akiang ua gimlim ahal seknate uh asam ding ua, himahleh abuai hun chiang un huaite'n amau ahumbit het kei ding hi.
24011013	Aw Judah, na pathiante na khopi zah ahi ngal ua; thil zumhuaitak, Baal kiang a gimlim halna ding maitam hial leng Jerusalem kongzing zah in na dingsakta hi.
24011014	Huaiziak in hiaite thumsak ke'nla, amau a ding in ngetna hiam aw hiam suah sam ke'n; abuai hun chiang ua ahon sap uleh ka ngaikhe kei ding hi.
24011015	Thilkihhuai hih kawm in, ka deih mahmah in ka inn ah tantuam bang ahia aneih? Thu kichiamte leh Setan in na siatna ding uh ahon pelsak thei ding ahia? Na suang thei ua hia?
24011016	Toupa'n na min ding in olive sing hing, gah hoih kilawmpi, ahon chi a, lum honhon in atung ah mei atoh a, ahiangte leng akitan khinta.
24011017	Sepaihte' Toupa , nang hon phutpa'n, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote khelhna, Baal kiang a gimlim lan a, hon hehsak thil uh, amau a dia asepkhiak tung ua thil hoih lou ding thu na tung ah apuangkheta hi.
24011018	Toupa'n hon theisak a, ka theita; huchi in nang mahmah in athilhihte uh na hon kawkmuhta.
24011019	“Kei bel belamnou nunnemtak, goh ding a pi bang ka hi, sing pen agah toh, hihse ni e, mihing gam a kipan amah zaw i hihmang vengveng ding uh, amin mawngmawng theih ahihlouhna ding in, chi a ka tung a athil sawm uh ka na thei het kei.”
24011020	Himahleh, aw sepaihte' Toupa , diktak a vaihawmpa, sunggil lam leh lungtang entelpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak in, ka tungthu lah na kiang ah ka hon kemsak hi, chi in.
24011021	Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n Anathoth mi, na hinna zongpa, “Ka khut ua na sihlouhna ding in Toupa min in thu gen ke'n,” chi mite tungtang ah hichi in achi:
24011022	“Ngai un, amau ka gawt ding a, tangvalte namsau in asi ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh kial in asi ding uh;
24011023	khosuak kuamah a-om kei ding uh; Anathoth mite tung ah thil hoih lou ka tun dek ngal a; agawtna kum ding uh atun hun chiang in.”
24012001	Aw Toupa , na kiang a ka phun in leng, nang zaw na dik nilouh a; himahleh ka vuina thu pen ka gen ding hi. Bangchi in ahia mithulimloute lam alamzan zel uh? Bangchi in ahia khemhat peuhmah nuamsa a a-om nak uh?
24012002	Amau na phut a, ahi, zung akaita ua, akhang ua, ahi, gah asuahta uhi; amuk un hon naih ua, asunggil un hon gamlat uhi.
24012003	Aw Toupa kei bel na hon thei a, na hon mu a, nang lam ah ka lungtang na entel sek a, amaute goh ding belam bang mai in kaikhia inla, agohna ni ding uh sep in.
24012004	Gam in bang tan ahia asuun ding a, anteh louhingte avuai ding uh? Ateng mite thulim louh ziak in gamsate amang khin ua, vasate leng, “I hun nanung uh amu kei ding uh,” achih ziak un.
24012005	“Khe a pai mite toh na kitaiteh a, nang ahon bahsak khit uleh bangchi in sakolte na kitaitehpih thei dia? Muanna gam ah bittak in om lechin leng, Jordan gammang ah bangchi in na hih dia?
24012006	Na unaute, na pa inkuante ngei in, amau nang ahon khemta ngal ua; amau nang hon delh in ngaihtak in ahon sam ua, thuhoihtak gen mah le uh taksang himhim ke'n.”
24012007	“Ka inn-le-lou paisan in ka gouluah ding ka paimangta; ka hinna in a-it mahmah nu, amelma kiang ah ka peta hi.
24012008	Ka gouluah ding gamnuai humpinelkai bang ahong hita, ka siatna ding in a-aw asuah a, huaiziak in ka mudah ahi.
24012009	Ka gouluah ding kei a ding in sasial ne vasa gial ahi hia? Sasial ne vasate'n akimvel in asual ua hia? Gamsa teng va kaikhawm unla, nek bei ding in hon pi un.
24012010	“Belamchingmi tampi in ka grephuan ahihsia ua, ka tan asikden ua, ka tantuan nuam mahmah mai gamdai gam segawp asuaksakta uh.
24012011	Gamsia in abawlta ua, asegawp a, ka kiang ah avui hi, agam pumpi asegawp a, himahleh kuamah in adonsak kei uh.
24012012	Gamdai a tang giau tengteng ah, hihse mite ahong tungta ua, gam tawp khat lam a kipan leh khat lam pha in Toupa namsau in lah anebeita a, muanna nei himhim a-omta kei uh.
24012013	Buhchi atuh ua, ling ala ua, akihihgimgawp ua, punna lah a-om tuan kei, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in gah na suahte uh na zumpih ding uh.”
24012014	Ka mi Israel kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak khoihsemi, ka inveng giloute tengteng tungtang ah Toupa'n hichibang in achi: “Ngai un, agam ua kipan ka botkhe ding a, alak ua kipan Judah inkote ka phawikhe ding.
24012015	Huan hichi ahi ding a, ka bohkhiak nung in amau ka hehpih nawn ding a, michih gouluah ding leh michih ama gam mah ah ka hon pi ding.
24012016	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Baal kiang a ka mite kichiam a asinsak mah bang un, ka min a, ‘ Toupa ahin a ahin sung’, chi a kichiam a akisin ua, ka mite omdan ngenteltak a asin uleh ka mite lak ah ka dingkhesak ding.
24012017	Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh huai nam aboh in ka botkhe ding a, ka hihse ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24013001	Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Puanmalngat kawnggak lei inla, kawtsak lou in gak in.”
24013002	Huchi in Toupa thu bangbang in kawnggak ka lei a, ka gakta hi.
24013003	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a,
24013004	“Na kawnggak lei, huai na kawng a om pen la in, thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, huai a suangheng kal ah sel in,” chi in.
24013005	Huchi in Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in ka kuan a, Euphrates Luipi chin ah ka selta hi.
24013006	Ni tampi nung in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, kawnggak ka hon selsak lakhia in,” achi hi.
24013007	Huchi in Euphrates Luipi ah ka hohta a, ka thai a, ka selna a kipan kawnggak ka pholhkhia hi. Huan ngai dih, kawnggak ana ngot khin vek a; bangmah ding in leng aphatuamta kei hi.
24013008	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
24013009	Toupa'n hichi in achi: hichi mah bang in Judah kisathei pipi leh Jerusalem ki-otsakna mahmahte ka hihse dek hi.
24013010	Hiai nam giloute, ka thute ngaikhe nuam lou a, amau lungsim genhak zui a pathian dangte' nna sem leh be ding a delh mite kawnggak bangmah ding a phatuam lou bang ahi ding uh.
24013011	Kawnggakmi kawng a abelh gige bang in Israel inkote pumpi leh Judah inko pumpi ka mite, ka minthanna, ka kilawmna leh ka thupina ahong hihtheihna ding ua ka kiang a belh gige ding a ka bawl ahi uhi; himahleh alimsak kei uh.
24013012	Hiai thu akiang ua na gen ding ahi: Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding,” chi in. Huan amaute'n na kiang ah, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding chih ka theih louh uh ahi maw?” achi ding uh.
24013013	Huchi in akiang uah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, hiai gam a teng tengteng, David tutphah a tu kumpipate, siampute, zawlneite leh Jerusalem a teng tengtengte zukhamna in ka dimsak ding.
24013014	Amau ka kiphusak ding a, pate atate uh toh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau ka hihmanlouhna ding khop in ka hehpih in hiam ka hawi in hiam ka zahngai kei hial ding.”
24013015	Ngaikhia unla, bildoh un; kisathei kei un, Toupa'n thu akhahta hi.
24013016	Toupa na Pathian uh pahtawi unla, mialna atunsak ma a khomui tung ate na khe uh akipal ma in, vak na lamet laitak un mial asuaksak a, mial bikbek ding in abawl ding hi.
24013017	Himahleh na ngaihkhiak kei uleh na kisaktheihna uh ziak in mundai ah ka kap nilouh ding a, ka khitui leng nakpitak in aluang gige ding; Toupa belamhon sal a kaih ahih ziak un.
24013018	Kumpipa leh anu kiang ah, “Niam tut un, na lukhute uh aketa hi, na lallukhu thupi uh,” chi in.
24013019	Sim khopite abing khin a, kuamah hon vual louh in; Judah tengteng sal in atang ua, avek un atang khin uhi.
24013020	Na mit uh daktou unla, mallam a kipan ahong kuan en un. Na belamhon neih koi ah, huai na belamhon deihhuaitak?
24013021	Nangmah in lawm ding a na bawlte na tung a akoih hun chiang un bangchi in na chi dia? Numei nauvei bang mai in na na sa ngial kei ding maw?
24013022	Bangziak in ahia hiaite ka tung a ahong tun? Chi sim na hihleh, na thulimlouhna ziak in ahi na nik lem ahih a na vuaktanna akimuh.
24013023	Ethiopia mivom in avun ahihlamdang in gialbem in azia asel thei a hia? Huchi ahihleh nou thil gilou hihhatsekte'n leng thil hoih hihthei na ve uteh!
24013024	Gamdai huih in buhsi amutleng bang mai in amau ka dalhsak ding.
24013025	Hiai na tantuan, na tuam dia ka hon sehsak ahi, na hon mangngilh a, zuau a na kingak ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24013026	Huchi in kei mahmah in na mai khuh hial in na nik ka hon lemsak ding a, na zumhuaina adawk ding hi.
24013027	Gamlak a mualte a na angkawmnate, na huk kikou husate, na kiphalgaih thupidante, huai na thilhih kihhuaite ka muta. Aw Jerusalem, na tung agik hi; hihsiang na hih ma bang tan hi ding ahia?
24014001	Khokheng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung;
24014002	Judah in asuun a, akulh kongpite angui; lei ah puan vom khu in akun ua, Jerusalem kah ging atungkah.
24014003	Amilalte'n asikhate uh tui atawisak ua, tuichin azuan ua, tui amu kei uh, tuibel hawm in akik ua; abeidong ua, gen ding athei kei ua, alu uh akhuh uhi.
24014004	Gam pum a vuahtui a-om louh ziak in lei akhang a, lei let mite alungdong ua, alu uh akhuh uh.
24014005	Ahi, zukpi in leng loubuk ah nou anei a, louhing a-om louh ziak in ataisan hi.
24014006	Gam sabiltungte mualvum ah adingh ua, sehal bang in huihkhua ngai in anak huhu ua; nek ding loupa om louh ziak in amit uh amial dundun hi.
24014007	Ka thulimlouhna un hon hek mahleh na min ziak in aw Toupa hong kuan in; ka puknate uh lah atamta ngal a, na tung mahmah ah thil ka na hihkhial uhi.
24014008	Aw nang Israelte lamet, mangbat lai a hondampa, bangziak a hiai gam a mikhual bang zen a zan khat giak a zin bang lel a om na hia?
24014009	Bangziak a mi lungkegawp bang phet leh pasalpha hondam thei lou bang lel a om na hia? Himahleh nang zaw, aw Toupa , ka lak uah na om lai a, na min ka pu ua, hon paisan ke'n.
24014010	Toupa'n hiai mite tungtang ah hichi in achi: Vakmang a-ut nak ua, akalsuan uh akidek kei uh; huchi in Toupa'n amau apom kei a, athulimlouhna uh atheigigeta ding a, akhelhna uh agawt ding hi.
24014011	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite hoihna ding ngetsak ke'n.
24014012	An ngawl mah le uh akikou uh ka ngaikhe kei ding a, halmang leh buh-le-bal thillat lan mah le uh ka dawng kei ding; namsau, kial, hipi in amau ka hihmang zaw ding,” achi hi.
24014013	Ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian , ngai dih, akiang uah zawlneite'n, ‘Namsau na tuak kei ding ua, kial leng na thuak kei ding uh, hiai mun ah muan mahmahna ka hon pe zaw ding hi, achi sek ngal ua,’ ” ka chi hi.
24014014	Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Zawlneite'n ka min a zuau gen zel ahi ve ua le; amau ka sawl kei a, thu ka khak kei a, ka houpih sam kei hi. Thil amuh kholhlouhte uh, aisan bangmah a pangloute leh alungsim dohate uh hon hilh ahi ve ua,” achi hi.
24014015	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ka sawl louh a ka min lou a, ‘Hiai gam ah kial leh namsau atung kei ding,’ chi a zawlnei thugen genmi, huai zawlneite namsau leh kial in amangthang ding uh.
24014016	Huan athugenna uh nam leng kial leh namsau ziak in Jerusalem kongzing ah paihkhiak ahi ding ua, atanute uh atapate uh toh, vuimi himhim anei kei ding uh. Athulimlouhna uh amau tung ah ka sung dek ngal a.”
24014017	Huan akiang ua hiai thu na gen ding ahi: “Sun leh zan in ka khitui luang hen, hul himhim kei hen, ka mi, ka tanu nungak siangthou in nakpi a liamna atuak hi, khutkhak na mahmah toh.
24014018	Gam a ka pawtleh, maizen, namsau a thahte! Khopi a ka lutleh, maizen, kialpi a misi! Gam chih ah zawlneite, siampute avakvai chiat ua, adan mahmah athei kei uh,” chi in.
24014019	Judah paikhe siang na hi hiam? Zion kih na hi maw? Kou a dia hihdamna om lou bikbek a bangziak a hon thuaksak na hia? Muanna ka zong ua, hoihna bangmah ahong tung kei; hihdamna hun ding leng, ngai dih buaina lel.
24014020	Aw Toupa , ka thulimlouhdan uh ka kitheihmohbawl kei uhi, ka pipute uh ginatlouhna toh, na tung ah ka hihkhialta uhi.
24014021	Na min ziak in hon musit ke'n, na laltutphah thupi minsesak ke'nla, ka kiang ua na thukhun theigige in hihse ke'n.
24014022	Namdangte pathiante lak ah vuah zusak thei a-om uhia? Ahihleh, van in vuahpi atungsak thei hia? Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh, huai pen nang na hi kei maw? Hiai thil tengteng na hih ahi a, ka lamet uh nang na hi.
24015001	Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Mosi leh Samuel ka ma ah hong dingh mah le uh, ka lungsim hiai mite lam anga tuan kei ding. Ka muh phak louh ah delhkhia inla, paimang uhen!
24015002	Huan koi ah ka pai ding ua chi a nang a hon dot uleh hichi in akiang uah na chi ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: Sihna a si dingte, sihna ah; namsau thuak dingte, namsau ah; kial thuak dingte, kial ah; saltang dingte, saltanna ah.
24015003	Thil li ka sehsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; that ding in namsau, keizan ding in ui, ne khin leh hihmang ding in tung leng vasate leh gam sahangte.
24015004	Judah kumpipa Hezekiah tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem a athilhih ziak in lei kumpipa gam tengteng lak a vial sepsep ding in ka bawl ding.
24015005	“Kua'n ahon hehpih dia aw Jerusalem? Kua'n hon lungkhampih dia? Na omdan dong ding in kua alampial dia oi?
24015006	Nang na hon paikhia a, na nungtawn tawn a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Huchi in kisik ka chimtak a, na tung ah ka khut ka lik a, ka hon hihmang hi.
24015007	Gam pumpi a kulh kongpite ah kizapna in amau ka zap a, ta bei in ka bawl a, ka mite ka hihmang a; a-omdan uh akiheisan louh ziak un.
24015008	Tuipi piaunel sang a tam in ameithaite uh ka pungsak ding a, suntang lai in tangvalte siatna ding in atung uah lokmi ka tungsak a, mangbatna leh thil mulkimhuai ka tungsak guih hi.
24015009	Sagih suangnu abahgawp a; akha akhahta; sun ahih lai in ani aketa, zahlak in alungbuai a; huan akhosuaksunte, amelmate uh khut ah namsau a thah ding in ka pe ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24015010	“Nu ei, gam pumpi a kituahlouhna mi leh kikalhna mi a na hon na suan ka tung gik hi na tel e! Ka leitawisak kei a, mite'n leng ahon leitawisak kei uh; himahleh avek un hamsia ahon loh uhi.
24015011	Toupa'n , chihtak ngial in thil hoih a ding in ka hon hihkip ding; chihtak ngial in siatna ni leh haksatna ni in melma na kiang ah khut ka dohsak ding,” achi hi.
24015012	Sik in mallam sik leh ngen akitansak thei dia hia?
24015013	“Gam pumpi a na khelhna tengteng ziak in na hauhsakna leh na goute, aman bei in gallak ding in ka pe ding.
24015014	Na theih ngei louh gam ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding. Ka heh ziak a na tung a mei ampha ding akuangkheta hi,” achi hi.
24015015	Nang na thei hi, aw Toupa , hon theigige inla, hong veh in, hon simmohte tung ah phuba hon laksak in. Na dohzohna ke'n manthat loh kei leng; nang ziak a minsiat thuak ka hi chih thei in.
24015016	Na thute hihlat ahia, ka ne a, na thute kei a ding in kipahna leh ka lungtang nopna ahi; aw Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian, na min lah ka puta ngal ua.
24015017	Nopbawl mite lak ah ka tel kei a, ka kipahpih sam kei; nang khut ziak in ka tu tuam a, lungkimlouhna in na hon dimsak hi.
24015018	Bangziak a ka natna dai thei lou a, ka liamna damthei lou ahia, hihdam ut lou bang mai a? Ka tung ah phaizang khemhat tui kang sekte bang na hi ding a hia?
24015019	Huchi in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiheileh angei ka hon bangsak ding, ka ma ah na dingh nawn ding. Thil gina lou a kipan thil manpha ngen na genkhiakleh keimah kam bang na hi ding. Amau nang lam hong nga uhenla, nang bel amau lam na nga ding ahi kei.
24015020	Hiai mite lak ah ngen kulhbaang in ka hon bawl ding a, ahon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh, nang hon hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24015021	Migiloute khut a kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, mi lauhuaite khut a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding.
24016001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
24016002	“Zi na nei ding ahi kei a, hiai mun ah tanu tapate leng na nei ding ahi sam kei,” chi in.
24016003	Tanu tapa hiai mun a piangte leh hiai gam a nu leh pa amaute suangte tungtang Toupa'n hichi in achi:
24016004	“Hipi in asi ding ua, kuamah vui louh leh kuamah suun louh in a-om ding uh; leitung ekvut bang lel ahi ding uh. Namsaute, kialte in amangthang ding ua, aluangte uh tungleng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding hi.”
24016005	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lusuunna inn ah lut ke'nla, suun ding in hoh ke'nla, amaute kah ke'n; hiai mite lak a kipan ka lungmuanna ka hawkta ngal a, zahngaihna leh lainatnate toh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24016006	Hiai gam ah milian leh mineu a si ding ua; vui ahi kei ding ua; kuama'n asuun kei ding ua, aki-at un akimetgiau loh kei ding uh.
24016007	Lusuun mite amisi ngaih uh lungmuan ding in kuamah in nek ding alui kei ding ua, anu uh hiam apa uh hiam ziak in leng nepna nou dawn ding kuamah in atun kei ding uhi.
24016008	Huan ne leh dawn ding in alak ua tu ding in ankuangluina inn ah na lut ding ahi kei.
24016009	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai dih ua, na mitmuh un, na damsung un mou awte, mouneipa awte, nopsakna husate, kipahna gingte hiai mun ah ka daisak ding.”
24016010	Hiai thu tengteng hiai mite kiang a na hilh hun chiang in amau, “Bangziak in ahia Toupa'n ka tung ua hichitak a thil hoih lou ahon genkhiak? Bang ahia ka thulimlouhna uh? Toupa ka Pathian uh tung a ka thilhihkhelh bang ahia?” ahon chih uleh,
24016011	hichi in na chi ding hi: “Na pipute un ahon paisan ziak uh ahi, pathian dangte adelh ua, a-nna uh asem ua, abia ua, ahon paisan ua, ka dan azui kei ua;
24016012	huan noute'n na pipute uh sang a lek lua in na hih ua, ngai un, michih in noumau lungtang gilou paupeng na zui ua, kei na hon ngaikhe kei uh.
24016013	Huaiziak in ka gam a kipan noute leh na pipute un leng na theih ngei louh uh gam ah ka hon delhkhe ding, huai ah sun leh zan in pathian dangte nna na sem ding ua, deihsakna ka hon lak dek ngal kei a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24016014	Huchi in ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung dek hi, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Israel suante Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhepa ahin a ahin sung, chita lou in,
24016015	mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan a Israel suante pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uh,” apipute uh kiang a ka piak, amau gam mahmah ah lah ka pikik nawn ding hi.
24016016	“Ngai dih ua, ngamanmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, amau aman ding ua; huai khit in gamvakmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, tang chiteng leh mual chiteng a kipan amaute abengkhe ding ua, suangpi heng kal a kipan in leng.
24016017	A-omdan tengteng uah lah ka mit atu nilouh ngal a; kei a kipan sel in a-om kei ua, athulimlouhna uh leng ka mit a kipan sel in a-om sam kei hi.
24016018	Huchi in athilkihhuai luangte ua ka gam ahihnit ualeh akihhuaina ua ka goutan gam adimsak ziak un athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh azahnih in ka thuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24016019	Aw Toupa , ka hatna leh ka kulhpi, mangbat ni a ka kihumbitna, kawlmong a kipan in namte ahong pai ding ua: “Ka pipute un zuau, thil gina lou, punna nei hilou kia lou ngal bangmah gouluah in anei kei uh.
24016020	Mi'n pathiante akibawlsak thei ua hia? Huaite pathian ahi sam ua,” achi ding uh.
24016021	“Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, tutung in amau ka theisak peuhmah ding; ka khut leh ka thilhihtheihna ka theisak ding, ka min Toupa ahi chih athei ding uh.”
24017001	Judah khelhna sik laigelhna leh suangmantam hiam mukzum a gelh ahi; alungtang pek ua khuak in a-om a, amaitam uahte leng;
24017002	sing hing bul leh mual pawngte ah atate un amaitamte uleh a Asherahte uh atheigige ngal ua.
24017003	Aw nang gam a ka tang, gam dung tawn a na khelhna ziak in na sum leh na gou tengteng, na mun sangte toh gallak ding in ka pe ding hi.
24017004	Huai na tantuam ka hon piak na tan ding a, na gam theih ngeih louh ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding, ka hehna mei, tangtawn a kang ding lah na mut kuangta ngal ua.
24017005	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Mihing muang a, mihing bantha hatna muang a, Toupa lehngatsan lungtang neimi hamsethuak in om hen.
24017006	Gamdai a loupa keu gaw bang ahi a, thil hoih pawt ding amu kei ding. Gamdai gamkeu, chi gam, kuamah luah louh ah ateng zaw ding hi.
24017007	Toupa muangmi, alametpen Toupa hi in nuam asa hi.
24017008	Tui kiang a sing suan, lui gei a zungkai, kholum hong tung ding patau lou, anahte hing gige, khokhen kum khawk sa lou, gah suan kikhelsak tuan lou bang ahi ding hi.
24017009	Lungtang bel thil tengteng sang in khemhat pen, hoih lou pumlum ahi a; kua'n ahia theithei ding?
24017010	Kei Toupa bel michih a-omdan bang zel uleh athilhih gah bang zel a pe ding a lungsim enkhepa, lungtang enchianpa ka hi.
24017011	Mi, kilawm lou a hong hau bel vengkeng, ama tuiloupi keuhsak dia op bang ahi, adam lai ngei in amah atuansan ding ua, atawp in mihai ahong himai ding.
24017012	Ka mun siangthou omna bel laltutphah thupi mahmah, atung a kipan a tawisang a om ahi.
24017013	Aw Toupa Israel lamet, nang hon paisan mi tengteng azahlak ding uh; kei hon lehngatsan mite lei a leivui a gelh bang lel ahi ding uh, Toupa hinna tuikhuk pen lah apaisanta ngal ua.
24017014	Aw Toupa hon hihdam inla, huchi in ka dam ding a, hon humbit lechin, huchi in ka bit ding, ka phat gige nang na hi.
24017015	“Ngai in, ka kiang ah, Toupa thu koi ah? Hong tung leh ake,” achi sek uh.
24017016	Thil hoih lou tungsak ding ka hon phut kei a, siatna ni lah ka deih het kei chih na thei hi; ka kam a thupawt lah na maima a om ahi ngal a.
24017017	Kei a ding in kihtakhuai hi ke'nla, mangbat ni a ka kihumbitna na hi.
24017018	Hon simmohte zahlak uhenla, kei bel zahlak kei leng; amau bel lungzing uhenla, kei bel lungzing kei leng; mangbat ni atung uah tun inla, nakpi in amaute hihmang in.
24017019	Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Kuan inla, Judah kumpipate lutna zel leh pawtna zel, mipite tate kongpi ah leh Jerusalem kongpite tengteng ah va dingh inla;
24017020	akiang uah, “Nou Judah kumpipate, Judah tengtengte, Jerusalem a teng tengteng hiai kongpi a lut sekte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un.”
24017021	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hinna uh pilvang mahmah dih ua, Sabbath ni in puak nei kei unla, Jerusalem kulh kongpi ah lutpih sam kei un.
24017022	Huan Sabbath ni in na inn ua kipan puak na pokhe ding uh ahi kei a, nna na sem ding uh ahi sam kei; na pipute uh kiang a ka thupiak bang in Sabbath na tang siangthou zaw ding uh ahi.
24017023	Amau zaw angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh kei ua; thununna azak ua atanlouhna ding un akigenhaksak zaw uhi.”
24017024	Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi: “Khawksatak a na hon ngaihkhiak ua, Sabbath ni a hiai khopi a kongpi a thil na puaklut louh ua,
24017025	nna na sep louh ua Sabbath na tan siangthou uleh, hiai khopi kongpi ah leh heutute, David tutphah a tu dingte kangtalaite leh sakolte ah tuang in ahong lut ding ua, amau leh amiliante uh Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte toh; huchi in hiai khopi ah mi atengdenta ding uh.
24017026	Judah khopi leh Jerusalem kim a kipan, Benjamin gam a kipan, gam niam gam a kipan, tanggam a kipan leh Sim gam a kipan in ahong pai ding ua, halmang thillat leh kithoihnate buh-le-bal thillat leh gimlimte, kipahna kithoihnate Toupa inn ah ahon tawi ding uh.
24017027	Himahleh Sabbath tang siangthou ding leh Sabbath ni a puak neih louh leh Jerusalem kulh kongpi a lutpih louh ding thu ah na hon ngaihkhiak kei uleh akulh kongpite ah mei ka pawtsak ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akangbei ding a, amit kei ding hi.”
24018001	Toupa a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in hichi in achi:
24018002	“Thou inla, belvelmi inn ah hohsuk inla, huai ah ka thute ka hon theisak ding,” achi hi.
24018003	Huchi in belvelmi inn ah ka hohsukta a, abel bawlna khawl ah nna asem hi.
24018004	Tung a bel abawl lai ahong hoih keileh belvelmi'n hoih asak bang in bel dang ding in abawl nawn zel hi.
24018005	Huchi in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a,
24018006	“Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai belvelmi hih bang in nou ka hon hihthei kei a hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai dih ua, belvelmi khut a tungman bang lel in ka khut ah na om uhi, aw Israel inkote aw,”
24018007	Chik lai in leng nam hiamgam hiam tungtang thu ah, ka hon dokkhe ding, ka hon phel ding a, ka hon hihse ding, chi in na gen mah leng,
24018008	Huai nam in atungthu ka gen ziak a athil hoih lou hih alehngatsan leh atung a thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka kikhelsak ding.
24018009	Huan chik lai in leng nam hiamgam tungtang thu ah, ka hon bawl ding a, ka hon dingsak ding, chi a na gen hi leng zong,
24018010	ka paukam suak ngaikhe lou a ka mitmuh a thil hoih lou ahihleh ama a ding in thil hoih hih ka tup ka kikhelsak sam ding.
24018011	Huaiziak in Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, na tung uah thil hoih lou ka ngaihtuah a, nou ka hon sawm lai na hi uh, michih in a-omdan hoih lou uh lehngatsan uhenla, na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlpha un,” va chi peuhmah in.
24018012	Himahleh amau zaw, “Kilawm kei e! Koumau phasak bangbang in ka om ding ua, michih koumau lungtang gilou genhak bang zel in ka om ding uh,” achi sek uhi.
24018013	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Namdangte dong him dih ua, hichibang mahmah kua'n athei a? Nungak siangthou Israel in thil lauhuai mahmah ahihta.
24018014	Lebanon vuk in amualvum anuse ngei a hia? Gamla a kipan a tui vot hong luangsukte akangtat ngei a hia?
24018015	Ka mite'n ahon mangngilh ua, bangmah lou phet kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, huaite'n atuma lam lampi ua kipan akisuisak a, lampi pen hilou lamkhem lam azui uh;
24018016	agam uh hihsiatgawp ahi dia, tangtawn a enghou ding; kivialleh min lamdang sa in alu uh asing ding ua.
24018017	Suahlam huihpi bang in melma ma ah ka thehzak ding, avangtah ni un ka mel hilou, ka dek ka musak ding hi.
24018018	Huan amau, “Kisa un, Jeremiah i sawm ding uh, siampu a kipan dan adai kei ding a, mipil a kipan thudot adai sam kei ding, zawlnei a kipan thu adai kei ding hi. Kisa un, i gensegawp ding ua, athu i limsak kei ding,” achi uhi.
24018019	Hon limsak inla, aw Toupa ka hon ngetna thu limsak in.
24018020	Thil hoih a gilou dit ahi dia hia? Amau lah ka kha a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua. Amau a kipan a na hehna heimang ding leh amau a dia thil hoih gen ding a na ma a ka din sek theigige in.
24018021	Huchi in atate uh kialpi kiang ah pekhia inla, namsau hatna kiang ah pia in; huan azite uh ta nei lou in, meithai uhen; apasalte uh hipi in si uhenla, atangvalte uh leng kidouna ah namsau in si uhen.
24018022	Sim mite akiang uh na tunsak guih lai in a-inn ua kipan kap husa thangkhia hen; kei a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua, ka khe awkna ding in thang akam uhi.
24018023	Himahleh nang, aw Toupa kei hon that ding a ahon sawmna tengteng uh na thei hi; athulimlouhna uh ngaidam ke'nla, na mitmuh in akhelhna uh thaimang sam ke'n. Na ma ah kipuk uhenla, na heh ni in amaute soisa in.
24019001	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Kuan unla, belvelmi leibel va lei un; mipite upate leh siampu lak a upate pi inla;
24019002	belvelmi kongpi lutna chin a Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah hoh inla, huai ah na kiang a thu ka hon hilh ding na puang ding hi.
24019003	Hichi in na chi ding hi, “Judah kumpipate leh Jerusalem a tengte aw, Toupa thu za un.” Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, hiai mun ah aza peuhmah bil am khop hial a thil hoih lou ka hon tun ding hi.
24019004	Mite'n ahon paisan ua, hiai mun ahihnin un, amau leh apate uh leh Judah Kumpipate'n leng atheih ngei nai het louh uh, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ziak uleh hiai mun mihoih sisan a adimsak ziak un leh Baal kiang a halmang thillat ding a atate uh ahalna ding ua Baal mun sangte alamkhiak ziak un;
24019005	Huai zaw ka thupiak ahi kei a, gen leng ka gen sam kei a, ka lungsim ah leng a-om ngei kei hi.
24019006	Huaiziak in ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi; huai nite chiang in hiai mun Tophet chih ahita kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang chih ahi sam kei ding; kithahna Phaizang chih ahi zawta ding.
24019007	Huan hiai mun ah Judah leh Jerusalem thiltupte ka vuaksuaksak ding a; amau pen namsau in amelmate uh ma ah leh ahinna uh lak tum mite khut ah ka puksak ding; aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding in ka pe ding.
24019008	Huchi in hiai khopi lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding in ka bawl ding a, avialpai peuh in siatna atuahte ziak in lamdang asa ding ua, a-enghou lai ding uhi.
24019009	Atanute uleh atapate uh sa ka nesak ding a; amelmate uh leh ahinna uh lak tum mite'n a-um ua amangbatsak hun chiang un kuapeuh in a-invengte uh sa ane ding uh.
24019010	Huan na paipihte mitmuh in bel na hihtam ding a, akiang uah huchi in na chi ding.
24019011	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hichi mah bang in hiai mite leh hiai khua ka hihtam ding; mi'n belvelmi bel akitapsak a, bawlhoih nawn vual ahih louh bang in Tophet ah avui ding uh; vuina ding mun dang a-om louh ziak in.
24019012	Huchi hial in hiai mun ka bawl ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; hichi mah bang in hiai khua Tophet bang a bawl hial in, asung a tengte tung ah leng ka hih ding;
24019013	Jerusalem innte leh Judah kumpipate innte, inn chiteng mahmah atung a van lam thilte kiang a gimlim halkhitna tengteng leh pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiaknasa tengtengte Tophet mun bang hial a hihnit ahi ding hi.”
24019014	Huan Jeremiah bel, Toupa'n thugen ding a asawlna mun Tophet a kipan in ahong pai a; Toupa' inn um sung ah adingh a, mipi tengteng kiang ah hichi in achi:
24019015	Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, thil hoih lou ka gen tengteng hiai khopi leh akho dang tengteng ah ka hon tungsak ding; ka thu ngaikhe lou ding a alungtang uh akhauhsak ziak un.”
24020001	Huan Immer tapa, Toupa' inn a heutupa pen, siampu Pashur in Jeremiah in huai zawlnei thugente agen chih ana za hi.
24020002	Huchi in Pashur in zawlnei Jeremiah akhen a, Toupa' inn a Benjamin Kongpi saknung a koltanna ah atangsak a.
24020003	Azing in Pashur in Jeremiah akhahkhia a, huan Jeremiah in akiang ah Toupa'n na min ding in Pashur achi kei a, Magermissabib ahon chi zaw hi.
24020004	Toupa'n lah hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, nang a ding leh na lawmte tengteng a ding in kihtak in ka hon bawl ding; amau amelmate uh namsau in apuk ding ua, nang zaw na mit in na en lel ding. Judahte tengteng Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe vek ding; ama'n Babulon ah sal in api ding a, namsau in athat ding hi.
24020005	Huai ban ah, khopi hauhna tengteng, asepkhiak tengteng, athil manpha tengteng leh Judah kumpipate gou tengteng amelmate uh khut ah ka pe ding a, amau alok ding ua, aman ding ua, Babulon ah api ding uh.
24020006	Huan nang Pashur, na insung a om tengtengte toh sal ah na tang ding ua; Babulon ah na pai tei ding; huai ah na si ding a, huai ah vui in na om ding a, nang leh na lawm zuauthu na hilhsekte tengteng toh,” achi hi.
24020007	Aw Toupa , nang na hon khem a, khem a om ka hita ve, nang zaw kei sang in na hat a, na hon zou a; nitum in nuihsan ka hita, mi kuapeuh in ahon nuihsan uhi.
24020008	Thu ka gen peuhmah chiang in, ka kikoukhia a, hiamgamna leh siatna, chi in ka kikou; Toupa thu bel kei a ding in, nitum a dem leh muhsit lohna kia ahi.
24020009	Amah ka kan kei ding a, amin in leng thu ka gen nawn sam kei ding, chi mah leng, ka guh sung a meikuang kikhum khin bang mai in ka lungtang sung ah a-om a, ka pai kinken zou kei a, ka phazou mahmah kei hi.
24020010	Mi tampi aguk phun uh ka za; kil chih ah lauhuai a-om, hek unla, i hekkhawm ding uh, chi in. Ka lawmte ka puk ding tang gigete'n, “Khem in a-om kha dia, i zou ding, atung ah phu i la kha ding,” achi uhi.
