24020011	Himahleh Toupa mihangsan kihtakhuai mahmah bang in ka kiang ah a-om a, hon simmohte apuk ding ua, ahon zou kei ding uh. Zahlaktak in a-om ding ua, alohchin sin louh ziak un. Tangtawn a aminsiatna uh mangngilh in a-om kei ding.
24020012	Aw sepaihte' Toupa , midiktatte enchianpa, lungtang leh lungsim mu paisuakpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak dih ve, ka tungtang thu ka hon kemsakta hi.
24020013	Toupa kiang ah la sa unla, Toupa phat un; thil gilou hih mite khut a kipan panpih deihte hinna ahumbitta hi.
24020014	Ka piankhiak ni hamsethuak in om hen, ka nu'n ahon piansak ni vualzawl in om dah hen.
24020015	Ka pa kiang a, “Tapa na neita,” chih thu hon tun a, hong kipaksakmi pen hamsethuak in om hen.
24020016	Huai mi, Toupa'n hehpih het lou a asukgawp khuate bang in om hen, zingsang lam in kikou husa za henla, sun ahih chiang in galdou husa;
24020017	sul sung a ahon hihlup louh ziak in; huchi hihleh ka nu ka han himai ding hi a, asul in tangtawn a hon pai ding hiven.
24020018	Bangziak a sul a kipan hong pawt chitchiat ka hia, semgim leh lungkham a om ding a zahlak mawngmawng a ka damsung nite zang ding in?
24021001	Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang a Malkijah tapa Pashur leh siampu Maaseiah tapa Zephaniah asawl lai a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa a kipan a thu hong tung ahi,
24021002	“Babilon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ahon dou a, Toupa'n athilhih thupitak ahih sek bang in ahon huh nuam in, akiksak nawn mai kha diam chih Toupa hon dotsak dih ve,” chi in.
24021003	Huan Jeremiah in akiang uah, Zedekiah kiang ah hichibang in va gen un; Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi:
24021004	“Ngai in, Babulon kumpipa leh Kaldai mi, kulh pua a nang hon umbichilhpa na douna galvan zat ka kiksak ding ahi; hiai khopi sung ah amaute ka pikhawm ding.
24021005	Kei mahmah in leng heh leh lungkim lou mahmah leh thangpaitak in ban zak a ban thahat zang in nang ka hon dou ding.
24021006	Hiai khua a teng mihingte leh gante ka that ding a, hipi in asi ding uh.”
24021007	Huai nung in, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Kumpipa Zedekiah leh anungzuite leh midang hiai khua a hipi leh namsau leh kial a siloute, Babulon kumpipa leh amelmate uh khut leh amau thah tum mite khut ah ka pe ding. Namsau hiam in athat ding a, ahehpih het kei ding, ahawi het kei ding a, azahngai sam kei ding.”
24021008	Huan hiai mipite kiang ah huchi in va gen in; Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, sihna lampi leh hinna lampi ka hon koihsak hi.
24021009	Hiai khopi sung a om namsau in hiam kial in hiam hipi in hiam asi ding uh; Kaldai mite nou hon umbichilhpa kiang a pawt a kipete bel ahing ding uh, ahinna uh kidouna kipahman ahi ding hi.
24021010	Hiai khopi hoihna ding hilou, asiatna ding ka tum bilbel ahi; Babulon kumpipa khut a piak ahi ding a, ama'n mei in ahal ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24021011	Judah kumpipa inkote tungtang thu ah; Toupa thu ngaikhia un,
24021012	Aw David inkote aw! Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zingsang in vai diktak in hawm unla, simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia un, huchi lou in zaw ka hehna mei bang in apawt ding a, kuamah phelh vual louh ding in akang dia, na thilhih giloute uh ziak in.”
24021013	“Ngai dih ua, phaizang zang a tengte aw, nou phaizang zang suangpi a teng a, ‘Kuate ahia i omna ua hong lut ding?’ chite aw, nou ka hon lang ding hi. Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24021014	Na thilhih uh gah bang zel in ka hon gawt ding a, agam gammang ah mei ka khah ding a, akim tengteng akangmang ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24022001	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa' inn ah hohsuk inla, hiai thu va gen in.
24022002	‘Aw Judah kumpipa, David tutphah tung a tu, nang leh na nungzuite leh na mi hiai kongkhak a lutte toh, Toupa thu ngaikhia un,’ ” chi in;
24022003	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Diktak leh hoihtak in vai hawm unla; simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia unla; mikhualte, pa neiloute leh meithai tung ah diklouhna hiam hiamgamna hiam ching kei un; hiai mun ah mihoih sisan leng suah sam kei un.
24022004	Hiai thu zui ngei hi le uchin zaw, David tutphah tung a kumpipate kangtalaite leh sakolte tung a tuang in, amaute, anungzuite uh leh amite uh hiai na inn kongkhakte ua lut ngeingei ding uh hiven.
24022005	Himahleh hiai thute na ngaihkhiak kei uleh, hiai inn asegawp ding a, chi in kei-le-kei kilou in ka kichiam ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24022006	Toupa'n Judah kumpipa inkuan tungtang thu hichibang in agen hi: “ ‘Nang zaw kei a ding in Gilead bang, Lebanon mualvum bang na hi, hinapi in gamdai ka hon suaksak ding; luahmi om lou khopi bang mai in.
24022007	Nang hihmang dingte, galvan nei chiat in, ka bawlkhol ding a; na sidar sing telte aphuk ding ua, mei ah akhul ding uh.’ ”
24022008	“ ‘Huan nam tampite'n hiai khopi apal paisuak ding ua, michih in amau invengte kiang ah “ Toupa'n hiai khopi thupi mahmah bangziak a hichitak a hih hi ding ahia eita?” achi ding uh.
24022009	A Pathian uh Toupa thukhun alehngatsan ua pathian dangte abiak ua, a-nna asep ziak uh ahi, chi in adawng ding uh.’ ”
24022010	Misi kah kei unla, suun sam kei un; paimangmi bel nakpi mahmah in kah un, ahong kik nawn kei ding a, apianna gam amuh nawn louh ding ziak in.
24022011	Judah kumpipa Shallum, Josiah sik a vaihawmpa, hiai mun a kipan paikheta tungtang thu bel Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hiai ah ahong kik nawnta kei ding.
24022012	Sal a apina mun uah, huai mah ah asi ding a, hiai gam amu nawnta kei ding.”
24022013	“Diktatlouhna a inn lam a, diklouhna a dantan tungnungte bawlmi, athawn a amah invengte tha zang, loh pe nuam lou mite tung agik hi;
24022014	‘Inn thupi mahmah ka kilam ding a, dantan tungnung zapite nei inn, tohlette ka hong ding a, sidar sing in ka thuapsuak ding a, zesan ka nuh ding,’ chimi tung mah.
24022015	Sidar sing a na ten ziak in, kumpipa kisa na hi maw! Na pa'n ne in adawn a, diktak in vai ahawm kei maw? Huai amah a ding in ahoih ahi.
24022016	Migenthei leh tasamte vai ahawmsak a, huai ahoih ahi. Hiaitak na hon theihdan ding ahi maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24022017	‘Himahleh na huaihamte a ding in, mihoih sisan suahna ding, nuaisiahna ding leh hiamgamna ding lel in na mit leh na lungsim na pu ahi.’ ”
24022018	Huaiziak in Judahte kumpipa Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa tungthu bel Toupa'n hichi in agen a; “ ‘Aw ka unaupa,’ chi in hiam, ‘Aw ka sanggampa,’ chi in hiam amah asuun kei ding ua, ‘Aw toupa,’ chi in hiam, ‘Aw thupipen,’ chi in hiam amah asuun sam kei ding uh.
24022019	Jerusalem kulh polam a lotkhiak a, paih in, sabiltung vui in avui ding uh.
24022020	Lebanon ah paitou inla, kikou in, Bashan ah na aw suah inla, Abarim a pan in kikou in, na itte tengteng amangthangta ua.
24022021	Na lohchin in na kiang ah thu ka gen a, nang lah ka ngaikhe kei ding, na chi a, ka kamsuak ngaihkhiak louh na tuailai kipan in hiai na omdan ahi.
24022022	Na belampute tengteng uh huih in akivak ding ua, na mi itte sal in atang ding ua, nang leng gitlouhna tengteng ziak in zahlaktak leh mangbangtak in na om ngei ding hi.
24022023	Aw Lebanon tang a teng, sidar sing lak a buseptu na tung a natna atun a na hong hehpihhuai ding dan mai zaw! numei nauvei na bang mai in.”
24022024	Ahin a ka hin sung, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipa Koniah, Jehoiakim tapa bel ka khut taklam a sawnna zungbuh himah lechin, huai a kipan ka hon botkhe ngeingei ding.
24022025	Thah ding a nang hon zongmi khut ah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah leh Kaldaite khut ah ngeingei nang ka hon pe ding hi.
24022026	Na pianna hilou gamdang ah nang leh na nu nang hon suangtu ka hon paikhe ding a, huai ah na si ding uh.
24022027	Alungsim ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah akik nawn kei ding uh.
24022028	Hiai Koniah pen bel kitamgawp, simmohhuai ahi kei a hia? Bel asung a lungkimna omlouhna ahi kei maw? Bangziak a amah leh asuante paihkhiak a gam atheih ngei louh ua paihkhiak a a-om uh?
24022029	Aw, gam, gam, gam, Toupa thu ngai in,
24022030	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Hiai mi ta nei lou, adamsung a lohching lou ding mi ahi, asuante kuamah lohching a, David tutphah tung a tu ding leh Judah gam a vaihawm nawn ding a-om kei ding uh,” chi in gelh in.
24023001	“Agantatna mun a belam hihmangthang a dalhzaksak belamching mite atung uh agik hi!” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023002	Huaiziak in Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka mite chingpa belamching mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: “Ka ganhonte na dalhsak ua, na delhmang ua, na veh kei uh, ngai un, na thilhih uh gilou ziak in nou ka hong veh ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023003	Huan ka ganhon khosuaksunte ka delhzakna gam tengteng a kipan ka pikhawm nawn ding a, ahuangsung uah ka hawlkhawm ding a, gah nuam mahmah ahi ding ua, apung ding uh.
24023004	Amaute limsak ding, amaute a ding in belamchingmi ka koih ding a, alau nawnta kei ding ua, kuamah amang nawn kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023005	“Ngai dih ua, David a ding in Hiang diktat ka suahsak hun ding ahong tung dekta hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amah kumpipa in atu ding a, piltak in agamta ding a, gam pumpi ah dikna leh diktatna atangtungsak ding.
24023006	Ahun sung in Judah hotdam ahi ding a, Israel bittak in a-om ding. Huai amin ding a asak ding uh hiai ahi, “ Toupa i diktatna uh ahi,” chih.
24023007	“Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, ahun atung sinta,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Israel mite, “Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, chi nawn lou in.
24023008	Mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan Israel inkote suante pikhia a, pikik nawnpa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uhi.” Huchi in amau gam ngei ah ateng ding uh.
24023009	Zawlneite tungtang thu pen, ka sung ah ka lungtang apuakkham hi, ka guh teng aling a, zukham bang mai ka hi, zu in azelh zoh mi bang mai in, Toupa ziak leh athu siangthou ziak in.
24023010	Gam angkawm in adim a, hamsia ziak in gam in asuun a, gamdai louhing munte akeu khinta; alampi uh agilou a, ahatna uh adik kei hi.
24023011	Zawlneite leh siampute'n Pathian khawk asa kei ua, ka insung mahmah ah leng akhelhna uh ka mu.
24023012	Huaiziak in amaute a ding in apaina lampi uh, zan khomial lampi nal bang ahi ding a, huai ah delh in a-om ding ua atolhpuk ding ua, atung uah thil hoih lou ka tungsak ding a, amau gawtna hun, Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24023013	Samaria zawlneite tung ah kihhuai ka mu, Baal lou in thu agen ua, Israelte apimang uhi.
24023014	Jerusalem a zawlneite tung ah thil mulkimhuai ka mu, ang a kawm ua, zuau in agamta ua, thil gilou hihte khut ahatsak ua, kuamah in agitlouh uh kisik atup louh loh uhi; kei a ding in Sodom a mite bang ahong hi vek ua, akhosung a mite tengteng leng Gomorrah a mite bang hial in.
24023015	Huaiziak in zawlnei hon tungtang thu ah sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, gamsai in ka vak ding a, thil kha ka dawnsak ding; Jerusalem a zawlneite kiang a kipan in gam pumpi ah Pathian poisaklouhna lah apawtta ngal a.”
24023016	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zawlnei na kiang ua thugente thu ngaikhe kei un; bangmah lou ahon sinsak ua, Toupa kam a kipan hilou amau lungsim geltawmte agen uhi.
24023017	Toupa thu musit mite kiang ah, ‘Nang ding in ahoih ding,’ achi vial ua; amau deihlam engtat a hih teitei mite kiang ah, ‘Thil hoih lou bangmah na tung ah ahong tung kei ding,’ ” achi uh.
24023018	Toupa thugelna ah kua apang ngei a, athu sang a thei ding kua ahia om? Ahihleh athu pen kua'n ahia limsak a ngaikhia om?
24023019	Ngai dih ua, Toupa huihpi, hehna apawtta, ahi, pingpei huihpi; migiloute lutang anuai ding.
24023020	Toupa hehna amawk kik kei ding, alungsim a atup tinten atangtungsak a, ahih khit phot masiah; ni nanung lam ah na hon theichian ding uh.
24023021	Zawlneite bel ka sawl louhpi in atai ua, akiang ua thu ka gen louh in leng thu agen uh.
24023022	Ka thugelna a om tei hi le uh zaw, ka mite kiang a ka thu puang ding hi ve un, athilhihdiklou ua kipan lehngatsak ding hi ve un.
24023023	Gamlapi a om Pathian hilou in, Pathian nai gige ka hi kei a hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023024	Mun kisel ah ka muh theih louh dia kibu thei mi a-om ua hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Lei leh van ah ka dim ahi kei maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023025	“Mang ka nei, mang ka nei, chi a ka min a zuaugen zawlneite thugen ka zata hi.”
24023026	Zawlnei zuaugente, amau lungtang kikhem tawm a thu sek mite lungtang ah hiai bang tan ahia a-om ding?
24023027	Amau bel a-invengte uh kiang ah amang uh ahilh ua ka mite ka min mangngilhsak atum ua, apate un Baal ziak a ka min amangngilh khit bang un,
24023028	zawlnei mang nei in amang gen hen aw, ka thuneimi in ka thutak diktak in gen hen. Buhpawl leh buhtang in kibatna bang anei ua? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023029	Ka thu mei bang ahi kei maw, sek suang seknenna bang? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023030	Huaiziak in ngai un, zawlnei hon, ka thu kiguksak tuah sekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023031	Ngai dih ua, zawlnei amah dangnalsak a, Toupa'n achi, chisekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023032	Ngai dih ua, mang zuau leltak gen a, hilh a, azuauthute uh leh aki-otsakna thuginaloute uh ziak a ka mite pimang zawlneite ka dou ahi, Toupa thupawt in achi; ka sawl ngal kei a, thu lah ka pe kei a, hiai mipite aloh taksak kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023033	Hiai mipite lak a mi kuahiam, zawlnei kuahiam in, siampu kuahiam in, “ Toupa puakgik bang ahia?” chi a ahon dot leh hichi in na dawng ding hi, “Noumau mah puakgik pen na hi uh, ka hon paimang ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24023034	Zawlnei hiam, siampu hiam, mi kuahiam, Toupa puakgik, chi a-om uleh, huai mi leh a-inkote ka gawt ding.
24023035	Huchi in mi kuapeuh in a-invengpa kiang ah leh kuapeuh in a-unaupa kiang ah Toupa'n bangchi in adawng a, Toupa'n bang agen a? chi in na kidong ding uh.
24023036	Toupa puakgik na lou kha nawn kei ding ua, mi kuapeuh amah mah thugen apuakgik ahi ding hi. Pathian hing, sepaihte' Toupa , i Pathian thu uh lah na lehbulh khinta ngal ua.
24023037	Zawlnei kiang ah, “ Toupa'n bangchi in nang ahon dawng a? Toupa'n bang ahia agen?” na chi ding.
24023038	Huan “ Toupa puakgik, na chih peuhmah uleh, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Toupa puakgik na chi ding uh ahi kei,” chi a ka hon sawl a, Toupa puakgik chi a thu na gen ziak in;
24023039	huchi in ngai un, “Ka hon mangngilh keuhkeuh ding a, noute leh hiai khopi na kiang uleh na pate uh kiang a ka na piaksa toh ka hon paimang ding hi.
24023040	Huan tangtawn demsiatna leh zahlak nilouhna mangngilh vual louh na tung uah ka hon tun ding hi.”
24024001	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judahte kumpipa Jekoniah, Jehoiakim tapa leh Judah heutute, mikhutsiamte leh siksek mite toh Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal dia api nung in, Toupa'n hiai mengmuhna ahon ensak a, ngai dih, theipi bawm nih Toupa tempul ma ah akitung hi.
24024002	Bawm khat ah theipi hoihtak, theipi min masa bangtak a-om a; bawm dang ah bel theipi hoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia a-om hi.
24024003	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Bang ahia na muh, Jeremiah?” achi a. Ke'n, “Theipi, theipi hoih, hoih mahmah; leh ahoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia,” ka chi hi.
24024004	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
24024005	Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah saltangte, Kaldaite gam a athahna ding ua ka sawlkhiakte, hiai theipi hoih bang in ka en ding hi.
24024006	Ahoihna ding un atung uah ka mit ka tusak ding a, hiai gam ah ka pikik nawn ding; amau ka dingsak ding a, ka phel kei ding; ka suan ding a, ka botkhe kei ding.
24024007	Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na hon theihna ding in lungtang ka hon pe ding a; ka mite ahi ding ua, a Pathian uh ka hi ding; alungtang tengteng uh toh ka kiang ah ahong kik ding uhi.”
24024008	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Theipi sia, nek tak louh khop a sia bang in Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh aheutute uh leh Jerusalem a nituang hiai gam a omlaite leh Aigupta gam a tengte, ka lehngatsan ding hi.
24024009	Haksatak a leitung gam teng lak ah sep leng ding in, ka delhmangnate gensiat leh tehpih leh tai leh hamsiatkhum hi ding in ka tawpsan ding.
24024010	Amau leh apate uh kiang a ka piak gam a kipan valh khit ahih tanpha un alak uah namsau, kial leh hii ka sawl ding hi.”
24025001	Judahte kumpipa, Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa kum lina a Judah mite tengteng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung; huai hun bel Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kum khatna ahi a,
24025002	huai thu zawlnei Jeremiah in Judah mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a om tengtengte kiang a agen ahi.
24025003	Kum sawmnih-le-thum sung, Judahte kumpipa Josiah, Ammon tapa kum sawm-le-thumna a kipan tutan in, Toupa thu ahong tung zel a, phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka gengen a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei uh.
24025004	Toupa'n na kiang uah anasemmi zawlneite tengteng asawl a, phalvak a thou in asawl a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei ua, thei ding in na bil uh na doh sam kei uh.
24025005	Huai, zawlneite'n, “Michih noumau lampi gilou a kipan hong kik unla, Toupa'n na kiang ua leh na pipute uh kiang a nidanglai a kipan tangtawn a ding a nou ahon piak gam ah teng un.
24025006	Pathian dangte kiang ah a-nna uh sem ding leh amaute be ding leh na khut nasep ua kei hon lungkim lousak ding in hoh kei un; huchi in ka hon hihna kei ding hi,” achi uh.
24025007	Himahleh nou ding a hoih lou ding a na khut nasep ua hon hehsak ding in na hon ngaikhe kei uh, Toupa'n achi.
24025008	“Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak louh ziak un, ngai dih ua,
24025009	mallam nam tengteng ka thukhak ding a, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leng ka thukhak ding a, amaute hiai gam leh asung a omte leh hiai kim a nam om tengteng sual ding in ka hon pi ding; ka hihmang sipsip ding a, lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding leh segawp nilouh ding in ka bawl ding.
24025010	Huan akiang ua kipan nopsakna husa leh kipahna husate, mouneipa aw leh mou awte, buhgawi husa ging leh khawnvak vakte ka lamang ding hi.
24025011	Hiai avek in ase ding a, lamdangsak ahi ding a; hiai namte'n Babulon kumpipa nna kum sawmsagih asem ding uh.
24025012	Huan kum sawmsagih aman hun chiang in Babulon kumpipa leh huai nam, Kaldaite gam, agitlouhna uh ziak in ka gawt ding a; tangtawn in ka segawpsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24025013	Huai gam tung ah ka thu atung ua ka gen tengteng, Jeremiah in namte tung a agen, hiai laibu a gelhsa tengteng ka tungsak ding hi.
24025014	Nam tuamtuam leh kumpipa thupitakte'n amaute'n nna akisep un, amau mahmah in leng amau nna ahon sepsak ding uhi.
24025015	Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka khut a hiai hehna uain nou la inla, ka hon sawlna ding nam chih dawnsak in.
24025016	Adawn ding ua, ahoi dongdong ding ua, ahai ding ua, akiang ua ka sawl ding namsau ziak in,” chi in.
24025017	Huchi in Toupa khut a kipan nou ka la a, Toupa'n hon sawlna nam chih ka dawnsak hi.
24025018	Jerusalem leh Judah khopite, huai kumpipate leh heutute, siatgawpnate, lamdangsakte, enghou dingte, hamsiatte tang ding in, tua a-omdan bang uh;
24025019	Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh asikhate, aheutute leh ami tengtengte;
24025020	Amau lak a mikitokpolh tengteng; Uz gam a kumpipa teng; Philistia gam a kumpipa tengteng, Ashkelon leh Gaza leh Ekron leh Ashdod khosuaksunte;
24025021	Edom leh Moab leh Ammon suante;
24025022	Tura kumpipa tengteng leh Sidon kumpipate leh tuipi gei kumpipate;
24025023	Dedan leh Tema leh Buz leh abaksam uh met a omte tengteng;
24025024	Arabia kumpipa tengteng, Gamdai a teng nam kihelte kumpipate;
24025025	Zimri kumpipa tengteng; Elam kumpipa tengteng; Media kumpipa tengteng;
24025026	Mallam kumpipa tengteng, agamla leh anai a mi akizom zel in; leitung a kumpi om tengteng in adawn khit chiang in Seshak kumpipa'n adawn ding hi.
24025027	Huan akiang uah sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Dawn unla, kham un, lau unla, kipuk in thoutou nawn kei un; na lak ua namsau ka sawl ding ziak in,” chi in.
24025028	Huan na khut a nou pen dawn ding a alak nop kei uleh huchi in na chi ding; sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na dawn ngeingei ding uh ahi!
24025029	Ka min tam khopi ah thil hoih lou ka hih pan a, noute gawt louh hial in na om ding uh maw? Gawt louh in na om kei ding ua; lei a teng tengteng tung ah namsau ka samkhe ding,” chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24025030	Huaiziak in atung ah hiaite gen inla, akiang uah huchi in chi in: “ Toupa mun sang a kipan in athum ding, atenna siangthou a kipan a-aw asuah ding, ahuang tung ah nakpi in athum ding; grep suk mite bang in akikou ding, lei luahte teng tung ah.
24025031	Lei tawp pha in husa athangkik ding a, Toupa'n namte alang a, sa tengteng tung ah vai ahawm ding, namsau kiang ah migilou ape ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24025032	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, thil hoih lou in nam chih ahon nuai ding hi, huihpi hat mahmah lei mun tawp a kipan in ahong kuan ding hi.
24025033	Huai ni chiang in Toupa thahte'n lei tawp a kipan in lei tawp pha in akhak ding ua; suun louh leh khop louh leh vui louh in a-om ding ua; leitung a eklei lel ahi maimah ding uh.
24025034	“Belamching mite aw kikou tuaituai unla, kap un, nou belamhon lak a makaite aw, kitung buatbuat un, thah a na om ni uleh na dalhzak nite uh ahong tung petmahta hi. Bel deihhuai bang in na puk ding uh.
24025035	Belamching mite'n taimangna lampi anei kei ding ua, belamhon lak a makaite'n leng pelhna lampi anei kei ding uh.
24025036	Belamching mite kah husa, belamhon lak a makaite mau ging toh, Toupa'n atatna mun uh asuksiat lel ziak in.
24025037	Huang muanhuaite daihsak sipsip in a-omta uh, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in.
24025038	Abukna pawtsanta, humpinelkai bang in, nuaisiahna namsau lauhuai ziak leh aheh mahmah ziak in agam uh ase khinta hi.”
24026001	Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim in vaihawm apat tung in hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan ahong tung hi:
24026002	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “ Toupa' inn huangsung ah dingh inla, Judah khopi tengteng Pathian be ding a Toupa' inn a hong paite kiang ah akiang ua gen ding a thu ka hon piak tengteng khat lel leng iim lou in gen vek in.
24026003	Michih in a-omdan gilou uh paisan in angaikhe zenzen khamoh ding uhia, athilhih gilou uh ziak a atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka khektheihna ding in.”
24026004	Nang akiang uah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hon ngaihkhiak louh ua, ka dan na ma ua ka koih na zuih louh ua,
24026005	zingsangpi a thou a amau na kiang ua ka sawl ka nasemmi zawlnei thu na limsak kei uleh;
24026006	hiai inn Shiloh bang in ka bawl ding a, leitung a nam tengtengte hamsia thuak ding in ka bawl ding,” na chi ding hi.
24026007	Huan siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in Toupa' inn a Jeremiah in hiai thu agen angaikhia uhi.
24026008	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng kiang a gen ding a Toupa'n apiak teng agen khit in, siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in amah amanta ua, “Si peuhmah niteh!”
24026009	Bangziak a Toupa min lou a, “Hiai inn Shiloh bang ahi ding, hiai khopi luahmi om lou in asegawp ding, chi a gen na hia?” achi ua. Huchi in Toupa' inn a mipi tengteng in Jeremiah aboh lutlut uhi.
24026010	Judah heutute'n hiai thu azak un, kumpipa' inn a kipan in Toupa' inn lutna Toupa' inn Kongpi Thak ah atu uhi.
24026011	Huchi in siampute leh zawlneite'n heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Hiai mi si tak ahi, khopi siat ding thu, na bil ua na zak bang un agenkhol ngal a,” achi uhi.
24026012	Huan heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in, “Na thu ngaihkhiak khitsate uh bang in hiai inn leh hiai khopi siat ding thu gen ding in Toupa'n kei hon sawl ahi.
24026013	Huaiziak in tu in na omdan uleh na gamtatdan uh bawlhoih unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu mang un; huchi in Toupa'n na tung ua thil hoih lou tung ding aphuankhiaksa akikhelsak thei ding hi.
24026014	Kei ka hihleh, na khut ua om ka hi. Dik leh hoih na chih bang un hon bawl un.
24026015	Na hon thah uleh, noumau leh hiai khopi leh khua-le-tuite tung ah mihoih sisan na tungsak ding uh chih thei mai un; adiktak in na bil ua hiai thute gen dia Toupa'n na kiang ua hon sawl ka hi,” achi hi.
24026016	Huchi in heutute leh mipite'n, siampute leh zawlneite kiang ah, “Hiai mi asih ding ahi kei, Toupa i Pathian min a i kiang ua thu gen ahi,” achi uhi.
24026017	Huan huai gam Upa kuate hiam ahong dingh ua, mipi omkhawmte kiang ah,
24026018	“Mikah, Moreseth mi'n Judah kumpipa Hezekiah vaihawm lai in thu agen a, Judah mi tengteng kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Lou bang in Zion leh ahi ding a, Jerusalem thil se omkhawm asuak ding, tang a inn gammang mun sang bang ahi ding,” achi hi.
24026019	Judah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Judahte tengteng in amah athat uhia? Toupa lau in Toupa deihsakna angen ua, Toupa'n atung ua thil hoih lou tung ding apuan akikhelsak ahi kei maw? E'n zaw i tung ua thil hoih lou tungsak ding i hi ve ua! achi hi.
24026020	Huan midang, Toupa min a thugen Keriath-jearim mi Shemaiah tapa Uriah mah leng a-om a, Jeremiah thugen tengteng mah bang in hiai gam leh khopi siat ding thu agen hi.
24026021	Kumpipa Jehoiakim leh amithupite leh heutute'n azak un kumpipa'n hihlup atum a; himahleh Uriah in azak in alau a, ataimang a, Aigupta gam ah apaita hi.
24026022	Kumpipa Jehoiakim in Akbor tapa Elnathan leh midangte toh Aigupta gam ah mi asawl hi.
24026023	Huchi in Aigupta gam a kipan in Uriah apikhia ua, kumpipa Jehoiakim kiang ah ahon pi ua, huai in namsau in athat a, aluang vantang han ah apailut ua, achi uhi.
24026024	Himahleh Shaphan tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah agum a, huchi in hihlup ding in mipite kiang ah piak ahita kei hi.
24027001	Judah Kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah, vaihawm apat tung lai in, Toupa kiang a kipan in hiai thu ahong tung hi.
24027002	Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Hakkolte leh akhaute bawl inla, na ngawng ah bat in.
24027003	Huan Edom kumpipa, Moab kumpipa, Ammon mite kumpipa, Tura kumpipa, Sidon kumpipa kiang ah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang a amisawl, Jerusalem a hong paite khut ah khak in.
24027004	Hiai thute apute uh kiang ah gensak in; hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: huchi in na pute uh kiang a na gen ding uh ahi:
24027005	“Ka thilhihtheihna thupitak leh ka ban zak in leitung, mihingte leh leitung a sate toh ka bawl vek a, piak tuak ka chihte kiang ah ka pia hi.
24027006	Tu in leng ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah hiai gam tengteng ka pe khinta hi, gamsate leng amah nna sem ding in ka pe lai hi.
24027007	Amah gam huntak atun ma in nam tengteng in amah leh atapate leh atapa tate nna asem ding ua, huai nung in bel nam tampite leh kumpipa thupi mahmahte'n amah sikha ding in abawl ding uh.”
24027008	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol po nuam lou leh a-nna sem nuam lou nam leh lalna gam namsau leh kial leh hipi a amah khut a ka hihman vek masiah amau ka gawt zel ding.
24027009	Noute'n zaw na zawlneite uh, na aisan siamte uh; na mangte uh, na bumsiamte uh, na kiang ua, “Babilon kumpipa nna na sem kei ding uh,” chi a gen mite ngaikhe kei un.
24027010	“Na gam ua kipan a gamlapi a pimang a na omtheihna ding un, na kiang uah zuauthu agenkhol uh ahi; ka hon delhkhiak a na manthatna ding un.
24027011	Himahleh Babulon kumpipa hakkol pua a, nna sem nuam namte bel agam ngei uah ka omsak ding a, lei alet ding uh, huai ah ateng gige ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24027012	Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah hiai thu tengteng bang zel in ka gen a, “Babilon kumpipa hakkol pua unla, amah leh amite nna sem unla, hing un!
24027013	Babulon kumpipa nna sem nuam lou namte tungtang Toupa'n agensa bang in bangziak a namsaute, kialte, hipite a nang leh na mite si ding na hi ua?
24027014	Zawlnei na kiang ua, Babulon kumpipa nna sem kei un, chite thu ngaikhe kei un; na kiang ua zuauthu gen lel ahi ngal ua.
24027015	Ka sawl ahi kei ua, ka min sial in zuauthu agen nak ua, nou leh na kiang ua thugen zawlneite ka delhkhia a, na manthat theihna ding un,” Toupa'n achi.
24027016	Siampute leh hiai mipite tengteng kiang ah leng ka gen sam a; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiang ua zawlnei thugen, “Ngai un, Toupa' inn a belsuante Babulon a kipan inn hon tut ahi pah ding hi,” chi mite thu ngaikhe kei un, na kiang uah zuau agen uhi.
24027017	Amaute ngaikhe het kei un; Babulon kumpipa nna sem unla, hing un; bang ding in hiai khopi akisegawp dia?
24027018	Himahleh zawlnei ahih ua, Toupa thu akiang ua om mah ahihleh Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a omlaite Babulon a tut ahihlouhna ding in sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah ngen uhen.
24027019	Sepaihte' Toupa'n , khuam sangte, dal tuipangte, kingaknate leh hiai khopi a belsuan nutsiat a omsunte,
24027020	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Judah leh Jerusalem a mihoih tengteng Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal a dia api lai a alak val tungtang thu huchi in agen hi.
24027021	Ahi, sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a om lai tungtang thu agen ahi;
24027022	Babulon ah lakmang ahi ding ua, amaute ka hong veh masiah huai ah a-om nilouh ding uh; amau ka latou nawn ding a, hiai mun ah ka koih nawn ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24028001	Hichi ahong hi a, huai kum mah in, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, vaihawm pat tunglam, akum lina, akha ngana ah zawlnei Hananiah, Azzur tapa Gibeon min siampute leh mipi tengteng ma ah, Toupa' inn ah hon houpih hi.
24028002	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hakkol ka hihtanta.
24028003	Kum nih sung vengveng in Toupa' inn a belsuan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in hiai mun a kipan a alak a, Babulon tan a apaipih tengteng, hiai mun mahmah ah ka hon tun nawn vek ding.
24028004	Hiai mun ah Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Babulon a hoh Judah saltang tengteng ka pikik nawn ding; Babulon kumpipa hakkol lah hihtan ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi in.
24028005	Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in siampute leh Toupa' inn a ding mipi tengteng ma ah zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah,
24028006	Zawlnei Jeremiah ngei in, “Amen, Toupa'n huchibang in hih ngei hen; Toupa' inn a belsuante leh saltanna a mi tengteng Babulon a kipan hiai mun a hon tun ding a na gen Toupa'n hih ngei hen.
24028007	Himahleh mipi tengteng leh na bil a ka thugen ngaikhia in.
24028008	Kei leh nang ma a nidang a zawlneite'n gam tampi tung ah leh lalna gam thupi pite tung ah kidounate, thil hoihloute leh hipi thute agen sek uh.
24028009	Zawlnei muanna thugenmi thugen ahong tun hun chiang in, huai zawlnei pen Toupa'n asawl ngei ahi, chih akithei mai ding,” achi hi.
24028010	Huan zawlnei Hananiah in hakkol, zawlnei Jeremiah puak ala a, ahihtan hi.
24028011	Mipi tengteng ma ah Hananiah in, Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Hichibang ngei in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol kum nih sung vingveng in nam tengteng ngawng a kipan ka hihtan ding, achi hi.” Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in apaisanta hi.
24028012	Huan zawlnei Hananiah in zawlnei Jeremiah ngawng a kipan hakkol ahihtan nung in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
24028013	Kuan inla, Hananiah kiang ah huchi in va chi in. Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Sing hakkol na hihtan a, atang in sik hakkol na bawlsak zaw ahi.
24028014	Hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi ngal a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar nna aseptheihna ding un hiai nam tengteng sik hakkol ka posak ding ahi; amah nna asem ding uh; gamnuai a gamsate leng amah ka pe lai ahi,” chi in.
24028015	Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah, “Ngai in, Hananiah, Toupa'n nang ahon sawl peuhmah kei hi; hiai mite zuau na muangsak lel ahi zaw.”
24028016	Huaiziak in huchi in Toupa'n achi: “Ngai dih, leitung a kipan ka hon hihmang vengveng ding; Toupa tung a helna thu na gen ziak in tukum mahmah in na si ding,” achi hi.
24028017	Huchi in huai kum mah, akha sagihna ah zawlnei Hananiah asita hi.
24029001	Zawlnei Jeremiah in Jerusalem a kipan a saltang upate, siampute, zawlneite, midangte, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a api khit, akhosuaksunte kiang a alaikhak thu hiai ahi:
24029002	Kumpipa Jekoniahte, kumpinute, michilgehte, Judah leh Jerusalem heutute, mikhutsiamte, siksek mite Jerusalem apaikhiak nung ua;
24029003	Shaphan tapa, Elasah leh Hilkiah tapa, Gemariahte khut ah akhak hi; amaute bel Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babulon gam a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang a asawlte ahi uh.
24029004	Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n saltang tengteng, Jerusalem a kipan Babulon sal dia ka pisaksate kiang ah hichi in achi:
24029005	Inn lam unla, huai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, zi nei unla, tanute tapate nei un.
24029006	Na tapate uh zi neisak unla, na tanute uh pasal neisak unla, tanu tapa aneihtheihna ding un; huai ah va pung unla, kiam lam nawt kei un;
24029007	sal dia ka hon tansakna khopi hoihna ding zong unla, Toupa kiang ah ngetsak un; ama hoihna ah nou leng hoihna na mu ding uhi.
24029008	Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na lak ua zawlneite leh aisan siamte'n hon khem kei uhenla, amang mat uh leng ngaikhe sam kei un.
24029009	Ka min sial in zuauthu na kiang ah agen uhi; kei sawl ahi kei uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24029010	Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a, Babulon a ding in kum sawmsagih achin chiang in ka hong veh ding a, na kiang ua ka thuchiam hoihtak ka tungsak ding, hiai mun ah ka hon kiksak nawn ding.
24029011	Nou lam a ka lungsim putdan ka kithei hi, na hun nanung tawp ua lametna leh tunung hon pe ding in thil hoih lou hilou in hoihna ngaihtuah ka hi.
24029012	Huan na hon kan ding ua, ka kiang ah na hong thum ding ua, ka hon ngaikhe ding hi.
24029013	Na hon zong ding ua, na lungtang tengteng ua na hon zon hun chiang un na hon mu ding uh.
24029014	Huchi in na hon muh un ka om ding, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Na vangphatnate uh ka tungding nawn ding a, nam tengteng lak a ka hon dalhsakna mun a kipan ka hon pikhawm nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; sal dia ka hon matsakna mun ngei ah ka hon tungsak nawn ding,” chi in.
24029015	“ Toupa'n Babulon gam ah leng zawlnei ahon bawlsak,” na chi uhi.
24029016	Toupa'n David tutphah ah kumpipa tungtang thu leh hiai khopi a teng mipi tengteng, sal dia pi tel louh, na unaute uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi:
24029017	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, atung uah namsau, kial leh hipi in ka delhzui ding a, theipi hut, ahoih louh mahmah ziak a nek tuak het lou bang mai in ka bawl ding.
24029018	Namsau, kial, hipi in ka delhzui ding a, leitung alalna gam tengteng thil mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a, amau ka dalhsakna nam tengteng lak ah hamsethuak ding in, lamdangsak chiat ding in, hamsiatkhum, selphou leh gensiat hi ding in ka bawl ding hi.
24029019	Phalvak a thou a ka nasem, zawlnei zang a ka thu na kiang ua ka hon tut khawk asak louh ziak un. Toupa thupawt in achi; na ngaikhe nuam ngal kei ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24029020	Huaiziak in nou Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a ka sawl, saltang tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un.
24029021	“Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kolaiah tapa, Ahab leh Maaseiah tapa, Zedekiah ka min sial a na kiang ua zuauthu gen mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka mansak ding hi; na mitmuh ngei un athat ding;
24029022	Amau thu ah Babulon gam a Judah saltang tengteng in, Babulon kumpipa'n mei a a-em Zedekiah leh Ahab bang mai in Toupa'n na tung ah hih hen, chih hamse lohna in aneihloh ding uh.
24029023	Israel gam ah thil haihuaitak ahih ua, invengte uh zite ang a kawm ua, ka min sial in ka thupiak louh zuauthu agen ziak un; kei atheipa leh atheihpihpa ka hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24029024	Nehelam mi, Shemaiah tungtang thu ah nang hichi a na gen ding ahi.
24029025	Israel' Pathian, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi, Jerusalem mipi tengtengte kiang ah nangmah min mahmah in lai na khak hi.
24029026	Toupa'n siampu Jehoiada sik in siampu ding in nang ahon bawl a, Toupa inkemmi na hi ua, mihai, zawlnei kichi peuhte kemte, sikkolte na butsak ding ahi.
24029027	Huchi in bangziak a Anathoth a mi Jeremiah, na kiang ua zawlnei kichi na taihilh louh uh?
24029028	Babulon gam ah i kiang uah, “Saltanna ding asawt ding a, inn lam unla, hiai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, chih thu ahon khak hi,” chi in.
24029029	Huan siampu Zephaniah in huai laikhak zawlnei Jeremiah zak in asim hi.
24029030	Huchi in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta.
24029031	Saltangte tengteng kiang ah, Nehelam mi Shemaiah tungtang thu ah Toupa'n huchi in achi: Ka sawl het louh in Shemaiah in na kiang uah thu agen a, zuauthu nou ahon gingtasak a,
24029032	huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai un, Nehelam mi Shemaiah leh asuante ka gawt ding a, hiai mite lak ah mi khat lel leng anei kei ding, ka mite a ding a thil hoih ka hih ding amu kei ding; Toupa tung ah helna thu agen ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in khak in achi hi.
24030001	Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa a kipan thu ahong tung a;
24030002	Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng laibu ah gelh in,” chi in.
24030003	Ngai in, Israel leh Judah, ka mite omdan ka kikhelsakna ding nite ahong tung lellel hi; gam, apipute uh kiang a ka piak ah ka pikik nawn ding a, aluahta ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in Toupa'n achi.
24030004	Huan Judah leh Israel tungtang thu a Toupa thugen hiaite ahi:
24030005	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Lauhthawnna husa ka za uh, muanna hilou, launa kikou husa.
24030006	Dong vialvial unla, en vialvial dih ua, pasal in nau avei thei hia? Bangziak a numei nauvei bang zen a, pasalte'n atai uh adep chiat ua, amelte uh ahong molh khit?
24030007	Maizen aw! Huai ni thupi hina mai e, akibatpih mahmah a-om kei, Jakob mangbat ni ahi mah ngut hi, himahleh hotkhiak in a-om ding.
24030008	Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, ahakkol puak ka hihtan ding a, akhau leng ka kitatsak ding; pau tuam mite'n amah nasempa ding in azang ngei nawn kei ding uh.
24030009	Toupa a Pathian uh leh akumpipa uh hi ding a ka tunding ding David nna asem zaw ding uhi.
24030010	Huaiziak in aw ka nasempa Jakob aw, lau het ke'n aw, Israel aw, lunglel het ke'n, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai in, gamlapi a kipan in ka hong hunkhe ding a, asaltanna ua kipan na suante ngei, huan Jakob akik nawn ding a, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh.
24030011	Nang hon hun ding in na kiang ah ka om gige ngal a, ka hon dalhsakna nam tengteng, ka beisak ding a, nang bel beisak lou in; ahun lel in ka hon gawt ding a, gawt louh in na pawt het kei ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24030012	Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a, na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei a, na meima athupi hi.
24030013	Nang hon panpih ding a-om kei ua, na damna ding damdawi a-om sam kei hi.
24030014	Nang hon itte'n ahon mangngilhta ua, hon limsakta kei uh; melma liamna in ka hon liamsak a, dawm lou in ka hon gawt hi, na thulimlouhna athupi a, na thilhih giloute apun ziak in.
24030015	Bangziak a na liam ziak a kap na hia? Na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei, na thulimlouhna athupi a, na thilhihkhelhte apun ziak in, hiai thilte na tung a hih ka hi.
24030016	Himahleh nang hon negaite, nekgaih in a-om ding ua, na melmate michih, sal dia pi in a-om ding uh, nang hon lokte loh in a-om ding ua, gallak a hon late gallak in ka la ding hi.
24030017	Ka hon damsak nawn ding a, na liamnate ka hihdam ding; Toupa thupawt in achi; delhkhiak, ahon chi ua, kuamah limsak louh Zion ahi, ahon chih ziak un.
24030018	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Ngai in, Jakob puanin saltangte ka lehhei ding a, atenna munte ka zahngaihsak ding a, a-omna mual ngei ah akhopi lam ahi ding a, akumpipa' inn a-omdan ngei in adingh nawn ding.
24030019	Kipahthu Genna leh nopsakna husa, huaite a pan ahong pawtkhe ding a, Mite ka pungsak ding a, atawm kei ding uh, amau ka hih thupi ding a, aneu kei ding uh.
24030020	Atate uh leng nidanglai bang in a-om ding ua, ka ma ah a-omkhopna uh akip ding a; amaute nuaisiah mite peuhmah ka gawt ding hi.
24030021	Aheutupa uh amau mi mah ahi ding a, avaihawmpa uh amau lak a hong pawt mah ahi ding; ahon naih ding a, amah ka bawl dia, ama'n ahon naih ding; kua ahia amah thu a hon naih ngam ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24030022	Huan ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding.”
24030023	Ngai un, Toupa huihpi, ahehna huihpi hat mahmah apawtkheta a; migiloute lu anuai ek ding hi.
24030024	Alungtang tupnate tangtun a ahih khit masiah, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah akikhel kei ding; ni nanungte ah na hon theisiam ding uhi.
24031001	“Huai hun chiang in kei Israel inkuante Pathian ka hi ding a, amaute leng ka mite ahi ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031002	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Namsau thah valte, gamdai gam a ka khawl tawldamsak lai in hehpihna amu ua, Israel mahmah ka tawldamsak lai in.
24031003	Nidang a ka kiang a Toupa hong kilang in, hichi in achi: Ahi, it tawp lou in ka hon it a, huaiziak in lainatna in ka hon kai hi.
24031004	K'on dingh thaksak ding, nungak siangthou Israel aw, dingh in kipsak na hong hi ding a, na khuangte toh kizem in na om nawn ding a, nopsak lai lamna munte ah na tel ding hi.
24031005	Samaria tang dung tawn in grephuante na bawl ding a, teng mite'n aching ding ua, agahte ane ding uhi.
24031006	Ephraim tanggamte ah, ching mite kikou ni atung ding hi. Thou un, Zion ah i hoh ding uh, Toupa i Pathian uh kiang ah,” chi in.
24031007	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Jakob a ding in nuam in la sa unla, nam thupipen a ding in kikoukhia un, puang unla, pahtawi unla, ‘ Toupa Israel khosuaksun, na mite hondam in,’ chi un.
24031008	Ngai un, mal gam a kipan ka hon pi ding, kawlmong tawp a kipan ka kaikhawm ding, mittaw, khebai, numei naupaite, nauvei lelte toh, mipi tampitak ahong tungkhawm ding uh.
24031009	Khitui toh ahong pai ding ua, khamuangtak in ka pi ding, tui luang lamte ah ka vaksak ding a, akisuihlouhna ding uh lamtangte ah; Israel a ding in pa ka hi a, Ephraim bel ka tachil ahi.
24031010	Aw namte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia unla, tui gei gam gamlapi ah puang unla, Israel dalhsakpa'n apikhawm nawn ding a, Belamchingpa'n abelamte akep bang in akem ding chi in.
24031011	Jakob bel Toupa'n atankhia a, asang a hat a pan ahunkheta hi.
24031012	Zion vum ah lasa in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa hoihna ah akipak ding ua, buhte, uainte, thaute, belam leh ganhon noute tungte ah akipak ding uh; ahinna uh tui avak huan bang ahi ding a, tangtawn in alungkham nawn kei ding uh.
24031013	Huan nungak siangthoute kipak a lam in anuam ding ua, tangvalte leng atek-akhang in anuam ding ua, alusuunna uh kipahna ka suaksak in ka khamuan ding, adahna ua pan ka kipaksak ding.
24031014	Siampute hinna thau in ka taisak ding a, ka hoihna in ka mite leng atai ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031015	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ramah ah husa aza ua, misi ngai a kap huphup, Rakil in atate akah a, atate a-om nawn louh ziak in akhamuan theih kei hi.
24031016	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Kap lou ding in na aw dek inla, na khitui hul hen, na thilhih in kipahman anei ding chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Gal gam a kipan in ahong pai nawn ding uhi.
24031017	Na hun tawp lam a ding in lametna a-om a, amau gam ah na tate ahong kik nawn ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031018	Ephraim kah leh mauna ka za hi, nang na hon gawt a, bawngtaltuai sawi bang mai in sawi ka hi a, na kiang ah hon kiksak inla, ka kik ding hi, Toupa ka Pathian na hi ngal a.
24031019	N'on kiksak khit nung in ka kisik a, na hon thuzoh nung in ka pheipi ka beng a, ka zum a, ahi, ka tuailai minsiat thuak in ka am ahai hi,” achi hi.
24031020	Ephraim, ka tapa deihtak, ka nau deihtak ahih ziak hia amah ka thunun teng a ka lungtang a aten tinten nak? Huchi in ka lungtang in amah alainat sek a, atung ah zah ka ngai ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031021	Lampi chiamtehna kibawl inla, nang a ding in lampi kawkmuhna phut in, na va pawtna lam lampi, lampi pen lam ngei chiamteh tinten in; aw nungak siangthou Israel, hong kik nawn in, na khopi ngei ah.
24031022	Aw, nang tanu nungtawn, bang tan ahia na vialvak vak ding? Toupa'n lei ah thil thak asiamta a, numei in pasal ahum zawta hi.
24031023	Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Asaltanna ua kipan ka pikik hun chiang in Judah gam leh akhopite ah hichibang paukam azang nawn ding uh; “Aw, diktatna tenna mun, Aw tang siangthou, Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen,” chih.
24031024	Huai ah Judahte leh akhopi uah mi tengteng atengkhawm ding ua, lounei mite leh ganvul mite toh.
24031025	Mibahte ka taisakta a, milungkham peuhmahte leng ka hihhalhta hi.
24031026	Huchi in ka hong halh a, ka nga vialvial a, mang hoihtak ana hi.
24031027	Ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding hi, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote ah mihing chi leh gan chi ka tuh ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031028	Huan hichi ahi ding a, amau botkhia a, hihzan leh paikhia a, hihmang a, hihgim ding a ka tan bang in amau ding hoihsak ding leh tungding ding in ka enkhe nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031029	Huai nite in, “Pate'n grep thuk ane ua, atate uh ha azau a, achi nawn ngei kei ding uh.”
24031030	Michih in amau gitlouhna asihpih zaw ding ua, grep thuk ne peuhmah ha azau ding hi.
24031031	Ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; huai nite ah Israel inkote leh Judah inkote kiang ah thukhun thak ka bawl ding.
24031032	Apipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhe ding a akhut uh ka let ni a ka thukhun bang hilou in, amaute a dia apasal uh ka hih in leng ka thukhun abohsia ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031033	Huai ni khit chiang a Israel inkote kiang a ka thukhun ding bel hiai ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; asunggil uah ka dan ka koih ding a, alungtang uah ka gelh lai ding a, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh;
24031034	Kuamah in, “ Toupa thei in, chi in amau invengte leh amau unau ahilh kei ding ua; aneupen a kipan in alianpen tan in avek un ahon thei chiat ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi, “Abohsiatna uh ka ngaidam ding a, akhelhna uh leng ka theigige kei ding,” chi in.
24031035	Hichi in Toupa , sun vaksak ding a ni pepa, kha leh aksite a dia dante sehsak a, zan vaksak ding a pepa, tuikihotte ging honhon ding a tuipi tokthoupa'n achi hi; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
24031036	“Hiai dansehte ka ma a kipan amanleh Israel suante ka ma a kipan in nam hih atawp den sam ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031037	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Tunglam van teh theih ahih a, lei kingaknate zonkhiak theih ahihleh Israel suante athilhihsate uh ziak in ka paimang sam ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031038	“Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, Hananel insung a kipan in kulh ning kongpi tan in Toupa a ding in khopi lamkhiak ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24031039	Atehna khau bel Gareb mual tan in tangtak in apai zinzen ding a, Goath lam ah akawi ding hi.
24031040	Misi luang leh vut paihna phaizang pumpi leh gamlak tengteng, Kidron lui phaizang tan in, suahlam pang Sakol Kongpi ning tan Toupa ding a tan ding ahi; huai tuh chikchiang mah a hihzak leh phelsiat ahi nawn kei ding hi.”
24032001	Judah Kumpipa Zedekiah akum sawmna, huai tuh Nebukadnezzar akum sawm-le-giatna ahi, Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung.
24032002	Huai in Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon in Jerusalem a-um ua; huan Judah kumpipa' inn ngakmi huangsung ah zawlnei Jeremiah atang hi.
24032003	Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Bangdia, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a ala ding;
24032004	Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leng Kaldai mite khut a kipan apawt kei ding, Babulon kumpipa khut a matsak in a-om zaw ding a, kimaituah in akihoupih ding ua, amit ngei in amel amu ding;
24032005	Zedekiah bel Babulon gam ah api ding a, amah ka veh mateng huai ah a-om nilouh ding; Kaldaite dou mah le uchin na lohching kei ding uh?’ ” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24032006	Huan Jeremiah in, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
24032007	Ngai in, na paneu Shallum tapa Hanamel in Anathoth a ka lou nang a ding in lei in, “Gouluah thei na hih ziak in na hon leisak ding ahi chi in na kiang ah ahong pai ding,” chi in.
24032008	Huchi in ka paneu tapa Hanamel in, “Anathoth a ka lou hon leisak tanla, gouluah thei na hih ziak in na tat ding ahi, nang a ding in lei mai in,” achi a. Huchi in hiai Toupa thu ahi chih ka theita hi.
24032009	Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel Anathoth a lou ka leita a, dangka ka buksak a, adangkasik shekel sawmsagih tak ahi.
24032010	Huchi in lai ka gelh a, ka hilh a, theihpihmi ka sam a, dangka pen bukna ah ka khai a.
24032011	Kileina lai akileidan leh a-omdan gelhna bilh leh bilhlouhte ka la a.
24032012	Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel mitmuh in leh theihpihmi kileina amin tuang teite mitmuh in leh ngakmi huangsung a Juda tute tengteng ma ah Mahseiah tapa Neriah tapa Baruk ka pia hi.
24032013	Baruk bel ama uah thu ka pia a, Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:
24032014	“Hiai lai, kileina lai, bilhlouhte la inla, a-om sawttheihna ding in leibel ah koih in.
24032015	Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a; hiai gam ah innte, loute, grephuante mite'n ahon lei nawn ding uh,” chi in.
24032016	Huan Neriah tapa Baruk kiang ah aleina lai ka piak nung in Toupa kiang ah ka thum hi.
24032017	Aw Toupa Pathian , ngai in, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na khut zak in lei leh van na bawl a; nang a ding in thilhih haksa lua a-om het kei hi.
24032018	Sang tampite kiang ah hehpihna na musak sek a, pate thulimlouhna anung ua atate uh tung ah na thuk a; aw Pathian thupi leh thilhihthei; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi;
24032019	thilgel siamtak, thilhihtheitak, mihing tate omdan tengteng muchianpa;
24032020	michih a-omdan uleh athilhih uh bang a thukpa; Aigupta gam a chiamtehnate leh thillamdang hihpa, tuni tan a Israel leh midang lak a hih zelpa, tuni bang mahmah a min kibawlpa.
24032021	Na mi Israelte, Aigupta gam a kipan chiamtehnate, thillamdangte, khut hat leh ban zak leh thil mulkimhuai thupitak in na pikhia hi.
24032022	Hiai khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam apipute uh kiang a kichiam a piak na chiam na peta a;
24032023	ahong lut ua, aluah vek ua, himahleh na paukam taksang lou in, na dan azui kei uh; hih ding a na piakte ahih kei ua, huaiziak in hiai thil hoih lou tengteng atung uah na tungsak hi.
24032024	En dih, khopi lakna ding a panmun leivupte ahong omta ve; namsaute, kialte, hipite ziak in khopi leng asimmi Kaldaite khut ah piak ahita; na gensa ahong tungta; en dih, na muta hi.
24032025	Ahi a lah, Aw Toupa Pathian , nang ka kiang ah, “Na sum in lou lei inla, thu thei mite sam in; khopi bel Kaldaite khut a piak ahita, na chi,” achi hi.
24032026	Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi:
24032027	“Ngai in, kei Toupa sa nei tengteng Pathian ka hi, kei a ding in haksa lua a-om a hia? chi in.
24032028	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in hiai khopi Kaldaite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka pe ding a, ala ding hi.
24032029	Huchi in hiai khopi simmi Kaldaite ahong pai ding ua, hiai khopi ahal ding ua, akang ding, hon hehsak ding a Baal kiang a gimlim latna, pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding lat butkhiakna inn tung nei inn tengteng toh.
24032030	Israel suante leh Judah tate'n atuailai chik ua kipan in ka mitmuh in thil hoih lou ngen ahih uh; Israel suante'n akhut nasepte un ahon hehsak phet uhi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24032031	Hiai a khopi alam tung ua kipan tutan in hon hehsaktu leh hon thangpaisaktu ahi nilouh ngal a; ka ma a kipan ka hihman vengveng theihna ding in; Israel suante leh Judah tate hon hehsak ding a athil hoih lou hihsate tengteng uh ziak in,
24032032	amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh, Judah mite Jerusalem luah mite tengteng toh.
24032033	Kei lam hong nga lou in adeksah uh ahon ngat ua, tawlnga lou hial in sinsakta mah leng, sinsakna lasawn ding in angeingaih kei uhi.
24032034	Ka min tuanna inn hihthanghuai ding in akihhuainate uh akoih zaw uhi.
24032035	Ben Hinnom Phaizang a Baal biakna mun sangte alamkhia ua, atanute uh, atapate uh Molek kiang a mei a apaihna ding un, Judahte thil gilou hihsak ding a hiai kihhuai ahih uh ka thupiak ahi het kei hi, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei kei hi.
24032036	“Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa Israel' Pathian in, ‘Hiai khopi, namsau, kial leh hipi in Babulon kumpipa khut ah piak ahita, na chih nak uh thu ah hichi in achi’:
24032037	Ngai dih, ka hehna, ka lung hihlouhna, ka thangpaihna thupi mahmahte a amau ka delh manna gam teng a kipan ka pikhawm ding a, hiai mun ka hon tun ding a, bittak in ka omsakta ding.
24032038	Huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei amaute Pathian ka hi ding.
24032039	Tangtawn a ahon lauhdet theihna ding un lungtang kibang leh omdan kibang ka bawlsak ding; amau leh anung ua atate uh hoihna ding in.
24032040	Akiang uah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau lehngatsan lou in, ahon launa ka hih gige ding; ahon kiheisanlouhna ding un alungtangte uah ahon lauhna uh ka koih ding.
24032041	Ahi, ahoihna uh hih ka kipah lam ahi ding a, ka lungtang tengteng in hiai gam ah ka phut ngeingei ding.
24032042	“ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mite tung a thil hoih lou thupi mahmah ka tut bangtak in amaute kiang a thil hoih ka chiam tengtengte ka tungsak ngeingei ding.
24032043	Gam kisegawp, Kaldaite khut a piaksa, mi leh sa om nawn lou, na chih gam uah loute akilei nawn ding uhi.
24032044	Benjamin gamte ah, Jerusalem khopi kim munte ah, Judah gam khopite leh simlam khopite ah mite'n dangka in lou alei ding ua, leina lai agelh ding ua, abilh ding ua, theihpih mite asam ding uhi; a-omdan uh ka hei ding hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.”
24033001	Huan Jeremiah kiang ah, vengmi huangsung a khum a a-om lai in, anihveina ding in Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi.
24033002	Lei bawlpa Toupa , kip ding a bawlpa Toupa'n , amin Toupa ahi, chi in achi:
24033003	Hon sam lechin, ka hon dawng ding a, thil thupi leh thil kisel na theih ngei louh ka hon ensak ding.
24033004	Israel' Pathian Toupa'n hiai khopi innte leh Judah kumpipa' inn te, namsau leh leivupte lak a venna bawl ding a aphelsiat uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi:
24033005	Kaldaite sual ding in amau ahong kuan ua, ka hehna leh thangpaihna a ka thah luangte in adimsak zaw ding uh, agitlouhna tengteng ziak un hiai khopi lak ah ka mel ka na sel hi.
24033006	Ngai in, damna leh hihdamna ka hon tun ding a, ka hon damsak ding; muanna leh bitna kiptak ka hon musak ding.
24033007	Judah omdan leh Israel omdan ka hei ding a, atung a ka dinsak bang in ka dingsak nawn ding.
24033008	Huan athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna lak ua kipan ka sawpsiang ding a, athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna uleh ka tung a atatleknate tengteng uh ka ngaidam ding.
24033009	Huchi in hiai khopi lei a nam tengteng, amau a dia ka hihhoih tengteng mu mite ma ah kei a ding in nopna, pahtawina leh thupina ahi ding a; hoihna muanna atung ua ka tut tengteng ziak in lau in aling ding uhi.
24033010	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, Judah khopi a mi leh sa om nawn lou a loihsa, Jerusalem kholak a mi leh sa leh tengmi om lou a loihsa, achih uah:
24033011	“Sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un. Toupa lah ahoih ngal a; azahngaihna lah tangtawn in a-om ding hi, chi mite aw leh Toupa' inn a kipahna kithoihna hon tawi lasa mite aw leh mou awte mouneipa awte ahon za nawn ding uh, atung a a-om bang in gam ka omsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24033012	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, mi leh sa om lou khop a loihsa leh akhopi tengteng ah, belamchingmi abelamhon uh kualsak mite tenna mun ahong om nawn ding.
24033013	Tanggam khopi ah, phaigam khopi ah, simlam khopi ah, Benjamin gam ah, Jerusalem kim munte ah, Judah khopi ah, amau simmi khut nuai ah belamte apai zungzung ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24033014	Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, Israel inkote tungtang ah leh Judah inkote tungtang a thuhoihtak ka na gen pen ka tangtungsak ding.
24033015	Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in diktatna Hiang David kiang ah ka khangkhesak ding, huai gam ah diktak leh diktattak in vai ahawm ding.
24033016	Huai nite in Judah humbit in a-om ding, Jerusalem bittak in a-om ding; huan, amin put ding hiai ahi ding, “ Toupa i diktatna,” chih.
24033017	Toupa'n hichi in achi: David in Israel inkote laltutphah a tu ding mi atasam ngei kei ding;
24033018	Siampu Levi chite'n leng ka ma a halmang na lan ding leh buh-le-bal thil lan ding leh kithoih zel ding in mi atasam sam kei ding.
24033019	Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a, Toupa'n hichi in achi:
24033020	Ka sun seh leh ka zan seh thu na phel theih ua, sun leh zan ahuntak ua om lou ding a na hihtheih uleh,
24033021	ka nasempa David kiang a ka thukhun leng alaltutphah a tu ding tapa aneihlouhna ding a hihsiat ahi phet ding hi; Levi chite, siampute, ka nasem mite kiang ah leng.
24033022	Van a omte sim seng louh leh tuipi a piaunel sim seng louh bang mai in ka nasempa David suan leh Levi chi kei na hon sepsak mite ka pungsak ding.
24033023	Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a:
24033024	“Inkuan nih Toupa'n atelte apaimangta,” chi a hiai mite'n agen uh na ngaihtuah ngei kei a hia? Amitmuh ua nam chih tham ahihlouhna ding un hichibang in ka mite amusit uhi.
24033025	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka sun leh zan thuseh a-omdet louh a, lei leh van omdante ka seh louh ahihleh,
24033026	Jakob suante leh ka nasempa David suante ka paimang ding, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob suante tung ah vaihawmmi asuan a kipan ka la kei ding; a-omdante uh ka kiheisak in atung uah zahngaihna nei ding ka hi ngal a.
24034001	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzarte, asepaihhon tengteng, amah thunuai a lei a vaihawmna gam tengteng leh mipi tengteng in Jerusalem leh akhopi tengteng asual lai ua Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung:
24034002	Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah va houpih in, hichi in achi: Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a, mei in ahal ding;
24034003	akhut a kipan na suakta het kei ding; mat na hi ding a, akhut ah ahon pe ding ua, na mit ngei in Babulon kumpipa na mu ding a, paukam ngei in na kihoupih ding ua, Babulon gam ah na hoh ding hi.
24034004	Himahleh, aw Judah kumpipa, Zedekiah, Toupa thu ngaikhe zel dih; na tungtang thu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi:
24034005	Namsau in na si kei ding a, muangtak in ahi na sih ding; na ma a kumpipa masa, na pipute gimlim ahalsak bang un, nang leng ahon halsak ding uh; ahon suun ding ua, “Ehe heh, ka pu,” chi in. Thu ka khahta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in.
24034006	Zawlnei Jeremiah in hiai thu tengteng Jerusalem a Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah agen a;
24034007	Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem leh Judah khopi om lai tengteng, Lakish leh Azekah asual lai un; Judah khopi lak a kulh neite hiaite kia ahita uhi.
24034008	Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jerusalem a om mipi tengteng kiang ah, michih in asikhanu toh asikhapate uh, Hebru nu hiam Hebru pa hiam ahih uleh, akhah ding uh ahi;
24034009	Michih in Hebru pasal hiam numei hiam sal a aneih peuhmah asuahtaksak ding ahi, kuamah in ama Juda sanggampih sal a aneihlouhna ding in.
24034010	Michih in nasemnu hiam nasempa hiam akhah ding ahi, amau nna sepsak in kuamah a-om ding uh ahi kei, chih thukhun pommi heutu tengteng leh mipi tengteng in thukhun amang ua, akhahta uhi.
24034011	Himahleh huai nung in akihei ua, anasemnu uh leh anasempa uh akhahsate uh akaikik ua, athunuai uah nasemmi ding in akoih nawn uh.
24034012	Huaiziak in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi:
24034013	Aigupta gam, saltanna inn a kipan ka pikhiak ni in na pipute uh kiang ah thukhun ka bawl a,
24034014	michih in a-unaupa, Hebru mi, akiang a zuaksa, kum guk a na nasemsa, akum sagihna tawp in akhah ding ahi, chi in; na pipute un bel ahon ngaikhe kei ua, abil uh adoh sam kei uh.
24034015	Tu in noute'n, na hong kihei ua, michih in a-invengpa kiang a noplenna thu puang in ka mitmuh in thil dik na hon hihta ua; ka min tam inn ah ka ma ah thukhun na hong kibawlta ua;
24034016	himahleh na kihei nawn ua, ka min na hihbuah un a-ut bangtak ua na khahsa nung uh, na sikhanu leh na sikhapa uh na pikik nawn ua, na thunuai uah nasemmi ding bang sikhanute ding bang in na koih nawn uh.
24034017	“Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Michih ama unau leh ama invengte kiang a noplenna thu puang ding in ka thu na ngaikhe kei ua; ngai un, ke'n na kiang uah noplenna thu ka puang hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; namsaute, hipite, kialte in ahi ding; lei a kumpigamte tengteng lak a paihkhiak ding in ka hon bawl ding hi.
24034018	Huan ka thukhun bohsete, ka ma a bawngnou atphel kikal a paisuak hial a thuchiam a tangtungsak lou mi.
24034019	Judah heutute leh Jerusalem heutute, michilgehte, siampute, mipi tengteng, bawngnou atphel kikal a paite;
24034020	amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite khut ah ka pe ding a; huchi in aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding lel ahi ding.
24034021	Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh alawite amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite leh Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon, nou hon paisansate khut ah ka pe ding hi.
24034022	Ngai un, hiai khopi a hong kik nawn ding in thu ka pe ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, huchi in asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh; luahmi om lou in Judah khopite ka hihgam vek ding,” chi in.
24035001	Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai a Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in:
24035002	“Rekab inkote kiang ah hoh in va houpih inla, Toupa inn a dantan khat ah pilut inla, uain dawn ding pia in,” achi a.
24035003	Huan Habazziniah tapa, Jeremiah tapa, Jaazaniah leh a-unaute, atapa tengteng Rekab inkote tengteng toh ka pi a;
24035004	Pathian mipa Igdali tapa Hanan tate dantan, Toupa inn ah ka pilut a; huai dantan bel heutute dantan chin kongpi ngakmi Shallum tapa Maaseiah dantan tung a om ahi.
24035005	Huchi in Rekab inkuante tapate ma ah belhbute, noute uain dim ka tung a, akiang uah, “Uain dawn un,” ka chi hi.
24035006	Amau bel, “Uain ka dawn kei hial ding uh; kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in, ‘Noumau leh na suante un leng tangtawn a uain na dawn ding uh ahi kei;
24035007	inn na lam un haichi na tuh un, grephuan leng na bawl un na nei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; na damsung nite un puanin a na ten zawk ding uh ahi, na omna gam ua na damsawt theihna ding un, chi in thu ahon pia hi.’
24035008	Huchi in kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in paukam a thu hon thukhah tengteng, ka damsung ua kou leh ka zite uh, ka tapate uleh ka tanute un uain dawn louh ding un,
24035009	ka tenna inn uh lam louh ding, grephuan hiam lou hiam haichi hiam neih louh ding tan in ka zui uhi.
24035010	Puaninte ah ka teng zaw ua, kou hon suangpa Jonadab thupiak tengteng mang in ka zui vek uhi.
24035011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in gam ahong sual lai in kou, ‘Kisa un, Kaldai sepaihhonte leh Siria sepaihhonte lau ziak in Jerusalem ah i hoh ding uh,’ ka chi ua, huchi in Jerusalem ah ka tengta uhi,” achi uhi.
24035012	Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ahong tung nawn a
24035013	Israel' Pathian Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah gam a mite leh Jerusalem a mi tengte kiang ah va gen inla, “Ka thute ngaikhe ding in sinsakna na sang kei ding uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24035014	Rekab tapa Jonadab thu, atapate kiang a apiak, uain dawn louh ding pen azui ua, tuni tan in bangmah adawn kei ua, amau suangpa thupiak azui mahmah uh hi; ke'n bel phalvak a thou in na kiang uah thu ka gen a, himahleh na hon ngaikhe kei uh.
24035015	Ka nasem zawlneite phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka sawl a, michih na omdan gilou ua kipan hong kik vek unla, na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, pathian dangte zaw a-nna uh sem ding in zui kei unla; nou leh na pipute uh kiang a gam ka piak ah na teng ding uh chi in; himahleh na bil uh na doh kei ua, na hon ngaikhe sam kei uh.
24035016	Rekab tapa Jonadab suante'n amau suangpa thupiak azui ua, hiai mite'n zaw ahon ngaikhe kei uh.
24035017	Huaiziak Toupa Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah thil hoih lou atung ua hong tung ding ka gen khiaksate ka hon tun ding; akiang uah thu ka gen a, angaikhe kei ua, amau ka sam a, ahon dawng sam kei uh,” chi in.
24035018	Huchi in Jeremiah in Rekab suante kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pa Jonadab thupiak na zui ua, athupawt tengteng bang a na hih ziak un;
24035019	Rekab tapa Jonadab in tangtawn in ka ma a dingh ding mi atasam ngei kei ding,” chi in Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in achi hi.
24036001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum lina ah hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi:
24036002	“Laibuzial la inla, hiai ah na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng, Israel tungthu, Judah tungthu, nam tengteng tungthu, na kiang a thu ka gen ni a kipan, Josiah hun lai a kipan, tuni tanpha a thu gelh in.
24036003	Judah inkote'n atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup tengteng, angaikhia un michih in a-omdan gilou uh ahei thei khamoh kei ding uh, athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh ka ngaihdam theihna ding in,” achi hi.
24036004	Huchi in Jeremiah in Neriah tapa Baruk asam a, huchi in Baruk in Toupa thu tengteng, akiang a agensa Jeremiah paukam a kipan laibuzial ah agelh hi.
24036005	Huan Jeremiah in Baruk kiang ah, “Khakkhum ka hi a, Toupa' inn ah ka hoh thei kei,
24036006	huaiziak in nang hoh inla, Toupa thu ka paukam a kipan laibuzial a na gelh an ngawl ni in, Toupa' inn a mipite bil a zak in va simkhia in; akhopi ua kipan a hong pawt Judahte tengteng bil a zak in leng na simkhiak ding ahi.
24036007	Michih in a-omdan gilou uh hei in, Toupa ma a hehpihna angetna uh, atun thei kha zenzen ding uam, hiai mite tung a hehna leh thangpaihna Toupa'n agenkhiak lah athupi mahmah ngal a,” chi in thu apia hi.
24036008	Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk in zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak tengteng bang in Toupa' inn a Toupa thu laibu a om asimta hi.
24036009	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum ngana, akha kuana ah Jerusalem mi tengteng leh Judah khopi a kipan a Jerusalem a hong pai tengteng in an ngawl thu apuangta uhi.
24036010	Huan Baruk in Toupa kongpi thak lutna ah, um sung tungnungzaw a laigelhmi Shaphan tapa Gemariah dantan, Toupa' inn a om ah Jeremiah thu laibu a om, mi tengteng bil azak in asim hi.
24036011	Huan Shaphan tapa Gemariah tapa Mikaiah in laibu a om Toupa thu tengteng ana zak in,
24036012	Kumpipa' inn ah ahohsuk a, laigelhmi dantan ah alut a, huan, ngai dih, huai ah heutu tengteng ana tu ua, laigelhmi Elishamate, Shemaiah tapa Delaiah, Akbor tapa Elnathan, Shaphan tapa Gemariah, Hananiah tapa Zedekiah leh heutu tengteng.
24036013	Huan Mikaiah in mite bil a zak in Baruk in laibu asim thu ana zak tengteng ahilh hi.
24036014	Huan heutu tengteng in Kushi tapa, Shelemiah tapa Nethaniah tapa Jehudi Baruk kiang ah asawl ua, akiang ah, “Mite bil a zak a na sim laibu tawi in hong pai in,” chi ding in. Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk bel laibuzial tawi in akiang uah ahong hi.
24036015	Akiang ah, “Tu inla, ka bil ua ka zak ngei un sim dih ve leh,” achi ua, huchi in Baruk in abil ua azak un asimta hi.
24036016	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thute azak uleh lau in aki-entuah chiat ua, Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng kumpipa ka hilh ngeingei ding uh,” achi uhi.
24036017	Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng na kam a kipan bangchidan a gelh na hia, hon hilh in?” chi in adong uhi.
24036018	Baruk in, “Hiai thu tengteng apaukam in ahon hilh a, laitui in laibu ah ka gelh mai ahi,” chi in adawng hi.
24036019	Heutute'n Baruk kiang ah, “Kuan unla, Jeremiah toh kibu un; kuamah in na omna uh thei kei hen,” achi uhi.
24036020	Huchi in huangsung ah kumpipa kiang ah alut ua; laibuzial bel laigelhmi Elishama dantan ah akoih ua; athu tengteng paukam in kumpipa ahilh uh.
24036021	Huchi in kumpipa'n laibuzial la ding in Jehudi asawl a, laigelhmi Elishama dantan a kipan ala uhi. Huan Jehudi in kumpipa leh kumpipa kiang a dingh heutu tengteng bil a zak in asim hi.
24036022	Akha kuana ahi a, kumpipa bel aphalbi inn ah atu a, ama a meihol thuk ah kuang a-om hi.
24036023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jehudi in khep thum hiam khep li hiam a sim in kumpipa in atemta in alaibuzial a-attan a, meikhuk ah pum katmang vek ding in alawnlut zel hi.
24036024	Kumpipa leh anasem mite'n hiai thu tengteng ngaikhe mite kuamah alau kei ua, apuansilh uh leng abotkek sam kei uh.
24036025	Huai phet hilou in Elnathan leh Delaiah leh Gemariahte'n laibuzial hal lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen ua, himahleh angaikhe nuam kei.
24036026	Huan kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa Jerahmeel leh Azriel tapa Seraiah leh Abdeel tapa Shelemiah Baruk laigelhmi leh zawlnei Jeremiah man ding in thu apia a; himahleh Toupa'n amau asel hi.
24036027	Huan laibuzial leh Jeremiah kam a kipan Baruk in agelh tengteng thute kumpipa'n ahalmang khit in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi.
24036028	Laibuzial dang la inla, laibuzial masa a thu tengteng, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in ahal mangsate gelh nawn vek in.
24036029	Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungtang thu ah huchi in na gen ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hong pai a, hiai gam hihsia in, hiai mi leh sa ahihmang vek ding chih, bangziak a huchibang thu gelh na hia? chi in laibuzial na halta hi.
24036030	Huaiziak in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungthu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: David tutphah a tu ding mi anei kei ding; aluang leng sun nisa ah leh zan vuk nuai ah paihkhiak ahi ding.
24036031	Athulimlouhna uh ziak in amah leh asuante leh anasem mite ka gawt ding; amau leh Jerusalem a tengte leh Judah mite tung ah atung ua ka phuansa, angaihkhiak kei uleh thil hoih lou tengteng ka hon tun ding,” chi in.
24036032	Huchi in Jeremiah in laibuzial dang ala a, Neriah tapa Baruk laigelhmi apia a, ama'n huai ah Jeremiah kam a kipan laibu gelhsa tengteng, Jehoiakim in mei a akhulmangsa thute agelh a; huai ban ah akibatpih thu tampi abehlap lai hi.
24037001	Huan Josiah tapa Zedekiah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in, Judah gam kumpipa ding a abawl Jehoiakim tapa Koniah sik in vai ahawmta hi.
24037002	Himahleh amah leh anasem mite leh agam a mite'n Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kam a gen angaikhe kei uh.
24037003	Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Shelemiah tapa Jehukal leh Maaseiah tapa siampu Zephaniah bel zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah, “ Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah hon thumsak in,” chi ding in asawl hi.
24037004	Jeremiah bel mipite lak ah a-utut in avak thei lai a; tanin ah lah akoih ngal kei ua.
24037005	Pharaoh sepaihhonte Aigupta a kipan ahong pawtkheta ua; huchi in Kaldaite Jerusalem um mite'n atanchin azak un Jerusalem atawpsanta uhi.
24037006	Huchi in Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a,
24037007	Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa hon dong ding a nou hon sawl kiang ah, ‘Ngai in, Pharaoh sepaihhon, nou hon panpih ding a hong paite amau gam Aigupta ah akik nawn ding uh.
24037008	Kaldaite hong pai in, hiai khopi asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh.
24037009	“Kaldaite'n ahon paisan ngei ding uh,” chi in nou kikhem kei un, ahon paisan kei ding uh.
24037010	Noute hon sual Kaldai sepaihte bawl ek mah le uchin, alak ua miliam omsunte kia in leng amau puanin a kipan hong thou in hiai khopi mei in ahal thouthou ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi,’ ” chi in.
24037011	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh sepaihhonte lau ziak a Kaldai sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem apaisan lai un,
24037012	Jeremiah in mite lak a atantuan la ding in Benjamin gam a lut ding in Jerusalem apawtsan hi.
24037013	Benjamin kongpi atun in ngakmi heutu Hananiah tapa Shelemiah tapa amin Irijah ana om a; huai in, “Kaldaite kiang a kipia na hi,” chi in zawlnei Jeremiah ana man hi.
24037014	Jeremiah in, “Zuau ahi; Kaldaite kiang ah ka kipe kei,” achi a; himahleh angaikhe kei a, huchi in Irijah in Jeremiah ana man a, heutute kiang ah apia hi.
24037015	Huan heutute Jeremiah tung ah aheh mahmah ua, asat ua, laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah akhum uh; huai tan inn ding a azat him uh ahi.
24037016	Huchi in Jeremiah lei nuai kokhuk ah alut a, ni tampitak a-om nung in kumpipa Zedekiah in asamkhia hi.
24037017	Huan kumpipa'n a-inn ah aguk in akiang ah, “ Toupa kiang a kipan thu banghiam bek a-om hia?” chi in adong hi. Jeremiah in, “Om e,” achi hi. Akiang ah, “Babilon kumpipa khut ah matsak in na om ding,” achi lai hi.
24037018	Jeremiah in kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah, “Nang hiam na nasemmi hiam hiai mite tung ah bang thil ahia ka hihkhelh a na hon matsak?
24037019	Nang kiang a ‘Babilon kumpipa nang leh hiai gam dou ding in ahong pai kei ding, chi a thugenmi na zawlneite koi a om ahita ua?’
24037020	Aw, ka pu, kumpipa ngaikhia in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka ngetna na sang in, ka hon ngen hi; laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah hon kiksak nawn ke'n, huai ah ka va si kha ding,” achi hi.
24037021	Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah in thu apia a, Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah atangsak a, tanghou bawl mite kongzing a kipan niteng in tanghou beu khat, khopi a tanghou a-om lai siah apia ua, huchibang in Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi.
24038001	Huan Mattan tapa Shephatiah leh Pashur tapa Gedaliah leh Shelemiah tapa Jukal leh Malkijah tapa Pashurte'n, mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in,
24038002	“ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi a om nilouhte zaw namsau, kial leh hipi in asi ding ua, Kaldaite kiang a kipia bel ahing ding uh, ahinna akihumbit ding a ahing ding,” chi in.
24038003	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte khut ah piak ahi ngei ding a, ala ding, chi a agen angaikhia uhi.
24038004	Huchi in heutute'n kumpipa kiang ah, “Hiai mi hihlup hi hen, ka hon ngen uh; ama'n akiang ua hiai thute gen in hiai khopi a galkapmi omlaite leh mipi tengteng tha hat lousak in; hiai mi'n hiai mipite hoihna azong kei a, asiatna azong zaw,” achi uhi.
24038005	Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Ngai un, amah na khut ua om ahi; kumpipa'n na deih louh lam uh hihthei ahi sam a,” achi hi.
24038006	Huchi in Jeremiah api ua, ngakmi huangsung a om kumpipa tapa Malkijah tuibem ah apailut ua; Jeremiah bel khau in akhesuk ua, huai tuibem ah buannawi kia lou ngal tui a-om kei a; buannawi ah Jeremiah akia hi.
24038007	Huan Ethiopia mi, michilgeh kumpipa' inn a om sek Ebed-melek in Jeremiah tuibem ah akoih uh chih ana za a; huchih lai in kumpipa bel Benjamin kongpi ah atu a;
24038008	Ebed-melek bel kumpipa' inn a kipan apawt a, kumpipa kiang ah,
24038009	“Ka pu, kumpipa, hiai mite'n zawlnei Jeremiah tuibem a ana paihkhiak uh thil gilou thupi mahmah hih ahi uh, gilkial ziak in a-omna mun ah si mai ding akei maw; khopi ah tanghou a-om nawn kei a,” achi a.
24038010	Huan kumpipa'n Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek thu apia a, “Hiai a kipan in mi sawmthum pi inla, tuibem a kipan in asih ma in zawlnei Jeremiah va lakhia un,” chi in.
24038011	Huchi in Ebed-melek in mite api a, kumpipa dangka inn nuai ah alut ua, puanak lui paihte leh puansilh siate alakhia ua, tuibem ah Jeremiah kiang ah khau in akhaikhesuk uhi.
24038012	Huan Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai puanak luite leh puansilh siate na lenuai ah khau in gakkhum in,” achi hi. Huan Jeremiah in huchibang in ahih hi.
24038013	Huan Jeremiah bel tuibem a kipan khau in akaikhia ua; huchi in ngakmi huangsung ah Jeremiah a-om nilouh hi.
24038014	Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah asam a, Toupa' inn a lutna thumna ah akiang ah apilut a; huan, kumpipa'n Jeremiah kiang ah, “Thil ka hon dong ding; ka lak ah bangmah iim nei ke'n,” achi hi.
24038015	Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “Hon hilh leng na hon that mahmah kei dia hia? Thu hon hanthawn leng lah hon ngaikhe lou ding chin a,” achi hi.
24038016	Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “ Toupa hiai ka hinna bawlpa ahin a ahin sung teng ka hon hihlum kei hial ding, na hinna zong mite khut ah leng nang ka hon pe sam kei ding,” chi in asim in akichiam hi.
24038017	Huchi in Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “ Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Babilon kumpipa heutute kiang ah na kipiak leh na hinna na bitsak ding a, hiai khopi leng mei in akang kei ding, nang leh na inkote leng na hing ding uh.’
24038018	Babulon kumpipa heutute kiang a na kipiak keileh bel hiai khopi Kaldaite khut a piak ahi ding a, ahal ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta het kei ding achi,” achi hi.
24038019	Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Kaldai mite kiang a kipia Judate khut ah ahon mansak in nuihzat in ahon bawl kha ding uh ka lau hi,” achi hi.
24038020	Jeremiah in bel, “Ahon mansak kei ding uh; na kiang a ka gen Toupa aw mang mai in. Huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding a, hin leng na hing ding.
24038021	Kipiak na ut keileh bel Toupa'n hon thu kawkmuh hiai ahi:
24038022	“Ngai in, Judah kumpipa' inn a numei omlaite tengteng Babulon kumpipa heutute kiang ah pi in a-om ding ua, huai numeite'n, na lawm hoihhoihte'n ahon khem ua, ahon zouta ua, na khe buannawi a atumtak in ahon lehngatsan ua,” achi ding uhi.
24038023	“Na zite, na tanute Kaldai mite kiang ah api vek ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta kei ding a, Babulon kumpipa khut ah mat in na om zaw ding a, nang ziak in hiai khopi akang ding,” achi hi.
24038024	Huan Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai thute kuamah in thei kei uhen, huchi in na si kei ding.
24038025	Himahleh heutute'n ka hon houpih azak ua, na kiang a ahong ua, na kiang a, ‘Kumpipa kiang a na gen hon hilh in; ka lak uah bangmah iim nei ke'nla, ka hon that kei ding uh; na kiang a kumpipa thugente leng, achih uleh,’
24038026	nang akiang uah, ‘Jonathan inn a hon kiksak lou a, huai a va si lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah ngetna ka pelut lel ahi, na chi ding hi,’ ” achi hi.
24038027	Jeremiah kiang ah heutu tengteng hong pai in, adongta ngei ua, kumpipa'n thu apiak tengteng bang in amau ahilh hi. Huchi in akihoupih uh atawp ua; athu theih phak ahita kei hi.
24038028	Huchi in Jeremiah bel Jerusalem lak ni tan in ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi.
24039001	Huan Judah vaihawm akum kuana akha sawmna ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihte'n Jerusalem asual ua, a-um uh.
24039002	Zedekiah vaihawm kum sawm-le-khatna akha lina, ani kuana ah khopi kulh aphu pailet uh.
24039003	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem alak un Babulon kumpipa heutute a hong lut ua, kongpi laita ah atu ua, Nergal-shar-ezar, Samgar-nebo, Sarsekim, Rab-saris mi Nergal-shar-ezar, Rab-mag mi leh Babulon kumpipa heutu dangte toh.
24039004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh galkapmi tengteng in amau amuh un ataikek ua, khopi a kipan zan in kumpipa huai lampi lam ah kulhbaang nih kikal kongpi ah ataikhia ua, amah pen Arabah lampi lam ah apawt hi.
24039005	Himahleh Kaldaite sepaihhon in amah adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua; huchi in amat nung un Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, Hamath gam a Riblah ah api ua, ama'n atungthu angaihtuah hi.
24039006	Huchi in Babulon kumpipa'n Riblah ah amah mitmuh ngei in Zedekiah tapate athat a, Babulon kumpipa'n Judah mihoih teng leng athat lai hi.
24039007	Huai lou leng Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, kol abunsak a, Babulon ah apita hi.
24039008	Kaldaite'n kumpipa' inn leh midang inn tengteng ahal ua, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng ahihsia uh.
24039009	Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in khopi a mipi khosuaksun akiang a amau a kipiate leh mipi omlaite Babulon ah sal in api hi.
24039010	Himahleh ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Judah gam migenthei bangmah neiloute anusia a, grephuan leh loute ape pah ngal hi.
24039011	Huan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Jeremiah tungtang thu a ngakmi Nebuzaradan kiang ah,
24039012	“Amah pi inla, hoihtak in bawl inla, hihna himhim ke'n, na kiang a agen bangbang in hih zel zaw in,” chi in thu apia hi.
24039013	Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Rab-saris mi Nebushazban, Rab-mag mi Nergal-shar-ezar leh Babulon kumpipa sepaih heutu deuhdeuhte athukhak vek a, amau Jeremiah ngakmi huangsung a kipan asamkhia ua,
24039014	Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah a-inn a puak ding in akemsak ua, huchi in mite lak ah a-omta hi.
24039015	Huan ngakmi huangsung a khakkhum a a-om lai in, Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
24039016	Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek kiang ah, “Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, ahoihna ding hilou in, hiai khopi siatna ding in ka thute ka hon tun ding a, huai ni mahmah in na ma ah tangtunsak ahi ding.
24039017	Huai ni in nang bel ka hon hunkhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, na mi kihtakte khut ah piak na hi kei ding.
24039018	Nang ka hon humbit ding a, namsau in na puk kei ding a, kei na hon muan ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in va gen in,” achi hi.
24040001	Judah leh Jerusalem sal tengteng, Babulon sal a apite uh lak a Jeremiah khainiang len kawm a api lai a ngakmi apawtsak nung a Toupa a kipan Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung hi.
24040002	Ngakmi heutu in Jeremiah api a, akiang ah, “ Toupa i Pathian in hiai mun a thil hoih lou tung ding ana puang khin hi.
24040003	Toupa'n ahon tungsakta ngei a, agen bangbang in ahihta hi; Toupa tung ah thil na hihkhial ua, apaukam na man louh ziak un hiai thil na tung ua ahong tung ahi.
