24040004	Tu in, ngai in, tuni in na khut a khainiang but ka hon phelsak hi. Babulon a ka kiang a hong na utleh hong inla, na ut keileh hong dah mai in; en dih, gam tengteng na ma ah a-om hi, hong hoh pha na sakleh hoih na sak bang in pai in.
24040005	Akik ma in ama'n, Judah khopite tung a ukpi dia Babulon kumpipa'n abawl Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah kik inla, mite lak ah akiang ah om in, ahihkeileh hoh pha na sakna ah va hoh mai in,” achi hi. Huchi in ngakmi heutu in nek ding leh thilpiak apia a, apaisakta hi.
24040006	Jeremiah bel Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah Mizpah ah ahoh a, akiang a gam a omsun mite lak ah a-om teita hi.
24040007	Huan sepaih pawl heutu tengteng gamlak a omte'n, amaute leh aheute uh Babulon kumpipa'n, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah huai gam a migenthei penpen, Babulon sal a pilouhte akemsak chih azak un Mizpah khua ah;
24040008	Gedaliah kiang ah ahong pai ua, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, Kareah tapate Johanan leh Jonathan, Tanhumet tapa Seraiah, Netophah a Ephai tate leh Maakath mi tapa Jezaniah, amau leh amite uh toh.
24040009	Huchi in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in amau leh aheute uh kiang ah, “Kaldaite nasep kihta kei un; gam ah om dinden unla, Babulon kumpipa na sem unla, noute a ding in ahoih mai ding hi.
24040010	Kei zaw Mizpah ah ka om ding a, Kaldai mi ka kiang a hong dingte ma ah noute sik in ka dingh ding; noute'n ahihleh uainte, nipitheite, thaute lakhawm in na bel uah koih unla, na khopi laksate uah teng un,” chi in akichiam hi.
24040011	Huchi mah bang in Juda mi tengteng, Moab gam a tengte, Ammon mite lak a tengte leh Edom gam a tengte leh gamdang a omte'n Babulon kumpipa'n Judah khosuaksunte nusia a, atung uah Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa, Gedaliah akoih chih azak un;
24040012	Juda mi tengteng ahawlzakna gam tengteng ua kipan in ahong paikik ua, Judah gam a Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah ahong tung ua, uain leh nipithei alakhawm uhi.
24040013	Huai lou leng Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawlte heutu, gamlak a om tengteng Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah,
24040014	“Ammon mite kumpipa Baalis in na hinna la ding in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael asawl chih na za hia?” achi uhi.
24040015	Huan Kareah tapa Johanan in Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang ah, “Hon paisak dih ve, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael ka va that mai ding, kuamah in athei kei ding uh; Juda mi na kiang omkhawm tengteng adalh vek ua, Judah mi khosuaksunte manthatna hih ding in bangziak a na hinna la ding ahia?” chi in asimtham in agen hi.
24040016	Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in bel Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah, “Hiai thil na hih ding ahi kei; Ishmael na gendan adik kei hi,” achi hi.
24041001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akha sagihna ah Elishama tapa Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, kumpi chi a mi, kumpipa upate lak a khat, mi sawmkhat pi in Mizpah ah Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah ahong ua; Mizpah ah an anekhawm uhi.
24041002	Huan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel amipi sawmkhatte toh adingh ua, namsau in Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa, Babulon kumpipa'n gam ukpipa dia abawl Gedaliah athat uhi.
24041003	Akiang a Juda mi om tengteng, Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang a omte leh Kaldai galkapmi om teite Ishmael in athat lai hi.
24041004	Gedaliah athah nung ni nih in hichi ahong hi a, kuamah in atheih ma un,
24041005	Shekem a kipan, Shiloh a kipan, Samaria a kipan in mi sawmgiat, akhamul uh met a, apuansilhte uh kek a, amau ki-atkeh in, tanghou latte leh gimlimte tawi in Toupa inn ah lan ding in ahong uhi.
24041006	Amau dawn ding in Mizpah a kipan in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael apawtkhia a, lamtawn in akapkap a; huan, hichi ahong hi a, amaute amuh in akiang uah, “Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah hong pai un,” achi hi.
24041007	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, khopi sung atun uleh Nethaniah tapa Ishmael leh amipite'n amau ana that ua, kokhuk ah apai uhi.
24041008	Alak ua mi sawmkhatte'n bel, “Hon that kei un, gam ah buh, buhman, sathau leh khuaizu tampi ka sel ngal ua,” achi uhi. Huchi in amau ahawi ua, a-unaute uh lak ah athat telta kei hi.
24041009	Huan Ishmael in Gedaliah toh amithahte luang apaihna kokhuk bel kumpipa Asa in Israel kumpipa Baasha akihtak ziak a abawl ahi. Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huai luangte in adimsak hi.
24041010	Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a mihing a-omsun, kumpipa tanute, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang a ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in akepsak, Mizpah a om lai tengteng toh sal in api vek a; Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huaite sal dia pi in Ammon mite zuan in apawt hi.
24041011	Himahleh, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a om sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael thil hoih lou hih tengteng ana zak un mi tengteng apikhia ua,
24041012	Nethaniah tapa Ishmael sual ding in akuan ua, tui tampi omna mun Gibeon ah ava mu uh.
24041013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ishmael kiang a mi tengteng in, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih heutu tengteng ava muh un ana kipak lo mahmah uhi.
24041014	Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a kipan a sal a api tengteng akihei ua, akik nawn ua, Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah apai diam uhi.
24041015	Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel mi giat toh Johanan a kipan ataikhe geigei ua, Ammon mite kiang ah apaita uhi.
24041016	Huan Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in Ahikam tapa Gedaliah athah nung a Mizpah a kipan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael lak a Johanan in ahutkhiaksa mi akhosuaksunte tengteng, kidou mite, numeite, naupangte, michilgehte, Gibeon a kipan a api nawnte api vek hi.
24041017	Huchi in apawt ua, Kaldaite ziak a Aigupta gam a tailut tum in Bethlehem kho kiang ah Geruth Chimham ah akhawl uhi.
24041018	Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah, Babulon kumpipa'n huai gam ukpipa dia abawl athah ziak in amau akihta mahmah uhi.
24042001	Huan sepaih pawl heutute leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh Hoshaiah tapa Jezaniah leh mipi tengteng, aneupen a kipan a alianpen tan in ahong nai ua, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah:
24042002	“Na ma ah ka ngetna uh pom hi henla, hiai akhosuaksun mi tengteng a ding ngei in na Pathian kiang a hon thumsak ding in ka hon ngen uhi; na hon muh bang ngei in mi tampite lak a kipan tawmchik kia nutsiat in ka omta uh.
24042003	Toupa na Pathian in ka paina ding thil uh hon kawkmuh theihna ding in,” achi uhi.
24042004	Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in akiang uah, “Na thu uh ka za hi, ngai un, na thu uh bangbang in Toupa na Pathian kiang uah ka ngen ding hi; huan, hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n nou ahon dawn peuhmah ka hon hilh zel ding; na lak uah bangmah ka iim kei ding,” achi hi.
24042005	Amau Jeremiah kiang ah, “ Toupa na Pathian in ka kiang ua nang ahon sawlna thu tengteng bang zel a ka hih kei uleh ka lak uah Toupa thu theipa dik leh muanhuai hi hen.
24042006	Asia hiam apha hiam ka hon sawlna uh Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka mang ngeingei ding uh; Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka man uleh kou hoihtheihna ding ahi,” achi uhi.
24042007	Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, ani sawm nung in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a.
24042008	Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang asepaih heutu om tengteng leh sepaih tengteng, aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in asam a, akiang uah,
24042009	Toupa na Pathian uh, ama a na ngetna uh tun dia na hon sawlna pa un hichi in achi:
24042010	Hiai gam a na omdet uleh ka hon tungding ding a, ka hon phelzak kei ding, ka hon phutkip ding a, ka hon botkhe kei ding, na tung ua thil hoih lou ka tutte lah ka lungheita ngal a.
24042011	Babulon kumpipa na lau sek uh lau nawn kei un, amah lau kei un chih Toupa thupawt ahi; akhut a kipan noute hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang uah ka om hi.
24042012	Na tung ua zah angaihtheihna ding in zahngaihna nou ka hon phal ding a, na gam mah uah ka hon kiksak ding hi.
24042013	Himahleh, hiai gam ah i om kei ding uh, chi a Toupa na Pathian uh aw na man louh ua,
24042014	“Ahi het lou Aigupta gam ah i pai zaw ding ua, huai ah kidouna himhim i tuak kei ding a, pengkul ging leng i za kei ding a, an taksapna a-om sam kei ding, huai ah i teng zaw ding uh,” na chih uleh,
24042015	Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa thu ngai dih ua; sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi:
24042016	Aigupta gam a lut ding leh huai a teng ding a kihei teitei na hih uleh hichi ahong hi ding a, namsau na kihtak ngei un Aigupta gam ah hon pha ding a, kial na kihtak sek un leng Aigupta gam ah nou ahon delhzui ding a, huai ah na si ding uh.
24042017	Aigupta gam a teng ding a kihei teiteite tengteng huchibang in a-om ding ua, namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ding uh, thil hoih lou atung ua ka tut ding a kipan kuamah asuakta un abit kei ding uh.
24042018	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in huchi in achi hi, “Jerusalem a tengte tung a ka hehna ka sun mah bang in Aigupta gam na lut hun chiang un na tung uah ka hehna ka sung sam ding; hamsethuak leh lamdangsak chiat, mi kamse banna, gensiat na hi ding ua, hiai mun na mu nawn kei ding uh.
24042019	“Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa'n na tungtang uh agenta hi, Aigupta gam ah lut kei un, hiai ni in nou ka hon theichiansak ahi chih thei mahmah un. Na hinna uh,
24042020	Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah na hon sawl ua, Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang ah hon thumsak inla, Toupa ka Pathian un achihchih hon hilh inla, ka hih zel ding uhi na chi ngal ua.
24042021	Tuni in na kiang uah ka puangta ahi; himahleh na kiang ua ahon sawlna bangmah in Toupa na Pathian uh paukam lah na mang ngal kei ua.
24042022	Huaiziak in tu'n zaw theita un, tenna na lunggulhna mun ngei uah namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ngeingei ding uh,” chi in achi hi.
24043001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem mipi tengteng kiang a Toupa a Pathian uh thu tengteng Toupa Pathian in gen ding a asawlna thu, huai thu tengteng agen khit in;
24043002	Hoshaiah tapa Azariah leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh mikiphasak tengteng in, Jeremiah ahoupih ua, akiang ah, “Zuaugen na hi, Toupa ka Pathian un, ‘Aigupta gam a teng ding in na pai ding uh ahi kei, chi a gen ding in nang ahon sawl sam a;’
24043003	Kaldaite khut a matsak a ka om ua hon thahtheihna ding un leh Babulon sal dia hon pitheihna ding in Neriah tapa Baruk in kou hon sual ding a hon sawl ahi zaw ve,” achi uhi.
24043004	Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu teng leh mipi tengteng in Judah gam a teng ding in Toupa aw amang kei uh.
24043005	Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Judah khosuaksun tengteng, Judah gam a teng ding a hawlzak a a-omna namte uh lak a kipan a hong kik;
24043006	pasalte, numeite, naupangte, kumpipa tanute leh michih ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah leh akiang a anutsiatte uh zawlnei Jeremiah leh Neriah tapa Baruk leng, apikhawm vek zawta uhi.
24043007	Huchi in Aigupta gam atungta ua, Toupa aw amang kei ua, huchi in Tahpanhes khua ngei atung uhi.
24043008	Tahpanhes ah Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
24043009	Suang lianpi la inla, Tahpanhes a Pharaoh inn lutna chin a teklei lep zutna ah Judah mite mitmuh ngei in phut in.
24043010	Akiang uah, Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ka thukhak ding a, ama'n hiai ka suang phumguk tung ah alaltutphah atung ding; ama'n atung uah akumpi puanin akai ding hi.
24043011	“Huan ahong ding a, Aigupta gam ahong gawt ding a, sihna a si dingte, sihna ah; saltang dingte, saltanna ah, namsau thuak dingte namsau ah.
24043012	Aigupta mite pathian innte ah meikuangte akhah ding a, akang ding, sal in api ding a; belamchingmi in puan asilh bang in Aigupta gam asilh ding, huai a kipan in galmuang in apawt ding.
24043013	Aigupta gam a Beth-shemesh khuam zeknei sang pipite achimsak ding a, Aigupta pathian innte mei in ahal ding, achi, chi in,” achi hi.
24044001	Aigupta gam a Juda om tengteng, Migdol khua, Tahpanhes khua, Memphis khua leh Pathros gam a tengte tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung,
24044002	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Jerusalem leh Judah khopite tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tutte na muta uh; ngai dih ua, tu in ahong segawpta a, kuamah ateng kei uh,
24044003	amau nou leh na pipute un pathian dangte atheih ngei nai louh uh na sem ding leh akiang ua gimlim hal in, kei hon hehsak ding uh; aginatlouhnate uh ahih khit tak ziak un.
24044004	Huchi pipi in na kiang uah nasem zawlnei tengteng phalvak a thou in ka sawl a, akiang uah, “Aw, hiai thu kihhuai, ka huat lamtak hih kei un,” chi in.
24044005	Himahleh angaikhe tuan kei ua, aginatlouhna uh pathian dangte kiang a gimlim hal louh ding pen angeingaih kei uh.
24044006	Huaiziak in ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ka sung a akuangta a, tuni a a-om bang in asia a, asegawpta hi.
24044007	Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in na lak ua kipan numei pasal, naungekte leh nawi ne laite Judah lak a kipan kuamah hawi lou a gawimang vek ding in bangziak a hiai thil hoih loutak na hinna uh tung a hih na hi ua?
24044008	Na va tenna uh Aigupta gam pathiante kiang a gimlim hal in leitung gam teng a nam chih lak a hamsethuak leh gensiat na hihtheihna ding uh leh gawimang na hihtheihna ding ua na khut thilhih ngei ua hon hehsak na hi uh.
24044009	Na pipute uh gitlouhnate, Judah kumpipate gitlouhnate leh na zite uh gitlouhna, Judah gam leh Jerusalem kongzing a ahih khitsate uh na mangngilhta ua hia?
24044010	Tuni tan in leng akisik tuan kei ua, na pipute uh leh noumau ma a ka taklat ka dan leh ka dan thusehte na zui kei ua, na lau sam kei uh.
24044011	Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, na siatna ding un Judah tengteng gawimang vek ding in nou ka hon maituah ding hi.
24044012	Huan Judah khosuaksun, Aigupta gam a ten tum a kihei teiteite ka man ding a, achimit vek ding uh; Aigupta gam ah apuk ding ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in a-om ding uh; aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in namsau leh kial in asi ding uh.
24044013	Jerusalem ka gawt bangmah in Aigupta gam a tengte namsaute, kialte leh hipite a gawt ding ka hi ngal a.
24044014	Huchi in Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan Judah khosuaksunte Judah gam, a-omna ding ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah kik ding in khat lel leng hingdam in asuakta kei ding uh, asim a taikhete kia lou ngal kuamah akik kei ding uh.”
24044015	Huchi in mi tengteng, azite un pathian dang kiang a gimlim ahal chih theite leh numei huai a dinghte mipi tampi, Aigupta gam a teng mipi tengteng in, Pathros ah Jeremiah adawng ua, hichi in achi uh;
24044016	“ Toupa min a ka kiang ua na thugente zaw ka hon ngaihkhiaksak kei ding uh.
24044017	Kou leh ka pipute uh, ka kumpipate uh leh ka heutute un Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ana hih zel bang un van kumpinu kiang a gimlim halte leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte, ka paukam suak peuhmah bang un ka hih ngeingei ding uh; huchih lai in ka lamzang ua, nek-le-dawn ding atam a, siatna himhim ka mu sam ua.
24044018	Van kumpinu kiang a thil hal leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka tawp nungsiah uh bangpeuh ka tasam zawta ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in ka omta uhi.”
24044019	Huan numeite'n, “Van kumpinu kiang a gimlim ka hal lai uh leh akiang a dawn ding thillatte ka butkhiak uh?” achi uhi.
24044020	Huchi in Jeremiah in mipi tengteng, numei pasal amah dawng mite tengteng kiang ah,
24044021	“Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah, nou leh na pipute uh, na kumpipate uh leh na heutute uh leh gam a mipite'n gimlim ahalte uh Toupa'n atheigige in alungsim ah akhum kei maw?
24044022	Na thil gilou hih ziak uleh na thilkihhuai hihte uh ziak in Toupa'n athuak ngap nawnta kei hi; huaiziak in, na gam uh tua a-om bang in asia a, lamdangsak chiat, hamsethuak, tengmi om lou, ahong hita hi.
24044023	Gimlim na hal ua, Toupa tung ah na gilou ua, Toupa paukam suakte na mang kei ua, adan hiam adan thusehte hiam athu theihsakte hiam na zuih sam louh ziak un hiai thil hoih lou tua a-om bang in na tung uah ahong tungta hi,” achi a.
24044024	Huai lou leng Jeremiah in mipi tengteng leh numeite kiang ah, “Aigupta gam a Judah tengteng aw, Toupa thu za un, sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi:
24044025	Nou leh na zite un, van kumpinu kiang a gimlim hal leh dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka na chiamsa bang zel in ka hih ngeingei ding, chi in na kam un na genta ua, na khut un na pichingsak lai uhi. ‘Na thuchiamte uh hihkip unla, na thu tupte uh tangtungsak vanglak un.’
24044026	Huaiziak in nou Judah, Aigupta gam a tengte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un: Ngai un, Toupa Pathian ahin bang in chi in Aigupta gam pumpi a teng, Judah mi kua kam mah ah ka min aging nawn ngei kei ding, chi in ka min thupi lou in ka kichiam ahi chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24044027	Ngai in, ahoihna ding uh hilou in asiatna ding un amau ka tang thek ahi; huchi in Judah mi, Aigupta gam a omte tengteng, namsau leh kialte ahihman in a-om ding uh, amanthat vek matan un.
24044028	Namsau hihman val tawmchik Aigupta gam a kipan a pawt in Judah gam ah alut ding uh; huan, Judah mi khosuaksunte tengteng, Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan mite'n kua thu ahia pai zaw ding, ka thu hia amau thu, athei ding uh.
24044029	“Huan hiai nou a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding; na tung uah thil hoih lou lam in ka thu apai ngei ding chih na theihna ding un hiai mun ah nou ka hon gawt ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24044030	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Pharaoh Hophra, Aigupta kumpipa bel amelma, ahinna zong mite khut ah ka mangsak ding, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, amelma, ahinna zongmi Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut a ka piak bangmah in,” achi hi.
24045001	Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa akum lina ah Jeremiah kam a kipan, hiai thute laibu a agelh lai a, Neriah tapa Baruk kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thugen:
24045002	Baruk aw, Toupa Israel' Pathian in, na kiang ah hichi in achi:
24045003	Nang, “Ka tung gik hi na mai e, Toupa'n ka thuakna ah lungkhamna ahon behlapta ngal a; ka mauna ka bahpih a, tawldamna ka muzou kei,” na chi a.
24045004	Akiang ah hichi in na gen ding ahi, “ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, ka lamsa ka phel nawn ding a, gam pumpi mahmah ah ka phuhsa ka botkhe nawn ding.
24045005	Huan nang a ding in thil thupi na zong hia? Zong dah mai in; sa tengteng tung ah thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; himahleh na hinna bel mun chih a na paina ah gallak ding in ka hon pe ding,” chi in.
24046001	Namte tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung;
24046002	Aigupta thu, Euphrates Luipi gei a Karkhemish a om, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim, akum lina a Nebukadnezzar in anuaisiah leh Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh Neko sepaihhonte tungtang thu:
24046003	“Lum bemte, lum zawlte mansa in om unla, gal nawt un,
24046004	Sakol van unla, sakol tuang mite aw, tuang un, dal lukhu khu in dingkip unla, tei tat-hiam in sik puanak silh un.
24046005	Bangchidan a amaute lau-le-ling a taikek a mu ka hia! Agalkap mite uh avuallel uh, baksam leng zen in atai ua, nunglam nga het lou in, ning chih ah gal alang chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24046006	Mizuanzaang ataimang thei kei, galkapmi apawt tuan kei uh, huai a mi Euphrates Luipi gei ah ahawi ua, apuk khinta uh.
24046007	Nile lui bang a khang kua ahia? Luipi tuikihot kimvel bang in?
24046008	Aigupta Nile lui bang in akhang a luipi tuikihot kimvel bang mai in, ka khang ding a, leitung ka luahsuak ding, khopi leh aluahte ka hihse ding,” achi hi.
24046009	“Aw sakolte aw, nawk zel unla, aw kangtalai aw, nakpi in pang un; galdou mite'n ma phu uhenla, Ethiopia mi leh Put mi, lum tawi mite, Lud mi thalpeu zang siamte toh.
24046010	Huai ni ahi, Toupa sepaihte' Toupa ni, phulak ni, amelmate tung a phu alaktheihna, namsau in agai ding a, atai ding, asisan uh taitak in adawn ding; Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n mal gam ah Euphrates Luipi gei ah mi tampi agou phengphung mai ve.
24046011	Aw, Aigupta tanu siangthou, Gilead ah hohtou inla, singnai nuhchi va la in, damdawi tampi athawn in na zangta, nang a ding in damna himhim a-om kei hi.
24046012	Namte'n na zahlakna aza ua, na kah in leitung pumpi adim hi, galhatmi leh galhatmi akiphu ua, lei ah apukkhawm uh,” chi in.
24046013	Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hong pai a, Aigupta gam ahong bawl ekdan ding thu Toupa'n zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a agen:
24046014	“Aigupta gam ah gen unla, Migdol ah puang un; Memphis leh Tahpanhes ah puang unla; dingkip in kigalging un; na kim a mi namsau in agaita ngal a.
24046015	Bangziak a na mihatte phiatmang a om ahi ua? Adingh zou kei ua, Toupa'n apaihkhiak ziak in.
24046016	Mi tampi akisuisak a, ahi, akiphupuk lemlum ua, Nuaisiahna namsau taisan in kisa un, i kik ding uh, i pianna gam ah i mite kiang ah, achi uhi.
24046017	Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh pen husa lian lel, ahun sehsa a paimangsak a om, chi in huai ah akikou uhi.
24046018	Ahin a ka hin sung in chih Kumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi hi, tangte lak a Tabor tang bang in tuipi chin a Karmel tang bang in ahong pai ngei ding.
24046019	Aw nang, tanu, Aigupta gam a teng, saltang ding in kibawl mai in; Memphis akisegawp dek a, teng ding om lou in akangmang ding hi.
24046020	Aigupta bel bawngla hoihtak ahi, himahleh mal a kipan nasemmi ding hong kuan in ahong pai hi.
24046021	Alak ua sepaih goihlaite bel bawngtuai vak thau bang mai ahi ua, adek uh angat ua, ataikek ua, khawl lou in, atung uah asiatna ni uh atungta, agawtna hun ding uh;
24046022	Gulpi kitholh bang mai in husa anei a, amelmate kiton in ahong pai ua, singphuk mite bang in hei toh ahong sual uh.
24046023	Agam gammang vaksuak zoh louh ahong hihse ding uh, khaukhup sang in atamzaw ua, sim seng louh ahi uh.
24046024	Aigupta tanu azahlak ding, mallam a mi khut a matsak in a-om ding.”
24046025	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Thebes khua a Ammon, leh Pharaoh leh Aigupta leh apathiante, akumpipate, Pharaoh ngei leh amah muang mite ka gawt ding.
24046026	Ahinna uh, zong mite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh anasem mite khut ah ka mansak ding; huai hun chiang in luah in a-om ding, nidanglai nite mah bang in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24046027	“Jakob aw, ka nasempa, lau ke'nla, aw Israel, lunglel sam ke'n, ngai in, gamlapi a kipan nang ka hon hunkhe ding a, na suante leng asaltanna gam ua kipan, Jakob ahong kik ding a, muangtak in a-om hiathiat ding a, kuamah in alausak nawn kei ding uh.
24046028	Jakob aw, ka nasempa, lau ke'n, ka hon ompih ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ka hon delhzakna nam tengteng ka beisak ding a, nang zaw ka hon beisak het kei ding; diktak in ka hon gawt ding a, gawt louh in ka hon khak kei ding hi.
24047001	Pharaoh in Gaza agawt ma a Philistia mite tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung.
24047002	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai un, mal a kipan in tui ahong khang hi, akuang dim in aluanglet ding; gam atum ding a asung a om tengteng toh, khopi leh asung a tengte leng; mite akap ding ua, gam a mi tengteng amau tuaituai ding uh.
24047003	Asakol hat chinte leitot ging in kidou kangtalai ging dopdop in, akangtalai ging in, pate alunglel ua, atate uh en lou zen in.
24047004	Philistia mi tengteng lohna ni, Tura leh Sidon a kipan apanpih mi khosuaksunte sattanna ni ziak in, Toupa'n tuipi gei Kaphtor omlaite ahihse ding hi.
24047005	Gaza mite lu ahong giauta, Ashkelon achimitta a, agam phaizang a teng khosuaksunte; bang tan kiat ding na hia?
24047006	Aw Toupa namsau, na om kinken ma bang tan a sawt ahia? Na pai ah kikhum in; khawl inla om kinken ve.
24047007	Toupa'n Ashkelon leh tuipi gei tung a gamtang ding a, ahon seh a, hih ding ahon piak ngalleh bangchi in na om kinken thei dia?
24048001	Moab tungtang thu; sepaihte' Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Nebo tung agik hi; hihgawp in a-omta; Kiriathaim zahlaksak in a-omta, laksuan ahi. Misgab bel zahlak leh hihsiat in a-omta.
24048002	Moab minthanna amangta; Heshbon ah asiatna ding gen in, ‘Kisa un, nam ahihna kipan i hihmang ding uh,’ ” achi ua. Aw Madmen khua, nang leng daihsak sipsip na hi ding a, namsau in ahon delh ding.
24048003	Horonaim a kipan akikou husa, lohna leh siatna thupi mahmah.
24048004	Moab suksiat ahi a, atate kap ging zak in a-om hi,
24048005	Luhith ah kap in apaitou ua, Horonaim sul ah manthatna kikou ging lunglelhhuai aza uh.
24048006	Taimang unla, na hinna uh humbit un, gamdai gam sabiltung bang in om un.
24048007	Na nasep leh na sum-le-pai na muan ziak in nang leng mat in na om ding hi, Khemosh sal a pi ahi ding; asiampute leh aheutute toh.
24048008	Kho chih ah hihsemi ahong tung ding, kho khat lel in leng apel kei ding; phaizang gam leng amang ding; phaizang hihsiat ahi ding. Toupa'n achihsa bang in.
24048009	Alenmang theihna ding in Moab kha pia un, tengmi om lou in, akhuate akisegawp ding.
24048010	Limsak loutak a Pathian nna semmi hamsethuak in om henla, sisan suah ding a anamsau zang nuamloumi hamsethuak in om hen.
24048011	Atuailai a kipan Moab in nuam asa a, a-uain abohkhum a, bel dang a teituah leng atuak kei a, sal a pi in a-om ngei sam kei hi, alim ngeingei a lim gige in, agim leng alamdang tuan kei.
24048012	“Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, abungkhe ding mi ka hon sawl ding a, huan amau abungkhe ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; abelte avuaksak ding ua, a-umte ahihkek ding uh.
24048013	Israel inkote'n amuanpi pen uh Bethel azahpih bang un Moab in Khemosh azahpihta ding hi.
24048014	Pasal hoih leh galdou mihangsan i hi ua, bangchidan a chi na hi ua?
24048015	Moab bel hihgawp in a-om a, akhopi meikhu in azam khinta, atangval hoih teng apuk khinta chih Kumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048016	Moab siatna ahong tung lellel, athuakna ding akinoh hi.
24048017	Nou akim a mi teng in amah suun in amin thei teng in chiangkhun khauh leh chiang thupi akitanta hi, chi un.
24048018	Aw nang tanu, Dibon a teng, na thupina paisan inla, dangtak in tu in; Moab lokmi'n nang ahon sual a, na kulhte ahihseta hi.
24048019	Aw Aroer a teng nu, kongbul ah dingh in, enkhia in, taikekpa, suaktanu dong inla, Bang amaizen a? chi in.
24048020	Moab zahlaksak in a-omta, achimgawpta ngal a, mau tuaituai in kap un, Moab hihsiat ahita! chih Arnon ah puang un.
24048021	Gam tampi tung ah; Holon, Zahjah, Mephaath,
24048022	leh Dibon, Nebo, Beth-diblathaim,
24048023	leh Keriathaim, Beth-gamul, Beth-menon,
24048024	leh Kerioth, Bozrah leh Moab gam a khua tengteng, agamla leh anai ah vaihawmna ahong tungta hi.
24048025	Moab ki-attan in a-om a, aban hihtan in a-omta, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048026	Amah dawnkhamsak un; Toupa tung ah akiliansak ngal a; huan, Moab bel amah luak ah akitholh ding a, nuihsan in a-om lai ding hi.
24048027	Israel nang ding nuihza bawlna ahita kei maw? Gutate lak ah atel a hia? Amah tungtang na gen teng in na lu na sinkhum hilou hiam?
24048028	Moab a tengte aw, khopite taisan unla, kawl kikal ah teng un, vakhu, kohawm gei a bu bawlsek bang in om un.
24048029	Moab kisaktheihna ka zata ua, akisathei ngut ve, akikoih sandan, akisaktheihdan, aki-otsakdan leh alungtang kideihkhopdante.
24048030	Ahehna bangmah ahi kei chih ka thei; aki-otsaknate'n bangmah ahih ko kei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048031	Huchi in Moab tung ah ka mau tuaituai ding a, ahi, Moab pumpi a ding in ka kap ding, Kir-hareseth mite suun ahi ding uh.
24048032	Jazer kap sang a thupi in ka hon kah ding a, aw Sibmah grep kung, na hiangte tuipi tung ah akiphalh a, Jazer tuipi leng atung hialta a, na nipithei leh grep gahte hihsemi in abawm hi.
24048033	Nopna leh kipahna amang khin hi, theibil leh Moab gam a kipan; uain sukna khuk a ka uain ka beisakta a, kuamah in nuamsa a kikou in achil nawn kei ding uh.
24048034	Heshbon leh Elealeh ah akikou ua, Jahaz tan in aw asuah ua, Zoar a kipan Horonaim tan, Eglath-shelishijah tan in leng, Nimrim tui kim adai ding hi.
24048035	Huai lou in Moab mun sangte thil lanmi leh apathiante a dia gimlim halmi ka hihmang ding, Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24048036	Huchi in tamngai bang in ka lungtang Moab a ding in aging a, Kir-hareseth mite a ding in tumging bang in ka lungtang aging hi; huaiziak in niang-le-tai a thil amuhsate amangthang khinta hi.
24048037	Lu chiteng metgiau ahi a, khamul chiteng met ahi; khut tengteng at ahi a; kongte ah sai-ip puan a-om chiat hi.
24048038	Moab inn tung tengteng, kongzing leh mun chih ah kahna a-om a; Moab bel phatuam nawn lou bang in ka hihkham khinta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048039	Seta namai e! Segawp zou hi na tel e; Moab zahlak in alehngatta ve; huchi in Moab bel akimvel a mite tengteng a ding in nuihza bawlna leh mulkimhuai ahong hita hi.
24048040	Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, mu bang in aleng ding a, Moab tung ah akha azak ding.
24048041	Kerioth lak ahi a, akulhte aphawng guih a, huai ni in Moab pasalphate lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang mai ahi ding.
24048042	Moab amangthang ding, nam aching nawn kei ding; Toupa anuaisiah zawk ziak in.
24048043	Launa, kokhuk leh tangte, aw Moab luahmi, na tung ah atung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048044	Launa taisanmi kokhuk ah ake ding a, kokhuk a pawt thang ah a-awk ding, agawtna kum ka hon tun sin ngal a, atung ah, Moab tung ah ngei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24048045	Heshbon lim ah taikekpawl bahgawp in akhawl ding ua, Heshbon a kipan in mei apawt a, Sihon lak a kipan in meikuang, chiak vengvung mite sip a sam toh Moab baksam akang khin hi.
24048046	Na tung agik hi, aw Moab! Khemosh mite amangta ua; na tapate sal a pi in, na tanute sal in atangta uhi.
24048047	Himahleh ni nanung chiang in Moab omdan ka hei ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hichi tan Moab tungthu ahi.
24049001	Ammon mite thu, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel in tate anei kei a hia? Gouluahmi nei lou hia? Bang achia ahia akumpipa'n Gad atantak a, khopite a amite aten uh?
24049002	Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ammon tate Rabbah ah kidou husa ging ka kizasak ding, thil sia omkhawm lel ahong hi ding hi, atanute mei in akang ding a, huchi in Israel in amah neimi anei thuk ding, Toupa'n achi.
24049003	Aw Heshbon, mau tuaituai inla, Ai alok khinta ua; Rabbah tate aw, kap un, kap unla, umna sungte ah vialtai un. Kumpipa, siampu leh amiliante toh sal a pi in a-om ding uhi.
24049004	Bangziak a na phaizang hoihte suang na hia, aw muanhuailounu aneih hoihhoihte muang a, ‘Kua ahia hon sual ding?’ chichi nak mi.
24049005	Ngai in, na tung ah launa ka hon tun ding a, na kim a mi tengteng a kipan, chih Toupa sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi; michih delhkhiak na hi vek ding uh, kuamah in taikekpawl akaikhawm kei ding uh.
24049006	“Huai khit chiang in bel Ammon tate omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049007	Edom thu, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Teman a pilna om nawn lou ahi maw? Lemthei lemtheihna amang khinta a hia? Apilna uh mang khin hia?
24049008	Aw Dedan a tengte aw, taikek unla, lehngat unla, tummang vengveng un; amah ka gawt hun chiang in, Esau siatna atung ah ka hon tun ding hi.
24049009	Grep lou mite na kiang a ahong pai un, maih anei kei ding ua hia? Zan a guta mite'n adeihzah uh angah masiah un alok zel kei ding ua hia?
24049010	Esau ka vuaktang sakta a, agukkhuhte ka hongta, abu thei nawn kei ding. Asuante hihsiat ahi ua, a-unaute, a-invengte toh a-omta kei.
24049011	Na tagahte limsak ke'n, ke'n ka hum ding, na meithaite'n kei hon muang uhen.”
24049012	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Nou dawn lou dingte'n leng adawn mawk uleh, nang gawt louh hial in na suakta ding a hia? Gawt louh in na pawt kei ding, na dawn mahmah ding hi.
24049013	Toupa'n keimah kilou in ka kichiamta ngal a, Bozrah lamdangsak chiat, gensiat, hihgawp, hamsethuak ahi ding, akhua tengteng leng asegawp tawntung ding,” achi hi.
24049014	Toupa kiang a kipan thupuan ka zata, namte kiang ah sawltak sawl ahita, “Kikaikhawm unla, amah sual unla, kidou ding in kuan un!
24049015	Ngai in, mihingte muhsit in namte lak ah nang ka hon neusakta hi.
24049016	Na kihih mulkimhuaina tak na lungtang kisathei in ahon khemna ahi, aw nang kawl suangkal a, mualvum a teng zel, mu bang in, sangpi ah bu sep mah lechin, huai a kipan in ka hon lakhesuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049017	Huchi in Edom bel lamdang asak uh ahong hi ding a, mi vialvak peuh in lamdang asa ding ua, asiat luat ziak in atekkhum ding uh.
24049018	Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akim a khopite hihsiat a om mah bang in, kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua, mihing ta kuamah huai ah a-om ngei nawn kei ding uh.
24049019	Ngai un, Jordan gam gammang a kipan a humpinelkai, gan khahna mun ah ahong tou ding a; amah a kipan amau ka taimangsak pah ding a, atung a thunei ding in ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Keimah bang kua ahia om? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon bikhiahsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding pen?
24049020	Huaiziak in Edom tung a Toupa thuhilh leh Teman mite tung a athilseh, hih atuppente ngaikhia un; ganhon nou neute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua; atenna uh ahihgawp ding hi.
24049021	Apuksiatna husa uah lei akising a; akah husa uh Tuipi san ah leng zak ahi ding.
24049022	Ngai un, muvanlai bang in ahong lengtou ding a; Bozrah tung ah kha azak ding; huai ni in Edom mihangsante lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang lel ahi ding hi.
24049023	Damaskas thu: Hamath zumta, Arpad toh, thuhoih lou azata ngal ua, azulta uh; tuipi kihot om kinken thei lou bang in abuai uh.
24049024	Damaskas athazaw, taikek atum a, linna in alap a, lungkhamna leh natna in numei nauvei bang mai in alenta hi.
24049025	Ka nopsakna khopi, khopi minthang bangziak a nutsiat a om lou ahia?
24049026	Huchi in huai ni in atangval honte kongtual ah apuk ding ua, galdoumi tengteng amangthang ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049027	Damaskas kulhbaang ah mei ka khah ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi.
24049028	Kedar leh Hazor gamte Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in agawtna thu; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Thou unla, Kedar sual unla, suahlam tate bawl ek un.
24049029	Apuaninte uh, aganhonte uh alaksak ding ua, apuanzakte uh, atui-um belsuan tengteng uh, asangawngsaute uh apaimangpih ding uh, ning chih ah launa a-om a, chi in mite'n akikoukhum ding uh.
24049030	Taikek unla, vakmang vengveng un, tummang vengveng unla, Hazor a tengte aw, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in nang ahon sawm a, na tung ah hihtup aneita hi.
24049031	Thou unla, lungmuangtak a om, amah a khosa, kulh kongkhak leng nei lou, kalhna siktawn leng nei lou nam sual un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049032	Asangawngsaute uh gal in ala ding ua, abawnghonte uh alok ding uh. Baksam metgiau honte ning chih ah ka dalhsak ding, asiatna ding uh ning chih a kipan in ka hon tun ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049033	Huan Hazor bel sihna tenna mun ahi ding a, asegawp tawntung ding, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding uh, mihing tate a-omta kei ding uh.
24049034	Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm pat tungna Elam tungtang a Toupa thu, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a hong tung;
24049035	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Elam thalpeu, ahatna bulpi pen uh, ka kitansak ding;
24049036	Kawlmong li a kipan in huih lite ka hon tun ding, Elam tung ah ka dalhsak ding, kawlmong chih ah, Elam delhkhiak mite phak louh nam a-om kei ding uh.
24049037	Amelma uh, ahinna uh zong mite ma ah, Elamte ka lunglelsak ding, atung uah siatna ka hon tun ding, ka hehna thupitak, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Amau ka hihman vek masiah namsau ka delhsak ding hi.
24049038	Akumpipate uleh aheutute uh hihmang in Elam ah ka laltutphah ka tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24049039	Himahleh ni nanungte ah hichi ahi ding, Elam omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050001	Babulon tungtang, Kaldai mite gam tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kam a Toupa thugen:
24050002	Namte lak ah gen unla, puang un, puanzak khai in, puang un, sel kei un, Babulon lak ahita. Bel azahlak a, Merodak mulkimna in adim a, milimte ase khinta.
24050003	Mallam a kipan amah nam khat in ahon sual a, huai in agam ahihgawp ding a, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua; ataikek ua, mi leh sate leng amang khinta uhi.
24050004	Huai nite in leh huai hun chiang in Israel suante ahong pai ding ua, amau leh Judah tate toh; kap kawm in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa a Pathian uh azong ding uh; chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050005	Zion lam nga in akalsuanna ding uh adong ding ua, “Kisa un, tangtawn thukhun mangngilh nawn lou ding in Toupa hong len un,” achi ding uh.
24050006	Ka mite zaw belam mang ahi ua; amau ching mite'n apimang ua, mualte ah apaimangsak ua, tang a pan mual dungte ah apai ua, ahuang uh amangngilh khinta uhi.
24050007	Amu peuh in ane zel ua, amelmate un, i gilou kei, Toupa dikna omna apipute uh lamet Toupa hilhial tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ahi, achi uhi.
24050008	Babulon sung a kipan in taikhia unla, Kaldaite gam a kipan paikhia un, kelhon lak a keltalte bang in om un.
24050009	Ngai dih ua, Babulon hong sual ding in mal gam a kipan nam honpi thupitak kikaikhawm ka tokthou ding a, amah dou ding in akisa ding ua; huai a kipan in lak ahi ding uh; athalte uh lah galbawl siamtak vuaksuak ngei lou bang ahi ding uh.
24050010	Huan Kaldai loh in a-om ding, alok mite atai ngial ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050011	Kipak mah le uchin, nuamsa mah le uchin, aw ka goutan lok mite aw, lou lak a bawngla takhialkhial bang leh sakoltal ham ngekngek bang himah le uchin;
24050012	Na nu uh ahong zum mahmah ding a, nou hon suangnu ahong zahlak ding hi. Ngai un, namte lak a nuainungpen, gamdai, gamkeu, gamvuak ahi ding.
24050013	Toupa hehna ziak in luahmi a-om kei ding a, ase vek zaw ding hi, Babulon hoh peuhmah amulkimsak ding a, asiatna tengteng ziak in atek ding uhi.
24050014	Thalpeu tawimi tengteng aw, Babulon umsuak in kivual unla, kap unla, thalte chil kei un, Toupa tung ah akhialta uhi.
24050015	Akimvel in awng unla, amah-le-amah akipeta, akulhte apukta a, abaangte achimta, Toupa phulakna ahi ngal a, atung ah phu la unla, ahih bangbang in atung ah hih un.
24050016	Babulon a kipan chi thehmi attan unla, buhlak lai a kawite tawimi toh, nuaisiahna namsau lau in amau mite lam azuan chiat ding ua, amau gam chiat ah atai ding uh.
24050017	Israel bel belam dalhzak ahi a; humpinelkaite'n adelhmang ua; Assuria kumpipa'n amah ane phot a, atawp in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in aguhte ahaizanta hi.
24050018	Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Assuria kumpipa ka gawt bang in Babulon kumpipa leh agam ka gawt ding.
24050019	Huan Israel agantatna ah ka pi nawn ding a, Karmel leh Bashan ah ata ding a, Ephraim tang ah leh Gilead ah amah ata ding hi.
24050020	Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in Israel thulimlouhnate azong ding ua, muh ding a-om kei ding; Judah thilhihkhelhte leng muh ding a-om sam kei ding; omsun ding a ka koihte ngaidam ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050021	Merathim gam sual un, agam leh Pekod luah mite mahmah that unla, hihgam sipsip un, thu ka hon piak bangbang in hih un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050022	Huai gam ah gal husa a-om, siatna thupi mahmah husa toh.
24050023	Khovel pumpi sek kitam in, nak keknen hi na tel e; namte lak ah Babulon kinaksiat hi na mai e!
24050024	Aw Babilon, nang ding in thang na kam a, thei lou a awk na hita ve; muhkhiak leh mat in na omta, Toupa na sual ziak in.
24050025	Toupa'n agalvan bawm ahongta, ahehna vanzatte alakhia a, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kaldaite gam ah hih ding anei hi.
24050026	Gamgi tawp pek a kipan in hon sual unla, athil koihkhawmna innte hong vek unla, paikhawm un, hihse vek unla, abangmah hawi kei un.
24050027	Abawngtal tuaite that vek unla, goh in om uhen. Atung uh gik hi na tel e! Ani uh, amaute gawtna ni mahmah ahong tungta hi.
24050028	Toupa i Pathian phulak, atempul phulakna ngei Zion a gen ding a Babulon a kipan a taikhete leh taimangte husa ngei.
24050029	Babulon sual ding in thalkap siam, thalpeu zangmi tengteng samkhawm un; akimvel in buk bawl unla, kuamah suakta kei uhen. Athilhih bangbang in thuk un, ahihsa bang tengteng amah tung ah hih un; Toupa , Israel Mi Siangthou lah achou ngam hi.
24050030	Huaiziak in akholakte ah tangvalte apuk ding ua, galkapmi tengteng huai ni in amangthang ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050031	Ngai in, nang mikisathei, ka hon dou ahi, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi hi. Na ni ahong tungta, na gawtna ding ni mah.
24050032	Huan mikisathei akisui in apuk ding a, kuamah in aphong kei ding ua, akhopite ah mei ka khah ding a, akimvel a om tengteng ka kangsiangsak vek ding.
24050033	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Israel suante leh Judah tate nuaisiah in a-om khawmta ua; sal a amaute pi mite tengteng in amau alen tinten ua, akhah nuam kei uhi. Amaute tanpa bel ahat a; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
24050034	Amah amau lam ah apang a, Babulon a tengte hihbuai in, leitung a khawlna atuttheihna ding in.
24050035	Kaldai mite tung ah namsau aleng hi, Babulon a tengte, aheutute uh leh amipilte uh tung ah leng, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24050036	Mizuautheite tung ah namsau, mihai ahong suak ding uh; agalkapmi tung ah namsau, alunglel khin ding uh.
24050037	Asakolte uh leh kangtalaite uh tung ah namsau, asung a mi kilak hel tengtengte tung ah leng, numei bang phet ahong hi ding uh; agou thil tung ah namsau lok in a-om maimai ding uhi.
24050038	Atuite kang in akeu khin a, milimte gam lah ahi ngal a, milimte lah ahailoh uhi.
24050039	Huaiziak in gamdai gam sahangte, ngiate toh huai ah ateng ding ua, ostrikte leng huai ah ateng ding uh; luah in a-om ngei nawn kei ding; suan tengteng pha in leng luah in a-om kei ding hi.
24050040	Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akho invengte ahihsiat bangbang in; huai ah kuamah atengta kei ding ua, mihing tapa kuamah in aveh nawnta kei ding uh, Toupa thupawt in achi hi.
24050041	Ngai un, mallam gam a pan mite ahong ua, mun tawp a kipan nam thupitak leh kumpipa tampi ahong kuan uhi.
24050042	Thalpeu leh tei atawi ua, hiamgamtak, zahngaihna nei lou ahi uh. Ahusa uh tuipi ging huhu bang ahi a, sakol tung ah atuang ua, michih galkapmi bang a kivan in, Babulon tanu aw, nang ahong sual ding uhi.
24050043	Ahusa uh za in Babulon kumpipa khut azawgawpta a, numei nauvei lai natna bang in, natna thupitak in amanta hi.
24050044	Ngai un, Jordan gammang a kipan humpinelkai, kahna mun a ahong tou bang in ahong paitou ding a; amah a kipan in amaute ka taimangsak pah ding; atung a thunei ding ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Kei bang kua a-om a! Kua'n sep ding. Kei bang kuakua a-om a? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon sehsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding?
24050045	Huaiziak in Babulon tung ah Toupa thuhilh, Kaldai mite tung a athilseh ngaikhia un. Ganhon noute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua, gan khahna mun a mite amulkimsak ding.
24050046	Babulon lakna husa ah lei aling ding a, akahna husa namte lak a zak ahi ding hi.
24051001	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih, Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah, hihse ding huihpi ka sawl ding hi.
24051002	Zapsiangmi ka sawl ding, Babulon tung ah, amah zap in agam azapsiang ding ua, siatna ni a um a sual ding ahi ngal ua.
24051003	Thalpeu zangmi in thalpeu lai a, sik puanak silh in, dingh heh, tangvalhon khat leng hawi lou in, asepaih tengteng nuaimang un.
24051004	Kaldai gam ah thah in apuk ding ua, akholakte uah sut pailet in a-om ding uhi.
24051005	Israel leh Judah, agam uah Israel Mi Siangthou tung ah khelhna in adim na ua, a Pathian uh sepaihte' Toupa'n amangngilh kei hi.
24051006	Taimang unla, Babulon khosung a kipan, michih in amah hinna humbit hen; athulimlouhna manloh kei un, Toupa phulak hun ahi ngal a, ama'n athuk ngeigngei ding hi.
24051007	Babulon bel Toupa khut a dangka-eng nou, leitung pumpi hihkhamna ahi a, namte'n kham in alung uh amawl khinta hi.
24051008	Babulon apuk guih a, amangta, amah kah ekek un, hihdam theihdan ding ahihleh singnai damdawi nuhchi laksak un.
24051009	Babulon hihdam ka tum a, adam tuan kei, amah nusia in eimah gam chiat uah pai ni, amohna in van asun a, van dum pha a dopkang ahi.
24051010	“ Toupa'n ka dikna apuangta; kisa un, Toupa i Pathian thilhih, Zion ah i puang ding uh.
24051011	“Thalte tat-hiam unla, lumte len un, Media kumpipate lungsim Toupa'n atokthouta a, athiltup Babulon hihsiat ahi. Huai Toupa'n atempul ziak a phulakna ahi.
24051012	Babulon kulh bul ah kidouna puangzak thak un, venna hihhat in, galvilmi koih un, galbuknate bawl unla, Babulon mite tungtang thu ah Toupa'n agen tak, angaihtuah in ahih khinta hi.
24051013	Aw nang, tui tamna mun a tengmi, sum-le-pai hau mahmah, na tawpna atungta, na hinna khau akitanta hi.
24051014	Sepaihte' Toupa amah kilou in achiamta hi, khaupete bang mai in mihing in ka hon dimsak ngeingei ding, nakpi in ahon otkhum ding uh.”
24051015	Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a, apilna in khovel adingkhesak a, alemtheihna in van aphalhsak.
24051016	A-aw asuah a, van a tui aging hawhaw a, kawlmong a kipan meipi apaitousak a, vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a, agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi.
24051017	Michih amual ua, theihna lou in, dangka-eng sekmichih in alimsek pen azumpih ua, amilim sun lah zuau ngen ahi a, amau ah nakna a-om kei lai hi.
24051018	Bangmah lou, khemna nasep lel ahi ua, agawt hun chiang in amang ding uh.
24051019	Jakob tantuan bel hichibang ahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahi ngal a; Israel agouluah nam ahi a, amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.
24051020	Nang bel ka galdouna heipi leh vanzat na hi a, nang hon zang in namte ka hihzan a, nang zang in lalna gamte ka hihmang hi.
24051021	Nang hon zang in sakol leh atung a ka hihzan a, nangmah zang in kangtalai leh atung a tuang ka hihzan a;
24051022	Nangmah zang in numei leh pasal ka hihzan a, nangmah zang in putek leh tuailai ka hihzan a, nangmah zang in nungak leh tangval ka hihzan hi.
24051023	Nangmah zang in belamching leh belamhon ka hihzan a, nangmah zang in louneimi leh bawngtal kop ka hihzan a, nangmah zang in gam ukpipate leh upate ka hihzan sek ahi.
24051024	Nang mitmuh ngei in Zion tung a athil hoih lou hih tengteng uh Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah ka thuk ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051025	Ngai in, leitung pumpi hihsia, aw hihsetu tang lian, nang ka hon dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, kawl sang a kipan ka hon khukkhe ding, tang kang mit khinsa in ka hon bawl ding.
24051026	Nang a kipan suang ning ding leh suangphum ding lakkhiak ahi nawn kei ding; tangtawn in na segawp zaw ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051027	“Huai gam ah kidou puanzak tak unla, namte lak ah pengkul mut un, amah dou ding namte kisasak unla, Araratte, Minnite, Ashkenaz gamte, amah sual ding sepaih sep unla, khaupe zuanzaang bang mai in sakolte kaikhawm un.
24051028	Amah dou ding namte kisasak un; Media kumpipate, ukpipate leh upate, athuneihna gam tengteng toh.
24051029	Huai gam nat thuak in aling a, Babulon gam, tengmi om lou a hihsiat ding in, Babulon tung a Toupa thiltup adingh gige hi.
24051030	Babulon galdou mite'n galkap ding ngapta lou in, akulhpi uah aton maimah uh, apasalphatna uh akhing a, numei bang mai ahong hita ua, atenna munte akang khin a, adeidanna siktawn akitan hi.
24051031	Thangkou tai in midang leng akituahpih a, misawl in leng midang atuak a, Babulon kumpipa kiang a akhopi ning chih ah amanta uh chih hilh ding in.
24051032	Lui kannate aman ua, phailuangte ahal siang ua, kidou mite leng alunglelta uh.
24051033	Sepaihte' Toupa , Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon tanu phual sikngil lai bang ahi a, sawt lou nung in buhchil hun atung ah ahong tung ding hi.”
24051034	“Hon negaita, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in, hon haizan a, bel vuak lel in ahon bawlta, gulpi bang in ahon nawmvalhta, ka thil limte'n agilpi adimsak a, ahon paikhe nawnta hi.
24051035	Kei leh ka satung a hiamgam thilhih, Babulon tung ah om hen; ka sisan Kaldai mite tung ah om hen, Jerusalem in achi ding.”
24051036	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, nang lam ah ka pang ding a, na phu ka hon laksak ding, atuipi ka kangsak ding a, atuikhuk leng ka keugawsak ding.
24051037	Huan Babulon bel hoih lou paihkhawm lel, sehal tenna mun, lamdangsak chiat leh enghou, tengmi om lou mun ahong hi ding.
24051038	Akikou ton ding ua, humpinelkai lun lai bang in, angik tuaktuak ding uh; humpinelkai nou bang in.
24051039	Akham mahmah lai un ankuang ka luisak dia, khothei het lou in ka khamsak dia, khanglou het lou ding a a-ihmut dettheihna ding un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051040	Ka pikhe ding a, belam goh ding bang in, belamtalte leh keltalte bang mai in.”
24051041	Shesak lak ahita ve; leitung pumpi pahtawi zel mat in a-omta ve, namte lak ah Babulon asegawpta ve.
24051042	Babulon tuipi in atumta, akihot thupi mahmah in akhuh khinta.
24051043	Akhopi asegawpta a, gamkeu, gamdai, mihing tenlouhna mihing ta kuamah phak louh gam ahong suakta hi.
24051044	Babulon bel ka gawt ding, avalhkhitsa akam a kipan asuahkhe ding, namte bel akiang ah aluangkhawm nawn kei ding uh, ahi Babulon kulhpi achim ding.
24051045	Ka mite aw, asung a kipan hong pawt unla, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah a kipan, michih amau kihumbit chiat un.
24051046	Na lungtang uh bah kei hen, huai gam a thuthang leng lau kei un; kum khat in thuthang ahong tung ding a, kum dang in thuthang ahong tung nawn ding ahi, kumpipa leh kumpipa kisual in gam ah hiamgamna a-om ding.
24051047	Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi. Babulon milim sektawmte tung a vai ka hawm a, agam pumpi zumna ni ding; huan, asung ah amithahte apuk ding uh.
24051048	Huchi in lei leh van leh asung a om tengteng in, Babulon tung a kipak in la asa ding uh; mallam a kipan sim mite akiang a tung ding uh ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051049	Babulon in Israel mithahte apuksak bang in Babulon ah gam chih a thah a omte apuk ding uh.
24051050	Nou namsau pel mite aw, kuan unla, dingh maimai kei un, gamlapi a kipan in Toupa theigige unla, na lungsim uah Jerusalem lut hen.
24051051	Gensiatna thu ka zak ziak un ka zum ua, lungdonna in ka mai uh atuam a, Toupa' inn a mun siangthoute ah pau theih louh mite ahong lutta uhi.
24051052	Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, amilim sektawmte uh tung a ka vaihawmna ding leh agam pumpi tung a miliamte thumna ni ding ngei.
24051053	Babulon bel van sun in sang mahleh, akulh sangte hihkip mahleh, atung ah ka kiang a kipan hihsemi ahong tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051054	Babulon a kipan kah husa leh Kaldai gam a kipan siatna thupitak husa;
24051055	Toupa'n Babulon asim a, ahusa uh thupitak ahih daihsak hi. Agamtat husa uh tui tampi ging hawhaw bang ahi, a-awng zuazua ua.
24051056	Atung ah simmi ahong tung, Babulon tung ngei ah pang ni, amihatte mat in a-om ua, athalpeute uh akitangawpta, Toupa bel thukna Pathian ahi a, athuk ngeingei ding.
24051057	Huan aheutute leh amipilte, a-ukpipate leh upate leh mihatte ka khamsak dia; alumden ding ua, akhanglou kei ding uh, chih, kumpipa, Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.
24051058	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Babulon kumpipa kulhbaang sahtakte achim vek ding a, akongpi sangte akang vek ding; amite'n athawn in asem ua, namte'n meihal a ding lel a kihihgim uh ana hi.
24051059	Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm akum lina a Babulon ahoh lai a akiang a hoh sam, Seraiah Neriah tapa, Maaseiah tapa kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak.
24051060	Seraiah bel kumpipa insung heutupen ahi a, Jeremiah in Babulon tung a siatna hong tung ding tengteng, Babulon tungtang a hiai thu gelh tengteng laibu ah agelh hi.
24051061	Huan Jeremiah in Seraiah kiang ah, Babulon na tun hun chiang in hiai thu tengteng sim ngeingei inla,
24051062	Aw Toupa hiai nam tungtang ah kuamah, mi leh sa leh tenlouhna ding suksiat a om in, tangtawn a kisegawp zaw ding in thu na genta a, na chi ding.
24051063	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, hiai laibu na sim khit chiang in suang toh gakkhawm in Euphrates Luipi ah pailut inla,
24051064	Babulon hichibang mai in atum ding a, atung a siatna ka hon tut ding ziak in athounawn kei ding; abah mahmah ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi, achi a. Hichi teng Jeremiah thu ahi.
24052001	Zedekiah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih leh kum khat a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat vai ahawm a; anu min Hamutal ahi a, Libnah a Jeremiah tanu ahi.
24052002	Jehoiakim hih bangbang in Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih hi.
24052003	Toupa aheh mahmah ziak in Jerusalem leh Judah gam ah ama a kipan a paihkhiakna khop in thil ahong tungta a; huchi in Babulon kumpipa tung ah Zedekiah ahelta hi.
24052004	Huan avaihawm akum kuana ah hichi ahong hi a, kha sawmna, huai kha ani sawm ni in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihhonte Jerusalem dou ding in ahong kuan ua, buk abawlkhumta ua; akim ah kulh abawl uhi.
24052005	Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah kum sawm-le-khatna tan in khopi um in a-omta hi.
24052006	Akha lina, huai kha ani kuana ah khopi ah kial ahong uang mahmah a, gam mipite a ding in nek ding a-omta kei hi.
24052007	Huchi in khopi kulhbaang asunvang ua, kidoumi tengteng ataimang ua, kumpipa huan a baang nih kikal a kongpi a pawt in, zan in khopi a kipan ataikhia ua; Kaldai mite' khopi a om ahi uhi.
24052008	Himahleh Kaldai sepaihte'n kumpipa adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua, sepaihhonte akiang a kipan adalhzak uhi.
24052009	Huchi in Zedekiah aman ua, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Hamath gam a Riblah ah apaipih ua; ama'n atung ah vai ahawmkhum hi.
24052010	Babulon kumpipa'n Zedekiah tapate amitmuh ngei in athat a; Riblah ah Judah heutu tengteng leng athat lai hi
24052011	Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, Babulon ah apaipih hi; asih ni tanpha in suangkul ah akoih hi.
24052012	Huan kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan, amah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ma a dingh sek, akum sawm-le-kuana, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawmna in Jerusalem ah ahong lut hi.
24052013	Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn ahal a, Jerusalem inn tengteng toh, inn thupi chitengte mei in ahal hi.
24052014	Huan Kaldai sepaihhon tengteng, kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu kiang a omte'n Jerusalem kulhte akimvel in ahihchim vek uhi.
24052015	Huchi in vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in mipi lak a genthei pawl khenkhat khopi a nutsiat a omte, Babulon kumpipa kiang a kipesate leh mikhutsiam omsun tengtengte toh sal in apivekta hi.
24052016	Himahleh vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in gam a migenthei pen khenkhatte grephuan kemmi leh vengmi ding in anusia hi.
24052017	Toupa' inn a dalkhuamte leh akingaknate, dal maiphiat kuang lian Toupa' inn a omte Kaldai mite'n ahihtamgawp ua, dal tengteng Babulon ah ala uhi.
24052018	Belte leng, vutluahte, khawnvak mihsaknate, maiphiat kuangte, sikkeute, dal tui-um belsuan tengteng a zat sekte uh ala vek uh.
24052019	Noute leng, meivu koihnate, maiphiat kuangte, belte, khawnvak koihnate, sikkeute leh belhbute; dangka-eng a bawl huai dangkasik in vengmi pawl heutu in ala vek hi.
24052020	Khuam nih, dal a bawl bawngtal sawm-le-nih, maiphiatna kuang kingakna, kumpipa Solomon in Toupa' inn a dia abawl, hiai tui-um belsuan tengteng dalte tamdan teh vual ahi kei hi.
24052021	Huan khuamte khuam khat sandan, tong sawm-le-giat ahi a, tong sawm-le-nih in akimvel zou phet ahi; asahdan zung za delh ahi a, asung ahawm hi.
24052022	Atung ah dal lubawk a-om a, alubawk sandan tong nga ahi a, alubawk kimvel leh theibuhfai, dal ngen a zep ahi a; khuam nih in leng hichi mah bang in theibuhfai a-om hi.
24052023	Asik ah theibuhfai sawmkua-le-guk a-om a, akim a azepna theibuhfai tengteng zakhat ahi.
24052024	Huan vengpa pawl heutu in siampu lianpen Seraiah leh siampu nihna, Zephaniah leh kongkhak ngakmi thumte aman hi.
24052025	Kidou mite tung a heutu dia seh michilgeh leh mi sagih, kumpipa mel mu sekmi, khopi a omte leh sepaih heutu gelhmi, gam mite min kempa leh gam mipi lak a mi sawmguk, khopi a na omte khopi a kipan in apikhia hi.
24052026	Nebuzaradan, vengpa pawl heutu in amaute api a, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Riblah ah atun hi.
24052027	Babulon kumpipa'n Hamath gam a Riblah ah atung ua khut kha in, athat vek hi. Huchi in Judah nam agam ua kipan in sal a pimang in a-omta.
24052028	Hiaite Nebukadnezzar in mipi sal a apite ahi uh; akum sagihna ah Juda mite sangthum sawmnih-le-thum;
24052029	Nebukadnezzar kum sawm-le-giatna ah Jerusalem a kipan in mi zagiat sawmthum-le-nih sal in api hi.
24052030	Nebukadnezzar akum sawmnih-le-thumna ah Nebuzaradan vengtu pawl heutu in Juda saltang mi zasagih sawmli-le-nga api a, saltang tengteng avek un sangli-le-zaguk ahi uh.
24052031	Kumpipa saltan kum sawmthum-le-sagihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni geih in hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Evil-merodak in avaihawm akum khatna ah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin lutang adopkangsak a, suangkul a kipan apikhia hi.
24052032	Akiang ah hoihtak in apau a, Babulon a akiang a om Kumpipate tutphah sang a sang in laltutphah atunsak hi.
24052033	Asuangkul puansilhte akikhengsak a, adamsung teng ama ah an ane den hi.
24052034	Huan amah vakna ding adamsung ni tengteng, asih ni tan in aniteng tantuan Babulon kumpipa'n ape gige hi.
25001001	Mite a khopi dim sek, bangchidan a lungzuang a tu maimah ahia! Bangchidan a meithai bang a hong om maimah ahia! Namte lak a thupi sek a, bialte lak a lalnu sek, bangchidan a sikha suak maimah ahia!
25001002	Zan in nakpitak in akap a, abiang a khituite toh; a-itte tengteng lak ah amah nem ding kuamah anei kei a; alawmte tengteng atung ah lepchiahtak in agamta ua, amelmate ahong hi uhi.
25001003	Gimthuakna ziak leh, saltanna thupi ziak in saltanna ah Judah apaita hi; khovel mite lak ah ateng a, tawldamna amu kei; mun kochikte ah amah sawi tengteng in apha uhi.
25001004	Kikhopna thupi a kuamah ahong pai louh ziak un. Zion lampite'n asuun ua; akongpite tengteng loih in a-om a, asiampute athum huthut uh; anungak siangthoute gimthuak in a-om ua, amah mah haksa thuak in a-om hi.
25001005	Agalte vaihawm makai ahong hi a, melmate alohching uh; atatlekna tam luat ziak in Toupa'n lah amah gim athuaksak ngal a; melma ma ah ata tuailaite saltanna ah apai uh.
25001006	Zion tate a pan in kilawmna tengteng apaimangta; alalte loupa hing mu lou zuktalte bang ahi ua, delhmi ma ah hatna nei lou in apai uh.
25001007	Agimthuak ni leh ahaksat ni in Jerusalem in nidanglai a kipan a om khinsa athil nuamte tengteng atheigige a; melma khut a mite apuk lai un, amah kuamah in apanpih kei, galte'n amah amu ua, asiatna ah anuihsan uhi.
25001008	Nakpitak in Jerusalem in thil ahihkhial a; huaiziak in thilnin bang in ahong om hi; avuaktanna amuh ziak un, amah zahte'n amusit ua, ahi, anak huthut a, nunglam ah akiheita hi.
25001009	Anik ah anitna a-om a; abeina nanung atheigige kei; huaiziak in lamdangtak in ahong kun a; lungmuanmi anei kei hi; ngai in, Aw Toupa , ka gimthuakna; melmapa akiliansak hi.
25001010	Gal in amah nu gou manphate tengteng tung ah akhut azak a; amun siangthou sung ah khovel mi ahong lut chih amu ngal a, na kikhopna uah amau ahong lut louh ding uh ahi chi a thu na piak.
25001011	Amite tengteng anak huhu ua, tanghou azong ua; kha hihhalh ding in athil nuamte uh sa khenna ding in apia ua: “Thei inla, Aw Toupa , en in ka hong buah ziak in.”
25001012	Nou a ding a bangmah lou ahi maw, nou hon paisuaksante tengteng? Ngai unla, en un, ka tung a hih a om ka lungkhamna bang lungkhamna himhim a-om hiam? Aheh mahmah lai a Toupa'n ahon hihgimna bang.
25001013	Tungsang a kipan in ka guhte ah mei ahon sawl a, amaute azou a; ka khe a ding in len azak a, ahon nungheisan; segawp leh nitum a bah in ahon bawlta hi.
25001014	Akhut a ka tatleknate hakkol khih in a-om a; phialkhawm in a-om ua, ka ngawngzang ah ahong tung ua; ka hatna avuaksuaksak; amau ka dou zohlouhte, akhut uah Toupa'n kei ahon pia hi.
25001015	Ka lak a ka mihatte Toupa'n bangmah lou in a-omsak a; ka tangvalte mekgawpna ding in ka siatna ding in ama'n kikhawmpi poimoh asam a; uain sukna bang in Toupa'n Judah tanu siangthou asikdenta hi.
25001016	Hiai thilte ziak in ka kap a; ka mit tui in atum a; lungmuan ding ka kha hihhalh ding kei a pan agamla ngal a; melma avualzoh ziak in, ka tate amau kia a nutsiat in a-om uhi.
25001017	Zion in akhutte azakkhia a; amah lungmuan ding kuamah a-om kei uh; Toupa'n Jakob tungthu ah thu apia a, huchi a akimvel a omte agalte ahong hihna ding un; Jerusalem alak uah thilnin bang in a-om hi.
25001018	Toupa adiktat a; athupiak ka helsan ua; himahleh za un, ka hon ngen hi, nou mi tengtengte aw, ka lungkhamna en un; ka nungak siangthoute leh ka tangvalte saltanna ah apai uhi.
25001019	Ka itte ka sam a, himahleh ahon khem uh; ka siampute leh ka upate'n amau khate hihhalh ding a an akizon lai un khopi sung ah asihloh uhi.
25001020	Aw Toupa , ngai in; ka dah ua; ka lungsim amangbang a; ka sung ah ka lungtang akilumlet a; nakpitak in ka helta ua; polam ah namsau thah in insung ah sihna a-om hi.
25001021	Ka thum aza ua; kuamah hon khamuan ding a-om kei; ka melmate tengteng in ka mangbatna aza ua, huchibang a na hih ziak in akipak uh; na phuankhiaksa ni na tun ding a, kei bang ahi ding uh.
25001022	Agitlouhna tengteng uh na ma ah hong tung hen; ka tatlekna tengteng ziak a ka tung a na hih bang in amaute tung ah leng hih in; ka khoisatna atam lua a, ka lungtang leng abahgawpta hi.
25002001	Bangchidan a Toupa'n ahehna a Zion tanu meipi a tuam ahia! Israel kilawmna van a kipan lei ah apaikheta a, aheh ni in akhe ngakna atheigige kei hi.
25002002	Jakob tenna tengteng Toupa'n anawmvalh a, ahehpih kei; ahehna ah Judah tanu kulh hatte alaichim a, lei toh kilual in akoih hi; gam leh huai a vaihawmte ahihninta hi.
25002003	Aheh mahmahna ah Israel kii tengteng asattan a; melma ma a kipan akhut taklam alakikta; meikuang, kimvel hulbei bang in Jakob akangmangta hi.
25002004	Melma bang in athalpeu alai a, gal bang in akhut taklam toh adingh a, mit a ding a etnophuaite tengteng athat a; Zion tanu puanin ah meikuang bang in athangpaihna asungbua hi.
25002005	Toupa'n melma bang ahong hi, Israel anawmvalhta; a-inpi tengteng anawmvalh vek a, akulh muanhuaite ahihseta; Judah tanu ah suunna leh kahna apungsak hi.
25002006	Huan hileh kilawm bang in, hiamgamtak in abiakbuk alamang a; akikhopna mun ahihseta; Toupa'n kikhawm thupi leh Sabbath Zion ah mangngilh in a-omsak a, ahehna thangpaihna in kumpipa leh siampu amusit hi.
25002007	Toupa'n amaitam apaimang a, amun siangthou akih a, a-inpi kulhbaangte melmate khut ah apeta hi; kikhop thupi ni bang in Toupa insung ah thawm anei uhi.
25002008	Zion tanu kulhbaang Toupa'n suksiat atumta; akhauzan a, hihse lou ding in akhut ala kei hi; himahleh leichian leh kulhbaang akapsak a; akigawp tuak uhi.
25002009	Akongpite lei ah atum ua; akalhna chiangte hihsia in akuaitan hi; dan omlouhna namte lak ah akumpipa leh alalte a-om uh; ahi, Toupa a kipan azawlneite'n meng amu kei uhi.
25002010	Leitung ah Zion tanu upate atu ua, apau kei uh; aluzang ua leivui akhi ua; sai-ip puan asilh uhi; Jerusalem nungak siangthoute'n lei lam ah alu uh akun uhi.
25002011	Khitui in ka mitte azuau a, ka lungsim amangbang hi, leitung ah ka sin buakkhiak in a-om a, ka mite tanu siatna ziak in khopi kongzingte a naupang tuailaite leh nawi ne laite asihbup ziak un.
25002012	Anute uh kiang ah, buh-le-bal leh uain koi a om ahia? achi ua. Khopi kongzingte miliamte bang a asihbup lai un, anute uh angsung a akha uh sunbuak a a-om lai in.
25002013	Na kiang ah bang ka theisak dia? Nang toh bang ka teh dia, Aw Jerusalem tanu? Aw Zion tanu siangthou, ka hon lungmuan theihna ding in, bang toh ka hon kikimsak dia? Na siatna lah tuipi bang in athupi ngal a; kua'n nang ahon hihdam thei dia?
25002014	Na zawlneite'n bangmah lou leh haina nang a ding in mengmuh in amu ua; na koltanna pi nawn ding in, na gitlouhna amukhe kei uh; himahleh bangmah lou puakgik leh pimang a omna ziakte nang hon muhsak uh.
25002015	Hon paikheng tengteng in nang akhut uh ahon betkhum ua; Jerusalem tanu akikoukhum ua; alu uh asinkhum uh, hiai khopi kilawmna bukim, leitung pumpi a nopsakna, achih uh ahi maw? achi uhi.
25002016	Nang siatna ding in na melmate tengteng in lianpi in akam uh aka ua; hiai ni i ngakngak uh ahi mahmah ve; i mukheta a, i muta uh.
25002017	Toupa'n alunggel ahihtangtungta, nidanglai a athupiak ahihtangtung a; apaita, ahehpih kei; na tung a melma akipaksak a, na galte kii atawisangta hi.
25002018	Toupa kiang ah alungtang akikou a; Aw Zion tanu kulhbaang, sun leh zan in khitui luipi bang in luangsak in; khawl kipe ke'nla; na mit khawlsak ke'n.
25002019	Thou in, zan in kikou in, zanvente kipatna ah; Toupa mai ah tui bang in na lungtang sungkhia in; na ta tuailaite hinna a ding in amah lam ah na khutte liktou in, kongzingte ah an ngawl in abahgawp uhi.
25002020	Aw Toupa , en inla, ngai in, hichibang a na hihna; numeite'n agah uh ane ding uam, khut a oih a om naupangte? Toupa mun siangthou sung ah siampu leh zawlnei thah a-om ding uh hia?
25002021	Kongzingte a leitual ah tuailaite leh putekte alum ua; namsau in ka nungak siangthoute leh ka tangvalte apuk uh; na heh ni in amaute na that a; na that a, na hehpih kei hi.
25002022	Kikhawmpi thupi lai bang in, mun chih ah a-unaute na sam a, Toupa heh ni in kuamah suakta hiam, om hiam a-om kei; huai ka dontei a ka khoilette ka melma in anegaita hi.
25003001	Ahehna chiang a gimthuakna mu keimah ka hi.
25003002	Khovak ah hilou in khomial ah ama'n hon pi in, ahon vaksak hi.
25003003	Nitum in ka siatna ding in akhut ahei ahei petmah hi.
25003004	Ka sa leh ka vun a-upasak a; ka guhte akitansak hi.
25003005	Ka siatna ding in alam a, khatna leh nauveina in ahon umsuak hi.
25003006	Sawtpi a sisate bang in, mun mialte ah ahon tengsak hi.
25003007	Ka pawtkhiak theihlouhna ding in, ka kimvel in dai akai a, ka khainiang agik hi.
25003008	Ahi, ka kah a, panpihna ka nget lai in, ka thumna adaltan hi.
25003009	Suangsek in ka lampite dai akaitou a, ka lam zuihte akawisak hi.
25003010	Kei a ding in amah vompi mibuk leh mun-guk a humpinelkai bang ahi.
25003011	Ka lampite akaihei a, ahon botnen a; ahon bawlgawp hi.
25003012	Athalpeu alai a, athal a dia ngim ding in kei ahon bawl hi.
25003013	Athalbawm a thalte ka lungtang ah alutsak a,
25003014	Ka mite tengteng nuihsan ka hong hi; ni tumtum a ala uh.
25003015	Hehna in ahon dimsak ua, gamsai in ahon vak uhi.
25003016	Suangtat in ka hate leng akitamsak a, vut in ahon tuam hi.
25003017	Muanna a kipan gamlapi ah ka kha na suan a; hauhsakna ka mangngilhta.
25003018	Ka hatna amang a, Toupa a kipan ka lametna, ka chi a.
25003019	Ka gimthuakna leh ka haksatna, gamsai leh khatna theigige in.
25003020	Ka kha in amaute atheigige a, ka sung ah akun ngiungiau hi.
25003021	Hiai ka thei thak a, huaiziak in lametna ka nei hi.
25003022	Toupa zahngaihnate ziak ahi hihmang a i om louh uh; alainatnate azuau ngei louh ziak in.
25003023	Zingsang teng in athak zel ua; na ginomna athupi hi.
25003024	Toupa ka tantuan ahi, ka kha in achi; huaiziak in amah ah lametna ka nei ding.
25003025	Amah ngakte kiang ah Toupa ahoih, amah zongmi tung ah.
25003026	Mi'n Toupa hotdamna a lamet angak vengveng ahoih hi.
25003027	Mi'n atuailai a hakkol apuak amah a ding in ahoih ahi.
25003028	Amah tung a angak tak ziak in, tangtut henla, dai sipsip hen.
25003029	Leivui ah akam koih hen; huchi a lametna a-omtheihna ding in.
25003030	Amah bengpa kiang ah abiang doh hen; kouna in amah dimvum hen.
25003031	Toupa'n lah tangtawn in adelh kei ding a.
25003032	Dahna suaksak mahleh, azahngaihna tamdan dungzui in lainatna anei ding hi.
25003033	Kilawptak in mite tate hihgim hiam lungkhamsak hiam ahi kei hi.
25003034	Lei a suangkul tangte tengteng khenuai sikkham ding,
25003035	Tungnungpen maima a mihing thuneihna kaihei ding in.
25003036	Athu a mihing bawlsiat, Toupa'n pha asa kei.
25003037	Toupa'n thu apiak louh in, hichi ahong hi, chi kua ahia?
25003038	Tungnungpen kam a kipan in hoih lou leh hoih ahong pai kei maw?
25003039	Bangziak a mihing, akhelhna gawtna a ding a mi phun ahia?
25003040	I lampite zong in enchian ni, huan Toupa lam ah kik nawn ni.
25003041	Vante a Pathian kiang ah i lungtang leh i khutte liktou ni;
25003042	Ka tatlek ua ka hel uh; na ngaidam kei hi.
25003043	Hehna in na khuh a, kou na hon delh a, that in, na hehpih kei hi.
25003044	Meipi in na kituam a, huchi a ka thumna in apailetlouhna ding in.
25003045	Mite lak ah deih louh leh ninneng bang in na hon bawl hi.
25003046	Ka siatna ding in ka melma tengteng un akam uh lianpi in aka uh.
25003047	Launa leh kokhuk ka tung uah ahong tung a, siatgawpna leh siatna.
25003048	Ka mite tanu suksiatna ziak in, ka mit tui in atum hi.
25003049	Khawl lou in, ka mit in abuak a, akhawl kei hi.
25003050	Van a kipan Toupa'n a-etsuk a, amuh matan
25003051	ka khopi tanute tengteng ziak in ka mit in ka kha adahsak.
25003052	Vasa bang in ahon delhbah ua, aziak bei a ka melma hite'n.
25003053	Leikohawm sung ah ka hinna asattat ua, ka tung ah suang akhia uhi.
25003054	Ka lutung ah tuite aluang a; satkhiak in ka om, ka chi hi.
25003055	Aw Toupa , leikohawm niampen a pan in, na min ka sam hi.
25003056	Ka aw na za a; ka kahna ah, ka nakna ah na bil sel ke'n.
25003057	Nang ka hon sap ni in na hong pai nai a, “Lau ke'n!” na chi hi.
25003058	Aw Toupa , ka kha thu na hon gensak a; ka hinna na tanta hi.
25003059	Aw Toupa , ka diklouhna na mu a, ka thu ngaihtuah in.
25003060	Ka tung a aphulakna tengteng uleh athusawm tengteng uh na muta hi.
25003061	Akouna uh na za a, Aw Toupa , ka siatna ding a athusawm tengteng uh.
25003062	Ka siatna ding a dinghte mukte leh nitum a ka siatna ding a angaihtuahna uh.
25003063	Atut uleh adintouh uh nang en in; ala uh ka hi.
25003064	Aw Toupa , akhut nasep dungzui in, atung uah thuk in.
25003065	Lungtang lungkhamna leh na hamsia atung uah pia inla,
25003066	heh in amau na delh ding a Toupa vante nuai a kipan amaute na hihgawp ding hi.
25004001	Bangchidan a dangka-eng mial ahia! Bangchidan a dangka-eng siangthoupen lamdangta ahia! Mun siangthou a suangte kongzingte ah sunkhiak ahi.
25004002	Zion tapa manphate, dangka-eng hoih toh teh theih, bangchidan a leibel, belvelmi khutsuak bang a ngaih hi ahia!
25004003	Sehalte nangawn in anawi uh asuah ua, ata tuailaite uh atepsak uh; gamdai ostrikte bang in ka mite tanu ahong gilou uhi.
25004004	Nawitep lai naupang lei dangtak ziak in adangtawng ah abelh a; naupangte'n tanghou angen ua, kuamah in amaute a ding in abalkham kei uhi.
25004005	Nuamtak a nete kongzing ah amangthang ua; puan sandup a khangliante'n ekvum akawi uhi.
25004006	Ka mite tanu gitlouhna gawtna Sodom khelhna gawtna sang in athupizaw a, huai tuh mitphiat kal lou in akizou a, amah tung ah khut akinga kei hi.
25004007	Amiliante vuk sang in asiangthou zaw ua, nawitui sang in angouzaw uh, rubi sandup sang in apum uh asandupzaw ua, atetna uh sapphir suangmantam bang ahi.
25004008	Amel uh suangkuangthei sang in avomzaw a; kongzing atheih in a-om kei uh; avun uh aguh uah abelh bikbek a; akeu a, chiangkang abang hi.
25004009	Namsau a thah a om dingte, kial a thah a om dingte sang in ahoihzaw uh; gam a theigahte duh ziak in hiaite lah agawnggawp un, nakpi in asia uhi.
25004010	Hehpihthei numeite khut in atate uh huan in, ka tanute hihsia in ane uhi.
25004011	Toupa'n athangpaihna ahihpichingta, ahehna asungkhia a; Zion ah mei atoh a, huai in asuangphumte asuse vek hi.
25004012	Lei a kumpipate leh khovel a mi tengteng in leng, Jerusalem kongpi ah gal leh melma alut ding uh, chih.
25004013	Azawlneite khelhna ziak leh asiampute ginatlouhna ziak ahi, huchibang a alaktak a midikte sisan suah a a-om.
25004014	Mittawte bang in kongzing ah avakvai ua, sisan a suknit in a-om ua, mite'n apuante uh alawng kei uh.
25004015	“Paimang un, Siangloute! Paimang un, paimang un! Hon lawng kei un,” chi in amau akikoukhum ua; ataimang ua, avialvak lai un, mite'n namte lak ah, hiai ah a-om nawn kei ding uh, achi uh.
25004016	Toupa hehna in amaute ahawmzak a; amaute alimsak nawnta kei ding; siampute min azahtak kei ua, upate adeihsak kei uh.
25004017	Koute mitte avaigawp a, huhna mu lou in; lametna i ngak uah nam hon hondam thei lou ding i ngak uhi.
25004018	I kongzingte ua i pai theihlouhna ding in, i kalsuante azong ua; i tawp uh anai a, i nite akimta; i tawp uh lah ahong tungta.
25004019	Van a muvanlaite sang in ei hon delhte akinzaw uh; mual tung ah hon delh ua, gamdai ah ahon na buk uhi.
25004020	I nakvangte a hu, Toupa thaunilh, akokhuk ua lak in a-om ua; amah thu gen in. Alimnuai a namte lak ah i hing ding, i chi uhi.
25004021	Nuamsa inla kipak in aw Edom tanu, Uz gam a teng; nou lah nang pha in leng ahong paisuak ding; na kham ding a vuaktang in na kibawl ding.
25004022	Aw Zion tanu, na thulimlouhna gawtna zoh ahita; saltanna ah nang ahon pimang nawn kei ding; na thulimlouhna in ahong veh ding, Aw Edom tanu; na khelhnate amukhe ding hi.
25005001	Theigige in, Aw Toupa , ka tung ua hong tung; ahon kouna uh en inla, mu in.
25005002	Ka gouluah uh mikhual kiang a hei ahi a, ka innte uh gamdang mite lam ah.
25005003	Tagah leh pabei ka hi ua, ka nute uh meithai bang ahi uh.
25005004	Ka tui dawn ding uh sum in ka lei ua; ka singte uh kou lak a zuak in a-om hi.
25005005	Ka ngawngzang uah kou hon delhte a-om ua, ka bah ua, khawlna ka nei kei uh.
25005006	Aiguptate leh Assuriate kiang ah, tanghou a lungkim ding in ka kipia uh.
25005007	Ka pipute uh akhial ua, a-om kei uh; agitlouhna uh kou ka pua uh.
25005008	Sikhate'n ka tung uah vai ahawm ua; akhut ua kipan kou hon tankhe ding kuamah a-om kei uh.
25005009	Ka hinna uh lauthawnna toh ka tanghou uh ka mu ua gamdai namsau ziak in.
25005010	Thuk bang in ka vun uh avom a nakpitak a kialna ziak in.
25005011	Zion a numeite asual ua, Judah khopite a nungakte.
25005012	Akhut un lalte khailup in a-om ua, upa melte zahtak in a-om kei hi.
25005013	Tangvalte'n khawl apua ua, naupangte sing nuai ah akisui uh.
25005014	Kongpi a kipan upate akhawl ua, alasakna ua kipan in tangvalte akhawl uh.
25005015	Ka lungtang kipahna uh atawp a, ka lamna uh dahna asuak hi.
25005016	Ka lu ua kipan ka lallukhu uh akia a, ka khelh ziak un, ka tung uh agik hi!
25005017	Hiai ziak in ka lungtang uh abah a; hiai thilte ziak in ka mitte uh amial hi.
25005018	Hihsiat a om, Zion Tang ziak in; sehalte atung ah avak uh.
25005019	Aw Toupa , nang tangtawn in na om gige; na laltutphah khang khat a kipan in khang khat tan in a-om hi.
25005020	Bangziak a tangtawn a hon mangngilh a, hichi tantan hon nungngatsan na hia?
25005021	Nang lam hon ngasak in, Aw Toupa huchi in bawlhoih nawn in ka om ding uh; nidanglai bang in ka nite uh thaksak in,
25005022	ka tung ua heh lua a, hon pum nawlkhin na hih kei ngalleh.
26001001	Saltan akum sawmthumna, akha lina, huai kha ani ngana ah Kebar lui a saltangte lak a ka om lai in hichi ahong hi a, van hong kihong a, Pathian kilakna ka mu hi.
26001002	Huai kha ani ngana ah, huai tuh kumpipa Jehoiakin saltan akum ngana ahi,
26001003	Kaldai gam a Kebar lui a Buzi tapa siampu Ezekiel kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: huai ah Toupa khut atung ah a-om hi.
26001004	Huan ka en a, ngai in, mallam a kipan huihpi thupi mahmah ahong kuan a, meipi asah a sah, kuang zoizoi, akim tengteng tanvak puappuap asung mei laitak ah sik am bang a am a-om hi.
26001005	Huchi in huai lai a kipan in thil hing li kibatpih ahong pawtkhia ua, akimuhdan uh hichibang ahi a: Mihing batna anei ua,
26001006	mai li anei chiat ua, kha li anei chiat uhi.
26001007	Akhete uh atang a; akhepek nuailam uh bawngnou khepek bang ahi a; huan dalte mahmah bang in avakkhe zualzual uhi.
26001008	Apang lite ua akha nuai uah mihing khut bang anei ua; huchi in ali un amel uleh akhate uh hichibang in apu uhi:
26001009	Akhate uh akizom a; apai un leng akihei ngei kei ua, amazawn uah apai chiat uhi.
26001010	Amel un akibatpihte mihing mel bang ahi a, ali un ataklam pang uah humpinelkai mel apu ua, ali un aveilam pang uah bawngtal mel apu ua, ali un muvanlai mel apu nawn ua, amel uh huchibang ahi.
26001011	Huan akhate uh azakkhia ua, akha nihte un akizak zom chiat ua, nih in apumpi uh akhuh uh.
26001012	Malam ah apai chiat ua, kha paina lam ding ah apai ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uhi.
26001013	Thil hingte lak ah suangkuangthei ampha bang, meisel bang mai asuk leh tou in apai a; meibel a-ampha mahmah a, mei a kipan khophia ahong suakkhe zualzual hi.
26001014	Thil hingte khophe zualzual bang in avialtai uhi.
26001015	Huan thil hingte ka et lai in, ngai in, thil hingte zul ah amel lite uh a ding in lei ah kangtalai liim khat zel ka mu hi.
26001016	Kangtalai khe leh atatdan beril suang zia bang mai in alang a, ali un latdan khat anei ua, alatdan uh leh atatdan uh kangtalai liim khat sung a kangtalai liim dang om bang ahi hi.
26001017	Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh.
26001018	Akangtalai liim kual sangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahi a; ali un akual teng mit in adim uhi.
26001019	Huchi in thil hingte apai chiang un azul uah kangtalai peite apai sam uhi; thil hingte lei a kipan dopkang a a-om uleh kangtalai liimte leng dopkang in a-om sam uhi.
26001020	Kha apai utna lam peuhmah ah apai ua; huai lam a kha apai zel ziak in; huchi in kangtalai liimte azul uah dopkang in a-om ua, thil hing kha kangtalai liimte ah a-om hi.
26001021	Huaite apai chiang un hiaite apai uhi; huaite adin chiang un hiaite adingh ua; huaite lei a kipan a dopkang a a-om chiang un kangtalai liimte amau zul ah dopkang in a-om ua, kangtalai liimte ah thil hingte kha a-om hi.
26001022	Thil hingte lutung ah van kibatpih a-om a, kristal vak bang a te mulkimhuaitak alutung uah akiphalh zeizoi hi.
26001023	Van dum nuai ah akha uh akop khat thil hing dangte sun in azak ua, akha uh kop khat in apumpi uh akhuh uhi.
26001024	Huan alen chiang un akha ging uh tui tampi mahmah ging bang, bangkim hihtheipa aw bang mai, mipi ging vengvung husa, sepaihhon husa bang mai in ka za a; adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi.
26001025	Alutung ua vansin tung ah aw ahong om a, adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi.
26001026	Huan alutung ua vansin tung ah laltutphah bang, sapphir suang bang mai a kimu a-om a; huai laltutphah batpih tung ah mihing bang a kilang a-om hi.
26001027	Akawng chiang tunglam sik hal-ap bang mai in ka mu a, akawng hileh kilawm chiang nuailam mei bang mai hi in ka mu a, avak kimvel lelaw hi.
26001028	Vuahzuk ni a meipi tung a sakhituihup latdan bang in akim vak alang hi. Hiai Toupa thupina latdan bang ahi. Huan ka muh in akhup in ka puk a, thugenpa aw ka za hi.
26002001	Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na khe in dingh in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding hi,” achi hi.
26002002	Ka kiang a thu agen lai in kei ah kha ahong lut a, ka khe in ahon dingsak a, huchi in kei hon houpihpa ka ngaikhia hi.
26002003	Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel suante kiang ah, helhat nam, ka tung a helnakte kiang ah ka hon sawl hi; amau leh apipute leng hiai ni pha nangawn in ka tung ah atalek uhi.”
26002004	Suan lungkhauh leh genhakte ahi ua, akiang uah nang ka hon sawl hi; akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” na chi ding ahi.
26002005	Huchi in amau angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, (amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua), alak uah zawlnei a-om chih atheigige ding uhi.
26002006	“Nang, mihing tapa, amaute kihta ke'nla, athu uah leng lunglel sam ke'n, na kiang ah khaulingnei leh louling neite om in, aikam lak a teng himah lechin; helhatmi himah le uh, athu uh kihta ke'nla, alatdan uah leng lunglel sam ke'n.
26002007	Angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, akiang uah ka thu na gen ding ahi; amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua.
26002008	“Himahleh nang mihing tapa, na kiang a ka gen ngaikhia in; mihelhat inkuan bang in helhat ke'nla; na kam ka inla, ka hon piak ne in,” achi hi.
26002009	Huan ka en a ngai in, khut in ahon sawk a, ngai in huai ah laibuzial a-om hi.
26002010	Ka ma ah aphalh a, asunglam leh apolam gelh ahi a; huai ah kahna, lusuunna leh tunggikna gelhna a-om hi.
26003001	Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na muh ne in; laibuzial ne inla, Israel inkote kiang ah thu va gen in,” achi hi.
26003002	Huchi in ka kam ka ka a, laibuzial ahon nesakta hi.
26003003	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ka hon piak hiai laibuzial in na gil ah vahsak inla, hiai in na gilsung hihdim in,” achi hi. Huchi in ka neta a, akhumdan ka kam ah khuaizu bang ahi hi.
26003004	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa kuan inla, Israel inkote kiang ah ka thute zang in va gen in.
26003005	Pau tuam leh pau haksate kiang a sawl na hi kei a, Israel inkote kiang a sawl na hi zaw a;
26003006	nam pau tuam leh pau haksa athu uh na theihtheihlouhte kiang a sawl na hi kei hi. Akiang ua nang ka hon sawl in pel lou in na thu angaikhe mahmah ding uh.
26003007	Himahleh Israel inkote'n ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua, kei ahon ngaikhe kei ding uh, Israel inkote tengteng taltangtak leh lungtang genhak mahmah ahi uhi.
26003008	Huan ngai in, na mai amau mai lak ah khauhsak in, na taltang leng amau taltang sang a takzaw in ka bawl hi.
26003009	Suang tak mahmah, meisuang sang a takzaw in na tal ka bawl a, lau ke'nla, amit hah uah lunglel sam ke'n, helhat inkuan himah le uh,” achi hi.
26003010	Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na kiang a ka thugen ding tengteng na bil in ngaikhia inla, na lungtang ah khum in.
