26003011	Kuan inla, na chipih saltangte kiang va tung inla; angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, ‘Hichibang Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,’ chi in gen inla, hilh in,” achi hi.
26003012	Huchi in kha in ahon domkangta a, amun a kipan Toupa thupina adinkhiak lai in, ka nunglam ah zinling thawm ka za hi.
26003013	Huai tuh thil hingte kha kisukha leh akiang ua kangtalai peite, zinling thawm bang nei ahi uhi.
26003014	Huchi in kha in hon domkang a, ahon lamangta a, heh mahmah leh ut lou pipi in ka kuanta hi; Toupa khut lah ka tung ah ahat ngal a.
26003015	Huchi in Telabib a saltangte, Kebar lui a tengte kiang ka va tung a, atutna uah ka tu a; lamdang satak in huai ah ni sagih ka tuta hi.
26003016	Huchi in ni sagih abei in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26003017	“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote vilpa in nang ka hon sep hi; huchi in ka kam a thu na za ding a, kei sik in amaute vauna na pe ding hi.”
26003018	Migilou kiang a ka thu, “Na si mahmah ding,” ka chih a, huai migilou ahinna hum ding a agitlouhna lampi paisan ding a vauna na neih louh a, vauna thu leng na hilh sam louh a, huai migilou agitlouhna a asihleh asisan moh nang lak ah ka hon sik ngeingei ding hi.
26003019	Himahleh huai migilou na vau a, agitlouhna apaisan louh a, agitlouhna lampi alehngatsan sam keileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ahi zaw ding hi.
26003020	“Huan midiktat in adiktatna lehngatsan a gitlouhna ahih a, ama a pukna ka koihleh, asi ding; vauna na neih louh ziak in akhelhna ah asi ding a; athil diktat ahihsate theihgige ahi kei ding; asisan moh ahihleh na lak ah ka hon sik ding hi.
26003021	Himahleh midiktat khial lou ding a na vauhilh a, akhelh keileh vauna akhawksak ziak in ahing ding; nang leng na hinna na humbit ding hi,” achi hi.
26003022	Huan huai ah Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, phaizang ah pai inla, huai ah ka hon houpih ding,” achi a. Huchi in ka thou a, phaizang ah ka paita hi.
26003023	Ngai in, huai ah Toupa thupina, Kebar lui a ka muh thupina bang ahong dingh a, kei ka khuppukta hi.
26003024	Huchi in kei ah kha ahong lut a, ka khe in ahon dingsak a, ahon houpih a, “Pai inla, na inn ah kikhakkhum in.
26003025	Nang zaw, mihing tapa, khauhual in ahon khih ding ua, ahon gak ding ua, alak uah na pawtkhe nawn kei ding.
26003026	Na dangtawng ah na lei ka belhsak ding a, na pau nawn kei ding a, amaute salpa na hi nawn kei ding; helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua.”
26003027	Himahleh na kiang a thu ka gen hun chiang in na kam ka hon ka sak ding a, akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Angaikhia in ngaikhia henla, angaikhe lou in ngaikhe kei hen, helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua, achi,’ ” chi in na gen ding hi.
26004001	“Nang mihing tapa, teklei pek la inla, na ma ah koih in, huai tung ah khopi Jerusalem khopi lim bawl in.
26004002	Akim a um in kulh khohkhum inla, mual pawng bawlkhum in sepaih giahbukte bawlkhum inla, kulh suksiatnate akim in bawlkhum in.
26004003	Sikpek la inla, nangmah leh khopi kikal ah sik baang ding in tung in; huai lam masuan inla, um in a-om ding a, nangmah in na um ding ahi. Hiai Israel inkote a dia etsak kholhna ahi ding.
26004004	“Huan nang bel na veilam pang delh in lum inla, atung ah Israel inkote gitlouhna nga in; atung a na lup sung ani zah bang zel a agitlouhna uh na puak ding ahi.
26004005	Agitlouhna kumte uh nang a ding a nite hi ding in lah ka septa ngal a, ni zathum-leh-sawmkua; huchibang in Israel inkote gitlouhna na po ding ahi.
26004006	Hiaite na khit hun chiang in na taklam pang delh in na lum leuleu ding a, Judah inkote gitlouhna na po ding, ni sawmli nang ding in ka sep hi; ni khat kum khat zel hi ding in.
26004007	“Na ban khuh lou a zak in Jerusalem kiluhna lam nga inla, atungthu genkhia in.
26004008	Ngai in, khauhual in ka hon hentom a, khopi kiluh sung nite abei masiah koilam ah leng na kihei ding ahi kei hi.
26004009	“Buh, buhman, be, behiang, vai buhman la inla, bel khat ah koih in, huan tanghou in bawl in; na pang khat lam delh a na lup sung teng, ni zathum-le-sawmkua sung, huai na ne ding ahi.
26004010	Na an nek ding teh vek ding ahi, ni khat in shekel sawmnih ahi ding ahi; hunbi neitak in na ne ding ahi.
26004011	Tuite leng teh vek in na dawn ding ahi, hin khat seh guk suah seh khat ahi ding ahi, hunbi neitak in na dawn ding ahi.
26004012	Amitmuh un mihing ekgaw sing dia zang in na kang ding a, buhman tanghou nek in na ne ding,” achi hi.
26004013	Huchi in Toupa'n , “Hichibang an thanghuai Israel suante'n ka delhmangna ding namte lak ah ane ding uh,” achi hi.
26004014	Huan ke'n, “Eh! Toupa Pathian , Ngai dih, ka hinna hihnit ahi ngei kei a, ka tuailai a kipan tutan in leng, amah sih a si hiam, gamsa keih hiam ka ne ngei nai kei a, sa kihhuai ka kam ah alut ngei nai kei hi,” ka chi hi.
26004015	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “En in, mihing ek sik in bawng ek ka hon pia, huaite zang in nek dingte na bawl ding hi,” achi hi.
26004016	Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ngai dih, Jerusalem ah, an hinna bul ka hihse ding a, a-an uh teh vek in lauthawngtak in ane ding uh; tui leng teh vek in, lungkhamtak in adawn ding uhi.
26004017	An leh tui tasam a, lungkhamtak a ki-entuah a, agitlouhna ua athammang khitna ding un.”
26005001	“Huan nang mihing tapa, namsau hiam mahmah la inla, na lu leh na khamul metna ding in sammetmi tem zang in; huan bukna la inla, sam khen in.
26005002	Seh thum a khen seh khat sim a a-om sung nite abei hun chiang in khopi lai a mei ah na hal ding ahi; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn na la dia, akim ah namsau in na satnen ding ahi; huan, seh thum a khen seh khat nawn huih mutleng ding in na thehzak ding a, ke'n namsau in ka delhzui ding hi.
26005003	Huan tawmchik na la ding a, na puanaktual mong ah na tun ding hi.
26005004	Hiaite lak a tam lou na la ding a, mei ah na thehlut ding a, na hal ding ahi; huai a kipan in Israel inkote tengteng ah mei ahong pawt ding,” achi hi.
26005005	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hiai Jerusalem khua ahi, namte' laizang ah ka koih a, akim ah gamte a-om hi.
26005006	Namte sang a nakpi a gitlouhna hih zaw in ka thugel tung ah ahel a, akim a gamte sang a thupizaw in ka dan bawl tung ah ahel uhi. Ka thugelte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte bang in a-om kei uhi.”
26005007	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kim a namte sang a buai hatzaw in na om a, ka dan thusehte bawl bang in na om kei a, ka thukhennate leng na zui kei ua, namte a dia ka thukhendan a na hih louh ziak un, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:
26005008	Ngai un, kei, kei nangawn in leng ka hon nang ahi, namte mitmuh ngei in na lak uah vaihawmna ka tangtungsak ding hi.
26005009	Na kihhuaina tengteng uh ziak in thil ka hih ngei nai louh, hih leng ka hih ngei nawn louh ding na tung uah ka hih ding hi.
26005010	Huchi in pate'n na sung ah atate uh ane ding ua, tate'n leng apate uh ane ding uh; nang a mikhosuaksun tengteng ka dalhsak vek ding.”
26005011	Huchi in hiai Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi: “Na nitna leh na kihhuainate a ka mun siangthou na hihnit ziak in, kei ka hin bang in, ka hon kiamsak ding a, ka mit in ahon maih het kei ding a, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi.
26005012	Seh thum a khen seh khat hipi in hiam, kial in hiam na lak uah asi ding uh; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn ka hihdalh ding a, namsau in ka delhzui ding hi.”
26005013	Hichibang in ka hehna ka tangtungsak ding a, atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, ka om anuamta ding hi; kei Toupa'n atung ua ka hehna ka lungdamsak hun chiang in phatuamngaitak in ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh.
26005014	Huai lou in, na kim a namte lak ah leh vialvak tengtengte mitmuh in kho segawp leh simmohhuai in ka hon bawl ding hi.
26005015	Huchi in thangpai leh heh mahmah a, nakpi a taihilh a, na tung a thugelte ka tunsak hun in na kim a namte mitmuh in nuihsan leh kouna leh hilhna leh mulkimhuai na hi ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita hi.
26005016	Atung uah kialna thaltang hoih loutak manna ding, noumau manna ding ka hon kesak ding; na tung uah kialna ka uangsak ding a, na an uh, hinna bul ka hihse ding hi.
26005017	Huchi in na tung uah kialna leh gamsa hangte ka hon sawl ding a, ta leh nau tan in ahon laksak ding uh; hipi leh sisan suahna na lak uah aleng ding a; na tung uah namsau ka hon sawl ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita hi, chi in.
26006001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
26006002	“Mihing tapa, Israel tang lam nga inla, akiang uah thu gen inla,
26006003	Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un; Toupa Pathian in tangte leh mualte kiang ah, leh phaizangte leh kuamte kiang ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in na tung uah namsau ka hon lik ding a, na mun sangte uh ka hihse vek ding.
26006004	Na maitamte uh loihsan in a-om ding a, na ni pathian limte uh akitamzan ding; na mithah luangte uh na milimte uh ma ah ka pai ding hi.
26006005	Amilimte uh ma ah Israel suante luang ka koihkhawm ding a, na guhte uh na maitam kim uah ka thehzak ding hi.
26006006	Na tenna mun tengteng uah khopi ase ding a, mun sangte akisegawp ding; na maitamte uh hihsiat leh loihsan ahihtheihna ding un leh na milimte uh akitapnen a, aman theihna ding in leh na ni pathian limte uh phukpaih a a-omtheihna ding un, na nasepte uh aman theihna ding in.
26006007	Huan na lak uah mithahte apuk ding ua, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26006008	“Himahleh gam chih a na dalhzak hun chiang un namte lak ah namsau a suakta a-om ding ziak un akhen ka hon hawi ding.
26006009	Huan na lak ua kipan a pawtte'n sal a apina namte uh lak ah kei ahon theigige ding ua, a-angkawmna lungtang uh ka lakmang sakleh amit uh, amilim lam ua angkawmte ka hihsiat sakdante athei ding uh; thil gilou a na hih ziak uleh akihhuai ziak un amau mitmuh ngei in leng kihhuai akisa ding uh.
26006010	Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding ua, hiai thil hoih lou akiang uah ka hih ding a, amawk in ka chi kei chih athei ding uh, chi in,” achi hi.
26006011	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na khut beng in na khe pek inla, Maizen! Israel inkote kihhuaina gitlouh ziak maw! Namsau in, kial in, hipi in apuk ding uhi.
26006012	Gamlapi a om hipi in asi ding ua, anai a om namsau in apuk ding ua, aval, um a omte kial in asi ding uh; hichibang in ka hehna mahmah atung uah ka bukimsak ding hi.
26006013	Mual sang teng ah, tang vumte ah leh sing hing peuhmah nuai ah leh tosaw bawkpha chih nuai a amilimte uh kiang a gimlim alatna mun ua amaitam kim ua amilimte uh lak a amisi luangte uh a-om hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26006014	Atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a, gamdai a kipan Diblah lam a atenna mun tengteng uh gamsia suaksak in ka loihsan vek ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.
26007001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26007002	“Nang mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in Israel gam kiang ah hichi in achi: Tawpna, tawpna gam ning li ah ahong tung hi.
26007003	“Tu nang a ding in tawpna ahi, na tung ah ka hehna ka hon tungsak ding a, na omdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding a, na kihhuaina tengteng na tung ah ka hon tun ding hi.
26007004	Ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi; na omdan bang in na tung ah ka hon tun zaw ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.”
26007005	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Siatna, siatgawpna mah, ngai dih, ahong tung hi.
26007006	Tawpna ahong tung hi, tawpna ahong tung hi, na tung ah ahong thouta, ngai in, ahong tung hi.
26007007	Aw gam luahpa, na siatna ding na tung ah ahong tung hi, hun ahong tung hi, ni anaita hi; buaina, kipak a tang tung a kikouna ni hilou.
26007008	“Tu in ka hehna na tung ah ka hon buakzok ding hi, na tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a; na omdan bang zel in ka hon vai hawmsak ding hi; na kihhuaina tengteng na tung ah ka hon tun ding hi.
26007009	Huan ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding; na omdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hon tun ding a, na kihhuaina leng na lak uah a-om ding; huchi in kei Toupa gawt theipa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26007010	“Ngai in, ani, ngai in, ahong tung hi, na siatna ding apawtta, satna chiang apakta, kisaktheihna apakmumta hi.
26007011	Hiamgamna gitlouhna chiang asuakta ahi; kua mahmah a-omta kei ding a, ahusa uhiam, ahauhsakna uhiam leng; kuamah in a-it sam kei ding uh.
26007012	“Hun ahong tungta, ani ahong naita; aleimi kipak kei henla, akhawngmi leng dah kei hen; thangpaihna avek ua tung ah a-omta hi.
26007013	Azuakmi in, dam lai mahleh, athil zuak amu nawn kei ding; muhkholhna zaw avek ua tungthu ahi a, kuamah akik kei ding uh, kuamah ahinna thulimlouhna uah akhosa suak sam kei ding uh.
26007014	Pengkul amut ua, bangkim akimanta; himahleh kidouna ah kuamah ahoh kei uh; avek ua tung a ka hehna a-om ziak in.
26007015	“Inpua ah namsau, asung ah hipi leh kial; gam a om namsau in asi ding ua, khopi a om kial leh hipi in ane khin ding hi.
26007016	Himahleh ataikhete, apawt ding ua, tangte ah phaizang gam vakhu bang in; avek un, lungzuangtak in amau thulimlouhna chiat ah a-om ding uh.
26007017	Khut tengteng azaw ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in anem ding.
26007018	Sai-ip puan ateng ding ua, mulkimna in amau atuam ding a, mel chiteng ah zumna alang ding a, alutang tengteng uh agiau khin ding hi.
26007019	Adangkasik uh leh adangka-engte un Toupa heh ni chiang in ahunkhe thei kei ding a, ahinna uh ataisak kei ding a, agil uh avahsak sam kei ding; athulimlouhna uh pukna ahih khit tak ziak in.
26007020	Akizepna kilawmna uh akisaktheihpih ua, akihhuaina milim un leh anitna thil un asuaksak zaw lel uhi; huaiziak in amau a ding in thilkihhuai ding in ka na bawlta hi.
26007021	“Huan gallak ding in namdang khut ah ka pe dia, lei a migiloute kiang ah gallak ding in ka pe ding a, amau ana hihnin ding uh.
26007022	Amaute ka nungngatsan ding a, ka mun siang ahihnin ding uh; huan guta ahong lut dia, ahihnin ding uh.
26007023	“Gamsung lah sisan suah hat vaihawmna a dim a, hiamgamna a khopi adim ziak in khainiang bawl un.
26007024	Huchi in namdang giloupente ka hon pilut ding a a-innte uh aneihsak ding ua; ahatna otpih uh ka hihtawp ding a, amun siangte uh hihnit in a-om ding hi.
26007025	Lungzinna ahong tung a, muanna azong ua, a-om het kei hi.
26007026	Siatna tung ah siatsemna, thuthang tung ah thuthang ahong om ding a, zawlnei lak ah kilakna azong ding ua, himahleh dante siampu lak ah amang ding a, upate lak ah thudot a-om kei ding hi.
26007027	Kumpipa adah ding a, kumpi tapa lungdonna puansilh in akivan ding a, vantang khut leng aling ding. Akiang uah a-omdan bang un ka hih ding a, athilhih bang zel un vai ka hawmsak ding; huan Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi.
26008001	Akum gukna, akha gukna, huai kha ani nga ni in hichi ahong hi a, ka inn a ka tut a, Judah upate ka ma a atut lai un Toupa Pathian khut ka tung ah ahong om hi.
26008002	Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, mi meikuang bang a kimu ahong om a; akawng chiang nuailam hi dia kilawm meikuang bang ahi a; akawng chiang tunglam bel sik hal-ap bang a vaktak ahi.
26008003	Huchi in khut melput ahon sawkkhia a, ka talsam a hon man in, kha in lei leh van kikal ah ahon domkang a, Pathian kilakna in Jerusalem ah ahon pi hi, Jerusalem mallam huang sungnung kongpi khakna kiang ahon tun a, huai ah mullitna lim tutna mun a-om a, huai in amullitsak hi.
26008004	Huan ngai in, phaizang a ka muh bang mah in huai ah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi.
26008005	Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, mallam nga in na mitsuan dih ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in mallam nga in ka mit ka suan a, ngai in, maitam kongpi mallam lutna ah hiai mullitna lim ana om hi.
26008006	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, athilhih uh na mu hia? Israel inkote'n thilkihhuai mahmah, hiai a ahih ngei uh, ka inn siangthou a kipan a gamla a ka paimangna ding a ahih uh? Himahleh thil dang kihhuaizaw na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi.
26008007	Huan huangsung lutna ah ahon pi a; ka en a, baang ah vang ana om hi.
26008008	Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, huai baang hon khuak dih,” achi hi. Ka khuakleh kongkhak ana om hi.
26008009	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lut inla, hiai a khelhna kihhuaitak ahih uh en dih,” achi hi.
26008010	Huchi in ka lut a, ka mu a, ngai in, thil hing chi chih limte, gamsa kihhuai limte, Israel inkote milim tengteng baang ah akimvel in ana tuang hi.
26008011	Huan ama uah Israel inkuan, upate lak a mi sawmsagihte adingh ua, alaitak uah Sephan tapa Jaazaniah adingh a, michih in belhbu atawi chiat ua; huan gimlim khu gim azamtou ngoingoi hi.
26008012	Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan upate mial nuai a thilhih na mu hia? Michih in milim dantan a ahih uh? Toupa'n ahon mu kei a, Toupa'n gam apaisanta aka,” achi uhi.
26008013	Ka kiang ah, “Athilhih uh kihhuai sem dang leng na mu nawn lai ding,” achi lai hi.
26008014	Huchi in Toupa' inn mallam panglutna kongkhak ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, huai ah numeite Tammuz ngai in kap in atu uhi.
26008015	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia? Hiai sang a kihhuaizaw sem na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi.
26008016	Huan Toupa' inn um sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a, ngai in, Toupa tempul lutna ah inliim leh maitam kikal ah mi sawmnih-le-nga, Toupa tempul lam anungngat a, amaite uh suahlam nga in ana om ua, suahlam ah ni ana bia uhi.
26008017	Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai na mu hia, aw mihing tapa, athilkihhuai hih uh, hiai ahih uh Judah inkote a ding in thil neutham ahi hia? Gam hiamgamna in ahihdim ua, hon hehsak nawn sem ua, anak uah singhiang abat uhi.
26008018	Huaiziak in ke'n leng hehtak in ka hih ding a; ka mit in amaih kei dia, ka hehpih sam kei ding; aw ngaihtak in ka bil ah hong kikou mah le uh ka ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi.
26009001	Huchi in bil a ka zak in, “Khopi kem mite michih hihmanna van tawi in hong nai uhen,” chi in ngaihtak in akikou hi.
26009002	Huan ngai in, mallam kongpi tungnung paina a kipan in mi guk ahong pai ua, michih in hihlupna van atawi chiat ua; alai ua mi khat puanmalngat silh in laituibuk akuah hi. Alut ua, dal maitam kiang ah adingh uhi.
26009003	Huan Israel' Pathian thupina a omna cherub a kipan in huai inn kongpi kiang ah apaitou a; puanmalngat silh, laituibuk kuahpa asam hi.
26009004	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Khopi sung tawnsuak inla, Jerusalem tawnsuak in; asung a thilkihhuai hihsate ziak atunggik a kapte atal uah chiamteh in,” achi hi.
26009005	Huan midangte kiang ah ka zak mahmah in, “Anung ah khopi tawnsuak unla, khut kha un, na mit un mumaih kei henla, hehpih sam kei un.
26009006	Putekte, tangvalte, nungakte, naupangte leh nute that siang vek un. Chiamtehna neite bel hon naih kei un; ka Mun Siangthou ah pan un,” achi hi. Huchi in inn kong a upate ah apan uhi.
26009007	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Inn hihbuah unla, ahuangsungte mi luang in dimsak unla, pawt un,” achi hi. Huan apawtta ua, khopi ah agamtangta uhi.
26009008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, khopi ah agamtat lai un kei bel nutsiat in ka na om a, akhup in ka puk hi. “Ah! Toupa Pathian , Jerusalem tung a na hehna na sunbuak ah Israel khosuaksunte leng hihman vek sawm na hi hiam?” chi in ka kikou hi.
26009009	Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Israel leh Judah inkote thulimlouhna athupi tel a ahi. ‘Sisan in gamsung adim a; khopi vaihawmna kaihkawi in a-om a, Toupa'n gam apaisanta a, Toupa'n bangmah amu kei!’ achi hi.
26009010	Kei toh kisai in leng, ka mit in amau ka mumaih kei ding a, ka hehpih sam kei ding hi; agitlouhna uh avekpi in amau ka khusak ding,” achi hi.
26009011	Huchi in ngai in, puanmalngat silh a laituibuk kuahpa'n thu atun a, “N'on thupiak bang in ka hih khinta,” achi hi.
26010001	Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, cherubte lutung a vansin om ah sapphir suang hileh kilawmtak, laltutphah bangtak a kimu ahong lang hi.
26010002	Ama'n puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherub nuai a kangtalai peite kikal ah va lut inla, cherubte kikal a meivu na khut langnih dim in va luak inla, khopi tung ah thehzak in,” achi hi.
26010003	Ka mitmuh lai mahmah in akuanta hi. Huan mi ahoh lai in tempul taklam pang ah cherubte adingh ua; huang sungnungpen meipi in adimta hi.
26010004	Toupa thupina cherubte a kipan apaitou a, inn kongpi tung ah ava dinghta a, huai inn meipi in adim a, Toupa thupina vak in huangsung adimta hi.
26010005	Cherubte khazap gingte huangsung ponungzaw leng Pathian Bangkim hihthei in ahon houpih lai a a-om bang mai in akiza hi.
26010006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherubte kikal a kangtalai pei kikal a kipan mei va la in,” chi a thu apiakleh, amah ava lut a, kangtalai liimte bul ah ava dinghta hi.
26010007	Huan cherubim, cherubte kikal a kipan in, cherubte kikal a mei om sawk in, ala a, puanmalngat silhpa khut ah apia a, ama'n ana la a, apawtkheta hi.
26010008	Huchi in cherubte bel akha nuai uah mihing khut bangtak ahong lang a.
26010009	Huan ka en a, ngai in, cherubte sik ah kangtalai liim li, cherub khat kiang ah, kangtalai liim khat, cherub dang kiang ah kangtalai liim dang ka mu a; kangtalai liim latdan bel beril suang zia bang ahi.
26010010	Alatdan un ali un kibatna khat anei ua, kangtalai liim khat sung a kangtalai liim dang om bang mai ahi hi.
26010011	Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh; himahleh amasa ngatna lam azui zel ua, apai un akihei tuan kei uh.
26010012	Huan apumpi uh apum in anungte uh, akhutte uh, akhate uleh kangtalai liimte leng akim in mit in adim a, ali ua kangtalai liimte leng.
26010013	Akangtalai liimte bil a ka zak mahmah in, “Kangtalai liimte kipei,” chih ahi.
26010014	Michih in mel li chiat anei ua, mel khat cherub mel ahi a, anihna mihing mel ahi a, athumna humpinelkai mel, alina muvanlai mel ahi.
26010015	Huchi in cherubte apaitou ua; hiai bel Kebar lui gei a thil hing ka muh ahi.
26010016	Huan cherubte apai uleh kangtalai liimte leng agei uah apai tei a, cherubte'n lei a kipan paitou ding a akhate uh azak uleh kangtalai liimte'n alehngatsan ngei kei uh.
26010017	Adin uleh hiaite adingh tei ua, apaitouh uleh hiaite leng apai tei zel ua, thil hingte kha amau ah a-om hi.
26010018	Toupa thupina inpi kongpi tung a kipan apawtkhia a, cherubte tung ah adinghta hi.
26010019	Huan cherubte'n akha uh azak ua, apawt un ka mitmuh mahmah in lei a kipan apaitou ua; kangtalai liimte akiang uah a-om zel a; huan Toupa Inn lutna suahlam kongkhak chin ah adinghta a; Israel' Pathian thupina atung uah a-om hi.
26010020	Hiai bel Kebar lui a Israel' Pathian nuai a ka thil hing muh mah ahi; cherubte ahi uh chih ka thei hi.
26010021	Avek un maitang li leh kha li anei chiat ua, akha nuai uah mihing khut bang mai a-om hi.
26010022	Huan amel lam uh ahihleh Kebar lui a ka muh melte mah bang, alatdan uleh amau mahmah leng ahi uh; huan amazawn zel uah apai chiat uhi.
26011001	Huan kha in ahon domkang a, Toupa' inn suahlam lutna, suahlam muhna ahon tun a; ngai in, lutna kongkhak chin ah mi sawmnih-le-nga ana om ua; alak uah Azzur tapa Jaazaniah leh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah, mipi heutute ka mu hi.
26011002	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiaite gitlouhna sawmkhete ahi ua, hiai khopi a gitlouh sawmkhe mite ahi uh.
26011003	Inn lam hun ahi nai kei; hiai khopi sa uina bel ahi a, eite asa i hi uh,” chite.
26011004	“Huaiziak in thu gen inla, aw mihing tapa, atung uah thu gen in,” achi hi.
26011005	Huan ka tung ah Toupa kha ahong tung a, ama'n ka kiang ah, “Gen in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hichibang in na hihsek ua, aw Israel inkote aw, na lungsim ua thil hong tungte ka theisiang vek hi.
26011006	Hiai khopi ah na mithahte uh na pungsak huthut ua, akongzingte na mithah un na dimsakta uhi.”
26011007	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na mithah uh alai a na koihte uh asa ahi ua; hiai khopi ahihleh sa uina bel ahi, himahleh alai a kipan suankhiak in na om ding uhi.
26011008	Namsau na kihta ua, na tung uah namsau ka hon tun ding, Toupa Pathian in achi.
26011009	“Alai a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding a, namdangte khut ah ka hon mansak ding a, na tungthu uh angaihtuah ding uh.
26011010	Namsau in na si ding ua, Israel gamgi lam ah na tungthu uh ka ngaihtuah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26011011	Hiai khopi na sa uina bel uh ahi kei ding a, nou asung a sa na hi sam kei ding ua, Israel gamgi lam ah na tungthu uh ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
26011012	Huan Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, ka dan bawl na zui kei ua, ka thupawt leng na zui sam kei ua; na kim ua namte hihdan na zui zawta uh, achi,” chi in.
26011013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, thu ka genleh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah ana sita mai a, huchi in ka khuppuk a, aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Ah, Toupa Pathian , Israel khosuaksunte chimihna na bawl ding a hia?” ka chi hi.
26011014	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah,
26011015	“Mihing tapa, na unaute, na chi-le-kuangte ngei leh Israel inkote tengteng, avek un, Jerusalem luah mite'n Toupa a kipan paimang un, hiai gam kou a dia piak ahita hi,” achihnate uh ahi uhi.
26011016	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamlapi ah namte lak ah ka suanmang a, gam tampi ah ka hihdalh na a, sawt lou kal in ava tunna gam uah amaute a ding in Mun Siangthou ka hi ding,” achi hi.
26011017	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Namdangte a kipan in ka hon pikhawm nawn ding a, na dalhna gam ua kipan ka hon kaikhawm nawn ding a, Israel gam ka hon pe ding hi.
26011018	Huchi in huai ah ahong pai ding ua, thil huathuai tengteng leh thilkihhuaite a kipan alamang ding uhi.
26011019	Lungtang khat ka pe ding a, na sung uah lungsim thak ka koih ding. Huan asa ua kipan lungtangsak ka lamang ding a, akiang uah lungtang nem ka pe ding hi.
26011020	Ka dan thusehte azuih ua, ka thupiakte avom ua, ahihtheihna ding un, huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei leng a Pathian uh ka hi ding.
26011021	Ahuathuaina uleh akihhuaina laigil lungtang zuite bel akhelhna uh avek in amau ka khusak ding, Toupa Pathian in achi.
26011022	Huchi in cherubte'n akhate uh azak ua, akiang uah kangtalai liimte a-om a, atung uah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi.
26011023	Khopi lai a kipan in Toupa thupina apaitou a, khopi suahlam pang a tang sang ah ava dinghta hi.
26011024	Huan kha in ahon domkang a, kilakna ah Pathian kha in Kaldai gam a saltangte kiang ah ahon tun hi. Huchi in ka kilakna muh in ahon paitouhsanta hi.
26011025	Huchi in saltangte kiang ah Toupa'n thil ahon etsak tengteng ka genta hi.
26012001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26012002	“Mihing tapa, helhat inkuan, muhna ding mit nei a mu lou, zakna ding bil nei a zaloute lak a om na hi; helhat inkuan ahih himhim ziak un.
26012003	“Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, saltanna a pai ding bang in na vante lomgak dimdiam inla, sun khovak ah amitmuh mahmah un paikhia in; amuh mahmah na mun ua kipan mun dang ah na paikhe ding ahi; helhat inkuan ahi ua, akingaihtuah loh kha mai ding uh.
26012004	Huan na van sun khovak in amitmuh mahmah uah, saltang pai ding van lakkhiak in na lakhe ding a, nang mahmah leng amitmuh uah gamdang a khakmang ding pai in na pai ding ahi.
26012005	Amitmuh mahmah uah kulhbaang vangsak inla, huai ah lakhia in.
26012006	Amitmuh mahmah uah na po ding a, mial ah na paikhe ding a, lei na muhlouhna ding in na mai na khuh ding ahi; Israel inkote a ding in etsak kholhna ding in nang ka hon bawl ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
26012007	Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka hihta a, ka van saltang ding van bang in sun khovak in ka lakhia a, ka khut in baang ka sunvang a, khomial lai in ka lakhia a, amitmuh mahmah uah ka pua hi.
26012008	Huan zingsang in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
26012009	Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan, helhat inkuante'n na kiang ah, “Bang hih na hia?” ahon chi uh ahi kei maw?
26012010	Akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thuphuan Jerusalem heutute leh Israel inkote pumpi, a-omna uh mite tungthu ding ahi.
26012011	Nou a ding in etsak kholhna ka hi a, ka chih bang geih a atung ua hih ahi ding; khakmang in, saltang ding in apaimang ding uh,” chi in.
26012012	“Huan alak ua heutu omsun in mial nuai ah aliang in apo ding a, apaikhe ding; alakkhiakna ding un baang avangsak ua, amit in gam amuh nawn louh ziak in amai akhuh ding ahi.
26012013	Amah ka len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang a awk ahi ding; Kaldai gam a Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, muh zaw amu kei ding; huai ah asi ding hi.
26012014	Amah panpih dia akiang a omte leh asepaihte tengteng gam chih ah ka hihzak ding a, namsau dokkhia in ka delh ding hi.
26012015	“Huan namte lak a ka delhzak a, gam chih a ka hihdalh hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26012016	Himahleh namsau, kial, hipi a kipan mi tawmchik ka hawi ding; huaite'n ahong paina gam ua namte kiang ah akihhuaina tengteng aphuanna ding un; kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.
26012017	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi.
26012018	“Mihing tapa, na an ling vonvon kawm in ne inla, na tui lungzing a ling kawm in dawn in.
26012019	Huan gam a mite kiang ah Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem a tengte tungtang ah leh Israel gam tungtang ah hichi in achi: Lau kawm in a-ante uh ane ding ua, lungzingtak in atui uh adawn ding ua, agamsung a tengte hiamgamna ziak in asung a thil om tengteng a kipan hihgawp in a-om ding hi.
26012020	Huchi in mite tenna khopite loihsan in a-om ding a, agam hihsiat in a-om ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
26012021	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi:
26012022	“Mihing tapa, Israel gam a hiai paunak na neih uh bang chihna ahia? Anite asawt chiang in kilakna peuhmah avuaksuak nawn zel,” na chih uh.
26012023	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hiai paunak ka hihbei ding a, Israel gam ah azang nawn ngei kei ding uh; kilakna tundik ni ding anaita, chi in akiang uah gen zaw in.
26012024	“Israel inkuante lak ah kilakna hong vuaksuak leh aisan hoih lam a maitang phatna a-omta kei ding.
26012025	Toupa ka hi a, ka gen ding a, ka gen tangtun ahi ding a, sit ahi kei ding; Aw helhat inkuante aw, na dam lai mahmah un thu ka gen ding hi, ka tangtungsak pah ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi.
26012026	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26012027	“Mihing tapa, ngai in, ‘Israel inkote a min kilakna amuhte bel ni tampi a ding ahi a, agenkholhte leng gamlapi a ding ahi,’ ” achi uhi.
26012028	Huaiziak in akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ka thu bangmah sit ahi kei ding a, ka thugen peuhmah hihtangtun in a-om zaw ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in hilh in,” achi hi.
26013001	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a,
26013002	“Mihing tapa, Israel zawlnei, amah lungtang kia a kipan a gen chingte tung ah thu gen inla, ‘ Toupa thu ngai un.’ ”
26013003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Zawlnei hai, amau ngaihdan zui a, bangmah muloute tung agik hi!
26013004	Aw Israel, na zawlneite khopi sesa a sehal om bang lel ahita uh.
26013005	Toupa ni a kidouna a dingzou ding a kulhbaang dingkipsak ding leh Israel inkote hum ding a kulhbaang lam ding in na paitou kei uhi.”
26013006	“ Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi mite'n bangmah lou lel leh genkholhna lim lel atang ua, Toupa sawl ahi kei uh; athu uh hi ngei ding bang in mite agingtasak ua.
26013007	Kilakna hong vuaksuak lel na mu un, thugenkholh diklou na gen uh ahi kei maw? “ Toupa thupawt ahi,” na chi nawn ngal ua, ke'n ka gen a hia?
26013008	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Bangmah lou phet na gen ua zuau lel na muh ziak un, ngai un, ka hon nang ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
26013009	Huan ka khut in bangmah lou mute leh zuau genkhol mite anang ding a, ka mite kidotkhawmna ah atel kei ding ua, Israel inkuante min gelhna ah gelh in a-om sam kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26013010	Galmuanna omloupi a, “Muanna,” chi a mite apimang ziak un leh mi baang bawl a, sunu nuh mite'n,
26013011	“Ake nawn mai ding, vuahpi ahong zu ding a, nou gial lianpite aw, na hong ke ding ua, huih thupi in ahihse ding,” chi in.
26013012	Ngai un, baang achip khit chiang in, “Na sunu nuh uh koi ah, ahon chi kei ding ua hia?”
26013013	“Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka heh in huihpi thupi in ka hihse vek ding, ka heh in vuahpi ahong zu ding a, ka heh in gial thupitak hihmang ding in ahong ke ding.
26013014	Huchi in sunu na nuhngou bang uh ka chimsak ding a, lei pha in achim dia, huchi in asuangphumte adawk hial ding hi; huan achim ding a, baang kichim ah hihmang in na om ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26013015	“Hichibang in baang tung ah leh sunu nuh mite tung ah ka hehna ka damsak ding; huan, baang a-om nawn kei a, abaang zutte leng a-om nawnta kei uh, ka hon chi ding hi.
26013016	Huai bel Israel zawlnei Jerusalem tungthu gen a, galmuanna omloupi a galmuanna musak mite ngei, a-om nawn kei uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26013017	“Nang mihing tapa, na mite tanute, alungtang lel ua gen mite masuan inla, amaute kalh in thu gen in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:
26013018	Numei, mite ban a sik bunsak leh mi hinnate mat belhna ding a miliante lukhuhna khui mite atung uh agik hi! Nou hinna ding in ka mite hinna na man ding uh maw?
26013019	Buhman tawmchik leh tanghou them mu ding a si lou ding sisak ding leh hing lou ding hingsak ding in na zuaugen uh ka mite'n a-up ziak un ka mite lak ah ka min athanghuai ahi.
26013020	“Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, mi hinna, vasa bang a man ding a na thil butsakte uh ka mudah ahi; na bante uh ka bot ding a, na mimat dingte uh vasa bang a na mat dingte uh hinna ka pawtsak vek ding hi.
26013021	Na lukhuhnate uh leng ka botkek ding a, ka mite na khut ua kipan ka suaktasak ding, na mat theih ding un na khut uah a-omta kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26013022	“Kei lungkhamsak hilou a, midiktatte lungtang zuau a na hihnat ziak un leh migilou hingdam a a-omna ding a akhelhna lampi a kipan akilehheilouhna ding in migilou khutte na hihhat uh ahi.
26013023	Huaiziak in bangmah lou lel, thugenkholh diklou hiam zaw na mu nawn kei ding uh; huan na khut ua kipan ka mite ka hunkhe ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh, achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
26014001	Huchi in Israel upa khenkhatte ka kiang ah ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu ua.
26014002	Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta, ka kiang ah;
26014003	“Mihing tapa, hiai mite'n amilimte uh alungtang uah alalut ua, ama uah athulimlouhna pukna uh akoih uhi; kei ahon dong peuhmah ding ua hia?”
26014004	Huaiziak in amau houpih inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel inkuan a michih alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua athulimlouhna pukna koih a, zawlnei kiang a hong pai peuhmah, kei Toupa'n amilim uh tamdan bang zel in ka dawng ding.
26014005	Israel inkote amilim uh ziak a hon na omtuamsan ziak ua alungtang ua ka mattheihna ding in.”
26014006	Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hong kik unla, na milimte ua kipan in hong kik un, na kihhuaina tengteng uh lehngatsan un.
26014007	“Israel inkote lak a mi kuapeuh hiam, mikhual Israel gam a teng hiam, kei a kipan a kihihtuam, alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua thulimlouhna pukna koih kawm a, atungtang ua hon dong ding a zawlnei kiang a hoh kei leh Toupa ngei in ka dawng ding hi.
26014008	Huai mi ka masuan ding a, mi'n lamdang asak ding in tangtawn tangtawn a gen ding in ka mite lak a kipan ka hihmang ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uhi.
26014009	“Huan zawlnei khem a om in thu gen henla, kei Toupa'n zawlnei ka thuzoh ahi a, atung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, ka mi Israelte lak a kipan ka hihmang ding.
26014010	Athulimlouhna uh apo ding ua; zawlnei thulimlouhna amah dong mite thulimlouhna bang mai ahi ding hi.
26014011	Israel inkote kei a kipan aman nawn louh ua, atatleknate tengteng ua akihihnit nawn samlouhna ding un, ka mite ahih zawk ua a Pathian uh ka hihtheihna ding in, Toupa Pathian in achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
26014012	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
26014013	“Mihing tapa, gam mite'n tatlekna thilhih a, ka tung a thil hihkhial a, ke'n ka khut ka lik a, a-an uh, hinna bul ka hihsiat a, atung ua kial ka tunsak a, mi leh sate ka hon hihmanleh hiai mi thum,
26014014	Noah, Daniel leh Job hial leng hong om bang hileh, adiktatna un amau hinna kia a humbit ding ahi,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26014015	Gam sahangte a gam uh ka tuansuaksak a, gam ahihsiat ua, ahong kigawp a, gamsa ziak a kuamah paisuak ding a-om kei uleh,
26014016	hiai mi thumte om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding uh; amau kia hotdam in a-om ding ua, gam asegawp ding hi.
26014017	Ahihkeileh huai gam ah namsau ka lik dia, “Namsau aw, gamsung teng tawnsuak in,” mi leh gamsa ka gawimang ding hi.
26014018	Hiai mi thumte om le uh leng, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding ua, amau hinna kia humbit in a-om ding uh.
26014019	Ahihkeileh, huai gam ah, hipi ka hon lensak a, mi leh sa hihmang ding a sisan suah a ka hehna huai gam tung a ka hon sunleh;
26014020	Noah, Daniel leh Job hial leng na om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanu uhiam, atapa uhiam ahumbit kei ding ua, adiktatna un amau hinna ngei ahumbit lel ding uhi.
26014021	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a, “Jerusalem tung a ka vaihawmna na mahmah lite, namsaute, kialte, gam sahangte, hipite, mi leh sa gawimang vek ding a ka hon tut hun chiang in bangzah a thupi ahi diam aw?
26014022	Himahleh ngai in, huai lai a akhosuaksun pikhiak dingte nutsiat in a-om ding ua, tanute leh tapate leng; ngai un, akiang uah ahong pawtkhe ding ua, a-omdan uh athilhihte na mu ding uh, Jerusalem tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tut thu ah lungmuan in na om ding ua, atung a ka hon tut tengteng thu ah leng.
26014023	A-omdan uleh athilhihte uh na muh hun chiang un ahon lungmuan ding uh; atung a ka thilhih tengteng hihsan nei lou in ka hih kei chih na thei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26015001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
26015002	“Mihing tapa, sing dang sang in gammang nuai a sing lak a grepgui bang ahi tuam a le?
26015003	Thil bawlna dia asing zat ahi hia? Tui-um belsuan khaina ding in kua'n azang ngei a le?
26015004	Ngai in, mei a paihlut ahi a, toh ding in mei in akangmang, among langnih, akang khin a alai ah phattuamna anei a hia?
26015005	Ngai in, abit lai nangawn in aphatuam kei; akatmang khit nung in, phatuam sin kei na tel e!”
26015006	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamnuai sing lak a grep guite, toh ding in mei ah ka khul maimah bang in, Jerusalem luah mite ka bawl ding.
26015007	Amau ka masuan ding a, pawt mah le uh, mei a kipan, akangbei ding, mei in, Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh; amaute ka masuan hun chiang in.
26015008	Agam uh ka hihgawp ngei ding ahi, thulimlouhna ahih ziak un chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26016001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26016002	“Mihing tapa, Jerusalem akihhuainate theikhesak inla, akiang ah,
26016003	Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem kiang ah hichi in achi: Na pawtna gam leh na pianna gam Kanaan mite gam ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi a, na nu Hit mi ahi.
26016004	Huan na pianna thu bel na pian ni in na laigui at ahi kei a, nang hihsiang ding a tui a sil na hi sam kei, chi nuh na tuak kei a, tuamlum na hi kei.
26016005	Lainat ding a na tung a hiaite hih ding in kuamah mit in nang ahon hehpih kei ua; gamlak a paihkhiak na hita, na pian ni a kipan kih a om na hi hi.”
26016006	Huan na kiang a ka hong pai in sisan lak a kital in ka hon mu a, na kiang ah, “Sisan ah om lechin leng ‘hing in!’ ka hon chi a,” ahi, ka hon chi ahi, “Sisan ah om mah lechin ‘hing in!’
26016007	Gam thil pakmum bang in ka hon khangsak a, khanglian a piching in, na hong melhoih mahmah hi. Na nawite ahong kisa ua, na sam ahong hoih a; himahleh savuak leh vuaktang lel na hi lailai hi.”
26016008	Huan na kiang a ka hong pai a ka hon et in, deihhuai tham na hong hita a, ka puan ka hon zawn a, na vuaktanna ka hon khuhta hi; ahi, na kiang ah ka kichiam a, thukhun ah ka hon lutpih a, kei a na hita hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26016009	Huchi in tui in ka hon sil a, ahi, na sisan ka hon hihsiang sipsip a, sathau ka hon nuh hi.
26016010	Puanzem in ka hon van a, saham vun khedap ka hon bunsak a, puanmalngat hoih in ka hon van a, silk puan ka hon khusak hi.
26016011	Kizepna hoih in ka hon zem a, na khut ah taute, na ngawng ah dangka-eng khainiangte.
26016012	Na nak ah nakbulhte, na bil ah bilbahte, na lu ah lallukhu hoihtak in ka hon zem hi.
26016013	Huchi in dangka-eng leh dangkasik a zephoih na hita a, na puansilhte puanmalngat hoihtak leh silk puan leh puankhui kilawm ahi ua; na nek tangbuang nel leh khuaizu leh sathau ahi, na kilawm mahmah a, kumpi chi leng na ching hi.
26016014	Na kilawmna ziak in namte lak ah athangkhia a, ka thupina a kivan in na buchingta, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26016015	Himahleh na kilawmna na muang lua a, na minthanna na hukloh a, mi vialvak peuh leh na muh peuh na kithuahpih hi.
26016016	Na puansilhte suah in mun sangte na zuan a, huai ah kizuak in na pang a, hichibang in na om ngei nawn kei ding hi.
26016017	Ka dangka-eng leh ka dangkasik tui-um belsuan hoih taktak ka hon piakte na la a, pasal limbawlna ding in na zang, na hukpihta hi.
26016018	Puansilh khui kilawmte na la a, amau na tuam a, ka sathaute leh ka gimlimte ama uah na tung hi.
26016019	Ka hon tanghou piak leng ka tangbuang hoih leh sathau leh khuaizu ka hon vaknate gimlim ding in ama uah na lui a; hichi ahong hita, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26016020	Huai lou leng na tanu, na tapa, na hon suansakte akiang uah kithoihna ding in zatbei ding in na pia a; na hukna thil namai ahi a hia?
26016021	Ka tate na thah a, meipi a pailut a akiang ua na latte?
26016022	Na kihhuaina leh na hukna tengteng ah na naupan lai avuaktang a na omleh na sisan a na tal maimah hunlaite na thei nawnta kei hi.
26016023	Huan hiai na thulimlouhna tengteng khit in leng, hichi ahong hi a, na tung agik hi! Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
26016024	Mun kiphoute na kibawlna, kongzing chiteng ah mun sangte na lam hi.
26016025	Lampi kipatna teng ah mun sang na lam a, na kilawmna kihhuai in na bawl a vialvak peuhmahte kiang ah na kilemdawk a, na hukna a-uang semsem hi.
26016026	Aigupta mi, na inveng, sami mahmah toh kingaihna khelhna leng na hihta; hon hehsak ding in na hukna na uangsakta ahi.
26016027	Huaiziak in ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik a, na an nek ka kiamsak a, nang hon mudah Philistia tanute, na hukdan zumpih mahmah nute kiang ah ut-ut a ahon bawl ding un ka hon peta hi.
26016028	Assuria mite kiang ah leng na kizuak a, huntawk chih lah nei tel lou; ahi, akiang uah kizuak in na pang a, na kham tuan sam kei hi.
26016029	Kanaan gam ah, Kaldai mite kiang ah na hukna na uangsak lailai a, na kham tuan kei hi.
26016030	Nang lungtang sia hina mai e, na tatdan numei genhak gilou mahmah mai thil na hih a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26016031	Lamka thuam teng a milim biakna inn na bawl a, kongzing chih a mun sang na bawlte loh na delh louh ziak in kizuak leng na bang kei hi.
26016032	Zi angkawm, pasalte sang a mi tuam deihzaw nu!
26016033	Kizuakte kiang ah thil apesek ua, nang bel na lehpiak a hon deihmi ang ah, gam chih a kipan ahong pai ua, ahon kithuahpih theihna ding un na nou zaw nak ahi.
26016034	Huan na huk thu a kuamah in ahon zot louh midang toh na kibatlouhna uh ahi; nang aman na pe zosop a; kuamah in man ahon piak louh uh na lamdanna ahi.
26016035	Huaiziak in aw mihuknu, Toupa thu ngai in;
26016036	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kihhuaina buakkhiak ahih a, na mingaihte toh na kithuahna lam ua na vuaktanna suklat ahih ziak leh na kihhuaina milim tengteng ziak leh akiang ua na piak na tate sisan ziak in;
26016037	ngai in, nang hon ngaimi na nuamtatpihte tengteng leh na na ngaih khitsa tengteng leh na muhdahte tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, ahi, na kim ah ka pikhawm ding a, na vuaktanna tengteng amuhtheihna ding un akiang uah na vuaktanna ka hihlang ding hi.
26016038	Huan numei pasal khen a, amah ta sisan suah tungthu a bang in ka hon vaihawmkhum ding; hehna leh mullitna sisan na tung ah ka tungsak ding.
26016039	Akhut uah ka hon pe dia, na mun kidohte ahihpuk ding ua, na mun sangte achimsak ding ua; na puansilhte asuah ding ua, na suangmantamte ahon sut ding ua, savuak leh vuaktang in ahon nuse ding uh.
26016040	Na tung ah mipi akaikhawm ding ua, suang in ahon deng ding ua, namsau in ahon kui pailet ding uhi.
26016041	Na innte mei in ahal ding ua, numei tampi mitmuh in na tung ah vaihawmna atangtungsak ding ua; na hukna ka tawpsak ding a, loh leng na peta kei ding hi.
26016042	Huchi in ka hehna na tung ah ka lungdamsak ding a, ka hon mullitna adaita ding, ka dai dide dia, ka heh ngei nawn kei ding hi.
26016043	Na tuailai nite na theihgige louh a, hiai thilte a na hon vuisak zawk ziak in, ngai in, na tatdan dan, na tung ah ka tun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huan na kihhuaina tengteng behlap in hiai hukna na hih nawn kei ding hi.
26016044	“Ngai in, paunak zang peuhmah in hiai paunak azang ding uh, ‘Atanu in anu asuun,’ chih.
26016045	Na nu, amah pasal leh tate mudahnu tanu na hi a, kitanauna lam ah bel, ama pasal leh tate mudahnu tanau na hi; na nu Hit mi ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi.
26016046	“Huan na tanau, na u Samaria, na veilam a teng amah leh atanute toh ahi uh; na tanau, na nau, na taklam a teng Sodom leh atanute ahi uhi.
26016047	Himahleh amau omdan na zui kei a, akihhuaina bang uh na hih kei na a, na omdan tengteng a na thulim louh zawkdan ngaihtuah in huaite bangmah tham ahi kei hi.
26016048	“Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, nang leh na tate'n ahih bang uh na tanau Sodom leh atanute'n leng ahih het kei uh.
26016049	Na tanau Sodom thulimlouhna hiaite ahi: kisaktheihna, nekvah luatnate, amah leh atanute nuamtat mawkmawkte, migentheite leh tasamte apanpih tuan sam kei uh.
26016050	Huan mi uang ahi ua, ka ma a thilkihhuai hihsa ahi uh; huchi in hoih ka sak bang in ka hihmangta ahi.
26016051	“Samaria in na khelhna kimkhat leng ahih sam kei; amau sang a na kihhuainate na nak hih zawk ziak in na hihsa na kihhuaina tengteng in na sanggamnute siam na tangsak hi.
26016052	Na sanggamnute dikzaw a na suklat ziak in nangmah in na zahlakna na puak ding ahi; amau sang in thilkihhuai uangzawte na hih a, na khelhnate ziak in amau nang sang in adiktatzaw uhi; ahi, na sanggamnute siam na tansakna ah nang anen-aham in zahlakna na tang ding ahi.
26016053	“Huan a-omdan uh, Sodom leh atanu omdante, Samaria leh atanu omdante, amaute toh ton in nang omdan mahmah ka hei ding.
26016054	Amau a dia lungmuanna na na hih sekna a na thilhihsa tengteng ziak a na zumtheihna ding in.
26016055	Huan na sanggamnute, Sodom leh atanute, Samaria leh atanute a-omdan uh masa bang in a-om nawn ding ua; nang leh na tanu leng na omdan uh masa bang in na om nawn ding uh.
26016056	Na thulimlouhna muhkhiak a hih ma a na kihih thupi nite in na sanggamnu Sodom na kamse khuahna ahi sek kei maw?
26016057	Tu'n zaw Siria tanu leh akim a mi tengteng, Philistia tanute na kim a hon simmoh mite'n ahon genseta uhi.
26016058	Na hukna leh na kihhuaina na po zel ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.
26016059	Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Thukhun bohsia in thuchiam na khawksak louhdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hih tei sin ahi.
26016060	Himahleh na naupan lai a na kiang a ka thukhun ka theigige ding a, na kiang ah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding hi.
26016061	Huchi in na sanggamnute ka pom hun chiang in na omdante na hon theikhe ding a, na kizumpih ding; amau lah na tanu ding in ka hon pia hi, na thukhun ziak bel hilou in.
26016062	Na kiang a ka thukhun ka hihkip ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh.
26016063	Na thilhih tengteng ka hon ngaihdam vek hun chiang in na theihgigena na zum ziak a na kam kat nawnlouhna ding in,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26017001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah:
26017002	“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah thuhaksa bawlkhia inla, gentehna in gen in,
26017003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, chi in; Muvanlai lianpi, kha zapi, khaveng saupi gial em-um, mul bittak Lebanon tang ah aleng a, sidar sing zik atuah hi.
26017004	Ahiang ziknou pen akitan a, mi vialvakna gam ah alenpih a, sumsinna khopi ah aphut hi.
26017005	Huai gam haichi leng atuah a, lei hoih ah apawipou a, tui tampi gei ah aphut a, muisum sing bang in aphut hi.
26017006	Huan akhang a, grepgui niam bilbial ahong hi a, selnoute ahon suah a, ahiangte ahong dawn hi.
26017007	“Muvanlai lianpi dang a-om nawn a, kha zapi leh mul bittak anei a, ngai in, hiai grep kung amah lam ah azung azam a; asuanna mun a kipan in amah lam ah hiangte apoukhia a, amah tui a avaktheihna ding in.
26017008	Hiangte asuah a, grep hoihtak ahihtheihna ding in tui tampi gei a lei hoih aphuh ahi.”
26017009	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Apiching den dia hia? Avuai maimah theihna ding in anahte satkhia in, azung toh abotkhe kei dia hia? Anah sel thak tengteng in leng avuailoh ding; azung toh botkhe ding in thilhihtheihna thupitak hiam, muvanlai tampi akiphamoh tuan kei dia hia?
26017010	“Ahi, ngai in, phuh hileh leng apiching den dia hia? Suahlam huih in ahon nuai hun chiang in avuai khin maimah kei dia hia? Apouna mun mah ah avuai maimah ding chi in,” achi a.
26017011	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah:
26017012	“Helhat inkote kiang ah gen in, hiai thil omdan athei kei ua hia? Hilh in, ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Jerusalem ah ahong pai a,
26017013	akumpipa uleh aheutu uh aman a, amah kiang ah Babulon ah api a, akumpipa uh suan khat aman a, thukhun abawlpih a, thu achiam teitei a, gam a miliante apimang vek a,
26017014	alalna gam akeniam a, amah a adinkhiak theih nawnlouhna ding in athukhun len kawm kia a adintheihna ding in.
26017015	Himahleh sakolte leh mi tampi hon sawl ding a ngen ding in Aigupta gam a palai sawl in atung ah ahelta hi. Alohching ding hia? Hichibang hihmi asuakta ding hia? Thukhun hihse ngal in apawtkhe thou ding hia?”
26017016	Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; kumpipa, kumpipa dia bawlpa tenna ngei ah akichiamnate musit leh athukhunte bohsia a, amah kiang mahmah ah Babulon ah asi ding hi.
26017017	Mi tampi hihlup ding a mual pawngte leh kulhte abawl hun chiang un leng Pharaoh sepaihhon leh pawl thupi mahmah leng bangmah ahihsak thei kei ding uh.
26017018	Thukhun bohsia in kichiamna amusitta ngal ua; thu akichiam nung in hiai thil tengteng ahih nawn a, asuakta peuhmah kei ding hi.
26017019	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka kichiamna amusit a, ka thukhun abohsia a, kei ka hin bang in, ama tung ah ka bung ngeingei ding hi.
26017020	Len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang ah a-awk ding a, Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, huchi in abohsiatna, ka tung ngei a abohsiatnate ziak in amah ka sual ding.
26017021	Huan apawl tengteng a taikekte tengteng namsau in asi ding ua, a-omlaite kawlmong chih ah adalh ding uh; huan kei Toupa'n ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh.
26017022	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sidar sang mahmah dawn ke'n ka la ding a, ka phut ding; azikpi pen aziknou ka khiak ding a, tang sang kidoh ah ka phut ding.
26017023	Israel sanna tang ah ka phut ding a, hiangte ahong sel ding ua, ahong gah ding, sidar thupitak ahi ding; anuai ah tungleng vasa chi chih ateng ding ua, ahiang liimte ah a-om ding uh.
26017024	Huan gam sing tengteng in kei Toupa'n sing sangte ka niamsak a, sing niamte ka sangsak a, sing hingte ka keusak a, sing keute ka hingphasak a, ka chi nalai hi,” achi hi. Kei Toupa'n ka genta a, ka gen bang in ka hih ding hi.
26018001	Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi.
26018002	“Israel gam tungtang a hiai paunak azat uh bang chihna ahia, ‘Pate'n grep thuk ane ua, atate uh ha azau hi, chih?’
26018003	“Kei ka hin bang in, Israel ah hiai paunak zat nawn chih na nei kei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26018004	Ngai un, hinna tengteng kei a vek ahi, pa hinna kei a ahih bangmah in tapa hinna leng kei a ahi; kha khial peuhmah asi ding.
26018005	“Himahleh mi adiktat a, siang leh dik ahih a,
26018006	mun sangte a ne lou a, Israel inkote milim lam nga sam lou a, numei kizen lou leng naih lou a, kuamah tung a thil hihkhial lou a,
26018007	leibami thil khamna koih pe kik zaw a, kuamah hiamgam a lok lou a, gilkial kiang a nek ding pia a, vuaktang puan silhsak a;
26018008	apung delh ding a leitawisak lou a, asumpung leng la sam lou a, thil gilou hih dia akhut kidek a, mi leh mi kikal a diktak a vai hawmsak a;
26018009	ka dan bawlte zui a, diktak a hih a, ka vaihawmnate azuihleh, amah midiktat ahi a, ahing ngei ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26018010	“Himahleh ama'n tapa guktak ching asuan a, sisan suahmi ahih a, hiai bang ahih a,
26018011	ahih ding zaw pen ahih louh a, mun sangte a anek zawk a, invengte zi ahihbuah a,
26018012	genthei leh tasamte asimmoh a, aloh a, akhamna koih apiak louh a, milimte lam nga, thilkihhuai ahih hi.
26018013	Apung delh a apiak a, apung alakleh, ahing ding hia? Ahing het kei ding; hiai thilkihhuai tengteng ahihta a, asi ngeingei ding, amah sisan moh ama tung ah atu ding ahi.
26018014	“Huan ngai in, tapa na nei tei taleh, apa thil gilou hihsa tengteng amuh a, lau a,
26018015	huchibang ahih teitei louh a, mun sang a anek louh a, Israel inkote milim lamte angat louh a, invengte zi ahihnit louh a,
26018016	kuamah tung a thil ahihkhelh louh a, khamna koih bangmah la lou a, kuamah lok lou a, gilkialte nek ding pe zaw a, savuakte asilhsak a;
26018017	genthei lak a akhut akideksak a, anou leh apung la lou a, ka thupiakte zang a ka dan bawlte zuimi ahihleh, apa thulimlouhna ziak in asi kei ding a, ahing zaw ngei ding hi.
26018018	Apa bel kheltak a mi nuaisiah a, a-unaupa hiamgamtak a sual a, amite lak a thil hoih lou ahih ziak in, ngai in, athulimlouhna ziak in asi ding ahi.
26018019	“Himahleh, bangziak a tapa in apa thulimlouhna thuak lou ding, na chi nak uh? Tapa in dan azuih a thil kizen ahih a, ka dan bawl tengteng azuih a, ahih laileh, ahing ngeingei ding hi.
26018020	Kha khial asi ding; tapa in apa thulimlouhna athuak kei ding a, pa in leng tapa thulimlouhna athuak sam kei ding; midiktat diktatna amah mah tung ah a-om ding, migilou gitlouhna amah mah tung ah a-om ding hi.
26018021	“Himahleh, migilou in akhelhna hih tengteng alehngatsan a, ka dan bawlte azuih a, dan zui a thil diktat ahihleh ahing ngei ding a, asi kei ding.
26018022	Tatlekna a na hihsa theihsak ahita kei ding; ana hihsa adiktatna ah ahing ding,
26018023	Migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei a hia? Alampite alehngatsan a, ahong hin ding chih louh ngal? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26018024	“Himahleh midiktat in adiktatna lampi alehngatsan a, thulimlouhna ahih a, migiloute hih bang zel a thilkihhuaite ahih in ahing dia hia? Athil diktat hihsa bangpeuh leng theihgige ahi nawnta kei ding a, atatlekna hih ah leh akhelhna hih ah, huai mahmah ah asi ding hi.
26018025	“Hinapi in, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei hi, na chi sek uh. Israel inkote aw, ngai un; ka hihdan akibang gige kei maw? Na hihdan uh akibang kei gige zaw ahi kei maw?
26018026	Midiktat in adiktatnate alehngatsan a, thulimlouhnate ahihleh huai ah asi ding a, thulimlouhna ahih ah asi ding.
26018027	Huai lou leng, migilou in akhelhna ahihsate lehngatsan a, dan azuih a, thil diktat ahihleh ahinna ahumbit ding.
26018028	Akingaihtuah a, atatlekna a hihsa tengteng alehngatsan ziak in ahing ngei ding, asi kei ding hi.
26018029	Hinapi in Israel inkote'n, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei, achi uhi. Aw Israel inkote aw, ka hihdante kibang gige ahi zaw kei maw?
26018030	“Huaiziak in aw Israel inkote aw, michih, noumau hihdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Kihei unla, na tatlekna tengtengte uh lehngatsan un; huchi in thulimlouhna na puksiatna uh ahi kei ding hi.
26018031	Na tatlekna tengteng uh, na tatleksate uh paimang vek unla, lungtang thak leh lungsim thak kibawl un! Israel inkote aw, bangziak a si ding na hi ua?
26018032	Mi sihna ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; huaiziak in kihei unla, hing un.”
26019001	Huai lou in leng Israel heutute tungtang ah suunna la phuah ahi;
26019002	Na nu bang ahia ahih? Humpinelkaipi ahi! Humpinelkaite lak ah akual a, humpinelkai lunlaite lak ah anoute avaklian hi.
26019003	Huan anoute lak ah khat avaktei a; humpinelkai lun lai ahong hi; samat asiam a, mite anegai hi.
26019004	Namte'n leng atanchin aza ua; akokhuk uah mat in a-om; huan Aigupta gam ah sikkawi in amah api uh.
26019005	Huchi in angak a, alametna avuaksuak chih atheih in, anoute lak ah khat ala a, humpinelkai lun lai in abawl hi.
26019006	Humpinelkai lak ah apaisuk paitou a, humpinelkai lun lai ahong hi a; samat asiam a, mite anegai hi.
26019007	Ama'n a-inpi kisesate uh athei a, akhopite uh ahihgawp a, gam asegawp a, ahumham husa ziak in, huai a tengteng.
26019008	Huchi in bialte a kipan in ning chih a namte'n amah adou ua; atung ah alen uh azak ua; akokhuk uah mat in a-omta hi.
26019009	Sikkawite in bawm sung ah akoih ua; Babulon kumpipa kiang ah api ua; kulh muanhuaite sung ah apilut uh; huchi a Israel tang sangte tung a aw akizak nawnlouhna ding in.
26019010	Na nu na sisan a grepgui bang ahi, tuite kiang a suan; tui tampite ziak in gahpha leh hiangte in adim.
26019011	Huan vaihawmna pote lalchiang sikchiang khauh a nei in, nah bawkpha lak ah asandan uh hihsang in a-om hi, huchi in ahiang tampite uh toh sangpi amuh in a-om uhi.
26019012	Himahleh thangpaihna a bohkhiak in a-om a, lei ah paihkhiak in a-om a, suahlam huih in agah amutkeu a; akung khauhte kitan in akeu a; mei in amaute akang beita.
26019013	Huan tu in gamdai ah, gamkeu leh tui om lou ah phuh in a-om.
26019014	Huchi in ahiang a sikchiang a pan mei apaikhia, agah ahulbei a, huchi in amah ah vaihawm ding in lalchiang ding sikchiang khauh a-om kei hi. Hiai kahla ahi, kahla a dia sak ahi ding hi.
26020001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sagihna, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawm ni in Israel Upa kuate hiam Toupa thu dong ding in ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu uhi.
26020002	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah,
26020003	“Mihing tapa, Israel upate houpih inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Kei thudong dia hong pai na hi uh hia? Kei ka hin bang in, noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26020004	Amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia, mihing tapa, amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia? Apate uh kihhuainate thei uh hen.
26020005	Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte ka tel ni a Jakob inkote telte kiang ah ban zak hial a Aigupta gam a akiang ua ka kitheihsak a, akiang ua ka khut ka zak a, Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka chih.
26020006	Huai ni a Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia a, amah a dia gam kham, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen a pilut ding a ka khut ka zak ni in akiang uah:
26020007	Michih in na mit ua muh thilkihhuai paimang unla, Aigupta gam a milimte in kihihnin kei un, kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chi in ka gen hi.
26020008	Himahleh, ka tung ah ahel ua, hon limsak kei ua, michih in amit ua muh thilkihhuaite leng apaimang kei ua, Aigupta milimte leng alehngatsan sam kei uh. Huai ah atung ua ka hehna lungdamsak ding in Aigupta gamsung ngei ah atung uah ka hehna ka leihbo kei na diam, ka chi hi.
26020009	Himahleh, keimah min ziak in ka gamtang zawta a, a-omna namte uh mitmuh in Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia in akiang uah ka kitheisakta; huai namte mitmuh a ka min gensiat a a-omlouhna ding in.
26020010	Huchi in Aigupta gam pawtsan ding in ka chita a, gamdai ah ka hon pilut hi.
26020011	Ka dan bawlte amaute ka pia a, ka dan thukhunte ka ensak a, huai tuh mi'n azuih ua ahinna ding un.
26020012	Huai lou leng kei leh amaute kikal achiamtehna ding in ka Sabbathte amau ka pia a, kei Toupa , amaute koihtuampa ka hi chih atheihtheihna ding un.
26020013	Himahleh Israel inkote gamdai ah ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak uh apaikhia ua, nakpitak in ka Sabbath abohsia ua; huchi in gamdai ah amaute hihmang ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na diam aw, ka chi hi.
26020014	Ka pikhiak lai in athei mite nam mahmah mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta hi.
26020015	Huai lou in huai gamdai ah ka gam piak, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen ah ka pilut kei ding, ban zak hial in ka chi hi.
26020016	Ka thugelhte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka Sabbathte abohsiat ziak un; alungtang un amilimte uh azui uhi.
26020017	Himahleh hihmang lou ding in ka mit in amuh maihta a, gam ah leng ka hihmang vekta kei hi.
26020018	Huan gamdai ah atate uh kiang ah: Na pipute uh dan bawl zui kei unla, athugelte uh zui kei unla, amilimte un kihihnin sam kei un;
26020019	Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka dan bawlte zui unla, ka thugelte vom unla, zui un.
26020020	Ka Sabbath tang unla, kei leh noute kikal a chiamtehna ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi chih na theihna ding un, ka chi hi.
26020021	Himahleh atate uh ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan thukhunte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak, zui ding in avom sam kei uh. Sabbath ni abohseta ua; gamdai ah ka hehna lungdamsak ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na hiam, ka chi hi.
26020022	Himahleh ka khut ka kideksak a, ka pikhiak lai athei mite nam ngei mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta ahi.
26020023	Huai lou leng, namte lak ah amau ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding, gamdai ah ban zak hial in ka na chi hi.
26020024	Ka thugelte zui lou a, ka dan bawlte paikhia a, ka Sabbath ni bohsia a, apipute uh milim lam angat ziak un.
26020025	Huai lou leng, dan bawlhoih lou ka pia a, ahinlouhna ding ua thugelte toh;
26020026	athiltan uh, sul hong tengtengte'n mei a apaihna uah amaute ka hihnin a, ka lungzuangsak a, atawp a Toupa ka hi chih atheihna ding un.
26020027	Huaiziak in mihing tapa, akiang uah thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pate un hiaite ah ahon gense lailai uhi, ka tung a tatlekna thil ahihte uah.
26020028	Ban zak hial a amaute ka chiam gam ah ka hon pilut in, mual sang leh singbuk lian amuh peuhmah uah akithoihnate uh alan ua, athillat uh hehhuai mahmahte apia uh. Agimlimte uh abawl ua, adawn ding thillatte uh abungkhia uh,” chi in.
26020029	Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, mun sang a na hoh nak uh bang na chihna uh ahia? ka chi a; huchi in amin a ding in tuni tan in, Bamah, chih ahita hi.
26020030	Huchi in Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh bang zel in noumau na kihihnin un akihhuaina bang un hupmang na hi ding uh maw?
26020031	Na thil tan uh na lan un, na tate uh mei ah na pai ua, tuni tan in na milimte tengteng un na kihihnin uh ahi kei maw? Noute thudot ding ka hi a hia, aw Israel inkote aw? Kei ka hin bang in noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26020032	I kim ua namdang pau tuam mite bang a singbul suangbul be ding i hi uh, na lungsim ua na chih uh, atangtung himhim kei ding.
26020033	Kei ka hin bang in, khut thagui hattak in, ban zak kawm leh heh suah in na tung uah vai ka hawm ngeingei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26020034	Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, dalhsak a na omna gam ua kipan khut hattak leh ban zak leh heh suah in ka hon pikhawm ding.
26020035	Pau tuam mite gamdai gam ah ka hon pilut ding a, kimaituah in i kisual ding uh.
26020036	Aigupta gam gamdai a na pipute uh ka sual bangtak in nou leng ka hon sual ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26020037	Chiang nuai ah ka hon lutsak ding a, thukhun delhkhumna nuai ah ka hon pilut ding hi;
26020038	Huan na lak ua kipan mihelte leh ka tung a talek mite ka khuahsiang ding a, a-omna gam ua kipan in ka pikhe ding a, himahleh Israel gam ah alut het kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26020039	Noute ahihleh, Aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak kei uleh tunung chiang in na milim nna uh sem chiat maita unla; himahleh ka min siangthou bel na thilpiakte uleh na milimte un na hihninta kei ding uhi.
26020040	Ka tang siangthou, Israel sanna tang ah, huai ah Israel inkote tengteng in avek un, huai gam ah ka nna asem ding uh; huai ah amaute ka paktata dia, huai ah na thillatte uh na thilpiak hoih tatate uh, na thil tan tengteng uh ka deihta ding.
26020041	Namte lak a kipan ka hon lakkhiak hun chiang in leh gam chih a na dalhna ua kipan ka hon pikhawm hun chiang in, gimlim ding in noute ka hon sangta ding a, namte mitmuh in noute ah ka sianthoudan alangta ding, Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
26020042	Huan Israel gam, ban zak hial a na pipute uh piak ka chiam gam a noute ka hon pilut hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26020043	Huan huai ah na omdante uleh na thilhih uh, na kihihnitna tengteng uh na theita ding uh; huchi in na thil hoih lou hih tengtengte uh ziak in noute mitmuh ngei in na kihta ding uhi.
26020044	Na omdan hoihloute uh bang hilou a, na thilhih uh thulimloute bang leng hi sam lou a, ka min ziak a noute ka hon pichinsak hun chiang in, aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in.
26020045	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26020046	“Mihing tapa, simlam masuan inla, simlam nga in na thu khah inla, simlam gammangpi lam ah thu gen inla,
26020047	simlam gammangpi kiang ah, Toupa thu ngai in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, nang ah mei ka toh ding a, nang ah sing hing tengteng akangbei ding a, sing keu peuhmah leng; meikuang luahluah adai kei ding, sim a kipan mal tanpha in, matuah teng akangvom ding hi.
26020048	Huan mi tengteng in kei Toupa meikhahpa ka hi chih amu ding ua, amit kei ding, chi in,” achi hi.
26020049	Huchi in ke'n, “Ah! Toupa Pathian , gentehna thugenmi lel ahi kei maw? ahon chi ding uh,” ka chi hi.
26021001	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah,
26021002	“Mihing tapa, Jerusalem maituah inla, amun siangthou lam nga in na thu gen inla, Israel gam tung ah thu gen in;
26021003	Israel gam kiang ah, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi: Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi, ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ding a, na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou kibang sap in ka phuk ding.
26021004	Huchi in na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou ka phuk ding ziak in ka namsau apai a kipan apawt ding a, simlam a kipan mallam pha in mihing tengteng aphuk ding hi.
26021005	Huchi in mi tengteng in, kei Toupa'n ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ahi chih athei ding uh, akikhum ngei nawnta kei ding hi.”
26021006	Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, thum huthut inla khasetak in amitmuh un thum in.
26021007	Huan “Bangziak a thum na hia?” ahon chih uleh, “Thuthang ziak in ahi, ahong tung sin ngal a, huai hun in lungtang chiteng azul ding a, khut tengteng azaw ding a, lungsim teng abah ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in azaw ding a; ngai in, ahong tung hi, atangtun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.
26021008	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah,
26021009	“Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi:
26021010	“Namsau, namsau tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahita, mi satna ding a tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahi, khophia bang in! I nuamsa lailai ding maw? ka tapa, chiang na simmoh, sing a bawl peuhmah toh,
26021011	tetsak ahi, khut a let ding in ahi namsau tat-hiam tetsak ahi, thatmi khut a tuang ding in.
26021012	Mihing tapa, kikou inla; sehal ham in, ka mite tung ahi ngal a; Israel miliante teng tung mahmah; piak ahi ua, ka mite toh, namsau nuai ah; huaiziak in kikou inla, na pheipi beng in.
26021013	Hiai namsau midang tung a chiamtehsa ahi ngal a, na ngaihsak kei hitaleh bang suak ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi.”
26021014	“Huaiziak in nang, mihing tapa, khut beng hial in thu gen in; thah a om dingte a ding namsau nihvei liksuk in om hen, ahi, thumvei; tampi thahna ding namsau ahi.
26021015	Lungtang zul, apukna uh apunna ding in, namsaute kongbiang teng ah ka giaksak hi; Ah! Khophia bang in ate zolzol, sihna namsau.
26021016	Nakpi'n gamtang in, taklam ah, gamtang in veilam ah leng van zel inla, na mazawn peuhmah ah leng.
26021017	Ke'n leng khut ka beng ding a, ka tangtun ngei ding, ka hehna, kei Toupa'n hiai ka genta hi, chi in,” achi hi.
26021018	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26021019	“Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa namsau hong tuntheihna ding in lampi nih na bawl in; huai lampi nihte gam khat a kipan in ahong pawtkhe ding uh ahi; lampi kawkmuhna bawl inla, kho pilut na khomual ah bawl in.
26021020	Ammon mite khua Rabbah a namsau ahong tuntheihna ding in lampi sep inla, Judah gam lai Jerusalem kulh ah leng.
26021021	Ai san ding in Babulon kumpipa lampi ka ah adingh a, lampi nih kigawmna tak ah; thalte asing loklok a terephim adong a, sa sin a-en hi.
26021022	A-aisanna ah akhut taklam ah Jerusalem ana tuang a, kulh suksiatnate galsual awng zuazuate, kongpi zawn a kulh suksiatnate, mual pawngsunte, kulh bawlte toh.
26021023	Aisan vuaksuak lel bang ahi a, himahleh mat a a-omna ding ua athulimlouhna uh theihkhiakna lel ding ahi.”
26021024	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Theihgigena ding a na thulimlouhna uh na bawl ziak un na tatleknate uh ahong kilang, na thilhih tengteng uah na khelhnate uh akimu kilkel a, theihkhiak na hong hih tak ziak un khut a mat na hong hi ding uhi.
26021025	Huan nang, Israel heutu, migilou si ding a liampa, na gitlouhna gawtna tawp ni ahong tung e;
26021026	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Heutu lukhu paihsak unla, lallukhu suhsak un, hiai angei in a-om kei ding; mivuallelte tawisang unla, miliante vuallelsak un.
26021027	Ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding; hiai leng angei in a-om kei ding, aneimi diktak ahong pai mateng amah ka pe ding hi.”
26021028	Huan nang mihing tapa, thu gen inla, hichi in chi in; Toupa Pathian in Ammon tate tungtang ah leh agensiatna thu uah hichi in achi: “Namsau, namsau phawi ahita, mithahna ding leh hihmanna ding khophia bang a tetsak ahita.
26021029	“Kilakna taklou nang ahon musak ua, zuau in ai ahon sansak ua, namsau bel migilou si ding a liam, agitlouhna ni uh tawp hong tung dingte ngawng ah na golh ding, ahon chih un azuau uh ahi.
26021030	Apai ah thun in. Na pianna siam a na omna gam ngei ah na thu ka ngaihtuah ding.
26021031	Na tung ah ka hehna ka sung dia, ka thangpaihna mei na tung ah ka toh ding, minunsetak, hihman siamtak khut ah ka hon mansak ding.
26021032	Mei a khul ding na hi ding a, gam lai ah na sisan abo ding a, theih mahmah na hita kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka genta ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.
26022001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26022002	“Nang mihing tapa, sisan suah hat khopi na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Akihhuaina tengteng theisak dih ve.
26022003	Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Khopi, ahun hong tunna ding a amah sung a sisan suah leh amah kihihnin ding a milim bawl!
26022004	Na sisan suahna ah mohna na pua a, na milim bawl ah na kihihnin ahi; na hunte na naisak a, na kumte na tung phialphial a; huaiziak in namte kiang ah gensiat ding leh gam tengteng engbawl ding in ka hon bawl ahi.
26022005	Nang naih a om mite leh gamla a om mite'n ahon simmoh ding ua, nang, minsiat pua leh buaina a dimmi;
26022006	Ngai in, Israel heutute michih in athilhihtheihna bang zel ua sisan suah mai ding in nangmah ah a-om uhi.
26022007	Nang ah mi'n nu leh pate amusit ua, nang ah mikhualte anuaisiah ua, nang ah tagahte leh meithaite amawkbawl uh.
26022008	Ka thiltante na musit a, ka Sabbathte na bohsia hi.
26022009	Nang ah sisan suah ding in mi hekhatte a-om ua, nang ah tang sang a nete a-om ua, nang ah hukna aching uh.
26022010	Nang ah apate uh vuaktanna lemsak a-om ua, nang ah numei kizen louh lai kithuahpih a-om uh.
26022011	Huan mi'n a-inveng' zi tung ah thilkihhuai ahih a, midang in huktak in amou ahihnin a, midang in nang ah asanggamnu, apa tanu ngei azahlaksak hi.
26022012	Nang ah sisan suah ding in golhna ala ua, anou leh apung na la a; na inveng nuaisiah in huaihamtak in na lepguksak hi; kei mahmah leng na hon mangngilh a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26022013	“Huaiziak in ngai in, na lepgukna thu ah, nang a sisan pawt thu ah khut ka hon betkhum ding.
26022014	Nang ka hon sual ni chiang in na lungtang in athuakzou in na khut ahat thei diam maw? Kei Toupa ngei in ka genta a, ka hih lai ding.
26022015	Huan namte lak ah ka hon hihdalh ding a, gam chih ah ka hon thehzak ding; nang a kipan in na nitnate ka hihmang vek ding.
26022016	Namte mitmuh in nangmah kihihnin na hi ding, huan, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding, chi in,” achi hi.
26022017	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26022018	“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote ei a ding in eksia lel ahong hita ua; avek un haltuina mei lai ah dalte, langvate, sikte, suante ahi ua, dangkasik eksia lel ahita uh.
26022019	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Eksia lel na hong hih ziak un, ngai un, Jerusalem lai ah ka hon khawm ahi.
26022020	Dangkasikte, dalte, sikte, suante, langvate haltuina mei a akoihkhawm ua, tuisak ding a atung a mei atoh bang un ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna ah nou ka hon khawm ding, huai ah ka hon koih ding a, ka hon tuisak ding.
26022021	Ahi, ka hon khawm ding a, na tung uah ka hehna mei ka toh ding a, alai ah na tui khin ding uhi.
26022022	Haltuina mei lai a dangkasik atui bang in nou leng, huai lai ah na tui khin ding uh, kei Toupa'n na tung uah ka hehna ka sung ahi chih na theita ding uh,” achi hi.
26022023	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, akiang ah gen inla,
26022024	gam khuahsiang louh hehna ni chia vuahtui tang lou na hi.
26022025	Humpinelkai in humham a samat azon bang mai in nang ah zawlnei sawmnate a-om ahi; mi hinnate ane khin ua, goute leh thil manphate alaksak ua, alai ah meithai tampi abawl uh.
26022026	Asiampute leng nakpitak in ka dan ah atalek ua, ka thil siangthoute ahihnin uh ahi, thiltante leh thil namai akhen kei ua, mite'n lah siangthou leh siangthou lou akhen tuan kei uh; ka Sabbathte akitheihmohbawl ua, alak uah hihminsiat in ka om hi.
26022027	Alai a heutute lah nge duhgawl nek ding zong bang lel ahi ua, sisan suah a mi hinnate hihmang in ginom loutak a aleptheihna ding un.
26022028	Huan azawlneite un sunu in baang anuh ua, kilakna bangmah lou lel amu ua, zuau in ai asan ua, Toupa'n bangmah a gen louh in leng, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” achi uh.
26022029	“Gam a mipite'n nuaisiah aching ua, loh ahat ua, ahi, migenthei leh tasamte amawkbawl ua, dikloutak in mikhualte anuaisiah uhi.
26022030	Gam ka hihsiatlouhna ding in alak ua dai kai ding leh gam hum a ka ma a pang ding mi ka zong a, ka mu kei hi.
26022031	Huaiziak in atung uah ka hehna ka sungbota a, ka thangpaihna mei in ka halmangta ahi; a-omdan ngei uh atung uah ka tungsak ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.
26023001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26023002	“Mihing tapa, numei nih, nu khat ta a-om uhi.
26023003	Aigupta gam ah ahukmang ua, atuailai neu ua huk ahi ua, huai ah a-angnem uh azawtsak ua, atuailai nawi uh ameksak ek uhi.
26023004	Khat, a-upapen min Oholah ahi a, asanggamnu bel Oholibah ahi; huan kei a ahong hita ua, tapate tanute asuang ua. Amin uh, Oholah pen Samaria ahi a; Oholibah bel Jerusalem ahi.
26023005	Huan Oholah kei a ahih nung in ahukmang nawn a, adeihtak, a-invengte, Assuria anou a;
26023006	ukpipate, vaihawm mite, tangval iplahhuai mahmah ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, puan sandup a kizemte.
26023007	Hiai Assuria tangval hoihte tengteng lak ah akiphal vek ua, a-etlahte milim tengteng in akihihnin nawn behlap hi.
26023008	Atuailai neu a kipan anawite ameksak uh leh akithuahpih ziak un Aigupta a kipan in ahukna atawp tuan kei a, amau leng ahukna uh atung uah ahih pichin uhi.
26023009	Adeihtakte, Assuria, anouhnouhte khut ngei ah ka mansak ahi.
26023010	Hiaite'n avuaktanna alemdawk ua, atanu leh atapate alaksak ua, amah leng namsau in athat ua, numeite lak ah akikhemlauna pen uh ahong hita a, ama tung a gel bang amualsuahta hi.
26023011	“Huan asanggamnu Oholibah in hiai amu a, himahleh a-unu sang in adeihtak nouhnouhna ah a-uangzaw in, ahukna a-uang semsem lai hi.
26023012	Assuria mi, invengte gam ukpipa leh vaihawmpa tangval etlahhuaitak ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, kilawmtak a kivante anounou hi.
26023013	Hihnit in a-om chih ka mu a, anih un lam kibang atawn uhi.
26023014	“Huchi in ahuknate a-uangsak sem a, baang a pasal lim tuang, Kaldai mite lim, san-au tak a kizem,
26023015	akawng ah kawnggak agak a, dial kilawmtak khim in, avek ua milian bang in, Kaldai gam, apianna gam ua Babulon mite bangtakte amuh ziak in.
26023016	Amau amuhtak in anounou a, akiang uah Kaldai pha in mi asawl hi.
26023017	Huchi in Babulon mite akiang ah, kingaihna lupna ah ahong pai ua, ahukna un ahihnin ua, akihihbuah khinta ua, amau amah anel mahmah uhi.
26023018	Huchi in ahukna ahihlang a, avuaktanna alemsak a, asanggamnu a pan ka kiheisan bang in amah ka kiheisanta hi.
26023019	Himahleh atuailai a Aigupta gam a ahuk lai atheihgige ziak in ahuk semsem hi.
26023020	A-angkawmpihte van, sabiltung a bang mai ahi a, athilpawtte leng, sakolte a thilpawt bang mai ahi.
26023021	Huchibang in na tuailai hukna Aigupta min na tuailai nawite ahon khoihsak lai na theikhe nawnta ahi.”
26023022	Huaiziak in aw Oholibah, hichibang in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Ngai in, nang hon it, na lungsim in anelsate ka tamsak ding a, kil chih a kipan ka pikhawm ding.
26023023	Babulon mite leh Kaldai mi tengteng, Pekodte, Shoate, Koate leh akiang ua Assuria mite tengteng toh; tangval etlahhuai taktakte, ukpipate, vaihawm mite, avek un miliante leh minthangte, avek un sakol tung a tuang in ahong pai ding uhi.
26023024	Galvante, kidouna kangtalaite, kangtalaite leh mipi omkhawm in ahong sual ding ua; lum lian leh lum neu, dal lukhute toh na kim ah ahon um ding ua; akiang uah vaihawmna ka kemsak ding a, athugel bang zel un na tung ah ahihtangtung ding uhi.
26023025	Huan na tung ah ka lung hihlouhna ka tungsak ding a, heh mahmah in nang ahon sual ding ua, na nakte leh na bilte asatkhe ding ua, akhosuaksunte namsau in asi ding uh, na tanu leh na tapate ahon laksak ding ua, akhosuaksunte mei in akanglum ding uh.
26023026	Na puansilhte ahon hawksak lai ding ua, na kizepna kilawm taktakte alamang ding uh.
26023027	Na hukna leh Aigupta gam a kipan a na kizuakna ahon tawpsak ding ua, huchi in amau lam ah na mit na lengsak nawn kei dia, Aigupta gam na theigige nawn kei ding hi.”
26023028	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, na huat mahmah, nang hon chimtakte khut mahmah ah ka hon mansak ding.
26023029	Huat petmah in ahon ho ding ua, na sepgim gah tengteng ahon laksak ding ua, vuaktang in kihawmkhai in ahon taisan ding uh; na kizuakna vuaktanna, na hukna leh na kizuakna ngei hihlat in a-om ding hi.
26023030	Hiai thilte na tung ah ahong tung ding, namdangte delh in na hukmang ding a, amilimte ua na kihihnit ziak in.
26023031	Na sanggamnu lampi na tawn sam a, huaiziak in amah nou na khut ah ka hon pe ding.”
26023032	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na sanggamnu nou thuk leh lian na dawn ding a, nuihsan leh simmoh in na om ding;
26023033	Khamna leh lungkhamna in na dim dia, lamdangsakna leh siatna nou, na sanggamnu Samaria nou toh na dawn gai keuhkeuh ding hi.
26023034	Na dawn ding a, anou leng na tawpsiang vek ding; na sam na botkhe dia, na nawite na hamkek ding. Kei, Toupa Pathian in ka chita hi.”
26023035	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “N'on mangngilh a na hon na dal ziak in na hukna leh na kizuakna moh na po mai ding hi.”
26023036	Huai lou leng Toupa'n ka kiang ah agen nawn a, “Mihing tapa, Oholah leh Oholibah na langsin ahia? Akihhuaina uh akiang uah puang in.
26023037	Ang akawmta ua, akhut uah sisan abang a, amilim kiang ah ang akawmta uhi; atapate uh kei a dia asuan uh akiang ua kangmang ding in mei ah apai uhi.
26023038	Huai lou in leng, ka kiang ah hiai achi uhi; amau mah in ka Mun Siangthou ahihnin ua, ka Sabbathte leng abohsia uhi.
26023039	Amilimte uh a dia atate uh athah nung un, amau mah in ka mun siangthou hihnin ding in alut ua; ngai in, hichibang in ka insung mahmah ah ahih uhi.
26023040	“Huai lou leng, gamlapi a pan mi hong pai ding in na thukhak ua, mi na sawl ua, ngai in, ahong ua, amau hel in na kisilsiang a, na mit na nuh a, kizephoihna dangte na silh a, lupna thupitak ah na tu hi.
26023041	Ama ah dohkan na bawl a, ka gimlim leh ka sathaute huai ah na lui hi.
26023042	Huai ah mipi noptal husa zak ahi a, mi namai kia lou leng gamdai a kipan in zukhamte ahon pi ua, anih un taute abun ua, lukhu kilawmte akhu uhi.”
26023043	Huan ke'n, “Angkawmnu tek nung a kithuahpih nuam un, ama'n leng angap peuhmah diam maw?” ka chi hi.
26023044	“Huchi in kizuak kiang a ahoh bang un akiang ah alutta thou ua; huchi in numei huk Oholah leh Oholibah kiang ah alutta uhi.
