26023045	Himahleh midiktatte'n angkawmnute leh sisan suah hat numeite vai ahawm bang un ahawmsak ding ua, angkawmnute ahih ua, akhut ua sisan aban ziak in.”
26023046	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na tung uah mipi ka kaikhawm ding a, ka hon loksak ding a, ka hon bawlsak ding hi.
26023047	Mihonte'n suang in adeng ding ua, anamsau un asatlum ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh athat ding ua, a-innte uh ahalsak ding uh.
26023048	Hichibang in hukna gam a kipan ka hihmang ding a, numei tengteng in na hukna uh chin louh hial ding ahi chih na theihna ding un.
26023049	Huchi in na tung uah na hukna uh ahon thuk ding ua, na milim khelhnate uh na thuak ding uh, kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.
26024001	Akum kuana, akha sawmna, huai kha, ani sawm ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a,
26024002	“Mihing tapa, tuni ngei, hiai ni min ngei gelhkhia in. Hiai ni ngei in Babulon kumpipa'n Jerusalem ahong sual pan hi.
26024003	Huan helhat Inkote kiang ah gentehna thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:
26024004	“Sa uina bel suang inla, suang nilouh inla, asung ah tui sung in; sabakte kha inla, asa hoih tengteng, apheite, aliangte, aguhbawk hoih tata in hihdim in.
26024005	Ganhonte lak a ahoih tata la inla, anuai ah singkhuah khul ek inla, sou bolhbolh hen; ahi, aguhbomte ki-ui hen.”
26024006	Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi, sa uina bel, asung kanggem, agem dai ngei nai lou tung agik hi! Tel tuan lou in, asa bak khatkhat in thuk in.
26024007	Asisan suah amah tung ah a-om a, leivui vuhtheihna dia lei a sunbuak gen tak louh, suangpi keu tung ah asungbo zawta hi.
26024008	Phu la ding a hehna ahong kisaktheihna ding in vuh louh in asisan suah suangpi keu tung ah ka sung ahi.”
26024009	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi! Kei mahmah in ka vum venvon ding.
26024010	Singtum sevum venvon unla, mei chihsa unla, sate ui min unla, satui chiktak in, aguhte leng kangmang hen.
26024011	Huchi in bel avuak in meivu tung ah suan hi nilouh henla, ahong sa ding a, adal ahong am ding a, anitna ahong zulmang ding, akangkhem akatmang theihna ding in.
26024012	Chimtak khop a sual in leng akangkhem asiang tuan kei a, mei in leng akangsiang sam kei hi.
26024013	Na nitna hukna ahi a, ka hon khuah a, na sian tuan louh ziak in na tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak mateng chik mah chiang in na nitna a kipan khuahsiang na hi nawnta kei ding hi.
26024014	Kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi, ahong tung mahmah ding, ke'n ka hih ding, ka nungkin kei ding a, ka hawi sam kei ding a, ka lunghei sam kei ding; na omdante leh na thilhih bang zel in vai ahon hawmsak ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.
26024015	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26024016	“Mihing tapa, ngai in, thakhat in na mittaina pen ka hon laksak ding a, na suun ding ahi kei dia, na kah ding leng ahi sam kei, na khitui leng akiak ding ahi kei hi.
26024017	Asim in thum inla, misi suunna nei ke'n, na dial khim inla, na khedap bun inla, na muk hum ke'nla, mite an leng ne ke'n,” achi hi.
26024018	Huchi in zingsang lam in mipite kiang ah thu ka gen a, nitaklam in ka zi asi maimah a; zingsang lam in ahon thupiak bang in ka hih hi.
26024019	Mite'n ka kiang ah, hichibang na thilhihte kou ding in bang ahia ahih na hon hilh kei dia hia? achi uhi.
26024020	Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a.
26024021	Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ka mun siangthou, na hatna suan pen uh, na mittaina pen uh, na deihlam pen uh ka hihnin ding hi; na tanute uh; na tapate uh, nunglam a na nutsiatte uh namsau in apuk ding uh.
26024022	Ka hih bang geih in na hih tei ding uhi; na muk uh na hum kei ding ua, mite an leng na ne sam kei ding uh.
26024023	Na dialte uh leng na khim ding ua, na khedap uh na bun ding ua; na suun kei ding ua, na kap sam kei ding ua, na thulimlouhnate uah na mangthang ding ua, na kikahtuah ding uhi.
26024024	Hichibang in Ezekiel, nou a ding in etsakna ahi ding a, ahihdan bang zel in na hih ding uh ahi; hiai ahong tun hun chiang in Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh, chi ahi, ka chi hi.
26024025	“Huan nang mihing tapa, amau a kipan ahatnate uh, athupi kipahnate uh, amit tainapente uh, alunglutna pente uh, atanu uleh atapate uh ka lakmang ni chiang in,
26024026	huai ni mahmah chiang in na kiang ah taikhemi hong pai in, ahong theisak kei ding ua hia?
26024027	Huai ni chiang in taikhemi kiang ah na kam na ka ding a, akiang ah thu na gen ding a, na dai maimah kei ding; huchi in amaute a ding in etsakna na hi ding a; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.
26025001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah;
26025002	“Mihing tapa, Ammon tate masuan inla, atungtang thu uh gen in.
26025003	Ammon tate kiang ah, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia unla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka mun siangthou hihnit a om a, Israel gam hihgawp a a-om a, Judah Inkote sal a pi a a-om lai ua, ‘Awi ing e!’ na chih ziak in,
26025004	ngai in, suahlam mite kiang ah ahon tan ding un ka hon pe ding ahi; nang ah buk akoih ding ua, nang ah tenna abawl ding uh; na theigahte ane ding ua, na nawitui adawn ding uh.
26025005	Rabbah khua sangawngsau inn ding in ka bawl dia, Ammon tate mun ganhon kualna mun ding in ka bawl ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.”
26025006	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel gam tung a na khut na bet a, na khe na pek a, lungsim tengteng a asiatna tung a na kipah ziak in,
26025007	ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, namte kiang ah gallak ding in ka hon mansak ding a; mite a kipan ka hon phuk ding a, huai gam a kipan in ka hon hihmang vengveng ding, ka hon hihse ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding,” chi in.
26025008	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Moab leh Seir in, ngai in, Judah inkote namdang bang ahi uh, achih ziak un.
26025009	Moab pang khat, khopite lam pang, gamgi zul a khopi, agam thupina pente, Beth-zeshimot, Baal-meon leh Kiriathaim lam pang ka hong ding a,
26025010	suahlam tate tan ding in Ammon tate toh ka pe ding a, namte lak a Ammon tate theihgige ahih nawnlouhna ding un.
26025011	Moab gam tung ah thu gel ka tangtungsak ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.
26025012	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Edom in Judah inkote tung a phuba la in nakpitak in thil ahihkhial hi, amah thu kia a atung ua phu alak ziak in.
26025013	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Edom tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, alak ua kipan mi leh sate ka phukmang vek ding; Teman a kipan in ka hihgawp ding a; Dedan pha in namsau in asi ding uh.
26025014	Huchi in ka mi Israelte khut in ka phulakna ka tungsak ding a, Edom tung ah ka hehna bang zel leh ka thangpaihna bang zel in ahih ding ua, ka phulakna ana thei ding uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26025015	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Philistia mite'n phu la a, tangtawn kimelmakna a, mi hihman utna lungsim sia pu a phu alak ziak un.
26025016	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, ngai in, Philistia mite tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Kareth khomite ka phuk vek ding a, tui gei a mi omsunte ka hihmang vek ding.
26025017	Huan heh mahmah in sal in atung uah phu ka la ding a, huchi a atung ua ka phulakna ka tunsak hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi.
26026001	Akum sawm-le-khatna huai kha ani masapen in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26026002	“Mihing tapa, Tura in Jerusalem tungthu a, ‘Nuam e! Namte kongkhak aseta, kei lam ah akihong, hihsiatgawp a a-om vek ziak in, ka tan hoih ding ahita,’ ”
26026003	huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai in, aw Tura, ka hon dou ahi, tuipi in tuihualte avoktouh bang mai in na tung a hong pai ding in nam tampi ka hon sawl ding.
26026004	Huchi in Tura kulhte ahihse ding ua, a-insangte achimsak ding ua, amah a kipan aleivui tengteng ka kheuhsiang ding a, suangpi keu lel in ka bawl ding hi.
26026005	Tui lai a len phoukeuna mun ahi mai ding, ke'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huchi in namte a ding in gallak ahi mai ding.
26026006	Huan atanu gam a omte namsau a hihlup ahih chiang un Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26026007	“Ngai in, Tura tung ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kumpipate' kumpipa mallam a kipan in, sakolte toh sakol tungtuang mite, apawl leh mipi tampi mahmah ka hon pi dek ahi.
26026008	Gam ah namsau in na tanute athat ding; kulh abawl ding a, nang nanna ding in, nang douna ding in abawl ding, mual pawngte, nang douna kidalna abawlkhe ding hi.
26026009	Kulhbaang suksiatna bawl in, na kulh phelna ding, heipi in na insangte achimsak ding hi.
26026010	Asakol tam luat ding ziak in aleivuite un nang ahon tuam ding a, khopi akiphutvang nung a mite alut sek bang a, na kongpi a ahong lut hun chiang un, na kulhpi aling ding; sakol tungtuangte husa leh kidou kangtalai husa in.
26026011	Sakol khechin in achilse ding, na kongzingte; na mite athat khin ding, namsau in; na hatna bangbang lei ah achim ding hi.
26026012	Na gou thil gallak in ala ding ua; na van tengteng agubei ding uh; lei ah na kulhbaang achimsak ding ua, na inpi nuam ahihse vek ding uh, na suangte, na singte, na leivuite tui lai ah apai ding uh.
26026013	Ka khawlsak khin ding a, na lasak husate, na kaihging leng adai den ding hi.
26026014	Suangpi keu lel in ka hon bawl ding a, len phoukeuna ding na hong hi ding hi, dinsak nawn na hi kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi.
26026015	Toupa Pathian in Tura khua kiang ah hichi in achi, na sung a kithahnate a-om hun a, miliamte athum hun chiang in na puk ging in tuipi gei gamte aling kei ding ua hia?
26026016	Tuipi tung a heutute tengteng atutphah ua kipan apaisuk ding ua, apuan thupite uh akoih ding ua, apuansilh zephoihte uh asuahkhe ding ua; linna in akivan zawta ding ua, lei ah atu ding ua, alingling ding ua, lamdang ahon sa ding uh.
26026017	Huchi in nang suunna la aphuak ding ua, na kiang ah, Khopi minthang, tuipi tung a hat, tuisiammi tengteng tenna sek, amah leh asung a tengte tengteng, mivialvakte'n ahon lauhlauh uh toh, na siatna thupi hi na tel e;
26026018	Na pukna ni in aling uh, tuikulh gamte; tuipi tuikulh alunglel ua, na man ni in, achi ding uh chi in.
26026019	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, khopi gam, kuamah luah louh khopi bang a ka hon bawl hun chiang in, tui thukpi ah ka hon tumsak ding a, tui thupi mahmah in ahon tum ding hi.
26026020	Lei nuailam ah, nidang a segawpsa, khuk thuk a paisate kiang ah ka hon tengsak ding a, kuamah in ahon luahlouhna ding un leh mihingte lak a thupina na muh nawn hetlouhna ding in.
26026021	Ka hon hihmang vengveng ding a, na om nawnta kei ding, mi'n hon zong mah le uh leng, ahon mu nawnta kei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26027001	Ka kiang ah Toupa thu hong tung a, ka kiang ah,
26027002	“Nang, mihing tapa, Tura kho suunna la phuak inla,
26027003	Tura khua kiang ah, Aw nang tuipi gei a teng sek, tuipi gei gam tampite kiang a sumsin, Toupa Pathian in huchi in ahon chi: Aw nang Tura, ka kilawm bukim na chi maw;
26027004	“Na gam in tuipi lai asun hi, nang hon bawlte'n hon kilawm tungtuansak mah ve ua;
26027005	Na singzat Senir meilah in abawl ua; na longpeu ding in, Lebanon a sidar in abawl uhi;
26027006	Bashan tosaw na longzapna ding in abawl ua; saiha suangphum na long pialkhang ding in, taksing tuipi gam Kupra a kipan in.
26027007	Na long puanzak Aigupta puanmalngat gial, nang chiamtehna ding in ana tung hi, nang a dia limzak dumpuang, sandup, Elishah tui gei a kipan;
26027008	Na longkalmi Sidon, Arvad mi ahi; na long hawl mite leng Zemir misiamte ahi ua;
26027009	Gebal upa leh mikhutsiam, na long bulhtuah mite ahi ua, tuipi long teng leh amite'n, nang hong dawr ding in ahong zuan uhi.
26027010	“Na galdoumi, na sepaihhon, Persia, Lud, Put mite ahi ua, alum uh leh adal lukhu uh na baang ah akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi.
26027011	Na sepaihhon leh Arvad mite'n na kulhpi kimvel in aveng ua, Gammadim mite'n na insang aveng ua, alum uh na kulhpi kimvel in akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi.
26027012	Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Tarshish nang hon dawr mi ahong hi a, na van lei in ahon lam hi, dangkasik, sik, langva leh asuante leng.
26027013	Zavan, Tubal, Meshek, nang hon dawrte'n sal leh dal tui-um belsuan in ahon dawr ua, na van neihna ding in.
26027014	Togarmah a mite'n sakol, kidouna sakol leh sabiltung in na van alei uhi.
26027015	Dedan mite nang hon dawr mite ahi ua, tui gei mun chih na sumsinna mun ahong hi a, saiha leh eboni ahon puak uhi.
26027016	Van na hauh ziak in, Edom nang hon dawr ahong hi a, emerald suang, puan sandup, puanzep, puanmalngat, khibah, agate suangte in nang ahon dawr uh.
26027017	Judah leh Israel teng nang hon dawrte ahi ua, Minnith buh leh Pannag, khuaizu, sathau leh singnai in ahon dawr uh.
26027018	Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Damaskas nang hon dawr ahong hi a, Helbon uain leh belam mulkaang in ahon dawr hi.
26027019	Uzal uain hon tawi in alei ua, na vante, sikseksa, singguithak leh kawltute na sumsinna.
26027020	Dedan in sakol tungphah puante in nang ahon dawr hi.
26027021	Arabia leh Kedar kumpipate nang hon dawrte ahi vek uh, belamnoute, belamtalte, keltalte in ahon dawr uh.
26027022	Sheba leh Raamah sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahong hi ua, gimlim hoihpente, suangmantam chi chih leh dangka-engte in, nang ahon dawr uh.
26027023	Haran, Kanneh leh Eden, Sheba, Assuria leh Kilmad sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahi uh.
26027024	Huaite ahi uh, nang hon dawr, puansilh hoih chi, puandum buang, puanzep, pialkhang phah ze kilawm toh, khauhual chiptak a hek in, hiaite in nang ahon dawr uh.
26027025	“Tarshish longhon leh long lian vanpote ahi ua, na hong inbul in tuipi tung ah na hong thupita hi.
26027026	Na long hawlpa'n tuipi kihot ah ahon hawllut a, suahlam huih in nang ahon nuaimang, tuipi lai ah.
26027027	Na hauhsakna, na van, na sumsinna thil, na long mite, long hawlmi, bulhtuak mite, sumsin van kheng mite, na galbawl mite tengteng, nang a om, na sung a om tengteng toh, na siat ni in tuipi lai ah na tummang ding uh.
26027028	Na long hawl mite kikou husa in na kim a mite aling uhi.
26027029	Longkalhna peu len mite tengteng, long mite leh, tuipi a hawl mite tengteng paisuk in, luipiau ah adingh uh.
26027030	Na tungthu ah a-aw uh zak tham in asuah ding ua, khasetak in akap ding ua; alu ua leivuite buak in, vut lak ah akitholh ding uh.
26027031	Nang ziak in kimetgiau in, sai-ip puan ateng ding ua; khase lua in nakpitak a kap in nang ahon suun ding uh.
26027032	Nang hon suun in kahla asam ding ua, nang suun in Tura bang khopi kua a-om a, amah tuipi lai ah, adai sipsip hi.
26027033	Na vante'n tuipi a pan pawt in mi tampi avak kham sek; na dangka leh na van in lei kumpipate na hausak hi.
26027034	Tuipi thuk a na siat ni in, na sumsinna thil, na mite, nang toh athelthang uhi.
26027035	“Tui gei a teng mi tengteng in mulkimhuai ahon sa ua; akumpipate uh lau in asibup ua, amel uh alamdang hial hi.
26027036	Mite lak a sumsin mite'n nang ahon khoisatkhum ua, mite a ding in launa na hong suakta a, na kilang ngei nawn kei ding, chi in ahon kahkhum uhi.”
26028001	Toupa Pathian thu ka kiang ah ahong tung nawn a,
26028002	“Mihing tapa, Tura heutupa kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in, hichi in achi: Na lungsim akisathei a, Pathian ka hi a, tuipi lai a Pathian tutmun ah ka tu, na chi a; himahleh mihing lel na hi a, pathian na hi kei a, pathian lungsim bang in kingaihtuah mah lechin;
26028003	Daniel sang in na pilzaw a, na lak ah thuguk a-om thei kei a;
26028004	na pilna leh na lemtheihna in na na kihihhau a; na goubawm ah dangka leh dangka-eng na khum hi.
26028005	Na pilna thupi mahmah leh na sumsaina in sum na hihpung a; na hauhsak ziak in na lungsim ana kisatheita hi.”
26028006	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Pathian lungsim bang pu a na kingaihtuah ziak in,
26028007	ngai in, na kiang ah gamdangmi, nam lauhuaitak ka hon pilut sin ahi; huan, na pilna gah kilawm tung ah anamsau uh alek ding ua, na thupina ahihse ding uh.
26028008	Khuk thuk ah ahon sawllut ding ua, tuipi lai a athahte uh sih in na si ding.
26028009	Nang hon thatmi ma ah, Pathian ka hi, na chi lailai dia hia? Nang hon liamsakmi khut ah pathian na hi kei a, mihing lel na hi zaw.
26028010	Pau tuam mite khut ah, zeksum louh sih in na si ding; ka pauta ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26028011	Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
26028012	“Mihing tapa, Tura kumpipa suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Hoih buchingtak, pilna a dim, kilawmna chiteng;
26028013	Pathian huan, Eden ah na teng a; suangmantam chiteng in na kituam a, sardi, topaz leh diamond, beril, onik, jasper, sapphir, emerald, karbankul, aphumkipna leh agelh kilawmna dangka-eng a bawlte, nang siam ni a kisiamte.
26028014	Nang chingmi cherub sathau nilh na hi; Pathian tang siangthou ah ka hon omsak a, meisuangte lak ah na vak hi.
26028015	Na hoih buching; siam a na om ni a kipan, nang a diktatlouhna a-om mateng in.
26028016	Na sumsinna apun hulhul ziak in hiamgamna in na dim a, khelhna ah na pukta hi. Pathian tang a kipan in bangmah lou in ka hon paita a; chingmi cherub in meisuangte lak a kipan ahon delhkhia hi.
26028017	Na kilawmna ziak a hong kisathei in, na thupina a na pilna hihsia in, lei ah ka hon pai a, etnop ding in kumpipate ma ah mual ah ka hon phou hi.
26028018	Na sumsin diktatlouhnate ah, na siatna ziak in, na mun siangthoute na hihbuah a, huaiziak in mei ka khah a; na sung a kipan ahong kangbei a, ahon musekte tengteng muh in lei ah leivui ka hon suaksakta.
26028019	Mite lak a ahon thei peuhmah lamdangsak, launa na hong suakta; na om ngei nawn kei ding,” chi in.
26028020	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26028021	“Mihing tapa, Sidon masuan inla, atungthu gen in.
26028022	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ka hon nang ahi, aw Sidon, ka hihlang ding, ka thupina; nang ah Toupa ka hihdan athei ding ua, amah ah vai ka hawm hun chiang in, ka sianthouna ka ensak mahmah ding.
26028023	Akongzing ah sisan leh hipi ka tungsak ding, asung ah miliam apuk ding; mun kil chih a kipan namsau in. Huan Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26028024	“Huchi in Israel inkote sun ding loulingnei a-om kei ding a, akim a amau musit mite lak ah hihna ding ling a-omta kei ding; kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh.”
26028025	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Israel inkote adalhna gam mite lak a kipan ka pikhawm nawn hun chiang in Jakob kiang a ka piak, agam mahmah uah atengta ding uh.
26028026	Huchi in bittak in a-omta ding ua; ahi, innte alam ding ua; grephuante abawl ding uh. Bittak in a-om ding ua; akim ua musit mite tengteng tung a vai ka hawm chiang in kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.
26029001	Akum sawmna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani sawmnihna ah ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26029002	“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh masuan inla, atung ah leh Aigupta mi tengteng tung ah thu gen in.
26029003	Gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta kumpipa, Pharaoh luipite lai ah Olepi thupitak, ‘Ka luipi kei a ahi, keimah ngei a dia ka bawl,’ chipa ka hon dou ahi.
26029004	Na haizekte ah ngakuai in ka hon man ding a; luipi a ngasate na lip ding in ka belhsak ding a; luipi lai a kipan na lip ah ngasate tengteng toh ka hon botkhe ding.
26029005	Huan gamdai ah ka hon pai ding a, nang leh na luipi a ngasa tengteng leng; gamlak ah na puk ding a; na luang kaihkhop ahi kei ding a, vui na hi sam kei ding; gam sahangte leh tungleng vasate kiang ah an ding in ka hon pia hi.
26029006	Israel inkote a dia sialluang chiangkhun lel na hong hih ziak in Aigupta gam a teng tengteng in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26029007	Khut a ahon let ua, aliangzang uh na tansak a, na satkhia; hon ngai ua, akongte uh kitan a tang lou in na omsak hi.
26029008	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, na tung ah namsau ka hon tun ding a, na lak a kipan mi leh sa ka phukmang ding.
26029009	Huan Aigupta gam, gam segawp leh kho sia ahi mai ding a, kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. ‘Luipi kei a ahi a, ka bawl ahi,’ na chih ziak in.”
26029010	Huaiziak in ka hon dou ahi, na luipi leng; Seveneh kulh a kipan in Ethiopia gamgi pha in Aigupta gam bel gam segawp leh kho sia in ka bawl ding.
26029011	Mihing khe in asik ngei kei ding a, sate leng apai ngei kei ding ua; kum sawmli sung luah in a-om kei ding hi.
26029012	Aigupta gam segawpte lak a khat in ka bawl ding a, akhopite ka khopi siate lak ah kum sawmli akigawp ding; Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka dalhsak ding hi.
26029013	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kum sawmli nung in adalhna munte ua kipan Aigupta mite ka lakhawm nawn ding a;
26029014	Aigupta mite omdan ka hei ding a, apianna gam uh, Pathros gam ah ka kiksak ding; huchi in huai ah vualleltak in alal ding uh.
26029015	Lalna gam a vuallel pen ahi ding, namte lak ah leng akilalsak nawn sam kei ding hi. Namdangte tung a thu aneih nawnlouhna ding un amau ka neusak ding hi.
26029016	Amau lam nga peuhmah in athulimlouhna uh atheihkhiakpih ziak in Israelte muanpi ahi nawnta kei ding uh; huan Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh, achi,” chi in.
26029017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawmnih-le-sagihna, akha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi:
26029018	“Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Tura tung ah na thupitak sem ding in asepaihhon asawl a, michih lu agiauloh a, michih liangzang in adulhloh lai a; himahleh amah leh asepaihhonte'n anasepna uah Tura a kipan punna bangmah amu tuan kei uh.
26029019	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta gam Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah ka pe ding a, athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding a, alok ding a, agallaksak ding; huai asepaihhonte loh ahi mai ding.
26029020	Ka nna asep ziak un aloh ding un Aigupta gam ka pia hi,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
26029021	Huai ni chiang in Israel inkote a ding in kii ka poukhesak ding a; alak uah na kam ka kasak ding hi; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chi in.
26030001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26030002	“Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi.
26030003	“Kikou un, maizen! Maizen, tua ni tel; ni anai hi, Toupa ni anai hi, mei kai ni, pau tuam mite siatna ding.
26030004	Ahong tung ding, namsau, Aigupta tung ah; sinlai natna, Ethiopia tung ah, Aigupta ah mithah apuk un; athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding ua, asuangphumte achimse ding.”
26030005	“Ethiopia, Pud leh Lud, nam chih omkhawm, Kush leh gam tate tel teite tengteng, namsau in apuk ding uh.”
26030006	“ Toupa'n hichi in achi: Aigupta tungding mite leng apuk ding ua, ahatna suanpen uh leng avuallel ding; Migdol a kipan Suene pha in namsau in apuk ding uh, Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
26030007	Gam hihgawpsate lak a khat ahi ding a, akhopite leng khopi gawpsate lak a ahi mai ding uh.
26030008	Aigupta gam ah mei ka khah ding a, amau panpih mite tengteng ka hihsiat hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.”
26030009	Huai ni chiang in Ethiopia mi kigingloute lunglelsak ding in ka kiang a kipan mi sawl long in apai ding ua; Aigupta ni mah bang in lungtang mangbatna mahmah atung uah atung sam ding hi; ngai in, ahong tung lellel hi.
26030010	“Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut in Aigupta thil hauh ziazuate ka hihmang ding.
26030011	Gam hihse ding in amah leh alawite, namte lak a kihtakte tunsak ahi ding uh; Aigupta tung ah anamsau uh alik ding ua, misi luang in gam adimsak ding uh.
26030012	Huan luipite ka kangsak ding a, migiloute kiang ah gam ka khawng ding; agam leh asung a om tengteng pau tuam mite khut in ka hihgawp ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi.
26030013	“Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Milimte ka hihse ding a, Memphis a kipan milimte ka hihmang ding, Aigupta ah heutu a-omta kei ding uh; huchi in Aigupta gam ah launa ka omsak ding.
26030014	“Pathros ka hihgawp ding a, Zoan ah mei ka khah dia; Thebes ah ka tangtungsak ding.
26030015	Huan Aigupta kulh Sin tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, Thebes a mipite ka phukmang ding.
26030016	Huan Aigupta ah mei ka khah ding a, buaitak in Sin a-om ding a, Thebes leng achim vek ding; Memphis in sun chiang in melma anei nilouh ding hi.
26030017	Aven leh Pibeseth kho tangvalte namsau in apuk ding ua, huai khuate sal a pi in a-om ding uh.
26030018	Aigupta hakkol ka hihtan a, ahatna akisaktheihpih ka hihbei hun Tehphanhes ah ni amial ding; amah zaw meipi in aliah ding a, atanute sal a pi in a-om ding uh.
26030019	Hichibang in Aigupta gam ah thu ka tangtungsak ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.
26030020	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha khatna, huai kha ani sagih ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,
26030021	“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ban ka kitansak a, ngai in, namsau tawi ding ahat nawnna ding in damdawi nuh leh tuam aloh kei hi.
26030022	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ka dou ahi, aban hoih lam leh akitansa nunglam leng ka kitansak ding a; huchi in akhut a kipan namsau ka kitansak ding hi.
26030023	Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding.
26030024	Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, akhut ah namsau ka tawisak ding a; Pharaoh bante ka kitansak ding a, ama ah sihpih khop liam mau in amau ding hi.
26030025	Huchi in Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, Pharaoh bante bel aluaikhe ding; Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka namsau ka tawisak a, Aigupta kumpipa tung a alik hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26030026	Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak vek ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.
26031001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha thumna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26031002	“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh akhua leh amite kiang ah gen inla: Na thupina ah kua toh na kibang a ahia?
26031003	“Ngai in, Assuria tuh Lebanon a sidar ahi a, hiang kilawm leh bawkpha, lim sah, sang kilawm, mei lak ah adawn a-om hi.
26031004	Tui in ahon vak a, tui thuk in akhangsak hulhul, aphuhna luite'n aluan kual ua, gam sing chih vakna ding in aluangsak hi.
26031005	Huchi in gam sing teng zou in asang tuan a; tuite akidaih zoh ziak in akungpite khanglian in, ahiangte asau ua amengkhesak hi.
26031006	Ahiang ah tungleng vasate'n bu abawl ua; ahiang nuai ah sa chiteng in nou anei ua; alimnuai ah nam thupi teng ateng uhi.
26031007	Huchi in athupina ah akilawm a, ahiangte sauna bang zel in; azungte lah tui tampite kiang ah a-om ngal a,
26031008	Pathian huan a sidar singte'n aphazou kei ua; abawk, meilah sing in adem zou kei a; ahiang sesing in aphazou sam kei; akilawmna ah Pathian huan a sing abang zou kei hi.
26031009	Ahiang tamsak in ka bawlhoih a, Pathian huan a Eden sing teng in ahaza uhi,” chi in.
26031010	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ahong san mahmah a, meipi lak a adawn alen a, alungtang a asandan akisaktheihpih ziak in,
26031011	namte lak ah mihattak khut ah ka mansak ding a; athulimlouhdan bang in agawt ding a, ka delhkhe ding.
26031012	Huchi in gamdangmi, namte lak a kihtakhuai mahmahte'n aphuk ding ua, anuse ding uh; tangte, phaizangte ah ahiangte ake lemlum ding a, huai gam tuiluanna phaizang tengteng ah ahiangte akitan lemlum ding; leitung a mi tengteng alimnuai a kipan apawtkhe ding ua, amah apaisan ding uh.
26031013	Asiatna ah tungleng vasa tengteng ateng ding ua, abawk tung ah gamsate a-om ding uh.
26031014	Hiai bel tui a vak sing tengteng akisansak louh ua, adawn uh meipi kal a lengsak lou a, tui a vak sing in asandan uh asuan samlouhna ding uh ahi; lei mun nuainungpen a kokhuk a paisukta, mihing tate lak ah pai ding in, sihna a matsak ahi vekta ngal ua.”
26031015	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sheol a apaisuk ni in amah ka sunsak a, luitui thuktakte ka khawlsak a; huai ah tui tampi let dingte ka daltan a; Lebanon amah ka sunsak lai a; gam sing tengteng amah ziak in agim khin uhi.
26031016	Namte leng apuk ging ah ka lingsak a, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang a Sheol a ka paihkhiak ni in; Eden sing tengteng, Lebanon sing hoih tata, tui a vak tengteng lei nuainungpen ah lungmuang in a-omta uhi.
26031017	Namsau a thahte kiang ah Sheol ah apaisuk ua; ahi, namte lak a, alimnuai a tengte leh namte lak a akizoppihte toh hankhuk atungsuk uhi.”
26031018	“Thupina leh letna ah Eden singte lak a kua ahia nang bang om? Himahleh Eden singte toh lei mun nuainungpen ah paihkhiak na hi ding; namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte lak ah na lum ding hi. Hiai bel Pharaoh leh akhua-le-tuite ahi uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26032001	Huan hiai ahi, akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi:
26032002	Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, “Namte humpinelkai lun lai kibatpih; tuipi a olepi na bang zaw hi; na nak a tuite phuansak in, na khe in na toknin a, aluite uh na ninsak vekta.
26032003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka len in ka hon khuh ding a, mi tampi toh, ka len in nang ahon man ngeingei ding uh.
26032004	Gamlak ah ka hon nuse ding a, gamlak ah ka hon pai ding; tung a leng tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, na tung ah; nang in leitung pumpi gamsa ka taisak ding hi.
26032005	Tang chih ah na sa ka lui ding a; na luang in phaizangte ka dimsak ding.
26032006	Na tenna gam tang tan in, na sisan in ka sil ding a, phaizang chih leng nangmah in adim ding hi.
26032007	Ka hon chimihsak hun chiang in, van ka khuh in aksi ka mialsak ding a; meipi in nisa ka liahmang ding; huan kha in avakna asuah kei ding hi.
26032008	Na tung ah van a vak tengteng ka mialsak ding a; na gam ah khomial ka lengsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26032009	Na theih louh gam a namte lak a na siatna ka tunsak hun chiang in mi tampite lungtang ka lungzingsak ding.
26032010	Ahi, mi tampi nangmah ah lamdang sa in ka bawl ding a, ama ua ka namsau ka leh hun chiang in nang ziak in akumpipate uh leng mulkimhuai asa un alau mahmah ding uh; na puk ni in michih in ahinna uh tan lau in alingling ding uhi.
26032011	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a; Babulon kumpipa namsau na tung ah ahong tung dek hi.
26032012	Na mite ka puksak ding, galhat mite namsau in, namte lak a kihtakhuai pente ahi ua, ahihse ding uh. Aigupta mite thupina, amipite tengteng ahihmang ding uh.
26032013	Tui tampi gei gamsa teng ka hihmang ding a; mi khete'n angap ninta kei ding; gamsa khete'n leng angap nin sam kei ding hi.
26032014	Huchi in tui ka chimsak ding a, ka luangsak ding, luite, sathau bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26032015	Aigupta gam ka hihsegawp ding a, ahauhna tengteng ah vuaktang in, asung a tengte ka phukmang hun in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ngei ding uh.
26032016	Hiai akahla ding uh ahi; namte tanute'n hiai kah in Aigupta leh ami tengteng asuun ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26032017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawm-le-nga ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
26032018	“Mihing tapa, Aigupta mipite kah ekek inla, amah leh nam minthangtak tanu kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh lei nuainung lam ah paikhia in.
26032019	“Kilawmna ah kua akhup a? Paisuk inla zeksumlouhte lak ah lum in.
26032020	“Namsau a thahsate lak ah apuk ding ua, namsau kiang a piak ahi khin ua, amah leh amite tengteng kaimang un.
26032021	Sheol a om galhatmi mahmahte'n amah leh apanpih mite ahoupih ding ua; apaisuk ua, alum nilouh uh, namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte.
26032022	“Huai ah Assuria leh aheute tengteng a-om ua; ahante uh amah kim ah a-om a; avek un thah, namsau a puk vek ahi uh.
26032023	Ahante uh kokhuk thukpen ah a-om a, ahan kim ah aheute a-om uh; avek ua thah, namsau a puk vek, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite ahi uh.
26032024	“Huai ah Elam leh ahan kim ah aheute a-om ua; avek ua, namsau a puk, lei nuainung a zeksum louh apaisuk ua, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite, azahlakna uh kokhuk a paipih sukte ahi uhi.
26032025	Mithahte lak ah amah leh aheute lupna abawlsak ua, ahante amah kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi ua; akihtakhuaina uh mihing gam gallauna ahi nak a; kokhuk a paisuktate toh azahlakna uh apua ua, mithahte lak ah a-omsak uhi.
26032026	“Huai ah Meshek leh Tubal, aheute uh toh a-om ua; ahante uh amau kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi uh; akihtakhuaina un mihing gam ahihmang zel hi.
26032027	Zeksum louh, mihat pukte, kidouna galvan toh Sheol a paisuktate, anamsau uh lukham a nei, aguhte uh tung a alum uh omte kiang ah alum kei uh; amau lah mihing gam a mihatte launa ahi.
26032028	“Nang zaw zeksumlouhte lak ah kitan lemlum in na om ding a, namsau a site kiang ah na lum ding hi.
26032029	“Huai ah Edom, akumpipate leh aheutute tengteng a-om ua; ahatna ua; namsau a thahte lak ah asial uh hi; zeksum louh, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang alum uhi.
26032030	“Huai ah mallam heutute, avek un, Sidon mi tengteng, thahte lak a paisuksate a-om ua, ahatna un mi agallausak nak a, azum ua, zeksum louh in namsau a thahte lak ah alum ua; kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh azahlak khawmta uhi.
26032031	“Pharaoh in amaute amu ding a, amite tengteng a lungmuan loh ding, Pharaoh leh asepaihhon tengteng, namsau a thahte ngei leng, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26032032	“Mihing gam ah gallauna alengsak a, zeksum louh, namsau a thahte lak ah alum ding uhi, Pharaoh leh ami tengteng ngei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi.
26033001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26033002	“Mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah thu gen inla, akiang uah, gam tung a namsau ka hon tutleh gam mite'n alak ua pat mi khat atelkhiak ua, galvilmi dia akoih uleh,
26033003	ama'n gam tung a namsau hong tung amuhleh pengkul amut ding a, mipite akigalgingsak ding hi.
26033004	Huchi in pengkul ging za a poisaloumi kuapeuh, namsau hong tung in manloh tamahleh, asisan moh amah mah in apo ding ahi.
26033005	Pengkul ging azak a apoisak louh ziak in asisan moh akipuak mai ding ahi; ana poisakleh bel ahinna ahumbit ding ahi.
26033006	Himahleh galvilmi in namsau hong tung amuh a, apengkul amut louh a, mipite akigalgin louh ua, namsau ahong tun a, alak ua mi kuahiam in amanlohleh athulimlouhna in amangthang ding a, galvilmi khut ah asisan phu ka ngiat ding,” chi in.
26033007	Huchibang in nang, mihing tapa, Israel inkote a dia galvilmi dia ka hon bawl na hi; huaiziak in ka kam a thupawt ngaikhia inla, ka kiang a kipan kigalginna ding thu akiang uah hilh in.
26033008	Migilou kiang ah, “Aw migilou, si mahmah ding na hi,” ka chih a, migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh keileh migilou agitlouhna ah asi ding a, asisan phu bel nang a kipan ka la ding.
26033009	Himahleh migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh a, a-omdan apaisan kei laileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ding hi.
26033010	Huan mihing tapa, nang Israel inkote kiang ah thu gen inla, hichibang in na chi ua, “Ka tatleknate uh leh ka khelhnate un ahon delhkhum a, huaiziak in ka thanggawp uh ahi, bangchi in ka hing nilouh thei ding ua?” na chi uhi.
26033011	Kei ka hin bang in, migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei kei a, migilou in a-omdan apaisan a ahin ka kipah lam ahi zaw. Na omdan hoih lou ua kipan kik un, kik un, Aw Israel inkote, bangziak a si ding na hi ua? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in gen in.
26033012	“Nang, mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah gen inla, midiktat diktanna in atatlekna ni in amah ahumbit kei ding a, migilou gitlouhna in leng athulimlouhna alehngatsan ni in apuksak kei ding a, midiktat lah akhelhna ni in adiktatna in ahing thei tuan sam kei ding.
26033013	Midiktat kiang ah, na hing ngeingei ding, chih ka gen in, adiktatna muang a thil ahihkhelhleh athil dik hih khat leng theihgige ahi kei ding; athilhihkhelhsa ah asi zaw ding.
26033014	Huan migilou kiang ah, ‘Na si ngeingei ding,’ ka chih nawn leuleu in, agitlouhnate alehngatsan a asiang leh adik ana hih a,
26033015	migilou in mi koih khamnate pekik a, athilgukte apiak nawn a, hinna dante azuih a, thulimlouhna bangmah ahihkeileh ahing ngeingei ding a, asi kei ding hi.
26033016	Khelhna ana hihsa bangmah theihgige ahita kei ding a, asiang leh adik ana hihta a, ahing ngeingei ding hi.
26033017	“Himahleh na nam tate'n, ‘ Toupa thilhihdan akikim kei,’ achih un amau hihdan adiktat kei zaw hi.
26033018	Midiktat in adiktatna alehngatsan a, thil gilou ana hihleh huaiziak in asi mai ding.
26033019	Huan migilou in agitlouhna alehngatsan a, asiang leh adik ahihleh huaiziak in ahing ding.
26033020	Himahleh, ‘ Toupa hihdan akikim kei,’ na chi ua, aw Israel inkote michih noumau hihdan bang in vai ka hon hawmsak ding hi,” achi hi.
26033021	Huan hichi ahong hi a, i saltan akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani nga ni in Jerusalem a kipan taikhia mi khat ka kiang ah ahong pai a, “Khopi zoh ahita,” ahong chi hi.
26033022	Huai mi taikhia ahong tun ma nitaklam in Toupa'n ka tung ah akhut anga a; zinglam a ka kiang a hong pai in ka kam ahon kasak a, huchi in ka kam ka ka a, pau thei lou in ka om nawnta kei hi.
26033023	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26033024	“Mihing tapa, Israel gam a mun segawpsa nung a omte'n, ‘Abraham khat ahi a, gam aluah a; eite bel tampi i hi ua, gam gouluah ding a piak hita ve hang,’ chi in agen uhi.
26033025	Huaiziak in akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Sa sisan na ne ua, na milimte uh lam ah na mitte uh na lengtousak ua; sisan na suah ua, noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw?
26033026	Na namsau uh na muang ua; thilkihhuai na hih ua; michih in invengpa zi na hihbuah ua; noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw?’
26033027	Hichibang a akiang ua na gen ding ahi, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Kei ka hin bang in, mun segawpsa nung a omte namsau in apuk ngeingei ding ua, gamlak a omte sahang kiang ah nek khit dia pe ding ka hi; kulh kip leh khuk a omte hipi in asi ding uh.
26033028	Gam leng ka hihsia in, mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a; athilhihtheihna, akisaktheihpih abeita ding; Israel tangte asegawp ding a, kuamah avialvak nawnta kei ding uh.
26033029	Thilkihhuai ahih ziak ua gam ka hihgawp a, mulkimhuaitak a ka bawl hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.’ ”
26033030	Huan nang, mihing tapa, baang bul ah kongpite ah na nam tate'n ahon ngen susup ding ua, michih in a-unaute kiang ah, “Kisa dih ua, Toupa kiang a kipan thupawt i ngaikhe ding uh, akichi ding uh.
26033031	Huchi in ahonhon in na kiang ah ahong pai ding ua, ka mite bang mai in na ma ah ahong tu ding ua, na thu ahong ngaikhe ding ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh; akam un itna thupitak ahihlang ding ua, alungtang un bel punna lam azuan ding.
26033032	Ngai in, nang bel amau a ding in itna la, kilawmtak a sak leh tum bang na hi ding; na thute angaikhia ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh.
26033033	Hiai ahong tun hun chiang in ngai in, ahong tung lellel ahi, alak uah zawlnei a-om chih athei ding uhi, chi in,” achi hi.
26034001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
26034002	“Mihing tapa, Israelte belamchingte tung ah thu gen in, thu gen inla, akiang uah, belamchingte kiang mahmah ah, huchi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Israelte belamching, amau kivak maimahte tung agik hi; belamchingte'n belamte vak lou ding ahi uhia?
26034003	Athaute na ne ua, amul in na kizem ua; athauthau na gou ua, belamte na vak kei uhi.
26034004	Natna veite, avakmangte na hon pi kei ua; amangte na zong kei ua; khauhtak leh na mahmah in na thunun zaw uh.
26034005	Belampute a-om louh ziak un dalhsak in ana omta ua; ana dalh ua, gam sahangte an lel ahong hita uhi.
26034006	Ka belamte tang chih leh mual chih ah avakmang ua; ahi, ka belamte leitung tengteng ah ana dalh khin uh; limsakmi leh zongmi a-om kei uh, chi in gen in,” achi hi.
26034007	Huaiziak in belamchingte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un;
26034008	Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, belamching a-om louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte azon louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte avak louh ua, amau akivak zawksop ziak un ka belamte gam sahangte an lel ahong hi ua; ka belamte samat lel ahong hi petmah uh.
26034009	Huaiziak in nou belamchingte aw, Toupa thu za un.
26034010	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Ngai un, belamchingte ka dou ahi; akhut ua kipan ka belamte ka sut ding a, ka belamte akepna uh ka tawpsak ding a, belamchingte leng amau akivakta kei ding uh; a-angsung ua kipan ka belamte ka lakhe ding a, amau dia nek ding ahih nawnlouhna ding un, chi in.
26034011	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi ngal a: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka zong ding a, ka zongkhe ding hi.
26034012	Belamching in abelam dalhte lak a abelamhonte azon lai bang in ka belamte ka zongkhe ding; khonim ni leh mial nuai a adalhna tengteng ua kipan ka zongkhe ding,
26034013	Huan mite lak a kipan ka lakhe ding a; gam chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a; amau gam ngei ah ka pilut ding; Israel tangte ah, lui geite ah, mi tenna mun tengtengte ah ka tasak ding.
26034014	Loupa hoihna munte ah ka tasak ding a; ahuangsung uh Israel tang sangte ah a-om ding; huang hoihtak sung ah leng a-om ding ua, Israel tang tung a loupa dawng munte ah ata ding uh.
26034015	Kei mahmah in ka belamte ka vak ding a; ka kualsak kinken ding a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26034016	Amang ka zong ding a, delhmangte ka pikik nawn ding a, akhe kitante uh ka tuam ding a, ka hatsak ding; athau leh ahatte leng ka ching ding a; diktak in ka vak ding hi.
26034017	Huan nou tungthu ahihleh, aw ka belamhonte, hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ngai un, ka belamte kal thu ka gensak ding a, belamtalte, keltalte leng.
26034018	Gantatna mun hoihtak tung a tat nou ding in thil bang tham lou bang alang in, na tatna neihsun na chilse zosop uh ahi maw?
26034019	Huan tuichim mahmahte na dawn khit un na ngap nin mawkmawk uh ahi maw? Ka belamte'n na siksa uh ane un, na ngahsa uh adawn ding uh maw?
26034020	Huaiziak in hichi in Toupa Pathian in akiang uah achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in gan gawngte leh gan thaute kal thu ka ngaihtuah ding hi.
26034021	Ahatloute na liang un leh na sikte un na phu ua, na khete un na pik ua, na dalhsak uhi.
26034022	Huaiziak in ka belamte ka humbit ding; samat lel ahi nawn kei ding ua, belamte kal thu ka gensak ding hi.
26034023	Huan atung uah belamchingpa khat, ka sikhapa David ngei ka koih ding a; ama'n amaute avak ding a; amah amau chingpa ahi ding a, amaute avak ding hi.
26034024	Huchi in kei a Toupa Pathian uh ka hi ding a, ka nasempa David atung ua heutu ahi ding; kei Toupa ngei in ka chita hi.
26034025	Amau toh lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, sahangte gam a kipan ka hihmang ding; gamdai ah leng bittak in ateng ding ua, gammang nuaite ah a-ihmu hithit ding uhi.
26034026	Amau leh ka mual kim munte ka vualzawl ding a; ahun geihgeih in vuah ka zusak ding a, vualzawl vuahte azu ding hi.
26034027	Huan gam a sing in gah asuah ding a, lei in apunna asuah ding a; agam uah bittak in a-om ding uh; ahakkolte uh ka kitansak a, sikha a bawl mite khut a kipan ka hutkhiak hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26034028	Namdangte samat lel ahi nawnta kei ding ua, gam sahangte nekmang mai ahi nawn kei ding uh; bittak in a-om zawta ding ua, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh.
26034029	Thilsuan minthang mahmah ka bawlsak ding a; huai gam ah kial in ahihmang nawn kei ding a, namdangte muhsitna leng athuak nawn kei ding uh.
26034030	Huan kei Toupa a Pathian uh akiang uah ka om chih athei un, amau Israel inkote leng ka mite ahi uh chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26034031	Huan nou ka belamte, ka gantatna mun a belamte na hi ua; kei na Pathian uh ka hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in.
26035001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26035002	“Mihing tapa, Seir tang masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in. Akiang ah,
26035003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aw Seir tang, ka hon dou hi, na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, ka hon hihgawp in mulkimhuaitak in ka hon bawl ding.
26035004	Na khopite ka hihse ding a, na kigawp ding; huan Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding.”
26035005	Na nitna uh gawtna nanungpen a asiat ni ua Israel inkote namsau thilhihtheihna a na lat a, na kinakpih gige ziak in,
26035006	kei ka hin bang in, sisan a ding in ka hon bawl ding a, sisan in ahon delh ding; sisan na huat louh ziak in sisan in ahon delh ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26035007	Hichi in Seir tang bel mulkimhuaitak a bawl in ka sugawp ding; atung a mi vialvakte ka tawpsak vek ding hi.
26035008	Atangte amah mithahte in ka dimsak ding; na tangte ah, na phaizang leh na lui phaizang kuakte ah namsau a thahte apuk phengphung ding uh.
26035009	Ka hon sugawp den ding a, na khopite luah in a-om kei ding; huan kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding hi.
26035010	Toupa zaw a-om gige na a, “Hiai nam nihte leh gam nihte kei a ahi ding a, ka tang mai ding uh,” na chih ziak in.
26035011	Kei ka hin bang in chih, Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, na hehna bang zel leh na huatna ziak a hazatna na suklatdan bang zel in ka hih ding ahi; na tungthu ka ngaihtuah hun chiang in alak uah ka hihlang ding hi.
26035012	“Hihgawp in a-omta ua, ka kiang ah piak in a-omta uh,” chi a Israel tangte na gensiatna tengteng kei Toupa'n ka za vek chih na thei ding hi.
26035013	Ka tung ah na kam in na kiliansak in ka tung ah thu na tamsak a, ka za vek hi.
26035014	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Lei pumpi kipahna ding in ka hon sugawp ding hi.
26035015	Israelte gouluah asiat ziak a na kipah mah bang in na tung ah ka hih ding; Aw Seir tang leh Edom tengteng, avek in akisegawp ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26036001	Huan nang mihing tapa, Israel tangte kiang ah thu gen inla, “Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:
26036002	Na tung ah na melmate'n, ‘Aha! Nidang mun sang tengtengte kei a ahita, achih ziak un,’ ” thu gen in.
26036003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsunte a ding a kil chih a nang ahon nek ua, hon sukgawp ziak un leh mikamtamte houlimna leh gensiat a ahon omsak ziak un;
26036004	Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un, Toupa Pathian in tangte, mualte, luiguamte, phaizangte leh mun sesate, khopi kigawpsa, akim a nam omsunte samat lel ding leh nuihsan dingte kiang ah hichi in achi.
26036005	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsun leh Edom tengteng lungsim kipaktak a ka gam na na kiseh tawm ua; na hon musit mahmah ua, gallak a bawl mite tung ah ka mullitna thangpaih mahmahna in thu ka gen ngei ahi.
26036006	Huaiziak in Israel gam tungthu ah thu gen inla, tangte, mualte, luiguamte leh phaizangte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, namdangte simmohna na thuak ziak un mullit mahmah leh thangpaitak in thu ka gen ahi.
26036007	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kim a namte'n amau zahlakna apo ngei ding uh chi in ka khut ka zak hi.
26036008	Nou bel, Aw Israel tangte aw, hiang na suah ding ua, ka mi Israelte a ding in gah na suah ding uh; ahong pai dek uhi.
26036009	Ngai un, nou lam a pang ka hi ngal a, nou lam ka nga ding a, kalhnen in na om ding ua, chi tuh in na om lai ding uh.
26036010	Na tung uah mihing ka pungsak ding a, Israel inkote tengteng, avek un; mun sesate bawlphat in a-om ding a, khopite luah in a-om ding.
26036011	Na tung uah mi leh sa ka pungsak ding a, apung un alamzang ding uh; na omdan masa bang in luah in ka hon omsak ding a, atung a na omdan sang ua hoihzaw in ka hon bawl ding hi; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26036012	Ahi, na tung uah mi ka vaksak ding a, ka mi Israelte ngei; ahon luah ding ua, agoutan uh na hi ding a, tuban siah atate uh na tansak ngei nawn kei ding hi.
26036013	Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Nang mihingte nemang, na mite tansek na hi, ahon chih ziak un,
26036014	mihingte na ne bei nawnta kei ding a, na mite leng na tan ngei na hon sam kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26036015	Pau tuam mite muhsitna ka hon thuaksak nawn kei ding a, mite gensiat na thuak ngei nawn kei ding; na mite na tan ngei nawn kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.
26036016	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a,
26036017	“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote amau gam a aten lai un a-omdan uleh athilhihte un akihihnin ua; ka ma a a-omdan uh numei kizen louh lai a asianthoulouhna bang mai ahi.
26036018	Huaiziak in gam tung ah sisan asuah ua, amilimte ua akihihnit ziak un atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak hi.
26036019	Namte lak ah ka dalhsak a, gam chih ah athehthangta ua; a-omdan uleh athilhihte uh bang zel in atungthu uh ka gensak hi.
26036020	Ava hohna namte kiang atun un ka min siangthou ahihbuah ua; mite'n, ‘Hiaite Toupa mite ahi ua, gam a kipan hong pawtkhete ahi uh,’ ” ana chih nakna uah.
26036021	Himahleh Israel inkote'n ava hohna namte lak a ahihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ahi.
26036022	Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel inkote, noute ka hon lainat ziak hilou in, na va hohna namte lak a na hihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ziak zaw in hiai ka hih ahi.
26036023	Ka min thupitak, namte lak a buah, alak ua noumau ngei in na hihbuah uh ka siangthousak ding ahi; huchi in amitmuh ua noute a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26036024	Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, gam tengteng a kipan ka hon kaikhawm ding a, na gam mahmah uah ka hon pilut ding hi.
26036025	Huan na tung uah tui siang ka theh ding a, na hong siangthou ding ua, na nitna tengteng uleh na milimte lak ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ding.
26036026	Lungtang thak ka hon pe ding a, na sung uah kha thak ka koih ding; na taksa ua kipan suang bang a sak lungtang ka lamang ding a, taksa bang a nip lungtang ka hon pe zaw ding hi.
26036027	Na sung uah ka kha ka koih ding a, ka dan bawl ah ka hon vaksak ding a, ka thupiakte na kem ding ua, na zui ding uh.
26036028	Na pipute uh kiang a ka piak gam ah na teng ding uh; nou ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding.
26036029	Na nitna tengteng ua kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, buh-le-bal ka sam ding a ka hon pungsak ding, na tung uah kial ake nawn kei ding hi.
26036030	Singgahte ka pungsak ding a, louma ka pungsak ding a, kial ziak in namte lak ah zahlakna na thuak kei ding uh.
26036031	Huchi in na omdan giloute uh, na thil hihhoihloute uh na theigige ding ua, na kihhuaina uleh na thulimlouhna uh ziak in noumau mitmuh mahmah in na kihta ding uhi.
26036032	Noute ziak a hiai hih ka hi kei chih na thei mai un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Aw, Israel inkote aw, na omdan ziak un zum unla, lamdang sa un.
26036033	Na thulimlouhna tengteng ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ni chiang in, khopite ka hon luahsak nawn ding a, mun sesa ka bawl nawn ding.
26036034	Huchi in gam sesa, tuma lam a mi vialvakte mitmuh a sesa nung himahleh lei leh in a-om ding hi.
26036035	Hiai gam sesa nung Eden huan bang mai ahong hi nawnta, achi ding uh; khopi sia a, na kigawpsate luah leh um in a-om nawn ding hi.
26036036	Huan na kim ua nam omlaite'n kei Toupa'n mun siate ka bawl nawn a, gam na se khinsa ka hihhoih nawnta chih athei ding uh; kei Toupa ka pauta a, ka hih ngei ding hi.
26036037	Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Huai lou in hiai Israel inkote ka hon dingsak ding a; ganhon bang mai a amite uh hihpung ding in.
26036038	Kithoihna ding ganhon, a-ankuanglui sehsa a Jerusalem ganhonte bang mai in; huchibang in khopi sesa nung mipi tampi in ahong dim ding ua; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.
26037001	Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, Toupa kha in ahon pikhia a, phaizang laitak ah hon koih a; guh ngen in huai phaizang adim hi.
26037002	Huan alak uah ahon pi vialvial a; phaizang ah guh tampi ana om lemlom a; ngai dih, akeu ngen ahi.
26037003	Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte ahing thei diam?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Aw, Toupa Pathian , nang na theizaw hi,” ka chi hi.
26037004	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Thu gen inla, akiang uah, ‘Aw, nou guh keute aw, Toupa thu ngai un.
26037005	Hiai guhte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, noute ah nakna ka lutsak ding a, na hing ding uh.
26037006	Noute ah thagui ka koih ding a, sa in ka hon tuam ding a, vun in ka hon khuh ding; huan na sung uah nakna ka omsak ding a, na hing ding ua, kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh,’ chi in,” achi hi.
26037007	Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka genta a; ka gen leh husa ahong om a, ngai in, aging luilui a, guhte amau kizoppih chiat ah akisutuah khawmta uh.
26037008	Ka etleh ngai in, amau ah thagui ahong om a, sa in atuam a, vun in akhuhta a; nakna bel amau ah a-om nai kei hi.
26037009	Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Huih kiang ah thu gen inla, mihing tapa, gen mahmah in, huih kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nakna, kawlmong li a kipan in hong pai inla, hiai mithahte tung ah nak in, ahintheihna ding un, chi in,” achi hi.
26037010	Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka gen a, amau ah nakna ahong lut a, ahingta ua, amau khe chiat in ahong dingh ua, sepaihhon thupitak ahong hita hi.
26037011	Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte Israel inkote pumpi ahi ua; ngai dih, amau, ‘Ka guhte uh akeu khin in, ka lamet uh abei khinta, phukmang in ka omta uh,’ achi uhi.
26037012	Huaiziak in thu gen inla, akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ahante uh ka hong ding a, aw, ka mite aw, na han ua kipan ka hon khah ding a; huchi in Israel gam ah ka hon pilut ding hi.
26037013	Na hante uh ka hon a, na han ua kipan ka hon pawtsak hun chiang in, aw, ka mite aw, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.
26037014	Huan noumau ah ka Kha ka koih ding a, na hing ding uh, na gam ngei uah ka hon koih ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita a, ka hih lai ding ahi chih na thei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” achi hi.
26037015	Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi.
26037016	Nang, mihing tapa, chiang khat la inla, atung ah, “Judah leh akithuahpih Israel suante,” chih gelh in; chiang dang leng la inla, atung ah, “Joseph leh Ephraim chiang leh akithuahpih Israel inkote tengteng,” chih gelh in.
26037017	Huan chiangte peh inla, na khut a khat ahihtheihna ding in.
26037018	“Hiaite bang chihna ahi ua, na hon kawkmuh kei dia hia?” Na nam tate un na kiang ahon chih uleh, akiang uah,
26037019	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Ephraim leh akithuahpih Israel chite khut a om Joseph chiang ka la ding a, huaite Judah chiang toh ka peh ding a, khat in ka bawl ding a, ka khut ah khat ahong hi ding, na chi ding hi.
26037020	Chiang, atung a na gelhnate mahmah amitmuh ngei uah na khut ah a-om ding hi.
26037021	Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ava tunna gam ua namte lak a kipan Israel tate ka pikhe ding a, ning chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a, agam uah ka pikik ding hi.
26037022	Huan huai gam, Israel tangte ah nam khat in ka bawl ding a, kumpipa khat avek ua kumpipa ahi dia; huan, nam nih ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vaihawmna gam nih in leng akikhen nawn sam kei ding hi.
26037023	Amilimte uh, athilkihhuaite uh, atatleknate un leng akihihnin ngei nawnta kei ding ua; apuk ua akhelhna nak tengteng ua kipan ka hunkhe ding a, ka khuahsiang ding; huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding hi.
26037024	Ka nasempa David atung ua kumpipa ahi ding a, avek ua tung ah belamchingtu khat a-om ding; ka thupiakte amang ding ua, ka dan bawlte azui ding ua, azang ding uh.
26037025	Ka nasempa Jakob kiang a ka gam piak, na pipute uh na tenna sek ah ateng ding ua; huai ah tangtawn in ateng ding ua, amau leh atate uh, atate uh tate leng; ka nasempa David tangtawn in aheutu uh ahi ding hi.
26037026	Huai lou leng amau kiang ah lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau a ding in tangtawn thukhun ahi ding a, akiang uah ka pe ding a, amau ka pungsak ding a, alak uah tangtawn in ka biakbuk ka dingsak ding hi.
26037027	Ka biakbuk leng akiang uah a-om ding a, a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh.
26037028	Huan alak ua tangtawn a ding a ka biakbuk adin hun chiang in kei Toupa , Israel hihsiangthoupa ka hi chih namte'n athei ding uh, achi, chi in.
26038001	Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a:
26038002	“Mihing tapa, Magog gam a mi, Rosh leh Meshek leh Tubal heutupen Gog masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in.
26038003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi.
26038004	Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, na haizek ah ngakuai in ka hon kuai ding a, ka hon khaikhe ding; na sepaihhon tengteng, sakol leh atungtuang mite, galvan buching a kithuam tengteng, pawl thupitak, lum lian leh lum neu zang a namsau tawi chiatte toh in.
26038005	Persia, Kush, Put toh, avek ua lum leh sik lukhu neite;
26038006	Gomer leh asepaihhon tengteng; Togarmah inkote, mal tawp a mi leh asepaihhon tengteng; na kiang a mi tampite toh leng.
26038007	Kigalgin inla, ahi, na man in, nang leh na kiang a omkhawm, na kithuahpih tengteng toh; huan amau vengpa na hi in.
26038008	Ni tampi nung in sap na hi ding a, kum nanungte ah namsau a kipan hotkhiak, nam tampite lak a kipan lakkhawmte omna gam, Israel tanggam kise gigete na hon sual ding a; himahleh namte lak a kipan huai mite pikhiak ahi ua, tu in avek un lungmuangtak in akhosa ding uhi.
26038009	Na kuantou ding a, huihpi bang mai in na hong tung ding a, meipi in gam atuam moimoi bang mai na hi ding, nang leh na kiang a sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mi tampite.”
26038010	Huan hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, na lungsim ah thil a hong lut ding a, thil hoih lou na suangtuah ding.
26038011	Huchi in kulh nei lou khuate gam ka sim ding a, mi bittak a om hiathiat, avek ua kulh lou a teng, kulh kongkhak leh akalhna sik neiloute ka sual ding, na chi sim ding hi.
26038012	Gallak sum leh vante la ding leh mun sesa nung luah nawn mite leh namte lak a kipan pikhawmsa, ganhon leh vante hau a, lei laizang a tengte tung ah na khut lik na tum ding hi.
26038013	Sheba leh Dedan leh Tarshish sumsin mite leh ahumpinelkai lun lai tengtengte'n na kiang ah, gallak la ding in na hong pai maw? Hon lok ding a na pawlte hon khawm na hi maw? Dangkasik, dangka-eng, ganhon leh van, thupitak suhsak a lamang ding na hi maw? ahon chi ding uh,” chi in.
26038014	Huaiziak in mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Gog kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huai ni, ka mi Israelte bittak a a-om hun ding uh na thei kei maw?
26038015	Mallam gam tawp pek, na mun a kipan in na hong pai ding a, nang leh na kiang a mi tampi sakol tungtuang chiat, pawl thupi mahmah, sepaihhon thupitak mai.
26038016	Meipi in gam atuam lunglung bang in ka mi Israelte tung ah na hong pai ding a; huan hichi ahi ding a, ni nanungte ah ka gam dou ding in ka hon pi ding a, namte'n ahon thei ding ua, Aw, Gog, amitmuh ua nang a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in.
26038017	Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tuma lam a ka nasempa Israel zawlnei, huai lai kum tampi sung a thu na gente'n amaute sual ding a ka hon pi ding thu agen sekpa uh na hi hia? chi in,” achi hi.
26038018	Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Israel gam sual ding a Gog ahong kuan hun in ka mel ah ka thangpaihna akilang ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26038019	Ka mullit a ka thangpaih laitak in, huai ni in Israel gam ah zin nakpi in aling ngeingei ding hi.
26038020	Huchi in tuipi ngate, tungleng vasate, gamsate, leitung a vak ganhing tengteng, leitung a mihing tengteng ka ma ah aling ding ua, tangte niamsak in a-om ding a, kawlte achim ding a, kulhbaang teng lei ah apuk ding, chi in ka gen hi.
26038021	Ka tang tengteng ah amah sualna ding in namsau ka sam ding a; michih in namsau in a-unaupa adou ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26038022	Huan sisan pawt leh hipi in amah ka sual ding a; amah leh asepaihhonte leh akiang a mi tampite tung ah vuahpi leh gial thupi leh mei katte ka zusak ding.
26038023	Huan ka thupidan leh ka sianthoudan ka hihlang ding a, nam tampite mitmuh in ka kihihlang ding, huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26039001	Huan nang, mihing tapa, Gog tung ah thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai in, Aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi.
26039002	Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, ka hon pi zel ding a, mal tawp pek a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, Israel tangte ah ka hon tun ding hi.
26039003	Na khut veilam a kipan na thalpeu ka kitansak ding a, na khut taklam a kipan na thalte ka kesak ding hi.
26039004	Israel tangte ah na puk ding a, nang leh na sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mipi omte toh, sasial ne vasa chitengte kiang leh gam sahangte kiang ah nekgaih ding in ka hon pe ding hi.
26039005	Gamlak ah na puk ding a; ke'n ka chita a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26039006	Magog leh tui gei gam a bittak a tengte tung ah mei ka khah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26039007	Huan ka mi Israelte lak ah ka min siangthou ka hihlang ding a, ka min siangthou hihbuah ka phal nawnta kei ding a; huchi in namte'n kei, Toupa Israel Mi Siangthoupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.
26039008	Ngai un, ahong tung hi; hihtangtun in a-om ngei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; hiai ni ahi ka na gen.
26039009	Huan Israel khopi a tengte apawtkhe ding ua, meikuang ah galvante akhul ding ua, akangmang ding; lum lian leh lum neute, thal leh apeute, teipi leh chiangzumte kum sagih sung meikuang ah akhul ding uhi.
26039010	Huchi in gam sing apo kei ding ua, gammang singte aphuk kei ding uh, galvante sing khul ding a zang ding uh ahi ngal a; gallak la mite gallak in ala tei ding ua, lok mite alokthuk ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26039011	Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Gog a ding in Israel gam ah vuina mun ka pe ding a, tuipi suahlam, Abarim Phaizang ngei; huai in khualzinte adal ding a, Gog leh alawite avui ding ua; huchi in huai phaizang Hamongog Phaizang asa ding uhi.
26039012	Huan Israel inkote'n agam uh khuahsiang in kha sagih sung avui ding uh.
26039013	Ahi, agam ua mi tengteng in avui ding ua; pahtawi a ka om ni in ka minthanna ahi ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26039014	Agam uh khuahsianna ding in, luang vuilouhte teng zongkhia avui ding in nasep a nei ding mi aseptuam ding uh, kha sagih bei nung in azong pan ding uhi.
26039015	Gam vel mite'n avel un, mihing guhte amuh uleh chiamtehna abawl ding ua, Hamongog Phaizang a vui mite'n avui ma uh.
26039016	Huan Hamonah khopi min ahi ding. Huchibang in gam akhuahsiang ding uhi.
26039017	Nang, mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Vasa chichihte leh sa chichihte kiang ah thu gen inla, pungkhawm unla, hong pai un, sa na nek ua sisan na dawntheihna ding un Israel tang a kithoihna thupitak, nou a dia ka bawl kim ah hong kikhawm un.
26039018	Mithupi sate na ne ding ua, lei a heutute sisan na dawn ding ua; belamtalte, belamnoute, kelte, Bashan gam a bawngtal vak thau tengteng sisan toh.
26039019	Nou a dia kithoihna ankuang ka lui thau, vah kikeih in na ne ding ua; asisan kham khop in na dawn ding uh.
26039020	Huchi in sakolte, kangtalai kai mite, mithupite leh galdoumi tengteng in ka ankuang ah na tai ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26039021	Huchi in namte lak ah ka thupina ka koih ding a, nam tengteng in athugel hihpuksate leh atung ua ka khut khakdante amu ding uh.
26039022	Huai ni a kipan Israel inkote'n kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih atheita ding uh.
26039023	Namte'n Israel inkote athulimlouhna ziak un sal in atang uh chih athei ding ua; ka tung a aginom louh mahmah ziak un amau tung ah ka mel ka sel a, huchi in amelmate uh khut ah ka pia a, namsau in apuk vek uhi.
26039024	Asianthoulouhna bang zel uleh atatlekna bang zel un atung uah ka hih tei a; amau a kipan ka mel ka sel ahi.
26039025	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tu'n zaw Jakobte omdan ka hei ding a, Israel inkuan pumpi tung ah zah ka ngai ding, ka min siangthou gum in ka thikthu ase ding hi.
26039026	Kuamah lausakmi om lou a, agam ua bittak a aten hun un leng atatlekna tengteng uh, ka tung a atatlekna uh leh azahlakna uh apo ding uhi.
26039027	Mite lak a kipan ka pikhiak nawn a, amelmate uh gam a kipan ka kaihkhawm a, amau nam tampi mitmuh a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in.
26039028	Huan namte lak a sal a ka tansak nawn a, agam ngei ua ka pikhawm nawndan ah kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh; huai ah alak ua khat lel leng ka nuse kei ding hi.
26039029	Amau a kipan ka mel ka sel nawnta kei ding; Israel inkote tung ah ka kha ka sungta ngal a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.
26040001	I saltan akum sawmnih-le-ngana, huai kum bul, huai kha ani sawmna, khopi siat nung akum sawm-le-lina, huai ni mahmah in Toupa khut ka tung ah ahong om a, huai ah ahon pi hi.
26040002	Pathian mengmuhna ah Israel gam ah ahon pi a, tang sangtak ah ahon koih a, huai simlam ah khopi dinsaksa bangtak a-om hi.
26040003	Huai ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, mi khat ana om a, amel latdan dal bang mai ahi a; khauzang leh tehna chiang atawi a, kongpi ah adingh hi.
26040004	Huan huai mi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na mit in en inla, na bil in za in; ka hon etsak ding lam ah na lungsim nga tinten in; huai ka hon etsak ding ziak a hiai a ka hon pi na hi ngal a; na muh tengteng Israel inkote kiang ah puang in,” achi hi.
26040005	Huan ngai dih, tempul kimvel ah kulhbaang ana om a, huai mi'n tehna chiang, tong guk a sau atawi a, atong khat bel tong khat leh khutpek bok chia ahi a; kulhbaang sahlam ateh a, chiang khep khat ahi a, asanlam leng chiang khep khat mah ahi.
26040006	Huchi in suahlam chial kongpi ahong tung a, akalbi ah apaitou a; kongpi lutna dantan ateh a, chiang khep khat a za ahi.
26040007	Huan vilna dantante adunglam chiang khep khat, availam chiang khep khat chiat ahi; vilna dantan kikal tong nga chiat ahi a; huan Inpi lam kongpi sumtawng kongpi lutna dantan chiang khep khat ahi.
26040008	Inpi lam sumtawng leng ateh a, tong giat ahi.
26040009	Abaangkate tong nih chiat ahi a, kongpi sumtawng inpi lam ah ahi.
26040010	Huan suahlam kongpi vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak ahi a, athum un akikim vek uhi; huan, baangkate leng alang tuak ah akikim ahi.
26040011	Kongpi lutna vailam ateh a, tong sawm ahi a; kongpi paisuakna vailam tong sawmthum ahi.
26040012	Huan vilna dantan ma ah deidanna langkhat ah tong khat a sah tuaktuak a-om a; huchi in vilna dantante lang tuak tong guk tuak ahi hi.
26040013	Huan kongpi ateh a, vilna dantan khat tung a kipan alangkhat tung pha in tong sawmnih-le-nga a za ahi; kongkhak leh kongkhak kizom chiat in.
26040014	Sumtawng leng ateh a, tong sawmnih ahi a; kongpi sumtawng pua bel huangsung ahi kei hi.
26040015	Huan kongpi ponungpen a kipan kongpi sumtawng sunggilpen chiang tong sawmnga ahi.
26040016	Huan kongpi sunglam ah akimvel in dantante ah tohlet hon theih louh a-om a, akikal a khuamte ah leng; asumtawngte ah leng, huchibang mah in asunglam ah leng akimvel in tohlet a-om a, akhuamte ah tum sing lim a-om chiat nawn hi.
26040017	Huan huangsung ponungzaw ah ahon pi a; ngai dih, dantante a-om a, huangsung kimvel suanglep ahi a; huan, suanglep ah dantan sawmthum a-om hi.
26040018	Huan suanglep bel kongpi a kipan a lep ahi a, kongpi tan ding mah a lep ahi, huai tuh suanglep nuainungzaw ahi.
26040019	Huchi in kongpi nuaizaw pen zawn a kipan in huang sungnungzaw pen polam pha in ateh a, azatdan suahlam leh mallam tong zakhat ahi.
26040020	Huan huangsung ponungzaw pen kongpi mallam pang a adung leh avai leng ateh hi.
26040021	Huan vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak a-om a, abaangkate leh akongpi sumtawngte leng amasa bang vek ahi; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, avai tong sawmnih-le-nga.
26040022	Atohlette, asumtawngte, atum sing limte suahlam kongpi toh kikim vek ahi; kalbi sagih a-omtou a; asunglam ah asumtawng a-om hi.
26040023	Huang sungnungzaw pen lutna ding kongpi bel kongpi dang zawn ah a-om zel a, mallam leh suahlam ah leng; kongpi leh kongpi kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.
26040024	Huan simlam ah ahon pi nawn a, ngai in, simlam kongpi ana om a; atehdan ngei in abaangkate leh asumtawng ateh hi.
26040025	Huai ah adangte bangmah in akimvel in tohlette a-om a, asumtawng ah leng; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi.
26040026	Huan kalbi sagih a-omtou a, asunglam ah sumtawng a-om a; alang tuak abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om zel hi.
26040027	Simlam ah huang sungnung lutna ding kongpi a-om a, simlam kongpite kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.
26040028	Huan simlam kongpi ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, tehna ngei in simlam kongpi ateh a;
26040029	vilna dantante, abaangkate sumtawngte tehna mah in huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi.
26040030	Huan akimvel ah sumtawngte a-om a, adunglam tong sawmnih-le-nga, availam tong nga ahi.
26040031	Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw lam anga a; abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.
26040032	Huan suahlam ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, atehna ngei in kongpi ateh hi.
26040033	Avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte tehna mah in; huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam bel tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi.
26040034	Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw pen lam anga a, abaangkate ah lang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.
26040035	Huan mallam kongpi ah ahon pi nawn a; atehna ngei in ateh a; avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte;
26040036	huai ah akimvel in tohlette a-om a; adunglam tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga.
26040037	Abaangkate huangsung ponungzaw pen lam ah a-om a; abaangkate ah alang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om hi; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.
26040038	Kongpi sumtawng a kipan a lut theih in dantan a-om a, huai ah halmang kithoihna ding asil zel uhi.
26040039	Kongpi sumtawng lang tuak ah; halmang kithoihnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a thillatte gohna ding dohkan nih tuak a-om hi.
26040040	Mallam kongpi lutna kahtouhna polam sik khat ah dohkan nih a-om a; kongpi sumtawng langkhat ah leng dohkan nih a-om nawn hi.
26040041	Huchi in kongpi sik langkhat ah dohkan li a-om a, alangkhat ah dohkan li a-om nawn a; kithoihna gan gohna dohkan giat ahi.
26040042	Huan halmang kithoihna dia dohkan li, suangsek a bawl, adunglam tong khat-le-akim, availam tong khat-le-akim, asanlam tong khat a-om a; huai ah halmang kithoihna leh thillat gohna ding vanzatte akoih zel uhi.
26040043	Huan asunglam ah akimvel in kuaika, khutpek khuh a sau abulh ua; dohkan tungte ah thil latsate a-om hi.
26040044	Huan huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pilut a, ngai dih, huang sungnungzaw pen ah dantan nih ana om a; khat pen mallam kongpi chin ah, simlam nga in a-om a, khat pen simlam kongpi chin ah mallam nga in a-om hi.
26040045	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai dantan simlam nga, tempul kemtu siampute omna ahi a;
26040046	dantan mallam nga maitam kem siampute omna ahi; hiaite Zadok tate, Levi tate lak a ama nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih sekte ahi uh,” achi hi.
26040047	Huan huangsung ateh a, adunglam tong zakhat, availam tong zakhat, kimvel ahi; maitam bel tempul maitak a om ahi.
26040048	Tempul inlim ah ahon pi a, sumtawng baangkate ateh chiat a, alang tuak ah tong nga a sah tuaktuak a-om a, alutna tong sawm leh tong li a za ahi; asik tuak a kongpi baangkate tong thum tuaktuak ahi.
26040049	Asumtawng adunglam tong sawmnih, availam tong sawm-le-nih ahi a; luttouhna ah kalbi sawm a-om a, baangka chin ah alang tuak ah khuam lian a-om hi.
26041001	Huan tempul ah ahon pilut a, abaangkate ateh a, asik tuak ah tong guk a sah tuaktuak a-om a, huai tuh biakbuk vailam chia ahi.
26041002	Huan alutna tong sawm a za ahi a; asik tuak ah baangkate tong nga tuaktuak ahi; huan asunglam ateh a, adunglam tong sawmli leh availam tong sawmnih ahi.
26041003	Dantan sungnung ah alut a, alutna baangkate tong nih a sah tuaktuak ahi a; alutna tong guk a za ahi a; alutna baangkate tong sagih tuaktuak ahi.
26041004	Dantan sungnung ateh a, asungpi ban ah adunglam tong sawmnih ahi a; tempul kantan availam leng tong sawmnih ahi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hiai Mun Siangthoupen ahi,” ahon chi hi.
26041005	Huan atempul baang ateh a, tong guk a sah ahi; huan tempul sik chih ah dantan tong li a za chiat a-om hi.
26041006	Huan chial thumte ah pang dantante a-om ua, huchi a huai lai a letkipna aneih theihlouhna ding un, tempul baang a letkipna nei lou in.
26041007	Huchi in apang dantante hong san hiaihiai in aza semsem a; tempul azuih touh ziak in, akimvel in asungpi anaih hulhul hi. Huchi in dantan nuainungpen a kipan atungnungpen pha a pai ding in alai a kantan ding ahi.
26041008	Huan tempul kim ah suanglep vum om in ka mu a; pang dantan suangphum tehna chiang, tong guk hial a sau tan a sang ahi.
26041009	Pang dantan polam bang tong nga a sah ahi; tempul pang dantan polam baang ban ah tong nga a-awl lai hi.
26041010	Inpi suanglep vum leh tempul huangsung dantante kikal akimvel in tong sawmnih a za ahi.
26041011	Pang dantan kongkhakte mun awng lam a hon ahi a, khat in mallam, adang khat in simlam anga a; akim a mun awng tong nga a za ahi.
26041012	Huan tumlam a phaitam khekhiakna lam nga inn tong sawmsagih a za ahi; huai inn baang akim in tong nga a sah vek ahi a, adung tong sawmkua ahi.
26041013	Huan tempul ateh a tong za a sau ahi; inn phaitam mun awng leh huai tempul baang sahdan simtel in tong za ahi nawn hi.
26041014	Tempul kongtual mun awng tong za a sau ahi.
26041015	Huan aphaitam mun awng khen inn dunglam ateh a, apang tuak abaangte huap in tong zakhat ahi.
26041016	Huan asungpite, tohlet khuam neute, polam sumtawngte singpek in athuap ua; athum un akimvel in hon theih louh tohlet leh inchial anei a; inpi lutna kongpi tan in apialkhang a kipan tohlet pha a apum a singpek a thuap ahi, tohlet leng thuap ahi lai hi.
26041017	Kongpi lutungte, dantan sungnung tanpha leh apolam toh, baang tengteng asunglam leh apolam tan in.
26041018	Huaite cherub limte leh tum sing limte a zep ahi a, cherub leh cherub kikal ah tum sing a-om zel a; cherubte'n mai nih anei chiat uhi.
26041019	Mihing mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga a, humpinelkai tuailai mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga nawn hi. Hiaite tempul kimvel vek in agelh uhi.
26041020	Apialkhang a kipan in kongpi tung pha in cherub leh tum sing lim a zep vek ahi; tempul baang bel huchi vek ahi.
26041021	Tempul kongpi biang khuamte tuh asah azat kibang ahi. Mun Siangthou ma ah sing a bawl maitam bangtak a-om hi.
26041022	Tong thum a sang, tong nih a za, aningte, atawte leh apangte sing a bawl vek ahi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai Toupa ma a dohkan ahi,” achi hi.
26041023	Tempul leh Mun Siangthou in kongkhak nih tuaktuak anei hi.
26041024	Kongkhak in phel nih anei tuaktuak a; aphel khat bel kheptheih chiat ahi; kongkhak khat ah phel nih, adang ah phel nih anei hi.
26041025	Baang a agelh mah bang un tempul kongkhakte ah cherub leh tum sing lim agelh chiat lai ua; sumtawng pua ah singpek sah mahmah aphalh uhi.
26041026	Huan sumtawng baang lang tuakte leh singpek phalhte ah tohlet hon theih louh leh tum sing lim a-om lai a; atempul pang dantan leh singpek phalh leng huchibang mah ahi.
26042001	Huan huang sungnungzaw malam pang ah ahon pikhia a; mun awng zawn mallam kulh khuam doh dantan ah hon pilut hi.
26042002	Mallam pang a dantante tong za a sau tong sawmnga a za ahi.
26042003	Huang sungnungzaw pen mun awng tong sawmnih lam nga leh huang ponungzaw suanglep lam doh inchial thum a-om tuaktuak hi.
26042004	Dantante kikal ah tong sawm a za, tong za a sau paisuakna a-om a, akongkhakte'n mallam anga hi.
26042005	Dantan tungnungte akochikzaw a; inchial nuainungzaw leh alaitate sang in a-inchialte'n mun lian aluah zaw uhi.
26042006	Chial thum a lam ahi a, huangsung khuamte bang in khuam anei kei a; huchi in alaita sang in atungnungpen akochikzaw a, alaita leng anuainungpen sang in akochikzaw lai hi.
26042007	Huan dantan pang polam ah huangsung ponungzaw pen lam doh baang tong sawmnga a sau a-om hi.
26042008	Huangsung ponungzaw a dantante tong sawmnga a sau ahi ua; tempul zul a pen tong za a sau ahi.
26042009	Huan huai dantante nuai ah suahlam pang ah huangsung ponungzaw a kipan polam ah alutna a-om hi.
26042010	Simlam ah leng mun awng zawn a kulhbaang doh in dantante a-om nawn hi.
26042011	Ama a paina leng mallam dantante paina mah bang ahi a; adung leh avai leng, apawtkhiaknate, alepkhawmdante, akongkhakte'n simlam anga chih kia lou ngal akibang vek ahi.
26042012	Huai dantante lutna ding paisuakna tawp suahlam baangchin ah kongkhak a-om hi.
26042013	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Simlam leh mallam dantan, mun awl hon dohte dantan siangthoute ahi ua; thil siangthoute akoihkhawm ua; nek ding latnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a kithoihnate alatna ding uh ahi; amun lah asiangthou ngal a.
26042014	Huai lai a siampute alut phot uleh, mun siangthou a kipan in huangsung ponungzaw ah apawtkhe ding uh ahi kei; huai ah anasepna puansilhte uh akoih zaw ding ua, puansilh siangthou ahi ngal ua; puansilh dang silh kia in vantang lak ah agamtang thei ding uh,” achi hi.
26042015	Tempul sungnungzaw pen ateh khit in suahlam nga kongpi ah ahon pikhia a, tempul kimvel in ateh hi.
26042016	Tehna chiang in suahlam pang ateh a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi.
26042017	Mallam pang ahon teh nawn leuleu a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi.
26042018	Simlam pang ateh nawn a, tehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi.
26042019	Huan tumlam ahon teh nawn a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi.
26042020	Apang li in atehta a; adunglam tong zanga, availam tong zanga ahi; akim in kulhbaang nei ahi; huai mun siang leh siang lou deidanna ding a bawl ahi.
26043001	Huchi in kongpi ah, suahlam kongpi ah ahon pi hi.
26043002	Ngai dih, Israel' Pathian thupina suahlam a kipan in ahong tung a; ahusa tui tampi ging bang ahi a, athupina in leitung atanvak hi.
26043003	Kilakna ka muh a alatdan, khopi hihse ding a hong pai leh Kebar lui gei a kilakna ka muh bangmah ahi a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi.
26043004	Suahlam nga kongpi ah tempul sung ah Toupa thupina alut hi.
26043005	Kha in ahon domkang a, huang sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a; huan, ngai in, Toupa thupina in tempul aluahdim hi.
26043006	Huan mi khat ka kiang a adin lai in mi kuahiam tempul polam a kipan hon houpih in ka za a, ka kiang ah,
26043007	“Mihing tapa, hiai ka laltutphah omna mun, ka khepek ngakna, Israel suante lak a tangtawn a ka tenna ding mun ahi; ka min siangthou Israel inkote'n amau inn hiam, akumpipate uh hiam, ahukna uleh akumpipate uh luangvuina a zang in ahihthanghuai nawnta kei ding uh.
26043008	Akongpi uh ka kongpi chin mahmah a bawl in, akongpi biang uh ka kongpi biang zul a koih in amau leh keimah kikal ah baang kia omsak in athilhih kihhuaite un ka min siangthou ahihthanghuai uhi; huaiziak in ka hehna in amau ka hihmangta hi.
26043009	Tu a kipan in kizuaknate, akumpipa uh luangte kei a kipan gamlapi ah koihmang le uh; huchi in alak uah tangtawn in ka teng ding hi.
26043010	“Nang mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah tempul lim ensak in; athilhihkhelh uh azumpih theihna ding un, abawldan ding leng na teh uhen.
26043011	Huan athilhih tengteng uh azumpih ua atempul omdante, apawtkhiaknate, alutnate, ageldante, azatdante, akepdante ensak inla, amitmuh mahmah uah gelh in; adan pumpi leh azatdan tengteng avom ua, azuihtheihna ding un.
26043012	Hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi; tang vum tau kim tengteng mun siangthoupen ding ahi; ngai dih, hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi.
26043013	“Huan tong a teh in hiai maitam let lam ahi, tong khat chih tong khat leh khutpek tuam ahi a, akingakna tong khat a sang, tong khat a za, agei akim a khap khat a pawng zel ahi.
26043014	Huan maitam sanlam hichibang ahi; lei a akingakna a kipan dohdan nuainungzaw pen tong nih ahi a, azatlam tong khat; adohdan neuzaw pen a kipan dohdan lianzaw pen tong li ahi a, tong khat a za ahi.
26043015	Amaitam tau tong li a sang ahi nawn a, maitam tau a kipan leh atunglam kii li ding ahi.
26043016	Maitam tau adung leh avai tong sawm-le-nih tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi.
26043017	Dohdan dung leh vai tong sawm-le-li tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi; agei tong kimkhat ahi; akingakna akim in tong khat ahi; akalbi in suahlam angat ding ahi,” achi hi.
26043018	Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Abawl khit chiang ua maitam zatdan ding hichibang ahi; halmang kithoihna dingte, sisan thehna dingte ahi.
26043019	Levi chi siampu Zadok suan a mi, nna hon sepsak ding a hon naih sekpa kiang ah khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai na piak ding ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
