26043020	Asisan na la ding a, maitam kii lite leh adohdan ning lite, agei kimvel in na luan ding a; huchibang in maitam na hihsiang in na siangsak ding hi.
26043021	Khelh ziak a kithoihna bawngtaltuai na la ding a, huai ding a tempul aseh uh, mun siangthou polam ah hal ahih ding ahi.
26043022	Huan ani nihna in keltal dembei, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding a lat ding ahi; huchi in maitam bel bawngtaltuai a ahihsiang mah bang un na siangsak ding hi.
26043023	Maitam hihsiang pen na hih khit chiang un ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei leh belamtal, gensiatbei, ahon lak a na lan ding hi.
26043024	Toupa ma ah na lan ding a, siampu in chi asoh ding a, Toupa kiang ah halmang a ding in alan ding.
26043025	Ni sagih sung niteng khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in keltal na zang ding ahi; ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai leh belamtal, ahon lak a, gensiatbei leng azat ding uh ahi.
26043026	Maitam hihsiang leh siansakna in ni sagih ala ding a; huchi in maitam siangthou ahita ding hi.
26043027	Huan huai nite ahihtangtun khit chiang un, ani giat ni a kipan in siampute'n na halmang kithoihnate uh leh lemna kithoihnate amaitam uah alan ding ua, huan ka hon na sang ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi.
26044001	Huan mun siangthou kongpi ponungzaw, suahlam nga ah hon pikik nawn a, kong khaksa ana hi.
26044002	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai kongpi akikhak gige ding a, akihong ngei kei ding a, kuamah alut sam kei ding uh; Toupa , Israel' Pathian ahong lut khit ziak in; akikhak gige ding ahi.
26044003	Kumpi bel Toupa ma a an ne ding in huai ah atu phet ding; sumtawng kongkhak ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawt nawn ding,” achi hi.
26044004	Huan mallam nga kongpi ah tempul intual ah ahon pi a; ka en a ngai dih, Toupa thupina in Toupa tempul aluahdim vek a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi.
26044005	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa tempul zatdan leh adan tengteng na kiang a ka gen tungtang ah na bildoh inla, na mitsuan inla, na lungsim ah chiamteh hoih dih; atempul a lutdante, amun siangthou a kipan pawtdante, na lungsim ah hoihtak in chiamteh in.
26044006	“Huan helhat, Israel inkote ngei kiang ah huchi in na gen ding ahi; Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nou Israel inkote aw, na thilhih kihhuai tengteng uh ahunta,
26044007	lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, ka tanghoute, thaute na lat lai ua ka mun siangthou, ka tempul mahmah hihbuah ding a na pilut ua, ka thukhun a na tatlek uh, na kihhuaina tengtengte uh na tawpta hen.
26044008	Ka thil siangthoute nou na kem kei ua, hiai pau tuam mite ka mun siangthou ah nou sik a kemmi in na sep zaw uhi.”
26044009	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamdangmi kuamah, lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, Israel suante lak a gamdangmi kuamah ka mun siangthou ah alut ding uh ahi kei hi.”
26044010	Levi chi, Israelte milim delh a avakmang lai ua kei a kipan a gamlapi a paisate'n bel athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh.
26044011	Ka mun siangthou ah nasemmi in apang ding ua; tempul kongkhakte angak ding ua; tempul sung ah nna asem ding uh; halmang kithoihnate, mipi a dia kithoihnate agou ding ua; mipi nna sepsak ding in ama uah adingh ding uhi.
26044012	Amilimte uh ma ah a-nna uh asepsak ding ua; Israelte inkote a ding in thulimlouhna a pukna ahih nak ziak un atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a; athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26044013	Huchi in ka kiang ah siampu nna sem ding in ahon naih ngei kei ding ua; ka thil siangthoute, thil siangthoupente ahon naih ngei sam kei ding uh; azahlakna uleh athilkihhuai hihsate uh apo zaw ding uh.
26044014	Tempul kem mite ding in ka bawl ding a, nasepna tengteng leh hih ding om peuhmahte hih ding in.
26044015	Siampu Levi chi, Zadok ta, kei a kipan a Israel suante avakmang lai ua ka mun siangthou kem mite'n bel ka nna sem ding in ahong naih ding uh; thau leh sisan lan ding in ka ma ah adingh ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26044016	Ka mun siangthou ah alut ding ua, nna hon sepsak ding in ka dohkan ahong naih ding ua, kei hon kemmi in apang ding uh.
26044017	Huan huang sungnungzaw kongpite a alut un puanaktual malngat in akithuam ding ua, huang sungnungzaw leh insung lam a nna asep sung un samul puan asilh ding uh ahi kei hi.
26044018	Dial malngat akhim ding ua, puanmalngat pheitom abun ding ua, kho-ulsak thei asilh ding uh ahi kei hi.
26044019	Huan huangsung ponungzaw, vantang kiang a ahong pawtkhiak uleh anasepna puansilhte uh asuah ding ua, dantan siangthou ah akoih ding uh, puansilh dang asilh ding uh; mipite apuansilh ua misiangthou a abawl teilouhna ding un.
26044020	Alute uh ametgiau ding uh ahi kei a; asam uh leng ahawisau ding uh ahi sam kei; amet lel ding uh ahi.
26044021	Siampu kuapeuh huang sungnungzaw pen alut chiang un uain adawn ding uh ahi kei hi.
26044022	Meithai hiam maksa nung hiam zi in anei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; Israel inkote, nungak siangthou hiam siampu sihsan meithai akitenpih zawk ding uh ahi.
26044023	Ka mite thil siangthou leh thil nin kibatlouhdan ahilh ding ua; siang leh siang lou akhentuamsak ding uhi.
26044024	Thubuaite leng angaihtuah ding uh ahi; ka ngaihtuah bang zel in angaihtuah ding uh; ka ankuanglui sehsa tengteng ah ka dante leh ka dan thuseh bawlsate azuih ding uh ahi; ka Sabbathte leng atan ding uh ahi.
26044025	Amau kihihbuah ding in misi luang anaih ding uh ahi kei; himahleh nu hiam, pa hiam, tanu hiam, tapa hiam unaupa hiam sanggamnu pasal nei lou hiam a ding in bel akihihbuah thei ding uh.
26044026	Huan akisiansak nung in amah a ding in ni sagih simsak nawn ding ahi.
26044027	Huang sungnungzaw mun siangthou a nasem ding a alut ni in khelh ziak a kithoihna amah a ding in alan ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26044028	Goutan bangmah anei kei ding ua; agoutan uh kei ka hi ding. Israel ah tan bangmah na pe ding uh ahi kei, atan uh keimah ka hi.
26044029	Nek ding latte, khelh ziak a thillatte, moh ziak a thillatte ane ding ua; Israel lak a thil latsa peuhmah amau a ding ahi.
26044030	Gah masate lak a ahoihpente, na thillat chiteng ua ahoihpen, na thillat tengteng ua siampute a ding ahi; na inn ua vualzawlna atamdet theihna ding in tangbuang meklom hoihpen siampu kiang ah na pe ding uh ahi.
26044031	Siampute'n sapul anek louh ding uh ahi. Vasa hiam gamsa bohzan hiam, amah sih a si hiam anek ding uh ahi kei hi.
26045001	Huai lou in leng goutan ding a gam na hawm hun chiang un gamseh siangthou, Toupa kiang ah thilpiak na bawl ding uhi. Adunglam tong singnih-le-sangnga, availam tong singnih, apum in gam siangthou ahi ding hi.
26045002	Hiai ah mun siangthou a ding in adung leh avai tong zanga tuaktuak, kimvel ahi ding a, akimvel in tong zanga a za mun awng a-om ding ahi.
26045003	Huan hiai tehsa a kipan in adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh avai tong singkhat na tehkhe ding a, huai ah Mun Siangthoupen a-om ding ahi.
26045004	Gamseh siangthou bel, mun siangthou a nasemmi, a-nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih siampute a ding ahi ding a, a-inn mun ding un leh mun siangthou ding in gam siangthou ahi ding hi.
26045005	Mun dang adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat, Levi chi tempul a nasem mite tuam ding in, atenna khopi ding in a-om ding ahi.
26045006	Gamseh siangthou latsa zul ah khopi tan avai tong zanga leh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga na sep ding uhi, Israel inkote pumpi a ding ahi ding.
26045007	Huan kumpi tapa tan bel gam siangthou latsa leh khopi tan malam ah tumlam a tumlam nga in, suahlam a suahlam nga in a-om ding ahi. Adung bel tumlam gamgi a kipan a suahlam gamgi pha in, gamseh dang tan mah ahi.
26045008	Huai bel Israel gam a amah tantuam ahi ding ahi; ka vaihawmte'n ka mite anuaisiah nawn kei ding ua, Israel inkote anam tuamdan bang zel un gam ape zaw ding uhi.
26045009	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel vaihawmte aw, hunta hen, hiamgamna leh kigapna tawpsanta unla; diktattak a vaihawm leh diktak a hih chingta unla, ka mite delhkhiak nak pen tawpsanta un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26045010	Bukna dik, ephah dik leh bath dik na zat ding uh ahi.
26045011	Ephah leh bath akikim ding uh ahi, bath homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi ding a, ephah leng homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi sam ding; homer a kipan a tehkhiak ding ahi ding.
26045012	Huan shekel bel gerah sawmnih ahi ding a; shekel sawmnih toh shekel sawmnih-le-nga toh shekel sawm-le-nga gawmkhawm na mina uh khat toh kikim ahi ding hi.
26045013	Huan hiai thillat na lat ding uh ahi ding; buh homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh buh man homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat na pe ding uhi.
26045014	Huan sathau latdan ding kor khat zel ah bath seh sawm a khen seh khat; kor bel bath sawm ahi.
26045015	Israel gantatna mun hoih a kipan belamhon lak a zanih zel ah anou khat, nek ding lat ding in, halmang kithoihna ding in lemna thillat ding in amaute hihsianna bawlna ding in alat ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26045016	Gam a mi tengteng in Israel vaihawmpa kiang ah hiai thillat ape ding uh.
26045017	Ankuang luina ah, kha thak ah, Sabbath ni ah, Israel ankuanglui ni sehsa tengteng ah halmang kithoihna, nek ding lat, dawn ding latte lan in angaihtuah ding a; khelh ziak a kithoihna, nek ding lat, halmang kithoihna, lemna thillat Israel inkote kisiansakna ding in ama'n atumsak ding ahi.
26045018	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei na la ding a, mun siangthou na siangsak ding ahi.
26045019	Huan siampu in khelh ziak a kithoihna sisan ala ding a, tempul kongpi biang leh maitam dohdan ning lite leh huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi baangka ah atat ding hi.
26045020	Huai kha ani sagih ni in hihkhak hiam theih louh ziak hiam a thil hihkhialmite a ding in leng huchi mah bang in na hih ding a, huchibang in tempul hihsianna na bawl ding hi.
26045021	“Akha khatna, huai kha ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang na lui ding ua; huan, ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uh.
26045022	Huai ni in vaihawmpa'n amah leh agam a mi tengteng a ding in, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding bawngtaltuai atum ding ahi.
26045023	Ankuanglui hun ni sagih sung teng in bawngtaltuai gensiatbei sagih leh belamtal sagih zel Toupa a ding in halmang kithoihna ding in atum ding; huan khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in niteng in keltal khat toh.
26045024	Huan tanghou lat ding in bawngtal khat zel ah ephah khat, belamtal khat zel ah ephah khat leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat atum ding hi.
26045025	“Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawm leh ni nga ni a ankuangluina ah ni sagih sung huchibang mah in ahih ding a, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, halmang kithoihnate, tanghou latte leh sathau latte atum ding ahi,” achi hi.
26046001	Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi suahlam nga pen nasep ni, ni guk sung a kikhak ding a, Sabbath leh kha thak ni in akihong ding ahi.
26046002	Huan vaihawmpa bel kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, kongpi baangka chin ah adingh ding a, siampute'n ahalmang kithoih leh lemna thillatte abawlsak ding ua, lutna kongpi dantan ah Pathian abe ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, nitaklam tan kong khak louh ahih ding ahi.
26046003	Huan vantang in bel Sabbath leh kha thakte ah kongpi lutna chinte ah Toupa ma ah Pathian abe ding uhi.
26046004	Sabbath ni in vaihawmpa'n Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna a lat ding bel belamnou gensiatbei guk leh belamtal gensiatbei khat ahi ding.
26046005	Belamtal khat zel ah tanghou lat ephah khat, belamnou pen ah bel apiak theih bangbang leh ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi.
26046006	Kha thak ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei khat, belamnou guk leh belamtal khat ahi ding a, gensiatbei ahih vek ding uh ahi.
26046007	Huan tanghou lat abawl ding a, bawngtaltuai ah ephah khat, belamtal ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah atheih bangbang leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat ahi ding hi.
26046008	Vaihawmpa alut chiang in kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawtkhe nawn ding hi.
26046009	Vantangte bel ankuanglui ni sehsa a Toupa ma a ahong pai uleh Pathian be ding a mallam kongpi a hong lut simlam kongpi ah apawtkhe ding ua; simlam kongpi a hong lut mallam kongpi ah apawtkhe leuleu ding uh; alutna kongpi uah akik ding uh ahi kei a, amalam uah apai zaw ding uh ahi.
26046010	Huan alut chiang un alak uah vaihawmpa alut ding a, apawt chiang un apawtkhe nawn ding hi.
26046011	Nopbawlna leh sehsa ankuanglui nite, tanghou lat bawngtaltuai khat ah ephah khat, belamtal khat ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah apiak theih bangbang, ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi.
26046012	Huan vaihawmpa'n ut thu a thillat alat dekleh halmang kithoihna hiam lemna thillat hiam Toupa kiang a ut thu a athillat bang a alat dekleh suahlam nga kong ahonsak ding a, Sabbath ni a hih bangmah in, halmang kithoihnate leh lemna thillatte abawl ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, apawtkhiak nung in kong akhak ding uhi.
26046013	“Niteng a Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna ding in belamnou kum khat a upa, gensiatbei na zang ding a, zingsang in na zat ding ahi.
26046014	Zingsang teng in tanghou lat na bawl ding a, ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh sathau hin khat seh thum a khen seh khat tangbuang nel mahmah anomsakna ding; huai tuh tangtawn a Toupa kiang a tanghou latdan ding ahi.
26046015	Hichibang in halmang thillat gige ding in belamnou, tanghou latte, sathaute zingsang teng in na bawl ding ahi,” chi in.
26046016	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Vaihawmpa'n atapate, kua kiang ah leng, goutan bangpeuh apiakleh atapate a ahi ding a, agou uh luah ahi mai hi.
26046017	Himahleh agoutan a pen anasemmi kuahiam kiang a apiakleh sal pawtna kum tan in anei ding a, huai ah vaihawmpa kiang ah apekik nawn ding hi. Amah gou ngeingei bel atapate a ding ahi ding.
26046018	Huai lou in vaihawmpa in mite goutan asuhsak ding ahi kei a, aneih-le-lam ua kipan adelhkhe ding ahi sam kei; amah a pen mah atapate kiang ah goutan in ape ding a; amau neih-le-lam a kipan mite avakzaklouhna ding un,” achi hi.
26046019	Huan kongpi pang a siampute a dia dantan siangthou mallam nga ah ahon pilut a; ngai dih, aphaitam tumlam pang ah mun ana om hi.
26046020	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai siampute'n moh ziak a thillat leh khelh ziak a thillat ahuanna mun uh, tanghou lat omna mun ahi; huangsung ponungzaw a atawikhiak ua mite hihsianna dia abawllouhna ding un,” achi hi.
26046021	Huang ponungzaw ah ahon pikhia a, huangsung ningzul ah ahon paisak a; ngai dih, ahuangsung ning chiat ah huang ana om nawn hi.
26046022	Huangsung ning li ah huang, bang nei, adung tong sawmli, avai tong sawmthum ana om a; huai aning ate ali un akikim vek uhi.
26046023	Huai mun li sunglam ah akimvel in suang vual in alem ua, huai vual nuai ah akim in huanna ding thuk a-om hi.
26046024	Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Hiai an huanna innte ahi, tempul nasem mite'n mite kithoihna sa ahuanna dingte uh,” achi hi.
26047001	Huchi in tempul kongkhak ah ahon pikik a; ngai dih, tempul kongpi chin nuai a kipan, suahlam nga in tui ahong luangkhia a; tempul suahlam nga ahi a, huan tui maitam simlam tempul pang taklam nuai a kipan in ahong luangkhia hi.
26047002	Huan mallam nga kongpi tawn in ahon pikhia a, inpua ah suahlam nga pawtkhiakna lampi ponungzaw tawn in ahon pi a; ngai dih, taklam pang ah tui ahong luangkhia hi.
26047003	Huan huai mi'n tehna khau tawi kawm a suahlam nga a pai in tong sangkhat ateh a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak a, siakmit tan ahi.
26047004	Huchi in tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak nawn a, khuk tan ahi. Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; hon ngap galkahsak nawn a, tui kawng tan ahi.
26047005	Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; ngah galkah vual louh luipi ahong hita a; tui ahong sang zel a, angah a ngah galkah vual louh, aleuh a leuh tham luipi ahong hita hi.
26047006	Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia?” achi hi. Huan lui gei a kik nawn ding in ahon pikikta hi.
26047007	Huchi in ka kik a, ngai dih, lui gei tawn in, lui gei lang tuak in sing tampi ana om hi.
26047008	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai suahlam gam lam a tui luang Arabah gam a luanglut ding ahi; tuipi ah aluanglut ding a, tuipi tui al tui siangthou asuaksak ding.
26047009	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; luite aluanna peuh uah ganhing chiteng in ahinloh ding ua, ngasate a-om huthut ding uh; tuipi tui asianthouna ding leh aluanna peuh a ganhingte'n ahinlohna ding ua hiai lui hong luang ahi.
26047010	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; agei ah ngaman mite adingh ding ua; Engedi a kipan Eneglaim pha in lenpaihna mun ahi ding; angasa pen achi bang zel un, tuipi lian ngasa bang mai in atam mahmah ding uh.
26047011	Buannawi leh chiklakte bel asiangthou kei ding ua, chikhuk ding a nutsiat ahi ding hi.
26047012	Alui gei ah agei langnih in theikung chi chih apou ding a, huaite anah avuai ngei kei in agah lou ngei sam kei ding, mun siangthou a kipan a lui hong luangkhia a vak ahih ziak in kha teng in agah ding; agah nek ding ahi ding a, anah bel hihdamna ding ahi ding,” achi hi.
26047013	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai Israel nam sawm-le-nih lak a gam kihawmdan ding ahi hi; Joseph in tan nih atang ding.
26047014	Kibang chiat in na tang ding uh ahi; na pipute uh kiang a piak ding a ka kichiamsa ahi; hiai gam na gam tan un apuk ding ahi.
26047015	Hiai a gam pumpi gi ding ahi; mallam ah Tuipi Lian a kipan Hethlon a paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Zedad atung a;
26047016	Berothah, Damaskas leh Hamath kigitna lai a om Sibraim, Hauran gamgi zul a om Hazor-hattikon pha in.
26047017	Huchi in gamgi bel Tuipi Lian a kipan in Damaskas gamgi zul a Hazar-enan pha in ahi ding a; mallam ah Hamath gamgi ahi ding hi. Hiai mallam gamgi ahi.
26047018	Huan suahlam ah Hauran leh Damaskas kikal ah Gilead leh Israel gam kikal a Jordan luidung azui ding; mallam gamgi a kipan in suahlam tuipi ah Tamar apha ding. Hiai suahlam gamgi ahi ding hi.
26047019	Simlam ah Tamar a kipan in Meibothkadesh tuite pha in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding. Hiai simlam gamgi ding ahi.
26047020	Tumlam ah Tuipi Lian in agi ding a, simlam gamgi a kipan in Hamath lutna phaizang zawn pha in. Hiai tumlam gamgi ahi ding hi.
26047021	Huchi in hiai gam Israel nam dungzui in na lak uah na hawm ding uh.
26047022	Huan hichi ahi ding a, na gam tan ding uleh na lak ua namdang teng, zi leh ta neisate gam tan ding bel na hop ding uh ahi. Amau lah Israel ta ding a piang mawng ahi ding uh ahi; Israel namte lak ah noute bang in tan aneih ding uh ahi.
26047023	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; kua nam lak ah leng namdang ana teng taleh, huai lai a agam tan ding na sehsak ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26048001	Hiaite anam minte uh ahi: Mallam gamgi Tuipi Lian a kipan a Hethlon paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Damaskas gamgi a Hamath kiang mallam pang Hazar-enan pha in, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Dante tan ahi.
26048002	Dante tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Asherte tan ahi.
26048003	Asherte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Naphtalite tan ahi.
26048004	Naphtalite tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Manassehte tan ahi.
26048005	Manassehte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Ephraimte tan ahi.
26048006	Ephraimte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Reubente tan ahi.
26048007	Reubente tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Judahte tan ahi.
26048008	Judahte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah, thilpiak na lat ding uh avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding a; adung suahlam leh tumlam sang ah tan dang bangmah in ahi a, alai a mun siangthou om in.
26048009	Thilpiak Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih ahi ding ahi.
26048010	Huan hiai ah siampute a ding in gam siangthou thilpiak ding ahi ding a; mallam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh tumlam ah avai tong singkhat leh suahlam ah avai tong singkhat, simlam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding ahi. Alaizang ah Toupa mun siangthou a-om ding hi.
26048011	Siampu siansaksa, Zadok tapate ka thu kem mite a ding ahi ding, amaute Israel suante avakmang lai ua Levi chite avakmang bang ua vakmangloute ahi uhi.
26048012	Huan gam thilpiak pumpi a kipan amau a dia piak tuam, mun siangthoupen ahi ding; Levi chi tan toh akigi in.
26048013	Siampu tan zulzul ah Levi chite'n tan anei ding ua, adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat ahi ding hi.
26048014	Huan azuak ding uh ahi kei a, akhen ding uh leng ahi sam kei; agam hoihna tata leng midang kiang a piak ding ahi kei hi; Toupa a dia siangthou ahi ngal a.
26048015	Huan avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ban ah tong sangnga vantang tan, khopi dinna ding, tenna inn dingte leh khopuate a ding ahi ding; khopi bel alaizang a a-om ding ahi.
26048016	Huchi in ateh vialdan hichibang in ahi ding: Amallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, asimlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga; asuahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, atumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga.
26048017	Akhopi in khopua anei ding a; mallam pang in tong zanih-le-sawmnga; simlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, suahlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, tumlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga ahi.
26048018	Adunglam val lai, thilpiak siangthou zul a pen suahlam ah tong singkhat, tumlam ah tong singkhat ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa zulzul ahi ding hi; huai a thilpawtte khopi a nasem mite nek ding ahi ding.
26048019	Huchi in khopi a nasemmi Israel nam tengteng a mite'n alei alet ding uhi.
26048020	Thilpiak pumpi adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa, dung leh vai kikim khopi tan toh na lat ding uh ahi.
26048021	Aval thilpiaksa siangthou leh khopi tan pang lang tuaktuak vaihawmpa tan ahi ding a, suahlam sang ah thilpiak tong singnih-le-sangnga ban, gamseh dangte zulzul vaihawmpa tan ahi ding; huchi in thilpiak siangthousa leh tempul mun siangthou bel alaizang ah a-om ding.
26048022	Huan Levi chi tan leh khopi tan vaihawmpa tante kikal ah a-om ding a; vaihawmpa tan Judah tan leh Benjamin tan toh akigi ding.
26048023	Huan nam omlaite tungthu ah, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Benjaminte tan ahi ding.
26048024	Benjaminte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam ah tan khat Simeonte tan ahi.
26048025	Simeonte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam Issakarte tan ahi.
26048026	Issakarte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Zebulunte tan ahi.
26048027	Zebulunte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Gadte tan ahi.
26048028	Gadte tan simlam pang gamgi Tarmar a kipan in Meribah-kadesh tuite tan in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding hi.
26048029	Hiai Israel namte goutan ding a gam kihawmdan ding leh agam sehtuamte ahi uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.
26048030	Huan hiaite khopi a kipan pawtnate ahi uh; mallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum;
26048031	khopi kongpite Israel nam min bang zel a sak ding ahi a; mallam kongpi thumte, Reuben kongpi khat, Judah kongpi khat, Levi kongpi khat;
26048032	suahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Joseph kongpi khat, Benjamin kongpi khat, Dan kongpi khat ahi ding hi.
26048033	Simlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Simeon kongpi khat, Issakar kongpi khat, Zebulun kongpi khat ahi ding.
26048034	Tumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Gad kongpi khat, Asher kongpi khat, Naphtali kongpi khat ahi ding hi.
26048035	Akimvel in tong singkhat-le-sanggiat ahi ding a; huai ni a kipan in khopi min bel, “ Toupa omna mun” chih ahi ding hi.
27001001	Judah kumpipa Jehoakim vaihawm akum thum kum in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hong kuan in Jerusalem ahong um hi.
27001002	Huan Toupa'n akhut ah Judah kumpipa Jehoakim apia a, Pathian in atui-um belsuan khenkhat toh; ama'n Shinar gam ah apathian inn ah huaite apua a; huchi in tui-um belsuante apathian sumkoihna inn ah alalutta hi.
27001003	Kumpipa'n amichilgehte heutupa Ashpenaz, Israel suante lak a kuate hiam, kumpi chite a kipan leh miliante a kipan hon pi ding in akiang ah thu agen hi.
27001004	Tuailaite amau a gensiatna om lou, himahleh hoihtak a deihsakna tang leh pilna tengteng a siamtheihna leh pilna theihsiamna lungpilte, kumpipa inpi a dingh thei ding, huchibang mite; huchi a Kaldai laisiamna leh pau amaute asinsak theihna ding in.
27001005	Huchi in kumpipa'n amau niteng tantuan ding in kumpipa an leh adawn uain a kipan in asehsak a, huchi a kum thum sung a kisinsiamsak a; huchi a huai hun abei chiang a kumpipa ma a adintheihna ding un.
27001006	Huchi in hiaite lak ah, Judah tate a kipan, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah a-om uhi.
27001007	Michilgehte heutupa'n amaute min ding aphuahsak a; Daniel min ding in Belteshazzar; Hananiah min ding in Shadrak; Mishael min ding in Meshak leh Azariah min ding in Abednego aphuak hi.
27001008	Himahleh Daniel in kumpipa an hiam adawn uain hiam a kihihnit louh alungtang in atum tinten hi. Huaiziak in michilgeh heutupa kiang ah akihih nitlouhna ding in angenta hi.
27001009	Huchi in Pathian in Daniel michilgehte heutupa mitmuh in deihsakna leh lainatna amusak hi.
27001010	Huan michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel kiang ah, “Ka toupa kumpipa na an uleh na dawn uh seppa ka lau; bang ding in na khanvualpih uh tuailaite sang a na mel uh hoih lou zaw a hon mu ding ahia oi? Huchi in kumpipa lak ah ka lutang na lauthawngsak dia hia?” achi hi.
27001011	Huchi in Daniel in sumkempa, michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah tung a asehpa kiang ah,
27001012	“Na sikhate ni sawm sung enkhia in, ka hon ngen ahi; nek ding in anteh-louhing leh dawn ding in tui hon pia uhen.
27001013	Huai chiang in na ma ah ka mel uleh amau kumpipa an ne tuailaite mel et hi hen; na muh bang in, na sikhate tung ah hih in,” achi hi.
27001014	Huchi in amau thu angaikhia a, ni sawm sung a-enkhia hi.
27001015	Ni sawm abei in tuailai kumpipa an nete tengteng sang in amel uh hoihzaw in akilang a, asa uh leng athauzaw hi.
27001016	Huchi in sumkempa'n a-an uleh adawn ding uh uain alamang a, amaute kiang ah anteh-louhing ape zawta hi.
27001017	Hiai tuailai lite ahih uleh Pathian in amaute kiang ah laisiamna leh pilna tengteng atheihna leh kivakna apia a; huchi in Daniel in mengmuhna leh mang tengteng ah theihsiamna anei hi.
27001018	Kumpipa'n amaute hon pilut ding achih nite abei in michilgehte heutupa'n amaute Nebukadnezzar ma ah ahon pi hi.
27001019	Kumpipa'n amau ahoulimpih a; amau lak ah Daniel, Hananiah Mishael leh Azariah bang kuamah muh in a-omta kei hi; huaiziak in kumpipa ma ah adinghta uhi.
27001020	Huchi in pilna leh theihsiamna thu chiteng, amaute kumpipa'n adotte ah agamsung a om mitkhialdawi tawi leh bummi tengteng sang in amun sawm a hoihzaw in amaute amu hi.
27001021	Kumpipa Kura in kum khatna vai ahawm tanpha in Daniel apaisuaktou hi.
27002001	Nebukadnezzar vaihawm akum nih kum in Nebukadnezzar in mang anei a; alungsim abuai mahmah a, a-ihmutheita kei hi.
27002002	Kumpipa'n mitkhialdawi tawite leh bum mite leh aisan mite leh Kaldai mite, kumpipa mang hilh ding a sap ding thu apia hi. Huchi in ahong lut ua kumpipa ma ah ahong dinghta uhi.
27002003	Huchi in kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Mang ka nei a, huai mang thei ding in ka lungsim abuai mahmah hi,” achi hi.
27002004	Kaldai mite'n kumpipa kiang ah Siria pau in, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in; na sikhate na mang hilh in, ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi.
27002005	Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kaldai mite kiang ah, hiai thil kei a kipan apaikheta; mang leh ahilhchetna ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei ualeh atnen in na om ding ua, na innte uh ekvum asuak ding.
27002006	Himahleh mang leh ahilhchetna na hon theihsak ualeh kei a kipan in thilpiakte leh kipahman leh nakpitak a zahtakna na mu ding uh; huaiziak in mang leh ahilhchetna hon ensak un,” achi hi.
27002007	Anihveina ding in amau adawng ua, “Kumpipa'n mang hon hilh henla, kou ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi.
27002008	Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kei a kipan hiai thil apaikheta chih na muh ziak un, hun hihsau tum na hi uh chih ka theitel hi.
27002009	Himahleh mang ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei uleh, nou a ding in dan khat kia a-om; hun akikhen tan a, ka ma a thuzuau leh sia gelkhol na hih ziak un; huaiziak in mang hon hilh unla, ahilhchetna na hon ensak thei uh chih ka thei ding,” achi hi.
27002010	Kaldai mite'n kumpipa adawng ua, “Kumpipa thudot ensak thei leitung ah kuamah a-om kei; kumpipa hiam, toupa hiam, vaihawmmi kuamah in mitkhialdawi tawi kuamah hiam, bummi kuamah hiam, Kaldai mi kuamah mah huchibang thu adot ngei louh ziak un.
27002011	Kumpipa thil deih vangtak ahi, mihingte lak a sa a om lou pathiante chih louh ngal, midang kuamah in kumpipa ma ah huai a-ensak thei kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
27002012	Hiai ziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, athangpai tuntun a, Babulon mipil tengteng hihmang ding in thu apeta hi.
27002013	Huchi in thupiak piakkhiak ahita a, mipilte thah ding ahong hita ua; Daniel leh alawmte thah ding in azong uhi.
27002014	Huchi in Daniel in kumpipa veng sepaih zaheutu Ariok, Babulon mipilte that ding a kuankhe pa kiang ah thuhilhna leh thupil toh dawnna akiksak hi.
27002015	Ariok kumpipa sepaih zaheutu adong a akiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a kipan thupiak huchi tel a kin ahia?” achi hi. Huchi in Ariok in Daniel kiang ah athil omdan atheisak hi.
27002016	Daniel alut a, amah a dia hun sehsak ding in kumpipa angen hi, huchi a ahilhchetna kumpipa a-etsak theihna ding in.
27002017	Huchi in Daniel a-inn ah apai a, Hananiah, Mishael, Azariah, alawmte kiang ah huai thil atheisakta hi.
27002018	Huchi a amaute'n hiai thuguk tanchin a van Pathian zahngaihnate angettheihna ding un; huchi a Daniel leh alawmte Babulon a mipilte alakte toh amanthatlouhna ding un.
27002019	Huchi in zan mengmuhna ah Daniel kiang ah thuguk taklat in a-omta hi. Daniel in van Pathian aphat hi.
27002020	Daniel in adawng a: Tangtawn tangtawn in Pathian min phat in om hen; pilna leh hatna amah a ahi.
27002021	Ama'n hunte leh hunbite ahih lamdang a; kumpipate asuankhia a, kumpipate atungkhia a; mipilte kiang ah pilna apia a, theihsiamna theite kiang ah theihna apia hi.
27002022	Thil thukte leh thil gukte ataklang a, mial a om bang ahia chih athei a, akiang ah khovak a-om hi.
27002023	Na tung ah ka kipak a, ka hon phat hi, Aw nang ka pipute Pathian, pilna leh hatna hon pepa, nang ka hon nget uh ka kiang ua hon theisakpa'n; kumpipa thu ka kiang uah na hon theisakta ngal a, chi in.
27002024	Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Babulon mipilte hihse dia asehpa Ariok kiang ah Daniel ava hoh a, akiang ah, “Babilon mipilte hihmang ke'n; kumpipa ma ah hon pilut inla, kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna ka ensak ding,” ava chi hi.
27002025	Huchi in Ariok in kintak in kumpipa ma ah Daniel apilut a, akiang ah, “Judah saltangte lak ah mi khat ka mu a, ama'n kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna atheisak ding,” achi hi.
27002026	Kumpipa, amin Belteshazzar in adawng a Daniel kiang ah, “Mang ka neih na hon theisak thei in, ahilhchetna na hon theisak thei ding maw?” achi hi.
27002027	Daniel in kumpipa ma ah adawng a, “Thuguk kumpipa'n anget mipilte hi in, mitkhialdawi tawite hi in, bum mite hin in, aisan mite hitaleh, kumpipa kiang ah a-ensak thei kei ding uhi.
27002028	Himahleh van ah Pathian a-om a, ama'n thugukte ataklang hi; ni nanung lam a bang om ding ahia chih, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah atheisak hi. Na lupna tung a na lutang mengmuhna leh na mang hiaite ahi.
27002029	“Nang na hihleh aw kumpipa na lupna tung ah na lungsim sung ah na ngaihtuahnate ahong om ua; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding thu; huan amah thugukte na kiang a taklangpa'n bang ahia hong om ding na kiang ah atheisakta hi.
27002030	Himahleh kei bel pilna mihing dangte sang a pilna ka neih tam zawk ziak a hiai thuguk ka kiang a taklat ahi kei a; himahleh ahilhchetna kumpipa kiang a theihsak ahihtheihna ding leh nang na lungtang ngaihtuahte na theihna ding ahi zaw hi.
27002031	“Aw kumpipa, ngai in, nang milim thupitak na muta hi. Hiai milim hattak mai, avakna thupi mahmah, na ma ah adingh a; amel a kihtakhuai mahmah hi.
27002032	Hiai milim ahihleh alutang dangka-eng hoih ahi a, a-awm leh abante dangka, agil leh apheipite dal,
27002033	akhete sik, akhezungte sik leh tungman khenkhat kihel ahi.
27002034	Suang khut a sek louh huai milim a khepek sik leh tungman deng a kitam nensak dimdem tan in na mu hi.
27002035	“Huchi in sik, tungman, dal, dangkate leh dangka-eng toh akitam nenkhawm vek ua, nipi buhphual a buhsi bang mai ahong hi ua; huchi in huih in huaite amutmang a, huai milim dengzan suangpi pen tang thupitak ahong suak a, leitung pumpi adimta hi.
27002036	Hiai mang ahi a; kumpipa ma ah ahilhchetna ka gen ding uhi.
27002037	“Aw kumpipa, nang kumpipate' Kumpipa, van Pathian in akiang a gam leh thilhihtheihna, hatna leh thupinate a piakna na hi.
27002038	Koipeuh a mite tate atenna uah, gam a sate leh van a vasate na khut ah ahon pia hi; amau tengteng tung a vaihawm ding a abawl dangka-eng lutang na hi.
27002039	Nang nung in nang sang a niamzaw gamdang khat ahong dingkhe ding; huchi in lalgam thumna dang, leitung tengteng a thunei ding in.
27002040	Huan gam lina sik bang in ahat ding a, sik in akeknensak a thil tengteng anuaisiah bang in sik in hiaite tengteng adelhzan bang in, akeknensak in, adelhzan ding hi.
27002041	“Huan khepek leh khezung na muhte, akhen belvelmi tungman leh akhen sik ahihleh gam hawmzak ahi ding a; himahleh asung ah sik hatna a-om ding a, sik tungman toh helkhawm na muh bangtak in.
27002042	Huan khepek khezungte, akhen sik leh akhen tungman pen ahihleh, huchibang in gam hatna chiang nei, kitapna chiang nei ahi ding hi.
27002043	Huan sik leh tungman kihel na muh pen ahihleh, mite chi toh amau akitok hel ding uh; himahleh sik leh tungman akigawm theih louh bang in akikawikip kei ding uhi.
27002044	“Huai kumpipate dam lai in van Pathian in gam suksiat a om ngei lou ding, athuneihna midang kiang a nutsiat a om ngei sam lou ding, ahon dingkhesak ding a; himahleh hiai gam tengteng akitam nensak ding a, ahihse vek ding, amah bel tangtawn in adingh ding hi.
27002045	“Huchi in tang a kipan khut a sek louh suangpi ahong omkhia a, sik, dal, tungman, dangka leh dangka-engte a kitamsak dimdem na muh pen ahihleh; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding kumpipa kiang ah Pathian thupi in atheisakta hi; mang omzia theihsa ahi a, akhiakna akichian hi,” achi hi.
27002046	Huaitak in Nebukadnezzar in amai a lei si in Daniel abia a, thillat leh gimnamtui akiang a lan ding in amaute thu apia hi.
27002047	Kumpipa'n Daniel adawng a, “Chihtaktak in na Pathian, pathiante' Pathian leh kumpipate' Toupa leh thugukte taklangpa ahi; hiai thuguk taklang ding a hihtheihna na neih ziak in,” achi hi.
27002048	Huchi in kumpipa'n Daniel aliansak a, thilpiak tampi apia hi, Babulon bial pumpi a heutu leh Babulon mipilte tengteng tung a ukpipapen ding in abawlta hi.
27002049	Daniel in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego, Babulon bial thu leh la tung a koih ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen hi; himahleh Daniel bel kumpipa kongpi ah a-om hi.
27003001	kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in dangka-eng milim, tong sawmguk a sang, tong guk a lian abawl a; Babulon bial a Dura Phaizang ah adingsak hi.
27003002	kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate, thukhenmi, sumkemmi, thudotmi, dansiammi leh bial vaihawmmi tengteng akaikhawm a, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiak milim kipahpihna bawlna a hong pai ding in mite asawlkhia hi.
27003003	Huchi in bial heutu vaihawmmi, ukpipa, thukhenmi, sumkemmi, thudotmi, dansiammi leh bial vaihawmmi tengteng kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiaksak milim kipahpihna ah ahong kikhawm vek uhi; Nebukadnezzar dinkhiaksak milim ma ah adingh uhi.
27003004	Huaitak in tangkou ngaihtak in akikou a, “Na kiang ua thupiak ahi, Aw mite, namte, paute,
27003005	pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging, tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un, puk unla, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim bia un.
27003006	Huan kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah a paihlut ding ahi,” achi hi.
27003007	Huaiziak in huai lai a mi tengteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging chi chih ging azak un, mi tengteng, namte, paute apuk ua, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in atunkhiak dangka-eng milim abia uhi.
27003008	Huchih lai in Kaldai mi kuate hiam ahong pai nai ua, Juda tuailaite ahong hekta uhi.
27003009	Adawng ua kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in!
27003010	Aw kumpipa, nang thupiak na bawl a, mi chiteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem leh nawtging, tumging peng nih neite leh tumging chi chih azak chiang ua, apuk ding ua dangka-eng milim abiak ding uh chi in.
27003011	Kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua ah paihlut ahi ding, chi in
27003012	Babulon bial a thu leh la tung a na sehsa Juda kuate hiam a-om ua, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego. Hiai mite'n, Aw kumpipa, nang ahon limsak kei ua; na pathiante nna asem kei ua na dinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim leng abe sam kei uh,” chi in.
27003013	Huchi in Nebukadnezzar heh leh thangpai in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego hon pi ding in thu apia hi.
27003014	Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa ma ah ahon pi ua, Nebukadnezzar in adong a, akiang uah, “Aw Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, ka pathian nna na sep louh ua, dangka-eng milim ka tunkhiak na biak louh uh, na tup mawng uh hia?” achi hi.
27003015	Tu in na kimansak unla chik hun peuh a pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un puk unla milim ka tunkhiak bia un, hoihtak in; himahleh na biak kei ualeh meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah in ahon paihlut ding uh; huchi in ka khut a kipan a nou hon hunkhe ding huai pathian kua hi ding ahia?
27003016	Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego in adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw Nebukadnezzar, hiai thu ah ka hon dawn uh akiphamoh kei hi.
27003017	Huchibang ding ahihleh, Aw kumpipa, a-nna ka sep uh ka Pathian un meipi kuang zuazua a kipan koute ahon hunkhe thei hi, na khut a pan ahon hunkhe ding hi.
27003018	Huchi ahihkeileh leng, na thei in, Aw kumpipa, na pathiante nna ka sem kei ding ua, na dinkhiak dangka-eng milim leng ka be sam kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
27003019	Huchi in Nebukadnezzar athangpai petmah a, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego tung ah amel putdan akikheng hial hi. Huaiziak in meipi asat ngeina sang a mun sagih a asatsak ding in thu apia hi.
27003020	Huan asepaih pawl lak a om mihat kuate hiam Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego hen ding leh meipi kuang zuazua sung a paihlut ding in thu apia hi.
27003021	Huchi in hiai mite apuansilh lai uh, samul puanak toh, puanak kawnggak nei leh apuansilh dangte uh toh, meikuang zuazua lak ah apailutta uhi.
27003022	Huchi in kumpipa thupiak akhawk mahmah ziak leh meipi asat mahmah ziak in huai mi Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego domte meikuang in ahul lumta hi.
27003023	Hiai mi thumte, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednegote, meipi kuang zuazua lak ah hensa in apuk uhi.
27003024	Huchih lai in Nebukadnezzar in lamdang asa mahmah a; kintak in athoukhia a; amah thudot mite kiang ah, “Mei lak ah mi thum hensa in i pailut uh ahi kei maw?” chi in agen hi. Amau adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Dik mah e, kumpipa aw,” achi uhi.
27003025	Ama'n adawng a, “Ngai un, mi li phelsa a om, mei lak a vak in ka mu a, bangmah achi kei uh, ami lina melputdan Pathian tapa abang,” achi hi.
27003026	Huchi in Nebukadnezzar meipi kuang zuazua gei chin ah ahong pai a; thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, nou Pathian Tungnungpen sikhate, hong pawtkhia unla, hiai lam ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, mei lak a kipan in ahong pawtkhia uhi.
27003027	Huan bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate leh kumpipa dan thei mite, omkhawmte'n hiai mite, mei in apumpi tung uah hihtheihna anei kei a, aluzang ua sam leng akangdang kei a, apuansilh uh leng alamdang kei a, meigim leng anam kei uh chih amu uhi.
27003028	Nebukadnezzar in thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian in a-angel sawl a, amah muang asikhate hunkhia a, kumpipa thu hihlamdang a, amau Pathian lou ngal pathian nna asep louh ua abiaklouhna ding ua apumpite uh pepa phat in om hen.
27003029	“Huaiziak in thupiak ka bawl hi, michih, nam chih, pau chih, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian gensiatna thil banghiam gente, atnen in a-om dia, a-innte uh ekvum a bawl ahi ding hi; hichibang a hunkhe thei pathian dang a-om louh ziak in,” achi hi.
27003030	Huchi in kumpipa'n Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, Babulon bial ah akaisangsak hi.
27004001	Kumpipa, Nebukadnezzar mite tengteng, namte leh paute, leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah, na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen.
27004002	Tungnungpen Pathian in kei lam a abawl chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte etsak, kei a ding in hoih hi in ka ngaihtuah hi.
27004003	Achiamtehnate thupi hi na mahmah e; athillamdangte thilhihthei hi na mahmah uh e; agam tangtawn gam ahi a, avaihawmna akhang-akhang in a-om hi.
27004004	Kei Nebukadnezzar, ka insung ah ka khawl a, ka inpi sung ah ka lum hi.
27004005	Hon lausak mang ka nei hi; ka lupna tung ah ngaihtuahnate leh ka lungtang mengmuhte'n hon hihbuai uhi.
27004006	Huaiziak in hilhchetna ka kiang a akitheihsak ding un, Babulon mipil tengteng ka ma a pi ding thupiak ka bawlta hi.
27004007	Huchi in mitkhialdawi tawite, bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite ahong pai ua; ama uah ka mang ka genta hi; himahleh ahilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisak thei kei uhi.
27004008	Himahleh atawptawp in ka ma ah, Daniel amin ka pathian min dungzui a Belteshazzar hiven, amah a Pathian siangthoute kha a-omna ma ah mang ka genta hi.
27004009	Aw Belteshazzar, mitkhialdawi tawite heutupa, nang ah, Pathian siangthoute kha a-om a, thuguk bangmah in nang ahon hihbuai kei chih ka theih ziak in ka mang a ka muh mengmuhte leh ahilhchetna hon hilh in, ka chi hi.
27004010	Ka lupna tung a ka lutang mengmuhte hichibang ahiz: Ngai in, lei laizang ah sing khat ka mu a, huai sing sandan athupi mahmah hi.
27004011	Huai sing akhangtou a, ahong hat a, asanna in van asuntou a, lei mong tengteng tanpha huai ah akimu hi.
27004012	Anahte ahoih un, agah pha mahmah a; huai ah mi tengteng a ding in an a-om hi; anuailim ah gamsate a-om ua, ahiangte ah van a vasate ateng ua, sa tengteng huai a kipan in akivak uhi.
27004013	Ka lupna tung a ka lup in mengmuhte ka mu a, ngai in, van a kipan in vengmi siangthou khat ahong paisuk hi.
27004014	Ngaihtak in akikou a, hichibang in achi a: “Sing phuk inla, ahiangte satkhia in, anahte singkhia inla, agah thehzak in; anuai a kipan gamsate leh ahiang a kipan vasate hawlmang in om uhen.
27004015	Himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in, gam a loupa nou lak ah nutsiat in om hen. Van daitui in kawt henla, atantuan lei a loupa lak a gamsate toh hi hen.
27004016	Huan atung a hun sagih abei mateng mihing lungsim kikheng in akiang ah gamsa lungtang piak hi hen.
27004017	Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-utna peuh kiang ah apia a, miniampente adingkhesak chih mihingte'n atheihna ding un veng mite'n agenkhia ua, misiangthoute'n apuangkhia uhi.
27004018	“Hiai mang kei kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ka man hi. Huan nang, Aw Belteshazzar, ahilhchetna genkhia in, ka gam a mipilte tengteng in ka kiang ah ahilhchetna ahon theisak thei kei ua; himahleh nang na hihthei, nang a pathian siangthoute kha a-om ziak in,” achi hi.
27004019	Daniel, amin Belteshazzar in, sawt lou kal lamdang asa a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausak hi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Belteshazzar, mang hiam ahilhchetna hiam in nang hon patausak kei hen,” achi hi. Belteshazzar in adawng a, “Ka toupa, mang nang hon mudahte lam thu hi henla, ahilhchetna na galte lam thu hi zawleh maw.
27004020	Na sing muh, hong khang a, hong hat a, asanna in van asuttouh a, hiai a kipan lei mong tengteng akimuhna;
27004021	anahte hoih a, agah pha mahmah a, mi teng a dia an om a; huai nuai a gamsate teng ua, ahiang a van a vasate atenna uh,
27004022	Aw kumpipa, huai hong khang a, hong hat na muh, nangmah na hi; na thupina akhang in, van asun in, na vaihawmna lei mong tawp pha in ahi.
27004023	Van a kipan a kumpipa'n vengmi siangthou hong paisuk amuh, Sing phuk inla, hihgawp in; himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in gam a loupa nou lak ah van daitui in kawt henla, huan atantuan gamsate kiang ah hi in, atung a hun sagih abei matan, chih thu ahihleh;
27004024	Aw kumpipa, ka toupa kumpipa tung a hong tung Tungnungpen thupiak ahilhchetna hiai ahi:
27004025	Mite a kipan hawlkhiak in na om dia; gamsate kiang ah na khosa ding a, bawngtalte bang a loupa neksak in na om ding a; van daitui in na kawt ding a; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding; mite gam ah Tungnungpen in vai ahawm a; a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan.
27004026	Huan sing bulsum leh azungte nutsiat ding a thupiak a om pen ahihleh; van Pathian in vaihawm petmah ahi chih na theih khit hun chiang in na gam nang kiang a piakkik ding genna ahi.
27004027	Aw kumpipa, huaiziak in ka hon thuhilh nang a ding in pom tuak leh tagahte kiang a zahngaihna etsakna in na thulimlouhnate tawpsan in; na lamzanna suksau a a-om khak zenzenleh,” achi hi.
27004028	Hiai tengteng kumpipa Nebukadnezzar tung ah ahong tung hi.
27004029	Kha sawm-le-nih abei in Babulon a kumpi Inpi sung ah avialvak hi.
27004030	Kumpipa'n thu agen a, hiai Babulon thupi, kumpipa tenna mun ding a, ka thilhihtheihna hatna leh ka thuneihna thupina ding a ka lam ahi kei maw? chi in.
27004031	Kumpipa kam a thu a-om lai mahmah in, van a kipan aw ahong suakkhia a, “Aw kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, na kiang a thugen ahi; nang a kipan gam apaimangta hi.
27004032	Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan, mihingte a kipan in hawlkhiak na hi ding a, na tenna gamsate kiang ah ahi ding; bawngtalte bang a loupa ne ding a bawl in na om dia; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding,” achi hi.
27004033	Kintak in huai bang thil ahong tungta, mite a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; bawngtalte bang in loupa ane petmah hi; apumpi van daitui in akawt a; asam muvanlai multe ahong bang a, achinte vasate chinte ahong bangta hi.
27004034	Huan nite abei in kei Nebukadnezzar in van lam ah ka mitte ka suantou a, ka theihtheihnate ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, huchi in Tungnungpen ka pahtawi hi; amah tangtawn a om gige phat in ka zahtak hi. Avaihawmna tangtawn vaihawmna ahi a, agam akhang-akhang in ahi, chi in;
27004035	Huan leitung a teng tengteng bangmah lou bang a ngaih ahi ua; huan van sepaih pawl leh leitung a teng tengtengte lak ah adeihlam bang in ahih zel a; kuamah in akhut alen thei un, akiang ah, “Bangziak a hih na hia?” achi thei kei uhi.
27004036	Huai lai mah in ka theihtheihna ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a; ka gam thupina, ka lalna leh hoihna ka kiang ah ahong kik a; ka midotte leh ka toupate'n kei ahong zong ua; huchi in ka gam ah kiptak in ka dingh a, kei a ding in thupina lian mahmah behlap in a-omta hi.
27004037	Huchi in kei Nebukadnezzar in van Kumpipa phat a pahtawi in ka zahtak a; athilhih tengteng thutak ahi a, alampite vaihawmna ahi a, kisatheitak a omte ahihniam thei hi.
27005001	Belshazzar kumpipa'n atoupate lak a mi sangkhat a ding in ankuang thupitak abawl a, sangkhatte ma ah uain adawn hi.
27005002	Belshazzar in uain achep lai in, apa Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om tempul a kipan a alak dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuante kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n huaite a adawntheihna ding un hon la ding in thu apia hi.
27005003	Huchi in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn, tempul a kipan alakkhiak dangka-eng tui-um belsuante ahon la ua; kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n, huaite in adawn uhi.
27005004	Uain adawn ua, dangka-eng, dangka, dalsik, sing leh suang pathiante aphat uhi.
27005005	Huai dak mah in mihing khutzungte ahong kilang guih a, kumpipa inpi baang pek tung, khawnvak koihna toh etdetna tak ahon gelh hi. Kumpipa'n laigelhtu khut bang tan hiam amu hi.
27005006	Huai lai in kumpipa mel ahong lamdang a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausakta hi; akhut akhe akipzouta kei a, akhukte akisat tuah nomnom uhi.
27005007	Bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite hon pi un chi in nakpitak in kumpipa akikou hi. Kumpipa'n thu agen a, Babulon mipilte kiang ah, “Kuapeuh in hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna hon ensak, puan sandup silhsak ahi ding a; angawng kimvel in dangka-eng khainiang a-ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna ahi ding,” achi hi.
27005008	Huchi in kumpipa mipilte tengteng ahong lut ua; himahleh laigelh asim thei kei ua, ahilhchetna leng kumpipa atheisak thei kei uhi.
27005009	Huchi in kumpipa Belshazzar apatau mahmah a; amah ah amel ahong lamdang a; akhawnbawlte alungzing uhi.
27005010	Huchi in kumpipa leh khawnbawlte thu ziak in ankuangluina insung ah kumpinu ahong lut hi; kumpinu'n thu agen a, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in, na ngaihtuahnate'n hon patausak kei henla, na mel leng lamdang kei hen.
27005011	Na gamsung a mi khat, amah a pathian siangthoute kha omna a-om a; na pa dam lai in vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna, pathiante pilna bang, amah ah muh in a-om; kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, kumpipa, na pa'n, amah mitkhialdawi tawite leh bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite heutu in abawl hi.
27005012	Lungsim hoihpen, theihna, theihtheihna, mangte hilhchetna, thugen haksa etsakna, ginlelhna hihvenna kumpipa'n Belteshazzar min asakpa, huai Daniel mah ah muh in a-om hi. Tu in Daniel sapsak in om henla, ama'n hilhchetna ensak hen,” achi hi.
27005013	Huan kumpipa ma ah Daniel ahon pi ua, Kumpipa'n thu agen a Daniel kiang ah, “Daniel, ka pa'n Judah gam a kipan Judah salmat hon pilut na hi hia?
27005014	Nang ah pathian kha a-om a, vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna hoihpen nang ah muh in a-om chih na tanchin ka za hi.
27005015	Tu in ka ma ah mipilte, bum mite ahon pilut ua, hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna ka kiang a theisak ding in; himahleh huai thil hilhchetna a-ensak thei kei uhi.
27005016	Himahleh hilhchetnate na bawl thei a, ginlelhnate na bawlhoih thei chih na tanchin ka na za hi. Tu in laigelh na sim theih a, ahilhchetna na hon hilh theih leh puan sandup ka hon silhsak ding a; na ngawng kimvel in dangka-eng khi na ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna na hi ding hi,” achi hi.
27005017	Huchi in Daniel in adawng a kumpipa ma ah, “Na thilpiakte nangmah kiang ah hi zaw henla, na kipahmante midang kiang ah pe zaw in; ahi a, kumpipa kiang ah laigelh ka sim ding a, ahilhchetna amah ka theisak ding hi.
27005018	Aw nang kumpipa, Tungnungpen Pathian in na pa Nebukadnezzar gam leh thupina, letna leh vaihawmna ahon pia hi.
27005019	Huai amah apiak letna ziak in ama ah mi tengteng, namte, paute aling un alau ua; a-utut athat a, a-utut hinghawi in; a-utut akaithou a, a-utut asawnniam hi.
27005020	Himahleh alungtang ahong kisaktheih a, ki-uangsaktak a gamta a alungsim hihkhauh a a-om lai in, alaltutphah a kipan suan in a-om a, amah a kipan athupina alakheta hi.
27005021	Huan mite tapate a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; huchi in alungtang gamsate a bang a bawl in a-om a; bawngtalte bang a loupa a vak in a-om a, apumpi van daitui in akawt a; Tungnungpen Pathian in mihing gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututte atung ah adingkhesak chih ahon theih matan.
27005022	“Huan nang atapa, Aw Belshazzar, hiai tengteng na theih in leng na lungtang na niamkhiak kei hi.
27005023	Himahleh van Toupa dem in na kihihsang a; amau na ma ah toupa inn a tui-um belsuante na lasak a; nang leh na toupate, na zite leh na meite'n, huaite in uain na dawn uh a; bangmah mu thei lou, za thei lou, theithei lou dangka leh dangka-eng, dal, sik, sing leh suang pathiante bia in na phat a; Pathian akhut a na hatna omna leh na lampite tengteng neipa na pahtawi zaw kei hi.
27005024	Huchi in amah a kipan huai khut banghiam tan sawl in ahong om a, hiai laigelh gelh in ahong omta hi.
27005025	“Huan gelh a om laithu hiai ahi: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN.
27005026	Huai hilhchetna hiai ahi. MENE: Pathian in na gam asimta, abeisakta hi.
27005027	TEKEL: bukna a buk in na om a, na chingzou kei hi.
27005028	PERES: na gam hawm in a-om a, Mid mite leh Persia mite kiang ah piak ahita,” achi hi.
27005029	Huchi in Belshazzar in thu apia a, dangka-eng khainiang angawng kimvel in a-oksak ua; gamsung a vaihawmmi athumna hi ding in amah tung ah thu apuang uhi.
27005030	Huai zan mah in Kaldai kumpipa Belshazzar thah in a-om hi.
27005031	Mid mi Darias, kum sawmguk-le-nih a upa in gam atangta hi.
27006001	Darias in agam pumpi bial za-le-sawmnih omsuak ding bial heutu za-le-sawmnih gam tung ah akoih hi.
27006002	Huan amaute tung ah, heutu lian thum, huaite lak ah Daniel akhatna ahi a; huchi a hiai bial heutute'n huaite kiang a thu atut ua, kumpipa'n siatna aneihlouhna ding in.
27006003	Huchi in hiai Daniel, amah a lungsim hoihpen a-om ziak in, heutu liante leh bial heutute tung ah akan-aval a bawl in a-om a; kumpipa'n gam pumpi tung ah amah koih ding angaihtuah hi.
27006004	Huai lai in heutu liante leh bial heutute'n gam thu ah Daniel demna ding azong uhi; himahleh amah miginom ahih ziak in thupatna ding in adiklouhna amu kei ua, amah ah diklouhna leh khelhna muh in a-om kei hi.
27006005	Huchi in hiai mite'n, “Hiai Daniel demna ding bangmah i mu kei ding; a Pathian dan toh kisai a amah demna ding i muh kei ngalleh,” akichi uhi.
27006006	Huan hiai heutu liante leh bial heutute kumpipa kiang ah akikhawm ua, akiang ah hichibang in, “Kumpipa Darias aw, tangtawn in dam in!
27006007	Gam heutu lian tengteng, heutute leh bial heutute, dan thei mite leh ukpipate, kumpi dan thuseh bawlkhiak a, khamna khauhtak bawl ding in akikumkhawm uhi. Huchi in mi kuapeuh, nang chih louh, Aw kumpipa, ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam lak a ngetna abawlleh, humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut in a-om ding hi.
27006008	Tu in, Aw kumpipa, khamna hihkip inla, laigelh ah na min gelh in; huchi a Mid mite leh Persia mite dan bang a akihih lamdanlouhna ding in,” achi uhi.
27006009	Huchi in kumpipa Darias in laigelh leh khamna ah amin agelhta hi.
27006010	Daniel in laigelh ah min akigelhta chih atheih in a-insung ah alut a; adantan sung a atawlette Jerusalem lam a hon hi ve un, akhukdin a, ni khat in thumvei, huchi in athum a, amalam a ahih bang in, a Pathian ma ah kipahthu agen hi.
27006011	Huchi in hiai mite akikhawm ua, Daniel a Pathian ma a thu ngen leh thum in amu uhi.
27006012	Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, kumpipa khamna tungtang kumpipa ma ah ahong genta uhi, “Aw kumpipa, nang chih louh michih kuapeuh in ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam kiang a ngetna abawlleh humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut ahi ding chih khamna ah na gelh ahi kei maw,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n, “Mid mite leh Persia mite dan lamdang thei lou bang in huai dan kip lai ahi,” achi hi.
27006013	Huan amau adawng ua kumpipa ma ah, “Huai Daniel, Judah saltang tate lak a mi in nang leh na min gelhna khamna leng ahon limsak kei, Aw kumpipa, ni khat in thumvei ngetna abawl hi,” achi uhi.
27006014	Hiai thute azak in, kumpipa alungkim het kei a, amah suaktasak ding in Daniel tung ah alungtang anga a; amah hutkhiak tum in nitum tan asemgim hi.
27006015	Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, khamna hiam dan thuseh hiam kumpipa'n ahihkipsa hihlamdan theih ahih louh Mid mite leh Persia mite dan ahi chih thei in,” achi uhi.
27006016	Huchi in kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apailut uhi. Huan kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “A-nna na sep gige na Pathian in ahon suaktasak ding,” achi hi.
27006017	Huan suang khat ahon la ua, huangsung gong ah akoih ua; kumpipa'n amah suaisawnna zungbuh leh atapate suaisawnna zungbuh in suai anamta hi; Daniel tungtang thu a bangmah hihlamdan theih ahihlouhna ding in.
27006018	Huchi in kumpipa a-inpi ah apai a, an ngawl in, tumging leh nopbawlna khawlsak in azanhak a; amah lah a-ihmu thei kei hi.
27006019	Huchi in zingsang beltak in kumpipa athou a, humpinelkaite huangsung lam ah kintak in ava hoh hi.
27006020	Huangsung lam a Daniel kiang a ahong pai nai lai in, kah aw in akikou a; kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, Pathian hing sikha, a-nna na sep gige, na Pathian in humpinelkaite a kipan nang hon suaktasak thei hiam?” achi hi.
27006021	Daniel in kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in!
27006022	Ka Pathian in a-angel hon sawl a, humpinelkaite kam ahong chihsak a, ahon hihna kei uh; amah ma a keimah a hoihna muh a a-om ziak leh Aw kumpipa nangmah ma a leng gilou ka hih louh ziak in,” achi hi.
27006023	Huchi in nakpitak in kumpipa akipak a, huangsung a kipan Daniel lakhe tou ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in huangsung a kipan in Daniel alakhe tou ua, a Pathian amuan ziak in atung ah bangmah natna akimu kei hi.
27006024	Huan kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel hekte huai mite ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apai ua, amau, azi leh tate uh; humpinelkaite'n amaute huangsung taw ahong tun ma un ana man ua, aguhte uh ahihnen vek uhi.
27006025	Huchi in kumpipa Darias in mite tengteng, namte, paute leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah lai agelh a, “Na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen!
27006026	Ka gam seh thum tengteng ah Daniel Pathian ma ah mite aling un alau ding uh; Amah Pathian hing, tangtawn a omkip, agam hihsiat ahi ngei kei ding a; athuneihna a-omden ding hi, chi in thupiak ka bawl hi.
27006027	Ama'n asuaktasak a, atankhia a, van leh lei ah chiamtehna leh thillamdangte ahih a; ama'n humpinelkaite thilhihtheihna a kipan in Daniel asuaktasak hi.”
27006028	Huchibang in Darias vaihawm lai leh Persia mi Kura vaihawm lai in hiai Daniel alamzang mahmah hi.
27007001	Babulon kumpipa Belshazzar kum khatna kum in Daniel in alupna tung a alup lai in mang anei a, alungsim ah mengmuh ahong kilang a, mang agelh a athute akim in agen hi.
27007002	Daniel in thu agen a, “Zan a ka mengmuhna ah, ngai in, van huih lite tuipi thupi tung a hong nungkhia un ka mu hi.
27007003	Huan tuipi a kipan sa thupi li, kibang lou chiat ahong paitou ua,
27007004	akhatna humpinelkai abang a, muvanlai kha anei hi; huchi a ka et lai in akhate bohkhiak in a-om ua; lei a kipan phottouh a mihing bang a khe nih a dinsak a om in; akiang ah mihing lungsim piak in a-om hi.”
27007005	Huan ngai in, sa dang, anihna, vompi bang, apang langkhat tung ah photkang in a-om a; akamsung ah ahate kikal ah nakguh thum a-om a; hichibang in akiang ah hilh in a-om a, “Thou inla, sa tampi negai in,” chi in.
27007006	Hiai khit in ka en a, huan ngai in, sa dang khat, gialbem bang, anungzang a vasa bang a kha li nei ka mu hi. Huai gamsa in lu li anei a; akiang ah thuneihna piak in a-om hi.
27007007	Hiai khit in, zan mengmuhna in ka mu a, ngai in sa lina, lauhuai leh thilhihtheitak, nakpi mahmah a hat; sik ha lianpite nei in anegai in abotnen a; a-omlaite akhe in achil hi. Ama a gamsa om tengteng toh akibang kei; kii sawm anei hi.
27007008	Kite ka ngaihtuah lai in, alak uah kii dang aneu khat hong poukhia a, huai ma ah huai kii masa thumte azung uah bohkhiak in a-om uh, hiai kineu ah mit, mihing mit bang leh kam thil thupite gen a-omta hi.
27007009	Huchi a ka et lai in, laltutphah akikoih a, Tanglai Mipa'n alaltutphah aluahta hi; apuansilh vuk bang in angou a, samul siang bang in alu a sam angou hi; huai alaltutphah meikuang zuazua ahi a, huai akangtalai khete meikuang lai bang ahi.
27007010	Meikuang luipi hong pawt a ama a kipan ahong paikhia a, asang asangte'n amah nna asepsak uh; ama ah singkhat mun singkhat adingh ua; vaihawmna atungkhia ua, laibute ahong uhi.
27007011	Huai kii in athugen thupite ziak in ka en nilouh hi. Huchi a ka et lai in, huai gamsa thah in ahong om a; apumpi hihsiat in ahong om a; meikuang a apaih dong uh ka en gige hi.
27007012	Huan sa dangte ahihleh athuneihna uh lakmang in a-om a; hun seh khat leh hun khat tan ahinna uh hihsau in a-om hi.
27007013	Zan mengmuhna in ka mu a, ngai in, van meipite toh mi khat mihing tapa toh kibang ahong pai a, Tanglai Mipa kiang mahmah ah ahong a, amah ama chin ah ahon pi uhi.
27007014	Huan thuneihna, thupina leh gam piak in a-om a; huchi a mi tengteng, namte leh paute'n amah nna asepsak theihna ding un; athuneihna tangtawn thuneihna ahi a, amang kei ding, agam hihsiat in a-om kei ding hi.
27007015	“Kei Daniel ahihleh ka sung ah ka lungsim adah a, ka lutang mengmuh in kei ahon patausak hi.
27007016	Akiangnai a dinghte lak a khat kiang ka zuan a, hiai tengteng thu ah thutak amah ka dongta hi. Huchi in huai thilte hilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisakta hi.
27007017	Hiai gamsa thupi lite etsak bel lei a hong dingkhe ding kumpipa lite ahi uhi.
27007018	Himahleh Tungnungpen misiangthoute'n gam atang ding ua, tangtawn, tangtawn in, gam aneiden ding uhi,” achi hi.
27007019	Huchi in sa lina, amaute tengteng toh kibang lou, kihtakhuai mahmah, ahate sik hi a, achinte dal, ne khin a, botnen a, a-omlaite akhepek a chil tungtang thutak theih ka ut hi.
27007020	Huan kii sawmte aluzang a omte lak ah kii dang khat hong poukhia a, huai ma a kii thumte apukna; huai kii mitte nei leh kam nei a thil thupite gen a, alatdan a lawite sang a hat tuakzaw pen tanchin ka thei nuam hi.
27007021	Huchi a ka etleh huai kii in misiangthoute dou in, gal abawl a,
27007022	Tanglai Mipa'n Tungnungpen misiangthoute gum in thu akhen a, amau lalgam aneih masiah ua ding in amaute azouta hi.
27007023	Huchi in sa lina pen leitung ah gam lina ahi ding a, huai gam tengteng toh akibang kei ding a, leitung pumpi agai ding a, asikden dia, abotnen ding achi hi.
27007024	Huan kii sawmte ahihleh, hiai gam a kipan in kumpipa sawm hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; amau nung in adang khat; amasa toh akibang kei ding a, ama'n kumpipa thumte azou ding hi.
27007025	Tungnungpen dem in agense ding a, misiangthoute anuaisiah ding hi; hunte leh dan khen ding angaihtuah dia; hun khat leh hunte leh hun kimkhat abei masiah misiangthoute akhut ah piak in a-om ding uhi.
27007026	Huaite zoh in vaihawmna a-om ding a, athuneihna lakmang ahi ding a, atawp tan a hihgawp ding leh suksiat in a-om ding hi.
27007027	Huan leitung gam leh thuneihna leh van nuai pumpi nuai a gamte thupina, Tungnungpen misiangthoute kiang ah piak in a-om ding; agam tangtawn gam ahi a, avaihawmnate'n amah nna asepsak un athu amang ding uhi.
27007028	Hiai ah thu leh la tawpna a-om hi. Kei Daniel ahihleh ka ngaihtuahnate'n nakpi in hon hihbuai a, kei ah ka mel amual hi; himahleh ka lungtang in huai thu ka kem khinkhian hi.
27008001	Kumpipa Belshazzar vaihawm akum thumna kum in kei, Daniel kiang a amasa a kilang pen mah ahong kilat khit nung in mengmuhna ka kiang ah hong kilang nawn hi.
27008002	Ka mengmuhna ah hichi ahong hi a, Elam bial a Susa inpi ah ka om a; huan mengmuhna in Ulai lui kiang ah om in ka mu hi.
27008003	Huchi in ka dakleh ngai in, huai lui gei ah belamtal khat kii nih nei adingh a, akii nihte asau uhi. Himahleh khat sang in adang pen asauzaw a, asauzaw pen ahong pou nanung pen ahi.
27008004	Huai belamtal in akii a si ding in tumlam, mallam leh simlam nawt in ka mu hi; ama ah sate adingh thei kei ua, akhut a kipan suaktasak thei leng kuamah a-om kei uh; himahleh ama deihlam in ahih a ahong thupi hi.
27008005	Huchi a ka ngaihtuah lai in, ngai in, leitung pumpi tawnsuak in tumlam a kipan in keltal khat lei sukha lou in ahong pai a, huai kel in amitte kikal ah kii minthang khat anei hi.
27008006	Belamtal kii nih nei lui malam a dingh ka muh kiang ah ahong pai a, athilhihtheihna toh heh in amah adelhta hi.
27008007	Belamtal kiangchin ah ahong pai ka mu a, atung ah nakpitak in athangpaita a, belamtal aboh a, akii nihte ahihtan a; huchi in belamtal in amah adinna ding thahatna aneita kei hi. Lei ah asipuk a, amah achilzial a; akhut a kipan belamtal suaktasak ding kuamah a-om kei hi.
27008008	Nakpi mahmah in keltal akiliansakta a; huchi a ahat lai in, huai kii thupi akitan a; amun ah kii li minthang, van huih lite lam ah ahong suakkhetou uhi.
27008009	Huan huai kiite lak a kii neu thupi mahmah khat, simlam, suahlam leh gam kilawm lam nga in ahong khangkhia hi.
27008010	Huchi in van sepaihte bang hial in ahong thupi mahmah a; aksihonte lak a khenkhatte lei ah apaikhesuk a, amau achil hi.
27008011	Ahi, van sepaihte' Toupa tung nangawn ah akiliansak a; amah a kipan in niteng halmang thillat alamang a, amun siangthou apaikhesuk hi.
27008012	Huan tatlekna ziak in halmang thillatte toh van sepaihte amah kiang ah piak in a-om ua; huchi in lei ah thutak apaikhia a, asep leh bawlte ah alohching hi.
27008013	Huchi in misiangthou khat in misiangthou dang khat kiang ah, “Hiai mengmuhna a kimu tatlekna mulkimhuai in niteng halmang thillat bang tan luahtou ding a, mun siangthoupen leh van sepaihte akhenuai a bang tan nuaisiah a omsak ding ahia,” achih ka za hi.
27008014	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Nitaklam leh zinglam sangnih-le-zathum sung tan in; huai chiang in mun siangthoupen silsiang ahi ding hi,” achi hi.
27008015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, kei, Daniel in ka mengmuh lai in, theihchet ka na tum a; huchi in ka ma ah mihing kibatpih bang ahong dingh hi.
27008016	Huan Ulai luipiau kikal ah, mihing aw kikou in, “Gabriel, hiai mipa mengmuhna theichiansak in,” achih ka za hi.
27008017	Huchibang in ka dinna mun naih in ahong pai a; huchi a ahong pai lai in, ka lauta a, ka mai in lei ka si hi; himahleh ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, mengmuh lah hun tawp a ding ahi a, theisiam in,” achi hi.
27008018	Huan kei ahon houpih lai in, lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmuta a; himahleh ahon khoih a, ahon dingtangsak hi.
27008019	Huan ama'n, “Ngai in, thangpaihna hun tawp lam a bang ahia hong om ding ka hon theisak ding; hun tawp sehsa a ding lah ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
27008020	“Belamtal na muh kii nih nei, Media leh Persia kumpipate ahi uh.
27008021	Huan huai keltal huham Grik kumpipa ahi; amitte kikal a om kii thupi kumpipa khatna ahi.
27008022	Huan akitan pen mun luah kii lite ahihleh, huai nam a kipan in gam li hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; himahleh amau bang in thilhihtheihna anei kei ding uh.
27008023	Huan agam vaihawm hun tawp na uah, talek mite ahong hat mahmah chiang un, kumpipa lauhuai melpu, zuau a khem siam khat adingkhe ding hi.
27008024	Huchi in athilhihtheihna ahat dia, himahleh amah mah thilhihtheihna hilou in; siatna lamdangtak atun dia, athilhih khempeuh alohching ding hi; huchi in mihatte leh misiangthoute ahihsegawp ding hi.
27008025	“Huan amah dan zui in khemna nasep ah alohching zel ding hi; huan alungtang akiliansak ding a, mi tampite bit akisak lai un ahihse ding a; kumpite Kumpi dou ding in akisa ding; himahleh mihing khut hilou in hihkhap in a-om ding hi.
27008026	Huan nitak lamte leh zingsang lamte toh kisai mengmuhna kigen adik ahi; himahleh ahong tung ding ni tampi a ding ahih lai ziak in hiai mengmuhna khak bikbek in,” achi hi.
27008027	Huchi in kei, Daniel ka sibup a; ni bangzah hiam ka china hi; ka thou a, kumpipa nna ka sem a hiai mengmuhna lamdang ka sa hi, himahleh kuamah in hiai atheisiam kei.
27009001	Media mi, Ahasueras tapa Darias, Kaldaite tung a kumpipa ding abawl, vaihawm akum khatna,
27009002	avaihawm akum khatna kum in kei, Daniel in laibute a kipan Jerusalem hihsiatna in kum sawmsagih daih ding ahi chih zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung tanchin a kipan in ka theisiam hi.
27009003	Huchi in Toupa Pathian lam ah ka mel ka koihkip a, thumna leh thilngette, an ngawlna leh sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak a tu in Toupa Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ngutngut hi.
27009004	Huan Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah ka thum a, thupha ka tawi hi, “Aw Toupa , Pathian thupi leh mulkimhuai, nang hon it a na thupiakte zuite tung a thukhun leh zahngaihna vom;
27009005	ka na khialta ua, hoih loutak in ka gamtang ua, giloutak in ka na hihta ua, ka hel ua, na thuseh leh na vaihawmte ka na lehngatsanta uhi.
27009006	Ka kumpipate uh, ka vaihawmtute uleh ka pipute uh leh gam a mi tengteng kiang a na min a thugen, na sikha zawlneite thu leng ka na ngaikhe kei uhi.
27009007	Aw Toupa , diktatna nang a ahi a, himahleh tuni bang in, kou a bel zahlakna leh buaina ahi; Judah a mite, Jerusalem a tengte, Israel tengteng, anai leh gamla a omte, na tung a atatlekna ziak un amaute gam tengteng ah delhzak in ka om uhi.
27009008	“Aw Toupa , ka kumpipate, ka vaihawmte uh, ka pipute uh leh kou hon suangtute'n na tung a dikloutak a akhelh ziak un zahlakna in hon khuh hi.
27009009	Amah tung ah na helta mah le ung zahngaihnate leh ngaihdamnate Toupa ka Pathian uh a ahi.
27009010	Toupa ka Pathian uh aw leh adante a om ding a asikha zawlneite zang a ka ma ua hon na koihsakte ka na mangta kei uhi.
27009011	Ahi, Israel tengteng in na dan atatleksan ua, ahilou lam ah apial ua, na aw amanlouhna ding un; huaiziak in na tung a ka hihkhelhte ziak in Mosi, Pathian sikha dan sung a gelh a om kichiamna hamsia ka tung ah sunbuak in a-omta hi.
27009012	“Huan koute demna leh ka tung ua vaihawmte demna thute leh ka tung ua siatna thupitak in ahihkip khinta hi; Jerusalem tung a kihih bang van nuai pumpi ah lah akihih ngei ngal kei a.
27009013	Mosi Dan sung a gelh ahih bang in, hiai siatna tengteng ka tung uah ahong tung hi; huchipi in leng ka thulimlouhnate uh kiheisan a, na thutak a theihkhen theihna ka neihtheihna ding un Toupa ka Pathian uh deihsakna ka ngen nai kei lai uhi.
27009014	Huaiziak in Toupa ka Pathian uh athilhihte tengteng a adiktat gige man in, Toupa'n thil hoih lou en gige in, ka tung uah ahon tungsakta hi; hinapi in kou lah a-aw ka na mangta kei uhi.
27009015	Huan tu in, Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh, khut hattak a na mite Aigupta gam a kipan pikhepa leh tuni bang a minthanna kimuhpa, tuni bang in ka khialta ua, giloutak in ka na hihta uhi.
27009016	“Aw Toupa , ka hon ngen ahi, na diktatna tengteng ziak in, na hehna leh thangpaihna, na khopi Jerusalem leh na tang siangthou a kipan kihei mangsak in; ka khelhnate uh ziak leh ka pipute uh thulimlouhna ziak in, Jerusalem leh na mite lah ka kim ka vel ua omte tengteng simmoh ahong hita uhi.
27009017	Huaiziak in tu in, Aw ka Pathian uh, na sikha thumna leh athilngette ngaikhia inla, Toupa ziak in, asegawpsa na mun siangthou tung ah na mel vaksak in.
27009018	Aw ka Pathian, na bil hon doh inla, za in; na mitte hak inla, na min a kilou na khopi siatgawpnate en in; ka diktatna ziak un na ma a hiai ka thilngetnate uh lan ka hi ngal kei ua, na zahngaihna thupite ziak in ahi zaw hi.
27009019	Aw Toupa , za in, Aw Toupa ngaidam in, Aw Toupa , ngaikhia inla hih in; hal ke'n; nangmah ziak mahmah in, Aw ka Pathian, na khopi leh na mite nang min pute ahi uhi,” achi hi.
27009020	Huchi a thu ka gen a, ka thum a, ka khelhna leh ka mi Israel khelhna thupha ka tawi a, Toupa ka Pathian ma a ka Pathian tang siangthou a dingh a thilngetna ka piak lai in;
27009021	ahi, thumna a thu ka gen lai in, pasal Gabriel, achil a mengmuhna a ka muh pa, kintak a leng dia bawl a om in, nitaklam thillat hun ding in ahong khoih hi.
27009022	Huan ahon thuhilh a, ahon houpih a, “Aw Daniel, theihsiamna a siam mahmah a hon bawl ding in tu in ka hong paikhia hi,” achi hi.
27009023	Na thilngetna kipat phet in adawnna piak ahi; nang hilh ding a hong pai ka hi, nakpitak a it lah na hi ngal a; huaiziak in thu ngaihtuah inla, mengmuhte theisiam in.
27009024	“Na mite leh na khopi siangthou a ding in tatlekna hihbeina ding, khelhnate tawpsakna ding leh thulimlouhna a dia kilemna bawlna ding, tangtawn diktatna laklutna ding leh mengmuhte leh genkholhnate khakkhum bikbekna ding leh asiangthoupen thaunilhna ding in na tung ah nipikal sawmsagih hun seh leh thu piak ahi.
27009025	Huaiziak in thei inla, theisiam in, Jerusalem tungding nawn ding leh lam ding a thupiak apaikhiak a kipan sathau nilh a ompa, vaihawm tan in, nipikal sagih ahi ding; huan nipikal sawmguk-le-nih sung in hun haksa mahmahte akongzing leh bukna phaizang toh akilam nawn ding hi.
27009026	“Nipikal sawmguk-le-nih khit chiang in sathau nilh a ompa satkhiak in a-om ding a, bangmah anei kei ding hi; huchi in ahong om ding vaihawmpa leh mite'n khopi leh mun siangthou ahihse ding ua; hun tawpna tui khang bang in ahong tung ding, huan atawp dong kidouna leh siatgawpnate om ding a guankholhsa ahita hi.
27009027	Huchi in nipikal khat a ding in tampi toh thukhun khauhtak abawl ding a; nipikal kimkhat a ding in kithoihna leh thillat atawpsak ding hi; mun siangthou ah mulkimhuai leh kihhuai atungkhe ding a; amah tung a tung dia guankholhsa hun tawp leh thangpaihna atung ah sunbuak ahih tan a-om ding hi,” achi hi.
27010001	Persia kumpipa Kura vaihawm kum thumna ah Daniel, amin Belteshazzar kiang ah thu khat ahong kihil hi; huan huai thu atak ahi a, kidouna thupi mahmah thu ahi; huchi in huai thu atheisiam a, mengmuhna theihsiamna anei hi.
27010002	Huai lai in kei, Daniel in nipikal pumpi kal thum ka suun hi.
27010003	Tanghou lim ka ne kei a; sa hi in uain hileh ka kam ah alut kei; nipikal thum tunkim masiah sathau ka kinilh kei himhim hi.
27010004	Huan akha masapen ani sawmnih-le-li ni in, lui lian, Tigris pang ah ka dingh hi.
27010005	Ka dak a, ngai in, mi khat puanmalngat silh, akawngte Uphaz dangka-eng siang a gak ka mu hi.
27010006	Apumpi leng beril suang bang ahi a; amaitang khophia bang ahi; amitte meisel kuangpha abang a, abante leh akhepekte dal nawttet abang a; athugen ging mipi aw abang hi.
27010007	Huchi in kei, Daniel kia in hiai mengmuhna ka mu a; ka kiang a om mite'n lah huai mengmuhna amu ngal kei ua; himahleh atung uah nakpi a linna ahong tung a, kibu ding in ataikek uhi.
27010008	Huchi in kei kia a nutsiat in ka om a; hiai mengmuhna thupi ka muta hi; huchi in kei ah hatna a-om nawnta kei a; ka kilawmna kei ah siatna ahong suakta a; hatna ka neita kei hi.
27010009	Hinapi in ka muh mipa aw ka za a; athute ka ngaihkhiak lai in, akhup in ka mai lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmu hithit hi.
27010010	Ngai in, khut in ahon khoih a; ka khuk leh ka khutpek leh ban ah hon len in ling kawmkawm lai ahon phong hi.
27010011	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, nang nakpitak a-it a ompa, na kiang a ka thugente theisiam in dingtang in; na kiang a sawl a ompa ka hi,” achi a; hiai thu ka kiang a agen lai in, ling kawm in ka dinghta hi.
27010012	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lau ke'n, Daniel, theisiam ding leh na Pathian ma a kiniamkhiak ding a, na lungtang na koihkip ni masapen a kipan, na thugente zak a omta ahi; na thugente ziak a hong ka hi.
27010013	Himahleh Persia gam kumpipa'n ni sawmnih-le-khat kei ahon dal hi; himahleh ngai in, Persia kumpipa kiang ah hentang a ka om nilouh ziak in Mikael, angel lianpen kei hon panpih ding in ahong pai hi.
27010014	Huchi in ni nanung lam chiang a na mite tung a hong tung ding bang ahia chih nang hon theisiamsak dia hong pai ka hi; mengmuhna tunung ni tampi a hong tung ding ahi lai hi,” chi in.
27010015	Huan hiai thute bang a ka kiang a ama'n thu agen khit in lei lam ah ka mai ka nga a, ka pau thei kei hi.
27010016	Huan ngai in, mi khat mite tapate toh kibang in ka mukte ahon khoihsak a; ka kam ka a, thu ka gen a, ka ma a dingpa kiang ah, “Aw ka toupa, mengmuhna ziak in lungkhamnate ka tung ah hong kibung a, hatna ka neita kei.
27010017	Bangchi in ahia ka toupa sikha in ka toupa ahoulimpih theih ding? Kei ah lah thahatna a-om kei a, nak leng nak lah sim ka hi,” ka chi hi.
27010018	Huai lai in mi khat mihing toh kibang in ahon khoih nawn a, ahon hatsakta hi.
27010019	Huan ama'n, “Aw nakpitak a it mipa, lau ke'n; na kiang ah muanna om hen, hattak in om in; ahi, hattak in om in,” achi hi. Ama'n ka kiang a thu agen khit in, ka hatta hi, “Ka Toupa thugen heh, ka chi a; nang na hon hatsakta ngal a,” chi in.
27010020	Ama'n, “Na kiang a bang ding a hong pai ka hia chih na thei hia? Tu in Persia gam makaipa kidoupih ding in ka kik nawn ding; huchi a ka paikhiak chiang in, ngai in, Grik makaipa ahong pai ding hi,” achi hi.
27010021	Himahleh thutak laibu sung a kigelh nang ka hon hilh ding; na makaipa Mikael chih louh kuamah hiaite kalh a kei hon doupih a-om kei.
27011001	Huan kei ka hihleh, Mid mi Darias akum khatna kum in, amah hihkip ding leh hihhat ding in ka dingh hi.
27011002	Huchi in thutak ka hon ensak ding hi. “Ngai in, Persia ah kumpipa thum ahong dingkhe lai ding ua; alina pen amaute tengteng sang in nakpitak in ahausazaw ding hi. Huchi a ahauhna ziak a ahong hat mahmah chiang in, Grik dou ding in mi tengteng atokthou ding hi.
27011003	Huan kumpipa hattak ahong dingkhe ding a, thuneihna thupi toh vaihawm ding leh adeihdan a hih ding in.
27011004	Ahong dinkhiak chiang in agam akek ding a, van huih lite lam ah hawmzak ahi ding; amah suan hilou in vai ahawm ding a, himahleh ama'n thilhihtheihna anei kei ding; agam bohkhiak leh midangte kiang ah piak in a-om ding hi.
27011005	“Huchi in simlam kumpipa ahat ding a, asepaih heutu khat amah sang in ahatzaw ding a, gam anei ding a; avaihawmna thupi ahi ding.
27011006	Huan kum bangzah hiam nung in, akizomkhawm ding ua; simlam kumpipa tanu mallam kumpipa kiang ah kituahna bawl ding in ahong pai dia; himahleh hiai kizopna in hun sawt adaih kei ding; huai ni in amah veng mite leh apa leh amah kithuahpih pa leng piakkhiak in a-om ding hi.
27011007	“Himahleh azung a kipan ahiang selnou mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe ding a; huai tuh sepaih pawl kiang ah ahong pai dia; mallam kumpipa kulhpi sung ah alut dia; amaute dou in thil ahih ding a, avualzou ding hi.
27011008	Huchi in apathiante u leng, amilim sunte uh toh, huan adangka leh dangka-eng tui-um belsuan hoihte uh toh, Aigupta ah ama'n asal in alakik ding a; huan mallam kumpipa a kipan kum bangzah hiam akidangkoih ding hi.
27011009	Huan simlam kumpipa gam ah ahong pai dia, himahleh ama gam lam ah akik nawn ding hi.
27011010	Huchi in atapate'n adou ding ua; sepaih thupi tampi akaikhawm ding ua; huaite adimlet in ahong kuan ding ua, apaisuak ding uh; huan akik nawn ding ua, amah kulh tanpha hial in adou ding uhi.
27011011	Huchi in simlam kumpipa aheh mahmah ding a, ahong kuankhe dia mallam kumpipa akidoupih ding hi. Mallam kumpipa'n sepaih atam a tam tungkhe mahleh mipite akhut a piak in a-om ding uhi.
27011012	Huan mipite pimang in a-om ding ua, alungtang sansak in a-om ding a; huchi in sing tampite apuksak ding a, himahleh avualzou kei ding hi.
27011013	“Huan mallam kumpipa ahong kik dia, ama sang a thupizaw mipi ahon tungkhe ding a; kum bangzah hiam nung in sepaihhon thupi leh van tampi toh ahong kuan ding hi.
27011014	Huan huai hunte ah simlam kumpipa dou in mi tampi adingkhe ding uh; na mite lak a hiamgam tate leng mengmuhna hihkip ding in ahong kidomkang ding ua; himahleh apuk ding uhi.
27011015	Huchibang in mallam kumpipa ahong kisa dia, panmun abawl dia, khopi kulh neite ala ding; simlam sepaihte leh amitelte'n leng anang kei ding ua, nanna ding in hatna leng a-om kei ding hi.
27011016	Himahleh amah dou dia hong paipa'n ama deihlam bang in ahih ding a, ama ah kuamah adingh kei ding; gam thupi ah adingh dia, akhut ah siatna a-om ding hi.
27011017	Agam pumpi thahatna toh hong pai atum tinten ding a, simlam kumpigam toh kizopna bawl ding in atanu akiang ah ape ding hi; himahleh athil sawm alohsam ding a, aphattuampih sam kei ding.
27011018	“Hiai khit in tuikulh lam anga dia, gam tampite azou ding hi; himahleh gamdangmi sepaih heutu khat in amah azou dia, ami simmohna atawpsak ding; ahi, ami simmohna amah tung ah akibungsak ding hi.
27011019	Huai hun chiang in ama gam kulhpi lam ah akik nawn dia; himahleh kisuipai in apuk dia, muh in a-om nawnta kei ding hi.
27011020	Huai hun chiang in ama mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe dia, ama'n agamsung puahna ding in leiman khonpa gam thupi tan apalsuaksak dia; himahleh ni tam lou zoh in hehna leh kidouna hilou in hihsiat in a-om ding hi.
27011021	“Huan amun ah mizahpihhuai khat ahong dingkhe ding a, huai lalgam in zahtakna apiaklouhna pa uh; himahleh mite bit akisak lai un ahong pai dia, maitang phatna in gam ala ding hi.
27011022	Huan sepaihhonte ama ah taihmang in a-om ding uh, thukhun heutupa tanpha tel in.
27011023	Huchi in amah toh pankhawmna kibawl nung in lepchiahtak in thil ahih ding a; ahong kuantou dia, nam neuchik toh hong hat ding ahi.
27011024	Gam khen a hausa mahmah namte abit lai pen un dou ding in akuantou dia, apipute'n ahihzoh louh uh ahon hihzou ding a, apipute'n leng ahih ngei louh uh alak uah samat leh gallakte leh vante ahawmzak dia, ahi, kulh nei khopite dou ding in aguksawm ding hi, himahleh hun khat kia adaih ding hi.
27011025	“Huan sepaih thupi toh simlam kumpipa dou ding in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna atokthou ding a; huchi in simlam kumpipa'n sepaih athupi a thupi leh hat in kidouna ah adouthuk ding hi. Himahleh ama siatna ding a aguk a thusawm ahih ziak in adingh zou kei ding hi.
27011026	Ahi, a-an nete'n amah ahihmang ding ua, asepaihte phiatmang in a-om ding uhi; huchi in tampi thah in apuk ding uhi.
27011027	Kumpipa nihte ahih uleh gilou lungtang pu kawm in dohkan khat ah atukhawm ding ua, zuau in akikhemtuah ding uh. Himahleh hun tawp atung ding a sehsa ahih ziak in alohching kei ding uhi.
