27011028	Huai hun chiang in simlam kumpipa tuh gallak thupi toh agam lam ah akik nawn dia; huchi in alungtang in thukhun siangthou adou ding; a-utut ahih ding a ama gam ngei ah akik nawn ding hi.
27011029	“Hun sehsa ah akik nawn dia, simlam ah ahong pai dia; himahleh hun masa hiam hun nanung bang ahi kei ding hi.
27011030	Amah dou dia Kittim longte hong pai ding ahih ziak in; huaiziak in adah ding a, akik nawn dia; thukhun siangthou dou in ahehna asungbo ding a a-utut ahih ding a; ahong kik nawn ngeingei dia, thukhun siangthou nungngatsante deihsakna alak ding hi.
27011031	Amah lam ah sepaihte apang ding ua, mun siangthou kulhpi mahmah abuahsak ding ua; halmang thillat gige ahihbei ding ua ahihgawp ding in kihhuai atungkhe ding uhi.
27011032	Huan thukhun nungngatsante maitang phatna in giloutak in, ama'n ahekkawi dia; himahleh mi a Pathian uh theite bel ahat ding ua, thilhih minthangpente ahih ding uhi.
27011033	Huchi in mite lak a theihsiamna neite, ni tampi sung, namsau leh meikuang, saltanna leh siatna ah puk mah le uh, mi tampi athuhilh ding uhi.
27011034	Huan apuk chiang un, panpihna tawmchik angah ding ua, himahleh maitang phatnate toh mi tampi in amau apawlbawl ding uhi.
27011035	Alak ua theihsiamna neite lak a mi khenkhatte, amaute bawlhoih ding leh siangthousak ding leh amaute ngousak ding in, apuk ding uhi. Hun tawp tanpha; hun sehsa a ding ahih lai ziak in.
27011036	“Huan kumpipa'n adeihlam bang in ahih dia; akiliansak ding a, pathian chiteng tung ah akikoih lian dia, pathiante' Pathian dem in thillamdangte agen ding hi; thangpaihna apichin matan alohching ding; atup tintensa ahih ding hi.
27011037	Apipute pathiante leh numeite lunggulh leng azahtak kei dia, pathian leng azahtak kei ding; mi tengteng tung ah akiliansak ding hi.
27011038	Himahleh ama'n kulhpite pathian apahtawi dia; api-le-pute theih ngei louh dangka-eng leh dangka leh suangmantamte leh thilthawnpiak manphate in amah abe ding hi.
27011039	Huan gamdang pathiante panpihna in kulh muanhuaipen pente asual ding a; kuapeuh amah hihna pomte kiang ah zahna lianzaw ape ding a, tampi tung a vaihawm ding in abawl dia, man nei in gam ahawm ding hi.
27011040	“Huan hun tawp chiang in simlam kumpipa'n amah akidoupih ding; mallam kumpipa amah dou ding in pingpei bang in, kangtalaite toh, sakol tungtuang mite toh, long tampi toh ahong kuan ding; huchi in gamte ah alut dia, adimlet dia apaisuak ding hi.
27011041	Ama'n gam siangthoupen leng asim ding a, huchi in gam tampi zoh in a-om ding hi; himahleh Edom leh Moab leh Ammon tate hausapate akhut a kipan suahtaksak in a-om ding hi.
27011042	Gam tampite tung ah akhut azan ding a; Aigupta gam asuakta kei ding hi.
27011043	Himahleh dangka-eng leh dangka goute tung leh Aigupta thil manphate tengteng tung ah thilhihtheihna anei dia; huan Libia mite leh Ethiopia mite akalsuanna ah a-om ding uhi.
27011044	“Himahleh suahlam a kipan leh mallam a kipan a thuthang in amah ahihlau dia; thangpaihna thupi a mi tampi hihse ding leh hihmang ding in akuankhe ding hi.
27011045	Huan tuipi leh tang siangthou thupi kikal ah a-inpi puaninte akai ding a, himahleh amah abeina hong tung dia, kuamah in amah apanpih kei ding uh.”
27012001	Huai hun chiang in Mikael, heutu thupi na mite tapate vengbittu ahong dingkhe ding hi. Leitung pianchil a kipan tu hun tanpha a om ngei nai lou, mangbat hun ahong tung ding hi, huai hun chiang in laibu sung a gelh a om a, muhkhiak a om na mite hutkhiak in a-om ding uh.
27012002	Huan alak ua mi tampi leitung a leivui a ihmute akhanglou ding ua, akhen tangtawn hinna tang ding in, akhen zumna leh tangtawn simmohna tang ding in.
27012003	Apilte vansin vakna bang in avak ding ua; mi tampi diktatna lam a heite tangtawn tangtawn in aksite bang in atang ding uhi.
27012004	Himahleh nang, Aw Daniel, hun tawp tan a ding in thute khakkhum bikbek inla, laibu bilh in; mi tampi avialtai ding ua, theihna apung ding.
27012005	Huai lai in kei, Daniel in ka en a, ngai in, midang nih, lui gei hiai lam pang ah khat, lui gei lang lam pang ah khat adingh uhi.
27012006	Huan khat in puanmalngat asilh a, luituite tung a ompa kiang ah, “Hiai thillamdangte tawpna ding bangchi a sawt hi ding ahia?” achi hi.
27012007	“Puanmalngat silh a, luituite tung a ompa'n van lam a akhut taklam leh akhut veilam liktou in, amah tangtawn a hingpa min a kichiam in hun khat, hunte leh hun kimkhat ahi ding achih ka zata hi; misiangthoute thilhihtheihna asuknen dimdem khit chiang un, hiai thil tengteng zoh ahi ding,” chi in.
27012008	Huai ka za a, himahleh ka theisiam kei. Ke'n, “Aw ka Toupa, hiai thilte tawpna bang hi ding ahia?” ka chi hi.
27012009	Ama'n, “Pai in, Daniel; thute khakkhum bikbek ahita ua, hun tawp matan a bilh bikbek ahita hi,” achi hi.
27012010	Mi tampi akihihsiangthou ding ua, angou ding ua, akibawlhoih ding uh; himahleh giloute agilou sem ding ua; giloute lak a kuamah in atheisiam kei ding uh; himahleh apilte'n atheisiam ding uh.
27012011	Huchi in halmang thillat gige lakmang a om a, hihgawptu kihhuai tunkhiak a hong om ding hun a kipan, ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmkua a-om ding hi.
27012012	Ni sangkhat zathum sawmthum-le-nga ngak a, huai a hong paite'n nuam asa uhi.
27012013	Himahleh atawp matan nang zaw pai in; na khawl ding a, nang a dia piakna mun ah nite beina ah na goutan sang ding in na thoukhe ding hi.
28001001	Judah kumpipate, Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah leh Israel kumpipa, Joas tapa Jeroboam dam lai a, Beeri tapa Hosia kiang a hong tung Toupa thu ahi.
28001002	Hosia zang a Toupa'n thu agen masak lai in, Hosia kiang ah Toupa'n , “Kuan inla, na zi ding in kizuakmi pi inla, kizuakmi tate nei in; gam in lah Toupa paisan in kizuakna nakpitak in ahihta ngal a,” achi hi.
28001003	Huchi in akuan a Diblaim tanu Gomer api a; ahong gai a, tapa aneihsak hi.
28001004	Huan Toupa'n akiang ah, “Amin Jezreel sa in; sawt lou nung chiang a, Jehu inkote tung a Jezreel sisan phuba la ding ka hi, Israel inkote lalgam ka tawpsak ding hi.
28001005	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a, Jezreel Phaizang ah Israel thalpeu ka kitansak ding,” achi hi.
28001006	Huan agai nawn a, tanu anei hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Amin ding in Lo-ruhamah sa in; amaute bangchi mah a ngaidam ding in, Israel inkote tung ah zahngaihna ka neih nawn louh ding ziak in,” achi hi.
28001007	“Himahleh Judah inkote tung ah zahngaihna ka nei ding a, Toupa a Pathian un amaute ka hondam ding a, thalpeu, namsau, kidouna, sakol, sakol tungtuang mite in amaute ka hondam kei ding hi,” achi hi.
28001008	Huan Lo-ruhamah nawi angolhsak zoh in, agai nawn a, tapa anei hi.
28001009	Pathian in, “Amin ding in Lo-ammi sa in; ka mite na hih louh ua, na Pathian uh ka hih louh ding ziak in,” achi hi.
28001010	Hinapi in Israel suante zah tuipi piaunel, teh theih louh, sim theih louh bang ahi ding; akiang ua, “Ka mite na hi kei uh,” chih a a-omna mun uah, hichi ahi ding a, “Pathian hing tate na hi uh,” akiang ua chih ahi ding hi.
28001011	Huchi in Judah suante leh Israel suante kaihkhawm ahi ding ua, amaute a ding in lu khat akiguan ding ua, gam a kipan a kuantou ding; Jezreel ni thupi ding ahi.
28002001	Na sanggampa Ammi kiang ah, “Ka mite na hi,” chi inla, na sanggamnute uh Ruhamah kiang ah, “Zahngaihna na tangta,” chi in gen in.
28002002	Na nu uh genpih un, genpih un; ka zi ahi kei a, apasal ka hi sam kei hi; amuhna a kipan akizuaknate leh anawi kikal a kipan a-angkawmnate koihmang hen.
28002003	Huchi lou in zaw vuaktang in ka omsak in, apian ni bang in ka koih in, gamdai bang in ka bawl in, gamkeu bang in ka koih in, dangtakna in amah ka that kha ding hi.
28002004	Ahi, atate tung ah zahngaihna ka nei kei ding a; kizuak tate ahih ding ziak un.
28002005	Anu uh kizuak ahih ziak in; amaute painu'n zumhuaitak in ahihta hi, “Ka tanghou leh ka tui, ka samul leh ka pat, ka sathau leh ka dawn ding hon pia, ka itte ka delh ding,” achih ziak in.
28002006	Huaiziak in ngai in, ling in alampi ka dal dia, amah dal ding in dai ka kai dia, huchi in alampite amu kei ding hi.
28002007	Huchi in a-itte anungzuih ding a, himahleh apha kei ding; amaute azong ding a, himahleh amu kei ding, “Ka pai dia ka pasal masapen kiang ah ka kik ding; huai chiang in tu sang in kei a ding in ahoihzaw ding,” achi ding hi.
28002008	“Abuh-le-bal, uain, sathau ka piak leh adangka leh adangka-eng, Baal a dia azat uh, ka hihpunsak chih atheih louh ziak un.
28002009	Huaiziak in buh-le-bal alak hun in ka la nawn ding, ka uain atun hun in, avuaktanna khuhna ding ka samul leh ka pat ka botkhe ding hi.
28002010	Huchi in tu'n ama itte muh in azahlakna ka mukhe ding a, ka khut a kipan kuamah in amah atankhe kei ding hi.
28002011	Avualnopna tengteng ka tawpsak ding a, a-ankuangluite, akha thak, a Sabbathte leh akhawmpi kulmut tengteng.
28002012	Hiaite ka kipahman ka itte'n kei hon piak uh ahi, achihna, agrep guite leh atheipi kungte ka hihse vek ding huchi in gammang in ka bawl ding a, gamsate'n huaite ane ding uh.
28002013	Baalim ni, huai agimlim hal nite amah tung ah ka kan ding a; abilbahte leh asuangmantamte a kizem a, a-it azuih a, kei ahon mangngilh ziak in,” Toupa'n achi.
28002014	Huaiziak in ngai in, amah ka khim ding a, gamdai ah ka tonpih ding a, akiang ah lungmuanhuaitak in thu ka gen ding hi.
28002015	Huan huai a kipan in agrephuante amah ka pe ding a, lametna kongkhak ding in Akor Phaizang; huan atuailai nite bang in, Aigupta gam a kipan a ahong pawtkhiak lai ni bang in huai ah ama'n la asa ding hi.
28002016	“Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding hi, Baalte na hon chi nawnta kei dia, Ishi na hon chita ding hi,” Toupa'n achi.
28002017	Akam a kipan Baalim minte ka lamangta ding a, amin uh genkhiak ahih nawn tak louh ding ziak un.
28002018	Huai ni chiang in, gamsate, van vasate, lei a bokvak a pai thilte toh amaute a ding in thukhun ka bawl ding; thalpeu leh namsau leh kidouna gam a kipan ka hihmangta ding a, galmuangtak in amau ka kualsak ding hi.
28002019	Huan kei a ding in tangtawn in nang ka hon khamta ding; ahi, diktatna leh vaihawmna leh, itna siamna leh zahngaihna in kei a ding in nang ka hon kham ding hi.
28002020	Ginomna in kei a ding in ka hon kham ding a; Toupa na thei ding.
28002021	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a, ka dawng ding, vante ka dawng ding a, amau lei adawng ding uh, Toupa'n achi.
28002022	Lei in buh-le-bal leh uain leh, sathau in adawng ding a, Amau Jezreel adawng ding uhi.
28002023	Huan lei ah kei a ding in amah ka tuh ding a; zahngaihna tanglounu tung ah zahngaihna ka musak ding; ka mite hiloute kiang ah, “Ka mite na hi uh,” ka chi ding a; amau, “Ka Pathian na hi,” ahon chi ding uhi.
28003001	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Kuan inla, alawm in alunggulh tuntun numei, angkawmnu, pathian dangte lam nga in, grep beu gamte it mah le uh, Toupa'n Israel suante a-it bang in it nawn in,” ahon chi hi.
28003002	Huchi in kei a ding in amah dangka shekel sawm-le-nga leh barli buh homer khat leh barli buh homer kimkhat in ka leita hi.
28003003	Akiang ah, “Kei a ding in ni tampi na om nilouh ding; kizuak in na om nawn kei dia, mi kuamah zi na hi kei ding; huchibang in kei leng nang lam ah ka om ding,” ka chi hi.
28003004	Israel suante bel kumpi nei lou, vaihawmmi om lou, kithoihna nei lou, khuam siangthou lou, siampu puanak lou leh pathiante lou in ni tampi a-om nilouh ding uhi.
28003005	Huai nung chiang in Israel suante ahong kik nawn ding ua, Toupa , a Pathian uh leh David akumpipa uh azong ding uhi; ni nanungte ah Toupa kiang ah ahoihna zuan in lau kawm in ahong pai ding uhi.
28004001	Nou Israel suante, Toupa thu za un, “Gamsung a thutak hiam, zahngaihna hiam, Pathian theihna a-om louh ziak in, Toupa'n gam a tengte akinakpih hi.
28004002	Kichiam leh ginna hihsiat, thah, guktak leh angkawm hih chih ngal louh bangmah a-om kei hi; akitungkhia ua, sisan akisuah zialzial uhi.
28004003	Huaiziak in gam adah ding a, asung a tengte leh gamsate leh tungleng vasate abah ding ua, ahi, tuipi ngasate tengteng amangthang ding uh,” achi hi.
28004004	“Hinapi in kuamah in sual kei henla, kuamah in sal kei heh; na mite lah siampu kisualpihte bang ahi ngal ua.
28004005	Huan sun in na kisui ding a, nang toh zawlnei leng zan in akisui ding uhi; huchi in na nu ka hihse ding hi.
28004006	Ka mite theihna taksap ziak in hihsiat in a-om ua; theihna na deih louh ziak in, ke'n leng, kei a dia siampu na hihlouhna ding in ka hon sam kei ding; na Pathian dan na mangngilhta chih thei in, ke'n leng na suante ka mangngilh ding hi.
28004007	“Ahong pun bang zel un, ka tung ah thil ahihkhial uhi; athupina uh zumna in ka khek ding hi.
28004008	Ka mite khelhna kivakna in anei ua, athulimlouhna uah alungtang uh akoihkip uhi.
28004009	Huan mipite hi in siampute akibang ua, atatdante uh ziak in amaute ka gawt ding a, athilhihte uah kipahman ka pe ding hi.
28004010	Ane ding ua, akham kei ding uh; akizuak ding ua, apung kei ding uh; Toupa lam a pilvan ding a-awlmoh louh ziak un.”
28004011	Toupa'n “Kizuakna leh uain leh uain thak in theihtheihna alamang hi!” achi hi.
28004012	Ka mite'n amilimte uh thu adong ua, akiang uah achiangkhun un thu agenkhia uhi; angkawmna kha in amaute takhialsak in, a Pathian uh nuai a kipan angkawm in a-omta uh.
28004013	Tang sangte tung ah akithoih ua, mualte tung leh tosaw singte leh ahiang singte leh nai nei singte nuai ah, huai nuailim ahoih ziak in, gimlim ahal uh; huaiziak in na tanute un kizuakna ahih ua, na moute un kizuakna ahih ua; na moute un angkawmna ahih uhi.
28004014	Na tanute un akizuak chiang un ka gawt kei ding a, na zite un ang a kawm chiang un leng ka gawt kei ding; pasalte kizuakna apaizak ua, tempul a kizuakte kiang ah akithoih uh; huchi in theihna nei lou mite nuaisiah in a-om ding uhi.
28004015	Nang Israel in, kizuakna hih mah leteh, Judah ahihleh moh kei hen, Gilgal ah hong pai kei unla, Beth-aven ah leng hohtou sam kei un, “ Toupa ahin bang in,” chi in leng kichiam kei un.
28004016	Bawngla genhak bang in, Israel genhaktak in akibawl a; mun za a belamnou bang in tu in Toupa'n amaute avak ding hi.
28004017	Ephraim milimte toh akizom a; a-omom in om hen.
28004018	Adawnkham nung un leng kizuak in a-om lailai ua, thupina sang in zumhuaina a-it tuntun uhi.
28004019	Huih in akha in amaute amutmang ding a, akithoihna ziak un azum ding uhi.
28005001	Nou siampute aw, hiai za un, nou Israel inkote aw, ngaikhia un, kumpipa inkote aw, bildoh un, na tung ua vaihawmna hong tung ding ahi; Mizpah a thang leh Tabor tung a lenthang na hi khinta uhi.
28005002	Mithahna lam ah thukpi in akihelta ua; himahleh amaute tengteng thuhilhpa ka hi.
28005003	Ephraim ka thei a, Israel ka lak ah sel in a-om kei; Ephraim aw, tu in, kizuak in na omta a, Israel abuahta hi.
28005004	Athilbawlte un a Pathian kiang lam angasak kei ding hi; asung uah kizuakna kha a-om a, Toupa athei kei uhi.
28005005	Israel kisaktheihna in amai ah atheihpih a; huaiziak in athulimlouhna uah Israel leh Ephraim akisuipuk ding ua, Judah leng amaute toh apukkhawm ding hi.
28005006	Toupa zong ding in abawnghonte uh leh abelamhonte uh toh akuan ding ua; himahleh amah amu kei ding uh; amau a kipan in akihemkheta hi.
28005007	Toupa tung ah lepchiahtak in agamta ua; ta lamdangte anei ua; tu in aloute uh toh kha thak in amau anegai ding hi.
28005008	Gibeah ah na pengkul binei uh mut unla, Ramah ah pengkul; Beth-aven ah ngaihtak in kikou un; aw Benjamin, ka hon zui uhi.
28005009	Salhna ni in Ephraim asegawp ding a; ahong om ngeingei ding Israel namte lak ah ka theisakta hi.
28005010	Judah heutute zaw gamgi chiamtehna lamangte bang ahi uh; tui bang in atung uah ka hehna ka sungbo ding hi.
28005011	Epraim nuaisiah in a-om, vaihawmna ah delhkhum in a-om, thupiak zui a om alungkim ziak in.
28005012	Huaiziak in Ephraim a ding in puannget leh Judah inkote a ding in siatna ka hi ding hi.
28005013	Ephraim in achinatna amuh a, Judah in aliamna amuh chiang in, huchi in Assuria kiang ah Ephraim ahoh a, kumpipa Jareb kiang ah asawl a; himahleh nang ahon hihdam thei kei a, na liamna leng ahihdam thei sam kei hi.
28005014	Ephraim a ding a humpinelkai bang leh Judah inkote a ding a humpinelkai lun lai bang ka hih ziak in; kei, kei mahmah in, ka botnen ding a ka paimang ding; ka pomang ding a; honkhe ding kuamah a-om kei ding hi.
28005015	Atatkhelhna uh thupha atawi ua, ka mel azon masiah uh, ka pai dia ka mun ah ka kik nawn ding; agimthuakna uah chihtaktak in kei ahon zong ding uhi.
28006001	Hong un, Toupa kiang ah i kik ding uh; ama'n ahon botkekta a, ahon damsak ding ziak in, ahon sat a, ahon tuam ding hi.
28006002	Ni nih nung in ama'n ahon hihhalh ding; ani thum ni in ahon kaithou ding a, ama ah i hing ding uhi.
28006003	Huan thei ni, Toupa thei ding in zuitou pek ni; zingsang a khua avak ngeingei bang in leh vuah, lei kawtsak vuah nanung bang in i kiang uah ahong pai ding chih theihsa ahi.
28006004	Aw Ephraim, bang ka hon chih dia? Aw Judah, bang ka hon loh dia? Na hoihna lah zingsang meipi bang leh daitui zulmang pah bang ahi.
28006005	Huaiziak in zawlneite in amaute ka heuhta; ka kam a thute in amaute ka thatta; na vaihawmnate khovak paikhe pah bang ahi.
28006006	Kithoihna hilou in, zahngaihna ka deih a; halmang thillat sang in Pathian theihna ka deih hi.
28006007	Himahleh Adam bang in thukhun ah atalek ua; huai ah lepchiahtak in ka tung ah ahih uhi.
28006008	Gilead thulim lou sepna khopi ahi a, sisan a hihnit in a-om hi.
28006009	Suamhat pawlte'n mi aguktan bang un, siampu pawlte'n Shekem zotna lampi ah tual athat uh; ahi, kilawm lou ahihta uhi.
28006010	Israel inkote ah thil mulkimhuai ka muta a; huai ah Ephraim ah kizuakna muh in a-om a, Israel abuahgawpta hi.
28006011	Huai lou in, Aw Judah, ka mite saltang ka pi nawn chiang in, nang a ding in buhlak ding sehsa a-om hi.
28007001	Israel ka sukdam chiang in, huai chiang in Ephraim thulimlouhna muhkhiak ahi, Samaria gitlouhna toh; zuauthei ahi ngal ua; gutate'n inn aluh ua, apolam ah suamhatte'n mite asuam uhi.
28007002	Agitlouhna tengteng uh ka theigige chih alungtangte un angaihtuah kei uh; tu in amau thilhihte ngei in amaute ahihbuai hi; tuate ka mai ma ah a-om uhi.
28007003	Agitlouhna un akumpipa uh akipaksak ua, azuau un aheutute uh.
28007004	Avek un angkawmte ahi uh; thuk sa gige, tanghou kangmi in tangbuang mekman silngou in azelhsuah masiah mei sawn kul lou thuk bang ahi.
28007005	I kumpipa uh ankuanglui ni in heutute uain sa in amau leh amau akichinasak ua; simmoh hatte toh akhut azankhia uhi.
28007006	Alungtang uh thukkhuk sa bang ahi a, mite zuau in abuk ua, zankhua in ahehna uh a-am a, zingsang in meikuang bang in akuangkhia hi.
28007007	Thuk bang in asa vek ua, avaihawmte uh anegai uh; akumpipa tengteng uh apukta uh; kei lam a hong patau kuamah a-om kei uhi.
28007008	Ephraim, mite lak ah akidiah a; lumleh louh tanghou beu ahi.
28007009	Mikhualte'n ahatna agai ua, ama'n athei kei; ahi, alutung koi lailai hiam a samkang a-om lam athei kei hi.
28007010	Huan Israel kisaktheihna amel ah alang hi; Toupa a Pathian lam ah akihei kei ua, hiai tengteng ziak in, amah azong tuan kei uh.
28007011	Ephraim vakhu hai bang, theihsiamna bei ahi; Aigupta lam ah asam ua, Assuria kiang ah apai uhi.
28007012	Apai chiang un, atung uah len ka zak ding; van a vasate bang in amaute ka kaikhesuk ding a; a-omkhopna uh azaksa bang un ka sawi ding.
28007013	Atung uh agik hi! Kei a kipan ataimang ziak un, atung uah siatna atung hi, keimah tung ah atalekta ua; amaute tankhe ut mah leng, ka siatna ding in zuau agengen uhi.
28007014	Alungtang uh toh ka kiang ah akap kei ua, alupna tung uah akap zosop uh; buh-le-bal leh uain zong in akikaikhawm ua, ka tung ah ahel uhi.
28007015	Akhut uh sinsak in hatsakta mah leng, ka siatna ding in angaihtuah uhi.
28007016	Akik ua, himahleh tungsang a ompa kiang ah ahi kei; thalpeu gilou bang ahi uh; alei hehna ziak in namsau in aheutute uh apuk ding uh; Aigupta gam ah hiai nuihsan a a-omna uh ahi ding hi.
28008001	Na kam ah pengkul bulh in, muvanlai bang in Toupa inkote dou ding in ahong hi; ka thukhun tung a atatlek ua, ka dan a atatlek ziak un.
28008002	Ka Pathian, kou Israel in ka hon thei uh, chi in kei lam ah akikoukhe ding uhi.
28008003	Israel in ahoih anawlkhin a; melma in amah adelh ding hi.
28008004	Kumpipate atungkhia ua, himahleh kei thu in bel ahi kei; heutute abawl ua, ke'n ka thei kei; satkhiak a a-omtheihna ding un adangka uleh adangka-eng un milimte abawl uhi.
28008005	Aw Samaria, na bawngnou milim in hon satkheta; amaute tung ah ka hehna asou; poi khoih lou a bang tan om zou ding uh ahia?
28008006	Bawngnou milim Israel a kipan in ahi a; nasem mite'n abawlkhiak uh ahi, huai Pathian ahi kei, ahi, Samaria bawngnou milim akitamzan ding hi.
28008007	Huih atuh ua pingpei a-at ua, buh-le-bal ding lai anei kei; avui in an asuah kei hi; huchi ahihleh suah hen, mikhualte'n anawmvalh khin ding uhi.
28008008	Israel nawmvalh in a-om, kipahna omlouhna bel bang in tu in namte lak ah a-om uhi.
28008009	Gam sabiltung tang-om bang in, Assuria zuan in apaitou uhi; Ephraim in it mite aguaita hi.
28008010	Ahi, namte lak ah kizuak mah le uh, amaute ka kaikhawm ding; heutute kumpipa dangte puakgik ziak in alungkham ding uhi.
28008011	Khial ding a Ephraim in maitam apunsak ziak in, amah a ding in maitamte khelhna ding ahi.
28008012	Amah a ding in ka dante singkhat in gelh mah leng, thillamdang bang a sim in a-om uhi.
28008013	Ka thillatte kithoihna thu ahihleh, sa in akithoih ua ane uh; himahleh Toupa'n huaite asang kei hi; tu in agitnatlouhna uh atheigige ding a, akhelhnate un aveh ding; Aigupta ah akik ding uhi.
28008014	Israel in amah bawlpa amangngilh a, mun sangte alamta hi; himahleh akhopite tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, huai a kulhpite akangtum ding uhi.
28009001	Aw Israel, midangte bang in nuamsa in kipak ke'n; Pathian taisan in kizuak in na om khinta ngal a, phual tung teng ah kizuakman na itta hi.
28009002	Phual leh uain suknate'n amaute avak kei ding a, uain thak in amah azuausan ding hi.
28009003	Toupa gam ah ateng kei ding ua; himahleh Ephraim Aigupta ah akik ding, Assuria ah an siang lou ane ding uhi.
28009004	Toupa kiang ah uain thillatte asungkhe kei ding ua, amah a ding in lungkimhuai ahi sam kei ding uh; akithoihnate uh amau a ding in sisuun mite tanghou bang ahi ding; huai ne tengteng hihnit in a-om ding uh; atanghou uh agilkialna uh a ding ahi; Toupa insung ah ahong pai kei ding hi.
28009005	Kikhawmpi chikleh Toupa ankuanglui ni in bang na hih ding ua?
28009006	Ngai un, Assuria ah apai ding uh; Aigupta in amaute akhawm ding, Memphis in amaute avui ding. Dangka a bawl agou manphate uh lahou in akhuh ding; apuaninte uah lingte a-om ding hi.
28009007	Vehna nite ahong tung, thukna nite ahong tung; Israel in athei ding hi; zawlnei mihai a seh ahi a, khamite leng mihai ahi, na ginatlouhna atam mahmah ziak in leh muhdahna athupi ziak in.
28009008	Ephraim galvilmi Pathian toh a-om hi; zawlnei tungtang ahihleh alampi tengteng ah thangkampa thang a-om a, muhdahna Pathian inn ah a-om hi.
28009009	Gibeah nite a bang in, nakpi in amau leh amau akihihsia ua; athulimlouhna uh atheigige ding a, akhelhnate uh agawt ding hi.
28009010	Gamdai a grepte bang in Israel ka mu a; theipi kung ahun masapen lai a min masa bang in na pipute uh ka muta hi. Himahleh Baal-peor ah ahong ua, thil zumhuai lam ah akipumpiak ua, athil deihte uh bang in amaute kihhuai ahong hita uhi.
28009011	Ephraim ahihleh, vasa bang in athupina uh alengmang ding a; nau pianna, nau paina leh nau neihna himhim a-om kei ding hi.
28009012	Atate uh khoilian mah le uh, amau ka suunsak ding a, piching a hawi in a-om kei ding hi; ahi, amaute ka nutsiat hun chiang in atung uah tunggikna a-om ding hi.
28009013	Ephraim, Tura ka muhsa bang in, mun nuam a phuh in a-om; himahleh Ephraim in atate tualthatmi kiang ah ahon pikhe ding hi.
28009014	Aw Toupa amau pia in; bang na pe dia? Sul naupai thei lou leh nawizu nei lou pia in.
28009015	Agitlouhna tengteng uh Gilgal ah a-om a; huai ah amaute ka mudahta hi; athilhihte uh gitlouh ziak in ka inn a kipan amau ka delhkhe ding a; ka it nawn kei ding; aheutute tengteng uh mihel ahi uhi.
28009016	Ephraim sat in a-om, azung uh akeu, gah asuang kei ding uh; tate suang mah le uh, asulgah it uh ka that ding hi.
28009017	Ka Pathian in amaute apaimang ding a, amah angaihkhiak louh ziak un; huchi in namte lak ah vakvai in a-om ding uhi.
28010001	Israel in gahtam asuah zel, grepgui pha ahi; agahtam mahmah dungzui in amaitamte apungsak; agam hoihna dungzui in milim kilawm taktak abawl uhi.
28010002	Alungtang uh akikhen a; huchi in mohtansak in a-om ding uh; amaitamte uh asat ding a, akhuamte uh alok ding hi.
28010003	Kumpipa i nei kei uh; Toupa i kihta kei ua; kumpipa leng, ei a ding in bang ahihthei dia, tu in achi ding uhi.
28010004	Thukhunte bawlna a zuau a kichiam in, thute agen ua; huaiziak in lou lehsa a namtul bang in thukhenna apoukhe ding hi.
28010005	Beth-aven bawngnoute ziak in Samaria a tengte'n alau ding ua; huai mite'n siampu atung a kipakte asuun ding uh, huai bawngnou ziak in thupina amah a kipan apaimang tak ziak in.
28010006	Kumpipa Jareb kiang a thilpiak ding a Assuria lam a puak ahi lai ding a, Ephraim in zahlakna amu dia, Israel amah pilna ah azahlak ding hi.
28010007	Samaria bel tui tung a tuiphuan bang in akumpipa satkhiak ahi.
28010008	Aven mun sangte leng, Israel khelhna hihsiat ahi ding, amaitam tung uah ling leh loulingnei ahong poutou ding a; tangte kiang ah, “Hon khuh un; mualte kiang ah hon pukkhum un,” achi ding uhi.
28010009	Aw Israel, Gibeah nite a kipan na khialta a; huai ah adingh ua; Gibeah thulimlouhna tate tung a kidouna in amaute aphaklouhna ding in.
28010010	Amaute ka sawi ding ka deihlam ahi; atatlekna uh thuah nih ziak a taihilh ahih hun chiang un, amaute dou ding in mite akikhawm ding uh.
28010011	Huan Ephraim bawngla chilsiamsa, buh-le-bal chilkhiak ut ahi; himahleh angawng kilawm tung ah hakkol ka bat dia, Ephraim tung ah tungtuangmi ka koih ding; Judah in lei alet dia, Jakob in asai anawn ding.
28010012	Diktatna ah kituh unla, zahngaihna bang zel in at un, na leileh lei uh satkham un; ahong pai a na tung ua diktatna ahon zuksak matan, Toupa zon hun ahi.
28010013	Gitlouhna lei na let ua, thulimlouhna na lata uh; zuaugenna gah na neta ua; na lampi ah, na mihatte ah na muangta uhi.
28010014	Huaiziak in na mite lak ah buaina ahong pawt ding a, na kulhte uh loh in a-om ding hi, kidou lai a Salman in Beth-arbel aluh bang in; atate toh anu paih nen in a-om uhi.
28010015	Huchibang mah in na gitlouh mahmah ziak in Bethel in na tung ah ahih ding; nuaisiah in Israel kumpipa satkhiak siang in a-omta ding hi.
28011001	Israel naupang ahih lai in, amah ka it a, Aigupta a kipan ka tapa ka samkhia hi.
28011002	Amaute asap chiang un, amau a kipan apai gamla sem ua, Baal kiang ah akithoih ua, lim bawltawmte kiang ah gimlim ahal uhi.
28011003	Hinapi in Ephraim pai ka kisinsak a; ka ban in amau ka pom a; himahleh amaute'n ka hihdam ahih lam uh athei kei uhi.
28011004	Mihing khaute leh itna gui in amau ka kai a, amaute a ding in amuk tung uleh amuk nuai ua kibat hakkol ka lakkhiaksak a, ama uah an ka lui hi.
28011005	Aigupta gam ah akik nawn kei ding a; himahleh Assuria mi akumpipa ahi ding, kik nawn anial ziak un.
28011006	Huan akhopite tung ah namsau lik in a-om dia, asiktawnte ahul in, anegai ding, athuhilhte uh ngei ziak in.
28011007	Huchi in ka mite'n kei a kipan nungtawn atum tinten uh; amah tungsang a ompa sam mah le uh, kuamah in amah aliansak kei ding uh.
28011008	Ephraim, bangchi in ka hon tawpsan dia? Israel, bangchi in ka hon tankhe dia? Admah bang in bangchi in ka hon bawl dia? Zeboim bang in bangchi in ka hon koih dia? Ka sung ah ka lungtang akilumlet a, ka lainatnate toh akuangkhawm hi.
28011009	Ka hehna mahmah ka suahkhesak kei ding a, Ephraim hihse ding in ka kihei kei ding; mihing hilou in, Pathian ka hi a, nang lak a Mi Siangthou, khopi sung ah ka lut kei ding hi.
28011010	Amau Toupa deihdan in a-om ding ua; amah humpinelkai bang in ahumham ding a, amah ahumham chiang in, tumlam a kipan tate ling kawm in ahong pai ding uhi.
28011011	Aigupta a kipan a vasa bang in ling kawm in ahong pai ding ua, Assuria gam a kipan a vakhu bang in; a-innte ua teng ding in amau ka bawl ding, Toupa'n achi.
28011012	Ephraim in zuauthu in leh Israel inkuan in khemna in kei ahon umsuak a; himahleh Judah bel Pathian toh vai ahawm lai a, misiangthoute toh aginom lai hi.
28012001	Ephraim huih in akivak a, suahlam huih azui; zuaute leh siatgawpna apungsak gige a; Assuria toh thukhun abawl ua, Aigupta gam ah sathau puaklut in a-om hi.
28012002	Toupa'n leng Judah akiselpih a, alampite bang in Jakob agawt ding; athilhihte bang in amah athuk ding hi.
28012003	Sul ah a-unaupa akhetul in aman a; apichin in Pathian ah thilhihtheihna anei hi.
28012004	Ahi, angel tung ah thilhihtheihna anei a, avualzouta a; akap a, akiang ah zahngaihna angen hi; Bethel ah amah amu a, huai ah kou ahon houpih hi.
28012005	Toupa mahmah, sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa theihgigena ahi.
28012006	Huaiziak in nang na Pathian lam nga in; zahngaihna leh vaihawmna kem in, na Pathian ngak nilouh in.
28012007	Amah Kanaan mi ahi, akhut ah khemna buknate a-om; nuaisiah a-utlam ahi.
28012008	Ephraim in, “Taktak in ka hong hauta a, hauhsakna ka kimuhkhiakta hi; ka sepgimna tengteng ah thulimlouhna thilhihkhelhna kei ah bangmah amu kei ding uh,” achi hi.
28012009	Himahleh Aigupta gam a kipan kei Toupa na Pathian ka hi; ankuanglui thupi lai nite bang in, puaninte a teng ding in nang ka hon bawl lai ding hi.
28012010	Zawlneite kiang ah leng thu ka genta a, mengmuhnate ka tamsakta hi; zawlneite nasepna zang in kibatpihte ka zangta hi.
28012011	Gilead thulimlouhna ahi hia? Bangmah lou ahi vek uh; Gilgal ah bawngtalte in akithoih ua; amaitamte uh loukaihna a leivup bang in a-om uh.
28012012	Aram lou a Jakob atailut bang in, Israel in zi loh ding in nna asem, zi loh ding in belamhon aching hi.
28012013	Aigupta a kipan zawlnei in Toupa'n Israel apikhia a, zawlnei a hawi in a-om hi.
28012014	Nakpi mahmah in Ephraim in Toupa ahehsak a; huaiziak in amah tung ah asisan nutsiat in a-om ding, amah gensiatna Toupa'n akiang lam ah akiksak nawn ding hi.
28013001	Ephraim in thu agen lai in, midangte aling ua; Israel ah amah-le-amah akiliansak; himahleh Baal milim bia in, asita hi.
28013002	Huchi in akhial semsem ua, adangka un milim sun abawl ua, amau theihtheihna dungzui a milimte mahmah avek ua khutsiam mite nasep; kithoih mite'n bawngnoute tawp uhen! chi in huaite tungthu agen uhi.
28013003	Huaiziak in zingsang meipi, daitui hulmang pah bang, phual a kipan a pingpei lak a buhsi bang a mutleng leh meikhu suahna a kipan a meikhu bang ahi ding uhi.
28013004	Hinapi in kei Aigupta gam a kipan Toupa na Pathian ka hi; kei lou ngal pathian na thei kei ding, kei chih louh hondampa a-om kei hi.
28013005	Gamdai ah ka hon theita a, khokhalna gam ah.
28013006	Aloupa hing nou mitmet mun uh bang in, amaute hihdim in a-om ua; hihdim in a-om ua, huan alungtang uh hihlet in a-om; huaiziak in kei ahon mangngilhta uhi.
28013007	Huaiziak in amaute a ding in humpinelkai bang ka hi a; gialbem bang in lampi kiang ah ka tang ding hi.
28013008	Vompi anoute suun bang in amaute ka maituah ding a, alungtang ua kipan alap uh ka kaikhe ding; huai ah humpinelkai bang in amaute ka ne bei ding; gamsa bang in amaute ka botnen ding hi.
28013009	Aw Israel, na panpihpa dou a, kei na hon dou, na siatna ahi.
28013010	Na khopi tengteng a nang hon hondam ding na kumpipa tua koi a om ahia? Kumpipa leh heutute hon pi un, na chihnate uh, na vaihawmte uh koi ah?
28013011	Hehngoh in kumpipa ka hon pia a, hehngoh in amah ka lamangta hi.
28013012	Ephraim thulimlouhna koih hoih in a-om a, akhelhna chiamtehna akoih in a-om hi.
28013013	Numei nauvei lungkhamna atung ah ahong tung ding; tapa pil lou suang ahi a, naupian hun tungta a, amun a a-omom ding ahita ngal kei a.
28013014	Han thilhihtheihna a kipan amaute ka tan ding a; sihna a kipan amaute ka tan ding; Aw sihna, na gu koi ah a-om ua? Aw han, na hihsiatna koi ah a-om a? Ka mit a kipan kisikna sel ahi ding hi.
28013015	A-unaute lak ah gahpha mahleh, suahlam huih ahong kuan dia, gamdai a kipan Toupa huih ahong nung dia, atui nak ahong keu dia, aluikhuk akang vek ding; bel kipahhuai tengteng a agou loh in a-om ding hi.
28013016	Samaria in amoh apo ding; a Pathian tung ah ahel a; namsau in apuk ding ua; anaungekte uh paihgawp in a-om ding uh, nau toh kithuah a numeite uh dawt pailet in a-om ding uhi.
28014001	Aw Israel, Toupa na Pathian kiang ah kik nawn in, na thulimlouhna ah na pukta hi.
28014002	Thupha tawi inla, Toupa kiang ah kik nawn in, “Thulimlouhna tengteng lamang inla, ahehpihna in na sang in; huchi in ka mukte uh thillat bawngtalte bang in ka pe ding uh,” akiang ah chi in.
28014003	Assuria in ahondam kei dia; sakolte tung ah i tuang kei ding uh; i khut ua i bawlte kiang uah, pathiante na hi uh, i chi nawn kei ding hi; nang ah pabeite'n zahngaihna amu uhi.
28014004	Aginomlouhna uh ka hihdam ding a, amaute athawn in ka it ding, kei a kipan in ka hehna lah akiheimangta ngal a.
28014005	Israel lak ah daitui bang ka hi ding, lili pak bang in apaklun dia, Lebanon sing bang in zungkip akakhesuk ding hi.
28014006	Ahiangte abawkpha dia, akilawmna olive sing bang ahi dia, agim Lebanon bang ahi ding hi.
28014007	Alimnuai a tengte ahong kik nawn ding ua, buh-le-bal bang in ahong hing thak ding ua, grepgui bang in apaklun ding; agim Lebanon uain bang ahi ding.
28014008	Milimte bang ding ka chi nawnta dia? Ephraim in achi ding hi. Ka dawng khin a, amah ka limsak ding, meilah sing hing bang ka hi a; kei a kipan na gah muh ahi.
28014009	Kua ahia pil a, hiai thilte theithei ding? Pilvang a amaute thei ding? Toupa lampite adik a, huaite ah midiktat a-om ding a; himahleh talekte huai ah apuk ding uhi.
29001001	Pethuel tapa Joel kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi:
29001002	Putekte aw, hiai za un; hiai, nou hun lai leh na pute uh hun lai in a-om kha ngeita a hia?
29001003	Huai pen na tate uh hilh unla, na tate un amau tate hilh uhenla, ata nawnte un suan dang hilhsawn zel uhen.
29001004	Singnget khaupe in anek bang teng khaukhuphon in ane a, khaukhuphon in anek bang teng khaupehon in ane a; khaupehon in anek bang teng khaupenouhon in ane khinta hi.
29001005	Nou zukhamte aw, halh unla kap un; uain dawn tengteng aw, a-uain khum ziak in kap vongvong un; na kam ua kipan lah uain lakmang ahita ngal a.
29001006	Nam hat mahmah, sim seng louh in ka gam ahong douta uh, ahate humpinelkai liante ha ahi a, humpinelkai pite hapak anei hi.
29001007	Ka grepgui ahihsia a, ka theipi sing hawng akheuh a, akheuhsiang vek a, apaimang a; ahiangte akiatngou vek hi.
29001008	Nungak in, sai-ip puan teng a, atuailai pasal asuun bang in kap vongvong un.
29001009	Tangbuang latte, dawn ding latte Toupa' inn a kipan hihman ahi a; siampu Toupa nasemte alungkham uhi.
29001010	Lou hihsiat ahi a, gam alungkham a; buh hihsiat ahi a, uain thak akang a, sathau aginata kei hi.
29001011	Aw, nou lounei mite aw, suun unla; aw, nou grepgui kem mite aw, huit buh leh barli buh ziak in dah in mau tuaituai un; lou a buhlak ding amangthang vekta hi.
29001012	Grepgui avuai a, theipi kung avuai a; theibuhfai zung, tum leh epul theikung, lou a sing tengteng leng avulta hi; mihing tate lak a kipahna lah avuaimangta ngal a.
29001013	Nou siampute aw, sai-ip puan teng unla kap un; nou maitam nasem mite aw, chiau vengvung un; nou ka Pathian nasem mite aw, hong pai unla, sai-ip puan silh in zankhua in hong lum un; na Pathian inn ua pan tangbuang lat leh dawn ding lat lah kham ahita ngal a.
29001014	An ngawl hun tang siangthou in, khawmpi taksuak bawl unla, Toupa na Pathian inn ah putekte leh hiai gam a teng mi tengteng pikhawm unla, Toupa sam un.
29001015	Huai ni atung agik hi; Toupa ni lah anai ngal a, Bangkim hihtheipa a kipan manthatna ahong tung ding hi.
29001016	Ka mitmuh in nek ding hihman ahi kei a hia, ahi, i nopna leh i kipahna i Pathian inn a kipan hihman ahi kei a hia?
29001017	Leikhal nuai ah haichitang amuat a; pangte lah akigawp a, buh innte phel in a-om a, abuhte avuaita uhi.
29001018	Gante nak thum hi na tel uh e! Bawnghonte abuaizak ua, loupa hing mun aneih louh ziak un; ahi, belamhonte asegawp uhi.
29001019	Aw, Toupa ka hon sam hi, mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta a, meikuang in gam a sing tengteng akangsiangta hi.
29001020	Ahi, gamsate nang hon ngai in anak huhu ua; luitate akangtat a, mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta hi.
29002001	Zion ah pengkul mut unla, ka tang siangthou ah kigalginna puang un; hiai gamsung a mi tengteng ling uhen; Toupa ni hong tung ding, anaita hi.
29002002	Mialna leh khonimna ni, mei kai ni leh mial sah ni, tangte tung a phalvak tangkhia bang a mipi tampitak leh hattak, huchibang om ngei nai lou, tunung a suan tampi tan a leng om nawn ngei sam lou ding ahong tung ding hi.
29002003	Amaban uh mei in akangsiang a; anunglam uh meikuang in ahul a; ama ua gam lah Eden huan bang ahi, anunglam ua gamdai gamkeu ahi a; ahi, bangmah in huai apel kei uh.
29002004	Alatdan uh sakol latdan bang ahi; sakol tungtuangmi bang in atai uhi.
29002005	Kidouna kangtalai ging bang in tang tung ah akilek suausuau ua, buhpawl kang kuang luahluah leh kidouna a mipi hattak mansa abang uhi.
29002006	Amaute mu mipite alau ua; amelte uh ahong mual khin uhi.
29002007	Mihattak bang in atai ua; kidoumi bang in baang ah akah ua, amau zawn chiat ah apai ua, akivolhdan uh ahihbuai kei uhi.
29002008	Akiphu kha tuan kei ua; amau lampi ah apai chiat ua; galvante anawk paisuak ua, apialzak kei uh.
29002009	Khopi tung ah atawm ua; kulh tung ah atai ua; insungte ah akaltou ua; guta bang in tohlette ah alut uhi.
29002010	Ama uah lei aling a; vante aling hi; ni leh kha amial a, aksite'n avak uh asel uhi;
29002011	Huan Toupa'n asepaihhonte ma ah a-aw asuah a; agiahbukte lah athupi ngal a; athu tangtungsakpa ahat a, Toupa ni athupi in amulkimhuai ngal a, kua'n athuak thei mahmah dia?
29002012	Toupa'n , huchipi in leng tu in na lungtang tengteng ua an ngawl a, kap a, lungkham in kei lam hong nga le uchin.
29002013	Na puante uh hilou in na lungtang uh botkek unla, Toupa na Pathian lam nga un; amah hehpih theitak leh lainatna a dim, lungnel leh zahngaihna hau, thil hoih lou a kipan kik nawn sek ahi, achi hi.
29002014	Toupa na Pathian un lungsim kihei in tangbuang leh dawn ding thillat ah vualzawlna nutsiat in a-om kei ding chih kua'n athei a?
29002015	Zion ah pengkul mut unla, an ngawl hun tang siangthou un, khawmpi taksuaktak bawl un.
29002016	Mipi kaikhawm unla, omkhawmte hihsiangthou unla, putekte, naupangte, nawitui ne laite kaikhawm unla; mouneite adantan a kipan in hong pawt uhenla, mou leng adantan sunggil a kipan in hong pawt hen.
29002017	Siampu, Toupa nasem mite inlim leh maitam kikal ah kap uhenla; Toupa aw, “Na mite hawi inla, na goutante gensiat a om namte'n atung ua vai ahawmsak ding un pe ke'n; ‘A Pathian uh koi a om ahia,’ chi in amipite lak ah bangziak a chi ding ahi ua?” chi uhen.
29002018	Toupa'n agam thikthuse khop in adeihthoh a, amite ahehpih hi.
29002019	Toupa'n amite kiang ah, Ngai unla, na kiang uah buhte, uainte, sathaute ka hon tungsak ding a, huaite in na tai ding ua; namte lak ah gensiat in ka hon omsak nawn kei ding.
29002020	Himahleh na kiang ua kipan in mallam sepaihhon ka suanmang ding a, gamkeu leh sia ah ka paisak ding, amasa pawl suahlam tuipi ah, ananung pawl tumlam tuipi ah; ahong uihkhe ding a, namsetak in ahong nam ding, thil thupitak ahih ziak in, chi in adawng hi.
29002021	Aw gam, lau ke'n, nuam in kipak in; Toupa'n thil thupite ahihta hi.
29002022	Gante aw, lau kei un, gamdai loupa mun ahong sel a, sing ahong gah a, theipi kung leh grepgui ahong selpha ding hi.
29002023	Nou, Zion tate aw, kipak un, Toupa na Pathian uah nuam un; noute a ding in vuah azusak a, akha khatna a vuah masa leh vuah nanung ahun lel ahon pe ding hi.
29002024	Pialkhangte buh in adim ding a, uain leh sathau belte adimlet ding uhi.
29002025	Na lak ua ka sepaihhon tampi ka sawl, khaukhupte, singnget khaute, khauhonte, leh khaupete'n anek khit kumte nou ka hon din nawn ding hi.
29002026	Tampi na ne ding ua, na tai ding ua, nou lamdangtak a hon ngaihtuah sekpa Toupa na Pathian min na phat ding uh; ka mite azahlak ngei kei uhi.
29002027	Huan Israelte lak ah ka om chih leh Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, kuamah dang a-om kei uh chih na thei ding uh; ka mite azahlak ngei nawn kei ding uhi.
29002028	Huai nung chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a, mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sung ding; huchi in na tapate, na tanute un ka thu agen ding ua, na putekte un mang aman ding ua, na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding uh;
29002029	Huai ni chiang in sikhapate, sikhanute tung ah leng ka kha ka sungbo ding hi.
29002030	Vante leh leitung ah thillamdangte, sisan, mei leh meikhu ding ka musak ding hi.
29002031	Nisa mial asuak ding a, kha sisan asuak ding hi, Toupa ni thupitak leh mulkimhuai ahong tun ma in.
29002032	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh Toupa min lou peuhmah humbit in a-om ding; Toupa'n agen bang in, Zion tang ah leh Jerusalem khua ah akhosuaksunte a-om ding uhi.
29003001	Ngai dih ua, huai nite leh huai hun a, Judah leh Jerusalem saltangte ka kaihkhop hun chiang in,
29003002	nam chih ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute Jehoshaphat Phaizang ah ka pisuk ding hi. Huai ah, nam chih lak a athehdalh uh, ka mi, ka goutan Israelte tung a agamtatna uh leh, ka gam akihawmna ziak un, atung uah amaute toh thukhenna ka bawlpih ding;
29003003	ka mite a ding in ai asan ua, kizuakna man ding in pasal naupang apia ua, uain adawntheihna ding un, aman ding in numei naupang azuak uhi.
29003004	“Ahi, aw Tura leh Sidon leh Philistia gam tengteng aw, kei a ding in bang na hi ua le? Na thuk ding ua hia? N'on thuk uleh, hattak in, kintak in na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka hon thuk sam ding hi.
29003005	Ka dangkasik leh adangka-eng na la ua, ka thil hoihtak deihhuaite na tempul sung uah na tawilut uhi;
29003006	Judah tate leh Jerusalem tate leng agamgi ua kipan gamlapi a na suanmang theihna ding un, Grik tapate kiang ah na zuakta uhi.
29003007	Ngai dih ua, na zuakna mun ua kipan in tokthou in ka pawtsak ding a, na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka thuk sam ding hi.
29003008	Judah tate khut ah na tapate uh leh na tanute uh ka zuak ding, amau gamlapi ah Sheba mite kiang ah azuak ding uhi,” Toupa'n achita hi.
29003009	Namte lak ah hiai puang unla; kidou ding in kisa unla; mihat mahmahte tokthou un; kidoumi tengtengte hong nai uhenla, hong paitou uhen.
29003010	Na leilehna mukzumte uh namsau ding in sek unla, teipi ding in na theikung kuaika temtate uh sek un; mihat lou in leng ka hat chi hen.
29003011	Akim a nam tengteng aw, kin unla, hong pai unla kikaikhawm un; Aw Toupa , huai ah na mihat mahmahte paisuksak in.
29003012	Namte kitokthou uhenla Jehoshaphat Phaizang ah hong paitou uhen; huai ah akim a nam tengteng tung a vaihawm ding in ka tu ding hi.
29003013	Na kawite uh suah un, buhlak ahun hi; hong pai unla, childen un; grep sukna khuk adim a, bel adimlet a; akhelhna uh athupi hi.
29003014	Mipi tampite, thukhenna phaizang a mipi tampite! Thupukna Phaizang ah, Toupa ni anaita hi!
29003015	Ni leh kha hihmial in om ding ua, aksite'n avakna uh asel ding uh.
29003016	Toupa Zion tang a kipan in ahumham ding a, Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding; leitung leh vante aling ding ua; himahleh Toupa zaw amite a ding in kihumbitna leh Israel suante a ding in insang ahi ding hi.
29003017	Huchi in Toupa na Pathian uh ka tang siangthou Zion a teng ka hi chih na thei ding uh; huchi in Jerusalem asiangthou ding a, mikhual kuamah apaisuak nawn kei ding.
29003018	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, tang sangte'n uain khum akaisak ding ua, nawitui in mualte aluang ding a; Toupa' inn a kipan in tuikhuk ahong kikhohkhe ding a, Shittim lui phaizang anomsak ding hi.
29003019	Judah tate tung ah engbawltak a agam ua sisan asuah ziak un, Aigupta asegawp ding a, Edom gam gamdai gamkeu asuak ding hi.
29003020	Judah gam tangtawn in luah in a-om gige ding a, Jerusalem khua suan a kipan suan zel tan in luah in a-om ding.
29003021	Huan asisan suahna uh ka sawpsiang louh ka sawpsiang ding a, Zion ah Toupa ateng gige hi.
30001001	Judah kumpipa Uzziah vaihawm lai leh Israel kumpipa Joas tapa Jeroboam vaihawm lai a zinling ma kum nih in, Tekoa mun ganhon veng mite lak a mi Amos thu Israel tungtang amuh:
30001002	Huan ama'n, “Zion tang a kipan Toupa ahumham ding a, Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding; belam veng mite gantatna munte alungkham ding ua, Karmel tang vum avuai ding,” achi hi.
30001003	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Damaskas kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Gilead gam buhgawina sikte a agawi ziak un.
30001004	Himahleh Hazael inn ah mei ka sawl ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi.
30001005	Huan Damaskas kho kongkhak sik ka hihtan ding a, Aven Phaizang a kipan luah mite leh Eden inn a kipan kumpipa chiang tawipa ka mangsak ding a; Siria gam mite Kir gam ah sal in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30001006	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gaza kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka hihtawp kei ding; Edom kiang a piak ding in mi tengteng sal a api ziak un.
30001007	Himahleh Gaza kulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi.
30001008	Huan Ashdod a kipan luahmi leh Ashkelon a kipan kumpipa chiang tawimi ka hihmang ding a; huan, Ekron kho tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Philistia mi khosuaksunte amang ding uh,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
30001009	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Tura kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kiang a mi tengteng apiak ua, unau tung a athukhun atheihgige louh ziak un.
30001010	Himahleh Tura khokulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.
30001011	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Edom tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, gawtna ka daisak kei ding; a-unau namsau in adelh a, ahehpihna tengteng apaimang a, ahehna in abotkek gige a, tangtawn a ahehna avom nilouh ziak in.
30001012	Himahleh Teman tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Bozrah kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.
30001013	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ammon tate tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; agam uh azatsak theihna ding un, Gilead kho numei naupaite akuihkek ziak un.
30001014	Himahleh Rabbah khokulh tung ah mei ka mutkuang ding a, huan, kidouna ni a kikou toh, pingpei ni a huihpi toh, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding.
30001015	Akumpipa uh sal in aman ding ua, amiliante toh kiton in,” Toupa'n achi.
30002001	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Moab tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kumpipa guhte sunu bang zen a ahal ziak in.
30002002	Himahleh Moab tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Kerioth kumpipa guhte akang khin ding; huan Moab buaina leh kikou leh pengkul ging in asi ding hi.
30002003	Huai lak a kipan vaihawmmi ka hihmang ding a, amiliante tengteng, amah toh ka that ding,” Toupa'n achi.
30002004	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Toupa dan adeih kei ua, athupiakte azui kei uh, apate uh chih sek azuaugente un amaute apimang ziak in.
30002005	Himahleh Judah tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” chi in.
30002006	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; dangkasik a midiktat azuak uleh khedap but khat a mitasam azuak ziak un.
30002007	Gentheite leivui bang a sikden ut tuntun a, mizawngte vaihawmna akaikawi uhi; huan, mi khat leh apa nungak khat kiang ah ka min hihnin ding in ahoh zel uhi.
30002008	Maitam tengteng kiangchin a khamna puanphah tung ah alum zel ua, a Pathian uh inn a mi aliausakna mante un uain adawn zel uh,” chi in.
30002009	“Himahleh amau ma a Amorte, Sidar bang a sang leh tosaw bang a khauh hihmang a; tunglam a kipan agah leh nuailam a kipan azung leng hihmangpa ka hi.
30002010	Huan Amorte gam nei ding in Aigupta gam a kipan in ka hon pikhia a, gamdai ah kum sawmli sung ka hon pi hi.
30002011	Huan zawlnei hi ding in na tapate uh lak a mi leh Nazaritte hi ding in na tangvalte uh lak a mi ka bawl a, Aw Israel suante aw, huchibang in ahi kei a hia? Toupa'n achi.
30002012	Himahleh Nazarit mite kiang ah uain dawn ding na pia ua, zawlneite kiang ah, thu gen kei un, chi in thu na pia uhi.
30002013	Ngai dih ua, kangtalai a buhphal sawnsip bang in, na mun uah ka hon sawn ding hi.
30002014	Huan mitaihatte hatna amang ding a, mihat in tha asuah thei sam kei ding hi; mihat mahmah leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi.
30002015	Thalpeu zangmi leng adingh thei sam kei ding; paihat thei mi leng akihumbit thei kei ding, sakol tungtuangmi leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi.
30002016	Huai ni chiang in mi thilhihthei mahmah lak a mihangsan leng vuaktang in ataimang ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30003001	Aw, Israel suante aw, Aigupta gam a kipan a ka hon pikhiak inkote aw, Toupa'n hichibang a nou ahon demna thu ngaikhia un,
30003002	“Noute kia leitung a inkuan tengteng a ka theih na hi ua; huaiziak in na thulimlouhna tengteng uah ka hon gawt ding,” achi hi.
30003003	Akithukim kei un mi nih apaikhawm ding ua hia?
30003004	Humpinelkai in gammang a sa amat lai louh ngal in, ahumham ngei a hia? Humpinelkai lun lai in bangmah amat keileh akohawm sung a kipan ahumham ngei a hia?
30003005	Amah a dia tah a-om keileh, leitung a thang ah vasa a-awk thei a hia? Thang pen bangmah awk lou in lei a kipan in akisai dia hia?
30003006	Khopi ah mi launa lou ah pengkul amut ding ua hia? Toupa hih louh in khopi ah hoihlouhna ahong om dia hia?
30003007	Diktak in Toupa Pathian in anasemmi, azawlneite kiang ah athuguk hilh lou in bangmah ahih kei ding hi.
30003008	Humpinelkai ahumham a, kua ahia lau lou ding? Toupa Pathian in thu agen a, kua'n ahia gen lou thei ding?
30003009	Ashdod kumpipa' inn te leh Aigupta gam kumpipa' inn te ah gen unla, “Samaria tang tungte ah kikhawm unla, huai a buaina liantak omte leh huai lak a simmohna omte en un,” chi in.
30003010	“Akumpipa uh innte a hiamgamna leh kisuamna koihkhawm mite'n lah hihdik dan asiam ngal kei ua,” Toupa'n achi.
30003011	Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Gam kimvel in melma a-om lai ding a; na kiang a kipan na hatna alakhe ding a, na kumpipa' inn te ahihse ding uhi.
30003012	Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Belampu in humpinelkai kam a kipan akhe nih hiam, bil them hiam, ahonkhia bang in, huchibang in Samaria a teng Israelte lupna ning leh lupna maimom puanphan lukham them toh hutkhiak in a-om ding uhi.
30003013	Ngai unla, Jakob inkote tung ah theisak un,”
30003014	“Israel tatleknate amah tung ah ka gawtleh, huai ni chiang in, Bethel a maitamte leng ka gawt ngal dia; maitam kiite tankhiak in a-om ding ua, lei ah ake ding uh,” sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
30003015	“Huan phalbi leh nipi inn ka satse ding a; saiha innte amangthang ding a, inn thupite'n tawpna anei ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004001	Nou Bashan bawngpite, Samaria tang tung a om a, gentheite simmoh a, tasamte nuaisiah a, atoupate uh kiang a, “Hon la unla i dawn ding uh,” chite aw, hiai thu za un;
30004002	Toupa Pathian in ama sianthouna in akichiam a, “Ngai dih ua, sikkuaika a nou ahon lakmang a, na lak ua omsun ngakuai a ahon lakmang ni ahong tung ding hi.
30004003	Huan awngvang ah na paisuak ding ua, michih tangtak in apai ding uh; Harmon ah paih in na om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004004	“Bethel ah hong unla, talek un; Gilgal ah hong unla, tatlekna pungsak un; huan, na kithoihnate uh zingsang teng in hon la unla, ni khat hal zel in na sawm ua khatte uh hon la un.
30004005	Huan silngou pang kipahthu gen kithoihna lan unla, amau deihdan a lante hilh unla, puang un; Aw Israel suante aw, hiai lah na deih ngal ua,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi.
30004006	“Huan ke'n leng na khopi tengteng uah hasianna leh na mun tengteng uah taksapna ka hon pia a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004007	“Buh lak hun ding kha thum ahih lai in na tung ua vuah zu ding leng ka len a; khopi khat tung ah ka zusak in, khopi dang tung ah ka zusak kei hi; mun khat tung ah ka zusak sek a, azuklouhna mun akeu hi.
30004008	Huchi in khopi nih leh thum ah tui dawn ding zong in khopi dang ah ataikhawm ua, adeihkhop kei uh; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004009	“Keuna leh apna in ka hon gawt a; na huante uh, na grephuante uh, na theipi kungte uh, na olive singkungte uh singnget lung in ane khin vekta hi; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004010	“Aigupta gam bang in na lak uah huihpi ka sawl a; namsau in na tangvalte uh ka that a, na sakolte uh ka pimang a; na giahphualte uh gim namsia na nak ua nam khop in ka hon omsak a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004011	“Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah khua achipsak lai bang in, na lak uah mi khenkhat ka hihchim a, singkang lakkhiak bang na hi ua; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi.
30004012	Huaiziak in “Aw Israel, na tung ah hichibang in ka hih ding; na tung a hiai ka hih ding ziak in, Aw Israel, na Pathian tuak ding in mansa in om in!”
30004013	“Ngai in, tangte dingkhesak a, huih bawl a, mihing kiang a angaihtuahna bang ahia chih genkhesak a, zingsang mialsak, lei mun sangte chilpa amin Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian ahi!”
30005001	Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai thu noute suunna ding ka gen za un.
30005002	Nungak, Israel, apukta hi; adingh nawn kei ding; agam tung ah paihkhiak ahita; amah tungding ding kuamah a-om kei.
30005003	Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel chite kiang ah, khopi sangkhat pawtna in zakhat anuse ding a, khopi zakhat pawtna in sawmkhat anuse ding hi.”
30005004	Toupa'n Israel inkote kiang ah hichi in achi:
30005005	“Hon zong un, na hing ding uh; himahleh Bethel khua zong kei unla, Gilgal ah lut sam kei un, Beer-sheba ah galkah kei unla; pel lou in Gilgal khua sal in aman ding a, Bethel khua ahong vuaksuak ding hi.”
30005006	Toupa zong unla, na hing ding uh; huchi lou in zaw Joseph inn ah mei bang in apawt ding a, akang khin ding a, Bethel ah mitsak ding kuamah a-om kei ding uhi.
30005007	Vaihawmna singkha suaksak a, diktatna lei a paikhete aw;
30005008	siguk leh zuheisuktun bawlpa leh sihna limliap lak a tangsakpa leh sun zanmial a bawlpa, tuipi tuite sam a, leitung a luangsakpa, amah tak zong le uchin; amin Toupa ahi;
30005009	kulh tung a manthatna hong tung guih zou hial a, mihatte tung a manthatna tungsakpa pen.
30005010	Kongpi ah taihilhmi amudah ua, thudiktak genmi akih uhi.
30005011	Huaiziak in migentheite tuanden in buh na laksak ua; suangsek in innte na lam ua, himahleh asung ah na teng kei ding uh. Grephuan nuamte na bawl ua, himahleh uain na dawn kei ding uhi.
30005012	Na tatleknate uh tamdan leh na khelhnate uh athupidan lah ka thei ngal a; midiktatte na simmoh ua, golhna la a, kongpi a tasamte ahih ding him ua pampaihte aw.
30005013	Huchi in hun hoih lou ahih ziak in mipil zaw huai hun chiang in adai dide ding hi.
30005014	Na hintheihna ding un hoihlouhna zong lou in, hoihna zong unla; huan na gen bang un, Toupa sepaihte' Pathian na kiang uah a-om ding hi.
30005015	Khelhna hua unla, hoihna it un; kongpi ah vaihawmna kiptak in tungding un; Joseph inkuan akhosuaksunte tung ah Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian in hehpihna anei kha mai ding hi.
30005016	Huaiziak in Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Kongzing teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a, lamliante tengteng ah, khawk hi na mah e; achi ding uh; lungkham ding in lounei mite leh nakpi a kap ding in sisuun siamte asam ding uhi.
30005017	Grephuan teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a; na lak uah ka paisuak ding,” Toupa'n achi.
30005018	Toupa ni deihte aw, na tung uh agik hi! Bangziak a Toupa ni deih na hia ua? Vak hilou in mial ahi zaw hi.
30005019	Humpinelkai taisan a, vompi tuak mi bang leh inn a lut a, baang tung a khut nga a gul in atuk bang ahi.
30005020	Toupa ni vak hilou in mial ahi sin kei a hia? Mial sah leh vakna nei lou in?
30005021	“Na ankuangluite uh ka hua in ka musit a, na kikhawmpi pisuakte uah leng ka kipak sam kei hi.
30005022	Ahi, na thillat uleh na buh lat uh hon lan mah le uchin, ka sang kei ding, na gan thau uh lemna thillatte leng ka limsak sam kei ding hi.
30005023	Na kaihging ging kilawm uh ka ngaikhe kei ding; huaiziak in kei a kipan bil aphuai na late uh lamang un.
30005024	Himahleh vaihawmna bel tuite bang in leh diktatna lui lian bang in luang hen,” Toupa'n achi.
30005025	“Aw Israel inkote aw, kum sawmli sung in gamdai ah kithoihnate leh thillatte ka kiang ah na hon lan ngei ua hia?
30005026	Ahi, na milim uh Molok leh na milimte uh Kaiuan, na aksi pathian uh, noute ding in na tawisang zaw uhi.
30005027	Toupa amin sepaihte' Pathian in, noute Damaskas kho khen ah sal in ka hon paisak ding,” Toupa'n achi.
30006001	“Zion tang a nuam lua a omte leh Samaria tang a bittak a omte leh Israel nam lian lak a inkuan mithupite tung agik hi!
30006002	Kalneh ah hoh unla, en un; huai a kipan in Hamath kho thupi ah hoh un; Philistia gam Gath ah paisuk unla; hiai gamte sang in noute na hoihzaw uhia? Nou gam sang in agam uh azazaw a hia?
30006003	Nou ni hoih lou gamlapi a koih leh hiamgam tunna naihsakte aw,
30006004	saiha lupna a lum a, atutphah sau tungte ua kizia a, belamhon lak a belamnoute leh bawnghonte lak a kipan bawngtuaite ne a;
30006005	David bang a kaihging tumtum a, lasak ding na bawlbawl uh;
30006006	belhbu lian a uain dawn a, sathau hoihpen a kinuhte mah; himahleh Joseph haksatna ziak in alungkham kei uhi.
30006007	Huchi in tua sal dia pai masate toh sal in apai ding ua, nuam sa a kiziate nopsakna lakmang in a-om ding hi.”
30006008	Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in amah-le-amah kilou in akichiam a, “Jakob kisaktheihna ka kih a, akumpipa' inn te ka mudah a; huaiziak in khua leh asung a om tengteng ka mansak sin ahi.”
30006009	Hichi ahong hi ding a, inn khat a mi sawm a-omleh asi vek ding uhi.
30006010	Huan vui ding a thaunilh, misite tanau, amaute halpa ngei in insung a kipan a aguh lakhe ding in, insung tawng pen a mi om kiang ah, “Na kiang ah kuahiam midang a-om lai uhia?” achih a, ama'n, “Om lou,” achihleh; ama'n, “Dai sipsip in! Toupa min i lou ding uh ahi ngal kei a,” achi ding hi.
30006011	Ngai dih ua, Toupa'n thu apeta hi; inn lian achim lemlum ding a, inn neu leng akhangkham ik-iak ding hi.
30006012	Sakolte suangpi tung ah atai ding ua hia? Huai ah mi'n bawng in lei alet ding ua hia? Noute'n vaihawmna lah gu na suaksak ua diktatna gah singkha na suaksak uh.
30006013	Nou thil bangmah lou tung a kipak a, i hatna in ahi kei maw kiite i lak ua? chite aw.
30006014	“En dih ua, Aw Israel inkote aw, nou hon dou ding in nam ka dingkhesak ding a; huan Hamath khomual a kipan in Arabah lui tan in nou ahon engbawl ding uh,” Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian in achita hi.
30007001	Huchibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; ngai dih ua, haichi poi nanungzaw pen adot pat tungna ah khaukhup abawl a; ngai dih ua, kumpipa tangseu khit a pou nanungzaw ahi.
30007002	Huan huchi ahong hi a, huai gam a loupa anek khit nung un, “Aw Toupa Pathian , ngaidam in, ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi.
30007003	Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alung hei in, “ Toupa'n , hiai hong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
30007004	Huchibang in, Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; huan en dih ua, Toupa Pathian mei a dou ding in asam a; mei in tui thuk lian akang khin a, gam leng kat a-ut lai hi.
30007005	Ke'n, “Aw Toupa Pathian , khawl in ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi.
30007006	Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alungsim hei in, “Toupa Pathian in, huai leng ahong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.
30007007	Hichibang in ahon ensak a; ngai dih ua, Toupa bel ulum a bawl baang kiang ah adingh a, akhut a ulum toh.
30007008	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa'n , “Amos, bang na mu a?” achi a. Ke'n, “Ulum,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n , “Ngai in, ka mi, Israelte lak ah ulum ka koih ding a; amau ka paikheng nawnta kei ding;
30007009	Isak mun sangte ahong segawp ding a, Israel mun siangthoute hihsiat ahi ding ua; Jeroboam inkote namsau in ka dou ding,” achi hi.
30007010	Huan Bethel kho siampu Amaziah in Israel kumpipa Jeroboam kiang ah, “Amos in Israel inkote lak ah nang hon kalh a; gam in athu tengteng athuak thei kei,” chi in.
30007011	Amos in lah hichi in achi ngal a, “Jeroboam namsau in asi ding, pel lou in agam a kipan in Israel sal in apikhe ding,” chi in thu akhak hi.
30007012	Huan Amos kiang ah Amaziah in, “Aw nang zawlnei, kuan inla, Judah gam ah taimang in, huai ah an ne inla, thu hilh in.
30007013	Himahleh Bethel ah thu hilh nawn ke'n; kumpipa mun siangthou leh kumpipa' inn ahih ziak in,” achi lai hi.
30007014	Huan Amaziah kiang ah Amos in, “Zawlnei ka hi kei a, zawlnei tapa leng ka hi sam kei; ganhon vengpa leh theipi sing kempa ka hi zaw hi.
30007015	Toupa'n ka kiang ah, ‘Kuan inla, ka mi Israelte kiang ah thu gen in,’ hon chi hi.
30007016	Huchi in tu in Toupa thu za in; nang Israel kalh in thu gen ke'nla, Isak inkote kalh in thu khak ke'n, na chih.
30007017	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Khopi ah na zi kizuaknu ahi ding a, na tapate, na tanute namsau in apuk ding ua, tehna khau in na gam ahawm ding ua; nang leng siang lou mun ah na si ding a; pel lou in Israel a gam a kipan sal in apimang ding uh, achi,’ ” chi in adawng hi.
30008001	Hichibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; en dih ua, nipithei bawm na hi hi.
30008002	Ama'n, “Amos, bang ahia na muh?” achi a. Ke'n, “Nipithei bawm,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Ka mi Israelte tung ah tawpna ahong tungta; amaute gawtna ding ah ka lungsim ka kheng nawn kei ding hi, chi in.
30008003	Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in tempul a lasakte dahna la ahi ding a; mun chih ah siluang tampi a-om ding a, dai dide in apaikhe ding uh,” achi hi.
30008004	Hiai ngaikhia in, aw tasamte ne bei nuam a; gam a migentheite hihmang nuamte aw,
30008005	“Buh ka zuaktheihna ding un chikchiang a kha thak bei ding a, tangbuang buh ka zuaktheihna ding ua chikchiang a Sabbath ni bei ding ahia, chi in; Ephah hihneu a shekel hihlian, dikloupi a bukna khemna in na zang ua,
30008006	huchi a dangkasik a migentheite lei a, tasamte khedap buh khat a i lei a, buhsi i zuaktheihna ding in,” chi in.
30008007	Toupa , Jakob thupina sial in akichiam a, “Pel lou in anasep himhim ka mangngilh het kei ding,” chi in.
30008008	Hiai ziak in gam pumpi ling in asung a om peuhmahte alungkham kei ding ua hia? Ahi, tui lian bang in ahong khang vek ding a; Aigupta gam lui bang in ahong buai in akiam ding hi.
30008009	Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in, hichi ahong hi ding a, sun lai in ni ka tumsak ding a, nisat lai in lei ka mialsak ding hi.
30008010	Na ankuangluite uh lungkhamna leh na la tengteng uh kahna ka suaksak ding a; kawng tengteng sai-ip puan ka tengsak ding a, lu chih sip ah giauna ka hon tungsak ding; tapa tang neih suunna ding in lungkhamna leh atawpna khatna ni bang in ka bawl ding hi.
30008011	“Toupa Pathian in, ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung lellel; huai ni chiang in gam ah kial ka sawl ding a, an kialna hilou, tui a kialna hi sam lou, Toupa thu theihna kialna pen,” achi hi.
30008012	Huan tuipi a kipan tuipi ah leh mal a kipan suahlam ah leng avakvai ding ua; Toupa thu zong ding in ning chih ah atai ding ua, amu kei ding uh.
30008013	Huai ni chiang in nungak siangthou leh tangvalte dangtak in abah ding uhi.
30008014	“Samaria khelhna sial a kichiam a, ‘Aw Dan, na Pathian ahin bang in’ leh ‘Beer-sheba Lampi ahin bang in’ chi, huai mite leng apuk ding ua, athounawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.
30009001	Maitam chin a Toupa dingh in ka mu a, ama'n, “Kongpi bulte alin theihna ding ua alu bawkte uh khen inla, avek ua lutung ah hihzan vek in; ke'n asibangte namsau in ka that ding a; khat lel leng ataimang kei ding uh, khat lel leng asuakta het kei ding uh,” achi hi.
30009002	Misikhua pha in paisuak mah le uh, huai a kipan ka khut in ka lakhe ding a; van ah kaltou mah le uh huai a kipan ka kaikhe ding hi.
30009003	Karmel mualvum ah bu mah le uh ka zong ding a, huai a kipan amau ka lasuk ding a, tuipi taw ah ka mitmuh louh in bu mah le uh, huai a kipan gulpi thu ka pe ding a, amau atu ding hi.
30009004	Amelmate uh ma ah sal in pai mah le uh, huai a kipan namsau thu ka pe ding a, amau asatlum ding ua; hoihna hilou in, hoihlouhna ding in atung uah ka mit ka nga ding hi.
30009005	Gam khoih a, zulsakpa Toupa , sepaihte' Pathian ahi ngal a; huai lai a omte tengteng alungkham ding ua; luipi bang in akhang ding ua, Aigupta lui bang in akiam nawn ding uh;
30009006	van a adantante bawl a, leitung a adantan kual bawl a, tuipi tuite sam a, leitung a sungbopa, amin Toupa ahi.
30009007	Toupa'n “Aw Israel suante aw, ka tung ah Ethiopia tate bang in na om kei ding ua hia? Aigupta gam a kipan Israel leh Kaphtor gam a kipan Philistia mite leh Kir gam a kipan Siria mite ka pikhe kei a hia?” achi hi.
30009008	Toupa'n , “Ngai dih ua, Toupa Pathian mit gam gilou tung ah atu a, leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding a; himahleh Jakob inkote ahihse vek kei ding,” achi hi.
30009009	“Ngai dih ua, thu ka pe ding ahi; hakvang a buh ahaih bang un, nam tengteng lak ah Israel inkote ka haih ding a; himahleh tang neupen leng leitung ah ake kei ding hi.
30009010	‘Ka mite mikhial tengteng, hoihlouhna in ahon delhpha kei ding a, hon pha sam kei ding,’ chite namsau in asi ding uh,” achi hi.
30009011	Toupa , hiai thilhihpa'n, “Huai ni chiang in David biakbuk chim ka tungding ding a, a-awngvangte ka hu ding a; asiate ka lemtou ding a, nidanglai a a-om bang in ka lam thak ding hi, chi in;
30009012	Edom mun a khosuaksunte leh ka min a sap nam tengtengte aneihtheihna ding un,” achi hi.
30009013	Toupa'n , “Ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung lellel ahi, huai ni chiang in leiletmi in buh atmi adelhpha ding a, grep chil mi'n chi thehmi adelhpha ding a; tang sang in uain khum ataksak ding; mual tengteng azul ding uhi.
30009014	Huan ka mi Israelte sal a kipan ka pikik nawn ding a; khua kigawpsate abawl nawn ding ua, aluah ding uh; huan grephuante abawl ding ua, a-uain adawn ding uh; huante leng abawl ding ua, agah ane ding uhi.
30009015	Agam uah amau ka phutkip ding a, akiang ua ka piak agam ua kipan bohkhiak in a-om nawnta kei ding,” Toupa na Pathian in achi hi.
31001001	Obadiah mengmuhna Toupa Pathian in Edom tungtang ah hichi in achi: Toupa a kipan thu ka thei a, namte lak ah palai sawl ahi, “Thou unla, kidouna ah amah dou ding in i kuan ding uh,” chi in.
31001002	“Ngai dih, namte lak ah ka hon hihneuta hi; nakpi a muhsit in na omta.
31001003	Aw nang, suangpi kitam kal a teng, mun sang luah, kua'n ahia lei a hon kesak ding lungsim a chipa? Na lungtang kisaktheihna in nang ahon khemta hi.
31001004	Muvanlai bang in sangpi ah lengtou mah lechin, na bu leng aksi lak ah seh in om mahleh, huai a kipan ka hon kaikhesuk ding,” Toupa'n achi.
31001005	“Na kiang ah gutate, suamhatte zan in hong pai le uh, hihman nak hih na ni chia, adeihzah un agu kei ding ua hia? Na kiang ah grep lakhawm mite hong pai le uh, grep lak ding khenkhatte anuse kei ding ua hia?
31001006	Esau thilte zonkhiak ahita a; agoubawm selgukte maikhiak ahita!
31001007	Nang lawmte khem in na om a, gamgi pha in hon delhkhe ding ua; na kituahpihte'n nang ahon zouta ua; na tanghou nete'n na nuai ah thang akam ua; amah ah theihsiamna a-om kei hi.
31001008	Huai ni chiang in Edom a kipan mipilte ka hihmang in, Esau tang a kipan theihsiamna ka hihmang kei dia hia?” Toupa'n achi hi.
31001009	Aw Teman, Esau tang ah michih thahgam a a-om vekna ding ua, na mihatte nakpitak in alunglel ding uh.
31001010	“Na unaupa Jakob tung a na hiamgamna ziak in zumna in nang ahon khuh ding, tangtawn in hihmanthat in na om ding hi.
31001011	Langkhat a na din ni a, mikhualte'n asum alakmang ni ua, namdang mite akulh kongkhak a ahong lut ua, Jerusalem tung a ai asan lai un, nang leng amau lak a tel bang in na om hi.
31001012	Himahleh na unaupa asiat lai in awibawl ke'nla, Judah tate amanthat ni un kipak ke'n; ahaksat ni in kisatheitak in pau ke'n.
31001013	Ka mite avangsiat ni un akulh kongpi uah lut ke'nla; avangsiat ni un athuakna uh en ke'n, avangsiat ni un asum-le-paite uh tung ah na khutte uh nga sam kei un.
31001014	Ami khenkhat taikhete that ding in lamka thuam a dingh in, haksat ni in ami omsunte mansak ke'n.
31001015	Nam tengteng tung ah Toupa ni lah anai ngal a; na hihsiat mah bang in na tung ah hih ahi ding; na hihdan nangmah luzang ah hong kik ding hi.
31001016	Ka tang siangthou a na dawn bang un, nam tengteng in adawn gige ding uh, ahi, adawn ding ua, avalh ding ua, piang lou bang in a-om ding uh.
31001017	Zion tang ah bel suaktate a-om ding ua, asiangthou ding uh; Jakob inkote'n agoutante uh atang ding uhi.
31001018	Jakob inkote mei ahi ding ua, Joseph inkote meikuang ahi ding, Esau inkote buhpawl ahi ding ua, amau lak ah akuang ding ua, akangmang ding uh; Esau inkote khosuak a-om kei ding uh; Toupa'n lah achita ngal hi.
31001019	Simlam mite'n Esau mual atang ding a; phaizang mite'n Philistia atang ding uh; amaute'n Ephraim leh Samaria lou atang ding uh; Benjamin in Gilead gam atang ding hi.
31001020	Kanaan mite lak a hiai Israel suan saltang mipite'n Zarephath gam tan atang ding ua; Sepharad gam a Jerusalem khomite saltang in simlam khopite atang ding uhi.
31001021	Zion tang a pan Esau dou ding in akuantou ding ua, atung ah vai ahawm ding uhi; huan gam Toupa a ahi ding hi.”
32001001	Amittai tapa Jonah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
32001002	“Thou inla, Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak ah hoh inla, atungthu kikoupih in; ka ma ah agitlouhna uh ahong tungtouta,” achi hi.
32001003	Himahleh Jonah bel Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish ah taimang ding in athou a; Joppa ah ahohsuk hi. Tarshish zuan ding long amu a; huchi in atuanman pia in, Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish zuan dingte toh ton ding in long ah alutsuk hi.
32001004	Himahleh Toupa'n huih hat mahmah tuipi ah anungsak a, tuipi ah huihpi hat mahmah anung hi, huchi in long tamzak ding bang in a-omta hi.
32001005	Long mite'n lau in, amau pathian chiat asam ua; long zanna ding in long sung a vante tuipi ah apaikhia uhi. Jonah bel long sunggilpen ah na lutsuk pah a, huai ah lum in, ana ihmu hithit hi.
32001006	Huchi in longheutu akiang ah ahong pai a, “Aw nang ihmu, bangchidan ahia? Thou inla, na Pathian sam in, Pathian in, i manlouhna ding in ahon ngaihtuah khamoh ding hiam,” achi hi.
32001007	“Khai, hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua hong om kua ziak ahia chih i theihna ding in, ai i san ding uh,” chi in akihou uhi. Huchi in ai asan ua, aisan Jonah tung ah atuta hi.
32001008	Huchi in akiang ah, “Hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua om kua ziak ahia, hon hilh in, ka hon ngen uh; na nasep bang ahia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia? Koi gammi na hia? Bang mi na hia?” achi uhi.
32001009	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hebru mi ka hi; tuipi leh gam bawlpa Toupa , van Pathian ka lau ahi,” achi hi.
32001010	Huchi in mite'n akihta mahmah ua, akiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai bang hih na hia?” achi ua ahilhkhitsa ahih ziak in mite'n Toupa ma a kipan taimang ahi chih lah athei ngal ua.
32001011	Huchi in akiang ah, “Kou a dia tuipi kihot adaihna ding in na tung ah bang ka hih ding ua?” achi ua; tuipi lah akihot sang hulhul ngal a.
32001012	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon domkang unla, tuipi ah hon lawnkhia un; huchi in nou a ding in tuipi akihot nawn kei ding; kei ziak in na tung uah hiai huihpi thupitak anung ahi chih ka thei hi,” achi hi.
32001013	Himahleh mite'n gam a kik ding in nakpi in long akal ua; himahleh ahi thei kei; tuipi lah atung uah anak kihoh semsem ngal a.
32001014	Huaiziak in Toupa asam ua, “Aw Toupa , hiai mipa hinna ziak in hon hihmang ke'nla, mihoih sisan moh ka tung uah nga mahmah lou ding in nakpitak in ka hon ngen uhi; Toupa , hiai lah nang na deih bang a na hih ahi ngal a,” achi uhi.
32001015	Huchi in Jonah adomkang ua, tuipi ah alawnkheta ua; huchi in tuipi kihot phul vonvon adaita hi.
32001016	Huchi in mite'n nakpitak in Toupa alau ua; Toupa kiang ah kithoihna alan ua, thu achiam uhi.
32001017	Toupa'n Jonah valh ding in nga liantak anasep khin a; huai ngapi gilsung ah Jonah, ni thum leh zan thum a-om hi.
32002001	Huan ngapi gilsung a kipan in Toupa a Pathian kiang ah Jonah athum a, hichi in achi a;
32002002	“Ka haksatna ziak in Toupa ka sam a, ama'n ahon dawng a; Sheol gilsung a kipan in ka kikou a, nang ka aw na zata hi.
32002003	Thukpi ah, tuipi sunggil ah na hon pailut a, tui tampi ka kimvel ah a-om a; na tuikihot leh na tuikisep tengteng in ahon tum zel hi.
32002004	‘Huan na mitmuh a kipan paihkhiak ka hi a; himahleh na tempul siangthou lam ka nga nawn ding,’ ka chi hi.
32002005	Tuite'n ka hinna tan in ahon umkimvel ua; tui thuk ka kim ka vel ah a-om hi; louhingte'n ka lu atuamsuak hi.
32002006	Tangte taw ah ka paisuk a; lei in tangtawn a ding in akalhnate'n ahon khakkhum a; himahleh nang Aw Toupa ka Pathian, kohawm a kipan ka hinna na lakhia hi.
32002007	Ka sung a ka hinna abah lai in, Toupa ka theigige ding a; na tempul siangthou ah ka thumna na kiang ahong tung hi.
32002008	Thil gina lou leh zuau leltak limsak mite'n amau zahngaihna alehngatsan uh ahi.
32002009	Ke'n zaw kipahthu genna aw toh na kiang ah kithoihna ka lan ding; ka chiamsa thu ka tangtun ding. Hotdamna Toupa a ahi.”
32002010	Huan Toupa'n ngapi ahoupih a, gam ah Jonah alokheta hi.
32003001	Huan Toupa thu Jonah kiang ah ahong tung nawn leuleu a,
32003002	“Thou inla, Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak ah hoh inla, thu gen ding ka hon chih pen va tangkoupih in,” chi in.
32003003	Huchi in Jonah athou a, Toupa thu bang in Nineveh ah ahohta hi. Nineveh bel khopi thupi petmah, ni thum pai aching hi.
32003004	Jonah ni khat pai zoh chiang khopi sung ah ava pai phot a, “Ni sawmli in, Nineveh hihman ahi ding hi,” chi in akikou hi.
32003005	Nineveh mite'n Pathian agingta ua; an ngawl apuang ua, alak ua alianpen a kipan aneupen tan in sai-ip puan asilh uhi.
32003006	Huai thu Nineveh kumpipa bil ahong tungta a, alaltutphah a kipan athou a, akumpi puan asuah a, sai-ip puan silh in, vut ah atuta hi.
32003007	Kumpipa leh amiliante thupiak in kumpipa'n Nineveh khosung ah thu apuang in apulakta hi. “Mihing hiam, ganta hiam, ganhon hiam, belamhon hiamte in bangmah chiam kei uhen; banghiam ne in tui leng dawn kei uhen;
32003008	mihing leh ganhingte'n sai-ip puan silh uhenla, nakpitak in Pathian sam uhen; ahi, michih in amau lampi hoih lou leh akhut ua hiamgamna lehngatsan uhen.
32003009	I manlouhna ding in, Pathian lunghei in lungsim kilehhei in, ahehna mahmah a kipan akilehhei kei ding chih kua'n ahia theithei?” achi hi.
32003010	Huchi in Pathian in athilhihte uh en in, alampi hoih lou uh alehngatsan uh chih amu a; akiang ua achihsa, hih atup thil hoih lou Pathian in alehngatsan a; ahihta kei hi.
32004001	Himahleh huai in Jonah alungkim het kei a, ahehta hi.
32004002	Toupa kiang ah athum a, “ Aw Toupa , ka hon ngen ahi, hiai ka gam ua ka om lai a ka gen hilou hia? Hiai ziak in Tarshish lam ah ka taimang pah a; hehpih thei Pathian, lainatna a dim, heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau, thil hoih lou lehngatsan sek na hi chih ka thei hi.
32004003	Huaiziak in Aw Toupa , tu in ka hinna hon laksak ding in ka hon ngen hi; kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw hi,” achi hi.
32004004	Huan Toupa'n , na heh mawk, na hihdik hia? achi hi.
32004005	Huchi in khopi a kipan Jonah apaikhia a, khopi suahlam pang ah atu a, huai ah sawlbuk alam a, khopi tung a thil hong tung ding muh tum in anuailim ah atu nilouh hi.
32004006	Toupa Pathian in umgui Jonah tung ah azamsak a, ahaksatna a kipan hunkhe ding a alu liah ding in ana sepkhol hi. Huchi in Jonah umgui ziak in akipak mahmah hi.
32004007	Himahleh Pathian in, azingsang phalvak in, leikha ana sepkhol a, huai in umgui akeitan a, ahong vuaita hi.
32004008	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni ahong suah in Pathian in suahlam huih ana sepkhol a; ni in Jonah lu ahai a, asibup a, amah a ding in sih angen hi, “Kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw,” achi hi.
32004009	Pathian in Jonah kiang ah, “Umgui tungtang thu a na heh mawk, na hihdik hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sih ut hial a ka heh, ka hihdik hi,” achi hi.
32004010	Toupa'n , “Na gim pih louh, na khansak leng hi sam lou, zan khat thu a hong om a, zan khat thu a mang nawn umgui na hehpihleh;
32004011	Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak, asung a mi nuaikhat-le-singnih sang a tam, ataklam uleh aveilam uh leng khen theiloute leh ganhon tampi omna, ka hehpih kei dia hia?” achi hi.
33001001	Judah kumpipa Jotham, Ahaz leh Hezekiah vaihawm lai a Moreseth mi Mikah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung, Samaria khua leh Jerusalem kho tungtang amuh thu.
33001002	Nou, mite aw, na vek un za unla; Aw lei leh asung a om tengteng aw, ngaikhia un; Toupa Pathian , Toupa atempul siangthou a kipan, nou dem in na tungthu uh theihpihpa hi hen.
33001003	Ngai dih ua, Toupa amun a kipan in ahong pawt a, ahong paisuk ding a, lei mun sangte achil ngal ding hi.
33001004	Mei kiangchin a khuainun bang leh munken a tui kikhohkhia bang mai in, tangte anuai ah azul ding a, munzangte akhangkham ding.
33001005	Hiai tengteng Jakobte tatlekna ziak leh Israel inkote khelhna ziak ahi. Jakobte tatlekna bang ahia oi? Samaria ahi kei maw? Judah mun sangte bang ahia? Jerusalem ahi kei maw?
33001006	Huaiziak in Samaria gam a thil sia omkhawm bang in ka bawl ding a, grephuan mun bang mai in; huai mun a suangte lui phaizang ah ka khukkhe ding a, asuangphumte ka dawksak ding hi.
33001007	Amilim bawltawm tengteng sukkhap vek ahi ding a, akizuakna mante mei a halmang ahi ding a, amilim tengteng ka hihgawp ding; kizuakna man ding in ala vek ngal a, kizuakna man mah in apang nawn ding uhi.
33001008	Hiai ziak in ka kap ding a, ka mau tuaituai ding a, kisuah leh vuaktang in ka om ding; sehalte bang in ka kikou ding a, vangawngsaute bang in ka thum ding hi.
33001009	Aliamna hihdam theih ahi kei; Judah gam atungta ngal a; ka mite kongpi, Jerusalem hial atungta hi.
33001010	Gath ah gen kei unla kap het kei un; Beth-le-aphrah ah leivui lak ah kikhuk un.
33001011	Aw Saphir mi, vuaktang leh zumtak in paimang in; Zaanan mite Beth-ezel kahna ziak in ahong pawtkhe kei ding ua; huai a bitna mun a-om louh ziak in.
33001012	Maroth mi in tanhoih tan angaklah tuntun hi; Toupa kiang a kipan thil hoih lou Jerusalem kongpi tan a ahong tunsuk ziak in.
33001013	Aw Lakish mi, kangtalai sakol hattak henden in; amah pen Zion tanu khelhna kipatna ahi. Israelte tatlekna nang a muh ahi.
33001014	Huaiziak in Moreseth-gath kiang ah kikhakna thilpiak na piak ding ahi; Akzib innte Israel gam kumpipate a ding in khemna ahi ding hi.
33001015	Aw Maresa mi, nang hon zoutu na kiang ah ka hon pi ding; Israelte thupina Adullam pha in ahong pai ding hi.
33001016	Kimetgiau inla, na ta deihtakte ziak in kimetgiau in; musane bang in kihihgiau semsem in; na kiang a kipan sal a pi in a-omta uhi.
33002001	Alupna tung ua thulimlouhna gelmi leh thil hoih lou ngaihtuahkhemi tung agik hi; zingsang a khua avak in huai ahih zel uhi.
33002002	Miloute eng in alaksak ua; innte a-eng ua, alaksak zel uhi; mi leh a-inkote uh mi leh agoutan un anuaisiah uhi.
33002003	Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih, hiai inko tung ah thil hoih lou ka gel ahi, huai a kipan in na ngawng uh na suan kei ding ua, kisatheitak in apai nawn kei ding uh; hun hoih lou ahih ding ziak in.
33002004	Huai ni chiang in noute dem in gentehna abawl ding ua, kahla khasiathuai a sam in; “Suksiat in i om vekta ua, ka mite thil tan akilamdangta; kei kipan gam lakmang ahi a; helhatmi kiang ah i lou uh hawmzak ahita,” achi ding uhi.
33002005	Huaiziak in Toupa mite kikhawmte lak ah aisan a khau a tehsak mi kuamah na nei kei ding uhi.
33002006	Thu gen kei un, chi in agen zel ua, hiai mite kiang ah thu agen kei ding uh; gensiatna adai kei ding hi.
33002007	Aw Jakob inkote aw, Toupa kha nehden in a-om a hia? Hiaite athilhih chih ding ahi maw? Diktak a om zel mi tung ah ka thute'n thil hoih ahih kei maw?
33002008	Himahleh ka mite tunai chin in melma bang in ahong dingkhia uhi; kidou ding lungsim a nei lou, muangtak a vialvakte lak a kipan in apuansilh puanaktualte uh na suahsak uhi.
33002009	Ka mi numeite a-inn nuamtak ua kipan na delhkhia ua; anaupang neute a kipan ka thupina alamang den uhi.
33002010	Thou unla, paimang un; hiai khawlna mun ding ahi kei a; siatna thupitak tan ahi, buahna a-om ziak in.
33002011	Mi kuahiam in kha a om chi a zuauthu gen in, “Uain leh zu na taina ding uh ahi,” chi in hong gen taleh huai mi, mipite zaknop lel thugen zawlnei ahi ding hi.
