33002012	Aw Jakobte, na vek un ka hon samkhawm ding a; Israel khosuaksunte ka pikhawm ding a; Bozrah khua belam bang a koihkhawm ding; ganhonte aloupa mun ua om bang in, mipi ahih ziak un achiak zuazua ding uh.
33002013	Ama uah lampi phuvangpa apai a; aphu pailet ua, kongkhak pha in apai zel ua, huai ah apaikhia uhi; akumpipa uh ama uah apai a, Toupa'n ama uh akai hi.
33003001	Aw nou Jakob heutute leh Israel inkote vaihawmte aw: Ngaikhia unla, ka hon ngen hi ka chi ahi; vaihawmdan na theih ding uh hilou hia?
33003002	Thil hoih na hua ua, thil hoih lou na it ua, avun uh na hawksak ua, aguh ua kipan in sa na leukhia uh.
33003003	Ka mite sa ne in; avun uh na lip ua, aguh uh na hihtansak ua; ahi, sa uina bel sung a sa atnen bang in huan ding in na atnen uhi.
33003004	Huai hun chiang in Toupa asam ding ua, himahleh amau adawng kei ding; ahi, huai hun chiang in athilhih ua ahihhoih louhdan bang un, amau a kipan amai asel ding hi.
33003005	Ka mite thil hihkhialsak mi, nek ding banghiam piak a a-om chiang ua, “Muanna” chi a kikou a, huai bang peloute peuhmah kidouna thu a vaulau zawlneite tungtang thu Toupa'n hichi in achi:
33003006	“Huaiziak in kilakna na neihlouhna ding un noute kiang zan hong tung hi; aisan na bawl theihlouhna ding un na kiang uah mialna ahong om ding a; zawlneite a ding in ni atum ding a, amau tung ah sun amial ding hi.
33003007	Mutheite azum ding ua, aisan siamte azahlak ding uh, avek un amuk uh ahum ding uh; Pathian in adawn louh ziak in.”
33003008	Himahleh Jakob kiang ah atatlekna uh theisak ding leh Israelte kiang ah akhelhna uh theisak ding in Toupa kha ziak athilhihtheihnate, vaihawmnate, hatnate in ka dim hi.
33003009	Nou Jakob inkote heutute leh Israel inkote vaihawmmi, vaihawmna kih a, dikna chiteng lumlet mite aw, hiai ngaikhia un, ka hon ngen ahi.
33003010	Sisan in Zion leh ginatlouhna in Jerusalem alam uh.
33003011	Huai ah heutute'n kipahman lamen in vai ahawm ua, siampute'n loh lamen in asinsak ua, azawlneite'n dangka lamen in ai asan uhi; huchi in leng, Toupa alak uah a-om kei a hia? I tung uah thil hoih lou ahong tung kei ding, chi in Toupa tung ah akinga uhi.
33003012	Huaiziak in Zion, noute ziak in, lou bang a leileh ahi ding a, Jerusalem thilsia omkhawm ahi ding a, tang a inn omna gammang bang ahi ding.
33004001	Himahleh ni nanung chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa' inn omna tang, tang lian tungte hihkip in a-om ding a, mualte tung ah tawisang in a-om ding; huai ah tawisang in a-om ding; huai ah chichihte apai zungzung ding uh.
33004002	Nam tampite apai ding ua, hong unla, Toupa tang ah, Jakob' Pathian inn ah i hohtou ding uh; huchi in ama'n alampi tanchinte hon sinsak ding a, alampite ah i pai ding ua, achi ding uh; Zion a kipan dan thu ahong pawt ding a. Toupa thu bel Jerusalem a kipan in ahong pawt ding hi.
33004003	Ama'n chi tampi lak ah vai ahawm ding a, gamlapi a nam hattak leng asal ding; anamsaute uh leilehna mukzum ding in asek ding ua, ateipite uh theikung attanna temkawi ding in asek ding uh; namdang in namdang tung ah namsau alikta kei ding a, kidoudan leng asinsakta kei ding uh.
33004004	Michihte agrepgui nuai uah leh atheipi kung nuai uah atu ding ua; kuamah in alausak kei ding uh; Sepaihte' Toupa kam in agenta ngal a.
33004005	Mi chih amau pathian min chiat in a-om ding ua, ei leng Toupa i Pathian min in tangtawn tangtawn in i om ding hi.
33004006	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Huai ni chiang in khebaite ka kaikhawm ding a, delhmang a om leh sukgim a omte ka kaikhawm ding,” chi in.
33004007	Akhosuaksunte ka khosuaksak ding a, gamlapi a delhmang a omte bel nam hattak in ka bawl ding; tuban siah Zion tang ah tangtawn in Toupa'n atung uah vai ahawmta ding hi.
33004008	Aw nang, ganchinna insang, Zion tanu tenna bitna tang, na kiang ah lalgam masa ahong tung ding; ahi, Jerusalem tanu kiang ngei ah lalgam ahong tung ding hi.
33004009	Bang achia hichi nak kah na hia? Na sung ah kumpipa a-om kei a hia, nang hon gensakpa amangthangta a hia, numei nauvei bang a lunggimna in nang ahon mat?
33004010	Aw Zion tanu, numei nauvei suak ding bang in natna thuak in vei in; khopi a kipan in na pawtkhe ding a, gam ah na teng ding a, Babulon tanpha a pai ding na hi ngal a, huai ah hotkhiak in na om ding a, huai ah na melmate khut a kipan Toupa'n nang ahon hunkhe ding hi.
33004011	Tu in tampi nang hon dou in akikhawm ua, hihbuai in om henla, i mit in Zion tung a alunggulhpen mu hen, achi uhi.
33004012	Himahleh Toupa ngaihtuahnate athei kei ua, aphatsakna leng atheisiam sam kei uh; phual a buhphal koihkhawm bang in amau akaikhawmta ngal a.
33004013	Aw Zion tanu, thou inla chil in; sik bang in na kii ka bawl ding a, dal bang in na khepek ka bawl ding; huan mi tampite na satnen ding a; athil neihte uh Toupa a dia na koihtuam ding ahi, asum uh lei kumpi Toupa a ding in akoihtuam ding uhi.
33005001	Aw sepaihhonte' tanu, tu in sepaih hon kaikhawm inla; amau ahon umsuakta ua; Israelte vaihawmpa abiang ah sikchiang in asun ding uhi.
33005002	Himahleh nang, Bethlehem Ephratha aw, Judah gam a sang tampi lak a tel ding in neu tawk lechin leng, nang a kipan in Israelte vaihawmpa ding kei a ding in ahong pawt ding; ahong pawtna sawtpi, tang lai nite a kipan ahi.
33005003	Huaiziak in nauveimi'n asuahsak mateng amau alehngatsan ding; huchi in a-unau khosuaksunte Israel suante kiang ah akik nawn ding uhi.
33005004	Amah adingh dia, Toupa a Pathian min thupina ngei in; amaute a-omta ding ua; amah lah lei tawp pha in athupi ding hi.
33005005	Huan hiai mi kilemna ahi ding; Assuria mi agam ua ahong a, i kumpipa uh innte ahon sik chiang in, amah dou ding in belampu sagih leh mithupi giat i kitelkhe ding uhi.
33005006	Assuria gam namsau in ahihse ding ua, Nimrod gam a lutna ahihse lai ding uh; huan ama'n, i gam ua Assuria mi hong pai a, i gam chiang uh ahong sik hun chiang in, amah a kipan in ahon hunkhe ding hi.
33005007	Jakob mi khosuaksunte chi tampi lak ah Toupa a kipan a daitui kia bang leh loupa tung a vuahzu bang in a-om ding uh; huai in mihing angak kei a, mihing tapate angak sam kei hi.
33005008	Jakob khosuaksunte namte lak ah leh chi tampite lak ah gamnuai sate lak a humpinelkai bang leh belamhon lak a humpinelkai lun lai bang in a-om ding; ama'n apaisuak peuhmahte asikden a, abotnen a, humbit ding leng kuamah a-om kei uh.
33005009	Na khut nang hon doute tung ah lik in om henla, na melma tengteng hihman in om hen.
33005010	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n achi, nang a kipan in na sakolte ka hihmang ding a, na kangtalaite ka hihse ding;
33005011	na khopite ka hihmang ding a, na kulhhat tengteng ka hihchim ding;
33005012	na khut a kipan bumsiamte ka hihmang ding a; aisan siamte ka hihmang ding; aisan siamte na nei nawnta kei ding hi;
33005013	nang a kipan na milim bawltawmte leh na suangphuhte ka hihmang ding a; na khutsuakte na be nawn kei ding hi.
33005014	Nang a kipan Asherahte ka botkhe ding a; na khopite ka hihse ding hi.
33005015	Huan thu ngaikhe lou namte tung ah hehna leh thangpaihna in phulakna ka pichingsak ding hi.
33006001	Tu in Toupa thugen ngaikhia un: Thou inla, tangte ma ah lang in, mualte'n na aw ngaikhia uhen,
33006002	Aw tangte aw, Toupa hon hekna ngaikhia unla, nou leitung kingaknate aw, ngaikhia un; Toupa amite toh akilang a, Israelte ahekna agen ding hi.
33006003	Aw ka mite aw, na tung uah bang ka hihta a ahia? Bang lam in ahia ka hon hihgim? Hon gen dih ua.
33006004	Aigupta gam a kipan in nou ka hon pikhia a, saltanna inn a pan nou ka hon tankhia a; na ma uah Mosi, Aaron leh Miriam ka sawl hi.
33006005	Aw ka mite aw, Toupa thilhih diktat na theihna ding un, Moab kumpipa Balak thusawm leh Boer tapa Balaam in adawndan, Sittim a kipan a Gilgal pha a thil omdante khawng tu in theigige un.
33006006	Bang toh ahia Toupa ma a ka hong pai ding a, Pathian tungnung ma a ka kun ding? Haltum thillatte, bawngnou kum khat a upate toh ama ah ka hong pai dia hia?
33006007	Toupa belamtal sang tampi hiam sathau lui singkhatte hiam ah alungkim dia hia? Ka tatlekna ziak in ka tachil pia in, ka khelhna ziak in pumpi gah ka pe dia hia?
33006008	Aw mihing, ahoih nang ahon ensakta hi; Toupa'n nang ahon phut bang ahia? Diktak a hih leh zahngaihna it leh na Pathian toh kiniamkhiaktak a tonkhawm ahi kei maw?
33006009	Toupa'n khopi asam hi, pilna nei mi'n na min laudan asiam ding; khetbuk leh aseppa limsak un.
33006010	Migilou insung ah gitlouhna a kaihkhawm goubawmte leh tehna diklou kihhuaitak a-om lai hia?
33006011	Bukna diklou zangte leh khemna dia gikdan tehna diklou zangte siangthou ka chi ding a hia?
33006012	Huai a mihausate lah hiamgamna in adim ua, huai a tengte'n zuau agen ua, akamsung ua alei uh khemhat ahi.
33006013	Huaiziak in ke'n leng nakpi a hon limsak in ka hon khen a; na khelhna ziak in ka hon hihgam hi.
33006014	Na ne ding a, himahleh na tai kei ding; na kiang ah na daina a-om ding a; na khol ding a, himahleh abit kei ding; na kholsate namsau kiang ah paimangpih ding in ka pe ding hi.
33006015	Na tuh ding a, himahleh na la kei ding; olive gahte na chil ding a, himahleh athau na nilh kei ding; grep chil mah lechin, a-uain na dawn kei ding.
33006016	Omri dan thusehte lah na vom gige ngal a, Ahab inkuan thuhilhna tengteng zui in amau lemtheihna ah na pai uhi; huchi in mun gamgawp in ka hon bawl sinta, na sung a tengte simmoh thuak in soisak in a-om ding uhi.
33007001	Ka tung gik hina mai e! Nipithei sekkhawm hun lai a om bang leh grep loh hun lai a grep maih loh ding bang ka hi ngal a; gahbom nek ding a-om kei; ka hinna in theipi min masa alunggulh hi.
33007002	Pathian limsakmi lei a kipan amang ua, mihing lak ah midiktak a-om kei uh; sisan suah ding in atang vek ua; michih in amau unau len in agem uhi.
33007003	Akhutte uh thil hoih lou tung a thanuamtak a hih ding in anga ua; kumpipa'n thilpiak angiat a, vaihawmpa'n anegu a; milian in alungsim thilhihkhelhna agenkhia a; huai in akithutuak uhi.
33007004	Alak ua mihoihpen loulingnei bang ahi a; midikpen leng dailing nei sang in ahoih kei zaw; nang veng mite ni, veh a na om ni ngei ahong tung hi; huai tuh amangbat ni uh ahi ding hi.
33007005	Lawm ah muang kei unla, makaimi ah ginna koih kei un; na angsung a omnu a kipan in na kam kongkhakte veng in.
33007006	Tapa in pa min ahihsia a, tanu in anu adou a, mou in api adou ngal a; mihing melmate zaw amah inkote mah ahi uh.
33007007	Huaiziak in ke'n zaw Toupa lam ka en ding a; ka hotdamna Pathian ka ngak ding; ka Pathian in ahon ngaikhe ding hi.
33007008	Aw ka melma, ka puk hun chiang in hon awi ke'n; ka thounawn ding; mial a ka tut in leng Toupa kei a ding in vak ahi ding hi.
33007009	Toupa tung a thil ka hihkhelh ziak in, alung hihlouhna mahmah ka po ding, ka tungthu ahon genpih a, kei a dia vaihawmna atangtun masiah; vak ah ahon pikhe ding a, huan diktatna ka mu ding hi.
33007010	Huchi in ka melma ka kiang a, Toupa na Pathian koi ah, chipa'n huai amu ding a, zahlakna'n amah atuam ding hi. Ka mite'n amah a-en ding ua; tu'n zaw kongzing buannawi bang a sikden ahita ding hi.
33007011	Na kulhbaangte bawlna ni ding leh na gamgi kekletna ni ahong tung ding hi.
33007012	Huai ni chiang in Assuria gam leh Aigupta khopi a kipan, Aigupta leh Lui pha hial a kipan, tuipi leh tuipi kikal a kipan leh tang leh tang kikal a kipan na kiang ah ahong pai ding uhi.
33007013	Huchipi in gam, asung a tengte ziak leh athilhih uh gah ziak in hihgam ahi ding hi.
33007014	Karmel tangkal a gamnuai a lungzuangtak a om na goutan belamhon, na mite na khetbuk zang in vak inla; nidanglai bang in Bashan leh Gilead ah vak in om chiat uhen.
33007015	Aigupta gam a kipan a na paikhiak lai bang in akiang ah thillamdang mahmahte ka ensak ding hi.
33007016	Namte'n huai amu ding ua, athilhihtheihna tengteng uh azumpih ding uh; amuk uh ahum ding ua, abil uh angong ding hi.
33007017	Gul bang in leivui aliak ding ua; bokkhup a vakte bang in a-omna kua ua kipan in ling kawm in ahong pai ding uh; Toupa i Pathian kiang ah laudan siam kawm in ahong pai ding ua, nang ziak in alau ding uhi.
33007018	Nang bang a thulimlouhna ngaidampa leh agoutan khosuaksun tatlekna nelhsiah Pathian kua a-om a? Ahehna tangtawn in avom gige kei; zahngaihna a akipah mahmah ziak in.
33007019	Akiheikik nawn ding a, i tung ah hehpihna anei ding; akhenuai ah i thulimlouhnate asikden ding a; nang amaute khelhna tengteng tuipi taw thukpi ah na pailut ding hi.
33007020	Nidanglai a ka pu leh pate kiang a na kichiamsa, Jakob kiang ah thutak leh Abraham kiang ah zahngaihna na tangtun ding hi.
34001001	Nineveh kho puakgik. Elkosh mi Nahum kilakna bu,
34001002	Toupa zaw mullit hat Pathian leh phulak ching ahi; Toupa'n phu ala a, hehna in adim hi; Toupa'n amah dou mite tung ah phu ala a, amelmate a ding in hehna akholkhawm hi.
34001003	Toupa alungnel a, nakpi a thilhihthei ahi, mimohte siam atangsak mahmah kei ding; Toupa'n pingpei leh huihpi ah alampi anei a, meipite akhe a leivui ahi.
34001004	Tuipi asal a, akangtatsak a, lui tengteng leng akangsak khin a; Bashan gam abah a, Karmel tang leh Lebanon tang paklunte avuai uhi.
34001005	Amah ziak in tangte aling ua, mualte azulmang ua; ama ah lei avuak a, ahi leitung leh asung a om tengteng toh in.
34001006	Alung hihlouhna mai ah kua ahia dingh thei a, ahehna thupitak ah kua ahia om thei ding? Ahehna mei bang a sunbuak ahi a, suangpite akekzaksak vek hi.
34001007	Toupa zaw ahoih a, mangbat ni a kulhkip ahi; amah a aginna uh koih mite athei hi.
34001008	Himahleh tui khang luanglet zang in huai mun manthat vekna atungsak ding a, khomial a amelmate delhlut ding in.

34001010	Lingnok bang a om in a-uain dawn un diahkawt dimdem bang in om mahleh, buhpawl keu bang mai a hihman vek in a-om ding uhi.
34001011	Nang a pawt mi khat Toupa kalh a thil gilou ngaihtuahmi, gitlouhna thuhilhmi a-om hi.
34001012	Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ahat theihtawp un hat mah le uh, tam leng tampi himah le uh, huchipi in leng vatpuk in a-om ding ua, amangthang ding uhi. Hon na hihgim khin mah leng ka hon hihgim nawnta kei ding hi.
34001013	Tu'n zaw na kiang a kipan ahakkol ka kitansak ding a, nang gakna khaute ka kitatsak vek ding.
34001014	“ Toupa'n na tungtang thu ah thu apia hi, na min chi bang a tuh ahi nawnta kei ding a; na pathiante inn a kipan milim bawltawm leh milim sunte ka hihmangthang ding a; na han ka bawl ding; na gilou ngal a,” chi in.
34001015	Tangte a tanchinhoih tun a, lemna thu tangkoupihte khe en dih; Aw Judah, na ankuang lui inla, na thuchiamte tangtun in; mi thugina lou in ahon pal paisuak nawn kei ding a; hihmanthat vek ahita hi.
34002001	Kitamgawpsakpa doutu na mai ah ahong pawt hi; kigalthuam inla, na lampi veng in, na kawng khauhsak inla na thilhihtheihna hattak in bawlhoih in.
34002002	Hihse mite'n Israel thupina hihsia in agrep guite hihtan mah le uh, Toupa Jakobte thupina ama a bang in atungding nawn ngal ding ahi.
34002003	Amihatte lum sansak ahi a, mihangsante asan-au in akivan ua; akisakna ni in kangtalaite kahpasik tet in ate kelkel ua, teipite mulkimhuaitak in aphe zolzol hi.
34002004	Kangtalaite kongzing ah atai gomgom a; lamlian zate ah akiphu noknok ua; meisel bang in alang ua, khophia bang in atai zualzual uhi.

34002009	Dangkasik gallak in laksak unla, dangka-eng leng gallak in laksak un; gou manpha a dim ahih ziak in thil kisekkhawm leh vanhoihte tawi bei ni anei kei ding hi.
34002010	Sukvuak in a-om a, avuak keuhkeuh a, asiang sipsip; lungtang azulmang a, khukte akihot ua, kawng tengteng ana tuntun a, amelte amual khin vek hi.
34002011	Humpinelkai khosakna mun, humpinelkai pite leh anoute nek ding abalnenna leh alausak ding om lou a humpinelkai leh humpinelkai tekte pai vialvialna koi mun hita ahia?
34002012	Humpinelkai tal in anoute kham khop abotnen a, humpinelkai pite a ding in akeilum a, akokhukte uh sa keih in adimsak a, a-omna kokhuk samatte in adimsak hi.
34002013	Sepaihte' Toupa'n , “Ngai dih, ka hon dou ahi, akangtalaite ka halkhu vungvung ding a, na humpinelkai noute namsau in ahihmang ding; lei a na sa keih ka sutawp ding a, na palaite aw zak ahi nawnta kei ding,” achi hi.
34003001	Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi! Zuau leh kilohna in adim khin a; asa keih uh tatlak lou ahi.

34003005	Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi; na mai ah na puan ka lem ding a; na vuaktanna namte kiang ah leh na zahlakna kumpipa gamte kiang ah ka ensak ding.

34003008	Nile Luite kikal a om Thebes, akim a tui in a-um, akulh ding a tuipi zang a kulhbaang ding a tuipi nei sang in na hoihzaw a hia?

34003010	Huchipi in leng lakmang in a-om a, sal in atang a; kongzing teng tawp ah anaupang neute apaihnensak uh; amithahte uh a ding in ai asan ua, amiliante tengteng khainiang a gak ahi uh.
34003011	Nang leng na kham sam ding a, sel in na om ding; melma ziak in kulh kip na zong lai ding hi.
34003012	Na kulh tengteng theipi kung, gah min masa pulh bang ahi ding ua; alin peuhmah uleh nemi kam ah akelut zel uhi.

34003015	Huai ah mei in ahong kangtum ding a, namsau in ahon satlum ding a, singnget bang in ahon hihmangthang ding hi. Singnget bang in kipungsak inla, khaukhup bang in kihihpung in.
34003016	Na sumsin mite van aksi sang a tam in na khangsak a; singnget in ahihsia a, alengmang mai uhi.

35003011	A-omna uah ni leh kha adingh kinken ua; apai bang un na thalte vak ah, na teipi te zolzol in avak uhi.
35003012	Heh in gam na palsuak petmah a, thangpai in namte na chil hi.
35003013	Na mipite hondam ding in na kuankhia a, na thaunilh hotdamna ding in; giloute inn a kipan lutang na hihliam a; ngawng chiang pha hial in suangphum na hihse vek. Selah
35003014	Agalhatte lutang amah chiangte ngei in na sun a; kei hon dalhsak ding in pingpei bang in ahong pai uhi; nuam asakna uh gentheite aguk a ne khin ding in ahi.
35003015	Na sakolte in tuipi leh tui hatte sunvumte na chil hi.
35003016	Ka za a, ka gilpi akising a, ka kam a awte aling pupulh a; ka guhte ah muatna ahong lut a, ka mun ah ka linggawp hi; buai ni a amah sim dia hong kuan mite dou ding a ahong paitouh chiang a ka linlouhna ding in, dai dide in ka ngak ding hi.
35003017	Theipi kung pak pha lou in, grep guite ah agah om lou in; olive sepgimna vuaksuak in, loute'n nek ding piangsak lou in; huang a pan ganhonte satkhiak a om in, huangsung ah ganta omta kei mahleh;
35003018	huchipi in leng Toupa ah ka kipak ding a, ka hotdamna Pathian ah ka nuam ding hi.
35003019	Jehovah, Toupa , ka hatna ahi, ka khepekte zukpi khe bang in abawl a, ka mun sangte ah ahon vaksak ding hi. Lapu lian a ding, tumging guineite a sak ding.
36001001	Judah kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah dam lai a, Kushi tapa, Gedaliah tapa, Amariah tapa, Hezekiah tapa, Zephaniah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung.
36001002	“Leitung a thil om tengteng ka hihbei sipsip ding,” Toupa'n achi.
36001003	“Mihing leh sa ka hihbei ding; van a tungleng vasate, tuipi a ngasate, giloute toh kipalpuknate ka hihbei ding; leitung a pan mihing ka satkhe ding,” Toupa'n achi.
36001004	“Judah tung leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a; hiai mun a kipan in Baal omlaite leh milim biak ching siampute min ka satkhe ding;
36001005	Intung a van aksihon bia; Toupa kiang a kun a kichiam khin napi a, Milkom mai a kichiamte;
36001006	Toupa zuihna a kipan kilehheite leh Toupa zong lou a, amah kanloute ka satkhe ding hi.”
36001007	Toupa Pathian ma ah dai sipsip in, Toupa ni lah anaita ngal a; Toupa'n lah kithoihna abawlkhol khin a, amisapte ahihsiangthou khinta hi.
36001008	Toupa kithoih ni in hichi ahi ding, heutute leh kumpipa tapate leh gamdang puan a kizem huchibang tengteng ka gawt ding hi.
36001009	Huai ni chiang in, phual kan a tawmte, hiamgamna leh khemna a apu uh inn hihdimte, ka gawt ding hi.
36001010	“Huai ni chiang in,” Toupa'n achi, Ngasa Kongpi a pan kah thawmging a-om dia, Kongpi Nihna a pan mauna leh mualte a kipan nakpitak a siatna husa a-om ding.
36001011	Mau un, nou Maktes a tengte, na sumsin mite tengteng a-omta kei ua; dangka teh mite satkhiak ahita uhi.
36001012	Huai hun chiang in hichi ahi ding hi, khawnvak tawi in Jerusalem zong ding ka hi; mi uain dawn a tengden, alungtang ua, Toupa'n thil hoih hi in thil gilou leng ahih sam kei ding chi mite ka gawt ding hi.
36001013	Huchi in ahauhna uh gallak ahong hi dia, a-innte uh asegawp ding; innte alam ding ua, himahleh aluah kei ding uh; grephuante abawl ding ua, himahleh huai a uain adawn kei ding uhi.
36001014	Toupa ni thupi anai a, anai a, akinoh mahmah, Toupa ni in kah aw athupi ding a; mi thilhihtheitakte huai ah akap loloih ding uhi.
36001015	Huai ni thangpaihna ni ahi, lungzinna leh dahna ni, mialna leh lungkiakna ni, meipi leh khomial bikbek ahi;
36001016	pengkul leh gallauna ni, khopi daikaih siatna, aning a insangte siat ni.
36001017	Huan mite tung ah dahna ka tun ding a, mittawte bang in avak ding uh, Toupa tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak un; huchi in asisan uh leivui bang leh asa uh eklei bang in butkhiak in a-om ding hi.
36001018	Toupa thangpaihna ni chiang in adangka uhiam adangka-eng uhiam in amaute atan thei kei ding; himahleh amullitna mei in gam pumpi akangbei ding a; hihbei a om ding ahih ziak in, beina mulkimhuai, gamsung a tengte tengteng tung ah a-om ding hi.
36002001	Kikaikhawm un, ahi, kikaikhawm un, zumna nei lou namte aw;
36002002	thupiak akuankhiak ma a, buhsi bang a hon mutmang ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna kihtakhuai ahong tun ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna ni ahong tun ma in kikaikhawm un.
36002003	Avaihawmna zui, nou lei a minunnem tengtengte aw, Toupa zong un; diktatna zong un, migitna zong un; Toupa hehna ni ah sel in na om kha thei uhi.
36002004	Gaza lah nutsiat in a-om dia, Ashkelon hihgawp in; suntang lai in Ashdod ahawlkhe ding ua, Ekron akizungkalh ding hi.
36002005	Tuipi piau a teng Kereth namte aw na tung uh agik hi! Toupa thu in noute ahon dem hi, Kanaan aw, Philistiate gam a teng om lou ding in ka hon hihgawp ding.

36002008	Moab hon kouna leh Ammon tate gensiatna ka zata hi. Akigitpihte uh tung a kiliansak a, ka mite gam dou asawm uhi.

36002010	Sepaihte' Toupa mite tung a akiletsak ua, akou ziak un, akisaktheihna ziak un sawi in a-om ding uhi.

36002012	Nou Ethiopiate leng, ka namsau a thah a om ding na hi uhi.
36002013	Huan ama'n mallam dou in akhut alikkhe ding a, Assuria ahihse ding; Nineveh akisegawp ding a, huchi in gamdai bang in akeu ding uh.
36002014	Alai ah belamte akual ding ua, namte ganta tengteng; vangawngsau leh sakuh achial tungnung ah agiak ding ua; tohlet ah a-aw in la asa ding uh; sangkilte ah siatgawpna a-om ding; sidar sing a nasepte ahihsiat ziak in.
36002015	Hiai khopi nuamsa pilvang loutak a teng a, “Alungtang a keimah ka hi, kei lou kuamah dang a-om kei,” chi ahi; bangchidan a hong segawp a, gantate a dia kualna ding hi ahia; kuapeuh akiang a pai in anuihsan in, akhut alehkhum ding uhi.
36003001	Khopi helhat leh buah, nuaisiah ching tung agik hi!
36003002	Kuamah thu angaikhe kei a, bawlhoihna leng asang thei kei. amuanna leng Toupa ah a-om kei a; a Pathian anaih sam kei hi.

36003005	Asung ua Toupa bel adiktat a; thil thulim lou ahih kei ding; zingsang teng in avaihawm khovak ah alak a, avuaksuak ngei kei a; himahleh midiktatloute'n zaw zumna athei kei uhi.
36003006	Namte ka satkheta a, a-insangte uh akisegawp hi; akongzingte uh ka susia a, kuamah apai kei uhi; akhopite uh hihsiat in a-om a, huchi a mi kuamah om lou in, ateng leng a-om kei uhi.
36003007	Chihtaktak in kei na hon kihta ding ua, bawlhoihna na kipahpih ding, ka chi a; huchi in atenna satkhiak in a-om kei dia, amah tungtang a sehsa tengteng bang in; himahleh beltak in athou ua, ahih tengteng uh asesak uhi.
36003008	“Huaiziak in mat ding zuan a ka thoh ni atun masiah hon na ngak un,” Toupa'n achi. Namte kaihkhawm ka tup ahi ngal a, lalgamte ka suktuah a atung ua ka hehna ka sunbuak theihna ding in, ka thangpaihna lauhuai tengteng; ka mullitna mei a leitung pumpi nekgaih a om ding lah ahi ngal a.
36003009	Huai hun chiang a mite'n Toupa min aloh ua, thukhat sat a amah nna aseptheihna ding un, akiang uah muk siangthou ka pe ding hi.
36003010	Ethiopia luite khen lam a kipan gimlim hal mite, dalhsa ka mite tanu mahmah in ka thillat ahon tawi ding hi.
36003011	Huai ni chiang in ka tung a na tatlekna, na thilhihte tengteng ziak in na zahlak kei ding; huai hun chiang a na lak a na mikisathei leh ki-uangsakte lakhe ding ka hih ziak in, huchi in ka tang siangthou ah na ki-uangsak nawnta kei ding uhi.
36003012	Himahleh na lak ah mi gimthuak leh genthei ka nuse ding a, Toupa ah amuang ding uhi.
36003013	Israel khosuaksunte'n gilou ahih kei ding ua, zuau agen sam kei ding uh; akam uah leng lei khemhat akimu kei ding hi; ne a, lum a, amaute kuamah in ahihlau louh ding ziak un.
36003014	La sa in, Aw Zion tanu; kikou in, aw Israel! Jerusalem tanu aw, na lungtang tengteng toh kipak inla, nuamsa in!
36003015	Toupa'n na vaihawmnate alamangta a, na melma adelhkhia a, na lak ah Israel kumpipa, Toupa a-om hi; gilou na lau nawn kei ding hi.

36003017	Na lak ah Toupa na Pathian a-om hi, hondam ding mihat; na itna ah akhawl ding, la sa in na tung ah anuam ding hi.
36003018	Khawmpi kulmut ziak a dahnate, noute a dia puakgik leh gensiatna hiite ka lamang ding hi.
36003019	Ngai in, huai hun chiang in, nang hihgimte tengteng ka bawl ding a, panpih kiphamohnu ka hondam ding a, hawlmang a omnu ka lakhawm ding; huchi in leitung pumpi a azahlakna uh ana omkhitnate ah, phatna leh minthanna amaute ka pe ding hi.
36003020	Huai hun chiang in ka hon la nawn ding a, huai hun chiang in nou ka hon kaikhawm ding hi; na mitmuh ua na saltanna ua kipan ka hon pi nawn hun chiang in, lei a mi tengteng lak ah min leh phatna in nou ka hon bawl ding, Toupa'n achita hi.
37001001	Kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum nihna, akha gukna, huai kha ani khat ni in, Judah ukpipa Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel kiang leh siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa Joshua kiang ah zawlnei Haggai a kipan Toupa thu ahong tung hi.

37001009	Tampi na lamen ua, ngai un, tawmchik ahong hi hi; inn na hon tut chiang un, ka na mutmang hi. Bangziak in? Sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Michih noumau inn tuam ah na tai chiat ua, kei inn pen kisegawp a a-om ziak in.
37001010	Huaiziak in noute ziak in van in adaitui akhou a, lei in agah akhou hi.

37001015	huai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni, akha gukna, kumpipa Darias vaihawm kum nihna in.

37002004	Himahleh, Zerubbabel aw, hattak in om in, Toupa'n achi, Joshua, siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa aw, hattak in om in; nou gam a mite tengteng aw, hattak in om unla, nna sem un, Toupa'n achi; na kiang ua ka om ziak in, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
37002005	Aigupta gam a kipan a na hong paikhiak lai ua na kiang ua thu ka khun a, na lak ua ka kha a-om gige dan theigige un; lau kei un.

37002016	mi'n tehna sawmnih kivum ahong muh lai, huai nite a-om nungsiah, sawmkhat kia a-om hi; bawm sawmnga a dimkhe ding a mi'n uain thau ahon muh lai in, sawmnih kia a-om hi.

38001001	Darias akum nihna, akha giatna in, Iddo tapa, Berekiah tapa, Zekariah, zawlnei kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a,

38001004	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, “Tu in na omdan gilou ua kipan leh na thilhih giloute ua kipan hong kik un,” chi a zawlnei masate'n agenna uh, na pipute uh bang in om kei un; himahleh amau hon za kei ua, hon ngaikhe sam kei uh, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38001005	Na pipute uh tua koi a omta ahi ua? Huan azawlneite uh tangtawn in ahing uhia?

38001007	Darias akum nihna, Sebat kha, akha sawm-le-khat, ani sawmnih-le-li ni in, Iddo tapa, Berekiah tapa Zekariah, zawlnei kiang ah, Toupa thu ahong tung a,
38001008	“Zan in mengmuhna in mi khat sakol san tung a tuang, munliap a om muisingte lak a dingh ka mu a, anunglam ah sakolte a-om ua, asan, asanpuang leh angou ahi uhi.
38001009	Huchi in ‘Aw ka toupa, hiaite bang ahi ua?’ ka chi a, huan kei hon houpih angel in ka kiang ah, ‘Hiaite bang ahi ua ka hon ensak ding,’ achi hi.
