38001011	“Huchi in huai muising lak a dingh Toupa angel adawng ua, ‘Leitung ah kivialleh in ka vakta ua, ngai in, leitung tengteng atu kinken a, akhawl dide hi,’ ” achi uhi.
38001012	Huan Toupa angel in adawng a, “Aw sepaihte' Toupa , hiai kum sawmsagih na hehkhum, Jerusalem tung leh Judah khopite tung ah bang tan zahngaihna nei lou ding na hia?” achi hi.
38001013	Huchi in Toupa'n thuhoihte, thu lungmuanhuaite a kei hon houpih angel adawng hi.
38001014	Huchi in kei hon houpih angel in ka kiang ah, hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “Thikthu setak in Jerusalem leh Zion ka deihthoh ahi, chi in nang kikou in, chi in.
38001015	Huan bangmah awlmoh lou namte tung ah ka lungkim kei ding a; neukha lel a ka lung hih louh lai in, siatna athupisak semsem uhi.
38001016	Huaiziak in hichibang in Toupa'n achi: Zahngaihnate toh Jerusalem ah ka kik nawnta a, asung ah inn lam ahi ding,” chi in.
38001017	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “Hauhsakna ziak in ka khopite akiphalh ding a; Toupa'n Zion alungmuan in, Jerusalem atel lai ding hi, chi in kikou behlap lai in,” chi in.
38001018	Huan ka dak a, ngai in kii li ka mu hi.
38001019	Kei hon houpih angel kiang ah, “Hiaite bang hi ding ahia?” ka chi a. Ama'n, “Hiaite Judah, Israel leh Jerusalem hawlzak mite ahi uh,” chi in ahon dawng hi.
38001020	Huchi in Toupa'n siksekmi li ahon ensak hi.
38001021	Huchi in ke'n, “Bang hih dia hiaite hong uh ahi ua?” ka chi hi. Ama'n thu agen a, “Kuamah in alu adaksaklouhna dia, Judah dalhzaksak hiai kiite ahi uh; himahleh hiaite, dalhzaksak ding a Judah gam tung a akii uh sangsak namte dou ding leh akiite uh paikhe ding a hong paite ahi uh,” achi hi.
38002001	Huan ka dak a, ngai in mi khat akhut a tehna khau tawi ka mu hi!
38002002	Huai lai in ke'n, “Koilam a hoh ding?” ka chi hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Jerusalem, availam bang tan hi a, adunglam bang tan hiam chih thei ding a teh ding in,” ahon chi hi.
38002003	Huan ngai in, kei hon houpih angel apaikhia a, amah kituahpih ding in angel dang khat apaikhe nawn hi.
38002004	Akiang ah, “Tai inla, huai a tangvalpa kiang ah, Jerusalem zaw asung a mipi tampitak leh ganhonte ziak in, kulhbaang om lou khuate bang in luah in a-om ding a,
38002005	huan akimvel a meikuang kulhbaang a umtu ka hi ding a, huchi in asung a athupina ka hih ding ziak in, Toupa'n achi,” chi in.
38002006	Khai, khai, mallam gam a kipan taikek un, Toupa'n achi; van huih lite bang in nou lah ka hon dalhzaksakta ngal a, Toupa'n achi.
38002007	Khai! Zion ah tai in, nang Babulon tanu toh tengkhawm un.
38002008	Huchibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, thupina khit in nang hon lok namte kiang ah ama'n kei ahon sawl hi; kuapeuh nang hon khoih in amit nauta khoih ahi.
38002009	“Ngai in, atung ua ka khut sing ding ka hi a, huchi in ana uh sepsakte a ding in gallak ahi ding uh; huan sepaihte' Toupa'n kei ahon sawl chih na thei ding uh.
38002010	“Aw Zion tanu, la sa inla, kipak in; ngai in, kei na lak ua teng ding in ka hong pai hi,” Toupa'n achi.
38002011	Huai ni chiang in Toupa lam ah nam tampi akizomkhawm ding ua, ka mite ahi ding uh; na lak ah ka teng ding a, huchi in sepaihte' Toupa'n na kiang ah kei ahon sawl chih na thei ding hi.
38002012	Huan gam siangthou a atantuam bang in Toupa'n Judah aluah ding a, Jerusalem ahon tel ding hi.
38002013	Dai un, mi tengteng, Toupa ma ah a-omna siangthou a kipan in amah akhanglou in athoukheta hi.
38003001	Huchi in siampu lianpen Joshua Toupa angel ma a dingh leh Setan akhut taklam a ahek ding a dingh ahon musak hi.
38003002	Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Aw Setan, Toupa'n hon tai hen; ahi, Jerusalem telpa Toupa'n nang hon tai hen; hiai mi kangmei a kipan sahkhiak ahi kei a hia?” achi hi.
38003003	Huchi in Joshua puansilh nin a kizem in angel ma ah adingh hi.
38003004	Angel in ama a dinghte kiang ah thu agenta hi. “Amah a kipan puansilh nin lamang un,” chi in. Huan akiang ah, “Ngai in, na thulimlouhna nang a kipan ka lakheta a, puansilh hoih in ka hon zem ding,” chi in.
38003005	Huan ke'n, “Aluzang ah lukhu siang koih uhen,” ka chi a. Huchi in aluzang ah lukhu siang akoih ua, puansilh in atuam ua; huchi in Toupa angel kiangnai ah adingh hi.
38003006	Huan Toupa angel in Joshua kiang ah hiai thu agen a,
38003007	“Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Ka lampite a na om a, ka thupiak na zuihleh ka inko vai na hawm ding a, ka vaihawmna innte ah thu na nei dia, hiai a dinghte lak a luttheihna ka hon pe ding,” chi in.
38003008	Aw siampu lianpen Joshua, tu in za un; nang leh na ma a tu na lawite; amau chiamtehna hoih mite ahi ua; ngai in ka sikha Hiang hon pi ding ka hih ziak in.
38003009	Ngai in, Joshua ma a ka suang koih, suang khat mit sagih nei tung ah laigelh ka gelh ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Ni khat thu in gam pumpi thulimlouhna ka lamang ding hi, chi in.
38003010	“Huai ni chiang in, na grepgui nuai leh theipi sing nuai ah michih in a-invengte na chial ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
38004001	Huan kei hon houpih angel ahong pai nawn a, mi ihmu lai phawn bang in ahong phawng hi.
38004002	Huan ka kiang ah, “Bang na mu a?” achi a. Ke'n, “Ngai in, dangka-eng khawnvak koihna, adawn a noubem leh apeng a khawnvak sagih omte, huai a khawnvak sagihte toh ka mu, chi in ka dawng hi.
38004003	Huan Olive sing nih akiang a om, khat noubem taklam pang ah khat veilam pang ah,” ka chi hi.
38004004	Huan ka dawng a, kei hon houpih angel kiang ah thu ka gen a, “Hiaite bang ahi ua, ka toupa?” ka chi hi.
38004005	Kei hon houpih angel in ahon dawng a, ka kiang ah, “Hiaite bang ahi ua na thei kei maw?” achi a. Ke'n, “ ‘Ii,’ Thei lou, ka toupa,” ka chi hi.
38004006	Huaitak in ama'n hon dawng a, ka kiang ah thu agen a, “Hiai Zerubbabel kiang a Toupa thu ahi: Thahatna in hilou, thilhihtheihna in leng hi sam lou, ka Kha in ahi zaw, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38004007	Kua na hia, Aw tang thupi? Zerubbabel ma ah mun zang na hong hi ding; ama'n atung ah, ‘Hehpihna, hehpihna!’ chi a kikou in suang poimohpen ahon lakhe ding hi,” achi hi.
38004008	Huai lou in Toupa thu ka kiang ahong tung lai a, hichi in achi:
38004009	“Zerubbabel khut in hiai inn suangphum akoih khinta; akhutte mah in azou ding, huan Sepaihte' Toupa'n na kiang ah kei ahon sawlta chih na thei ding,” chi in.
38004010	Thil neu kipat ni kua'n asimmoh thei a? Zerubbabel khut ah ulum amu ding ua, akipak ding uh. Hiai Toupa mit sagihte ahi; leitung pumpi kantan a vialtaite.
38004011	Huan ke'n ka dawng a akiang ah, “Khawnvak koihna taklam pang tung a hiai olive sing nihte leh huai aveilam pang a bang ahi ua?” ka chi hi.
38004012	Anihveina ding in ka dong nawn a, akiang ah, “Dangka-eng kahiang nihte sik a om, dangka-eng sathau amau a kipan suah zel olive hiang nihte bang ahi ua?” ka chi hi.
38004013	Ama'n hon dawng a, hiaite bang hi ding ahi ua chih thei lou maw? achi a. Huan ke'n, “ ‘Ii,’ Thei lou, ka toupa,” ka chi hi.
38004014	Huaitak in ama'n, “Hiaite leitung pumpi Toupa kiang a dingh, thaunilh nihte ahi uh,” achi hi.
38005001	Huan ka dak nawn a, ngai in, laibuzial leng ka mu hi.
38005002	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Bang na mu a?” hon chi hi. Ke'n, “Laibuzial leng ka mu; huai dunglam tong sawmnih ahi a, availam tong sawm,” ka chi hi.
38005003	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai gam pumpi tung a paikhia hamsia ahi, huai dungzui in kuapeuh guta tu a kipan satkhiak in a-om ding ua; huai dungzui in kuapeuh dikloupi a kichiamte tu a kipan satkhiak in a-om ding uh.
38005004	Ka paikhesak ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi a, gutami inn ah alut ding, ka min a zuau a hamsia zangmi inn ah; huan a-inn ah a-om gige dia, asing asuang toh anegai ding,” achi hi.
38005005	Huchi in kei hon houpih angel apaikhia a, ka kiang ah, “Tu in dak inla, bang ahia paikhia chih en in,” achi hi.
38005006	Ke'n, “Bang ahia?” ka chi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai a paikhia ‘Ephah’ ahi, achi a, huai lou in, hiai, ‘Gamsung tengteng a mite khelhna ahi,’ ” achi hi.
38005007	Ngai in, “Ngensik dopkang in a-om a; huai Ephah sung a tu hiai numei ahi,” achi lai hi.
38005008	Huan ama'n, “Hiai gitlouhna ahi,” achi a; huai Ephah sung a-ensuak a; huai agong ah ngen gik angasuk hi.
38005009	Huchi in ka dak a, ngai in, numei nih hong paikhia ua, akhate uah huih a-om hi. Tuivapi bang in kha anei ua; huchi in lei leh van kikal ah huai Ephah adomtou uhi.
38005010	Kei hon houpih angel kiang ah, “Hiaite'n koilam a Ephah po ding uh ahia?” ka chi hi.
38005011	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Shinar gam a inn ding lam ding in. Huan abawl zoh chiang un ama muntak ah koih in a-om ding,” achi hi.
38006001	Huchi in ka dak nawn a, ngai in, tang nih kikal a kipan in kangtalai li a hong paikhia ua, huai tangte dal tang ahi uhi.
38006002	Kangtalai khat in sakol san anei ua kangtalai nihna in sakol vom;
38006003	kangtalai thumna in sakol ngou; kangtalai lina in sakol puang hat anei uhi.
38006004	Huan kei hon houpih angel ka dong a akiang ah, “Hiaite bang ahi ua, ka toupa?” ka chi hi.
38006005	Angel in ahon dawng a, ka kiang ah, “Hiaite van huih lite, leitung pumpi Toupa ma a va dingh khin a paikhete ahi uh.
38006006	Sakol vomte omna kangtalai mallam gam ah apaikhia ua; amau zui in angoute tumlam ah apawtkhia ua; apuangte simlam zuan in apawtkhia uhi.”
38006007	Huan sakolte apaikhia ua, lei kantan a avialvak theihna ding uh angaklah uhi. Ama'n, “Hiai a kipan pai unla, lei kantan in vialvak un,” achi a, huchi in lei kantan in avialvak uhi.
38006008	Huchi in ahon sam a, ka kiang ah thu agen a, “Ngai in, mallam gam zuan a paite'n mallam gam ah ka kha akhawlsakta uh,” achi hi.
38006009	Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi:
38006010	Babulon a kipan saltang hong pai Heldai, Tobijah leh Jedaiah a pan thilpiak la in; ani mah in pai inla, Zephaniah tapa Josiah inn ah lut in.
38006011	Ahi, amau a kipan dangka leh dangka-eng la inla, kumpi lukhute bawl in, Jehozadak tapa Joshua, siampu lianpen luzang ah khusak in.
38006012	Huan akiang ah thu gen inla, huchibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Ngai in, mi amin Kahiang: amun a kipan ahong kakhe ding a, ama'n Toupa tempul alam ding hi.
38006013	Ama'n Toupa tempul alam ding a, thupina silhsak in a-om ding a, alaltutphah tung ah atu dia, vai ahawm ding; alaltutphah tung ah siampu ahi ding; huchi in amau gel kikal ah lemna thuhilhna a-om ding hi.
38006014	Kumpi lukhute Helem, Tobijah, Jedaiah leh Zephaniah tapa Hen kiang ah, Toupa tempul atheihgigena ding in a-om ding uhi.
38006015	Huan gamlapi a omte ahong pai ding ua Toupa tempul ahong lampih ding ua, huchi in sepaihte' Toupa'n na kiang a kei hon sawl ahi chih na thei ding hi. Huchi in hiai ahong tung ding, Toupa na Pathian aw pilvangtak a na man uleh, achi, chi in.
38007001	Kumpipa Darias akum lina in hichi ahong hi a, Kisleu kha, akha kuana, ani li ni in, Zekariah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi.
38007002	Huan amau Bethel a omte'n Serezer leh Regem-melek leh amite uh Toupa deihsakna ngen ding in asawl ua,
38007003	sepaihte' Toupa' inn a siampute kiang leh zawlneite kiang a thu va gen ding in, “Kum tampi sung ka na hihsa bang in akha ngana ah kei-le-kei kihihtuam in, kap a suun in an ka ngawl diam?” chi in.
38007004	Huai lai in sepaihte ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a:
38007005	“Gam a mite tengteng kiang leh siampute kiang ah thugen in. Hiai kum sawmsagih sung, akha ngana leh akha sagihna a an na ngolh chiang un, kei a ding in, keimah ding in na ngawlta uhia?
38007006	Na nek chiang un, na dawn chiang un, noumau a mah ding in na ne un, na dawn uh ahi kei maw?
38007007	“Jerusalem akiluah lai leh ahauhsak lai a, akimvel a khopite leh Sim leh gam niam gam akiluah lai a zawlnei masate zang a Toupa tangkoupih hiai thute ahi kei ua hia? chi in,” chi in.
38007008	Huan Toupa thu Zekariah kiang ah hiai bang in ahong tung hi.
38007009	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n thu agen hi: “Vaihawmna dik hih un, michih in a-unau tung ah zahngaihna leh lainatna ensak hen.
38007010	Meithai nuaisiah kei un, pabeite, mikhual, gentheite leng, na lak ua kuamah in alungtang in a-unau siatna ding gilou ngaihtuah kei hen, chi in,” achi hi.
38007011	Himahleh ngaihkhiak a-ut kei ua, genhaktak in akiheimang ua, azaklouhna ding un abil uh ahum uhi.
38007012	Ahi, suang tak bang in alungtang uh abawl ua, huchi keileh dan aza kha ding ua, zawlnei masate khut a ama Kha a sepaihte' Toupa'n athukhakte aza kha ding uh; huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa a kipan nakpi a hehna ahong tung hi.
38007013	Huan hichi ahong hi a, “Ka kikou lai a angaihkhiak louh ziak un akikou chiang un leng ka ngaikhe sam kei ding,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38007014	“Himahleh atheih louh uh namte lam ah pingpei in amaute ka delhsak ding. Huchi in gam amau nung in akisegawp ding a, kuamah in akantan un alehkik kei ding uh; gam nuam asukgawp ziak un, achi,” chi in.
38008001	Huchi in sepaihte ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a;
38008002	“Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Thikthusetak in Zion ka deihthoh a, nakpitak a hehna toh amah a ding in phatuam ka ngai hi,” chi in.
38008003	Hichibang in Toupa'n achi: Zion ah kiksak in ka om a, Jerusalem lai ah ka teng ding; Jerusalem bel Thutak khopi, sepaihte' Toupa tang, tang siangthou akichi ding hi.
38008004	Hichi in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Jerusalem kongzingte ah putekte leh pitekte ahong khosa ding ua, a-upat ziak un akhut uah chiangkhun akhun chiat ding uh.
38008005	Khopi kongzingte a kimawl in numei leh pasal naupangte adim ding hi.
38008006	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Huai ni chiang a hiai mite lak a khosuaksunte mit a lamdang ahihleh, kei mit ah leng alamdang sam kei dia hia? sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38008007	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Ngai in, suahlam gam a kipan leh tumlam gam a kipan, ka mite ka hondam ding hi.
38008008	Amau ka hon pikhawm ding a, Jerusalem lai ah ateng ding ua; ka mite ahi ding uh, thutak leh diktatna ah, a Pathian uh ka hi ding hi.
38008009	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “ Toupa' inn suangphum phum ni a kipan a hiai nite a zawlneite kam a kipan a hiai thu zate'n, tempul akilam theihna ding in noute khut hatsak un.
38008010	Huai nite malam a mihing a dia kilohna a-om louh a, aganta dia leng kilohna a-om sam louh ziak in; melma ziak in apawtkhia hiam hong lut hiam a ding in leng muanna himhim a-omsak kei a, mi tengteng michih a-invengte dou in ka koih hi.
38008011	Himahleh tu in zaw hiai mite lak a khosuaksunte tung ah tuma lam nite bang in ka om kei ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38008012	Huan haichi pawi a om ding ahi ngal a; grepgui in agah asuang ding a, leitung in apung a-omsak ding a, vante'n adaitui uh ape ding uh; huchi in hiai mite lak a omlaite hiai thil tengteng ka luahsak ding hi.
38008013	Huan hichi ahi ding a, namte lak a hamsia na hih tak bang un, Aw Judah inkote leh Israel inkote, huchibang mah in nou ka hon hondam ding a; vualzawlna na hi ding uh; lau kei un, himahleh na khutte uh hatsak un.”
38008014	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “Na pipute un ahon hihheh lai ua, na tung ua gilou hih ding ka tup bang in, huchi in ka nem tuan kei, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi:
38008015	Huchi in Jerusalem tung leh Judah inkote tung ah hoih hih ding tulai nite in ka tum nawnta hi; lau kei un.
38008016	Na hih ding uh thil hiaite ahi: Michih in a-invengte toh thutak kihilh un; na kongpite uah thutak leh lemna vaihawmna hih un;
38008017	na lak ua kuamah in a-invengte siatna ding na lungtang uah gilou ngaihtuah kei un; thuchiam diklou deih kei un; hiaite tengteng ka thil huat lam ahi uh,” Toupa'n achi.
38008018	Huan sepaihte ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi,
38008019	Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “Kha lina an ngawlna, ngana an ngawlna, sagihna an ngawlna leh sawmna an ngawlna, Judah inkote a ding in nopna leh kipahna, ankuangluina vualnopna ahi ding hi; huaiziak in thutak leh lemna deih in,” chi in.
38008020	Huchi in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: “Hichibang in ahong om lai ding, mite leh khopi tampite a pan ahong pai ding ua;
38008021	huan, khopi khat a teng mite khopi dang a tengte kiang ah apai ding ua, Toupa deihsakna ngen ding leh sepaihte' Toupa zong ding in kintak in kuan ni; kei leng ka kuan ding, achi ding uhi.
38008022	Ahi, mi tampite leh nam hatte Jerusalem a Toupa sepaihte zong ding leh Toupa deihsakna ngen ding in ahong kuan ding uhi.
38008023	Huchibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a, namte pau tengteng a kipan mi sawm in Juda mipa puanten alen ding ua, na kiang ah ka pai ding uh, na kiang ah Pathian a-om chih ka za ngal ua, achi ding uh,” chi in.
38009001	Hadrak gam dou in Toupa thu a kilak a, “Damaskas akhawlna mun ahi ding. Aram khopite Toupa a ahi, Israel nam tengteng ahih bang un,
38009002	huan pil mah le uh agamgitpih Hamath, Tura leh Sidon tung atung ding hi.
38009003	Tura kulh muanhuaitak in akilamkhia in, dangka leivui bang in vum venvon in, kongzingte buannawi bang in dangka-eng hoih in dim mahleh.
38009004	Ngai in, Toupa'n amah neih-le-lam alamang ding a, tuipi a ahauhsakna ahihse ding; huchi in meikuang a nekgaih ahong hi ding hi.
38009005	“Ashkelon in huai amu dia, alau ding; Gaza in leng amu dia, nakpi a suknat in a-om ding; Ekron, alametna zahlakna ahi dia; Gaza a kipan kumpipa amangthang ding a, Ashkelon luah in a-om kei ding hi.
38009006	Huchi in Ashdod ah chi siangloute ateng ding ua, Philistiate kisaktheihna ka satkhe ding hi.
38009007	Huan akam a kipan asisan ka lamang ding a, ahate kikal a kipan in akihhuainate; huchi in amah leng i Pathian a ding in khosuaksun ahi ding hi; Jebus mi bang in Judah leh Ekron ah hausa ahi ding hi.
38009008	Huan sepaih pawlte ziak in akimvel in ka inn ka um ding, huchi a kuamah apaisuak uhiam akik nawnlouhna ding un; huchi in nuaisiahmi in apaltan nawnta kei ding; tu in ka mit mahmah in ka muta hi,” achi hi.
38009009	Aw Zion tanu, nakpi mahmah in kipak in; Aw Jerusalem tanu, kikou in; ngai in, na kumpipa kiniamkhiak in, sabiltung tung, sabiltungnou tuan ngei nailouhna tung a tuang in na kiang ah ahong hi; amah adiktat a, hotdamna anei.
38009010	Ephraim a kipan kangtalai leh Jerusalem a kipan sakol ka satkhe ding a, kidouna thalpeu satkhiak in a-om ding a; namte kiang ah lemna thu agen ding; huchi in agam tuipi a kipan tuipi tan, luipi a kipan lei tawpnate tan ahi ding hi.
38009011	Nang tungthu ah leng, na thukhun sisan ziak in tui omlouhna kokhuk a kipan in na suangkul tangte ka sawlkheta hi.
38009012	Lametna suangkul a tangte, kulh muanhuai lam ah kihei un; tuni mahmah in na tung ah azahnih in ka hon dinkik ding chih ka puang hi.
38009013	Judah thalpeu bang in ka laikulta a, Ephraim thal a bawl in thalpeu ah ka bulhta hi. Aw Zion, na tapate dou ding in na tapate ka tokthou ding, Aw Grik, huchi in mihat namsau bang in, nang ka hon bawl ding hi.
38009014	Huchi in atung ah Toupa akimu ding a, khophia bang in athal apaikhe ding; Toupa Pathian in pengkul amut dia, simlam pingpei toh apaikhe ding hi.
38009015	Sepaihte' Toupa'n amaute ahunkhe ding a; suang sailim tangte asikden ding ua; anegai ding ua, uain bang in asisan uh adawn ding uh; noubemte bang in adim ding ua, maitam ningte bang in akawt ding uhi.
38009016	Huai ni chiang in Toupa a Pathian un abelamhonte bang in amau ahondam ding a; lallukhu a suangmantamte bang in agam ah atang ding uhi.
38009017	Ahi, ahoihna alian mahmah a, akilawmna athupi mahmah a; buh-le-bal in tangvalte atai ding a, uain thak in nungakte atai ding uhi.
38010001	Vuah nanung hun in Toupa vuah ngen un, meipite bawlpa Toupa mahmah, huchi in vuahphinte, gam a loupate kiang ah, amaute ape ding.
38010002	Milimte'n bangmah lou thu agen un, aisante'n zuau amu uh; mang zuauthei agen ua, athawn lel in alungmuan uh; huaiziak in belamte bang in amau lampi ah apai ua, belamchingmi a-om louh ziak in hihgim in a-om uhi.
38010003	“Belamching mite tung ah ka hehna apuakzak a, aheutute uh ka gawt ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n Judah inkote, abelamte avehta a, kidouna a sakol hoih bang in amaute abawl ding hi.
38010004	Amah a kipan in aning a suang, amah a kipan puanin khetphim amah a kipan kidouna thalpeu, amah a kipan vaihawm tengteng ahong paikhe ding hi.
38010005	Kidouna a kongzing a buannawi a amelmate uh childen in, mihatte bang in a-om ding ua; akiang ua Toupa a-om ziak in adou ding uh; sakol tung a tuangte hih lungzin in a-om ding uhi.”
38010006	“Judah inkote ka hatsak ding a, Joseph inkote ka hondam ding, amaute ka hon pi nawn ding a, amau tung ah zahngaihna ka nei; huchi in ka paihkhiak het louh bang ahong hi ding uh; Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi a, amaute ka dawng ding hi.
38010007	Ephraim mite mihatpa in a-om ding ua, uain ziak in alungtang uh akipak ding a; ahi, atate un huai amu ding ua, akipak ding uh; Toupa ah alungtang uh akipak ding hi.
38010008	Amau ka khutvan ding a, amau ka kaikhawm ding; amau ka tanta hi; apun khitsa bang un apung ding uh.
38010009	Namte lak ah hawldalh mah leng; gam gamlate ah kei ahon theigige ding uh; huchi in atate uh toh ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn ding uhi.
38010010	Aigupta gam a pan ka pi nawn ding a, Assuria a kipan ka pikik nawn ding hi; Gilead leh Lebanon gam ah amau ka pilut ding; amaute a dia mun akidaih louh dong in
38010011	gimthuakna tuipi apalkai ding ua, tuipi a tui kihawtte khet in a-om ding uh, huchi in Nile luipi thukna tengteng akang vek ding; Assuria kisaktheihna koihniam in a-om dia, Aigupta kumpi chiang apaimang vengveng ding hi.
38010012	Huan Toupa ah amau ka hihhat ding a; amin in avaktou un avaksuk ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.
38011001	Aw Lebanon, mei in na sidar singte akattum theihna ding in na kongkhakte hong in.
38011002	Aw meilah sing, mau vongvong in, Sidar sing apukta ngal a, ahoih tatate hihsiat a a-om ziak un; Aw nou Bashan tosaw singte chiau vongvong un, gammangpi vatpaih ahita hi.
38011003	Ngai un belamching mite amau vongvong ding ua, na thupina uh loh a a-om ziak in, ngai un humpinelkai ahumham a, Jordan gammang athengta hi!
38011004	Hichibang in Toupa ka Pathian in achi hi, “Goh ding belamhon chingpa hong hi in.
38011005	Amau leite'n athat ua, gawt in a-om kei ua; amau zuakte'n Toupa phat in om hen! Ka hauta uh! Amau chingte'n alainat kei uhi,” achi uhi.
38011006	“Gam a tengte ka hehpih nawn kei ding, Toupa'n achi. Himahleh ngai in mite michih a-invengte khut ah leh akumpipa khut ah ka pe ding; amau gam agawt ding ua, akhut ua kipan amaute ka hunkhe kei ding,” chi in.
38011007	“Huchi in belamte a sumdawngte a dia thah ding a om belamte chingpa ka hong hita hi. Huchi in chiang nih ka kilak a; khat pen ‘Deihsakna’ ka chi a, adang pen ‘Kizopna’ ka chi; huchi in belamte ka vak hi.
38011008	Huan kha khat in belamchingmi thum ka satkhia hi. Himahleh ka kha in amau achimtak a, amau kha in leng kei ahon chimtak uhi.
38011009	Huaitak in ke'n, ‘K'on vak kei ding, asi dingte, si henla, satkhiak a om dingte, satkhiak in om heh; nutsiatte khat-le-khat sa kinetuah uhen,’ ka chita hi.
38011010	Huan ‘Deihsakna’ kichi ka chiangkhun ka la a, ka sattan a, mite tengteng toh ka thukhun ka bawl ka suksiat theihna ding in.
38011011	Huchi in huai ni in akitanta, huchi in pawlte lak ah agenthei kei hon limsakte'n Toupa thu ahi chih athei uhi.
38011012	Ke'n akiang uah, ‘Hoih a na ngaihtuah ualeh ka loh tak hon pia, un ahihkeileh, tang un,’ ka chi hi. Huchi in ka loh tak ding in ‘dangka shekel sawmthum’ abuk uhi.
38011013	“Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, ‘Ka man ding a aseh uh, man hoih belvelmi kiang ah khia in,’ achi hi. Dangka shekel sawmthum ka la a Toupa' inn a, belvelmi kiang ah ka khia hi.
38011014	Huchi in Judah leh Israel kikal a ki-unauna ka suksiat theihna ding in, ka chiangkhun dang ‘Kizopna’ kichi pen ka tumtan hi.
38011015	“Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, ‘Belamching mihai vanzatte kilak nawn in,’ achi hi.
38011016	Ngai in, gamsung ah belamchingmi ka bawlkhe ding hi. Ama'n satkhiak a om dingte aveh kei dia, delhzak a om dingte leng azong sam kei dia, satkeh a omte leng ahihdam sam kei ding, ahoih leng avak sam kei dia, himahleh athaute sa ane ding a, achinte nangawn uh atolsak ding hi.
38011017	Belamhonte nusia belamchingmi phattuamna bei tung agik hi; aban tung leh amit taklam tung namsau in adou ding a; aban akeugawp kiuhkeuh ding a, amit taklam amial bikbek ding!” achi hi.
38012001	Judah tungtang a Toupa thu kilakna: Van phalhkhia a, lei kingakna koih a, mihing sung a mihing kha koihpa, Toupa'n hichi in achi:
38012002	“Ngai in, kho kimvel a mite a ding in hoina nou in Jerusalem ka bawl ding a, Judah tung ah leng, Jerusalem lakna ah ahi ding hi.
38012003	Huan huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, mi tengteng a ding in Jerusalem suang chimtakhuai in ka bawl ding a, ama ziak a tunggik kisate nakpi in liamsak in a-om ding ua, amah dou ding in leitung a nam tengteng akikhawmkhawm ding uhi.
38012004	Huai ni chiang in lamdangsakna toh sakol chih ka khen ding a, hehna toh atungtuangmi; huan Judah inkote tung ah ka mit ahak ding a mittawtna in mite sakol chih ka gawt ding hi.
38012005	Judah hausate'n alungtang un, Jerusalem a tengte'n sepaihte' Toupa a Pathian uah hatna anei uh,” achi ding uhi.
38012006	Huai ni chiang in Judah hausate sing lak a mei-am bang in ka bawl dia, buhphal lak a meisel bang in akimvel, khut taklam pang leh veilam pang a mite tengteng anegai ding uh. Jerusalem ahihleh ama mun, Jerusalem mahmah ah ahong teng nawn ding hi.
38012007	Toupa'n amasa in Judah puaninte leng ahondam ding; David inkote thupina leh Jerusalem a tengte thupina Judah tung akiliksaklouhna ding in.
38012008	Huai ni chiang in Toupa'n Jerusalem a tengte ahum ding a, alak ua hatloupen leng huai ni chiang in David bang ahi ding a; David inkote Pathian bang in a-om ding, ama ua pai Toupa angel bang in.
38012009	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Jerusalem dou ding a hong kuan nam tengteng hihse ding in ka kuankhe ding hi.
38012010	Huan David inkote tung leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah hehpihna leh thumna kha ka sungbo ding a; asutpa uh lam a-en ding uh; amah asuun ding ua, mi'n atapa neihsun asuun bang in, mi'n ata masa khasetak a akah bang in, amah akah ding uhi.
38012011	Huai ni chiang in Jerusalem ah suunna thupi a-om ding, Megiddon Phaizang a Hadad-rimmon suunna bang in.
38012012	Huan gam pumpi in asuun dia; inkuan chih in atuam in, David nam inkote atuam in, azite un atuam in; Nathan nam inkote atuam in, azite un atuam in;
38012013	Levi nam inkote atuam in, azite un atuam in; Shimei inkote atuam in, azite un atuam in;
38012014	inkuan om lai teng a inkuan chih atuam in, azite un atuam in.
38013001	Huai ni chiang in khelhna leh nitna siangsak ding in, David inkote leh Jerusalem a tengte a ding in tuikhuk kihong ahong om ding hi.
38013002	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, gam a kipan in milimte minte ka satkhe ding a, theihgige in a-omta kei ding uh; huan zawlneite leh kha nin gam a kipan in ka paikhesak ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
38013003	Huan hichi ahi ding a, zawlnei kuapeuh ahong kilat laileh amah suangtu anu leh apa'n akiang ah, “Na hing kei ding; Toupa min in zuau na gen a,” achi ding ua; amah suangtu anu leh apa'n thu agenkholh ziak in amah asun pailet ding uhi.
38013004	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, zawlneite thu agenkholhna uah, amengmuh uah azahlak chiat ding ua; khem ding in samul phan puanak leng asilh sam kei ding uhi.
38013005	“Zawlnei ka hi kei, leiletmi ka hi; ka tuailai a kipan a sikha a bawl ka hih khit tak ziak in,” achi zaw ding uhi.
38013006	Mi'n akiang ah, na bante kikal a liamnate bang ahia? achi ding ua, huchi in ama'n, “Huaite ka lawmte insung a ka liamnate ahi uh,” chi in adawng ding uhi.
38013007	“Aw namsau, ka belamchingmi dou ding leh mi ka lawm dou ding in halh in, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: Belamchingmi khen in, huan belamte adalh ding uh; huchi in aneute tung ah ka khut ka lik ding hi.
38013008	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, gam tengteng ah, huai a seh nih satkhiak in a-om dia asi ding uhi; himahleh huai a athumna nutsiat in a-om ding, Toupa'n achi.
38013009	Huan aseh thumna mei a paisuak in ka hon tawi dia, dangka hihsiangthou bang in ka hihsiangthou ding a, dangka ettel bang in ka entel ding hi; ka min alou ding ua, amau ka dawng ding; ka mite ahi, ka chi dia, amau, Toupa ka Pathian ahi,” hon chi ding uhi.
38014001	Ngai in, Toupa ni, na gallak na lak a hawm a a-om ding hun ahong tung hi.
38014002	Jerusalem dou a galdou ding in nam tengteng ka kaikhawm ding a; khopi lak in a-om dia, innte lok in leh numeite sualluih in a-om ding uh; khopi kimkhat sal a kaih in a-om ding a, khopi a kipan mikhosuaksunte kuamah satkhiak in a-om kei ding uhi.
38014003	Huai ni chiang in Toupa apaikhe dia, kidou lai a adou bang in huai namte adou ding hi.
38014004	Huai ni chiang in akhe a Jerusalem suahlam a om, Olive Tang sik in adingh dia, huchi in Olive Tang bel suahlam a pan tumlam ah phel nih kisuah in akiphelkhap ding hi, huchi in phaizang thupi mahmah ahong omta ding a; tang kimkhat mallam ah leh akimkhat simlam ah akikhin ding hi. Huchi in phaizang lam ah ka mualte na taikek ding uhi.
38014005	Mualte phaizang Azal tung ding ahi ngal a; ahi, Judah kumpipa Uzziah dam lai a zinling ma a kipan na taikek uh bang in; huchi in Toupa ka Pathian ahong pai ding a, akiang ah misiangthoute ahon tonpih ding hi.
38014006	Huan huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, khovot a-om kei dia, vuk a-om sam kei ding.
38014007	Himahleh Toupa a dia theih a om ni khat ahi ding; sun hilou, zan hilou; himahleh hichi ahi ding a, nitaklam in khovak a-om ding hi.
38014008	Huan huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Jerusalem a kipan in tui hingte aluangkhe dia; alak ua kimkhat suahlam tuipi ah, alak ua kimkhat tumlam tuipi ah; nipi leh phalbi in a-omden ding hi.
38014009	Huchi in leitung tengteng ah Toupa kumpipa ahi ding; huai ni chiang in Toupa khat amin khat ahi ding hi.
38014010	Jerusalem sim Geba a kipan Rimmon tan, gam tengteng phaizang asuak ding a; Jerusalem bel Benjamin kongpi a kipan kongpi khatna chiang, aning a kongpi chiang, Hananel insang a kipan kumpipa uain sukna pha a kipan khentuam in a-om ding hi.
38014011	Huai ah mite ateng ding ua, hamsia a-om nawn kei dia; himahleh Jerusalem ah muangtak in ateng ding uhi.
38014012	Huan Jerusalem kidoupih mite tengteng Toupa'n agawtna ding hipi bel hiai ahi ding; akhe ua adin lai un, asa uh amuat ding a, amit hawm sung uah amit uh amuat ding, akamsung uah alei uh amuat ding hi.
38014013	Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa a kipan nakpitak a buaina alak uah ahong om ding a; michih in a-invengte khut ah alen tinten ding a, a-invengte khut dou ding in akhut akisa ding hi.
38014014	Judah in leng Jerusalem ah adou dia; kho kim khovel a nam tengteng hauhsakna dangka-eng, dangka, puansilh atam a tam in alakhawm ding hi.
38014015	Huchibang in hiai gawtna hipi gamsa tengteng leh sakol, sakolneu, sangawngsau leh sabiltungte puaninte ah hiai gawtna a-om ding hi.
38014016	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Jerusalem dou ding a hong kuan nam tengteng lak a nutsiat a om michih akum sik in Kumpipa, sepaihte' Toupa , be ding leh Biakbukte Ankuangluina nei ding in Jerusalem ah akuantou ding uhi.
38014017	Hichi ahi ding a, leitung a inkuan tengteng, Jerusalem a Kumpipa, sepaihte' Toupa , be ding a hohtou lou peuhmah, atung uah vuah azu kei ding hi.
38014018	Aigupta inkuan ahohtouh louh ua, ahong pai kei uleh, amaute tung ah leng vuah azu kei ding; Biakbuk Ankuangluina nei ding a hohtou lou namte gawtna ding hipi a-om zaw ding hi.
38014019	Hiai Aigupta gawtna bel Biakbuk Ankuangluina nei ding a hoh lou nam tengteng gawtna ahi ding hi.
38014020	Huai ni chiang in sakol longte ah, Toupa A DING A SIANGTHOU, chih akigelh ding a; Toupa' inn a belte maitam ma a noubemte bang ahi ding uhi.
38014021	Ahi, Jerusalem leh Judah a bel tengteng sepaihte' Toupa a ding in siangthou ahi ding uh; akithoihte ahong pai ding ua huai belte la in kithoihna sa ahuan ding uhi, huai ni chiang in sepaihte' Toupa' inn ah Kanaan mi a-om nawn kei ding hi.
39001001	Israel kiang a Toupa kilakna Malaki in amuh.
39001002	“Ka hon itta,” Toupa'n achi. Nou bel, “Koi lai ah ahia nang kou na hon it tak?” na chi uhi, “Esau, Jakob unaupa ahi kei maw? Hinapi in, Jakob ka it hi.”
39001003	Himahleh Esau ka hua a, atang sangte ka hihgawp a, gamdai sehalte kiang ah agoutan ka peta hi, Toupa'n achi.
39001004	Edom in, “Suk zawngkhal in i om ua, himahleh i kik nawn ding ua mun kisegawpsate i lam ding uh,” chi mahleh, hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n , “Alam nawn ding ua, himahleh ka chimsak ding; mite'n amaute gitlouhna gam leh mipi atung ua tangtawn a Toupa hehna nam,” achi ding uhi.
39001005	Huchi in na mitte un amu dia, “Israel gamgi khen ah Toupa letsak in om hen,” na chi ding uhi.
39001006	“Tapa in apa azahtak a, sikha in apu; huchi apa ka hihleh, kei zahtakna koi a om ahia? Huchi a pu ka hihleh, kei kihtakna koi a om ahia? Sepaihte' Toupa'n na kiang uah achi, siampu ka min musitte aw. Nou koi lai ah ahia na min ka muhsit uh? na chi uhi.
39001007	Ka maitam tung ah tanghou sesa na lan ua, nou koi lai ah ahia ka hon hihnit uh? na chi uh. Toupa dohkan asimmohhuai, na chihna uah.
39001008	Kithoihna ding a mittaw na lat un, gilou ahi kei maw? Khebai leh damlou na lat un, gilou ahi kei maw? Tu in na ukpipa kiang ah pe mah dih ua, ama'n apom in na tung ah alungdam diam? Ahihkeileh nou ahon deihsak diam?” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39001009	Huchi in tu in ka hon ngen hi, i tung a azahngaihna na theihna ding un Pathian deihsakna ngen un. Hiai na khut ua kipan thilpiak toh nou hon deihsak diam? sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39001010	Athawn a ka maitam tung a mei na tohlouhna ding un, na lak ua mi khat kongkhakte khak ding omleh aw; Sepaihte' Toupa'n , “Nou ah kipahna ka nei kei a, na khut ua kipan in thillat leng ka sang sam kei ding.
39001011	Nisuahna a kipan nitumna lam pha hial in leng namte lak ah ka min athupi hi, mun chih ah ka min a ding in gimlim akilan a, thillat siangthou; namte lak a ka min alet ziak in, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39001012	Himahleh nou na hihnin ua, Toupa dohkan anin a, huai a agah toh an nangawn azahpihhuai na chihna uah.
39001013	‘Ngai un, nak chimtakhuai hina e; na chi lai ua, huan na hahchhiai khum uh, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, hiamgamtak a lak hiam ahihkeileh khebaite leh damloute huchibang thillat na hon tawi uh; na khut ua kipan in hiaite sang peuhmah ding ka diam?’ Toupa'n achi.
39001014	Himahleh aganhon lak a apa nei a, thuchiam a Toupa lak a thil demkai a kithoih, mikhempa hamsiat in om heh; Kumpipa thupi ka hi a, namte lak ah ka min alauhuai ngal a,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39002001	Tu in, nou siampute aw, “Hiai thupiak noute a ding ahi.
39002002	Ka min pahtawi ding a, na ngaihkhiak louh ua, na lungtang ua na koih kei uleh, huchi in na tung uah hamsia ka tungsak ding a, na vualzawlnate uh ka hamsiatkhum ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, ahi, lungtang a na koih louh ziak un, ka hamsiat khinta hi.
39002003	Ngai un, noute ziak in na chi tuh ka sal ding a, na mai uah ek ka thehthang ding a, na kithoihna ek ngei uh; huchi in huai toh lakmang in na om ding uhi.
39002004	Hiai thupiak, Levi toh ka thukhun a-omtheihna ding in, na kiang uah ka hon sawlta chih na thei ding uh, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39002005	“Hinna leh lungmuanna ka thukhun amah toh a-om hi, akihtak theihna ding in akiang ah amaute ka peta a, kei ahon kihta a, ka min azahtak mahmah hi.
39002006	Akamsung ah thutak dan a-om a, diktatlouhna amuk ah akimu kei; lungmuanna leh tanna ah ka thu azui a, gitlouhna a kipan in mi tampi aheimangsak hi.
39002007	Siampu mukte'n theihna akem un, akam uah dan azong ding uh ahi him hi; amah lah sepaihte' Toupa sawltak ahi ngal a.
39002008	“Himahleh lampi a kipan pialsak in na om ua; tampi dan ah na kisuipuksak uhi; Levi thukhun na suseta uhi.
39002009	Huaiziak in ka lampite na zuih louh dungzui un, dan a mite deihsak tuam na neih zawk ziak un, ke'n leng mipite tengteng ma ah zahpihhuai leh dai in ka hon bawlta hi,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39002010	I vek un pa khat i nei kei ua hia? Pathian khat in hon siam kei a hia? Bangziak a lepchiahtak a michih in i pipute uh thukhun hihnin a-unau siatna ding a hih i hi ua?
39002011	Judah in lepchiahtak in ahihta a, Israel ah leh Jerusalem ah kihhuai hih in a-om hi, Judah in Pathian' mun siangthou it ahihninta a, theih louh pathian tanu akitenpihta hi.
39002012	Toupa'n hiai thilhihpa, sinsakpa leh sinsak a ompa, Jakob puanin a kipan leh sepaihte' Toupa kiang a thillat lanpa asatkhe ding hi.
39002013	Huan hiai na hih nawn uh; Toupa maitam khitui, kah leh thumna in na khuh ua, thillat alimsak nawn louh a, na khut ua kipan deihsakna toh san leng asan nawn louh tanpha in.
39002014	Hinapi in lah, “Bangziak in maw?” achi uhi. Na tuailai zi, lepchiahtak a na bawl, na kithuahpihnu, na thukhun zi hinapi in, amah leh nang kikal ah Toupa theihpihpa ahih khit tak ziak in.
39002015	Pathian in nihte sa khat in hon bawl kei maw? Khat in na kha hon bawlsak in, ahingsak kei maw? Bang achia khat? Pathian limsak chi azong ahi. Huaiziak in michih in atuailai zi lepchiahtak a hih lou ding in na kha thu uah pilvang un.
39002016	Toupa Israel' Pathian in achi, koihmangna ka hua a, hiamgamna a puansilh khuh mipa ka mudah hi, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Huaiziak in michih in atuailai zi lepchiahtak a hih lou ding in, na kha thu uah pilvang un.
39002017	Na thu un Toupa na hihgimta uh, koi ah ka hon hihgim ua ahia, na chi lai uhi; michih gilou hih Toupa mitmuh in ahoih a, huaite ah amah akipak hi na chihna uah leh vaihawmna Pathian koi a om hiam na chih nakna uah.
39003001	“Ngai in, ka sawltak ka sawl a, ama'n ka ma ah lampi abawlkhol ding a Toupa , na zon uh, atempul ah thakhat in ahong pai ding; na kipahna uh, thukhun sawltak, ngai un, ahong hi,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39003002	Himahleh ahong paina ni kua'n athuakzou thei dia? Ahong lat chiang in kua adingzou dia? Amah hihsiangthou meikuang leh puansawptu sahbon bang ahi ngal a.
39003003	Huchi in dangka hihsiangthoumi leh siangsakmi bang in atu ding a Levi tapate ahihsiang ding hi, dangka-eng leh dangka bang in amau akhuahsiang ding a, huchi in diktatna in Toupa kiang ah thillatte alan ding uhi.
39003004	Huai chiang in Judah leh Jerusalem thillatte nidanglai bang leh tang a kumte bang in Toupa a ding in namtui ahi ding hi.
39003005	“Huan vaihawmna ah aisan mite kalh in, angkawmte kalh in, zuau a kichiamte kalh in theihpihpa kin ka hi ding a, loh thu a migoih, meithai, pabei, nuaisiah, athuneihna a kipan mikhual kaiheipa, kei hon kihtaloute kalh in, na kiang uah ka hong ding sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39003006	“Kei Toupa ka zulhzau kei a; huaiziak in Jakob tapate aw, haltum in na om kei uhi.
39003007	Na pipute uh dam lai a kipan ka dan thupiakte na kilehheisan ua, na zui kei uhi. Ka kiang ah hong kik unla, na kiang uah ka hong kik ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Himahleh nou, koi ah i kik ding ua? na chi uhi.
39003008	Mi'n Pathian alok diam? Hinapi in noute'n na hon lok uh. Himahleh bangchidan in ka hon lok ua eita? na chi uhi. Sawm-a-khatte ah leh thillatte ah.
39003009	Hiai nam pumpi in, kei na hon loh ziak un hamsiatna a hamsiat na hi uhi.
39003010	Ka insung a an ahong omtheihna ding in koihkhawmna inn ah sawm-a-khat avek in hon lalut unla, huai in kei hon entel un, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Akoihna ding dantan kiching om lou khop in van tohlette hong in, vualzawlna ka hon buakkhe kei na hiam!
39003011	Huan negaimi pen nou ziak in ka sal ding a, na leigahte uh ahihse kei ding hi; na grepgui uh leng lou ah ahun tun ma in agah akesak kei ding hi, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39003012	Huchi in nam tengteng in nang nuamsa ahon chi ding ua; gam deihhuai na hih ding ziak un, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39003013	“Kei dem a na thute uh akhauh hi,” Toupa'n achi, “Nou koi ah nang dem in thu ka gen ua eita,” na chi uh.
39003014	“Pathian nasep athawn ahi, athupiak i zuih ua, suunna puan silh a sepaihte' Toupa ma a i om uh bang ahia aphattuamna, na chi uh.
39003015	Tu in kisatheite nuamsa chi in agitlouhna nasemte tunding in a-om uh; ahi; Pathian khemte hotkhiak in a-om uh,” i chi uhi.
39003016	Toupa kihtate akihoupih ua; huchi in Toupa'n angaikhia a, aza a, Toupa kihta a, amin ngaihtuahte ama ah, theihgigena laibuzial ah gelh ahi.
39003017	“Huan amau kei a ahi ding ua, gou lamdangtak ka bawl ni chiang in,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Mi'n ama nasem atapa ahawi bang in huchi in amau ka hawi ding hi.
39003018	Huai hun chiang in na hong kihei ding ua, diktatte leh giloute, Pathian nasem leh ama nna semloute kal na khenchian thei ding uhi.
39004001	“Ngai in, ani ahong tun ziak in, meiphualpi bang in akuang a; huchi in kisatheite tengteng, gilou nasemte tengteng, buhpawl ahi ding uh; huan ahong tung huai ni in amaute zung leh hiang nuse lou hial in akangmang ding uh,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39004002	Himahleh nou ka min kihtate kiang ah diktatna ni, akhate ahihdamna toh ahong suak ding; huchi in na pawtkhe ding ua, huangsung bawngnoute bang in na diang velhvelh ding uhi.
39004003	Huan giloute na sikden ding ua; ka gamtat ni chiang in na khepek nuai uah meivu hi ding ahih ziak un, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.
39004004	“Horeb a Israel tengteng a ding a ka sikha Mosi Dan, amah thupiak, dan thusehte leh vaihawmte ngei, theigige un.
39004005	Ngai un, Toupa ni thupi leh mulkimhuai ahong tun ma in na kiang uah zawlnei Elijah ka hon sawl ding hi.
39004006	Pate lungtang tate lam ah, tate lungtang apate uh lam ah angasak ding; huchi lou in zaw hamsia in lei ka gawt kha ding hi.”
40001001	Abraham tapa, David tapa, Jesu Khrist khangthubu.
40001002	Abraham in Isak asuang a, Isak in Jakob asuang a, Jakob in Judas leh a-unaute asuang hi.
40001003	Judas in Tamar a pan Perez leh Zerah asuang a, Perez in Erom asuang a, Erom in Aram asuang hi.
40001004	Aram in Amminadab asuang a, Amminadab in Nashon asuang a, Nashon in Salmon asuang hi.
40001005	Salmon in Rahab a pan Boaz asuang a, Boaz in Ruth a pan Obed asuang a, Obed in Jesse asuang hi.
40001006	Jesse in kumpipa David asuang a, kumpipa David in Uria zi a pan Solomon asuang hi.
40001007	Solomon in Rehoboam asuang a, Rehoboam in Abijah asuang a, Abijah in Asa asuang hi.
40001008	Asa in Jehoshaphat asuang a, Jehoshaphat in Jeram asuang a, Jeram in Uzzia asuang hi.
40001009	Uzzia in Jotham asuang a, Jotham in Ahaz asuang a, Ahaz in Hezekiah asuang hi.
40001010	Hezekiah in Manasseh asuang a, Manasseh in Amon asuang a, Amon in Josiah asuang hi.
40001011	Babulon sal a api lai un Josiah in Jekoniah leh a-unaute asuang hi.
40001012	Huan Babulon sal a api nung un Jekoniah in Salathiel asuang a, Salathiel in Zerubbabel asuang hi.
40001013	Zerubbabel in Abiud asuang a, Abiud in Eliakim asuang a, Eliakim in Azor asuang a,
40001014	Azor in Zadok asuang a, Zadok in Akim asuang a, Akim in Eliud asuang hi.
40001015	Eliud in Eleazar asuang a, Eleazar in Mathan asuang a, Mathan in Jakob asuang hi.
40001016	Jakob in Joseph, Mari pasal asuang a, huai Mari lak ah Jesu Khrist ahong piangta hi.
40001017	Huchi in suan tengteng Abraham a pan David tan suan sawm-le-li ahi a, David a pan Babulon a sal a pi ahih tan un, suan sawm-le-li ahi a, Babulon a sal a pi ahih ua pan Khrist tan suan sawm-le-li ahi.
40001018	Jesu Khrist hong piandan hichibang ahi. Anu Mari leh Joseph akikham lai ua a-omkhawm ma un, Kha Siangthou in agaisak chih atheita uhi.
40001019	Huchi in apasal Joseph, midiktak ahi a, amah daisak a-ut kei a, aguk in tawpsan atum hi.
40001020	Himahleh, huai thute angaihtuah lai in, ngai in, amang in akiang ah Toupa angel ahong kilak a, “Joseph, nang David tapa, na zi Mari neih lau ke'n, anaupai Kha Siangthou a kipan ahi.
40001021	Tapa anei dia, amin ding in Jesu na sa ding; ama'n amite akhelhna ua kipan ahotdam ding ziak in,” achi hi.
40001022	Toupa'n zawlnei kam a:
40001023	“Ngai in, nungak siangthou agai dia, tapa anei dia, amin Immanuel asa ding uh,” chi a agen ahong tuntheihna ding in huai tengteng ahong om hi. Huai tuh, “I kiang uah Pathian a-om,” chihna ahi.
40001024	Huchi in Joseph ihmu athoukhia a, Toupa Angel in akiang a thu apiak bang in ahih a, azi aneita hi.
40001025	Himahleh, tapa aneih masiah akithuahpih kei; huan amin Jesu asata hi.
40002001	Huan kumpipa Herod vaihawm lai a Judia gam a, Bethlehem a Jesu ahong pian lai in, ngai in, suahlam a kipan Jerusalem ah mipilte ahong pai uhi.
40002002	“Koi ah ahia Judate' Kumpipa ahong pian? Suahlam ah ama aksi ka mu ua, amah be dia hong pai ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
40002003	Kumpipa Herod in huai azak phet in alungzing a, Jerusalem tengteng leng alung uh azing sam hi.
40002004	Huchi in siampu liante leh mite laigelhmi tengteng asamkhawm a, Khrist pianna ding thu adongta hi.
40002005	Huan amau akiang ah, “Judia gam a Bethlehem khua ah zawlnei in hichi in agelh akei hiam:
40002006	“Nang, Judia gam a Bethlehem aw, Judia khopite lak ah na neupen kei hial, na sung a kipan ukpa hong suak ding ahi ngal a, ka mi Israelte vengpa ding,” chih, achi uhi.
40002007	Huai nung in Herod in aguk in mipilte asam a, ngenteltak in aksi kilat lai adongkheta hi.
40002008	Huan amau Bethlehem ah apaisak a, “Paita unla, naungek thu ngenteltak in dongkhia un, ke'n leng amah ka hong biak theih samna ding in, na muh chiang un hong hilh un,” achi hi.
40002009	Huan kumpipa thu azak un apaita ua, ngai in suahlam a aksi amuh uh naungek omna tung zawn atun a akhawl masiah ama uah apai zel hi.
40002010	Aksi amuh un, akipak lo mahmah uhi.
40002011	Inn sung ah ava lut ua, anu Mari kiang a naungek om amuh un, abokkhup ua, abia uhi. Agoubawm uh ahong ua, akiang ah kipahna dangka-eng, begaw leh murrah alan uhi.
40002012	Herod kiang a kik nawn lou ding in amang ua vauhilh a a-om ziak un, amau kholam, lam tuam ah apaita uhi.
40002013	Huan apai nung un, ngai in, Joseph kiang ah amang in Toupa angel akilak a, “Thou inla, naungek leh anu pi inla, Aigupta gam ah taipih in, ka hon hilh nawn masiah huai ah om gige in; Herod in naungek hihsiat dia zong ding ahih ziak in,” achi hi.
40002014	Huchi in athou a, azanzan in naungek leh anu api a, Aigupta gam ah apaita hi.
40002015	Herod sih mateng huai ah a-om gige hi. Toupa'n zawlnei kam a, “Ka tapa Aigupta gam a pan ka samkhia,” chi a agen ahong tuntheihna ding ahi.
40002016	Huchih lai in Herod in mipilte' khem a om ahih lam akitheihtak in aheh mahmah a, mi asawl a, ahun laitak thu ngenteltak a mipilte adotkhiak bang in, Bethlehem khua leh akim tengteng a pasal naupang kum nih chiang nuailam avek un athatta hi.
40002017	Huchih lai in zawlnei Jeremiah in:
40002018	“Ramah ah husa aza uh, suunna, kah thawm, misi ngai a mau vengvungte, Rakil in atate akah a, a-om nawn louh ziak un akhamuan theih kei,” chi a ana gen ahong tungta hi.
40002019	Himahleh Herod asih nung in, ngai in, Aigupta gam a Joseph kiang ah Toupa Angel amang in akilak hi.
40002020	“Thou inla, naungek leh anu pi inla, Israel gam ah pai in; naungek thah tumte asih tak ziak un,” achi hi.
40002021	Huchi in athou a, naungek leh anu api a, Israel gam ah apaita uhi.
40002022	Himahleh Arkelaus in apa Herod sik in Judia gam ah vai ahawm chih azak in, huai lam a pai alau a; amang a vauhilh a a-om ziak in Galili gam ah apai a,
40002023	Nazaret kichi khua khat ah atengta hi. “Amah zaw Nazaret mi achi ding uh,” chi a zawlneite na gen ahong tuntheihna ding in.
40003001	Huchih lai in Baptispa Johan in,
40003002	“Kisik un! Van-gam anaita,” chi in Judia gamdai ah thu gen in ahong pai hi.
40003003	Amah ahi, zawlnei Isai in: “Gamdai a mi kikou aw in, Toupa lamlian sial unla, alampite tangsak un, achi,” chi a ana gen pen.
40003004	Johan in sangawngsau mul puan asilh a, savun kawnggak agak a, a-an khaukhup leh khuaizu ahi.
40003005	Huchih lai in Jerusalem khua, Judia gam tengteng, Jordan luidung kim tengteng akiang ah ahong paikhawm ua,
40003006	akhelhna uh thupha tawi in, Jordan lui ah baptisma atang uhi.
40003007	Himahleh Pharisaite leh Saddukaite tampi ama a baptisma tang ding a hong paite amuh in, akiang uah, “Nou gul suante! Thangpaihna hong tung ding taisan ding a kua'n hon thuhilh ahia?
40003008	Huchi in kisikna toh kilawm gah hon suangkhia un.
40003009	Abraham ka pu uh ahi, chi in kingaihtuah kei un, Pathian in hiai suangte Abraham suante in adingsak thei ka hon chi ahi.
40003010	Tu a kipan in singbul teng ah heipi akoihta uh; huchi in sing chih gah hoih a gah lou peuhpeuh aphuk ua, mei ah apailut zel uhi.
40003011	Ke'n zaw kisikna ding in tui in ka hon baptis a, himahleh, amah ka nung a hong pai kei sang in athupizaw a, akhedap tawitak leng ka hi kei, ama'n zaw Kha Siangthou leh mei in noute ahon baptis ding hi.
40003012	Akhut in phazah atawi a, aphual azapsiang sipsip ding a, buhpang ah abuh asung ding, asi bel mei mit thei lou in ahalmang ding,” achi hi.
40003013	Huchih lai in akiang a baptisma tang ding in Galili gam a kipan Jordan lui ah Johan kiang ah Jesu ahong pai hi.
40003014	Johan in, “Nang kei na hon baptis kiphamohzaw hinapi, ka kiang ah na hong zosop ahi maw?” chi in akham hi.
40003015	Himahleh Jesu'n akiang ah, “Tu in lemsa teitei in, hichibang a diktatna tengteng hihtangtun ei a ding in akilawm ngal a,” chi in adawng a, huchi in lem asata hi.
40003016	Huan Jesu baptisma atantak in tui a kipan apawt pah a, ngai in, amah a ding in van ahong kihong a, Pathian Kha, vakhu bang a hong suk in, atung a hong tu amu hi.
40003017	Huan ngai in, van a kipan aw in, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak, ka kipahna mahmah ahi,” achi hi.
40004001	Huai khit in diabol khem a om ding in gamdai ah Kha pilut in Jesu a-omta hi.
40004002	Huan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli an angolh nung in agil hong kialta hi.
40004003	Khempa ahong pai a, akiang ah, “Pathian Tapa na hihleh hiai suangte tanghou suak ding in thu pia in,” achi hi.
40004004	Himahleh ama'n, “Tanghou kia in mihing ahing kei ding, Pathian kam a thupawtte in ahing zaw ding, chih gelh ahi ngal a,” chi in adawng hi.
40004005	Huai zoh in, diabol in kho siangthou ah apilut a, Pathian tempul tungzum ah akoih a,
40004006	akiang ah, “Pathian Tapa na hihleh kikesak in; ‘Na tungthu ah a-angelte thu ape ding a, akhut un ahon dom ding uh, huchi lou in zaw na khe in suang na sui kha ding,’ chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
40004007	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian ze-et ke'n chih gelh ahi zaw,” achi hi.
40004008	Huan diabol in tang sangtak ah api nawn a, khovel gam tengteng leh athupina a-ensak hi.
40004009	Huan akiang ah, “Bokkhup in hon bia in, hiai tengteng ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
40004010	Huaitak in Jesu'n akiang ah, “Setan, hiai a kipan paimang in, Toupa na Pathian na biak ding, ama nna kia na sep ding ahi chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
40004011	Huai zoh in diabol in apaisanta a, ngai in, angelte'n amah nna ahong sepsak uhi.
40004012	Huan Johan aman uh chih Jesu'n azak phet in, Galili ah akihemkhia hi.
40004013	Nazaret khua apaisan a, Kapernaum ah a-om nilouh a, huai tuh Zebulun leh Naphtali uk, tuipi gei a om ahi a,
40004014	zawlnei Isai kam a thugenkholh tangtunna ding ahi:
40004015	“Dil lam a, Jordan gal a, Zebulun gam leh Naphtali gam, Zentelte Galili gam a,
40004016	mial nuai a tute'n vak thupi amu ua, sihna lim nuai a tute tung ah vak ahong suakta,” chi a agen hong tuntheihna ding in.
40004017	Huai hun a kipan in Jesu'n, “Kisik un! Van lalgam anaita,” chi in thu agenta hi.
40004018	Huan Galili Tuipi gei a avak kawm in, unau nih Simon Peter kichi a-unau Andru toh, tuipi ah len pai lai amu a; amaute ngamanmi ahi him uhi.
40004019	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon zui un, mihing man ding in ka hon bawl ding,” achi hi.
40004020	Huchi in alente uh nuse pah in amah azuita uhi.
40004021	Huan huai a kipan apai zel a unau dang nih, Zebedai tapa Jakob leh a-unau Johan, apa uh Zebedai kiang a long a alente uh bawlpha in amu a; amaute asam hi.
40004022	Huchi in long leh apa uh nuse pah in amah azuita uhi.
40004023	Jesu'n asinagogte ua thu hilh in, lalgam tanchinhoih gen in, mite natna chiteng leh hatlouhna chiteng hihdam in Galili gam tengteng ah apai vialvial hi.
40004024	Siria gam tengteng ah atanchin athangta a, akiang ah mi damlou tengteng damlouhna leh natna chih thuakte, dawimatte, kaih veite leh zawte ahon pi ua, ana hihdam hi.
40004025	Galili gam a kipan, Dekapolis a kipan, Jerusalem leh Judia a kipan leh Jordan gal a kipan in mipi tampitak in amah azui uhi.
40005001	Huchi in mipite amuh in tang a paitou in atu a, akiang ah anungzuite hong pai uhi.
40005002	Huan thu agen a, amaute thu ahilh hi.
40005003	“Lungsim a gentheite ahampha uh, van-gam amaute a ahi ngal a.
40005004	Lungkhamte ahampha uh, khamuan a om ding ahi ngal ua.
40005005	Thunuailutte ahampha uh, leigou luah ding ahi ngal ua.
40005006	Diktatna lunggulh a gilkial leh dangtakte ahampha uh, tai ding ahi ngal ua.
40005007	Zahngaitheite ahampha uh, zahngaihna mu ding ahi ngal ua.
40005008	Lungsim a siangthoute ahampha uh, Pathian mu ding ahi ngal ua.
40005009	Lemna bawlte ahampha uh, Pathian tate chih ding ahi ngal ua.
40005010	Diktatna ziak a sawina thuakte ahampha uh, van-gam amau a ahi ngal a.
40005011	“Mi'n keimah ziak a ahon tai ua, ahon sawi ua, zuau a gilou chiteng a hon hek hun chiang un, na hampha uhi.
40005012	Kipak unla, nakpitak in nuam un, van ah na kipahman uh athupi ngal a; huchi mah bang in na ma ua zawlnei omte leng ana sawi zel uhi.
40005013	“Lei chi na hi uh, himahleh chi peng taleh, bang in ahia ahih al nawn ding? Paihkhiak a mihingte chilgawp ding louh ngal, bangmah ding in aphatuam kei hi.
40005014	“Khovel vak na hi uh. Mual tung a khopi om selguk theih ahi kei.
40005015	Mi'n khawnvak de in loh nuai ah akoih ngei kei ua, akoihna ah akoih zaw uhi. Huchi in insung a om tengteng atanvak hi.
40005016	Huchi mah bang in, na vak uh mite mitmuh ding in vak hen, huchi in na thil hoih hihte uh amu ding ua, na Pa uh van a om apahtawi thei ding uhi.
40005017	“Dan hiam zawlneite thu hihmang ding a hong pai in hon ngaihtuah kei un; hihmang ding a hong pai ka hi kei a, hihtangtung ding a hong pai ka hi zaw hi.
40005018	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, lei leh van aman ma, avek a atunkim masiah uh dan thu a sutvom neuchik hiam, thaivom neuchik hiam, khat leng amang kei hial ding.
40005019	Huchi in kuapeuh hiai thupiak neupente lak a khat bohsia a, huai zui dia mite thuhilh peuhmah, van-gam ah mineupen akichi ding; himahleh kuapeuh zui a thuhilh behlapte, van-gam ah milian akichi ding hi.
40005020	Na diktatna un laigelhmite leh Pharisaite diktatna akhup kei in zaw van-gam ah na lut kei hial ding uh chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40005021	“Nidanglai a mite kiang ah, ‘Tual na that ding ahi kei,’ kichi leh, ‘Kuapeuh tualthat vaihawmna a ding in lauhuai in a-om ding,’ kichi na zata uh.
40005022	Ke'n zaw, kuapeuh a-unau tung a heh vaihawmna a ding in lauhthawnhuaitak in a-om ding. Kuapeuh a-unau selphou vaihawmte hawmsak a om lauhthawnhuaitak in a-om ding; ‘Nang mihai’ chi kuapeuh Gehenna mei a paih lauhthawnhuaitak in a-om ding uh, chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40005023	Huaiziak in maitam a na thilpiak na lat lai a na unau in na tung ah lung hihlouhna anei chih na theihkhiakleh,
40005024	huai maitam ma a na thilpiak nusia in pai inla, na unau kilempih in, huai zoh in na thilpiak lan in.
40005025	Na langpa toh vaihawmna inn zuan a lampi a na paikhawm lai un kilempih in, huchi lou in zaw na langpa'n thukhenmi khut ah hon pe dia, thukhenmi'n mimanpa kiang ah hon pe dia; suangkul ah hon khum kha ding hi.
40005026	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, paihsa san khat nangawn na piak kim masiah huai a kipan in na pawtkhe kei hial ding hi.
40005027	“Nidanglai mite'n ‘Ang na kawm ding ahi kei’ achih uh na zata uhi.
40005028	Himahleh ke'n zaw kuapeuh etlahna lungsim toh numei en in, alungsim in angkawm ahi chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40005029	Na mit taklam in hon hihpukleh, khelkhia inla paihmang in; na pumpi Gehenna a pai sang in na pumpi a hiang khat manthat nang a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
40005030	Na khut taklam in hon hihpukleh, tankhia inla paihmang in; na pumpi a Gehenna a pai sang in, na pumpi a hiang khat manthat nang a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
40005031	“Kuapeuh zi ma in kimakna lai akiang ah pia heh, leng akichi.
40005032	Ke'n zaw kuapeuh kingaihna ziak hilou a zi ma in amah angkawmsak ahi, kuapeuh maksa nei nawn angkawm ahi chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40005033	“Nidanglai in mite kiang ah, ‘Zuau in kichiam ke'nla, Toupa kiang ah na kichiamnate tangtun zaw in,’ akichi chih leng na zata uhi.
40005034	Ke'n zaw ka hon hilh ahi, chiam himhim kichiam kei un; van lou in kichiam kei un, huai Pathian laltutphah ahi ngal a; lei lou in kichiam sam kei un, huai akhe ngakna ahi.
40005035	Jerusalem lou in kichiam sam kei un, huai Kumpipa thupitak khopi ahi.
40005036	Na lutang lou in na kichiam ding ahi sam kei, samzang khat lel leng na hihngou in, na hihvom thei ngal kei uhi.
40005037	Na thugen uh, ‘Ahi, hi henla,’ ‘Hilou, hilou,’ hi vanglak hen, akan-aval zaw gitlouhna asuak ahi.
40005038	“Mit sik in mit, ha sik in ha, akichi chih na zata uhi.
40005039	Ke'n zaw ka hon hilh ahi. Migilou nang kei un; na taklam biang bengte, alehlam leng doh zaw un.
40005040	Kuapeuh in na lak ah thusia bawl ut in, na puanak lak atupleh, na puanza leng lasak ngal in.
40005041	Huan mel khat pai dia hon phut kiang ah mel nih pai in.
40005042	Ahon ngen kiang ah pia inla, nang lak a leitawi nuam kiheisan ke'n.
40005043	“Na vengte it inla, na melmate hua in, akichi chih na zata uhi.
40005044	Ke'n zaw ka hon hilh ahi, na melmate uh it unla, hon sawite thumsak un.
40005045	Na Pa uh van a om tate na hihtheihna ding un. Ama'n migiloute leh mihoihte tung ah anisa asuaksak a, midiktatte leh diktatloute tung ah leng vuah azusak hi.
40005046	Nou hon itte kia na it un, kipahman bang ahia na muh ding uh? Siahkhon mite'n leng huchibang in ahih sam kei ua hia?
40005047	Huan na unaute kia uh chibai na buk un bang na hihtam tuan ua ahia? Zentelte'n leng hichibang in ahih sam kei ua hia?
40005048	Huchi in na Pa uh van a om ahoihkim sipsip bang in na hoihkim sipsip ding uh ahi.”
40006001	“Na diktatna nasepte uh mite ma a, mihing mitmuh ding a hih lou ding in pilvang un; huchi lou in zaw na Pa uh van a om kiang ah kipahman na nei kei ding uh.
40006002	“Huchi in mi kiang a thilpiak na piak in, milepchiahte'n mite phat alohtheihna ding ua sinagogte leh kongzing a ahih nak bang un na ma uah pengkul mut kei un. Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, amaute'n apahtakman uh angahta uh.
40006003	Nang zaw mi kiang a thilpiak na piak in, na khut taklam in ahih na khut veilam in thei kei hen;
40006004	na thilpiak aguk ahihtheihna ding in. Huchi in na Pa aguk a mupa'n pahtakman ahon pe ding hi.
40006005	“Huan na thum chiang un milepchiahte bang in na hih ding uh ahi kei; mi'n amuhtheihna ding un, sinagogte leh kongzing kathuam laitak khawng ah dingh kawm a thum a-ut se uhi. Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, amaute'n apahtakman uh angahta uh.
40006006	Nang zaw na thum chiang in, na dantan sunggil a lut in, na kongkhak khak inla, na Pa aguk a om kiang ah thum in. Huchi in na Pa aguk a mupa'n pahtakman ahon pe ding hi.
40006007	“Huan na thum un, Zentelte bang in gentuan mawkmawk kei un; apau tam ziak ua zak a om ding akisa uhi.
40006008	Huaiziak in amaute bang in om kei un, amah na nget ma ua na Pa un bangbang ahia na poimoh uh theigige ahi.”
40006009	Huchi in nou zaw hichibang in thum un: “Ka Pa uh van a om, na min kizahtak hen.
40006010	Na gam hong tung hen. Na deihlam van a akihih bang in, lei ah leng kihih hen.
40006011	Niteng ka nek khop uh an hon pia in.
40006012	Ka tung ua khialte ka ngaihdam bang un, nang leng ka khelhna uh hon ngaidam in.
40006013	Khemna ah hon pilut ke'nla, gilou lak ah hon hu zaw in, lalgam leh thilbawltheihna leh thupina Tangtawn a nang a ahih ziak in, Amen,” chi in.
40006014	“Mi atatleknate uh na ngaihdam uleh, na Pa uh van a om in leng hon ngaidam sam ding hi.
40006015	Himahleh mite tatleknate na ngaihdam kei ngal un, na Pa un na tatleknate uh angaidam sam kei ding hi.
40006016	“An na ngolh un leng, milepchiahte bang in nguimel pu kei un; amau zaw mite mitmuh a an ngawl a akilat theihna ding un, amel uh anguisak nak uhi. Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, apahtakman uh angahta uhi.
40006017	Nou zaw, an na ngolh chiang un na lu uh sathau nilh unla, na mai uh phiat un.
40006018	Huchi in na Pa uh aguk a om mitmuh lou ngal ah mihing mitmuh in an ngawl na bang kei ding ua; huchi in na Pa uh aguk a mupa'n pahtakman ahon pe ding hi.
40006019	“Lei a, leikha leh tui-ek in aneksiatna ah, gutate'n phenvang a agukna uah gou kikhol kei un.
40006020	Van ah, leikha leh tui-ek in aneksiatlouhna ah, gutate'n aphen ua aguklouhna uah, gou kikhol zaw un.
40006021	Na gou omna peuh uah na lungtang uh leng a-om ding hi.
40006022	“Pumpi khawnvak mit ahi; huchi a na mit achimleh avek in na pumpi atansuak ding hi.
40006023	Na mit asiatleh na pumpi avek in amial khin vek ding. Huchi in na sung a vak om pen mial hileh nak mial na tel in chia!
40006024	“Kuamah in heutu nih nna asemkop thei kei; khat hua in khat a-it ding; ahihkeileh, khat gum in khat asimmoh ding. Pathian leh sum nna na semkop thei kei ding uh.
40006025	“Huaiziak in ka hon hilh ahi. Bang ahia ka nek ding, bang ahia ka dawn ding, chi in na hinna thu uh leh; bang ahia ka silh ding, bang ahia ka ten ding, chi in na pumpi thu uh lunghimoh kei un. Nek ding sang in hinna athupizaw kei a hia? Silh-leten sang in pumpi leng athupizaw kei a hia?
40006026	Tungleng vasate en un; buh atuh kei ua, a-at kei uh, buh inn ah leng aseklut sam kei uh. Himahleh na Pa uh van a om in amaute avak hi. Noute amau sang a nakpitak a manphazaw hilou na hi uh maw?
40006027	Huan noute lak ah lunghihmoh ziak a kua'n ahia ama dunglam tong khat a hihsang thei tuan?
40006028	“Huan silh-le-ten thu bang ding a lunghimoh na hi ua? Gamlak lili pak khandan hoihtak in ngaihtuah un; nna asem kei ua, khau leng akhek kei uh.
40006029	Himahleh, ka hon hilh ahi, Solomon hial leng athupina tengteng a akizep in hiai lili pak khat bang in zep in a-om kei hi.
40006030	Huchi in gamlak loupa, tuni a hing a, azing a thuk a khul mai ding bawn Pathian in huchi lawmlawm a azepleh, aw nou gintawmte, silh-le-ten ding hon pe tawk na lou ding hiam?
40006031	“Huchi in bang ahia i nek ding, ahihkeileh bang ahia i dawn ding? Ahihkeileh bang silh in ahia i om ding chi in lunghimoh kei un.
40006032	Zentelte'n huai tengteng azong uhi. Hiaite tengteng na poimoh uh chih na Pa uh van a om in theigige ahi.
40006033	Agam leh ama diktatna zong masa un, huchi in hiaite tengteng ahon piak behlap ding hi.
40006034	“Huchi in azing a ding lunghimoh kei un; azing in amah a ding akilunghimoh tawm ding ziak in. Ni khat a ding in ni khat buaina ahun lel hi.”
40007001	“Vai hawmsak kei un, vai hawmsak na hihlouhna ding un.
40007002	Na vai hawmsak mah bang un hawmsak in na om ding uh, na tehna ngei mah un hon tehsak nawn ding uh.
40007003	Huan bangziak a, nangmah mit a singtum om ngaihtuah lou a, na unau mit a ninneng neuchik mu na hia?
40007004	Bangchi in na unau kiang ah, na mit a kipan huai ninneng neuchik hon lakhesak ve, na chih theih ding? Ngai in, nangmah mit mahmah ah singtum a-om nilouh ngal a.
40007005	Milepchiah, na mit a kipan singtum lakhe masa in; huchi in na unau mit a kipan ninneng neuchik lakkhiak ding kichiantak in na mu thei ding hi.
40007006	“Ui kiang ah thil siangthou pe kei un; vok ma ah na tuikepsuang uh pai kei un, achilse kha ding ua, huan kihei in nang ahon balzak kha ding uh.
40007007	“Ngen un, piak in na om ding uh; zong un, na mu ding uh; kiu un, hon honsak ding uh.
40007008	Kuapeuh angen in angah a; kuapeuh azong in amu a; akiu peuhmah honsak in a-om ding hi.
40007009	Ahihleh noute kuapeuh na tapa un tanghou ngen taleh, kua'n suang pe ding na hi ua?
40007010	Ahihkeileh ngasa ngen taleh, kua'n gul pe ding na hi ua?
40007011	Huchi hileh nou migilou in bawn, na tate uh thil hoih piakdan na theih un, na Pa uh van a om in angente thil hoih pe zaw sem lou ding hia?
40007012	“Huaiziak in mi'n na tung ua thil bangpeuh hih ding a na deih bang uh, mi tung ah leng hih sam un; huai Dan leh zawlneite thu ahi him hi.
40007013	“Kong kochik ah lut un; manthatna a paina kong aza a, alampi leng alian a, huai a lut tam leng atam mahmah uhi.
40007014	Hinna a paina kong akochik a, alampi aneu a, atawnte tawmchik ahi uh.
40007015	“Zawlnei takloute lak ah pilvang un, amaute belam vun silh in na kiang uah ahong pai nak ua, asunglam uh nge duhgawl pipi ahi uh.
40007016	Amaute agah uah na thei mai ding uh. Khaulingnei gui ah grep gah alou ngei ua hia? Lenling ah theipi a lou ngei ua hia?
40007017	Huchi mah bang in sing hoih peuhmah agah ahoih a; sing sia agah ase nak.
40007018	Sing hoih agah ase thei kei, sing sia agah ahoih thei sam kei hi.
40007019	Sing chih gah hoih lou aphuk ua, mei ah apai uhi.
40007020	Huaiziak in amaute agah uah na thei mai ding uhi.
40007021	“Toupa, Toupa, hon chi na peuh van-gam ah alut kei ding uh; ka Pa van a om deihlam hihte alut ding uhi.
40007022	Huai ni chiang in mi tampi'n, Toupa, na min in thute ka gen ua, na min in dawite ka delhkhia ua, na min in thillamdang tampi ka hih zel uh hilou hiam? achi ding uh.
40007023	Huai hun chiang in, ‘Nou thil gilou hihte aw, ka hon thei ngei kei, ka kiang a kipan paimang un, chi in amaute ka hilh ding hi.’
40007024	“Huchi in michih hiai ka thu za a, zui peuhmah, mipil suangpi tung a inn lammi toh ka tehpih ding hi.
40007025	Vuahpi hong zu in tui ahong khang a, huih ahong nung a, huai inn hon mut zialzial a; himahleh achim kei; suangpi tung a lepkip ahih ziak in.
40007026	Huan michih, hiai ka thu za a zom lou peuhmah, mihai piaunel tung a inn lammi toh ka teh ding hi.
40007027	Vuah hong zu in tui ahong khang a, huih ahong nung a, huai inn hon mut zialzial a; achimta a, huai inn anakchip ngel hi,” achi hi.
40007028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n huai thu agen zoh in, mipi'n athuhilh lamdang asa mahmah uh;
40007029	laigelhmite bang lou a, thuneihna neitak a amaute thu ahilh ziak in.
40008001	Huan tang a kipan a ahong paisuk nung in mipi tampitak in amah azuita uhi.
40008002	Ngai in, akiang ah phak khat ahong pai a, “Toupa, na utleh na hon hihsiangthou thei hi,” chi in abia hi.
40008003	Jesu'n sawk in akhoih a, “Ka ut hi, na siangthouta in,” achi hi. Thakhat in phak hong siangthou pah hi.
40008004	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kuamah hilh lou ding in pilvang in, himahleh siampu kiang ah va kilak inla, Mosi in thilpiak ding achihte lan in; amau hon theihchetna ding un,” achi hi.
40008005	Kapernaum a lut in, akiang ah sepaih zaheutu ahong pai hi.
40008006	“Toupa, inn ah ka sikha alum maimah a, nakpitak a hihnat in a-om,” chi in ana ngen hi.
40008007	Huan ama'n akiang ah, “Ka hong pai dia, ka hihdam ding,” achi hi.
40008008	Sepaih zaheutu'n, “Toupa, ka insung na lutna tak ahi kei, thu kia gen lechin ka sikha adam mai ding.
40008009	Kei leng mi thunuai a om ka hi a, ka nuai ah sepaihte a-om ua, ‘nang pai in,’ ka chihleh apai zel a; midang kiang ah, ‘nang hong pai in,’ ka chihleh ahong pai zel; ka sikha kiang ah leng, ‘hiai hih in’ ka chihleh ahih zel,” chi in adawng hi.
40008010	Huan Jesu'n hiai thu azak in lamdang asa a, amah zuite kiang ah, “Chihtaktak in, ka hon hilh ahi, Israelte lak ah hichi tel a ginna thupi ka mu kei hi.
40008011	K'on hilh ahi, suahlam leh tumlam a pan mi tampi ahong pai ding ua, van-gam ah Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang ah atu ding uh.
40008012	Gam tate zaw polam mial ah paihkhiak in a-om ding uh; huai ah kah leh hagawi a-om ding,” achi hi.
40008013	Huan Jesu'n sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, “Paita in, na gin bang in na tung ah tung hen,” achi a, huchi in sikha adamta hi.
40008014	Peter inn ah Jesu alut a, azi nu khosik a lum amu hi.
40008015	Akhut akhoihsak a, akhosik adaita; athou a, a-nna asepsakta hi.
40008016	Huan nitaklam ahong hih in akiang ah dawimatte tampi ahon pi ua; thu in dawite adelhkhia a, damlou tengteng ahihdam hi.
40008017	Zawlnei Isai in, “Amah ngei in i hatlouhnate ala a, i natnate apua,” chi a agen hong tangtun theihna ding in.
40008018	Jesu'n akimvel a mipi tampitak amuh in, gal khat lam a pai ding in thu apia hi.
40008019	Laigelhmi khat ahong pai a, akiang ah, “Heutupa, na paina peuh ah ka hon zui ding,” achi hi.
40008020	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Sehalte'n kua anei ua, tungleng vasate'n leng bu anei uh, himahleh Mihing Tapa in zaw lungakna ding mun anei kei,” achi hi.
40008021	Huan anungzuite lak a midang khat in, “Toupa, ka pa hon vuisak phot in,” achi hi.
40008022	Himahleh ama'n akiang ah, “Hon zui in; misi in amau misi kivui uhen,” achi hi.
40008023	Huan long sung ah alut a, anungzuite'n azui uhi.
40008024	Ngai in, tuipi ah huihpi hattak ahong nung a, huchi in tuikihot in long atumtou a; himahleh amah a-ihmu hi.
40008025	Huan akiang a hong pai in aphawng ua, “Toupa, hon hondam in, mangthang ding ka kei uhiam,” achi uhi.
40008026	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou ginglahte aw, bangziak a lau na hi ua?” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, huih leh tuipi atai a; huan ahong dai sipsipta hi.
40008027	Huan mite'n lamdang asa mahmah uhi. “Hiai mi bangchidan ahia, huih leh tuipi nangawn in athu aman uh?” achi uhi.
40008028	Huan gal khat lam Gadaren mite gam atun in dawimat nih, han a kipan hong pawt in, ahon tuak ua; ahang mahmah ua, huchi in huai lampi ah kuamah apai thei kei uhi.
40008029	Ngai in, amau, “Pathian Tapa kou leh nang bang ahia i kizolhna om? Hunchiam tun ma a koute hon gawt ding a hong pai na hi maw?” chi in akikou uhi.
40008030	Huan a-omna ua kipan gamla khop ah vokhon tampi agamta uhi.
40008031	Huan dawite'n, “N'on delhkhiak aleh huai a vokhonte sung ah hon lutsak in,” chi in akiang ah nakpi in angen uhi.
40008032	Ama'n akiang uah, “Pai un,” achi a, huchi in ahong pawtkhia ua, vok sung ah alut ua; ngai in, vokhon tengteng tui gei ken lak ah ataisuk ua, tuipi a tailut in, tui ah amangthangta uhi.
40008033	Huan ganvulte atai ua, khua ah apai ua, dawimatte tung a thil hong tungte bangkim ahilhta uhi.
40008034	Ngai in, akhua in Jesu mu ding in ahong pawt ua; amah amuhtak un agam ua kipan a pawtkhe ding in nakpi in angen uhi.
40009001	Huan long ah lut in agalkah a, ama khua ahong tung hi.
40009002	Ngai in, mizeng khat damlou, lupna a lum ahon zawng ua; huchi in Jesu'n aginna uh mu in, zeng damloupa kiang ah, “Tapa, khamuangtak in om in, na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita,” achi hi.
40009003	Ngai in, laigelhmi kuate hiam akingaihtuah ua, “Hiai mi'n Pathian agensia,” achi uh.
40009004	Huchi in Jesu'n angaihtuahte uh athei a, “Bangziak a na lungtang ua gilou ngaihtuah na hi ua? achi hi.
40009005	‘Na khelhnate ngaihdam hi hen’ chih leh ‘thou inla, khe in pai in, chih koi abaihlamzaw?’
40009006	Himahleh Mihing Tapa in leitung ah khelhnate ngaihdam theihna anei chih na theihna ding un,” zeng damloupa kiang ah, “Thou in, na lupna la inla, na inn ah pai in,” achi hi.
40009007	Huchi in athou a, a-inn ah apaita hi.
40009008	Himahleh, mipi'n amuh un lamdang asa ua, huchibang hihtheihna mihingte kiang a pepa, Pathian apahtawita uhi.
40009009	Huai a kipan Jesu apai zel a, siah piakna mun a tu, mi khat, amin Matthai amu a; akiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi a, huchi in athou a, azuita hi.
40009010	Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-inn a ankuang a-um lai in, ngai in, siahkhonte leh mikhial tampi ahong pai ua, Jesu leh anungzuite a-umpih uhi.
40009011	Pharisaite'n huai amuh un, anungzuite kiang ah, “Bangziak a na heutupa un siahkhonte leh mikhialte kiang a ne ahia?” achi uhi.
40009012	Himahleh Jesu'n huai azaktak in, “Midamtheite'n daktor akiphamoh kei ua, midamtheiloute'n akiphamohzaw uhi.
40009013	Huchi in ‘kithoihna deih lou in zahngaihna ka deih hi,’ chih, a-omdan va zil un, midiktatte sam dia hong pai ka hi kei a, mikhialte sam ding a hong pai ka hi zaw,” achi hi.
40009014	Huchih lai in akiang ah Johan nungzuite ahong pai ua, “Bangziak a kou leh Pharisaite'n an ngawl zelzel ua, na nungzuite'n ngawl lou uh ahia?” achi uhi.
40009015	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Moupite kiang a apasal a-om lai teng moupite'n asuun thei ua hia? Himahleh, akiang ua kipan apasal pimang nite ahong tung ding a, huai hun chiang in an angawl ding uhi.
40009016	Huan kuamah in puan lui puan tui khai louh them in athuap ngei kei; athuapna in puan akaihkek ding ziak in, ahong nakkek zaw sem ding hi.
40009017	Kuamah in uain thak savun uain thawl lui ah athun ngei kei uh; huchi lou in zaw savun thawlte apuakkek dia, uain abo dia, savun thawl leng hong kise ding; huaiziak in savun uain thawl thak ah uain thak athun zaw ua, huchi in hoihtak in a-om tuaktuak hi,” achi hi.
40009018	Huan akiang ua agen laitak in, ngai in, vaihawmpa khat ahong pai a, amah bia in, “Tu mah in ka tanu asi a; himahleh hong pai inla, atung ah na khut koih lechin ahong hing nawn ding,” achi hi.
40009019	Huchi in Jesu athou a, azuita a, nungzuite'n leng azui uhi.
40009020	Ngai in, numei khat kum sawm leh kum nih sipawt damlou, anung ah hong pai a, apuan mong akhoihsak hi.
40009021	“Apuan mongkai khoih lel leng, hihdam in ka om mai ding,” alungsim in achi hi.
40009022	Huan Jesu akihei a, amah amu a, “Ka tanu, khamuangtak in om in; na ginna na dampih hi,” achi hi. Huchi in numeinu huai dakkal a kipan adamta hi.
40009023	Vaihawmpa inn ah Jesu alut a, tamngai tumte leh mipi thawm ngaih vengvungte ava muh in,
40009024	“Pawt un; naupang asi kei, ihmu ahi zaw,” achi hi. Amau bel amah anuihsan maimah uh.
40009025	Himahleh mipite polam a apawtsak zoh in amah alut a, naupang khut ah alen a, hong thou maimah hi.
40009026	Hiai tanchin huai gam tengteng ah athangkheta hi.
40009027	Huai a kipan Jesu apai zel a, mittaw nih in, “David Tapa, ka tung uah zahngai in,” chi a kikou in azui uhi.

40009029	Ama'n amit uh akhoihsak a, “Na gintak bang un na tung uah tung hen,” achi hi.
40009030	Huchi in amitte uh hong vakta hi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Kuamah theih louh ding in pilvang un,” achi bilbel hi.
40009031	Himahleh amau apawt ua, huai gam tengteng ah atanchin agenthangta uhi.
40009032	Huai a pan apawt laitak un, ngai in, dawimat pau thei lou khat akiang ah ahon pi uhi.
40009033	Huai dawi adelhkhiaktak in pau thei lou tuh ahong pauta a; mipite'n lamdang asa mahmah ua, “Israelte lak ah hichibang akimu ngei kei hi,” achi uhi.
40009034	Pharisaite'n bel, “Dawi kumpipa ziak in ahi, dawite adelhkhiak nak,” achi uh.
40009035	Huan Jesu'n asinagogte ua hilh a, lalgam tanchinhoih gen in, damlouhna chiteng leh natna chiteng ahihdam a, kholian leh khoneu tengteng atawn vialvial hi.
40009036	Huchi in mipite amuh in, chingtu nei lou belamte bang a gimthuak leh dalh a a-om ziak un alainat mahmah hi.
40009037	Anungzuite kiang ah, “Buh lak ding atam mahmah a, himahleh sem mite atawm uhi.
