40010001	Huai zoh in anungzui sawm-le-nihte akiang ah asamkhawm a, akiang uah khaninte tung leh amau hawlkhe ding, damlouhna chiteng leh natna chiteng hihdam ding in athuneihna apia hi.
40010002	Huai sawltak sawm-le-nihte min hiaite ahi: Amasapen in Simon Peter leh a-unau Andru; Zebedai tapa Jakob leh a-unau Johan,
40010003	Philip leh Bartholomai; Thomas leh siahkhon Matthai; Alphai tapa Jakob leh Thaddai;
40010004	Kanaan mi Simon leh zuausan a mansakpa Judas Iskariot.
40010005	Hiai sawm-le-nihte Jesu'n asawlkhia a, akiang uah huchi in thu apia hi. “Zentelte lam ah pai kei unla, Samari mite khua ah leng lut kei un.
40010006	Himahleh Israel inkuan belam mangte kiang ah pai zaw un.
40010007	Huan na pai un, van-gam anaita, chi in thu gen zel un.
40010008	Damloute hihdam unla, misite kaithou unla, phakte hihsiangthou unla; dawite hawlkhia un, athawn in na mu ua, athawn in pia un.
40010009	Na kawnggak uah dangka-eng hiam, dangka hiam, dal dangka hiam vom kei un.
40010010	Zinna a ding in kawlzal hiam, puanak nih hiam, khedap hiam, chiangkhun hiam tawi sam kei un; nasemmi nek ding mu tak ahi.
40010011	“Huan kholian hi in khoneu hitaleh na lutna peuh uah nou hon tungsaktak mi zongkhia unla, na pawt nawn mateng uh huai inn ah tung den un.
40010012	A-inn ua na lut peuh chiang un, chibai buk un.
40010013	Huai inn a mite chibai buktak ahih ualeh atung uah na khamuanna uh atung dia; atak kei ualeh nou tung ah akhamuanna uh hong kik nawn ding hi.
40010014	Kuapeuh nou hon kipahpih lou a, na thu uh leng angaihkhiak keileh, huai inn a kipan leh huai khua a kipan na pawt chiang un, na khepek ua leivui tatkhia un.
40010015	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, thukhen ni chiang in huai khua sang in Sodom leh Gomorrah gam thuak ding adan a-omzaw ding hi.
40010016	“Ngai dih ua, ngia lak a belam om bang in ka hon sawlkhia hi; gul bang a pil in, vakhu bang a poi khoih lou in om un.
40010017	Himahleh mihing lak ah pilvang un; vaihawmte ahon mansak ding uh; sinagogte a hon vuak ding ziak un.
40010018	Keimah ziak in gamukte leh kumpipate ma ah amaute leh Zentelte theihsakna ding in hon pi ding uhi.
40010019	Himahleh ahon matsak chiang un, bang chih ding ahia, bang thu ka gen dia? chi in lungkham kei un; ahuntak in na gen ding uh ahon theisak ding hi.
40010020	Agenpa noumau na hi kei ding ua, na Pa uh Kha in noumau ah agen zaw ding hi.
40010021	“Huan hihlup ding in unaupa leh unaupa akimansak ding ua, pa'n leng ata amansak ding; tate'n leng anu leh apate uh adou ding uh, ahihlumsak ding uh.
40010022	Ka min ziak in mi tengteng huat na hi ding ua; himahleh atawp pha a thuak ngap peuhmah hotdam in a-om ding hi.
40010023	Huchi in hiai khua ahon gawt chiang un, kho dang ah taisan un; chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, Mihing Tapa hong pai ma in Israel gam a khopite na siksuak kei ding uhi.
40010024	“Nungzui aheutu tung ah a-om kei; sikha leng apu tung ah a-om kei hi.
40010025	Nungzui aheutu bang a a-om leh sikha apu bang a a-om ahun lel hi. Inn neipa bawn Beelzibul achih uleh, a-inkuanpihte nak chih na tel un chia!
40010026	“Huaiziak in amaute kihta kei un; lang lou ding a sel bangmah a-om kei, theih louh ding a iim bangmah a-om kei hi.
40010027	Mial a nou ka hon hilh vak ah na gen ding ua; bilbul ana zak uh intung a tuang in tangkoupih un.
40010028	Huan pumpi that a kha that theiloute kihta kei unla; Gehenna a kha leh pumpi hihmang theipa kihta zaw un.
40010029	Kawlgit nih dal dangka khat in azuak zel uh hilou hiam? Himahleh alak ua khat leng na Pa uh theih louh in lei ah ake kei ding hi.
40010030	Na samzangte uh nangawn leng sim vek ahi.
40010031	Huaiziak in lau kei un; kawlgit tampi sang in na manphazaw uhi.
40010032	“Huchi in mite ma a hon gum peuhmah, ka Pa van a om ma ah ka gum sam ding hi.
40010033	Himahleh kuapeuh mite ma a hon kitheihmohbawl, ka Pa van a om ma ah ka kitheihmohbawl sam ding.
40010034	“Leitung a lemna lengsak ding a hong pai hon sa kei un; lemna lengsak ding hilou in namsau lengsak ding a hong pai ka hi zaw.
40010035	Mi apa dousak ding in, tanu anu dousak ding in, mou anu dousak ding a hong pai ka hi.
40010036	Mi amelma amah inkuanpihte lak a mi mah ahi ding hi.
40010037	“Kuapeuh anu hiam, apa hiam, kei sang a itzaw tuh ka mi hi tak ahi kei; kuapeuh atanu hiam atapa hiam kei sang a itzaw leng, ka mi hi tak ahi kei.
40010038	Kuapeuh ama kros pua a hon zui lou ka mi hi tak ahi kei.
40010039	Kuapeuh ahinna mu in amansuah ding a, keimah ziak a ahinna mansuah in amu ding.
40010040	“Kuapeuh nou hon kipahpih in kei hon kipahpih ahi a, kuapeuh kei hon kipahpih ahon sawlpa kipahpih ahi.
40010041	Zawlnei kuahiam, zawlnei ahih ziak a kipahpih in zawlnei pahtakman angah ding a; kuapeuh midiktat kuahiam midiktat ahih ziak a kipahpih in midiktat pahtakman angah ding hi.
40010042	Huan kuapeuh hiai mineuchikte lak a khat kiang a, nungzui ahih ziak a tuisik nou khat kia pia leng, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, ama pahtakman amansuah kei hial ding,” achi hi.
40011001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n anungzui sawm-le-nihte thu apiak zoh in huai a pan in akhopite uah sinsak ding leh thugen ding in apaita uhi.
40011002	Johan in suangkul sung a Khrist thilhihte ana zak in anungzuite sawl in akiang ah,
40011003	“Hong pai dingpa na hi hia, ahihkeileh midang hungaih lai ding ka hi uhiam?” achisak hi.
40011004	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Pai nawnta unla, thil na muh uh leh na zak uh Johan kiang ah va hilh un;
40011005	mittawte amit uh ahong vakta, khebaite khe in ahong pai ua, phakte ahong siangthouta ua, nangongte leng abil uh ahong vakta, misite leng kaihthoh in a-omta ua; mizawngte'n leng tanchinhoih hilh adongta uhi.
40011006	Kuapeuh ka tung a lung hihlouhna mu lou ahampha hi,” chi in adawng hi.
40011007	Huai mite apaitak un, Jesu'n mipite kiang ah Johan thu agenta hi, “Bang en ding a gamdai a paikhia na hi ua? Sialluang huih mut ling maw?
40011008	Ahihkeileh bang en ding pen a paikhia na hita ua? Puannem silh maw? Ngai un, puannem silhte zaw kumpipate inn ah ei ve a-om uh.
40011009	Ahihkeileh bangziak pentak in ahia na paikhiak uh? Zawlnei en ding in maw? Ahi tawk vo oi, ka hon chi ahi; zawlnei sang a leng thupizaw.
40011010	“En dih, na ma ah ka thangkou ka sawl ahi, ama'n na ma ah na lampite abawl ding chih atanchin agelh uh hiai mipa ahi.
40011011	“Chihtaktak in, ka hon hilh ahi, numei suan lak ah baptispa Johan sang a thupizaw apiang kei; himahleh van-gam a mineupen amah sang in athupizaw hi.
40011012	Baptispa Johan om a kipan tutan in van-gam in hiamgamna atuak nak, hiamgamte'n thagum in ala uhi.
40011013	Zawlneite tengteng leh Dan thu in Johan ahong om tanpha in ana genkhol zel uhi.
40011014	Na pom nop uleh, huai zaw Elijah hong pai dingpa mah ahi.
40011015	Kuapeuh zakna ding a bil nei in za hen!
40011016	“Himahleh hiai khangte bang toh ka tehpih dia? Naupang dawr mun a tu a, alawmte sam a,
40011017	tamngai hon tumsak ung a, lam lou uchin a, kap huphup ung a, suun lou uchin a, chite bang ahi uh.
40011018	Johan ahong pai a, ne in adawn kei a, dawi zawl achi uhi.
40011019	Mihing Tapa ahong pai a, ne in adawn a, ‘En dih ua, an haipa, uain haipa, siahkhonte leh mikhialte lawm,’ achi uh. Hinapi in athilhih in pilna siam atan uh,” achi hi.
40011020	Huan akisik louh ziak un, athil thupi hihtamna khopite atai hi.
40011021	“Korazin, na tung agik e; Bethsaida, na tung agik e; noumau a thil thupi kihihte Tura leh Sidon a hih hileh, sai-ip puan silh a vut lak a tu in akisikta ding uhi.
40011022	Himahleh ka hon hilh ahi, thukhen ni chiang in nou thuak ding sang in Tura leh Sidon khua thuak ding adan a-om zaw ding hi.
40011023	Huan nang Kapernaum, van tan a tawisang na hi dia hia? Misikhua tan a paisuk ding na hita ve, nangmah a thil thupitak kihihte Sodom a hih hileh, tutan in a-om lai ding hi.
40011024	Himahleh ka hon hilh ahi, thukhen ni chiang in na thuak ding sang in Sodom gam thuak ding adan a-om zaw ding,” achi hi.
40011025	Huchih lai in Jesu'n ahoupih a, “Pa aw, leitung leh van Toupa, nang mipil leh mibengvakte kiang ah hiai thu na iim a, naungekte kiang a na theihsak ziak in ka hon phat hi.
40011026	Ahi, Pa, tua bang hih, nang ngaih in ahoih ahi.
40011027	Ka Pa'n thil bangkim hon kemsakta; Pa lou in kuamah in Tapa athei kei; Tapa leh akiang ua Tapa in akitheihsak utnate kia lou ngal in kuamah in Pa athei kei hi.
40011028	“Nou semgim leh puakgik po tengteng aw, ka kiang ah hong pai un, keima'n khawlna ka hon pe ding hi.
40011029	Ka hakkol pua unla, kei a kipan zil un; thunuailut leh lungtang kingainiamtak ka hi; huchi in na kha ua ding in khawlna na mu ding uh.
40011030	Ka hakkol puak anuam a, ka puakgik leng azang hi,” achi hi.
40012001	Huchih lai in, Sabbath ni in buhlei kantan in Jesu apai hi. Nungzuite agilkial ua, nek ding in buhvuite akhiak uhi.
40012002	Pharisaite'n huai amuh un, akiang ah, “En dih, na nungzuite'n Sabbath ni in hihsiang lou ahih uh,” achi uhi.
40012003	Jesu'n akiang uah, “David in agilkial lai a alawmte toh athilhih uh na sim kei ua hia?
40012004	Huchi a Pathian inn a alut a, amah leh alawmte'n nek siang louh, siampute kia nek siang tanghou koihtuam anek thu uh?
40012005	Ahihkeileh Sabbath ni in tempul a siampu omte'n Sabbath ni abohsiat un leng siamtang in a-om uh chih Dan thu na sim kei ua hia?
40012006	Huchi ahih ngalleh, tempul sang a thupizaw hiai ah a-om chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40012007	Himahleh ‘kithoihna deih lou in, zahngaihna ka deih’ chih a-omdan na thei hi le uchin, mi siamtangte siam louh tangsak lou ding hi ve uchin.
40012008	Mihing Tapa zaw Sabbath' Toupa ahi,” achi hi.
40012009	Huan huai a kipan apai a, asinagogte uah ava lut hi.
40012010	Ngai dih, mi khat khutzaw ana om a, amah ahektheihna ding un, “Sabbath ni a hihdam asiang hia?” chi in Jesu adong uhi.
40012011	Ama'n akiang uah, “Noute lak ah kuapeuh in belam khat nei unla, Sabbath ni in kokhuk ah ke taleh kua ahia len a kaikhe lou ding?
40012012	Belam khat sang in mihing khat bangchi lel a manphazaw ahia? Huaiziak in Sabbath ni in hihhoih asiang hi,” achi hi.
40012013	Huai zoh in, huai mi kiang ah, “Na khut zan in,” achi a, huchi in azan a, alangkhat bang in adamsiangta hi.
40012014	Pharisaite bel apawt ua, amah ahihlup theihdan ding uh ngaihtuah in akihou uhi.
40012015	Jesu'n huai thu atheih in huai mun a kipan in akihemmang hi. Himahleh mi tampi in amah azui ua, adamloute uh ana hihdam vek hi.
40012016	Atanchin genthang het lou ding in akiang uah achi hi.
40012017	Huai zawlnei Isai thugenkholh tangtunna ding ahi zaw hi;
40012018	“En dih, ka sikha ka tel, ka deihtak, ka lungsim in apahtak mahmah, atung ah ka Kha ka koih dia, huchi in Zentelte kiang ah dik a vaihawmna apuangkhe ding hi;
40012019	Asel kei ding a, akikou sam kei ding, kongzing ah kuamah in a-aw aza kei ding uh.
40012020	Dik a vaihawmna avualzohsak mateng sialluang kigawpsa ahihtankhe kei ding a, meivak kuang liakliak ahihmit sam kei ding hi.
40012021	Amah min ah Zentelte'n lametna angah ding uh,” achi hi.
40012022	Huchih lai in dawimat mittaw pau thei lou khat akiang ah hon pi ua; ama'n ahihdam a, pau thei lou hong pau in, ahon mutheita hi.
40012023	Huchi in mipi tengteng in lamdang asa mahmah ua, “Hiai mipa, David Tapa hilou ahi maw?” achi uhi.
40012024	Himahleh Pharisaite'n huai azak phet un, “Hiai mi'n dawite kumpipa, Beelzibul ziak lou in dawite adelhkhe kei ding,” achi uhi.
40012025	Jesu'n amaute ngaihtuahte athei a, akiang uah, “Koi gam leng amah kidou amangthang nak; koi khua hiam, inkuan khat leng amah kidou, akhosuak kei ding hi.
40012026	Setan in Setan mah adelhkhiak in amah-le-amah kidou hi ding ahi a; agam bangchi in adingh dia le?
40012027	Huan kei Beelzibul ziak a dawite delhkhia ka hihleh, na tate un kua ziak in ahia adelhkhiak uh? Huaiziak in amaute noute tung a thukhen mite ahi ding uhi.
40012028	Himahleh, ke'n Pathian Kha ziak a dawite delhkhia ka na hihleh, Pathian lalgam na kiang uah hong tungta ahi ding hi.
40012029	“Huchi ahih kei ngal in, mi'n mihat agak masak phot keileh bangchi in ahia mihat inn alut a, asum alaksak theih ding? Huai nung in a-inn alok mai ding hi.
40012030	“Kuapeuh kei lam a pang lou, hon dou ahi; kuapeuh hon lakkhawmpih lou in athehzak ahi.
40012031	Huaiziak in ka hon hilh ahi, mi akhelhna chiteng uah leh Pathian agensiatna chiteng uh ngaihdam ahi ding ua; Kha hilhial agensiatna ngaihdamsak ahi kei ding hi.
40012032	Kuapeuh Mihing Tapa kalh, akalhna uh ngaihdamsak ahi ding; kuapeuh Kha Siangthou hilhial kalh zaw huai akalhna uh, tu damsung leh hun hong tung ding ah leng, ngaihdam ahi kei ding,” achi hi.
40012033	“Sing hoih agah leng ahoih na chih kei ngal uleh, sing sia agah leng asia, chi vanglak un; sing agah a akitheih ziak in.
40012034	Nou gul suante aw, nou gilou napi in bangchi in ahia thuhoih na gen theih ding uh? Lungtang a dim val kam in agen zel hi.
40012035	Mihoih in agoubawm hoih a kipan thil hoihte alakhia a, migilou in agoubawm hoih lou a kipan thil hoih lou alakhe zel hi.
40012036	“Huan ka hon hilh ahi. Mite'n thugina lou agen peuhmah uh huai thu tanchin mah vaihawm ni chiang in agen ding uhi.
40012037	Na thu in siam ahon tangsak ding a, na thu mah in siam louh ahon tangsak ding hi,” achi hi.
40012038	Huai lai in laigelhmite leh Pharisaite lak a mi kuate hiam in amah ahoupih ua akiang ah, “Heutupa, nang a kipan chiamtehna muh ka ut uh,” achi uhi.
40012039	Ama'n akiang uah, “Khang gilou leh angkawmte'n chiamtehna azong ua, himahleh zawlnei Jonah chiamtehna lou ngal akiang uah chiamtehna piak ahi kei ding hi.
40012040	Ngapi gilsung a Jonah ni thum leh zan thum a-om bang in, Mihing Tapa ni thum leh zan thum lei gilsung ah a-om sam ding hi.
40012041	Nineveh khomite thukhen ni chiang in hiai khangte kiang ah adingh sam ding ua, siam louh atangsak ding uh. Jonah thugen ziak in akisik ua; ngai dih ua, Jonah sang a thupizaw hiai ah a-om hi.
40012042	Thukhen ni chiang in hiai khangte kiang ah simlam kumpinu athou ding a, siam louh atangsak ding hi, Solomon pilna ngaikhe ding in kawlmong a kipan ahong pai ngal a; ngai dih ua, hiai ah Solomon sang a thupizaw a-om hi!
40012043	“Huan mihing sung a kipan a dawi nin pawt in, khawlna zong in tui omlouhna mun ah avakvak a, amu kei hi.
40012044	Huan ‘ka pawtna inn mah ah ka kik nawn mai ding,’ achi a; ava tunleh ahawm a zephoihsa in ava mu hi.
40012045	Huaitak in ava pai a, amah sang a gilouzaw dawi dang sagih ahon pi a, huai mi sung ah alut ua, atengta uhi; huai mihing omdan nanung amasa sang in ahong hoih kei zaw hi. Tua bang mah in, hiai khang giloutakte tung ah ahong om ding,” chi in adawng hi.
40012046	Mipite kiang a thu agen lai in ngai dih, amah houpih tum in inpua ah anu leh a-unaute adingh uhi.
40012047	Mi khat in akiang ah, “Ngai dih, na nu leh na unaute nang hon houpih tum in inpua ah adingh nilouh uh,” achi hi.
40012048	Ama'n ahilhpa kiang ah, “Ka nu kua ahia? Ka unaute leng kuate ahi ua?” chi in adawng hi.
40012049	Huan nungzuite lam a akhut zan in, “En un, ka nu leh ka unaute;
40012050	kuapeuh ka Pa van a om deihlam hih phot ka unaupa leh ka unaunu leh ka nu ahi uh,” achi hi.
40013001	Huai ni'n inn a kipan Jesu apaikhia a, tuipi gei ah atu hi.
40013002	Huan akiang ah mipi tampitak ahong kikhawm ua, huchi in long ah atuang a, atu a, mipi tengteng piautak ah adingh uhi.
40013003	Gentehna in thu tampi akiang uah agen hi, “Ngai dih ua, buhchithehpa buhchi theh in akuan hi.
40013004	Buhchi atheh lai in akhen lamsik ah akia a, vasate'n ane zou uhi.
40013005	Akhen suangsilei lak ah akia a, lei asah louh ziak in hong pou pah hi.
40013006	Himahleh ni asuah in haivuai in a-om a; zung aneih louh ziak in avuai maimah hi.
40013007	Huan akhen loulingnei lak ah akia a, loupa hong pousang a; adepmangta hi.
40013008	Akhen lei hoih ah akia a, khenkhat aleh za, khenkhat aleh sawmguk, khenkhatte aleh sawmthum in hong gah uhi.
40013009	Kuapeuh bil nei in, za hen!” achi hi.
40013010	Huan nungzuite ahong pai ua, akiang ah, “Bangziak a gentehna a thu gen na hia?” achi uhi.
40013011	Ama'n adawng a akiang uah, “Van lalgam thuguk noute theih phal ahi a, amau theih zaw phal ahi kei hi.
40013012	Kuapeuh anei piak behlap ahi ding a, ahau ding; kuapeuh anei lou aneihsun nangawn laksak ahi ding hi.
40013013	Huchi ahih ziak in akiang uah gentehna in thu ka gen ahi; ‘mu napi in amu kei nak ua, za napi in atheisiam kei nak uh.’
40013014	Isai thugenkholh atung uah atung hi; ‘Bil in zaw na za ding ua, theih bel na theisiam kei ding uh; muh zaw na mu ding ua, theih bel na thei kei ding uh.
40013015	Hiai chite lungtang ananggawpta, abilte uh angong a, amitsi ua, huchi lou in zaw amit un amu ding ua, abil un aza kha ding ua, alungtang un atheisiam ding ua, ahong kik nawn kha ding ua, amau ka na hihdam kha ding,’ ana chi hi.
40013016	“Nou mitte zaw ahampha hi, amuh ziak in; na bil uh leng ahampha hi, azak ziak in.
40013017	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, zawlnei tampi leh midiktat tampi'n leng na thil muhte uh muh a-ut ua, himahleh amu kei uh; na thilzakte uh zak a-ut ua, himahleh aza kei uhi.
40013018	“Huaiziak in buhchithehpa gentehna thu za un.
40013019	Kuapeuh in lalgam thu bil a azak a, atheihsiam keileh migilou hong pai in, alungtang a thehsa alaksak nak hi. Huai tuh lamsik a theh ahi.
40013020	Suangsilei a theh bel, thu za a kipaktak a pom bang ahi.
40013021	Himahleh amah ah zung a-om kei a, sawt louchik kia a-om a, thu ziak a gimthuakna leh sawina ahong omtak in apuk pah hi.
40013022	Huan loulingnei lak a thehte tuh thu za a, himahleh khovel awlmohna leh hauhsakna khemna in thu adep a, gah lou in ahong om hi.
40013023	Huan lei hoih tung a theh tuh thu bil a za a, theisiam ahi; huai tuh agah ngei a, khenkhat aleh za, khenkhat aleh sawmguk, khenkhat aleh sawmthum in apung,” achi hi.
40013024	Akiang uah gentehna dang agen nawn a, “Van lalgam tuh mi alou a chi hoih thehpa toh teh ahi.
40013025	Himahleh mi a-ihmut kal in melma ahong pai a, buhlak ah buhlem atheh a, apaimang nawnta hi.
40013026	Huan buh hong pou a, ahong vuih in, buhlem leng ahong kilang sam hi.
40013027	Huchi in inn neipa sikhate ahong pai ua, akiang ah, Pu, na lou a chi hoih theh lou na hi maw? Buhlemte koi a kipan a hong om ahia? achi uhi.
40013028	Ama'n akiang uah, melma in na theh ahi ve,” achi hi. Sikhate'n akiang ah ahihleh huaite va lakhawm le ung hoih na sa hia? achi uhi.
40013029	Ama'n bel, “sa lou e, buhlem na lakkhawmna lam uah buhtak na botkhawm kha ding uh.
40013030	Buh lak dong in poukhawm uheh; buhlak hun chiang in buh atte kiang ah, buhlem lakhawm masa phot unla, hal ding in lomgak un; buhtak pen bel ka buh inn ah seklut un, ka chi ding,” achi hi.
40013031	Akiang uah gentehna dang agen nawn a, “Van lalgam tuh mi'n ankam chi tang khat alak a, alou a atheh bang ahi.
40013032	Huai chi laklak ah aneupen a; himahleh ahong pousang chiang in loupa lak ah alianpen a, sing hong hi a, huchi in tungleng vasate ahong pai ua, ahiang ah agiak uh,” achi hi.
40013033	Akiang uah gentehna dang agen nawn a, “Van lalgam tuh numei in silngou anbuang tehna thum lak a abilh a, avek a athoh mateng aphum bang ahi,” achi hi.
40013034	Jesu'n mipite kiang ah gentehna in huai tengteng agen a, gentehna lou in akiang uah bangmah agen kei hi.
40013035	Zawlnei in, “Gentehna in ka kam ka ka ding a, leilung pian tung a kipat thil kisel ka genkhe ding,” chi a agen ahong tuntheihna ding in.
40013036	Huai lai in mipite apaisan a, inn ah alut a, nungzuite akiang ah ahong pai ua, “Lou a buhlem gentehna thu hon hilhchian in,” achi uhi
40013037	Ama'n adawng a, “Chi hoih thehpa Mihing Tapa ahi a; lou bel khovel ahi.
40013038	Chi hoihte gam tate ahi ua; buhlemte migilou tate ahi.
40013039	Melma buhlem thehpa diabol ahi a, buhlak hun khovel tawpna ding ahi; a-atte angelte ahi uhi.
40013040	Huchi in buhlemte alakhawm ua mei a ahal bang un khovel tawpna ah a-om ding hi.
40013041	Mihing Tapa in angelte asawlkhe ding a, gam a kipan hihkhialsakte leh thil hihkhialte tengteng akhawmkhe ding uh.
40013042	Amaute haltuina mei ah apai ding ua, huai lai ah kah leh hagawi a-om ding hi.
40013043	Huai hun chiang in midiktatte a Pa uh gam ah ni bang in atang ding uhi. Zakna ding a bil nei peuh in za hen!
40013044	“Van lalgam tuh lou a gou phumguk bang ahi; mi'n huai mu in, asel nawn a, akipah ziak in aneih tengteng azuak a, huai lou aleita hi.
40013045	“Huan van-gam tuh sumsinmi tuikepsuang hoihtak zongmi bang ahi nawn hi.
40013046	Huan ama'n tuikepsuang manphatak khat amu a, aneih tengteng zuak in aleita hi.
40013047	“Van lalgam tuh lenpi, tuipi a paih, chi chih tunkhawmna bang ahi nawn hi.
40013048	Adimtak in agei ah akaikhia ua, atu ua, bawm ah ahoih teng alakhawm ua, ahoihloute apaih uh bang ahi.
40013049	Khovel tawp hun chiang in huchibang mah in a-om ding, angelte ahong pawt ding ua, midiktatte lak ah migiloute akhenkhe ding uh.
40013050	Huchi in haltuina mei ah apai ding ua, huai ah kah leh hagawi a-om ding,” achi hi.
40013051	Jesu mah in akiang uah, “Huai tengteng na theisiam uhia?” achi a, amau akiang ah, “Thei e,” achi uhi.
40013052	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Huaiziak in laigelhmi van-gam thuhilh a om peuhmah, inn neipa, agoubawm a kipan a thil thakte leh thil luite pholhkhepa bang ahi,” achi hi.
40013053	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n huai gentehnate agen khit in huai a kipan apaita hi.
40013054	A-omna kholam atung a, asinagogte uah amaute thu ahilh a, huchi in lamdang asa mahmah ua, “Hiai mi'n koi a kipan a hiai bang pilna leh hiai nasep thupi hihtheihnate amuh ahia?
40013055	Hiai mi singlem bawlpa tapa hilou hia? Anu Mari kichi hilou hia? A-unaute Jakob, Joseph, Simon, Judas kichite hilou uhia?
40013056	Hiai mi in koi a kipan a hiaite tengteng mu ahia? Asanggamnute leng i kiang ua om vek hilou uhia?” achi uhi.
40013057	Huchi in atung ah alungkim kei uhi. Himahleh Jesu'n akiang uah, “Zawlnei ama kholam leh ama inn lam lou ngal ah pahtawi louh in a-om ngei kei,” achi hi.
40013058	Agin louh ziak un huai ah nasep thupi dang tam ahih kei hi.
40014001	Huai laitak in kumpipa Herod in Jesu tanchin ana za hi.
40014002	Asikhate kiang ah thu agen a, “Hiai Baptispa Johan ahi; misi lak a kipan thounawn ahi; huaiziak in huai thilhihtheihnate'n amah a sem ahi,” achi hi.
40014003	Herod in a-unau Philip zi, Herodias ziak in Johan aman a, ahen a, suangkul ah ana khum hi.
40014004	Johan in akiang ah amah na neih asiang kei, achih ziak in.
40014005	Johan hihlup ut mahleh mipi akihta a, zawlnei hi a apom ziak un.
40014006	Himahleh Herod pian ni ahong tun in alai ah Herodias tanu alam a, Herod akipaksak hi.
40014007	Huai phet in anget peuhmah pe ding in thu akichiam hi.
40014008	Ama'n anu' thuhilh bang in, “Hiai kuang ah Baptispa Johan lutang hon pia in,” achi hi.
40014009	Kumpipa alungkhamta a, himahleh athuchiamte leh a-ankuang umpihte ziak in piak ding thu apia hi.
40014010	Huchi in mi asawl a, Johan lutang atansak hi.
40014011	Huan kuang in alutang ahon la ua, numei naupang kiang ah apia ua, ama'n anu kiang ah apaipihta hi.
40014012	Johan nungzuite'n aluang hong la ua, avui ua, huchi in Jesu ava hilh uhi.
40014013	Jesu'n huai thu azak in, hiai a kipan long in gamkeu lam ah apaituamta hi. Himahleh mipi'n azaktak un khua a kipan khe a pai in azuita uhi.
40014014	Huchi in amah ahong paikhiakleh mipi tampitak amu a, ahehpih mahmah a, adamloute uh ahihdamsak hi.
40014015	Nitaklam ahong hih in, nungzuite akiang ah ahong pai ua, “Hiai mun gamkeu ahi a, ni akaita a, mipite khuate apai a, amau a ding nek ding aleitheihna ding un paisakta in,” achi uhi.
40014016	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Apaimang uh akiphamoh kei, noumau nek ding pia un,” achi hi.
40014017	Amau akiang ah, “Hiai ah tanghou phel nga leh ngasa nih kia i nei uh,” achi uhi.
40014018	Ama'n, “Huaite ka kiang ah hon la un,” achi hi.
40014019	Huchi in loupa tung a tu ding in mipite thu apia a, tanghou phel nga leh ngasa nihte ala a, van lam en in avualzawl a, abalkham a, nungzuite kiang ah tanghoute apia a, mipite kiang ah nungzuite'n apesawn uhi.
40014020	Huan avek un ane ua, avah chiatta ua; akhamval uh bawmpi sawm-le-nih dim angah uhi.
40014021	Anete numei leh naupang sim louh in, piching ngen sangnga vel ahi uh.
40014022	Huan mipite asawlmang khit in apai ma a gal khat na pai masa ding in nungzuite long ah atuangsak teitei hi.
40014023	Mipite apaimang nung un thum ding in tang ah atuam in apaitou a, nitaklam ahong hih in huai ah amah kia in a-omta hi.
40014024	Tuipi laitak ah long a-omta a; huih in ahilou lam a asawn ziak in tuikihot in asepta hi.
40014025	Zanven lina ah tuipi tung a khe a Jesu pai a, akiang lam uh hon zuan in amu uhi.
40014026	Nungzuite'n amah tuipi tung a khe apai amuh un, “Sikha ahi,” chi in abuai ua, lau in akikouta uhi.
40014027	Himahleh Jesu'n amaute ahoupih pah a, “Khamuangtak in om un, keimah ka hi, lau kei un,” achi hi.
40014028	Peter in adawng a, “Toupa, nang na hihleh tui tung ah nang kiang a hong pai thu hon pia in,” achi hi.
40014029	Huan ama'n, “Hong pai ve,” achi a, long a kipan Peter akum a, Jesu kiang zuan in tui tung ah khe in apaita hi.
40014030	Himahleh huih nung amuh in alau a, tum ding in akisa a, “Toupa, hon hondam in,” chi in akikou hi.
40014031	Jesu'n asawk pah a, amah alen a, akiang ah, “Nang gintawm, bangziak a ginglah na hia?” achi hi.
40014032	Huan long a atuan uleh huih adaita hi.
40014033	Long a omte'n, “Pathian Tapa na hi taktak hi,” chi in amah abia uhi.
40014034	Huan gal khat lam akai uleh, Gennesaret gam ahong tung uhi.
40014035	Huai mun a mite'n amah atheihtak un, huai kim gam tengteng ah mi asawl ua, damlou tengteng akiang ah ahon pi ua;
40014036	Apuan mong bek khoih theih angen ngutngut ua; huan akhoih peuhmah adam zel uhi.
40015001	Huai khit in Jesu kiang ah Jerusalem a kipan Pharisaite leh laigelhmite ahong pai ua,
40015002	“Bangziak a upate thugousiah a na nungzuite talek nak uh ahia? Tanghou anek chiang un akhut uh asil ngei kei uh,” achi uhi.
40015003	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Nou leng bangziak a na thugousiah ziak ua Pathian thupiak a talek na hi ua?
40015004	Pathian in, ‘Na nu leh na pa zahtak in, kuapeuh anu hiam apa hiam gensia si ngeingei heh’ achi hi.
40015005	Nou bel, ‘kuapeuh anu hiam apa hiam kiang a, na hon zatna ding Pathian kiang a piak ahih peuhmah chiang in,
40015006	anu leh apa azah ding ahi nawn kei,’ na chi uhi. Huchi in na thugousiah ziak un Pathian thu bangmah lou na suah uhi.
40015007	Nou lepchiahte, Isai in na tungtang thu uh ana genkhol dik mahmah hi;
40015008	“Hiai mite'n akam un ahon zah ua, amuk un ahon phat ua, himahleh alungtang un ahon gamlat uh.
40015009	Himahleh, athuhilhna ua mihing thupiak ahilh ziak un ahon biak uh athawn mai ahi,” chi in adawng hi.
40015010	Huan mipi asam a akiang uah, “Ngaikhia unla, theisiam un;
40015011	kam a lut in mihing ahihnin kei a; himahleh kam a pawt, huai ngei in mihing ahihnin zaw hi,” achi hi.
40015012	Huai lai in anungzuite ahong pai ua, akiang ah, “Pharisaite'n huai thu azak ua alungkimlouhdan uh na thei hia?” achi uhi.
40015013	Ama'n, “Kung tengteng ka Pa van a om suan louh bohkhiak in a-om ding.
40015014	Amaute awlmoh kei un; mittaw makai ahi uh; huchi in mittaw in mittaw mah apileh kokhuk ah akekhawm ding uh,” chi in adawng hi.
40015015	Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Huai gentehna thu hon hilhchian in,” chi in adong hi.
40015016	Ama'n, “Tutan a nou leng thei nai lou lai na hi uh maw?
40015017	Kam a lut peuhmah gil ah alutsuk a, dailenna ah paihkhiak in a-om chih na thei kei ua hia?
40015018	Kam a pawtte bel lungtang a kipan a hong pawt ahi ua; huaite ngeingei in mihing ahihnin nak hi.
40015019	Lungtang a kipan ngaihtuahna giloute, tualthahna, angkawmna, kingaihna, guktakna, hekna, gensiatna ahong pawt nak hi.
40015020	Huaite ahi mihing hihnin; khut sil lou a an nek in mi ahihnin kei,” achi hi.
40015021	Jesu hiai a kipan pawt in Tura leh Sidon uk ah apaita hi.
40015022	Huan ngai dih, huai gam a kipan Kanaan numei khat ahong pai a, “Toupa, David Tapa, ka tung ah zahngai in, ka tanu dawi in lungkhamhuaipi in ama'n,” chi in akikou hi.
40015023	Ama'n bel kam khat in leng adawng kei hi. Anungzuite'n, “I nung ah akikoukou a, paisak mai in,” chi in hong gen uhi.
40015024	Ama'n bel, “Israel inkote nam lak a belam mangte kiang lou ngal ah sawl ka hi kei,” chi in adawng hi.
40015025	Himahleh numei ahong pai a, “Toupa hon huh in,” chi in abia hi.
40015026	Huan ama'n, “Tate tanghou laksak a, uite kiang a paih akilawm kei,” chi in adawng hi.
40015027	Numei in, “Toupa, hih zaw ahi tham hi; himahleh, uite'n leng apu uh dohkan a kipan a tanghou nen kia ane zel sam ve ua oi,” achi hi.
40015028	Huaitak in Jesu'n akiang ah, “Numei, na ginna thupi na tel e; na deih bangtak in na tung ah om hen,” chi in adawng a, huchi in atanu huai hun ngei in adamta hi.
40015029	Huai a kipan Jesu apai a, Galili tuipi kiang ahong tung a; tang ah apaitou a, huai ah atu hi.
40015030	Huchi in akiang ah mipi tampi ahong ua, khebaite, mittawte, pau theiloute, piangsualte leh midang tampi ahon pi ua, ama'n amaute ana hihdam chiat hi.
40015031	Mipite'n pau theiloute hong pau a, piangsualte hong hoih a, khebaite khe a pai a, mittawte'n hon mutheita uh chih amuh un lamdang asa mahmah ua; huchi in Israel' Pathian aphatta uhi.
40015032	Huchi in Jesu'n anungzuite asam a, “Ka kiang ah mipite ni thum a-omta ua, nek ding bangmah aneih louh ziak un, ka lainat mahmah; an ngawl in ka paikiksak ut kei hi, huchi lou in zaw lamkal ah abahsegawp kha ding uh,” achi hi.
40015033	Nungzuite'n akiang ah, “Mipi hiai zahzah vahna khop tanghou huai zahzah gamdai ah koi a kipan i mu dia?” achi uhi.
40015034	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Tanghou phel bangzah na nei ua? achi hi. Amau akiang ah, phel sagih leh nga neu tawmchik toh,” achi uhi.
40015035	Huan ama'n lei a tu ding in mipite thu apia a,
40015036	huan tanghou phel sagih leh ngate ala a, kipahthu gen in, abalkham a, nungzuite kiang ah apia a, huchi in nungzuite'n mipite kiang ah apesawn uhi.
40015037	Huan avek un ane ua, avah chiatta ua; akhamval nen uh bawmpi sagih adim hi.
40015038	Anete tuh numei leh naupang sim louh in, piching ngen sangli ahi uh.
40015039	Huan mipite asawlmang nung in long ah Jesu atuang a, Magadan gam atung hi.
40016001	Huai zoh in Pharisaite leh Saddukaite ahong pai ua, amah ze-etna ding in van a kipan chiamtehna amaute ensak ding in angen uhi.
40016002	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nitaklam ahong hih in, khua apha dia ahi ding e, meisan asuak a, na chi nak uh.
40016003	Huan zingsang in, tuni'n khua se dia ahi ding e, meisan asuak a, aniamkai, na chi nak uh. ‘Van omdan na theisiam ngal ua, himahleh, hun chiamtehnate na theisiam thei kei uhi.’
40016004	Khang gilou leh angkawmte'n chiamtehna azong ua, himahleh, Jonah chiamtehna lou ngal akiang uah chiamtehna piak ahi kei ding,” chi in adawng hi. Huan amaute paisan in apawtkheta hi.
40016005	Huan nungzuite gal khat lam atun un tanghou apo mangngilh ua,
40016006	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Pharisaite leh Saddukaite silngou lak ah kiveng unla, pilvang un,” achi hi.
40016007	Amau, “Tanghou i puak louh ziak uh ei ve,” chi in akingaihtuah uhi.
40016008	Jesu'n huai athei a, “Nou ginglahte aw, bang achia tanghou na neih louh ziak ua kingaihtuah maimah na hi ua?
40016009	Tu nangawn in na lungsim un na thei nai kei lailai uh maw? Mi sangnga nek tanghou phel nga leh akhamval uh bawmpi bangzah na dimsak zah uh na theigige kei ua hia?
40016010	Mi sangli nek tanghou phel sagih leh akhamval uh bawmpi bangzah hiam na luahdim uh chih thei lou uh maw?
40016011	Tanghou thu na kiang ua gen lou in, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite silngou a pan pilvang un, chih gen ka hi zaw chih bang achia thei lou na hi ua?” achi hi.
40016012	Huaitak in tanghou silngou lak a pilvang ding in asawl kei a, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite thuhilhna a pan pilvang ding in amau asawl zaw chih atheita uhi.
40016013	Kaisaria uk a Philippi mun ahong tun in Jesu'n anungzuite kiang ah, “Mite'n Mihing Tapa kua ahi achi ua?” chi in adong hi.
40016014	Amau, “Khenkhat in Baptispa Johan ahi, achi ua; khenkhat in Elijah; khenkhat in Jeremiah hiam zawlnei kuahiam ahi,” achi uh, achi uhi.
40016015	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ahihleh nou kua ka hi na hon chi ua?” achi hi.
40016016	Simon Peter in, “Khrist Pathian Hing Tapa na hi,” chi in adawng hi.
40016017	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Simon, Bar Jonah, hampha chia; sa leh sisan in hon theihsak na hi kei a, ka Pa van a om hon theihsak na hi zaw hi.
40016018	K'on hilh ahi, nang Peter na hi, hiai suangpi tung ah ka saptuam ka lamtou ding a, misi khokulh kongkhakte'n hiai azou kei ding uh.
40016019	Van lalgam chabite ka hon pe ding a, leitung ah bangpeuh na hen van ah leng hen ahi ding a, leitung ah bangpeuh na phel van ah leng phel ahi ding,” achi hi.
40016020	Huai zoh in Khrist ahi chih kuamah hilh lou ding in nungzuite achi bikbek hi.
40016021	Huai nung in Jerusalem a apai ding dan, upate, siampu liante, laigelhmite a pan thil tampi athuakdan ding leh hihlup a a-omdan ding, ni thum ni a kaihthoh a a-omdan ding Jesu'n anungzuite atheisak panta hi.
40016022	Huai phet in Peter in amah apituam a, “Toupa, hi kei hen! Huaite na tung ah tung ngei kei hen!” chi in ataihilh hi.
40016023	Jesu akihei a, Peter kiang ah, “Setan, ka nung ah pai in, kei a di'n pukna na hi; Pathian thilte ngaihtuah lou in mihing thilte na ngaihtuah zaw hi,” achi hi.
40016024	Jesu'n anungzuite kiang ah, “Kuapeuh in hon zuihnopleh amah kimangngilh in, ama kros pua in hon zui hen.
40016025	Kuapeuh ahinna humbit ut in atan ding a; kuapeuh keimah ziak a ahinna tan in ahumbit ding hi.
40016026	Mi'n khovel apumpi in nei henla, ahinna tanleh amah a ding in bang aphatuam dia? Ahihkeileh mi'n ahinna sik in bang ape thei dia?
40016027	“Mihing Tapa a-angelte toh, a Pa thupina a kizem a ahong pai ding ziak in. Huai hun chiang in michih anasep bang un adin chiat ding hi.
40016028	Chihtaktak in ka hon chi ahi, hiai adingh akhente, agam a Mihing Tapa hong pai amuh masiah uh, sihna chiam lou hial ding a-om uh,” achi hi.
40017001	Huan ni guk nung in Jesu'n atuam in tang sangtak ah Peter, Jakob leh a-unau Johan apaitouhpih hi.
40017002	Huan ama uah amel omdan ahong lamdangta a; amai ni bang in ahong tang a, apuansilhte vuk bang in ahong ngouta hi.
40017003	Huan ngai dih, Mosi leh Elijah, amah kihoupih in akiang uah akilak uhi.
40017004	Huan Peter in Jesu ahoupih a, “Toupa, ei a di'n hiai a om ahoih, na utleh hiai ah aidakbuk thum ka bawl ding a; nang a ding in khat, Mosi a ding in khat, Elijah a ding in khat,” achi hi.
40017005	Agen laitak in, mei ngoutak in amaute aliahta a; ngai dih, mei a kipan aw in, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak, ka kipahna mahmah ahi; amah thu ngai un,” achi hi.
40017006	Huan nungzuite'n huai azak un bokkhup in apuk ua, alau mahmah uhi.
40017007	Jesu'n amaute ahong khoih a, “Thou unla, lau kei un,” achi hi.
40017008	Huan adakkhia ua, Jesu kia lou ngal kuamah amuta kei uhi.
40017009	Huan tang a kipan akum lai un, Jesu'n akiang uah, “Misi lak a kipan Mihing Tapa athohnawn masiah na thil muh uh kuamah hilh kei un,” chi in thu apia hi.
40017010	Huan anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Laigelhmite'n Elijah hong pai masa ding ahi, bangchidan a chi ahi ua?” chi in adong uhi.
40017011	Ama'n, “Elijah ahong pai ding him ahi a, bangkim asiam hoih ding hi.
40017012	Himahleh ka hon hilh ahi, Elijah zaw ahong pai khinta, amah athei kei ua, atung ah a-utut un ahihzawta uhi. Huchi mah bang in Mihing Tapa in leng alak uah athuak sam ding,” chi in adawng hi.
40017013	Huaitak in, nungzuite'n akiang ua Baptispa Johan thu gen ahi chih atheita uhi.
40017014	Huan mipi kiang ahong tun un mi khat akiang ah ahong pai a, ama a khukdin in,
40017015	“Toupa ka tapa tung ah zahngai in, amah phungzawl vei ahi a, anak thuak tel mai; tamveipi mei ah apuklut a, tamveipi tui ah leng apuk nak hi.
40017016	Na nungzuite kiang ah ka hon pi a, ahihdam thei kei uh,” achi hi.
40017017	Jesu'n, “Ginna nei lou leh khang genhakte aw, bang tan ahia ka hon thuakzoh ding, amah ka kiang ah hon pi un,” chi in adawng hi.
40017018	Huan Jesu'n dawi atai a, asung a kipan apawt a; huai dak in naupang adamta hi.
40017019	Huai zoh in, atuam in Jesu kiang ah nungzuite ahong pai ua, “Bang achia kou delhkhe thei lou ka hi ua?” achi uhi.
40017020	Ama'n akiang uah, “Na gintak louh ziak un ahi. Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, ankam tang khat bang ginna na neih uleh, hiai tang kiang ah, ‘Hiai a kipan huai a pam ah va kisuan in,’ na chi ding ua, akisuan mai ding; nou a ding in hihtheih louh bangmah a-om kei ding,” achi hi.
40017021	Akoi abang hitaleh, hichibang zaw thumna leh an ngawlna lou ngal in apaikhe kei ding hi.
40017022	Galili gam a a-om lai un Jesu'n akiang uah, “Mihing Tapa zaw mihingte khut ah matsak in a-om ding a, athat ding ua;
40017023	ani thum ni in kaihthoh in a-om ding hi,” achi a, huchi in alungkham mahmah uhi.
40017024	Kapernaum khua ahong tun un, Peter kiang ah sumkhonte ahong pai ua, “Na pu un siah pe zel lou hia?” achi uhi.
40017025	Ama'n, “Pe zel e,” achi hi. Huan insung a ava lut in, Jesu'n akiang ah, “Simon, bangchi in na ngai a? Lei a kumpipate'n siah leh leiman sumte kua a pan ahia alak zel uh? Atate ua pan hia, mituam a pan?” chi in ana gentuh hi.
40017026	Peter in, “Mituam a pan,” achihtak in, Jesu'n akiang ah, “Huchi ahihleh tate awl uh ahi mai vo oi.
40017027	Himahleh nang tuipi ah va hoh inla, ngakuai diah inla, nga hong suak masapen man in, akam kek lechin dangka nih na mu ding; huaite la inla kei leh nang a ding in akiang uah pia in, huchi lou in zaw amaute i hihlungkim kei kha ding,” achi hi.
40018001	Huai laitak in Jesu kiang ah nungzuite ahong pai ua, “Van lalgam ah kua athupipen dia?” achi uhi.
40018002	Huan ama'n naupang neuchik asam a; alak uah adingsak hi.
40018003	“Chihtaktak in ka hon chi ahi, na lamdan ua, naupang neuchik bang na hong hih kei uleh, van-gam ah na lut kei hial ding uh.
40018004	Huchi in kuapeuh hiai naupang neuchik bang a kingainiam, huai mi van-gam ah athupipen ding,” achi hi.
40018005	Huan kuapeuh ka min ziak a hichibang naupang neuchik khat kipahpih keimah hon kipahpih ahi.
40018006	“Himahleh hiai hon gingta neuchikte lak a khat leng hihpuk, angawng ah buh gawizanna suang lianpi oksak in tuipi thuk lai ah khemang le uh, amah a ding in ahoihzaw ding hi.
40018007	Puknate ziak in khovel tung agik hi, puknate bel om ding him ahi a; himahleh pukna omsakpa tung agik hi!
40018008	“Huan na khut hiam na khe hiam in hon hihpukleh, tankhia inla, paimang in; khut nih leh khe nih nei a tangtawn mei a paih a na om sang in, piangsual hiam khebai hiam a hinna a lut nang ding in ahoihzaw hi.
40018009	Huan na mit in hon hihpukleh khelkhia inla, paimang in; mit langnih nei a Gehenna mei a paih a om sang in, mit langkhat nei a hinna a lut nang a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
40018010	“Hiai mineute lak a khat leng simmoh lou ding in pilvang un, a-angelte un van ah ka Pa van a om mel a-en gige uh chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40018011	Mihing Tapa mangthangte zong ding a hong pai ahi him hi.
40018012	“Bangchi na sa ua? Mi kuapeuh in belam za nei henla, alak ua khat vakmang taleh sawmkua-le-kuate nusia in, tang a pai in, amang pen azong kei dia hia?
40018013	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, amuh nawn zenzenleh sawmkua-le-kua vakmangloute tung ah sang in, tua belam tung ah akipak zaw ding hi.
40018014	Huchi mah bang in hiai mineute lak a khat manthat na Pa uh van a om deihlam ahi kei hi.
40018015	“Huan na unau in na tung a thil ahihkhelhleh pai inla, amah leh nang kia theih in akhelhna hilh in; ahon ngaihkhiakleh na unau zou na hi ding.
40018016	Ahon ngaihkhiak keileh midang khat hiam nih hiam na kiang ah na pi dia, huchi in thu chiteng theihpihmi nih hiam thum hiam kam a hihkip a a-omtheihna ding in.
40018017	Huan amau leng angaihkhiak nop kei laileh, saptuamte kiang ah tun in. Huan saptuamte leng angaihkhiak nop keileh amah tuh nang ding in Zentel leh siahkhonmi bang hi hen.
40018018	“Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, leitung ah bangpeuh na hen uh, van ah hen ahi ding. Huan leitung a na phel uh, van ah leng phel ahi ding hi.
40018019	“Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh nawn hi. Leitung ah na lak ua mi nih athilnget ua akithutuah uleh, ka Pa van a om hihsak in a-om ding uh.
40018020	Mi nih hiam thum hiam ka min a akikhopna peuh uah alak uah ka om zel hi,” achi hi.
40018021	Huai lai in Peter ahong pai a, “Toupa, ka unau in bangzah vei ahia ka tung ah hihkhialleh ka ngaihdam ding? Sagihvei tan in ahi diam?” achi hi.
40018022	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Sagihvei tan ka hon chi kei a, sagihvei mun sawmsagih tan,” ka hon chi zaw ahi.
40018023	“Huaiziak in van-gam tuh kuahiam asikhate kiang a asum thu saifel tum toh tehpih ahi.
40018024	Huchi a sum thu hon sai pattak in, mi khat talent singkhat ba akiang ah ahon pi uhi.
40018025	Huan piak ding aneih louh ziak in, apu in amah toh, azi toh, atate toh, aneih tengteng toh zuak a dit ding thu apia hi.
40018026	Huchi in sikha in Toupa, ‘ka tung ah zahngai tadih inla, avek in ka hon pe ding, chi in bokkhup in abia hi.’
40018027	Huai sikhapa pu'n ahehpih mahmah a, akhah a, abat angaidamta hi.
40018028	“Himahleh huai sikha apaikhia a, asikha hihpihte lak a khat amakhai zakhat ba ava mu a; amah aman a, na bat hon pia in, chi in agawlmek hi.
40018029	Huchi in asikha hihpihpa'n bokkhup in, ka tung ah zahngai tadih inla, ka hon pe ding, chi in angen ngutngut hi.
40018030	Himahleh a-ut kei a; abat apiak zoh masiah suangkul ah akhumta hi.
40018031	Huchi in asikha hihpihte'n athilhih amuh un, poi asa mahmah ua, athilhih tengteng atoupa uh ahilhta uhi.
40018032	Huaitak in atoupa'n amah asam a, akiang ah, sikha gilou, na hon nget ngutngut ziak a, na bat tengteng hon ngaidam ing a;
40018033	k'on hehpih bang in nang leng na sikha hihpih na hehpih sam ding hilou hia? achi hi.
40018034	Huchi in atoupa athangpaita a, abat tengteng apiak zoh masiah migawtte kiang ah apeta hi.
40018035	Michih in na lungtangtak ua na unaute uh na ngaihdam kei uleh ka Pa van a om in leng huchi mah bang in na tung uah ahih sam ding,” achi hi.
40019001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n huai thute agen zoh in, Galili gam a kipan apawt a, Jordan lui gal Judia gam ah ahoh hi.
40019002	Mipi thupitak in azui ua; amaute ahihdam zel hi.
40019003	Huan Pharisaite akiang ah ahong ua, amah ze-etna ding in, “Bangziak peuh in mi'n azi mak asiang hia?” achi uhi.
40019004	Ama'n, “Atung a kipan amau bawlpa'n numei leh pasal abawlleh,
40019005	hiai ziak in pasal in anu leh apa apaisan ding a, azi alen ding.
40019006	Huchi in anih un sapum khat ahong hita ding uh, achi chih na sim kei ua hia? Huchi in nih ahita kei ua, sapum khat ahi zawta uhi. Huaiziak in Pathian in agawmsa mihing in khen kei hen,” chi in adawng hi.
40019007	Amau bel akiang ah, “Ahihleh, bangziak a Mosi in kimakna laipiak a mak ding chi a thu pia ahia?” achi uhi.
40019008	Ama'n akiang uah, “Mosi in na lungtang uh khauh ziak in ei ve na zite uh mak aphal; himahleh atung a kipan huchibang ahi ngei kei hi.
40019009	Ke'n zaw ka hon chi ahi, kuapeuh kingaihna ziak hilou a, zi ma a midang nei angkawm ahi; maksa nei peuhmah leng angkawm ahi,” achi hi.
40019010	Nungzuite'n akiang ah, “Azi lam thu a pasal huchibang ahihleh kiten louh ahoihzaw,” achi uhi.
40019011	Ama'n akiang uah, “Huai thu ahihleh, apiaknate kia lou ngal, mi napeuh in apom thei kei ding uh.
40019012	Michilgeh, anu gilsung ua kipan huchibang a piang himte a-om ua; michilgeh, mihing khut a gehte leng a-om sam ua; michilgeh van-gam ziak a chilgeh a kibawltawmte leng a-om sam uhi. Kuapeuh apom thei in pom hen,” achi hi.
40019013	Huai lai in atung ua akhut koih a, athumsak ding in, akiang ah naupang neute ahon pi ua; nungzuite'n ana tai uhi.
40019014	Himahleh Jesu'n, “Naupang neute ka kiang ah hon paisak unla, kham kei un; van-gam hichibang mite a ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
40019015	Huan atung uah akhut akoih a, huai a pan in apaita hi.
40019016	Huan mi khat akiang ah ahong a, “Pu, tangtawn hinna ka neihtheihna ding in thil hoih bang ka hih ding?” achi hi.
40019017	Ama'n akiang ah, “Thil hoih thu bangziak a hon dong? Hoih khat kia a-om; himahleh, hinna a na lut utleh thupiakte zui in,” achi hi.
40019018	Ama'n akiang ah, “Akoi pen maw?” achi hi. Jesu'n, “Tual na that ding ahi kei; Ang na kawm ding ahi kei; Na gu ding ahi kei; Na hek ding ahi kei;
40019019	Na nu leh na pa zahtak in, chihte leh nangmah na ki-it bang in na vengte na it ding ahi chih,” achi hi.
40019020	Tangval in akiang ah, “Huaite teng ka zui zel; bang ka sam lai a?” achi hi.
40019021	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Hoihkim a om na utleh, pai inla, na neih tengteng zuak inla, mizawngte kiang ah pia in, huchi in van ah gou na nei ding; huan, hong pai inla, hon zui in,” achi hi.
40019022	Tangval bel mihausa ahih ziak in, huai thu azak in lungkhamtak in apaimangta hi.
40019023	Jesu'n anungzuite kiang ah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, mihausa a dia van-gam lut haksapi ahi.
40019024	Huan ka hon hilh ahi, Pathian lalgam a mihausa alut sang in phimbil a sangawngsau lutsuak abaihlamzaw,” achi hi.
40019025	Huan nungzuite'n huai azak un, lamdang asa mahmah ua, “Kua hotdam in a-om zou dia?” achi uhi.
40019026	Jesu'n amau a-en a, akiang uah, “Huai mihing hih vual ahi kei, Pathian a di'n bangkim hihtheih ahi,” achi hi.
40019027	Peter in akiang ah, “Ngai dih, kou bangkim paisan in ka hon zuita ua; bang ka mu ding ua?” chi in adong hi.
40019028	Jesu'n akiang ah, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, “Khovel thak ah, athupina tutphah a Mihing Tapa atut chiang in, nou kei hon zuite, Israel nam sawm-le-nihte tung a vaihawm in, laltutphah sawm-le-nih ah na tu sam ding uhi.
40019029	Huan michih a-innte, a-unaute, asanggamnute, apa, anu, atate, agamte ka min ziak a paisan peuhmah in aleh za amu ding ua, tangtawn hinna atang ding uh.
40019030	Himahleh mi tampi, amasapen a omte, ananungpen ah a-om ding ua; ananungpen a omte leng amasapen ah a-om ding uh,” achi hi.
40020001	“Van lalgam tuh inn neipa grephuan a sem dingte chial ding a zing a pawtkhia bang ahi.
40020002	Ama'n nasemte toh ni khat a makhai loh dia akituahtak un agrephuan ah asawl chiat hi.
40020003	Huan dak thumna ding vel in ava pawt a, midang dawr mun a dingh maimaite amu hi.
40020004	Akiang uah, ‘nou leng grephuan ah va pai sam ve ua, akilawm hun ka hon pe na ding,’ achi hi.
40020005	Huchi in apaita uhi. Huan dak gukna ding leh dak kuana ding vel in ava pawt nawn a, huchi mah bang in ahih nawn hi.
40020006	Huan dak sawm-le-khatna ding in ava pawt a, midang dinghte amu a; akiang uah, ‘Bangziak a nitum a hiai lai a dingh maimai na hi ua?’ achi hi.
40020007	Amau akiang ah, ‘kuamah in ahon chial louh ziak un,’ achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, ‘Nou leng grephuan ah va hoh sam un,’ achi hi.
40020008	“Huan nitaklam ahong hih in, grephuan neipa'n asumkempa kiang ah, ‘Nasemte samkhawm inla, ananungpen a kipan amasapen tan in aloh uh pia in,’ achi hi.
40020009	Huan dak sawm-le-khatna ding khawng a achialte ahong uleh makhai amu chiat uhi.
40020010	Amasapente ahong ua, muh tam deuh akigingta ua; himahleh amau leng makhai mah amu chiat uhi.
40020011	Aloh uh asantak un, inn neipa tung ah aphun uhi.
40020012	Hiai nanungpente'n dakkal khat kia asem ua, kou sun haksa leh kho-ul thuakte toh kibang in na bawl a,” chi in.
40020013	Ama'n bel alak ua mi khat kiang ah, “Lawm, na tung ah bangmah ka hihkhial sam a; makhai loh ding a kithukim i hi kei maw?
40020014	Nang a la inla pai mai in; nang ka hon piak bangmah hiai nanungpen kiang ah ka pe nuam ahi.
40020015	Kei a hiven, ka ut-ut a ka hih asiang kei a hia? Ahihkeileh kei ka hoih ziak in nang na haza a hia?” chi in adawng hi.
40020016	“Huchi in ananungpente, amasapente ahong hi ding ua, amasapente leng ananungpente ahong hi ding uh,” achi hi.
40020017	Jerusalem a ahohtouh lai in Jesu'n anungzui sawm-le-nihte apituam a, lampi ah akiang uah,
40020018	“Ngai dih uh, Jerusalem ah i paitou dia, siampu liante leh laigelhmite khut a Mihing Tapa matsak in a-om ding a; amau si ding in atung ah thu ahihpuk ding uhi.
40020019	Nuihza bawlna dia zat ding leh kilhden ding in Zentelte kiang ah ape ding uh; huan, ani thum ni in kaihthoh in a-om ding,” achi hi.
40020020	Huai laitak in, Zebedai tapate nu, atate pi in akiang ah ahong a, amah bia in thil banghiam angen hi.
40020021	Huan ama'n akiang ah, “Bang ahia na deih?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ka tapa nihte na gam ah na taklam ah khat, na veilam ah khat atuttheihna ding un thu pia in,” achi hi.
40020022	Jesu'n, “Na nget uh thei lou hi uteh. Ka nou dawn ding na dawn thei ua hia? Ka baptisma tan ding na tang thei ding ua hia?” chi in adawng hi. Amau akiang ah, “Thei e,” achi uhi.
40020023	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka nou na dawn ngei ding ua; ka baptisma tan ding na tang thei ding uh. Himahleh ka taklam leh ka veilam a tut ding thu zaw kei piak ding ahi kei, ka Pa bawlsakte a ding ahi zaw ding,” achi hi.
40020024	Huchi in sawmkhatte'n huai azak un unau nihte tung ah ahehta uhi.
40020025	Jesu'n amaute asam a, “Zentelte vaihawmte atung uah thu anei mahmah ua, amiliante un atung uah thu anei mahmah lai uh chih leng na thei uh.
40020026	Himahleh nou lak ah zaw huchi ahi kei ding; kuapeuh na lak ua milian hih ut na nasem un a-om zaw ding hi.
40020027	Kuapeuh na lak ua masapen hih ut na nasem un a-om lai ding ahi.
40020028	Mihing Tapa nasepsak a om ding in ahong pai kei a, nasem ding leh mi tampi tatna dia ahinna pe ding a hong pai ahi zaw hi,” achi hi.
40020029	Jeriko a kipan apawt lai un mipi tampitak in amah azui uhi.
40020030	Ngai dih, mittaw nih lam gei a tute'n Jesu ahong pai chih azak un, “Toupa, Nang David Tapa, ka tung uah zahngai in,” chi in akikou uhi.
40020031	Mipite'n dai ding in atai ua, himahleh amau, “Toupa, Nang David Tapa, ka tung uah zahngai in,” chi in akinak kou semsem uhi.
40020032	Jesu adingh a, amau asam a, “Na tung uah bang ka hih na ut ua?” achi hi.
40020033	Amaute'n akiang ah, “Mitvak ka ut uh,” achi uhi.
40020034	Jesu'n amau ahehpih mahmah a, amit uh akhoihsak a; huchi in amu thei pah ngal ua, amah azuita uhi.
40021001	Huchi in Jerusalem khua atun ding kuan ua, Bethphage khua, Olive tang atun un Jesu'n nungzuite nih asawl a, akiang uah,
40021002	“Na mazawn ua khua ah va hoh unla, sabiltung khih, akiang a anou toh na mu ding ua; phel unla, ka kiang ah hon kai un.
40021003	Huan kuapeuh in na kiang ua banghiam agen uleh, ‘Toupa'n adeih a ahi,’ na chi ding uh; ama'n ahon sawl pah mai ding,” achi hi.
40021004	Hiai tengteng zawlnei kam a gen ahong tuntheihna ding in ahong omta hi.
40021005	“En dih, na Kumpipa, thunuailuttak in, sabiltung tung ah, sabiltungnou tung ngei a tuang in na kiang ah ahong pai, chi in Zion tanu hilh in,” achih.
40021006	Huchi in nungzuite ava pai ua, Jesu'n akiang ua thu apiak bang ngei in ahihta uhi.
40021007	Sabiltung leh anou ahon kai ua, atung uah apuante uh aphah ua, huai ah atuangta hi.
40021008	Huan mipi lak a tamzaw in lampi ah apuante uh ana phah ua, midang in singsawl sat in, lampi ah aphah uhi.
40021009	Mipi amalam a paite leh amah zuite'n, “David Tapa kiang ah Hosanna! Toupa min a hong pai ahampha hi; tungnungpen ah Hosanna!” chi in akikou uhi.
40021010	Jerusalem khua ahong lut in akhua in, “Hiai mi kua ahia?” chi in aling souhsouh uhi.
40021011	Mipite'n hiai mi zawlnei Jesu, Galili gam a Nazaret a ahi, achi uhi.
40021012	Pathian tempul ah Jesu ava lut a, tempul a zuak mite leh lei mite tengteng adelhkhia a, dangka khengte' dohkante leh vakhu zuakte tutphahte leng asawnpaihsak hi.
40021013	Akiang uah, “Ka inn thumna inn achi ding uh, chi a gelh ahi. Himahleh nou bel suamhatte khuk in na bawl zaw uh,” achi hi.
40021014	Huan tempul ah mittawte leh khebaite akiang ah ahong ua; amau ana hihdam hi.
40021015	Himahleh siampu liante leh laigelhmite'n athillamdang hihte leh tempul a, David Tapa Hosanna; chi a naupang kikoute amuh un, alungkim kei mahmah uhi.
40021016	Akiang ah, hiaite thugen na za hia? achi uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Za e, ‘naungekte leh nawi ne laite kam a pawt in pahtawina na hihkimta,’ chih na sim ngei kei ua hia?” achi hi.
40021017	Huan amaute apaisan a, khopi a pan pawt in, Bethani ah apai a; huai ah agiakta hi.
40021018	Azing a khopi lam a akik nawn lai in agil hong kialta hi.
40021019	Lampi sik ah theipi kung amu a, ava naihleh anah kia lou ngal muh ding a-om kei hi. Huan akiang ah, “Tangtawn in na gah nawn ke'n,” achi hi.
40021020	Huchi in theipi avuai pah hi. Nungzuite'n huai amuh un, “Bangchidan ahia theipi avuai pah tel?” chi in lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
40021021	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, ginna na neih ua, na ginlah kei uleh, theipi tung a hih bang phet leng na hih kei ding ua, hiai tang kiang ah na kisuan inla tuipi ah na kipailut in, chi le uchin, na chih bang un a-om mai ding hi.
40021022	Bangpeuh gingta a thum a na nget uh na mu ding uh,” chi in adawng hi.
40021023	Huan tempul alut nung a thu ahilh lai in, akiang ah siampu liante leh vantang upate ahong ua, akiang ah, “Kua thu in ahia hiai thil na hih? Kua'n thu hon pia ahia?” achi uhi.
40021024	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Ke'n leng thu kam khat ka hon dong sam ding a, huai na hon hilh uleh, kua thu in hiam hiai thilte ka hih chih ka hon hilh sam ding hi.
40021025	Johan baptisma koi a kipan ahia? Van a kipan hia, ahihkeileh mihing a kipan?” chi in adong hi. Amau akingaihtuah ua, “Van a kipan chi lehang, bangziak a amah ginglou na hi ua le?” ahon chi dia;
40021026	“Mihing a kipan chi lehang, mipi i kihta ngal ua; mi tengteng in lah Johan zawlnei in apom ngal ua,” achi uhi.
40021027	Huchi in Jesu adawng ua, “Thei kei ung,” achi uhi. Ama'n leng akiang uah, “Ke'n leng kua thu in ahia hiai thilte ka hih ka hon hilh sam kei ding,” achi hi.
40021028	“Himahleh nou bangchi na sa ua? Mi kuahiam in tapa nih anei a, akhatna pen kiang ah ava hoh a, ‘Tapa aw, kuan inla ka grephuan ah va sem ve,’ achi hi.
40021029	Ama'n, ‘Ka ut kei,’ chi in adawng hi. Himahleh aden chiang in alungsim kheng in, akuanta hi.
40021030	Huan anihna pa kiang ah leng ava hoh a, tua bangmah in ava chi hi. Ama'n ‘Pu, ka kuan ding,’ ” chi in adawng a, himahleh akuanta kei hi.
40021031	“Huai mi nihte akua zaw in apa uh deihlam ahih a le?” achi hi. Amaute'n, “Amasapen in,” achi uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, siahkhonte leh kizuakte'n Pathian lalgam ah nou hon lutsan ding uh.
40021032	Diktatna tawn in na kiang uah Johan ahong a, amah na gingta kei uh; siahkhonte leh kizuakte'n amah agingta ua; noute'n huai na muh nung un leng amah na gintakna ding un na kisik nuam tuan kei uh.
40021033	“Gentehna thudang ngaikhia un; mi kuahiam inn neitu a-om a, huai mi'n grephuan abawl a, dai in a-umsuak a, grep sukna khuk atou a, inn sang alam a; loukemte kiang ah khohloh ding a pia in gamdang ah apaita hi.
40021034	Huan agah loh hun in agah lakhawm ding in loukemte kiang ah asikhate asawl hi.
40021035	Loukemte'n tua sikhate ana man ua, khat avua ua, khat pen that in, adang khat suang in adeng uhi.
40021036	Huai zoh in sikha dang amasa pawl sang a tamzaw asawl nawn hi. Amau tung ah leng ama ua mite ahih bangmah un ana hih nawn uhi.
40021037	Huai nung in, ‘Ka tapa azahtak kha ding uh,’ chi in atapa akiang uah asawl hi.
40021038	Himahleh loukemte'n atapa ana muhtak un, hiai mipa gouluah dingpa ahi; that ni in agouluah ding tansak ni, akichi uhi.
40021039	Huchi in amah aman ua, grephuan a kipan paikhia in athat uhi.
40021040	Huchi in grephuan neipa ahong pai chiang in huai loukemte tung ah bangchi in ahihta dia le?” achi hi.
40021041	Amaute'n akiang ah, “Huai migiloute haksatak in ahihmangthang ding a, grephuan loukem midang aloh hun teng a agahte akiang a pe zel dingte kiang ah khohloh ding in ape ding,” achi uhi.
40021042	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Inn lam mite suang deih louhpen huai ngeingei aning a suang phatuampen ahong hita. Huai Toupa hih ahi, i mitmuh in alamdang ahi, chih Laisiangthoute na sim ngei kei ua hia?”
40021043	“Huaiziak in Pathian lalgam na kiang ua kipan laksak ahi dia, namdang kiang ah agahsuah ding piak ahi ding, chih ka hon hilh ahi.
40021044	Huai suang tung a puk tuh akitamgawp dia; adelhkhak mi agawizan ding,” achi hi.
40021045	Huan siampu liante leh Pharisaite'n agentehna thute azak un amau tungthu gen ahi chih atheita uhi.
40021046	Huchi in amah mat atum ua; himahleh mipi'n zawlnei a apom ziak un akihta uhi.
40022001	Jesu'n amaute houpih in akiang uah gentehna thu agen nawn hi,
40022002	“Van lalgam tuh kumpipa kuahiam atapa a dia kitenna ankuanglui toh teh ahi.
40022003	Huan kitenna ankuang um dia achialte sam ding in asikhate asawl a, himahleh ahong nuam kei uh.
40022004	Ama'n, ka chialte kiang ah, ‘ngai dih ua, ka ankuang amanta; ka bawngtalte leh ka gan vak thaute ka gouta a, bang teng amanta hi; kitenna ankuang um ding in hong paita un,’ chi un, chi in sikha dang asawl nawn hi.
40022005	Himahleh ana limsak kei ua, khat a lou ah akuan a, khat asumsinna ah apaimang hi.
40022006	Midangte'n asikhate aman ua, zumhuaitak in abawl ua, ahihlumta uhi.
40022007	Huchi in kumpipa athangpaita a; asepaihhon asawl a, tualthatte ahihmang a, akhua uh leng ahalsakta hi.
40022008	Asikhate kiang ah, ‘kitenna ankuang man ahita, ka chialte ne tak ahi kei uh.
40022009	Huaiziak in lamlian ah pai unla, mi na muh peuhpeuh uh kitenna ankuang um ding in chial un,’ achi hi.
40022010	Huchi in huai sikhate apawt ua, lamlian a va pai in, amuh peuhmah uh migilou leh mihoihte leng apikhawm vek uhi. Huchi in michialte in kitenna dantan ahong dimta hi.
40022011	“Himahleh kumpipa michialte enkhe ding a ahong lutleh kitenna puan silhloumi khat huai ah amu hi.
40022012	Huchi in akiang ah, ‘Lawm, bangchidan a kitenna puan silh lou a hiai a hong lut na hia?’ achi hi. Amah adai dide hi.
40022013	Kumpipa'n asikhate kiang ah, ‘Akhut leh akhe gak unla, polam mial ah paikhia un; huai ah kah leh hagawi a-om ding,’ achi hi.
40022014	Chialte tampi ahi ua, telte zaw tawmchik ahi uh,” achi hi.
40022015	Huai lai in Pharisaite athugen a amattheihna ding dan akikum uhi.
40022016	Huan amau anungzuite uleh Herod pawlte akiang ah asawl ua, huai mite'n, “Sinsakpa, midiktak na hi a, diktak in Pathian thu na hilh a, kuamah deihsak tuam leh maivil tuam na nei kei chih ka thei uh.
40022017	Huaiziak in bangchi na sa a, hon hilh in, Kaisar kiang a siah piak asiang hia siang lou?” achi uhi.
40022018	Jesu'n agitlouhdan uh ana thei a, “Lepchiahte aw, bangziak a hon ze-et na hi ua?
40022019	Na siahsum uh hon ensak un,” achi hi. Huan akiang ah makhai ahon la uhi.
40022020	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hiai kua lim leh kua min ahia?” achi hi.
40022021	Amau akiang ah, “Kaisar a,” achi uh. Ama'n akiang uah, “Huchi ahih nung Kaisar thilte Kaisar kiang ah pia unla, Pathian thilte Pathian kiang ah pia un,” achi hi.
40022022	Hiai thute azaktak un lamdang asa mahmah ua, amah nusia in, apaimangta uhi.
40022023	Huai ni mah in, akiang ah Saddukaite, thohnawnna a-om kei chite ahong pai ua;
40022024	akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, Mosi in, mi ta nei lou in sileh, a-unaupa'n azi luah in a-unaupa a ding in chi akhahsak ding ahi,” achi hi.
40022025	“Ahi a, koute lak ah sal sagih a-om ua; a-upapen in zi anei a, asi a, chi akhah louh ziak in a-unaupa luah ding in azi anutsiat hi.
40022026	Huchi mah bang in anihna in aluah a, athumna in aluah lai a, asagihna tan in aluah chiat uhi.
40022027	Atawp in avek ua asih nung un numei mah leng hong sita hi.
40022028	Huchi in thohnawnna ah amau sagihte lak ah akua pen zi ahi dia? Avek un lah anei kha chiat ngal ua? chi in,” adong uhi.
40022029	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Laisiangthou leh Pathian thilhihtheihna na theih louh ziak un na ngaikhial nak uhi.
40022030	Thohnawn hun ah zi leh pasal a kitenna a-om nawn kei a, van a angelte bang ahi zawta ding uh,” achi hi.
40022031	Himahleh, misi thohnawnna thu Pathian in na kiang ua agen na sim kei ua hia?
40022032	“Kei Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian, Jakob' Pathian ka hi, Pathian zaw misite Pathian ahi kei a, ahingte Pathian ahi zaw,” chi in adawng hi.

40022034	Jesu'n Saddukaite selkhia ahi chih Pharisaite'n azak un akikhawm uhi.
40022035	Huchi in alak ua dansiammi khat in, amah ze-et in thu adong hi.

40022042	“Khrist bangchi na sa ua? Kua tapa ahia?” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “David tapa,” achi uh.

40023001	Jesu'n mipite leh anungzuite kiang ah thu agen hi.
40023002	“Mosi tutphah ah laigelhmite leh Pharisaite atu uhi.
40023003	Huaiziak in ahon hilh peuhmah uh hih unla zui zel un; amau thilhih bang zaw hih tuan kei un, gen zaw agen ua, ahih tuan kei uh.
40023004	Puakgik haksatak abawl ua, mite asuan ua, amau lah akhutzung un leng akhoih nuam kei uh.

40023014	Laigelhmi leh Pharisai lepchiahte aw, na tung uh agik hi; meithai innte na negai ngal ua, thumna saupi mi khemna ding in na nei ua, huaiziak in mohna liansem na mu ding uhi.

40023016	“Nou makai mittaw, kuapeuh tempul lou a kichiam bangmah ahi kei; kuapeuh tempul a dangka-eng lou a kichiam zaw tangtunsak ding ahi chite aw, na tung uh agik hi.

40023020	Huchi in ‘maitam lou a kichiam peuhmah zaw maitam leh atung a om tengteng lou a kichiam ahi.

40024001	Tempul a kipan Jesu pawtkhia a, apai lai in, anungzuite tempul ensak ding in akiang ah hong pai uhi.

40024003	Olive tang a atut lai in nungzuite amau kia in akiang ah ahong ua, “Huaite chikchiang in ahong om dia? Na hong pai nawnna leh khovel tawpna ding chiamtehna bang ahi dia? hon hilh in,” achi uhi.

40025001	“Huai hun chiang in van-gam tuh nungak siangthou sawm, akhawnvak uh tawi a mouneipa dawn ding a pawtte toh teh ahi ding hi.

40025003	Ahaite'n akhawnvak uh atawi ua, atui atawi kei uhi.
40025004	Apilte'n bel akhawnvakte uh tawi in, a-um ah atui leng atawi uhi.

40025013	“Huaiziak in kiging un, ani leh ahun na theih louh ziak un.
40025014	“Van lalgam tuh mi gamdang a pai dia kisa, asikhate sam a, akiang ua asumte kemsak bang ahi.
40025015	Sikha khat kiang ah talent nga apia a, sikha dang kiang ah talent nih apia a, sikha dang kiang ah talent khat apia a; ahihtheih hundan ding chiat ua pia in apaita hi.
40025016	Talent nga mupa huai in ava sumsin pah a, talent nga dang amukheta hi.

40025024	“Huan talent khat mupa leng ahong pai a, ‘Pu, mi chihhakpi na hi chih ka hon thei a; na tuhlouhna ah leng na at a, na thehlouhna ah leng na khawm hi.

40025027	Huchi ahih ngalleh sumsinte kiang a ka dangka na koih ding hi a, huchi a ka hong pai a kei a apung toh ka muh nawn ding ahi.
40025028	Huaiziak in atalent khat laksak unla, talent sawm neipa kiang ah pia un.

40025034	Huai hun chiang in Kumpipa'n ataklam a mite kiang ah, ‘Ka Pa deihsakte aw, hong pai un, khovel siamchil a pan nou a dia gam bawlsa luah un.

41001001	Pathian Tapa, Jesu Khrist tanchinhoih kipat tungna,

41001004	Johan in gamdai ah abaptis a, khelhnate ngaihdamna ding a kisikna baptisma thu gen in, ahong pawt hi.
41001005	Judia gam a mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a mi tengteng apawt ua, akiang ah apai ua, akhelhnate uh thupha tawi in Jordan lui ah, amaute abaptis zel hi.
