41001007	“Ka nung ah kei sang a thupizaw ahong pailel ahi; kun a akhedap khau phel tak leng ka hi kei,” achi hi.
41001008	“Ke'n tui in noute ka hon baptis a; ama'n ahihleh Kha Siangthou in ahi ahon baptis ding,” chi in agen hi.
41001009	Huai nite in hichi ahong hi a, Galili gam a Nazaret a kipan Jesu ahong pai a, Jordan lui ah Johan in ana baptis hi.
41001010	Tui a pan ahong pawttak in, van kihong a vakhu bang a atung a Kha hong kum amu hi.
41001011	Huan van a kipan aw hong pawt in, “Nang ka Tapa deihtak na hi a, na tung ah ka kipak mahmah,” achi hi.
41001012	Kha in amah gamdai ah asawl pah hi.
41001013	Huchi in Setan khem in gamdai ah ni sawmli a-om a, gamsate lak ah a-om a; angelte'n a-nna asepsak uhi.
41001014	Johan mat a a-om nung in, Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih gen in, Galili gam ah Jesu ahong pai hi.
41001015	“Ahun ahong tungta a, Pathian lalgam ahong naita; kisik unla tanchinhoih gingta un,” chi in.
41001016	Galili tuipi gei anawk lai in tuipi a Simon leh Simon unaupa Andru len pai a om amu a; amaute ngamanmi ahi him uhi.
41001017	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Hon zui un, huchi in mihing man ding in ka hon bawl ding,” achi hi.
41001018	Alen uh paisan in amah azui pah uhi.
41001019	Sau lou apaileh Zebedai tapa Jakob leh a-unaupa Johan amu a, huaite len bawlpha in long ah a-om uhi.
41001020	Huan ama'n amau asam pah a; apa uh Zebedai leh kilohmi agoihte uh toh long nusia in azuita uhi.
41001021	Huan Kapernaum ah ava lut ua; Sabbath ni in sinagog ah alut a, thu ahilh hi.
41001022	Laigelhmite bang lou a, thuneitak a amau thu ahilh ziak in athuhilh lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
41001023	Asinagog uah dawi nin paimi khat ana om a; ama'n;
41001024	“Nazaret Jesu, kou leh nang bang ahia i kizolhna om? Kou hon hihmang dia hong pai na hi maw? Nang ka hon thei a, Pathian Mi Siangthou na hi,” chi in akikoukhia hi.
41001025	Jesu'n atai a, “Dai inla, asung a kipan hong pawt in,” achi hi.
41001026	Dawi nin in amah a-engbawl a ngaihtak a kikou in asung a kipan ahong pawtta hi.
41001027	Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, huchi in “Hiai bang ahia le! Sinsakna thak ahi ve! Dawi ninte nangawn thuneitak in thu apia a, athu amang zel uh,” chi in akihou uhi.
41001028	Huan Galili leh akim gam tengteng ah atanchin athangta hi.
41001029	Huan sinagog a kipan apawt un, Jakob leh Johan toh Simon leh Andru inn ah alut uhi.
41001030	Huan Simon sungnu khosik in achi ana a, ana lum a; huchi in a-omdan Jesu ahilh pah uhi.
41001031	Huan Jesu'n akhut a len in, aphong a; huchi in khosik in anuseta a, a-nna uh asepsak hi.
41001032	Huan nitaklam a nitum nung in, akiang ah damlou tengteng leh dawimatte ahon pi uhi.
41001033	Akhomi tengteng kongkhak bul ah ahong omkhawm khiukheu uhi.
41001034	Huan mi tampi natna chiteng a nate ahihdam a, dawi tampi adelhkhia a; dawite'n amah atheih ziak un apau uh aphal kei hi.
41001035	Huan zingsang khovak ma tham a thou in apawt a, gamdai mun ah ahoh a, huai ah athum hi.
41001036	Simon leh alawmte'n anung ah azui uhi.
41001037	Amah ava muh un akiang ah, “Mi tengteng in ahon zong uh,” achi uhi.
41001038	Ama'n akiang uah, “Maban khuate ah pai ni, huai a leng thu ka gentheihna ding in; huai mah ka hong pawtsan ahi,” achi hi.
41001039	Huchi in thu hilh a dawite delhkhe kawm in Galili gam tengteng a asinagogte uah alut hi.
41001040	Huan akiang ah phak ahong pai a, “Na utleh na hon hihsiangthou thei,” chi in ama ah khukdin in angen ngutngut hi.
41001041	Ama'n ahehpih mahmah a, sawk in akhoih a, “Ka ut hi, na siangthouta in,” achi hi.
41001042	Huchi in phakna in amah anuse pah a, ahong siangthouta hi.
41001043	Jesu'n amah akham bikbek kawm in asawlkhe pah hi.
41001044	“Kuamah kiang a bangmah gen lou ding in pilvang in; himahleh siampu kiang ah va kilak inla, na kisiansakna ding in Mosi thilsehte lan in, mite'n ahon theihchetna ding un,” achi hi.
41001045	Himahleh amah apawt a, huai thu nakpitak a kikoupih in athangzakta hi; huchi in Jesu alangtang in khua ah alut thei nawnta kei a, gamdai mun ah a-om zawta a; huan mun teng a kipan mite akiang ah ahong pai uhi.
41002001	Huan ni bangzah hiam nung in Kapernaum a ahong lut nawnleh inn ah a-om chih thu ahong thang hi.
41002002	Huchi in kongkhak kim a omna ding om lou khop in mi tampi ahong kikhawm ua, akiang uah thu agen hi.
41002003	Mizaw khat, mi li zawn, akiang ah ahon pi uhi.
41002004	Mipi ziak a akiangnai a ahong pai theih louh ziak un a-omna intung aphenvang ua; huai khit in alupna leh atung a mizaw lum kawm in akhaikhesuk uhi.
41002005	Huchi in Jesu'n aginna uh amuh in, mizaw kiang ah, “Ka tapa, na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita,” achi hi.
41002006	Laigelhmi khenkhat huai mun ah atu uhi.
41002007	“Hiai mi'n bangziak a hichibang thu gen ahia? Pathian agensia hi; mi khat, Pathian kia lou ngal, kua'n ahia khelhnate ngaidam thei?” chi in alungtang un angaihtuah uhi.
41002008	Huan Jesu'n, alungtang un huchibang angaihtuah uh chih alungsim in athei pah a, akiang uah, “Huai thu bangziak a na lungtang ua ngaihtuah na hi ua?
41002009	Mizaw kiang a, ‘Na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita,’ chih leh ‘na lupna la inla, khe in paita in,’ chih akoi ahia agen nuamzaw?
41002010	Himahleh leitung ah Mihing Tapa in khelhnate ngaihdam theihna anei chih na theihna ding un,” ahi, mizaw kiang ah;
41002011	“Thou inla, na lupna la inla, na inn ah pai in, ka hon chi,” achi hi.
41002012	Huchi in amah athou a, alupna la pah in, avek ua mitmuh in apaita hi; huchi in avek un lamdang asa mahmah uh, hichibang himhim i mu ngei kei, chi in Pathian aphat uhi.
41002013	Huan apawt nawn a tuipi gei ah apaita hi, mipi tengteng akiang ah ava pai ua, ama'n thu ana hilh hi.
41002014	Apai kawm in, Alphai tapa, Levi siah piakna mun a tu amu a, akiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi hi. Athou a azuita hi.
41002015	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n Levi inn ah an a-um a, siahkhonte leh mikhialte tampi in Jesu leh anungzuite a-umpih uhi, amah zuite tampi ahi uh.
41002016	Pharisaite leh laigelhmite'n Jesu'n mikhialte leh siahkhonte kiang a anek amuh un, anungzuite kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia siahkhonte leh mikhialte kiang a anek a adawn?” achi uhi.
41002017	Jesu'n huai aza a, akiang uah, “Michidamte'n daktor akiphamoh kei ua, midamloute'n akiphamohzaw uh; midiktatte sam ding a hong pai ka hi kei a, mikhialte sam ding a hong pai ka hi zaw,” achi hi.
41002018	Huan Johan nungzuite leh Pharisaite'n an angawl zel uhi. Amau ahong pai ua, Jesu kiang ah, “Bangziak a Johan nungzuite leh Pharisaite nungzuite'n an ngawl ua, nang nungzuite'n angolh sam louh uh?” achi uhi.
41002019	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Moupite kiang a apasal a-om lai teng moupite'n an angawl thei ua hia? Apasal ding akiang ua a-om lai teng angawl thei kei ding uh.
41002020	Himahleh akiang ua kipan apasal pimang nite ahong tung ding a, huai ni chiang in zaw angawl ding uhi.
41002021	“Kuamah in puan tui khai nai louh them in puan lui athuap ngei kei uh; thuap le uh, thuap bit asawmna lam uah akaikek ding a, athak in alui akaikek ding a, ahong kek semsem ding hi.
41002022	Huan kuamah in savun uain thawl lui ah uain thak athun ngei kei, uain in savun thawl aphukham ding a, uain abo bei ding hi, savun thawl mah leng; uain thak savun uain thawl thak ah athun zaw uh,” achi hi.
41002023	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu Sabbath ni in buhlei ah apaisuak hi, anungzuite'n apai kawm un buhvuite akhiak uhi.
41002024	Pharisaite'n akiang ah, “En dih, bangziak a Sabbath ni a hihsiang lou hih ahi ua?” achi uhi.
41002025	Ama'n akiang uah, “David leh alawmte ataksap ua, agilkial lai ua athilhih uh na sim kei ua hia?
41002026	Abiathar siampu lianpen ahih lai a, Pathian inn a alut a, siampute kia lou ngal in anek siang louh tanghou koihtuam anek a, alawmte kiang a apiak sam thu,” achi hi.
41002027	Huan amah mah in, akiang uah, “Sabbath zaw mihing a dia bawl ahi, mihing bel Sabbath ni a dia bawl ahi kei hi.
41002028	Huchi in Mihing Tapa zaw Sabbath tung nangawn a Toupa ahi,” achi hi.
41003001	Huan sinagog ah alut nawn a; huai ah khutzaw khat ana om hi.
41003002	Amah ahektheihna ding un Sabbath ni a ahihdam nop leh nop louh a-enkhia uhi.
41003003	Ama'n khutzaw kiang ah, “Dingkhia in,” achi hi.
41003004	Huan akiang uah, “Sabbath ni in hihhoih hia siang, hihsiat? Hotdam hia siang, hihlup?” chi in adong hi. Himahleh adai dide uhi.
41003005	Huan alungtang uh tak ziak a lungkham mahmah leh heh kawm a amaute a-et velvel nung in, huai mi kiang ah, “Na khut zan in,” achi a, huchi in azankhia a, akhut adamta hi.
41003006	Pharisaite apawtkhia ua, amah hihlup theihna ding lampi ngaihtuah in Herod pawl a mite toh akihoukhawm pah uhi.
41003007	Jesu anungzuite toh tuipi lam ah apaimang ua; Galili gam a kipan mipi tampitak in azui uhi.
41003008	Athilhih thupidan azak un Judia gam a kipan, Jerusalem a kipan, Idumai gam a kipan, Jordan gal a kipan, Tura leh Sidon kho kim a kipan in mipi tampitak akiang ah ahong pai uhi.
41003009	Mipi ziak in amah a dia long neu mansa a om ding in anungzuite ahilh hi, huchi lou in zaw hon um lutlut kha ding uhi.
41003010	Mipi tampi ahihdam tak ziak in natna nei peuhmah in amah akhoihtheihna ding un aboh huthut uhi.
41003011	Dawi ninte'n leng amah amuh un ama ah bokkhup in, “Nang Pathian Tapa na hi,” chi in akikou uhi.
41003012	Huan atanchin genthang lou ding in akiang uah achi bikbek hi.
41003013	Huan tang ah ahohtou a, ama'n angaihngaih akiang ah asam a; amau akiang ah ahohtou uhi.
41003014	Akiang a om ding leh thugen dia asawlkhiak ding in sawm-le-nihte asep hi.
41003015	Natnate hihdam ding leh dawite delhkhe ding in thuneihna apia hi.
41003016	Huai mite, Simon, Peter, achih pa;
41003017	Zebedai tapa, Jakob leh Jakob unau Johan, huai mite Boanerges achihte; huai omdan tuh vanpiging tapate chihna ahi.
41003018	Andru, Philip, Bartholomai, Matthai, Thomas, Alphai tapa Jakob, Thaddai, Kanaan mi Simon leh,
41003019	amansakpa, Judas Iskariot ahi uhi.
41003020	Huai zoh in, inn khat ah alut uhi. Huai ah mipi tampi ahong kikhawm nawn ua, huchi in an nangawn leng ane thei kei uhi.
41003021	Huan alawmte'n azak un, “Lungsim buai ahita,” chi in amah mat atum uhi.
41003022	Huan laigelhmi, Jerusalem a kipan a hong sukte'n, “Beelzibul zawl ahi, dawite kumpipa ziak in ahi, dawite adelhkhiak,” achi uhi.
41003023	Jesu'n laigelhmite asam a, gentehna in akiang uah, “Setan in Setan mah bangchi in adelhkhe thei dia?
41003024	Gam leng amah akidouleh huai gam adingkhe thei kei ding hi.
41003025	Inkuan khat leng amah akidou uleh, huaite inkuan adingkhe thei kei ding uhi.
41003026	Setan leng amah kidou a, akilanleh adingkhe thei kei ding a, amangthang zaw ding hi.
41003027	Kuamah in mihatpa ahen masak phot keileh inn a lut in asum alaksak thei kei uh, huai nung in bel a-inn alok mai ding uhi.
41003028	“Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, mihing tate, akhelhna tengteng uah leh Pathian agensiatna bangpeuh uah leng agensiatnate uh ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
41003029	Kuapeuh Kha Siangthou hilhial gensia zaw chik mah chiang in ngaihdam ahi kei ding a, tangtawn khelhna ah siam louh in a-om zaw ding,” achi hi.
41003030	Dawi nin pai ahi, achih ziak un huai agen ahi.
41003031	Huan anu leh a-unaute ahong ua, inpua ah adingh ua; amah sam ding in mi asawl uhi.
41003032	Akim a mipi tu diamduamte'n akiang ah, “Ngai dih, inpua ah na nu leh na sanggampate'n ahon ngak uh,” achi uhi.
41003033	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka nu leh ka sanggampate kuate ahi ua?” chi in adong hi.
41003034	Akiang a tute a-en vialvial a, “En un, ka nu leh ka sanggampate;
41003035	kuapeuh Pathian deihlam hih photphot ka sanggampa, ka sanggamnu leh ka nu ahi uh,” achi hi.
41004001	Huan tuipiau ah thu ahilh nawn hi. Mipi tampitak akiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, huchi in tuipi ah long ah tuang in atu a, mipi tengteng tuipiau a leitung ah a-om uhi.
41004002	Huan gentehna zang in thil tampi asinsak a, amah sinsakna dan in akiang uah,
41004003	“Ngaikhia unla, en dih ua; buhchithehpa buhchi theh ding in akuan hi.
41004004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, atheh lai in akhen lampi sik ah akia a, vasate'n anegai uhi.
41004005	Akhen suangsilei ah akia a; lei asah louh ziak in apou pah hi.
41004006	Himahleh ni ahong suah in haivuai in ahong om a, zung aneih louh ziak in avuaimang uhi.
41004007	Akhen loulingnei lak ah akia a, loupa ahong khang a, buhkungte adepmang a, agahta kei hi.
41004008	Akhen lei hoih a kia in apou a, akhanglian a, agah a; aleh sawmthum aleh sawmguk leh aleh za in apung chiat uhi,” achi hi.
41004009	Huan akiang uah, “Kuapeuh zakna ding bil nei in, za hen!” achi hi.
41004010	Huan amah kia a-om lai in akim a omte leh sawm-le-nihte'n gentehna thu adongchian thak uhi.
41004011	Ama'n akiang uah, “Pathian lalgam thuguk zaw noute kiang a piak ahi a, polam mite a ding in bel bangkim gentehna a gen ahi.
41004012	Muh zaw amu na ua, atheisiam kei ding uh, huchi lou in zaw akihei nawn ding ua, ngaihdam ahong hi kha ding uh,” achi hi.
41004013	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Hiai gentehna thu na theisiam kei uh maw? Huchi ahih in bangchi in gentehna tengteng na theisiam tuan ding ua?
41004014	Buhchithehpa'n thu atheh ahi.
41004015	Lamsik a thu theh hiai bang ahi uh; thu azaktak un kintak a Setan hong pai in alungtang ua thu theh alakmangsak hi.
41004016	Huchibang mah in suangsilei a theh hiaite ahi uh; thu azak phet ua kipaktak a pom pahte.
41004017	Himahleh amau ah zung anei kei ua, sawt louchik kia a-om uh; huai nung in thu ziak a gimthuakna hiam sawina hiam ahong om phet in akipuk pah uhi.
41004018	Huan midangte loulingnei lak a theh bang ahi uh; huaite'n thu azata ua,
41004019	himahleh khovel lunggulhnate, thil dang duhgawlnate ahong lut chiang in, thu adep a, gah lou in a-om hi.
41004020	Huchi in lei hoih a kia hiaite ahi uh; thu za a, pom, aleh sawmthum, aleh sawmguk leh aleh za a gahte ahi uh,” achi hi.
41004021	Huan akiang uah, “Mi'n khawnvak de in akoihna a koih lou in, loh nuai hiam, lupna nuai hiam ah akoih ngei ua hia?
41004022	Thang lou ding a iim bangmah a-om ngei kei a, lang lou ding a sel bangmah a-om sam kei hi.
41004023	Kuapeuh zakna ding a bil nei peuh in za hen,” achi hi.
41004024	Huan akiang uah, “Na zak uh bang ahia, pilvang un; na tehna ngei mah ua tehsak in na om ding ua, atamzaw bawn piak in na om ding uhi.
41004025	Kuapeuh anei piak behlap in a-om ding ua, kuapeuh anei lou aneihsun nangawn laksak in om ding,” achi hi.
41004026	“Pathian lalgam tuh mi'n lei a chi atuh bang ahi,” achi hi.
41004027	“Zan chiang in a-ihmu a, sun chiang in athou zel a; chi pou in ana khang a, himahleh bangchi a pou a, khang ahia chih athei kei.
41004028	Lei in amah in gah ahon suah a; amasapen in akung, huan avui leh avui ah atang hong om hi.
41004029	Himahleh agah amin chiang in, kawite in a-at pah uhi; buhlak ahun tak ziak in,” achi hi.
41004030	Huan “Pathian lalgam bang toh i tehpih dia? Ahihkeileh, bang gentehna in ahia i genteh ding? achi hi.
41004031	Ankam chi tang khat lei a atuh un, lei a chi tengteng sang in neupen mahleh,
41004032	atuh nung un ahong pou a, loupa tengteng sang in ahong lianzawta a, hiang liantak ahon nei a, huchi in tungleng vasate alim ah agiak uh, huchi mah bang ahi,” achi hi.
41004033	Huan huchibang gentehna thu tampi in, atheihsiam theih khomkhom uh, akiang uah agen zel hi.
41004034	Himahleh gentehna lou in zaw akiang uah thu agen ngei kei; amah nungzuite kiang ah asim in bangkim ahilhchian zel hi.
41004035	Huai ni mah nitaklam ahong hih in, akiang uah, “Gal khat lam i kai ding uh,” achi hi.
41004036	Huchi in mipite paisan in, a-om ngeingei bang in, long ah apaipih pah ua, long dangte leng akiang ah a-om uhi.
41004037	Huchi in huihpi thupitak ahong nung a, tuikihotte long ah ahong kihotlut zuazua hi, huchi in long ahong dimta hi.
41004038	Amah lukham kham a ihmu in, longmei lam ah a-om hi. Huan aphawng ua akiang ah, “Heutupa, ka manthat uh khawk sa lou na hi maw?” achi uhi.
41004039	Amah ahong thou a, huih atai a, tuipi kiang ah leng, “Dai inla om kinken in,” achi hi. Huan huih atawp a, hong dai dide hi.
41004040	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bangchi a hichi tel a lau na hi ua oi? Ginna nei lou na hi uh maw?” achi hi.
41004041	Huchi in lau petmah in alau ua, “Hiai mi kua ahia le, huih leh tuipi nangawn in athu aman uh?” akichi uhi.
41005001	Huan dil gal, Gerasin mite gam ahong tung uhi.
41005002	Long a kipan apawt nung in dawi nin pai khat, han a kipan a hong pawt in amah ana tuak pah hi.
41005003	Hanmunte ah akhosa zel a, kuamah in sik khainiang nangawn a ahen theih louh uh ahi.
41005004	Sikkol leh sik khainiang in ahen ua; himahleh sik khainiang abottat a, sikkol leng ahihtan zel a; kuamah in athuzoh zou kei uhi.
41005005	Sun leh zan in han leh tang ah akikoukou a, suang in aki-at hi.
41005006	Huan gamlatak a kipan Jesu amuhtak in atai a, amah abia hi.
41005007	Huan aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Jesu, Pathian Tungnungpen Tapa, kei leh nang bang ahia i kizolhna om? Hon gimsak lou ding in Pathian min in nget chihtak in ka hon ngen hi,” achi hi.
41005008	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Nang, dawi nin pai, hiai mi sung a kipan pawt in,” ana chi hi.
41005009	Huan ama'n, “Na min bang ahia?” chi in adong hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka min nuai ahi, tampi ka hih ziak un,” achi hi.
41005010	Huai gam a pan amau sawlkhe lou ding in Jesu kiang ah nakpi in angen hi.
41005011	Huan huai lai a tang pang ah vokhon tampi ata uhi.
41005012	Dawi ninte'n, “Vok sung ah hon sawl in, asung ua ka luttheihna ding un,” chi in akiang ah angen uhi.
41005013	Ama'n thu apia a, huchi in dawi ninte apawt ua, vok sung ah alut ua; vokhonte sangnih phial ahi ua, ken ah ataisuk ua, tuipi ah atailut ua; tuipi ah tui hak in asita uhi.
41005014	Huan vok an pete atai ua, khua leh lou ah agen ua, huai thil hong om bang ahia chih en ding in mite ahong taikhawm uhi.
41005015	Jesu kiang ahong tung ua, dawimatpa, alungsim ngei pu leh puansilh a huai a tu amu ua, huchi in alauta uhi.
41005016	Ama ua mute'n, dawimat tung a thiltundan leh vok tanchin amaute ana hilh uhi.
41005017	Huan amau agam ua kipan a pawt ding in angenta uhi.
41005018	Huan long a alut in dawi nin paipa'n amah kiang a omsak ding in angen hi.
41005019	Himahleh Jesu'n aphal kei a, akiang ah, “Na inn a na lawmte kiang ah pai inla, Toupa'n nang a dia thil hon hihsak athupidan leh nang ahon lainatdan va hilh in,” achi zaw hi.
41005020	Huan apai a, Dekapolis ah Jesu'n amah a dia thil ahihsak thupidan atangkoupihta hi. Huan mi tengteng in lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
41005021	Jesu long a gal khat lam a ahong kai nawn in mipi tampitak akiang ah ahong paikhawm ua, amah tuipi gei ah a-om hi.
41005022	Huchi in sinagog a vaihawmte lak a mi khat, amin Jaira, ahong a, Jesu amuhtak in akhebul ah abokkhup hi.
41005023	“Ka tanu naupang chik asi dekdek a; hong dam a, ahintheihna ding in hong pai a atung a na khut koih ding in ka hon ngen hi,” chi in nakpi in athum hi.
41005024	Huchi in Jesu akiang ah ava hoh a, mipi tampitak in zui in, amah aboh lutlut uhi.
41005025	Huan numei khat kum sawm-le-nih sipawt a damlou a-om hi.
41005026	Daktor tampi lak ah nakpitak a thuak in, aneih tengteng azangbei khinta a, phattuam nak sang in ase zosop hi.
41005027	Huai mi'n Jesu tanchin ana za a, anung ah mipi lak ah ahong pai a, apuan mong akhoih hi.
41005028	“Apuan mong kia khoih leng hihdam in ka om mai ding,” alungsim in achi hi.
41005029	Huan thakhat in asipawt akam ngal a, anatna hihdam ahi chih asa ah akitheita hi.
41005030	Jesu'n, asung a kipan thilhihtheihna apawt chih athei a, mi lak ah akihei vialvial a, “Kua ahia ka puan mong khoih?” achi hi.
41005031	Anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Mipi'n ahon boh lutlut uh mu chin a, kua ahia hon khoih? Bangchidan a chi na hia?” achi uhi.
41005032	Ama'n huai thilhihnu muh tum in a-en vialvial hi.
41005033	Huchi in numei in atung a thil ahihsak thei in, lau leh ling kawm in ahong pai a, ama ah bokkhup in, akiang ah thudik ahilh vek hi.
41005034	Ama'n akiang ah, “Tanu na ginna dampih na hi, khamuangtak in pai inla, na natna a kipan na damta in,” achi hi.
41005035	Apau laitak in sinagog a vaihawmpa inn a kipan mi ahong pai ua, “Na tanu asita, sinsakpa hihbuai lailai ding na hiam?” achi uhi.
41005036	Jesu'n athugen uh ngeingaih lou in, sinagog a vaihawmpa kiang ah, “Lau ke'n, gingta mai in,” achi hi.
41005037	Peter, Jakob leh Jakob unau Johan chih louh ngal midang kuamah in amah azuih uh aphal kei hi.
41005038	Huan sinagog vaihawmpa inn atung a, Jesu'n ana buai vengvung, kap vengvung leh mau vengvungte thawm aza hi.
41005039	Ava lut a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a bil am zen a kap na hi ua? Naupang si lou ahi, ihmu ahi zaw,” achi hi.
41005040	Huan amah anuihsan maimah uhi. Himahleh ama'n avek un apawtsak a, naupang omna ah ava lut hi.
41005041	Huan naupang khut alen a, akiang ah, “Talitha kumi,” achi a, huai tuh “Nungaknou, thou in, ka hon chi,” chihna ahi.
41005042	Huan numei naupang athou a, apai pah ngal a; amah kum sawm-le-nih mi ahi. Huan amau lamdang asa mahmah uh.
41005043	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hiai kuamah in thei kei hen,” achi bilbel a, nek ding piak ding thu apia hi.
41006001	Huan huai a kipan apawt a, a-omna kholam atungta a; anungzuite'n azui uhi.
41006002	Sabbath ni ahong hi a, sinagog ah thu ahilh a; mi tampi athu zate'n, “Hiai mi'n hiai thu koi a kipan amuh ahia? Hiai mi kiang a pilna piak bang pilna ahia? Akhut in hichi tel a thillamdang ahih bangchidan ahia?” ana chi uhi.
41006003	“Hiai mi Mari tapa, Jakob, Joses, Judas leh Simon sanggampa, singlem bawlpa ahi kei a hia? Asanggamnute leng hiai a i kiang ua om ahi kei ua hia?” achi ua, lamdang asa mahmah uhi. Huchi in atung ah alungkim kei uhi.
41006004	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Zawlnei zaw ama kholam ah, ama inkote lak ah, ama inn kia lou ngal ah pahtawi louh in a-om ngei kei,” achi hi.
41006005	Huan mi damlou tawmchikte tung a khut koih a ahihdam kia lou ngal huai ah thil thupi lua ahih kei hi.
41006006	Agintak louh uh lamdang asa mahmah hi. Huan thuhilh kawm in khuate atawn vialvial hi.
41006007	Huan sawm-le-nihte asam a, nihnih in asawlkhia a; dawi ninte tung a thuneihna leng apia hi.
41006008	Azinna ua ding in chiangkhun kia lou ngal bangmah, tanghou leh kawlzal leng, akawnggak ua dangka tawi louh ding achi bikbek hi.
41006009	Khedap bel but ding achi a; puanak nih silhthuah kei un, achi lai hi.
41006010	Huan akiang uah, “Koipeuh ah leng na tunna inn uah, huai a kipan na pawt mateng uh tung kinken un.
41006011	Huan koi khua peuh in ahon kipahpih louh ua, na thu uh angaihkhiak kei ualeh huai a kipan na pawt chiang un, amau mohpaih ding in, na khepek nuai ua leivui kai na tatkhe ding uh,” achi hi.
41006012	Huchi in apaikhia ua, mite akisik ding uh ahi chih agen uhi
41006013	Dawi tampi leng adelhkhia ua, damlou tampi leng thau anilh ua, ahihdam uhi.
41006014	Huan kumpipa Herod in ana za a, amin athan ziak in, “Baptispa Johan, misi lak a pan thounawn a, huaiziak a huai thilhihtheihnate'n amah a sem ahi,” achi hi.
41006015	Midangte'n bel, “Elijah ahi, achi ua; midangte'n, ma lai zawlneite bang zawlnei khat ahi,” achi uhi.
41006016	Himahleh Herod in ana zak in, “Alutang ka tanpa ngei, hong thounawnta ahi,” achi hi.
41006017	Herod in a-unau Philip zi Herodias ziak in mi asawlkhia a, Johan amansak a, suangkul ah hen in ana khum khinta a; Herodias zi in ana neita ngal a.
41006018	Johan in lah Herod kiang a, “Na unaupa zi na neihsak siang lou ahi,” ana chih khit tak ziak in.
41006019	Huaiziak in Herodias in amah amudah a, hihlup a-ut a, himahleh ahihthei kei hi.
41006020	Herod in, Johan midiktat leh misiangthou ahi chih atheih ziak in amah akihta a, amah a-enkhia a, athu azak in, thil tampi ahih a, kipaktak in angaikhia hi.
41006021	Huan Herod in apian ni in amithupite, sepaih heutu liante, Galili gam a miliante a ding a zan ankuang alui lai in hun lemtang ahong omta hi.
41006022	Herodias tanu ahong lut a, alam a, Herod leh a-ankuang umpihte akipaksakta hi. Kumpipa'n numei naupang kiang ah, “Na deihdeih hon ngen in, ka hon pe ding,” achi hi.
41006023	“Bangpeuh na hon nget phot, hon pe ding ka hi, ka gam kimkhat nangawn leng,” chi in akiang ah akichiam hial hi.
41006024	Amah apawt a, anu kiang ah, “Bang ka ngen dia?” ava chi hi. Anu'n, “Baptispa Johan lutang,” ana chi hi.
41006025	Huan amah kintak in kumpipa kiang ah ava lut pah a, “Kuangpi a Baptispa Johan lutang na hon piak pah ka ut,” chi in angen hi.
41006026	Huan kumpipa alungkham mahmah a; himahleh akichiamna leh a-ankuang umpihte ziak in asel nuam kei hi.
41006027	Huan kumpipa'n amah vengte lak a sepaih khat alutang va la ding a thu pia in asawl pah hi. Amah suangkul a pai in alutang ava tankheta hi.
41006028	Huai lutang kuang in ahon tawi a, numei naupang kiang ah apia a, huan numei naupang in anu kiang ah apeta hi.
41006029	Huan anungzuite'n azak un, aluang la in, han ah avuita uhi.
41006030	Huan sawltakte Jesu kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, thil bangkim, athilhih peuh uleh athuhilh peuh uh, ahong hilh uhi.
41006031	Ama'n akiang uah, “Noumau kia in gamdai mun ah atuam in hong unla, khawl tadih un,” achi hi. Mipi atam a, akuan leh apai akiphamat ua, an nangawn leng ane man kei uhi.
41006032	Huchi in gamdai mun ah long in apaituamta uhi.
41006033	Mite'n apai lai uh amu ua, mi tampi in amau athei ua, kho chih a pan huai ah khe in ataikhawm ua, ana makhelhta uhi.
41006034	Huchi in amah hong paikhiak in mipi tampitak amuta a, chingtu ding nei lou belamte bang ahih ziak un alainat mahmah a, thu tampi ahilhta hi.
41006035	Huan ni akai mahmahta a, anungzuite akiang ah ahong ua, “Hiai gamdai mun ahi a, ni akaita mahmah hi.
41006036	I kim a loute leh khuate a hoh a, anek ding uh banghiam bek aleitheihna ding un amaute paisakta in,” achi uhi.
41006037	Ama'n bel akiang uah, “Noumau nek ding pia un,” chi in adawng hi. Amau akiang ah, “Makhai zanih man tanghou va lei in nek ding pe ding ka ding uam?” achi uhi.
41006038	Ama'n akiang uah, “Tanghou phel bangzah na nei ua? Hon en dih ua,” achi a. Huan aneih zah uh atheihtak un, “Nga leh ngasa nih,” achi uhi.
41006039	Huan ama'n, avek un loupa hing tung ah apawlpawl a tusak ding in akiang uah thu apia hi.
41006040	Huchi in apawlpawl in, zakhat khawng, sawmnga khawng in atu uhi.
41006041	Huan ama'n tanghou phel nga leh ngasa nih ala a, van lam en in avualzawl a, tanghou phelte abalkham a, ama ua lui ding in anungzuite kiang ah apia a; ngasa nih leng huaite tengteng lak ah ahawmzak hi.
41006042	Avek un ane ua, akham chiat uh.
41006043	Huan tanghou leh ngasa nente bawm sawm-le-nih adim hi.
41006044	Tanghou phel nete pasal piching ngen sangnga ahi uh.
41006045	Huan mipi akikhensak nung in gal khat lam a Bethsaida a na pai masa ding in long ah anungzuite atuangsak pah hi.
41006046	Amau akikhensak nung in thum ding in tang ah ahohtou hi.
41006047	Nitaklam ahong hih in, tuipi laitak ah long a-om a, amah kia in gam ah a-om hi.
41006048	Long kalh a mangbang in amaute amu a, huih in ahilou lam ah asep hi. Huchi in zanven lina ding kuan in tuipi tung a khe a pai in amau lam ahon zuan a, amau paisuak san atum hi.
41006049	Himahleh amah tuipi tung a khe a pai amuh un sikha sa in, akikoukhia uhi.
41006050	Avek un amah amu ua, alau mahmah uhi. Himahleh ama'n amau ahoupih pah a, akiang uah, “Khamuangtak in om un, keimah ka hi, lau kei un,” achi hi.
41006051	Huan long ah akiang uah atuangtou sam a, huih adai maimah hi. Huan lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
41006052	Alungtang uh akhauh ziak in tanghou beu thillamdang thu angaihtuah ban kei uhi.
41006053	Huan gal khat lam akai un Gennesaret gam atung ua, luipiau ah long akhih uhi.
41006054	Long a kipan apawt nung un mite'n amah ana thei pah uhi.
41006055	Huai gam kim tengteng ah atai ua, a-om chih azakna peuh uah alupna un damloute ahon zawng hial uhi.
41006056	Huan khoneu leh kholian ah khopi leh khota leh koipeuh ah leng alutna ah damloute, dawr mun ah alumsak ua, apuan mong bek khoihsak ding in angen ngutngut uhi. Huan amah khoih peuhmah adam uhi.
41007001	Huan Pharisaite leh laigelhmite lak a mi kuate hiam, Jerusalem a kipan akiang ah ahong kikhawm uhi.
41007002	Huaite'n nungzui khenkhatte'n khut ninpi a tanghou anek uh amu ua, nin, chih tuh, sil lou, chihna ahi.
41007003	Pharisaite leh Judate tengteng in upate thugousiah apom tinten ziak un akhut uh hoihtak a asil kei uleh ane ngei kei uhi.
41007004	Dawr mun a kipan a apai un leng akisil phot kei uleh ane ngei kei uhi. Huan thugousiah dang tampi achin uh a-om, nou, bel, taubelte sil thute ah.
41007005	Huchi in Pharisaite leh laigelhmite'n, “Bang achia upate thugousiah bang a na nungzuite om lou a, khut ninpi a tanghou ne ahi ua,” chi in adong uhi.
41007006	Ama'n akiang uah, “Isai in nou milepchiahte thu a na genkhol dik hilhial ve, ‘Hiai mite'n amuk un ahon zahtak ua, alungtang un hon gamlat uh’ achi hi.
41007007	‘Mihing thupiakte asinsak lel ziak un ahon biak uh athawn ahi,’ chih gelh bang in.
41007008	“Pathian thupiakte nelhsiah in mihing thugousiah na len tinten ua ei ve,” achi hi.
41007009	Akiang uah, “Na thugousiah uh na zuihtheihna ding ua Pathian thupiakte na deih louh uh zaw, lem na thei hial ve ua.
41007010	Mosi in, ‘Na nu leh na pa zahtak in,’ ‘Kuapeuh anu hiam apa hiam gensia si mahmah hen,’ achi a;
41007011	nou hichibang in na chi ua, mi'n, anu hiam, apa hiam kiang a, ‘Na hon phatuampihna ding Korban ahita,’ achih, (huai tuh Pathian kiang a piak, chihna ahi).
41007012	Anu a ding hiam, apa a ding hiam in bangmah hihsak na phal nawn kei nak uh.
41007013	Na thugousiah uh na piak sawnsawnna un Pathian thu bangmah lou na suah uhi; huai bang thil tampi na hih uh,” achi hi.

41007015	mihing polam a kipan asung a lut amah hihnin thei bangmah a-om kei; mihing sung a kipan a hong pawt, huaite mihing hihnin ahi zaw hi.
41007016	Kuapeuh zakna ding bil nei in, za hen!” achi hi.
41007017	Mipite inn a alutsan nung in anungzuite'n gentehna thu amah adongchian uhi.
41007018	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou leng huchi tel a theihsiamna nei lou na hi uh maw? Bangpeuh polam a kipan a mihing sung a lut in amah ahihnin thei kei chih na thei kei ua hia?
41007019	Alungtang sung a lut lou a, agilpi sung a alut zawk ziak in leh dailenna a pawtkhe mai ahih ziak in,” achi a. (Huai tuh an chiteng asiang, achihna ahi).
41007020	“Mihing sung a pan hong pawt, huai ngeingei in mihing ahihnin nak ahi.
41007021	Mihingte sunglam lungtang a kipan in, ngaihtuahna giloute ahong pawt nak hi;
41007022	kingaihna, guktakna, tualthahna, angkawmna leh enna, gitlouhna, khemhatna, bevenna, hazatna gensiatna, kisaktheihna leh haihuainate ahi.
41007023	Hiai thil giloute tengteng sunglam a kipan ahong pawt a, mihing ahihnin nak hi,” achi hi.
41007024	Huan athou a, huai a kipan in Tura leh Sidon uk ah apaita hi. Inn ah alut a, kuamah theih adeih kei a; himahleh akisel thei tuan kei.
41007025	Huchi in numei khat, atanu naupang chik dawi nin pai in, atanchin ana za a, akhebul ah abokkhup hi.
41007026	Huai numei tuh Grik mi ahi a, Sirophoinisia gam a piang ahi. Ama'n atanu sung a kipan a dawi delhkhe ding in angen hi.
41007027	Ama'n akiang ah, “Tate hong vah masa uhen aw; tate tanghou laksak a uite kiang a paih kilawm lou ahi,” achi hi.
41007028	Numei in akiang ah, “Toupa, hih zaw ahi na a, himahleh dohkan nuai a uite'n leng tate tanghou nen ane zel sam ve uah oi,” chi in adawng hi.
41007029	Ama'n, akiang ah, “Na thugen ziak in paita in; na tanu sung a kipan dawi apawtta hi,” achi hi.
41007030	Huan a-inn ah apaita, atanu, dawi in apawtkhiaksan, lupna a lum ava muta hi.
41007031	Huan Tura gam a kipan apawt nawn a, Sidon khua tawn in Dekapolis gam paikan in Galili tuipi atungta hi.
41007032	Mi khat nangong, pau leng pau kichian thei lou akiang ah hon tonpih ua, atung a khut koih ding in angen uhi.
41007033	Ama'n mipi lak a kipan in amah kia in apituam a, akhutzungte in abilsung akhoih a, chil sia in alei akhoihsak hi.
41007034	Van lam en in akhoisa huthut hi. Huan akiang ah, “Ephatha,” achi a; huai bel, “Kihongta in,” chihna ahi.
41007035	Huchi in abilte hong kihong a, aleigakna leng ahong kiphel a, chiantak in apau theita hi.
41007036	Akiang uah, kuamah hilh lou ding achi bikbek a; himahleh anak kham peuhleh, anak tangkoupihzaw sem uhi.
41007037	“Ama'n bangkim hoihtak in ahih a; nangongte nangawn apausak zel,” achi ua, lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
41008001	Huai nite in, mipi tampitak ahong om nawn ua, nek ding bangmah anei kei ua, ama'n anungzuite asam a, akiang uah,
41008002	“Mipite tu in ka kiang ah ni thum a-omta ua, nek ding bangmah aneih louh ziak un ka lainat mahmah hi.
41008003	An ngawl in a-inn uah paisak leng lamkal ah abah kha ding uh; khenkhatte houh ahong paina uh agamla mahmah ngal a,” achi hi.
41008004	Anungzuite'n, “Mi'n hiai gamdai ah koi a tanghou in ahia hiai mite ahihvah theih ding uh?” chi in amah adawng uhi.
41008005	Huan ama'n, “Tanghou phel bangzah na nei ua?” chi in amau adong a. Amau, “Phel sagih,” achi uhi.
41008006	Huan mipite lei a tu ding in thu apia a; tanghou phel sagih ala a, kipahthu agen khit in abalkham a, ama ua lui ding in anungzuite kiang ah apia a; huchi in mipite ma ah aluita uhi.
41008007	Ngasa tawmchik leng anei ua; ama'n avualzawl a, huaite leng ama ua lui ding in thu apia hi.
41008008	Huchi in ane ua, akham chiat ua; bawm sagih dim in akhamval nen uh aluak uhi.
41008009	Amau sangli vel ahi ua; ama'n amaute apaisakta hi.
41008010	Amah bel anungzuite kiang ah long ah atuang pah a, huchi in Dalmanutha gam atung uhi.
41008011	Pharisaite ahong pai ua, amah ze-etna ding in, amah a pan van a kipan a chiamtehna zong in amah ahong sel uhi.
41008012	Huan amah alungsim in nakpi in anak kuaikuai a, “Bang achia hiai khangte'n chiamtehna zong uh ahia? Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai khangte kiang ah chiamtehna himhim piak ahi kei ding,” achi hi.
41008013	Huchi in amaute paisan in long ah atuang nawn a, gal khat lam ah apaisanta hi.
41008014	Huan anungzuite'n tanghou atawi mangngilh ua, tanghou phel khat kia lou ngal long ah tanghou dang himhim lah anei kei uhi.
41008015	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Pharisaite silngou leh Herod silngou lak ah kiveng unla, pilvang un,” achi hi.
41008016	Amau, “Tanghou i neih louh ziak ei ve,” chi in akingaihtuah uhi.
41008017	Jesu'n huai atheih in, akiang uah, “Bangziak a tanghou na neih louh ziak ua kingaihtuah na hi ua? Tu nangawn in na theisiam kei lai uh maw? Theisiam lou lai maw? Na lungtang uh na khauhsak ua hia?
41008018	Mit nei napi in na mu kei ua hia? Bil nei napi in na za kei ua hia? Theigige lou uh maw?
41008019	Sangnga lak a tanghou phel nga ka balkhap lai in anen bawm bangzah ahia na luahdim uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Sawm-le-nih,” achi uhi.
41008020	Huan sangli a dia sagih ka balkhap lai in, anen bawm bangzah ahia na luahdim uh? achi a. Amau akiang ah, “Sagih,” achi uhi.
41008021	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bangchidan a tu nangawn a theisiam lou lailai na hi ua?” achi hi.
41008022	Huai nung in Bethsaida ahong tung uhi. Huan akiang ah mittaw ahon pi ua, amah khoih ding in angen uhi.
41008023	Ama'n mittaw khut alen a, khua a kipan apikhia hi; amit ah chil sia in atung a akhut akoih khit in, “Khua na mu thei hia?” chi in adong hi.
41008024	Amah hong dakkhia a, “Mite ka mu; singkung pai bang in ka mu,” achi hi.
41008025	Amit ah akhut akoih nawn a, ahong hakkhia a, ahong dam maimah a, bangkim chiantak in amutheita hi.
41008026	Huan Jesu'n, khua ah leng lut ke'n chi in a-inn ah apaisakta hi.
41008027	Huan Jesu leh anungzuite ahong pai zel ua, Kaisaria Philippi khuate ahong tung ua; huan pai kawm in anungzuite kiang ah, “Mite'n kei kua ka hi ahon chi ua?” chi in adong hi.
41008028	Amau, “Baptispa Johan ahi, ahon chi ua; midang in Elijah ahi, ahon chi ua; khenkhat in bel, zawlnei kuahiam ahi, ahon chi uh,” achi uhi.
41008029	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Ahihleh nou kei kua ka hi na hon chi ua?” chi in adong hi. Peter in akiang ah, “Khrist na hi,” chi in adawng hi.
41008030	Huan ama'n atanchin kuamah hilh louh ding in achi bikbek hi.
41008031	Huan Mihing Tapa in thil tampi athuak dingte, upate, siampu liante, laigelhmite deih louh a a-om ding, hihlup a a-om ding leh ni thum nung a athohnawn ding thute amau ahilh hi.
41008032	Huai thute chiantak in agen hi. Huan Peter in amah apituam a, atai hi.
41008033	Himahleh amah ahong kihei a, anungzuite muh in, Peter atai a, “Setan, ka nung ah pai in, Pathian thilte ngaihtuah lou in, mihing thilte na ngaihtuah zaw,” achi hi.
41008034	Huan mipite, anungzuite toh asam a, akiang uah, “Kuapeuh in hon zuih a-utleh amah kingaihsak lou in, ama kros pua in hon zui hen.
41008035	Kuapeuh ahinna humbit ut in atan ding a; kuapeuh keimah ziak leh tanchinhoih ziak a ahinna tan in ahumbit ding hi.
41008036	Mi'n khovel apum in nei henla, ahinna tan taleh amah a ding in bang aphatuam dia?
41008037	Mi'n ahinna tang in bang ape thei dia?
41008038	Kuapeuh hiai khang a angkawm leh gilou chingte lak ah keimah leh ka thu zumpih, Mihing Tapa in, angel siangthoute toh a Pa thupina a kivan a ahong hun chiang in, huai mi ahon zumpih thuk sam ding,” achi hi.
41009001	Huan akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai a dingh akhente, Pathian lalgam thilhihtheihna toh hong tung amuh ma ua, sihna chiam lou ding a-om uh,” achi hi.
41009002	Huan ni guk nung in Jesu'n Peter, Jakob leh Johan apituam a, tang sangtak ah apaitouhpih a; ama uah amel omdan ahong lamdangta hi.
41009003	Huchi in apuansilhte lei a puansawpmi in asawp ngou theih louh khop hial a ngou velvol in ahong lamdangta hi.
41009004	Akiang uah Elijah leh Mosi ahong kilak ua, Jesu toh akihou uhi.
41009005	Peter in Jesu ahoupih a, “Heutupa, ei a ding in hiai a om ahoih; aidakbuk thum i lam ding ua, nang a ding in khat, Mosi a ding in khat, Elijah a ding in khat,” achi hi.
41009006	Alau mahmah ziak un agen pen leng athei kei hi.
41009007	Huan amau liah in meipi ahong kai a; meipi a pan aw ahong suak a, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak ahi, amah thu ngai un,” achi hi.
41009008	Kintak in akimvel a-en ua, akiang ua Jesu kia lou ngal kuamah amuta kei uhi.
41009009	Huan tang a kipan apaisuk lai un, “Misi lak a kipan Mihing Tapa athohnawn khit mateng athil muhte uh kuamah hilh louh ding,” achi bikbek hi.
41009010	Huchi in huai thu avom kinken uhi, misi lak a pan thohnawn pen bang chihna hi ding ahia chih akidong uhi.
41009011	Huan amau akiang ah, “Bangchidan a laigelhmite'n, Elijah ahong pai masa ding ahi,” chi ahi ua? chi in adong uhi.
41009012	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bangkim bawlhoih thak ding in Elijah ahong pai masa him ahi; ahihleh thil tampi athuak ding a, muhdah a mawkbawl in a-om ding chi a Mihing Tapa tungthu bangchidan a gelh a na om ahia le? achi hi.
41009013	Himahleh ka hon hilh ahi, Elijah zaw ahong pai khinta hi, atanchin agelh bang ngei un atung ah a-utut un ahih khinta uhi,” achi hi.
41009014	Huan nungzuite kiang atunsuk un, akim ua mipi tampite leh laigelhmite ana kisel lai uh amu uhi.
41009015	Mipi tengteng in amah amuhtak un lamdang asa mahmah ua, akiang ah atai pah ua, chibai ava buk kheukhou uhi.
41009016	Ama'n akiang uah, “Amaute toh bang thu ahia na na kisel uh?” chi in adong hi.
41009017	Mipi lak a mi khat in akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, ka tapa, dawi mat pau thei lou dia abawl, na kiang ah ka hon pi a;
41009018	amatna peuh ah apuksak ekek a; huchi in achilphuan pawt in, aha agawi a, ahong kongkaw a; na nungzuite'n delhkhe le uh ka chihleh adelhkhe thei kei uh,” achi hi.
41009019	Ama'n akiang uah, “Ginna nei lou khangte aw, bang tan na kiang ua om ding a bang tan hon thuak thei ding ka hia? Amah ka kiang ah hon pi un,” chi in adawng hi.
41009020	Huan amah Jesu kiang ah ahon pi ua; dawi in amah amuhtak in nakpi in naupang asawisa pah a; huchi in lei ah apuk a, achilphuan kai zezu in akikhuk volvol hi.
41009021	Huan ama'n apa kiang ah, “Hichibang a ahong kipatna bang tan ahita a?” chi in adong hi. Ama'n, “Anaupan lai a kipan ahita,”
41009022	“Huchi in amah hihmangthang ding in tamveipi mei ah leh tui ah asawnpuk a; himahleh nang bangchi chi hiam bek a na hihtheihleh hon hehpih inla, hon huh in,” achi hi.
41009023	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Na gintakleh e! Agingtami a ding in bangkim hihtheih ahi,” achi hi.
41009024	Huchi in naupang' pa'n khitui toh, “Toupa, ka gingta hi, ka ginlahna hon huh in,” chi in akikoukhia hi.
41009025	Jesu'n mipi hong taikhawm amuh in, dawi nin atai a, akiang ah, “Nang dawi pau thei lou leh nangong, thu ka hon pia hi, asung a kipan pawt inla, lut nawn ke'n,” achi hi.
41009026	Huchi in akikoukheta a, nakpitak a asawi khit in apawtta a, naupang misi bang in a-om a; huchi in mi tamzawte'n, “Asi ahi,” achi uhi.
41009027	Jesu'n akhut alen a, akaithou a; huan ahong thou maimahta hi.
41009028	Huan Jesu inn a ava lutleh anungzuite'n, “Bangchi a kou delhkhe thei lou ka hi ua?” chi in asim in adong uhi.
41009029	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hichibang zaw thumna leh an ngawlna kia lou ngal in bangchi mah in apawt thei kei,” achi hi.
41009030	Huan huai a kipan apaikhia ua; Galili gam paikan in, kuamah theih adeih kei,
41009031	anungzuite asinsak lai ahih ziak in akiang uah, “Mihing Tapa mihingte khut ah matsak in a-om dia, athat ding ua; ahihlup nung uh ni thum nung in athounawn ding,” achi ngal a.
41009032	Himahleh athugen atheisiam kei ua, amah lah adong ngam kei uhi.
41009033	Huan Kapernaum khua ahong tung ua; insung a a-om lai in, akiang uah, “Lampi a bang thu ahia na kisel uh?” chi in adong hi.
41009034	Lampi ah, i lak uah kua i thupipen dia? chi a ana kisel khit ziak un adai dide uhi.
41009035	Huan amah atu a, sawm-le-nihte asam a, akiang uah, “Kuapeuh in masapen hih a-utleh mi tengteng sang in ananungpen in a-om ding ahi, mi tengteng nna sem in a-om ding ahi,” achi hi.
41009036	Huan naupang chik khat akai a, alak uah adingsak a; apom a akiang uah,
41009037	“Kuapeuh ka min ziak a hiai bang naupang chik khat kipahpih keimah hon kipahpih ahi a, kuapeuh kei hon kipahpih zaw, kei hon kipahpih ahi kei ding, hon sawlpa kipahpih ahi zaw uh,” achi hi.
41009038	Johan in akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, kuahiam na min a dawite delhkhia ka mu ua; ahon zuih louh ziak in ka kham uhi,” achi hi.
41009039	Jesu'n, “Kham nawn kei un; kuamah ka min a thil thupi hih kei hon gense pah thei a-om kei hi.
41009040	Kuapeuh ei hon dou lou i lam a pang ahi.
41009041	Kuapeuh Khrist mi na hih ziak ua tui nou khat dawn ding hon pia, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, akipahman atan kei hial ding hi.
41009042	“Huan kuapeuh hon gingta neuchikte lak a khat leng hihpuk, angawng ah buh gawizanna suang lianpi oksak in tuipi ah khe le uh, amah a ding in ahoihzaw ding hi.
41009043	Huan na khut in ahon hihpukleh tankhia in; melhem a hinna a lut nang ding in ahoihzaw, khut nih nei a gawtmun mei mit thei lou a pai sang in,
41009044	athan uh asih louh a, meikuang mihlouhna ah.
41009045	Na khe in ahon hihpukleh tankhia in, khe nih nei a gawtmun a paih a om sang in, khebai a hinna a lut nang a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
41009046	Athan uh asih louh a, meikuang amihlouhna ah.

41009048	Athan uh sih ngeilouhna leh mei mih ngeilouhna ah.
41009049	Michih mei a soh a om ding uh ahi ngal a.
41009050	Chi ahoih hi; himahleh, chi apen khitleh bang in na hih al nawn ding ua? Noumau ngei ah chi nei unla, khat-le-khat kilem in om un,” achi hi.
41010001	Huan adingh a, huai a kipan Judia gam ah leh Jordan gal ah apaita hi. Akiang ah mipite ahong kikhawm ua; huchi in ahih ngeidan in amaute thu ahilh nawn hi.

41010004	Amau, “Mosi in kimakna laigelh a mak aphal,” achi uhi.
41010005	Himahleh Jesu'n akiang uah, “Na lungtang khauh ziak un ahi huai thupiak nou a dia ahon gelhsak.

41010007	Huai thu ziak in pasal in anu leh apa apaisan ding a, azi alen tinten ding;
41010008	huchi in anih un sa khat ahong hita ding ua; nih ahi nawnta kei ua, sa khat ahong hi zawta ding uh.

41010010	Huan inn ah anungzuite'n huai thu amah adong nawn uhi.

41010012	ama'n leng apasal khen a, midang aneihleh angkawm ahi,” achi hi.
41010013	Mite'n akhoih ding in naupang neute ahon pi ua; huan nungzuite'n huai mite ana tai uhi.

41010015	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, “Kuapeuh naupang neute'n akipahpih bang a Pathian lalgam kipahpih lou asung ah alut kei hial ding,” achi hi.
41010016	Huan amau pom in, atung uah akhut akoih a, avualzawlta hi.
41010017	Huan pai ding a apawt lai in mi khat amah lam ah ahong tai a, ama ah akhukdin a, akiang ah, “Sinsakpa hoih, tangtawn hinna ka neihtheihna ding in bang ka hih dia?” chi in adong hi.
41010018	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Bangziak a hoih hon chi na hia? Mi khat kia lou ngal kuamah hoih a-om kei uh, huai Pathian ahi.
41010019	Thupiakte na thei vo oi; tual that ke'n, angkawm ke'n, gu ke'n, hek ke'n, khem ke'n, na nu leh na pa zahtak in, chihte,” achi hi.
41010020	Ama'n akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, huai tengteng ka naupan lai a kipan ka zuita,” achi hi.

41010022	Himahleh, huai thu ah amel ahong mual a, lungkhamtak in apaimangta; mihausa ahih ziak in.

41010024	Nungzuite'n athugen lamdang asa mahmah uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Naute aw, hauhna muangte a ding in Pathian lalgam a lut ahaksa ngei e.

41010026	Amau lamdang asa mahmah ua, akiang ah, “Ahihleh, kua hotdam ahi thei dia?” achi uhi.
41010027	Jesu'n amau a-en a, “Huai zaw mihing a ding in hih vual ahi kei, Pathian a ding in bel hih vual louh a-om kei; Pathian a ding in bangkim hihtheih ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
41010028	Peter in akiang ah, “Ngai dih, kou bangkim paisan in ka hon zui ua,” chi in agen pan a.

41010030	tu damsung mahmah in, innte, unaupate, sanggamnute, nute, tate, gamte aleh za in, sawinate toh, hun hong tung ding a tangtawn hinna toh mu lou ding mahmah a-om kei hi.
41010031	Himahleh mi tampi masapen a omte nanungpen ahong hi ding ua, nanungpente leng masapen ahong hi ding uh,” achi hi.
41010032	Huan Jerusalem a hohtou ding in lampi ah a-om ua; Jesu'n ama uh akai hi. Amau lamdang asa mahmah ua; ahon zuite'n alau uhi. Ama'n sawm-le-nihte apituam nawn a, atung a tung dingte ahilh hi.
41010033	“Ngai dih ua, Jerusalem a hohtou ding i hi ua; Mihing Tapa siampu liante leh laigelhmite khut ah matsak in a-om ding; amau si ding in atung ah thu ahihpuk ding ua, Zentelte kiang ah ape ding uh.
41010034	Amau nuihza bawlna in anei ding ua, chil asiatkhum ding ua, avo ding ua, athat ding uh; himahleh ni thum nung in athounawn ding,” chi in atung a thil tung dingte amaute ahilh hi.
41010035	Huan Zebedai tapa Jakob leh Johan in amah ahong naih ua, akiang ah, “Sinsakpa na kiang a ka hon nget peuh uh na hon hihsak ka ut uh,” achi uhi.
41010036	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou a ding in bang hon hihsak leng na ut ua?” achi hi.
41010037	Amau akiang ah, “Na thupina ah na taklam ah khat, na veilam ah khat hon tusak in,” achi uhi.
41010038	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Na nget uh na thei kei ua ahi. Ka nou dawn ding na dawn thei ding ua hia? Ka baptisma tan ding leng na tang thei ding ua hia?” achi hi.

41010040	himahleh ka taklam leh ka veilam a tut ding thu zaw kei piak ding ahi kei a, abawlsakte uh a ding ahi zaw,” achi hi.
41010041	Huan sawmte'n huai azak un, Jakob leh Johan tung ah alungkim kei uhi.
41010042	Jesu'n amau asam a, akiang uah, “Zentelte tung a vaihawm dia asehte uh atung uah alian mahmah ua, amiliante un atung uah thu anei mahmah uh chih na thei uhi.

41010044	Kuapeuh na lak ua masapen hih utmi tengteng sikha a apan ding ahi.
41010045	Mihing Tapa hial leng nna sepsak a om ding in ahong pai kei a, nasem ding leh mi tampi tatna dia ahinna pe ding a hong pai ahi zaw hi,” achi hi.
41010046	Huan Jeriko khua ahong tung uhi; huchi in Jesu, Jeriko a kipan anungzuite leh mipi tampitak toh apawt lai un khutdoh mittaw, Timai tapa Bartimai lam gei ah ana tu hi.
41010047	Huan Nazaret Jesu ahi chih azaktak in, “Jesu, David Tapa, ka tung ah zahngai in,” chi in akikou hi.

41011001	Huchi in Jerusalem khua tung ding a akisak ua, Olive tang a Bethphage leh Bethani kho kiang atun un, anungzuite lak a mi nih asawl a, akiang uah,

41011003	Huan kuapeuh in, huai bangziak a hih ahon chih uleh, Toupa'n adeih a ahi; hiai ah ahon koihsak nawn pah na ding, na chi ding uh,” achi hi.
41011004	Huan ahohta ua, kongzing ah kongkhak polam a sabiltungnou kikhih ava mu ua; huai aphelta uhi.

41011008	Mi tampi in lampi ah apuan uh aphah ua; midang in leng gam a sawlnah sat in aphah uhi.
41011009	Amalam a paite leh anunglam a hon zuite'n: “Hosanna! Toupa min a hong pai ahampha!
41011010	Gam hong tung ding, i Pa David lalgam ahampha! Tungnungpen ah Hosanna!” chi in akikou uhi.
41011011	Huan Jerusalem a tempul ah ava lut a; bangkim a-et velvel khit in nitaklam leng ahong hita a, apawt a, sawm-le-nihte toh Bethani ah apaita uhi.

41011016	Tempul a mite'n van alut paisuakpih uh aphalta kei hi.
41011017	Huan amaute sinsak in akiang uah, “Ka inn nam chih a ding in thumna inn achi ding uh, chih gelh ahi kei a hia? Nou suamhatte khuk in na bawl ua,” achi hi.

41011019	Huan nitaklam ahong hih in khopi a kipan apawtkhia uhi.

41011022	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Pathian gingta un.
41011023	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh in hiai tang kiang ah, na kisuan inla, tuipi ah na kipailut in chi a, alungtang a ginglel lou a agen atung ngeingei ding chih gingta peuhmah in agen bangbang amu ding uhi.
41011024	Huaiziak in ka hon hilh ahi, bangkim thum a na nget peuhmah uh musa in kiging unla huchi in na mu ding uh.
41011025	Thum a na din peuhmah chiang un kua tung ah leng thubuai banghiam na neih uleh ngaidam un; na Pa uh van a om in leng na tatlekna uh ahon ngaihdam theihna ding in.
41011026	Himahleh na ngaihdam kei uleh, na Pa uh van a om in na tatleknate uh ahon ngaidam sam kei ding,” chi in adawng hi.
41011027	Huan Jerusalem khua atung nawn ua; tempul a avak lai in siampu liante, laigelhmite leh upate akiang ah ahong pai ua,
41011028	akiang ah, “Kua thu in ahia hiai thilte na hih? Hiai thilte hih ding in kua'n ahia nang thu hon piak?” achi uhi.

41011030	“Johan Baptisma van a kipan hia; mihing a kipan? Hon dawng un,” achi hi.
41011031	Huan akingaihtuah ua, “Van a kipan chi lehang, Bang achia athu gingta lou na hi ua, ahon chi dia;
41011032	himahleh mihing a kipan chi leng mipi akihta ua; mi tengteng in Johan zawlnei taktak in abawl chiat uhi.”
41011033	Huchi in Jesu adawng ua, “Thei kei ung,” achi uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Ke'n leng kua thu in ahia hiai thilte ka hih, ka hon hilh sam kei ding,” achi hi.
41012001	Huan gentehna thu in akiang uah agen a, “Mi kuahiam in grephuan abawl a, akim huang in a-um a, grep sukna ding khuk atou a, insang alam a, loukhou mite kiang ah khohloh ding in apia a, gamdang ah apaisanta hi.
41012002	Agah loh hun in atansik amau kiang a kipan la ding in lou khohloh mite kiang ah sikha khat asawl hi.
41012003	Huai mi ana man ua, avua ua, khutvuak in apaisak uhi.
41012004	Huan sikha dang akiang uah asawl nawn a; huai mi leng alu ana hihliam ua, zumhuaipi in ana bawl uhi.
41012005	Huan sikha dang asawl nawn zel a; huai mi ana that ua, sikha dang tampi leng, khenkhat ana vua ua, khenkhat ana that uhi.
41012006	Huan sawl ding khat, atapa deihtak kia anei lai hi; ‘Ka tapa zaw ana zahtak ding uh’ chi in amah ananungpen in akiang uah asawl hi.
41012007	Himahleh huai lou khohloh mite'n, ‘hiai mi gouluah dingpa ahi; i that ding uh aw; huchi in agouluah ding ei a ahi mai ding,’ akichi uhi.
41012008	Huchi in amah aman ua, that in, grephuan a pan alawnkhia uhi.
41012009	Huaiziak in grephuan neipa'n bangchi in ahon hih dia? Lou khohloh mite ahon hihmangthang dia; grephuan midangte ape ding hi.
41012010	Hiai Laisiangthou na sim kei ua hia? ‘Inn lam mite' suang deih louhpen, huai mahmah aning a suang phatuampen ahong hita hi.
41012011	Huai Toupa hih ahi, i mitmuh un alamdang hi, chih,’ ” achi hi.
41012012	Huan amah mat atum ua; himahleh huai gentehna thu amau dem a agen ahi chih atheih ziak un, mipite alau uhi. Huchi in amah anusia ua, apaimangta uhi.
41012013	Huan athugen a mat ahihtheihna ding in Pharisaite leh Herod pawl a mi kuate hiam akiang ah asawl uhi.
41012014	Huchi in amau ahong tun un akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, midiktat na hi a, deihsak tuam kuamah na nei kei chih ka thei uh, kuamah khentuam nei lou in, chihtak ngial in Pathian lam thu na hilh zel hi; Kaisar kiang a leiman liau asiang hia siang lou?
41012015	Pe ding ka hi uhia, pe lou ding?” achi uhi. Ama'n alepchiahdan uh thei in, akiang uah, “Bangziak a hon ze-et na hi ua? Makhai hon tawi un, ka en ding,” achi hi.
41012016	Ahon tawi ua, ama'n akiang uah, “Hiai kua lim leh kua min ahia?” achi hi.
41012017	Amau, “Kaisar a,” achi uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Kaisar thilte Kaisar kiang ah pia unla, Pathian thilte Pathian kiang ah peta unla,” achi hi. Huchi in lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
41012018	Huan Saddukai, thohnawnna a-om kei chite, akiang ah ahong ua,
41012019	akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, Mosi in, kuapeuh a-unaupa'n ta nei lou in azi sihsan taleh a-unaupa'n azi luah in a-unaupa a ding in chi asuahsak ding chi in ahon gelhsak hi.
41012020	Ahi, sal sagih a-om ua; a-upapen in zi anei a, chi suah lou in asi hi.
41012021	Huan anihna in aluah a, chi suah lou in asi nawn zel a; athumna in huchi mah bang in.
41012022	Huchi in sal sagihte chi suah lou in asita ua, atawpna ah numei leng asita hi.
41012023	Thohnawn hun in akua pen zi ahi dia le? Sagihte'n zi in anei chiat ngal ua,” chi in adong uhi.
41012024	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Hiai ziak hilou hia, na theihkhelh nak uh, Laisiangthou leh Pathian thilhihtheihna na theih louh ziak un?
41012025	Misi lak a pan athohnawn hun un zi leh pasal a kinei lou in, van angelte bang ahi zawta ding uh ahi.
41012026	Huan misite kaihthoh a a-om ding thu lah Mosi laibu a loubukh kuang thu a Pathian in, ‘Kei Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian leh Jakob' Pathian ka hi, chi a, amah ahoupihdan na sim kei ua hia?’
41012027	Amah misi Pathian ahi kei a, mihing Pathian ahi zaw; na theikhial tel uh,” achi hi.
41012028	Huan laigelhmite lak a mi khat ahong a, akisel uh ana ngaikhia a, Jesu'n amaute thutak in adawng chih athei a, akiang ah, “Thupiak tengteng ah koi ahia thupipen?” chi in adong hi.
41012029	Jesu'n, “Athupipen hiai ahi; Israel aw, ngai dih uh, Toupa i Pathian uh Toupa khat kia ahi;
41012030	‘Toupa na Pathian na lungtang tengteng in, na kha tengteng in, na lungsim tengteng in leh na hatna tengteng in na it ding ahi,’ chih.
41012031	Azom hiai ahi, ‘Nangmah na ki-it bang in na vengte na it ding,’ chih. Hiaite sang a thupiak thupizaw a-om kei,” chi in adawng hi.
41012032	Laigelhmi'n akiang ah, “Hina ngei e, Sinsakpa amah zaw khat kia ahi a, amah lou zaw kuamah dang a-om kei,
41012033	amah lungtang tengteng, theihsiamna tengteng, hatna tengteng a it a, eimah i ki-it bang a vengte it halmang thilpiak leh kithoihna tengteng sang in ahoihzaw petmah chih, na gen dik ngei,” achi hi.
41012034	Piltak in adawng chih Jesu'n atheih in akiang ah, “Pathian lalgam na gamlat kei hi,” achi a, huai nungsiah kuamah in thu adong ngamta kei uhi.
41012035	Huan tempul a Jesu'n thu ahilh lai in, amau ahoupih a, “Khrist David tapa ahi chih laigelhmite'n bangchidan a gen uh ahia?
41012036	David ngei in, Kha Siangthou in, Toupa'n, ka Toupa kiang ah, ‘Na melmate na khepek ngakna a ka bawl masiah ka taklam ah tu in, achi,’ achi hi.
41012037	“David ngei in amah Toupa, achi ngal a, koi a kipan in ahia amah atapa ahih?” achi hi. Huan mivantang in kipaktak in athu angaikhia uhi.
41012038	Huan athuhilhna ah, “Laigelhmite lak ah pilvang un; amau puanaktual silh a vak a-ut ua, dawr munte ah mite chibai abuk ua,
41012039	sinagog ah tutphah hoihpen leh ankuangluina a mun hoihpen adeihtuam nak uh;
41012040	meithai inn anegai ua, kilimbawl in sawt pipi athum uh; huaite'n siam louh tanna lianzaw atang ding uh,” achi hi.
41012041	Huan sumkholna zawn ah atu a; sumkholna a mipi sumkhiakdan a-en a; mihau tampitak in tampipi akhia uhi.
41012042	Meithai zawngtak ahong pai a, dal dangka muza nih akhia a, huai tuh paihsa khat hu ahi.
41012043	Jesu'n anungzuite asam a, akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, sumkholna a khe tengteng lak ah hiai meithai zawngtak in akhe tampen hi.
41012044	Hiaite tengteng in aneihlet uh akhia ua; ama'n zaw adeihthoh laitak, aneihsun, ahinna ding tengteng akhe vek ahi,” achi hi.
41013001	Huan tempul a kipan apaikhiak lai in, anungzuite lak a mi khat in akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, en dih, suang leh innte athupi mahmah hi,” achi hi.
41013002	Jesu'n, akiang ah, “Hiai inn thupitakte na mu maw? Hihchip louh a, suang kichiang hiai ah a-om kei ding,” achi hi.
41013003	Huan Olive tang a tempul zawn a atut lai in, Peter, Jakob, Johan leh Andrute'n akiang ah,
41013004	“Huaite chikchiang in ahong om dia? Huai tengteng atun ding chiang in chiamtehna bang a-om dia, hon hilh in,” chi in asimdot uhi.
41013005	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Kuamah in hon khemlouhna ding in pilvang un.
41013006	Mi tampi, Khrist ka hi, chi in keimah min lou in ahong pai ding ua, mi tampi akhempuk ding uh.
41013007	Huan kidou thu leh kidou thuthang na zak hun chiang un mangbang kei un; huaite hong tung ding him ahi uh. Himahleh atawpna zaw ahi nai tadih kei ding.
41013008	Nam tuam leh nam tuam akidou ding ua, gam tuam leh gam tuam akidou ding ua; mun tuamtuam ah zin aling dia; kial ake ding hi. Hiaite nauvei kipatna ahi.
41013009	“Himahleh pilvang un; vaihawmte ahon mansak ding ua; sinagog ah ahon vo ding ua; keimah ziak in gamukte leh kumpipate ma ah theihpihna pe ding in na dingh ding uhi.
41013010	Huan nam tengteng kiang a tanchinhoih hilh masak ding ahi.
41013011	Huan hon pi a, ahon matsak hun chiang un, bang ka gen dia chi in ngaihtuah khawl kei un; ahuntak a theihsak a na om peuh uh, huai ngeingei gen zaw un; agen pen zaw noumau hilou in Kha Siangthou ahi zaw ding hi.
41013012	Huan hihlup ding in unaupa leh unaupa akimansak ding ua, pa in atapa amansak ding a; tate'n leng anu leh pate uh adou ding ua, athatsak ding uhi.
41013013	Keimah min ziak in mi tengteng huat na hi ding uh; himahleh atawp pha a thuak mualsuahmi, huai mi hotdam in a-om ding hi.
41013014	“Himahleh zawlnei Daniel in agen bang a hihmangbangpa kihhuai adinlouhna ding a dingh na muh chiang un, asim peuh in a-omdan thei hen, huai hun chiang in Judia gam a omte tang sang ah taimang uhen;
41013015	inn tung a om kum kei hen; a-insung a thil lakhe ding in lut sam kei hen.
41013016	Huan lou a om apuansilh la ding in kik nawn kei hen.
41013017	Huai ni in naupaite leh naunou pomte tung agik ding hi.
41013018	Huaite phalbi a ahong tunlouhna ding in thum un.
41013019	Huai nite bang a gimthuakna thupi Pathian siam leilung pian tung a kipan tutan in a-om ngei nai kei a, chik mah chiang in a-om ngei nawn kei ding hi.
41013020	Huan Toupa'n huai nite hihtom keileh mihing dam in asuakta kei ding; himahleh, telte ziak in nite ahihtom hi.
41013021	“Huai hun chiang in, kuapeuh in na kiang ua, ‘En dih uh; hiai ah Khrist a-om!’ ahihkeileh ‘En dih uh; huai ah a-om!’ hiam achih chiang un gingta kei un.
41013022	Khrist takloute leh zawlnei takloute hong pawt ding ahi ngal ua, huaite'n chiamtehna leh thillamdang ahih ding uh; hi thei ngialleh telte nangawn akhemtheihna ding un.
41013023	Nou zaw pilvang un, ngai dih uh, bangkim ka hon hilhkhol khinta ahi.
41013024	“Himahleh huai nite zoh in, huai gimthuakna khit in, ni hihmial in a-om ding a, kha avak nawn kei ding hi.
41013025	Van a kipan aksite ahong ke ding ua, van a thilhihtheihna omte hihlin in a-om ding uhi.
41013026	Huai hun chiang in Mihing Tapa, thilhihtheihna leh thupina lianpi toh meipi lak a hong pai amu ding uhi.
41013027	Huai hun chiang in a-angelte asawlkhe dia, atelte lei ning li a pan lei tawp a kipan van tawp pha in apikhawm ding uhi.
41013028	“Huchi in theipi kung ah gentehna zil un; ahiang ahong nou a, anah ahong sel in nipi anaita chih na thei uhi.
41013029	Huchi mah bang in, nou leng huaite hong tung na muh chiang un, amah ahong naita a, kongkhak bul mahmah ah a-om chih, thei un.
41013030	Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, huai tengteng atunkim masiah hiai khang amang kei ding hi.
41013031	Lei leh van amang dia, ka thu ahihleh amang kei ding hi.
41013032	“Himahleh huai ni leh dak Pa kia lou ngal kuamah in, van a angelte'n leng Tapa in leng athei kei uhi.
41013033	Pilvang unla, kiging gige in thum un; ahun lah na thei ngal kei ua.
41013034	Mi a-inn paisan a, asikhate thu neisak a, anasep ding uh pe chiat a, kongkhak veng leng kigin ding thu pe phot a, gamdang a va taam bang ahi.
41013035	Huaiziak in kiging gige in om un, inn neipa hong pai ding hun, nitaklam in hia, zan in hia, ak khuan in hia, zing in hia chih lah na thei ngal kei ua.
41013036	Huchi lou in zaw, hong pai guih kha taleh ihmu in ahon mu kha ding.
41013037	Huan na kiang ua ka genmi tengteng kiang a ka gen ahi: Kiging gige in om un,” achi hi.
41014001	Huan ni nih nung a Paikan Ankuangluina leh Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina om ding ahi a; siampu liante leh laigelhmite'n, amah khem a, man a, ahihlup theihna ding dan azongzong uhi.

41014003	Huan Bethani a phak Simon inn a a-om lai a, ankuang a-um lai in numei khat, alabaster bawm a spiknardi thau gimlim man tampi tawi in ahong a, abawm ahihkham a, alu ah asungta hi.

41014072	Huan ak khuan nihveina akhuang pah hi. Peter in, Jesu'n akiang a, “Ak nihvei akhuan ma in nang thumvei na hon kitheihmohbawl ding,” achih atheikhe thak nawn a, huai angaihtuah a akapta hi.
41015001	Huan zingsang ahong hih in, siampu liante, upate leh laigelhmite leh vaihawmte tengteng toh akihou ua, Jesu ahen ua, api ua, Pilat kiang ah apeta uhi.
41015002	Pilat in akiang ah, “Judate' Kumpipa na hi hia,” chi in adong a, ama'n akiang ah, “Na gen bang in himah ing,” chi in adawng hi.
41015003	Siampu liante'n thu tampi in ahek uhi.
41015004	Huchi in Pilat in adong nawn a, akiang ah, “Bangmah a dawng lou maw? Ngai in, ahon hekna uh tamdan!” achi hi.
41015005	Jesu'n bangmah in adawng kei; huchi in Pilat in lamdang asa mahmah hi.
41015006	Huan Pilat in ankuanglui ni in mi henta khat anget peuhmah uh apawtsak zel hi.
41015007	Mi khat, Barabbas achih uh, ahelte lak ah hensa in a-om a, amah bel helna a pang leh tualthat ahi.
41015008	Mipite ahohtou ua, amau a dia ahihsak zel bang a hihsak ding in angen uhi.
41015009	Pilat in adawng a akiang uah, “Judate' Kumpipa hon khahsak leng na ut uhia?” achi hi.
41015010	Siampu liante'n hazat ziak a paipih uh ahi, chih athei hi.
41015011	Himahleh siampu liante'n Barabbas pawtsak zawk ngen ding in mipite ahasuan uhi.
41015012	Huan Pilat in akiang uah, “Judate' Kumpipa achih uh bang ka lohta dia le?” chi in adong nawn hi.
41015013	Huan amau, “Kros ah kilhden in,” chi in akikou nawn uhi.
41015014	Pilat in akiang uah, “Bang ding in maw? Bang ahihkhial a ahia?” achi hi. Himahleh amau, “Kilhden in,” chi in akikou semsem uhi.
41015015	Huchi in Pilat in mipite hihlungkim ut in, Barabbas apawtsakta a; Jesu avuak zoh in kilhden ding in apeta hi.
41015016	Huan sepaihte'n inn huangsung kong lai, Praitoriam achih uah, amah apilut ua, apawl ua mi tengteng asamkhawm uhi.
41015017	Huchi in puan sandup asilhsak ua, linglukhu phan in akhusak uhi.
41015018	“Chibai, Judate' Kumpipa!” chi in chibai abuk uhi.
41015019	Alu sialluang in akhen ua, chil aphih ua, khukdin in chibai abuk uhi.
41015020	Huan nuihza bawlna a azatzoh un, puan sandup ahawk ua, ama puan asilhsak nawn ua, kilhden ding in apikhia uhi.
41015021	Huan mi vialvak khat, Kurini khomi, Alexander leh Rufas pa, Simon, agam lam a kipan hong pai, akros po ding in aman uhi.
41015022	Golgotha mun ah Jesu api ua, huai tuh Luguh Mun, chihna ahi.
41015023	Huan uain murrah toh hel apia ua, himahleh adawn nuam kei.
41015024	Akilhden ua, atan ding chiat uh theihna ding in aisan in apuansilhte akihawm uhi.
41015025	Akilhden hun uh dak thumna vel ahi.

41015027	Huan suamhat nih, ataklam ah khat, aveilam ah khat amah toh akilhden uhi.
41015028	Laisiangthou in, “Amah talekte toh simkhawm ahita,” chih genna hihtangtun in a-omta hi.

41015030	Kihondam inla, kros a kipan hong kum in,” chi in a-enghou uhi.
41015031	Huchi mah bang in siampu liante'n, laigelhmite toh, amau lak a enghou in, “Midang bawn hondam a, amah kihondam theiloupi in,” achi uh.
41015032	I muh a, i gintak theihna ding in, “Khrist, Israel Kumpipa, tu in kros a kipan hong kumleh akei dia,” achi uhi. Huan amah toh akilhden samte'n leng a-enghou uhi.
41015033	Huan dak gukna ahong hih in, dak kuana dong in gam pumpi ahong mialta hi.
41015034	Dak kuana ding in aw ngaihtak in Jesu, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakthani?” chi in akikoukhia a, huai tuh, “Ka Pathian, Ka Pathian, bang achia hon paisan?” chihna ahi.
41015035	Huan akiang a dingh khenkhatte'n huai azak un, “Ngai un, Elijah sam ahi,” achi uh.
41015036	Mi khat atai a, uain thuk spanji diahdim in, chiangdawn ah atak a, adawnsak hi. “Khawl dih ua, amah lakhe ding in Elijah ahong hiam i en ding uh,” achi uhi.
41015037	Aw ngaihtak in Jesu akikou a, akha akhahta hi.
41015038	Tempul puanzak atunglam a kipan anuailam pha in ahong keksuakta hi.
41015039	Amazawn a sepaih zaheutupa dingh in huchibang a akha akhah amuh in, “Hiai mi zaw Pathian Tapa ahi ngeingei,” achi hi.
41015040	Numeite'n leng gamlatak a dingh in a-en ua; huaite lak ah Mari Magdalin, Jakob naupangzaw leh Joses nu Mari, Salomi leng apang uhi.
41015041	Huaite Galili gam a a-om lai a, amah zui a, a-nna sepsak zelte ahi uhi; numei dang tampi Jerusalem a amah toh hohtoute leng a-om uhi.

41015043	Arimathai a om, Joseph, vaihawmpa zahtakhuai, Pathian lalgam lamenmi, ahong pai a, hangsantak in Pilat kiang ah alut a, Jesu luang angenta hi.

41015045	Sepaih zaheutupa kam a pan sita ahi chih atheih in, Joseph kiang ah aluang apia hi.

41016001	Huan Sabbath ni abei in han ah Mari Magdalin, Jakob nu Mari leh Salomite ava hoh ua, amah nuh ding in gimlim alei uhi.

41016013	Amau nungzui dangte kiang ah ava hilh ua, amau thu leng agingta tuan kei uhi.

41016018	khut in gulte ala ding ua; sihna gu bangchibang dawn mah le uh bangmah achi kei ding uh; damloute tung ah akhut uh akoih ding ua, adam zel ding uh,” achi hi.

42002036	Huan mi khat, amin, Anna, zawlnei, Phanuel Tanu, Asher nam a mi a-om a; amah tektak ahi a, anungak tawp nungsiah apasal kiang ah kum sagih a-om hi.
42002037	Kum sawmgiat-le-li ahih tanpha meithai in a-om a, ama'n tempul paisan lou in asun-azan in an ngawl a thum in Pathian abe zel hi.
42002038	Huchih laitak in amah ahong pai a, Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen a, Jerusalem tatna lamen peuhmahte kiang ah Jesu tanchin agen hi.
42002039	Huan Toupa dan bang zel a thil tengteng ahihzoh un, Galili gam a, amau khua Nazaret ah akik nawnta uhi.
42002040	Naungek ahong khanglian deuhdeuh a, ahong hat hiaihiai a, pilna in adimta a, atung ah Pathian deihsakna a-om hi.
42002041	Huan kum teng in, Paikan Ankuanglui hun in, anu leh apa Jerusalem ah ahoh zel uhi.
42002042	Amah kum sawm-le-nih ahih in dan ngeina in ahohtou uhi.
42002043	Ankuanglui zoh a akik nawn lai un, Jerusalem ah naupang Jesu a-om lai a, anu leh pa'n athei kei uhi.
42002044	Huchi in apawlte lak ua om hi na'nteh achi ua, ni khat lam apai khin ua, asanggamte uh leh ameltheihte uh lak ah azong uhi.
42002045	Amuh louh ziak un zong kawmkawm in Jerusalem ah akik nawnta uhi.
42002046	Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum nung in, tempul ah, sinsak mite lak a tu a, athu uh na ngaikhia a, amaute thudong in, ava mu uhi.
42002047	Athu zate'n atheihdan leh adawndan lamdang asa mahmah uh.
42002048	Anu leh apa'n amah amuh un, lamdang asa mahmah ua; anu'n, akiang ah, “Tapa aw, bangziak a hichibang a hon hih na hia? Ngai in, na pa leh ke'n lungkhamtak in ka hon zong ua,” achi hi.
42002049	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bangziak a hon zong na hi ua? Ka Pa inn a ka om ding na thei kei ua hia?” achi hi.
42002050	Huan akiang ua athugen atheisiam kei uhi.
42002051	Huan amau azuisuk a, Nazaret khua ahong tung ua, athu uh mang in a-om hi. Anu'n huai thil tengteng alungtang ah avom gige hi.
42002052	Jesu apil deuhdeuh a, ahong lian hiaihiai a, Pathian leh mihing deihsak in a-om deuhdeuhta hi.
42003001	Tiberias Kaisar vaihawm akum sawm-le-nga kum in, Judia gam-ukpa Pontias Pilat ahi a, Galili gam kumpipa Herod ahi a, a-unau Philip, Ituria leh Trakoniti gam kumpipa ahi a, Abilin gam kumpipa Lusania ahi.
42003002	Annas leh Kaiapha siampu lianpen ahi ua, huai lai in gamdai ah Zakariah tapa Johan kiang ah Pathian thu ahong tung hi.
42003003	Amah bel Jordan lui gei kim gam tengteng ah ahoh a, thil hihkhial ngaihdamna ding in kisikna baptisma thu agen zel hi.
42003004	Zawlnei Isai laibu a: “Gamdai a kikou aw in, Toupa lampi sial unla, alampite tangsak un.
42003005	Guam chih sundim ahi ding a, tang leh mual chih, hihniam ahi ding; lampi kawite tansak ahi ding a, lampi phokte mamsak ahi ding.
42003006	Huan mi tengteng in Pathian hotdamna amu ding uh,” achi, chih gelh bang in.
42003007	Ama'n baptisma tang ding akiang a mipi hong sukte kiang ah, “Nou gul suante aw, thangpaihna hong tung ding taisan ding a kua'n hon vauhilh ahia?
42003008	Huchi in kisik minputak in gah un, ei hon suangpa Abraham ahi na lungsim un chi kei un; Pathian in hiai suangte Abraham suante in adingsak thei chih ka hon hilh ahi.
42003009	Tu mahmah in singbul teng ah heipi koih ahita; huchi in sing chih gah hoih a gah lou peuhmah phuk in a-om a, mei ah paih in a-om,” achi hi.
42003010	Huan mipite'n akiang ah, “Bang ka hihta ding ua?” chi in adong uhi.
42003011	Ama'n akiang uah, “Kuapeuh puanak nih nei in anei lou kiang ah hawm hen; kuapeuh an nei in huchibang mah in hih hen,” chi in adawng hi.
42003012	Huan siahkhon mite leng baptisma tang ding in ahong ua, akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, bang ka hih ding ua?” achi uhi.
42003013	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon sehsak val uh khon kei un,” achi hi.
42003014	Sepaihte'n leng akiang ah, “Kou leng bang ka hih ding ua?” chi in adong uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Kuamah hiamgam in hih kei unla, dikloupi in kuamah hek kei unla, na loh uah lungkim un,” achi hi.
42003015	Huan mite'n alamet ua, mi tengteng in Johan tungthu alungtang ua, Khrist ahi kha zenzen diam aw? chi a angaihtuah lai un,
42003016	Johan in adawng a, avek ua kiang ah, “Ke'n tui in ka hon baptis a, himahleh kei sang a mithupizaw ahong pai ding, akhedap khau phel tak leng ka hi kei; ama'n Kha Siangthou leh mei in nou ahon baptis ding.
42003017	Akhut in aphazah atawi a, aphual zapsianna ding leh buhpang a buhte sunlutna ding in; asite mei mit ngei lou ah ahalmang ding,” achi hi.
42003018	Huan hanthawnna tampi in mite kiang ah tanchinhoih ahilh zel hi.
42003019	Himahleh kumpipa Herod in anaupa zi, Herodias tungthu ah leh athilhihkhelh tung a Johan in ataihilh ziak in,
42003020	athilhihkhelh tengteng behlap in amah suangkul ah akhum hi.

42003022	Kha Siangthou sa pu in vakhu bang in ahong suk a, atung ah atuta a; van a kipan in aw ahong pawt a, “Nang ka Tapa deihtak na hi; na tung ah ka kipak mahmah,” achi hi.
