42004001	Jesu, Kha Siangthou in adim a, Jordan lui a kipan akik nawn a, diabol khem kawm in gamdai ah ni sawmli Kha pi in a-om hi.
42004002	Huai nite in bangmah ane kei hi.
42004003	Atawp in agil ahong kialta a, diabol in akiang ah, “Pathian Tapa na hihleh hiai suang tanghou suak ding in thu pia in,” achi hi.
42004004	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Tanghou kia in mihing ahing kei ding, Pathian kam a thupawt in ahing zaw ding,” chih gelh ahi, chi in adawng hi.
42004005	Huan tang sangtak ah apitou a, mitphiat kal lou in khovel gam tengteng a-ensak hi.
42004006	Akiang ah, “Hiai tengteng tung a thuneihna leh athupina ka hon pe ding; ka kiang a piak ahita hi, ka ut peuh kiang ah leng ka pe zel hi.
42004007	Huchi in hon bia inla, avek in nang a ahi ding,” achi hi.
42004008	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian na biak ding a, amah nna kia na sep ding ahi,” chih gelh ahi, chi in adawng hi.
42004009	Huan Jerusalem ah api a, tempul tungzum ah akoih a, akiang ah, “Pathian Tapa na hihleh hiai a kipan kikesak in;
42004010	nangmah humbit ding in na tungthu ah zaw a-angelte thu ape ding a,
42004011	amau akhut un ahon dom ding uh, huchi lou in zaw na khe in suang na sui kha ding, chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
42004012	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian ze-et ke'n,” chih gelh ahi, chi in adawng hi.
42004013	Huan diabol in akhemna ding teng a akhem khit in alemtan hun chiang a ding in apaisanta hi.
42004014	Kha thilhihtheihna in Galili gam ah Jesu apai nawnta a; atanchin huai kim gam teng ah athangta hi.
42004015	Huan sinagogte ah thu ahilh zel a, mi tengteng phat in a-om hi.
42004016	Huan akhanletna khua Nazaret ahong tung a; Sabbath ni a ahihdan ngeina bang in sinagog ah alut a, sim ding in adingh hi.
42004017	Akiang ah zawlnei Isai laibu apia ua, ama'n laibuzial aphel a, hiai thu kigelhna laitak asim hi:
42004018	“Liangvaite kiang a Tanchinhoih gen ding a na hon seh ziak in ka tung ah Toupa Kha a-om; ama'n ahon sawl, salte kiang ah pawtna thu leh, mittawte kiang a mitvak neih nawnna thu gen ding, simmoh thuakte pawtsakna ding.
42004019	Toupa lungkim kum thu gen ding in,” chih.
42004020	Huan laibu azial a, nasepsakpa ape nawn a, atuta hi. Huan sinagog a mi tengteng mit atung ah atuta hi.
42004021	Akiang uah, “Hiai Laisiangthou thu tuni in na zak un atangtungta,” chi in agen pan hi.
42004022	Avek un amah aphat ua, akamsuak hehpihna thute lamdang asa mahmah uh, “Hiai mi Joseph tapa ahi kei a hia?” achi uhi.
42004023	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou hiai thupil thu, Daktor, nang leh nang kihihdam in, Kapernaum a na thilhih ka na zak peuh uh, hiai ah nangmah kholam ah leng hih in chi in hon chi khong ding zaw na hi ve ua,” achi hi.
42004024	Amah mah in, “Chihtaktak in, ka hon hilh ahi, zawlnei kuamah ama kholam ah pahtawi in a-om ngei kei hi.
42004025	Huchi in diktak in ka hon chi ahi, Elijah dam lai a, kum thum leh kha guk van abin a, khovel a kial nakpitak a ahong tun in, Israel gam ah meithai tampi a-om uhi.
42004026	Himahleh alak ua kuamah kiang ah Elijah sawl ahi kei, Sidon gam lam a Zarephath a numei, meithai kiang kia a sawl ahi zaw hi.
42004027	Huan zawlnei Elishah dam lai in leng Israel gam ah phak tampi a-om ua; himahleh alak uah kuamah hihsiangthou in a-om kei, Siria mi Naaman kia hihsiangthou in a-om zaw hi,” achi hi.
42004028	Huan sinagog a mi tengteng in huai thute azaktak un, aheh mahmah uhi.
42004029	Adingh suausuau ua, khua a kipan in asawnkhia ua, paihkhiak ding in akho omna mual pang ah api uhi.
42004030	Himahleh amah alak uah apaisuak a, apaimangta hi.
42004031	Huan Galili gam a khua khat, Kapernaum ah ava hohsuk hi. Sabbath ni in mite thu ahilh hi.
42004032	Thuneitak a agen ziak in athuhilh lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
42004033	Huan sinagog ah dawi nin paimi khat ana om hi.
42004034	Amah aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Eh! Nazaret Jesu, kou leh nang bang ahia i kizolhna om? Hon hihmangthang ding in na hong maw? Nang ka hon thei, Pathian Mi Siangthou na hi,” achi hi.
42004035	Jesu'n atai a, “Dai inla, asung a kipan pawt in,” achi hi. Huan dawi in alai ah ahihpuk a, hihna lou in asung a kipan apawtta hi.
42004036	Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, “Bang thu ahia le? Thuneitak leh thilhihtheitak in dawi ninte thu apia a, apawt uh,” chi in akihou uhi.
42004037	Huan huai kim gam khua teng ah atanchin athangta hi.
42004038	Huan athou a, sinagog a kipan apawt a, Simon inn ah alut hi. Simon zi nu nakpitak in akhosik a, huchi in amah a ding in ana ngetsak uhi.
42004039	Akiang ah adingh a, khosik atai a, adaita hi; athou pah a, a-nna uh asepsakta hi.
42004040	Huan nitum kuan in natna tuamtuam a na, damlou nei peuhmah in akiang ah ahon pi ua; avek un atung uah akhut akoih chiat a, ana hihdam zel hi.
42004041	Huan dawite'n leng, “Pathian Tapa na hi,” chi a kikou in, mi tampi sung a kipan in hong pawt uhi. Huan amau atai a, Khrist ahi chih atheih ziak un apau uh aphal kei hi.
42004042	Huan khovak tak in apawt a, kuamah omlouhna mun ah ahoh a; mipite'n azong ua, akiang ah ahong ua, amau apaisanlouhna ding in let atum uhi.
42004043	Himahleh akiang uah, “Kho dang ah leng Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih ka hilh ding ahi, huai ding a sawl ka hi ngal a,” achi hi.
42004044	Huchi in Galili gam a sinagogte ah thu ahilhta hi.
42005001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi'n Pathian thu angaihkhiak ua, amah aboh huthut lai un, amah Gennesaret tuipi gei ah adingh hi.
42005002	Huan tuipi gei a long nih om amu a, himahleh ngaman mite apawtkhia ua, alente uh asawp uhi.
42005003	Huchi in long khat Simon a pen ah atuang a, akiang ah lui gei a kipan neukha tolhlutsak deuh angen hi. Huan atu a, long a kipan mipite thu ahilh hi.
42005004	Huan thugen azoh in, Simon kiang ah, “Lithuk lam naih unla, ngaman ding in, na lente uh pai un,” achi hi.
42005005	Huan Simon in akiang ah, “Heutupa, gimtak in zankhua in ka pang ua, bangmah ka man kei ua, himahleh na thu in lente ka pai nawn ding,” chi in adawng hi.
42005006	Huan apaih ualeh nga tampitak akhuh ua, alente uh akek iak-iak hi.
42005007	Huan long dang a om alawmte uh amau huh ding in akhutvan hial uhi. Ahong pai ua, long nih tum phialphial in asungdim tuaktuak uhi.
42005008	Simon Peter in huai amuh in, Jesu khebul a bokkhup in, “Toupa, hon paisan in, mikhial ka hi,” achi hi.
42005009	Anga mat uh amah leh alawmte'n lamdang asa mahmah uhi;
42005010	Simon pawlte mah Zebedai tapa Jakob leh Johan in leng lamdang asa mahmah sam uhi. Simon kiang ah Jesu'n, “Lau ke'n, tuban siah mihing na manta ding,” achi hi.
42005011	Huan lui gei ah alongte uh atolh galkai ua, bangkim paisan in amah azuita uhi.
42005012	Huan hichi ahong hi a, khua khat a a-om lai in ngai dih, mi khat phak a pumdim a-om a, ama'n Jesu amuh in, ama a bokkhup in, “Toupa, na utleh na hon hihsiang thei,” chi in angen ngutngut hi.
42005013	Ama'n sawk in akhoih a, “Ka ut hi, na siangta in,” achi hi. Huan thakhat in aphak ahong bei pah hi.
42005014	Akiang ah, “Kuamah hilh ke'n, himahleh siampu kiang ah va ki-ensak inla, na sianthouna ding Mosi seh bang lan in, mite theihchetna ding in,” achi hi.
42005015	Himahleh atanchin thu athang semsem a; mipi tampitak athu za nuam leh anatnate uh hihdam ut in ahong kikhawm kheukhou uhi.
42005016	Himahleh amah gamdai ah apaituam a, athum hi.
42005017	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in ni khat thu ahilh hi. Akiang ah Pharisaite leh dansiamte atu uhi, huaite Galili leh Judia gam kho teng a kipan a hong pai ahi uhi. Mite hihdamna ding in akiang ah Toupa thilhihtheihna a-om hi.
42005018	Huan ngai dih, lupna toh mizaw khat ahon zawng ua; ama a koih ding in zawnlut atum uhi.
42005019	Himahleh mipi ziak in zawnlutdan ding amu thei kei ua, intung a kipan alaitak, Jesu ma ah alupna toh akhaikhesuk uhi.
42005020	Huan aginna uh amuh in akiang ah, “Mihing, na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita,” achi hi.
42005021	Laigelhmite leh Pharisaite'n, “Pathian gensia hiai mi kua ahia? Pathian kia lou in kua'n ahia khelhnate ngaidam thei?” chi in angaihtuah uhi.
42005022	Huchi in Jesu'n angaihtuah uh athei a, akiang uah, “Na lungtang uah bang na ngaihtuah ua?
42005023	Na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita, chih leh thou inla, khe in paita in, chih, akoi pen gen anuam zaw?
42005024	Himahleh, khovel ah Mihing Tapa in khelhnate ngaihdam theihna anei chih na theihna ding un,” damlou mizaw kiang ah, “Thou inla, na lupna la inla, na inn ah pai in, ka hon chi,” achi hi.
42005025	Huchi in amitmuh un athou pah a, alupna ala a, Pathian phat kawmkawm in a-inn ah apaita hi.
42005026	Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, Pathian aphat uhi. “Tuni in thillamdang pitak i mu hi,” achi ua, alau mahmah uhi.
42005027	Huaite khit in apawt a, siah piakna mun a tu, siahkhonmi khat amin Levi amu a; akiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi hi.
42005028	Huchi in adingh a bangkim paisan in azuita hi.
42005029	Huan Levi in a-inn ah Jesu a ding in ankuang thupitak alui a; siahkhonmi leh midangte toh mi tampi in amau a-umpih chiat uhi.
42005030	Pharisaite leh laigelhmite anungzuite tung ah aphun uhi, “Bangziak a siahkhon mite leh mikhialte kiang a ne a dawn na hi ua?” achi uhi.
42005031	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Midamtheite'n daktor akiphamoh kei ua, midamtheiloute'n akiphamoh uhi.
42005032	Midiktatte sam ding a hong pai ka hi kei a, mikhialte kisiksak ding a hong pai ka hi zaw,” chi in adawng hi.
42005033	Huan amau akiang ah, “Johan nungzuite'n an angawl zel ua, athum zel uh; Pharisaite nungzuite'n leng huchibang mah in ahih zel uh; himahleh na nungzuite'n ane un adawn gige uh,” achi uhi.
42005034	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Moupi mite kiang a apasal ding a om lai siah moupi mite an angawlsak thei ua hia?
42005035	Himahleh apasal ding amau a kipan pimang nite ahong tung ding a, huai ni chiang in zaw angawl ding uh,” achi hi.
42005036	Huan akiang uah gentehna thu leng agen a, “Kuamah in puan thak them in puan lui athuap ngei kei, thuap mah le uh, athak in akaikek dia, athak them leh alui akituak kei ding uhi.
42005037	Huan kuamah in uain thak savun uain thawl lui ah athun ngei kei, thun le uh uain thak savun thawlte apuakzak dia, abo dia, savun thawlte leng asegawp ding uhi.
42005038	Uain thak savun uain thawl thak ah athun zaw ding uhi.
42005039	Huan kuapeuh uain lui na dawn khin in leng, athak aduh pah kei hi; alui pen hoihzaw achi ngal a,” achi hi.
42006001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Sabbath ni khat in buhlei ah apaisuak a, anungzuite'n buhvuite akhiak ua, akhutpek ua nuaisiang in ane uhi.
42006002	Pharisai kuate hiam in, “Bangziak a Sabbath ni a hihsiang lou hih na hi ua?” achi uhi.
42006003	Jesu'n adawng a, “David agilkial lai a alawmte toh athilhih uh huai bangte leng na sim kei ua hia?
42006004	Huchi a Pathian inn a lut a, siampute lou ngal in anek siang louh tanghou koihtuam alak a, alawmte kiang a apiak sam thu,” achi hi.
42006005	Huan akiang uah, “Mihing Tapa zaw Sabbath' Toupa ahi,” achi hi.
42006006	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Sabbath ni dang khat in sinagog ah alut a, thu ahilh a; huai ah mi khat khut taklam zaw ana om hi.
42006007	Laigelhmite leh Pharisaite'n ahekna ding amuhtheihna ding un, Sabbath ni in hihdam ding in akisa hia kisa lou asim et uhi.
42006008	Himahleh ama'n alungsim uh thei a, khutzaw kiang ah, “Thou inla, alai ah dingkhia in,” achi hi. Huan athou a, adingkheta hi.
42006009	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Sabbath ni in hihhoih asiang hia, hihsiat? Hotdam asiang hia, hihlup? K'on dong ahi,” achi hi.
42006010	Huan avek un a-en velvel a, akiang ah, “Na khut zankhia in,” achi hi. Huan azankhia a, akhut adamta hi.
42006011	Huchi in aheh lo mahmah ua, Jesu tung a hihdan ding akihouta uhi.
42006012	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai a kipan in apawt a, thum ding in tang ah akuan a, Pathian kiang ah zankhua in athum hi.
42006013	Khua avaktak in anungzuite asam a; alak uah sawm-le-nih atel a, amin ding un leng Sawltakte asa hi.
42006014	Huaite Simon Peter achih leh a-unaupa Andru, Jakob leh Johan, Philip leh Bartholomai,
42006015	Matthai leh Thomas, Alphai tapa Jakob, Zealot kichi Simon,
42006016	leh Jakob tapa Judas leh amansakpa Judas Iskariot ahi uh.
42006017	Huan amau toh apaikhia a, mun zang ah adingh a, anungzui mipite toh, Judia gam tengteng a kipan leh Jerusalem a kipan leh Tura leh Sidon kholam a tuipi gei a kipan mipi tampitak athu ngainuam leh adamlouhnate uh hihdam ut in ahong pai uhi.
42006018	Huchi in dawi nin sukbuaite leng damsak in a-omta uhi.
42006019	Huan akiang a kipan thilhihtheihna apawtkhia a, michih ahihdam zel ziak in mipi tengteng in amah khoih atum uhi.
42006020	Huan adakkhia a, anungzuite mitsuan kawm in agen a: “Nou gentheite aw, na hampha uh; Pathian lalgam nou a ahi ngal a.
42006021	Nou tua gilkialte aw, na hampha uh, tai ding na hi ngal ua. Nou tua kapte aw, na hampha uh, nui ding na hi ngal ua.”
42006022	“Mihing Tapa ziak a mite'n ahon huat ua, hon pampaih ua, hon tai ua, na min uh ahoih kei chi a ahon paihmang chiang un, na hampha ding uh.
42006023	Huai ni in kipak unla, nuam in tawm un, ngai un, van ah na kipahman uh a-om kihkeih hi; huchibang mah in apipute un zawlneite tung ah ahih uhi.”
42006024	“Himahleh, nou mihaute aw, na tung uh agik e; na khamuanna uh na mu khinta ngal ua;
42006025	nou tua vahte aw, na tung uh agik e; na gil uh ahong kial ding. Nou tua nuite aw; na tung uh agik e; lungkham a kap ding na hi ngal ua.”
42006026	“Mi tengteng in ahon phat chiang un na tung uh agik ding hi; huchi mah bang in apipute un zawlnei takloute tung ah ahih uhi.
42006027	“Ka thu ngaikhete aw, ka hon hilh ahi, na melmate uh it unla, hon hote hoihna ding hih un,
42006028	Hon hamsiatte vualzawl unla, hon simmohte thumsak un.
42006029	Biang langkhat a hon bengpa alehlam leng doh in; na puan hon laksakpa kiang ah na puanak leng it ke'n.
42006030	Ahon ngen peuh kiang ah pia in; huan na van hon laksakpa kiang ah ngen nawn ke'n.
42006031	Huan mi'n na tung ua ahih ding uh na deih bang zel un mi tung ah leng hih sam un.
42006032	“Huan ahon itte kia na it un, pahtak bang na loh ding ua? Mikhialte'n leng amau itte a-it sam ve ua oi!
42006033	Na tung ua hoihte tung kia a na hoih un, pahtak bang na loh ding ua? Mikhialte'n leng huchibang mah in ahih zel ve ua oi.
42006034	Muh nawn lametnate kiang kia a thil na leitawisak un, pahtak bang na loh ding ua? Mikhialte'n leng angeingei mu nawn ding in mikhialte kiang ah aleitawisak sam uhi.
42006035	Himahleh na melmate uh it unla, ahoihna ding un hih unla, lunglel het lou in leitawisak un; huchi in na kipahman uh atam dia, Tungnungpen tate na hi ding uh; ama'n mi kipahna dan theiloute leh migiloute ahehpih hi.
42006036	Na Pa azahngaih theih bang in zahngai thei in om un.
42006037	“Hawmsak kei un, huchi in hawmsak in na om kei ding uh; kuamah siam lou in sep kei un, huchi in siam louh in na om kei ding uh; ngaidam un, huchi in ngaihdam in na om ding uh;
42006038	pia un, huchi in piak in na om ding uh, hoihtak a teh a, hen gak a, sin gak in, let nawinawi in na angsung uah piak in na om ding uh. Noumau tehna ngei mah a tehsak a piak in na om ding uh ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
42006039	Huan akiang uah, gentehna agen a: “Mittaw in mittaw mah api thei diam? Anih un kokhuk ah akekhawm kei ding ua hia?
42006040	Asinsakpa tung ah nungzui a-om kei; himahleh mi kuapeuh kisinsiamtate asinsakpa bang in a-om ding uh.
42006041	“Huan bangziak a na mit a singtum om limsak lou a, na unau mit a ninneng neuchik om mu na hia?
42006042	Nangmah mit a singtum om mu lou in, na unau kiang a, ‘Unau, na mit a ninneng neuchik om hon lakhesak ve,’ bangchi a chi thei na hia? Milepchiah na mit a pan singtum lakhe masa in, huchi in na unau mit a ninneng neuchik lakkhiak ding chiantak in na mu thei ding hi.
42006043	“Sing hoih gahsia a gah a-om ngei kei; sing sia lah gah hoih a gah a-om ngei sam kei hi.
42006044	Sing chih amau gah chiat ah akithei hi. Mi'n khaulingnei kung ah theipi alou ngei kei uh, loubukh lingnok lak ah grep gah alou ngei sam kei uh.
42006045	Mihoih in alungtang goubawm hoih a kipan thil hoihte alakhia a; migilou in alungtang goubawm sia a kipan thil hoihloute alakhe zel hi; alungtang a dim val kam in agen zel ngal a.
42006046	“Huan nou bang ding a, ka gente hihloupi a, Toupa, Toupa, hon chi na hi ua?
42006047	Michih ka kiang a hong a, ka thu za a zui peuhmah kua bang ahi ua, ka hon ensak ding:
42006048	Amah zaw inn lammi in lei thukpi a tou a, suangpi tung a suangphum lem mi bang ahi; huan tui ahong khan in, tui khauh in huai inn akhoh a, ahihling thei kei; hoihtak a lam ahih ziak in.
42006049	Himahleh thu za a mang lou suangphum louh a leitung maimah a inn lammi ahi; tui khauh in huai inn akhoh a, achim pah a; huai inn siatna thupitak ahi,” achi hi.
42007001	Huan mipite zak a athugen teng azohtak in Kapernaum ah alut a,
42007002	sepaih zaheutu kuahiam sikha deihtak a china in, asi dekdek hi.
42007003	Huchi in Jesu tanchin azaktak in asikha hong hihdam ding a ngen ding in akiang ah Juda upate asawl hi.
42007004	Amau Jesu kiang ava tung ua, limtak in angen uhi,
42007005	“Amah zaw na hihsak tak ahi; ka nam uh a-it a, ka sinagog uh leng ama hon lamsak ahi,” achi uhi.
42007006	Huchi in Jesu amau toh ahong pai hi. A-inn atun dek kuan in sepaih zaheutu'n alawmte asawl a, “Ka insung na lutna tak ahi kei,
42007007	huaiziak in na kiang a hong tak in leng ka kisim kei, thu leltak gen lechin, ka naupang adam mai ding.
42007008	Kei leng mi thunuai a om ka hi a, ka nuai ah sepaihte a-om ua; huai mipa, hiai mipa, ‘Pai in,’ ka chihleh apai a, midang kiang ah leng, ‘Hong pai in,’ ka chihleh ahong pai a; ka sikha kiang ah leng, hiai hih in, ka chih leh ahih zel,” achi hi.
42007009	Jesu'n huai thu azak in lamdang asa mahmah a, akihei a, mipi amah zuite kiang ah, “K'on hilh ahi, Israelte lak ah leng hichi tel a ginna thupi ka mu kha kei,” achi hi.
42007010	Huan inn ah amisawlte apai nawn ua, damtak in sikha amuta uhi.
42007011	Huan sawt louchik in khua khat Nain kichi ah ahoh a; akiang ah anungzuite leh mipi tampitak ahoh sam uhi.
42007012	Khopi kongkhak kiang atun in, ngai in, misi ahon zawngkhia ua, anu tapa neihsun ahi a, amah lah meithai ahi ngal a; akhua mite tampi akiang ah a-om uhi.
42007013	Toupa'n meithainu amuh in, alainat mahmah a, “Kap ke'n,” achi hi.
42007014	Huan ava naih a, lang ava len hi; huchi in lang zawngte akhawl uhi. “Tangval thou in, ka hon chi,” achi hi.
42007015	Huan misi atukhia a, ahong pauta hi. Huchi in Jesu'n anu kiang ah apeta hi.
42007016	Huan mi tengteng in alau ua, Pathian aphat ua, “I lak ah zawlnei thupi ahong suakta, achi ua, Pathian in amite hong vehta,” achi uhi.
42007017	Huan huai mi tungtang thu Judia gam tengteng leh akiang vel gam teng ah athangkheta hi.
42007018	Huan Johan nungzuite'n huai thu tengteng Johan ahilh uhi.
42007019	Huchi in Johan in anungzuite nih asam a, Toupa kiang ah asawl a, “Hong pai dingpa na hi hia, midang hungaih lailai ding ka hi uhia?” chi in.
42007020	Huan amisawlte akiang ahong tun un, “Baptispa Johan in, ‘Hong pai dingpa na hi hia, midang hungaih lai ding ka hi uhia?’ chi in na kiang ah kou a hon sawl,” achi uhi.
42007021	Huaitak in Jesu'n, damloute, hipi veite, dawimatte tampi ahihdam a, mittaw tampite leng amit uh ahihvak hi.
42007022	Akiang uah, “Pai nawnta unla, thil na muh uleh na zak uh Johan va hilh un; mittawte mit ahong vakta, khebaite khe in apaita ua, phakte hihsiang in om ua, nangongte bil ahong vakta, misite kaihthoh in a-omta uh, azawngte'n tanchinhoih hilh atangta uh.
42007023	Huan kuapeuh ka tung a lung hihlouhna mu lou ahampha hi,” chi in adawng hi.
42007024	Johan sawltakte apai nung un Jesu'n mipite kiang ah Johan thu agen a, “Bang en ding a gamdai a paikhia na hi ua? Sialluang huih mut ling maw?
42007025	Ahihkeileh, bang en ding pen a paikhia na hi ua? Puannem silh mi maw? Ngai un, puan thupi silh leh minuamsate kumpipate inn ah ei ve a-om uh.
42007026	Ahihkeileh, bang en ding pen in ahia na paikhiak uh? Zawlnei maw? Ahi tawk vo oi, ka hon chi ahi, amah zaw zawlnei sang a leng thupizaw ahi.
42007027	‘En dih, ka thangkou na ma ah ka sawl ahi, ama'n na ma ah na lampi abawlkhol ding, chi a, atanchin kigelh, hiai mipa ahi.’
42007028	Numei suan lak ah Johan sang a thupizaw a-om kei; himahleh Pathian lalgam a mineupen leng amah sang in athupizaw, ka hon chi ahi,” achi hi.
42007029	Huan mi tengteng leh siahkhonte'n huai azak un, Johan khut a baptisma tangsa ahih ziak un, Pathian siam atangsak uhi.
42007030	Pharisaite leh dan thei mite'n bel akiang a baptisma ana tang kei ua, amau a ding a Pathian in hoih dia asehsak adeih kei uhi.
42007031	Huchi in Jesu mah in, “Hiai khang bang toh ka teh diam aw? Bang toh kibang ahi ua?
42007032	Naupang dawr mun a tu a, ‘Tamngai hon tumsak ung a, lam lou uchin a;’ ‘Suun ung a, nou lah kap tuan lou uchin a,’ chi a kichituahte bang ahi uh.
42007033	Baptispa Johan ahong pai a, tanghou ane kei, uain leng adawn kei a nou, ‘Dawi zawl ei ve,’ na chi uhi.
42007034	Mihing Tapa ahong pai a, ane in adawn a, ‘En dih uh, an haipa, uain haipa, siahkhon mite leh mikhialte lawm,’ na chi zel uhi.
42007035	Himahleh pilna tuh atate tengteng in siam atan uhi,” achi hi.
42007036	Pharisaite lak a mi khat in akiang a an ne ding in adeih hi. Huai Pharisai inn ah alut a, an a-um hi.
42007037	Ngai dih, huai khua a numei khat om in Pharisai inn ah an um in atu chih a theihtak in alabaster bawm in thaunamtui ahon tawi hi.
42007038	Anung ah akhepek bul ah kap kawm in adingh a, akhitui in akhepek asukawt a, asam in anul a, akhepek atawp a, thaunamtui anuh hi.
42007039	Huan asampa Pharisai in huai amuh in, alungsim in, “Hiai mi zawlnei ahihleh akhoihnu numei kua ahia, mi bangchi ahia, theihtuaktak hi a, mikhial ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
42007040	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Simon, na kiang ah thu kam khat gen ding ka nei,” chi in adawng hi. Ama'n, “Bang ahia, Sinsakpa?” achi hi.
42007041	Jesu'n, “Dangka leitawisak kuahiam in leibami nih anei a; khat in makhai zanga, khat in sawmnga aba uhi.
42007042	Huan aditna ding anei kei ua, angaidam tuaktuak hi. Huai mite akua in amah a-itzaw dia?” achi hi.
42007043	Simon in, “Angaihdam tampen in hi in ka gingta,” chi in adawng hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na chi dik,” achi hi.
42007044	Huan numei lam anga a, Simon kiang ah, “Hiai numei na mu hia? Na inn ah ka hong lut a, nang ka khepek silna ding tui na hon pe kei a, ama'n akhitui in ka khepek asukawt a, asam in anul hi.
42007045	Nang tawp himhim na hon tawp kei; ama'n ka hong lut nungsiah ka khepek tawp atawlnga kei hi.
42007046	Nang ka lutang ah thau na hon nilh kei a; ama'n ka khepek thaunamtui anilh hi.
42007047	Huaiziak in ka hon chi ahi, akhelhna tampi ngaihdam in a-omta; ama'n nakpi in a-it hi. Himahleh, ngaidam tawm in, neuchik in a-it,” achi hi.
42007048	Huai zoh in numei kiang ah, “Na khelhnate ngaihdam ahita,” achi hi.
42007049	Huchi in an umpihte'n, “Mikhialte nangawn ngaidam kua ahia eita?” akichi uhi.
42007050	Numei kiang ah, “Na ginna in ahon hondam hi, khamuangtak in paita in,” achi hi.
42008001	Anung in Jesu thuhilh leh Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih gen kawm in kholian leh khoneute tawn vialvial in apai a; akiang ah sawm-le-nihte a-om uhi.
42008002	Numei kuate hiam dawimat leh china dam nawnte Magdalin kichi Mari sung a dawi sagih pawtna achih uh,
42008003	Joanna, Herod sumkempa Chuza zi, Sussana leh midang tampite toh ahi uh; huaite'n amau neihsa in amah nna asepsak zel uhi.
42008004	Huan mipi tampitak ahong kikhawm ua, kho chih a pan akiang a hong paikhawm mite kiang ah gentehna in thu agen a.
42008005	“Buhchithehpa buhchi theh in akuan a; atheh lai in akhen lamsik ah akia a, mi'n asikden ua, tungleng vasate'n anegai uhi.
42008006	Huan akhen suang tung ah akia a, apoutak in akawt louh ziak in avuai pah hi.
42008007	Huan akhen loulingnei lak ah akia a, lou in apou tonpih a, adepmang hi.
42008008	Huan akhen lei hoih ah akia a, ahong pou a, aleh za in agahta,” achi hi. Huai thu agen lai in akikou a, “Kuapeuh zakna ding bil nei in, za uhen!” achi hi.
42008009	Huan anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Hiai gentehna bang chihna ahia?” chi in adong uhi.
42008010	Ama'n, “Pathian lalgam thugukte na theih ding ua piak ahi a, midang kiang ah bel gentehna kia a gen ahi; mu napi a amuh theihlouhna ding uleh za napi a atheihsiamlouhna ding un,” chi in adawng hi.
42008011	Huai gentehna thu omdan hiai ahi: Buhchi Pathian thu ahi.
42008012	Lampi sik a kiate thu zasate ahi uh; himahleh diabol ahong pai a, agin louh ua, hotdam ahihtheihlouhna ding un alungtang ua kipan thu alakmangsak zel hi.
42008013	Huan suang tung a kiate azaktak ua thu kipaktak a pom pahte ahi ua; himahleh zung himhim anei kei ua, sawt louchik kia agingta ua, khemna hun in atawpsan nak uhi.
42008014	Huan loulingnei lak a kiate thuzate ahi ua; himahleh akhosak zelna uah damsung khosak ngaihtuahnate, hauhsaknate, nopsaknate'n adep a, agah piching kei nak uhi.
42008015	Lei hoih a kiate bel thu za a lungtang kizen leh hoihtak a kem kinken a, thuakzoutak a gahsuahte ahi uhi.
42008016	“Kuamah khawnvak de in bel in akhuh kei uh, lupna nuai ah leng akoih kei uh; alut peuhmah in avak amuhtheihna ding un akoihna ah akoih zaw hi.
42008017	Thang lou ding a iim bangmah a-om kei, theih louh ding leh lang lou ding a selguk bangmah a-om sam kei hi.
42008018	Huchi in bangchibang in ahia na zak uh pilvang un; kuapeuh anei piak behlap ahi ding a, kuapeuh anei lou nei akichih sun leng laksak ahi ding,” achi hi.
42008019	Huan anu leh a-unaute'n Jesu kiang ahong naih ua, himahleh mipi ziak in akiang atung thei kei uhi.
42008020	“Na nu leh na unaute nangmah muh tum in inpua ah adingh nilouh uh,” chi in ahilh uhi.
42008021	Ama'n akiang uah, “Pathian thu za a gingtate ka nu leh ka unaute ahi uh,” chi in adawng hi.
42008022	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in ni khat anungzuite toh long ah atuang a, akiang uah, “Dil gal khat lam ah i kai ding uh,” achi a, huchi in long aphel ua, apaita uhi.
42008023	Long a atuan lai un Jesu a-ihmuta a; tuipi ah huihpi ahong nungsuk a, along uh tui in adim dekdek a, lauhuaipi in a-omta hi.
42008024	Huan akiang ah ava hoh ua, aphawng ua, “Heutupa, heutupa, mangthang ding ka kei uh maw,” achi uhi. Amah akhanglou a huih leh tuikihot ataita a; atawp ua adaita mai uhi.
42008025	Huan akiang uah, “Na ginna uh koi a om ahia?” achi hi. Huan alau ua, lamdang asa mahmah uh. “Hiai mi kua ahia le, huih leh tui nangawn thu apiak a, athu aman uh?” akichi uhi.
42008026	Galili gam zawn Gerasinte gam atung uhi.
42008027	Huan gam a apaikhiak lai in, khua a mi dawimat kuahiam in ana mu a; huai mi sawtpi puan silh lou in a-om hi, inn ah leng a-om kei a, han ngen ah a-om zaw hi.
42008028	Jesu amuhtak in akikou a, ama ah abokkhup a, aw ngaihtak in, “Jesu, Pathian Tungnungpen Tapa, kei leh nang bang i kizolhna om ahia? Hon hihgim lou ding in ka hon ngen ahi,” achi hi.
42008029	Jesu'n huai mi sung a kipan a dawi nin pawt ding in thu ape khinta hi. Huai mi dawi in tamveipi amat ahi a; khainiang leh kol abunsak ua, aveng zel ua; himahleh agakna uh ahihtat a, dawi in gamkeu ah adelhkhia hi.
42008030	Jesu'n, “Na min bang ahia?” chi in adong a, ama'n, “Nuai ka hi,” achi, asung a dawi tampi alut ziak in.
42008031	Huan kokhuk taw nei lou a paih ding thu pe lou ding in Jesu kiang ah angen uhi.
42008032	Huai tang ah vokhon tampi agamta ua; vok sung a luttheihna thu akiang ah angen uhi. Ama'n phalna apia hi.
42008033	Dawite huai mi sung a kipan apawt ua, vok sung ah alut uhi; huan tuipi gei, ken ah vokhonte ataisuk ua, tuipi ah atailut ua, tui hak in asita uhi.
42008034	Huan vok vulte'n huai thil omdan amu ua, atai ua, khua ah leh gam ah agen uhi.
42008035	Huan bang ahita a? chi a en ding in apawt chiat uhi. Jesu kiang ahong tun un, dawi pawtsan nung puansilh a, lungsim ngeina pu in, Jesu khebul a tu ahong mu ua, huchi in alauta uhi.
42008036	Huan atheite'n dawimat ahihdamdan thu amaute ana hilh uhi.
42008037	Huan akim Gerasinte gam a mi tengteng in, alau mahmah ziak un, amah akiang ua kipan paimang ding in angen ua; huan, long ah atuang a, apaikik nawnta hi.
42008038	Dawi pawtsan mi in Jesu kiang a omdet angen hi.
42008039	Himahleh Jesu'n, “Na inn ah pai inla, Pathian in nang a dia thil ahon hihsak thupidan va hilh in,” chi in asawlkhia hi. Huchi in apai a, khopi sung tengteng ah Jesu'n amah a dia thil ahihsak thupidan atangkoupihta hi.
42008040	Huan Jesu ahong kik nawn in mipi in amah akipahpih ua; amah ana ngak nilouh uhi.
42008041	Huan ngai dih, sinagog vaihawmpa mi khat amin Jaira ahong pai a, Jesu khebul ah abokkhup a, a-inn a hoh ding in angen ngutngut hi.
42008042	Tanu tang khat, kum sawm-le-nih hiam ding anei a, amah laitat ding in alum hi. Huan Jesu apai lai in mipihon in aboh lutlut uhi.
42008043	Numei khat kum sawm-le-nih sipawt a china asum neih tengteng daktorte lak a zang khinta, kuamah in ahihdam theih tuan louh uh;
42008044	anung ah ahong pai a, apuan mong akhoih a; thakhat in asipawt akam guih hi.
42008045	Jesu'n, “Kua ahia hon khoih?” achi hi. “Kei zaw ka hi kei,” ana chi chiat uhi. Peter leh alawmte'n, “Heutupa, mipi'n hon boh lutlut in, ahon vel vengvung ve ua,” achi uhi.
42008046	Himahleh Jesu'n, “Kuahiam in hon khoih ahi, ka sung a kipan thilhihtheihna apawt chih ka theih ziak in,” achi hi.
42008047	Huan numei in akisel theih louh atheih in, ling kawm in ahong pai a, ama ah bokkhup in akhoihsan leh thakhat a adam takdan mi tengteng ma ah agenkheta hi.
42008048	Huan akiang ah, “Tanu, na ginna na dampih hi, khamuangtak in paita in,” achi hi.
42008049	Apau laitak in sinagog vaihawmpa inn a kipan mi khat ahong pai a, “Na tanu asita, heutupa hihgim nuam dah in,” achi hi.
42008050	Jesu'n huai thu azak in, “Lau ke'n, gingta mai in, huchi in adam nawn ding,” chi in adawng hi.
42008051	Huan inn ava tun in, Peter, Johan, Jakob leh naupang nu leh pate kia chih louh ngal kuamah lut ding aphal kei hi.
42008052	Avek un ana kap kheukhou ua, akap vengvung ua, himahleh, ama'n, “Kap kei un, asi kei, ihmu ahi zaw,” achi hi.
42008053	Huan si khin a atheih ziak un anuihsan maimah uhi.
42008054	Jesu'n akhut alen a, “Nungaknou, thou in,” achi a, asam hi.
42008055	Huan akha ahong kik nawn a, athou pah hi.
42008056	Banghiam nek ding piak ding thu apia hi. Anu leh apa'n lamdang asa mahmah uhi. Himahleh ama'n athilhih kuamah hilh lou ding in achi bikbek hi.
42009001	Huan Jesu'n sawm-le-nihte asamkhawm a, dawi nin tengteng tung a thilhihtheihna leh natnate hihdamtheihna thuneihna apia hi.
42009002	Huchi in Pathian lalgam thu gen ding leh damloute hihdam ding in asawlkheta hi.
42009003	Akiang uah, “Zinna a ding in chiangkhun hiam, kawlzal hiam, tanghou hiam, dangka hiam, bangmah keng kei un; puanak nih leng keng kei un.
42009004	Na tunna inn uah tung kinken unla, huai inn a kipan paikhia un.
42009005	Huan ahon kipahpih lou peuhmah huai khua a kipan na paikhiak chiang un amau mohpaihna ding in na khepek ua leivui tatkhia un,” achi hi.
42009006	Huchi in akuanta ua, khua atawn vialvial uhi. Gam chih ah tanchinhoih ahilh ua, mi ahihdam zel uhi.
42009007	Huan kumpipa Herod in athilhih tengteng uh ana za a; khenkhat in, “Johan hing nawnta ahi, achi ua, khenkhat in,
42009008	Elijah hong kilak ahi, achi ua, khenkhat in, nidanglai zawlnei kuahiam thounawnta ahi,” achih ziak un, alungzingta hi.
42009009	Herod in, “Johan alu ka tanta a; himahleh hichi lawmlawm a athu ka zakzak kua ahia?” chi in amah muh atumta hi.
42009010	Huan sawltakte ahong kik nawn un, akiang ah athilhihte uh ahilh ua, ama'n amaute pi in khopi Bethsaida kichi ah apaituamta hi.
42009011	Himahleh mipi'n athei ua, azui zel uh; ama'n amaute ana kipahpih a, Pathian lalgam thu ahilh a, hihdam kiphamoh peuhmahte ahihdam hi.
42009012	Huan nitaklam ahong hi dekta a; sawm-le-nihte ahong pai ua, akiang ah, “Khuate leh akim gam ah giahna leh annek-tuidawn zong ding in mipite paisak tanla; gamkeu mun a om hi ngal hang a,” achi uhi.
42009013	Ama'n bel akiang uah, “Nou nek ding pia un,” achi hi. Amau, “Mi hiai zahzah nek ding i va leisak keileh, tanghou phel nga leh nga nih kia lou ngal bangmah i nei kei uh,” achi uhi.
42009014	Piching ngen leng sangnga phial ahi uhi. Huan anungzuite kiang ah, “Mite apawlpawl in tusak un, sawmnga zel in,” achi hi.
42009015	Huchi in ahih ua, atusak vekta uhi.
42009016	Huan tanghou phel nga leh ngasa nih ala a, van lam en in avualzawl a, abalkham a, mipi ma a lui ding in anungzuite kiang ah apia hi.
42009017	Huan ane ua, avah chiatta ua, akhamval nengte uh bawm sawm-le-nih aluakdim uhi.
42009018	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu amah kia a athum lai in akiang ah anungzuite a-om ua; akiang uah, “Mipite'n kua ka hi ahon chi ua?” chi in adong hi.
42009019	Amau, “Baptispa Johan ahon chi ua; himahleh khenkhat in, Elijah hiam nidanglai zawlnei kuahiam thounawn ahon chi uh,” chi in adawng uhi.
42009020	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Ahihleh nou kua ka hi na hon chi ua?” achi hi. Peter in, “Pathian Khrist mah,” chi in adawng hi.
42009021	Huan huai thu kuamah hilh louh ding chi bikbek in, thu apia hi:
42009022	“Mihing Tapa in thil tampi athuak dia, upate, siampu liante leh laigelhmite deih louh in a-om ding, thah in a-om dia, ani thum ni in kaihthoh in a-om ding,” achi hi.
42009023	Huan mi tengteng kiang ah, “Kuapeuh in hon zuih a-utleh amah kingaihsak lou in, niteng a ama kros pua in hon zui hen.
42009024	Kuapeuh ahinna humbit ut in atan ding; kuapeuh keimah ziak a ahinna tan in ahumbit ding.
42009025	Mi'n khovel apum in nei henla, amah kimangsak hiam, ahihkeileh kimanlohleh amah a ding in bang aphatuam dia?
42009026	Kuapeuh keimah leh ka thu zahpihmi zaw Mihing Tapa in ama thupina toh, a Pa thupina leh a-angel siangthoute thupina toh ahong pai hun chiang in azahpih ding hi.
42009027	Diktak in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai a dinghte akhen, Pathian lalgam amuh masiah uh sihna chiam lou hial ding a-om uh,” achi hi.
42009028	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu'n athugen nung ni giat hiam in, Peter, Johan leh Jakob api a, thum ding in tang ah ahohtou uhi.
42009029	Athum lai in amel omdan ahong lamdang a, apuansilhte mi lengthei in ahong ngouta hi.
42009030	Huan ngai in, mi nih amah toh akihou ua, huai mite Mosi leh Elijah ahi uh.
42009031	Thupina a kithuam in akilak ua, Jerusalem a sihna ahih bukim ding thu agen uhi.
42009032	Peter leh alawmte bel a-ihmut uh asuak a, himahleh ahak teitei ua athupina leh akiang a mi nih dinghte amu uhi.
42009033	Huan huai mite'n Jesu apaisan dek lai un, Peter in Jesu kiang ah, “Heutupa, ei a ding in hiai a om ahoih, aidakbuk thum i khoh dia, nang a ding in khat, Mosi a ding in khat, Elijah a ding in khat, achi a, athugen leng theiloupi in.”
42009034	Huan huai thute agen lai in mei ahong kai a, amau aliahta; mei lak a alut lai un alau uhi.
42009035	Meipi a kipan aw ahong suak a, “Hiai ka Tapa, ka tel ahi, amah thu ngai un,” achi hi.
42009036	Huan aw adaihtak in Jesu kia amuta uhi. Huan adai dide ua, huai lai in athil muh uh kuamah bangmah ahilh kei uhi.
42009037	Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in tang a kipan apaisuk nung un, mipi tampitak in amah ana dawn uhi.
42009038	Ngai in, mipi lak ah mi khat akikou a, “Sinsakpa, ka tapa en ding in ka hon ngen ahi, amah ka tapa neihsun ahi.
42009039	Ngai in, dawi in aman a, akikoukhe guih zel a; huchi in achilphuan ke hial in agimbawl a, nakpitak a hih sidup in apaisan zel hi.
42009040	Na nungzuite kiang ah delhkhe ding in ka ngen na a, ahihthei kei uh,” achi hi.
42009041	Huan Jesu'n, “Ginna nei lou khang leh lampialte aw, bang tan ahia ka hon thuak theih ding? Hiai ah na tapa hon pi in,” chi in adawng hi.
42009042	Huan ahong pai lai in dawi in ahihpuk ek a, nakpitak in agimbawlta hi; himahleh Jesu'n dawi nin atai a, naupang ahihdam a, apa kiang ah apaisak nawnta hi.
42009043	Huan mi tengteng in Pathian thupidan lamdang asa mahmah uhi. Huchi in mi tengteng in athilhih tengteng lamdang asak lai un, Jesu'n anungzuite kiang ah,
42009044	“Hiai thute na bil uah lut hen. Mihingte khut a Mihing Tapa matsak a om ding ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
42009045	Himahleh athugen atheisiam kei uh, atheihtheihlouhna ding ua kisel ahi, huai thugen tanchin amah adong ngam kei uhi.
42009046	Huan alak uah kua athupipen dia? chih thu in ana kisel uhi.
42009047	Jesu'n alungtang ua angaihtuah uh athei a, naupang neu khat akai a, asik ah a-omsak a, akiang uah,
42009048	“Kuapeuh ka min ziak a hiai naupang neu kipahpih keimah hon kipahpih ahi ding uh; keimah hon kipahpih hon sawlpa kipahpih ahi; na vek ua lak a neupen athupipen ahi ding,” achi hi.
42009049	Johan in, “Heutupa, kuahiam na min a dawite delkhia ka mu ua, ka hon zuihna ua apan louh ziak in ka khamta uhi,” chi in adawng hi.
42009050	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kham nawn kei un, kuapeuh nou hon dal lou nou lam a pang ahi,” achi hi.
42009051	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amah pitouh hun ding anaitak in, Jerusalem a hoh atum tinten a, ama ah mi ama taisak hi.
42009052	Huan apai ua, amah a dia na kimansak ding in Samari mite khua khat ah alut uhi.
42009053	Amai Jerusalem kholam naih a alat ziak in amah ana kipahpih kei uhi.
42009054	Huchi in anungzui Jakob leh Johan in huai atheih un, “Toupa, amaute kangmang ding in, Elijah hih bang in van a kipan mei hong ke ding a thu ka piak uh hoih na sa hia?” achi uhi.
42009055	Amah akihei a, amau tai in, “Bang kha a pan na hi ua chih thei lou na hi uhiam?
42009056	Mihing Tapa mite hihmangthang ding hilou in, hondam ding a hong pai ahi zaw hi,” achi hi. Huan kho dang ah apaita uhi.
42009057	Huan lampi a apai lai un, kuahiam in akiang ah, “Na paina peuh ah ka hon zui ding,” achi hi.
42009058	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Sehalte'n kua anei ua, tungleng vasate'n leng bu anei uh, himahleh Mihing Tapa in zaw alu ngakna ding mun anei kei,” achi hi.
42009059	Jesu'n midang kiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi hi. Himahleh ama'n, “Toupa, ka pa hon vuisak phot in,” achi hi.
42009060	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Misite'n amisi uh kivui uhen; nang Pathian lalgam thu va gen zaw in,” achi hi.
42009061	Huan midang in leng, “Toupa, ka hon zui ding, himahleh ka inn a mite kampha in hon khasak phot in,” achi hi.
42009062	Huan Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kuapeuh leilehna len a, nunglam nga Pathian kumpigam mi hi tak ahi kei,” achi hi.
42010001	Huai khit in Toupa'n midang sawmsagih asep a, apaina ding kho teng leh mun teng ah, ama ah nihnih in asawl hi.
42010002	Akiang uah, “Buh lak ding atam mahmah a, himahleh asemte atawm uh, huchi in abuh la ding a sem dingte sawl ding in buh neipa kiang ah ngen un.
42010003	Pai un; ngai un, ngehon lak a belamnou bang in ka hon sawl ahi.
42010004	Dangka ip, kawlzal leh khedap tawi kei unla, lampi ah kuamah chibai buk kei un.
42010005	Huan inn na lutna peuh uah amasapen in, ‘Hiai inn ah khamuanna tung hen!’ chi un.
42010006	Huai inn a khamuanna ta a-omleh na khamuanna thu uh atung ah a-om ding a; a-om keileh na kiang uah ahong kik nawn ding hi.
42010007	Huai inn ah tung in om nilouh unla, ahon piak peuh uh ne in dawn un; nasemmi loh mu tak ahi. Inn teng ah ban hoh kei un.
42010008	Huan khua na lutna peuh uah hon kipahpih uleh, hon lui peuh uh na ne ding ua; huai a damlou omte leng na hihdam ding ua;
42010009	akiang uah, ‘Pathian lalgam na kiang uah hong tungta,’ na chi ding uh.
42010010	Khua na lutna peuh uah hon kipahpih kei uleh akongzing uah paikhia unla,
42010011	na kho leivui uh ka khepek ua bang teng na tung uah tatsiang ung e; himahleh Pathian lalgam ahong naita chih thei un, na chi ding uhi.
42010012	K'on hilh ahi, huai ni chiang in huai khuate thuak sang in Sodom khua thuak ding adan a-om zaw ding hi.
42010013	“Korazin, na tung agik e! Bethsaida, na tung agik e! Noumau a thillamdang kihihte Tura leh Sidon a hih hileh, sai-ip puan silh a vut lak a tu in akisik khin thamta ding uh.
42010014	Himahleh thukhen ni chiang in nou thuak sang in Tura leh Sidon khua thuak ding adan a-om zaw ding.
42010015	Huan nang Kapernaum, van tan ah tawisang in na om a, misikhua a sawnkhiak a om ding na hi.
42010016	“Kuapeuh na thu uh ngaikhia keimah thu ngaikhia ahi a; kuapeuh nou hon deih lou kei hon deih lou ahi; kuapeuh nou hon ngai lou kei hon ngai lou ahi a, kuapeuh kei hon ngai lou tuh hon sawlpa ngai lou ahi,” achi hi.
42010017	Huan sawmsagihte kipaktak in ahong kik nawn ua, “Toupa, dawite nangawn na min ziak in ka thuthu un a-om uh,” achi uhi.
42010018	Ama'n akiang uah, “Khophia bang in van a kipan Setan hong kia ka mu hi.
42010019	Ngai un, gulte, aikamte sikdenna thu leh melma thilhihtheihna tengteng tung a thuneihna ka hon pia ahi; bangmah in ahon hih na kei hial ding.
42010020	Himahleh dawite na thuthu ua a-om ziak un kipak kei un; van a na min uh gelh ahih ziak in kipak zaw un,” achi hi.
42010021	Huai laitak in Jesu, Kha Siangthou in akipak mahmah a, “Pa aw, lei leh van Toupa, nang mipil leh mibengvakte kiang ah hiai thu na iim a, naungekte kiang a na than ziak in ka hon phat hi; ahi, Pa, huchibang hih nang ngaih in ahoih ahi.
42010022	Ka Pa'n bangkim ahon kemsak a, Tapa kua ahia, Pa lou ngal kuamah in athei kei, Pa leng kua ahia, Tapa leh akiang ua Tapa in atheihsak nopnate kia lou ngal kuamah in athei kei,” achi hi.
42010023	Huan nungzuite lam anga a, asim in, “Na thil muhte uh amu mitte ahampha e!
42010024	K'on chi ahi, zawlnei tampi leh kumpipa tampite'n leng na thil muhte uh muh akilawp gige ua, himahleh amu kei uh, bil a na zakte uh leng zak akilawp thei mahmah ua, himahleh aza kei uh,” achi hi.
42010025	Huan ngai un dan thei mi kuahiam adingh a, amah ze-etna ding in, “Sinsakpa, tangtawn hinna neihna ding in bang ka hih dia?” achi hi.
42010026	Ama'n akiang ah, “Dan laibu ah bang gelh ahia? Bangchi in na sim a?” achi hi.
42010027	Huan ama'n, “Toupa, na Pathian na lungtang tengteng, na kha tengteng, na hatna tengteng, na lungsim tengteng in na it ding ahi; nangmah na ki-it bang in na vengte na it ding ahi, chih,” chi in adawng hi.
42010028	Huan ama'n akiang ah, “Na dawng dik hi; huchi in hih lechin na hing ding,” achi hi.
42010029	Ama'n bel kisiamtansak ut in, Jesu kiang ah, “Ahihleh, ka inveng kua ahia?” achi hi.
42010030	Jesu'n adawng a, “Kuahiam Jerusalem a kipan Jeriko ah ahohsuk a, suamhatte atuak hi. Amau apuansilh asuahsak vek ua, avua ua, si dektak in apaisanta uhi.
42010031	Huan huai lampi ah siampu kuahiam ava paisuk a, amuhtak in lampi sik lehlam ah apel maimah hi.
42010032	Huan huchibang mah in Levi chimi khat leng huai mun ahong tung a, amuhtak in lampi sik lehlam ah apel maimah hi.
42010033	Himahleh, Samaria gam a mi kuahiam zin pai lai a-omna ahong tung a, amuhtak in alainat mahmah hi.
42010034	Akiang ah ava hoh a, aliamnate thau leh uain abuak a, atuam a, amah gan tung ah atuangsak a, khualbuk ah apaipih a, akemta hi.
42010035	Huan azing in makhai nih asuahkhia a, khualbuk kempa kiang ah apia a, amah na kem inla, hiai ban ana zat teng, ka hong kik nawn chiang in ka hon din ding,” achi hi.
42010036	Huai mi thumte lak ah, suamhatte tuakpa a ding in, invengte hi pen kua hi in na gingta a? achi hi.
42010037	Ama'n, “Huai atung a zahngaihna suahpa,” achi hi. Jesu'n akiang ah, “Nang leng huai mah bang in va hih in,” achi hi.
42010038	Huan azin kawm un khua khat ah alut a; numei khat amin Martha in ana zintun hi.
42010039	Huai minu'n sanggam numei khat anei a, amin Mari ahi, huai minu Toupa khebul ah atu a, athu angaikhia hi.
42010040	Martha in bel nna sem in abuai mahmah a; huchi in akiang a hong pai in, “Toupa, ka sanggamnu'n kei kia nasem ding a hon khiat khawk sa lou na hi maw? Hon huh ding in sawl in,” achi hi.
42010041	Toupa'n, “Martha, Martha, thil tampi na ngaihtuah a, buai nei ve; thil khat kia akul ahi;
42010042	Mari in tan hoih atel a, huai laksak ding ahi kei,” chi in adawng hi.
42011001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jesu koi lai mun hiam ah athum a, athum khit in anungzui mi khat in akiang ah, “Toupa, Johan in anungzuite thumdan ahilh bang in hon hilh sam in,” achi hi.
42011002	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Na thum chiang un hichibang in na chi ding uh, achi hi: Ka Pa uh, van a om, na min kizahtak hen, na gam hong tung hen.
42011003	Niteng in ka nek khop uh an hon pia in.
42011004	Ka khelhnate uh hon ngaidam in, kou leng kuapeuh bat hon neite ka ngaidam uhi; Khemna ah hon pilut ke'n. Gilou lak ah hon hu zaw in.”
42011005	Huan akiang uah, “Na lak ua kuahiam in lawm nei henla, zan lai in akiang a hoh in, ‘Lawm, tanghou phel thum hon leitawisak ve.
42011006	Ka lawm zin in ahon tawn a, ama a lui ding bangmah ka nei kei,’ chi henla;
42011007	ama'n insung a pan in, ‘Hon hihbuai ke'n; tu'n zaw kong khak ahi, ka tate leng ka kiang ah lupna ah a-ihmuta uh; thou in ka hong pe thei kei chi in dawng taleh, ka hon hilh ahi,’
42011008	alawm ahih ziak in thou in ava pe kei na a, anget ngutngut ziak in thou in adeih zahzah ava pe ding hi.
42011009	“Huchi in ka hon hilh ahi, ‘Ngen un, piak in na om ding uh; zong un, na mu ding uh; kiu un, honsak in na om ding uh.
42011010	Kuapeuh angen in angah a, kuapeuh azong in amu a, akiu peuhmah honsak in a-om ding hi.’
42011011	Nou lak a papen, ata in tanghou ngen taleh kua ahia suang pe ding? Ahihleh ngasa ngen taleh kua ahia gul pe ding?
42011012	Ahihkeileh, aktui ngen taleh aikam ape dia hia?
42011013	Huchi in nou migilou in bawn na tate thil hoih piakdan na theih uleh, na Pa uh van a om in angente Kha Siangthou pe na tel in chia!” achi hi.
42011014	Huan Jesu'n dawi pau thei lou khat adelhkhia hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, dawi apawttak in pau thei lou ahong pauta; huchi in mipi'n lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
42011015	Himahleh akhen in, “Dawimang Beelzibul ziak in ei ve dawite adelhkhiak zel,” achi uhi.
42011016	Akhen in, amah ze-etna ding in, van a kipan chiamtehna angen uhi.
42011017	Ama'n angaihtuah uh athei a, akiang uah, “Koi gam leng amah kidou peuh amangthang a; inkuan khat leng amah kidou amangthang hi.
42011018	Setan leng amah akidouleh agam bangchi in adingkhe dia? Beelzibul ziak in dawite adelhkhia, na hon chi uh maw;
42011019	ke'n Beelzibul ziak a dawite delhkhia ka hihleh, na tate un kua ziak in ahia adelhkhiak uh? Huaiziak in amau noute hon vai hawmsak dingte ahi ding uh.
42011020	Himahleh ke'n Pathian khutzung ziak a dawite delhkhia ka hihleh Pathian lalgam na kiang uah ahong tung khinta hi.
42011021	“Mihat in hiamzat kim tawi a a-inn aven sung teng, asum bittak in a-om gige hi.
42011022	Himahleh amah sang a hatzaw in ahong sual a, azoh chiang in, amuan agalvan kim asut a, sum alaksak a ahawmzak zel hi.
42011023	“Kuapeuh ka lam a pang lou tuh hon dou ahi a, kuapeuh hon lakkhawmpih lou in ahihzak hi.
42011024	“Dawi nin paimi sung a kipan apawt in, khawlna zong in tui omlouhna mun peuh ah avakvak hi. Huan khawlna himhim amu kei a, ka pawtna inn ah ka kik nawn mai ding,” achi hi.
42011025	Ava tun in phiatsiang leh zephoih in amu hi.
42011026	Huaitak in ava pai a, amah sang a gilouzaw dawi dang sagih ahon pi a, huai mi sung ah alut ua, ateng uhi. “Huai mihing omdan nanung, amasa sang in ahoih kei zaw tham hi,” achi hi.
42011027	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thute agen lai in, mipi lak ah numei khat akikoukhia a, akiang ah, “Nang hon painu gil leh, nang hon vaktu nawi ahampha e,” achi hi.
42011028	Ama'n bel, “Pathian thu za a zuite mihampha ahi zaw uh,” achi hi.
42011029	Huan mipite akiang a ahong kikhop lai un, Jesu'n, “Hiai khang giloute ahi uh; chiamtehna azong ua; himahleh Jonah chiamtehna chih louh akiang uah chiamtehna piak ahi kei ding.
42011030	Nineveh a mite a dia chiamtehna Jonah ahih bang in, Mihing Tapa leng hiai khangte chiamtehna ahong hi ding hi.
42011031	Thukhen ni chiang in, Simlam kumpinu hiai khangte kiang ah adingh dia, siam louh atangsak ding; Solomon pilna ngaikhe ding in kawlmong a kipan ahong ngal a; ngai un, Solomon sang a thupizaw hiai ah a-om hi.
42011032	Thukhen ni chiang in, Nineveh khua a mite hiai khangte kiang ah adingh ding ua, siam louh atangsak ding uh, Jonah thuhilh ziak in akisik ngal ua; ngai un, Jonah sang a thupizaw hiai ah a-om hi.
42011033	“Kuamah in khawnvak akimu lou ding in asel kei a, loh nuai ah leng akoih ngei sam kei uh, alut mite'n vak amuhtheihna ding un akoihna ah akoih zel uhi.
42011034	Na pumpi khawnvak na mit ahi; na mit achiimleh na pumpi leng avek in avaksuak nak hi; achiim keileh bel na pumpi amial vek nak hi.
42011035	Huchi in na sung a vak om mial ana hi kha ding e, pilvang in.
42011036	Huchi in na pumpi koi lai peuh mial lou a, avek a avakkhiakleh khawnvak vak petpet in atatvak bang in avakkhe vek ding,” achi hi.
42011037	Huan agen lai in Pharisai khat in amah kiang a an ne ding in achial a; huchi in alut a an ane hi.
42011038	Pharisai in an um amuh in, an nek ma a khut asil louh lamdang asa mahmah hi.
42011039	Toupa'n akiang ah, “Nou Pharisaite'n nou leh kuang polam na silsiang ngeitak ua; na sunglam uh lah lepgukna leh gilou in adim hi.
42011040	Mihaite aw, polam bawlpa'n sunglam leng abawl kei a hia?
42011041	Himahleh na neihte uh migenthei kiang a thilthawnpiak ding in zang un; huchi in ngai un, nou a ding in bangkim asiang vek hi.
42011042	“Nou Pharisaite aw, na tung uh agik e; pudina, pardi leh anteh-louhing teng sawm-a-khat na pia ua, diktatna leh Pathian itna na limsak kei uhi; himahleh huaite ei ve na hih ding uh, adangte hih lou tuan lou in.
42011043	Nou Pharisaite aw, na tung uh agik e! Sinagog ah tutphah hoihpente leh dawr mun a chibai bukte na ngaisang uh.
42011044	Laigelhmite leh Pharisai lepchiahte, na tung uh agik hi! Han chiamteh louh, atung a thei lou a mi apaina zel bang na hi uh,” achi hi.
42011045	Huan dan thei mi khat in akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, hiai thu na gen kou leng hon tai na hi,” chi in adawng hi.
42011046	Huan ama'n, “Dan thei mite aw, nou leng na tung uh agik! Puakgik, puak haksa pipi mite na suan ua, nou lah huai puakgikte na khutzung khat un leng na khoih ngei kei uh.
42011047	Na tung uh agik! Na pipute uh thahsa zawlneite han inn na lam ngal ua.
42011048	Huchi in na pipute uh thilhihte na theihpih un na hoihsakpih uh ahi; amau athat ua, nou ahan innte na lam uhi.
42011049	Huaiziak in ‘Pathian pilna in leng, akiang uah zawlneite leh sawltakte ka sawl dia, akhen athat ding ua, akhen asawi ding uh,’ achi hi.
42011050	Zawlnei tengteng sisan, leitung pian tung a kipan a kisuah, hiai khangte tung ah phu alak theih ding in achi hi.
42011051	Abel sisan suah a kipan, Zakariah, maitam leh tempul kikal a sisan suah tan in; ahi, ka hon hilh ahi, hiai khangte tung ah phu akila ding.
42011052	Nou dan theite aw, na tung uh agik e! Theihna chabi na paimangpih ua; nou lah na lut ngal kei ua, mi alut dingte na dal uhi,” achi hi.
42011053	Huai a kipan apawt in, laigelhmite leh Pharisaite'n amah atawng ua, thu chiteng gensak teitei tum in leh,
42011054	apaukhelh zenzenleh mat tum in atang gige uhi.
42012001	Huchih lai a mipi sang tampi kiphu mawimawi zou hial a ahong kikhop un, Jesu'n amasapen in anungzuite kiang ah, “Pharisaite silngou, lepchiahna lak ah pilvang un,
42012002	kilang lou ding a selguk bangmah a-om kei a; theih louh ding a iim leng bangmah a-om sam kei hi.
42012003	Huaiziak in mial a na gen peuh uh vak a zak in a-om ding; dantan sunggil a bilbul a na thugen uh intung vum ah tangkoupih in a-om ding hi.
42012004	“Huan ka lawmte aw, ka hon hilh ahi, pumpi that a, huai nung a bangmah dang hih nawn theiloute zaw, kihta kei un,
42012005	Himahleh kua ahia na lauh ding uh ka hon hilhkhol ahi; ahihlup nung a leng Gehenna a paihtheihna thuneipa lau un.
42012006	“Dal dangka nih in kawlgit nga azuak sek kei ua hia? Himahleh alak ua khat leng Pathian in amangngilh ngei kei hi.
42012007	Na luzang ua samzangte nangawn leng sim vek ahi uh. Lau kei un; kawlgit tampi sang in na manphazaw uhi.

42012011	“Sinagog a mite, vaihawmte, heutute ma a ahon pi hun chiang un, bangchi in bang thu in ka dawng dia, bang thu ka gen dia chi in lungkham kei un.
42012012	Huai huntak in, bang ahia na gen ding uh, Kha Siangthou in ahon hilh ding hi,” achi hi.

42012016	Huan akiang uah gentehna thu agen a, “Mihau kuahiam ahong pung mahmah hi.

42012021	Amau a dia gou khol a, Pathian lam a hauloute huchi ahi uh,” achi hi.
42012022	Huan anungzuite kiang ah, “Huaiziak in ka hon hilh ahi, bang ka ne diam aw? chi in na hinna thu uh leh bang silh in ka teng diam aw? chi in na pumpi thu uah lunghimoh kei un.
42012023	Nek ding sang in hinna athupizaw a, puansilh sang in leng pumpi athupizaw hi.
42012024	Va-akte ngaihtuah dih uh, buh atuh kei ua, a-at sam kei uh; buhpang leh buh inn leng anei kei uh; himahleh Pathian in amaute avak hi; noute vasate sang a manphazaw na hi uh.
42012025	Huan nou lak ah lunghimoh ziak a kua'n ahia ama dunglam tong khat a hihsang thei tuan?
42012026	Hiai lel leng hihtheiloute'n bangziak a thil dang lunghimoh nak na hi ua?

42012029	Huan na nek ding uh, na dawn ding uh, zong kei un; ginglel in leng om sam kei un.
42012030	Khovel a namte'n huai thil tengteng azong uh; huai bang na kiphamoh uh chih na Pa un atheigige hi.

42012033	Na neih peuh uh zuak unla, migentheite kiang ah pia un; van ah guta naih phaklouhna ah, leikha in aneksiatlouhna ah, dangka ip lui theiloute, gou bei theiloute kibawl un.
42012034	Na gou omna peuh ua na lungtang uh leng a-om ding ziak in.

42012036	Mi'n apu uh kitenna ankuangluina a kipan ahong pai chiang a, kongkhak ahon kiuhtak a, hon thei pah ding a angak nilouh bang in, om un.
42012037	Apu uh ahong pai chiang in sikha na ngak nilouh a, amuhte ahampha uh; chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, ama'n akawng agak dia, amau an um ding in atusak ding a, a-nna uh asepsak ding hi.
42012038	Zan lai in hiam, thoh hun in hiam a hong a, huchibang a ahon muh, huai sikhate ahampha uhi.

42012044	Diktak in ka hon hilh ahi, aneih tengteng tung a heutu ding in abawl ding hi.

42012046	huai sikha pu, agin louh ni, atheih louh lai in ahong ding a, tum nih ahon suah ding a, miginomloute tan bang atangsak ding hi.
42012047	Sikha apu deihlam theigige napi a na kiging tuan lou a, apu deihlam a gamta loupa'n nakpitak a vuak atuak ding hi.
42012048	Himahleh theiloupi a vuakna tham a gamtapa'n awlchik a vuak atuak ding. Tampi piak a ommi kiang ah tampi phut in a-om ding a; tampi kepsakpa kiang ah atamsem aphut ding uhi.

42012051	khovel a lem lengsak ding a hong pai hiam hon sa na hi uh maw? Hi dek lou hial, ka hon hilh ahi, kikhenna lengsak ding a hong pai ka hi zaw.
42012052	Tunung chiang in inkuan khat ah mi nga akidou ding uh, thum in nih, nih in thum.
42012053	Akidou ding ua, pa in atapa, atapa in apa; anu in atanu, atanu in anu; atekpi in amou, amou in atekpi,” achi hi.
42012054	Huan mipi kiang ah leng, “Tumlam a mei kai na muh uleh, ‘vuah azu ding na chi pah ua; huan ahong zu ngei zel hi.’

42012056	Nou lepchiahte aw, khovel leh van omdan leng na genchian thei ngal ua, bang achia tu hun theichian siam lou na hi ua?
42012057	“Bang achia noumau in thudik kikhen lou na hi ua?
42012058	Hon hekpa toh thukhenpa kiang na zot lai un, lampi ah kileptheihna khat zong teitei in; huchi lou in zaw thukhenpa mai ah hon kailut ding a, thukhenpa'n miman heutu ahon mansak ding a, miman heutupa'n suangkul ah ahon khum kha ding hi.
42012059	K'on hilh ahi, paihsa san khat nangawn na piak kim masiah, huai a kipan na pawt kei hial ding,” achi hi.
42013001	Huai lai in, kuate hiam a-om ua, huaite'n Pilat in Galili mite asisan uh Pathian biakna sagohte lak a ahelsakte tungtang Jesu ahilh uhi.

42013017	Huai thute agen lai in amelma tengteng azum ua; mipi bel athil thupi hih tengteng ziak in akipak uhi.

42013019	Ankam chi tang khat mi'n alak a, huan a atheh bang ahi, huai ahong pou a, sing ahong hi a, ahiangte ah tungleng vasate agiak uh,” achi hi.
42013020	Huan “Pathian lalgam bang toh ka teh dia? achi nawn a.
42013021	Silngou numei in alak a, anbuang tehna thum lak a avek a athoh mateng aphum bang ahi,” achi hi.

42013033	Akoi abang hitaleh tuni toh, zingchiang toh, ani thum ni toh ka pai zel lai ding; Jerusalem kho polam ah zawlnei amanthat thil hi thei hilou ahi.’
42013034	Aw Jerusalem, Jerusalem; zawlneite that, na kiang a hon sawlte suang a na denglum; akpi in anoute akha nuai a a-opkhum bang in na tate bangzah vei opkhum ka tum a? Himahleh na ut kei uhi.
42013035	En in, na inn avuak a taihsan in a-omta. Ka hon hilh ahi, ‘Toupa min a hong pai ahampha, na chih masiah na hon mu kei ding,’ ” achi hi.
42014001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, Sabbath ni in Pharisai vaihawmmi khat inn a an ne ding a ahoh in ana enkhia uhi.

42014005	Huan akiang uah, “Na lak uah kuahiam in sabiltung hiam bawngtal hiam nei unla, Sabbath ni in tuikul sung ah ke taleh kua ahia kaikhe pah lou ding?” achi hi.

42014026	“Kuapeuh ka kiang a hong pai in anu leh apa leh azi leh atate leh a-unaute leh asanggamnu leh ama hinna nangawn ahuat keileh ka nungzui ahi thei kei ding.

42014029	Huchi lou in zaw, suangphum khin phot a, alam zoh theih keileh a-en peuh in,
42014030	‘Hiai mi'n gel napi in azou thei ngal kei chi in anuihsan ding uh.’

42014035	Lei a ding in ahoih kei; ekvum ding in leng ahoih sam kei; mi'n apaikhia uhi. Kuapeuh zakna ding a bil nei in za hen,” achi hi.
42015001	Huan siahkhon mite leh mikhialte tengteng in athu za ding in akiang ahon zuan uhi.
42015002	Pharisaite leh laigelhmite'n, “Hiai mi'n mikhialte akithuahpih a, akiang uah an ane chi in aphun tuak uhi.”
42015003	Huchi in ama'n akiang uah hiai gentehna agen hi.
42015004	“Nou lak ah kuahiam in belam zakhat nei henla, alak ua khat mangsak taleh gamdai ah sawmkua-le-kuate nusia in, amang pen amuh nawn masiah kua ahia zong lou ding?
42015005	Huan amuh nawn in kipaktak in aliangzang ah apua hi.

42022051	Huan Jesu'n, “Hih nawn ke'n,” achi a, abil akhoih a, ahihdamta hi.
42022052	Jesu'n akiang a hong siampu liante tempul heutute leh upate kiang ah, “Namsau leh khetbuk tawi in, suamhat man ding bang hial in na hong kuan uh maw?
42022053	Tempul a na kiang ua niteng a ka om lai in hon mat tum in na hon sawk kei ua; himahleh tu mial thuneihna toh na tat hun uh ahi,” achi hi.
42022054	Huan aman ua, api ua, siampu lianpen inn ah apilut uhi. Peter in gamlapi ah azui hi.
42022055	Huan inn huangsung intual ah mei achih ua, atukhawm ua, alak uah Peter ava tu sam hi.
42022056	Huan meivak nuai a atut lai in nungak kuahiam in amu a, a-en nilouh a, “Hiai mi leng akiang a om ahi,” achi hi.
42022057	Ama'n bel, “Numei, amah ka thei kei,” chi in akitheihmohbawl hi.
42022058	Aden chiang deuh in midang in ahong mu nawn a, “Nang leng alak ua mi na hi ve,” achi hi. Peter in bel, “Mihing aw, ka hi kei,” achi hi.
42022059	Huan dakkal khat phial nung in, midang in, “Hiai mi leng akiang a om ahi tham hi; Galili gammi ahi,” achi tinten hi.
42022060	Huan Peter in, “Mihing aw, na thugen ka thei kei,” achi hi. Huan thakhat in, apau laitak in ak ahong khuangta hi.
42022061	Huan Toupa akihei a, Peter a-en hi. Peter in, “Ak khuan ma in thumvei na hon kitheihmohbawl ding, chi a Toupa'n akiang a athugen ahon phawkkhe thak hi.”
42022062	Huan apawt a, akap huphup hi.
42022063	Jesu lente'n nuihza bawlna in azang ua, asat uhi.
42022064	Amit atuamsak ua, “Kua ahia hon sat, gen in?” chi in adong uhi.
42022065	Thudang tampi in leng agensia un akou uhi.
42022066	Huan khua avaktak in upa hon, siampu liante leh laigelhmite ahong kikhawm ua, avaihawmna uah api uhi.
42022067	“Khrist na hihleh hon hilh in,” achi uhi. Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Hon hilh mah leng na gingta kei ding uh.
42022068	Ke'n noute thu hon dong hita leng leng, na hon dawng kei ding ua, na hon khah sam kei ding uh.
42022069	Himahleh tuban siah Mihing Tapa, Pathian thilhihtheihna taklam ah atuta ding,” achi hi.
42022070	Huan avek un, “Nang Pathian Tapa na hi maw le?” achi ua. Ama'n akiang uah, “Hi e, na hon chih bang un,” achi hi.
42022071	Huan amau, “Bang theihpihna dang i deih lai dia? Eimah mah in amah kamsuak a pan i zata ve ua le,” achi uhi.
42023001	Huan mipi tengteng adingh ua, Pilat kiang ah Jesu apita uhi.
42023002	“Hiai mi'n ka chite uh apimang a, Kaisar kiang ah siah liau akham a, Khrist, kumpipa, akichih ka za uh,” chi in ahek uhi.
42023003	Pilat in akiang ah, “Judate' Kumpipa na hi hia?” chi in adong a. Ama'n, “Hi e,” chi in adawng hi.
42023004	Pilat in siampu liante leh mipite kiang ah, “Hiai mi tung ah bangmah khelhna ka mu kei,” achi hi.
42023005	Himahleh amau, “Galili gam a kipan Judia gam khua teng leh hiai mun tan ah thu hilh in, mi tengteng afuihse gige,” chi in akhauh semsem uhi.
42023006	Pilat in huai azak in, hiai mi Galili gam a mi ahi hiam chih adong hi.
42023007	Huchi in Herod ukna sung a mi ahi chih atheihtak in Herod kiang ah asawlta a; huai lai in amah leng Jerusalem ah a-om hi.
42023008	Herod in Jesu amuh in akipak mahmah a; atanchin azak ziak in, tuma lam a pan muh ana ut him ahi a, athillamdang hih banghiam bek muh alamen hi.
42023009	Huan thu tampi adong a; himahleh bangmah in adawng tuan kei.
42023010	Siampu Liante leh laigelhmite'n dingh in nakpitak in ahek uhi.
42023011	Herod leh asepaihte'n Jesu simmohbawl in nuihza bawlna'n azang uh, puan thupitak silhsak in Pilat kiang ah asawl nawnta hi.
42023012	Huai ni in Herod leh Pilat akihoutheita uh; huai masiah a zaw kimelma et ahi uhi.
42023013	Pilat in siampu liante, heutute, mi tengteng asamkhawm a, akiang uah,
42023014	“Mite apimang chi in hiai mi ka kiang ah na hon pi uhi, ngai un, na ma ua ka etchet nung in na hekna thu uah hiai mi tung ah bangmah khelhna ka mu kei;
42023015	Herod in leng mu tuan lou in, i kiang uah ahon sawlkik nawn hi. Ngai un, sihna khop hial bangmah ahih kei hi.
42023016	Huchi in ka vo ding a, ka pawtsak mai ding,” achi hi.
42023017	(Ankuanglui ni a alak ua mi khat apawtsak teitei ding ahi ngal a).
42023018	Himahleh kituaktak in akikou ua, “Hiai mi hihmangthang inla, Barabbas pen hon pawtsak zaw in,” achi uhi.
42023019	Huai mi khopi a helna leh tualthah ziak a suangkul tang ahi.
42023020	Pilat in bel Jesu khah a-ut a, akiang uah thu agen nawn hi.
42023021	Himahleh, “Kros ah kilhden in, kros ah kilhden in,” chi in akikou uhi.
42023022	Huan ama'n, athumveina ah akiang uah, “Bang ding in maw? Hiai mi in bang ahia ahihkhelh? Sihna khop hial atung ah bangmah ka mu kei; ka sawi ding a, ka khah mai ding,” achi hi.
42023023	Amau bel aw ngaihtak suah in kilhden ding in angen teitei uhi. Huan a-aw un avau daita uhi.
42023024	Pilat in anget bang ua hih ding in thu ahihpukta hi.
42023025	Helna leh tualthah ziak a suangkul tang anget uh akhah a; Jesu bel a-utut aloh ding un apeta hi.
42023026	Apikhiak lai un, Kurini khomi Simon kichi, gamsung a kipan hong pai amantawm ua, Jesu nunglam a po ding in atung ah kros angata uhi.
42023027	Huan mi nazong leh numei amah kah a mau zelzul, mipi tampitak in amah azui uhi.
42023028	Jesu bel amaute lam nga in, “Jerusalem tanute aw, hon kah kei un, noumau leh na tate uh a ding in kap zaw un,” achi hi.
42023029	“Ngai un, ani ahong tung ding a, ‘Huai ni in, numei chingte, naupai ngeilouhna gilte, naungek tep ngei louh nawite ahampha uh,’ achi ding uhi.
42023030	Huai hun chiang in mite'n, tangte kiang ah, ‘Hon delh un,’ achi ding uh, mualte kiang ah, ‘Hon khuh un,’ achi ding uhi.
42023031	Sing ahin lai a bawn hichibang a ahih uleh; akeu chiang in bang alohta phet ding ua?” achi hi.
42023032	Huan akiang ah midang nih, migiloute leng hihlup ding in api uhi.
42023033	Kalvari, achih mun uh atun un, migiloute, ataklam ah khat, aveilam ah khat toh akilhden uhi.
42023034	Jesu'n, “Pa, amaute ngaidam in; athilhih uh athei kei ua ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in apuansilhte kihawm in, ai asan uhi.
42023035	Huan mihonpi'n dingh kawm in a-en uhi. Huchi in vaihawm mite'n, “Midang bawn ahondam aka; Pathian tel Khrist ahih taktakleh amah leng kihondam hen aw,” chi in a-enghou uhi.
42023036	Sepaihte'n leng amah nuihza bawlna in anei ua, akiang ah ahong ua, zu thuk apia uhi.
42023037	“Judate' Kumpipa na hih taktakleh kihondam in,” achi uhi.
42023038	Huan alutung zawn kros ah, Grik, Latin leh Hebru laimal in, “HIAI JUDATE' KUMPIPA AHI,” chi in laigelh atak uhi.
42023039	Huan amigilou kilh khat un Jesu atai a, “Khrist na hi kei a hia? Kihondam inla, kou leng hon hondam tanla,” achi hi.
42023040	Himahleh khatpa'n dawng kawm in, ataihilh a, “Pathian nangawn na kihta kei a hia kibang sap a hon gawt uh?
42023041	Ei zaw gawt tuak him i hi; i thilhih man lel mu i hi a; hiai mi'n bangmah ahihkhial ngal kei a,” achi hi.
42023042	Ama'n Jesu kiang ah, “Toupa na lalgam a na hong pai chiang in hon theigige in,” achi hi.
42023043	Ama'n akiang ah, “Chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, tuni in ka kiang ah Paradis ah na om sam ding,” achi hi.
42023044	Huan dak gukna vel ahi a, huai nungsiah dak kuana hun tan in gam pumpi ahong mialvekta a, nisa vak abeita hi.
42023045	Tempul puanzak alai ah ahong keksuak hi.
42023046	Aw ngaihtak in Jesu akikou a, “Pa, na khut ah ka kha ka hon kemsak hi,” achi hi. Huai achih zoh in akha akhahta hi.
42023047	Sepaih zaheutupa'n thil omdan amuh in, “Hiai mi, pel lou in midik ahi ngeingei,” chi in Pathian aphat hi.
42023048	Huai etnop en ding a mipi hong kikhawm tengtengte'n thil omdante amuh un a-awm uh kitum in akik nawnta uhi.
42023049	Huan ameltheihte tengteng leh numei Galili gam a kipan a hon zuite, huai thilte en in gamlatak ah adingh uhi.
42023050	Huan ngai un, mi khat amin Joseph, vaihawmmi, mihoihtak, diktak, Judate khua khat Arimathai a kipan a-om hi.
42023051	Avaihawm uah leh athilhih uah leng aki-awi kei him a, ama'n Pathian lalgam ana lamen gige hi.
42023052	Huai mi Pilat kiang ah ahoh a, Jesu luang angen hi.
42023053	Huan alakhia a, puanmalngat in atuam a, han, suang khuakkuak, kuamah sial nailouhna ah, asial hi.
42023054	Huan huai ni tuh Kisakkholhna ni, Sabbath ni tun dek kuan ahi.
42023055	Galili gam a kipan akiang a numei hong zuite'n azui zel ua, han leh aluang sialdan amu uhi.
42023056	Huan apai nawn ua, gimnamtui leh thaunamtui abawl ua; huan Sabbath ni in thupiak bang in akhawlta uhi.
42024001	Huan nipikal a ani masapen, phalvak in, gimnamtui abawlte uh tawi in, han ah ava hoh uhi.
42024002	Han a kipan suangtum khuksuan a om amu uhi.
42024003	Huan alut ua, Toupa Jesu luang amu kei uhi.
42024004	Huan hichi ahong hi a, huaiziak a amangbat lai un, ngai in, mi nih puan milengthei silh akiang uah ahong dingh uhi.
42024005	Alau ziak ua, lei si a bokkhup a a-om lai un, akiang uah, “Bangziak a misi lak a mihing zong?
42024006	Hiai ah a-om nawnta kei, athounawnta; Galili gam a a-om lai a na kiang ua athugen theigige un,
42024007	Mihing Tapa mikhialte khut ah matsak in a-om ding a, akilhden ding ua, ani thum ni in athounawn ding ahi, achih,” achi uhi.
42024008	Huan athugente ahon thei thak nawn uhi.
42024009	Hanmun a kipan apai nawn un, sawm-le-khatte leh midang tengtengte kiang ah huai thil tengteng ahilh uhi.
42024010	Sawltakte kiang a huai thuhilhte bel Mari Magdalin, Mari, Joanna, Jakob nu Mari leh akiang ua numei dangte ahi uhi.
42024011	Himahleh huaite thugen thu maimai in angai ua, amau ataksang kei uhi.
42024012	Himahleh Peter athou a, han ah ataita a; huan akun a, a-en a, puanmalngat omte kia amu a, huchi in thil omdan lamdang satak in inn lam ah apaita hi.
42024013	Huan ngai in, huai ni mah in alak ua mi nih khua khat Emmaus achih uah ahoh dek ua, huai khua Jerusalem a pan ching sawmguk ahi.
42024014	Huan thil hong tung tengteng agenkhawm zel uhi.
42024015	Gen a akisel lai un, Jesu ngei in ahon zuan a, akiang uah apai samta hi.
42024016	Himahleh amah a theihlouhna ding un, amit uh hihvaih in a-om hi.
42024017	Huan akiang uah, “Pai kawm a na genkhawm uh bang thu ahia?” achi hi. Huan dahmeltak in adingh dinden uhi.
42024018	Huan amin Kleopas pen in akiang ah, “Tulai a thil omdan na theih louh, Jerusalem ah nangmah kia in hia na ten?” chi in adong hi.
42024019	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bang thil eita?” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Nazaret Jesu, Pathian leh mi tengteng mitmuh a athu leh athilhih a zawlnei minthangtak tanchin thu;
42024020	siampu liante leh ka heutute un thah ding a thu apiak ua, akilhden thute uh.
42024021	Kou amah zaw Israelte tanpa hi ding a lamen lua hi ung a, himahleh, huai thiltun nungsiah tuni ani thum ni ahita hi.
42024022	Huai lou leng ka pawlte uh numei kuate hiam zingsang in, han ah ava hoh ua, hon hihmangbang uhi.
42024023	Aluang muloupi in, Pathian angelte kilak ka mu uh, huai mite'n athounawnta chih agen uh, ahong chi uhi.
42024024	Ka ompihte lak ua kuate hiam han ah ahoh ua, numeite gen bang ngei in amu ua; himahleh amah amu kei uh,” achi uhi.
42024025	Ama'n akiang uah, “Mihaite aw, zawlneite thugen tengteng gintak thu a ze-olte aw;
42024026	Khrist in huai thilte thuak a thupina a lut ding him ahi kei a hia?” achi hi.
42024027	Mosi leh zawlneite tengteng a pan in, Laisiangthou tengteng a ama tanchin toh kisai peuhmah amau ahilhchian zel hi.
42024028	Huan ahohna ding khua uh atung dekta ua; amah gamla deuh a hoh tum bang in a-om hi.
42024029	Kam in akhou ua, “Ka kiang uah taam in; nitaklam hi ding ahita a, ni leng tum dekta ahi,” chi in. Huchi in akiang ua taam ding in alutta hi.
42024030	Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ua an um a atut in tanghou ala a, avualzawl a, abalkham a, akiang uah apia hi.
42024031	Huan amit uh ahong vakta a, amel atheichianta uhi. Himahleh amah amangta mai hi.
42024032	Amau, “Lampi a hon houpih lai a Laisiangthou thute hon hilhchet lai in i lungtang avakhuai him hilou hia?” akichi uhi.
42024033	Huai laitak in, athou ua, Jerusalem ah akik nawn ua, sawm-le-khatte leh alawm omkhawmte amu ua, amau,
42024034	“Toupa ana thounawn taktak ahi, Simon kiang ah leng akilakta,” ana chi uhi.
42024035	Amau lampi a bang thil om hiam chih leh tanghou abalkhap a, amel atheihdante uh ahilh sam uhi.
42024036	Huai thu agen lai un, Jesu mahmah alak uah ahong dingh a, akiang uah, “Na tung uah khamuanna om hen,” achi hi.
42024037	Himahleh kiguih hial in, lauhuai asa mahmah ua, sikha mu hi in akingaihtuah uhi.
42024038	Ama'n akiang uah, “Bang achia mangbang na hi ua? Bangziak a na lungsim ua ginlahna hong om ahia?
42024039	Ka khutte ka khepekte en un, kei mahmah ka hi. Hon khoih unla, thei un; sa leh guh nei a na hon muh bang un, kha in zaw sa leh guh anei ngal kei hi,” achi hi.
42024040	Huai agen khit in akhutte akhepekte amau alak hi.
42024041	Kipah luat ziak a agin ngam louh ua lamdang asak lai un, akiang uah, “Hiai ah banghiam nek ding na nei uhia?” achi hi.
42024042	Ngahou, bak khat leh khuaizu khak apia uhi.
42024043	Ala a, ama uah aneta hi.
42024044	Huan akiang uah, “Na kiang ua ka om lai a ka tanchin gelh peuhmah thute ahong tung ding chi a ka hon hilhhilhte Mosi Dan, zawlneite leh phatna late a thu kigen, hiaite mah ka thu ahi,” achi hi.
42024045	Huchi in Laisiangthou thu theihna ding in alungtang uh avaksakta hi.
42024046	Huan akiang uah, “Hichibang a gelh ahi, Khrist in gim athuak ding a, ani thum ni in misi lak a kipan athounawn ding,” achi hi.
42024047	“Ama min in kisikna leh khelh ngaihdamna thu Jerusalem khua a pan in nam chih kiang ah hilh ahi ding,” chi in.
42024048	“Huai thil tengteng atheihpihte na hi uhi.
42024049	Huan ngai un, na tung uah ka Pa thuchiam ka hon sawl ding hi. Himahleh, tunglam a kipan thilhihtheihna silhsak a na om masiah uh khopi ah om kinken un,” achi hi.
42024050	Huan Bethani pha in amau apikhia a; huan aban azak a, avualzawl hi.
42024051	Huan hichi ahong hi a, avualzawl laitak in amau apaisan a, van ah pitouh in a-omta hi.
42024052	Huan amah abia ua, kipak kawm in Jerusalem ah akik nawn ua;
42024053	tempul ah Pathian phat in a-om nilouh uhi. Amen.
43001001	Atung in Thu a-om a, Thu tuh Pathian kiang ah a-om, huai Thu Pathian ahi.
43001002	Huai Thu mah atung in Pathian kiang ah a-om hi.
43001003	Bangkim avek in ama siam ahi; thilsiam tengteng amah siam louh bangmah a-om kei.
43001004	Amah ah hinna a-om, huai hinna mihingte vakna ahi.
43001005	Mial lak ah vak ahong vak a; mial in huai azou kei hi.
43001006	Pathian sawl mi khat a-om a, amin Johan ahi.
43001007	Huai mi theihpihtu hi ding in ahong, huai vak toh kisai theihpih ding in, amah tawn a mi tengteng in agintak theihna ding un.
43001008	Amah bel vak ahi kei a, vak thu theihpih ding a hong ahi zaw hi.
43001009	Vak diktak, michih kiang a vakna pia, khovel ah ahong pailel ahi.
43001010	Amah khovel ah a-om, khovel ama siam ahi, hinapi in khovel in amah athei kei hi.
43001011	Ama mite kiang ah ahong a, amite mahmah in ana pom kei uhi.
43001012	Himahleh amah kipahpih a pom, amin gingtate tengteng kiang ah Pathian tate suahtheihna apia a:
43001013	amaute sisan hiam, sa deihna hiam, mihing deihna hiam hilou in, Pathian suan a piang ahi zaw uhi.
43001014	Huai Thu tuh sa ahong suak a, i lak uah ahong teng a, hehpihna leh thutak a dim in; athupina Pa Tapa tang neihsun thupina bangbang i muta uhi.
43001015	Johan in amah theihpihna apia a, “Ka nung a hong paipa'n hon paikheng, amah ka ma a omsa him ahih ziak in, chi a athu ka genpa hiai ahi,” achi hi.
43001016	Huan eite'n ataangchinna a kipan hehpihna tung a hehpih nawnsawnna i tang chiat uhi.
43001017	Mosi zang a Dan piak ahi a, himahleh Jesu Khrist ziak in hehpihna leh thutak ahong om hi.
43001018	Kuamah in chik lai mah in Pathian amu ngei kei; Tapa tang neihsun, Pa angsung a om in theihtheih in amah abawlta hi.
43001019	Huan Judate'n, “Kua na hia?” chi a dong ding a, Jerusalem a kipan akiang a siampute leh Levi chi a mite asawl lai un hiaite Johan thu na theihsak ahi uhi.
43001020	Ama'n chiangtak in agen a, “Khrist ka hi kei hi,” chi in apulak hi.
43001021	Amau akiang ah, “Kua na hia le? Elijah na hi hia?” achi ua, adong uhi. Huan ama'n, “Ka hi kei,” achi hi. “Huai zawlnei na hi hia?” achi ua. Ama'n, “Hilou e,” chi in adawng hi.
43001022	Amau akiang ah ahihleh, “Kua na hia? Hon sawlte ka dawntheihna ding un hon hilh in; na tanchin himhim bang ahia na gen ding?” achi uhi.
43001023	Ama'n, zawlnei Isai gen bang in, “Toupa lampi hihtang un, chi a, gamdai a kikoupa aw ka hi,” achi hi.
43001024	Amisawlte uh Pharisaite kiang a kipan kuate hiam ahi uhi.
43001025	Amau akiang ah, “Khrist bek, Elijah bek, zawlnei bek na hih kei ngalleh bang achia baptis nak na hia le?” achi ua, adong nawn uhi.
43001026	Johan in akiang uah, “Ke'n tui in ka hon baptis a, na lak uah mi khat na theih louh uh adingh ahi,
43001027	amah ahi ka nung a hong pai dingpa, ka ma a omsa pen, akhedap khau phel tak leng ka hi kei,” chi in adawng hi.
43001028	Hiaite Jordan gal a Bethani a Johan in abaptisna mun a thil tung ahi.
43001029	Huan azing in Johan in akiang a hong pai Jesu amu a, agen a, “En un, Pathian Belamnou khovel khelhna lamangpa!
43001030	Hiai ahi amah, mi khat ka nung a hong paipa, ka ma a omsa him ahi, ka chihpa.
43001031	Amah lah ka na thei ngal kei a; himahleh Israelte kiang a amah latsak ahihna ding in tui a baptis in ka hong pai ahi,” achi hi.
43001032	Huan Johan in athu atheisak a, “Vakhu bang in van a kipan Kha hong suk ka mu a, atung ah a-om nilouh,” chi in agen hi.
43001033	Amah lah ka thei ngal kei a; himahleh tui a baptis ding a hon sawlpa'n ka kiang ah, “Kua tung ah leng Kha hong suk a atung a om na muh peuh, hiai tuh Kha Siangthou a baptispa ahi, ahon chi hi.
43001034	Huai ka muta a, hiai mipa Pathian Tapa ahi chih ka theisakta hi,” achi hi.
43001035	Huan azing nawn in anungzui nihte toh Johan adingh a,
43001036	Jesu vialvak vak lai a-en a, “En un, Pathian Belamnou!” achi hi.
43001037	Anungzui nihte'n athugen aza ua, Jesu azuita uhi.
43001038	Jesu akihei a, ahon zui uh amu a, akiang uah, “Bang ahia na zon uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Rabbi (huai tuh Sinsakpa chihna ahi), koi a teng na hia?” achi uhi.
43001039	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hong le uchin na mu ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai ua, a-omna amu ua; huai hun dak sawmna vel ahih tak ziak in akiang ah huai ni ataam uhi.
43001040	Johan thugen za a Jesu zui nihte lak a khat zaw pen Andru, Simon Peter sanggampa ahi.
43001041	Ama'n amasapen in amah sanggampa Simon amu a, akiang ah, “Messia ka muta uh,” achi a, huai tuh Khrist chihna ahi.
43001042	Huchi in Jesu'n amah ana en a, “Johan tapa Simon na hi, Kifas ahon chi ding uh,” achi a (huai tuh Peter chihna hi).
43001043	Huan azing in Jesu'n Galili gam a hoh atum a, Philip amu a, akiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi hi.
43001044	Philip bel Bethsaida khomi ahi a, Andru leh Peter omna khopi mah ahi.
43001045	Philip in Nathanael amu a, akiang ah, atanchin Mosi in dan laibu a agelh leh zawlneite'n agelh uh, “Amah ka muta uhi, Nazaret Jesu, Joseph tapa,” achi hi.
43001046	Nathanael in akiang ah, “Nazaret ah thil hoih apawt thei a hia?” achi hi. Philip in akiang ah, “Hong pai inla, en in,” achi hi.
43001047	Jesu'n akiang a Nathanael hong dek in amu a, atanchin ana gen a, “En un, Israel mitak, khemna himhim nei lou,” achi hi.
43001048	Nathanael in akiang ah, “Nang bangchidan a hon thei na hia?” achi hi. Jesu'n akiang ah, “Philip in nang ahon sap ma a, theipi bul a na om lai in, ka hon mu hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43001049	Nathanael in akiang ah, “Rabbi, Pathian Tapa na hi, Israelte kumpipa na hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43001050	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Theipi bul ah nang ka hon mu, na kiang a ka chih ziak in na gingta ahi maw? Hiaite sang a thil thupizaw na mu lai ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43001051	Huan Jesu mah in akiang ah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, van kihong a, Mihing Tapa tung a Pathian angelte kahtou leh kumsuk na mu ding uh,” achi hi.
43002001	Huan ani thum ni in, Galili gam a Kana ah kitenna a-om a, huai ah Jesu nu a-om hi.
43002002	Jesu leh anungzuite leng kitenna ah chial in a-om uhi.
43002003	Uain abeitak in Jesu nu'n akiang ah, “Uain atasamta uh e,” achi hi.
43002004	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Numei, nang na hon theihsak ding bang ahia om? Ka hun atung nai kei hi,” achi hi.
43002005	Anu'n sikhate kiang ah, “Na kiang ua agen peuhmah hih zel un,” achi hi.
43002006	Huan Judate silsiang dan bang in suang tuibel guk, buk sawmli mun nih hiam, mun thum hiam ta chiat, huai ah atung uhi.
43002007	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Tuibelte tui in dimsak un,” achi hi. Agong toh kikim in adimsak chiat uhi.
43002008	Akiang uah, “Tu in dim unla, nekbawl thusa kiang ah paipih un,” achi hi. Huchi in apaipihta uhi.
43002009	Nekbawl thusa in, tui uain hong suak achiam a, ahong kipatna athei kei a, tuidim sikhate'n ahihleh athei uh, mouneipa asam a, akiang ah,
43002010	“Michih in atung in uain hoih ahawm ua, atam deuh adawn nung un, ahoih lou ahawm uh; nang bel tutan in uain hoih na kem lailai a,” achi hi.
43002011	Jesu'n hiai a thillamdang hihpatna Galili gam Kana khua a ahih ahi; athupina alangsakta a; anungzuite'n amah agingta uhi.
43002012	Huan huai khit in Kapernaum ah ahohsuk a, amah leh anu toh, a-unaute leh anungzuite toh; huai ah ni tam lou a-om uhi.
43002013	Huan Judate Paikan Ankuangluina anaita a, Jerusalem ah Jesu ahohtou hi.
43002014	Tempul a bawng, belam leh vakhu zuak leh dangka kheng a tute amu hi.
43002015	Huan khauhual in zepna ding abawl a, belam leh bawng avek un tempul a kipan adelhkhia a, dangka khengte dangka asungbua a, adohkante uh leng asawnpuksak hi.
43002016	Vakhu zuakte kiang ah, “Hiai thilte hiai a kipan paipih un, ka Pa inn sumsinna mun in bawl kei un,” achi hi.
43002017	Huan “Na inn a ka phatuamngaihna in ahon gai ding,” chih gelh ahi chih anungzuite'n athei nawnta uhi.
43002018	Huchi in Judate'n akiang ah, “Hiai na thilhih chiamtehna bang ahia na hon lah theih?” chi in adong uhi.
43002019	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Hiai inn hihse le uchin, ni thum sung in ka tungding nawn ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43002020	Huan Judate'n, “Hiai inn kum sawmli-le-guk sung lam ahi, nang ni thum sung in na tungding ding maw?” achi uhi.
43002021	Himahleh amah pumpi inn thu gen ahi zaw hi.
43002022	Huaiziak in misi lak a kipan athohnawn in, anungzuite'n huai thugen athei nawnta uhi. Laisiangthou thu leh Jesu thugen agingta uhi.
43002023	Huan Jerusalem a Paikan Ankuangluina a-om lai in, athillamdang hihte amu ua, mi tampi in amin agingta uhi.
43002024	Himahleh Jesu bel alak uah akikangkoih a, mi tengteng athei hi.
43002025	Mihing thu kuamah hilhchet akiphatmoh louh ziak in; amah mah in mihing sung a om peuhmah athei ngal hi.
43003001	Pharisaite lak a mi, Judate vaihawmpa, amin Nikodem a-om hi.
43003002	Huai mi zan in Jesu kiang ah ahong a, akiang ah, “Rabbi, Pathian a kipan hong pai sinsakpa na hi chih ka thei uhi. Pathian na kiang a om lou hileh hiai thillamdang na hihte kuamah in ahihthei kei ding,” achi hi.
43003003	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, mi kuapeuh apianthak keileh Pathian lalgam amu thei kei,” achi hi.
43003004	Nikodem in akiang ah, “Mi atek nung in bangchi in apiangthak thei dia? Anu sung a nihvei lut in apiang thei dia hia?” achi hi.
43003005	Jesu'n adawng a, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh tui a leh Kha a apianthak keileh Pathian lalgam alut thei kei hi.
43003006	Sa suan peuhmah sa ahi a, Kha suan peuhmah kha ahi.
43003007	Na pianthak ngeingei ding ahi ka hon chih lamdang sa ke'n.
43003008	Huih a-utna peuh ah anung a, aging na za hi, himahleh koi a kipan hong pai ahia, koi ah ahia ahoh ding chih na thei ngal kei a; kuapeuh Kha a piang huchibang mah in a-om hi,” achi hi.
43003009	Nikodem in adawng a, “Hiai bangchi in a-om thei dia?” achi hi.
43003010	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Israelte sinsakpa na hi ngal a, huaite na thei kei maw?
