43003011	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kou ka theih uh ka gen ua, ka muh uh ka theisak uh; himahleh ka thu theihsak uh na sang kei uhi.
43003012	Lei lam thil ka hon hilh bawn gingtaloute'n, van lam thil hon hilh leng bangchi in na gingta ding ua?
43003013	Mihing Tapa, van a ompa leh van a kipan hong sukpa kia lou ngal kuamah van ah akahtou ngei kei.
43003014	“Huan Mosi in gamdai a gul akhaikang bang in, Mihing Tapa khaikang in a-om ding hi.
43003015	Kuapeuh agingta in amah ziak a tangtawn hinna aneihna ding in.
43003016	Pathian in khovel a-it mahmah ziak in, a Tapa tang neihsun apia hi. Kuapeuh amah gingtate amanthat louh ua, tangtawn hinna aneih zawkna ding un.
43003017	Khovel siam louh tangsak ding in Pathian in khovel ah a Tapa asawl kei, khovel amah vang a ahintheihna ding in asawl ahi zaw hi.
43003018	“Kuapeuh amah gingta siam louh in a-om kei ding a, kuapeuh agingta lou, tu a kipan siam louh in a-om pah ngal hi; Pathian Tapa tang neihsun min agintak louh ziak in.
43003019	Hiai siamlouhna ahi, khovel ah vak ahong a, himahleh mi'n vak sang in mial a-itzaw uh; athilhihte uh agitlouh ziak in.
43003020	Kuapeuh thil gilou hih in vak aho nak, vak ah leng ahong pai kei hi; huchi lou in zaw athilhihte alang kha ding hi.
43003021	Himahleh kuapeuh adik hihte athilhih uh Pathian ziak a hih ahi, chih alatna ding in vak ah ahong pai uhi,” achi hi.
43003022	Huai khit in Jesu anungzuite toh Judia gam ah ahoh ua, huai ah Jesu akiang uah a-om nilouh a, abaptis zel uhi.
43003023	Johan in leng Ainon ah, Salim kho kiang ah abaptis sam a, huai a tui atam ziak in mi ahong ua, baptisma atang uhi.
43003024	Hiai hun in Johan suangkul a khum ahi nai kei hi.
43003025	Huan Johan nungzuite leh Juda khenkhat silsiang thu ah akisel uhi.
43003026	Johan kiang ah ahong pai ua, akiang ah, “Rabbi, Jordan gal a na kiang a om, athu mi na theihsakpa'n, ngai dih, mi abaptis a, akiang ah mi tengteng ahong pai uh,” achi uhi.
43003027	Johan in adawng a, “Van a pan a piak ahihkeileh mihing in bangmah anei thei kei uhi.
43003028	Kei Khrist ka hi kei, ama a misawl ka hi, ka chih, noumau mahmah hon theihpihte na hi uhi.
43003029	Mouneipa zaw mounu pasal ahi; himahleh mouneipa lawm ding a athu za mouneipa aw ziak in akipak mahmah a, ka kipahna atangtungta hi.
43003030	Amah alian semsem ding a, kei bel ka neu hiaihiai ding,” achi hi.
43003031	“Tunglam a kipan hong pai zaw mi tengteng sang a tungnungpen ahi; lei a kipan bel lei a ahi a, lei lam thu agen a, van a kipan a hong paipa zaw mi tengteng sang a tungnungpen ahi.
43003032	Amuh leh azak peuh atheisak hi; kuamah in athu theihsak ataksang kei uhi.
43003033	Athu theihsak taksangmi in, Pathian midiktat ahi, chih akipsak hi.
43003034	Pathian sawl in Pathian thu agen hi; ama'n zaw teh chitchiat in Kha ape ngal kei a.
43003035	Pa in Tapa a-it a, akhut ah bangkim avek in apeta hi.
43003036	Kuapeuh Tapa gingta in tangtawn hinna anei; himahleh Tapa gingta lou in hinna anei kei ding a, Pathian thangpaihna atung ah a-om zaw,” achi hi.
43004001	Johan sang in Jesu'n nungzui tamzaw abawl a, tam abaptis zaw chih Pharisaite'n aza uh chih Toupa'n atheih in,
43004002	(Jesu hial in zaw abaptis kei a, anungzuite'n abaptis zaw zel uh),
43004003	Judia gam paisan in, Galili gam ah akik nawnta hi.
43004004	Huchi in Samaria gam tawn a pai akul hi.
43004005	Huchi in Samaria gam khua khat, Saikar achih uh, Jakob in atapa Joseph kiang a mun apiakna kiang ahong tung hi.
43004006	Huai ah Jakob tuileh a-om hi. Huchi in Jesu apaigim ziak in tuileh gei ah atu a; huai hun dak gukna khawng ahi.
43004007	Huchi in Samari numei khat tui tawi in ahong kuan a, Jesu'n akiang ah, “Dawn ding hon pia in,” achi hi.
43004008	(Anungzuite lah nek ding lei in khua ah ahoh ngal ua).
43004009	Huchi in Samari numei in akiang ah, “Nang Juda mi hi chin a, kei Samari numei hi ing a, bangchidan a ka kiang a dawn ding hon ngen na hia? achi hi. Judate'n lah Samari mite bangmah in angai ngal kei ua,” achi hi.
43004010	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Pathian thilthawnpiak leh dawn ding hon pia in, na kiang a chipa thei leteh zaw nang akiang a ngen zaw ding hi chin a, ama'n tuihing hon pe ding hiven,” achi hi.
43004011	Huan numei in akiang ah, “Pu, akhaikhiakna ding bangmah lah na nei kei a, tuileh athukthuk toh, koi a kipan in ahia huai tuihing na muh ding?
43004012	Ka pu uh Jakob sang in na thupizaw a hia? Ama'n hiai tuileh hon pia a, amah leh atate leh agante'n leng adawn uhi,” achi hi.
43004013	Huan Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kuapeuh hiai tui dawn adangtak nawn ding uh,” chi in adawng hi.
43004014	“Kuapeuh akiang a ka piak ding tui dawn bel, dangtak nawn ngei lou ding a; akiang a tui ka piak ding pen amah ah tui nak ahong phulkhe ding a, tangtawn hinpha a kikhohtou ding ahi,” achi hi.
43004015	Huan numei in akiang ah, “Pu, huai tui hon pe ve, ka dangtak nawnlouhna ding leh hiai tantan a tui tawi ding a ka hong kuanlouhna ding in,” achi hi.
43004016	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Pai inla, na pasal va sam inla, hiai ah hong kik nawn in,” achi hi.
43004017	Numei in akiang ah, “Pasal ka nei sam a,” chi in adawng hi. Jesu'n akiang ah, “Pasal ka nei sam a, na chih zaw, na chi dik ve;
43004018	pasal nga na neita a, tua na neihpa pen na pasal ahi kei him ahi, hiai thu na chi dik ve,” achi hi.
43004019	Numei in akiang ah, “Pu, zawlnei na hi chih ka thei hi.
43004020	Kou pipute'n hiai tang ah Pathian abe zel ua; nou bel mihing in Pathian abiakna mun ding Jerusalem khua ahi, na chi sese ua,” achi hi.
43004021	Huan Jesu'n akiang ah, “Numei, kei hon gingta in, hiai tang chitchiat lou leh Jerusalem khua chitchiat lou ah leng Pa na biak hun uh atungta hi.
43004022	Nou na theih louhpi uh na be nak ua, kou zaw ka theih uh ka bia uh; hotdamna lah Judate a kipan ahi ngal a.
43004023	Himahleh Pathian be taktakte'n kha leh thutak a Pa abiak hun uh tung ding ahita, tu in leng atung lel hi, Pa'n huchibang mi abemi ding in azong hi.
43004024	Pathian zaw Kha ahi a, abemite'n kha leh thutak a abiak ngeingei ding uh ahi,” achi hi.
43004025	Numei in akiang ah, “Messia, Khrist akichi, ahong pai ding chih ka thei, amah ahong pai chiang in bangkim ahon hilh ding,” achi hi.
43004026	Jesu'n, “Keimah nang hon houpihpa, huai amah ka hi,” achi hi.
43004027	Huan huai lai in anungzuite ahong pai ua, numei ahoupih lamdang asa mahmah uhi; himahleh kuamah in, “Bang zong na hia? Bangziak a numei houpih?” achi kei uh.
43004028	Numei in atuibel apaisan a, khua ah ava pai a, mite kiang ah,
43004029	“Ka thilhih peuh hon hilh zel mi khat a-om, hong unla, en dih uh; Khrist ahihtheih tuak na hiam?” achi hi.
43004030	Amaute khua a kipan ahong pawt ua, akiang lam azuanta uhi.
43004031	Huai kal in nungzuite'n akiang ah, “Sinsakpa, ne in,” achi uhi.
43004032	Himahleh ama'n akiang uah, “Na theih louh uh nek ding an ka nei,” achi hi.
43004033	Huan nungzuite akihou ua, “Anek ding mi'n ahon tawi ua eita maw?” akichi uhi.
43004034	Jesu'n akiang uah agen a, “Hon sawlpa deihlam hihleh, ama nna sep zoh ding ka an ahi.
43004035	Nou, buhlakna ding kha li a-om lai, na chi uh hilou hia? Ngai un ka hon hilh ahi, dak unla loute en un, tu mahmah in lak ding in amin ahi.
43004036	Alapa'n loh amu a, tangtawn hinna ding in gah ala hi, huchi a atuhpa leh alapa akipah tuaktheihna ding un.
43004037	Khat in atuh a, midang in ala chih thu hiai ah adik hi.
43004038	Na sepgim louh uh at dia hon sawl ka hi; midang in asem ua, nou asepsa uh na sunzom uh ahi,” achi hi.
43004039	Huan numei in, “Ka thilhih peuh hon hilh zel,” chi a atheihsak thu ziak in huai khua a om Samari mi tampi in Jesu agingta uhi.
43004040	Huchi in Jesu kiang ah Samari mite ahong pai ua, akiang ua om ding in akhou ngutngut ua; huchi in huai ah ni nih ataam hi.
43004041	Huan midang tampi in amah thu ziak in agingta samta uhi.
43004042	Amau numei kiang ah, “Tu in zaw na thugen ziak a gingta ka hi kei uh; koumau ngei in athu ka za ua, hiai mipa Khrist, khovel Hondampa ngei ahi chih ka theita uh,” achi uhi.
43004043	Huan ni nih nung in huai a pan pawt in, Galili gam ah apaita hi.
43004044	Jesu ngei in, zawlnei zaw ama kholam ah pahtawi in a-om ngei kei chih atheihpih hi.
43004045	Huchi in Galili gam ahong tun in Galili gam mite'n ana kipahpih ua, Jerusalem a ankuanglui lai a athilhih tengteng amuh tak ziak un; amau mah leng ankuangluina ah ahoh sam uhi.
43004046	Galili gam a Kana khua, tui uain asuahsakna mun ahong tung nawnta hi. Kumpi milian kuahiam a-om a, Kapernaum ah atapa achina hi.
43004047	Judia gam a kipan Galili gam ah Jesu ahong chih azak in akiang ah ahohtou a, va hohsuk a atapa si dekdek hihdam ding in achial hi.
43004048	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte na muh kei uleh na gingta kei hial ding uh,” achi hi.
43004049	Huan Kumpi milian in akiang ah, “Pu, ka ta asih ma in hong suk mai in,” achi hi.
43004050	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Pai nawnta in, na tapa adamta,” achi hi. Huai mipa'n, Jesu'n akiang a thu agen agingta a, apaita hi.
43004051	Apaisuk lai in asikhate'n ana dawn ua, “Na tapa adamta,” ana chi uhi.
43004052	Ama'n akiang uah adam tung lai adong hi. Amau akiang ah, “Zan in dak sagihna ah akhosik ahong daita hi,” achi uhi.
43004053	Naupang pa'n Jesu'n akiang a, “Na tapa adamta hi,” achih lai ahi chih atheita a; amah leh a-inkuanpihte'n avek un, agingtata uhi.
43004054	Hiai Judia gam a kipan Galili gam a ahong a Jesu thillamdang hih anihveina ahi.
43005001	Huai thil nung in Judate ankuangluina a-om a; Jerusalem ah Jesu ahohtou hi.
43005002	Jerusalem ah belam kongkhak kiang ah dil khat a-om a, huai mun Hebru pau in Bethesda achi ua, inlim nga anei hi.
43005003	Huai ah tui hong tat ngak in damloute, mittawte, khebaite, zawte tampi alum phengphung uhi.
43005004	Bang hun hiam in huai dil ah angel ahohsuk a, tui ava tok zel a; kuapeuh huai tui kitoh khit a va lut masa penpen in, bangchibang natna nei hileh leng hihdam in a-om zel hi.
43005005	Huai ah kum sawmthum-le-giat damlou mi kuahiam a-om hi.
43005006	Jesu'n huai a lum amu a, huchibang in sawtpi ana omta chih athei a, akiang ah, “Hihdam na ut hia?” achi hi.
43005007	Damloupa'n, “Pu, tui kitoh in dil a hon koih ding mi ka nei kei a, ka kuan sung in midang in hon makhelh nak uh,” chi in adawng hi.
43005008	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, na awngphah la inla, khe in paita in,” achi hi.
43005009	Thakhat in huai mipa adam pah a, a-awngphah la in, apaita hi.
43005010	Huai ni Sabbath ni ahi a, Judate'n adampa kiang ah, “Sabbath ni ei ve, na awngphah na lak asiang kei,” achi uhi.
43005011	Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon hihdampa ngeingei in ka kiang ah, ‘Na awngphah la inla, khe in paita in,’ hon chi ahi,” chi in adawng hi.
43005012	Amau akiang ah, “Na awngphah la inla, khe in paita in, na kiang a chipa kua ahia?” chi in adong uhi.
43005013	Himahleh adampa'n kua ahia ahih athei kei, huai a mipi a-om ziak un Jesu apaimangta hi.
43005014	Aden chiang in Jesu'n amah tempul ah amu a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na damta hi, khial nawn ke'n, huchi lou in zaw thil hoih lou sem na tung ah ahong tung kha ding,” achi hi.
43005015	Huan huai mi ava paikhia a, Judate kiang ah, “Ahihdampa Jesu ahi,” chih ahilh hi.
43005016	Huchi in Sabbath ni a athilhih ziak in Judate'n Jesu a-engbawl ua, thah ding in azong uhi.
43005017	Himahleh Jesu'n amau ahoupih a, akiang uah, “Ka Pa'n tu tanpha in nna asem zel a, ke'n leng ka sem zel,” achi hi.
43005018	Huchi in Judate'n hihlup atum semsem ua, Sabbath ni atan louh ziak kia ahi kei, Pathian amah Pa a abawl leh Pathian toh kikim a akibawl ziak in leng ahi.
43005019	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, Tapa in amah in bangmah ahihthei kei, Pa thilhih amuh kia lou ngal; thil ahih peuhmah, Tapa in leng ahih sam zel hi.
43005020	Pa in Tapa a-it a, athilhih peuhmah akiang ah amusak a; hiaite sang a thilhih thupizaw akiang ah amusak lai ding, lamdang na sak ding un.
43005021	Pa in misite kaithou a, hinna apiak bang in, Tapa in leng a-utna peuh kiang ah hinna apia hi.
43005022	Pa in kuamah vai ahawmsak ngei kei, himahleh vai tengteng Tapa in ahawmsak zaw hi;
43005023	mi tengteng in Pa zahna apiak bang un, Tapa leng zahna apiakna ding un. Kuapeuh Tapa zahloute'n, Pa asawlpa leng azah kei uhi.
43005024	“Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh ka thu za a, hon sawlpa gingta in, tangtawn hinna anei; siam louh in a-om kei a, sihna a kipan apawt a, hinna ah alut zawta hi.
43005025	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, ahun atung dekta, tu in leng atung lellel, huai hun chiang in misite'n Pathian Tapa aw aza ding ua, aza peuhmah ahing ding uh.
43005026	Pa in amah a hinna aneih bang in, Tapa in leng amah a hinna nei ding in apeta hi.
43005027	Mihing Tapa ahih ziak in, akiang ah thukhenna leh thuneihna apia hi.
43005028	Hiai lamdang sa kei un, ahun atungta, huai hun chiang in han a om tengteng in a-aw aza ding ua,
43005029	ahong pawt vek ding uh; thil hoih hihte hinna tang in athounawn ding ua, thil gilou hihte siam louh tang in athounawn ding uhi.
43005030	“Keimah in bangmah ka hihthei kei; bil a ka zak bangbang in vai ka hawm zel; ka vaihawm adik ahi, keimah deihlam a om ka tum kei; hon sawlpa deihlam a om ka tup zel ziak in.
43005031	“Keimah tanchin theihpihtu a pang hi leng, ka thu theihpihna adik kei ding hi.
43005032	Ka tanchin toh kisai theihpihtu midang khat a-om, ama'n ka tanchin atheihpihna apiak pen dik ahi, chih ka thei hi.
43005033	Nou Johan kiang ah mi na sawl ua, ama'n thutak thu ahon theihpih hi.
43005034	Thu theihpihna ka san mihing a kipan ahi kei a; himahleh na hinna ding un hiai thu ka gen ahi.
43005035	Huai Johan khawnvak kuangtak leh vaktak ahi, avak ah nopsak takdih na ut uhi.
43005036	“Himahleh theihpihna ka neih zaw Johan theihpihna sang in athupizaw hi; Pa'n thilhih zoh ding a ahon piak, ka thilhih ngei in Pa'n hon sawl chih ka tanchin atheisak hi.
43005037	“Pa hon sawlpa ngei leng ka tanchin atheihpihtu in apang hi. Nou chik lai mah in a-aw na za ngei kei ua, amel leng na mu ngei kei uh.
43005038	Athu leng noumau ah na tengsak kei uh, asawl mipa na gintak louh ziak uh ahi.
43005039	“Laisiangthou sung a tangtawn hinna om ding a na ngaihtuah ziak un na nak zon ngial ua; huaite mah ka tanchin theihpihtute ahi uhi.
43005040	Himahleh hinna nei ding in ka kiang ah na hong nuam kei uhi.
43005041	“Mihing pahtawina ka sang kei.
43005042	Himahleh nou ka hon thei hi, Pathian itna noumau ah na nei kei uhi.
43005043	Ka Pa min in ka hong a, noute'n na hon kipahpih kei uh; midang ama min in hong taleh amah na na kipahpih ding uhi.
43005044	Nou kipahtawi tuahna paktate'n Pathian tak kia a pawt pahtawina zong lou in bangchi in kei na hon gingta thei ding ua?
43005045	Ke'n Pa kiang a nou ka hon hek ding gingta kei un; nou hon hek khat a-om, na muan uh Mosi ngei.
43005046	Mosi gingta hi le uchin, kei leng na hon gingtata ding uh; ka tanchin gelh lah amah ahi ngal a.
43005047	Himahleh ama thugelh gingta lou in, bangchi in ka thute na gingta ding ua?” achi hi.
43006001	Huai thilte khit in, Galili dil, Tiberias tuipi kichi gallam ah Jesu apai hi.
43006002	Damloute tung a thillamdang ahihte amuh ziak un mipi tampi in amah azui uhi.
43006003	Jesu tang ah ahohtou a, huai ah anungzuite kiang ah atu hi.
43006004	Huan Paikan Ankuangluina, Judate ankuangluina anaita hi.
43006005	Jesu adak a, mipi tampi in akiang lam hon zuan in amu a, Philip kiang ah, “Hiaite nek ding tanghou koi a lei ding i hi ua?” achi hi.
43006006	Huai thu amah ze-etna ding a agen ahi, ahih ding lah ama'n athei ngal a.
43006007	Philip in akiang ah, “Michih in tawmchik a atan chiat ding uh leng, makhai zanih man tanghou in adaih kei ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43006008	Huan anungzuite lak a khat, Simon Peter unau Andru in akiang ah,
43006009	“Barli buh tanghou phel nga leh ngasa nih nei pasal naupang khat hiai ah a-om, himahleh mi hiai zah lawmlawm lak ah bang tham hizou ding ahia?” achi hi.
43006010	Jesu'n, “Mite tusak un,” achi hi. Huai ah loupa tampi a-om hi. Huchi in pichingte atusuk ua, atamlam uh sangnga vel ahi.
43006011	Jesu'n tanghou phelte ala a, kipahthu agen khit in atute kiang ah ahawm a, huchi mah bang in ngasate leng adeih hun un ahawm sam hi.
43006012	Huan akham nung un, anungzuite kiang ah, “Bangmah mang lou ding in anente luak un,” achi hi.
43006013	Huchi in aluak ua, barli buh tanghou phel nga nete nek bang nente bawm sawm-le-nih ahihdim uhi.
43006014	Mite'n athillamdang hih amuhtak un, “Hiai mi, zawlnei, khovel a hong dingpa ana hi ngei e,” achi uhi.
43006015	Huchi in amah kumpipa dia bawl ding a mat teitei tum in ahong kuan ding uh, chih Jesu'n athei a, tang ah amah kia in apaituam nawnta hi.
43006016	Huan nitaklam in anungzuite tuipi ah apaisuk uhi.
43006017	Long ah atuang ua, tuipi ah Kapernaum azuan uhi. Khua amialta a, Jesu lah akiang uah ahong tung nai kei hi.
43006018	Huihpi hattak anun ziak in tuikihot asang hulhul hi.
43006019	Ching sawmnih leh ching nga hiam, ching sawmthum hiam akalh nung un, tuipi tung a khe a Jesu pai a, long lam hon naih in amu ua, alauta uhi.
43006020	Himahleh ama'n akiang uah, “Keimah ka hi, lau kei un,” achi hi.
43006021	Huchi in kilawptak in long ah Jesu atuangsakta ua, huchi in along uh azotna gam uah atung pah hi.
43006022	Azing in dil gal lehlam a mipi dinghte'n, long khat lou ngal long dang a-om kei a, anungzuite toh long ah Jesu atuang ton kei a, anungzuite amau kia in apai uh chih athei uhi.
43006023	Himahleh Toupa'n kipahthu agen nung a, tanghou anekna kiang uh, Tiberias a kipan long neu chikchik ahong tung uhi.
43006024	Huchi in mipi'n Jesu leh anungzuite a-omta kei uh chih atheih un, amau leng long neute a tuang in, Jesu zong in Kapernaum khua ahong tung uhi.
43006025	Huan tuipi gal a ahong muh un akiang ah, “Rabbi, chik in ahia hiai lam na hong tun?” achi uhi.
43006026	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, thillamdangte na muh ziak ua hon zong na hi kei ua, tanghou phel na nekvah ziak uh ahi zaw.
43006027	An mang thei phet zong in phiaphia kei un, himahleh an, tangtawn hinpha a om gige ding, Mihing Tapa hon piak ding pen zong in phe zaw un; Pa Pathian in amah achiamtehta hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43006028	Amau akiang ah, “Pathian nna ka septheihna ding un bang ahia ka hih ding uh?” achi uhi.
43006029	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Pathian nasep hiai ahi, amisawl gingta le uchin,” chi in adawng hi.
43006030	Amau akiang ah, “Chiamtehna bang ahia na hih ding, ka muh ua nang ka hon gintak theihna ding un? Thil bang ahia na hih ding?
43006031	Van a kipan akiang uah amau tanghou nek ding apia chih gelh bang in, ka pipute un gamdai ah manna ane uh,” achi uhi.
43006032	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, van a kipan a tanghou na muh pen uh Mosi hon piak ahi kei, ka Pa'n van a kipan tanghoutak noute ahon piak ahi zaw.
43006033	Pathian tanghou van a kipan in ahong paisuk a, khovel kiang a hinna pepa ahi,” achi hi.
43006034	Amau, “Toupa, huai tanghou hon pe gige in,” achi uhi.
43006035	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Keimah hinna tanghou ka hi; kuapeuh ka kiang a hong pai agilkial kei ding, kuapeuh kei hon gingta chik mah chiang in adangtak kei ding.
43006036	Himahleh nou na hon muh un leng na hon gingta kei uh chih ka hon hilhta ve.
43006037	Pa'n hon piak peuhmah ka kiang ah ahong pai vek ding uh; kuapeuh ka kiang a hong pai ka delhkhe ngei kei ding hi.
43006038	Kei deihlam hih ding a van a kipan a hong paisuk ka hi kei, hon sawlpa deihlam hih ding a hong paisuk ka hi zaw hi.
43006039	Hiai ahon sawlpa deihlam ahi, ama'n hon piak tengteng bangmah mangsak lou in, nitawp ni chiang in kaithou zaw leng.
43006040	Kuapeuh Tapa mu a gingta in tangtawn hinna aneih a, nitawp ni chiang a amah ka kaihthoh ding ka Pa deihlam ahih ziak in,” achi hi.
43006041	Van a kipan a tanghou hong paisuk ka hi, achih ziak in, atung ah Judate aphun uhi.
43006042	“Hiai mi Joseph tapa Jesu ahi kei a hia, anu leh apa leng i theih? Van a kipan a hong paisuk ka hi, bangchi chih a chi ahia?” achi uhi.
43006043	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Phunphun dah un.
43006044	Pa hon sawlpa'n ahip keileh kuamah ka kiang ah ahong pai thei kei. Ke'n ahong pai mi nitawp ni chiah ka kaithou ding.
43006045	Zawlneite laibu ah ‘Pathian hilh in a-om ding uh,’ chih gelh ahi. Michih Pa thu za a thei peuhmah ka kiang ah ahong pai uhi.
43006046	Pathian a kipan pen lou ngal in kuamah in Pa amu ngei kei, ama'n zaw Pa amu hi.
43006047	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh agingta in tangtawn hinna anei.
43006048	Keimah hinna tanghou ka hi.
43006049	Na pipute un gamdai ah manna ane ua, huchi in asi uhi.
43006050	Hiai tanghou i chih pen van a kipan a hong paisuk ahi, mi'n anek ua asihlouhna ding un.
43006051	Keimah van a kipan a tanghou hing hong paisuk ka hi, kuapeuh in hiai tanghou anekleh tangtawn in ahing gige ding; ahi, khovel hinna dia ka piak ding tanghou ka sa ahi,” achi hi.
43006052	Huchi in Judate akisel ua, “Hiai mi'n bangchi in asa nek ding in hon pe thei ding ahia?” achi uhi.
43006053	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, Mihing Tapa sa na nek ua, asisan na dawn kei uleh noumau in hinna nei lou hi ve uchin.
43006054	Kuapeuh ka sa ne a, ka sisan dawn in tangtawn hinna anei; huan, nitawp ni chiang in amah ka kaithou ding.
43006055	Ka sa zaw an taktak ahi a, ka sisan leng dawn tak taktak ahi.
43006056	Kuapeuh ka sa ne a, ka sisan dawnmi, keimah ah a-om gige a, kei leng amah ah ka om gige hi.
43006057	Pa hing in hon sawl a, Pa ziak a hing ka hih mah bang in, kuapeuh kei hon nete keimah ziak in amah leng ahing ding hi.
43006058	Hiai van a kipan a tanghou hong paisuk ahi; na pipute un tanghou anek ua, asih bang uh zaw ahi kei; kuapeuh hiai tanghou ne tangtawn in ahing gige ding,” achi hi.
43006059	Huai thute Kapernaum a sinagog a thu ahilh lai a agen ahi.
43006060	Huchi in anungzuite akhen tampi in huai azak un, “Hiai thuhaksa ahi, kua'n angaikhe thei dia?” achi uhi.
43006061	Huai thu ah anungzuite aphun uh chih Jesu'n alungsim a atheih in, akiang uah, “Hiai thu in hon hih lunghi lou hia?
43006062	Mihing Tapa tuma lam a a-omna ngei a kahtou mu le uchin, bang na chi ding ua?
43006063	Hinna pia zaw kha ahi a, sa zaw bangmah ding in aphatuam kei; na kiang ua thu ka gente kha ahi a, hinna leng ahi.
43006064	Himahleh na lak uah akhen gingta lou om na hi uh,” achi hi. Jesu'n atung a kipan in agingtaloute leh amansak dingpa atheigige ngal a.
43006065	Huan ama'n, huaiziak in ahi na kiang ua, “Pa in apiak keileh kuamah ka kiang ah ahong pai thei kei, ka chih,” achi hi.
43006066	Hiai nung in anungzuite akhen tampi akinunghei ua, amah akithuahpih nawnta kei uhi.
43006067	Jesu'n sawm-le-nihte kiang ah, “Nou leng paimang sam na ut uhia?” achi a.
43006068	Simon Peter in, “Toupa, kua kiang ah ahia ka pai tuan ding uh? Nangma'n tangtawn hinna thu na nei hi.
43006069	Nangmah Pathian Mi Siangthou na hi chih ka taksangta ua, theih leng ka thei uh,” chi in adawng hi.
43006070	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Nou sawm-le-nihte keimah hon tel hilou na hi uh maw? Na lak ua mi khat diabol ahih laitei toh,” achi hi.
43006071	Iskariot, Simon tapa Judas, sawm-le-nihte lak a tel sam, huai thu agen ahi, amah zuausan a mansakpa ding ahi.
43007001	Huai khit in Galili gam ah Jesu avak a; Judate'n amah hihlup atup ziak un Judia gam apha nuam kei hi.
43007002	Judate Biakbuk Ankuangluina anaita hi.
43007003	Huchi in a-unaute'n akiang ah, “Hiai a kipan in Judia gam ah va hoh in, na nungzuite'n na thilhih amuhtheihna ding un,” achi uhi.
43007004	“Kuamah in aguk in thil bangmah ahih kei ua, amah mah in alangtang in mite theih ding in ahih hi. Hiai thilte na hih ngalleh khovel kiang ah kimusak in,” achi uhi.
43007005	A-unaute nangawn in leng amah agingta kei uhi.
43007006	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Ka hun atung nai kei; nou hun zaw chik lai peuh in atung gige hi.
43007007	Khovel in nou ahon ho thei kei, kei zaw hon ho nak uh, athilhihte uh gilou ahi chih ka theihsak ziak in.
43007008	Nou ankuangluina ah va hohtou unla, kei zaw tu ankuangluina ah ka hohtou tadih kei ding, ka hun atun nai louh ziak in,” achi hi.
43007009	Huai thu akiang uah gen in Galili gam ah a-om nilouh hi.
43007010	Himahleh a-unaute ankuangluina a ahohtouh nung un, amah leng vantang theih louh in, aguk bang in ahohtou sam hi.
43007011	Judate'n ankuangluina ah amah azong ua, “Koi a om ahia?” achi uhi.
43007012	Atung ah mipite lak a mi aphun sim supsup ua, khenkhat in, “Mihoih ahi,” achi ua; khenkhat in, “Hi dek kei e, mipi khem ahi,” achi uhi.
43007013	Himahleh Judate akihtak ziak un kuamah in alangtang in atungtang thu agenlang ngam kei uhi.
43007014	Ankuanglui san laitak in, tempul ah Jesu ahohtou a, thu ahilh hi.
43007015	Huan Judate'n, “Hiai mi'n zil ngeiloupi a bang achia hichi theih ahia?” achi ua, lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
43007016	Huan Jesu'n amau adawng a, “Ka thuhilh kei a hilou in, hon sawlpa thu ahi zaw.
43007017	Kuapeuh ama deihlam hih ut in ka thuhilh Pathian a kipan hia, keimah phuahtawm a ka gen chih athei ding hi.
43007018	Kuapeuh ama phuahtawm thu gen zaw, ama hoihna zong ahi; asawlpa hoihna zongmi mitak ahi, amah ah diklouhna himhim a-om kei hi.
43007019	Mosi in na kiang uah dan ahon pe kei a hia? Himahleh na lak uah kuamah in dan na zui kei uh. Nou bang achia hon hihlup tum na hi ua?” achi hi.
43007020	Mipi'n, “Dawi zawl na hi ve; kua'n ahia hon hihlup tum?” chi in adawng uhi.
43007021	Jesu'n adawng a akiang uah, “Thil khat ka hih nou tengteng in lamdang na sa uh.
43007022	Ahi a, Mosi in zeksum thu nou ahon piak ziak in Sabbath ni in leng mi zek na sum zel uhi. Huai pen Mosi a kipan hilou in pipute a kipan ahi zaw hi.
43007023	Mosi Dan a tatleklouhna ding a Sabbath ni a pasal in azek asum ngalleh, ke'n Sabbath ni a mi ka hihdam ziak in ka tung ah na heh tuam uh maw?
43007024	Akilatdan in ngaihtuah kei unla, diktattak in ngaihtuah zaw un,” achi hi.
43007025	Huan Jerusalem a mi khenkhat in, “Hiai mi thah atuppa uh hilou hia?
43007026	En dih uh, alangtang in hiai ah thu agen a, akiang ah bangmah agen kei uhi. Amah Khrist ahi chih vaihawmte'n thei taktak uh ahita diam?
43007027	Hiai mi ahong kipatna lam nangawn i thei ngal a. Khrist ahong kilat chiang in ahong kipatna lam kuamah in athei kei ding uh,” achi uhi.
43007028	Huaiziak in tempul a Jesu'n thu ahilh kawm in akikou a, “Nou na hon thei ua, ka hong kipatna lam leng na thei uh. Himahleh keimah thu a hong pai ka hi kei, amah kei hon sawlpa midik ahi, amah lah na thei ngal kei ua.
43007029	Ke'n amah ka thei; amah a kipan a hong pawt ka hi a, ama'n lah ahon sawl ngal a,” achi hi.
43007030	Huchi in amah mat atumta ua, himahleh ahun atun nai louh ziak in kuamah in akhoih thei kei uhi.
43007031	Mipi akhen tampite'n bel amah agingta ua, “Khrist ahong kilak chiang in, hiai mi hih sang in chiamtehna tamzaw ahih tuan dia hia?” achi uhi.
43007032	Huan Pharisaite'n atung a mipi phunna thute aza ua; huchi in siampu liante leh Pharisaite'n amah man ding in heutute asawlta uhi.
43007033	Jesu'n, “Sawt lou kal na kiang uah ka om phot ding a, hon sawlpa kiang ah ka pai ding hi.
43007034	Nou na hon zong ding ua, na hon mu kei ding uh; ka omna ah leng na hong thei kei ding uh,” achi hi.
43007035	Huan Judate akihou ua, “I muh louh ding in hiai mi koi a hoh dek ahi ding? Grik pemdalhte kiang a hoh in Grikte thu va hilh ding adiam aw?
43007036	Nou na hon zong ding ua, na hon mu kei ding uh, ka omna ah leng na hong thei kei ding uh achih, bang achihna adiam maw?” achi uhi.
43007037	Huan ankuanglui ni nanungpen, ni thupi ni in, Jesu adingh a, akikou a, “Kuapeuh adangtakleh ka kiang ah hong henla, dawn hen.
43007038	Kuapeuh kei hon gingta Laisiangthou gen bang in tuihing luite asung a pan ahong luangkhe ding,” achi hi.
43007039	Hiai thu agingtate'n Kha atan ding thu uh agenna ahi; Jesu pahtawi a a-om nai louh ziak in Kha lah piak ahi nai tadih ngal kei ua.
43007040	Huchi in mipi lak a khenkhat in huai thu azak un, “Hiai zaw zawlnei hi petmah e,” achi uhi.
43007041	Khenkhat in, hiai zaw, “Khrist ahi,” achi ua, khenkhat in bel, “Bang ding in Galili gam ah Khrist ahong pawt tel dia?
43007042	Khrist zaw David suante lak ah, David omna khua Bethlehem a apawt ding ahi, chih Laisiangthou in agen kei a hia?” achi uhi.
43007043	Huchi in amah ziak in mipi akikhen ua, akilangta uhi.
43007044	Khenkhat in mat a-ut ua, himahleh kuamah in akhoih tuan kei uh.
43007045	Huan heutute, siampu liante leh Pharisaite kiang ah ahong pai nawn ua akiang uah, “Bang achia hon tonpih lou?” achi uhi.
43007046	Heutute'n, “Hiai mi bang in kuamah in thu agen ngei kei,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43007047	Pharisaite'n akiang uah, “Nou leng pimang a om sam na hita uh maw?
43007048	Vaihawmte leh Pharisaite lak a mi amah gingta a-omta a hia?
43007049	Huai dan thei lou mipite sop lai, hamsethuak ei ve ua,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43007050	Nikodem, tuma a Jesu kiang a hong, alak ua pang sam ahi a, ama'n akiang uah,
43007051	“Amah kam ngei a thu zak leh athilhih theih ahih ma, i dan un mi siam louh atangsak ngei a hia?” achi hi.
43007052	Amau akiang ah, “Nang leng huai Galili mi na hi sam maw? Zong lechin, Galili gam ah zawlnei kuamah pawt ding a-om kei uh chih thei tanla,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43007053	Huan michih ama inn chiat ah apaita uhi.
43008001	Himahleh Olive tang ah Jesu ahohtou hi.
43008002	Zingsang phalvak in tempul ah alut nawn a, mi tengteng akiang ah ahong pai ua, amah atu a, amaute thu ahilh hi.
43008003	Laigelhmite leh Pharisaite'n numei khat angkawm lai amat uh ahon pi ua; alai ah adingsak uhi.
43008004	Jesu kiang ah, “Sinsakpa, hiai numei angkawm, a-angkawm laitak a amat uh ahi.
43008005	Mosi Dan laibu in hichibang mi suang a denlup thu ahon pia hi; nang bangchi na sa a?” achi uhi.
43008006	Huai thu amah hekna ding amuhtheihna ding ua, ze-etna dia agen uh ahi. Huchi in Jesu akun a, athugen uh za lou bang in akhutzung in leitual agelh hi.
43008007	Huan adot lailai ziak un amah adaktou a akiang uah, “Na lak ua khelhna nei lou in amah suang in deng masa heh,” achi hi.
43008008	Akun nawn a, akhutzung in leitual agelh nawn hi.
43008009	Amau athugen azak un, upapen a pan atawp pha in, khatkhat in akigelkhia ua; huchi in numei alai a a-omna ngei a om toh Jesu kia a-om uhi.
43008010	Jesu adaktou a, “Numei, koi a om ahi ua? Kuamah in siam louh hon tangsak lou uhia?” achi hi.
43008011	Huan ama'n, “Toupa, kuamah in hon tangsak kei,” achi hi. Jesu'n, “Ke'n leng siam louh ka hon tangsak kei; pai inla, tuban khial nawn ke'n,” achi hi.
43008012	Jesu'n akiang uah thu agen nawn a, “Kei khovel vak ka hi; kei hon zui kuapeuh mial ah akhosa kei ding a, hinna vak anei zaw ding,” achi hi.
43008013	Huchi in Pharisaite'n akiang ah, “Nangmah thu theisak na hi; na thu theihsak adik kei,” achi uhi.
43008014	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Keimah thu theisak na hi taleng zong ka thu theihsak adik ahi. Ke'n ka hong kipatna leh ka manohna ding ka thei hi; noute'n bel ka hong kipatna leh ka manohna ding na thei kei uh.
43008015	Nou sadan in vai na hawmsak uh; ke'n kuamah vai ka hawmsak kei.
43008016	Ahi, vai hawmsak na hi taleng zong, ka vai hawmsak adik ding; keimah kia ka hi kei a, kei leh Pa hon sawlpa ka hi zaw uhi.
43008017	Ahi, na dan laibu uah leng mi nih theihpihna adik, chih gelh ahi.
43008018	Kei ka hihleh keimah thu theisakpa ka hi a, Pa hon sawlpa'n ka thu atheisak hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43008019	Amau akiang ah, “Koi a na Pa om ahia?” achi uhi. Jesu'n, “Nou kei na hon thei kei uh, ka Pa leng na thei kei uh; kei hon thei hi le uchin, ka Pa leng na thei ding uh,” chi in adawng hi.
43008020	Huai thu tempul a thu ahilh kawm a, sumkoihna mun a agen ahi; ahun a tun nai louh ziak in kuamah in amah aman nai kei uhi.
43008021	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Ka paimang ding a, nou na hon zong ding ua, na khelhna uah na si ding uh; ka hohna ding ah na hong thei kei ding uh,” achi nawn hi.
43008022	Judate'n, “Ka hohna ding ah na hong thei kei ding uh, achih, akihihlum dia adiam?” achi uhi.
43008023	Ama'n akiang uah, “Nou nuailam a kipan na hi ua; kei tunglam a kipan ka hi; nou khovel a na hi ua, kei zaw hiai khovel a ka hi kei hi.
43008024	Huaiziak in na kiang uah, na khelhna uah na si ding uh ka chih, huai amah ka hi, chih na gintak kei ualeh na khelhna uah na si ngeingei ding uh,” achi hi.
43008025	Huan amau akiang ah, “Kua na hia?” achi uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Atung a kipan in na kiang uah ka genta hi.
43008026	Nou tungtang thu ah thil tampi gen ding leh ngaihtuah ding ka nei; himahleh, hon sawlpa zaw midik ahi; amah kiang a ka thuzakte khovel kiang ah ka hilh ahi,” achi hi.
43008027	Pa thu akiang uah agen chih atheisiam kei uhi.
43008028	Huchi in Jesu mah in, “Nou mihing Tapa na khaikang nung un, amah ka hi chih leh ke'n keimah thu in thil bangmah ka hih kei a, Pa hon hilh bang zel in hiai thu ka gen zaw ahi chih na thei ding uhi.
43008029	Hon sawlpa ka kiang ah a-om a, Pa'n kei kia in hon nuse ngei kei; athil kipah lam peuhmah ka hih zel ziak in,” achi hi.
43008030	Huan huai thute agen lai in mi tampi'n amah agingta uhi.
43008031	Huchi in Jesu'n amah gingta Judate kiang ah, “Ka thu a na om gige uleh, ka nungzuite na hi taktak ding uhi.
43008032	Huan thutak na thei ding ua, thutak in ahon suaktasak ding,” achi hi.
43008033	Huan amau akiang ah, “Abraham suante ka hi ua, tutan in kuamah sal ah ka om ngei kei uh, suahtaksak in na om ding uh bangchi chih a chi na hia?” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43008034	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh thil hihkhial khelhna sal ahi.
43008035	Sal kichi peuhmah inn ah a-om gige kei a; Tapa bel a-om gige hi.
43008036	Tapa in sal a pan ahon suahtaksakleh na suakta taktak ding uhi.
43008037	Abraham suante na hi uh chih ka thei hi, himahleh hon thah na tum ngal ua, ka thu in noute a mun aneih louh ziak in.
43008038	Ke'n ka Pa kiang a thil ka muh ka gen a; nou leng na pa uh kiang a thil na muh uh na hih uh,” achi hi.
43008039	Huan amau akiang ah, “Ka pa uh Abraham ahi,” achi ua, adawng uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Abraham tate hi le uchin, Abraham thilhih na hihta ding uhi,” achi hi.
43008040	“Himahleh Pathian kiang a thutak ka zak, kei ahon hilhpa ngei, tu'n ah hon thah na tum ngal ua; Abraham in zaw hichibang in ahih kei. Nou zaw na pa uh thil na hih nak uhi,” achi hi.
43008041	Amau akiang ah, “Ang kikawm a piang ka hi kei uh, Pa khat kia ka nei uh, Pathian,” achi uhi.
43008042	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Pathian na Pa uh hitaleh nou kei na hon it ding uh; Pathian a pan hong pawt leh akiang a kipan hong pai ka hi; keimah thu a hong leng ka hi sam kei, ama'n ahon sawl zaw hi.
43008043	Bangziak a ka thugen theisiam lou? Ka thu na zak theih louh ziak uh ahi.
43008044	Nou zaw na pa uh diabol a pawt na hi ua, na pa uh utna na hih ding uh. Amah zaw atung a kipan tualthat ahi, thutak ah a-om kei; asung a thutak himhim a-om louh ziak in. Zuauthu agen in amah a ngei agen ahi; zuauthei ahi ngal a, zuaupa leng ahi.
43008045	Thutak ka gen ziak in nou hon gingta lou na hi uhi.
43008046	Na lak uah kua'n ahia khelhna a siam louh hon tan thei om? Thutak ka gen in leng nou bang achia hon gingta lou?
43008047	Pathian a pan pawt in Pathian thu apakta a; Pathian a pan pawt na hih louh ziak un na pakta kei uhi,” achi hi.
43008048	Huan Judate'n akiang ah, “Samari mi dawi zawl na hi ka chih uh, ka chi dik ngel uh ahi kei maw?” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43008049	Jesu'n, “Dawi zawl ka hi kei. Ka Pa ka zahtak ahi zaw, nou kei na hon zahtak kei uhi.
43008050	Himahleh keimah kilawmna zong ka hi kei; azongmi leh angaihtuahmi khat a-om hi.
43008051	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, mi'n ka thu azuihleh tangtawn in sihna amu kei ding,” achi hi.
43008052	Huan Judate'n akiang ah, “Dawi zawl na hi chih tu in ka theita uhi. Abraham asita, zawlneite toh, nang mi'n ka thu azuihleh tangtawn in sihna achiam kei ding, na chi maw.
43008053	Ka pu uh Abraham sang in na thupizaw a hia? Amah leng asita a, zawlneite leng asita uh; kua a kibawl na hia?” achi uhi.
43008054	Jesu'n, “Keimah kipahtawi hi taleng ka kipahtawina bangmah ahi kei; na Pathian uh, na chih uh ka Pa, hon pahtawipa ahi; nou amah na thei kei uhi.
43008055	Ke'n zaw amah ka thei; amah ka thei kei chi leng noumau bang a zuauthei ka hi ding; huchi in amah ka thei a, athu leng ka zui zel.
43008056	Na pu uh Abraham in ka ni mu ding ahih ziak in akithalawp a, huan amu petmah a, akipak hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43008057	Huan Judate'n akiang ah, “Nang kum sawmnga leng hi nailoupi in, Abraham na mu a hia?” achi uhi.
43008058	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, Abraham om ma a Ompa ka hi,” achi hi.
43008059	Huchi in adenna ding un suangte atawm ua; himahleh Jesu akibu a, tempul a kipan apawtta hi.
43009001	Huan Jesu'n apai kawm in pian tung a kipan mittaw khat amu hi.
43009002	Anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Rabbi, mittawsa a apian kua'n ahia thil hihkhial, hiai mi hia, anu leh apa?” chi in adong uhi.
43009003	Jesu'n, “Hiai mi'n ahihkhial kei, anu leh apa'n leng ahihkhial kei uh; Pathian nasepte atung a alatna ding ahi zaw,” chi in adawng hi.
43009004	“Sun ahih lai in hon sawlpa nna i sep ngeingei ding uh ahi; zan hi dekdekta ahi, huai hun chiang in kuamah in nna asem thei kei ding uh.
43009005	Khovel a ka om sung in khovel vak ka hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43009006	Huchibang a agen khit in, lei ah chil asia a, tungman abawl a, huan amit ah tungman anuh hi.
43009007	Akiang ah, “Siloam dil ah va sil in,” achi a, (huai tuh Sawl chihna ahi). Va pai in asil a, mitvak in ahong kik nawn hi.
43009008	Huchi in avengte leh tuma a khutdoh a mute'n, “Hiai mi tu kawm a khutdohpa ahi kei a hia?” achi uhi.
43009009	Midang in, “Ahi mah vo oi,” achi ua, midang in, “Hi kei e, akibatpih ahi zaw,” achi uhi. Ama'n bel “Huai mi mah ka hi,” achi hi.
43009010	Huan amau akiang ah, “Na mit bangchi in ahia ahong vak?” achi uhi.
43009011	Ama'n, “Mi khat, Jesu achih un tungman abawl a, ka mit anuh a, ‘Siloam dil ah va hoh inla va sil in’ ahon chi a, huchi in ka va hoh a, ka sil a, mitvakna ka muta,” achi hi.
43009012	Huan amau akiang ah, “Amah koi a om ahia?” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Ka thei kei,” achi hi.
43009013	Amaute'n Pharisaite kiang ah huai mittawpa ahon pi uhi.
43009014	Jesu'n tungman bawl a, amit ahihvak ni Sabbath ni ahi.
43009015	Huchi in Pharisaite'n amit ahong vak takdan adong nawn uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka mit ah tungman akoih a, ka sil a, ka mutheita hi,” achi hi.
43009016	Huan Pharisai khenkhat in, “Huai mi'n Sabbath ni atan louh ziak in, Pathian a kipan ahi kei,” achi uhi. Khenkhat in bel, “Mikhial in bangchi in hichibang thillamdang ahihthei dia?” achi uhi. Huchi in akikhen ua, akilangta uhi.
43009017	Mittawpa kiang ah, “Na mit ahihvaksak, nang bangchibang in amah na ngaihtuah a?” achi nawn ua. Ama'n, “Zawlnei ahi,” achi hi.
43009018	Himahleh Judate'n amit hong vakta nu leh pa asap masiah uh, mittaw ana hi him a, amit ahong vakta chih atungtang thu ataksang kei uhi.
43009019	Anu leh apa kiang ah, “Hiai mi na tapa uh mittawsa a piang ahi na chih uh ahi hia? Bangchi in ahia tua amuh theih tak?” chi in adong uhi.
43009020	Anu leh apa'n, “Hiai ka tapa uh ahi chih ka thei uh, mittawsa in apiang chih leng ka thei uh.
43009021	Himahleh bangchi in ahia tua hon muh theih chih ka thei kei uh, amit hihvakpa leng ka thei sam kei uh; amah dong un; piching ahi a; amah thu kigen thei ahita,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43009022	Judate akihtak ziak ua anu leh apa'n huai thute agen uh ahi; Judate'n, huai ma him in leng, amah Khrist ahi chi a gum a-omleh sinagog a pan nohsuah ding chih lem ana sa chiat ngal ua.
43009023	Huaiziak in anu leh pa'n, “Piching ahi, amah dong un,” achi uhi.
43009024	Huchi in mittawpa asam nawn ua akiang ah, “Pathian phat in hiai mi zaw mikhial ahi chih ka thei uh,” achi uhi.
43009025	Ama'n bel, “Mikhial ahi hia hilou ka thei kei, thil khat ka thei, tuma in ka mit ataw a, tu in ka mutheita,” chi in adawng hi.
43009026	Amau akiang ah, “Na tung ah bangchi in ahia ahih? Na mit bangchi in ahia ahihvak?” achi uhi.
43009027	Ama'n akiang uah, “Den in ka hon hilhta vele, na thei nuam ngal kei ua; bang achia thei nuam nawn na hi ua? Nou leng anungzui hih sam ut na hi uh maw?” chi in adawng hi.
43009028	Huan amau amah atai ua, “Nang amah nungzui na hi, kou zaw Mosi nungzuite ka hi uh, chi in.
43009029	Pathian in Mosi ahoupih chih ka thei uh, hiai mi koi a hong kipan ahia ka theihsak kei uh,” achi uhi.
43009030	Huai mi'n akiang uah, “Huai pentak ahi alamdanna, koi a hong kipan ahia na theih louh uh, ka mit lah ahihvak ngei ngal a,” achi hi.
43009031	“Pathian in mikhial thu angaikhe kei chih i thei uhi. Himahleh kuapeuh in Pathian alimsak a, adeihlam ahihleh, Pathian in amah angaikhia hi.
43009032	Khovel om tung a kipan kuamah mittawsa a piang mit ahihvak nawn chih akithei ngei kei hi.
43009033	Hiai mi Pathian a kipan a pawt ahihkeileh bangmah ahihthei kei ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43009034	Amau akiang ah, “Nang khial lumlet a piang in hiai bang na hon hilh vial maw?” chi in adawng uhi. Huchi in amah ahawlkhia uhi.
43009035	Huan anohkhia uh chih Jesu'n aza a; amah amuh in, “Pathian Tapa na gingta hia?” achi hi.
43009036	Ama'n, “Pu aw, ka gintak theihna ding in amah kua ahia?” chi in adawng hi.
43009037	Jesu'n, “Amah na mu khinta, tua nang hon houpihpa ahi,” achi hi.
43009038	Ama'n, “Toupa, ka gingta hi,” chi in amah abia hi.
43009039	Jesu'n, “Thukhen ding in hiai khovel a hong ka hi, mittawte' mit ahong vakna ding uleh mitvakte' mit ahong tawtna ding un,” achi hi.
43009040	Akiang a Pharisai omte'n huai thu azak un, akiang ah, “Kou leng mittaw ka hi sam uh maw?” achi uhi.
43009041	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Mittaw hi le uchin khelhna nei lou ding hi uchin a, himahleh ka mu thei uh na chih ziak un khelhna ah na om gige uhi,” achi hi.
43010001	“Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh belam huang kongkhak a lut lou a, lampi dang a kahlutmi guta leh suamhat ahi.
43010002	Kuapeuh kongkhak a lut belamchingpa ahi.
43010003	Kongkhak ngakpa'n amah ana honsak a; belamte'n a-aw aza uh; ama'n belamte amin un asam chiat a, apikhe zel hi.
43010004	Amah a tengteng apawtsaktak in, ama uh akai a, belamte'n amah azui zel ua, a-aw athei uhi.
43010005	Midang azui kei ding ua, ataimangsan zaw ding uh; midangte aw atheih louh ziak un,” achi hi.
43010006	Hiai gentehna Jesu'n akiang uah agen hi; himahleh bang thu ahia akiang ua agen chih athei kei uhi.
43010007	Huchi in Jesu'n akiang uah agen nawn a, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kei belam kongkhak ka hi.
43010008	Ka ma a hong pai tengteng gutate leh suamhatte ahi vek uh; himahleh belamte'n athu uh angaihsak kei uh.
43010009	Kei kongkhak ka hi; keimah a mi alutleh, humbit in a-om ding a, alut in apawt dia, nek ding leng amu ding hi.
43010010	Guta zaw, gu ding leh that ding leh hihse ding lou in ahong pai kei; kei ka hihleh hinna aneihna ding ua, tampitak aneihna ding ua hong pai ka hi.
43010011	“Kei belamchingpa hoih ka hi; belamchingpa hoih in abelamte a ding in ahinna apia hi.
43010012	Kilohmi, belamchingpa tak hilou, belamte amah a hilou in, ngia hong pai amuh in belamte ataisan a; huan ngia in amau akei a, huchi in belamte ahihdalh hi.
43010013	Kilohmi ahi a, belamte a ding a deihsakna himhim aneih louh ziak in ataimang hi.
43010014	Kei zaw belamchingpa hoih ka hi.
43010015	Pa in ahon theih bang in ke'n leng Pa ka thei hi, huan belamte a ding in ka hinna ka pia hi.
43010016	Hiai belam huang a lou belam dangte ka nei hi; amau leng ka hon pi ding a, ka aw aza ding ua, hon khat in chingpa khat toh a-omkhawm ding uhi.
43010017	“Hiai ziak in Pa'n kei ahon it ahi; lak nawn ding a ka hinna ka piak ding ziak in.
43010018	Kuamah in hon laksak kei ding, keimah thuthu in ka pe zaw ding hi. Pe thei ka hi a, la nawn thei leng ka hi. Hiai thupiak ka Pa a pan ka muh ahi,” achi hi.
43010019	Hiai thu ziak in Judate akikhen ua, akilang nawnta uhi.
43010020	Akhen tampi in, “Dawi zawl ahi, ahai ei ve; bangziak a athu ngaikhia na hi ua?” achi uhi.
43010021	Akhen in, “Hiai dawi zawl thute hi kei e. Dawi in mittaw mit ahihvak thei a hia?” achi uhi.
43010022	Huan Jerusalem a Latna Ankuanglui lai ahi a, huai hun phalbi lai ahi.
43010023	Tempul, Solomon inlim ah Jesu akivialleh hi.
43010024	Judate'n hong umkual ua, akiang ah, “Bang tan lakloh tak a hon koih ding na hia? Khrist na hihleh chiantak in hon hilh in,” achi uhi.
43010025	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Ka hon hilhta a, na gingta tuan kei uh; ka Pa min a thil ka hih hiaite'n ka tanchin atheisak uhi.
43010026	Himahleh na gingta kei uhi, ka belam lak a mi na hih louh ziak un.
43010027	Ka belamte'n ka aw aza uh, ke'n leng amaute ka thei a, amau ahon zui uhi.
43010028	Akiang uah tangtawn hinna ka pia; tangtawn in amangthang himhim kei ding ua, kuamah in ka khut a kipan hon sut sam kei ding hi.
43010029	Amau hon pepa ka Pa, mi tengteng sang a thupizaw ahi; kuamah in Pa khut a kipan asut thei kei ding hi.
43010030	Kei leh Pa lah pum khat ka hi uh,” chi in adawng hi.
43010031	Huan Judate'n adenna ding in suang atawm nawn uhi.
43010032	Jesu'n amau ahoupih a, “Pa a kipan nasep hoih tampi ka hon ensak a, huai nasepte lak ah bang nasep ziak in ahia suang a na hon den dek uh?” achi hi.
43010033	Judate'n akiang ah, “Nasep hoih ziak in suang in ka hon dengdek kei uh; Pathian na gensiat ziak leh nang mihing hi ngal a, Pathian a na kibawl ziak ahi zaw,” chi in adawng uhi.
43010034	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Na dan uah, ‘noute pathiante na hi uh ka hon chi,’ chih gelh ahi kei a hia?
43010035	Pathian thu tunnate bawn pathiante achihleh Laisiangthou bohsiat theih ahi kei hi.
43010036	Pathian Tapa ka hi, ka chih ziak in Pa'n aseh a, khovel a asawlpa Pathian na gensia hon chi na hi uh maw?
43010037	Ka Pa nasem ka hih keileh hon gingta kei un.
43010038	Himahleh sem ka hihleh kei hon gingta kei mah le uchin ka nasepte bek gingta un; huchi a keimah ah Pa a-om chih leh kei Pa ah ka om chih na theihna ua, na theihsiamna ding un,” chi in adawng hi.
43010039	Huaitak in mat atum nawn ua, himahleh akhut ua kipan asuakta hi.
43010040	Jordan lui gal ah Johan in atung a mi abaptisna lam ah apaimang nawn a, huai ah a-om nilouh hi.
43010041	Huan akiang ah mi tampi ahong pai ua, “Johan in thillamdang bangmah ahih kei a; himahleh Johan in hiai mi tungtang thu agen peuhmah ana dik mahmah hi,” achi uhi.
43010042	Huan huai ah mi tampi in amah agingta uhi.
43011001	Huan mi khat, Mari leh asanggam Martha omna Bethani khua ah, mi khat amin Lazaras kichi damlou in a-om hi.
43011002	Asanggampa Lazaras damlou neinu hiai Mari ahihleh sathau gimnamtui Toupa nuh a, asam a akhete nulnu ahi.
43011003	Asanggamnute'n Jesu kiang ah, “Ngai dih Toupa, na it achi ana,” chi in mi asawl uhi.
43011004	Jesu'n huai azak in, “Hiai natna sihna ding zen ahi kei, Pathian thupina ding ahi zaw hi. Hiai ziak a Pathian Tapa hih thupi ahihtheihna ding in ahi,” achi hi.
43011005	Martha, asanggamnu, Mari leh Lazaraste Jesu'n a-it hi.
43011006	Ama'n china ahi chih azak in, a-omna ngei ah ni nih ataam lai hi.
43011007	Huai khit in anungzuite kiang ah, “Judia gam ah i hoh nawn ding uh,” achi hi.
43011008	Huan nungzuite'n akiang ah, “Rabbi, tuma zek in Judate'n suang a hon den atum ua; huchipi in huai ah na hoh nawn dia hia?” achi ua.
43011009	Jesu'n, “Sun in dakkal sawm-le-nih a-om kei a hia? Mi sun a avakleh akisui ngei kei, hiai khovel vak amuh ziak in.
43011010	Himahleh mi zan a avakleh akisui hi; amah a vak a-om louh ziak in,” chi in adawng hi.
43011011	Huai thute agen khit in akiang uah, “I lawmpa Lazaras a-ihmuta; amah phawnghalh ding in ka hoh ding,” achi hi.
43011012	Huchi in anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Toupa, a-ihmut takleh akhanglou nawn mai na ke,” achi uhi.
43011013	Jesu'n asih thu gen ahi a; himahleh amau ihmu a atawldam thu gen hiam asa uhi.
43011014	Huchi in Jesu'n chiangtak in akiang uah, “Lazaras si ahi, achi a,
43011015	huai a ka om louh nou ziak in ka kipak ahi, na gintak theihna ding un; himahleh akiang ah i hoh ding uh,” achi hi.
43011016	Thomas, Didum achih un, anungzuihpihte kiang ah, “Amah toh i sih samna ding un eite leng i hoh ding uh,” achi hi.
43011017	Huchi in Jesu atun in ni li han ah a-omta chih athei hi.
43011018	Bethani khua ahihleh Jerusalem kiang a om ahi a, ching sawm-le-nga phial a gamla ahi.
43011019	Huchi in asanggampa uh sihna tung a khamuan ding in Judate tampi Martha leh Mari kiang ah ahoh uhi.
43011020	Jesu ahong dek chih Martha in azak phet in ava dawn a; Mari bel insung ah atu lailai hi.
43011021	Martha in Jesu kiang ah, “Toupa, hiai a om hi lechin zaw, ka sanggampa si lou ding hi a.
43011022	Tu'n ah leng Pathian kiang a na nget peuhmah Pathian in nang hon pe ding chih ka thei,” achi hi.
43011023	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Na sanggampa athounawn ding,” achi hi.
43011024	Martha in akiang ah, “Nitawp ni chiah, thohnawnna ah, athounawn ding chih ka thei,” achi hi.
43011025	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kei thohnawnna leh hinna ka hi; kuapeuh hon gingta si mahleh ahing gige ding.
43011026	Ahing peuhmah a, ahon gingta peuhmah tangtawn in asi kei ding; huai thu na gingta hia?” achi hi.
43011027	Ama'n akiang ah, “Gingta e, Toupa, Khrist, Pathian Tapa, khovel a hong pai dingpa na hi chih ka gingta hi,” achi hi.
43011028	Huan huai thu agen khit in akuan a, asanggamnu Mari asim sap a, “Sinsakpa hiai ah a-om a, nang ahon samsak,” achi hi.
43011029	Ama'n huai azaktak in, adingkhe pah a, akiang ah ava hoh hi.
43011030	Khua ah Jesu alut nai kei a, Martha in ava dawn lai a a-omna ngei ah a-om lai hi.
43011031	Huan insung a amah khamuan a ompih Judate'n Mari dingkhe pah a pawt amuhtak un, han a kap ding a hoh dek hi in teh, chi in azui uhi.
43011032	Huan Jesu omna ah Mari ava tung a, amah amuhtak in, akhebul a bokkhup in akiang ah, “Toupa, hiai a om hi lechin zaw, ka sanggampa si lou ding hi a,” achi hi.
43011033	Huan Jesu'n Mari kap leh ahon zui Judate kap amu a, alung akhoih mahmah a, kha in amau hi.
43011034	Huan ama'n, “Amah koi a sial na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Toupa hong pai inla, hong en in,” achi uhi.
43011035	Jesu akapta.
43011036	Judate'n, “En dih uh, Lazaras it hi na tel e,” achi uhi.
43011037	Himahleh khenkhat in, “Hiai mi, mittaw mit hihvakpa'n, hiai mi leng asi lousak thei kei a eita?” achi uhi.
43011038	Huan Jesu nakpi in amau nawn a, han atung hi. Huai han kokhuk, suang a sit ahi.
43011039	Jesu'n, “Suang hemkhia un,” achi hi. Asipa sanggamnu Martha in akiang ah, “Toupa, tu'n zaw anamta ding, asihna ni li ahita,” achi hi.
43011040	Jesu'n akiang ah, na gintakleh Pathian thupina na mu ding, ka hon chi kei a hia? achi hi. Huchi in suang ahemkhia uhi.
43011041	Huchi in Jesu avandak a, “Pa ka thu na ngaihkhiak ziak in na tung ah ka kipak hi.
43011042	Ka thu na ngaikhe zel chih ka thei; himahleh, mipi dinghte ziak in hiai ka chi ahi, nang na hon sawl chih agintak theihna ding un,” achi hi.
43011043	Huan huchi a apau khit in aw ngaihtak in, “Lazaras, hong pawt in,” chi in akikou hi.
43011044	Huan misi akhut akhe, han puan a tuamsa in ahong pawtta a, amai leng kinulna puan a tuam ahi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Phel unla, paisak un,” achi hi.
43011045	Huchi in Mari kiang a hong pai Jesu thilhih mu, Judate akhen tampi in Jesu agingta uhi.
43011046	Himahleh, akhen Pharisaite kiang ah ava hoh ua, akiang uah Jesu thilhihte ava hilh uhi.
43011047	Huchi in siampu liante leh Pharisaite'n vaihawmte asamkhawm ua, “Bangchi in i hih ding ua? Hiai mi'n thillamdang tampi ahih ngal a, achi uhi.
43011048	Hichibang a i khahzan un zaw mi tengteng in amah agingta ding ua; Rome mite hong pai in, i mun leh i namte ahong laksak tuak ding uh,” achi uhi.
43011049	Huan alak ua mi khat Kaiapha, huai kum a siampu lianpen in akiang uah, “Nou bangmah thei kei uteh,
43011050	i nam pumpi manthatlouhna ding in mi tengteng sik a mi khat sih, nou a ding in ahoih chih leng na ngaihtuah kei uh,” achi hi.
43011051	Huai thu amah phuahtawm in agen kei, huai kum in siampu lianpen ahi a, anamte sik a Jesu asih ding genkhol ahi zaw hi.
43011052	Huai namte sik kia ahi kei a, khovel a Pathian' ta dalhte tengteng apikhawmna ding in leng ahi sam hi.
43011053	Huchi in huai ni a kipan amah thahna ding in akihou zel uhi.
43011054	Huaiziak in Judate lak ah alangtang in Jesu avak nawnta kei a, huai a kipan gamdai zullam a khua khat Ephraim achih uah ava hohta hi; huai ah nungzuite toh a-om nilouh uhi.
43011055	Huan Judate Paikan Ankuangluina anaita a, mi tampi kisiangsak ding in, gam a pat, Paikan Ankuanglui ma in, Jerusalem ah ahohtou uhi.
43011056	Huchi in Jesu azong ua tempul ah dingh kawm in akihou ua, “Bang ahia na ngaihtuah uh? Ankuangluina ah ahong kei ding maw?” akichi uhi.
43011057	Siampu liante leh Pharisaite'n amah amattheihna ding un kuapeuh in a-omna atheih uleh amaute theihsak ding thu apeta uhi.
43012001	Huan Paikan Ankuangluina ding ni guk a-om lai a, Jesu'n misi lak a kipan a akaihthoh Lazaras omna khua, Bethani ahong tung hi.
43012002	Huai ah amah a ding in nitak an abawl ua, Martha in nek abawl hi, Lazaras bel a-ankuang umpih khat ahi.
43012003	Mari in spiknardi buk kimkhat thaunamtui manphatak ahon tawi a, Jesu khete anuh a, asam in anul a, huai thaugim in insung adimta hi.
43012004	Himahleh Judas Iskariot, anungzuite lak a khat, amansak ding pa'n,
43012005	“Hiai thaunamtui bangziak a makhai zathum a zuak a migentheite kiang a pe zaw lou uh ahia?” achi hi.
43012006	Migentheite a-awlmoh ziak a hiai thu gen ahi kei; amah guta ahi a, dangka ip akem a, asung a koih a alak zel ziak ahi zaw hi.
43012007	Jesu'n, “Subuai kei un, ka kivui ni a dia asit ahi.
43012008	Na kiang ua migentheite om gige ahi ua, kei bel na kiang ua om gige ding ka hi kei,” achi hi.
43012009	Huan huai mun ah Jesu a-om chih Juda mipite'n atheih un; ahong ua, Jesu ziak kia hilou in, misi lak a kipan a akaihthoh, Lazaras mah leng amuh nop ziak uh ahi.
43012010	Huan siampu liante Lazaras leng thah ding in akihou uhi.
43012011	Amah ziak a Judate tampi in langkaisan a, Jesu agintak ziak un.
43012012	Azing in, Ankuangluina a hong mipi tampi'n Jerusalem ah Jesu ahong pai ding chih azak un,
43012013	tumnahte atawi ua, dawn ding in apawtkhia ua, “Hosanna! Toupa min a Israelte Kumpipa hong pai ahampha e!” chi in akikou uhi.
43012014	Huan Jesu'n sabiltungnou amu a, atung ah atuang hi.
43012015	“Lau ke'n, Zion tanu; en in, na Kumpipa, sabiltungnou tung a tuang in, ahong pai ding,” chih gelh ahih bang in.
43012016	Huai thute atung in anungzuite'n atheisiam kei ua; himahleh, Jesu pahtawi ahih nung in, atanchin ah huai thu gelh ahi chih leh amah tung ah huai thilte akihih ngei chih atheita uhi.
43012017	Huan han a kipan asapkhiakpa Lazaras, misi lak a kipan akaihthoh lai a akiang a mipi omte'n, athu atheihpih uhi.
43012018	Huaiziak in ahi, mipite'n leng amah ava dawn uh; huai thillamdang ahih chih atheih ziak un.
43012019	Huchi in Pharisaite'n, “Thei un, bangmah na hihtheih louh uh, en un, khovel in amah azuita,” akichi uhi.
43012020	Huan ankuangluina a Pathian be ding a hohtoute lak ah Grik kuate hiam a-om uhi.
43012021	Huaite Galili gam a Bethsaida a mi Philip kiang ah ahong ua, akiang ah, “Pu, Jesu ka mu nuam uh,” achi ua, angen uhi.
43012022	Philip in Andru ahong hilh a, Andru leh Philip in Jesu ahong hilh uhi.
43012023	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang uah, “Mihing Tapa pahtawi a a-omna ding hun atungta hi.
43012024	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, lei a buhtang akiak a, asih phot keileh amah kia in a-om tawntung; asih in bel, tampi in agah hi.
43012025	Kuapeuh ahinna it in amangsak ding a; kuapeuh hiai khovel a ahinna ngaineu in tangtawn hinna ah akem ding hi.
43012026	Kuapeuh in ka nna asepleh hon zui hen; ka omna ah ka sikha leng a-om ding hi; kuapeuh in ka nna asepleh Pa'n amah apahtawi ding hi.
43012027	“Tu in ka kha amangbang mahmah; bang ka genta dia? ‘Pa, hiai hun a pan hon hondam in, ka chi dia hia?’ Himahleh hiai ding ziak mah a hiai hun a hong pai lah ka ngal a.
43012028	Pa na min pahtawi in,” achi hi. Huchi in van a kipan in aw ahong suak a, “Ka pahtawita, ka pahtawi nawn lai ding,” achi hi.
43012029	Mipi akiang a dinghte'n huai aza ua, “Vanpiging ahi,” achi ua; midangte'n, “Angel in amah houpih ahi,” achi uhi.
43012030	Jesu'n adawng a, “Huai aw kei a dia hong suak ahi kei, noumau a ding ahi zaw,” achi hi.
43012031	“Tu hiai khovel thukhensakna hun ahi; tu hiai khovel lal paihkhiak hun ahi.
43012032	Huan lei a kipan a khaikang a ka omleh, mi tengteng keimah kiang ah ka hip ding,” achi hi.
43012033	Huai thu asihdan ding theihsakna dia agen ahi.
43012034	Huan mipi'n akiang ah, “Khrist tangtawn in a-om chih Dan Bu ah ka thei uh, nang Mihing Tapa khaikang a om ding ka hi, bangchi chih a chi na hia? Huai Mihing Tapa kua ahia?” achi ua, adong uhi.
43012035	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Na lak uah sawt lou sung vak a-om tadih hi. Huai vak na neih sung un vak ah khosa un, huchi lou in zaw mial in ahon lap ding hi. Kuapeuh mial a khosa in apaina athei kei hi.
43012036	Vak na neih sung un vak gingta un, vak tate na hong hihtheihna ding un,” achi hi. Huai thute Jesu'n agen a; huan apai a, amuh louh ding un akiselta hi.
43012037	Ama uah huchi tel a tam thillamdang hih mahleh, amah agingta tuan kei uh.
43012038	“Toupa, ka thugen uh kua'n ahia gingta? Toupa khut leng kua kiang ah ahia latsak a a-om?” chi a zawlnei Isai thugen atangtunna ding in.
43012039	Hiai ziak in ahi a gintak theih louh uh, Isai in,
43012040	“Ama'n amit uh ahihtaw a, alungtang uh ahihkhauh; huchi lou in zaw amit un amu kha ding ua, alungtang un athei kha ding uh, huan hong kihei nawn ding ua, ke'n amau ka hihdam kha ding,” chih agen nawn ziak in.
43012041	Hiai thilte Isai in athupina amuh a atanchin agen ahi.
43012042	Himahleh, heutute lak nangawn ah tampi in Jesu agingta uhi; himahleh Pharisaite ziak in akipulak nuam kei uh, huchi lou in zaw sinagog a kipan ahawlkhe kha ding uhi;
43012043	Pathian pahtakna sang a mihing pahtakna adeih zawk ziak un.
43012044	Huan Jesu akikou a, “Kuapeuh hon gingta, kei hon gingta ahi kei a, hon sawlpa gingta ahi zaw hi.
43012045	Kuapeuh kei hon mu hon sawlpa mu ahi.
43012046	Khovel a vak hong pai pen ka hi, kuapeuh kei hon gingta mial a a-omlouhna ding in.
43012047	Kuapeuh ka thugen za in, gingta kei mahleh, ke'n siam louh ka tangsak kei; khovel siam louh tangsak ding a hong pai ka hi kei a, khovel humbit ding a hong pai ka hi zaw hi.
43012048	Kuapeuh kei hon deih lou a, ka thugente pom lou in, siam louh tangsak khat anei hi, ka thugen huai thu mahmah in, nitawp ni chiang in amah siam louh atangsak ding hi.
43012049	Keimah phuahtawm in thu ka gen kei a; Pa hon sawlpa'n ka thugen ding leh ka hih ding thu ahon pe zaw hi.
43012050	Amah thupiak tangtawn hinna ahi chih ka thei; huaiziak in ka thugen, Pa hon hilh bang zel in ka gen ahi,” achi hi.
43013001	Paikan Ankuanglui kipat ma in, Jesu'n hiai khovel nusia a Pa kiang a apai hun hong tungta chih athei a; khovel a a-itte, atawp pha in a-it hi.
43013002	Huan nitak an nek lai a, diabol in Simon tapa, Judas Iskariot, lungtang a Jesu zuausan a matsak lungsim akoihsak khit nung in,
43013003	Pa'n akhut ah thil bangkim apeta chih leh Pathian a kipan hong pai ahi a, Pathian kiang a pai ding ahi chih, Jesu'n theigige in,
43013004	nitak an um lai adingh a, apuante asuahkhia a, kinulna puan ala a, ateng hi.
43013005	Huan kisilna kuang ah tui asung a, nungzuite khe asilsak a, akinulna puanten in anul zel hi.
43013006	Huchi in Simon Peter kiang ah ahong a, “Toupa, nang tel in ka khe na sil dia hia?” achi hi.
43013007	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Ka thilhih tu'n ah na thei kei; himahleh tunung chiang in na thei ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43013008	Peter in akiang ah, “Ka khe na sil kei hial ding,” achi hi. Jesu'n akiang ah, “Na khe ka sil keileh ka kiang ah tan na nei kei ding,” achi hi.
43013009	Simon Peter in akiang ah, “Toupa, ka khe kia hilou in, ka khutte leh ka lutang leng aw,” achi hi.
43013010	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Kisil khinsa akhe lou ngal sil akiphamoh kei, apumpi in asiang; nou na siang uh, na vek un zaw ahi kei,” achi hi.
43013011	Amansak dingpa athei ngal a; huaiziak in, “Na vek un zaw na siang kei uh,” achi hi.
43013012	Huchi in akhete uh asil khit a, apuante alak a, atut nawn in akiang uah, “Na tung ua ka thilhih na thei uhia?” achi hi.
43013013	“Nou, Toupa leh heutupa na hon chi ua; na chi dik uh, ka hihna mah ahi.
43013014	Kei Toupa leh na heutupa un na khe uh ka silleh noute'n leng na khe uh na kisilsak chiat ding uh ahi.
43013015	Na tung ua ka hih bang in, nou leng na hih sam ding un, hihdan ding hon hilh ka hi.
43013016	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, sikha apu sang in athupizaw kei a; sawl a om leng asawlpa sang in athupizaw sam kei hi.
43013017	Huai thilte na theih ua, na hih uleh minuamsa na hi uhi.
43013018	“Na vek ua thu ka gen kei a; ka telte ka thei; himahleh ka tanghou nepa'n ka tung ah akhetul alikta chih, Laisiangthou ahong tuntheihna ding ahi.
43013019	Tu in ahong tun ma in ka hon hilh ahi, ahong tun hun chiang a kei amah ka hi chih na gintakna ding un.
43013020	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh ka sawl kipahpih, kei hon kipahpih ahi; kuapeuh kei hon kipahpih, hon sawlpa kipahpih ahi,” achi hi.
43013021	Jesu'n huai thu agen khit in, alungsim amangbang a, “Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, na lak ua mi khat in kei hon mansak ding,” chi in atheisakta hi.
43013022	Huan nungzuite'n achih pen athei kei ua, aki-entuah chiat uhi.
43013023	Anungzuite lak a khat, Jesu'n a-itpa, dohkan sik ah Jesu angsung ah kingai in a-om hi.
43013024	Simon Peter in huai mi kiang ah, kua pen thu ahia agen dong ding in akhutvan hi.
43013025	Jesu awm ngai mah in a-awnphei a, akiang ah, “Toupa, kua pen ahia?” achi hi.
43013026	Jesu'n, “Tanghou them ka diah a, ka piakpa ahi ding,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in tanghou them adiah zoh in Simon tapa, Judas Iskariot in kiang ah apia hi.
43013027	Tanghou them apiak nung in asung ah Setan alutta hi. Huchi in Jesu'n akiang ah, “Na hih ding hih meng in,” achi hi.
43013028	Dohkan a omte'n bang tum a hiai thu gen hiam chih athei kei uh.
43013029	Akhen in Judas in dangka ip akep ziak in, Jesu'n ankuangluina a ding thil kiphamoh peuh lei in, chi hiam, migentheite kiang ah banghiam piak ding, chi hiam asa uhi.
43013030	Huan tanghou them la in, apawtkhe pah a; huai tuh zan lai ahi.
43013031	Huaiziak in apawt nung in, Jesu'n agen a, “Tu in Mihing Tapa pahtawi in a-omta a, Pathian leng amah ziak in pahtawi in a-om hi.
43013032	Amah a Pathian pahtawi a a-omleh amah leng Pathian mahmah in apahtawi ding a, apahtawi pahta ding hi.
43013033	Naute aw, hun tomchik na kiang uah ka om lai tadih hi. Nou na hon zong ding uh; Judate kiang a, ka paina ding ah nou na hong pai thei kei ding uh chih ka gen bang in, tu in huchi mah bang in na kiang uah ka gen ahi.
43013034	Thupiak thak ka hon pia ahi, ki-ittuah chiat un; ke'n nou ka hon it bang in, nou leng ki-ittuah un.
43013035	Na ki-ittuah uleh mi tengteng in ka nungzuite na hi uh chih hiai ah athei ding uh,” achi hi.
43013036	Simon Peter in akiang ah, “Toupa, koi a hoh ding na hia? achi hi. Jesu'n, ka hohna ding ah nang tu in na hon zui thei kei ding; tunung chiang in zaw na hon zui ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43013037	Peter in akiang ah, “Toupa, bang ding in ahia tua leng ka hon zuih theih louh ding? Nangmah ziak in ka hinna ka koihkhe ding,” achi hi.
43013038	Jesu'n, “Keimah ziak in na hinna na koihkhe ding maw? Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, nang thumvei na hon kitheihmohbawl ma in ak akhuang kei ding,” chi in adawng hi.
43014001	“Na lungtang uh hihmangbat in om kei hen; Pathian na gingta ua, kei leng hon gingta sam un.
43014002	Ka Pa inn ah tenna mun tampi a-om; a-om lou hileh, ka hon hilhta ding hi; noute a dia mun bawl ding a kuan dek ka hi.
43014003	Huan nou a dia mun bawl ding a ka kuanleh ka hong kik nawn ding a, ka kiang ah nou ka hon la ding, ka omna a nou leng na om theih samna ding un.
43014004	Ka hohna ding alampi na thei uh,” achi hi.
43014005	Thomas in akiang ah, “Toupa, koi a hoh ding na hia ka thei kei uh, alampi bang ka chi theih ding ua?” achi hi.
43014006	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Keimah tuh huai lampi, huai thutak leh huai hinna ka hi; keimah a pai lou kuamah Pa kiang atung kei,” achi hi.
43014007	“Kei na hon theih khit uleh ka Pa leng na thei khinta ding uh; tu a kipan amah na thei ua muh leng na muta uhi,” achi hi.
43014008	Philip in akiang ah, “Toupa, huai Pa kou hon ensak in, huchi in kou a ding in ahun ding,” achi hi.
43014009	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Philip, hiai tanpi na kiang ah ka om a, huchi a leng hon thei lou maw? Kuapeuh kei hon mu tuh Pa mu ahi. Huai Pa kou hon musak in bangchi chih a na chih ahia?
43014010	Kei Pa ah ka om a, keimah ah Pa a-om chih na gingta kei a hia? Na kiang ua thu ka gen, keimah phuahtawm in ka gen kei; keimah ah Pa a-om gige a, thil ahih zaw nak hi.
43014011	Kei Pa a ka omleh Pa keimah a a-om gingta un; ahihkeileh thilhih ziak bek in hon gingta un.
43014012	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, kuapeuh hon gingta in ka thilhihte ahih sam ding; hiai sang a thupizaw leng ahih ding, Pa kiang a ka pai ding ziak in.
43014013	Huan ka min a na nget peuhmah uh ka hih zel ding, Tapa a Pa pahtawi a a-omtheihna ding in.
43014014	Nou ka min a bangpeuh na hon nget uleh, ka hih zel ding hi,” achi hi.
43014015	“Nou na hon it uleh, ka thupiakte na zui ding uhi.
43014016	Huan Pa ka ngen dia, ama'n Khamuanpa dang ahon pe ding, tangtawn a na kiang ua om ding in;
43014017	huai thutak Kha; khovel in aneih theih louh ahi, amah amuh louh a, atheih louh behlap ziak in; nou amah na thei ua, na kiang uah a-om gige ngal a, noumau sung ah a-om ding hi.
43014018	“Tagah ding in ka hon paisan kei ding; na kiang uah ka hong pai nawn ding hi.
43014019	Sawt louchik sung khovel in ahon mu nawn kei ding; himahleh nou zaw na hon mu ding uh; keimah ka hin ziak in nou leng na hing sam ding uhi.
43014020	Huai ni chiang in kei ka Pa a ka om leh nou keimah a na om bang un, kei noumau a ka omdan na thei ding uhi.
43014021	“Kuapeuh ka thupiakte nei a, zui tuh kei hon it ahi; kuapeuh kei hon it ka Pa'n a-it ding, ke'n leng amah ka it ding a, akiang ah ka hihna ka kilak ding,” achi hi.
43014022	Huan Judas, Iskariot lou pen in akiang ah, “Toupa, koute kiang a na kilak a, khovel kiang a na kilak louh se ding bangziak ahia?” achi hi.
43014023	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Mi'n ahon itleh ka thute azui ding a; ka Pa'n amah a-it dia, akiang ah ka hong pai ding ua, amah toh ka tengkhawm gige ding uhi.
43014024	Kuapeuh hon itlou in ka thu azui kei; na thuzakte uh kei a ahi kei a, Pa hon sawlpa a ahi zaw.
43014025	“Na kiang ua ka om takdih sung in, hiai thute ka hon hilh ahi.
43014026	Khamuanpa, Kha Siangthou, Pa in ka min a hon sawl ding in bangkim nou ahon sinsak ding a, na kiang ua ka gen tengteng nou ahon theikhesak nawn lai ding.
43014027	“Khamuanna ka hon nutsiat hi; keimah khamuanna ka hon pia; khovel in apiak bang in ka hon pe kei. Na lungtang uh hihmangbat in om kei hen, lauh leng lau kei hen.
43014028	Ka paimang ding a, na kiang uah ka hong pai nawn ding, ka hon chih omdan na theita uh. Nou na hon it uh leh Pa kiang a ka pai ding ziak in na kipak ding uh ahi; keimah sang in Pa athupizaw ngal a.
43014029	Tu in hiai thil ahong tun chiang a na gintak theihna ding un ahong tun ma in ka hon hilh ahi.
43014030	Na kiang uah thu ka gen tam nawn kei ding, khovel vaihawmpa ahong pai dek ziak in; ama'n keimah ah bangmah anei kei hi.
43014031	Himahleh ke'n Pa ka it chih leh Pa in hon thupiak bang zel in thil ka hih chih, khovel in atheihna ding uh ahi ve. Dingh dih ua, hiai a kipan i paikhe ding uh.
43015001	“Kei grepgui dik ka hi, ka Pa akempa ahi.
43015002	Kei a hiang gah lou peuhmah alamang a; agah peuhmah tamsem agahna ding in ahahsiang hi.
43015003	Na kiang ua ka thugen ziak in tu'n ah na siangthou pah uhi.
43015004	Keimah ah om gige un, kei leng noumau ah ka om gige ding. Hiang, grepgui a a-om gige keileh amah in agah thei kei bang in, nou leng keimah a na om gige kei uleh, na gah thei kei ding uhi.
43015005	“Kei agrepgui ka hi a, nou ahiangte na hi uh. Kuapeuh keimah a om gige a, kei leng amah a ka om gigena, huai mah tampi in agah hi; keimah lou in bangmah na hihthei kei uhi.
43015006	Mi kei a a-om gige keileh hiang bang a paihkhiak in a-om a, avuai hi; huan atawm ua mei ah apai ua, akang hi.
43015007	Nou keimah a na om gige ua, ka thu leng noumau a a-om gigeleh na ut peuh uh ngen un, nou a ding in hih in a-om ding hi.
43015008	Hiai ziak in tampi a na gah chiang un ka Pa pahtawi in a-om hi, huchi in ka nungzuite na hi ding uhi.
43015009	Pa'n kei ahon it mah bang in ka hon it hi; ka itna ah om gige un.
43015010	Nou ka thupiakte na zuih uleh ka itna ah na om gige ding uhi, ke'n ka Pa thupiakte ka zui a, a-itna a ka om gige mah bang in.
43015011	“Ka kipah noumau a a-om gige theihna ding in leh na kipah uh akimna ding in hiai thu na kiang uah ka gen ahi.
43015012	Hiai ka thupiak ahi, ke'n nou ka hon it bang in, noumau leng ki-ittuah un.
43015013	Mihing in alawm a dia ahinna apiak sang a itna thupizaw kuama'n anei kei.
43015014	Thu ka hon piak peuhmah na hih uleh ka lawmte na hi ding uh.
43015015	Sikha ka hon chi nawn kei ding; apu thilhih sikha in atheih louh ziak in; lawmte ka hon chi zawta ding; Pa kiang a ka thil zak tengteng na kiang uah ka hon theisakta hi.
43015016	Nou na hon tel kei ua, ke'n ka hon tel zaw hi, va gah ding leh na gah uh om gige ding in ka hon sep ahi; ka min a Pa kiang a na nget peuhmah uh ahon piakna ding in.
43015017	Hiaite ka hon thupiak ahi, ki-ittuah chiat un.
43015018	“Khovel in nou ahon huatleh ahon huat ma in keimah ahon ho khinta chih thei un.
43015019	Nou khovel a hi le uchin, khovel in amah a a-it ding; khovel a kipan ka hon telkhiak zawk ziak in, khovel in nou ahon hua hi.
43015020	Apu sang in sikha athupizaw kei, chih thu ka hon hilhta hi, hiai theigige un. Amau kei ahon sawi uleh, nou leng ahon sawi ding uh; ka thu zui hita le uh, noumau thu leng azui ding uhi.
43015021	Himahleh hiai thil tengteng ka min ziak in na tung uah ahih ding uh, hon sawlpa atheih louh ziak un.
43015022	Kei hong pai lou in akiang uah thu gen kei leng khelhna nei lou ding hi ua, himahleh tu in akhelhna uah paulap ding aneita kei uhi.
43015023	Kuapeuh kei hon hua in, ka Pa leng ahua ahi.
43015024	Midang kuamah hih ngeilouhte alak ua hih lou hi taleng, khelhna nei lou ding hi ua, himahleh tu in amau kei leh ka Pa, ka nih un ahon muta uh, huat leng hon hota uhi.
43015025	Adan uah, amau aziak om lou in hon hua uh chih, thu kigelh pen, ahong tangtunna ding ua hih uh ei ve.
43015026	“Huan Pa a kipan Khamuanpa na kiang ua ka hon sawl ding, Pa a kipan thutak Kha ahong tun chiang in, keimah hon theihpih ding hi.
43015027	Atung a kipan a kei toh omkhawm na hih ziak un nou leng na theihpih ding uhi.
43016001	“Lungkia a na paimanglouhna ding un na kiang uah hiai thute ka genta hi.
43016002	Sinagogte ah ahon nongsak ding ua; kuapeuh nou hon that Pathian tung a thil hoih hih in akithei ding ua huai bang hun hong tung ding ahi.
43016003	Huai thilte ahih ding ua, Pa leh kei hon theih louh ziak un.
43016004	Hiai thute na kiang uah ka genta hi, ahun ahong tun chiang a, ka hon hilh khinta chih na theih nawnna ding un. Hiai thilte na kiang ua ka om takdih ziak in atung a ka hon hilh louh him na hi uhi.
43016005	“Tu in hon sawlpa kiang ah ka pai ding a noute kuamah in, koi a hoh ding? chi in na hon dong kei uh.
43016006	Hiai thute na kiang ua ka gen ziak in na lungtang uh lungkhamna in adimzou hialta hi.
43016007	Himahleh thutak ka hon hilh ahi; ka pai nou a ding in ahoihzaw hi; ka pai keileh na kiang uah Khamuanpa ahong tung kei ding a; ka paileh bel na kiang ua hon sawl ding ka hi.
43016008	Amah ahong tun chiang in khelhna thute ah, diktatna thute ah, leh vaihawmna thute toh kisai a khovel asiamlouhdan atheisak ding hi.
43016009	Khelhna thu ah siam louh atang ding uh, kei hon gintak louh ziak un.
43016010	Diktatna thu ah siam louh atang ding uh; Pa kiang ah ka pai ding; nou kei na hon muh nawn tak louh ding ziak un.
43016011	Vaihawmna thu ah siam louh atang ding uh; hiai khovel lal siam louh a apuk tak ziak in.
43016012	“Na kiang uah gen ding tampi ka nei lai a, himahleh tu in zaw na chin tadih kei uhi.
43016013	Himahleh amah Thutak Kha ahong tun chiang in, thutak tengteng ah nou ahon pi ding; ama phuahtawm in thu agen kei dia; azak peuhmah agen zaw ding, thil hong tung dingte leng nou ahon theisak ding hi.
43016014	Ama'n kei ahon pahtawi ding a; kei a ala ding a, nou kiang ah ahon theisak ding hi.
43016015	Pa'n thil aneih tengteng kei a ahi; huaiziak in kei a ala ding a, na kiang uah ahon theisak ding, ka chi hi.
43016016	“Sawt louchik in nou kei na hon mu kei ding ua; sawt louchik mah in na hon mu nawn ding uh,” achi hi.
43016017	Anungzuite khenkhat in, i kiang ua athugen bang ahi, sawt louchik in nou kei na hon mu kei ding uh, sawt louchik mah in na hon mu nawn ding uh achih leh Pa kiang a ka hoh dek ziak in, achih? akichi uhi.
43016018	Amau mah in, sawt louchik, achih bang chihna ahia? Athugen i theisiam kei uh, achi uhi.
43016019	Huan amah dot ut anei uh chih Jesu'n athei a, akiang uah, “Sawt louchik in nou kei na hon mu kei ding uh, sawt louchik mah in nou kei na hon mu nawn ding uh chi a ka thugen na kidong uh maw?
43016020	Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, na khitui uh ake ding a, na kap huphup ding uh, khovel bel akipak ding; na lungkham ding ua, himahleh na lungkham uh kipahna asuak ding hi.
43016021	Numei nau nei ding in avei lai in alungkham nak hi, ahun atun tak ziak in; himahleh nau asuahtak in alunggimna athei nawnta kei hi, khovel a naungek hong pian a akipah ziak in.
43016022	Tu in nou na lungkham uh; himahleh ka hon mu nawn ding a, na lungtang uh akipak ding, na kipahna uh kuamah in hon laksak kei ding hi.
43016023	Huai ni chiang in nou kei bangmah na hon ngen kei ding uh. Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, Pa kiang a bangpeuh ka min a na nget uleh ahon pe ding hi.
43016024	Tutan in ka min in bangmah na ngen nai kei uh. Ngen un, huchi in na mu ding uh, na kipah uh akimna ding in.
43016025	“Huai thute ahem in na kiang uah ka genta hi; ahun atung dekta, huai hun chiang in na kiang uah ahem in thu ka gen nawnta kei ding a, chiantak in Pa tanchin ka hon hilh ding hi.
43016026	Huai ni chiang in keimah min in thil na ngen ding uh; Pa kiang ah ke'n ka hon ngetsak ding ka chi kei hi.
43016027	Pa in amah ngei in noute ahon it ngal a, nou kei na hon it ua, Pa a kipan ka hi chih na hon gintak ziak un.
43016028	Kei Pa kiang a kipan hong pawt a, khovel a hong pai ka hi a; khovel paisan a, Pa kiang a pai nawn ding ka hi,” achi hi.
43016029	Huan anungzuite'n akiang ah, “Ngai dih, tu in teltak in na genta, ahem in na genta kei hi! achi uhi.
43016030	Nang bangkim na thei a, kuamah hon dot na kiphamoh kei chih tu in ka theita uh; hiai ziak in Pathian kiang a kipan hong pai na hi chih ka gingta uhi,” achi uhi.
43016031	Jesu'n adawng a akiang uah, “Tu in na gingta uh maw?
43016032	Ngai un, ahun hong tung ding ahita, tu in leng atung lellel hi, huai hun chiang in noumau inn chiat ah na dalh vek ding ua, keimah kia na hon nuse ding uh. Himahleh ka kiang a Pa a-om ziak in keimah kia in ka om kei hi.
43016033	Hiai thute na kiang uah ka genta hi, keimah a na khamuanna ding un. Khovel ah gimthuakna na nei ding uh, himahleh khamuangtak in om un, ke'n khovel ka zouta,” achi hi.
43017001	Huai thute Jesu'n agen khit in van lam nga in, “Pa ahun atungta, Tapa in nang ahon pahtawi theihna ding in na Tapa pahtawi in;
43017002	huchi a mi tengteng tung a thunei a na bawl in, akiang a na piak peuhmahte tangtawn hinna apiaktheihna ding in.
43017003	Hiai tangtawn hinna ahi, nang Pathian tak kia leh na sawl Jesu Khrist theih.
43017004	Nang thilhih ding na hon piakte ka hih khinta a, khovel ah ka hon pahtawita hi.
43017005	Pa aw, khovel om ma a na kiang a thupina ka neih in, tu in nangmah kiang ngei ah hon pahtawi in.
43017006	“Nang khovel a kipan a mi, kei na hon piakte kiang ah na min ka hihlangta; amau nang a ahi ua, nang amaute kei na hon piak ahi uh; amau lah na thu azuita uhi.
43017007	Nang kei na hon piak tengteng nang a kipan ahi chih atheita uhi.
43017008	Nang thu na hon piakte akiang uah ka peta a; huaite akem ua, nang a kipan ka hi chih diktak in atheita uh, nang na hon sawl chih leng agingta uhi.
43017009	“Amaute a ding a ngetsak ka hi. Khovel a dia ngetsak ka hi kei, nang na hon piakte a ding ahi zaw, nang a ahi uhi.
43017010	Thil tengteng kei a peuhmah nang a ahi a, nang a lah kei a ahi a; amau ziak in pahtawi in ka om hi.
43017011	Huan kei zaw khovel ah ka omta kei ding, hiaite bel khovel ah a-om ding uh; kei na kiang ah ka hong paidekta hi. Pa Siangthou aw, nang kei na hon piakte na min in hum in pum khat ahihtheihna ding un, eimah pum khat i hih bang in.
43017012	Akiang ua ka om sung in, nang kei na hon piakte na min in ka hum a; amau ka don a, alak ua khat leng amangthang kei hi, mangthang tapa lou ngal, Laisiangthou atangtun theihna ding in.
43017013	Himahleh tu in na kiang ah ka hong paidekta; khovel ah hiai thute ka gen ahi, ka kipahna amau ua aneih kimna ding un.
43017014	Na thu akiang uah ka peta hi; khovel in amau ahua a, khovel a ahih louh ziak un, kei khovel a ka hih louh mah bang in.
43017015	Nang amaute khovel a kipan na lakkhiak ding ngen ka hi kei a, migilou lak ah na hum ding ka chi ahi zaw hi.
43017016	Amau khovel a ahi kei uh, kei khovel a ka hih louh mah bang in.
43017017	Amau thutak in hihsiangthou in, na thu thutak ahi.
43017018	Nang khovel a kei na hon sawl bang in, khovel ah amaute ka sawl hi.
43017019	Amau ziak in ka kihihsiangthou a, amaute leng thutak a asianthouna ding un.
43017020	“Hiaite a ding kia a ngetsak ka hi kei, athugen ziak ua kei hon gingta lai dingte a ding in leng ka ngetsak hi; avek ua pum khat ahihna ding un;
43017021	Pa, nang keimah a na om leh kei nangmah a ka om bang in, amau leng eimah a a-omna ding un; nang kei na hon sawl chih khovel in ataksan theihna ding in.
43017022	Huan nang thupina na hon piak ke'n amau ka peta; amau pum khat ahihtheihna ding un, ei pum khat i hih mah bang in.
43017023	Kei amau ah, nang kei ah, amau pum khat a a-om ua abukim theihna ding un; nang kei na hon sawl chih leh na hon it bang in amaute na it chih khovel in atheihtheihna ding in.
43017024	“Pa, nang kei na hon piakte, ka omna a ka kiang a om ding in ka deih; leilung pian ma a itna a nang na hon piak ka thupina amuhtheihna ding un.
43017025	Pa diktat aw, khovel in nang hon thei kei mahleh, ke'n zaw ka hon thei hi; hiaite'n leng nang kei na hon sawl chih athei uhi.
43017026	Huan akiang uah na min ka theisakta a, ka theisak lai ding, nang kei na hon itna bangbang na itna amau a a-om a, kei leng amau a ka omtheihna ding in,” achi hi.
43018001	Jesu'n huai thute agen khit in anungzuite toh apawt ua, Kidron luita akan ua, huai ah huan khat a-om hi. Huai ah amah leh anungzuite alut uhi.
43018002	Huan amansak dingpa Judas in leng huai mun athei a; huai ah anungzuite toh Jesu ava tawlnga zelzel uhi.
43018003	Huchi in Judas in sepaih pawl, siampu liante leh Pharisaite kiang a om heutute api a, khawnvakte, meiselte, galvante tawi in huai ah ahong pai uhi.
43018004	Jesu'n atung a thil tung ding tengteng atheigige a, ava pawt a, akiang uah, “Kua ahia na zon uh?” achi hi.
43018005	Amau akiang ah, “Nazaret Jesu,” chi in adawng uhi. Jesu'n akiang uah, “Keimah ka hi,” achi hi.
43018006	Amansakpa Judas leng alak uah adingh a, “Keimah ka hi,” achihtak in, anungtolh ua, lei ah apuk duam uhi.
43018007	Huan ama'n akiang uah, “Kua ahia na zon uh?” chi in adong nawn hi. Amau, “Nazaret Jesu,” achi uhi.
43018008	Huan Jesu'n, “Keimah ka hi chih ka hon hilhta a; nou kei hon zong na hih uleh hiaite hoihtak in khah un,” achi a adawng hi.
43018009	“Nang kei na hon piakte khat leng ka mangsak kei,” chi a athugen atangtunna ding ahi.
43018010	Huan Simon Peter in anamsau vom adokkhia a siampu lianpen sikha asat a, abil taklam asatkhiaksak hi. Huai sikha min Malkas ahi.
43018011	Huchi in Peter kiang ah Jesu'n, “Na namsau apai ah siat in; Pa in nou ahon piak ka dawn kei dia hia?” achi hi.
43018012	Huchi in sepaih pawl leh Judate heutute'n Jesu aman ua, ahenta uhi.
43018013	Annas kiang ah api masa uh, amah Kaiapha sunghpa ahih ziak in. Kaiapha, huai kum a siampu lianpen ahi.
43018014	Kaiapha bel, mi tengteng sang a mi khat sih ahoihzaw chi a, Judate hanthawnpa ahi.
43018015	Huan Simon Peter in nungzui dang khat toh Jesu azui hi. Huai nungzuipa siampu lianpen meltheih ahi a, siampu lianpen huangsung intual ah, Jesu kiang ah alut sam hi.
43018016	Himahleh polam a kongkhak bul ah Peter adingh hi. Huchi in nungzui dang siampu lianpen meltheih khat ava pawt a, kongkhak ngaknu ahoupih a, Peter apilut hi.
43018017	Kongkhak ngak, nungak in Peter kiang ah, “Nang leng hiai mi nungzuite lak a pang sam na hi hia?” achi hi.
