43018018	Ama'n, “Ka hi kei,” achi hi. Sikhate leh heutute huai ah adingh uhi. Avot ziak in meihol in mei atoh ua, meilum a-awi uhi. Peter leng akiang uah a-om a, dingh kawm in meilum a-awi sam hi.
43018019	Siampu lianpen in Jesu anungzuite tanchin leh athusinsak adong hi.
43018020	Jesu'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Khovel kiang ah vantang theih in, thu ka gen gige hi; sinagog, tempul leh Judate omkhawmnate ah thu ka hilh zel a, asim in bangmah ka gen kei.
43018021	Bang achia kei hon dong? Akiang ua ka thugen ka thuzate dong in, ngai in, amaute'n ka thugen athei uh akei hiam,” achi hi.
43018022	Huan agentak in akiang a dingh heutu khat in Jesu abeng a, “Siampu lianpen hichibang in na dawng maw?” achi hi.
43018023	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Thudiklou gen ka hihleh, adiklouhna hon theisak in; himahleh, ka thugen dik ahihleh bang achia hon beng?” achi hi.
43018024	Huan Annas in hensa in siampu lianpen Kaiapha kiang ah asawl hi.
43018025	Simon Peter in dingh kawm in meilum a-awi hi. “Nang leng anungzuite lak a pang sam na hi hia?” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Ka hi kei,” chi in akitheihmohbawl hi.
43018026	Huan siampu lianpen sikha khat Peter in abil satkhiaksakpa sanggampa'n, akiang ah, “Huan ah ka hon mu kei maw?” achi hi.
43018027	Huchi in Peter in akitheihmohbawl nawn a; huan ak akhuang pah hi.
43018028	Kaiapha inn a pan in Vaihawmna inn ah Jesu api nawn ua; huai zingsang ahi a; amau ahihleh Vaihawmna inn ah alut kei uh, alut un zaw buah in, Paikan Ankuanglui ane thei kei ding uhi.
43018029	Amaute kiang ah Pilat ava pawt a, “Hiai mi tung ah hekna bang ahia na neih uh?” achi hi.
43018030	Amau akiang ah, “Hiai migilou hi keileh na kiang ah ka hon pi kei ding uh,” chi in adawng uhi.
43018031	Huan Pilat in akiang uah, “Nou pi unla, na dan bang un vai hawmsak un,” achi hi. Judate'n akiang ah, “Kou thu in kuamah hihlup dan bang ahi kei,” achi uhi.
43018032	Hiai thu asihdan ding, Jesu'n agen bang a atangtunna ding ahi.
43018033	Huchi in insung ah Pilat alut nawn a, Jesu asam a, akiang ah, “Judate' Kumpipa na hi hia?” achi hi.
43018034	Jesu'n, “Hiai ka tungtang thu nangmah lungsim puakkhiak a na gen hia, midang in hon hilh?” chi in adawng hi.
43018035	Pilat in, “Kei Juda mi ka hi a hia? Nangmah chipihte leh siampu liante'n ka kiang ah ahon pekhia ua ahi; thil bang ahia na hih?” chi in adawng hi.
43018036	Jesu'n, “Ka kumpi hihna hiai khovel ahi kei; ka kumpi hihna hiai khovel a hileh Judate kiang a piak a ka omlouhna ding in, ka sikhate'n adou ding uh. Himahleh ka kumpi hihna zaw hiai khovel a kipan ahi kei,” chi in adawng hi.
43018037	Pilat in akiang ah, “Huchi, nang kumpipa na hi mawleh?” achi hi. Jesu'n, “Kumpipa ka hi na hon chi mah ve. Thutak theihsak ka piansan leh khovel a ka hong paisan ahi. Kuapeuh thutak a om peuhmah in ka thu asang uh,” achi hi.
43018038	Pilat in akiang ah, “Thutak bang ahia?” achi hi. Huan huai thu agen khit in, Judate kiang ah ava pawt nawn a, akiang uah, “Bangmah agitlouhna ka mu kei,” achi hi.
43018039	Himahleh Paikan Ankuangluina ah mi khat ka hon pawtsakna ding dan na nei uh; huchi in “Judate' Kumpipa hon pawtsak leng na ut uhia?” achi hi.
43018040	Amau akikou nawn ua, “Hiai mi hi kei henla, Barabbas pen hi zaw hen,” achi uhi. Barabbas tuh suamhat ahi.
43019001	Huchi in Pilat in Jesu api a, azep hi.
43019002	Huan sepaihte'n linglukhu aphan ua, akhusak ua, puan sandup leng asilhsak uh.
43019003	Akiang ah ahong pai ua, “Chibai, Judate' Kumpipa,” achi ua, abeng uhi.
43019004	Huan Pilat apawt nawn a, akiang uah, “En un, bangmah agitlouhna ka mu kei chih na theihna ding un, na kiang uah ka hon pikhia hi,” achi hi.
43019005	Jesu, linglukhu khu in leh puan sandup silh in ahong pawt hi. Pilat in akiang uah, “En un, Mihing!” achi hi.
43019006	Huan siampu liante leh heutute'n amah amuhtak un akikou ua, “Kros ah kilhden in, kros ah kilhden in,” achi uhi. Pilat in akiang uah, “Noumau paipih unla, kros ah kilhden un; ke'n zaw bangmah agitlouhna ka mu ngal kei hi,” achi hi.
43019007	Judate'n akiang ah, “Ka dan uh khat a-om, huai dan bang zel in Pathian Tapa a akibawl ziak in asi ding ahi,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43019008	Pilat in huai thu azak in alau nawn semsem hi.
43019009	Ama inpi sung ah va lut nawn in Jesu kiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia?” achi hi. Himahleh Jesu'n adawng kei.
43019010	Pilat in akiang ah, “Nang kei hon houpih lou ding maw? Hon khah thei leh kros a hon kilhden thei ka hi chih na thei kei a hia?” achi hi.
43019011	Jesu'n, “Tunglam a kipan piak hi kei lechin, ka tung ah hihtheih na nei kei ding. Huaiziak in na kiang a hon pekhepa'n khelhna lianzaw apua hi,” achi hi.
43019012	Huai nungsiah Pilat in khah atum a; himahleh Judate akikou ua, “Hiai mi na khahleh Kaisar lawm na hi kei; kuapeuh kumpipa a kibawl Kaisar dou ahi,” achi uhi.
43019013	Pilat in huai thu azak in Jesu apikhia a, amin Suanglep, Hebru pau a Gabbatha achih uh, huai mun ah thukhenna tutphah ah atu hi.
43019014	Huan huai ni Paikan Ankuangluina kiginni ahi a, dak gukna vel ahi. Huan ama'n Judate kiang ah, “En un, na Kumpipa uh,” achi hi.
43019015	Huan amau akikou ua, “Hihmangthang in, hihmangthang in, kros ah kilhden in,” achi uhi. Pilat in akiang uah, “Na kumpipa uh kros ah ka kilhden ding maw?” achi hi. Siampu liante'n, “Kaisar lou ngal kumpipa dang ka nei kei uh,” achi ua, adawng uhi.
43019016	Huchi in Pilat in kilhden ding in akiang uah amah apeta hi. Huchi in Jesu api ua, apaikhiakpih uhi.
43019017	Ama'n kros kipuak in Luguh Mun, achih uh, Hebru pau a Golgotha achih mun tan apai hi.
43019018	Huai ah kros ah alai ah Jesu midang nih asik ah khat tuaktuak toh akilhden uhi.
43019019	Pilat in lai agelh a, kros ah atak a, “NAZARET JESU, JUDATE' KUMPIPA,” chi in.
43019020	Huai laigelh Judate tampi in asim ua; Jesu kros akilhdenna mun uh khopi kiang ahi a; huai Hebru pau, Grik pau leh Latin pau a gelh ahi.
43019021	Huchi in Juda siampu liante'n Pilat kiang ah, “Judate' Kumpipa, chi in gelh ke'n; Judate' Kumpipa ka hi achi,” chi in gelh zaw in, achi uhi.
43019022	Pilat in, “Ka gelh khit, gelh khit ahita,” chi in adawng hi.
43019023	Huan sepaihte'n Jesu akilhden khit un apuansilh phel li asuah ua, phel khat chiat in atang ua; apuanak leng ala uh. Puanak khui louh puanak ahi a, angawng a kipan ataw tan a gatthoh ahi.
43019024	Huaiziak in amau, “I botkek kei dia, kua tan ding ahi hiam, ai i san ding uh,” akichi uhi. Laisiangthou a, “Ka puansilhte akihawm ua, ka puanak ding in ai asan uh,” chih atangtunna ding in hiai thil sepaihte'n ahih uhi.
43019025	Huan Jesu kros kiang ah anu leh anu sanggam, Kleopas zi Mari leh Mari Magdalin adingh uhi.
43019026	Huan Jesu'n anu leh nungzui a-itpa akiang a dingh amu a, anu kiang ah, “Numei, en in, na tapa,” achi hi.
43019027	Nungzuipa kiang ah, “En in, na nu,” achi hi. Huai dak a pan huai nungzui in a-inn ah amah pita hi.
43019028	Huai nung in, Jesu'n thil bangkim hihzoh ahita chih athei a, Laisiangthou atangtunna ding in, “Ka dang atak,” achi hi.
43019029	Huai ah bel khat uain thuk a dim atung ua, huchi in spanji khat uain thuk a diahdim in, hissop chiangdawn a tak in, amuk ah atulhtou uhi.
43019030	Huan Jesu'n uain thuk adawn khit in, “Zoh ahita,” achi a, huan alu akun a, akha akhahta hi.
43019031	Huan kiginni ahih ziak in, Sabbath ni a kros a siluangte a-omlouhna ding in, (huai Sabbath ni lah ni thupi ahi ngal a), Judate'n Pilat kiang ah akhete uh hihtan a aluang uh paipih ding in angen uhi.
43019032	Sepaihte ahong pai ua, akiang a kilhden a om, tuah masakpen leh akhat pen khe ahihtansak uhi.
43019033	Himahleh Jesu kiang ahong tun un, ana sita chih athei ua, akhete ahihtan tuan kei uhi.
43019034	Himahleh sepaihte lak a mi khat in anak ah tei in adawt a, huchi in sisan leh tui ahong luangkhia hi.
43019035	Huaite mupa'n atheisakta, athu theihsak adik ahi; agen dik chih akithei a, nou leng na gintakna ding un.
43019036	Laisiangthou in, “Aguh khat lel leng hihtan ahi kei ding,” achih tangtunna ding in huai thil ahong omta hi.
43019037	Huan Laisiangthou dang in, “Asutpa uh lam a-en ding uh,” achi hi.
43019038	Huan huai thilte khit in, Joseph, Arimathai mi, Jesu nungzui, Judate kihtak ziak a sim-om in Jesu luang paipih ding in Pilat kiang ah angen hi. Pilat in aphal a, huchi in ahong pai a, aluang apaipihta hi.
43019039	Huan Nikodem, atung a zan a akiang a hong in, murrah leh aloe kihelsa buk sawmnga vel tawi in ahong pai sam hi.
43019040	Jesu luang ala ua, Judate kivuidan bang in gimlimte toh puanmalngat hoih in atuam uhi.
43019041	Huan kros a akilhlupna mun uah huan khat a-om a; huan ah kuamah sial ngei nailouhna han thak khat a-om hi.
43019042	Judate kiginni ahih ziak in, han omna akiangchin uh ahih toh, huai ah Jesu asialta uhi.
43020001	Nipikal a ani masapen ahong tun in, zingsangpi khomial lai in, han ah Mari Magdalin ava hoh a, hansuang lakkhiaksa in amu hi.
43020002	Huchi in atai a, Simon Peter leh nungzui dang, Jesu'n a-itpa kiang ah ahong pai a, “Han a kipan Toupa apaimangpih ua, akoihna uh ka thei kei uh,” chi in agen hi.
43020003	Huchi in Peter apawt a, nungzui dang toh han lam azuan uhi.
43020004	Atai tuak ua; nungzui dang in Peter amakhelh a, han atung masa hi.
43020005	Huan kunsuk in a-en a, puanmalngat hoih amu a; himahleh asung ah alut kei hi.
43020006	Simon Peter amah nung in ahong tung sam a, han sung ah alutsuak a; puanmalngat hoih omte amu hi.
43020007	Jesu lukhung a kinulna puan pen, puanmalngat hoih lak a om lou a, atuam a khepsa a om amu hi.
43020008	Huchi in nungzui dang, han tung masazaw pen leng alut sam a, amu a, agingta hi.
43020009	Misi lak a kipan a thounawn ding ahi, chih Laisiangthou gen atheigige nawn kei uhi.
43020010	Huchi in nungzuite amau inn ah apai nawnta uhi.
43020011	Himahleh han pua ah kap kawm in Mari adingh a; kap kawm in akun a, han sung a-en hi.
43020012	Huan angel nih puanngou silh, Jesu luang sialna mun ah khat alulam leh khat akhe lam a tu amu hi.
43020013	Huan amau, “Numei, bangziak a kap na hia?” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Ka Toupa apaimangpih ua, akoihna uh ka theih louh ziak in,” chi in adawng hi.
43020014	Huan huchi a agentak in anunglam anga a, Jesu dingh amu a, himahleh Jesu ahi chih athei kei hi.
43020015	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Numei, bangziak a kap na hia? Kua ahia na zon?” achi hi. Ama'n huanpu hiam asa a, akiang ah, “Pu, amah hiai a kipan a paimangpih na hihleh, na koihna hon hilh tanla, huchi in ka la ding,” achi hi.
43020016	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Mari” achi hi. Amah akihei a, akiang ah Hebru pau in, “Rabboni” achi a, (huai tuh Sinsakpa chihna ahi).
43020017	Huan Jesu'n akiang ah, “Hon lawng ke'n, tutan in leng Pa kiang ah ka kahtou nai kei hi. Himahleh ka unaute kiang ah va hoh inla, akiang uah, ka pa, na Pa uh, ka Pathian, na Pathian uh kiang ah ka kahtou dek, achi, va chi in,” achi hi.
43020018	Mari Magdalin ava hoh a, nungzuite kiang ah, “Toupa ka muta,” achi a, akiang ah hiai thute agen chih ahilhta hi.
43020019	Huan huai ni, nipikal a ni masapen, nitaklam ahong hih in, Judate kihtak ziak a nungzuite omna inn kongkhakte akhak nung un, Jesu ahong pai a, alak uah ahong dingh a, akiang uah, “Na tung uah khamuanna om hen,” achi hi.
43020020	Huai agen khit in akiang uah akhut leh anak alak a, Toupa amuhtak un nungzuite akipak uhi.
43020021	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Na tung uah khamuanna om hen, Pa'n kei hon sawl bang mah in nou ka hon sawl hi,” achi nawn hi.
43020022	Huai thu agen khit in amau ahatkhum a, akiang uah, “Kha Siangthou tang un.
43020023	Kua khelhna leng na ngaihdam uh ngaihdam ahi ding a; kua khelhna leng na ngaihdam louh uh, ngaihdam louh ahi ding,” achi hi.
43020024	Huan Jesu ahong lai in sawm-le-nihte lak a pang sam Thomas, Didum achih uh, akiang uah a-om kei hi.
43020025	Huchi in nungzui dangte'n akiang ah, “Toupa ka muta uh,” achi uhi. Himahleh ama'n akiang uah, “Akhut sikkhetna pawn ka muh a, ka khutzung a ka khoih a, anak a ka khut ka golhlut hial keileh ka gingta kei ding,” achi hi.
43020026	Huan ani giat nung in, insung ah anungzuite a-om nawn ua, Thomas leng akiang uah a-om sam hi. Huan kongkhakte khak hinapi in Jesu ahong pai a, alak uah ahong dinghta a, akiang uah, “Na tung uah khamuanna om hen,” achi hi.
43020027	Huan Thomas kiang ah, “Na khutzung in sawk in, ka khutte en in; na khut in khoih inla, ka nak ah sawk in; ging lou ke'nla, gingta mai in,” achi hi.
43020028	Thomas in, “Ka Toupa leh ka Pathian na hi,” chi in adawng hi.
43020029	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Nang zaw na hon muh ziak in na gingta ahi; mu lou a gingta peuhmahte ahampha uh,” achi hi.
43020030	Huan Jesu'n nungzuite ma ah chiamtehna dang tamtak ahih a, huaite hiai laibu ah gelh vek ahi kei hi.

43021001	Huai thilte nung in, Tiberias tuipi ah anungzuite kiang ah Jesu akilak nawn a; hichibang in amah mah akilak hi.
43021002	Simon Peter leh Thomas, Didum achih uh, Galili gam a Kana a Nathanael, Zebedai tapa nihte, anungzui dang nihte toh a-omkhawm uhi.
43021003	Simon Peter in akiang uah, “Ngasa man ding in ka kuan dek,” achi a, amau akiang ah, “Kou leng na kiang ah ka hong sam ding uh,” achi uhi. Apawtkhia ua, long ah atuang ua, huai zan in bangmah aman kei uhi.
43021004	Phalvak in piautak ah Jesu ava dingh a; himahleh anungzuite'n Jesu ahi chih athei kei uhi.
43021005	Jesu'n akiang uah, “Naute aw, nek ding banghiam na nei uhia?” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Nei lou,” chi in adawng uhi.
43021006	Huan akiang uah, “Long sik taklam ah len pai le uchin na man ding uh,” achi hi. Apai ua, ngasa atam ziak in akaikhe zou kei uhi.
43021007	Huchi in nungzui Jesu itpa'n Peter kiang ah, “Toupa ei ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa ahi chih Simon Peter in atheih in, apuanak tungsilh ateng a, amah vuaktang a om ahi a, tuipi ah atawmkheta hi.
43021008	Himahleh nungzuite'n long neuchik in, len ngasa a dim toh kai kawm in ahon zuan ua, gam a kipan in agamla ngal kei ua, tong zanih hiam phet ahi.
43021009	Huan gam a ahong suahtak un, meihol a mei tohsa atung a ngasa leh tanghou emsa amu uhi.
43021010	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Tu in na ngasa mat uh akhen hon latou un,” achi hi.
43021011	Huchi in Simon Peter ava tuang a, ngasa lian pipi a dim tui gei ah ahon kaikhia a, zakhat sawmnga-le-thum apha hi; huchi lawmlawm in tam mahleh len akek kei hi.
43021012	Huan Jesu'n akiang uah, “Zing an hong ne un,” achi hi. Nungzuite lak ah kuamah in akiang ah, “Kua na hia?” chi in adong ngam kei uh. Toupa ahi chih athei uhi.
43021013	Huan Jesu ahong pai a, tanghou ala a, akiang uah apia a, ngasate leng huchibang mah in ape sam hi.
43021014	Huai tuh Jesu misi lak a kipan athohnawn nung a, anungzuite kiang a akilak thumveina ahi.
43021015	Huan zing an anek khit un, Simon Peter kiang ah Jesu'n, “Simon, Johan tapa, nang hiaite sang in kei na hon itzaw hia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Hi, Toupa, ka hon it chih na thei hi,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka belamnoute vak in,” achi hi.
43021016	Huan anihveina ding in akiang ah, “Simon, Johan tapa, nang kei na hon it hia?” achi nawn hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Hi, Toupa, ka hon it chih na thei hi,” achi nawn hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka belamte ching in,” achi hi.
43021017	Huan athumveina ding in akiang ah, “Simon, Johan tapa, nang kei na hon it hia?” achi hi. Huan thumveina a nang kei na hon it hia? chi a akiang a agen ziak in Peter alungkham a, akiang ah, “Toupa, bangkim na thei a, ka hon it chih na thei hi,” achi hi. Jesu'n akiang ah, “Ka belamte vak in.”
43021018	“Chihtaktak in, chihtaktak in ka hon hilh ahi, na naupan lai in na tai ah na kigak a, na utna peuh ah na hoh a; himahleh na upat hun chiang in na khut na zak ding a, midang in ahon gaksak ding ua, na utlouhna lam ah ahon kai ding uh,” achi hi.
43021019	Huai thu bangchidan a si in ahia Pathian apahtawi ding, chih theihsakna ding a agen ahi. Huai agen khit in akiang ah, “Hon zui in,” achi hi.
43021020	Huai khit in Peter akihei a, Jesu nungzui itpa, nitak an nek lai a a-awm ngai a hong awnphei a, “Amansak dingpa kua pen ahia?” chipa'n, amau hon zui amu hi.
43021021	Peter in amah amuhtak in, Jesu kiang ah, “Toupa, hiai mi'n bang ahih dia?” achi hi.
43021022	Jesu'n akiang ah, “Ka hong pai nawn tan a om nilouh ding in deih leng, huai nang bang lunghimoh zenzen? Nang hon zui in,” achi hi.
43021023	Huchi in huai nungzuipa si lou ding in athu unaute lak ah athangta a; himahleh Jesu'n asi kei ding chih akiang ah agen kei a, “K'ong pai nawn tan a om nilouh ding in deih leng, huai nang bang lunghimoh zenzen?” chi lel ahi zaw hi.
43021024	Huai nungzuipa, “Hiai thu theisakpa leh gelhpa ahi; huan athu theihsak adik chih i thei uhi.”
43021025	Huan hiaite lou leng Jesu thilhih dang tampi a-om lai a; huaite gelh vek ding hileh, laibu gelh ding tengteng khovel ah leng tazou in ka gingta kei hi. Amen.
44001001	Theophilas aw, tuma a ka laigelh ah, Jesu thilhih leh athuhilh pat tung tengteng thu ka gelh hi.
44001002	Kha Siangthou tawn a asawltak telte kiang a thupiak tampi apiak khit a van a pitouh a a-om ni tan a thute ahi.
44001003	Huai sawltakte kiang ah gimna athuak nung in theihna zuau lou tampi in ahing in akimusak a, ni sawmli hial akiang uah akilak a, Pathian lalgam thu agen hi.
44001004	Huan a-omkhawm uh akithuahpih a, “Jerusalem khua paisan kei un, Pa thilchiam ka gen na zak uh ngak un, achi tinten hi.

44001009	Huai thu agen khit in amuh laipi un, van a pitouh in a-omta a, meipi in amuh phak louh uah apitouta hi.
44001010	Huan apaitouh lai a van lam a-et nilouh lai un, ngai in, mi nih, puanngou silh in, akiang uah ahong dingh uhi.

44002001	Pentikost ni ahong tun in, avek un mun khat ah a-omkhawm uhi.
44002002	Thakhat in van a kipan huihpi nung bang in ging ahong om guih a, huchi in huai in atutna inn uh ahihdim vekta hi,
44002003	leite amah-le-amah mei bang a kihawm in, alutung uah ahong tuang chiat hi.
44002004	Huchi in avek un Kha Siangthou in aluahdimta a, Kha in hihtheihna apiak a apausak bang zel in pau dangte in apauta uhi.
44002005	Huan van nuai nam chih lak a kipan Pathian limsak Juda kulmutte Jerusalem ah a-om uhi.
44002006	Huan ging husa azaktak un mipi ahong kikhawm ua, michih in apau uh amau pau chiat a azak ziak un alungsim uh ahong buai hi.

44002011	khenkhat Krit tuikulh leh Arab gam a mite i hi ngal ua; himahleh, Pathian thilhih thupite agen uh eimau pau chiat in i za ngal ua!” achi uhi.
44002012	Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, akhiakna dan thei lou in, “Hiai bangchidan ahia?” akichi uhi.
44002013	Khenkhat in, “Uain thak akham ua ahi,” chi in anuihsan uhi.
44002014	Himahleh Peter in sawm-le-khatte toh dingkhawm in, aw ngaihtak in akiang uah agen a, nou Judia gam a mite aw, nou Jerusalem a om tengteng aw, hiai thei unla, ka thu leng ngaikhia un.
44002015	Hiaite na gin bang un akham kei uh, dak thumna hun ahi.
44002016	Hiaite zawlnei Joel in agen ahi zaw:
44002017	“Pathian in, ni nanungte ah hichi ahi ding, mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sungbo ding a; na tapa leh na tanute'n ka thu ahilh ding uh; na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding ua, na putekte un mang anei ding uh.
44002018	Ahi, huai ni in ka sikhapate, ka sikhanute tung ah leng ka Kha ka sungbo ding a, ka thu agen ding uhi.
44002019	Huan tunglam van ah thillamdang nuailam lei ah chiamtehna ka musak ding a; sisan, mei, meikhu hu toh,
44002020	Nisa mial asuak ding a, kha sisan asuak ding, Toupa ni thupitak leh lauhuaitak ahong tun ma in.
44002021	Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa min lou peuhmah hotdam in a-om ding hi.
44002022	“Nou Israel mite aw, hiai thu za un: Nazaret Jesu, Pathian in amah zang in na lak uah thil thupite, thillamdangte, chiamtehnate ahih in ahon theichiansak hi; nou ngei in tuate na theichian uhi.
44002023	Huai mi Pathian' tupkholhsa leh theihkholh bang in na mansak ua, nou migiloute khut a kilhden in na hihlumta uhi.
44002024	Amah, Pathian in sihna thuaknatna phelsak in, akaithouta a; ama sihna letdet vual ahih louh ziak in.
44002025	Huan David in athu agen a, ‘Ka ma ah chik lai peuh in Toupa ka mu gige hi. Ka mangbatlouhna ding in ka taklam ah a-om hi.
44002026	Huaiziak in ka lungtang anuam a, ka lei leng akipak a, ka sa lamentak in a-om behlap lai hi.
44002027	Misikhua ah ka kha na nuse kei ding a, muatna na Mi Siangthou na musak sam kei ding hi.
44002028	Nangma'n hinna lampite na hon theisak a; nangma'n na mel in kipak in na hon hihdim ding,’ ” chi in.
44002029	“Unaute aw, chikhahpa David thu lau lou in na kiang uah ka gen thei hi; amah zaw asi a, vui leng avui khinta ua, ahan leng tutan in i kiang ah a-om lai hi.
44002030	Amah tuh zawlnei ahi a, Pathian in akhal a mi kuahiam sadan a achite lak a mi khat Khrist laltutphah a tu ding in akaithou ding chih kichiam in agen chih athei hi.
44002031	Huchi in huai tuh atheihkholh him ziak in Khrist thohnawn ding thu agen hi, ‘Misikhua a nutsiat in a-om kei a, aluang leng amuat sam kei hi,’ ” chi in.
44002032	“Pathian in Jesu akaithouta chih theihpihte i vek un i hi uhi.
44002033	Pathian khut taklam ah pahtawi in a-om a, Kha Siangthou chiam Pa kiang a kipan in amu a, na muh uh leh na zakte uh ahon sunbuak ahi uhi.
44002034	David zaw van ah akahtou kei, amah ngei in, Jehovah in ka Toupa kiang ah,
44002035	‘Na melmate na khepek ngakna dia ka bawl masiah, Ka taklam ah tu kinken in,’ ” achi, ana chi hi.
44002036	“Huchi in Jesu, na kilhden uh, Pathian in Toupa leh Khrist hikhawm in abawlta chih Israel inkuan chih in kichiantak in thei uhen,” achi hi.
44002037	Huan huai thu azak un alungtang ua sut bang ahong hi ua, Peter leh sawltak dangte kiang ah, “Unaute aw, bangchi in ka hihta ding ua?” achi ua.
44002038	Peter in akiang uah, “Na khelhnate uh ngaihdamna ding in lungsim khek unla, Jesu Khrist min in baptisma tang chiat un; huchi in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak na tang ding uhi.
44002039	Achiam nou a ding, na tate uh a ding, gamlapi a mi tengteng a ding leh Toupa i Pathian in akiang a asap peuhmahte a ding ahi,” achi hi.
44002040	Huan thudang tampi in ahilhchian a; hiai khang thulimloute lak ah kihumbit un, chi in ahanthawn hi.
44002041	Huan athu zui peuhmah in baptisma atang ua, huai ni in mi sangthum vel behlap in a-om uhi.
44002042	Huan sawltakte thusinsakte sin in, kithuah in, tanghou balkham in, thum in, phatuamngaitak in a-omkhawm uhi.
44002043	Huan michih in alauta ua; sawltakte'n thillamdang leh chiamtehna tampi ahih uhi.
44002044	Agingta peuhmah in bangkim akikopkhawm uhi.
44002045	Agoute uh, athil neihte uh azuak ua, adeihdong ching lel chiat in avek ua kiang ah ahawm zel uhi.
44002046	Huan niteng in, lungsim mun khat in, tempul ah phatuamngaitak in a-om zelzel ua, a-innte uah leng tanghou balkham in, nuam leh lungkim in, a-an uh ane zel uhi.
44002047	Pathian aphat ua, mi tengteng deihsak in a-om uhi. Huan ahotdam lel peuhmah Toupa'n niteng in akiang uah abehlapsak zel hi.
44003001	Huan Peter leh Johan, dak kuana ah thum hun lai in tempul a lut ding in ahohtou uhi.
44003002	Piching kuahiam apian tung a pan khebai ahon zawng ua, tempul a lutte kiang a khutdoh ding in, tempul Kongkhak Kilawm kichi bul ah niteng in alumsak uhi.
44003003	Peter leh Johan tempul a lut ding mu in khut adoh hi.
44003004	Peter in amah a-en gegu a, Johan in leng; huan Peter in, “Hon en in,” achi hi.
44003005	Ama'n amau a pan banghiam muh akilamen a, a-en pah hi.
44003006	Himahleh Peter in, “Dangka leh dangka-eng bangmah ka nei kei; himahleh ka neihsun ka hon pe ding, ‘Nazaret Jesu Khrist min in khe in paita in,’ ” achi hi.
44003007	Huan akhut taklam alen a, akaithouta a; huchi in thakhat in akhete leh asiakmit guhte ahong hat pah hi.
44003008	Amah atawmtou a, adingh a, khe in apai pah hi. Khe a paipai, diangdiang leh Pathian phat kawm in tempul ah alut hi.
44003009	Huan khe a pai leh mi tengteng in Pathian aphat lai amuh un;
44003010	Tempul Kongkhak Kilawm bul a khutdoh a tupa ahi chih athei ua; atung a thil tunglamdang asa mahmah ua, abuaipih uhi.
44003011	Huan ama'n Peter leh Johan alet lai in, mi tengteng in lamdang asa mahmah ua, inlim Solomon a achih uah akiang uah ahong taikhawm uhi.
44003012	Peter in huai amuh in, mite ahoupih a, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiaite bangziak a lamdang sa? Koumau thilhihtheihna leh Pathian ka limsak ziak ua amah ka paisak bang zen ua bang achia hon en gige?
44003013	Abraham, Isak leh Jakob' Pathian, i pipute Pathian in, asikha Jesu apahtawita ahi; amah na mansak ua, Pilat in khah atup hun in leng ama ah na ut kei uhi.
44003014	Mi Siangthou leh Dik na deih kei ua, tualthatpa na kiang ua piak na ngen zawta uhi.
44003015	Hinna Siampa na that ua; himahleh Pathian in amah misi lak a pan akaithou nawn a; huai theihpihte ka hi uhi.
44003016	Ama min gintak ziak in amin in hiai mi na muh uh leh na theih un ahihhatta hi. Amah ziak a ginna ahong om in na vek ua mitmuh in ahihdam vilvelta hi.
44003017	“Himahleh unaute aw, na heutute un atheih louh ziak ua ahih bang un, na theih louh ziak un hiaite na hih uh ahi, chih ka thei uhi.
44003018	Himahleh Pathian in zawlnei tengteng kam in, Khrist in gim athuak ding thu atheikholsak hi, huchibang in atungsak zawta hi.
44003019	Huaiziak in na khelhnate uh thaimanna ding in kisik unla, kihei nawn un, huchi in Toupa a pan halh hun ahong tung ding hi.
44003020	Khrist Jesu nou a dia aseh mah leng, ahon sawl ding hi.
44003021	Himahleh Pathian in thil bangkim abawlhoih hun ahong tun masiah amah van a a-om ding him ahi; huai bawlhoih ding thu Pathian in leilung pian tung a kipan azawlnei siangthoute kam a agen khit ahi.
44003022	Mosi ngei in ‘Toupa Pathian in keimah ahon bawl bang in na unaute lak ah zawlnei khat ahon bawlsak ding; ama'n thu tengteng na kiang ua agen peuh na ngaihkhiaksak ding uhi.
44003023	Huan mi kuapeuh huai zawlnei thu ngaihkhiaksak lou tuh, mi lak a kipan hihmangthang ahi ding,’ achi hi.
44003024	Ahi, Samuel om a kipan zawlnei tengteng, anung ua mite toh, thugen peuhte'n, tulai tanchin agenkhol uhi.
44003025	Noute zawlneite leh thukhun tate na hi ve ua; Pathian in Abraham kiang ah, ‘Na suante ziak in khovel a nam chih avualzawl ding uh, chi in na pipute uh kiang ah achiam hi.
44003026	Pathian in a Tapa Jesu, misi lak a kipan kaithou in, na khelhnate uh kiheisanna ding leh kisik mite vualzawl ding in noumau kiang ah ahon sawl masapen hi,’ ” achi hi.
44004001	Huan Peter leh Johan in mite kiang a thu agen lai un, siampute, tempul heutute leh Saddukaite akiang uh ahong tung guih ua;
44004002	mite asinsak uh leh Jesu ziak a misi lak a kipan thohnawnna thu ahilh ziak un alungkim kei hial uhi.
44004003	Huan amaute aman ua nitaklam ahih ziak in azingsang pha in suangkul ah akhumta uhi.
44004004	Himahleh thu ngaikhete akhen tampite'n agingta ua; atamlam uh piching ngen leng sangnga vel aching uhi.
44004005	Azing in aheutute uh, upate, laigelhmi te,
44004006	siampu lianpen Annas leh Kaiapha, Johan, Alexander, siampu lianpen tanau tengtengte leng Jerusalem ah a-omkhawm uhi.
44004007	Peter leh Johan alai ah adingsak ua, “Bang thilhihtheihna in ahia, kua min in ahia hiai na hih uh?” chi in adong uhi.
44004008	Huchi in Peter Kha Siangthou in adim a, akiang uah, “Nou mipite vaihawmte leh Israel upate aw,
44004009	hiai mi damlou tung a nna hoih ka sep thu uah, hiai mi bangziak in ahia ahong dam tak chi in tu in salh leh dot a om ka hi uh maw;
44004010	nou tengteng leh Israel mi teng in leng thei hen, kros a Nazaret Jesu Khrist na kilhden uh, Pathian in misi lak a kipan in akaithou nawn a, amah min ngei in hiai mi hiai ah na ma uah dam in adinghta ahi.
44004011	“Nou inn lam mite aw, na suangpaih uh, aning a, suang phatuampen ahong hita, huai amah ahi achi uhi.”
44004012	“Midang kuamah kiang ah hotdamna a-om kei, van nuai a mihing min sak lak ah, hon hondam ding min dang a-om kei,” achi hi.
44004013	Peter leh Johan hansandan amuh un, milaisiam lou leh minautang maimai ahi uh chih atheih un lamdang asa mahmah uhi; huchi in Jesu kiang ah a-om khinta uh chih athei uhi.
44004014	Huan mi ahihdam uh akiang ua dingh amuh un, bangmah agense thei tuan kei uhi.
44004015	Huchi in avaihawmna ua pat a apaituamsak nung un, akihou ua,
44004016	“Hiai mite bangchi in i hih dia? Thillamdang chiamteh tham ahih uh Jerusalem a om tengteng in teltak in atheita uh; en leng i sel thei tuan kei hi.
44004017	Himahleh midang kiang a athan semsemlouhna ding in tunung siah kuamah kiang ah hiai min a thu agenlouhna ding un i vau ding uh,” achi uhi.
44004018	Huchi in amau asam ua, Jesu min a thu gen het lou ding leh hilh het lou ding in achi tinten uhi.
44004019	Himahleh Peter leh Johan in akiang uah, “Pathian mitmuh in Pathian thuman sang in noumau thuman adikzaw hia ngaihtuah un.
44004020	Kou zaw ka thil muh uh leh ka zakte uh gen lou in ka om thei kei uh,” achi uhi.
44004021	Huan amau avau semsem ua, akhahta uh, mipi ziak in gawtna lemtang amu kei uh; athilhih ziak un mi tengteng in Pathian apahtawi uhi.
44004022	Hiai ahihdamna chiamtehna uh kum sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi.
44004023	Huan Peter leh Johan apawt un amau lawmte kiang ah ava hoh ua, siampu liante leh upate'n akiang ua agen peuh uh ahilh vek uhi.
44004024	Huchi in angaikhete'n akituak in aw ngaihtak in Pathian kiang ah, “Toupa, nang tuh van leh lei, tuipi leh asung a omte tengteng bawlpa na hi;
44004025	Nang Kha Siangthou in, ka pu uh na sikha David kam in, hiai thu na gen ahi: ‘Zentelte bangchi in ahita aheh uh? Mite'n bangchi in ahia thil phatuam lou angaihtuah uh?
44004026	Khovel kumpipate adingh ua, heutute leng akikhawm ua, Toupa leh ama Khrist kalh in,’ chi in.
44004027	“Hiai khua ah na sikha siangthou, na thaunilh Jesu tung ah, Herod leh Pontias Pilat toh, Zentelte leh Israel mite toh akikhawmta uh;
44004028	na khut leh na lungsim a hong tung ding a na sehkholh peuh hih ding in.
44004029	Huchi in tu'n ah, Toupa, ahon vaudan uh ngai in; na sikhate kiang ah na thu hangsantak a gentheihna pia in.
44004030	Damsak ding a na khut na zak a, na sikha Jesu min a chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte hih ahih lai in,” achi uhi.
44004031	Huan athum khit un a-omkhawmna mun uh ahong ling a, avek un Kha Siangthou in adim ua, hangsantak in Pathian thu ahilhta uhi.
44004032	Huan agingta mipite lungsim mun khat leh ngaihtuah mun khat in a-om ua; alak ua kuamah in athil neihte, kei a tuam ahi, achi kei ua, thil tengteng akikop uhi.
44004033	Sawltakte'n thilhihtheihna thupitak in Toupa Jesu thohnawn thu ahilhhilh ua; avek ua tung ah hehpihna thupitak a-om hi.
44004034	Huan alak uah leng tasam kuamah a-om kei uh; gam leh inn nei peuh in azuak ua, athil khotte uh aman ahon tawi uhi.
44004035	Huan sawltakte khebul ah akoih zel ua, amau deihdong ching hun chiat in ahawm chiat zel uhi.
44004036	Huan Levi chi a mi khat, Kupra tuikulh a kipan, Joses kichi, sawltakte'n Barnabas achih uh, (huai min omdan, “Hanthawnna Tapa,” chihna ahi),
44004037	hiai mi in agam neih azuak a, aman ahon tawi a, sawltakte khebul ah akoih hi.
44005001	Himahleh mi khat amin Ananias in azi Sapphira toh athil neih uh azuak hi.
44005002	Huan azi theih in ama'n akhen a-iim a, akhen hon tawi in sawltakte khebul ah ahong koih hi.
44005003	Himahleh Peter in, “Kha Siangthou khem ding leh gam man akhen iim ding in bangziak a Setan in na lungtang hihkhauh ahia?
44005004	A-om lai teng leng nang a ahi gige kei a hia? Na zuak nung in leng na thuthu in a-om kei a hia? Bang achia hiai thute na lungtang a ngaihtuah? Mihing khem na hi kei a, Pathian khem na hi zaw,” achi hi.
44005005	Ananias in huai thu azaktak in apuk a, asita hi; aza kha peuh in alau mahmah uhi.
44005006	Tangvalte athou ua, tuam in azawngkhia ua, avuita uhi.
44005007	Dakkal thum ding hiam nung in, thil omdan thei lou in azi ahong lut hi.
44005008	Peter in akiang ah, “Hon hilh in, hiai zah phet in maw gam na zuak uh?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi, hiai zah phet in ahi,” achi hi.
44005009	Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Bang achia Toupa Kha ze-et ding a kithutuak na hi ua? Ngai in, kongkhak bul ah na pasal vuite khepek ahong omta, nang leng ahon zawngkhe ding uh,” achi hi.
44005010	Huchi in thakhat in akhebul ah apuk pah a, asi hi; tangvalte ahong lut ua, amah si in ahong mu ua, azawngkhia ua, apasal kiang ah avuita uhi.
44005011	Huan saptuamte leh huai thu za peuhmahte'n alau mahmah uhi.
44005012	Huan mi lak ah Pathian in sawltakte khut in chiamtehna leh thillamdang tampi ahih zel hi. Huan amaute avek un lungsim mun khat in Solomon inlim ah akikhawm zel uhi.
44005013	Midang bel kuamah alak uah apang ngamta kei uhi; himahleh mi'n amaute angaisang uhi.
44005014	Huan Toupa lam ah numei leh pasal gingthak tampi behlap semsem in a-om uhi.
44005015	Huchi in mi damloute kongzing ah alumsak ua, Peter pai kawm a alim bek in alak ua khat bek aliahtheihna ding in, achi uhi.
44005016	Jerusalem kho kim a kipan mipite leng huai damloute dawi nin hihgimte hon pi in ahong paikhawm ua; huaite leng ahong dam chiat uhi.
44005017	Huan siampu lianpen akisa a, akiang a omte tengteng toh, alawmte tuh Saddukai pawl ahi ua; amau hazatna in adim uhi.
44005018	Sawltakte aman ua, vantang khumna ah akhumta uhi.
44005019	Zankim in Toupa angel khat in kongkhakte hong in, apikhia hi.
44005020	“Tempul ah pai unla, va dingh in mite kiang ah hiai hinna thu va gen un,” achi hi.
44005021	Huan huai thu azak un, khua hong vak phet in tempul ah ava lut ua, thu ava gen uhi. Himahleh, siampu Lian leh alawmte ahong ua, vaihawmte leh Israel suante upate tengteng asamkhawm ua, sawltakte va pi ding in suangkul ah mi asawl uhi.
44005022	Suangkul ah heutute va hoh mah le uh, amau ava mu kei ua; huchi in akik nawn uhi.
44005023	“Suangkul bittak a kikhak in, avengte leng kongkhak bul a dingh amu uhi, himahleh ka hong ua, asung ah kuamah ka mu kei uh,” chi in agen uhi.
44005024	Huan tempul upa leh siampu liante'n huai thute azak un, hiai bangchi phet in athang diam aw? chi in athu ah amangbang petpet uhi.
44005025	Huan mi khat ahong pai a akiang uah, “Ngai un, suangkul a na mikhumte un tempul a dingh in thu agen uh,” chi in ahong gen hi.
44005026	Huchi in sepaih heutupa toh heutu liante ava kuan ua, vantang akihtak ziak un hiamgamna om lou in sawltakte ahon pi ua, huchi hi keileh suang a den ahi kha ding uhi.
44005027	Huan apitung un, vaihawmte ma ah adingsak uhi. Siampu lianpen in akiang uah,
44005028	“Huai min in thu hilh louh ding ka hon chita ua; thei un na thuhilh un Jerusalem ahihdim vekta hi, hiai mipa sisan hon khuksak tum na hi ve ua,” chi in asal hi.
44005029	Himahleh Peter leh sawltakte'n, “Mihing thu sang in Pathian thu i man zawk ding ahi,” achi uhi.
44005030	“Nou sing ah Jesu khaikang in na that ua, i pipute Pathian in akaithou nawnta hi.
44005031	Amah mah Pathian in Kumpipa leh Hondampa a om ding in ataklam ah ahihlianta hi. Israelte khelhna a pan kiheisak ding leh ngaidam ding in.
44005032	Huai thute kou atheihpihte ka hi ua; Kha Siangthou, Pathian in athu zui peuhte kiang a apiak tak, atheipa ahi nawn lai,” chi in adawng uhi.
44005033	Amau huai thu azak un asin uh athak mahmah a, hihlup atumta uhi.
44005034	Himahleh vaihawmte lak ah, amin Gamaliel, Pharisai, dan sinsakmi, mi tengteng lak a minthangpi khat adingtou a, huai mite inn polam a omsak takdih ding thu apia hi.
44005035	Huan vaihawmte kiang ah, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiai mite tung a na thilhih tup uah pilvang un.
44005036	Tuma lam in Theuda kichi, mi khat ahong om a, huai mipa kiang ah mi tampi, zali phial, a-awn uhi, amah tuh hihlup in a-omta a; athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta ua bangmah ahita kei uhi.
44005037	Huai mi om nung in kisimpi lai in, Galili gam ah mi khat Judas kichi ahong om nawn hi; alam ah mi khenkhat ahip nawn hi; himahleh amah leng asita a, athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta uhi.
44005038	Huaiziak in tu in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai mite khoih kei unla, amau om-om in omsak un; hiai athiltup uh leh athilhih uh mihing a kipan ahihleh amang ding hi.
44005039	Himahleh Pathian a kipan ahihleh amau na hihmang thei kei ding uh; huchi lou in zaw Pathian dou na hi zaw kha ding uh,” achi hi.
44005040	Huan agen lem asata ua; huchi in sawltakte asam ua, avua ua; avuak khit un, Jesu min a thu gen lou ding chi bikbek in akhahta uhi.
44005041	Huchi in vaihawmte lak a kipan apawtkhia ua, Khrist min ziak a daina thuak tak a seh ahih ziak un akipak mahmah uhi.
44005042	Huan niteng in tempul leh amaute inn ah, Jesu Khrist ahi, chi in thuhilh leh sinsak atawp kei uhi.
44006001	Huai lai a, nungzuite apunpun lai un, aniteng thilhawm uah Grik pau zang Juda meithaite limsak lou chi in Hebru pau zang Judate tung ah Grik Judate aphun uhi.
44006002	Huan sawm-le-nihte'n nungzui mipite asamkhawm ua, “Pathian thugen tawpsan a dohkan a nek-tak ka bawl uh ahoih kei.
44006003	Huaiziak in unaute aw, na lak uah Kha leh pilna a dim mi minhoih ngen sagih tel un, amau hiai thil gel ding in ka bawl ding ua;
44006004	kou ahihleh thum leh thu nasem in ka om gige zaw ding uh,” achi uhi.
44006005	Huai thu in mi tengteng akipaksak a; huchi in ginna leh Kha Siangthou a dim ngen, Stephen, Philip, Prokoras leh Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas leh Judate phungkai Antiok a mi Nikolas atel uhi.
44006006	Sawltakte ma ah hiai mite adingsak ua; amau athum ua, atung uah akhut uh anga uhi.
44006007	Huchi in Pathian thu ahong dalh zom zel a; Jerusalem ah nungzuite apungta mahmah ua; siampute lak ah leng mi tampi'n ginna lam ahong ngata uhi.
44006008	Huan Stephen, hehpihna leh thilhihtheihna in adim in, mi lak ah thillamdang leh chiamtehna thupite ahih zom zel hi.
44006009	Himahleh Kurini, Aleksandria leh Silisia gam leh Asia gam a kipan Juda pawl khat Salsuakte sinagog kichite leh mi khenkhat ahong kisa ua, Stephen hong kiselpih uhi.
44006010	Himahleh apilna leh agenpihpa Kha aselkhe thei kei uhi.
44006011	Huan mi khenkhat aguai ua; huai mite'n, “Mosi leh Pathian agensiat ka za uh,” achi uhi.
44006012	Huan mite, upate leh laigelhmite atokthou ua, Stephen asual ua, aman ua, vaihawmte kiang ah api uhi.
44006013	Theihpih zuauthei bawlkhia in, amaute'n, “Hiai mi'n hiai mun siangthou leh Dan agense gige,
44006014	Nazaret Jesu'n hiai mun ahihse dia, Mosi in hon piak dante ahihlamdang ding chih, agen ka za uh,” achi uhi.
44006015	Huan vaihawmte tengteng in Stephen a-ensal chiat ua, amel angel mel bang in amu uhi.
44007001	Huan siampu lianpen in, “Hiai thute adik ahi na hia?” achi hi.
44007002	Stephen in, “Unaute aw, pate aw, ngai un. I pu Abraham, Haran a a-om ma, Mesopotamia gam a a-om lai a, thupina Pathian akiang a hong kilak in akiang ah,
44007003	‘Na kholam leh na chite lak a kipan pawt inla, gam ka hon etsak ding lam ah pai in,’ ” achi hi.
44007004	Huan amah tuh Kaldaite gam a kipan apaikhia a, Haran ah ava om a; huan apa sih nung in huai a kipan in tua na omna kholam uah Pathian in apemlutsak hi.
44007005	Huan hiai ah zaw mun luah ding, khe ngakna tham bangmah ape kei. Himahleh tapa aneih ma nangawn in ama gou ding leh anung a asuante gouluah ding in gam piak achiam hi.
44007006	Pathian in hichibang in agen, asuante mi kholam ah kum zali ataam ding ua mi'n sikha in abawl ding ua, asawi behlap ding uh.
44007007	Pathian in, “ ‘Sikha a nei dingte nam keima'n ka ngaihtuah ding a, huai khit chiang in ahong pawt ding ua, hiai mun ah ka nna asem ding uh,’ achi behlap hi.
44007008	Pathian in akiang ah tua zeksum thu akhung a; huchi in Abraham in Isak asuang a, ani giat ni in azek asum a, huan Isak in Jakob asuang a; Jakob in suangtubul ding sawm-le-nihte ahon nei hi.
44007009	“Huai suangtubul dingte'n Joseph ahaza ua, Aigupta gam ah azuak ua; himahleh akiang ah Pathian a-om hi.
44007010	Agimthuak tengteng ah ahunkhe zel a, Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh deihsakna angahsak a, mipiltak ahi chih atheisak behlap hi; huchi in ama'n Aigupta gam leh a-inn a mi tengteng tung ah gam-ukpa in abawlta hi.
44007011	Aigupta leh Kanaan gam tengteng ah kial ahong tung a, gimthuakna thupitak ahong tungta hi; i pipute'n lah nek ding himhim amuta kei ua.
44007012	Himahleh Jakob in Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih azaktak in i pipute asawlkhia a; huai tuh ahoh pat tungna pen uh ahi.
44007013	Huan anihvei hohna uah, a-unaute kiang ah Joseph kitheisakta a, huchi in Joseph chite tuh Pharaoh kiang ah akitheisakta uhi.
44007014	Huan Joseph in apa Jakob leh a-unau tengteng mi sawmsagih leh nga asamsak hi.
44007015	Huchi in Aigupta gam ah Jakob ahohsuk a; huai ah amah leh i pipute asita uhi.
44007016	Shekem ah apotung ua, Abraham in Shekem a Emmor tapate lak a dangka sum a alei han ah avuita uhi.
44007017	“Pathian in Abraham kiang a athuchiam ahong tun ding in Aigupta gam ah mite ahong pung ua, ahong tam deuhdeuh uhi.
44007018	Huan Aigupta gam ah Joseph thei lou kumpi dang khat ahong lal hi.
44007019	Huai mi in i chipihte akhem a, i pipute asawi a, anaungekte uh hing lou ding in apaikhesak hi.
44007020	Huai lai in Mosi ahong piang a, Pathian muh in melhoih mahmah ahi; apa inn ah kha thum akem uhi.
44007021	Akoihkhiak un Pharaoh tanu in ama tapa ding a la in akem hi.
44007022	Huan Aigupta gam a pilna tengteng Mosi ahilh ua, thu ah leh athilhih ah athupi mahmah hi.
44007023	“Huan amah kum sawmli achin kuan in, a-unau, Israel suante aveh hi.
44007024	Huan alak ua mi khat gimthuak lai amu a, apanpih a, ahihgimpa Aigupta mi athat a, aphu alaksakta hi.
44007025	Mosi in ama khut in Pathian in amaute ahondam chih a-unaute'n thei na uhiam asa a, himahleh athei kei uh.
44007026	Huan azing in alak ua mi nih akilai un akiang uh ava naih a, ‘Pute aw, unau nei ve ua; bangziak a dikloutak a kibawl na hi ua?’ chi in lep atum hi.
44007027	Himahleh a-invengpa tung a thugilou bawl zaw pen in Mosi tuh asawnhang a, koute tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia?
44007028	Zan a Aigupta mi na thah bang a hon thah tum na hi maw? achi hi.
44007029	Huai thu ziak in Mosi ataimangta a, Midian gam ah ataam nilouh a, huai ah tapa nih ava nei hi.
44007030	“Huan kum sawmli nung in Sinai Tang gamdai ah; loubuk ah meikuang lak ah angel khat akiang ah ahong kilak hi.
44007031	Mosi in amuh in, athil muh tuh lamdang asa mahmah a; huan en ding a apai lai in, Toupa aw in:
44007032	‘Kei na pipute Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian, Jakob' Pathian, ka hi,’ ana chi hi. Huchi in Mosi aling a a-en ngamta kei hi.
44007033	Huan Toupa'n akiang ah, ‘Na khepek a kipan na khetuam suah in; na dinna Mun Siangthou ahi,’ achi hi.
44007034	Aigupta gam a om ka mite gimdan ka mu gige hi, athum uh leng ka za gige, amau hunkhe ding in ka hong suk hi. Hong in, Aigupta gam ah ka hon sawl ding,” achi hi.
44007035	“Kou tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia, chi a adeih louh uh, Mosi, loubuk a angel kilak tungtawn in, Pathian in amah mah heutu leh hunkhepa hikhawm ding in asawlta hi.
44007036	Ama'n Aigupta gam ah Tuipi San leh gamdai mun ah, kum sawmli sung in thillamdang leh chiamtehnate amusak phot a, amaute apikheta ahi.
44007037	Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Pathian in keimah bang in, na unaute lak a mi zawlnei khat, athu na ngaihkhiak ding uh ahon bawlsak ding chipa Mosi ahi.
44007038	Hiai mi ahi gamdai a omkhawmte lak a ompa, Sinai Tang a angel in ahoupihpa leh i pipute kiang a ompa; huai mi eite hon piaksawn ding a thuhingte lasawnpa mah ahi.
44007039	“I pipute'n amah thu amang kei ua, ahua ua, Aaron kiang ah,
44007040	‘I makai ding in pathiante hon bawlsak in; Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Mosi lah atanchin ka thei nawnta kei uhi,’ chi in alungtang uh Aigupta gam lam ah anga nawnta uhi.
44007041	Huai lai in bawngnou lim abawl ua, amai a kithoihna alan ua amau khutsuak milim tung ah akipak uhi.
44007042	Huchi in Pathian in alehngatsan a, van a aksi abiak theihna ding un amaute akilehngat santa hi. Zawlnei laibu a, ‘Aw nou Israel inkote aw, gamdai ah kum sawmli sung in gan sisan a kithoih in thillat toh in kei na hon bia ua eita?
44007043	Molok biakna maitam leh na pathian uh, Remphan aksi leh, na milim bawltawmte uh, vialpuak in biak ding in na zong ua, huaiziak in Babulon kho khen lam ah sal in ka hon pomang ding,’ chih gelh bang in.
44007044	“I pi-le-pute'n gamdai ah theihpihna biakbuk, Mosi kiang a theihsak a a-om bang leh alim amuhsak bang in ana bawl uhi.
44007045	Huai biakbuk mah i pipute suansawnte'n leng aneisawn zel ua, Pathian in i pipute ma a Zentel adelhkhiakte gam aluah lai un, Joshua makaih in biakbuk alutpih uhi. David hong om tan in huai ah a-om gige a,
44007046	amah Pathian mitmuh a deihsakna tang, Jakob' Pathian a ding in inn bawlsak angen hi.
44007047	Himahleh Solomon in huai inn alamsak zawta hi.
44007048	“Himahleh zawlnei gen bang in khut a bawl innte ah Tungnungpen a-om kei;
44007049	“Toupa'n van ka tutphah ahi a, lei ka khepek ngakna ahi; inn bangchibang na hon lamsak ding ua? Ka khawlna mun ding koi mun ahia?
44007050	Hiai thilte keimah khut in ka bawl kei a hia?” chi a, agen bang in.
44007051	“Migenhakte, lungtang leh bil a zeksumlouhte aw, chik lai peuh in Kha Siangthou na dal gige uh; na pipute uh hih bang in na hih nilouh uhi.
44007052	Na pipute un zawlneite lak ah kua ahia asawi louh uh? Mi Diktak hong ding thu genkholte athat ua; huai midiktak mansakte leh thatte noumau na hi uhi.
44007053	Dan angelte piaksawn mu masa a zuiloute aw,” achi hi.
44007054	Huan huai thu azak un asin uh athakta a, Stephen tung ah aha uh agawita uhi.
44007055	Himahleh amah Kha Siangthou in adim a, van lam a-en a, Pathian thupina leh Pathian taklam a Jesu dingh amu hi.
44007056	“Ngai un, van kihong ka mu a, Pathian taklam a Mihing Tapa dingh leng ka mu,” achi hi.
44007057	Huchi in amau aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, abil uh ahum ua,
44007058	kituaktak in apang ua, khua a kipan adelhkhia ua, suang in adeng ua, atheihpihte'n tangval khat amin Saul khebul ah apuante uh akoihkhawm chiat uhi.
44007059	Amaute'n Stephen suang in adengta ua; ama'n Pathian sam in, “Toupa Jesu, ka kha la in,” achi hi.
44007060	Huan khukdin in aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Toupa, hiai akhelhna tung uah moh posak ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in huai agen zoh in, a-ihmuta hi.
44008001	Saul in leng asih hoih asa hi. Huai ni in Jerusalem a saptuam omte tung ah nakpitak in sawina atung a; sawltakte kia lou ngal Judia leh Samaria bial teng ah adalhzak vekta uhi.
44008002	Huan Pathian limsak kuate hiam in Stephen avui ua, nakpitak in asuun uhi.
44008003	Saul in bel saptuam pawlte asawi a, inn teng a lut in, numei pasal akaikhia a, suangkul ah akhum hi.
44008004	Huan adalhzakte kho teng ah apaita ua, thu agen zel uhi.
44008005	Samaria ah Philip ahohsuk a, akiang uah Khrist thu atangkoupih hi.
44008006	Huan athillamdang hihte azak ua, amuh un, mipite'n lungsim mun khat in, Philip thugente alimsakta uhi.
44008007	Dawi nin paimi tampi amatte uh sung a kipan in aw ngaihtak a kikou a pawt leh mizaw leh khebai tampi hihdam a a-om ziak un.
44008008	Huchi in huai khopi ah nakpitak a kipahna a-om hi.
44008009	Huan mi khat amin Simon a-om a; ama'n mithupi ka hi, chi in tuma lam in huai khua ah mitkhialdawi in Samaria khomite lamdang satak in abawl nilouh hi.
44008010	Mi tengteng, aneupen a pan alianpen tan in, “Hiai mi Pathian thilhihtheihna thupi achih uh ahi,” chi in athu alimsak chiat uhi.
44008011	Amitkhialdawi in sawtpi lamdang satak a abawl nak ziak in athu alimsak uhi.
44008012	Himahleh Philip in Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih leh Jesu Khrist min agen pen agintak tak un, numei leh pasalte'n baptisma atangta uhi.
44008013	Huan Simon nangawn in leng agingta a, baptisma atan zoh in Philip kiang ah a-om gige a, chiamtehna leh thillamdang thupite amu a, lamdang asa thei mahmah hi.
44008014	Huan sawltak Jerusalem a omte'n Samaria mite'n Pathian thu agingtata uh chih azak un, akiang uah Peter leh Johan asawl uhi.
44008015	Huai mite ava tunsuk uleh Kha Siangthou atantheihna ding un athumsak uhi.
44008016	Huai ma in alak uah kuamah tung ah atung nai kei a; Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang phet uhi.
44008017	Huan sawltakte'n atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, Kha Siangthou atangta uhi.
44008018	Huan sawltakte khut ngakna ziak a Kha Siangthou piak ahi chih Simon in amuh in; dangka piak asawm hi.
44008019	“Hichibang thuneihna hon pe sam un, kuapeuh tung a leng khut ka koihna in Kha Siangthou atan samna ding in,” achi hi.
44008020	Himahleh Peter in akiang ah, “Na dangka nang toh mangkhawm hen, Pathian thilpiak dangka sum a lei na tup ziak in.
44008021	Hiai thu ah nang zaw na pang kei, tan leng na nei kei hi; Pathian ngaih in na lungtang adik kei hi.
44008022	Huaiziak in hiai na gitlouhna tawpsan inla, Toupa kiang ah thum in, huchi in na lungtang a na ngaihtuah ahon ngaidam khamoh ding hiam.
44008023	Thil khakna sinkha ah leh gitlouh gaklopna ah na om chih ka thei hi,” achi hi.
44008024	Huan Simon in, “Na thil gen uh bangmah ka tung a hong tunlouhna ding in noumau in Toupa kiang ah hon thumsak un,” chi in adawng hi.
44008025	Huchi in amau Toupa thu atheihsak ua, agen zoh nung un, Jerusalem a kik nawn in, Samari mite tenna khua tampi ah tanchinhoih agen zel uhi.
44008026	Huan Toupa angel khat in Philip ahoupih a, “Thou inla, simlam a Jerusalem a kipan Gaza kho sunsuk lampi huai gamdai ah hoh in,” achi hi.
44008027	Huchi in athou a, apaita hi; huan ngai in, Ethiopia gam a mi khat, Ethiopia kumpinu Kandas gou tengteng kempa, michilgeh thuneitak, Jerusalem ah Pathian be ding in ahohtou hi.
44008028	Apaikik lam kangtalai a tu in zawlnei Isai laibu asim hi.
44008029	Huchi in Kha in Philip kiang ah, “Huai kangtalai va naih inla, va kithuahpih in,” achi hi.
44008030	Michilgeh kiang ah Philip ava tai a, zawlnei Isai laibu asim aza a, “Na laibu sim na theisiam hia?” achi hi.
44008031	Ama'n, “Kuamah hon hilhchet louh in bangchi in ka theisiam dia?” chi in akiang a kaltou a tutpih ding in Philip achialta hi.
44008032	Laisiangthou asim lai tuh hiai ahi: “Goh ding belam bang in amah api ua; belamnou amulmetpa ma a adaih dide bang in ama'n leng akam aka kei;
44008033	avuallelh lai in atung ah thugen aphal kei ua; asuante tanchin kua'n ahon gen ding ua? Khovel a kipan in ahinna alaksak ngal ua,” chi in.
44008034	Michilgeh in Philip ahoupih a akiang ah, “Zawlnei in hiai thu kua thu ahia agen, amah thu hia, midang thu? Ka hon dong hi,” achi hi.
44008035	Huan Philip in adawng a, Laisiangthou thu abul a pan in, akiang ah Jesu thu ahilhta hi.
44008036	Huan lampi a apai kawm un koi mun hiam tui omna khat atung ua; huan michilgeh in, “En dih, hiai ah tui a-om, baptisma ka tan ding bang in hon dal ahia?” achi hi.
44008037	Philip in, “Na lungtang tengteng a na gintakleh na hi thei,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Jesu Khrist, Pathian Tapa ahi chih ka gingta,” chi in adawng hi.
44008038	Huchi in kangtalai akhawlsak ua, anih un, Philip leh michilgeh, tui ah ahohkhawmsuk ua; huchi in ama'n abaptista hi.
44008039	Huan tui a pan apaitouh un Toupa Kha in Philip alamangta a; huan michilgeh in amah amu nawnta kei, nuamsatak in apai zel hi.
44008040	Himahleh Azotas ah Philip muh in a-om nawn hi; huan apaisuak kawm in Kaisaria atun masiah kho teng ah tanchinhoih agen zel hi.
44009001	Saul in Toupa nungzuite vau leh thah atup thu agen lailai man in siampu lianpen kiang ah ava hoh hi.
44009002	Damaskas a sinagog tengteng amite kiang a piak ding in lai angen a, hiai Lampi zui mi kuapeuh amuhleh, numei leh pasal leng, hen a Jerusalem a hon pitheihna ding in.
44009003	Huan apai lai in, Damaskas atun kuan in, thakhat in van a kipan vak akim ah ahong vak puap hi.
44009004	Huan lei ah apuk a, akiang ah, “Saul, Saul, bang achia nang hon sawi na hia?” chi in aw aza hi.
44009005	Huan ama'n, “Toupa, kua na hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na sawi Jesu ka hi; kilhna sikzum na tot nang ding in ahaksa hi,” achi hi.
44009006	Huan ling leh lamdang sa kawm in, “Toupa bang sem ding a hon deih na hiam?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, khopi ah lut in, huchi in na hih ding hilh in na om ding hi,” achi hi.
44009007	Atonpihte gen ding thei lou in adingh ua, aw zaw aza ua, himahleh kuamah amu kei uh.
44009008	Huan lei a kipan in Saul athou a; ahong hak a kuamah amutheita kei hi; huchi in akhut in akai ua, Damaskas ah apilut uhi.
44009009	Huan ni thum kho mu lou in a-om a, bangmah ne in adawn kei hi.
44009010	Huan Damaskas ah amin Ananias nungzui khat a-om hi. Toupa'n mengmu bang in akiang ah, “Ananias,” achi hi.
44009011	Huan ama'n, “En in, Toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, Kongzing Tang achih uah hoh inla, Judas inn ah, Tarsas khomi, amin Saul kichi kankhia in. Ngai in, athum laitak ahi.
44009012	Ama'n mengmuhna in mi khat amin Ananias akiang ava lut a, amit hihvakna ding a atung akhut nga in amuta hi,” achi hi.
44009013	Ananias in, “Toupa huai mi Jerusalem a na misiangthoute tung a atatsiat thu mi tampi kam ah ka za hi.
44009014	Huan hiai ah na min lou peuhmah hen ding in siampu liante a kipan thuneihna toh hong pai ahi,” chi in adawng hi.
44009015	Himahleh Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hoh mai in; Zentelte, kumpipate leh Israel suante kiang a ka min polut ding a ka belseh ahi.
44009016	Ka min ziak in gimna bangchi a thupi ahia athuak ding akiang ah ka theisak ding,” achi hi.
44009017	Huan Ananias ava hoh a, inn ah alut a, huan atung ah akhut anga a, “Unau Saul, na mitvakna ding leh Kha Siangthou dim a na omtheihna ding in, Toupa, na hong paina lampi a na kiang a kilak Jesu'n hon sawl ahi,” achi hi.
44009018	Huan thakhat in amit a kipan lip bang aketa a, amit avak nawnta a; athou a, huan baptisma atangta hi.
44009019	Huan an ane a, ahalhta hi. Huan Damaskas a nungzui omte kiang ah ni bangzah hiam ataam hi.
44009020	Huan Sinagog ah, “Jesu, Pathian Tapa” ahihdan thu atangkoupih zui ngal hi.
44009021	Huan athu zate tengteng in lamdang asa ua, “Hiai mipa Jerusalem a hiai minloute sawi zelpa ahi kei a hia? Huai mite siampu liante kiang a hensa a piak sawm a hong hohpa hilou hia?” achi uhi.
44009022	Saul bel ahong hattuam a, huai mi Khrist ahi taktak chih ahilhchian a, Damaskas a Juda omte gen ding bei in akoih hilhial hi.
44009023	Huan ni sawttak nung in Saul that ding in Judate akihou uhi.
44009024	Himahleh ama'n athiltup uh ana thei hi. Huan amah thah tum in kulh kong teng ah sun leh zan in atang uhi.
44009025	Himahleh anungzuite'n zan in api ua, kulh tohlet ah bawm in akhaikheta uhi.
44009026	Huan Jerusalem a Saul atuntak in nungzuite kithuahpih atum a; amau bel avek un amah akihta ua, nungzui ahih sam agingta kei uhi.
44009027	Barnabas in amah api a, sawltakte kiang ah apaipih a, lampi a Toupa amuh a, ahoupihdan bang, Damaskas a Jesu min a hangtak a thu ahilhdan khawng leng akiang uah agenta hi.
44009028	Huchi in Jerusalem ah Saul tuh akiang uah lut zel pawt zel in a-omta a, Toupa min in hangsantak in thu agen zel hi.
44009029	Huan Grik pau zang Judate kiang ah thu agen a, asel a; amau bel amah hihlup atum uhi.
44009030	Huan unaute'n huai atheihtak un, Kaisaria ah apisuk ua, Tarsas ah asawlmangta uhi.
44009031	Huchi in saptuamte Judia, Galili leh Samaria gam kimvel ah akip deuhdeuh ua, muangtak in a-omta ua; huan Toupa laudan siam kawm in, Kha Siangthou khamuan in a-om ua, ahong pung deuhdeuh uhi.
44009032	Huan Peter in kho kim atot vialvial kawm in, Lidda a Mi Siangthou omte kiang ah leng ahohsuk hi.
44009033	Huai ah mi khat amin Ainias, azawt ziak a kum giat lupna a lumden amu hi.
44009034	Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Ainias aw, Jesu Khrist in ahon hihdam, thou inla, na awngphah zial in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou pahta hi.
44009035	Huan Lidda khua leh Sharon phai a omte tengteng in Ainias amu ua, Toupa lam anga duam uhi.
44009036	Huan Joppa ah amin Tabitha nungzui khat a-om a, Tabitha minkhiakna tuh Dorkas ahi, huai numei in thil hihhoih leh thilpiak ahau mahmah hi.
44009037	Huai lai in, achi ana a, asi hi; huchi in asilsiang ua, indan tungnung ah asial uhi.
44009038	Huan Lidda khua tuh Joppa kho kiang ahih ziak in, nungzuite'n Peter huai ah a-om chih aza ua, “Sawt hal lou in ka kiang uah hong pai in,” chi a va thum ding in akiang ah mi nih asawl uhi.
44009039	Huan Peter athou a akiang uah apaita hi. Huan atuntak in indan tungnung ah api ua; meithai tengteng dingh in, akiang ua Dorkas a-om lai a apuanak bawlte, apuan bawlte lak kawm in akap chiat uhi.
44009040	Himahleh Peter in avek un apawtsak a, akhukdin a, athumta hi; huan luanglam anga a, “Tabitha, thou in,” achi hi. Huchi in amit ahong hak a, Peter amuhtak in atutou hi.
44009041	Huan Peter in akhut apia a, akaithou hi, misiangthoute leh meithaite asam a, hingdam in apeta hi.
44009042	Huan huai Joppa kho tengteng in athei vek ua; mi tampi in Toupa agingta uhi.
44009043	Huan Joppa ah savunbawlpa Simon inn ah ni tampitak Peter ataam nilouh hi.
44010001	Kaisaria ah mi khat amin Kornelia a-om a; amah Itali pawl achih uh, huai pawl a sepaih zaheutupa ahi.
44010002	Amah Pathian limsakmi ahi a, a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Pathian laudan asiam uhi, mite kiang ah thilthawnpiak tampi ape zel a, Pathian kiang ah leng athum gige hi.
44010003	Hiai mi'n sun dak kuana ding khawng in mengmuhna in Pathian angel khat akiang ah alut a, “Kornelia” chi a asap lai chiangtak in amu hi.
44010004	Huan Kornelia in lau in amah ana en kilkel a, “Toupa, bang ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na thumnate leh na thilpiakte theihgigena ding in Pathian ma ah atungtouta hi.
44010005	Tu'n ah Joppa khua ah mi sawl inla, mi khat Simon Peter achih uh va pisak in;
44010006	amah huai tuipi gei a om, savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi a, ama'n na hih ding hon na hilh ding hi,” achi hi.
44010007	Ahoupihpa angel apaitak in, Kornelia in asikhate lak a mi nih leh anek bawl gigete lak a Pathian limsak sepaih khat asam hi.
44010008	Thu tengteng akiang ua ahilh khit in Joppa khua ah asawlta hi.
44010009	Huan azing nawn in, khopi zuan a pai, khua atun kuan un, thum ding in dak gukna vel in intung ah Peter akaltou hi.
44010010	Huan agil ahong kial mahmahta a, an nek a-utta hi; himahleh nek ding abawl lai un ihmu bang in zeel in ahong om hi.
44010011	Van kihong in, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang, ning li a khih, lei a luai a khaikhiak a om in amu hi.
44010012	Huai sung ah leitung a khe li nei ganhing chi chih leh gamsa leh ganhing bokvak, tungleng vasa chichihte a-om uhi.
44010013	Huan akiang ah aw in, “Peter, thou in gou inla, ne in,” achi hi.
44010014	Himahleh Peter in, “Toupa hilou e; siang lou leh nin bangmah himhim ka ne ngei kei,” achi hi.
44010015	Aw in, anihveina in, “Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n,” achi hi.
44010016	Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan van ah bawm khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi.
44010017	Huan Peter in mengmu bang a amuh theisiam lou a, abuai lai in, Kornelia mi sawlte'n Simon inn ana kankhia ua,
44010018	kongkhak bul ah ana dingh ua asam ua, “Simon, Peter achih uh, huai a atun leh tun louh,” ana dong uhi.
44010019	Peter in mengmu bang a amuh angaihtuah lai inla, Kha in akiang ah, “Ngai in, mi thum in ahong zong uh.
44010020	Huaiziak in thou inla, kumsuk in, bangmah ginglel lou in amaute zui in; amau ka sawl ahi uh,” achi hi.
44010021	Huchi in Peter huai mite kiang ah ahohsukta a, akiang uah, “Ngai un na mizon uh ka hi; bang ahia na hong nasan uh?” achi hi.
44010022	Amau, “Angel siangthou khat in, Kornelia, sepaih zaheutupa, midiktak, Pathian laudan siam, Juda nam tengteng lak a mihoih kiang ah, na thugen azakna ding in, a-inn ah nangmah sam ding in ahilh hi,” achi uhi.
44010023	Huchi in mite asamlut a, agiaksakta hi. Huan azing in Peter athou a, akiang uah apai a, Joppa khomi unau kuate hiam leng akiang uah apai sam uhi.
44010024	Huan azing nawn in Kaisaria ah alutta uhi. Kornelia in, asanggamte leh alawm deihpente samkhawm in, amau ana ngak nilouh hi.
44010025	Peter ahong lut dek laitak in Kornelia in ana dawn a, akhebul a bokkhup in, abia hi.
44010026	Himahleh Peter in amah akaithou a, dingh in, “Kei leng mihing mai ka hi,” achi hi.
44010027	Amah toh kihou kawm in alut a, mi tampi omkhawm amu hi.
44010028	Akiang uah, “Juda mi namdang toh kithuah leh pai asianlouhdan noumau mah in na thei uhi; himahleh kuamah siang lou leh nin ka chih ding ahi kei chih Pathian in ahon theisak hi.
44010029	Huaiziak in na hong saptak in sel lou in ka hong pai hi. Huchi in ka hon dong ahi, bangziak a hon sam na hi ua le?” achi hi.
44010030	Huan Kornelia in, “Ni li ahita, tu hun bang tan in, ka inn ah, dak kuana hun thumna ah ka thum a; ngai in, ka ma ah puan vaktak silh mi khat ahong dingh a,
44010031	‘Kornelia, na thumna zak in a-omta, mi kiang a na thilthawnpiakte leng Pathian in atheigige hi.
44010032	Huaiziak in Joppa ah Simon, Peter achih uh, sam ding in mi sawl inla, na kiang ah sam in; amah tuipi gei ah savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi, amah ahong tun chiang in na kiang ah thu agen ding hi,’ achi hi.
44010033	Huaiziak in na kiang ah mi ka hon sawl pah hi; na hong pai ahoih ahi. Huchi in Toupa'n thu ahon piak peuhmah thei ding in tu'n ah Pathian mitmuh in i vek un hiai ah i om uhi,” achi hi.
44010034	Huan Peter in agen a, “Pathian in mi deihsak tuam anei kei chih, diktak in ka thei hi.
44010035	Himahleh nam chih lak ah kuapeuh amah kihtakdan siam a, diktak a gamta peuhmah, apahtak mi ahi naknak uhi.
44010036	Ama'n khamuanna tanchinhoih, Jesu Khrist tungtawn in Israel suante kiang ah agen a (amah mi tengteng Toupa ahi),
44010037	Johan in atangkou pihpih baptisma nung in, hiai tanchinhoih, Galili gam a kipan ahong thang pan a, Judia gam tengteng ah athangsuak a, noumau leng na thei uhi.
44010038	Nazaret Jesu tungtang thu, huchi a Pathian in amah Kha Siangthou leh thilhihtheihna a athaunilhdan, Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in amah mi tung a thil hoih hih leh diabol gawt tengteng hihdam in avialvak vak hi.
44010039	Judate gam ah leh Jerusalem a athilhih tengteng theihpihte ka hi uh, amah sing dawn ah khai in athat uhi.
44010040	Amah Pathian in ani thum ni in akaithou nawn a, chiantak in akitheisak hi.
44010041	Himahleh mi tengteng kiang ah ahi kei, Pathian in theihpih dia asehkholhte kiang kia ah ahi koute, misi lak a kipan athohnawn nung a akiang a ne a dawnte kiang ah.
44010042	Amah misi leh mihingte tung a Vaihawmpa dia Pathian seh ahi chih, mi kiang a tangkoupih leh theisak ding in Pathian in thu ahon pia hi.
44010043	Kuapeuh amah gingta amin ziak in khelhnate ngaihdam in a-om ding uh chih hiai a tanchin zawlnei tengteng in ana theihsak det uh ahi,” achi hi.
44010044	Peter in huai thu agen laitak in thuzate tengteng tung ah Kha Siangthou ahong tung hi.
44010045	Zeksumte lak a agingtate Peter hon zui peuhmah in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak Zentelte tung ah leng sunbuak ahih ziak in lamdang asa mahmah uhi.
44010046	Paute a thu gen in Pathian phat in aza uhi.
44010047	Huan Peter in apuang a, “Hiai mite, eimah bang a Kha Siangthou tang sam, baptisma ding in tui zat kuama'n akham thei dia hia?” achi hi.
44010048	Huchi in Toupa min a baptisma tan ding thu apia hi. Huai khit in ni bangzah hiam taam ding in akhou uhi.
44011001	Huan Judia gam a sawltak leh unau omte'n Zentelte'n leng Pathian thu agingta uh chih azata uhi.
44011002	Huchi in Peter, Jerusalem atuntouhtak in, zeksumte'n akiang ah,
44011003	“Zeksumloute inn ah lut in, akiang uah na ne,” chi in akalhta uhi.
44011004	Himahleh Peter in abul a kipan in kizom zel in akiang uah ahilhchian hi.
44011005	“Joppa ah thum in ka om a, huan ihmu bang in ka om a, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang aning li a kikhih, van a kipan khiaksuk bang in ka mu a; ka kiang ngeingei ahong tung hi.
44011006	Huai tuh ka en kilkel a, ka ngaihtuah a, ‘Lei a ganhing khe li nei leh gamsate chi chih, awm a kitholh ganhingte leh tungleng vasate ka mu hi.’
44011007	Huan aw in, ‘Peter, thou in; gou inla, ne in, hon chi in’ ka za hi.
44011008	Himahleh ke'n, ‘Toupa, hilou e, siang lou leh nin bangmah ka kam ah alut ngei kei,’ ka chi hi.
44011009	Himahleh van a kipan aw in, anihveina in, ‘Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n,’ chi in ahon dawng hi.
44011010	Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan bangkim van ah khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi.
44011011	Huan ngai in, mi thum Kaisaria a kipan ka kiang ah ahon sawl ua, ka omna inn kong ah ana dingh nilouh uhi.
44011012	Huan Kha in kuamah khentuam nei lou a amau zui ding in ahon sawl hi. Hiai unau guk in leng ahon zui sam ua, huai mi inn ah ka lutta uhi.
44011013	Huan ama'n ka kiang uah, a-inn a angel kilak amuhdan leh angel in akiang a, Joppa ah mi sawl a, Simon Peter achih uh, pisak ding leh;
44011014	‘Ama'n thu ahon hilh ding a, huai mi thu in nang leh na inkuanpihte hotdam in na om ding uh’ achihdan leng ahon hilh hi.
44011015	Huan thu ka gen patleh, achil a eite tung a ahong tun bang mah in, atung uah Kha Siangthou ahong tungta hi.
44011016	Toupa thu, Johan in tui in abaptis zel; himahleh nou zaw Kha Siangthou a baptis in na om ding uh achih ka hon theikhe nawn uhi.
44011017	Huchi in Toupa Jesu Khrist i gintak ua, Pathian in thilthawnpiak ahon piak amaute kiang a apiak sam, kei Pathian sel vual ka hi a hia?” achi hi.
44011018	Huai thu azak un adaita ua, huchi ahihleh, “Pathian in Zentelte leng hing ding a kisik phalta ahi ve maw,” chi in Pathian aphat uhi.
44011019	Huan Stephen ziak a sawina thuak dalhzakte, Phoinisia gam, Kupra tuikulh leh Antiok khua pha in apai ua, Judate kiang kia ah lou ngal kuamah kiang ah thu agen kei uhi.
44011020	Himahleh alak ua akhen tuh Kupra tuikulh leh Kurini a mite ahi ua, huai mite'n Antiok khua atun un Grikte leng ahoupih ua, Toupa Jesu tanchinhoih ahilh samta uhi.
44011021	Huan Toupa khut in amaute apanpih a; mi tampi in agingta ua, Toupa lam ahong nga chiatta uhi.
44011022	Huan atanchin thu uh Jerusalem a saptuam omte bil ah alutta a; huchi in Antiok kho pha in Barnabas asawlkhia uhi.
44011023	Amah ava tung a, Pathian hehpihdan amuh in akipak a, phatuamngaitak in Toupa len gige ding in avek un ahanthawn hi.
44011024	Barnabas mihoihtak ahi a, Kha Siangthou leh ginna a dim ahi. Huan Toupa kiang ah mi tampi a behlap in a-omta uhi.
44011025	Huan Saul zong ding in Tarsas ah Barnabas ahoh hi.
44011026	Amuh in Antiok ah ahon pi hi. Huan kum khat hilhial saptuamte kikhopna ah apang zel ua, mi tampi leng thu ahilh uhi. Antiok ah ahi nungzuite, “Khristian,” achih masakpen uh.
44011027	Huai lai in zawlnei kuahiam Jerusalem a kipan in Antiok ah ahohsuk hi.
44011028	Alak ua mi khat amin Agabas kichi adingh a, khovel tengteng ah kial thupitak atung dek chih Kha hilh in atheisak a; huai kial tuh Klaudias vaihawm lai in ahong tungta hi.
44011029	Huchi in nungzuite'n atheihdan chiat un Judia gam a unau omte kiang ah panpihna khak atum uhi.
44011030	Huai tuh ahihta ngei uhi, Barnabas leh Saul khut ah upate kiang ah akhak uhi.
44012001	Huai lai in Kumpipa Herod in saptuamte lak a kuate hiam hihgim tum in akhut alikta hi.
44012002	Huan Jakob, Johan unau, namsau in asatlum hi.
44012003	Huai in Judate akipaksak chih atheih in, Peter leng mat atum zel hi. Huai ni tuh Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ni ahi.
44012004	Huan amat nung in suangkul ah akhum a, sepaih pawl li, li chiat zel in, akivenkhelsak hi; Paikan Ankuanglui nung in mi tengteng kiang ah pikhiak atum hi.
44012005	Huaiziak in suangkul ah Peter a-omsak tadih hi; himahleh, saptuamte'n amah a ding in phatuamngaitak in Pathian kiang ah athumsak uhi.
44012006	Herod in apikhiak ding zan in sepaih nih kikal ah khainiang nih bun in Peter a-ihmu a; avengte kongkhak bul a om in suangkul aveng uhi.
44012007	Ngai in, Toupa angel khat akiang ah ahong dingh a, suangkul sung ah vak ahong tang hi; huan Peter nak ah abenghalh a, “Thou meng in,” achi hi. Huan akhut a kipan khainiangte atolhkhesuk hi.
44012008	Huan angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silh inla, na khetuam bun in,” achi hi. Huan ama'n huchibang in ahih hi. Angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silhhoih inla, hon zui in,” achi hi.
44012009	Huan Peter apawt a azuita hi, angel tatdan atak hia ahih athei kei, mengmu bang a amuh hiam akisa hi.
44012010	Huan chingmi masa leh azom akhen nung un, khopi lutna sik kongpi ava tung ua, huai tuh amau a ding in akihong tawmta hi; huan apawt ua, kongzing khat akheng ua; huai a kipan angel in amah paisanta hi.
44012011	Huan Peter ahalhtak in, “Herod khut leh Juda mite lametna tengteng a kipan a hunkhe ding a Toupa'n a-angel hon sawlkhia ahi chih tu in diktak in ka theita,” achi hi.
44012012	Huan akingaihtuah khit in, Johan, Marka achih uh, huai nu Mari inn ah ava hoh a; huai ah thum in mi tampi ana omkhawm uhi.
44012013	Kongpi kongkhak a kiuhtak in, nungak khat amin Rhoda, adawng ding in ava hoh hi.
44012014	Peter aw azaktak in akipah ziak in kong hon lou in atailut nawn a, kongkhak bul ah Peter adingh chih ava gen hi.
44012015	Himahleh amau akiang ah, “Ahai na hita ve,” ana chi uhi. Ama'n bel, “Hi petmah ahi,” chi in apang teitei hi. Amau, “A-angel hi in teh,” achi lai uhi.
44012016	Himahleh Peter in kongkhak akiukiu a; ahon ualeh amah amu ua, lamdang asa uhi.
44012017	Huchi in ama'n amaute dai ding in akhutvan a, Pathian in suangkul a kipan amah apikhiakdan ahilhta hi. “Hiai thute Jakob leh unaute kiang ah va hilh un,” achi hi. Huan apawt a mun dang ah ava pai hi.
44012018	Ni ahong suahtak in, Peter tung a bang thil tung hiam, chi in buai chihtak in sepaihte abuai uhi.
44012019	Huan Herod in amah azong a amu kei, avengtute a-enchian a, thah ding in thu apeta hi. Huan Judia gam a kipan Kaisaria ah ahohsuk a, huai ah a-om nilouh hi.
44012020	Huan Tura leh Sidon a mite tung ah Herod alung hi kei mahmah hi; amau thukhat sat in Blastas, kumpipa lupna ngakpa, alawm in abawl ua, kumpipa kiang ah hong pai ua, amah a kipan nek-le-dawn ngah zel ahih ziak un akholamte uh toh kilemna angen uhi.
44012021	Huan ani chiam ni in kumpipa Herod in kumpi puan asilh a, alaltutphah a tu in akiang uah thu agen hi.
44012022	Mi tengteng in, “Hiai pathian aw ahi, mihing aw ahi kei,” achi ua, akikou zuazua uhi.
44012023	Ama'n Pathian kiang a thupina apiak louh ziak in Toupa Angel in amah aman pah a, hut in ane a, asita hi.
44012024	Pathian thu bel adalh a, apung zel hi.
44012025	Barnabas leh Saul in nna asep khit un, Jerusalem a kipan akik nawnta ua, Johan, amin dang Marka achih uh leng atonpih uhi.
44013001	Antiok a saptuam omte lak ah zawlnei leh thuhilhmi kuate hiam a-om ua; huaite Barnabas, Niger achih uh Simeon, Kurini khomi Lusias, kumpipa Herod toh khangkhawm Manaen leh Saul ahi uhi.
44013002	Huan Toupa nna sem a an angolh lai un, Kha Siangthou in, “Barnabas leh Saul ka sapna nna sem ding in kei a ding in hon koihtuamsak un,” achi hi.
44013003	Huchi in an angawl ua, athum khit un atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, apaisakta uhi.
44013004	Huchi in Kha Siangthou sawlkhiak in apai ua, Seliusia ah ahohsuk ua, huai a kipan in Kupra tuikulh ah long in apai uhi.
44013005	Salamis a a-om lai un Judate sinagog ah Pathian thu agen ua; Johan leng amaute panpih ding in atonpih uhi.
44013006	Huan tuikulh gam Paphos kho pha in anawksuak ua, bumsiam, zawlnei tak lou, Juda mi khat amu ua, amin tuh Bar Jesu ahi.
44013007	Huai mi gam-ukpa Serjia Paulus, mipiltak kiang a om ahi. Huai gam-ukpa'n Barnabas leh Saul asam a, Pathian thu zak atum hi.
44013008	Himahleh bumsiam Elimas, (huai tuh ama minkhiakna ahi a), amau nasep dal in ginna a kipan gam-ukpa heimang atum hi.
44013009	Huchi in Saul, Paul leng kichi; Kha Siangthou in adim a, amah a-ensal hi.
44013010	“Nang, mi khem leh huathuai chiteng a dim diabol tapa, diktatna tengteng melmapa aw, Toupa lam diktatte hihsiat na tawp kei ding maw?
44013011	Thei in, tu in Toupa khut na tung ah atu hi, na mit ahong taw ding a, bang tan hiam khovak na mu kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in khomui leh mial in amah akhuh pah a, khut a kai ding mi zong in amai puampuam hi.
44013012	Huan gam-ukpa'n huai thilhih amu a, Toupa sinsakna lamdang asa mahmah a, agingtata hi.
44013013	Paul, atonpihte toh Paphos a kipan in long in apai ua, Pamphilia gam a Perga khua atung uhi; huai ah Johan in amaute paisan in, Jerusalem ah akiksan hi.
44013014	Himahleh amau Perga a kipan apai zel ua, Pisidia gam a Antiok khua atung uhi; huan Sabbath ni in sinagog ah alut ua, atu uhi.
44013015	Dan leh zawlneite laibu asim khit un, sinagog upate'n akiang uah mi asawl ua, “Unaute aw, mite hanthawnna thu banghiam na neih uleh gen un,” achi uhi.
44013016	Huan Paul adingh a, akhut a zap in agen a, “Israel mite leh Pathian laudan siamte aw, ngai un.
44013017	Hiai Israel chite Pathian in i pipute atel a, Aigupta gam a ataam lai un ahih thupi mahmah a, ban thahat in amaute huai a kipan in apikheta hi.
44013018	Huan kum sawmli gamdai ah athilhihte uh athuak teitei hi.
44013019	Kanaan gam a nam sagihte ahihsiat khit in, agam uh aisan a hawm in, aluah ding un apia hi.
44013020	Huaite nung kum zali-le-sawmnga sung teng, zawlnei Samuel hun tan in vaihawmte ape zel hi.
44013021	Huan huai nung in kumpipa angen ua; Pathian in, Saul kichi, Benjamin nam a Kish tapa, kum sawmli sung amau apia hi.
44013022	Amah asuanmang nung in akumpipa ding un David abawlta hi; Pathian in huai thu theisak in, David, Jesse tapa, ka lungtang bang pumi ka mukheta, ama'n ka deihlam ahih ding,” achi hi.
44013023	Hiai mi suan a kipan in Pathian in athuchiam bang in Israelte kiang ah Hondampa, Jesu kichi ahon dinkhia hi.
44013024	Amah ahong pai ma in Johan in kisikna baptisma thu Israel mi tengteng kiang ah ana hilh masa hi.
44013025	Huan Johan in asep ding azoh kuan in, “Noute'n kei kua na hon sa ua? Amah zaw ka hi kei hi. Himahleh ngai un, ka nung ah mi khat ahong pai dek, kei zaw akhepek a khetuam phel tak leng ka hi kei,” achi hi.
44013026	“Mite leh unaute, Abraham suante leh Pathian laudan siam Zentelte tengteng aw, noute kiang ah hiai hotdamna thu piak in a-omta hi.
44013027	Jerusalem a omte leh amakaite un, amah atheih louh ziak ua siam louh atansak lai un, zawlneite thute Sabbath teng a asimte uh tangtungsak ana hi uhi.
44013028	Asihna ding khop atung a bangmah amuh louh nung un leng, Pilat kiang ah hihlup ding in angen uhi.
44013029	Huan athu zawlneite'n agelhkholh tengteng uh ahihtangtun khit un, sing a kipan in alakhia ua, han ah asialta uhi.
44013030	Himahleh Pathian in misi lak a kipan akaithou nawnta hi.
44013031	Huchi in Galili gam a kipan Jerusalem a amah toh hohtoute kiang ah ni sawtpi akilak a; huai mite mah mi kiang a athu theihpihte ahi uhi.
44013032	Kou leng pipute kiang ah huai thuchiam a Tanchin kipahhuai ka hon puangzak uhi.
44013033	Huchi a Pathian in Jesu akaihthoh, ei atate kiang ah huai thuchiam tuh ahihtangtung hi. Sam nihna ah, ‘Nang zaw ka tapa na hi a, tuni in ka hon neikhia hi,’ chih gelh bang in.
44013034	Muatna mun a pai nawn lou ding in Pathian in amah misi lak a kipan akaihthohdan ding hiai bang in agen hi, David kiang a hehpihna ka chiamte nangmah ka hon pe ding,” chi in.
44013035	“Huaiziak in Sam dang ah, ‘Na Mi Siangthou muatmang na phal kei ding,’ achi behlap hi.
44013036	David zaw, Pathian vai hawmsak bang in ama khang hun a nna asep khit in, a-ihmu a, apipute kiang ah asial ua, amuatmangta hi.
44013037	Himahleh Pathian kaihthoh pen in zaw muatna amu kei hi.
44013038	Huchi in unaute aw thei un; amah ziak in khelhna ngaihdamna thu na kiang ua gen ahi.
44013039	Kuapeuh agingta tuh bangkim ah amah siamtansak in a-om, huai lah Mosi Dan in siamtansak in na om thei kei uhi.
44013040	Huaiziak in pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw zawlneite a agen uh na tung uah ahong tung kha ding hi.”
44013041	“Musitte aw, en un, lamdang sa unla, mangthang un; na damsung un nna khat ka sem hi, huai nna mi'n hon hilh mah le uh, na gingta kei hial ding uhi, chih,” achi hi.
44013042	Huan apawt un, Sabbath nawn chiang a huai thute gen nawn ding in angen uhi.
44013043	Huan omkhawmte akikhentak un, Judate leh phungkaite Pathian limsak lak a mi tampi in Paul leh Barnabas azui zel ua; amau ana houpih ua, Pathian hehpihna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi.
44013044	Huan Sabbath nawn in akhozang phial un Pathian thu ngaikhe ding in ahong kikhawm uhi.
44013045	Himahleh Judate'n mipite amuhtak un ahaza mahmah ua; Paul thugente kalh in agensia uhi.
44013046	Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in hangsantak in adawng ua, “Pathian thu noumau kiang ah gen masak ding him ahi; himahleh na nial ua, tangtawn a hing tak lou a na kiseh nung un, thei un, Zentelte lam ka ngata uh,” achi uhi.
44013047	Huchibang in Toupa'n thu ahon pia hi, “Zentelte hihvakpa ding in ka hon sep a, kawlmong pha a Hondampa dia na omtheihna ding in, chih gelh bang in,” achi hi.
44013048	Zentelte'n huai thu azak un, akipak ua, Toupa thu apahtawi ua, tangtawn a hing ding a sehkholh peuhmah in agingta uhi.
44013049	Toupa thu huai gam kimvel ah adalhta hi.
44013050	Himahleh Judate'n numei zahtakhuai Pathian limsakte leh kho upate hanthawn in, Paul leh Barnabas soisasak in, agam ua kipan adelhkhia uhi.
44013051	Amau leng atung uah akhepek ua leivui asingkhia ua, Ikoniam ah apaita uhi.
44013052	Huan nungzuite kipahna leh Kha Siangthou in adim chiat uhi.
44014001	Ikoniam ah Judate sinagog ah alutkhawm ua, thu agen zel uhi, huchi in Judate leh Grik mipi tampi in leng agingtata uhi.
44014002	Himahleh agingta nuam lou Judate'n Zentelte lungsim atokthou ua, unaute ahosak uhi.
44014003	Huaiziak in Toupa ah hangtak a thu gen in huai ah sawt sim a-om uhi. Ama'n chiamtehna leh thillamdangte akhut ua hihsak in, ahehpihna thu atheisak zel hi.
44014004	Himahleh khua a mipite akilangta ua, akhen in Judate agum ua, akhen in sawltakte agum uhi.
44014005	Zentelte leh Judate aheutute uh toh pangkhawm in sawltakte simmohhuaitak a bawl a suang a den atup lai un,
44014006	amau ana thei ua, Likonia gam mah, Listra leh Darbi ah leh akim gam ah ataimang uhi.
44014007	Huai ah tanchinhoih agen zom zel uhi.
44014008	Listra ah khezaw kuahiam atu a, apian tung a pan khebai him ahi a, khe in apai ngei kei hi.
44014009	Huai mi'n Paul thugen angaikhia a; huan Paul in a-en gegu a, damna ding in ginna anei chih athei a, aw ngaihtak in, “Na khe in dingtang in,” achi hi.
44014010	Huan amah atawm a, khe in apaita hi.
44014011	Mipite'n Paul thilhih amuh un, Likonia pau in aw ngaihtak in, “Mihing melpu in i kiang uah pathiante ahong sukta uh e!” achi uhi.
44014012	Amaute'n Barnabas pen, “Jupiter” achi ua, Paul bel thugenpi pen ahih ziak in, “Hermes” achi uhi.
44014013	Huan Jupiter siampu, khopi lutna a atempul om in, bawngtalte leh pakkhigui limte kongpi ah ahon tawi a, mipite toh biakna ding in lat atum uhi.
44014014	Himahleh sawltak Barnabas leh Paul in huai azak un, apuan uh abotkek ua, mipi lak ah adianglut ua, akikou uhi.
44014015	“Pute aw, hiai thilte bangziak a hih na hi ua? Kou leng noumau hindan toh kibang pu, mihing ka hi ve ua le; hiai thil ginaloute na kiheisan ua, van, lei, tuipi leh asung ua om tengteng bawlpa Pathian hing kiang a na hong kiheina ding un tanchinhoih ka hon tun uhi.
44014016	Pathian in nidanglai in nam chih amau lampi chiat zuih aphal hi.
44014017	Himahleh amah theihsakna om lou in akibawl kei, huchi in thil ahihhoih zel a, van a kipan in vuahtui ahon pia a, na lungtang uh nek ding leh kipahna a hihdim gige akei hiam,” achi uhi.
44014018	Huchi in huai thu in mipite'n amaute biakna dia gan agoh ding uh akhamzou teitei hi.
44014019	Himahleh Antiok leh Ikoniam ah Juda mi kuate hiam ahong ua, mipite akhempukta uhi; huchi in suang in Paul adeng ua, si hi a agintak ziak un khua a kipan akaikhia uhi.
44014020	Himahleh nungzuite akim a adin lai un, ahong thou a, khua ah alut nawnta hi. Huan azing in Barnabas toh Darbi ah apaita uhi.
44014021	Huan huai khuate kiang ah tanchinhoih ahilh ua, nungzui tampi abawl nung un Listra, Ikoniam leh Antiok khua ah akik nawn uhi.
44014022	Gim tampi thuak in Pathian lalgam i lut ding ahi him ahi, chi in nungzuite lungsim ahihkip ua, ginna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi.
44014023	Huan saptuam pawl teng ah upate asehsak ua, an ngawl kawm a athum khit un, agin uh Toupa kiang ah akemsak zelzel uhi.
44014024	Pisidia gam atawnsuak ua, Pamphilia gam atung uhi.
44014025	Perga a thu agen khit un Attalia ah ahohsuk uhi.
44014026	Huai a kipan in long in apawt ua, Antiok khua ahong tung nawnta uhi. Huai mun ahi tua athilhih khitsa uh hih ding a unaute'n Pathian hehpihna a kemsak a asawlkhiakna uh.
44014027	Huan a tun nung un asaptuamte asamkhawm ua, Pathian in, amaute zang a athilhihte leh Zentelte a dia ginna kongkhak ahonsakdan ahilh uhi.
44014028	Huan nungzuite kiang ah sawt sim a-om uhi.
44015001	Mi kuate hiam Judia gam a kipan in ahong suk ua unaute kiang ah, “Mosi Dan bang a zek na sum kei uleh hotdam na hi thei kei ding uh,” chi in ahong gen uhi.
44015002	Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in amaute kalh in nakpitak a kisel a akilan ziak un, huai thubuai tungtang a Jerusalem a sawltakliante leh upate va mu ding in Paul leh Barnabas, leh alak ua kuate hiam asep uhi.
44015003	Huchi in saptuamte'n ava kha ua, amau Zentelte hong kikhekdan thu gen zel in, Phoinisia gam leh Samaria gam atawnsuakta uh; huchi in unaute tengteng akipaksak mahmah uhi.
44015004	Jerusalem atuntouh un saptuam pawlte, sawltakte, upate'n ana kipahpih ua; Pathian in amau zang a athilhihte apuangkhe zelzel uhi.
44015005	Himahleh Pharisai pawl a mi gingta kuate hiam akisa ua, “Zentelte zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan azuih chiat ding uh ahi,” achi uhi.
44015006	Huan sawltakliante leh upate, huai thu ngaihtuah ding in akikhawm uhi.
