44015007	Nakpi a akisel nung un Peter adingtou a, akiang uah, “Mite leh unaute aw, Zentelte'n keimah kam a tanchinhoih thu za a gingta ding a, Pathian in nidanglai a na lak ua kipan ahon sehdan na thei uhi.
44015008	Lungsim theipa Pathian in eite hon piak bang mah in Kha Siangthou akiang ua pe sam in atung uah akipak chih atheisak hi.
44015009	Huan eite leh amau khentuam nei lou in ginna in alungsim uh ahihsiangthou hi.
44015010	Huchi in i pipute leh eite'n i zuih zoh louhsa hakkol, tu'n ah nungzuite tung a ngak tum a bangziak a Pathian kalh na hi ua?
44015011	Amau gintak bang mah in eite'n leng Toupa Jesu hehpihna ziak a hotdam ding hi in i kigingta ngal ua,” achi hi.
44015012	Barnabas leh Paul in, amaute zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a chiamtehna leh thillamdang ahih thu agen lai un mipite'n ngaikhia in adai sipsip uhi.
44015013	Huchi a mipite adaih sipsip zoh un Jakob in adawng a, “Unaute aw, ka thu ngaikhia un, chi in agen sam hi.
44015014	Simeon in, Pathian in amah min pu ding leh alak ua kipan mite lakhe ding in Zentelte aveh tungthu agenta hi.
44015015	Huai thu leh zawlneite thu, gelh a omsa toh akituak hi.
44015016	Huai khit chiang in ka kik nawn ding a, David biakbuk chimsia ka bawl nawn ding a, asiatna lai ka puah ding a, ka tungding nawn ding.
44015017	Midang akhosuaksunte leh ka min pu Zentelte ka min kikoppihte'n, Toupa azonna ding un huai thilte tengteng ahihta hi,” chi in.
44015018	“Khovel siamchil a kipan hiai thu theisakpa Toupa'n achi,” chih gelh ahi.
44015019	“Huaiziak in Zentelte lak a Pathian lam ngate hihgim kei ni chih ka thusawm ahi.
44015020	Milim biakna in abuahsak thilsiang lou, kingaihna nin, sa heklup leh sisan nek atawpsanna ding un akiang uah laigelh zaw lehang, ka chi pen hi.
44015021	Mosi Dan lah nidanglai a kipan kho teng ah athu tangkoupih ahih ban ah sinagog peuh ah Sabbath niteng in athu sim ahi,” achi hi.
44015022	Huan sawltakte, upate, saptuam tengteng toh, apawl ua mitel, Paul leh Barnabas kiang ah Antiok a hohsak hoih asa ua; atelte uh min Judas, Barnabas achih uh leh Silas ahi ua, huai mite unaute lak a heutu deuhte ahi uhi.
44015023	Hichibang in agelh ua, akhut uah akhak uh: “Sawltakte leh unaute lak a upate'n Antiok khua, Siria gam leh Silisia gam a Zentel unaute chibai abuk uhi.
44015024	Ka pawl lak ua mi kuate hiam in noute kiang a thu gen in, zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan zui ding in ahon hihbuai ua, na lungsim uh ahon mangbangsak uh chih ka za ua, amaute hiai thu gen ding in ka sawl kei uhi.
44015025	Huaiziak in thukhat sat a ka kikhop un, ka deihtak uh Barnabas leh Paul,
44015026	Toupa Jesu Khrist min ziak a sih khawk saloute toh, mitelte na kiang ua hon sawl hoih ka sa uhi.
44015027	Huchi in Judas leh Silas ka hon sawl uhi, amau leng hiai thu mah kam in ahon hilh ding uhi.
44015028	Hiai thu poimohte ka gelhte uh chih louh ngal Kha Siangthou leh koute'n puakgik tuan na tung uah bangmah nga kei le ung hoih ka sa uhi.
44015029	Milim biakna sa nek, sa sisan nek leh kingaih tawpsan le uchin ka chi uhi; hiaite na tawp uleh nou a ding in ahoih ding hi. Damtak in om un,” chi in.
44015030	Huchi in asawl un akuan ua, Antiok khua atungsuk ua; mipi asamkhawm ua, lai apia uhi.
44015031	Huan asim khit un lungmuanna thu ziak in akipak mahmahta uhi.
44015032	Judas leh Silas in, zawlnei leng ahi ua, thu tampi in unaute akhamuan ua, ahihkip uhi.
44015033	Huan huai a sawt khop a-om nung un amau sawltakte kiang apai nawn ding in, unaute'n khamuangtak in apawtsak nawnta uhi.
44015034	Bang teng hileh Silas in bel akiang ua om takdih hoih asa hi.
44015035	Paul leh Barnabas bel midang tampite toh Antiok ah Toupa thuhilh leh gen in a-om nilouh uhi.
44015036	Huan ni bangzah hiam nung in Paul in Barnabas kiang ah, “Kho teng a Toupa thu i genna peuh a unau omte va veh nawn in, a-omdan uh va en lehang,” achi hi.
44015037	Barnabas in Johan, Marka achih uh, akiang ua tonpih atum hi.
44015038	Himahleh Paul in bel, ama'n Pamphilia gam a amaute kiksan a, nasepna a akiang ua ahoh louh ziak in tonpih hoih asa kei hi.
44015039	Huchi in nakpi in akiselta ua, huan akikhen ua Barnabas in Marka atonpih a, Kupra tuikulh lam ah long in apaita hi.
44015040	Paul in Silas atel a, unaute'n Toupa hehpihna akepsak nung un apaikheta uhi.
44015041	Huan saptuam pawlte hihkip zel in Siria leh Silisia gam atawnsuak uhi.
44016001	Huchi in Darbi khua leh Listra ah leng ahoh a; huai ah nungzui khat amin Timothi a-om hi. Amah gingta Juda numei tapa, apa bel Grik ahi;
44016002	Listra leh Ikoniam khua a unau omte'n amah aphat mahmah uhi.
44016003	Paul in akiang a hoh sam ding in adeih a; huchi in huai a Juda omte ziak in zek asumsak a, apa Grik ahi chih lah athei vek ngal ua.
44016004	Kho teng a apai kawm un Jerusalem a sawltak leh Upa omte vaihawm zui ding in unaute kiang ah thupiak zuih ding ape zel uhi.
44016005	Huchi in ginna ah saptuam pawlte akipta ua, niteng in akhang deuhdeuh uhi.
44016006	Huan Kha Siangthou in Asia gam a thugen akham ziak in Phrigia leh Galatia gam a tawnsuakta uhi.
44016007	Misia gam ahong tun nung un, Bithinia gam lut atum ua; himahleh Jesu Kha in aphal kei hi.
44016008	Huchi in Misia gam tawn in Troas ah ahohsukta uhi.
44016009	Zan in Paul in mengmu bang in Masidonia gam a mi khat dingh a, “Masidonia gam ah hong galkai inla, hong huh in,” chi a thumthum in amu hi.
44016010	Huan huai mengmuhna aneih khit in akiang ua tanchinhoih gen ding in Pathian in hon sam ahi, chih kichiantak a thei in, Masidonia gam ah hoh ka tum pah uhi.
44016011	Huan Troas a kipan long in ka pawt ua, tangtak in Samothrasi ah ka pai ua, azing in Neapoli ah ka pai nawn uh;
44016012	huai a kipan in Phillippi ah ka pai ua, huai khua tuh Masidonia gam a khua khat Rome a mipemte khua ahi a, huai uk a kho poimohpen ahi. Huai khua ah ni tamsim ka tamta uhi.
44016013	Huan Sabbath ni in kulh kongpi polam lui gei ah, thumna mun hi a ka gintakna uah ka hoh ua; huan ka tu ua, numei hong paikhawmte kiang ah thu ka gen uhi.
44016014	Huan amin Lidia, puan sandup zuak, Thiatira khomi, Pathian bia numei khat in ka thu uh aza a; huan Paul thugen zui ding in Toupa'n alungtang ahonsak hi.
44016015	Amah leh a-inkuanpihte'n baptisma atan khit un, “Toupa a ginom a na hon seh uleh ka inn ah hong tung un,” chi in ahon ngen a, ahon khou hi.
44016016	Huan thumna mun a ka hoh lai un, sikha nungak kuahiam dawi aisan siam zawl in ahon kituahpih a, ama'n a-aisan ziak in apute sum tampi amuhsak zel hi.
44016017	Huai mi in Paul leh kou ahon zui a, “Hiai mite, hotdamna lampi nou hon hilhte, tungnungpen Pathian sikha ahi uh,” chi in akikou hi.
44016018	Huchibang in ni tampi ahih hi. Huchi in Paul alungkimta kei a, akihei a dawi kiang ah, “Jesu Khrist min in asung a kipan pawt thu ka hon pia,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pawtkhe pah hi.
44016019	Huan apute'n asummuhna uh amang chih atheihtak un, Paul leh Silas aman ua, heutute ma ah dawr mun ah akailut uhi.
44016020	Huchi in vaihawmte kiang ah api ua, “Hiai mite Judate ahi uh, ka khua uh ahihbuai mahmah uhi.
44016021	Rome mite a dia kipahpih huai lou leh zuih siangloute chindan agengen uh,” achi uhi.
44016022	Huchi in mipite sawltakte sual ding in ahong dingkhia ua, vaihawmte'n apuan uh asahkeksak ua, chiang a sat ding in thu apia uhi.
44016023	Huan tamveipi asat khit un suangkul ah akhum ua, avengpa kiang ah bittak a ven ding, achi bikbek uhi.
44016024	Huchi tel a thu apiak ziak un ama'n tanna sungnung ah akhum a, akhe uh singkol abunsak hi.
44016025	Himahleh zan lai in, Pathian kiang ah Paul leh Silas athum ua, la asa ua, hentate'n angaikhia uhi.
44016026	Thakhat in zin nakpitak in ahong ling a, huchi in suangkul suangphumte tan in alingsak a, kongkhak tengteng akihong pah a, saltang chih kolbutte akiphel vekta hi.
44016027	Huan asuangkul vengpa ihmu ahong halh a, suangkul kongkhakte kihong in amu a, hentate taimang uh asa a, anamsau adokkhia a, kithah atum hi.
44016028	Himahleh aw ngaihtak in Paul akikou a, “Bangmah kichih ke'n, ka vek un hiai ah ka om lai uh,” achi hi.
44016029	Huan suangkul vengpa'n khawnvakte azong a, asung a tawmlut in, ling kawm in Paul leh Silas ma ah abokkhup hi.
44016030	Amaute apikhia a, “Pute aw, hotdam a ka omna ding in bang ahia ka hih ding?” achi hi.
44016031	Huan amau, “Toupa Jesu ging inla, huchi in hotdam in na om ding, nang leh na inkuanpihte toh,” achi uhi.
44016032	Amah leh a-inn a om teng kiang ah Toupa thu agen uhi.
44016033	Huai zan lai mah in apikhia a, asatna golhte uh asilsiangsak a; amah leh a-inkuanpihte tengteng in baptisma atang uhi.
44016034	A-inn ah apitou a nek ding alui a, Pathian agintak ziak un, amah leh a-inkuanpihte, akipak mahmah uhi.
44016035	Khua ahong vak in vaihawmte'n, mimante sawl in, “Huai mite khah in,” achi uhi.
44016036	Suangkul vengpa'n, Paul kiang ah athu uh ahilh a, “Vaihawmte'n nou khah ding in mi ahon sawl uh; huaiziak in tu'n hong pawt unla, khamuangtak in paita un,” achi hi.
44016037	Himahleh Paul in akiang uah, “Rome khomi ka hi ngal ua, ka siamna uleh siamlouhna uh thei lou in vantang mitmuh in na hon sat ua, suangkul ah na hon khum ua; tua aguk a hon khah maw na hon sawm uh? Hilou! Amau mahmah hong uhenla, hong pikhia uhen,” achi hi.
44016038	Huchi in mimante'n huai thute vaihawmte kiang ah ahilh uhi. Rome mi ahi uh chih azak un alauta mahmah uhi.
44016039	Va hoh in thupha ava tawi ua, huan apikhia ua, khua pawtsan ding in angen uhi.
44016040	Huan suangkul a kipan apawt ua, Lidia inn ah alut uhi. Unaute amuh un, akhamuan ua, apawtta uhi.
44017001	Amphipolis khua leh Appolonia khua tawn in, Thessalonika khua atungta ua, huai ah Judate sinagog a-om hi.
44017002	Paul, adan ngeina bang in, akiang uah alut a, Sabbath ni thumvei Laisiangthou a kipan in teltak in asutpih hi.
44017003	Khrist in gimthuak ding him ahihdan leh misi lak a kipan a thounawn ding ahihdan hilhchian in, ahihlang zel hi. “Hiai Jesu, athu ka hon hilh, amah Khrist ahi,” chi in agen behlap hi.
44017004	Huchi in alak ua khenkhat in agingta ua, Pathian limsak Grik mipi tampitak leh numei makai tampi toh Paul leh Silas akithuahpihta uhi.
44017005	Himahleh gingta lou Judate'n ahaza ua; dawr mun a migilou thadah kuate hiam akiang uah atonpih ua, mipi samkhawm in kho pumpi atokbuai ua, Jason inn aluh ua, vantang kiang a pikhiak atum uhi.
44017006	Amau amuh louhtak un Jason leh unau dang kuate hiam kho heutute kiang ah akailut ua, akikou ua, “Khovel tokbuai a lumlette hiai ah ahong uh,
44017007	Jason in ana zintun a; hiai mite'n Kaisar vaihawmna kalh in kumpipa dang khat, amin Jesu a-om,” achi uhi.
44017008	Huan mipi leh kho heutute'n huai thu azak un abuaita uhi.
44017009	Jason leh midangte tatkhiakna ding banghiam ala ua, amau tuh akhahta uhi.
44017010	Huan unaute'n azanzan in Beriah ah Paul leh Silas apaisak pah ua; huai lai ava tun un Judate sinagog ah alut uhi.
44017011	Huai mite Thessalonika khote sang in ana hoihzaw ua, huchi in lungsim kipaktak in thu apom ua, athugen uh adik leh diklouh theihna ding in niteng in Laisiangthou azong zel uhi.
44017012	Huchi in huaite mi tampi in agingtata ua; Grik numei zahtakhuai leh pasalte leng tampi mahmah in agingtata uhi.
44017013	Himahleh Thessalonika a Judate'n, Paul in Beriah ah Pathian thu agen chih azaktak un, huai ah leng ava hoh ua, mipite hanthawn in, ahihbuai nawn uhi.
44017014	Huchi in unaute'n tuipi tan a pai ding in Paul asawlkhia ua, Silas leh Timothi bel huai ah a-om tadih uhi.
44017015	Paul pitute'n Athen khua tan in api ua; Silas leh Timothi kintak a akiang a hong pai ding thupiak toh apaikikta uhi.
44017016	Huan Paul in Athen a amau ana ngak lai in, huai khua milimte a dim in amu a, alungtang in na asa mahmah hi.
44017017	Huchi in sinagog ah Judate leh Pathian limsakte ahoulimpih zel a, dawr mun ah leng huai a na om peuhmahte toh niteng in akihoulim zel uhi.
44017018	Huan Epikuria mi leh Stoik mi lak a mipil kuate hiam in leng amah ahong kiselpih uhi. “Hiai mi kamtam in bang ahia gen atup?” achi ua, akhen in, “Jesu thu leh thohnawnna thu agen ziak in gamdang pathiante thugenpa ahih tuak e,” achi uhi.
44017019	Amah alen ua, Areopagus ah api ua, akiang ah, “Hiai sinsakna thak na gengen na hon theisak thei diam?
44017020	Thillamdang banghiam ka bil uah na hon tun ahi; huchi in hiai thil omdan theih ka ut uh,” achi uhi.
44017021	Athen khomi tengteng, huai amikhualte toh, aman peuh ualeh thu thak photphot gen hiam, angaikhe ding in ahunte uh azang zel uhi.
44017022	Huchi in Areopagus laitak ah Paul adingh a, “Nou Athen a mite aw, bangkim ah sabiak limsakmi na hi uh chih ka thei hi.
44017023	Ka vak kawm a, na biaknate uh ka et lai in, maitam khat, atung a, ‘Theih louh pathian' a ding,’ chi a kigelh ka mu ahi. Huchi in thei lou a na biak uh, huai thu ka hon hilh ahi zaw hi,” achi hi.
44017024	Pathian, khovel leh asung a thil tengteng siampa, lei leh van Toupa ahih ziak in khut a lam inn peuh ah a-om kei hi.
44017025	Thil tasam bang in mihing khut a nna sepsak in leng a-om kei, amah mah bangkim kiang a hinna, hatna leh thil tengteng pepa ahi zaw hi.
44017026	Huan leitung maikaih teng a om ding in bul mun khat vek in nam chih asiam a, amau a ding in hunbi asehsak a, tenna ding gamgi akhunsak hi.
44017027	Ama'n hon gamlat kei mahleh mi tengteng in Pathian azon ua, amai amai ua, amuh teiteina ding ua alemgel ahi.
44017028	Noumau laphuahsiam kuate hiam in leng, “Eite leng asuante i hi uh, chi a agen bang un. Amah vang in i hing in i tang in, i om uhi.”
44017029	Huchi in “Pathian suante i hih nung, Pathian zaw dangka-eng hiam, dangka hiam, suang hiam, mihing khutsiam leh suktuah sekte bang ahi chih i gingta ding uh ahi kei.
44017030	Huchi in Pathian in i theih louh hun lai khawng akitheihmohbawl a; himahleh, tu'n ah zaw gam chih a mi tengteng kisik ding thu apeta,
44017031	Pathian in amiseh zang a dikna a khovel vai ahawm ni ding achiam ziak in; amiseh tungthu amah misi lak a kipan a kaithou in, mi tengteng kiang ah atheisakta hi,” achi hi.
44017032	Huan misi thohnawnna thu azaktak un, akhen in anuihsan ua; akhen in, “Hiai thu na kiang ah ka ngaikhe nawn ding uh,” achi uhi.
44017033	Huchi in Paul tuh alak ua kipan apawtta hi.
44017034	Himahleh mi kuate hiam amah lam ah apang tinten ua, agingtata ua, huaite lak a khenkhat Areopagus mi Dionisias leh numei khat amin Damaris leh akiang ua midangte toh ahi uhi.
44018001	Huai thilte zoh in Athen a kipan Paul apawt a, Korinth ah ahohta hi.
44018002	Huan amin Akuila, Juda khat amu a, huai mi Pontus gam a piang ahi a, Klaudias in Judate tengteng Rome a kipan pawt thu apiak ziak a azi Priscilla toh Itali gam a kipan hong tung phet ahi uhi. Huai mite kiang ah Paul atungta hi.
44018003	Anasep uh kibang ahih ziak in amau akikoppih in nna asemkhawm ua; anasep uh puanin bawl ahi.
44018004	Sabbath teng in sinagog ah chitaktak in thu agen zel a, Judate leh Grikte thuzoh atum hi.
44018005	Masidonia gam a kipan Silas leh Timothi ahong tun un, Paul tuh kha phutluih in thu nasem in a-om a, tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi chih Juda mite kiang ah atheihpih zel hi.
44018006	Himahleh akalh un agensia ua, Paul in apuan asing a, akiang uah, “Na sisan moh uh noumau lutung ah om hen; kei zaw ka hul ahi; tuban Zentelte kiang ah ka paita ding,” achi hi.
44018007	Huan huai a kipan apai a, amin Titas Justas mi khat inn ah alut a, huai mi'n Pathian abe zel hi, a-inn leng sinagog toh kizom ahi.
44018008	Huan Krispus pa sinagog heutu in a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Toupa agingta a, Korinth a mi tampi'n leng za in agingta ua, baptisma atang uhi.
44018009	Zan in Toupa'n Paul kiang ah mengmu bang in, “Lau ke'nla, dai lou in thu gen zel in;
44018010	kei na kiang ah ka om akei hiam, sihna ding in kuamah in na tung ah khut akha kei ding uhi; hiai khua ah mi tampi ka nei ngal a,” achi hi.
44018011	Huan huai ah alak uah Pathian thu hilh in kum khat leh kha guk a-omta hi.
44018012	Huan Akaia gam-ukpa Gallio ahih lai in Judate'n kituak in Paul kalh in buaina abawl ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah api uhi.
44018013	“Huai mi'n dan lou bang in a Pathian be ding in mi athuzoh,” achi uhi.
44018014	Paul in adawn dekleh Gallio in, Judate kiang ah, “Judate aw, hiai thil diklou thu hiam, thilhihkhelh thu hiam bek hileh, pel lou in ka hon awlmoh ding hi.
44018015	Himahleh thumalte leh minte, noumau dan thu lel zaw noumau kingaihtuah zaw un; ke'n zaw huchibang thu ngaihtuah ka ut kei,” achi hi.
44018016	Huan vaihawmna tutphah a kipan in amau adelhkheta hi.
44018017	Huan Grik mi tengteng in sinagog heutu Sostheni aman ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah avua uhi. Gallio in athilhih uh khawk asa kei hi.
44018018	Huai zoh in Paul ni sawttak ataam nilouh a; huai zoh in unaute kampha in akha a, huai a kipan Siria gam lam ah long in apaita a, akiang ah Priscilla leh Akuila leng apai uhi. Paul in thuchiam aneih ziak in Kenkriai ah sam amet phot hi.
44018019	Huan Ephesa atung ua, huai ah amau anusia a; himahleh amah kia sinagog ah alut a, Judate kiang ah chitaktak in thu asutpih hi.
44018020	Huan sawt deuh taam ding in akhou ua, himahleh ama'n lem asa kei a,
44018021	“Pathian in aphalleh na kiang uah ka hong nawn ding,” chi in kampha in akhen a, Ephesa a kipan long in apaita hi.
44018022	Huan Kaisaria ah ahong kai a, Jerusalem ah ahohtou a, saptuamte chibai buk in, Antiok ah ahohsukta hi.
44018023	Huan huai a sawt kuam a-om nung in apai nawn a, nungzuite tengteng hihhat in Galatia gam leh Phrigia gam atawnsuak vek hi.
44018024	Huan Juda mi khat, amin Apollos, Aleksandria a piang, mipiltak, Ephesa ah ahohsuk a; ama'n Laisiangthou anak theih mahmah hi.
44018025	Hiai mi'n Toupa Lampi thu zilsa ahi a, lungsim a phatuamngaitak ahih ziak in Toupa thu ahilh zel hi, Johan baptisma thu kia athei hi.
44018026	Sinagog ah hangsantak in thu agen hi. Huchi in Priscilla leh Akuila in athugen azak un, a-inn uah leh akiang ah Pathian Lampi thu kichian sem in ahilhchianta uhi.
44018027	Ama'n Akhaia gam a paikai atuptak in unaute'n ahanthawn ua, amah ana kipahpihna ding un nungzuite kiang ah lai agelhsak uhi. Huan atun in, Pathian hehpihna ziak a gingtate nakpitak in apanpih hi.
44018028	Vantang theih in Judate nakpitak in aseldong a, Laisiangthou zang in tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi ngei chih atheisak hi.
44019001	Korinth a Apollos a-om kal in Paul in saklam gamte tawnsuak masa kawm in, Ephesa khua atung a, huai ah nungzui kuate hiam amu hi.
44019002	Ama'n akiang uah, “Na gintak chil ua pan Kha Siangthou na tang uhia?” achi hi. Amaute'n akiang ah, “Tang lou, Kha Siangthou a-om chih zak leng ka za kei uh,” achi uhi.
44019003	Ama'n, “Bang baptisma ahia na tan uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Johan baptisma,” achi uhi.
44019004	Huan Paul in, “Johan in zaw anung a hong paipa Jesu gingta ding a mite hilh in kisikna baptisma in abaptis zel ahi,” achi hi.
44019005	Huan huai thu azaktak un Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang uhi.
44019006	Paul in atung uah akhut akoih a, Kha Siangthou atung uah ahong tungta hi. Huchi in pautuamte in thu agen ua; Pathian thu leng ahilhta uhi.
44019007	Avek un piching sawm-le-nih vel ahi uhi.
44019008	Huan sinagog ah Paul alut zel a, kha thum phial hangsantak in thu agen a, Pathian lalgam thu ahihna sutpih in, mi athuzoh zel hi.
44019009	Himahleh akhen achihhak ua, agingta nuam kei uh, mipi ma a Lampi agensiattak un, ama'n amaute apaisan a, nungzuite apituam a, niteng in kisinsakna mun Tairanas ah thu hilh in asutpih zel hi.
44019010	Huchibang ngen in kum nih phial ahih a; huchi in Asia gam a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte'n leng Toupa thu azata uhi.
44019011	Pathian in Paul khut in thillamdang taktak ahihsak hi.
44019012	Huchi in ataksa sukha kinulna puan neu, puan tungsilh damloute kiang ah ahon tawi ua, anatnate uh adam zel hi, asung ua kipan dawite leng apawt uhi.
44019013	Huan Juda mi dawi hawlkhia chi a vakvai dawithu thei kuate hiam in, “Paul in athu tangkoupih Jesu Khrist min in ka hon vau hi, chi in dawimatte tung ah Toupa Jesu min alou uhi.”
44019014	Juda mi siampu lianpen khat Skeva in huchibang hih tapa sagih anei hi.
44019015	Himahleh dawi in akiang uah, “Jesu ka gingta, Paul leng ka thei, nou kuate na hi ua?” chi in adawng hi.
44019016	Huan dawipai in aboh a, avek un azou a, anuaisiahta hi; huchi in huai mipa inn a kipan vuaktang leh liam in ataikheta uhi.
44019017	Huchi in Ephesa a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte kiang ah huai mi thu athangta hi. Huan avek un alau ua, Toupa Jesu min alianta hi.
44019018	Huan agingtate leng akhen tampi ahong ua, athilhihkhelhte uh thupha atawi ua, akipulak uhi.
44019019	Mitkhialdawi hihmi akhen tampi in leng alaibute uh ahon tawikhawm ua, mi tengteng mitmuh in ahalta uh; huan aman asut ua dangka singnga hi in athei uhi.
44019020	Huchi lawmlawm a thupi in Toupa thu adalh a, azou zel hi.
44019021	Huan huai khit in, Paul in Masidonia gam leh Akhaia gam tawtsuak takdih a, Jerusalem a hoh atum hi. “Huai a ka hoh khit chiang in Rome khua ka sik sam ding,” achi hi.
44019022	Huchi in amah nasepsakte nih Timothi leh Erastas, Masidonia gam ah apaisak phot a, amah bel Asia gam ah ataam tadih hi.
44019023	Huai lai in Lampi ziak in mi buai petmah in abuaita uhi.
44019024	Mi khat amin Demetrias, dangkasik sek a Diana milim bawlpa a-om a, khutsiamte a ding in kilohna tampi apia hi.
44019025	Hiai mi in amaute asamkhawm a, anasep bang uh semte toh; huan akiang uah, “Pute aw, hiai nasepna i hauhna uh ahi chih na thei uhi.
44019026	Hiai Ephesa khua kia hilou in, Asia gam kho kim teng phial ah leng, Paul in khut a bawl pathiante, Pathian ahi kei uh chi in mi tampi thuzoh in, akiheisak khinta chih noumau ngei in na mu un na za uhi.
44019027	Huchi in i nekzonna un athuak ding chih alauhuai kia hilou in, pathiannu thupitak Diana tempul leng ahon ngaineu ding uh. Asia gam a mi tengteng leh khovel a mi'n abiak zel uh, athupipi toh, ahong neu ding chih alauhuai hi,” achi hi.
44019028	Huai thu azaktak un, aheh mahmah ua, “Ephesa a Diana thupitak ahi,” chi in akikou uhi.
44019029	Huchi in akhua in apumbuai vekta ua, Gaias leh Aristarkhas, Masidonia gam a mi, Paul nungzuite, aman ua, kituaktak in etnop inn ah ataipih kheukhou uhi.
44019030	Paul in mipi lak a lut atupleh nungzuite'n aphal kei uhi.
44019031	Asia gam a heutupente lak a khenkhat kuate hiam Paul lawmte ahi ua, akiang ah mi asawl ua, etnop inn ah lut teitei lou ding in akun uhi.
44019032	Omkhawmte abuai ua, mi tamzaw in akikhopna san uh leng athei kei uh, khenkhat thukhat in akikou ua, khenkhat thudang in akikou uhi.
44019033	Mipi lak a mi khenkhat in Alexander, asiamna thu gendan ding ahilhta ua, Judate'n amah malam ah asawnphei uhi. Huan Alexander in akhut in azap a, mi tengteng kiang ah asiamna thu gen atum hi.
44019034	Himahleh amah Juda mi ahi chih atheihtak un, dakkal nih sung aw kituaktak in, “Ephesate Diana athupi hi,” chi ngen in akikou uhi.
44019035	Huan khosung laigelhpa'n mipi asukdaih khit in, “Ephesa a mite aw, Diana thupitak tempul kemtu leh van a kipan a milim kia, Ephesa khuate a kem na hi uh chih, kua ahia thei lou om?
44019036	Huchi in hiai thu sel vual ahih louh nung in, na dai dide ding uh ahi, thunung veng lou in bangmah na hih ding uh ahi kei hi.
44019037	Hiai mi hiai mun a na hon pite uh, tempul lokmi ahi kei ua, i pathiannu gensete leng ahi kei uh.
44019038	Huchi in Demetrias leh alawm khutsiamte'n leng kua lak ah leng thubuai aneih uleh, thubuai genna innte honsa in a-om vele, gam ukpate leng a-om uhi; kihektuah uhen.
44019039	Thil dang buaina nei him na hih uleh, kikhopna ngeina ah alem ding uh.
44019040	Tuni a thu vengvung ziak in salh lauhuai in i omta uh, athu om ngel lou buaina bawl a ngoh theih i hi ngal ua, hiai kikhopna san bangmah gen ding thei lou ding i kei uhiam,” achi hi.
44019041	Huan huchibang thu agen khit in omkhawm heutute akikhenzak sakta hi.
44020001	Buaina aven nung in, Paul in nungzuite asamsak a, ahanthawn a, kampha in akha a, Masidonia gam a pai ding in apawtta hi.
44020002	Thu tampi anungzuite hanthawn in huai gam atawnsuak a, Grikte gam atungta hi.
44020003	Huan huai ah kha thum ataam hi. Siria gam a long a azin dek kuan in, Judate'n amah thah asawm ziak un, Masidonia gam tawn a kilehkik atum zawta hi.
44020004	Asia gam tan a amah zuite, Beriah khomi Pirhas tapa Sopater, Thessalonika a pan Aristarkhas leh Sekundas, Darbe khomi, Gaias, Timothi leh Asia gam a Taikikas leh Trophimaste ahi uh.
44020005	Huaite'n ka ma uh akai ua, Troas ah hon na ngak uhi.
44020006	Kou bel Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh ni abei in Philippi a kipan long in ka pawt ua, ni nga nung in Troas ah akiang uh ka tung uhi; huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi.
44020007	Huan nipikal a ani masapen in, tanghou balkham ding a ka kikhop lai un, Paul in akiang uah thu agen hi; ama'n azingchiang a pai atup ziak in zankim tan hial thu agen hi.
44020008	Huan indan tungnung, ka omkhawmna uah khawnvak tampi a-om hi.
44020009	Huan amin Eutikas tangval khat tohlet ah atu a, nakpitak in ana ihmu hi. Huan Paul in thu agen sawt tak ziak in ama'n a-ihmut suak a thuakzou nawnta kei a, insawng thumna a kipan in aketa a, asisa in aphong uhi.
44020010	Himahleh Paul akumsuk a, bohkhum in a-angpom a, “Lunglau kei un, alaitat kei lai hi,” achi hi.
44020011	Huan Paul akahtou nawn a, tanghou balkham in an ane a, khovak pha in akiang uah thu agen a, huai nung in apaita hi.
44020012	Huan valnoupa dam in api ua, akhamuang petmah uhi.
44020013	Huan koute Assos khua zuan in long in ka na pai masa ua, long ah Paul tuansak ka tum uhi; ama'n khe a paina lam tot atup ziak in huchibang tuh amah geldan ahi.
44020014	Huan Assos a ahon tuah chiang in, long ah ka tuangsakta ua, Mitilini khua ka tung uhi.
44020015	Huan huai a kipan in long in ka pai nawn ua, azing in Khios tuikulh gal ka tung ua; huan azing nawn in Samo tuikulh ka tung ua, Troguliam ah ka giak uhi. Azing nawn in Miletas khua ka tung nawn uhi.
44020016	Huan Paul in Asia gam a om sawt lou a, long a Ephesa khua khen atupsa him ahi a, ahihtheihleh Jerusalem a Pentikost ni huam tum in akinpai hi.
44020017	Huan Miletas a kipan in Ephesa ah mi asawl a, akiang ah saptuam upate asamsak hi.
44020018	Huan akiang ahong tun un, ama'n akiang uah, Asia gam ka tot chil ni a kipan na kiang ua ka om sung teng in ka omdan na thei uhi.
44020019	Thunuailutpen kawm leh Judate'n hon thah asawm ziak ua khitui kai leh thil haksa ka tung a tungte thuak kawm in Toupa nna ka sem hi.
44020020	Huchibang in aphatuam ding thu na kiang uah bangmah iim ka nei kei a, vantang lak leh inn teng ah thu ka hon hilh zel a,
44020021	Judate leh Grikte kiang ah leng Pathian lam a kisikna thu leh i Toupa Jesu Khrist lam a ginna thu ka theisak zel hi.
44020022	Ngai un, tu in Kha in hon sawl teitei a ka theih ziak in, Jerusalem a hoh dia kisa ka hi, huai ah ka tung a thil hong tung ding bangmah ka thei kei;
44020023	Kha Siangthou in, henna leh haksatna in nang ahon dawn hi, chi in kho teng ah ahon hilh zel hi, tuate kia ka theih ahi.
44020024	Himahleh ka kitaitehna lam ka maban tun ding leh Pathian hehpihna tanchinhoih a dia theihpihtu a pang ding a Toupa Jesu kiang a huai nasepna ka muh pen sem khin phot leng, ka hinna leng khiaklah tham in ka sep kei hi.
44020025	“Huan thei un, noute tengteng, Pathian lalgam thu tangkoupih a ka vakvaknate'n ka mel na mu nawnta kei ding uh chih ka thei hi.
44020026	Huaiziak in mi tengteng sisan ah ka hul ahi chih tuni in ka hon theisak hi.
44020027	Pathian vaihawm tengteng avek in na kiang uah iim ka nei kei hi.
44020028	Pathian saptuamte, ama sisan a aleite, vak ding in noumau leh na heute tengteng uh tung ah pilvang un, Kha Siangthou in atung uah nou heutu in ahon bawl hi.
44020029	Ka pai nung in na lak uah ngehangte ahong lut ding ua, pawlte ahawi kei ding uh chih ka thei hi.
44020030	Noumau lak a mi nangawn, nungzui pawlte amau lam a kaimang ding in thu tuam gen na hong om ding uh.
44020031	Huaiziak in limsak unla; kum thum hilhial khitui ke kawm a, sun leh zan a michih taihilh ka tawplouhdan, theigige un.
44020032	“Tu in noute Pathian leh ahehpihna ah ka hon kemsak hi, huai in noute ahon bawllian thei a, mi lungsim siangthoute kiang ah goutan ahon neisak thei lai hi.
44020033	Kuamah dangka, dangka-eng leh puansilh ka eng ngei kei.
44020034	Hiai khutte'n keimah leh ka lawmte taksap asepkhiak zeldan, noumau ngei in na thei uhi.
44020035	Bangkim ka hih peuhmah na chin ding ua ka hih ahi, huchibang a semgim leh Toupa Jesu thu theigige kawm in mihatloute na panpih ding uh ahi; amah mah in, ‘Lak sang in piak in lukhawng anei zaw’ achih,” achi hi.
44020036	Huai thu agen khit in akhukdin a, avek un athum uhi.
44020037	Huan avek un akap huphup ua, Paul ngawng ah kawi in atawp uhi.
44020038	Amel amuh nawn tak louh ding thu agen alungkhamna pen uh ahi. Huan long pha in amah ava kha uhi.
44021001	Huan hichi ahong hi a, amaute toh ka kikhen ua, long in ka pawt ua, huai khit in tangtak in Kos tuikulh ka tung ua, azing in Rhodes tuikulh ka tung nawn ua, huai a kipan in ka pai zel ua, Patara khua ka tung uhi.
44021002	Phoinisia gam pai ding long khat ka mu ua, ka tuang ua, ka pai zel uhi.
44021003	Huan Kupra tuikulh ka mu ua, veilam pang ah ka kheng ua, Siria gam ah ka pai zel ua, Tair ah long van nawnkhiak ding a-om man in ka kum phot uhi.
44021004	Nungzuite ka zongkhia ua, huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi; huan Kha theihsak in Paul kiang ah, Jerusalem a hohtou lou ding in achi uhi.
44021005	Himahleh huai nite khit in ka pawt ua ka paita ua, unaute'n avek un, azi atate uh toh khopi pua dong ahong kha ua; tuipi piau ah ka khukdin ua, ka thum uhi.
44021006	Huan mangpha ka kikhak zoh un, long ah ka tuang ua, amau bel a-inn uah apai nawnta uhi.
44021007	Tair a kipan long a ka pai khit un Ptolemais khua ka tung ua, unaute chibai ka buk uhi, akiang uah ni khat ka nituang uhi.
44021008	Huan azing in ka pawt ua Kaisaria khua ka tung ua huai ah tanchinhoih genpa, Philip inn ah ka lut ua, amah ahihleh sagihte lak a khat ahi a, akiang ah ka taam uhi.
44021009	Huai mi'n, amau zawlnei bang a thu agen zel nungak siangthou ngen, tanu li anei hi.
44021010	Huai ah ni tampi ka taam ua, huai lai in Judia gam a kipan amin Agabas kichi zawlnei khat ahong suk hi.
44021011	Ka kiang uah ahong a, Paul kawnggak ala a, akhete, akhutte amah in akigak a, “Jerusalem a Judate'n hichibang in hiai kawnggak neipa agak ding ua, Zentelte khut ah ape lai ding uh, Kha Siangthou in achi,” achi hi.
44021012	Huan huai thu ka zaktak un, kou leh huai khua a mite'n Jerusalem a Paul hoh lou ding in ka khou chiat uhi.
44021013	Himahleh Paul in adawng a, “Bangchi na hi ua, na kahkah ua, na hon khasiatsak uh? Toupa Jesu min ziak in Jerusalem a hen kia hilou in, sih leng ngap ka hi,” achi hi.
44021014	Huan khouhzoh vual ahih louhtak in, ka tawpta ua, “Toupa thuthu hi hen aw,” ka chi uhi.
44021015	Huai nung in ka van uh ka bawl ua, Jerusalem ah ka hohtou uhi.
44021016	Kaisaria a mi nungzuite kuate hiam, ka kiang uah apai ua, amau, amin Mnason inn, nungzui masa pawl Kupra tuikulh a mi khat ka tunna dingpa uh api sam uhi.
44021017	Huan Jerusalem khua ka tun un unaute'n nuamtak in hon na kipahpih uhi.
44021018	Azing in Paul toh Jakob kiang ah ka lut ua; huai ah saptuam upate tengteng leng a-om uhi.
44021019	Paul in amau chibai abuk khit in, anasepna zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a thil ahihsak peuhmah avek in agen hi.
44021020	Unaute'n huai thu azak un Pathian apahtawi uh; huan Paul kiang ah, “Unaupa, Judate lak a gingtami tamdan na mu a; avek un dan lam ah phatuam angai lai uhi.
44021021	Nang Zentelte lak a Juda omte tengteng kiang ah atate uh zeksum louh ding leh dan bang a om louh ding chi in Mosi Dan paihkhiakna ding na thuhilh zel chih mi kam ah na thu athei vek uhi,” achi uhi.
44021022	“Bangchi hita ding ahia le? Na hong tung chih aza ngal ding ua.
44021023	Huaiziak in na kiang a ka gen bang un hih in; thuchiam nei pasal li ka kiang uah a-om uhi.
44021024	Huai mite pi in la, akiang uah kisiangsak sam inla, asam uh amettheihna ding un amau a ding in sum seng in; huchi in mi tengteng in mi kam a na thu azak teng uh gen tham ahi kei chih athei ding ua, nangmah mah dan zui in kichiantak in na om zaw chih athei ding uhi.
44021025	Zentelte lak a gingtate thu zaw, milim biakna thil nek lam ah, sa sisan nek thu ah, sa heklup nek lam ah, kingaih lam a kipan in akihulsak ding uh ahi, chi in ka gen ua, ka gelhta uhi,” achi uhi.
44021026	Huan azing in Paul in pasalte atonpih a, amau toh akisiangsak a, tempul ah alut a, amaute a ding a kithoihna apiaksak chiat masiah kisiansakna ni anei phot ding uh chih, siampu kiang ah ahilh hi.
44021027	Kisiansuahna ni sagih achin dektak in Asia gam a Judate'n tempul ah Paul amu ua, mipi tengteng atokthou ua, amah aman ua, kikou in,
44021028	“Israel mite aw, hong huh un! Hiai mi, gam teng a mi tengteng kiang a Juda mite dante, hiai mun siangthou gensepa ahi; huai lou leng, tempul ah Grik mite alutpih a, hiai in siangthou ahihbuah khin,” achi uhi.
44021029	Huai ma in khua ah Ephesa a mi Trophimas akiang ah amu ua, Paul in huai mi tempul ah alutpih agingta uhi.
44021030	Huan akhua in akising kheukhou ua, mite ataikhawm ua; Paul aman ua, tempul a kipan akaikhia ua; kongkhakte akhak pah ngal uhi.
44021031	Amah hihlup atup laitak un Jerusalem a mi tengteng abuai uh chih sepaih pawl heutu lianpen kiang atungtou hi.
44021032	Ama'n sepaihte leh sepaih za heutute api pah a, akiang uah ataisuk uhi; heutu lianpen leh sepaihte amuhtak un Paul vuak atawpta uhi.
44021033	Sepaih heutu lianpen in ahong naih a, Paul alen a, khainiang nih butsak ding thu apia a; kua ahia ahih a, bang ahia ahih adong hi.
44021034	Mipite akhen thu khat in akikou ua, akhen thudang a akikou ziak un, buaina ziak diktak athei kei a, sepaihte giahbuk a pilut thu apia hi.
44021035	Paul kalbi atun lai in mipi ahiamgam ziak un sepaihte'n amah apumzawn uhi.
44021036	Mi tengteng in, “Hihmangthang un,” chi akikou in, azui uhi.
44021037	Sepaihte giahbuk sung a apilut dek lai un Paul in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah, “Na kiang ah thu kam khat ka gen thei diam?” achi hi.
44021038	Huan ama'n, “Grik pau na thei maw? Tuma a mite hanthawn a, gamdai mun a mihing sangli suam a thatte heutupa Aigupta mi na hi kei maw?” achi hi.
44021039	Paul in, “Silisia gam a Tarsas a om Juda mi ka hi, khopi neu liai lou khat khua-le-tui ka hi; hon hehpih inla, mi tengteng kiang ah thu hon gensak in,” achi hi.
44021040	Huan alemsaktak in kalbi ah Paul adingh a, mi tengteng daihna ding in akhut avan a; huan adaih duamtak un Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen hi.
44022001	“Unaute aw, pate aw, tu'n ah na kiang uah ka siamna thu ka hon hilh ding hi, ngaikhia un,” achi hi.
44022002	Huan Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen chih azaktak un, adai nawn sem ua; huan ama'n,
44022003	“Juda mi ka hi a, Silisia gam a Tarsas a piang ka hi. Himahleh hiai khua ah Gamaliel khebul a zil a khanglian ka hi, i pipute Dan omdan kimtak zil zel a om ka hi a, tuni a noumau tengteng bang in Pathian a ding a phatuam na ngai sam ka hi.
44022004	Hiai Lampi a mite that hial khop in ka sawi zel a, numei pasal ka hen a, suangkul ah ka khumsak hi.
44022005	Siampu lianpen leh upate tengteng in leng huai thu hon theihpih ua, amau a kipan in leng unaute piak ding in lai ka mu hi, huan Damaskas a omte sawi ding leh hensa a Jerusalem a pi ding in ka hoh hi.
44022006	“Huan hichi ahong hi a, ka pai a Damaskas kho kiang ka tun in, sun lai in, thakhat in van a kipan vak thupitak ka kim ah ahong vak hi.
44022007	Huan lei ah ka puk a, ka kiang ah, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi?’ chi in aw ka zata hi.
44022008	Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa kua na hia?’ chi in ka dong a. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, Nazaret Jesu na sawi ka hi,” achi hi.
44022009	Ka lawmte'n vak amu ua, hon houpihpa aw aza kei uhi.
44022010	Ke'n, “Toupa, bang ka hih dia?” ka chi a. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Damaskas ah lut in, thil tengteng na hih ding achih peuhmah ahon hilh ding uh,” achi hi.
44022011	Huan huai vak thupi ziak in khua ka mutheita kei a, ka lawmte'n khut in ahon kai ua, Damaskas ah ka lutta uhi.
44022012	“Huan mi khat, Ananias Dan lam a Pathian limsak leh huai a Judate tengteng lak a minhoih,
44022013	amah ahong a ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ‘Unau Saul, mitvakna nei in,’ ahon chi hi. Huaitak in amah ka mutheita hi.
44022014	Ama'n, ‘I pipute Pathian in adeihlam thei ding in ahon deih a, Diktatpa mu a, akamsuak za ding a hon sep ahi, achi hi.
44022015	Na muh leh na zak thu ah mi tengteng kiang ah amah thu theihpihpa na hi ding.
44022016	Huan bangziak a om maimai na hia? Thou inla, Toupa min sam in, baptisma tang inla, na khelhna hihsiang tanla,’ ahon chi hi.
44022017	“Jerusalem a ka pai nawn nung, tempul a ka thum lai in, mengmu bang in ka om hi.
44022018	‘Kin inla, Jerusalem a kipan pawt in; ka tanchin na gen ding apom tuak kei uh,’ ahon chih lai ka mu hi.
44022019	Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa sinagog teng a nang gingta peuhmah hentasak a, ka vuak zeldan athei uhi.
44022020	Huan na thu theihpihpa Stephen sisan asuah lai un kei leng akiang uah ka dingh a, asih ding lem ka na sa a, ahihlumte puante leng ka na kem hi,’ ka chi hi.
44022021	Huan ama'n, ‘Pai in, hiai a kipan in gamlatak a Zentelte kiang ah ka hon sawl ding ahi,’ ahon chita hi,” achi hi.
44022022	Huan huai thutan in angaikhia ua; aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, “Mi hichibang hing tak ahi kei, khovel a kipan hihmangthang un,” achi uhi.
44022023	Akikou ua apuan uh alem ua, apai ua, leivui avik uhi,
44022024	huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul sepaihte giahbuk sung a pilut thu apia a, atung ah huchi tel a akikouna uh atheihna ding a soisak kawm a dottel ding in, achi hi.
44022025	Savun khau a alehhensawm khit un, Paul in akiang a dingh sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, “Siam louh tansak louh Rome mi vuak ding chih nang a ding in dan toh kituak ahi hia?” achi hi.
44022026	Sepaih zaheutu in huai azaktak in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahoh a, “Na thilhih ding ah pilvang dih aw; hiai mi Rome mi ana hi,” achi a, ahilh hi.
44022027	Sepaih heutu lianpen ahong a, akiang ah, “Rome mi na hi maw? Hon hilh in,” achi hi.
44022028	Ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi. Sepaih heutu lianpen in, “Ke'n hiai khomi hihna sum tampi a ka lei ei ve,” chi in adawng hi. Paul in, “Kei zaw Rome mi a piang him ka hi,” achi hi.
44022029	Huchi in amah dottel tumte'n apaisan pah ngal ua; sepaih heutu lianpen in Rome mi ahi chih atheih in akihta a, ahen ziak in alau hi.
44022030	Azing in Judate'n bangziak a Paul hek ahi uhiam chih theihtel tum in, sepaih heutu lianpen in amah aphel a, siampu liante leh vaihawm tengteng kikhop ding thu apia a, Paul pisuk in, ama uah adingsak hi.
44023001	Paul in vaihawmte a-en kilkel a, “Unaute aw, tuni tan in Pathian mitmuh a ahoih lam hi a ka theih peuhmah hih in ka om hi,” achi hi.
44023002	Huan siampu lianpen Ananias in, Paul kiang a dinghte kiang ah, akam betsak ding thu apia hi.
44023003	Paul in akiang ah, “Nang baang nuhngou bang lelpa, Pathian in ahon beng zaw ding, nang dan bang a vaihawm ding a tu a, dan lou bang a mi bet ding na chi vial maw?” achi hi.
44023004	Huan akiang a dinghte'n, “Bangziak a Pathian siampu lianpen tai?” achi uhi.
44023005	Paul in, “Unaute aw, siampu lianpen ahi chih ka thei kei a ahi; na chipihte vaihawmte tung ah thuhoih lou gen ke'n, chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi.
44023006	Paul in akhen Saddukaite, akhen Pharisaite ahi uh chih atheih in vaihawmte lak ah akikou a, “Unaute aw, Pharisai ka hi, Pharisai tapa leng ka hi; misi lametna leh thohnawnna thu ah vaihawmte mai a dinsak a om ka hi,” achi hi.
44023007	Huai agentak in, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite ana kisel ua, vaihawmte akilangkhenta uhi.
44023008	Saddukaite'n, misi thohnawnna a-om kei, angelte, khate leng a-om tuan kei, achi ua; Pharisaite'n huaite teng a-om vek chih agen uhi.
44023009	Huai thu in nakpitak in abuaita ua; Pharisaite lam a mi laigelhmite khenkhat adingh ua; asel ua, “Hiai mi bangmah agitlouhna i mu kei uh; kha hiam angel hiam in akiang a thu gen hileh, eite Pathian dou suak ding i hi uh,” achi uhi.
44023010	Huan kituahlouhna lianpi ahong omtak in, sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul abohzan khak uh alau a, sepaihte kiang ah, ava hohsuk a, alak ua kipan giahbuk a va pitouh teitei ding achi hi.
44023011	Huan azan in, Paul kiang ah Toupa adingh a, “Khamuangtak in om in, Jerusalem a ka thu na theihsak bang in Rome ah leng na theisak ding hi,” achi hi.
44023012	Huan khua ahong vaktak in Judate apanghuan ua, Paul athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiamta uhi.
44023013	Huai thubawlte sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi uh.
44023014	Amau siampu liante leh upate kiang ah ahoh ua, “Paul ka thah masiah uh bangmah chiam lou ding in ka kichiam uh achi uhi.
44023015	Huaiziak in nou vaihawmte toh athu kichian nawn sem a ngaihtuah tum bang in, na kiang ua pekhe ding in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahem deuh in va gentou un; kou bel na kiangnai uh ahong tun ma a amah that dia mansa ka hi uh,” achi uhi.
44023016	Himahleh Paul sanggamnu tapa in athusawm uh ana za a, giahbuk ah ava lut a, Paul ava hilhta hi.
44023017	Paul in sepaih zaheutu khat asam a, “Hiai tangval sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah pi in, akiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi.
44023018	Huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah api a, “Paul, hentapa'n ahon sam a, hiai tangval na kiang a hon pi ding in ahon sawl a, na kiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi.
44023019	Sepaih heutu lianpen in akhut in alen a, asim in atuam paipih a, “Bang ahia hon hilh ding na neih?” chi in adong hi.
44023020	Ama'n, “Paul tungtang kichian nawn sem a na ngaihtuah ding mah bang in, zingchiah vaihawmte kiang ah pisuk ding in Judate'n hon nget hoih asa chiat uh.
44023021	Himahleh athu uh na gingta ke'n; alak ua mi sawmli sang a tamzaw in thah asawm ua, huai mite'n amah athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiam uh; tu in na thu ngak in mansa in a-om uhi,” achi hi.
44023022	Sepaih lianpen in tangval apaisak a, “Hiai thute na hon theisak chih kuamah hilh ke'n,” achi bikbek hi.
44023023	Huan sepaih zaheutu nih asam a, “Zan ihsip hun in Kaisaria kho pha a pai ding in sepaih zanih, sakol tungtuangmi sawmsagih, tei tawimi zanih mansa in koih un, achi hi.
44023024	Huan Paul tuanna ding sakol leng na ngaihtuahsak unla, gam-ukpa Felik kiang ah bittak in tun un,” achi hi.
44023025	Huan hichibang in lai agelh hi.
44023026	“Klaudias Lisias in Felik gam-ukpa hoihpa chibai abuk hi.
44023027	Hiai mi Judate'n amu ua, athah dek lai un akiang uah sepaihte pi in ka hoh a, Rome mi ahi chih ka theih in ka hunkheta hi.
44023028	Huan ahekna uh theih ut in, vaihawmte kiang ah ka pisuk a,
44023029	huchi in adan uh banghiam a hek a om ahi chih ka thei a, himahleh ahekna thu uah sihna leh henna ding bangmah ka thei kei hi.
44023030	Huan Judate'n amah tang uh ahi chih theihsak a ka omtak in, na kiang ah amah ka hon sawl ngal a, amah hekte leng atung a thubuai aneih peuh uh na ma a gen ding in thu leng ka pia hi,” achi hi.
44023031	Huchi in sepaihte'n athupiak bang in Paul azanzan in api ua, Antipatris atunpih uhi.
44023032	Huan azing in sakol tungtuang mite akiang a pai zel ding in anusia ua, amau giahbuk ah akik nawnta uhi.
44023033	Huan amau Kaisaria khua atung ua, gam-ukpa kiang ah lai apia ua, Paul leng ama ah adingsak uhi.
44023034	Gam-ukpa'n asim khit in, Paul omna gam adong hi. Huan Silisia gam a pan ahi chih atheih in,
44023035	“Nang hon hekte ahong tun chiang un na thubuai ka ngaihtuah ding,” achi hi. Herod thukhenna inn a ven ding thu apia hi.
44024001	Huan ni nga nung in siampu lianpen Ananias ahong tungsuk a, upa kuate hiam toh, amin Tertullas thugen siam khat toh; Paul tung a thubuai gam-ukpa kiang ah agen uhi.
44024002	Paul asapkhiak nung un Tertullas in amah ahek pan a, “Felik hoihpen, nangmah vang a khamuang petpet a ka om ziak un leh na hon kepna ziak a hiai namte a ding a kipuahthakna a-om zel ziak in,
44024003	chik lai peuh in koipeuh ah leng lungkimtak in ka pom gige uhi.
44024004	Akoi abang hitaleh, nang a dia chimtakhuai hih ka ut kei hi, na migitna in thu kam khat ahihleh hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi.
44024005	Hiai mihuathuaipi, khovel a Judate tengteng tokbuaipa leh Nazarit mite pawl a amakaipen khat uh ahih ka thei uhi.
44024006	Tempul hihbuah leng atum a; huaiziak in ka man uhi.
44024007	Ka dan bang ua atung a vaihawm tum zaw hi ung a, himahleh sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong kuan a, thagum suah in ka khut ua kipan alakhia a, atung a thubuai neite na kiang a hong pai ding in thu apia hi.
44024008	Nangmah ngei in amah dongtel in ka hekna tengteng uh na theithei ding hi,” achi hi.
44024009	Huan Judate'n leng huai thu huchibang ahi, chi in apanpih uhi.
44024010	Huan gam-ukpa'n thugen ding a Paul akhutvantak in, hichi in adawng a, “Ama'n nang kum tampi hiai namte vai hawmsakpa na hi chih ka theih ziak in kipaktak in ka siamna thu ka gen ding ahi.
44024011	Jerusalem a Pathian be ding a ka hohtouh nung ni sawm-le-nih aval nai kei ding chih na na thei ding hi.
44024012	Tempul ah hiam sinagog ah hiam, khua ah leng mi kuahiam ka sel leh mipi ka hanthawn lam amau zong ahon mu kei uh.
44024013	Tu'n ah leng ahon hekna thu uh na theih in abul asuikhe thei kei ding uh.
44024014	Himahleh hiai thu na kiang ah ka genkhe ding, Dan leh zawlneite thugelh tengteng gingta in, pawl tuam achihte uh Lampi dan bang in ka pipute uh Pathian ka be zel hi.
44024015	Pathian ah lametna nei in, hiai mite'n leng huai agintak sam uh, midiktatte leh diktatloute thohnawnna a-om ding hi.
44024016	Huchi ahih ziak in Pathian leh mihing tung a hihkhial lou ding in sia-le-pha siangtak nei ding in ka kibawl gige hi.
44024017	“Huan kum tampi nung in ka chipihte kiang ah thilpiak ding leh thillat ding hon tawi in ka hong hi.
44024018	Huai thil ka piak lai in, Asia gam a kipan Juda mi khenkhatte'n mipi pang lou leh buaina om lou in, tempul ah kisiangsak in ahon mu uhi.
44024019	Hiai mite'n ka tung a thubuai nei hi le uh na ma ah hong pai in ahong hek khinta ding uhi.
44024020	Ahihkeileh hiai mite ngei in vaihawmte ma a ka din lai in, ka hihkhelh bang ahia amuh uh, gen uhen.
44024021	Alak ua dingh a, ‘Misi thohnawnna thu ah tuni in na ma uah salh in ka om ahi,’ ka chih a hiai thu kam khat ziak houh ahih kei ngalleh, chi in adawng hi.”
44024022	Huan Felik hiai thilte azak a, Lampi thu atheihchet ziak in, “Sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong tunsuk hun chiah na thu uh ka lem ding,” chi in akoih tadih hi.
44024023	Sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, Paul zalentak leh alawmte amah hong veh leh nek-tak abawlsak utte kham lou a, vensak ding in thu apia hi.
44024024	Huan ni bangzah hiam nung in Felik ahong nawn a, azi Drusilla, Juda numei toh, Paul asamsak a, Khrist Jesu ginna thu angaikhia hi.
44024025	Paul in diktatna thu, kidek thu, thukhen vaihawmna hong tung dingte asuipih detdet lai in, Felik in lauhuai asa mahmah a, “Pai nawn phot inla, hunlem ka neih hun chiang in ka hon sam ding,” achi hi.
44024026	Paul in dangka apiak peuh alamen a, huaiziak in asam mun hial a, ahoupih zihzeh hi.
44024027	Himahleh kum nih akivei sung in Porsias Festas in Felik mun ahon kheng a; Felik in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in, hensa in Paul anuseta hi.
44025001	Huchi in Festas in gamukna alak nung ni thum zoh in Kaisaria a kipan Jerusalem ah ahohtou hi.
44025002	Siampu liante leh Juda makaite'n akiang ah Paul tungtang thu aselam in ana theisak uhi.
44025003	Jerusalem khua a pitouhsak ding in adeihsakna leng ana ngen ua; lampi a na lamtan a thah ding atum uhi.
44025004	Himahleh Festas in, “Kaisaria a Paul kep ding leh amah leng huai lam a hoh pah ding,” achi hi.
44025005	Huaiziak in “Huai mi'n gitlouhna nei ahihleh na lak ua thunei peuhmah in hon zuisuk in hong hek uhen,” chi in adawng hi.
44025006	Alak ua ni sawm val ataam nung in, Kaisaria ah apaisuk a; azing in thukhenna tutphah a tu in, Paul hon pi ding in thu apia hi.
44025007	Paul ahong tun phet in, Jerusalem khua a kipan Juda hong sukte akim ah adingh ua, suikhiak vual louh ding thubuai tampi giktak tak agen uhi.
44025008	Paul in asiamna thu agen a, “Judate dan hi in tempul thu hitaleh, Kaisar tung ah leng bangmah hihkhelh ka nei kei,” achi hi.
44025009	Himahleh Festas in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in Paul kiang ah, “Jerusalem a hohtouh a, huai lai a ka ma a hiai thute lepsak na deih hia?” chi in adong hi.
44025010	Paul in, “Kaisar thukhenna tutphah ma a, vai hawmsak a om ding in ka dingh hi. Judate tung ah thil bangmah ka hihkhial kei chih nangmah in leng na theichian mahmah hi.
44025011	Migilou ka hih a, sihna khop hial khelhna ka hihleh, sih leng ka nial kei; himahleh hiaite hon hekna abul bangmah a-om keileh kuamah in akiang uah hon pekhe thei kei ding. Kaisar kiang ah ka tun ding,” achi hi.
44025012	Huan Festas in avaihawmpihte ahoulimpih kimvel nung in, “Kaisar kiang a thu tut ding na ngen maw? Kaisar kiang ah na pai mahmah ding,” chi in adawng hi.
44025013	Ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa Agrippa leh Barnis, Kaisaria khua ahong tung ua, Festas chibai abuk uhi.
44025014	Huai a ni tampi ataam ziak un Festas in Paul thubuai kumpipa kiang ah aluikhia a, “Felik in mitang kuahiam anusia hi
44025015	Jerusalem a ka om lai in siampu liante leh Juda upate'n atungtang thu ahon hilh ua, siam louh tansak ahon ngen uhi.
44025016	Ke'n amaute kiang ah, ahekpa uleh amah hekte akimaituah ua, ahekna thu ua asiamna thu genna hunlem aneih ma in, mi kuahiam thah ding a piakkhiak Rome mite dan ahi kei, chi in ka dawng hi.
44025017	Huchi in hiai lai ka hong tun un, sawt hal lou in azing in thukhenna tutphah ah ka tu a, huai mipa hon pi ding in thu ka pia hi.
44025018	Ahekte adin lai un, ka muanmohdan ngohna atung ah gitlouhna thubuai agen kei uhi.
44025019	Asabiak thu ua, Jesu, mi khat sisa, Paul in ahing nawn ahi, chi a agup ziak in atung ah thubuai anei uh ana hi zaw hi.
44025020	Ke'n huai thute ngaihtuahdan ding ka thei kei a, Jerusalem a hoh a, huai lai a huai thu lepsak a-utleh ut louh ka dong hi.
44025021	Himahleh Paul in Kumpipa lep dia sit angen zawta hi. Huaiziak in Kaisar kiang a ka sawl theih masiah veng ding in thu ka pia hi,” achi hi.
44025022	Huan Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi thu kei mahmah in zak ka ut gige ahi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Zingchiah athugen na ngaikhe ding,” achi hi.
44025023	Huchi in azing in Agrippa leh Barnis thupitak in ahong ua, thugenna inn ah alut ua, sepaih heutu liante toh, khua a milian deuhte toh; huan Festas thu in Paul apilutsak uhi.
44025024	Huan Festas in, “Kumpipa Agrippa leh hiai lai a om tengtengte aw, hiai mi na muh uh ahi, atungtang thu a Judate tengteng in, hing tak nawn lou ding chi a kikou a, Jerusalem khua leh hiai lai a ka kiang a ahek uh ahi.
44025025	Himahleh sihna ding khop bangmah ahih kei chih ka thei hi. Huan ama'n Kumpipa kiang a tut anget ziak in sawl ka tum ahi;
44025026	Himahleh ka toupa kiang ah atungthu ginatak in bangmah gelh ding ka thei kei hi. Huaiziak in na ma uah ka hon pikhia hi, Kumpipa Agrippa nangmah ma a hon pi tuanse ka hi a, etchet nung a banghiam bek gelh ding ka muhtheihna ding in.
44025027	Hekna kiteltak omloupi a henta kuahiam Kumpipa kiang a sawl thil haihuai hi in ka thei hi,” achi hi.
44026001	Huai zoh in Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Na siamna thu na gen thei,” achi hi. Huan Paul in akhut avan a, asiamna thu agen hi.
44026002	“Kumpipa Agrippa, Judate'n ahon hekna tengteng uah ka siamna thu gen ding a tuni a na ma a ka din theih hampha ka kisa hi.
44026003	Judate tawndan leh pupa ngeinate theisiam leh pil mahmah na hih ziak in ka kipak tuanse hi. Huaiziak in thuakzoutak in ka thugen hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi.
44026004	“Ka tuailai hun a kipan ka chipihte lak leh Jerusalem a ka omdan Judate tengteng in athei uhi.
44026005	Atung a kipan a ka tanchin theite ahi ua, huchi a ka sabiakdan ua ngentelpen a khosa Pharisai ka hihdan a-ut ualeh ahon genpih thei uhi.
44026006	Pathian in ka pipute uh kiang a thu achiam lametna ziak in tu in hiai ah vai hawmsak in ka dingh hi.
44026007	Huai thuchiam lametna ziak in ka nam uh sawm-le-nih in, sun leh zan in Pathian nna phatuamngaitak a sem in muh alamen uhi. Kumpipa aw, huai lametna tungthu ah Judate'n ahon hek uhi.
44026008	Pathian in misite akaithou ding chih bangchidan a thil hi thei lou a ngaihtuah na hi ua?
44026009	“Kei mahmah in Nazaret Jesu min kalh a hihtheih teng hih thil hoih hi in ka na ngaihtuah hi.
44026010	Huai bang Jerusalem ah leng ka hih zel hi; siampu liante kiang a thu mu in, misiangthoute lak a mi tampi suangkul ah ka khum zel hi; ahihlup lai un lemsa lam ah leng ka na pang zel hi.
44026011	Huan sinagog teng ah ka sawi gige a, Jesu thu gensiatsak ka tum teitei hi. Huan atung uah ka gilou mahmah a, gamdang khuate tanpha in leng ka sawi zel hi.
44026012	“Huchibang a hih ding in siampu liante thu mu in leh asawlna lai uh tawi in Damaskas ah ka hoh hi.
44026013	Kumpipa aw, huchi a ka pai lai in sun laitak in, nisa vak sang a vakphazaw van a kipan in keimah leh ka paipihte kim ah hong vak ka mu hi.
44026014	Ka vek un lei ah ka puk ua, Hebru pau in, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi? Sutna chiangzum tot nang dia na ahi,’ hon chi in ka za hi.
44026015	Ke'n, ‘Toupa, kua na hia?’ ka chi hi. Toupa'n, ‘Na sawi, Jesu ka hi,’ achi hi.
44026016	Himahleh thou inla dingh in; hiai na thil muhte leh na kiang a ka hon lah lai dingte sem ding leh theihpih dia sikha a nang hon bawl ding in na kiang ah ka hong kilak ahi.
44026017	Mi tengteng leh ka hon sawlna mite, Zentelte khut a kipan ka hon humhing ding;
44026018	amit uh hihvak ding in akiang uah ka hon sawl ahi, huchi in mial a pan vak lam anga ding ua, Setan thuneihna Pathian lam angatsan ding uhi, khelhna ngaihdamna amuhna ding uleh ahon gintak ziak ua sehtuam siangthoute lak a goutan aneihna ding un,” achi hi.
44026019	“Huaiziak in kumpipa Agrippa aw, van a kilakna ka sel kei hi.
44026020	Atung in Damaskas a mite kiang ah, huan Jerusalem ah, Judia leh gam chih a mite kiang leh Zentelte kiang ah leng athilhih uh kisik a, Pathian lam angatna ding un ka hilh zaw hi.
44026021	Hiaite ziak in Judate'n tempul ah ahon man ua, hon hihlup atum uhi.
44026022	Himahleh Pathian kiang a kipan a panpihna ka muh ziak in tuni tan in mineute leh miliante kiang a thu theisak in ka om lai hi; zawlneite leh Mosi in hong tung ding achih thu kia uh lou ngal thudang gen lou in.
44026023	Huchi a, Khrist in gim athuak ding a, misi lak a kipan athohnawn ziak a mi tengteng kiang leh Zentelte kiang a vak musakpa masapen ahi ding achih thu uh,” achi hi.
44026024	Huchibang a asiamna thu agen lai in, Festas in, aw ngaihtak in, “Paul, hai na hi; na theih tamna in nang hon haisak ahi,” achi hi.
44026025	Himahleh Paul in, Festas hoihpen, “Hai kei veng e; thu diktak leh thu piltak ka gen zaw ahi.
44026026	Hiai thute kumpipa'n athei, akiang ah leng hangsantak in ka gen ahi; hiai thil bangmah akiang ah iim ahi kei chih diktak in ka thei hi. Hiai thu inkil kawm peuh a aguk a hih ahi kei hi.
44026027	Kumpipa Agrippa, zawlneite na gingta hia? Na gingta chih ka thei,” achi hi.
44026028	Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Sawt louchik sung in Khristian na hon suaksak zou dek,” achi hi.
44026029	Paul in, “Sawt in tom taleh, nang kia ka chi kei, tuni a ka thu za tengteng leng keimah bang a om ding in Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ahi, hiai kolbutte chih louh ngal,” achita hi.
44026030	Huan thu agen zoh in kumpipa adingtou a, gam-ukpa, Barnis leh akiang ua tute leng adingh chiat uhi.
44026031	Apaituam ua akihou ua, “Hiai mi'n sihna leh kolbutna khop hial thil bangmah ahih kei,” achi uhi.
44026032	Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi'n Kaisar kiang a tut ding na ngen lou hileh pawt mai ding hiven,” achi hi.
44027001	Itali gam a long a pai ding thu ahihpuktak un, Paul leh henta dang kuate hiam Augusta pawl a sepaih zaheutu, amin Julias akemsak uhi.
44027002	Huan Adramittium kho long, Asia gam tuipi piau a kho omte tawn ding ah ka tuang ua, tuipi ah ka paita uhi. Ka kiang uah Masidonia gam a mi Aristarkhas, Thessalonika khomi a-om hi.
44027003	Azing in Sidon khua ka tawn uhi. Julias in Paul alimbawl ngial a, kihihhalh ding in alawmte kiang ah apawtsak hi.
44027004	Huai a kipan in tuipi ah ka pai nawn ua, huih in ahi lou lam a hon mut ziak in Kupra tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi.
44027005	Silisia gam leh Pamphilia gamzul tuipi ka khen nung un, Lisia gam a Mira khua ka tung uhi.
44027006	Huai ah sepaih zaheutupa'n Aleksandria kho long Itali gam tawn ding amu a; huai ah hon tuangsak hi.
44027007	Ni tampi, awlawl in ka pai ua, Knidas kho zawn haksapi in ka tung teitei ua, huih in hon sawnkik ziak in Salmoni zuan in Krit tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi.
44027008	Haksatak in tui geigei ah ka pai ua, Longkhawlna Kilawm achih mun uh ka tungta ua; huai kiang ah Lasea khua a-om hi.
44027009	Huan ni tampi abei tak ziak in leh long a pai alauhuai ziak in, An Ngawl ni akhengta ngal a, Paul in amau athuhilh a, akiang uah,
44027010	“Pute aw, tua long a tuangte siatna leh manthatna thupitak i tung ua tung ding ahi chih ka thei a, avante leh long tung ah kia ka chi kei a, eimah tung ah leng ka chi ahi,” achi hi.
44027011	Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul thugen sang in longpu leh long neipa thu agingta zaw hi.
44027012	Phalbi douna ding in longkhawlna aginat louh ziak in atamzaw in huai a kipan a tuipi a paikhiak a, bangchi hiam bek a Phoenik khua tun teitei a, huai lai a phalbi dou asawmpih ua; Phoenik ahihleh Krit tuikulh a longkhawlna khat ahi a, simtum leh maltum lam doh ahi.
44027013	Sim huih awlawl a ahong nuntak in adeihlam uh mu akisa ua, sikkip akhaikhia ua, Krit tuikulh zulzul ah apai uhi.
44027014	Himahleh sawt lou nung in huih hattak, Euroklidon kichi, gam lam a kipan in ahong nung hi.
44027015	Long ahon mutkhata a, huihlam angat theih louhtak in ka khahta ua, hon mutleng hon mutlengta hi.
44027016	Kauda tuikulh neuchik petmah pansan in huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai ua, haksatak in long neu ka bitsak thei ham uhi.
44027017	Akaihkhiak nung un panpihna khaute khawng azang ua, long nuailam ah vial kawm in akhih uhi. Puanzakna bangkim apuksak ua, huchi lou in zaw Sirtis piaunel kip lou a lenlut alau ua, huchi in huih mutdan dungzui in apai uhi.
44027018	Tuikihot in hon sep ek ziak in, azing in tui lak ah long a vante apaikheta uhi.
44027019	Huan ani thum ni in, amau khut in long vante apaikhe nawnta uhi.
44027020	Huan ni tampi nisa leh aksi leng akimu kei a, huihpi hat petmah in hon nuai a, hin himhim ka lamen nawn kei uhi.
44027021	Huan an ne lou a sawttak a-om nung un, alak uah Paul adingh a, “Pute aw, Krit tuikulh a kiphel lou dia, ka thu ngaikhia hi le uchin hiai siatna leh manthatna tuah louh ding hi zen a.
44027022	Himahleh tu'n ah leng khamuangtak a om ding in ka hon hanthawn lai hi. Na lak uah kuamah in hinna na mangsak kei ding uh, long zaw amangthang ding.
44027023	Amah Pathian a ka hih a, a-nna leng ka sep, amah angel tuzan in ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ka kiang ah,
44027024	‘Paul, lau ke'n, Kaisar ma ah na dingh ding. Ngai in, long a na kiang a zin tengteng leng Pathian in ahon pia hi,’ ahon chi hi.
44027025	Huaiziak in Pute aw, khamuangtak in om un, Pathian ka gingta hi, hon hilh bang in a-om ding hi.
44027026	Himahleh bang tuikulh hiam ah zaw ahon lenkhe ding,” achi hi.
44027027	Zan sawm-le-li achin zan in Adria tuipi ah huih in alanglang ah ahon mutleng leng lai hi. Zankim lai in, long mite'n koi gam hiam tung dek in akithei uhi.
44027028	Huchi in tui thukdan ateh ua, laam sawmnih hi in athei ua, huan sawt louchik in ateh nawn ua, laam sawm-le-nga hi in athei uhi.
44027029	Huan longmei lam ah sikkip li akhia ua, huchi lou in zaw suang se mun ah hon lenkhe zenzen kha ding chih alau ua; huan khovak kal angaklahtak in a-om uhi.
44027030	Huan long mite'n long malam a sikkipte khiak ding bawl a kineih in tuipi ah long neu akhia ua, long taisan atum uhi.
44027031	Hiai lai in Paul in, sepaih zaheutu leh sepaihte kiang ah, “Hiaite long a a-om gige kei uleh abit kei ding uh,” achi hi.
44027032	Huchi in sepaihte'n long neu khaute a-attat ua, akhahta uhi.
44027033	Khovak kuan in, Paul in an ne ding in mi tengteng asawl a, “Tuni bangmah ne lou a na om ua, an na ngawlna uh ani sawm-le-li ni ahita.
44027034	Huaiziak in an ne ding in ka hon sawl chiat ahi; na damna ding uh; na lak uah kuamah asamzang khat leng amangthang kei ding,” achi hi.
44027035	Huai thu agen khit in tanghou ala a, Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen khit in, mi tengteng ma ah abalkham a, ane panta hi.
44027036	Amau leng khamuangtak in a-om ua, an ane samta uhi.
44027037	Long a mite ka vek un zanih sawmsagih-le-guk ka hi uhi.
44027038	An anek kham khit un, tuipi ah buh apai ua, long ahihzang deuh uhi.
44027039	Huan ni asuah in, koi lai gam ahia chih athei kei ua; himahleh, koi lai longkhawlna hiam piautak nei khat amu ua, huai tung ah ahihtheih uleh long taikhiaksak atum uhi.
44027040	Huan sikkip khihnate a-attat ua, tuipi ah anusia ua; huchih lai mah in kaihheina khihnate aphel ua, huih mut ding in malam puanzak akaitou ua; piautak azuanta uhi.
44027041	Himahleh tuikihot khauh nih kituahna mun ah ka lutkha zenzen ua, long in lei hetkha in, huan, long mailam atang bikbekta a, hihtat zoh louh in a-omta a, tuikihot ahat ziak in longmei lam akekgawpta hi.
44027042	Huan hentate, tui liau galkai khattou a om kha ding ua, ataimang kha ding uh chih alauh man un sepaihte'n amaute hihlup mai asawm uhi.
44027043	Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul humhing a-ut a, athiltup uh akham a; tuileuh siam peuhmah tuipi a tawmkhiak a gam na kai masa ding leh,
44027044	midang akhen singpek tung leh akhen long van tung a kitholh galkai ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in avek un gam ah bittak in agalkai vek uhi.
44028001	Huan gam a ka suahtak un, tuikulh min tuh Malta ahi chih ka theita uhi.
44028002	Tuikulh gam mite'n asiam theihtawp uh suah in hon na hehpih ua; vuah ahong zuk ziak leh khovot ziak in mei atoh ua, ka vek un hon na kipahpih uhi.
44028003	Paul in singlom khat atom a mei ah achih a, asat ziak in gul ahong vakkhia a, akhut a tu in atangden hi.
44028004	Tuikulh gam mite'n ganhing akhut a kikhaiden amuh un, “Hiai mi tualthat ahi ding, tuipi a kipan taikhe mahleh diktatna in ahin phalta lou ahi,” achi uhi.
44028005	Himahleh ama'n mei ah gul asingkhia a, bangmah achi kei hi.
44028006	Amau bel abawk hiam, thakhat a puk pah a si ding in agingta uh; hun sawtpi angak nilouh ua, bangmah achi kei chih atheih un alungsim uh akheng ua, Pathian ahi achi zaw uhi.
44028007	Huai mun kiang ah huai tuikulh a hausapa, amin Publias a-om a, huai mi in ahon na kipahpih a, ni thum siamtak in ahon tungsak hi.
44028008	Publias pa khosik leh santen vei in ana lum a; akiang ah Paul alut a, athum a, atung ah akhut koih in ahihdamta hi.
44028009	Huai ahihdam khit in tuikulh a midang natna nei peuhmah ahong ua; adam chiatta uhi.
44028010	Huai mite'n nakpitak in ahon na pahtawi ua; ka pai ding un long ah ka vante uh ahong koih uhi.
44028011	Huan kha thum nung in, Aleksandria kho long, phalbi a tuikulh a omsa, unau phik, Kastor leh Pollux lutang kisuanna long ah ka pai uhi.
44028012	Sairakus khua ka tawn ua huai ah ni thum ka taam uhi.
44028013	Huai a kipan ka paikawi ua, Rejiam khua ka tung ua; ni khat nung in sim huih ahong nung a, azing nawn in Puteoli khua ka tung nawn uhi.
44028014	Huai ah unaute ka mu ua, akiang uah ni sagih taam ding in ahon khou ua; huchibang in Rome kholam ah ka pai zelta uhi.
44028015	Huan unaute'n ka Tanchin uh azaktak un huai a kipan in Appii dawr leh Khualbuk thumte omna chiang ah hong dawn ding in ahong kuan ua; Paul in huai mite amuh in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen a, alungmuang mahmahta hi.
44028016	Rome a ka lut un Paul bel avengpa sepaih kiang a amah kia a om aphal uhi.
44028017	Ni thum nung in, Paul in Juda heutute asamkhawm a; akihoukhawm ua, akiang uah, “Unaute leh mite aw, i pipute dan tung ah bangmah ka hihkhelh louh in leng Jerusalem a kipan in Rome a mite kiang ah ahon hentasak uhi.
44028018	Amau ahon etchet khit un, sihna khop hial ka tung ah bangmah amuh louh ziak un khah ahon tum uhi.
44028019	Himahleh Judate'n huai asel ziak un Kaisar kiang tun lou thei ka hita kei a; himahleh ka chipihte hekna nei a hih bel ka hi kei hi.
44028020	Huai lam thu a noumau hon mu a hon houpih ding in ka hon sam ahi; Israelte lamet thilte toh kisai a khainiang bun ka hi ngal a,” achi hi.
44028021	Amau akiang ah, “Na tanchin Judia gam a kipan lai in ka mu kei ua, unau hiai a hong omte kuamah in na tungtang thubuai bangmah apulak kei ua, gen leng agen ngei kei uhi.
44028022	Himahleh hiai pawl zaw gam teng ah gensiat ahi ngal ua, nang bangchi in ahia na ngaih chih theih ka utzaw uhi,” achi uhi.
44028023	Huan ni achiam ua, huai atunna ah akiang ah mi tampi ahong ua; zing a kipan nitaklam pha in akiang uah huai thu ahilhchian a, Pathian lalgam thu atheisak a, Mosi Dan laibu thu leh zawlneite laibu thu in Jesu lam ah amaute athuzoh zel hi.
44028024	Khenkhat in athugen agingta ua, akhen in agingta kei uh.
44028025	Huan akituakta kei ua, Paul in thu agen khit in apaikheta uhi. Athugen tuh hiai ahi: Kha Siangthou in zawlnei Isai kam a na pipute uh kiang a athugen adik mahmah ahi chi in:
44028026	“Hiai chite kiang ah va gen in, bil in zaw na za na ding ua, angaihna ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh; muh zaw na mu ding ua, theih ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh.
44028027	Hiai chite lungtang atakta a, abilte uh ana ngong deuh a, amit uh leng asi ua, huchi lou in zaw amit un amu ding ua, abil un aza ding ua, alungtang un leng athei ding uh, akiheikik ding ua, ke'n ka hihdam kha ding hi,” achi, achih pen ahi.
44028028	“Huaiziak in Pathian hotdamna thu Zentelte kiang a khakkhiak ahi chih thei un, amau bel ngaih leng angaikhe ding uh,” achi hi.
44028029	Huchi a hiai thute agen khit nung in, Judate apawtkheta ua, alak uah nakpitak in kiselna apiang hi.
44028030	Huchi in kum nih vengveng ama inn luahna mun ah Paul a-om a, akiang a hoh peuhmah ana kipahpih hi.
44028031	Pathian lalgam thu ahilh a, hangsantak in Toupa Jesu Khrist thu agen zel a, kuamah in amah akham kei uhi.
45001001	Paul, Jesu Khrist sikha, sawltak hi ding a sap, Pathian tanchinhoih lam a khenkhiak,
45001002	Pathian in tuma lam a Laisiangthou a azawlneite a achiamsa,
45001003	atapa, salam a David suan a piang tungtang thu,
45001004	amah Pathian Tapa hihna bel misi lak a kipan thilhihtheihna toh athohnawnna ziak a sianthouna Kha in Jesu Khrist, Toupa chi a apuankhiak ahi.
45001005	Amin ziak a ginna nam chih lak a mi gingtasak ding in, amah ziak in hehpihna leh sawltak hihna i tangta hi;
45001006	huai lak ah nou leng Jesu Khrist sapte na hi uh;
45001007	Rome khua Pathian deihtak, misiangthou a om ding a sapte tengteng kiang ah, Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
45001008	Amasa in khovel tengteng ah na ginna uh athan ziak in na vek ua tung ah ka kipahthu Jesu Khrist ziak in ka Pathian kiang ah ka gen hi.
45001009	Ka thumnate ah tawp lou in na min uh ka lou nilouh ahi, chih kei hon theihpihpa Pathian ahi a, amah ahi a Tapa tanchinhoih gen a ka kha a, a-nna ka sep gige pa pen;
45001010	tu bek a na kiang ua ka hong theihna ding in Pathian thuthu a zin hun lemtang ka muh teitei theihna ding ka ngen hi.
45001011	Na kipna ding ua khalam thilpiak banghiam nou ka hon piaktheihna ding in nou hon muh ka ut thei mahmah ngal a;
45001012	huai na ginna uh leh ka ginna a i kikhamuantuah theihna ding un ka chihna ahi.
45001013	Unaute aw, Zentel dangte kiang a ka sepgim gah ka muhtak bangmah in, noumau lak ah leng gahte ka muhtheihna ding in na kiang uah tamveipi hong ka tumta chih na theih louh uh ka deih kei hi; himahleh tu tanpha dal in ka om nilouh hi.
45001014	Grik mite leh melmak mite kiang ah bat ka nei a; mipil leh mipilloute kiang ah leng.
45001015	Huchi in nou Rome a omte kiang ah leng tanchinhoih gen ka ut mahmah hi.
45001016	Tanchinhoih tuh ka zahpih kei a; kuapeuh agingta phot a ding in hotdamna ding a Pathian thilhihtheihna ahi ngal a; atung in Juda mi a ding in ahi a, huan Grik mi a ding in leng ahong hi nawn hi.
45001017	Huai ah tuh gin semsemna ding in ginna in Pathian diktatna latsak in a-om hi, “Midiktat tuh ginna in ahing ding,” chi a gelh ahih bang in.
45001018	Dik loutak a thutak dalte leh Pathian limsaklouhna leh diktatlouhna tengteng tung ah van a kipan in Pathian thangpaihna ahong kilangta hi.
45001019	Pathian in atheihsak tak ziak in Pathian tanchin theihtheih ding tuh alungsim uah chiangtak a theihsak in a-omta ngal a.
45001020	Khovel siam tung a kipan a pianken muh theih louh, atangtawn thilhihtheihna leh a Pathianna, thilsiamte ah chiantak a muh theih ahi; huaiziak in paulam ding anei kei uhi.
45001021	Pathian thei ngal in Pathian bang in apahtawi kei ua; kipahthu leng agen sam kei uh; himahleh thil thulim lou angaihtuah zaw ua, alungtang hai uh ahong mialta hi.
45001022	Pil kisa khem in mihai ahong suak ua,
45001023	asithei lou Pathian thupina sithei mihingte leh vasate, gamsate leh bokvak ganhingte lim asuaksak uhi.
45001024	Huaiziak in asa uh zumhuaipi a kibawltuah ding in alungtang uh duhgawlna bang a thilnin hihphal in Pathian in alehngatsan hi.
45001025	Pathian thutak tuh zuau tangsak in, abawlpa biak sang in abawl bia in a-nna asem uhi. Abawlpa tuh tangtawn a phat tuak ahi, Amen.
45001026	Huaiziak in Pathian in zumhuaipi a huk phal in lehlam angatsanta hi; anumeite nangawn un leng a-omdan pianpih uh dan lou bang a om ding in akibawl lamdang ua;
45001027	pasalte'n leng numei zatdan ngeina tawpsan in, huk in aki-enlahtuah ua, pasal leh pasal zummoh thilhih in a-om uh; agitlouh man muh ding uh asa tung ua mu in.
45001028	Huan Pathian theih a-ut louh ziak un, thil kilawmloute hih ding a adeih louh lam lungsim neih phal in Pathian in alehngatsanta hi.
45001029	Huchi in diktatlouhna, gitlouhna, huaihamna, huatna in adim ua; hazatna, tualthahna, kiselna, khemna, nundan hoih lou in adim ua;
45001030	gensiatnate, migennate, Pathian huat lamte, kisaktheihnate, kisathei mite, thil gilou bawlkhete,
45001031	nu leh pa thu mangloute, theihna beite, thuchiam susete, itna pianpih neiloute, hehpihna neiloute ahi uhi.
45001032	Huchibang hihte tuh si tak him ahi uh chih Pathian dan tuh theigige in, amau kia a hih leng hilou in, midang hih zelte tung ah leng akipak uhi.
45002001	Huaiziak in mihing aw, miselhat kuapeuh himah lechin paulam himhim na nei kei hi. Midang na selna mah ah nangmah leh nangmah siam louh na kitan hi. Nang selhat in leng huchibang thilte na hih sam ngal hi.
45002002	Huchibang thilhih nakte tung ah Pathian' vaihawmna diktak in atung, chih i thei uhi.
45002003	Mihing aw, huchibang thilhih nakte gensia, nang leng huchibang na hih sam ngal nak a, Pathian' vaihawmna pelh na kigingta a hia?
45002004	Ahihkeileh Pathian hoihna kisikna a nang hon pi ding a om ahi chih thei lou in, ahoihna, athuaktheihna leh adohtheihna hauhnate na ngaineu a hia?
45002005	Himahleh na lungtang khauh leh kisik utlouhnate ziak in, na tung ah thangpaihna na kholkhawmte Pathian' vaihawmna diktat hong kilatna, thangpaihna ni chiang a ding a kholkhawm ahi zaw hi.
45002006	Pathian in michih athilhih bang zel un ahawmsak ding;
45002007	Thil hoih hih teitei a, thupina leh pahtawina leh manthat theihlouhna zong mite kiang ah tangtawn hinna ape ding hi.
45002008	Himahleh genhakte, thutak zui lou a, gitlouhna zui zawte tung ah, hehna leh thangpaihna, haksatna leh lungkhamna thupitak a-om dia;
45002009	mihing thil hihkhial tengteng kha tung ah a-om ding, Juda mi kha tung ah a-om masa ding a, huan, Grik mi kha tung ah a-om nawn ding hi.
45002010	Himahleh, thil hoih hih peuhmahte kiang ah thupina, pahtawina, khamuanna piak ahi ding, Juda mi kiang ah piak ahi masa ding a, huan, Grik mi kiang ah ahi nawn ding hi.
45002011	Pathian in mi deihsak tuam anei ngal kei hi.
45002012	Kuapeuh dan nei lou a thil hihkhial, dan lou in amangthang ding hi; kuapeuh dan nei a thil hihkhial, dan bang in vaihawm in a-om ding.
45002013	Dan zami phette Pathian mitmuh in midik ahi kei ua; dan zuite midik ahi zaw ding uhi.
45002014	Dan nei lou Zentelte'n amau pianpih a dan thilte ahih un, amau dan nei kei mah le uh, amau leh amau dan in akinei tawm uhi.
45002015	Alungtang uah dan thilhih gelh ahi chih langsak ding in asia-le-pha theihna un atheihpih hi; alungsimte un leng theihpih ahih ziak in angaihtuahna un siam louh atangsak hiam siam atangsak zel hi.
45002016	Ka tanchinhoih gen bang in, Pathian vaihawm ni chiang in mihing thugukte, Jesu Khrist ah angaihtuah ding hi.
45002017	Himahleh nang Juda na kichi a, dan a kinga in Pathian na suang hi.
45002018	Adeihlam na thei a, thil hoihzawte hoih na sa a, dan a hilh in na om a,
45002019	nangmah mittawte pipa, mial lak a omte vakna hi in na kigingta hi.
45002020	Dan ah pilna leh thutak omdan na theih ziak in, mipilloute hilhpilpa, naungekte hilhpa in na kigingta hi.
45002021	Huchibang na hih ngalleh nang midangte hilhpa, nangmah na kihilh kei a hia? Nang guta lou dia mite hilhpa, nang na gu nak maw?
45002022	Nang angkawm lou dia hilhpa, nang ang na kawm maw? Nang milim hopa, nang milim tempul a thilte na gu nak maw?
45002023	Nang dan suangpa, nang dan a na tatlek ziak in Pathian na hihminse zel ahi maw?
45002024	“Pathian min noumau ziak in Zentelte lak ah gensiat in a-omta hi,” chi a kigelh bang in.
45002025	Dan zuipa na hihleh zeksum aphatuam ngial hi; dan a talekpa na hihleh bel, na zeksum sum louh bang phet ahong hita hi.
45002026	Huaiziak in zek sumloumi in dan thusehte azuihleh azeksum louh, sum bang a sim ahi kei dia hia?
45002027	Huan amau sa a zeksum louh in dan azuih kim uleh, nang dan thu gelh leh zeksum nei ngal a dan a talekpa ahon mohpaih kei ding ua hia?
45002028	Alang lel a Juda mi hih zaw Juda mi tak ahi kei a; alang a sa lel a zeksum zaw zeksum tak ahi tuan sam kei hi.
45002029	Himahleh alang lel hilou a, Juda mi zaw, Juda mi tak ahi; huan zeksum tak, lungsim a sum ahi, laigelh thu phet ah hilou in, kha ah ahi; huai mi'n mihing phat aloh kei a, Pathian phat aloh zaw ahi.
45003001	Ahihleh Juda mi'n hamphat tuamna bang ahia aneih tuan? Zeksum leng bang ahia aphattuamna?
45003002	Bang lam peuh ah aphatuam hi; Pathian thute akiang ua kepsak a a-om ziak ahi pen.
45003003	Mi khenkhatte'n ginna nei kei mah le uh, bang ahi tuan a eita? Agintaklouhna un Pathian muanhuaina bangmah lou in abawl tuan a hia?
45003004	Bawl tuan lou hial! Pathian midiktak hita hen, michih zuauthei hi uhen: “Nang na thugen in siam na tang thei a, vaihawm a na om in leng na zohtheihna ding in,” chih gelh bang in.
45003005	Himahleh i diktatlouhna in Pathian diktatna a hihlat semleh bang i gen dia? Pathian in mi agawt in, midiktat lou ahi hia? Mihing dan bang in ka gen ahi.
45003006	Hilou hial! Huchibang hitaleh, Pathian in khovel vai bangchi in ahawm dia?
45003007	Himahleh ka zuauthu gen ziak a Pathian thu dikdan amah hih thupi khop hial a alat sem ngalleh bang achia kei leng mikhial bang a siam louh tansak a om lai ka hia?
45003008	Bang achia, ahon hek ua, mi khenkhat in gen louhpi hon gensak bang un, “Thil hoih ahong tuntheihna ding in thil gilou i hih ding uh,” chi a i gen zawk louh? Huchibang ching mite'n siam louh atan uh adik him ahi.
45003009	Ahihleh amau sang in i hoihzaw khol ua hia? Hoihzaw lou hial. Judate leh Grikte khelhna sikha a om vek in tuma in leng i ngohta vele;
45003010	“Kuamah midiktat himhim a-om kei uh, khat leng a-om kei uh;
45003011	kuamah theisiam himhim a-om kei uh, kuamah Pathian zong himhim a-om kei uh.
45003012	Ahilou lam ah apial khinta ua, bangmah phatuam lou in a-om khinta ua, kuamah thil hoih hih himhim a-om kei uh, khat lel leng a-om kei uh,”
45003013	Agawl uh han kihong ahi a; alei un khemna thu agen uhi. Akamsung uah gulgu a-om hi.
45003014	Akam uh hamse lohna leh thukha in adim hi.
45003015	Akhete uh sisan suah ding in akinsuan uhi;
45003016	Alampite uah manthatna leh gimthuakna a-om a;
45003017	khamuanna lampi athei kei ua,
45003018	amit uah Pathian launa a-om kei, chih gelh bang in.
45003019	Dan in bangpeuh agen a, dan thuthu a omte kiang a agen ahi chih i thei uhi; kam chiteng adaihsak theihna ding in leh khovel a mi tengteng Pathian vaihawm a a-omtheihna ding un.
45003020	Huchi in “Dan thilhihte ziak in mi kuamah amitmuh in siamtang in a-om kei ding uhi,” dan tawn in khelhna theihna ahong om hi.
45003021	Himahleh tu'n bel dan leh zawlneite na theihsak Pathian dikna dan tel lou in hihlat in a-omta hi.
45003022	Huai tuh Jesu Khrist gintak ziak a, agingtate tengteng a dia Pathian diktatna ahi. Lamdanna himhim a-om kei.
45003023	Mi tengteng in thil ahihkhelh ziak ua Pathian thupina atan zoh louh nung un,
45003024	Khrist Jesu a om tatna ziak in, hehpihna a athawn a siamtansak in a-om uhi.
45003025	Amah tuh asisan ziak a thuphatawina hi in, ginna a muh ding in Pathian in aluikheta hi. Hiai tuh Pathian dikna latsakna ding ahi, ama'n adohtheihna ziak a nidanglai khelhnate apaikan tak ziak in.
45003026	Huan amah ngei adik a, chih leh Jesu a ginna neimi siam atangsak chih chetna ding in.
45003027	Na ki-otsakna uh koi a om ahia le? Posiah in a-omta. Bang dan in ahia le? Thilhihna dan in hia? Hilou hial, ginna dan in ahi zaw hi.
45003028	Huchi in dan thilhihte ziak hilou in, ginna in mihingte siamtansak in a-om chi in i sep uhi.
45003029	Pathian, Judate Pathian kia ahi hia? Zentelte Pathian leng ahi sam kei a hia? Hi e, Zentelte Pathian leng ahi.
45003030	Pathian khat kia ahih ziak in; ama'n zeksumte aginna ziak un, zeksumlouhte aginna ziak un siam atangsak ding hi.
45003031	Huchi ahihleh hiai ginna ziak in dan bangmah lou a bawl i hi uhia? Bawl lou hial! Dan tuh i hihkip zaw uhi.
45004001	Ahihleh Abraham, sadan a i pu un, bang ahia amuh i gen ding?
45004002	Abraham in thilhih ziak a siam atan ngalleh suan ding anei ahi, Pathian ma ah zaw hi het lou in.
45004003	Laisiangthou in bang agen a? “Abraham in Pathian agingta a, huan huai ginna tuh adikna a seh ahi,” chi in agen ahi.
45004004	Huan nasemmi loh tuh hehpihna a seh ahi kei a, bat a seh ahi zaw hi.
45004005	Himahleh nna sem lou a, Pathian limsak lou siamtangsakpa gingtazaw mi ginna, ama diktatna a seh ahi.
45004006	Mi athilhih ngaihtuah lou a, Pathian in diktat a aseh, avualzawlsak thu David in leng,
45004007	“Atatleknate ngaihdam a om a, akhelhnate uh khuh a omte, ahampha uhi,
45004008	Toupa'n khelhna nei a asehlouhte ahampha uhi,” chi a agen bang in.
45004009	Ahihleh huai vualzawlna zeksumte kia tung ah hia a-om, zeksumloute tung ah leng? Abraham ginna adiktatna a seh ahi, i chi ngal ua.
45004010	Huai bangchi seh ahia? Azeksum nung in hia, azeksum ma in? Azeksum nung in ahi kei a, azeksum ma in ahi zaw hi.
45004011	Huchi in azeksum ma in ginna ziak in diktatna amu chih chiamtehna ding in zeksum thu amu hi. Huchi a amah tuh zeksum lou himahleh agingtate diktatna sehsak a omte tengteng pa ahihtheihna ding in.
45004012	Huchi mah bang a zeksumte phet hilou, i pa uh Abraham in zek asum ma a aneih ginna bang ginna khekhap zuite pa ahihtheihna ding ahi.
45004013	Abraham leh asuante kiang a khovel gouluah ding ahi ding uh chih thuchiam zaw dan a kinga ahi kei a, ginna ziak a diktatna a kinga ahi zaw hi.
45004014	Dan nei mite gouluahte hi ding hi le uh bel, ginna bangmah in aphatuam kei a, thuchiam leng thuchiam ahita kei hi.
45004015	Dan in thangpaihna atun nak ngal a; himahleh dan omlouhna ah tatlekna leng a-om kei hi.
45004016	Huaiziak in thuchiam hehpihna a piak ahihtheihna ding in ginna a kinga ahi, asuante tengteng in thuchiam pel lou a aluahtheihna ding un. Dan nei mite kia in aluah kei ding ua, Abraham neih bang ginna neite'n leng aluah sam ding uhi; amah i vek ua pa ahi.
45004017	“Nam tampite pa in ka hon bawlta,” chi a gelh ahih bang in, misite hihhingpa leh thil omloute om bang a genpa, agin Pathian mitmuh ah eite pa a bawl in a-om zaw hi.
45004018	Lamet tuak a a-om louh in leng ama'n zaw lamentak in agingta a, “Nam tampite pa ahong hihtheihna ding in; huchibang in na suante ahong hi ding uh,” chi a hilh a a-om bang in.
45004019	Huan ginna kip lou tuan lou in, apumpi sisa bang a om tuh angaihtuah a, amah kum za vel mi ahi ngal a, Sarah chiing leng angaihtuah sam hi.
45004020	Pathian thuchiam ginglel lou in ginna tasam in a-om kei a, Pathian apahtawi hi.
45004021	Athuchiam alohchingsak thei chih agingta a, aginna ahong kip zawta hi.
45004022	Huaiziak in aginna tuh adiktatna a seh ahita hi.
45004023	Huchi in “amah ah sehsak in a-om,” chih amah ziak kia a gelh ahi kei a,
45004024	eite ziak in leng ahi. Jesu i Toupa misi lak a kipan a kaithoupa gingta, eite a ding in sehsak ahi ding,
45004025	amah i tatlekna ziak a piakkhiak a om a, siam i tanna ding a kaihthoh a ompa ahi.
45005001	Huaiziak in ginna ziak a siamtansak a om in i Toupa Jesu Khrist pansan in Pathian toh kilem in i om uhi.
45005002	Amah tawn mah in ginna in hiai hehpihna ah luttheihna i nei ua; huai a ding in Pathian thupina i tan ding lametna ah kipak in i om uhi.
