45005003	Huai kia leng hilou in, i gimthuakna ah leng kipak in i om uh, gimthuakna in thuakhatna atun hi.
45005004	Thuakhatna in hindan hoih atun a, hindan hoih in lametna atun chih thei in.
45005005	Huan lametna in ahon zahlaksak kei a, huai Kha Siangthou i kiang ua hon piak tawn a Pathian itna i lungtang ua sun a a-om tak ziak in.
45005006	I hat louh lai in ahuntak in Pathian limsakloute sih sik in Khrist ahong sita hi.
45005007	Midik sik a sih, mi a-ut ngel kei hial ding ua, mihoih sik in bel mi kuahiam bek in sih angap khamoh kei ding hi.
45005008	Himahleh Pathian in mikhialte i hih lai a Khrist i sik a asihna ah ahon itna alangsakta hi.
45005009	Huchi in asisan a siamtansak a i om khit nung in, amah ziak in Pathian hehna a kipan hotdam in i om ngei ding uhi.
45005010	Melma i hih lai a bawn a Tapa sihna ziak a Pathian toh na kilemkik khin i hih ngal uleh, kilem a i om khit nung un ahinna ziak in hotdam in i om sem ding uhi.
45005011	Huai kia leng ahi kei, kilepkikna tua hon musakpa i Toupa Jesu Khrist ziak in Pathian ah leng i kipak ahi.
45005012	Huan mi khat ziak in khovel ah khelhna alut a, khelhna ziak in sihna alut a, huchi in mi tengteng akhelh tak ziak un sihna in mi tengteng azelsuakta hi.
45005013	Dan om ma in khovel ah khelhna a-om khin ngal a; dan a-om louh lai in khelhna tuh khelhna a sim ahi kei hi.
45005014	Himahleh Adam om a kipan Mosi om pha in Adam tatlekna bang a thil hihkhialloute tung ah leng sihna in vai ahawm zel hi. Adam tuh hong pai dingpa tehpihna ahi.
45005015	Himahleh thilthawnpiak zaw tatlekna toh akibang kei. Mi khat tatlekna ziak a mi tampi asih ualeh Pathian hehpihna leh mi khat, Jesu Khrist hehpihna thawnpiak akichingzaw sem a mi tampi tung ah vuh in a-om hi
45005016	Huan thilthawnpiak zaw mi khat tatlekna gah toh leng akibang sam kei hi. Mi khat tatlekna tung a vaihawmna in siam louh tansakna atun a, mi tampi tatlekna tung a thilthawnpiak in bel siamtansakna atun hi.
45005017	Mi khat tatlekna ziak a sihna in huai mi khat mah pansan a vai ahawm leh hehpihna kiningching mahmah leh diktatna thawnpiak tangte'n mi khat, Jesu Khrist pansan in hinna ah vai ahawm zaw sem ding uhi.
45005018	Huan mi khat tatlekna in mi tengteng a ding a siam louh tansakna atut mah bang in, mi khat diktatna thilhih in mi tengteng a ding in suahtakna leh hinna ahon tun hi.
45005019	Mi khat thumanlouhna ziak a mi tampi mikhial a bawl ahih bang un, mi khat thumanna ziak in mi tampi midiktat a bawl ahi ding uhi.
45005020	Khelhna latsak semna ding in Dan ahong om behlap a; himahleh khelhna akhanna peuh ah hehpihna akhangsem,
45005021	huchi a khelhna in sihna a vai ahawm mah bang a, hehpihna in leng i Toupa Jesu Khrist pansan a diktatna ziak a tangtawn hinna dong a vai ahawmtheihna ding in.
45006001	Bang i genta dia le? Hehpihna akhansem theihna ding in khelhna ah i om nilouh ding ua hia?
45006002	Om nilouh lou hial ding! Eite khelhna lam a sisa, khelhna ah bangchi in i hing thei lailai dia?
45006003	Eite Khrist Jesu a baptis lut a om tengteng asihna ah baptis lut in i om chih na thei kei ua hia?
45006004	Huaiziak in asihna a baptis lut a om in amah toh vuikhawm in i om uhi, huchi a Pa thupina in misi lak a kipan a Khrist akaihthoh tak bang a eite leng hinna thak a i khosak theihna ding in.
45006005	Asihna kibatpih a amah toh i kizop khit ngalleh athohnawnna kibatpih in leng i kizom ngei ding uhi.
45006006	I mihing lui akiang ah kilhden in a-om samta chih i thei; huchi a khelhna pumpi hihmanthat a a-omtheihna ding leh tua kipan a khelhna sikha a i omlouhna ding in.
45006007	Kuapeuh sisa khelhna lak ah asuaktata hi.
45006008	Huan Khrist toh i sih samleh akiang ah i hing sam ding chih i gingta uhi.
45006009	Misi lak a kipan Khrist kaihthoh in a-omta, asi nawn kei ding chih i thei ngal ua; sihna in amah tung ah thu aneita kei hi.
45006010	Asihna khelhna lam thu ah tangtawn a ding in khatvei kia asi a, ahinna bel Pathian lam thu ah ahing ahi.
45006011	Huchi mah bang in, nou leng khelhna lam thu ah sisa in kisep unla, Pathian lam thu ah bel Khrist Jesu ah hing in kisep un.
45006012	Huaiziak in na pumpi uh duhgawlna thumang ding in na pumpi sithei uah khelhna vai hawmsak kei un.
45006013	Na pumpi hiangte uh leng diktatlouhna vanzat ding in khelhna kiang ah pe phal sam kei un; himahleh misi lak a kipan hing nawn bang in Pathian kiang ah kipia unla, na pumpi hiangte uh leng diktatna vanzat ding in Pathian kiang ah pe phal zaw un.
45006014	Noute dan thunuai a om hilou a, hehpihna nuai a om na hih ziak un khelhna in na tung uah thu anei nawn kei ding hi.
45006015	Bangchi in ahita dia le? Dan thunuai a om i hi kei ua, hehpihna nuai a om i hih zawk ziak in i khial ding uh ahi diam? Hilou hial ding!
45006016	Kua kiang peuh ah leng athu mang ding a asikha dia na kipiak un sihna khop a khelhna sikha hiam, diktatna khop a thumang sikha hiam, athu na man uh sikha na hi uh chih na thei kei ua hia?
45006017	Himahleh Pathian kiang ah kipahthu om hen; noute khelhna sikha na hita mah le uchin, thuginpi a na kipiakna uh na lungtang taktak un na zuita uhi.
45006018	Khelhna lak a kipan suahtaksak in na omta ua, diktatna sikhate na hong hita uhi.
45006019	Na sa uh hat louh ziak in mihing dan in thu ka gen hi; na sahiangte uh nitna leh tatlekna ding a tatlekna kiang a sikha ding a na piak phal bang un, tu in na sahiangte uh sianthouna ding in diktatna kiang ah sikha ding in pe zaw un.
45006020	Khelhna sikhate na hih lai un diktatna lak ah na siang uhi.
45006021	Huai na thil zahpihsate uah, huai lai in gah bang ahia na muh zel uh? Huai thilte tawpna zaw sihna ahi.
45006022	Tu'n ah bel khelhna lak a hihsiang a om in, Pathian sikhate na hong hih un, sianthouna mu khop in na gah uh na nei uh akei hiam, huai tawpna tangtawn a hinna toh.
45006023	Khelhna man sihna ahi ngal a, Pathian thilthawnpiak bel i Toupa Khrist Jesu ziak in tangtawn a hinna ahi.
45007001	Ahihleh unaute aw, dan in mi adamsung teng atung ah vai ahawm nak chih na thei kei ua hia? Dan thei mite kiang ah ka gen ahi.
45007002	Pasal nei lai numei apasal damsung teng apasal ah dan a hen in a-om ngal a; himahleh asih in bel pasal lam ah dan a kipan khahkhiak in a-om hi.
45007003	Huchi a apasal damsung a midang akitenpihleh angkawm chih ahi ding a; apasal asih in bel huai dan a kipan khahkhiak in a-om a, huchi in midang nei taleh leng angkawm ahi kei hi.
45007004	Huchi ahih mah bang in ka unaute aw, Pathian lam a i gahtheihna ding in midang, misi lak a kipan kaihthoh ngeingei na kitenpih theihna ding un, Khrist pumpi pansan in dan lam ah sihsak in na omta uhi.
45007005	Sa a i om lai un dan ziak a khelhna utna hong suakte'n, i sahiangte ah sihna khop a gah ding in asem nak hi.
45007006	Tu in bel hon henpa lak ah si khin in, dan a kipan khah in i omta, laigelh lui bang hilou a, Kha a hinna thak a nna i septheihna ding in.
45007007	Bang i genta dia le? Dan khelhna ahi a hia le? Hilou hial! Himahleh, dan tawn a theih hi keileh khelhna thei lou ding hi ing a; dan in, “Eng ke'n,” chi keileh, en chih thei lou ding ka hi.
45007008	Himahleh khelhna in, thupiak ziak in, lemtan lai mu in ka sung ah enna chiteng a-omsak hi. Dan pang lou in khelhna kichi asisa ahi ngal a.
45007009	Tuma lam in kei dan lou in ka na hing a; himahleh thupiak ahong omtak in khelhna ahong halh a, kei ka sita hi.
45007010	Huan hinna thuchiam nei thupiak kei a ding in sihna ahong hi chih ka na theita hi.
45007011	Khelhna in thupiak ziak in, lemtanna la in ahon khem a, huai tungtawn mah in ahon hihlumta hi.
45007012	Huchi ahih ziak in dan asiangthou a, thupiak leng asiangthou in, adik a, ahoih ahi.
45007013	Ahihleh thil hoih kichi kei a ding in sihna ahong hi a hia? Hilou hial! Khelhna tuh kei a ding in sihna ahong hi zawta hi. Huchi in khelhna, khelhna ahi chih alattheihna ding in thil hoih zang in ahon that a; thupiak ziak a khelhna, khelhna pen thupitak ahong hihtheihna ding in.
45007014	Dan ahihleh khalam thil ahi chih i thei ngal ua, kei bel sami, khelhna a khotsa ka hi.
45007015	Keimah thilhih mah leng ka theisiam thei kei; ka thilhih zel pen lah ka hih ut lam ahi ngal kei a, ka thil huat lamtak ka hih zaw nak ngal a.
45007016	Ka hih ut louh lam ka hih zel in tuh, dan hoih ahi chih pompih ka suak hi.
45007017	Tu in, huai thilhih pen keimah ahi nawnta kei a, keimah a om khelhna in ahih ahi zaw hi.
45007018	Keimah ah, huai bel, ka taksa ah, thil hoih hih ding lunggulhna zaw keimah ah a-om, himahleh huai thil hoih bangchi sepsuah ding ahia chih ka thei zou kei.
45007019	Thil hoih hih ka ut pen hih lou in, khelhna hih ka ut louh pen, ka hih zaw kha nak ngal a.
45007020	Tu in ka hih ut louh lam pen ka hihleh, ahihpa kei ka hi nawnta kei a, ka sung a teng huai khelhna pen ahi zaw hi.
45007021	Huchi in thil hoih hih ka ut laitak in kei ah gitlouhna ahong om nak chih hiai dan ka mukhia hi.
45007022	Ka lungsim taktak in Pathian dan tung ah ka kipahpih ngal nak a;
45007023	himahleh ka sahiangte ah dan tuam a-om chih ka thei, huai in ka lungsim dan adou a, ka sahiangte a khelhna dan om kiang ah sal in ahon pi hi.
45007024	Genthei hi na lawmlawm ing e! Hiai sihna pumpi a pan kua'n ahia hon suahtaksak ding?
45007025	Jesu Khrist i Toupa ziak in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi. Huchi in keimah tak in zaw ka lungsim in Pathian dan ka sem a, ka taksa in bel gitlouhna dan asem hi.
45008001	Huaiziak in tu'n ah zaw Khrist Jesu a omte a ding in siam louh tansakna himhim a-omta kei hi.
45008002	Khrist Jesu a Hinna Khadan in khelhna leh sihna dan a kipan hon suaktasakta ngal a.
45008003	Sa ziak a dan ahat louh a, ahihtheih vual louh, Pathian in, amah Tapa ngei, khelhna sa gilou bang pu in, khelhna thoihna ding a hon sawl in, sa a khelhna om tuh siam louh atangsakta,
45008004	sadan zui lou a Khadan zui zawte eimah a dan in angiat diktatna tangtun a a-omtheihna ding in.
45008005	Sadan a omte'n salam thilte alunggulh nak ua; Khadan a omte'n bel Khalam thilte alunggulh nak uhi.
45008006	Sa thilte deih zaw sihna ahi ngal a, Kha thil deih bel hinna leh khamuanna ahi.
45008007	Sa deihdan zaw Pathian douna ahih ziak in, huai Pathian dan in a-om ngal kei a, om leng a-om thei kei him ahi.
45008008	Huchi in sa a omte'n Pathian akipaksak thei kei uhi.
45008009	Himahleh Pathian Kha noumau a a-om taktakleh sa a om na hi kei ua, Kha a om na hi zaw uhi. Himahleh, kuapeuh Khrist Kha nei lou zaw amah a ahi kei.
45008010	Khrist Kha noumau a a-om ngalleh khelhna ziak in pumpi asi ahi; kha bel dikna ziak in ahing ahi.
45008011	Himahleh misi lak a kipan Jesu kaithounawn pa Kha noumau a a-omleh, misi lak a kipan Khrist Jesu kaithounawn pa'n, noumau a om ama Kha pansan in na pumpi sitheite uh ahihhing sam ding hi.
45008012	Huaiziak in unaute aw, bat i nei; sadan a om ding in sa lak ah bel ahi kei.
45008013	Sadan a na om uleh, na si mahmah ding uh; himahleh pumpi thilhihte Kha a na hihlup zel uleh bel na hing ding uhi.
45008014	Pathian Kha pi a om peuhmahte zaw, Pathian tate ahi ngal ua.
45008015	Lau a om nawn ding in bawi hihna kha tang na hi ngal kei ua; himahleh ta hihna kha na tang ua, “Abba, Pa!” chi in i kikou hi,
45008016	Kha mahmah in, eimah kha toh, Pathian tate i hi chih hon theisak hi.
45008017	Huan tate i hihleh gouluahpihte i hi uhi; Pathian gouluahte, Khrist luahpihte i hi ua; akiang a pahtawi a i om sam theihna ding a amah i thuakpih taktak nakleh.
45008018	Tu lel a thuaknate den chiang a i tung a thupina hihlat a om ding toh tehpih tham in ka sep kei hi.
45008019	Thilsiam tengteng in, lamen mahmah in, Pathian tate hong latna angaklah mahmah uhi.
45008020	Thilsiam tengtengte thil thulim lou thuthu a omsak in a-omta uh; a-ut ua om ahi kei ua, lametna a a-omsakpa ziak ahi zaw hi.
45008021	Thilsiam tengteng leng siatna sikha a kipan suahtaksak in a-om ding ua, Pathian tate noplenna thupi ah alut ding uhi.
45008022	Thilsiam tengteng tutan in thum leh nauvei nat thuak in a-om uh chih i thei ngal ua.
45008023	Thilsiamte kia hilou in, eite ngei, Kha gah masa tengte leng, ta hihna kilatna, i pumpi tatna ngak in i lungsim sung uah i mau uhi.
45008024	Hiai lametna a hotdam lah i hi ngal ua. Himahleh muh theihgige lametna zaw lametna ahi kei. Kua'n amuh theihgige alamen a?
45008025	I muh louh pen i lametleh bel i ngak teitei hi.
45008026	Huai bang in, Kha in i hatlouhna ah hon huh zel a; bangchi a thum ding ahia chih i thei ngal kei ua; himahleh Kha in mauna gen vual louh in hon thumsak zel hi.
45008027	Pathian deihlam bang zel a misiangthoute athumsak zel ziak in, lungtang enpa'n Kha deihlam athei hi.
45008028	Pathian a-it mite, Ama'n aseh bang a asapte a ding in, ahoihna ding un thil bangkim asemkhawm chih i thei hi.
45008029	Atheihkholhte ama Tapa batpih a om ding in asepkhol a, a-unau tampite lak a ta masapen ahong hihtheihna ding in.
45008030	Huan asehkholhte asam a; huan asapte siam atangsak lai a; siam atansakte apahtawi lai hi.
45008031	Huai thu ah bang i genta dia le? Pathian ei lam a apanleh kua'n ahia hon zou thei ding?
45008032	Ama Tapa ngei leng hawi lou a, i vek ua ding a pepa'n thil tengteng athawn in ahon pe tawk kei dia hia?
45008033	Pathian mitelte kua'n ahia hek ding? Siamtangsakpa lah Pathian ahi ngal a.
45008034	Kua'n ahia siam louh tangsak ding? Asi pen Khrist Jesu ahi; ahi, athounawn zawta a, Pathian taklam a om hon gensakpa ahi.
45008035	Khrist itna a kipan kua'n ahia hon khen ding? Gimthuakna in hia, lungngaihna in hia, sawina in hia, taam in hia, vuaktanna in hia, lauhuaina in hia, namsau in hia?
45008036	“Nangmah ziak in nitum in thah in ka om ua; goh ding belam bang a sim ka hi uh,” chih gelh bang in.
45008037	Khen lou hial ding, huaite tengteng ah, hon itpa ziak in, vual tungtuangte sang a tungtuangzaw i hi uhi.
45008038	Sihna hiam, hinna hiam, angelte hiam, thupinate hiam, thil omlelte leh thil hong om dingte hiam thilhihtheihna leh,
45008039	sanna, thukna leh thilsiam dangte himhim in leng, i Toupa Khrist Jesu a om Pathian itna a kipan hon khen thei kei ding chih diktak in ka theichian hi.
45009001	Khrist ah thutak tak ka gen ahi, ka zuau kei, Kha Siangthou ah ka sia-le-pha theihna in leng hon theihpih hi.
45009002	Ka lungtang ah haksatna thupitak leh lungngaihna dai thei lou ka pai hi.
45009003	Ka unaute salam a ka chipihte sik in, kei pen Khrist a kipan hihtuam khop hial in hamsethuak in om leng ka chi hi.
45009004	Amau Israel mi ahi ngal ua; ta hihna, thupina leh thukhun tengteng, dan piakna leh Pathian nasepna a thuchiam tengteng amau a ahi.
45009005	Pipute leng amau a ahi ua, salam thu ah Khrist leng amau a kipan a hong pawt ahi a; amah thil tengteng tung a om, tangtawn a phat tuak Pathian ahi. Amen.
45009006	Himahleh Pathian thu bangmah lou bang a omta ahi kei hi. Israel suante Israel mi ahi vek kei uh;
45009007	Abraham suante ahih ziak un avek un atate leng ahi kei uhi, “Isak ah na suante akiminloh ding,” chih ahi zaw hi.
45009008	Huai sa tate Pathian tate chihna ahi kei ua, thuchiam tate Abraham suan a seh ahi uh chihna ahi zaw uhi.
45009009	Thuchiam pen hiai ahi, “Tu hun bang in ka hong dia, Sarah in tapa anei ding,”
45009010	Huai phet ahi kei Rebekah in leng i pu Isak lak a nau apai lai in,
45009011	naupangte apian ma uh, sia-le-pha atheih ma un, thilhih ziak hilou in, asampa deihna ziak zaw in, tel lam thu ah Pathian thiltup akiptheihna ding in akiang ah;
45009012	“A-upazaw in anaupangzaw nna asem ding,” Pathian in achi hi.
45009013	“Jakob ka it a, Esau zaw ka hua,” chih gelh bang in.
45009014	Bang i genta ding ua le? Pathian ah diktatlouhna a-om a hia?
45009015	Om lou hial! Ama'n, “Ka hehpih peuhmah ka hehpih dia, zah ka ngaihna tung peuhmah ah zah ka ngai ding,” chi in Mosi kiang ah agenta hi.
45009016	Huaiziak in adeihpa ziak ahi kei a, ataipa ziak leng ahi sam kei a, ahehpihpa Pathian ziak ahi zaw hi.
45009017	Laisiangthou in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Hiai ziak tak in ahi ka hon tunding, nang a ka thilhihtheihna ka taklat theihna ding leh leitung tengteng a ka min athantheihna ding in,” achi hi.
45009018	Huchi in Pathian in zahngaihna asuah ut peuhmah tung ah azahngai a, a-ut peuhmah alungkhauhsak hi.
45009019	Nou ka kiang ah, bangziak a ama'n moh a hon dem lai ahia? Kua in adeihlam kalh ahia? hon chi ding na hih tuak uhi.
45009020	Ahi a, mihing aw, nang Pathian nial vialpa kua na hia le? Thilsiam in asiampa kiang ah, “Bang achia hichibang a hon siam,” achi dia hia?
45009021	Tungman tang khat a pan bel khat kilawmtak, manphatak a zat ding leh manpha lou deuh a zat ding bawl ding in belvelpa'n tungman tung ah thu anei kei a hia?
45009022	Pathian in ahehna leh athilhihtheihna latsak a-ut a, ahehna thuak ding a hihsiat a om ding a abawlkholhte tung a ahehpihna hauhdan alatsak a athuakzoh teiteileh bang apoi a?
45009023	Huchi a athupina hauhsaknate, azahngaihna thupina tang ding a abawlkholhte tung a asunbuakleh alatsak theihna ding in,
45009024	huaite tuh eite i hi ua, Judate lak a kipan kia hilou in, Zentelte lak a kipan a leng sapte ahi.
45009025	Hosea laibu ah: “Ka mite hi ngei lou, ka mite, ka chi dia; it ngei louhnu leng itnu, ka chita ding hi.
45009026	Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, akiang ua, ka mite na hi kei uh achihna mun ngei ah Pathian hing tate chih in a-omta ding uh, chih gelh bang in.”
45009027	Isai in leng Israel mite thu kikoupih in, “Israel mite zaw tuipi piaunel zah in tam mah le uh, akhosuaksunte kia hotdam in a-om ding uh.
45009028	Toupa'n kintak a hihzou vek in leitung ah agawt ding thu atangtun dek ngal a,” achi hi.
45009029	Isai in, “Sepaihte' Toupa'n chisuah ding hon na hawisak lou hileh Sodom khua bang in i na omta ding ua, Gomorrah khua bang a bawl in i na omta ding uh,” chi a agenkholh bang in.
45009030	Bang i genta dia le? Zentel, diktatna delhloute'n, ginna ziak adiktatna tuh ana phata uhi.
45009031	Israel, diktatna dan delhte'n, diktatna pen aphazouta kei uh.
45009032	Bangziak in ahia? Ginna in adelh kei ua, thilhih a muh theih bang a adelh ziak uh ahi. Pukna suang ah apukta uhi.
45009033	Laisiangthou in: “Ngai in, Zion ah kisuihna suang leh pukna suangpi ka koih a, kuapeuh amah gingta tuh azahlak kei ding,” chih gelh bang in.
45010001	Unaute aw, ka lungtang deihlam leh amau a dia Pathian kiang a ka thumna pen zaw, hotdam ahong hihtheihna ding uh ahi.
45010002	Pathian lam ah phatuam angai uh chih ka theihpih ahi, himahleh theihna ahihvak in zaw ahi kei uh.
45010003	Pathian diktatna thei lou in, amau diktatna lamkhiak atum ua, Pathian diktatna ah akipelut sam kei uhi.
45010004	Khrist bel agingta peuhmahte a ding in diktatna amuhtheihna ding un dan tawpna ahi.
45010005	Mosi in, “Dan a diktatna zui zaw, huai mi diktatna ziak in ahing ding,” chi in agelh hi.
45010006	Ginna a diktatna in bel huchi in agen: “Na lungsim in, kua ahia van a kah ding? (huai lah ‘tunglam a kipan Khrist va pisuk ding,’ chihna ahi ngal a).
45010007	Ahihkeileh, kua ahia khukthuk a hohsuk ding? Huai lah ‘misi lak a kipan Khrist pitou nawn ding,’ chihna ahi, chi ke'n,” chi in.
45010008	Ahihleh, bang ahia agen? “Thu in ahon naih hi, na kam leh na lungtang ah a-om,” chi in agen ahi; (huai ahi ginna thu ka tangkoupih pen uh).
45010009	Na kam a Jesu, Toupa ahi chih na gup a, misi lak a kipan Pathian in akaithou chih na lungtang a na gintakleh hotdam in na om ding, chih.
45010010	Mi'n lungtang in agingta ua, diktatna amu uh; kam in agum ua, hotdamna leng amu nak uh ahi.
45010011	Laisiangthou in, “Kuapeuh amah gingta azahlak kei ding,” achi hi.
45010012	Juda leh Grik mite bangmah ah alamdang tuan kei ua, Toupa khat avek ua tung ah Toupa ahi a, amin lou peuhmahte tung ah hoihna ahau ngal a.
45010013	“Kuapeuh Toupa min lou tuh hotdam in a-om ding,” chih ahi.
45010014	Ahihleh, agintak louhpi uh bangchi in alou ding ua? Athu azak louhpi uh bangchi in agingta ding ua? Thuhilhmi om lou in bangchi in aza ding ua?
45010015	Sawl ahih kei uleh bangchi in thu ahilh ding ua? “Thil hoih tanchin kipahhuai tunte khe kilawm hi na tel e!” chih gelh bang in.
45010016	Himahleh tanchinhoih azui vek kei uh. Isai in, “Toupa, ka thugen uh kua'n ahia gingta?” achih bang in.
45010017	Huchi in ginna tuh zakna ziak in ahong om a, zakna tuh Khrist thu kigen ziak in ahong om hi.
45010018	Ahihleh abil un aza kei ua hia? Za na ke, “Ahusa uh gam chih ah athang a, athu uh kawlmong pha in athangsuakta,” chih ahi.
45010019	Ahihleh, Israel mite'n aza kei ua hia? “Mipi dia gen thamlouhte ka hon hazasak dia; nam pilloute zang in ka hon hehsak ding,” chi in Mosi in agen masapen hi.
45010020	Huan Isai in hangsantak in, “Hon zongloute muh in ka omta; hon kanloute ka kimusakta,” achi hi.
45010021	Himahleh Israel mite thu ah, “Michihmoh leh selhatte a ding in sun nilouh in ka ban ka zak hi,” achi hi.
45011001	Ahihleh Pathian in amite apaikhia a hia? Paikhe lou hial! Kei leng Israel mi, Abraham suan Benjamin nam ka hi ngal a.
45011002	Pathian in ami a theihkholhte apaikhe kei hi. Laisiangthou in Elijah thu agen na thei kei ua hia? Ama'n Israel mite tungthu Pathian kiang ah atun a,
45011003	“Toupa na zawlneite athat ua, na maitamte ahihchim ua; keimah kia nutsiat in ka om, kei leng hihlup ahon tum uhi,” achih.
45011004	Himahleh Pathian in bangchi in adawng a? “Baal ma a khukdin ngeiloumi sangsagih keimah a ding in ka hawi hi,” chi in adawng hi.
45011005	Huchibang in tulai in leng akhosuaksun, hehpihna a tel a-om uhi.
45011006	Hehpihna ziak ahihleh, nasep ziak ahita kei, huchi hi keileh, hehpihna tuh hehpihna ahita kei ding.
45011007	Bangchi ahita dia le? Israel mite'n azon uh amu kei uh. Telte'n bel amu ua, adangte tengteng ananggawpta uhi.
45011008	“Pathian in tuni tan in akiang uah lusukna kha apia a, muh theihlouhna mitte, zak theihlouhna bilte toh,” chih gelh bang in.
45011009	David in, “Adohkan uh amau a ding in thang leh pial, pukna leh phulakna hong hi hen;
45011010	Amuh theihlouhna ding un amitte uh hong mial hen, nang anungzang uh kunsak gige in,” achi hi.
45011011	Ahihleh akisuih uh akipukdetna ding uhia? Hilou hial! Apuk ziak un Zentelte kiang ah hotdamna ahong tung zawta hi; Israel mite hazatsakna ding in.
45011012	Huchi in apukna uh bawn khovel hih hauhsakna ahih a, akiamna uh leng Zentelte hauhsakna ahihleh, abuchin nawnna uh bangchi phet a hamphatna lianzaw in azui diam aw!
45011013	Huchi in nou Zentelte kiang ah ka gen ahi. Kei Zentelte kiang a sawltak ka hih ziak in, ka nasepna pen ka pahtawi ahi.
45011014	Huchi a ka chipihte ka hazatsak theih teiteina ding leh alak ua khenkhatte ka hotdam theihna ding in.
45011015	Amau paihkhiakna bawn khovel toh kituah nawnna ahihleh, amau deih nawnna ding sihna a kipan hin nawnna lou ngal bang ahi dia?
45011016	Huan gah masa thillat, tangbuang mekthem asianthouleh huchi mah bang in abeupi asiangthou hi; azungpi asianthouleh ahiangte leng huchi mah bang ahi uhi.
45011017	Hiang khenkhatte hihtan a a-om in, nang, olive tak lou, amaute lak a phuhlut a na om a, olive sing a hauhna zung kikoppih sam na hihman in,
45011018	hiang dangte lak ah kisathei ke'n. Kisathei mah lechin nang azung vakpa na hi kei a, huai azung pen nang hon vakpa ahi zaw hi.
45011019	Huan nang, “Phuhlut a ka omtheihna ding in hiangte hihtan in a-om khinta vo oi,” na chi dia.
45011020	Ahi agintaklouhna ziak un hihtan in a-om ua, nang na ginna ziak in na dingh ahi, uang ke'nla, lau zaw in.
45011021	Pathian in hiangtakte pen bawn ahawi kei ngalleh nang leng ahon hawi tuan kei ding hi.
45011022	Huchi in Pathian hoihna leh athukhauhna ngaihtuah in; apukte a ding a athukhauhna; nang a ding in bel ahoihna, hoihna a na om gigeleh; huchi ahihkeileh nang leng satkhiak in na om sam ding.
45011023	Huan amau leng gingta lou a a-om nilouh kei uleh, phuhlut in a-om nawn ding uh; Pathian in amaute aphutlut nawn thei hi.
45011024	Nang piandan a olive tak lou a kipan a satsup bawn, piandan lou bang a olive sing hoih a phuhlut a na omleh, tua ahiangtakte, amau olive sing ngei ah phuhlut hi na tel un chia!
45011025	Unaute aw, hiai thuguk na theih louh uh ka ut kei a, huchi lou in zaw na kipilsak ding uh; Zentelte buchinna ahong tun masiah Israel mi khenkhatte tung ah siatna ahong tung tadih hi.
45011026	Huchi in Israel mi tengteng hotdam in a-om ding uh: “Zion a kipan in Hondampa ahong suak ding a, Jakob kiang a kipan Pathian limsaklouhna ahihmang ding,”
45011027	“Akiang ua ka thukhun ding hiai ahi, akhelhnate uh ka lakmang chiang in,” chih gelh bang in.
45011028	Tanchinhoih lam ngaihtuah in, nou ziak in melma ahi ua; tel thu lam ngaihtuah in bel apipute uh ziak in deihtakte ahi uhi.
45011029	Pathian in athilthawnpiak ah leh asapna ah alungsim akhel ngei kei hi.
45011030	Nidanglai in Pathian thu na gingta kei ua, himahleh tu in amau agin louh ziak un zahngaihna na mu ngal ua.
45011031	Huchi mah bang in tu in, Pathian in nou ahon hehpihna ziak a, zahngaihna amuhtheihna ding un amau leng ging lou ahita ve ua.
45011032	Pathian in azahngaih vek theihna ding in ginlouhna ah mi tengteng akhumvekta hi.
45011033	Pathian pilna leh theihna hauhdan thuk hi na tel e! Avaihawmnate theihtheih vual leh alampite sui zoh vual hi kei na tel e!
45011034	“Toupa lungsim kua'n ahia thei? ahihkeileh kua ahia ama thuhilhmi?
45011035	Ahihkeileh adit nawn ding a leng akiang ah kua'n ahia thil pe masa?”
45011036	Amah a kipan leh amah ziak leh amah a ding a thil tengteng ahong om ahi ngal a; amah kiang ah tangtawn in thupina om hen. Amen.
45012001	Huchi in unaute aw, Pathian zahngaihna ziak in, kithoihna hing, siangthou leh Pathian lung tuak ding in na pumpi uh lan ding in ka hon ngen ahi; huai na biakna dan ding him uh ahi.
45012002	Hiai khovel dan bang in om kei unla; Pathian deihlam a hoih leh lungtuahhuaitak leh hoih bukim na theihtel theihna ding un, na lungsim uh athak a om in hong kikheng lamdang zawta un.
45012003	Na lak uah kuamah na kiletsak ding hun val ua kiliansak lou in, Pathian in michih kiang a ginna hun apiak bang zel a diktak a ngaihtuah zaw ding in Pathian in ahon piak hehpihna ziak in ka hon chi chiat ahi.
45012004	Pumpi khat ah hiang tampi i nei ua, hiang tengteng nasep bel akibang kei hi,
45012005	huchi mah bang in, eite tampi himah lehang Khrist ah pumpi khat i hi ua; atuamtuam in i kihiangtuah chiat uhi.
45012006	Hehpihna ahon piakdan bang zel in thilthawnpiak tuamtuam i nei chiat uhi; thugen ding ahihleh i ginna toh kihun in i gen ding uhi;
45012007	Nasepna ahihleh tua anasepna mah ah sem hen; sinsakmi'n asinsakna ah sinsak hen;
45012008	Hanthawn mi in ahanthawnna mah sem hen; thilpemi'n phaltak in pia hen; makaimi'n phatuamngaihna toh ma kai hen; zahngaihna nasemmi in kipaktak in sem hen.
45012009	Itna ahihleh lepchiahna tel lou in hi hen. Gilou hua unla, ahoih lam len tinten un.
45012010	Unaute itna lam ah ittak in kilainattuah chiat un; pahtawi lam ah, kideihsaktuah chiat un.
45012011	Thanop lam ah, thadah kei un; Kha a vakna toh phatuamngai in Toupa nna sem un.
45012012	Lametna ah kipak unla; gimthuakna ah kuhkal un; thumna ah thum teitei un;
45012013	Misiangthoute taksapna ah taksap awng hu unla; mikhualte kipahpih in om nilouh un.
45012014	Hon sawite vualzawl un, vualzawl unla, hamsiat kei un.
45012015	Kipakte kipahpih unla, kapte kahpih un.
45012016	Ngaihtuah kibang in om chiat un, kingaihtuah sang lo kei unla, mi neuneu kithuahpih zaw un. Kipilsak kei un.
45012017	Kua gitlouh leng gilou in thuk kei un. Mi tengteng muh in thil kilawm ngaihtuah un.
45012018	Ahihtheih liaileh noumau lam bek, mi tengteng toh kituak in om un.
45012019	Deihtakte aw, phu kila kei un, Pathian hehna awn zaw un, “Phulak himhim keimah lak ding ahi, ke'n ka thuk na ding, Toupa'n achi,” chih gelh ahi.
45012020	Huaiziak in “Na melma agil akialleh nek ding pia inla; adang atakleh dawn ding pia in; huchibang a na hihleh alutung ah mei-am sekkhawm na hi ding hi.”
45012021	Gitlouh zoh in om ke'nla, hoihna in gilou zou zaw in.
45013001	Michih atung ua vaihawm thuneite thuthu in om hen. Pathian thu lou in kuamah thunei a-om ngal kei ua; vaihawm thunei mite zaw Pathian seh ahi uh.
45013002	Huaiziak in kuapeuh vaihawmmi sel Pathian sehkalh ahi a, aselte'n amau tung ah vaihawmna akimuh ding uhi.
45013003	Vaihawmte thil hoih hihte ding in kihtakhuai ahi kei ua; thil hoih lou hihte a ding in bel kihtakhuai ahi uhi. Ahihleh vaihawmmi kihta lou a om na ut uhia? Thil hoih hih le uchin phat na loh ding uh.
45013004	Amah tuh na hoihna ding ua Pathian nasemmi ahi ngal a. Himahleh kihta un, namsau lah amawk tawi ngal kei a; amah Pathian nasemmi, thil hihkhialmi tung a heh a phulami ahi.
45013005	Huaiziak in Pathian hehna kihtakna ziak kia hilou in, na sia-le-pha theihna ziak lel ua leng na kituklut ding uh ahi.
45013006	Hiai ziak in siah leng na liau zel ve ua le; huchibang thil ngei hih teitei ding in Pathian nasem mite ahi uhi.
45013007	Mi tengteng kiang ah piak ding peuhmah pia un; leiman piakna ding kiang ah leiman pia unla, siah liauna dingpa kiang ah siah liau unla; kihtak dingpa leng kihta unla; zahtak dingpa leng zahtak un.
45013008	Ki-ittuahna lou ngal kuamah bangmah ba kei un; amau mihinpih itpa'n dan azuikimta hi.
45013009	Hiaite, “Ang kawm ke'n, Tualthat ke'n, Gu ke'n, Eng ke'n,” chih leh thupiak dang om lai himhimte, “Nangmah na ki-it bang in na invengte na it ding ahi,” chih in akhaikhawm vek hi.
45013010	Itna in a-invengte ahihse ngei kei a; huaiziak in itna zaw dan zuihkimna ahi.
45013011	Huai lou in, tu bang hun ahia chih na thei ua, ihmu khanloh a hun mahmahta chih na thei uhi. Tu'n zaw i gintak tung lai sang in i hotdamna anai zawta ngal a.
45013012	Zan abei dekdekta a, khua avak dekta hi; huaiziak in mial a thilhihte paikhia in vak thuam in i kithuam ding uh.
45013013	Sun a om bang in kilawmtak in i om ding uh, zu dawn buai leh zu kham a om lou in, huk leh kingaihhat a om lou in, kilai leh kihaza a om lou in.
45013014	Toupa Jesu Khrist in kithuam zaw unla, na sa duhgawlna uh pichin ding in bangmah kibawl kei un.
45014001	Huan ginna hat lou mi, angaihdante gense lou in ngai un.
45014002	Mi khat in thil bangkim ne thei ding in akigingta a, mihat lou in bel anteh-louhing kia ane hi.
45014003	Ane mite'n nelou a kidekte simmoh kei henla; nelou a kidekte'n leng anete soisel tuan kei hen; Pathian in amah akipahpih khinta ngal a.
45014004	Midang sikha tung a soiselpa nang kua na hia? Apu a ding in ahi adin hiam ahihkeileh apuk. Himahleh amah zaw dinsak in a-om ding, Toupa'n adingsak thei hi.
45014005	Mi khat in ni khat nidang sang in athupi ngaih tuam a, midang in ni tengteng kibang chiat in angai. Michih amah lungsim ah kitheichian hen aw.
45014006	Ni tangpa'n Toupa pahtawina ding in atang hi. Huan bangkim nepa'n, Pathian kiang a kipahthu agen ziak in, Toupa pahtawina ding in ane a; aneloupa'n leng Toupa pahtawina ding in ane kei a, Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen hi.
45014007	Kuamah eimah a dia hing i hi kei ua, kuamah eimah a dia si leng i hi sam kei.
45014008	I hinleh Toupa a ding in i hing a; i sih in leng Toupa a dia si i hi ngal a; huaiziak in i hin in leng, i sih in leng Toupa a i hi uhi.
45014009	Khrist sihna leh ahin nawnna pen, mihing leh misi Toupa ahihtheihna ding ahi.
45014010	Himahleh nang bang achia na unau soisel na hia oi? Ahihkeileh nang bang achia na unau simmoh na hia oi? Pathian' thukhenna tutphah ma a dingh vek ding lah i hi ngal ua.
45014011	“Toupa'n, kei ka hin bang in, mi tengteng ka ma ah akun ding ua, lei tengteng leng Pathian kiang ah akipulak ding uh chi in ka chiam ahi,” achi, chih gelh ahi.
45014012	Huchi in i vek un Pathian kiang ah eimah tanchin i gen chiat ding uhi.
45014013	Huaiziak in kisoisel nawn kei ni, kuapeuh in a-unau lampi ah kisuihna hiam dalna hiam koih louh tum zaw hen.
45014014	Amah mawngmawng a siang lou bangmah himhim a-om kei chih Toupa Jesu ah ka thei mahmah hi; thil khatpeuh siang lou a seh pen bel aseppa a ding in siang lou ahi mai hi.
45014015	Na banghiam nek ziak a na unau lungsim anatleh itna dan in na gamta kei' a ahi. Asih sik a Khrist in asihsakpa na thil nek in hihmang kei hen.
45014016	Huchi in nou a dia hoihna, gilou lam a gen in om kei hen.
45014017	Pathian lalgam nek-le-dawn thu hilou in Kha Siangthou a diktatna, kituahna leh kipahna ahi zaw hi.
45014018	Kuapeuh huai thu ah Khrist nasem Pathian kipahpih leh mihing phat in a-om hi.
45014019	Huchi in kituahna ding leh kihihhat tuahna ding thilte i delh ding uh.
45014020	Na thil nek ziak in Pathian nasep hihse ke'n. Thil tengteng asiangthou ngei a, himahleh banghiam anek in mi ahihpukleh anepa a ding in gilou ahi.
45014021	Na unau pukna ding ahihleh, sa neklouhte, uain dawnlouhte, thil bangpeuh hih louh ahoih ahi.
45014022	Ginna na neih Pathian ma ah nangmah kia theih in nei mai in. Ama hoihsak lam a siam louh kitan lou tuh mihampha ahi.
45014023	Himahleh ginglelpa'n anekleh, ginna a anek louh ziak in, siam louh atang hi; bangpeuh ginna lou a hih zaw khelhna ahi.
45015001	Huchi in ei ahatte'n, eimah kipahna zong lou in, ahatloute hatlouhnate i thuakpih ding uh ahi.
45015002	Eimah invengte chiat tunding leh ahoihna ding ua kipahsak i tum chiat ding uh.
45015003	Khrist in leng amah kipahna azong ngal kei a, “Nang hon taite taina ka tung ah atuta,” chih gelh bang in ahi zaw.
45015004	Laisiangthou a kuhkalna leh khamuanna mu a lametna i neihtheihna ding un, nidanglai a gelh peuhmahte eite hon hilhna ding a gelh ahi uhi.
45015005	Tu in kuhkalna leh khamuanna Pathian in, Khrist Jesu ah noute lungsim leh ngaihtuahna mun khat pu in hon omsak hen;
45015006	Huchi a, lungsim mun khat leh kituaktak a Toupa Jesu Khrist Pa leh Pathian na pahtawi theihna ding uh ahi.
45015007	Huaiziak in Khrist in Pathian thupina ding a noute ahon kipahpih mah bang in, khat-le-khat kipahpihtuah chiat un.
45015008	Tu in, pipute kiang a thuchiamte hihkipna ding in Khrist tuh Pathian thutakdan theihsakna ding in zeksumte nasempa ahong hita chih na kiang uah ka gen hi.
45015009	Azahngaihna ziak a Zentelte'n Pathian apahtawi theihna ding un, “Huaiziak in Zentelte lak ah ka hon phat ding a, na min pahtawina ding in la ka sa ding,” chih gelh bang in.
45015010	“Huan nou Zentel tengtengte aw, amite toh kipak un,” achi nawn hi.
45015011	“Nou Zentel tengtengte aw, Toupa phat un, mi tengteng in amah phat uhen,” achi nawn hi.
45015012	Isai in: “Jesse zungzam ahong khang ding a, Zentelte tung a vaihawm dingpa ahong dingkhe ding hi; amah ah Zentelte'n alametna uh akoih ding uhi,” achi lai hi.
45015013	Kha Siangthou thilhihtheihna ziak a lametna na hauhtheihna ding un, lametna Pathian, na gintak ziak un, kipahna leh kituahna chiteng in hon hihdim hen.
45015014	Huan ka unaute aw, nou tungthu zaw noumau mah hoihna in na dim ua, na kihanthawntuah thei uh chih keimah ngei in leng diktak in ka thei hi.
45015015	Himahleh Pathian in ahon piak hehpihna ziak in nou hon theihpih ding in koi kalkal hiam ah hangsantak in ka gelh hi.
45015016	Zentelte kiang a Khrist Jesu nasempa a ka omtheihna ding in, Zentelte Kha Siangthou a hihsiangthou ahih ua, pomtak ahihtheihna ding un Pathian tanchinhoih lam ah siampu nna ka sem ahi.
45015017	Huchi in Pathian nna ka sep lam thu ah Khrist Jesu ah kisaktheihna ding ka nei ahi.
45015018	Khrist in Zentelte thumangsak ding a ka thugen leh nasepnate zang a asepkhiakte lou ngal bangmah ka gen ngam ngal kei a,
45015019	chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte, thilhihtheihna ah, Kha Siangthou thilhihtheihna in Jerusalem khua leh akim gam a kipan in, Illirikum gam pha in, Khrist tanchinhoih gam chih ah ka hilh kimta; keimah hon zang a athilhih tuh huchi tel ahi.
45015020	Ahi, midang suangphum tung a lem ka hihlouhna ding in, tanchinhoih Khrist min loh khitna mun a gen lou in.
45015021	“Atanchin gen ngeilouhnate'n amu ding ua, za ngei nailoute'n aza ding uh,” chih gelh bang in, gen ka tum zaw ahi.
45015022	Huaiziak in ahi, na kiang ua hong ka kikhelsak naknak.
45015023	Tu in bel hiai gam kim ah sepna mun himhim ka neita kei a, kum tampi na kiang ua hong ut in leng ka omta hi.
45015024	Spain gam a ka hoh chiang in ka pai kawm a nou hon muh ka kilamen ngal a, noumau toh kithuahkhawm phot in, maban ka paina ding ah noute'n na hon va khaksuk uh leng ka lamen ahi.
45015025	Tu in bel, misiangthoute nasem ding in Jerusalem ah ka hoh tadih ding hi.
45015026	Masidonia leh Akhaia gam a mite'n kipaktak in Jerusalem a misiangthoute lak a gentheite a ding in thilpiakte ape chiat uhi.
45015027	Hiai thilpiak in amau nakpi in akipaksak hi; amaute ding in leng bat ahi him hi; Zentelte'n Judate khalam vualzawlna akikoppih ualeh salam thil a amaute taksap awng ahuksak sam uh akilawm him ahi.
45015028	Huaiziak in huai ka hih a, gah leng amaute diktak a ka muhsak nung in, noute hon tawn in, Spain gam ah ka pai zel ding hi.
45015029	Huan na kiang ua ka hong chiang in, Khrist tanchinhoih vualzawlna kim pu in ka hong ding chih ka thei hi.
45015030	Unaute aw, Pathian kiang a na hon thumsak na uah, hon thumpih teitei ding in Toupa Jesu Khrist leh Kha Siangthou itna in nget petmah in ka hon ngen ahi.
45015031	Juda gam a gingloute lak a ka bit theihna ding leh Jerusalem a dia huhna ka tawi misiangthoute kipahna lamtak ahihtheihna ding in.
45015032	Pathian hoihsak bang a nuamtak a na kiang ua ka hong a, i halhkhawm vek theihna ding un.
45015033	Lemna Pathian na vek ua tung ah om hen. Amen.
45016001	I sanggamnu, Phoebi, Kenkriai a saptuamte nasem,
45016002	Toupa min a misiangthoute bang a na na kipahpihna ding uleh, na huh uh akiphatmohna peuh a na na huh ding un hon kimeltheihsak ka ut ahi. Amah mah in leng mi tampi ana huh a, kei ngei leng ahon huh zel hi.
45016003	Khrist Jesu a hon huhte Priscilla leh Akuila chibai hon buksak un,
45016004	ka hinna humbitna ding a amau ngawngtan ngapte; amau tung kia ah kipahthu ka gen kei a, Zentel saptuam tengteng tung ah leng ka gen sam hi.
45016005	A-inn ua saptuam kikhawmte leng chibai hon buksak un. Ka deihtak, Epanitas, Asia gam a Khrist gingta masapen, chibai hon buksak un aw.
45016006	Noute a dia semgim Mari, chibai hon buksak un aw.
45016007	Ka chipih leh ka hentakpih, Andronikas leh Junia, chibai hon buksak un; amau sawltakte lak a minthangtak ahi ua, kei sang a Khrist a om masazaw ahi uh.
45016008	Amplias, Toupa a ka deihtak, chibai hon buksak un aw.
45016009	Khrist a i naseppih uh Urbanes leh ka deihtak Stakis chibai hon buksak un.
45016010	Khrist a mitak, Apelles, chibai hon buksak un. Aristobulas, a-inkuanpihte lak a mite chibai hon buksak un.
45016011	Ka chipih, Herodion, chibai hon buksak un. Inkuanpihte lak a mi Narkissas, Toupa a om, chibai hon buksak un.
45016012	Triphena leh Triphosa Toupa a semgimte, chibai hon buksak un aw. Deihtak Persis, Toupa a ana semgim mahmah, chibai hon na buksak un.
45016013	Toupa amitel Rufus leh anu, kei nu leng hi sam, chibai hon na buksak un.
45016014	Asinkritas, Phligon, Hermas, Patrobas, Hermes leh akiang ua unau omte, chibai hon na buksak un aw.
45016015	Philologas leh Julia, Nerias leh sanggamnu, Olimpas leh akiang ua misiangthou om tengteng, chibai hon na buksak un.
45016016	Tawp siangthou in chibai kibuk un. Khrist saptuam pawl tengteng in chibai ahon buk chiat uhi.
45016017	Huan unaute aw, thuhilhna thu noumau hilh louh lam a kikhenna leh pukna omsakte a pan kiveng ding leh kiheisan ding in ka hon ngen ahi.
45016018	Huchibang mite'n i Toupa Khrist nna asem kei ua, amau gilpi nna asem zaw uhi; akamzolna uleh akamsiamna un mipilloute lungtang akhem nak uhi.
45016019	Na thumandan uh mi tengteng lak ah athangkheta ngal a. Huaiziak in noumau tungthu ah ka kipak hi; himahleh, hoih lam a na pil ua, gilou lam a na pil louh uh ka deih ahi.
45016020	Huan lemna Pathian in na khepek nuai uah Setan ahon sikdensak pah ding hi. I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kiang uah om hen.
45016021	Ka naseppih Timothi leh ka chipih Lusias leh Jason, Sosipaterte'n chibai ahon buk uhi.
45016022	Kei Tertias, hiai laigelhtu in, Toupa min in chibai ka hon buk hi.
45016023	Ka tunnapa Gaias leh saptuam tengteng in chibai ahon buk uhi. Huai sumkempa Erastas leh unaupa Kuartas in chibai ahon buk uhi.
45016024	I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na vek ua tung ah om hen. Amen.
45016025	Tu in amah, ka tanchinhoih gen bang leh thuguk kilakna bangbang a Jesu Khrist ka tangkoupih bang a noute hon hihhattheipa, huai thuguk tang lai sawtpi mahmah sung selguk in na om mahleh,
45016026	tu'n bel ginna thumanna piangsak ding in zawlnei laibute zang a nam tengteng kiang a theihsak leh tangtawn Pathian thupiak bang in taklat in ahong omta hi.
45016027	Pilna Pathian kiang kia ah, Jesu Khrist ziak in thupina tangtawn dong in om hen! Amen.
46001001	Paul, Pathian deihlam a Jesu Khrist sawltak hi ding a sap leh i unaupa Sostheni in,
46001002	Korinth a Pathian saptuam omte, Khrist Jesu a sehtuam siangthoute, misiangthou hi ding a sapte leh gam chih a i Toupa, amau leh eite Toupa, Jesu Khrist min lou tengteng kiang ah;
46001003	Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
46001004	Khrist Jesu a Pathian hehpihna noute kiang a hong kipiak ziak in na tungthu uah Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen gige a;
46001005	bangkim ah thugen peuhmah ah leh theihna chiteng ah, amah ahihhauh in na om uhi.
46001006	Huchi in Khrist thu ka theihsak pen noumau ah hihkip in a-om hi.
46001007	Huan i Toupa Jesu Khrist kilakna ngak kawm in, khalam thilpiak himhim na tasam kei uhi.
46001008	Ama'n i Toupa Jesu Khrist ni chiang a gensiatbei a na omna ding un, atawp pha in hon hihkip behlap ding hi.
46001009	A Tapa Jesu Khrist i Toupa toh kithuahna nei ding a nou hon samlutpa, Pathian amuanhuai hi.
46001010	Huan unaute aw, na vek un thu kibang na gen ua, na lak ua kikhenna himhim a-omlouhna ding in lungsim mun khat leh ngaihtuah mun khat a diktak a na kizop tinten zawkna ding un Toupa Jesu Khrist min in ka hon ngen ahi.
46001011	Ka unaute aw, na tungtang thu uh, na lak uah kiselna a-om chih Kloi inkuanpihte'n hon hilh uhi.
46001012	Hiai ka chihna ahi, nou sung a khat-le-khat in, “Kei Paul pawl ka hi, kei Apollos pawl ka hi, kei Kifas pawl ka hi, kei zaw Khrist pawl ka hi,” na chih uh.
46001013	Khrist khenzak in a-om a hia? Na sik un Paul kilhden in a-om a hia? Ahihkeileh Paul min in baptis in na om ua hia?
46001014	Khrispas leh Gaias lou ngal na lak uah mi kuamah ka hon baptis louh ziak in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen ahi.
46001015	Huchi hi keileh zaw mi'n keimah min a baptis na hi uh achi kha ding uhi.
46001016	Stephenas inkuanpihte bel ka baptis ngei a, tuate lou zaw midang ka baptis hia ka thei kei.
46001017	Khrist in baptis ding in hon sawl kei a, tanchinhoih gen ding in ahon sawl zaw hi; thupil a gen lou in, huchi lou in zaw Khrist kros thilhihtheihna bangmah lou asuaksak kha ding uhi.
46001018	Kros thu zaw mangthang lelte a ding in haina ahi ngal a; ei hotdam lelte a ding in bel Pathian thilhihtheihna ahi zaw hi.
46001019	“Mipil' pilna ka hihmang ding a, lemthei' lemtheihna leng ka paikhe ding,” chih gelh ahi.
46001020	Mipil koi ah ahia? Laigelhmi koi ah ahia? Hiai khovel a selhatmi koi ah ahia? Pathian in khovel pilna haihuai ahi chih atheisak kei a hia?
46001021	Pathian pilna ah bel, khovel in apilna zang a Pathian atheihtheih louh nung in thugen haihuai zang a agingtate hotdam akipah lam ahi.
46001022	Judate'n chiamtehnate aphut ua, Grikte'n pilna'n azong uh.
46001023	Eite'n bel Khrist kilhden thu i gen ua; huai tuh Judate a ding in pukna, Zentelte a ding in haina ahi.
46001024	Himahleh Judate leng hi hen aw, Grikte leng hi heh, sapte a ding in zaw Khrist, Pathian thilhihtheihna leh Pathian pilna pen ahi.
46001025	Pathian haina mihing sang in apilzaw a, Pathian hatlouhna leng mihing sang in ahatzaw hi.
46001026	Unaute aw, ahon sapna ngaihtuah dih ua, salam a mipil tampite, mihat tampite, mihoih pipite, sap ahihlouhdan uh;
46001027	himahleh Pathian in mipilte azahlaksak theihna ding in khovel thil haite atel a; huan Pathian in khovel thil hatloute atel a, ahatte azahlaksak theihna ding in;
46001028	khovel thil niam leh simmohhuaite, thil omloute tan in Pathian in atel a; thil omte bangmah lou a abawltheihna ding in.
46001029	Huchi in Pathian ma ah mi kuamah aki-uangsak thei kei ding uh.
46001030	Amah ziak in noute Khrist Jesu ah na om uhi; Pathian in Khrist i pilna, i diktatna, i sianthouna leh i tatna hi ding in abawlta hi,
46001031	hichi a gelh ahih bang in, “Asuang peuhmah in Toupa suang hen.”
46002001	Unaute aw, Pathian thuguk noute hon hilh ding a na kiang ua ka hong lai in thugen thupi leh pilna thupi toh ka hong pai kei hi.
46002002	Jesu Khrist, amah mah kilhden a om thu kia lou ngal na lak uah bangmah theih ka tum kei hi.
46002003	Hat lou leh lau in, nakpitak a ling kawm in na lak uah ka om hi.
46002004	Ka paukam suak leh ka thugente thupil a khemna thu ahi kei a, Kha leh thilhihtheihna theihsakna in ahi zaw hi.
46002005	Huchi a na ginna uh mihing pilna a kinga lou a, Pathian thilhihtheihna a kinga a a-om zawk theihna ding in.
46002006	Himahleh pichingte lak ah ahihleh thupil i hilh zel a, hinapi in hiai khovel thupil zaw ahi kei; hiai khovel vaihawmte mangthang dingte thupil leng ahi sam kei hi;
46002007	Pathian pilna guk leh kisel, i thupina ding a Pathian in khovel om ma a asehkholhsa pen i hilh zaw nak hi.
46002008	Hiai khovel vaihawmte himhim in athei kei uh; thei le uh zaw thupina Toupa kilhden lou ding hi ve un.
46002009	“Mit a muh ngei louh, bil a zak ngei louh, mihing lungtang a lut ngei lou, Pathian in amah itte a dia abawl,” chih gelh bang in.
46002010	Pathian in Kha in huaite ei ahon theisakta a; Kha in bangkim asuikhe vek a; Pathian thugilte tan in.
46002011	Mihing ngaihtuahte mihing sung a om kha mah lou in, kua'n ahia thei ding? Huchi mah bang in Pathian ngaihtuahte Pathian Kha mah lou kuamah in athei kei uhi.
46002012	Huan athawn a Pathian in thil hon piakte i theihna ding in, eite'n zaw khovel kha hilou in, Kha, Pathian a kipan ngei i mu zaw uhi.
46002013	Mihing' pilna a sinsak thute a hilh lou in Kha sinsak in i hilh zaw ua, Kha neite kiang ah khalam thutakte i hilhchian uhi.
46002014	Khovel mi'n Pathian Kha thilpiakte asang kei nak hi, amah ngaihdan in haihuai ahi ngal a, kha a theihchet ahih ziak in atheithei kei hi.
46002015	Khami in bel thil bangkim achian zel a, amah lah kuamah in achian kei uhi.
46002016	“Kua'n ahia Toupa lungsim thei khin a, amah thuhilh thei ding?” Eite'n bel Khrist lungsim i pu uhi.
46003001	Unaute aw, khamite kiang a gen bang in na kiang uah thu ka gen thei kei hi; sa mite, Khrist a naungekte kiang a gen bang in ka gen zaw hi.
46003002	An gum na nek theih nai louh ziak un, nawitui in ka hon vak a, sami na hih lai ziak un tua an gum tu tanpha in leng na ne thei nai kei lailai uhi.
46003003	Na lak ua kihazatna leh kiselna a-om nak ziak in sami hi lai in mihing bang a om lai hilou na hi uhiam?
46003004	Mi khat in, “Paul pawl ka hi,” midang in, “Kei zaw Apollos pawl ka hi,” na chih lai teng uh mihing lel hi lai hilou na hi uhiam?
46003005	Apollos kua ahia le? Paul leng kua ahia? Nasemmi, noumau hon gingtasak mi lel ahi ve ua, huai leng Toupa'n apiak bang zel in ahi.
46003006	Ke'n ka suan a, Apollos in tui in avak a, himahleh Pathian in akhangsak hi.
46003007	Huchi in akhangsakpa Pathian kia lou ngal, asuanpa lah bangmah ahi kei a, tui a vakpa leng bangmah ahi tuan kei hi.
46003008	Huan asuanpa leh tui a vakpa pum khat ahi ua, himahleh amau sepgim bang zel in, amau kipahman amu tuaktuak ding uhi.
46003009	Koute Pathian na seppihte ka hi ua, noute Pathian louma na hi ua, Pathian inn lam leng na hi uhi.
46003010	Pathian in hehpihna hon piak bang zel in inn lam heutupen piltak bang in ke'n suangphum ka lem a, midang in atung ah inn alam uhi. Himahleh michih atung a alamdan ding uah pilvang uhen.
46003011	Suangphum lepkhitsa lou ngal suangphum dang kuamah in alem theita kei ua, huai suangphum Jesu Khrist ahi.
46003012	Hiai suangphum tung ah kuapeuh in dangka-eng in hiam, dangka in hiam, suangmantam in hiam, sing in hiam, loupa in hiam, buhpawl hiam zang in lam taleh;
46003013	michih nasep ahong lang ding hi; tua Ni in hihlang ding ahi ngal a, meikuang a akilak ding ziak in; meikuang ngeingei in michih nasep bangchibang ahia chih a-enchian ding hi.
46003014	Kua nasep leng atung a alam pen a-om gigeleh huai mi in kipahman amu ding.
46003015	Kua nasep leng akatleh huai mi in atan ding hi; amah taktak zaw hotdam in a-om ding, himahleh mei apaisuak bang in.
46003016	Pathian tempul na hih uleh Pathian Kha noumau sung ah ateng gige chih na thei kei ua hia?
46003017	Kuapeuh in Pathian tempul ahihsiatleh Pathian in huai mi ahihse ding; Pathian tempul asiangthou ngal a, huai tempul noumau na hi uhi.
46003018	Kuamah amah-le-amah kikhem kei hen. Na lak ua kuapeuh hiai khovel a pil akisakleh, ahong piltheihna ding in mihai hong suak hen.
46003019	Hiai khovel pilna Pathian ngaihdan in haina ahi. “Ama'n amaute apil lepchiahna uah aman hi,” chih gelh ahi;
46003020	Toupa'n mipilte ngaihtuahna athawn ahi, chih athei chi a gelh ahi nawn lai hi.
46003021	Huaiziak in kuamah in mihingte suang kei hen; bangkim nou a ahi vekta ngal a;
46003022	Paul hiam, Apollos hiam, Kifas hiam, khovel hiam, hinna hiam, sihna hiam, thil omsa hiam, thil hong om ding hiam;
46003023	avek in nou a ahi vek hi; noumau leng Khrist a na hi ua; Khrist leng Pathian a ahi.
46004001	Koute zaw Khrist nasemte leh Pathian thuguk kemte bang in min hon thei uhen.
46004002	Hiai ah kempa mimuanhuai hih akiphamoh ahi.
46004003	Himahleh nou na hon ettelna uh leh mihing ngaihtuahna a na hon ettelna uh kei a ding in thil neuchik ahi.
46004004	Keimah leng ka ki-entel ngei tuan kei. Bangmah kimohsakna ding ka kithei kei a; himahleh huai in siam hon tangsak tuan kei hi; hon entelpa Toupa ahi zaw hi.
46004005	Huchi in ahun ma in bangmah thukhenna bawl kei un, Toupa hong pai masiah, ama'n mial a thil selgukte vak ah hon lakhe ding a; lungtang a tupte leng ahihlang lai ding hi; huai hun chiang in michih in Pathian a kipan in amau tan hun chiat in phatna aloh chiat ding uhi.
46004006	Unaute aw, na phattuampihna ding un hiai thu Apollos leh kei tung ah ka belh hi, huchi a koute a kipan a hindan na sintheihna ding uleh, akigelhsa pen sang a na lak ua kuamah mi khat midang sang a ngaina zaw a na kisaktheihpih louhna ding un.
46004007	Kua'n ahia nou a thiltuam deuh om a mu? Na muhsawn louh ngal uh bang ahia na neih uh? Huchi a amusawn lel na hih uleh na muhsawn uh athawn a piak hilou bang a bangziak a kisathei zenzen?
46004008	Tu in na vahta ua! Tu in na hong hauta ua! Kou lou in vai na hawmta uh! Ahi, vaihawm taktak le uchin, huchi a noute toh vai ka hawm sam theihna ding un.
46004009	Pathian in kou sawltakte, si ding a sehsa bang in ananungpen in hon sepkhia hi in ka thei ahi; khovelte leh angelte leh mihingte mitmuh a etnop a bawl in ka om uhi.
46004010	Kou zaw Khrist ziak in mihai ka hi ua, nou bel Khrist ah mipil na hi zaw uhi; kou zaw ka hat kei ua, nou bel na hat uhi; nou zaw mi pahtawi in na om ua, kou zaw mi simmoh in ka om zaw uhi.
46004011	Tutan in leng ka gilkial un ka dangtak ua, puansilh ka kiching kei ua, mi khut thak nuhna ka hi ua, mun leh mual ka nei kei uh;
46004012	koumau khut a sem in ka gim mahmah ua; mi'n hon tai uleh ka vualzawl ua; ahon sawi uleh ka thuak teitei uhi.
46004013	Mi'n hon gensiat uleh ka khem ua; tutan in leng khovel ninnok thil tengteng nin kihhuai bang in ahon bawl uhi.
46004014	Na zumna ding un hiai thu ka gelh ahi kei a, ka ta deihtakte bang a hon taihilh ding in ka gelh ahi zaw hi.
46004015	Khrist ah heutu singkhat nei mah le uchin, pa zaw tampi na nei tuan kei uhi. Ke'n Khrist Jesu ah tanchinhoih in noute ka hon neikhia hi.
46004016	Huaiziak in ka omdan zui ding in ka hon ngen ahi.
46004017	Hiai ziak in Timothi, Toupa a ka ta deihtak leh muanhuai, na kiang uah ka hon sawl hi. Ama'n Khrist a ka omdan, gam chih a saptuamte teng thu ka hilh zeldan noute ahon theisak nawn ding hi.
46004018	Huan kei na kiang ua hong nawn lou ding bang zen in khenkhat na na ki-uangsak uhi.
46004019	Himahleh Toupa'n pha asakleh sawt louchik nung in na kiang uah ka hong ding, huchi in miki-uangsakte kamhat thu hilou in, athilhihtheihna uh ka thei zawta ding hi.
46004020	Pathian lalgam zaw kamhat thu ah a-om kei a, thilhihtheihna ah a-om zaw hi.
46004021	Bang na deihzaw ua? Chiangpum toh hia, itna leh kingaihniamna lungsim toh na kiang ua ka hong ding?
46005001	Na lak uah kingaihna nin a-om chih thu athang vengvung hi. Huchibang kingaihna nin Zentelte lak a leng om ngei lou, na lak ua mi khat in amah pa zi akitenpih hi.
46005002	Huai thilhihpa na lak ua kipan delhkhiak ding a lungngaih nak sang in na kisaktheihpih zaw uhi.
46005003	Kei mahmah pumpi in ka pang kei na a, kha in noute lak ah ka om a, thil huchi tel hihpa tu in leng Toupa Jesu min in na lak ua pang bang a kingaihtuah in thupukna ka bawlta hi.
46005004	I Toupa Jesu Khrist min a na kikhop chiang un, noute lak ah kha in ka om a, Toupa Jesu Khrist thilhihtheihna leng a-om hi.
46005005	Mi huchibang zaw Toupa ni chiang a akha hotdam a a-omtheihna ding in asa hihmang ding in Setan kiang ah pekhia un.
46005006	Na kisaktheihna uh hoih lou ahi. Silngou tawmchik in tanghou beu apum in azelsuak chih na thei kei ua hia?
46005007	Silngou pang lou na hih mah bang un tanghou beu thak na hong hihtheihna ding un silngou lui pen paikhe siang un. I Paikan Ankuangluina ding Khrist latkhiak in a-omta hi.
46005008	Huaiziak in ankuanglui ni, silngou lui a ankuang lui lou in, nunsia leh gitlouhna silngou a leng ankuang lui sam lou in, takna leh thutak tanghou silngou soh louh in ankuang i lui zaw ding uh.
46005009	Ka laikhak ah kingaihhatte kithuahpih lou ding in na kiang uah ka gelh hi.
46005010	Hiai khovel a kingaihhatte hiam, huaiham leh lepgute hiam, milim bete hiam kithuahpih het louh ding chi ka hi kei a; huchibang hileh khovel a kipan na paikhiak uh kul ding ahi.
46005011	Tu'n bel kuapeuh unau min po ngal in, kingaihhatmi hiam, mihuaiham hiam, milim bemi hiam, hanhatmi hiam, zukham hatmi hiam, lepgumi hiam hileh, kithuahpih lou ding in na kiang uah ka gelh ahi; mi huchibang kiang ah nek leng ne kei un.
46005012	Polam mite tung a vaihawm ding ke'n bang ahia ka awlmoh ding om? Nou sung a mite hilou hia na ngaihtuah ding uh?
46005013	Polam a mite tung a Pathian in vaihawm hilou hia? “Huai migiloupa na lak ua kipan koihkhia un.”
46006001	Na lak uah kuapeuh in midang toh thubuai neita le uchin, misiangthoute ma a tun lou in, midiktatloute ma ah na tun ngam ding ua hia?
46006002	Ahihleh misiangthoute'n khovel tung a vaihawm ding ahi chih na thei kei ua hia? Khovel mite tung a bawn vaihawm ding na hih uleh, thil neupente leng ngaihtuah tak lou na hi ua hia?
46006003	Tulai damsung thute gen louh angelte nangawn i vaihawm ding uh ahi chih na thei kei ua hia?
46006004	Huchi in tulai damsung thute ngaihtuah ding na neih un bangziak a saptuamte ngaihniam pente ngaihtuahsak na hi ua?
46006005	Na zumna ding un ka gen ahi. A-unaute kal a thu hihpuk thei mipil, khat bek na lak uah na mu kei ua ahi ding maw?
46006006	Unau in a-unau mah ginglou mite vaihawmna a atut zawk nak!
46006007	Hilou ahi, hiai na diklouhna khat uh ahi pah hi, thubuai na kineih tuah nak uh. Bangziak a dikloupi a hihna na thuak zaw lou? Bang achia kizangsak zaw mai lou oi?
46006008	Hilou ahi, noumau ngei in na unaute uh tung ah leng na hihdik kei ua, na zangsak uhi.
46006009	Ahihleh midiktatloute'n Pathian lalgam aluah kei ding uh chih na thei kei ua hia? Khem in om kei un, kingaihhatte, milim bete, angkawmte leh mihukte leh tokohukte,
46006010	gutate, mihuaihamte, zukhamhatte, salhhatte leh lepgute'n Pathian lalgam aluah kei ding uh.
46006011	Huan noute khenkhat huchibang na hi uh; himahleh Toupa Jesu Khrist min in leh i Pathian Kha ah siansak na hita ua, hihsiangthou na hita ua, siamtang na hita uhi.
46006012	“Thil bangkim hih kei a ding in asiang a,” himahleh thil bangkim hih ahoihkim kei, “Thil bangkim hih kei a ding in asiang a,” himahleh bangmah sikha ding in ka kiphal kei hi.
46006013	“Nek dingte gilpi a ahi a, gilpi leng nek ding a ahi,” himahleh Pathian in ahihmang tuaktuak ding. Huan pumpi pen kingaihna ding ahi kei a, Toupa a ding ahi; Toupa leng pumpi a ding ahi;
46006014	Pathian in misi lak a kipan Toupa akaithou a, eite leng athilhihtheihna in hon kaithou sam ding hi.
46006015	Na pumpi uh Khrist hiang ahi chih na thei kei ua hia? Khrist hiangte laksak in kizuak hiang ding peuh in ka bawl dia hia?
46006016	Bawl lou hial ding. Ahihleh kizuak zop amah toh pum khat ahi uh chih na thei kei ua hia? “Anih un sapum khat ahi ding uh,” achi ngal a.
46006017	Toupa zop bel amah toh kha pum khat ahi uhi.
46006018	Kingaih taisan un. Mihing thilhihkhelh chiteng pumpi polam ah ahi; mingaih hat in bel amah pumpi tung ah thil ahihkhial hi.
46006019	Ahihleh na pumpi uh, na sung ua om Pathian kiang a kipan a na muh uh, Kha Siangthou tempul ahi chih na thei kei ua hia? Noumau a leng na hi kei ua,
46006020	man a leisa na hih ziak un, na pumpi uh leh na kha Pathian a mah in, Pathian pahtawi un.
46007001	Tu in, na thilgelh thute uh zaw, “Pasal a ding in numei khoih louh ahoih hi.”
46007002	Himahleh kingaihna a-om nak ziak in pasal chih in ama zi chiat nei henla, numei chih in leng ama pasal chiat nei hen.
46007003	Pasal in azi kiang ah atan ding hun pia hen; huchi mah bang in zi in leng apasal kiang ah atan ding hun pe sam hen.
46007004	Zi in ama pumpi tung ah thu anei kei a, apasal in thu aneizaw hi; huchi mah bang in pasal in leng ama pumpi tung ah thu anei kei a, azi in thu aneizaw hi.
46007005	Thum ding a na kipiak theihna ding uleh, na kikholh nawn theihna ding ua sawt lou kal a dia pha na sak tuaktuak kei ngal uleh akuamah mah kizangsak kei un, huchi lou in zaw na kidek zoh louh ziak un Setan in ahon khem kha ding hi.
46007006	Himahleh hiai thu thupiak dan hilou in phal lam thu in ka gen zaw ahi.
46007007	Ke'n bel, mi tengteng keimah bang a a-om vek uh ka deih ahi. Himahleh michih in Pathian a kipan thilpiak amau muh lam anei chiat uhi; khat in lam tuam ah khat in lam dang in.
46007008	Himahleh koppih neiloute leh meithaite kiang ah huchi in ka chi ahi; keimah bangtak in om le uh amau a ding in ahoih ding hi.
46007009	Kidektheihna aneih kei ualeh kiteng uhen; huk sang in kiten ahoihzaw hi.
46007010	Huan kitengsate kiang ah thu ka pia, keimah bel hilou in, Toupa piak ahi zaw; zi in apasal khen kei hen;
46007011	akhen vanglakleh pasal nei nawn lou in om vanglak hen, ahihkeileh, apasal toh mah kituak nawn uheh; huan pasal in azi ma kei hen.
46007012	Midang kiang ah ahihleh Toupa hilou in keimah in ka gen; unau kuapeuh in zi, gingloumi kitenpih leh akiang a om gige a-utleh, ma kei hen.
46007013	Huan numei pasal ginglou kitenpih in, apasal in akiang a om gige a-utleh ma kei hen.
46007014	Pasal gingloumi azi ziak in hihsiangthou in a-om a, zi gingloumi leng apasal ziak in hihsiangthou in a-om sam ahi; huchi hita keileh, na tate uh asiangthou kei ding uhi; himahleh asiangthou na uhi.
46007015	Himahleh aging lou pen in akhenleh khen mai hen, huchibang ah zaw unaupa hiam, unaunu hiam, hen ahita kei ding. Pathian in lemna ah ahon sam hi.
46007016	Zi aw, na pasal na hotdam ding leh ding louh bangchi in na thei a eita? Pasal aw, na zi na hotdam ding leh ding louh bangchi in na thei a eita?
46007017	Himahleh, Toupa'n michih kiang a apiak bang chiat leh Pathian in michih asap lai a a-omdan bang chiat in om hen. Huchibang in saptuam pawl tengteng ah ka hihkip hi.
46007018	Zeksumsa a sap a-om uhia? Zeksum louh hong hi tuan kei uhen. Zeksum louh a om sap a-om uhia? Zeksum tuan dah uhen.
46007019	Pathian thupiakte zuih lel louh ngal zeksum i chih bangmah ahi kei a, zeksum louh leng bangmah ahi kei hi.
46007020	Michih sap a a-om lai ua atan ngeina uah om chiat uhen.
46007021	Sikha hisa a sap na hi hia? Khawk sa tuan ke'n. Na suahtak theihleh sensuk in.
46007022	Sikha hisa a om Toupa sap Toupa sikha noplen ahi a; huchi mah bang in noplen sa a sap Khrist sikha ahi.
46007023	Man a lei na hita ua mihingte sikha ah lut kei un.
46007024	Unaute aw, michih sap a a-om lai bangbang in Pathian kiang ah om gige hen.
46007025	Huan nungak siangthou lam thu ah zaw Toupa thupiak himhim ka nei kei; himahleh muanhuai a om ding in Toupa kiang a kipan zahngaihna mu ka hih ziak in ka ngaihtuahdan ka gen ding.
46007026	Tulai haksatna ziak in pasal a-omdan ngeingei bang in omleh amah a ding in hoih in ka gingta hi.
46007027	Zi a hen na hi hia? Kisutkhiak tum ke'n. Zi a hen louh na hi hia? Zi zong ke'n.
46007028	Himahleh zi na neihleh thil na hihkhial kei hi, nungak siangthou in leng pasal aneihleh thil ahihkhial sam kei hi. Himahleh, hichibang mite'n sa ah gimna athuak ding uhi; himahleh ke'n zaw hon thuaksak louh ka ut hi.
46007029	Himahleh unaute aw, hiai ka chi ahi; hun seh atomta; zi neite nei lou bang a a-omtheihna ding un;
46007030	kapte kap lou bang a a-omtheihna ding un leh kipakte kipak lou bang a a-omtheihna ding un;
46007031	khovel zangte zang lo zen lou a a-omtheihna ding un; hiai khovel omdan lah amangthang gige ahi.
46007032	Lungzinna nei lou a na om uh ka hon deih hi. Zi nei lou pasal in Toupa lungkimsakna ding in, Toupa lam thilte alimsak hi.
46007033	Zi nei pasal in bel azi lungkimsakna ding in, khovel thilte alimsak hi.
46007034	Pasal neisa leh nungak siangthou kilamdanna a-om hi. Pasal nei lou numei in apumpi leh kha asianthoudan ding, Toupa lam thilte alimsak a; pasal nei numei in bel apasal lungkimsakdan ding, khovel lam thilte alimsak hi.
46007035	Nou phattuamna ding in hiai ka gen ahi; na tung ua khamna nga hilou in, navak a na omna ding uleh Toupa kiang a na kipiakna uh bukimna ding in ahi zaw.
46007036	Kuapeuh in azikham tung a gamta diklou hi a akigintak a, alunggulhna a let ngal a akulleh, hoih asak bang in hih hen aw; kiteng uhen, khelhna ahi kei.
46007037	Himahleh kuapeuh alungtang a thu khensat a, alou thei lou khop a kulna nei hilou a, amah kithuzohmi in asianthouna kepbit atup tintenleh ahihhoih ding.
46007038	Huchi in nungak kitenpihpa'n ahihhoih a; himahleh zi nei lou dia amah kikham in ahihhoih zaw ding hi.
46007039	Zi zaw apasal adam lai teng hen ahi; himahleh apasal asihleh bel adeih peuh anei thei ding a, himahleh Toupa a ommi ahih ding ahi.
46007040	Himahleh kei ngaihdan in, a-om ngei in om gigeleh nuam asa zaw ding; ke'n Pathian Kha nei sam in ka kithei hi.
46008001	Tu in milimte kiang a kithoihna tungtang zaw; i vek un theihna i nei chiat uh, chih i kithei hi. Theihna in mi akisatheisak a itna in mi abawlhoih hi.
46008002	Kuapeuh in thil banghiam thei a akingaihtuahleh, atheih ding thei nai lou ahi.
46008003	Himahleh mi kuapeuh in Pathian a-itleh, huai mi mah ama theih ahi.
46008004	Huchi in milimte kiang a kithoihna thil nek thu zaw, “Khovel ah milim himhim bangmah ahihlouhdan uleh, khat kia lou ngal Pathian dang himhim a-omlouhdan i thei uhi.”
46008005	Van ah leh lei ah pathian min pu tampi om mah le uh, huchibang pathian tampi leh toupate tampi a-om uhi.
46008006	Eite a ding in bel Pathian khat kia Pa, a-om a amah kiang a kipan in bangkim apawt a, eite leng amah a dia om i hi uhi. Toupa khat kia, Jesu Khrist a-om hi, amah ziak in bangkim a-om hi, eite leng amah ziak mah a om i hi uhi.
46008007	Himahleh huai theihna mi tengteng ah a-om kei hi; khenkhatte milim biakna sa ahih ziak un, milim kiang a kithoihna ahi chih thei napi in tutan in ane uhi; huchi in asia-le-pha theihna uh ahat louh ziak in athanghuaisak uhi.
46008008	Himahleh, sa nek in Pathian mit hon tungsak tuan kei ding a, ne kei mah lehang i se tuan kei a, ne mah lehang leng i hoih tuan sam kei hi.
46008009	Himahleh pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw na noplenna uh bangchi chi hiam in mihatloute a ding in pukna ahong hi kha ding hi.
46008010	Nang theihna neimi, kuapeuh in milim biakna in a-ankuang um a ahon muh ngal un, amau mihat lou na hita le uh milim kiang a kithoihna thil ne ding in asia-le-pha theihna hong maingal lou ding hia?
46008011	Huchi in na theihna ziak in unau hat lou, asih sik a Khrist in asihsakpa, amangthang ding hi.
46008012	Unaute tung a huchibang thil na hihkhelh ua, asia-le-pha theihna uh ahat louh nak lai a na liamsak behlap un, Khrist tung ah thil na hihkhial uhi.
46008013	Huaiziaktak in ka sa nek in ka unau ahihpuk sang in, ka unau ka hihpuklouhna ding in sa himhim ka ne ngei kei ding hi.
46009001	Noplen ka hi kei a hia? Sawltak ka hi kei a hia? I Toupa Jesu ka muta kei a hia? Noute Toupa a ka nasep gah na hi kei ua hia?
46009002	Midangte a ding in sawltak hi kei mah leng, noute a ding bek in zaw ka hi; Toupa a ka sawltak hihna chiamtehna noumau na hi uhi.
46009003	Hiai kei hon demte ka dawn na ahi,
46009004	Ne ding leh dawn ding in thu ka nei kei ua hia?
46009005	Sawltak dangte leh Toupa unaute leh Kifas bang in zi gingtami pi vialvial ding in thu ka nei kei ua hia?
46009006	Ahihkeileh kei leh Barnabas kia koumau kivak kawm a khut a nna sem lou ding in thu ka nei lou tuam ua hia?
46009007	Sepaih kua ahia amah kivak a galkap ngei? Kua'n ahia agah ne lou a grephuan bawl ngei? Ahihkeileh kua'n ahia ganhon nawitui ne lou a ganhon vul ngei?
46009008	Huai thute mihing bang mai in ka gen a hia? Dan thu mah in leng huai ngei agen sam kei a hia?
46009009	Mosi Dan Laibu ah, “Bawngtal in buh achil lai in amuk gak ke'n,” chih gelh ahi. Pathian in bawngtal a ding kia hia angaihtuahsak?
46009010	Ahihkeileh ei a ding a kigen ahi hia? Hi e, ei a ding a agelh ahi; lei letpa'n lamet nei a aleh ding ahi a, buhvopa'n leng tan neih sam lamen a avuak ding ahi.
46009011	Koute'n khalam thilte na kiang ua ka tuh ngal uleh, na salam thilte uh at le ung leng thil thupi ahi dia hia?
46009012	Midang in bawn na tung ua thuneihna atan uleh kou tang sem lou ding ka hi uh maw? Himahleh huai thuneihna ka zang kei uh; Khrist tanchinhoih ka dallouhna ding un bangkim ka thuak teitei uhi.
46009013	Tempul a thil siangthou bawl vialvialte'n tempul a kipan nek amu ua, maitam a nasemte'n maitam a pan ane uh chih na thei kei ua hia?
46009014	Huchi mah bang in, Toupa'n tanchinhoih gente nek muhna ding in tanchinhoih mah asep hi.
46009015	Himahleh ke'n zaw tuate khat leng ka zang kei hi; ka tung a hiaite na hih ding uh ahi chi a hiai thu gelh ka hi kei hi. Kuapeuh in ka suan pen bangmah lou a abawl sang un, si mai leng kei a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
46009016	Tanchinhoih gen mah leng kisaktheihna ding ahi kei hi. Hih louh theih louh ka tung ah akinga ahi; tanchinhoih gen kei leng ka tung gik ding ahi.
46009017	Huai tuh keimah ut thu a hih hi leng kipahman ka nei hi; himahleh, keimah ut thu ahihkeileh tanchinhoih kepna nna piak a om ka hi.
46009018	Ka kipahman bang ahia le? Tanchinhoih ka gen in loh nei lou a, tanchinhoih athawn a pia ka hihtheihna ahi.
46009019	Mi teng a pan zalen himah leng, mi tamsem ka laktheihna ding in mi tengteng sikha in ka kibawlta hi.
46009020	Huchi in Judate ka laklut theihna ding in Judate kiang ah Juda mi bang in ka om zel; dan nuai a omte ka laklut theihna ding in dan nuai a omte kiang ah dan nuai a om bang in ka om zel; dan nuai a om tuan lou in.
46009021	Dan neiloute ka laklut theihna ding in dan neiloute kiang ah dan nei lou bang in ka om zel, Pathian dan a om lou tuan lou in; Khrist dan zom ngal in.
46009022	Hatloute ka laklut theihna ding in hatloute kiang ah hat lou bang in ka om zel; hihtheihna teng zang a khenkhatte ka hotdam theihna ding in mi tengteng kiang ah bangkim ka hita hi.
46009023	Tanchinhoih ziak in bangkim ka hih zel a, huai nasepna a ka tel sam theihna ding in.
46009024	Kitaitehte avek un atai ua, himahleh khat kia in kipahman amu zel chih na thei kei ua hia? Na muhtheihna ding un huchi mah bang in tai un.
46009025	Huan kidemna a kimawl mi peuhmah bangkim ah mahni kithunun in a-om nak hi. Amau zaw lallukhu se thei mu ding in ahih ua, eite'n bel Lallukhu Setheilou mu ding in.
46009026	Huaiziak in kei ka tai a, aziak bei hilou in; huihkhua leltak noh lou in ka pang hi.
46009027	Himahleh ka pumpi ka thunun a; sikha in ka bawl zaw zel hi; huchi lou in zaw midangte kiang a ka tangkoupih nung in leng bangchi hiam in kei ngeitak kipahman mu tak lou in ka om kha ding hi.
46010001	Unaute aw, hiaite na theih louh uh ka deih kei, huchi a i pipute tengteng meipi nuai a a-om vek ua, avek ua tuipi leng akan ua,
46010002	avek ua meipi leh tuipi a Mosi a baptis lut a a-om vek ua,
46010003	avek ua khalam an kibang anek chiat ua,
46010004	avek ua khalam dawn ding kibang adawn chiatdan uh. Amaute zui, khalam Suangpi a pan adawn chiat ngal ua; huai Suangpi Khrist ahi.
46010005	Himahleh alak ua mi tamzaw tung ah Pathian alunghita kei a; gamdai ah apuklum uhi.
46010006	Huan huai thilte ei ding a etton ding ahi, thil gilou alunggulh bang ua i lunggulh samlouhna ding in.
46010007	Alak ua khenkhat milim bemi ahih bang un milim bemi hi kei un, “Mipite ne ding leh dawn ding in atu ua, lam ding in adingh nawn chiat uh,” chih gelh bang in.
46010008	Alak ua khenkhat in nungak angai ua, ni khat in singnih-le-sangthum in apuklup loh bang un, i kingai kei ding uh.
46010009	Alak ua khenkhat in Toupa aze-et ua, gul a hihman a a-om bang un, Toupa zaw i ze-et kei ding uh.
46010010	Alak ua khenkhat aphun ua, hihmangthangpa hihmanthat a a-om bang un, phun sam kei ni.
46010011	Huan huaite vaukholhna ding in atung uah ahong tung hi; eite, hun tawp hong tunnate, hon thuhilhna ding a leng gelh ahi uhi.
46010012	Huaiziak in dingh a kingaihtuah pilvang hen, huchi lou in zaw apuk kha ding hi.
46010013	Mihing thuak theih val khemna himhim na tuang uah atung ngei kei hi. Pathian zaw amuanhuai hi, ama'n na thuak theih val uh khemna na tuah uh aphal kei ding; na thuaktheihna ding un khemna peuh ah taikhiakna lampi abawl zaw ding hi.
46010014	Huaiziak in ka deihtakte aw, milim biak taisan un.
46010015	Mipilte kiang a gen bang in ka thugente ngaihtuah un.
46010016	Vualzawlna nou a ka hon vualzawl uh, Khrist sisan kikoppihna ahi kei a hia? Tanghou ka balkhap uh Khrist pumpi kikoppihna ahi kei a hia?
46010017	Eite mi tampi tanghou beu khat, pum khat i hi uh; i vek un tanghou beu khat ah i tang chiat uhi.
46010018	Salam a Israelte en dih ua; kithoihna sa nete'n maitam thilte akikoppih kei ua hia?
46010019	Bang ka genna ahia le? Milim lak a kithoihna leh milim leng banghiamtak ahi chih ka genna hia?
46010020	Zentelte kithoihna, Pathian lak ah hilou in dawite lak ah akithoih uh ahi chih ka gen zaw ahi; noute zaw dawite toh na kithuah uh hon deih lou ka hi.
46010021	Toupa nou leh dawi nou na dawnkhawm thei kei ding uh; Toupa dohkan leh dawi dohkan ah na nekhawm thei sam kei ding uh.
46010022	Ahihkeileh Toupa hazatna tohthoh i tum uh ahi maw? Amah sang in i hatzaw ua hia?
46010023	“Thil bangkim hih asiang a,” himahleh thil bangkim hih ahoih kei, “Thil bangkim hih asiang a,” himahleh thil bangkim hih in mi abawlhoih kei hi.
46010024	Kuapeuh in amah hoihna ding zong lou in midang hoihna ding zong zaw hen.
46010025	Sa dawr a azuak peuhmah uh na sia-le-pha theihna ziak un bangmah dong lou in ne un.
46010026	“Lei leh asung a tengteng Toupa a ahi ngal a.”
46010027	Gingloumi lak a kuahiam in nou hon sap a, hoh na ut ngal un, sia-le-pha theihna ziak in bangmah dong lou in, ahon lui peuh uh ne un.
46010028	Himahleh kuahiam in, “Hiai zaw kithoihna ahi chi a ahon hilh leh sia-le-pha theihna ziak leh nou a hon hilhpa ziak in ne kei un,”
46010029	Nangmah sia-le-pha theihna ka chi kei a, ama sia-le-pha theihna pen ahi ka chih zawk. Bang achia midang sia-le-pha theihna in ka noplenna thunun ahia?
46010030	Kipaktak a ka tanleh atung a kipahthu ka genna tung ah bang ding a gensiat a om ka hia?
46010031	Huchi in na nek uhiam na dawn uhiam, na hih peuhmah uh, Pathian thupina ding ngen in hih un.
46010032	Judate a ding hiam, Grikte a ding hiam, Pathian saptuamte a ding hiam in apukna ding uh bangmah hih kei un.
46010033	Ke'n keimah phattuamna zong lou a, hotdam ahihtheihna ding ua mi tampi phattuamna zong a, mi tengteng bangkim a ka kipahsak bang in.
46011001	Hon enzuite hi un, kei leng Khrist enzuipa ka hih mah bang in.
46011002	Huan bangkim a na hon theihgige ziak un leh thukhah ka hon hilh bang a na vom tinten ziak un ka hon phat ahi.
46011003	Himahleh pasal peuhmah lutang Khrist ahi, numei lutang pasal ahi, Khrist lutang Pathian ahi chih na theih uh ka deih hi.
46011004	Pasal alu khuh kawm a thum hiam, thu gen hiam peuhmah in, alu aselphou hi.
46011005	Himahleh numei alu khuh lou a thum hiam, thu gen hiam peuhmah in alu selphou ahi; metmai toh kibang ahi.
46011006	Numei alu khuh lou a a-om ngalleh met vanglak hen. Himahleh, numei a ding a sam met leh metmai azumhuaileh alu khuh hen.
46011007	Pasal zaw Pathian batpih leh thupina ahih ziak in alu akhuh ding hilou himhim ahi; numei bel pasal thupina ahi.
46011008	Numei a kipan pasal pawt ahi kei a; numei bel pasal a kipan a pawt ahi zaw hi;
46011009	numei a dia pasal siam ahi kei a; numei bel pasal a dia siam ahi zaw hi.
46011010	Huaiziak in angelte ziak in numei in pasal thuneihna chiamtehna akhuk ding ahi.
46011011	Himahleh Toupa thilgeldan ah, pasal lou in numei a-om thei kei a, pasal leng numei lou in a-om thei sam kei hi.
46011012	Pasal a kipan a numei pawt ahih bang in, pasal leng numei lak a piang ahi ngal a; himahleh bangkim Pathian a kipan a pawt vek ahi.
46011013	Noumau kingaihtuah dih ua, numei in alu khuh lou a Pathian kiang a thum akilawm hiam?
46011014	Pasal in samsau aneihleh amah a ding in azumhuai ahi chih na lungtang pianpih un leng ahon theisak kei a hia?
46011015	Numei in bel samsau aneihleh amah a ding in thupina ahi zaw; kikhuhna ding a asam piak ahih ziak in.
46011016	Himahleh mi kuahiam hiai thu a agenhakleh huchibang paidan himhim i nei kei ua, Pathian saptuam pawlte'n leng anei sam kei uhi.
46011017	Himahleh nou hiai thu ka hon hilhna ah ka hon phat thei kei, na hoihsemna ding uh hilou in, na siatsemna ding ua na kikhop nak ziak un.
46011018	Amasapen in saptuamte na kikhop un, na lak uah kilangkhenna a-om chih ka za a; gin leng ka gingta sim hi.
46011019	Na lak ua ataktakte alattheihna ding un, na lak ua gintuamna leng a-om sam ding him ahi.
46011020	Na hong kikhop ua na nekkhawm uh Toupa nitak an ahi kei hi;
46011021	Michih in na nek chiang un noumau nitak an na ne masa zel ngal ua; huchi in mi khat gil akial a, adang in akham hi.
46011022	Bangchidan ahia? Nek leh dawnna ding inn na nei kei ua hia? Ahihkeileh Pathian saptuamte musit in, bangmah neiloute na selphou ua hia? Na kiang uah bang ka genta dia? K'on phat dia hia? Hiai lam thu ah ka hon phat thei kei hi.
46011023	Ka thu hon hilhsawn Toupa kiang a kipan ka muh ahi, huchi a Toupa Jesu'n matsak a a-om zan a, tanghou alak a,
46011024	kipahthu agen khit a abalkhap a, “Hiai ka pumpi nou a dia piak ahi, keimah theihgigena in hiai hih zel un,” achih.
46011025	Huchi mah bang a nitak an anek khit a nou leng alak a, “Hiai nou ka sisan a thukhun thak ahi, na dawn teng un keimah theihgigena in hih zel un,” achih.
46011026	Huai tanghou na nek ua, nou na dawn teng un ahong pai nawn masiah, Toupa sihna na puangzak uhi.
46011027	Huaiziak in kuapeuh kilawmloutak a tanghou ne hiam, Toupa nou dawn hiam in Toupa pumpi leh sisan tung ah siam louh atang ding hi.
46011028	Huchi in michih amah ki-enchian zaw hen, huchibang in tanghou ne in nou dawn hen.
46011029	Ane leh dawn in Toupa pumpi ngenteltak a angaihtuah keileh amah tung a vaihawmna ding in ane in adawn hi.
46011030	Hiai ziak in na lak ua mi tampi na hat kei ua, na zawngkhal ua, tampi'n na sihloh uhi.
46011031	Himahleh ngenteltak in eimah kingaihtuah zel lehang, vai hawmsak a om nak lou ding i hi uhi.
46011032	Himahleh vai hawmsak a i om in leng khovel toh siam louh tang a i omlouhna ding in Toupa taihilh in i om zel ahi.
46011033	Huaiziak in ka unaute aw, ne ding a na kikhop un kingak chiat un.
46011034	Na kikhop uh vaihawmna na thuakpihlouhna ding un, kuapeuh in agil akialleh a-inn lam ah ne masa hen. Huan thudang zaw ka hong pai chiang in ka bawllem ding hi.
46012001	Tu in unaute aw, khalam thilpiak thute na theih louh uh ka ut kei hi.
46012002	Zentelte na hih lai un bangchidan peuh a hon pi lai un leng, huai milim pau theiloute lam ah pimang in na om uh chih na thei uhi.
46012003	Huaiziak in kuamah in, Pathian Kha a thu gen in, “Jesu hamsiat in om hen,” achi ngei kei. Huan kuamah in, Kha Siangthou kia lou ngal in, “Jesu, Toupa ahi,” achi ngei kei uh chih ka hon theisak hi.
46012004	Huan thilpiak tuamtuam a-om a, Kha bel kikhat ahi.
46012005	Nasepna tuamtuam leng a-om, himahleh Toupa khat ahi.
46012006	Nasepsakna tuamtuam leng a-om, himahleh Pathian khat ahi, mi tengteng a bangkim sempa ahi.
46012007	Himahleh Kha theihsakna michih kiphattuampih chiatna ding in piak ahi.
46012008	Mi khat kiang ah Kha in pilna thu apia hi; midang kiang ah, huai Kha mah in theihna thu apia hi.
46012009	Huan midang kiang a, huai Kha mah in, ginna apia a; midang kiang ah hihdamtheihna apia;
46012010	midang kiang ah thillamdang hihtheihna, midang kiang ah thugenkholh theihna, midang kiang ah khate theihkak theihna, midang kiang ah pau tuamtuamte, midang kiang ah pautuamte hilhchetna.
46012011	Himahleh hiaite tengteng Kha khat leh akikhat mah in, michih kiang ah adeih bang zel a hawm in asem hi.
46012012	Pumpi i chih khat ahi a, hiang anei a, pumpi hiangte tengteng, tam mah le uh, pumpi khat ahi a; Khrist leng huchibang mah ahi.
46012013	I vek un pumpi khat a om ding in Kha khat a baptis in i omta ua, Judate hiam, Grikte hiam, sikhate hiam sikha lou hiam; huan i vek un Kha khat a kipan dawnsak in i omta uhi.
46012014	Pumpi i chih hiang khat kia hilou in tampi ahi zaw hi.
46012015	Khepek in, “Khut ka hih louh ziak in pumpi a pang ka hi kei,” chileh, huai thu ziak in pumpi a pang lou ahi tuan kei hi.
46012016	Huan bil in, “Mit ka hih louh ziak in pumpi a pang ka hi kei,” chileh, huai thu ziak in pumpi a pang lou ahi tuan kei hi.
46012017	Pumpi tengteng mit hi vek taleh gingzakna koi ah a-om dia? Avek in gingzakna hitaleh, gimzakna koi ah a-om dia?
46012018	Himahleh Pathian in hiang khempeuh pumpi ah a-utna peuh ah a-omsak chiatta hi.
46012019	Huchi in huai tengteng hiang khat kia hileh pumpi pen koi ah a-om dia?
46012020	Himahleh hiang tampi ahi zaw uh, himahleh pumpi khat kia ahi.
46012021	Huan mit in, khut kiang ah, “Bangmah in ka hon deih kei,” achi thei kei; lu in leng khepekte kiang ah, “Bangmah in ka hon deih kei,” achi thei sam kei hi.
46012022	Huchih nak sang in, pumpi hiang hat dia kilawm lou pente akiphamohzaw mahmah uhi.
46012023	Huchi in pumpi hiang pahtawi tham louh zaw a i sehte, huaite ngei i pahtawi zaw uhi; huan i hiang kilawmloute'n kilawmna thupizaw amu zel uhi.
46012024	I hiang kilawmte'n bel huchibang a hih akiphamoh kei uhi. Pathian in, kilawmna nei lou hiang pahtawi zawk ding in, pumpi alemkhawm hi.
46012025	Huchi a pumpi a kikhenna om lou a, ahiangte'n kibangtak a akibuaipihtuah theih zawkna ding un.
46012026	Huchi in hiang khat in athuakleh hiang tengteng in athuakpih a, hiang khat pahtawi a a-omleh hiang dangte'n akipahpih zel uhi.
46012027	Huchi in noute Khrist pumpi na hi ua, ahiangte na hi chiat lai uhi.
46012028	Huan Pathian in khenkhat saptuam lak ah ahon koih a, akhatna ah sawltakte, anihna ah thugenkholte, athumna ah sinsaktute akoih a; huai nung in thillamdang hihte a-om a; huai nung in hihdamtheihna thilpiakte, panpih theihna thilpiakte, vaihawm siamna thilpiakte, pau tuamtuam a thugentheihna thilpiakte a-om nawn hi.
46012029	Avek un sawltak ahi uhia? Avek un thugenkholmi ahi uhia? Avek un sinsaktu ahi uhia?
46012030	Avek un thillamdang hihmi ahi uhia? Avek un hihdamtheihna thilpiakte ahi uhia? Avek un pautuamte in thu agen uhia? Avek un thu hilhchianmi ahi uhia?
46012031	Thilpiak thupipente lunggulh mahmah zaw un. Huan lampi hoihsem ka hon ensak ding hi.
46013001	Mihing pautuamte leh angel pautuamte in thu gen mah leng, itna ka neih keileh dak ging lel hiam, dakkhutbet ging lel hiam ka hi ding hi.
46013002	Huan thugenkholh theihna nei in, thuguk tengteng leh theihna tengteng thei vek in, mual suantheihna khop hial ginna kim nei mah leng, itna ka neih keileh bangmah ka hi kei hi.
46013003	Huan migentheite vakna ding in ka sum tengteng pe vek in, ka pumpi leng kang ding hial in kipe mah leng, itna ka neih keileh kei a ding in bangmah aphatuam kei hi.
46013004	Itna in adohzou a, amigi a; itna in ahaza kei a, akisathei sam kei;
46013005	itna aki-uangsak kei a, ahuham sam kei. Amah thu achi tentun kei a, ahehbaih kei, hehsa in a-omden sam kei;
46013006	itna in gilou akipahpih kei a, adik akipahpih zaw hi.
46013007	Itna in bangkim athuak teitei a, bangkim agingta a, bangkim alamen a, bangkim athuakkhe zel hi.
46013008	Itna zaw chikchiang mah in abei kei ding; himahleh, thugenkholhnate om mahleh hihtawp ahong hi ding a, pautuamte om mahleh ahong tawp ding a, theihnate om mahleh hihtawp ahong hi ding.
46013009	Akim lou in i thei ua, akim lou in thu i gen uhi.
46013010	Akim ahong tun chiang in akim lou hihtawp ahita ding.
