46013011	Ka naupan lai in naupang pau in ka pau a, naupang theih in ka thei a, naupang ngaihtuah in ka ngaihtuah hi; tua ka hong pichin nung in naupang hihdan ka tawpsanta hi.
46013012	Tu in zaw limlang ah i mu milmial ahi, huai hun chiang in zaw kimaituah in ahita ding hi. Tu in zaw akim lou in ka thei a, himahleh huai hun chiang in zaw theih khit a ka om bang in ka theikimta ding hi.
46013013	Huchi in hiai thumte: ginna, lametna, itna, a-om gige ding ahi; himahleh hiaite a athupipen itna ahi.
46014001	Itna delh zel unla, khalam thilpiakte leng lunggulh gige un, himahleh thu na gentheihna ding uh lunggulh sem un.
46014002	Pautuamte a pau in mi kiang a thugen hilou in Pathian kiang a gen ahi zaw hi, kuamah in athugen athei kei a; himahleh kha ah thuguk agen ahi.
46014003	Thugenmi in bel mihing kiang ah bawlhoihna thute, hanthawnna thute, khamuanna thute agen zaw zel hi.
46014004	Pautuamte a pau in amah kia akibawlhoih a, thugenmi'n saptuamte abawlhoih zaw hi.
46014005	Huan na vek un pautuamte a na pau uh ka hon deihsak a, himahleh thu na gen uh ka hon deihsak sem hi; saptuamte'n kibawlhoihna amuhtheihna ding un ahilhchet nawn keileh thugenmi zaw pautuamte a pau mi sang in athupizaw hi.
46014006	Tu in unaute aw, na lak uah kilakna hiam, theihna hiam, thugen hiam, sinsakna hiam toh hong lou a, pautuamte a thu gen in hong pai leng, nou a ding in bang ka phatuam dia?
46014007	Thil hinna nei lou, gingtheite leng, tamngai hiam, kaihging hiam, gen nei a agin keileh, bang la ahia atum ua akaih uh bangchi in atheihtheih dia?
46014008	Gen nei lou a pengkul amut un kua galkap ding in akisa dia?
46014009	Huchi mah bang in nou leng pau theih baihlam a na gen kei uleh bang thu ahia na gen uh bangchi in atheihtheih dia? Huihkhua a pau lel na hi kei ding ua hia?
46014010	Khovel ah pau chi tuamtuam tampi a-om tham a, himahleh gen nei lou himhim a-om kei hi.
46014011	Apau in bang gen ahia chih ka theih keileh a genmi a ding in kei melmak ka hi ding a; a genmi leng kei a ding in melmak ahi ding.
46014012	Huchi in noute'n khalam thilpiakte na lunggulh mah bang un saptuam bawlhoihna ding in theihtawp suah in zang un.
46014013	Huaiziak in pautuamte a thu gen in ahilhchet theihna ding in thum hen.
46014014	Pautuamte a ka thumleh ka kha in zaw athum ngei a, ka theihna bel aphatuam tuan kei hi.
46014015	Bangchi in ahita dia le? Kha in ka thum dia, theihna in leng ka thum ding; kha in la ka sa dia, theihna in leng la ka sa ding hi.
46014016	Hichi lou in, Kha in vualzawl mah lechin athei nailoute'n na thugen theiloupi in na kipahthugen uh bangchi in Amen, achi thei ding ua?
46014017	Nang zaw chihtak in kipahthu na gen hoih a, midang abawlhoih tuan kei hi.
46014018	Noumau tengteng sang in pautuamte a thu ka gen tam zawk ziak in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi;
46014019	Himahleh saptuamte kikhopna ah pautuamte a thu singkhat gen sang in midangte ka hilhtheihna ding in ka theihtheihna in thumal nga kia gen ka utzaw ahi.
46014020	Unaute aw, ngaihtuahna ah naupang kei un; himahleh gilou ah zaw naungek unla, lungsim ah piching un.
46014021	Dan laibu ah: “Pautuamte leh gamdang mite muk in, hiai mite kiang ah thu ka gen ding a; huchi in leng ahon ngaikhe tuan kei ding uh, Toupa'n achi,” chih gelh ahi.
46014022	Huaiziak in pautuamte zaw gingtate a ding in chiamtehna ahi kei a, gingloute a ding in ahi zaw, thugen bel gingloute a ding in chiamtehna ahi kei a, gingtate a ding in ahi zaw hi.
46014023	Huaiziak in saptuam tengteng kikhawm a na vek ua pautuamte a na pau uleh thei nailoute leh gingloute hong lut leh ahai uh hon chi kei ding ua hiam?
46014024	Na vek ua thu na gen uleh ging lou hiam, thei nai lou hiam hong lutleh asiamlouhdan uh na vek ua ma ah hihlat ahi ding;
46014025	huchi in alungtang thugukte uh hihlat in a-omta ding a, lei si in Pathian abe ding ua, “Pathian na lak uah a-om taktak,” chih agen ding uhi.
46014026	Unaute aw, bangchi ding ahita dia le? Na hong kikhop un, phatna la hiam, thu kihilh hiam, theihsakna thu hiam, pautuamte, hilhchetna hiam na nei chiat zel ua. Bangkim bawlhoihna ding in hih hi hen.
46014027	Kuapeuh in pautuamte a thu agen uleh, nih in hiam, atampen in thum in hiam hileh, kikhel zel in leng hi hen.
46014028	Huan mi khat in hilhchian hen; hilhchianmi a-om keileh saptuamte kikhopna ah dai in om henla, amah leh Pathian kiang ah gen hen.
46014029	Thugenmi in leng nih in hiam, thum in hiam, gen uhenla, midangte'n hoihtak in ngaihtuah uhen.
46014030	Himahleh akiang a tu midang kiang a theihsakna thupiak ahong tunleh amasa pen dai mai hen.
46014031	Mi tengteng in atheihtheihna ding leh mi tengteng khamuang a a-omtheihna ding un, na vek un khatkhat in thu na gen thei ngal ua.
46014032	Thugen mite, khate thugen mite thuthu in a-om uh ahi.
46014033	Pathian zaw buaina Pathian ahi kei a, lemna Pathian ahi zaw hi. Mi Siangthou saptuam pawl tengteng a-om bang in,
46014034	Saptuamte kikhopna ah numeite dai dinden in om uhen; amau zaw athugen uh phal ahi kei a; Dan gen bang in thumang in om zaw uhen.
46014035	Huan bangpeuh atheihnop uleh inn ah amau pasalte dong uhen; saptuamte kikhopna a numei thugen zaw azumhuai hi.
46014036	Pathian thu noumau a pan pawt ahi maw? Ahihkeileh noumau kiang kia ahong tung ahi maw?
46014037	Kuapeuh thugenmi hiam khami hiam akisakleh na kiang ua ka gelh Toupa thupiak ahi chih atheih ding ahi.
46014038	Himahleh kuapeuh in atheih keileh amah leng theih ahi kei hi.
46014039	Huaiziak in unaute aw, thugen lunggulh unla, pautuamte a thugen leng kham kei un;
46014040	Himahleh bangkim kilawm leh diktak a hih hi hen.
46015001	Huai ban ah unaute aw, tanchinhoih ka hon hilh zaw ka hon theisak nawn ding a; huai tanchinhoih na kipahpih ua, huai mah ah na dingh ua;
46015002	k'on thuhilh pen na mawk gintak uh hilou a, pomkip na hih uleh, huai mah ah hotdam in na om uhi.
46015003	Amasapen in ke'n ka muh sam nou ka hon hilhsawn a; huchi a, Laisiangthou bangbang a i khelhnate ziak a Khrist asih a,
46015004	vui a a-om a, laisiangthou bangbang a ani thum ni a kaihthoh a a-omdan,
46015005	huchi a Kifas kiang a akilak a, huai khit a sawm-le-nihte kiang a akilak thute,
46015006	huai khit in unau zanga sang a tamzawte kiang ah khatvei thu in akilak nawn a, huaite lak a mi, atamzaw tutan in adam lai ua, khenkhat bel a-ihmuta uhi.
46015007	Huai khit in Jakob leh sawltak tengteng kiang ah akilak nawn hi.
46015008	Huan atawp pen ah, ahun lou bang a piang, keimah kiang ah leng akilak hi.
46015009	Kei zaw sawltak lak a neupen, Pathian saptuamte ka sawi ziak a sawltak chih tuak louh ka hi.
46015010	Himahleh Pathian hehpihna ziak in ka hihhih ka hita; huan ahehpihna hon piak athawn in a-om kei a, huchih nak sang in amau tengteng sang in ka semgimzaw hi; himahleh keimah kia in ka sem kei a, Pathian hehpihna ka kiang a om in asem zaw hi.
46015011	Himahleh, ke'n leng, amau leng huchi in ka gen zel ua, huchi in nou leng na gingta uhi.
46015012	Huan Khrist misi lak a kipan kaihthoh in a-om chih ahon hilh ngal uleh, bangchidan ahia na lak ua khenkhat in, misi thohnawnna himhim a-om kei na chih uh?
46015013	Misi thohnawnna himhim om lou ahihleh, Khrist leng kaihthoh in a-om kei ding hi.
46015014	Huan Khrist kaihthoh a a-om keileh, i thugen uh bangmah lou ahi ding a, na gin uh leng bangmah lou ahi ding hi.
46015015	Ahi, Khrist akaithou chih Pathian i theihpih ziak in, Pathian lam thu ah theihpih zuauthei i hong hi ding hi, misite kaihthoh a a-om kei uleh, amah leng akaithou kei ding hi.
46015016	Misite kaihthoh a a-om kei un zaw, Khrist leng kaihthoh in a-omta kei ding.
46015017	Huan Khrist kaihthoh a a-om keileh, na gin uh bangmah lou ahi ding a, na khelhna uah na om nilouh uh ahi ding.
46015018	Huchi hileh, Khrist a ihmusate mangthangta uh ahi ding hi.
46015019	Tu damsung kia a Khrist tung a lametna i neih in zaw mi tengteng lak a mi hehpihhuaipen i hi ding hi.
46015020	Himahleh Khrist misi lak a kipan kaihthoh in a-om taktak ahi, ihmute lak a kipan gah masa ana hita hi.
46015021	Mi khat ziak a sihna ahong om ziak in mi khat ziak mah in misi thohnawnna leng ahong omta ahi.
46015022	Adam ah mi tengteng asi mah bang un, Khrist ah mi tengteng hihhin in leng a-om ding uhi.
46015023	Himahleh amau hun chiat ah; Khrist gah masapente ahi a; huai khit chiang in ahong pai nawn na ah Khrist ate athou ding uhi.
46015024	Huai khit chiang in atawp ahong tung ding; huai hun chiang in, vaihawmna tengteng, thuneihna leh thilhihtheihna tengteng ahihman nung in, Pathian kiang ah, Pa kiang ngei ah gam ape ding hi.
46015025	Amelmate tengteng akhenuai a akoih masiah ama'n vai hawm ding ahi ngal a.
46015026	Melma nanungpen hihmang a om ding sihna ahi.
46015027	Ama'n, “Akhenuai ah bangkim akoih hi.” Himahleh, “Akhenuai ah bangkim koih in a-om,” achih in anuai a bangkim koihpa apang kha kei chih akimu gige ahi.
46015028	Huan anuai a bangkim koih a a-om hun chiang in, Tapa mahmah leng anuai ah koih in a-om ding; Pathian bangkim a bangkim ahihtheihna ding in.
46015029	Huchi ahih kei in, misite a ding a baptisma atansak uh bang achihna uh hi ding ahia? Misite kaihthoh a om lou ding ahih uleh bang achia amaute a dia baptisma tansak uh ahia?
46015030	Bangziak a eite dakkal chih a sih lauhuai a om i hi ua?
46015031	Unaute aw, Khrist Jesu i Toupa a ka hon suanna sial in niteng in ka si, ka chi ahi.
46015032	Mihing dan in gen leng Ephesa a gamsate kilaipih ka hihleh, kei a ding in bang aphatuam dia? “Misi, kaihthoh a a-om kei ding uleh ne in dawn leng ake, zingchiang a si ding hi ve hang in.”
46015033	Khem in om kei un, “Lawm giloute'n omdan hoih ahihgawp nak uhi.”
46015034	Kizentak in halh unla, thil hihkhial kei un; khenkhat in Pathian theihna himhim na nei kei ua. Hiai tuh na zumna ding ua ka gen ahi.
46015035	Himahleh kuahiam khat in, “Misi bangchi in kaihthoh ahi ding uh? Pumpi bangchibang pu in ahia ahong thoh ding?” chi ahi ding e.
46015036	Nang, mihai, nang mahmah in na tuh leng, asih phot keileh hihhin in a-om sam a;
46015037	huan chi na tuh in apumpi hong om ding pen ahi kei a, atang lel na tuh zaw nak, buhtang hiam, chi dang tang hiam ahi thei hi.
46015038	Himahleh Pathian in ama deih bangbang in pumpi apia a, haichitang chih kiang ah amau pumpi chiat apia hi.
46015039	Sa tengteng sa chi khat ahi kei ua; mihing sa atuam a, gamsa sa atuam; vasa sa atuam a, ngasa sa atuam hi.
46015040	Van pumpi a-om a, leitung pumpi leng a-om, himahleh van lam pumpite thupina atuam a, lei lam pumpite thupina atuam hi.
46015041	Nisa thupina atuam a, khapi thupina atuam a, aksite thupina atuam; aksi leh aksi leng athupina uh atuam ziak in.
46015042	Misite thohnawnna leng tua bang ahi. Muat thei a tuh in a-om a, muat thei lou a kaihthoh in a-om hi.
46015043	Pahtawi louh a tuh in a-om a, thupitak a kaihthoh in a-om hi. Hat lou a tuh in a-om a, thilhihtheihna nei a kaihthoh in a-om hi.
46015044	Pianken pumpi a tuh in a-om a, khalam pumpi a kaihthoh in a-om hi. Pianken pumpi a-omleh khalam pumpi leng a-om hi.
46015045	Huchi in mi masapen, “Adam mihing ahong hi a,” chi a gelh ahi; Adam nanung pen bel hinna pepa kha ahong hita hi.
46015046	Himahleh khalam a-om masa kei a, salam a-om zaw; huai zoh in khalam pen a-om hi.
46015047	Mihing masa pen lei a siam, leimi ahi a; mihing nihna pen van a pan ahi.
46015048	Lei a siam mihing leimi ahih bang in, van a kipan mi tuh vanmi ahi.
46015049	Huan lei a siam mihing batna i put bang in, van a kipan hong paipa batna leng i pu sam ding uhi.
46015050	Unaute aw, sa leh sisan in Pathian lalgam aluah thei kei ding a; muat thei in muat theihlouhna aluah sam kei ding chih, ka gen ahi.
46015051	Ngai un, thuguk ka hon hilh ding hi! I vek un i ihmu khol kei ding ua, himahleh i vek un pengkul nanungpen agin chiang in, sawt lou kal in,
46015052	Mitphiat kal lou in hihlamdan in i om vekta ding; pengkul ging ding ahi ngal a, huchi in misite muat thei lou in kaihthoh in a-om ding ua, eite leng hihlamdan in i omta ding uhi.
46015053	Hiai muat thei in muat theihlouhna asilh ding ahi a, hiai sithei in leng sih theihlouhna asilh sam ding ahi.
46015054	Huchi a hiai muat thei in muat theihlouhna asilh a, hiai sithei in sih theihlouhna asilh hun chiang in, huai hun ngeingei in, “Zohna in sihna avalh zouta,” chih thugelh ahong tung ding hi.
46015055	“Aw sihna, na gu koi a-omta ahia? Aw han, na zohna koi a-omta ahia?”
46015056	Sihna gu khelhna ahi a; khelhna thilhihtheihna dan ahi.
46015057	Himahleh i Toupa Jesu Khrist ziak a zohna hon pepa Pathian kiang ah kipahthu om hen.
46015058	Huaiziak in ka unau deihtakte aw, kiptak in, hihlin vual louh in, Toupa nasep phatuamngaitak a sem gige in om un, na sepgimna uh Toupa ah athawn ngei kei chih na thei uhi.
46016001	Huan misiangthoute a dia thilpiak thu zaw, Galatia gam a saptuam pawlte kiang a thu ka piak bang in nou leng na hih sam un.
46016002	Ni sagih ani masapen in michih in vualzawlna na muh bang zel un koih khawl chiat un; ka hong chiang a lakkhawm himhim a-omlouhna ding in.
46016003	Huan na hehpih thilpiak uh Jerusalem a hohpih ding in ka hong tun chiang in kuapeuh hoih na chih ua lai na piak uh ka sawl ding hi.
46016004	Huan kei va hoh kilawm ahihleh, kei toh ahoh ding uhi.
46016005	Huan Masidonia gam ka totsuah khit chiang in na kiang uah ka hong ding a; Masidonia gam ka tuansuak himhim ding hi.
46016006	Na kiang uah bang tan hiam, phalbi sung teng houh ka taam nilouh kha diam; ka hohna ding peuh a noute'n na hon khaksawn theihna ding un.
46016007	Tua pai kawm lel a hon muh malam ka ut kei a, Toupa'n lem asakleh na kiang ua sawt sim taam ka lamen hi.
46016008	Himahleh Pentikost ni tan in Ephesa ah ka taam ding hi.
46016009	Kong lianpi, phatuampi sepna ding kei a ding in akihong ngal a; huan dou mite leng tampi a-om uh.
46016010	Huan Timothi ahong tunleh lauthawng lou a na kiang ua a-omna ding in pilvang un; ke'n ka sep bangmah in Toupa nna asem hi.
46016011	Huaiziak in kuamah in musit kei uhen; ka kiang a ahong theihna ding in khamuangtak in khakhia unla; unaute toh amah muh ka lamen hi.
46016012	I unaupa Apollos thu zaw, unaute toh na kiang ua hong ding in ka deih ngial hi, himahleh tu'n zaw hong a-ut kei a; alemtan hun chiang in ahong ding hi.
46016013	Kiveng unla, ginna ah dingkip un, kihihhang unla, hattak in om un.
46016014	Na hih peuhmah uh itna a hih hi vek hen.
46016015	Unaute aw, Stephenas inkuanpihte zaw Akhaia gam a gingta masate ahi ua, misiangthoute nna sem ding in akipia uh chih na thei uhi;
46016016	huchibang mite kiang ah leh nasep a panpih leh semgim peuhte kiang a lut ding in ka hon hanthawn hi.
46016017	Huan Stephenas, Fortunate leh Akaikas ahong tun uh ka kipak hi; noute hih louh kilang lou a ka taksapna hon huh ziak un.

46016019	Asia gam a saptuam pawlte'n chibai hon buk uhi. Akuila, Priscilla leh a-inn ua om saptuamte'n deihsaktak in Toupa ah chibai hon buk uhi.
46016020	Unau tengteng in chibai hon buk uhi. Tawp siangthou in chibai kibuk un.
46016021	Kei Paul in hiai chibai bukna keimah khut mahmah a ka gelh ahi.

47001001	Paul, Pathian deihlam a Khrist Jesu sawltak leh i unaupa Timothi in, Korinth a Pathian saptuam omte kiang leh Akhaia gam tengteng a misiangthou omte kiang ah:
47001002	Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
47001003	I Toupa Jesu Khrist' Pa leh Pathian, zahngaihnate' Pa leh khamuanna tengteng Pathian phat in om hen.
47001004	Pathian in koumau hon khamuanna ngei in gimthuakna peuhmah a omte leng ka khamuan sam theihna ding un, ama'n ka gimthuaknate uah ahon khamuan hi.
47001005	Khrist thuaknate tampitak ka tan bang un, Khrist ziak in khamuanna leng tamsem ka tang uhi.
47001006	Himahleh gimthuak a ka om uleh noumau khamuanna ding leh hotdamna ding ahi a; huan khamuan a ka om uleh ka thuak bang uh na thuak chiang ua na theih ua na khamuanna ding uh ahi.
47001007	Huan gimthuakna tang samte na hih bang un, khamuanna tang samte leng na hi uh chih ka theih un, noute a ka lametna uh akip ahi.
47001008	Unaute aw, Asia gam a ka tung ua gimthuakna tung na theih louh uh ka deih kei uhi, huchi a nakpitak a thuakzoh vual louh leh hin leng lamethuai lou khop hial in delhden in ka om uhi.
47001009	Ahi, si dia thupukkhum in ka om ua; huai tuh koumau kimuang lou a misite kaithoupa Pathian ka muan zawkna ding uh ahi.
47001010	Ama'n huchibang sih lauhuai lak ah hon hunkheta a, ahon hunkhe lellel a, hon hunkhe nawn lai ding ahi, chi in amah ka muang uhi.
47001011	Noute'n leng thumna in na hon panpih ding uh ahi, huchi in tampite thumna dawnna vualzawlna piak a ka om chiang un koute ziak in mi tampi in kipahthu agen ding uhi.
47001012	Koute suanpen hiai ahi, sapilna ah hilou in, Pathian hehpihna ah hi zaw in sianthouna leh Pathian dikna nei in khovel ah mawltak a ka gamta in, nou lam ah ka gamta hoih nawn sem uh chih ka sia-le-pha theihna un hon theisak hi.
47001013	Na sim theih uleh na theihtheih ding uh lou ngal thudang himhim na kiang uah ka gelh kei uhi; atawp pha in ka thu uh na theihsiam uh ka lamen lai uhi.
47001014	Theihsiamna tan na neih tak bang un, i Toupa Jesu ni chiang in, noute ka hon suan theih bang un nou leng koute na hon suang thei sam ding uhi.
47001015	Huan huai gintakna nei in, na kiang uah hong masa leng ka chi a, kipahna thuah nih na neihtheihna ding un.
47001016	Noumau tawn kawm in Masidonia gam ah pai zel leng la, Masidonia gam a kipan na kiang uah hong kihei nawn in, Judia gam a ka hohna ding ah noumau hong kha le uchin ka chi ahi.
47001017	Huchibang ka ngaihtuah lai in ka lungsim kiplouhdan langsak in hia ka hih? Ahihkeileh, “Ahi, chih leh Ahi kei,” chi tuaktuak ding in, thilhih ka tup nak pen sadan in hia ka tup?
47001018	Himahleh Pathian amuanhuai bang in noumau lam a ka thu uh, Ahi, chih leh Ahi kei, chih ahi kei hi.
47001019	Akoi abang hi hen aw, Pathian Tapa Jesu Khrist thu, kei Silvanas leh Timothi in na lak ua ka gen un, “Ahi leh Ahi kei,” chih ahi sam kei a, amah ah zaw thil tengteng, “Ahi,” chih ahi gige hi.
47001020	Pathian thuchiamte tengteng in amah ah, “Ahi,” chih amu vek hi. Huaiziak in ahi Pathian thupina ding a amah ziak a, “Amen,” ka chih uh.
47001021	Huan Khrist a noumau toh hon hihkippa leh koute hon thaunilhpa, Pathian ahi.
47001022	Amah zaw hon chiamtehpa leh i lungtang a khamna Kha hon pepa leng ahi.
47001023	Himahleh ka kha tung a theihpih ding in Pathian ka sam ahi, noumau hon hawi ding in ahi Korinth a ka hong tak louh zawk.
47001024	Na ginna uh hon thuneihkhum hilou in, na kipahna ding ua nou toh semkhawm ka hi zaw uhi; ginna a na dinkip ziak un.
47002001	Himahleh keimah lam thu ah zaw hiai ka na tum tintenta ahi, lungkhamna dia na kiang ua hong nawnta lou ding in.
47002002	Ke'n ka hon hihlungkhamleh ka hihlungkhampen mah lou in kua'n ahia kei hon hihkipak ding?
47002003	Huchi in huai mahmah ka gelh ahi, huchi lou in zaw ka hong in ka kipahna dingte lak ah lungkhamna ka mu zaw kha ding a; ka kipahna zaw na vek ua kipahna ahih ka hon gintaksak chiat ngal hi.
47002004	Khitui tampi ke kawm a lungtang a haksa leh lauthawng pipi a ka gelh ahi; hihlungkham a na omna ding uh ahi kei a, na tung ua itna thupizaw sem ka nei chih na theih zawkna ding uh ahi.
47002005	Himahleh kuapeuh in mite ahihlungkhamleh keimah kia hon hihlungkham ahi kei a, uanggen lua bel hilou in, na vek ua hon hihlungkham chiat ahi zaw hi.
47002006	Huchibang mi a ding in gawtna na piak tak uh akihun ahi.

47002008	Huaiziak in amah na itna uh hihkip ding in ka hon ngen hi.
47002009	Hiai ziak mah in leng ka gelh ahi, bang peuhmah thu na man uleh, na man louh uh theihchetna ding in.
47002010	Bang lam peuh a mi na ngaihdam uh ke'n leng ka ngaidam hi; ke'n ka ngaihdam khitsa, bangpeuh ka na ngaihdam takleh noumau ziak in Khrist ah ka ngaidamta ahi.
47002011	Huchi lou in zaw Setan in hunlem ala kha ding hi; atup lah i haih ngal kei ua.

47002014	Himahleh Khrist vualzohna a hon pi zelpa leh koute a mun chih a amah theihna gimnamtui theisakpa Pathian kiang ah kipahthu om hen.

47002016	Pawl khatte a ding in sihna lak ah sihna ding gimnam ka hi ua, pawl khatte ding in hinna lak a hinna ding in gimnam ka hi uh. Hiai bangte a ding in kua ahia chingzou ding?
47002017	Mi tampi in Pathian thu mite khem a sumsinna a azat bang un kou zaw ka zang kei uhi. Pathian sawltak hi zaw in, chihtaktak in Pathian mitmuh in Khrist ah thu ka gen zel uhi.
47003001	Koumau kigenhoih pan nawn dek ka hi uhia? Ahihkeileh, na kiang ua piak ding hiam aw na kiang ua kipan hiam genhoihna lai, mi khenkhat a dia akiphatmoh bang in koute a ding in akiphamoh sam ding a hia?
47003002	Noute ka lai uh, na lungtang ua gelh, mi tengteng theih leh sim na hi uhi.
47003003	Khrist lai, kou hon gelhsak laitui a gelh hilou, Pathian hing Kha gelh hi zaw, suangpek a gelh hilou, sa lungtang pek a gelh hi zaw na hi uh chih chiantak in na taklangta uhi.
47003004	Huan Pathian lam ah huchibang muanna Khrist vang in ka nei uhi.

47003006	Amah mah in thukhun thak nasemte hi ding in hon chingsak a; alai thu gelh lel nasemte ding hilou in, a Kha nasemte ding in ahi zaw hi; laithu gelh lel in zaw ahihlum nak a, Kha in bel ahihhing hi.
47003007	Mosi mel avak ziak in Israel suante'n amel a-en sawt thei kei ua, huai thupina amang hiaihiai a; sihna nasepna suang a laimal gelh bawn, huchi tel a thupi a atunleh,
47003008	Kha nasepna pen bangchi phet a thupi in atung diam aw?
47003009	Siam louh tansakna nasepna bawn athupileh diktatna nasepna athupizaw mahmah ding ahi.
47003010	Hih thupi a omsa in hiai ah zaw thupina himhim aneita ngal kei a, thupina thupizaw in akhuh tak ziak in.
47003011	Mangta hiaihiai bawn thupi a atunleh om gige ding thupi atuam in a-om zaw mahmah ding ahi.
47003012	Huan huchibang lametna ka neih ziak un hangsantak in gen ngamna ka nei uhi.
47003013	Mosi hih bang in ka hih kei ua, ama'n zaw thupina mang hiaihiai tawpna Israel suante'n a-et sawt louhna ding un maikhuhna in amai akhuh a;
47003014	alungsim uh bel hihkhauh in a-om a; tuni tanpha in Thukhun Lui asim un khuhna ngeina hawk louh in a-om gige ngal a, huai khuhna Khrist ah hihmang in a-omta hi.
47003015	Himahleh tuni tanpha in Mosi Laibu asim peuh chiang un alungtang uah khuhna a-om hi.

47004001	Huaiziak in Pathian zahngaihna a hiai nasepna mu in ka lungke kei uhi.
47004002	Thil zumhuai kiselte ka pampaih zawta ua, khemna thu ka zang kei ua, Pathian thu tuh mi khemna ding in ka zang kei ua, thutak theisak in Pathian mitmuh in michih sia-le-pha theihna mit ka tungsak uhi.
47004003	Himahleh ka tanchinhoih uh khuh a a-omleh, mangthang lelte ah ahi khuh a a-om.

47004006	Jesu Khrist mel ah Pathian thupidan theihna vak hon pe ding in, “Mial a kipan vak avakkhe ding,” chipa Pathian in i lungtangte asalvakta ngal hi.
47004007	Himahleh thilhihtheihna thupina koute a hilou a, Pathian a ahihtheih zawkna ding in huai gou tuh leibel ah ka kem uhi.
47004008	Alanglang ah nehden in ka om ua, himahleh ning kitel in ka om tuan kei uh; mangbang in ka om ua himahleh ka lungke tuan kei uhi.
47004009	Sawi in ka om ua, himahleh taisan in ka om kei uh; khetpuk in ka om ua, himahleh hihmang in ka om kei uh.
47004010	Ka pumpi uah chik lai peuh in leng Jesu sihna ka pu zel ua, Jesu hinna leng ka pumpi ua alattheihna ding in.
47004011	Koute hingdam a omlaite Jesu ziak a si ding a matsak in ka om gige ua Jesu hinna leng ka sa sithei ua a lattheihna ding in.
47004012	Huchi in koute ah sihna in asem gige a, nou ah bel hinna in asem gige hi.
47004013	Himahleh, “Ka ging a, huaiziak in thu ka gen ahi,” chih gelhpa ginna lungsim ngei pu in, kou leng ka ging ua, thu leng ka gen uhi.
47004014	Toupa Jesu kaithoupa'n koute leng Jesu ah hon kaithou sam ding a, noumau toh ama omna mun ah hon dingsak ding chih thei in.
