47004016	Huai thu ziak in ka bah kei uhi; i polam mihing zawngkhal hiaihiai mahleh, i sunglam mihing pen niteng in bawl thak zel in a-om zaw ahi.
47004017	Ka gimthuakna neukha uh tu mitphiat kal sung kia a om ding in, thupina thupitak tangtawn a ding in ahon bawlsak hulhul ahi.
47004018	Thil muhtheihte en lou in, thil muh theihlouhte ka en zaw uhi; thil muhtheihte zaw sawt lou kal a ding ahi a, thil muh theihlouhte bel tangtawn a ding ahi zaw hi.
47005001	I omna lei inn, hiai puanin pen hihsiat in om mahleh van ah inn, khut a lam louh, tangtawn a om ding, Pathian a kipan inn kip i nei uh chih i thei uhi.
47005002	Van a kipan i omna ding silhthuah ut mahmah in hiai puanin ah thum chihtak in i thum gige uhi.
47005003	Huchibang a silh in om leng vuaktang in i om kei ding uhi.
47005004	Eite hiai puanin a i om sung in gik pua in thum petmah in i thum ngal ua, silh lou a om i ut ziak ahi kei a, silhthuah a om i ut ziak ahi zaw, sithei pen hinna valh a a-om theih zawkna ding in.
47005005	Huan huai mahmah ding a hon sutuahpa khamna Kha hon pepa Pathian ahi.
47005006	Huchi in pumpi a i om lai teng in Toupa kiang ah i om nai kei chih thei in, muangtak in i om gige uhi.
47005007	Muthei a pai lou in, ginna in i pai zaw zel uhi.
47005008	Muangtak in i om, huan pumpi a om lou a Toupa kiang a om i utzaw hi.
47005009	Huaiziak in om in om keita lehang leng, amah kipahpih lam mi hih i tum tinten ahi.
47005010	Michih in pumpi a thilhihte asia-apha in, i hih bangbang a i muh chiat theihna ding in, Khrist thukhenna tutphah ma ah hihlat in i om vek ding uhi.
47005011	Huchi in Toupa kihtakdan thei in mihingte ka hanthawn zel uhi, koute hihna Pathian kiang ah latsak a om bang in, na sia-le-pha theihna uah leng latsak a ka om uh ka lamen uhi.
47005012	Na kiang uah ka kigenhoih nawn uh ahi kei a, lungtang hilou a, dinmun lel suangte bang ahi hiam dawnna ding na neihtheihna ding un kou lam ah suantheihna hon bawl in ka gen zaw uhi.
47005013	Ka hai uleh Pathian a ding in ahi a; ka pil uleh noumau a ding in ahi.
47005014	Khrist itna in ahon sawl teitei ahi; hichi in ka ngaihtuah uhi; mi tengteng sih sik in mi khat asi a, huaiziak in mi tengteng asi uhi.
47005015	Mi tengteng sih sik a Khrist asihna pen ahingte leng amau a dia ahin nawn louh ua, asih sik ua si a thounawn a ding a ahin zawkna ding un.
47005016	Huchi ahih ziak in tuban kou zaw salam ah kuamah ka thei nawnta kei ding uh; salam ah Khrist na theita mah le ung leng; tu'n zaw ka theita kei uhi.
47005017	Huchi ahih ziak in, kuapeuh Khrist a a-omleh thilsiam thak ahong hi a; thil luite amangta a, ngai un, ahong thakta hi.
47005018	Himahleh bangkim Pathian kiang a kipan a pawt ahi a; ama'n Khrist ziak in amah toh kituak in hon bawl a, kituahna nasepna ahon pia hi.
47005019	Huchi in Pathian in Khrist ah khovel amah toh kituak nawn in abawl a, atatleknate uh tatlekna a sehsak lou in, kituah nawnna thu hon kemsak ahi.
47005020	Huaiziak in koute Khrist palai nasemte ka hi ua, Pathian in koute tungtawn in ahon ngen ahi. Pathian toh kituakta un aw chi in Khrist sik in ka hon ngen uhi.
47005021	Amah a Pathian diktatna i hong hihtheihna ding in khelhna himhim thei lou amah Pathian in eite ziak in khelhna in abawl hi.
47006001	Pathian hehpihna phattuampih lou a na tanlouhna ding un, amah seppih koute'n ka hon ngen petmah uhi.
47006002	“Hun kipahhuai ah ka hon ngaikhia a, hotdamna ni ah ka hon panpih,” achi ngal a. Ngai un, tu hun kipahuai ahi a; ngai in, tu hotdamna ni ahi!
47006003	Ka nasepna uh dem a a-omlouhna ding in bang lam peuh ah kuamah pukloh ding himhim ka bawl kei uhi.
47006004	Pathian nasemte bang in bangkim ah mi mit tung in ka om zaw zel ua, nakpi a kuhkalna ah, gentheihna ah, taksapnate ah, lunggimnate ah;
47006005	vuaknate ah, hentaknate ah, mipihon buainate ah, sepgimnate ah, zan ihmutmohnate ah leh gilkialna ah;
47006006	sianthouna in, theihna in, kuhkalna in, migitna in, Kha Siangthou in leh
47006007	thutak thu in, Pathian thilhihtheihna in; taklam leh veilam a diktatna galvante zang in;
47006008	pahtawina ah leh pahtawilouhna ah, min gensiat leh min genhoihna ah leng;
47006009	midiktat hi ngal in mikhemte bang a bawl in ka om ua; minthangtak hi ngal in theih tham louh bang in, si dek phial a vuak a om a, hihlup louh in, ngai dih ua, ka hing ua;
47006010	lungkhamtak bang a om in, lah kipak gige ngal in; zawngtak bang a om in, lah bangkim a midangte hausa a bawl in, bangmah nei lou bang in, lah thil bangkim nei hi ngal in.
47006011	Korinthte aw, koute'n zalentak in ka gen ua, ka lungtang uh zatak in akihong hi.
47006012	Noute a ding in phal louh bangmah ka nei kei ua, nou bel na thil deihlam uah phal louh tan na nei uhi.
47006013	Huchi in ka hon piak bangbang hon pethuk sam ding in (tate kiang a gen bang in ka gen ahi), nou leng na lungtangte uh zasak sam un.
47006014	Ginglou mite toh kituakloupi a hakkol pokhawm in om kei un; diktatlouhna leh diktatna in bang ahia kikopna aneih uh? Ahihkeileh, mial leh vak in bang ahia kithuahna aneih uh?
47006015	Belial leh Khrist in bang ahia kituahna aneih uh? Ahihkeileh, gingloumi leh gingtami'n bang ahia tankhawm aneih uh?
47006016	Milimte leh Pathian tempul in leng bang ahia kituahna aneih uh? Eite zaw Pathian hing tempul i hi ngal ua; Pathian in, “Amaute ah ka teng dia, amau lak ah leng ka khosa ding; huan a Pathian uh ka hi dia, amau leng ka mite ahi ding uh, achih bang in.
47006017	Huaiziak in alak ua kipan in hong pawt unla, atuam in om un, thilsiang lou himhim khoih kei un, Toupa'n achi, huchi in ka hon kipahpih dia,
47006018	noute a ding in na Pa uh ka hi dia, noute leng kei a ding in tanute leh tapate na hi ding uh, Toupa Bangkim hihthei in achi,” chi in.
47007001	Huchi in deihtakte aw, huai thuchiamte i neih ziak un, sa leh kha buahna tengteng a kipan ei leh ei i kisiangsak ding uh, Pathian laudan siam kawm a sianthouna hihbukim in.
47007002	Na lungtang uah mun hon awn un; kua tung mah ah ka khial kei ua, kuamah ka hihse kei ua, kuamah ka khem sam kei uh.
47007003	Kuamah siam louh tansak sawm a hiai thu gen ka hi kei; sih leh sihkhawm a, dam leh damkhawm ding in ka lungtang uah noute ka hon vom uh chih tuma zek in ka genta hi.
47007004	Nou lam ah zaw ka pau ngamdan athupi a, ka hon suandan athupi hi; khamuanna in ka dim a, ka haksatna tengteng uah nuamsa in ka dimlet hi.
47007005	Masidonia gam ka tun un leng ka sa un muanna himhim anei tuan kei a, khat lam khat lam ah hihgim in ka om zawta ua; polam kisualnate a-om a; sunglam launate leng a-om hi.
47007006	Himahleh, lungngai a omte khamuanpa, Pathian in, Titas ahong tunna in hon khamuan a;
47007007	ahong tunna kia in ahi kei, na lungkhamdante uh, na kahdante uh, ka tung a na phattuamngaihdante uh hon hilh a, noumau a akhamuanna mah in leng ahon khamuanta ahi; huchi in ka kipak nawn sem hi.
47007008	Ka laikhak in hon hihlungkham mah leng, ka kisik kei hi; atung in ahihleh ka kisik a, huai laikhak in nou ahon hihlungkham chih ka theih ziak in; himahleh sawt lou kal kia ahi.
47007009	Tu'n zaw ka kipak ahi, hihlungkham a na om ziak uh ahi kei a, kisikna ding a na lungkham ziak un ahi zaw hi. Koumau ziak a bangmah na tanlouhna ding un Pathian deihlam bang a hihlungkham in na om uhi.
47007010	Pathian deihlam a lungkhamna in hotdamna ding in, kisikna abawl a, kisikhuai thil atun kei; khovel lungkhamna in bel sihna atun zaw hi.
47007011	En mah un, Pathian deihlam a lungkhamna in bangchibang chihtakna, bangchibang kihahsiang nopna, bangchibang ki-awilouhna, bangchibang patauhna, bangchibang lunggulhna, bangchibang phattuamngaihna, bangchibang gawtna ahia nou a dia ahon tut tak. Bangkim ah huai thu ah na siang uh chih na kihihlangta uhi.
47007012	Huchi in na kiang uah gelh mah leng, agilou hihpa ziak in ka gelh kei a, agilou thuakpa ziak in leng ka gelh sam kei, ka tung ua na phattuam ngaihdan uh Pathian mitmuh a na kiang ua theihsak a a-omtheihna ding in ka gelh ahi zaw hi.
47007013	Huaiziak in khamuan in ka omta him ua; koumau khamuanna kia lou ah leng, Titas kipahna ziak in ka kipak nawn sem ua, noute tengteng in alungsim na hihhalhsak tak ziak un.
47007014	Akiang ah bang lam peuh ah leng noumau hon suang mah le ung, ka zahlak ngal kei ua, zahlak nak sang in bangkim, na kiang ua thutak tak a ka gen zel bang un, Titas ma a ka hon suan uh thutak tak ahong hita ngei hi.
47007015	Huan na vek ua athu na mandante uh, lau leh ling kawm a amah na kipahpihdante uh theigige in, alainatna noumau lam ah alian nawn semta ahi.
47007016	Thil bangkim ah na tung ua ka muan ziak in ka kipak ahi.
47008001	Huan unaute aw, Masidonia gam a saptuam pawlte lak a Pathian hehpihna piak pen ka hon theisak ding uhi.
47008002	Huchi a haksa thuakna ze-etna thupi a, akipahna uh kiching zou leh nakpi a genthei hinapi, amau lam a athilphalna thupi un huaite khupzou ahihdan bang.
47008003	Aneih bang un, ahi, aneih sang ua thupi in leng, amau ut thu un apia uh chih theihpih ka hi;
47008004	hiai hehpihna leh misiangthoute nasepsakna thu a nakpitak a hon ngen ngutngut in.
47008005	Huan hiai leng ka lamet bang uh hilou, Toupa kiang ah akipekhe masa phot ua, huan Pathian deihna bang in koute kiang ah ahong kipekhia uhi.
47008006	Huchi in tuma a apatsa, hiai hehpihna leng noumau a hihkim lai ding in Titas ka ngen uhi.
47008007	Huchi in bangkim ginna, thugen siamna, theihna, phattuamngaihna tengteng, na hon itna uh na hauh bang un, huai hehpihna leng na hauhtheihna ding un thanop suah un.
47008008	Thupia bang in ka gen kei a, midang phattuamngaihna in na itna uh gildan leng chian ding in ka gen ahi zaw hi.
47008009	I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna, agentheihna ziak a na hong hauhtheihna ding un hau mahleh noumau ziak ngeingei a ahong gentheih takdan, na thei uhi.
47008010	Huchi in huai ah ka ngaihdan bang ahia ka gen hi; kum khat paita a na hih pat kia uh leng hilou, hih ding a na na lunggulh uh tu in buchingsakta le uchin nou a ding in ahoihpen ahi.
47008011	Huchi in hihpichin ding a kimanna a-om bang in, na neih bang zel ua tangtunna leng a-omtheihna ding in, tu'n ah zaw hihtangtungta un.
47008012	Kimanna pen a-om nak photleh mi aneih louhpi hilou in, aneih bang zel a apiak kipahpih tuak ahi.
47008013	Midang agim louh ua, nou na gimna ding un ka chi kei hi.
47008014	Kibatlualna ding in, na hauhna uh tulai in ataksap awnghukna ahong hih a, ahauhna uh leng na taksap awnghukna uh ahong hih sam theihna ding in ka chi ahi zaw, huchi in kibatlualna ahong om thei ding hi.
47008015	“Akhawm tam in aval in anei kei a, akhawm tawm in leng atasam tuan kei,” chih gelh bang in.
47008016	Huan ke'n nou ka hon awlmoh bang a awlmohna lungtang Titas kiang a pepa Pathian kiang ah kipahthu om hen.
47008017	Ka ngetna uh ahon sansak a; himahleh ka nget ziak kia uh hilou in, ama phatuamngaihna in, amah ut thu in na kiang ua hoh dia pawt ding in akisa hi.
47008018	Unaupa khat toh amah ka hon sawl uhi. Huai unaupa asaptuam un tanchinhoih lam a aphatna uh saptuam pawl tengteng ah athangsuak hi.
47008019	Huchi lel leng ahi kei, hiai hehpihna thawnpiak po ding a kou toh zin vialvial ding a saptuam telkhiak ahi a, Toupa thupina ding in hiai thilthawnpiak ka hawm ua, midangte huh na kithalawpna uh ensak ding in leng ka hawm uhi.
47008020	Hiai thilpiak ka hawmna lam uah kuamah in ahon demlouhna ding un ka pilvang uhi.
47008021	Toupa ngaihdan kia in hilou in, mihing ngaihdan a leng thil kilawm ka ngaihtuah khol zel uhi.
47008022	Huan akiang uah ka unaupa uh ka sawl ua, amah thil tampitak ah phatuamngaitak ahi chih tamveipi ka theichianta uhi, tu khol a houh nou ahon taksan mahmah ziak in phatuam angai nawn sem hi.
47008023	Titas ahihleh, ka lawm leh noumau lam a ka naseppih ahi a; huan, ka unaute uh ahihleh, saptuam pawlte palai, Khrist thupina ahi uhi.
47008024	Huaiziak in na it uh chih theihna leh ka hon suanna uh theihtelna saptuam pawlte ma ah akiang uah langsak un.
47009001	Misiangthoute a dia thilpiak thu zaw na kiang uah ka gelh akiphamoh kei hi.
47009002	Na kimandan uh ka thei ngal a, huai lam thu ah zaw nikum in Akhaia gamte kimansa in a-omta uh chi in Masidonia gam a mite kiang ah ka hon na suang zel a; na phattuamngaihna un alak ua mi tampi atok halhta hi.
47009003	Himahleh huai lam thu ah zaw ka hon suanna bangmah lou ahong hihlouhna ding in unaute ka hohsak zel hi; ka gen bangtak a mansa a na na omtheihna ding un.
47009004	Huchi lou in zaw Masidonia gam a mi kuate hiam in ahon zuih zenzen uleh, kiman lou in hong mu le uh, noute kia hilou in noute ka hon ginna uh lam ah kou leng ka zahlak kha ding uhi.
47009005	Huaiziak in unaute bel nou kiang a hong masa a, hoihtak a thilpiak na chiamkholhte uh na bawlkhol ding a, nget kiphamoh in ka gingta hi, laksak teitei bang hilou a phaltak a piak bang zaw a mansa a na omna ding un.
47009006	Himahleh huai lam thu ah zaw, theh tawm in a-at tawm ding a, theh tam in a-at tam ding hi.
47009007	Michih in it pipi a pe lou in, piak louh theih louh a ngaihtuah a pe tuan lou in, alungtang ua atup bang zel un pe chiat uhen; Pathian in kipaktak a pe mite ahi a-it.
47009008	Huan Pathian in hehpihna chiteng in na tung uah avuk thei ahi; huchi in nou bangkim ah ahun ngial nei gige in, nasep hoih chiteng a ding in na hau thei ding uhi;
47009009	“Ahawmzak a; gentheite kiang ah apia a; adiktatna tangtawn in a-om gige,” chih gelh bang in.
47009010	Thehpa kiang a achi pepa leh nek ding a tanghou pepa'n na theh ding uh chi ahon pe ding a, ahon hihpungsak ding a, na diktatna gahte uh leng ahon hihpungsak ding.
47009011	Thilphalna chiteng koute ziak a Pathian kiang a kipahthu genna pen nei ding a, bangkim a hihhauh a om in,
47009012	hiai sepsakna nna in misiangthoute taksapna awngte ahuksak kia ahi kei a, Pathian kiang a kipahthu genna tampi in leng aluanglet lai ahi.
47009013	Hiai nasepna a etkhiak a om in Khrist tanchinhoih lam a na thugin uh na zuihdan uleh amau a ding leh mi tengteng a dia thilpiak a na thilphaldan un Pathian na hih thupi ding uh ahi.
47009014	Amau ngei in leng na tung ua Pathian hehpihna thupi mahmah ziak in, nou a dia thumsak kawm in ahon ngai mahmah uhi.
47009015	Athilpiak gen zoh vual louh ziak in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu om hen.
47010001	Huan kei Paul, na lak ua na mitmuh ua thunuailuttak a om a, na kiang ua om louh chiang a noumau lam a khauh in Khrist lungnemna leh nunnemna in ka hon ngen ahi.
47010002	Ahi, na kiang ua ka om chiang in khenkhat sa bang a om a hon septe tung a hangsantak a om ka tup ngamna bang in, ka hon khauhkhum akullouhna ding in ka hon ngen ahi.
47010003	Sa ah om mah leng sa kidou bang in i dou kei ua,
47010004	eite kigalthopnate zaw sa leng ahi kei a, kulhpi kiptak phelna ding a Pathian ziak a thilhihtheitak galvan ahi zaw hi.
47010005	Lung a gel pansante leh thil sang chiteng Pathian theihna dal ding a sangtak a bawlte i phuk zel; ngaihtuahna chiteng Khrist thumanna sikha a pi in;
47010006	na thumandan uh hihkim a a-om chiang in, thumanlouhna tengteng phu la ding nangawn a leng mansa in ka om uhi.
47010007	Noute'n polam muh theih thilte kia en na hi uh maw? Kuapeuh in Khrist a hi a kimuang ahihleh amah kingaihtuah nawn hen, amah Khrist a ahih bang in, koute leng ka hi sem uhi.
47010008	Ka thuneihna uh nou hihsiatna ding ahi kei a, noumau bawlhoih zawkna ding a Toupa'n ahon piak suang mah leng ka zahlak kei ding uhi.
47010009	Ka laikhakte a nou hon hihlau tum bang a ka latlouhna ding in huai ka chi ahi.
47010010	“Alaikhakte zaw agik in akhauh a, himahleh ataksa kilatdan mizawngkhalpi ahi a, apau leng ahawmthohhuai,” achi uhi.
47010011	Ka om louh chiang ua ka laikhakte ua ka thugelh uleh, huai lai a na kiang ua ka om chiang ua ka hih ding uh akibatlouhna a-om kei chih huchibang mite'n theisiam uhen.
47010012	Khenkhat amau kiphatte lak ah ka kisimkhawm ngam kei ua, amau toh leng ka kitehpih ngam sam kei uhi. Himahleh amau zaw amau leh amau kiteh in amau leh amau kitehpih in lungsim nei lou in a-om uhi.
47010013	Kou zaw Pathian hon tehna val in ka ki-uangsak kei ding ua, mohpuakna ahon piak bang zel in ka ki-uangsak zaw ding uhi, noumau ngei leng huai mohpuakna in hon huamkhak na hi uhi.
47010014	Ka thuneih phaklouhna ding tantan uh hong uk hilou in, Khrist tanchinhoih gen in na khua uah ka hong pai zaw uhi.
47010015	Koute ka hihna pel ua kiphat hiam, midang sepgimnate kisuanpih ka hi kei uh; na ginna uh akhandan bang zel in, na lak ua ka nasepna uh nakpitak a hihlet in omleh chih lametna ka nei zaw uhi,
47010016	huchi in midang nasepsa suang hilou a, nou khen lam gamte tanpha a tanchinhoih ka gentheihna ding un.
47010017	Himahleh, “Asuang peuh in Toupa suang hen,”
47010018	Amah kiphat mi in phat aloh ngal kei a, Toupa'n agen hoih mi in phat aloh zaw ahi.
47011001	Ka hai deuhna uah noute'n Pathian ah na hon thuak theih uh ka ut hi. Ahi, thuak leng na hon thuak theita uhi!
47011002	Pathian hazatna, thikthuse khop in ahi nou ka hon hazat; Khrist kiang a nungak siangthou bang a ka hon piaktheihna ding in, pasal khat ka hon hawisak hi.
47011003	Himahleh gul in azuau pil a Evi akhem bang in, Khrist lam a takna leh sianthouna a kipan bangchi hiam in na lungsim uh ahihse kha ding, chih ka lauthawng hi.
47011004	Khattei hong pai a Jesu dang, athu ka gen ngei louh uh, agen a, kha lamdang na muh ngei louh uh leh tanchinhoih lamdang na san ngei louh uh, na pom pah un kipe baih lua na himah kei ding ua hia!
47011005	Hiai Sawltaklian thuneipen na chihte uh sang in bang lam peuh ah niamzawkna nei in ka kigingta kei hi.
47011006	Thugen lam ah pau zatsiam kei mah leng theihna ah zaw huchibang ka hi kei uhi; huai noute kiang ah bang lam peuh leh thil tengteng ah ka kilangsak uhi.
47011007	Ahihkeileh, Pathian tanchinhoih athawn lel a ka hon hilh ziak a tawisan a na omtheihna ding ua ka kihihniam in thil ka hihkhial a hia?
47011008	Na nna uh ka septheihna ding in midangte a kipan huhna la in, saptuam pawl dangte ka lok ahi.
47011009	Huan na kiang ua ka om a, ka taksap lai in, kuamah ka hon hihbuai kei a; unau Masidonia gam a kipan a hong paite'n ka taksap awng ahong huksak ngal ua; bangkim ah noumau hihbuai lou in ka kibawl bang in, ka kibawl zel lai ding hi.
47011010	Khrist thutak kei mah a a-om bang in, hiai ka kisuanna zaw Akhaia gam lam ah hihdaih in a-om kei ding.
47011011	Bangziak in? K'on it louh ziak hia? Pathian in ka hon it lam athei hi.
47011012	Huan anasep uh kisaktheihpih a, kou sep bangbang a sem kichite kichihna ka bulkalh theihna ding in ka sep tuh ka sem zom zel ding hi.
47011013	Mi huchibangte zaw Khrist sawltak akibawltawm a, sawltak takloute, nasemmi, mikhem hatte ahi uhi.
47011014	Huai ahihleh alamdang kei; Setan hial leng vak sawltak in akibawltawm nak ahi.
47011015	Huaiziak in anasemte leng diktatna nasemmi in kibawltawm mah le uh thillamdang ahi kei; huaite tawpna zaw athilhih bang zel un ahi ding hi.
47011016	Ka chi nawn ahi, kuamah in mihai in hon sep kei uhen; himahleh na hon seh vanglak uleh, ke'n leng neuchik bek a ka kisaktheih sam theihna ding in mihai bangtak in hon pom un.
47011017	Ka gen zaw Toupa thuneihna in ka gen kei a, ka kisaktheihna mihai bangtak in ka gen zaw ahi.
47011018	Mi tampite'n khovel thilte akisaktheihpih ziak un kei leng ka hong kisathei sam ding hi.
47011019	Nou bel mipil na hih ziak un mihaite lungkimtak in na thuakzou zel uhi.
47011020	Mi sal a hon bawlte, hon negaite, nuamtak hon sa a na tung ua kiliansak leh na mai ua hon bengte na thuak thei zel ngal ua.
47011021	Kisitna dan in ka gen ahi, huchi dia zaw hat lou lua mah kei ve ua!
47011022	Amaute Hebru mi ahi uhia? Kei leng ka hi. Israel mi ahi uhia? Kei leng ka hi. Abraham suante ahi uhia? Kei leng ka hi.
47011023	Khrist nasemte ahi uhia? Mihai bang in gen taleng, ka hi sem; sepgimna ah thupi sem in, suangkul tanna ah bang thupi sem in, vuakna ah bang akan-aval in, sih lauhuaina tamveipi ka tuak hi.
47011024	Judate lak ah vuakna khatvei a sawmli ching lou ngavei ka tuak hi.
47011025	Thumvei chiang a khet in ka om a, khatvei suang a den in ka om hi, thumvei longsiatna ka tuak a, zan khat leh ni khat tuipi ah taihmang in ka om hi.
47011026	Khualzinna ah tamveipi, luite lak ah lauhuai, suamhatte lak ah lauhuai, ka chipihte lak ah lauhuai, Zentelte lak ah lauhuai, khopi ah lauhuai, gamdai ah lauhuai, tuipi ah lauhuai, unau takloute lak ah lauhuai;
47011027	septawlna leh sepgimna, ihmutmohna ah tamveipi, gilkial leh dangtakna ah, an ngawlna ah tamveipi, khosik leh vuaktang a omnate.
47011028	Huan hiaite ban a kigen lou saptuam pawl tengteng ka ngaihtuahna niteng a hon delh gige leng a-om hi.
47011029	Kua ahia zawngkhal a om a, ke'n ka zawnkhalpih louh? Kua ahia khelhna a puksia a, ke'n ka lunggimpih louh?
47011030	Suang ding ka hih vanglakleh ka hatlouhna lam thilte ahi ka suan ding.
47011031	Tangtawn a phat tak, Toupa Jesu' Pathian leh Pa in zuau ka genlouhdan athei hi.
47011032	Damaskas ah kumpipa Aretas nuai a gam-ukpa'n hon man ding in Damaskas khopi avengsak a;
47011033	himahleh kulhbaang tohlet ah bawm in hon khaikhia ua, huchi in akhut a kipan ka suakta hi.
47012001	Ka ki-uangsak lai ding hi. Ka phattuampih ding a-om kei na a, Toupa kiang a kipan mengmuhna leh kilakna thu ka genzom lai ding hi.
47012002	Khrist a mi khat ka thei; huai mi tuh kum sawm-le-li ahita a, pumpi in hia a-om ka thei kei, pumpi lou in hia a-om ka thei sam kei; Pathian in athei, van thumna hial ah laktouh in a-om hi.
47012003	Huai mi mahmah, pumpi in hia a-om, pumpi lou in hia ka thei kei; Pathian in athei hi;
47012004	paradis a laktouh a a-omdan, thu genkhiak vual louh, mihing gensiangloute aza chih ka thei hi.
47012005	Mi huchibang ahihleh ka suang ding; himahleh ka hatlouhna lou zaw keimah ka kisuang kei ding hi.
47012006	Suan ut mah leng mihai ka hi kei ding, thutak tak ka gen dek ngal a; himahleh ka kidek ding, huchi lou in zaw kuapeuh in hon muh bang uleh ka lak a thu azak sang un hon ngai thupizaw kha ding uhi.
47012007	Huan kilakna thupi mahmah ziak a ka kingaihlet luatlouhna ding in ka sa ah ling hon pia ahi, Setan sawltak, khut thak nuhna dia hon zang ding ngei; huchi lou in zaw ka kingailian kha ding hi.
47012008	Huai thil tungtang thu ah hon awngsut theihna ding in Toupa thumvei ka ngen hi.
47012009	Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Ka hehpihna nang a ding in ahun hi, hatlouhna ah ahi ka thilhihtheihna hihkim a a-om,” achi hi. Huchi in Khrist thilhihtheihna ka tung a a-omtheihna ding in kipaktak in ka hatlouhnate ka suang zaw ding hi.
47012010	Huaiziak in Khrist ziak a hatlouhna ah, liamna ah, taksapna ah, sawina ah, lungngaihna ah ka kipak zel hi; ka hat louh peuhpeuh chiang in ahi ka hat zawk zel.
47012011	Hai ka na hita; nou hai lou thei lou in na hon bawl ua ahi; bangmah hi kei mah leng, noumau na hon pahtawi ding uh ka hi, bang lam peuh ah leng sawltaklian thuneipente ka pha lou kei hi.
47012012	Ka sawltaklian hih chiamtehnate kuhkalna chiteng toh chiamtehnate, thillamdangte, nasep thupite in na lak uah hih ahi taktak hi.
47012013	Bang lam ah ahia, saptuam pawl dangte sang a niamzaw a bawl a na omna uh? Keimah ngeingei in ka hon hihbuailouhna lam thu ah ahih kei ngalleh. Huai diklouhna ah hon ngaidam un.
47012014	Ngai un, hiai na kiang ua hong hoh ding ka sawm athumveina ahi; noute ka hon hihbuai kei ding, na thilneihte uh hilou in noumau hon deih ka hi zaw hi; tate'n nu leh pate a ding in akholkhawmsak ding uh ahi kei a, nu leh pate'n tate ding in akholkhawmsak zaw ding uh ahi.
47012015	Huan kei zaw na kha ua ding in kipaktak in ka kizangbei ding a, ka kizangbei vek lai ding hi. Akan-aval a nou ka hon it ziak in ke'n noute itna tawmzaw muhna in ka nei ahi maw?
47012016	Himahleh kei mahmah in ka hon hihbuailouhna ah kei lepchiahpil leh khemna a noute hon man na sa ua hiam.
47012017	Na kiang ua ka misawl kuahiamte zang in nou ka hon hamphatpih ngei a hia?
47012018	Noute kiang a hong pai ding in Titas ka ngen a, amah toh unaupa ka hon sawl hi. Titas in nou ahon hamphatpih himhim hia? Kha kibang a gamtakhawm ka hi kei ua hia? Khap kibang a pai ka hi kei ua hia?
47012019	Noumau kiang a kou leh kou kihu na hon sa ua hia? Khrist ah Pathian mitmuh in ahi thu ka gen uh. Himahleh deihtakte aw, bangkim noumau bawlhoihna ding ahi.
47012020	Ka hong pai chiang in bangchi hiam a ka lamet bang a ka hon muh keileh kei deih bang in na hon mu kei kha ding uh chih leh bangchi hiam in kitainate, kihazatnate, hehnate, kilangkhennate, kigennate, kihuaukhumnate, kingaihlet luatnate, buainate a om in ka hon mu kha ding chih ka lau hi.
47012021	Na kiang ua ka hong nawn chiang in ka Pathian in na lak uah hon hih zahlak in thil hihkhialte leh thilsiang lou hihte, kingaite, huk ching a kisik tuan lou, mi tampite ka kahkhum kha ding chih ka lau hi.
47013001	Hiai pen na kiang ua ka hong athumveina ding ahi. “Theihpih nih hiam, thum hiam kam ah thu chiteng hihkip in a-om ding hi.”
47013002	Ka genkholta a, anihveina a na kiang ua ka om lai a ka gen bang in, tu'n ah na kiang ua om lou in, tuma lam a thil hihkhialte kiang ah leh midang tengteng kiang ah ka genkhol nawn dek hi, ka hong nawnleh ka hawi kei ding, chih;
47013003	Khrist keimah a thu gen zelpa pen chetna na zon ziak un, amah zaw noumau lam ah ahat lou kei a, na lak uah thilhihtheitak ahi zaw hi.
47013004	Hatlouhna a kilhlup himahleh Pathian thilhihtheihna ziak in ahing hi. Kou leng amah ah ka hat kei uhi, himahleh, noumau lam a Pathian thilhihtheihna ziak in akiang ah ka hing sam ding uhi.
47013005	Ginna ah na om na uhiam chih noumau ngeingei ki-enchian zel un. Ahihkeileh noumau ah Jesu Khrist a-om chih noumau ngeingei in na theichian kei ua hia? Deih louh na hih kei ngal uleh.
47013006	Koute deih louh in ka om kei uh chih na thei lai ding un ka gingta hi.
47013007	Huan thil himhim na hihkhelhlouhna ding un Pathian kiang ah ka ngen zel uhi; koute deihhuai a ka lattheihna ding uh ahi kei a, koute deih louh in om mah le ung noute'n akilawm peuhmah na hihtheihna ding uh ahi zaw hi.
47013008	Thutak gum ding lou in zaw, thutak dou ding in bangmah ka hihthei kei uhi.
47013009	Koute ka hat louh lai un noute na hat ua, ka kipak uhi; noumau hoih lam a na kibawlphat uh thumna a ka nget uh ahi.
47013010	Huaiziak in hihse ding hilou a bawlhoih ding zaw a, Toupa'n thuneihna ahon piak bang zel in, na kiang ua ka om chiang a nakpitak a ka hon taihilhlouhna ding in, na kiang ua ka om louh lai in hiai thu ka gelh ahi.
47013011	Atawp pen in, unaute aw, kipaktak in om un, na omdan uh kitungding unla; ka hon ngetna limsak un, kikhamuantuah in om unla; lungsim mun khat pu unla, kituaktak in om un; huan na kiang uah itna leh khamuanna Pathian a-om ding hi.
47013012	Tawp siangthou in chibai kibuk un.
47013013	Misiangthou tengteng in chibai ahon buk uhi.
47013014	Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna, Pathian itna, Kha Siangthou kithuahpihna na vek ua tung ah om hen, Amen.
48001001	Paul, Jesu Khrist leh misi lak a kipan a kaithoupa, Pa Pathian ziak a sawltak, mihing sawlkhiak hilou, mihing vang a leng hi sam lou,
48001002	leh ka kiang a unau om tengtengte'n, Galatia gam a saptuamte kiang ah:
48001003	Pa Pathian leh i Toupa Jesu Khrist a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
48001004	Ama'n i Pathian leh Pa deihdan in, tulai khovel giloutak lak a ahon suahtaksak theihna ding in i khelhnate a ding in amah mah ahong kipeta hi.
48001005	Pathian kiang ah thupina tangtawn in om hen, Amen.
48001006	Khrist hehpihna ziak a nou hon sampa huchi guih a tanchinhoih tuam lam a na kisuansan uh lamdang ka sa hi.
48001007	Tanchinhoih dang om ahi kei a; noumau hon hihbuai in Khrist tanchinhoih hihlamdan ut kuate hiam a-om uh ahi zaw hi.
48001008	Himahleh koumau hiam, van a kipan hong suk angel nangawn in leng, tanchinhoih na kiang ua ka gensa pen lou ngal uh tanchinhoih dang himhim hon na hilhta a-om uleh hamsiat in om uhen.
48001009	Tuma a ka gen bang un, tua gen nawn ding ka hi. Tanchinhoih na muh pen lou ngal uh, tanchinhoih dang kuapeuh in nou ahon hilhleh hamsiat in om uhen.
48001010	Ahihleh tu in mihing maipha hia ka zon, Pathian a? Ahihkeileh mihing ahi maw lungtaisak ka tup? Mihing ana lungtaisak lel hi taleng, Khrist sikha ka hi kei ding hi.
48001011	Huchi in unaute aw, ka tanchinhoih gen pen mihing a pan ahi kei chih ka hon theisak hi.
48001012	Mihing kiang a kipan a ka muh leng ahi kei, mi hon hilh leng ka hi sam kei, Jesu Khrist kilakna ziak amu ka hi zaw hi.
48001013	Judate sabiakdan a nidanglai ka omdan na thei khinta ngal ua, huchi a Pathian saptuamte nakpitak a sawi in sukchimih ka na sawm gige hi.
48001014	Huan ka pipute thugousiah tung a phatuam ka ngaih tuankhol ziak in Judate sabiakdan lam ah ka chipihte lak a ka khanvual tampite ka na khengta hi.
48001015	Ka nu gilsung a kipan a hon hihtuampa leh ahehpihna ziak a hon sampa Pathian in,
48001016	Zentelte lak a ka hilhtheihna ding a, ama Tapa lungkimtak a keimah a akilaksak lai in, sa leh sisan toh kidong lou in,
48001017	sawltak ka hih ma a sawltak ana hisate kiang a Jerusalem a hohtou tuan lou in, Arabia gam ah ka paimang pah a; huan Damaskas ah ka kik nawnta hi.
48001018	Kum thum abei nung in Kifas veh ding in Jerusalem ah ka va hohtou a, akiang ah ni sawm-le-nga ka taam hi.
48001019	Sawltak dangte, Toupa unau Jakob kia lou ngal kuamah ka mu kei hi.
48001020	Na kiang ua ka thugelhte ngai dih ua, Pathian mitmuh ah ka zuau kei hi.
48001021	Huai nung in Siria leh Silisia gamte ah ka pai hi.
48001022	Judia gam a saptuam, Khrist a omte meltheih ka hi nai kei lai hi,
48001023	“Tuma lam a khatvei ginna thu sukchimih tum a hon sawipa'n tu in huai thu agen zawta,” chih mi gen kia aza uhi.
48001024	Huan keimah ziak in Pathian apahtawita uhi.
48002001	Kum sawm-le-li abei nung in Titas mah leng pi in, Barnabas toh Jerusalem ah ka va hohtou nawn hi.
48002002	Kilakna ziak a va hohtou ka hi a, Zentelte kiang a tanchinhoih ka tangkoupih amau ka va hilh a; himahleh milian deuhte atuam in ka hilh a; huchi lou in zaw athawn a tai kha hiam ahihkeileh taithawnta ka hi kha ding hi.
48002003	Himahleh ka kiang a om Titas hial leng Grik mi himahleh zeksumsak teitei in a-om kei hi.
48002004	Huai unau tak lou, aguk a pilut a omte, sal a ahon laktheihna ding ua Khrist Jesu a noplenna i neih uh enkhe ding a hong lutte ziak in ahi.
48002005	Himahleh noute a dia huai tanchinhoih thutak a bittak a kep ahihtheihna ding in amau kiang ah mitphiat kal lel leng ka kipe himhim kei uhi.
48002006	Hihna deuh min nei mahmahte bangchibang hihna nei mah le uh kei a ding in alamdanna a-om kei hi. Pathian in kuamah akhentuam kei a; huai min nei mahmahte thugen in bangmah hon behlap kei hi.
48002007	Huchih nak sang in zeksumte kiang a tanchinhoih Peter kiang a kepsak a a-om bang in zeksumlouhte kiang a tanchinhoih kei kiang ah kepsak in a-om chih athei zaw uhi.
48002008	Zeksumte sawltak hi ding a Peter a sempa mah in Zentelte sawltak hi ding in kei ah asem hi.
48002009	Huan kei kiang a piak a om hehpihna amuh un, Jakob, Kifas, Johan, khuam muanhuai leh min neite'n amau bel zeksumte kiang a hoh ding leh kou Zentelte kiang a hoh ding in kei leh Barnabas kithuahna khut taklam hon pe zawta uhi.
48002010	Gentheite ka theihgige lel uh adeih ua, huai mah hih ka tum tinten hi.
48002011	Huan Antiok a Peter ahong pai lai a demhuai mahmah a a-om ziak in amaitang ngei ah ka kalh hi.
48002012	Jakob kiang a kipan mi kuate hiam ahong pai ma un ama'n Zentelte kiang ah an ane zel a; himahleh ahong tuntak un zeksumte akihtak ziak in pang nawn lou in akikoihtuamta hi.
48002013	Juda dangte leng alepchiah chiat sam ua, huchi in Barnabas hilhial leng alepchiahna uah pimang in a-om zou hial hi.
48002014	Tanchinhoih thutak bang in a-om kei uh chih ka theih in avek ua ma ah Peter kiang ah, “Nang Juda mi na hi ngal a, Judate om bang a om lou in Zentelte om bang a na om zawkleh bangchidan ahia Judate om bang a Zentelte na omsak teitei nak?” ka chi hi.
48002015	Ei zaw Zentel mikhialte hilou in, Juda mi him a piang i hi uhi.
48002016	Himahleh dan thilhihte ziak in mi siamtang in a-om kei, Jesu Khrist ginna ziak in siamtang in a-om zaw uh chih i thei uhi; e'n leng dan thilhih ziak hilou in, Khrist ginna ziak a siamtang a i omtheihna ding in, Khrist Jesu i gingta hi; dan thilhihte ziak in mihing himhim siamtang a om lou ding uh ahi.
48002017	Ahihleh Khrist a siamtang a om tum kawmpi a eite mikhialte i na hih nakleh Khrist khelhna omsakpa hita ve maw le! Hilou hial!
48002018	Ka thilhihsiatte ka lam nawn zel in zaw, talekpa ka hi chih ka kitheisak phet ahi ding hi.
48002019	Pathian lam a dia ka hong hintheihna ding in, kei zaw dan ziak in dan lam ah ka si khinta hi.
48002020	Khrist toh kilhden in ka omta; himahleh ka hing ahi; keimah pen ka hita kei a, keimah ah Khrist ahing ahi zaw; tua sa a ka hin bel ginna a hing ka hi; Pathian Tapa, hon it a ka sik a kipepa pen ginna ah.
48002021	Pathian hehpihna bangmah lou in ka bawl kei, dan ziak a diktatna a om in zaw Khrist athawn a si ahi kha ding hi.
48003001	Nou Galatia mihaite aw, kua'n hon bumhai amaizen a? Na mitmuh ngei ua Jesu Khrist kilhden a kichiantak a lahsak zaw hiven maw.
48003002	Hiai leltak ka hon dong ding; dan thilhihte ziak in hia Kha na muh uh, na ngaihkhiak ua na gintak ziak un?
48003003	Hichi tel in na hai uh maw? Kha a pan khin ngal in, sa in na zou ding ua hia?
48003004	Thil huchi zahzah athawn a thuak na hi uh maw? Athawn taktak na hitaleh.
48003005	Na kiang ua Kha hon pepa leh na lak ua thillamdang hihpa'n dan thilhihte ziak in hia ahih, na ngaihkhiak ua na gintak ziak un?
48003006	“Abraham in Pathian agingta a, huai ginna diktatna a simsak ahih tak mah bang in,”
48003007	Huchi in thei un, ginna a omte Abram tate ahi uhi.
48003008	Huan Laisiangthou in, “Pathian in ginna ziak in Zentelte siamtangsak ding in akisa chih theikhol in, nangmah ah namte vualzawlsak in a-om ding uh,” chi in Abraham kiang ah tanchinhoih ana genkholta hi.
48003009	Huchi in ginna a omte ginna mipa Abraham toh vualzawlsak in a-om sam nak uhi.
48003010	Dan thilhih a kinga peuhmahte hamse nuai ah a-om uhi, “Dan laibu a thugelh tengteng bang a hih gige lou peuhmah hamsiat in om hen,” chi a gelh ahi.
48003011	Tu in Pathian mitmuh in kuamah dan a siamtang a-om kei, “Midiktat tuh ginna in ahing ding,” chih ahih ziak in chih alang kilkel hi.
48003012	Himahleh dan zaw ginna a kinga ahi kei; huchibang a hihpa huaite in ahing ding chih ahi zaw hi.
48003013	Eite sik in Khrist hamsiat in ahong om a, dan hamsia a kipan in ahon tankheta hi, “Sing a khailup peuhmah hamsiat hi hen,” chih gelh ahih bang in.
48003014	Huchi a Abraham tung a vualzawlnate Khrist Jesu ziak a Zentelte tung ahong tun theih a, ginna ziak a chiam a om Kha pen i muhtheihna ding in.
48003015	Unaute aw, mihing hihdan in gen leng; mihing thukhun leltak leng, hihkipsa nung aphel kei ua, behlap leng abehlap ngei kei uhi.
48003016	Abraham kiang ah leh achisuante kiang ah thuchiamte piak ana hi. Mi tampi tungthu gen bang in, “Chisuante kiang ah,” achi kei a; mi khat tungthu gen bang in, “Nang chisuan kiang ah,” achi zaw a, huai tuh Khrist ahi.
48003017	Huchi in hiai ka chi ahi; huai thuchiam bangmah lou suaksak a hihmang ding in, thukhun Pathian in ana hihkipsa, anung kum zali-le-sawmthum khit a hong om, dan in ahihmang thei kei hi.
48003018	Gouluah ding thu dan ziak ahihleh thuchiam ziak ahita kei ding a; himahleh Pathian in Abraham kiang ah thuchiam ziak in ahi ana piak.
48003019	Ahihkeileh bangchi thu a dan om ahia le? Chisuan thuchiamna ahong om masiah tatleknate ziak in behlap in a-om a, angelte zang a palai khut a hihkip ahi.
48003020	Huan palai himhim mi khat lak ah palai ahi ngei kei hi; Pathian bel khat ahi.
48003021	Ahihkeileh dan in Pathian thuchiamte akalh hia? Kalh lou hial! Hihhing thei himhim dan piak a om na hitaleh, dan ziak in diktatna a-om ngei ding hi.
48003022	Himahleh Jesu Khrist gin ziak a thilchiam a gingtate kiang a piak ahihtheihna ding in Laisiangthou in khelhna nuai ah bangkim akhakkhum vekta hi.
48003023	Himahleh ginna ahong tun ma in ginna hong kilang ding ah khakkhum in dan nuai a ven i na hi uhi.
48003024	Huchi in ginna ziak a siam i tantheihna ding in huai dan tuh Khrist hon chilpa ahi.
48003025	Himahleh ginna ahong tun in, hon chilpa nuai ah i omta kei uhi.
48003026	Khrist Jesu gin ziak in Pathian tate na hi vek uhi.
48003027	Noute Khrist a baptis lut a omsate Khrist in na kithuamta uhi.
48003028	Huai ah Juda mi a-om kei a, Grik mi leng a-om kei; huai ah sikha a-om kei a, noplen leng a-om kei; huai ah pasal leh numei leng a-om kei hi. Khrist Jesu ah na vek un pum khat na hi uhi.
48003029	Huan Khrist a na hih uleh Abraham suan thuchiam bang a gouluah dingte na hi uhi.
48004001	Himahleh huchi in ka chi ahi, Gouluah dingpa bangkim tung ah toupa himahleh naupang ahih lai teng sikha toh bangmah in akilamdang kei;
48004002	apa hun seh ahong tun masiah achilpa leh akempa nuai ah a-om hi.
48004003	Huchibang in ei leng naupang i hih lai in, khovel thubulte nuai ah sikha in i om uhi.
48004004	Himahleh ahunbi ahong kim in, Pathian in a Tapa, numei suan in, dan nuai a hong suak in ahon sawlkhia hi;
48004005	ta hihna i muhtheihna ding leh dan nuai a omte tankhe ding in.
48004006	Huan tate na hih ziak un Pathian in a Tapa Kha, “Abba, Pa,” chi a kikou in, i lungtang uah ahon sawl hi.
48004007	Huchi in sikha na hita kei ua, ta na hi zawta uhi; huan ta na hihleh Pathian vang a gouluah ding na hi uhi.
48004008	Hinapi, tuma Pathian na theih louh lai un, apiandan mawng ua pathian hilou hialte sikha na hi uhi.
48004009	Himahleh tu a Pathian na hon theih nung un bel, ahihkeileh Pathian theihmi na hong hih nung un chih ding ahi zaw; thubul zawngkhal leh namanloute nuai a bangchidan a bawi a tan ut nawn na hi ua?
48004010	Nite, khate, hunte, kumte na tang zel ua.
48004011	Na tung uah tha ka sengthawn kha ding chih ka lau hi.
48004012	Unaute aw, ka hon ngen ahi, keimah bang in om un, kei leng noumau bang in ka om a, ka bangmah na hihse kei uhi.
48004013	Tanchinhoih na kiang ua ka gen masakna pen ka sa hat louh ziak ahi chih na thei uhi.
48004014	Huan ka sa a nou a dia khemna om tuh na simmoh kei ua, na kih sam kei uh; Pathian angel bang leh Khrist Jesu bang hial in na hon pakta zaw uhi.
48004015	Vangpha na kisakna uh koi a omta ahia le? Hihtheih liai hileh na mit uh khelkhia in na hon pe khin ding uh chih ka hon theihpih ahi.
48004016	Thutak ka hon hilh ziak in na melma uh ka hong hita a hia?
48004017	Amau noute phatuamngaitak in, ahoih lam deih hilou napi in ahon zol ua; ahi, amau a dia phattuam na ngaih theihna ding ua koute a kipan posiah a hon omsak a-ut uhi.
48004018	Atup ahoih nakleh ahoih lam ah chik lai peuh in phatuamngaih gige ahoih hi, na kiang ua ka om lai kia hilou in.
48004019	Ka unaute aw, Khrist noumau a siam piching a a-om masiah nauvei in ka hon vei hi.
48004020	Ahi, tulai in na kiang ua om a, ka awsuah hihlamdan ka ut theihdan; na tungthu uah ka mang abang ahi.
48004021	Dan nuai a om utte aw, hon hilh un, dan in agen na thei kei ua hia?
48004022	Hichibang a gelh ahi: Abraham in tapa nih anei a, khat sikhanu toh khat noplennu toh ahi.
48004023	Himahleh sikhanu lak a pen sadan in apiang a, noplennu lak a pen bel thuchiam ziak a piang ahi.
48004024	Huai thilte etsakna ahi, huai numeite thukhun nih ahi uh; khat Sinai Tang a sikha hi ding a ta neinu, Hagar ahi.
48004025	Huan Hagar bel Arabia gam a Sinai Tang ahi a, tulai a om Jerusalem toh kibang ahi, atate toh sikha in a-om uhi.
48004026	Tunglam Jerusalem bel noplen ahi; huai ngeingei eite nu ahi.
48004027	“Nang chiing, ta nei ngei lou, nuam in, nang, nauvei ngei lou, kikoukhia in; pasal neinu sang in lungzuangnu tate tamzaw ding ahi ngal a,” chih gelh ahi.
48004028	Huchi in unaute aw, eite Isak bang in thuchiam tate i hi uhi.
48004029	Himahleh huai lai bang in tu in leng ahi; sadan a piang in Khadan a piang asawi ahi.
48004030	Himahleh Laisiangthou in bangchi in agen a? “Bawinu atapa toh hawlkhia un; bawinu tapa in noplennu tapa gou aluahpih louh ding ziak in,” achi hi.
48004031	Huchi in unaute aw, bawinu tate i hi kei ua, noplennu tate i hi zaw uhi.
48005001	Noplen ding in Khrist in ahon suaktasakta, huaiziak in dingkip unla, bawi hakkol ah zaw lut nawn kei un.
48005002	Ngai un kei Paul in na kiang ua ka gen, zek na sum uleh Khrist nou a ding in bangmah phattuamna hilou ding ahi.
48005003	Ahi a, dan thu tengteng zui ding a bate ana hi uh chih zeksumte tengteng kiang ah ka theisak nawn ahi.
48005004	Nou dan a siamtan tumte aw, Khrist toh kikhenta na hi ua, hehpihna na puksanta uhi.
48005005	Kou bel Kha ziak in ginna in diktatna lametna ka ngak uhi.
48005006	Khrist Jesu ah zeksum bangmah aphatuam kei a, zeksum louh leng bangmah aphatuam sam kei; itna a sem ginna bel aphatuam hi.
48005007	Hoihtak in na tai uhi. Kua'n thutak zui lou ding a hon dal ahia?
48005008	Hiai khemna zaw nou hon sampa kiang a kipan ahi kei hi.
48005009	Silngou tawmchik in tanghou beupi azelsuak hi.
48005010	Kei ngaihtuahna bang lou in na ngaihtuah lamdang tuan kei ding uh chih Toupa ah ka hon muang hi; himahleh nou hon hihbuaite, akua akua hita le uh vaihawmna atung ua kia pen athuak ding uh ahi.
48005011	Unaute aw, ke'n zeksum thu gen lailai ka hihleh, bangziak a sawi a om lailai ka hia? Huchibang ahih ngalleh kros kisuihna tuh hihmang ahita ding hi.
48005012	Nou hon hihbuaite satkhiak in om vanglak le uh ka deih ahi.
48005013	Nou unaute aw, noplen ding a sap na hi ua; himahleh na noplenna uh sa a ding a lemtanna in zang kei unla, itna in akua akua a ding a kisepsakte hi zaw un.
48005014	Nangmah na ki-it bang in na vengte na it ding ahi, chih thu kam khat ah dan thu tengteng kimsak in a-om hi.
48005015	Himahleh na kikeih ua, na kinektuah uleh na kinekgaihlouhna ding un pilvang un.
48005016	Huchi in hiai ka chi ahi, Kha ah om un, huchi in taksa utna na hihtangtung kei ding uhi.
48005017	Sa in Kha adou nak a, Kha in leng sa adou hi; thilhih na tupte uh na hihtheihlouhna ding un huaite akikalh uh ahi.
48005018	Himahleh Kha pi a na om uleh dan nuai ah na om kei uhi.
48005019	Huan sa thilhihte akilangchian hi, huaite hiaite ahi uh: angkawmna, kingaihna, thanghuaina, hukna,
48005020	milim biakna, bumna, huatna, kinakna, hazatna, hehna, kilanna, omtuamna, gintuamna,
48005021	deihgohna, tualthahna, zukhamna, zumun uangtatna, huchibang thilhih chingte'n Pathian lalgam atang kei ding uh chi a tuma a ka hon hilhkholh mah bang in, ka hon hilhkhol ahi.
48005022	Kha gah ahihleh, itna, kipahna, lemna, thuaktheihna, migitna, hoihna, muanhuaina,
48005023	nunnemna, kidektheihnate ahi zaw uhi; huchibang kalh lam in dan himhim a-om kei hi.
48005024	Khrist Jesu a hitate'n sa, alunggulhna leh aduhgawlna toh akilhdenta uhi.
48005025	Kha a hing i hihleh kha mah ah i om ding uhi.
48005026	Kitawngtuah a, kihaza chiat in, i kikoihlian kei ding uhi.
48006001	Unaute aw, mi takhial bangpeuh ahih lai phawk a na omleh nou khamite aw, khemna ka tuak sam kha ding e, chi a kivenghoih kawm in, huai bang mi nunnemna lungsim toh tungding thak nawn un.
48006002	Na puakgikte uh kidawn chiat un, huchi in Khrist dan na zui uh ahi ding.
48006003	Mi bangmah hiloupi in mi liankuam a akibawlleh amah kikhem tawm lel ahi.
48006004	Michih in amah thilhih ki-enchian hen; huchi a midang toh kiteh a, ki-uangsak lou a, amah mah a suanhuai thil ahihtheihna ding in.
48006005	Michih in ama puak mah po ding ahi ngal a.
48006006	Thuhilh a ommi in thil hoih tengteng ahilhpa kiang ah pe sam hen.
48006007	Zekhem in om kei un; Pathian zaw khem a mawkbawl vual ahi kei; mi'n atuh peuh uh huai mah at nawn ngei ding ahih ziak un.
48006008	Amah salam a tuh in sa a om siatna a-at ding a, khalam a tuh in bel kha a kipan tangtawn hinna a-at ding hi.
48006009	Huchi in thil hoih hih chimtak kei ni; i lungkiak keileh ahuntak ah i at ngei ding uhi.
48006010	Huchi in lemtang hun i neihdan bang zel in mi tengteng tung ah thil hoih hih ni, ginna inkuanpihte lak a omte tung ah hi kholdiak hen.
48006011	Keimah khut mahmah a na kiang ua laimal gol pipi a ka gelh en un.
48006012	Sa a mel kilawmsak utte peuhmah in zeksum a om ding in nou ahon sawl teitei nak uhi; bangmah dang ziak ahi kei, Khrist kros ziak a sawina athuaklouhna ding lel uh ahi.
48006013	Zeksumte nangawn in leng dan azui tuan sam kei ua, na sa uah, suan ding aneihtheihna ding un na zek uh kisumleh chih a-ut lel uh ahi.
48006014	Ke'n zaw i Toupa Jesu Khrist kros lou ngal ka suan louh ding dan, huai kros ziak in khovel kei a ding in kilhden in a-om a, kei leng khovel a ding in kilhden in ka om hi.
48006015	Siam thak nawnna lou zaw zeksum bangmah ahi kei a, zeksum louh leng bangmah ahi sam kei hi.
48006016	Huai dan bang a om peuhmahte tung ah lemna leh zahngaihna, Israel' Pathian tung ngei ah om hen.
48006017	Tuban siah kuamah in hon hihbuai nawn kei hen; ka pumpi ah Jesu chiamtehnate ka pu ngal a.
48006018	Unaute aw, Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kha uah om hen. Amen.
49001001	Paul, Pathian deihlam a Khrist Jesu sawltak in, misiangthou Ephesa a om Khrist Jesu a miginomte kiang ah:
49001002	Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
49001003	I Toupa Jesu Khrist Pa leh Pathian phat in om hen. Ama'n van munte ah khalam vualzawlna chiteng in eite Khrist ah ahon vualzawlta hi.
49001004	Amah mai a siangthou leh dembei a om ding a leitung pian ma a eite hon tel tak bang ngei in;
49001005	Ama'n adeih leh atup bangbang in, eite Jesu Khrist vang a atate hi ding in, itna ziak in hon sepkhol khinta hi.
49001006	Huchi a it a ahon piak hehpihna thupi mahmah pahtawina i hihtheihna ding ahi.
49001007	Asisan ziak in amah ah tatkhiakna, ahehpihna hauhdan bang a i tatleknate ngaihdamna ngei i tangta ua,
49001008	huai mah tuh ama'n eite lam ah pilna leh theihsiamna chiteng hon dimsakta a;
49001009	athiltup Khrist a agelkhiak bangbang in adeihlam thuguk eite ahon theisakta hi.
49001010	Huai adeihlam thilgel bel; hunbi ahong kim chiang a, thil tengteng, van a omte leh leitung a omte Khrist ah gawmkhawm a asuktuah vek ding ahi.
49001011	Ama deihlam a lunggel bang a thil bangkim semkhepa tup bang ngei in, amah mah ah sehkholh a om in i gouluah ding i muta uhi.
49001012	Koute, Khrist a ana lamen masate, athupina pahtawina ding a hing ding in sehkholh in ka na om khinta uhi.
49001013	Huan noute'n thutak thu, na hotdamna tanchinhoih uh ngaikhia a na gintak nung un, amah ah chiamsa Kha Siangthou a chiamteh in na omta uhi;
49001014	huai tuh, Pathian thupina ding a tatna kim i tan mateng a i gouluah ding tang ngei ding i hi chih khamkholhna ahi.
49001015	Huaiziak in ke'n leng Toupa Jesu a ginna na lak ua om leh misiangthoute tengteng tung a na itna uh ka zak in,
49001016	ka thumnate ah na min uh lou in nou ziak a kipahthu gen ka tawp kei hi;
49001017	i Toupa Jesu Khrist Pathian, thupina Pa'n, amah theihna lam thu a pilna leh kilakna kha nou ahon piaktheihna ding in.
49001018	Huchi a na lungsim mitte uh hihvak a hong om a, ama'n nou ahon sapna lametna bang leh misiangthoute agouluah hauhsaknate na theihna ding un.
49001019	Huan agingta eite athilhihtheihna thupina teh vual louh, huai a hatna thilhihtheihna toh asep bang zel in.
49001020	Hiai thilhihtheihna bel misi lak a kipan a Khrist akaihthoh a, vanmun a, ataklam a atutsak hun a,
49001021	lalnate, thuneihnate, thilhihtheihnate, vaihawmna tengteng tung leh tu khovel kia hilou a khovel hong tung ding nangawn a minsak chiteng tunglam pek ah akoih lai a azat mah ahi.
49001022	Ama'n akhenuai ah bangkim akoih a, saptuam a bangkim tung a lutang in amah abawl a,
49001023	huai saptuam apumpi ahi a, amah bangkim a bangkim hihdimpa taangchinna ahi.
49002001	Nou leng na tatlekna uleh na khelhnate uh ziak a si na hih lai un ahon hihhing hi.
49002002	Huaite ah tuma lam in hiai khovel dan bang in, huihkhua a thuneipa, tua thumang lou tate sung a semlelpa kha deihdan in na khosa uhi.
49002003	Huai thumang lou tate lak ah eite leng tuma lam in sa duhgawlna hih in, i tak taksa utnate bang in i om vek ua, midangte mah bang in thangpaihna ta a piang i na hi uhi.
49002004	Himahleh zahngaihna hau Pathian in, itna thupitak a hon it ziak in,
49002005	tatleknate ziak a si i hih lai in Khrist toh ahon hihhing a, hehpihna a hotdam na hita uhi.
49002006	Khrist Jesu ah amah toh ahon kaithou a, van munte ah amah kiang ah ahon tukhawmsak hi.
49002007	Huchi a hun hong tung dingte a, Khrist Jesu a i tung a migitna nei a, ahehpihna hauhdan a-etsak theihna ding in.
49002008	Hehpihna ziak a ginna tawn a hotdam na hi uhi; huai leng noumau a suak ahi kei a, Pathian thilthawnpiak ahi.
49002009	Thilhih ziak ahi kei, huchi hi keileh mi'n asuang kha ding hi.
49002010	Thil hoih hih ding a Khrist Jesu a siam a om in, ama khutsuak i hi uhi; huai thil hoih hih i khosakna dan ding in Pathian in abawlkhol ahi.
49002011	Huaiziak in tuma lam a nou taksa a Zentelte, taksa khut a zeksum, achihte un zeksum louh hon chihte uh na hi uhi.
49002012	Huai lai in, Khrist lou in Israelte khua-le-tui toh kimidang in khovel ah lametna nei lou leh Pathian lou a om in, thuchiam thukhun lak ah mikhual in na om uh chih theigige un.
49002013	Tu'n bel, Khrist Jesu ah nou nidanglai a gamlapi a omte, Khrist sisan a hihnai in na hong omta uhi.
49002014	Amah i kilemna ahi; ama'n ei nihte khat a siam in i kikal a kimelmakna baang lai ahihchimta hi.
49002015	Thusehte leh dan thupiakte asa a hihmang in; huchi a nihte amah a mihing thak khat a siam a kilemna abawltheihna ding in.
49002016	Huan kros ziak a nihte pumpi khat a Pathian toh hon kilemsakna ding in kimelmakna ahihbeita hi.
49002017	Huan amah ahong pai in, nou gamlapi a omte kiang ah leh naichik a omte kiang ah leng lemna tanchinhoih ahilh sam hi.
49002018	Amah ziak in kha khat a Pa kiang luttheihna i nei tuaktuak uhi.
49002019	Huchi in tu'n zaw, zin-le-leng na hi nawnta kei ua, misiangthoute toh tualsung khat leh Pathian inkuanpihte na hita uhi.
49002020	Khrist Jesu ngei aning a suang kiphamohpen hi in, sawltakte leh zawlneite suangphum tung a lam na hi ua,
49002021	amah ah suanglep tuam chiat kituaktak a suktuah, Toupa ah tempul siangthou asuak hi.
49002022	Amah ngei ah nou leng, Kha a Pathian tenna ding a lepkhawm na hi uhi.
49003001	Hiai ziak in kei Paul, nou Zentelte ziak a Khrist Jesu hentapa in,
49003002	noute a dia Pathian hehpihna nasepna piak a om ka hihdan na za thamta ding uhi.
49003003	Huchi a kilakna tungtawn a Khrist thuguk ka kiang a theihsak a a-omdante; tuma a tomchik a ka gelh bang in.
49003004	Huai na sim un Khrist thuguk ka theihdan na thei ding uhi.
49003005	Tu hun a asawltak siangthoute leh azawlnei siangthoute kiang ah Kha theihsak a a-om bang in, tuma lam in mihing tate kiang ah theihsak in a-om ngei kei hi.
49003006	Huai thuguk hiai ahi, tanchinhoih ziak in Khrist Jesu ah, Zentelte gouluahpihte, pumpi hiangte leh thuchiam tanpihte ahi uhi.
49003007	Athilhihtheihna nasepdan bang a, Pathian hehpihna thawnpiak bang zel in huai tanchinhoih nasemtu ding a bawl ka hi.
49003008	Kei, misiangthou tengteng lak a neupen sang a neuzaw kiang ah, hiai hehpihna piak ahi, Khrist hauhsakna suikhiak vual louh Zentelte kiang a gen ding in;
49003009	huan Pathian thil bangkim siampa a tangtawn a sel a na om, thuguk kisel bang ahia chih mi tengteng musak ding in,
49003010	Pathian pilna chiteng van munte a kumpi vaihawmte leh thuneihnate kiang a saptuamte zang a, tu hun a theihsak ahihna ding in.
49003011	Hiai atangtawn thiltup dungzui a Toupa Khrist Jesu a atup leh sepdan ahi.
49003012	Khrist Jesu i gin ziak in amah mah ah maingalna leh kimuanna toh luttheihna i nei hi.
49003013	Huchi in noute ziak a ka gimthuak ziak in lungke lou ding in ka hon ngen hi, huaite na thupina uh ahi.
49003014	Huaiziak in i Toupa Jesu Khrist Pa ma ah ka khukdin hi,
49003015	lei leh van a inkuan chiteng min phuahkhiakna pa,
49003016	athupina hauhdan bang zel a, ama Kha ziak a mihing sunglam a thilhihtheihna a hihhat a ahon omsak theihna ding in.
49003017	Huan na lungtang ua Khrist ginna a atentheihna ding in, a-itna a noute zungkai leh kingakna nei a na omtheihna ding un,
49003018	misiangthou tengteng toh azatdan, asaudan, asandan leh athukdan theihchet theihna leh,
49003019	Khrist itna theih phak louh, Pathian taangchinna chiteng bang a hihdim a na omtheihna ding un.
49003020	Huan eimah a sem zel thilhihtheihna bang in, i nget leh i ngaihtuah tengteng sang a thupizaw tham hihtheipa kiang ngei ah,
49003021	tangtawn in suan tengteng tan in, saptuamte leh Khrist Jesu ah thupina om hen, Amen.
49004001	Huaiziak in noute sap a na omna uh toh kikhawm a khosa ding in kei Toupa a hentapa in ka hon ngen hi.
49004002	Kingaihniamna leh migitna tengteng, kuhkalna toh, itna a kithuakzou chiat in,
49004003	lemna Kha a kipum khatna vom tinten ding in.
49004004	Ahon sapna pen lametna mun khat a sap na hih mah bang un pumpi khat leh Kha khat kia a-om hi.
49004005	Toupa khat, ginna khat, baptisma khat,
49004006	bangkim Pathian leh Pa khat kia a om a; amah bangkim tung a om a, bangkim mu suak leh bangkim sung a om ahi.
49004007	Himahleh Khrist thilpiak tehna bang zel in hehpihna i kiang chiat uah piak in a-om hi.
49004008	“Huaiziak in ahi, tunglam a akahtouh lai in matte tampi api a, mihingte kiang ah leng thilpiakte apia,” achihna.
49004009	Huchi in “Akahtou,” chih lei mun nuainungpente bang a ahong suk masak phot keileh bangchi ahita dia le?
49004010	Hong suk pen thil tengteng ahihdim theihna ding in, van tengteng tung pek a kahtoupa mah ahi.
49004011	Huan khenkhatte sawltak hi ding in, khenkhatte zawlnei hi ding in, khenkhatte tanchinhoih gen ding in, khenkhatte pastor hi ding in, khenkhatte sinsaktu ding in apia hi.
49004012	Hiai tuh misiangthoute thopna ding, nasepna sepna ding, Khrist pumpi lamtouhna ding in.
49004013	Huai tuh ginna leh Pathian Ta theihna lam a thukituak a, piching a, Khrist taangchinna bang a i vek ua i om masiah a ding ahi.
49004014	Huchi a mihingte diklouhna khemna bang a lepchiahpil a khem tawmtawm a om a, thuhilhna huih chiteng a alanglang a sep leh mutleng naupang i hih nawnlouhna ding un.
49004015	Itna a thutak gen a, bangkim a amah lupen, Khrist ngei a i khanlet zawkna ding uh ahi.
49004016	Amah a kipan pumpi tengteng kizopna chiteng sep ziak a lemtak a suktuah leh kizomkhawm a, hiang chih in sepdan ding bang asep chiang in pumpi akhang a itna ah amah-le-amah akilamtou hi.
49004017	Tu in hiai Toupa ah ka hon theisak hi, Zentelte alungsim ginatlouhna uh pu a a-om bang un, na om nawn mahmah ding uh ahi kei hi.
49004018	Amau alungtang uh khauh ziak a theihtheihna nei lou in Pathian hinna theihtheihna a pan posiah in a-om ua; atheihtheihna uh hihmial in a-om uhi.
49004019	Akhenggawpta ua, siang lou chiteng hihna lam a huaiham in zautatna ah akipumpiak uhi.
49004020	Himahleh nou zaw huchibang in Khrist thu na zil kei uhi!
49004021	Athu za a amah a thuhilh a om khin na hih peuhmah uleh, Jesu a thutak a om bang in,
49004022	na pianken lui uh, na nidanglai hindan uh segawpsa suahkhia in,
49004023	na lungsim Kha uah athak in hong om unla,
49004024	pianken thak, diktatna leh sianthouna a Pathian batpih a siam pen silh un.
49004025	Huchi in zuaugen tawpsan in, noumau inveng chiat kiang ah thudik gen un; khat-le-khat kihiangtuah chiat lah na hi ngal ua.
49004026	Heh unla, khelh zaw khial kei un; na hehna uh ni in tumpih kei hen.
49004027	Diabol leng mun awn sam kei un.
49004028	Guta in gu nawn kei hen; tasam kiang a piak ding aneihtheihna ding in, akhut a thil hoih sem in gim zaw hen.
49004029	Thusia peuhmah na kam ua kipan in pawt kei hen; akhawkdan bang zel a bawlhoih ding in thuhoih peuhmah pawt zaw hen, angaikhete a ding a hehpihna ahong hihtheihna ding in.
49004030	Huan Pathian Kha Siangthou hihlungkham kei un, tatna ni a ding in amah ah chiamteh na hi uhi.
49004031	Khaatna bang, thangpaihna bang, hehna bang, hanna bang, gensiatnate leh gitlouh tupna chiteng toh tawpsan in om hen.
49004032	Huan kihehpihtuah chiat a lainatna nei in om unla, Pathian in Khrist a nou ahon ngaihdam bang in, noumau leng kingaidamtuah chiat un.
49005001	Huchi in ata deihtakte bang in Pathian omdan zuite hi un.
49005002	Huan Khrist in hon it a, namtui ding a Pathian kiang a thilpiak ding leh kithoihna ding a i sik a akipiak bang in itna ah khosa un.
49005003	Misiangthou hita na hihman un kingaihna leh siang lou tengteng huaihamna toh, na lak uah lohkhak in om kei hen.
49005004	Zahmohte, thugina lou gente, chiamnuih thu nangawn huaite akilawm lou ahi; huaite gen sang in kipahthu gen zaw un.
49005005	Kingaihhat leh mithanghuai leh mihuaiham in, mihuaiham zaw milim bemi ahi, Khrist leh Pathian lalgam ah gou tan ding anei kei uh chih na thei mahmah uhi.
49005006	Kuamah in thugina lou peuh in hon khem kei uhen; huai thilte ziak in Pathian thangpaihna thumang lou tate tung ah atung nak hi.
49005007	Huaiziak in amau kikoppih kei un.
49005008	Tuma in mial na hi ua, tu'n zaw Toupa ah vak na hong hita uhi; vak tate bang in om un;
49005009	vak gah tuh hoihna, diktatna leh thutak tengteng ahi;
49005010	huan Toupa ah akipah lam pomtak bang ahi hiam zong un.
49005011	Huan mial thilhih gah nei ngeiloute ah leng panna nei kei unla, pan nak sang in adiklouhdan uh theisak zaw un.
49005012	Aguk a athilhih nakte uh agen lel leng azumhuai hi.
49005013	Himahleh thil bangkim adiklouhdan muh theih a om tuh vak hihlat ahi nak hi; muh theih a om peuhmah vak ahi ngal a.
49005014	Huaiziak in “Nang ihmu! Hak inla, misi lak a kipan thou in. Huchi in Khrist in vak hon pe ding,” chih ahi.
49005015	Huan mihaite bang a om lou in, mipilte bang a om zaw in, na omdan uah pilvang un;
49005016	nite ahoih louh ziak in hun na neih sung un atam theipen sem un.
49005017	Huaiziak in hai nuam kei unla, Toupa deihlam bang ahia chih thei zaw un.
49005018	Uain kham in om kei un, huai ah kideklouhna a-om hi; Kha a dim in om zaw un,
49005019	phatna late, Pathian late, khalam late a kihoupih chiat a Toupa kiang a na lungtang tengteng ua ging kilawm bawl leh la sa in,
49005020	i Toupa Jesu Khrist min a, Pathian, Pa ngei kiang a bangkim tung a kipahthu gen gige in.
49005021	Khrist laudan siam in kiniamkhiak chiat un.
49005022	Zite aw, Toupa kiang a na kiniamkhiak bang un, noumau pasalte kiang ah kiniamkhiak un.
49005023	Khrist amah ngei pumpi hondampa hi a, saptuamte lutang ahih mah bang in zi lutang tuh pasal ahi.
49005024	Huchi in saptuamte Khrist kiang a akiniamkhiak bang un bangkim ah apasalte uh kiang ah zite kiniamkhiak uhen.
49005025	Pasalte aw, na zite uh it un, Khrist in saptuamte a-it a, asik ua akipiak bang in,
49005026	huchi a ama'n tui a sil a, thu a ahihsiangthou theihna ding in;
49005027	huchi a saptuamte nin baang lou, vuai lou leh huchibang thil mawngmawng pu lou a, siangthou leh gensiatbei a om zaw a, saptuamte amah-le-amah thupitak a akipiak theihna ding in.
49005028	Huchibang in pasalte'n leng amau pumpi mah bang in amau zite a-it ding uh ahi. Ama zi itpa amah ki-it ahi.
49005029	Kuamah in ama sa mah aho ngei kei, Khrist in saptuamte avak a adeihthoh bang in, avak in adeihthoh zaw hi;
49005030	ama sa leh guh a pan a om, apumpi hiangte i hi ngal ua.
49005031	Huaiziak in pasal in anu leh apa paisan in azi alen tinten ding a, anih un sapum khat ahong hita ding uhi.
49005032	Hiai thuguk athupi hi, himahleh ke'n zaw Khrist leh saptuamte toh kisai ahi ka gen.
49005033	Akoi abang hitaleh, nou lak a kuapeuh in amah a ki-it bang in azi it hen; zi mah in leng apasal zahtak ding in pilvang hen.
49006001	Naupangte aw, Toupa ah na nu leh pate uh thu mang un, huai tuh thil dik ahi ngal a.
49006002	“Na nu leh pa zahtak in,” hiai thupiak chiam nei masapen ahi.
49006003	“Huchi in nang a ding in ahoih dia, lei ah leng na damsawt ding hi.”
49006004	Huan nou pate aw, na tate uh hihthangpai kei unla, Toupa thuzohna leh hilhna ah kem zaw un.
49006005	Sikhate aw, Khrist thumang bang in laudan siam leh ling kawm in lungtang khat in sadan a na pute uh thumang un;
49006006	Mihing kipaksakte maimah bang a mitmei kia veng lou in, Khrist sikha bang a lungtang a Pathian deihlam hih zaw in.
49006007	Mihing nasem phet hilou in, Toupa nasem bang zaw a chitaktak kawm a nna sem in,
49006008	michih sikha hi in noplen himahleh thil hoih ahih bang mah Toupa kiang a kipan in angei mah amu nawn ding uh chih thei in.
49006009	Nou heutute aw, huchibang in amau leh noumau heutupa van ah a-om chih leh ama'n mi deihsak tuam anei kei chih thei in vau lou in atung uah hih sam un.
49006010	Atawp pen in, Toupa leh ahatna thagui ah thilhihtheihna nei in hong om un.
49006011	Diabol khemnate na dou zohtheihna ding un Pathian galvan kim in kivan un.
49006012	I doute zaw sa leh sisan ahi kei ua, lalnate leh thuneihnate leh tu a om lel mial tung a khovel vaihawmte leh van munte a kha gilouhon omte ahi zaw uhi.
49006013	Huaiziak in ni hoih lou a na douzohna ding un leh na hihzoh vek nung ua leng na dintheihna ding un, Pathian galvan kim la un.
49006014	Na kawng uh thutak a gak in, diktatna awmphaw zang in,
49006015	lemna tanchinhoih vanzat na khe ua bun in dingh un.
49006016	Huaite ban ah ginna lum la unla, huai in migilou thal kuangthei tengteng na hihmit thei ding uhi.
49006017	Huan hotdamna lukhu leh Kha namsau, Pathian thu la unla;
49006018	thumna leh ngetna chiteng in bangchik lai peuh in Kha ah thum un. Huai lam ah misiangthou tengteng a ding in phatuamngai leh ngen bilbel in limsak un.
49006019	Tanchinhoih thuguk hangsantak a theisak ding a, ka kam ka kat a, thu gensak a ka omtheihna ding in kei a ding in leng hon ngetsak un.
49006020	Ka gen ding bang hangsantak a ka gentheihna ding in, huai tanchinhoih palai khainiang bun ka hi.
49006021	Himahleh nou leng bangchibang in ka om hiam ka tanchin na theihtheihna ding un, Taikikas, Toupa a unau deihtak leh nasempa muanhuai in bangkim ahon theisak ding hi.
49006022	Huaiziak in amah na kiang uah ka hon sawl ahi, ka tanchin uh na theihna ding uleh ama'n na lungtang uh akhamuan theihna ding in.
49006023	Unaute kiang ah Pa Pathian leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan lemna leh ginna tel itna om hen.
49006024	I Toupa Jesu Khrist tul lou a itte tengteng kiang ah hehpihna om hen, Amen.
50001001	Paul leh Timothi, Khrist Jesu sikhate'n, Philippi a om misiangthou tengteng leh heutute leh upate kiang ah:
50001002	Hehpihna leh khamuanna i Pa Pathian leh Toupa Jesu Khrist a kipan na tung uah om hen.
50001003	Noute ka hon theihgigena ah ka Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi,
50001004	na vek ua ding a kipaktak a thum a ka hon ngetsakna teng ah;
50001005	ani masapen a pan tuni tanpha a tanchinhoih a na kithuahkhawmna ziak ua kipak in.
50001006	Hiai thil mahmah gingta ing; amah nou a nasep hoih panpa'n Jesu ni tanpha in azoukim vek ding hi.
50001007	Na vek ua tungtang thu a, ke'n hichibang lungsim ka neih adik ahi, ka lungtang a ka hon neih ziak in; ka kolbutna leh tanchinhoih gupna leh hihkipna thu a hehpihna ka tanpihte na hi vek uhi.
50001008	Khrist Jesu hehpihna nou ngiingei ah nou ka hon ngai mahmah chih Pathian in ahon theihpih hi.
50001009	Noute theihna leh theihkakna toh kithuah itna a na khan semsemna ding un ka thum hi.
50001010	Huchi a thil hoihpen na deih ua, Khrist ni a siangthou leh dembei a na omtheihna ding uh leh,
50001011	Pathian thupina leh pahtawina ding a, Jesu Khrist ziak a hong om dikna gahte na dimtheihna ding un.
50001012	Unaute aw, tu in ka tung a thil hong tungte, tanchinhoih akhanna dia hong tung ahi uh chih na theih uh ka deih;
50001013	huchi in inpi vengpawl tengteng leh adang tengteng kiang ah Khrist ziak a kolbun ka hi chih achiangta hi.
50001014	Ka kolbuhna a kipan a Toupa muanna nei in unaute lak a tampite lau lou a Pathian thu gen ding in nakpitak in ahong hangsan deuhdeuhta uhi.
50001015	Khenkhatte'n hazatna ziak leh thangpaihna ziak in Khrist atangkoupih ua; khenkhatte'n hoih asak ziak un agen uh.
50001016	Pawl khatte'n itna ziak in, tanchinhoih dikdan gen dia om ka hihdan thei in agen uhi.
50001017	Himahleh pawl dang in kikhenna ding in Khrist atangkoupih ua, ataktak hilou in ka kolbuhna a ka thuakna behlap tum in.
50001018	Bang apoi a? Kong bangkim a Khrist akigenkhiak photleh akhem hi in atak hitaleh, huai ah ka kipak hi. Ahi, ka kipak zel lai ding hi.
50001019	Na thumnate uh leh Jesu Khrist Kha panpihna ziak in hiai ka suahtakna hong suak ding chih ka thei hi.
50001020	Ka gintak taktakna leh ka lametna bang in bangmah ah hihzum in ka om kei hial dia, himahleh ahi gige sa mah bang in tu in leng ka hinna hiam ka sihna hiam in ka pumpi ah hangsanna kim toh Khrist hihlet in a-om ngeingei ding hi.
50001021	Kei a ding in zaw hin Khrist ahi a, huan sih leng punna ahi.
50001022	Himahleh sa a hin ka tan ding hitaleh kei a ding in sepgim gah tampi suahna ding ahi. Hinapi in ka tel ding pen ka thei kei.
50001023	Nih kalteh in hamhaihtak in ka om hi. Paimang a Khrist kiang a om utna ka nei a; huai lah nakpitak in ahoihzaw ngal a.
50001024	Himahleh noute ziak in sa a om phot akiphamohzaw hi.
50001025	Huchi in hiai ginna ka neih ziak in, ka om phot ding chih ka thei; ginna a na khanletna ding uh leh na kipahna ding un, na vek ua lak ah ka om phot ding hi;
50001026	huchi a na kiang ua ka hong pai nawn ding ziak a Khrist Jesu na suanna ding uh tam semsem kei a na neihna ding un.
50001027	Na omdan uh Khrist tanchinhoih toh kituaksak photphot un; hong hoh a, nou hong muh hiam, ahihkeileh ka om louh a leng kha khat a na dinkipdan uh leh lungsim khat nei a tanchinhoih thugin a na pandan uh, na tanchin uh ka zaktheihna ding in.
50001028	Huan bangmah ah na melmate uh hihlau in om kei un. Huai amau a ding in manna ding kichetna teltak ahi a, himahleh nou a ding in hotdamna ding kichetna ahi, huai Pathian a kipan ahi.
50001029	Hiai tuh noute a ding in phal ahita; Khrist gingtate kia hilou in, ama ziak in na thuak sam ding uh.
50001030	Keimah a na muh uleh na zak uh huai kidouna mah na dou ding uh ahi.
50002001	Huaiziak in Khrist a thu kihilh ding a-om a, itna a kinep theihna ding a-om a, kha toh kithuahna, kilainatna leh kihehpihna a-omleh,
50002002	huai lungsim mah pu in, hichibang itna mah nei unla, tup kibang leh lungsim khat nei in ka kipahna hon hihkimsak un.
50002003	Kikhenna ding leh kithupisakna ziak in bangmah hih kei un; lungsim niamlak in michih in ama sang in midang hoih sa zaw hen.
50002004	Na lak ua kuapeuh in amah a ding kia en lou in, midang a leng en sam hen.
50002005	Khrist Jesu a om hiai lungsim nei le uchin:
50002006	Amah Pathian bang a om hinapi in, Pathian toh kikim a om thil khiaklah ding in asep kei hi,
50002007	himahleh amah ahong ki-awngsak a, sikha bang in ahong om a, mihing bang geih in ahong piang hi.
50002008	Huchi in mihing mel ahon pu a, ahong kingainiam a, si ding in thu ahon mang a, ahi, kros a sihna nangawn.
50002009	Huaiziak in Pathian in amah nakpitak in ahihlianta a, min laklak a min tungnungpen apeta hi;
50002010	Jesu min a mi tengteng akhukdin a, van tung, leitung leh lei nuai a thil om tengteng leh,
50002011	lei tengteng in Jesu Khrist Pa Pathian thupina ding a Toupa ahi chih apuankhiak theihna ding un.
50002012	Huchi ahih ziak in, ka itte aw, ka om lai kia hilou a, ka om louh lai a leng thu na man theih tak mah bang un, lau leh ling kawm in na hotdamna chiat uh semkhia un;
50002013	ama lungtaina ding a noumau a hon utsak leh hon semsakpa Pathian ahi.
50002014	Dawngdawng lou leh phunphun lou in thil bangkim hih un;
50002015	Khangthak gilou leh khial, alak ua khovel vak bang a na tennate lak uah Pathian ta gensiatbei leh siangthou,
50002016	hinna thu taklang na hihtheihna ding un; huai a kipan ke'n, Khrist ni ahong tun chiang a, athawn in ka semgim kei a, athawn in ka taigim kei ka chih ngamna ding in.
50002017	Ahi, na ginna thillat tung ua Pathian a dia buakkhiak a om ding na hi leng ka kipak a, na vek un ka hon kipahpih hi.
50002018	Huaiziak mah in, nou leng kipak unla; kei leng hon kipahpih un.
50002019	Akoi abang hitaleh na omdan uh ka theih a lungmuang a ka omtheihna ding in na kiang ua Timothi hon sawl pah Toupa Jesu ah ka lamen hi.
50002020	Hichibang lungsim pu a, na hoihna ding uh awlmoh midang kuamah ka nei kei hi.
50002021	Jesu Khrist thilte zong lou in, avek un amau tuam chiat azong uhi.
50002022	Himahleh ama'n tuh ta in apa nna asep bang in tanchinhoih genzakna ah kei ahon seppih chih theihchetna amah ah na nei uhi.
50002023	Huaiziak in bangchi in ka om dia chih ka hon theihchet peuhpeuh chiang in amah hon sawlkhiak pah ka kilamen hi.
50002024	Himahleh keimah mah leng ka hong pah ding chih Toupa ah ka kilamen hi.
50002025	Himahleh ka sanggam leh seppih leh sepaihpih leh na taksapna ua gamtang leh sawltak Epaphroditas na kiang ua hon sawl kiphamoh ka sa hi;
50002026	na vek un ahon ngai mahmah a, adam louh thu na zak un, alungkham mahmah hi.
50002027	Si dektak in achina ngei a; himahleh Pathian in atung ah zahngaihna anei a; amah tung kia leng hilou in kei tung ah leng ahi sam a, huchi a lungkhamna ka neih sawnsawnlouhna ding in.
50002028	Huaiziak in amah ka hon sawl teitei hi, amah na muh chiang un ana kipahpih un, huchi a kei leng ka dah luatlouhna ding in.
50002029	Huaiziak in kipaktak in Toupa ah amah na kipahpih unla, hichibang mite ana ngaisang un;
50002030	Khrist nasepna ah amah tuh ahong si dek a, kei a ding a na hihkimlouhte uh hon hihsak atupna lam ah ahinna akhuai dektak hi.
50003001	Atawp pen in unaute aw, Toupa ah kipak un. Angei mah gelh kei a ding in achimtakhuai kei a, nou a ding in ahoihzaw hi.
50003002	Uite lak ah kiveng un, nna gilou semte a pan kiveng un, sa atgawp mite a pan kiveng un.
50003003	Eite lah Kha a Pathian bia, Khrist Jesu suang, zeksum diktakte i hi ngal ua, huan pumpi ah suan ding i nei kei uhi.
50003004	Sa ah suang ding chi lehang kei mahmah in suan ding ka nei sem ding hi. Mi himhim in asa a suan ding nei a akitheihleh ke'n ka nei sem hi.
50003005	Ani giat ni a zeksum, Israel chi, Benjamin nam, Hebru mi kholdiak, dan lam a Pharisai;
50003006	phatuamngaihna lam chi lehang saptuamte sawi; dan a diktatna lam chi lehang gensiatbei ka hi.
50003007	Ahihi hitaleh, kei a dia punna ka ngah thilte peuhmah Khrist ziak in manna in ka simta hi.
50003008	Ahitak in, ka Toupa theihna manpha ziak in thil tengteng ka tanta hi. Khrist ka tantheihna ding in thil tengteng ninneng bang phet in ka sim hi.
50003009	Amah a ka omtheihna ding in leh dan a kinga keimah diktatna hilou a, Khrist ginna ziak a om pen, ginna a kinga Pathian a pan suak diktatna nei zaw in.
50003010	Huchi a amah leh athohnawnna thilhihtheihna ka theih a, athuaknate tanpih a, asihna a amah batna ka neihtheihna ding in.
50003011	Bangchi hiam a misi lak a kipan thohnawnna ka ngah theih khakleh chi in.
50003012	Hiai tang khin ka hi kei a, bukim khinta ka hi kei; himahleh huai mah kei a hihsak tum in ka delh teitei hi, Khrist Jesu'n kei, amah a ahon hihsak tak ziak in.
50003013	Unaute aw, tang khinta in ka kingai kei a; himahleh thil khat ka hih hi: nunglam a omte mangngilh in malam a om pen ka delh hi;
50003014	Khrist Jesu a Pathian sapna sang kipahman mu ding in phakchiamna ka delh hi.
50003015	Huaiziak in i lak ua apiching deuhdeuh bek in huchibang lungsim i nei ding uh; huchi a thil peuhpeuh a lungsim dang na neih uleh Pathian in nou ahon theisak ngei ding hi.
50003016	I hong tunna i ngahna chiang uah muanhuai in kip peuhmah ni uh.
50003017	Unaute aw, kei hon enton vek unla huchibang a omte zuih ding a na hon neihte uh chiamteh un.
50003018	Mi tampi a-om ua, atanchin uh ka hon hilhta hi, amau Khrist kros melmate ahihdan uh tu in leng kap kawm in ka hon hilh hi.
50003019	Lei lam thil ngaihtuahte zaw atawpna uh siatna ahi a, apathian uh agilpi uh ahi a, athupina uh leng adaina uh ahi.
50003020	I khua-le-tui hihna uh zaw van ah ahi zaw a; huai a kipan mah in Toupa Jesu Khrist hondampa i ngak uhi.
50003021	I pumpi thulim lou amah thupina pumpi toh kibang ding in, ahon bawlthaksak ding a, thil bangkim ama thuthu a a-omsak theihna thilhihtheihna in.
50004001	Huaiziak in ka unau it leh ngaih, ka kipahna leh ka lallukhute aw, Toupa ah kiptak in dingh un, ka itte aw.
50004002	Toupa a lungsim kibang pu ding in Euodia ka thuhilh a, Sintikhe ka thuhilh hi.
50004003	Ahi, nou leng ka hon ngen ahi, hakkol puakpih muanhuaite, tanchinhoih a ka na seppih hiai numeite, Klemen leh ka naseppih dangte hinna bu a min tuangte leng na panpih un.
50004004	Toupa ah kipak gige un; ka chi nawn ding hi kipak un.
50004005	Na migitna uh mi tengteng kiang ah kithei hen, Toupa anai hi.
50004006	Bangmah lou ah mangbang kei un; himahleh thil bangkim ah, thumna leh ngetna, kipahthu genna toh na ngetnate uh Pathian kiang ah theihsak in om hen.
50004007	Huchi in Pathian muanna, lungsim himhim a theih zoh vual louh in Khrist Jesu ah na lungtang leh na ngaihtuahnate uh ahon kepsak ngeingei ding hi.
50004008	Atawp pen in unaute aw, thil dik peuhmah, thil phathuai peuhmah, thil kilawm peuhmah, thil siangthou peuhmah, thil hoih peuhmah, thil minhoih peuhmah, hoihna himhim a-om a, phatna ding a-omleh huai thilte ngaihtuah un.
50004009	Kei a pan na zilkhiakte, tante, zakte leh na muhte uh, huai thilte hih un. Huchi in muanna Pathian na kiang uah a-om ding hi.
50004010	Himahleh nakpitak in Toupa ah ka kipak hi, huchi a tua kei na hon awlmohna uh athak nawn ziak in; na hon limsak mahmah ua, himahleh hun kizen na nei kei ua ahi.
50004011	Taksap ziak a hiai thu gen ka hi kei; bangchibang in om mah leng huai a lungkim a omdan ka theikheta hi.
50004012	Zawndan ka siam a, hauhdan leng ka siam, mun chih leh thil tengteng a gilvah leh gilkial a omtheihna leh niang leh tasam a omtheihna thuguk ka theikheta hi.
50004013	Ahon hihhatpa Khrist ah thil tengteng ka hihthei hi.
50004014	Huchi a ka mangbatna a na hon panpih ziak un na hihhoih mahmah uhi.
50004015	Nou mahmah, nou Philippite ngei in leng tanchinhoih om tung a kipat, Masidonia gam a kipan a ka pai nung, nou chih louh saptuam dang kuamah in piak leh muh lam ah ahon pe kei uh chih na thei uhi.
50004016	Thessalonika ah ka taksap awng na hon huksakta uhi.
50004017	Thilpiak ka zon ziak ahi kei a, nou a ding a gahpung zong ka hi zaw hi.
50004018	Ahimhim in thil bangkim ka nei a, ka hau a; hihdim in ka om a, noumau a pan bangbang hiam, gimnamtui, kithoihna hoih, Pathian kipaksak, Epaphroditas a kipan in ka na mu hi.
50004019	Huai chiang in ka Pathian in Khrist Jesu thupina ahauhna bang in na taksap tengteng uh ahon pe ngeingei ding hi.

50004021	Khrist Jesu a misiangthou tengteng chibai hon buksak un. Ka kiang a unau omte'n leng chibai ahon buk uhi.

51001001	Paul, Pathian deihdan a Khrist Jesu sawltak leh i unaupa Timothi in,
51001002	Kolossa a Khrist a misiangthoute leh unau muanhuaite kiang ah, Pathian i Pa kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
51001003	Nou a ding a thum gige in Pathian i Toupa Jesu Khrist Pa kiang ah kipahthu ka gen uhi,
51001004	Khrist Jesu na gindan uh leh misiangthou tengteng tung a itna na neihdan uh ka zak tak ziak un.
51001005	Huai bel nou a ding a lametna van a koihkholh a a-om ziak ahi. Huai lametna tanchin mah tuma in, tanchinhoih thutak na zata uhi.
51001006	Huai tanchinhoih tuh khovel tengteng ah gah a akhan zel mah bang in na kiang uh ahong tung a, Pathian hehpihna na ngaihkhiak ua na zak ni ua kipan in, noumau ah leng gah in akhang zel hi.
51001007	Huchibang in Epaphras i sikha hihpih ngaihtak lak a na zil bang un, amah kou sik in Khrist nasempa muanhuai ahi.
51001008	Ama'n Kha a na itna uh ahon hilh hi.
51001009	Huaiziak in ka zak ni ua kipan kou leng noute a ding in thum leh nget ka tawp kei uhi; huchi a khalam pilna leh theihna tengteng a adeihlam theihna a hihdim a na hong omtheihna ding un.
51001010	Huan nasep hoih chiteng a gah a, Pathian theihna a khang a, ama kipah lam a Toupa a dia kilawm a na hintheihna ding un.
51001011	Kipahna toh kithuah thuakhatna leh kuhkalna nei ding in, ahatna thupi bang zel a hihhat in hong om un.
51001012	Vak a misiangthoute gouluahpih dia hon chingsak Pa kiang a kipahthu gen in.
51001013	Ama'n mial thuneihna lak a kipan hon suaktasak in, a Tapa ittak gam ah hon kaisakta hi.
51001014	Amah ah i tatkhiakna leh khelhnate ngaihdamna i mu uhi.
51001015	Amah muh theih louh Pathian batpih, thilsiam tengteng a piang masapen ahi.
51001016	Amah ah bangkim siam ahi a, van a omte leh lei a omte, muhtheihte leh muh theihlouhte, laltutphahte, thuneihnate, vaihawmnate leh thilhihtheihnate hitaleh bangkim ama siam ahi, amah a ding mah a siam ahi.
51001017	Huan amah zaw bang teng om ma in leng a-om hi, amah ah bang teng adingkhawm chiat uhi.
51001018	Amah tuh pumpi, saptuam lutang ahi a; bangkim a tungnungpen ahong hihtheihna ding in abulpi, misi lak a kipan piang masapen ahi.
51001019	Amah ah Pathian taangchinna tengteng a om Pa deihlamtak ahi.
51001020	Ama kros sisan a lemna abawl in amah ah bangkim amah toh akilemsak a; amah ngei ah lei a thil omte leh van a thil omte leng amah toh akilemsakta hi.
51001021	Huan nou tuma lam in na lungsim uah amelma na hi ua, na thilhih gilou ua amah a kipan a khen a om na hi uhi, himahleh tu in ama'n amah toh hon kilemsakta a;
51001022	asihna in apumpi ah amah toh noute ahon kilemsakta hi, ama a siangthou, gensiatbei leh mohsak theih louh a ahon dinsak theihna ding in,
51001023	kingakna nei a kiptak a om a, tanchinhoih na zak ua lametna a kipan a suanmang a om lou a, ginna a na om gige peuhmah uleh; huai tanchinhoih van nuai a thilsiam tengteng lak a tangkoupih ahi a; kei Paul leng huai nna sem ding a bawl ka hi.
51001024	Nou ziak a tu a ka gimthuaknate ah ka kipak hi; huan apumpi ziak a Khrist in agimthuaknate ban zom zel ka hi; huai tuh Saptuam ahi.
51001025	Nou a ding a Pathian nasepna kei kiang a piak a om bang zel in huai saptuam nasempa ka hong hita; Pathian thu bukimtak a theisak ding in.
51001026	Huai Pathian thu tuh tangtawn leh akhang-akhang a kipan a thuguk kisel ahi; tu in bel misiangthoute kiang ah latsak in a-omta hi.

51002003	pilna leh theihna gou chiteng amah Khrist ah selguk in a-om hi.
51002004	Kuamah in paukam siam a ahon khemzohlouhna ding un, huaite ka gen ahi.
51002005	Sa in na kiang uah om kei mah leng, kipaktak a om in na kizendan uleh Khrist ginna a na kipdan uh thei in, kha in na kiang uah ka om hi.

51002009	Amah ah Pathian taangchinna chiteng tuh pumpi nei in a-om gige hi.
51002010	Amah ah hinna taangchinna na neita ngal ua; amah vaihawmna leh thuneihna tengteng lutang ahi.
51002011	Amah ah zeksum, mihing khut a sum hilou, Khrist in abawl zeksumna ah na pianken khelhna uh suahkhia in zeksum na hita uhi.
51002012	Baptisma a amah toh vui na hita ua, huai mah ah misi lak a kipan a Pathian nasep gintak ziak in amah toh kaihthoh na hi uhi.
51002013	Huan noute na tatleknate uleh na sa uh zeksumlouhna a si na hi ua, noumau ngei amah toh ahon hingsak in na tatlekna tengteng uh angaidamta hi.
51002014	I tatlekna tengteng hon ngaidam a, batna lai thupiak a gelh i tung ua om eimah hon dou gige anulmangta hi. Huai ngei kros a kilhlum in alamangta hi.
