52005010	I hah in leng i ihmut in leng, amah toh i hinkhawm theihna ding in i sih sik in amah asita hi.
52005011	Huaiziak in kihanthawntuah chiat in, na hih zel mah bang un kitungdingtuah chiat un.
52005012	Huan unaute aw, na lak ua semgim leh Toupa a na heutu ua na omleh nou hon thuhilhte thei ding in ka hon ngen ahi.
52005013	Anasep ziak un it in ngai thupi mahmah un. Noumau kituak in om un.
52005014	Tu in unaute aw, ka hon hanthawn uhi, dan lou a omte hilh unla, lungkete hanthawn un, hatloute panpih unla, mi tengteng lak ah thuakzoutak in om un.
52005015	Kuamah in kua gitlouh leng gilou a thuk lou ding in pilvang un; thil na kihihsaktuahna lam uah leh mi tengteng tung a na hihsakna lam uah leng ahoih lamlam zui un.
52005016	Nuam gige un;
52005017	tawp lou in thum un;
52005018	bangkim ah kipahthu gen gige un; huai tuh noumau lam a Khrist Jesu ah Pathian deihlam ahi.
52005019	Kha phelh kei un;
52005020	thugente simmoh kei un;
52005021	bangkim enchian zaw unla, ahoih lam peuhmah len tinten un;
52005022	gilou lam peuhmah ah kihemkhia un.
52005023	Huchi in lemna Pathian ngei in nou hon hihsiangthou sipsip hen; na kha uh leh na lungsim uh leh na pumpi uh i Toupa Jesu Khrist hong pai chiang in gensiatbei in humbit in omsuak sipsip hen.
52005024	Nou hon sampa amuanhuai a, hih leng ahih ding hi.
52005025	Unaute aw, hon thumsak un.
52005026	Unaute tengteng tawp siangthou in chibai hon na buksak un.
52005027	Hiai laithon unau tengteng kiang ah sim ngeingei ding in Toupa min in ka hon ngen hi.
52005028	I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kiang uah om hen, Amen.
53001001	Paul, Silvanas leh Timothi in, Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist a Thessalonika a om saptuamte kiang ah;
53001002	Pa Pathian leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
53001003	Unaute aw, na ginna uh nakpitak a khanglian in, na vek ua na ki-ittuah chiatna uh akhan semsem ziak in noumau tungthu ah Pathian kiang a kipahthu gengen ding him ka hi uh; huai ka hihtuak him uh ahi.
53001004	Huaiziak in mi'n ahon sawina tengteng uleh gim na thuaknate ua na kuhkaldan uleh na ginna ziak un Pathian saptuam pawlte lak ah koute mahmah in ka hon suang uhi.
53001005	Huai lah Pathian' vaihawmna adiktat chih chiamtehna ahi a, tu a Pathian kumpigam mi a seh tak na hi uh chih kilatna semsem ahi; huaiziak a leng thuak na hi ngal ua.
53001006	Pathian in nou hon hihgimte gimthuakna a thuk diktathuai in asepta hi.
53001007	Toupa Jesu van a kipan a-angel hatte toh meikuang a hong kilak chiang a, nou hihgim a omte koute toh khawlna ahon pe ding hi.
53001008	Pathian theiloumi leh i Toupa Jesu tanchinhoih taksangloute tung ah phu ala ding hi.
53001009	Amau tangtawn manthatna a gawtna leh Toupa omna leh athilhihtheihna thupina a kipan posiahna athuak ding ua,
53001010	amah ahong pai chiang in misiangthoute hih thupi in a-om ding ua, gingtute tengteng lak ah lamdangsak in a-om ding uhi, ka hon thu theihsak uh na gintak ziak un nou leng amaute lak ah na tel sam ding uhi.
53001011	Huchi a hih thupi leh lamdangsak ahihtheihna ding a i Pathian in nou ahon sapna a sap tuak him ahon saktheihna ding in leh lungtaina chiteng leh ginna nasep chiteng a thilhihtheihna a ahon lohchinsak theihna ding in noute a ding in ka hon thumsak gige uhi;
53001012	huchi a i Pathian leh Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna bang zel a i Toupa Jesu min noumau a hih thupi a om a, noumau leng amah a hih thupi a na omtheihna ding un.
53002001	Himahleh unaute aw, i Toupa Jesu Khrist hong paina leh amah tuak ding a i kikhopna ding thu ah;
53002002	Toupa ni atung khinta chihna kha in hiam aw, thu ziak in hiam aw, kou a kipan a laikhak ziak in hiam aw, na lungsim uh alin pahlouhna ding in leh na buailouhna ding un ka hon ngen uhi.
53002003	Kuamah in bangmah in hon khem kei uhen; puksanna tak ahong tun masak phot a, khelhna mipa, mangthang tapa ngei ahong kilat keileh huai ni tung lou ding ahi.
53002004	Ama'n Pathian kichi peuhmahte leh biak a om peuhmahte kalh in, amah leh amah kitawisang in Pathian tempul ah atu dia, Pathian in amah leh amah akibawl ding hi.
53002005	Na lak ua ka om lai in leng huai bang thu ka hon hilh zel chih na theigige kei ua hia?
53002006	Amah hun tuam a ahong kilattheihna ding in bang in kham ahia chih na thei uhi.
53002007	Dan lou a omna thuguk in tu in leng asem lellel ngal a, himahleh lakmang a a-om masiah tua akhampa'n huchibang in akham ding hi.
53002008	Huai lakmang ahih chiang in dan a talekpa ahong kilangta ding a, Toupa Jesu'n akam hatna in athat dia, ahong paina leh kilakna in ahihmang ding hi.
53002009	Huai dan a talekpa ahong paina Setan sepdan bang zel in, thilhihtheihna chiteng, chiamtehna chiteng, zuau thillamdang chiteng toh,
53002010	mangthang lelte ding in khemna gilou chiteng toh ahi ding; hotdam a a-omtheihna ding ua thutak itna apom louh ziak un.
53002011	Huaiziak in zuauthu agintakna ding un, Pathian in diklouhna nasep akiang uah ahon sawl ding hi;
53002012	thutak gingta lou a diktatlouhna a kipakzawte'n siam louh atan vek theihna ding un.
53002013	Unau Toupa ngaihtakte aw, Kha hihsiangthou leh thutak gingta a hotdam a om ding in atung a kipan Pathian in nou ahon tel ziak in na tungthu uah zaw Pathian kiang ah kipahthu gen zel ding him ka hi uhi.
53002014	Huchibang ding in ama'n i Toupa Jesu Khrist thupina tang ding in ka tanchinhoih un nou ahon sam hi.
53002015	Huchi in unaute aw, dingkip unla, kam a ka thugen uleh laikhakte a nou ka hon sinsakte uh lenkip un.
53002016	Huchi in i Toupa Jesu Khrist mahmah leh Pathian i Pa, eite hon itpa leh hehpihna ziak a tangtawn a khamuanna leh lametna hoih hon pepa'n,
53002017	na lungtangte uh hihkhamuang in, thil hoih hih leh thugen chiteng ah hon hihkip hen.
53003001	Atawp pen in unaute aw, Toupa thu noumau lak a a-om bang in, khang a hih thupi a a-omtheihna ding leh,
53003002	migenhakte leh migiloute lak a ka bit theihna ding un, hon thumsak un; mi tengteng in lah ginna anei vek kei uhi.
53003003	Himahleh Toupa amuanhuai a, ama'n noute hon phutkip in giloupa a pan ahon veng ding hi.
53003004	K'on thupiak peuhmah uh na hihzou ua, na hih zelzel uh leng Toupa ah ka hon gingta uhi.
53003005	Toupa'n na lungtangte uh Pathian itna ah leh Khrist kuhkalna ah pilut hen.
53003006	Huan unaute aw, koute a kipan a thuhilhna amuh bang ua om lou nasep thadah, dan lou bang a om unau tengteng a pan kihemkhe ding in i Toupa Jesu Khrist min in thu ka hon pia uhi.
53003007	Na kiang ua ka om lai un, dan lou bang in ka gamta ngei kei uh chih leh noumau mahmah in na hon zuihdan ding uh na thei uhi.
53003008	Kuamah khut a kipan athawn in na tanghou uh leng ka ne ngei kei uh; noute ka hon tuailuai saklouhna ding un sun leh zan a gim leh tawltak a sem kawm in ka ne zaw zel uhi.
53003009	Huai thuneihna ka neih louh ziak uh hilou in, ka omdan uh na zuih ding ua etton ding hon pia ka hi zaw hi.
53003010	Na kiang ua ka om lai un; kuapeuh in nna asepnop keileh nek leng ne kei hen, chi in thu ka hon pia uhi.
53003011	Na lak ua khenkhat dan lou a omte tungtang ka za uhi, huaite'n nna himhim asem kei ua, midangte nasep ah akichinglah zaw uhi.
53003012	Huchi ahih chiang in, huai mite nasem hiathiat ding leh amau tanghou ne ding in Toupa Jesu Khrist ah thu pia in ka hanthawn uhi.
53003013	Unaute aw, nou zaw thil hoih hih chimtak kei un.
53003014	Huan kuapeuh in hiai ka laikhak ua ka thu uh azuih kei uleh, na kithuahpih hetlouhna ding un chiamteh un, azumtheihna ding in.
53003015	Ahi, melma bang in en kei unla, unau bang in hilh zaw un.
53003016	Tu in muanna Toupa'n kong chiteng ah noute hon khamuan tawntung hen. Toupa na vek ua lak ah om hen.
53003017	Kei, Paul in, keimah khut a hiai chibai bukna ka gelh ahi; hiai ka laikhak teng ah chiamtehna ahi; hichibang ka gelhdan ahi.
53003018	I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na vek ua tung ah om hen. Amen.
54001001	Paul, Pathian thupiak bang a i hondampa leh i lamet Toupa Jesu Khrist sawltak in;
54001002	ginna a ka ta taktak Timothi kiang ah, i Pa Pathian, leh i Toupa Khrist Jesu a kipan hehpihna, zahngaihna, leh khamuanna na tung ah om hen.
54001003	Masidonia gam a ka hoh dek lai a ka hon nget bang in Ephesa ah om gige in, huchi a mi khenkhat gindan tuam sinsak lou ding a na hilhtheihna ding in.
54001004	Huan Pathian lam a phattuamna, ginna a om pen hilou, kiselna leh gintak thu gen omsak lel tangthu leh khangthu sui zoh louh peuh buaipih lou ding a na hilhtheihna ding in.
54001005	Eite'n thuhilh ding i kep pen bel lungtang siangthou leh sia-le-pha theihna siang leh ginna taktak a kipan a pawt itna ahi zaw hi.
54001006	Mi khenkhatte'n hiaite pialsan in thugina lou genna lam ah avakmang uhi.
54001007	Athugen uh leh thil ahi a agente uh leng bang ahia chih theiloupi in dan sinsak mite hih a-ut uhi.
54001008	Mi'n azat hoihleh dan ahoih chih i thei uhi.
54001009	Ahi a, dan zaw midiktatte a ding a bawl ahi kei a, dan kalhte leh dan lou a omte a ding, Pathian limsakloute leh mikhialte, misiangthouloute leh Pathian zahloute, pate thatte, nute thatte, mihing thatte;
54001010	kingaihhatte, tawkohukte, mihing gute, zuautheite, kichiam khemkhemte a ding leh thil dang thugin toh kituak lou himhimte a ding leh,
54001011	ka kiang a kepsak a om Pathian tanchinhoih thupi hilhna dik kalhte a ding ahi.
54001012	Ahon hihhatpa Khrist Jesu i Toupa kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi, muanhuai ahon sak a, anasempa dia ahon chih tak ziak in.
54001013	Tuma lam in Pathian gensepa leh sawipa leh hihsepa na hita mah leng; gingtaloupi leh theiloupi a hih ka hih ziak in ahi zahngaihna ka na muh tak.
54001014	Huan i Toupa hehpihna ginna leh Khrist Jesu a itna in nakpitak in adimletta hi.
54001015	Khrist Jesu khialte hondam ding in khovel ah ahong pai chih ataksanhuai in alak tuak mahmah hi. Alak ua khialpen ka hi.
54001016	Himahleh hiai ziak in ahi zahngaihna ka na muh; Jesu Khrist in adohzohna kim a khialpen keimah a alatsak theihna ding ahi, tuban siah tangtawn hinna muhna ding a amah hon gingta dingte a dia etsakna hi ding in.
54001017	Kumpipa tangtawn a om, sithei lou, muh theih louh, Pathian tak kia, tangtawn in zahtak leh thupi in om hen, Amen.
54001018	Ka tapa Timothi aw, na tungtang genkholhnate toh kituak in hiai mohpuakna leh thuhilhna ka hon pia hi, huchi a huai thute hilh a, kidouna hoih na dou theihna ding in,
54001019	ginna leh sia-le-pha theihna siangtak len tinten in, mi khenkhatte'n huai sia-le-pha theihna paikhia in ginna lam ah long sia bang in akekseta uhi.
54001020	Huaite lak ah Himenaias leh Alexander apang uhi; Pathian agensiatlouhna ding un amaute Setan ka peta hi.
54002001	Huchi in amasapen in thilnget thumnate, thumna himhimte, thumsaknate, leh kipahthu gennate, mi tengteng a ding a bawlsak ding in ka hon hanthawn hi.
54002002	Kumpipate leh thuneite tengteng a ding in leng; Pathian limsak leh zahtakhuaitak a kituak a khamuang a i omtheihna ding in.
54002003	Huai tuh i Hondampa Pathian theih in ahoih in, akipahhuai hi.
54002004	Ama'n mi tengteng hotdam a om ding leh thutak thei ding in adeih hi.
54002005	“Pathian khat kia a om, Pathian leh mihing kikal ah palai khat kia a-om nawn,
54002006	Amah mihing ahi, Khrist Jesu, mi tengteng tatna dia kipepa pen.” Huai theihpihna ahuntak a piak ahi.
54002007	Hiai hih ding a tangkoupihpa ding leh sawltak a seh ka hi, Khrist ah thutak tak ka gen, ka zuau kei; ginna leh thutak a Zentelte sinsakpa a seh ka hi.
54002008	Pasalte'n mun chih a khut siangthou zak in, thangpai lou leh ginglel lou in thum le uh ka deih hi.
54002009	Huchibang mah in numeite zumthei leh omdan siam in puansilh kilawm lel in kivan le uh; samphek, dangka-eng, tuikepsuang leh puan mantam taktakte a kivan lou in;
54002010	himahleh numei Pathian limsak kichite akihun lel in thil hihhoih in kivan le uh ka deih hi.
54002011	Numei in thumang hiathiat in om dinden in zil hen.
54002012	Himahleh numei in thu ahilh zaw ka phal kei, pasal tung a thuneih leng ka phal sam kei, dai dinden in om zaw hen.
54002013	Adam siam masak ahi a, huai nung in Evi siam ahi.
54002014	Adam khem in a-om kei a, numei khem in a-om a, tatlekna ah apukta hi.
54002015	Numei in omdan siamna toh ginna leh itna leh sianthouna a a-om gigeleh nau pianna ah hotdam in a-om ding hi.
54003001	Kuapeuh saptuam heutu a pan ut in nasep hoih a-ut ahi, chih adik ahi.
54003002	Huchi in saptuam heutu zaw gensiatbei, zi khat nei, kidek thei, navaktak, midiktat, mipahtakdan siam, thuhilh siam,
54003003	uain khamhat lou, mivuak hat lou, minunnem ahi ding hi, selhat lou, sum deihta lou,
54003004	zahtakhuaitak a tate kemsiam, amah insung kizentak a vaihawm siammi ahi ding hi.
54003005	Mi'n ama insung vaihawm nangawn kizentak a ahihsiam keileh bangchi in ahia Pathian saptuam akep theih ding?
54003006	Gingthakmi ahi ding ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw akisathei kha dia, diabol siam louh tansakna ah apuk kha ding hi.
54003007	Huaite lou leng polam a mite phat in a-om nalai ding ahi, huchi lou in zaw gensiat a a-om in diabol thang ah a-awk kha ding hi.
54003008	Huchibang in Saptuam Upate leng mizahtakhuai ahih ding uh ahi; kamtamte, uain haite, lepna nin a huaiham mite ahi ding ahi kei;
54003009	sia-le-pha theihna siang a ginna a thuguk kemmi ahi zaw ding uhi.
54003010	Huan huaite leng chet in om masa uhen, huai nung in gensiatbei ahong hih uleh Saptuam Upa nna sem uhen.
54003011	Huchibang in azite uh leng mizahtakhuai ahi ding uhi, gensiat hat lou, kidek thei leh bangkim a muanhuai ahi ding uhi.
54003012	Saptuam Upate zi khat nei atate uleh amau insung vaihawm navaktak a hihmi hi uhen.
54003013	Saptuam Upa nna hoihtak a semte'n amau a ding in phat tak hihna aloh ua, huan Khrist Jesu a om ginna a muanna leh hangsanna thupitak amu uhi.
54003014	Sawt lou nung a na kiang a hong hoh lamen in hiai thu na kiang ah ka gelh ahi;
54003015	himahleh ka hong zekai khakleh Pathian inkuanpihte lak a mi bangchibang in ahia a-om ding uh chih na theihna ding in ka gelh ahi; Pathian inkuanpihte Pathian hing saptuamte, thutak khuam leh kingakna ahi uhi.
54003016	Pathian limsakna thuguk nial vual louh in athupi hi: “Taksa a muh theih a latsak in Pathian a-om a, Kha a siamtansak, Angelte muh, namte lak a tangkoupih, khovel a mite gintak, thupina apitouh ahi.”
54004001	Himahleh tunung chiang in mi khenkhatte'n; pimangna khate leh dawite thuhilhna limsak in, ginna atawpsan ding uh chih Kha in kichiantak in agen hi; huai tuh,
54004002	mizuautheite lepchiahna ziak in ahi; huai mizuautheite amau sia-le-pha theihna ngei a sik am a halkeu bang ahi uhi.
54004003	Kiten akham ua, nek ding ante, thutak thei a gingtate'n kipahthu gen a san ding a Pathian in asiamte, nek louh ding achi uhi.
54004004	Pathian thilsiam chiteng ahoih ngal a, kipahthu gen a san ahih khit nak photleh bangmah deih louh ding ahi kei hi;
54004005	Pathian thu leh thumna a hihsiangthou ahi khinta hi.
54004006	Huaite unaute na sinsakleh Khrist Jesu nasempa hoihtak, ginna leh thuhilhna hoih tutan a na zuih thu a vaklian na hi ding hi.
54004007	Himahleh Pathian zahlouhna leh tangthu bulbal neiloute deih ke'n. Pathian limsak ding in kithuzoh in;
54004008	pumpi kisawizoina aphatuam zek a; Pathian limsakna pen tangtawn in, tua omsa hinna leh hong om nawn ding piak chiamna aneih ziak in thil tengteng ah aphatuam hi.
54004009	Hiai thu amuanhuai in alak tuak mahmah hi.
54004010	Huchi in Pathian hing i muan ziak in i semgim ua, i pang teitei uhi; amah mi tengteng Hondampa ahi a, agingtate Hondampa ahi tuanse hi.
54004011	Hiaite thupiak in pia inla, sinsak in.
54004012	Na naupanna kuamah musitsak ke'n; thugen ah, tatdan ah, itna ah, kha ah, ginna leh sianthouna ah, gingtute zuih ding hi zaw in.
54004013	Ka hong pai masiah laisim, hanthawn leh thugin limsak in.
54004014	Nangmah a om thilpiak thugenkholhna a piak, upate khut ngak a Pathian in nang ahon neihsak limsak lou ke'n.
54004015	Mi tengteng kiang a na phattuamna alattheihna ding in huai thilte ah thanuam inla, kizang zou in.
54004016	Nangmah leh na thuhilh ah pilvang in; huai thilte hih in om gige in; huchibang hih in nangmah leh na thuzate na hondam ding hi.
54005001	Upa deuhte tai ke'nla, pa bang in thuhilh in; tangval deuhte unaupa bang in;
54005002	numei upa deuhte nu bang in; nungak deuhte siangthoutak in sanggamnu bang in thuhilh in.
54005003	Meithai, meithai taktakte zahtak in.
54005004	Himahleh meithai kuapeuh in tate leh tute aneih uleh huaite'n amau insung ah Pathian limsakna mohpuakna thei masa uhenla, amau nu leh pate uh kem uhen; hiai lah Pathian mitmuh in ahoih in apom tak ngal a.
54005005	Meithai taktak amah kia nutsiat a om in Pathian tung ah lametna anei a, sun leh zan a ngen in athum gige hi.
54005006	Himahleh meithai ama nopsakna sung a kipia zaw, adam lai nangawn in asi ahi.
54005007	Gensiatbei a a-omtheihna ding un huaite thupiak in pia in.
54005008	Himahleh kuapeuh in ama mite a ding angaihtuahsak louh a, ama inkuante khol houh angaihtuahsak keileh ginna azuausan a, gingloumi sang in agilouzaw hi.
54005009	Meithai kum sawmguk chiang nuailam hilou, mi khat zi hisa,
54005010	thil hoih hih lam a mi phatlohta, atate vaktei khin a, mikhualte na zintun khin a, misiangthoute khe na silta a, mangbangte na dawnzang khin a, thil hoih peuhmah thanuamtak a na hih khin ahihleh meithai a gelh theih ahi.
54005011	Himahleh meithai naupang simte zaw gelh ke'n; ataksa lunggulhna un Khrist lam a akipiakna uh athuzoh chiang in pasal neih a-ut nak ua,
54005012	aginna masa uh atawpsan ziak un siam louh tang in a-om nak uhi.
54005013	Huai lou leng thadah in inn teng ah aban pawt nak ua, thadah kia leng hilou in, thu gen louh ding gen in, kamtam leh mite thilhih lai avai hawmsak nak uhi.
54005014	Huchi in meithai naupang simte zaw pasal nei in, tate nei uhenla, insung khosak ngaihtuah le uh, melmapa gensiatna ding lemtang musak kei le uh ka deih hi.
54005015	Meithai khenkhat Setan lam naih in apialkheta uhi.
54005016	Gingtami numei hiam pasal hiam in methaite nei taleh dawnzang hen; saptuamte hihbuai in om kei hen; meithai taktakte adawnzang theihna ding un.
54005017	Saptuam Upa vaihawm hoihte, abik in thugen leh sinsakna a semgimte aleh nih a hih thupi tuak a seh nawn sem hi uhen.
54005018	Laisiangthou in, “Bawngtal in buh achil lai in amuk gak ke'n,” achi hi. “Nasemmi loh mu tak ahi,” achi nawn hi.
54005019	Saptuam Upa hekna zaw theihpih nih hiam thum hiam kam a lou zaw sang ke'n.
54005020	Mikhialte mi tengteng ma ah taihilh in, midangte'n leng alautheihna ding un.
54005021	Deihsak tuam leh khentuam nei a bangmah hih lou a hiai thute zui ding in Pathian leh Khrist Jesu leh angel teltuamte mitmuh in phatuamngaitak in ka hon theisak hi.
54005022	Kuamah tung ah khut nga pah ke'nla, midang khelhna ah leng kikum pah ke'n; kihihsiangthou gige in.
54005023	Tui kia dawn ke'nla, na gilpi ziak in leh na hat louh nak ziak in uain neu khakha zang zel in.
54005024	Mi khenkhatte khelhna alang gige a, vaihawmna atun nak hi; mi khenkhat khelhnate bel akhonung in ahong kilang hi.
54005025	Huchi mah bang in mi khenkhatte thil hoih hih kilang pah a-om a, akilangloute leng sel theih ahi kei hi.
54006001	Pathian min leh athuhilhna thu gensiat a a-omlouhna ding in sikha hakkol bat peuhmahte'n amau pute bangkim ah zahtak tham in sim uhen.
54006002	Huan gingtami pu a neite'n unau ahih ziak un ngaineu kei uhen, himahleh phattuamna mute leh deihtakte ahih ziak un a-nna uh sepsak semsem uhen. Huai thute hilh inla, hanthawn in.
54006003	Mi kuapeuh in thuhilhna dang ahilh a, thutak, i Toupa Jesu Khrist thu leh Pathian limsak lam thuhilhna hoih asak keileh,
54006004	amah kisathei ahi a, bangmah thei lou ahi, theih nak sang in kisel leh thukalh lam ah ahai zawta a, huchibang a kipan in, enna, kilaina, gensiatna,
54006005	hoih lou lam a ginna, selhatna asuak nak hi; huchibang mi lungsim sia neite'n thutak nei lou in, Pathian limsak pen punna khattou asa uhi.

54006007	Khovel ah bangmah i lutpih kei a, bangmah i pawtpih thei sam kei ding hi.

54006010	Dangka sum deihtak zaw gilou chiteng bul ahi; khenkhatte'n a-eng ua, ginna apaimangsan ua, amau leh amau lungkhamna tampi in akisunlet tektok uhi.

54006012	Ginna kidouna hoih dou inla, tangtawn hinna len tinten in; huai tang ding a sap na hi a; theihpih tamtakte mitmuh in gupna hoih na gumta hi.

54006014	Toupa Jesu Khrist hong kilat nawn masiah huai thupiak siangthou leh gensiatbei a kem ding in.
54006015	Huai kilakna ama huntak ah phat tuak thuneipa tak kia, kumpipate' Kumpipa, toupate' Toupa'n alak ding ahi.
54006016	Amah kia in sih theihlouhna anei a, vak naih theih vual louh ah a-om a, amah kuamah in amu ngei kei ua, muh leng amu thei sam kei uhi; amah kiang ah tangtawn in thupina leh thilhihtheihna om hen, Amen.
54006017	Hiai khovel a mihausate kisathei lou ding leh hauhna kip lou a muanna nga lou a, thil tengteng kipahna ding a tampi a hon pepa Pathian a nga zaw ding in hilh in.

55001001	Paul, Pathian deihdan a Khrist Jesu a om hinna thuchiam dungzui a, Khrist Jesu sawltak in,

55001004	kipak a ka dimtheihna ding in hon muh ka ut mahmah hi, na khitui theigige in.

55001011	Huai tanchinhoih theisak ding a tangkoupihpa, sawltak leh sinsaktu a seh ka hi.

56003014	I mite'n leng ataksap khawktakte uh asuktuah theihna ding un leh gah lou a a-omlouhna ding un thil hoih hih a kuhkal ding in zil uhen.
56003015	Ka kiang a om tengteng in chibai ahon buk uhi. Ginna a kei hon itte chibai hon buksak in. Na vek ua kiang ah hehpihna om hen, Amen.
57001001	Paul, Khrist Jesu hentapa leh i unaupa Timothi in, ka deihtak leh ka sepgimpih uh Philemon kiang leh,
57001002	ka sanggamnu uh Apphia kiang ah, ka sepaihpih uh Arkippas kiang leh na inn a saptuam kikhawmte kiang ah leng:
57001003	Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.
57001004	Ka thumnate ah na min lou gige in, ka Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi.
57001005	Toupa Jesu lam leh misiangthou tengteng lam a itna leh ginna na neih za in.
57001006	Na ginna kikoppihna, noumau a om thil hoih chiteng theihkimna lam ah Khrist lam a ahong phattuam theihna ding in.
57001007	Unaupa aw, nangmah ziak a misiangthoute lungtang ahong halh tak ziak in na itna ah ka kipak in ka kha amuang mahmah hi.
57001008	Huaiziak in akilawm hun hih ding in nang thu hon piak Khrist ah kingap mah leng,
57001009	itna ziak in, Paul putek hial hita leh, tu a Khrist Jesu hentapa hita in, anget in ka hon ngen zaw hi.
57001010	Ka ta Onesimas, kolbun kawm a ka neihkhiak, amah a ding in na kiang ah ka ngetsak hi.
57001011	Tuma lam in nang a ding in aphatuam kei a, tu'n zaw kei leh nang a ding in aphatuamta hi.
57001012	Amah, ka lungtang mahmah na kiang ah ka hon sawlkik nawn hi.
57001013	Amah tanchinhoih a ka kolbutna a nangmah sik a nna ahon sepsak theihna ding in ka kiang a omsak nilouh ka ut mahmah hi.
57001014	Himahleh na hehpihna hehpihsak teitei bang hilou in, na thu bang ahihtheih zawkna ding in, na thu lou in bangmah hih ka ut kei hi.
57001015	Sawt lou kal nang ahon khen tangtawn a amah na neih tawntungna ding ziak ahi kha mai ding hi,
57001016	himahleh sikha bang hi nawn lou a, sikha sang a hoih unau deihtak bang zaw in; kei a ding in deihtak ahi diak a, nang a ding ngial in sa leh Toupa ah nak hihna in chia!
57001017	Huchi in lawm a na hon simleh keimah bang in amah na kipahpih in.
57001018	Huan na tung a banghiam ahihkhelh a, na thil banghiam abatleh keimah bat in bawl in.
57001019	Kei Paul in, keimah khut ngei a ka gelh ahi. Keimah in ka ditsak ding hi; ka kiang a nangma'n leng bat na neih sam dan hon hilh bel ka hi kei hi.
57001020	Ahi, unaupa aw, nangmah ziak in Toupa ah kipahna hon neisak inla, Khrist ah leng ka lungtang hihhalh in.
57001021	Ka gen sang a thupizaw tham in na hih ding chih ka theih ziak in, na hon thuman ding chih muang in na kiang ah ka gelh ahi.
57001022	Akoi abang hitaleh, huai kia hih lou in, tunna ding hon na suktuahsak in; na thumnate uh ziak in na kiang ua piak ka hi ding chih ka kigingta hi.
57001023	Epaphras, Khrist Jesu a ka hentakpihpa'n chibai ahon buk hi;
57001024	huchi mah bang in ka seppih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas leh Lukate'n leng chibai ahon buk uhi.
57001025	I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kha uah om hen, Amen.
58001001	Pathian, nidanglai api-le-pute kiang a seh tampi leh lam chiteng a zawlneite zang a thu na genpa'n,
58001002	tu hun nanung ah eite kiang ah a Tapa in thu ahon genta hi. Huai mi bangkim gouluahpa ding in asiam a, huai mi mah in khovel asiam hi.
58001003	Amah ah athupina vak leh atak batpih leh ama thilhihtheihna a bangkim tungdingpa hi in, i khelhnate sianna abawl khit nung in tunglam a thupina khut taklam ah ava tuta hi.
58001004	Angelte sang a min ngaihzaw amuh bang in amaute sang a tungnungzaw tham ana hi him hi.
58001005	Angelte lak ah kua kiang ah hiai thute agen ngei a? “Nang zaw ka Tapa na hi a, tuni in ka hon neikhia,” chih leh “Amah a ding in Pa ka hi dia, amah kei a ding in Tapa ahi ding,”
58001006	Huan ata neihsun khovel a apilut lai in, “Pathian angelte tengteng in leng amah chibai buk uhen,” achi hi.
58001007	Huan angelte tungtang thu ah, Ama'n zaw a-angelte huih in asuaksak a, anasemte leng meikuang in asuaksak chi in agen hi.
58001008	Tapa tungthu ah bel, “Pathian aw, na laltutphah tangtawn in a-om ding hi; dikna kumpi chiang leng na gam kumpi chiang ahi, chi in agen hi.
58001009	Diktatna na it a, tatlekna na hua a; huaiziak in Pathian, na Pathian in na lawmte sang in nang kipahna thau ahon nilh hi.”
58001010	Huan nang, “Toupa'n, atung in leilung kingakna na phum khin a, vante leng na khutsuak ahi;
58001011	Huaite ahong mangthang ding ua, nang bel om tawntung ding na hi; huaite tengteng puansilh bang in ahong lui ding ua,
58001012	Puan bang in na zial ding a, puansilh bang lel in ahong lamdangta ding a; nang bel angeingei na hiden a, na kumte leng amang kei ding,” chi in.
58001013	Himahleh angelte akua pen kiang ah ahia hiai agen ngei? “Na melmate na khepek ngakna a ka bawl masiah ka taklam ah tu in, chih.”
58001014	Angelte tengteng nasepna khate, hotdamna gouluah dingte a dia nasem ding a sawlkhiak ahi kei ua hia?
58002001	Huaiziak in bil a i zakte phatuamngaitak in i khawk sa nawn sem ding uh, huchi lou in zaw i tolhmangsan kha zenzen ding uhi.
58002002	Angelte zang a thugen nangawn akip a, tatlekna leh thumanlouhna chiteng in thukna diktathuaitak amuh zel ngal un,
58002003	huchi tel a hotdamna thupi ngeingaih kei leng bangchi in ahia i suahtak theih mahmah ding? Huai hotdamna thu atung a Toupa zang a gen khit ahi a, azate'n hon na hihkipsak uhi.
58002004	Pathian in leng chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte leh thilhihtheihna chiteng toh, ama deih bang zel in Kha Siangthou thilhawmte toh, amaute atheihpih hi.
58002005	Khovel hong om ding a tanchin i gen uh, angelte nuai ah akoih kei hi.
58002006	Himahleh mi kuahiam in koi lai hiam ah hiai thu gen in atheisak hi, “Mihing bang atel a, na theihgige? Mihing tapa leng bang ahia, na veh nak?”
58002007	“Amah angelte sang a nuaizaw zek in na bawl a; thupina leh pahtawina na khusak a, na khutsuak tung ah heutu in na bawl hi,
58002008	akhenuai ah bangkim na koih a,” chi in. Huchi in bangkim anuai a akoih ziak in anuai a koih louh bangmah anei kei hi. Himahleh tu'n ah zaw bangkim anuai a om in i mu nai tadih kei uhi.
58002009	Himahleh Jesu, angelte sang a niamzaw deuh a abawl takdih tuh, sihna thuak in thupina leh pahtawina khuksak a om in i mu zaw, huchi a Pathian hehpihna ziak a michih a ding a sihna acheptheihna ding in.
58002010	Amah a ding leh amah ziak a bangkim omsakpa'n tapa tampi thupina a pilut a, athuakna ziak a amaute hotdamna makaipa bukim hih amah a dia kilawm him ahi.
58002011	Hihsiangthoupa leh hihsiangthoute avek un mi khat a pawt ahi uh. Huaiziak in ama'n amaute unaute, chih azum kei hi.
58002012	“Ka unaute kiang ah na min ka gen dia; omkhawmte lak ah la sa in ka hon phat ding,” chi in.
58002013	Huan “Amah ah ka muanna ka nga dia, achi nawn hi. Huan en dih ua, kei leh Pathian hon piak tate,” achi nawn lai hi.
58002014	Huchi in naupangte sa leh sisan tangte ahih chiat ziak un, amah ngei in huai bangmah atang sam hi; asihna a sihna thuneipa, diabol, ahihmanthat theihna ding leh,
58002015	sih kihtak ziak a damsung sikha a omte tengteng asuahtaksak theihna ding un.
58002016	Ahitak in, ama'n apanpih zelte zaw angelte ahi kei ua, Abraham suante apanpih zaw ahi.
58002017	Huchi in mite a ding a khelhna thupha tawina bawlsak ding in, Pathian lam a siampu lianpen, milainat thei leh muanhuaitak ahihtheihna ding in, bangkim a-unaute bang a hong om amah a ding in akiphamoh him ahi.
58002018	Amah ngei in khemna tuak a, ana thuak tak ziak in khemna tuakte apanpih thei ahi.
58003001	Huchi in unau siangthou, van sapna tanpihte aw, i thugin toh kisai a Sawltak leh Siampu Lian, Jesu ngaihtuah un;
58003002	Pathian inkuante tengteng lak a Mosi amuanhuai mah bang a, amah seppa lak a muanhuaipa.
58003003	Inn sung a papen a-inkuante sang a apahtawi zawk bang un, amah Mosi sang a thupi zawk semna mu dia kilawm a seh ahita hi.
58003004	Inkuan chih in papen kuahiam anei chiat ngal ua; bangkim pa pen bel Pathian ahi.
58003005	Huan huai nung a thugen lai dingte theihsakna ding in, Mosi Pathian inkuante tengteng lak a nasempa in zaw amuanhuai ngei hi.
58003006	Khrist bel Pathian inkuante tung a Tapa in amuanhuai hi. Atawp tan a i kingakna a, i lametna ziak a kipahna, kiptak a i vomhoih photleh, eite a-inkuanpihte i hi uhi.
58003007	Huchi in Kha Siangthou gen bang in, “Tuni a a-aw na zak chiang un,
58003008	Gamdai a ze-etna ni a ahel bang un, na lungtang uh khauhsak kei un;
58003009	huai lai ah na pi-le-pute un hon ze-et in ahon khem ua, kum sawmli sung a ka thilhihte amu uhi.
58003010	Huchi in huai suante tung ah ka lung hita kei a, ‘Alungtang un angaihtuah khial gige ua, ka lampite leng athei kei uh,’ ka chi hi.
58003011	Ka thangpaihna a ka kichiam bang in ka khawlna ah alut kei ding uh,” chi in.
58003012	Unaute aw pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw Pathian hing tawpsan ding in na lak uah kuapeuh sung ah ginlouhna lungtang gilou ahong om kha ding hi.
58003013	“Tuni,” achih lai un niteng in kihanthawntuah zaw un, huchi a na lak ua mi kuamah khelhna khemhat ziak a hihkhauh a na omlouhna ding un.
58003014	I kingakna kipatna pen atawp tan a kiptak a i vomhoih photleh Khrist a tan neite i hita uhi.
58003015	“Tuni in a-aw na zak chiang un ahel lai bang un, na lungtang uh khauhsak kei un,” akichih lai teng.
58003016	Ahihleh kuate ahi ua thei napi a helte? Aigupta a kipan a Mosi pipawt tengteng hilou uhia?
58003017	Kuate tung ah ahia, kum sawmli sung alunghih louh? Hihkhialte aluang uh gamdai a pukmangte tung ah hilou hia?
58003018	Thumangloute kiang ah kia lou ngal kua kiang ah ahia akhawlna a lut lou ding a akichiam?
58003019	Huchi in ginlahna ziak in alut theita kei uh chih i thei uhi.
58004001	Huaiziak in i lau ding uh, huchi lou in zaw akhawlna a lutna thuchiam om lai napi, na lak ua kuapeuh ching lou in na om kha zenzen ding uh.
58004002	Amau kiang a gen ahih bang in tanchinhoih i kiang ua gen ahi ngal a; himahleh athuzak uh amaute'n aphattuampih kei uh, azate toh ginna a akizom louh ziak un.
58004003	Ei gingta khinte huai khawlna ah i lut lellel uhi, “Ka thangpaihna a ka kichiam bang in ka khawlna ah alut kei hial ding uh,” achih bang in; leilung pian tung a kipan ama nnate sep zoh hita mahleh.
58004004	Koi lai mun hiam ah ni sagih ni thu hichibang in agen hi: “Huan ani sagih ni in Pathian in anasep tengteng akhawlsanta,” chi in.
58004005	Huan hiai mun ah, “Ka khawlna ah alut kei ding uh,” achi nawn hi.
58004006	Huchi in ni dang a tanchinhoih za masate thuman louh ziak in lut kei mah le uh, khenkhatte huai khawlna a alutna ding ua thuchiam a-om lai ziak a lut lai ding a-om uhi.
58004007	Hun sawttak nung in David ah ama a kigensa bang in bang ni hiam aseptuan nawn hi. “Tuni a aw na zak chiang un na lungtang uh khauhsak kei un,” chi in.
58004008	Joshua in amaute na khawlsakta hileh zaw, huai nung in ni tuam dang thu gen angai kei ding hi.
58004009	Huchi in Pathian mite a ding in Sabbath khawlna a-om lai hi.
58004010	Pathian in ama nasepte akhawlsan bang in, akhawlna a lut khinsa mi'n leng anasepte akhawlsan samta hi.
58004011	Huchi in kuamah huai thumanlouhna bang a om a i puklouhna ding un huai khawlna a lut ding in phatuam i ngai ding uhi.
58004012	Pathian thu ahing a, thil ahihthei a, namsau hiamtuah bangchibang sang in ahiam a, hinna leh kha, guhlawi leh guhngek tuamkhen hel khop in asun thei a, lungtang a ngaihtuah leh tupte athei pah thei hi.
58004013	Huaiziak in thilsiam peuhmah ama mitmuh a lang lou himhim a-om kei; i tanchin tutna dingpa mitmuh ah bangkim vuaktang leh kihongsa ahi.
58004014	Hichi in van munte a paisuak khinsa siampu lianpen thupitak, Jesu Pathian Tapa, i neih ziak in i thugin i pomkip ding uhi.
58004015	Siampu Lianpen i hat louh kitheihnate hon theihpih pha lou nei i hi kei ua; eimah bang a lam tuamtuam a khemna tuaksa, khelh bel khial lou, nei i hi zaw uhi.
58004016	Huchi in zahngaihna i muhtheihna ding leh huh i poimoh chiang a huhna hehpihna i ngah theihna ding in, hehpihna laltutphah hangtak in i naih ding uhi.
58005001	Siampu Lianpen peuhmah mihingte sik-le-tang akhelhnate ziak a thilpiak leh kithoihnate Pathian kiang a lankhawm ding a mihing lak a kipan telkhiak leh mihingte a dia Pathian seh ahi uhi.
58005002	Huaite'n amau ngei leng hatlouhna a tuam a om sam ahih ziak un, bangmah theiloute leh lamhaihte tung ah zahngaihna anei thei uhi.
58005003	Huaiziaktak in mite a ding a alatsak bang un, amau a ding ngei leng khelhnate ziak in lan lou thei lou ahi uhi.
58005004	Huan huai pahtawina Aaron bang a Pathian sap ahih ngal kei uleh kuamah amau akipe ngei kei uhi.
58005005	Huchibang in Khrist leng siampu lianpen a bawl ding in amah akihih thupi kei a, “Nang zaw ka Tapa na hi a, tuni in ka hon neikhia hi,” chi a akiang a genpa'n ahih thupizawta hi.
58005006	Mun dang a agen bang in; “Nang zaw, Melkizedek omdan bang a tangtawn siampu na hi,” achi hi.
58005007	Ama'n sa aput lai nite in, sihna lak a amah hondam theipa kiang ah nakpitak a kikou leh khitui ke kawm in thumnate leh ngetnate alan a, akihtakdan asiam zel ziak in ngaihkhiak in a-om hi.
58005008	Tapa hilhial himahleh athilthuakte ah thuman azil hi.
58005009	Huchi in hihbukim a hong om in, athumang peuhmahte a ding in tangtawn a hotdamna bulpi ahong hita hi.
58005010	Melkizedek omdan bang a siampu lianpen in Pathian in abawlta hi.
58005011	Huai mi tanchin ahihleh gen ding tampi i nei ua, genchet leng ahaksa; na bil uh angon tak ziak in.
58005012	Ahun thu ngaihtuah in zaw heutu hi khinta hial le uchin kilawm hiven, Pathian thubulte hilh kiphamoh nawn na hi ve ua, an gum hilou nawitui kiphamoh na hong hita uhi;
58005013	nawitui ne peuhmah in diktatna thu ah theihna anei kei ua, naungek ahih ziak un.
58005014	An gum piching a ding ahi, huaite'n azat gige ziak un sia-le-pha theichian ding in atheihtheihnate uh asin zongsangta uhi.
58006001	Huchi in Khrist thubulte gen nawn lou in pichin lam i manoh ding uh; thilhih sisate kisikna, Pathian lam a ginna,
58006002	baptisma leh khutngak leh misi thohnawnna leh tangtawn vaihawmna lam thuhilhnate suangphum phum nawn lou in.
58006003	Pathian in pha asakleh huai bang i hih ngei ding uhi.
58006004	Khatvei hihvak a om khin a, van thilpiak chiamta, Kha Siangthou dong khin a,
58006005	Pathian thuhoihna leh hun hong om ding a thilhihtheihnate chiam khin hinapi,
58006006	ginna akihei mangsan ualeh huchibang mite zaw akisikna ding ua bawl thak theih ahi kei uhi; Pathian Tapa amau a ding a kilhlum tuan nawn a selphou ahih ziak un.
58006007	Lou, atung ua vuahtui ke gige na dawn khin a, huai khohsak a ompa a dia nek theih anteh-louhing hon suah pen in Pathian vualzawlna atang hi.
58006008	Himahleh loulingnei leh khaulingnei asuah nak in bel aphatuam kei a; hamsiat in a-om ding a, atawpna halmang ahi ding hi.
58006009	Himahleh deihtakte aw, huchibang thu gen mah leng nou zaw huai thilte sang a hoihzaw hotdamna toh kizui thilte nei na hih uh ka muang uhi.
58006010	Amin ziak a itna a nna na sep uleh misiangthoute nna na sepsak uh na latsak uh leh tutan a leng nasep lai uh mangngilh ding in Pathian mitak lou ahi kei hi.
58006011	Himahleh atawp tan a lametna theihchetna kim mu ding in na thanop ngeingei bang un thanop suah gige chiat le uchin ka chi uhi.
58006012	Huchi in na kithadahsak kei ding ua, ginna leh kuhkalna ziak a thuchiamte gouluah khin khawngte entonte na hi zaw ding uhi.
58006013	Pathian in Abraham kiang a thu achiam lai in, amah sang a thupizaw lou a akichiam theih louh ziak in, amah-le-amah kilou in akichiam hi.
58006014	Taktak in ka hon vualzawl ngeingei ding a, hih leng ka hon hihpung ding chi in akichiamta hi.
58006015	Huchi in kuhkaltak a athuakkhiak nung in, thilchiam amuta hi.
58006016	Mihingte zaw asang ua thupizawte min lou in akichiam ua; akiselna chiteng uah leng hihkipna ding in kichiam tuh thutawp ahi.
58006017	Huchi in Pathian in athiltup hihlamdan tuan theihlouhdan nakpi mahmah a theihsak ut in thuchiam gouluah dingte kiang ah kichiamna apalaisak hi.
58006018	Pathian thugen zuauthei vual ahihlouhna ah thil kikhek lamdang thei lou nihte ziak in, i ma a lametna koih lenkip ding a bitna ding a amah delhte'n hanthawnna thupitak i neihtheihna ding in ahi.
58006019	Huai lametna hinna sikkip in i nei ua, muanhuai leh kiptak ahi, huai lametna puanzak sung ah leng alutta hi.
58006020	I ma a na paita Jesu, mun siangthoupen ah i makaipa a alut tak man in Melkizedek omdan bang in eite a ding in tangtawn a siampu lianpen ana hita hi.
58007001	Abraham in kumpipate athah zoh a hong kiklam na dawn a vualzawlpa, hiai “Melkizedek, Salem kumpipa, Tungnungpen Siampu,” ahi a,
58007002	Abraham in, “Bangkim ah sawm-a-khat,” apia hi. Amin khiakna genchian in amasapen in, “Diktatna Kumpipa,” azom nawn in, “Salem Kumpipa,” ahi nawn a, huai tuh “Lemna Kumpipa,” chihna ahi.
58007003	Amah pa nei lou, nu nei lou, khangthu nei lou, om pat ni nei lou hin tawp ni leng nei sam lou in, Pathian Tapa bang a siam tangtawn a siampu hi gige ahi zaw hi.
58007004	Huchi in suangtu, Abraham in agallak hoih peuhmah lak a sawm-a-khat apiakna pa, huai mipa thupidan ngaihtuah un.
58007005	Levi suante lak a siampu nna tang peuhmah in dan bang in mite lak ah sawm-a-khat lak ding thu a-unaute uh lak ah amu uhi, huaite Abraham khal a pawt hi sam mah le uh leng.
58007006	Himahleh alak ua asuante suikhawmsak sam louhpa'n Abraham lak ah sawm-a-khat ala a, thuchiamte kempa avualzawlta hi.
58007007	Himahleh sel vual louh in aneuzaw tuh alianzaw vualzawlsak in a-om hi.
58007008	Huan hiai ah mihing si zelte'n sawm-a-khat amu ua, huai ah bel, ahing gige pen chi a athu atheisak in amu zaw hi.
58007009	Levi, sawm-a-khat la zelpa nangawn in Abraham khut ah sawm-a-khat apeta, chih theih ahi;
58007010	Melkizedek in ana dawn lai in apa khal ah a-om lai hi.
58007011	Huchi in Levite'n siampu hihna ziak a bukimna muhtheihna hileh huai nuai ah mite'n dan thu ana mu ngal ua, Aaron omdan bang hilou a Melkizedek omdan bang a siampu dang hong om, bang kiphamoh ding ahia?
58007012	Siampu hihna ahong kilamdan ziak in dan leng hihlamdan sam ahong kiphamoh hi.
58007013	Hiai a thugenpa nam tuam ahi ngal a, huai namte lak a akuamah maitam ah agamtang ngei kei uhi.
58007014	I Toupa, Judah nam lak a hong suak ahi chih akichian hi; huai nam thu ah Mosi in siampute lam thu bangmah agen kei hi.
58007015	Melkizedek bang a tangtawn siampu dang hong suahna in nakpitak in i thugen achiangsak nawn sem hi;
58007016	amah khangthu dan leh dan thupiak ziak a siampu hilou in, hin tawp nei lou leh thilhihtheihna bang zaw in siampu ahong hi.
58007017	“Nang zaw, Melkizedek omdan bang a tangtawn siampu na hi,” chih theihsak ahi.
58007018	Ahat louh leh aphattuamlouhna ziak in thupiak om masa paihkhiak ahi.
58007019	Dan in bangmah ahih bukim louh ziak in Pathian in lametna hoihzaw hon lalut in huai pansan in amah i naih theita uhi.
58007020	Huan kichiamna tel lou a amah siampu a bawl ahi kei hi;
58007021	siampu dangte ahihleh kichiam lou a siampu a bawl ahi ua; Jesu bel, nang zaw tangtawn siampu na hi chi in Toupa akichiam hi, ka khelkik kei ding chi a akiang a genpa khut ah akichiam hi.
58007022	Huchitak a thupi in Jesu thukhun hoihzaw hihkippa ahong hita hi.
58007023	Huan siampu tampi ana om tak ziak bel amaute asi zel ua, kuamah omden thei lou ahih ziak uh ahi.
58007024	Hiai mi bel tangtawn a omden ahih ziak in, asiampu hihna khen theih vual louh aneizaw hi.
58007025	Huchi in amah tawn a Pathian kiang a hong paite atawp dong in ahondam thei hi, amaute thumsak a tangtawn a ahin gige ziak in ahi.
58007026	Huchibang siampu lianpen, misiangthou, poikhoih lou, nin baang lou, khialte lak a om tuam, vante sang a tungnungzaw a siam eite a ahong hita hi.
58007027	Ama'n siampu lianpen dangte lat bang in, niteng in ama khelhna a ding kithoihna lan masa phot in, huai nung a mite khelhna kithoihna alat akiphamoh kei hi; amah akilat laitak in setdet ding in khatvei ana lan khinta hi.
58007028	Dan in mihing hatlouhna neite, siampu lianpen ding in asep a; himahleh tua kichiam thu, dan nung a hong om in, Tapa mahmah tangtawn siampu ding a hihkim khitsa asep zawta hi.
58008001	Huchi in i thugente lak a poimohpen hiai ahi; vanmun a Thupipen laltutphah taklam a va tu siampu lianpen neite i hi uhi.
58008002	Amah mun siangthou leh biakbuk taktak, mihing lam hilou, Toupa lam zaw a nasempa i nei uhi.
58008003	Siampu lian peuhmahte thilpiak leh kithoihnate lan ding a seh ahi ua; huchi in hiai siampu lianpen in banghiam bek lat ding neih akiphamoh hi.
58008004	Amah leitung a om lai hileh zaw, dan bang zel a thilpiakte lan ding om khinta ahih ziak un, siampu hilou ding ahi.
58008005	Amaute'n van lam thilte etsakna leh aliim in nna asem uhi. Mosi biakbuk lam dia akisak lai in Pathian hilh a om in, “Tang tung a etton ding ka hon etsak bang a biakbuk lam ding in pilvang in,” achi hi.
58008006	Tu in bel thuchiam hoihzaw tung a kinga thukhun hoihzaw a dia nasem palai ahih bang in, nasepna hoihzaw ana tangta hi.
58008007	Thukhun masa dembei na hileh, anihna hong om kul lou ding ahi.
58008008	Amaute dem in hiai thute agen hi, “Ngai in, nite ahong tung dek, Toupa'n achi, huai ni chiang in Israel inkuante leh Judah inkuante kiang ah thukhun thak ka bawl ding,”
58008009	“Api-le-pute uh Aigupta gam a kipan pikhe ding a akhut ka let ni a akiang ua ka khun bang hilou in; ka thukhun ah a-om gige kei uhi, huchi in amau ka limsakta kei,” Toupa'n achi hi.
58008010	“Huai ni zoh chiang in Israel inkuante kiang a thu ka khun ding hiaite ahi, Toupa'n achi; alungsim uah ka thupiakte ka koih dia, alungtang uah ka gelh nalai dia, huan amau a ding in Pathian ka hi dia, kei a ding in amaute ka mite ahi ding uhi.
58008011	Huan michih in Toupa thei in, chi in ama inveng leh ama unau athuhilhta kei ding uhi; aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in avek un ahon thei chiat ding uhi.
58008012	Atatleknate uah ka zahngai dia, akhelhnate uh leng ka theigige nawnta kei ding,” chi in.
58008013	Thukhun thak chi a agen ziak in amasa zat nawn louh ding in aluisakta hi. Huchi in aluita a, zat tak louh mang pah thei ahita hi.
58009001	Huchi in thukhun masa in leng Pathian nasepna a zuih ding thukhun leh lei lam mun siangthou leng anei hi.
58009002	Biakbuk alam ua, pindan tuah masak ah khawnvak koihna mung, dohkan leh tanghou koihna a-om hi; huai tuh Mun Siangthou achi uhi.
58009003	Puanzak nihna ban ah biakbuk, Mun Siangthoupen achih uh a-om hi.
58009004	Huai sung ah dangka-eng gimlim halna bawm leh thukhun bawm dangka-eng a kiluan a-om a, huai thukhun bawm sung ah Manna omna dangka-eng bel, Aaron chiang sel leh thukhun gelhna suangpek a-om hi.
58009005	Atunglam ah zahngaihna tutphah liah in, thupina cherubte a-om ua; huaite tu in zaw akim sipsip in i gen thei kei ding uh.
58009006	Huai thilte huchibang a bawl ana hi ua, siampute'n Pathian nna sem in, biakbuk tuah masak ah alut zel uhi.
58009007	Pindan sungnungpen ah bel siampu lianpen kia, kum teng in khatvei sisan tawi in alut a; ama khelhna a ding leh mite khelhna a ding in alan zel hi.
58009008	Kha Siangthou in hon theihsak nop bel, biakbuk masa adin lai teng Mun Siangthou a luttheihna lampi akilang nai tadih kei, achihna ahi.
58009009	Biakbuk a thilpiak leh kithoihna kilan zelte'n abemite sia-le-pha theihna asiangsak thei kei chih tu hun a eite hon etsakna ahi.
58009010	Huaite nek-le-dawn, kisilna dan tuamtuamte, ataktak bawlhoihna hong tun ma a kizang salam thilte ahi.
58009011	Himahleh Khrist bel thil hoih hong om dingte siampu lianpen ding a hong pai in, khut a lam louh biakbuk thupizaw leh bukimzaw sung ah alut hi, huai tuh thilsiamte lak a ahi kei chihna ahi,
58009012	ama'n ei a ding a tangtawn tatkhiakna ngah khin in, kelte leh bawngtalte sisan hilou, ama sisan mahmah tawi in khatvei a setdet ding in mun siangthou sung ah alutta hi.
58009013	Kel leh bawngtalte sisan leh bawngla vu, minin tung a theh in bawn sa siang khop a ahihsiangthouleh,
58009014	Khrist, tangtawn Kha ziak a gensiatbei a Pathian kiang a kilan sisan in, Pathian hing nasem ding in na sia-le-pha theihna uh thilhih sisa a pan nak hihsiangthou na tel in chia!
58009015	Hiai ziak in amah thukhun thak palai ahong hi a, sapte'n tangtawn a gouluah ding thuchiam atantheihna ding un thukhun masa nuai a tatleknate lak a kipan hon tankhe ding in amah ahong sita, chihna ahi.
58009016	Thusiah omna peuh ah asiahmi sihna leng a-om teitei ding ahi.
58009017	Mi asih nung un thusiah in thu anei nak hi, asiahmi adam lai teng bel thu anei kei hi.
58009018	Huchi in thukhun masa leng sisan lou in ahihkip kei uhi.
58009019	Dan thupiak peuhmah Mosi in mipi tengteng kiang a apuan nung in, bawngnoute leh kelte sisan tui, samulkhau sandup leh hissop in ala a, laibu leh mipi tengteng atheh a,
58009020	huai Pathian in na kiang ua anamkip thukhun sisan ahi, chi in.
58009021	Huai lou leng biakbuk leh nasepna van tengteng huchi mah bang in sisan in atheh hi.
58009022	Huan dan in sisan a bangkim hihsiangthou angiat bang in, sisan suak lou in ngaihdamna himhim a-om kei hi.
58009023	Huai thilte van a om batpih laksawnte huaite a hihsiangthou a-om ding him uh ahi; van thil taktakte bel huai sang a kithoihna hoihzawte a hihsiangthou a-om ding ahi.
58009024	Khrist khut a lam mun siangthou, atak batpih ah alut ngal kei a; tu'n ah bel Pathian ma ah i sik ua dingh ding in van ah alut zawta hi.
58009025	Himahleh kum teng a siampu lian, ama sisan toh hilou, sisan tawi kawm a mun siangthou a alut zihzeh bang a, amah kilan ding a van a lut ahi kei;
58009026	huchi hi keileh leilung pian tung a kipan tamveipi athuakta ding hi; himahleh tulai hun tawp ah amah kithoihna pansan a khelhna hihmang ding in khatvei a setdet ding in amah ahong kilangta hi.
58009027	Huan mihing a ding in khatvei sih seh ahi, huai nung in vaihawmna a-om ding hi;
58009028	huchi mah bang in Khrist leng mi tampi khelhnate paipih ding a khatvei lat khit a om in, hotdamna mu ding a amah ngakte kiang ah khelhna pang lou in anihveina ah ahong lang nawn ding hi.
58010001	Dan bel thil hoih hong om ding lim kia ahih ziak in, ataktak lohkhiakna nei lou in, kum teng a kithoihna ngeingei alat zelte un, abe ding a hong paite bangchi mah in abukimsak thei ngei kei hi.
58010002	Huchi hi keileh lat tawp thamta lou ding uhia? Abemite khatvei a hihsiangthou pah hileh khelhna kitheihna anei nawn kei ding uhi.
58010003	Himahleh huai kithoihna ah kum teng in khelhnate theih nawnna ahong om nak hi.
58010004	Bawngtal leh kelte sisan in khelhnate lamang theivual ahi kei hi.
58010005	Huchi a khovel a Khrist ahong lut lai in; “Kithoihna leh thillat na deih kei a, kei a ding in pumpi na hon bawlsak zaw hi.”
58010006	Halmang a pumpiaknate leh khelhna ding a kithoihnate ah kipahna himhim na nei kei hi.
58010007	Huaitak in ke'n, “Pathian aw, Ngai in, laibuzial a ka tungthu gelh ahih bang in na deihlam hih ding in ka hong pai,” ka chi hi.
58010008	Atung ah, “Kithoihnate, thillatte, halmang pumpiaknate, khelhna ding a kithoihnate dan bang a lat ahih ziak in na deih kei a, amaute ah kipahna na nei sam kei,” achi hi.
58010009	Huaitak in ama'n, “Ngai in, Pathian aw, na deihlam hih ding in ka hong pai,” achita hi. Anihna atunding theihna ding in amasapen alamangta hi.
58010010	Huai deihlam in Jesu Khrist pumpi khatvei thu a setdet ding a alat tak ziak in, hihsiangthou in i omta hi.
58010011	Huan siampu tengteng in kawl a nisuak sim a nna sem in, khelhnate bangchik mah a hihmang thei lou kithoihna ngeingei lan gige in adingh uhi.
58010012	Amah bel tangtawn a ding akhelhnate a dia kithoihna khat kia alat nung in, “Pathian taklam ah ava tu zawta hi.”
58010013	Huai nungsiah, “Amelmate akhepek ngakna a siam ahih masiah uh angak nilouh hi.”
58010014	Huchi in khatvei thillat in hihsiangthousate tangtawn a ding in ahih bukimta hi.
58010015	Huan Kha Siangthou in eite ahon theihpih sam a, amasa in hiai bang in agen hi,
58010016	“Huai nite khit chiang in akiang ua ka thukhun ding hiaite ahi, Toupa'n achi; alungtang uah ka thupiakte ka koih dia, alungsim uah ka gelh nalai ding chi a agen khit in,
58010017	akhelhnate uh leh atatleknate uh ka theigige nawnta kei ding,” achi hi.
58010018	Huchi in khelhna ngaihdam ahih nung in khelhna a ding in thillat a-om nawnta kei hi.
58010019	Huchi in unaute aw, Jesu sisan ziak a mun siangthou a lutngamna nei in,
58010020	lampi thak leh hing tawn a puanzak sung a luttheihna, ama pumpi tawn in i nei uhi.
58010021	Pathian inkuante tung a siampu thupitak i neih ziak in,
58010022	i lungtang a sia-le-pha theihna siang lou a pan thehsiang a om in leh i pumpi leng tui siang a sil a om in, ginna a theihchetna kim nei in lungtang diktak mah pu in amah i naih ding uhi.
58010023	I lamet thugin ling lou in i pomkip ding uh, thuchiampa amuanhuai hi.
58010024	Huan itna leh thil hoih hih a kitokthou ding in i kingaihtuah ding uhi.
58010025	Khenkhatte hihdan bang a i kikhopnate uh tawpsan lou in, kihanthawn chiat ni; ni hong nai hulhul a na theih un kihanthawntuah sem un.
58010026	Thutak theihna kim i tan nung a thil i hihkhelh teitei in zaw, khelhnate a dia kithoihna a-om tak louh ziak in,
58010027	Vaihawmna lauhuai mulkimhuaitak, dou mite kangmang ding thangpaihna mei maban a nei in i om zawta ding hi.
58010028	Mosi Dan khawk saloumi, “Theihpihtu mi nih hiam thum hiam nuai ah, zahngaihna bei in asi zel uhi.”
58010029	Pathian Tapa sikden a, thukhun sisan amah hihsianthouna pen thil namai a bawl a, hehpihna Kha hihvuimi, huai mi sang a bangchi phet a gawtna thupizaw thuak tak in na sep uhiam?
58010030	“Phulakna himhim keimah lak ding ahi, keima'n ka thuk ding chih leh Toupa'n amite vai ahawmsak ding,” chi nawnpa lah i thei ngal uhi.
58010031	Pathian hing khut a puk thil mulkimhuaitak ahi.
58010032	Himahleh tuma lam a hihvak a na om nung ua thuakna buaina thupitak na thuak lai nite uh thei nawn un;
58010033	kong khat ah zaw muhsit leh haksatna thuak in etnop a bawl in na om ua, kong khat ah lah huchibang a bawl a omte thuakpihte na hong hi uhi.
58010034	Kolbunte na lainat ua, gou hoihzaw leh a-omden ding noumau in na neih uh kithei in na van hon laksakte uh leng kipaktak in na na thuakzou behlap uhi.
58010035	Huchi in kipahman piak thupitak ngahna ding na ginna uh paimang kei un.
58010036	Pathian deihlam na hih nung un thilchiam na muhtheihna ding un kuhkalna na kiphamoh uhi.
58010037	Sawt lou nung chiang a hong pai dingpa, hong pai ding ahi, sawt ahal nawn kei ding hi.
58010038	“Tu in ka midiktat tuh ginna in ahing ding; anungtolhleh bel ka kha in amah ah kipahna anei kei ding,” chih ahi ngal a.
58010039	Himahleh eite zaw mangthang ding a nungtolh pawl a pang i hi kei ua; hinna humbit ding a ginna nei pawl a pang i hi zaw uhi.
58011001	Ginna tuh thil lamette om ngei a theihtelna leh thil muhlouhte theihchetna ahi.
58011002	Huai ah nidanglai upate'n phat aloh uhi.
58011003	Ginna in khovelte Pathian thu a suktuah ahita chih i thei ua, huchi in thil muhtheihte leng thil langtheite a siam ahi kei hi.
58011004	Ginna in Abel in Kain sang in Pathian kiang ah kithoihna hoihzaw alan a, huaiziak in midik hihna amu chih Pathian in athilpiakte apomna ah atheisak hi; huai ginna ziak mah in ama'n sih nung nangawn in thu agen lai hi.
58011005	Ginna in Enok leng sihna chiam lou ding in lakmang in a-om a; Pathian in alakmang ziak in muh theih ahita kei a; lakmang a a-om ma in Pathian pahtak lam mi ahi chih theihsakna amu khinta hi.
58011006	Himahleh ginna lou in amah pahtak lam mi hih vual ahi kei; Pathian kiang a hong pai in, amah a-om chih leh azong mite lohchingsakpa ahi chih gin ding ahi.
58011007	Ginna in Noah thil muh nailouhte lam thu ah Pathian hilh a om in, Pathian laudan siam in a-inkuan hotdamna ding in long abawl a; huai in khovel siam louh atangsakta hi, ginna ziak adiktatna gouluahpa ahita hi.
58011008	Ginna in Abraham sap a a-om lai in agouluah ding mun a lut ding in paikhiakna ding thu amuta hi; apaina ding lam thei lou in apaikheta hi.
58011009	Ginna in gam chiam ah mi gam a taam bang in ana taam nilouh a, thuchiam kikhat gouluahpih ding Isak leh Jakobte toh puanin ah a-om uhi.
58011010	Khopi suangphum nei, Pathian gel leh lam angak nilouh hi.
58011011	Ginna in Sarah ngei in leng a chiampa muanhuai asak ziak in, atek nung in chi paitheihna amu hi.
58011012	Huchi in pasal khat amah lah misi bang mai a kipan, “Van a aksite bang a tam, tuipiau a piaunel bang a sim zoh louh suangtu,” ahong suakta uhi.
58011013	Hiai mi tengtengte'n thilchiamte tang khin hilou in, himahleh huaite gamlapi a kipan galmuh a na kipahpih hi zaw in, lei ah zaw khualzin leh mikhual lel ahi uh chih kitheigige in ginna nei in amaute asita uhi.
58011014	Huchibang a thu na gente'n amau gam ding azong uh chih ahihlang mahmah uhi.
58011015	Apawtsan gam uh lunggulh hi le uh bel kik nawnna hunlem mu mahmah ding ahi uhi.
58011016	Himahleh tu'n bel gam hoihzaw huai van a om pen deih ahi ua; huchi in Pathian a Pathian uh chih a om azum kei a; amau ding in khopi khat abawlsak hi.
58011017	Ginna in Abraham tuh ze-et a om in, Isak alan a; huan thuchiamte kipaktak a sangpa'n atapa neihsun alan hi,
58011018	huai lah, “Isak ah na suante akiminloh ding,” achih pen ahi.
58011019	Pathian in misi lak a kipan nangawn kaithou thei in asep a; huchi in gentehna dan a gen in amah misi lak a kipan mu nawn ahi ngei hi.
58011020	Ginna in Isak in thil hong tung dingte thu ah Jakob leh Esau avualzawl hi.
58011021	Ginna in Jakob in asih ding kuan in Joseph tate avualzawl tuaktuak a, “Achiangkhun dawn a kingai in Pathian abia hi.”
58011022	Ginna in Joseph in asih ding kuan in, Israel suante pawt ding thu agen a; aguhte vui ding tungtang thu apia hi.
58011023	Ginna in Mosi apian lai in, naungek melhoihtak ahi achih ziak un kha thum sung anu leh apate sel in a-om a; kumpipa thupiak leng alau kei uhi.
58011024	Ginna in Mosi in ahong pichin nung in Pharaoh tanu tapa a kiloh a-ut kei a;
58011025	sawt lou kal a dia khelhna nopna kipahpih sang in Pathian mite toh sukgentheih thuak atel zawta hi.
58011026	Khrist amuhsitna uh Aigupta gam goute sang a hauhsakna thupizaw in angai a; kipahman piak ding a-et zel ziak in.
58011027	Ginna in kumpipa thangpaihna lau lou in Aigupta gam apaisan a, muh theih louh pa amuh ziak in athuak teitei hi.
58011028	Ginna in Paikan Ankuangluina leh sisan thehna abawl a, ta masa hihmangthangpa'n amaute akhoihlouhna ding in.
58011029	Ginna in gam hul a pai bang in Tuipi San akan ua, Aiguptate'n tua bang a hih atum sam ua, tui ah akelum uhi.
58011030	Ginna in Jeriko khokulh ni sagih a-um nung un achimta hi.
58011031	Ginna in Rahab kizuaknu, gingloute lak ah amangthangkhawm kei, enkhete iim nei lou a ana pahtak ziak in.
58011032	Huan bang ka gen nalai dia? Gideon thute, Barak thute, Samson, Jepthah leh David thute, Samuel thute, zawlneite thute gen ni chi lehang hun in hon daih lou ding ahi.
58011033	Huai mite'n ginna in gam ala ua, thudik a vaihawm azong ua, thuchiamte atang ua, humpinelkai kamte achihsak uhi.
58011034	Mei thilhihtheihna ahihmit ua, namsau hiam nangawn apel ua, hatlouhna a kipan hattak a bawl in a-om ua, kidouna ah mihat minthang ana hi ua, namdang kidou pawlte ataikeksak uhi.
58011035	Numeite'n amisite uh thounawn amu ua; khenkhatte gimthuaksak in a-om ua, thohnawnna hoihzaw atantheihna ding un khahkhiakna adeih kei uhi.
58011036	Midangte'n leng nuihza bawlna leh vuak athuak ua, ahi, huai lou leng, kolbut leh hentakna atuak uhi.
58011037	Suang a den in a-om ua, sing-atna a attan in a-om ua, khemna atuak ua, namsau a satlup in a-om ua; belam vun leh kel vun silh in avakvai ua; gentheitak a gimthuak a sawi in a-om uhi.
58011038	Khovel amau tenna tak hilou mite, gamdai mun, mual tung, phaizang leh kawlhawm ah avial vakvak uhi.
58011039	Ahi a, hiaite tengteng in ginna ziak in phat na loh khin mah le uh thilchiam pen atang kei uh;
58011040	Pathian in eite a dia thil hoihzaw muhkholh aneih ziak a, ei tel lou a amaute hihbukim a a-omlouhna ding ziak uh ahi.
58012001	Huaiziak in huchi tel a theihpihte, meipi thupi umsuak a i om thei in, hon hihnok peuhmah leh khelhna eimah a belhte koihmang ni, huan i ma ua kitaitehna ding om ah kuhkaltak in tai ni.
58012002	Jesu, i ginna siampa leh hihkippa, ama a kipahna om ziak a zahlaknate ngaineu a kros a thuakpa, Pathian laltutphah taklam a tupa, amah lam en in.
58012003	Na khalam ua na bah ua, na lungkiaklouhna ding un, mikhialte a pan a huchibang a selkalhna thuakpa ngaihtuah un.
58012004	Khelhna dou in sisan suak hial in na pang nai kei uhi; hanthawnna thu, tate taihilh bang a nou hon taihilhna na mangngilhta uhi.
58012005	“Ka ta, Toupa sawina ngaineu ke'nla, ataihilh a na om in leng lungke sam ke'n;
58012006	Toupa'n a-itte asawi nak a, ta akipahpih avo nak hi,” chi in.
58012007	Na thuak uh zaw noumau a ding ahi; tate tung a hih bang in Pathian in na tung uah ahih a; pa sawi louh ta kua a-om ngei a?
58012008	Ta chihna teng loh a sawina loh lou a na om un bel, tatak hilou in, sawn na hi ua akei dia.
58012009	Huai lou leng eite hon sawi ding, sa ah pate i nei uhi, huaite lah zahtak ngal hang a; huai sang a thupizaw in, i hinna ding in, khate Pa thuthu in i om kei ding ua hia?
58012010	Amau zaw ni sawt louchik, hoih asak bang zel un ahon sawi ua, ama'n bel asianthouna i tantheihna ding in, i hoihna ding in ahon sawi zaw hi.
58012011	Sawina himhim thuak lai in kipahhuai in alang kei a khasiathuai in alang zaw hi, himahleh anung in huchi a sawizawt a omte ding in diktatna gah khamuanhuaitak asuahsak zel hi.
58012012	Huchi in khut kaikhete leh khut zawte liktou un;
58012013	huan khebai kilawisak lou a, hihdam a a-om zawkna ding in, na khete uh a ding in lamtang bawl un.
58012014	Mi tengteng toh kituahna leh sianthouna delh un, huai sianthouna lou in kuamah in Toupa amu kei ding uhi;
58012015	Pilvangtak in en un, huchi lou in zaw Pathian hehpihna ngah zou lou kuahiam a-om ding a, khaatna zung banghiam hong sel a nou hon hihbuai in, huai in mi tampi hihnit in a-om ding uhi;
58012016	kingaihhat hiam, Esau bang a Pathian zahloumi hiam ahong om kha ding hi. Ama'n ata masa hihna an khatvei nek in akhawngta hi.
58012017	Huai nung in vualzawlna gouluah a-ut in, khitui ke kawm in phatuamngaitak in zong mahleh, kisikna hun amuh louh ziak in paih in a-omta chih na thei uhi.
58012018	Nou zaw tang khoih theih, mei a kangte, meivomte, mialte, huihpite,
58012019	pengkul ginnate, thugen ging omnate tung na hi kei ua; huai ging zate'n thudang akiang ua gen nawn lou ding in angen uhi.
58012020	“Gamsa nangawn in huai tang akhoih aleh suang a denlup in a-om ding,” ahi chih thupiak pen athuak thei kei uhi.
58012021	Athil muh peuhmah uh akihtakhuai mahmah ziak in Mosi in, “Ka lau a, ka nak lin mahmah,” achi hial hi.
58012022	Himahleh Zion tang, Pathian hing khopi, van lam Jerusalem, sim zoh louh angel hon khawmpite,
58012023	ta masa van a min tuang saptuam hon kiang, Pathian, mi tengteng ngaihtuahpa kiang bang, midiktat hih hoihkim kha kiang leh,
58012024	Jesu thukhun thak palai kiang, sisan theh, Abel sisan sang a thuhoihzaw genpa kiang tung na hi zaw uhi.
58012025	Thugenpa na deih kei kha ding uh, pilvang un. Lei a amaute taihilhpa adeih louh ua bawn, gimthuakna apelh louh ngal un, eite, van a kipan a hon taihilhpa kiheisante'n i pel kei sem ding uhi.
58012026	Huai hun in aw in lei ahihling a, “Himahleh tu'n zaw, khatvei lei kia hilou in, van leng ka hihling nawn ding chi in akichiam zawta hi.”
58012027	Khatvei ka hihling nawn ding chih in, thil lingloute a-om dettheihna ding in, thil lingtheite thilsiamte bang phet in, suanmang in a-om ding chih theisak ahi.
58012028	Huchi in hihlin vual louh gam i tan ziak in, hehpihna i nei ding ua, huaiziak in zah leh laudan siam kawm in, Pathian pahtak lam nna i sem thei ding uhi.
58012029	Pathian zaw mikatmang hat mei ahi.
58013001	Unau ki-itna om zel hen.
58013002	Mikhualte tung ah itna suah ding mangngilh kei un; huchibang hih in khenkhat in theiloupi in angelte azintun uhi.
58013003	Hen a omte hen hi sam bang in theigige unla; gimthuakte sa a om sam na hih ziak un theigige un.
58013004	Mi tengteng lak ah kitenna pahtawi in om henla, lupna leng hihbuah louh in om hen; kingaite leh angkawmte tung a Pathian in vaihawm ding ahi.
58013005	Na lungsim putdan uh dangka deihtakna pang lou hi hen; na thil neihsun tung uah lungkim un; amah mah in, “Bangchik mah in ka hon don lou kei ding a, pai leng ka hon paisan kei ding,” achi hi.
58013006	Huchi in hangsantak in, “Toupa hon panpihpa ahi, ka lau kei ding; mihing in bang ahon chih thei dia?” i chi uhi.
58013007	Noute hon heu, Pathian thu hon hilhte, theigige unla, a-omdan ua thilsuakte ngaihtuah in a-omdan uh ching un.
58013008	Jesu Khrist tuh zan, tuni leh tangtawn in angeingei in a-om gige hi.
58013009	Kisinsakna tuamtuam leh thugin lamdangte mutleng in om kei un; lungtang hehpihna a hihkip a om ahoih ngal a, nek dingte bang a hihkip a om lou in; huchibang lam lungkhamte'n huaite ah phattuamna amu tuan kei uhi.
58013010	Eite'n maitam khat, biakbuk nasemte'n anek theihlouhna mun i nei hi.
58013011	Gan sisan, siampu lianpen in mun siangthou a khelhna a dia lan a alutpih zel luangte dainawl ah ahal uhi.
58013012	Huchi in Jesu in leng amah sisan mahmah a mite ahihsianthouna ding in kulh kongkhak polam ah ana thuakta hi.
58013013	Huchi in amah amuhsitna uh pu in dainawl ah akiang lam ah i paikhe ding uhi.
58013014	Hiai lai ah zaw khomun kip i nei ngal kei ua, kho hong om ding i zong uh ahi zaw hi.
58013015	Huchi in amah vang in phatna kithoihna Pathian kiang ah i lan gige ding uh, amin gupna mukte gah ahih ziak in.
58013016	Himahleh thil hihhoih leh thilphal mangngilh kei un; huai bang kithoihna tung ah Pathian alungkim mahmah hi.
58013017	Nou hon heutute thu mang unla, athuthu un om un, anasepte uh tanchin gen nawn ding a, na khate uh ching a hon veng ahi uhi, lungkham kawm hilou in, kipaktak in semsak un; huchi lou in zaw nou a ding a khawk ahi zaw ding hi.
58013018	Hon thumsak un; bangkim a diktattak a om a, sia-le-pha theihna siangtak nei ka hi uh chih diktak in ka kithei uhi.
58013019	Huan kintak a na kiang ua sawl nawn a ka omtheihna ding in, huai ding in ka hon ngen nawn sem hi.
58013020	Tu in, lemna Pathian, tangtawn thukhun sisan ziak a misi lak a kipan a, i Toupa Jesu, belamchingpa thupitak, kaithou nawnpa'n,
58013021	amitmuh a akipah lam peuhmah Jesu Khrist ziak in eimah a sem in, adeihlam hih ding in thil hoih chiteng lam ah nou hon hihkim hen; Jesu Khrist kiang ah thupina tangtawn in om hen. Amen.
58013022	Himahleh unaute aw, ka hon ngen ahi, hanthawn thuhilhna ngaithei teitei un; na kiang uah thu tomchik ka gelh uhi.
58013023	I unaupa Timothi apawtsakta uh chih na thei un; ahong pai baihleh, amah toh nou ka hong mu ding uhi.
58013024	Nou hon heute tengteng leh misiangthoute tengteng chibai hon buksak un. Itali gam a mite'n chibai ahon buk uhi.
58013025	Na vek ua kiang ah hehpihna om hen, Amen.
59001001	Jakob, Pathian leh Toupa Jesu Khrist sikha in, nam sawm-le-nih dalhzakte kiang ah chibai abuk hi.
59001002	Ka unaute aw, na ginna uh ze-etna in kuhkalna asiam chih thei in, khemna chiteng na tuah chiang un kipahna ngen in sim un.
59001003	Na ginna ze-etna un kuhkalna asiam chih thei in.
59001004	Bangmah tasam lou a na kim ua, na vek ua na bit theihna ding un, kuhkalna in semkim hen.
59001005	Na lak ua kuapeuh in pilna ataksapleh mi tengteng kiang a itlou leh tai lou a pepa Pathian kiang ah ngen hen, huchi in akiang ah piak ahi ding hi.
59001006	Himahleh ginglel het lou in ginna nei in ngen hen, ginglelmi zaw tuipi kihot huih mutleng leh sep bang ahi.
59001007	Huchibang mi'n Toupa a kipan bangmah muh kiging kei hen.
59001008	Lungsim det neiloumi athilhih tengteng ah akip kei hi.
59001009	Unau daikil kal a om dopsang a a-om ziak in kipak hen;
59001010	mihau hihneu a a-om ziak in kipak zaw hen; loupa pak bang a aman ding ziak in.
59001011	Ni hong suak a huihlum ahong nun in loupa avuai a; apak apulh a; akilawmna amangthang hi; huchi mah bang in mihau apaina ah avuai ding hi.
59001012	Khemna thuak teitei mi ahampha hi; ze-et a a-om nung in Hinna Lallukhu, Toupa'n amah itte kiang a achiam amuh ding ziak in.
59001013	Kuamah in khemna atuah lai in Pathian khem ka hi, chi kei hen. Pathian gitlouhna toh khemvual ahi kei, ama'n leng kuamah akhem ngal kei a.
59001014	Michih amau utna a hip leh pimang a a-om chiang un khemna atuak uh ahi zaw hi.
59001015	Huan utna pai ahih chiang in huai in khelhna apiangsak a, huan, huai khelhna ahong pichin in, sihna atun hi.
59001016	Ka nau deihtakte aw, khem in om kei un.
59001017	Thilpiak hoih leh thilpiak buching tunglam a kipan a vakte Pa kiang a kipan a hong suk ahi a, amah ah lamdanna leh kikhekna lim a-om kei hi.
59001018	Athilsiamte lak a gah masa i hong hihtheihna ding in, amah deihlam in thutak lak a pan in ahon suangkhia hi.
59001019	Unau deihtakte aw, huaite na thei uhi, himahleh michih ngaihkhiak kilawp henla, thugen kituhpih kei henla, heh hak hen.
59001020	Mihing thangpaihna in Pathian diktatna abawl kei hi.
59001021	Huaiziak in nin tengteng leh gilou dim val koihmang unla, thu kipawi, na kha uh hondam thei, thunuailuttak in pom un.
59001022	Himahleh noumau kikhem in ngaikhete leltak hilou in thuzuite hi zaw un.
59001023	Kuapeuh thu ngaikhia a zui tuan lou zaw limlang a apianpih maitang hoihtak a ki-en bang ahi.
59001024	Hoihtak in aki-en a, apaimang zoh in mi bangchi ahia ahih akimangngilh nawn pah hi.
59001025	Himahleh kuapeuh dan bukim, noplenna dan vel a, huchibang a om gige a, ngaikhia a, mangngilh nawn maimah nak bang hiloute zui a nasem gige, huai mi athilhih ah vualzawl in a-om ding hi.
59001026	Kuapeuh sabiak limsak hi a kigingta a, alei venghoih lou a, amah lungtang kikhem zaw mi sabiakdan bangmah ahi kei hi.
59001027	I Pathian leh Pa mitmuh a sabiak siangthou leh gilou pang lou zaw, tagah leh meithaite agimthuak lai ua veh leh khovel buahna bang lou a kibawl zel ahi.
59002001	Ka unaute aw, i Toupa Jesu Khrist, thupina Toupa gingta kawm in, mite khentuam kei un.
59002002	Na kikhopkhawmna inn uah mi dangka-eng zungbuh bun, puan hoihtak silh hong lut henla, huan migenthei puansetak silh hong lut samleh;
59002003	puan hoihtak silhmi na limsak ua akiang ah, “Nang hiai mun hoih ah tu in,” na chi ua, migenthei kiang ah bel, “Nang huai ah na dingh in, ahihkeileh, ka khe ngakna nuai ah tu in,” na chih uleh,
59002004	na lungsim uah khentuam nei leh ngaihtuahna giloupu, gense mite na hong hi kei ding ua hia?
59002005	Ka unau deihtakte aw, Pathian in hiai khovel a gentheite ginna a hau ding leh amah itte kiang a achiam gam luah ding in achi kei a hia?
59002006	Nou bel migentheite na zahlaksak zaw uhi. Mihaute hilou uhia nou hon nuaisiah? Mihaute hilou uhia vaihawmna a nou hon kailut?
59002007	Amaute hilou uhia minhoih na put uh gensete?
59002008	Himahleh Laisiangthou in, “Nangmah na ki-it bang in na vengte na it ding ahi,” chih kumpi dan na zop uleh na hihhoih uhi.

59002017	Huchi mah bang in ginna leng thilhih nei lou a amah kia a a-omleh si ahi.
59002018	Ahi, mi kuahiam in, “Nang ginna na nei a, ke'n thilhih ka nei hi,” na ginna na thilhih pang lou in hon ensak inla, ke'n thilhih in ka ginna ka hon ensak ding achi thei hi.
59002019	Pathian khat kia ahi chih na gingta maw? Na hihhoih e; dawite'n leng agingta ua, aling zel uh, achi ding hi.
59002020	Mithulim lou aw, thilhih pang lou a ginna lel bangmah ahi kei chih na thei nuam hia?

59003001	Ka unaute aw, na lak uah mi tampi heutu in hong om kei un, heutu in vaihawmna thupi sem atuak ding chih i thei uhi.

59003011	Tuikhuk khat in nak khat mah a kipan in tui lim leh lim lou asuaksak zel a hia?
59003012	Ka unaute aw, theipi kung ah olive thei agah thei a hia? Ahihkeileh grepgui ah theipi agah thei a hia? Huchibang in chikhuk in tui al lou asuaksak thei sam kei hi.
59003013	Na lak uah kua apil in, thu atheithei a? Thunuailut leh piltak in athilhihte omdan hoih in ensak hen.
59003014	Himahleh na lungtang uah hazatna thupitak leh kidemna na neih uleh thudik zuausan kei un.
59003015	Huai bang pilna zaw tunglam a kipan a hong paisuk ahi kei a, lei lam thil, khamitlouhna leh dawi lam thil a kipan ahi zaw hi.
59003016	Hazatna leh kidemna omna ah buaina leh thilhihkhelhna chiteng a-om hi.
59003017	Tunglam a kipan pilna bel, atung in asiangthou phot a, huai khit in kituah a-ut a, anunnem a, achihnuam a, zahngaihna leh gah hoih in adim a, khentuam anei kei a, alepchiah kei hi.
59003018	Huan diktatna gah zaw lemna bawlmi in lemna a atuh ahi.
59004001	Na lak ua kidounate leh kinaknate koi a kipan hong suak ahi ua? Hiaite na pumpi hiangte ua kidouna bawl nak, na nopsak utna ua kipan a hong suakkhete ahi kei ua hia?
59004002	Na lunggulh ua, na nei tuan kei ua, huchi in tual na that uh. Na eng ua, na ngah thei tuan kei ua, huchi in na kidou ua, gal na bawl uh. Na nget louh ziak un, na nei kei uh.
59004003	Na ngen ua, na nget diklouh ziak un na ngah kei uh, na nopsak bawlna ding lel ua zat na tup ziak un.
59004004	Nou angkawm hatte aw, khovel lawm hihna zaw Pathian melma hihna ahi chih na thei kei ua hia? Huaiziak in khovel lawm hih ut peuhmah Pathian melma in akibawl nak hi.
59004005	Ahihkeileh eimah a teng Kha in, “Haza khop hial in ahon deih chih Laisiangthou in agen bangmah lou in na ngaihtuah ua hia?”
59004006	Himahleh ama'n hehpihna tamsem ahon pia hi. Huaiziak in Laisiangthou in, “Pathian in mikisatheite adou a, kingaineute bel hehpihna ape nak hi,” achih.
59004007	Huaiziak in Pathian ah kitulut un. Diabol dou un, hileh noute ahon taimangsan ding hi.
59004008	Pathian naih unla, huchi in ama'n ahon naih ding. Khialte aw, na khut uh silsiang un; lungsim thuah neite aw, na lungtang uh hihsiangthou un.
59004009	Lungkham unla, suun unla, kapkhia un. Na nuih uh suunna suak henla, na lungnopna uh lungngaihna suak hen.
59004010	Toupa mitmuh in kingaineu un, huchi in ahon hihlian ding hi.
59004011	Unaute aw, kigensetuah kei un. Kuapeuh in a-unau agensiat hiam vai ahawmkhumleh, dan gensia a vaihawmkhum ahi; dan na gensiatleh dan zuimi na hi kei a, vaihawmpa na hi zaw hi.
59004012	Dan pepa leh vaihawmpa, amah hondam theipa leh hihmang theipa khat lel a-om hi; nang na vengte vaihawmkhum kua kisa na hia?
59004013	Tu'n ah noute'n ngai un, “Tuni hiam zingchiang hiam in, huai khopi ah i hoh ding ua, huai ah kum khat i va taam ding ua, i sumsin ding ua, punna i mu ding,” chite aw.
59004014	Zingchiang a bang hong om ding ahia chih na thei kei uhi. Na hinna uh bang ahia? Tuimei sawt lou kal a hong dawk a, mang nawn lel bang na hi uhi.
59004015	Huchi in “Toupa'n pha asakleh i dam dia, hiai hiam, huai hiam i hih ding,” na chih ding uh ahi.
