59004017	Huchi in kuapeuh thil hoih ding thei a hih tuan lou zaw amah a ding in khelhna ahi.
59005001	Mihausate aw, ngai dih uh, na tung ua gimthuakna hong tung ding ziak a kap in, mau tuaituai un.
59005002	Na goute uh aseta a, na puante uh leikha in ne khinta hi.
59005003	Na dangka-eng uleh na dangkate uh atui-ek khinta hi; huan atui-ek uh nou hon theihpihtu ahi ding ua, meikang bang in na taksa uh akangse zou ding hi.
59005004	Ngai un, na lou ua buh at a kilohte loh amau khem a na piak louh uh akikou ua, buh atte mangbang kikou aw Sepaihte' Toupa bil ah alutta hi.
59005005	Khovel ah nuamsatak leh noptaltak in na hing ua, na thah ni bang un na lungtang uh na taisak uhi.
59005006	Midiktat, nou hon douloute siam louh tangsak in na that uhi.
59005007	Huchi in unaute aw, Toupa hong pai mateng kuhkaltak in om un. Ngai un, louneimi in vuahtui ke masa leh nanung amuh mateng leigah hoihtak angak zel hi.
59005008	Nou leng kuhkaltak in om un; na lungtang uh hihkip un; Toupa hong paina ding anaita hi.
59005009	Unaute aw, siam louh tang a na omlouhna ding un, kiphunkhum kei un; ngai un, kongkhak bul ah vaihawmpa adingh hi.
59005010	Unaute aw, Toupa min a thugenmi zawlneite thuakdan leh akuhkaldan uh zuih ding in nei un.
59005011	Ngai un, athuak mite tuh nuamsa i chi uhi; Job kuhkaldan na zata ua, Toupa'n atawp a ahihdan leh Toupa hehpihna a adimdan leh azahngaih theihdan leng na mu uhi.
59005012	Himahleh ka unaute aw, bang teng tung ah, kichiam kei un; van lou in hiam, lei lou in hiam, thil dang himhim lou in hiam kichiam kei un, hiamhleh “hi” na chih uh “hi” henla, “hilou” na chih uh “hilou” hi hen; huchi lou in zaw siam louh tang in na om kha ding uhi.
59005013	Na lak uah thil hoih lou thuak a-om uhia? Thum uhen. Kipak a om uhia? Phatna la sa uhen.
59005014	Na lak uah damlou a-om uhia? Saptuam Upa samsak uhenla, ama'n Toupa min a sathau nilh in atung ah thum hen.
59005015	Huan ginna a thumna in damlou adam ding a, Toupa'n amah akaithou ding; thil ahihkhelh takleh ngaihdam ahi ding hi.
59005016	Huchi in hihdam a na omtheihna ding un, na khelhnate uh thupha kitawituah unla, kithumsaktuah un. Midiktat thumna in thil thupitak ahih zel hi.
59005017	Elijah leng eimah piandan bang pu mihing ahi a, vuah zuklouhna ding in phatuamngaitak in athum a, kum thum leh kha guk sung teng leitung ah vuah azu kei hi.
59005018	Athum nawn a, van in vuah azusak a, lei in agahte ahon suah hi.
59005019	Ka unaute aw, na lak ua mi kuapeuh thutak a kipan in pialmang henla kuahiam in pikik nawnleh,
59005020	mikhial alamhaihna a kipan a kiheisakpa'n sihna a kipan akha ahondam ding a, khelhna tampi akhuhsak lai ding chih kithei hen.
60001001	Peter, Jesu Khrist sawltak in, Pontus gam, Galatia gam, Kappadosia gam, Asia gam Bithinia leh gam tuamtuam a mikhual dalhzakte kiang ah;
60001002	Pa Pathian theihkholh bang a Jesu Khrist thumanna leh sisan theh tang ding a Kha hihtuamna tungtawn a tel a omte kiang ah hehpihna leh khamuanna hihkhan in om hen.
60001003	I Toupa Jesu Khrist leh Pa Pathian phat in om hen! Ama'n azahngaihna thupitak bang zel in, misi lak a kipan Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak in lametna hing mu ding in ahon piang thaksak nawn hi;
60001004	goutan setheilou, nin baang lou, tul thei lou, van a nou a ding a sit muhna ding in;
60001005	hotdamna, hun nanung a lang ding a zohsa mu ding in, ginna ziak in Pathian thilhihtheihna a ven na hi uhi.
60001006	Tu in ze-etna chiteng ziak in hun sawt lou lungkham tadih mah le uchin, huai ah nakpitak in na kipak uhi.
60001007	Na ginna uh ze-etna, dangka-eng mei a ze-et nung nangawn a mangthang zel sang a manphazaw, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a phatna leh pahtawina leh thupina ding ahong hihtheihna ding in.
60001008	Mu ngei lou napi in amah na it ua, tu in mu tadih kei mah le uchin, amah na gingta ua, kipahna gen vual louh leh thupina a dim in na kipak mahmah uhi.
60001009	Na ginna un atup pen na kha uh hotdamna na mu uhi.
60001010	Huai hotdamna thu zawlneite hehpihna na kiang ua hong tung ding thugenkholte'n akankan ua, siamneltak in azongkhia uhi.
60001011	Khrist kha amau a om in Khrist thuakna ding leh thupina hon zui dingte atheihkholhsak lai in, bang hun a bangchi a hong tung ding ahia chih zonkhiak atum uhi.
60001012	Huai thu in amau nasep kisep lou in, noumau nasep asem zaw uh chih akiang uah theihsak ahita, huai thute van a kipan a sawlkhiak Kha Siangthou panpih in tanchinhoih nou hon hilhte'n tu in ahon hilh ua, huai thilte angelte'n leng vel a-ut uhi.
60001013	Huaiziak in na lungsim puan uh teng in pilvang unla, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a hehpihna nou ahon puak ding lungke lou in lamen un.
60001014	Ta thumangte bang in, na theih louh lai ua na nidanglai duhgawlna uh bang a om lou in;
60001015	nou hon sampa asiangthou bang in nou leng na tatdan tengteng uah hong siangthou un;
60001016	“Noute na siangthou ding uh ahi, kei ka siangthou ngal a,” chih gelh ahi.
60001017	Huan khentuam nei lou a michih nasep bang chiat a vaihawmpa Pa bang a na loh uleh, hiai lai a na taam lai teng un laudan siam in om un.
60001018	Na pipute uh piaksawn, na omdan uh bangmah hilou a kipan, thil se thei, dangka leh dangka-eng a tat na hi kei ua,
60001019	belamnou gensiatbei leh nin baang lou sisan bang a, Khrist sisan pha a tat na hi zaw uh chih na thei uhi.
60001020	Amah leilung pian ma in sehkholh in a-om ngeitak a, himahleh hun nanung ah noumau ziak in kilak in a-om hi.
60001021	Amah ziak in misi lak a kipan kaithoupa leh athupina pepa Pathian gingtate na hi uh, na ginna uh leh na lametna uh Pathian a a-omtheihna ding in.
60001022	Unaute it taktak ding a thutak zui a na kha uh na hihsiangthou tak ziak un lungtang a phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat un.
60001023	Chi se thei lak ah hilou in, Pathian Thu hing gige leh om gige chi setheilou lak a piangthak na hi zaw uhi.
60001024	“Mi tengteng loupa bang ahi ua, athupina uh leng loupa pak bang ahi. Loupa avuai a, apak apulh hi.
60001025	Toupa bel tangtawn in a-om gige hi,” chih ahi ngal a. Hiai ahi tanchinhoih nou ahon hilh pen uh.
60002001	Huchi in gitlouhna tengteng, khemna tengteng, lepchiahna tengteng, hazatna tengteng, gensiatna tengteng tawpsan unla,
60002002	naungek suak thakte bang in khalam nawitui, bangmah hel louh lunggulh un; huai a na khantheihna ding un:
60002003	Toupa mihehpih theitak ahi chih na chep tak ngal uleh.
60002004	Amah suang hing, mihingte deih louh, Pathian theih a bel tel leh manpha ahi.
60002005	Amah kiang a hong pai in, noute ngei leng suang hingte bang in Jesu Khrist ziak a Pathian kipah lam kithoihna lan ding a siampu siangthou hi ding in khalam inn ah leptouh in na om uhi.
60002006	Huaiziak in Laisiangthou ah: “Ngai un, Zion ah aning a suang kiphamohpen tel a om leh manphatak ka lem hi; amah gingtate azahlak kei ding uh,” chih atuang hi.
60002007	Nou agingtate a ding in huai manphapi ahi, agingtaloute a ding in bel; “Inn lamte suang deih louhpen, huai mah aning a suang phatuampen ahong hita hi.”
60002008	Huan “Pukna suang leh dalna suangpi ahi. Thu kigente azuih louh ziak un akisuipuk ua; huchibang ding a sehsa ahi him uhi.”
60002009	Himahleh mial a kipan pawt a, vak lamdangtak a lut ding a nou hon sampa hoihna na muhsak theihna ding un, nou zaw chitel, kumpi siampu, nam siangthou, Pathian mite na hi uhi;
60002010	Nidanglai in nam himhim na hi kei ua; tu in zaw Pathian namte na hita uh; nidanglai in zahngaihna na mu kei ua, tu in zaw zahngaihna na muta uhi.
60002011	Deihtakte aw, mikhual leh khualzin na hih ziak un kha dou nakpa taksa utnate tawpsan ding in nou ka hon ngen hi.
60002012	Zentelte lak a na tatdan uh kilawmtak hi hen, huchi in thil hihkhial a, ahon gensiat chiang un leng na thil hoih hih amuhte uh ziak in veh a a-om chiang un Pathian apahtawi thei ding uhi.
60002013	Toupa ziak in mihing dan bawl peuhmah ah lut un; thuneihna tawi kumpipa kiang ah hiam,
60002014	thil hihkhialte tung a thuk ding leh thil hoih hihte phat ding a kumpipa'n aseh gam ukpate thunuai ah lut un.
60002015	Hiai Pathian deihlam ahi, mihaite haina thil hoih hih in na hihdai thei ding uhi.
60002016	Noplen na hi ua, himahleh na noplenna uh khelhna khuhna ding a zang lou in Pathian sikha a omna ding in zang zaw un.
60002017	Mi tengteng zahtak un. Ki-unauna it un. Pathian laudan siam un. Kumpipa pahtawi un.
60002018	Sikhate aw, mihoih leh minunnemte lak kia hilou in migiloute lak ah leng laudan siam in nou hon heute thuthu in om un.
60002019	Mi'n Pathian theihna ziak in thuak louh ding thuak a lungkhamna athuak teiteileh huai pen Pathian pahtak lam ahi.
60002020	Nou na thilhihkhelh ziak ua vuak na thuak un, kuhkaltak in thuak mah le uchin phatna bang na loh ua? Himahleh na thil hoih hih ziak ua na thuak ua, kuhkaltak a na thuak teitei ualeh, hiai pen Pathian kipah lam ahi.
60002021	Khrist in leng nou ahon thuaksak ziak in, huai bang hih ding a sap na hi uhi; akhap a na zuihna ding un zuih ding ahon nutsiat ahi.
60002022	“Ama'n thil ahihkhial kei a, akam ah khemna leng a-om sam kei.”
60002023	Enghou a a-om lai in, a-enghou thuk kei a, athuak lai in avau kei hi; diktattak a ngaihtuahpa kiang ah akipe zaw hi.
60002024	Khelhna lam a si khin, adiktatna lam a i hintheihna ding in amah mah in tua sing ah asa in i khelhnate apua hi; avuakna golhte ah hihdam in na omta uhi.
60002025	Belam mang bang in na mang ua, tu'n zaw nou hon chingpa leh heutupa kiang ah na kik nawnta uhi.
60003001	Huchibang in, nou zite aw, noumau pasalte thuthu in om un, huchi in alak ua khenkhat in Pathian thu zui kei mah le uh na tatdan uh zoh in a-om ding uhi.
60003002	Laudan siam kawm a na tatdan siangthou uh en in.
60003003	Na kivatna uh polam kivatna samphek leh dangka-eng khi-oh hiam, puansilh a kivatte hilou in,
60003004	lungtang a mihing thuguk lungsim thunuailut leh nunnem puansilh setheilou a kivat Pathian mitmuh in amanpha mahmah hi.
60003005	Huchibang in tuma lam a numei siangthou Pathian gingtate'n leng amau pasalte thuthu a om in akivan uhi.
60003006	Sarah in Abraham, toupa chi a athuthu a a-om bang in; thil hoih hih a, khemlauna himhim lau lou a na om uleh Sarah tate na hi ding uhi.
60003007	Huchi mah bang in, nou pasalte aw, numei zaw bel kitambaihzaw ahih bang un leh hehpihna hinna tanpihte ahih bang un, theihsiamna toh pahtawidan siam kawm in theihna bang zel in na zite uh kem un, na thumna uh dal a a-omlouhna ding in.
60003008	Atawp pen in, na vek un lungsim mun khat in om unla, kilainattuah unla, thunuailut in om un.
60003009	Khelhna, khelhna in thuk kei unla, salhna, salhna a thuk sam lou in, vualzawl zaw un. Hiai vualzawlna tang ding a sap na hi uhi.
60003010	“Hinna it a nihoihte muh ut in khelhna lak ah alei venghoih henla, amuk leng khemna thu gen lou ding in venghoih hen.
60003011	Gilou nungngatsan in thil hoih hih henla; kituahna zong in delh zel hen.
60003012	Midiktatte tung ah Toupa mit atu a, abil in leng athumna lam uah adoh zel hi, himahleh Toupa mel in thil hihkhialte adou nak,” chih gelh ahi.
60003013	Thil hoih lam a phatuam na ngaih uleh na poikhoih ding uh kua a-om dia?
60003014	Himahleh diktatna ziak a na thuakta bang na hih uleh, na hampha ding uhi. Akihtakhuaina uh kihta kei un.
60003015	Himahleh na lungtang uah Toupa in Khrist bawl un; noumau a om, na lametpen uh hon dong peuhmah dawng ding in mansa gige in thunuailuttak leh laudan siam kawm in om un;
60003016	sia-le-pha theihna siangtak nei un, huchi in nou ahon gensiatna lam uah, Khrist a na omdan hoih uh gen thanghuaite hih zahlak in a-om ding uhi.
60003017	Thil gilou hih ziak a thuak sang in Pathian hoihsak lam ahihleh thil hoih hih ziak a thuak ahoihzaw hi.
60003018	Pathian kiang a hon pitheihna ding in Khrist in leng khelhnate a ding in khatvei athuakta hi, midiktat in midiktatloute sik in athuak a; sa ah sihsak in a-om a, Kha ah hinsak in a-omta hi.
60003019	Huai kha in suangkul a kha omte kiang ah thu ava tangkoupih hi.
60003020	Huai mite'n nidanglai a Noah dam lai a long bawl sung teng a, Pathian thuakzohna in angak lai in thu amang kei ua; huai long ah mi tawmchik, mi giat lel tui a pan humbit in a-om uhi.
60003021	Huan huai tui in Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak a hotdamna baptisma lim hon ensak a, huai tuh pumpi nitna siansakna dan hilou in, sia-le-pha theihna siansakna ziak a Pathian kiang naihna ahi zaw hi.
60003022	Amah van a pai in Pathian taklam ah a-om a; angelte, thuneihnate, thilhihtheihnate amah thuthu a omsak in a-omta hi.
60004001	Huchi in Khrist in taksa a athuak ziak in nou leng huchibang lungsim in kivan un; sa a thuak khinsa in gilou atawpsanta hi.
60004002	Huchi in tunung sa a om lai teng mihing duhgawlna lam bang a om lou in, Pathian deihlam in a-omta hi.
60004003	Zentelte ut lam hihna, huknate, tak taksa utnate, uain hainate, zu khamnate, milim biakna kihhuaitakte tuma lam a hihsa teng i na zang khin ngal a.
60004004	Huai a amau nuambawl luatna bang a noute'n tu a na bawl sam louh uh lamdang asa ua, nou ahon gense nak uhi.
60004005	Amau mihing leh misite ngaihtuah ding a mansa kiang ah atanchin uh agen ding uhi.
60004006	Hiai ziak in ahi, misite kiang a leng tanchinhoih gen a hih, sa a om mihingte bang a ngaihtuah in om mah le uh, kha a bel Pathian bang a ahintheihna ding un.
60004007	Himahleh thil tengteng tawpna anaita, huaiziak in na thumtheihna ding un lungsim diktak pu in pilvang un.
60004008	Bangdang teng sang in phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat unla; itna in gilou tampi akhuh zel hi.
60004009	Phun lou in kizintun tuah unla;
60004010	michih in thilpiak na muh bang zel un, Pathian hehpihna chiteng kemhoihte bang in huaite in nna kisepsaktuah chiat un.
60004011	Mi kuapeuh in thu agenleh Pathian thute bang in gen hen; mi kuapeuh in nna asepleh Pathian in hatna apiak bang in sem hen; huchi in Jesu Khrist ziak in thil bangkim ah Pathian pahtawi in a-om thei ding, thupina leh vaihawmna tangtawn in amah a ahi, Amen.
60004012	Deihtakte aw, na lak ua ze-etna thupitak hong om, noumau ze-etna ding a na tung ua hong tung, thillamdang na tung ua tung bang in lamdang sa kei un.
60004013	Khrist thuaknate thuakpihte na hihdan bang zel un kipak zaw un; huchi in athupina a ahong kilak chiang in noumau leng nuamtak in na kipak thei ding uhi.
60004014	Khrist min ziak a tai na hih uleh, na hampha uhi; na tung uah thupina kha leh Pathian kha a-om gige hi.
60004015	Himahleh na lak uah kuamah in tualthatmi ahih ziak hiam, midangte thilhih gensakmi ahih ziak hiam in thuak kei hen.
60004016	Himahleh, Khristian ahih ziak a athuakleh zum kei hen; huai min pu ahih ziak in Pathian pahtawi zaw hen.
60004017	Pathian inkuanpihte ah vaihawmna pat ahunta hi; huan eite ngei a apan masakleh Pathian tanchinhoih thumangloute tawpna bangchi phet ahi diam aw?
60004018	Huan, “Midiktat nangawn hotdam liailiai ahih in, Pathian limsak lou leh migiloute koi ah bang asuak ding ua?”
60004019	Huaiziak in Pathian hoihsak bang a thuakte'n thil hoih hih in akhate uh Siampa muanhuaitak kiang ah kemsak hen.
60005001	Huchi in na lak ua saptuam upate kei na upatpih uh, Khrist thuaknate theipa leh thupina hong lang ding tang sam ding in hiai bang in ka hon hanthawn hi:
60005002	Na lak ua Pathian belamhonte ching unla, enkol un, sawl teitei ziak hilou in, Pathian hon deihna bang hi zaw in, punna thanghuai deih ziak hilou in, kithalawptak zaw in,
60005003	na tante uh tung ah kiliansak tuan lou in belamhonte zuih ding a kibawl zaw in, kem un.
60005004	Huchi in Belamchingpa lianpen ahong lat chiang in, Thupina Lallukhu tul thei lou na mu ding uhi.
60005005	Huchi mah bang in, nou valnoute aw, upate nuai ah lut un. Ahi, na vek ua nna kisepsaktuah chiat ding in thunuailutna in kithuam un; “Pathian in kisatheite adou a, kingaineute bel hehpihna ape nak hi.”
60005006	Huaiziak in ahuntak a nou ahon pahtawi theihna ding in, Pathian khut hattak nuai ah kihihniam un;
60005007	ama'n ahon limsak gige ziak in na mangbatna tengteng uh amah tung ah nga vek un.
60005008	Pilvang unla, limsak un; na melma uh diabol, humpinelkai humham bang in anawmvalh ding zong in avialvak hi.
60005009	Na unau uh khovel a omte tung ah huchibang thuaknate atung sam chih thei in gingkiptak a om in, amah dou un.
60005010	Huan hehpihna tengteng Pathian, atangtawn thupina tang ding a Khrist a nou hon sampa ngei in, sawt lou kal na thuak nung un ahoih bukim a hon bawl in, hon hihkip in, ahon hihhat ding hi.
60005011	Amah kiang ah vaihawmna tangtawn in om hen, Amen.
60005012	Ka unaupa muanhuaitak Silvanas khut in, noumau hanthawn leh huai Pathian hehpihna taktak ahi chih thei in, tomchik in na kiang uah ka gelh ahi; huaite ah dingkip un.
60005013	Babulon a om noumau bang a telnu'n chibai ahon buk hi; huchibang in ka tapa Marka in leng chibai ahon buk ahi.
60005014	Itna kitawpna a tawp in chibai kibuk un, na lak ua Khrist a om peuhmahte kiang ah khamuanna om hen, Amen.
61001001	Simon Peter, Jesu Khrist sikha leh sawltak in, i Pathian leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist diktatna ziak a ginna manphatak i tan bang tang samte kiang ah:
61001002	‍Pathian leh Jesu i Toupa theihna ah hehpihna leh khamuanna noute ah hihkhan in om hen.
61001003	Ama thupina leh hoihna ziak a hon sampa, atanchin theih ziak in ama Pathianna thilhihtheihna in hinna leh Pathian limsakna lam thu ah thil tengteng ahon peta hi.
61001004	‍Huaite ziak in athuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ahon pia hi; huchi in utna ziak a khovel a siatna hong om taikhiaksan in; huai thuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ziak in Pathian omdan na kikoppih thei sam ding uhi.
61001005	Ahi, huaiziak tak in, thanop himhim suah in, na ginna uah hoihna hel unla, na hoihna uah theihna hel unla,
61001006	‍na theihna uah kidekna hel unla, na kidekna uah kuhkalna hel unla, na kuhkalna uah Pathian limsakna hel unla,
61001007	‍na Pathian limsakna uah unaute itna hel unla, na unaute itna ah itna hel un.
61001008	‍Hiai hoihnate nou a ahih a, akhan zelleh i Toupa Jesu Khrist theihna lam ah thadah lou leh gah lou lou in nou ahon bawl ding hi.
61001009	‍Kuapeuh huai thilte nei lou mittaw, naichikte kia mu thei, anidanglai khelhnate siansakna mangngilhte ahi uhi.
61001010	‍Huaiziak in unaute aw, nou ahon sapna leh ahon telna hihkip ding in thanop suah semsem un; huaite na hih uleh chik lai mah in na puk kei ding uhi.
61001011	‍Huchi in Jesu Khrist i Toupa leh Hondampa'n tangtawn gam a lutna ahon musak lo mahmah ding hi.
61001012	‍Huaiziak in huai thilte nei in na kiang ua om thutak a phuhkip hita mah le uchin, huai thutak mah ka hon theisak nawn ding hi.
61001013	‍Huan hiai pumpi a ka om lai teng noumau hon theihpih in hon tohhalh gige hoih ka sa hi.
61001014	‍I Toupa Jesu Khrist in hon theihsak bang in ka pumpi puanin koihkhiak hun ding hong tung pah ding chih ka thei hi.
61001015	Ahi ka paikhiak nung in huai thilte na theihgigena ding un ka kisuk ding hi.
61001016	‍I Toupa Jesu Khrist thilhihtheihna leh ahong paina thu ka hon theihsak lai un, tangthu piltak a ngaihtuahkhiak phet zui ka hi kei ua, athupina mute ka hi zaw uhi.
61001017	Ama'n Pa Pathian kiang a kipan in pahtawina leh thupina amu a, huchih lai in thupina thupitak a kipan in hichibang aw akiang ahong tung hi, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak, ka kipahna mahmah ahi,” chi in.
61001018	‍Huan tang siangthou a akiang a ka om ziak un huai aw van a kipan a hong suak koumau ngei in ka za uhi.
61001019	‍Huchi in genkholhna thu kip nawn sem i nei uhi. Khua ahong vak a, zingsol aksi na lungtang ua ahong suah masiah hiai thu khawnvak mun mial a vak alimsak bang ua, na limsak uleh na hihhoih ding uhi.
61001020	‍Laisiangthou a thugenkholh himhim eimah kihilhchet ding ahi kei chih thei masa un.
61001021	‍Thugenkholh himhim mihing thu a pawt ahi ngei kei a, mite'n Kha Siangthou sawl in, Pathian a kipan agen zaw uhi.
61002001	Himahleh mite lak ah zawlnei takloute leng ahong pawt ua, huchi mah bang in na lak uah heutu takloute ahong om ding uhi, amaute leipa Toupa hilhial tawpsan in mi hihse thei ginna tuam, aguk in ahon lutpih ding ua, amau tung ah thakhat in manthatna atungsak ding uhi.
61002002	‍Mi tampi in azautatna lam thil uh ahon ching ding ua, amaute ziak in lampi dik gensiat ahi ding hi.
61002003	‍Sum deihna ziak in zuauthu in sumsinna ding in nou ahon zang ding uh, himahleh nidanglai a omsa amohtanna ding uh akhawl kei a, amanthatna uh leng a-ihmu kei hi.
61002004	Angelte'n thil ahihkhelh un Pathian in ahawi kei a, gawtmun ah apai a, vaihawm ding in phaizang khuk thuk mial ah akhum hi.
61002005	Amah limsakloute omna khovel ah tuichim tungsak in, nidanglai khovel ahawi kei a, himahleh Noah, diktatna thugenpa midang sagih toh ahondamta hi.
61002006	‍Sodom leh Gomorrah khuate amah limsak lou hong om dingte etsakna ding in azang a, vut suaksak in hihmangthang in siam louh atangsakta hi;
61002007	‍huan midiktat Lot, migiloute omdan huktak ziak a lungkham mahmah pa ahondamta hi.
61002008	‍Huai midiktatpa alak ua a-om in, amit in amu a, abil in aza a, dan lou bang a athilhihte un alungsim diktat niteng in ahih na mahmah hi.
61002009	‍Toupa'n amah limsak mite khemna a pan hotkhiakdan leh diktatloute vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan athei hi.
61002010	‍Utna thanghuai lam a sa bang a om leh vai hawmsakna musit mite ngial houh vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan atheisem hi. Haihan leh chihhak ahi ua, amithupite agensiat un leng aling kei uhi.
61002011	Angel hatna leh thilhihtheihna neite'n amaute dem in Toupa ma ah agense ngei kei uhi.
61002012	‍Himahleh hiaite'n bel ganhing ngaihtuahna nei lou, mat a hihman dingte bang in, thil atheihlouhte uh agensia uhi.
61002013	Amau diktatlouhna gah lou in asegawp ding ua, suntang lai a zu leh sa kham a buai nuamsami ahi uh. Na kiang ua ankuang alui un, amau kikhemna ankuanglui ahih ziak un, thanghuaina gensiatna ahi uhi.
61002014	‍Mit angkawmna a dim, khelhna tawpsan theiloute anei ua; mikiploute akhempuk ua; en hat lungsim apu ua; hamsethuak tate ahi uhi.
61002015	‍Beor tapa Balaam, thilhihkhelhna, loh deihpa lampi atot ziak un lam dik paisan in avakmang uhi.
61002016	‍Himahleh amah atatlekna ziak in taihilh in a-omta a; sabiltung pau thei lou mihing pau in ahong pau a, zawlnei haina akham hi.
61002017	‍Hiaite tuikhuk tui om lou leh tuimei huihpi mutleng ahi ua; amaute a ding in nuailam mial sah meuhmouh sit ahita hi.
61002018	‍Thugina lou chiak zen a gen in gitlouhna lak a kipan a taikhete, taksa utna ah hukna in akhempuk nak uhi.
61002019	Amau siatna sikha hi kawmpi in mite sikha suahtakna thu achiam nak uhi; mite'n zohsa achihte mah in amau sikha in abawl nak hi.
61002020	Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist atheih ziak ua khovel thanghuainate ataikhiaksan nung ua, huai mah a apuk nawn ua, zoh a a-om nawn ualeh zaw, amasa sang in a-omdan nanung uh ahong hoih keizaw hi.
61002021	‍Diktatna lampi pen theih nung a, thupiak siangthou akiang ua kepsak nungngatsan sang in, diktatna lampi thei lou hi le uh amau a ding in ahoihzaw ding hi.
61002022	“Ui ama luak ah akik nawn a, vokpi kisilsiangsa leng buannawi ah kisil ding in akik nawn chih paunak diktak amaute tung ah atungta hi.”
61003001	Deihtakte aw, tua na kiang ua ka gelh laikhak nihna ahi. Hiaite gel ah theih thak nawnna in na lungsim siang uh ka tokthou hi.
61003002	‍Zawlnei siangthoute thugenkholh leh na sawltakte uh kam a Toupa leh Hondampa thupiak na theihgigena ding un.
61003003	‍Hiai thei masa un, ni nanungte ah, misimmoh hatte amau utna bang a om in, simmoh kawm in ahong pai ding uhi.
61003004	‍Ahong pai nawnna thuchiam koi ah? Siam tung a kipan bangkim a-om ngeingei bang in pi-le-pute ihmut ni a kipan in a-om zel ngal a! ahon chi ding uhi.
61003005	‍Pathian thu in nidanglai pek in vante ahong om achih akitheihmohbawl ua, tui a kipan leh tui zang a leitung kibawl ahi a,
61003006	‍huai tui mah in atum a, amangthangta hi.
61003007	‍Himahleh tua vante leh lei omte huai thu mah in Pathian limsak lou mite vaihawm leh manthat ni a ding a sit in mei hihsiat ding a kholkhawm ahita hi.
61003008	‍Himahleh deihtakte aw, hiai thu kam khat pen mangngilh kei un, Toupa ngaih in ni khat tuh kum sangkhat bang ahi a, huan kum sangkhat leng ni khat bang ahi, chih.
61003009	‍Mi khenkhat in zekai asak bang un Toupa zaw athuchiam ah azekai kei hi; kuamah manthat deih lou a, mi tengteng hong kisik deih in noumau lam ah adohzou zaw ahi.
61003010	‍Himahleh Toupa ni zaw guta bang in ahong tung ding; huai ni chiang in nakpitak a ging in vante amangthang ding, thilbulte mei a haitui in a-om ding a, lei leh asung a nasep omte, akangtum ding hi.
61003011	‍Huai thilte huchibang a mangthang vek ding uh ahi chih na theih un, omdan siangthou leh Pathian limsakna lam ah mi bangchibang hi ding na hi ua.
61003012	‍Pathian' Ni ahong tun baihna ding lamen leh phatuamngaitak a ngak in; huai ni atun ziak in vante hong kang in amangthang dia, thilbulte leng mei a haltui in a-omta ding hi.
61003013	‍Himahleh athuchiam bang in van thak leh lei thak, asung a diktatna omte i lamen hi.
61003014	‍Huaiziak in deihtakte aw, huai bang thilte na lamet ziak un nin baang lou leh gensiatbei in, khamuangtak a na om uh ahon muhtheihna ding in thanop suah un.
61003015	‍Huan i unaupa deihtak Paul in leng akiang a pilna piak bang zel a na kiang ua agelh bang in Toupa dohzohna hotdamna in sim un.
61003016	Alaikhak tengteng ah huai thute gen in, huai mah bang in agelh hi. Huai ah thu theihhak thu thukte a-om a, huaite mipil lou leh mikiploute'n Laisiangthou dang angaihkawi bang un angaikawi ua, amau leh amau siatna ding in azang uhi.
61003017	‍Huchi in deihtakte aw, noute'n tua thute na theihkholh ziak un pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw migiloute diklouhna a pimang a om in, na kipna ua kipan na pukkha ding uhi.
61003018	‍Himahleh i Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist hehpihna leh theihna ah hong khang un. Tu leh tangtawn in amah kiang ah thupina om hen, Amen.
62001001	Hinna thu, atung a kipan a ana omta, koute'n ka zak uh, ka mit ua ka muh uh, ka et kilkel ua, ka khut ua ka khoih uh,
62001002	‍huai hinna latsak in ahong omta a, koute'n ka mu uhi, huai tangtawn hinna, Pa kiang a-omleh koute kiang ah latsak a om noute kiang ah ka hon puang uhi;
62001003	‍huai koute'n ka muhsa uh leh ka zaksa uh mah noute kiang a ka puankhiak uh, huchi a noute'n leng koute toh kithuahna na neihtheihna ding un; koute kithuahna bel Pa toh a Tapa Jesu Khrist toh kithuahna ahi.
62001004	‍Noute na kipahna uh abukimna ding in hiai ka hon gelh uhi.
62001005	‍Huan thukhah akiang a kipan a ka zak uh na kiang ua ka hon hilhsawn uh hiai ahi; Pathian zaw vak ahi a, amah ah mial a-om kei hi.
62001006	‍Mial a om napi in amah ka kithuahpih chi lehang zuau i gen a, thutak i zui kei uhi.
62001007	‍Himahleh amah vak a a-om bang a eite leng vak a i omleh i kithuah chiat ua, huan a Tapa Jesu sisan in i khelhna tengteng ahon silsiangsak zel hi.
62001008	‍Khelhna ka nei kei chi lehang eimah leh eimah i kikhem a, eimah ah thutak a-om kei hi.
62001009	‍I khelhnate thupha i tawileh i khelhnate ngaidam ding leh i diktatlouhna tengteng silsiang ding in amah amuanhuai in adiktat hi.
62001010	‍Thil ka hihkhial kei i chihleh amah zuauthei in i bawl ua, athu leng ei ah a-om kei hi.
62002001	Ka naute aw, thil na hihkhelhlouhna ding un hiai thute na kiang uah ka gelh ahi. Kuapeuh in thil ahihkhelhleh Pa kiang a hon gensakpa, Jesu Khrist, midiktat i nei hi.
62002002	Amah i khelhnate thuphatawina ahi, eimah khelhna kia hilou in, khovel tengteng khelhna thuphatawina leng ahi.
62002003	‍Huan athupiakte i zuihleh huai ah amah i thei chih i kithei hi.
62002004	Athupiakte zui lou a, “Amah ka thei,” chimi zaw mizuauthei ahi, amah ah thutak a-om kei hi.
62002005	‍Kuapeuh athu zui peuhmah amah ah Pathian itna akim petmah hi. Amah ah i om chih hiai ah i kithei ahi.
62002006	Amah ah ka om gige chimi, amah om bang in a-om sam ding ahi.
62002007	‍Deihtakte aw, thupiak thak na kiang uah ka gelh kei a; thupiak lui atung a kipan a na neih uh ka gelh zaw ahi. Huai thupiak lui na thu theihsa pen uh ahi.
62002008	‍Himahleh thupiak thak gelh hi sam na veng, huai amah ah leh noumau ah alang hi, mial aman lellel ziak in leh vak taktak tua ahong vak tak ziak in.
62002009	A-unau ho napi a, vak ah ka om chimi tutan in leng mial ah a-om gige hi.
62002010	A-unau itmi bel vak ah a-om gige a, amah ah kipalpaihna ding san a-om kei hi.
62002011	A-unau homi zaw mial ah a-om a, mial ah akhosa a, mial in amit atotsak ziak in apaina leng athei kei hi.
62002012	‍Naute aw, ama min ziak a na khelhnate uh ngaihdam ahih tak ziak in na kiang uah ka gelh ahi.
62002013	‍Pate aw, amah atung a kipan a om gige na theih ziak un na kiang uah ka gelh ahi. Tangvalte aw, Pathian thu noumau ah a-om gige a, giloupa na zoh tak ziak un na kiang uah ka gelh ahi. Naute aw, Pa na theih ziak un na kiang uah ka gelh ahi.
62002014	‍Pate aw, amah atung a kipan a om gige na theih ziak un na kiang uah ka gelh ahi. Tangvalte aw, na hat ua Pathian thu noumau ah a-om gige a, migilou na zoh tak ziak un na kiang uah ka gelh ahi.
62002015	‍Khovel it kei unla, khovel a thil omte leng it sam kei un. Mi kuapeuh in khovel a-itleh Pa itna amah ah a-om kei hi.
62002016	‍Khovel a thil om tengteng, taksa utnate, mit utnate, damsung thupina limte Pa a kipan ahi kei a, khovel a kipan ahi zaw hi.
62002017	‍Khovel, a-utnate toh amangthang lellel ahi. Pathian deihlam hihmi bel tangtawn in a-om gige ding hi.
62002018	‍Naute aw, hun nanungpen hita e, Khrist doupa ahong pai ding chih na zak bang un tu in leng Khrist doumi tampitak ahong pawtta uhi; huaiziak in hun nanungpen ahita chih i thei uhi.
62002019	Amaute i lak ua kipan in apawt ua, himahleh ei sung mi tak ahi kei uh; ei sung mi tak hi le uh i kiang uah a-om sam ding uhi; himahleh avek un ei sung mi tak ahi kei uh chih alatchetna ding in ahon pawtsanta uhi.
62002020	‍Mi Siangthou kiang a kipan thaunilhna na tang ua, bangkim na thei uhi.
62002021	‍Thutak na theih louh ziak ua ka gelh ahi kei a, na theih ziak uh leh thutak a zuau bangmah apawt ngei louh ziak in ka gelh ahi zaw hi.
62002022	‍Jesu tuh Khrist ahi chih gingtaloumi sang a zuauthei kua a-om a? Khrist doumi tuh Pa leh Tapa gingtaloumi ahi.
62002023	‍Kuapeuh Tapa nial in Pa anei kei a; kuapeuh Tapa gingta in bel Pa leng asang hi.
62002024	‍Nou zaw atung a kipan a na zak uh noumau ah omsak gige un. Huai atung a kipan a na zak uh noumau a a-om gigeleh noute ngei leng Tapa leh Pa ah na om gige ding uhi.
62002025	‍Hiai ahi amah ngei in ahon chiam pen: tangtawn hinna.
62002026	‍Noumau hon pimang tumte tungtang na kiang uah ka gelh ahi.
62002027	‍Nou zaw amah kiang a kipan a thaunilhna na tan uh noumau ah a-om gige a, kuamah hilh na kiphamoh kei uhi; ama thaunilhna in thil tengteng ahon sinsak bang in leh hiai thudik hi a, zuau leng ahih louh ziak in huai in nou ahon sinsak bang in amah ah om gige un.
62002028	‍Huchi in naute aw, amah ah om gige un; amah ahong kilak chiang in ama ah zum lou in hangsantak in i om thei ding uhi.
62002029	Amah midiktat ahi chih na theih uleh mi kuapeuh diktatna hihmi amah a suak ahi chih na thei uhi.
62003001	Ngai un, Pa hon itna thupi hi na tel e! Pathian tate chih a i om; huai mah i hihna uh ahi hi. Hiai khawng ziak in khovel in ahon thei kei hi, amah atheih louh ziak in.
62003002	‍Deihtakte aw, tu'n ah Pathian tate i hi ua, bangchi in ahia i om ding chih akithei tadih kei hi; amah ahong kilak chiang in, amah bang in i om ding chih bel i thei hi, amah a-om ngeingei bangtak a mu ding i hi ngal ua.
62003003	Amah tung a lametna nei peuhmah amah asiangthou bang in akihihsiangthou hi.
62003004	‍Kuapeuh thil hihkhial dan ah atalek hi; dan a tatlekna khelhna ahi ngal a.
62003005	Amah khelhnate lamang ding in ahong langta chih na thei uhi; amah ah khelhna bangmah a-om kei hi.
62003006	‍Kuapeuh amah a om gige in thil ahihkhial kei; kuapeuh thil hihkhial in amah amu kei a, amah leng athei kei hi.
62003007	‍Tate aw, kuamah khem in om kei un. Diktatna hihmi amah adiktat mah bang in adiktat hi.
62003008	‍Thil hihkhialmi zaw diabol a pawt ahi; diabol in atung a kipan thil ahihkhial hi. Pathian Tapa hong latna pen diabol nasepte ahihmanthat theihna ding in ahi.
62003009	‍Kuapeuh Pathian a suak in amah a Pathian chi a-om gige ziak in thil ahihkhial kei, Pathian a suak ahih ziak in, thil ahihkhial thei kei hi.
62003010	‍Hiai ah Pathian tate leh diabol tate atheihtheih hi; kuapeuh diktatna hih lou Pathian a suak ahi kei a, a-unau it lou leng Pathian a suak ahi kei hi.
62003011	Atung a kipan thukhah na zak uh i ki-ittuah chiat ding uh chih ahi.
62003012	‍Kain, giloupa a kipan amah unau thatpa bang in om kei ni. Bangziak in ahia athah tak? Amah thilhihte agilou a, a-unau thilhihte adik ziak in ahi.
62003013	‍Naute aw, khovel in nou ahon huatleh lamdang sa kei un.
62003014	‍Unaute i it ziak in sihna a kipan in i pawt ua, hinna ah i lutta chih i thei uhi. Kuapeuh itna nei lou sihna ah a-om lai hi.
62003015	‍Kuapeuh a-unau hua tualthat ahi; tualthatmi tangtawn hinna nei a-om kei uh chih na thei uhi.
62003016	‍Hiai ah itna bang ahia chih i thei hi, ama'n eite a dia ahinna apiak tak ziak in; en leng unaute a ding in i hinna i piak sam ding ahi.
62003017	‍Himahleh kuapeuh in khovel sum nei in, a-unau tasam in mu henla, amah lainat tuan kei taleh Pathian itna amah ah bangchi in a-om dia?
62003018	‍Naute aw, thu kia in it kei ni, lei kia in leng it sam kei ni, thilhih leh thutak in hi zaw hen.
62003019	‍Hiai in thutak a suak i hi chih hon theisak a, amah ma ah i lungtang i muangsak thak ding hi.
62003020	‍I lungtang in siam louh ahon tansak dek chiang in chihna ahi; Pathian zaw i lungtangte sang in alianzaw a thil bangkim athei hi.
62003021	‍Deihtakte aw, i lungtang in siam louh ahon tan keileh Pathian lam ah i hangsan hi;
62003022	athupiakte i zuih ua, amitmuh a thil kipahhuai i hih zel ziak in i nget peuhmah amah a kipan in i mu zel uhi.
62003023	‍Huan athupiak hiai ahi, a Tapa Jesu Khrist min gingta lehang, ama'n thu ahon piak bang in ki-ittuah chiat lai lehang.
62003024	Athupiakte zuimi amah ah a-om gige a, amah mah leng amah ah a-om gige hi. Huan Kha ahon piak ah amah eimau ah a-om gige chih i thei uhi.
62004001	Deihtakte aw, kha napeuh gingta kei un, himahleh khate Pathian a kipan ahi uhiam hilou chih chian un; khovel a zawlnei taklou tampi ana pawt tak ziak un.
62004002	‍Hiai ah Pathian Kha na thei ding uh, bang kha peuh Jesu Khrist, sa in ahong pai chih gum tuh Pathian a kipan ahi.
62004003	‍Bang kha peuh Jesu gum lou Pathian a kipan ahi kei; huai tuh Khrist doumi kha, hong pai ding na zak uh ahi; tu in khovel ah a-om khinta hi.
62004004	‍Naute aw, Pathian a kipan na hi ua, tuate na zouta uhi; noumau a om khovel a om sang a athupi zawk ziak in.
62004005	Amau khovel a ahi ua; huaiziak in khovel a bang in apau ua, khovel in athu uh angaikhia hi.
62004006	‍Eite Pathian a kipan i hi ua, Pathian thei mite'n i thu angaikhe zel uhi; Pathian a kipan lou mite'n bel i thu angaikhe kei uhi. Hiai ah thutak Kha leh thutak lou kha i thei uhi.
62004007	‍Deihtakte aw, i ki-ittuah chiat ding uh; itna zaw Pathian a suak ahi ngal a, michih itna nei peuhmah Pathian a suak ahi khin ua, Pathian athei lai uhi.
62004008	‍Itna nei lou in Pathian athei kei; Pathian itna ahih ziak in.
62004009	‍Hiai ah Pathian itna i tung uah ahong langta hi, amah ziak a i hintheihna ding a Pathian in a Tapa neihsun khovel a ahon sawlna ah.
62004010	‍Hiai ah itna a-om, eite'n Pathian i it uh ka chi ahi kei, ama'n ahon it a, i khelhnate thuphatawina ding in, a Tapa ahon sawl ka chi zaw hi.
62004011	‍Deihtakte aw, Pathian in huchi tel a ahon itleh eite leng i ki-ittuah chiat ding uh ahi.
62004012	‍Kuamah in chik lai mah in Pathian amu ngei kei hi. I ki-ittuah chiat uleh ei ah Pathian a-om gige dia, a-itna leng eite sung ah akim lai ding hi.
62004013	Amah ah i om gige chih leh amah eite sung ah a-om gige chih Kha a hon piak tak ziak in hiai ah i thei hi.
62004014	‍Huan Pa in Tapa khovel Hondampa hihna nei in ahon sawl chih i muta ua, i theisak uhi.
62004015	‍Kuapeuh Jesu Pathian Tapa ahi chi a gum amah ah Pathian a-om gige a, amah leng Pathian ah a-om gige hi.
62004016	‍Pathian in eite a ding in itna anei chih i theita ua, i gingta lai uhi. Pathian itna ahi; itna a om gige mi Pathian ah a-om a, Pathian leng amah ah a-om hi.
62004017	‍Hiai ah i tung uah itna akimta, vaihawm ni a ding a lau lou a i omtheihna ah; amah om bang a khovel a i om ziak in.
62004018	‍Itna ah launa a-om kei, itna kim in lauhna adelhkhe zaw zel hi, lauhna in gawtna ahon ngaihtuahsak; alaumi peuhmah itna ah abukim nai kei hi.
62004019	Ama'n ahon it masak ziak in i it uhi.
62004020	‍Mi'n, “Pathian ka it,” chi in a-unau ho taleh amah zuauthei ahi; a-unau amuhsa bawn a-it kei in, Pathian amuh ngei louhpi bangchi in a-it thei dia?
62004021	Amah kiang a kipan in hiai thupiak i nei uhi, kuapeuh in Pathian a-itleh a-unau leng a-it sam ding chihna ahi.
62005001	Kuapeuh Jesu, Khrist ahi chih gingta Pathian suahsak ahi; kuapeuh asuaksakpa it in asuahsak leng a-it nak hi.
62005002	‍Hiai ah Pathian tate i itna ah Pathian i it a, athupiakte i zui chih i thei uhi.
62005003	‍Pathian i itna hiai ahi, athupiakte i zuihna; athupiakte lah ahaksa ngal kei hi.
62005004	‍Pathian suahsak peuh in khovel azou zel hi; hiai ahi khovel tung a vualzohna, i ginna uh.
62005005	‍Jesu, Pathian Tapa ahi chih gingtami kia ngal lou, kua'n khovel azou zel a?
62005006	‍Hiai ahi tui leh sisan a hong paipa, Jesu Khrist; tui kia ah hilou in, tui ah leh sisan ah ahi zaw. Theisakpa tuh Kha ahi, Kha thutak ahih ziak in.
62005007	‍Van tung ah theihpih thum a-om, Pa, Thu leh Kha Siangthou ahi ua, amaute khat ahi uhi.
62005008	‍Leitung ah theihpih thum a-om, Kha leh tui leh sisan; huai thumte akithutuak uhi.
62005009	‍Mihing theihpihna bawn i sanleh Pathian theihpihna athupizaw hi. Pathian theihpihna tuh a Tapa tanchin atheipihta chih ahi.
62005010	‍Pathian Tapa gingtami in amah ah theihna anei a, Pathian gingtaloumi in amah zuauthei in abawl hi; Pathian in a Tapa tanchin atheihpih agintak louh ziak in.
62005011	‍Theihpihna hiai ahi, Pathian in tangtawn hinna ahon pia a, huai hinna a Tapa ah a-om hi.
62005012	‍Kuapeuh Tapa nei in hinna anei; kuapeuh Pathian Tapa nei lou in hinna anei kei hi.
62005013	‍Tangtawn hinna na nei uh chih na theihna ding un, nou Pathian Tapa min gingtate kiang ah hiai thu ka gelh ahi.
62005014	‍Hiai pen amah tung a i hangsanna ahi, bangpeuh ama deihlam bang a i ngetleh ama'n ahon ngaihkhiaksak hi.
62005015	‍Huchi in bangpeuh i nget ahon ngaihkhiaksak chih i theihleh akiang a i thilnget i muta chih i thei hi.
62005016	‍Kuapeuh in a-unau sihna khop hilou khelhna hih in muleh angetsak ding, huchi in Pathian in an genmi kiang ah sihna tun hilou khelhna hihte a ding in hinna ape ding hi. Sihna tun khelhna a-om a; huchibang lam ah angetsak ding ka chi ahi kei hi.
62005017	‍Diktatlouhna tengteng khelhna ahi; sihna khop hilou khelhna leng a-om sam hi.
62005018	‍Kuapeuh Pathian suahsak in thil ahihkhial kei chih i thei hi; Pathian Tapa neihsun in amah akem gige a, giloupa'n khoih leng akhoih thei kei hi.
62005019	‍Huan eite Pathian a kipan i hi chih i thei ua, khovel pumpi bel giloupa thuthu in a-om chih i thei hi.
62005020	‍Huan Pathian Tapa ahong pai a, adikpa i theihna ding in theihtheihna ahon pia chih i thei behlap uhi; eite a Tapa Jesu Khrist a i om in adikpa ah i om uhi. Amah tuh Pathian diktak leh tangtawn hinna ahi.
62005021	‍Naute aw, milim lak ah kihemkhia un, Amen.
63001001	‍Upa in, tel a om numei leh atate thutak a ka it, kei kia hilou a, thutak thei peuhmahte kiang ah;
63001002	‍thutak eimah a om gige, tangtawn a i kiang ua om gige ding ahih ziak in;
63001003	‍Pa Pathian a kipan leh Pa' Tapa, Toupa Jesu Khrist a kipan hehpihna, zahngaihna, leh khamuanna in thutak leh itna ah noute hon ompih hen.
63001004	‍Pa kiang a kipan athupiak i muh bang in na ta kuate hiam thutak a om a ka muh ziak in ka kipak mahmah hi.
63001005	‍Numei hoih, na kiang a thupiak thak gelh hilou in, atung a kipan a i neih pen gelh zaw in, i ki-ittuah theihna ding in nget petmah in ka hon ngen hi.
63001006	‍Huan hiai itna ahi, athupiak bang zel a i omna uh. Hiai ahi thupiak atung a kipat ana zak uh, huai ah na om ding uh ahi.
63001007	‍Jesu Khrist taksa in ahong pai chih gum lou khemmi tampi khovel ah ahong pawtta uhi. Huai mite ahi, khemmi leh Khrist doumi.
63001008	‍I sepkhiaksate mangsak lou a, akipahman bukim a i muhtheihna ding un, nangmah kivenghoih in.
63001009	‍Kuapeuh huai Khrist thu sinsakna thu a om gige lou a talek in Pathian anei kei. Huai thu sinsakna thu a a-om gige in Pa leh Tapa aneikhawm hi.

66004005	‍Huai laltutphah a kipan in khophiate, awte leh vanpigingte ahong suakkhia hi. Huan mei khawnvak sagih, laltutphah ma ah akuang a, huaite Pathian Kha sagihte ahi uhi.
66004006	‍Huai laltutphah ma ah kristal bang a siang limlang tuipi a-om hi. Huai laltutphah kimvel ah thil hing nunglam leh malam mit a dim a-om uhi.
66004007	Thil hing khatna humpinelkai bang ahi a, thil hing nihna bawngnou bang ahi a, thil hing thumna in mihing mai bang anei hi, thil hing lina muvanlai leng lai bang ahi.
66004008	‍Huai thil hing lite'n kha guk anei chiat ua, akimvel leh asunglam mit ngen a dim ahi a; amaute'n sun leh zan khawl lou in: “Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou, Toupa Pathian, Bangkim hihthei, omsa leh omlel leh hong om ding,” achi uhi.
66004009	‍Huan huai amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh huai amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa kiang a thil hingte'n, thupina leh zahhuaina leh kipahna thu apiak chiang un,
66004010	amah laltutphah tung a tupa ma ah upa sawmnih-le-lite abokkhup uhi, huai laltutphah ma a alallukhute uh koih in, amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa abia uhi.
66004011	“Nang ka Toupa leh ka Pathian uh, thupina, zahhuaina, thilhihtheihna mu tak na hi; thil tengteng nang na siam a, nang thu ziak a om leh siam ahi uhi,” achi uhi.
66005001	Huai laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam ah laibuzial, asunglam leh apolam kigelh chiamtehna sagih a kichiamteh ka mu hi.
66005002	Angel hat khat in aw ngaihtak in, “Kua ahia laibuzial hong a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham?” chi a puangkhia ka mu hi.
66005003	‍Huan van tung hi in, leitung hiam, ahihkeileh lei nuai ah leng huai laibuzial hong thei hiam, ahihkeileh atung en thei kuamah a-om kei hi.
66005004	‍Huchi in huai laibuzial hong a sim tak hiam, ahihkeileh atung en tak kuamah a-om louh ziak in ka kapkap hi.
66005005	‍Huan upate lak a khat in ka kiang ah, “Kap ke'nla ngai in, humpinelkai, Judah nam a, David Zung in, laibuzial hong thei ding leh huai a chiamtehna sagihte phel thei ding in avualzouta,” achi hi.
66005006	‍Huan huai laltutphah leh huai thil hing lite leh huai upate lai ah thahsa hileh kilawm, Belamnou, kii sagih leh mit sagih nei dingh ka mu a, huai mit sagihte Pathian kha sagih leitung tengteng a sawlkhiakte ahi uhi.
66005007	Amah ahong pai a, laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam a kipan laibuzial ala hi.
66005008	‍Huai laibuzial alaktak in, thil hing lite leh upa sawmnih-le-lite, gosem khat chiat leh dangka-eng belhbute gimnamtui a dim chiat tawi in, Belamnou ma ah abokkhup ua, huaite gimnamtui misiangthoute thumna ahi.
66005009	‍Huan la thak khat asa uhi: “Laibuzial la a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham na hi; thah in na omta a, chi chih leh pau chih leh michih leh nam chih a mite Pathian a ding a na sisan a na lei tak ziak in.
66005010	Ka Pathian kiang uah amau lalgam leh siampute hi ding in na bawl a; amaute'n leitung ah vai ahawm ding uh,” chi in.
66005011	‍Huan ka etleh, laltutphah leh thil hingte leh upate kimvel ah, angel tampi aw ka za hi. Atamdan uh singkhat mun singkhat leh asang mun sang tampi ahi uh;
66005012	Amau aw ngaihtak in: “Thah a om, Belamnou in hatnate, leh hauhsaknate, leh thilhihtheihnate, leh zahtakhuainate, leh thupinate, leh vualzawlnate mu tham na hi,” chi in akikou uhi.
66005013	‍Huan thilsiam khempeuh van a omte, leitung a omte, lei nuai a omte, tuipi tung a omte leh amau a thil omte tengteng in, “Laltutphah tung a tupa leh Belamnou kiang ah; Vualzawlnate, zahtakhuainate, thupinate leh vaihawmnate, tangtawn tangtawn in om hen,” achih uh ka za hi.
66005014	‍Huan thil hing lite'n, “Amen!” achi ua, huan upate abokkhup ua, abia uhi.
66006001	Belamnou in chiamtehna sagihte lak a khat aphel lai ka mu a, thil hing lite lak a khat aw in, vanpiging bang mai in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi.
66006002	‍Huan ka etleh ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tupa thalpeu tawi ka mu a; amah kiang ah lallukhu piak in a-om a; amah vualzou a vualzou zou zel ding in ahong paikhia hi.
66006003	‍Huan chiamtehna nihna aphel lai in, thil hing nihna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi.
66006004	‍Sakol dang asan khat ahong paikhia a; huai tung a tupa kiang ah leitung a kipan lemna lakhe ding a thupiak ahi a, huchi a amau akithahtuahna ding un; amah kiang a namsau thupi piak ahita hi.
66006005	‍Huan chiamtehna thumna aphel lai in thil hing thumna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Ka etleh ngai in, sakol vom ka mu hi; atung a tupa'n akhut in bukna atawi hi.
66006006	‍Huan thil hing lite lai ah aw hileh kilawm in, “Huit buh tehna dan khat dinari khat, huan barli buh tehna dan thum in dinari khat, huan thau leh uain zaw hihse ke'n,” achih ka za hi.
66006007	‍Chiamtehna lina aphel lai in, thil hing lina aw in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi.
66006008	‍Ka etleh ngai in, sakol daang ka mu hi; atung a tupa min Sihna ahi a, Misikhua toh akizui uhi. Namsau, kial leh sihna leh leitung a gam sahangte thah ding in amau kiang ah leitung seh li suah seh khat tung a thuneihna piak ahita hi.
66006009	‍Chiamtehna ngana aphel lai in, Pathian thu ziak leh azuih uh theihsakna ziak a amau thah a omte maitam nuai ah ka mu hi.
66006010	Amaute aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Toupa Tungnungpen aw, siangthou leh dik bang tan ka sisan man uh amau leitung a tengte tung a thuk lou leh vaihawm lou ding na hia?” achi uhi.
66006011	Amaute kiang ah puanngou thupi piak in a-om chiat ua; amau asikha hihpihte uleh a-unaute uh amau bang a thah a om dingte akim mateng uh na khawl tadih un chi a hilh in a-om uhi.
66006012	‍Chiamtehna gukna aphel lai ka mu a, zinling thupitak a-om hi. Nisa tuh samul sai-ip puan bang in ahong vom a, kha leng apum in sisan bang in asan hi.
66006013	‍Van aksite theipi kung huihpi in amutling a, ahutte apulh bang in leitung ah apulh uhi.
66006014	‍Van laibuzial bang a kizial zou in suanmang in a-omta; tang sangte leh tuikulh gam teng amun ua pat suanmang in a-omta uhi.
66006015	‍Huchi in leitung kumpipate, miliante, heutute leh ahat leh ahaute, salte leh sal lou teng leng tang sangte leh suangpi heng leh kokhukte ah akisel uhi.
66006016	‍Tang sangte kiang leh suangpite kiang ah, “Hon delhlum unla, amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh Belamnou thangpaihna mai a kipan hon sel un;
66006017	athangpaihna ni thupi hong tung hi; kua adingh zou dia?” achi uhi.
66007001	Hiai thilte zoh in angel li, lei kil li a dinghte'n leitung a huih lite leitung a nung lou ding leh tuipi tung hiam, ahihkeileh sing tung hiam a nung lou ding in akhawlsak uhi.
66007002	‍Huan amau chiamtehna a pan angel dang kuantou ka mu hi, Pathian hing chiamtehna anei ua; ama'n huai angel lite leitung leh tuipi hihse ding a piak a omte kiang ah aw ngaihtak a kikou in.
66007003	‍“Pathian sikhate atal ua i chiamteh zoh ma in leitung leh tuipi leh singte hihse kei un,” achi hi.
66007004	‍Huai chiamteh a omte lak a tampi, nuaikhat singli-le-sangli, Israel suan chiteng a kipan chiamteh zah ka za hi.
66007005	‍Judah chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih chiamteh in a-om ua. Reuben chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Gad chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;
66007006	Asher chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Naphtali chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Manasseh chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;
66007007	‍Simeon chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Levi chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Issakar chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;
66007008	‍Zebulun chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih, Joseph chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih, Benjamin chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih.
66007009	‍Hiai thil teng zoh in ka etleh ngai in, mipi tampi kuamah sim seng louh, nam chih leh chi chih leh mi tengteng leh pau tengteng a kipan laltutphah leh Belamnou ma a dingh a, puanngou thupi a kizem a tumnah tawi ka mu a,
66007010	‍huan amau aw ngaihtak in, “Laltutphah a tu i Pathian leh Belamnou kiang ah hotdamna,” chi in akikou uhi.
66007011	Angel tengteng laltutphah leh upate leh thil hing lite kimvel in adingh ua; laltutphah ma a bokkhup in, Pathian abia uhi:
66007012	“Amen! Vualzawlnate, leh thupinate, leh pilnate, leh zahtakhuainate, leh thilhihtheihnate, leh hatnate, tangtawn tangtawn in i Pathian kiang ah om hen,” achi uhi.
66007013	‍Huan upate lak a khat in ka kiang ah, “Hiai puanngou thupi a kizemte kuate ahi ua, koi a kipan a hong pai ahi ua?” chi in ahon houpih a,
66007014	‍ke'n akiang ah, “Ka Toupa, nang na thei hi,” ka chi hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite gimthuakna thupi a kipan hong paite ahi ua, apuan thupi uh sawp in, Belamnou sisan in ahihngou uhi.”
66007015	‍“Huaiziak in Pathian laltutphah ma ah a-om ua, sun leh zan in atempul uah amah asepsak uhi; amah laltutphah tung a tupa'n amau tung ah apuanin azak ding hi.
66007016	Agil uh kial nawn ke'n chin, adang uh tak nawn himhim ke'n teh, amau ni in kang ke'n chin, satna in leng ahihgim kei ding hi.
66007017	Belamnou huai laltutphah lak a om abelamchingpa uh ahih ding ziak in, amau hinna tuikhuk ah api ding a; Pathian in amit ua kipan khitui anulhul ding,” achi hi.
66008001	Chiamtehna sagihna aphel lai in dakkal kimkhat sung van adai sipsip hi.
66008002	‍Huchi in Pathian ma a angel sagih dinghte ka mu a, amaute kiang ah pengkul sagih piak in a-om hi.
66008003	‍Huan angel dang khat ahong pai a, gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel tawi in, maitam kiang ah adingh hi, akiang ah gimnamtui tampi laltutphah ma a om dangka-eng maitam teng a misiangthou tengteng thumna toh hel ding in, piak in a-om hi.
66008004	‍Huai gimnamtui khu leh misiangthoute thumna angel khut a kipan Pathian ma ah azamtou hi.
66008005	Angel in gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel ala a; huai maitam amei in ahihdim a, leitung ah apaikhia a; huan awgingte, van-gingte leh khophiate leh zinlingte ahong om hi.
66008006	‍Huan angel sagih pengkul sagih tawite mut ding in ahong kisa uhi.
66008007	Angel masapen in amut a, sisan toh kihel gial leh mei ahong om hi, huaite leitung a paihkhiak in a-om ua; leitung mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei hi, huan sing mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei a; loupa hing tengteng akangbei hi.
66008008	‍Huan angel nihna in amut a, tang lianpi mei a kang bang a kang hileh kilawm tuipi ah paihkhiak in ahong om a; tuipi mun thum a khen mun khat sisan asuak hi.
66008009	‍Huai tuipi a thil hingte hinna neite mun thum a khen mun khat asi ua; long mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat in a-om hi.
66008010	‍Huan angel thumna in amut a, van a kipan in aksi lianpi, meisel bang a kuang ahong kesuk a, lui mun thum a khen mun khat leh tui tuikhukte tung adeng hi.
66008011	‍Huai aksi min Gamsai ahi; tui mun thum a khen mun khat gamsai asuak hi; tuite hihkhaat a a-om ziak un mi tampi asi uhi.
66008012	‍Huan angel lina in amut a, huan ni mun thum a khen mun khat leh kha mun thum a khen mun khat leh aksi mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat ahong hi a; huchi in avaknate uh mun thum a khen mun khat hihmial in a-om a; sun hun seh thum suah seh khat leh zan hun seh thum suah seh khat beisak in a-om hi.
66008013	‍Huan ka etleh, angel khat van laizawl a leng in aw ngaihtak in, “Tunggik, tunggik, angel thum pengkul mut lai dingte leh huai ging hong om lai dingte ziak in leitung a omte tung agik,” achih ka za hi.
66009001	Angel ngana in amut a, van a kipan leitung a aksi kia ka mu a; amah kiang ah kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi piak in a-om hi.
66009002	Ama'n kokhuk taw nei lou ahong a; huai kokhuk a kipan in meikhu, meipi khu bang mai ahong pawttou a, huai kokhuk a meikhu ziak in ni leh huihkhua hihmial in a-omta hi.
66009003	‍Huan meikhu a kipan in leitung ah khaupete ahong suak ua; aikamte'n thilhihtheihna aneih bang un amau thilhihtheihna piak in a-om uhi.
66009004	Amau leitung a loupate, thil hing himhimte leh sing peuhmahte, hihse lou a, mi kuapeuh atal ua Pathian chiamtehna neiloute kia hihse dia hilh in a-om uhi.
66009005	Amau that lou ding a, kha nga sung amau hihgenthei zaw ding a hilh in a-om ua; huai a hihgentheihna tuh aikam in mi kuahiam ateh a ahihgentheih bang ahi.
66009006	‍Huai ni chiang in mi'n sihna azong ding ua, bangchi mah in amu kei ding uh; sih a-ut ding ua, himahleh sihna in amau ataimangsan ding hi.
66009007	‍Huan khaupete kilatdan sakol kidouna a pang dia bawl bang ahi ua; alutung uah dangka-eng lallukhu hileh kilawm a-om a, amai uh mihingte mai bang ahi.
66009008	‍Numei sam bang sam anei ua, aha uh humpinelkai ha bang ahi.
66009009	A-awm uah sik awmphawte bang anei ua; akhazap ging uh kidouna lam a sakol tampi tai dupdup, kidouna kangtalai tampi ging bang ahi.
66009010	‍Huan aikam bang in meigu nei anei ua, mihingte kha nga sung hihnatna ding in amei uah thilhihtheihna anei uhi.
66009011	Amaute'n kokhuk taw nei lou neitu angel atung ua kumpipa in anei uhi; ama min Hebru pau in Abaddon ahi a, Grik pau in Appolion ahi.
66009012	‍Tunggikna masapen abeita a, ngai in, tunggikna nih tunung chiang in ahong tung lai ding hi.
66009013	‍Huan angel gukna in amut a, Pathian ma a om dangka-eng maitam kii a kipan in aw ka za a;
66009014	‍huai aw in angel gukna pengkul nei kiang ah, “Euphrates luipi lianpi a angel li hen a omte phel in,” achi hi.
66009015	‍Huan mi mun thum a khen mun khat athahtheihna ding ua dak khat, ni khat, kha khat leh kum khat sung kisa a na om, angel lite phel in a-om uhi.
66009016	‍Huan sakol tungtuang sepaih atamdan uh sing ngen mun singnih ahi chi a atamdan uh kigen ka za hi.
66009017	‍Huchibang in kilakna in sakolte leh atung ua tuangte, mei bang a san, engdup leh kaat bang a eng, awmphaw neite ka mu hi; sakolte lu humpinelkai lu bang ahi ua; akam ua kipan in mei leh meikhu leh kaat asuakkhia hi.
66009018	‍Huan akamsung ua kipan a hong pawtkhia huai hipi thum, mei, meikhu leh kaat in mihing mun thum a khen mun khat thah in a-om uhi.
66009019	‍Huai sakolte thilhihtheihna akam uh leh amei ua om ahi a; amei uh gulpi mei toh akibang ua, lu leng anei ua, huaite in mi ahih na uhi.
66009020	‍Huan midang huai gawtna a siloute akhut ua sepkhiakte ah akisik tuan kei ua; dawite, dangka-engte, milimte, dangka milimte, suang milimte leh sing milimte; mu theiloute, za thei lou leh tang theiloute be nawn lou ding in akisik tuan kei uhi.
66009021	‍Huan atualthahna uh, ami bumna uh leh akingaihna khelhna uh leh aguktakna uh akisik tuan kei uhi.
66010001	Huan meipi puansilh a kizem van a kipan angel hat dang hong paikhesuk ka mu hi; alutung ah sakhituihup a-om a, amai nisa mah abang a, akhete mei khuamte bang mai ahi.
66010002	Akhut a laibuzial neuchik honsa atawi a; akhe taklam a tuipi tung sik in akhe veilam leitung ah anga hi.
66010003	‍Humpinelkai humham bang in aw ngaihtak in akikou a; akikou khit in vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuah uhi.
66010004	‍Huan vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuahtak un gelh ding in ka kisa hi; van a kipan aw in, “Vanpiging sagihte' thugen iim bikbek inla gelhkhe ke'n,” achih ka za hi.
66010005	‍Huan tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh ka muh in van lam ah akhut taklam aliktou a;
66010006	‍huchi in huai tangtawn a hing van leh leitung leh asung a om tengteng leh tuipi leh asung a om tengteng siampa min lou in azekai nawnlouhna ding chi in akichiam hi.
66010007	‍Himahleh angel sagihna in amut ding pengkulpi agin chiang in, huai hun chiang in, “Pathian thuguk, asikha zawlneite kiang a agenkhiak tak hihkim in a-omta ding,” chi in.
66010008	‍Van a kipan a ka aw zak in kei hon houpih a, “Kuan inla, tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh khut a laibuzial neuchik honsa va la in,” achih ka za nawn hi.
66010009	‍Kei, angel kiang ah ka va hoh a, laibuzial neu hon pe ding in akiang ah ka va gen hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “La inla, ne zou vek in; huai in na gil hihkha in chin himahleh na kam ah khuaizu bang in akhum ding,” achi hi.
66010010	‍Huan angel khut a kipan in laibuzial neuchik ka la a, ka ne zou vek a; ka kam ah khuaizu bang in akhum a; huan ka nekzohtak in ka gil hihkhat in ahong om hi.
66010011	‍Huan ka kiang ah, “Mi tampite leh namte leh paute leh kumpipate kiang ah Pathian thusuak na genkholh nawn ngeingei ding ahi,” ahon chi hi.
66011001	Huan sialluang chiang bang tehna chiang khat piak in ka om a; angel in, “Thou inla, Pathian tempul leh maitam leh huai a bete teh in;
66011002	‍tempul huangsung polam ahihleh nusia inla, teh ke'n; Zentelte kiang a piaksa ahih tak ziak in; huan kho siangthou akhenuai un kha sawmli-le-nih sung asikden ding uhi.
66011003	‍Huan ka theihpihtu nihte kiang ah thilhihtheihna ka pe dia, amau sai-ip puan silh in ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmguk thu agenkhol ding uh achi hi.”
66011004	‍Hiaite olive sing nihte leh khawnvak koihna nihte, leitung a Toupa ma a dinghte ahi uhi.
66011005	‍Mi kuapeuh in amau suknat atup ualeh, akam ua kipan a mei hong suakkhia in amelmate akangtum vek dia; kuapeuh in amau hihnat atup ualeh huchibang a thah in a-om ding uhi.
66011006	‍Hiai mite'n athugenkholh sung ua vuah azuklouhna ding in, van khaktheihna anei ua; huan a-ut hunhun ua sisan suaksak ding in tuite tung ah thu anei ua, leitung leng gawtna chiteng a gawt ding in thu anei uhi.
66011007	‍Huan atheihpihna nasep uh azoh chiang un, kokhuk taw nei lou a kipan a hong pawtkhia huai gamsa in amau akidoupih ding a, amau azou dia, athat ding hi.
66011008	Asiluang uh khopi thupi kongzing ah akisial a, huai khalam thu ah Sodom leh Aigupta kichi, kros a Toupa kilhlup a a-omna mah ahi.
66011009	‍Mite leh chite leh paute leh namte lak a kipan mite aluang uh ni thum-le-akim a-en ua, aluang uh han a vui aphal kei uhi.
66011010	‍Huchi in leitung a tengte amaute tung a kisial in akipak ua, kipahna abawl ua; thilpiakte akikhaktuah ua; hiai zawlnei nihte'n amau leitung a tengte athuakgimsak khit tak ziak un.
66011011	‍Huan ni thum-le-akim nung in, Pathian a kipan in hinna hatna amau ah ahong lut a, akhe un adingh uhi; amau mu tengteng tung ah nakpi a launa ahong omta hi.
66011012	‍Van a kipan in aw thupitak aza ua, “Hiai ah hong paitou un,” chi in. Huan amau meipi lak ah van ah apaitou uhi; amelmate un amau amu chiat uhi.
66011013	‍Huai dak in zinling thupitak ahong om a, khopi mun sawm a khen mun khat achim hi. Huai zinling ah mi sangsagih thah in a-om ua; adangte'n alau ua, van a Pathian kiang ah thupina apia uhi.
66011014	‍Tunggikna nihna abeita a; ngai in, tunggikna thumna ahong tung pah ding hi.
66011015	‍Huan angel sagihna in apengkul amut a; van ah aw thupitak in, “Khovel lalgam tuh i Toupa leh a Khrist a ahong hita hi; ama'n tangtawn in vai ahawm ding,” achi uhi.
66011016	‍Upa sawmnih-le-li, laltutphah tung a Pathian ma a tute'n amai ua lei si in Pathian abia uhi.
66011017	“Na tung ah ka kipak uhi, Toupa Pathian Bangkim hihthei, omlel leh omsa leh hong om ding; na thilhihtheihna thupi na lak tak ziak in leh vai na hawm tak ziak in,
66011018	Namte aheh ua, tu in nang thangpaihna ni ahong tung hi, misite vai na hawmsak hun leh na sikha zawlneite leh misiangthoute kiang leh na min kihtate milian leh mineute kiang a kipahman na piakna hun leh leitung hihsete hihsiat a a-om sam hun uh ahong tungta hi,” achi uhi.
66011019	‍Huan van a om Pathian tempul hon in a-om a; atempul sung ah thukhun bawm ahong kimu hi; huchi in khophiate, awte, van-gingte, zinlingte leh gial thupitak in azui ngal hi.
66012001	Van ah chiamtehna thupi leh lamdangtak; numei khat ni a kizem, akhenuai a khapi sikden leh alutung a lallukhu aksi sawm-le-nih khu hong kimu hi.
66012002	Ama'n nau apai a, nauvei leh suakkhe ding natna in akapkhia hi.
66012003	‍Huan van ah chiamtehna dang khat ahong kilang a; ngai in, dragon san lianpi, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei, alutung a lallukhu sagih khu hong kilang hi.
66012004	Amei in van a aksite mun thum a khen mun khat akaikhia a, leitung ah apaikhia a; dragon in huai numei nau nei ding a kisa, aneih chiang a anau nek zoh tum in ama ah adingh hi.

66018018	Amau khopi kang leh halna meikhu amuh chiang un, “Hiai bang kho thupi a-om ngei hiam,” chi in akikou uhi.
66018019	‍Huan alutung ua leivui kibuak in akikou ua, kap leh suun in, “Maizen! Maizen! Kho thupi huai a tuipi a mi longnei tengteng ama hauhsakna ziak a hauhsak in a-om uhi! Dakkal khat sung a amah bangmah lou ahong hih tak mai, achi ding uhi.
66018020	“Aw nang van, amah tung ah kipak unla, Aw nou misiangthoute leh nou sawltakte leh nou zawlneite; na tung ua avaihawmna Pathian in ama tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in kipak un!” achi uhi.
66018021	‍Huan angel hat khat in buhgawina suang lianpi hileh kilawm suang khat adom a, tuipi ah apailut a, “Hichibang in khopi thupi, Babulon nakpi a hihchip in om in chin, muhkhiak nawn louh hial in a-om ding.
66018022	‍Gosem tumte leh lasiamte leh tamngai tumte leh pengkul tumte, na sung ah akiza nawn kei hial ding hi. Khutsiam siamna nei himhim, na sung ah muhkhiak in om nawn kei hial un chin; na sung ah khawl ging akiza nawn sam kei ding hi.
66018023	‍Na sung ah meivak avak nawn kei ding a; mouneipa aw leh mou aw na sung ah akiza nawn kei ding; na sumsinte lah leitung kumpipate ahi ngal ua; na bumsiamna in nam tengteng khem in a-omta uhi!
66018024	“Amah sung ah zawlneite sisan leh misiangthoute sisan leh leitung a thah a omte tengteng sisan akimukhia hi,” achi hi.
66019001	Hiai thilte nung in van ah mipi aw hileh kilawm in, “Hallelujah! Hotdamna leh thupina leh thilhihtheihna i Pathian a ahi;
66019002	avaihawmna adik in akizen hi; kizuaknu thupi leitung a, amingaihna a hihsenu tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in, ama'n asikhate sisan ama tung ah athukta,” achih ka za hi.
66019003	‍“Hallelujah! Huai khopi halna meikhu tangtawn tangtawn in azamtou hi,” chi in akikou nawn uhi.
66019004	‍Upa sawmnih-le-lite leh thil hing lite abokkhup ua, Pathian laltutphah a tupa, “Amen, Hallelujah!” chi in abia uhi.
66019005	‍Huan laltutphah a kipan in aw ahong pawtkhia a, “Nou asikhate aw, na vek un, aneu leh alian, nou amah laute, Pathian phatna pia un,” chi in.
66019006	‍Mipi tampi aw hileh kilawm tui tampi ging bang leh vanpiging bang aw in, “Hallelujah! Toupa i Pathian Bangkim hihthei in vai ahawm ziak in,
66019007	‍nuam ni, nakpitak in kipak ni, amah kiang ah thupina pia in; Belamnou zineih hun ahong tungta hi. Azi leng akisak khit tak ziak in;
66019008	amah puanmalngat hoih leh siangthou a kizepna ding in piak in a-omta, achih ka za hi, tua puanmalngat hoih misiangthoute nasep diktatte ahi.”
66019009	‍Huan angel in ka kiang ah, “Gelh in, Belamnou zineihna nitak ankuang um ding a chial a omte ahampha uhi,” achi hi.
66019010	‍Huan amah be ding in akhebul ah ka puk hi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in; Jesu thu theihpihna kem nangmah unau leh sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in, Jesu thu theihpihna genkholhna kha ahih ziak in,” achi hi.
66019011	‍Huan van kihong ka mu a; ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tuang Ginom leh Dik kichi leng ka mu hi; ama'n dikna a vaihawm in kidouna abawl hi.
66019012	Amit meikuang bang ahi a, alutung ah lallukhu tampi a-om a, min khat amah lou ngal kuamah theih louh kigelh anei hi.
66019013	Amah puan sisan a diah in akizem a; amin, “Pathian Thu,” chih ahi.
66019014	Amah van a om sepaihhon puanmalngat hoih, ngou leh siangthou silh a sakol kang tung a tuang in ahon zui uhi.
66019015	Akam a kipan in namte asatna ding, namsau hiam khat ahong suakkhia a; amau tung ah sikchiang in vai ahawm dia; Pathian Bangkim hihthei hehna lauhuaina uain sukna achil hi.
66019016	Apuan tung leh aphei tung ah min, “KUMPIPATE' KUMPIPA, LEH Toupa TE' Toupa ,” chih akigelh hi.
66019017	‍Huan angel khat ni a dingh ka mu a; amah aw ngaihtak a kikou in, van laizawl a vasa leng tengteng kiang ah, “Hong unla, Pathian nitak an thupi ah hong kikhawm vek un;
66019018	‍Kumpipate sa, sepaih heutute sa, mihatte sa, sakolte sa, atung a tute sa, mi tengteng sa, sikha leh sikhaloute sa leh milian leh mineu sa na nektheihna ding un,” achi hi.
66019019	‍Huai gamsa leh leitung a kumpipate leh asepaihte uh, huai sakol tung a tuangpa leh asepaihte kidoupih ding in ahong kikhawm uhi.
66019020	‍Gamsa mat in a-om a, zawlnei tak lou, ama a chiamtehna hih a gamsa chiamtehna neite leh amah limbete akhempa toh amankhawm a; anih tuak un ahing in meidil, kaat a kang sung ah paihlut in a-om uhi.
66019021	‍Huan adangte huai sakol tung a tupa kam a kipan a hong suak namsau a thah in a-om uhi; vasa tengteng amau sa in gilvah in a-om uhi.
66020001	Huan angel khat van a kipan a hong paikhesuk, akhut a kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi leh khainiang lianpi tawi ka mu hi.
66020002	Ama'n dragon, gulpi tek, diabol leh Setan aman a, kum sangkhat sung a ding in amah ahen hi.
66020003	‍Kum sangkhat achin ma a namte akhem nawnlouhna ding in amah kokhuk taw nei lou ah paihlut in a-om a, akhakkhum a, amah akilhkhum hi; tunung in sawt lou kal amah khah nawn a om ding ahi.
66020004	‍Huan laltutphahte leh atung a tute ka mu a, amaute kiang ah vaihawmna piak in a-om hi; Jesu thu theihsakna ziak leh Pathian thu ziak a angawng uh sattan a omte kha ka mu a, huaite gamsa leh alim beloute, atal ua leh akhut ua achiamtehna neiloute ahi ua; amaute ahong hing ua, Khrist toh kum sangkhat vai ahawm uhi.
66020005	‍Hiai pen thohnawnna masapen ahi. Misi dangte bel kum sangkhat abei mateng ahingkik kei uhi.
66020006	‍Thohnawnna masapen a pangte ahampha un asiangthou uhi; amaute tung a sih nihna in hihtheih aneih louh ziak in; himahleh amau Pathian leh Khrist siampute ahong hi ding ua, kum sangkhat sung amah toh vai ahawm ding uhi.
66020007	‍Huan kum sangkhat abei chiang in, atanna suangkul a kipan Setan khahkhiak in a-om dia,
66020008	‍leitung kil li a om namte, Gog leh Magog khem a amau kidouna mun a pikhawm ding in amah ahong paikhe pah dia; atamdan uh tuipi piaunel bang ahi uhi.
66020009	‍Huan amau leitung vailam khaksuak in apaitou ua, misiangthoute giahphual leh khopi it, akimvel in a-um uhi. Huan van a kipan in mei ahong kesuk a, amaute akangtum vek hi.
66020010	‍Huan amaute khempa diabol gamsa leh zawlnei taklou omna, mei leh kaat dil ah paihlut in a-om uhi; tangtawn tangtawn in sun leh zan in hihnat in a-omta ding uhi.
66020011	‍Huan laltutphah ngou thupi leh atung a tu ka mu a; amai a kipan lei leh van ataimang a, amaute a ding in mun himhim a-om kei hi.
66020012	‍Misite, aneu leh alian, huai laltutphah ma a dinghte ka mu a; laibute akihong a; laibu dang, hinna laibu leng akihong a; misite huai laibute a thil kigelhte a kipan in athilhih bang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi.
66020013	‍Tuipi in asung a om misite ahon pawtsak a; sihna leh misikhua in asung ua misi omte ahon pawtsak ua; mi chiteng athilhih bangbang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi.
66020014	‍Sihna leh misikhua meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi. Hiai meidil pen sih nihna ahi.
66020015	‍Kuapeuh hinna laibu a kigelh amuh louh uh, meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi.
66021001	Huan van masapen leh lei masapen abei tak ziak un van thak leh lei thak ka mu a; tuipi leng a-om nawnta kei hi.
66021002	‍Khopi siangthou, Jerusalem thak, mou apasal a ding a kizem bang a bawlzohsa a om, Pathian a kipan van ahong paikhesuk ka mu hi.
66021003	‍Huan laltutphah a kipan aw thupitak ka zak in, “Ngai in, mihingte lak ah Pathian biakbuk a-om a, amau lak ah ateng dia amau amite ahi ding ua, Pathian mahmah in amaute a-ompih dia, a Pathian uh ahi ding hi.
66021004	‍Huan amit ua kipan in khitui tengteng anulhul dia; sihna a-om nawn kei dia; lusuun leh kah leh natna himhim leng a-om nawn kei ding hi,” achi hi.
66021005	‍Huan laltutphah tung a tupa'n, “Ngai in, thil tengteng ka siam thakta,” achi hi. “Gelh in, hiai thute amuanhuai in adik uhi,” achi hi.
66021006	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Sep zoh ahita. Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp ka hi. Dangtakte kiang ah aman bei in hinna tuikhuk a tui amau ka pe ding hi.
66021007	‍Kuapeuh avualzoupa'n hiai thilte aluah ding; a Pathian ka hi dia, amah ka tapa ahi ding hi.
66021008	‍Himahleh dawilokte leh gingtaloute leh kihhuaite leh tualthatte leh mingaihhatte leh bumhatte leh milim bete leh zuautheite tengteng tan tuh dil, mei leh kaat a kang, sih nihna ahi,” achi hi.
66021009	‍Huan angel sagih belhbu sagih leh gawtna sagih nanungpen tawite lak a khat ahong pai a; kei ahon houpih a, “Hiai ah hong pai in, mou, Belamnou zi ka hon ensak ding,” achi hi.
66021010	Ama'n Kha in tang lian leh sangpi ah ahon pomang a, huchi in khopi siangthou Jerusalem, Pathian a kipan a van a hong paikhesuk ahon ensak a,
66021011	‍Pathian thupina anei a; avakna suangmantam pen, jasper suang, kristal bang in asiang hi.
66021012	‍Kulhbaang thupi leh sangpi anei a; kong sawm-le-nih anei a, huai kongte ah angel sawm-le-nih a-om ua; huai kongtungte ah Israel suan nam sawm-le-nihte min akigelh hi:
66021013	asuahlam ah kongpi thum a-om a; amallam ah kongpi thum, asimlam ah kongpi thum; atumlam ah kongpi thum a-om hi.
66021014	‍Huan khopi kulhbaang in nuaiphah sawm-le-nih anei a, huaite tung ah Belamnou sawltak sawm-le-nihte minte atuang hi.
66021015	‍Huan kei hon houpihpa'n khopi leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte tehna ding in tehna dangka-eng sialluang atawi hi.
66021016	‍Huai khua in ning li anei a, adunglam availam chiachia in alian a; asialluang in khopi ateh a, lou chiing singkhat-le-sangnih ahi a, dunglam leh vailam leh asanlam akikim uhi.
66021017	‍Huan angel in huai kulhbaang mihing tehna dan in ateh a, tong za-le-sawmli-le-li a sah ahi.
66021018	‍Huan akhopi kulhbaang jasper suang a kibawl ahi a; huan akhopi dangka-eng siang, limlang siang bang ahi.
66021019	‍Huai khopi kulhbaang suangphum suangmantam chiteng a zep ahi. Asuangphum khatna jasper suang ahi a; anihna sapphir suang, athumna kalsedoni suang; alina emerald suang;
66021020	angana sardonik suang; agukna sardi suang; asagihna kristolait suang; agiatna beril suang; akuana topaz suang; asawmna krisopras suang; asawm-le-khatna zasinth suang; asawm-le-nihna amethis suang ahi uhi.
66021021	‍Huan kongpi sawm-le-nihte tuikepsuang sawm-le-nihte ahi ua; akongpite tuikepsuang khat chiat a bawl ahi a; khopi kholak dangka-eng siang ahi a, limlang muh paisuak theih bang ahi.
66021022	‍Toupa Pathian Bangkim hihthei leh Belamnou atempul ahih ziak in, huai khopi ah tempul ka mu kei hi.
66021023	‍Huan atung a tanvak ding in huai khopi in ni hiam, kha hiam leng apoimoh kei a, Pathian thupina in atanvak a, Belamnou ameivak uh ahi.
66021024	‍Huai vak ah hotdam namte akhosa ding ua; leitung kumpipate athupina uh toh ahong lut ding uhi.
66021025	‍Bangchi mah in huai kongpite sun a khak in a-om kei ding hi, huai lai a zan a-om louh ding ziak in.
66021026	‍Huai mun ah namte thupina leh zahtakhuaina laklut ahi ding hi.
66021027	‍Bangchi mah in huai ah thilnin hiam, ahihkeileh kihhuai leh zuaubawl himhim leng alut kei ding a; himahleh Belamnou hinna laibu a min gelhte kia alut ding uhi.
66022001	Huan hinna tui siang luanna lui ahon ensak a, huai lui bel kristal bang a siang, Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a pan hong luangkhia ahi.
66022002	‍Huai a kongzing lai, alui lang tuaktuak ah hinna singgah chi sawm-le-nih nei, kha teng a gah a-om a; huai singnahte namte hihdamna ding ahi.
66022003	‍Huan hamsia himhim a-om nawnta kei dia; huai ah Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a-omta ding hi; asikhate'n a-nna asem ding uhi.
66022004	Amaute'n amel amu ding ua; atal uah ama min a-om ding hi.
66022005	‍Huan zan himhim a-om nawn kei dia; khawnvak vak leh nisa vak hiam leng apoimoh nawn kei ding uh; Toupa Pathian in amau vakna apiak ding ziak in; amau tangtawn tangtawn in vai ahawmta ding uhi.
66022006	‍Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, hiai thute amuanhuai un adik uhi; Toupa zawlnei siangthoute Pathian in thil hong om pah mahmah dingte asikhate kiang ah musak ding in a-angel asawl hi.
66022007	‍“Ngai in, Ka hong pai pah ding. Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute zui peuhmah ahampha hi,” achi hi.
66022008	‍Huan kei Johan, hiai thilte zapa leh mupa ka hi. Huchi a ka zak leh ka muhtak in, hiai thilte hon musakpa angel khebul ah be ding in ka puk hi.
66022009	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in, hiai laibu thute kem, na unau zawlneite leh nang sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in,” achi hi.
66022010	Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai laibu a genkholhnate bilhkhum ke'n, ahun anai tak ziak in.
66022011	‍Kuapeuh midiklou in diklouhna hih nalai henla, kuapeuh minin, nin nalai hen; kuapeuh midiktat, diktat nalai henla; kuapeuh Mi Siangthou, siangthou nalai hen,” achi hi.
66022012	‍“Ngai in, ka hong pai pah ding hi; michih athilhih bang zel ua piak ding in ka kiang ah ka kipahman a-om hi.
66022013	Kei Alpha leh Omega, amasapen leh ananungpen, abul leh atawp ka hi.”
66022014	‍Hinna sing ahon zottheihna ding uleh, khopi kongpi a aluttheihna ding ua apuan uh sawpsiangte ahampha uhi.
66022015	Apolam ah uite, bumhatte, mingaihhatte, tualthatte, milim bete leh kuapeuh zuauthu deih a, zuauthu bawlte a-om uhi.
66022016	‍“Kei, Jesu in saptuamte a ding a hiai thilte na kiang ua hon theisak ding in ka angel ka hon sawl hi. David zung leh asuan zingsol aksi vak ka hi,” achi hi.
66022017	‍Kha leh Mou in, “Hong pai in,” achi uhi. Aza peuh in, “Hong pai in,” chi hen. Kuapeuh a-ut in hinna tui aman bei in dawn hen.
66022018	‍Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute za peuh kiang ah ka theisak hi: Mi kuapeuh in hiai thute abehlapleh Pathian in ama tung ah hiai laibu a kigelh gawtnate abehlap ding hi;
66022019	‍huan kuapeuh in hiai genkholhna laibu a thute lakmang aneihleh Pathian in atan ding hiai laibu a kigelh, hinna sing leh khopi siangthou a kipan alamang ding hi.
66022020	‍Hiai thilte theisakpa'n, “Ahi, ka hong pai pah ding hi,” achi hi. Amen! Hong pai in, Toupa Jesu.
66022021	Toupa Jesu hehpihna noute tengteng tung ah om hen, Amen.
